Genesis1:1 Kar chakruok, Nyasaye nochueyo polo gi piny." 
Genesis1:2 Piny ne onge kido, kendo gimoro ne onge e iye. Mudho mandiwa noimo ataro mang’ongo, kendo Roho mar Nyasaye ne wuotho ewi ataro." 
Genesis1:3 Eka Nyasaye nowacho niya, “Ler mondo obedie.” Mi ler nobetie." 
Genesis1:4 Nyasaye noneno ni ler ber, mi ne opoge oa kuom mudho." 
Genesis1:5 Nochako ler ni, Odiechieng’, to mudho nochako ni Otieno. Piny noyuso kendo noru, mi mano nodoko chieng’ mokwongo." 
Genesis1:6 Eka Nyasaye nowacho niya, “Gima pogo pi diriyo mondo obedie.”" 
Genesis1:7 Kuom mano, Nyasaye nochweyo gima nopogo pi mamalo gi pi mapiny, mi nobedo kamano." 
Genesis1:8 Gima nopogo pino nochako ni, Polo. Piny noyuso kendo noru, mi mano nodoko odiechieng’ mar ariyo." 
Genesis1:9 Bang’ mano, Nyasaye nowacho niya, “Pi manie bwo polo mondo ochokre kanyachiel, mondo lowo motwo onen.” Mi nobedo kamano." 
Genesis1:10 Nochako lowo motwo ni, Piny, to pi mane ochokore ne ochako ni, Nam, noneno ni gima nosetimo ber." 
Genesis1:11 Eka nowacho niya, “Gik moko kaka buya gi cham kod kit yien duto ma nyago olemo, mondo otwi e lowo.” Kamano" 
Genesis1:12 gik moko kaka cham kod kit yien duto manyago olemo notwi e lowo, mi Nyasaye noneno ni gima nosetimo ber." 
Genesis1:13 Piny noyuso kendo noru, mi mano nodoko chieng’ mar adek." 
Genesis1:14 Bang’e Nyasaye nowacho niya, “Gik marieny mondo obed e polo, mondo opog odiechieng’ gi otieno, mondo onyis ndalo mitimoe sewni, kod chakruok chwiri gi opon kod higni." 
Genesis1:15 Ginirieny e kor polo, mondo gikel ler e piny.” Kamano," 
Genesis1:16 Nyasaye nochweyo gik marieny ariyo madongo mondo orit odiechieng’, kod otieno. Mane rito odiechieng’ ne duong’ moloyo mane rito otieno. Sulue bende nochueyo." 
Genesis1:17 Noketo gik marieny e polo mondo okel ler ni piny," 
Genesis1:18 kendo mondo orit odiechieng’ kod otieno, ka gipogo ler kuom mudho. Nyasaye noneno ni gima nosetimo ber." 
Genesis1:19 Piny noyuso kendo noru, mi mano nodoko chieng’ mar ang’wen." 
Genesis1:20 Bang’e Nyasaye nowacho niya, “Gik mangima mopogore opogore mondo obed mang’eny e pi, to winy mondo ohu e kor polo.”" 
Genesis1:21 Kuom mano Nyasaye nochueyo rech madongo mae nam, gi gimoro amora modak e pi, kod kit winy duto, mi noneno ni gima nosetimo ber." 
Genesis1:22 Eka noguedhogi kowacho niya, “Gik moko duto manie pi mondo onywolre, kendo opong’ nam. Winy bende mondo omedre.”" 
Genesis1:23 Piny noyuso kendo noru, mi mano nodoko chieng’ mar abich." 
Genesis1:24 Bang’e Nyasaye nowacho niya, “Gik mangima kaka jamni gi le kod gik mamol, mondo onywolre e piny.” Mi nobedo kamano." 
Genesis1:25 Mano e kaka nochueyo jamni kod gik mamol duto. Mi noneno ni gima nosetimo ber. 
Genesis1:26 Eka Nyasaye nowacho niya, “Koro wachue dhano e kido machal kodwa. Enobed gi teko kuom rech gi winy gi jamni kod gik mamol duto.”" 
Genesis1:27 Kamano Nyasaye nochueyo dhano e kido machal kode. Nochueyogi dichwo gi dhako," 
Genesis1:28 mi noguedhogi, kowachonigi niya, “Beduru gi nyithindo mang’eny, kendo upong’ piny.”" 
Genesis1:29 Nyasaye nomedo wacho ni dhano niya, “In amiyi cham kod olembe duto mondo obed chiembi," 
Genesis1:30 to le gi winy kod gik mamol duto, to amiyo oboke mondo ocham.” Mi nobedo kamano." 
Genesis1:31 Eka Nyasaye nong’iyo gik moko duto mane osechueyo, kendo noneno ni gibeyo ahinya. Piny noyuso kendo noru, mi mano nodoko chieng’ mar auchiel." 
Genesis2:1 Kamano Ruoth Nyasaye notieko chueyo polo gi piny kod gik moko duto mantie. 
Genesis2:2 Chieng’ mar auchiel Nyasaye notieko gik moko duto mane otimo, eka noweyo tijene duto mi oyueyo chieng’ mar abiriyo." 
Genesis2:3 Noguedho chieng’ mar abiriyo, kendo nowale mondo obed maler, nikech chieng’no ema noyueyoe bang’ chueyo gik moko duto." 
Genesis2:4 Mano e kaka nochue polo gi piny. E kinde mane Ruoth Nyasaye chueyo polo gi piny," 
Genesis2:5 ne onge buya kata yien motwi e lowo, nikech ne pok ooro koth e piny, to bende ne onge dhano mane nyalo pure." 
Genesis2:6 To kata obedo ni koth ne onge kamano, pi ne wuok e lowo, kendo ne miyo piny bedo mangich." 
Genesis2:7 Eka Ruoth Nyasaye nokawo lowo monywaso, kendo ochweyogo dhano. Nokudho much ngima e um dhano, mi dhano nobedo gi ngima." 
Genesis2:8 Bang’e Ruoth Nyasaye noloso puodho e Eden, yo wuokchieng’, mi oketoe dhano mane osechueyo." 
Genesis2:9 Nomiyo yien mopogore opogore odongo e puodhono, ma moko lombo wang’, kendo moko nyago olemo michamo. To yath manyago olemb ngima, kod mago manyago olemo ma nyiso ber gi rach, noketo e dier puodho." 
Genesis2:10 Aora moro ne mol e puodhono, kawuok Eden, mondo omiye ng’ich, kendo bang’ wuok e puodho nopogore, mobedo aore ang’wen." 
Genesis2:11 Aora mokwongo iluongo ni, Pishon. En e aora molworo piny Havila," 
Genesis2:12 kuma dhahabu maber kod dwogo miluongo ni bedelium, gi kite ma nengogi tek miluongo ni oniks, yudoree." 
Genesis2:13 Aora mar ariyo iluongo ni Gihon, mamol kolworo piny Kush duto." 
Genesis2:14 Aora mar adek iluongo ni Tigris, mamol yo wuokchieng’ mar Asuria. Aora mar ang’wen to iluongo ni Yufrate." 
Genesis2:15 Eka Ruoth Nyasaye nokawo dhano, moketo e puoth Eden mondo opure kendo orite." 
Genesis2:16 Nowachone niya, “Oyieni chamo olemb yien duto manie puodho" 
Genesis2:17 mak mana olemo manyiso ber gi rach ema kik icham, nikech chieng’ michame to initho.”" 
Genesis2:18 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho niya, “Ok ber ka dhano obet kende. Omiyo abiro miye ng’ama konye.”" 
Genesis2:19 Kuom mano, nokawo lowo, mochueyogo le mae thim kod winy duto, mi nokelogi ni dhano mondo ochakgi nying’, kendo nying’ mane dhano omiyo moro ka moro ema nobedo nyinge." 
Genesis2:20 Kamano Adam nomiyo jamni gi le mae thim kod winy duto nyinggi, to ne pod onge ng’ama konye kata madak kode." 
Genesis2:21 Kuom mano, Ruoth Nyasaye nomiyo nindo matut otero Adam, kendo kane onindo, Nyasaye nogolo ng’etne achiel, mi nochako odino kama nogoloe ng’edno." 
Genesis2:22 Eka noloso dhako gi ng’edno, mokele ir Adam." 
Genesis2:23 Mi Adam nowacho niya, “Thoo! ma e kita, chogo moa kuom choka, ringruok moa kuom ringra. Ibiro luonge ni ‘Dhako’, nikech noa kuom dhano.”" 
Genesis2:24 Ma emomiyo ng’ato weyo wuon gi min, to padore kuom chiege, kendo gidoko ringruok achiel." 
Genesis2:25 Giduto ne gin duge, to kata kamano ne ok gineno ka gin gi wichkuot." 
Genesis3:1 Thuol ne riek moloyo le duto mane Ruoth Nyasaye osechueyo. Nopenjo dhako niya, “Bende en adieri ni Nyasaye nowacho ni kik ucham olemb yath moro amora manie puodhoni?”" 
Genesis3:2 Dhako nodwoke niya, “Wanyalo chamo olemb yien duto manie puodho," 
Genesis3:3 to mak mana olemb yath manie dier puodho ema ok wanyal chamo. Nyasaye nokwerowa ni kik wacham olemb yadhno, kendo kik wamule, nimar kwatimo kamano, to wanatho.”" 
Genesis3:4 Thuol nodwoke niya, “Ngang’! Ok unutho." 
Genesis3:5 Nyasaye nowacho kamano nikech ong’eyo ni ka uchame to wang’u noyepi, mi unubed machal kode, kendo unung’e ber gi rach.”" 
Genesis3:6 Dhako noneno ni olemb yadhno ber chamo, kendo lombo wang’, mi noparo kaka onyalo miyo ng’ato doko mariek. Kuom mano, nopono olembe moko mochamo. Chwore bende nomiyo moko, mochamo." 
Genesis3:7 Kane gisechamo olembego wengegi noyepo mi ne gifwenyo ni gin duge. Omiyo ne gitwang’o oboke, mi gigeng’orego." 
Genesis3:8 Adam gi chiege nowinjo Ruoth Nyasaye kawuotho e puodho kar ang’ich welo, mi ne gipondone e yien manie puodho." 
Genesis3:9 To Ruoth Nyasaye noluongo Adam, mopenje niya, “In kanye?”" 
Genesis3:10 Adam nodwoke niya, “Aye awinjo kiwuotho e puodho, to luoro nomaka, mi apondo, nikech an duk.”" 
Genesis3:11 Nyasaye nopenje niya, “Ng’a monyisi ni in duk? Koso isechamo olemo mane akweri ni kik icham?”" 
Genesis3:12 To Adam nodwoke niya, “Dhako mane imiya mondo okonya, ema nomiya olemo mondo acham, mi nachamo.”" 
Genesis3:13 Eka Ruoth Nyasaye nopenjo dhako ni, “Ang’o momiyo nitimo kamano?” Nodwoke niya, “Thuol ema nowuonda, machamo olemono.”" 
Genesis3:14 Eka Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni thuol niya, “Gima isetimoni, omiyo okuong’i moloyo jamni duto, kendo moloyo le duto. Inilag gi bund iyi, kendo inicham lowo, ndalo duto mag ngimani." 
Genesis3:15 Anaket sigu e kindi gi dhako, kendo e kind kothi gi kothe. Nyikwaye noto wiyi, to in nika ofunj tiendgi.”" 
Genesis3:16 Eka nowacho ni dhako niya, “Anamedni chandruok ka in gi ich, kendo muoch nokayi kinyuol. Kata kamano inigomb mondo ibed gi chwori, to enobed ng’ama chiki.”" 
Genesis3:17 Eka Nyasaye nowacho ni Adam niya, “Okuong’ lowo nikech in, nimar niwinjo gima chiegi nowachoni, michamo olemo mane akweri ni kik icham. Koro inibed kitiyo matek, kuom ngimani duto, mondo lowo onyagni chiemo." 
Genesis3:18 Enonyagni kuthe gi riegni kod buya, kendo inicham mana alote mae thim." 
Genesis3:19 Inicham kuon gi luya, nyaka idog e lowo, nikech kanyo ema ne ogolie. In lowo, kendo lowo ema nidogie.”" 
Genesis3:20 Adam nochako chiege ni Hawa, nikech ne en min ji duto." 
Genesis3:21 Ruoth Nyasaye noloso ni Adam gi chiege lewni mag pien, morwakogigo." 
Genesis3:22 Eka Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho niya, “Koro dhano osedoko machal kodwa, nikech oseng’eyo ber gi rach. Kik yiene mondo ocham olemb yadh ngima, nimar dipo kobet mangima nyaka chieng’.”" 
Genesis3:23 Kuom mano, Ruoth Nyasaye noriembe e puoth Eden, motere mondo odhi opur lowo mane osechweyego." 
Genesis3:24 Kamano noriembo dhano, mi noketo gik moko machalo gi malaika miluongo ni kerubi kaachiel gi ligangla mamil kendo rundore koni gi koni, yo wuokchieng’ mar puoth Eden, mondo ogeng’ ni ji madwaro dhi but yath mar ngima." 
Genesis4:1 Adam noriwore gi Hawa chiege, mi Hawa nomako ich, monywolo Kain. Eka nowacho niya, “Aseyudo wuowi kuom ng’wono mar Ruoth Nyasaye.”" 
Genesis4:2 Bang’e nonywolo Habil omin Kain. Habil nodoko jakwath, to Kain nodoko japur." 
Genesis4:3 Chieng’ moro Kain nokelo cham moko ma nosekayo e puothe, mochiwo ni Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Genesis4:4 Habil bende nokelo jambe ma nokwong nywol. Noyang’o mochiwo bochegi ni Ruoth Nyasaye. Ruoth Nyasaye nobedo mamor gi Habil kod chiwone," 
Genesis4:5 to nodagi Kain kod chiwone. Omiyo mirima nomako Kain, mokecho ahinya." 
Genesis4:6 Ruoth Nyasaye nopenje niya, “Ang’o momiyo ikecho, kendo wang’i ojuol?" 
Genesis4:7 Kitimo maber, donge diyieni? To kitimo marach, to richo okichore e dhoodi, mondo oloyi. To in nyaka item matek mondo iloye.”" 
Genesis4:8 Kain nowacho ni Habil omin mare ni mondo gidhi giba, to ka ne gisedhi e thim kuma bor gi dala, nogoyo Habil monego." 
Genesis4:9 Bang’e Ruoth Nyasaye nopenje niya, “Ere Habil owadu?” Kain nodwoke niya, “Ok ang’eyo. An jakwadhe ma dang’e kuma entie?”" 
Genesis4:10 Ruoth Nyasaye nopenje kendo niya, “Ang’o misetimoni? Winji! Remb owadu misechuero ywakna e lowo." 
Genesis4:11 Omiyo koro in ng’ama okuong’, kendo oriemb e lowo ma nong’amo dhoge, momadho remb owadu misechwerono." 
Genesis4:12 Chakre tinende, kipuro lowo, to ok nonyagni cham, kendo inibed jabayo ma onge gi kar dakne e piny ka.”" 
Genesis4:13 Kain nodwoko Ruoth Nyasaye niya, “Isemiya kum mohinga." 
Genesis4:14 Iseriemba e nyimi, kendo e lowoni. Anabed jabayo ma onge kama odakie e pinyni, kendo ng’ato ang’ata moyuda nyalo nega.”" 
Genesis4:15 To Ruoth Nysaye nodwoke niya, “Ooyo, ng’at monego Kain nochulne kuor nyadibiriyo.” Omiyo Ruoth Nyasaye noketo kido moro kuom Kain ni mondo ng’at ang’ata moromo kode kik nege." 
Genesis4:16 Eka Kain noa e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, modhi odak e piny miluongo ni Nod, yo wuokchieng’ mar Eden." 
Genesis4:17 Kain noriwore gi chiege, mi chiege nomako ich, monywolo Enoka. Eka Kain nogero dala maduong’ mochako Enoka wuode." 
Genesis4:18 Enoka nonywolo Irad, to Irad nonywolo Mehujael. Mehujael nonywolo Methushael, to Methushael nonywolo Lamek." 
Genesis4:19 Lamek nokendo mon ariyo, ma nyinggi Ada gi Zila." 
Genesis4:20 Ada nonywolo Jabal mane kwar jokwath modak e hema. 
Genesis4:21 Ne en gi owadgi ma nyinge Jubal, mane kwar joma goyo thum gi asili." 
Genesis4:22 To Zila chi Lameck machielo nonywolo Tubal-Kain, mane kwar jotheth mula gi nyinyo. Ne en gi nyamin mare ma nyinge Naama." 
Genesis4:23 Lameck nowacho ni monde niya, “Ada gi Zila, winjuru dwonda. Monda, winjuru gima adwaro wacho. Asenego ng’ato nikech nohinya. Asenego wuowi nikech nogoya." 
Genesis4:24 Ng’at ma nohiny Kain, nochulne kuor nyadibiriyo, to ng’at ma chieng’ nohinya, nochulne kuor nyadi piero abiriyo gabiriyo!”" 
Genesis4:25 Adam nochako oriwore gi chiege, mi chiege nonywolo wuowi moro, mochako ni Seth, (tiende ni, mich,) nikech Nyasaye nosemiye wuowino kar Habil mane Kain onego." 
Genesis4:26 Seth bende nonywolo wuowi mochako ni Enos. E kindeno ema ne ji ochako luongoe Nyasaye ni Jehova ka gilame. 
Genesis5:1 Ma e kaka ochan tienge mag nyikwa Adam: Kane Nyasaye ochueyo dhano machal kode owuon. 
Genesis5:2 Nochueyogi dichwo gi dhako, kendo chieng’no ema noguedhogie, mochakogi ni, ‘Dhano’." 
Genesis5:3 Adam ne jahigni mia achiel gi piero adek kane onywolo wuowi machal kode, mochako ni Seth." 
Genesis5:4 Bang’ mano, Adam nochako odak kuom higni mia aboro, kendo nomedo nywolo nyithindo moko." 
Genesis5:5 Notho ka en jahigni mia ochiko gi piero adek. 
Genesis5:6 Seth ne jahigni mia achiel gabich kane onywolo Enos wuode. 
Genesis5:7 Bang’e nochako odak kuom higni mia aboro gi apar gabich, kendo nomedo nywolo nyithindo moko." 
Genesis5:8 Notho ka en jahigni mia ochiko gi apar gariyo. 
Genesis5:9 Enos ne jahigni piero ochiko kane onywolo Kenan wuode. 
Genesis5:10 Bang’e nochako odak kuom higni mia aboro gi apar gabich, kendo nomedo nywolo nyithindo moko." 
Genesis5:11 Notho ka en jahigni mia ochiko gabich. 
Genesis5:12 Kenan ne jahigni piero abiriyo kane onywolo Mahalalel wuode. 
Genesis5:13 Bang’e nochako odak kuom higni mia aboro, kendo nomedo nywolo nyithindo moko." 
Genesis5:14 Notho ka ne en jahigni mia ochiko gi apar. 
Genesis5:15 Mahalalel ne jahigni piero auchiel gabich kane onywolo Jared wuode. 
Genesis5:16 Bang’e nochako odak kuom higni mia aboro, kendo nomedo nywolo nyithindo moko." 
Genesis5:17 Notho ka en jahigni mia aboro gi piero ochiko gabich. 
Genesis5:18 Jared ne jahigni mia achiel gi piero auchiel gariyo kane onywolo Enoka wuode. 
Genesis5:19 Bang’e nochako odak kuom higni mia aboro, kendo nomedo nywolo nyithindo moko," 
Genesis5:20 nyaka nodoko jahigni mia ochiko gi piero auchiel gariyo. 
Genesis5:21 Enoka ne jahigni piero auchiel gabich kane onywolo Methusela wuode. 
Genesis5:22 Bang’e nowuotho gi Nyasaye kuom higni mia adek, kendo nomedo nywolo nyithindo moko," 
Genesis5:23 nyaka nodoko jahigni mia adek gi piero auchiel gabich. 
Genesis5:24 Bang’ wuotho gi Nyasaye kamano, ne ok ochak onene kendo, nikech Nyasaye nokawe." 
Genesis5:25 Methusela ne jahigni mia achiel gi piero aboro gabiriyo kane onywolo Lameck wuode. 
Genesis5:26 Bang’e nochako odak kuom higni mia abiriyo gi piero aboro gariyo, kendo nomedo nywolo nyithindo moko." 
Genesis5:27 Notho ka ne en jahigni mia ochiko gi piero auchiel gochiko. 
Genesis5:28 Lameck ne jahigni mia achiel gi piero aboro gariyo kane onywolo wuowi. 
Genesis5:29 Nowacho niya, “Wuowini nodwog chunywa kuom tich matek moseket kuomwa nikech kuong’ ma Ruoth Nyasaye osekuong’ogo lowo.” Kuom mano nochake ni Nowa." 
Genesis5:30 Bang’e nochako odak kuom higni mia abich gi piero ochiko gabich. 
Genesis5:31 Notho ka en jahigni mia abiriyo gi piero abiriyo gabiriyo. 
Genesis5:32 Kane Nowa osedoko jahigni mia abich, nonywolo yawuote adek, ma nyinggi Shem gi Ham kod Jafeth." 
Genesis6:1 Kane ji ochako medore e piny, kendo nywolo nyiri," 
Genesis6:2 yawuot Nyasaye noneno ni nyi dhano beyo, omiyo ng’ato ka ng’ato nokendo nyako mohero kuomgi." 
Genesis6:3 Eka Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho niya, “Mucha ma chiwo ngima ok nodag e chuny dhano nyaka chieng’, nikech dhano en mana ringruok matow. Chakre tinendeni, onge ng’ama nodag moloyo higni mia achiel gi piero ariyo.”" 
Genesis6:4 E ndalogo kod ndalo moluwo mano, ne nitie joma rabede miwuoro e piny, mane nyi dhano kod yawuot Nyasaye onywolo. Jogo ne thuondi kendo ne joma nigi huma e ndalo machon-go." 
Genesis6:5 Kane Ruoth Nyasaye oneno ni dhano osetimo richo mang’eny e piny, kendo chunye gombo mana timo richo pile," 
Genesis6:6 noparo ni kara ne ok owinjore ochue dhano, kendo kete e piny. Omiyo chunye nodoko malit ahinya," 
Genesis6:7 mowacho niya, “Abiro nego ji duto ma asechueyo kamoro amora ma gintie, kaachiel gi le kod winy bende, nikech daber ka dine ok achueyogi.”" 
Genesis6:8 To Nowa e mane Ruoth Nyasaye morgo. 
Genesis6:9 Ma e sigand Nowa: Nowa ne en ng’at makare. En kende ema ne oonge gi ketho e ndalogo, kendo nowuotho gi Nyasaye." 
Genesis6:10 Ne en kod yawuowi adek ma nyinggi Shem gi Ham kod Jafeth. 
Genesis6:11 Nyasaye noneno ni piny duto osekethore, kendo opong’ gi timbe mahundu." 
Genesis6:12 Noneno ni piny duto osenjawni, nikech ji duto nodak e richo." 
Genesis6:13 Eka nowacho ni Nowa niya, “Asechano ni mondo atiek dhano. Abiro negogi duto, nikech piny opong’ gi timbegi maricho." 
Genesis6:14 Omiyo los yie gi yien mabeyo, kipogo iye udi, kendo imwone gi odok oko gi iye." 
Genesis6:15 Borne mondo obed mita mia ariyo, to lachne mita piero adek, tutne to mita piero ariyo." 
Genesis6:16 Ketne tado, kiweyo thuolo moromo nus mita e kind tado kod kore. Bende ketne dhoot, kendo ipog iye gorofa adek." 
Genesis6:17 “Abiro kelo pi e piny mondo oneg gik mangima duto. Gimoro amora manie piny biro tho," 
Genesis6:18 to mak mana in ema natim kodi singruok. Inidonj e yieno gi chiegi kod yawuoti gi mondgi," 
Genesis6:19 kendo inikaw le ma dichwo gi madhako kuom kit le duto, mondo ires ngimagi." 
Genesis6:20 Kuom kido duto mag winy gi mag le kod gik mamol, ariyo ariyo nodonj kodi e yie, mondo ores ngimagi." 
Genesis6:21 Kaw kit chiemo duto, ikan mondo obed chiembu kod chiemb gik man obed kodigo.”" 
Genesis6:22 Nowa notimo gik moko duto mane Nyasaye ochike. 
Genesis7:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Nowa niya, “Donj e yie kod joodi duto, nikech aseneno ni in kendi e ng’at makare e nyima kuom ji duto manie piny." 
Genesis7:2 Kaw le michamo machwo abiriyo gi mamon abiriyo, kod ma ok cham ariyo ariyo," 
Genesis7:3 kaachiel gi kit winy, machwo abiriyo gi mamon abiriyo, mondo kik kitgi rum e piny." 
Genesis7:4 Bang’ ndalo abiriyo abiro kelo koth e piny kuom ndalo piero ang’wen, odiechieng’ gotieno, mi anatiek gik moko duto mangima masechweyo.”" 
Genesis7:5 Nowa notimo gik moko duto mane Ruoth Nyasaye ochike. 
Genesis7:6 Nowa ne jahigni mia auchiel kane pi opong’o piny. 
Genesis7:7 Nodonjo e yie gi chiege kod yawuote gi mond yawuote mondo gikwo. 
Genesis7:8 Le ka le ma dichwo gi madhako, michamo kod ma ok cham, kaachiel gi winy kod gik mamol" 
Genesis7:9 ariyo ariyo bende nodonjo kode e yie, kaka Nyasaye nochike." 
Genesis7:10 To bang’ ndalo abiriyo pi nochako pong’o piny. 
Genesis7:11 Due apar gabiriyo, due mar ariyo, kane Nowa jahigni mia auchiel, sokni duto moa e nam mang’ongo manie bwo piny nomuoch, kendo dirise duto mag polo noyawore," 
Genesis7:12 mi koth nochue e piny kuom ndalo piero ang’wen, odiechieng’ gotieno." 
Genesis7:13 Odiechiengno ema Nowa gi chiege kod yawuote adek ma nyinggi Ham gi Seth kod Jafeth, kaachiel gi mondgi, nodonjo e yie," 
Genesis7:14 kod kit gik moko duto, kaka le gi jamni gi gik mamol kod winy." 
Genesis7:15 Kamano Nowa nodonjo e yie gi gik mangima ariyo ariyo, ma dichwo gi madhako" 
Genesis7:16 kaka Nyasaye nochike. Eka Ruoth Nyasaye nolorone dhoot. 
Genesis7:17 Piny notimo ataro kuom ndalo piero ang’wen, kendo yie ne lewore e wi pi." 
Genesis7:18 Bang’e pi nomedore, kendo yie nosiko ka kwang’." 
Genesis7:19 Pi nogingore malich, moimo gode maboyo duto." 
Genesis7:20 Kane oseimo godego, nomedo gingore maromo mita abiriyo." 
Genesis7:21 Ji duto notho, kaaachiel gi gik mangima dutoi manie piny, kaka winy gi jamni gi le kod gik mamol." 
Genesis7:22 Kamano gik moko duto mangima manie piny notho. 
Genesis7:23 Nyasaye ema notieko gik mangimago duto. Dhano gi jamni gi le kod winy, duto notho e piny ngima. Nowa kende gi joma ne ni kode e yie ema nokwo." 
Genesis7:24 Kane pi osemedo pong’o piny kuom ndalo mia achiel gi piero abich," 
Genesis8:1 Nyasaye noparo Nowa kaachiel gi le kod jamni mane en go e yie omiyo notugo yamo okudho e piny, mi pi nochako duono." 
Genesis8:2 Sokni moa e nam mang’ongo manie bwo piny nodinore, kendo dirise mag polo nolor, mi koth nochok." 
Genesis8:3 Pi noduono mos mos, kendo bang’ ndalo mia achiel gi piero abich nodok chien." 
Genesis8:4 Chieng’ due apar gabiriyo, due mar abiriyo, yie nomoko e wi got moro e piny Ararat." 
Genesis8:5 Pi to nomedo mana duono nyaka due mar apar. To chieng’ mokwongo mar due mar aparno, wi gode nochako limbo." 
Genesis8:6 Bang’ ndalo piero angwen, Nowa noyawo dirisa mar yie mane oloso," 
Genesis8:7 kendo nooro agak mondo ong’ego ka pi osedok chien, to agak nohuyo e kor polo nyaka piny notwo." 
Genesis8:8 Bang’ ndalo abiriyo, nooro akuru mondo ong’ego ka koro pi osedok chien." 
Genesis8:9 To ne onge kama akuru nyalo piyoe, nikech pi ne pod oimo piny duto, omiyo noduogo ir Nowa e yie. Kuom mano Nowa norieyo bade oko mogame, kendo odwoke ei yie." 
Genesis8:10 Norito kuom ndalo abiriyo eka nochako ooro akuruno. 
Genesis8:11 Kane akuru oduogo godhiambo, noting’o pot zeituni e dhoge. Mano nonyiso Nowa ni kare pi osemedo dok chien." 
Genesis8:12 Norito kendo kuom ndalo abiriyo moko, eka nochako ooro akuruno, to koro akuru ne ok ochako oduogo e yie kendo." 
Genesis8:13 Chieng’ due achiel, due mokwongo e higa mane Nowa odokoe jahigni mia auchiel gachiel, pi norumo, kendo kane Nowa oelo wi yie, nong’iyo oko, noyudo ka piny otwo." 
Genesis8:14 To chieng’ due piero ariyo gabiriyo, due mar ariyo, ema piny duto notwoe chuth." 
Genesis8:15 Eka Nyasaye nowacho ni Nowa niya," 
Genesis8:16 “Wuog e yie gi chiegi kod yawuoti kod mondgi. 
Genesis8:17 Le gi winy kod gik mamol duto bende igol oko, mondo ginywolre, gipong’ piny.”" 
Genesis8:18 Omiyo Nowa nowuok e yie gi chiege kod yawuote gi mond yawuote. 
Genesis8:19 Le duto gi jamni duto kod winy duto, gi gimoro amora mamol e lowo, bende nowuok e yie ka kit gimoro ka gimoro luwore kendgi." 
Genesis8:20 Eka Nowa nogero ni Ruoth Nyasaye kendo-mar-misango, mi nokawo kit le ka le michamo kod kit winyo ka winyo michamo, motimogo ni Ruoth Nyasaye misango miwang’o pep." 
Genesis8:21 Kane Ruoth Nyasaye owinjo suya mamit, nowacho e chunye niya, “Timbe dhano ok nomi akuong’ piny kendo, nikech aneno ni paro mag dhano richo, chakre nywolne. Bende ok nachak atiek gik mangima kaka asetimoni.”" 
Genesis8:22 “Chuoyo gi keyo, koyo gi liet, oro gi chwiri, kod odiechieng’ gi otieno, ok nobed maonge nyaka chop giko piny.”" 
Genesis9:1 Nyasaye noguedho Nowa gi yawuote, mowacho nigi niya, “Medreuru mondo upong’ piny." 
Genesis9:2 Le duto mae piny, kod winy duto mae polo, gi gik moko duto mamol e lowo, kaachiel gi rech mae nam, noluoru, kendo aketogi e luetu." 
Genesis9:3 Gimoro amora man gi ngima, kendo mawuotho, nobed chiembu. Kaka ne amiyou alote, e kaka koro amiyou gigo duto." 
Genesis9:4 To mak mana ni kik ucham gimoro mapok rembe ochuer piny, nikech remo e ngima." 
Genesis9:5 Ka remb dhano ochuer, to nachul kuor, bed le, kata dhano wadgi, ema onege.”" 
Genesis9:6 “Ng’at monego dhano, en bende nyaka nege, nikech Nyasaye nochueyo dhano e kite owuon." 
Genesis9:7 To un, medreuru mondo upong’ piny duto kendo uriti.”" 
Genesis9:8 Nyasaye nomedo wacho ni Nowa gi yawuote niya," 
Genesis9:9 “Koro atimo kodu singruok, kaachiel gi nyikwau," 
Genesis9:10 kod gik mangima duto man kodu bende, kaka winy gi jamni gi le kod gimoro amora mosewuok e yie." 
Genesis9:11 Singruok matimo kodu e ma: Onge chieng’ moro kendo, ma pi nokethie piny gi gik mangima mantie.”" 
Genesis9:12 Eka Nyasaye nowacho kendo niya, “Koro aketo lihudu mara e boche polo, mondo obed ranyisi mar singruok ma asetimo kodu kaachiel gi gik moko duto mangima." 
Genesis9:13 Enobed ranyisi mar singruok masetimo ni piny duto. 
Genesis9:14 Kinde moro amora ma amiyoe piny odudo, mi lihudu ochung’ e boche polo," 
Genesis9:15 to anapar singruok masetimo kodu kaachiel gi le duto ni pi ok nochak oketh gik mangima duto. 
Genesis9:16 Ka lihudu ochung’ e boche polo, to anane, kendo anapar singruokna mosiko e kinda kod gik mangima duto manie piny.”" 
Genesis9:17 Nowacho ni Nowa niya, “Mano e ranyisi mar singruok matimo ni gik mangima duto manie piny.”" 
Genesis9:18 Yawuot Nowa manowuok e yiego ne gin Shem gi Ham kod Jafeth. Ham ne wuon Kanaan," 
Genesis9:19 Yawuot Nowa adekgi ema nobedo kwere ji duto manie piny ngima. 
Genesis9:20 Nowa ne en japur, kendo en ema nokwongo pidho mzabibu, mi olosogo divai." 
Genesis9:21 Nomadho divai momer, monindo duk e hembe." 
Genesis9:22 To Ham wuon Kanaan noneno dug wuon, mi nodhi onyiso owetene ariyo mane ni oko." 
Genesis9:23 Kane Shem gi Jafeth owinjo wachno, ne gikawo nanga, mi giketo e gokgi, kendo ne giwuotho gi kang’egi, mi giumo dug wuon-gi. Ne giloko wigi mondo kik gine duge." 
Genesis9:24 Kane Nowa ochiew bang’ mer, kendo ne ofwenyo gima ne wuode matin otimone," 
Genesis9:25 nowacho niya, “Okwong’ Kanaan, kendo obed misumba owetene.”" 
Genesis9:26 Eka nomedo wacho niya “Ruoth Nyasaye oguedh hemb Shem, to Kanaan obed misumba Shem" 
Genesis9:27 Nyasaye mondo omed Jafeth, kendo nyikwaye mondo odag gi joka Shem. To Kanaan obed misumba Jafeth.”" 
Genesis9:28 Kane pi oseketho piny, Nowa nochako odak kendo kuom higni mia adek," 
Genesis9:29 eka notho kane en jahigni mia ochiko gi piero abich. 
Genesis10:1 Nyikwa Nowa mane yawuote ma Shem gi Ham kod Jafeth onywolo kane pi oseketho piny e magi: 
Genesis10:2 Jafeth nonywolo Gomer gi Magog gi Madai gi Javan gi Tubal gi Meshak kod Tiras. 
Genesis10:3 To Gomer nonywolo Ashkenaz gi Rifeth kod Togarma. 
Genesis10:4 Javan nonywolo Elisha gi Tarshish gi Kitim kod jo-Rodan. 
Genesis10:5 Kuomgi ema ogendni modak e dho nembe kod chulni nojakoree kadhi e pinjegi giwegi, kuma dhoot ka dhoot, kendo oganda ka oganda wachoe dhogi." 
Genesis10:6 Ham nonywolo Kush gi Misri gi Put kod Kanaan. 
Genesis10:7 To Kush nonywolo Seba gi Havila gi Sabta gi Raama kod Sabteka. To Raama nonywolo Sheba gi Dedan. 
Genesis10:8 Kush ne wuon Nimrod bende. Nimrod ema nokwongo bet ruoth e piny. 
Genesis10:9 Ne en jadwar maratego e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye. Mano emomiyo ipako ng’ato ni “Jadwar maratego e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye ka Nimrod.” 
Genesis10:10 Piny Nimrod mokwongo noting’o Babel gi Erek kod Akad. Miego duto ne nie piny Shinar. 
Genesis10:11 Nodar kuno, modhi e piny Ashur, kuma nogeroe Nineve gi Rehobothir gi Kala" 
Genesis10:12 kod Resen, dala maduong’ manie kind Nineve gi Kala." 
Genesis10:13 Nyikwa Misri ne gin jo-Lud gi jo-Anam gi jo-Lehab gi jo-Naftu 
Genesis10:14 gi jo-Pathrus gi jo-Kaslu kod jo-Kaftor ma jo-Filistia nowuok kuomgi. 
Genesis10:15 Kanaan nonywolo yawuowi ariyo. Ne gin Sidon, ma wuode ma kayo, kod Heth." 
Genesis10:16 Nyikwaye ne gin jo-Jebus gi jo-Amor gi jo-Girgash 
Genesis10:17 gi jo-Hivi gi jo-Harki gi jo-Sini 
Genesis10:18 gi jo-Zemar kod jo-Hamath. 
Genesis10:19 Bang’e dhout jo-Kanaan nolandore, mi tong’ pinygi nochakore Sidon kochomo Gerar nyaka Gaza, kendo nokadho Sodom gi Gomora mochopo Adma gi Zeboim nyaka Lasha." 
Genesis10:20 Mago e nyikwa Ham, koluwore gi dhoutgi kod pinjegi, ka dhoot ka dhoot wacho dhogi giwegi." 
Genesis10:21 Shem mane kwar jo-Eber kod mane owadgi Jafeth maduong’, bende ne nigi nyithindo." 
Genesis10:22 Nonywolo Elam gi Ashur gi Arpaksad gi Lud kod Aram. 
Genesis10:23 To Aram nonywolo Huz gi Hul gi Gether kod Mash. 
Genesis10:24 Arpaksad nonywolo Shela, to Shela nonywolo Eber." 
Genesis10:25 Eber nonywolo yawuowi ariyo; wuode makayo nochak ni Peleg, nikech e ndalone ema nopogie piny, to owadgi ne nyinge Joktan." 
Genesis10:26 Joktan nonywolo Almodad gi Shelef gi Hazamoth gi Jera," 
Genesis10:27 gi Hadoram gi Huzal gi Dikla 
Genesis10:28 gi Obal gi Abimael gi Sheba 
Genesis10:29 gi Ofir gi Havila kod Jobad. Jogo duto ne joka Joktan. 
Genesis10:29 gi Ofir gi Havila kod Jobad. Jogo duto ne joka Joktan. 
Genesis10:30 Pinygi nochakore Mesha kochomo Shefar nyaka gode man yo wuok chieng’. 
Genesis10:31 Mago e nyikwa Shem, kaluwore gi dhoutgi kod pinjegi, to dhoot ka dhoot wacho dhogi giwegi." 
Genesis10:32 Giduto ne gin dhout yawuot Nowa, kaluwore gi anywolagi kod pinjegi, kendo gin ema ne ginywolo ogendini mopogore opogore mae piny bang’ ataro." 
Genesis11:1 E kinde mokwongo ji duto mae piny ne wacho mana dhok achiel, kendo ne gikonyore gi weche machal." 
Genesis11:2 Kane giwuotho e yo wuok chieng’, ne gichopo e pap manie piny Shinar, mi ne gidak kuno." 
Genesis11:3 Bang’e ne giporo wach niya, “Walosuru matafari kendo wawang’gi mochiek.” Ne gikonyore gi matafari kar kite, kendo lam kar simit kuom gedo." 
Genesis11:4 Bang’e ne giwacho niya, “Koro wageruru dala maduong’ man gi gorofa mabor mochopo nyaka e polo, mondo walos nyingwa, kik wabed ji moke e kor piny.”" 
Genesis11:5 Eka Ruoth Nyasaye nolor piny mondo one dala kod gorofa mabor mane dhano osegero," 
Genesis11:6 mi nowacho niya, “Dhano en oganda achiel mawacho mana dhok achiel, kendo gima osechako timoni nyiso ni onge gimoro amora ma notame timo." 
Genesis11:7 Omiyo wadhi wapog dhogi, mondo ng’ato ka ng’ato kik winj dho wadgi.”" 
Genesis11:8 Kamano Ruoth Nyasaye nokeyogi e piny duto, mi ne giweyo gero dalano." 
Genesis11:9 Mano emomiyo iluongo dalano ni Babel, nikech kanyo ema Ruoth Nyasaye nopogoe dho ogendini, kendo okeyogi e piny duto." 
Genesis11:10 Koro magi e nyikwa Shem: Higni ariyo bang’ ataro, Shem nonywolo Arpaksad wuode, ka en jahigni mia achiel." 
Genesis11:11 Bang’e nochako odak kuom higni mia abich, kendo nomedo nywolo nyithindo moko." 
Genesis11:12 Arpaksad ne jahigni piero adek gabich kane onywolo Shela wuode. 
Genesis11:13 Bang’e nochako odak kuom higni mia ang’wen gabich, kendo nomedo nywolo nyithindo moko." 
Genesis11:14 Shela ne jahigni piero adek kane onywolo Eber wuode. 
Genesis11:15 Bang’e nochako odak kuom higni mia ang’wen gadek, kendo nomedo nywolo nyithindo moko." 
Genesis11:16 Eber ne jahigni piero adek gang’wen kane onywolo Peleg wuode. 
Genesis11:17 Bang’e nochako odak kuom higni mia ang’wen gi piero adek kendo nomedo nywolo nyithindo moko. 
Genesis11:18 Peleg ne jahigni piero adek kane onywolo Reu wuode. 
Genesis11:19 Bang’e nochako odak kuom higni mia ariyo gochiko, kendo nomedo nywolo nyithindo moko." 
Genesis11:20 Reu ne jahigni piero adek gariyo kane onywolo Serug wuode. 
Genesis11:21 Bang’e nochako odak kuom higni mia ariyo gabiriyo, kendo nomedo nywolo nyithindo moko." 
Genesis11:22 Serug ne jahigni piero adek kane onywolo Nahor wuode. 
Genesis11:23 Bang’e nochako odak kuom higni mia ariyo, kendo nomedo nywolo nyithindo moko." 
Genesis11:24 Nahor ne jahigni piero ariyo gochiko kane onywolo Tera wuode. 
Genesis11:25 Bang’e nochako odak kuom higni mia achiel gi apar gochiko kendo nomedo nywolo nyithindo moko. 
Genesis11:26 Kane Tera osedoko jahigni piero abiriyo, nonywolo Abram gi Nahor kod Haran." 
Genesis11:27 Koro magi e joka Tera: Tera nonywolo Abram gi Nahor kod Haran, to Haran nonywolo Lut." 
Genesis11:28 Haran notho e dalagi miluongo ni Hur manie piny Kaldea, kane Tera wuon mare pod ngima." 
Genesis11:29 Abram nokendo Sarai, to Nahor nokendo Milka nyar Haran ma wuon Iska." 
Genesis11:30 Sarai to ne migumba. 
Genesis11:31 Tera nokawo Abram wuode gi Lut nyakware maka wuode Haran, kod Sarai chi Abram, mi ne giwuok Ur e piny Kaldea mondo gidhi e piny Kanaan. To kane gichopo Haran, ne gidak kuno." 
Genesis11:32 Bang’e Tera notho Haran ka en jahigni mia ariyo gabich. 
Genesis12:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Abram niya, “Dar iwe pinyu gi wedeni kod dhoodu, mondo idhi e piny moro ma abiro nyisi." 
Genesis12:2 Analoki oganda maduong’; anaguedhi, kendo anami nyingi obed gi huma, mi ji nokonyre gi nyingi kuom gueth." 
Genesis12:3 “Anaguedh jogo ma guedhi, to nakuong’ jogo ma kuong’i, kendo ogendini duto mae piny nokwaya mondo aguedhgi kaka aseguedhi.”" 
Genesis12:4 Omiyo Abram nochako wuoth kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nochike mi ne gidhi gi Lut. Ne en jahigni piero abiriyo gabich kane odar Harran. 
Genesis12:5 Nokawo Sarai chiege, gi Lut wuod owadgi, kaachiel gi mwandu duto kod wasumbni duto mane gin go Harran, eka ne gichako wuoth madhi e piny Kanaan. Kane gisechopo Kanaan," 
Genesis12:6 Abram nowuotho e pinyno nyaka nochopo kar lemo man Shekem, e tiend yath mar More. E ndalogo jo-Kanaan ne pod odak e pinyno." 
Genesis12:7 Ruoth Nyasaye nofwenyore ni Abram kanyo, mowachone niya, “Ma e piny ma nami nyikwayi.” Mi Abram nogero kendo-mar-misango kanyono ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma nofwenyorene." 
Genesis12:8 Bang’e nodar kanyo modhi yo milambo e piny gode man yo wuok chieng’ mar Bethel, moguro hembe e kind Bethel gi Ai, ka Bethel ni yo podho chieng’ to Ai ni yo wuok chieng’. Kanyo bende nogeroe kendo-mar-misango ni Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Genesis12:9 Bang’ mano nowuotho matintin, kobworo e wuodhe mochiko piny Kanaan ma milambo." 
Genesis12:10 To kech maduong’ nowuok e pinyno, omiyo Abram nodhi nyaka Misri, mondo odag kuno mondi." 
Genesis12:11 Kane ochiegni chopo Misri, nowacho ni Sarai chiege niya, “Ng’e ni in dhako ma jaber," 
Genesis12:12 omiyo ka jo-Misri oneni to gibiro wacho ni in chiega, kendo gibiro nega mondo idong’nigi." 
Genesis12:13 Emomiyo yie inyisgi ni in nyamera, mondo kik ginega to gitimna maber nikech in.”" 
Genesis12:14 Kamano, kane Abram ochopo Misri, jo-Misri noneno ni chiege nigi chia miwuoro." 
Genesis12:15 Jodong Farao, ruodh Misri, noneno Sarai, mi ne giwuoro berne ni Farao. Eka ne gitere e od ruoth." 
Genesis12:16 Farao norito Abram maber nikech Sarai, kendo nomiye rombe gi diek gi dhok gi kenje gi wasumbini kod ngamia." 
Genesis12:17 To Ruoth Nyasaye nosando Farao gi joode gi tuoche madongo nikech osekawo Sarai chi Abram. 
Genesis12:18 Kuom mano Farao noluongo Abram, mopenje niya, “Ang’o momiyo isetimona kama? Ere gima omiyo ne ok inyisa ni Sarai en chiegi?" 
Genesis12:19 Mar ang’o niwuonda ni en nyameru, mi akawe mondo obed chiega? Chiegi eri! Kawe mondo udhi!”" 
Genesis12:20 Eka Farao nochiko joge mondo oriemb Abram gi chiege e pinye kaachiel gi joge duto. 
Genesis13:1 Abram noa Misri mochiko yo nyandwat nyaka piny Kanaan ma milambo, kodhi gi chiege kod gik moko duto mane en go, Lut bende nodhi kodgi." 
Genesis13:2 To Abram koro ne jamoko ahinya, ne en gi rombe gi diek gi dhok, kaachiel gi fedha kod dhahabu." 
Genesis13:3 Kane oa kuno, nowuotho matintin, kobworo kochomo Bethel, nyaka nochopo kuma nokwongo bworoe e kind Bethel gi Ai." 
Genesis13:4 Kendo ogeroe kendo-mar-misango. Eka nolamo Ruoth Nyasaye kanyo. 
Genesis13:5 Lut mane wuotho gi Abram bende ne nigi rombe gi diek kod dhok, kaachiel gi ji bende mane bworo kode e hembene." 
Genesis13:6 To lek ne tin, ma ok nyal romo gi, nikech giduto ne gin gi jamni mang’eny." 
Genesis13:7 Kuom mano dhaw nowuok e kind jokwadh Abram gi jokwadh Lut. E kindeno jo-Kanaan gi jo-Perizi ne pod odak e pinyno. 
Genesis13:8 Eka Abram nowacho ni Lut niya, “Wan wede; dhaw ok onego bed e kindwa kodi, kata e kind jokwadhi gi jokwadha." 
Genesis13:9 Ber mondo wapogre. Yier bath piny koma ihero. Kikawo koracham to abiro kawo korachwich. Kata kikawo korachwich to abiro kawo koracham.” 
Genesis13:10 Lut norango koni gi koni, moneno ka holo mar aora Jordan nyaka Zoar nigi pi mang’eny, machal gi puoth Ruoth Nyasaye kata ka piny Misri. (Mano notimore kane pok Ruoth Nyasaye oketho Sodom gi Gomora.)" 
Genesis13:11 Omiyo Lut noyiero holo mar Jordan duto, mi nochomo yo wuok chieng’. Kamano e kaka ji ariyogo nopogore." 
Genesis13:12 Abram nodong’ e piny Kanaan, to Lut nodak but Sodom e mier mae paw Jordan, kuma noguroe hembe." 
Genesis13:13 To jo-Sodom ne joma okethore kendo ma joricho motamore gi nono e nyim Nyasaye. 
Genesis13:14 Kane Lut gi Abram osepogore, Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Abram niya, “Ting’ wang’i gi kuma intieno, mondo ing’i yo nyandwat gi yo milambo gi yo wuok chieng’ kod yo podho chieng’" 
Genesis13:15 nimar piny duto minenono abiro miyi gi nyikwayi nyaka chieng’. 
Genesis13:16 Anami nyikwayi bed mang’eny mana ka lowo mae piny. Kapo ni ng’ato nyalo kwano lowo mae piny, to kara nyikwayi bende nokwan." 
Genesis13:17 Koro ikri mondo iwuoth kuonde duto e pinyni, nikech amiyigo duto.”" 
Genesis13:18 Kuom mano, Abram nodar, modhi Hebron, kuma noguroe hembe but yien milemoe mag Mamre. Eka nodak kanyo mogeroe kendo-mar-misango ni Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Genesis14:1 Amrafel ruodh Shinar, gi Ariok ruodh Elasar, gi Kedor-laomer ruodh Elam, kod Tidal ruodh Goyim," 
Genesis14:2 nodhi kedo kod Bera ruodh Sodom gi Birsha ruodh Gomora, gi Shinab ruodh Adma, gi Shemeber ruodh Zeboim, kod ruodh Bela. (Dala mar Bela iluongo bende ni Zoar)" 
Genesis14:3 Ruodhi abichgo nosechoko jolwenjgi kanyakla e holo Sidim, ma tinde pi Nam Kado oimo." 
Genesis14:4 Ne gisebedo e bwo loch Kedor-laomer kuom higni apar gariyo, to e higa mar apar gadek ne ging’anyo, mi giweyo bedo e bwo lochne." 
Genesis14:5 E higa mar apar gang’wen, Kedor-laomer kod ruodhi mane oriwore kode nobiro gi jolwenjgi, kendo ne giloyo jo-Refaim e Ashteroth-karnaim, gi jo-Zuzim e Ham, gi jo-Emim e paw Kiriathaim," 
Genesis14:6 kod jo-Hor e gode mag Seir nyaka El-paran man but thim. 
Genesis14:7 Eka ne giduogo chien nyaka En-mishpat, ma tinde iluongo ni Kadesh, mi gikawo piny jo-Amalek duto, kod piny jo-Amor ma nodak Hazazon-tamar." 
Genesis14:8 Bang’e ruodhi mag Sodom gi Gomora gi Adma gi Zeboim kod Bela nowuok moriedo jolwenjgi e holo Sidim 
Genesis14:9 mondo giked gi Kedor-laomer ruodh Elam, gi Tidal ruodh Goyim, gi Amrafel ruodh Shinar, kod Ariok ruodh Alasar. Kamano ruodhi ang’wen nokedo gi ruodhi abich." 
Genesis14:10 To ne nitie buche mang’eny motimo chuodho e holo Sidim kendo ruodhi mag Sodom gi Gomora nonyumore e buchego kane gitemo ringo lweny. Ruodhi mamoko to noringo motony e gode. 
Genesis14:11 Ruodhi ang’wen-go nopeyo jamb jo-Sodom gi mag jo-Gomora duto, kendo ne giyako gimoro amora mane giyudo kuno." 
Genesis14:12 Lut wuod owad gi Abram, ma nodak Sodom, bende ne gimako, mi gidhigo kaachiel gi jambe duto." 
Genesis14:13 To ng’at moro mane otony e lwenyno nobiro ir Abram ja-Hibrania monyise gima osetimore. E ndalogo, Abram nodak but yiend Mamre ja Amor. Mamreno ne omin Eshkol kod Aner mane osiepe Abram." 
Genesis14:14 Kane Abram owinjo ni oseter Lut wuod owadgi e twech, nolwongo joge mia adek gapar gaboro, kendo nolawo ruodhigo nyaka Dan." 
Genesis14:15 Ne gimonjo wasigugo gotieno, kendo ne giriembogi nyaka Hoba yo nyandwat mar Damaski." 
Genesis14:16 Eka Abram nodwogo jamni duto, kaachiel gi Lut ma wuod owadgi gi jambe duto, kod mon gi jomoko duto ma noyudo oter e twech." 
Genesis14:17 Kane Abram oduogo bang riembo Kedor-laomer kod ruodh mane oriwore kode, ruodh Sodom nobiro mondo oromne e holo Shave ma tinde iluongo ni holo Ruoth." 
Genesis14:18 To Melkizedek mane ruodh Salem kendo jadolo mar Nyasaye Maduong’ Moloyo nokeloni Abram chiemo gi divai kendo noguedhe," 
Genesis14:19 kowacho niya, “Abram! Nyasaye Maduong’ Moloyo, mane ochueyo polo gi piny, mondo oguedhi." 
Genesis14:20 Wapako Nyasaye maduong’ moloyo, mosechiwo wasiki e lweti.” Eka Abram nomiyo Melkizedek achiel kuom apar mag gik moko duto ma noyako." 
Genesis14:21 Ruodh Sodom nowacho ni Abram niya, “Duogna joga kende, to idong’ gi gik moko duto mane iseyako.”" 
Genesis14:22 To Abram nodwoke niya, “Akuong’ora gi nying Ruoth Nyasaye, ma Nyasaye Maduong’ Moloyo, kendo ma Jachuech polo gi piny," 
Genesis14:23 ni ok nakaw giri kata achiel, nimar dipo ka chieng’ moro iwacho ni, ‘An ema namiyo Abram obedo jamoko.’" 
Genesis14:24 Omiyo ok nakaw gimoro, to mak mana gigo ma joga osechamo, kaachiel gi pok ma osiepena ma Aner gi Eshkol kod Mamre onego yudi.”" 
Genesis15:1 Bang’ wechego Ruoth Nyasaye nofwenyore ni Abram, mowacho ne niya, “Abram, kik iluor! An okumbani, kendo pokni nobed maduong.”" 
Genesis15:2 To Abram nodwoke niya, “A Ruoth Nyasaye, en ang’o minyalo miya, kapod asiko ma onge nyathi, kendo Eliezer ja-Damaski ma misumbana ema ochung’ ka jacham mwanduna?" 
Genesis15:3 Kaka ok isemiya nyithindo, omiyo achiel kuom wasumba ema nocham mwanduna.”" 
Genesis15:4 Eka nochako owinjo dwond Ruoth Nyasaye, kawachone niya, “Ng’atno ok nocham mwanduni, to wuodi minywolo ema nochamgi.”" 
Genesis15:5 Bang’e Ruoth Nyasaye nogole oko mowachone niya, “Ng’i malo, kendo kwan sulwe kinyalo.” Eka nomedo wachone ni, “Nyikwayi bende nobed mang’eny ka suluego.”" 
Genesis15:6 Abram noyie kuom Ruoth Nyasaye, omiyo Ruoth Nyasaye nokwano yieneno ka tim makare," 
Genesis15:7 mi nowachone niya, “An e Ruoth Nyasaye mane ogoli Ur e piny Kaldea mondo omiyi pinyni idagie.”" 
Genesis15:8 To Abram nopenje niya, “A Ruoth Nyasaye, ere kaka anyalo ng’eyo ni pinyni nobed mara?”" 
Genesis15:9 Ruoth Nyasaye nodwoke niya, “Kelna roya ma hike adek, gi diel ma hike adek, gi im ma hike adek, kod akuch odungla gi akuch obondo.”" 
Genesis15:10 Abram nokelo ni Ruoth Nyasaye gigo duto, kendo nopogo moro ka moro sirunde ariyo. Nochano sirundego e laini ariyo, ka moro ka moro omanyore gi wadgi. Winy to ne ok opogo." 
Genesis15:11 Achudhe nobiro mondo ochamgi, to noriembogi." 
Genesis15:12 Kane chieng’ podho, nindo matut notero Abram, kendo luoro maduong’ nomake." 
Genesis15:13 Eka Ruoth Nyasaye nowachone niya, “Nyikwayi nobed jodak e piny ma ok margi. Ginibed wasumbini kuno, kendo nosandgi kuom higni mia ang’wen." 
Genesis15:14 To nakum jopiny ma notimnigi kamano, kendo bang’e ginia kuno gi mwandu mogundho." 
Genesis15:15 To in, nidag aming’a, kendo nitho gi kue, kiluwo kwereni." 
Genesis15:16 Tieng’ mar ang’wen mar nyikwayi nodwog ka nikech ndalogo ema noyud ka richo jo-Amor osemedore moromo kum.” 
Genesis15:17 Kane chieng’ osepodho kendo piny olil, tak mach nodum iro, kod chuk mach maliel nothinyore, mokadho e kind sirunde kande." 
Genesis15:18 Chieng’no Ruoth Nyasaye nosingore ni Abram kowacho ne niya, “Pinyni amiyo nyikwayi, chakre aora man e tong’ Misri nyaka aora maduong’ mar Yufrate," 
Genesis15:19 moting’o pinje mag jo-Keni gi jo-Kenizi gi jo-Kadmon 
Genesis15:20 gi jo-Hiti gi jo-Perizi, gi jo-Refaim" 
Genesis15:21 gi jo-Amor gi jo-Kanaan gi jo-Girgash kod jo-Jebus.” 
Genesis16:1 Sarai chi Abram ne onge nyathi, to ne en gi jatich ot ma nyar Misri, ma nyinge Hagar." 
Genesis16:2 Sarai nowacho ni Abram niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye osetama e nywol. Kaw jatichnani, dipo ka onywolona nyathi.”" 
Genesis16:3 Kuom mano Sarai nomiyo Abram Hagar jatichne ma nyar Misri. Mano noyudo ka Abram osedak e piny Kanaan kuom higni apar. 
Genesis16:4 Abram noriwore gi Hagar, mi Hagar nomako ich. To kane Hagar ofwenyo ni osemako ich,, sunga nomake, mojaro Sarai." 
Genesis16:5 Eka Sarai nowacho ni Abram niya, “In ema imiyo Hagar jara! Namiyi jatichna, to ka noneno ni osemako ich, to ochako jara. Ruoth Nyasaye mondo ong’ad burani e kinda kodi.”" 
Genesis16:6 Abram nodwoke niya, “Jatichnino nie lweti. Inyalo timone gima ihero.” Omiyo Sarai nothago Hagar, nyaka Hagar noringo moa." 
Genesis16:7 To malaika mar Ruoth Nyasaye noyudo Hagar e thim e soko manie yo madhi Shur. 
Genesis16:8 Nopenje niya, “Hagar jatich Sarai, ia kure, to idhi kanye?” Nodwoke niya, “Aringo Sarai ma atiyone.”" 
Genesis16:9 Malaika nomedo wachone niya, “Dog ir Sarai, kendo yie gi thagruok momiyi.”" 
Genesis16:10 Eka malaika nowachone kendo niya, “Anamiyi nyikwayo mang’eny ma ok nyal kwan." 
Genesis16:11 “In gi ich, kendo ibiro nywolo nyathi ma wuowi. Inichak nyinge ni Ishmael, tiende ni, ‘Nyasaye winjo’, nikech Ruoth Nyasaye osewinjo chandruokni." 
Genesis16:12 To wuodino nochal gi le mae thim. Nobed mamon gi ji duto, kendo ji duto nobed mamon kode, bende nodag mabor gi wedene duto.”" 
Genesis16:13 Hagar nowacho niya, “Bende en adier ni aseneno Nyasaye, to pod angima?” Omiyo noluongo Ruoth Nyasaye ma noyudo wuoyo kode ni El-roi, tiende ni, ‘Nyasaye ma neno.’" 
Genesis16:14 Mano emomiyo iluongo soko manie kind Kadesh gi Bered ni, ‘Beer-lahai-roi’, tiende ni, ‘Soko mar Nyasaye mangima ma neno’." 
Genesis16:15 Bang’e Hagar nonywolo ni Abram nyathi ma wuowi, kendo nochako nyinge ni Ishmael." 
Genesis16:16 Abram ne jahigni piero aboro gauchiel kane Hagar onywolo Ishmael. 
Genesis17:1 Kane Abram ja higni piero ochiko, Ruoth Nyasaye nofwenyorene, mowachone niya, “An Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto. Bed ng’ama odimbore kendo maonge ketho e nyima ndalo duto," 
Genesis17:2 eka anatim kodi singruok, kendo nami nyikwayi bed mogundho.”" 
Genesis17:3 Abram nogoyo chonge piny, mokulore nyaka e lowo, mi Nyasaye nowachone niya," 
Genesis17:4 “Singruok ma atimo kodi e ma: Inibed wuon ogendini mang’eny. 
Genesis17:5 Nyingi ok nochak oluong ni Abram, to noluonge ni Ibrahim. Mano koro e nyingi, nikech aseloki wuon ogendini mang’eny." 
Genesis17:6 Anamiyi nyikwayo mathoth, mi ginidok ogendini madongo, kendo jomoko kuomgi nobed ruodhi." 
Genesis17:7 “Anarit singruok ma asetimo kodi kendo gi nyikwayi e tienge mabiro, mi anabed Nyasachi kendo Nyasach nyikwayi nyaka chieng’." 
Genesis17:8 Anamiyi piny Kanaan duto ma koro inie jadakni, mi enobed mari gi nyikwayi nyaka chieng’ kendo anabed Nyasachgi.”" 
Genesis17:9 Nyasaye nomedo wacho ni Ibrahim niya, “To bende in kaachiel gi tienge duto mag nyikwayi unurit singruokna." 
Genesis17:10 Koro ma e kaka onego umak singruoknani: ng’ato ka ng’ato ma dichwo kuomu nyaka ter nyangu. 
Genesis17:11 Chakre kawuono, nyaka uter nyathi ka nyathi ma wuowi nyangu ka en gi ndalo aboro, kata en nyathiu, kata nyathi misumba mong’iew kuom oganda moro. Mano biro nyiso ni nitie singruok e kinda kodu." 
Genesis17:12  
Genesis17:13 Ng’ato ka ng’ato nyaka ter nyangu, kendo mano nobed ranyisi e ringreu ma nyiso ni singruok masetimo koduni osiko." 
Genesis17:14 To dichwo ma ok oter nyangu noriemb kuom jowetene, nikech ok oserito singruokna.”" 
Genesis17:15 Eka Nyasaye nowacho ni Ibrahim kendo niya, “Kik ichak iluong chiegi ni Sarai, nikech koro nyinge Sara." 
Genesis17:16 Abiro guedhe kendo abiro miyi nyathi ma wuowi kode. Anaguedh Sara, mi nobed min ogendini mang’eny, kendo nyikwaye moko nobed ruodhi.”" 
Genesis17:17 Ibrahim nogoyo chonge piny, mokulore nyaka e lowo, to nochako nyiero, koparo ni, “Bende ng’ato dinywol nyathi ka en jahigni mia achiel? Koso Sara nyalo nywol ka en jahigni piero ochiko?”" 
Genesis17:18 Omiyo nowacho ni Nyasaye niya, “Akwayi ni mondo irit Ishmael, obed mangima.”" 
Genesis17:19 To Nyasaye nodwoke niya, “Ooyo, Sara chiegi ema biro nywoloni wuowi, kendo inichak nyinge ni Isaka. Anachop singruok ma asetimo kode, kaachiel gi nyikwaye bende, nikech en singruok mosiko." 
Genesis17:20 To bende abiro rito Ishmael kaka isekwaya. Abiro guedhe, kendo abiro miye nyithindo gi nyikwayo mang’eny. Enobed wuon jodongo apar gariyo, kendo anami nyikwaye bedo oganda maduong’." 
Genesis17:21 To anarit singruok ma asetimo kod Isaka wuodi ma Sara biro nywolo e kinde makama e higa mabiro.” 
Genesis17:22 Kane Nyasaye osewuoyo gi Ibrahim, nowuok moweyo Ibrahim kanyo." 
Genesis17:23 Odiechieng’ono ema Ibrahim notimoe gima Nyasaye nochike. Notero Ishmael wuode nyangu, kaachiel gi joma chwo duto monywol e dalane, kod wasumbini duto." 
Genesis17:24 Ibrahim ne oter nyangu ka jahigni piero ochiko gochiko. 
Genesis17:25 Ishmael wuode to ne jahigni apar gadek. 
Genesis17:26 Kamano Ibrahim gi Ishmael wuode," 
Genesis17:27 kaachiel gi wasumbe duto noter nyangu odiechieng’ achiel. 
Genesis18:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nofwenyore ni Ibrahim but yien milemoe mag Mamre. Noyudo oyueyo e dho hembe, ka chieng’ kech." 
Genesis18:2 To kane oting’o wang’e nopo koneno ji adek mochung’ e nyime. Noringo kodhi romonigi, kendo nogoyo chonge piny, mokulore nyaka e lowo." 
Genesis18:3 Eka nowacho niya, “Ruoth, kiyie koda, to kik ikadh mak irawo kuoma." 
Genesis18:4 Weuru aomnu pi mondo uluokgo tiendu, kendo uyue e tiend yadhni." 
Genesis18:5 Abiro kelonu chiemo mondo omedu teko, eka unyalo dhi nyime gi wuodhu mosekelou irani.” Ne gidwoke niya, “Mano ber, tim kamano.”" 
Genesis18:6 Kuom mano Ibrahim noreto kodhi ir Sara e hema, mowachone niya, “Kaw mogo moromo aditni adek mondo itedgo kuon piyopiyo.”" 
Genesis18:7 Eka noringo odhi e kund dhok moyiero nyarwath mopugno. Nomiye jatichne moro moyang’e, kendo olose piyopiyo." 
Genesis18:8 Eka Ibrahim nokawo adila gi chiewo kod ring’o ma nolosono, moketo e nyim jogo. Kane gichiemo, nochung’ e tiend yath koritogi." 
Genesis18:9 Bang’e ne gipenjo Ibrahim niya, “Ere Sara chiegi?” Nodwokogi ni, “En e hema ka”." 
Genesis18:10 Wendono nowachone niya, “Anaduog iri e kinde makama higa mabiro, kendo nanwang’ ka Sara chiegi osenywolo nyathi ma wuowi.” To kara Sara nowinjo wachno kobet e dho hema e ng’e wendo." 
Genesis18:11 Ibrahim gi Sara ne josedoko moti, kendo ndalo Sara mag nywol nosekadho." 
Genesis18:12 Kuom mano, Sara nonyiero e chunye kawacho niya, “Bende danywol nyathi ka aseti kama, to chwora bende osedoko moti?”" 
Genesis18:13 Eka Ruoth Nyasaye nopenjo Ibrahim niya, “Ang’o momiyo Sara nyiero, kawacho ni, ‘Bende danywol nyathi kasedoko moti kama?’ ”" 
Genesis18:14 Ruoth Nyasaye nomedo penje niya, “Bende nitie gimoro manyalo tama? Abiro duogo iri e kinde makama higa mabiro, kendo nanwang’ ka Sara osenywolo nyathi ma wuowi kaka asewacho.”" 
Genesis18:15 Sara noluor ahinya, omiyo nokwer ni ok onyiero. To Ruoth Nyasaye nowachone niya, “Ooyo, ne inyiero!”" 
Genesis18:16 Bang’e jogo nowuok, ka Ibrahim kowogi, kendo ne gichopo kuma ne ginyalo nenogo Sodom." 
Genesis18:17 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho e chunye niya, “Bende dapand Ibrahim gima adwaro timo?" 
Genesis18:18 Nyikwaye nodok oganda maduong’ kendo maratego, mi ogendini duto mae piny nokwaya mondo aguedhgi kaka aseguedho Ibrahim." 
Genesis18:19 Aseyiere mondo ochik nyithinde kod nyikwaye oluw yorena ka gitimo timbe mabeyo kendo makare. Kamano natimne gik moko duto ma nasesingorane.” 
Genesis18:20 Omiyo Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho niya, “Nitie ywak mang’eny nikech richo madongo ma jo-Sodom gi jo-Gomora osetimo." 
Genesis18:21 Kuom mano, nyaka adhi ane ka ywak ma asewinjono en adier, ni mar nyaka ang’e adiera!”" 
Genesis18:22 Jogo nowuok, ma omako yo madhi Sodom, to Ibrahim nodong’ kochung’ e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Genesis18:23 Nosudo machiegni, mopenjo Ruoth Nyasaye niya, “Ibiro tieko joma onge ketho kaachiel gi joma nigi ketho koso?" 
Genesis18:24 Ka nitie ji piero abich makare e dala, diketh dalano, koso diweye mondo ires ngima ji piero abich makarego?" 
Genesis18:25 Adier, ok dineg jomaonge ketho kaachiel gi joma nigi ketho. Ok inyal timo kamano, nikech kapo ni itimo kamano, to jomaonge ketho diyud mana kum maromre gi joma nigi ketho. To mano ok nyalre, nikech Jang’ad Bura mar piny ngima nyaka ng’ad bura kare.”" 
Genesis18:26 Ruoth Nyasaye nodwoke niya, “Kayudo ji piero abich maonge ketho e Sodom, to ok naketh dalano, nikech joma onge kethogo.”" 
Genesis18:27 Ibrahim nomedo wacho ni Ruoth Nyasaye niya, “Yie ing’wonna kuom wuoyo kodi kamano, nikech an mana dhano adhana ma ok owinjore wacho gimoro." 
Genesis18:28 Kapo ni iyudo mana ji piero ang’wen gabich kende kuom ji piero abich, diketh dalano duto nikech ji abich moremgo?” Ruoth Nyasaye nodwoke niya, “Kanyalo yudo ji piero ang’wen gabich ma onge ketho, to ok naketh dalano.”" 
Genesis18:29 Ibrahim nodhi nyime kawacho niya, “Kiyudo mana ji piero ang’wen kende to?” Ruoth Nyasaye nodwoke niya “Ok naketh dalano kayudo ji piero ang’wen-go.”" 
Genesis18:30 Ibrahim nokwayo kendo niya, “A Ruoth Nyasaye, yie kik isin koda kapenji kendo. Kapo ni iyudo mana ji piero adek kende to?” Nodwoke ni, “Ok nakethe nikech ji piero adekgo.”" 
Genesis18:31 Ibrahim nochako owachone niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye, yie ing’wonna kuom penji wach kendo. Ka ji piero ariyo kende ema iyudo to?” Ruoth Nyasaye nodwoke niya, “Ok nakethe kayudo ji piero ariyo.”" 
Genesis18:32 Eka nowacho ni Ruoth Nyasaye kendo niya, “Yie kik isin koda, Ruoth Nyasaye, kapenji wach mogik. Bende diketh dalano kapo ni iyudo mana ji apar kende?” Ruoth Nyasaye nodwoke niya, “Ok nakethe kanyalo yudo ji apargo.”" 
Genesis18:33 Kane Ruoth Nyasaye osetieko loso gi Ibrahim noa, mi Ibrahim bende nodok e hembe." 
Genesis19:1 Malaika ariyogo nochopo Sodom kar ang’ich welo, moyudo ka Lut obet e dhoranga dalano. Kane onenogi, nodhi mondo oromnigi, mi nogoyo chonge piny e nyimgi, mokulore nyaka e lowo." 
Genesis19:2 Nowachonigi niya, “Jodongo, yieuru uraw e oda mondo uluok tiendu, kendo unindi. Eka kiny unyalo wuok gokinyi.” To ne gidwoke niya, “Ooyo, wabiro nindo mana e laru ka.”" 
Genesis19:3 To Lut nonano ni nyaka ginind e ode, mi ne giyie. Nolosonigi chiemo, gi makati ma ok ketie thowi, mi gichamo." 
Genesis19:4 To kane pok gidhi nindo, jo-Sodom duto matindo, gi madongo, nolworo odno." 
Genesis19:5 Ne giluongo Lut, mi giwacho niya, “Eke joma nende obiro e odi ka? Golnwagi oko mondo waterre kodgi!”" 
Genesis19:6 Kane Lut owinjo kamano, nowuok moloro dhoot." 
Genesis19:7 Eka nowachonigi niya, “Akwayou jowadwa, kik utim gima rach kama." 
Genesis19:8 Winjuru, an kod nyiri ariyo mapok ong’eyo chwo. We agolnugi oko mondo utim kodgi gima uhero. To kik utim marach ni jogi, nikech gin wenda.”" 
Genesis19:9 To ne gidwoke niya, “Aye e nyimwa, jadakni! In ok iromo nyisowa gima onego watim. Aye e nyimwa, nimar dipo ka watimoni marach moloyogi!” Mi ne gidhiro Lut, ka gisudo mondo gimuk dhoot." 
Genesis19:10 To ji ariyo ma welogo noywayo Lut, modwoko e ot, mi giloro dhoot." 
Genesis19:11 Eka ne gimiyo wang’ jogo duto mane ni oko odinore, mane ok ginyal yudo dhoot." 
Genesis19:12 Welogo nopenjo Lut niya, “Bende in gi jomoko ka kaka yawuoti kata nyigi kata chwo nyigi kata wadu moro amora? Kawgi duto mondo uwuog ka," 
Genesis19:13 nikech wabiro ketho dalani. Ywak man kuom dalani osebedo malich ahinya, omiyo Ruoth Nyasaye oorowa mondo wakethe.”" 
Genesis19:14 Kuom mano Lut nodhi ir joma ne nywomo nyige, mowachonigi niya, “Ikreuru piyo mondo waa e dalani, nikech Ruoth Nyasaye biro kethe.” To ne giparo ni otugo." 
Genesis19:15 Kane piny oru, malaikago norungo Lut mondo owuogi, ka giwachone niya, “Tim piyo! Kaw chiegi gi nyigi ariyo man ka, nono to ibiro tho sa mikethoe dalani.”" 
Genesis19:16 To kane gineno ni pod odigni, ne gimako lwete, mi gigole e dalano kaachiel gi chiege kod nyige, nikech Ruoth Nyasaye nokeche." 
Genesis19:17 Kane gisegologi kamano, ne giwachonigi niya, “Ringuru utony. Kik ugo machiemo kata kik uchung’ kamoro amora e pap nyaka uchop e gode, nikech dipo ka utho.”" 
Genesis19:18 Lut nodwokpogi niya, “Ooyo, jodongo!" 
Genesis19:19 Usetimona ng’wono, kendo kuom herau ureso ngimana. To ok naring machop e gode ka pok masirani ojuka, kendo onega." 
Genesis19:20 To nitie dala morio matin man machiegni ma anyalo chopoe piyopiyo. En mana dala matin, omiyo yienauru aring achop kuno mondo ares ngimana.”" 
Genesis19:21 Nodwoke niya, “Ayie kwayoni, kendo ok naketh dala miwachono." 
Genesis19:22 To mak mana ni ring kuno piyopiyo, nikech ok anyal timo gimoro ka pok ichopo kuno.” Mano emomiyo dalano ne oluong ni Zoar, (tiende ni matin.)" 
Genesis19:23 Lut nochopo Zoar ka chieng’ osewuok. 
Genesis19:24 Eka Ruoth Nyasaye nooro mach gi kite maliel mowang’o Sodom gi Gomora. 
Genesis19:25 Kamano Ruoth Nyasaye noketho miego duto kod pawgi, kaachiel gi ji duto manodak kuondego, kod gik moko duto ma dongo e lowo." 
Genesis19:26 To chi Lut nogoyo machiemo, mi nolokore siro mar kado." 
Genesis19:27 Kinyne Ibrahim nomondo kama nosechung’ie e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye," 
Genesis19:28 mong’iyo yo Sodom gi Gomora kod pap duto moneno iro ka dhuolore. 
Genesis19:29 To Ruoth Nyasaye noseparo Ibrahim ka noketho miego, mi nogolo Lut mondo kik tho e masira ma notieko mier ma odakie." 
Genesis19:30 To Lut noluoro dak Zoar, omiyo noa kuno gi nyige ariyo, modhi e gode, kendo ne gidak e rogo." 
Genesis19:31 Chieng’ moro, nyare maduong’ nowacho ni nyamin matin niya, “Wuonwa oseti, to onge ng’ato modong’ e piny ma nyalo kendowa mondo wanywol nyithindo kaka jomoko." 
Genesis19:32 Bi wami wuonwa kong’o, to kosemer, to onyalo nindo kodwa mondo wayud nyithindo.”" 
Genesis19:33 Kuom mano, ne gimero wuon-gi gi kong’o gotienono, mi nyako maduong’ noriwore gi wuon mare. To Lut nomer ahinya mane ok onyal ng’eyo gima timore." 
Genesis19:34 Kinyne nyako maduong’ nowacho ni matin niya, “Ne! Nyoro wuonwa onindo koda. Wamere gi kong’o kendo kawuono, mondo idhi onind kodi, nimar dipo ka wanywolo nyithindo kode.”" 
Genesis19:35 Kuom mano ne gichako gimero wuon-gi otienono, mi nyako matin bende nodhi moriwore kode, to Lut ne ok ong’eyo gima timore." 
Genesis19:36 Kamano nyiri ariyogo nomako ich. 
Genesis19:37 Nyako maduong’ nonywolo wuowi, mochako nyinge ni Moab. En e kwar jo-Moab." 
Genesis19:38 Nyako matin bende nonywolo wuowi, mochako nyinge ni Ben-ami. En e kwar jo-Amon." 
Genesis20:1 Ibrahim noa Mamre e piny Kanaan, kawuotho matintin nyaka nochopo milambo mar pinyno, modak Gerar e kind Kadesh gi Shur." 
Genesis20:2 Nowuondo jo-Gerar ni Sara ma chiege en nyamin mare, omiyo Abimalek ruodh Gerar nooro joote moomone Sara." 
Genesis20:3 To Nyasaye nofwenyore ni Abimelek e lek gotieno, mowachone niya, “Ibiro tho, nikech dhako misekawono en chi ng’ato.”" 
Genesis20:4 Mano noyudo ka Abimelek pok oriwore gi Sara, omiyo nopenjo Nyasaye niya, “Ruoth, bende dineg ji maonge gi ketho?" 
Genesis20:5 Donge Ibrahim owuon ema nonyisowa ni Sara en nyamin mare, to Sara bende nosire kowacho ni en owadgi? Omiyo natime ratiro kakia gima rachie.”" 
Genesis20:6 Nyasaye nodwoke niya, “Ee, ang’eyo ni isetimo kamano kikia. Kuom mano ne ok ayie mondo iriwri kode, mi iketh e nyima." 
Genesis20:7 Koro dwok dhakono ni chwore. Chworeno en janabi, omiyo obiro lemoni mondo kik itho. To ka ok idwoke, to ibiro tho gi joodi duto!”" 
Genesis20:8 Kinyne gokinyi Abimelek noluongo jotichne duto monyisogi wachno, mi ne gibwok ahinya." 
Genesis20:9 Eka noluongo Ibrahim, mopenje niya, “Ang’o momiyo isetimonwa marach kama? Ere gima rach ma asetimoni, momiyo isekelo richo maduong’ kama kuoma, kendo kuom pinya?" 
Genesis20:10 Ang’o momiyo isetimo gima ok onego ng’ato tim?” 
Genesis20:11 Ibrahim nodwoke niya, “Naparo ni onge joma oluoro Nyasaye e pinyni, omiyo nagalo ni ginyalo nega mondo gikaw chiega." 
Genesis20:12 To adier, kata obedo ni nakendo Sara, to en nyamera, nimar en nyar wuora, to minewa ema opogore." 
Genesis20:13 Kuom mano kane Nyasaye ochika mondo awuog e dala wuora, kendo awuoth e pinje mamoko, nakwayo Sara niya, ‘Adwaro mondo itimna ng’wono kama. Kuonde duto ma wadhiye, to iwachie ni an owadu.’ ”" 
Genesis20:14 Kane Abimelek owinjo kamano, nodwoko Sara ni Ibrahim, kendo nomiye rombe gi dhok kod wasumbini," 
Genesis20:15 kowachone niya, “Pinyni duto en mara; inyalo dak kamoro amora mihero.”" 
Genesis20:16 Nonyiso Sara bende niya, “Asemiyo owadu fedha alufu achiel mondo obed ranyisi ni jou duto ni ionge gi ketho, kendo mondo ging’e ni ok isetimo gimoro marach.”" 
Genesis20:17 To noyudo ka Ruoth Nyasaye osetamo mon duto mane ni e dala Abimelek nywol nikech gima nosetimore ni Sara chi Ibrahim. To kane Ibrahim olamo Nyasaye, Abimelek gi chiege kod mon ma wasumbe nochango, mi ne gichako nywolo nyithindo kendo." 
Genesis20:18  
Genesis21:1 Ruoth Nyasaye noguedho Sara kaka nosesingore," 
Genesis21:2 mi Sara nomako ich, monywolo ni Ibrahim wuowi, ka Ibrahim osedoko moti. Nonywole mana e ndalo mane Ruoth Nyasaye osechiko." 
Genesis21:3 Ibrahim nochako nyinge ni Isaka (tiende ni nyiero). 
Genesis21:4 Kane osetieko ndalo aboro, Ibrahim notere nyangu, kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nosechike." 
Genesis21:5 Ne en jahigni mia achiel kane onywol Isaka wuode. 
Genesis21:6 Sara nowacho niya, “Nyasaye osemiya gimomiyo anyiero, kendo ng’ato ang’ata mowinjo nokonya nyiero!”" 
Genesis21:7 Eka nowacho kendo niya, “Ng’ama dine nyis Ibrahim ni Sara didhodh nyathi? To koro eri osenywolo ne wuowi ka en ng’ama oti.”" 
Genesis21:8 Nyathino nodongo, kendo chieng’ ma noweyoe dhoth, Ibrahim notimo nyasi maduong’." 
Genesis21:9 Chieng’ moro Sara noneno Ishmael mane Hagar nyar Misri onywolo gi Ibrahim ka jotugo gi Isaka wuode. 
Genesis21:10 Omiyo nowacho ni Ibrahim niya, “Riemb dhako ma jatichnani gi wuode, nikech ok ayie mondo wuode ocham mwanduni kaachiel gi Isaka wuoda.”" 
Genesis21:11 Wachni nochando chuny Ibrahim ahinya, nimar Ishmael bende ne rembe." 
Genesis21:12 To Nyasaye nowachone niya, “Kik chunyi chandre nikech nyathino, kata nikech Hagar jatichni, tim mana kaka Sara osewachoni, nimar joka Isaka kende ema noluong ni nyikwayi." 
Genesis21:13 To wuod jatichni bende nami nyikwayo mang’eny, mi ginibed oganda maduong’ nikech en wuodi minywolo.”" 
Genesis21:14 Ibrahim nochiew gokinyi, momiyo Hagar chiemo kod puga mar pi. Eka noketo nyathi e gok Hagar, mogole odhi. Hagar nowuok modhi, kendo notho wuotho awuotha e thim Beer-sheba." 
Genesis21:15 Kane pi moting’o oserumo, nobolo nyathi e tiend bungu. Eka nochwalore nyime ma dirom mita mia achiel," 
Genesis21:16 mobet piny kowacho niya, “Ok darang nyathina katho.” To kane pod obet kanyo, nyathi nochako ywak." 
Genesis21:17 Nyasaye nowinjo ka nyathi ywak, mi malaika mar Nyasaye nowuoyo gi Hagar gi e polo, kapenje niya, “Ang’o machandi Hagar? Kik iluor, nimar Nyasaye osewinjo ywak nyathi." 
Genesis21:18 Chung’ ikaw nyathi, kendo irite maber, nikech nami nyikwaye bedo oganda maduong’.”" 
Genesis21:19 Eka Nyasaye noyawo wang’ Hagar, mi Hagar noneno soko moro. Nodhi motuomo pi e puke, momiyo nyathi omodho." 
Genesis21:20 Nyasaye norito nyathino. Nodak e thim Paran, kendo nodoko jadwar molony." 
Genesis21:21 Bang’e min mare nonyombone e piny Misri. 
Genesis21:22 E ndalono Abimelek kod Fikol ma jatend jolweny nodhi ir Ibrahim mowachone niya, “Nyasaye ni kodi kuom gik moko duto mitimo." 
Genesis21:23 Omiyo koro kuong’rina gi nying Nyasaye ni ok nitimna gimoro marach kata ni nyithinda kata ni nyikwaya. Kaka asetimoni maber, e kaka in bende onego itimna maber, kendo ni piny ma koro idakie.”" 
Genesis21:24 Ibrahim nodwoke niya, “Ayie.”" 
Genesis21:25 To bang’e nonyiso Abimelek wach soko moro mane jatich Abimelek osemaye. 
Genesis21:26 Abimelek nodwoke niya, “Ok ang’eyo wachno, nikech pok inyisago, to kawuono ema akwongo winjee.”" 
Genesis21:27 Eka Ibrahim nomiyo Abimelek nyirombe gi dhok, mi ne gitimo winjruok." 
Genesis21:28 Ibrahim nopogo nyirombe abiriyo kuom jambego, moketo yorgi." 
Genesis21:29 Abimelek nopenje gimomiyo nopogo nyirombego," 
Genesis21:30 mi Ibrahim nodwoke niya, “Kawgi mondo gibed ranyisi ni an ema nakunyo sokoni.”" 
Genesis21:31 Kuom mano ne ochak kanyo ni Beer-sheba, nikech en e kama ji ariyogo nokuong’oree. (Beer-sheba, to tiende ni, soko abiriyo, kata soko kuong’ruok, nikech rombe abiriyo mane gitimogo singruokno.)" 
Genesis21:32 Kane gisetimo winjruokno Beer-sheba, Abimelek kod Fikol jatend jolwenje ne jodok e piny jo-Filistia." 
Genesis21:33 Ibrahim to nopidho yath moro Beer-sheba, kendo nolamo Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasaye mochwere, kanyono." 
Genesis21:34 Bang’e nomedo dak aming’a e piny jo-Filistiano. 
Genesis22:1 Chieng’ moro Nyasaye nomiyo Ibrahim tem. Noluonge niya, “Ibrahim! Ibrahim!” En to nodwoke ni, “Antie.”" 
Genesis22:2 Eka Nyasaye nowachone niya, “Kaw Isaka, wuodi ma miderma kendo mihero, mondo udhigo e piny Moria. Kuchopo kuno to chiwe ka misango e wi got moro ma abiro nyisi.”" 
Genesis22:3 Kuom mano Ibrahim nochiew gokinyi mang’ich. Nogawo kanje, kendo nobaro yien ma nodhi wang’ogo misango. Eka nowuok gi Isaka wuode, kod jotichne ariyo, ka gichomo kuma Nyasaye nosewachone." 
Genesis22:4 Bang’ ndalo adek, Ibrahim noting’o wang’e, moneno kanyono gi kuma bor, mi nowacho ni joge niya," 
Genesis22:5 “Dong’uru ka gi kanyna, kwadhi kucha gi wuoda. Kwaselemo kuno, to wabiro duogo iru.”" 
Genesis22:6 Ibrahim nomiyo Isaka yiend wang’o misango mondo oting’, to en owuon noting’o mach kod pala, mi jariyogo nochako wuoth kanyakla." 
Genesis22:7 Eka Isaka noluongo Ibrahim niya, “Wuora!” Mi Ibrahim nopenje ni, “En ang’o wuoda?” Isaka nowachone niya, “Wan gi mach kod yien, to ere rombo mwabiro timogo misango?”" 
Genesis22:8 Ibrahim nodwoke ni, “Wuoda, Nyasaye owuon ema biro miyowa rombo.” Bang’ mano ne gidhi nyime gi wuodhgi kanyakla." 
Genesis22:9 Kane gichopo kama Nyasaye nosenyise, Ibrahim nogero kendo-mar-misango, kendo nochanoe yien. Bang’ mano notweyo wuode, moketo e wi yien ma nosechano e kendogo." 
Genesis22:10 Eka nokawo pala mondo oneggo wuode," 
Genesis22:11 to malaika mar Ruoth Nyasaye noluonge gi e polo niya, “Ibrahim! Ibrahim!” Mi Ibrahim nodwoke ni, “Antie.”" 
Genesis22:12 Eka malaikano nokwere ni, “Kik ineg wuodi, kata kik itimne gimoro marach, nikech koro ang’eyo ni in ng’at moluoro Nyasaye, nimar ok isetama e wuodi ma miderma.”" 
Genesis22:13 Ibrahim noting’o wang’e mopo koneno im momoko gi tungene e bungu. Nokawo imno motimogo misango ni Ruoth Nyasaye kar wuode. 
Genesis22:14 Ibrahim nochako kanyo ni Jehova-jire (Tiende ni Ruoth Nyasaye e jachiwo). Pod iwacho nyaka chil kawuono ni “God Ruoth Nyasaye ema nochiwee.” 
Genesis22:15 Malaika mar Ruoth Nyasaye nochako oluongo Ibrahim gie polo mowachone niya," 
Genesis22:16 “Ruoth Nyasaye owacho kama: 
Genesis22:17 Akuong’ora gi nyinga awuon ni kaka ok isetama e wuodi ma miderma, abiro guedhi moloyo, mi ami nyikwayi bed mang’eny ka sulue, kendo ka kuoyo mae dho nam. Nyikwayi nolo wasikgi," 
Genesis22:18 kendo ogendini duto mae piny nokwaya mondo aguedhgi kaka aseguedho nyikwayi. Magi duto notimre nikech iserito chikna.” 
Genesis22:19 Ibrahim nodok ir jotichne, mi giduto ne giduogo Beer-sheba kuma nodakie." 
Genesis22:20 Bang’e Ibrahim noyudo wach ni Milka osenywolo ni Nahor owadgi yawuowi. 
Genesis22:21 Wuowi makayo ne nyinge Huz, to jalupne ne Buz, to owetene mamoko ne Kemwel wuon Aram," 
Genesis22:22 kod Kezed gi Hazo gi Pildash gi Jedlaf kod Bethuel. 
Genesis22:23 To Bethuel nonywolo nyako ma nyinge Rebeka. Yawuowi aborogo e mane Milka onywolo ni Nahor owadgi Ibrahim. 
Genesis22:24 To Reuma chi Nahor machielo bende nonywolo yawuowi moko, ma nyinggi Teba gi Gaham gi Tahash kod Maaka." 
Genesis23:1 Sara nodak higni mia achiel gi piero ariyo gabiriyo. 
Genesis23:2 Bang’e notho Kiriath-arba, ma tinde iluongo ni Hebron, manie piny Kanaan. Ibrahim nodonjo e hembe moywage." 
Genesis23:3 Bang’e nowuok moweyo ringre Sara kanyo. Nodhi mowacho ni jo-Hiti ma weg pinyno niya," 
Genesis23:4 “An mana wendo, kendo jadak e kindu. Yieuru umiya lowo moromo kar yiko, mondo ayikie ng’ata e yo mowinjore.”" 
Genesis23:5 Ne gidwoke niya," 
Genesis23:6 “Jaduong’, winji. In ng’at maduong’ e dierwa. Yik ayika ng’ati e burwa moro maber miyiero. Onge ng’ato kuomwa ma dituoni kare mar yiko, kata madimoni yiko ng’ati.”" 
Genesis23:7 To Ibrahim nochung’ mokulore e nyimgi," 
Genesis23:8 mowachonigi niya, “Ka uyie ni mondo ayik ng’ata kaka owinjore, to yieuru ukwana Efron wuod Zohar" 
Genesis23:9 mondo oyie omiya rogo man Makpela e giko lope. Ayie chule nengo mowinjore e nyimu ka, mondo obed kara mar yiko.”" 
Genesis23:10 Noyudo ka Efron owuon obet piny gi jo-Hiti wetenego. Nodwoko Ibrahim e nyim ji duto mane ni kode e dhorangach niya," 
Genesis23:11 “Ooyo ruoth, amiyi lowono duto, kaachiel gi rogo man kanyo. Amiyigo e nyim jowagi duto, mondo iyike ng’ati motho.”" 
Genesis23:12 To Ibrahim nokulore kendo e nyimgi," 
Genesis23:13 mowacho ni Efron ka ji duto winjo, niya, “Erokamano, to winj gima akwayo. Adwaro ng’iewo lowono gi nengo mowinjore kode. Omiyo yie ikaw pesana, mondo ayik ng’ata kanyo.”" 
Genesis23:14 To Efron nodwoko Ibrahim niya," 
Genesis23:15 “Jaduong’ nengo lowono oromo nus kilo mar fedha, to mano ok owinjore thagwa.”" 
Genesis23:16 Ibrahim noyie gi nengo mane Efron osegoyo e nyim jo-Hiti, mi nomiye nus kilo mar fedha. Nopimogi gi rapim mane jolok ohala tiyogo." 
Genesis23:17 Mano e kaka puoth Efron mane ni Makpela yo wuokchieng’ mar Mamre, kaachiel gi rogo kod yien duto mane ni e puodhono, nodoko mag Ibrahim." 
Genesis23:18 Jo-Hiti duto mane nie dhorangach nobedo joneno kuom wachno. 
Genesis23:19 Bang’ mano, Ibrahim noyiko Sara chiege e rogono." 
Genesis23:20 Kamano puodho kod rogo mane ni kanyo nodoko kar Ibrahim mar yiko. 
Genesis24:1 Ibrahim koro nosedoko moti ahinya, kendo Ruoth Nyasaye noseguedhe e yorene duto." 
Genesis24:2 Nowacho ni jatichne maduong’ mane rito mwandune duto niya, “Ket lweti e kind ema." 
Genesis24:3 Adwaro ni mondo ikuong’rina e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach polo gi piny ni ok ninywom ni wuoda nyar piny Kanaan madakieni," 
Genesis24:4 to nyaka idog thurwa ir joodwa mondo iyudie nyako ni Isaka wuoda.” 
Genesis24:5 Jatichneno nopenje ni, “Datim ang’o ka nyakono ok oyie biro koda e pinyni? Daduok wuodi thuru kuma niayeno?”" 
Genesis24:6 To Ibrahim nodwoke niya, “Ngang’! Kik idwok wuoda kuno!" 
Genesis24:7 Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach polo gi piny ma nogola thurwa e dala wuora, kendo nosingorena ni nomi nyikwaya pinyni ema noor malaikane nyimi mondo iyud ni wuoda nyako kuno." 
Genesis24:8 To ka nyakono otamore biro kodi e pinyni, muma mitimo kodani ok nomaki. To kik idwok wuoda kuno, kata da ni ang’o ema timore!”" 
Genesis24:9 Kuom mano ng’atno noketo lwete e kind em Ibrahim ruodhe, mokwong’ore ni notim kamano." 
Genesis24:10 Eka nokawo ngamia apar mag ruodhe, kod chiwo mang’eny mabeyo, mi nomako yo modhi Nahor e piny Mesopotamia." 
Genesis24:11 Nochopo godhiambo e sa ma mon dhiye kulo. Nomiyo ngamiago ogoyo chonggi piny e dho soko mane ni but dalano. 
Genesis24:12 Eka nowacho niya, “A Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Ibrahim ruodha, guedha tinendeni mondo wuodhani obed maber, kendo ichop singruok ma nitimo ni ruodha." 
Genesis24:13 Eri, achung’ e dho sokoni, kama nyi dalani biro umboe." 
Genesis24:14 Abiro kwayo nyako moro mondo oket dapige piny, amodhie, to ka odwoka ni, ‘Modhi; ngamia magi bende abiro miyo pi’, to en ema mondo obed nyako ma iseyiero ni Isaka jatichni. Kamano anang’e ni isechopo singruok mane itimo ni ruodha.”" 
Genesis24:15 Kane pok otieko lemo, Rebeka nyar Bethuel ma wuod Milka chi Nahor ma owadgi Ibrahim nochopo, koting’o dapi e goke." 
Genesis24:16 Ne en nyako silili ma jaber, mapok ong’eyo dichwo. Nolor e soko, motwomo pi, eka oduogo." 
Genesis24:17 Jatich Ibrahim noreto kadhi ire, mowachone niya, “Yie imiyae pi mondo amodhi,”" 
Genesis24:18 Mi nyakono noloro dapige piyopiyo, moting’o e lwete, kowachone niya, “Modhi, jaduong’.”" 
Genesis24:19 Kane osetieko modho, Rebeka nowachone niya, “Koro adhi omo pi ni ngamia magi mondo omodh kaka gidwaro.”" 
Genesis24:20 Piyopiyo nono, noolo pi ma nodong’ e dapige e mbero mane jamni modhoe. Eka noreto e soko koomo pi nyaka ngamiago duto notieko modho." 
Genesis24:21 Ng’atno nobedo ka range ling’ling’ mondo one ane ka Ruoth Nyasaye oseguedho wuodhe. 
Genesis24:22 Kane Rebeka osetieko omo pi ni ngamia, ng’atno nokawo tere mar um ma nengone tek, moketo e um Rebeka, kaachiel gi bangli ariyo mag dhahabu ma pekgi oromo achiel kuom apar mar kilo, moketo e bade." 
Genesis24:23 Eka nopenje niya, “In nyar ng’a? Yie inyisa. Bende dwayudie kar nindo e dalau?”" 
Genesis24:24 Nodwoke niya, “An nyar Bethuel ma wuod Nahor gi Milka," 
Genesis24:25 kendo wan gi chiemb ngamia kod lum mang’eny ma ginyalo nindoe, kaachiel gi ot bende ma unyalo nindoe.”" 
Genesis24:26 Kane ng’atno owinjo kamano, nogoyo chonge piny molamo Ruoth Nyasaye," 
Genesis24:27 kowacho niya, “Apako Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Ibrahim ruodha, moserito singruok ma notimo ni ruodha, kendo osekela mana dala owadgi ruodha.”" 
Genesis24:28 Rebeka noringo nyaka od min mare, monyiso joodgi gik mosetimore." 
Genesis24:29 Ne en gi owadgi ma nyinge Laban. 
Genesis24:30 Laban noneno tere e um nyamin mare, kod bangli e bade, kendo nowinjo ka onyisogi gima ne ng’at cha owachone. Omiyo noringo nyaka e soko, moyudo ng’atno ka pod ochung’ but ngamia." 
Genesis24:31 Nowachone niya, “Donji, in ng’at ma Ruoth Nyasaye oseguedho. Ere gimomiyo pod ichung’ oko? Aseikoni ot, kendo nitie kama ngamia nyalo betie.”" 
Genesis24:32 Mi ng’atno nodonjo e ot, to Laban nogonyo gik mane ngamia oting’o kendo nopedho ni ngamia lum, momiyogi chiembgi. Eka nokelo pi mondo jatich Ibrahim gi joge olwokgo tiendegi." 
Genesis24:33 Nokelnigi chiemo, to ng’atno nowacho niya, “Ok anyal chiemo ka pok ahulo gimomiyo abiro ka.” Omiyo Laban nowachone ni, “Ara wachi.”" 
Genesis24:34 Eka ng’atno nowacho niya, “An jatich Ibrahim." 
Genesis24:35 Ruoth Nyasaye oseguedho ruodha ahinya, mi osedoko ng’ama duong’. Osemiye rombe gi diek kod dhok mang’eny, kod fedha gi dhahabu, kaachiel gi wasumbni machwo gi mamon, kod ngamia gi kanje." 
Genesis24:36 Bende Sara chi ruodha nonywolone wuowi koseti, kendo wuodeno ema osemiyo mwandune duto." 
Genesis24:37 To ruodha nowachona niya, ‘Kuong’rina ni ok ninywom ni wuoda nyar jo-Kanaan ma adak e pinygini." 
Genesis24:38 To dhiyo dalawa ir owetena, mondo iyudie nyako ni wuoda.’" 
Genesis24:39 Mano nomiyo apenjo ruodha niya, ‘To datim ang’o kapo ni nyakono odagi biro koda?’" 
Genesis24:40 Nodwoka niya, ‘Ruoth Nyasaye ma arito chikne pile biro oro malaikane kodi mondo oguedh wuodhi. Inikaw nyar owadwa moro e dalawa mondo obed chi wuoda." 
Genesis24:41 Kitimo kamano to muma mitimoni ok nomaki. To bende kidhi ir owetenago, mi gitamore ni ok nyargi bi kodi, to kuong’ruokni ok nomaki.’" 
Genesis24:42 Omiyo ka nende achopo e soko, to nalamo Ruoth Nyasaye niya, ‘A Nyasach Ibrahim ruodha, yie iguedh wuodhani." 
Genesis24:43 Eri achung’ e dho sokoni. Ka nyako moro obiro umbo pi, abiro wachone niya, ‘Yie imiyae pi amodhi.’" 
Genesis24:44 To kodwoka ni, ‘Modhi, kendo abiro omo pi ni ngamia magi bende,’ to en ema mondo obed nyako ma iseyiero ni wuod ruodha.’" 
Genesis24:45 Kane pok atieko lemo, Rebeka nobiro koting’o dapi e goke, molor e soko mondo otwom pi. Nawachone niya, ‘Yie imiyae pi amodhi.’" 
Genesis24:46 Mi nogolo dapige e goke piyopiyo, mowachona niya, ‘Modhi; ngamia magi bende abiro miyo pi.’ Kamano namodho, kendo ngamia bende noomonigi pi." 
Genesis24:47 Bang’e napenje niya, ‘In nyar ng’a?’ Nodwoka ni, ‘An nyar Bethuel, wuod Nahor gi Milka.’ Eka naketo tere e ume, kod bangli e bade," 
Genesis24:48 kendo nagoyo chonga piny makulora kalamo Ruoth Nyasaye. Napako Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Ibrahim ruodha mosetelona maber mondo ayud nyar owadgi ruodha ni wuode. 
Genesis24:49 Koro nyisauru kuyie timo ng’wono ni ruodha. To ka ok uyie, bende nyisauru, mondo ang’e gima atimo.”" 
Genesis24:50 Laban gi Bethuel ne jodwoke niya, “Kaka wachni oa mana kuom Ruoth Nyasaye ok wanyal wachoe gimoro." 
Genesis24:51 Rebeka eri, kawe udhi kode mondo obed chi wuod ruodhi kaka Ruoth Nyasaye osechano.”" 
Genesis24:52 Kane jatich Ibrahim owinjo kamano, nogoyo chonge piny, mokulore, kolamo Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Genesis24:53 Eka nomiyo Rebeka gik moko mag fedha gi mag dhahabu, kaachiel gi lewni. Owadgi Rebeka kod min-gi bende nomiyo chiwo moko ma nengogi tek." 
Genesis24:54 Bang’e nochiemo kaachiel gi joge, mi ne ginindo kanyo. Kane gichiew gokinyi, ng’atno nowacho niya, “Weuru adog ir ruodha.”" 
Genesis24:55 To owadgi nyako kod min-gi nodwoke niya, “We nyarwa obed kodwa mondi kata kuom ndalo apar, eka bang’e udhi.”" 
Genesis24:56 To ng’atno nokwayogi ni, “Kik uriwa, to yieuru adog ir ruodha, nikech Ruoth Nyasaye oseguedho wuodhani.”" 
Genesis24:57 Mi ne giwachone niya, “We waluong nyako, mondo wawinj dhoge.”" 
Genesis24:58 Omiyo ne giluongo Rebeka, mi gipenje ni, “Iyie dhi gi ng’atni?” Nodwokogi niya, “Ee, ayie dhi kode.”" 
Genesis24:59 Kuom mano ne giyie mondo Rebeka gi dhako ma nopire jodhi gi jotich Ibrahim kod joge. 
Genesis24:60 Ne giguedho Rebeka ka giwachone niya, “Nyathiwa, bed min ji gana gi gana, kendo nyikwayi mondo olo wasikgi.”" 
Genesis24:61 Eka Rebeka kod nyige ma jotich noikore, moidho ngamia mondo gidhi gi ng’at cha. Kamano ng’atno nokawe modhi kode." 
Genesis24:62 Noyudo Isaka koro osedar modak Beer-lahai-roi, e piny Kanaan ma milambo." 
Genesis24:63 Kane owuotho e pap godhiambo, nopo koneno ngamia moko kabiro." 
Genesis24:64 Rebeka bende noneno Isaka, mi nolor oa e ngamia," 
Genesis24:65 mopenjo jatich Ibrahim niya, “Macha ng’a, mawuotho e pap ka biro romonwa cha?” Ng’atno nodwoke ni, “Macha ruodha.” Kane Rebeka owinjo kamano, nokawo nanga, moumogo wang’e." 
Genesis24:66 Ng’atno nonyiso Isaka gik moko duto ma nosetimore. 
Genesis24:67 Eka Isaka notero Rebeka e hembe, mokende. Isaka nohero Rebeka, mi chunye koro noa kuom wach tho min mare." 
Genesis25:1 Ibrahim nokendo dhako machielo ma nyinge Ketura. 
Genesis25:2 Dhakono nonywolone Zimran gi Jokshan gi Medan gi Midian gi Ishbak kod Shua. 
Genesis25:3 To Jokshan nonywolo Sheba gi Dedan. Nyikwa Dedan ne gin jo-Ashur gi jo-Letush kod jo-Leum. 
Genesis25:4 To Midian nonywolo Efa gi Efer gi Hanok gi Abida kod Eldaa. Jogo duto ne joka Ketura. 
Genesis25:5 Ibrahim nosemiyo Isaka mwandune duto," 
Genesis25:6 to kane pok otho, nopogo ni yawuot monde mamoko chiwo. Eka nodarogi, mondo gidag mabor gi Isaka wuode, mi gidhi e piny man yo wuokchieng’." 
Genesis25:7 Ibrahim notieko higni mia achiel gi piero abiriyo gabich," 
Genesis25:8 mi notho moluwo kwerene, koseti ahinya, kendo ka hike oniang’." 
Genesis25:9 Yawuote ma Isaka kod Ishmael noyike but Sara chiege e rogo man Makpela e puoth Efron wuod Zohar ja-Hiti mane ni yo wuokchieng’ mar Mamre. 
Genesis25:10 Mano e puodho mane Ibrahim ong’iewo kuom jo-Hiti. 
Genesis25:11 Bang’ tho Ibrahim, Nyasaye noguedho Isaka wuode, mane oyudo odak but soko miluongo ni Beer-lahai-roi." 
Genesis25:12 Ishmael ne wuod Ibrahim mane Hagar nyar Misri jatich Sara onywolone. 
Genesis25:13 Yawuot Ishmael, kaluwore ne gin: Nebayoth, wuode makayo, eka Kedar gi Abdeel gi Mibsaim" 
Genesis25:14 gi Mishma gi Duma gi Musa 
Genesis25:15 gi Hadad gi Tema gi Jetur gi Nafish kod Kedema. 
Genesis25:16 Mago e yawuot Ishmael, ma nyinggi nochak miechgi kod kuonde mane gibworoe. Ne gin ruodhi apar gariyo, ng’ato ka ng’ato gi ogandane." 
Genesis25:17 Ishmael notho moluwo kwerene ka ne en jahigni mia achiel gi piero adek gabiriyo. 
Genesis25:18 Nyikwaye nodak e piny manie kind Havila gi Shur, yo wuokchieng’ mar Misri e yo madhi Asuria. Kamano ne gidak mochwalore gi owetegi ma joka Isaka." 
Genesis25:19 Ma e sigand Isaka wuod Ibrahim. 
Genesis25:20 Ne en jahigni piero ang’wen kane okendo Rebeka nyamin Laban wuod Bethuel ja-Aram ma nodak e piny Mesopotamia. 
Genesis25:21 Rebeka nodak aming’a kapok onywol, omiyo Isaka nolamone Ruoth Nyasaye mondo oyud nyathi. Ruoth Nyasaye nowinjo kwayone, mi Rebeka nomako ich." 
Genesis25:22 Kane Rebeka owinjo ka nyithindo tugo e iye, nowacho niya, “Gima timorenani, tiende ang’o?” Omiyo nodhi penjo Nyasaye tiend wachno." 
Genesis25:23 Ruoth Nyasaye nodwoke niya, “Ogendini ariyo nie iyi, to ogendinigo biro pogore. Achiel nobed ratego moloyo wadgi, kendo maduong’ noti ni matin.”" 
Genesis25:24 Kane Rebeka onywol, noyud ni kara noting’o rude adier." 
Genesis25:25 Wuowi mane okwong nywol ne kwar, kendo dende ne chalo gi nanga marayier, omiyo ne gichake ni Esau (tiende ni, rayier)." 
Genesis25:26 Gikanyono owadgi Esau nowuok ka lwete omako ofunj tiend Esau, mi nochake ni Jakobo (tiende ni ofunj tielo). Isaka nonywolo yawuotego ka en jahigni piero auchiel." 
Genesis25:27 Kane gidoko joma dongo, Esau nobet jadwar ma jaganga, kendo ng’at ma jathim. Jakobo to ne japur, kendo ne dong’ dala." 
Genesis25:28 Isaka nohero Esau nikech ring le mane Esau kelone ochamo. Rebeka to ne ohero Jakobo. 
Genesis25:29 Chieng’ moro, kane Jakobo tedo ogira, Esau nobiro ire koa dwar e thim." 
Genesis25:30 Nodenyo ahinya, omiyo nowacho ni Jakobo niya, “Kech nega! Miya gima kwarno acham.” (Mano emomiyo nochak Esau ni Edom, tiende ni gima kwar.)" 
Genesis25:31 To Jakobo nodwoke niya, “Abiro miyigo mana kimiya duong’ni mar nywol.”" 
Genesis25:32 Esau nowachone niya “Duong’ mar nywol to biro konya gang’o, ka kech nega kama?”" 
Genesis25:33 To Jakobo nodwoke niya, “Kuong’rina mondi, ni ibiro miya duong’ni mar nywol.” Mi Esau nokwong’orene, momiye duong’ne mar nywol." 
Genesis25:34 Eka Jakobo nomiye kuon kod ogich ng’or. Kane Esau osechiemo, nowuok, modhi. Kamano e kaka nojwang’o duong’ne mar nywol." 
Genesis26:1 Kech moro nowuok e piny, ma ok mano mane osewuok e ndalo Ibrahim, mi Isaka nodhi Gerar ir Abimelek ruodh jo-Filistia." 
Genesis26:2 Eka Ruoth Nyasaye nofwenyorene, mowachne niya, “Kik idhi Misri, to dag mana e pinyni kama abiro nyisi." 
Genesis26:3 Dag adaga e pinyni mondi, eka nabed kodi kendo naguedhi, kamiyi pinyni duto gi nyikwayi. Kamano nachop singruok mane atimo ni Ibrahim wuoru." 
Genesis26:4 Anami nyikwayi bedo mang’eny ka sulwe mae polo, kendo anamigi pinyni duto, mi ogendini duto nokwaya mondo agwedhgi kaka aseguedho nyikwayi." 
Genesis26:5 Anaguedhgi kamano nikech Ibrahim nowinjo wachna kendo nomako chikena gi buchena duto.” 
Genesis26:6 Kuom mano Isaka nomedo dak Gerar. 
Genesis26:7 Jo-Gerar nopenjo Isaka ka Rebeka en chiege, to nowuondogi ni en nyamin mare. Noparo ni dipo ka ginege konyisogi ni Rebeka en chiege, nikech ne en dhako ma jaber ahinya."
