Genesis26:8 Chieng’ moro kane gisedak kuno kuom kinde mogwarore, Abimelek ma ruodh jo-Filistia nong’icho gie dirisa, moneno ka Isaka gi Rebeca jotugo." 
Genesis26:9 Omiyo noluongo Isaka mopenje niya, “Kwerie ka dhakoni ok chiegi! Ang’o mane omiyo iwuondowa ni en nyameru?” Isaka nodwoke niya, “Naluor ni dipo ka jogi onega, ka giwinjo ni en chiega.”" 
Genesis26:10 To Abimelek nomedo penje ni, “Ang’o momiyo isetimonwa kamano? Ka dine ng’atwa moro riwre gi chiegi, to in ema dimiyo wabedo joketho.”" 
Genesis26:11 Eka Abimelek nochiko joge duto, kosiemogi ni, “Ng’at ma nomul Isaka kata chiege, to nonegi!”" 
Genesis26:12 E higano, Isaka nopuro, mi nokayo cham moloyo ma nochwoyo nyadi mia, nikech Ruoth Nyasaye noguedhe." 
Genesis26:13 Nomedo bedo gi mwandu nyaka koro nomew ahinya. 
Genesis26:14 Nyiego nomako jo-Filistia kod Isaka, nikech ne en gi rombe kod dhok mathoth, kaachiel kod wasumbini mang’eny." 
Genesis26:15 Omiyo ne gidino sokni mane wasumb Ibrahim wuon Isaka okunyo. 
Genesis26:16 Bang’ mano, Abimelek nowacho ni Isaka niya, “Aye ka, nikech itek moloyowa!”" 
Genesis26:17 Omiyo Isaka noa, modhi e holo mar Gerar, mi nodak kuno." 
Genesis26:18 Nochako okunyo sokni mane osekuny e ndalo Ibrahim wuon mare, kendo mane jo-Filistia osedino bang’ tho Ibrahim. Noluongogi gi nying mane wuon mare osechakogi chon." 
Genesis26:19 Jotich Isaka nokunyo holono, mi giyudoe soko mamol." 
Genesis26:20 To jokwath ma jo Gerar nolaro pigno gi jokwadh Isaka, ka giwacho niya, “Pigno en marwa.” Omiyo Isaka nochako nying sokono ni, Esek, (tiende ni, dhaw), nikech jogo nodhaw kode." 
Genesis26:21 Eka jotichne nokunyo soko moro, to kanyo bende ne gidhawie, mi nochako nyinge ni Sitna, (Tiende ni, sadha)." 
Genesis26:22 Nodar oa kanyo, mokunyo soko machielo ma koro ne ok gidhawie. Nowacho niya, “Koro Ruoth Nyasaye osemiyowa thuolo e pinyni, kendo wabiro medore.” Kuom mano nochako nying sokono ni Rehoboth, (tiende ni, thuolo moromowa)." 
Genesis26:23 Isaka nodar oa kuno, mi nodhi Beersheba." 
Genesis26:24 To nopo ka Ruoth Nyasaye ofwenyorene gotieno, mowachone niya, “An e Nyasach Ibrahim wuoru. Kik iluor, nikech an kodi. Abiro guedhi, kendo abiro miyi nyikwayo mang’eny, nikech singruok mane atimo ni Ibrahim jatichna.”" 
Genesis26:25 Kuom mano, Isaka nogero kendo-mar-misango kuno, molamoe Ruoth Nyasaye. Nodak kanyo, mi jotichne nokunyo soko moro kanyono." 
Genesis26:26 Abimelek noa Gerar gi Ahuzath jang’adne rieko, kod Fikol jaduong’ jolwenje, mi gibiro ir Isaka." 
Genesis26:27 Isaka nopenjogi niya, “Ang’o momiyo ubiro nena, to e ndalo mane adak e pinyu, to ne ok udwara, muriemba?”" 
Genesis26:28 Ne gidwoke niya, “Koro wasefwenyo ni Nyasaye ni kodi, omiyo wadwaro ni mondo watim kodi winjruok kwakuong’ore. Wadwaro ni mondo isingrinwa," 
Genesis26:29 ni ok nihinywa, mana kaka wan bende ok wahinyi. Ne watimoni maber, mi ne ia gi kue, kendo koro Ruoth Nyasaye oseguedhi.”" 
Genesis26:30 Kuom mano Isaka nolosonigi chiemo, mi ne gichiemo kendo gimetho." 
Genesis26:31 Kinyne gokinyi ne gitimo winjruok gi Isaka. Eka Isaka noweyogi, mi gia gi kue." 
Genesis26:32 Chieng’onogo ema jotich Isaka nobiroe ire, monyise ni gisekunyo soko, kendo giyudoe pi." 
Genesis26:33 Omiyo nochako nying sokono ni Shiba, (tiende ni, kuong’ruok). Mano dala man kanyo pod iluongo ni Beer-sheba." 
Genesis26:34 Kane Esau ja-higni piero ang’wen, nokendo Judith nyar Beeri, ja-Hiti, kod Basemath nyar Elon ma bende ja-Hiti." 
Genesis26:35 Wachno nochando chuny Isaka gi Rebeka ahinya. 
Genesis27:1 Kane Isaka oseti modoko muofu, noluongo Esau wuode makayo, ni “Wuoda!” Esau nodwoke ni, “Antie.”" 
Genesis27:2 Eka Isaka nowachone niya, “Asedoko moti kendo ok ang’eyo sa thona." 
Genesis27:3 Omiyo kaw atung’ gi asere mondo idhi e thim, inegna le." 
Genesis27:4 Bang’e itedna ring’o mamit kaka ahero cha, mondo ikelna acham. Eka abiro guedhi kapok atho.”" 
Genesis27:5 To Rebeka nowinjo ka Isaka wuoyo gi Esau wuode. Omiyo kane Esau osedhi e thim dwaro le," 
Genesis27:6 noluongo Jakobo wuode, mowachone niya, “Asewinjo ka wuoru wacho ni Esau owadu ni," 
Genesis27:7 ‘Negna le mondo itedna ring’o mamit acham, eka aguedhi e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye kapok atho.’" 
Genesis27:8 Kuom mano, nyathina, yie iwinj gima awachoni." 
Genesis27:9 Dhiyo e jamni mondo ikelna nyidiek ariyo mopugno, atedni wuoru kaka oherocha," 
Genesis27:10 mondo iterne ocham, kendo oguedhi kapok otho.”" 
Genesis27:11 To Jakobo nowacho ni min mare niya, “Ing’eyo ni Esau en ng’ama rayier, to an denda poth." 
Genesis27:12 Kamoro wuora nyalo mula, mofweny ni awuonde, mi dayud mana kuong’ kar gueth.”" 
Genesis27:13 To min mare nodwoke niya, “We mondo kuong’no omaka, nyathina, to in yie iomna nyidiego mana kaka awachoni.”" 
Genesis27:14 Omiyo Jakobo nodhi mokelo nyidiek, mi min mare notedo ring’o mamit kaka Isaka nohero." 
Genesis27:15 Eka Rebeka nokawo lep Esau mabeyo ma nokano, mi orwakogo Jakobo." 
Genesis27:16 Nokawo bende piende diego moumogo bede Jakobo kod ng’ute kama onge yier. 
Genesis27:17 Eka nomiye ring’o ma noseloso mamitno, gi kuon ma nosetedo." 
Genesis27:18 Jakobo nodhi ir wuon mare, moluonge ni, “Wuora!” Mi wuon nodwoke ni, “Antie wuoda. To in ng’a?”" 
Genesis27:19 Jakobo nodwoke ni, “An Esau wuodi maduong’. Eri asetimo kaka ninyisa. Koro chungi mondo icham ring’o ma asekeloni, eka mondo iguedha.”" 
Genesis27:20 Isaka nopenjo wuode niya, “To iyude piyopiyo kamano nadi?” Jakobo nodwoke ni, “Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachi ema osekonya mayude.”" 
Genesis27:21 Eka Isaka nowacho ni Jakobo niya, “Sud machiegni amuli, eka mondo ang’e ka in Esau wuoda adier.”" 
Genesis27:22 Jakobo nosudo machiegni gi wuon, mi wuon nomule, mowachone ni, “Duondi chalo gi duond Jakobo, lweti to chalo gi lwet Esau.”" 
Genesis27:23 To ne ok ofwenyo ni en Jakobo, nikech bedene notimo yier ka mag Esau, kendo mano emomiyo noyie guedhe." 
Genesis27:24 Kata kamano nomedo penje niya, “In Esau wuoda adier.” Jakobo nodwoke niya, “Ee, an.”" 
Genesis27:25 Isaka nowachone niya, “Ara koro miya ring’o mondo acham eka aguedhi.” Eka Jakobo nomiye ring’o mochamo, kod divai omadho." 
Genesis27:26 Eka wuon mare nowachone niya, “Sud machiegni wuoda, mondo inyodha.”" 
Genesis27:27 Omiyo nosudo machiegni monyodhe. Kane Isaka owinjo tik lepe, noguedhe kowacho kama: “Tik wuoda madum mamitni chalo gi tik puodho ma Ruoth Nyasaye oseguedho." 
Genesis27:28 Nyasaye mondo okelni koth moa e polo, mondo puotheni obed momew kendo iyud cham gi divai mogundho." 
Genesis27:29 Ogendini duto mondo otini kendo okulreni. Bed ruodh oweteni, kendo nyikwa meru mondo okulreni. Okuong’ joma kuong’i, to oguedh jogo maguedhi.”" 
Genesis27:30 Kane Isaka osetieko guedho Jakobo kamano, Jakobo nowuok. To gikanyono, Esau owadgi noduogo koa dwar." 
Genesis27:31 En bende notedo chiemo mamit, motero ni wuon mare. Nowachone niya, “Wuora, yie ichung’ mondo icham ring’o ma asekeloni, eka iguedha.”" 
Genesis27:32 Isaka nopenje niya, “In to, in ng’a?” Nodwoke ni, “An Esau wuodi maduong’.”" 
Genesis27:33 Isaka nobwok kendo okirni ahinya, mopenje niya, “To kara macha nende ng’a, mane onego le, mokelona, nende achamo ring’ono kapok ibiro, mi aguedho ng’atno, kendo guethno osiko.”" 
Genesis27:34 Kane Esau owinjo kamano noywak malit ahinya, mowacho niya, “Wuora, an bende guedha!”" 
Genesis27:35 Isaka nodwoke niya, “Owadu nobiro mowuonda, kendo koro osekawo guethni.”" 
Genesis27:36 Eka Esau nowacho niya, “Ne onyal chake ni Jakobo, nikech koro osewuonda diriyo, mokwongo nokawo duong’na mar nywol, kendo koro osemaya gueth. To donge ikanonae gueth moro?”" 
Genesis27:37 Isaka nodwoko Esau niya, “Aseloke ruodhi, kendo aseloko owetene duto mondo obed jotichne. Aseguedhe gi cham gi divai, koro wuoda ere gima odong’ ma datimni?”" 
Genesis27:38 To Esau nomedo penjo wuon niya, “Wuora, ne in mana gi gueth achiel kende, yie iguedha an bende.” Mi noywak malit." 
Genesis27:39 Eka Isaka nowachone niya, “Inidag e piny motimo ongoro, kendo puotheni ok noyud koth moa e polo." 
Genesis27:40 To liganglani ema nomiyi chiemo, kendo inibed jatich owadu. To kinde nobi ma ining’anyie, kendo nia e bwo lochne.”" 
Genesis27:41 Esau nomako sadha gi Jakobo nikech gueth mane wuon-gi oseguedhego. Omiyo noparo niya, “Wuora tinde chiegni tho, to kaseloso liende, to abiro nego Jakobo owadwa.”" 
Genesis27:42 To kane Rebeka ong’eyo gima Esau paro, noluongo Jakobo mowachone niya, “Wuoda, winji! Esau owadu dwaro negi mondo ochulni kuor." 
Genesis27:43 Omiyo adwaro ni mondo itim gima abiro wachoni. Ikri piyopiyo mondo iring idhi Harran ir Laban owadwa," 
Genesis27:44 idag kuno. Ka mirimb owadu oserumo," 
Genesis27:45 kendo wiye osewil gi gima isetimone, eka naor ng’ato mondo oomi. Ere gima omiyo yawuota ariyo ditho odiechieng’ achiel?”" 
Genesis27:46 Kuom mano, Rebeka nowacho ni Isaka niya, “Mond Esau ma nyi pinje mokogi ojoga. Ka dipo ni Jakobo bende okendo mana nyar Hiti, to ber katho.”" 
Genesis28:1 Isaka noluongo Jakobo, moguedhe kendo osieme niya, “Kik ikend nyar jo-Kanaan," 
Genesis28:2 to dhiyo Mesopotamia piyopiyo e dala Bethuel kwaru mondo ikend nyar Laban neru. 
Genesis28:3 Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto oguedhi, kendo omiyi nyithindo mang’eny, mondo chieng’ moro idok wuon ogendini mathoth." 
Genesis28:4 Onego oguedhi kendo oguedh nyikwayi kaka noguedho Ibrahim, mondo ikaw piny ma koro idakie. En e piny mane Nyasaye omiyo Ibrahim.”" 
Genesis28:5 Kamano Isaka nooro Jakobo Mesopotamia ir Laban wuod Bethuel ja-Aram. Labanno ne owadgi Rebeka ma min Jakobo gi Esau. 
Genesis28:6 Esau koro nong’eyo ni Isaka oseguedho Jakobo kendo oseore Mesopotamia mondo odhi okend kuno. Nowinjo bende ni kane Isaka guedho Jakobo, nosieme ni kik okend nyar Kanaan." 
Genesis28:7 Bende nong’eyo ni Jakobo nowinjo wach wuon mare gi min mare, mi nosedhi Mesopotamia." 
Genesis28:8 Kamano Esau nofwenyo ni kara Isaka wuon mare ne ok ohero nyi Kanaan. 
Genesis28:9 Omiyo nodhi ir Ishmael wuod Ibrahim, mokendo Mahalath, nyar Ishmael ma nyamin Nebayoth." 
Genesis28:10 Jakobo nowuok Beersheba kochomo Harran. 
Genesis28:11 Nochopo kamoro mobworoe nikech chieng’ nosepodho, nonindo kanyo koteno wiye gi kidi moro ma nokwanyo kanyo." 
Genesis28:12 To konindo, noleko ni oneno raidhi mochung’ koa e piny, mochopo e polo. To malaika mag Nyasaye ne luwo raidhino, kaidho malo, kendo kalor piny." 
Genesis28:13 Bende noneno Ruoth Nyasaye kochung’ bute, ka wachone niya, “An e Ruoth Nyasaye, ma Nyasach Ibrahim kwaru, kendo Nyasach Isaka, piny minindoeni abiro miyi gi nyikwayi." 
Genesis28:14 Nyikwayi nobed mang’eny ka lowo. Gininya malach kendo ginilandre koni gi koni, mi dhoudi duto mae piny nokwa mondo oguedhgi kaka aseguedhi gi nyikwayi." 
Genesis28:15 Anabed kodi, kendo anariti kamoro amora midhiye, nyaka adwoki e pinyni. Ok naweyi ka pok atimoni gima asewachoni.”" 
Genesis28:16 Eka Jakobo nochiew mowacho niya, “Adier, kara Ruoth Nyasaye nika, to ok ang’eyo!”" 
Genesis28:17 Luoro nomake, mowacho niya, “Ma kama lich manade! Nyaka bed ni en od Nyasaye, kendo ranga polo.”" 
Genesis28:18 Jakobo nochiew gokinyi mang’ich. Nokawo kidi ma notenogo wiyeno, mi ochunge ka siro moolo kuome mo, kochiwe ni Nyasaye." 
Genesis28:19 Nochako nying kanyo ni Bethel (tiende ni od Nyasaye.) To e kinde mokwongo dalano niluongo ni Huz. 
Genesis28:20 Eka Jakobo nokuong’ore ka wacho ni Ruoth Nyasaye niya, “A Ruoth Nyasaye, ka inibed koda, kendo ka initelna e wuodha, kimiya chiemo gi lewni," 
Genesis28:21 mi aduog maber e dalawa, eka nibed Nyasacha," 
Genesis28:22 kendo kidi ma asechungo ka sironi nobed odi. Bende anamiyi achiel kuom apar mag gik moko duto mimiya.” 
Genesis29:1 Jakobo nodhi nyime gi wuodhe nyaka nochopo e piny man yo wuokchieng’. 
Genesis29:2 Nopo koneno soko e pap ka kweth adek mag rombe onindo e dire. Sokono ema ne jamni modhoe, to ne nitie kidi maduong’ ahinya e dhoge," 
Genesis29:3 ma jokwath ne ng’ielo oko mondo gimi jambgi pi. To kane jamni osemodho, eka jokwath ne dwoko kidino ewi soko." 
Genesis29:4 Jakobo nopenjogi niya, “Osiepena, ua kanye?” Ne gidwoke ni, “Waa Harran”" 
Genesis29:5 Eka nopenjogi ka ging’eyo Laban ma nyakwar Nahor, mi ne gidwoke ni ging’eye." 
Genesis29:6 Nomedo penjogi niya, “Ongima?” Ne gidwoke ni, “Ongima, kendo Rahel ma nyare ero biro gi jambe.”" 
Genesis29:7 Jakobo nowacho nigi niya, “Piny pod chon, kendo sa mirwakoe jamni podi. Dak umodhgi, mondo utergi e lek?”" 
Genesis29:8 Ne gidwoke niya, “Ok wanyal timo kamano kapok jokwath duto ochokore mi wang’ielo kidi man e dho soko oko mondo jamni omodhi.”" 
Genesis29:9 To kane pod Jakobo wuoyo kodgi, Rahel nochopo gi jamb wuon mare, nimar en ema ne en jakwadhgi." 
Genesis29:10 Kane Jakobo oneno Rahel ka ni gi jamb Laban ner mare, nodhi mong’ielo kidi mani dho soko, mi nomiyo jamb Laban pi." 
Genesis29:11 Eka nonyodho Rahel, kendo oywak." 
Genesis29:12 Nowachone niya, “An wuod Rebeka, ma nyamin wuoru!” Gikanyono Rahel noringo monyiso wuon mare." 
Genesis29:13 To kane Laban owinjo ni Jakobo wuod nyamin obiro, nodhi piyopiyo mondo oromne. Nokwake monyodhe, eka nokele dala, bang’e Jakobo nonyiso Laban gik moko duto mane osetimore," 
Genesis29:14 mi Laban nowachone niya, “Adier in remba.” Kamano Jakobo nobet kode kuom due mangima." 
Genesis29:15 Bang’e Laban nowacho ni Jakobo niya, “Ok owinjore itina nono mana nikech in watna, omiyo nyisa gima onego achuli.”" 
Genesis29:16 To Laban ne nigi nyiri ariyo. Nyako maduong’ ne nyinge Lea, to matin ne Rahel." 
Genesis29:17 Lea ne ok jaber gi ka wang’e, to Rahel ne nigi chia, kendo nojaber." 
Genesis29:18 Jakobo nohero Rahel, omiyo nowacho ni Laban niya, “Abiro tiyoni kuom higni abiriyo mondo imiya Rahel nyari.”" 
Genesis29:19 Laban nodwoke niya, “Ber ka amiyigo, moloyo miye ng’at machielo, omiyo bed koda.”" 
Genesis29:20 Jakobo notiyo ni Laban kuom higni abiriyo mondo okend Rahel, to hignigo duto nochalone mana ka ndalo moko manok, nikech nohero Rahel ahinya." 
Genesis29:21 Jakobo nowacho ni Laban niya, “Asetieko ndalo mane iketona, omiyo koro miya nyari obed chiega.”" 
Genesis29:22 Kuom mano Laban notimo nyasi, moluongo jogweng’no duto." 
Genesis29:23 To gotienono nomiyo Jakobo mana Lea kar Rahel mi Jakobo nokende. 
Genesis29:24 Bende Laban nokawo Zilpa jatichne manyako, momiyo Lea mondo obed jatichne." 
Genesis29:25 Kinyne gokinyi, Jakobo nofwenyo ni kara Laban nomiye mana Lea, omiyo nopenjo Laban niya, “Ang’o momiyo isetimona kama? Natiyoni mondo imiya Rahel. Koro ang’o momiyo isewuonda?”" 
Genesis29:26 To Laban nodwoke niya, “Thurwa ka nyako matin ok kwongni maduong’ dhi tedo." 
Genesis29:27 Rit arita nyaka watiek juma mar nyasini eka abiro miyi Rahel, kiyie tiyona kuom higni abiriyo mamoko.”" 
Genesis29:28 Jakobo noyie gi wachne, motieko jumb nyasi mar kend Lea." 
Genesis29:29 Eka Laban nomiye Rahel nyare, kendo nokawo Bilha jatichne manyako, momiyo Rahel mondo obed jatichne." 
Genesis29:30 Kamano Jakobo nokendo Rahel bende, mi nohere moloyo Lea. Bang’ mano notiyo ni Laban kuom higni abiriyo moko." 
Genesis29:31 Kane Ruoth Nyasaye oneno ni Lea ok oher, noguedhe gi nyathi, to Rahel ne ok nywol." 
Genesis29:32 Lea nomako ich, monywolo nyathi ma wuowi. Nowacho niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye oseneno chandruokna, kendo koro chwora biro hera.” Omiyo nochako wuodeno ni Reuben, (tiende ni Nyasaye oseneno chandruokna.)" 
Genesis29:33 Nochako omako ich monywolo wuowi moro. Nowacho niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye osemiya wuowi machielo, nimar nowinjo ka chwora ok ohera.” Kuom mano nochake ni Simeon, (tiende ni, winjo.)" 
Genesis29:34 Nomako ich kendo, monywolo wuowi mar adek. Nowacho niya, “Koro chwora biro padore kuoma, nimar asenywolone yawuowi adek.” Mi nochake ni Lawi, (tiende ni padruok.)" 
Genesis29:35 Bang’e nochako omako ich, monywolo wuowi moro kendo. Nowacho niya, “Koro apako Ruoth Nyasaye.” Omiyo nochake ni Juda, (tiende ni, pak). Bang’ mano nochung’ moweyo nywol." 
Genesis30:1 Kane Rahel oneno ni ok onywol ni Jakobo nyithindo, nyiego nomake gi nyamin mare, mowacho ni Jakobo niya, “Miya nyithindo, nono to abiro tho!”" 
Genesis30:2 Jakobo nokecho gi Rahel, mowachone niya, “Iparo ni an e Nyasaye, mosetami e nywol?”" 
Genesis30:3 Nodwoko Jakobo niya, “Kaw Bilha jatichna manyako, ibedgo, mondo onywolna nyithindo e chonga. Mano e yo ma dimi abed gi nyithindo.”" 
Genesis30:4 Mi nochiwo Bilha jatichne ni chwore. 
Genesis30:5 Bang’e Bilha nomako ich, monywolone Jakobo wuowi." 
Genesis30:6 Eka Rahel nowacho niya, “Nyasaye oseng’ado bucha maber, nikech osewinjo kwayona, momiya nyathi ma wuowi.” Omiyo nochake ni Dan (tiende ni ng’ado bura)." 
Genesis30:7 Bilha nomako ich kendo mi nonywolone Jakobo wuowi machielo. 
Genesis30:8 Rahel nowacho niya, “Ne apiem matek gi nyamera, mi aloyo.” Omiyo nochako wuodeno ni Naftali (tiende ni piem)." 
Genesis30:9 Kane Lea ofwenyo ni ochung’ ok onywol, nokawo Zilpa jatichne, momiyo Jakobo." 
Genesis30:10 Zilpa bende nonywolo ni Jakobo wuowi. 
Genesis30:11 Omiyo Lea nowacho niya, “An jahawi!” Mi nochake ni Gad (tiende ni, Hawi)." 
Genesis30:12 Zilpa nonywolo ni Jakobo wuowi machielo," 
Genesis30:13 mi Lea nowacho niya, “Mano mor manade! Koro mon biro luonga ni Omore.” Omiyo nochake ni Asha, (tiende ni, Mor)." 
Genesis30:14 E ndalo mag kayo ngano, Reuben nodhi e puodho, moyudo olemo miluongo ni mandrek, mokelo ni Lea min mare. Rahel nokwayo Lea mondo omiye mandrek mane wuode okelo." 
Genesis30:15 To Lea nopenje niya, “Iparo ni kawo chwora en gima tin koso, mapod kendo idwaroe mana mandrek mag wuoda bende?” To Rahel nodwoke niya, “Kimiya mandrekgo, to ang’ Jakobo nonind e odi kawuono.”" 
Genesis30:16 Omiyo kane Jakobo duogo dala koa e puodho godhiambo, Lea nowuok kadhi romone, mowachone niya, “Nyaka inind e oda kawuono, nikech aseng’iewi gi mandrek mag wuoda.” Kuom mano otienono nonindo e ode." 
Genesis30:17 Nyasaye nowinjo kwayo Lea, modwoke. Nomako ich, kendo nonywolo ni Jakobo wuowi mar abich." 
Genesis30:18 Eka Lea nowacho niya, “Nyasaye osemiya pokna, nikech namiyo chwora jatichna.” Omiyo nochako wuode ni Isakar, (tiende ni, pok)." 
Genesis30:19 Bang’e Lea nomako ich kendo, monywolo ni Jakobo wuowi mar auchiel." 
Genesis30:20 Nowacho niya, “Nyasaye osemiya chiwo maber. Koro chwora biro gena, nikech asenywolone yawuowi auchiel.” Omiyo nochako wuodeno ni Zebulun, (tiende ni, geno)." 
Genesis30:21 Achien nonywolo nyako, mochako ni Dina." 
Genesis30:22 Bang’e Nyasaye noparo Rahel nodwoko kwayone, moguedhe gi nyathi." 
Genesis30:23 Nomako ich, monywolo nyathi ma wuowi. Eka nowacho niya, “Nyasaye osegolona wichkuot ma nyocha an go.” Omiyo nochako wuodeno ni Josef, (tiende ni golo kata medo). Nowacho niya," 
Genesis30:24 “Mad Ruoth Nyasaye medna wuowi machielo.” 
Genesis30:25 Kane Rahel osenywolo Josef, Jakobo nowacho ni Laban niya, “We mondo adog thurwa." 
Genesis30:26 Miya monda gi nyithinda ma omiyo asebedo ka atiyoni.” 
Genesis30:27 Laban nodwoke niya, “Yie awachie. Aneno ni asemew, kendo Ruoth Nyasaye oseguedha nikech in." 
Genesis30:28 Omiyo nyisa pok monego achuli.” 
Genesis30:29 Jakobo nodwoke niya, “Ing’eyo kaka asetiyoni, kendo kaka jambi osenywolore ka aritogi." 
Genesis30:30 Kane abiro, jambi ne nok, to koro gisemedore ahinya, kendo Ruoth Nyasaye oseguedhi e yoreni duto nikech an. Donge koro en kinde ma an bende onego apidhie jooda?”" 
Genesis30:31 Laban nopenje ni, “Onego achuli ang’o?” To Jakobo nodwoke ni, “Ok adwar mondo imiya gimoro, to mak mana kiyie timo gima adwaro, eka pod abiro medo bedo jakwadhi." 
Genesis30:32 Kawuono abiro wuotho ei jambi duto, mondo awal rombe maratenge, gi diek marang’eye, kod maraboge, obed yorgi. Ma e pok ma adwaro." 
Genesis30:33 To bang’e inyalo neno ane kaka asebedo jaadiera. Ka ibiro nono jamba, mineno ka an gi diel moro ma ok rabok kata rang’ech, kata rombo ma ok rateng’ to kara mano nobed gima okwal.”" 
Genesis30:34 Laban nodwoke ni, “Ber! Wabiro timo kamano.”" 
Genesis30:35 To chieng’no Laban nogolo nywogi maraboge kod marang’eye, gi nyibuche ma aboge kod ma ang’eye kata man gi kido motono marachar rachar, kaachiel gi rombe maratenge. Jamnigo duto nomiyo yawuote," 
Genesis30:36 modhi kodgi mabor moromo wuodh ndalo adek, koa kuma ne Jakobo nitie. To Jakobo nodong’ ka kwayo jamb Laban mamoko." 
Genesis30:37 Eka Jakobo nokawo kete moko mag yien mopogore opogore, mi nopoko kuonde moko e korgi, mondo igi marachar onen." 
Genesis30:38 Nochungo ketego but mberni ma jamni modhoe, mondo jamni ochomgi tir ka modho, nikech kanyo ema ne thuondi luwogie." 
Genesis30:39 Omiyo kane oluwgi e nyim ketego kamano, to ne ginywolo nyithindo maraponde gi marang’eye kod maraboge." 
Genesis30:40 To bang’e Jakobo nopogo imbe, mi oweyo mana mago maraponde gi maratenge mondo oluw romb Laban. Mano e yo mane omedogo jambe owuon, mi ne ok oriwogi gi mek Laban." 
Genesis30:41 Kane iluwo swinni motegno, Jakobo ne keto ketego e nyimgi, but mberni ma gimodhoe, ni mondo igi opong’ e nyim ketego." 
Genesis30:42 To ne ok oketo ketego e nyim swinni moyomno. Omiyo diek moyomno nodong’ ni Laban, to motegno nobedo mag Jakobo." 
Genesis30:43 Piyopiyo nono Jakobo nodoko jamoko miwuoro. Ne en gi jamni mang’eny gi ngamia kod kenje, kaachiel gi wasumbini ma chuo gi mamon." 
Genesis31:1 Jakobo nowinjo ni yawuot Laban wacho niya, “Jakobo osekawo gik wuonwa duto, kendo mwandu ma en go oseyudo mana kuom wuonwa.”" 
Genesis31:2 Noneno bende ka Laban koro ok ohere kaka chon. 
Genesis31:3 Bang’e Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Jakobo niya, “Dogi e pinyu ir oweteni, abiro bet kodi kuno.”" 
Genesis31:4 Omiyo Jakobo noluongo Rahel gi Lea kuma nokwayoe jambe," 
Genesis31:5 mowachonigi niya, “Aseneno ka wuonu tinde ok ohera kaka nohera e kinde mokwongo, to kata kamano Nyasach wuora osebedo ka ni koda." 
Genesis31:6 Uduto ung’eyo kaka asetiyo ni wuonu gi tekra duto. 
Genesis31:7 En to, osewuonda, moloko pokna nyadipar. To kata kamano, Nyasaye ne ok oweyo ohinya." 
Genesis31:8 Kane Laban owachona ni diek marang’eye ema nobed pokna, to diek duto ne nywolo mana nyithindo marang’eye, kendo ka nowacho ni jamni ma kitgi rapora ema nobed pokna, to diek duto ne nywolo mana nyithindo ma kitgi rapora." 
Genesis31:9 Kamano Nyasaye osegolo jamni kuom wuonu, momiya." 
Genesis31:10 E kinde mane thuondi dwaro luwo jamni, naleko maneno ni nyuogi duto malupo, gin rang’eye gi raponde kod ma kitgi okiko okiko." 
Genesis31:11 Malaika mar Nyasaye nowuoyo koda ka aleko, moluonga niya, ‘Jakobo’. Mi nadwoke ni, ‘Antie’" 
Genesis31:12 Nowachona niya, ‘Neye kaka nyuogi duto ma luwo diek gin rang’eye gi raponda kod ma kitgi okiko okiko. Mano timore nikech aseneno gik moko duto ma Laban timoni." 
Genesis31:13 An e Nyasaye ma nofwenyoreni Bethel kuma niwiroe siro gi mo, kichiwena, kendo ikuong’ori. Koro wuogi ia e pinyni mondo idog thuru.’ ”" 
Genesis31:14 Rahel gi Lea ne jodwoke niya, “Onge mwandu ma wabiro chamo kuom wuonwa." 
Genesis31:15 Donge tinde okwanowa ka jomoko nono, nikech oseng’iewowa kendo osechamo mwandu duto mane onywomwa." 
Genesis31:16 Mwandu duto ma Nyasaye osegolo kuom wuonwa gin mawa kod nyithindwa, omiyo tim mana kaka Nyasaye osewachoni.”" 
Genesis31:17 Kamano Jakobo noikore mondo odog ir wuon mare e piny Kanaan. Noketo nyithinde gi monde e ngamia, mi nosembo jambe duto, kendo nokawo gimoro amora ma noseyudo Mesopotamia." 
Genesis31:18  
Genesis31:19 E kindeno, noyudo ka Laban odhi ng’ado yie rombe, kendo kane pod en kuro, Rahel nokwalo nyisechene," 
Genesis31:20 to Jakobo bende nowuonde moa ling’ling’ ma ok onyise. 
Genesis31:21 Nokawo gige owuon moringo oa. Nong’ado aora Yufrate, momako yo madhi e piny gode mag Gilead." 
Genesis31:22 Bang’ ndalo adek, Laban nowinjo ni Jakobo osea," 
Genesis31:23 omiyo nokawo joge, kendo ne gilawe kuom ndalo abiriyo, mi gijuke e got Gilead." 
Genesis31:24 To Nyasaye nofwenyore ni Laban ja-Aram e lek gotieno, mowachone niya, “Kik iwach ni Jakobo gimoro amora.”" 
Genesis31:25 Laban noyudo ka Jakobo oguro hembe e got Gilead, mi en bende noguro mare kanyo gi joge." 
Genesis31:26 Laban nopenjo Jakobo niya, “Ang’o momiyo niwuonda, mikawo nyiga iringogo ka joma omak e lweny?" 
Genesis31:27 Ere gimomiyo nia ling’ling’ ka akia? Dine inyisa ni idwaro dhi, dine akowi gi mor, kiwerni kendo igoyoni thum." 
Genesis31:28 Bende ne ok iweyo agoyo oriti ni nyiga gi nyikwaya. Kuom mano isetimo gima ofuwo. 
Genesis31:29 An gi teko mar hinyi, to Nyasach wuoru nyoro owuoyo koda, ka kwera ni kik awachni gimoro amora." 
Genesis31:30 Ang’eyo ni ne ia nikech siso ne oloyi gi joodu, to ang’o momiyo nikwalo nyisechena”?" 
Genesis31:31 Jakobo nodwoke niya, “Naringo aa nikech naluor ni dipo ka imaya nyigi." 
Genesis31:32 To ng’ato ang’ata moyud gi nyisecheni nyaka negi! Rang gimoro amora ma mari mondo ikaw ka jowagi neno.” To Jakobo ne ok ong’eyo ni Rahel ema nosekwalo nyisechego. 
Genesis31:33 Laban nodhi e hemb Jakobo gi hemb Lea gi hemb nyiri ariyo ma jotich, to ne ok oyudo gimoro. Kane owuok e hemb Lea nodhi e mar Rahel." 
Genesis31:34 To kata kamano Rahel nosepando nyisechego e bwo kom ngamia, mi obetie. Laban nodwaro kuonde duto e hema, to ne ok oyudo nyisechego." 
Genesis31:35 Rahel nowacho ni wuon mare niya, “Wuora, kik ikech koda, ni ok anyal chung’e nyimi, nikech atuo tuo mon.” To kata Laban nodwero kamano, ne ok onyal yudogi." 
Genesis31:36 Eka mirima nomako Jakobo, modhaw gi Laban kowachone niya, “Ere gima aseketho momiyo iselawa matek," 
Genesis31:37 kendo seto giga duto? Ka iseyudo gimoro ma mari, to gole oko e nyim jowa gi jou, mondo gipog kindwa kodi." 
Genesis31:38 Asedak kodi koro kuom higni piero ariyo, to rombi kata dieki pok obuogo, bende pok achamo imi kata achiel." 
Genesis31:39 Kane ondiek onego romboni moro, ne ok adewo keloni ringe ma dinyisi gima osetimore, to nachulo achula. Ne iketo chik ni nyaka achul chiayo moro amora mokwal, bed ni okwale godiechieng’ kata gotieno." 
Genesis31:40 E kindego duto chieng’ ne chama godiechieng’, to koyo chama gotieno, kendo nindo ne ok tera." 
Genesis31:41 Kamano e kaka asetiyoni kuom higni piero ariyogi. Natiyoni kuom higni apar gang’wen mondo imiya nyigi ariyo, kendo namedo tiyoni kuom higni auchiel mondo ayud jamni kaka pokna, to niloko pokna nyadipar." 
Genesis31:42 Ka dine Nyasach Ibrahim kwara mane Isaka bende lamo, ok ni koda, to dine iseriemba gi lweta nono. To Nyasaye noneno kaka natiyo matek, kendo kaka nachandora, omiyo nyoro okweri gotieno ni kik itimna gimoro marach.”" 
Genesis31:43 Laban nodwoko Jakobo niya, “Nyigo gin nyiga, kendo nyithindogo gin nyithinda; jamnigo bende maga. Gik moko duto ma in go gin maga. To koro datim nyiga gi nyithindgi nadi?" 
Genesis31:44 Watim winjruok, kendo wachok kite mondo obed rapar e kindwa kodi.”" 
Genesis31:45 Omiyo Jakobo noyiero kidi mang’ongo, mochungo tir ka siro mar rapar," 
Genesis31:46 kendo nowacho ni joge mondo okwany kite moko, mi ne gichokogi kaachiel. Eka ne gichiemo but kitego." 
Genesis31:47 Laban nochako nying kanyo ni Jegar-sahadutha, to Jakobo nochake ni Galeed. (Jegar-sahadutha en dho Aram, to Galeed en dho Hibrania. Tiend nying ariyogo en pidh kite mobedo ka janeno.)" 
Genesis31:48 Laban nowacho niya, “Chakre kawuono, pidh kiteni biro bedo ka janeno e kindwa kodi”. Mano emomiyo nochak kanyo ni Galeed." 
Genesis31:49 Laban nowacho kendo niya, “Kwasepogore, to Ruoth Nyasaye mondo ong’i timbewa.” Mano emomiyo nochak kanyo bende ni Mizpa (tiende ni kar ng’icho)." 
Genesis31:50 Laban nomedo wacho niya, “Kapo ni ithago nyiga, kata ka ikendo mon moko ka onge janeno, to ng’e ni Nyasaye e janeno e kindwa kodi.”" 
Genesis31:51 Eka nodhi nyime kowacho ni Jakobo niya, “Ne pidh kite ma asechoko, kod siro ma asechungo e kindwa." 
Genesis31:52 Pidhni kod sironi mondo obed ka janeno ni ok nakadh pidhni mondo amonji, to in bende ok nikadh pidhni kata sironi mondo imonja." 
Genesis31:53 Nyasach Ibrahim gi Nyasach Nahor nopog kindwa kodi kwatimo kamano.” Bang’e Jakobo nokuong’ore e nying Nyasaye mane Isaka wuon mare lamo. 
Genesis31:54 Noyang’o chiayo moro, motimogo misango e godno, kendo noluongo wedene mondo obi ochiem. Kamano ne gichiemo kaachiel, kendo ne ginindo kanyo." 
Genesis31:55 Kinyne Laban nogoyo ni nyige gi nyikwaye oriti, mi noa modok dala." 
Genesis32:1 Jakobo to nodhi nyime gi wuodhe, kendo nopo ka malaika mag Nyasaye oromo kode." 
Genesis32:2 Kane onenogi, nowacho niya, “Ma en oganda mar Nyasaye!” Mi nochako kanyo ni Mahanaim (tiende ni, ogendini ariyo)." 
Genesis32:3 Jakobo nooro joote mondo otel nyime ir Esau owadgi mane nie gweng’ Seir, e piny Edom." 
Genesis32:4 Nochikogi mondo giwach ni Esau ni jatichne Jakobo owacho kama: “Asebedo kadak gi Laban nyaka koroni. 
Genesis32:5 An gi dhok kod kenje gi rombe gi diek, kaachiel kod wasumbini machwo gi mamon. Kuom mano aoroni wach mondo iyie irwaka gi ng’wono.”" 
Genesis32:6 Joote nodwogo ir Jakobo, mowachone niya, “Ne waromo gi owadu Esau ka biro romoni gi ji mia ang’wen.”" 
Genesis32:7 Kane Jakobo owinjo kamano, nobwok, kendo chunye nochandore ahinya. Omiyo nopogo joge gi jambe e migepe ariyo," 
Genesis32:8 koparo ni kapo ni Esau omonjo migawo achiel, to migawo machielo nyalo tony." 
Genesis32:9 Eka nolemo, kowacho niya, “A Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Ibrahim kwara, kendo Nyasach Isaka wuora, in ema niwachona ni mondo adog thurwa ir joodwa, kendo ni initimna maber." 
Genesis32:10 Ok awinjora gi herani maradier kendo mosiko misenyisa. Nang’ado aora Jordan ka aonge gi gimoro mak mana ludha mar wuoth kende, to koro aseduogo gi ogendini ariyogi." 
Genesis32:11 Omiyo resa e lwet Esau owadwa, nimar aluor ni dipo ka otiekowa duto, ma ok oweyo kata mana mon kata nyithindo." 
Genesis32:12 Par kaka nisesingorina ni iniguedha, kendo nimiya nyikwayo mang’eny ka kwoyo mae dho nam ma ok nyal kwan.”" 
Genesis32:13 Jakobo nobuoro kanyo, to kinyne noyiero" 
Genesis32:14 diek mia ariyo ma nyibuche, gi nyuogi piero ariyo, kod rombe mia ariyo, gi imbe piero ariyo," 
Genesis32:15 kod ngamia madhodho piero adek man gi nyithindgi, gi dhok piero ang’wen, gi rwedhi apar, kod kenje piero ariyo mamon, gi apar machwo." 
Genesis32:16 Noketo kweth ka kweth e lwet jatichne achiel achiel kowachonigi niya, “Teluru nyima kuweyo thuolo e kind kweth gi kweth.”" 
Genesis32:17 Eka nochiko jal ma notelo niya, “Ka Esau owadwa oromo kodi, mopenji ni in jatich ng’a, to idhi kanye, kendo jamni misembogi mag ng’a?" 
Genesis32:18 To mondo idwoke kama: ‘Gin mag Jakobo jatichni, kendo ooronigi kaka chiwo. En owuon to obiro bang’wa.’ ”" 
Genesis32:19 Jal mar ariyo gi mar adek kod jogo duto mane sembo jamnigo bende Jakobo nochiko kamano," 
Genesis32:20 monyisogi ni mondo gimed wacho ni Esau niya, “Jakobo jatichni biro bang’e,” Jakobo noparo ni obiro hoyo chuny Esau gi chiwo mane oseorone motelogo, kendo koromo kode bang’e, to dipo ka orwake gi ng’wono." 
Genesis32:21 Kamano chiwogo duto nodhi motelo nyime, to en nodong’ monindo e kambi gotienono." 
Genesis32:22 Gotienono Jakobo nochiew mokawo monde ariyo gi jotichne ariyo ma nyiri kod nyithinde apar gachiel, mi ne gikadho kama ing’adogo aora Jabok." 
Genesis32:23 Kane osekonyogi ng’ado aora kaachiel gi mwandune duto," 
Genesis32:24 nodong’ kende, kendo ng’ato nobuke moi kode kanyo nyaka piny oru." 
Genesis32:25 To kane ng’atno oneno ni ok onyal nyago Jakobo, nogoyo achiake, mi em Jakobo owil ka pod gii." 
Genesis32:26 Eka ng’atno nowacho niya, “Weya mondo adhi, nikech piny, dwaro ru.” To Jakobo nodwoke niya, “Ok anyal weyi idhi kapok iguedha.”" 
Genesis32:27 Nopenjo Jakobo niya, “Nyingi ng’a?” Mi nodwoke ni, “Nyinga Jakobo.”" 
Genesis32:28 Eka ng’atno nowachone niya, “Chakre kawuono nyingi ok nobed Jakobo, to ibiro luongi ni Israel, nikech isei gi Nyasaye, kendo gi ji, miloyo.”" 
Genesis32:29 Jakobo nokwaye niya, “Yie inyisa nyingi.” To nopenje ni, “Ang’o momiyo ipenja nyinga?” Kata kamano noguedhe." 
Genesis32:30 Jakobo nowacho niya, “Aseneno Nyasaye wang’ gi wang’, to pod angima!” Omiyo nochako nying kanyo ni Peniel (tiende ni, wang’ Nyasaye)." 
Genesis32:31 Jakobo noa Peniel ka chieng’ wuok, kendo nowuotho kofwono, nikech bamne nosewil." 
Genesis32:32 Mano emomiyo jo-Isarel ok cham pond bam nyaka chil kawuono, nikech ring’ono ema ng’atno nogoyo e bam Jakobo." 
Genesis33:1 Kane Jakobo oting’o wang’e moneno Esau kabiro gi ji mia ang’wen, nopogo nyithinde ni Lea gi Rahel kod monde ariyo ma jotich." 
Genesis33:2 Noketo monde ma jotichgo gi nyithindgi mondo otel, eka Lea gi nyithinde noluwogi, to Rahel gi Josef ema noketo chien." 
Genesis33:3 Eka Jakobo notelo nyimgi, mogoyo chonge piny kokulore nyaka e lowo dibiriyo, kodhi nyime nyaka noromo gi owadgi." 
Genesis33:4 Esau noringo kadhi romone, kendo nokwake monyodhe, mi ne giywak giduto." 
Genesis33:5 Kane Esau oting’o wang’e, moneno mond Jakobo gi nyithindgi nopenjo niya, “Magi ng’a gini man kodigi?” Jakobo nodwoke ni, “Jaduong’, gin nyithindo ma Nyasaye osemiya kuom ng’wonone.”" 
Genesis33:6 Eka monde ma jotich nosudo machiegni, moro ka moro gi nyithinde, mi gikulore piny." 
Genesis33:7 Lea gi nyithinde be nosudo machiegni, mokulore. Eka Josef gi Rahel bende ne josudo, mokulore." 
Genesis33:8 Esau nopenjo Jakobo niya, “Oganda maduong’ mane aromogo cha to?” Jakobo nodwoke niya, “Jaduong’, naorogi mondo gibi gikwana ng’wono kuomi.”" 
Genesis33:9 To Esau nowachone niya, “An gi giga moroma, owadwa. Omiyo bed abeda gi magi.”" 
Genesis33:10 Jakobo nowachone niya, “Ooyo; ka iseng’wonona, to yie ikaw mich ma achiwogo. Kaka iserwaka gi ng’wono, biro e nyimi chalna mana gi biro e nyim Nyasaye." 
Genesis33:11 Omiyo yie ikaw chiwo ma asekeloni, nimar Nyasaye oseguedha mi ayudo gik moko duto madwaro.” Kamano nochune nyaka nokawo michgo." 
Genesis33:12 Bang’ mano Esau nowacho ni Jakobo niya, “Waikreuru mondo waa, kendo an ema abiro telo.”" 
Genesis33:13 To Jakobo nodwoke ni, “Jaduong’, ing’eyo ni nyithindogi pod tindo, to bende nyaka apar jamni madhodho. Kapo ni osemb gi matek kata mana kuom ndalo achiel, to giduto ginyalo tho." 
Genesis33:14 Kuom mano, jaduong’, akwayi mondo itel atela nyima, to abiro luwi mosmos gi nyithindo kod jamni, nyaka achop iri Seir.”" 
Genesis33:15 Esau nowachone ni, “Kara awe joga moko mondo akonyi wuoth.” To Jakobo nodwoko ni, “Erokamano jaduong’; ok onego ithagri kamano.”" 
Genesis33:16 Omiyo Esau nomako yo, modok Seir." 
Genesis33:17 Jakobo to nolokore mochomo Sukoth, mi nogero ot kuno, kendo nolosoe abilni ni jambe. Mano emomiyo nochak nying kanyo ni Sukoth (tiende ni, abilni)." 
Genesis33:18 Kane Jakobo osea Mesopotamia, nochopo maber e dala Shekem e piny Kanaan. Noguro hembe yo wuok chieng’, machiegni gi dalano." 
Genesis33:19 Lowo mane ogedoe kanyo nong’iewo kuom nyikwa Hamor ma wuon Shekem gi fedha mia achiel. 
Genesis33:20 Nogero kendo-mar-misango kanyo, mochako ni Elelohe-Israel, (tiende ni, El, ma Nyasach Israel.)" 
Genesis34:1 Chieng’ moro Dina nyar Jakobo mane Lea onywolo, nodhi limo nyi pinyno." 
Genesis34:2 Shekem wuod Hamor ma ja-Hivi mane ruodh pinyno nonene, mokawe kendo noriwore kode, mokethe." 
Genesis34:3 To nohero Dina ahinya, omiyo notemo hoyo chunye," 
Genesis34:4 mi nowacho ni wuon mare niya, “Nywomna nyakoni.”" 
Genesis34:5 Kane Jakobo owinjo ni Shekem oseketho Dina nyare, ne ok otimo gimoro nikech noyudo ka yawuote odhi kwath." 
Genesis34:6 Gikanyono mane yawuot Jakobo odwogoe koa kwath, ema Hamor wuon Shekem bende nobiroe ir Jakobo mondo olos kode. Yawuot Jakobo nobwok kendo ne gikecho ahinya ka ne giwinjo ni Shekem oseketho nyamin-gi, nikech jo-Israel kwano gima kamano ka gima rach ahinya." 
Genesis34:7  
Genesis34:8 Hamor nowachonigi niya, “Shekem wuoda ohero nyani ahinya, omiyo yieuru mondo okende." 
Genesis34:9 Wanywom nyiu, to un bende ukend mawa, mondo wabed wede." 
Genesis34:10 Daguru kodwa, mondo uwuoth e pinywa duto kaka udwaro, kendo uyud lopu uwegi.”" 
Genesis34:11 Bang’e Shekem nowacho ni wuon Dina kod owete Dina niya, “Yie utimna gima akwayou, mondo anywomnu gimoro amora mudwaro." 
Genesis34:12 Nyisauru kar gik monego anywomnu kod chiwo monego amiu. Ayie chiwo gimoro amora mudwaro, kuyie ni mondo akend nyani.”" 
Genesis34:13 To yawuot Jakobo nowuondo Shekem gi Hamor wuon mare nikech Shekem nosekuodo wi Dina nyamin-gi. 
Genesis34:14 Ne giwachonigi niya, “Ok wanyal yie mondo ng’ama ok oter nyangu mondo okend nyaminwa, nikech mano dibed wichkuot kuomwa." 
Genesis34:15 To mak mana ka uyie chalo kodwa, mi utero jou machwo duto nyangu," 
Genesis34:16 eka wanyalo yie mondo ukend nyiwa, kendo wan bende wanyalo kendo mau, mondo wadag kaachiel kodu, kendo wabed oganda achiel." 
Genesis34:17 To ka ok uyie mondo oteru nyangu, to wabiro kawo nyarwa, wadhigo.”" 
Genesis34:18 Wechego ne beyo ne Hamor kod Shekem wuode," 
Genesis34:19 omiyo Shekem, mane omi duong’ ahinya moloyo jomoko duto e dalagi, notimo kaka osewachne piyopiyo, nikech nohero nyar Jakobono ahinya." 
Genesis34:20 Kamano Hamor gi Shekem nodok kar bura e dhoranga dalagi, mi ne giwuoyo gi jo thurgi," 
Genesis34:21 ka giwachonigi niya, “Jogi gin osiepewa. Wawegiuru mondo gidag e pinywa ka, kendo giwuothie kaka gidwaro. Piny lach moromowa duto kodgi. Weuru wakend nyigi, kendo wamigi nyiwa gikendi." 
Genesis34:22 To ok ginyal yie dak kodwa mondo wabed oganda achiel kodgi mak mana ka jowa machwo duto oter nyangu kaka gin. 
Genesis34:23 To kwayie timo kamano, eka ginidag kodwa, kendo jambgi gi mwandugi kod dhogi biro bedo mawa.”" 
Genesis34:24 Jo dalano duto noyie gi gima Hamor gi Shekem nowachonigi, mi joma chwo duto noter nyangu." 
Genesis34:25 To bang’ ndalo ariyo, kane pod jo-Shekem nigi rem malit, yawuot Jakobo ma Simeon kod Lawi, owete Dina mahie, nokawo gigi mag lweny, mi gidonjo e dala jogo apoya, kendo ne ginego joma chwo duto." 
Genesis34:26 Ne ginego Hamor gi Shekem wuode, eka ne gigolo Dina e od Shekem, mi giago." 
Genesis34:27 Yawuot Jakobo mamoko nomonjo joma ne owetegi osehinyogo, mi giyako dalano nikech jogo nosekuodo wi nyamin-gi." 
Genesis34:28 Ne gipeyo jambgi gi kenjegi kod gik moko duto mane giyudo e dala kod oko e lek. 
Genesis34:29 Bende ne giyako mwandugi duto, kendo ne gikawo mon gi nyithindo kod gik moko duto mane giyudo e udi." 
Genesis34:30 Jakobo nowacho ni Simeon gi Lawi niya, “Usekelona chandruok, kendo usemiyo jo-Kanaan gi jo-Perizi ma weg pinyni mon koda. An mana gi ji manok kende, omiyo ka jo-pinyni oriwona, to ginyalo tieka kaachiel gi jooda duto.”" 
Genesis34:31 To ne gidwoke niya, “Ok wanyal yie mondo otimni nyaminwa ka nyako ma jachode kamano!”" 
Genesis35:1 Nyasaye nowacho ni Jakobo niya, “Ikri idhi Bethel, mondo idag kuno, kendo igerie kendo-mar-misango ni Nyasaye mane ofwenyoreni e kinde mane iringo Esau owadu.”" 
Genesis35:2 Omiyo Jakobo nowacho ni joode kod joma nodak kode niya, “Goluru nyiseche mag pinje mamoko ma un go. Pwodhreuru, kendo rwakuru lewni maler." 
Genesis35:3 Wawuoguru wadhi Bethel kuma abiro geroe kendo-mar-misango ni Nyasaye mane okonya ka anie chandruok, kendo mosebedo koda kamoro amora madhiye.”" 
Genesis35:4 Omiyo ne gimiyo Jakobo nyiseche duto mag pinje moko mane gin go, kod stadi mane giketo e itgi, mi noikogi e tiend yath moro machiegni gi Shekem." 
Genesis35:5 Kane Jakobo gi yawuote owuok, luoro maduong’ moa kuom Nyasaye nomako ji modak e miech pinyno, mi ne ok gilawo Jakobo gi yawuote." 
Genesis35:6 Jakobo nodhi gi joge nyaka Luz, ma tinde iluongo ni Bethel, e piny Kanaan." 
Genesis35:7 Nogero kendo-mar-misango kuno, kendo nochako kanyo ni Bethel, (tiende ni od Nyasaye,) nikech Nyasaye nofwenyorene kanyo ka ne oringo owadgi." 
Genesis35:8 Debora mane opiro Rebeka notho, mi noyike e tiend yath manie tik got Bethel. Omiyo Jakobo nochako yedhno ni Alon-bakuth (tiende ni yath miywakie)." 
Genesis35:9 Nyasaye nochako ofwenyore ni Jakobo kendo, kane oseduogo oa Mesopotamia. Noguedhe," 
Genesis35:10 kowachone niya, “Nyingi en Jakobo, to chakre kawuono ok noluongi ni Jakobo, to nyingi koro en Israel.” Kamano nochake ni Israel." 
Genesis35:11 Nyasaye nowachone kendo niya, “An Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto. Nywol nyithindo mang’eny ibed oganda maduong’. Inibed gi nyikwayo mathoth, mi ginidok ogendini mang’eny, kendo moko kuomgi nobed ruodhi." 
Genesis35:12 Piny mane amiyo Ibrahim gi Isaka ema namiyi gi nyikwayi.” 
Genesis35:13 Eka Nyasaye noweye kama ne osewuoyoe kodeno, modok e polo." 
Genesis35:14 Jakobo nochungo siro kanyo, mochiwoe misango miolo piny, eka bang’e nooloe mo." 
Genesis35:15 Nochako kanyono ni Bethel. 
Genesis35:16 Ne giwuok Bethel, to kane pod gin mochwalore gi Efrath, muoch nochako kayo Rahel malit." 
Genesis35:17 Kane muoch kaye kamano, jacholo nojiwe niya, “Kik iluor, nikech eri inywolo wuowi machielo.”" 
Genesis35:18 To kata kamano Rahel ne tho, kendo kane chunye dwaro chot, nochako nyathino ni Benoni (tiende ni wuowi ma ayudo gi chandruok.)" 
Genesis35:19 Kamano Rahel notho, moyike but yo madhi Efrath, ma tinde iluongo ni Bethlehem." 
Genesis35:20 Jakobo nochungo siro e liende ka rapar. Sirono iluongo ni Rapar Liend Rahel, kendo pod entie nyaka chil kawuono." 
Genesis35:21 Eka Jakobo nodhi nyime gi wuodhe nyaka nochopo Migdal-eder, moguro hembe kuno." 
Genesis35:22 E kinde mane Israel odak e pinyno, Reuben noterore gi Bilha, ma achiel kuom mond wuon nare. Israel nowinjo wachno, mi iye owang’. Jakobo ne nigi yawuowi apar gariyo." 
Genesis35:23 Yawuot Lea ne gin Reuben, wuod Jakobo makayo, eka Simeon gi Lawi gi Juda gi Isakar kod Zebulun." 
Genesis35:24 Yawuot Rahel to ne gin Josef gi Benjamin. 
Genesis35:25 Yawuot Bilha jatich Rahel ne gin Dan gi Naftali. 
Genesis35:26 To yawuot Zilpa jatich Lea ne gin Gad gi Asher. Mago e yawuot Jakobo ma nonywolo Mesopotamia. 
Genesis35:27 Jakobo nobiro ir Isaka wuon mare mane oyudo odak Mamre machiegni gi Kiriath-arba, (ma tinde iluongo ni Hebron), kuma Ibrahim gi Isaka nodakie." 
Genesis35:28 Isaka notho ka en jahigni mia achiel gi piero aboro. 
Genesis35:29 Kamano notho moluwo kwerene ka hike oniang’. Yawuote ma Esau gi Jakobo noyike. 
Genesis36:1 Magi e joka Esau ma bende iluongo ni Edom. 
Genesis36:2 Esau nokendo nyi Kanaan ma nyinggi Ada nyar Elon ma ja-Hiti, gi Oholibama nyar Ana wuod Zibeon ma ja-Hivi," 
Genesis36:3 kaachiel gi Basemath nyar Ishamael, ma nyamin Nebayoth." 
Genesis36:4 Ada nonywolo Elifaz ni Esau, to Basemath nonywolo Reuel," 
Genesis36:5 Oholibama to nonywolo Jeush gi Jalam kod Kora. Mago e yawuot Esau ma nonywolo Kanaan. 
Genesis36:6 Esau nokawo monde gi yawuote gi nyige kod joode duto ma noseyudo Kanaan, mi nodhi e piny moro mabor gi Jakobo owadgi." 
Genesis36:7 Nodar nimar kama ne gidakie gi Jakobo ne tin mane ok nyal romogi nikech giduto ne gin gi jamni mathoth ahinya. 
Genesis36:8 Kamano Esau ma bende iluongo ni Edom nodak e piny gode mag Seir. 
Genesis36:9 Magi e joka Esau ma kwar jo-Edom modak e piny gode ma Seir: 
Genesis36:10 Chiege ma Ada nonywolo Elifaz, to chiege ma Basemath nonywolo Reuel." 
Genesis36:11 Yawuot Elifaz ne gin Teman gi Omar gi Zefo gi Gatam kod Kenaz. 
Genesis36:12 Elifaz wuod Esau ne nigi dhako moro ma nyinge Timna, to nonywolone Amalek. Mago e nyikwa Ada chi Esau." 
Genesis36:13 Reuel to nonywolo Nahath gi Zera gi Shama kod Miza. Mago e nyikwa Basemath chi Esau. 
Genesis36:14 To chi Esau ma Oholibama nyar Ana ma wuod Zebeon nonywolo Jeush gi Jalam kod Kora. 
Genesis36:15 Koro magi e jodong joka Esau: Elifaz wuod Esau makayo nonywolo Teman gi Omar gi Zefo gi Kenaz 
Genesis36:16 gi Kora gi Getam kod Amalek. Mago e nyikwa Elifaz ma nobedo jodong piny Edom. Giduto ne gin nyikwa Ada. 
Genesis36:17 Reuel wuod Esau nonywolo Nahath, gi Zera gi Shama kod Miza. Mago e nyikwa Reuel, ma nobedo jodong Edom. Giduto ne gin nyikwa chi Esau ma Basemath." 
Genesis36:18 Chi Esau ma Oholibama nonywolo Jeush gi Jalam kod Kora. Mago e jodongo ma chi Esau ma Oholibama nyar Ana nonywolo. 
Genesis36:19 Jogo duto e joka Esau, ma bende iluongo ni Edom, kaachiel gi jodonggi." 
Genesis36:20 Nyikwa Seir ja-Hori mane okwongo bet weg pinyno ne gin Lotan gi Shobal gi Zibeon gi Ana gi Dishon gi Ezer kod Dishan. 
Genesis36:21 Mago e jodong jo-Hori ma nyikwa Seir ma norito Edom. 
Genesis36:22 Lotan nonywolo Hori kod Heman, to bende ne en gi nyamin mare ma nyinge Timna," 
Genesis36:23 Shobal to nonywolo Alvan gi Manahath gi Ebal gi Shefa kod Onam. 
Genesis36:24 To Zibeon nonywolo Aya kod Ana, Ana ema noyudo sokni machuer pi maliet ka nokwayo kenje Zibeon wuon mare e thim." 
Genesis36:25 Ana nonywolo Dishon kaachiel gi Oholibama ma nyare. 
Genesis36:26 Dishon to nonywolo Hemdan gi Eshban gi Ithran kod Keran. 
Genesis36:27 Ezer to nonywolo Bilhan gi Zavan kod Akan. 
Genesis36:28 Dishan to nonywolo Uz gi Aran. 
Genesis36:29 Jodong jo-Hori ne gin Lotan gi Shobal gi Zibeon gi Ana 
Genesis36:30 gi Dishon gi Ezer kod Dishan. Mago e jodong jo-Hori, kaluwore gi dhoutgi, ma nodak e piny Seir." 
Genesis36:31 Magi e ruodhi ma norito piny Edom kane jo-Israel pod onge gi ruoth. 
Genesis36:32 Ruoth mokwongo ne en Bela wuod Beor, ma dalane niluongo ni Dinhaba." 
Genesis36:33 Kane Bela otho, Jobab wuod Zera ma ja-Bozra nodoko ruoth kare." 
Genesis36:33 Kane Bela otho, Jobab wuod Zera ma ja-Bozra nodoko ruoth kare." 
Genesis36:34 To kane Jobab otho, Husham ja-Teman nodoko ruoth kare." 
Genesis36:34 To kane Jobab otho, Husham ja-Teman nodoko ruoth kare." 
Genesis36:35 Bang’ tho Husham, Hadad wuod Bedad nodoko ruoth kare. Hadadno ema noloyo jo-Midian e piny Moab. Dalane niluongo ni Avith." 
Genesis36:36 Kane Hadad otho, Samla ja-Masreka nodoko ruoth kare." 
Genesis36:37 Kane Samla otho, Shaul ja-Rehoboth man but aora Yufrate nodoko ruoth kare." 
Genesis36:38 To kane Shaul otho, Baal-hanan wuod Akbor nodoko ruoth kare." 
Genesis36:39 To bang’ tho Baal-hanan, Hadar nodoko ruoth kare. Dalane niluongo ni Pau, to nying chiege ne Mehetabel nyar Matred ma nyar Mezahab." 
Genesis36:40 Koro magi e jodong joka Esau kaluwore gi dhoutgi kod gwengegi: Ne gin Timna gi Alva gi Jetheth 
Genesis36:41 gi Oholibama gi Ela gi Pinon 
Genesis36:42 gi Kenaz gi Teman gi Mibzar 
Genesis36:43 gi Migdiel kod Iram. Jogo duto e jodong Edom, kaluwore gi gwenge mane gidakie. (Esau e kwar jo-Edom.)" 
Genesis37:1 Jakobo nomedo dak e piny Kanaan kuma ne wuon mare odakie. 
Genesis37:2 Koro ma e wach joka Jakobo. Josef ne en rawera ma jahigni apar gabiriyo, kendo nokonyo owetene ma yawuot Bilha gi Zilpa mond wuon mare kwayo rombe gi diek, to nonyiso wuon mare gik maricho mane owetenego timo." 
Genesis37:3 Jakobo nohero Josef moloyo yawuote duto, nikech nonywole koseti, omiyo notwang’one kandho ma bade boyo." 
Genesis37:4 To kane owetene mamoko oneno ni wuon-gi ohero Josef moloyogi duto, ne gidoko mamon kode, kendo na gidagi wuoyo kode maber." 
Genesis37:5 Chieng’ moro Josef noleko lek, to ka nonyiso owetene, ne gimedo mana mon kode." 
Genesis37:6 Nowachonigi niya, “Winjieuru kaka nende aleko." 
Genesis37:7 Naleko ni wan e puodho waduto kwatueyo ngano, mi wich mane atueyo noa malo mochung’ tir. Eka wiyeu nolworo wiyano mokulorene.”" 
Genesis37:8 Owetene nodwoke ka penje niya, “Iparo ni chieng’ moro inibed ruodhwa mondo itiwa?” Mi ne gimedo doko mamon kode ahinya, nikech lek mane owacho ni olekono." 
Genesis37:9 Bang’e Josef nochako oleko lek machielo, mowacho ni owetene niya, “Nende aleko lek moro ni aneno wang’ chieng’ gi due kod sulue apar gachiel ka kulorena.”" 
Genesis37:10 Ka ne onyiso wuon mare kod owetene wachno, wuon nokwere kapenje niya, “Lek ni no en lek manade? Iparo ni wan gi meru kod oweteni wabiro kuloreni?”" 
Genesis37:11 Nyiego nomako owete Josef kode, to wuon mare nosiko kaparo wachno." 
Genesis37:12 Owete Josef nodhi Shekem kwayo jamb wuon-gi. 
Genesis37:13 Bang’e Israel nowacho ni Josef niya, “Oweteni kwayo jamni Shekem. Bi, adwaro ori irgi.” Josef nodwoke ni, “Ayie dhi.”" 
Genesis37:14 Wuon mare nowachone niya, “Dhiyo ine ane ka oweteni ngima, kendo kwayo jamni maber, mondo idwokna wach.” Kamano nooro Josef Shekem, mi Josef nochako wuoth koa e holo mar Hebron kuma ne gidakie." 
Genesis37:15 Ng’at moro noromo gi Josef ka wuotho e thim, mopenje niya, “Idwaro ang’o?”" 
Genesis37:16 Nodwoke ni, “Adwaro owetena. Yie inyisa kama gikwayoe.”" 
Genesis37:17 Ng’atno nowachone niya, “Gisea ka, to nawinjo ka giwacho ni gidhi Dothan.” Omiyo Josef noluwo owetene moyudogi Dothan." 
Genesis37:18 Ne ginene kobiro ka pod en gichien, mi ne giparo mondo ginege." 
Genesis37:19 Ka giwacho e kindgi giwegi niya, “Neuru! Jalek lek cha biro." 
Genesis37:20 Wanegeuru, kendo wawite e bugo moro ka, to wadhi wawachi ni ondiek onege. Mi wanane ane gima lekne timone!”" 
Genesis37:21 Reuben nowinjo ka giwacho kamano, mi notemo reso Josef e lwetgi, nowachonigi niya, “Kik wanege." 
Genesis37:22 Witeuru mana e bugo manie thim ka ni, to kik uhinye.” Nowachonigi kamano nikech nodwaro kawe achien mondo odwoke ni wuon mare." 
Genesis37:23 Omiyo kane Josef ochopo ir owetene, ne gilonyo kandhone ma bade boyo, mi gibole e bugo" 
Genesis37:24 motuo maonge pi. 
Genesis37:25 Eka ne gibet piny mondo gichiem, to kane gichiemo, ne gipo ka gineno oganda mar jo-Ishmael koa Gilead dhi Misri, Ne gin gi ngamia moting’o gik mang’ue ng’ar gi manemane kod yien moko." 
Genesis37:26 Eka Juda nowacho ni owetene niya, “Ere ohala ma wabiro yudo kuom nego owadwa, kendo pando thone?" 
Genesis37:27 Wang’ieweuru gi jo-Ishmaelgi, to kik wahinye, nikech en owadwa, kendo en rembwa.” Mi owetene noyie kode," 
Genesis37:28 omiyo kane jo-ohala ma jo-Midian kadho kanyo, ne gigolo Josef oko e bugo. Eka ne ging’iewe gi jo-Ishmaelgo kuom fedha piero ariyo, mi jogo notere Misri." 
Genesis37:29 Kane Reuben odok limo bugono, ma ok oyudo Josef, noyiecho lepe." 
Genesis37:30 Nodok ir owetene, mopenjogi niya, “Nyathi cha onge kacha! Koro anyalo timo ang’o?”" 
Genesis37:31 Owete Josef nonego diel, mi onyumo kandhu Josef e remb diendno." 
Genesis37:32 Ne giyiecho kandhuno mi gitero ni wuon-gi, kendo ne giwachone niya, “Neye gima wasekwanyo. Range ane ka en mar wuodi.”" 
Genesis37:33 Jakobo nong’eyo lawno, mowacho niya, “Ee, en law Josef nyaka bed ni ondiek osenege, mokidhe matindotindo!”" 
Genesis37:34 Noyiecho lepe, morwako pien gugru, kendo noywago wuode kuom ndalo mang’eny." 
Genesis37:35 Yawuote gi nyige duto notemo hoyo chunye, to nodagi hore. Nowacho niya, “Abiro ywago wuoda nyaka atho alu bang’e.” Kamano e kaka Jakobo noywago Josef wuode." 
Genesis37:36 To jo-Midian notero Josef Misri mong’iewe gi Potifar mane achiel kuom jotend Farao, kendo mane jaduong’ jorit od ruoth." 
Genesis38:1 E kindeno Juda noweyo owetene, modhi odak gi Hira ma ja-Adulam." 
Genesis38:2 Noyudo nyar Shua ma ja-Kanaan kuno, mokendo." 
Genesis38:3 Nyakono nomako ich kendo nonywolo wuowi ni Er. 
Genesis38:4 Nochako omako ich monywolo wuowi moro mochako ni Onan. 
Genesis38:5 Eka nomako ich kendo, monywolo wuowi mar adek, mochako ni Shela. Bang’e nochung’ moweyo nywol." 
Genesis38:6 Juda nonywomo ni Er wuode maduong’ nyako ma nyinge Tamar. 
Genesis38:7 To timbe Er ne richo e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, omiyo Ruoth Nyasaye nonege." 
Genesis38:8 Juda nowacho ni Onan niya, “Kaw chi owadu ibedgo, kendo itimne yore duto kaka yuore, mondo ichung wi owadu.”" 
Genesis38:9 To Onan nong’eyo ni nyithindogo ok dibed mage, omiyo e kinde duto mane oriwore gi chi owadgino, ne oolo kothe piny, mondo kik onywol ni owadgi." 
Genesis38:10 Gima notimono ne rach ni Ruoth Nyasaye, omiyo en bende Ruoth Nyasaye nonege." 
Genesis38:11 Bang’ mano Juda nowacho ni Tamar chi wuode niya, “Dog dalau mondo ibed kuno ka chi liel nyaka Shela wuoda bed maduong’.” Nowachone kamano nikech noluor ni dipo ka Shela wuode bende otho ka owetene. Kamano Tamar nodok dalagi." 
Genesis38:12 Bang’ kinde moko, nyar Shua ma chi Juda notho. Kane Juda oseloso liende, ne giwuok gi Hira ja-Adulam mosiepne, mi gidhi Timna kuma ne ing’adoe yie rombe." 
Genesis38:13 To kane Tamar owinjo ni kwar mare dhi Timna, ng’ado yie rombe," 
Genesis38:14 nolonyo lepe mag chola mi oloso dende, kendo oumo wang’e gi nanga. Eka nodhi mobet e akek yo madhi Timna. Notimo kamano nimar nong’eyo ni Shela nosebedo maduong’ to ne pok omiyego mondo okende." 
Genesis38:15 Kane Juda onene, noparo ni en dhako ma jachode, nikech noumo wang’e." 
Genesis38:16 Nodhi ire e dir yo kama nobetie, mowachone ni, “Bi, adwari.” To ne ok ong’eyo ni en chi wuode. Tamar nopenje niya, “Ibiro miya ang’o, kiriwori koda?”" 
Genesis38:17 Juda nodwoke ni, “Abiro oroni nyadienda moro.” To nomedo wacho niya, “Ayie gi mano, to ere gima ibiro singona kapok ioro nyadiendno?”" 
Genesis38:18 Juda nopenje gima odwaro mondo osingne, mi nodwoke niya, “Miya bonynino gi tonde kod ludhino.” Kamano nomiye gigo, moriwore kode, mi Tamar nomako ich." 
Genesis38:19 Tamar nodok dala mi nolonyo nanga ma noumogo wang’e kendo nochako orwako lepe mag chola. 
Genesis38:20 Juda nooro osiepne ma ja-Adulam gi nyadiel, mondo oduok gik mane osingo ni dhako cha, to ne ok onyal yude." 
Genesis38:21 Nopenjo joma noyudo kuno niya, “Ere dhako ma jachode ma nobet e akek yo ka?” To ne gidwoke ni, “Onge dhako ma jachode ka.”" 
Genesis38:22 Nodok ir Juda mokwere ni, “Ok ayudo dhakono, to bende joma odak kuno onyisa ni onge dhako ma jachode modak kanyo.”" 
Genesis38:23 Juda nowachone niya, “We obed gi gik ma nasingonego, nono to nyingwa biro kethore. Asetemo orone nyadiedni, to ne ok anyal yude.”" 
Genesis38:24 Bang’ dweche maromo adek, Juda nowinjo ni Tamar chi wuode osemako ich, omiyo nowacho ni, “Goleuru oko mondo owang’e.”" 
Genesis38:25 To kane gigole oko, nooro ni kwar mare wach niya, “Wuon bonyni gi tolni kod ludhni ema nomiya ich. Ranggi ane ka ing’eyo wuon-gi.”" 
Genesis38:26 Juda nong’eyo gigo, mowacho ni, “En ema en kare, to an ema asetimo marach, nikech nonego amiye Shela wuoda mondo okende.” Bang’ mano Juda ne ok ochako oriwore kode kendo." 
Genesis38:27 Kane sa ma Tamar onego onywolie ochopo, nofwenyo ni oting’o rude." 
Genesis38:28 To kane ochako nywol, lwet nyathi achiel nowuok, mi jacholo nomako lwedono motweyoe usi makwar, “Ma ema okwongo wuok.”" 
Genesis38:29 To nyathino nodwoko lwete iye, mi owadgi machielo ema nonywol mokwongo. Jacholo nowacho niya, “Ee, kamano e kaka imwomori!” Omiyo nochake ni Perez (tiende ni, mwomruok)." 
Genesis38:30 Bang’e machiegni, owadgi bende nonywol ka usi makwar otwe e lwete, mi nochak nyinge ni Zera, (tiende ni, makwar)." 
Genesis39:1 Josef to jo-Ishmael nosekawo motero Misri, kuma Potifar ja-Misri mane achiel kuom jotend Farao, kendo jaduong’ jorit od ruoth, nong’iewee." 
Genesis39:2 To Ruoth Nyasaye ne ni kod Josef, mi noguedhe e yorene duto. Nodak e od ruodhe ma ja-Misrino." 
Genesis39:3 Ruodheno noneno ka Ruoth Nyasaye ni kode, kendo guedhe e gik moko duto motimo." 
Genesis39:4 Omiyo nobedo mamor gi Josef, kendo nohero tichne, mokete jarit ode kod mwandune duto." 
Genesis39:5 Chakre kanyo, Ruoth Nyasaye noguedho gik moko duto mane nie od ja-Misrino, kod mago duto mane ni e puothene, mana nikech Josef." 
Genesis39:6 Potifar noketo gik moko duto e lwet Josef, kendo ne ok odewo rango gimoro kata achiel mak mana chiemo mochamo. Josef na nigi chia, kendo ne ojaber." 
Genesis39:7 Bang’ ndalo moko, chi ruodhe norange ka gombe, mowachone niya, “Bi mondo iriwri koda.”" 
Genesis39:8 To Josef nodagi, mowachone niya, “Ruodha ok ong’eyo gimoro amora manie ode, kendo oseketo gik moko duto e lweta." 
Genesis39:9 Osemiya teko marom gi mare e ode, kendo ok osetuona gimoro amora mak mana in, to nikech in chiege. Koro, ere kaka danyal timo richo machal kamano, kabedo jaketho e nyim Nyasaye?”" 
Genesis39:10 Dhakono nosiko kawacho ni Josef wachno, to Josef ne ok dew wachne, kendo notamore riwore kode, kata mana bedo bute ne ok obedo." 
Genesis39:11 Chieng’ moro Josef nodonjo e ot mondo oti tije kaka pile, to jotich duto mag odno ne onge." 
Genesis39:12 Eka chi ruodhe nomake gi lawe, mowachone niya, “Bi iriwri koda!” To Josef noweyo lawe e lwete, moringo owuok oko." 
Genesis39:13 Kane dhakono oneno ni Josef oweyo lawe e lwete moringo owuok oko," 
Genesis39:14 noluongo jotich ode, mowachonigi niya, “Neuru! Chwora nokelo ja-Hibraniani e odwa mondo okuod wiwa! Nodonjo e ot mondo oriwre koda, to nagoyo uwi matek." 
Genesis39:15 Kane oneno ka agoyo uwi, kendo aluongou, eka noweyo lawe e lweta, moringo owuok oko.”" 
Genesis39:16 Nokano lawno nyaka ruodh Josef nodwogo dala," 
Genesis39:17 mi nonwoyo mana weche ma nowachogo niya, “Misumba ma ja-Hibrania mane ikelo e odwa cha nende obiro ira mondo omaka." 
Genesis39:18 To ka nende agoyo koko, to noweyo lawe e lweta moringo owuok oko.”" 
Genesis39:19 Kane ruodh Josef owinjo gima chiege nowachone, ni misumbane osetimo, nokecho ahinya." 
Genesis39:20 Nomako Josef, moketo kama itueyoe mabuse mag ruoth, mi nobet kanyo. To kata Josef nobedo e od twech kamano," 
Genesis39:21 Ruoth Nyasaye ne ni kode, mokeche, omiyo jaduong’ od twech nohere," 
Genesis39:22 mokete jatend joma otwe duto. Kamano Josef norito gik moko duto mane gitimo. 
Genesis39:23 Jaduong’ od twech ne ok odewo rango gigo duto mane oseketo e lwet Josef, nimar Ruoth Nyasaye ne ni kod Josef kendo noguedhe e gik moko duto mane otimo." 
Genesis40:1 Bang’ ndalo moko, jaduong’ jogam divai mar Farao ruodh Misri, kod jated makati mare ne joketho ni ruodhgi." 
Genesis40:2 Farao nokecho gi jotelo ariyogo," 
Genesis40:3 mi notweyogi e od jaduong’ askeche, kama bende noyudo otueye Josef." 
Genesis40:4 Jaduong askeche noketo Josef mondo oti ni ji ariyogo. 
Genesis40:5 Bang’ bedo e od tuech kuom kinde moromo, jaduong’ jagam divai gi jaduong’ jated makati ne joleko lek. Nga’to ka ng’ato noleko lekne owuon, kendo lek ka lek ne nigi tiende." 
Genesis40:6 Kane Josef obiro irgi gokinyi, noneno ka gikuyo," 
Genesis40:7 omiyo nopenjogi niya, “Ang’o momiyo ukuyo kamano?”" 
Genesis40:8 Ne gidwoke ni, “Waduto nende waleko lek mopogore opogore, to onge ng’ama nyalo lokonwa tiendgi.” Josef nowachonigi niya, “Donge teko mar loko lek a mana kuom Nyasaye? Emomiyo yieuru unyisa lekugo.”" 
Genesis40:9 Jagam divai nonyiso Josef lekne, kowacho niya, “Nende aleko ni yadh mzabibu" 
Genesis40:10 man gi bede adek ni e nyima. To nochako loth, mogolo thiepe, kendo onyago mzabibu mochiek mana gi kanyono." 
Genesis40:11 Noyudo ka ating’o kikombe Farao e lweta, omiyo nakawo mzabibugo, mi abiyo e kikombeno, amiyo Farao.”" 
Genesis40:12 Josef nowachone niya, “Ma e tiend leknino: Bede adek mag mizabibu nyiso ndalo adek," 
Genesis40:13 to ka pok ndalo adekgo orumo, Farao biro gonyi, kendo dwoki e tiji, mi ibiro miye kikombene, kaka yande imiye kaka jagam divai mare." 
Genesis40:14 To ka isebedo maber kamano, yie ipara, kendo imul nyinga ni Farao mondo ogola e od tuech ka." 
Genesis40:15 Ne omaka gi thuon e piny jo-Hibrania, to bende onge gima rach ma asetimo ka, mowinjore gitueyane.”" 
Genesis40:16 Kane jaduong’ jated makati oneno tiend lek ma Josef olokono ber, nowachone niya, “An bende nende aleko kama: Atonge adek moting’o makati marachere noluwore e wiya." 
Genesis40:17 Atonga mamalo noting’o kit chiemo duto ma jatedo loso ni Farao. To winy ne chamo chiemogo e atonga mamalono.” 
Genesis40:18 Josef nodwoke niya, “Ma e tiend leknino: Atonge adekgo nyiso ndalo adek." 
Genesis40:19 To kapok ndalo adekgo orumo Farao biro gonyi, to obiro ng’ado wiyi oko, kendo liero ringri e yath, mi winy biro chamo.”" 
Genesis40:20 Chieng’ mar adek nobedo chieng’ nywol Farao, mi noloso nyasi ni jotichne duto. Nogonyo jaduong jogam divai gi jaduong’ joted makati, moketogi e nyim jodonge." 
Genesis40:21 Nodwoko jaduong’ jogam divai e tije mar keto kikombe e lwet ruoth," 
Genesis40:22 to nonego jaduong’ joted makati. Gigo duto notimore mana kaka Josef noselokonigi tiend lekgi. 
Genesis40:23 Kata kamano jaduong’ jogam divai ne ok oparo Josef, to wiye nowil kode." 
Genesis41:1 Bang’ higni ma dirom ariyo, Farao noleko ni ochung’ e dho aora Nael," 
Genesis41:2 mi dhok abiriyo mabeyo kendo machwe nowuok e aora, ka kwayo e odundu." 
Genesis41:3 Bang’ mano dhok moko abiriyo maricho kendo modhero nowuok e aorano, mochung’ but dhok mokwongogo e dho aora." 
Genesis41:4 Dhok maricho kendo modherogo nomwonyo dhok mabeyo kendo machwe kande. Gikanyono Farao nochiew. 
Genesis41:5 Eka nindo nochako otere, moleko kendo, mi oneno wi ngano abiriyo mochiek machwe e tiang’ achiel." 
Genesis41:6 To bang’ mano wi ngano abiriyo moko motho kendo ma yamb oro otwoyo nowuok e tiang’no. 
Genesis41:7 Wi ngano mothogo nomwonyo wi ngano mochiek machwe kande. Bang’ mano Farao nochiew, mong’eyo ni en mana lek." 
Genesis41:8 Kinyne gokinyi chunye nochandore ahinya, omiyo noluongo ajuoke kod joma riek duto manie piny Misri. Nonyisogi lekne, to onge ng’ama ne nyalo lokone tiendgi." 
Genesis41:9 Eka jaduong’ jogam divai nowacho ni Farao niya, “Nyaka ahul gima rach ma asetimo." 
Genesis41:10 Kane ikecho gi jotichni, nitueyowa kaachiel gi jaduong’ joted makati e od jaduong’ askeche." 
Genesis41:11 Eka chieng’ moro gotieno ne waleko lek waduto, kendo lek ka lek ne nigi tiende." 
Genesis41:12 To ja-Hibrania moro ma wuowi mane misumba jaduong’ askeche ne ni kodwa kanyo, mi ne wanyise lekwa. Nolokonwagi konyisowa tiend moro kamoro," 
Genesis41:13 mi gik moko notimore mana kaka noselokonwa tiend lekno. An ne odwoka e tija, to jaduong’ joted makati ne onegi.”" 
Genesis41:14 Kane Farao owinjo kamano, nooro wach mondo okelne Josef, mi ne gikele piyopiyo ka gigole e od twech. Noliedo, moloko lepe, eka nobiro ir Farao." 
Genesis41:15 Farao nowachone niya, “Nende aleko lek, to onge ng’ama nyalo lokona tiende. Osewachna ni inyalo loko tiend lek moro amora.”" 
Genesis41:16 To Josef nodwoke niya, “Ngang’! An ok anyal to Nyasaye biro dwoki maber.”" 
Genesis41:17 Farao nonyise niya, “Nende aleko ni achung’ e dho aora Nael," 
Genesis41:18 mi dhok abiriyo mabeyo kendo machwe owuok e aora ka kwayo e odundu. 
Genesis41:19 Eka dhok moko abiriyo nowuok e aorano to gin ne gin dhok maricho kendo modhero. Pok anenoe dhok maricho kamano e piny Misri mangima. 
Genesis41:20 Dhok maricho modherogo nomwonyo dhok machwe abiriyo mokwongo kande. 
Genesis41:21 To kane gisechamogi kamano, ng’ato ne ok nyal ng’eyo ni gisechamogi, nikech ne pod ginenore mana modhero kaka chon. Bang’e nende achiew." 
Genesis41:22 Eka nindo nochako otera, maleko kendo, ni aneno wi ngano abiriyo mochiek machwe e tiang’ achiel." 
Genesis41:23 To wi ngano abiriyo moko motho, kendo ma yamb oro otwoyo, nowuok bang’gi." 
Genesis41:24 Mi wi ngano modherogo nomwonyo wi ngano abiriyo mochiek machwe kande. Asenyiso ajuoke lekgo duto, to onge ng’ama nyalo lokona tiendgi.”" 
Genesis41:25 Josef nowacho ni Farao niya, “Leknigo tiendgi achiel. Nyasaye osenyisi gima obiro timo." 
Genesis41:26 Dhok abiriyo machwego gin higni abiriyo, kendo wiye ngano abiriyo machwego bende gin higni abiriyo. Giduto ginyiso tiend wach achiel." 
Genesis41:27 To dhok moko abiriyo modhero mane owuok achien-go, kod wiye ngano motho kendo ma yamb oro otwoyogo nyiso higni abiriyo mag kech." 
Genesis41:28 En mana kaka awachoni ni Nyasaye osenyisi gima obiro timo. 
Genesis41:29 Higni abiriyo biro betie ma piny Misri mangima nobedie gi yieng’o ahinya. 
Genesis41:30 Bang’ mano, higni abiriyo moko nobedie mag kech, kendo wi ji nowil gi higni abiriyo mosebet mag yieng’ogo, mi kech noketh piny." 
Genesis41:31 Ji ok nopar higni abiriyo mag yieng’ogo, nikech kech maluweno nobed mager miwuoro." 
Genesis41:32 Lek ma iseleko diriyono nyiso ratiro ni Nyasaye osechano mar timo kamano, kendo obiro timogo piyopiyo." 
Genesis41:33 Omiyo koro yier ng’at mariek kendo mong’eyo gik moko mondo iket jatelo mar Misri. 
Genesis41:34 Bende nyaka iket jotelo moko e piny, mondo okanni achiel kuom abich mar chamb Misri duto. Ginitim kamano kuom higni abiriyo ma piny biro yieng’ie." 
Genesis41:35 Nyaka giti gi chikni, ka gichoko cham moyud e kinde mag yieng’o mabirogo, mondo gikan-gi e dere manie mier madongo, kendo nyaka giritgi." 
Genesis41:36 Chamgo nokan mondo okony piny e kinde mag higni abiriyo ma kech nobedie ka chamo piny Misri. Kamano kech ok noketh piny Misri.” 
Genesis41:37 Farao gi jodonge ne mor gi wachno," 
Genesis41:38 mi nopenjogi niya, “Ere kuma wanyalo yudoe ng’at moro machielo, man gi Roho mar Nyasaye machal gi jali?”" 
Genesis41:39 Omiyo Farao nowacho ni Josef niya, “Kaka Nyasaye osenyisi wechegi duto, onge ng’at moro mariek kendo mong’eyo gik moko moloyi." 
Genesis41:40 Abiro keti jatend pinya kendo joga duto biro winjo chikni. An kende ema naloyi gi duong’ nikech an ruoth.” 
Genesis41:41 Eka nomedo wachone niya, “Ne! Koro aseketi ruodh Misri duto.”" 
Genesis41:42 Mi nogolo tere mar loch e lwete, moketo e lwet Josef. Nomiye lewni mag bafta mayom morwako, mi olierone thiwni mag dhahabu e ng’ute." 
Genesis41:43 Nomiyo oidho gach ruoth mar ariyo, kendo joritne ne goyo koko e nyime, ka wacho niya, “Yawneuru e yo!” Kamano Josef noket ruodh Misri duto." 
Genesis41:44 Farao nowachone niya, “An e ruoth, to onge ng’ato ma notim gimoro amora e Misri ma ok in ema iyiene.”" 
Genesis41:45 Nochako Josef ni Zefenath-panea. Nonywomone nyako ma nyinge Asenath nyar Potifera, jadolo mar dala On. Kamano Josef nobedo gi teko e piny Misri duto." 
Genesis41:46 Josef ne jahigni piero adek ka nochako tij Farao ruodh Misri. Noa ir Farao, mowuotho e piny Misri duto." 
Genesis41:47 E kinde mar higni abiriyo mag yieng’ogo, ji nokayo cham mogundho." 
Genesis41:48 Josef nochoko cham duto kuom higni abiriyo ma piny Misri ne nie gi yieng’o, mi nokanogi e mier madongo. E dala ka dala nokanoe cham moa e puothe machiegni kode." 
Genesis41:49 Nokano cham mang’eny ka kuoyo ma e dho nam. Chamgo nodoko mathoth mokadho apima. 
Genesis41:50 Kane pok higni mag kech obiro, Josef nosenywolo yawuowi ariyo gi Asenath nyar Potifera, jadolo mar On." 
Genesis41:51 Josef nowacho niya, “Nyasaye osemiyo wiya owil gi chandruokna duto.” Omiyo nochako wuode makayo ni Manase (tiende ni wich wil)." 
Genesis41:52 Nowacho bende niya, “Nyasaye osemiya nyithindo e piny ma nachandorae.” Omiyo nochako wuode mar ariyo ni Efraim, (tiende ni, omiya nyithindo)." 
Genesis41:53 Kane higni abiriyo mag yieng’o e Misri orumo," 
Genesis41:54 higni abiriyo mag kech nochakore mana kaka Josef nosewacho. Kejno nomako pinje moko duto, to mak mana Misri ema cham ne yudoree." 
Genesis41:55 Kamano ka ne kech omako piny Misri duto, jopiny noywak ni Farao mondo omigi chiemo. To nowachonigi niya, “Dhiuru ir Josef, kendo utim kaka owachonu.”" 
Genesis41:56 Kech koro nokwako piny Misri, omiyo Josef noyawo dere duto, mong’iewo cham gi jo-Misri, nimar kech ne lich ahinya." 
Genesis41:57 Ji moa e pinje moko duto bende nobiro Misri mondo ong’iew cham kuom Josef nimar kech ne ger e piny ngima. 
Genesis42:1 Kane Jakobo owinjo ni cham yudore Misri, nowacho ni yawuote niya, “Ang’o momiyo ubudho abudha ka, maonge gima utimo?" 
Genesis42:2 Asewinjo ni cham yudore Misri, omiyo dhiuru kuno urundie cham mondo kik kejni negwa.”" 
Genesis42:3 Kuom mano, owete Josef apar nodhi ng’iewo cham Misri." 
Genesis42:4 To Jakobo ne ok oyie mondo Benjamin owadgi Josef mahie odhi kodgi, nikech noluor ni dipo ka gimoro ochame kuno." 
Genesis42:5 Kamano yawuot Israel nodhi rundo cham Misri kaka jomoko duto ne timo, nimar kech nomako piny Kanaan." 
Genesis42:6 Koro, kaka Josef ne jatend Misri, en ema ji moa e pinje duto ne rundo kuome cham. Emomiyo, owetene nobiro mogoyo chonggi piny, kendo okulorene nyaka e lowo." 
Genesis42:7 Kane Josef onenogi, nong’eyogi, to kata kamano nowuondore ka ng’ama kiagi. Nowuoyo kodgi gi gero kopenjogi niya, “Ua kure?” Ne gidwoke ni, “Waa Kanaan, mondo wabi warund cham.”" 
Genesis42:8 To kata obedo ni Josef nong’eyo owetene kamano, gin to ne ok ging’eye." 
Genesis42:9 Noparo lek mane oseleko kuomgi, mowachonigi niya, “Un jombetre, kendo usebiro ka mondo ucheng ane kama pinywa nyapgo.”" 
Genesis42:10 Ne gidwoke ni, “Ooyo, ruoth, wabiro mana ni mondo warund cham." 
Genesis42:11 Waduto wan yawuot ng’at achiel, kendo ok wan jombetre, to wan mana joma kare.”" 
Genesis42:12 Josef nodwokogi ni, “Ngang’! Usebiro mana ni mondo ucheng ane kama pinywa nyapgo.”" 
Genesis42:13 Eka ne giwachone niya, “Ruoth, wan owete apar gariyo ma yawuot ng’at achiel e piny Kanaan. Owadwa ma chogo odong’ gi wuonwa dala, to owadwa moro nolal.”" 
Genesis42:14 Josef nodwokogi niya, “En mana kaka awachonu ni un jombetre," 
Genesis42:15 kendo ma e kaka abiro temou. Akuong’ora gi nying Farao ni ok unua, mak mana ka owadu ma chogono obiro ka." 
Genesis42:16 Omiyo oruru ng’at achiel kuomu mondo odhi oome. To joma odong’ ibiro ket e od twech nyaka chop wane ane ka gima uwacho en adier. Ka ok en adier, to gi nying Farao, kara un jombetre!”" 
Genesis42:17 Eka noketogi e od twech kuom ndalo adek. 
Genesis42:18 Chieng’ mar adek Josef nowacho ni owetene niya, “An ng’at moluoro Nyasaye, omiyo unyalo kwo kutimo kaka awacho." 
Genesis42:19 Ka un ji makare adier, to ara weuru owadu achiel e od twech ka, mondo uter cham muserundogi ni joodu ma koro kech nego." 
Genesis42:20 Eka ukel owadu machogo ira, mondo ang’e ni kara usebedo kuwachona adier, mi ok nonegu.”" 
Genesis42:21 Ne giwuoyo e kindgi giwegi, ka giwacho niya, “Adier, owinjore wayud kum kuom gima ne watimo ni owadwa. Ne waneno kochandore malit, to kane waneno kochandore, ne ok wadewe, mano emomiyo koro wanie chandruok.”" 
Genesis42:22 Eka Reuben nowachonigi niya, “Donge nakwerou ni kik utim ni rawerano gimoro marach? To ne utamoru winjo. Koro sani ochulnwa kuor nikech thoneno.”" 
Genesis42:23 Josef nowinjo gima giwacho, to gin ne ok ging’eyo, nimar ne giwuoyo kode ka ng’ato ema lokonigi wach." 
Genesis42:24 Josef noa irgi, moywak ahinya. Kane mirimbe orumo, noduogo irgi, mokawo Simeon, otueyo e nyimgi." 
Genesis42:25 Eka Josef nogolo chik mondo oket cham e ogundegi, kendo mondo odwok ni ng’ato ka ng’ato pesane e ogunde, to bende mondo omigi chiemo moromogi chamo e wuodhgi ka gidok. Mi notimnigi kamano." 
Genesis42:26 Eka ne giketo cham e ng’e kenjegi, mi gia." 
Genesis42:27 Kane gibuoro kamoro gotienono, achiel kuomgi nogonyo ogunde, mondo omi kanje chiemo, mi nopo koyudo pesane e wi cham." 
Genesis42:28 Nowacho ni owetene niya, “Osedwokna pesana! Eri go, en e ogunda ka.” Mi ne gibwok, kendo gibedo maluor ka gipenjore niya, “Ang’o ma Nyasaye osetimonwani?”" 
Genesis42:29 Kane giduogo Kanaan ir Jakobo wuon-gi, ne ginyise duto mane osetimorenigi." 
Genesis42:30 Ne giwachone niya, “Ruodh pinyno nowuoyo kodwa gi gero kowachonwa ni wan jombetre, modhi chengo pinyno." 
Genesis42:31 Ne wanyise ni wan ji makare, kendo ok wan jombetre." 
Genesis42:32 Bende ne wanyise ni wan owete apar gariyo ma yawuot ng’at achiel, to achiel noselal, kendo owadwa machogo odong’ dala Kanaan gi wuonwa." 
Genesis42:33 To ng’atno nodwokowa niya, ‘Abiro ng’eyo ka un joma kare mana kuweyo ng’at achiel kuomu odong’ koda ka, to jomoko okawo cham motero ni joodu ma koro kech nego," 
Genesis42:34 kendo okelona owadu machogono. Kamano an ang’e ni kara ok un jombetre, to un mana joma kare. Eka nadwoknu owadu, kendo unuwuoth kamoro amora mudwaro e pinyka.’ ”" 
Genesis42:35 Bang’e owetego nogolo cham e ogundegi, mi ng’ato ka ng’ato noyudo ofuko mar pesane e ogunde. Kane gineno pesano, giduto ne gibwok ahinya kaachiel gi wuon-gi." 
Genesis42:36 Jakobo wuon-gi nowachonigi niya, “Usemaya nyithinda! Josef nolal, kendo Simeon bende koro oselal, to koro eka pod udwaro kawo Benjamin! To an ema ayudo chandruok!”" 
Genesis42:37 Reuben nowacho ni wuon mare niya, “Inyalo nego yawuota ariyogo ka ok aduokoni Benjamin. Kete e lweta, kendo abiro dwokonigo.”" 
Genesis42:38 To Jakobo nodwoke niya, “Wuoda ok nyal dhi kodu, nimar owadgi mahie osetho, kendo en kende ema koro odong’. Dipo ka otho e yo, mi mano dikelna kuyo ma nyalo nega, nikech aseti ahinya.”" 
Genesis43:1 Kech ne pod ger ahinya e piny Kanaan," 
Genesis43:2 omiyo kane jood Jakobo osetieko cham duto mane girundo Misri, Jakobo nowacho ni yawuote niya, “Doguru Misri mondo urundie cham moko matin, wakonyrego.”" 
Genesis43:3 To Juda nodwoke niya, “Ng’atcha nosiemowa matek ni kik wadog ire ka ok wadhi gi owadwa machogo." 
Genesis43:4 Omiyo kiyie ni mondo wadhi kode, to eka wanyalo dhi rundo cham." 
Genesis43:5 To ka ok iyie mondo odhi kodwa, to ok wanyal dhi, nimar ng’atcha nowacho ni kik wadog ire ka ok wadhi gi owadwa machogo.”" 
Genesis43:6 Israel nowacho niya, “Ang’o momiyo usetimona kamano, kunyiso ng’atno ni un gi owadu moro modong?”" 
Genesis43:7 Ne gidwoke niya, “Nopenjowa matek weche ma kuomwa kod ma kuom joodwa, kowacho niya, ‘Wuonu pod ngima? Donge un gi owadu moro?’ Omiyo nyaka ne waduok penjonego. To ne ok wang’eyo ni onyalo wachonwa mondo water owadwa ire.”" 
Genesis43:8 Juda nowacho ni Israel wuon mare niya, “We waikre mondo adhi gi rawerani. Eka wan duto, kod in kaachiel gi nyithindwa dwakuo e kech." 
Genesis43:9 Asingora ni nobed wachna ka ok adwokonigo ka ongima, kendo anabed jaketho e nyimi nyaka chop thona." 
Genesis43:10 Ka dabed ni ok waseketho kindegi duto, di koro wasechopo kuno, kendo duogo nyadiriyo.”" 
Genesis43:11 Israel wuon-gi nowachonigi niya, “Ka ochuno ni nyaka bed mana kamano, to ara timuru. To kawuru gik moko mabeyo mag pinyni, machalo dwogo gi mor kich gi gik mang’ue ng’ar, gi manemane, kod olembe moko, mondo uting’ e ogundeu, uter ni ng’atno kaka chiwo." 
Genesis43:12 Bende kawuru pesa moromo rundo diriyo, nimar nyaka udwok pesa mane uyudo kodwoknu e ogundeu, nikech nyalo bet ni ne jogo oboth." 
Genesis43:13 Eka ukaw owadu, udhigo ir ng’atno." 
Genesis43:14 Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto mondo omi chuny ng’atno obed maler kodu, mi odwoknu owadu mane uweyo kuno, kaachiel gi Benjamin bende. To ka ochunore ni nyithinda nyaka tho, to kara ginitho!”" 
Genesis43:15 Kamano ne gikawo pesa moromo rundo diriyo, kaachiel gi chiwo, mi ne gidok Misri ir Josef, ka gidhi gi Benjamin." 
Genesis43:16 Kane Josef oneno Benjamin ka ni kodgi, nowacho ni jaduong’ ode niya, “Rwak jogo e ot, kendo ineg chiayo mondo itedi, nikech gibiro chiemo koda sa auchiel.”" 
Genesis43:17 Notimo kaka Josef nochike, mi norwako jogo e ot." 
Genesis43:18 Kane iterogi e ot, luoro nomakogi, nimar ne giparo niya, “Okelwa ka mana nikech pesa mane odwok e gundewa chieng mokwongo cha. Omiyo nyaka bed ni gibiro monjowa kendo lokowa wasumbini, mi gikaw kenjewa.”" 
Genesis43:19 Kuom mano ne gidhi ir jaduong’ od Josef e dhoot, mi giwachone niya," 
Genesis43:20 “Ruoth, kiyie to winjwae. Yande wabiro ka mondo warund cham," 
Genesis43:21 to kane wadok, mwachopo kuma ne onego wabworie, ne wagonyo gundewa, mi ng’ato ka ng’ato noyudo pesane duto kodwokne e wi ogunde. To koro waduoko pesago," 
Genesis43:22 kendo wakelo pesa moko mondo wamed rundogo cham. To ok wang’eyo ng’at mane osoyo pesago e ogundewa.” 
Genesis43:23 Ng’atno nodwokogi niya, “Mano kik thagu, kendo kik ubed maluor. Nyasachu ma Nyasach wuora ema noketonu pesago, nimar an to nayudo pesa mane uchulo.” Bang’ mano nokelo Simeon irgi." 
Genesis43:24 Kane jaduong’ od Josef oserwakogi e ot, nomiyogi pi mondo gilwokgo tiendegi, kendo momiyo kenjegi chiemo." 
Genesis43:25 Ne gigolo chiwo mane gikelo, mi giritogo biro Josef sa auchiel, nimar ne giwinjo ni gibiro chiemo kode." 
Genesis43:26 Kane Josef oduogo e ode, ne gimiye chiwo mane gisekelonego, kendo ne gikulore piny e nyime." 
Genesis43:27 Nopenjogi ngimagi, eka nopenjogi kendo niya, “To jaduong’ ma wuonu mane uwachona wachne ni nade? Donge pod ongima?”" 
Genesis43:28 Ne gidwoke niya, “Ee, ruoth, wuonwa pod ngima.” Eka ne gigoyo chonggi piny, mi gikulore e nyime nyaka e lowo." 
Genesis43:29 Kane Josef oneno Benjamin ma owadgi mahie, nopenjogi niya, “Ma e owadu machogo mane uwachona?” Mi nowacho ni Benjamin niya, “Nyasaye mondo oguedhi, wuoda.”" 
Genesis43:30 Eka Josef noa kanyo piyopiyo nikech siwuori mar hera nomake gi owadgino. Pi wang’e ne chiegni ton, omiyo nodhi e ode ma iye, moywak kuno." 
Genesis43:31 Bang’e nolwoko wang’e, mowuok oko. Nosiro mirima manoyudo omake, mi nogolo chik mondo otok chiemo." 
Genesis43:32 Josef nochiemo yore, kendo owetene bende nochiemo e mesa machielo. Jo-Misri mane chiemo kode bende nochiemo yore, nikech en wichkuot maduong’ kuom jo-Misri riwo tawo gi jo-Hibrania." 
Genesis43:33 Owete Josef noket e mesa mane ni e nyim Josef, ka giluwore kaka nywolgi obet, chakre wuowi maduong’ nyaka wuowi matin. Kane gineno kochan-gi kamano, ne ging’iyore ka chunygi parore." 
Genesis43:34 Josef nopogonigi chiemo moa e mesane, to Benjamin nopogne nyadibich moloyo owetene mamoko. Kamano ne gichiemo, kendo gimetho kode nyaka ne gibet mamor giduto." 
Genesis44:1 Josef nochiko jaduong’ ode niya, “Ket cham e ogunde jogi kar ma ginyalo ting’o, kendo idwokni ng’ato ka ng’ato pesane kisoyo e dho ogunde." 
Genesis44:2 Bende so kikombena mar fedha ewi ogund wuowi machogo, kaachiel gi pesane.” Mi notimo kaka Josef nochike." 
Genesis44:3 Kinyne gokinyi nogony jogo, mi ne gikawo kenjegi, kendo gimako yo madhi thurgi." 
Genesis44:4 To kane pok gidhi mabor ahinya gi dala, Josef nochiko jaduong’ ode niya, “Dhiyo ilaw joka, kendo kisejukogi, to mondo ipenjgi kama: ‘Mar ang’o uchulo richo kar ber?" 
Genesis44:5 Ang’o momiyo usekwalo kikombena mar fedha? En e kikombe ma ruodha methogo, kendo okorogo wach. Awuoro kaka usetimo gima rach moloyo!’ ”" 
Genesis44:6 Omiyo kane jaduong’ od Josef ojukogi, nonyisogi wechego," 
Genesis44:7 to ne gidwoke niya, “Ruoth, ere gimomiyo iwuoyo kamano? Ok ne wanyal kata mana paro timo kamano!" 
Genesis44:8 Kane waa Kanaan, donge nineno ka wadwokoni pesa mane wayudo e wi ogundewa? Koro ere gimomiyo dwakwal fedha fedha kata dhahabu e od ruodhi?" 
Genesis44:9 Ruoth, ka ng’atwa moro oyud gi kikombeno, to nyaka otho, kendo wan duto wanabed wasumbi.”" 
Genesis44:10 Nowachonigi niya, “Ber, awinjo gima uwacho, to ng’atno moyud gi kikombeno ema nyaka bed misumbana, to jomoko duto nyalo a.”" 
Genesis44:11 Kuom mano ne giyieyo ogundegi piny, mi ng’ato ka ng’ato nogonyo mare." 
Genesis44:12 Jaduong’ od Josefno nodwero, kochako gi wuowi makayo nyaka wuowi machogo, mi noyudo kikombeno e ogund Benjamin." 
Genesis44:13 Kane gineno kamano, ne giyiecho lepgi, kendo ne giyieyo kenjegi, mi gidok e dalano." 
Genesis44:14 Juda gi owetene notundo e od Josef, mi giyudo kapod entie. Ne gigoyo chonggi piny e nyime, mi gikulore nyaka e lowo." 
Genesis44:15 Josef nopenjogi niya, “Ang’o musetimoni? Donge nung’eyo ni ng’atno maduong’ ka an nyalo koro wach, mong’e gima usetimo?”" 
Genesis44:16 Juda nowachone niya, “Ruoth, ang’o ma dwawachi? Onge gima wanyalo timo mondo onyis ni wan joma kare, nimar Nyasaye osefwenyo kethowa. Wan duto koro wan wasumbi, ma ok mana jal moyud kikombeni kuome kende.”" 
Genesis44:17 To Josef nowachonigi niya, “Ooyo, ok anyal timo kamano. Mana jal moyud gi kikombe ema biro bedo misumbana. Jomoko kuomu modong’, to nyalo dok dala ir wuonu gi kue.”" 
Genesis44:18 Eka Juda nodhi ir Josef, mowachone niya, “Ruoth, yie mondo awuo kodi, kendo kik ikech koda, nikech in bende iduong’ mana kaka Farao." 
Genesis44:19 Ruoth, nene ipenjowa ka bende wan gi wuonwa kata owadwa moro," 
Genesis44:20 mi ne wadwoki ni wan gi wuonwa ma tinde oti, kod owadwa matin monywolo koseti. To owadgi rawerano notho, kendo en kende e nyathi min mare modong’; omiyo wuon mare ohere ahinya." 
Genesis44:21 Bende ne iwachonwa ni mondo wakele inene. 
Genesis44:22 To ne wadwoki ni rawerano ok nyal pogore gi wuon, nikech kotimo kamano, to wuon mare ditho." 
Genesis44:23 To ruoth, niwachonwa ni ok noyienwa biro e nyimi kendo, ka ok wabiro gi owadwa machogono." 
Genesis44:24 Omiyo kane wadok dala ir wuonwa, ne wanyise kaka nisewachonwa." 
Genesis44:25 Bang’e wuonwa nowacho ni mondo waduog warund cham moko. 
Genesis44:26 To ne wadwoke ni, ‘Ok wanyal dhi, nikech kwaonge gi owadwa machogo, to ok noyienwa dhiyo e nyim ng’at cha. Omiyo wanyalo mana dhi ka wan gi owadwa machogo.’" 
Genesis44:27 Wuonwa nodwokowa niya, ‘Donge ung’eyo ni chiega nonywolona mana yawuowi ariyo kende?" 
Genesis44:28 Achiel kuomgi noselalna nono, kendo aparo ni adier ondiek osekidhe okidhe, nimar pok achako anene nyaka chil kawuono." 
Genesis44:29 To ka ukawo wuodani bende, mi gimoro odhi ochame, to dumi chunya chandre, mi datho, nikech aseti.’" 
Genesis44:30 Emomiyo ruoth,, ka adok ir wuora nono ka aonge gi rawerani," 
Genesis44:31 to gikanyono monenoe ni oonge, to enotho, nikech ngimane otuere kuom ngima rawerani. Kuom mano, ruoth, dibed ni wan ema wamiyo wuonwa otho malit, nikech oseti ahinya." 
Genesis44:32 To bende ruoth, an ema nasingo ngimana kuom rawerani, ka anyiso wuora ni ka ok adwokonego, to nabed jaketho e nyime kuom ngimana duto." 
Genesis44:33 Omiyo koro ruoth, yie adong’ ka mondo abed misumbani kar rawerani. En to yie iweye, mondo odog kod owetene." 
Genesis44:34 Ere kaka dadog ir wuora nono, ka aonge kode? Ok danyal neno masira ma doyudno.”" 
Genesis45:1 Josef koro ne ok nyal geng’o mirima mane en go e nyim joma ne pogogi chiemo, omiyo nokok niya, “Ng’ato ka ng’ato mondo owuogi.” Kamano koro ne onge ng’at moro machielo e sa mane ohuloree ni owetene."
