Genesis45:2 Noywak matek, mi jo-Misri gi jood ruoth owinjo." 
Genesis45:3 Josef nowacho ni owetene niya, “An Josef. Bende wuora pod ngima adier?” To luoro nomako owetene ahinya, mi dhogi omoko." 
Genesis45:4 Eka Josef nowachonigi niya, “Suduru machiegni.” Kane gisesudo machiegni, nowachonigi niya, “An e Josef owadu mane ung’iewo, moter Misri." 
Genesis45:5 To kik uluor, kata kik une marach ni ne ung’iewa ku, nikech Nyasaye ema noora motelonu mondo ares ngimau." 
Genesis45:6 Ma eri en mana higa mar ariyo ma kech osebetgo e piny, to higni abich moko pod odong’ ma pur kata keyo ok nobedie." 
Genesis45:7 Nyasaye noora motelonu mondo kik ulal, to mondo aresu ubed oganda maduong’." 
Genesis45:8 Omiyo un ok ema ne ukela ku, to Nyasaye ema nokela. Osemiya bedo gi duong’, mi achalo wuon Farao, nimar an e jatend pinye duto, kendo an e ruodh Misri mangima.”" 
Genesis45:9 “Koro doguru ir wuora uwachne mondo ni Josef wuode owacho kama: ‘Nyasaye oseketa ruodh Misri duto, omiyo bi ira piyopiyo." 
Genesis45:10 Inyalo dak e piny Goshen mondo ibed machiegni koda, kaachiel gi yawuoti gi nyikwayi kod jambi, gi mwanduni duto." 
Genesis45:11 Anapidhi kuno, kendo narang gigi duto mondo ane ni ok ichando gimoro, nimar pod nitie higni abich mabiro mag kech.’" 
Genesis45:12 “Koro unyalo neno uwegi, kaachiel gi Benjamin owadwa, ni adier an e Josef ma wuoyo koduni." 
Genesis45:13 Nyisuru wuora kaka an gi teko e Misri, bende nyiseuru gik moko duto ma useneno ka, kendo ukele ira piyopiyo.”" 
Genesis45:14 Eka nokwako Benjamin owadgi, mochako ywak." 
Genesis45:15 Bang’ mano nonyodho owetene duto, kendo noywak kokwakogi. Eka owetene nowuoyo kode." 
Genesis45:16 Kane wach ochopo e od ruoth ni owete Josef osebiro Misri, Farao kaachiel gi jotende, ne jodoko mamor." 
Genesis45:17 Farao nowacho ni Josef niya, “Nyis oweteni mondo oyie kenjegi, kendo odog e piny Kanaan," 
Genesis45:18 gidhi gikaw wuon-gi kod joodgi duto mondo gibi ira. Abiro miyogi kama ber moloyo e Misri mondo gidagie, kendo ginicham chiemo mabeyo ahinya mayudore e pinya." 
Genesis45:19 Bende nyisgi gikaw geche mag Misri, mondo giting’go mondgi kod nyithindgi kendo gikaw wuon-gi mondo gibigo." 
Genesis45:20 Kata ka giweyo mwandugi kuno, to kik gidew, nimar abiro miyogi lowo maber moloyo e Misri.”" 
Genesis45:21 Yawuot Israel notimo kaka nowachnigi, kendo Josef nomiyogi geche kaka Farao nosechiko, kaachiel gi chiemo moromogi chamo e wuodhgi." 
Genesis45:22 Bende nomiyogi lewni mabeyo, to Benjamin nomiyo fedha mia adek kod lewni abich mabeyo." 
Genesis45:23 To bende nooro ni wuon mare gik mabeyoe moloyo ma kenje apar oting’o, kod cham gi makati, kaachiel gi chiemo moko ma bende kenje apar mamoko oting’o, ma wuon ne dhi chamo e wuoth." 
Genesis45:24 Nokowo owetene, to kane oweyogi, nowachonigi niya, “Kik udhaw kendu e wang’yo.”" 
Genesis45:25 Kamano ne gia Misri, mi gidok Kanaan ir Jakobo wuon-gi." 
Genesis45:26 Ne giwachone niya, “Josef pod ngima! En e morito piny Misri duto!” Jakobo nobwok ahinya, kendo ne ok oyie ni wachgino en adier." 
Genesis45:27 To kane ginyise weche duto mane Josef osewachonigi, kendo ka noneno geche mane Josef oseoro mondo otere Misri, chunye noduogo." 
Genesis45:28 Mi nowacho niya, “Mano oromo! Kara Josef wuoda pod ngima! Nyaka adhi anene kapok atho.”" 
Genesis46:1 Israel nokawo gige duto, mochako wuoth, ka ne ochopo Beer-sheba, notimo misango ni Nyasach Isaka wuon mare kuno." 
Genesis46:2 Nyasaye nofwenyorene gotieno, ka luonge niya, “Jakobo, Jakobo.” Nodwoke ni, “An ka.”" 
Genesis46:3 Eka Nyasaye nowachone niya, “An Nyasaye ma Nyasach wuoru. Kik iluor dhi Misri, nikech anatimi oganda maduong’ kuno." 
Genesis46:4 Abiro dhi kodi Misri, kendo an ema nadwok nyikwayi ka. Bende Josef noyuo wang’i sa thoni.”" 
Genesis46:5 Kuom mano Jakobo noa Beer-sheba. Yawuot Israel noketo Jakobo wuon-gi kaachiel gi nyithindgi kod mondgi e geche mane Farao oseoro mondo oting’gi. 
Genesis46:6 Ne gikawo jambgi kod mwandugi duto mane gin go Kanaan, mi gidhigo Misri. Jakobo nokawo joode duto, ma onge achiel modong’." 
Genesis46:7 Nodhi gi yawuote gi nyige kod nyikwaye ma yawuowi gi ma nyiri. 
Genesis46:8 Magi e nying jo-Israel ma nodhi Misri: Jakobo gi yawuote: Reuben wuod Jakobo maduong’," 
Genesis46:9 kaachiel gi yawuote ma Hanok gi Palu gi Hezron kod Karmi. 
Genesis46:10 To yawuot Simeon ne gin Jemuel gi Jamin gi Ohad, gi Jakin gi Zohar kod Shaul, mane wuod dhako ma nyar Kanaan." 
Genesis46:11 Yawuot Lawi ne gin Gershon gi Kohath kod Merari. 
Genesis46:12 To yawuot Juda ne gin Er gi Onan, gi Shela gi Perez kod Zera. (To Er gi Onan ne jotho Kanaan.) Yawuot Perez ne gin Hezron gi Hamul." 
Genesis46:13 Yawuot Isakar to ne gin Tola gi Puva gi Iob kod Shimron. 
Genesis46:14 To yawuot Zebulun ne gin Zered gi Elon kod Jaleel. 
Genesis46:15 Mago e yawuowi mane Jakobo onywolo gi Lea Mesopotamia, ka ok okwan Dina nyare. Kamano giduto ne gin ji piero adek gadek." 
Genesis46:16 Yawuot Gad ne gin Zifion gi Hagi gi Shuni, gi Ezbon gi Eri gi Arodi kod Areli." 
Genesis46:17 Yawuot Asher ne gin Imna gi Ishva gi Ishvi kod Beria, gi nyako ma nyinge Sera. Yawuot Beria to ne gin Heber kod Malkiel." 
Genesis46:18 Ji apar gauchielgo e joka Jakobo ma od Zilpa mane Laban omiyo Lea nyare. 
Genesis46:19 Rahel nonywolo Josef kod Benjamin. 
Genesis46:20 To Asenath nyar Potifera jadolo mar On nonywolo ni Josef Manase gi Efraim e piny Misri. 
Genesis46:21 Yawuot Benjamin to ne gi Bela gi Beker gi Ashbel. Yawuot Bela ne gin Gera gi Namaan gi Ehi gi Rosh gi Mupim gi Hupim kod Ard. 
Genesis46:22 Ji apar gang’wen-go e joka Jakobo ma od Rahel. 
Genesis46:23 Wuod Dan ne Hushim. 
Genesis46:24 To yawuot Naftali ne gin Jazeel gi Guni gi Jezeel kod Shilem. 
Genesis46:25 Ji abiriyogo e joka Jakobo ma od Bilha, mane Laban omiyo Rahel nyare." 
Genesis46:26 Kamano joka Jakobo ma nodhi Misri ne gin ji piero auchiel, ka ok okwan mond yawuote." 
Genesis46:27 To Josef nonywolo yawuowi ariyo Misri, omiyo joka Jakobo duto ma nodhi Misri noromo piero abiriyo." 
Genesis46:28 Israel nooro Juda motelo ir Josef mondo onyise oromne Goshen. Kamano, ka ne gichopo e piny Goshen," 
Genesis46:29 Josef nokawo gache modhi kuno, romo ni Israel wuon mare. Kane oneno wuon mare, nokwake moywak aming’a." 
Genesis46:30 Israel nowacho ni Josef niya, “Koro kata katho to onge wach, nikech koro aseneni, kendo ang’eyo ni pod ingima.”" 
Genesis46:31 Bang’e Josef nowacho ni owetene gi jood wuon mare niya, “Adhi nyiso Farao ni owetena kod joodwa ma yande odak Kanaan koro osebiro ira," 
Genesis46:32 to gin jokwath, kendo gisekelo jambgi kod mwandugi duto." 
Genesis46:33 Emomiyo ka Farao oluongou, mopenjou ni tiju en ang’o," 
Genesis46:34 to nyaka uwachne ni, chakre tindou, usebedo jokwath mana kaka kwereu. Kuwacho kamano, to unuyud thuolo mar dak e piny Goshen ka, nikech jo-Misri ok ohero jokwath.”" 
Genesis47:1 Josef nodhi ir Farao, mowachone niya, “Wuora kod owetena josea Kanaan gi jambgi kod mwandugi duto, kendo koro gin e piny Goshen.”" 
Genesis47:2 To noyudo Josef osekelo ji abich kuom owetene ir Farao mondo ong’egi," 
Genesis47:3 mi Farao nopenjogi niya, “Tiju en ang’o?” Ne gidwoke ni, “Ruoth, wan jokwath, mana kaka kwerewa." 
Genesis47:4 To wasebiro mondo wadag e pinyni, nimar kech ger e piny Kanaan, ma kata lek ma jambwa dikwaye onge. Koro, ruoth, yie mondo wadag e piny Goshen.”" 
Genesis47:5 Farao nowacho ni Josef niya, “Kaka koro wuoru gi oweteni josebiro iri," 
Genesis47:6 piny Misri duto ni e lweti. Ketgi gidag kama berie moloyo. Ginyalo dak e piny Goshen, kendo king’eyo ni jomoko kuomgi gin jokwath molony, to ketgi mondo girit jamba.”" 
Genesis47:7 Bang’ mano, Josef nokelo Jakobo wuon mare e nyim Farao, mi Jakobo nogwedho Farao." 
Genesis47:8 Eka Farao nopenje niya, “In jahigni adi?”" 
Genesis47:9 Jakobo nodwoke ni, “Higni ma asewuotho e piny, gin mana mia achiel gi piero adek. Hignigo osebedo manok kendo maricho, kendo ok girom gi higni ma kwerewa nowuothogo e piny.”" 
Genesis47:10 Eka Jakobo nogoyo ni Farao oriti modhi. 
Genesis47:11 Bang’e Josef nomiyo wuon mare gi owetene puothe kuonde mabeyo e Misri e gweng’ Rameses, kaka Farao nochiko." 
Genesis47:12 Bang’e nomiyo wuon mare gi owetene kod jood wuon duto, chiemo duto mane gidwaro." 
Genesis47:13 Kech ne ger, ma piny ngima ne onge gi chiemo, mi jo-Misri gi jo-Kanaan nodoko moyomno." 
Genesis47:14 Josef nochoko pesa duto mane jo-Misri gi jo-Kanaan ong’iewogo cham, kendo noterogi e od keno mar Farao." 
Genesis47:15 Kane jo-Misri gi jo-Kanaan osetieko pesagi duto, jo-Misri nobiro ir Josef, mi giwachone niya, “Miwa chiemo, dipo ka watho e nyimi, nikech pesawa oserumo.”" 
Genesis47:16 Josef nodwokogi niya, “Ka pesau oserumo, to kara miyauru jambu, eka amiu cham.”" 
Genesis47:17 Omiyo ne gitero jambgi ni Josef, mi nomiyogi cham kar farese gi jamni kod kenje. Kamano e higano nomiyogi cham, to nokawo jambgi duto." 
Genesis47:18 Higa moluwe, ne gidok ire, mi giwachone niya, “Ruoth, ok wadwar wuondi, to pesawa duto orumo, kendo jambwa bende koro osedoko meki. Omiyo koro waonge gi gima wanyalo miyi, to mak mana dendwa gi lopwa." 
Genesis47:19 Ang’o momiyo watho e nyimi, to ineno, kendo lopwa bende kethore? Ng’iewwa kaachiel gi puothewa kuom chiemo mondo wabed wasumb Farao, kendo puothewa odok mage, miwa kodhi mondo kik kech negwa, mondo pwothewa kik kethre.”" 
Genesis47:20 Kuom mano Josef nong’iewo ni Farao puothe duto mag Misri, nikech jo-Misri duto nong’iewo puothegi nimar kejno ne ger. Kamano puothe duto nodoko mag Farao." 
Genesis47:21 Josef noloko jo-Misri wasumbini, chakre bath Misri konchiel nyaka komachielo." 
Genesis47:22 Puothe jodolo kende ema ne ok ong’iewo, nimar jodolo ne nigi pokgi ma gikonyorego maa kuom Farao. Omiyo onge gima nochuno jodolo mondo ong’iew puothegi." 
Genesis47:23 Josef nowacho ni jo-Misri niya, “Winjuru! Kawuononi aseng’iewou ni Farao, kaachiel gi puotheu bende. Kodhi eriuru, mondo ukom e puotheu." 
Genesis47:24 To e kinde mag keyo, nyaka umi Farao achiel kuom abich mag cham. To mago modong’ ema nobednu kodhi, kod cham munyalo chamo gi joodu kod nyithindu.”" 
Genesis47:25 Ne gidwoke niya, “Ruoth, isekonyowa, omiyo kineno ni mano ber, to wabiro bedo wasumb Farao.”" 
Genesis47:26 Kuom mano, Josef noketo chik ni achiel kuom abich mag chamb Misri nyaka bed mag Farao. Chikni pod dhi nyime nyaka chil kawuono. Puothe jodolo kende ema ne ok Farao okawo." 
Genesis47:27 Jo-Israel nodak Misri e piny Goshen. Ne giyudo lowo, mi gimew, kendo ne ginya ahinya." 
Genesis47:28 Jakobo nodak Misri kuom higni apar gabiriyo, nyaka nodoko jahigni mia achiel gi piero ang’wen gabiriyo." 
Genesis47:29 Kane kinde mar thone ochopo machiegni, noluongo Josef wuode, nowachone niya, “Yie iket lweti e kind ema, kikuong’orina ni inibedna jaadiera, kendo ni initimna maber, mi ok niyika Misri." 
Genesis47:30 Kasetho, maluwo kwerena, to mondo igola Misri, kendo idhi iyika kama oyikie kwerena.” Josef nodwoke niya, “Abiro timo kaka iwacho.”" 
Genesis47:31 To Israel nowachone niya, “Kuong’rina ni initim kamano.” Mi Josef nokuong’orene. Eka Israel nokulore gi yo ka wi kitandane." 
Genesis48:1 Kinde moro achien, Josef nowinjo ni wuon mare tuo, mi nokawo yawuote ariyo ma Manase gi Efraim, modhi nene." 
Genesis48:2 Ka ne onyis Jakobo ni Josef wuode osebiro mondo onene, nochukore mobet e kitandane." 
Genesis48:3 Nowacho ni Josef niya, “Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto nofwenyorena Luz e piny Kanaan, moguedha." 
Genesis48:4 Nowachona ni, abiro miyi nyithindo mang’eny, mondo nyikwayi chieng’ odok ogendini mathoth, to pinyni namigi kaka mwandugi nyaka chieng’.”" 
Genesis48:5 Eka Jakobo nomedo wacho ni Josef niya, “Yawuoti ariyo mane inywolo Misri kapok abiro iri kaeri, ibiro kwan ka nyithinda. Adier, Efraim gi Manase biro bedo maga, mana kaka Reuben gi Simeon." 
Genesis48:6 To nyithindo mibiro nywolo bang’gi ema nobed magi. Kata kamano, korka gikeni, to nokwan-gi mana kaka joka owetegi ariyo ma Efraim gi Manase." 
Genesis48:7 “Kane aduogo aa Mesopotamia, nabwok malich ka ne Rahel meru othona e piny Kanaan ka pok wachopo Efrath. Ne ayike kuno but yo madhi Efrath” (Efrath iluongo bende ni Bethlehem.)" 
Genesis48:8 Ka ne Israel oneno yawuot Josef, nopenje ni, “Magi to ng’a gini?”" 
Genesis48:9 Josef nodwoke ni, “Magi e nyithinda ma Nyasaye osemiya Misri ka.” Mi Israel nowachone niya, “Yie ikelgi mondo aguedhgi.”" 
Genesis48:10 Israel koro noseti ahinya, ma wang’e oyuso ma ok onyal neno. Josef nokelo nyithinde ire, mi nokwakogi kendo onyodhogi." 
Genesis48:11 Eka Israel nowacho ni Josef niya, “Ne ok apar ni naneni kendo, to koro Nyasaye osemiyo aneno koda ka nyithindi.”" 
Genesis48:12 Eka Josef nogolo nyithindogo e chong Israel, kendo nogoyo chonge piny, mokulore nyaka e lowo." 
Genesis48:13 Josef nomako lwet nyithindo ariyogo. Noketo Efraim e bade korachwich, mondo odhi obed e bad Israel koracham; to Manase noketo e bade ma koracham mondo odhi obed e bad Israel korachwich. Eka noterogi ir Israel." 
Genesis48:14 To Israel norieyo bade ma korachwich, moketo e wi Efraim wuowi matin, kendo bade ma koracham noketo e wi Manase wuowi maduong’." 
Genesis48:15 Eka noguedhogi kowacho niya, “A Nyasaye, yie iguedh nyithindigi. In e Nyasaye mane Ibrahim kwara gi Isaka wuora jolamo, kendo in e Nyasaye mosetelona nyaka koroni." 
Genesis48:16 Malaika ma oseresa e masiche duto, mondo oguedhgi. Noluonggi gi nyinga kod nying Ibrahim kwara gi nying Isaka wuora. Onego gimedre kendo gibed oganda maduong’ e piny.”" 
Genesis48:17 Ka ne Josef oneno ni wuon mare oketo lwete ma korachwich e wi Efraim, nokecho. Omiyo nogolo lwet wuon mare e wi Efraim, moketo e wi Manase" 
Genesis48:18 kowacho ni wuon niya, “Mano ok ber wuora, nimar jali ema duong’. Kuom mano, en ema onego iket lweti ma korachwich e wiye.”" 
Genesis48:19 To wuon mare nodagi, kowacho niya, “Ang’eyo mano nyathina. Manase bende biro bedo oganda maduong’, to owadgi maluwe ema nobed maduong’ moloye, kendo nyikwaye nodok ogendini mang’eny.”" 
Genesis48:20 Israel noguedho nyithindogo chieng’no, kawacho niya, “Ka jo-Israel dwaro gwedho ng’ato to ginikonyre gi nyingu ka giwacho kama: ‘Nyasaye mondo oguedhi kaka oseguedho Efraim gi Manase.’ ” Kamano Israel nomiyo Efraim obedo maduong’ ni Manase." 
Genesis48:21 Eka Israel nowacho ni Josef niya, “Ne! An to koro atho, to Nyasaye nobed kodu, kendo nodwoku e piny kwereu." 
Genesis48:22 In ema amiyi lowo ma Shekem, mane amiyo jo-Amor e lweny. Kamano inibed gi puodho achiel moloyo oweteni.”" 
Genesis49:1 Jakobo noluongo yawuote mowachonigi niya, “Biuru machiegni, mondo anyisu gik mabirom timorenu e ndalo mabiro," 
Genesis49:2 “Un yawuot Jakobo, chokreuru buta, mondo uwinji; winjuru Israel wuonu." 
Genesis49:3 “Reuben, wuoda makayo, in e tekona, kendo kacha manyiso wuowina. In jasunga, kendo iratego moloyo yawuota duto." 
Genesis49:4 Ijamwomri ka pi ohula, to ok nibed gi duong’, nikech isetimo richo gi chi wuoru. Adier, isenindo e kitandana midwanyo." 
Genesis49:5 “Simeon gi Lawi gin owete. Gisetimo timbe mahundu gi gigi mag lweny. 
Genesis49:6 Ok nariwra e buchegi maling’ling’ kendo ok nadonj e chokruokgi, nikech ka gikecho, to ginego ji kendo ging’ado odond ruedhi kayiem nono." 
Genesis49:7 Okuong’ mirimbgi, nimar en mirima mager kendo makwiny! Anakegi e piny Jakobo duto, e kind jo-Israel." 
Genesis49:8 “Juda, in ema oweteni biro paki. Inimak wasikgi gi ng’utgi, kendo oweteni nokulreni." 
Genesis49:9 Juda, in nyathi sibuor. Inego le, eka idok kari midakie. Juda, ichalo sibuor moriere kendo onindo piny, maonge ng’ama hedhore chiewo." 
Genesis49:10 Juda nomak ludh loch, kochunge e kind tiendene, kobedo ruoth nyaka wuon loch ma biro rito ogendini duto, chopi." 
Genesis49:11 En jamoko, omiyo otweyo kanje e kor mzabibu, mana e kor mzabibu mochiek makwar! Olwoko lepe gi divai makwar." 
Genesis49:12 Wang’e onuria ka divai makwar, kendo lake tar ka chak." 
Genesis49:13 “Zebulun nodag e dho nam, kama yiedhi gowoe, kendo mbape nogik Sidon." 
Genesis49:14 “Isakar en kanyna maratego, monindo e kind misikene." 
Genesis49:15 Noneno ni bedo gi dala en gima ber, kendo oneno bende kaka pinyno ber, omiyo noyie ting’o misigo, modoko misumba matiyo tich matek." 
Genesis49:16 “Dan nobed jatend joge. Kamano nochal gi dhout Israel mamoko. 
Genesis49:17 Dan nobed ka thuol man e dier yo, thuol man gi kwiri mager, ma kayo ombong’ faras, mi ng’at moidhe podho gi ka ng’eye." 
Genesis49:18 “A Ruoth Nyasaye, arito warruok moa kuomi!" 
Genesis49:19 “Gad, to jomecho nomonji, to noriembgi, kolawogi matek." 
Genesis49:20 “Asher nobed kachamo chiemo mamit pile. Pinye nonyag gik mabeyo moromo ruoth chamo. 
Genesis49:21 “Naftali to en mwanda mae thim, manywolo nyithindo mabeyo." 
Genesis49:22 “Josef en yath mopidh e bath thidhiya, manyago olemo mogundho kendo ma bedene lawore e kor ohinga." 
Genesis49:23 Jodwar nolawo Josef matek, ka gibaye gi asere," 
Genesis49:24 to Jateko ma Nyasach Jakobo noturo atungegi, kendo jakwath ma Lwanda mar Israel, nochodo leche mag ogich bedegi." 
Genesis49:25 Nyasach wuoruno, ma Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto, mondo okonyi, kendo oguedhi gi koth moa malo, kendo gi nyithindo, kod chak ma gidhodho," 
Genesis49:26 gi cham kod maua. Gueth mag gode machon, gi gik mabeyo duto mag gode mosiko duto, mondo obi ni Josef, jal mane opog gi owetene." 
Genesis49:27 “Benjamin en ondiek ma kech kayo. Gima osenego, ochamo gokinyi. Godhiambo, to pod ong’ingo gima osemako.”" 
Genesis49:28 Mago e dhoudi apar gariyo mag jio-Israel, kendo ka ne Jakobo wuon-gi oguedhogi, nomiyo moro ka moro gueth moromo kode." 
Genesis49:29 Eka Jakobo nochiko yawuote niya, “Kaka koro achiegni tho kaluwo kwerena, yikauru but kwerena e rogo man e puoth Efron ja-Hiti" 
Genesis49:30 man Makpela, yo wuok chieng’ mar Mamre e piny Kanaan. Rogono Ibrahim ema nong’iewo kaachiel gi puodhono ir Efron ja-Hiti, mondo obed kar yiko joge." 
Genesis49:31 Kanyo ema noyikie Ibrahim gi Sara chiege, kod Isaka gi Rebeka chiege, kendo kanyo ema nayikoe Lea." 
Genesis49:32 Puodho kod rogo man e iye nong’iew kuom jo-Hiti.” 
Genesis49:33 Kane Jakobo osetieko chiko nyithinde kamano, nodwoko tiende e kitanda mi chunye nochot koluwo kwerene." 
Genesis50:1 Josef norudhore kuom wuon, koywak kendo konyodhe." 
Genesis50:2 Eka nochiko jotichne ma jothieth mondo owir ringre wuon mare gi yath, kik tow. Mi ne gitimo kamano," 
Genesis50:3 kuom ndalo piero ang’wen kaka kit wiro ringre ng’ama otho nobet. Jo-Misri noywago Israel kuom ndalo piero abiriyo. 
Genesis50:4 Kane kinde mar ywago wuon mare oserumo, Josef nowacho ni jodong Farao niya, “Kunyalo yie koda, to nyisnauru Farao kama:" 
Genesis50:5 ‘Kane wuora chiegni tho, nomiyo asingorane ni abiro yike e bur mane osekunyo e piny Kanaan. Kuom mano yie adhi ayike, eka abiro duogo.’ ”" 
Genesis50:6 Farao nodwokone wach niya, “Dhiyo, iyik wuoru kaka nomiyo isingorine.”" 
Genesis50:7 Kamano Josef nodhi yiko wuon mare. Jodong Farao duto gi jodong ode, kod jodong Misri duto nodhi kode," 
Genesis50:8 kaachiel gi joode gi owetene kod jood wuon mare. Mak mana nyithindgi matindo kende gi jambgi ema ne giweyo e piny Goshen. 
Genesis50:9 Bende nodhi gi geche kod joidh farese. Ne en oganda maduong’ ahinya. 
Genesis50:10 Kane gichopo kar dino cham man Atad yo wuok chieng’ mar Jordan, ne giywago wuon-gi malich ahinya kuom ndalo abiriyo." 
Genesis50:11 Kane jo-Kanaan modak kuno oneno kaka jogo ywak malich Atad, ne giwacho niya, “Jo-Misri ywak malich manade!” Mano emomiyo nochak kanyo ni Abel-mizraim, (tiende ni ywak jo-Misri.) Kanyono ni yo wuok chieng’ mar Jordan." 
Genesis50:12 Kamano yawuot Jakobo notimo gima wuon-gi nochikogi. 
Genesis50:13 Ne giting’o ringre nyaka Kanaan mi giyike e rogo manie puodho man Makpela, yo wuok chieng’ mar Mamre, mane Ibrahim ong’iewo kuom Efron ja-Hiti mondo obedne kar yiko joge." 
Genesis50:14 Kane Josef oseyiko wuon, nodok Misri gi owetene kod ji duto ma nodhi kode e liel." 
Genesis50:15 Kane owete Josef oneno ni wuon-gi osetho, ne giwacho niya, “Dipo ka Josef pod nigi sadha kodwa, manyalo miyo ochulnwa kuor kuom gima rach mane watimone.”" 
Genesis50:16 Omiyo ne gioro ni Josef wach niya, “Kane pok wuoru otho, nowachonwa ni mondo wanyisi kama:" 
Genesis50:17 ‘Asayi, we ni oweteni richogi, kaachiel gi gima mono mane gitimoni’ Kuom mano yie iwenwa kuom tim marach mane watimo, nikech wan jotich Nyasaye wuoru.” To kane Josef owinjo wechego, pi wang’e noton." 
Genesis50:18 Bang’e owetene nobiro ire giwegi, mi gigoyo chonggi piny e nyime, ka gikulore nyaka e lowo. Ne giwachone niya, “Eriwa e, wan wasumbi.”" 
Genesis50:19 Josef to nowachonigi niya, “Kik uluor, an ok anyal kawo kar Nyasaye." 
Genesis50:20 Ne undhoga mondo utimna gima rach, to Nyasaye noloke gima ber, mondo ores ji mang’eny, ma koro ngima mana nikech wachno." 
Genesis50:21 Omiyo kik uluor. Abiro ritou uduto kod jouteu.” Kamano e kaka nokueyo chunygi gi weche mamit. 
Genesis50:22 Josef nomedo dak Misri gi joodgi. Nodak kuom higni mia achiel gapar," 
Genesis50:23 moneno nyithi Efraim gi nyikwaye. Noneno bende nyithind Makir wuod Manase, mi nokwanogi ka nyithinde." 
Genesis50:24 Achien Josef nowacho ni owetene niya, “An koro achiegni tho, to Nyasaye biro ritou, kendo golou e pinyni, moteru e piny mane osingore ni nomi Ibrahim gi Isaka kod Jakobo.”" 
Genesis50:25 Bang’ mano nomiyo yawuot Israel okuong’ore kowachonigi niya, “Kuong’reuru ni ndalo ma Nyasaye nokonyue, mi ua ka, to nyaka ukaw chokena udhigo.”" 
Genesis50:26 Josef notho ka en ja-higni mia achiel gapar. Ne giwiro ringre gi yath mondo kik otow, mi gikete e sanduk e piny Misri kuno." 
Exodus1:1 Jo-Israel ma nodhi Misri gi Jakobo, moro ka moro gi joode, e magi:" 
Exodus1:2 Reuben gi Simeon gi Lawi gi Juda 
Exodus1:3 gi Isakar gi Zebulun gi Benjamin 
Exodus1:4 gi Dan gi Naftali gi Gad kod Asher. 
Exodus1:5 Kar romb joka Jakobogo duto noromo piero abiriyo. (Josef to noyudo ka ni Misri.) 
Exodus1:6 Bang’e achien, Josef gi owetene kod tieng’no duto notho." 
Exodus1:7 To jo-Israel nonywolo nyithindo mang’eny, mi ginya ahinya, kendo ne gipong’o piny, nyaka ne gibedo oganda maratego." 
Exodus1:8 Koro ruoth manyien mane ok ong’eyo wach Josef nochako tich e Misri. 
Exodus1:9 Nowacho ni joge niya, “Neuru! Jo-Israel osedoko oganda maduong’ kendo maratego, ma koro nyalo loyowa." 
Exodus1:10 Nyaka watang’, mondo watamgi kik ginya, nimar kapo ni lweny owuok, to kamoro ginyalo dok ni wasikwa, mondo giked kodwa, mi giring gia e pinywa.”" 
Exodus1:11 Kuom mano, jo-Misri noketo jo-Israel e tij athwon, ka nyipeche ritogi mondo giti matek, eka gibed moboch. Mano e kaka ne gigero ni Farao miech keno miluongo ni Pithom gi Rameses." 
Exodus1:12 To kaka nomed sandogi e kaka ne gimedo bedo mang’eny kendo gilandore, nyaka jo-Misri nodoko mosin kodgi, kendo oluorogi." 
Exodus1:13 Kuom mano ne gibembo wasumbgi ma jo-Israel gi tich mapek," 
Exodus1:14 ka gimiyo ngimagi doko matek gi tije achune mag nyono lowo, gi loso matafari, kod tije duto mag pur." 
Exodus1:15 Bang’e ruodh Misri nowacho ni mond Hibrania ariyo ma jocholo, miluongo ni Shifra gi Pua, niya," 
Exodus1:16 “Ka ucholo mond jo-Hibrania, mi uneno ka dhako moro onywolo nyathi ma wuowi, to neguru nyathino. To ka en nyathi ma nyako, to kik unege.”" 
Exodus1:17 To jocholo noluoro Nyasaye, omiyo ne gichayo chik ruoth, mi ne ok ginego nyithindo machwo." 
Exodus1:18 Ruodh Misri noluongo jochologo, mopenjogi gimomiyo giweyo nyithindo machwo, mak ginego." 
Exodus1:19 Ne gidwoke niya, “Mond jo-Hibrania ok chal gi mond jo-Misri. Gin muchgi thoth, omiyo ginywolo nyithindo piyopiyo, kapok jacholo ochopo irgi.”" 
Exodus1:20 Kuom mano Nyasaye noguedho jochologo, kendo jo-Israel nomedo nya, modoko oganda maratego ahinya." 
Exodus1:21 Nyasaye nomiyo jocholo obedo gi nyithindo kod nyikwayo nikech ne giluore. 
Exodus1:22 Bang’e Farao nochiko joge duto niya, “Nyithindo ma chwo duto ma jo-Hibrania onywolo, mondo uwit e aora Nael, to nyiri uwe odongi.”" 
Exodus2:1 Jalawi moro nokendo nyar dhoodgi," 
Exodus2:2 mi chiegeno nomako ich, monywolo nyathi ma wuowi. Ka noneno ni en nyathi ma jaber, nopande kuom dueche adek." 
Exodus2:3 To kane koro ok onyal medo pande, nokawo adita mochwe gi togo, mi omwono gi lop chwech kod odok, mondo kik chwer. Nopielo nyathi ei aditano, eka nokete ei togo e bath aora Nael." 
Exodus2:4 To nyamin nyathino nochung’ gi chien matin mondo one ane gima nyalo timorene. 
Exodus2:5 Eka nyar Farao nobiro mondo olwokre kanyo, ka jotichne manyiri to wuotho e geng aora. Nopo koneno adita ka ni ei togo, mooro misumbane manyako moro mondo odhi oome." 
Exodus2:6 Kane osekelnego, noele, moyudo nyathi ma wuowi e iye ka ywak. Nokeche, mowacho niya, “Nyaka bed ni en achiel kuom nyithind jo-Hibrania.”" 
Exodus2:7 Kane nyamin nyathi owinjo kamano, nopenje niya, “Adhi aluongni chi ja-Hibrania moro mondo odhodhni nyathino?”" 
Exodus2:8 Nyar Farao nodwoke ni, “Tim kamano.” Mi nyano nodhi moluongo mana min nyathino." 
Exodus2:9 Kane dhakono obiro, nyar Farao nowachone niya, “Kaw nyathini, ipidhna, kendo abiro chuli kuom timo kamano.” Mi dhakono nokawe, mopidhe." 
Exodus2:10 Kane oseweyo dhoth, notere ir nyar Farao, ma koro nokawe ka mare. Nowacho niya, “Ne agole e pi.” Emomiyo nochake ni Musa (tiende ni mogol.)" 
Exodus2:11 Chieng’ moro kane Musa osedoko ng’at maduong’, nodhi mondo one jo-Israel wetene, moneno kaka ichunogi gi tich matek. To bende noneno ka ja-Misri moro goyo achiel kuom jo-Hibrania wetene." 
Exodus2:12 Nong’iyo koni gi koni, to kane ok oneno ng’ato, nonego ja-Misrino, mopando ringre ei kuoyo." 
Exodus2:13 Kinyne nodok, moneno jo-Hibrania ariyo kagore. Nokwero jal mane okwinyo wadgi niya, “Mar ang’o igoyo wadu?”" 
Exodus2:14 Jalo nodwoke ni, “Ng’ano moketi jatendwa kata jang’adnwa bura? Koso idwaro nega kaka ninego ja-Misri cha?” Kane Musa owinjo kamano, kibaji nogoye, koparo ni, “Adier, kara nyaka bed ni wachni oseng’ere!”" 
Exodus2:15 Farao nowinjo gima notimore, motemo mondo oneg Musa, to Musa noringo mondo odhi odag e piny Midian. Kane ochopo e pinyno, nobet e dho soko moro." 
Exodus2:16 Noyudo ka jadolo mar Midian nigi nyiri abiriyo. Nyigo nobiro umbo pi, mi giolo e mberni ma jamni modhoe, mondo jamb wuon-gi omodhi." 
Exodus2:17 Jokwath moko nobiro mondo oriembgi, to Musa nokonyogi, kendo omodhonigi jambgi." 
Exodus2:18 Kane nyigo odok ir Reuel wuon-gi, nopenjogi niya, “Ang’o momiyo uduogo chon kawuono?”" 
Exodus2:19 Ne gidwoke ni, “Ja-Misri moro noresowa ka jokwath moko thagowa, bende en ema nende omiyo jambwa pi.”" 
Exodus2:20 Reuel nopenjo nyige ni, “En kanye? Mar ang’o uweye kuno? Dhiuru uluonge obi ochiem kodwa.”" 
Exodus2:21 Musa noneno ni ber mondo odag gi ng’atno, mi Reuel nomiye nyare ma Zipora, mokendo." 
Exodus2:22 Zipora nonywolo ni Musa wuowi, mi Musa nochako ni Gershom, (tiende ni jadak ka). Nochake kamano nikech noneno ni osedoko jadak e piny ma ok margi." 
Exodus2:23 Bang’e achien, ruodh Misri notho, to jo-Israel ne pod ng’ur malich kuom bedo wasumbini, kendo ne giywak malit mondo ogolgi e thagruok ma kamano. Ywakgino notundo ni Nyasaye" 
Exodus2:24 kendo nowinjo ng’urgi, mi noparo singruok mane otimo gi Ibrahim gi Isaka kod Jakobo." 
Exodus2:25 Noneno kaka jo-Israel thagore, mi wachno nodonjone malit!" 
Exodus3:1 Chieng’ moro Musa ne kwayo jamb Jethro jaduong’ne, ma jadolo mar Midian. Nong’ado thim gi jamni nyaka Horeb god Nyasaye." 
Exodus3:2 Malaika mar Nyasaye nofwenyorene kanyo e ligek mach maliel e chuny bungu moro. Musa norange, moneno ni bungu liel aliela to ok wang’," 
Exodus3:3 mi nowacho niya, “Nyaka adhi machiegni mondo ane ane hono maduong’ni. Ang’o momiyo bungu liel aliela to ok wang’?”" 
Exodus3:4 To kane Ruoth Nyasaye oneno kosudo machiegni, noluonge gie chuny bungu niya, “Musa! Musa!” Musa to nodwoke ni, “An ka.”" 
Exodus3:5 Nyasaye nowachone niya, “Kik imed sudo machiegni, to lony wuocheni, nikech kama ichung’ieno en kama ler.”" 
Exodus3:6 Eka nomedo wacho niya, “An Nyasach kwereni ma Nyasach Ibrahim gi Nyasach Isaka kod Nyasach Jakobo.” Mi Musa noumo wang’e, nikech noluoro ng’iyo wang’ Nyasaye." 
Exodus3:7 Bang’e, Nyasaye nowachone niya, “Aseneno ratiro kaka joga thagore e piny Misri. Asewinjo ywakgi, ka gikwayo ni mondo oresgi gia e lwet joma chunogi gi tich matekno. Adier ang’eyo chandruokgi." 
Exodus3:8 Omiyo aselor mondo aresgi e lwet jo-Misri, kendo agolgi e pinyno mondo atergi e piny maber kendo malach. En piny momew, kendo machiek, ma koro jo-Kanaan gi jo-Hiti gi jo-Amor gi jo-Perizi gi jo-Hivi kod jo-Jebus ema odakie." 
Exodus3:9 Asewinjo ywak jo-Israel, kendo aneno kaka jo-Misri thirogi malit." 
Exodus3:10 Omiyo koro abiro ori ir Farao mondo igol joga ma jo-Israel oa e piny Misri.” 
Exodus3:11 Musa to nowacho ni Nyasaye niya, “An to an ng’a, ma dadhi ir Farao kendo agol jo-Israel e piny Misri?”" 
Exodus3:12 Nyasaye nodwoke niya, “Anabed kodi, kendo kisegolo ji Misri, to unulama e godni. Mano nobed ranyisi ni an ema aseori.”" 
Exodus3:13 Musa nowacho ni Nyasaye niya, “To ka adhi ir jo-Israel, mawachonigi ni Nyasach kweregi oseora, gibiro penja ni, ‘Nyinge ng’a?’ An to nadwokgi ang’o?”" 
Exodus3:14 Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa niya, “AN MANTIE e nyinga.” Eka nomedo wacho niya, “Ma e gima mondo iwach ni jo-Israel: ‘AN MANTIE oseora iru.’ ”" 
Exodus3:15 Nyasaye nochako owacho ni Musa niya, “Nyaka iwach ni jo-Israel kama: ‘Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach kwereu, ma Nyasach Ibrahim, gi Isaka kod Jakobo, oseora iru.’ Ma e nyinga ma nyaka chieng’, kendo ma tienge mabiro duto noluongago." 
Exodus3:16 Dhiyo mondo ichok jodong Israel kanyakla, kendo mondo iwachnigi ni Nyasach kweregi, ma Nyasach Ibrahim gi Isaka kod Jakobo osefwenyoreni, mochiki mondo iwachnigi niya, ‘Asebiro iru, kendo aseneno gima jo-Misri timonu." 
Exodus3:17 Koro aseng’ado wach ni nyaka agolu e piny Misri kuma isandoue, mi ateru e piny ma jo-Kanaan gi jo-Hiti gi jo-Amor gi jo-Perizi gi jo-Hivi kod jo-Jebuz odakie. En piny momew kendo machiek.’" 
Exodus3:18 Kamano jo-Israel biro winjo gima iwacho. Bang’e nyaka udhi gi jodong Israel ir ruodh Misri, kendo uwachne niya, ‘Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach jo-Hibrania, oseromo kodwa. Omiyo koro yie iwe wadhi e thim kuom wuodh ndalo adek, mondo watim misango ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachwa.’" 
Exodus3:19 Chutho to, ang’eyo ni ruodh Misri ok nowe udhi, mak mana kochune." 
Exodus3:20 To abiro tiyo gi tekona, mi nasand Misri gi honni duto ma natim kuno. Eka bang’e noyienu mondo udhi." 
Exodus3:21 “Anami jo-Misri geno jogi, mi ka uwuok to ok unudhi gi lwetu nono." 
Exodus3:22 Dhako ka dhako nodwar gik moko mag fedha kod dhahabu, kaachiel gi lewni kuom jagweng’gi, kendo kuom dhako moro amora modak kode e ode. Unurwak nyithindu gi gigo, kendo mano e kaka unuyak jo-Misri.”" 
Exodus4:1 Musa nodwoko Ruoth Nyasaye niya, “Ok gibi yie, kata winjo gima awacho, to gibiro mana wachona ni, ‘Ruoth Nyasaye ne ok ofwenyoreni.’ To koro abiro timo ang’o?”" 
Exodus4:2 Ruoth Nyasaye nopenje niya, “Mano ang’o miting’o e lwetino?” Nodwoke ni, “En luth.”" 
Exodus4:3 Eka Ruoth Nyasaye nowachone niya, “Bole piny.” To kane Musa obole piny, nolokore thuol, mi Musa oringe." 
Exodus4:4 Bang’e Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa niya, “Make gi iwe!” Musa nomake matek, mi olokore luth e lwete." 
Exodus4:5 Ruoth Nyasaye nowachone niya, “Tim kamano mondo onyis jo-Israel ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach kweregi, ma Nyasach Ibrahim gi Isaka kod Jakobo osefwenyoreni.”" 
Exodus4:6 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa kendo niya, “So lweti e lawi.” Notimo kamano, to kane ogolo lweteno oko, nonwang’o kotimo dhoho, kendo olokore rachar ka pe." 
Exodus4:7 Eka Ruoth Nyasaye nowachone ni, “So lweti e lawi kendo.” Mi notimo kamano, to kane ochako ogole oko nonwang’o kochango modoko mangima mana kaka dende duto." 
Exodus4:8 Ruoth Nyasaye nowachone niya, “Ka gitamore yie gi wecheni, kata ka ranyisi mokwongo ok omiyo giyie, to ranyisi mar ariyoni nomigi giyie." 
Exodus4:9 To kapo ni ok giyie gi ranyisi ariyogi, kata winjo gima iwacho, to mondo itwom pi e aora Nael, ipuk piny. Kitimo kamano, to pigno nolokre remo.”" 
Exodus4:10 Musa nowacho ni Ruoth Nyasaye niya, “Ruoth kiyie; ok an ng’at mong’eyo wuoyo e nyim ji, kata mana sani, ma koro isewuoyo kodani, pod an mana kamano. Lewa pek, kendo aywayo wach.”" 
Exodus4:11 Ruoth Nyasaye nowachone niya, “En ng’a ma chueyo dho dhano, kata en ng’a ma miyo dhano doko momo, kata ma ite odino? En ng’a mamiye wang’ mabith, kata loke muofu? Donge an Ruoth Nyasaye ema atimo gigi duto?" 
Exodus4:12 Emomiyo koro dhiyo! Anakonyi wuoyo, kendo ananyisi gima onego iwachi.”" 
Exodus4:13 To Musa ne pod odagi, ka kwero Ruoth Nyasaye niya, “Ruoth, kiyie to or ng’at moro nono mihero.”" 
Exodus4:14 Ruoth Nyasaye nokecho gi Musa, mowachone niya, “Harun owadu ma ja-Lawi donge nitie? En to ang’eyo ni onyalo wuoyo maber. Ero en e yo, obiro iri, kendo obiro bedo mamor ahinya koneni." 
Exodus4:15 En ema iwuo kode, kinyise gima onego owachi. Abiro konyou wuoyo, kendo nyisou gima onego utim." 
Exodus4:16 Harun biro wuoyo gi ji kari, nimar en ema nobedni ka dhogi, to in ema nibedne ka Nyasaye, kinyise gima onego owachi." 
Exodus4:17 Kaw ludhini, nikech en ema ibiro timo kode honni.”" 
Exodus4:18 Musa nodhi ir Jethro jaduong’ne mowachone niya, “Yie mondo adog Misri ir jowetena, mondo ane ka pod gingima.” Jethro nowachone niya, “Ber, dhi gi kue.”" 
Exodus4:19 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa e piny Midian niya, “Koro dog Misri, nikech jogo duto ma nyocha dwaro negi osetho.”" 
Exodus4:20 Mi Musa nokawo chiege gi nyithinde, kendo noketogi e kanyna, modok Misri, koting’o luth mane Nyasaye omiye." 
Exodus4:21 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa niya, “Koro ero idok Misri, to nyaka ine ni itimo honni ma asemiyi teko ni mondo itim, e nyim Farao. To abiro miyo chunye doko matek, mi ok nowe jo-Israel thuolo mondo oa." 
Exodus4:22 To nyaka inyise ni Ruoth Nyasaye owacho kama: ‘Israel en wuoda makayo. 
Exodus4:23 Nawachoni ni mondo iwe wuoda odhi olama, to nidagi, omiyo koro abiro nego wuodi makayo.’ ”" 
Exodus4:24 Ka ne Musa pod ni e yo, Ruoth Nyasaye nodhi ire kama nobworoe, mondo onege." 
Exodus4:25 To Zipora nokawo kidi mabith, mong’adogo wuode nyangu eka nomulo Musa gi pien ma nong’adono, kowachone niya, “In chwora mar remo.”" 
Exodus4:26 Eka Ruoth Nyasaye noweyo Musa. Ter nyanguno ema nomiyo Zipora owacho ni, “In chwora mar remo.”" 
Exodus4:27 E ndalogo Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Harun niya, “Dhiyo e thim mondo irom ni Musa.” Nodhi moromo kode e god Nyasaye, kendo nonyodhe." 
Exodus4:28 Musa nonyiso Harun weche duto mane Ruoth Nyasaye omiye mondo odhi owachi, kod honni mane onego odhi otim." 
Exodus4:29 Eka Musa kod Harun ne jodhi, mochoko jodong Israel kanyakla." 
Exodus4:30 Harun nonyisogi weche duto mane Ruoth Nyasaye owacho ni Musa, kendo notimo honnigo duto e nyimgi," 
Exodus4:31 mi ne giyie ni kara Ruoth Nyasaye oseoro Musa adier. Bende kane giwinjo ni Ruoth Nyasaye oselimo jo-Israel, moneno chandruokgi, ne gikulore, mi gilame." 
Exodus5:1 Bang’e, Musa kod Harun nodhi ir Farao, mowachone niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach jo-Israel owacho kama: ‘We joga odhi, mondo otimna sawo e thim.’ ”" 
Exodus5:2 To Farao nodwokogi niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye to en ng’a, ma dawinj wachne, mi awe jo-Israel dhi? Akia Ruoth Nyasaye, bende ok nawe jo-Israel odhi!”" 
Exodus5:3 Ne giwachone niya, “Nyasach jo-Hibrania oseromo kodwa. Omiyo, yie iwe wadhi e wuodh ndalo adek e thim, mondo watim misango ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachwa, nono to obiro kelonwa tho, kata lweny ma ditiekwa.”" 
Exodus5:4 Farao, ruodh Misri nodwoko Musa gi Harun niya, “Marang’o umono ji tiyo tijegi? Doguru e tiju wasumbnigi!”" 
Exodus5:5 Eka nomedo wacho niya, “Jou koro ng’eny moloyo jo-Misri to eka pod udwaro mana ni mondo giwe tich!”" 
Exodus5:6 Odiechieng’no, Farao nochiko jo-Misri ma jorit wasumbni kod jo-Israel ma nyipeche niya," 
Exodus5:7 “Kik uchak umi jo-Israel tiang’ ma gilosogo matafari, kaka usebedo ka utimo, to weuru gidhi giom tiang’ giwegi." 
Exodus5:8 To nyaka une ni giloso matafari ma kwan-gi romre gi mago ma gisebedo ka giloso. Kik uwe kwanno dog chien! Gin jonyawo, emomiyo gigoyo koko ni mondo gidhi gitim misango ni Nyasachgi." 
Exodus5:9 Mednigiuru tich matek, mondo gibed modich, kendo giwe chiko itgi e weche manono.”" 
Exodus5:10 Jorit nowuok kaachiei gi nyipeche, mowacho ni jo-Israel niya, “Farao osewacho ni ok obi medo miyou tiang’." 
Exodus5:11 To ni nyaka udhi udwar tiang’ uwegi kamoro amora moyudoree. To bende nyaka ulos matafari ma kwan-gi romre gi mago muloso pile.” 
Exodus5:12 Omiyo ji noke e piny Misri duto, ka dwaro tiang’." 
Exodus5:13 Jorit ne rungogi ka wacho niya, “Odiechieng’ kodiechieng’ nyaka utiek tich momiu, mana kaka nutimo e ndalo mane imiyoue tiang’.”" 
Exodus5:14 Jodong Farao nogoyo jo-Israel mane giketo nyipeche, ka gipenjogi niya, “Ang’o momiyo kawuono ok ulos matafari marom gi mago ma yande uloso?”" 
Exodus5:15 Nyipeche ma jo-Israel notero ywakgi ni Farao ka giwachonigi niya, “Ruoth, ere gimomiyo itimonwa kama?" 
Exodus5:16 Tiang’ koro ok miwa, to eka pod ichunowa ni mondo walos matafari, goch bende igoyowa, to jogi iwuon ema ketho.”" 
Exodus5:17 To Farao nodwokogi niya, “Un jonyawo ahinya! Mano emomiyo ukwaya ni mondo aweu udhi utim misango ni Nyasachu." 
Exodus5:18 Koro doguru e tiju! Ok bi miu tiang’ to nyaka ulos mana kar kwan matafari moketnu!” 
Exodus5:19 Kane nyipeche jo-Israel owinjo ni nyaka gilos matafari ma kwan-gi romre mana gi mago ma gisebedo ka giloso, ne gineno ni kara gin e chandruok." 
Exodus5:20 Ne gia ir Farao mi giromo gi Musa kod Harun ma noyudo ritogi," 
Exodus5:21 mi giwachonigi niya, “Nyasaye mondo one gima usetimo, kendo okumu kuom miyo Farao gi jodonge bedo mamon kodwa. Useketo ligangla e lwetgi mondo ginegwago!”" 
Exodus5:22 Musa nodok ir Ruoth Nyasaye, mowacho niya, “A Ruoth Nyasaye, ang’o momiyo isando jogi? Koro niora nang’o?" 
Exodus5:23 Chakre kinde ma nabiroe ir Farao ma awuoyo e nyingi, ose mana bedo kosando jogi, to in pok itimoe gimoro mondo iresgi.”" 
Exodus6:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa niya, “Koro ibiro neno gima abiro timo ni Farao. Abiro chune mondo owe jo-Israel odhi. Adier abiro chune ni nyaka oriembgi e pinye.”" 
Exodus6:2 Nyasaye nowuoyo gi Musa, mowachone niya, “An e Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Exodus6:3 Nafwenyora ni Ibrahim gi Isaka kod Jakobo ka Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto, to ne ok aweyo ging’eya gi nyinga mar Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Exodus6:4 Bende natimo kodgi singruok, kawachonigi ni namigi piny Kanaan, mane ginie jodak." 
Exodus6:5 Koro asewinjo ywak jo-Israel ma jo-Misri oseloko wasumbni, mi aseparo singruok mane atimono." 
Exodus6:6 Omiyo koro nyaka iwachni jo-Israel kama: ‘An e Ruoth Nyasaye, abiro golou e tije mapek ma jo-Misri oketo kuomu, kendo abiro resou e tij bedo wasumbni maggi. Narie bada mang’ongo kuomgi, kakumogi malit mondo owaru." 
Exodus6:7 Anakawu ka joga awuon, kendo anabed Nyasachu, mi unung’e ni an e Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu ma golou e tij jo-Misri mapek michunou mondo uti." 
Exodus6:8 Anateru e piny mane asingora ni nami Ibrahim gi Isaka kod Jakobo, kendo anamiugo mondo obed maru, an e Ruoth Nyasaye.’ ”" 
Exodus6:9 Musa noluwo ni jo-Israel wechegi, to ne ok gidewe, nimar chunygi nool nikech tich matek mar bedo wasumbni." 
Exodus6:10 Eka Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa niya," 
Exodus6:11 “Dhi inyis Farao ruodh Misri ni nyaka owe jo-Israel oa e pinye.” 
Exodus6:12 To Musa nodwoko Ruoth Nyasaye ni, “Ka jo-Israel ema ok nyal winja, Farao to diwinja nadi, an ng’at maywayo wachni?”" 
Exodus6:13 To Ruoth Nyasaye nochiko Musa gi Harun ni gidhi ginyis jo-Israel kaachiel gi Farao ruodh Misri ni Ruoth Nyasaye osemiyogi tich mar golo jo-Israel e piny Misri. 
Exodus6:14 Jodong dhoud Israel e magi: Yawuot Reuben ma kach Israel ne gin Hanok gi Palu gi Hezron kod Karmi. Mago e jo-Reuben. 
Exodus6:15 Yawuot Simeon ne gin Jemuel gi Jamin gi Ohad gi Jakin gi Zohar kod Shaul wuod dhako ma nyar Kanaan. Mago e jo-Simeon. 
Exodus6:16 To magi e nying yawuot Lawi kaachiel gi nyikwagi: Gershon gi Kohath kod Merari. Lawi nodak higni mia achiel gi piero adek gabiriyo. 
Exodus6:17 Joka Gershon ne gin dhout Libni gi Shimei. 
Exodus6:18 Yawuot Kohath ne gin Amram gi Izhar gi Hebron kod Uziel. Kohath nodak higni mia achiel gi piero adek gadek. 
Exodus6:19 Yawuot Merari ne gin Mali kod Mushi. Mago e dhout jo-Lawi gi nyikwagi. 
Exodus6:20 Amram nokendo Jokebed nyamin wuon mare, ma nonywolone Harun gi Musa. Amram nodak higni mia achiel gi piero adek gabiriyo." 
Exodus6:21 Yawuot Izhar ne gin Kora gi Nefeg kod Zikri. 
Exodus6:22 To yawuot Uziel ne gin Mishael gi Elzafan kod Sithri. 
Exodus6:23 Harun nokendo Elisheba nyar Aminadab ma nyamin Nashon, monywologo Nadab gi Abihu gi Eliezar kod Ithamar." 
Exodus6:24 Yawuot Kora ne gi Asir gi Elkana kod Abiasaf. Mago e dhout joka Kora. 
Exodus6:25 Eliezar wuod Harun nokendo achiel kuom nyi Putiel, ma nonywolone Finehas. Mago e jodong dhout jo-Lawi." 
Exodus6:26 Ma e Harun nogo, kaachiel gi Musa, mane Ruoth Nysaye owachonigi niya, “Goluru jo-Israel e piny Misri kochan-gi e dhoutgi.”" 
Exodus6:27 Musa gi Harun gogo ema nowacho ni Farao ruodh Misri ni mondo owe jo-Israel oa Misri. 
Exodus6:28 Kane Ruoth Nyasaye owuoyo gi Musa e piny Misri," 
Exodus6:29 nowachone niya, “An e Ruoth Nyasaye. Nyis Farao ruodh Misri weche duto ma abiro wachoni.”" 
Exodus6:30 To Musa nodwoko Ruoth Nyasaye niya, “Ing’eyo ni an ng’at maywayo wach, to ere kaka Farao diwinj wachna?”" 
Exodus7:1 To Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa niya, “Koro ng’e ni aseketi ka Nyasaye ni Farao, kendo Harun owadu nowuo kari." 
Exodus7:2 Ininyis Harun owadu weche duto ma abiro chiki mondo iwachi, to en ema nowach ni Farao ni mondo owe jo-Israel oa e pinye." 
Exodus7:3 To anami chuny Farao doko matek, kendo named timo ranyisina kod honni maga." 
Exodus7:4 To kata kamano Farao ok nowinju. Omiyo anasand Misri gi timbe madongo kakumo jo-Misri malich, mi nagol joga ma jo-Israel e Misri, kochan-gi e dhoutgi." 
Exodus7:5 Kamano jo-Misri nong’e ni an e Ruoth Nyasaye, katimonigi timbe madongo, kendo kagolo jo-Israel kuomgi.”" 
Exodus7:6 Kuom mano Musa gi Harun notimo mana kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nochikogi. 
Exodus7:7 E kinde mane giwuoyoe gi Farao, Musa ne jahigni piero aboro, to Harun ne jahigni piero aboro gadek." 
Exodus7:8 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa gi Harun niya," 
Exodus7:9 “Kapo ni Farao owachonu ni mondo utimne ranyisi moro, to in Musa mondo iwachni Harun kama: ‘Bol ludhi piny e nyim Farao mondo olokre thuol.’ ”" 
Exodus7:10 Kane Musa kod Harun jobiro ir Farao, ne gitimo kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nochikogi, Harun nobolo ludhe piny e nyim Farao gi joge, mi ludhno nolokore thuol." 
Exodus7:11 Kane Farao oneno kamano, noluongo ji mariek kod ajuoke, kendo ajuoke mag Misrigo bende notimo mana hono machal kamano gi bindgi." 
Exodus7:12 Ng’ato ka ng’ato nobolo ludhe piny, kendo luth ka luth nolokore thuol, to ludh Harun nomwonyo ludhegi." 
Exodus7:13 To Farao ne wiye tek mana kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nosenyiso, mi nodagi winjo weche Musa gi Harun." 
Exodus7:14 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa niya, “Farao wiye tek, kendo odagi weyo jo-Israel mondo oa." 
Exodus7:15 Dhiyo ire gokinyi, kodhi e aora Nael, mi irite e dho aora, kiting’o luth mane olokore thuolcha." 
Exodus7:16 Nyis Farao kama: ‘Ruoth Nysaye ma Nyasach jo-Hibrania ne oora mondo anyisi ni, we joge oa mondo odhi olame e thim. To nyaka chil kawuono pok isetimo kamano." 
Exodus7:17 Omiyo koro Ruoth Nyasaye owacho ni ibiro ng’eyo ni en e Ruoth Nyasaye kuom gik ma obiro timo. Abiro chwado pi aora gi luth ma ating’oni mi pi biro lokore remo. 
Exodus7:18 Rech biro tho, kendo aora biro bedo mang’ue marach, mi jo-Misri ok noyud kaka modho pi aorani.’ ”" 
Exodus7:19 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa niya, “Nyis Harun kama: ‘Rie ludhi e wi pige duto man Misri, kaka aore madongo gi matindo, kod yewni gi sokni.’ Pi biro lokore remo, kendo piny duto nopong’ gi remo, koda ka dapige mag yien mopa, koda mag kite.”" 
Exodus7:20 Musa gi Harun ne jotimo kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nochikogi. Harun noting’o ludhe malo e nyim Farao gi jodonge, kendo nochwado pi aora Nael, mi pi duto nolokore remo." 
Exodus7:21 Rech notho, kendo aora nodoko mang’ue marach, mi jo-Misri ne ok nyal modho pi aorano. Piny Misri duto nopong’ gi remo." 
Exodus7:22 To bang’e ajuoke mag Misri bende notimo hono mana machal kamano gi bindgi, mi wi Farao nosiko matek kaka chon. Notamore winjo wach Musa gi Harun mana kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nosenyiso," 
Exodus7:23 kendo noa modok e ode ka ok odewo wachgi. 
Exodus7:24 Jo-Misri duto nokunyo bath aora Nael mondo giyud pi modho, nikech ne ok ginyal modho pi aora." 
Exodus7:25 Pi nobet kolokore remo kuom ndalo abiriyo kane Ruoth Nyasaye osechwado aora Nael. 
Exodus8:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa niya, “Dhiyo ir Farao mondo inyise ni Ruoth Nyasaye owacho kama: ‘We joga oa mondo odhi olama." 
Exodus8:2 To winji! Ka ok iyie timo kamano, to abiro kelo ogwende e pinyi duto mondo asandugo." 
Exodus8:3 Ginipong’ aora Nael, kendo giniwuog ka gidhi e odi nyaka kor nindo gi kitandani kod ut jodongi gi mag jogi, kendo ei kendeni kod ei sufriecheni mitedoe makati." 
Exodus8:4 Bende ginichikre kuomi kendo kuom jogi kod kuom jodongi.’ ” 
Exodus8:5 Ruoth Nyasaye nomedo wacho ni Musa niya, “Nyis Harun mondo orie ludhe ewi aore gi sokni kod yewni, mondo ogwende onywolre mathoth e piny Misri.”" 
Exodus8:6 Kamano Harun norieyo lwete ewi pige duto, mi ogwende nobiro mopong’o piny." 
Exodus8:7 To ajuoke notiyo gi bindgi, mi gin bende ne gimiyo ogwende obiro e piny." 
Exodus8:8 Farao koro noluongo Musa gi Harun mowachonigi niya, “Kwauru Ruoth Nyasaye mondo ogol ogwende oko kuoma, kendo kuom joga, eka awe jou oa mondo odhi otim misango ni Ruoth Nyasaye.”" 
Exodus8:9 Mi Musa nowacho ni Farao niya, “Timna ng’wono, mondo inyisa sa monego alemnie, kaachiel gi jodongi kod jogi, mondo ogwende oweu, kendo oa e uteu, mi gidong’ mana e aora Nael kende.”" 
Exodus8:10 Nodwoke niya, “Kiny.” Musa nowachone niya, “Biro timore mana kaka iwacho, mondo ing’e ni onge Nyasaye moro machalo gi Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachwa." 
Exodus8:11 Ogwende biro weyi, kaachiel gi jodongi kod jogi, kendo gibiro a e uteni, mi ginidong’ mana e aora Nael kende.”" 
Exodus8:12 Eka Musa gi Harun ne joa ir Farao, mi Musa nolamo Ruoth Nyasaye gi chunye duto, ni mondo ogwende ma nosekelo kuom Farao oa." 
Exodus8:13 Ruoth Nyasaye notimo kaka Musa nokwaye, mi ogwende duto mane nie udi gi lerni kod puothe notho." 
Exodus8:14 Jo-Misri nochokogi tuche tuche, mi piny nodoko mang’ue marach." 
Exodus8:15 To kane Farao oneno ni oyudo yueyo, wiye nochako obet matek, kendo nodagi wach Musa gi Harun, mana kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nosenyiso." 
Exodus8:16 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa niya, “Nyis Harun ni mondo ochwad piny gi ludhe mi buru biro lokore kikun e piny Misri duto.”" 
Exodus8:17 Ne giwinjo gima nowachonigi mi Harun norieyo ludhe, mochwadogo piny, mi buru nolokore kikun, kuom ji gi jamni. Buru duto manie Misri nolokore kikun." 
Exodus8:18 Ajuoke notiyo gi bindgi ni mondo gin bende gihon kikun, to notamogi. Kikun ne ni kuonde duto, kuom ji gi jamni." 
Exodus8:19 Eka ajuoke nowachoni Farao niya, “Ma en hond Nyasaye.” To wi Farao ne pod tek, kendo ne ok owinjo wach Musa gi Harun, mana kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nosenyiso." 
Exodus8:20 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa niya, “Dhiyo gokinyi mang’ich, mondo irom gi Farao, ka dhi aora Nael, kendo inyise ni Ruoth Nyasaye owacho kama: ‘We joga oa mondo odhi olama." 
Exodus8:21 To ka ok itimo kamano, to abiro hono lwang’ni kuomi gi kuom jodongi gi kuom jogi kod kuom uti, kendo gibiro pong’o ut jo-Misri, kaachiel gi pinygi duto." 
Exodus8:22 To chieng’no ok nahon lwang’ni e piny Goshen, kuma joga odakie, mi ining’e ni an Ruoth Nyasaye kara anie pinyni!" 
Exodus8:23 Kamano ok natim ni joga gima abiro timo ni jogi. Hononi kiny notimre kiny.’ ” 
Exodus8:24 Ruoth Nyasaye notimo kamano, kendo lwangni mang’eny nopoto e od Farao gi ut jodonge kod e piny Misri duto. Lwang’nigo noketho piny." 
Exodus8:25 Farao noluongo Musa gi Harun mowachonigi niya, “Dhiuru, utim misango ni Nyasachu, to nyaka utime mana ei pinyni.”" 
Exodus8:26 To Musa nodwoke niya, “Ok onego watim kamano, nimar timo misango ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachwa gi dhiang’ en gima kwero ni jo-Misri. Kapo ni gineno kwatimo misango ma kamano, to gibiro goyowa gi kite mwatho." 
Exodus8:27 Omiyo nyaka wadhi e thim kuom wuodh ndalo adek, mondo watim misango ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachwa mana kaka nochikowa.”" 
Exodus8:28 Farao nodwokogi niya, “Abiro weyou udhi mondo utim misango ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu e thim, to mana ka ok udhi mabor ahinya. Omiyo koro kwanauru.”" 
Exodus8:29 Musa nowachone niya, “Ka asedhi, to abiro kwayo Ruoth Nyasaye mondo kiny lwang’ni oweyi gi jodongi kod jogi. To kik ichak iwuondwa, mi itam jowa dhi timo misango ni Ruoth Nyasaye.”" 
Exodus8:30 Musa noa ir Farao molamo Ruoth Nyasaye," 
Exodus8:31 mi Ruoth Nyasaye notimone gima nokwayo. Lwang’ni noa kuom Farao gi jodonge kod joge, ma onge kata mana lwang’ni achiel mane odong’." 
Exodus8:32 To kata e kindeno bende wi Farao nochako obedo matek, mi ne ok oyie mondo jo-Israel oa." 
Exodus9:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa niya, “Dhiyo ir Farao mondo inyise ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach jo-Hibrania owacho kama, ‘We joga oa mondo odhi olama." 
Exodus9:2 To ka idagi weyogi," 
Exodus9:3 to abiro kelo tho marach kuom fareseni gi kenjeni gi ngamiani gi dhogi kod rombi gi dieki. 
Exodus9:4 Jamb jo-Israel to ok abi timonigi gima abiro timoni jamb jo-Misri, mi onge chiach ja-Israel kata achiel ma notho.’" 
Exodus9:5 Bende Ruoth Nyasaye oseketo odiechieng’, kowacho ni kiny ema notimie kamano e pinyni duto.”" 
Exodus9:6 Kinyne Ruoth Nyasaye notimo kaka nowacho, mi jamb jo-Misri duto notho, to chiach jo-Israel ne ok otho kata achiel." 
Exodus9:7 Kane Farao onono to nonyise ni onge chiach ja-Israel mane otho kata achiel. To kata kamano wiye ne pod tek, mi ne ok oyie mondo jo-Israel oa." 
Exodus9:8 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa gi Harun niya, “Jukuru buch kendo gi lwetu, mondo Musa okir e kor yamo e nyim Farao." 
Exodus9:9 Buruno biro lokore buru mayom e piny Misri duto, kendo obiro kelo tuo buche malokore adhonde kuom ji gi jamni.”" 
Exodus9:10 Kamano ne gijuko buru e kendo mi gidhigo ir Farao. Eka Musa nokiro buruno e kor yamo, mi buruno nokelo tuo buche ma nolokore adhonde kuom ji gi jamni." 
Exodus9:11 Ajuoke ne ok nyal piem gi Musa nikech gin bende dendgi ne buche okuodo, mana kaka jo-Misri mamoko." 
Exodus9:12 Ruoth Nyasaye nomiyo wi Farao odoko matek, mi ne ok odewo Musa gi Harun, mana kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nosenyiso Musa." 
Exodus9:13 Bang’e Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa niya, “Dhi ir Farao gokinyi mang’ich, mondo inyise ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach jo-Hibrania owacho kama: ‘We joga oa mondo odhi olama." 
Exodus9:14 To wang’ni, ka ok itimo kamano, to in ema abiro kumi kaachiel gi jodongi kod jogi, kakelonu sand duto mondo ing’e ni onge ng’at marom koda e piny ngima." 
Exodus9:15 Ka dine arie bada mi agoyi gi tuo moro, kaachiel gi jogi, to dikoro kari oselal." 
Exodus9:16 To aseweyi ibet mangima mana ni mondo anyisigo tekona, kendo mondo humba olag e piny ngima." 
Exodus9:17 To kaka pod ithago joga, kendo ok iyienigi mondo gia," 
Exodus9:18 kiny kar sa ma kama, naor pe malich ma pok one e piny Misri nyaka nene." 
Exodus9:19 Koro gol chik mondo jambi kod gigi duto man oko orwak e udi, nimar pe biro goyo ji kod jamni mowe oko, mi gibiro tho giduto.’ ”" 
Exodus9:20 Luoro nomako jodong Farao moko nikech gima Ruorh Nyasaye nosewachono, omiyo ne gikelo wasumbgi gi jambgi e udi piyopiyo." 
Exodus9:21 To joma ne ok odewo wach Ruoth Nyasaye noweyo wasumbgi gi jambgi mana oko. 
Exodus9:22 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa niya, “Rie lweti kochomo polo mondo pe ogo ji gi jamni kod buya duto man piny e Misri.”" 
Exodus9:23 Kamano Musa norieyo ludhe kochomo polo, mi Ruoth Nyasaye nooro mil polo kaachiel gi pe mi polo nogoyo piny. Ruoth Nyasaye nomiyo pe ogoyo Misri malich," 
Exodus9:24 ka polo mil koni gi koni. Ne en pe marach mane pok one e piny Misri nyaka nene. 
Exodus9:25 Pe nogoyo gik moko duto, kaachiel gi ji kod jamni mane ni oko kuonde duto e piny Misri. Bende nogoyo buya manie piny, moturo yien duto." 
Exodus9:26 To mak mana piny Goshen kende mane jo-Israel odakie, ema ne ok ogoyo." 
Exodus9:27 Farao noluongo Musa gi Harun, mowachonigi niya, “Koro aseketho. Ruoth Nyasaye e man kare, to an, kaachiel gi joga, ema wasetimo marach," 
Exodus9:28 lamnwa Ruoth Nyasaye, nikech pe gi polo osegoyowa mohingo tekowa. Asingora ni abiro weyou mondo udhi ma ok urito gimoro kendo.”" 
Exodus9:29 Musa nowachone niya, “Ka asea e dalani, to abiro rieyo bada kalamo Ruoth Nyasaye. Polo biro weyo mor, kendo pe bende biro chok mondo omi ing’e ni Ruoth Nyasaye e wuon piny ngima." 
Exodus9:30 To ang’eyo ni in kaachiel gi jodongi pod ok uluoro Ruoth Nyasaye.” 
Exodus9:31 (Tworo gi shairi nokethore chuth, nimar noyudo ka tworo osetegno, to shairi ne koro eka mino." 
Exodus9:32 To ngano ne ok okethore nimar ojachiek achien.) 
Exodus9:33 Musa noa ir Farao, mowuok e dala. Eka noting’o bedene malo kolamo Ruoth Nyasaye, mi mor polo gi pe norumo, kendo koth bende nochok." 
Exodus9:34 Kane Farao oneno ni gigo duto noserumo, nochako oketho, mi chunye, kaachiel gi chuny jodonge nomedo mana bedo matek." 
Exodus9:35 Kamano wi Farao nomedo bet matek, mi notamo jo-Israel dhi, mana kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nosemiyo Musa owacho." 
Exodus10:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa niya, “Dhi ir Farao, asemiyo chunye, kaachiel gi chuny jodonge obedo matek mondo anyisgi hondenagi," 
Exodus10:2 kendo mondo unyis nyithindu gi nyikwau e ndalo mabiro kaka nene afuwo jo-Misri gi honnigo. Kamano unung’e ni an e Ruoth Nyasaye.” 
Exodus10:3 Kuom mano Musa gi Harun nodhi ir Farao, mowachone niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach jo-Hibrania owacho kama: ‘Pod ibiro dagi bolori e nyima nyaka kar ang’o? We joga oa mondo odhi olama." 
Exodus10:4 Ka pod itamori miyo joga thuolo mondo oa, to kiny nakel bonyo e pinyi," 
Exodus10:5 kendo gibiro nur e piny ma kata mana lowo ok nonen. Ginicham gik moko duto modong’, mane pe ok oketho, kaachiel gi yien duto." 
Exodus10:6 Ginipong’ uteni gi ute jodongi kod ute jogi. Ginibed marach moloyo gimoro amora ma wuoneu kata kwereu oseneno nyaka ne gibi e pinyni.’ ” Kane Musa osewuoyo kamano, noa moweyo Farao." 
Exodus10:7 Jodong Farao nowachone niya, “Ng’atni pod biro thagowa nyaka kar ang’o? We jo-Israel machwo odhi mondo olam Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachgi. Donge koro ing’eyo ni Misri osekethore?”" 
Exodus10:8 Kuom mano, noom Musa gi Harun, moduogo ir Farao, mi nowachonigi niya, “Unyalo dhi mondo ulam Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu. To ng’a gini ma biro dhi?”" 
Exodus10:9 Musa nodwoke niya, “Wabiro dhi waduto, joma tindo kod joma dongo, nyiri gi yawuowi, kaachiel gi jamni duto, nimar waduto nyaka watim ni Ruoth Nyasaye sawo.”" 
Exodus10:10 Farao nowachonigi niya, “Nyasaye mondo okonyu ka po ni ayienu udhi kaachiel gi mondu kod nyithindu! Nyaka bed ni uchano timo gimoro marach." 
Exodus10:11 Ooyo, ok ayienu timo kamano! Un joma chwo kende ema unyalo dhi mondo ulam Ruoth Nyasaye, nikech mano ema nudwaro.” Mi noriembogi gia e nyime." 
Exodus10:12 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa niya, “Rie badi e piny Misri mondo bonyo obi ocham gik moko duto mane pe oweyo mak oketho.”" 
Exodus10:13 Omiyo Musa norieyo ludhe e piny Misri, mi Ruoth Nyasaye notugo yamb ugue mokudho e pinyno odiechieng’no duto gotienono duto. To kane piny oru, noyudo ka yamb ugue osekelo bonyo." 
Exodus10:14 Bonyogo nopie e piny Misri mang’eny ma nyaka nene pok one bende ok none nyaka chieng’. 
Exodus10:15 Ne gipoto piny mi piny nolokore bonyo lilo kendo ne gichamo gik moko duto mane dongo e piny kaachiel gi olembe duto mane pe oweyo. Onge kata lith oboke mane odong’ e piny Misri duto. 
Exodus10:16 Farao noluongo Musa gi Harun, mowachonigi niya, “Aseketho ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu, kendo ni un bende." 
Exodus10:17 Koro yie ung’wonnae dichiel, kendo ulam Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu mondo oyie ogol masira malichni kuoma.”" 
Exodus10:18 Kuom mano Musa noa ir Farao modhi olamo Ruoth Nyasaye. 
Exodus10:19 Ruoth Nyasaye noloko yamono mi okudho matek kaa imbo, motero bonyo e Nam Makwar, ma kata achiel ne ok odong’ Misri." 
Exodus10:20 To Ruoth Nyasaye nomiyo chuny Farao odoko matek, mi ne ok oweyo jo-Israel odhi." 
Exodus10:21 Bang’ mano Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa niya, “Rie badi kochomo polo mondo mudho mandiwa, ma ji muloe mana gi lwetgi, oim piny Misri.”" 
Exodus10:22 Musa norieyo bade kochomo polo, mi mudho mandiwa noimo piny Misri duto kuom ndalo adek." 
Exodus10:23 Onge ja-Misri mane nyalo neno wadgi, kendo onge ng’at mane owuok e ode kuom ndalo adekgo. To kamoro amora mane jo-Israel odakie ema ler ne nitie." 
Exodus10:24 Farao noluongo Musa, mowachone niya, “Dhiuru ulam Ruoth Nyasaye. Mondu gi nyithindu bende nyalo dhi kodu, mak mana jambu ema nyaka dong’ ka.”" 
Exodus10:25 Musa nodwoke niya, “To ing’eyo ni in ema nyaka imiwa jamni mwatimogo ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachwa misengni miwang’o pep kod misengni mamoko." 
Exodus10:26 To jambwa bende nyaka wadhigo, kendo onge kata achiel ma biro dong’ chien, nimar dipo ka wadwaro jamni moko mwadhi lamogo Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachwa kuom jambwago, nikech kapok wachopo kuno to ok wang’eyo ni wadhi lame gang’o.”" 
Exodus10:27 To Ruoth Nyasaye nomiyo chuny Farao odoko matek, mi nodagi ni kik gidhi." 
Exodus10:28 Nowacho ni Musa niya, “Aye e wang’a! To bende kik ichak inena, nikech chieng’ minenae kendo to nitho!”" 
Exodus10:29 Musa nodwoke ni, “Adier, ok nachak aneni kendo.”" 
Exodus11:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa niya, “Koro odong’ masira achiel ma abiro kelo ni Farao gi jo-Misri. Eka noweu udhi. To ok mano kende, to noriembu mana kaka ng’at ma riembo chiege." 
Exodus11:2 Koro nyis ji ni ng’ato ka ng’ato ma dichwo kata ma dhako mondo okwa gik molos gi fedha kod dhahabu kuom jogweng’gi.” 
Exodus11:3 Mi Ruoth Nyasaye nomiyo jo-Misri ogeno jo-Israel. To bende jodong Farao gi jo-Misri duto nomiyo Musa duong’ ahinya. 
Exodus11:4 Musa nowacho ni Farao niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye owacho kama: ‘Abiro wuotho kuom jo-Misri e dier otieno tir," 
Exodus11:5 kendo nyithindo makayo duto manie piny Misri biro tho, chakre kach ruoth Farao nyaka kach dhako ma misumba ma jarego, kaachiel gi kach jamni duto." 
Exodus11:6 Ywak maduong’ ma pok one, bende ma ok none, biro bedo e piny Misri." 
Exodus11:7 To jo-Israel biro bedo gi kue, ma kata mana guok ok nogue dhano kata chiayo.’ Kamano unung’e ni Ruoth Nyasaye oketo pogruok e kind jo-Misri gi jo-Israel." 
Exodus11:8 Bang’e jodongi nobi ira, mi ginikulrena ka giwacho niya, ‘Dhiyo, un gi jou duto!’ Bang’ mano eka naa.” Mi Musa noa ir Farao gi mirima mager." 
Exodus11:9 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa niya, “Farao ok bi winjo wachni. Omiyo abiro medo timo honni e piny Misri.”" 
Exodus11:10 Musa gi Harun nosetimo honnigo duto e nyim Farao, to Ruoth Nyasaye nomiyo wiye odoko matek, mi ne ok onyal weyo jo-Israel a e pinye." 
Exodus12:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa gi Harun e piny Misri niya," 
Exodus12:2 “Dueni ema biro bedonu due mokwongo mar higa. 
Exodus12:3 Nyis jo-Israel duto kama: Chieng’ due apar mar dueni ng’ato ka ng’ato nyaka yier nyarombo kata nyadiel ni joode, tiende ni chiayo achiel ni ot ka ot." 
Exodus12:4 To kapo ni joot moro nok ahinya ma chiayo ngima ohingo, to wuon odno kod ng’at modak bute nyaka riwre e chiayono. Nyaka upim gima ng’ato ka ng’ato nyalo chamo, mondo ung’ego kar romb joma oromo chiayo achiel." 
Exodus12:5 Chiayono nyaka bed nyarombo kata nyadiel ma dichwo ma jahiga achiel ma onge songa. 
Exodus12:6 Kanuru chiayogo nyaka chop chieng’ mar apar gang’wen mar dueni, eka oganda jo-Israel duto mondo oneggi ka piny dwaro yuso." 
Exodus12:7 Bang’e gikaw remo, giwirgo sisi mag dhoudi kod wi dhoudi mag udi duto ma nochamie jamnigo." 
Exodus12:8 Nyaka gibul ring’o gotienono, kendo gichame gi makati ma ok ketie thowi, kaachiel gi alode makech." 
Exodus12:9 Kik ucham ringe moro manumu, kata motedi, to nyaka bule duto, kaachiel gi wiye gi tiendene kod jamb iye." 
Exodus12:10 Kik uwe lemo moro dong’ nyaka okinyi. To kapo ni moro odong’, to nyaka wang’e e mach." 
Exodus12:11 “Nyaka uchame kutueyo okanda e nungou, kendo kurwako wuoche e tiendu, kendo kumako ludhe e lwetu; to bende nyaka uchame piyopiyo. En sap Pasaka mar Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Exodus12:12 Otienono nawuoth e piny Misri duto kendo naneg nyathi ka nyathi ma dichwo makayo mar dhano kod mar chiayo. An e Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo anakum nyiseche duto mag jo-Misri." 
Exodus12:13 Remb nyirombego nobed kido ma nyiso udi mudakie, kendo kaneno remono to anakadhu, mi masich tho magoyogo piny Misri ok nomaku." 
Exodus12:14 “Odieching’no nobednu chieng’ rapar, omiyo nyaka urite ka sawo mochwere ni Ruoth Nyasaye kuom tiengeu duto." 
Exodus12:15 Nyaka ucham makati ma ok ketie thowi kuom ndalo abiriyo. Chieng’ mokwongo, nyaka ugol thowi duto manie uteu, nimar ka ng’ato kuomu ochamo makati moketie thowi chakre chieng’ mokwongo nyaka chieng’ mar abiriyo to nong’ad kare oko kuom oganda jo-Israel." 
Exodus12:16 Chieng’ mokwongo kod chieng’ mar abiriyo, nyaka utim chokruok moyiedhi. Kuom ndalo ariyogo kik uti tich moro mak mana tij loso chiemo." 
Exodus12:17 Nyaka utim sawo mar makati ma ok ketie thowi, nikech chieng’no ema nagolie ogendu e piny Misri. Tiengeu duto nyaka rit odiechieng’no mondo obed chieng’ sawo mochwere." 
Exodus12:18 Chakre odhiambo mar due apar gang’wen mar due mokwongo, nyaka odhiambo mar due piero ariyo gachiel ema unuchamie makati ma ok ketie thowi." 
Exodus12:19 Kuom ndalo abiriyogo kik thowi bedie uteu, nikech ng’at mochamo gimoro moketie thowi nong’ad kare oko kuom oganda jo-Israel, bed ni en japiny kata jadak." 
Exodus12:20 Kik ucham gimoro moketie thowi, to nyaka ucham mana makati ma ok ketie thowi kamoro amora mudakie.”" 
Exodus12:21 Musa noluongo jodong Israel duto, mowachonigi niya, “Ng’ato ka ng’ato mondo odhi oyier nyarombo kata nyadiel ni joode, mondo unegi kutimogo Pasaka." 
Exodus12:22 Eka ukaw oboke mag owino ulutie remo manie tawo, kendo uwirgi wi dhoudi kod sisi mag dhoudi. Kik ng’ato kuomu wuog oko nyaka okinyi." 
Exodus12:23 Ruoth Nyasaye biro wuotho e piny Misri duto, mondo oneg jo-Misri, to enokadh dhoot ka dhoot moneno remo e wiye, kendo e sisi mage, kendo ok nowe malaika maneko donje uteu mondo onegu." 
Exodus12:24 “Rituru chikegi mochwere kaachiel gi nyithindu. 
Exodus12:25 Ka udonjo e piny ma Ruoth Nyasaye nomiu kaka osesingore, to nyaka urit sawoni." 
Exodus12:26 To ka nyithindu nopenju tiende," 
Exodus12:27 to unudwokgi ni, ‘En misango mar Pasaka mitimo ni Ruoth Nyasaye nikech nokadho ut jo-Israel e piny Misri konego jo-Misri, to oweyo miechwa.’ ” Kane Musa otieko wuoyo, jo-Israel nogoyo chonggi piny molemo." 
Exodus12:28 Ne gidhi, mi girito wechego, kendo gitimo gima Ruoth Nyasaye nochiko Musa gi Harun." 
Exodus12:29 E dier otienono tir, Ruoth Nyasaye nonego nyithindo ma yawuowi makayo duto, chakre kach ruoth Farao nyaka kach ng’at motue e jela, kaachiel gi nyithindo makayo duto mag jamni." 
Exodus12:30 Farao gi jodonge kod jo-Misri duto nochiew gotienono, kendo ne nitie ywak malich ahinya e Misri nimar ne onge kata dala achiel ma ok nyathi ma wuowi othoe." 
Exodus12:31 Otieno nogo Farao noluongo Musa gi Harun mowachonigi niya, “Wuoguru gi jo-Israel piyopiyo mondo uwe joga. Dhiuru ulam Ruoth Nyasaye kaka usekwayo." 
Exodus12:32 Jambu bende kawuru uago. An bende lamnauru mondo ayud gueth.” 
Exodus12:33 Jo-Misri norungo jo-Israel mondo oa e pinygi piyopiyo, ka giwacho niya, “Waduto wabiro tho ka ok ua.”" 
Exodus12:34 Omiyo jo-Israel nokawo sufriache mag makati moting’o mogo modwal mapok oketie thowi. Ne giboyogi gi nenggi, mi giting’ogi e gokgi." 
Exodus12:35 Noyudo ka jo-Isreal osekwayo jo-Misri lewni kod gik moko molos gi fedha kod dhahabu, kaka Musa nosechiko." 
Exodus12:36 Ruoth Nyasaye nomiyo jo-Misri ogeno jo-Israel, mi ne gimiyogi gik moko duto mane gikwayo. Kamano e kaka ne giyako jo-Misri." 
Exodus12:37 Jo-Israel nochako wuoth Rameses kochomo Sukoth. Ne gin ji alufu mia auchiel ka ok okwan mon gi nyithindo. 
Exodus12:38 Oganda maduong’ mar ji mamoko kaachiel gi jamni bende nodhi kodgi. 
Exodus12:39 Ne gikawo mogo modwal mane giago Misri, mi gitedogo makati ma ok oketie thowi. Ne ok oketie thowi nikech ne oriembgi gia Misri apoya. Bende ne ok giyudo thuolo kata mana mar tedo chiemo ma gidhi chamo e wuoth." 
Exodus12:40 Jo-Israel nosedak e piny Misri kuom higni mia ang’wen gi piero adek. 
Exodus12:41 To chieng’ mane higni mia ang’wen gi piero adekgo orumoe ema ne ogend Ruoth Nyasaye duto owuokie Misri. 
Exodus12:42 Ne en otieno mane Ruoth Nyasaye oritogie mondo ogolgi e piny Misri. Otieno nogono en otieno moket mondo jo-Israel duto oparie Ruoth Nyasaye nyaka chieng’ ka ginindo bedo. 
Exodus12:43 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa gi Harun niya, “Magi e chike monego urit kitimo Pasaka: Jodak kik chame," 
Exodus12:44 to wasumbini duto mong’iew nyalo chame mana kuseterogi nyangu. 
Exodus12:45 To japiny moro kata ng’ato ang’ata mondiki kik chame. 
Exodus12:46 Nyarombo ka nyarombo nyaka cham mana e ot achiel; kik gol lemo kata achiel oko, bende kik utur choke kata achiel." 
Exodus12:47 Oganda jo-Israel duto nyaka tim sawoni. 
Exodus12:48 Kapo ni nitie jadak moro kuomu ma dwaro timo Pasaka ni Ruoth Nyasaye, to nyaka ukuong uter joge machwo duto nyangu, eka onyalo riwore kodu e timo sawono, mi koro nokwane ka ja-Israel hie. To ng’at ma ok oter nyangu kik chame." 
Exodus12:49 Chikni otweyo ja-Israel gi jadak machalre.” 
Exodus12:50 Jo-Isreal notimo gik moko duto mane Nyasaye ochiko Musa gi Harun," 
Exodus12:51 mi chieng’onogo, ema nogoloe jo-Israel e piny Misri, kochan gi e ogendgi." 
Exodus13:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa niya," 
Exodus13:2 “Nyathi ka nyathi makayo nyaka walna, nikech dhano kata chiayo mokwong nywol e Israel en mara.”" 
Exodus13:3 Musa nowacho ni jo-Israel niya, “Nyaka upar odiechieng’ ma uwuokie Misrini, nikech Ruoth Nyasaye ogolou gi tekone maduong’ e piny mane ubedoe wasumbini. Makati moketie thowi ok onego cham kawuono," 
Exodus13:4 nikech odiechieng’ni, due mar Abib, e chieng’ wuoku Misri." 
Exodus13:5 Ruoth Nyasaye nosingore ni kwereu ni nomiu piny momew kendo machiek ahinya ma jo-Kanaan gi jo-Hiti gi jo-Amor gi jo-Hivi gi jo-Jebus odakie. Ka Ruoth Nyasaye oseterou kuno, to nyaka utim sawoni e due nogoni." 
Exodus13:6 Nyaka ucham makati ma ok ketie thowi kuom ndalo abiriyo, to chieng’ mar abiriyo utim sawo ni Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Exodus13:7 Makati ma ok ketie thowi, ema nucham kuom ndalo abiriyogo, to makati miketoe thowi, kata gimoro amora moket gi thowi, kik yud e pinyu duto." 
Exodus13:8 Odiechieng’no nyaka unyis yawuotu niya, ‘Ma ema waparogo gima Ruoth Nyasaye notimonwa kwawuok Misri.’" 
Exodus13:9 Raparni nyaka bed ka kido e lwetu, kendo ka ranyisi e lela wang’u mondo usik kuwacho chik Ruoth Nyasaye e dhou, nimar Ruoth Nyasaye nogolou Misri gi tekone maduong’." 
Exodus13:10 Rituru chikni e higa ka higa e ndalo moketi.” 
Exodus13:11 “Ruoth Nyasaye nokelu e piny Kanaan mane osingore ni nomiu kaachiel gi kwereu. Kosemiyougo," 
Exodus13:12 to nyaka uchiwne nyithindu machwo makayo duto. Nyithind jambu makayo machwo duto bende gin mag Ruoth Nyasaye. 
Exodus13:13 Nyaka uwal nyithind kenjeu machwo makayo duto, kuketo nyirombe kargi. To ka ok udwar warogi, to nyaka utur ng’utgi. Bende nyaka uwar yawuowi makayo duto munywolo." 
Exodus13:14 Ka chieng’ moro yawuotu penjou ni, ‘Ere tiend gima utimoni?’ To nyaka uduokgi niya, ‘Ruoth Nyasaye nogolowa gi tekone maduong’ e piny Misri, kuma ne wabedoe wasumbini." 
Exodus13:15 Kane Farao otamore weyowa mondo waa, Ruoth Nyasaye nonego nyithindo makayo duto, mag dhano gi mag jamni, e piny Misri. Mano emomiyo watimo ni Nyasaye misango gi nyithind jamni machwo makayo duto, to wawaro nyithindwa makayo kwachiwo gik moko kargi." 
Exodus13:16 Timni nyaka bednu rapar, mana ka kido manie lwetu kata ka ranyisi manie lend wang’u, nikech Ruoth Nyasaye nogolowa Misri gi tekone maduong’.’ ”" 
Exodus13:17 Kane Farao oweyo jo-Israel mondo odhi, Nyasaye ne ok otelonigi e yo madhi e piny Filistia, kata obedo ni yorno ema ng’ado machiegni. Nyasaye noparo niya, “Ka jo-Israel oneno ni gibiro kedo, to chunygi nyalo lokore mi gidog Misri.”" 
Exodus13:18 Omiyo kar luwo yorno to Nyasaye notelonigi e yo maluoro maluwo thim kochomo Nam Makwar. Jo-Israel noa Misri koikore ni lweny. 
Exodus13:19 Musa nokawo chok Josef, modhigo, nikech Josef nosemiyo jo-Israel osingore, kowachonigi niya, “Chieng’ moro Nyasaye nokonyu, omiyo ka udhi, to mondo ukaw chokena udhigo.”" 
Exodus13:20 Ne gia Sukoth, mi giwuotho nyaka Etham man e lak thim." 
Exodus13:21 Godiechieng’ Ruoth Nyasaye notelo nyimgi kobet e siro mar bor polo, mondo onyisgi yo, to gotieno notelo nyimgi ei siro mar mach, mondo omenynigi ler. Kamano ne ginyalo wuotho odiechieng’ gotieno." 
Exodus13:22 Siro mar bor polo nosiko kotelo nyimgi godiechieng’ to siro mar mach ne telonigi gotieno. 
Exodus14:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa niya," 
Exodus14:2 “Nyis jo-Israel mondo odog obwor e nyim Pihahiroth, e kind Migdol gi nam, yo wuok chieng’ mar Baal-zefon. Bworuru e dho nam, kama omanyore gi dalano." 
Exodus14:3 Farao biro paro ni jo-Israel digni e thim, kendo ni thim ogeng’onigi." 
Exodus14:4 Abiro miyo chunye doko matek, mi enolawu. To loch ma nalogo Farao kaachiel gi ogandane mar lweny nomi nyinga duong’, mi jo-Misri nong’e ni kara an Nyasaye.” Kamano jo-Israel notimo kaka nowachnigi." 
Exodus14:5 Kane onyis Farao ruodh Misri ni jo-Israel oseringo, chunye gi chuny jodonge nolokore ni nonego ni kik giwe gia, mi giwacho niya, “Ang’o mwasetimoni? Waseweyo wasumbwa ma jo-Israel odhi!”" 
Exodus14:6 Omiyo Farao noiko gache mar lweny, modhi gi joge mag lweny." 
Exodus14:7 Nokawo geche mag lweny moyier mia auchiel, gi geche moko duto mag Misri, ka jatend lweny ni ei moro ka moro." 
Exodus14:8 Ruoth Nyasaye nomiyo chuny Farao ruodh Misri odoko matek, mi nolawo jo-Israel ma nosewuok ka chunygi ochayo jo-Misri." 
Exodus14:9 Jo-Misri nolawogi gi farese Farao duto gi geche mag lweny gi joidh faresene, kaachiel gi joge mag lweny, mi gijukogi ka gibworo e dhonam but Pihahiroth, yo wuok chieng’ mar Baal-zefon." 
Exodus14:10 Kane Farao ochopo machiegni, jo-Israel noting’o wang’gi, moneno ka jo-Misri lawogi machiegni, mi ne giluor ahinya, kendo ne giywak ni Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Exodus14:11 Ne giwacho ni Musa niya, “Donge liete ni Misri? Ang’o momiyo nikelowa oko e thim ka, mondo wathoe? Koro neye gima isetimo kuom golowa Misri!" 
Exodus14:12 Donge ne wanyisi kapok wawuok Misri ni gima kama biro timore? Ne wakweri ni mondo iwewa wati ni jo-Misri. Da obedo maber ka wan wasumbgi, moloyo tho e thim ka.”" 
Exodus14:13 Musa nodwokogi niya, “Kik uluor! Chung’uru motegno mondo une kaka Ruoth Nyasaye biro resou kawuono, nimar jo-Misri munenogi, ok unune kendo." 
Exodus14:14 Ruoth Nyasaye biro kedonu, omiyo un ling’uru aling’a.”" 
Exodus14:15 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa niya, “Marang’o iywakna? Wach ni jo-Israel odhi adhiya nyime." 
Exodus14:16 Kaw ludhi, irie e nam, mondo nam opogre koni gi koni, eka jo-Israel ong’ade, kawuotho e lowo motwo." 
Exodus14:17 Abiro jiwo jo-Misri mondo oluw bang’u. Nyinga noyud duong’ kuom loyo Farao gi joge mag lweny gi gechene, kaachiel gi joidh faresene." 
Exodus14:18 Eka jo-Misri nong’e ni kara an Ruoth Nyasaye, kaseloyogi.”" 
Exodus14:19 Malaika mar Nyasaye mane otelo e nyim oganda jolweny mar Israel noa modok kang’egi. Siro mar bor polo bende noa e nyimgi, mi nodok mochung’ kang’egi," 
Exodus14:20 kopogo kind jolweny mag Misri gi jolweny mag Israel. Bor polono nokelo mudho kanyo, mi piny noyuso piyopiyo, kendo oganda moro ne ok osudo machiegni gi wadgi otieno duto." 
Exodus14:21 Musa norieyo bade e nam, mi Ruoth Nyasaye notugo yamb ugue mokudho matek otieno duto, mi nam nong’wel, kendo kama ne pi nitie nodoko motwo. Pigno nopogore diriyo," 
Exodus14:22 kendo jo-Israel nong’ado namno kawuotho e lowo motwo, ka pi ogingore koni gi koni." 
Exodus14:23 Jo-Misri nolawogi, modonjo bang’gi nyaka e chuny nam gi farese Farao duto, gi gechene mag lweny kod joidh faresene." 
Exodus14:24 Kane piny dwa yawore, Ruoth Nyasaye nong’iyo jolweny mag Misri gi e siro mar mach kod mar bor polo, mi nomiyo kihondko omakogi." 
Exodus14:25 Nomiyo tiend gechegi omoko, mi koro ne ok ginyal ringo maber, nyaka jo-Misri nowacho niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye ema kedonigi kodwa.”" 
Exodus14:26 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa niya, “Rie badi e nam mondo pi oduog oim jo-Misri gi gechegi kod jogi ma joidh farese.”" 
Exodus14:27 Mi Musa norieyo bade e nam, kendo kane piny oyawore, pi noduogo e wang’e machon. Jo-Misri noyudo ringo kane pi duogo, mi Ruoth Nyasaye notiekogi e chuny nam." 
Exodus14:28 Pi noduogo, moimo geche lweny gi joidh farese kod jolweny duto mag Farao ma nolawo jo-Israel ei nam. Onge kata ng’at achiel mane odong’." 
Exodus14:29 To jo-Israel noseng’ado nam, ka wuotho e lowo motwo, ka pi ogingore koni gi koni." 
Exodus14:30 Kamano e kaka Ruoth Nyasaye noreso jo-Israel e lwet jo-Misri odiechieng’no. Bang’e jo-Israel noneno jo-Misri koriere e dhonam kosetho. 
Exodus14:31 Kane jo-Israel oneno teko maduong’ mane Ruoth Nyasaye okumogo jo-Misri, ne giluore, mi ne giyie kuome kendo kuom Musa jatichne." 
Exodus15:1 Bang’e Musa gi jo-Israel nowero ni Ruoth Nyasaye wendni: “Abiro wer ni Ruoth Nyasaye nikech oseyudo duong’ mipako ahinya. Osewito farese kod joithgi e nam. 
Exodus15:2 Ruoth Nyasaye e tekona, kendo e wenda, En ema osewara. En e Nyasacha, kendo abiro pake. En e Nyasach wuora, kendo abiro miye duong’." 
Exodus15:3 Ruoth Nyasaye en jalweny, kendo Ruoth Nyasaye nyinge." 
Exodus15:4 Osewito geche Farao gi jolweny mage e nam, kendo jatend Farao moyier josenimo e Nam Makwar." 
Exodus15:5 Nam matut oimogi. Ne ginyumore piny ka kidi. 
Exodus15:6 “A Ruoth Nyasaye, badi ma korachwich nigi teko maduong! Oturo wasiki matindotindo." 
Exodus15:7 Kuom duong’ mar tekoni niloyo joma nopiem kodi. Mirimbi noliel ka mach, mowang’ogi ka tiang’." 
Exodus15:8 Much umi nomiyo pi ogingore, mi apaka nochung’ tir ka ohinga, kendo nam matut ne opoto nyaka pier pi piny" 
Exodus15:9 Jasikwa nowacho niya, ‘Analawgi, mi ajukgi! Anape mwandugi, kendo anayak gimoro amora ma adwaro. Anawuodh ligangla, kendo anatiekgi gi tekona.’" 
Exodus15:10 To in, a Ruoth Nyasaye, nikudho muya achiel kende, mi nam oimogi, Ne ginimo ka nyinyo e apaka madongo." 
Exodus15:11 A Ruoth Nyasaye, Ere Nyasaye machal kodi? Ere ng’ama ler ka in? Ere ng’ama chal kodi, manyalo timo honni kod timbe madongo miwuoro?" 
Exodus15:12 Nirieyo badi ma korachwich, mi piny nomwonyo wasikwa." 
Exodus15:13 Kuom herani mosiko isetelo ni joma niwaro. Kuom tekoni maduong’ isetelonigi nyaka kar dakni maler. 
Exodus15:14 Ogendini moko osewinjo, mi otetni. Rem machal gi muoch omako jo-Filistia." 
Exodus15:15 Koro luoro omako jodong Edom, kendo ruodhi mag Moab ochako kirni. Ji duto modak Kanaan, bende chirgi olal." 
Exodus15:16 Luoro gi kihondko omakogi, mi gichung’ achung’a ka siro, nikech duong’ mar tekoni. A Ruoth Nyasaye, gichung’ kamano, nyaka joma iloko jogi kadhi." 
Exodus15:17 A Ruoth Nyasaye, ibiro rwakogi, kendo ibiro chwoyogi ka kodhi e godi iwuon, kama niloso mondo obed kar dakni," 
Exodus15:18 Hekalu ma in iwuon nigero. A Ruoth Nyasaye, bed Ruoth nyaka chieng’.”" 
Exodus15:19 Farese Farao kod gechene gi joithgi nodonjo e nam, mi Ruoth Nyasaye noduogo pi, moimogi. To jo-Israel nong’ado nam, kawuotho e lowo motwo." 
Exodus15:20 Miriam janabi ma nyamin Harun nokawo bul, kendo mon duto nowuok moluwo bang’e, ka goyo bul kendo miel." 
Exodus15:21 Miriam nowernigi niya: “Weruru ni Ruoth Nyasaye, nikech oseyudo duong’ mipako ahinya! Osewito farese gi joithgi e nam!”" 
Exodus15:22 Musa nogolo jo-Israel e dho Nam Makwar, kuma ne gibworoe, mi ne giwuotho e thim Shur kuom ndalo adek ma ok giyudo pi." 
Exodus15:23 Bang’e ne gichopo Marah, to ne ok ginyal modho, nimar pi mane ni kuno ne kech. Mano emomiyo nochak kanyo ni Marah (tiende ni, makech)." 
Exodus15:24 Ji noywak ni Musa, ka giwacho niya, “Wabiro modho ang’o?”" 
Exodus15:25 Musa nolamo Ruoth Nyasaye gi chunye duto, mi Ruoth Nyasaye nonyise osiki moro. Nokawe, mobole e pi, mi pi nodoko mamit. Kanyo ema Ruoth Nyasaye nomiyogie chik mogurore, kendo kanyo ema notemogie." 
Exodus15:26 Nowachonigi niya, “An Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu. Ka uwinjo wechena gi chunyu duto, mi utimo mana kaka adwaro, kendo kumako chikena gi buchena, to ok nasandu gi tuoche ma nakelo kuom jo-Misri, nimar an e Ruoth Nyasaye machangou.”" 
Exodus15:27 Bang’ mano, ne gichopo Elim, kuma ne giyudoe sokni apar gariyo, kod yiend othidhe piero abiriyo, mi ne gibworo but soknigo." 
Exodus16:1 Oganda duto mar jo-Israel noa Elim, mi ochopo e thim Sin manie kind Elim gi Sinai. Mano notimore due mar ariyo kane gisea Misri." 
Exodus16:2 Jo-Israel duto noywak ni Musa gi Harun," 
Exodus16:3 ka giwacho niya, “Mad ne Ruoth Nyasaye negwa e piny Misri, kuma ne wanyalo betie piny gi tap ring’o e nyimwa, mwachiem mana kaka wadwaro. To koro usekelowa e thimni mondo kech onegwa waduto!”" 
Exodus16:4 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa niya, “Abiro loronu chiemo koa e polo. Odiechieng’ kodiechieng’ ji nyaka dhi mondo ochok chiemo moromo chamo odiechieng’no. Kamano abiro temogi mondo ane ane ka giyie chikena." 
Exodus16:5 To chieng’ mar auchiel, ka gitedo gima gisechoko, to giniyud ni oromre diriyo gi mago michoko pile e odiechieng’ achiel.”" 
Exodus16:6 Omiyo Musa kod Harun nowacho ni jo-Israel duto niya, “Godhiamboni ubiro ng’eyo ni adier Ruoth Nyasaye ema nogolou Misri," 
Exodus16:7 kendo kinyne gokinyi unune duong’ne maler, nimar osewinjo kaka uywakne. Wan ok ema uywagnwa, nikech wan ok wan gimoro.”" 
Exodus16:8 Eka Musa nomedo wacho niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye ema biro miyou kuon mang’eny mondo ucham gokinyi, nimar osewinjo kaka uywakne. Wan ok uywagnwa, to Ruoth Nyasaye ema uywakne, nikech wan ok wan gimoro.”" 
Exodus16:9 Musa nowachoni Harun niya, “Nyis ji duto mondo ochung’ e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, nimar osewinjo ywakgi.”" 
Exodus16:10 Kane Harun pod wuoyo gi jo-Israel, ne ging’iyo yo ka thim, kendo ne gipo ka duong’ maler mar Ruoth Nyasaye othinyore e bor polo." 
Exodus16:11 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa niya," 
Exodus16:12 “Asewinjo ywak jo-Israel, omiyo koro nyisgi kama: ‘Kapok piny oyuso, ubiro yudo ring’o mondo ucham, to gokinyi ubiro yudo kuon mang’eny. Eka unung’e ni an Nyasaye ma Nyasachu.’ ”" 
Exodus16:13 Godhiambono aluru mang’eny nobiro moimo kama ne gibworoe, kendo gokinyi tho nomoko, molworo kambi duto." 
Exodus16:14 To kane tho orumo, gik moko matindotindo, mong’inore machalo gi tho, nodong’ e thim." 
Exodus16:15 Jo-Israel nonenogo, to ne ok ging’eyo ni en ang’o, omiyo ne gipenjore kendgi giwegi ni, “Mano to ang’o?” Musa nodwokogi niya, “Mano e kuon ma Ruoth Nyasaye osemiyou mondo ucham." 
Exodus16:16 Ruoth Nyasaye osechiko ni mondo ng’ato ka ng’ato kuomu ochok morome, ka kwanyo ondweto achiel ni ng’ato ka ng’ato manie hembe.”" 
Exodus16:17 Jo-Israel notimo kamano. Jomoko kuomgi nochoko mang’eny, to jomoko nochoko manok." 
Exodus16:18 To kane gipimogi e ondweto, ne giyudo ni joma nochoko mang’eny ne ok nigi mathoth mohingogi, bende joma nochoko manok ne ok nigi matin moremogi to ng’ato ka ng’ato nosechoko mana morome." 
Exodus16:19 Musa nowachonigi niya, “Kik ukan chiemo moko nyaka kiny.”" 
Exodus16:20 Jomoko kuomgi ne ok odewo wach Musa, to nokano chiemo moko nyaka kinyne, mi kudni nopong’o chiemogo, moketho. Omiyo Musa nokecho kodgi." 
Exodus16:21 Okinyi kokinyi, ng’ato ka ng’ato ne choko chiemo morome chamo. To ka chieng’ oseowore, chiemono ne leny rumo." 
Exodus16:22 Chieng’ mar auchiel ne gichoko chiemo moromo chamo diriyo. Ng’ato ka ng’ato nochoko onduetni ariyo. Jodongo duto mag oganda nobiro, monyiso Musa wachno," 
Exodus16:23 mi nodwokogi niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye osechiko kama: ‘Kiny en chieng’ yueyo ma en Sabato mowal ni Ruoth Nyasaye. Kuom chiemo musechokogo, unyalo bulo mago mudwaro bulo, kendo boko mago mudwaro boko. To modong’ mondo oket tenge, okan nyaka kiny.’ ”" 
Exodus16:24 Ne gitimo kaka Musa nochiko, mi ne gikano gima odong’ nyaka kinyne, kendo ne ok okethore, bende kudni ne ok odonjoe." 
Exodus16:25 Musa nowachonigi niya, “Mano ema mondo ucham tinende, nikech kawuono en chieng’ Sabato. Tiende ni chieng’ mowal ni Ruoth Nyasaye. Omiyo ok ubi yudo chiemo oko mukwanyo." 
Exodus16:26 Unyalo choko chiemo kuom ndalo auchiel, to chieng’ mar abiriyo, ma en chieng’ Sabato, chiemono ok bi lwar.”" 
Exodus16:27 To chieng’ mar abiriyonogo, jomoko nodhi mondo ochok chiemo, to ne ok giyudo." 
Exodus16:28 Eka Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa niya, “Ubiro tamoru rito chikena gi buchena nyaka karang’o?"
