Exodus16:29 Ng’euru ni an Ruoth Nyasaye ema aseketonu chieng’ Sabato. Kuom mano, chieng’ mar auchiel amiyou chiemo moromo ndalo ariyo. To chieng’ mar abiriyo, ng’ato ka ng’ato nyaka bed mana kama entie, kendo kik owuog e dalane.”" 
Exodus16:30 Kamano ji noyueyo chieng’ mar abiriyo. 
Exodus16:31 Jo-Israel nochako chiemono ni, ‘Manna’. Nochalo gi kodhi matindotindo marachere, kendo nomit ka kek moted gi mor kich." 
Exodus16:32 Musa nowacho niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye ochiko kama: ‘Kawuru manna moromo ondweto achiel, ukan ni nyikwau, mondo chieng’ moro gine chiemo mane amiyou mondo ucham e thim, kane agolou Misri.’ ”" 
Exodus16:33 Eka Musa nowacho ni Harun niya, “Kaw agulu, iolie manna moromo ondweto achiel, kendo iket e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye mondo okan ni nyikwawa.”" 
Exodus16:34 Omiyo Harun nokawe, mokete e nyim Sandug Muma, mondo okane kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nochiko Musa." 
Exodus16:35 Jo-Israel nochamo manna kuom higni piero ang’wen, nyaka ne gichopo e piny mane ginyalo dakie. Ne gichamo mannano kamano nyaka ne gichopo e mbap piny Kanaan. (" 
Exodus16:36 Onduetni ang’wen romre gi debe achiel). 
Exodus17:1 Oganda duto mar jo-Israel nowuok e thim Sin, mi giwuotho matintin kaka Ruoth Nyasaye ne chikogi. Ne gibworo Refidim, to pi modho ne onge kuno." 
Exodus17:2 Mano nomiyo ji odhaw gi Musa, ka giwachone niya, “Miwa pi wamodhi!” Musa nodwokogi ni, “Marang’o udhaw koda? Ang’o momiyo utemo Ruoth Nyasaye?”" 
Exodus17:3 To ji ne riyo oloyo malich, omiyo ne giywakne, ka giwacho niya, “Ere gimomiyo nigolowa Misri gi nyithindwa kod jambwa mondo riyo obi onegwa?”" 
Exodus17:4 Kane Musa owinjo kamano nokwayo Ruoth Nyasaye gi chunye duto, kopenjo niya, “Abiro timo ang’o gi jogi, nimar gichiegni goya gi kite?”" 
Exodus17:5 Ruoth Nyasaye nodwoke niya, “Kaw jodong Israel moko mondo itelgo e nyim ji, kiting’o ludhi mane ichwadogo aora Nael." 
Exodus17:6 Anachung’ e nyimi kanyo, but lwanda man Horeb. Inichwad lwandano, mi pi nowuogie mondo ji omodhi.” Musa notimo kamano e nyim jodong Israel." 
Exodus17:7 Nochako nying kanyo ni Masa, (tiende ni, tem), to bende nochake ni Meriba, (ma tiende ni, dhaw), nikech jo-Israel nodhaw kode kanyo, kendo otemoe Ruoth Nyasaye, ka gipenjo niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye ni koda, koso oonge?”" 
Exodus17:8 Jo-Amalek nobiro Refidim, momonjo jo-Israel." 
Exodus17:9 Mi Musa nowacho ni Joshua niya, “Yier jomoko mondo kiny udhi ukednwago gi jo-Amalek. An to abiro chung’ ewi got kating’o luth mane Nyasaye omiya.”" 
Exodus17:9 Mi Musa nowacho ni Joshua niya, “Yier jomoko mondo kiny udhi ukednwago gi jo-Amalek. An to abiro chung’ ewi got kating’o luth mane Nyasaye omiya.”" 
Exodus17:10 Joshua notimo kaka Musa nochike, mi nokedo gi jo-Amalek, to Musa gi Harun kod Hur ne joidho ewi got." 
Exodus17:10 Joshua notimo kaka Musa nochike, mi nokedo gi jo-Amalek, to Musa gi Harun kod Hur ne joidho ewi got." 
Exodus17:11 E kinde duto mane Musa oting’o bedene malo, jo-Israel ne loyo, to kane odwoko bedene piny, to jo-Amalek ema ne loyo." 
Exodus17:12 Kane bede Musa koro ojony, Harun gi Hur ne joketone kidi mobetie, ka giting’o bedene koni gi koni malo. Ne gisiro bedene kamano nyaka chieng’ opodho," 
Exodus17:13 mi Joshua noloyo jo-Amalek monegogi. 
Exodus17:13 mi Joshua noloyo jo-Amalek monegogi. 
Exodus17:14 Bang’e Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa niya, “Ndik gima osetimoreno e kitabu mondo e ndalo mabiro ji opar wachno. Bende inyis Joshua ni abiro miyo wi ji duto wil chuth gi jo-Amalek.”" 
Exodus17:14 Bang’e Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa niya, “Ndik gima osetimoreno e kitabu mondo e ndalo mabiro ji opar wachno. Bende inyis Joshua ni abiro miyo wi ji duto wil chuth gi jo-Amalek.”" 
Exodus17:15 Musa nogero kendo-mar-misango, mi nochake ni Jehova-Nisi, (tiende ni, Ruoth Nyasaye e bandecha.)" 
Exodus17:16 Eka nowacho niya, “Akuong’ora e bwo bandech Ruoth Nyasaye, ni Ruoth Nyasaye biro kedo gi jo-Amalek nyaka chieng’.”" 
Exodus18:1 Jethro jadolo mar Midian, kendo jaduong’ Musa, nowinjo gik moko duto mane Nyasaye osetimo ni Musa gi jo-Israel, kendo kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nogologi Misri." 
Exodus18:2 Kane Musa oriembo Zipora chiege, Jethro nokawo nyareno" 
Exodus18:3 kaachiel gi yawuote ariyo, ma Gershom gi Eliezer. Musa nosewacho niya, “An jadak e piny ma ok marwa,” omiyo nochako wuode achiel ni Gershom, (tiende ni, jadak)." 
Exodus18:4 Bende nosewacho niya, “Nyasach wuora en jakonyna mane oresa ka Farao dwaro nega.” Omiyo nochako wuode machielo ni Eliezer, (tiende ni, Nyasaye en Jakonyna)." 
Exodus18:5 Jethro nobiro ir Musa e god Nyasaye, kuma ne Musa obworoe, kokelone chiege gi yawuote." 
Exodus18:6 Noter ne Musa wach ni, “Jaduong’ni Jethro biro iri gi chiegi kod yawuoti.”" 
Exodus18:7 Musa nowuok, modhi romone. Nokulorene, kendo onyodhe, mi gimosore. Kane gisedonjo e hema," 
Exodus18:8 Musa nonyise duto mane Ruoth Nyasaye osetimo ni Farao, kendo ni jo-Misri, nikech nohero jo-Israel. Bende nonyise thagruok mane giyudo e yo, kendo kaka Ruoth Nyasaye noresogi." 
Exodus18:9 Jethro koro ne mor ahinya kowinjo ng’wono mane Ruoth Nyasaye otimo ni jo-Israel koresogi kuom jo-Misri. 
Exodus18:10 Nowacho niya, “Opak Ruoth Nyasaye mane oresou e lwet jo-Misri, kendo e lwet Farao." 
Exodus18:11 Koro ang’eyo ni Ruoth Nyasaye duong’ moloyo nyiseche duto, nikech osereso jo-Israel e loch mar jo-Misri, kuma ne iritogie gi achaye.”" 
Exodus18:12 Bang’e Jethro notimo ni Nyasaye misango miwang’o pep, kod misengni mamoko. Harun gi jodong Isarel duto ne jobiro mochamo sawono gi Jethro e nyim Nyasaye." 
Exodus18:13 Kinyne Musa nobet piny mondo oyal ji, mi ji nochung’ kolwore, chakre okinyi nyaka odhiambo." 
Exodus18:14 Kane Jethro oneno tich mang’eny mane Musa timo ni ji, nopenje niya, “Ang’o momiyo itiyo tijegi ni jogi duto, ka in kendi, ka ji ochung’ kolwori chakre okinyi nyaka odhiambo?”" 
Exodus18:15 Musa nodwoke niya, “Nyaka atim kamano, nikech ji biro ira mondo ong’e gima Nyasaye dwaro." 
Exodus18:16 Ka ng’ato odonjo ni wadgi, to gikelo wachno ira mondo ang’ad buchgi. To bende anyiso ji buche gi chike mag Nyasaye.”" 
Exodus18:17 Jethro nowachone niya, “Gima itimoni ok ber." 
Exodus18:18 Ibiro mana ol, kaachiel gi jogi duto. Tijni ng’eny, omiyo ok inyal time kendi." 
Exodus18:19 We ang’adni rieko, mondo Nyasaye okonyi. In onego ibed jachung’ ni ji e nyim Nyasaye, kiterone ywakgi." 
Exodus18:20 Bende onego ipuonjgi chike kod buche, kendo inyisgi yore monego giluw, kod gik monego gitim." 
Exodus18:21 To nyaka iyier ji mariek kendo moluoro Nyasaye kuom ji duto. Nyaka gibed joadiera, kendo ma ok nyal chamo asoya. Gin ema mondo iketgi jotend ji. Jomoko kuomgi onego rit ji alufu achiel achiel, to moko ji mia mia, kendo moko ji piero abich abich, to moko ji apar apar." 
Exodus18:22 Jogi ema mondo ong’ad ni ji bura pile. Buche matek kende ema ginyalo kelo iri, to moko matindo to ging’ad kendgi. Kipogo ting’ kodgi kamano, to tiji biro dong’ moromi." 
Exodus18:23 Kitimo gima awachoni, to Nyasaye biro konyi, mi ok ibi ol, kendo ji duto nyalo dok miechgi piyo, ka buchegi oserumo.”" 
Exodus18:24 Musa nowinjo wach jaduong’ne, motimo kaka nowachone." 
Exodus18:25 Noyiero joma riek kuom jo-Israel duto, moketogi jotelo mag ji alufu achiel achiel, gi mag ji mia mia, gi mag ji piero abich abich, kod mag ji apar apar." 
Exodus18:26 Jotelogo ne ng’ado bura ni ji kinde duto. Buche matek kende ema ne gitero ir Musa, to mago matindo ne ging’ado kendgi giwegi." 
Exodus18:27 Bang’e Musa noweyo jaduong’ne oa, modok thurgi." 
Exodus19:1 E due mar adek kane jo-Israel osewuok Misri, ne gichopo e thim Sinai." 
Exodus19:2 Ne giwuok Refidim mi gitundo e thim Sinai, kuma ne gibworoe momanyore gi got." 
Exodus19:3 Musa noidho godno ir Nyasaye. Mi Ruoth Nyasaye noluonge gie got, mowachone niya, “Nyis nyikwa Jakobo ma jo-Israel kama:" 
Exodus19:4 ‘Nuneno gima natimo ni jo-Misri, kendo kaka nakelou ira, ka ating’ou kaka ongo ting’o nyithinde e bwombe." 
Exodus19:5 Koro ka unuluora murit singruok ma atimo kodu, to unubed joga awuon, ma aseyiero kuom ogendini duto; nikech piny duto en mara." 
Exodus19:6 Unubed oganda mowal, matiyona ka jodolo.’ Mano e wach ma onego inyis jo-Israel.”" 
Exodus19:7 Omiyo Musa nodhi, mochoko jotend jo-Israel kanyakla, monyisogi weche duto mane Ruoth Nyasaye osewachone." 
Exodus19:8 Ji duto nodwoke rat niya, “Wayie timo gik moko duto ma Ruoth Nyasaye osewacho.” Mi Musa nodwoko ni Ruoth Nyasaye wach mane ji owacho." 
Exodus19:9 Eka Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa niya, “Abiro biro iri ka an ei bor polo mapek, mondo awuo kodi ka ji winjo, mondo gen ma gigenigo kik rum.” Musa nonyiso Ruoth Nyasaye gima ji nodwoko." 
Exodus19:10 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa niya, “Dhiyo, ipwodh ji kawuono gi kiny kendo inyisgi gilwok lepgi." 
Exodus19:11 To orucha nyaka gibed moikore, nikech odiechieng’no ema an Ruoth Nyasaye, nalor ewi got Sinai, kama ji duto nonenae." 
Exodus19:12 Nyaka iket tong’ molworo got, kendo iwach ni ji niya, ‘Neuru ni ok uidho got, kata mana nyono tike. Ka ng’ato omulo got, to nyaka nege." 
Exodus19:13 To ka unege, kik umule gi lwetu, to goyeuru mana gi kite kata chieleuru mana gi asere. Timuru kamano ni dhano kata ni le. To mak mana ka tung’ oywak eka ji nyalo dhi e got.’ ”" 
Exodus19:14 Musa nolor oa e got, moduogo ir ji. Nopwodhogi, kendo ne gilwoko lepgi." 
Exodus19:15 Nowachonigi niya, “Ikreuru, kendo kik uriwru gi mon, mondo orucha oyud ka usepwodhoru.”" 
Exodus19:16 Chieng’ mar adek, kane piny oru, polo ne mor kendo mil ewi got, bende ne nitie bor polo mapek, kendo tung’ ma ywak, mi ji duto mane nie kambi nokirni." 
Exodus19:17 Musa notelo ni ji ka gia e kambi gidhi romo gi Nyasaye, mi ne gichung’ e tiend got Sinai." 
Exodus19:18 Wi got duto notimo iro, nikech Ruoth Nyasaye noselorie, ka en ei mach. Iro ne dhuolore, kendo ji duto ne kirni malich." 
Exodus19:19 Ywak tung’ nomedore kendo e kinde ka kinde mane Musa wuoyo, Nyasaye ne dwoke gi mor polo." 
Exodus19:20 Ruoth Nyasaye nolor, mochung’ ewi got Sinai, kendo noluongo Musa kanyo, mi Musa noidho modhi ire." 
Exodus19:21 Nowacho ni Musa niya, “Lor idhi isiem ji dipo ka gikadho tong’ mondo gibi ginena, nono to gibiro tho mang’eny." 
Exodus19:22 Kata mana jodolo bende, moyienigi chopo ira, nyaka ne ni opwodhore, nono to abiro mwomora kuomgi.”" 
Exodus19:23 To Musa nodwoko Ruoth Nyasaye ni, “Ji ok nyal biro ewi got Sinai ku, nikech in iwuon ema nisiemowa matek, kichikowa ni mondo waket tong’ ni got mondo wawalego, osik maler.”" 
Exodus19:24 Ruoth Nysaye nowachone niya, “Lor mondo idhi iom Harun. To jodolo kaachiel gi ji kik kadh tong’ ka giidho ira, nono to abiro mwomora kuomgi.”" 
Exodus19:25 Omiyo Musa nodhi ir ji, mowuoyo kodgi." 
Exodus20:1 Nyasaye nowuoyo kowacho wechegi: 
Exodus20:2 “An e Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu, mane ogolou e piny Misri kuma ne ubedoe wasumbni." 
Exodus20:3 “Kik ubed gi Nyasaye moro, to mak mana an." 
Exodus20:4 “Kik ulos kido moro mopa kata gima chalo gi gimoro manie polo malo, kata manie piny mwalo, kata mana manie pi ma e bwo piny." 
Exodus20:5 Kik ukulrunigi, kata lamogi kik ulamgi, nikech an Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu an Nyasaye ma janyiego. Akumo nyithind joma ochaya nikech richo jonywolgi nyaka tieng’ mar adek gi mar ang’wen," 
Exodus20:6 to tienge gana gi gana mohera kendo momako chikna, to ahero gi hera mosiko." 
Exodus20:7 “Kik uluong nying Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu kayiem nono, nimar anakum ng’ato ka ng’ato mokonyore gi nyinga e yo ma ok ni kare." 
Exodus20:8 “Paruru chieng’ Sabato, kendo uwale ni Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Exodus20:9 Nyaka uti tijeu duto kuom ndalo auchiel," 
Exodus20:10 to chieng’ mar abiriyo en chieng’ yweyo mowal ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu. Chieng’no, un kaachiel gi yawuotu kod nyiu, kata wasumbu machwo gi mamon, kata jambu, kata mana jodak manie miechu, kik ti tich moro," 
Exodus20:11 nimar Ruoth Nyasaye mochweyo polo gi piny kod nam, kaachiel gi gik moko duto manie igi kuom ndalo auchiel, to chieng’ mar abiriyo noyueyo. Mano emomiyo Ruoth Nyasaye noguedho chieng’ Sabato, kowale mondo obed maler." 
Exodus20:12 “Luor wuoru gi meru, eka mondo idag aming’a e piny ma Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu biro miyou." 
Exodus20:13 “Kik ineki. 
Exodus20:14 “Kik iterri. 
Exodus20:15 “Kik ikwal. 
Exodus20:16 “Kik ihang ni ng’ato wach. 
Exodus20:17 “Kik igomb od ng’ato, kata chi ng’ato, kata misumba ng’ato, kata dher ng’ato, kata kanj ng’ato, kata gimoro amora ma ng’ato nigo.”" 
Exodus20:18 Kane ji duto oneno ka polo mor kendo mil, bende kane giwinjo ka tung’ ywak, kendo gineno ka got dum iro, ne gikirni, mi gichung’ gi chien." 
Exodus20:19 Ne giwacho ni Musa niya, “In ema mondo iwuo kodwa, to wabiro winjo wachni. To ka Nyasaye ema owuoyo kodwa, to wabiro tho.”" 
Exodus20:20 Musa nodwokogi niya, “Kik uluor, nimar Nyasaye osebiro mana ni mondo otemu, kendo omi usik kuluore mondo kik utim richo.”" 
Exodus20:21 Ji nochung’ gi chien, to Musa kende ema nosudo machiegni gi bor polo mapek mane Nyasaye nie iye." 
Exodus20:22 Ruoth Nysaye nowacho ni Musa niya, “Nyis jo-Israel kama: ‘Koro ung’eyo ni asewuoyo kodu gie polo." 
Exodus20:23 Kik ulos nyiseche mag fedha kata mag dhahabu mondo ulam kaachiel koda. 
Exodus20:24 Nyaka ulosna kendo-mar-misango mar lowo, kendo utimie misengni miwang’o pep, kod misengni mag sawo, mutimo gi rombu kod dhou. Kamoro amora ma achiko ni mondo ulamae, to anabie kendo naguedhue." 
Exodus20:25 Kapo ni uloso na kendo-mar-misango gi kite, to kik ugere gi kite mopa, nikech kupayogi, to umiyo kendono bedo mogak." 
Exodus20:26 Kik ng’ato dhi e kendona-mar-misango koidho raidhi, nimar dipo ka duge oneno.’ ”" 
Exodus21:1 “Chike ma nyaka imi jo-Israel e magi: 
Exodus21:2 “Ka ng’ato ong’iewo misumba ma ja-Hibrania, to misumbano notine kuom higni auchiel, to e higa mar abiriyo nyaka oweye oa, mak ochulo gimoro." 
Exodus21:3 Kane obiro kapok okendo, to enodog kende. To kane obiro kosekendo, to enodog ir chiege." 
Exodus21:4 To ka ruodhe ema omiye dhako, mi onywologo nyithindo, dhakono gi nyithindogo, nyaka dong’ ni ruodhe, to ng’atno noa kende." 
Exodus21:5 To kapo ni misumbano ohulo ratiro niya, ‘Ahero ruodha gi chiega kod nyithinda, omiyo ok adwar a’," 
Exodus21:6 to ruodhe nyaka tere e nyim Nyasaye, kendo e dhoot kata e sis dhoot, mi otuch ite gi riw, kendo ng’atno nobed misumbane nyaka chieng’." 
Exodus21:7 “Ka ng’ato ong’iewo nyar ng’ato mondo obed misumbane, to ok nowe nyakono oa kaka iweyo wasumbini machwo." 
Exodus21:8 To ka ok otoyo ruodhe manong’iewe ka dwaro kende, ruodheno nyaka weye mondo ng’ato oware. To ok oyiene mondo ong’iewe ni japiny moro, nikech osewuonde." 
Exodus21:9 Ka odwaro ni mondo wuode okende, to nyaka osewe kaka dosew nyare owuon." 
Exodus21:10 Ka omedo dhako machielo, to nyaka one ni pod omiyo mokwongono chiemo, gi lewni, kendo onindo e ode." 
Exodus21:11 To ka ok otimne gik moko adego, to nyaka oweye oa mak ochulo gimoro." 
Exodus21:12 “Ngato ka ng’ato mogoyo wadgi monego, en bende nonege." 
Exodus21:13 To ka obothne, to onyalo ringo mondo odhi oresre kuma abiro nyisou." 
Exodus21:14 To ka ng’ato okiyo wadgi, monego maroyiem, to unugole kata mana e kendona mar misango mondo onege." 
Exodus21:15 “Ng’at mogoyo wuon kata min nyaka negi. 
Exodus21:16 “Ng’at mokwalo dhano nyaka negi, kata da bed ni oyud koseng’iewe, kata koyud ka pod en kode." 
Exodus21:17 “Ng’at mokuong’o wuon kata min nyaka negi. 
Exodus21:18 “Ka ji dhaw, mi ng’ato ogoyo wadgi gi kidi kata gi adhong’, to jal mogono ok otho, to obedo matuo e pien," 
Exodus21:19 kendo bang’e ochango, ma koro onyalo wuotho oko kata mana kosirore gi luth, to jal mane ogoyeno ok nobed gi bura. To nyaka ochul gimoro kuom kinde ma jalo oseketho, kendo nyaka one ni othiedhe, mochango chuth." 
Exodus21:20 “Ka ng’ato ogoyo misumbane ma dichwo kata madhako gi luth motho e wago, to nyaka kume." 
Exodus21:21 To ka misumbaneno obet mangima kuom ndalo achiel kata ariyo, to ok nokume, nikech misumba en mwandu ruodhe." 
Exodus21:22 “Ka chwo moko gore, mi moro otuomore kuom dhako ma yach, mi dhakono iye okirore, to tuo moro ok oluwe, ng’at mohinyeno nyaka chul gima chwor dhakono dwaro, ka jong’ad bura oyiego." 
Exodus21:23 E kinde akinda ma ng’ato ohinyo wadgi, to kum nyaka bed maromre gi hinyruok: Ngima kar ngima," 
Exodus21:24 wang’ kar wang’, lak kar lak, tielo kar tielo," 
Exodus21:25 weng’o kar weng’o, lero kar lero, kendo chwat kar chwat." 
Exodus21:26 “Ka ng’ato ogoyo wang’ misumbane ma dichwo kata madhako motucho, to nyaka owe ni misumbaneno thuolo mondo oa, kar chule pesa mar wang’eno." 
Exodus21:27 Kata ka ng’ato omuko lak misumbane, to nyaka owene thuolo mondo oa, kar chule lakeno." 
Exodus21:28 “Ka rwath ochwowo dichwo kata dhako moro, monego, to nyaka go rwadhno gi kite mi tho, kendo ringre kik cham. To wuon rwadhno ok noyud kum." 
Exodus21:29 To ka rwadhno osebedo ka chwowo ji, kendo osesiem wuon-go, to otamore tueye, mi onego ng’ato, to wuon-go bende nyaka negi." 
Exodus21:30 To ka buch tho oloki, moketne chudo, to nyaka ochul gimoro amora mowachne, mondo owargo ngimane." 
Exodus21:31 Ka rwath onego nyathi moro, bed ni en wuowi kata nyako, to chik achielno ema nyaka tigo." 
Exodus21:32 To ka rwath onego misumba ma dichwo kata madhako, to wuon rwadh-no nyaka chul ruodh misumbano fedha moromo nus kilo, kendo rwadhno nyaka go gi kite mi tho." 
Exodus21:33 “Ka ng’ato oelo dho bur, moweyo nono, kata ka okunyo bur, to ok oumo dhoge, mi rwath kata faras onyumoree," 
Exodus21:34 to nyaka ochul chiayono. Enochul wuon chiayo pesa, to chiayo mothono nodong’ne." 
Exodus21:35 “Ka rwadh ng’ato onego rwadh ng’at machielo, to ji ariyogo nyaka lok rwath mangimano pesa, mondo gipogre, kendo ring chiayo mothono bende nyaka gipogre." 
Exodus21:36 To ka ong’ere ni rwadhno jachwow ruedhi wetene, to wuon-go nyaka chul rwath kar rwadhno, to chiayo mothono nodong’ne." 
Exodus22:1 “Ka ng’ato okwalo rwath kata rombo, mi oyang’o kata ong’iewo, to nyaka ochul ruedhi abich kar rwadhno, kata rombe ang’wen kar rombono." 
Exodus22:2 Nyaka ochule te. To ka jakuogno jachan, to nyaka ong’iewe ka misumba, mondo pesa mong’iewego obed chudo kar gima osekwalo. To ka oyude gi chiayono ka pod ngima, kata bed ni en rwath kata kanyna kata mana rombo, to nyaka ochul nyadiriyo. “Ka ojuk jakuo ka turo ot, mi onege, to ok noyal ng’at monegeno e buch nek. To ka gima kamano otimore ka chieng’ osewuok, to nyaka yal ng’at monegeno e buch nek." 
Exodus22:3  
Exodus22:4  
Exodus22:5 “Ka ng’ato kwayo jamni e puoth cham, kata e puoth mzabibu, moweyo jambe ochamo puoth ng’at machielo, to nyaka ochul chamgo gi cham mabeyo, kata ochul olembego gi olembe mabeyo mag puothe owuon." 
Exodus22:6 “Ka mach omuoch, kendo olandore, momako yugi, kendo owang’o tuche mag cham mobeti, kata cham ma pok oka, kata mana puodho ngima, ng’at momoko majno nyaka chul kar gik mokethorego." 
Exodus22:7 “Ka ng’ato omiyo wadgi pesa kata gimoro ni mondo okanne, mi okwal gigo e od wadgino, koyud jakuogno to nyaka ochul gik mokwalgo nyadiriyo." 
Exodus22:8 To ka ok oyude, to nyaka wuon odno dhi e nyim Nyasaye mondo okuong’re ni ok okawo gino." 
Exodus22:9 “Gimoro amora mochachni, kata rwath kata kanyna, kata rombo, kata law, kata gimoro amora mokwany ma ji ariyo laro, nyaka ter wachne e nyim Nyasaye. Jal ma Nyasaye onyiso ni e jaketho, nyaka chul wadgi mokethoneno nyadiriyo." 
Exodus22:10 “Ka ng’ato oriembo ni wadgi kanyna, kata dhiang’, kata rombo, kata chiayo moro amora, mi chiayono otho, kata ohinyore, kata ope e kwath, ka ng’ama neno onge," 
Exodus22:11 to ng’at mane oriembnegono nyaka kuong’re e nyim Nyasaye, konyiso ni en ok okawe. To ka oyud ni ok okwale adier, to wuon-go nyaka we wachno kamano, kendo ng’atno ok nochule." 
Exodus22:12 To ka okwal chiayono kuome, to nyaka ochul wuon-go." 
Exodus22:13 To ka ondiek ema onege nyaka okel ringe modong’ mondo ji one, nikech ok onego ochul gima ondiek ema onego." 
Exodus22:14 “Ka ng’ato oholo chiach wadgi, to bang’e chiayono ohinyore kata otho ka wuon-go onge, to jal moholono nyaka chule." 
Exodus22:15 To ka chiayono ohinyore kata otho ka wuon-go nitie, to jaholono ok chule. To ka en gima ichuloe gimoro, to wuon chiayono noyud mana chudono kende." 
Exodus22:16 “Ka ng’ato osero nyako ngili ma pok okendi mi oriworego, to nyaka okende." 
Exodus22:17 To ka wuon nyako odagi ni ng’atno ok kend nyare, to nyaka ng’atno chul pesa moromo nywomo nyako ngili." 
Exodus22:18 “Kik uwe dhako ma jajwok bed mangima, to nyaka unege." 
Exodus22:19 “Ng’ato moterore gi chiayo nyaka negi. 
Exodus22:20 “Ng’ato motimo liswa ni nyasaye moro, ma ok Ruoth Nyasaye, nyaka negi." 
Exodus22:21 “Kik uthag jadak, kata kik uthire, nikech un bende ne un jodak e piny Misri," 
Exodus22:22 bende kik uthag chi liel kata nyathi ma kich. 
Exodus22:23 Ka uthagogi, mi giywakna mondo akonygi, to anawinjgi," 
Exodus22:24 kendo anakech kodu, mi anakel lweny ma unuthoe. Kamano mondu nodong’ mond liete, kendo nyithindu nobed kiye." 
Exodus22:25 “Ka iholo ng’ata moro ma jachan pesa, to kik ikaw kuome ohala, ka jahol pesa." 
Exodus22:26 Kata ka ng’ato osingoni lawe, to nyaka idwokne lawno kapok chieng’ opodho," 
Exodus22:27 nikech mano e lawe kende moumorego. Ka ok itimo kamano, to ere gima donindie? Ka oywakna ni mondo akonye, to anawinje, nikech ang’won." 
Exodus22:28 “Kik uyany Nyasaye, kendo kik ukuong’ jotendu." 
Exodus22:29 “Kik utamru miya chiwo moa kuom chambu, kata kuom divai, kata kuom mo. Yawuotu makayo bende nyaka umiya," 
Exodus22:30 kendo utim kamano gi jambu, bende. Nyaka gibed gi min-gi kuom ndalo abiriyo, to chieng’ mar aboro unumiyagi." 
Exodus22:31 “Unubed ji mowalna, omiyo kik ucham ring’o ma ondiek onego oko e thim, to nyaka uwite mana ni guogi." 
Exodus23:1 “Kik ijig wach, kendo kik ikony ng’at ma jaketho, kibedo janeno mar miriambo." 
Exodus23:2 Kik itim gimoro marach mana nikech iluoro koma ji ng’enyie, kata kik iketh bura mana nikech idwaro chwako koma ji ng’enyie." 
Exodus23:3 To bende kik idog ni ng’at modhier kayiem. 
Exodus23:4 “Kineno dher jasiki kata kanje ka ringo lal, to nyaka igeng’e mi idwoke ni wuon-go." 
Exodus23:5 Ka iyudo kanj ng’at moro ma mon kodi kopodho gi misike, to nyaka ikony wuon-go chunge, kata da bed ni ok idwar konye." 
Exodus23:6 “Kik uketh buch jachan, kiyale." 
Exodus23:7 Beduru mabor gi wach mar miriambo, kendo kik umi ng’at maonge ketho ng’adne buch tho, nimar ok nawe ng’at motimo marach machalo kamano." 
Exodus23:8 Kik ucham asoya nikech asoya mono kata ng’at maber wacho adiera, kendo owito buch ng’at ma onge gi ketho." 
Exodus23:9 “Kik usand jodak, nikech ung’eyo paro ma jodak nigo, nimar un bende ne un jodak e piny Misri." 
Exodus23:10 “Unyalo puro lopu kuom higni auchiel, kendo kayo gik monyakie." 
Exodus23:11 To e higa mar abiriyo nyaka uwe onindi mak opure, mondo jou modhier ocham gik moloth kuno. To le mae thim nocham gik ma joma odhier oweyo kuno. Puotheu mag mzabibu, gi mag zeituni bende nyaka uwe kamano." 
Exodus23:12 “Unuti kuom ndalo auchiel, to chieng’ mar abiriyo kik uti, mondo dhou gi kenjeu oyue, kendo mondo chuny wasumbu kod chuny jodak oduogi." 
Exodus23:13 “Mak uru weche duto ma asenyisou. Kik ulam nyiseche mamoko, kendo kik umul nyinggi." 
Exodus23:14 “Nyaka utimna sawo didek e higa: 
Exodus23:15 Unurit Sap Makati ma ok ketie Thowi kaka nachikou, kuchamo makati ma ok ketie thowi kuom ndalo abiriyo e kinde moketie e due mar Abib, ni mar dueno ema ne uae Misri. Kik ng’ato bi e nyima gi lwete nono." 
Exodus23:16 Kukayo cham mane uchwoyo e lopu, to nyaka utim Sap Keyo, kukelona cham mukwongo kayo. Bende unutim Sap Olembe e giko higa, ka usepono olembe puotheu mag mzabibu kod mag zeituni." 
Exodus23:17 Kinde adekgo e higa, jou machwo duto nyaka bi e nyima an Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Exodus23:18 “E kinde ma utimonae misango gi chiayo, to kik uchiw gimoro moketie thowi, kendo kik uwe bor chiayo motimnago misango dong’ nyaka piny ru mak uwang’o pep." 
Exodus23:19 “Cham mabeyoe moloyo mukwongo kayo, nyaka ukel e Od Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu. “Kutedo nyadiel, to kik uolie cha min mare." 
Exodus23:20 “Koro aoro malaika mondo otelnu e yo, koritou nyaka kuma aseiko." 
Exodus23:21 Nyaka uwinj wachne, kendo utim kaka owacho. Kik utamru winje, nikech kutamoru kamano, to ok nowenu richo ma kamano, nimar an ema an kode." 
Exodus23:22 To ka uwinjo wachne, mutimo duto mawachonu, to anakednu gi wasigu, kendo anathag joma thagou." 
Exodus23:23 Malaikana notel e nyimu, kendo noteru e piny ma jo-Amor gi jo-Hiti gi jo-Perizi gi jo-Hivi kod jo-Jebus odakie, mi anatiek ogendinigo." 
Exodus23:24 To kik ukulru ni nyiseche jogo, kata kik ulamgi. Bende kik utim gik ma jogo timo. Nyaka uketh nyisechegi chuth, kendo nyaka umuk sirni maggi ma gilamo." 
Exodus23:25 Lamauru, an Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu, mi anaguedhu gi chiemo kod pi, bende anatiek tuoche duto kuomu." 
Exodus23:26 Ong’e dhako ma iye nokirre e pinyu, kendo onge ma nobed migumba. Bende anami udag aming’a." 
Exodus23:27 “Anaor kihondko otel nyimu mondo ochand joma dwaro kedo kodu, mi anami wasiku duto ringu." 
Exodus23:28 Bende anaor luoro mondo otel nyimu, kendo luoro nogo noriemb jo-Hivi gi jo-Kanaan kod jo-Hiti, mondo owenu thuolo." 
Exodus23:29 Ok nariembgi duto e higa achiel, nimar dipo ka piny odong’ nono, molokore thim, kendo ondiegi dinywolre mi thagu." 
Exodus23:30 To anariembgi matintin nyaka chop kusemedoru mang’eny moromo kawo pinyno duto. 
Exodus23:31 Anayar tong’ pinyu, kochakore e Nam Makwar nyak Nam Maduong’ manie tong’ jo-Filistia, kendo kochakore e thim man yo milambo, nyaka aora Yufrate. Anami ulo jopinyno, mi unuriembgi." 
Exodus23:32 Kik utim kodgi winjruok kendo kik ulam nyisechegi," 
Exodus23:33 kik uwe gidag e pinyu nimar dipo ka gimiyo uketho e nyima mi ulamo nyisechegi. Mano dilokrenu obadho.” 
Exodus24:1 Noyudo ka Ruoth Nyasaye osewacho ni Musa niya, “Bi ira e got, kaachiel gi Harun gi Nadab gi Abihu kod jodong Israel piero abiriyo. To kapok uchopo machiegni, kulreuru mondo ulem." 
Exodus24:2 In kendi, Musa, ema nichop machiegni koda. Jomokogo ok nosud ira, to bende onge ng’ato ang’ata ma noidh kodi ku.”" 
Exodus24:3 Musa nodhi monyiso ji chike kod buche duto mag Ruoth Nyasaye. Ji duto nodwoke niya, “Wayie timo gik moko duto ma Ruoth Nyasaye osewacho.”" 
Exodus24:4 Musa nondiko chike duto mag Ruoth Nyasaye. To kinyne gokinyi nogero kendo-mar-misango e tiend got, kendo nochungo kite apar gariyo mag rapar, maromre gi kar romb dhout Israel apar gariyo." 
Exodus24:5 Eka nooro yawuowi moko ma jo-Israel monego ruedhi, mi gitimogo ni Ruoth Nyasaye misengni miwang’o pep, kod misengni mag sawo." 
Exodus24:6 Musa nokawo remo moko, moolo e tewni, to remo modong’ nokiro e kendo mar-misango." 
Exodus24:7 Bang’e nokawo kitabu mondikie weche mag singruokgo, mosomo matek mondo ji duto owinji. Giduto ne giwacho niya, “Wayie winjo Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo wanatim duto mosechiko.”" 
Exodus24:8 Bang’ mano Musa nokawo remo, mokiro kuom ji, kowacho niya, “Ma e remo mar singruok mane Ruoth Nyasaye osemiyo utimo kode, kaluwore gi weche manie kitabuni.”" 
Exodus24:9 Musa gi Harun gi Nadab kod Abihu, kaachiel gi jodong Israel piero abiriyo nodhi e got, moneno Nyasach Israel." 
Exodus24:10 Nochung’ ewi gima chalo gi laro molos gi kit ombo marieny mana ka polo. 
Exodus24:11 To Ruoth Nyasaye ne ok ohinyo jodong Israelgo. Ne gineno Ruoth Nyasaye, mi gichiemo kode kendo gimetho." 
Exodus24:12 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa niya, “Bi ira e got ku, mondo ibed ka. Abiro miyi kite mopamore ma asendikoe buche kod chike mondo ipuonj ji.”" 
Exodus24:13 Musa kaachiel gi Joshua jatichne nodhi e god Nyasaye. 
Exodus24:13 Musa kaachiel gi Joshua jatichne nodhi e god Nyasaye. 
Exodus24:14 Noyudo Musa osewacho ni jodong Israel niya, “Ritwauru ka, nyaka waduogi. Harun kod Hur eki odong’ kodu. Ng’ato ka ng’ato man gi wach modwaro loso to mondo odhi irgi.”" 
Exodus24:15 Kamano Musa nodhi ewi got, kendo bor polo noimo got." 
Exodus24:16 Duong’ maler mar Ruoth Nyasaye nolor ewi got Sinai, mi bor polo noimo got kuom ndalo auchiel. To chieng’ mar abiriyo Ruoth Nyasaye noluongo Musa gi e bor polo." 
Exodus24:17 Duong’ maler mar Ruoth Nyasaye ne chalo ni jo-Israel mana ka mach maduong’ maliel ewi got. 
Exodus24:18 Musa nodonjo e bor polono, modhi ewi got, kendo nobet kuno kuom ndalo piero ang’wen odiechieng gotieno." 
Exodus25:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa niya," 
Exodus25:2 “Nyis jo-Israel mondo okelna chiwo, kendo ichokna chiwo moro amora kuom ji duto moyie golo kuom herogi." 
Exodus25:3 Gik ma onego ichok e magi: Dhahabu gi fedha kod mula," 
Exodus25:4 kaachiel gi law mambulu kod marathuol kod makwar, kod law katana maber, gi yie diek," 
Exodus25:5 gi piende rombe molok gi range makwar gi piende monyong’ gi yiend shita," 
Exodus25:6 gi mor taya kod gik mang’ue ng’ar," 
Exodus25:7 gi kite mibiro keto e law dolo miluongo ni efod kod law agoko. 
Exodus25:8 Bang’ mano gigerna Kama Ler mondo adag kodgi. 
Exodus25:9 To nyaka gere kaachiel gi gige duto, kiluwo mana kido ma abiro nyisi." 
Exodus25:10 “Los sanduk ma borne oromo mita achiel, to lachne nus mita, kendo borne modhi malo bende nus mita." 
Exodus25:11 Bawe gi dhahabu maler, oko gi iye, kendo ilosne laini mar dhahabu molwuoro bethene duto." 
Exodus25:12 Thedhne ratege ang’wen mag dhahabu, kendo ketgi e tiendene ang’wen. Ratege ariyo nobed e bathe konchiel, to ariyo e bathe komachielo." 
Exodus25:13 Los ludhe ariyo gi yiend sida, mi ibawgi gi dhahabu," 
Exodus25:14 kendo irwakgi e ratege manie bath sanduk koni gi koni mondo oting’go sanduk. 
Exodus25:15 Ludhego nyaka sik ei ratege, ma ok ogolgi oko." 
Exodus25:16 To ketie kite ariyo mag rapar ma abiro miyi. 
Exodus25:17 “Losne raum mar dhahabu ma borne oromo mita achiel, to lachne nus mita, obed kar-ng’wono." 
Exodus25:18 Kaw dhahabu, ithedhgo kido ariyo machalo gi malaika miluongo ni kerubi, mondo gibed gimoro achiel gi raum, mondo obed kar ng’wono." 
Exodus25:19 Kerubi achiel nobed e dho raum konchiel, kendo achiel e dhoge komachielo." 
Exodus25:20 Ginibed ka giyaro buombegi malo mondo gigeng’ raum, kendo ginimanyre, ka ging’iyo wi raum." 
Exodus25:21 Ket raumno e dho sanduk, to iye ketie kite ariyo mag rapar ma abiro miyi." 
Exodus25:22 Kanyo ema naromie kodi, kendo ka an ewi raum e kind kerubi ariyo manie wi Sandug Rapar, anamiyi chikena duto, iter ni jo-Israel." 
Exodus25:23 “Los mesa gi yiend sida, ma borne romo mita achiel, to lachne nus mita, kendo borne modhi malo bende nus mita." 
Exodus25:24 Bawe gi dhahabu maler, kendo ilosne laini mar dhahabu molworo bethene duto." 
Exodus25:25 Chue mithe alwora ma lachne romo tat lwedo achiel, kendo ichue dir mitheno gi dhahabu." 
Exodus25:26 Ilos ratege ang’wen mag dhahabu, kendo ichomgi e tunge ang’wen mag mesa kama tiendene nitie, mondo oting’ego." 
Exodus25:27 Ratege ma norwakie ludhe miting’ego nobed e mithe. 
Exodus25:28 Ilos ludhego gi yiend sida, kendo ibawgi gi dhahabu. Gin ema noting’ kodgi mesano." 
Exodus25:29 Los tewni gi kikombe gi agulni kod agwetni mitiyogo kitimo misengni miolo piny. Gigo duto nyaka los gi dhahabu maler. 
Exodus25:30 To makati miketo e nyima pile nyaka bed e mesano ndalo duto. 
Exodus25:31 “Ilos rachung taya gi dhahabu maler. Tiende kod kore to mondo ilos gi dhahabu mothedhi, kendo maupe mogorie, kaachiel, gi thiepegi kod obokegi, nyaka los obed gimoro achiel kode." 
Exodus25:32 Nobed gi bede auchiel moa e bathe koni gi koni, adek e bathe konchiel, kendo adek e bathe komachielo." 
Exodus25:33 Moro ka moro nyaka bed gi maupe adek mogor kaachiel gi thiepegi kod obokegi, machal gi thiep oyungu." 
Exodus25:34 E kor taya hie nyaka bedie maupe ang’wen man gi thiepe kod oboke machalo gi thiep oyungu. 
Exodus25:35 Bede ariyo ariyo mag rachungino nyaka bed gi maua achiel e bwogi. 
Exodus25:36 Maupego gi bedego kod rachungino nobed gimoro achiel mothedh gi dhahabu maler. 
Exodus25:37 To bende ilos teyni abiriyo ni rachungi, kendo iketgi malo mondo giliel ka gimenyo yo ka nyime." 
Exodus25:38 Rangis teyni kod tepe nyaka los gi dhahabu maler. 
Exodus25:39 To nyaka ikonyri gi kilo piero abich mag dhahabu maler kuom loso rachungino, kaachiel gi gige duto." 
Exodus25:40 To nyaka ine ni ilosogi machal gi kido mane onyisi ewi got. 
Exodus26:1 “Los Hema Maler gi pasia apar mag law katana maber. Nyaka gor kuomgi kido mar kerubi gi usi mambulu gi maralik kod makwar, ma jatweng’o ma olony ema ogoro." 
Exodus26:2 Bor pasia ka pasia nyaka bed mita apar gang’wen, to lachne mita ariyo, kendo giduto nyaka gibed maromre." 
Exodus26:3 Abich kuomgi noriw kaachiel, kendo abich modong’ bende noriw kamano." 
Exodus26:4 Nyaka ilos tonde mambulu piero abich e riak pasia matung’ kuom pasia abich mokwongo, kendo tonde piero abich moko e riak pasia matung’ kuom pasia abich modong’." 
Exodus26:5 Tondego nyaka bed momanyore. 
Exodus26:6 Bende ilos ramekni piero abich mag dhahabu kendo iriwgo pasia ariyo momanyorego, mondo Hema Maler obed gimoro achiel." 
Exodus26:7 “Los Hema gi pasia apar gachiel mag yie diek, mondo obed hema ma oko maumo Hema Maler." 
Exodus26:8 Bor pasia ka pasia nyaka bed mita apar gabich, to lachne mita ariyo. Giduto nyaka gibed maromre." 
Exodus26:9 Riw pasia abich kaachiel, kendo auchiel modong’ bende iriw kamano. Bang’e ban pasia mar auchiel mondo obed e dho Hema gi malo." 
Exodus26:10 Los tonde piero abich e riak pasia matung’ kuom pasia abich, kendo tonde piero abich moko e riak pasia matung’ kuom pasia auchiel." 
Exodus26:11 Bende los ramekni piero abich mag mula, kendo irwakgi e tonde mondo iriwgo hema obed gimoro achiel." 
Exodus26:12 Bath hema modong’ koliero, nyaka geng’ tok Hema Maler." 
Exodus26:13 Kamano hema maoko biro bedo mabor moloyo pasia maiye gi nus mita koni gi koni, omiyo obiro liero mondo ogeng’ Hema Maler." 
Exodus26:14 To bende los raum mar piende imbe molok gi range makwar mondo oumgo hema maokono, kendo raum machielo molos gi piende monyong’, mondo obed ewi mokwongono." 
Exodus26:15 “Nyaka ilos ni Hema Maler sirni mag yiende shita. 
Exodus26:16 Bor mar siro ka siro nyaka bed mita abich, to lachne nus mita." 
Exodus26:17 Siro ka siro nyaka bed gi tiendene ariyo moriw kaachiel. Sirni duto mag Hema Maler nyaka los machal kamano. 
Exodus26:18 Kiloso sirnigo, to nyaka ilos piero ariyo migerogo sisi mar Hema Maler mochomo yo milambo," 
Exodus26:19 kendo ilos rachungi piero ang’wen mag fedha mirwakoe sirnigo. Rwak tiende ariyo mag siro mokwongo e rachungi ariyo, kendo itim kamano gi sirni duto." 
Exodus26:20 Sisi mar Hema Maler mochomo yo nyandwat bende nyaka ilosne sirni piero ariyo," 
Exodus26:21 kaachiel gi rachungi piero ang’wen mag fedha. Rwak siro ka siro ei rachungi ariyo ariyo. 
Exodus26:22 Bende los sirni auchiel ni tok Hema Maler koma odok yo podho chieng’," 
Exodus26:23 kaachiel gi ariyo mamoko mibiro keto e konde ariyo man yo ka tok Hema Maler. 
Exodus26:24 Sirni mag kondego nyaka riw gi ratego achiel, chakre ka tiendegi nyaka malo. Sirni ariyogo duto nyaka los machal." 
Exodus26:25 Kamano ginibed sirni aboro kod rachungi apar gauchiel mag fedha. Siro ka siro mondo orwak ei rachunge ariyo ariyo. 
Exodus26:26 “Los rariw apar gabich gi yiend shita. 
Exodus26:27 Rariw abich obed mag sirni mag bath Hema Maler konchiel, kendo abich mamoko obed mag sirni molosgo ka toke, mochomo yo podho chieng’." 
Exodus26:28 Rariw ka rariw madiere mondo okadh e kor sirni, koa tung’ konchiel nyaka tung’ komachielo." 
Exodus26:29 Nyaka gibaw sirnigo gi dhahabu, kendo iketnigi ratege mag dhahabu mondo omak rariwgo, ma bende nyaka ibaw gi dhahabu." 
Exodus26:30 Kamano nyaka ilos Hema Maler, kiluwo mana kido mane onyisi ewi got." 
Exodus26:31 “Twang’ pasia mar law katana maber. Nyaka jatueng’o molony gor kuome kido mag kerubi gi usi mambulu gi maralik kod makwar. 
Exodus26:32 Ng’aw pasiano gi rang’aw mag dhahabu e sirni ang’wen mag yiend shita, mobaw gi dhahabu, kendo morwak ei rachungi ang’wen mag fedha." 
Exodus26:33 Kiseliere e rang’awgo, eka iket Sandug Rapar e toke gi yo ka iye. Kamano pasiano nopog kind Ka Maler kod Kama Ler Moloyo." 
Exodus26:34 Bang’e ket raum ewi Sandug Rapar ei Kama Ler Moloyo. 
Exodus26:35 Mesa nyaka ket yo nyandwat gi yo ka oko mar pasia, to rachung taya iket momanyore gi mesa, yo milambo mar Hema Maler." 
Exodus26:36 Los ni dho Hema pasia mar law katana maber. Nyaka gorie maradadi gi usi mambulu gi maralik kod makwar. 
Exodus26:37 Los ni pasiano sirni abich gi yiend shita, mi ibaw gi dhahabu, kendo iketnigi rang’aw mag dhahabu kod rachunge abich mag mula." 
Exodus27:1 “Los kendo-mar-misango gi yiend shita. Borne gi lachne mondo obed mita ariyo gi nus. 
Exodus27:2 Nyaka ilosne tunge ang’wen e kondene mondo gibed gimoro achiel kode, kendo ibawe gi mula." 
Exodus27:3 Bende losne agulni mag golo buru kod mo, kaachiel gi rajow gi tewni gi rachwow kod tep mach. Giduto nyaka ilosgi gi mula." 
Exodus27:4 Losne gimoro mar mula machalo gi sing’enge, kendo ikelne ratege achiel achiel mag mula e kondene ang’wen." 
Exodus27:5 Kete e bwo ndiri molworo kendo-mar-misango gi yo ka piny, mondo ochop mana e kor kendo-mar-misango." 
Exodus27:6 Los ni kendono ludhe mag shita, kendo ibawgi gi mula." 
Exodus27:7 Norwakgi e ratege man e bath kendo koni gi koni, mondo oting’ego." 
Exodus27:8 Nyaka ilos kendo-mar-misango gi bao, to iye mondo obed thuolo, ka i sanduk. Lose mana kaka ne onyisi ewi got." 
Exodus27:9 “Los laru ni Hema Maler. Koma odok yo milambo nyaka bed gi pasia mar law katana maber ma borne romo mita piero abich," 
Exodus27:10 mong’aw e sirni piero ariyo, morwak e rachungi piero ariyo mag mula. To rang’aw kod ratege miriwogo sirnigo nyaka bed mag fedha." 
Exodus27:11 Kamano koma odok yo nyandwat bende nyaka bed gi pasia ma borne romo mita piero abich, mong’aw e sirni piero ariyo, morwak e rachungi piero ariyo mag mula. Rang’epi kod ratege miriwogo sirni bende nyaka bed mag fedha." 
Exodus27:12 To lach laru modok yo podho chieng’ nyaka bed gi pasia ma borne romo mita piero ariyo gabich, mong’aw e sirni apar, morwak e rachungi apar." 
Exodus27:13 To lachne koma omanyo yo wuok chieng’, bende borne nyaka rom mita piero ariyo gabich." 
Exodus27:14 E dir rangach koni gi koni nyaka bedie pasia ma borne romo mita abiriyo gi nus. 
Exodus27:15 Pasia ka pasia nyaka ng’aw e sirni adek, morwak e rachungi adek." 
Exodus27:16 To e dhoranga laru iketie pasia mar law katana maber, mogorie maradadi gi usi mambulu gi maralik kod makwar. Pasiano nong’aw e sirni ang’wen morwak e rachungi ang’wen." 
Exodus27:17 Sirni duto molworo laru nyaka bed gi ratege mag fedha, kod rachungi mag mula." 
Exodus27:18 Kamano bor laru biro bedo mita piero abich, to lachne mita piero ariyo gabich, kendo borne modhi malo mita ariyo gi nus. Pasiano nyaka los gi law katana maber, kendo rachungi duto nyaka bed mag mula." 
Exodus27:19 Gik moko duto mibiro tiyogo e Hema Maler, kaachiel gi loyene duto, kod mago mag laru, nyaka los gi mula." 
Exodus27:20 “In iwuon nyaka ichik jo-Israel mondo okelni mor zeituni maliw mondo oliel e taya pile. 
Exodus27:21 Tayano nyaka bed ei Hemb Romo ma Nyasaye romoe gi joge, gi yoka oko mar pasia mogeng’o Sandug Rapar. Harun gi yawuote nyaka rite pile mondo oliel e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, chakre odhiambo nyaka piny ru. Chikni omako jo-Israel kod nyikwagi nyaka chieng’." 
Exodus28:1 “In iwuon nyaka iluong Harun owadu gi yawuote, ma Nadab gi Abihu gi Eleazar kod Ithamar, kuom jo-Israel mondo iket obed jodolona." 
Exodus28:2 Twang’ni Harun owadu lep dolo, mondo omedu duong’ gi chia." 
Exodus28:3 Nyis jotich molony ma asemiyo rieko olos ni Harun lewni morwako kokete jadolona. 
Exodus28:4 Lewni monego gilos e magi: Law agoko gi law dolo miluongo ni efod, gi aroya, gi law akor mogorie maridadi, kaachiel gi kilemba kod okanda. Ginibed lewni maler ma Harun owadu gi yawuote rwako ka tiyona tich dolo." 
Exodus28:5 Nyaka losgi gi dhahabu kod usi mambulu gi maralik kod makwar, kod law katana maber." 
Exodus28:6 “Bende gilos law dolo miluongo ni efod gi dhahabu kod usi mambulu gi maralik kod makwar, kod law katana maber ma jatueng’o molony oloso." 
Exodus28:7 To obed gi misibe ariyo mitueyego gok, gi yo ka nyime kod yo ka chien." 
Exodus28:8 Okanda man kuome nyaka chue machal kode, kendo en bende nyaka lose gi dhahabu kod usi mambulu gi maralik kod makwar, kod law katana maber." 
Exodus28:9 Kaw kite ariyo mag berul mondo indikie nying yawuot Israel. 
Exodus28:10 E kidi mokwongo ndikie nying’ auchiel, to nying’ auchiel modong’ ndik e kidi mar ariyo, kaluwore gi nywolgi." 
Exodus28:11 Ng’at molony e goro kidi ema nyaka ndik nying’ yawuot Israel e kite ariyogo, eka ichomgi e otunge mag dhahabu." 
Exodus28:12 Tuegi e misib efod, obed rapar mar yawuot Israel. Harun noting’ nyinggi e goke ka rapar e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Exodus28:13 “Los otunge mag dhahabu 
Exodus28:14 kod thiwni ariyo mag dhahabu maler, molos ka tol mokadi, kendo ituegi kuom otungego." 
Exodus28:15 Jatueng’o molony ema nyaka los law agoko mar ng’ado bura gi dhahabu kod usi mambulu gi maralik kod makwar, kod law katana maber, mana kaka olos efod." 
Exodus28:16 Borne obed lwedo achiel, to lachne bende lwedo achiel, kendo mondo obane diriyo." 
Exodus28:17 Nyaka ichan laini ang’wen mag kite ma nengogi tek. Laini mokwongo nobedie sardius gi topaz kod karbunkel," 
Exodus28:18 to laini mar ariyo ketie emerald gi safir kod diamond. 
Exodus28:19 Laini mar adek to ketie jasinth gi agat kod amethust," 
Exodus28:20 kendo laini mar ang’wen ketie berul gi oniks kod jasper. Kidi ka kidi mondo orwak e otunge achiel achiel molos gi dhahabu. 
Exodus28:21 Kitego nyaka ndikie nying mag dhoudi apar gariyo, kaka igoro tere migoyogo sei. Kidi ka kidi mondo ondikie nying’ mag dhoudi apar gariyogo." 
Exodus28:22 “Los ni law agoko thiwni mag dhahabu maler, mokadi ka tol." 
Exodus28:23 Bende los ratege ariyo mag dhahabu, kendo iketgi e riak law agoko gi malo koni gi koni." 
Exodus28:24 Tue tonde ariyo mag dhahabugo e ratege manie riak law agoko koni gi koni," 
Exodus28:25 to dho tondego komachielo tue e otunge ariyo kande. Kamano e kaka itud law agoko gi misibe miriwogo ka nyim efod gi ka toke. 
Exodus28:26 Los ratege ariyo mag dhahabu, kendo iketgi e riak law agoko gi yo ka malo gi ka iye koni gi koni. Nyaka gibed momanyore gi efod." 
Exodus28:27 Bende ilos ratege ariyo moko mag dhahabu, mi iketgi yo ka mwalo e dho misibe ariyo mag gok efod kama otwang’gigo e okanda." 
Exodus28:28 Eka iriw ratege mag law agoko gi ratege mag efod gi tol mambulu, mondo law agoko obed ewi okanda gi malo, mondo kik ogonyre." 
Exodus28:29 Kamano ka Harun donjo Kama Ler, nobed koting’o nying yawuot Israel e law agoko mar ng’ado bura e kore ka rapar e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye kinde duto." 
Exodus28:30 “To koro mogik, nyaka iket ombulu miluongo ni Urim gi Thumim ei law agoko mar ng’ado bura, mondo gibed e kor Harun kodonjo e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, ka Harun donjo e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, nobed koting’o gik ng’ado bura ni jo-Israel e kore." 
Exodus28:31 “Los aroya mar umo efod gi law mambulu. 
Exodus28:32 Nyaka obed gi otuch e diere ma wich wuokie. Aluora mar otuchno duto nyaka twang’ gi pien, mondo kik yiech." 
Exodus28:33 Twang’ gik mong’inore ka machunga molos gi usi mambulu gi maralik kod makwar e riak lawno alwora, kendo iketie gara mag dhahabu e kindgi e kindgi." 
Exodus28:34 Kamano gik mong’inorego nobed mokikore gi garago e laini achiel alwora mar riake mogik piny. 
Exodus28:35 Harun nyaka rwak aroyano kotiyo tich dolo, mondo garago owinj ka odonjo Kama Ler e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo kowuok. Kamano ok notho." 
Exodus28:36 “Los gima opamore ka san gi dhahabu maler, kendo indikie ni, ‘MOWAL NI RUOTH NYASAYE’. Wechego nyaka gor kaka igoro tere migoyogo sei." 
Exodus28:37 Itueye gi tol mambulu, kendo ikete ka nyim kilemba." 
Exodus28:38 Gima opamoreno nyaka bed e wi Harun, kendo kamano e kaka enopwodh ketho moro ma dipo kobetie kuom mich maler ma jo-Israel ochiwo ni Ruoth Nyasaye. Omiyo gino nyaka bed e wiye kinde duto, mondo Ruoth Nyasaye oyie chiwogo." 
Exodus28:39 “Itwang’ law akor mar katana maber, kendo ilos kilemba bende gi law katana maber, kod okanda mogoye maradadi." 
Exodus28:40 Los ni yawuot Harun kendhe gi okendni kod kilembni, mondo omedgi duong’ gi chia." 
Exodus28:41 Gigi imi Harun owadu gi yawuote, eka iwirgi gi mo, kendo iwalgi mondo gibed jodolona." 
Exodus28:42 Ilosnigi sirweche mag law katana machopo e thochgi, mondo oim duggi." 
Exodus28:43 Harun gi yawuote nyaka rwakgi ka gidonjo e Hemb Romo, kata ka gidhi e kendo-mar-misango mondo giti tich dolo. Kamano ok ginikethi, kendo ok ginitho. Chikni omako Harun gi nyikwaye nyaka chieng’." 
Exodus29:1 “Kiwalo Harun gi jowuote mondo obed jodolona, to nyaka itim kama: Kaw nyarwath kod imbe ariyo maonge gi songa." 
Exodus29:2 Bende ikaw makati, kek moted gi mo, kod chapat mowirie mo. Magi duto nyaka los gi mok ngano mayom, ma ok oketie thowi." 
Exodus29:3 Iketgi e odheru, kendo ikelgigo. Bende ikel nyarwath gi imbe ariyo kande." 
Exodus29:4 Bang’e ikel Harun gi yawuote e dho Hemb Romo kendo ilwokgi. 
Exodus29:5 Eka ikaw lewni kande, ma gin kandhu gi aroya maumo efod gi efod wuon, kod law agoko, irwak ni Harun, kendo ituene efod gi okandane." 
Exodus29:6 Sidhne kilemba, kendo ituene gima opamore cha, ma en osimbo maler." 
Exodus29:7 Eka ikaw mor wir, iol e wiye kiwalego." 
Exodus29:8 Bang’ mano ikel yawuote, mi irwaknegi aroche," 
Exodus29:9 kendo ituenigi okanda e nungogi, bende isidhnigi kilemba. Mano e kaka iniket Harun gi yawuote e tichgi, kendo ginibed jodolo mosiko nyaka chieng’." 
Exodus29:10 “Kel nyarwath e nyim Hemb Romo, kendo Harun gi yawuote oket luetgi e wiye," 
Exodus29:11 eka iyange e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye e dho Hemb Romo kanyo. 
Exodus29:12 Kaw rembe moko, imien gi lith lweti e tunge kendo-mar-misango. To remo duto modong’ iol e tiend kendono." 
Exodus29:13 Eka ikaw boche duto mogawo jambich, gi atel man kuom chuny, kod nyirokene, kaachiel gi boche mogawogi, kendo iwang’gi e kendo-mar-misango." 
Exodus29:14 To ring nyarwath kod piene, kaachiel gi ich iwang’ e tok kambi oko, nikech en misango mar golo richo." 
Exodus29:15 “Bang’ mano ikaw achiel kuom imbe kande, kendo Harun gi yawuote oket luetgi e wiye." 
Exodus29:16 Eka iyange, kendo ikaw rembe, ipuk e kor kendo-mar-misango." 
Exodus29:17 Ipoge lemo lemo, kendo ilwok jambiye kod tiendene, mi iketgi kaachiel gi ringe moko kod wichne." 
Exodus29:18 Eka iwang’ imno duto e kendo-mar-misango. Mano en misango miwang’o pep ni Ruoth Nyasaye. En tik mang’ue ng’ar moa kuom misango miwang’o ni Ruoth Nyasaye. 
Exodus29:19 “Kaw im mar ariyo, kendo Harun gi yawuote oket luetgi e wiye." 
Exodus29:20 Eka iyange, kendo ikaw rembe moko mondo imien e it Harun makorachwich kod it yawuote ma korachwich kod lith luetegi mathwon makorachwich kod lith tiendegi mathwon bende. To remo modong’, ipuk e kor kendo mar-mar-misango koni gi koni." 
Exodus29:21 “Kaw remo moko manie wi kendo-mar-misango, kod mor wir, mi ikir kuom Harun gi yawuote, kendo kuom lepgi, kamano Harun gi yawuote kaachiel gi lepgi nodok maler." 
Exodus29:22 Kaw bor im, gi sembe kod boche mogawo ich, gi atel man kuom chuny, gi nyirokene, kaachiel gi boche mogawogi, kod em ma korachwich, ni mar en im mirwakogo jodolo." 
Exodus29:23 Bang’ mano ikaw makati achiel, gi kek achiel moted gi mo, kod chapat achiel, mogol e odheru moting’o makati ma ok ketie thowi man e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Exodus29:24 Ket mago duto e lwet Harun, kendo e lwet yawuote, kendo iyieggi e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Exodus29:25 Eka ikawgi e lwet Harun gi yawuote, kendo iwang’gi e kendo-mar-misango, kaachiel gi misango miwang’o pep, mondo gidum tik mang’ue ng’ar moa kuom misango miwang’o ni Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Exodus29:26 “Bang’e ikaw agoko im mane orwakgo Harun, kendo iyiege e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye. En ema nobed lembi kuom chiayono." 
Exodus29:27 Ipwodh agoko im mane orwakgo Harun gi yawuote, kiyiege e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye. Em imno moket tenge ni jodolo bende itim kamano." 
Exodus29:28 Mago nobed lemo ma Harun gi yawuote yudo kuom jo-Israel, nyaka chieng’. En lemo moket tenge ni jodolo ma jo-Israel golo kuom misengni mag sawo. En mich ma nyaka gichiw ni Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Exodus29:29 “Lep Harun mag dolo nyaka dong’ ni yawuote bang’ thone mondo girwak kiwirogi kendo kiketogi e tich dolo. 
Exodus29:30 Wuod Harun ma noket kare e tich, kendo ma nobed kadonjo e Hemb Romo mondo oti e Kama Ler nyaka rwakgi kuom ndalo abiriyo." 
Exodus29:31 “Kaw im morwakgo jodolo, inegi, eka ited ringe kamoro mowal ni Nyasaye," 
Exodus29:32 mi Harun gi yawuote nocham ring’ono, kaachiel gi makati modong’, ka gin e dho Hemb Romo." 
Exodus29:33 Ginicham gigo mane opwodhgo richogi kirwakogi kendo kiwalogi. To ng’ato ma ok jadolo kik chamgi nimar gin gik maler. 
Exodus29:34 Kapo ni ring’o, kata makati moko odong’ nyaka okinyi, to nyaka wang’gi. Kik chamgi, nimar gin gik maler." 
Exodus29:35 “Tim ni Harun gi yawuote mana kaka asechiki. Kamano ketogi e tich nokaw ndalo abiriyo. 
Exodus29:36 “Odiechieng’ kodiechieng’ kuom ndalo abiriyo duto, nyaka itim misango mar golo richo gi nyarwath mondo opwodhgo richo. Kamano inipwodh kendo-mar-misango, kitimo misango mar golo richo kuome, kendo iniwire gi mo kiwalego ni tich Nyasaye." 
Exodus29:37 Nyaka ipwodh kendo-mar-misango kuom ndalo abiriyo, mondo obed maler moloyo. Gimoro amora mogere kuome nodok mowal ni Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Exodus29:38 “Gik ma inichiw e kendo-mar-misango gin e magi: Odiechieng’ kodiechieng’ nyaka itim misango gi nyirombe ariyo ma hikgi achiel achiel. 
Exodus29:39 Ineg nyarombo achiel gokinyi, to machielo ineg godhiambo." 
Exodus29:40 Kichiwo nyarombo mokwongo, to nyaka ichiw bende mogo mayom moromo ondweto, moruw gi mo maliw moromo lita ariyo. To bende nyaka ichiw divai moromo lita ariyo, ka misango miolo piny." 
Exodus29:41 To godhiambo ineg nyarombo machielo, kendo ichiwe kaachiel gi misango mar cham kod misango miolo piny, mana kaka nende ichiwo gokinyi, mondo odum tik mamit. En misango miwang’o ni Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Exodus29:42 Misangono nyaka bed kitimo e dho Hemb Romo e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye kuom tienge duto nyaka chieng’. Kanyo ema an Ruoth Nyasaye nabed karomoe kodu, kendo losoe kodi." 
Exodus29:43 Kanyo bende ema naromie gi jo-Israel, kendo duong’na maler nomi kanyono bedo maler." 
Exodus29:44 Anaguedh Hemb Romo kod kendo-mar-misango obed maler, bende anawal Harun gi yawuote mondo obed jodolona." 
Exodus29:45 Anadag gi jo-Israel, mi anabed Nyasachgi," 
Exodus29:46 kendo dakna kodgino nomi ging’e ni an e Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachgi ma nogologi Misri. Adier, an Ruoth Nyasaye an Nyasachgi." 
Exodus30:1 “Los kendo-mar-misango mar wang’o ubani, gi yiend shita." 
Exodus30:2 Borne gi lachne obed nus mita maromre, to borne modhi malo obed mita achiel. Tungene nyaka bed gimoro achiel kode." 
Exodus30:3 Bawe duto gi dhahabu maler, kendo ichuene ndiga mar dhahabu molworo bethene duto." 
Exodus30:4 Losne ratege ariyo ariyo mag dhahabu, kendo iketgi e bwo ndigano e konde ariyo man koni gi koni, mondo irwakie ludhe miting’ego." 
Exodus30:5 Nyaka ilos ludhego gi yiend shita, kendo ibawgi gi dhahabu." 
Exodus30:6 Ket kendono e nyim pasia mogeng’o Sandug Rapar, kama nobed karomoe kodu." 
Exodus30:7 Harun nyaka wang’ ubani mang’ue ng’ar e kendono okinyi kokinyi koiko teyni," 
Exodus30:8 kendo odhiambo kodhiambo komokogi. Kamano ubani nobed kiwang’o e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye nyaka chieng’. 
Exodus30:9 Kendono kik wang’ie ubani ma ok owinjore, kata misango miwang’o pep, kata mar cham, kata mana mano miolo piny." 
Exodus30:10 Harun nyaka mien tunge kendono gi remb chiayo mitimogo misango mar golo richo higa ka higa, kopwodhego. Nyaka tim kamano dichiel e higa kuom tienge duto mondo opwodhego. Kendono nobed maler moloyo, mowal ni Ruoth Nyasaye.”" 
Exodus30:11 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa niya," 
Exodus30:12 “Kikwano jo-Israel, to ng’ato ka ng’ato nyaka chul Ruoth Nyasaye chiwo mowarogo ngimane, mondo kik giyud masira e ndalo mikwanogie." 
Exodus30:13 Ng’ato ka ng’ato mokwan nyaka chul nus shekel mondo obed chiwo ni Ruoth Nyasaye, (shekel achiel oromo gera piero ariyo, kopim gi rapim mitiyogo e tich Nyasaye.)" 
Exodus30:14 Nga’to ka ng’ato mokwan ma hike oromo piero ariyo kata mokadho kanyo nyaka chul Ruoth Nyasaye chiwono. 
Exodus30:15 Kuchulo Ruoth Nyasaye chiwo muwarogo ngimau, ng’at ma jamoko ok nochul mang’eny moloyo, to bende ng’at ma jachan ok nochul morem." 
Exodus30:16 Pesa ma jo-Israel chiwo kar ngimagi nyaka itigo e Hemb Romo. Pesa muchiwo kar ngimaugo nomi Ruoth Nyasaye paro jo-Israel.” 
Exodus30:17 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa niya," 
Exodus30:18 “Los karaya mar lwok gi mula, ma rachungine bende mar mula. Kete e kind Hemb Romo gi kendo-mar-misango, mi iolie pi" 
Exodus30:19 mondo Harun gi yawuote olwokgo luetegi gi tiendegi. 
Exodus30:20 Pile ka gidonjo e Hemb Romo to nyaka gilwokre gi pigno kamano mondo kik githo. Bende ka gidhi e kendo-mar-misango mondo gitiye, kendo giwang’ie misango ni Ruoth Nyasaye," 
Exodus30:21 to nyaka gilwok luetegi gi tiendegi mondo kik githo. Mano nobed chik mochwere momako Harun gi nyikwaye kod tiengegi duto.” 
Exodus30:22 Ruoth Nyasaye nochako owacho ni Musa niya," 
Exodus30:23 “In to ikaw gik mang’ue ng’ar, mabeyo machal kama: Manemane manumu moromo kilo apar gi dalasini moromo kilo abich, gi ondago bende kilo abich," 
Exodus30:24 gi kasia kilo apar, (duto nyaka pim gi rapim mitiyogo e tich Nyasaye,) kod mor zeituni moromo lita abiriyo." 
Exodus30:25 Gigo ema mondo ilosgo mor wir maler mang’ue ng’ar, mana kaka jalos gik mang’ue ng’ar loso. Mano nobed mor wir maler." 
Exodus30:26 Morno iwirgo Hemb Romo gi Sandug Rapar," 
Exodus30:27 kod mesa gi gige, kod rachung taya gi gige, kod kendo-mar-misango miwang’oe ubani," 
Exodus30:28 gi mar misango miwang’o pep, kaachiel gi gige, kod karaya mar lwok gi rachungine." 
Exodus30:29 Kamano nyaka ipwodh gigo mondo obed maler ahinya. To gimoro amora mogere kuomgi nobed mowal ni Ruoth Nyasaye. 
Exodus30:30 To bende iwir Harun gi yawuote, kiwalogi mondo gibed jodolona." 
Exodus30:31 Wach ni jo-Israel kama: ‘Morni nobed mor wir maler kuom tiengeu duto. 
Exodus30:32 Kik konyruok kode kuom wiro joma ok jodolo, bende kik ulos mo moro machal kode. En mo mowal maler, kendo nyaka obednu kamano." 
Exodus30:33 Ng’ato ang’ata ma nolos mo machal kamano, kata ma nowir kode ng’at ma ok jadolo nyaka ng’ad kare oko kuom jowetene.’ ”" 
Exodus30:34 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa niya, “Kaw gik ma kiwang’o to ng’ue ng’ar, machalo dwogo gi sare gi mieny kod ubani maler. Pimgi maromre, kendo iketie chumbi" 
Exodus30:35 mondo ilosgo ubani mang’ue ng’ar, kaka jalos gik mang’ue ng’ar loso. Nobed gima ler, kendo mowal ni tich Nyasaye." 
Exodus30:36 Kaw moko, iswag mayom mondo iket e nyim Sandug Rapar ei Hemb Romo kama naromie kodu. Enobednu gima ler ahinya." 
Exodus30:37 Ubani molos e yo makama kik ukonyrugo e yoru uwegi. Nyaka obednu gima ler ahinya, mowal ni Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Exodus30:38 Ng’ato ang’ata ma nolos ubani machal kode kamano, mondo otigo e yore owuon, nyaka ng’ad kare oko kuom jowetene.”" 
Exodus31:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa niya," 
Exodus31:2 “Ng’eni aseyiero Bezalel wuod Hur, ja Juda." 
Exodus31:3 Asepong’e gi Roho mara mondo obed gi lony kod nyalo, kaachiel gi rieko mar ng’eyo tije duto mag lwedo, kaka:" 
Exodus31:4 goro kido mabeyo mag dhahabu gi fedha kod mula," 
Exodus31:5 kendo ng’ado kite michomo, kaachiel gi payo bao, kata tich moro amora mar lwedo." 
Exodus31:6 To bende aseyiero Oholiab wuod Ahisamak, ja Dan, mondo okonye, kendo asemiyo jotich duto molony rieko mondo olos gigo duto masechiki." 
Exodus31:7 Ginilos Hemb Romo, kod Sandug Rapar gi raumne kod gik moko duto mag hema," 
Exodus31:8 kaka mesa gi gige, kod rachung taya mag dhahabu maler gi gige," 
Exodus31:9 kod kendo-mar-misango miwang’oe ubani, gi mar misango miwang’o pep, gi gige, kod karaya mar lwok gi rachungine," 
Exodus31:10 kod lep dolo malich mag Harun jadolo gi mag yawuote, ma girwako ka gitiyo tich dolo," 
Exodus31:11 kod mor wir gi ubani mang’ue ng’ar mar Kama Ler. Ka giloso gigo duto, to nyaka giti mana kaka asenyisi.”" 
Exodus31:12 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa niya," 
Exodus31:13 “Nyis jo-Israel kama, ‘Nyaka urit chieng’ Sabatona, nikech chieng’ yueyono en ranyisi manie kinda kodu kaachiel gi nyikwau nyaka chieng’, mondo ung’e ni an e Ruoth Nyasaye mopwodhou." 
Exodus31:14 Kuom mano nyaka urit Sabato nikech en chieng’ moket mondo obednu maler. Ka ng’ato ok orite, to nyaka nege. Ng’ato ang’ata motiyo chieng’no nyaka ng’ad kare oko kuom jowetene." 
Exodus31:15 Unyalo tiyo tijeu kuom ndalo auchiel, to chieng’ mar abiriyo en chieng’ yueyo maler, mowal ni Ruoth Nyasaye. Ng’ato ang’ata ma noti chieng’ Sabato nyaka negi." 
Exodus31:16 Jo-Israel nyaka rit chieng’ Sabato kuom tiengegi duto kaka chieng’ ma gisesingore rito nyaka chieng. 
Exodus31:17 En ranyisi mochwere manie kinda kod jo-Israel, nimar an Ruoth Nyasaye, nachueyo polo gi piny kuom ndalo auchiel, to chieng’ mar abiriyo naweyo tich, mayueyo.’ ”" 
Exodus31:18 Kane Ruoth Nyasaye osetieko wuoyo gi Musa e got Sinai, nomiye kite mopamore ariyo mag rapar. Gin e kite ariyo mane Nyasaye ondikoe gi lith lwete." 
Exodus32:1 Kane ji oneno ni Musa osedeko e got, kapok olor piny, ne gichokore kuom Harun, mi giwachone niya, “Bi ilosnwa nyasaye mondo otelnwa, nikech wakia gima osetimo ng’at ma Musano, mane ogolowa e piny Misri.”" 
Exodus32:2 Harun nodwokogi niya, “Deduru bonje mag dhahabu ma mondu gi yawuotu kod nyiu orwako mondo ukelna.”" 
Exodus32:3 Mi ji duto nogolo bonjegi, motero ni Harun." 
Exodus32:4 Nokawo bonjego molenyo, eka noolo e gimoro mokuny iye e kido mar nyaroya, molosogo nyaroya. Jo-Israel nowacho niya, “Ma e nyasaye mane ogolowa e piny Misri!”" 
Exodus32:5 To kane Harun owinjo gima giwachono, nogero kendo-mar-misango e nyim nyaroyano. Eka nogoyo milome, kowacho niya, “Kiny wanatim sawo mwamiyogo Ruoth Nyasaye duong’.”" 
Exodus32:6 Kinyne ji nochiew gokinyi mang’ich, motimo lisweche miwang’o pep, kendo ne gikelo lisweche mag sawo. Ne gibet piny mondo gichiem, kendo gimethi, to bang’e ne gia malo mondo gitugi." 
Exodus32:7 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa niya, “Lor piyopiyo, nikech jou mane igolo Misri osetimo marach." 
Exodus32:8 Piyopiyo nono giseweyo yo mane achikogi ni mondo giluw, mi giseloso nyaroch dhahabu mondo gilam. Gisekulorene, kendo gisetimone liswa, ka giwacho niya, ‘A jo-Israel, ma e nyasaye ma nogolowa e piny Misri.’ ”" 
Exodus32:9 Ruoth Nyasaye nomedo wacho ni Musa niya, “Aserango jogi, maneno ni gin joma wigi tek." 
Exodus32:10 Koro weya mondo atiekgi gi mirimba mager. Bang’e anamiyi doko oganda maduong’.” 
Exodus32:11 To Musa nohombo Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasache, kowachone niya, “A Ruoth Nyasaye, ang’o momiyo iwang’o jogi gi mirimbi? Donge gin jogi mane igolo Misri gi teko maduong’?" 
Exodus32:12 Ang’o momiyo imiyo jo-Misri biro wacho, niya, ‘Ruoth Nyasaye nogolo jo-Israel Misri mana ni mondo otimnigi marach, konegogi e gode, kendo otiekgi chuth’? Yie iwe mirimbi mager, kendo ilok paroni, mondo kik ikel masirani kuom jogi." 
Exodus32:13 Par jotichni ma Ibrahim gi Isaka kod Israel, kendo kaka nikuong’orinigi gi nyingi iwuon, kiwacho niya, ‘Anamiu nyikwayo mang’eny ka sulue ma e polo, kendo anamigi pinyni duto kaka nasingora, ni nobed margi nyaka chieng’.’ ”" 
Exodus32:14 Omiyo Ruoth Nyasaye noloko parone, mi koro ne ok okelo ni joge masira mane osewacho." 
Exodus32:15 Musa nowichore molor oa e got, koting’o kite ariyo mag rapar e lwete. Kitego nondiki koni gi koni." 
Exodus32:16 Ne gin tich Nyasaye, kendo ndiko mane ni kuomgi ne mar Nyasaye." 
Exodus32:17 Joshua nowinjo ka ji goyo koko, mowacho ni Musa niya, “Awinjo mahu mar lweny e kambi.”" 
Exodus32:17 Joshua nowinjo ka ji goyo koko, mowacho ni Musa niya, “Awinjo mahu mar lweny e kambi.”" 
Exodus32:18 To Musa nodwoke niya, “Mano ok agoro mar joma oloyo lweny, bende ok en ywak mar joma olo e lweny, to en mana koko mar joma wer.”" 
Exodus32:19 Kane Musa osesudo machiegni gi kambi, noneno nyaroya, kendo noneno ji ka miel, mi nokecho malich. Nowito kitego piny e tiend got mobarore." 
Exodus32:20 Nokawo nyaroya mane ji oselosono mowang’o. Norege, molokore buru, eka nokire e pi, momiyo jo-Israel pigno omodho." 
Exodus32:21 Nopenjo Harun niya, “Ang’o ma ne jogi otimoni momiyo imiyo gitimo richo maduong’ kama?”" 
Exodus32:22 Harun nodwoke niya, “Ruoth, kik ikechi. Ing’eyo ang’eya kaka chuny jogi richo." 
Exodus32:23 Ne giwachona niya, ‘Losnwa nyasaye mondo otelnwa, nikech wakia gima osetimo Musani, ma nogolowa e piny Misri.’" 
Exodus32:24 Omiyo nawachonigi mondo joma nigi dhahabu oded oko. Ne gimiya dhahabugo, mabolo e mach, mi nyaroyano ema owuok.”" 
Exodus32:25 Kane Musa oneno ka ji osenjawni, nikech Harun noseweyo ni wasikgi thuolo mondo ojargi," 
Exodus32:26 nochung’ e dhoranga kambi, mogoyo koko niya, “Eke joma ni kor Ruoth Nyasaye? Biuru ira!” Mi jo-Lawi duto nochokore ire." 
Exodus32:27 Nowachonigi niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel owacho ni, ng’ato ka ng’ato kuomu mondo orwak liganglane, kendo ong’ad e dier kambi koa e dhorangach ma koni nyaka dhorangach ma kocha. Ng’ato ka ng’ato mondo oneg owadgi gi osiepne kod ng’at modak bute.”" 
Exodus32:28 Jo-Lawi notimo kaka Musa nosechikogi, kendo chieng’no ji alufu adek notho." 
Exodus32:29 Eka Musa nowachonigi kendo niya, “Kawuono usewaloru ni tich Nyasaye chuth, nikech usenego yawuotu kod oweteu, omiyo Ruoth Nyasaye oguedhou tinende.”" 
Exodus32:30 Kinyne Musa nowacho ni ji niya, “Usetimo richo maduong’. To koro abiro idho got, mondo adhi ir Ruoth Nyasaye. Kamoro onyalo yie weyonu richou ka akwaye.”" 
Exodus32:31 Kamano Musa nodok ir Ruoth Nyasaye mowachone niya, “Yie iwinj wachna. Jogi osetimo richo maduong’ ahinya! Giseloso nyasaye mar dhahabu mondo gilam." 
Exodus32:32 To koro yie iwenigi richogi. Ka ok iyie timo kamano, to kara yie iruch nyinga oko e kitabu misendiko.”" 
Exodus32:33 Ruoth Nyasaye nodwoko Musa niya, “Ng’at motimo richo e nyima ema naruch nyinge e kitapa." 
Exodus32:34 Koro dhiyo mondo itel ni ji nyaka kuma nasenyisi. Malaikana notel nyimi, to kinde biro chopo ma anakumgie kuom richogi.”" 
Exodus32:35 Bang’e Ruoth Nyasaye nogoyo jo-Israel gi tuo kuom lamo nyaroya mane Harun oloso. 
Exodus33:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa niya, “Wuoguru in kaachiel gi joma nigolo Misri, kendo udhi e piny mane asingora ni nami Ibrahim gi Isaka kod Jakobo, kawachonigi ni nami nyikwagi pinyno." 
Exodus33:2 Anaor malaika mondo otel nyimu, kendo anariemb jo-Kanaan gi jo-Amor gi jo-Hiti gi jo-Perizi gi jo-Hivi kod jo-Jebus." 
Exodus33:3 Anateru e piny momeu kendo machiek. To an awuon ok nadhi kodu, nimar dipo ka atiekou e yo, nikech un ji ma tokgi tek.”" 
Exodus33:4 Kane jo-Israel owinjo wach magerno, ne gichako ywak, mi onge ng’at ma norwako bonjene." 
Exodus33:5 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa niya, “Nyis jo-Israel ni gin joma tokgi tek, kendo ka da bed ni anyalo wuotho kodu kata kuom sa matin kende, to datieku te. Koro mondo gilony bonjegi, eka abiro ng’eyo gima anyalo timonigi.”" 
Exodus33:6 Omiyo jo-Israel nogonyo bonjegi e got Horeb kanyo, kendo ne ok gichako girwakogi." 
Exodus33:7 Musa ne thoro golo hema e kambi kendo guro oko mochwalore. Nochake ni Hemb Romo, kendo ng’ato ang’ata mane dwaro penjo Nyasaye wach ne dhi kanyo." 
Exodus33:8 Kinde duto kane Musa wuok dhi e hemano, ji duto ne a malo, kendo ng’ato ka ng’ato chung’ e dho hembe ka rango Musa nyaka donj e hema." 
Exodus33:9 To kane Musa osedonjo e hema, bor polo ne lor piny kendo chung’ e dho hema ka Ruoth Nyasaye wuoyo gi Musa." 
Exodus33:10 Kane ji oseneno ka bor polo ochung’ e dho hema kamano, ne gikulore giduto, ng’ato ka ng’ato e dho hembe owuon." 
Exodus33:11 Kamano Ruoth Nyasaye ne wuoyo gi Musa wang’ gi wang’ mana kaka ng’ato wuoyo gi wadgi. Bang’e Musa ne duogo e kambi. To Joshua wuod Nun, wuowi mane konye, ne dong’ mana e hema." 
Exodus33:11 Kamano Ruoth Nyasaye ne wuoyo gi Musa wang’ gi wang’ mana kaka ng’ato wuoyo gi wadgi. Bang’e Musa ne duogo e kambi. To Joshua wuod Nun, wuowi mane konye, ne dong’ mana e hema." 
Exodus33:12 Musa nowacho ni Ruoth Nyasaye niya, “En adier ni isenyisa mondo atel ni jogi nyaka piny Kanaan, to pok inyisa ng’at ma ibiro orago. To bende isewacho ni ing’eya maber, kendo imor koda." 
Exodus33:13 Ka imor koda kamano, to koro akwayi mondo ipuonja yoreni mondo ang’eyi, kendo imed bedo mamor koda. To bende ng’e malong’o ni jogi gin jogi.”" 
Exodus33:14 Ruoth Nyasaye nodwoke niya, “Abiro dhi kodi an awuon, kendo anamiyi kue.”" 
Exodus33:15 Musa nowachone niya, “Ka in iwuon ok idhi kodwa, to kik igolwa ka," 
Exodus33:16 nikech ka ok idhi kodwa, to ere kaka ji nyalo ng’eyo ni imor kodwa? To ka idhi kodwa, jogi kaachiel gi an nobed joma opogore gi dhoudi duto manie piny.”" 
Exodus33:17 Mi Ruoth Nyasaye nodwoko Musa niya, “Abiro timo mana kaka isekwayo, nikech amor kodi, kendo ang’eyi maber.”" 
Exodus33:18 Musa nokwayo Ruoth Nyasaye niya, “Yie inyisa duong’ni maler.”" 
Exodus33:19 Ruoth Nyasaye nodwoke ni, “Abiro miyo berna duto kadh buti, kendo anahul nyinga ma JEHOVA mana kiwinjo. Anaher ng’at ma adwaro hero, gi hera mosiko, bende anakech jalo ma adwaro kecho.”" 
Exodus33:20 Nomedo wacho ni Musa ni, “To ok inyal neno wang’a, nikech onge dhano ma nyalo neno wang’a, mi pod obed mangima.”" 
Exodus33:21 Eka nodhi nyime, kowachone niya, “Nitie kamoro buta ka. Bi ichung’ e wi lwanda," 
Exodus33:22 to ka duong’na maler kadho, abiro keti e gek lwanda, kendo anaumi gi lweta nyaka akadhi." 
Exodus33:23 Eka nagol lweta, mi inine mana ng’eya. To wang’a ok nine.”" 
Exodus34:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa niya, “Pa kite ariyo machal gi mane igoyo piny, mobarore kande, mondo andikie weche mane ni e kite mokwongogo." 
Exodus34:2 Kiny iikri gokinyi mondo ibi e got Sinai. Ichung’ kuno, kendo irita." 
Exodus34:3 Ng’ato kik idh kodi kuno, bende ng’at moro kik bed kamoro amora ewi godno, kata mana jamni kik kwa e alwora ne.”" 
Exodus34:4 Kuom mano Musa nopayo kite ariyo machal gi mokwongo. Kinyne gokinyi nodhi ewi got Sinai, kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nosechike koting’o kitego." 
Exodus34:5 Eka Ruoth Nyasaye nolor e bor polo, mochung’ bute kanyo, mi ohulo nyinge ma JEHOVA." 
Exodus34:6 Nokadho e nyim Musa, kowacho gi dwol maduong’ niya, “An JEHOVA. An Ruoth Nyasaye, an Nyasaye ma jang’wono kendo makecho ji. Iya ok wang’ piyo, kendo anyiso hera mosiko kod adiera." 
Exodus34:7 Arito singruokna masetimo gi ji gana gi gana, kendo aweyonigi rochruokgi gi kethogi kod richogi, to kata kamano ok akwan jaketho ka ng’ama ler, to akumo nyithindo gi nyikwayo nyaka tieng’ mar adek kod mar ang’wen nikech richo kweregi.”" 
Exodus34:8 Musa nokulore piny piyopiyo, molemo." 
Exodus34:9 Nowacho niya, “A Ruoth Nyasaye, kimor koda adier, to koro akwayi mondo idhi kodwa, jogi tokgi tek, to kata kamano, yie iwenwa kethowa gi richowa, kendo ikawwa ka mwanduni iwuon.”" 
Exodus34:10 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho niya, “Koro adwaro timo kodu singruok. Abiro timo honni madongo ka jou neno, ma nyaka nene pok otim e piny ngima, kata e oganda moro. Ji duto ma un e kindgi biro neno gima an Ruoth Nyasaye anyalo timo, nikech abiro timonu gima lich." 
Exodus34:11 Kuom mano, rituru chike ma abiro miyou kawuono, eka abiro riembo jo-Amor gi jo-Kanaan gi jo-Hiti gi jo-Perizi gi jo-Hivi kod jo-Jebus mondo owenu thuolo." 
Exodus34:12 Ritreuru mondo une ni ok utimo winjruok moro gi jopiny mudhiyeno, nono to gilokorenu obadho." 
Exodus34:13 Nyaka umuk kendegi mag liswa, kendo uketh sirni maggi milamo, mag kite gi mag yien." 
Exodus34:14 “Kik ulam nyasaye moro machielo ni mar an Ruoth Nyasaye, nyinga en Nyasaye ma Janyiego, kendo an Nyasaye ma janyiego adier!" 
Exodus34:15 Ritreuru mondo kik utim winjruok gi jopinyno nikech ka gilamo nyisechegi, kendo gitimonigi liswa, to gibiro luongou, mi kamoro dipo ka uchamo chiemb liswechegi." 
Exodus34:16 Yawuotu bende dikend nyigi, to mondgigo dilam nyisechegi, mi gimi yawuotu weya, kendo lam nyisechegigo." 
Exodus34:17 “Kik ulos nyiseche mag mula mondo ulam. 
Exodus34:18 “Rituru Sawo mar Makati ma ok oketie Thowi, kaka asechiki. Nyaka ucham makati ma ok oketie thowi kuom ndalo abiriyo e ndalo mar Abib, nikech dueno ema ne ua e piny Misri." 
Exodus34:19 “Nyithindo makayo ma chwo duto mag dhano kata mag jamni gin maga. 
Exodus34:20 To ngima kanyna makayo unyalo waro gi nyarombo, to ka ok udwar ware, to nyaka tur ng’ute. Ng’ato ka ng’ato nyaka war ngima wuode makayo, kendo onge ng’at ma nobi ira gi lwete nono." 
Exodus34:21 “Unuti kuom ndalo auchiel, to chieng’ mar abiriyo nyaka uyue, kata obedo ni en kinde mag pur kata mag keyo." 
Exodus34:22 “Nyaka urit Sap Jumbe, tiende ni sap chiwo mar cham mokwongo nyak. To bende nyaka urit Sap Pono Olembe e giko higa." 
Exodus34:23 “Jou machwo duto nyaka bi e nyima didek e higa, an Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel" 
Exodus34:24 nimar kaseriembonu ogendini ma weg pinyno, kendo ayaro pinyu, to onge wasigu ma notem kawo pinyu e kinde adek mubiro biroe e nyima higa ka higa." 
Exodus34:25 “E kinde mutimoe misango ni chiayo, kik uchiw gimoro moketie thowi, kendo kik uwe ring chiayo motimgo Sap Pasaka dong’ nyaka piny ru mak uwang’o te." 
Exodus34:26 “Cham mabeyoe moloyo mukwongo kayo nyaka ukel e Od Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu. “Kitedo nyadiel, to kik uolie cha min.”" 
Exodus34:27 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa niya, “Ndik wechego, nikech gin ema atimogo singruok kodi kaachiel gi jo-Israel.”" 
Exodus34:28 Omiyo Musa nobet gi Ruoth Nyasaye kanyo kuom ndalo piero ang’wen, odiechieng’ gotieno, ma ok ochiemo kata metho, kendo nondiko weche mag singruokno e kitego. Ne gin Chike Apar." 
Exodus34:29 Kane Musa lor a e got Sinai, koting’o kite ariyo mag rapar, wang’e ne rieny nikech nosewuoyo gi Ruoth Nyasaye, to kata kamano ne ok ong’eyo ni wang’e rieny kamano." 
Exodus34:30 Harun gi jo-Israel duto norango Musa moneno ka wang’e rieny, mi ne giluor sudo bute." 
Exodus34:31 To Musa noluongogi, mi Harun gi jodong oganda nodok ire, moloso kodgi." 
Exodus34:32 Bang’ mano jo-Israel duto nodhi irgi machiegni, kendo Musa nomiyogi chike duto mane Ruoth Nyasaye omiye e got Sinai." 
Exodus34:33 Kane Musa osetieko wuoyo kodgi, nogeng’o wang’e gi law," 
Exodus34:34 E kinde duto mane Musa donjo e hemb Ruoth Nyasaye mondo olos kode, nogolo lawno e wang’e nyaka owuog oko. To pile kane owuok mondo onyis jo-Israel weche duto ma nochike ni mondo owachi," 
Exodus34:35 ne gineno wang’e ka rieny. Eka bang’e nogeng’o wang’e kendo, nyaka odonj e hema, mondo owuo gi Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Exodus35:1 Musa noluongo jo-Israel duto, mowachonigi niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye osechikou ni mondo uti kama:" 
Exodus35:2 Unyalo tiyo kuom ndalo auchiel, to chieng’ mar abiriyo nyaka bednu chieng’ yueyo maler, nimar en Sabato mowal ni Ruoth Nyasaye. Ng’ato ang’ata motiyo chieng’no nyaka negi." 
Exodus35:3 Kik umok kata mana mach e miechu chieng’ Sabato.” 
Exodus35:4 Musa nowacho ni jo-Israel duto niya," 
Exodus35:5 “Ruoth Nyasaye nosechiko ni mondo uchiwne mich. Ng’ato ka ng’ato moyie timo kamano, mondo okelna chiwo mag dhahabu kod mula," 
Exodus35:6 gi nanga mambulu gi maralik kod makwar, gi law katana maber, gi yie diek," 
Exodus35:7 gi piende rombe molok gi range makwar, gi piende monyong’ gi yiend shita," 
Exodus35:8 gi mor taya, kod gik mang’ue ng’ar milosogo mor wir, gi ubani mang’ue ng’ar," 
Exodus35:9 gi kite mag oniks kod kite moko miketo kuom law dolo miluongo ni efod, kendo kuom law agoko." 
Exodus35:10 “Jotich duto molony man kuomu mondo obi, kendo olos gik moko duto mane Ruoth Nyasaye ochiko." 
Exodus35:11 Ginilos Hema Maler, gi hembe maoko, kod raumne, gi ramekni mage, gi bepene, gi raripene, gi rachungine," 
Exodus35:12 kod Sanduk gi ludhene miting’ego, gi raumne, kod pasia mogeng’e," 
Exodus35:13 gi mesa kod ludhene gi gige duto, gi makati miketo e nyim Nyasaye pile," 
Exodus35:14 kod rachung taya machiwo ler, kod gige duto, gi teyni mage kod mor taya," 
Exodus35:15 gi kendo-mar-misango miwang’oe ubani kaachiel gi ludhene, kod mor wir gi ubani mang’ue ng’ar, gi pasia manie dho hema," 
Exodus35:16 kod kendo-mar-misango miwang’o pep, kaachiel gi ndiri mare molos gi mula, gi ludhene kod gige duto, gi karaya, kod rachungine," 
Exodus35:17 gi pasia mag laru gi sirni kod rachungigi gi pasia mar dhoranga laru," 
Exodus35:18 kod loye mag Hema gi loye mag laru kod tondegi," 
Exodus35:19 kaachiel gi lewni malich ma jodolo tiyogo Kama Ler, ma gin lep lemo ma Harun jadolo gi yawuote rwako ka gitiyo tich dolo.”" 
Exodus35:20 Oganda jo-Israel duto nowuok oa ir Musa. 
Exodus35:21 Ng’ato ka ng’ato ma noyie golo chiwo ni Ruoth Nyasaye notimo kamano, mondo olosgo Hemb Romo gi gik moko duto mitiyogo kanyo, kaachiel gi lep lemo." 
Exodus35:22 Mon gi chwo nobiro, kendo ng’ato ka ng’ato ma noyie golo chiwo nokelo ngaga gi sitadi gi bony gi mula kod gimoro amora maber mar dhahabu. Ji duto nokelo ni Ruoth Nyasaye chiwo mag dhahabu," 
Exodus35:23 to bende ng’ato ka ng’ato nokelo gima en go kaka nanga mambulu kata maralik kata makwar, kata law katana maber, kata yie diek, kata piende rombe molok gi range makwar." 
Exodus35:24 Joma ne nyalo chiwo mich mag fedha gi mag mula nokelo ni Ruoth Nyasaye. Kendo ji duto mane ni gi yiend shita mane inyalo losogo gimoro amora bende nokelo. 
Exodus35:25 Mon duto mane olony e wicho nowiyo usi mambulu gi maralik gi makwar mokelo, kaachiel gi law katana maber." 
Exodus35:26 Bende mon duto mane olony e tich wiyo yie diek nowicho gi chuny achiel. 
Exodus35:27 Jodongo nokelo kite mabeyo mag oniks gi kite miketo kuom efod kendo kuom law agoko," 
Exodus35:28 kaachiel gi gik mang’ue ng’ar kod mor taya gi mor wir kod mor ubani mang’ue ng’ar. 
Exodus35:29 Jo-Israel duto machwo gi mamon mane oyie golo chiwo ni tich duto mane Ruoth Nyasaye osechiko Musa ni mondo otim, nokelo ni Ruoth Nyasaye michgi." 
Exodus35:30 Musa nowacho ni jo-Israel niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye oseyiero Bezalel wuod Uri ma wuod Hur ja Juda." 
Exodus35:31 Osepong’e gi Rohone, mondo obed gi lony kod nyalo kaachiel gi rieko mar ng’eyo tije duto mag lwedo," 
Exodus35:32 kaka goro kido mabeyo mag dhahabu gi fedha kod mula," 
Exodus35:33 kendo ng’ado kite michomo, kaachiel gi payo bao, kata tich moro amora mar lwedo." 
Exodus35:34 Ruoth Nyasaye osemiyo Bezalel gi Oholiab wuod Ahisamak ma ja Dan, teko, mondo gipuonj ji tich lwedo." 
Exodus35:35 Osemiyogi rieko mathoth mar tiyo tije duto mag lwedo, kaka tich goro kite, gi mar kwoyo nanga, gi mar tweng’o gi usi mambulu gi maralik, gi mar loso law katana maber, kod mar chweyo nanga. Gin ji manyalo timo tich moro amora." 
Exodus36:1 “Bezalel gi Oholiab kod jotich molony duto mane Ruoth Nyasaye osemiyo rieko kod ng’eyo mar loso gik moko duto midwaro mondo olosgo Kama Ler nyaka los gigo duto mana kaka Ruoth Nyasaye osechiko.” 
Exodus36:2 Musa noluongo Bezalel gi Oholiab kod joma olony e tijegi, mane Ruoth Nyasaye osemiyo rieko, kendo mane oyie konyo tich, mi nonyisogi mondo gichak tich." 
Exodus36:3 Nomiyogi chiwo mane jo-Israel okelo mondo olosgo Kama Ler. To jo-Israel nomedo mana kelo chiwo ni Musa okinyi kokinyi," 
Exodus36:4 nyaka joma ne olony e tije mopogore opogore mane loso Kama Ler noweyo tijegigo," 
Exodus36:5 mobiro ir Musa ka giwachone niya, “Ji kelo gik mang’eny moloyo kar midwaro kuom tich mane Ruoth Nyasaye ochiko ni mondo otim.”" 
Exodus36:6 Omiyo Musa nogoyo milome e kambi kokwero ji duto niya, “Ng’at ma dichwo kata ma dhako kik med loso gimoro mitiyogo e Kama Ler.” Kamano ji noweyo kelo gik moko." 
Exodus36:7 Gik mane osekel ne ng’eny mohewo tieko tich. 
Exodus36:8 Jotich molony ema noloso Hema Maler. Ne gilosone pasia apar mag law katana maber, mogoe kido mag kerubi gi usi mambulu gi maralik kod makwar mana kaka jatueng’o molony goro." 
Exodus36:9 Bor pasia ka pasia ne romo mita apar gang’wen, to lachne mita ariyo, kendo giduto ne giromre." 
Exodus36:10 Abich kuomgi noriw kaachiel,, kendo abich modong’ bende noriw kamano." 
Exodus36:11 Ne giloso tonde piero abich mambulu e riak pasia matung’, kuom pasia abich mokwongo, kendo tonde piero abich moko e riak pasia matung’ kuom pasia abich modong’." 
Exodus36:12 Tondego nobedo momanyore. 
Exodus36:13 Bende ne giloso ramekni piero abich mag dhahabu, mi giriwogo pasia ariyo momanyorego, mondo Hema Maler obed gimoro achiel." 
Exodus36:14 Ne giloso pasia apar gachiel mag yie diek, mondo obed hema maoko maumo Hema Maler." 
Exodus36:15 Bor pasia ka pasia, ne romo mita apar gabich, to lachne mita abich, to lachne mita ariyo. Giduto ne giromre." 
Exodus36:16 Ne giriwo mita abich kaachiel, kendo auchiel modong’ bende ne giriwo kamano." 
Exodus36:17 Ne giloso tonde piero abich, e riak pasia matung’ kuom pasia abich, kendo tonde piero abich moko e riak pasia matung’ kuom pasia auchiel." 
Exodus36:18 Bende ne giloso ramekni piero abich mag mula, mane giriwogo hema mondo obed gimoro achiel." 
Exodus36:19 Ne giloso raum mar piende imbe molok gi range makwar mondo giumgo hema maoko, kendo raum machielo molos gi piende monyong’ mondo obed ewi mokwongono." 
Exodus36:20 Ne giloso ni Hema Maler sirni gi yiend shita. 
Exodus36:21 Bor siro ka siro ne romo mita abich, to lachne nus mita." 
Exodus36:22 Siro ka siro ne nigi tiende ariyo moriw kaachiel. Sirni duto mag Hema Maler nolos machal kamano. 
Exodus36:23 Ne gipayo sirni piero ariyo mondo gilosgo sisi mar Hema maler mochomo yo milambo," 
Exodus36:24 kod rachungi piero ang’wen mag fedha mane girwako e sirnigo. Ne girwako siro mokwongo e rachungi ariyo, kendo ne gitimo kamano e sirni duto." 
Exodus36:25 Sisi mar Hema Maler mochomo yo nyandwat bende ne gilosone sirni piero ariyo," 
Exodus36:26 kaachiel gi rachungi piero ang’wen mag fedha. Ne girwako siro ka siro ei rachungi ariyo ariyo. 
Exodus36:27 Bende ne giloso sirni auchiel ni tok Hema Maler koma odok yo podho chieng’," 
Exodus36:28 kaachiel gi ariyo mamoko mane giketo e konde ariyo man yo ka tok Hema Maler. 
Exodus36:29 Ne giriwo sirni mag kondego gi ratego achiel, chakre ka tiendgi nyaka malo, kendo sirni ariyogo nolos machalre." 
Exodus36:30 Kamano ne gin sirni aboro kod rachungi apar gauchiel mag fedha. Siro ka siro norwak ei rachungi ariyo ariyo. 
Exodus36:31 Ne giloso rariw apar gabich gi yiend shita. Rariw abich nomako sirni mag bath Hema Maler konchiel," 
Exodus36:32 kendo abich mamoko nomako sirni e bathe komachielo, to abich modong’ nomako sirni mane olosgo ka toke, mochomo yo podho chieng’." 
Exodus36:33 Ne giloso rariw ka rariw madiere mondo okadh e kor sirni, koa tung’ konchiel nyaka tung’ komachielo." 
Exodus36:34 Ne gibawo sirnigo gi dhahabu, kendo ne giketonigi ratege mag dhahabu mondo omak rariw. Rariwgo bende ne gibawo gi dhahabu." 
Exodus36:35 Ne gitwang’o pasia mar law katana maber, mi gigoyoe kuome kido mag kerubi gi usi mambulu gi maralik kod makwar, mana kaka jatueng’o molony goro." 
Exodus36:36 Ne giloso ni pasiano sirni ang’wen mag yiend shita, mi gibawo gi dhahabu, kendo ne gilosone rachungi ang’wen mag fedha." 
Exodus36:37 Ne gitwang’o ni dho hema pasia mar law katana maber, mi gigoyoe maradadi gi usi mambulu gi maralik kod makwar." 
Exodus36:38 Ne gibawo wi sirnigo kod ratege molworogi gi dhahabu, to rachungi abich mirwako e sirnigo nolos gi mula." 
Exodus37:1 Bezelel noloso Sanduk gi yiend shita, ma borne oromo mita achiel, to lachne nus mita, kendo borne modhi malo bende nus mita." 
Exodus37:2 Nobawe gi dhahabu maler iye gi oko, kendo nolosone ndiga mar dhahabu molworo bethene duto." 
Exodus37:3 Nothedhone ratege ang’wen mag dhahabu, moketo e tiende ang’wen. Ratege ariyo nobet e bathe konchiel, to ariyo e bathe komachielo." 
Exodus37:4 Noloso ludhe ariyo gi yiend shita, mobawo gi dhahabu," 
Exodus37:5 kendo norwakogi e ratege manie bath Sanduk koni gi koni mondo gibed mag ting’e. 
Exodus37:6 Bende nolosone raum mar dhahabu maler ma borne oromo mita achiel to lachne nus mita, obed kar ng’wono." 
Exodus37:7 Nothedho kerubi ariyo mag dhahabu, mondo obed gimoro achiel gi raum." 
Exodus37:8 Kerubi achiel noketo e dho raum konchiel, kendo achiel e dhoge komachielo." 
Exodus37:9 Ne gibedo ka bwombegi oyarore kochomo malo mondo ogeng’ raum, kendo ne gimanyore, ka ging’iyo raum." 
Exodus37:10 Bezalel noloso bende mesa gi yiend shita, ma borne oromo mita achiel, to lachne nus mita, kendo borne modhi malo bende nus mita." 
Exodus37:11 Nobawe gi dhahabu maler, kendo nolosone ndiga mar dhahabu molworo bethene duto." 
Exodus37:12 Nochueyo mithe alwora ma lachne oromo tat lwedo achiel, kendo nochueyo dir mitheno gi dhahabu." 
Exodus37:13 Nothedhone ratege ang’wen mag dhahabu, moketo, e kendo ang’wen mag mesa, kama tiendene nitie, mondo obed mag ting’e." 
Exodus37:14 Ratege mane orwakie ludhe miting’ego noket e mithe. 
Exodus37:15 Noloso ludhego gi yiend shita, mobawo gi dhahabu." 
Exodus37:16 Bende noloso gik mitiyogo e mesa, kaka tewni, gi kikombe gi agulni kod aguetni mitiyogo gitimo misengni miolo piny. Gigo duto noloso gi dhahabu maler."
