Exodus37:17 Noloso rachung taya gi dhahabu maler. Tiende gi kore noloso gi dhahabu mothedhi, kendo maupe ma nogorie, kaachiel gi thiepege kod obokegi nobedo gimoro achiel kode." 
Exodus37:18 Ne en gi bede auchiel moa e bathe koni gi koni, adek e bathe konchiel kendo adek e bathe komachielo." 
Exodus37:19 Bedenego moro ka moro ne nigi maupe adek molos gi thiepegi kod obokegi machal gi thiep oyungu. 
Exodus37:20 E kor rachung taya hie ne nitie maupe ang’wen man gi thiepe kod oboke machal gi thiep oyungu. 
Exodus37:21 Bedene ariyo ariyo ne nigi maua achiel achiel e bwogi. 
Exodus37:22 Maupego gi bedego kod rachungi nobedo gimoro achiel mothedh gi dhahabu maler. 
Exodus37:23 Bende noloso ni rachungino teyni abiriyo gi rangis teyni kod tewni. Mago duto noloso gi dhahabu maler. 
Exodus37:24 Rachung taya kod gige duto nolos gi dhahabu maler moromo kilo piero abich. 
Exodus37:25 Noloso kendo miwang’oe ubani gi yiend shita. Noromre koni gi koni. Borne ne nus mita, kendo lachne bende nus mita, to borne modhi malo mita achiel. Tungene nobedo gimoro achiel kode." 
Exodus37:26 Nobawe duto te gi dhahabu maler, kendo nochueyo laini mar dhahabu molworo bethene duto." 
Exodus37:27 Nolosone ratege ariyo ariyo mag dhahabu, moketo e bwo laini e konde ariyo man koni gi koni, mondo orwakie ludhe miting’ego." 
Exodus37:28 Ludhego noloso gi yiend shita, mobawo gi dhahabu." 
Exodus37:29 Noloso bende mo maler mar wir, kod ubani maler mang’ue ngar." 
Exodus38:1 Bezalel noloso kendo-mar-misango miwang’o te gi yiend shita. Borne gi lachne ne mita ariyo gi nus maromre, to borne modhi malo ne mita achiel gi nus." 
Exodus38:2 Noloso tungene e kondene ang’wen mobedo gimoro achiel kode, kende nobawe duto gi mula." 
Exodus38:3 Noloso gik moko duto mitiyogo e kendo-mar-misango, kaka agulini, gi rajope, gi tewni, gi rachwow, kod tegni mag mach. Gigo duto noloso gi mula." 
Exodus38:4 Bende nolosone kendono gimoro mar mula machalo gi sing’enge moketo e bwo ndiri molwore. Gino nochopo mana e kore gi yo ka malo. 
Exodus38:5 Nothedho ratege ang’wen mag mula, moketo e konde ang’wen mag gima chalo gi sing’engeno, mondo orwakie ludhene." 
Exodus38:6 Noloso ludhego gi yiend shita, mobawo gi mula." 
Exodus38:7 Norwakogi e ratege manie bath kendo-mar-misango koni gi koni, mondo gibed mag ting’e. Nolose gi bepe moweyo iye thuolo ka i sanduk." 
Exodus38:8 Nolenyo mula mag rangi mane okawo kuom mon mane tiyo e dho Hemb Romo, mi olosogo karaya mar lwok kod rachungine." 
Exodus38:9 Bende noloso laru. Kuma odok yo milambo noketoe pasia molos gi law katana maber ma borne romo mita piero abich. 
Exodus38:10 Nong’awogi e sirni piero ariyo, morwak e rachungi piero ariyo mag mula. To rang’aw kod ratege miriwogo sirnigo nolos gi fedha." 
Exodus38:11 Koma odok yo nyandwat noketoe pasia ma borne romo mita piero abich. Nong’awogi e sirni piero ariyo, morwak e rachungi piero ariyo mag mula." 
Exodus38:12 To koma odok yo podho chieng’ noketoe pasia ma borne romo mita piero ariyo gabich mong’aw e sirni apar kod ratege apar. Rang’aw kod ratege miriwogo sirni nolos gi fedha. 
Exodus38:13 Bor mar koma odok yo wuok chieng’ ne romo mita piero ariyo gabich. 
Exodus38:14 E dir rangach koni gi koni nolieroe pasia ma borne oromo mita abiriyo gi nus. 
Exodus38:15 Pasia ka pasia nong’aw e sirni adek, morwak e rachungi adek." 
Exodus38:16 Pasia mag laru duto notwang’ gi law katana maber. 
Exodus38:17 Rachungi norwakie sirni molos gi mula, to rang’aw kod ratege mag sirni nolos gi fedha, kendo nobaw wi sirnigo gi fedha. Ratege mag sirni duto mag laru bende nolos gi fedha." 
Exodus38:18 Pasia mar dhoranga laru nolos gi law katana maber, mogoe kido gi usi mambulu gi maralik kod makwar. Borne ne romo mita apar, to borne modhi malo mita ariyo gi nus maromre gi pasia mar laru." 
Exodus38:19 Ne ong’awe e sirni ang’wen morwak e ang’wen mag mula, to rang’awgi nolos gi fedha, kendo wigi kod rategegi nobaw gi fedha." 
Exodus38:20 Loye duto mag Hema Maler kod mag laru nolos gi mula. 
Exodus38:21 Magi e kar romb gik mane Musa oketo e lwet jo-Lawi mane tiyo e bwo Ithamar wuod Harun jadolo, mondo olosgo Hema Maler, ma nyinge moro en Hemb Rapar." 
Exodus38:22 Bezalel wuod Uri ma wuod Hur ja-Juda noloso gik moko duto mane Ruoth Nyasaye ochiko Musa. 
Exodus38:23 Oholiab wuod Ahisamak ma ja Dan ema ne konye. Oholiab nolony e tich goro kite, gi tweng’o, kod tich goyo maradadi e law katana gi usi mambulu gi maralik kod makwar." 
Exodus38:24 Kar romb dhahabu duto mane otigo kuom loso Kama Ler ne romo kilo alufu achiel gi mia ariyo kod piero adek, kipimo gi rapim mitiyogo e tich Nyasaye. Dhahabugo duto nochiw ka mich mowal ni Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Exodus38:25 Kar romb fedha mane ji ogolo e kinde mane ikwanogie, ne romo kilo alufu ang’wen gi mia abich kod piero aboro, kipimo gi rapim mitiyogo e tich Nyasaye." 
Exodus38:26 Fedhago ema ne ochok ka ne ng’ato ka ng’ato mokwan ogolo nus-shekel, nimar kar romb joma ne okwan ma hikgi oromo piero ariyo kata mokadho kanyo ne alufu mia auchiel gadek, kod mia abich gi piero abich (603,550). Nus shekelno nopim gi rapim mitiyogo tich Nyasaye." 
Exodus38:27 Kilo alufu ang’wen gi mia abich kod piero abich mag fedhago nolosgo rachungi mag Kama Ler kod mag pasia. Kilo alufu ang’wen gi mia abich kod piero abichgo ema nolosgo rachungi mia achiel, ka rachung ka rachung kawo kilo piero ang’wen gabich gi nus." 
Exodus38:28 To kilo piero adek mag fedha mane odong’ nolosgo rang’aw kod ratege mag sirni, kendo nobawgo wi sirni." 
Exodus38:29 Mula mane ji ochiwo ka mich mowal ni Ruoth Nyasaye noromo kilo alufu adek gi mia abich. 
Exodus38:30 Mago Bezalel nolosogo rachungi mag dhoranga Hemb Romo, kendo nolosogo kendo-mar-misango mar mula kod gima chalo gi sing’enge, kaachiel gi gik moko duto mitiyogo e kendono." 
Exodus38:31 Bende nolosogo rachungi duto mag laru gi mag sirni mane ni e dhoranga laru, kaachiel gi loye duto mag Hema Maler kod mag laru." 
Exodus39:1 Ne gitiyo gi usi mambulu gi maralik kod makwar kuom loso lewni malich mane jodolo rwako ka gitiyo Kama Ler, kendo kuom loso ni Harun lep lemo kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nochiko Musa." 
Exodus39:2 Ne giloso law dolo miluongo ni efod gi dhahabu kod usi mambulu gi maralik kod makwar, kendo gi law katana maber." 
Exodus39:3 Ne gipamo dhahabu nyaka odoko mareprep, mi ne gilire matindotindo, kendo ne gikade ka tol mondo jatweng’o molony oti kode kaachiel gi usi mambulu gi maralik kod makwar kod law katana maber." 
Exodus39:4 Ne giloso ni efod misibe ariyo mitweyego e gok gi yo ka nyime kod kang’eye. 
Exodus39:5 To okanda mane ni kuome nolos machal kode kendo en bende nolose gi dhahabu kod usi mambulu gi maralik kod makwar kod law katana maber, kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nochiko Musa." 
Exodus39:6 Ne giloso kite mag berul, mi gichomo e otunge mag dhahabu, mondikie nying yawuot Israel e yo ma jagoro molony goroe." 
Exodus39:7 Noketogi e misib efod ka rapar mar dhout Israel mana kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nochiko Musa. 
Exodus39:8 Ne giloso law agoko e yo ma jatueng’o molony tueng’oe, ka gitiyo gi dhahabu kod usi mambulu gi maralik kod makwar, kod law katana maber mana kaka niloso efod." 
Exodus39:9 Ne gilose maromre, mi gibane diriyo. Borne ne romo lwedo achiel, to lachne bende lwedo achiel." 
Exodus39:10 Ne gichano kuome laini ang’wen mag kite ma nengogi tek. Laini mokwongo noketie sardius gi topaz kod karbunkal," 
Exodus39:11 to laini mar ariyo ne mar emarald gi safir kod diamond. 
Exodus39:12 Laini mar adek noketie jasinth gi aget kod amethust," 
Exodus39:13 to laini mar ang’wen ne mar berul gi oniks kod jasper. Kidi ka kidi norwak e tunge mar dhahabu. 
Exodus39:14 Kitego nondikie nying dhout Israel apar gariyo. Nogorgi ka kido, ma moro ka moro ne nigi nying achiel achiel mag dhoudi apar gariyogo." 
Exodus39:15 Ne giloso ni law agoko thiwni mag dhahabu maler, molos ka tol mokadi." 
Exodus39:16 Ne giloso otunge ariyo kod ratege ariyo mag dhahabu, eka ne giketo ratege ariyogo e riak law agoko gi malo koni gi koni." 
Exodus39:17 Ne gitueyo thiwni ariyo mag dhahabu e ratege kande mane ni e riak law agoko koni gi koni. 
Exodus39:18 To dho tondego komachielo ne gitueyo e otunge ariyo ka. Kamano e kaka ne gitudo law agoko gi misibe miriwogo ka nyim efod gi ka toke. 
Exodus39:19 Ne giloso ratege ariyo mag dhahabu mi giriedo e riak law agoko gi yo ka mwalo kod yoka iye, koni gi koni kama omanyore gi efod." 
Exodus39:20 Bende ne giloso ratege ariyo moko mag dhahabu, mi girwako yo ka mwalo e dho misibe ariyo mag gok efod, but kama otuang’gigo e okanda." 
Exodus39:21 Ne gitueyo ratege mag law agoko e ratege mag efod gi tol mambulu mondo law agoko olier e okanda gi malo, kendo kik ogonyre. Mano e kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nochiko Musa." 
Exodus39:22 Ne giloso aroya mar umo efod gi law achiel mambulu. 
Exodus39:23 Notuch diere ma wich wuokie, kendo aluora mar kama otuchino notwang’ gi pien, mondo kik yiechi." 
Exodus39:24 E riak lawno aluorane ne gitwang’o gik mong’inore ka machunga, molos gi usi mambulu gi maralik kod makwar, kod law katana maber." 
Exodus39:25 Bende ne giloso gara mag dhahabu, mi giketo e riak law alwora e kind gik mong’inorego." 
Exodus39:26 Kamano gara nokikore gi gik mong’inore ong’inore e laini achiel e aluora mar riak lawno mogik piny. Lawno nirwako pile kitiyo tich dolo kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nochiko Musa. 
Exodus39:27 Ne gitwang’o kandhe ni Harun gi yawuote," 
Exodus39:28 kendo ne gilosonigi kilemba gi ogute gi sirweche 
Exodus39:29 kod okanda. Gigo duto nolos gi law katana maber mogoe maradadi gi usi mambulu gi maralik kod makwar, eyo ma jagoro molony goyoe. Mago duto ne gitimo mana kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nochiko Musa." 
Exodus39:30 Ne giloso gima opamore ka san gi dhahabu maler mondo obed osimbo maler kendo ne gindiko kuome ni, “MOWAL NI RUOTH NYASAYE” wechego nogor mana e yo ma jagor kidi goroe." 
Exodus39:31 Ne gitueyone tol mambulu mondo oketego e kilemba gi yo ka malo, mana kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nochiko Musa." 
Exodus39:32 Tije duto mag Hema Maler, ma en Hemb Romo ma Nyasaye romoe gi joge norumo. Jo-Israel notimo gik moko duto mana kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nochiko Musa." 
Exodus39:33 Ne gikelo ni Musa Hema Maler gi hema ma oko kod gige duto, kaka ramekni gi bepe gi rariw gi sirni kod rachungi," 
Exodus39:34 gi raum molos gi piende imbe molok gi range makwar, kod raum molos gi piende monyong’ kod pasia mogeng’o sanduk," 
Exodus39:35 gi Sandug Rapar, gi ludhene, gi raum," 
Exodus39:36 kod mesa gi gige duto gi makati miketo e nyim Nyasaye pile," 
Exodus39:37 kod rachung taya molos gi dhahabu maler, kaachiel gi teyni miketo kuome, gi gige duto, kod mor taya," 
Exodus39:38 gi kendo mar dhahabu, gi mor wir, gi ubani mang’ue ng’ar, gi pasia mar dho Hema," 
Exodus39:39 kod kendo-mar-misango molos gi mula gi gire mar mula machalo gi sing’enge, gi ludhene kod gige duto, gi karaya kod rachungine" 
Exodus39:40 gi pasia mag laru, gi sirni mage kod rachungine, kaachiel gi pasia man e dhoranga laru, gi tondene kod loyene gi gik moko duto mitiyogo tich Hema Maler, ma en Hemb Romo." 
Exodus39:41 Ne gikelo bende lewni motwang’ malich ma jodolo tiyogo e Kama Ler, tiende ni lep lemo mag Harun jadolo kod lep yawuote ma girwako ka gitiyo tich dolo." 
Exodus39:42 Jo-Israel nosetimo tije duto mana kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nochiko Musa. 
Exodus39:43 Musa norango gik moko duto mane giseloso, moneno ni giselosogi mana kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nosechiko, omiyo noguedhogi." 
Exodus40:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa niya," 
Exodus40:2 “Chieng’ due achiel mar due mokwongo, nyaka ichung Hema Maler, ma en Hemb Romo." 
Exodus40:3 Ket Sandug Rapar e iye kendo igeng’ Sanduk gi pasia. 
Exodus40:4 Kel mesa e iye, kendo ichanie gik moko duto monego obedie. Rachung taya bende ikel, mi imok teyni man kuome." 
Exodus40:5 Ket kendo miwang’oe ubani e nyim Sandug Rapar, kendo igeng’ dho Hema Maler gi pasia." 
Exodus40:6 To ket kendo-mar-misango e nyim dho Hema Maler, ma en Hemb Romo." 
Exodus40:7 Ket karaya e kind Hemb Romo gi kendo-mar-misango, mi iolie pi." 
Exodus40:8 Bang’e ichielne laru aluora gi pasia, kendo ilier pasia moro mondo ogeng’ dhoranga laru." 
Exodus40:9 “Eka ikaw mor wir, iwirgo Hema Maler kod gik moko duto manie iye. Kamano inipwodhe kaachiel gi gige duto mondo obed gima ler ahinya." 
Exodus40:10 Bang’e iwir kendo-mar-misango, kaachiel gi gige duto mondo obed maler ahinya." 
Exodus40:11 Bende iwir karaya kaachiel gi rachungine mondo iwalego. 
Exodus40:12 “Bang’e ikel Harun gi yawuote e dho Hemb Romo, kendo ilwokgi gi pi." 
Exodus40:13 Eka irwak Harun gi lep dolo, kendo iwire gi mo, kiwale mondo obed jadolona." 
Exodus40:14 Bang’ mano ikel yawuote machiegni, kendo irwaknigi kandhe." 
Exodus40:15 Wirgi mana kaka isewiro wuon-gi, mondo gin bende gibed jodolona. Wirno biro miyo gibedo jodolona kaachiel gi nyikwagi kuom tiengegi duto nyaka chieng’.”" 
Exodus40:16 Musa notimo gik moko duto mana kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nochike. 
Exodus40:17 Omiyo chieng’ due achiel mar due mokwongo e higa mar ariyo kane gia Misri, nochungo Hema Maler." 
Exodus40:18 Nochunge kama: Nochano rachungi, morwakoe bepe, kendo noketo raripene mochungogo sirni." 
Exodus40:19 Noyaro hema maoko e wi Hema maler, mi noume gi raumne kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nochike." 
Exodus40:20 Nokawo kite mag rapar moketo e sanduk. Norwako ludhe e ratege mag sanduk, eka noyieyo raum e wiye." 
Exodus40:21 Noketo sanduk e Hema Maler, mogeng’e gi pasia. Kamano nogeng’o Sandug Rapar kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nochike." 
Exodus40:22 Noketo mesa e Hemb Romo gi yo ka oko mar pasia, koma ochomo yo nyandwat," 
Exodus40:23 mochanoe makati miketo e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye pile mana kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nochike. 
Exodus40:24 Noketo rachung taya e Hemb Romo gi yo milambo koma omanyore gi mesa," 
Exodus40:25 moketo teyni kuome e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, mana kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nochike." 
Exodus40:26 Noketo kendo-mar-dhahabu e Hemb Romo gi yo ka oko mar pasia," 
Exodus40:27 mowang’oe ubani mang’ue ng’ar mana kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nochike. 
Exodus40:28 Nogeng’o dho Hema Maler gi pasia," 
Exodus40:29 kendo noketo kendo-mar-misango e dho Hema Maler, ma en Hemb Romo. Notimoe misango mar mogo mana kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nochike." 
Exodus40:30 Noketo karaya mar lwok e kind Hemb Romo gi kendo-mar-misango, mooloe pi lwok." 
Exodus40:31 Musa gi Harun gi yawuote ne lwokoe lwetegi gi tiendegi 
Exodus40:32 ka gidonjo e Hemb Romo kata ka gidhi e kendo-mar-misango mana kaka Nyasaye nochiko Musa. 
Exodus40:33 Noliero pasia e aluora duto mar laru, mogeng’ogo Hema Maler kaachiel gi kendo-mar-misango, kendo noliero pasia moro e dhoranga laru. Kamano Musa notieko tich duto," 
Exodus40:34 mi bor polo noimo Hemb Romo, kendo duong’ maler mar Ruoth Nyasaye nopong’e." 
Exodus40:35 Musa ne ok nyal donjo e Hemb Romo nikech bor polo ne ni kanyo, bende nikech duong’ maler mar Ruoth Nyasaye nopong’e." 
Exodus40:36 E wuodh jo-Israel duto, ne ginyalo dhi e kambi moro mana ka bor polo oa e Hema Maler," 
Exodus40:37 to kane bor polo ok oa, ne ok gidhi nyime gi wuoth, to ne girito nyaka chieng’ moro oa." 
Exodus40:38 Kamoro amora mane jo-Israel dhiye, bor polo mar Ruoth Nyasaye nosiko ewi Hema Maler godiechieng’, to gotieno mach ne liel ei bor polono, kendo jo-Israel duto ne nyalo nene." 
Leviticus1:1 Ruoth Nyasaye noluongo Musa mowuoyo kode gi e Hemb Romo ma Nyasaye romoe gi joge, kowachone niya:" 
Leviticus1:2 Nyis jo-Israel ni ka ng’ato kuomgi chiwo chiayo mondo otimna misango, to chiayono nyalo bet dhiang’ kata diel kata rombo." 
Leviticus1:3 Ka ng’ato chiwo dhiang’ mondo otimgo misango miwang’o pep, to nyaka obed rwath maonge songa. Enochiwe e dhoranga Hemb Romo e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye mondo Ruoth Nyasaye oyie kode." 
Leviticus1:4 Nyaka oket lwete ewi chiayono, mi Ruoth Nyasaye noyie gi misangono mondo obed gima opwodhnego richone." 
Leviticus1:5 Eka noneg rwadhno e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo jodolo ma joka Harun nokaw remo, kendo nokir e bethe duto mag kendo-mar-misango manie dho Hemb Romo." 
Leviticus1:6 Bang’ mano noyang’ chiayono, kendo nopoge lemo lemo." 
Leviticus1:7 Joka Harun jadolo nomok mach e kendo-mar-misango, kotimogo misango, mi giniketie yien." 
Leviticus1:8 Ginichan lemogo kod wich gi bor e yien moket e majno. 
Leviticus1:9 Jambich gi tielo to nyaka lwok gi pi, eka jadolo nowang’gi kaachiel gi lemo duto e kendo-mar-misango, kotimogo misango miwang’o pep, mondo odum mamit ni Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Leviticus1:10 Ka ng’ato ochiwo rombo kata diel mondo otimgo misango miwang’o pep, to nyaka obed im kata nyuok maonge songa." 
Leviticus1:11 Nyaka onege e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye e bath kendo-mar-misango koma ochomo yo nyandwat, kendo jodolo ma joka Harun nyaka kir remo e bethe duto mag kendo-mar-misango." 
Leviticus1:12 Eka ng’atno nopog ring’o lemo lemo, mi jadolo nocham lemogo kaachiel gi wich kod bor kuom yien moketi e mach manie kendo-mar-misango." 
Leviticus1:13 Jambich gi tielo to nyaka lwok gi pi, eka jadolo nochiwgi kaachiel gi lemo duto e kendo-mar-misango mondo otimgo misango miwang’o pep ma tikne dum mamit ni Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Leviticus1:14 Ka ng’ato chiwo winyo mondo otimgo ni Ruoth Nyasaye misango miwang’o pep, to nyaka ochiw mana akuch odugla kata nyathi akuru." 
Leviticus1:15 Jadolo nokel chiwono e kendo-mar-misango kendo nochod wiye, eka owang’e e kendo mar-misango, to rembe nyaka bi mi chuer e kor kendo-mar-misango." 
Leviticus1:16 Nyaka ogol oswakone kaachiel gi gik manie iye, mi owit e bath kendo-mar-misango koma ochomo yo wuok chieng’, kama ipukoe buru." 
Leviticus1:17 Nyaka obambe ma ok ogolo buombene oko, eka owang’e ewi yien moket e mach manie kendo-mar-misango. En misango miwang’o pep, madum mamit ni Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Leviticus2:1 Ka ng’ato timo ni Ruoth Nyasaye misango mar cham, to nyaka ochiw mogo mayom, kendo ool mo kuome, mi omedie ubani." 
Leviticus2:2 Eka nokele ni jodolo ma joka Harun, kendo jadolo achiel nojuk mogo sanja moruw gi mo, mi nowang’ kaachiel gi ubani duto ka rapar e kendo-mar-misango. Mano en misango miwang’o mondo tikne odum mang’ue ng’ar ni Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Leviticus2:3 To mogo gi mo modong’ kuom chiwono nobed mar Harun gi yawuote. En gima ler moloyo, nimar ogole kuom misango miwang’o ni Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Leviticus2:4 Ka ichiwo gima otedi mondo otimgo misango mar cham, to nyaka obed makati matindotindo ma ok ketie thowi, molos gi mogo mayom modwal gi mo, kata chapat ma ok ketie thowi, mowir gi mo." 
Leviticus2:5 To ka en gima ochiel e tawo, to nyaka obed mar mogo mayom moruw gi mo, to ok oketie thowi." 
Leviticus2:6 Nyaka ging’inge madundedunde, kendo olie mo. Mano en misango mar cham." 
Leviticus2:7 Ka ichiwo gima otedi e sufuria mondo otimgo misango mar cham, to nyaka obed mar mogo mayom modwal gi mo." 
Leviticus2:8 Kel ni Ruoth Nyasaye misango molos kamano, kendo imiye jadolo, mi jadolo notere e kendo-mar-misango." 
Leviticus2:9 Enopog moko mondo owang’ e kendo-mar-misango ka rapar. En misango miwang’o mondo tikne odum mang’ue ng’ar ni Ruoth Nyasaye. 
Leviticus2:10 To gima odong’ kuom chiwono nobed mar Harun gi yawuote. En gima ler moloyo, nikech ogole kuom misango miwang’o ni Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Leviticus2:11 Misengni duto mag cham muchiwo ni Ruoth Nyasaye nyaka bed ma ok oketie thowi. Bende kutimo ni Ruoth Nyasaye misango miwang’o, to kik thowi kata mor kich bedie." 
Leviticus2:12 To gigo unyalo chiwo ni Ruoth Nyasaye ka misango mar chamb agwela, to kik wang’gi e kendo-mar-misango kaka iwang’o misango madum tik mang’ue ng’ar." 
Leviticus2:13 Misengni duto mag cham mutimo nyaka ketie chumbi majiwo singruok mane utimo gi Nyasaye. Kamano chumbi nyaka keti e misengni duto mutimo. 
Leviticus2:14 Ka utimo ni Nyasaye misango mar cham gi cham mokwongo nyak, to nyaka uchiw cham manyien molodi kendo moyoki." 
Leviticus2:15 Nyaka uolie mo, kendo uketie ubani. Mano en misango mar cham." 
Leviticus2:16 Jadolo nokaw cham moko moruw gi mo, mi nowang’ kaachiel gi ubani duto ka rapar. En misango miwang’o ni Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Leviticus3:1 Ka ng’ato chiwo rwath kata dwasi mondo otimgo ni Ruoth Nyasaye misango mar sawo, to nyaka obed mana dhiang’ ma onge songa." 
Leviticus3:2 Ng’atno nyaka ket lwete ewi dheno, kendo oyang’e e dho Hemb Romo. Jodolo ma joka Harun nokaw remo, kendo nokir e bethe duto mag kendo-mar-misango." 
Leviticus3:3 Achiel kuom jodologo nyaka kaw boche duto mag jambich," 
Leviticus3:4 gi nyiroke gi boche mogawogi man but oguro, kod jwala mabor man ewi chuny gi nyiroke, mi owang’gi ni Ruoth Nyasaye ka misango miwang’o pep." 
Leviticus3:5 Joka Harun nowang’gi e kendo-mar-misango ewi misango miwang’o pep man e yien moket e mach mondo obed misango miwang’o madum mamit ni Ruoth Nyasaye. 
Leviticus3:6 Ka ng’ato chiwo diel kata rombo mondo otimgo ni Ruoth Nyasaye misango mar sawo, to nyaka obed ma dichwo kata ma dhako maonge songa." 
Leviticus3:7 Ka im ema otimogo misango, to nyaka okele e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye," 
Leviticus3:8 mi oket lwete e wiye, kendo oyang’e e nyim Hemb Romo. Eka joka Harun nokaw remo, kendo nokir e bethe duto mag kendo-mar-misango." 
Leviticus3:9 Bang’ mano, ng’atno nyaka pog boche duto kaka sembe mong’ad gie lihumblu, gi boche mag jambich," 
Leviticus3:10 kod nyiroke kaachiel gi boche mogawogi man but oguro kod jwala mabor man ewi chuny gi nyiroke, mondo obed misango miwang’o ni Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Leviticus3:11 Jadolo nowang’ mago duto e kendo-mar-misango ka chiemo michiwo ni Ruoth Nyasaye. 
Leviticus3:12 Ka chiwo ma otimogo misangono en diel, to nyaka ochiwe e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye," 
Leviticus3:13 mi oket lwete ewi chiayono, kendo oyang’e e nyim Hemb Romo. Eka joka Harun nokaw remo, kendo nokir e bethe duto mag kendo-mar-misango." 
Leviticus3:14 Bang’ mano ng’atno nyaka pog boche duto mag jambich," 
Leviticus3:15 kod nyiroke, kaachiel gi boche mogawogi man but oguro, kod jwala mabor man ewi chuny gi nyiroke, mondo obed misango miwang’o ni Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Leviticus3:16 Jadolo nowang’ mago duto e kendo-mar-misango madum mamit. Boche duto gin mag Ruoth Nyasaye. 
Leviticus3:17 Enobed chik mochwere kuom tienge duto, kamoro amora mudakie, ni kik ucham bor kata remo." 
Leviticus4:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa niya: 
Leviticus4:2 Nyis jo-Israel ni magi e chike ma omako ng’ato ang’ata ma oboth, mi oketho chikna moro amora mi otimo gimoro ma chikgo okwero." 
Leviticus4:3 Ka jadolo maduong’ oketho, mi okelo chola kuom jo-Isarel, to nyaka ochiw ni Ruoth Nyasaye nyarwath maonge songa mondo otimgo misango mar golo richo, kopwodhogo ketho ma osetimono." 
Leviticus4:4 Enokel nyarwadhno e dho Hemb Romo e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, mi noket lwete e wiye, kendo noyang’e kanyo." 
Leviticus4:5 Eka nokaw rembe moko, mi okel ei Hemb Romo." 
Leviticus4:6 Enolut lith lwete e remono, kendo nokir nyadibiriyo e nyim pasia maler e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Leviticus4:7 Bang’ mano, jadolono nomien remo moko e tunge kendo-mar-misango miwang’oe ubani e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye ei Hemb Romo, to nopuk remo duto modong’ e tiend kendo-mar-misango miwang’o pep manie dho Hemb Romo." 
Leviticus4:8 To boche duto mogol kuom nyarwadhno nyaka ket tenge. Gin boche mag jambich," 
Leviticus4:9 kod nyiroke, kaachiel gi boche mogawogi man e bath oguro, kod jwala mabor man ewi chuny gi nyiroke." 
Leviticus4:10 Mago noket tenge mana kaka iketo boche mogol kuom boche mitimogo misengni mag sawo. Jadolo nyaka wang’ bochego e kendo-mar-misango miwang’o pep. 
Leviticus4:11 To pien nyarwadhno gi ringe duto, kaachiel gi wiye kod tiendene gi jambiye kod owuoche," 
Leviticus4:12 ma tiende ni nyarwadhno duto, noting’ kendo noter oko mar kambi kama owe ni puko buch kendo-mar-misango, mi nowang’e kanyo te e mach mar yien e pidh buruno." 
Leviticus4:13 Ka oganda Israel duto odoko joketho kakia, mi gitimo gimoro ma chik Ruoth Nyasaye okwero, mi wachno ok ong’ere," 
Leviticus4:14 to achien ofwenyore, to nyaka gichiw nyarwath mondo otimgo misango mar golo richo, mi gikele e nyim Hemb Romo." 
Leviticus4:15 Eka jodong oganda noket lwetgi ewi nyarwadhno e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo noyang’e kanyo." 
Leviticus4:16 Jadolo maduong’ nokaw remo moko kendo nokel ei Hemb Romo. 
Leviticus4:17 Eka nolut lith lwete e remono kendo nokir nyadibiriyo e nyim pasia maler e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye. 
Leviticus4:18 Bang’ mano nomien remo moko e tunge kendo-mar-misango man e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye ei Hemb Romo, kendo nopuk remo duto modong’ e tiend kendo-mar-misango miwang’o pep man e dho Hemb Romo." 
Leviticus4:19 Eka nokaw boche duto mag nyarwadhno, mi nowang’gi e kendo-mar-misango." 
Leviticus4:20 Nowang’ nyarwadhno mana kaka iwang’o rwath mitimogo misango mar golo richo. Kamano e kaka jadolo nopwodhnigi kethogi, mi nowenigi." 
Leviticus4:21 Enogol nyarwadhno oko mar kambi, kendo nowang’e mana kaka nowang’ rwath machielo cha. Mano en misango mar golo richo ni oganda." 
Leviticus4:22 Ka jatelo moro oketho chik moro amora mar Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasache kakia, mi odoko jaketho," 
Leviticus4:23 to bang’e onyise ni oseketho chik, nyaka ochiw nywok maonge songa mondo otimgo misango." 
Leviticus4:24 Enoket lwete ewi chiayono, kendo noyang’e e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye kama iyang’oe chiayo mitimogo misango miwang’o pep. En misango mar golo richo." 
Leviticus4:25 Eka jadolo nogwel remb chiayono gi lith lwete, mi nomien e tunge kendo-mar-misango miwang’o pep. To remo duto modong’ nyaka puk e tiend kendono." 
Leviticus4:26 Enowang’ boche duto e kendo-mar-misango mana kaka iwang’o boche mag misengni mag sawo. Kamano e kaka jadolo nopwodh ketho ng’atno mi nowene. 
Leviticus4:27 Ka ng’ato ang’ata oketho chik moro amora mar Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasache kokia, mi odoko jaketho," 
Leviticus4:28 to bang’e onyise ni oseketho chik, to nyaka okel diel maonge songa mondo otimgo misango mar golo richo, kopwodhogo ketho mosetimono." 
Leviticus4:29 Enoket lwete ewi chiayono, kendo noyang’e e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye kama iyang’oe jamni mitimogo misengni miwang’o pep." 
Leviticus4:30 Eka jadolo nogwel remo gi lith lwete, mi nomien e tunge kendo-mar-misango miwang’o pep. To remo duto nyaka puki e tiend kendono." 
Leviticus4:31 Enogol bochene duto mana kaka igolo boche mag jamni mitimogo misengni mag sawo, mi jadolo nowang’gi e kendo-mar-misango mondo odum mamit ni Ruoth Nyasaye. Kamano e kaka jadolo nopwodh ketho ng’atno, mi nowene." 
Leviticus4:32 Ka ng’ato ochiwo rombo mondo otimgo misango mar golo richo, to nyaka obed rombo ma nyaburi maonge songa." 
Leviticus4:33 Enoket lwete e wiye, kendo noyang’e mondo otimgo misango mar golo richo, kama iyang’oe jamni mitimogo misengni miwang’o pep." 
Leviticus4:34 Eka jadolo nogwel remo gi lith lwete, mi nomien e tunge kendo mar misango miwang’o pep. To remo duto nopuk e tiend kendono." 
Leviticus4:35 Enogol boche duto, mana kaka igolo boche mag rombe mitimogo misengni mag sawo. Eka nowang’ bochego ewi misengni miwang’o ni Ruoth Nyasaye, kopwodhogo ketho ma ng’atno osetimo, mi nowene." 
Leviticus5:1 Ka omi ng’ato okuong’ore mondo ohul gima oseneno kata mosewinjo, to otamore hulo, en bende odoko jaketho, kendo nyaka ochul." 
Leviticus5:2 Ka ng’ato omulo gimoro makuero, kaka le makuero motho, bed ni en le maoko kata mopidhi, kata gima mol motho," 
Leviticus5:3 kata ka ogere kuom gimoro amora makuero moa kuom dhano, ka ok ong’eyo, mi ofwenyo achien, to enodok jaketho." 
Leviticus5:4 Kata ka ng’ato omwomore, mokuong’ore ka ok ong’eyo, mondo otim gima rach kata gima ber e wach moro ma ji thoro mwomoree kakuong’ore, mi ofwenyo achien, to enodok jaketho." 
Leviticus5:5 Ka achiel kuom buchegi omako ng’ato, mi ohulo kaka oseketho," 
Leviticus5:6 to nyaka okel ni Ruoth Nyasaye chiayo madhako, ma rombo kata diel, kuom ketho mosetimono mondo otimgo misango mar golo richo. Eka jadolo nopwodhnego kethoneno, mi nowene." 
Leviticus5:7 Ka ng’ato odhier ma ok onyal yudo kata mana chiayo moro matin, to enokel ni Ruoth Nyasaye akuch odugla ariyo, kata nyithi akuru ariyo, kuom richo mosetimono. Akuru achiel notimgo misango mar golo richo, to machielo notimgo misango miwang’o pep." 
Leviticus5:8 Enokel ni jadolo winygo, kendo nokuong ochiw winyo monego timgo misango mar golo richo, mi jadolo nomin wiye, to ok nochod chuth." 
Leviticus5:9 Enokir remb winyono moko e kor kendo-mar-misango, to remo modong’ nyaka bi, mi chuer e tiend kendono. En misango mar golo richo." 
Leviticus5:10 Winyo machielo, to notimgo misango miwang’o pep, kaka chik dwaro. Kamano e kaka jadolo nopwodhnigo ng’atno kethone, mi nowene." 
Leviticus5:11 Ka ng’ato ok nyal kata mana chiwo akuch odugla ariyo kata nyithi akuru ariyo kuom richone, to nyaka ochiw kilo ang’wen mag mogo mayom mondo otimgo misango mar golo richo. To kik oolie mo, kata kik oketie ubani, nikech en misango mar golo richo." 
Leviticus5:12 Enokel ni jadolo mogono, mi jadolo nojuk sanja ka rapar, mondo owang’ e kendo-mar-misango ewi misengni miwang’o ni Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Leviticus5:13 Kamano e kaka jadolo nopwodh ni ng’atno ketho mosetimo kuom chikego, mi nowene." 
Leviticus5:14 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa niya: 
Leviticus5:15 Ka ng’ato oboth, moketho, mi ok ochiwo gima onego ochiw ni Ruoth Nyasaye, to nyaka okelni Ruoth Nyasaye im maonge songa, mondo otimgo misango mipwodhogo ketho mar gowi. Nengo imno nyaka pim gi shekel mar fedha mitiyogo e tich Nyasaye. En misango mar golo ketho." 
Leviticus5:16 Bende nyaka ochul nengo mar gima ne ok ochiwo ni Ruoth Nyasaye, komedoe achiel kuom abich mar nengono. Enochiwe ni jadolo, mi jadolo nokaw imno, kendo notimgo misango mipwodhogo ketho mar gowi, mi ketho ng’atno nowene." 
Leviticus5:17 Ka ng’ato oketho, motimo gima Ruoth Nyasaye okwero, bed ni ok ong’eyo ni osetimo kamano, to pod en mana jaketho." 
Leviticus5:18 Nyaka okel ni jadolo im maonge songa, mondo otimgo misango mipwodhogo ketho mar gowi, kendo jadolo nopwodhnego ketho mosetimo kokia, mi nowene." 
Leviticus5:19 En misango mipwodhogo ketho mar gowi, nikech ng’atno oseketho mobedo gi gowi e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Leviticus6:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa niya: 
Leviticus6:2 Ka ng’ato oketho, motimo gima rach e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, mokuong’ore gi miriambo, kowuondo wadgi kuom gima nomiye mondo okan, kata kuom gima osingne, kata kuom gima osekwalo, kata kosechamo malang’," 
Leviticus6:3 kata kokwanyo gimoro to oriamboe," 
Leviticus6:4 odoko jaketho. Omiyo nyaka ochul gima osekwalo kata mosechamo malang’, kata ma nomiye mondo okan, kata mane olal to okwanyo," 
Leviticus6:5 kata gimoro amora mane okuong’oree gi miriambo, to enochul gino pep, chieng’ mochiwoe misango mipwodhogo ketho mar gowi, komedoe achiel kuom abich mar nengo gino." 
Leviticus6:6 Bende enokel ni Ruoth Nyasaye im maonge songa ma nengone opim ni oromo timogo misango mipwodhogo ketho mar gowi. 
Leviticus6:7 Jadolo notimnego misango mipwodhogo ketho mar gowi, mi nowene kuom gimoro amora ma notimo, mosemiyo obedo jagowi." 
Leviticus6:8 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa niya," 
Leviticus6:9 “Koro nyis Harun gi yawuote ni chik mar misango miwang’o pep ema: Misango miwang’o pep nyaka bed e kendo-mar-misango otieno duto nyaka okinyi, to bende mach nyaka sik ka liel kanyo." 
Leviticus6:10 Bang’e jadolo norwak law katana maber, kod sirwari mondo ogeng’go duge. Eka nogol buch misango ma mach osewang’o e kendo-mar-misango, mi noket e bath kendono." 
Leviticus6:11 Bang’e nolok lepe moko, eka nogol buru e kambi, mi oter oko kama oyangi." 
Leviticus6:12 Mach nosik ka liel e kendo mar misango ma ok otho. Okinyi kokinyi, jadolo nyaka ketie yien mondo oliel, eka ochanie misango miwang’o pep, kendo owang’ie boche mag misengni mag sawo." 
Leviticus6:13 Mach nyaka sik ka liel e kendo mar misango ma ok otho ngang’. 
Leviticus6:14 “To ma e chik mar misango mar cham: Joka Harun nochiwe e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye e dho kendo-mar-misango. 
Leviticus6:15 Achiel kuom jodolo nojuk mogo sanja moruw gi mo, kaachiel gi ubani duto moketie. Enowang’ sanja mojukono ka rapar e kendo-mar-misango mondo odum mang’ue ng’ar ni Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Leviticus6:16 To modong’, Harun gi yawuote nocham, maonge thowi, e laru mar Hemb Romo, ma en kama oyang ni Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Leviticus6:17 Mogono asemiyo joka Harun ka migapgi kuom misengni motimna kiwang’o gi mach. En gima ler moloyo mana ka misango mar golo richo kendo ka misango mipwodhogo ketho mar gowi. 
Leviticus6:18 Joka Harun duto machwo nyalo chame ka migapgi kuom misengni mowang’ ni Ruoth Nyasaye. Mano en chik mochwere kuom tiengeu duto. Gimoro amora mogere kuom misengnigo nodok mowal ni Ruoth Nyasaye. 
Leviticus6:19 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa niya," 
Leviticus6:20 “Mich ma Harun gi yawuote nochiw ni Ruoth Nyasaye chieng’ mowire nobed mogo moromo kilo ang’wen, ma en misango mar cham mapile. Nus mogono nochiw gokinyi, to nus machielo nochiw godhiambo." 
Leviticus6:21 Notede gi mo e tawo, eka inikele ka oseruwore maber, mi inichiwe kong’injore matindotindo mondo otimgo misango mar cham madum mamit ni Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Leviticus6:22 Nyakwar Harun ka nyakwar Harun mobedo jadolo maduong’ ema nochiwe. Mano en chik mochwere nyaka chieng’. Nowang’e ni Ruoth Nyasaye ka misango miwang’o pep. 
Leviticus6:23 Misengni duto mag cham ma jodolo chiwo nyaka wang’ pep. Kik chamgi kata matin.” 
Leviticus6:24 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa niya," 
Leviticus6:25 “Nyis Harun gi yawuote ni chik mar misango mar golo richo ema: Chiach misango mar golo richo nyaka yang’ kama iyang’oe jamni mitimogo misengni miwang’o pep. En gima ler moloyo. 
Leviticus6:26 Jadolo motimo misangono ema nochame e laru mar Hemb Romo ma en kama oyang ni Ruoth Nyasaye. 
Leviticus6:27 Gimoro amora mogere kuom misangono nobed mowal ni Ruoth Nyasaye. Ka remb misangono okirore e nanga, to nyaka lwoke kama oyang ni Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Leviticus6:28 Agulu motedie ring misango mar golo richo nyaka negi. To ka aguch mula ema otedee, to nyaka rudhe kendo lawe gi pi." 
Leviticus6:29 Ng’ato ang’ata ma dichwo ma jaodgi jadolo nyalo chamo misangono. En gima ler moloyo. 
Leviticus6:30 Ka remb chiayo motimgo misango mar golo richo okel e Hemb Romo mondo opwodhgo richo e Kama Ler, to misangono ok nocham, to nowang’e mana gi mach.”" 
Leviticus7:1 Ma e chik mar misango mipwodhogo ketho mar gowi. En gima ler moloyo. 
Leviticus7:2 Chiach misango mipwodhogo ketho mar gowi nyaka yang’ mana kama iyang’oe jamni mitimogo misengni miwang’o pep, kendo rembe nyaka kir e bethe duto mag kendo-mar-misango." 
Leviticus7:3 Jadolo nokaw bochene duto, kaka sembe gi boche moumo jambich," 
Leviticus7:4 kod nyiroke kaachiel gi boche mogawogi man but oguro kod jwala mabor manie wi chuny kod nyiroke. Enochiwgi 
Leviticus7:5 kowang’ogi e kendo-mar-misango mondo obed misango miwang’o ni Ruoth Nyasaye. En misango mipwodhogo ketho mar gowi. 
Leviticus7:6 Ng’ato ka ng’ato ma dichwo ma jaodgi jodolo nyalo chame, to nyaka chame kama owal ni Ruoth Nyasaye, nikech en gima ler moloyo." 
Leviticus7:7 Nitie chik achiel moriwo misango mar golo richo kod misango mipwodhogo ketho mar gowi. Misengnigo nodong’ ni jadolo motimogi, kopwodhogo richo." 
Leviticus7:8 Jadolo motimo misango miwang’o gi chiayo ma ng’ato ochiwo, nodong’ gi pien chiayono." 
Leviticus7:9 Bende misango ka misango mar cham motedi e kendo, kata mochiel e sufuria kata e tawo, nodong’ ni jadolo matime." 
Leviticus7:10 To misengni mamoko duto mag cham, moruw gi mo kata ma ok oruw gi mo, joka Harun duto nopogre maromre." 
Leviticus7:11 Chik mar misango mar sawo michiwo ni Ruoth Nyasaye ema: 
Leviticus7:12 Ka ng’ato ochiwe ka gir erokamano, to nyaka omedie makati ma ok oketie thowi, moted gi mo, gi chapat maonge thowi mowirie mo, kod kek matindotindo moted gi mogo mayom, modwal gi mo." 
Leviticus7:13 To bende nyaka medie makati moketie thowi. 
Leviticus7:14 To kek achiel kuom misango ka misango nyaka yiegi e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye. Enodong’ ni jadolo ma kiro remb misango mar sawo e kendo mar misango. 
Leviticus7:15 Ring misango mar sawo nyaka cham chieng’ mochiwee. Ok nowe kata matin nindi nyaka okinyi. 
Leviticus7:16 To ka ng’ato otimo misango mochopogo kuong’ruok, kata ma otimo atima kuom herone, to jodolo nyaka chame chieng’ mochiweno kod kinyne." 
Leviticus7:17 To ka ring’o moko odong’ nyaka chieng’ mar adek, to nyaka wang’ie e mach." 
Leviticus7:18 Ka ring misango mar sawo ocham nyaka chieng’ mar adek, to Nyasaye ok noyie gi ng’at mochiweno, kata misango bende ok nochiw ka gima ber, to enobed gima kwero, kendo ng’at mochame nobed jaketho." 
Leviticus7:19 Ring’o aring’a ma ogere kuom gima ogak ok nocham, to nyaka wang’e gi mach. Ng’ato ang’ata ma ok ogak nyalo chamo ring’o," 
Leviticus7:20 to ng’at mogak kochamo ring misango mar sawo mochiw ni Ruoth Nyasaye, to nong’ad kare oko kuom ogandagi." 
Leviticus7:21 Ka ng’ato ogere kuom gimoro mogak, bed ni en dhano kata le, kata gimoro amora makuero, to bang’e ochamo ring misango mar sawo mochiw ni Ruoth Nyasaye, to nong’ad kare oko kuom ogandagi." 
Leviticus7:22 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa 
Leviticus7:23 ni mondo onyis jo-Israel kama: Kik ucham bor chiayo moro amora. 
Leviticus7:24 Bor chiayo motho athoya kende kata ma ondiek onego unyalo konyorugo e tich moro, to kik uchame." 
Leviticus7:25 Ng’ato ang’ata mochamo bor chiayo ma lembe moko nono osetimgo misango miwang’o ni Ruoth Nyasaye, nyaka ng’ad kare oko kuom ogandagi." 
Leviticus7:26 Kik ucham remo moro amora, bed ni en mar winyo kata mar le, kamoro amora mudakie." 
Leviticus7:27 Ng’ato ang’ata mochamo remo nong’ad kare oko kuom ogandagi. 
Leviticus7:28 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa 
Leviticus7:29 ni mondo onyis jo-Israel kama: “Ng’ato ang’ata mobiro mondo otim misango mar sawo nyaka pog lemo moko obed misango michiwo ni Ruoth Nyasaye. 
Leviticus7:30 En owuon nokel ni Ruoth Nyasaye boche miwang’o gi mach, kod agoko ma iyiego e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Leviticus7:31 Jadolo nowang’ bochego e kendo-mar-misango, to agoko nodong’ ni Harun gi yawuote." 
Leviticus7:32 Bende unumi jadolo em ma korachwich mar chiayo ka chiayo motimgo misango mar sawo. 
Leviticus7:33 Jaka Harun machiwo remo kod boche mag misango mar sawo ema nokaw emno. 
Leviticus7:34 Agoko kod em mag chiayo ka chiayo ma jo-Israel timogo misengni mag sawo, amiyo Harun jadolo kod yawuote mondo obed mich moyiedhi migolo kuom jo-Israel nyaka chieng’." 
Leviticus7:35 Mano en lemo momi Harun gi yawuote kuom misengni miwang’o, chakre chieng’ mane oketgie jodolo mag Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Leviticus7:36 Chieng’ mane owirgieno, Ruoth Nyasaye nogolo chik ni, jo-Israell nyaka mi jodolo migepego. Mano en chik momako jo-Israel nyaka chieng’." 
Leviticus7:37 “Mago e chike mag misango miwang’o pep, gi mag misango mar cham, gi mag misango mar golo richo, gi mag misango mipwodhogo ketho mar gowi, gi mag misengni mitimo chieng’ miketo jadolo e tich, kod mag misengni mag sawo." 
Leviticus7:38 Ruoth Nyasaye nomiyo Musa chikego e got Sinai chieng’ mane ochikoe jo-Israel mondo ochiwni Ruoth Nyasaye misengni maggi, ka gin e thim Sinai.”" 
Leviticus8:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa niya," 
Leviticus8:2 “Kaw Harun gi yawuote kendo kaw lep dolo gi mor wir gi rwath mitimogo misango mar golo richo gi imbe ariyo kod odheru moting’o makati ma ok ketie thowi," 
Leviticus8:3 bende ichok oganda jo-Israel duto e dho Hemb Romo.” 
Leviticus8:4 Musa notimo kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nochike, mi jo-Israel nochokore e dho Hemb Romo." 
Leviticus8:5 Eka nonyiso ji niya, “Gima adwaro timoni, ema Ruoth Nyasaye nochiko.”" 
Leviticus8:6 Nokelo Harun gi yawuote, mi olwoko gi pi." 
Leviticus8:7 Bang’ mano norwako ni Harun kandhu, mi otweyone okanda e nungone kendo norwakone aroya, gi law efod, kotueyo gi okanda mar efod." 
Leviticus8:8 Notueyone law agoko, moketo ombulu miluongo ni Urim gi Thumim e iye." 
Leviticus8:9 Eka nosidhone kilemba, kendo oketone dhahabu mopamore, ma en osimbo maler, e nyim kilemba, kaka ne Ruoth Nyasaye ochike." 
Leviticus8:10 Bang’e Musa nokawo mor wir, mowirogo Hema Maler kod gik moko duto mane ni e iye, kopwodhogi ni tich Nyasaye." 
Leviticus8:11 Bende nokiro mo moko dibiriyo e kendo-mar-misango, mowire kaachiel gi gige duto, kod karaya mar lwok gi rachungine, kopwodhogi ni tich Nyasaye." 
Leviticus8:12 Noolo mo moko ewi Harun, mi owire, kokete e tich dolo." 
Leviticus8:13 Eka nokelo yawuot Harun, morwakonigi kendhe, kendo otueyonigi okanda, mi osidhonigi kilemba, kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nochike." 
Leviticus8:14 Bang’ mano Musa nokelo rwath mane idhi timgo misango mar golo richo, mi Harun gi yawuote noketo lwetgi e wiye, eka Musa nonege." 
Leviticus8:15 Nokawo remb rwadhno mi omieno e tunge kendo-mar-misango gi lith lwete, mondo opwodhego. Eka nopuko remo modong’ e tiend kendo-mar-misango, mi owalo ni Ruoth Nyasaye, kotimoe misango mipwodhogo richo." 
Leviticus8:16 Bang’e nokawo boche mag jambich gi jwala mabor man ewi chuny, kod nyiroke gi boche mogawo nyiroke, mi nowang’ogi e kendo-mar-misango." 
Leviticus8:17 To rwadhno duto, ma tiende gi piene gi ringe kod owuoche nogolo oko mar kambi, mowang’o pep, kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nochike." 
Leviticus8:18 Eka Musa nokelo im mane ibi timgo misango miwang’o pep. Harun gi yawuote noketo lwetgi ewi imno, eka Musa nonege." 
Leviticus8:19 Nokawo remo mokiro e bethe duto mag kendo-mar-misango. 
Leviticus8:20 Ne opogo imno lemo lemo, mowang’o wiye gi lembe duto kod bochene." 
Leviticus8:21 Eka nolwoko jambich kod tielo e pi, mowang’ogi e kendo-mar-misango. Mano ne misango miwang’o pep mondo odum mamit ni Ruoth Nyasaye, kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nochiko Musa." 
Leviticus8:22 Bang’ mano Musa nokelo im machielo mar keto jadolo e tich. Harun gi yawuote noketo lwetgi e wiye, eka Musa nonege." 
Leviticus8:23 Nokawo remo momieno e it Harun ma korachwich, kendo e lith lwete mathwon ma korachwich, kendo e lith tiende mathwon ma korachwich." 
Leviticus8:24 Eka nokelo yawuot Harun, momieno remo e itgi ma korachwich gi lith lwetgi mathwon ma korachwich, kod lith tiendgi mathwon ma korachwich. Bang’e nokiro remo modong’ e bethe duto mag kendo-mar-misango." 
Leviticus8:25 Eka nokawo boche duto, kaka sembe gi boche mogawo jambich gi jwala mabor man ewi chuny, kod nyiroke gi boche mogawo nyiroke, kaachiel gi em ma korachwich." 
Leviticus8:26 Eka nodhi e odheru moting’o makati ma ok ketie thowi mane ni e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, mokawoe makati achiel ma ok ketie thowi gi kek achiel moted gi mo, kod chapat achiel, moketogi e wi boche gi em ma korachwich." 
Leviticus8:27 Gigo duto noketo e lwet Harun gi yawuote mondo ochiw ka mich moyiedhi. 
Leviticus8:28 Bang’e nochako okawogi e lwetgi, mowang’ogi kaachiel gi misango miwang’o pep e kendo-mar-misango. Mano ne misango mar keto jodolo e tich, miwang’o gi mach mondo odum mamit ni Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Leviticus8:29 Musa nokawo agoko mochiwo ka mich moyiedhi. Mano ne e lembe kuom im mar keto jodolo e tich, kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nochike." 
Leviticus8:30 Nokawo mor wir moko gi remo moko mane ni ewi kendo mar misango, mokiro kuom Harun gi lepe mag dolo, kendo kuom yawuote gi lepgi mag dolo." 
Leviticus8:31 Musa nowachoni Harun gi yawuote niya, “Teduru ring imno e dho Hemb Romo, kendo uchame kuno kaachiel gi makati manie odheru moting’o gik miketogo jodolo e tich, mana kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nochika niya, ‘Harun gi yawuote nyaka cham ring’ono.’" 
Leviticus8:32 To ring’o kod makati modong’, nyaka uwang’ pep gi mach." 
Leviticus8:33 Kuom ndalo abiriyo kik ua e dho Hemb Romo, nyaka ndalo mar ketou e tich dolo rum, nimar nyasi mar ketou e tich dolo kawo ndalo abiriyo." 
Leviticus8:34 Kaka wasepwodhou kawuononi e kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nochiko ni mondo otim. 
Leviticus8:35 Omiyo koro beduru e dho Hemb Romo odiechieng’ gotieno kuom ndalo abiriyo, kutimo gima Ruoth Nyasaye ochiko, mondo kik utho. Mano e kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nochika.”" 
Leviticus8:36 Kamano Harun gi yawuote notimo gik moko duto mane Ruoth Nyasaye omiyo Musa ochikogi. 
Leviticus9:1 Chieng’ mar aboro Musa noluongo Harun gi yawuote kod jodong Israel. 
Leviticus9:2 Nowacho ni Harun niya, “Kaw nyarwath mondo otimgo misango mar golo richo, kod im otimgo misango miwang’o pep, mondo ikelgi e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye. Jamnigo nyaka bed maonge songa." 
Leviticus9:3 Bang’e chik jo-Israel mondo okaw nywok otimgo misango mar golo richo, kendo gikaw nyaroya gi nyarombo ma hikgi achiel achiel, maonge songa, mondo otimgo misango miwang’o pep," 
Leviticus9:4 kendo gikaw rwath gi im mondo otimgo misengni mag sawo e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, kaachiel gi misango mar cham moruw gi mo, nimar Ruoth Nyasaye biro fwenyorenu tinende.”" 
Leviticus9:5 Ne gikelo gik mane Musa ochikogigo duto e nyim Hemb Romo, kendo oganda duto nosudo, mochung’ e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Leviticus9:6 Eka Musa nowacho niya, “Ma e gima Ruoth Nyasaye osechikou mondo utim mondo duong’ne maler ofwenyrenu.”" 
Leviticus9:7 Nowacho ni Harun ni, “Sud but kendo-mar-misango, mondo itim misango mar golo richo, kod misango miwang’o pep, mondo ipwodhrigo, kendo ipwodhgo joodi. Bang’e itim misango gi jamni ma oganda ochiwo, kipwodhogo oganda, kaka Ruoth Nyasaye ochiko.”" 
Leviticus9:8 Omiyo Harun nosudo but kendo-mar-misango, mi onyang’o nyarwath mibi timgo misango mar golo richone owuon." 
Leviticus9:9 Yawuote nokelone remo, mi olutoe lith lwete, kendo omienogo tunge mag kendo-mar-misango. To remo modong’ nopuko e tiend kendo." 
Leviticus9:10 Nokawo boche gi nyiroke kod jwala mabor man ewi chuny mag chiayo mane otimgo misango mar goolo richo, mowang’o e kendo-mar-misango kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nochiko Musa." 
Leviticus9:11 To ring’o gi pien notero oko mar kambi, mowang’o pep." 
Leviticus9:12 Bang’ mano Harun noyang’o chiayo mane ibi timgo misango miwang’o pep, kendo yawuote nogamone remo, mokiro e bethe duto mag kendo-mar-misango." 
Leviticus9:13 Eka ne gigamone lemo mag chiayono, kaachiel gi wich, mi ne owang’ogi e kendo-mar-misango." 
Leviticus9:14 Nolwoko jambich kod tielo, mi nowang’ogi e kendo-mar-misango, kaachiel gi misango miwang’o pep." 
Leviticus9:15 Eka nokelo gik mane ji ochiwo, mokawo nywok mane ibi timgo misango mar golo richo ni oganda. Noyang’e kendo nopwodhogo richogi kaka ne opwodho richone owuon." 
Leviticus9:16 Bang’ mano nokelo chiayo mane ibi timgo misango miwang’o pep, mi notiyo kode kaka chik dwaro." 
Leviticus9:17 Eka nokelo mogo mane ibi timgo misango mar cham, kendo nojuko sanja mowang’o e kendo-mar-misango kaachiel gi misango mar okinyi miwang’o pep." 
Leviticus9:18 Bang’e noyang’o rwath kod im mane ibi timgo misango mar sawo ni oganda, mi yawuote nogamone remo mokiro e bethe duto mag kendo-mar-misango." 
Leviticus9:19 Ne gikawo boche mag rwath, gi sembe mar im gi boche mogawo jambich kod nyiroke gi boche mogawo nyiroke, kaachiel gi jwala mabor man ewi chuny," 
Leviticus9:20 mi giketogi ewi agoko mag jamnigo, eka ne giwang’ogi e kendo-mar-misango." 
Leviticus9:21 Harun nokawo agoko gi em ma korachwich, mi ochiwo e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye ka mich moyiedhi, kaka Musa nochiko." 
Leviticus9:22 Bang’e Harun noting’o lwete malo kochomo oganda, moguedhogi. Eka nolor oa kama notimoe misengni mag golo richo, gi misengni miwang’o pep, kod mag sawo." 
Leviticus9:23 Musa gi Harun nodonjo e Hemb Romo, to kane giwuok oko ne giguedho ji, mi duong’ maler mar Ruoth Nyasaye nofwenyore ni ji duto." 
Leviticus9:24 Mach nomwuoch e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, mowang’o misango miwang’o pep, kaachiel gi boche mane nie kendo-mar-misango. Kane ji duto oneno kamano, ne gikok, mi gipodho piny auma." 
Leviticus10:1 Nadab gi Abihu, ma yawuot Harun, nokawo tepgi mag mach, mi giketoe mach, eka ne gioloe ubani. Ne gidonjo e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, mi giyiegoe mach ma ok ni kare, mane Ruoth Nyasaye ok ochiko mondo ochiwne." 
Leviticus10:2 Mi mach nomwoch e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, motiekogi pep. Kamano ne githo kanyo e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Leviticus10:3 Bang’ mano Musa nowacho ni Harun niya, “Ma e gima Nyasaye nowuoyoe niya, ‘Joma sudo buta nyaka ng’e ni an Ng’ama Ler, kendo nyaka gimiya duong’ e nyim ji duto.’ ” To Harun noling’ aling’a thi, ka dhoge omoko." 
Leviticus10:4 Musa nooro wach, mi oluongne Mishael gi Elzafan ma yawuot Uziel, ma owadgi wuon Harun kod yawuote ma Eleazar gi Ithamar niya, “Biuru uting’ ringre oweteu ugol oko mondo oa Kama Ler.”" 
Leviticus10:5 Omiyo ne gibiro mi giting’ogi gi lepgi, kendo gigologi oko mar kambi kaka Musa nosechikogi." 
Leviticus10:6 Bang’e Musa nowacho ni Harun kod yawuote ma Eleazar gi Ithamar niya, “Kik uwe wiu yugno, kendo kik uyiech lepu, manyiso ni uywak, nimar dipo ka utho, mi Ruoth Nyasaye okecho gi oganda duto. Joweteu ma jo-Israel nyalo ywago joma ne Ruoth Nyasaye otieko gi mach." 
Leviticus10:7 To un kik ua e dho Hemb Romo, nono to utho, nimar osewiru gi mor wir mar Ruoth Nyasaye.” Mi ne gitimo kaka Musa nowacho." 
Leviticus10:8 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Harun niya," 
Leviticus10:9 “In kod yawuoti kik umadh kong’o kata gimoro mamero ji, ka udhi e Hemb Romo, nono to utho. Mano en chik momako nyikwau nyaka chieng’." 
Leviticus10:10 Nyaka umak chikno, kupogo gik mowal ni Ruoth Nyasaye, kod gik moko nono, kendo kupogo gik mokwer kod gik ma ok okwer," 
Leviticus10:11 kendo kupuonjo jo-Israel chike mane Ruoth Nyasaye omiyogi gi dho Musa.” 
Leviticus10:12 Musa nowacho ni Harun gi yawuote modong’ ma Eleazar gi Ithamar niya, “Kawuru mogo modong’ kuom misango mar cham miwang’o gi mach ni Ruoth Nyasaye mondo ucham maonge thowi but kendo-mar-misango, nikech en gima ler moloyo." 
Leviticus10:13 Mano emomiyo nyaka uchame Kama Ler, nimar en pokni kaachiel gi yawuoti. Pok onogo ogol kuom misengni miwang’o ni Ruoth Nyasaye nikech kamano e kaka nochika." 
Leviticus10:14 Un gi yawuotu unucham agoko gi em mar mich moyiedhi michiwo ni Ruoth Nyasaye, to nyaka uchamgi kamoro amora mowal ni Ruoth Nyasaye, nimar osemiugi kuom misengni mag sawo ma jo-Israel timo." 
Leviticus10:15 Em kod agoko nyaka kel kaachiel gi boche mag misengni miwang’o ni Ruoth Nyasaye, mondo obed mich moyiedhi michiwo ni Ruoth Nyasaye. To bang’e em gi agoko nodong’ni gi nyithindi kaka poku mosiko nyaka chieng’, nikech Ruoth Nyasaye ochiko kamano.”" 
Leviticus10:16 Musa nopenjo wach diel mane otimgo misango mar golo richo, mi ne onyise ni osewang’e. Omiyo mirima nomake gi Eleazar kod Ithamar ma yawuot Harun mane odong’. Nopenjogi niya," 
Leviticus10:17 “Marang’o ne ok uchamo misango mar golo richo Kama Ler, to en misango maler moloyo? Ne omiugo mondo ugolgo richo mar oganda jo-Israel kupwodhogi kuom richogi e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Leviticus10:18 Ne ok ukelo rembe ei Kama Ler, omiyo ne onego uchame ei Kama Ler kaka nochika.” To Harun nodwoko Musa niya," 
Leviticus10:19 “Kawuono yawuota osetimo ni Ruoth Nyasaye misango mar golo richogi giwegi kod misango miwang’o pep, to kata kamano neye gima osetimorena! To koro ka da acham misango mar golo richo kawuono, bende datimo maber e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye?”" 
Leviticus10:20 Kane Musa owinjo kamano, noneno ni Harun ni kare." 
Leviticus11:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa gi Harun 
Leviticus11:2 ni mondo onyis jo-Israel kama: 
Leviticus11:3 Unyalo chamo kit le moro amora, kata kit chiayo moro amora ma ombong’ne opogore ariyo kendo nyamo kambula." 
Leviticus11:4 To kik ucham mago ma ombong’gi opogore ariyo to ok nyam kambula, kata mago manyamo kambula to ombong’gi ok opogore ariyo. Nyaka ukuer ngamia," 
Leviticus11:5 gi terere," 
Leviticus11:6 kod apuoyo, nikech kata ginyamo kambula kamano, to ombong’gi ok opogore ariyo." 
Leviticus11:7 Mbidhi bende nyaka ukuer, nikech kata ombong’ne opogore ariyo kamano to ok onyam kambula." 
Leviticus11:8 Kik ucham lego, kata mana mulogi ka gisetho kik umulgi. Unukwan-gi ka gik makuero." 
Leviticus11:9 To kuom gik modak e thim unyalo chamo mago duto man gi thuokgi kod kagahla, bed ni gidak e pi chumbi, kata e pi maonge chumbi." 
Leviticus11:10 To nyaka ukuer mago duto maonge gi thuokgi kata kagahla, kata ka gin gik matindo manywolore, kata ka gin gik madongo." 
Leviticus11:11 Ginibednu gik makuero. Ok unuchamgi, kendo kata mana mago motho nobednu gik makuero." 
Leviticus11:12 Gimoro amora modak e pi maonge thuoke kata kagahla nobednu gik makuero. 
Leviticus11:13 Winy ma nyaka kuer e magi: Ongo gi koga gi kwasi 
Leviticus11:14 gi otenga kod kit okunekune duto," 
Leviticus11:15 gi kit agak duto 
Leviticus11:16 gi udo gi nyatawo gi okok kod kit olith duto," 
Leviticus11:17 gi tula matin gi osou gi tula maduong’ 
Leviticus11:18 gi tula ma ite dongo gi mbusi gi achuth 
Leviticus11:19 gi nyamnaha gi kit ng’ang’a duto gi cherwa kot oliktik. 
Leviticus11:20 Gik mahuyo kanyakla duto, kendo ma wuotho gi tiende ang’wen, nobednu gik makuero," 
Leviticus11:21 mak mana mago ma tiendegi ochomore e ogwendegi mondo gichikrego. 
Leviticus11:22 Kuom gik makamago unyalo chamo kit bonyo madongo duto, gi git osialo duto, gi kit onjiri duto, kod kit dede duto." 
Leviticus11:23 To gik moko duto mahuyo kanyakla, kendo man gi tiende ang’wen, nobednu gik makuero." 
Leviticus11:24 Ka ng’ato omulo gik makamago to obedo mogak, kendo gimoro amora mogere kuomgi ka gisetho nobed mogak nyaka odhiambo." 
Leviticus11:25 Ng’at moting’ogi ka gisetho nyaka lwok lepe, to nosik kogak nyaka odhiambo." 
Leviticus11:26 Unukuer le duto ma ombong’gi ok opogore ariyo, kendo ma ok nyam kambula, kendo ng’ato ang’ata momulogi nobed mogak." 
Leviticus11:27 Bende unukuer le duto man gi tiende ang’wen, ma wuotho ka nyono piny gi i tiendegi kaka paka kata guok. Ng’at momulogi ka gisetho nobed mogak nyaka odhiambo." 
Leviticus11:28 Ng’at moting’ogi ka gisetho nyaka lwok lepe, to nosik kogak nyaka odhiambo. Le makamago nyaka ukuer." 
Leviticus11:29 Gik mamol ma nyaka ukuer e magi: Oyieyo gi gudhugudhu kod kit ng’ech duto," 
Leviticus11:30 gi ogue gi kalagwena gi olele gi obongo kod ong’ongruok. 
Leviticus11:31 Unukuergi, kendo ng’at momulogi ka gisetho nobed mogak nyaka odhiambo." 
Leviticus11:32 Ka achiel kuomgi otho, molwar kuom gimoro, to gino nobed mogak, bed ni en gima olos gi yien, kata en law, kata pien kata ogunia, kata gimoro amora mikonyruokgo pile. Nyaka nyume e pi, to nosik kogak nyaka odhiambo. Bang’e nobed maler." 
Leviticus11:33 Ka achiel kuom gigo olwar e agulu, to gik manie agulugo duto nobed mogak, kendo aguluno nyaka negi." 
Leviticus11:34 Chiemo moro amora moolie pi moa e aguluno nobed mogak, kendo gimoro amora mimadho manie aguluno bende nobed mogak." 
Leviticus11:35 Ka achiel kuom gigo otho mi olwar kuom gimoro amora, to gigo nobed mogak. Ka olwar kuom kendo, to kendono nyaka kethi, nimar odoko mogak, kendo nyaka okwane kamano." 
Leviticus11:36 Kata obedo ni gimoro amora mogere kuom gima othono bedo mogak kamano, to soko kata dago ma pi gudore nosik ka ler, kata bed ni gima kamano olwarie." 
Leviticus11:37 Kapo ni achiel kuom gigo otho, molwar kuom kodhi mipidho, to kodhigo nosik ka ler," 
Leviticus11:38 to ka kodhigo osebudi e pi, to unukwane ka gima ogak." 
Leviticus11:39 Ka chiayo moro michamo otho, to ng’ato ang’ata momule nobed mogak nyaka odhiambo." 
Leviticus11:40 Ng’at mochame nyaka lwok lepe, to nosik kogak nyaka odhiambo. Kata ng’at moting’o chiayono bende nyaka lwok lepe, kendo nosik kogak nyaka odhiambo." 
Leviticus11:41 Gik mamol duto gin gik makuero, omiyo kik chamgi:" 
Leviticus11:42 Gin gik ma lak gi bund igi, kata ma wuotho gi tiende ang’wen, kata man gi tiende mathoth. Ok nuchamgi, nikech gin gik makuero mamiyo ji bedo mogak." 
Leviticus11:43 Kik uchidru gi gimoro amora ma lak e lowo. Kik uduwru kodgi, nono to ubedo joma ogak." 
Leviticus11:44 An e Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu, omiyo nyaka opwodhru kendo ubed joma ler, nikech an aler. Kik uchidru gi gimoro mamol kata malak e lowo." 
Leviticus11:45 An e Ruoth Nyasaye mane ogolou e piny Misri mondo ubed Nyasachu. Omiyo nyaka obed maler nikech aler. 
Leviticus11:46 Mago e chike mag le gi winy kod gik moko duto modak e pi, kaachiel gi gik moko duto malak e lowo." 
Leviticus11:47 Chikego oket mondo opog gik makuero kod gik ma ok kuero, kendo opog gik mangima michamo kod mago ma ok cham." 
Leviticus12:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa 
Leviticus12:2 ni mondo onyis jo-Israel kama: Ka dhako omako ich mi onywolo nyathi ma wuowi, to enobed mogak kuom ndalo abiriyo, mana kaka obedo mogak ka en e due." 
Leviticus12:3 Chieng’ mar aboro to nyaka ter nyathi nyangu. 
Leviticus12:4 Bang’ mano dhakono nyaka rit kuom ndalo piero adek gadek mondo rembe opwodhre. Kik omul gimoro mowal ni Ruoth Nyasaye, kata kik odonj Kama Ler nyaka ndalone mag pwodhruok rum." 
Leviticus12:5 To ka onywolo nyathi manyako, to nobed mogak kuom ndalo apar gang’wen, mano kaka obedo mogak ka en e due. Bang’ mano nyaka orit kuom ndalo piero auchiel gauchiel mondo rembe opwodhre." 
Leviticus12:6 Ka kindene mar pwodhruok kuom nyathi ma wuowi kata manyako oserumo, to enokel nyaim mondo otimgo misango miwang’o pep, kaachiel gi nyathi akuru kata akuch odugla mondo otimgo misango mar golo richo, mi omi jadolo e dho Hemb Romo." 
Leviticus12:7 Jadolo nochiwe e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye mondo opwodhgo dhakono, mi dhakono nodok maler kuom rembe mosechuer. Mano e chik momako dhako monywolo nyathi ma wuowi kata manyako." 
Leviticus12:8 Ka dhakono odhier ma ok nyal yudo nyaim, to nokel akuch odugla ariyo, kata nyithi akuru ariyo. Achiel kuomgi notimgo misango miwang’o pep, to machielo notimgo misango mar golo richo. Jadolo notim misengnigo, ka opwodhogo dhakono, mi dhakono nodok maler." 
Leviticus13:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa kod Harun niya: 
Leviticus13:2 Ka dend ng’ato obokore kata oluro kata olokore mamarmar, mi opar ni dipo kobedo dhoho, to nyaka ter ng’atno ir Harun jadolo kata ir achiel kuom yawuote." 
Leviticus13:3 Jadolo norang kama litno, to ka oyudo ni yier man kanyo olokore rachar, kendo tuone nenore ni odonjo ei pien, to mano nyiso ni en dhoho. Ka oserange kamano, to nong’ad wach ni nga’tno ogak." 
Leviticus13:4 To ka kama litno rachar, kendo ok nenre ni odonjo ei pien, to yier man kanyo bende ok olokore rachar to jadolo noket ng’at matuono kar kende kuom ndalo abiriyo." 
Leviticus13:5 Jadolo nochak orange chieng’ mar abiriyo, kendo koyudo ni kama litno pod osiko kaka chon, kendo ok olandore, to nochak oket ng’atno kar kende kuom ndalo abiriyo mamoko." 
Leviticus13:6 Chieng’ mar abiriyo jadolo nochak orange, kendo koyudo ni kama litno odok chien, kendo ok olandore, to mano nyiso ni en mana kama oroch, omiyo noland wach ni ng’atno ok ogak." 
Leviticus13:7 To ka bang’ mano kama orochno ochako olandore e dend ng’atno, to nyaka odog ir jadolo." 
Leviticus13:8 Jadolo nyaka chak range, kendo koyudo ni kama litno landore, to mano nyiso ni en tuo mar dhoho, omiyo nong’ad wach ni ng’atno ogak." 
Leviticus13:9 Ka tuo machalo dhoho omako ng’ato, to nyaka tere ir jadolo," 
Leviticus13:10 mi range. Ka nitie kido marachar kama litno, mi yier man kanyo olokore marachar, kendo kanyo onogo otimo adhola," 
Leviticus13:11 to mano nyiso ni en dhoho mosedak e del, omiyo jadolo nyaka ng’ad wach ni ng’atno ogak, kuom mano ok onego kete kar kende kuom ndalo abiriyogo, nikech ong’ere ni ng’atno ogak." 
Leviticus13:12 To ka tuono nenore ni jadolo ka gima olandore motieko dend ng’atno duto," 
Leviticus13:13 to jadolo nyaka range. Koyudo ni tuono olandore e dende duto adier, to nong’ad wach ni ng’atno ok ogak, nikech dende duto oselokore marachar, omiyo oler." 
Leviticus13:14 To ka dende ochako dholore, to nokwane ka ng’ama ogak." 
Leviticus13:15 Jadolo norang adhondeno, mi nong’ad wach ni ogak. Kama dholore nyaka kwan ka gima ok ler, nikech onyiso ni tuono en dhoho." 
Leviticus13:16 To bende ka adholano ochango, molokore rachar, to ng’atno nyaka dog ir jadolo." 
Leviticus13:17 Jadolo nyaka range, kendo koyudo ni adhondego oselokore rachar, to nyaka ong’ad wach ni ng’at matuono koro ok ogak, nikech adier oler." 
Leviticus13:18 Ka bur omako ng’ato, mi ochango," 
Leviticus13:19 to bang’e kanyono olokore rachar, kata obokore mamarmar, to ng’atno nyaka nyis jadolo kama litno." 
Leviticus13:20 Jadolo norange, kendo ka tuono nenore ni odonjo ei pien, kendo yier man kanyo olokore rachar, to mano nyiso ni dhoho otuch kama bur ne nitie, omiyo nyaka ong’ad wach ni ng’atno ogak." 
Leviticus13:21 To ka jadolo orange, mi oyudo ni yier man kanyo ok olokore rachar, kendo tuono ok odonjo ei pien, to osedok chien, to nyaka oket ng’atno kar kende kuom ndalo abiriyo." 
Leviticus13:22 Bang’ mano, koyudo ni tuono olandore e dende kata mana matin, to mano nyiso ni en tuo mar dhoho, omiyo nyaka jadolo ng’ad wach ni ng’atno ok ler." 
Leviticus13:23 To ka kama obokoreno odong’ adong’a mana kaka ne en, kendo pok olandore, to kara en mana mbala mar bur, omiyo jadolo nyaka ng’ad wach ni ng’atno ler." 
Leviticus13:24 Ka mach owang’o dend ng’ato, to bang’e kanyo ochako dhe, modoko mamarmar kata marachar," 
Leviticus13:25 to jadolo nyaka rang kama litno. Ka oyudo yier man kanyo olokore rachar, kendo tuono nenore ni odonjo ei pien, to mano nyiso ni tuo mar dhoho otuch kama owang’no. Jadolo nong’ad wach ni ng’atno ogak, nimar tuono en dhoho." 
Leviticus13:26 To ka jadolo orange, moyudo ni yier marachar onge kanyono, kendo tuono ok odonjo ei pien, to odok chien, to nyaka oket ng’atno kar kende kuom ndalo abiriyo." 
Leviticus13:27 Chieng’ mar abiriyo jadolo nyaka ng’iye kendo, to ka oyudo ni tuo oselandore e dende, mano nyiso ni en dhoho, omiyo nyaka ong’ad wach ni ng’atno ogak." 
Leviticus13:28 To ka kama litno ok omedore, to odok chien, mano nyiso ni en mana kama owang’. Jadolo nyaka ng’ad wach ni ng’atno ok ogak, nikech en mana mbala mar mach." 
Leviticus13:29 Ka ng’at moro, ma dichwo kata ma dhako nigi adhola e wiye kata e tike," 
Leviticus13:30 to jadolo nyaka rang adholano. Ka oyudo ni tuono odonjo ei pien, kendo yier man kanyo olokore mamarmar, kendo okelore okelore to mano nyiso ni kit dhoho mawuok buk ema omako wich kata tik. Omiyo jadolo nyaka ng’ad wach ni ng’at matuono ogak." 
Leviticus13:31 To ka jadolo orango kama litno, moneno ni ok odonjo ei pien, kendo onge yier moselokore mamarmar to nyaka oket ng’at matuono kar kende kuom ndalo abiriyo." 
Leviticus13:32 Nyaka orang kama litno chieng’ mar abiriyo, to koyudo ni kama otimo bukno ok olandore, kendo ni yier man kanyo ok olokore mamarmar, kendo ni kama litno ok odonjo ei pien," 
Leviticus13:33 to jatuo nyaka liel wiye kama buk nitieno, mi jadolo nokete kar kende kuom ndalo abiriyo." 
Leviticus13:34 Jadolo nochak orang kanyo chieng’ mar abiriyo, to ka oyudo ni kama otimo bukno ok olandore, kendo nenore ni ok odonjo ei pien, to nyaka ong’ad wach ni ng’atno ok ogak. Ng’atno nyaka lwok lepe, mi bed maler." 
Leviticus13:35 To bang’ mano, ka kama otimo bukno ochako olandore," 
Leviticus13:36 to jadolo nochak orange. Ka onwang’o ni oselandore adier, to ok onego odew ng’iyo ka yier oselokore mamarmar, nimar onge kiawa ni ng’atno ogak." 
Leviticus13:37 To ka kama otimo bukno osiko mana kaka chon, kendo yier marateng’ ochako twi kanyono, to mano nyiso ni osechango. Adier ng’atno koro ler, kendo jadolo nyaka ng’ad wach kamano." 
Leviticus13:38 Ka ng’at moro ma dichwo kata ma dhako nigi kuonde moko marachere e dende, to jadolo norange." 
Leviticus13:39 Ka oyudo ni kuondego rachere, kendo dok chien, to mano nyiso ni en mana kit dhoho moro maloko del marachar, omiyo ng’atno ok ogak." 
Leviticus13:40 Ka yie wi ng’atno oluny, modoko rabondo gi e dier wiye to mano ok mi odok mogak." 
Leviticus13:41 Kata ka yie wiye oluny ka nyiem wang’e mano bende nyiso ni orabondo to ok ogak. 
Leviticus13:42 To ka adhola mamarmar omako bondono, to mano nyiso ni dhoho otuch kanyo." 
Leviticus13:43 Jadolo norange, kendo koyudo ni adhola olokore mamarmar, machalo gi dhoho matuch e del," 
Leviticus13:44 to mano nyiso ni ng’atno nigi tuo dhoho, kendo ogak. Omiyo jadolo nyaka wach kamano, nimar tuo mar dhoho omako wi ng’atno." 
Leviticus13:45 Ng’at man gi tuo mar dhoho norwak lewni moyiech, kendo wiye bende nowe mak ogolo. Noum dhoge gi yo ka malo, kendo noywag niya, “Abet mogak! Abet mogak!”" 
Leviticus13:46 To kinde duto ma pod en gi dhoho, nyaka kwane ka ng’at mogak. Kuom mano enodag oko kar kende, ma ok odonj e kambi." 
Leviticus13:47 Ka law kata usi kata pien kata gimoro molos gi pien opur, molokore makwar kata maratiglo, to nyaka tere ir jadolo mi range. Mano nyaka timre kata ka lawno olos gi yie rombo kata gi katana." 
Leviticus13:48  
Leviticus13:49  
Leviticus13:50 Jadolo norang gima opurno, eka nokete kar kende kuom ndalo abiriyo." 
Leviticus13:51 To chieng’ mar abiriyo nochak orang gino, to ka kama opurno olandore, mano nyiso ni en gima ketho gik moko kaka dhoho ketho del." 
Leviticus13:52 Nyaka owang’ lawno, kata usino, bed ni en mar yie rombo kata mar katana, kata ka en gima olos gi pien, nikech gima landoreno en gima rach ka dhoho. Mano emomiyo nyaka wang’e gi mach." 
Leviticus13:53 To ka jadolo oneno ni kama opurno ok olandore e gino," 
Leviticus13:54 to enogol chik mondo olwok gino, eka nochak okete kar kende kuom ndalo abiriyo mamoko." 
Leviticus13:55 Bang’e jadolo nyaka chak range. Kata koyudo ni kama opurno ok olandore, to osiko mana kaka chon, mano pod nyiso ni ogak. Emomiyo nyaka wang’e gi mach, kata bed ni kama opurno nigi yo ka iye kata gi yo ka oko." 
Leviticus13:56 To ka jadolo orange moyudo ni kama opurno odok chien bang’ lwoko, to nong’ad kanyo oko, bed ni en kuom law kata kuom pien kata kuom usi." 
Leviticus13:57 To ka kama opurno ochako othinyore e lawno, kata e usino kata e gima olos gi pienno, to mano nyiso ni gima rachno landore e gino, omiyo nyaka wang’ gino gi mach." 
Leviticus13:58 To ka oneno ni kidono olal bang’ lwoko, to nyaka chak lwoke, eka gakne rum." 
Leviticus13:59 Mano e chik mar gima rach ka dhoho man kuom law molos gi yie rombo, kata mar katana, kata man kuom usi, kata kuom gima olos gi pien, mondo ong’e ka gima kamano ogak kata ok ogak." 
Leviticus14:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa kama: 
Leviticus14:2 Ma e chik mar ng’at mipwodho kuom tuo dhoho. Chieng’ mipwodhe to nyaka tere ir jadolo. 
Leviticus14:3 Kuom mano jadolo nyaka wuog oko mar kambi mondo odhi orange. Ka oyudo ni ng’atno ochango kuom tuoneno," 
Leviticus14:4 to nyaka ogol chik mondo okelni ng’at mipwodhono winy ariyo mangima michamo, kaachiel gi yiend sida gi usi makwar kod bad owino." 
Leviticus14:5 Eka jadolo nogol chik mondo winyo achiel onegi e agulu moting’o pi aora. 
Leviticus14:6 Bang’ mano nokaw winyo mangima gi yiend sida gi usi makwar kod owino, mi nolutgi e remb winyo mosenegno." 
Leviticus14:7 Eka nokir remono nyadibiriyo kuom ng’at mipwodhone tuo dhoho. Bang’e nong’ad wach ni ng’atno ler, kendo nowe winyo mangima cha dhi e thim." 
Leviticus14:8 Ng’at mipwodhono nolwok lepe, kendo noliel yie dende duto, mi nolwokre gi pi, eka nobed mopwodhore. Bang’ mano onyalo donjo e kambi, to ok nonind e hembe nyaka ndalo abiriyo rum." 
Leviticus14:9 Chieng’ mar abiriyo nochak oliel yie wiye duto gi yie tike kod yie wang’e kaachiel gi yie dende moko duto. Bang’e nolwok lepe kendo nolwokre gi pi, eka nobed mopwodhore chuth." 
Leviticus14:10 Chieng’ mar aboro nyaka okel imbe ariyo ma hikgi achiel achiel, kod rombo ma swini ma bende hike achiel. Jamnigo duto nyaka bed maonge songa. Bende nokel mogo moromo kilo apar moruw gi mo, mondo otimgo misango mar cham, kaachiel gi mo moromo nus lita." 
Leviticus14:11 Jadolo mapwodho ng’atno nokete kaachiel gi chiwone e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye e dho Hemb Romo. 
Leviticus14:12 Bang’e jadolo nokaw im achiel gi morno, mondo otimgo misango mipwodhogo ketho mar gowi, kendo nochiwgi e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye mondo gibed mich moyiedhi." 
Leviticus14:13 Imno nyaka yang’ ei Kama Ler miyang’oe jamni mitimogo misengni mag golo richo kod misengni miwang’o pep, nimar misango mipwodhogo ketho mar gowi dong’ ni jadolo mana kaka misango mar golo richo. En gima ler moloyo." 
Leviticus14:14 Jadolo nokaw remb misango mipwodhogo ketho mar gowi, mi nomien e dho it ng’at mipwodhono ma korachwich, kendo e lith lwete mathwon ma korachwich, kendo e lith tiende mathwon ma korachwich." 
Leviticus14:15 Bang’ mano jadolo nokaw mo, mi nool moko e tat lwete owuon ma koracham." 
Leviticus14:16 Eka enolut lith lwete ma korachwich e mo man e tat lwete ma koracham, kendo nokir nyadibiriyo e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Leviticus14:17 Bang’e nokaw mo moko modong’ e tat lwete, mi nowir e dho it ng’at mipwodhono ma korachwich, kendo e lith lwete ma korachwich, kendo e lith tiende mathwon ma korachwich, mana kuonde ma nomienie remb misango mipwodhogo ketho mar gowi." 
Leviticus14:18 Modong’ e tat lwet jadolo, to nool ewi ng’at mipwodhono. Kamano jadolo nopwodhe e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Leviticus14:19 Bang’e jadolo notim misango mar golo richo mondo opwodhgo ng’atno kar gakne. 
Leviticus14:20 Eka enowang’ chiayo mitimogo misango miwang’o pep, kendo nochiwe e kendo-mar-misango kaachiel gi misango mar cham. Kamano e kaka jadolo nopwodhe, kendo nodok maler." 
Leviticus14:21 Kapo ni ng’atno jachan, ma ok nyal yudo gigo, to nokel nyaim mondo otimgo misango mipwodhogo ketho mar gowi. Imno nobed mich moyiedhi, kendo mitimogo misango mipwodhogo gakne. Kendo nokel mogo moromo kilo apar moruw gi mo mondo otimgo misango mar cham, kaachiel gi mo moromo nus lita," 
Leviticus14:22 kod akuch odugla ariyo kata nyithi akuru ariyo kaka onyalo yudo. Winyo achiel notimgo misango mar golo richo, to machielo notimgo misango miwang’o pep." 
Leviticus14:23 Chieng’ mar aboro nokel gigo ni jadolo e dho Hemb Romo e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye mondo pwodhego. 
Leviticus14:24 Jadolo nokaw im mi bi timgo misango mipwodhogo ketho mar gowi, kaachiel gi morno, mi nochiwgi e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye ka mich moyiedhi." 
Leviticus14:25 Eka noneg imno, kendo nokaw rembe moko, mi nomien e dho it ng’at mipwodhono ma korachwich, kendo e lith lwete mathwon ma korachwich, kendo e lith lwete ma korachwich." 
Leviticus14:26 Bang’e jadolo nool mo moko e tat lwete owuon ma koracham," 
Leviticus14:27 kendo nokir mo moko nyadibiryo e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye gi lith lwete ma korachwich. 
Leviticus14:28 Eka nokaw mo moko modong’ e tat lwete, kendo nowir e dho it ng’at mipwodhono ma korachwich, kendo e lith lwete mathwon ma korachwich, kendo e lith tiende mathwon ma kotachwich, mana kuonde ma nomienie remb misango mipwodhogo ketho mar gowi." 
Leviticus14:29 Mo modong’ e tat lwet jadolo, to nool ewi ng’at mipwodhono mondo opwodhego." 
Leviticus14:30 Jadolono nokaw winyo achiel kuom winy mane ng’atno okelo, kata bed ni gin akuch odugla kata gin nyithi akuru," 
Leviticus14:31 mi notimgo misango mar golo richo, to machielo notimgo misango miwang’o pep. To bende enotim misango mar cham. Kamano e kaka jadolo nopwodh ng’atno e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Leviticus14:32 Mano e chik moket ni ng’at modhier man gi tuo mar dhoho, kendo ma ok nyal yudo chiwo mitimogo misengni mipwodhego." 
Leviticus14:33 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa gi Harun niya," 
Leviticus14:34 “Ka usedonjo e piny Kanaan ma abiro miyou mondo udagie, mi akelo gimoro marach momiyo kor ot moro opur," 
Leviticus14:35 to wuon odno nyaka dhi ir jadolo kendo nyise ni gima rach ni e ode. 
Leviticus14:36 Jadolo nyaka gol chik mondo gik moko duto manie odno ogol kapok odhi range, nono to gigo duto obedo mogak. Bang’e jadolo nodonj e odno mondo orangi." 
Leviticus14:37 Ka onwang’o ni kuonde ma gigo nitie olokore ratiglo kata makwar, kendo nenore ni odonjo e kor ot," 
Leviticus14:38 to nyaka owuog oko e dhoot, kendo olor odno kuom ndalo abiriyo." 
Leviticus14:39 Chieng’ mar abiriyo nyaka oduogi mi ochak orang ot, to koyudo ka gima rachno oselandore e kor ot," 
Leviticus14:40 to nyaka ogol chik mondo kite ma gino nitie ogol oko kendo owiti e tok dala kamoro ma ok ler. 
Leviticus14:41 Bang’ mano nogol chik mondo ochwer kor odno duto gi yo ka iye, kendo gipuk lowo ma gichwero e tok dala kamoro ma ok ler." 
Leviticus14:42 Eka giniket kite manyien kuonde ma gisegoloe moko ka, mi gimwon ot gi lowo manyien." 
Leviticus14:43 “To ka gino ochako owuok molandore, kosegol kite ka, kendo ochuer kor ot, mi ochak omwon," 
Leviticus14:44 to jadolo nyaka duog rang odno. Ka oyudo ni gino oselandore, to mano nyiso ni en gima rach ka dhoho. Kuom mano odno obedo mogak," 
Leviticus14:45 kendo nyaka muke, mi kitene gi yiende kod lope ter e tok dala, mi wit kamoro ma ok ler." 
Leviticus14:46 Ng’ato ang’ata mane oyudo odonjo e odno e kinde mane olore nobed mogak nyaka odhiambo," 
Leviticus14:47 kendo ng’ato ang’ata ma osenindo e odno kata ochiemoe, nyaka lwok lepe." 
Leviticus14:48 “To ka jadolo odhi morango odno kendo oyudo ni gino ok oselandore bang’ mwone, to nong’ad wach ni odno osepwodhi, nikech gima rachno orumo." 
Leviticus14:49 Jadolo nyaka kaw winy ariyo matindo kendo kaw yiend sida gi usi makwar kod owino opwodhgo ot, mondo odok maler." 
Leviticus14:50 Eka noneg winyo achiel e agulu moting’o pi aora," 
Leviticus14:51 kendo nokaw yiend sida gi owino kod usi makwar kaachiel gi winyo mangima cha, mi nolutgi e remb winyo mosenegno, kendo e pi malerno, mi nokir nyadibiriyo kuom ot." 
Leviticus14:52 Kamano e kaka nopwodh ot, kokonyore gi remb winyo gi pi maler gi winyo mangima gi yiend sida kaachiel gi owino kod usi makwar." 
Leviticus14:53 Winyo mangima to nowe ring dhi e thim. Kosepwodho ot kamano, to ot nodok maler." 
Leviticus14:54 “Mano e chik man kuom tuo dhoho kido mopogore opogore, kod tuo mawuok buk," 
Leviticus14:55 gi pur mamako nanga kata mamako ot 
Leviticus14:56 gi kuonde mobokore e del, kata moluro kata mamarmar." 
Leviticus14:57 Chikno nyiso kaka ipogo gik mogak kod gik ma ok ogak. En chik mar tuo dhoho gi mar gik mopur.” 
Leviticus15:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa gi Harun 
Leviticus15:2 ni mondo onyis jo-Israel ni: Ka nyot ng’ato owuok, kata koyudo tuo nyach machuer, to gima chuerno bedo mogak." 
Leviticus15:3 Kata ka nyajno chuer kata kodinore, to ng’atno ogak kendo chik mar gakne kuom chuer kamano chalo kama:" 
Leviticus15:4 Kitanda ma ng’at ma dende chuer kamano onindoe, kata gimoro amora mobetie bedo mogak," 
Leviticus15:5 ng’ato ang’ata momulo kitandano nyaka lwok lepe, kendo lwokre, to nosik kogak nyaka odhiambo." 
Leviticus15:6 Bende ng’ato ang’ata mobet kama ng’at ma dende chuer osebetie, nyaka lwok lepe, kendo lwokre, to nosik kogak nyaka odhiambo." 
Leviticus15:7 Ng’ato ang’ata momulo ng’at ma dende chuer nyaka lwok lepe, kendo lwokre, to nosik kogak nyaka odhiambo." 
Leviticus15:8 Ka ng’at ma dende chuer ong’ulo olawo kuom ng’ato, to ng’at mong’ul kuome olawno nyaka lwok lepe, kendo lwokre, to nosik kogak nyaka odhiambo." 
Leviticus15:9 Gimoro amora ma ng’at ma dende chuerno obetie ka en e wuoth bedo mogak. 
Leviticus15:10 Ng’ato ang’ata momulo gima ng’atno osebetie nobed mogak nyaka odhiambo kendo ng’ato moting’o gik ma kamago nyaka lwok lepe, kendo lwokre, to nosik kogak nyaka odhiambo." 
Leviticus15:11 Ng’ato ang’ata ma ng’at ma dende chuer omulo ka pok ologo nyaka lwok lepe kendo lwokre, to nosik kogak nyaka odhiambo." 
Leviticus15:12 Gimoro amora mochue gi lowo ma ng’at ma dende chuer omulo nyaka negi, to ka en gima olos gi bawo, to nyaka lawe gi pi." 
Leviticus15:13 Ka ng’at ma dende chuerno ochango, to nyaka owe ndalo abiriyo kadhi kopwodhore. Nolwok lepe, kendo nolwokre gi pi maler, eka nopwodhre." 
Leviticus15:14 Chieng’ mar aboro nokaw akuch odugla ariyo kata nyithi akuru ariyo, mi nobigo e dho Hemb Romo e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo nomigi jadolo." 
Leviticus15:15 Jadolo nokaw akuru achiel, mi notimgo misango mar golo richo, to machielo notimgo misango miwang’o pep. Kamano nopwodh ng’atno e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, kaka chik dwaro kuom gak mar chuer." 
Leviticus15:16 Ka nyot ng’ato owuok, to nyaka olwok dende duto gi pi, kendo nosik kogak nyaka odhiambo." 
Leviticus15:17 Nanga moro amora kata pien moro amora ma nyodo otonie nyaka lwoki, kendo nobed mogak nyaka odhiambo." 
Leviticus15:18 Chikno bende omako dhako ma ng’ato oriworego. Giduto ji ariyogo nyaka gilwokre, to ginisik ka gigak nyaka odhiambo." 
Leviticus15:19 Ka dhako odhi e due, to nobed mogak kuom ndalo abiriyo, kendo ng’ato ang’ata momule nobed mogak nyaka odhiambo." 
Leviticus15:20 Gimoro amora monindoe kata mobetie e kindego nobed mogak. 
Leviticus15:21 Ng’ato ang’ata momulo kitanda dhakono," 
Leviticus15:22 kata momulo gimoro mosebetie nyaka lwok lepe, kendo lwokre, to nosik kogak nyaka odhiambo." 
Leviticus15:23 Kata ka omulo gima nie kitanda dhakono, kata man kama obetie, to nobed mogak nyaka odhiambo." 
Leviticus15:24 Ka ng’ato oriwore gi dhakono mi rembe omiene, to nobed mogak." 
Leviticus15:25 Ka dhako moro chuer kuom ndalo mogwarore e kinde ma ok odhi e due, kata ka ochuer aming’a mokadho kaka ojadhi e due, to nobed mogak e kinde mochwerieno duto, mana kaka ndalo modhi e due." 
Leviticus15:26 Kitanda moro amora monindoe kata gimoro amora mobetie e kindeno nobed mogak mana ka kitanda monindoe kodhi e due. 
Leviticus15:27 Ng’ato ang’ata momulo gigo nobed mogak, omiyo nyaka olwok lepe, kendo olwokre, to nosik kogak nyaka odhiambo." 
Leviticus15:28 Ka dhakono ochango, to nyaka owe ndalo abiriyo kadhi, bang’e nobed maler." 
Leviticus15:29 To chieng’ mar aboro nyaka okaw akuch odugla ariyo kata nyithi akuru abiriyo, mi oter ni jodolo e dho Hemb Romo." 
Leviticus15:30 Jadolo nokaw akuru achiel, mi notimgo misango mar golo richo, to machielo notimgo misango miwang’o pep, kopwodho dhakono e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye kaka chik dwaro kuom gak mar chuer." 
Leviticus15:31 Kamano e kaka unusiem jo-Israel kuom bet mogak, nimar dipo ka gidwanyo Kar Dakna Maler manie kindgi, mi githo nikech gakgino." 
Leviticus15:32 Mano en chik momako ng’at moyudo nyach machuer kata ma nyote owuok mi odoko mogak. 
Leviticus15:33 Bende en chik mamako dhako modhi e due, kaachiel gi ng’ato ang’ata bed ni en dichuo kata dhako, ma dende chuer, kod ng’at moriwore gi dhako mogak." 
Leviticus16:1 Kane yawuot Harun ariyo kande osetho kuom chiwo mach ma ok ni kare e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye," 
Leviticus16:2 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa niya, “Nyis Harun owadu ni kik okadh pasia, mi odonj e Kama Ler e nyim raum Sandug Muma miluongo ni kar ng’wono, mak mana e kinde moketi, nono to otho, nikech afwenyora gi e bor polo man ewi raum." 
Leviticus16:3 E kinde ka kinde ma Harun donjoe Kama Ler, to nyaka okel nyarwath mondo otimgo misango mar golo richo, kod im mondo otimgo misango miwang’o pep.”" 
Leviticus16:4 Enorwak law dolo mabor gi sirwari mondo ogeng’go duge, kendo notue misip e nungone, kendo nosidh kilemba e wiye, mago duto nobed mag katana maber. Gin lep dolo, omiyo Harun nyaka lwokre ka pok orwakogi." 
Leviticus16:5 Enokaw nyuogi ariyo kuom oganda jo-Israel mondo otimgo misango mar golo richo, kendo im achiel mondo otimgo misango miwang’o pep." 
Leviticus16:6 Nyaka otim misango mar golo richo gi rwath mondo opwodhrego kaachiel gi joode. 
Leviticus16:7 Bang’ mano, nokaw nyuogi ariyo kande, kendo nokelgi e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye e dho Hemb Romo." 
Leviticus16:8 Nyaka ogo ombulu kuomgi mondo diel achiel obed mar Ruoth Nyasaye, to machielo obed mar Azazel." 
Leviticus16:9 Eka nokaw diel ma ombuch Ruoth Nyasaye olwar kuome mi notimgo misango mar golo richo. 
Leviticus16:10 Diel ma ombuch Azazel olwar kuome to nokel ka ngima e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, mi nopwodhe. Eka noriembe odhi e thim ir Azazel." 
Leviticus16:11 Harun nyaka chiw rwath mondo otimgo misango mar golo richo, kopwodhorego kaachiel gi joode." 
Leviticus16:12 Enokaw tap mach moketie mach mogol e kendo-mar-misango manie nyim Ruoth Nyasaye kaachiel gi ubani mang’ue ng’ar moromo lwedo ariyo, mi nokel ei kama nogeng’ gi pasia." 
Leviticus16:13 Eka nool ubani e majno e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye mondo ich ubani oim Sandug Rapar, mondo kik otho." 
Leviticus16:14 Enokaw remb rwath, mi nokir gi lith lwete e bath raum koma ochomo yo wuokchieng’ kendo nokir remono nyadibiriyo gi lith lwete e nyim raum." 
Leviticus16:15 Bang’ mano noyang’ diel mitimogo misango mar golo richo ni oganda jo-Israel, mi noter rembe ei kama ogeng’ gi pasia, kendo nokir remono ewi raum, kendo e nyim raum, mana kaka nokiro remb rwath." 
Leviticus16:16 Mano e kaka enopwodh Kama Ler kuom timbe mogak ma jo-Israel osedwanyego, kendo kuom timbe mane giweyogo Ruoth Nyasaye, tiende ni richogo duto. Kamano bende e kaka nopwodh Hemb Romo manie diergi, kama timbegi ogakie." 
Leviticus16:17 Ong’e ng’at moro machielo manobed ei Hemb Romo chakre sa ma Harun donjo ei Kama Ler mondo opwodhre owuon, kendo opwodh joode kod oganda duto mar jo-Israel nyaka sa ma owuokie, kosetieko tich pwodhruok duto." 
Leviticus16:18 Bang’e nowuog oko e kendo-mar-misango manie nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, mi nopwodh kendono. Nokaw remb rwath moko kod remb diel moko mi nomien-go tunge duto mag kendo-mar-misango," 
Leviticus16:19 kendo nokir remo moko nyadibirioyo gi lith lwete e kendo-mar-misango. Kamano nopuodhe kuom timbe mogak mag jo-Israel mi nomi obed maler. 
Leviticus16:20 Ka Harun osetieko pwodho Kama Ler gi Hemb Romo kendo-mar-misango, to nokel diel mangima e nyim oganda." 
Leviticus16:21 Enoket lwetene duto ewi diendno, kendo nohul richo duto mag jo-Israel gi timbe mane giweyogo Ruoth Nyasaye, tiende ni richogi duto. Enowe richogo duto ewi diendno, eka nomiye ng’at ma noyud obet ka rito mondo otere e thim."
