Leviticus16:22 Kamano diendno noting’ richo duto mag jo-Israel e thim kuma bor. Ng’atno noweye kuno mondo odhi adhiya. 
Leviticus16:23 Bang’ mano, Harun nodonj e Hemb Romo, mi nolony lep katana mane orwako kodonjo e Kama Ler kendo nowegi kanyo." 
Leviticus16:24 Eka nolwokre gi pi, kamoro moyang ni Nyasaye, kendo norwak lepe mag dolo, mi nowuog oko mondo otim misangone owuon miwang’o pep, kod mar oganda jo-Israel. Kamano nopwodhre, kendo nopwodh ji bende." 
Leviticus16:25 Enowang’ boche chiayo motimogo misango mar golo richo e kendo-mar-misango. 
Leviticus16:26 To ng’at mane oriembo diel, ka tero ir Azazel kik donj e kambi nyaka chop olwok lepe kendo olwokre." 
Leviticus16:27 Rwath gi diel motimgo misengni mag golo richo, kendo ma rembgi oseter ei Kama Ler mondo opwodhgo richo, nogol ringgi gi piendegi kod owuochgi oko e tok kambi, kama nyaka wang’gie pep." 
Leviticus16:28 Ng’at ma owang’ogi nyaka lwok lepe kendo lwokre, eka bang’e onyalo duogo e kambi." 
Leviticus16:29 Koro chik momakou nyaka chieng’ e ma: Due apar mar due mar abiriyo, un jo-Israel kaachiel gi jopinje mamoko modak kuomu, nyaka utue chiemo, kendo kik uti tich moro," 
Leviticus16:30 nikech chieng’no ema nogolnue richou mondo upwodhru. Kamano unupwodhru kuom richou duto e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye. 
Leviticus16:31 Chieng’no en chieng’ Sabato moyiedhi ma nyaka uyueye, kendo nyaka utueye chiemo. En chik momakou nyaka chieng’." 
Leviticus16:32 Jadolo mowir kendo moketi kar wuon mare e tij dolo ema notimnu pwodhruok. Enorwak lep dolo mag katana maber. 
Leviticus16:33 Kendo enopwodh Kama Ler gi Hemb Romo kod kendo-mar-misango. Eka nopwodh jodolo kod oganda jo-Israel duto. 
Leviticus16:34 Mano nobed chik momakou nyaka chieng’ mondo upwodh jo-Israel dichiel e higa kuom richogi. Kamano Musa nochopo chike mag Ruoth Nyasaye. 
Leviticus17:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa 
Leviticus17:2 ni mondo onyis Harun gi yawuote kaachiel gi jo-Israel duto ni Ruoth Nyasaye ochiko kama: 
Leviticus17:3 Ka ja-Israel moro amora onego dhiang’ kata rombo kata diel ei kambi kata oko mar kambi," 
Leviticus17:4 to ok okelo e dho Hemb Romo mondo otimgo ni Ruoth Nyasaye misango e nyim Hema Maler mar Ruoth Nyasaye, to nokwane ka ng’ama oneko. Osechuero remo, omiyo nyaka ng’ad kare oko kuom ogandagi." 
Leviticus17:5 Chikni oketi mondo jo-Israel okel ni Ruoth Nyasaye jamni ma ginego oko. Nyaka gikelgi ni jadolo e dho Hemb Romo, mondo gitim kodgi misengni mag sawo ni Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Leviticus17:6 Jadolo nokir remo e kendo-mar-misango mar Ruoth Nyasaye man e dho Hemb Romo, kendo nowang’ boche mondo odum mamit ni Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Leviticus17:7 Ka jo-Israel nego jamni, to kik gimed timo misengni ni jochiende ma gilamo, ka gidwanyorego mana kaka dhako moweyo chwore dwanyore gi chwo mamoko, mano nobed chik momakogi kaachiel gi nyikwagi nyaka chieng’." 
Leviticus17:8 Ruoth Nyasaye nomedo wacho ni Musa mondo owach ni jo-Israel niya, “Ka ja-Israel moro amora kata japiny moro modak kuomu otimo misango miwang’o pep kata misango moro amora," 
Leviticus17:9 to ok okelo e dho Hemb Romo mondo otimnigo Ruoth Nyasaye misango, nong’ad kare oko kuom ogandagi." 
Leviticus17:10 “Ka ja-Israel moro amora kata japiny moro modak kuomu ochamo remo to anabed jasike, mi nang’ad kare oko kuom ogandagi," 
Leviticus17:11 nikech ngima gimoro ni e rembe. Achiwo remo mondo otimgo misango e kendo-mar-misango mondo upwodhrugo, nimar remo, tiende ni ngima, ema ipwodhogo richo." 
Leviticus17:12 Mano emomiyo asekwero jo-Israel kaachiel gi jopinje moko modak kuomgi ni kik gicham remo. 
Leviticus17:13 “Ka ja-Isarel moro amora kata japiny moro modak kuomu odhi dwar, momako le kata winyo minyalo chamo, to nyaka ool rembe piny, kendo oik gi lowo," 
Leviticus17:14 nikech ngima gimoro ni e rembe. Mano emomiyo asekwero jo-Isarel mondo kik ocham remb gimoro, nikech ngima gino ni e rembe. Ng’at mochamo remo nong’ad kare oko." 
Leviticus17:15 “Ng’ato ang’ata, bed ni en ja-Israel kata japiny moro modak kuomu, mochamo gimoro motho athoya kende, kata ma ondiek onego, nolwok lepe kendo nolwokre, to nosik kogak nyaka odhiambo, eka bang’e nobed maler." 
Leviticus17:16 To ka ok olwoko lepe, kendo ok olwokore, to noyud kum kuom kethone.”" 
Leviticus18:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa 
Leviticus18:2 ni mondo onyis jo-Israel kama: An e Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu. 
Leviticus18:3 Kik utim timbe jo-Misri, mane udak e pinygi, kata kik utim timbe jo-Kanaan ma aterou e pinygi. Kik ulu chike jogo duto," 
Leviticus18:4 to nyaka urit chikena, kendo uluw yorena. An e Ruoth Nyasaye," 
Leviticus18:5 omiyo nyaka urit chikena gi buchena, ma ka ng’ato orito, to yudo ngima. An e Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Leviticus18:6 Kik ng’ato moro kuomu terre gi dhako moro ma watne. An e Ruoth Nyasaye. 
Leviticus18:7 Kik ikuod wi wuoru kuom terruok gi meru. En meru, omiyo kik ikuod wiye." 
Leviticus18:8 Kik iterri gi chi wuoru, nikech kitimo kamano to ikuodo wi wuoru." 
Leviticus18:9 Kik iterri gi nyameru hie, kata gi nyameru ma ng’at machielo onywolo, bed ni onywole dala kata kamoro machielo." 
Leviticus18:10 Kik iterri gi nyar wuodi kata gi nyar nyari, nikech kitimo kamano to ikuodo wiyi iwuon" 
Leviticus18:11 Kik iterri gi nyameru ma ot machielo. En nyameru, omiyo kik ikuod wiye." 
Leviticus18:12 Kik iterri gi wayu, nikech en gi wuoru gin remo achiel," 
Leviticus18:13 kata kik iterri gi nyamin meru, nikech en gi meru bende gin remo achiel." 
Leviticus18:14 Kik iterri gi chi owadgi wuoru, nikech kitimo kamano to ikuodo wi wuoruno." 
Leviticus18:15 Kik iterri gi chi wuodi, nikech kitimo kamano to ikuodo wiye." 
Leviticus18:16 Kik iterri gi chi owadu nikech kitimo kamano to ikuodo wi owaduno. 
Leviticus18:17 Kik iterri gi dhako moro to nyare bende iterorigo, kata kik ikaw nyar wuod dhakono kata nyar nyar dhakono mondo iterrigo, nimar dipo kiriwori gi rembi iwuon, to mano en richo maduong’." 
Leviticus18:18 Kik ikaw nyamin chiegi mondo obed nyieke, mi iriwri kode ka nyamin pod ngima." 
Leviticus18:19 Kik iriwri gi dhako ka ni e due. 
Leviticus18:20 Kik iterri gi chi wadu, mi omi idok mogak." 
Leviticus18:21 Kik ichiw nyathini moro ni nyasaye manono miluongo ni Molek, nikech kitimoo kamano to ikwedo nying Nyasachu. An e Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Leviticus18:22 Kik inind gi ng’ama dichwo kaka dinind gi ng’ama dhako nikech mano kwero. 
Leviticus18:23 Kik iterri gi chiayo moro, mi omiyi ibed mogak. Dhako bende kik yie mondo chiayo moro oriwre kode. Mano en gima mono." 
Leviticus18:24 Kik udwanyru kutimo timbe ma kamago nikech timbego ema nomiyo ogendini ma abiro riembo mondo owenu thuologi odoko joma odwanyore. 
Leviticus18:25 Mano e kaka pinyno nodoko mogak, mi ne akume nikech richogo, omiyo nong’ogo joma odakie oko." 
Leviticus18:26 Un to nyaka urit chikena. Onge ng’ato kuomu ma notim timbe makuerogo, bed ni en ja-Israel kata jadak," 
Leviticus18:27 nono to pinyno ong’ogou oko kuom dwanye, mana kaka nong’ogo oganda mane okuongonu dakie. Oganda mane okuongonuno notimo timbe makuerogo, mi ne gimiyo pinyno odoko mogak." 
Leviticus18:28  
Leviticus18:29 Ng’ato ang’ata motimo achiel kuom timbe makuerogo nong’ad kare oko kuom ogandagi. 
Leviticus18:30 Emomiyo rituru chikna kendo kik uluw timbe makuero mane weg pinyno otimo ka pok ubiro. Kamano ok nudok mogak. An e Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu. 
Leviticus19:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa 
Leviticus19:2 ni mondo onyis jo-Israel niya, “Nyaka ubed joma ler, nikech an Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu aler." 
Leviticus19:3 Ng’ato ka ng’ato kuomu nyaka luor min gi wuon, kendo nyaka rit Sabato maga. An e Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu." 
Leviticus19:4 Kik uluw nyiseche manono, kendo kik uthedh nyiseche mag nyinyo mondo ulam. An e Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu." 
Leviticus19:5 “Ka uyang’o chiayo mondo utimgo ni Ruoth Nyasaye misango mar sawo, to neguru chiayono kaka chik dwaro mondo Ruoth Nyasaye oyie kodu." 
Leviticus19:6 Nyaka chame mana chieng’ mitimoe misangono, kata kinyne. To ring’o modong’ nyaka chieng’ mar adek, nyaka wang’ e mach." 
Leviticus19:7 Ka ochame chieng’ mar adek, to Ruoth Nyasaye ok noyie kode, nikech ne en gima kuero." 
Leviticus19:8 Ng’ato ang’ata mochame nyaka yud kum kuom kethone, nikech osechayo gima ler mar Ruoth Nyasaye. Ng’atno nong’ad kare oko kuom ogandagi." 
Leviticus19:9 “Ka ukayo cham e puotheu, to kik uke nyaka giko puotheu, kata kik uhul abang’ tiang’." 
Leviticus19:10 Bende kik upon olembeu mag mzabibu mutiek pep, kata kik ukwany mago molwar piny. Nyaka uwegi ni joma odhier kod jodak. An e Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu." 
Leviticus19:11 “Kik ikwel, kata kik iwuond wadu kata kik imaye e yor wuond." 
Leviticus19:12 Kik ikuong’ri gi nyinga kiwuondo ng’ato, nimar kitimo kamano to ichayo nying Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu. An e Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Leviticus19:13 Kik idhir wadu, kata kik imaye gire. Bende nyaka ichul jatich mana e odiechieng’ motiyonieno." 
Leviticus19:14 Kik iyany ng’at ma ite odino, kata kik iket gimoro e nyim muofu ma dochwanyre. Luoruru Nyasachu. An e Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Leviticus19:15 “Kik iketh bura kuom dok ni jachan, kata kuom luoro ng’ama duong’ to ng’ad ni wadu bura kare kichung’ e adiera." 
Leviticus19:16 Kik iwuoth koni gi koni kiketho nying jou, kata kik ihangne wadu wach kodonjne e buch nek. An e Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Leviticus19:17 Kik imak sadha gi wadu, to nyaka inyise kethone wang’ gi wang’; mano eka ok dibed jaketho." 
Leviticus19:18 Kik ichul kuor kata kik ibed mamon gi jowadu, to nyaka iher wadu kaka iherori iwuon. An e Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Leviticus19:19 “Nyaka urit chikena. Kik uwe jamni mopogore opogore luwre, kendo kik uchwo kothe ariyo mopogore opogore e puotheu. Bende kik urwak lewni molos gi usi ariyo mopogore opogore." 
Leviticus19:20 “Ka ong’iew misumba ma nyako ni ng’at moro mondo okendi, mi ng’ato oterore kode ka pok owar nyakono, kata ka pok omiye thuolo mondo odhi, to nyaka non wachno. To ok noneg nyako kod ng’at moterore kodeno, nikech pod en misumba." 
Leviticus19:21 Ng’at moterore kodeno nyaka kel im e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye e dho Hemb Romo mondo otimgo misango mar golo ketho mar gowi. 
Leviticus19:22 Jadolo notim misango e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye gi imno mondo opwodh ni ng’atno richone, eka nowene richo mosetimono." 
Leviticus19:23 “Ka usedonjo e piny ma abiro miyou, mi upidho yath moro amora ma olembe inyalo cham, to nyaka ukwan olembego ka gima kuero, kendo ok unuchamgi kuom higni adek." 
Leviticus19:24 E higa mar ang’wen olembe duto nobed chiwo maler ni Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo mano nomi gibed gik ma inyalo cham." 
Leviticus19:25 To e higa mar abich unyalo chamo olembego. Kutimo kamano, to ginimed nyak moloyo. An e Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu." 
Leviticus19:26 “Kik ucham ring’o man gi remo. Kik upor wach, kata kik ubed ajuoke." 
Leviticus19:27 Kik utit wiu kata yie tiku. 
Leviticus19:28 Kik usar dendu kuywago ng’ama otho kata kik usar kido moro kuomu. An e Ruoth Nyasaye. 
Leviticus19:29 “Kik umi nyiu bed jochode, mi lokre ohodho, dipo ka pinyu okethore, mi richo opong’o." 
Leviticus19:30 Nyaka urit Sabato maga, kendo uluor Kama Ler mara. An e Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Leviticus19:31 “Kik udhi ir jonyakalondo kata kuom ajuoke ma moko, nikech kutimo kamano to udoko mogak. An e Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu." 
Leviticus19:32 “Nyaka uchung’ ni ng’ama duong’ ma wiye oti lwar, kumiye duong’ kendo uluor Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu. An e Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Leviticus19:33 “Ka japiny moro odak kuomu, to kik uthage." 
Leviticus19:34 Nyaka urite mana kaka wuodu, kendo uhere mana kaka uheroru uwegi, nikech un bende ne un jodak e piny Misri. An e Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu." 
Leviticus19:35 “Kik uketh chik kuom gimoro mipimo borne kata mipimo pekne kata mana mipimo ng’eny mare. 
Leviticus19:36 To nyaka ubed gi rapim makare mipimogo gik moko. 
Leviticus19:37 An e Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu mane ogolou e piny Misri. Nyaka urit chikena kendo uluwgi. An e Ruoth Nyasaye.” 
Leviticus20:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa 
Leviticus20:2 ni mondo onyis jo-Israel niya, “Ka ja-Israel moro amora kata japiny moro modak kuomgi ochiwo nyathine moro ni nyasaye moro manono miluongo ni Molek, to nyaka neg ng’atno. Jo-Israel duto nogoye gi kite, nyaka otho," 
Leviticus20:3 kendo an awuon nabed jasike, mi nang’ad kare oko kuom ogandagi, nikech osechiwo nyathine ni Molek, kodwanyogo Kama Ler mara, kendo kochayo nyinga maler." 
Leviticus20:4 To ka ji otemo fwayo wach ng’at mochiwo nyathine ni Molek, mi ok ginege," 
Leviticus20:5 to an awuon nabed jasik ng’atno, kaachiel gi dhoodgi duto. Anang’ad kargi oko kuom ogandagi, kaachiel gi jogo duto maluwe kendo madwanyore ka lamo Molek." 
Leviticus20:6 “Ka ng’ato oweya, modwanyore gi jonyakalondo kod ajuoke ma moko kaka dhako weyo chwore kendo dwanyore gi chwo mamoko, to nabed jasik ng’atno, kendo nang’ad kare oko kuom ogandagi." 
Leviticus20:7 Kuom mano pwodhreuru ubed maler, nikech an Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu aler." 
Leviticus20:8 Nyaka urit chikena kendo uluwgi, nimar an e Ruoth Nyasaye mapwodhou." 
Leviticus20:9 “Ka ng’ato oyanyo wuon mare kata min mare, to nyaka nege. Rembe nodong’ e wiye, nikech oseyanyo wuon gi min." 
Leviticus20:10 Ka ng’at oterore gi chi wadgi, to ng’atno kaachiel gi dhakono nyaka negi." 
Leviticus20:11 Ng’at moterore gi chi wuon, oelo dug wuon mare. Giduto ji ariyogo, nyaka neggi kendo rembgi nodong’ e wigi." 
Leviticus20:12 Ka ng’ato oterore gi chi wuode, to nyaka neggi giduto ji ariyogo, nikech gisetimo gima mono. Rembgi nodong’ e wigi." 
Leviticus20:13 Ka ng’ato onindo gi dichwo wadgi ka ng’ama terore gi dhako, giduto gitimo gima kuero. Nyaka neggi, kendo rembgi nodong’ e wigi." 
Leviticus20:14 Ka ng’ato okendo nyako moro, kaachiel gi min nyakono to mano richo maduong’. Nyaka wang’gi gi mach giduto, mondo richo maduong makamano kik bed kuomu." 
Leviticus20:15 Ng’at moterore gi chiayo moro amora nyaka negi. Chiayono bende nyaka negi. 
Leviticus20:16 Ka dhako moro odhi ir chiayo moro mondo oterre kode, to nyaka neg dhakono kaachiel gi chiayono. Noneggi duto, kendo rembgi nodong’ e wigi." 
Leviticus20:17 “Ka ng’ato okawo nyamin mare ma nyar wuon kata ma nyar min, mi giterore, to mano en wichkuot marach. Nyaka neggi ka ji duto neno. Ng’atno oseterore gi nyamin, omiyo nyaka kume." 
Leviticus20:18 Ka ng’ato oriwore gi dhako ka nie due, to okuodo wi dhakono, nikech oseelo kama rembe wuokie; dhako bende oseelo kama rembe wuokie. Giduto nyaka ng’ad kargi oko kuom ogandagi." 
Leviticus20:19 Kik iterri gi nyamin meru kata gi wayu, nikech mano en ketho wat. Joma timo kamano nyaka yud kum." 
Leviticus20:20 Ng’at moterore gi chi owadgi wuon mare, okuodo wi wuon mareno, omiyo giniyud kum. Noneggi, kendo nyinggi nolal nono kuom ogandagi." 
Leviticus20:21 Ka ng’ato oterore gi chi owadgi, otimo gima ogak, kendo okuodo wi owadgi. Nyinggi nolal nono kuom ogandagi." 
Leviticus20:22 “Nyaka urit chikena gi buchena duto, kendo uluwgi, mi piny ma akelou mondo udagie kik ng’ogu oko." 
Leviticus20:23 Kik uluw timbe ogendini ma ariembonu mondo owenu thuolo. 
Leviticus20:24 Ne gitimo gik marichogo duto, mi asin kodgi, omiyo nawachonu ni abiro miyou pinygi maber kendo momewno mondo ukaw. An e Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu mosepogou gi ogendini mamoko," 
Leviticus20:25 omiyo un bende nyaka upog le michamo gi le makuero kod winy michamo gi winy makuero. Kik udok mogak nikech le kata winy, kata gimoro amora mamol, nimar aseketo pogruok e kindu kodgi, ka ahulonu ni gin gik makuero." 
Leviticus20:26 Unubed jogo maler, nikech an Ruoth Nyasaye aler. Asepogou gi ogendini mamoko mondo ubed joga." 
Leviticus20:27 “Ng’ato ang’ata kuomu ma dichwo kata ma dhako ma janyakalondo kata ma ajuoga moro amora nyaka go gi kite mi otho, kendo rembe nodong e wiye owuon.”" 
Leviticus21:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa ni mondo onyis jodolo ma joka Harun ni kik jadolo moro amora tim gimoro ni ringre jadhoodgi moro motho, ma dimi obed mogak," 
Leviticus21:2 mak mana ka ng’atno watne hie, kaka min kata wuon, kata wuode kata nyare, kata owadgi," 
Leviticus21:3 kata nyamin mare hie ma nyako ngili ma pok okendi. 
Leviticus21:4 To ka nyamin mareno osekendi, to kik otimne gimoro ma dimi obed mogak." 
Leviticus21:5 Jodolo kik liel yie wigi atuota, ka ginyisogo ni giywak, kata kik gitit yie tikgi, kata kik gisar dendgi." 
Leviticus21:6 Nyaka gibed joma owal ni Nyasachgi, kendo kik gicha nying Nyasachgi, nikech gin ema gitimo misengni miwang’o ni Ruoth Nyasaye. Misengnigo gin chiemb Nyasachgi, emomiyo nyaka gibed maler." 
Leviticus21:7 Jadolo kik kend ohodho kata nyaka maonge gi ringre kata dhako ma chwore oriembo, nimar en ng’at maler mowal ni Nyasache." 
Leviticus21:8 Unuwale ni Ruoth Nyasaye, nikech en e jachiw chiemo ni Nyasachu. Nyaka ukwane ka ng’ama ler nikech an Ruoth Nyasaye ma apuodho jodolo, aler." 
Leviticus21:9 Ka nyar jadolo odwanyore modoko ohodho, omiyo wuon mare bedo mogak. Nyaka wang’ nyakono gi mach mi tho." 
Leviticus21:10 Jadolo maduong’ e kind owetene ma en jadolo moseol mo e wiye, mi owal mondo orwak lep dolo, kik we wiye koyuothore, kata kik yiech lawe, konyisogo gi iye owang’." 
Leviticus21:11 Ok nodonj kama ng’at motho nitie ma dimi obed mogak, bed ni en wuon kata min." 
Leviticus21:12 Kik owuog oa Kama Ler, nikech dipo ka omiyo Kama Ler mar Nyasache obedo mogak, nimar osewale gi mor wir mar Nyasache. An e Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Leviticus21:13 Jadolo maduong’ nyaka kend nyako ngili. 
Leviticus21:14 Ok nokend nyako ma chwore otho, kata ma chwore oriembo, kata ma onge gi ringre, kata ma ohodho," 
Leviticus21:15 To nyaka okend mana nyako ngili moa e dhoodgi, mondo kik nyithinde bed mogak kuom kiko remb jo Lawi kata remb jomoko nono, nikech an e Ruoth Nyasaye mapwodho jadolo maduong’." 
Leviticus21:16 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa 
Leviticus21:17 ni mondo onyis Harun niya, “Kuom tiengeu duto onge ng’at mong’ol ma nobi mondo ochiw chiemo ni Nyasache." 
Leviticus21:18 Ng’ato ang’ata ma rang’ol kik sud machiegni, bed ni en muofu kata en puth kata ka dende kamoro okethore, kata ka gimoro otwi e dende," 
Leviticus21:19 kata ka tiende kata ka bade ong’ol," 
Leviticus21:20 Kata ka thur wiye obiro, kata ka orachiero, kata ka wang’e dhuth, kata ka en gi aput kata adhola machuer, kata ka en buoch." 
Leviticus21:21 Nyakwar Harun moro amora ma rang’ol ok nosud machiegni mondo otim ni Ruoth Nyasaye misango miwang’o. 
Leviticus21:22 Kaka orang’ol kamano, kik osud machiegni mondo ochiw chiemo ni Nyasache. Onyalo chamo chiemb Nyasache, bed ni ogol chiemo kuom gik maler kata kuom gik maler moloyo." 
Leviticus21:23 To kik osud machiegni gi Pasia kata gi kendo-mar-misango, nikech dipo ka omiyo kuondena maler obedo mogak nimar orang’ol. An e Ruoth Nyasaye mapwodhogi.”" 
Leviticus21:24 Kamano e kaka Musa nowuoyo gi Harun kaachioel gi yawuote kod jo-Israel duto. 
Leviticus22:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa niya," 
Leviticus22:2 “Nyis Harun gi yawuote ni nyaka giritre ahinya ka gitiyo gi mich maler ma jo-Israel chiwona, nono to gichayo nyinga maler. An e Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Leviticus22:3 Wachnigi ni, ka ng’ato moro mogak osudo machiegni gi chiwo maler ma jo-Israel walo ni Ruoth Nyasaye, to nang’ad kare oko e nyima. Mano en chik momakou nyaka chieng’. An e Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Leviticus22:4 Nyakwar Harun moro amora man gi tuo mar dhoho, kata man gi nyach machuer, kik cham chiwo maler ka pok opwodhe. Koro magi e joma obedo mogak: Ng’at momulo gimoro mosegere kuom gima otho, kata ng’at ma nyote owuok," 
Leviticus22:5 kata ng’at momulo gimoro mamol, kata ng’at momulo ng’at mogak." 
Leviticus22:6 Ng’ato ang’ata momulo achiel kuom gik makamago nobed mogak nyaka chieng’ podhi, kendo ok nocham chiwo malergo ka pok olwokore." 
Leviticus22:7 Ka chieng’ osepodho to nobed maler, eka bang’ mano onyalo chamo chiwo malergo, nikech gin chiembe." 
Leviticus22:8 Kik ocham gima otho athoya kende, kata chiayo ma ondiek onego, nikech kotimo kamano to obedo mogak. An e Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Leviticus22:9 Jodolo nyaka rit chikna, nono to gidoko joketho, mi githo kuom chayo nyinga. An e Ruoth Nyasaye mapwodhogi." 
Leviticus22:10 “Ng’ato ang’ata ma ok jadolo kik cham chiwo maler, kata en wendo molimo jadolo, kata en mana jatichne mondiki." 
Leviticus22:11 To misumba ma jadolo ong’iewo nyalo chamo chiwogo, kendo wasumbni monywol e dalane nyalo chamo chiembeno." 
Leviticus22:12 Ka ng’at ma ok jadolo okendo nyar jadolo, to nyakono ok nocham mich moyiedhi mogol kuom chiwo maler." 
Leviticus22:13 To ka chwore otho, kata ka chwore oriembe kendo oonge gi nyathi, mi oduogo dak e dalagi, to onyalo chamo chiemb wuon mare. To ng’ama ok jadolo kik cham chiemono." 
Leviticus22:14 “Ka ng’ato ochamo gimoro maler mochiw ni Ruoth nyasaye kokia, to enochul jadolo gino komedoe achiel kuom abich." 
Leviticus22:15 Jadolo kik keth chiwo maler ma jo-Israel walo ni Ruoth Nyasaye 
Leviticus22:16 ka giyie ni joma ok jodolo chamogi, ma dimi jogo bed joketho kendo yud kum, nikech an e Ruoth Nyasaye mapwodho gigo.”" 
Leviticus22:17 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa," 
Leviticus22:18 ni mondo onyis Harun kod yawuote, kaachiel gi jo-Israel duto niya, “Ka ja-Israel moro amora kata japiny moro modak kuomu okelo chiwo mondo ochopgo kuong’ruok kata kaka chiwo mokelo kuom herone owuon, mi ochiwe ni Ruoth Nyasaye ka misango miwang’o pep mondo Ruoth Nyasaye oyie kode," 
Leviticus22:19 to nyaka ochiw chiayo maonge songa, bed ni en rwath kata rombo kata diel." 
Leviticus22:20 Kik uchiw chiayo man gi songa nimar Ruoth Nyasaye ok nyal yie kode. 
Leviticus22:21 Ka ng’ato otimo misango mar chiwo gi dhiang’ kata gi rombo mondo ochopgo kuong’ruok, kata kaka chiwo ma okelo kuom herone owuon, to nyaka obed chiayo malong’o maonge songa eka Ruoth Nyasaye noyie kode." 
Leviticus22:22 Kik uchiw ni Ruoth Nyasaye chiayo moro ma muofu kata ma rang’ol kata man gi songa kata kalanga, kata man gi aluny kata bur. Kik uket chiayo ma kamano e kendo-mar-misango mondo obed misango miwang’o ni Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Leviticus22:23 Rwath kata rombo magana unyalo timogo misango ma ng’ato chiwo, to ok noyie kode kuom timo misango michopogo kuong’ruok." 
Leviticus22:24 Chiayo ma mendene otore kata ogol kata opuodi kik chiw ni Ruoth Nyasaye. Tim ma kamano okwer e pinyu. 
Leviticus22:25 Bende kik uyie kawo chiayo machal kamano kuom japiny moro mondo ochiw ni Nyasachu ka chiembe. Ka ging’ol kamano to gin gi songa mosiko, omiyo ok digimi Ruoth Nyasaye yie kodu.”" 
Leviticus22:26 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa niya, “Ka onywol nyaroya kata nyarombo kata nyadiel," 
Leviticus22:27 to ok onego poge gi min nyaka ndalo abiriyo rum. Kochiwe ni Ruoth Nyasaye ka misango miwang’o chakre chieng’ mar aboro ka dhi nyime, to noyie kode." 
Leviticus22:28 Kik uneg dhiang’ gi nyathine, kata rombo gi nyathine odiechieng’ achiel." 
Leviticus22:29 Ka uchiwo ni Ruoth Nyasaye misango mar erokamano, to chiweuru kaka chik dwaro, mondo Ruoth Nyasaye oyie kodu." 
Leviticus22:30 Nyaka chame duto chieng’no, kendo gimoro kik dong’ nyaka chop okinyi. An e Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Leviticus22:31 “Nyaka urit chikena kendo uluwgi. An e Ruoth Nyasaye. 
Leviticus22:32 Kik ucha nyinga maler. Jo-Israel nyaka mi nyinga maler duong’. An e Ruoth Nyasaye mapwodhou," 
Leviticus22:33 kendo mane ogolou e piny Misri mondo obed Nyasachu. An e Ruoth Nyasaye.” 
Leviticus23:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa mondo onyis jo-Israel niya," 
Leviticus23:2 “Sewni ma Ruoth Nyasaye oketo e magi: Gin chokruok maler, ma nyaka ogonigi milome nikech gin sewni maga ma aseketo." 
Leviticus23:3 Unuti tijeu kuom ndalo auchiel, to chieng’ mar abiriyo en chieng’ yueyo moyiedhi. En odiechieng chokruok maler, ma kik utimie tich moro amora, nikech en sabato mar Ruoth Nyasaye kuonde duto mudakie." 
Leviticus23:4 “Sewni ma Ruoth Nyasaye oketo e magi: Gin chokruok maler ma ka kindegi ochopo to nyaka ugo milome maggi. 
Leviticus23:5 “Due apar gang’wen, due mokwongo chakre odhiambo, en chieng’ Pasaka mar Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Leviticus23:6 To Sap Makati ma ok ketie thowi mar Ruoth Nyasaye chakore tarik apar gabich mar dueno. Unucham makati ma ok ketie thowi kuom ndalo abiriyo. 
Leviticus23:7 Chieng’ mokwongo mar jumano, unubed gi chokruok maler, kendo ok unuti tijeu ma pile." 
Leviticus23:8 Unuchiw ni Ruoth Nyasaye misengni miwang’o kuom ndalo abiriyo. Chieng’ mar abiriyo bende nobedie chokruok maler, kendo ok unuti tijeu mapile.”" 
Leviticus23:9 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa mondo onyis jo-Israel niya," 
Leviticus23:10 “Ka uchopo e piny ma abiro miyou, mi ukayoe cham, to nyaka ukel ni jadolo cham mukwongo kayo higa ka higa." 
Leviticus23:11 Jadolo nochiwgi e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye ka mich moyiedhi chieng’ moluwo sabato mondo Ruoth Nyasaye oyie kodu. 
Leviticus23:12 To chieng’ onogo muchiwoe michno, nyaka uchiw ni Ruoth Nyasaye nyaim ma hike achiel maonge songa mondo otimgo misango miwang’o pep." 
Leviticus23:13 To misango mar cham michiwo gi imno nobed mogo mayom moromo kilo abiriyo, moruw gi mo. Misango nyaka wang’ mondo odum tik mamit ni Ruoth Nyasaye. To misango miolo piny nobed divai moromo lita achiel." 
Leviticus23:14 Kik ucham makati, kata cham molodi kata manumu, ka pok ochopo chieng’ michiwoe ni Nyasachu michne.”" 
Leviticus23:15 Chakre chieng’ maluwo sabato mukeloe cham mar mich moyiedhi, nyaka ukwan jumbe abiriyo," 
Leviticus23:16 to chieng’ maluwo sabato mar abiriyo nobed chieng’ mar piero abich. Chiengno unutim misango mar cham gi cham mar higa manyien. 
Leviticus23:17 Nyaka ukel makati ariyo mugolo e miechu kaka mich moyiedhi. Nyaka losgi gi mogo mayom moromo kilo abiriyo moketie thowi, kendo nyaka chiwgi ni Ruoth Nyasaye ka chamb agwela." 
Leviticus23:18 Bende nyaka uchiw makati gi nyirombe abiriyo maonge songa, kendo ma hikgi achiel achiel, gi nyarwath achiel kod imbe ariyo. Ginibed misango miwang’o pep mitimo ni Ruoth Nyasaye. Unuchiwgi kaachiel gi misango mar cham kod misango miolo piny mondo obed misango miwango ma dum tik mamit ni Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Leviticus23:19 Bende nyaka uchiw nywok achiel mitimogo misango mar golo richo, kod nyiimbe ariyo ma hikgi achiel achiel mitimogo misengni mag sawo." 
Leviticus23:20 Jadolo nyaka chiwgi e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye ka mich moyiedhi, kaachiel gi makati mag chamb gwel. Ginibed mich moyiedhi michiwo e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo ginidong’ ni jadolo." 
Leviticus23:21 Unugo milome mar chokruok maler chieng’ onogo, kendo ok unuti tijeu mapile. Mano en chik momakou gi nyikwau nyaka chieng’, kamoro amora mudakie." 
Leviticus23:22 “Ka ukayo cham e puotheu, to kik uke nyaka giko puotheu, kata kik uhul abang’ tiang’. Nyaka uwegi ni joma odhier kod jodak. An e Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu.”" 
Leviticus23:23 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa 
Leviticus23:24 mondo onyis jo-Israel niya, “Due achiel mar due mar abiriyo nobednu chieng’ yueyo ma unugoe milome gi tung’ mondo obed chokruok maler." 
Leviticus23:25 Kik utim tijeu mapile, to chiwuru ni Ruoth Nyasaye misango miwang’o.”" 
Leviticus23:26 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa 
Leviticus23:27 mondo onyis jo-Isarel niya, “Due apar due mar abiriyono nobednu chieng’ migolonue richo. Enobed chokruok maler ma nyaka uriye kech, kendo uchiwie ni Ruoth Nyasaye misango miwang’o." 
Leviticus23:28 Chieng’ onogo kik uti tich moro amora nikech en chieng’ pwodhruok, migolonue richo e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu." 
Leviticus23:29 Emomiyo ng’ato ka ng’ato ma ok oriyo kech chiengno nyaka ng’ad kare oko kuom ogandagi. 
Leviticus23:30 Anatiek ng’at motiyo tich moro amora chieng’no kang’ade oko kuom ogandagi. 
Leviticus23:31 Kik uti tich moro. Mano en chik momakou gi nyikwau nyaka chieng’, kamoro amora mudakie." 
Leviticus23:32 Chieng’ono nobednu sabato mar yueyo maber, omiyo nyaka uri kech. Chakre odhiambo mar due ochiko nyaka odhiambo mar due apar kik uti.”" 
Leviticus23:33 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa 
Leviticus23:34 mondo onyis jo-Israel bende ni, chakre due apar gabich mar due abiriyono, Sap Kiche mar Ruoth Nyasaye nobedie kuom ndalo abiriyo." 
Leviticus23:35 Chieng’ mokwongo nobedie chokruok maler ma kik utiye tijeu mapile. 
Leviticus23:36 Kuom ndalo abiriyogo nyaka uchiw ni Ruoth Nyasaye misengni miwang’o, to chieng’ mar aboro chokruok maler nobedie. Chieng’no bende unuchiw ni Ruoth Nyasaye misango miwang’o. En chokruok mitiekogo nyasi, omiyo kik uti tijeu mapile." 
Leviticus23:37 Mago e sewni ma Ruoth Nyasaye oketo ma nyaka ogoe milome ni gin e chokruok maler michiwoe ni Ruoth Nyasaye misengni miwang’o kod misengni miwang’o pep, kod misengni mag cham gi misengni mag sawo gi misengni miolo piny, moro ka moro gi chieng’e." 
Leviticus23:38 To ewi mago nitie sabato mag Ruoth Nyasaye kod chiwou moko duto gi mich muchopogo kuong’ruok mau, kod mago muchiwo ni Ruoth Nyasaye kuom herou." 
Leviticus23:39 “To chakre due apar gabich nogo, due mar abiriyo, bang’ keyo, nyaka utim sap Ruoth Nyasaye kuom ndalo abiriyo. Chieng’ mokwongo nobed chieng’ yueyo mowal, to chieng’ mar aboro bende kamano." 
Leviticus23:40 Chieng’ mokwongono unukaw olembe mag yien mabeyo gi bede othidhe kod bede yien motimo otie, kaachiel gi bede yien matwi e tiend aore, mi unubed mamor e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu kuom ndalo abiriyo." 
Leviticus23:41 Nyaka utim sawoni ni Ruoth Nyasaye kuom ndalo abiriyo higa ka higa. En chik momakou gi nyikwau nyaka chieng’. E due mar abiriyo nyaka utimie sawoni. 
Leviticus23:42 Uduto ma un jo-Israel nyaka ubed e kiche kuom ndalo abiriyo. 
Leviticus23:43 Mondo omi nyikwau opar kaka namiyo jo-Israel odak e kiche ka ne agologi e piny Misri. An e Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu.” 
Leviticus23:44 Mano e kaka Musa nonyiso jo-Israel sewni ma Ruoth Nyasaye oketo. 
Leviticus24:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa niya," 
Leviticus24:2 “Chik jo-Israel mondo okelni mor zeituni maler mondo ool e taya, mondo taya oliel pile, oko mar pasia mageng’o sandug rapar e Hemb Romo." 
Leviticus24:3 Harun nyaka rit taya mondo osik ka liel pile e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, chakre odhiambo nyaka okinyi. Mano en chik momakou gi nyikwau nyaka chieng’." 
Leviticus24:4 Pile Harun nyaka rit teyni man kuom rachung taya maler mar dhahabu mochung’ e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye.” 
Leviticus24:5 “Nyaka ukaw mogo, mi utedgo makati apar gariyo, ma moro ka moro oted gi mogo moromo kilo abiriyo." 
Leviticus24:6 Nyaka uchan-gi e laini ariyo e mesa maler mochung’ e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, auchiel e laini ka laini." 
Leviticus24:7 Unuket ubani maler e laini ka laini, mondo obed rapar mar makati michiwo ni Ruoth Nyasaye ka misango miwang’o." 
Leviticus24:8 Chieng’ sabato ka chieng’ sabato Harun nochan makatigo e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye. Gin mich ma jo-Israel osingore ni nochiw nyaka chieng’. 
Leviticus24:9 Makatigo nodong’ ni Harun gi nyikwaye, kendo ginichamgi kamoro moyang ni Ruoth Nyasaye, nikech en mich maler moloyo. En pok migolone nyaka chieng’ kuom misengni miwang’o ni Ruoth Nyasaye.”" 
Leviticus24:10 Ne nitie ng’at moro e kambi jo-Israel ma min mare ne nyar Israel, to wuon mare ne ja-Misri. Nying min mare ne Shelomith, nyar Dibri ma ja-Dan. Jalo nodhi modhaw gi ja-Israel moro." 
Leviticus24:11 Nokwong’e koyanyo nying maler mar Ruoth Nyasaye, omiyo ne gikele ir Musa." 
Leviticus24:12 Ne gikete e od tuech, ka girito gima Ruoth Nyasaye biro nyisogi." 
Leviticus24:13 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa niya," 
Leviticus24:14 “Gol ng’at moseyanyono oa e kambi, mondo ji duto mane owinje koyenyo oket lwetgi e wiye. Bang’e jo-Israel duto ogoye gi kite nyaka otho." 
Leviticus24:15 Nyaka iwach ni jo-Israel ni ng’ato ang’ata moyanyo Nyasache noyud kum kuom kethone. 
Leviticus24:16 Ng’at moyanyo nying Ruoth Nyasaye nyaka negi. Oganda jo-Israel nyaka goye gi kite motho. Bed ni en jadak kata ja-Israel ema ohulo nying malerno, nyaka nege." 
Leviticus24:17 “Ka ng’ato ogoyo wadgi monego, to en bende nyaka nege." 
Leviticus24:18 Ka ng’ato ogoyo chiayo motho, to nyaka ochul chiayo kar chiayono." 
Leviticus24:19 Ka ng’ato ohinyo wadgi momiyo songa, to notimne mana kaka osetimono:" 
Leviticus24:20 Lero kar lero, wang’ kar wang’, kendo lak kar lak. Nyaka hiny ng’atno mana kaka osehinyo wadgi." 
Leviticus24:21 “Ng’at mogoyo chiayo monego, nyaka chul chiayo," 
Leviticus24:22 to ng’at mogoyo wadgi monego, en bende nonege. Nyaka kum jadak mana kaka ikumo ja-Israel, nimar an e Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu.”" 
Leviticus24:23 Ka ne Musa osewacho ni jo-Israel kamano, ne gigolo ng’at ma ne oyenyono oa e kambi, mi gigoye gi kite nyaka otho. Ne gitimo mana kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nochiko Musa." 
Leviticus25:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa e got Sinai 
Leviticus25:2 mondo onyis jo-Israel niya, “Ka usechopo e piny ma abiro miyou, to pinyno nyaka rit sabato, kimiyogo Ruoth Nyasaye duong’." 
Leviticus25:3 Kuom mano higni auchiel unyalo chuoyo puotheu, kendo loso yiendu mag mzabibu, kendo kayo chambu gi pono olembeu." 
Leviticus25:4 To higa mar abiriyo en sabato maler mimiyogo Ruoth Nyasaye duong’, ma piny nyaka yueye. E higano, kik uchwo puotheu, kata kik ulos yiendu mag mzabibu." 
Leviticus25:5 Kik uka orowe, kendo kik upon mzabibu manyak kendgi e yien mane ok ulosogo, nikech en higa maler ma piny yueyoe." 
Leviticus25:6 To kata kamano, gik ma piny ochiego e hik sabato nobed chiembu, kendo chiemb wasumbu machwo gi mamon, gi mar jotichu kod wendu," 
Leviticus25:7 kendo mar jambu gi le mae pinyu. Gik moko duto ma piny ochiego nobed chiembu. 
Leviticus25:8 “Nyaka ukwan sabato abiriyo mag higni ma en higni abiriyo nyadibiriyo, tiende ni higni piero ang’wen gochiko." 
Leviticus25:9 Due apar, due mar abiriyo e higano, ma en chieng’ pwodhruok, unugo tung’ e pinyu duto." 
Leviticus25:10 Kamano unuwal higa mar piero abich, kugoyo milome mondo obed higa miweyoe jopinyu duto thuolo. Higano nobed higa mar mor, ma ng’ato ka ng’ato nodogie pinygi ir joodgi." 
Leviticus25:11 Higa mar piero abichno nobednu higa mar mor. Kik uchuoye kata kik ukae orowe, kendo kik uponie mzabibu monyak anyaka e yien mane ok uloso," 
Leviticus25:12 nimar en higa mar mor, ma nyaka uwal maler ni Ruoth Nyasaye. Unucham gik monyak e lowo." 
Leviticus25:13 “E higa mar mor nogono, ng’ato ka ng’ato kuomu nodog thurgi." 
Leviticus25:14 Ka ng’ato ng’iewo lop wadgi, to kik ng’ato wuond wadgi." 
Leviticus25:15 Nyaka kwan higni, chakre higa mar mor mokadho, kendo nengo noket maromre gi higni ma pod ibiro keyoe." 
Leviticus25:16 Ka hignigo ng’eny to nochul nengo mamalo, to ka ginok, nochul nengo mapiny, nikech cham mibiro kayoe ema ong’iewo." 
Leviticus25:17 Kik ng’ato kuomu wuond wadgi, to mondo uluor Nyasachu, nikech an e Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu." 
Leviticus25:18 “Rituru chikena, kendo uluwgi, eka unudag e pinyno gi kue." 
Leviticus25:19 Lowo nochieg cham, mi unuchiem muyieng’, kendo unudag gi kue." 
Leviticus25:20 Kapo ni upenjo gima ubiro chamo e higa mar abiriyo ka ok uchuoyo, kata ka ok ukeyo," 
Leviticus25:21 to nadwoku kama: Abiro guedhou e higa mar auchiel, mi piny nochieg cham moromou chamo kuom higni adek." 
Leviticus25:22 Kuchuoyo e higa mar aboro, to noyud ka pod uchamo cham machon. Unubed kuchamo cham machon nyaka chop uka cham manyien mar higa mar ochiko." 
Leviticus25:23 “Ka ng’ato ong’iewo lowo kuom wadgi, to lowono ok nobed mare nyaka chieng’, nikech an e wuon lowo, to un, un mana jodakna." 
Leviticus25:24 E pinyu duto unuyie mondo puodho ma noseng’iew owar. 
Leviticus25:25 “Ka wadu moro odoko modhier, mi ong’iewo lope moro, to watne machiegni nyaka war lowono." 
Leviticus25:26 To ka ng’atno onge gi watne manyalo waro lowono, to en owuon onyalo ware koyudo pesa." 
Leviticus25:27 Enokwan higni, chakre higa ma nong’iewe mi nochul ng’at ma nong’ieweno pesa moromo higni modong’ nyaka higa mar mor chopi. Eka nokaw lope odok mare kendo." 
Leviticus25:28 To ka ok onyal ware, to lowono nodog e lwet ng’at ma ne ong’iewe cha nyaka chop higa mar mor. To e higa mar mor, lowono nowe odog ni wuon, mi wuon-go nokawe." 
Leviticus25:29 “Ka ng’ato oyie, mi wadgi ong’iewo ode mar dak manie dala mochiel gi ohinga, to onyalo ware mana ka higa achiel pok orumo nyaka ne ng’iewe. Higano duto enobed gi thuolo mar ware," 
Leviticus25:30 to ka ok oware ka higa pok orumo, to odno nosik kobedo mar ng’at mane ong’iewe, kaachiel gi nyikwaye nyaka chieng’. Ok noweye odog ni wuon e higa mar mor." 
Leviticus25:31 To udi manie mier ma ok ochiel gi ohinga nokwan mana kaka ikwano lowo. Gin gik ma inyalo waro, kendo e higa mar mor ginidog ni wegi." 
Leviticus25:32 Jo-Lawi to nobed gi thuolo mochwere mar waro udi manie miechgi. 
Leviticus25:33 Ka ja-Lawi moro ok owaro ode manie dalagi, to odno nyaka dogne e higa mar mor, nimar udi manie miech jo-Lawi e mwandugi e piny Israel." 
Leviticus25:34 To puothe molworo miechgi ok nyal ng’iew, nikech gin mwandugi nyaka chieng’." 
Leviticus25:35 “Ka ja-Israel wadu odoko modhier ma ok onyal konyore, to nyaka ukonye mana kaka unyalo konyo japiny moro kata wendo, kendo nodag kodu." 
Leviticus25:36 Kuhole gimoro, to kik ukaw kuome ohala, to luoruru Nyasachu, kendo uyie owadu odag kodu." 
Leviticus25:37 Kik uhole pesa mondo uyudie ohala. Kata kik ukaw ohala kuom chiemo muhole. 
Leviticus25:38 An e Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu mane ogolou e piny Misri mondo omiu piny Kanaan, kendo mondo obed Nyasachu." 
Leviticus25:39 “Ka wadu odoko modhier, kendo obiro iri, mi ing’iewe, to kik ikete mondo otini ka misumba." 
Leviticus25:40 To mondo obedi kaka jatich michulo, kendo kaka wendo modak kodi. Enotini nyaka chop higa mar mor," 
Leviticus25:41 eka nowe tiyoni, mi nodog gi nyithinde kuom joodgi kendo e lop kwerene." 
Leviticus25:42 Jo-Israel gin wasumbni maga mane agolo e piny Misri, emomiyo ok onego ng’iewgi kaka ing’iewo wasumbni." 
Leviticus25:43 Kik isand ja-Israel waduno, to nyaka iluor Nyasachu." 
Leviticus25:44 “Kudwaro wasumbni machwo kata mamon, to unyalo ng’iewogi kuom ogendini mokiewo kodu." 
Leviticus25:45 To bende unyalo ng’iewo nyithind jodak man kuomu, kod joodgi monywol e pinyu, mi ginibed mwandu," 
Leviticus25:46 kendo unyalo weyogi ni yawuotu kusetho. Unyalo loko jogo wasumbu nyaka chieng’, to jo-Israel weteu kik usand." 
Leviticus25:47 “Ka japiny moro modak kuomu odoko jamoko, to wadu moro odoko modhier, mi odhi ir ng’atno kata ir jaodgi moro mi ong’iewe," 
Leviticus25:48 to thuolo nitie mar ware. Owadgi moro nyalo ware," 
Leviticus25:49 kata owadgi wuon mare, kata wuod wuon kata watne moro amora. To bende onyalo warore owuon, koyudo pesa." 
Leviticus25:50 Enogo nengo gi jal mane ong’ieweno, ka gikwano higni chakre higa mane ong’iewe nyaka chop higa mar mor. Pesa monego dwok ni ng’at ma nong’ieweno nyaka bed maromre gi misara ma dine ng’atno ondikogo jatich kuom higni ma ng’atno osetiyonego." 
Leviticus25:51 Enoware gi pesa maromre gi higni modong’ to chop higa mar mor. Ka hignigo ng’eny, to enochul pesa mang’eny," 
Leviticus25:52 to ka ginok, to nochul pesa matin." 
Leviticus25:53 Nyaka rit ng’atno machal gi jatich mondiki, bende kik uyie mondo ng’at mane ong’ieweno osande." 
Leviticus25:54 Ka ng’atno ok owar e kinde modong’ ka pok higa mar mor ochopo, to nyaka weye odhi kaachiel gi nyithinde e higa mar mor," 
Leviticus25:55 nikech jo-Israel gin wasumbini maga. Gin maga ma nagolo e piny Misri. An e Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu. 
Leviticus26:1 “Kik ulos kido mar nyasaye manono, kendo kik uchung kido mopa kata siro milamo. Kidi moro amora mopa kik bed e pinyu mukulorune kulamo, nikech an e Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu." 
Leviticus26:2 Nyaka urit sabatona, kendo uluor Kama Ler mara. An e Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Leviticus26:3 “Ka uwuotho e yorena, mi urito chikena, kendo uluwogi," 
Leviticus26:4 to anakelnu koth e kinde mowinjore, mi pinyu nochieg cham kendo yiendu nonyag olembe." 
Leviticus26:5 Unudin cham nyaka e kinde miponoe mzabibu, kendo unupon mzabibu nyaka kinde michwoyoe. Unuyud chiemo moromou, kendo unudag e pinyu gi kue." 
Leviticus26:6 “Anakel kue e pinyu, mi ununind maonge luoro. Anatiek ondiegi e pinyu, kendo lweny ok nomi pinyu kethre." 
Leviticus26:7 Unuriemb wasiku, kendo ununeggi." 
Leviticus26:8 Jou abich nobed gi teko mar riembo ji mia achiel, kendo jou mia achiel nobed gi teko mar riembo ji gana apar, mi unutiek wasiku." 
Leviticus26:9 “Anabed ka aguedhou, mi anami unywol kendo unya mathoth, kendo anachop singruok duto ma natimo kodu." 
Leviticus26:10 Chambu machon manie dereu noromu chamo nyaka chop kinde ma uwitogie, mondo uyud kama ukanoe cham manyien." 
Leviticus26:11 Analos kar dakna kuomu, kendo ok najuang’u." 
Leviticus26:12 Anawuoth e dieru koni gi koni, mi nabed Nyasachu, kendo unubed joga." 
Leviticus26:13 An e Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu ma nogolou e piny Misri mondo uwe bedo wasumb jo-Misri. Aseturo lodi ma ne otuenu, mi omiyo koro uwuotho tir." 
Leviticus26:14 “To ka utamoru winja, kendo ok urito chikenago duto," 
Leviticus26:15 mi udagi buchena, kendo ok uluwo yorena, mi uketho singruok mane atimo kodu," 
Leviticus26:16 to ng’euru malong’o ni anatimnu kama: Anapou gi masira kendo gi tho marach kod tuo mayuyo wang’, kendo mamiyo del dhi. Chambu muchwoyo ok nokonyu, nimar wasiku ema nochamgi." 
Leviticus26:17 Anabed mosin kodu, mi wasiku nonegu. Unubed e bwo loch joma mon kodu, kendo unubwogru gi ng’wech kata ka onge joma lawou." 
Leviticus26:18 “Ka pod utamoru winja bang’ gigo duto, to anamed kumou nyadibiriyo kuom richou." 
Leviticus26:19 Anaketh sunga mar wich teko, ma un go. Anami polo malo rieny ka chuma, kendo piny mwalo dok matek ka mula." 
Leviticus26:20 Unuketh tekreu nono kuchwoyo, nimar chambu ok nochiegi, kata mana yiendu bende ok nonyag olembe." 
Leviticus26:21 “To kapod upiem koda, mutamoru winja, to nakelnu masiche nyadibiriyo marom gi richou." 
Leviticus26:22 Anaor ondiegi mondo omak nyithindu, mi ginineg jambu kendo ginimi udong’ manok, bende wang’ yore duto muluwo notho." 
Leviticus26:23 “Ka gigo duto ok omiyo uduogo ira, to usiko ka upiem koda," 
Leviticus26:24 an bende napiem kodu, kendo namiu kum nyadibiriyo nikech richou." 
Leviticus26:25 Anakel lweny kuomu mondo achulgo kuor kuom ketho singruok ma ne atimo kodu, kendo kata kuchokoru e miechu to anagou gi tuoche kendo wasiku nomaku." 
Leviticus26:26 Anami chiembu doko manok, mi agulu achiel norom mon apar tedoe. Ginipimnu chiemo mana e rapim, kendo kata kuchiemo, to ok unuyieng’ ngang’." 
Leviticus26:27 “To ka bang’ mago duto, pod udagi winja, kendo usiko kupiem koda," 
Leviticus26:28 to an bende nasik kapiem kodu gi mirimba mager, mi nakumu nyadibiriyo nikech richou." 
Leviticus26:29 Kar chamo ring’o, to unucham mana yawuotu gi nyiu." 
Leviticus26:30 Anaketh kuonde hembko mau, kendo anamuk kendeu mag ubani. Anadhur ringreu motop kuom kido motop mag nyisecheu manono, kendo najwang’u." 
Leviticus26:31 Analok miechu gundni, mi anaketh kuondeu mag lemo, kendo ok anayie ng’weyo tik misengni mau madum mamit." 
Leviticus26:32 Anaketh pinyu, mi wasiku mobiro dakie nohum nono." 
Leviticus26:33 Anakeu e kind ogendini, kendo nakel lweny kuomu mi pinyu nodong’ gunda, kendo miechu nokethre chuth." 
Leviticus26:34 E kinde duto ma pinyu odong’ gunda, kendo udak e piny wasiku, pinyu nonind mak opur mondo ochul sabato ma ne ok urito." 
Leviticus26:35 Ka pinyu odong’ gunda kamano, enonind mak opure, korito sabato ma ne ok oyueyoe kudak kuno." 
Leviticus26:36 Jou modong’ ka ngima e piny wasikgi anago gi kihondko, mi kata mana ka giwinjo ka yamo kwadho it oboke, to giniringi ka joma wasigu lawo, kendo kata obedo ni onge ng’ama lawogi to ginipodh piny," 
Leviticus26:37 kendo ginituomre kendgi giwegi mana ka joma ichadho gi ligangla. Unubed maonge gi teko mar siro wasiku. 
Leviticus26:38 Karu nolal nono e kind ogendini, kendo piny wasiku nonang’u." 
Leviticus26:39 Jou modong’’ ka ngima e pinje mag wasiku nobed ka dendgi dhi adhiya nikech richogi, kendo nikech richo mag kweregi, mana kaka notimore ni kweregi." 
Leviticus26:40 “Bang’e ginihul richogi gi richo kweregi mane omiyo giweya, kaachiel gi richo mane omiyo gidoko wasika." 
Leviticus26:41 An to nabed mamon kodgi, kendo natergi e piny wasikgi. Bang’e chunygi ma ok oyie timo kaka adwaro nobolre, kendo giniyud kum kuom richogi." 
Leviticus26:42 Eka anapar singruok mane atimo gi Jakobo kendo gi Isaka kod Ibrahim, kendo napar pinyu." 
Leviticus26:43 Piny nodong’ gunda ka joma odakie oseaye, kendo nonind ma ok opure mondo ochul sabato duto mane ok oyueyoe. Giniyud kum kuom richogi nimar ne gichayo chikena, kendo gidagi luwogi." 
Leviticus26:44 “Kata kamano, ka gin e piny wasikgi, to ok nawitgi, kendo ok najwang’gi kata tiekogi chuth, mi aketh singruok mane atimo kodgi, nimar an e Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachgi." 
Leviticus26:45 Aherogi, omiyo anapar singruok mane atimo gi kweregi, mane agolo e piny Misri ka ogendini neno, mondo an Ruoth Nyasaye abed Nyasachgi.”" 
Leviticus26:46 Mago e chike gi buche mane Ruoth Nyasaye omiyo Musa e got Sinai mondo jo-Israel oluw. 
Leviticus27:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa 
Leviticus27:2 ni mondo onyis jo-Israel niya, “Ka ng’ato okuong’ore ni obiro chiwo ng’ato ni Ruoth Nyasaye, eka bang’e oyudo ni ok onyal chopo kuong’ruokno, to nengo monego owargo ng’atno e ma:" 
Leviticus27:3 Ng’ama dichwo ma hike ni e kind piero ariyo gi piero auchiel nowar gi shekel piero abich mag fedha, (ma gin shekel mitiyogo e tich Nyasaye.)" 
Leviticus27:4 To ng’ama dhako ma hike rom kamano nowar gi shekel piero adek. 
Leviticus27:5 To ka hik ng’atno ni e kind higni abich gi higni piero ariyo, to noware gi shekel piero ariyo ka en ng’ama dichwo, to shekel apar ka en dhako." 
Leviticus27:6 Ka hike pok ochopo abich, to osekadho due achiel, to noware gi shekel abich ka en nyathi ma wuowi to nyako, shekel adek." 
Leviticus27:7 Ka ng’atno hike piero auchiel kata mokadho kanyo, kendo en ng’ama dichwo, to noware gi shekel apar gabich. Ka en dhako, to shekel apar." 
Leviticus27:8 Ka ng’at mokuong’oreno odhier ahinya ma ok nyal chulo nengo moketne, to noter ng’at ma nokuong’ore ni ochiwono e nyim jadolo, mi jadolo nogo nengone maromre gi pesa ma ng’at mokuong’ore nyalo chulo." 
Leviticus27:9 “Ka ng’ato okuong’ore ni obiro chiwo ni Ruoth Nyasaye chiayo minyalo timogo misango, to gima ochiwono doko mowal ni Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Leviticus27:10 Ng’atno ok nyal wile mondo oket moro kare, bed ni orach kata ober, bende ok onyal wile gi gimoro nono. To kapo ni olok chiayo moro kar ma nochiw, to chiayo mokwongo, kaachiel gi mowilego nodok mowal ni Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Leviticus27:11 Ka chiayo ma ng’atno okuong’ore ni obiro chiwo ogak, ma ok nyal timgo misango ni Ruoth Nyasaye," 
Leviticus27:12 to chiayono nyaka kel e nyim jadolo, mi jadolo nogo nengo moromo kode." 
Leviticus27:13 Nengo ma jadolo oketo ema oromo. Ka ng’atno dwaro waro chiayono, to nyaka omedie achiel kuom abich mar nengone." 
Leviticus27:14 “Ka ng’ato ochiwo ode mondo obed moyang ni Ruoth Nyasaye, to jadolo nyaka go nengo moromo kode, kendo nengo ma jadolo ogoyono ema oromo." 
Leviticus27:15 To ka ng’ato mane ochiwo ode dwaro waro odeno, to nyaka omed achiel kuom abich mar nengone, eka ot nodong’ne." 
Leviticus27:16 “To ka ng’ato ochiwo ni Ruoth Nyasaye lope moro, to nyaka go nengone maromre gi kodhi michwoyego. Nengo lowo minyalo chwoyo gi kodhi moromo kilo abiriyo nobed shekel piero abich." 
Leviticus27:17 Ka ochiwo lopeno e higa mar mor, to nengone nosiki mana kamano." 
Leviticus27:18 To ka ochiwe ka higa mar mor oserumo, to jadolo nokwan higni modong’ nyaka higa mar mor chak chop, mi nogo nengo maromre gi higni modong’go." 
Leviticus27:19 Ka ng’at mane ochiwo puothe dwaro waro puotheno, to nyaka ochul nengo mogoneno, komedoe achiel kuom abich. Eka puodhono nodong’ne." 
Leviticus27:20 To ka ok odwar waro puodhono, kata ka oseuse ni ng’at machielo, to ok nyal ware." 
Leviticus27:21 Ka higa mar mor ochopo mi owe puodhono, to nobed gima ler, ka puodho moyang ni Ruoth Nyasaye chuth. Nodong ni jadolo ka mwandune." 
Leviticus27:22 “Ka ng’ato ochiwo ni Ruoth Nyasaye puodho moro moseng’iewo, to chutho puodhono ok mare owuon," 
Leviticus27:23 to jadolo nogo nengo maromre gi higni modong’ nyaka higa mar mor chopi, mi ng’atno nochiw pesago mana odiechieng’no. En pesa mowal ni Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Leviticus27:24 Ka higa mar mor osechopo, to puodhono nodog ni ng’at mane ong’iewe kuome, ma en wuon lowo hie." 
Leviticus27:25 (Nengo ka nengo nopim gi shekel mitiyogo e tich Nyasaye. Shekel achiel romre gi gera piero ariyo.) 
Leviticus27:26 “To chiayo mokwong nywolo kik ng’ato chiw ni Ruoth Nyasaye, nikech gik moko duto mokwong nywolo gin mag Ruoth Nyasaye. Bed ni gin dhok kata rombe, to gin mag Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Leviticus27:27 To ka en chiayo mogak ma ok nyal timgo misango ni Ruoth Nyasaye, to enoware e nengo migoyone, komedoe achiel kuom abich mar nengone. Kata ka ok oware, to nyaka ng’iewe e nengo miketo." 
Leviticus27:28 “To kata kamano gima ng’ato oweyo ni Ruoth Nyasaye chuth kuom gik moko ma en go, bed ni en dhano kata chiayo kata lowo, ok onyal waro kata ng’iewo nikech gima owe ni Ruoth Nyasaye chuth en gima ler moloyo." 
Leviticus27:29 Ng’ato ang’ata mowe ni Ruoth Nyasaye chuth ok nowar, to nyaka nege anega." 
Leviticus27:30 “Achiel kuom apar mag gik moko duto ma piny onyago, bed ni gin cham, kata olembe, gin mag Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo gin gik maler mowalne." 
Leviticus27:31 Ka ng’ato dwaro waro gimoro kuom achiel kuom apar mag gige, to nyaka omedie achiel kuom abich mag gigo." 
Leviticus27:32 Bende chiayo mar apar ka chiayo mar apar mokalo e bwo ludh jakwath kokwanogi, nobed mowal ni Ruoth Nyasaye, bed ni gin dhok kata rombe." 
Leviticus27:33 Kik ng’ato non ni gibeyo kata giricho, bende ok nolokgi gi moko. To kapo ni owilo chiayo moro gi machielo, to chiayo mar aparno, kaachiel gi mowilegono, nobed gik maler chuth, kendo ok nowargi.”" 
Leviticus27:34 Mago e chike mane Ruoth Nyasaye omiyo Musa e got Sinai mondo Musa omi jo-Israel. 
Numbers1:1 Chieng’ mokwongo mar due mar ariyo e higa mar ariyo, kane jo-Israel osewuok e piny Misri, Ruoth Nyasaye nowuoyo gi Musa e Hemb Romo e thim Sinai, kowachone niya:" 
Numbers1:2 Dhiyo ikwan oganda jo-Israel duto e dhoutgi kaluwore gi kweregi," 
Numbers1:3 kendo indik nying ng’ato ka ng’ato ma dichwo ma hike oseromo piero ariyo kata mokadho kanyo, moromo dhi e lweny. Un gi Harun nyaka undik nyinggi malong’o kuchanogi e ogendini mag lweny." 
Numbers1:4 Nyaka okaw ng’ato achiel ma jatelo e dhoot ka dhoot mondo okonyu e tijno. 
Numbers1:5 Magi e nying jogo ogogo: E dhood Reuben, en Elizur wuod Shedeur." 
Numbers1:6 E dhood Simeon, en Shelumiel wuod Zurishadai." 
Numbers1:7 E dhood Juda, en Nashon wuod Aminadab." 
Numbers1:8 E dhood Isakar, en Nathaneel wuod Zuar." 
Numbers1:9 E dhood Zebulun, en Eliab wuod Helon." 
Numbers1:10 Kuom joka Josef to en Elishama wuod Amihud e dhood Efraim, kod Gamaliel wuod Pedazur e dhood Manase." 
Numbers1:11 E dhood Benjamin, en Abidan wuod Gideoni." 
Numbers1:12 E dhood Dan, en Ahiezer wuod Amishadai." 
Numbers1:13 E dhood Asher, en Pagiel wuod Okran." 
Numbers1:14 E dhood Gad en Eliasaf wuod Reuel. 
Numbers1:15 To e dhood Naftali, en Ahira wuod Enan." 
Numbers1:16 Mago ne jotelo mochung’ ni oganda duto e dhoutgi, kendo ne gin jodongo mag dhout Israel." 
Numbers1:17 Musa gi Harun nokawo joma osehul nyinggigo," 
Numbers1:18 kendo ne gichoko oganda jo-Israel chieng’ mokwongo mar due mar ariyo. Ne gichano anywolagi e dhoutgi kaluwore gi kweregi, ka gindiko nying ng’ato ka ng’ato ma dichwo ma hike oseromo piero ariyo kata mokadho kanyo, kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nosechiko Musa." 
Numbers1:19 Kamano e kaka Musa nokwano jo-Israel e thim Sinai. 
Numbers1:20 Ne ochan jo-Reuben, ma wuod Israel maduong’, e utgi kaluwore gi kweregi, kindiko nying ng’ato ka ng’ato ma dichwo ma hike oseromo piero ariyo kata mokadho kanyo moromo dhi e lweny." 
Numbers1:21 Kar rombgi ne alufu piero ang’wen gauchiel gi mia abich. 
Numbers1:22 Jo-Simeon e utgi kaluwore gi kweregi, kindiko nying ng’ato ka ng’ato ma dichwo ma hike oseromo piero ariyo kata mokadho kanyo moromo dhi e lweny," 
Numbers1:23 ne alufu piero abich gochiko gi mia adek. 
Numbers1:24 Jo-Gad e utgi kaluwore gi kweregi, kindiko nying joma chwo duto ma hikgi oseromo piero ariyo kata mokadho kanyo ma oromo dhi e lweny," 
Numbers1:25 ne alufu piero ang’wen gabich gi mia auchiel kod piero abich. 
Numbers1:26 Jo-Juda e utgi kaluwore gi kweregi, kindiko nying joma chwo duto ma hikgi oseromo piero ariyo kata mokadho kanyo ma oromo dhi e lweny," 
Numbers1:27 ne alufu piero abiriyo gang’wen gi mia auchiel. 
Numbers1:28 Jo-Isakar e utgi kaluwore gi kweregi, kindiko nying joma chwo duto ma hikgi oseromo piero ariyo kata mokadho kanyo ma oromo dhi e lweny," 
Numbers1:29 ne alufu piero abich gang’wen gi mia ang’wen. 
Numbers1:30 Jo-Zebulun e utgi kaluwore gi kweregi, kindiko nying joma chwo duto ma hikgi oseromo piero ariyo kata mokadho kanyo ma oromo dhi e lweny," 
Numbers1:31 ne alufu piero abich gabiriyo gi mia ang’wen. 
Numbers1:32 Joka Josef ma jo dhood Efraim e utgi kaluwore gi kweregi, kindiko nying joma chwo duto ma hikgi oseromo piero ariyo kata mokadho kanyo ma oromo dhi e lweny," 
Numbers1:33 ne alufu piero ang’wen gi mia abich. 
Numbers1:34 To joka Josef ma jo dhood Manase e utgi kaluwore gi kweregi, kindiko nying joma chwo duto ma hikgi oseromo piero ariyo kata mokadho kanyo ma oromo dhi e lweny," 
Numbers1:35 ne alufu piero adek gariyo gi mia ariyo. 
Numbers1:36 Jo-Benjamin e utgi kaluwore gi kweregi, kindiko nying joma chwo duto ma hikgi oseromo piero ariyo kata mokadho kanyo ma oromo dhi e lweny," 
Numbers1:37 ne alufu piero adek gabich gi mia ang’wen. 
Numbers1:38 Jo-Dan e utgi kaluwore gi kweregi, kindiko nying joma chwo duto ma hikgi oseromo piero ariyo kata mokadho kanyo ma oromo dhi e lweny," 
Numbers1:39 ne alufu piero auchiel gariyo gi mia abiriyo. 
Numbers1:40 Jo-Ashur e utgi kaluwore gi kweregi, kindiko nying joma chwo duto ma hikgi oseromo piero ariyo kata mokadho kanyo ma oromo dhi e lweny," 
Numbers1:41 ne alufu piero ang’wen gachiel gi mia abich. 
Numbers1:42 Jo-Naftali e utgi kaluwore gi kweregi, kindiko nying joma chwo duto ma hikgi oseromo piero ariyo kata mokadho kanyo ma oromo dhi e lweny," 
Numbers1:43 ne alufu piero abich gadek gi mia abich. 
Numbers1:44 Mago e kwan jo-Israel mane Musa gi Harun kod jodong dhout Israel apar gariyogo ochano, ka jaduong’ ka jaduong’ ochung’ gi dhoot ka dhoot." 
Numbers1:45 Jo-Israel ma hikgi oseromo piero ariyo kata mokadho kanyo ma oromo dhi e lweny ne ondik nyinggi e dhout kweregi. 
Numbers1:46 Kar rombgi ne alufu mia auchiel gadek gi mia abich gi piero abich. 
Numbers1:47 To nying jo-Lawi kaluwore gi kweregi ne ok ondiki," 
Numbers1:48 nikech Ruoth Nyasaye nosewacho ni Musa niya," 
Numbers1:49 “Kik ikwan jo-Lawi kaka ikwano jo-Israel mamoko, kendo kik indik nyinggi kodgi," 
Numbers1:50 to iketgi e tich rito Hema Maler gi gige duto. Gin kende ema ginibed jorit Hema Maler, kendo ginigur hembegi molwore koni gi koni." 
Numbers1:51 Ka Hema Maler dhi kamoro, to jo-Lawi ema nopudhe, kendo kochopo kama gidhiye, to gin ema onego gigure. Ka ng’ato ang’ata ma ok owal ni tijno osudo but Hema Maler, to nyaka nege." 
Numbers1:52 Jo-Israel mamoko duto nyaka gur hembegi dhoot ka dhoot e kambine, kendo e bwo bandeche." 
Numbers1:53 To jo-Lawi nogur hembegi e alwora mar Hema Maler mar Rapar, mondo mirimba kik bi kuom oganda duto mag Israel. Kamano jo-Lawi ema nobed karito Hema Maler mar Rapar.”" 
Numbers1:54 Jo-Israel notimo mana kaka ne Ruoth Nyasaye ochiko Musa. 
Numbers2:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa gi Harun kama: 
Numbers2:2 Jo-Israel nyaka buor ka ng’ato ka ng’ato ni e bwo bandech jatendgi kendo e bwo bandech dhoodgi. Ginigur hembegi molworo Hemb Romo, kendo momanyore kode." 
Numbers2:3 Koro magi e dhoudi ma nogur hembegi yo wuok chieng, e nyim Hemb Romo: Jo-Juda nobed e bwo bandech kambigi, kochan e ogendgi mag lweny. Jatendgi en Nashon wuod Aminadab." 
Numbers2:4 Ogandane mar lweny romo ji alufu piero abiriyo gang’wen gi mia auchiel. 
Numbers2:5 Jo-Isakar ema nogur hembegi machiegni gi jo-Juda. Jatendgi en Nethaneel wuod Zuar. 
Numbers2:6 Ogandane romo ji alufu piero abich gang’wen gi mia ang’wen. 
Numbers2:7 Butgi jo-Zebulun ema nobedie. Jatendgi en Eliab wuod Helon. 
Numbers2:8 Ogandane mar lweny romo ji alufu piero abich gabiriyo gi mia ang’wen. 
Numbers2:9 Kamano ji duto manie kambi mar jo-Juda, kochan e ogendgi, romo alufu mia achiel gi piero aboro gauchiel gi mia ang’wen. Ka oganda jo-Israel duto chako wuoth, to gin ema gikwongo." 
Numbers2:10 Magi e dhoudi ma nobed yo milambo: Jo-Reuben nobed e bwo bandech kambigi kochan e ogendgi mag lweny. Jatendgi en Elizur wuod Shedeur. 
Numbers2:11 Ogandane mar lweny romo ji alufu piero ang’wen gauchiel gi mia abich. 
Numbers2:12 Jo-Simeon ema nobed butgi. 
Numbers2:13 Jatend jo-Simeon gogo nobed Shelumiel wuod Zurishadai. Ogandane mar lweny romo ji alufu piero abich gochiko gi mia adek. 
Numbers2:14 Bang’e to jo-Gad ema nobedie. Jatendgi en Eliasaf wuod Reuel. 
Numbers2:15 Ogandane mar lweny romo ji alufu piero ang’wen gabich gi mia auchiel gi piero abich. 
Numbers2:16 Kamano ji duto manie oganda jo-Reuben, kochan e ogendgi mag lweny, romo alufu mia achiel gi piero abich gachiel kod mia ang’wen gi piero abich. Gin ema giniwuog mar ariyo." 
Numbers2:17 Bang’gi to Hemb Romo ema nowuogi, ka kambi jo-Lawi osiko kargi e dier kambe mamoko. Ka giwuotho, to ginichanre mana kaka kambegi ochanore, ka ng’ato ka ng’ato ni e bwo bandeche." 
Numbers2:18 Dhoudi ma nobed yo podho chieng’ e magi: Jo-Efraim nobed e bwo bandechgi, kochan e ogendgi mag lweny. Jatendgi en Elshama wuod Amihud." 
Numbers2:19 Ogandane mar lweny romo ji alufu piero ang’wen gi mia abich. 
Numbers2:20 Jo-Manase ema nobed butgi. Jatend jo-Manase en Gamaliel wuod Pedazur. 
Numbers2:21 Ogandane mar lweny romo ji alufu piero adek gariyo gi mia ariyo. 
Numbers2:22 Bang’ jogo jo-Benjamin ema nobedie. Jatendgi en Abidan wuod Gideoni. 
Numbers2:23 Ogandane mar lweny romo ji alufu piero adek gabich gi mia ang’wen. 
Numbers2:24 Kamano ji duto manie kambi jo-Efraim, kochan e ogendgi mag lweny romo ji alufu mia achiel gaboro gi mia achiel. Gin ema giniwuog mar adek." 
Numbers2:25 Dhoudi ma nobed yo nyandwat e magi: Jo-Dan nobed e bwo bandech kambigi, kochan e ogendgi mag lweny, jatendgi en Ahiezel wuod Amishadai." 
Numbers2:26 Ogandagi romo ji alufu piero auchiel gariyo gi mia abiriyo. 
Numbers2:27 Jo-Ashur ema nobed butgi. Jatendgi en Pagiel wuod Okram. 
Numbers2:28 Ogandane mar lweny romo ji alufu piero ang’wen gachiel gi mia abich. 
Numbers2:29 Jo-Naftali ema nobed but dhoodno. Jatendgi en Ahira wuod Enan. 
Numbers2:30 Ogandane romo ji alufu piero abich gadek gi mia ang’wen. 
Numbers2:31 Kamano ji duto manie kambi jo-Dan romo alufu mia achiel gi piero abich gariyo gi mia auchiel. Gin ema giniwuog achien e bwo bandechegi, kochan-gi e ogendgi mag lweny." 
Numbers2:32 Mago e jo-Israel mane okwan kaluwore gi dhoutgi. Kar romb ji duto e kambi, kochan e ogendgi mag lweny romo ji alufu mia auchiel gi adek, gi mia abich gi piero abich." 
Numbers2:33 Kane ikwano jo-Isarel, to jo-Lawi ne ok okwan, nikech kamano e kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nochiko Musa." 
Numbers2:34 Jo-Israel notimo mana kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nochiko Musa. Ne gibworo e bwo bandechegi, kendo ne giwuotho e bwo bandechegigo, ka ng’ato ka ng’ato nigi joodgi e dhoodgi mana kaka nonyisgi." 
Numbers3:1 Magi ne e nyikwa Harun gi Musa e kinde mane Ruoth Nyasaye wuoyoe gi Musa e got Sinai: 
Numbers3:2 Yawuot Harun ne Nadab, wuowi maduong’, gi Abihu gi Eleazer kod Ithamar." 
Numbers3:3 Mago e nying yawuot Harun mane obiro, moketi e tij dolo." 
Numbers3:4 To Nadab gi Abihu notho e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, nikech ne giwang’o ubani ma ok ni kare e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye e thim Sinai. Ne githo ka pok ginywolo nyithindo, omiyo Eleazer gi Ithamar ne jokawo tij dolo ka wuon gi pod ngima." 
Numbers3:5 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa niya," 
Numbers3:6 “Kel jo-Lawi machiegni, kendo iketgi giti ni Harun." 
Numbers3:7 Nyaka gitine, kendo giti ni oganda duto e nyim Hemb Romo ka gitiyo tich lemo e Kama Ler." 
Numbers3:8 Ginibed ka girito gik moko duto mitiyogo e Hemb Romo, kendo giniti tich lemo e Kama Ler ni jo-Israel." 
Numbers3:9 Iniket jo-Lawi e teko Harun gi yawuote, mondo gibed joma ochiwne kuom oganda jo-Israel." 
Numbers3:10 Harun gi yawuote ema inimi tich dolo, to ng’at ma ok jadolo motiyo tich dolo nyaka negi.”" 
Numbers3:11 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa niya," 
Numbers3:12 “Aseyiero jo-Lawi kuom jo-Israel kar nyithindo makayo duto ma mond Israel onywolo. Kuom mano, jo-Lawi gin joga," 
Numbers3:13 nimar nyithindo duto makayo gin maga. Chieng’ mane anego nyithindo duto makayo e piny Misri ne awalo nyithind Israel makayo duto obed maga, bed ni gin mag dhano kata mag le. Gin maga. An e Ruoth Nyasaye.”" 
Numbers3:14 Ruoth Nyasaye ne ochako owacho ni Musa e thim Sinai niya," 
Numbers3:15 “Ndik nying jo-Lawi machwo duto chakre ja-due achiel kadhi nyime, kichanogi e dhoutgi kaluwore gi kweregi.”" 
Numbers3:16 Omiyo Musa nondiko nyinggi kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nochike," 
Numbers3:17 kendo nying yawuot Lawi e magi: Gershon gi Kohath, kod Merari." 
Numbers3:18 Joka Gershon e dhoutgi gin Libna gi Shimei. 
Numbers3:19 Joka Kohath e dhoutgi gin Amram gi Izhar gi Hebron kod Uziel. 
Numbers3:20 Joka Merari e dhoutgi gin Mali kod Mushi. Mago e dhout Lawi kaluwore gi kweregi. 
Numbers3:21 E dhood Gershon ne nitie joka Libni kod joka Shimei. Mago ne dhout Gershon," 
Numbers3:22 kendo kar romb jogi machwo mane okwan chakre ja-due achiel kadhi nyime ne alufu abiriyo gi mia abich. 
Numbers3:23 Dhout Gershon ne oket yo podho chieng’ e tok Hema Maler. 
Numbers3:24 Jatendgi ne Eliasaf wuod Lael. 
Numbers3:25 To kuom tich Hemb Romo, joka Gershon ne omi tich rito Hema Maler, kaachiel gi gik miumego, kod pasia mar dhood Hemb Romo," 
Numbers3:26 gi pasia mag laru gi mag rangach midonjogo e laru mar e aluora mar Hema Maler gi aluora mar kendo-mar-misango, kod gik moko duto mitiyogo kanyo." 
Numbers3:27 E dhood Kohath, ne nitie joka Amram gi joka Izhar gi joka Hebron kod joka Uziel." 
Numbers3:28 Mago ne dhout Kohath, kendo kar romb jogi machwo ma nokwan, chakre ja-due achiel ka dhi nyime ne alufu aboro gi mia achiel. Gin ema ne gin jorit Kama Ler." 
Numbers3:29 Dhoutgi noket yo milambo e bath Hema Maler. 
Numbers3:30 Jatendgi ne en Elizafan wuod Uziel," 
Numbers3:31 kendo ne omigi tich rito Sandug Muma gi mesa gi rachung taya gi kende mag misango gi gik moko duto mitiyogo e lemo, kod pasia gi gige duto." 
Numbers3:32 Jaduong’ jotend jo-Lawi duto ne Eleazer wuod Harun jadolo. En ema nokete jatelo mar rito Hema Maler. 
Numbers3:33 E dhood Merari ne nitie joka Mali gi joka Mushi. Mago ne e dhout Merari," 
Numbers3:34 kendo kar romb jogi machwo mane okwan, chakre ja-due achiel kadhi nyime, ne alufu auchiel gi mia ariyo." 
Numbers3:35 Jatendgi ne Zuriel wuod Abihail, kendo noketgi yo nyandwat mar Hema Maler." 
Numbers3:36 Joka Merari ne omi tich rito frembe gi rariw gi sirni gi rachungi mag Hema Maler, kaachiel gi gige duto kod gik moko duto mitiyogo kanyono," 
Numbers3:37 gi sirni molworo laro, kod rachungigi gi loyegi kod tondegi." 
Numbers3:38 To mogik, Musa gi Harun kod joka Harun noket e nyim Hema Maler yo wuok chieng’ mar Hemb Romo. Gin ema ne omigi tich rito Kama Ler ni jo-Israel, to ng’ato ang’ata ma ok jadolo mane nyalo sudo machiegni nyaka ne negi." 
Numbers3:39 Kar romb jo-Lawi machwo mane Musa ondiko nyinggi e dhoutgi kaka ne Ruoth Nyasaye ochiko ne alufu piero ariyo, chakre ja-due achiel kadhi nyime." 
Numbers3:40 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa niya, “Ndik nying jo-Israel machwo makayo duto chakre ja-due achiel kadhi nyime, kendo ikwan kar rombgi." 
Numbers3:41 An e Ruoth Nyasaye. Unuwalna jo-Lawi kar jo-Israel machwo makayo. Kamano bende unuwalna jamb jo-Lawi kar jamni makayo mag jo-Israel.” 
Numbers3:42 Musa nondiko nying jo-Isarel machwo makayo duto, chakre ja-due achiel kadhi nyime, kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nochike." 
Numbers3:43 Kar rombgi ne alufu piero ariyo gariyo gi mia ariyo gi piero abiriyo gadek. 
Numbers3:44 Ruoth Nyasaye nochako owacho ni Musa niya," 
Numbers3:45 “Kaw jo-Lawi kar jo-Israel machwo makayo duto, kendo kaw jamb jo-Lawi kar jambgi. Jo-Lawi nyaka bed joga. An e Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Numbers3:46 To jo-Israel machwo makayo ng’eny moloyo jo-Lawi gi ji mia ariyo kod piero abiriyo gadek," 
Numbers3:47 omiyo nyaka uwar joma odong’go gi shekel abich abich, kipimo gi shekel mitiyogo e tich Nyasaye. (Shekel achiel romre gi gera piero ariyo.)" 
Numbers3:48 Pesa mowargigo unuchiw ni Harun gi yawuote.” 
Numbers3:49 Ka ne gisetieko waro joma kayo mane odong’, Musa nokawo pesa mowargigo." 
Numbers3:50 Kar romb pesago ne shekel mag fedha alufu achiel gi mia adek kod piero achiel gabich kopim gi rapim mitiyogo e tich Nyasaye. 
Numbers3:51 Nochiwo pesago ni Harun gi yawuote kaka ne Ruoth Nyasaye owachone. Kamano notimo gima ne Ruoth Nyasaye ochike. 
Numbers4:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa gi Harun niya," 
Numbers4:2 “Kwanuru jo-Lawi ma joka Kohath e dhoutgi, kaluwore gi kweregi," 
Numbers4:3 kundiko nying joma hikgi nie kind piero adek gi piero abich, monego ti tich lemo e Hemb Romo." 
Numbers4:4 “Tich momi joka Kohath e Hemb Romo ma en tich maler moloyo, ema:" 
Numbers4:5 Ka udaro kambiu, to Harun gi yawuote nyaka bi mi lor pasia mogeng’o Kama Ler moloyo, kendo giumgo Sandug Rapar." 
Numbers4:6 Eka giume gi piende monyong’, kendo giboye gi law mambulu. Bang’e girwakne ludhe miting’ego." 
Numbers4:7 Ginipedh law mambulu e mesa miketoe makati e nyim Nyasaye pile, kendo giniketie tewni gi tegni gi kikombe kod agwetni mitiyogo kitimo misengni miolo piny. Makati michiwo pile bende nyaka bed e wi mesano." 
Numbers4:8 Bang’ mano, nyaka gipedh law makwar kuom gigo, kendo gichak giumgi duto gi piende monyong’. Eka girwak ludhe miting’ego." 
Numbers4:9 Ginikaw law mambulu, giumgo rachung taya gi teyni mage, gi rangisni gi rajow, kod gik miting’ogo mor taya," 
Numbers4:10 ginibo rachung taya kod gige duto gi piende monyong’, kendo giniting’e koliero e luth." 
Numbers4:11 Ginipedh law mambulu e mesa mar dhahabu kendo giniume gi piende monyong’. Bang’e ginirwakne ludhe miting’ego. 
Numbers4:12 Ginikaw gik moko duto mitiyogo e Kama Ler, mi giket e law mambulu, kendo giumgi gi piende monyong’, eka giniting’gi ka giliero e luth." 
Numbers4:13 Ginijow buru e kendo-mar-misango, mi gium kendono gi law maralik." 
Numbers4:14 Eka giniket kuome gik moko duto mitiyogo e tich dolo, kaka tep mach gi rachwow gi rajow gi tewni kod gik moko duto mag kendo mar misango. Giniume gi piende monyong’, kendo ginirwakne ludhe miting’ego." 
Numbers4:15 Pile ka kambi dar, to joka Kohath nyaka bi mondo oting’ Hema Maler kod gige duto. To kik gibi ka pok Harun gi yawuote otieko umogi, bende kik gimul gimoro amora maler, nono to githo. Mago duto gin gik Hemb Romo ma joka Kohath ema ting’o." 
Numbers4:16 Eleazer wuod Harun jadolo ema norit mor taya gi ubani mang’ue ng’ar, gi mor wir kod misango mar cham michiwo pile. Hema Maler gi gik moko duto manie iye, tiende ni Kama Ler kod gige, bende en ema noriti.”" 
Numbers4:17 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa gi Harun niya," 
Numbers4:18 “Kik uwe dhood joka Kohath rum mi lal kuom jo-Lawi wetegi," 
Numbers4:19 to nyisgiuru ni ka gisudo machiegni gi gik maler, to gima onego tim mondo kik githo e ma: Harun gi yawuote ema nyaka donji mondo omi ng’ato ka ng’ato tije kod gima onego ng’atno ting’" 
Numbers4:20 to joka Kohath kik donj, nikech dipo ka gigoyo wang’gi kuom gik maler, mi githo.”" 
Numbers4:21 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa niya," 
Numbers4:22 “Kwan joka Gershon e dhoutgi, kaluwore gi kweregi," 
Numbers4:23 kindiko nying joma hikgi ni e kind piero adek kod piero abich, monego ti e Hemb Romo." 
Numbers4:24 “Tije momigi kod gik ma onego giti e magi: 
Numbers4:25 Giniting’ pasia mag Kama Ler kendo giniting’ Hemb Romo gi law miumego, kaachiel gi piende monyong’ moluow kuome, gi pasia mar dhood Hemb Romo," 
Numbers4:26 gi rageng’ni mag laru gi mag pasia mar rangach midonjogo e laru mar aluora mar Hema Maler gi aluora mar kendo-mar-misango gi tondegi kod gik moko duto mitiyogo. Gin ema omigi tich rito gigo. 
Numbers4:27 Harun gi yawuote ema nochan tije duto mag joka Gershon, kod gik ma onego giting’." 
Numbers4:28 Mano e tich momi joka Gershon e Hemb Romo. Ithamar wuod Harun jadolo ema nobed jatendgi. 
Numbers4:29 “Nyaka ikwan joka Merari e dhoutgi moluwore gi kweregi," 
Numbers4:30 kindiko nying ji duto ma hikgi ni e kind piero adek gi piero abich, monego ti e Hemb Romo." 
Numbers4:31 “Gik ma onego giting’ kaka tichgi e Hemb Romo e magi: Frembe mag Hema Maler gi rariw mage gi sirni mage gi rachungi," 
Numbers4:32 gi sirni mag laru molworo hema, gi rachungine gi loyegi gi tondegi kod gik moko duto mitiyogo kanyo. Nyaka pog ni ng’ato ka ng’ato gik ma onego giting’." 
Numbers4:33 Mago e tije momi joka Merari e hemb Romo. Ithamar wuod Harun jadolo ema nobed jatendgi.” 
Numbers4:34 Musa gi Harun kod jodong oganda jo-Israel nokwano joka Kohath e dhoutgi kaluwore gi kweregi," 
Numbers4:35 ka gindiko nying ng’ato ka ng’ato ma hike ni e kind piero adek gi piero abich, moromo tiyo e Hemb Romo." 
Numbers4:36 Kar rombgi kochan e dhoutgi ne alufu ariyo gi mia abiriyo gi piero abich. 
Numbers4:37 Mano ne e kar romb joka Kohath mane tiyo e Hemb Romo. Musa gi Harun nokwanogi mana kaka ne Ruoth Nyasaye omiyo Musa onyisogi. 
Numbers4:38 Joka Gershon ma hikgi ne ni e kind piero adek gi piero abich ma ne tiyo e Hemb Romo nondik nyinggi kaluwore gi kweregi. 
Numbers4:39  
Numbers4:40 Kar rombgi e dhoutgi kaluwore gi kweregi ne alufu ariyo gi mia auchiel gi piero adek. 
Numbers4:41 Mago e joka Gershon mane tiyo e tich Hemb Romo, kendo mane Musa gi Harun ondiko nyinggi kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nosechikogi." 
Numbers4:42 Joka Merari ma hikgi ne ni e kind piero adek gi piero abich mane oromo tiyo e Hemb Romo ne ondik nyinggi e dhoutgi kaluwore ki kweregi. 
Numbers4:43  
Numbers4:44 Kar rombgi e dhoutgi ne alufu adek gi mia ariyo. 
Numbers4:45 Musa gi Harun nondiko nying joka Merarigo ka gichanogi e dhoutgi kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nomiyo Musa ochikogi. 
Numbers4:46 Mano e kaka Musa gi Harun kod jodong Israel nondiko nying jo-Lawi duto e dhoutgi kaluwore gi kweregi. 
Numbers4:47 Ne gin joma hikgi ni e kind piero adek gi piero abich mane tiyo tije mopogore opogore e Hemb Romo, kendo mane ting’o gik Hemb Romo." 
Numbers4:48 Kar rombgi duto ne alufu aboro gi mia abich kod piero aboro. 
Numbers4:49 Musa nondiko nying ng’ato ka ng’ato kuomgi kaka ne Ruoth Nyasaye ochike, kaluwore gi tijegi kod gik mane onego giting’. Mano e kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nochiko Musa mondo otim." 
Numbers5:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa niya," 
Numbers5:2 “Chik jo-Israel ni joma nigi tuo dhoho, kata man gi nyach machuer, kata mogak nikech omulo gimoro motho, mondo ogol e kambi." 
Numbers5:3 Nyaka uketgi gidag oko mar kambi, bed ni gin chwo kata mon, mondo kik gidwany kambeu, kuonde ma adake kodu.”" 
Numbers5:4 Omiyo jo-Israel nogolo joma nigi tuoche ma kamago e kambi, mana kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nonyiso Musa." 
Numbers5:5 Ruoth Nyasaye nochako owacho ni Musa 
Numbers5:6 mondo onyis jo-Isarel kama: “Ka ng’ato otimo marach ni wadgi, mi oketho e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, bed ni en dichwo kata dhako, to mano omiyo obedo jaketho, kendo en gi gowi ma nyaka ochul." 
Numbers5:7 Nyaka ohul ketho mosetimono, kendo nyaka ochul ng’at mokethoneno gima oromo gi kethono, komedoe achiel kuom abich." 
Numbers5:8 Ka ng’atno osetho, to oonge gi jaodgi mahie ma dichul kuom kethono, to chudono kaachiel gi im ma jadolo pwodhogo jakethono nobed mar Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo nodong’ ni jadolo." 
Numbers5:9 “Mich moyiedhi duto ma jo-Israel kelo nobed mag jadolo. 
Numbers5:10 Enokaw mich moyiedhi duto, bende gimoro amora momiye nobed mare.”" 
Numbers5:11 Ruoth Nyasaye nochako owacho ni Musa 
Numbers5:12 ni mondo onyis jo-Israel niya, “Nyalo bet ni chi ng’ato oketho," 
Numbers5:13 koterore gi ng’ato, ka chwore kia. Kodwanyore kamano ling’ling’, ma onge janeno kata kaonge ng’ama ojuke," 
Numbers5:14 to bang’e gimoro otimore momiyo chwore ochich kode," 
Numbers5:15 to nyaka chwore tere ir jadolo, bed ni dhakono osedwanyore adier, kata chwore chich mana kode kayiem. Chwore nyaka kel mogo mayom moromo kilo abiriyo kaka chik dwaro, to kik oolie mo, bende kik oketie ubani, nimar en misango mar cham mitiekogo chich, tiende ni misango mifwenyogo adiera." 
Numbers5:16 Jadolo nokel dhakono e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye," 
Numbers5:17 eka notwom pi maler gi tawo, kendo nojuk lop dier ot mar Hema Maler, mi noruw gi pigno." 
Numbers5:18 Kosekelo dhakono e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, to nogony yie wiye, eka noket misango mar cham mifwenyogo adiera e lwete. En misango mar cham mitiekogo chich. To jadolo noting pi mar muma mafwenyo adiera e lwete owuon." 
Numbers5:19 Bang’ mano nomi dhakono kuong’re, kowachone niya, ‘Ka ng’ato ok oseterore kodi, kendo ok iseketho kidwanyori, to in chi chwori, to pi mar muma mafwenyo adierani kik hinyi." 
Numbers5:20 To ka en adier ni iseketho kidwanyori, mi ng’ato oterore kodi, to in chi chwori," 
Numbers5:21 to Ruoth Nyasaye mondo omi iyi okirre, kata omi ibuog nyathi ka kindeni mar nywol pok ochopo, kibedogo ranyisi ni jou kuom wach kuong’ruok." 
Numbers5:22 Pigni mondo odonj e iyi, kendo omi iyi okirre, kata omi ibuog nyathi ka kindeni mar nywol pok ochopo.’ Ka jadolo osemiyo dhakono okuong’ore kamano, to dhakono nodwok ni, ‘Obed kamano.’" 
Numbers5:23 “Eka jadolo nondik weche mag kuong’go e kalatas, to nolwokgi gi pi mar muma mafwenyo adiera." 
Numbers5:24 Bang’e nomi dhakono pigno omodhi mi donj e iye. 
Numbers5:25 Jadolo nokaw misango mar cham mitiekogo chich e lwet dhakono, mi nochiwe e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye ka mich moyiedhi. Bang’ mano nokel mogono e kendo mar misango," 
Numbers5:26 mi nojuk sanja, kendo nowang’ ka rapar e kendo-mar-misango, eka nochak omi dhakono modh pigcha." 
Numbers5:27 Ka en adieri ni osedwanyore, koterore, to en chi chwore, to ka jadolo osemiye pigno omodho, to iye nokirre, kata nobuogi ka kindene mar nywol pok ochopo, kendo nyinge nobed mokwong’ e nyim jogi." 
Numbers5:28 To ka dhakono ok osedwanyore kendo adier oler, to ok noyud hinyruok, to nonywol anywola maber." 
Numbers5:29 “Mano e chik mar weche mag chich, ma ka chi ng’ato oketho, mi odwanyore," 
Numbers5:30 kata ka chwore ochich achicha kode, to nyaka okele e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, mi jadolo timne kaka chikno dwaro." 
Numbers5:31 Dichwo nobed maonge ketho, to chiege nyaka yud kum kuom kethone.”" 
Numbers6:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa 
Numbers6:2 ni mondo onyis jo-Israel niya, “Ng’ato ang’ata ma okuong’ore ni obiro bedo ja-Nazir, tiende ni ng’at mowal ni Ruoth Nyasaye," 
Numbers6:3 ok nomadh kong’o kata gimoro mamero ji, bed ni en dichwo kata dhako. Ok nomadh gik ma kamago, kata gimoro amora molos gi mzabibu, to bende ok nocham mzabibu manumu kata motwo." 
Numbers6:4 E kinde duto ma okuong’ore ni obiro bedo ja-Nazirno, ok nomul gimoro amora moa kuom yadh mzabibu kata matin." 
Numbers6:5 “E kindeno duto bende mirich ok noka wiye, to nowe yie wiye dongi, kendo nokadgi akada, nyaka ndalo mag kuong’ruok norum. Enoritre maler ni Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Numbers6:6 Ok nosud machiegni gi ng’at motho," 
Numbers6:7 ma dimi obed mogak, bed ni en wuon kata min kata owadgi kata nyamin. Yie wiye maboyogo ema nyiso ni osewale ni Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Numbers6:8 Enoritre maler ni Ruoth Nyasaye ndalo duto mag kuong’ruokne. 
Numbers6:9 “Ka ng’ato otho bute apoya, mogere kuome, mi omiyo yie wiye ogak, to nyaka oliel wiye bang’ ndalo abiriyo, chieng’ moket ni ipwodhee." 
Numbers6:10 To chieng’ mar aboro nyaka okel ni jadolo akuch odugla ariyo kata nyithi akuru ariyo e dho Hema Miromoe gi Nyasaye. 
Numbers6:11 Jadolo nokaw akuru achiel, mi notimgo misango mar golo richo to machielo notimgo misango miwang’o pep, mi nopwodh ng’atno kuom gak mane oyudo kuom ng’at motho. Eka ja-Nazir nochak opidh wiye chieng’no, kowalore manyien ni Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Numbers6:12 Kuom ndalo duto mane okuong’oree, kendo nokel nyaim ma hike achiel mondo otimgo misango mipwodhogo ketho mar gowi. To kinde mane oyudo osetieko e walruokneno ok nokwan, nikech yie wiye mane nyiso ni owale ne odoko mogak." 
Numbers6:13 “Chik momako ja-Nazir chieng’ ma kindene mar walruok orumo e ma: Nyaka tere e dho Hemb Romo," 
Numbers6:14 kendo nochiw ni Ruoth Nyasaye nyaim ma hike achiel maonge songa mondo otimgo misango miwang’o pep, gi rombo swini maonge songa mondo otimgo misango mar sawo," 
Numbers6:15 gi odheru moting’o makati ma ok ketie thowi, moted gi mo, kod chapati ma bende ok ketie thowi, mowir gi mo kaachiel gi misengni mag cham kod misengni miolo piny, kaka chik dwaro." 
Numbers6:16 Jadolo nochiw gigo duto e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, eka notim ni ng’atno misango mar golo richo kod misango miwang’o pep." 
Numbers6:17 Im cha to notimgo ni Ruoth Nyasaye misango mar sawo, kaachiel gi makati manie odheru. Bende nochiw misango mar cham gi misango miolo piny." 
Numbers6:18 Ja-Nazirno noliel wiye e dho Hemb Romo, kendo nokaw yie wiye ma yande owalno, mi owang’ie mach mitimogo misango mar sawo." 
Numbers6:19 Bang’ mano jadolo nokaw bad im kosetedi, kaachiel gi makati ma ok ketie thowi mogol e odheru, kod chapat achiel ma ok ketie thowi, mi noketgi e lwet ja-Nazirno, koselielo yie wiye mane owalegono." 
Numbers6:20 Eka jadolo nochiwgi ni Ruoth Nyasaye ka mich moyiedhi. Lemogo kaachiel gi agoko kod em michiwo ni Ruoth Nyasaye ka mich moyiedhi, gin gik maler, omiyo gidong’ ni jadolo. Bang’ timo mago duto, ja-Nazirno koro nobed gi thuolo mar madho divai." 
Numbers6:21 “Mano e chik momako ja-Nazir ma osekwong’ore, kendo mano e misango ma nyaka otim ni Ruoth Nyasaye kuom walruokne, ka ok okwan gik mamoko ma onyalo chiwo. Nyaka ochop kuong’ruokne duto, kaluwore gi chik mar walruokne.”" 
Numbers6:22 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa ni mondo onyis Harun niya," 
Numbers6:23 “Ka iguedho jo-Israel, to magi e weche ma nyaka ikonyrigo:" 
Numbers6:24 ‘Ruoth Nyasaye mondo oguedhu kendo oritu," 
Numbers6:25 Ruoth Nyasaye mondo orienynu kendo ong’wonnu," 
Numbers6:26 Ruoth Nyasaye mondo orangu maber, kendo okelnu kue.’" 
Numbers6:27 Kamano e kaka ginihul nyinga ni jo-Israel kendo anaguedhgi.” 
Numbers7:1 Chieng’ mane Musa otieko chungoe Hema Maler, nowirogo gi mo mowale ni tich Nyasaye, kaachiel gi gige duto kod kendo-mar-misango gi gige duto." 
Numbers7:2 Jodong Israel ma jotend dhoutgi mane okonyo Musa e tich kwano jo-Israel, nogolo chiwo." 
Numbers7:3 Chiwo mane gikelo e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye e magi: Geche auchiel moum wigi, kaachiel gi ruedhi apar gariyo. Ruodhi ariyo ariyo nochiwo gari achiel achiel, kendo ruoth ka ruoth nochiwo rwath achiel. Kane gikelo gigo e nyim Hema Maler, Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa niya," 
Numbers7:4 “Kaw gik ma gisechiwogo, nikech ibiro tiyo kodgi e Hema Miromoe gi Nyasaye." 
Numbers7:5 Migi jo-Lawi kaka tich ng’ato ka ng’ato dwaro.” 
Numbers7:6 Omiyo Musa nokawo geche kod ruedhi, momiyo jo-Lawi." 
Numbers7:7 Nomiyo joka Gershon geche ariyo gi ruedhi ang’wen, moromo tichgi." 
Numbers7:8 Joka Merari to nomiyo geche ang’wen gi ruedhi aboro, kaka tijgi dwaro, Ithamar wuod Harun jadolo ema nobedo jatend jogo." 
Numbers7:9 To joka Kohath ne ok omiyo gimoro, nikech tich mane omigi ne mar ting’o gik maler, mane nyaka ting’ mana e gokgi." 
Numbers7:10 Kane owir kendo-mar-misango gi mo, jodongo nokelo chiwogi e nyim kendono mondo owalego." 
Numbers7:11 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa niya, “We jodongo ochiw michgo mar walo kendo-mar-misango ni tich Nyasaye, ka jaduong’ ka jaduong’ kelo michne chieng’ achiel achiel.”" 
Numbers7:12 Chieng’ mokwongo Nashon wuod Aminadab ma ja-Juda ema nokelo chiwo mare. 
Numbers7:13 Nochiwo nyalaro mar fedha ma pekne romo shekel mia achiel gi piero adek, kopim gi rapim mitiyogo e tich Nyasaye, gi tawo mar fedha ma pekne shekel piero abiriyo. Giduto ne giting’o mogo moruw gi mo mitimogo misango mar cham." 
Numbers7:14 Bende nochiwo kikombe mar dhahabu ma pekne shekel apar ma ubani pong’o," 
Numbers7:15 gi nyarwath gi im gi nyaim ma hike achiel mitimogo misango miwang’o pep," 
Numbers7:16 gi nywok mitimogo misango mar golo richo," 
Numbers7:17 kod ruedhi ariyo gi imbe abich gi nywogi abich kod nyiimbe abich ma hikgi achiel achiel. Jamnigo duto ne ibiro timogo misango mar sawo. Mago e chiwo mane Nashon wuod Aminadab ogolo. 
Numbers7:18 Chieng’ mar ariyo, Nethaneel wuod Zuar, jatend jo-Isakar, nokelo chiwo mare." 
Numbers7:19 Nochiwo nyalaro mar fedha ma pekne romo shekel mia achiel gi piero adek kopim gi rapim mitiyogo e tich Nyasaye, gi tawo mar fedha ma pekne shekel piero abiriyo. Giduto ne giting’o mogo moruw gi mo mitimogo misango mar cham." 
Numbers7:20 Bende nochiwo kikombe mar dhahabu ma pekne shekel apar ma ubani opong’o," 
Numbers7:21 gi nyarwath gi im gi nyaim ma hike achiel mitimogo misango miwang’o pep," 
Numbers7:22 gi nywok mitimogo misango mar golo richo,"
