Numbers7:23 kod ruedhi ariyo gi imbe abich gi nywogi abich kod nyiimbe abich ma hikgi achiel achiel. Jamnigo duto ne ibiro timogo misango mar sawo. Mago e chiwo mane Nethaneel wuod Zuar ogolo. 
Numbers7:24 Chieng’ mar adek, Eliab wuod Helon, jatend jo-Zebulun, nokelo chiwo mare." 
Numbers7:25 Nochiwo nyalaro mar fedha ma pekne romo kilo mia achiel gi piero adek, kopim gi rapim mitiyogo e tich Nyasaye, gi tawo mar fedha ma pekne shekel piero abiriyo. Giduto ne giting’o mogo moruw gi mo mitimogo misango mar cham." 
Numbers7:26 Bende nochiwo kikombe mar dhahabu ma pekne shekel apar ma ubani opong’o," 
Numbers7:27 gi nyarwath gi im gi nyaim ma hike achiel mitimogo misango miwang’o pep," 
Numbers7:28 gi nywok mitimogo misango mar golo richo," 
Numbers7:29 kod ruedhi ariyo gi imbe abich gi nywogi abich kod nyiimbe abich ma hikgi achiel achiel. Jamnigo duto ne ibiro timogo misango mar sawo. Mago e chiwo mane Eliab wuod Helon ogolo. 
Numbers7:30 Chieng’ mar ang’wen Elizur wuod Shedeur, jatend jo-Reuben, nokelo chiwo mare." 
Numbers7:31 Nochiwo nyalaro mar fedha ma pekne romo shekel mia achiel gi piero adek kopim gi rapim mitiyogo e tich Nyasaye, gi tawo mar fedha ma pekne shekel piero abiriyo. Giduto ne giting’o mogo moruw gi mo mitimogo misango mar cham." 
Numbers7:32 Bende nochiwo kikombe mar dhahabu ma pekne shekel apar ma ubani opong’o," 
Numbers7:33 gi nyarwath gi im gi nyaim ma hike achiel mitimogo misango miwang’o pep," 
Numbers7:34 gi nywok mitimogo misango mar golo richo," 
Numbers7:35 kod ruedhi ariyo gi imbe abich gi nywogi abich kod nyiimbe abich ma hikgi achiel achiel. Jamnigo duto ne ibiro timogo misango mar sawo. Mago e chiwo mane Elizur wuod Shedeur ogolo. 
Numbers7:36 Chieng’ mar abich, Shelumiel wuod Zurishadai, jatend jo-Simeon nokelo chiwo mare." 
Numbers7:37 Nochiwo nyalaro mar fedha ma pekne romo kilo mia achiel gi piero adek, kopim gi rapim mitiyogo e tich Nyasaye, gi tawo mar fedha ma pekne shekel piero abiriyo. Giduto ne giting’o mogo moruw gi mo mitimogo misango mar cham." 
Numbers7:38 Bende nochiwo kikombe mar dhahabu ma pekne shekel apar ma ubani opong’o," 
Numbers7:39 gi nyarwath gi im gi nyaim ma hike achiel mitimogo misango miwang’o pep," 
Numbers7:40 gi nywok mitimogo misango mar golo richo," 
Numbers7:41 kod ruedhi ariyo gi imbe abich gi nywogi abich kod nyiimbe abich ma hikgi achiel achiel. Jamnigo duto ne ibiro timogo misango mar sawo. Mago e chiwo mane Shelumiel wuod Zurishadai ogolo. 
Numbers7:42 Chieng’ mar auchiel, Eliasaf wuod Reuel, jatend jo-Gad, nokelo chiwo mare." 
Numbers7:43 Nochiwo nyalaro mar fedha ma pekne romo kilo mia achiel gi piero adek, kopim gi rapim mitiyogo e tich Nyasaye, gi tawo mar fedha ma pekne shekel piero abiriyo. Giduto ne giting’o mogo moruw gi mo mitimogo misango mar cham." 
Numbers7:44 Bende nochiwo kikombe mar dhahabu ma pekne shekel apar ma ubani opong’o," 
Numbers7:45 gi nyarwath gi im gi nyaim ma hike achiel mitimogo misango miwang’o pep," 
Numbers7:46 gi nywok mitimogo misango mar golo richo," 
Numbers7:47 kod ruedhi ariyo gi imbe abich gi nywogi abich kod nyiimbe abich ma hikgi achiel achiel. Jamnigo duto ne ibiro timogo misango mar sawo. Mago e chiwo mane Eliasaf wuod Reuel ogolo. 
Numbers7:48 Chieng’ mar abiriyo, Elishama wuod Amihud, jatend jo-Efraim, nokelo chiwo mare." 
Numbers7:49 Nochiwo nyalaro mar fedha ma pekne romo kilo mia achiel gi piero adek, kopim gi rapim mitiyogo e tich Nyasaye, gi tawo mar fedha ma pekne shekel piero abiriyo. Giduto ne giting’o mogo moruw gi mo mitimogo misango mar cham." 
Numbers7:50 Bende nochiwo kikombe mar dhahabu ma pekne shekel apar ma ubani opong’o," 
Numbers7:51 gi nyarwath gi im gi nyaim ma hike achiel mitimogo misango miwang’o pep," 
Numbers7:52 gi nywok mitimogo misango mar golo richo," 
Numbers7:53 kod ruedhi ariyo gi imbe abich gi nywogi abich kod nyiimbe abich ma hikgi achiel achiel. Jamnigo duto ne ibiro timogo misango mar sawo. Mago e chiwo mane Elishama wuod Amihud ogolo. 
Numbers7:54 Chieng’ mar aboro, Gamaliel wuod Pedazur, jatend jo-Manase nogolo chiwo mare." 
Numbers7:55 Nochiwo nyalaro mar fedha ma pekne romo kilo mia achiel gi piero adek, kopim gi rapim mitiyogo e tich Nyasaye, gi tawo mar fedha ma pekne shekel piero abiriyo. Giduto ne giting’o mogo moruw gi mo mitimogo misango mar cham." 
Numbers7:56 Bende nochiwo kikombe mar dhahabu ma pekne shekel apar ma ubani opong’o," 
Numbers7:57 gi nyarwath gi im gi nyaim ma hike achiel mitimogo misango miwang’o pep," 
Numbers7:58 gi nywok mitimogo misango mar golo richo," 
Numbers7:59 kod ruedhi ariyo gi imbe abich gi nywogi abich kod nyiimbe abich ma hikgi achiel achiel. Jamnigo duto ne ibiro timogo misango mar sawo. Mago e chiwo mane Gamaliel wuod Pedazur ogolo. 
Numbers7:60 Chieng mar ochiko, Abidan wuod Gideoni, jatend jo-Benjamin nokelo chiwo mare." 
Numbers7:61 Nochiwo nyalaro mar fedha ma pekne romo kilo mia achiel gi piero adek, kopim gi rapim mitiyogo e tich Nyasaye, gi tawo mar fedha ma pekne shekel piero abiriyo. Giduto ne giting’o mogo moruw gi mo mitimogo misango mar cham." 
Numbers7:62 Bende nochiwo kikombe mar dhahabu ma pekne shekel apar ma ubani opong’o," 
Numbers7:63 gi nyarwath gi im gi nyaim ma hike achiel mitimogo misango miwang’o pep," 
Numbers7:64 gi nywok mitimogo misango mar golo richo," 
Numbers7:65 kod ruedhi ariyo gi imbe abich gi nywogi abich kod nyiimbe abich ma hikgi achiel achiel. Jamnigo duto ne ibiro timogo misango mar sawo. Mago e chiwo mane Abidan wuod Gideoni ogolo. 
Numbers7:66 Chieng’ mar apar, Ahiezer wuod Amishadai, jatend jo-Dan, nokelo chiwo mare." 
Numbers7:67 Nochiwo nyalaro mar fedha ma pekne romo kilo mia achiel gi piero adek, kopim gi rapim mitiyogo e tich Nyasaye, gi tawo mar fedha ma pekne shekel piero abiriyo. Giduto ne giting’o mogo moruw gi mo mitimogo misango mar cham." 
Numbers7:68 Bende nochiwo kikombe mar dhahabu ma pekne shekel apar ma ubani opong’o," 
Numbers7:69 gi nyarwath gi im gi nyaim ma hike achiel mitimogo misango miwang’o pep," 
Numbers7:70 gi nywok mitimogo misango mar golo richo," 
Numbers7:71 kod ruedhi ariyo gi imbe abich gi nywogi abich kod nyiimbe abich ma hikgi achiel achiel. Jamnigo duto ne ibiro timogo misango mar sawo. Mago e chiwo mane Ahiezer wuod Amishadai ogolo. 
Numbers7:72 Chieng’ mar apar gachiel Pagiel wuod Okran, jatend jo-Asher, nokelo chiwo mare." 
Numbers7:73 Nochiwo nyalaro mar fedha ma pekne romo kilo mia achiel gi piero adek, kopim gi rapim mitiyogo e tich Nyasaye, gi tawo mar fedha ma pekne shekel piero abiriyo. Giduto ne giting’o mogo moruw gi mo mitimogo misango mar cham." 
Numbers7:74 Bende nochiwo kikombe mar dhahabu ma pekne shekel apar ma ubani opong’o," 
Numbers7:75 gi nyarwath gi im gi nyaim ma hike achiel mitimogo misango miwang’o pep," 
Numbers7:76 gi nywok mitimogo misango mar golo richo," 
Numbers7:77 kod ruedhi ariyo gi imbe abich gi nywogi abich kod nyiimbe abich ma hikgi achiel achiel. Jamnigo duto ne ibiro timogo misango mar sawo. Mago e chiwo mane Pagiel wuod Okran ogolo. 
Numbers7:78 Chieng’ mar apar gariyo, Ahira wuod Enan, jatend jo-Naftali, nokelo chiwo mare." 
Numbers7:79 Nochiwo nyalaro mar fedha ma pekne romo kilo mia achiel gi piero adek, kopim gi rapim mitiyogo e tich Nyasaye, gi tawo mar fedha ma pekne shekel piero abiriyo. Giduto ne giting’o mogo moruw gi mo mitimogo misango mar cham." 
Numbers7:80 Bende nochiwo kikombe mar dhahabu ma pekne shekel apar ma ubani opong’o," 
Numbers7:81 gi nyarwath gi im gi nyaim ma hike achiel mitimogo misango miwang’o pep," 
Numbers7:82 gi nywok mitimogo misango mar golo richo," 
Numbers7:83 kod ruedhi ariyo gi imbe abich gi nywogi abich kod nyiimbe abich ma hikgi achiel achiel. Jamnigo duto ne ibiro timogo misango mar sawo. Mago e chiwo mane Ahira wuod Enan ogolo. 
Numbers7:84 Gik mane jodong Israel ochiwo mondo owalgo kendo mar misango chieng’ mane iwire e magi: Nyilerni mag fedha apar gariyo gi tewni mag fedha apar gariyo kod kikombe mag dhahabu apar gariyo. 
Numbers7:85 Pek mar nyalaro ka nyalaro ne romo shekel mia achiel gi piero adek, to pek mar tawo ka tawo shekel piero abiriyo. Kamano pek mag gigo duto ne romo shekel alufu ariyo gi mia ang’wen, kipimoo gi rapim mitiyogo e tich Nyasaye." 
Numbers7:86 Kikombe apar gariyo ma ubani opong’ogo, moro ka moro pekne ne romo shekel apar kipimo gi rapim mitiyogo e tich Nyasaye. Kamano kar romb pek dhahabu mag kikombego ne romo shekel mia achiel gi piero ariyo." 
Numbers7:87 To kar romb jamni duto mitimogo misango miwang’o pep ne ruedhi apar gariyo gi imbe apar gariyo gi nyiimbe apar gariyo ma hikgi achiel achiel achiel, kaachiel gi misengni mag cham michiwo kodgi kaka chik dwaro, kod nywogi apar gariyo mitimogo misango mar golo richo." 
Numbers7:88 Kar romb jamni mitimogo misango mar sawo ne ruedhi piero ariyo gang’wen gi imbe piero auchiel gi nywogi piero auchiel kod nyiimbe oiero auchiel ma hikgi achiel achiel. Mago e gik mane ochiw mondo owalgo kendo mar misango chieng’ mane iwire. 
Numbers7:89 To kane Musa odonjo e Hemb Romo mondo owuo gi Nyasaye, nowinjo Dwond Nyasaye ka wuoyo kode ewi raum mar Sandug Rapar miluongo ni kar-ng’wono, e kind kido ariyo machalo gi malaika miluongo ni kerubi." 
Numbers8:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa 
Numbers8:2 mondo onyis Harun niya, “Ka iketo teyni abiriyo e rachungi, to chan-gi mondo girieny ka gimenyo kanyim rachungi.”" 
Numbers8:3 Omiyo Harun noketo teyni mondo orieny kamenyo kanyim rachungi mana kaka ne Nyasaye ochiko Musa. 
Numbers8:4 Kor rachungi kaachiel gi bedene kod thiepene ne othedhi gi dhahabu. Musa nolose mana machal gi kido mane Ruoth Nyasaye onyise. 
Numbers8:5 Ruoth Nyasaye nochako owacho ni Musa niya," 
Numbers8:6 “Pog jo-Lawi kuom dhout Israel mamoko mondo ipwodhgi. 
Numbers8:7 To ma e kaka nipwodhgi: Kir kuomgi pi mapwodho richo. Nyaka giliel dendgi duto, kendo gilwok dendgi, mi gidok mopwodhore." 
Numbers8:8 Bang’ mano gikaw nyarwath mondo otimgo misango miwang’o pep. In to nikaw nyarwath machielo mondo otimgo misango mar golo richo. 
Numbers8:9 Eka nikel jo-Lawi e dho Hemb Romo michok oganda duto mar Israel kanyakla. 
Numbers8:10 Ka isekelo jo-Lawi e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, to inimi jo-Israel ket lwetgi e wigi." 
Numbers8:11 Bang’ mano Harun nochiw jo-Lawi e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye ka mich moyiedhi moa kuom jo-Israel, kendo nowalgi ni tich Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Numbers8:12 Jo-Lawi noket lwetgi e wi ruedhi kande. Rwath achiel notimgo misango mar golo richo, to machielo notimgo ni Ruoth Nyasaye misango miwang’o pep, mondo opwodhgo ni jo-Lawi richogi." 
Numbers8:13 Bang’e iniket jo-Lawi e nyim Harun gi yawuote kichiwogi ni Ruoth Nyasaye ka mich moyiedhi. 
Numbers8:14 Kamano iniwal jo-Lawi kuom dhout Israel mamoko, mi ginibed joga." 
Numbers8:15 “Ka isepwodho jo-Lawi kichiwogi ka mich moyiedhi kamano, to ginidonj e Hemb Romo mondo gitiye," 
Numbers8:16 nimar osewalgi chuth kuom jo-Israel duto. Asetimogi joga, ka akawogi kar nyithind Israel duto makayo," 
Numbers8:17 nikech nyathi moro amora ma dichwo mokwong nywol e Israel en mara, bed ni en nyathi dhano kata nyathi chiayo. Chieng’ mane anegoe nyithindo makayo e piny Misri, nawalo nyithindo makayo duto e piny Israel mondo obed maga," 
Numbers8:18 to koro asekawo jo-Lawi kargi. 
Numbers8:19 Aseketo jo-Lawi e lwet Harun gi yawuote, ka joma owal kuom jo-Israel mondo oti tich lemo ni jo-Israel e Hemb Romo kendo opwodhnigi richogi, mondo kik jo-Israel tho ka sudo machiegni gi Kama Ler.”" 
Numbers8:20 Musa gi Harun kaachiel gi jo-Israel duto nochopo chike duto mane Nyasaye omiyo Musa kuom tich walo jo-Lawi. 
Numbers8:21 Jo-Lawi nopwodhre kuom richogi, kendo olwoko lepgi eka Harun nochiwogi e nyim Nyasaye ka mich moyiedhi kendo mitimogo misango mipwodhogo richo mondo gibed maler." 
Numbers8:22 Bang’e ne gidonjo e Hemb Romo mondo giti tich lemo e nyim Harun gi yawuote, kamano Musa notimo ni jo-Lawi mana kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nochike." 
Numbers8:23 Ruoth Nyasaye nochako owacho ni Musa niya," 
Numbers8:24 “Chik moketi ni jo-Lawi ema: Ka ja-Lawi oseromo higni piero ariyo gabich, to nochak tich e Hemb Romo." 
Numbers8:25 To kosebedo jahigni piero abich, to nowe tich." 
Numbers8:26 Onyalo konyo jowadgi kuom tich Hema, to ok nobed kotiyo tich mapile. Mano e kaka inichan tich jo-Lawi.”" 
Numbers9:1 E due mokwongo mar higa mar ariyo kane jo-Israel osewuok e piny Misri, Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa e thim Sinai niya," 
Numbers9:2 “Jo-Israel nyaka tim Sap Pasaka e kinde moketne. 
Numbers9:3 Unutime godhiambo chieng due apar gang’wen mar dueni, kendo unutime pile e kinde moketneno, ka uluwo chikene duto.”" 
Numbers9:4 Kuom mano Musa nochiko jo-Israel mondo otim Pasaka," 
Numbers9:5 kendo ne gitime godhiamb chieng’ due apar gang’wen mar due mokwongo, e thim Sinai, ka giluwo chike mane Ruoth Nyasaye omiyo Musa." 
Numbers9:6 To noyudo jomoko odoko mogak, nikech ne gisemulo ng’at motho, omiyo ne ok ginyal timo Pasaka chieng’ moketi. Kuom mano ne gidhi ir Musa gi Harun chieng’ onogo," 
Numbers9:7 mi giwacho niya, “Wagak, nikech wasemulo ng’at motho. To koro mano dimonwa kelo ni Ruoth Nyasaye chiwowa chieng’ moketi, kaachiel gi jo-Israel mamoko koso?”" 
Numbers9:8 Musa nodwokogi niya, “Rituru mondi nyaka chop ang’e gima Ruoth Nyasaye biro wacho kuomu.”" 
Numbers9:9 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa ni mondo onyis jo-Isarel niya," 
Numbers9:10 “Ka ng’ato kuomu, kata kuom nyikwau, odoko mogak kuom mulo ng’at motho, kata ka en e wuoth kuma bor, to nyaka pod enotim atima ni Ruoth Nyasaye Sap Pasaka," 
Numbers9:11 kar timogo e due mokwongo, to ng’at ma kamano notime e due mar ariyo, due apar gang’wen, godhiambo. Chiayo mitimogo Pasakano nyaka cham gi makati ma ok ketie thowi, kod alot makech." 
Numbers9:12 Kik lembe moro dong’ nyaka okinyi, kendo kik tur choke kata achiel. Pasaka nyaka tim mana kaka chik dwaro." 
Numbers9:13 Ka nga’to odagi timo pasaka, to ok ogak, kata ok odhi e wuoth kuma bor, to nyaka ng’ad kare oko kuom ogandagi, nikech ok osekelo ni Ruoth Nyasaye chiwo e kinde moketi. Ng’at ma kamano noyud kum kuom kethone." 
Numbers9:14 “Ka japiny moro odak kuomu, to en bende nyaka otim ni Ruoth Nyasaye Sap Pasaka, koluwo chike moketi duto. Chik achielno omako jadak gi ja-Israel machalre.”" 
Numbers9:15 Chieng’ mane giguroe Hema Maler, ma en Hemb Rapar, bor polo ne oime, to godhiambo ler machal gi mach nothinyore e wiye, mosiko kanyo nyaka okinyi." 
Numbers9:16 Kamano bor polo noime godiechieng’, to gotieno ne nitie ler machal gi mach." 
Numbers9:17 E kinde akinda mane bor polo oa ewi Hema Maler, jo-Israel ne pudho hembegi kendo ne gichak gigurogi kamoro amora ma bor polo ochung’ie." 
Numbers9:18 Ne gichako wuoth mana ka Ruoth Nyasaye ochikogi, kendo ne giguro hembegi mana ka Ruoth Nyasaye ochikogi, mi gibed kanyo kuom kinde duto mane bor polo ni ewi Hema Maler." 
Numbers9:19 Kane bor polo obet aming’a ewi Hema Maler, to jo-Israel nosiko ka lemo alema e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo ne ok gidhi nyime gi wuoth." 
Numbers9:20 Kamano bende kane bor polo obet ewi Hema Maler mana kuom ndalo manok, to ne giguro hembegi kendo gimukogi mana kaka Ruoth Nyasaye ochikogi." 
Numbers9:21 Bende ne nitie kinde moko mane bor polo bet ewi Hema Maler chakre odhiambo nyaka okinyi kende, to oa gokinyino, kendo jo-Israel dhi nyime gi wuoth. Kane bor polo oa ewi Hema Maler, to ne gichako mana wuoth, bed ni en otieno kata odiechieng’." 
Numbers9:22 Kata bed ni ne obet ewi Hema Maler kuom ndalo achiel kata ndalo ariyo, kata kuom due kata higa, kata bed ni obudho marom nadi, to jo-Israel ne bet mana e kambi to ne gichako wuoth mana ka oa ewi Hema Maler." 
Numbers9:23 Ne giguro hembegi kendo gipudho mana ka Ruoth Nyasaye ochikogi. Kamano ne gilamo Ruoth Nyasaye kaluwore gi chik mane Ruoth Nyasaye omiyo Musa. 
Numbers10:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa niya," 
Numbers10:2 “Thedh tunge ariyo mag fedha mondo igo kiluongo jo-Israel, kendo kigoyogo milome mondo kambi odar." 
Numbers10:3 Ka ogo tunge ariyogo duto, to ji duto nobi iri e dho Hemb Romo." 
Numbers10:4 To ka tung’ achiel kende ema oywak to jodongo ma jotend dhout Israel kende ema nobi. 
Numbers10:5 Ka tung’ oywak moriwore gi sigiya, to joma ojot yo wuokchieng’ nochak wuoth," 
Numbers10:6 kendo ka tung’ mar ariyo oywak moriwore gi sigiya, to joma ojot yo milambo nochak wuoth. Kamano ka idwaro mondo kambi odar, to tung’ nyaka ywagi moriwore gi sigiya," 
Numbers10:7 to ka ichoko ji, to tung’ nyaka ywagi maonge sigiya." 
Numbers10:8 Jodolo ma joka Harun ema omi tich goyo tung’. Mano en chik momakou gi nyikwau nyaka chieng’. 
Numbers10:9 “Ka ukedo gi wasigu momonjou e pinyu, kendo dwaro loyou, to unugo tunge moriwore gi sigiya, mi Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu noparu, kendo noresu kuomgi." 
Numbers10:10 E kinde ma utimoe nyasi, gi ndalo moketi mutimoe sewni, kod chieng’ mokwongo mar due ka due, unugo tung’ kutimo misengni miwang’o pep, kod misengni mag sawo, mi tungego nomi Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu paru. An e Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu.”" 
Numbers10:11 Due piero ariyo, due mar ariyo, e higa mar ariyo, bor polo nowuok oa ewi Hemb Rapar." 
Numbers10:12 Eka jo-Israel nochako wuoth mosmos ka gia e thim Sinai, nyaka bor polo nodhi mochung’ ewi got Paran." 
Numbers10:13 Kane gikwongo muko kambi, kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nomiyo Musa ochikogi," 
Numbers10:14 kambi jo-Juda ema nokwongo wuok e bwo bandechgi ka gichanore e ogendgi mag lweny. Kambino noting’o jo-Juda ma jatendgi ne Nashon wuod Aminadab," 
Numbers10:15 gi jo-Isakar, ma jatendgi ne Nethaneel wuod Zuar," 
Numbers10:16 kod jo-Zubulun, ma jatendgi ne Eliab wuod Helon." 
Numbers10:17 Kane Hema Maler omuki, joka Gershon gi joka Merari nowuok koting’e." 
Numbers10:18 Kambi jo-Reuben ema nowuok mar ariyo, kochanore e bwo bandechgi, e ogendgi mag lweny. Kambino noting’o jo-Reuben, ma jatendgi ne Elizur wuod Shedeur," 
Numbers10:19 gi jo-Simeon, ma jatendgi ne Shelumiel wuod Zurushadai," 
Numbers10:20 kod jo-Gad, ma jatendgi ne Eliasaf wuod Reuel." 
Numbers10:21 Joka Kohath ma joting’ gik maler ema nowuok bang’ jogo, to kane gichopo kama onego gurie kambi, ne giyudo ka osegur Hema Maler." 
Numbers10:22 Kambi jo-Efraim ema nowuok mar adek, kowuok e bwo bandechgi, e ogendni mag lweny. Kambino noting’o jo-Efraim, ma jatendgi ne Elishama wuod Amihud," 
Numbers10:23 gi jo-Manase, ma jatendgi ne Gamaliel wuod Pedazur," 
Numbers10:24 kod jo-Benjamin ma jatendgi ne Abidan wuod Gideoni. 
Numbers10:25 Kambi jo-Dan ema nowuok mogik bang’ kambi mamokogo, kochanore e bwo bandechgi, e ogendgi mag lweny. Kambino noting’o jo-Dan, ma jatendgi ne Ahiezer wuod Amishadai," 
Numbers10:26 gi jo-Asher, ma jatendgi ne Pagiel wuod Okran," 
Numbers10:27 kod jo-Naftali, ma jatendgi ne Ahira wuod Enan." 
Numbers10:28 Kamano e kaka jo-Israel nochanore ka gichako wuoth, kendo ne giwuotho ka gichanore kamano." 
Numbers10:29 Musa nowacho ni Hobab wuod Reuel ja-Midian ma ore niya, “Koro wawuok wadhi e piny ma Ruoth Nyasaye osewacho ni nomiwa. Yie wadhi kodi, kendo wabiro timoni maber, nimar Ruoth Nyasaye osesingore ni obiro guedhowa.”" 
Numbers10:30 To Hobab nodwoke niya, “Ok adhi kodu, ber mondo adog e pinywa kuom jowa.”" 
Numbers10:31 To Musa nowachone niya, “Ahombi kik iwewa, nimar in ema ing’eyo kama onego wabworie e thim, kendo in ema inibed ng’at motelonwa." 
Numbers10:32 Ka inyalo dhi kodwa, to gima Ruoth Nyasaye ogwedhowago wanapog kodi.”" 
Numbers10:33 Ne giwuok ka gia e god Ruoth Nyasaye, mi giwuotho kuom ndalo adek, ka Sandug Muma mar Ruoth Nyasaye otelo nyimgi mabor ma dirom wuodh odiechieng’ achiel, mondo omanynigi kama ginyalo bworoe." 
Numbers10:34 Bor polo mar Ruoth Nyasaye ne ochung’ e wigi godiechieng’ ka gin e wuoth. 
Numbers10:35 Pile kane Sanduk chako wuoth, Musa ne wacho niya, “A Ruoth Nyasaye, a malo, mondo wasiki oke, kendo joma mon kodi oringi!”" 
Numbers10:36 To pile kane Sanduk chung’, to Musa ne wacho niya, “Yue, A Ruoth Nyasaye, Nyasach jo-Israel gana gi gana.”" 
Numbers11:1 E kinde moro jo-Israel noywak ni Ruoth Nyasaye kuom thagruokgi. Ruoth Nyasaye ne okecho kowinjo wechegigo, mi mach moa kuome nomuoch kuomgi, kendo oketho bath kambi konchiel." 
Numbers11:2 Eka jo-Israel noywak ni Musa, mi Musa nokwayonigi Ruoth Nyasaye mi mach otho." 
Numbers11:3 Ne ochak kanyo ni Tabera, (tiende ni, kar weng’o) nikech mach moa kuom Ruoth Nyasaye nomuoch kuomgi kanyo." 
Numbers11:4 Ne nitie joma yoreyore moa e ogendini mopogore opogore, mane wuotho gi jo-Israel. Chuny jogo nochako gombo gik mopogore opogore. Jo-Israel bende nochako ywak, kapenjo ni “Onge ng’at ma dimiwae ring’o ngang’?" 
Numbers11:5 Parieuru rech mane wachamo nono e piny Misri, gi budho gi poipoi gi kitungu kod alode mamit." 
Numbers11:6 Dwondwa tinde otwo, kendo onge gimoro amora ma wanyalo neno mak mana Manna.”" 
Numbers11:7 (Manna ne chalo gi kodhi matindotindo, ma kitgi chal gi dwogo." 
Numbers11:8 Ji ne kwanyogi kendo regogi e pong’ lwedo, kata yokogi e pany, eka ne gitedogi e agulu, kendo gilosogo kek. Ka ichame, to ndhathe chalo gi ndhath kek moted gi mo." 
Numbers11:9 Kane tho omoko gotieno, to manna bende ne lwar.)" 
Numbers11:10 Musa nowinjo ka jo-Israel ywak, ka joot ka joot ochung’ e dho hembgi. Mano omiyo mirima mager nomako Ruoth Nyasaye, mi chuny Musa nochandore." 
Numbers11:11 Nopenjo Ruoth Nyasaye niya, “Ang’o momiyo isekelo chandruok kuom jatichni? Ere ketho ma aseketho e nyimi momiyo iketo kuoma ting’ mapek mar rito jogi duto?" 
Numbers11:12 An e min-gi mane onywologi? Koso ka gidhi e piny mane isingori ni nimi kweregi, to nyaka ating’gi mana e kora kaka japidi ting’o nyathi?" 
Numbers11:13 Ere kuma anyalo yudonigie ring’o giduto? Gichando chunya ka giywakna ni mondo amigi ring’o gicham. 
Numbers11:14 Ting’ mar rito jogi duto ohinga. Ok anyal ting’e kenda. 
Numbers11:15 Omiyo ka mano e tich ma imiya, to kara ber mondo inega chuth. To kapo ni ikecha, to yie iwe miya thagruok makama.”" 
Numbers11:16 Ruoth Nyasaye nodwoko Musa niya, “Chok jodong Israel piero abiriyo ma ing’eyo ni jotend oganda. Kelgi e nyima e Hemb Romo kendo gichung’ kodi kanyo." 
Numbers11:17 Abiro lor mondo awuo kodi, kendo abiro kawo kuomi teko moko mane amiyi, mondo ami jogo okonyi rito oganda, mi ting’no ok noturi." 
Numbers11:18 To nyis jo-Israel duto kama: ‘Pwodhreuru nikech kiny unucham ring’o. Ne uywakna ka upenjo ni, “Ere ng’ama nyalo miyowa ring’o?” Kendo kuwacho ni, “E piny Misri ne wadakie maber.” Koro Ruoth Nyasaye biro miyou ring’o, kendo ubiro chamo!" 
Numbers11:19 To ok nuchame kuom ndalo achiel kata kuom ndalo ariyo kata abich kata apar kata mana ndalo piero ariyo," 
Numbers11:20 to unuchame kuom due ngima, nyaka chop othing’u, mi ung’ogi, nikech usedagi Ruoth Nyasaye modak e kindu, kendo useywakne kuwacho niya, “Ang’o momiyo ne wawuok e piny Misri?” ’ ”" 
Numbers11:21 Musa nodwoko Ruoth Nyasaye niya, “An gi jolweny alufu mia auchiel, to in iwacho ni ibiro miyogi ring’o ma gichamo kuom due achiel ngima!" 
Numbers11:22 Ere kaka rombe gi ruedhi diyang’ mi romgi? Kata mana ka omak rech duto mae nam, to mago bende ok diromgi!”" 
Numbers11:23 Eka Ruoth Nyasaye nopenjo Musa niya, “Bende nitie gimoro manyalo tamo Ruoth Nyasaye? Kawuono ibiro ng’eyo ka wechena gin adier, kata ka ok gin adier.”" 
Numbers11:24 Musa nowuok oko, monyiso ji gima ne Ruoth Nyasaye owacho. Nochoko jodong oganda piero abiriyo, mi oketo e alwora mar Hema." 
Numbers11:25 Eka Ruoth Nyasaye nolor e bor polo mowuoyo kode, kendo okawo kuome teko moko mane osemiye, mi omiyo jodongo piero abiriyogo, kendo kane Roho osedonjo kuomgi ne gidhumore. To bang’ mano ne ok gidhumore kendo." 
Numbers11:26 To ji ariyo ma nyinggi Eldad kol Medad, mane osekwan kaachiel gi jodongo piero abiriyoka nodong’ chien e kambi. To kata obedo ni gin ne ok gidhi e Hema kamano, Roho nobiro kuomgi, mi gidhumore e kambi." 
Numbers11:27 Wuowi moro noringo, odhi ir Musa, monyise ni Eldad kod Medad jodhumore e kambi." 
Numbers11:28 Eka Joshua wuod Nun, mane oyudo osetiyo ni Musa chakre tinne, nowacho niya, “Jaduong’ Musa, kwergi.” To Musa nodwoke niya, “Iywaga ni gimaya duong’ koso?" 
Numbers11:28 Eka Joshua wuod Nun, mane oyudo osetiyo ni Musa chakre tinne, nowacho niya, “Jaduong’ Musa, kwergi.” To Musa nodwoke niya, “Iywaga ni gimaya duong’ koso?" 
Numbers11:29 Mad jo-Ruoth Nyasaye duto dok jonabi, kendo Ruoth Nyasaye migi teko mar Roho!”" 
Numbers11:30 Bang’ mano Musa gi jodong Israel nodok e kambi. 
Numbers11:31 Ruoth Nyasaye notugo yamo, mokelo aluru koa yo podho chieng’, kendo alurugo ne huyo gi piny maromo mita achiel koa e lowo, e bath kambi koni gi koni, kuma bor ma dirom wuodh ndalo achiel koa e kambi." 
Numbers11:32 Ji nomako alurugo odiechieng’no gi otieno kod kinyne duto, ma kata ng’at mane omakoe manok moloyo ne oyudo depe piero ariyo. Ne gimoyogi e kambi duto mondo gitwo." 
Numbers11:33 To Ruoth Nyasaye nokecho kodgi, mi ogoyogi gi tho marach mana ka koro eka gichako kayo ring alurugo kendo pok gimwonyo." 
Numbers11:34 Ne ochak kanyo ni Kibroth-hataava, (tiende ni liete joma jowuoro), nikech kanyono ema ne giyikoe joma ne wuoch ring’o omako." 
Numbers11:35 Jo-Israel noa Kibroth-hataava modhi Hazeroth, kendo kane gin kuno" 
Numbers12:1 Miriam gi Harun ne jochako kuodho Musa nikech nyar Kush mane okendo. 
Numbers12:2 Ne giwacho niya, “Musa kende ema Ruoth Nyasaye osewuoyogo koso? Wan donge osewuoyo kodwa?”" 
Numbers12:3 (To ka iwacho adier, Musa ne en ng’at mamuol ahinya moloyo ji duto manie piny.) Ruoth Nyasaye nowinjo kaka jogo kuodhe," 
Numbers12:4 mi nopoyo Musa gi Harun kod Miriam gi wach niya, “Wuoguru, un ji adek, udhi e Hemb Romo.” Kamano ji adekgo nowuok modhi," 
Numbers12:5 eka Ruoth Nyasaye nolor e siro mar bor polo. Nochung’ e dho Hema, mi oluongo Harun gi Miriam," 
Numbers12:6 kendo kane gibiro e nyime, nowachonigi niya, “Winjuru wechena: Ka de ni Musa en mana janabiu, to dafwenyorane, kendo dawuoyo kode e lek." 
Numbers12:7 To jatichna Musa ok en janabi ma kamano en kende e jaadiera kuom joga duto. 
Numbers12:8 En awuoyo kode wang’ gi wang’, kende mana moyangore ma onge ngero. Enone kit Ruoth Nyasaye. Ere kaka uhedhoru kuodho jatichna Musa?”" 
Numbers12:9 Mirima nomako Ruoth Nyasaye kodgi mi oa," 
Numbers12:10 kendo kane bor polo oa e Hema kamano, dhoho nomako dend Miriam, molokore marachar ka pe. Kane Harun olokore monene," 
Numbers12:11 nokwayo Musa niya, “Jaduong’, lamnwa! Kik iwe wachul gop richo, kata obedo ni wasetimo gima ofuwo kendo marach kamano." 
Numbers12:12 Kik iwe Miriam chal gi nyathi monywol kosetho, ma bath dende konchiel gimoro ochamo.”" 
Numbers12:13 Omiyo Musa noywak niya, “A Ruoth Nyasaye, gima kama kik timre. Akwayi ni yie ichange.”" 
Numbers12:14 Ruoth Nyasaye nodwok niya, “Ka da bed ni wuon mare ema ong’udho olawo e wang’e, donge da obedo gi wichkuot kuom ndalo abiriyo? Kuom mano keteuru kar kende oko mar kambi kuom ndalo abiriyo, eka mondo oduoge.”" 
Numbers12:15 Kamano noket Miriam oko mar kambi kuom ndalo abiriyo kendo kambi ne ok odar nyaka oduogo. 
Numbers12:16 Bang’ mano ne gia Hazeroth, mi gidhi giguro kambi e thim Paran." 
Numbers13:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa niya," 
Numbers13:2 “Or joote mondo odhi ocheng piny Kanaan ma abiro miyo jo-Israel. Jootego nyaka bed jotelo, ma ng’ato ka ng’ato ochung’ ni dhoot ka dhoot.”" 
Numbers13:3 Omiyo Musa noorogi kapod gin e thim Paran, mana kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nochike. Giduto ne gin jotend jo-Israel," 
Numbers13:4 kendo magi e nyinggi: E dhood jo-Reuben, ne en Shamua wuod Zakur;" 
Numbers13:5 E dhood jo-Simeon, ne en Shafat wuod Hori;" 
Numbers13:6 E dhood jo-Juda, ne en Kaleb wuod Jefune;" 
Numbers13:7 E dhood jo-Isakar, ne en Igal wuod Josef;" 
Numbers13:8 E dhood jo-Efraim, ne en Hoshea wuod Nun;" 
Numbers13:9 E dhood jo-Benjamin, ne en Palti wuod Rafu;" 
Numbers13:10 E dhood jo-Zebulun, ne en Gadiel wuod Sodi;" 
Numbers13:11 E dhood jo-Josef, tiende ni dhood jo-Manase, ne en Gadi wuod Susi;" 
Numbers13:12 E dhood jo-Dan, ne en Amiel wuod Gemali;" 
Numbers13:13 E dhood jo-Asher, ne en Sethur wuod Mikael;" 
Numbers13:14 E dhood jo-Naftali, ne en Nabi wuod Vosfi;" 
Numbers13:15 E dhood jo-Gad, ne en Geuel wuod Maki." 
Numbers13:16 Mago e nying joma Musa nooro mondo odhi ocheng piny Kanaan, to Hoshea wuod Nun to nochako ni Joshua." 
Numbers13:16 Mago e nying joma Musa nooro mondo odhi ocheng piny Kanaan, to Hoshea wuod Nun to nochako ni Joshua." 
Numbers13:17 Kane Musa dwaro orogi mondo gidhi gicheng pinyno, nowachonigi niya, “Chikuru yo milambo mar pinyno, bang’e uidh e piny gode." 
Numbers13:18 Chenguru kaka pinyno chalo, kendo ka ji modak kuno rateke kata nyap, bende kata ka ginok kata ging’eny" 
Numbers13:19 Ranguru ane ka kit piny ma gidakieno ber kata rach, kendo kata ka mier ma gidakie ochiel motegno kata mayomyom," 
Numbers13:20 bende kata ka pinyno omew kata otwo kata ka yien nitie kata onge. Dhiuru gi chir, kendo ukel olemb pinyno moko.” Noyudo ka en ndalo ma mzabibu nyakie." 
Numbers13:21 Kamano ne gidhi mi gichengo pinyno chakre thim Zin nyaka Rehob man but kama idonjogo Hamath. 
Numbers13:22 Ne giidho ka ging’ado piny milambo, mi gichopo Hebron, kuma ne Ahiman gi Sheshai kod Talmai ma nyikwa Anak odakie. (Hebron noger higni abiriyo kapok oger Zoan man e piny Misri.)" 
Numbers13:23 Bang’e ne gichopo e holo mar Eshkol, (tiende ni, saga mar mzabibu,) mi ging’ado bad mzabibu monyago saga achiel, kendo ji ariyo noting’e koliero e luth. Bende ne gipono olemb komamanga, kod ng’owo." 
Numbers13:24 Ne ochak kanyo ni holo mar Eshkol, nikech kanyo ema jo-Israel nong’adoe saga mar mzabibu." 
Numbers13:25 Bang’ ndalo piero ang’wen ne gidwogo Kadesh e thim Paran, ka gia chengo pinyno," 
Numbers13:26 mi gibiro ir Musa gi Harun kod oganda jo-Israel duto. Ne gipimonigi wach, kendo ne ginyisogi olembe mag pinyno." 
Numbers13:27 To ne giwacho ni Musa niya, “Ne wadhi mwawuotho e piny mane iorowa," 
Numbers13:28 mi wanwang’o ni en piny maber kendo momew, kendo magi e olembe manyak kuno. To jopinyno rateke, kendo miechgi ochiel motegno malich, kendo ne waneno nyikwa Anak kuno," 
Numbers13:29 gi jo-Amalek modak e piny milambo, gi jo-Hiti gi jo-Jebus kod jo-Amor modak e piny gode, kod jo-Kanaan modak e dho nam, kendo e bath aora Jordan.”" 
Numbers13:30 To Kaleb nokwayo ji e nyim Musa mondo oling’, kowacho niya, “Wadhiuru piyopiyo mondo wakaw pinyno, nikech wan gi teko mwanyalo kawego.”" 
Numbers13:31 To joma noyudo osedhi kode kuno nowacho niya, “Ooyo, ok wanyal monjo jogo, nikech gitek moloyowa.”" 
Numbers13:32 Kuom mano weche mane giwacho ni jo-Israel kuom piny mane gia chengono nonyoso chuny ji, nikech ne giwacho niya, “Piny ma nyocha wadhi chengono en piny manyalo mwonyo ng’ato ang’ata modhi dakie. Bende ji duto ma waneno kuno gin joma rabede." 
Numbers13:33 Kane wagoyo wang’wa kuom jo-Nefili, to ne waneno ka wachalo mana dede, bende mano e kaka ne wachalonigi.” (Jo-Anak gin nyikwa Nefili.)" 
Numbers14:1 Kane giwinjo weche jogo, oganda jo-Isarel duto noywak matek otienono duto, ka chunygi lit." 
Numbers14:2 Giduto ne ging’ur ni Musa gi Harun, ka giwacho niya, “Mad ne watho e piny Misri, kata e thimni!" 
Numbers14:3 Ere gima omiyo Ruoth Nyasaye okelowa e pinyni mondo watho e lweny, kendo omak mondwa gi nyithindwa? Donge diber ka wadok Misri?”" 
Numbers14:4 Eka ne gimedo wacho niya, “Wayier ng’ato mondo odwokwa Misri.”" 
Numbers14:5 Musa gi Harun ne jopodho piny mana e nyim oganda jo-Israel," 
Numbers14:6 to Joshua wuod Nun kod Kaleb wuod Jefune, mane gin ji ariyo kuom joma nochengo piny Kanaan, noyiecho lepgi," 
Numbers14:6 to Joshua wuod Nun kod Kaleb wuod Jefune, mane gin ji ariyo kuom joma nochengo piny Kanaan, noyiecho lepgi," 
Numbers14:7 mi owacho ni oganda duto niya, “Piny mane wadonjoe kendo wachengono en piny maber sidang’." 
Numbers14:8 Ka Ruoth Nyasaye mor kodwa, to obiro terowa e piny maber kendo momewno, mi omiwago." 
Numbers14:9 To kik uwe Ruoth Nyasaye, bende kik uluor jopinyno, nimar wabiro mwonyogi amwonya. Tipo ma nyocha ogeng’ogi osea, to wan, Ruoth Nyasaye ni kodwa, omiyo kik uluorgi.”" 
Numbers14:10 To kar dwokogi, oganda jo-Israel nobwogogi mana ni goyogi mana gi kite, to sano duong’ mar Ruoth Nyasaye nothinyorenigi duto e Hemb Romo." 
Numbers14:11 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa niya, “Jogi biro chaya kamano nyaka karang’o? Pod gibiro tamore gena marom nadi, to eka asetimonigi ranyisi mang’eny?" 
Numbers14:12 Abiro goyogi gi tuo, bende ok abi kwanogi ka joga. To in gi nyikwayi natimu oganda maduong’ kendo mang’eny moloyogi.”" 
Numbers14:13 To Musa nodwoko Ruoth Nyasaye niya, “A Ruoth Nyasaye, jo-Misri ong’eyo ni in ema nigolo jo-Israel kuomgi gi tekoni iwuon," 
Numbers14:14 kendo gibiro nyiso jo-Kanaan kamano. Gin bende koro gisewinjo ni idak e dier jogi, kendo ni gineni wang’ gi wang’. Ging’’eyo bende ni bor polo mari ochung’ ewi jo-Israel, ka itelonigi e siro mar bor polo godiechieng’, to gotieno itelonigi e siro mar mach." 
Numbers14:15 Kuom mano, ka inego jogi duto rat, to ogendini mosewinjo humbi biro wacho niya," 
Numbers14:16 ‘Ruoth Nyasaye osetieko jogi e thim, nikech kelogi e piny mane osingorenigi otame.’" 
Numbers14:17 “Omiyo ma e sa monego inyisie tekoni machal gi weche mane iwacho niya," 
Numbers14:18 ‘Ruoth Nyasaye ok kech piyo, kendo onyiso herane mosiko, koweyo ni ji kethogi gi richogi, to kata kamano ok okwan jaketho ka ng’ama ler, to okumo nyithindo nyaka tieng’ mar adek kod mar ang’wen nikech richo kweregi.’" 
Numbers14:19 Omiyo kaka ng’wononi thoth, we ni jogi richogi, mana kaka isetimo, chakre Misri nyaka koroni.”" 
Numbers14:20 Ruoth Nyasaye nodwoko Musa niya, “Koro asewuoyonigi kaka ikwaya." 
Numbers14:21 To kaka antie, kendo kaka duong’na nopong’ piny duto," 
Numbers14:22 akuong’ora ni onge kata mana ng’at achiel kuom joma oseneno duong’na kod honni mane atimo e piny Misri kendo e thim 
Numbers14:23 ma none piny mane asingora ni nami kweregi. Gisetema kendo gisetamore winja nyadipar, omiyo onge kata ng’at achiel kuom joma nochayago ma none pinyno." 
Numbers14:24 To jatichna Kaleb ema osebedo gi chuny maber, nimar oseluwa gi chunye duto. Kuom mano abiro kele e piny mane osedhiye, mi nyikwaye nokaw. En piny pap, ma jo-Amalek kod jo-Kanaan odakie." 
Numbers14:25 Kuom mano, kiny nyaka uwichru, mi udogi e thim, kuluwo yo ma ochomo Nam Makwar.”" 
Numbers14:26 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa gi Harun niya," 
Numbers14:27 “Asewinjo ka jo-Israel ng’urna. Anyalo ng’wono ni oganda marachni nyaka karang’o? 
Numbers14:28 Wachnigi ni awacho kakuong’ora ni, Kaka antie, abiro chopo mana weche ma asewinjo kuwacho." 
Numbers14:29 Ng’ato ka ng’ato ma nyinge nondiki e kweno cha, chakre jahigni piero ariyo kadhi nyime, chokene biro dong’ e thimni, nikech useng’urna." 
Numbers14:30 Onge ng’ato kuomu ma nodonj e piny mane akuong’ora kating’o bada ni nobed maru, to mak mana Kaleb wuod Jefune gi Joshua wuod Nun." 
Numbers14:30 Onge ng’ato kuomu ma nodonj e piny mane akuong’ora kating’o bada ni nobed maru, to mak mana Kaleb wuod Jefune gi Joshua wuod Nun." 
Numbers14:31 To nyikwau mane uwacho ni nobed joma omak e lweny ema abiro kelo e piny ma usedagino, mi ginidagie maber." 
Numbers14:32 To un uduto, chokeu nodong’ e thim." 
Numbers14:33 Nyithindu biro digni e thim kuom higni piero ang’wen, nyaka ng’atu mogik tho kuno, ka gichulogo richo mane utimo kuom weya." 
Numbers14:34 Ne ubet ka urango pinyno kuom ndalo piero ang’wen omiyo unuchul richou kuom higni piero ang’wen, ka higa achiel ikwano kar ndalo achiel, mi unung’e kaka ajok kodu." 
Numbers14:35 An Ruoth Nyasaye, asewuoyo, kendo abiro timo ni oganda marach moseriworenani gima asewachono. Gibiro rumo mana e thimni! Adier, ka ema gibiro thoe!”" 
Numbers14:36 Joma Musa nooro mondo ocheng piny, kendo mane oduogo mi omiyo oganda duto ochako ng’urne," 
Numbers14:37 tho nonego e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye nikech ne gikelo wach marach. 
Numbers14:38 To Joshua wuod Nun gi Kaleb wuod Jefune kende ema nokwo kuom joma nodhi chengo pinyno. 
Numbers14:38 To Joshua wuod Nun gi Kaleb wuod Jefune kende ema nokwo kuom joma nodhi chengo pinyno. 
Numbers14:39 Kane Musa onyiso jo-Israel gima Ruoth Nyasaye owacho, ne gimuoch gi ywak." 
Numbers14:40 To kinyne ne giwuok kogwen, mi gidhi ewi gode mag piny moting’ore, ka giwacho niya, “Wayie ni wasebedo joketho, omiyo koro wan e yo, wadhi kuma Ruoth Nyasaye owacho.”" 
Numbers14:41 To Musa nodwokogi niya, “Marang’o umedo ketho chik Ruoth Nyasaye? Tim makamano ok nyal kelo gima ber," 
Numbers14:42 Kik umed dhi nyime gi wuoth, nimar Ruoth Nyasaye ok nobed kodu, kendo wasiku biro loyou." 
Numbers14:43 Jo-Amalek gi jo-Kanaan nie nyimu, kendo gibiro negou. Ruoth Nyasaye ok nyal bedo kodu, nikech useweyo luwe.”" 
Numbers14:44 Kata kamano pod ne gihedhore ahedha idho gode mag piny moting’oreno, to Sandug Muma, kata mana Musa, ne ok owuok kodgi e kambi." 
Numbers14:45 Jo Amalek gi jo-Kanaan ma nodak e godego nomwomore kuomgi, moriembogi ka rodhogi nyaka Horma." 
Numbers15:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa 
Numbers15:2 mondo onyis jo-Israel niya, “Ka usedonjo e piny ma abiro miyou mondo udagie," 
Numbers15:3 to unutim ni Ruoth Nyasaye misengni miwang’o. Ginyalo bedo misengni miwang’o pep, kata misengni michopogo kuong’ruok, kata ma ng’ato timo kuom herone, kata mitimo e ndalo mag sewni moketi. Ka uwang’o ni Ruoth Nyasaye jambu ka misango ma dum tik mamit kamano," 
Numbers15:4 to ng’at machiwo misangono nyaka chiw bende misango mar cham mar mogo moromo kilo adek moruw gi mo lita ariyo. 
Numbers15:5 Bende nyaka uchiw lita ariyo mar divai obed misango miolo piny kuom nyarombo ka nyarombo mutimogo misango miwang’o pep, kata misango mar sawo." 
Numbers15:6 “Ka chiayo mitimogo misangono en im, to mogo mitimogo misango mar cham nyaka bed kilo apar gang’wen moruw gi mo moromo lita adek," 
Numbers15:7 kendo divai mitimogo misango miolo piny nyaka bed moromo lita adek. Kamano e kaka unutim ni Ruoth Nyasaye misango madum tik mamit. 
Numbers15:8 “To ka nyarwath ema utimogo ni Ruoth Nyasaye misango miwang’o pep, kata misango michopogo kuong’ruok, kata misango mar sawo," 
Numbers15:9 to nyaka uchiw bende mogo moromo kilo apar moruw gi mo moromo lita ang’wen, mondo otimgo misango mar cham," 
Numbers15:10 kod divai moromo lita ang’wen mondo otimgo misango miolo piny. Gigo duto nobed misango miwang’o mondo odum tik mamit ni Ruoth Nyasaye. 
Numbers15:11 Mano e gima nyaka utim ni rwath ka rwath, kata ni im ka im, kata ni nyarombo ka nyarombo." 
Numbers15:12 Kata bed ni utimo misengni gi jamni adi, to chiayo ka chiayo nyaka timne kamano." 
Numbers15:13 Ng’ato ka ng’ato ma ja-Israel nyaka rit chikego ka otimo misango miwang’o mondo odum tik mamit ni Ruoth Nyasaye. 
Numbers15:14 “Ka japiny moro man kuomu, kata modak kodu chuth, otimo misango miwang’o mondo odum tik mamit ni Ruoth Nyasaye, to nyaka otim mana kaka utimo." 
Numbers15:15 En mana chik achiel ma omakou kaachiel gi japiny moro modak kuomu, kendo omako nyikwau nyaka chieng’. Un gi jodak uchalru e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Numbers15:16 Chik achielno ema omakou machalre gi japiny moro modak kuomu.” 
Numbers15:17 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa 
Numbers15:18 mondo onyis jo-Israel niya," 
Numbers15:19 “Ka usedonjo e piny ma abiro teroue, mi uchamo chiemb pinyno, to nyaka uchiw ni Ruoth Nyasaye mich moyiedhi." 
Numbers15:20 Ka utedo makati gi mok cham mukwongo kayo, to nyaka uket makati achiel tenge, obed mich moyiedhi, mana kaka uketo tenge cham mukwongo dino." 
Numbers15:21 Nyaka uchiw ni Ruoth Nyasaye mich moyiedhi mugolo kuom makati mukuongo tedo. Mano en chik momakou gi nyikwau nyaka chieng’. 
Numbers15:22 “Ka uketho ka ukia, mi uweyo chik moro amora kuom chike mane Ruoth Nyasaye omiyo Musa," 
Numbers15:23 ma gin chike duto momakou gi nyikwau nyaka chieng’, kendo mane Ruoth Nyasaye omiyou gi lwet Musa chakre chieng’ mokwongo," 
Numbers15:24 to ma e gima nyaka utim. Ka oganda duto ema oketho ka kia kamano, to nyaka gichiw nyarwath mondo gitimgo misango miwang’o pep mondo odum mamit ni Ruoth Nyasaye, kaachiel gi misango mar cham kaachiel gi miolo piny mitimego kaka chik dwaro. Bende nyaka gichiw nywok mondo gitimgo misango mar golo richo." 
Numbers15:25 Eka jadolo nopwodh oganda duto mar Israel, mi nowenigi richogi, nikech ne giketho mana ka gikia, kendo gisetimo ni Ruoth Nyasaye misango miwang’o. Bende gisetimo misango mar golo richo e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye kuom ketho mane giketho ka gikia." 
Numbers15:26 Kuom mano oganda jo-Israel duto, kaachiel gi jopinje mamoko modak kuomu nowenigi kethogi, nimar oganda duto ema noketho." 
Numbers15:27 “To ka ng’at achiel kende ema oketho ka kia, to nyaka ochiw diel swini ma hike achiel, mondo otimgo misango mar golo richo," 
Numbers15:28 kendo jadolo nopwodh ni ng’atno kethone e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, mi nowene." 
Numbers15:29 En chik achiel kende momako ng’at ma oketho ka ok ong’eyo, bed ni en japiny kata jadak." 
Numbers15:30 To ng’ato ang’ata ma oketho goyiem oyanyo Ruoth Nyasaye, bed ni en ja-Israel kata japiny moro modak kuomu. Nyaka ng’ad kare oko kuom ogandagi," 
Numbers15:31 nimar osechayo wach Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo oseketho chikne. Ng’at ma kamano nyaka ng’ad kare oko chuth, kendo kethoneno nobed e wiye owuon.”" 
Numbers15:32 E kinde mane jo-Israel ni e thim, ne oyud ng’at moro ka modo yien chieng’ Sabato." 
Numbers15:33 Joma ne ojuke komoto, nokele e nyim Musa gi Harun kod oganda duto mar Israel." 
Numbers15:34 Ne gikete e od tuech nikech ne ok ging’eyo malong’o gima onego timne. 
Numbers15:35 Eka Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa niya, “Ng’atno nyaka negi. Oganda duto nyaka goye gi kite oko mar kambi.”" 
Numbers15:36 Kuom mano ne gigole oko, mi gigoye gi kite giduto nyaka otho, mana kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nochiko Musa." 
Numbers15:37 Ruoth Nyasaye nochako owacho ni Musa 
Numbers15:38 mondo onyis jo-Israel niya, “Un kaachiel gi nyikwau nyaka umin usi, mondo uket e riak lepu. Achiel kuom usi momin-go nyaka bed mambulu." 
Numbers15:39 Kamano e kinde duto ma unenoe usi mominno, to nupar chike duto mag Ruoth Nyasaye mi unumakgi, kendo ok unuluw yore maricho ma wengeu gi chunyu nyalo teroue." 
Numbers15:40 Usi mominno nobed ranyisi maparonu chikena duto mondo uritgi, kendo ubed joma ler, mowal ni Nyasachu." 
Numbers15:41 “An e Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu mane ogolou e piny Misri mondo obed Nyasachu. An e Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu.” 
Numbers16:1 Korah wuod Izhar ma wuod Kohath ma wuod Lawi, kod jo-Reuben ma Dathan gi Abiram yawuot Eliab, kod On wuod Peleth," 
Numbers16:2 ne jotamore bet e bwo Musa, kendo jo-Israel mia ariyo gi piero abich ma jotend oganda kendo ma joma ogen bende ne ni kodgi e wachno." 
Numbers16:3 Ne giriwore giduto ni Musa gi Harun, mi giwachonigi niya, “Marang’o uhedhoru moloyo, to ng’ato ka ng’ato kuom oganda jo-Israel owal ni Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo Ruoth Nyasaye ni kodgi giduto. Ere gima omiyo ukaworu moloyo jo Ruoth Nyasaye duto?”" 
Numbers16:4 Kane Musa owinjo kamano, nopodho piny auma." 
Numbers16:5 Bang’e nowacho ni Korah gi joge niya, “Kiny gokinyi Ruoth Nyasaye nohul ng’at ma ng’ate adier, kod ng’at mowalne, kendo monego timne misengni. Ng’at ma Ruoth Nyasaye oyiero ema notim misengni ni Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Numbers16:6 To in Korah, gima nyaka utim kaachiel gi jogi duto e ma: Kiny ukaw tepe ubani," 
Numbers16:7 uket mach e igi, mi uolie ubani e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye. Ng’at ma kiny Ruoth Nyasaye oyiero e ng’at mowalne. Un ema uhedhoru moloyo, un jo-Lawi!”" 
Numbers16:8 Musa nochako owacho ni Korah niya, “Winjuru un jo-Lawi." 
Numbers16:9 Donge en gima ber ka Ruoth Nyasaye osepogou kuom dhout Israel mamoko kokelou bute mondo urit tije mag Hema Maler mar Ruoth Nyasaye, kuchung’ e nyim oganda jo Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo kutiyonigi?" 
Numbers16:10 Osekelou machiegni kode, un kaachiel gi jo-Lawi weteu, to koro eka udwaro ni mondo ubed jodolo bende!" 
Numbers16:11 Mano emomiyo in kaachiel gi jogi duto useriworu ka ukwedo Ruoth Nyasaye. Uparo ni Harun nigi teko manade, ma omiyo onego uywagne kamano?”" 
Numbers16:12 Musa nooro wach mondo oluongne Dathan gi Abiram ma yawuot Eliab, to ne gidwoko niya, “Ok wabi." 
Numbers16:13 Iparo ni gol mane igolowago e piny maber kendo momew mondo watho e thim ka, en gima tin koso, ma pod idwaroe mana ni nyaka ibed jatendwa?" 
Numbers16:14 To gima rach moloyo en ni ok isekelowa e piny maber kendo momew, bende ok isemiyowa puothe cham gi mag mzabibu mondo obed mawa. Iparo ni inyalo wuondo ji machal kodwa kama? Ooyo, ok wabi!”" 
Numbers16:15 Kane Musa owinjo wechegigo, mirima mager nomake, mi owacho ni Ruoth Nyasaye niya, “Kik idew ng’ur ma ging’urgono. Pok amayogi kata mana kanyna achiel, bende pok atimo marach ni ng’ato ang’ata kuomgi.”" 
Numbers16:16 Musa nochako owacho ni Korah niya, “Kiny ibi e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, in kaachiel gi jogi kod Harun bende." 
Numbers16:17 Ng’ato ka ng’ato kuomu nyaka kaw tap mach, kendo oketie ubani. Eka inikel jogi kaachiel gi tepegi mia ariyo gi piero abich e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye kendo un gi Harun bende nyaka ukel tepeu.”" 
Numbers16:18 Kuom mano, ng’ato ka ng’ato nokawo tape, moketoe mach kendo oolo e ubani. Musa gi Harun to nodhi mochung’ e dho Hemb Romo." 
Numbers16:19 Korah bende nochoko joge duto, mi gichung’ ka gimanyore gi ji ariyogo e dho Hema. Bang’e duong’ maler mar Ruoth Nyasaye nothinyore ni oganda duto mar Israel," 
Numbers16:20 kendo Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa gi Harun niya," 
Numbers16:21 “Chung’uru mabor gi ogandani mondo atiekgi dichiel ka diemo wang’!” 
Numbers16:22 To ne gipodho piny auma, ka giwacho niya, “A Nyasaye ma Nyasach ngima, bende mirima nyalo maki gi oganda duto mana nikech richo mar ng’ato achiel?”" 
Numbers16:23 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa niya," 
Numbers16:24 “Wach ni ji mondo osud gi chien, oa but hembe mag Korah gi Dothan kod Abiram.”" 
Numbers16:25 Kamano Musa nodhi ir Dothan gi Abiram, kendo jodong Israel noluwo bang’e." 
Numbers16:26 Eka nowacho ni oganda duto niya, “Suduru mabor gi hembe mag ji marichogi. Kik umul girgi moro amora, nono to urumo nikech richogi.”" 
Numbers16:27 Kuom mano, oganda duto noa kama ne Korah gi Dothan kod Abiram nitie. Koro noyudo ka Dothan gi Abiram josewuok, mochung’ e dho hembegi, kaachiel gi mondgi gi nyithindgi kod jogi." 
Numbers16:28 Musa nowacho nigi niya, “Ubiro ng’eyo ni Ruoth Nyasaye ema noora mondo atim gigi duto, to ok ni aketora awuon." 
Numbers16:29 Ka jogi otho mana kaka ji duto tho, to kara Ruoth Nyasaye ok oseora." 
Numbers16:30 To ka Ruoth Nyasaye otimo hono, mi bur obarore matut, kendo piny ong’amo dhoge momwonyogi kaachiel gi mwandugi duto, mi gidhi e bur ka gingima, eka unung’e ni ne gichayo Ruoth Nyasaye.”" 
Numbers16:31 Kane dho Musa pok olwar, lowo mane jogo ochung’ie nobarore," 
Numbers16:32 kong’amo dhoge momwonyogi gi hembegi kod ji duto mane luwo Korah, kaachiel gi mwandugi duto." 
Numbers16:33 Ne gidhi e bur ka gingima, mi lowo oumogi kod mwandugi duto, kendo gidwono nono kuom oganda jo-Israel." 
Numbers16:34 Ne giywak, mi jo-Israel duto mane ni machiegni kanyo, oringo ka kok niya, “Neyeuru kaka piny biro mwonyowa!”" 
Numbers16:35 Ruoth Nyasaye nooro mach mowang’o ji mia ariyo gi piero abich mane oyudo wang’o ubani kande. 
Numbers16:36 Bang’e Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa niya," 
Numbers16:37 “Nyis Eleazer wuod Harun jadolo mondo ogol tepe mag ubani e buch mach, kendo opuk mach man e igi kuma bor, nikech gin gik maler." 
Numbers16:38 Adier, tewni mag joma timo richo, mi oyudo kum mar tho ler, nikech osechiwgi e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye. Omiyo nyaka uthedhgi mopamore mondo oumgo kendo mar misango. Ginibed rapar ni jo-Israel.”" 
Numbers16:39 Kamano Eleazer jadolo nokawo tepe ubani mag mula ma ji mane mach owang’o ochiwo. Ne othedhgi raum mar kendo-mar-misango," 
Numbers16:40 mondo obed rapar ni jo-Israel ni ng’ato ang’ata ma ok jadolo, kendo ma ok jaka Harun kik wang’ ubani ni Ruoth Nyasaye, nono to otho mana kaka Korah kod joge. Mago duto notimore mana kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nomiyo Musa ochiko Eleazar." 
Numbers16:41 To kinyne oganda duto mar Israel nong’ur ni Musa gi Harun, ka giwachonigi gisemiyo jo Ruoth Nyasaye moko otho." 
Numbers16:42 E sa mane gichokoree ka ging’ur ni Musa gi Harun, ne giwichore ka gichiko Hemb Romo mi gineno ka bor polo oime, kendo duong’ maler mar Ruoth Nyasaye nothinyore kanyo." 
Numbers16:43 Musa gi Harun ne jobiro e nyim Hema," 
Numbers16:44 kendo Ruoth Nyasaye nowachonigi niya," 
Numbers16:45 “Chung’uru mabor gi jogi mondo atiekgi dichiel ka diemo wang’!” To ne gipodho piny auma. 
Numbers16:46 Eka Musa nowacho ni Harun niya, “Kaw tapi mar ubani iketie mach moa e kendo-mar-misango, kendo iolie ubani, mi idhi kode piyopiyo ir oganda mondo ipwodhnigi richogi. Mirima mager mar Ruoth Nyasaye osechopo, kendo tho osechako nego ji.”" 
Numbers16:47 Omiyo Harun nokawo tape mar ubani kaka Musa nochike, mi noringo odhi ir oganda jo-Israel, kendo noyudo ka tho osechako nego ji adier. Ne oketo ubani e tawo, mi opwodho ni ji richogi," 
Numbers16:48 kochung’ e kind joma osetho gi joma ngima, mi tho norumo." 
Numbers16:49 To ji alufu apar gang’wen gi mia aboro notho, ka ok kwan joma ne otho nikech ketho mar Korah." 
Numbers16:50 Kane tho oserumo, Harun nodok ir Musa e dho Hemb Romo." 
Numbers17:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa niya," 
Numbers17:2 “Nyis jo-Israel mondo jotend dhoot ka dhoot omiyi luth achiel achiel, duto ludhe apar gariyo, ma moro ka moro ondikie nying jatelo ka jatelo." 
Numbers17:3 Kuom ludh dhood Lawi to mondo indikie nying Harun, nimar luth ka luth nyaka bed mar jatelo ka jatelo." 
Numbers17:4 Eka iketgi duto e Hema e nyim Sandug Rapar, kama aromoe kodu," 
Numbers17:5 kendo ng’at ma ludhe oloth e ng’at ma ayiero. Mano e kaka abiro tieko ng’ur ma jo-Israel ng’urnigo.” 
Numbers17:6 Kuom mano, Musa nowuoyo gi jo-Israel mi jatend dhoot ka dhoot nomiye luth, duto ludhe apar gariyo, koriwore gi mar Harun." 
Numbers17:7 Musa noketogi e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye ei Hemb Rapar. 
Numbers17:8 Kinyne ka ne odonjo e Hema, noyudo ka ludh Harun, ma ludh dhood Lawi, ema oloth. Adier, noloth mogolo ite kod thiepe, kendo onyago olembe!" 
Numbers17:9 Eka Musa nogolo ludhego oko, monyiso jo-Israel duto. Ne ginenogi gi wang’gi, kendo jatelo ka jatelo nokawo mare." 
Numbers17:10 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa niya, “Dwok ludh Harun e nyim Sandug Rapar, obed ranyisi ma siemo joma wigi tek duto, mondo owe ywakna chuth, eka ok ginitho.”" 
Numbers17:11 Musa notimo mana kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nochike. 
Numbers17:12 Bang’e jo-Israel nowacho ni Musa niya, “Waserwenyo! Waduto warumo!" 
Numbers17:13 Ng’ato ang’ata kuomwa mosudo machiegni gi Hema Maler mar Nyasaye biro tho! Wabiro tho waduto koso?” 
Numbers18:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Harun niya, “In gi yawuoti, kaachiel gi jodhoodu duto, ema unubed ka urito tich Kama Ler, kendo gimoro amora marach motimore kuome nobed wachu. To gimoro amora motimore marach kuom tich dolo, nobed wachni kaachiel gi yawuoti." 
Numbers18:2 Iniwe jodhoodu ma joka Lawi bed kodu kendo konyu, kutiyo gi yawuoti e nyim Hemb Rapar." 
Numbers18:3 Ginibed ka gikonyou, mi gitiek tije duto mag Hema, to kik gisud machiegni gi gik maler, kata gi kendo-mar-misango, nono to githo kaachiel gi un bende." 
Numbers18:4 Ginibed kodu, kendo ginikaw ting’ duto mag rito Hema e yo moro amora, to onge ng’at ma ok jadolo ma nosud machiegni kodu." 
Numbers18:5 To un uwegi unubed kutiyo tije mag Kama Ler, kod tich dolo e kendo-mar-misango, mondo mirima mager mar Ruoth Nyasaye kik bi kuom jo-Israel kendo." 
Numbers18:6 An awuon asepogo joweteu ma jo-Lawi kuom dhout Israel mamoko duto mondo achiwnugi ka joma owalna mondo orit Hema. 
Numbers18:7 To in gi yawuoti kende ema nyaka uti tichu mar dolo mitimo e kendo-mar-misango, kendo mitimo e tok Pasia. Tich dolono e tich ma amiyou. Ng’ato ang’ata ma ok jadolo motiyo tich dolo nyaka negi.”" 
Numbers18:8 Ruoth Nyasaye nochako owacho ni Harun niya, “An awuon aketo e lweti mich duto, tiende ni chiwo maler duto ma jo-Israel okelo. Amiyigi ka pokni kaachiel gi nyikwayi, kaluwore gi chik mochwere." 
Numbers18:9 Gima ogol kuom chiwo moro amora maler moloyo, ma ok owang’ e kendo-mar-misango, nobed mari gi nyikwayi, bed ni en misango mar cham, kata mar golo richo, kata mipwodhogo ketho mar gowi, mochiwna ka mich maler moloyo." 
Numbers18:10 Unuchame kaluwore gi chik mar chamo gik maler moloyo, kendo ng’ato ang’ata kuomu ma dichwo nyalo chame. Enobednu gima ler." 
Numbers18:11 “Gik ma jo-Israel chiwo ka mich moyiedhi bende nobed mau. Achiwonugi kaachiel gi yawuoti kod nyigi, kaluwore gi chik mochwere. Ng’ato ang’ata mae odi ma ok ogak nyalo chamogi." 
Numbers18:12 “Amiyou mo maber gi divai manyien mabeyo duto gi cham mabeyo, tiende ni cham agwela mochiw ni Nyasaye." 
Numbers18:13 Olembe duto mokwong pon e pinyu, mokel ni Ruoth Nyasaye nobed mau. Ng’ato ang’ata ma e odi ma ok ogak nyalo chamogi." 
Numbers18:14 “Gimoro amora mochiw ni Ruoth Nyasaye chuth e Israel nobed maru. 
Numbers18:15 “Nyithindo makayo duto michiwo ni Ruoth Nyasaye nobed mau, bed ni gin mag dhano kata mag le. To nyaka war nyitnindo duto makayo mag dhano kod mag le ma ok ler." 
Numbers18:16 Ka gisetieko due achiel, to nyaka wargi gi shekel abich abich, mopim gi rapim mitiyogo e tich Nyasaye (shekel achiel oromo gera piero ariyo.)" 
Numbers18:17 To kik wariw nyithindo makayo mag dhok kata mag rombe kata mag diek, nimar gin jamni maler. Nyak ukir rembgi e kendo-mar misango, kendo uwang’ bochegi kutimogo misango miwang’o mondo odum tik mamit ni Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Numbers18:18 Ringgi to nodong’nu mana kaka agoko gi em ma korachwich mag mich moyiedhi dong’nu. 
Numbers18:19 “Mich duto mag gik maler ma jo-Israel chiwo ni Ruoth Nyasaye, amiyo gi yawuoti kod nyigi, kaluwore gi chik mochwere. Mano en singruok mosiko ma ok kethre, ma Ruoth Nyasaye otimo kodi kaachiel gi nyikwayi bende.”" 
Numbers18:20 Ruoth Nyasaye nomedo wacho ni Harun niya, “In ok nibed gi lowo mopogni e piny jo-Israel. Ok ginipogni kata lithe matin, nimar an e mwanduni kendo e pokni." 
Numbers18:21 “Jo-Lawi to amiyo achiel kuom apar mag gik moko duto obed pokgi kuom tich rito Hemb Romo. 
Numbers18:22 Jo-Israel ok nochak osud machiegni gi Hema, nono to githo." 
Numbers18:23 To jo-Lawi ema nobed ka tiyo tich Hema, kendo gimoro amora marach motimore kuome nobed wachgi. Mano e chik momakou gi nyikwau nyaka chieng. Ok giniyud lowo moro mopognigi kuom jo-Israel," 
Numbers18:24 nimar amiyogi achiel kuom apar mag gik moko ma jo-Israel chiwo ni Ruoth Nyasaye, mondo obed mwandugi. Mano emomiyo anyisogi ni ok giniyud lowo mopognigi kuom jo-Israel.”" 
Numbers18:25 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa niya," 
Numbers18:26 “Nyis jo-Lawi kama, “Ka jo-Israel chiwonu achiel kuom apar mag mwandugi, ma amiyou ka poku, to un bende nyaka uchiw ni Ruoth Nyasaye achiel kuom apar mag gigo." 
Numbers18:27 Chiwono nokwan mana ka cham mogol kar dino, kata divai mogol kar bicho." 
Numbers18:28 Mano e kaka unugol ni Ruoth Nyasaye chiwo mogol kuom achiel kuom apar duto ma uyudo kuom jo-Israel. Chiwo mugolo ni Ruoth Nyasayeno nyaka umi Harun jadolo. 
Numbers18:29 Kuom chiwo duto muyudo, unugolie mich michiwo ni Ruoth Nyasaye. Nyaka uchiw mana mabeyo moloyoe kuomgi." 
Numbers18:30 “Bende wach ni jo-Lawi niya, “Ka usegolo ni Ruoth Nyasaye mich mabeyo moloyo kuom poku, to modong’ nobednu ka cham mogol kar dino, kata divai mogol kar bicho." 
Numbers18:31 Unyalo chamogi kamoro amora gi joodu. En e pok muyudo kuom tiyo e Hemb Romo. 
Numbers18:32 Ka usegolo ni Ruoth Nyasaye gik mabeyoe moloyo kamano, to ok unubed joketho kuom wachno, kendo ok nobed ni udwanyo gik maler ma jo-Israel ochiwo, ma dimi utho.”" 
Numbers19:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa gi Harun mondo onyis jo-Israel chik moseketno, kowacho miya," 
Numbers19:2 “Wachnigiuru ni mondo gikel ni Musa dhiang’ malando ha maonge songa, kendo ma pok otuene jok." 
Numbers19:3 Nyaka ichiwe ni Eleazar jadolo mondo ogole oko yo wuokchieng’ mar kambi, kendo onege kuno." 
Numbers19:4 Eleazar jadolo nogwel remo gi lith lwete, kendo nokir nyadibiriyo kochomo yo ka nyim Hemb Romo." 
Numbers19:5 Nyaka wang’ dheno mana e wang’e koneno; piene gi ringre gi rembe kod owuoche duto nyaka wang’. 
Numbers19:6 Jadolo nokaw yiend sida gi owino kod usi makwar, mi nobolgi e chuny mach ma dhiang’ wang’ie." 
Numbers19:7 Bang’e enolwok lepe kendo nolwokre gi pi, eka onyalo donjo e kambi, to kata kamano, pod nosik kogak nyaka chieng’ podhi." 
Numbers19:8 Ng’at mowang’o dheno nolwok lepe, kendo nolwokre, to en bende nosik kogak nyaka chieng’ podhi." 
Numbers19:9 Bang’ mano, ng’at ma ok ogak nojow buch dheno, mi nodhi oole oko mar kambi, kamoro maler. Nyaka kan buruno mondo oganda jo-Israel olosgo pi mar pwodhruk, nikech dheno otimgo misango mar golo richo." 
Numbers19:10 Ng’at mane ojowo buch dheno nyaka lwok lepe, to en bende nosik kogak nyaka chieng’ podhi. Chikni omako jo-Israel nyaka chieng, kaachiel gi jopinje mamoko modak kuomgi." 
Numbers19:11 “Ng’at momulo ng’at motho nobed mogak kuom ndalo abiriyo. 
Numbers19:12 Enopwodhre gi pi pwodhruok chieng’ mar adek gi chieng’ mar abiriyo, to nosik kogak." 
Numbers19:13 Ng’ato momulo ng’at motho, to ok nopwodhre, ochido Hema Maler mar Ruoth Nyasaye. Ng’atno nong’ad kare oko kuom jo-Israel. Pi pwodhruok ne ok kir kuome, omiyo osiko kogak." 
Numbers19:14 “Ka ng’ato otho e hema, to chik moketi e ma: Ng’ato ang’ata modonjo e hemano, kata ng’ato ang’ata manie hemano nobed mogak kuom ndalo abiriyo," 
Numbers19:15 kendo agulu manie hemano ma dhoge ni nono ma ok oum, bende nobed mogak." 
Numbers19:16 Kata ka ng’at man oko omulo ng’at moneg e lweny kata ng’at ma otho athoya, kata omulo choke dhano kata mana liel obedo mogak kuom ndalo abiriyo." 
Numbers19:17 Kuom gak ma kamano, ginikaw buch misango mar golo richo, mi giruw gi pi aora manie agulu." 
Numbers19:18 Bang’e ng’at ma ok ogak nokaw owino mi nolut e pigno, eka nokir e hema kod e gik moko manie iye, kaachiel gi ji duto ma tho ng’atno oyudo kanyo. Ng’at momulo choke dhano, kata ng’at monegi, kata ng’at motho athoya, kata momulo liel, bende nokir pigno kuome." 
Numbers19:19 Ng’at ma ok ogak nyaka kir pigno kuom ng’at mogak chieng’ mar adek gi chieng’ mar abiriyo, mi chieng’ mar abiriyo nodok mopwodhore kuom gakne. Nolwok lepe, kendo nolwokre, eka nobed maler ka chieng’ opodho." 
Numbers19:20 “To ka ng’at ma ogak ok opwodhore, to nyaka ng’ad kare oko kuom ogandagi, nimar dochid Kama Ler mar Ruoth Nyasaye. Pi pwodhruok ok okir kuome, omiyo osiko kogak." 
Numbers19:21 “Chikno omakou nyaka chieng’. Ng’at ma kiro pi pwodhruok nyaka lwok lepe, kendo ng’ato ang’ata momulo pigno nobed mogak nyaka chieng’ podhi." 
Numbers19:22 Gimoro amora ma ng’at mogak omulo bedo mogak, kata ng’at momulo gino bende bedo mogak nyaka chieng’ podhi.”" 
Numbers20:1 E due mokwongo, oganda jo-Israel duto nochopo e thim Zin, kendo ne gibet Kadesh kuom kinde mogwarore. Kanyo ema Miriam nothoe, moyikee." 
Numbers20:2 Pi ne onge ni jo-Israel kanyo, omiyo ne gichako ng’ur ni Musa gi Harun." 
Numbers20:3 Ne gidhaw gi Musa ka giwacho niya, “Mad ne watho kaachiel gi jowetewa mane otho e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye!" 
Numbers20:4 Ere gima omiyo isekelo oganda mar Ruoth Nyasaye e thimni mondo wathoe kaachiel gi jambwa? 
Numbers20:5 Ang’o momiyo nigolowa Misri kikelowa kama rach ma kata cham kata ng’owo kata mzabibu kata komamanga ok nyagie, bende onge kata mana pi ma dwamodhi?”" 
Numbers20:6 Musa kod Harun nodhi e Hema Miromoe gi Nyasaye e nyim jo-Israel. Ne gipodho piny auma, mi duong’ maler mar Ruoth Nyasaye nothinyore." 
Numbers20:7 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa niya," 
Numbers20:8 “Kaw ludhi, kendo in gi Harun owadu, uchok jo-Israel kanyakla, kendo chik lwanda mondo ogol pi ka ji duto neno. Kamano inigol pi e lwanda mondo oganda omodhi, kaachiel gi jambgi.”" 
Numbers20:9 Musa nokawo ludhno e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, mowuokgo kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nosechike." 
Numbers20:10 Bang’e Musa gi Harun nochoko oganda kanyakla e nyim lwandano. Musa nowachonigi niya, “Winjuru un joma tokgi tekgi! Uparo ni nyaka wagolnu pi e lwandani koso?”" 
Numbers20:11 Eka noting’o bade mogoyo lwandano diriyo gi ludhe. Pi nobubni mang’eny, mi oganda nomodho kaachiel gi jambgi." 
Numbers20:12 To Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa gi Harun niya, “Ne ok ugena moromo nyiso jo-Israel ni an ng’ama ler! Kuom mano ok unyal tero ogandani nyaka piny mane asingora ni namigi.”" 
Numbers20:13 Mago e sokni mag Meriba, kama ne jo-Israel odhawie gi Ruoth Nyasaye mi nonyisogi ni en ng’ama ler. (Tiend Meriba en dhaw.)" 
Numbers20:14 Kane jo-Israel ni Kadesh, Musa nooro joote ir ruodh Edom, kowacho niya, “Owadu Israel owacho kama: Ing’eyo malong’o chandruok duto mwaseyudo," 
Numbers20:15 kendo kaka kwerewa nodhi Misri, mi wasedak kuno kuom higni mang’eny. Jo-Misri nothagowa malit mana kaka ne githago kwerewa," 
Numbers20:16 to kane waywak ni Ruoth Nyasaye mondo okonywa, nowinjo ywakwa, mooro malaika mogolowa Misri, omiyo koro wan Kadesh, dala ma en tong’ pinyi." 
Numbers20:17 Wakwayi ni yie wakadhi e pinyi. Ok wananyon puotheu mag cham kata mag mzabibu, kendo ok wanamodh e sokniu. Wanaluw mana Ndach Ruoth, kendo ok wanabar korachwich kata koracham nyaka wakadh pinyi.”" 
Numbers20:18 To jo-Edom nodwoke niya, “Ok unyal kadho e pinywa, nono to wamonjou.”" 
Numbers20:19 To jo-Israel nowacho niya, “Donge wabiro mana luwo Ndara? To kata ka wan gi jambwa wamodho piu to wanachulu. Omiyo wewauru wang’ad ang’ada.”" 
Numbers20:20 To jo-Edom ne ok oyienigi mondo gikadhi, kendo ne giwuok gi jolweny mathoth mondo girad kodgi." 
Numbers20:21 Kamano jo-Edom notamo jo-Israel kadho e pinygi, mi jo-Israel notando, moluwo komachielo." 
Numbers20:22 Oganda jo-Israel nowuok Kadesh, modhi e got Hor." 
Numbers20:23 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa gi Harun e got Hor man but tong’ piny Edom niya," 
Numbers20:24 “Harun biro tho, mi luw kwerene, to ok nodonji e piny ma nasingora ni nami jo-Israel, nikech nudagi rito chikna kuom pi Meriba." 
Numbers20:25 Kaw Harun kod Eleazar wuode mondo uidhgo got Hor. 
Numbers20:26 Eka ilony lep Harun mondo irwakni Eleazar wuode. Harun to notho mana kanyo, koluwo kwerene.”" 
Numbers20:27 Musa notimo kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nochike, mi ne giidho got Hor, ka oganda duto neno." 
Numbers20:28 Nolonyo lep Harun, morwako ni Eleazar wuod Harun. Harun to notho ewi got kanyo. Bang’e Musa gi Eleazar nolor piny oa e got." 
Numbers20:29 Kane oganda jo-Israel oneno ni Harun osetho, ne giywage kuom ndalo piero adek." 
Numbers21:1 Kane ja-Kanaan ma ruodh Arad mane odak yo milambo mar pinyno owinjo ni jo-Israel biro koluwo yor Atharim, nomonjogi momako jomoko kuomgi." 
Numbers21:2 Eka jo-Israel nokuong’ore ni Ruoth Nyasaye kawacho niya, “Ka ichiwo jogi e lwetwa, to wabiro ketho miechgi chuth.”" 
Numbers21:3 Ruoth Nyasaye nowinjo kwayogi, mi ochiwo jo-Kanaan e lwetgi. Ne gitiekogi kendo giketho miechgi chuth, mi gichako kanyo ni Horma, (tiende ni, keth.)" 
Numbers21:4 Bang’e ne gia got Hor ka giluwo yor Nam Makwar malworo piny Edom. 
Numbers21:5 To ne gichako ng’ur ka gin e yo, mi giywak ni Nyasaye kod Musa, ka giwacho niya, “Ere gimomiyo usegolowa e piny Misri mondo watho e thimni, kama onge chiemo kata pi? Chiemo marachni ojogowa!”" 
Numbers21:6 Eka Ruoth Nyasaye nooro thuonde man gi kwiri mager, mokayo jo-Israel kendo onego ji mang’eny." 
Numbers21:7 Omiyo ji nobiro ir Musa, mowachone niya, “Ne waketho kuom ng’ur ni Ruoth Nyasaye kod in. Yie ikwanwa Ruoth Nyasaye mondo ogol thuonde oko kuomwa.” Kuom mano Musa nokwayonigi Ruoth Nyasaye," 
Numbers21:8 mi Ruoth Nyasaye nowachone niya, “Los thuond mula, igur e luth mabor. Ka ng’ato thuol okayo, mi orango thuond mulano to nochangi.”" 
Numbers21:9 Kamano Musa noloso thuond mula moketo e luth, ni, ka ng’ato thuol okayo, mi orango thuond mulano, to chango." 
Numbers21:10 Jo-Israel nodhi nyime gi wuoth, moguro kambi kamoro miluongo ni Oboth." 
Numbers21:11 Bang’e gia Oboth, mi gidhi giguro kambi Iye-abarim, e thim man yo wuokchieng’ mar piny Moab." 
Numbers21:12 Kane gia kanyo, to ne gidhi mi giguro kambi e hoho mar Zared." 
Numbers21:13 Eka ne gia Arnon e thim momakore gi piny jo-Amor. Aora Arnon ne ni e tong’ piny jo-Moab gi piny jo-Amor. 
Numbers21:14 Mano emomiyo Kitap Lwenje mag Ruoth Nyasaye wuoyo kuom Vaheb man Sufa, kod hohni man kuno niya," 
Numbers21:15 “Arnon kod hohni motimo thidhya, gi piny maridore kochomo mier mag Ar, kod tong’ piny Moab.”" 
Numbers21:16 Jo-Israel noa aora Arnon modhi Beer, (tiende ni soko.) Mano e soko mane Ruoth Nyasaye owuoyo kuome ni Musa niya, “Chok ji kaachiel mondo ami pi.”" 
Numbers21:17 “Chieng’no ema jo-Israel nowerie niya, In soko, bubni oko! Waweruru ni soko!" 
Numbers21:18 En soko mane jodongo okunyo gi ludhe kod odungnigi, mi obedo chiwo manie thim.”" 
Numbers21:19 Ne gia Beer, mi gidhi Nahaliel, kendo ne gia Nahaliel, mi gidhi Bamoth." 
Numbers21:20 Bang’ a Bamoth, ne gidhi e holo man piny Moab ewi got Pisga, kama inyalo nenogo thim." 
Numbers21:21 Jo-Israel nooro joote ir Sihon ruodh jo-Amor, ka gikwaye niya," 
Numbers21:22 “Yienwa mondo wakadh e pinyi. Ok wananyon puotheu mag cham kata mag mzabibu. To bende ok wanamodh e sokniu. Wanaluw mana Ndach Ruoth nyaka chop wakadh pinyi.” 
Numbers21:23 To Sihon ne ok oyie mondo jo-Israel okadh e pinye. Ne ochoko joge duto, mi owuok mondo oked gi jo-Israel e thim. Nodhi nyaka Jahaz, momonjogi kuno." 
Numbers21:24 To jo-Israel nonegogi oyokre, mokawo pinygi, chakre aora Arnon nyaka aora Jabok, ma en tong’ piny jo-Amon, kuma ne giyudoe ka weg pinyno rateke." 
Numbers21:25 Kuom mano jo-Israel nokawo miech jo-Amorgo duto, modakie. Miego ne gin Heshbon kod mier matindo mage." 
Numbers21:26 Hesbon ne dala maduong’ mar Sihon ruodh jo-Amor, mane oyudo osekedo gi ruodh Moab machon, mi okawo pinye nyaka aora Arnon." 
Numbers21:27 Mano emomiyo jower nochuogo wer niya, “Biuru Heshbon, biuru! Wageruru dala Sihon obed kaka chon," 
Numbers21:28 nimar mach nomuoch Heshbon! Ee, mach noliel e dala Sihon. Noketho Ar dala Moab, kendo notieko gode mag Arnon." 
Numbers21:29 A yaye Moab! Uromo, un jo-Kemosh. Kemosh oseriembo yawuote, moringo, kendo osemiyo Sihon ruodh Amor omako nyige." 
Numbers21:30 Nyikwagi orumo, chakre Heshbon nyaka Dibon, to mach pod liel kochomo Medeba!”" 
Numbers21:31 Kamano jo-Israel nokawo piny jo-Amor, modakie." 
Numbers21:32 Eka Musa nooro joote mondo odhi ocheng Jazer, mi jo-Israel nokawe, kaachiel gi mier matindo mage, kendo ne giriembo jo-Amor mane oyudo odak kuno." 
Numbers21:33 Bang’e ne giwichore mi giluwo yo mochomo Bashan. Og ruodh Bashan kod joode duto nobiro Edrei, mondo oked kodgi." 
Numbers21:34 To Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa niya, “Kik iluore, nimar asechiwe e lweti, kaachiel gi joge duto kod pinye. Timne mana kaka nitimo ni Sihon ruodh jo-Amor, mane odak Heshbon.”" 
Numbers21:35 Kamano jo-Israel nonego Og kaachiel gi yawuote kod joge duto, nyaka ne onge kata ng’at achiel modong’, mi ne gikawo pinye gidakie." 
Numbers22:1 Jo-Israel nodhi moguro kambi e piny Moab mamwalo, man yo wuokchieng’ mar aora Jordan, kama omanyore gi Jeriko." 
Numbers22:2 Balak wuod Zipor nowinjo gima ne jo-Israel otimo ni jo-Amor. 
Numbers22:3 To jo-Moab bende kihondko malich nomako, nikech ne gineno ka jo-Israel ng’eny ahinya." 
Numbers22:4 Omiyo ne giwacho ni jodong Midian niya, “Oganda maduong’ malichni biro nang’owa mana kaka dede nang’o lum.” Balak wuod Zipor, mane ruodh Moab e kindego," 
Numbers22:5 nooro joote ir Balam wuod Beor mane oyudo ni Pethor but aora Yufrate e piny jo-Amav, kowachone niya, “Oganda maduong’ moa e piny Misri osebiro, mi opong’o piny, kendo othung’a marach." 
Numbers22:6 Omiyo bi piyo mondo ikuong’gi nikech ging’eny ahinya mohewowa. Bang’e dipo ka aloyogi, mi ariembogi oko e pinywa, nikech ang’eyo ni joma igwedho to yudo gueth, to joma ikwong’o to yudo kuong’.”" 
Numbers22:7 Jodong Moab gi Midian ne jokawo gik michulo jokor, mi gidhi ir Balaam, kendo ginyise kaka Balak oorogi." 
Numbers22:8 Balaam nowachonigi niya, “Ninduru ka otienoni, kendo abiro wachonu gima Ruoth Nyasaye onyisa kuom wachni.” Kuom mano jodong Moabgo nonindo ka Balaam." 
Numbers22:9 Eka Nyasaye nofwenyore ni Balaam, mopenje niya, “Joma olimigo oa kanye?”" 
Numbers22:10 Balaam nodwoke niya, “Balak wuod Zipor ma ruodh Moab ema oseorogi ira, konyisa ni" 
Numbers22:11 oganda maduong’ osea e piny Misri mopong’o piny. Omiyo odwaro ni mondo adhi akuong’negi, eka dipo ka oloyogi, mi oriembogi.”" 
Numbers22:12 To Nyasaye nowacho ni Balaam niya, “Kik idhi kodgi, to bende kik ikuong’ jogo nikech gin joma oguedhi.”" 
Numbers22:13 Kuom mano, kane Balaam ochiew gokinyi, nonyiso jodongo mane Balak ooro niya, “Doguru thuru nimar Ruoth Nyasaye osekwera ni kik adhi kodu.”" 
Numbers22:14 Omiyo jodong Moabgo noa modok ir Balak, monyise ni Balaam osedagi biro kodgi." 
Numbers22:15 Eka Balak nochako ooro jodongo moko mang’eny kendo madongo moloyo mane oseoro mokwongo. 
Numbers22:16 Ne gibiro ir Balaam, mi giwachone niya, “Balaam wuod Zipor oorowa mondo wanyisi kama, ‘Kik gimoro moni biro ira," 
Numbers22:17 nikech abiro miyi duong’ miwuoro, kendo anatimni gimoro amora miwacho. Omiyo nyaka ibi mondo ikuong’na jogi.’ ”" 
Numbers22:18 To Balaam nodwoko jodong Balak niya, “Kata ka bed ni Balak dwaro miya fedha gi dhahabu duto manie ode, to ok anyal chayo chik Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasacha e yo moro amora." 
Numbers22:19 To kata kamano, ninduru ka gotienoni kaka ne jou mokwongo ka onindo mondo awinj ane gima nyien ma Ruoth Nyasaye nyalo nyisa kuom wachno.”" 
Numbers22:20 Nyasaye nofwenyore ni Balaam gotieno, mowachone niya, “Ka jogo osebiro luongi, to dhi kodgi. To nyaka itim mana gima abiro wachoni.”" 
Numbers22:21 Omiyo kane Balaam ochiew gokinyi, nogawo kanje, modhi gi jodong Moab." 
Numbers22:22 To kata kamano Ruoth Nyasaye nokecho nikech Balaam ne dhi, omiyo kane Balaam biro koidho kanje, ka en gi jotichne ariyo, malaika mar Ruoth Nyasaye nobiro mochung’ e nyime mondo ogeng’ne kik okadhi." 
Numbers22:23 Kane kanyna oneno malaika kochung’ e yo gi ligangla, nobaro moweyo yo, to Balaam nochwade mondo oduog e yo." 
Numbers22:24 Eka malaika mar Ruoth Nyasaye nodhi mochung’ kamoro ma yo dinygo e kind puothe mag mzabibu, kama ochiel gi ohinga koni gi koni." 
Numbers22:25 Kanyna noneno malaika kochung’ kanyo, mi norere e ohinga, kendo odiyo tiend Balaam e ohingano, mi Balaam nochako chwade." 
Numbers22:26 Bang’ mano, malaika mar Ruoth Nyasaye nosudo modhi ochung’ kamoro madiny ma ng’ato ok nyal baroe korachwich kata koracham." 
Numbers22:27 Kane kanyna oneno malaika kanyo, nonindo gi Balaam piny, mi mano nomiyo Balaam mirima, mochwade gi ludhe." 
Numbers22:28 Eka Ruoth Nyasaye nomiyo kanyna owuoyo, ka penjo Balaam niya, “Koro igoya didek, to ere gima aseketho?”" 
Numbers22:29 Balaam nowachone niya, “Isebedo kichanda, kendo ka dabed ni an gi ligangla, to dikoro asenegi!”" 
Numbers22:30 To kanyna nopenjo Balaam niya, “To donge an e kanji ma isebedo kiidho pile? Bende asetimonie gima kamano nyaka nene?” Balam nodwoke ni, “Ooyo.”" 
Numbers22:31 Eka Ruoth Nyasaye noyawo wang’ Balaam moneno malaika mar Ruoth Nyasaye kochung’ e yo gi ligangla. Nokulore, mopodho piny auma e nyim malaika." 
Numbers22:32 Malaika nopenje niya, “Ere gima omiyo inyalo goyo kanji didek kamano? Ne abiro mondo ageng’ni, to ne ichoma mana tir," 
Numbers22:33 to ka kanji nende onena didek, mobaro oa e yo. To ka da bed ni ok obaro, to dikoro asenegi, mi aweye odhi.”" 
Numbers22:34 Balaam nowacho ni malaika mar Ruoth Nyasaye niya, “Aseketho. Ne ok ang’eyo ni ichung’ e nyima e yo mondo igeng’na. To koro ka wuodhani ok berni, to ayie dok dala.”" 
Numbers22:35 To malaika mar Ruoth Nyasaye nowachone niya, “Dhiyo adhiya gi jogo, to nyaka iwach mana gima abiro nyisi.” Omiyo Balaam nodhi adhiya gi jodong Balak." 
Numbers22:36 Kane Balak owinjo ni Balaam biro, nowuok modhi nyaka Ar e piny Moab but aora Arnon manie tong’ pinye, mondo oromne." 
Numbers22:37 Balak nopenjo Balaam niya, “Donge naoroni joote ndalo mang’eny mondo oluongi? Ang’o ma ne omoni biro? Koso ne iparo ni ok anyal miyi duong’?”" 
Numbers22:38 Balaam nodwoke niya, “Eri asebiro, to koro ere teko ma an-go ma dawachgo gimoro amora? Wach moro amora ma Nyasaye omiya ema abiro wacho.”" 
Numbers22:39 Kamano Balam ne jodhi gi Balak nyaka Kiriath-huzoth," 
Numbers22:40 mi Balak oyang’o dhok gi rombe ni Balaam kod jodongo mane ni kode. 
Numbers22:41 Kinyne gokinyi Balak nokawo Balaam motero ewi got miluongo ni Bamoth-baal, kuma ne onyalo nenogo oganda jo-Israel duto." 
Numbers23:1 Eka Balam nowacho ni Balak niya, “Gerna kende abiriyo mag misango ka, kendo kelna ruedhi abiriyo gi imbe abiriyo.”" 
Numbers23:2 Balak notimo kamano, mochiwo rwath achiel gi im achiel e kendo ka kendo-mar-misango." 
Numbers23:3 Eka nowacho ni Balaam niya," 
Numbers23:4 “Aseloso kende abiriyo mag misango kendo asechiwo rwath achiel gi im achiel e kendo ka kendo.” Balaam nowacho ni Balak niya, “Chung’ e bath misango misechiwo to an iweya adhi kenda. Kamoro dipo ka Ruoth Nyasaye ofwenyorena, kendo gimoro amora mowachona abiro nyisi.” Kamano nowuok modhi, kendo Nyasaye nofwenyorene" 
Numbers23:5 monyise weche ma onego owachi, kowachone niya, “Dog ir Balak, kendo iwachne mana kaka anyisi.”" 
Numbers23:6 Omiyo nodok moyudo Balak kochung’ e bath misango mane osechiwo, kaachiel gi jodong Moab duto." 
Numbers23:7 Eka ne Balaam ohulo wach moa kuom Nyasaye kama: “Balak ruodh Moab oseoma Aram piny gode man wuok chieng’ kowachona niya, ‘Bi mondo ikuong’na joka Jakobo! Bi ikwer jo-Israel.’" 
Numbers23:8 To ere kaka dakuong’ joma Nyasaye ok osekuong’o? Ere kaka dakwer joma Ruoth Nyasaye ok osekwero? 
Numbers23:9 Anenogi kachung’ ewi lwendni maboyo, kendo arangogi gi ewi gode. Aneno oganda modak kar kende, ma ok oseriwore gi ogendni mamoko." 
Numbers23:10 Ere ng’ama nyalo kwano oganda joka Jakobo, kata manyalo riwo kar romb jo-Israel? Weuru atho kaka joma kare tho, kendo abed achiel kodgi.”" 
Numbers23:11 Bang’ mano Balak nowacho ni Balaam niya, “Mano to ang’o misetimono? Ne aluongi mondo ikuong’na wasika, to in koro ise mana guedhogi!”" 
Numbers23:12 To Balaam nodwoke niya, “Donge nyaka awach mana gima Ruoth Nyasaye osenyisa?”" 
Numbers23:13 Eka Balak nowachone niya, “Bi mondo ateri kamoro machielo ma inyalo nenogo mana bath jo-Israel konchiel, to ok giduto, mondo ikuong’nagi kanyo.”" 
Numbers23:14 Kamano ne otero Balaam e paw Zofim ewi got Pisga, kendo nogeroe kende abiriyo mag misango, mi ochiwoe rwath achiel gi im achiel e kendo ka kendo." 
Numbers23:15 Eka ne Balaam owacho ni Balak niya, “Chung’ but misango misechiwo, an to adhi romo gi Nyasaye kucha.”" 
Numbers23:16 Ruoth Nyasaye nofwenyore ni Balaam monyise gima onego owachi kowachone niya, “Dog ir Balak kendo iwach mana kaka anyisi.”" 
Numbers23:17 Omiyo nodok, moyudo ka Balak ochung’ e bath misangone kaachiel gi jodong Moab. Balak nopenjo gima Ruoth Nyasaye owacho." 
Numbers23:18 Mi Balaam nohulo wach moa kuom Nyasaye kama: “Balak a malo mondo iwinj! Wuod Zipor winji gima onyisa mondo awachi! 
Numbers23:19 Nyasaye ok en dhano ma doriambi. Ooyo, ok en dhano ma dolokre. Osewuoyo, to donge obiro timo kaka owacho? Adier, obiro chopo gima osehulo." 
Numbers23:20 Osechika mondo achiw gueth, omiyo abiro chiwo gueth, to ok anyal loko guethno." 
Numbers23:21 Onge ketho moseyudo kuom joka Jakobo. Ooyo, onge richo moseneno kuom jo-Israel. Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachgi ni kodgi en ema giyie ni en Ruodhgi." 
Numbers23:22 Nyasaye, ma nogologi e piny Misri, tekone chalonigi gi teko jowi." 
Numbers23:23 Tim ajuoke onge kuom joka Jakobo, Adier, timbe ndagla onge kuom jo-Israel. Koro ma e sa monego wanyisie joka Jakobo ma jo-Israel niya, ‘Neyeuru gima Nyasaye osetimonu!’" 
Numbers23:24 Ogandagi chalo gi sibuor ma dhako mokichore, kendo ojuol ka sibuor ma dichwo. Ok onyal nindo piny, kapok ochamo gima onego momadho rembe.”" 
Numbers23:25 Eka Balak nowacho ni Balaam niya, “Ka ok idwar kuong’ogi, to kara ber mondo kik iguedhgi bende.”" 
Numbers23:26 To Balaam nodwoke niya, “Donge ne anyisi ni nyaka atim gik moko duto ma Ruoth Nyasaye ochika?”" 
Numbers23:27 Balak nowachone niya, “Bi mondo ateri kamoro machielo, dipo ka Nyasaye oyie, mi ikuong’onagi kanyo.”" 
Numbers23:28 Kamano notero Balaam ewi got Peor, momanyore gi Jeshimon." 
Numbers23:29 Eka Balaam ne onyise mondo olosne kende abiriyo mag misango kanyo, kendo ochiw ruedhi abiriyo kod imbe abiriyo." 
Numbers23:30 Balak notimo kaka ne Balaam onyise mi ochiwo rwath achiel gi im achiel e kendo ka kendo. 
Numbers24:1 Koro kaka Balaam nong’eyo ni Ruoth Nyasaye dwaro ni mondo oguedh jo-Israel, ne ok odhi mondo otim tim ajuoke, kaka ne osetimo mokwongo, to nowichore mochomo thim," 
Numbers24:2 kendo kane ong’icho, noneno jo-Israel koguro kambigi kochanore e dhoutgi. Eka teko mar Nyasaye nobiro kuome," 
Numbers24:3 mi ohulo kama: “Ma e wach madier mar Balaam wuod Beor, mana ng’at ma wang’e bith," 
Numbers24:4 kendo ma winjo weche Nyasaye. En wach ma ng’at ma wang’e oyepo, kendo ma neno fwenyruok moa kuom Ng’at ma Nyalo Gik Moko Duto." 
Numbers24:5 A joka Jakobo, mano kaka hembeu beyo! A jo-Israel, kar daku long’o!" 
Numbers24:6 Hembeu chalo gi yiend othidhe mopidhi e laini maboyo, kendo chalo gi puothe mae bath aora, kaka yien mabeyo ma Ruoth Nyasaye opidho, kendo kaka yiend sida mae dho pi." 
Numbers24:7 Pi mae dapigeu biro bubni oko, kendo kothu nochal gi nembe madongo, mondo ruodhu obed maduong’ moloyo Agag, kendo lochne oyud duong’." 
Numbers24:8 Nyasaye mane ogolou e piny Misri, tekone chalo gi teko jowi. Uchamo ringre ogendini ma wasiku bende urado chokegi, kendo uturo lembgi matindo tindo." 
Numbers24:9 Uchalo gi sibuor madhako manindo piny, ma onge ng’ama hedhore chiewo. Joma guedhou mondo oyud gueth, to joma kuong’ou mondo oyud kuong’!”" 
Numbers24:10 Kane Balak owinjo wechego, nokecho ahinya gi Balaam, mi ne okeyo lwetene, kowacho ni Balaam niya, “Ne aluongi mondo ikuong’na wasika, to in koro iseguedhogi mana nyadidek!" 
Numbers24:11 Omiyo wuogi, idhi thuru. Ne asingora ni damiyi duong’ mang’ongo, to koro Ruoth Nyasaye osemoni yudo duong’no.”" 
Numbers24:12 To Balaam nodwoke niya, “Donge ne anyiso jooteni mane ioro ira" 
Numbers24:13 ni kata dibed ni Balak dwaro miya fedha kod dhahabu duto manie ode, to ok anyal chayo chik Ruoth Nyasaye, ka atimo dwarona awuon, bed ni en gima ber kata gima rach, to abiro wacho mana gima Ruoth Nyasaye onyisa." 
Numbers24:14 Koro adok ir jowa, to kapok adhi, to nyaka anyisi gima jo-Israel biro timo ni jogi e ndalo mabiro.”" 
Numbers24:15 Kamano Balaam nohulo wach moa kuom Nyasaye kama: “Ma e wach madier mar Balaam wuod Beor, mana wach ng’at ma wang’e bith," 
Numbers24:16 kendo mawinjo weche Nyasaye. En wach ng’at mong’eyo rieko mar Ng’ama Duong’ Moloyo, ng’at ma wang’e oyepo, kendo ma neno fwenyruok moa kuom Ng’ama Nyalo Gik Moko Duto." 
Numbers24:17 Anene, to ok sani, kendo ang’iye, to ok machiegni. Sulue nobi koa kuom joka Jakobo, kendo ludh duong’ nowuog kuom jo-Israel. Obiro goyo oganda lweny mag jo-Moab, kendo nolo joma sungore." 
Numbers24:18 Obiro loyo piny Edom e lweny, mi okaw kendo jo-Seir ma wasike nobed mage. Jo-Israel biro timo timbe chir." 
Numbers24:19 Ee, joka Jakobo biro loyo wasikgi. Onge ng’at ma nodong’ Ar ka ngima.”" 
Numbers24:20 Eka Balaam norango piny Amalek, mi ohulo kama: “Oganda mane okwongo betie ne jo-Amalek. To mogik ginirum chuth.”" 
Numbers24:21 Eka norango jo-Keni, mi owacho niya, “Yaye un jo-Kain, kata obedo ni kar daku otegno, kendo udak malo ewi gode," 
Numbers24:22 to obiro wang’. Uparo ni unyalo dak e nyima kanyo nyaka karang’o?” 
Numbers24:23 Ne ochako ohulo kendo niya, “Yaye, mago jokanye machokore malogo?" 
Numbers24:24 Gin mony moa Saipras. Gibiro ketho Asuria, kendo giniketh Eber, to kata gin bende gibiro rumo chuth.”" 
Numbers24:25 Bang’ mano Balaam nowuok modok thurgi, to Balak bende nodhi." 
Numbers25:1 Kane jo-Israel ni Shitim, ne gichako terore gi nyi Moab," 
Numbers25:2 mane luongogi e sep misengni mane gitimo ni nyisechegi. Ne gidhi, mi gichamo chiemogo, kendo gilamo nyiseche jo-Moab." 
Numbers25:3 Kane jo-Israel ochako lamo Baal-peor kamano, Ruoth Nyasaye nokecho kodgi." 
Numbers25:4 Mowacho ni Musa niya, “Ter jotend oganda ewi got idhir olwar piny, mondo otho e nyima odiechieng’ alanga, mondo mirimba mager oa kuom jo-Israel.”" 
Numbers25:5 Omiyo Musa nowacho ni jong’ad bura mag Israel niya, “Ng’ato ka ng’ato kuomu nyaka neg joge moselamo Baal-peor.”" 
Numbers25:6 Noyudo ja-Israel moro okelo nyar Midian e hembe ratiro ka Musa kod oganda duto neno, ka noyudo giywak e dho Hemb Romo." 
Numbers25:7 Kane Finehas wuod Eleazar ma wuod Harun jadolo onene, nowuok e oganda mokawo tong’," 
Numbers25:8 kendo odonjogo e ot ma iye, kodwaro ja-Israelno. Nochwowe gi tong’ moriwe kaachiel gi nyakono. Eka tho mane oyudo ogoyo jo-Israel orumo." 
Numbers25:9 To noyudo ka thono osenego ji piero ariyo gang’wen. 
Numbers25:10 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa niya,"
