Numbers25:11 “Finehas wuod Eleazar ma wuod Harun jadolo osemiyo mirima mane an go gi jo-Israel orumo, nikech mirima mosemake kodgi chal gi mara. Mano emomiyo kata obedo ni ne an gi nyiego kod jo-Israel nikech aherogi ahinya, to ne ok atiekogi." 
Numbers25:12 Dhi iwach ni Finehas ni asingorane ni obiro bedo jadolo nyaka chieng’. 
Numbers25:13 Asingorane, en kaachiel gi nyikwaye ni ginibed jodolo nyaka chieng’ nikech osebedo gi mirima ma nyiso ni ohero Nyasache, mi opwodho jo-Israel kuom richogi.”" 
Numbers25:14 Ja-Israel mane onegi kaachiel gi nyar Midian niluongo ni Zimri wuod Salu ma jatend dhoot achiel kuom dhout jo-Simeon. 
Numbers25:15 To nyar Midian ma ne onegno nyinge ne Kozbi nyar Zur, mane jatend dhout Midian moko." 
Numbers25:16 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa niya," 
Numbers25:17 “Sanduru jo-Midian, kendo uneggi," 
Numbers25:18 nikech ne githagou gi timbegi mag amara mane gitimo Peor, kendo kuom wach Kozbi ma nyargi, ma nyar jatend Midian, mane oneg ndalo mane yamb tho obiro nikech gima notimore Peor.”" 
Numbers26:1 Bang’ yamono, Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa gi Eleazar jadolo ma wuod Harun niya," 
Numbers26:2 “Kwanuru oganda jo-Israel e dhoutgi, kundiko joma hikgi oromo piero ariyo kata mokadho kanyo, kendo moromo dhi e lweny,”" 
Numbers26:3 Musa gi Eleazar nochoko ji duto ma hikgi piero ariyo kata mokadho kanyo," 
Numbers26:4 e piny Moab mamwalo, e bath aora Jordan kama omanyore gi Jeriko, kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nosechiko Musa. Jo-Israel mane owuok Misri e magi:" 
Numbers26:5 Jo-Reuben ma wuod Israel makayo, kochan e dhoutgi, ne joka Hanok gi joka Palu" 
Numbers26:6 gi joka Hezron gi joka Karmi. 
Numbers26:7 Mago ne dhout Reuben. Kar romb joma ondik nyinggi ne alufu piero ang’wen gi mia abiriyo kod piero adek. 
Numbers26:8 Wuod Palu ne Eliab," 
Numbers26:9 to yawuot Eliab ne Nemuel gi Dathan kod Abiram. Gin e Dothan gi Abiram mane joma ogen e oganda, to ne gipiem gi Musa kod Harun, mi giriwore gi jo-Korah mondo gipiem gi Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Numbers26:10 Bang’e piny nong’amo dhoge, mi omwonyogi kaachiel gi Korah, mi ogandagi norumo, kendo mach nowang’o ji mia ariyo gi piero abich kande. Ne gidoko ranyisi ma siemo ji." 
Numbers26:11 To kata kamano jo-Korah ne ok otho duto. 
Numbers26:12 Jo-Simeon, kochan e dhoutgi ne joka Nemuel gi Joka Jamin gi joka Jakin" 
Numbers26:13 gi joka Zera kod joka Saulo. 
Numbers26:14 Mago ne dhout joka jo-Simeon. Kar romb joma ondik nyinggi ne alufu piero ariyo gariyo gi mia ariyo. 
Numbers26:15 Jo-Gad, kochan e dhoutgi, ne joka Zefon gi joka Hagi gi joka Shuni" 
Numbers26:16 gi joka Ozni gi joka Eri 
Numbers26:17 gi joka Arod kod joka Arieli. 
Numbers26:18 Mago ne dhout jo-Gad. Kar romb joma ondik nyinggi ne alufu piero ang’wen gi mia abich. 
Numbers26:19 Yawuot Juda ne Er gi Onan gi Shela gi Perez kod Zera. To Er gi Onan notho e piny Kanaan. 
Numbers26:20 Jo-Juda, kochan e dhoutgi, ne joka Shela gi joka Perez kod joka Zera." 
Numbers26:21 Dhout Perez ne joka Hezron gi joka Hamul. 
Numbers26:22 Mago ne dhout Juda. Kar romb joma ondik nyinggi ne alufu piero abiriyo gauchiel gi mia abich. 
Numbers26:23 Jo-Isakar kochan e dhoutgi ne joka Tola gi joka Pua 
Numbers26:24 gi joka Jashub kod joka Shimron. 
Numbers26:25 Mago ne dhout Isakar. Kar romb joma ondik nyinggi ne alufu piero auchiel gang’wen gi mia adek. 
Numbers26:26 Jo-Zebulun kochan e dhoutgi ne joka Sered gi joka Elon kod joka Jaleel. 
Numbers26:27 Mago ne dhout Zebulun. Kar romb joma ondik nyingi ne alufu piero auchiel gi mia abich. 
Numbers26:28 Yawuot Josef ne Manase gi Efraim. 
Numbers26:29 Jo-Manase kochan e dhoutgi ne joka Makir gi joka Gilead. (Gilead ne wuod Makir.) 
Numbers26:30 Dhout Gilead ne Jezeer gi joka Helek 
Numbers26:31 gi joka Asriel gi joka Shekem 
Numbers26:32 gi joka Shemida kod joka Hefer. 
Numbers26:33 Zelofehad wuod Hefer nonywolo mana nyiri kende. Nyingi ne Mala gi Noa gi Hogla gi Milka kod Tirza. 
Numbers26:34 Mago ne dhout Manase. Kar romb joma ne ondik nyinggi ne alufu piero abich gariyo gi mia abiriyo. 
Numbers26:35 Jo-Efraim kochan e dhoutgi ne joka Shuthela gi joka Beker kod joka Tahan. 
Numbers26:36 Dhood Shuthela ne joka Eran. 
Numbers26:37 Mago ne dhout Efraim. Kar romb joma ondik nyinggi ne alufu piero adek gariyo gi mia abich. Mago duto ne joka Josef, kochan e dhoutgi." 
Numbers26:38 Jo-Benjamin kochan e dhoutgi ne joka Bela gi joka Ashbel gi joka Ahiram 
Numbers26:39 gi joka Shufam kod joka Hufam. 
Numbers26:40 Yawuot Bela ne Ard gi Naaman. Dhout Bela ne joka Ard gi joka Naaman. 
Numbers26:41 Mago ne dhout Benjamin. Kar romb joma ondik nyinggi ne alufu piero ang’wen gabich gi mia auchiel. 
Numbers26:42 Jo-Dan kochan e dhoodgi ne joka Shuham. Mano ne dhood Dan. 
Numbers26:43 Kar romb joka Shuhan ma ondik nyinggi ne alufu piero auchiel gang’wen gi mia ang’wen. 
Numbers26:44 Jo-Asher kochan e dhoutgi ne joka Imna gi joka Ishvi kod joka Beria. 
Numbers26:45 Dhout Beria ne joka Heber gi joka Malkiel. 
Numbers26:46 Bende Asher ne nigi nyako ma nyinge Sera. 
Numbers26:47 Mago ne dhout Asher. Kar romb joma ondik nyinggi ne alufu piero abich gadek gi mia ang’wen. 
Numbers26:48 Jo-Naftali kochan e dhoutgi ne joka Jazeel gi joka Guni 
Numbers26:49 gi joka Jezer kod joka Shilem. 
Numbers26:50 Mago ne dhout Naftali, kochan e utgi. Kar romb joma ondik nyinggi ne alufu piero ang’wen gabich gi mia ang’wen." 
Numbers26:51 Kamano kar romb jo-Israel duto ne ji alufu mia auchiel gi achiel, kod mia abiriyo gi piero adek. (601,730)" 
Numbers26:52 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa niya," 
Numbers26:53 “Nyaka pog piny gi dhoudi mana maromre gi kar joma ondik nyinggi. 
Numbers26:54 Oganda maduong’ inimi lowo maduong’, to oganda matin nimi matin. Oganda ka oganda nopogne lowo maromre gi kar romb joma ondik nyinggi." 
Numbers26:55 Kata kamano unupog piny mana gi ombulu," 
Numbers26:56 mi dhoot ka dhoot noyud lowo maromre gi kar romb nying joma ondik e dhoodgi. Lowo nopog gi ombulu ni ogendni madongo gi matindo bende.” 
Numbers26:57 Jo-Lawi mondik nyinggi kochan e dhoutgi ne joka Gershon gi joka Kohath kod joka Merari. 
Numbers26:58 Dhout Lawi ne joka Libni gi joka Hebron gi joka Mali gi joka Mushi kod joka Korah. Kohath ne wuon Amram," 
Numbers26:59 to chi Amram ne nyinge Jokebed nyar Lawi, mane Lawi onywolo Misri. Jokebed nonywolo ni Amram nyithindo ma nyinggi Harun gi Musa kod Miriam ma nyamin-gi." 
Numbers26:60 Yawuot Harun ne Nadab gi Abihu gi Eleazar kod Ithamar. 
Numbers26:61 To Nadab gi Abihu notho nikech ne giyiego mach ma ok ni kare e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye. 
Numbers26:62 Kar romb jo-Lawi ma chwo, chakre ja due achiel kadhi nyime, ne alufu piero ariyo gadek. Nondik nyinggi mopogore gi dhout Israel mamoko, nikech ne ok opognigi lowo kaka ipogo ni dhout Israel mamoko." 
Numbers26:63 Mago e nying jo-Israel mane Musa gi Eleazar jadolo ondiko e piny Moab mamwalo e bath aora Jordan kama omanyore gi Jeriko. 
Numbers26:64 To onge ja-Israel moro kata achiel mane Musa gi Harun jadolo okwano e thim Sinai, mane okwan e kweno mar ariyoni," 
Numbers26:65 nimar Ruoth Nyasaye nosewacho ni nyaka githo giduto e thim. Onge ng’ato kuomgi mane pod ngima, mak mana Kaleb wuod Jefune kod Joshua wuod Nun." 
Numbers26:65 nimar Ruoth Nyasaye nosewacho ni nyaka githo giduto e thim. Onge ng’ato kuomgi mane pod ngima, mak mana Kaleb wuod Jefune kod Joshua wuod Nun." 
Numbers27:1 Bang’ kweno, nyi Zelofehad nobiro. Zelofehad ne wuod Hefer ma wuod Gilead ma wuod Makir ma wuod Manase ma wuod Josef. Nying nyirigo ne Mala gi Noa gi Hogla gi Milka kod Tirza." 
Numbers27:2 Ne gibiro e dho Hema Miromoe gi Nyasaye e nyim Musa gi Eleazar jadolo kaachiel gi jodongo kod oganda duto, mi giwacho niya," 
Numbers27:3 “Wuonwa ne otho e thim, to ne ok en achiel gi jo-Korah mane piem gi Ruoth Nyasaye. Ne otho athoya kuom richone owuon, kendo noonge gi yawuowi." 
Numbers27:4 Koro ere gimomiyo nying wuonwa dilal e dhoodgi mana nikech oonge gi wuowi? Pognwa lowo mana kaka ipogo ni omine wuonwa.” 
Numbers27:5 Kuom mano Musa notero wachgi e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye," 
Numbers27:6 mi Ruoth Nyasaye nowachone niya," 
Numbers27:7 “Gima nyi Zelofehad dwaro ni kare. Nyaka ipognigi lowo mana kaka ipogo ni omine wuon-gi. 
Numbers27:8 To wach ni jo-Israel ni ka ng’ato otho maonge wuowi, to mwandune nyaka dong’ ni nyare." 
Numbers27:9 Ka oonge gi nyako, to mwandune nyaka dong’ ni owetene." 
Numbers27:10 To ka oonge gi owetene, to mwandune dong’ ni omine wuon-gi." 
Numbers27:11 Ka wuon onge gi ominene, to mwandune dong’ ni watne moro machiegni, kendo ng’atno ema kawo. Wachni nobed chik ni jo-Israel.” Mano e kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nochiko Musa." 
Numbers27:12 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa niya, “Idh got Abarim, mondo ine piny masemiyo jo-Israel." 
Numbers27:13 Ka isenene, to ibiro tho miluw kwereni, mana kaka Harun owadu notho," 
Numbers27:14 nikech nutamoru rito chikna kane oganda jo-Israel piem koda e sokni manie thim Zin, kendo ne ok unyiso oganda ni an Ng’ama Ler.” (Mago e sokni mag Meriba man but Kadesh e thim Zin.)" 
Numbers27:15 Bang’e Musa nowacho niya,," 
Numbers27:16 “A Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach ngima, yier jatelo ni ogandani," 
Numbers27:17 mondo otel nigi e gik moko duto ma gitimo, kendo oritgi ka giwuok kendo ka giduogo dala, mondo oganda Ruoth Nyasaye kik bed ka rombe maonge jakwath.”" 
Numbers27:18 Ruoth Nyasaye nodwoko Musa niya, “Kaw Joshua wuod Nun, ng’at ma teko ni kuome, mondo iket lweti kuome," 
Numbers27:18 Ruoth Nyasaye nodwoko Musa niya, “Kaw Joshua wuod Nun, ng’at ma teko ni kuome, mondo iket lweti kuome," 
Numbers27:19 kendo ikete e nyim Eleazar jadolo gi oganda duto. Miye chik e nyimgi," 
Numbers27:20 kendo imiye tekoni moko mondo oganda jo-Israel duto oluore. 
Numbers27:21 Enobed kodhi ir Eleazar jadolo ma nobed ka goyone ombulu miluongo ni Urim, mondo ong’ego gima Ruoth Nyasaye dwaro. Oganda jo-Israel, kaachiel gi Joshua, nowuog oko kendo noduog dala, mana kaka Eleazar ochikogi.”" 
Numbers27:21 Enobed kodhi ir Eleazar jadolo ma nobed ka goyone ombulu miluongo ni Urim, mondo ong’ego gima Ruoth Nyasaye dwaro. Oganda jo-Israel, kaachiel gi Joshua, nowuog oko kendo noduog dala, mana kaka Eleazar ochikogi.”" 
Numbers27:22 Musa notimo kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nochike. Nokawo Joshua moketo e nyim Eleazar jadolo gi oganda duto," 
Numbers27:22 Musa notimo kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nochike. Nokawo Joshua moketo e nyim Eleazar jadolo gi oganda duto," 
Numbers27:23 moyieyo lwete kuome, kendo omiye chik kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nosechike." 
Numbers28:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa niya," 
Numbers28:2 Chik jo-Israel mondo ochiw gik mitimonago misengni miwang’o mondo obed chiemba madum tik mamit e kinde moketi. 
Numbers28:3 “Bende nyisgi ni misengni miwang’o ni Ruoth Nyasaye e magi: Odiechieng’ kodiechieng’ nyaka chiw nyiimbe ariyo maonge songa ma hikgi achiel achiel, mondo otimgo misango miwang’o pep." 
Numbers28:4 Nyaim achiel unutimgo misango gokinyi, to machielo unutimgo misango godhiambo mar ang’ich welo." 
Numbers28:5 Misango mar cham michiwo kodgi to nobed mogo moromo kilo adek moruw gi mo maber moromo lita ariyo. 
Numbers28:6 (Mano e misango mitimo miwang’o mitimo pile mondo odum mamit ni Ruoth Nyasaye, mane ochak tim e got Sinai.)" 
Numbers28:7 To misango miolo piny mitimego nobed divai moromo lita ariyo kuom im ka im. Nyaka uol divai makechno ei Kama Ler ka misango ni Ruoth Nyasaye. 
Numbers28:8 Nyaim machielo mutimogo misango godhiambo mar ang’ich welo nyaka chiw gi misango mar cham kod miolo piny maromre gi mago michiwo gokinyi. En misango miwang’o mondo odum tik mamit ni Ruoth Nyasaye. 
Numbers28:9 “Chieng’ sabato to nyaka uchiw nyiimbe ariyo maonge songa ma hikgi achiel achiel mondo otimgo misango. Nyaka chiwe gi misango miolo piny, mitimego kaka chik dwaro." 
Numbers28:10 Misango miwang’o pep mitimo chieng’ sabato ka sabatono nyaka utim kumedo ewi misango miwang’o pep mitimo pile, kod misango miolo piny mitimego." 
Numbers28:11 “To chieng’ due achiel mar due ka due nyaka uchiw nyiruedhi ariyo gi im achiel kod nyiimbe abiriyo ma hikgi achiel achiel mondo otimgo misango miwang’o pep. Jamnigo duto nyaka bed maonge songa. 
Numbers28:12 Misango mar cham michiwo gi nyarwath ka nyarwath nobed mogo moromo kilo apar moruw gi mo, to michiwo gi im nobed moromo kilo abiriyo," 
Numbers28:13 kendo michiwo gi nyaim ka nyaim, kilo adek. Mano en misango miwang’o pep mondo odum tik mamit ni Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Numbers28:14 Misango miolo piny mitimo gi nyarwath ka nyarwath nobed divai moromo lita ang’wen, to michiwo gi im nobed lita ariyo, kendo michiwo gi nyaim ka nyaim, lita achiel. Mano en misango miwang’o pep ma nyaka tim due ka due e higa ngima." 
Numbers28:15 Bende nyaka uchiw nywok mondo otimnigo Ruoth Nyasaye misango mar golo richo. Mano nyaka utim kumedo ewi misango miolo piny michiwego. 
Numbers28:16 “Nyaka utim Pasaka mar Ruoth Nyasaye due apar gang’wen mar due mokwongo," 
Numbers28:17 to due apar gabich unutim sawo, kendo nyaka ucham mana makati ma ok ketie thowi kuom ndalo abiriyo." 
Numbers28:18 Chieng’ mokwongo to nyaka ubed gi chokruok mar lemo, kendo ok unuti tijeu mapile chieng’no." 
Numbers28:19 Nyaka uchiw nyiruedhi ariyo gi im achiel kod nyiimbe abiriyo ma hikgi achiel achiel mondo otimgo misango miwang’o pep, madum tik mamit ni Ruoth Nyasaye. Jamnigo duto nyaka bed maonge songa." 
Numbers28:20 Misango mar cham michiwo gi nyarwath ka nyarwath nobed mogo moromo kilo apar moruw gi mo," 
Numbers28:21 to michiwo gi im nobed kilo abiriyo, to michiwo gi nyaim ka nyaim, kilo adek." 
Numbers28:22 Bende nyaka uchiw nywok mondo otimgo misango mar golo richo, upwodhrugo." 
Numbers28:23 Mago duto nyaka uchiw kumedo ewi misango miwang’o pep mitimo gokinyi pile. 
Numbers28:24 Unutim misengnigo pile nyaka chieng’ mar abiriyo. En misango mitimo mondo obed chiemo madum tik mamit ni Ruoth Nyasaye. Nyaka uchiwe kumedo ewi misango miwang’o pep mitimo pile, kod misango miolo piny michiwego." 
Numbers28:25 Chieng’ mar abiriyo bende nyaka ubed gi chokruok maler, kendo ok unuti tijeu mapile." 
Numbers28:26 “Chieng’ muchiwoe chamb gwel, ka ukelo ni Ruoth Nyasaye chiwo mar cham manyien e Sap Jumbe, to nyaka ubed gi chokruok maler, kendo ok nuti tijeu mapile." 
Numbers28:27 Unuchiw nyiruedhi ariyo gi im achiel kod nyiimbe abiriyo ma hikgi achiel achiel mondo otimgo misango miwang’o pep madum mamit ni Ruoth Nyasaye. 
Numbers28:28 Misango mar cham michiwo gi nyarwath ka nyarwath nobed mogo moromo kilo apar moruw gi mo, to michiwo gi im nobed kilo abiriyo," 
Numbers28:29 kendo michiwo gi nyaim ka nyaim, kilo adek." 
Numbers28:30 Bende nyaka uchiw nywok mondo otimgo misango mar golo richo, upwodhrugo." 
Numbers28:31 Jamnigo duto nyaka bed maonge songa, kendo misengnigo duto nyaka utim kumedo ewi misengni miwang’o pep mitimo pile, kaachiel gi misango miolo piny michiwogigo." 
Numbers29:1 “Due achiel due mar abiriyo, nyaka ubed gi chokruok mar lemo, kendo ok unuti tijeu mapile. Mano en chieng’ mor mugoyoe tung.’" 
Numbers29:2 Unuchiw nyarwath achiel gi im achiel kod nyiimbe abiriyo ma hikgi achiel achiel mondo otimgo misango miwang’o pep madum tik mamit ni Ruoth Nyasaye. Jamnigo duto nyaka bed maonge songa. 
Numbers29:3 To misango mar cham michiwo gi nyarwath nobed mogo moromo kilo apar moruw gi mo, to michiwo gi im nobed kilo abiriyo," 
Numbers29:4 kendo michiwo gi nyaim ka nyaim, kilo adek." 
Numbers29:5 Bende nyaka uchiw nywok mondo otimgo misango mar golo richo, upwodhrugo." 
Numbers29:6 Mago duto nyaka utim kumedo ewi misango miwang’o pep mitimo due ka due, kendo mitimo pile, kaachiel gi misengni mag cham gi miolo piny, michiwogigo kaka chik dwaro. En misango miwang’o mondo odum tik mamit ni Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Numbers29:7 “Due apar due mar abiriyono nyaka ubed gi chokruok maler, kendo nyaka usandru kuriyo kech, bende kik uti tich moro amora." 
Numbers29:8 Unuchiw nyarwath achiel gi im achiel kod nyiimbe abiriyo ma hikgi achiel achiel mondo otimgo misango miwang’o pep madum tik mamit ni Ruoth Nyasaye. Jamnigo duto nyaka bed maonge songa. 
Numbers29:9 Misango mar cham michiwo gi nyarwath nobed mogo moromo kilo apar moruw gi mo, to michiwo gi im nobed kilo abiriyo," 
Numbers29:10 kendo michiwo gi nyaim, kilo adek." 
Numbers29:11 Bende nyaka uchiw nywok mondo otimgo misango mar golo richo, kumedo ewi misango mipwodhogo richo, kod misango miwang’o pep mitimo pile, kaachiel gi misango mar cham kod miolo piny michiwo kodgi." 
Numbers29:12 “Due apar gabich due mar abiriyo, nyaka ubed gi chokruok mar lemo. Ok unuti tijeu mapile, to nyaka utim ni Ruoth Nyasaye sawo kuom ndalo abiriyo." 
Numbers29:13 Unuchiw nyiruedhi apar gadek gi imbe ariyo kod nyiimbe apar gang’wen ma hikgi achiel achiel, mondo otimgo misango miwang’o pep madum tik mamit ni Ruoth Nyasaye. Jamnigo duto nyaka bed maonge songa." 
Numbers29:14 Misango mar cham michiwo gi nyarwath ka nyarwath nobed mogo moromo kilo apar moruw gi mo, to michiwo gi im ka im nobed kilo abiriyo," 
Numbers29:15 kendo michiwo gi nyaim ka nyaim, kilo adek." 
Numbers29:16 Bende nyaka uchiw nywok mondo otimgo misango mar golo richo, kumedo ewi misango miwang’o pep mitimo pile, kaachiel gi misango mar cham kod miolo piny michiwego." 
Numbers29:17 “Chieng’ mar ariyo unuchiw nyiruedhi apar gariyo gi imbe ariyo kod nyiimbe apar gang’we ma hikgi achiel achiel mondo otimgo misango. Jamnigo duto nyaka bed maonge songa. 
Numbers29:18 Misengni mag cham kod miolo piny nyaka bed moketi kaka chik dwaro, maromre gi kar romb jamnigo." 
Numbers29:19 Bende nyaka uchiw nywok achiel mondo otimgo misango mar golo richo, kumedo ewi misango miwang’o pep mitimo pile, kod misango mar cham gi miolo piny michiwego." 
Numbers29:20 “Chieng’ mar adek unuchiw ruedhi apar gachiel gi imbe ariyo kod nyiimbe apar gang’wen ma hikgi achiel achiel mondo otimgo misango. Jamnigo duto nyaka bed maonge gi songa. 
Numbers29:21 Misengni mag cham kod miolo piny nyaka bed moketi kaka chik dwaro, maromre gi kar romb jamnigo." 
Numbers29:22 Bende nyaka uchiw nywok achiel mondo otimgo misango mar golo richo, kumedo ewi misango miwang’o pep mitimo pile, kod misango mar cham gi miolo piny michiwego." 
Numbers29:23 “Chieng’ mar ang’wen unuchiw ruedhi apar gi imbe ariyo kod nyiimbe apar gang’wen ma hikgi achiel achiel mondo timgo misango. Jamnigo duto nyaka bed maonge songa. 
Numbers29:24 Misengni mag cham kod miolo piny nyaka bed moketi kaka chik dwaro, maromre gi kar romb jamnigo." 
Numbers29:25 Bende nyaka uchiw nywok achiel mondo otimgo misango mar golo richo, kumedo ewi misango miwang’o pep mitimo pile, kod misango mar cham gi miolo piny michiwego." 
Numbers29:26 “Chieng’ mar abich unuchiw ruedhi ochiko gi imbe ariyo kod nyiimbe apar gang’wen ma hikgi achiel achiel mondo otimgo misango. Jamnigo duto nyaka bed maonge songa. 
Numbers29:27 Misengni mag cham kod miolo piny nyaka bed moketi kaka chik dwaro, maromre gi kar romb jamnigo." 
Numbers29:28 Bende nyaka uchiw nywok achiel mondo otimgo misango mar golo richo, kumedo ewi misango miwang’o pep mitimo pile, kod misango mar cham gi miolo piny michiwego." 
Numbers29:29 “Chieng’ mar auchiel unuchiw ruedhi aboro gi imbe ariyo kod nyiimbe apar gang’wen ma hikgi achiel achiel mondo otimgo misango. Jamnigo duto nyaka bed maonge songa. 
Numbers29:30 Misengni mag cham kod miolo piny nyaka bed moketi kaka chik dwaro, maromre gi kar romb jamnigo." 
Numbers29:31 Bende nyaka uchiw nywok achiel mondo timgo misango mar golo richo kumede ewi misango miwang’o pep mitimo pile, kod misango mar cham gi misango miolo piny michiwego." 
Numbers29:32 “Chieng’’ mar abiriyo unuchiw ruedhi abiriyo gi imbe ariyo kod nyiimbe apar gang’wen ma hikgi achiel achiel mondo otimgo misango. Jamnigo duto nyaka bed maonge songa. 
Numbers29:33 Misengni mag cham kod miolo piny nyaka bed moketi kaka chik dwaro, maromre gi kar romb jamnigo." 
Numbers29:34 Bende nyaka uchiw nywok achiel mondo otimgo misango mar golo richo kumedo ewi misango miwang’o pep mitimo pile, kod misango mar cham gi misango miolo piny michiwego." 
Numbers29:35 “Chieng’ mar aboro unutim nyasi mitiekogo chokruok, kendo ok unuti tijeu mapile." 
Numbers29:36 Nyaka uchiw rwath achiel gi im achiel kod nyimbe abiriyo ma hikgi achiel achiel, mondo otimgo misango miwang’o pep madum tik mamit ni Ruoth Nyasaye. Jamnigo duto nyaka bed maonge songa." 
Numbers29:37 Misengni mag cham kod miolo piny michiwogo ruedhi gi imbe kod nyiimbe nyaka bed moketi kaka chik dwaro maromre gi kar romb jamnigo. 
Numbers29:38 Bende nyaka uchiw nywok achiel mondo otimgo misango mar golo richo, kumedoe misango miwang’o pep mitimo pile, kod misango mar cham gi miolo piny michiwego." 
Numbers29:39 “Mago e misengni ma nyaka utim ni Ruoth Nyasaye e sewni moketi, kumedo ewi misengni muchopogo kuong’ruok, gi muchiwo kuom herou, gi miwang’o pep gi mag cham gi miolo piny kod mag sawo.”" 
Numbers29:40 Musa nonyiso jo-Israel mana kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nochike. 
Numbers30:1 Musa nowacho ni jotend jo-Israel niya," 
Numbers30:2 “Ruoth Nyasaye ochiko kama: Ka ng’ato osingore ni Ruoth Nyasaye kata okuong’orene, to kik olokre. Gimoro amora mowacho gi dhoge, to nyaka otim." 
Numbers30:3 “Ka nyaka matin ma pod nie odgi osingore ni Ruoth Nyasaye, kata okuong’orene," 
Numbers30:4 kendo wuon mare owinjo singruokno kata kuong’ruokno, to ok owachone gimoro, kuong’ruokneno nyaka siki." 
Numbers30:5 To ka wuon odagi wachno chieng’ mowinjeeno, to kuong’ruokgo duto ok nyal mako nyakono. Ruoth Nyasaye nowene nikech wuon mare osedagi." 
Numbers30:6 “To ka nyako okendi kapod kuong’ruok omake, kata ka wach mane owacho piyopiyo ka ok oparo pod otweye," 
Numbers30:7 to eka bang’e chwore owinjo to oling’ aling’a to kuong’ruokno nyaka siki. 
Numbers30:8 To ka chwore odagi kuong’ruokno chieng’ mowinjoe wach mi oketho kuong’ruok, to kuong’ruokno ok nyal mako dhakono, to Ruoth Nyasaye nowene." 
Numbers30:9 “Kuong’ruok moro amora ma chi liel kata dhako ma chwore oriembo okuong’orego nyaka siki. 
Numbers30:10 To ka dhako okuong’ore kata otuere gi kuong’ruok," 
Numbers30:11 to eka bang’e chwore owinjo to oling’ aling’a mi ok odagi wachno, to kuong’ruokgo duto nyaka siki." 
Numbers30:12 To ka chwore odagi kuong’ruokgo ratiro kowinjogi, to onge gimoro amora mane chiege owacho ma nomake, bed ni en kuong’ruok kata singruok. Chwore osekethogi, omiyo Ruoth Nyasaye nowene." 
Numbers30:13 “Chwor dhako nyalo guro kata ketho singruok kata kuong’ruok ma chiege dwaro sandorego. 
Numbers30:14 To ka dichwo oling’ chieng’no kod kinyne, to mano nyiso ni oyie gi singruok kata kuong’ruok mane chiege otuerego. Ginisiki, nikech ka ne owinjogi, to noling’." 
Numbers30:15 To kolokore mana achien, modagi kosewinjogi, to ketho mar chiege nobed mare, kendo nyaka ochul.”" 
Numbers30:16 Mago chike mane Ruoth Nyasaye omiyo Musa kuom dichwo gi dhako kendo kuom wuon nyako gi nyare matin ma pod ni e odgi. 
Numbers31:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa niya," 
Numbers31:2 “Inimi jo-Israel chul kuor ni jo-Midian. Bang’ mano ibiro tho, miluw kwereni.”" 
Numbers31:3 Omiyo Musa nowacho ni jo-Israel niya, “Yieruru jou moko, mondo odhi oked gi jo-Midian, ochulnigi kuor e nying Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Numbers31:4 Nyaka ugol ji alufu achiel achiel e dhoot ka dhoot mar Israel.” 
Numbers31:5 Kamano noluong jo-Israel alufu apar gariyo moikore ni lweny, ka ogol ji alufu achiel achiel e dhoot ka dhoot." 
Numbers31:6 Musa nooro jolwenygo gi Finehas wuod Eleazar jadolo mane oting’o gik lemo mag Kama Ler kod tunge migoyo mondo ji ogo sigich lweny. Ji alufu achiel achiel noa e dhoot ka dhoot. 
Numbers31:7 Ne gikedo gi jo-Midian kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nochiko Musa, mi ginego jogi machwo duto." 
Numbers31:8 To bende ne ginego Evi gi Rekem gi Zur gi Hur kod Reba, mane ruodhi abich mag Midian, kaachiel gi Balaam wuod Beor." 
Numbers31:9 Jo-Israel nomako mond jo-Midian gi nyithindgi, kendo ne giyako jambgi kod mwandugi duto." 
Numbers31:10 Ne giwang’o miechgi duto, kod kuondegi mag buoro." 
Numbers31:11 Bang’e ne gikawo jamni kod gik moko duto mane giyako, kaachiel gi joma ne gimako," 
Numbers31:12 mi gitero ir Musa gi Eleazar jadolo kod oganda jo-Israel e kambi mane ni e piny Moab mamwalo but aora Jordan kama omanyore gi Jeriko. 
Numbers31:13 Musa gi Eleazar jadolo gi jodong oganda duto nodhi romo ni jolwenygo e dho kambi oko. 
Numbers31:14 To Musa nokecho gi jotend ogend lweny madongo gi matindo mane duogo koa e lweny," 
Numbers31:15 mopenjogi niya, “Ere gimomiyo useweyo mon-gi mak unego?" 
Numbers31:16 Donge ung’eyo ni kane Balaam osea gweng’ Peor, to mon-go ema nobet kawuondo jo-Israel mondo owe Ruoth Nyasaye, mi mano nomiyo tho ogoyo oganda Ruoth Nyasaye?" 
Numbers31:17 Emomiyo neguru nyithindo machwo duto, kaachiel gi mon duto," 
Numbers31:18 to uwe nyiri ma pok ong’eyo chwo, mondo ukaw." 
Numbers31:19 To ng’ato ka ng’ato kuomu moseneko, kata mosemulo ng’at motho, nyaka dong’ oko mar kambi kuom ndalo abiriyo. Gudreuru chieng’ mar adek kod chieng’ mar abiriyo, kendo upwodh joma umako e lweny." 
Numbers31:20 Bende pwodhuru lewni duto gi gimoro amora molos gi pien, kata gi yie diel mokadi, kata gi bao.”" 
Numbers31:21 Eleazar jadolo nowacho ni jolweny mane dwogo koa e lweny niya, “Ma e chik achiel kuom chike mane Ruoth Nyasaye omiyo Musa." 
Numbers31:22 Gimoro amora manyalo tamo mach wang’o, kaka dhahabu gi fedha gi mula gi nyinyo gi opanga kod lisasi, nyaka uketi e mach, eka obed maler. To kata kamano nyaka pwodhgi gi pi mar pwodhruok. Bende gimoro amora ma mach nyalo ketho nyaka lwok e pigno." 
Numbers31:23  
Numbers31:24 Chieng’ mar abiriyo nyaka ulwok lepu, mi ubed maler, eka bang’e unyalo duogo e kambi.”" 
Numbers31:25 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa niya," 
Numbers31:26 “Un gi Eleazar jadolo kod jodong dhout oganda mondo ukwan jamni gi gik moko moyaki, kaachiel gi joma omak e lweny." 
Numbers31:27 Bang’e poguru gigo maromre e kind jolweny mane odhi kedo, kod ji duto mane odong’." 
Numbers31:28 Kuom mago mopogni jolweny, ugolie achiel kuom mia abich abich, bed ni gin ji kata dhok kata kenje kata rombe, mondo obed chiwo momi Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Numbers31:29 Gik mugolo kuom pok jolwenygo nyaka mi Eleazar jadolo kaka chiwo ni Ruoth Nyasaye. 
Numbers31:30 To kuom gik mopog ni jo-Israel modong’, ugolie achiel kuom piero abich abich, bed ni gin ji kata dhok kata kenje kata rombe, omi jo-Lawi ma jorit Hema Maler mar Ruoth Nyasaye.”" 
Numbers31:31 Musa gi Eleazar jadolo ne jotimo kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nochiko Musa. 
Numbers31:32 To gik moyaki, ka ok okwan mago mane jolweny okawo e magi: Rombe alufu mia auchiel gi piero abiriyo gabich (675,000)" 
Numbers31:33 gi dhok alufu piero abiriyo gariyo," 
Numbers31:34 kod kenje alufu piero auchiel gachiel," 
Numbers31:35 kaachiel gi nyiri alufu piero adek gariyo ma pok ong’eyo chwo. 
Numbers31:36 Kamano gik mane omi joma ne okedo e lweny 
Numbers31:37 ne rombe alufu mia adek gi piero adek gabiriyo kod mia abich, (337,500)" 
Numbers31:38 gi dhok alufu piero adek gauchiel," 
Numbers31:39 kod kenje alufu piero adek gi mia abich," 
Numbers31:40 kaachiel gi ji alufu apar gauchiel. Kuom mano, pok mane ogol mondo ochiw ni Ruoth Nyasaye ne rombe piero abiriyo gariyo, gi dhok mia auchiel gi piero abiriyo gabich, kod kenje piero auchiel gachiel, kaachiel gi ji piero adek gariyo." 
Numbers31:41 Musa nomiyo Eleazar jadolo pok mane ogol ni Ruoth Nyasaye, kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nochike." 
Numbers31:42 To gik mane odong’ ni jo-Israel, tiende ni mago mane Musa oketo tenge komiyo jolweny pokgi," 
Numbers31:43 ne rombe alufu mia adek gi piero adek gabiriyo gi mia abich, (337,500)" 
Numbers31:44 gi dhok alufu piero adek gauchiel 
Numbers31:45 kod kenje alufu piero adek gi mia abich," 
Numbers31:46 kaachiel gi ji alufu apar gauchiel. 
Numbers31:47 Kuom gik mane opogni oganda jo-Israelgo, Musa nogolo achiel kuom piero abich abich, bed ni gin ji kata jamni, momiyo jo-Lawi mane jorit Hema Maler mar Ruoth Nyasaye kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nochike." 
Numbers31:48 Bang’e jotend ogend lweny madongo gi matindo nobiro ir Musa," 
Numbers31:49 nowachone niya, “Jaduong’, wasekwano jolweny mawa duto mwayudo ni gintie gite." 
Numbers31:50 Kuom mano wasekelo gik molos gi dhahabu mane wayako, kaka thiwni gi manyonge gi tere gi stadi kod tigo, mondo wachiw ni Ruoth Nyasaye ka gik mwawarogo ngimawa.”" 
Numbers31:51 Eka Musa gi Eleazar jadolo nokawo gik molos gi dhahabugo kuom jotelo madongo gi matindo. 
Numbers31:52 Pek chiwo mar dhahabu mane gimiyo Ruoth Nyasaye noromo kilo mia ariyo," 
Numbers31:53 nimar jalweny ka jalweny noseyako. 
Numbers31:54 Kamano Musa gi Eleazar jadolo noyudo dhahabu kuom jotend ogend lweny madongo gi matindo, mi ne gikelo e Hema Miromoe gi Nyasaye mondo Ruoth Nyasaye opargo jo-Israel." 
Numbers32:1 Jo-Reuben kod jo-Gad ne nigi jamni mang’eny, kendo kane gineno ka piny Jazer kod piny Gilead nigi lege mabeyo," 
Numbers32:2 ne gibiro ir Musa gi Eleazar jadolo kod jodong oganda, mi giwacho nigi niya," 
Numbers32:3 “Piny moting’o Ataroth gi Dibon gi Jazer gi Nimra gi Heshbon gi Eleale gi Sebam gi Nebo kod Beon 
Numbers32:4 ma Ruoth Nyasaye osekawo ka jo-Israel neno, en piny man gi lek maber mar jamni, kendo ung’eyo ni wan jopith jamni." 
Numbers32:5 Kuom mano ka uyie kodwa, to miwauru pinyno obed marwa. Kik wang’ad aora Jordan.”" 
Numbers32:6 To Musa nopenjo jo-Gad kod jo-Reubengo niya, “Udwaro ni mondo joweteu odhi oked e lweny ka un to udong’ ka?" 
Numbers32:7 Ere gimomiyo unyoso chuny jo-Israel mondo kik ng’ad loka, odhi e piny ma Ruoth Nyasaye osemiyogi?" 
Numbers32:8 Mano e gima ne wuoneu otimo kane aorogi ka wan Kadesh-barnea mondo gidhi gicheng piny Kanaan. 
Numbers32:9 Ne gidhi mi gichengo pinyno nyaka holo mar Eshkol, to kane gidwogo ne ginyoso chuny jo-Israel ni ok ginyal dhi kawo piny mane Ruoth Nyasaye osemiyogi." 
Numbers32:10 Mirima mager nomako Ruoth Nyasaye chieng’no, mi okuong’ore niya," 
Numbers32:11 ‘Jo-Israel osedagi luwa gi chunygi duto, omiyo onge kata ng’ato achiel ma jahigni piero ariyo kata mokadho kanyo mane owuok Misri, ma none piny mane asingora ni Ibrahim gi Isaka kod Jakobo." 
Numbers32:12 Kaleb wuod Jefune ja-Kenizi, kod Joshua wuod Nun kende ema nodonj e pinyno, nikech giseluwo Ruoth Nyasaye gi chunygi duto.’" 
Numbers32:12 Kaleb wuod Jefune ja-Kenizi, kod Joshua wuod Nun kende ema nodonj e pinyno, nikech giseluwo Ruoth Nyasaye gi chunygi duto.’" 
Numbers32:13 Ruoth Nyasaye nokecho gi jo-Israel mi ne omiyo gidigni e thim kuom higni piero ang’wen-gi, nyaka tieng’ mane oketho e nyimeno otho duto." 
Numbers32:14 Koro kendo uluwo mana timbe wuoneu! Un joma timbegi richo, ma pod biro mana medo mirimb Ruoth Nyasaye kuom jo-Israel," 
Numbers32:15 nimar ka udagi luwe, to obiro jwang’o oganda jo-Israel duto e thim, kendo un ema ubiro miyo girum.”" 
Numbers32:16 Bang’ kinde matin ne gidwogo ir Musa, mi giwacho niya, “Wadwaro gero abilni ni jambwa ka, kod mier mondo mondwa gi nyithindwa odagie." 
Numbers32:17 Bang’e wanyalo dhi e lweny mondo waked ka watelo ni jo-Israel, nyaka chop gikaw piny ma gidhi dakie. To e kinde ma pod wadhi kedo, mondwa gi nyithindwa nyalo dak e mier mochiel motegno gi ohinga ma jopinyni ok nyal monjogie." 
Numbers32:18 Ok wanaduogi ka pok ja-Israel ka ja-Israel oyudo lowo mopogne. 
Numbers32:19 Wan ok wadwar mondo opognwa piny kodgi loka machielo mar aora Jordan, nikech osepognwa lopwa yo wuokchieng’ mar Jordan lokani.”" 
Numbers32:20 Musa nodwokogi niya, “Ka unyalo rito singruok musesingorugoni, mi uyie kedo e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye," 
Numbers32:21 kendo jou duto ma jolweny ong’ado aora Jordan e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, mi gibet kuno nyaka chop Ruoth Nyasaye riemb wasike," 
Numbers32:22 mokawo pinyno, to un udwog ka, kendo unubed maonge ketho e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye kendo e nyim jo-Israel, mi pinyni nobed maru e nyim Ruloth Nyasaye." 
Numbers32:23 To ng’euru ni ka ok utimo kamano, to unubed joketho e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo richou nokelnu kum." 
Numbers32:24 Kuom mano, geruru mier ni mondu kod nyithindu, kendo uger abilni ni jambu, to nyaka utim mana kaka usesingoru!”" 
Numbers32:25 Jo-Gad gi jo-Reuben nodwoko Musa niya, “Jaduong’ wan jogi omiyo wabiro timo kaka ichikowa." 
Numbers32:26 Nyithindwa gi mondwa kod jambwa duto biro dong’ e miech Gilead ka," 
Numbers32:27 to jowa duto ma jolweny biro ng’ado aora mondo odhi oked e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye kaka isechiko.” 
Numbers32:28 Kuom mano, Musa nochiko Eleazar jadolo gi Joshua wuod Nun kod jodong dhout Israel niya," 
Numbers32:28 Kuom mano, Musa nochiko Eleazar jadolo gi Joshua wuod Nun kod jodong dhout Israel niya," 
Numbers32:29 “Ka jo-Gad gi jo-Reuben duto ma jolweny ong’ado aora Jordan kodu mondo oked e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, mi ukawo pinyno, to nyaka upognigi piny Gilead." 
Numbers32:30 To ka ok ging’ado aora mi gidhi e lweny kodu, to upognigi lowo e piny Kanaan.”" 
Numbers32:31 Jo-Gad gi jo-Reuben nodwoko niya, “Jaduong’, wabiro timo mana kaka Ruoth Nyasaye osechikowa." 
Numbers32:32 Waduto mwaromo dhi e kedo wabiro ng’ado loka cha e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, to lopwa nobed mana loka Jordan koni.”" 
Numbers32:33 Omiyo Musa nomiyo jo-Gad gi jo-Reuben kod nus jo-Manase wuod Josef piny Sihon ruodh jo-Amor, gi piny Og ruodh Bashan duto, kaachiel gi miechgi kod gwenge mokiewo kodgi." 
Numbers32:34 Jo-Gad nogero Dibon gi Ataroth gi Aroer," 
Numbers32:35 gi Atroth-safan gi Jazar gi Jogbeha 
Numbers32:36 gi Bethnimra kod Bethharan, duto mier mochiel motegno gi ohinga, kendo ogerie abilni mag jamni." 
Numbers32:37 Jo-Reuben to nogero Heshbon gi Eleale gi Kiriathaim 
Numbers32:38 gi Nebo gi Baal-meon, (mane nyinge oloki) kod Sibma. Mago e nying mane gichako mier mane gigerogo." 
Numbers32:39 Joka Makir wuod Manase to nomonjo piny Gilead, mokawo, kendo ne giriembo jo-Amor mane oyudo odakie." 
Numbers32:40 Eka Musa nomiyo joka Makir wuod Manase piny Gilead, mi gidak kuno." 
Numbers32:41 Jair nyakwar Manase, to nomonjo miech Ham, mi okawo, kendo ochako ni Havoth-jair, (tiende ni, miech Jair.)" 
Numbers32:42 Noba to nomonjo Kenath gi mier matindo mokiewo kode, mi ne ochake ni Noba, nyinge owuon." 
Numbers33:1 Kane Musa gi Harun otelo ni jo-Israel e dhoutgi ka giwuok e piny Misri," 
Numbers33:2 Musa nondiko nying kuonde mane gibworoe mana kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nochiko, kendo magi e kuonde mane gibworoe gogo:" 
Numbers33:3 Jo-Israel noa Ramases chieng’ due apar gabich mar due mokwongo, ma en chieng’ maluwo chieng’ Pasaka. Ne giwuok ka jo-Misri nenogi, to ne ok gidewo." 
Numbers33:4 Jo-Misri noyudo yiko nyithindgi makayo duto mane Ruoth Nyasaye onego, kang’adogo bura ni nyisechegi." 
Numbers33:5 Jo-Israel noa Ramases, modhi oguro kambi Sukoth." 
Numbers33:6 Eka ne gia Sukoth, mi gidhi giguro kambi Etham e bath thim." 
Numbers33:7 Ne gia Etham, mi gidok chien but Pihahiroth, yo wuok chieng’ mar Baal-Zefon, mi giguro kambi kama omanyore gi Migdol." 
Numbers33:8 Bang’e ne gia Pihahiroth, mi ging’ado nam nyaka thim, kendo ne giwuotho kuom ndalo adek e thim Etham, mi giguro kambi kamoro miluongo ni Marah." 
Numbers33:9 Ka gia Marah, ne gidhi Elim kuma ne giyudoe sokni apar gariyo mag pi kod yiend othidhe piero abiriyo, mi giguro kambi kuno." 
Numbers33:10 Eka ne gia Elim, mi giguro kambi e bath Nam Makwar." 
Numbers33:11 Ne gia e bath Nam Makwar, mi gidhi giguro kambi e thim Sin." 
Numbers33:12 Bang’e ne gia kanyo mi gidhi giguro kambi Dofka. 
Numbers33:13 Ne gia Dofka, mi gidhi giguro kambi Alush." 
Numbers33:14 Kane gia Alush, ne gidhi mi giguro kambi Refidim, kuma ne onge pi ma ji modhi." 
Numbers33:15 Eka ne gia Refidim, mi gidhi giguro kambi e thim Sinai." 
Numbers33:16 Ne gia e thim Sinai, mi gidhi giguro kambi Kibroth-hatava." 
Numbers33:17 Bange ne gia Kibroth-hatava mi gidhi giguro kambi Hezeroth. 
Numbers33:18 Ne gia Hezeroth, mi gidhi giguro kambi Rithma." 
Numbers33:19 Eka ne gia Rithma, mi gidhi giguro kambi Rimon-parez." 
Numbers33:20 Ne gia Rimon-parez, mi gidhi giguro kambi Libna." 
Numbers33:21 Bang’e ne gia Libna, mi gidhi giguro kambi Risa." 
Numbers33:22 Ne gia Risa mi gidhi giguro kambi Kehelatha. 
Numbers33:23 Ne gia Kehelatha, mi gidhi giguro kambi e Got Shafer." 
Numbers33:24 Kane gia got Shafer, ne gidhi mi giguro kambi Harada." 
Numbers33:25 Eka ne gia Harada, mi gidhi giguro kambi Makeloth." 
Numbers33:26 Bang’e ne gia Makeloth, mi gidhi giguro kambi Tahath." 
Numbers33:27 Ne gia Tahath, mi gidhi giguro kambi Tara." 
Numbers33:28 Ne gia Tara, mi gidhi giguro kambi Mithka." 
Numbers33:29 Eka ne gia Mithka, mi gidhi giguro kambi Hashmona." 
Numbers33:30 Ne gia Hashmona, mi gidhi giguro kambi Moseroth." 
Numbers33:31 Bang’e ne gia Moseroth, mi gidhi giguro kambi Bene-jaakan." 
Numbers33:32 Ne gia Bene-jaakan, mi gidhi giguro kambi Horhagidgad." 
Numbers33:33 Kane gia Horhagidgad, ne gidhi mi giguro kambi Jotbatha." 
Numbers33:34 Ne gia Jotbatha, mi gidhi giguro kambi Ebrona." 
Numbers33:35 Eka ne gia Ebrona, mi gidhi giguro kambi Ezion-geber." 
Numbers33:36 Ne gia Ezion-geber, mi gidhi giguro kambi e thim Zin, ma en thim Kadesh." 
Numbers33:37 Ne gia Kadesh, mi gidhi giguro kambi e got Hur, manie tong’ piny Edom." 
Numbers33:38 Eka Harun jadolo noidho got Hor kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nochike, mi otho kuno due achiel, due mar abich e higa mar piero ang’wen bang’ wuok jo-Israel e piny Misri." 
Numbers33:39 Ne en jahigni mia achiel gi piero ariyo kane otho kuno. 
Numbers33:40 Ruodh Arad ma ja-Kanaan, mane odak yo milambo mar piny Kanaan, nowinjo ni jo-Israel biro." 
Numbers33:41 Kane gia got Hor ne gidhi mi giguro kambi Zalmona. 
Numbers33:42 Ne gia Zalmona, mi gidhi giguro kambi Punon." 
Numbers33:43 Eka ne gia Punon, mi gidhi giguro kambi Oboth." 
Numbers33:44 Ne gia Oboth, mi gidhi giguro kambi Iye-Abarim e tong’ piny Moab." 
Numbers33:45 Bang’e ne gia Iyim, gidhi giguro kambi Dibon-gad." 
Numbers33:46 Kane gia Dibon-gad, ne gidhi mi gidhi giguro kambi Almon-diblathaim." 
Numbers33:47 Ne gia Almon-diblathaim, mi gidhi giguro kambi e gode mag Abarim, yo wuok chieng’ mar Nebo." 
Numbers33:48 Ne gia e gode mag Abarim, mi gidhi giguro kambi e piny Moab, mamwalo e bath aora Jordan, kama omanyore gi Jeriko." 
Numbers33:49 Kambigino nochakore Beth-Jeshimoth, moyarore nyaka Abel-shitim e piny Moab ma mwalo." 
Numbers33:50 Ruoth Nyasaye nowuoyo gi Musa e piny Moab mamwalo e bath aora Jordan, kama omanyore gi Jeriko," 
Numbers33:51 mowachone mondo onyis jo-Israel niya, “Koro uchiegni ng’ado aora Jordan mondo udonj e piny Kanaan." 
Numbers33:52 Nyaka uriemb ji duto modak e pinyno mondo owenu thuolo, kendo uketh kido maggi mopa kod mag mula moleny" 
Numbers33:53 Kawuru pinyni mi udagie, nimar asemiyougo mondo obed maru." 
Numbers33:54 Nyaka upoge gi ombulu e kind dhoutu, mondo dhoot ka dhoot oyud lope. Dhoot maduong’ nyaka yud lowo maduong’ to dhoot matin nyaka yud matin. Pognigiuru mana kaka ombulu owacho, ka dhoot ka dhoot kendo joot ka joot yudo lopgi." 
Numbers33:55 To ka ok uriembo joma odak e pinyno mondo owenu thuolo, to joma uweyogo nobednu kaka pedo mandhodho wang’u, kendo ka kudho machwowo dendu. Ginibed ka gilaro kodu piny mudakieno," 
Numbers33:56 kendo gima naparo timonigi, ema natimnu.”" 
Numbers34:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa 
Numbers34:2 mondo onyis jo-Israel niya, “Koro uchiegni donjo e piny Kanaan, momiu mondo obed mwandu nyaka chieng’. En piny Kanaanno duto, ma tong’ne chalo kama:" 
Numbers34:3 pinyu man yo milambo nochakre e thim Zin manie tong’ piny Edom. Tong’u ma yo milambo mogik yo wuok chieng’ nobed giko mar nam Kado. 
Numbers34:4 Eka kochopo yo milambo mar pith Akrabim, to nogom mokadh Zin, kendo gikone ma yo milambo nobed Kadesh-barnea. Eka nochom Hazar, mochop Azmon," 
Numbers34:5 kendo nogom kochomo aora manie tong’ piny Misri, mi nogik e Nam Mediterenia." 
Numbers34:6 “Tong’u ma yo podho chieng’ to nobed Nam Mediterenia, gi dho namno. Mano ema nobed tong’u ma yo podho chieng’." 
Numbers34:7 “To tong’u ma yo nyandwat nobed koa e Nam Mediterenia kochomo got Hor tir," 
Numbers34:8 kendo koa got Hor, nochom kama idonjogo Hamath, mi nogik Zadad." 
Numbers34:9 Eka noa kanyo kochomo Zifron, mi nodhi ogik Hazer-enan. Mano ema nobed tong’u ma yo nyandwat." 
Numbers34:10 “Tong’u ma yo wuok chieng’ noa Hazar-enan kochomo Shefam tir. 
Numbers34:11 Bang’e noridre koa Shefam nyaka Ribla yo wuok chieng’ mar Ain, molor nyaka gode man yo wuok chieng’ mar Nam Galili." 
Numbers34:12 Eka nomed lor nyaka aora Jordan, mi ogik e Nam Kado. Kamano piny duto ma tong’go olworo nobed maru.”" 
Numbers34:13 Bang’e Musa nochiko jo-Israel kama: “Mano e piny ma ubiro pogo gi ombulu, mondo dhoot ka dhoot oyud lope. En piny ma Ruoth Nyasaye osechiko ni mondo omi dhoudi ochiko gi nus," 
Numbers34:14 nikech jo-Reuben gi jo-Gad kod nus jo-Manase oseyudo pinygi, dhoot ka dhoot." 
Numbers34:15 Dhoudi ariyo gi nusgo oseyudo pinygi loka aora Jordan koni, yo wuok chieng’ mar Jeriko.”" 
Numbers34:16 Eka Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa niya," 
Numbers34:17 “Joma biro konyi pogo pinyno e magi: Eleazar jadolo kod Joshua wuod Nun. 
Numbers34:17 “Joma biro konyi pogo pinyno e magi: Eleazar jadolo kod Joshua wuod Nun. 
Numbers34:18 To bende nyaka ikaw jotend dhoot ka dhoot mondo okonyi e tijno," 
Numbers34:19 kendo magi e nyinggi: E dhood jo-Juda en Kaleb wuod Jefune. 
Numbers34:20 E dhood jo-Simeon en Samuel wuod Amihud," 
Numbers34:21 to e dhood jo-Benjamin en Elidad wuod Kislon. 
Numbers34:22 E dhood jo-Dan to jatelo nobed Buki wuod Jogli. 
Numbers34:23 Kuom joka Josef, jatend dhood Manase nobed Haniel wuod Efod," 
Numbers34:24 to jatend dhood Efraim nobed Kemuel wuod Shiftan. 
Numbers34:25 E dhood jo-Zebulun to jatelo nobed Elizafan wuod Parnak," 
Numbers34:26 to e dhood jo-Isakar jatelo nobed Paltiel wuod Azan. 
Numbers34:27 E dhood jo-Asher, jatelo nobed Ahihud wuod Shelomi," 
Numbers34:28 to e dhood jo-Naftali, jatelo nobed Pedahel wuod Amihud.”" 
Numbers34:29 Mago e joma ne Ruoth Nyasaye oyiero mondo opog ni jo-Israel lowo e piny Kanaan. 
Numbers35:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nowuoyo gi Musa e piny Moab mamwalo but aora Jordan kama omanyore gi Jeriko, mowacho niya," 
Numbers35:2 “Nyis jo-Israel mondo oyier miechgi moko, kaachiel gi lowo molworogi, mondo omi jo-Lawi odagie." 
Numbers35:3 Ginidag e miergo, kendo jambgi nokwa e legegi." 
Numbers35:4 Lach mar lowo mumiyo jo-Lawi, chakre e ohinga mar dala ka dala, kadhi nyime noromo mita mia abich kuonde duto koni gi koni." 
Numbers35:5 Kamano bor tong’ man yo wuok chieng’ nobed mita alufu achiel, gi man yo milambo gi man yo podho chieng’ kod man yo nyandwat, duto mita alufu achiel achiel maromre. To dala nobed e dier lowono tir. Lowo molworo dala ka dala nobed lek ma joma odak e dalano kwayoe jambgi." 
Numbers35:6 “Ka umiyo jo-Lawi miechgi, to auchiel kuomgi nobed miech tony, ma joma oneko nyalo pondoe. To bende unumigi mier piero ang’wen gariyo mamoko." 
Numbers35:7 Kamano kar romb mier monego umi jo-Lawi, kaachiel gi legegi, gin piero ang’wen gaboro." 
Numbers35:8 Ka uyiero miergo e piny jo-Israel duto, to ukaw mier mang’eny kuom dhoudi matindo. Dhoot ka dhoot nomi jo-Lawi mier maromre gi lowo mane opogne.”" 
Numbers35:9 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa 
Numbers35:10 mondo onyis jo-Israel niya, “Kuseng’ado aora Jordan, mudonjo e piny Kanaan," 
Numbers35:11 to yieruru mier moko mondo obed kuonde ma ng’at moneko kobothne nyalo tonyie. 
Numbers35:12 Miergo nobed miech tony, ma ng’at moneko nyalo tonyie koringo ng’at madwaro chulone kuor, mondo kik nege kapok oyale e nyim oganda." 
Numbers35:13 Ginibed mier auchiel moyier kaka miech tony," 
Numbers35:14 ka adek ni yo wuok chieng’ mar aora Jordan, to adek nie piny Kanaan." 
Numbers35:15 Mier auchielgo nobed kuonde tony, ma ka ng’ato oboth monego nyawadgi, to onyalo tonyie, bed ni en ja-Israel kata wendo kata japiny moro modak kuomu." 
Numbers35:16 “Ka ng’ato ogoyo wadgi gi gima olos gi nyinyo, mi otho, to ng’at mogoyeno doko janek, omiyo nyaka nege." 
Numbers35:17 Ka ng’ato nigi kidi e lwete ma nyalo nego ng’ato, mi ogoyogo wadgi, motho, to en janek, kendo nyaka nege." 
Numbers35:18 Kata ka ng’ato nigi gimoro molos gi yien e lwete manyalo neko, mi ogoyogo wadgi motho, to en janek, omiyo nyaka nege." 
Numbers35:19 Owadgi ng’at monegno nyaka neg janekno koyudo mondo ochulne kuor. 
Numbers35:20 Ka ng’ato odhiro wadgi goyiem, kata ka odiro gimoro mogoye," 
Numbers35:21 kata kogoye adhong’, motho, to nyaka nege, nikech en janek. Owadgi ng’at monegno nyaka neg janekno, koyude." 
Numbers35:22 “Kapo ni odhiro wadgi ma ok gimonrego, kata ka ochiele gi gimoro ka ok en gi paro mar goye," 
Numbers35:23 kata ka oboth, mobolo kuome kidi manyalo neko ka ok onene, mi otho, kendo ka en adier ni ok gimonre, kendo ne ok odwar hinye," 
Numbers35:24 to oganda nyaka yal wachno e kind janek gi owadgi ng’at monegi, kaluwore gi chikegi eki." 
Numbers35:25 Oganda nyaka kony janekno kuom kuor ma owadgi ng’at monegi dochulone, mi gidwoke e dala tony, kuma ne otonyie mokwongo. Enobed kuno nyaka jadolo maduong’ tho." 
Numbers35:26 To kapo ni chieng’ moro janekno okadho tong’ mar dala tony," 
Numbers35:27 mi owadgi ng’at mane onego cha oyude monege, to owadgi ng’at mane onegono onge gi ketho." 
Numbers35:28 Janek nyaka sik mana e dala tony nyaka jadolo maduong’ tho. Ka jadolo maduong’ osetho, to eka onyalo dok thurgi." 
Numbers35:29 Mago nobednu chik mochwere, kamoro amora mudakie." 
Numbers35:30 “Ng’at moneko nyaka ng’adne buch tho mana kuom dho joneno. To wach janeno achiel kende ok oromo ng’ado ni ng’ato buch tho. 
Numbers35:31 Kik uyie janek mong’adne buch tho warre, to nyaka nege." 
Numbers35:32 Bende kik uyie ng’at mopondo e dala tony warre mi dog dag e dala, kapok jadolo maduong’ otho." 
Numbers35:33 Kik uketh pinyu gi remo kamano, nikech remo ketho piny, kendo pinyu ok nyal pwodhore kuom gak mar remo mochuer, mak mana ka opwodhe gi remb ng’at mane ochuero remono." 
Numbers35:34 Kik uchid pinyu mudakie, kendo ma an bende adakie, nimar an Ruoth Nyasaye adak e kind jo-Israel.”" 
Numbers36:1 Jodong dhout Gilead wuod Makir ma wuod Manase ma achiel kuom dhout Josef, nodhi ir Musa gi jotend oganda kod jodong dhout Israel," 
Numbers36:2 mowacho niya, “Jaduong’, Ruoth Nyasaye nochiki mondo ipog ni jo-Israel lowo gi ombulu, to bende nochiki mondo ipog lowo ma dine owadwa Zelofehad oyudo ni nyige." 
Numbers36:3 To kapo ni moro kuom nyirigo okendi e dhood ja-Israel moro, to lowo mopogne biro lal kuom lop kwerewa, mi nomiye dhoot ma okendie nyakono. Kamano lopwano dilal." 
Numbers36:4 Ka higa mar mor ochopo e piny Israel, to lowono nomi dhoot mokendie nyakono, mi nolal chuth kuom lop kwerewa.”" 
Numbers36:5 Kane Musa oseng’eyo gima Ruoth Nyasaye dwaro, nonyiso jo-Israel niya," 
Numbers36:6 “Joka Josef ni kare, kendo kama e kaka Ruoth Nyasaye osechiko kuom wach nyi Zelofehad. Ginyalo tedo ni ng’ato ang’ata ma gihero, mak mana ni nyaka bed ni okendgi e dhoodgi." 
Numbers36:7 Onge lop ja-Israel moro amora ma nowuog e dhoodgi, kimiyo dhoot machielo, to ng’ato ka ng’ato e Israel nyaka sik mana gi lop wuon mare." 
Numbers36:8 Nyar Israel moro amora ma opogne lop wuon mare nyaka kendi mana e dhoodgi. Kamano ng’ato ka ng’ato e Israel nosik e lop kwerene. 
Numbers36:9 Onge lowo ma noa e dhoot moro kimiyo dhoot machielo, to dhoot ka dhoot nosik gi lope.”" 
Numbers36:10 Kuom mano, Mala gi Tirza gi Hogla gi Milka kod Noa, ma nyi Zelofehad, notimo kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nochiko Musa, mi gitedo mana ni yawuot omine wuon-gi." 
Numbers36:11  
Numbers36:12 Nokendgi e dhood Manase ma wuod Josef, kendo lopgi nosiko mana e dhood kweregi." 
Numbers36:13 Mago e chike mane Ruoth Nyasaye omiyo Musa onyiso jo-Israel e piny Moab mamwalo e bath aora Jordan kama omanyore gi Jeriko. 
Deuteronomy1:1 Magi e weche mane Musa owacho ni jo-Israel duto kane gin e thim manie holo, yo wuokchieng’ mar aora Jordan. Kuno nomanyore gi Suf, ka Paran nie bathe konchiel, to Tofel gi Laban gi Hazeroth kod Dizahab e bathe komachielo." 
Deuteronomy1:2 (En wuodh ndalo apar gachiel kia Horeb nyaka Kadesh-barnea, kiluwo yo mokadho e piny gode mag Seir.)" 
Deuteronomy1:3 Chieng’ mokwongo mar due mar apar gachiel, e higa mar piero ang’wen bang’ wuok Misri, Musa nonyiso jo-Israel weche duto mane Ruoth Nyasaye osechike mondo owachnigi." 
Deuteronomy1:4 Mano notimore kane oseloyo Sihon ruodh Amor, mane odak Heshbon, kod Og ruodh Bashan, mane odak Ashtaroth gi Edrei." 
Deuteronomy1:5 E piny Moab loka Jordan kuno, ema Musa nong’adoe bura e chunye, ni mondo onyis ji tiend chikni. Nowacho niya," 
Deuteronomy1:6 “Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachwa nowuoyo kodwa Horeb, mowachonwa kama: ‘Usebet e godni moromo," 
Deuteronomy1:7 omiyo koro chakuru wuoth, mondo udhi e piny gode mag jo-Amor, kendo uked gi joma odak machiegni kodgi e holo mar aora Jordan, gi piny gode kod piny pewe gi piny man yo milambo, kod dhonam, ma tiende ni piny Kanaan kod piny Lebanon duto nyaka aora maduong’ mar Yufrate." 
Deuteronomy1:8 Aseikonu pinyno, omiyo dhiuru mondo ukawe. En e piny mane Ruoth Nyasaye osingore ni nomi kwereu ma Ibrahim gi Isaka gi Jakobo kod nyikwagi.’" 
Deuteronomy1:9 “E kinde nogo nawachonu niya, ‘Ting’uru pek ma ok anyal ting’o kenda," 
Deuteronomy1:10 nikech Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu osemiyo unya ahinya, ma koro ung’eny mana ka sulue mae polo." 
Deuteronomy1:11 Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach kwereu onego mi umed nya nyadi gana gi gana moloyo kaka uromoni, kendo oguedhu kaka nosingore." 
Deuteronomy1:12 To tich bedo jatendu kod ng’ado buchu osedoko mapek mohewa. 
Deuteronomy1:13 Kuom mano, yieruru ji man gi rieko kendo molony mondo oketgi jotend dhoutu.’" 
Deuteronomy1:14 Ne udwoka ni uyie gi gima nawachonu. 
Deuteronomy1:15 Omiyo nakawo ji man gi rieko kendo molony, maketo mondo oritu. Moko kuomgi naketo jotend ji gana, to moko jotend ji mia mia, to moko jotend ji piero abich abich, kod ji apar apar, kendo moko bende naketo jotelo mopogore opogore e dhoutu duto." 
Deuteronomy1:16 E kinde nogo nachiko jong’ad bura mau niya: ‘Un ema onego uyal buche mag joweteu, kendo nyaka ung’ad bura kare e kind ng’ato gi wadgi, kata bed ni ng’atno en ja-Israel wadu, kata en jadak." 
Deuteronomy1:17 Nyaka ubed joratiro kung’ado bura, kendo nyaka uwinj wach ng’at modhier mana kaka uwinjo wach jamoko. Kik uluor wang’ ng’ato, nikech ng’ado bura en mar Nyasaye. Kapo ni uneno ka bura moro tek ahinya, ma ok unyal ng’ado, to kelnagouru mondo ayale.’" 
Deuteronomy1:18 Chieng’ onogo bende nachikou kuom gik moko duto monego utim. 
Deuteronomy1:19 “Bang’e ne wawuok Horeb kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nochikowa, mi ne wawuotho e thim maduong’ kendo malich kaka ne uneno cha, kwadhi e piny gode mag jo-Amor, mi wachopo Kadesh-barnea." 
Deuteronomy1:20 Eka nawachonu ni, ‘Koro wasechopo e piny gode mag jo-Amor, ma Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachwa miyowa." 
Deuteronomy1:21 Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu oseikonu piny ma uneno e nyimuno, omiyo dhiuru mondo ukawe kaka Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach kwereu nosingorenu. Kik chunyu nyosre, kata kik ubed maluor.’" 
Deuteronomy1:22 To kane uwinjo kamano, nubiro ira uduto, muwachona niya, ‘We mondo waor jomoko mondi nyimwa, odhi ochengnwa pinyno, eka gidwoknwa wach, ka ginyisowa yo ma onego waluw, kod mier man kuno.’" 
Deuteronomy1:23 Ne ayie gi wachuno, mi ayiero jou apar gariyo ka ng’ato achiel achiel ochung’ ni dhoot ka dhoot." 
Deuteronomy1:24 Ne giwuok, mi giwuotho e piny gode nyaka holo mar Eshkol, mi gichengo gweng’no." 
Deuteronomy1:25 Ne gikawo gik monyak e pinyno, mi gikelonwa, ka ginyisowa ni piny ma Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachwa dwaro miyowano en piny maber ahinya." 
Deuteronomy1:26 “To kata kamano nudagi dhi kuno, kendo nutamoru winjo chik Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu." 
Deuteronomy1:27 Ne ung’ur e hembeu, kuwacho niya, ‘Ruoth Nyasaye ok oherowa, emomiyo osegolowa Misri mondo oketwa e lwet jo-Amor, otiekwa." 
Deuteronomy1:28 Ang’o ma wabiro yudo kuno ka wadhi? To jowetewa mane waoro osenego chunywa, ka wachonwa ni ji man kuno rabede kendo boyo mohewowa! Bende ginyisowa ni mier man kuno dongo, kendo nigi ohinga maboyo mochopo e polo. To kendo nyikwa Anakim bende gineno kuno!’" 
Deuteronomy1:29 “To nanyisou ni, ‘Chunyu kik nyosre, kendo kik uluor jogo." 
Deuteronomy1:30 Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu e jatendu, kendo en ema obiro kedonu, mana kaka nokedonu e Misri cha.’" 
Deuteronomy1:31 To bende kane un e thim nuneno kaka ne Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu oting’ou e wuodhu duto nyaka nuchopo kaeri, mana ka ng’ama ting’o nyathine." 
Deuteronomy1:32 To kata obedo kamano, pod nutamoru atama geno kuom Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu," 
Deuteronomy1:33 mane telo nyimu mondo ong’inu kuonde mane unyalo bworoe. Gotieno notelo nyimu kobet ei mach, mondo onyisu kuma onego uluw, to godiechieng’ notelonu kobet e bor polo." 
Deuteronomy1:34 “Kane Ruoth Nyasaye owinjo wecheugo, mirima nomake, mokuong’ore niya," 
Deuteronomy1:35 ‘Onge kata ng’at achiel kuom tieng’ marachni ma none piny maber mane asingora ni nami kweregi," 
Deuteronomy1:36 mak mana Kaleb wuod Jefune. En ema none pinyno, kendo anamiye kaachiel gi nyikwaye piny ma osenyonono, nikech osebedo ka oluwa gi chunye duto.’" 
Deuteronomy1:37 Gima nutimono nomiyo Ruoth Nyasaye okecho koda an bende, mowachona niya, ‘Kata in bende ok inidonji e pinyno," 
Deuteronomy1:38 to Joshua wuod Nun matiyoni ema nodonj kuno. Kuom mano, jiwe mondo obed motegno, nimar en ema nomi jo-Israel okaw pinyno." 
Deuteronomy1:38 to Joshua wuod Nun matiyoni ema nodonj kuno. Kuom mano, jiwe mondo obed motegno, nimar en ema nomi jo-Israel okaw pinyno." 
Deuteronomy1:39 Nyithindu ma pod tindo mane uparo ni nobed joma nomak e lweny, kendo mapok ong’eyo pogo ber gi rach ema nodonj e pinyno. Gin ema namigi pinyno, kendo ginidagie." 
Deuteronomy1:40 Omiyo chakuru wuoth mondo udog e thim kuchomo Nam Makwar.’ 
Deuteronomy1:41 “Eka nudwoka niya, ‘Waseketho e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, omiyo koro wabiro dhi mondo wamonj pinyno kaka Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachwa ochikowa.’ Omiyo ng’ato ka ng’ato kuomu nokawo gi lwenje, kuparo ni en gima yot monjo piny godeno." 
Deuteronomy1:42 To Ruoth Nyasaye nowachona niya, ‘Kwergi kik gidhi gikedi, nimar an ok nabed kodgi, omiyo wasikgi biro loyogi.’" 
Deuteronomy1:43 Nanyisou kamano, to ne ok udewo. Nudagi winjo wach Ruoth Nyasaye, mudhi umonjo piny gode mana gi wiu matek." 
Deuteronomy1:44 Jo-Amor modak e piny gode nowuok kedo kodu, mi ginur kuomu mana ka kich, kendo ne gikeyou e gweng’ Seir, mi giriembou nyaka Horma." 
Deuteronomy1:45 Bang’ mano nuduogo, muywak e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, to ne ok onyal winjo ywaku, kendo ne ok onyal dewou." 
Deuteronomy1:46 Mano ema omiyo nudak Kadesh-barnea kuom ndalo mang’eny. 
Deuteronomy2:1 “Bang’e ne wamako yo mang’ado thim, kwachomo Nam Makwar, kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nochikowa, kendo ne wadigni e piny gode mag Seir kuom ndalo mang’eny," 
Deuteronomy2:2 nyaka Ruoth Nyasaye nokona niya," 
Deuteronomy2:3 ‘Usebedo kudigni e piny godegi moromo, omiyo koro wichreuru uchom yo nyandwat." 
Deuteronomy2:4 To wach ni ji kama: “Bang’ kinde manok ubiro ng’ado e piny joweteu ma nyikwa Esau modak Seri. 
Deuteronomy2:5 Ginibed maluor ka ginenou, to un nyaka une ni ok ukwinyogi, nikech ok namiu pinygi kata matin nono, nimar piny gode mag Seir asemiyo Esau ka mwandune." 
Deuteronomy2:6 Unyalo yudo chiemo gi pi kuomgi, to nyaka uchul," 
Deuteronomy2:7 nimar Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu oseguedhou kuom gik moko duto ma usetimo. Oseritou ka uwuotho e thim malichni. Kuom higni piero ang’wen-gi duto Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu osebedo kodu, kendo onge gima usechando.” ’" 
Deuteronomy2:8 Kamano ne wakadho, mi waweyo jowetewa ma nyikwa Esau modak Seir, kendo ne waweyo yo mochomo Elath gi Ezion-geber, mi ne wawichore mwamako yo mochiko thim Moab." 
Deuteronomy2:9 “Eka Ruoth Nyasaye nowachona niya, ‘Kik umonj jo-Moab, kendo kik ukwinygi nikech ok namiu pinygi kata matin mondo obed mwanduu, nimar asechiwo dala mar Ar ni nyikwa Lut mondo obed mwandugi.’" 
Deuteronomy2:10 (Jo-Emim mane oganda maratego ahinya, kendo mane nigi ji mang’eny nosedak kuno e kinde moko. Ne gin joma raboche mana ka jo-Anakim." 
Deuteronomy2:11 Ji ne luongogi ni jo-Refaim, mana kaka niluongo jo-Anakim, to jo-Moab ne luongogi ni jo-Emim." 
Deuteronomy2:12 Mokwongo jo-Hori nodak Seir to nyikwa Esau notiekogi, mokawo pinygi kendo odakie, mana kaka jo-Israel notimo e piny mane Ruoth Nyasaye omiyogi mondo obed mwandugi.)" 
Deuteronomy2:13 “Ruoth Nyasaye nodhi nyime kowachona niya, ‘Wuothuru mondo ung’ad holo mar Zere.’ Mi ne wang’ado." 
Deuteronomy2:14 Ne wasetieko higni piero adek gaboro chakre kinde mane wawuokie Kadesh-barnea, nyaka wang’ado holo mar Zered. E kindeno tieng’ mar jolweny ne koro osetho duto, mana kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nosekuong’ore." 
Deuteronomy2:15 Ruoth Nyasaye ema nokelonigi masira, motiekogi pep, ma onge kata ng’atgi achiel mane odong’ e kambi." 
Deuteronomy2:16 “Kane jolwenygo duto osetho te," 
Deuteronomy2:17 Ruoth Nyasaye nowachona niya," 
Deuteronomy2:18 ‘Kawuono ubiro ng’ado tong’ mar Moab e dala mar Ar," 
Deuteronomy2:19 kendo kuchopo e piny jo-Moab, to kik ukwinygi kata kik umonjgi, nikech ok namiu pinygi mondo obed mwanduu, nimar asechiwe ni nyikwa Lut.’" 
Deuteronomy2:20 (Pinyno bende ikwano ka piny jo-Refaim. Jo-Refaim nosedak kuno mokwongo, to jo-Amon ne luongogi ni jo-Zamzumim." 
Deuteronomy2:21 Ne gin oganda maratego ahinya, kendo mane nigi ji mang’eny. Ne gin joma raboche mana ka jo-Anakim, to Ruoth Nyasaye notiekogi, kane gitemo geng’o ni jo-Amon mane monjogi, mi jo-Amon nokawo pinygi mi odakie." 
Deuteronomy2:22 Mano notimore mana kaka Ruoth Nyasaye notimo ni jo-Hori mane otemo geng’o ni nyikwa Esau mane odak Seir. Notieko jo-Horigo mi nyikwa Esau nokawo pinygi kendo pod gidakie nyaka chil kawuono. 
Deuteronomy2:23 To jo-Avim mane odak e mier matindo but Gaza, jo-Kaftor ema notieko, mokawo pinygi, modakie.)" 
Deuteronomy2:24 “Eka Ruoth Nyasaye nodhi nyime, kowachone niya, ‘Wuothuru mondo ung’ad holo mar Arnon, nimar asechiwo Sihon ja-Amor ma ruodh Heshbon e lwetu kaachiel gi pinye. Koro donjuru e pinye mondo uked kode." 
Deuteronomy2:25 Chakre kawuono abiro miyo ogendni duto ma e piny ngima luorou ahinya, ma kata ka giwinjo mana humbu, to gibiro kirni ka kihondko omakogi.’" 
Deuteronomy2:26 “Omiyo kane pod wan e thim Kedemoth, naoro joote ir Sihon ruodh Heshbon kakwaye gi ng’wono niya," 
Deuteronomy2:27 ‘Yie mondo wakadh e pinyi. Wabiro luwo mana yo tir ma ok wabaro korachwich kata koracham. 
Deuteronomy2:28 Bende wabiro ng’iewo kuomu chiemo mwachamo kod pi mwamodho. 
Deuteronomy2:29 Omiyo yienwa mondo wakadhi mana kaka nyikwa Esau modak Seir kod jo-Moab modak Ar ne joyienwa, mwakadho. Bang’ mano, wanyalo ng’ado Jordan mondo wadonj e piny ma Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachwa miyowa.’" 
Deuteronomy2:30 To kata kamano, Sihon ruodh Heshbon nodagi miyowa thuolo mondo wakadhi, nimar Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu nomiyo toke odoko matek mondo ochiwe kaachiel gi pinye e lwetu, kendo uneno ka pinyno pod marwa nyaka chil kawuono." 
Deuteronomy2:31 Kuom mano Ruoth Nyasaye nowachona niya, ‘Biuru, nikech koro adwaro chiwo Sihon kaachiel gi pinye e lwetu. Monjeuru, mondo ukaw pinye.’" 
Deuteronomy2:32 Kamano Sihon gi joge nowuok morado kodwa Jahaz. 
Deuteronomy2:33 To Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachwa nochiwe e lwetwa, mi wanege kaachiel gi yawuote kod joge duto." 
Deuteronomy2:34 Kinde nogono bende ema ne wakawoe mier mage duto, mwaketho chuth, kendo wanego ji duto mane odakie, chwo gi mon kod nyithindo. Onge ng’ato kata achiel mane waweyo ka ngima." 
Deuteronomy2:35 Jamni kaachiel gi gik mane wayako e mier mane waloyo kende ema ne wakawo. 
Deuteronomy2:36 Onge dala mane nyalo sirowa, chakre Aroer e dho holo mar Arnon, kod dala man e holo hie, nyaka chop Gilead. Adier Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachwa ema nochiwo gik moko duto e lwetwa." 
Deuteronomy2:37 To kata kamano, numako chik Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachwa gi chunyu duto mi ok umonjo piny jo-Amon ji yo ka holo mar Jabok, kata mana gi yo ka miechgi manie gode." 
Deuteronomy3:1 “Bang’e ne wawuok, mi wamako yo mochomo piny Bashan. Eka Og ruodh Bashan kaachiel gi joge duto ne jowuok mondo oked kodwa Edrei." 
Deuteronomy3:2 To Ruoth Nyasaye nowachona niya, ‘Kik uluor Og, nimar asechiwe kaachiel gi joge kod pinye e lwetu. Timneuru mana kaka nutimo ni Sihon ruodh jo-Amor mane odak Heshbon.’" 
Deuteronomy3:3 Kamano Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachwa nochiwo Og ruodh Bashan kaachiel gi joge e lwetwa, mi ne wanegogi duto, ma ok waweyo kata ng’at achiel ka ngima." 
Deuteronomy3:4 E kindeno bende ne wakawoe gweng’ Argob duto, man e piny Og ruodh Bashan. Ne wakawo mier mage duto, ma onge kata achiel mane odong’." 
Deuteronomy3:5 Ne gin mier piero auchiel, mochiel motegno gi ohinga maboyo, moketie dhorangeye man gi thipe kod lodi. To bende ne wakawo mier moko matindo mang’eny ma ok ochiel." 
Deuteronomy3:6 Dala ka dala ne wanegoe ji duto modakie, chwo gi mon kod nyithindo, mana kaka ne watimo ni miech Sihon ruodh Heshbon." 
Deuteronomy3:7 To jamni kod mwandu duto mane nie miego, ne wayako." 
Deuteronomy3:8 “Kamano e kaka ne wakawo pinje mag ruodhi ariyo mag jo-Amor mane ni loka Jordan yo wang’chieng’, chakre holo mar Arnon nyaka got Hermon." 
Deuteronomy3:9 (Jo-Sidon luongo got Hermon ni Sirion, to jo-Amor luonge ni Senir.)" 
Deuteronomy3:10 Ne wakawo mier duto manie piny gode motarore, kaachiel gi piny Gilead kod piny Bashan, nyaka Saleka gi Edrei, miech Og ruodh Bashan." 
Deuteronomy3:11 (Og ruodh Bashan kende ema nodong’ kuom jo-Refaim. Sandug liende, molos gi kite maratenge, pod ni Raba dala jo-Amor nyaka chil kawuono. Borne chiegni romo mita abich, to lachne mita ariyo.)" 
Deuteronomy3:12 “Kane wakawo pinyno ne apogo ni jo-Reuben gi jo-Gad piny man yo nyandwat mar Arwer, e bath holo Arnon, kod nus mar piny gode man Gilead, kaachiel gi mier duto mane ni kuno." 
Deuteronomy3:13 To nus piny Gilead, komachielo kod Bashan piny Og, napogo ni nus jo-Manase. (Piny Bashan duto niluongo ni piny jo-Refaim." 
Deuteronomy3:14 Jair nyakwar Manase nokawo gweng’ Argob duto nyaka tong’ jo-Geshur gi jo-Maakath. Pod nitie mier moko e Bashan kuno miluongo ni Havoth-jair ma tiende ni miech Jair.) 
Deuteronomy3:15 Napogo ni joka Makir piny Gilead. 
Deuteronomy3:16 To jo-Reuben gi jo-Gad napogonigi piny mochakore Gilead nyaka dier holo mar Arnon, kendo nyaka holo mar Jabok, moting’o tong’ gi piny jo-Amon," 
Deuteronomy3:17 kaachiel gi piny manie holo mar aora Jirdan, chakre Nam Galili nyaka Nam Araba miluongo ni Nam Kado, man yo podho chieng’ mar got Pisga." 
Deuteronomy3:18 “E kinde nogono nachiko dhoudi ariyo gi nusgo kama: ‘Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu osemiyou pinyni mondo obed mwanduu, to jolwenju duto nyaka dong’ e oganda lweny, kendo otel e nyim jo-Israel weteu." 
Deuteronomy3:19 Mak mana mondu gi nyithindu kod jambu ema mondo odong’; e mier masemiyougo. (Ang’eyo ni un gi jamni mathoth.) 
Deuteronomy3:20 To ka Ruoth Nyasaye osekonyo oweteu kaka osekonyou, mi gikawo piny man loka Jordan ma Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu miyogi, mi gidakie, eka unyalo dok e piny ma asemiyouni, ng’ato ka ng’ato e dalane.’" 
Deuteronomy3:21 “Chieng’no bende nachiko Joshua niya, ‘Nuneno gi wang’u gima Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu notimo ni ruodhi ariyo kande. Ruoth Nyasaye biro timo mana kamano ni pinje duto mubiro donjoe kuseng’ado aora Jordan." 
Deuteronomy3:21 “Chieng’no bende nachiko Joshua niya, ‘Nuneno gi wang’u gima Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu notimo ni ruodhi ariyo kande. Ruoth Nyasaye biro timo mana kamano ni pinje duto mubiro donjoe kuseng’ado aora Jordan." 
Deuteronomy3:22 Kik uluorgi, nimar Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu ema biro kedonu.’" 
Deuteronomy3:23 “Chieng’ onogono, nakwayo Ruoth Nyasaye niya," 
Deuteronomy3:24 ‘A Ruoth Nyasaye, isechako nyisa duong’ni gi tekoni. Onge Nyasaye moro amora e polo kata e piny ma tekone nyalo romo gi tekoni, kata manyalo timo timbe madongo mitimogi." 
Deuteronomy3:25 Akwayi ni yie ang’ad Jordan mondo aneye piny maber man loka cha kod piny gode mabeyo, kaachiel gi piny Lebanon.’" 
Deuteronomy3:26 To Ruoth Nyasaye nokecho koda ahinya nikech gik musetimo, omiyo notamore winjo kwayona. Nodwoka nioya, ‘We! Mano oromo. Kik ichak iwuo koda kendo kuom wachno." 
Deuteronomy3:27 Dhiyo ewi got Pisga mondo irang yo nyandwat gi yo milambo, kendo irang yo wuokchieng’ gi yo podho chieng’. Inyalo mana neno pinyno gi wang’i, to in iwuon ok ning’ad Jordan." 
Deuteronomy3:28 Ket Joshua mondo okaw kari. Ijiwe kendo imiye teko, nimar en ema obiro telo ni jogi, koterogi loka cha mondo gikaw piny minenono.’" 
Deuteronomy3:28 Ket Joshua mondo okaw kari. Ijiwe kendo imiye teko, nimar en ema obiro telo ni jogi, koterogi loka cha mondo gikaw piny minenono.’" 
Deuteronomy3:29 “Kuom mano ne wadong’ e hoho momanyore gi Beth-peor.” 
Deuteronomy4:1 Musa nomedo wacho niya, “To koro, un jo-Israel, winjuru chike gi buche ma apuonjou, kendo umak, eka unubed mangima kendo unudonj e piny ma Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach kwereu nomiu, mudagie." 
Deuteronomy4:2 Kik umed gimoro kuom gik ma achikou, kata kik ugol gimoro kuomgi. Rituru chike mag Ruoth Nyasaye adimba, mana kaka amiyougi." 
Deuteronomy4:3 Nuneno gi wang’u gima Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu notimo Baal-peor. Nonego jou moko duto mane lamo Baal ma nyasach Peor. 
Deuteronomy4:4 To un mane upadoru kuom Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu, pod ungima uduto nyaka chil kawuono." 
Deuteronomy4:5 Asepuonjou chike gi buche kaka Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasacha nochika. Mago duto nyaka urit e piny mudhi donjoe, kendo kawo." 
Deuteronomy4:6 Ritgiuru adimba, nimar mano biro nyiso ogendini mamoko ni uriek. Ka giniwinj chikegi eki, to giniwach niya, ‘Onge oganda moro mariek ka oganda maduong’ni.’" 
Deuteronomy4:7 Giniwach kamano nimar onge oganda moro, kata bed ni oduong’ manade, ma nyasache nyalo sudo machiegni kode kaka Ruoth Nyasaye sudo machiegni kodwa e sa asaya ma walame." 
Deuteronomy4:8 Onge oganda moro kata bed ni oduong’ manade, man gi chike kod buche makare machal gi Chik ma aseketo e nyimu tinendeni." 
Deuteronomy4:9 “To beduru kutang’ kendo neuru ni wiu ok owil gi gik museneno gi wang’u. Kik uwe gia e chunyu ka pod ungima, to hulgiuru ni nyithindu kendo ni nyikwau." 
Deuteronomy4:10 Nyaka uparnigi gik mane otimore chieng’ mane uchung’ Horeb e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu cha, ka Ruoth Nyasaye wachona ni, ‘Chokna ji e nyima ka, mondo giwinj kawuoyo kodgi, kendo gipuonjre luora e ngimagi duto.’" 
Deuteronomy4:11 Nusudo machiegni, mi uchung’ e tiend got. Got ne wang’ gi mach matundo e polo, e mudho mandiwa gi rumbi kod ong’weng’o mopoto." 
Deuteronomy4:12 Bang’e Ruoth Nyasaye noloso kodu gie majno, muwinjo dwol mawuoyo, to ne ok uneno kit gimoro amora. Dwol kende ema nuwinjo." 
Deuteronomy4:13 Nohulonu ratiro singruok ma koro notimo kodu, kochikou mondo urit singruokno, tiende ni rito Chike Apar, mane ondiko kuom kite ariyo mopamore." 
Deuteronomy4:14 To bende e sano Ruoth Nyasaye nochika ni mondo apuonju chike gi buche ma nyaka udhi urit e piny mudhi donjoe mondo ukauw. 
Deuteronomy4:15 “Chieng’ mane Ruoth Nyasaye owuoyo kodu Horeb gie mach, ne ok uneno kit gimoro amora," 
Deuteronomy4:16 omiyo ritreuru matek ni kik udonj e richo mar loso kido maket, bed ni en gima chal gi dichwo, kata gi dhako," 
Deuteronomy4:17 kata mana machal gi chiayo, kata gi winyo," 
Deuteronomy4:18 kata gi gima mol, kata gi rech." 
Deuteronomy4:19 Bende kung’iyo polo, muneno gik moko duto mantie, kaka chieng’ gi due kod sulue, to kik gimoro ywau mondo ukulrunigi kata ulamgi. Gik ma kamago Ruoth Nyasaye osechiwo ni ogendini mamoko e piny duto ka gik ma gilamo." 
Deuteronomy4:20 To un e oganda ma Ruoth Nyasaye nokawo, mogolo Misri e sand mager ka mach makakni, ni mondo ubed joge owuon, kaka pod un nyaka chil kawuono." 
Deuteronomy4:21 To Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu nokecho koda nikech un, mi okuong’ore ni ok nang’ad aora Jordan, kata donjo e piny maber ma omiyou mondo obed maruno." 
Deuteronomy4:22 An to nyaka atho e pinyni mak ang’ado Jordan, to un ubiro dhi loka mondo ukaw piny maberno." 
Deuteronomy4:23 Ritreuru mondo une ni wiu ok owil gi singruok mane Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu osetimo kodu. Kik ulos kido moro amora maket, kukethogo chik mar Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu," 
Deuteronomy4:24 nimar Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu en mach matieko gik mowang’o, kendo en Nyasaye ma janyiego." 
Deuteronomy4:25 “Ka usedak e pinyno aming’a munywolo nyithindu gi nyikwau, to beduru motang’ mondo kik udonj e richo kuom loso kido moro amora maket." 
Deuteronomy4:26 Koro aluongo polo gi piny mondo obed janeno ni, ka timbeu obedo maricho e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu kamano, mokecho kodu, to unurum piyopiyo, kendo ok nudag aming’a e piny ma koro ung’ado Jordan mondo udhi ukaw, to notieku chuth." 
Deuteronomy4:27 Ruoth Nyasaye noriembu, kendo nokeu e kind ogendini mamoko, mi nudong’ ji manok e kindgi." 
Deuteronomy4:28 Kuondego unulamie nyiseche molos gi yien kata gi kidi, ma ok nyal neno, kata winjo wach, kata chamo gimoro. Tik gimoro bende ok ginyal winjo." 
Deuteronomy4:29 To kudwaro Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu gi chunyu duto gi adiera kuonde moterouego, to unuyude." 
Deuteronomy4:30 To mogik, ka gigi otimorenu, mi udonjo e masira, to unudog ir Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu, kendo unurit chikene." 
Deuteronomy4:31 Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu en Nyasaye mang’won, omiyo ok nojwang’u, kata kethou ok nokethu, kendo wiye ok nowil gi singruok ma notimo gi kwereu kokuong’ore." 
Deuteronomy4:32 “Koro penjuru ane gima notimore e higni machon, ndalo mane pok onywolu, chakre kinde mane Nyasaye ochueyoe dhano e piny. Bende penjuru ane wach, chakre tung’ piny nyaka tung’ piny, ka gima duong’ kamano oseneye kata osewinjie." 
Deuteronomy4:33 Bende nitie oganda moro mosewinjo dwond Nyasaye kawuoyo gie mach kaka usewinjo, to kendo pod ngima?" 
Deuteronomy4:34 Koso nitie Nyasaye moro mosetemo golo oganda moro kuom oganda machielo mane oselokogi wasumbni? Bende nyasaye moro osetimo timbe madongo gi ranyisi kod honni, kokedo gi teko maduong’ kendo komiyo ji luoro kod kibaji? To Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu notimonu gik ma kamago kogolou Misri mana kuneno gi wang’u." 
Deuteronomy4:35 Mago duto Ruoth Nyasaye notimo mondo onyisu ni en Nyasaye. Onge Nyasaye moro mak mana en. 
Deuteronomy4:36 Ne oyienu winjo dwonde gie polo mondo opuonjugo, bende noyienu neno maye malich e piny, kendo nuwinjo wechene kawuok ei majno." 
Deuteronomy4:37 Nohero kwereu, moyiero nyikwagi, omiyo en owuon nogolou Misri gi tekone maduong’," 
Deuteronomy4:38 kendo noriembo ogendini madongo kendo mohewou gi teko, ni mondo udonj e pinygi, kendo ukaw obed maru, kaka pod en nyaka chil kawuono." 
Deuteronomy4:39 Kuom mano koro beduru gi adiera, kendo ung’e ni Ruoth Nyasaye en Nyasaye, kendo onge nyasaye moro e polo kata e piny." 
Deuteronomy4:40 Emomiyo rituru buche kod chike Nyasaye ma amiyou kawuono. Eka un kaachiel gi nyikwau unubed maber, kendo unudag aming’a e piny ma Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu miyou mondo obed maru nyaka chieng’.”" 
Deuteronomy4:41 Bang’e Musa noyiero mier adek e piny man yo wuokchieng’ mar aora Jordan," 
Deuteronomy4:42 mondo obed kuonde ma ka ng’ato oboth, monego wadgi ma yande ok gimonrego, to onyalo pondoe. Kochopo e achiel kuom miergo, to oreso ngimane." 
Deuteronomy4:43 Miergo ne: Bezer-e-thim manie piny gode motarore, mane jo-Reuben nyalo pondoe, gi Ramoth-gilead manie piny Gilead, mane jo-Gad nyalo pondoe, kod Golan manie piny Bashan, mane jo-Manase bende nyalo pondoe." 
Deuteronomy4:44 Koro magi e chike mane Musa omiyo jo-Israel. 
Deuteronomy4:45 Gin e chike gi buche mane Musa onyiso jo-Israel kane gisea Misri," 
Deuteronomy4:46 mi gichopo e piny man yo wuokchieng’ mar aora Jordan e hoho momanyore gi Beth-peor e piny Sihon ruodh Amor modak Heshbon. Musa gi jo-Israel noloyo ruodhno kane gisea Misri," 
Deuteronomy4:47 mi ne gikawo pinye kaachiel gi piny Og ruodh Bashan. Ruodhigo ne mag jo-Amor mane odak e piny man yo wuokchieng’ mar Jordan. 
Deuteronomy4:48 Pinyno nochakore Aroer man e bath holo mar Arnon nyaka got Sirion, ma bende iluongo ni Hermon," 
Deuteronomy4:49 kaachiel gi piny pap duto man yo wuokchieng’ mar aora Jordan, nyaka Nam Kado man e tik got Pisga." 
Deuteronomy5:1 Musa noluongo jo-Israel duto mowachonigi niya, “Un jo-Israel winjuru chike kod buche ma awacho kuwinjo kawuononi. Puonjreuru, kendo uritgi maber." 
Deuteronomy5:2 Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachwa notimo kodwa singruok Horeb. 
Deuteronomy5:3 Ne ok otimo singruok gi kwerewa, to mana kodwa, waduto ma wan ka, ma pod wangima." 
Deuteronomy5:4 Ruoth Nyasaye noloso kodu wang’ gi wang’ gie mach, ewi godno." 
Deuteronomy5:5 Chutho an nachung’ e kindu gi Ruoth Nyasaye e sechego, mondo eka akownu weche Ruoth Nyasaye nikech nuluoro mach, mi ne ok uidho godno. “Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho niya," 
Deuteronomy5:6 “ ‘An e Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu ma nogolou e piny Misri kuma ne ubedoe wasumbini. 
Deuteronomy5:7 “ ‘Kik ubed gi Nyasaye moro mak mana an. 
Deuteronomy5:8 “ ‘Kik ulos kido moro mopa kata gima chalo gi gimoro manie polo malo kata manie piny mwalo kata mana manie pi mae bwo piny. 
Deuteronomy5:9 Kik ukulrunigi, kata lamogi kik ulamgi, nikech an Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu an Nyasaye ma janyiego. Akumo nyithind joma ochaya nikech richo jonywolgi nyaka tieng’ mar adek gi mar ang’wen," 
Deuteronomy5:10 to tienge gana gi gana mohera kendo momako chikena, ahero gi hera mosiko." 
Deuteronomy5:11 “ ‘Kik uluong nying Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu kayiem nono, nimar anakum ng’ato ka ng’ato mokonyore gi nyinga e yo ma ok kare." 
Deuteronomy5:12 “ ‘Rituru chieng’ Sabato kendo uwale ni Ruoth Nyasaye, kaka Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu nochikou." 
Deuteronomy5:13 Nyaka uti tijeu duto kuom ndalo auchiel," 
Deuteronomy5:14 to chieng’ mar abiriyo en chieng’ yueyo mowal ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu. Chieng’no un, kaachiel gi yawuotu kod nyiu, kata wasumbu machwo gi mamon, kata ruethu kata kenjeu kata dhou, kata mana jodak manie miechu kik ti tich moro. Mano en ni mondo wasumbu machwo gi mamon oyue kaka un bende uyueyo." 
Deuteronomy5:15 Paruru malong’o ni un uwegi ne un wasumbni e piny Misri, to Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu nogolou kuno gi teko mathoth kod bat morie. Mano emomiyo Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu nochikou ni mondo urit Sabato." 
Deuteronomy5:16 “ ‘Luor wuoru gi meru kaka Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu nochikou, eka mondo udag aming’a, kendo udhi maber e piny ma Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu biro miyou." 
Deuteronomy5:17 “ ‘Kik ineki. 
Deuteronomy5:18 “ ‘Kik iterri. 
Deuteronomy5:19 “ ‘Kik ikwal. 
Deuteronomy5:20 “ ‘Kik ihang ni ng’ato wach. 
Deuteronomy5:21 “ ‘Kik igomb chi ng’ato kata od ng’ato kata puoth ng’ato kata misumba ng’ato kata dher ng’ato kata kanj ng’ato, kata gimoro amora mar ng’ato.’" 
Deuteronomy5:22 “Ruoth Nyasaye nomiyou chikego ka uchokoru uduto e got. Noloso gi dwol maduong’ gie mach ei rumbi kod ong’weng’o mopoto, eka noweyo wuoyo. Bang’e nondiko chikego e kite ariyo mopamore, momiya." 
Deuteronomy5:23 Kane uwinjo dwol ka wuok e mudho, to got wang’, jotend dhoutu gi jodongu nobiro ira," 
Deuteronomy5:24 mowachona niya, ‘Ne! Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachwa osenyisowa duong’ne maler gi tekone, kendo wasewinjo dwonde kawuok ei mach. Omiyo koro wang’eyo ni kara Nyasaye nyalo wuoyo gi dhano, mi dhano chak bed abeda mangima." 
Deuteronomy5:25 To kata kamano, kik wawit ngimawa, nimar mach malich cha nyalo mana wang’owa, mi tiekwa. Kwachako wawinjo dwond Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachwa kendo, to wabiro tho," 
Deuteronomy5:26 nikech onge ng’at moro amora mosewinjo dwond Nyasaye mangima kawuok e mach, kaka wasewinjo, to pod ngima." 
Deuteronomy5:27 In ema inyalo sudo machiegni mondo iwinj weche duto ma Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachwa dhi wacho. Bang’e iduog iwachnwa gigo duto mowachoni, eka wanawinjgi, kendo wanamakgi.’" 
Deuteronomy5:28 “Ruoth Nyasaye nowinjo gima nuwachona, mokona niya, ‘Asewinjo gima ji owachoni. Gin kare." 
Deuteronomy5:29 Da ber ka gisiko gi chuny moluora kendo morito chikena duto, eka mondo gin gi nyikwagi gidag maber nyaka chieng’." 
Deuteronomy5:30 Dhiyo kendo iwachnigi mondo gidog e hembegi," 
Deuteronomy5:31 to in dong’ koda ka mondo ahulni chike gi buche ma nyaka ipuonjgi girit e piny ma amiyogi mondo gidagie.’ 
Deuteronomy5:32 “Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu osemiyou chikegi, omiyo ritgiuru maber." 
Deuteronomy5:33 Luwuru yo ma Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu osechikou, mak ubaro koracham kata korachwich. Bang’e eka unubed maber kendo unudag aming’a e piny ma udhi kawo." 
Deuteronomy6:1 “Koro magi e chike kod buche mane Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu ochika mondo apuonju uriti e piny mubiro donjoe kendo kawo mondo obed maru. 
Deuteronomy6:2 E ngimau duto un kaachiel gi nyikwau nyaka uluor Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu, kendo urit buchene gi chikene ma amiyou kawuono. Bang’e eka unudag maber aming’a." 
Deuteronomy6:3 Omiyo un jo-Israel winjuru kendo rituru chikego mondo udag maber kendo unya e piny maber kendo momewno, mana kaka Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach kwereu nosingorenu." 
Deuteronomy6:4 “Winjuru un jo-Israel. Ruoth Nyasaye e Nyasachwa, en e Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo en kende e Nyasaye." 
Deuteronomy6:5 Heruru Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu gi chunyu duto, gi parou duto, kendo gi tekou duto." 
Deuteronomy6:6 Chike ma amiyou kawuonogi, kanuru e chunyu," 
Deuteronomy6:7 kendo puonjgiuru nyithindu. Bende twaguru kuomgi e mier, kata kuwuotho e yo, kata kudhi nindo, kata kuchiew gokinyi." 
Deuteronomy6:8 Tuegiuru ka ranyisi e lwetu, kendo mien-giuru e lend wang’u ka kido," 
Deuteronomy6:9 bende ndikgiuru e sirni mag dhoutu kendo kuom rangeyeu. 
Deuteronomy6:10 “Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu nokelu e piny mane osesingore ni kwereu ma Ibrahim gi Isaka kod Jakobo ni nomiu. En piny man gi mier mang’eny madongo miwuoro, mane ok ugero," 
Deuteronomy6:11 kod udi mopong’ gi kit gik moko duto mabeyo ma un ne ok uketoe. En gi sokni mokuny e lwanda ma un ne ok ukunyo, kod puothe mag olemb mzabibu kod mag zeituni mane ok upidho. Kusechiemo, muyieng," 
Deuteronomy6:12 to kik wiu wil gi Ruoth Nyasaye mane ogolou e piny Misri, kuma ne ubedoe wasumbni." 
Deuteronomy6:13 Luoruru Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu, kendo utine. Ka ukuong’oru to nyaka ukuong’ru mana gi nyinge." 
Deuteronomy6:14 Kik uluw nyiseche mag ogendini mokiewo kodu," 
Deuteronomy6:15 nikech kuluwogi, to Ruoth Nyasaye modak e dieru biro kecho kodu ahinya mi dotieku e wang’ piny, nimar Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu en Nyasaye ma janyiego." 
Deuteronomy6:16 “Kik utem Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu, kaka nuteme ka un Masa." 
Deuteronomy6:17 Nyaka urit malong’o chike Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu, kaachiel gi wechene kod buchene moko mane omiyou." 
Deuteronomy6:18 Timuru gik makare kendo mabeyo e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, mondo udag maber mi udonj kendo ukaw opiny maber mane osesingore kokuong’ore ni kwereu" 
Deuteronomy6:19 Obiro riembonu wasiku duto mondo owenu thuolo, kaka nosingore." 
Deuteronomy6:20 “To e ndalo mabiro ka yawuotu nopenju ni, ‘Weche gi buche kod chike mane Ruoth Nyasaye omiyou, tiendgi ang’o?’" 
Deuteronomy6:21 To nudwokgi niya, ‘Ne wan wasumb Farao e piny Misri, to Ruoth Nyasaye nogolowa kuno gi teko maduong’.’" 
Deuteronomy6:22 Kendo nosando piny Misri gi Farao kod joge duto, kokelonigi masiche madongo gi ranyisi kod honni, kaka ne waneno." 
Deuteronomy6:23 Nogolowa kuno mondo oterwa e piny mane osesingore ni kwerewa ni nomiwa. 
Deuteronomy6:24 Ruoth Nyasaye nochikowa ni mondo warit chikegi duto, kendo ni mondo waluore. Eka dwadag maber ndalo duto, kendo domed ritowa." 
Deuteronomy6:25 Ka warito chikegi duto e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachwa, to obiro kwanowa ka joma kare.”" 
Deuteronomy7:1 “Ka Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu oterou mondo ukaw piny ma ubiro dhiyoeno, noriembnu ogendini abiriyo madongo kendo marateke moloyou, ma gin jo-Hiti, gi jo-Girgash gi jo-Amor gi jo-Kanaan gi jo-Perizi gi jo-Hivi kod jo-Jebus." 
Deuteronomy7:2 Kosechiwogi e lwetu kamano, muloyogi to nyaka uneggi duto. Kik utim kodgi winjruok, to bende kik uwe mak utiekogi," 
Deuteronomy7:3 Kik uyie yawuotgi okend nyiu, bende kik yawuotu kend nyigi," 
Deuteronomy7:4 nimar kutimo kamano, to nyigo nolok chuny yawuotu mondo kik lam Ruoth Nyasaye, to olam mana nyiseche mamoko. Mano dimi Ruoth Nyasaye kech kodu, kendo tieku piyopiyo." 
Deuteronomy7:5 Kuom mano, onego utimnigi mana kama: Mukuru kendegi mag liswa, kendo kethuru sirni maggi milamo mag kite gi mag yien, mi uwang’ kido mag nyisechegi manono," 
Deuteronomy7:6 nimar un joma owal ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu. Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu noyierou e kind ji duto mae piny mondo ubed ogandane moyiero. 
Deuteronomy7:7 “Uparo ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu noparou, moyierou nikech ung’eny moloyo ogendini mamoko duto koso? Ooyo, ka adier, to un e oganda matinie moloyo." 
Deuteronomy7:8 Noyierou mana nikech noherou, kendo nikech norito singruok mane otimo ni kwereu. Mano emomiyo nogolou gi tekone maduong’ e piny mane unie wasumbini, moresou e lwet Farao ruodh Misri."
