Deuteronomy7:9 Omiyo koro ng’euru ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu en Nyasaye. En Nyasaye ma jaadiera kendo marito singruokne kuom tienge gana gi gana mag ji mohere kendo momako chikene, koherogi gi hera mosiko." 
Deuteronomy7:10 To jogo mochaye kendo ma ok ohere, otieko chuth piyopiyo ma ok odeko." 
Deuteronomy7:11 Nyaka umak chikene gi buchene ma amiyou kawuononi, kendo uritgi." 
Deuteronomy7:12 “Kuwinjo chikegi kendo uritogi, to Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu biro rito singruok mane otimo gi kwereu, kendo obiro siko koherou." 
Deuteronomy7:13 Enoheru kendo enogwedhu, mi enomi unya mathoth. Enoguedhu gi nyithindo mang’eny kod gik manyak e pwotheu, kaka ngano gi divai kod mo, kendo enoguedhu gi jamni mang’eny e piny ma nosingore ni kwereu ni nomiu." 
Deuteronomy7:14 Unubed joma ogwedhi moloyo ogendini mamoko duto. Ok nobedie bwoch kata lur kuom jou kata kuom jambu. 
Deuteronomy7:15 Ruoth Nyasaye notiek tuoche duto kuomu bende ok nokelnu tuoche maricho mane goyou e piny Misri, to wasiku ema nokelne tuochego." 
Deuteronomy7:16 Tiekuru ji duto ma Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu biro chiwo e lwetu. Kik uwegi, to bende kik ulam nyisechegi, nikech kutimo kamano, to mano dibednu obadho." 
Deuteronomy7:17 “Dipo ka uwacho niya, ‘Ogendinigi ng’eny mohingowa. Ere kaka dwariembgi?’" 
Deuteronomy7:18 Kata kamano kik uluorgi, to paruru gik ma Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu notimo ni Farao kendo ni piny Misri ngima." 
Deuteronomy7:19 Paruru timbe madongo mane uneno gi wang’u kod ranyisi gi honni kaachiel gi teko maduong’ mane Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu ogolougo Misri gi bat morie. Kamano e kaka obiro timo ni ogendini duto muluorogo. 
Deuteronomy7:20 Bende obiro miyogi kihondko, mondo otiek joma pod odong’, kata mago mopondo kamoro amora." 
Deuteronomy7:21 Kik luoro maku kukedo kodgi, nimar Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu, ma en Nyasaye maduong’ kendo malich ni kodu." 
Deuteronomy7:22 Obiro riembonu ogendinigo matintin nyaka girum. Ok unutiekgi dichiel, nimar dipo ka ondiegi onywolore mang’eny, mothagou." 
Deuteronomy7:23 To Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu nochiw ogendinigo e lwetu, kendo ok nowenigi thuolo nyaka chop girum te." 
Deuteronomy7:24 Enochiw ruodhi mag ogedinigo e lwetu, mi unumi kargi lal chuth, kendo onge kata ng’at achiel kuomgi ma nosiru, to unutiekgi pep." 
Deuteronomy7:25 Nyaka uwang’ kido mag nyisechego manono, kendo kik ugomb fedha gi dhahabu ma gibawogo nyisechegigo, bende kik ukawgi. Kutimo kamano, to enobednu obadho, nimar gigo gin gik makuero e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu." 
Deuteronomy7:26 Kik ukel gimoro amora makuero e miechu, nikech kutimo kamano, to un bende unubed joma okwedi. Nyaka ubed mosin kod gik ma kamago, kendo ukwan-gi ka gik makuero, nikech gin gik ma nyaka utiek, marum chuth." 
Deuteronomy8:1 “Nyaka urit chike duto ma amiyou kawuononi, mondo ubed mangima, mi unya, kendo udonj e piny mane Ruoth Nyasaye osingore ni nomi kwereu, odagie." 
Deuteronomy8:2 Paruru wuoth mabor mane Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu otelonue kuom higni piero ang’wen ka un e thim. Nodwokou piny kotemougo, mondo ong’e ane ka unyalo rito chikene adier." 
Deuteronomy8:3 Nodwokou piny, kendo nomiyo kech okayou, eka bang’e nomiyou manna mondo ucham. En chiemo mane pok uneno, kendo kwereu bende ne ok oneno. Notimo kamano mondo onyisugo ni dhano ok bed mangima nikech chiemo kende, to obedo mangima gi weche duto mawuok e dho Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Deuteronomy8:4 Kuom higni piero ang’wen go duto, lepu ne ok oti, kata tiendu ne ok okuot." 
Deuteronomy8:5 To nyaka ung’e ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu ne rieyou mondo opuonju mana kaka ng’ato puonjo nyathine. 
Deuteronomy8:6 Rituru chike Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu mondo uwuoth e yorene, kendo umiye duong’," 
Deuteronomy8:7 nimar Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu terou e piny maber, motimo aore gi sokni, kendo man gi kuonde ma pi wuokie ewi gode kendo e holni." 
Deuteronomy8:8 En piny machiego cham kaka ngano gi shairi, kendo machiego mzabibu gi ng’owo gi zeituni kod olembe mamoko, bende ma mor kich ng’enyie." 
Deuteronomy8:9 En piny ma unubedie gi chiemo mang’eny, kendo onge gima unuchandie. Bende en piny man gi kite miloso nyinyo. Mula bende unyalo kunyo e godene." 
Deuteronomy8:10 Kusebedo gi chiemo mang’eny, moromou, to pakuru Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu kuom piny maber mosemiyouno." 
Deuteronomy8:11 “Kik wiu wil gi Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu, kendo kik uwe rito chikene gi buchene ma amiyou kawuononi." 
Deuteronomy8:12 Kusebedo gi chiemo mang’eny moromou, kendo usegero udi mabeyo mudakie," 
Deuteronomy8:13 mi jambu gi fethu gi dhahapu kod mwanduu duto omedore," 
Deuteronomy8:14 to kik ubed josunga, mi wiu wil gi Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu mane ogolou Misri kuma nubedoe wasumbni," 
Deuteronomy8:15 nimar notelonu e thim maduong’ kendo malich, kuma otwo ma onge pi, kendo ma thuonde man gi kwiri maricho kod thomoni opong’o. En ema nomiyo pi owuoknu e lwanda motegno," 
Deuteronomy8:16 bende nomiyou manna mane kwereu pok ong’eyo mondo ucham e thim. Notimo kamano mondo odwokugo piny, kotemou, eka bang’e ogwedhu." 
Deuteronomy8:17 Emomiyo kik uwach ni tekou gi riekou ema osemiyo uyudo mwandugo," 
Deuteronomy8:18 to paruru Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu, nimar en ema omiyou teko mar yudo mwandu. Kamano ochopo singruok mane omiyo kwereu, kokuong’ore." 
Deuteronomy8:19 “To kapo ni wiu owil gi Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu, muluwo nyiseche mamoko, mi ulamogi kendo ukulorunigi, to akuong’ora kawuono ni natieku ma onge kiawa." 
Deuteronomy8:20 Adier, ka ok uluoro Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu, to notieku mana kaka ogendini ma obiro tieko ka odonjo e pinyni." 
Deuteronomy9:1 “Winjuru un jo-Isarel. Kawuono ubiro ng’ado Jordan mondo udhi ukaw piny ogendini marateke kendo madongo moloyou, kaachiel gi mier mochiel gi ohinga mochopo e polo." 
Deuteronomy9:2 Gin joma dongo kendo maboyo ma nyikwa Anakim, kaka ung’eyo, nimar usewinjo ka iwacho niya, ‘Ere joma nyalo siro nyikwa Anakim?’" 
Deuteronomy9:3 To ubiro ng’eyo kawuono ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu ema otelonu kachalo mach matieko gik mowang’o. Obiro tiekogi en owuon, kendo obiro loyonugi. Kuom mano, ubiro riembogi kendo tiekogi piyopiyo, mana kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nosingorenu." 
Deuteronomy9:4 “Ka Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu riembo jogo mondo owenu thuolo, to kik uwach ni timbeu mabeyo ema osemiyo Ruoth Nyasaye okelou e pinyni." 
Deuteronomy9:5 Ok timbeu mabeyo kata dimbruok ma un-go ema omiyo ubiro donjo e piny jogo mondo ukaw, to en mana nikech richo mag ogendinigo emomiyo Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu riembogi mondo giwenu thuolo, kochopogo singruok ma notimo gi kwereu ma Ibrahim gi Isaka kod Jakobo." 
Deuteronomy9:6 Kuom mano koro ng’euru ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu ok miu piny momewni nikech timbeu mabeyo, nimar ka adier, to un joma tokgi tek." 
Deuteronomy9:7 “Paruru ma wiu ok owil kaka numiyo Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu mirima e thim, chakre chieng’ mane uwuokie Misri nyaka chieng’ mane uchopoe ka, usebedo kutamoru winjo Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Deuteronomy9:8 Nukwinye e got Horeb, mokecho kodu, kendo odwaro tiekou." 
Deuteronomy9:9 Noyudo ka asedhi ewi got mondo akaw kite mopamore mag singruok ma Ruoth Nyasaye otimo kodu, mi ne abet ewi got kuno kuom ndalo piero ang’wen, odiechieng’ gotieno, ka ok achiem kata ok amadh gimoro." 
Deuteronomy9:10 Eka Ruoth Nyasaye nomiya kite ariyo mopamore, mondik gi lith lwete. Weche duto mane Ruoth Nyasaye owachonu gie mach ewi got chieng’ chokruok, ondiki e kitego." 
Deuteronomy9:11 Kane ndalo piero ang’wen-go orumo, Ruoth Nyasaye nomiya kite ariyo mopamore mag singruokgo," 
Deuteronomy9:12 kowachona niya, ‘Lor piny piyopiyo ia e got, nikech jou mane igolo Misri osetimo marach. Piyopiyo nono, giseweyo yo mane achikogi ni mondo giluw, mi giloso kido mar dhahabu moleny mondo gilam.’" 
Deuteronomy9:13 “Bang’ mano Ruoth Nyasaye nowachona niya, ‘Aserango jogi, ma ayudo ni gin joma tokgi tek." 
Deuteronomy9:14 We mondo atiekgi, kendo ami nyinggi olal e piny duto. Bang’e anamiyi doko oganda maratego kendo maduong’ moloyogi.’" 
Deuteronomy9:15 Kamano nawichora mi alor piny kaa ewi got mane oyudo wang’, ka ating’o kite mopamore mag singruok e lweta." 
Deuteronomy9:16 Naneno ni useketho e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye kuom loso kido mar nyaroya gi dhahabu moleny, kendo ni piyopiyo nono, useweyo yo mane Ruoth Nyasaye ochikou mondo uluw." 
Deuteronomy9:17 Omiyo nakawo kite ariyo mopamorego, mawito piny gi lwetena ariyo, mi ne ging’inyore matindotindo e nyimu." 
Deuteronomy9:18 Eka nariera piny e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye kuom ndalo piero ang’wen odiechieng gotieno, kaka nasetimo e kinde mokwongo, mi ariyo kech ka ok achiem kata ok amadh gimoro, nikech richo duto mane usetimo kuketho e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo kumiye mirima." 
Deuteronomy9:19 Naluoro mirima mager mar Ruoth Nyasaye mane chiegni tiekou, to Ruoth Nyasaye nochako owinjo ywakna." 
Deuteronomy9:20 Ruoth Nyasaye nokecho gi Harun ahinya, kendo nodwaro tieke, to e sano en bende ne alemone." 
Deuteronomy9:21 Eka nakawo gima nukethogo, ma en kido mar nyaroya mane uloso, mi awang’o e mach. Ne atoye matindotindo mi arege, molokore buru, kendo nakawo buruno makiro e aora mamol koa e got." 
Deuteronomy9:22 “Bende numiyo Ruoth Nyasaye mirima ka un Tabera gi Masa kod Kibroth-hataava," 
Deuteronomy9:23 kendo kane un Kadesh-barnea, Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu nowacho ni mondo udhi ukaw piny momiyou, to nudagi winjo wachne, kendo ne ok ugeno kuome, bende ne ok urito chikne." 
Deuteronomy9:24 Usebedo kudagi Ruoth Nyasaye chakre chieng’ mokwongo mane ang’eyoue. 
Deuteronomy9:25 “Nariera piny e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye kuom ndalo piero ang’wen, odiechieng’ gotieno nimar nosewacho ni odwaro tiekou." 
Deuteronomy9:26 Nalamo Ruoth Nyasaye kakwaye niya, ‘A Ruoth Nyasaye ma Ruodha, kik itiek jogi, nimar gin mwanduni mane iwaro gi tekoni maduong’, mi igolo Misri gi bat motegno." 
Deuteronomy9:27 Par jotichni ma Ibrahim gi Isaka kod Jakobo, kendo kik idew wich teko gi kethruok kod richo mag jogi," 
Deuteronomy9:28 nikech ka ok kamano to weg piny mane igolowae biro wacho niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye osetero joge e thim mondo otho kuno, nikech osin kodgi, kendo nikech ok onyal terogi e piny mane osesingore ni nomigi.”" 
Deuteronomy9:29 To Ruoth Nyasaye, jogo gin jogi kendo mwanduni iwuon mane igolo e piny Misri gi tekoni maduong’ kod bat morie.’" 
Deuteronomy10:1 “Ruoth Nyasaye nowachona niya, ‘Pa kite ariyo machal gi mane igoyo piny mobarore kande, mondo ibigo ira ewi got. Bende los sanduk mar bao." 
Deuteronomy10:2 Weche mane andiko kuom kite mokwongo mane ibaro kande ema abiro ndiko kuom kitego, kendo iniketgi e sandugno.’" 
Deuteronomy10:3 Kuom mano, naloso sanduk gi yiend shita, kendo napayo kite ariyo machal gi mokwongo ka, mi adhi ewi got kating’o kite ariyogo e lweta." 
Deuteronomy10:4 Ruoth Nyasaye nondiko kuom kitego chike apar mane osewachonu gie mach ewi got chieng’ chokruok, mana kaka nosendiko e kite mokwongo ka, mi nomiyagi." 
Deuteronomy10:5 Eka nadwogo iru kaa ewi got, mi aketo kitego ei sanduk mane aloso, kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nochika, kendo gisebedo kanyo nyaka chil kawuono." 
Deuteronomy10:6 “Jo-Israel noa e gweng’ sokni mag jo-Jaakan, mi giwuotho matintin ka gidhi Mosera. Eka Harun notho, moyike kuno, mi Eleazar wuode, nodoko jadolo kare." 
Deuteronomy10:7 Ne gia kuno, mi gidhi Gudgoda. Eka ne gia Gudgoda, mi gidhi Jotbatha, piny motimo aore." 
Deuteronomy10:8 “E kindego Ruoth Nyasaye nowalo jo dhood Lawi mondo obed joting’ Sandug Muma mare, kendo obed jodolo mage, ka giguedho ji e nyinge, mana kaka pod gitimo nyaka chil kawuono." 
Deuteronomy10:9 Mano emomiyo jo-Lawi onge gi piny mopognigi ka mwandugi, kaka opog ni dhout Israel mamoko. Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu owuon e mwandugi, mana kaka nosesingorenigi." 
Deuteronomy10:10 “Nabet ewi got kuom ndalo piero ang’wen odiechieng’ gotieno, mana kaka nasetimo mokwongo, mi Ruoth Nyasaye nochako owinjo kwayona moyie ni ok obi tiekou." 
Deuteronomy10:11 Nowachona niya, ‘Chak wuoth kitelo ni ji, mondo gidhi gikaw piny mane asingora ni nami kweregi.’" 
Deuteronomy10:12 “Koro un jo-Israel, ang’o ma Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu dwaro kuomu? Donge odwaro mana ni mondo uluore kendo uwuoth e yorene duto, kuhere kendo kutiyone gi chunyu duto?" 
Deuteronomy10:13 Ubiro timo kamano kurito chikene gi buchene duto, ma amiyou kawuono mondo okonyu." 
Deuteronomy10:14 Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu e wuon polo duto, kata polo man malo manadi, kaachiel gi piny bende kod gik moko duto manie iye." 
Deuteronomy10:15 To kata kamano, Ruoth Nyasaye ne pod rito kwereu nikech noherogi, mi bang’gi noyiero mana un nyikwagi kuom ogendini moko duto mondo ubed joge, kaka pod ubet nyaka chil kawuono." 
Deuteronomy10:16 Kuom mano, koro nyaka uyie mako singruok gi chunyu duto, kendo kik umed bedo joma tokgi tek," 
Deuteronomy10:17 nimar Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu en Nyasaye moloyo nyiseche duto, kendo Ruoth moloyo ruodhi duto. En Nyasaye maduong’ kendo malich miwuoro. En kende e Nyasaye miluoro, ma ok dew wang’ ng’ato, kendo ma ok cham asoya." 
Deuteronomy10:18 To ong’ado bura kare ni mond liete, kendo ni nyithi kiye. Ohero jodak, kendo omiyogi chiemo gi lewni." 
Deuteronomy10:19 Omiyo un bende onego uher jodak man kuomu, nimar un bende ne un jodak e piny Misri." 
Deuteronomy10:20 Nyaka uluor Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu, kendo ulame gi chunyu duto, bende kukuong’oru mana gi nyinge." 
Deuteronomy10:21 En ema nyaka upake, nimar en Nyasachu mosetimonu timbe madongo kendo malich, ma useneno gi wang’u." 
Deuteronomy10:22 Kane kwereu odhi Misri, ne gin mana ji piero abiriyo kende, to koro Ruoth Nyasaye osemiyo unya ka sulue mae polo." 
Deuteronomy11:1 “Heruru Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu, kendo nyaka urit chikene gi buchene ndalo duto." 
Deuteronomy11:2 Kawuono paruru puonj mane uyudo kuom Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu, nimar, kata obedo ni nyithindu pok oneno kata pok ong’eyo puonjno, un to ung’eye. Bende paruru duong’ mar Ruoth Nyasaye gi tekone kod bade morie," 
Deuteronomy11:3 gi ranyisi kod timbe mane otimo e piny Misri, kosandogo Farao kaachiel gi pinye duto." 
Deuteronomy11:4 Donge nuneno gima notimo gi jolwenj Misri gi faresegi kod gechegi? Kane oyudo gilawou, nomiyo pi Nam Makwar oimogi, motiekogi pep." 
Deuteronomy11:5 Bende paruru gik mane otimonu e thim nyaka nuchopo kaeri," 
Deuteronomy11:6 kod gima notimo ni Dathan kod Abiram, yawuot Eliab ma ja-Reuben, kendo kaka piny nong’amo dhoge momwonyogi kaachiel gi joodgi gi hembegi kod ji duto mane gin-go, mana ka jo-Israel duto neno." 
Deuteronomy11:7 Un uwegi useneno timbe madongo kendo malich ma Ruoth Nyasaye osetimo. 
Deuteronomy11:8 “Nyaka urit chike duto ma amiyou kawuono, mondo ubed gi teko kendo ukaw piny ma ubiro donjeno." 
Deuteronomy11:9 Kamano unudag aming’a e piny maber kendo momew mane Ruoth Nyasaye osingore ni nomi kwereu gi nyikwagi. 
Deuteronomy11:10 Piny ma ubiro donjoe mondo udagieno ok chal gi piny Misri kuma ne uaye, nimar kuno kane usechwoyoe cham, to bang’e nusombo pi uole, mana kaka itimo ni puoth alot." 
Deuteronomy11:11 To piny ma udonjoe mondo udagieno en piny motimo gode gi holni, kendo en piny koth." 
Deuteronomy11:12 Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu rito pinyno maber, kendo orange pilepile e higa ngima." 
Deuteronomy11:13 Omiyo kurito chike ma amiyou kawuonogi, mi uhero Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu, kendo utiyone gi chunyu duto," 
Deuteronomy11:14 to enokelnu koth e ndalo chwiri gi ndalo opon, mondo uyud cham gi mzabibu kod mo." 
Deuteronomy11:15 Enomi lum lodhi e legeu mondo jambu ocham, kendo un bende unuyud chiemo moromou." 
Deuteronomy11:16 To ritreuru mondo kik ulal, mi uti ni nyiseche mamoko kendo ulamgi." 
Deuteronomy11:17 Kutimo kamano, to mirimb Ruoth Nyasaye noliel kuomu ka mach, mi enomi koth rum. Piny ok nochieg cham, kendo karu nolal nono piyopiyo e piny momew ma Ruoth Nyasaye nomiuno." 
Deuteronomy11:18 Kanuru wechegi e chunyu, kutueyogi ka ranyisi e lwetu, kendo kuketogi e lend wengeu ka kido." 
Deuteronomy11:19 Puonjuru nyithindu wechegi kendo twaguru kuomgi ka un e mier, kata kuwuotho e yo, kata kudhi nindo, kata kuchiew." 
Deuteronomy11:20 Ndikgiuru e sirni mag dhoutu, kendo kuom rangeyeu," 
Deuteronomy11:21 mondo un gi nyithindu udag aming’a e piny ma Ruoth Nyasaye nosingore ni nomi kwereu obed maru nyaka chieng’. 
Deuteronomy11:22 “Ka urito chike ma amiyougi adimba, mi uhero Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu, kendo uwuotho e yorene duto, kuketo chunyu kuome," 
Deuteronomy11:23 to obiro riembonu ogendinigo mondo owenu thuolo, mi unukaw pinje mag ogendini madongo kendo marateke moloyou." 
Deuteronomy11:24 Kamano kamoro amora ma tiendu onyono nobed maru, kendo mbap pinyu nochakre e thim yo milambo nyaka piny Lebanon yo nyandwat, kendo chakre aora Yufrate yo wuok chieng’ nyaka nam Mediterania yo podho chieng’." 
Deuteronomy11:25 Onge kata ng’ato achiel ma nonyal sirou, kendo Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu nomi ji luorou, mi kibaji nogogi kuonde duto mudhiye, mana kaka nosingorenu." 
Deuteronomy11:26 Kawuono aketo gueth kod kuong’ e nyimu. 
Deuteronomy11:27 Ka urito chike mag Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu ma amiyou kawuono, to ubiro yudo gueth." 
Deuteronomy11:28 To ka ok uritogi, mi ubaro kuweyo yo ma asechikou kawuono mondo uluw, mulamo nyiseche mamoko ma ok ung’eyo, to ubiro yudo kuong’." 
Deuteronomy11:29 “Ka Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu oseterou e piny mudhiye mondo ukaw obed maru, to uhul weche gueth e got Gerizim, to weche mag kuong’ uhul e got Ebal." 
Deuteronomy11:30 Godego ni yo podho chieng’ mar aora Jordan, kama omanyore gi Gilgal, but yadh More, e yo mochiko piny jo-Kanaan." 
Deuteronomy11:31 Koro uchiegni ng’ado aora Jordan mondo udonj e piny ma Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu miyou mondo ukaw obed maru. To ka usekawe, mudakie," 
Deuteronomy11:32 to nyaka une ni urito chike gi buche ma amiyou kawuononi. 
Deuteronomy12:1 “Koro magi e chike kod buche ma onego urit maber e piny ma Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach kwereu miyou mondo obed maru kuom ndalo duto mudak e piny. 
Deuteronomy12:2 Nyaka uketh chuth kuonde ma ogendini mubiro riembogo lamoe nyisechegi, kata ka gin ewi gode maboyo kata ewi gode matindo, kata mana ka gin e tiend yath moro amora motimo otiep." 
Deuteronomy12:3 Mukuru kendegi mag liswa gi sirni maggi milamo mag kite, kendo uwang’ sirni maggi milamo mag yien, mi uketh kido mag nyisechegi. Kamano unuruch nying nyisechegi oko kuondego." 
Deuteronomy12:4 “Un to, kulamo Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu, to kik ulem kaka jogo ne lamo nyisechegi." 
Deuteronomy12:5 Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu owuon biro yiero kamoro e piny dhoodu moro mondo oketie nyinge. Kanyo kende ema unuchokrue kuom lamo Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu. 
Deuteronomy12:6 Kanyo ema ubiro keloe misengni mau miwang’o pep, kod misengni mamoko, gi chiwo mar achiel kuom apar, kod chiwo mamoko kod gik ma ukuong’oru ni ubiro chiwo, kod mago muchiwo kuom herou, kaachiel gi nyithindo makayo mag jambu." 
Deuteronomy12:7 Unuchiem kanyo e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu, kendo un gi jouteu unubed mamor, nikech Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu oseguedho gik moko duto mutimo." 
Deuteronomy12:8 “Kik udhi nyime gi gima watimo e ndaloni, ma ng’ato ka ng’ato timo mana gima ohero." 
Deuteronomy12:9 Usebedo kutimo kamano nikech pok uchopo kar yueyo, ma en piny ma Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu miyou ka mwanduu." 
Deuteronomy12:10 To ubiro ng’ado aora Jordan mondo udhi udag e piny ma Ruoth Nyasachu miyou ka mwanduu. Nomiu kue e kindu gi wasiku molworou koni gi koni, mi unudag maber." 
Deuteronomy12:11 Bang’e ukel gigo duto ma achikou kama Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu biro yiero mondo nyinge obedie. Kanyo ema unukelie misengni mau miwang’o pep, kod misengni mamoko gi chiwo mar achiel kuom apar, kod chiwo mamoko, kaachiel gi chiwo moyiedhi mukuong’oru ni ubiro kelo ni Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Deuteronomy12:12 Beduru mamor e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu, un gi yawuotu gi nyiu kod wasumbu machwo gi mamon, kaachiel gi jo-Lawi modak e miechu, nikech jo-Lawi onge gi piny mopognigi kaka opognu." 
Deuteronomy12:13 To kik uchiw misengni mau miwang’o pep kamoro amora muneno," 
Deuteronomy12:14 to chiwgiuru mana kama Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu biro yiero e piny dhoodu moro. Kanyo bende ema nyaka utimie gik moko duto machikou. 
Deuteronomy12:15 “To kata kamano, pod unyalo yeng’o e dala moro amora mondo ucham ring’o, e sa asaya muhero, mana kaka Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu omiyou. Ji duto, joma ogak kod joma ok ogak, nyalo chamo ring’ono, mana ka gima en ring ogunde kata ring mwanda." 
Deuteronomy12:16 Remo to kik ucham, to, oleuru piny mana ka pi." 
Deuteronomy12:17 To e miechu kik uchamie chiwo mar achiel kuom apar mag chambu kata mag divai kata mag mo, kendo kik uchamie nyithindo makayo mag jambu, kata chiwo mukwong’oru ni ubiro chiwo, kata mugolo kuom herou, kata mana chiwo moro amora mowal ni Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Deuteronomy12:18 Ubiro chamo gigo mana kama Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu biro yiero. Kanyo ema unuchiemie e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu, un gi yawuotu gi nyiu, kod wasumbu machwo gi mamon, kaachiel gi jo-Lawi modak e miechu. Unubed mamor e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu kuom gik moko duto mutimo." 
Deuteronomy12:19 Ndalo duto ma un e piny nyaka une ni ok ujwang’o jo-Lawi. 
Deuteronomy12:20 “Ka Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu oseyaro pinyu kaka osesingorenu, mi ng’atu moro ogombo chamo ring’o, to onyalo chame mana kaka odwaro." 
Deuteronomy12:21 To ka obedo ni kama Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu biro yiero mondo nyinge obedie bor kod ng’atno, to onyalo nego chiache moro ma Ruoth Nyasaye omiye, kendo onyalo chame e dalane sa asaya modwaro." 
Deuteronomy12:22 Onyalo chame mana kaka ng’ato chamo ring ogunde kata ring mwanda. Joma ogak kaachiel gi joma ok ogak nyalo chame. 
Deuteronomy12:23 To neuru ni ok uchamo remo, nimar remo e ngima, omiyo kik ucham ngima gi ring’o kanyakla." 
Deuteronomy12:24 Kik uchame, to oleuru piny mana ka pi." 
Deuteronomy12:25 Ka ok uchame, to ubiro dhi maber, kaachiel gi nyikwau nimar utimo gima long’o e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Deuteronomy12:26 To chiwo mowal ni Ruoth Nyasaye, kod gik mukuong’oru ni ubiro chiwo, nyaka ukel kama Ruoth Nyasaye biro yiero." 
Deuteronomy12:27 Misengni miwang’o pep, moriwo ring’o gi remo nyaka chiw e kendo-mar-misango mar Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu. To remb misengni mau mag sawo, nyaka ol e kendo-mar-misango mar Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu, mak mana ring’o ema unyalo chamo." 
Deuteronomy12:28 Rituru chike duto ma amiyougi adimba, mondo un gi nyikwau une maber mochwere, kutimo gik mabeyo kendo makare e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu." 
Deuteronomy12:29 “Ka Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu osetieko ogendini ma udonjo e pinygi, mi ukawo kargi, kendo udak e pinyno," 
Deuteronomy12:30 to beduru kutang’ mondo kik uluw timbegi, nono to gilokorenu obadho. Ka osetiekgi, mi giweyonu thuolo kamano, to kik upenjru ni, ‘Ere yo mane ogendinigi lamoe nyisechegi? Mondo wan bende watim mana machal kamano kamano.’" 
Deuteronomy12:31 Kik ulam Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu kaka gilamo nyisechegi, nikech Ruoth Nyasaye mon gi timbe makuero ma gilamogo nyisechegi, nimar gise kata mana wang’o ni nyisechegigo yawuotgi gi nyigi ka misango." 
Deuteronomy12:32 “Neuru ni urito gik moko duto machikou. Kik umedie gimoro, kata kik ugolie gimoro." 
Deuteronomy13:1 “Ka jakor wach kata jalek moro ohonore e kindu, mokoro ni ranyisi kata hono moro biro timore," 
Deuteronomy13:2 mi ranyisi kata hono mowuoyeno otimore, kendo bang’e owachonu ni mondo udhi uluw nyiseche mamoko ma ok ung’eyo, kendo ulam," 
Deuteronomy13:3 to kik uwinj wachne. Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu temou mondo ong’e ane kuhere gi chunyu duto. 
Deuteronomy13:4 Luwuru Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu kumiye duong’ kendo kurito chikene. Winjuru gima owacho, kendo lameuru kupadoru kuome." 
Deuteronomy13:5 To nyaka neg jakor wachno kata jalekno, nimar osewuoyo marach kodwaro ni mondo utamru winjo wach Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu mane oresou, kagolou Misri, kama nubedoe wasumbni. Ng’atno osetemo witou mondo uwe yo mane Ruoith Nyasaye ma Nyasachu ochikou mondo uluw. Kunege kamano, eka unugol richo ma kama kuomu." 
Deuteronomy13:6 “Ka owadu hie kata wuodi kata nyari kata chiegi mihero, kata mana osiepni migeno osemi ling’ling’ kawachoni ni mondo idhi ilam nyiseche mamoko ma in ok ing’eyo kata ma kwereni bende ne ok ong’eyo," 
Deuteronomy13:7 ma gin nyiseche mag ogendini moluorou, bed ni gin mabor kata machiegni," 
Deuteronomy13:8 to kik iyie, kata mana winjo wachne kik iwinji, nyaka inege anega mak iweye kata ikeche kata ichwake." 
Deuteronomy13:9 In ema nyaka ikwong keto lweti kuome, eka bang’e jou duto nokonyi nege." 
Deuteronomy13:10 Unugoye gi kite nyaka otho, nimar notemo hoyou mondo uwe Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu mane ogolou Misri kuma nubedoe wasumbni." 
Deuteronomy13:11 Jo-Israel duto nowinj wachno, mi ginidok, maluor, kendo gima rach makamano ok nochak otimre kuomu." 
Deuteronomy13:12 “Kuwinjo ni joweteu ma acheje osehoyo joma odak e dala moro ma Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu biro miyou mondo udagie," 
Deuteronomy13:13 ka giwachonigi ni mondo gidhi gilam nyiseche mamoko ma un ok ung’eyo," 
Deuteronomy13:14 to nonuru wachno matut. Koyud ni gima kuero kamano osetimore kuomu adier," 
Deuteronomy13:15 to nyaka uneg joma odak e dalano duto kaachiel gi dhok, kendo uketh chuth gik moko duto manie dalano." 
Deuteronomy13:16 Nyaka uchok mwandu duto mag dalano kanyakla, kendo uket e laru manie dier dalano. Eka uwang’ dala duto, kaachioel gi gik moko duto manie iye ka misango miwang’o pep ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu. Dalano ok noger kendo, to nodong’ gunda nyaka chieng’." 
Deuteronomy13:17 To kik ukaw gimoro kata achiel kuom gik monego keth chuthgo, eka mirima mager mar Ruoth Nyasaye norum, mi notimnu ng’wono kendo nomi unya kaka nosingore ni kwereu." 
Deuteronomy13:18 Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu biro timo kamano kuwinjo dwonde, kendo urito chikene ma amiyou kawuono, kendo kutimo gik malongo e nyime." 
Deuteronomy14:1 “Un e nyithind Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu, omiyo kik usar dendu kata kik uliel nyiem wengeu kuywago ng’at motho," 
Deuteronomy14:2 nikech un joma ler mowal ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu. Ruoth Nyasaye noyierou kuom ogendini duto manie piny mondo ubed joge owuon. 
Deuteronomy14:3 “Kik ucham gimoro makuero. 
Deuteronomy14:4 To jamni gi le munyalo chamo e magi: Dhiang’ gi rombo gi diel 
Deuteronomy14:5 gi nyakech gi ogunde gi ngawo gi diend thim gi puro gi omoro kod nyambaja. 
Deuteronomy14:6 Unyalo chamo kit jamni gi kit le duto ma ombong’gi opogore ariyo, kendo ma nyamo kambula." 
Deuteronomy14:7 To mak mana ni kik ucham mago ma nyamo kambula, to ombong’gi ok opogore ariyo, kata mago ma ombong’gi opogore ariyo to ok nyam kambula kaka ngamia gi apuoyo kod terere. Mago nyamo kambula to ombong’gi ok opogore, omiyo nyaka ukwan-gi ka gik makuero." 
Deuteronomy14:8 Mbidhi bende kik ucham, nikech kata ombong’ne opogore kamano, to ok onyam kambula omiyo en gima kuero. Kik ucham lego kata mulogi kik umulgi ka gisetho." 
Deuteronomy14:9 “Unyalo chamo rech duto man gi thuokgi kata man gi kagahla," 
Deuteronomy14:10 to kik ucham rech moro amora maonge gi gigo, nimar ka en kamano to en gima kuero." 
Deuteronomy14:11 “Unyalo chamo winy duto ma ok kuero," 
Deuteronomy14:12 to mago ma kuero ma kik ucham e magi: Ongo gi koga gi kwasi 
Deuteronomy14:13 gi kalamindi gi okunekune gi otenga gi winy machal kamago," 
Deuteronomy14:14 kod kit agak duto," 
Deuteronomy14:15 gi udo gi nyatawo gi okok kod kit olith duto," 
Deuteronomy14:16 gi tula matin gi tula maduong’ kod tula ma ite dongo," 
Deuteronomy14:17 gi mbusi gi achuth gi osou 
Deuteronomy14:18 kod nyamnaha gi kit ng’ang’a duto gi cherwa kod oliktik. 
Deuteronomy14:19 Gik mahuyo mang’eny kanyakla gin gik makuero, omiyo kik uchamgi." 
Deuteronomy14:20 To unyalo chamo gik mahuyo ma ok kuero. 
Deuteronomy14:21 Kik ucham gima otho kende, nimar un joma ler mowal ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu. Gima kamano unyalo miyo jopinje mamoko modak kodu mondo ocham, kata unyalo ng’iewe gi jopinje mamoko. “Kutedo nyadiel, to kik uolie cha min mare." 
Deuteronomy14:22 “Higa ka higa nyaka uket tenge achiel kuom apar mag gik moko duto monyak e puotheu, kaka cham gi divai gi mo, kaachiel gi nyithind jambu duto mokwong nywol." 
Deuteronomy14:23 Chamgiuru e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu kama obiro yiero mondo nyinge obedie. Kamano ubiro puonjoru luoro Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu ndalo duto. 
Deuteronomy14:24 To ka Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu oseguedhou gi gik mang’eny, kendo ng’atu moro odak mabor gi kama Ruoth Nyasaye biro yierono, ma ok onyal ting’o gigo motundgo kuno," 
Deuteronomy14:25 to onyalo lokogo pesa, moter kuno." 
Deuteronomy14:26 Kosetundo kuno, to onyalo ng’iewo gima ohero gi pesago, bed ni en ring dhiang’ kata ring rombo, divai kata kong’o. Unuchiem kuno gi joodu kumor e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu." 
Deuteronomy14:27 To dhiuru gi jo-Lawi modak kodu, ni mar dhood Lawi ok opogne piny kaka opognu." 
Deuteronomy14:28 “To bang’ higni adek ka higni adek, keluru achiel kuom apar mag gik monyaknu e higano, kendo uket e dhorangeyeu," 
Deuteronomy14:29 mondo jo-Lawi ma onge gi piny mopognigi, kod jopinje mamoko, gi nyithindo ma kiye kod mond liete modak kodu oyud chiemo moromogi. Kutimo kamano, to Nyasaye noguedh gik moko duto mutimo." 
Deuteronomy15:1 “Bang’ higni abiriyo ka higni abiriyo nyaka uwe gopeu duto ma ji nigo. 
Deuteronomy15:2 Unuwegi kama: Ng’ato ka ng’ato nyaka we gope ma ja-Israel wadgi oseholo kuome. Ok nochune mondo ochul, nikech higa ma Ruoth Nyasaye oketo mondo oweyee gope osechopo." 
Deuteronomy15:3 Jo pinje mamoko to unyalo chuno mondo ochul gope ma gin-go, to gopeu ma jo-Israel weteu nigo nyaka uwenigi." 
Deuteronomy15:4 To kuluoro Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu kendo urito chikene ma amiyougi, to jochan ok nobedie kuomu, e piny ma omiyou mondo obed mwanduu, to Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu noguedhu ahinya." 
Deuteronomy15:5  
Deuteronomy15:6 Ka Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu oseguedhou kaka nosingore ni notim, ji moa e pinje mang’eny biro holo gik moko kuomu, to un ok nuhol gimoro kuomgi. Pinje mang’eny nobed e bwo lochu, to un ok nubed e bwo lochgi." 
Deuteronomy15:7 “Kapo ni nitie jo-Israel weteu moko ma jochan e dalau moro e piny ma Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu biro miyou, to kik iu bed makwar, mutamru konyogi," 
Deuteronomy15:8 to ubednigi mang’won, mi uholgi gimoro amora ma gichando." 
Deuteronomy15:9 Kata dabed ni higa mar abiriyo miweyoe gope chiegni chopo, to kik ubed gi ich lit, mutamru miyogi gimoro. Jogo diywag ni Ruoth Nyasaye, mi dubed joricho." 
Deuteronomy15:10 Nyaka umigi gik ma gidwarogo mabup, kendo gi chuny maler. Kutimo kamano to Ruoth Nyasaye biro guedhou kuom gik moko duto mutimo." 
Deuteronomy15:11 Pile ubiro bedo gi jochan e pinyu, mano emomiyo achikou ni mondo ubed mang’won ni jo-Israel weteu ma jochan kata manie chandruok." 
Deuteronomy15:12 “Ka ing’iewo ja-Hibrania wadu ma dichwo kata ma dhako mondo obed misumbani, enotini kuom higni auchiel, to e higa mar abiriyo nyaka iweye odhi." 
Deuteronomy15:13 To kik iweye odhi gi lwete nono," 
Deuteronomy15:14 mak ikowe mabup gi jamni kod cham gi divai. Bedne mang’won, mana kaka Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu osebedoni mang’won." 
Deuteronomy15:15 Paruru ni ne un wasumbni e piny Misri, to Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu noresou. Mano emomiyo amiyou chikni." 
Deuteronomy15:16 To ka misumbanino ohero dak kodi, mi owacho ni ok odwar weyo dalani, nikech oheri kaachiel gi joodi," 
Deuteronomy15:17 to ikaw riw, ituchgo ite, kitenoe dhoot, eka nobed misumbani kuom ngimane duto. Chikno oriwo koda ka misumba ma dhako bende." 
Deuteronomy15:18 “To kapo ni iweyo ni misumba thuolo odhi, to onge gima inyalo ywago, nimar ka dine indiko jatich, to dine ichulo msara nyadiriyo moloyo ting’ mane ikawo kirito misumbano. Kamano Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu noguedh gik moko duto mitimo." 
Deuteronomy15:19 “Waluru kach jambu machwo duto ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu. Kik uket ruedhi ma jou okuongo nywolo e tich, bende kik ung’ad yie imbe ma rombu okuongo nywolo," 
Deuteronomy15:20 to giga ka giga nyaka utergi kuma Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu biro yiero, mondo uchamgi kaachiel gi jouteu e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye kuno." 
Deuteronomy15:21 To ka chiayo moro nigi songa, kata ka osuto, kata ka en muofu kata ka en gi mbala moro marach manade, to kik timgo misango ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu." 
Deuteronomy15:22 Unyalo chame e miechu. Joma ogak kaachiel gi joma ok ogak nyalo chamo ring’ono mana ka gima en ring ogunde kata ring mwanda. 
Deuteronomy15:23 Remo to kik ucham, to oleuru piny mana ka pi." 
Deuteronomy16:1 “Nyaka utim Sap Pasaka e due mar Abib, nimar dueno ema ne Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu ogolou e Misri gotieno." 
Deuteronomy16:2 Nyaka uneg nyarombo kata nyadiel kata nyaroya kutimogo misango mar Pasaka ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu, kama obiro yiero mondo nyinge obedie." 
Deuteronomy16:3 Kik ucham sawono gi makati moketie thowi, to kuom ndalo abiriyo unucham mana makati ma ok ketie thowi, ma en ranyisi mar sandruoku, nikech nuwuok Misri kurikni. Mano nobednu rapar mochwere muparogo chieng’ mane uwuokie Misri." 
Deuteronomy16:4 Kik ubed gi thowi kamoro amora e pinyu kuom ndalo abiriyogo, to bende ring chiayo muyang’o godhiambo e odiechieng’ mokwongo mar sawo kik nind nyaka okinyi mak uwang’o pep." 
Deuteronomy16:5 Kik uyang’ jamni mag Pasaka e mier ma Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu dwaro miyou," 
Deuteronomy16:6 to mak mana kama obiro yiero mondo nyinge obedie. Nyaka uyang’gi godhiambo ka chieng’ podho, e sa mane uwuokie Misri." 
Deuteronomy16:7 Nyaka uted ringgi kendo ucham kama Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu biro yiero, to kinyne nyaka udog e miechu." 
Deuteronomy16:8 Chamuru makati ma ok ketie thowi kuom ndalo auchiel, to chieng’ mar abiriyo nyaka ubed gi chokruok kaka Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu dwaro, kendo kik uti tich moro amora chieng’no." 
Deuteronomy16:9 “Kwanuru jumbe abiriyo, chakre ndalo michako kayoe cham." 
Deuteronomy16:10 Bang’ jumbego nyaka utim Sap Jumbe kaka Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu dwaro kukelo chiwo ma ng’ato golo kuom dwarone, maromre gi gueth ma Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu guedhougo." 
Deuteronomy16:11 Un kaachiel gi yawuotu kod nyiu, gi wasumbu machwo kod mamon, gi jo-Lawi modak e miechu gi jopinje mamoko gi nyithindo ma kiye kod mond liete modak kodu, nubed mamor e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu, kama obiro yiero mondo nyinge obedie." 
Deuteronomy16:12 Paruru ni ne un wasumbni e piny Misri. Mano emomiyo nyaka une ni urito chikego. 
Deuteronomy16:13 “Kusetieko kayo ngano kendo pono mzabibu, to nyaka utim Sap Kiche kuom ndalo abiriyo." 
Deuteronomy16:14 Unutim sawono gi mor, kaachiel gi yawuotu gi nyiu kod wasumbu machwo gi mamon gi jo-Lawi kod jopinje mamoko gi nyithi kiye kod mond liete modak kodu." 
Deuteronomy16:15 Nyaka utime ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu kaka obiro yiero, nimar unubed mamor ka Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu oguedho gik monyak e puotheu kod gik moko duto mutimo." 
Deuteronomy16:16 “Jou machwo duto nyaka bi e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye didek e higa ka higa, mondo otim sewni adekgo kama Ruoth Nyasaye biro yiero. Gin Sap Makati ma ok ketie Thowi, gi Sap Jumbe, kod Sap Kiche. Onge ng’at ma nobi e nyim Nyasaye gi lwete nono." 
Deuteronomy16:17 To ng’ato ka ng’ato nyaka kel gima romre gi gueth ma Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu oseguedhego. 
Deuteronomy16:18 “Unuyier jang’ad bura kod jotend dhoutu e mier duto ma Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu biro miyou, kendo nyaka ging’ad ni ji bura kare." 
Deuteronomy16:19 Kik ung’ad buch amwor kata buch nyakonchiel, to bende kik ucham asoya, nimar asoya mono kata mana ng’at mariek wacho adiera, kendo wito buch ng’at ma onge ketho." 
Deuteronomy16:20 Nyaka une ni uluwo mana adiera kende. Kutimo kamano, to unudag aming’a e piny ma Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu biro miyou." 
Deuteronomy16:21 “Kik upidh yath moro amora milamo but kendo-mar-misango, mubiro gero ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu," 
Deuteronomy16:22 kata kik uchung siro milamo, nimar gin gik ma Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu ok dwar." 
Deuteronomy17:1 “Kik utim misango ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu gi rwath kata rombo kata diel man gi mbala kata songa, nikech gima kamano en kuero e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Deuteronomy17:2 “Kapo ni unwang’o ng’at ma dichwo e dala moro amora ma Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu biro miyou, kotimo gima rach e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, mi oketho singruok kendo odagi chikna," 
Deuteronomy17:3 kolamo kendo okulore ni nyiseche mamoko, kata ni wang’chieng kata ni due kata ni gimoro amora manie kor polo," 
Deuteronomy17:4 to nyaka unon wachno maber. Ka ofweny malong’o ni gima rach kamano osetimore adier e Israel," 
Deuteronomy17:5 to nyaka ukel ng’at motimo kamano e dhoranga dala, mi ugoye gi kite nyaka otho, kata da bed ni en dhako kata en dichwo." 
Deuteronomy17:6 Kik ung’ad ni ng’ato buch tho ka nitie mana janeno achiel kende, to unyalo ng’adone buch tho mana ka nitie joneno ariyo kata adek." 
Deuteronomy17:7 Joneno ema nyaka kwong goyo ng’at ma kamano gi kite, eka ji duto bende nogoye. Kamano e kaka unupwodhru kuom richo ma kamano." 
Deuteronomy17:8 “Kapo ni unwang’o buche matek ma ok unyal ng’ado, to nyaka udhi piyopiyo kama Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu biro yiero. Buchego nyalo bet mag nek, kata mag laro gimoro kata mag gorruok." 
Deuteronomy17:9 Unudhi ir jodolo ma jo-Lawi man kuno, kendo ir jang’ad bura muyudo ka nie tich kuno, mondo unyisgi wachno, kendo gin ema gining’ad bura." 
Deuteronomy17:10 Gima giwachonu kama Ruoth Nyasaye biro yierono ema nyaka utim. 
Deuteronomy17:11 Nyaka une ni utimo mana kaka giwachonu, ma ok uweyo kata matin." 
Deuteronomy17:12 Ng’ato ang’ata modagi wach jadolo matiyo ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu kanyo, kata modagi wach jang’ad bura, nyaka negi. Kamano e kaka unupwodh jo-Israel kuom richo ma kamano." 
Deuteronomy17:13 Kutimo kamano, to ji duto nowinj wachno, mi ginibed maluor, kendo onge ng’at ma nochak otim wichteko." 
Deuteronomy17:14 “Ka usedonjo e piny ma Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu biro miyou mondo ukaw, udagie, mi uparo ni mondo uket ruoth oritu kaka ogendini duto moluorou timo," 
Deuteronomy17:15 to nyaka uket mana ng’at ma Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu noyiernu. Ng’at ma uketo ruothno nyaka bed mana ja-Israel wadu, to kik uket ng’at ma ok ja-Israel." 
Deuteronomy17:16 Kik ruodhno bed gi farese mang’eny, to bende kik oor jo-Israel Misri mondo oomne farese moko ni eka omed bedo gi farese mang’eny, nimar Ruoth Nyasaye nokwerou ni kik udog kuno kendo ngang’." 
Deuteronomy17:17 Kik obed gi mon mathoth, nikech mano dipo koketho parone, to mwandu bende kik obedgo mang’eny." 
Deuteronomy17:18 Kosekete ruoth, to nyaka ondik weche duto mag chik, kogologi e kitap chik ma jadolo ma jo-Lawi nigo." 
Deuteronomy17:19 Nyaka obed gi kitabuno, kendo nyaka osome pile e ndalo duto mag ngimane, mondo opuonjrego luoro Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasache, korito chike gi buchego duto." 
Deuteronomy17:20 Kotimo kamano, to ok nosungre ni jowadgi, kendo ok nowe mak orito chikego kata matin. Bang’e en kaachiel gi nyikwaye ginibed ruodhi mag Israel aming’a." 
Deuteronomy18:1 “Jodolo ma jo-Lawi, tiende ni dhood Lawi duto, ok noyud pinygi giwegi kaka dhout Israel mamoko. Ginibed ka giyudo pokgi mana kuom misengni motim ni Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo kuom dir mwandu muchiwo ni Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Deuteronomy18:2 Kaka ok giniyud piny mopognigi ka mwandugi, Ruoth Nyasaye owuon ema nobed mwandugi kaka nosingore." 
Deuteronomy18:3 Ka ji timo misango gi rwath kata gi rombo kata gi diel, to nyaka gimi jadolo bat gi lem duto kod chino kaka lembgi." 
Deuteronomy18:4 Bende nyaka umigi cham mukwongo kayo gi divai mukwongo loso, gi mor zeituni mokwongo nyak, kaachiel gi yie rombu mukwongo ng’ado," 
Deuteronomy18:5 nimar Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu oseyierogi kuom dhoutu duto mondo gin kaachiel gi nyikwagi giti e nying Ruoth Nyasaye nyaka chieng’. 
Deuteronomy18:6 “Ka ja-Lawi moro modak e achiel kuom miech Israel obiro kuom herone kama Ruoth Nyasaye biro yiero," 
Deuteronomy18:7 mi otiyo tich dolo e nying Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasache kaka jo-Lawi wetene ma tiyo e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye kanyo," 
Deuteronomy18:8 to nyaka oyud pok maromre kodgi, ka ok okwan mwandu monego ocham e dala wuon mare." 
Deuteronomy18:9 “Kusedonjo e piny ma Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu biro miyou, to kik upuonjru luwo timbe makuero mag ogendini mamoko modak e pinyno." 
Deuteronomy18:10 Kik uyie ni ng’ato kuomu wang’ wuode kata nyare ka gir misango. Bende kik bedie jakor kata jambofwa kata jadil kata jandagla 
Deuteronomy18:11 kata ajuok nyakalondo kata japenj jochiende wach. 
Deuteronomy18:12 Joma kamago Ruoth Nyasaye okwedo, kendo timbegi makuerogo ema omiyo Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu riembo ogendinigo mondo owenu thuolo." 
Deuteronomy18:13 Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu dwaro mondo utine gi chunyu duto. 
Deuteronomy18:14 “Ogendini ma ubiro kawo pinygigo oyie gi weche jombofwa kod weche jokor, to un, Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu okwerou ni kik utim gik ma kamago." 
Deuteronomy18:15 Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu noyier janabi moro ka an kuom jou uwegi, kendo nyaka uwinj wachne." 
Deuteronomy18:16 Mano e gima nukwayo Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu chieng’ mane uchokore Horeb, kuwacho niya, ‘Owinjore kik wachak wawinj dwond Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachwa, bende ok onego wachak wane mach maduong’ kama kendo, nono to wabiro tho.’" 
Deuteronomy18:17 Eka Ruoth Nyasaye nowachona niya, ‘Gima giwachono ni kare." 
Deuteronomy18:18 Abiro yieronigi janabi kaka in, kuom ogandagi giwegi. Abiro keto wechena e dhoge, kendo enowachnigi weche duto ma achike." 
Deuteronomy18:19 Ng’ato ang’ata modagi winjo wachna ma janabino wacho, to noyal." 
Deuteronomy18:20 To janabi ma nohedhre wacho wach moro e nyinga ma ok achike ni mondo owachi, kata ma nowuo e nying nyiseche mamoko, nyaka negi.’" 
Deuteronomy18:21 To ma e kaka unyalo ng’eyo wach ma ok oa kuom Ruoth Nyasaye: 
Deuteronomy18:22 Ka janabi owacho wach moro e nying Ruoth Nyasaye to bang’e wachno ok ochopo kare, mano nyiso ni ok en wach Ruoth Nyasaye, to osewuoyo mana gi tekone owuon. Omiyo kik umiye duong’." 
Deuteronomy19:1 “Ka Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu osetieko ogendini ma obiro miyou pinygi, mi ukawo miechgi gi utegi, udakie," 
Deuteronomy19:2 to unuyier mier adek manie pinyno. 
Deuteronomy19:3 Poguru pinyno didek, kendo ulosie yore mondo ka ng’ato onego wadgi, to nyalo luwo kadhi tony e achiel kuom miego." 
Deuteronomy19:4 Ng’at moboth monego wadgi ma ok gimonrego ema nyalo ringo dhi kuno mondo ores ngimane. 
Deuteronomy19:5 Ranyisi mar nek moboth kamano chal kama: Ng’ato nyalo dhi e bungu gi wadgi mondo otong’ yien, to ka onyigore gi le kong’udo, mi wi le obwodhore oa e loge mogoyo wadgino monego, to ng’atno nyalo ringo dhi e achiel kuom miego mondo ores ngimane." 
Deuteronomy19:6 Ka ok uloso yorego, kata ka miego bor gi kar nek, to ng’at ma dwaro chulo kuor dipo kolawo janek ka pod mirimbe liet, mi ojuke, kendo onege. To chutho, janekno ok owinjore negi, nikech ne ok gimonre gi wadgi mane onegono." 
Deuteronomy19:7 Mano emomiyo achikou mondo uyier mier adek. 
Deuteronomy19:8 “To kapo ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu oyaro pinyu, mi omiyou piny duto mane osingore ni kwereu ni nomiu," 
Deuteronomy19:9 to nyaka umed yiero mier moko adek kuom mago. Adier enomiu pinyno, kuketo chunyu kuom rito chik ma amiyou kawuononi, mi uhero Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu kuwuotho e yorene pile." 
Deuteronomy19:10 Kuyiero miego, to remb joma onge ketho ok nochuer e piny ma Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu biro miyou obed mwanduu, kendo richo mar chuero remo ok nobed kuomu." 
Deuteronomy19:11 “To ka nga’to nigi sigu gi wadgi, mi obutone, eka opoye, kendo ogoye motho, mi bang’e oringo odhi e achiel kuom miego," 
Deuteronomy19:12 jodong dalagi nyaka or ji moko mondo oome, mi kete e lwet owadgi jal monegono, mondo onege ka chulonego kuor." 
Deuteronomy19:13 Kik ukeche, nyaka ugol ketho mar chuero remb ng’at ma ok oketho oko kuom piny Israel. Kamano unudag maber." 
Deuteronomy19:14 “Ka udak e lowo mubiro yudo e piny ma Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasacu dwaro miyou, to kik ng’ato kuomu gol kidi ma kwereu noketo manyiso kiepe gi wadgi." 
Deuteronomy19:15 “Wach janeno achiel kende ok nyal mi ng’ad ni ng’ato bura kuom ketho moro, kata kuom richo moro, to wach nyaka ng’ere malong’o e nyim joneno ariyo kata adek." 
Deuteronomy19:16 Ka ng’ato obedo janeno mar miriambo mana ni mondo ohiny wadgi kuom ketho moro," 
Deuteronomy19:17 ji ariyogo nyaka chung’ e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye kendo e nyim jodolo gi jong’ad bura. 
Deuteronomy19:18 Jong’ad bura nyaka non wachno matut, to ka giyudo ni janenono hango ni wadgi wach," 
Deuteronomy19:19 to nyaka utimne mana kaka odwaro timo ni wadgino. Mano e kaka unupwodhru kuom richo ma kamano. 
Deuteronomy19:20 Bang’e jou moko duto nowinj wachno, mi ginidok maluor, kendo gima rach ma kamano ok nochak otimre kuomu." 
Deuteronomy19:21 Kik ukech jaketho. Ngima nyaka chul kar ngima, wang’ kar wang’, lak kar lak, lwedo kar lwedo, kendo tielo kar tielo." 
Deuteronomy20:1 “Kudhi kedo gi wasiku, muneno ogandagi ka duong’ moloyo maru, kendo nigi farese kod geche lweny, to kik uluorgi, nimar Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu ma nogolou Misri ni kodu." 
Deuteronomy20:2 Ka uchiegni rado kodgi, to jadolo nowuogi e nyim ogandau mar lweny," 
Deuteronomy20:3 kendo nowach niya, ‘Un jo-Israel, winjuru, kawuono uyworo machiegni mondo uked gi wasigu. Kik chunyu nyosre, kendo kik uluor. Kibaji bende kik gou kuneno wasikugo," 
Deuteronomy20:4 nikech Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu ema dhi kodu, mondo okednu, kendo olonu wasigu.’" 
Deuteronomy20:5 Jodongo bende nowach ni jolweny niya, ‘Ka ng’at moro kuomu osegero ot manyien, to pok orwako, onego odog dala, nimar dipo ka otho e lweny, mi ng’at machielo ema orwako odno." 
Deuteronomy20:6 Kata ng’at mosepidho mzabibu, to pok ochamo olembgi, bende onego odog dala, nimar dipo ka otho e lweny, mi ng’at moro nono ema ochamo olembego." 
Deuteronomy20:7 To bende ka nitie ng’ato mosenywomo nyako, to pok okawo, onego odog dala, nimar dipo ka otho e lweny, mi ng’at moro ema okawo chiege.’" 
Deuteronomy20:8 Jodongo nomed wuoyo gi jolweny, kawacho niya, ‘Bende kapo ni nitie ng’ama luor, kata ma chunye onyosore, to onego odog dala nikech dipo ka omiyo jowetene obedo maluor ka en.’" 
Deuteronomy20:9 Ka jodongo osetieko wuoyo, eka noket jotend lweny." 
Deuteronomy20:10 “Kuchopo machiegni gi dala mudhi kedogo, to penjuru jodalano ka gidwaro timo kodu winjruok mar kue." 
Deuteronomy20:11 Ka giyie timo kodu winjruok, mi giyawonu dhoranga dala, to nyaka uchun ji duto munwang’o dalano e mondo otinu." 
Deuteronomy20:12 To ka gidagi timo kodu winjruok, mi gichako kedo kodu, to lworuru dalano," 
Deuteronomy20:13 kendo ka Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu okete e lwetu, to nyaka uneg chwo duto man kanyo." 
Deuteronomy20:14 To unyalo kawo mon gi nyithindo, kendo yako jamni kod gik moko duto manie dalano, mi ukonyru gi gik ma Ruoth Nyasaye oseketo e lwetugo kaka uhero." 
Deuteronomy20:15 Timuru kamano ni mier duto man mabor gi pinyu, mak mana miech ogendini mokiewo kodu ema kik utimnigi kamano." 
Deuteronomy20:16 To e miech ogendini ma Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu biro miyougo, kik uweyee kata gimoro achiel ka ngima." 
Deuteronomy20:17 Jo-Hiti gi jo-Amor gi jo-Kanaan gi jo-Perizi gi jo-Hivi kod jo-Jebus, nyaka utiek chuth, kaka Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu osechiko." 
Deuteronomy20:18 Timuru kamano mondo kik gipuonju luwo timbegi makuero ma gitimo ni nyisechegi, nimar timbe ma kamago gin richo e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu." 
Deuteronomy20:19 “Ka uselworo dala moro kuom kinde malach mondo ukaw, to kik utong’ yiend dalano mi ukethi. Unyalo mana chamo olembgi, to kik utong’gi, nimar yath ok en dhano ma unyalo kedogo." 
Deuteronomy20:20 To unyalo ng’ado kata tong’o yien ma ung’eyo ni olembgi ok cham, mi ugergo raidhi kod gilweny mamoko mondo umonjgo dala mukedogo, nyaka ukaw." 
Deuteronomy21:1 “Ka oyud ringre ng’at motho ka oriere e pap e piny ma Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu dwaro miyou, to ng’at monege ok ong’e," 
Deuteronomy21:2 jodongu gi jou ma jong’ad bura nyaka dhi opim bor mae kind kama ringruokne nitie, gi miech gweng’no, mondo ong’e ni ere dala machiegni gi kanyo." 
Deuteronomy21:3 Jodong dala machiegni gi ringruokno nyaka yier nyaroya ma pok otiyo tich moro kata ma pok oywayo jok. 
Deuteronomy21:4 Ginikele e holo moro ma ok pur man gi aora ma ok dwon, kendo ginitur ng’ute kanyo." 
Deuteronomy21:5 Jodolo ma jo-Lawi bende nyaka bedie, nikech Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu oseyierogi mondo gitine, kendo giguedh ji e nyinge. Gin ema omigi tich ng’ado buche ma ji laroe gimoro, kod buche goruok duto." 
Deuteronomy21:6 Bang’e jodongo duto mag dala machiegni gi ringruokno nyaka log lwetgi kuom nyaroya mosetur ng’ute e holo cha," 
Deuteronomy21:7 ka giwacho niya, ‘Wan ne ok wachuero remoni, kata ng’at ma nochuere bende ne ok waneno." 
Deuteronomy21:8 A Ruoth Nyasaye, yie iwe richo mag jogi Israel ma isewaro, kendo kik iyie mondo remo ma onge gi ketho mien-gi.’ Kamano ginipwodhre kuom richo mar chuero remono." 
Deuteronomy21:9 Mano e kaka unugol remo ma onge gi ketho kuomu, kutimo gima ber ma Ruoth Nyasaye dwarono." 
Deuteronomy21:10 “Kusekedo gi wasiku, mi Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu oketogi e lwetu, kendo umako jomoko udhigo," 
Deuteronomy21:11 mi ng’ato kuomu oneno dhako moro ma jaber kuomgi ma doher mondo okendi," 
Deuteronomy21:12 to onyalo kawe akawa, motere dala. Bang’ mano noliel wiye, mi ong’ad koke," 
Deuteronomy21:13 kendo olony lewni mane omakego. Dhakono nodag e dala ng’atno koywago min gi wuon kuom due ngima, eka ng’atno nyalo loke dhako." 
Deuteronomy21:14 To kapo ni bang’e ojok kode, to onyalo weye odhi kuma ohero. To ok nong’iewe gi ng’ato, kata loke misumba, nikech oseriwore kode." 
Deuteronomy21:15 “Ka ng’ato nigi mon ariyo, ma achiel ohero, to machielo ok ohero, to dhako ma ok oherono ema onywolone wuowi makayo," 
Deuteronomy21:16 kendo kinde modwaro lamo nie yawuowi ochopo, to kik okaw wuod dhako moherono ka wuode makayo kar wuod dhako ma ok ohero, ma adier e wuowi makayo." 
Deuteronomy21:17 Nyaka omi wuode makayo duong’ne mar nywol, kopogone pok nyadiriyo moloyo yawuote mamoko, kata dabed ni en wuod dhako mocha kamano, nimar en e wuode motieko wuowine, omiyo duong’ mar nywol en mare." 
Deuteronomy21:18 “Kapo ni ng’ato nigi wuowi ma wiye tek kendo ma achach, ma ok nyal winjo jonywolne, kata da gikume," 
Deuteronomy21:19 to nyaka gimake, mi gitere e nyim jodongo e dhoranga dala." 
Deuteronomy21:20 Giniwach ni jodongo niya, ‘Wuodwani wiye tek, kendo en achach. Ok otim gima wawachone, bende timbene richo kendo ojamer.’" 
Deuteronomy21:21 Eka jodalano duto nyaka goye gi kite nyaka otho. Mano e kaka unupwodhru kuom richo ma kamano, mi jo-Israel duto nowinj wachno, kendo nobed maluor." 
Deuteronomy21:22 “Ka oseng’ad ni ng’ato buch tho, mi onege, kendo olier ringre e yath," 
Deuteronomy21:23 to ringreno kik we kanyo otienono duto. Nyaka yike chieng’ onogo, mondo kik uketh piny ma Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu biro miyou ka mwanduu, nikech ng’at molier e yath okuong’ e nyim Nyasaye." 
Deuteronomy22:1 “Kineno dher wadu moro kata rombone ka ringo lal, kik iweye to nyaka igeng’e, mi idwoke ni wuon-go." 
Deuteronomy22:2 Kopo ni wuon-go ok jagweng’u, kata ka ok ing’eye, to nyaka iter chiayono e dalani, kendo irite nyaka wuon-go nwang’e kuomi, eka idwoknego." 
Deuteronomy22:3 Nyaka itim kamano ni kanj wadu, kata ni lawe, kata ni gimoro amora molalne, to kik iweye orweny." 
Deuteronomy22:4 Kineno kanj wadu moro kata dhere kopodho e yo, to kik iwe mak ikonyo wuon-go chunge." 
Deuteronomy22:5 “Dhako kik rwakre ka dichwo, dichwo bende kik rwakre ka dhako, nimar joma otimo kamano okwedi e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu." 
Deuteronomy22:6 “Kapo ni iyudo od winyo man gi nyithindo kata tong’ e yath manie dir yo, kata man piny e lowo ka min-gi butnoe, to kik ikaw min-gi kaachiel gi nyithinde." 
Deuteronomy22:7 Nyaka iwe min-gi dhi, to ikaw mana nyithinde kende. Kamano inibed maber kendo nidag aming’a." 
Deuteronomy22:8 “Ka igero ot, to nyaka iriw rageng’ e lak tado gi yo ka oko, mondo kik ng’ato podhi koa e wi tatino, mi kel bura mar remo kuom odi." 
Deuteronomy22:9 “Kik ipidh kodhi moro amora e puothi mar mzabibu, nimar kitimo kamano, to gik ma kodhino onyago, kaachiel gi olembe mag mzabibu nyaka chiw ni Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Deuteronomy22:10 “Kik ipur gi dhiang’ kod kanyna e kwer achiel. 
Deuteronomy22:11 “Kik irwak law molos gi usi mar yie rombo mokik gi usi mar katana. 
Deuteronomy22:12 “Nyaka iket usi momin e konde ang’wen mag lawi mar abola. 
Deuteronomy22:13 “Ka ng’ato okendo chiege, to bang’e ojok kode," 
Deuteronomy22:14 mi ohangone wach kendo oketho nyinge, kowacho ni nokawe to ok oyude gi ringre," 
Deuteronomy22:15 to jonywol nyakono nyaka dhi ir jodongo e dhoranga dala, ka gitero gima nyiso ni nyargino ne nigi ringre." 
Deuteronomy22:16 Eka wuon nyako nowachni jodongo niya, ‘Namiyo ng’atni nyara mondo okendi, to koro ojok kode," 
Deuteronomy22:17 omiyo osehangone wach, kendo oketho nyinge kowacho ni ne ok oyude gi ringre. To kata kamano ma e gima nyiso ni nyara ne nigi ringre.’ Bang’ mano, noyar law mane oywego ringre nyakono e nyim jodong dala." 
Deuteronomy22:18 Jodongogo nyaka chwad ng’atno," 
Deuteronomy22:19 kendo goye faini pesa moromo fedha mia achiel mondo omi wuon nyako, nikech ng’atno oseketho nying nyar Israel. Nyakono nosik kode, kendo ok noriembe nyaka chieng’." 
Deuteronomy22:20 To ka en adier ni nyakono ne onge gi ringre, kendo onge gima nyiso ni ne en gi ringre," 
Deuteronomy22:21 to nyaka tere e dhood wuon mare, kendo jodalagi nogoye gi kite nyaka otho nimar osekelo wichkuot e piny Israel kochodo ka pod en e dala wuon. Mano e kaka unupwodhru kuom richo ma kamano." 
Deuteronomy22:22 “Ka onwang’ ng’ato ka terore gi chi wadgi, to nyaka neggi giduto. Mano e kaka unupwodh jo-Israel kuom richo ma kamano." 
Deuteronomy22:23 “Ka ng’ato onwang’o nyako moro minywomo, mi oterore kode e dala," 
Deuteronomy22:24 to nyaka ukelgi giduto e dhoranga dala, mi ugogi gi kite nyaka githo. Nyaka neg nyakono nikech kata obedo ni ne en e dala kamano, to ne ok ogoyo uwi mondo okonye. Ng’atno to nyaka neg kuom kuodo wi chi wadgi. Mano e kaka unupwodh ogandau kuom richo ma kamano." 
Deuteronomy22:25 “To ka ng’ato oyudo nyako moro minywomo, mi omako, kendo oterorego gi thwon oko e pap, to ng’atno kende ema nyaka negi." 
Deuteronomy22:26 Kik utim gimoro ni nyako, nikech en ok osetimo gimoro moromore gi buch tho," 
Deuteronomy22:27 nimar ng’atno nomake oko e pap, omiyo kata obedo ni nogoyo uwi to onge ng’at mane nyalo konye. Tim ma kamano chalo gi tim ng’at momonjo wadgi monego." 
Deuteronomy22:28 “Ka ng’ato omako nyako ma ok nywom, mi oterorego, bang’e ofwenygi," 
Deuteronomy22:29 to nyaka ng’atno chul wuon nyako pesa moromo fedha piero abich. To bende nyaka okend nyakono, nikech osemiye wichkuot, kendo ok onyal riembe nyaka chieng’." 
Deuteronomy22:30 “Kik ng’ato ter chi wuon mare, nimar kotimo kamano, to okuodo wi wuon." 
Deuteronomy23:1 “Ng’at ma nyangetane otore kata ma duong’ne ong’ad oko, kik donj e chokruok mar jo-Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Deuteronomy23:2 “Kimirwa kik donji e chokruok mar jo-Ruoth Nyasaye, nyaka nyikwaye mar apar." 
Deuteronomy23:3 “Jo-Amon gi jo-Moab kata mana nyaka nyikwagi mar apar kik donj e chokruok mar jo-Ruoth Nyasaye. Ok ginidonj e chokruokno," 
Deuteronomy23:4 nikech ne ok giromonu gi chiemo kata gi pi kane uwuok Misri, to bende nikech ne giluongo Balaam wuod Beor modak Pethor manie piny Mesopotamia mondo okuong’u." 
Deuteronomy23:5 To Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu ne ok odewo wach Balaam, mi noloko kuong’no obedonu mana gueth, nikech noherou." 
Deuteronomy23:6 Kik udwar gima dikelnigi kue kata gima dikelnigi dongruok e ndalou duto. 
Deuteronomy23:7 “To kik ukaw jo-Edom ka joma okwedi, nikech gin joweteu, bende kik ukaw jo-Misri ka joma okwedi nikech ne udak e pinygi ndalo moko." 
Deuteronomy23:8 Nyikwagi mar adek ema nyalo donjo e chokruok mar jo-Ruoth Nyasaye. 
Deuteronomy23:9 “Ka un e kambi ndalo lweny, to kik utim gimoro mochido." 
Deuteronomy23:10 Ka ng’at moro kuomu ogak nikech nende olekore gotieno, to nyaka owuog oa e kambi mobed oko." 
Deuteronomy23:11 To kochopo odhiambo, nyaka olwokre, eka oduog e kambi ka chieng’ podho." 
Deuteronomy23:12 Nyaka ubed gi kamoro oko mulosorue," 
Deuteronomy23:13 kendo kudhi kanyo, to nyaka udhi gi rapur, ukunygo bur, mi ka uselosoru to uiko." 
Deuteronomy23:14 Nyaka utim kamano nikech Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu wuotho kuonde duto e kambiu, mondo oritu kendo omiu loyo wasiku. Emomiyo kambiu nyaka bed maler, mondo kik Ruoth Nyasaye nwang’ie gimoro marach ma dimi oweu." 
Deuteronomy23:15 “Ka misumba moro opondo koa e piny moro, mi oringo obiro iru, to kik uduoke ni ruodhe." 
Deuteronomy23:16 Nyaka uweye odag e pinyu e dala moro amora mohero. To kik uloke misumba. 
Deuteronomy23:17 “Onge nyar Israel moro kata wuod Israel moro manyalo bedo jachode e od lemo. 
Deuteronomy23:18 Pesa ma dhako moro kata ma dichwo moro oyudo kuom chode kik kel e Od Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu mondo ochopgo kuong’ruok, nikech pesa moyud kamano okwedi e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu." 
Deuteronomy23:19 “Kik imi ja-Israel wadu chul ohala kuom gima oholo, bed ni en pesa, kata chiemo, kata gimoro amora monego dwok gi ohala." 
Deuteronomy23:20 Inyalo kawo ohala kuom gima iholo japiny moro nono, to ok kuom ja-Israel wadu. Kuluwo chikno, to Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu noguedhu kuom gik moko duto mutimo e piny ma ubiro donjoe mondo udagie." 
Deuteronomy23:21 “Kikuong’ori kuom wach moro, to nyaka ichop kuong’ruokno piyopiyo, nikech ka ok itimo kamano, to Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu nobandhi wachno, kendo nibed jaketho." 
Deuteronomy23:22 Ka ok ikuong’ori to ok iketho," 
Deuteronomy23:23 to kikuong’ori ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu kuom heroni iwuon, to nyaka irit kendo ichop gima iwachono." 
Deuteronomy23:24 “Ka idonjo e puoth ng’ato mar mzabibu to inyalo chamo mzabibu kaka ihero, to kik ikaw moko iago." 
Deuteronomy23:25 Bende kidonjo e puoth ng’ato mar cham, to inyalo jako ajaka cham gi lweti, to kik ika gi pala." 
Deuteronomy24:1 “Ka ng’ato okendo chiege, to bang’e oyudo ni ok ohere nikech osetimo gimoro ma ok owinjore, onyalo ndiko barup weruok momiye, kendo oriembe." 
Deuteronomy24:2 Bang’e ka dhakono osea, nyalo bet ni ng’ato ochako okende, obedo chiege," 
Deuteronomy24:3 to ka chwore mar ariyono bende ojok kode, mondiko barup weruok momiye, kendo oriembe, kata ka chwore mar ariyono otho," 
Deuteronomy24:4 to chwore mokwongo mane oriembe cha kik chak kawe mi loke chiege kendo, nikech koro osedokone mogak. Tim ma kamano en kuero e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu, kendo dikel richo e piny ma Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu biro miyou obed mwanduu." 
Deuteronomy24:5 “Ka ng’ato okendo, to kik tere e lweny kata e tich moro amora, to onego obed dala kuom higa achiel komiyo chiege mor." 
Deuteronomy24:6 “Kik ng’ato mak pong’ rego kata mana nyapong’ ka gir singo, nikech mano chalre gi nego dhano." 
Deuteronomy24:7 “Ka oyud ng’ato kokwalo ja-Israel wadgi mi oloke misumbane, kata ong’iewe gi ng’ato, to nyaka neg jakuogno. Mano e kaka unupwodhru kuom richo ma kamano." 
Deuteronomy24:8 “Kuom weche mag tuo dhoho, nyaka utim mana kaka jodolo ma jo-Lawi biro chikou, nimar namiyogi chikena duto ma nyaka uriti." 
Deuteronomy24:9 Paruru gima ne Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu otimo ni Miriam ka ne usewuok Misri! 
Deuteronomy24:10 “Kiholo ja-Israel wadu gimoro, to kik idonj e ode kikawo gir singo." 
Deuteronomy24:11 Nyaka irit mana gi oko mondo ng’at ma jagopino ema okelni gino. 
Deuteronomy24:12 Ka en ng’at ma jachan, mi omiyi lawe mar abola ka gir singo, to kik inind e laweno," 
Deuteronomy24:13 to nyaka idwoknego ka pok chieng’ opodho mondo onindie. Kamano ng’atno noguedhi, kendo Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachi nokwan gima itimono ka gima ber." 
Deuteronomy24:14 “Kik itim marach ni jatich moro modhier machandore, kata obedo ni en ja-Israel kata jadak." 
Deuteronomy24:15 Nyaka imiye pokne pilepile kapok chieng’ opodho, nimar en jachan kendo pokneno ema konye. Ka ok itimo kamano, to onyalo ywakni kuom Ruoth Nyasaye, mi dibed jaketho." 
Deuteronomy24:16 “Kik neg wuone nikech richo mag nyithinde, kata kik neg nyithindo nikech richo mag wuonegi, to ng’ato ka ng’ato noneg mana nikech richone owuon." 
Deuteronomy24:17 “Kik ung’ad buch amwor ni jodak kata ni nyathi kich, bende kik ukaw law dhako ma chwore otho ka gir singo." 
Deuteronomy24:18 Paruru ni ne un wasumbni e piny Misri, to Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu noresou mogolou kuno. Mano emomiyo achikou ni mondo utim kamano." 
Deuteronomy24:19 “Ka ikayo cham e puothi, mi wiyi owil gi cham moko motue kuno, to kik idog iom, to nyaka iwegi ni jodak gi nyithindo ma kiye kod mond liete mondo Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu oguedhi kuom gik moko duto mitimo." 
Deuteronomy24:20 “Ka iseyiengo yiendi mag zeituni mondo olembe olwar, to kik ichak iyienggi kendo, to nyaka iwe modong’ ni jodak gi nyithi kiye kod mond liete." 
Deuteronomy24:21 “Ka isepono mzabibu e puothi to kik ichak ipon kendo, to nyaka iwe modong’ ni jodak gi nyithi kiye kod mond liete." 
Deuteronomy24:22 Paruru ni ne un wasumbni e piny Misri. Mano emomiyo achikou ni mondo utim kamano. 
Deuteronomy25:1 “Ka ji ariyo larore e wach moro, mi gibiro mondo oyalgi, to nyaka jong’ad bura ng’ad nigi bura kare, ka giweyo ng’at ma onge gi ketho, to gikumo jaketho." 
Deuteronomy25:2 Ka ong’ad ni ng’at ma jakethono buch chweto, to nyaka onind piny e nyim jang’ad bura, mi chwade. Nyaka chwade maromre gi kethone," 
Deuteronomy25:3 to kar kwan kiboko kik kadh piero ang’wen, nono to dipo ka chweto ohingo ja-Israel waduno, mi oyudo wichkuot marach e nyimu." 
Deuteronomy25:4 “Kik itue dho dhiang’ ka ywayo lodi madiemo cham. 
Deuteronomy25:5 “Ka owete odak kanyakla, mi achiel kuomgi otho ka ok oweyo nyathi ma wuowi, to ng’at moro nono ma ok jadalano ok nyal tero chiege. Owadgi chwor dhakono ema nyaka riwre kode, mi loke chiege, kendo timne gik moko duto ma owinjore yuor dhako tim." 
Deuteronomy25:6 Nyathi ma wuowi ma dhakono okwongo nywolo nyaka kaw nying wuon mare mothono, mondo nyinge kik lal e Israel." 
Deuteronomy25:7 To ka owadgi ng’at mothono ok dwar tero chi owadgino, to dhakono nyaka dhi ir jodongo e dhoranga dala kar bura, mondo onyisgi niya, ‘Yuora otamore chungo wi owadgi e Israel, kendo odagi timona gima owinjore yuor ng’ato tim ni chi owadgi.’" 
Deuteronomy25:8 Ka jodong dala owinjo kamano, to nyaka giluong ng’atno, kendo giwuo kode e wachno. Ka owachonigi malong’o ni ok odwar kawe," 
Deuteronomy25:9 to chi owadgino nyaka dhi ire e nyim jodongo mi lony wuore e tiende, kendo ng’udh wang’e olawo. Bang’ mano dhakono nyaka wach niya, ‘Ma e kaka watimo ni ng’at modagi chungo wi owadgi.’" 
Deuteronomy25:10 E Israel jood ng’atno noluong ni, ‘Jood ng’at ma olony wuore.’" 
Deuteronomy25:11 “Ka ji ariyo gore, mi chi ng’at achiel kuomgi odhi konyo chwore, momako duong’ ng’at machielono," 
Deuteronomy25:12 to nyaka ng’ad lwet dhakono oko ma ok ukeche. 
Deuteronomy25:13 “Kik ibed gi rapim mopogore opogore e mifuki, ma moro duong’ to moro tin." 
Deuteronomy25:14 Bende kik ibed gi rapur mopogore opogore e odi, ma moro duong’ to moro tin." 
Deuteronomy25:15 Nyaka ubed gi rapim kod rapur malong’o kendo makare mondo udag aming’a e piny ma Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu biro miyou. 
Deuteronomy25:16 Joma timo gik ma kamago kawuondo ji, okwedi e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Deuteronomy25:17 “Paruru gima ne jo-Amalek otimonu e yo, ka uwuok e piny Misri." 
Deuteronomy25:18 Ne gibutonu mi gimonjou gi ka ng’eu, ka uol kendo ujony, mi ginego joma nodong’ chien, ma ok gidewo luoro Nyasaye." 
Deuteronomy25:19 Emomiyo ka Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu osemiyou kue kuom wasiku duto molworou e piny ma obiro miyou mondo obed mwanduu, to kik wiu wil mak utieko jo-Amalek, mi nyinggi lal e piny." 
Deuteronomy26:1 “Ka usechopo e piny ma Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu biro miyou mondo obed mwanduu, mi udak kuno," 
Deuteronomy26:2 to nyaka ng’ato ka ng’ato kaw gik moko duto mokwongo nyak e pinyno, kendo ket e atonga, mi dhigo kama Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu biro yiero mondo nyinge obedie." 
Deuteronomy26:3 Nyaka odhi ir jadolo man kanyo, kendo owachne niya, ‘Ahulo ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasacha kawuono ni asechopo e piny mane Ruoth Nyasaye osingore ni kwerewa ni nomiwa.’" 
Deuteronomy26:4 Bang’ mano jadolo nokaw atonga e lwet ng’atno, mi noket piny e nyim kendo-mar-misango mar Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Deuteronomy26:5 Eka ng’atno nowach e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye niya, ‘Kwara ne en ja-Aram mabayo abaya, ma onge gi kar dak. Ne odhi e piny Misri kane pod joge nok, mi gidak kuno. Bang’e ne ginya, mi gidoko oganda maratego man gi ji mang’eny." 
Deuteronomy26:6 To jo-Misri nosandowa, monyorowa, kendo oketowa e tich misumba malit." 
Deuteronomy26:7 Ne waywak ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach kwerewa mondo okonywa, mi nowinjo ywakwa, kendo oneno thagruok gi nyor mane inyorowago, kod tich matek mane watiyo." 
Deuteronomy26:8 Kuom mano nogolowa e piny Misri gi teko maduong’ kod bat morie, kendo gi timbe madongo kod ranyisi gi honni." 
Deuteronomy26:9 Nokelowa kaeri momiyowa piny maber kendo momewni. 
Deuteronomy26:10 A Ruoth Nyasaye, mano emomiyo akeloni gik mokwongo nyak e lowo misemiya.’ Eka noket atongano piny e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, mi okulorene piny mondo olame." 
Deuteronomy26:11 Bang’e un gi jo-Lawi kod jopinje mamoko modak kuomu nyaka utim sawo mondo upargo gik mabeyo duto ma Ruoth Nyasaye osetimonu kaachiel gi jou. 
Deuteronomy26:12 “Ka usetieko choko achiel kuom apar mag gik monyak e higa mar adek, ma en higa michiwoe achiel kuom apar mar gik manyak, to nyaka uchiw gigo ni jo-Lawi gi jopinje mamoko modak kuomu, kaachiel gi nyithindo ma kiye kod mond liete, mondo gibed gi chiemo moromogi e miechu." 
Deuteronomy26:13 Bang’ mano ng’ato ka ng’ato nowach e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu niya, Asegolo gik mowalni e oda, mi amiyo jo-Lawi gi jopinje mamoko gi nyithindo makiye kod mond liete mana kaka nichika. Wiya ok osewil, kata ok aseketho chikni moro kata achiel." 
Deuteronomy26:14 Pok achamo gik mowalnigo e ndalo ma aywago ng’at motho, kata gologi e oda ka agak, kendo ok asechiwogi ni ng’at motho. A Ruoth Nyasaye asemako chikni, katimo gik moko duto midwaro." 
Deuteronomy26:15 Rang piny gie polo kar dakni maler, mondo iguedh jogi Israel kod piny maber kendo momew misemiyowa, kaka nikuong’ori ni kwerewa.”" 
Deuteronomy26:16 “Kawuono, Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu chikou mondo urit chikegi gi buchegi duto. Nyaka uritgi gi chunyu duto." 
Deuteronomy26:17 Usehulo tinende ni Ruoth Nyasaye e Nyasachu, kendo ni ubiro luwo yorene, murit chikene gi buchene, kendo uwinj wachne." 
Deuteronomy26:18 Ruoth Nyasaye bende osehulo tinende ni un e joge owuon, marito chikene duto, kaka nosingorenu." 
Deuteronomy26:19 Obiro ting’ou malo moloyo ogendini mamoko duto mane ochueyo, mondo nyinge oyud duong’ gi pak kod huma. Kamano unubed oganda mowal ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu mana kaka nosingore.”" 
Deuteronomy27:1 Kane Musa nigi jodong Israel, nochiko ji niya, “Rituru chike duto ma amiyou kawuono," 
Deuteronomy27:2 kendo chieng’ ma ung’ado aora Jordan kudhi e piny ma Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu biro miyou, to uchung kite madongo, kendo umwon-gi." 
Deuteronomy27:3 Ndikuru kuomgi weche duto mag chikni, mondo udonji e piny maber momew ma Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu nosingore ni kwereu ni nomiu." 
Deuteronomy27:4 Ka useng’ado aora Jordan, to unuchung kitegi e got Ebal mana kaka achikou kawuono, kendo umwon-gi." 
Deuteronomy27:5 Geruru kendo-mar-misango kanyo ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu gi kite ma ok opa gi chuma. 
Deuteronomy27:6 Kendo mar Ruoth Nyasayeno nyaka ger gi kite ma ok opa, bende utimie ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu misengni miwang’o pep." 
Deuteronomy27:7 Timuru misengni mag sawo, kendo chiemuru kanyo, mi ubed mamor e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu." 
Deuteronomy27:8 Ndikuru malong’o weche duto mag chikni kuom kitego.” 
Deuteronomy27:9 Musa kod jodolo ma jo-Lawi nowacho ni jo-Israel duto niya, “Chikuru itu maber, un jo-Israel. Tinendeni usedoko jo-Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu." 
Deuteronomy27:10 Winjuru Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu, kendo rituru chikene gi buchene ma amiyou kawuono.”" 
Deuteronomy27:11 Chieng’no ema Musa nogoloe chik, kowacho ni ji niya," 
Deuteronomy27:12 “Ka useng’ado aora Jordan, to jo-Simeon gi jo-Lawi gi jo-Juda gi jo-Isakar gi jo-Josef kod jo-Benjamin nyaka chung’ e got Gerizim, mondo oguedh ji." 
Deuteronomy27:13 To jo-Reuben gi jo-Gad gi jo-Asher gi jo-Zebulun gi jo-Dan kod jo-Naftali mondo ochung’ e got Ebal, kihulo weche mag kuong’." 
Deuteronomy27:14 Bang’ mano jo-Lawi nowach nii jo-Israel duto gi dwol maduong’ niya. 
Deuteronomy27:15 “ ‘Okuong’ ng’at moloso kido mar nyasaye manono mar bao kata mar chuma, kata bed ni oketo gino kama opondo. Mano en tim makuero e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Deuteronomy27:16 “ ‘Okuong’ ng’at mochayo wuon kata min. 
Deuteronomy27:17 “ ‘Okuong’ ng’at moketho kiepe gi wadgi. 
Deuteronomy27:18 “ ‘Okuong’ ng’at mowuondo muofu, mi obaro oweyo yo." 
Deuteronomy27:19 “ ‘Okuong’ ng’at moketho buch japiny moro modak kodu, kata buch nyathi ma kich, kata buch chi liel." 
Deuteronomy27:20 “ ‘Okuong’ ng’at moterore gi chi wuon, nikech oelo dug wuon mare." 
Deuteronomy27:21 “ ‘Okuong’ ng’at moterore gi le moro amora. 
Deuteronomy27:22 “ ‘Okuong’ ng’at moterore gi nyamin hie, kata nyamin ma nyar wuon." 
Deuteronomy27:23 “ ‘Okuong’ ng’at moterore gi mar mare. 
Deuteronomy27:24 “ ‘Okuong’ ng’at mogoyo wadgi ling’ling’. 
Deuteronomy27:25 “ ‘Okuong’ ng’at mochamo asoya mondo oneg ng’at ma onge gi ketho. 
Deuteronomy27:26 “ ‘Okuong’ ng’at ma ok orito kata ma ok ochopo weche duto mag chikni. Bang kuong’ ka kuong’ to ji duto nyaka duok ni, ‘Obed kamano.’" 
Deuteronomy28:1 “Ka uluoro Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu, kendo urito adimba chikene duto ma amiyou kawuono, to enoting’u malo moloyo ogendini duto mag piny," 
Deuteronomy28:2 kendo guethgi duto biro bironu: 
Deuteronomy28:3 Noguedhu kamoro amora ma untie; ka un e dala, kata ka un oko." 
Deuteronomy28:4 Noguedhu gi nyithindo mang’eny, kendo gi cham mogundho kod jamni mathoth." 
Deuteronomy28:5 Noguedh atongeu gi dakuondeu. 
Deuteronomy28:6 Noguedhu kudonjo e dala kendo kuwuok. 
Deuteronomy28:7 “Ruoth Nyasaye noket wasiku momonjou e luetu, kendo unulogi muriembgi. Ginirad kodu ka gin oganda achiel, to giniringu ka gike e sidienje abiriyo." 
Deuteronomy28:8 Ruoth Nyasaye noguedh dereu kaachiel gii tich luetu duto e piny ma obiro miyou. 
Deuteronomy28:9 Kurito chike Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu, kendo uwuotho e yorene, to obiro miyo udoko joge owuon maler, kaka nosesingorenu." 
Deuteronomy28:10 Ogendini duto mag piny none ni un jo Ruoth Nyasaye mi giniluoru. 
Deuteronomy28:11 “Ruoth Nyasaye biro miyo udhi maber. Ubiro bedo gi nyithindo mang’eny, kendo gi jamni mathoth, kod cham mogundho e piny mane Ruoth Nyasaye osingore ni kwereu ni nomiu." 
Deuteronomy28:12 Ruoth Nyasaye biro golo koth e polo kar kenone, mondo ochwenu e ndalo mowinjore, kendo obiro guedho gik moko duto mutimo. Ogendini mang’eny biro holo gik moko kuomu, to un ok nuhol kuomgi." 
Deuteronomy28:13 Kurito chike mag Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu ma anyisou kawuono mondo urit matek," 
Deuteronomy28:14 kendo ka ok utamoru chikego mi udagi lamo nyiseche mamoko, to Ruoth Nyasaye biro ketou jotelo, to ok joma itelonigi. Kamano ubiro dhi nyime maber, kendo ok nudog chien." 
Deuteronomy28:15 “To ka ok uluoro Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu, mi udagi rito chikene gi buchene ma amiyou kawuono, to kuong’ gi duto biro makou:" 
Deuteronomy28:16 Nokuong’u kamoro amora ma untie; ka un e dala, kata ka un oko." 
Deuteronomy28:17 Nokuong’ atongeu gi dakuondeu. 
Deuteronomy28:18 Nokuong’u kuom nywol kendo kuom cham kod kuom jamni. 
Deuteronomy28:19 Nokuong’u kudonjo e dala kendo kuwuok. 
Deuteronomy28:20 Ruoth Nyasaye noornu kuong’ gi chandruok kod kum maketho gik moko duto mutimo, nyaka otieku mi urum ka diemo wang’ kuom timbeu maricho, kendo nikech useweye." 
Deuteronomy28:21 Ruoth Nyasasye biro goyou gi tuoche nyaka tieku ua e piny mudonjoe mondo ukaw. 
Deuteronomy28:22 Ruoth Nyasaye biro goyou gi kahera gi midhusi gi tuo akuodi kod gwonyo, kendo kelonu oro, mi cham rochre ewi dongo. Gigo duto biro thagou nyaka urum." 
Deuteronomy28:23 Polo norieny ka mula, to piny nodok matek ka chuma." 
Deuteronomy28:24 Kar kelo koth, to Ruoth Nyasaye nomi lowo gi buru chwenu mana ka koth, nyaka tieku." 
Deuteronomy28:25 Ruoth Nyasaye noketu e lwet wasiku, mi ginilou. Unurad kodgi ka un oganda achiel, to unuringi kuke e sidienje abiriyo, mi unubed joma pinje duto wuoro." 
Deuteronomy28:26 Ringreu nobed chiemb winy gi le, kendo onge ng’at ma noriembgi." 
Deuteronomy28:27 “Ruoth Nyasaye biro goyou gi tuo buche mag Misri gi akuodi kendo gi kalanga kod gwonyo ma ok nyal thiedhi. 
Deuteronomy28:28 Obiro goyou gi tuo mar neko, kendo lokou muofni gi joma orundore." 
Deuteronomy28:29 Unubed kumulo godiechieng’, mana kaka muofu mulo, kendo ok nuchop kuma udwaro dhiyoe. Nothiru kendo noyaku e ngimau duto, kendo onge ng’at ma nokonyu." 
Deuteronomy28:30 Unukend mon, to jomoko nono ema nonind kodgi. Unuger udi, to ok nudagie. Unupidh mzabibu, to ok unucham olembegi." 
Deuteronomy28:31 Unune dhou kiyang’o, to ok unubil ringgi. Nomau kenjeu kuneno, to ok nodwoknugi. Rombeu nomi wasiku, to onge ng’ama nokonyu." 
Deuteronomy28:32 Yawuotu gi nyiu nokaw, kendo nomi jopinje mamoko ong’iew mana kuneno, mi siso nolou kodgi, to ok nubed gi teko mar timo gimoro." 
Deuteronomy28:33 “Oganda moro ma ok ung’eyo nocham gik monyak e puotheu, kendo unubed joma othir malich e ngimau duto." 
Deuteronomy28:34 Gigo biro miyo udoko joneko. 
Deuteronomy28:35 Ruoth Nyasaye biro goyo chongeu kod tiendeu gi buche ma ok nyal thiedhi, to ginilandre e dendu duto." 
Deuteronomy28:36 “Ruoth Nyasaye biro terou, kaachiel gi ruoth mubiro yiero, kuom oganda ma un ok ung’eyo kata kwereu bende ne ok ong’eyo, kendo kuno unulamie nyiseche mamoko mag yien kod mag kite." 
Deuteronomy28:37 Nyingu nolokre ka ngero, kendo gima ji jaro kendo nyiero." 
Deuteronomy28:38 “Ubiro chwoyo kodhi mang’eny e puotheu, to unuka matin, nimar bonyo biro chamogi." 
Deuteronomy28:39 Unupidh mzabibu, kendo unudogi, to ok unuka olembgi kata madho divachgi, bende ok unumadhi nikech, kudni nokethgi." 
Deuteronomy28:40 Yiend zeituni noyudre e pinyu kuonde duto, to ok unuwirru gi mogi, nimar ginilwar piny ka pok gichiek." 
Deuteronomy28:41 Ununywol yawuowi gi nyiri, to ok ginisik kodu, nikech notergi e tuech." 
Deuteronomy28:42 Yiendu duto, kod gik monyak e puotheu, bonyo notiek pep." 
Deuteronomy28:43 Jopinje mamoko modak kuomu biro medo dongore molou, to un ubiro dok piny." 
Deuteronomy28:44 Ginibed gi gik ma giholou, to un ok nubed gi gima duholgi. Ginibed jotelo, to un unubed joma itelonigi." 
Deuteronomy28:45 “Masichego duto biro lawou mi maku nyaka tieku, nikech kane Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu ochikou mondo urit chikene gi buchene, to ne ok uwinjo wachne." 
Deuteronomy28:46 Masichego nobednu ranyisi mochwere, kendo ni nyikwau," 
Deuteronomy28:47 nikech ne ok utiyo ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu gi mor kendo gi ilo kuom chiwone mogundho. 
Deuteronomy28:48 Emomiyo unuti ni wasigu ma Ruoth Nyasaye biri oro mondo omonju. Kech nokau, kendo riyo nolou; unuwuoth duge, kendo nuchand gimoro amora. Ruoth Nyasaye noket jok mar nyinyo e ng’utu nyaka otieku." 
Deuteronomy28:49 “Ruoth Nyasaye biro kelo kuomu oganda moro moa kuma bor ma dhogi ok nuwinji. Ginimwomre kuomu mana kaka ongo mwomore kuom nyagweno. 
Deuteronomy28:50 Ogandano nobed mager ahinya. Ok ginidew joma oti, kendo ok ginikech nyithindo." 
Deuteronomy28:51 Ginicham jambu gi chambu, ma ok giweyonu cham kata divai kata mo kata mana chiayo moro kuom jambu nyaka urum." 
Deuteronomy28:52 Ginilwor mier duto ma Ruoth Nyasaye nomiu mondo gikau, nyaka gimuk ohinga maboyo kendo motegno muparo ni dugeng’rugo." 
Deuteronomy28:53 Wasikugo nokelnu chandruok malich ahinya, e ndalo ma giluoro e miechu, mi unucham kata mana nyithindu uwegi ma Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu omiyou." 
Deuteronomy28:54 Kata mana ng’at malong’o kendo mang’wonie moloyo biro bedo ma iye kwar gi wadgi, kata mana chiege mohero kaachiel gi nyithinde modong’," 
Deuteronomy28:55 mi notamre pogonigi ringre nyithinde mochamo, nimar onge gimoro machielo ma nodong’ne, nikech chandruok malich ma wasiku biro kelonu e ndalo ma giluoroe miechu." 
Deuteronomy28:56 Bende kata mana dhako malong’o kendo mang’wonie moloyo bende, ma nyaka nene ok wuoth gi tiende, biro bedo ma iye kwar gi chwore mohero kaachiel gi nyithinde," 
Deuteronomy28:57 mi notamre pogonigi bieche kata mana nyathi mosenywolo, nikech chandruok malich ma wasigu biro kelone e ndalo ma giluoroe miechu duto." 
Deuteronomy28:58 “Ka ok urito chike duto mondiki e kitabuni, kendo ok luoro nying Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu, ma en nying maduong’ kendo malich," 
Deuteronomy28:59 to ubiro kelo kuomu, kendo kuom nyikwau, masiche malich kendo miwuoro, kod tuoche maywayo ji kuom kinde malach." 
Deuteronomy28:60 Ruoth Nyasaye nokel tuoche duto mag Misri mane uluoro, kendo ginisik kuomu." 
Deuteronomy28:61 To bende nokel kuomu tuoche kod masiche ma ok ondik e kitap chikni, nyaka urum." 
Deuteronomy28:62 Kata obedo ni ung’eny ka sulue manie polo kamano, to ji manok kuomu kende ema nodong’ nikech ne ok uwinjo wach Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu." 
Deuteronomy28:63 Ruoth Nyasaye nobed mamor kokethou, kendo kotiekou mana kaka nobedo mamor koguedhou kendo omiyo unya, mi nogolu gi thwon e piny ma udonjoe mondo ukau." 
Deuteronomy28:64 Ruoth Nyasaye nokeu e kind ogendini, chakre tung’ piny konchiel nyaka tung’ piny komachielo, kendo kuondego duto unulamie nyiseche mag yien kod mag kite, ma un ok ung’eyo kata kwereu bende ne ok ong’eyo." 
Deuteronomy28:65 Ka un e kind ogendinigo, to ok nuyud kue, to unuriwni e kindgi, kendo Ruoth Nyasaye nomi ubed gi parruok, gi wenge mojony, kod chuny mokuyo." 
Deuteronomy28:66 Ok unung’e gima biro timorenu, kendo unubed gi kihondko odiechieng’ gotieno, mi ok unung’e sa thou." 
Deuteronomy28:67 Kihondkono gi gik mubiro neno, nomi uwach okinyi kokinyi ni, ‘Yaye! Mad obed odhiambo!’ To odhiambo kodhiambo unuwach ni, ‘Yaye! Mad obed okinyi.’" 
Deuteronomy28:68 Ruoth Nyasaye nodwoku Misri gi yiedhi, kata obedo ni nosingore ni ok nudog kuno kendo. Unuhonru ni wasiku mondo ong’iewu ka wasumbni, to onge ng’ama nong’iewu.”" 
Deuteronomy29:1 Mago e weche mag singruok mane Ruoth Nyasaye ochiko Musa mondo omi jo-Israel otim, kane gin e piny jo-Moab. Singruokno ne omedi kuom singruok mane otimo kodgi Horeb." 
Deuteronomy29:2 Musa noluongo jo-Israel duto, mowachonigi niya, “Ne uneno gi wang’u gik moko duto mane Ruoth Nyasaye otimo e piny Misri ni Farao gi jodonge kod pinye duto." 
Deuteronomy29:3 Timbe madongo mane unenogo ne gin ranyisi gi honni 
Deuteronomy29:4 to kata kamano, nyaka chop sani Ruoth Nyasaye pok omiyou chuny mar ng’eyo, kata wang’ mar neno, kata it mar winjo." 
Deuteronomy29:5 Ruoth Nyasaye osetelonu e thim kuom higni piero ang’wen, to lepu kata wuochu pok oti," 
Deuteronomy29:6 bende ok usechamo makati kata madho divai kata gimoro mamero ji. Notimonu kamano mondo ung’ego ni en e Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu. 
Deuteronomy29:7 Kane uchopo ka, to Sihon ruodh Heshbon kod Og ruodh Bashan ne jomonjowa, to ne waloyogi." 
Deuteronomy29:8 Ne wakawo pinygi, mi wamiyo jo-Reuben gi jo-Gad kod nus jo-Manase mondo obed mwandugi." 
Deuteronomy29:9 Nyaka urit weche mag singruok adimba, mondo udhi maber kuom gik moko duto mutimo." 
Deuteronomy29:10 “Kawuono uchung’ e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu, koda ka jotend dhoutu gi jodongu gi jotendu mamoko kod jo-Israel duto, chwo," 
Deuteronomy29:11 gi mon kod nyithindo, kaachiel gi jopinje mamoko modak kuomu, kata mana joma modonu yien, kendo ma umbonu pi." 
Deuteronomy29:12 Uikoru mondo ukuong’ru, kutimo singruok ma Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu dwaro timo kodu kawuono." 
Deuteronomy29:13 Ruoth Nyasaye dwaro mondo oloku joge, kendo mondo obed Nyasachu kaka nonyisou, kendo kaka nosingore ni kwereu ma Ibrahim gi Isaka kod Jakobo." 
Deuteronomy29:14 Ok un kende ema amiyou utimo singruokni," 
Deuteronomy29:15 to ji duto mochung’ kodwa ka e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachwa kaachiel gi ji duto maonge kodwa ka kawuono, bende amiyo otimo singruokni." 
Deuteronomy29:16 Ung’eyo kaka ne wadak e piny Misri, kendo kaka ne wakadho e pinje mag ogendini mamoko." 
Deuteronomy29:17 Bende nuneno gik makuero ma gilamo, kod kido mag nyisechegi manono mag yien gi mag kite, kod mag fedha gi mag dhahabu." 
Deuteronomy29:18 Kapo ni nitie ng’ato kuomu ma dichwo kata ma dhako, kata ka nitie joot kata dhoot moro madwaro weyo lamo Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachwa, mondo odhi olam nyiseche mag ogendini mamoko, to mano nyalo bedone chakruok mar masira gi lit." 
Deuteronomy29:19 Ka ng’atno owinjo weche mag singruokni, mi owuondore e chunye ni onge gima biro time, kata koluwo timbene mag wich teko, to mano nokel masira maduong’."
