Deuteronomy29:20 Ruoth Nyasaye ok nowe ni ng’atno richone, kendo mirimbe mager noliel kuome, mi kuong’ duto mondiki e kitabuni nomake kendo Ruoth Nyasaye noruch nyinge oko." 
Deuteronomy29:21 Ruoth Nyasaye nopoge kuom dhout Israel duto, mi nosande kaka kuong’ duto mondik e kitabu mar chikni dwaro." 
Deuteronomy29:22 “E ndalo mabiro, nyikwau kod joma oa e pinje mamoko maboyo none masiche kod tuoche mane Ruoth Nyasaye osetimo e pinyni." 
Deuteronomy29:23 Piny duto nowang’ gi mach kendo notim chumbi, ma ok nyal pidhie gimoro, kata mana lum bende ok notwiye. Nokethre mana ka Sodom gi Gomora, kod Adma gi Zeboim, mane Ruoth Nyasaye otieko gi mirimbe mager." 
Deuteronomy29:24 Bang’e ogendni duto nopenjre ni, ‘Ang’o momiyi Ruoth Nyasaye osetimo gima kama e pinyni? Ere tiend mirima magerni?’" 
Deuteronomy29:25 To nodwokgi niya, ‘Mano osetimore nikech jo-Israel ne ok orito singruok mane Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach kweregi otimo kodgi kane gin e piny Misri." 
Deuteronomy29:26 Ne gilamo nyiseche mamoko mane ok ging’eyo, kendo mane Ruoth Nyasaye ok omiyogi mondo gilam." 
Deuteronomy29:27 Mano emomiyo mirimb Ruoth Nyasaye nobedo mager kuom pinyni, mi nokeloe kuong’ duto mondik e kitabuni." 
Deuteronomy29:28 Osedhuologi gi lop tiendgi e pinygi gi mirimbe mager, mi oterogi e piny machielo ma pod gintie nyaka chil kawuono.’" 
Deuteronomy29:29 “Nitie gik moko mopondo, to gin mag Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachwa, to gik moelnwa tiendgi ema omiwa kaachiel gi nyikwawa nyaka chieng, omiyo wanyalo timo gik moko duto ma chikni dwaro." 
Deuteronomy30:1 “Ka gueth kod kuong’ ma aketo e nyimugo duto osetimorenu, muparo wechena e pinje ma Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu oseteroue," 
Deuteronomy30:2 mi uduogo ire gi chunyu duto, kaachiel gi nyithindu, mana kaka chike ma amiyougi dwaro," 
Deuteronomy30:3 to Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu nong’wonnu, mi nochak omi udhi nyime maber kendo. Enochak ochoku kendo kanyakla, kogolou e pinje duto mane okeyoue." 
Deuteronomy30:4 Kata obedo ni osekeyou e tung’ piny gi tung’ piny kamano, to nochak ochoku kaachiel kendo." 
Deuteronomy30:5 Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu nodwoku e piny kwereu mondo udagie. Enomi unya mang’eny, kendo ubed gi mwandu mathoth moloyo kwereu." 
Deuteronomy30:6 Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu nomi chunyu gi chuny nyikwau tim gik ma odwaro, mondo uhere gi chunyu duto kendo gi adiera, eka ubed mangima." 
Deuteronomy30:7 Bang’e Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu nolok kuong’go duto ni wasiku, kendo ni joma sandou." 
Deuteronomy30:8 Unuchak uluor Ruoth Nyasaye kendo, mi unurit chikene duto ma amiyou kawuonogi." 
Deuteronomy30:9 Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu nomedu mwandu mang’eny moloyo. Unubed gi nyithindo mathoth, gi jamni mang’eny, kod cham mogundho. Enobed mamor komiyou mwandu, mana kaka nobedo mamor komiyo kwereu mwandu," 
Deuteronomy30:10 to mana ka uluore, murito chikene gi buchene kaka ondiki e kitabu mar chikni, kendo ka uduogo ire gi chunyu duto kendo gi adiera." 
Deuteronomy30:11 “Chik ma amiou kawuononi ok en chik matek, to bende ok en kuma bor. Ok en e polo ma dimi uwach ni," 
Deuteronomy30:12 ‘Ng’ama didhinwa malo e polo mondo oomnwa chikno, kendo opuonjwa, eka warite?’" 
Deuteronomy30:13 Bende ok en loka nam, ma dimi uwach ni, ‘Ng’ama ding’adnwa nam mondo okelwago, mi opuonjwa, eka warite?’" 
Deuteronomy30:14 To wach Nyasaye chiegni kodu ahinya, kendo en mana e dhou kendo e chunyu, omiyo ritogo yot." 
Deuteronomy30:15 “Neuru, kawuono aketo gik moko ariyo e nyimu mondo uyier. Gin ngima gi ber, kata tho gi rach." 
Deuteronomy30:16 Ka umako chik Ruoth Nyasachu ma amiyou kawuono, muhere kuluwo yorene, kendo urito chikene gi buchene, to unubed mangima, mi ununya mang’eny, kendo Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu noguedhu e piny ma ubiro donjoe mondo ukaw." 
Deuteronomy30:17 To kuweye, mubaro kudhi lamo nyiseche mamoko kendo ukulorunigi," 
Deuteronomy30:18 to ng’euru maler ni karu nolal nono, kendo ok unudag aming’a e piny ma ubiro donjoe mondo ukaw, kuseng’ado aora Jordan." 
Deuteronomy30:19 Koro aluongo polo gi piny mondo obed joneno ni aseketo gik moko ariyo e nyimu mondo uyier. Gin ngima gi gueth, kata tho gi kuong’. To yieruru ngima, mondo udag maber kaachiel gi nyikwau." 
Deuteronomy30:20 Heruru Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu, kuwinjo wachne, kendo kuketo chunyu kuome. Mano nomi ubed mangima, kendo udag aming’a e piny mane osingore ni kwereu ma Ibrahim gi Isaka kod Jakobo.”" 
Deuteronomy31:1 Musa nomedo wuoyo ni jo-Israel, kowacho niya," 
Deuteronomy31:2 “Koro hika gin mia achiel gi piero ariyo, kendo ok anyal dhi nyime gi telonu. To bende Ruoth Nyasaye osenyisa ni ok nang’ad aora Jordan." 
Deuteronomy31:3 Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu owuon biro telo nyimu mondo otiek ogendini mudhi kawo pinygigo, mi unudag e pinygi, kendo Joshua notelnu kaka Ruoth Nyasaye osewacho." 
Deuteronomy31:3 Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu owuon biro telo nyimu mondo otiek ogendini mudhi kawo pinygigo, mi unudag e pinygi, kendo Joshua notelnu kaka Ruoth Nyasaye osewacho." 
Deuteronomy31:4 Ruoth Nyasaye biro tieko ogendinigo mana kaka notieko Sihon gi Og, ruodhi jo-Amor, kaachiel gi pinjegi." 
Deuteronomy31:5 Nochiwgi e luetu, mi unutimnigi mana kaka nochikou." 
Deuteronomy31:6 Beduru gi chir, kendo gi jing’o. Kik uluorgi, kendo kik chunyu nyosre, nimar Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu biro dhi kodu, kendo ok noweu kata jwang’ou ok nojwang’u.”" 
Deuteronomy31:7 Bang’e Musa noluongo Joshua mowachone e nyim jo-Israel duto niya, “Bed gi chir kendo gi jing’o, nikech in ema ibiro telo ni jogi ka gidhi e piny ma Ruoth Nyasaye nosingore ni kweregi ni nomigi, kendo inimi gikawe." 
Deuteronomy31:7 Bang’e Musa noluongo Joshua mowachone e nyim jo-Israel duto niya, “Bed gi chir kendo gi jing’o, nikech in ema ibiro telo ni jogi ka gidhi e piny ma Ruoth Nyasaye nosingore ni kweregi ni nomigi, kendo inimi gikawe." 
Deuteronomy31:8 Ruoth Nyasaye owuon biro teloni, kendo nobed kodi. Ok noweyi, bende ok nojwang’i, omiyo kik ibed maluor, kendo kik chunyi nyosre.”" 
Deuteronomy31:9 Musa nondiko chikno momiyo jodolo ma jo-Lawi mane ting’o Sandug Muma mar Ruoth Nyasaye, kod jodong Israel duto." 
Deuteronomy31:10 Eka nochikogi kama: “Bang’ higni abiriyo ka higni abiriyo e higa miweyoe gope, e kinde mutimoe Sap Kiche," 
Deuteronomy31:11 ka jo-Israel duto biro mondo olam Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu kama obiro yiero mondo nyinge obedie, to nyaka usom chikni matek e nyimgi duto." 
Deuteronomy31:12 Nyaka uchik ji duto, chwo gi mon kod nyithindo, kaachiel gi jopinje mamoko modak kuomu, mondo giwinj chikno, eka gipuonjre luoro Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu, mi girit wechene duto maber." 
Deuteronomy31:13 Tienge mabiro mapok ong’eyo wechegi nowinjgi, mi nopuonjre luoro Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu ndalo duto ma gidakgo e piny ma ubiro kawo ka useng’ado aora Jordan.”" 
Deuteronomy31:14 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa niya, “Ibiro tho machiegni, omiyo luong Joshua udhi e Hemb Romo mondo akete e tich.” Omiyo Musa gi Joshua ne jodhi kaka nowachnigi," 
Deuteronomy31:14 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa niya, “Ibiro tho machiegni, omiyo luong Joshua udhi e Hemb Romo mondo akete e tich.” Omiyo Musa gi Joshua ne jodhi kaka nowachnigi," 
Deuteronomy31:15 kendo Ruoth Nyasaye nofwenyore e Hema ka nie bor polo mane ochung’ e dho Hema. 
Deuteronomy31:16 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa niya, “Ka isetho, moyiki, to jogi biro weya mi luw nyiseche mag jomoko ma gidhi yudo ka gidonjo e pinyno, mana kaka dhako weyo chwore, to dwanyore gi chwo mamoko. Giniweya, kendo giniketh singruok ma asetimo kodgi." 
Deuteronomy31:17 Kuom mano, mirimba mager noliel kuomgi ka mach mi notiekgi. Anawegi, kendo ok nakwan-gi ka joga, mi ginithagre malit, kendo ginine masiche madongo. Eka bang’e giniwach niya, ‘Thagruokgi osebironwa mana nikech Nyasachwa koro ok ni kodwa.’" 
Deuteronomy31:18 To ok nawinjgi e ndalogo, nikech richo ma gisebedo ka gitimo mar lamo nyiseche mamoko." 
Deuteronomy31:19 “Kuom mano, koro ndik wer ma anyisi ni, kendo ipuonjgi kaka iwere, mondo oparnigi chikena." 
Deuteronomy31:20 Ka asekelogi e piny maber kendo momew, kaka nasingora ni kweregi, mi giyudo chiemo, kendo gidoko machwe, eka bang’e ginichara, kendo giniketh singruokna, ka giluwo nyiseche mamoko kendo tiyonigi." 
Deuteronomy31:21 Ka githagore malit kendo gineno masiche malit kamano, to wendni nobednigi rapar, nimar nyikwagi nosik ka were. Kata koroni, kapok akelogi e piny ma nasingora ni namigi, ang’eyo kaka chunygi chalo.”" 
Deuteronomy31:22 Musa nondiko wendno chieng’no, mopuonjo jo-Israel." 
Deuteronomy31:23 Ruoth Nyasaye nochiko Joshua wuod Nun niya, “Bed gi chir, kendo gi jing’o, nikech in ema nitelni jo-Israel ka gidhi e piny mane asingora ni namigi kendo anabed kodi.”" 
Deuteronomy31:23 Ruoth Nyasaye nochiko Joshua wuod Nun niya, “Bed gi chir, kendo gi jing’o, nikech in ema nitelni jo-Israel ka gidhi e piny mane asingora ni namigi kendo anabed kodi.”" 
Deuteronomy31:24 Kane Musa osetieko ndiko chikno duto e kitabu," 
Deuteronomy31:25 nochiko jo-Lawi mane ting’o Sandug Muma mar Ruoth Nyasaye niya," 
Deuteronomy31:26 “Kawuru kitap chikni, uket e bath Sandug Muma mar Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu, mondo obednu kanyo ka rapar," 
Deuteronomy31:27 nimar ang’eyo ni un joma wigi tek ta. Usetamoru winjo Ruoth Nyasaye kata kapod angima ka an kodu. Koro kasetho to ubiro dage machal nadi? 
Deuteronomy31:28 Omiyo chokuru jodong dhoutu gi jotendu duto e nyima, mondo awachnigi wechegi, kendo aluong polo gi piny mondo obedna joneno." 
Deuteronomy31:29 Ang’eyo ni ka asetho, to ubiro duworu malich, muwe yo ma asechikoue. Kuom mano, unune masiche e ndalo mabiro, nikech numiyo Ruoth Nyasaye mirima gi timbeu maricho.”" 
Deuteronomy31:30 Bang’e Musa nowachonigi weche duto mag wendni, ka oganda jo-Israel ochiko itgi." 
Deuteronomy32:1 “In polo, chik iti ka awuoyo! In piny, winj wechena!" 
Deuteronomy32:2 Puonj mara mondo obed ka koth machue e lek, kendo wechena mondo obed ka tho mamiyo lum doko mang’ich." 
Deuteronomy32:3 Abiro luongo nying Ruoth Nyasaye, to dwokuru ni, ‘Omi Nyasaye duong’!’" 
Deuteronomy32:4 En lwanda, ma tichne long’o, nikech yorene duto ni kare. En Nyasaye ma jaadiera, kendo maonge ketho, ma timbene kare, kendo ma jaratiro." 
Deuteronomy32:5 Tieng’ni to en tieng’ makoch, kendo mobam, ma timbegi mobam nyiso ni ok gin nyithind Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Deuteronomy32:6 Yaye, oganda mofuwo ma onge gi rieko, mano e kaka utimo ni Ruoth Nyasaye adier? Donge en e wuoru mane ochueyou? Donge en ema omiyou doko oganda maratego?" 
Deuteronomy32:7 Paruru ndalo machon, kod tienge ma koro osekadho. Penjuru wuoneu kod jodongu, mondo ogannu sigendgi." 
Deuteronomy32:8 Kane Ng’ama Duong’ Moloyo ochiwo ni ogendini pinjegi, mondo obed kuondegi mag dak, noketo ni oganda ka oganda tong’ pinygi maromre gi kar romb nyithind Nyasaye." 
Deuteronomy32:9 To Ruoth Nyasaye owuon noyiero joka Jakobo mondo obed joge owuon, kendo obed mwandune." 
Deuteronomy32:10 Noyudo ogandano e thim malich ma ondiegi rutoe, mi nolworogi koni gi koni, moritogi maber." 
Deuteronomy32:11 Kaka ongo yiengo ode mondo nyithinde owuogi, koyaro bwombene mondo okawgi, kendo oting’gi e bwombene, e kaka Ruoth Nyasaye yaro bwombene, kendo kawo ogandane." 
Deuteronomy32:12 Ruoth Nyasaye kende ema otelonigi, ka onge nyasaye moro makonye." 
Deuteronomy32:13 Nomiyo giidho gode mag piny, kendo omiyo gichamo gik manyak e lowo. Nomiyo gichamo mor kich mothodhi e kind lwanda, kod mor zeituni manyak e lowo motimo kite." 
Deuteronomy32:14 Ne gin gi cha adila gi cha rombe, kod nyirombe gi imbe mabeyo moloyo gi dhok moa Bashan, kod nyuogi, kaachiel gi ngano maber. Ne gimadho mana divai makwar maber." 
Deuteronomy32:15 Kamano dhood Jakobo nochiemo, moyieng’. Adier, joka Jeshurun nodoko machwe, mogwecho. Ee, nubedo machwe ahinya, nikech nuchiemo mang’eny. Ne giweyo Nyasaye ma nochweyogi, ka gicharo Lwanda ma noresogi." 
Deuteronomy32:16 Ne gimiyo nyiego omake kuom lamo nyiseche mamoko, kendo ne gimiye mirima gi timbegi makuero." 
Deuteronomy32:17 Ne gitimo lisweche ni jochiende ma ok Nyasaye, kendo ni nyiseche ma ok ging’eyo, ma kata mana kweregi bende ne ok ong’eyo." 
Deuteronomy32:18 Wigi nowil gi Lwanda ma nochweyogi! Ne ok giparo Nyasaye ma nomiyogi ngima. 
Deuteronomy32:19 Ruoth Nyasaye noneno gik mane yawuote gi nyige timo, mi nojwang’ogi nikech ne giwang’o iye." 
Deuteronomy32:20 Nowacho niya, ‘Ok named kwanogi ka joga, to abiro neno gikogi, nimar gin tieng’ ma wigi tek, nyithindo ma ok nyal gen." 
Deuteronomy32:21 Gisemiyo nyiego omaka, nikech giselamo gikma ok nyasaye. Adier gisewang’o iya, nikech giselamo gima nono. Omiyo abiro miyo nyiego makgi ka ayiero oganda ma nono oloyo, kendo abiro wang’o igi, ka ayiero oganda ma ok dew Nyasaye." 
Deuteronomy32:22 Mirimba osemoko mach! Mawang’o piny kaachiel gi gik manyakie, kendo owang’o mise mag gode, bende ochopo kata kar joma otho e liel piny." 
Deuteronomy32:23 Anamed masiche kuom joga, kendo nachielgi gi asechena duto," 
Deuteronomy32:24 mi kech nokagi, kendo midhusi notuogi, kendo tuoche maricho nogogi, bende naol kuomgi ondiegi mangemo, kod thuonde man gi kwiri mager." 
Deuteronomy32:25 Ligangla noneggi ka gin oko, kendo ka gin ei udi, mi nyithindgi nodong’ kiye, kendo mondgi nodok mond liete. Yawuowi gi nyiri bende notho, kaachiel gi nyithindo mayom, kod jodongo moti." 
Deuteronomy32:26 Naparo ni mondo ang’adgi matindotindo, kendo atiekgi ma ok nochak opargi." 
Deuteronomy32:27 To naparo ni dipo ka wasigu ojara, ka gipakore ni gin ema gisetimo gigo duto, to ok an, Ruoth Nyasaye.’" 
Deuteronomy32:28 “Joma wacho kamano gin oganda mofuwo, kendo maonge gi paro." 
Deuteronomy32:29 Ka dine giriek, to dine ging’eyo tiend gik matimore, dine ging’eyo gima biro timorenigi e giko." 
Deuteronomy32:30 Ere kaka ng’at achiel dilaw ji gana achiel, kata ji ariyo riemb ji gana apar, mak mana ka ok Ruoth Nyasaye ma Lwandagi ema oweyogi, moketogi e lwet wasikgi?" 
Deuteronomy32:31 To adier, lwanda mar wasikwa ok chal gi Lwandawa, kata mana wasikwa bende ong’eyo kamano." 
Deuteronomy32:32 Mzabibu maggi gin mzabip Sodom, mopidh Gomora ma olembgi otimo kwiri, kendo kech." 
Deuteronomy32:33 Divachgi chalo gi kwich thuol mager. 
Deuteronomy32:34 “Ruoth Nyasaye wacho niya, ‘Donge gigo duto okan maber e od kenona," 
Deuteronomy32:35 nyaka chop chieng’ ma abiro chuloe kuor kendo kumogi mana chieng’ ma tiendgi nokierie, mi gipodh piny? Chieng’ mar masira, ma gibiro rumoe sudonigi machiegni!’" 
Deuteronomy32:36 “Adier, ka Ruoth Nyasaye oneno ni joge ool, kendo ni onge kata ng’at achiel modong’ makonyogi, to obiro ng’adonigi bura maber, kendo obiro kechogi." 
Deuteronomy32:37 Enowach niya, ‘Nyisecheu ni kanye, lwanda mane udwaro yudo konyruok kuome?" 
Deuteronomy32:38 Ere nyisecheu mane chamo boche mag misengni mau, kendo madho divai mar misengni miolo piny? Koro gibi mondo gikonyu, kendo gibednu kar konyruok.’" 
Deuteronomy32:39 “Koro ng’euru malong’o ni an e Nyasaye, kendo onge nyasaye moro, mak mana an. An kende ema anego ji, kendo an ema achiwo ngima. Ahinyo, bende achango. Onge ng’ama nyalo reso ng’ato e lweta." 
Deuteronomy32:40 Koro ating’o bada ka akuong’ora gi nyinga awuon mochwere ni," 
Deuteronomy32:41 kasepiago ligangla mamil, to anachul kuor ni wasika, kendo kasechako ng’ado bura, to anakum jogo mochaya." 
Deuteronomy32:42 Anami asere maga chadhre gi remb joma onegi kod joma omaki. Liganglana nochadh jotend wasigu. 
Deuteronomy32:43 “Un polo, moruru kaachiel gi Ruoth Nyasaye. Un nyiseche duto, kulreneuru. Moruru un ogendini kaachiel gi joge, kendo malaika duto mag Nyasaye mondo opak tekone, nikech enochul kuor kuom remb jotichne, kokumo wasike kod joma ochaye. Enopwodh piny kaachiel gi joge.”" 
Deuteronomy32:44 Musa nobiro gi Joshua wuod Nun, mosomo weche duto mag wendno, ka ji ochiko itgi." 
Deuteronomy32:44 Musa nobiro gi Joshua wuod Nun, mosomo weche duto mag wendno, ka ji ochiko itgi." 
Deuteronomy32:45 Kane Musa osetieko wuoyo ni jo-Israel duto," 
Deuteronomy32:46 nowachonigi niya, “Chikuru itu maber mondo uwinj weche duto ma asiemougo kawuono. Puonjuru nyithindu chikego duto, mondo girit kendo gitim, mak giweyo kata achiel," 
Deuteronomy32:47 nikech ok gin weche manono, to gin e ngimau. Kuritogi, to gibiro miyo udag aming’a e piny ma ubiro kawo ka useng’ado aora Jordan.”" 
Deuteronomy32:48 Odiechieng’ onogo Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa niya," 
Deuteronomy32:49 “Idh got Nebo ma en achiel kuom gode Abarim manie piny Moab, yo wuokchieng’ mar Jeriko, mondo irang piny Kanaan ma abiro miyo jo-Israel ka mwandugi." 
Deuteronomy32:50 Initho ewi got ma ibiro idhono, mi iluw kwereni, mana kaka owadu Harun notho e got Hor, moluwo kwerene." 
Deuteronomy32:51 Gima kamano nyaka timre nimar nuketho e nyima kane ok uluora e nyim jo-Israel e sokni mag Meribath-kadesh, e thim Zin." 
Deuteronomy32:52 Inine piny ma abiro miyo jo-Israelno gi chien, to ok inidonjie.”" 
Deuteronomy33:1 Kane Musa ng’at Nyasaye chiegni tho, noguedho jo-Israel, kowacho kama:" 
Deuteronomy33:2 “Ruoth Nyasaye nobiro koa Sinai. Ne orienynigi gie Seir, kendo gie got Paran. Nobiro ka ji maler gana gi gana oruowo e bathe ma korachwich." 
Deuteronomy33:3 Adier, ohero joge maler, kendo oguedhogi. Giluwe kamoro amora modhiye, kendo giwinjo chikene" 
Deuteronomy33:4 mane Musa omiyowa, mondo obed mwandu mar oganda joka Jakobo." 
Deuteronomy33:5 Ruoth Nyasaye nodoko Ruodh Israel ma bende iluongo ni jo-Jeshurum, kane jodong dhoutgi ochokore kaachiel.”" 
Deuteronomy33:6 Kuom jo-Reuben, Musa nowachoe niya, “Jo-Reuben mondo obed mangima kendo kik githo, to kata kamano, onego gibed manok.”" 
Deuteronomy33:7 Kuom jo-Juda to nowuoyoe kama, “A Ruoth Nyasaye, winj ywak jo-Juda mondo idwokgi kuom ogandagi. Bednigi tekregi ma gisirorego kendo ikonygi kuom wasikgi.”" 
Deuteronomy33:8 Jo-Lawi to nowuoyo kuomgi niya, “A Ruoth Nyasaye, nimiyo nyikwa Lawi ombulu miluongo ni Urim gi Thumim mondo ging’ego dwaroni, nikech gin joma tiyoni gi adiera. Ne itemogi Masa, kendo e sokni mag Meriba mi inwang’o ni gin joma inyalo geno." 
Deuteronomy33:9 Hera mane giherigo oloyo hera mane giherogo wuonegi gi minegi kod owetegi, kata nyithindgi, nikech ne giluwo mana chikeni, mi girito singruok mari maber." 
Deuteronomy33:10 Gipuonjo joka Jakobo wecheni. Ee, gipuonjo jo-Israel chikeni. Giwang’oni misengni, madum tik mamit, kendo gitimoni misengni miwang’o pep e kendoni mar misango." 
Deuteronomy33:11 A Ruoth Nyasaye, guedh riekogi duto, kendo iyie gi tichgi. Tiek wasikgi duto, mondo wasikgigo kik chak bed gi teko.”" 
Deuteronomy33:12 To kuom jo-Benjamin nowuoyoe kama, “Joma Ruoth Nyasaye ohero odak gi kue; Nyasaye Maduong Moloyo ritogi seche duto, kendo gidak e godene.”" 
Deuteronomy33:13 Kuom joka Josef to nowachoe niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye onego guedh lopgi, gi chiwo maber moa e polo malo, kaachiel gi pi manie bwo piny," 
Deuteronomy33:14 gi olembe mabeyo ma chieng’ onyago, kod olembe mabeyo manyak due ka due," 
Deuteronomy33:15 gi gik mabeyo mag gode machon mochwere," 
Deuteronomy33:16 kaachiel gi gik mabeyo mag piny, kod gik moko duto manie iye, gi ng’wono mar Jal modak e Bungu Maliel. Guethgi duto onego bed ewi joka Josef, jal mane oyier kuom owetene." 
Deuteronomy33:17 Dhoode nochal gi nyarwath makayo, ma tungene chalo gi tung jowi, ma obiro chwowogo ogendini, moriembgi nyaka tung piny gi tung’ piny. Tungego gin gi ji tara gi tara ma jo-Efraim, kod ji gana gi gana ma jo-Manase.”" 
Deuteronomy33:18 Jo-Zebulun to nowuoyo kuomgi kama, “Un jo-Zebulun, beduru mamor e wuodheu, kendo un jo-Isakar, beduru mamor e hembeu." 
Deuteronomy33:19 Dhoudi ariyogo biro luongo ogendini e got, kama gitimoe misengni makare, nimar gibiro yudo mwandu mogundho e nembe, kendo gik mabeyo mopondo e dhonam.”" 
Deuteronomy33:20 Kuom jo-Gad to nowuoyoe niya, “Oguedh jalo mayaro tong’ jo-Gad. Dhood Gad chalo gi sibuor madhako, mogwom piny, ka yiecho bat gi wi gima omako." 
Deuteronomy33:21 Ne giyiero piny koma ber moloyo, nikech gin ema nopognigi migap jatelo. Ne gibiro ir jotend ji, kendo ne gitimo kaka Ruoth Nyasaye dwaro, ka girito chike mane Ruoth Nyasaye omiyo jo-Israel.”" 
Deuteronomy33:22 Kuom jo-Dan nowachoe kama, “Dhood Dan chalo gi nyathi sibuor, machikore koa Bashan.”" 
Deuteronomy33:23 Kuom jo-Naftali to nowuoyoe niya, “Dhood Naftali nigi gik moko duto modwaro, kendo en gi gueth mogundho, moa kuom Ruoth Nyasaye. Bende opogne nam Galili kod dho wedhe ma milambo.”" 
Deuteronomy33:24 To kuom jo-Asher nowachoe kama, “Dhood Asher mondo oyud gueth moloyo dhout owetene mamoko. Dhout owetene mondo oher dhoode, kendo mondo dhoode odag maber." 
Deuteronomy33:25 Lodi mag dhorangeyene obed mag chuma gi mag mula, kendo tekone omedre ndalo duto." 
Deuteronomy33:26 “Onge nyasaye moro machal gi Nyasach joka Jeshurun maringo e kor polo e duong’ne maler mondo okonyu. 
Deuteronomy33:27 Nyasaye mochwere ma nyaka chieng’ en kar daku, kendo bedene mochwere ema konyou. Noriembonu wasigu, mi ogolo chik mondo oneggi." 
Deuteronomy33:28 Kamano jo-israel odak gi kue. Adier, nyikwa Jakobo odak maonge ng’ama thagogi e piny machiego cham gi divai, kama tho moa e polo tonie maber." 
Deuteronomy33:29 Ere joma mor ka un, un jo-Israel ma Ruoth Nyasaye owaro! Ruoth Nyasaye e kuot mogeng’ou, kendo en e liganglau mar duong’. Wasiku mondo obolrenu, kendo unyon hembko maggi gi tiendu.”" 
Deuteronomy34:1 Musa nowuok oa e paw Moab moidho got Nebo nyaka wi Pisga yo wuokchieng’ mar Jeriko, mi Ruoth Nyasaye nonyise piny Kanaan duto, chakre Gilead nyaka Dan," 
Deuteronomy34:2 gi piny Naftali duto, kod piny Efraim gi Manase kaachiel gi piny Juda duto nyaka nam Mediterenia man yo podho chieng’," 
Deuteronomy34:3 gi piny man yo milambo, kod paw holo man yo Jeriko miluongo ni Dala Othidhe, nyaka Zoar." 
Deuteronomy34:4 Ruoth Nyasaye nowachone niya, “Ma e piny mane asingora ni Ibrahim gi Isaka kod Jakobo ni nami nyikwagi. Asenyisigo mondo inene gi wang’i, to kata kamano, ok niidh loka, midonjie.”" 
Deuteronomy34:5 Kamano, Musa jatich Ruoth Nyasaye notho e piny Moab kuno, mana kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nosewacho," 
Deuteronomy34:6 mi noyike e holo momanyore gi Beth-peor e piny Moab. To onge ng’ama ong’eyo liende nyaka chil kawuono. 
Deuteronomy34:7 Musa ne otho ka jahigni mia achiel gi piero ariyo, to ne pod en ng’at matek ma wang’e bith." 
Deuteronomy34:8 Jo Israel noywage e paw Moab kuom ndalo piero adek, nyaka ndalo miywagego norumo." 
Deuteronomy34:9 Joshua wuod Nun nomi rieko mathoth, nikech Musa noseyieyo lwete kuome, mi jo-Israel nowinje, motimo gik mane Ruoth Nyasaye ochiko Musa." 
Deuteronomy34:9 Joshua wuod Nun nomi rieko mathoth, nikech Musa noseyieyo lwete kuome, mi jo-Israel nowinje, motimo gik mane Ruoth Nyasaye ochiko Musa." 
Deuteronomy34:10 Nyaka koroni janabi moro machal gi Musa, mane Ruoth Nyasaye romogo wang’ gi wang’, pok owuok e Israel." 
Deuteronomy34:11 Paruru ranyisi gi honni duto mane Ruoth Nyasaye ooro Musa mondo odhi otim ni Farao gi joge kod piny Misri duto," 
Deuteronomy34:12 kendo paruru timbe madongo kendo malich mane Musa otimo, ka jo-Israel neno." 
Joshua1:1 Kane Musa jatich Ruoth Nyasaye osetho, Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Joshua wuod Nun, mane jalup Musa niya," 
Joshua1:2 “Musa jatichna osetho. Omiyo ikri gi jo-Israel duto mondo ung’ad aora Jordan, udhi e piny mamiyou." 
Joshua1:3 Kamoro amora ma tiendu onyono, nobed maru, kaka nasingora ni Musa." 
Joshua1:4 Kuonde duto nobed mau, chakre e thim ma yo milambo, nyaka Lebanon yo nyandwat, kendo koa Yufrate, aora maduong’ man yo wuok chieng’, koluwo piny jo-Hiti, nyaka Nam Mediterenia man yo podho chieng’." 
Joshua1:5 Onge ng’at ma nosiri nyaka chieng’. Anabed kodi kaka nabet gi Musa. Ok naweyi kata jwang’i ok najwang’i. 
Joshua1:6 Bed gi chir, kendo gi jing’o, nimar in ema nitel ni jogagi, ka gikawo piny mane asingora ni kweregi ni namigi." 
Joshua1:7 To bed mana gi chir, kendo gi jing’o, kiluwo chik duto mane Musa jatichna omiyi. Kik iwe chikno, kibaro koracham kata korachwich, mi inibed gi hawi kuonde duto midhiye." 
Joshua1:8 Kik wiyi wil gi Kitap Chikno, to nyaka isome odiechieng’ gotieno, kendo ine ni iluwo chik duto mondikie. Eka inidongi, kendo noguedh gik moko duto mitimo." 
Joshua1:9 Par kaka asechiki ni mondo ibed gi chir kendo gi jing’o. Kik iluor, kendo kik chunyi nyosre, nikech an Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachi, an kodi kuonde duto midhiye.”" 
Joshua1:10 Eka Joshua nochiko jotend jo-Israel kowachonigi niya," 
Joshua1:11 “Wuothuru e kambi duto, kunyiso ji niya, ‘Ikreuru, nimar bang’ ndalo adek ubiro ng’ado aora Jordan, mondo ukaw piny ma Ruoth Nyasaye miyou.’ ”" 
Joshua1:12 Joshua nowacho ni jo-Reuben gi jo-Gad kod jo-Manase konchiel niya," 
Joshua1:13 “Paruru gima Musa jatich Ruoth Nyasaye nochikou, kowacho niya, ‘Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu nomiu pinyni mondo obed kar daku.’" 
Joshua1:14 Mondu gi nyithindu kod jambu nyalo dong’ e piny mane Musa omiyou yo wuok chieng’ mar aora Jordan, to un jolweny nyaka uidh loka, kutelo e nyim jo-Israel weteu, mondo ukonygi kedo." 
Joshua1:15 Ka gin bende gisekawo piny ma Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu miyogi, kendo gidakie, eka unuduogi, mondo udag e pinyu uwegi man yo wuok chieng mar aora Jordan, mane Musa jatich Nyasaye omiyou.”" 
Joshua1:16 Ne giduoko Joshua niya, “Wanatim duto michikowa, kendo wanadhi kamoro amora miorowae." 
Joshua1:17 Wanawinji kaka ne wawinjo Musa, to Nyasaye mondo obed kodi kaka nobedo gi Musa!" 
Joshua1:18 Ng’ato ang’ata ma nodagi winjo chikni, kata ma notamre timo gima ichiko, nonegi. Omiyo bed gi chir kendo gi jing’o!”" 
Joshua2:1 Kane pod gin Shitim, Joshua wuod Nun nooro jombetre ariyo ling’ling’ mondo odhi ocheng piny. Jombetrego nodhi Jeriko modonjo e od dhako moro ma ohodho ma nyinge Rahab, kendo ne ginindo kanyo." 
Joshua2:2 To ruodh Jeriko noyudo wach ni jo-Israel moko osebiro kanyo gotieno mondo ocheng piny," 
Joshua2:3 omiyo nooro ni Rahab wach, kochike niya, “Golnwa joma nie odigo oko, nimar gisebiro mondo gicheng pinywa duto.”" 
Joshua2:4 To noyudo dhakono osepandogi, omiyo nodwoko ruoth niya, “Adier, jomoko nende obiro e oda, to ne ok ang’eyo kuma giaye." 
Joshua2:5 Nende giwuok kar sa miloroe rangach ka piny dwaro yuso, to akia kuma gidhiye. Kulawogi matek, to ubiro jukogi.”" 
Joshua2:6 To chutho, noseterogi ewi tado, moumogi gi tworo mane osechano kanyo." 
Joshua2:7 Jootego nowuok, molor rangach. Ne gilawo jombetre ka giluwo yo madhi kuma iyorogo aora Jordan." 
Joshua2:8 Kane Rahab odhi ir jombetrego e tado, nonwang’o ka pok ginindo," 
Joshua2:9 mowachonigi niya, “Ang’eyo ni Ruoth Nyasaye osemiyou pinyni, kendo en adier ni waduto waluor nikech birou, kendo kibaji omako piny duto." 
Joshua2:10 Wasewinjo kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nodwono pi Nam Makwar e nyimu, kane ua Misri. Bende wasewinjo kaka nunego Sihon gi Og, ruodhi mag jo-Amon man loka Jordan, kaachiel gi ogendini mag lweny." 
Joshua2:11 Kane wawinjo wachno, ne wadoko maluor. Birou bende osekawo chunywa duto, nimar Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu en Nyasach polo gi piny." 
Joshua2:12 Emomiyo koro kuong’renauru e nying Ruoth Nyasaye kendo umiya ranyisi ni kaka asetimonu maber, un bende nutimne joodwa maber." 
Joshua2:13 Singrenauru ni unures wuora gi mama kod owetena gi nyiminena, kaachiel gi joutgi duto. Kik uwe watho.”" 
Joshua2:14 Jogo nodwoke niya, “Kutho, to kara wan bende owinjore watho. Ka Ruoth Nyasaye osemiyowa pinyni, to wanarit singruokwa, kendo wanatimni maber, mak mana kihulo wachwani.”" 
Joshua2:15 Rahab nodak e ot mochuog e kor ohinga mar dala Jeriko, omiyo nogologi gie dirisa, molorogi piny gi tol," 
Joshua2:16 kowachonigi niya, “Dhiuru e got, nikech dipo ka joma lawou oyudou, ponduru kuno kuom ndalo adek, to bang’e ka jogo oseduogo, eka uchak wuoth.”" 
Joshua2:17 Jombetrego nosieme ni ka ok otimo gima gichike, to muma ok nomakgi." 
Joshua2:18 Ne giwachone niya, “Chieng ma wanadonj e pinyni, to nyaka itue tol makwarni e dirisa kama ilorowaeni, kendo ichok wuoru gi meru gi oweteni kod joodu duto, mondo gibed kodi e odi ka." 
Joshua2:19 Ka ng’ato nowuog oko, mi negi, to rembe nobed e wiye owuon, kendo ok wanabed joketho. To ka oneg ng’ato man kodi e ot, to rembe nobed e wiwa." 
Joshua2:20 To kapo ni ihulo wachwani, muma ok nomakwa.”" 
Joshua2:21 Nodwokogi niya, “Obed kamano.” Eka noweyogi, mi gidhi. To bang’e notueyo tol makwar e dirisa." 
Joshua2:22 Kamano ne gidhi e got, mi gipondo kuno. Joma ne lawogi nomanyogi kuonde duto e yo madhi Jordan kuom ndalo adek, to ne ok giyudogi, omiyo ne gidok Jeriko." 
Joshua2:23 Eka jombetre ariyogo nolor oa e got. Ne ging’ado aora, mi gidok ir Joshua." 
Joshua2:24 Ne ginyise weche duto ma notimorenigi, ka gimedo nyise niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye osemiyowa pinyno duto, kendo kibaji osemako ji duto, ka giwinjo birowa.”" 
Joshua3:1 Gokinyi mang’ich, Joshua kod jo-Israel duto nowuok Shitim, mi gidhi aora Jordan. Ne gibworo kanyo ka pok ging’ado aora." 
Joshua3:2 Bang’ ndalo adek jotelo nowuotho e kambi duto," 
Joshua3:3 ka ginyiso ji niya, “Kuneno ka jo-Lawi ma jodolo otelo e nyimu koting’o Sandug Muma mar Ruoth Nyasachu, eka un bende unuchak wuoth kuluwo Sanduk." 
Joshua3:4 Kuluwe kamano, eka unung’e yo monego uluw, nimar yandi pok ubiro koni. To kik usud machiegni kode; weuru thuolo ma dirom ondamo alufu achiel.”" 
Joshua3:5 Joshua nowacho ni ji niya, “Pwodhreuru nikech kiny Ruoth Nyasaye notimnu hono maduong’.”" 
Joshua3:6 Eka nowacho ni jodolo niya, “Ting’uru Sandug Muma, kendo utel ni ji.” Mi ne gitimo kamano." 
Joshua3:7 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Joshua niya, “Tinendeni abiro chako miyi bedo gi duong’ e nyim jo-Israel duto kendo gining’e ni abedo kodi mana kaka nabedo gi Musa." 
Joshua3:8 Omiyo nyis jodolo moting’o Sandug Muma, ni, ka gichopo e aora Jordan, to mondo gichung’ e pi.”" 
Joshua3:9 Joshua nowacho ni jo-Israel niya, “Biuru ka mondo uwinj gima Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu owacho." 
Joshua3:10 Tinende unuyud ranyisi ni Nyasaye mangima ni kodu, kendo nodarnu jo-Kanaan gi jo-Hiti gi jo-Hivi gi jo-Perizi gi jo-Girgash gi jo-Amor kod jo-Jebus." 
Joshua3:11 Sandug Muma mar Ruoth Nyasaye ma Ruodh piny ngima notelnu kung’ado aora Jordan," 
Joshua3:12 kendo ka jodolo moting’e nonyon pi Jordan, to aora nowe mol, mi pi moa malo nogudre kogingore ka pith. Koro yieruru ji apar gariyo kuom dhout Istrael, kugolo ng’at achiel e dhoot ka dhoot.”" 
Joshua3:13  
Joshua3:14 Omiyo ji nowuok e kambi mondo ong’ad aora Jordan, ka jodolo otelonigi koting’o Sandug Muma. Ne en ndalo keyo, kinde mane aora pong’ie mao." 
Joshua3:15 Kane jodolo ochopo e dho aora, mi giketo tiendegi e pi," 
Joshua3:16 gikanyono pi nochung’ gi yo ka malo, kogingore machiegni gi Adam, dala man but Zarethan. Pi mane mol kochomo nam mar Araba, miluongo ni Nam Kado, noduono chuth, mi jo-Israel nong’ado aora kama omanyore gi Jeriko." 
Joshua3:17 Jodolo ma noting’o Sandug Muma mar Ruoth Nyasaye nochung’ e lowo motwo e dier Jordan nyaka jo-Israel duto notieko kadho, ka giwuotho e lowo motwo." 
Joshua4:1 Kane ji duto oseng’ado aora Jordan, Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Joshua niya," 
Joshua4:2 “Yier ji apar gariyo, kigolo ng’at achiel e dhoot ka dhoot," 
Joshua4:3 kendo chikgi mondo gikwany kite apar gariyo e dier Jordan, kama ne jodolo ochung’ie, mondo giting’gi mi gichunggi kama ang’ nubworie gotienoni.”" 
Joshua4:4 Eka Joshua noluongo ji apar gariyo ma noseyiero," 
Joshua4:5 mowachonigi niya, “Kadhuru utel e nyim Sandug Muma mar Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu nyaka e dier Jordan, kendo ng’ato ka ng’ato mondo okwany kidi achiel oyie e goke, mondo kidi ka kidi ochung’ ni dhoot ka dhoot." 
Joshua4:6 Kitego nobednu ka rapar e ndalo mabiro, kendo ka nyithindu nopenju ngechgi," 
Joshua4:7 to ununyisgi kaka pi aora Jordan noduono kane Sandug Muma mar Ruoth Nyasaye kadho. Kamano kitego nobed rapar ni jo-Israel ndalo duto.” 
Joshua4:8 Jo-Israelgo notimo gima ne Joshua ochikogi, kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nosechike. Ne gikwanyo kite apar gariyo e dier Jordan, maromre gi kar kwan dhoutgi, kendo ne giting’ogi nyaka kama ne gidhi bworoe, mi giketogi kanyo." 
Joshua4:9 Bende Joshua nochungo kite apar gariyo moko e dier aora Jordan, kama jodolo mane oting’o Sandug Muma ochung’ie, kendo kitego pod ni kanyo nyaka chil kawuono." 
Joshua4:10 Jodolo ma noting’o Sandug Muma nochung’ achung’a e dier Jordan nyaka ji notieko timo gik moko duto mane Ruoth Nyasaye ochiko Joshua mondo gitim. Ji nokadho piyopiyo," 
Joshua4:11 to kane giseng’ado aroa giduto, eka jodolo bende nong’ado gi Sanduk mar Ruoth Nyasaye," 
Joshua4:12 Jo-Reuben gi jo-Gad kod jo-Manase konchiel ema nong’ado aora kotelo ni jo-Israel, ka giikore ni lweny kaka Musa nosewachonigi." 
Joshua4:13 Ji alufu mia ang’wen moikore ni lweny nong’ado aora e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye ka giidho loka nyaka paw Jeriko mondo gikedi. 
Joshua4:14 Chieng’no Ruoth Nyasaye nomiyo Joshua bedo gi duong’ ahinya e nyim jo-Israel duto, kendo ne gimiye luor e ngimane duto, mana kaka ne gimiyo Musa." 
Joshua4:15 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Joshua niya," 
Joshua4:16 “Chik jodolo moting’o Sandug Rapar, mondo owuog e aora Jordan.”" 
Joshua4:17 Mi Joshua notimo kamano. 
Joshua4:18 To kane jodolo oseidho loka, monyono lowo motwo, aora nochako mol kendo, mi genge nopong’ kaka chon," 
Joshua4:19 Jo-Israel nong’ado aora Jordan tarik apar mar due mokwongo, kendo ne gibworo Gilgal, yo wuok chieng’ mar Jeriko." 
Joshua4:20 Kanyo Joshua nochungoe kite apar gariyo mane gigolo e aora Jordan. 
Joshua4:21 Eka nowacho ni jo-Israel niya, “Ka nyikwau nopenju ngech kitegi e ndalo mabiro," 
Joshua4:22 to ununyisgi ni jo-Israel nong’ado aora Jordan kotwo," 
Joshua4:23 kendo ne Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu nomiyo aora Jordan odwono nyaka ne ukadho uduto mana kaka nomiyo Nam Makwar oduono nyaka ne wakadho. 
Joshua4:24 Kamano ji duto manie piny nong’e teko mar Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo ginimi Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu duong’ nyaka chieng’.”" 
Joshua5:1 Ruodhi duto mag jo-Amor ma nodak yo podho chieng’, kod jo-Kanaan ma nodak mokiewo gi Nam Mediterenia nowinjo ni Ruoth Nyasaye osemiyo aora Jordan oduono ka jo-Israel kadho. Omiyo kihondko nomakogi, mi gidoko maluor, kendo chunygi noa nikech jo-Israel." 
Joshua5:2 E ndalogo, Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Joshua niya, “Los miriye mag kite, mondo ochak oter jo-Israel nyangu kendo.”" 
Joshua5:3 Omiyo Joshua noloso miriye, motero ji nyangu e Gibeath-haaraloth." 
Joshua5:4 Notimo kamano nikech ji duto ma nosebedo madongo moromo kedo e kinde mane gia Misri nosetho e thim kane pod gin e yo. 
Joshua5:5 To kata obedo ni joma chwo duto ma noa Misri noseter nyangu, ji duto ma nonywol e kinde mane ging’ado thim ne pok oter nyangu." 
Joshua5:6 Jo-Israel nosewuotho e thim kuom higni piero ang’wen, kendo joma dongo duto mane oa Misri koseromo kedo nosetho, nikech ne ok girito chik Ruoth Nyasaye. Ruoth Nyasaye noramo ni ok nowe gine piny momew kendo man gi mwandu mane osesingore ni kwerewa ni nomiwa." 
Joshua5:7 To yawuotgi ma nodongo bang’gi ne ok oter nyangu kane giwuotho e thim. Omiyo gin ema Joshua noterogi nyangu. 
Joshua5:8 Kane osetergi nyangu, ji duto nobet e kambi nyaka ne gichango." 
Joshua5:9 Eka Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Musa niya, “Tinendeni asegolo ayanj jo-Misri oko kuomu.” Mano emomiyo nochak kanyo ni Gilgal, kendo pod iluonge kamano nyaka chil kawuono." 
Joshua5:10 Kane jo-Israel obworo Gilgal e paw Jeriko, ne gitimo Pasaka godhiambo due apar gang’wen mar dueno." 
Joshua5:11 Kinyne ne gichamo chamb Kanaan. Ne en chamb abula, kod makati moted maonge thowi." 
Joshua5:12 Chakre chieng’ mane jo-Israel ochamoe chiemb Kanaanno, chiemb Manna mane oyudo gichamo norumo, mi ne ok giyudo moko kendo. Higano ne gichamo mana chamb Kanaan." 
Joshua5:13 Kane Joshua ochopo machiegni gi Jeriko, noneno ng’at mochung’ e nyime, koting’o ligangla, Joshua nodhi ire, mopenje niya, “In jakorwa, koso jasikiwa?”" 
Joshua5:14 Ng’atno nodwoke niya, “An ka kaka jaduong’ jolweny mag Ruoth Nyasaye.” Joshua nogoyo chonge piny, mokulore nyaka e lowo, mowacho niya, “Ang’o midwaro mondo atim ruodha?”" 
Joshua5:15 Jaduong’ jolweny mag Ruoth Nyasaye nodwoke niya, “Lony wuocheni nimar kama ichung’ieno en kama ler.” Mi Joshua notimo kamano." 
Joshua6:1 Ranga Jeriko nolor matek mondo ogeng’ jo-Israel oko, kendo onge ng’ama ne nyalo donjo kata wuok." 
Joshua6:2 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Joshua niya, “Asechiwo Jeriko gi ruodhe e lweti." 
Joshua6:3 Nyaka ilwor dalano gi jogi mag lweny kuom ndalo auchiel, kilwore odiechieng’ kodiechieng’ dichiel." 
Joshua6:4 Jodolo abiriyo nyaka dhi e nyim Sandug Muma, koting’ tunge abiriyo molos gi tunge imbe. To chieng’ mar abiriyo nyaka ilwor dala gi jogi mag lweny nyadibiriyo, ka jodolo goyo tungegi." 
Joshua6:5 Ka giselwore kamano, to mondo gigo tung’ dichiel matek. Gikanyono muwinjoe tung’, to ji duto mondo okog matek. Eka ohinga mar Jeriko nopodh riep, kendo oganda lweny nodonj e dala, ka ng’ato ka ng’ato ochomo nyime tir.”" 
Joshua6:6 Omiyo Joshua wuod Nun nolwongo jodolo, mowachonigi niya, “Ting’uru Sandug Muma mar Ruoth Nyasaye, to ji abiriyo kuomu mondo otel e nyime, koting’o tunge abiriyo molos gi tunge imbe.”" 
Joshua6:7 Eka nowacho ni jolweny niya, “Wuothuru mondo ulwor dala Jeriko, ka jolweny moa e dhoudi ariyo gi nus kande otelo gi Sanduk mar Ruoth Nyasaye.”" 
Joshua6:8 Kane Joshua osechiko jolweny kamano, jodolo abiriyo moting’o tunge abiriyo e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye nochako wuoth ka goyo tung’, kendo Sandug Muma mar Ruoth Nyasaye ne luwo bang’gi." 
Joshua6:9 Jolwenygo notelo e nyim jodolo mane goyo tung’, to moko ne luwo bang’ Sanduk, kendo e kindeno duto tung’ ne ywak." 
Joshua6:10 To Joshua nokwero ji ni kik gikogi, kendo kik gilos nyaka chop chieng’ ma enogol chik, eka ginikog matek." 
Joshua6:11 Kane Joshua osegolo chik kamano, ne gilworo dala dichiel gi Sanduk mar Ruoth Nyasaye. Eka bang’e ne gidok e kambi mi ginindo kanyo." 
Joshua6:12 Joshua nochiew gokinyi mang’ich, kendo jodolo noting’o Sanduk mar Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Joshua6:13 Jodolo abiriyo moting’o tunge abiriyo notelo e nyim Sanduk mar Ruoth Nyasaye ka goyo tung’. Jolweny moko notelonigi, to moko ne luwo Sanduk, kendo e kindego duto tung’ ne ywak." 
Joshua6:14 Kamano ne gilworo dala dichiel chieng’ mar ariyo eka gidok e kambi. Ne gitimo kamano kuom ndalo auchiel. 
Joshua6:15 To chieng’ mar abiriyo, ne gichiew ka ugue wang’, mi gilworo dala dibiryo. Chieng’no kende ema ne gilworoe dalani dibiriyo." 
Joshua6:16 E sa mane gilworee mar abiriyo jodolo ne goyo tung’. Eka Joshua nowacho ni jolweny niya, “Koro gueuru, nikech Ruoth Nyasaye osemiyou dalani." 
Joshua6:17 To joma odakie kaachiel gi gik moko duto manie iye noketh chuth, kendo dhano ok nomulgi, to ginibed gik mochiw ni Ruoth Nyasaye. Rahab gi ji duto manie ode kende ema nowe ka ngima, nikech en ema nopando jombetre mane waoro." 
Joshua6:18 To un, beduru motang’ kendo kik ugomb gik mokwer! Kik ukaw kata achiel kuomgi, nikech kutimo kamano to masira momako jodalano nomak kambi jo-Israel, kendo nokelnigi chandruok." 
Joshua6:19 To fedha gi dhahabu duto kod gik moko molos gi mula kod molos gi nyinyo ema nobed gik mochiw ni Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo nyaka tergi e kar keno mare.”" 
Joshua6:20 Jodolo nogoyo tung’, kendo kane jolweny owinjo, ne gigueyo gi dwol maduong’, mi ohinga mar dala nopodho. Eka jolweny duto nodonjo e dala, ka ng’ato ka ng’ato ochomo nyime tir, mi gikawe." 
Joshua6:21 Ne giketho gik moko duto e dalano, bende ne ginego ng’ato ang’ata ma dichwo kata ma dhako, ma rawera kata moti, kod dhok gi romb kod kenje." 
Joshua6:22 Joshua nowacho ni jombetre ariyo kande mondo odhi e od Rahab okele kaachiel gi joode, kaka ne gisesingore ni ginitim." 
Joshua6:23 Omiyo yawuowigo nodhi, mogolo Rahab gi wuon kod min, gi owetene kod ji duto mane ni kode. Ne gikelogi duto, mi giweyogi e kambi mar jo-Israel gi yo ka oko." 
Joshua6:24 Eka ne giwang’o dala gi gik moko duto manie iye, mak mana fedha gi dhahabu kod gik molos gi mula kod molos gi nyinyo ema ne gikawo, mi gikano kar keno mar od Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Joshua6:25 Kamano Joshua noreso ngima Rahab gi joode kod ji duto mane ni kode, nikech nosepando jombetre ma noor mondo ocheng Jeriko. Nyikwa Rahab pod odak gi jo-Israel nyaka chil kawuono." 
Joshua6:26 Chieng’no Joshua nokwero ji gi kuong’ niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye mondo okum ng’at ma notem gero Jeriko kendo! Koketo mise mare, to wuode makayo notho, kendo kochungo dharangaye, to wuode ma chogo notho.”" 
Joshua6:27 Kamano Ruoth Nyasaye ne ni kod Joshua, mi humbe nolak e pinyno duto." 
Joshua7:1 To jo-Israel ne ok orito chik mane Nyasaye ogolo ni mondo oketh gik moko duto. Akan wuod Karmi ma wuod Zabdi ma wuod Zera ma ja-Juda nokawo gik mokwer mi Ruoth Nyasaye nokecho gi jo-Israel. 
Joshua7:2 Kane gin Jeriko, Joshua noseoro jomoko mondo odhi Ai, dala man machiegni gi Bethaven, yo wuokchieng’ mar Bethel, mondo girang kaka piny chalo. Mi jogo notimo kamano." 
Joshua7:3 Kane giduogo Jeriko, ne giwacho ni Joshua niya, “Jolweny duto ok onego dhi Ai to or mana ji alufu adek kata ariyo kende ema mondo odhi omonje. Kik imi jolweny duto sandre gi idho malo kuro, nikech joma odak kuno nok.”" 
Joshua7:4 Kamano ji ma dirom alufu adek nodhi Ai, to jo-Ai noriembogi," 
Joshua7:5 kendo nonego ji alufu piero adek gauchiel kuomgi. Jo-Ai nolawogi chakre rangagi nyaka Shebarim, monegogi kama yo ridoree. Gikanyono chir mane jo-Israel nigo nolalnigi ka yamo." 
Joshua7:6 Joshua gi jodong Israel noyiecho lepgi, kendo noolo buru e wigi. Ne giriere piny auma e nyim Sanduk mar Ruoth Nyasaye, mi giriyo kanyo nyaka odhiambo." 
Joshua7:7 Joshua nowacho niya, “A Ruoth Nyasaye, ere gimomiyo isekelo jogi loka Jordan mana ni mondo ichiwgi e lwet jo-Amor, kendo itiekgi? Mad ne wasik loka cha!" 
Joshua7:8 A Ruoth Nyasaye ang’o ma dawachi ka koro wasigu oseriembo jo-Israel? 
Joshua7:9 Kapo ni jo-Kanaan kod jopinyno duto owinjo wachni, to gibiro nur kuomwa, kendo yweyowa ka yuech. To koro ang’o ma nitim mondo ires nyingi maduong’ni?”" 
Joshua7:10 Ruoth Nyasaye nodwoko Joshua niya, “A malo! Ang’o momiyo inindo auma kamano?" 
Joshua7:11 Jo-Israel oseketho! Ok giserito chik mane amiyogi, to gisekwalo gik mokwer, kendo giriwogi gi mekgi." 
Joshua7:12 Mano emomiyo ok ginyal siro wasikgi, to giringo nimar gin bende koro okwedgi. Ka ok giwang’o gimoro amora mokwer ma gisekawo, to ok anabed kodgi." 
Joshua7:13 “A malo! Luong ji duto, kendo chikgi mondo gipwodhre ka giikore ni gima kiny notimre. Nyisgi ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel owacho ni gisekawo gik mokwer, omiyo kapok gigolo gigo kuomgi, to ok ginyal siro wasikgi." 
Joshua7:14 Kiny gokinyi giniwuog oko libamba ka libamba, kendo libamba ma Ruoth Nyasaye okwanyo nowuog oko dhoot ka dhoot. To dhoot ma Ruoth Nyasaye okwanyo nowuog oko anywola ka anywola." 
Joshua7:15 Eka anywola ma Ruoth Nyasaye okwanyo nowuog oko ng’ato ka ng’ato. To ng’at ma ombulu nonyis ni nokawo gik mokwer, nowang’ gi joge kaachiel gi mwandune duto, nikech osetimo gima nono, kendo oseketho chik mane Ruoth Nyasaye omiyo joge Israel.”" 
Joshua7:16 Joshua nochiew gokinyi mang’ich, moluongo jo-Israel oko libamba ka libamba, to libamba mar jo-Juda ema nokwany." 
Joshua7:17 To noluongo dhout Juda, joka Zera ema nokwany. Kuom joka Zera, anywola mar Zabdi ema nokwany." 
Joshua7:18 Kane ogolo ng’ato ka ng’ato kuom joka Zabdi, to Akan wuod Karmi, ma wuod Zabdi, ma wuod Zera, ema nokwany." 
Joshua7:19 Eka Joshua nowacho ni Akan niya, “Wuoda, mi Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel duong’, kendo hulne richoni. Nyisa gima isetimo, ma ok ipanda kata achiel.”" 
Joshua7:20 Akan nodwoke niya, “Adier aseketho e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel," 
Joshua7:21 nikech kane aneno law maber molos Shinar, gi fedha ma pekne oromo kilo ariyo, kod dhahabu ma pekne oromo nus kilo kuom mwandu Jeriko, gombo nomaka, makawogi. Nakunyogi e hemba ka fedha ema akuongo keto e bur.”" 
Joshua7:22 Joshua nooro joote, modhi e hema piyopiyo. Ne giyudo gigo koyiki e lowo mana kaka Akan nowacho." 
Joshua7:23 Ne gigologi, kendo gikelogi ir Joshua kod jo-Israel duto, mi giyarogi e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Joshua7:24 Eka Joshua kod jo-Israel duto nokawo Akan nyakwar Zera, kaachiel gi fedha kod law kod dhahabu, gi yawuote gi nyige gi dhoge gi kenjene gi rombene gi hembe kod mwandune duto, moterogi e holo mar Akor." 
Joshua7:25 Joshua nowacho ni Akan niya, “Isekelonwa masira marach! Koro in bende Ruoth Nyasaye biro keloni masira!” Eka jo-Israel duto nogoyo Akan kod joge gi kite nyaka githo, mi giwang’ogi kaachiel gi mwandune." 
Joshua7:26 Ne gidhuro kuome kite mogundho, ma pod ni kanyo nyaka chil kawuono. Mano emomiyo pod iluongo kanyo ni Holo mar Akor, (tiende ni, holo mar masira). Eka bang’e mirimb Ruoth Nyasaye norumo." 
Joshua8:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Joshua niya, “Kik iluor, kendo kik chunyi nyosre. Kaw jolweny duto, kendo dhi imonj Ai. Anachiw ruodh Ai gi dalane gi joge kod pinye e lweti," 
Joshua8:2 kendo unutim ni Ai kod ruodhe mana kaka nutimo ni Jeriko kod ruodhe. To wang’ni unyalo kawo dhok kod gik moko muyudo kuno. Koro or jolweny moko mondo odhi opond yo podho chieng’ mar dalano.” 
Joshua8:3 Omiyo Joshua kod jolweny duto noikore mondo omonj Ai. Noyiero jolweny alufu piero adek, moorogi gotieno, kowachonigi niya," 
Joshua8:4 “Ponduru yo podho chieng’ mar dalano, kubet machiegni kode, kendo kuikore." 
Joshua8:5 An to anamonje gi jolweny modong’, to ka jogo nowuog mondo orad kodwa kaka ne gitimo chieng’ mokwongo, to wanaring e nyimgi." 
Joshua8:6 Kuom mano ginipar ni waringogi kaka ne watimo mokwongo, mi ginilawwa nyaka chop waseywayogi mabor gi dalagi." 
Joshua8:7 Kwaringo kamano, eka uwuogi kama upondoe, kendo ukaw dalagino, nikech Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu biro chiwe e lwetu," 
Joshua8:8 kendo osechiko ni kusekawe to uwang’e. Koro timuru kamano.” 
Joshua8:9 Eka Joshua noorogi yo podho chieng’ mar Ai, mondo gipond e kind dalano kod Bethel. Joshua nonindo kanyachiel gi jolweny," 
Joshua8:10 to gokinyi mang’ich nochiew, mochokogi, kendo ne gidhi Ai, kotelo gi jodong Israel," 
Joshua8:11 nyaka ne gichopo machiegni gi dalano. Ne gijot yo nyandwat mar Ai, to holo ne ni e kindgi gi dalano." 
Joshua8:12 To Joshua noseoro ji maromo alufu abich yo podho chieng mar Ai mondo opond e kind dalano kod Bethel. 
Joshua8:13 Kamano thoth jolweny nojot yo nyandwat mar Ai, to joma nopondo ne ni yo podho chieng’. Joshua to nonindo e holo." 
Joshua8:14 Kane ruodh Ai oneno ni jo-Israel nowuok mapiyo gi joge duto mondo oked kodgi. Ne ok ong’eyo ni jolweny moko osepondone yo podho chieng’ mar dala. 
Joshua8:15 Joshua kod jo-Israel nowuondore ni ologi, mi giringo ka gichomo thim." 
Joshua8:16 Eka noluong jo-Ai duto mane ni e dala mondo olawgi. To kane gilawo Joshua kamano, ne gichwalora mabor gi dalagi." 
Joshua8:17 Onge ng’ato kata achiel ma nodong’ e Ai, nikech ne gisewuok giduto mondo gilaw jo-Israel. Kuom mano ne giweyo dala nono." 
Joshua8:18 Eka Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Joshua niya, “Siem yo Ai gi tong’i, nimar abiro chiwe e lweti.” Mi Joshua notimo kamano." 
Joshua8:19 Kane jo-Israel mopondo oneno ranyisi ma Joshua otimono, ne giwuok. Ne giringo piyopiyo, mi gidonjo e dala, kendo kane gisekawe, ne giwang’e gi kanyono." 
Joshua8:20 Kane jo-Ai ogoyo machiemo, ne gineno iro kadum e dala kochomo polo. Onge kuma ne ginyalo tonyie, nikech jo-Israel ma noyudo wuondore ni ringo kochomo thim, nolokore gi joma ne lawogi." 
Joshua8:21 Joshua gi jo-Israel duto nolokore gi jo-Ai nikech ne gineno ka joma nopondo koro osekawo dala, mi owang’o." 
Joshua8:22 Jo-Ai mane owuok mondo orad gi jo-Israel koro noket diere, mi jo-Israel nonegogi duto, maonge modong’ kata motony," 
Joshua8:23 mak mana ruodh Ai ema ne gimako kangima, mi gitero ir Joshua." 
Joshua8:24 Kane jo-Israel osenego jo-Ai duto mane ni e pap, kod mane ni e thim kuma ne giselawogie, ne gidok Ai, mi ginego ji duto ma nodong’ kuno." 
Joshua8:25 Chieng’no noneg jo-Ai duto, ma onge ng’ama dichwo kata madhako ma nodong’. Ne giromo ji alufu apar gariyo." 
Joshua8:26 Joshua ne ok oweyo siemo Ai gi tong’ nyaka noneg ji duto ma nodak kuno. 
Joshua8:27 Jo-Israel nokawo mana dhok gi mwandu mane giyudo, kaluwore gi wach mane Ruoth Nyasaye owacho ni Joshua." 
Joshua8:28 Kamano Joshua nowang’o Ai chuth, moweye kokethore, ma onge ji modakie nyaka chil kawuono." 
Joshua8:29 Noliero ruodh Ai e yath, moweye kanyo nyaka odhiambo. To ka chieng’ podho, nogolo chik mondo ong’ade oko e yath. Ne giwito ringre e dhoranga dala, mi gidhuro kuome kite mogundho, ma pod ni kanyo nyaka chil kawuono." 
Joshua8:30 Joshua nogero kendo-mar-misango ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel e got Ebal. 
Joshua8:31 Nogere gi kite ma ok opa gi gir nyinyo, kaluwore gi chik mane Musa jatich Ruoth Nyasaye omiyo jo-Israel, kaka ondik e kitap Chik mar Musa. Ne gitimo ni Ruoth Nyasaye misengni miwang’o pep kod mag sawo e kendono." 
Joshua8:32 Joshua nondiko chik Musa e kitego e nyim jo-Israel. 
Joshua8:33 Mi jo-Israel duto gi joma nobiro kodgi, kaachiel gi jodongo gi jotelo kod jong’ad bura, nochung’ e dir Sandug Muma mar Ruoth Nyasaye koni gi koni, ka gimanyore gi jo-Lawi ma jodolo ma noting’e. Jo-Israel moko nochung’ kochomo got Gerazim, to modong’ nochomo got Ebal, mondo oguedhgi kaka Musa jatich Ruoth Nyasaye nosechiko chon." 
Joshua8:34 Eka Joshua nosomo weche duto mag gueth kod mag kuong’ mana kaka ondik e Kitap Chik. 
Joshua8:35 Ne ok oweyo kata wach achiel kuom weche mane Musa osechiko, to nosomogi duto gi dwol maduong’ ni jo-Israel duto, machwo gi mamon gi joma tindo, kod joma nobiro kodgi." 
Joshua9:1 Ruodhi duto ma nodak yo podho chieng’ mar Jordan nowinjo humb wechego. Ne gin ruodhi mag jo-Hiti, gi mag jo-Amor, gi mag jo-Kanaan, gi mag jo-Perizi, gi mag jo-Hivi, kod mag jo-Jebus, mane gin ogendini modak e gode, gi pewe kod e dho Nam Mediterenia nyaka Lebanon yo nyandwat." 
Joshua9:2 Kane giwinjo wechego, ne giriwore giduto, mondo giked gi Joshua kod jo-Israel." 
Joshua9:3 To kane jo-Gibeon owinjo gima Joshua osetimo Jeriko gi Ai, ne giparo mondo giwuonde." 
Joshua9:4 Ne gikawo gunde moti moting’o chiemo motwo kendo mopur, mi giketo e ng’e kenjegi, kaachiel gi ndede mobaw obaw mag divai." 
Joshua9:5 Ne girwako wuoch moyiech, kod nengni moti," 
Joshua9:6 eka ne gibiro ir Joshua e kambi Gilgal, mi giwachone kod jo-Israel niya, “Waa e piny mabor ahinya, omiyo yie watim kodu winjruok mar kue.”" 
Joshua9:7 To jo-Israel nodwoko jo-Hivigo niya, “Ang’o ma dimi watim kodu winjruok mar kue? Kamoro udak mana machiegni kodwa.”" 
Joshua9:8 Jo-Hivi to nowacho ni Joshua niya, “Wayie bedo e bwo lochni.” Eka Joshua nopenjogi nyinggi, kendo kuma giaye." 
Joshua9:9 Ne gidwoke niya, “Ruoth, waa e piny mabor ahinya nikech humb Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu. Wasewinjo gik ma notimore e Misri," 
Joshua9:10 kendo gima notimo ni ruodhi ariyo mag jo-Amor man yo wuok chieng’ mar Jordan, ma gin Sihon ruodh Heshbon kod Og ruodh Bashan ma nodak Ashtaroth." 
Joshua9:11 Omiyo jodongwa duto nochikowa mondo wakaw chiemo ma dirom wuoth, kendo wabi iru mondo wanyisu ni wayie bedo e bwo lochu. Kuom mano, yie watim kodu winjruok mar kue." 
Joshua9:12 Neuru makati mwating’ogi. Kane wachako wuoth kwabiro ka, ne pod giliet, to koro gisetwo kendo gipur." 
Joshua9:13 Neuru ndedewagi! Kane waoloe divai, ne ginyien, to koro giseyiech. Wuochewa gi lepwa bende oseti nikech wuoth mabor.”" 
Joshua9:14 Jotelo moko mag jo-Israel nobilo chiemb jogo, mak gipenjo Ruoth Nyasaye wach." 
Joshua9:15 Omiyo Joshua norwako jootego, motimo kodgi winjruok mar kue, kokuong’orenigi ni ok noneggi, kendo jodong Israel bende okuong’orenigi kamano." 
Joshua9:16 Chieng’ mar adek bang’ timo kodgi winjruokno, wach nofwenyore ni kara gin manaa jogweng’ modak machiegni." 
Joshua9:17 Mano omiyo jo-Israel nochako wuoth, kendo bang’ ndalo adek ne gichopo e mier mane jogo odakie. Miego ne gin Gibeon gi Kefira gi Beeroth kod Kiriath-jearim." 
Joshua9:18 Jo-Israel ne ok onegogi, nikech singruok mane jodong Israel otimo kodgi e nying Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel, to kata kamano ji duto nong’ur gi jodonggi." 
Joshua9:19 To jodongo duto nodwokogi niya “Ng’euru ni ne wachamo kodgi muma e nying Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel, omiyo koro ok wanyal mulogi." 
Joshua9:20 Wabiro weyogi mak wanegogi, mondo muma mane wachamo kodgi kik dognwa," 
Joshua9:21 to wabiro ketogi joma baronwa yien kendo ma umbonwa pi.” Kamano jo-Israel duto noyie gi wach mane jodonggi onyisogi. 
Joshua9:22 Joshua noluongo jo-Gibeon, mopenjogi niya, “Ere gimomiyo ne uwuondowa kamano? Nunyisowa ni ua e piny mabor ahinya, to kara un mana jogweng’!" 
Joshua9:23 Koro unubed joma okwedi nikech wachni, kendo e kinde duto unubed wasumbwa ma baro yien kendo ma umbo pi mitiyogo e Od Nyasachwa.”" 
Joshua9:24 Ne gidwoke niya, “Ruoth, ne watimo kamano nikech nonyiswa ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachi nochiko Musa jatichne ni mondo ochiwnu pinyni duto, kendo ni mondo uneg ji duto modakie. Kuom mano, birou osemiyo kihondko omakowa." 
Joshua9:25 Koro wan e lweti, omiyo timnwa gima ineno ni ber.”" 
Joshua9:26 Kamano Joshua noresogi e lwet jo-Israel, mi ne ok ginegogi." 
Joshua9:27 To chakre kanyono noketogi jobar yien kod joumb pi ni jo-Israel, kendo ni tich kendo-mar-misango mar Ruoth Nyasaye. Pod gitiyo kamano nyaka chil kawuono kamoro amora ma Ruoth Nyasaye oyiero." 
Joshua10:1 Adoni-zedek ruodh Jerusalem nowinjo ni Joshua okawo Ai, moketho chuth, kendo osetimo ni Ai gi ruodhe mana kaka notimo ni Jeriko gi ruodhe. Nowinjo bende ni jo-Gibeon osetimo winjruok mar kue gi jo-Israel, kendo odak kodgi." 
Joshua10:2 Kuom mano, jo-Jerusalem nobwok ahinya, nimar Gibeon ne en kama duong’ machalo dala ruoth. Noduong’ moloyo Ai, kendo joge ne gin jolweny marateke." 
Joshua10:3 Omiyo Adoni-zedek ruodh Jerusalem nooro wach ni Hoham ruodh Hebron, gi Piram ruodh Jarmuth, gi Jafia ruodh Lakish, kod Debir wuod Eglon, kowachonogi niya," 
Joshua10:4 “Biuru ukonya monjo jo-Gibeon, nikech gisetimo winjruok mar kue gi Joshua kod jo-Israel.”" 
Joshua10:5 Kamano ruodhi mag Jerusalem gi Hebron gi Jarmuth gi Lakish kod Eglon, ma gin ruodhi abich mag jo-Amor, noriwo jolwenjgi kaachiel, mi gimonjo Gibeon." 
Joshua10:6 To jo-Gibeon nooro wach ni Joshua e kambi Gilgal ka giwachone niya, “Bi ikonywa, kik iwewa, nikech ruodhi mag jo-Amor modak e piny gode oseriwore mondo onywaknwa. Omiyo bi mondo ireswa.”" 
Joshua10:7 Kamano Joshua nodhi gi thuondi duto, kod joge duto mag lweny." 
Joshua10:8 Ruoth Nyasaye nowachone niya, “Kik iluorgi, nikech asechiwogi e lweti, kendo onge kata ng’at achiel ma nosiri.”" 
Joshua10:9 Eka Joshua noa Gilgal, mowuotho otieno duto nyaka Gibeon. Nomonjo jo-Amor apoya," 
Joshua10:10 kendo Ruoth Nyasaye notaro wang’gi mokeyogi e nyim jo-Israel, mi nologi chuth. Jo-Israel nolawogi e yo maridore Beth-horon, mi ne ginegogi nyaka Azeka gi Makeda." 
Joshua10:11 E kinde mane jo-Israel riembogi e yo maridoreno, Ruoth Nyasaye nodiro kuomgi pe madongodongo, monegogi nyaka Azeka. Peno nonego ji mang’eny moloyo mane jo-Israel onego." 
Joshua10:12 Chieng’ mane Ruoth Nyasaye ochiwoe jo-Amor e lwet jo-Israel, Joshua nowuoyo gi Ruoth Nyasaye, kowacho e nyim jo-Israel duto kama: “A wang’chieng,’ chung’ achung’a ewi Gibeon. To in due, mondo ichung’ ewi holo Aijalon.”" 
Joshua10:13 Kamano wang’chieng’ nochung’ kendo due bende ne ok osudo nyaka jo-Israel notieko chulo kuor kuom wasikgi. Wachno ondik e Kitap Jashar. Wang’chieng’ nosiko mana e kor polo. Ne ok oruyo podho nyaka kane osebet kanyo odiechieng’ ngima. 
Joshua10:14 Pok osebedoe odiechieng’ machal kamano, ma Ruoth Nyasaye owinjoe dwond dhano, nimar chieng’no Ruoth Nyasaye nokedo ni jo-Israel." 
Joshua10:15 Bang’e Joshua kod jo-Israel duto nodok e kambi Gilgal. 
Joshua10:16 Ruodhi abichgo noringo mopondo e rogo man Makeda," 
Joshua10:17 to noyudgi, monyis Joshua ni gipondo kanyo." 
Joshua10:18 Eka Joshua nowacho niya, “Ng’ieluru kite madongo olorgo dho rogono, kendo uket ji orite." 
Joshua10:19 To kik udek kuno, to meduru mana lawo wasiku, kendo kik uwe gichop e miechgi mak unegogi, nimar Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu osechiwogi e lwetu.”" 
Joshua10:20 Joshua kod jo-Israel nonego jo-Amor motieko, mak mana ji manok ma nodonjo e mier mochiel gi ohinga ema notony." 
Joshua10:21 Eka jolweny duto nodwogo ir Joshua Makeda kangima. Onge ng’ama notemo timo gimoro marach ni jo-Israel. 
Joshua10:22 Koro Joshua nowacho ni mondo oel dho rogo, kendo okelne ruodhi abichgo." 
Joshua10:23 Mi ne gitimo kamano. Ne gin ruodhi mag Jerusalem gi Hebron gi Jarmuth gi Lakish kod Eglon. 
Joshua10:24 Kane gisekelogi ire, Joshua noluongo jo-Israel duto, mowacho ni jotend jolweny ma nodhi kode niya, “Suduru ka, mondo unyon ng’ut ruodhigi.” Mi ne gitimo kamano." 
Joshua10:25 Eka Joshua nowacho ni jotelogo niya, “Kik uluor kata kik chunyu nyosre. Beduru gi chir kendo gi jing’o, nimar mano e kaka Ruoth Nyasaye notim ni wasigu duto mubiro kedogo.”" 
Joshua10:26 Bang’e Joshua nonego ruodhigo, kendo nolierogi e yien abich, mi ne giriyoe nyaka odhiambo." 
Joshua10:27 Kane chieng’ podho, Joshua nogolo chik, mi ong’adgi oko, kendo nowitgi e rogo mane gisepondoeno. Eka nolor dho rogo gi kite madongo, ma pod ni kanyo nyaka chil kawuono." 
Joshua10:28 Chieng’no, Joshua nokawo Makeda, monego ruodhe gi joge. Notiekogi duto, kaachiel gi gimoro amora mangima mane ni kuno. Ne ok oweyo ng’ato ka ngima kata achiel, kendo notimo ni ruodh Makeda mana kaka nosetimo ni ruodh Jeriko." 
Joshua10:29 Bang’ mano Joshua gi jo-Israel duto noa Makeda modhi Libna. Ne gimonjo dalano," 
Joshua10:30 mi Ruoth Nyasaye nochiwe gi ruodhe e lwetgi, kendo ne ginego joma odakie duto, kod gimoro amora mangima mane ni kuno. Ne ok giweyo kata ng’at achiel kangima, kendo ne gitimo ni ruodh dalano mana kaka ne gitimo ni ruodh Jeriko." 
Joshua10:31 Kane Joshua kod jo-Israel duto oa kanyo, ne gidhi mi gilworo Lakish. Ne gimonje," 
Joshua10:32 kendo Ruoth Nyasaye nochiwe e lwetgi. Ne gikawe bang’ ndalo ariyo, mi ne ginego gimoro amora mangima mane ni kuno, kaka ne gisetimo Libna." 
Joshua10:33 E kindeno, Horam ruodh Gezer nobiro mondo ores Lakish, to Joshua nonege kaachiel gi joge, ma onge ng’ama otony." 
Joshua10:34 Joshua kod jo-Israel duto noa Lakish modhi Eglon. Ne gilwore kendo gimonje," 
Joshua10:35 mi gikawe mana odiechieng’no. Ne ginego ji duto modakie, kod gimoro amora mangima mane ni kuno, mana kaka ne gitimo Lakish." 
Joshua10:36 Kane gia Eglon, Joshua kod jo-Israel duto nodhi momonjo Hebron." 
Joshua10:37 Ne gikawe, mi ginego ruodhe kod gimoro amora mangima mane ni kuno, kaachiel gi mago mane nie mier matindo mokiewo kode. Joshua noketho dalano chuth, ma ok oweyo kata ng’at achiel kangima, mana kaka ne gitimo Eglon." 
Joshua10:38 Bang’e Joshua gi jo-Israel duto nowichore mochomo Debir, mi gimonje." 
Joshua10:39 Ne gikawe kaachiel gi ruodhe kod mier matindo mokiewo kode, mi ne ginego ji duto kod gimoro amora mangima mane ni kuno. Ne ok giweyo ng’ato otony kata achiel. Ne gitimo ni Debir gi ruodhe mana kaka ne gitimo ni Hebron kod Libna gi ruodhi maggi." 
Joshua10:40 Kamano Joshua nokawo pinyno duto. Noloyo ruodhi mag piny gode, kod mag piny milambo, gi mag pewe, kod mag kuonde motimo thidhiya. Nonego ji duto, ma ok oweyo ng’ato otony kata achiel, kotieko gimoro amora ma yueyo, kaka Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel nosechiko." 
Joshua10:41 Nonego jopinjego duto, chakre Kadesh-barnea nyaka Gaza, kokwako piny duto mar jo-Goshen nyaka Gibeon." 
Joshua10:42 Joshua nomako ruodhigo duto, kaachiel gi pinjegi e lweny achielno, nimar Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel nokedo ni joge." 
Joshua10:43 Bang’e Joshua gi jo-Israel duto nodok e kambi Gilgal. 
Joshua11:1 Kane Jabin ruodh Hazor owinjo wechego duto, nooro wach ni Jobab ruodh Madon kod ruodhi mag Shimron gi Akshaf," 
Joshua11:1 Kane Jabin ruodh Hazor owinjo wechego duto, nooro wach ni Jobab ruodh Madon kod ruodhi mag Shimron gi Akshaf," 
Joshua11:2 kod ruodhi mae piny gode ma yo nyandwat, gi holo mar aora Jordan man yo milambo mar Kinereth, kod mae pewe, gi mae piny Dor yo podho chieng’." 
Joshua11:3 Nooro wach bende ni jo-Kanaan ma yo wuokchieng’ gi ma yo podho chieng’, kendo ni jo-Amor gi jo-Hiti gi jo-Perizi gi jo-Jebus ma nodak e piny gode, kod jo-Hivi ma nodak e tiend got Hermon e piny Mizpa." 
Joshua11:4 Giduto ne giwuok gi jolwenjgi duto. Ne ging’eny ka kuoyo mae dhonam, kendo ne gin gi geche lweny mogundho." 
Joshua11:5 Ruodhigo duto noriwo paro achiel, mi ne gibiro, kendo gijot e dho kuonde motimo thidhiya mag Merom mondo gimonj jo-Israel." 
Joshua11:6 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Joshua niya, “Kik iluorgi, nimar kiny sa makama nachiwgi e lwet jo-Israel, kendo giduto ginitho, mi ning’ad odond faresegi kendo niwang’ gechegi.”" 
Joshua11:7 Kamano Joshua kod jolwenje nopoyogi e dho kuonde motimo thidhiya mag Merom, mi gimwomore kuomgi." 
Joshua11:8 Ruoth Nyasaye nochiwogi e lwet jo-Israel, mi jo-Israel noloyogi, kendo nolawogi yo nyandwat nyaka Sidon Maduong’, kendo yo podho chieng’ nyaka Misrefoth, kendo yo wuok chieng’ nyaka holo mar Mizpa. Ne ginegogi, ma onge kata ng’at achiel ma nodong’ ka ngima." 
Joshua11:9 Joshua nong’ado odond faresegi, kendo nowang’o gechegi, kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nochiko." 
Joshua11:10 Eka Joshua nowichore ni Hazor, dala ma noyudo otelo ni pinjego. Jo-Israel nokawe, monego ruodhe." 
Joshua11:11 Ne ginego gimoro amora mangima mane ni kuno, ma onge gima yueyo ma nodong’, kendo ne giwang’o dalano." 
Joshua11:12 Kamano Joshua nomako ruodhigo monego, kendo noketho miechgi. Nonego ji duto ma nodak e miego, kendo noketho gik moko duto, kaka Musa jatich Ruoth Nyasaye nosechiko." 
Joshua11:13 To jo-Israel ne ok owang’o mier mane oger ewi pidhe, mak mana Hazor kende ema ne Joshua owang’o." 
Joshua11:14 Ne gipeyo dhok, mi giyako gimoro amora mane giyudo e miego, kendo ne ginego ji duto, ma ok giweyo kata ng’at achiel ka yueyo." 
Joshua11:15 Ruoth Nyasaye noketo chikene e lwet Musa jatichne, to Musa nomiyogi Joshua, mi Joshua nochopo duto, ma ok oweyo kata chik achiel mane Ruoth Nyasaye omiyo Musa." 
Joshua11:16 Joshua nokawo piny gode gi piny milambo duto gi piny Goshen duto, kaachiel kod pewe gi holo mar aora Jordan kod piny gode mag Israel gi pewe mokiewo kode." 
Joshua11:17 Lochne nochakore got Halak man but Seir, nyaka Baal-gad e holo mar Lebanon manie tiend got Hermon." 
Joshua11:18 Nokedo gi pinjego kuom ndalo mang’eny, nyaka nomako ruodhi maggi duto, monego." 
Joshua11:19 Miego duto nokaw gi thwon, ma onge mane otimo winjruok gi jo-Israel mak mana Gibeon mane jo-Hivi odakie." 
Joshua11:20 Ruoth Nyasaye nomiyogi chir mar kedo gi jo-Israel mondo jo-Israel oneggi maonge ng’wono, kendo otiekgi chuth, mana kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nosechiko Musa." 
Joshua11:21 E ndalogo ema ne Joshua odhiye piny gode, motieko jo-Anak mane odak Hebron gi Debir gi Anab kendo e piny gode duto mag Juda kod mag Israel. Notiekogi duto, kendo noketho miechgi." 
Joshua11:22 Onge jo-Anak ma nodong’ kata achiel e piny mane jo-Israel okawo, mak mana mago ma nodak Gaza gi Gath kod Ashdod." 
Joshua11:23 Kamano Joshua nokawo pinyno duto, kochopo chike duto mane Ruoth Nyasaye omiyo Musa. Joshua nomiyo jo-Israel pinyno, kopogo ni dhoot ka dhoot lembe, mi piny nokue." 
Joshua12:1 Jo-Israel nosekawo piny duto man yo wuokchieng’ mar aora Jordan, chakre aora Arnon, koluwo aora Jordan nyaka got Hermon, kendo ne ginego ruodhi mag pinyno." 
Joshua12:2 Ne ginego Sihon, ruodh jo-Amor ma nodak Heshbon. Pinye nochakore Aroer man but holo mar Arnon, koluwo holono. Piny Gilead konchiel nyaka aora Jabok motimo tong’ Amon bende" 
Joshua12:3 ne nie pinye kaachiel gi piny man yo wuok chieng’ mar aora Jordan, chakre Nam Galili nyaka Nam Araba, miluongo ni Nam Kado, koluwo yor Beth-jeshimoth, kochomo yo milambo nyaka got Pisga." 
Joshua12:4 Bende ne ginego Og ruodh Bashan, ma nodak Ashtaroth gi Edrei. Ne en achiel kuom jo-Refaim manok ma nodong’." 
Joshua12:5 Got Hermon gi Saleka kod Bashan duto mochopo e mbap Geshur gi Maakath kod Gilead komachielo nyaka mbap Sihon ruodh Heshbon ne nie pinye. 
Joshua12:6 Musa jatich Nyasaye kod jo-Israel nonegogi duto, mokawo pinygi. Nomiyo jo-Reuben gi jo-Gad kod jo-Manase konchiel pinyno mondo obed margi." 
Joshua12:7 Joshua kod jo-Israel nonego ruodhi modak e piny man yo podho chieng’ mar aora Jordan, chakre Baal-gad e holo mar Lebanon, nyaka got Halak man but Seir. Joshua nokawo pinygi mopogo ni dhout Israel mondo obed margi." 
Joshua12:8 Ne en piny gode gi pewe gi holo mar aora Jordan gi kuonde motimo thidhiya gi piny milambo. Kuondego ema jo-Hiti gi jo-Amor gi jo-Kanaan gi jo-Perizi gi jo-Hivi kod jo-Jebus odakie. 
Joshua12:9 Ne ginego ruodhi mag Jeriko gi Ai man but Bethel," 
Joshua12:10 gi Jerusalem gi Hebron 
Joshua12:11 gi Jarmuth gi Lakish 
Joshua12:12 gi Eglon gi Gesher 
Joshua12:13 gi Debir gi Geder 
Joshua12:14 gi Horma gi Arad 
Joshua12:15 gi Libna gi Adulam 
Joshua12:16 gi Makeda gi Bethel 
Joshua12:17 gi Tapia gi Hefer 
Joshua12:18 gi Afek gi Sharon 
Joshua12:19 gi Madon gi Hazor 
Joshua12:20 gi Shimron-meron gi Akshaf 
Joshua12:21 gi Taanak gi Megido 
Joshua12:22 gi Kedesh gi Jokneam-karmel 
Joshua12:23 gi Dor e piny Dor gi Gaim-galili 
Joshua12:24 kod Tirza. Giduto ne gin ruodhi piero adek gachiel. 
Joshua13:1 Joshua koro noseti, kendo hike oniang’, mi Ruoth Nyasaye nowachone niya, “Isedoko jaduong’ moti to piny malach pod odong’ monego kaw." 
Joshua13:2 Magi e pinje ma pod odong’: Piny jo-Filistia kod piny jo-Geshur duto.” 
Joshua13:3 (Pinyno duto chakre Shihor yo wuok chieng’ mar Misri, nyaka Ekron yo nyandwat, ikwano ka piny Kanaan. To ruodhi mag jo-Filistia ma nodak Gaza gi Ashdod gi Ashkelon gi Gath kod Ekron ema ne weg pinyno.) “Piny jo-Avim duto" 
Joshua13:4 yo milambo, gi piny jo-Kanaan duto, chakre Meara e piny jo-Sidon nyaka Afek gi mbap jo-Amor," 
Joshua13:5 kod piny jo-Gebal gi piny Lebanon duto man yo wuok chieng’ mar Baal-gad manie tiend got Hermon nyaka kama idonjogo Hamath. 
Joshua13:6 Pinyno oting’o jo-Sidon modak e piny gode, chakre Lebanon nyaka Misrefoth-maim. Anariemb jogo duto mondo oweni jo-Israel thuolo. To pinyno duto ipog ni jo-Israel mondo obed margi, kaka asechiki." 
Joshua13:7 Koro pog pinyni ni dhoudi ochiko kande, kaachiel gi jo-Manase konchiel.”" 
Joshua13:8 Jo-Manase komachielo, kaachiel gi jo-Reuben kod jo-Gad, noseyudo pinje mane Musa jatich Ruoth Nyasaye omiyogi yo wuok chieng’ mar Jordan. Nopogonigi pinyno" 
Joshua13:9 chakre Aroer man but holo mar aora Arnon gi piny mopie man e bath holo konchiel kendo noting’o piny pap duto chakre Medeba nyaka Dibon," 
Joshua13:10 kod mier duto mag Sihon ruodh jo-Amor ma nodak Heshbon, nyaka mbap jo-Amon." 
Joshua13:11 Noting’o bende piny Gilead kod piny jo-Geshur gi jo-Maakath kod got Hermon duto gi piny Bashan duto nyaka Saleka. 
Joshua13:12 Piny Bashan noting’o piny Og duto, mane Og orito kodak Ashtaroth gi Edrei. E ndalo mane Musa onegoe jo-Refaim manok ma nodong’, mokawo pinygi, Og kende ema notony." 
Joshua13:13 To jo-Israel ne ok oriembo jo-Geshur gi jo-Maakath, omiyo pod gidak gi jo-Israel nyaka chil kawuono." 
Joshua13:14 Jo-Lawi kende ema ne ok oyudo piny, nimar Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel ema nobedo ka mwandugi, kaka nosesingorenigi." 
Joshua13:15 Musa nosepogo piny gi dhout jo-Reuben. 
Joshua13:16 Pinygi nochakore Aroer man but holo mar aora Arnon, kod piny mopie manie bath holo konchiel, kendo noting’o piny pap duto nyaka Medeba," 
Joshua13:17 gi Heshbon kaachiel gi mier mokiewo kode duto, kod Dibon gi Beth-baal-meon" 
Joshua13:18 gi Jahaz gi Kedemoth gi Mafaath 
Joshua13:19 gi Kiriathaim gi Sibma kod Zereth-shahar e got manie holo," 
Joshua13:20 gi Beth-peor gi kuonde thidhiya mag got Pisga, gi Beth-jeshimoth" 
Joshua13:21 kod mier moko duto mag piny pap, gi piny duto mane Sihon ruodh jo-Amor ma nodak Heshbon orito. Musa nosenego Sihon kaachiel gi Evi gi Rekam gi Zur gi Hur kod Reba mane jodong jo-Midian. Jodongogo nodak e pinyno, ka gin e bwo loch Sihon." 
Joshua13:22 Balaam wuod Beor, mane jakor wach, ne en achiel kuom joma jo-Israel nonego." 
Joshua13:23 Aora Jordan ema nobedo mbap jo-Reuben. Pinyno kaachiel gi mieche kod mier matindo mokiewo kodgi nobedo mwandu dhout jo-Reuben. 
Joshua13:24 Bende Musa nopogo piny ni dhout jo-Gad. 
Joshua13:25 Pinygi ne en Jazer gi miech Gilead duto kod piny jo-Amon konchiel nyaka Aroer man yo wuok chieng’ mar Raba. 
Joshua13:26 Nochakore Heshbon nyaka Ramoth-mizpe gi Betonim, kendo chakre Mahanaim nyaka mbap Lodeba." 
Joshua13:27 To pinygi mane nie holo mar aora Jordan noting’o Beth-haram gi Beth-nimra gi Sukoth gi Zafan kod bath piny Sihon ruodh Heshbon modong’. Pinygino ne ni yo wuokchieng’ mar aora Jordan kendo Jordan nyaka Nam Galili nodoko mbape. 
Joshua13:28 Pinyno kaachiel gi mieche, kod mier matindo mokiewo kodgi nobedo mwandu dhout jo-Gad." 
Joshua13:29 Kamano bende Musa nopogo piny ni dhout jo-Manase komachielo cha. 
Joshua13:30 Pinygi nochakore Mahanaim, mokwako piny Og ruodh Bashan duto kod mier piero auchiel mag Jair e Bashan." 
Joshua13:31 Kamano dir Gilead konchiel gi Ashtaroth kod Edrei, ma gin joka Makir wuod Manase, tiende ni dhout joka Makir konchiel." 
Joshua13:32 Mago e pinje mane Musa opogo ni dhoudigo e paw Moab, yo wuok chieng’ mar Jordan." 
Joshua13:33 To ne ok opogo ni jo-Lawi piny, nimar Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel nobedo ka mwandugi, kaka nosesingorenigi." 
Joshua14:1 Koro magi e pok mane jo-Israel oyudo e piny Kanaan kaka Eleazar jadolo gi Joshua wuod Nun kod jodong dhout Israel nopogonigi. 
Joshua14:2 Pinyno nopog gi ombulu, ni dhoudi ochiko gi nus kande kaluwore gi chik mane Ruoth Nyasaye omiyo Musa." 
Joshua14:3 Musa nosepogo ni dhoudi ariyo gi nus kande pinygi loka Jordan, to ne ok opogo ni jo-Lawi piny kaka nopogo ni dhoudi mamoko." 
Joshua14:4 Joka Josef nosepogore dhoudi ariyo, ma Manase gi Efraim. Jo-Lawi ne ok oyudo pok moro e pinyno, mak mana mier mag dak kod lege jamni ma nokiewo gi miego." 
Joshua14:5 Jo-Lawi nopogo piny kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nosechiko Musa. 
Joshua14:6 Jo-Juda nobiro ir Joshua Gilgal, mi Kaleb wuod Jefune ma ja Keniz nowachone niya, “Bende iparo gima ne Ruoth Nyasaye onyiso Musa jatich Nyasaye kuomi gi kuoma kane wan Kadesh-barnea?" 
Joshua14:7 Ne an jahigni piero ang’wen kane Musa jatich Nyasaye oora mondo abi anon pinyni, kendo kane adok, naterone wach ma adieri." 
Joshua14:8 Jomoko mane wabirogo nonyoso chuny ji, to an ne aluwo dwaro mar Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasacha gi chuny modimbore." 
Joshua14:9 Chiengno Musa nosingore ka wachona niya, ‘Piny ma isenyono gi tiendi nobed mari kod yawuoti nyaka chieng’, nimar iseluwo dwaro mar Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasacha gi chuny modimbore.’" 
Joshua14:10 Koro en higni piero ang’wen gabich nyaka ne Ruoth Nyasaye singre ni Musa e wachno e ndalo mane jo-Israel pod wuotho e thim. To Ruoth Nyasaye oserito ngimana kaka nosingore mi koro an jahigni piero aboro gabich. 
Joshua14:11 To pod atek mana kaka ne atek e kinde mane Musa oora, kendo pod anyalo kedo, kata timo gimoro amora monego atim." 
Joshua14:12 Omiyo koro miya piny gode mane Ruoth Nyasaye osingorena e kinde cha. Chieng’ cha donge niwinjo ni jo-Anak odak kuno, kendo ni gin gi mier madongo kendo mochiel matek mar siro wasigu? To dipo ka Ruoth Nyasaye okonya, mi ariembogi kaka nosesingorena.”" 
Joshua14:13 Joshua noguedho Kaleb, momiye dala mar Hebron," 
Joshua14:14 kendo pod en mar Kaleb wuod Jefune maja-Keniz, nikech noluwo dwaro mar Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel gi chuny modimbore." 
Joshua14:15 Koro piny nobedo mokue. E ndalo machon niluongo Hebron ni Kiriath-arba, tiende ni, dala Arba. Arbano ne jaduong’ jo-Anak." 
Joshua15:1 Piny ma nopog ni dhout Juda gi ombulu nogik yo milambo e mbap jo-Edom man e thim Zin. 
Joshua15:2 Mbapgi ma yo milambono nochakore yo milambo mar Nam Kado," 
Joshua15:3 koluwo yor Akrabim, mokadho Zin, kochomo yo milambo mar Kadesh-barnea. Eka nokadho Hezron nyaka Adar, mogomo kochomo Karka" 
Joshua15:4 nyaka Azmon, kendo noluwo aora manie tong’ piny Misri nyaka Nam Mediterenia. Mano e mbapgi ma yo milambo." 
Joshua15:5 Nam Kado nyaka dho aora Jordan ema nobedo mbapgi ma yo wuok chieng’. To mbapgi ma yo nyandwat nochakore e dho aorano," 
Joshua15:6 modhi nyaka Beth-hogla, kokadho yo nyandwat mar Beth-araba, mochopo nyaka Lwanda Bohan wuod Reuben." 
Joshua15:7 Eka noluwo holo mar Akor nyaka Debir, kochomo yo nyandwat nyaka Gilgal, machiegni gi yo maidho Adumin man yo milambo mar aora. Eka nokadho kuonde thidhiya man En-shemesh, mochopo En-rogel." 
Joshua15:8 Noluwo holo mar Ben-hinom, yo milambo mar; piny gode mane jo-Jebus odakie, ma tinde ogerie Jerusalem. Noidho got momanyore gi holo Hinom yo podho chieng’, ma en giko holo mar Refaim." 
Joshua15:9 Noluwo wi godno molor nyaka soko mar Neftoa, kendo nyaka mier man e got Efron. Kosekadho miego, nogomo kochomo Baala, miluongo bende ni Kiriath-jearim." 
Joshua15:10 Koa Baala, nochiko got Seir, mokadho yo nyandwat mar got Jearim, miluongo bende ni Kesalon, nyaka Beth-shemesh, mochopo Timna." 
Joshua15:11 Eka nochomo yo nyandwat nyaka Efron, mogomo kochiko Shikeron. Bang’ mano nokadho got Baala, kendo nodhi Jabneel, mogik e Nam Mediterenia." 
Joshua15:12 Nam Mediterenia ema notimo tong’ pinygi ma yo podho chieng’. Mano e tong’ ma nolworo dhout Juda duto. 
Joshua15:13 Nopog ni Kaleb wuod Jefune dir piny jo-Juda, kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nosechiko Joshua. Pok ma noyudono ne en Hebron, dala mar Arba, kwar jo-Anak." 
Joshua15:14 Kaleb nodaro jo-Anak adek ma nodak kuno, ma nyinggi Sheshai gi Ahiman kod Talmai. Ne gin nyikwa Anak." 
Joshua15:15 Bang mano, nodhi momonjo joma nodak Debi, ma chon niluongo ni Kiriath-sefer." 
Joshua15:16 Eka nowacho niya, “Ng’at ma nokaw Kiriath-sefer ema nami Aksa nyara mondo okendi.”" 
Joshua15:17 Othniel wuod Kenaz owadgi Kaleb ema nokawo dalano, omiyo Kaleb nomiye Aksa nyare mokendo." 
Joshua15:18 Kane Aksa odhi ir chwore, nojiwe mondo okwa wuon mare lowo, mi Aksa nodhi ir Kaleb, kendo kane oselor e kanje, Kaleb nopenje gima odwaro." 
Joshua15:19 Nodwoke niya, “Kaka iseketa e piny milambo motwoni, yie imiya sokni.” Kuom mano Kaleb nomiye sokni mamalo gi mamwalo." 
Joshua15:20 Koro magi e mier duto mopog ni dhout Juda, kaachiel gi mier matindo ma nokiewo kodgi:" 
Joshua15:21 Mier man yo milambo e tong’gi gi jo Edon ne gin Kabzeel gi Eder gi Jagur 
Joshua15:22 gi Kina gi Dimona gi Arara 
Joshua15:23 gi Kedesh gi Hazor gi Ithnan 
Joshua15:24 gi Zif gi Telem gi Bealoth 
Joshua15:25 gi Hazor-hadata gi Kerioth-hezron," 
Joshua15:26 gi Amam gi Shema gi Molada 
Joshua15:27 gi Hazar-gada gi Heshmon gi Beth-pelet 
Joshua15:28 gi Hazar-shual gi Beer-sheba kod mier matindo mokiewo kode," 
Joshua15:29 gi Baal gi Iyim gi Ezem 
Joshua15:30 gi Eltolad gi Kesil gi Horma 
Joshua15:31 gi Ziklag gi Madmana gi Sansana 
Joshua15:32 gi Lebaoth gi Shilhim gi Ain kod Rimon. Giduto ne gin mier piero ariyo gochiko. 
Joshua15:33 To mier mane giyudo e pewe ne gin Eshtaol gi Zora gi Ashna 
Joshua15:34 gi Zanoa gi En-gamin gi Tapua gi Enam 
Joshua15:35 gi Jarmuth gi Adulam gi Soko gi Azeka. 
Joshua15:36 Gi Shaaraim gi Adithaim gi Gedera kod Gederothaim. Giduto ne gin mier apar gang’wen. 
Joshua15:37 Bende jo-Juda noyudo Zenan gi Hadasha gi Migdal-gad 
Joshua15:38 gi Dilan gi Mizpe gi Joktheel 
Joshua15:39 gi Lakish gi Bozkath gi Eglon 
Joshua15:40 gi Kabon gi Lamas gi Kithlish 
Joshua15:41 gi Gederoth gi Beth-dagon gi Naama kod Makeda. Giduto ne gin mier apar gauchiel. 
Joshua15:42 Kendo ne giyudo Libna gi Ether gi Ashan 
Joshua15:43 gi Ifta gi Ashna gi Nezib 
Joshua15:44 gi Keila gi Akzib kod Maresha. Giduto ne gin mier ochiko. 
Joshua15:45 Ekron bende ne margi 
Joshua15:46 kod mier duto mokiewo gi Ashdod, chakre Ekron nyaka Nam Mediterenia." 
Joshua15:47 Ashdod gi Gaza, kod mieche mochopo nyaka aora manie tong’gi gi Misri, kendo nyaka Nam Mediterenia ne maggi bende." 
Joshua15:48 To mier mane giyudo e piny gode ne gin Shamir, gi Jatir gi Soko" 
Joshua15:49 gi Dana gi Kiriath-sana, miluongo bende ni Debir," 
Joshua15:50 Anab gi Eshtemoa gi Anim 
Joshua15:51 gi Goshen gi Holon kod Gilo. Giduto ne gin mier apar gachiel. 
Joshua15:52 Kendo ne giyudo Arab gi Duma gi Eshan 
Joshua15:53 gi Janim gi Beth-tapua gi Afek 
Joshua15:54 gi Humta gi Kiriath-arba, miluongo bende ni Hebron, kod Zior. Giduto ne gin mier ochiko." 
Joshua15:55 Nomigi bende Maon gi Karmel gi Zif gi Juta 
Joshua15:56 gi Jezreel gi Jokdeam gi Zanoa 
Joshua15:57 gi Kain gi Gibea kod Timna. Giduto ne gin mier apar. 
Joshua15:58 To bende ne giyudo Halhul gi Beth-zur gi Gedor 
Joshua15:59 gi Maarath gi Beth-anoth kod Eltekon. Giduto ne gin mier auchiel. Ne giyudo bende Tekoa gi Efratha, ma tinde iluongo ni Bethlehem, gi Peor gi Etam gi Kulom gi Tatam gi Sores gi Karem gi Galim gi Baither kod Manak. Giduto ne gin mier apar gachiel." 
Joshua15:60 Kiriath-baal, miluongo ni Kiriath-jearim, kod Raba ne maggi bende." 
Joshua15:61 To mier mane giyudo e thim ne gin Beth-araba gi Midin gi Sekaka 
Joshua15:62 gi Nibshan gi Ir-melek kod Engedi. Giduto ne gin mier auchiel. 
Joshua15:63 Jo-Juda ne ok nyal riembo jo-Jebus ma nodak Jerusalem, omiyo pod gidak kodgi kuno, nyaka chil kawuono." 
Joshua16:1 Piny mane opog ni joka Josef gi ombulu nochakore e aora Jordan, kama omanyore gi Jeriko, yo wuok chieng’ mar sokni mag Jeriko man but thim. Tong’gi noa Jeriko, moidho Bethel." 
Joshua16:2 Koa Bethel, noidho Luz mochopo Ataroth manie tong’ piny jo-Arki." 
Joshua16:3 Eka nochomo yo podho chieng, kolor nyaka tong’ piny jo-Jaflet, mochopo but Beth-horon Mamwalo kod Gezer, mogik e Nam Mediterenia." 
Joshua16:4 Pinyno ema nopog ni jo-Manase kod jo-Efraim ma yawuot Josef. 
Joshua16:5 To piny dhout jo-Efraim e ma: Mbapgi ma yo wuok chieng’ nochakore Ataroth-adar, modhi nyaka Beth-horon Mamalo." 
Joshua16:6 Eka nochiko yo-podho chieng’, koweyo Mikmethath yo nyandwat, kendo nokadho yo wuok chieng’ mar Taanath-shilo kod Janoa." 
Joshua16:7 Kosekadho Janoa nolor nyaka Ataroth kod aora Jordan. 
Joshua16:8 Tong’gi ma yo nyandwat noa Tapua, kochiko yo podho chieng’ moluwo aora Kana, nyaka nogik Naaroth, mokadho machiegni gi Jeriko, mogik e nam Mediterenia. Pinyno ema nopog ni dhout jo-Efraim," 
Joshua16:9 kaachiel gi mier moko mane omigi ei piny jo-Manase kod mier matindo mokiewo kodgi. 
Joshua16:10 To jo-Efraim ne ok oriembo jo-Kanaan ma nodak Gezer, mi jo-Kanaan-go pod odak e diergi nyaka chil kawuono, to nochun-gi mondo gibed wasumbni nyaka chieng." 
Joshua17:1 Nopog ni jo-Manase dir piny nikech Manase ne e wuod Josef maduong’. Makir wuon Gilead nomi piny Bashan gi piny Gilead nikech ne en wuod Manase maduong’. 
Joshua17:2 Dhout jo-Manase modong’ ma gin joka Abiezer gi joka Helek gi joka Asriel gi joka Shekem gi joka Hefer kod joka Shemida, bende nopognigi piny. Mago ne gin dhout nyikwa Manase wuod Josef." 
Joshua17:3 Zelofehad wuod Hefer, ma wuod Gilead, ma wuod Makir, ma wuod Manase, nonywolo mana nyiri lilo, ma nyinggi Mala gi Noa gi Hogla gi Milka kod Tirza." 
Joshua17:4 Ne gibiro ir Eleazar jadolo gi Joshua wuod Nun kod jotend Israel mi giwachonigi niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye nochiko Musa mondo opognwa piny mana kaka opog ni jowetewa.” Kuom mano Joshua nopogonigi piny kaka nopog ni owete wuon-gi, kaluwore gi chik Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Joshua17:5 Jo Manase noyudo pok apar, ka ok okwan piny Gilead gi piny Bashan man yo wuok chieng’ mar aora Jordan," 
Joshua17:6 nikech nopog piny ni nyikwa Manase manyiri kaachiel gi nyikwaye ma yawuowi. Piny Gilead nobedo pok mar nyikwa Manase modong’. 
Joshua17:7 Tong’ piny jo-Manase nochakore e piny Asher mochopo nyaka Mikmethath man yo wuok chieng’ mar Shekem. Eka tong’gi nochomo yo milambo nyaka Jashub, kokadho but En-tapua." 
Joshua17:8 Piny Tapua nobedo mar jo-Manase, to dala Tapua hie, mane nie mbapgi, nobedo mar jo-Efraim." 
Joshua17:9 Koa kuno, tong’gi noluwo aora Kana, to mier man yo milambo mar aorano ne mag Efraim, kata obedo ni gin e dier miech jo-Manase kamano. Tong’ Manase noluwo geng aora Kana gi yo nyandwat, mogik e Nam Mediterenia." 
Joshua17:10 Piny Efraim ne ni yo milambo mar aorano, to piny Manase ne ni yo nyandwat, ka Nam Mediterenia obedo tong’gi giduto. Jo-Manase nokiewo kod jo-Asher gi yo nyandwat, kendo kod jo-Isakar gi yo milambo." 
Joshua17:11 Bethshean kaachiel gi mier mokiewo kode gi joma nodak Ibleam gi Dor manie dhonam, gi En-dor gi Taanak kod Megido, kaachiel gi mier matindo ma nokiewo kodgi ne nie bwo jo-Manase, kata obedo ni ne gin e pinje mag jo-Isakar gi jo-Asher kamano." 
Joshua17:12 Jo-Kanaan pod weg pinyno nyaka chil kawuono, nikech jo-Manase ne ok nyal riembogi." 
Joshua17:13 To kane jo-Israel osebedo motegno, ne gichuno jo-Kanaan mondo obed wasumbgi." 
Joshua17:14 Joka Josef nopenjo Joshua niya, “Ere gima omiyo isemiyowa mana pok achiel kende e pinyni? Wasenya ahinya, nikech Ruoth Nyasaye oseguedhowa.”" 
Joshua17:15 Joshua nodwokogi niya, “Kusenya kamano, kendo uhingo piny gode mag Efraim, to koro dhiuru e bungu manie piny jo-Perizi gi jo-Refaim, mondo ubete obed lopu.”"
