Joshua17:16 To joka Josef nowachone niya, “Adier piny godeno ok oromowa, to bende jo-Kanaan modak Beth-sheam gi mier mokiewo kode kaachiel gi mago modak e paw Jezreel, nigi geche lweny mag nyinyo!”" 
Joshua17:17 Joshua nowacho ni jo-Efraim gi jo-Manase ma nyikwa Josef niya, “Un ji mang’eny, kendo man gi nyalo. Ok unubed gi pok achiel kende," 
Joshua17:18 to piny gode bende nobed maru. “Kata otimo bungu kamano, to kaweuru, kendo ubete nyaka uchop e tong’. Adier, jo-Kanaan nigi geche lweny mag nyinyo, to pod unuriembgi ariemba.”" 
Joshua18:1 Ka ne jo-Israel osekawo pinyno, ne gichokore Shilo giduto, mi giguro Hemb Romo kuro." 
Joshua18:2 To dhout Israel abiriyo ne pok okawo lowo," 
Joshua18:3 omiyo Joshua nowacho ni jo-Israel niya, “Ang’o murito momiyo pok ukawo piny ma Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach kwereu osemiyou?" 
Joshua18:4 Dhoot ka dhoot mondo omiya ji adek ma anyalo oro mondo odhi onon kaka dipog pinyno duto e migepe abiriyo, ka gindiko kaka migawo ka migawo chalo. Ka gisetieko, eka giduog ira" 
Joshua18:5 mondo opog pinyno ni dhoudi abiriyogo. To jo-Juda to nobed abeda e pinygi man yo milambo, kendo joka Josef bende nobed e pinygi man yo nyandwat." 
Joshua18:6 Kusepogo piny nyadibiriyo kamano, kendo usendiko kaka ochalo, eka ukelna ndiko manyiso migepego, kendo nopognugi gi ombulu e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Joshua18:7 To jo-Lawi ok noyud lowo kaka uyudo, nimar pokgi en bedo jodolo mag Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo jo-Gad gi jo-Reuben gi jo-Manase konchiel bende ok nopognigi nikech giseyudo lopgi loka Jordan mane Musa jatich Ruoth Nyasaye omiyogi.”" 
Joshua18:8 Joma noyiergo nodhi, mowuotho e pinyno duto ka ginono kaka ochalo, nikech Joshua nosechikogi niya, “Dhiuru uwuoth e pinyno duto, kendo undik kaka ochalo; eka uduog ira Shilo ka. Bang’e napognu piny gi ombulu e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye.”" 
Joshua18:9 Kuom mano jogo nodhi monono pinyno duto, kendo ne gindiko e kitabu kaka ochalo. Ne gipogo piny nyadibiriyo, ka gichano nying mier duto mane ni kuno. Bang’e ne giduogo ir Joshua e kambi Shilo," 
Joshua18:10 kendo Joshua nogoyonigi ombulu e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, mopogo ni dhoot ka dhoot lope." 
Joshua18:11 Ombulu mokwongo nolwar kuom dhout Benjamin, mi giyudo lowo e kind jo-Juda gi joka Josef." 
Joshua18:12 To malo yo nyandwat tong’gi nochakore e aora Jordan modhi nyaka gode man yo nyandwat mar Jeriko. Noluwo piny godego, kochomo yo podho chieng’ nyaka e thim machiegni gi Beth-aven." 
Joshua18:13 Eka nochomo Luz yo milambo nyaka god Luz ma tinde iluongo ni Bethel. Bang’e nodhi nyaka Ataroth-adar e got man yo milambo mar Beth-horon mamwalo. 
Joshua18:14 Nogomo koa yo podho chieng’ mar godno, mochomo yo milambo mar got man but Beth-horon, mogik Kiriath-baal, dala jo-Juda, miluongo bende ni Kiriath-jearim. Mano e tong’gi ma yo podho chieng’." 
Joshua18:15 Tong’gi ma yo milambo nochakore Kiriath-jearim, kochomo yo podho chieng’ nyaka soko mar Neftoa." 
Joshua18:16 Eka nodhi nyaka bath got mochomore gi holo Ben-hinom man yo nyandwat mar holo Refaim. Noluwo holo Hinon tir kochomo yo milambo mar god jo-Jebus nyaka En-rogel. 
Joshua18:17 Bang’e nogomo kochomo yo nyandwat nyaka Enshemesh, kendo nyaka Geliloth momanyore gi yo maidho Adumin. Eka nolor nyaka Lwanda Bohan wuod Reuben," 
Joshua18:18 mokadho yo nyandwat mar Beth-araba kendo noridore nyaka holo mar aora Jordan. 
Joshua18:19 Bang’e nodhi yo nyandwat mar got Beth-hogla, mogik yo nyandwat mar Nam Kado e dho aora Jordan gi yo milambo. Mano ne tong’gi ma yo milambo." 
Joshua18:20 To tong’gi ma yo wuok chieng’ ne en aora Jordan. Mano ne tong’ piny ma nopog ni dhout Benjamin. 
Joshua18:21 Miech jo-Benjamin, kaluwore gi dhoutgi, ne gin Jeriko, gi Beth-hogla, gi Emek-keziz," 
Joshua18:22 gi Beth-araba, gi Zemaraim, gi Bethel," 
Joshua18:23 gi Avim, gi Para, gi Ofra" 
Joshua18:24 gi Kefar-amoni, gi Ofni, kod Geba. Giduto ne gin mier apar gariyo, ka ok okwan mier matindo mane okiewo kodgi," 
Joshua18:25 to bende ne gin gi Gibeon, gi Rama, gi Beeroth," 
Joshua18:26 gi Mizpe, gi Kefira, gi Moza," 
Joshua18:27 gi Rekem, gi Irpeel, gi Parala" 
Joshua18:28 gi Zela, gi Ha-elef gi Jebuz (ma tinde iluongo ni Jerusalem,) gi Gibea, kod Kiriath-jearim. Giduto ne gin mier apar gang’wen ka ok okwan mier matindo mane okiewo kodgi. Mago e mier mane opog ni dhout Benjamin." 
Joshua19:1 Ombulu mar ariyo nolwar kuom dhout Simeon. Pinygi ne nie dier piny jo-Juda. 
Joshua19:2 Noting’o Beer-sheba gi Molada 
Joshua19:3 gi Hazar-shual gi Bala gi Ezem 
Joshua19:4 gi Eltolad gi Bethul gi Horma 
Joshua19:5 gi Ziklag gi Beth-mar-kaboth gi Hazar-susa 
Joshua19:6 gi Beth-lebaoth kod Sharuhen. Giduto ne gin mier apar gadek, ka ok okwan mier matindo ma nokiewo kodgi." 
Joshua19:7 Bende ne giyudo Ain gi mier Rimon gi Ether kod Ashan, duto mier ang’wen, ka ok okwan mier matindo ma okiewo kodgi," 
Joshua19:8 nyaka Baalath-beer miluongo bende ni Ramath-negeb. Pinyno ema nopog ni dhout Simeon," 
Joshua19:9 to pinyno ne en dir piny jo-Juda, nikech jo-Juda nomi piny malach mohingogi." 
Joshua19:10 Ombulu mar adek nolwar kuom dhout Zebulun. Piny mane opognigi nochopo nyaka Shadub. 
Joshua19:11 Koa kuno tong’gi mochiko yo podho chieng’ nodhi nyaka Marala, moluwo bath Debesheth kod Apra man yo wuok chieng’ mar Jokneam." 
Joshua19:12 To tong’gi moa Shedub kochomo yo wuok chieng’, nochiko tong’ Kisloth-tabor modhi Daberath kod Jafia." 
Joshua19:13 Nomedo dhi yo wuok chieng’, mochopo Gath-hefer kod Ita-kazin nyaka Rimon, mogomo kochiko Nea." 
Joshua19:14 Tong’ ma yo nyandwat nolworo nyaka Hanathon mogik e holo Jeftael. 
Joshua19:15 Pinyno noting’ Katath gi Nahalal gi Shimron gi Idala kod Bethlehem. Giduto ne gin mier apar gariyo ka ok okwan mier matindo ma nokiewo kodgi. 
Joshua19:16 Miegi kaachiel gi mier matindo ma nokiewo kodgi ema nopog ni dhout Zebulun. 
Joshua19:17 Ombulu mar ang’wen nolwar kuom dhout Isakar. 
Joshua19:18 Jezreel gi Kesiloth gi Shunem 
Joshua19:19 gi Hafaraim gi Shion gi Anaharath 
Joshua19:20 gi Rabith gi Kishion gi Ebez," 
Joshua19:21 gi Remeth gi En-ganim gi En-haga kod Beth-pazez ne nie pinygi. 
Joshua19:22 Tong’gi nokadho but Tabor gi Shahazuma kod Beth-shemesh mogik e aora Jordan. Giduto ne gin mier apar gauchiel, ka ok okwan mier matindo ma nokiewo kodgi." 
Joshua19:23 Miego duto, kaachiel gi mier matindo ma nokiewo kodhi ema nopog ni dhout Isakar." 
Joshua19:24 Ombulu mar abich nolwar kuom dhout Asher. 
Joshua19:25 Pinygi noting’o Helkath gi Hali gi Beten gi Akshaf 
Joshua19:26 gi Alamelek gi Amad kod Mishal. Yo podho chieng’ tong’gi noluwo Karmel gi Shihor-libnath. 
Joshua19:27 Eka nochiko yo wuok chieng’ modhi Beth-lagon, koluwo bath piny Zebulun kod holo Jiftael, kochomo yo nyandwat nyaka Beth-emek gi Neyel. Yo nyandwat, pinyno noting’o Kabul" 
Joshua19:28 gi Abdon gi Rehob gi Hamon kod Kana, mochopo Sidon Maduong’." 
Joshua19:29 Eka tong’ nogomo mochomo Rama, nyaka Turo dala mochiel, kuma nogomoe kochiko Hosa, mogik e Nam Mediterenia. Yo podho chieng’ noting’o Mehalab gi Akzib" 
Joshua19:30 gi Ako gi Afek kod Rehob. Giduto ne gin mier piero ariyo gariyo ka ok okwan mier matindo mane okiewo kodgi. 
Joshua19:31 Miego duto kaachiel gi mier matindo ma nokiewo kodgi ema nopog ni dhout Asher. 
Joshua19:32 Ombulu mar auchiel nolwar kuom dhout Naftali. 
Joshua19:33 Pinygi nochakore Helef kendo e yath maduong’ man Zanaanim moluwo Adami-negeb gi Gabneel nyaka Lakum, mogik e aora Jordan." 
Joshua19:34 Tong’gi ma yo podho chieng’ noluwo Azmoth-tabor nyaka Hukoth. Piny jo-Zebulun ne ni yo milambo, kendo piny jo-Asher ne ni yo podho chieng’, to aora Jordan nobedo tong’ ma yo wuok chieng’." 
Joshua19:35 Miechgi mane ochiel gi ohinga ne gin Zidim gi Zer gi Hamath gi Rakath gi Kinereth 
Joshua19:36 gi Adama gi Rama gi Hazor 
Joshua19:37 gi Kedesh gi Edrei gi En-hazor 
Joshua19:38 gi Yiron gi Migdalel gi Horem gi Beth-anath kod Beth-shemesh. Giduto ne gin mier apar gochiko, ka ok okwan mier matindo mane okiewo kodgi." 
Joshua19:39 Miego duto kaachiel gi mier matindo mane okiewo kodgi ema ne opog ni dhout Naftali. 
Joshua19:40 Ombulu mar abiriyo nolwar kuom dhout Dan. 
Joshua19:41 Pinygi noting’o Zora gi Eshtaol gi Ir-shemesh 
Joshua19:42 gi Shaalabin gi Aijalon gi Ithla 
Joshua19:43 gi Elon gi Timna gi Ekron 
Joshua19:44 gi Elteke gi Gibethon gi Baalath 
Joshua19:45 gi Jehud gi Bene-berak gi Gath-rimon 
Joshua19:46 gi Mejarkon kod Rakon, kaachiel gi piny momanyore gi Jopa." 
Joshua19:47 Kane oriemb jo-Dan e pinygi, ne gidhi nyaka Leshem, mi gimonjo dalano. Ne gikawe, kendo ne ginego ji duto ma nodakie. Ne gidak kuno, mi giloko nyinge ni Dan, nying kwargi." 
Joshua19:48 Miego duto, kaachiel gi mier matindo ma nokiewo kodgi ema nopog ni dhout Dan." 
Joshua19:49 Kane jo-Israel osetieko pogo piny, kendo guro mbapgi, ne gimiyo Joshua lowo e pinygi," 
Joshua19:50 kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nosechiko. Ne gimiye Timna-sera e piny gode mag Efraim, nikech mano ema nokwayo. Nochako ogero dalano, modakie." 
Joshua19:51 Mano e kaka Eleazar jadolo, gi Joshua wuod Nun, kod jodong dhout Israel, nopogo lowo gi ombulu e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye e dho Hemb Romo, ka ne gin Shilo. Kamano ne gitieko pogo piny." 
Joshua20:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nochiko Joshua 
Joshua20:2 ni mondo owach ni jo-Israel kama: “Koro yieruru miechu mag tony mane awacho ni Musa mondo onyisu. 
Joshua20:3 Ng’at moneko kobothne nyalo dhi kuondego mondo opond ni ng’at madwaro chulone kuor. 
Joshua20:4 Ka ng’ato dwaro tony kamano, moringo nyaka e achiel kuom miego, to nochung’ e dhorangach, kendo nonyis jodong dalano gima osetimorene. Eka giniyiene odonji, kendo ginimiye kar dak." 
Joshua20:5 Ka ng’ato madwaro chulo kuorno oluwe nyaka kuno, to jodalano kik chiwe, to girite, nikech nonego nyawadgi mana kuom both, to ok nikech ne gimonre." 
Joshua20:6 Janekno nodag e dalano nyaka chop yale e nyim oganda, kendo ka jadolo maduong’ e kindeno osetho, eka onyalo dok dalagi, kuma noseringo oaye.”" 
Joshua20:7 Kuom mano ne giyiero Kadesh-galili manie piny gode mag Naftali, gi Shekem manie piny gode man Efraim kod Kiriath-arba, miluongo bende ni Hebron, manie piny gode mag Juda." 
Joshua20:8 To yo wuok chieng’ mar aora Jordan, e piny mamalo momanyore gi Jeriko, ne giyiero Bezer-me-thim kuom piny jo-Reuben, gi Ramoth-gilead kuom piny jo-Gad, kod Galon-bashan kuom piny jo-Manase." 
Joshua20:9 Mago ne gin mier mane ng’at moneko nyalo tonyie. Ne oketgi ni jo-Israel duto, kendo ni jodak mane ni kodgi. Ng’ato ang’ata mane oneko kobothne, ne nyalo ringo kuno, mondo ng’at ma dwaro chulone kuor kik nege, kapok oyale e nyim oganda." 
Joshua21:1 Jodong dhout jo-Lawi nodhi Shilo e piny Kanaan, mowacho ni Eleazar jadolo gi Joshua wuod Nun, kod jodong dhout Israel niya," 
Joshua21:2 “Ruoth Nyasaye nochiko Musa ni mondo wayud mier mag dak kaachiel gi lege jamni mokiewo kodgi.” 
Joshua21:3 Kuom mano jo-Israel nomiyo jo-Lawi miechgi gi lege mokiewo kodgi mana e pinygi giwegi, kaluwore gi chik Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Joshua21:4 Joka Kohath ema nokwong pognigi mier gi ombulu. Jo-Lawi ma nyikwa Harun jadolo noyudo mier apar gadek e piny jo-Juda gi piny jo-Simeon kod piny jo-Benjamin. 
Joshua21:5 To joka Kohath modong’ nomi mier apar e piny jo-Efraim gi jo-Dan, kendo e piny jo-Manase konchiel." 
Joshua21:6 Joka Gershom nomi mier apar gadek e piny jo-Isakar gi piny jo-Asher kod piny jo-Naftali kendo e piny jo-Manase komachielo ma nodak Bashan. 
Joshua21:7 Joka Merari to nomi mier apar gariyo e piny jo-Reuben gi piny jo-Gad kod piny jo-Zebulun. 
Joshua21:8 Kamano jo-Israel nopogo ni jo-Lawi miego gi ombulu, kaluwore gi chik mane Ruoth Nyasaye omiyo Musa." 
Joshua21:9 Ombulu mokwongo nolwar kuom jo-Lawi ma nyikwa Harun mane gin dhoot achiel kuom joka Kohath. Mier mane opognigi kuom piny jo-Juda gi mar jo-Simeon ne gin 
Joshua21:10  
Joshua21:11 Kiriath-arba, miluongo bende ni Hebron, e piny gode mag Juda, kaachiel gi lege ma nokiewo kode. (Arbano ne kwar jo-Anak.)" 
Joshua21:12 To mier matindo ma nokiewo gi dalano, kaachiel gi gweng’ momanyore kode, nosemi Kaleb wuod Jefune." 
Joshua21:13 Mier mane opog ni nyikwa Harun jadolo e magi: Hebron, (ma achiel kuom mier ma ng’at moneko nyalo tonyie,) gi Libna" 
Joshua21:14 gi Jatir gi Eshtemoa 
Joshua21:15 gi Holon gi Debir 
Joshua21:16 gi Ashan gi Juta kod Beth-shemesh. Ne gin mier ochiko ma nopog ni dhoudi ariyogo. 
Joshua21:17 To e piny jo-Benjamin nomigi mier ang’wen mane gin Gibeon gi Geba 
Joshua21:18 gi Anathoth kod Almon. 
Joshua21:19 Kamano jodolo ma nyikwa Harun noyudo mier apar gadek, kaachiel gi legegi." 
Joshua21:20 Kane ogo ombulu, jo-Lawi ma jodhout Kohath modong’ nopognigi mier ang’wen kaachiel gi legegi e piny Efraim." 
Joshua21:21 Ne gin Shekem, (ma dala ma ng’ato moneko nyalo tonyie,) e piny gode mag Efraim, gi Gezer" 
Joshua21:22 Kibzaim kod Beth-horon. 
Joshua21:23 Nopognigi bende mier ang’wen e piny jo-Dan. Ne gin Elteke gi Gibethon 
Joshua21:24 gi Aijalon kod Gath-rimon. 
Joshua21:25 To e piny jo-Manase konchiel nomigie Taanak kod Ibleam. 
Joshua21:26 Kamano dhout Kohath modong’go noyudo mier apar, kaachiel gi legegi." 
Joshua21:27 Nyikwa Gershom, ma achiel kuom dhout jo-Lawi, bende nomi mier kaachiel gi legegi. E piny jo-Manase komachielo ne giyudoe mier ariyo, mane gin Galon-gashan, (dala ma ng’at moneko nyalo tonyie,) kod Be-astaroth." 
Joshua21:28 To e piny jo-Isakar ne giyudoe mier ang’wen mane gin Kishion gi Daberath 
Joshua21:29 gi Jarmuth kod En-ganim. 
Joshua21:30 E piny jo-Asher bende nomigie mier ang’wen, mane gin Mishal gi Abdon" 
Joshua21:31 gi Helkath kod Rehob. 
Joshua21:32 E piny jo-Naftali to ne giyudoe Kedesh-galili, (dala ma ng’at moneko nyalo tonyie,) gi Hamothdor gi Kartan, duto mier adek." 
Joshua21:33 Kamano dhout jo-Gershom koriwore noyudo mier apar gadek kaachiel gi legegi. 
Joshua21:34 Koro magi e mier kaachiel gi legegi mane opogni jo-Lawi ma jodhout Merari modong’. E piny jo-Zebulun ne giyudoe mier ang’wen mane gin Jokneam gi Karta 
Joshua21:35 gi Dimna kod Nahalal. 
Joshua21:36 To yo wuok chieng’ mar aora Jordan, e piny jo-Reuben momanyore gi Jeriko ne giyudoe mier ang’wen mane gin Bezer-me-thim, (dala ma ng’at moneko nyalo tonyie,) gi Jahaz" 
Joshua21:37 gi Kedemoth kod Meraath. 
Joshua21:38 To e piny jo-Gad ne giyudoe mier ang’wen, mane gin Ramoth-gilead, (ma bende dala ma ng’at moneko nyalo tonyie,) gi Mahanaim" 
Joshua21:39 gi Heshbon kod Jazer. 
Joshua21:40 Kamano jo-Lawi ma jodhout Merari modong’go noyudo mier apar gang’wen, kaachiel gi legegi." 
Joshua21:41 Kuom mano, mier duto mane jo-Lawi oyudo e piny Israel, noromo piero ang’wen gaboro." 
Joshua21:42 Dala ka dala ne nigi lege mokiewo kode. 
Joshua21:43 Kamano Ruoth Nyasaye nomiyo jo-Israel piny duto mane osesingore ni kweregi ni nomigi. Ne gikawe, mi gidak kuno." 
Joshua21:44 Ruoth Nyasaye nomiyogi kue e tong’gi duto kaka nosesingore ni kweregi. Onge wasikgi kata achiel mane nyalo sirogi, nikech Ruoth Nyaaye ema nomiyo giloyogi duto." 
Joshua21:45 Ruoth Nyasaye nochopo singruokne duto ma nosetimo ni jo-Israel. 
Joshua22:1 Bang’ wechego duto, Joshua noluongo jo-Benjamin gi jo-Gad kod jo-Manase konchiel kande," 
Joshua22:2 mowachonigi niya, “Usechopo chike duto mag Musa jatich Ruoth Nyasaye, kaachiel gi maga bende." 
Joshua22:3 E kindegi duto ok useringo uweyo jo-Israel weteu, to userito chik Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu gi chunyu duto nyaka chil kawuono." 
Joshua22:4 To koro Ruoth Nyasaye osemiyo oweteu pinyni kaka nosingorenigi, omiyo unyalo dok e miechu manie piny mane Musa jatich Ruoth Nyasaye omiyou yo wuok chieng’ mar aora Jordan." 
Joshua22:5 Neuru ni urito chik duto mane Musa jatich Ruoth Nyasaye omiyiou. Heruru Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu, kuluwo yorene, kendo kurito chikene. Padreuru kuome, kutiyone gi chunyu duto.”" 
Joshua22:6 Eka Joshua noguedhogi, kendo nowachonigi niya," 
Joshua22:7 “Ero, udok e miechu gi mwandu mang’eny. Un gi dhok mathoth, gi fedha kod dhahabu, gi mula kod nyinyo, kendo gi lewni mogundho. Neuru ni upogo ni joweteu gigo duto musepeyo kuom wasiku.” Bang’ wachonigi kamano, noweyogi gia, mi gidok miechgi. (Musa nosemiyo jo-Manase konchielgi lowo e Bashan, to jo-Manase modong’ ema Joshua nomiyo lowo yo podho chieng’ mar Jordan kaachiel gi jowetegi.)" 
Joshua22:8  
Joshua22:9 Kuom mano, jo-Reuben gi jo-Gad kod jo-Manase konchiel noweyo jo-Israel Shilo e piny Kanaan. Ne gidok Gilead e pinygi, mane Ruoth Nyasaye osechiko Musa ni mondo gikaw." 
Joshua22:10 To kane gichopo Geliloth man but aora Jordan, ne gigero kendo mang’ongo mar misango e bath aora kanyo, mane ji nyalo neno gi kuma bor." 
Joshua22:11 Kane jo-Israel mamoko owinjo ni jo-Reuben gi jo-Gad kod jo-Manase konchiel osegero kendo-mar-misango Geliloth e bath aora Jordan, kama omanyore gi piny Kanaan," 
Joshua22:12 ne gichokore Shilo mondo gidhi giked kodgi. 
Joshua22:13 Bende ne gioro Finehas wuod Eleazar jadolo e piny Gilead ir jo-Reuben gi jo-Gad kod jo-Manase konchiel," 
Joshua22:14 mi nodhi gi jotelo apar mag dhout Israel ka moro ka moro ochung’ ni dhoot ka dhoot. 
Joshua22:15 Ne gibiro ir jogo, mi giwachonigi niya," 
Joshua22:16 “Wabiro e nying jo-Ruoth Nyasaye duto mondo wapenju gima omiyo usetimo gima rachni e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel? Useketho ni Ruoth Nyasaye, nikech ugero kendo-mar-misango maru uwegi, kendo useweyo luwe." 
Joshua22:17 Paruru richo mane watimo Peor, kod kum mane Ryoth Nyasaye omiyowa, ma pok orumo nyaka chil kawuono." 
Joshua22:18 Uparo ni kumno ne yot, ma kendo pod uweyoe mana luwo Ruoth Nyasaye? Ka uketho ni Ruoth Nyasaye kawuono, to kiny nokech gi jo-Israel duto." 
Joshua22:19 Kuom mano, kuneno ni ok unyal lemo maber e pinyu, to biuru lokawa e piny Ruoth Nyasaye kuma ogurie Hema Maler, mondo udag kodwa. To kik uwe Ruoth Nyasaye, mi urwakwa e masira, kugero kendo-mar-misango machielo ni ma ok mana mar Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachwa ma noseger cha." 
Joshua22:20 Paruru kaka Akan wuod Zera notamore rito chik kuom gik mokwer, momiyo jo-Israel duto noyudo kum, ma ok Akan kende ema ne otho nikech richono!”" 
Joshua22:21 Jo-Reuben gi jo-Gad kod jo-Manase konchiel nodwoko jotend dhout Israelgo niya," 
Joshua22:22 “Ruoth Nyasaye e Nyasaye Maduong’! Ruoth Nyasaye e Nyasaye Maduong’! En ema ong’eyo gima omiyo ne wagero kendoni, to un bende nyaka ung’e. Ka en adieri ni waseketho, kendo waweyo Ruoth Nyasaye, to owinjore watho." 
Joshua22:23 Ka dibed ni wasepiem gi Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo wagero kendowa wawegi mondo wawang’ie misengini, kata watimie misengni mag cham kata mag kue, to Ruoth Nyasaye owuon mondo okumwa." 
Joshua22:24 Ne watimo kamano nikech dipo ka chieng’ moro nyikwau owacho ni nyikwawa niya, ‘Ere gima omiyo uluongoru ni jo-Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel?" 
Joshua22:25 Ruoth Nyasaye noseketo aora Jordan mondo opog kindwa kodu, omiyo ok un joge.’ Ka giwacho kamano, to di gimon nyikwawa lamo Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Joshua22:26 Kuom mano ne wagero kendoni 
Joshua22:27 mana ni mondo obed ranyisi ni jowa gi jou, kod joma nobi bang’wa, ni walamo Ruoth Nyasaye gi misengni miwang’o gi mag sawo kod mamoko. To kata kamano ne ok wagere mondo watimie misango. Kamano nyikwau ok nonyal wacho ni nyikwawa ni ok gin jo Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Joshua22:28 Ne waparo bende ni ka gima kamano ditimrenwa, kata ni nyikwawa, to wanyalo nyisogi kido mar kendo-mar-misango mar Ruoth Nyasaye ma wasegero. Ok en mar wang’o misengni kata gimoro amora machalo kamano, to en mana ranyisi e kindwa kodu." 
Joshua22:29 Ok wanyal piem gi Ruoth Nyasaye, bende ok wanyal weyo luwe, kwagero kendo machielo, to mak mana mano mar Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachwa mochung’ e dho Hema Maler.”" 
Joshua22:30 Kane Finehas jadolo gi jodong oganda kod jotend dhout Israel owinjo wach jo-Reuben gi jo-Gad kod jo-Manase, ne gimor ahinya." 
Joshua22:31 Eka Finehas wuod Eleazar jadolo nowacho ni jo-Reuben gi jo-Gad kod jo-Manase niya, “Kawuono wang’eyo ni Ruoth Nyasaye ni kodwa, nikech ok usetimo gima Ruoth Nyasaye okwero. Kuom mano usereso jo-Israel mondo kik Ruoth Nyasaye kumgi.”" 
Joshua22:32 Bang’e Finehas wuod Eleazar jadolo kod jotelo noweyo jo-Reuben gi jo-Gad e piny Gilead mi gidok Kanaan ir jo-Isarel mamoko mondo gidwoknigi wach. 
Joshua22:33 Jo-Israel ne mor gi wachgi, mi ne gipako Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo ne giweyo wach dhi kedo gi jo-Reuben gi jo-Gad, kendo ketho pinygi." 
Joshua22:34 Jo-Reuben gi jo-Gad noluongo kendono ni ‘Rapar’, nikech ne giwacho niya, “Noparnwa waduto ni Ruoth Nyasaye en Nyasaye.”" 
Joshua23:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nomiyo jo-Israel kue e kindgi gi wasigu ma nolworogi kuom ndalo mang’eny nyaka koro Joshua nodoko moti. 
Joshua23:2 Eka Joshua noluongo jodongo gi jong’ad bura kod jotelo duto mag Israel, mowachonigi niya, “Koro aseti ahinya," 
Joshua23:3 to useneno gik moko duto ma Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu osetimo ni ogendini duto, nikech oherou. En ema osebedo kokedonu." 
Joshua23:4 Omiyo winjuru! Asepogo ni dhoutu piny ogendini ma aseriembo kaachiel gi piny jogo ma pod odong’, chakre aora Jordan yo wuok chieng’, nyaka Nam Maditerenia man yo podho chieng’." 
Joshua23:5 Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu noriembnugi, mi unukaw pinygi kaka osesingorenu." 
Joshua23:6 Omiyo timuru chir mondo uluw chike duto mondik e Kitap Chik mar Musa, mak ubaro korachwich kata koracham." 
Joshua23:7 Kik utim osiep gi joma odong’ e kindugo, bende kik uluong nying nyisechegi kata kuong’oru gi nyinggi, kata lamogi." 
Joshua23:8 To padreuru kuom Ruoth Nyasaye gi chuny modimbore, mana kaka usetimo nyaka chil kawuono." 
Joshua23:9 Ruoth Nyasaye oseriembonu ogendini madongo kendo marateke, ma onge kata achiel kuomgi mane nyalo sirou." 
Joshua23:10 Ng’at achiel kuomu nyalo riembo ji gana achiel, nikech Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu ema kedonu kaka nosingore." 
Joshua23:11 Omiyo neuru ni uhero Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu," 
Joshua23:12 nikech ka udok chien, mutimo osiep kod ogendini ma pod odong’ e kindu, kendo ukendoru kodgi," 
Joshua23:13 to Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu ok noriembnugi kendo. Ginibednu mana kaka obadho mochiknu, kata bur mokunynu, kendo ginibednu malit ka del michwadogo otengau, kata ka kuthe ma tucho wengeu. Mano notimrenu nyaka uduto karu lal chuth e piny maber ma Ruoth Nyasaye osemiyouni." 
Joshua23:14 “An koro achiegni tho. To ng’ato ka ng’ato kuomu ong’eyo e chunye ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu osemiyou gik mabeyo duto ma nosingorenu. Onge kata achiel kuom gik moko duto ma nosingore ma pok otimo. 
Joshua23:15 Adier, Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu osetimonu gik moko duto mabeyo ma nowacho ni notimnu." 
Joshua23:16 To ka ok urito singruok ma nomiyou, mi ulamo nyiseche mamoko, to enokech kodu, mi karu nolal nono piyopiyo e piny maber mosemiyouni.”" 
Joshua24:1 Joshua nochoko dhout jo-Israel duto Shekem, noluongo jodongo gi jotelo mag Israel, mi ne gisudo e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Joshua24:2 Eka Joshua nonyiso ji duto ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel owacho kama: “Chon, Tera wuon Ibrahim gi Nahor ma kwereu, nodak loka aora Yufrate, kendo ne gilamo nyiseche mamoko." 
Joshua24:3 To ne agolo kwaru Ibrahim loka Yufrate, mi atelone kowuotho e piny Kanaan duto, kendo namiye nyikwayo mang’eny, namiye Isaka," 
Joshua24:4 to Isaka namiyo Jakobo kod Esau. Namiyo Esau piny Seir motimo gode mondo obed mare, to Jakobo gi nyithinde nodhi Misri." 
Joshua24:5 Bang’e naoro Musa kod Harun, kendo nakelo chandruok mathoth ni jo-Misri, eka nagolou kuno." 
Joshua24:6 Kane asegolo kwereu Misri kamano, kendo gichopo e Nam Makwar, jo-Misri nolawogi kod farese gi geche mag lweny nyaka e namno." 
Joshua24:7 To kane jo-Israel oywakna gi chunygi duto, naketo mudho e kindgi gi jo-Misri, kendo namiyo nam oduogo moimo jo-Misrigo, kendo nuneno gima natimonigi. “Bang’ mano ne udak e thim ndalo mang’eny," 
Joshua24:8 nyaka nakelou e piny jo-Amor ma nodak yo wuok chieng’ mar aora Jordan. Ne gikedo kodu to naloyogi, maketogi e lwetu, mi ukawo pinygi." 
Joshua24:9 Balak wuod Zipor ma ruodh Moab bende nokedo kodu. Nooro Balaam wuod Beor mondo obi okuong’u," 
Joshua24:10 to ne ok ayiene mondo otim kamano. Omiyo kar kuong’ou, to noguedhou, mi naresou e lwet Balak." 
Joshua24:11 Eka bang’e nung’ado aora Jordan, muchopo Jeriko. Jo-Jeriko gi jo-Amor gi jo-Perizi gi jo-Kanaan gi jo-Hiti gi jo-Girgash gi jo-Hivi kod jo-Jebus nokedo kodu, to namiyo uloyogi duto." 
Joshua24:12 Giu mag lweny ok ema noriembogi. 
Joshua24:13 Namiyou piny mane luchu ok ochuerie, kod mier mane ok ugero, ma koro udakie, kendo uchamoe olemb mzabibu kod zeituni mane ok upidho." 
Joshua24:14 “Kuom mano, lamuru Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo tineuru gi chuny modimbore. Wituru nyiseche mane kwereu lamo kane gidak loka aora Yufrate, kendo e piny Misri, to lamuru mana Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Joshua24:15 Ka ok uikoru mar tiyone, to yieruru tinendeni nyasaye mubiro tiyone. Unyalo tiyone nyiseche mane kwereu lamo loka aora Yufrate, kata nyiseche mag jo-Amor, ma koro udak e pinygini. To an, kaachiel gi jooda, wabiro tiyo ni Ruoth Nyasaye.”" 
Joshua24:16 Jo-Israel nodwoko Joshua niya, “Ok wadwar weyo Ruoth Nyasaye kata matin, mondo wati ni nyiseche mamoko." 
Joshua24:17 Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachwa ema nogolo kwerewa kod wan bende e piny Misri kuma ne wabedoe wasumbini, kendo ne waneno honni ma notimo. Noritowa kamoro amora mane wadhiye, kendo e kind ogendini mane wawuothoe." 
Joshua24:18 To bende Ruoth Nyasaye noriembo jo-Amor gi ogendini moko ma nodak e pinyni mondo owenwa thuolo. Kuom mano, wan bende wabiro tiyo ni Ruoth Nyasaye, nimar en Nyasachwa.”" 
Joshua24:19 Joshua nowachonigi niya, “Ok dunyal tiyo ni Ruoth Nyasaye, nimar en Nyasaye maler, kendo ma janyiego, ma ok nowenu richou kod timbeu mamono." 
Joshua24:20 Kuweyo Ruoth Nyasaye, mutiyo ni nyiseche mamoko, to enolokre jasiku, kendo nokumu. Kata obedo ni oseguedhou kamano, to koro enotieku chuth.”" 
Joshua24:21 To ji duto nodwoko Joshua niya, “Ooyo, wabiro tiyo ni Ruoth Nyasaye.”" 
Joshua24:22 Eka Joshua nowachonigi niya, “Un uwegi un joneno.”" 
Joshua24:23 To Joshua nomedo wachonigi niya, “Wituru nyiseche mag pinje mamoko, kendo keturu chunyu kuom Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel.”" 
Joshua24:24 Ne gidwoke niya, “Wanati ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachwa, kendo wanarit chikene.”" 
Joshua24:25 Kamano Joshua nomiyo jo-Israel otimo singruok gi Ruoth Nyasaye ka gin Shekem odiechieng’no, mi nomiyogi chike." 
Joshua24:26 Nondiko chikego e Kitap Chik mar Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo nochungo kidi maduong’ e tiend yath man but Hema Maler mar Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Joshua24:27 Eka nowacho ni ji duto niya, “Uneno kidini? Nobednwa janeno, nikech osewinjo weche duto ma Ruoth Nyasaye owachonwa. Kuom mano, nobednu janeno mondo kik uwe luwo Ruoth Nyasaye.”" 
Joshua24:28 Eka Joshua nomiyogi thuolo, kendo ng’ato ka ng’ato nodok kar dakne e lowo mopogne." 
Joshua24:29 Bang’ mago duto, Joshua wuod Nun jatich Ruoth Nyasaye notho, ka jahigni mia achiel gapar." 
Joshua24:30 Ne giyike e lope owuon mane ni Timnath-sera, yo nyandwat mar got Gaash, e piny gode mag Efraim." 
Joshua24:31 Jo-Israel notiyo ni Ruoth Nyasaye e ndalo duto mag Joshua, kod e ndalo jodongo mane odong’ bang’e, kendo mane ong’eyo gik mane Ruoth Nyasaye otimo ni Israel." 
Joshua24:32 Choke Josef mane jo-Israel ogolo Misri, noyik Shekem, e lowo mane Jakobo ong’iewo gi yawuot Hamor wuon Shekem kuom siling’ mia achiel. Achien lowono nobedo mar joka Josef." 
Joshua24:33 Eleazar wuod Harun bende notho, mi noyike Gibea, dala mane opog ni Finehas wuode e piny gode mag Efraim." 
Judges1:1 Bang’ tho Joshua, jo-Israel nopenjo Ruoth Nyasaye wach niya, “Ere dhoot monego kuong dhi monjo jo-Kanaan?”" 
Judges1:1 Bang’ tho Joshua, jo-Israel nopenjo Ruoth Nyasaye wach niya, “Ere dhoot monego kuong dhi monjo jo-Kanaan?”" 
Judges1:2 Ruoth Nyasaye nodwokogi ni, “Dhood Juda ema mondo okwongi. Ero, achiwo pinyno e lwetgi.”" 
Judges1:3 Juda nowacho ni jo-Simeon ma owetegi niya, “Biuru, wadhi e piny mopognwa, mondo wamonj jo-Kanaan. Eka wan bende wanadhi kodu e piny mopognu, wakonyu kedo.” Kamano jo Simeon nodhi kodgi." 
Judges1:4 Jo-Juda nodhi momonjo jo Kanaan kod jo-Perizi modak kuno, kendo Ruoth Nyasaye nochiwogi e lwetgi, mi ne ginego ji alufu apar kuomgi e dala mar Bezek." 
Judges1:5 Ne giyudo Adoni-bezek kuno, kendo ne gikedo kode, mi giloyo jo-Kanaan gi jo-Perizi." 
Judges1:6 Adoni-bezek noringo, to ne gilawe, mi gimake. Ne ging’ado lith luetene mathwon kod lith tiendene mathwon." 
Judges1:7 Eka Adoni-bezek nowacho niya, “Ruodhi piero abiriyo mong’ad lith luetegi mathuondi kod lith tiendegi mathuondi yande kwanyo mana ng’injo mag chiemo e bwo mesana. To koro Nyasaye osetimona mana kaka natimonigi.” Bang’e nokel Adoni-bezek Jerusalem, motho kuno." 
Judges1:8 Jo-Juda nomonjo Jerusalem, mokawo. Ne ginego joma odakie, mi giwang’o dalano gi mach." 
Judges1:9 Bang’ mano jo-Juda nochomo yo milambo, mokedo gi jo-Kanaan mane odak e piny gode, kendo e piny milambo, kendo e piny pewe." 
Judges1:10 Bende ne gidhi kedo gi jo-Kanaan mane odak Hebron, dala ma chon niluongo ni Kiriath-arba, mi ne giloyo Sheshai gi Ahiman kod Talmai." 
Judges1:11 Kane gia kanyo ne gidhi kedo gi jo-Debir, dala ma chon niluongo ni Kiriath-sefer." 
Judges1:12 Kaleb nowacho niya, “Ng’at ma nomonj Kiriath-sefer, mi kaw, ema nami Aksa nyara mondo obed chiege.”" 
Judges1:13 Othniel wuod Kenaz owadgi Kaleb matin ema nokawo dalano, omiyo Kaleb nomiye Aksa nyare obedo chiege." 
Judges1:14 Kane Aksa odhi ir chwore, chwore nojiwe mondo okwa wuon mare lowo, mi Aksa noidho kanje modhi ir Kaleb, kendo kane oselor e kanje, Kaleb nopenje gima odwaro." 
Judges1:15 Nodwoke niya, “Kaka iseketa e piny milambo motwoni, yie imiya sokni.” Kuom mano Kaleb nomiye sokni mamalo gi mamwalo." 
Judges1:16 Nyikwa ja-Keni ma jaduong’ Musa ne jowuok kaachiel gi jo-Juda e Dala mar Othidhe, mi gidhi e thim Juda ma yo milambo mar Arad, kendo ne gidak gi jo-Amalek kuno." 
Judges1:17 Bang’e jo-Juda ne jodhi gi jo-Simeon ma owetegi, mi gimonjo jo-Kanaan man Zefath, kendo giketho dalano chuth. Omiyo noluong dalano ni Horma (tiende ni, mokethi.)" 
Judges1:18 To jo-Juda ne ok okawo Gaza gi Ashkelon gi Ekron, kata gwengegi." 
Judges1:19 Ruoth Nyasaye nokonyo jo-Juda, omiyo ne gikawo piny gode, to ne ok ginyal riembo joma nodak e piny pewe, nikech ne gin gi geche lweny mag nyinyo." 
Judges1:20 Hebron nopog ni Kaleb, kaka Musa nosechiko, kendo Kaleb noriembo yawuot Anak adek ma noyudo kuno." 
Judges1:21 To jo-Benjamin ne ok oriembo jo-Jebus modak Jerusalem, omiyo jo-Jebus osebet kodak kodgi kuno nyaka chil kawuono." 
Judges1:22 Joka Josef nodhi momonjo Bethel, dala ma chon niluongo ni Luz, kendo Ruoth Nyasaye ne ni kodgi." 
Judges1:23 Ne gioro jombetre kuno," 
Judges1:24 mi jombetrego noneno ng’ato kawuok e dalano, mi giwachone niya, “Kinyisowa yo ma wanyalo donjogo e dala, to ok wabi timi gimoro.”" 
Judges1:25 Nonyisogi yo midonjogo e dala, mi ne ginego ji duto mane odak kuno, mak mana ng’atno gi joode ema ne giweyo." 
Judges1:26 Bang’ mano ng’atno nodhi e piny jo-Hiti, mogero dala kuno, kendo nochako ni Luz. Pod iluongo dalano ni Luz nyaka chil kawuono." 
Judges1:27 Jo-Manase bende ne ok oriembo joma nodak Beth-shean, kata joma nodak Dor gi Ibleam kod Megido, gi mier matindo ma nokiewo kodgi. To jo-Kanaan nosiko mana kodak e pinyno." 
Judges1:28 Achien kane jo-Israel osedoko motegno, ne giloko jo-Kanaan-go wasumbgi, to ne ok giriembogi chuth." 
Judges1:29 Jo-Efraim bende ne ok oriembo jo-Kanaan ma nodak Gezer, to jo-Kanaan-go nosiko kodak kodgi kuno." 
Judges1:30 Jo-Zebulun bende ne ok oriembo joma nodak Kitron gi Nahalol, to jo-Kanaan nodak kodgi. Kata kamano jo-Zebulun nolokogi wasumbgi." 
Judges1:31 Jo-Asher bende ne ok oriembo joma nodak Ako gi Sidon gi Alab gi Akzib gi Helba gi Afik kod Rehob. 
Judges1:32 Kamano jo-Asher nodak adaka gi jo-Kanaan-go, kendo ne ok giriembogi." 
Judges1:33 Jo-Naftali bende ne ok oriembo jo-Kanaan ma nodak Beth-shemesh, kod joma nodak Beth-anath, to ne gidak mana kodgi, kendo ne gilokogi wasumbgi." 
Judges1:34 To jo-Amor nodhiro jo-Dan chien e piny gode, kendo notamogi lor e piny pewe." 
Judges1:35 To bende jo-Amor nosiko kodak e gode mag Heres gi Aijalon kod Shaalbim. Kata kamano joka Josef noloyogi mosmos, mi gidoko wasumbgi." 
Judges1:36 Tong’ piny jo-Edom nochakore kama iidhogo Akrabim, koa Sela kochomo yo nyandwat." 
Judges2:1 Malaika mar Ruoth Nyasaye noa Gilgal, modhi Bokim. Nowacho ni jo-Israel niya, “Ne agolou e piny Misri, mi akelou e piny mane asingora ni nami kwereu. Ne awacho ni ok naketh singruokna kodu." 
Judges2:2 Omiyo un bende kik utim winjruok gi weg pinyni, to nyaka uketh kendegi mag liswa. Kata kamano ne ok uwinjo chikna kendo koro neuru gima usetimoni." 
Judges2:3 Mano emomiyo nawacho ni ok nariemb ogendnigo mondo owenu thuolo, to ginithagu kendo nyisechegi nobednu obadho.”" 
Judges2:4 Kane malaika mar Ruoth Nyasaye osewacho ni jo-Israel wechego, ne giywak malit giduto." 
Judges2:5 Omiyo nochak kanyo ni Bokim, (tiende ni, joywak). Jo-Israel notimo ni Ruoth Nyasaye misengni kanyo." 
Judges2:6 Joshua nomiyo jo-Israel thuolo mi ne gidhi mi gidak e pinyno, ng’ato ka ng’ato e lowo mopogne." 
Judges2:6 Joshua nomiyo jo-Israel thuolo mi ne gidhi mi gidak e pinyno, ng’ato ka ng’ato e lowo mopogne." 
Judges2:7 Jo-Israel notiyo ni Ruoth Nyasaye e ndalo duto mag Joshua, kendo e ndalo mag jodongo mane odong’ bang’e, kendo mane oneno timbe madongo duto mane Ruoth Nyasaye otimo ni jo-Israel." 
Judges2:7 Jo-Israel notiyo ni Ruoth Nyasaye e ndalo duto mag Joshua, kendo e ndalo mag jodongo mane odong’ bang’e, kendo mane oneno timbe madongo duto mane Ruoth Nyasaye otimo ni jo-Israel." 
Judges2:8 Joshua wuod Nun jatich Ruoth Nyasaye notho ka ja-higni mia achiel gapar. 
Judges2:8 Joshua wuod Nun jatich Ruoth Nyasaye notho ka ja-higni mia achiel gapar. 
Judges2:9 Ne giyike e lope owuon Timnath-heres, man yo nyandwat mar got Gaash e piny gode mag Efraim." 
Judges2:10 Tieng’no duto notho, moluwo kweregi, kendo tieng’ machielo mane ok ong’eyo Ruoth Nyasaye, kata gik mane osetimo ni jo-Israel, noluwo bang’gi." 
Judges2:11 Timbe jo-Israel nodoko maricho e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo ne gilamo nyiseche manono miluongo ni Baal." 
Judges2:12 Ne giweyo Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach kweregi mane ogologi Misri, mi giluwo nyiseche mamoko mag ogendini mane gidakgo. Ne gilamo nyisechego, mi gimiyo Ruoth Nyasaye mirima." 
Judges2:13 Ne giweyo Ruoth Nyasaye mi gilamo Baal kod Ashtaroth. 
Judges2:14 Omiyo Ruoth Nyasaye nokecho kodgi, mi nochiwogi e lwet mony moyakogi. To bende noketogi e lwet wasikgi duto mane olworogi, mi koro ne ok ginyal sirogi kata matin." 
Judges2:15 Kinde duto mane gidhi kedo, Ruoth Nyasaye ne kelonigi chandruok, mana kaka nosiemogi kokuong’orenigi. Kamano ne gichandore malit." 
Judges2:16 To Ruoth Nyasaye noketonigi jotelo moresogi e lwet joyekogo. 
Judges2:17 To kata kamano ne ok gidewo kata mana jotelogo. Ne giduwore, mi gitiyo ni nyiseche mamoko, kendo ne gilamogi. Piyopiyo nono ne gibaro, mi giweyo rito chik Ruoth Nyasaye mane kweregi orito, kendo ne ok giluoro Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Judges2:18 Kinde ka kinde mane Ruoth Nyasaye oketoe ni jo-Israel jatelo, nokonyo jatelono, kendo norito jo-Israel e lwet wasikgi kuom ndalo duto mane jatelono pod ngima. Ruoth Nyasaye ne kecho jo-Israel nikech ne giywak ka wasikgi sandogi kendo thirogi." 
Judges2:19 To pile kane jatelo ma kamano osetho, ne gidok e timbe maricho moloyo mane kweregi timo, kendo ne giluwo nyiseche mamoko, ka gitiyonigi kendo gilamogi. Ne ok giweyo timbegi maricho, kata yoregi mag wich teko." 
Judges2:20 Kuom mano, Ruoth Nyasaye nokecho gi jo-Israel, mowacho niya, “Ogandani oseketho singruok mane atimo ni kweregi, kendo ok gisemako chikna." 
Judges2:21 Omiyo koro ok nariemb kata ng’at achiel kuom ogendini duto mane Joshua oweyo bang’ thone. 
Judges2:21 Omiyo koro ok nariemb kata ng’at achiel kuom ogendini duto mane Joshua oweyo bang’ thone. 
Judges2:22 Abiro temo jo-Israel gi tim jogo, mondo ane ane ka digiluw yorena adimba kaka kweregi notimo.”" 
Judges2:23 Kamano Ruoth Nyasaye noweyo ogendinigo, kendo ne ok odewo riembogi, kata chiwogi e lwet Joshua." 
Judges2:23 Kamano Ruoth Nyasaye noweyo ogendinigo, kendo ne ok odewo riembogi, kata chiwogi e lwet Joshua." 
Judges3:1 Ruoth Nyasaye noweyo ogendini moko mondo otemgo jo-Israel mane ok okedo e ndalo mane gikawo piny Kanaan. 
Judges3:2 Notimo kamano ni mondo tienge jo-Isarel mabiro, kod joma ne pok opuonjore kaka ikedo, ong’e lweny." 
Judges3:3 Ogendinigo e magi: ruodhi abich mag jo-Filistia gi jo-Kanaan duto, gi jo-Sidon kod jo-Hivi mane odak Lebanon, chakre god Baal-hermon nyaka kama idonjogo Hamath." 
Judges3:4 Ruoth Nyasaye noweyo jogo mondo otemgo jo-Israel, kendo ong’ego ka ginyalo rito chike mane omiyo Musa mondo omi kweregi." 
Judges3:5 Omiyo jo-Israel nodak e kind jo-Kanaan gi jo-Hiti gi jo-Amon gi jo Perizi gi jo-Hivi kod jo-Jebus. 
Judges3:6 Ne ginywomo nyi jogo, to nyigi bende ne gimiyo yawuot jogo, kendo ne gilamo nyisechegi." 
Judges3:7 Wi jo-Israel nowil gi Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachgi, mi timbegi nodoko maricho e nyime, ka gilamo Baal kod nyiseche ma mon miluongo ni Asher." 
Judges3:8 Kuom mano, Ruoth Nyasaye nokecho kodgi, mochiwogi e lwet Kushan-rishathaim ruodh Mesopotamia, mi gibedo e bwo lochne kuom higni aboro." 
Judges3:9 To kane jo-Israel oywak ni Ruoth Nyasaye mondo okonygi, nomiyo ng’ato moresogi. Ne en Othniel wuod Kenaz ma owadgi Kaleb matin." 
Judges3:10 Much Ruoth Nyasaye nobiro kuome, mi nobedo jatend jo-Israel. Nodhi kedo gi Kushan-rishathaim ma ruodh Mesopotamia, mi noloyo, nikech Ruoth Nyasaye nochiwo ruodhno e lwete." 
Judges3:11 Omiyo piny Israel nobet gi kue kuom higni piero ang’wen. Bang’e Othniel wuod Kenaz notho. 
Judges3:12 Timbe jo-Israel nochako obedo maricho kendo e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, omiyo Ruoth Nyasaye nothuwo Eglon ruodh Moab mondo oked kodgi." 
Judges3:13 Eglon nochoko jo-Amon gi jo-Amalek, eka ne gidhi mi giloyo jo-Israel, kendo ne gikawo dala mar othidhe." 
Judges3:14 Jo-Israel nobedo e bwo loch Eglon ruodh Moab kuom higni apar gaboro. 
Judges3:15 To kane jo-Israel oywak ni Ruoth Nyasaye mondo okonygi, Ruoth Nyasaye nomiyogi ng’ato moresogi. Ne en Ehud wuod Gera ja-Benjamin, mane ng’at ma racham. Chieng’ moro jo-Israel noore mondo odhi ochul osuchgi ni Eglon ruodh Moab." 
Judges3:16 Ehud nothedho pand ligangla ma dhoge ariyo, to borne romo nus mita, mi notweye ei lawe e bathe ma korachwich." 
Judges3:17 Eka notero ni Eglon ruodh Moab osuru. Eglon ne ng’at machwe ahinya. 
Judges3:18 Kane Ehud osetieko chulo osuru, nowacho ni joma noting’o osuru mondo odhi adhiya." 
Judges3:19 To en owuon nowichore kar Kite Mopa man Gilgal, modok ir ruoth, kendo owachone niya, “Ruoth, an kodi gi wach maling’ling’.” Eka Ruoth nowacho ni joge mondo owuog oko, owenigi thuolo." 
Judges3:20 Noyudo Eglon obet e ode man ewi tado, mane ojabetie ka chieng’ kech. Ehud nosudo bute, mowachone niya, “Akeloni wach moa kuom Nyasaye.” Kane Eglon owinjo wachno, nochung’ e kome," 
Judges3:21 mi Ehud notero lwete ma kor acham, mowuodho ligangla e bathe ma kor achwich, mohobogo bund i Eglon." 
Judges3:22 Ligangla nodonjo e iye, molal kuno gi loge duto. Ehud ne ok oywaye oko to noweye, mi dhoge opowore mowuok kabang’ Eglon." 
Judges3:23 Eka Ehud nowuok oko mochiego dhoudi. 
Judges3:24 Kane osedhi, jotich Eglon nodwogo, mi giyudo ka dhoot ochiegi, to ne giparo ni ruoth odonjo e ot maiye mondo olosre." 
Judges3:25 To kane gineno ni koro giserito motamo wang’gi, ne gikawo kifungu mi giyawogo dhoot, kendo ne ginwang’o ruodhgi koriere piny e dier ot kotho." 
Judges3:26 To Ehud noseringo e sa mane jogo pod ogalore ka girito e dhoot cha. Nokadho kar Kite Mopa, motony odhi Seira." 
Judges3:27 Kane ochopo kuno, nogoyo tung’ e piny gode mag Efraim mondo ji oywor ni lweny. Eka notelo ni jo-Isarel, kendo ne gilor kode ka gia e piny godego." 
Judges3:28 Nowachonigi niya, “Luwauru, nimar Ruoth Nyasaye osechiwo wasiku ma jo-Moab e lwetu.” Omiyo ne gilor ka giluwe, kendo ne girito kuonde ming’adogo aora Jordan mondo kik jo-Moab kadhi. Ne ok giyie mondo ng’ato oidh loka." 
Judges3:29 Ne ginego jo-Moab ma rateke kendo ma jochir alufu apar, kendo chieng’no onge kata ng’ato achiel mane otony." 
Judges3:30 Kamano jo-Israel noloyo jo-Moab, mi pinyno nobedo gi kue kuom higni piero aboro." 
Judges3:31 Jatelo mane owuok bang’ Ehud ne en Shamgar wuod Anath. Nonego jo-Filistia mia achiel mana gi bidhi. En bende noreso jo-Israel. 
Judges4:1 Bang’ tho Ehud, timbe jo-Israel nochako obedo maricho e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye," 
Judges4:2 omiyo nochiwogi e lwet Jabin ruodh jo-Kanaan ma nodak Hazor. Jaduong’ jolweny Jabin ne nyinge Sisera. Nodak Harosheth-hahagoim," 
Judges4:3 kendo ne en gi geche lweny mag nyinyo mia ochiko. Nothago jo-Israel malit kuom higni piero ariyo. Omiyo jo-Israel noywak ni Ruoth Nyasaye mondo okonygi. 
Judges4:4 E ndalogo Debora janabi madhako ma chi Lapidoth ne jang’ad bura e Israel. 
Judges4:5 Nothoro bet e tiend yadh othidhe man e kind Rama gi Bethel e piny gode mag Efraim. Yadhno niluongo ni yadh Debora. Jo-Israel ne dhi ire mondo ong’adnigi bura kanyo. 
Judges4:6 Chieng’ moro Debora noluongo Barak wuog Abinoam ma nodak Kedesh e piny Naftali, mowachone niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel ochiki mondo idhi e piny Naftali gi Zebulun, ikawie ji alufu apar mondo idhigo e got Tabor." 
Judges4:7 Enomi Sisera jaduong’ jolweny Jabin bi e aora Kishon, kaachiel gi gechene kod ogandane, kendo nochiwgi e lweti kuno.”" 
Judges4:8 Barak nodwoke niya, “Anyalo mana dhi ka in bende idhi koda, to ka ok idhi to an bende ok adhi.”" 
Judges4:9 Debora nowachone niya, “Adier abiro dhi kodi, to kata kamano, lwenjni ok nokelni duong’, nimar Ruoth Nyasaye biro chiwo Sisera mana e lwet dhako.” Kamano Debora noa malo, modhi gi Barak Kedesh." 
Judges4:10 Barak noluongo jo-Zebulun gi jo-Naftali ire Kedesh, mi nodhi gi ji alufu apar ma nobiro. Debora bende nodhi kode." 
Judges4:11 Noyudo ka ng’at moro miluongo ni Heber ja-Keni oguro hembe Elonbezaananim man but Kedesh, nimar nosedar moweyo jo-Keni ma nyikwa Hobab, ma or Musa." 
Judges4:12 Kane onyis Sisera wach ni Barak wuod Abinoam osedhi got Tabor," 
Judges4:13 nochoko gechene mia ochiko mag nyinyo kod jolwenje duto. Eka ne giwuok Harosheth-mar-ogendini, mi gidhi e aora Kishon." 
Judges4:14 Debora nowacho ni Barak niya, “A malo! Kawuononi Ruoth Nyasaye biro keto Sisera e lweti. Ruoth Nyasaye osewuok kedo e nyimi.” Kamano Barak nobiro koa got Tabor gi ji alufu apar." 
Judges4:15 Ruoth Nyasaye nodhuolo Sisera gi gechene kod jolwenje e nyim Barak, mi Sisera nolor e gache moringo gi tiende." 
Judges4:16 Barak nolawogi nyaka Harosheth, monego jolwenygo duto, mi kargi olal ma onge kata ng’at achiel ma nodong’." 
Judges4:17 To Sisera noringo modhi e hemb Jael chi Heber ma ja-Keni, nikech ne nitie winjruok e kind Jabin ruodh Hazor gi jood Heber." 
Judges4:18 Jael nowuok moso Sisera, mowachone niya, “Donji, ruoth, donji. Kik iluor.” Omiyo nodonjo e hema, mi Jael noume gi law." 
Judges4:19 Sisera nokone niya, “Riyo oloya, miyae pi amodhi.” Jael noyawo dho puk chak, moolone chak omadho, bang’e noume kendo." 
Judges4:20 Sisera nowachone niya, “Chung’ e dho hema, mondo ka ng’ato obiro ma penjo ka ng’ato ni ka, to ikwere ni onge.”" 
Judges4:21 To Jael chi Heber nokawo tuor kod mulo migurogo hema. Nolidho, modhi ir Sisera mane oyudo nindo ogoyo ngoga. Noguro wiye gi mulono, mi obwongone othichore. Sisera nogwecho, motho." 
Judges4:22 Kane Barak obiro ka dwaro Sisera, Jael nodhi romone kawacho ne niya, “Bi mondo anyisi ng’ama idwaro.” Nodhi kode, moneno Sisera koriere piny otho, ka mulo migurogo hema othir e wiye." 
Judges4:23 Chieng’no Ruoth Nyasaye nomiyo jo-Israel oloyo Jabin ruodh Kanaan," 
Judges4:24 kendo ne githung’e ahinya gi lweny, nyaka ne gitieko kare chuth." 
Judges5:1 Chieng’no Debora gi Barak wuod Abinaom nower niya," 
Judges5:2 “Pakuru Ruoth Nyasaye, nikech jo-Israel duto gi jotendgi nochiwore ni lweny." 
Judges5:3 Winjuru, un ruodhi! Chikuru itu, un jotelo! Abiro goyo thum, kawer ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel." 
Judges5:4 Kane Ruoth Nyasaye owuok oa Seir e piny Edom, piny noyiengni, kendo polo notetni, mi boche polo noton piny mang’eny." 
Judges5:5 Gode noyiengni e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye mar Sinai, ma Nyasach Israel." 
Judges5:6 E ndalo Shamgar wuod Anath, kendo e ndalo Jael, joohala ne ok nyal dhi e wuoth, to jowuoth ne luwo mana yore mogondore ogondore." 
Judges5:7 Miech Israel nodong’ nono, nyaka nabiro an Debora. Nabiro mabedo ka min ji e Israel." 
Judges5:8 Ne giyiero nyiseche manyien. Ne gilamo mana jochiende. Kuot kata tong’ ne ok nyal yudi kuom jo-Israel alufu piero ang’wen. 
Judges5:9 Un jotend Israel, beduru gi sunga! Un jo-Isarel mane ochiwore ni lweny, denduru Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Judges5:10 Un joidh kenje marachere, kod un joma obet e lewni mabeyo mopedhi, kata un joma wuotho awuotha gi tielo, paruru ane gik mosetimoregi." 
Judges5:11 Winjuru dwond jower magoyo thum, kuonde ma mon umboe. Gipako Ruoth Nyasaye kuom lochne, nikech obedo kaka thwon jo-Israel. Jo-Ruoth Nyasaye nolor, kowuok e miechgi." 
Judges5:12 Chiew! Chiew, in Debora! Chiew! Chiew, ichak wer. A malo Barak! Wuod Abinoam, imak ji mang’eny!" 
Judges5:13 Eka jolweny nolor gi jotendgi. Jo-Ruoth Nyasaye nolor ire, ka giikore ni lweny." 
Judges5:14 Jo-Efraim nobiro, moriedo ni lweny gi chir, ka giwacho niya, ‘Wan kodu, un jo-Benjamin! Oweteu ni ka!’ Jotend jolweny nobiro koa Makir, kaachiel gi jo-Zebulun ma nomako ludh jodong lweny." 
Judges5:15 Jodong Isakar ne ni kod Debora e lweny. Ee, jo-Isakar noluwo Barak. Giduto ne giluwe, mi gimwomore nyaka e holo. To jo-Reuben ne onge winjruok e kindgi giwegi, ka giparo gima onego gitim." 
Judges5:16 Ang’o momiyo ne udigni, mudong’ e kund rombe, kuwinjo mana jokwath kaluongo rombegi?" 
Judges5:17 Jo-Gilead bende nodong’ loka Jordan. To ang’o momiyo jo-Dan nodong’ kuma yiedhi gowoe? Jo-Asher nobet e dhonam, kuma aore wuokie." 
Judges5:18 To jo-Zebulun nochiwo ngimagi nyaka kar tho. Jo-Naftali bende nochiwore kamano e paw lweny mane nie got. 
Judges5:19 Ruodhi nobiro mokedo Taanak, but aora mar Megido. Ee, ruodhi mag Kanaan nokedo, to ne ok giyako fedha." 
Judges5:20 Sulue manie polo bende nokedo gi Sisera. 
Judges5:21 Aora Kishon maringo matek noyuoyo jo-Sisera! Adier, aora Kishon nogeng’onigi. Yaye chunya, tim teko!" 
Judges5:22 Tiend faresegi ne goyo koko ka ringo. 
Judges5:23 Malaika mar Ruoth Nyasaye owacho ni, ‘Kuong’uru Meroz kod joma odakie gi kuong’ malit, nikech ne ok gibiro mondo gikony Ruoth Nyasaye. Ne ok gikonyo Ruoth Nyasaye kata joge mag lweny.’" 
Judges5:24 Oguedh Jael chi Heber ja-Keni, moloyo mon duto modak e hema." 
Judges5:25 Sisera nokwayo pi, to nomiye chak. Nokelone cha adila e tawo maber ka tap ruoth." 
Judges5:26 Nomako lo hema gi lwete achiel, to tuor omako gi lwete machielo. Nogoyo Sisera gi tuor, motoyo wiye. Notoyo wiye, mi obwongone othichore e lowo." 
Judges5:27 Noruombore piny, mopodho e tiende koriere kanyo. Kama noruomboreeno ema noriere, mothoe." 
Judges5:28 Min Sisera nong’icho gie dirisa, kapenjo niya, ‘Ang’o momiyo gechene mag lweny odeko, mak obiro? Ang’o momiyo pod ok wawinjo tiend faresene kagiro?’" 
Judges5:29 Mon mariek nodwoke, to en bende nodwokore kende niya," 
Judges5:30 ‘Nyaka bed ni giyeko, kendo gipogo mwandu ma giseyudo. Ng’ato ka ng’ato yudo nyako achiel kata ariyo, kendo omi Sisera gik mope ma kitgi yoreyore, kod nanga mokwo maber, mondo orwak e ng’ute.’" 
Judges5:31 “A Ruoth Nyasaye, wasiki duto mondo olal nono kamano, to ji duto moheri mondo orieny ka wang’chieng’ ma wuok gi tekone duto.” Bang’e piny Israel nobedo gi kue kuom higni piero ang’wen." 
Judges6:1 Timbe jo-Israel nochako obedo maricho e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye mi nochiwogi e lwet jo-Midian kuom higni abiriyo. 
Judges6:2 Jo-Midian nothung’ogi ahinya, omiyo nochunogi ni nyaka gipondi kuonde madiny e kor gode, kod kuonde motimo rogo, gi kuonde moko ma ginyalo geng’oree." 
Judges6:3 Pile kane jo-Israel osechwoyo, jo-Midian kod jo-Amalek kod ogendini mamoko moa yo wuok chieng’ ne biro monjogi." 
Judges6:4 Ne giguro hembegi e piny jo-Israel, kendo ne giketho cham nyaka mbap Gaza, ma ok giweyo gimoro amora mane jo-Israel nyalo konyorego, kaka rombo kata dhiang’, kata kanyna." 
Judges6:5 Ne gibiro gi jambgi kod hembegi, kendo ne ging’eny mana ka bonyo. Kane oriwgi gi ngamia mane gin-go, to ne ging’eny mokalo akwana. Ne gibiro e pinyno mondo giketh cham." 
Judges6:6 Kamano jo-Midian nomiyo jo-Israel obedo modhier, mi jo-Israel noywak ni Ruoth Nyasaye mondo okonygi." 
Judges6:7 Kane giywak ni Ruoth Nyasaye nikech thagruok mane giyudo e lwet jo-Midian," 
Judges6:8 Ruoth Nyasaye nooronigi janabi mowachonigi niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Isarel owacho ni, ‘Nagolou e piny Misri kuma ne unie wasumbini," 
Judges6:9 mi aresou e lwet jo-Misri, kendo e lwet jogo duto mane thagou. Nariembogi oko mondo giwenu thuolo, mi amiyou pinjegi." 
Judges6:10 Nawachonu ni an e Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu, kendo ni kik ulam nyiseche jo-Amor ma koro udak e pinygi. To ne ok uwinjo wachna.’ ”" 
Judges6:11 Bang’ mano, malaika mar Ruoth Nyasaye nobiro, mobet piny e tiend yath moro man Ofra. Yadhno ne mar Joash ja-Abiezer. Noyudo ka Gideon wuod Joash dino cham e bur lwanda mar biyo mzabibu, mondo kik jo-Midian juke gi chamgo." 
Judges6:12 Malaika mar Ruoth Nyasaye nofwenyorene mowachone niya, “In ng’at ma thwon kendo Ruoth Nyasaye ni kodi.”" 
Judges6:13 Gideon nodwoke niya, “To ruoth, to ka en adier ni Ruoth Nyasaye ni kodwa to ang’o momiyo gigi duto osetimorenwa? Ere honni duto mane kwerewa owachonwa ni Ruoth Nyasaye notimo kogologi e piny Misri? Ruoth Nyasaye osejwang’owa, kendo oseweyowa e lwet jo-Midian.”" 
Judges6:14 Eka Ruoth Nyasaye nochike ni “Dhiyo mondo ires jo-Israel e lwet jo-Midian gi teko ma in-go. An ema aori.” 
Judges6:15 Gideon nodwoke niya, “To ruoth ere kaka dares jo-Israel? Dhoodwa e dhoot matinie moloyo dhoudi duto mag Manase, to bende an mana ng’at marachrachie moloyo e dhoodwa.”" 
Judges6:16 Ruoth Nyasaye nowachone niya, “Anabed kodi mi initiek jo-Midian. Inilogi mana ka gima en ng’at achiel.”" 
Judges6:17 Gideon nokone niya, “Ka iyie koda adier, to timna gima nyisa ni in ema iwuoyo koda." 
Judges6:18 Yie kik ia ka nyaka akelni chiwo moro mondo aket e nyimi.” Nodwoke ni, “Abiro riti nyaka iduogi.”" 
Judges6:19 Kamano Gideon nodhi moyang’o nyadiel kendo otedo. Nokawo mogo ma dirom kilo piero ariyo molosogo makati ma ok ketie thowi. Noketo ring’o e adita to kado noolo e tawo, eka nokelo ni malaika mar Ruoth Nyasaye e tiend yath." 
Judges6:20 Malaika nowachone niya, “Ket ring’ono kod makatino e lwandani, kendo iol kado kuomgi.” Mi notimo kamano." 
Judges6:21 Eka malaika mar Ruoth Nyasaye norieyo lwete, momulo ring’o kod makati gi luth mane en-go e lwete. Mach nomwoch e lwanda, mowang’o ring’o gi makati te. Bang’ mano malaikano nolal nono e wang’e." 
Judges6:22 Mano nomiyo Gideon ong’eyo ni kara malaika mar Ruoth Nyasaye ema aye loso kode, mi nowacho niya, “Yaye Ruoth Nyasaye! Kara en adier ni asewuoyo gi malaika mari wang’ gi wang’.”" 
Judges6:23 To Ruoth Nyasaye nowachone niya, “Bed gi kue, kendo kik iluor, nimar ok nitho.”" 
Judges6:24 Bang’ mano, Gideon nogero ni Ruoth Nyasaye kendo-mar-misango kanyo, mochako ni, ‘Jehova Shalom’, (tiende ni, Ruoth Nyasaye en kue.) Kendono pod ni Ofra kuno e piny jo-Abieze, nyaka chil kawuono." 
Judges6:25 Otienono Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Gideon niya, “Kaw rwadh wuoru, gi rwath machielo ma hike abiriyo, kendo imuk kendo-mar-liswa mar Baal ma wuoru orito, bende ing’ad siro milamo mochung’ e bathe." 
Judges6:26 Eka iger ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachi kendo-mar-misango maber mowinjore ewi pidhni. Kaw rwath machielo iwang’ kaachiel gi siro miseng’adono, ka misango miwang’o pep.”" 
Judges6:27 Omiyo Gideon nokawo jotichne apar, mokonye timo gima ne Ruoth Nyasaye ochike. To ne ok ohedhore timo kamano godiechieng’, nikech noluoro joodgi kod jodalagi, omiyo notime mana gotieno." 
Judges6:28 Kane jodala ochiew gokinyi, ne giyudo ka omuk kendo-mar-liswa mar Baal, kendo otong’ siro mane ochung’ e bathe, mi ochiw rwath ka misango miwang’o pep e kendo-mar-misango mane Gideon ogero." 
Judges6:29 Ne gipenjore ka gidwaro ng’eyo ng’ama otimo kamano, mi bang’e ne giyudo wach ni en Gideon wuod Joash." 
Judges6:30 Omiyo ne giwacho ni Joash niya, “Gol wuodi oko, nimar osemuko kendo-mar-liswa mar Baal, kendo oseng’ado siro mane ochung’ e bathe. Omiyo nyaka otho.”" 
Judges6:31 To kane Joash oneno ka ji ochokore molwore, nopenjogi niya, “Un ema uwuoyo ni Baal koso? Un ema uyalone? Ng’ato ka ng’ato ma yalone ang’ nonegi ka piny pok oru! Ka Baal en nyasaye adier, to mondo owach wachne owuon, nimar en ema nende omuk kendone-mar-liswa.”" 
Judges6:32 Chieng’no nochak Gideon ni Jerubaal, (tiende ni, ‘We Baal owach wechene owuon’,) nimar Joash nosewacho ni, “We Baal owach wechene owuon, kodonjo ni ng’atno kuom muko kendone-mar-liswa.”" 
Judges6:33 Jo-Midian gi jo-Amalek kod ogendini duto ma yo wuok chieng’ noriwo jolwenjgi kaachiel. Ne ging’ado aora Jordan, mi gijot e holo Jezreel." 
Judges6:34 Much Ruoth Nyasaye nobiro kuom Gideon, mi nogoyo tung’, koluongo joka Abiezer mondo oluwe." 
Judges6:35 Nooro joote e piny Manase duto mondo gin bende giluwe, kendo nooro joote ir jo-Asher gi jo-Zebulun kod jo-Naftali mi gin bende ne gibiro." 
Judges6:36 Gideon nowacho ni Nyasaye niya, “Ka idwaro ni mondo ires jo-Israel gi lweta kaka isewacho," 
Judges6:37 to eri aketo pien rombo e laru kama wadinoe cham. Ka kiny ayudo ka pien rombo kende ema tho omokoe, to piny odong’ kotwo, eka nang’e ni kara adier, idwaro ni mondo ares jo-Israel.”" 
Judges6:38 Mi notimore kaka nokwayono. Kane Gideon ochiew gokinyi, nobiyo pien rombono, mogolo kuome pi moromo pong’o bakul." 
Judges6:39 Eka Gideon nowacho ni Nyasaye niya, “Kik ikech koda, to yie awuo kodi kendo. Yie mondo pien kende ema mondo odong’ kotwo, to piny ema mondo tho omokie.”" 
Judges6:40 Otienono bende, Nyasaye notimo kamano, mi pien kende ema nodong’ kotwo, to piny duto nomoko tho." 
Judges7:1 Gideon ma bende iluongo ni Jerubaal, kod ji duto mane ni kode, nochiew gokinyi mang’ich modhi ojot but soko man Herod. Kambi jo-Midian to ne nie holo man yo nyandwat mar got More." 
Judges7:2 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Gideon niya, “In gi ji mang’eny ahinya, omiyo ok anyal keto jo-Midian e lwetgi, nimar dipo ka jo-Israel opakore ni gilocho mana gi tekogi giwegi." 
Judges7:3 Koro dhiyo mondo iland ni ji wach niya, ‘Ng’ato ang’ata ma luoro kata kibaji omako, mondo oa e got Galud piyopiyo odog dala.’ ” Gideon notimo kamano, mi ji alufu piero ariyo gariyo noduogo, to alufu apar nodong’." 
Judges7:4 Eka Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Gideon kendo niya, “Ji pod ng’eny ahinya, omiyo tergi mwalo e dho pi, mondo abi kuno ayiernigi. Ka awacho ni ni, ‘Jali nyaka dhi kodi,’ to ng’atno nodhi kodi. To ka awachoni ni, ‘Jali ok dhi kodi,’ to ng’atno ok nodhi.”" 
Judges7:5 Kamano Gideon notero ji mwalo nyaka e dho pi, mi Ruoth Nyasaye nowachone niya, “Jogo duto ma gado pi gi lewgi kaka guok gado, ket yorgi, to mago ma goyo chonggi piny, eka modho, ket komachielo.”" 
Judges7:6 Kar romb joma nogado pi gi lwetgi ne mia adek, to ji mamoko duto nogoyo chonggi piny ka modho." 
Judges7:7 Bang’ mano Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Gideon niya, “Abiro resou gi lwet ji mia adek mogado pigo, kendo abiro chiwo jo-Midian e lwetu, to joma odong’ duto mondo odog dala.”" 
Judges7:8 Kuom mano, Gideon nokawo agulni kod tunge kuom jo-Israel mamoko duto, mi noweyo gidok dala, to nodong’ mana ji mia adek kende. Kambi jo-Midian to ne ni e holo gi mwalo." 
Judges7:9 Otieno nogo Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Gideon niya, “Chung’ idhi imonj kambi jo Midian, nikech aseketogi e lweti." 
Judges7:10 Kiluoro timo kamano, to ara dhiuru mokwongo gi Pura jatichni e kambigi," 
Judges7:11 mondo iwinj gima giwacho. Wach ma iwinjo ka giwachono biro miyi chir mar dhi monjo kambino.” Omiyo ne gilor gi Pura jatichne, mi gidhi e kambi kuma ne jolweny mag jo-Midian nindoe." 
Judges7:12 Jo-Midian gi jo-Amalek kod jo yo wuokchieng’ duto mane nindo e holo ne ng’eny ka bonyo, kendo ngamia mane gin go nokadho akwana mana ka kuoyo manie dho nam." 
Judges7:13 Kane Gideon ochopo, nowinjo ka ng’at moro poro ni wadgi lek niya, “Nende aleko ni makati moro motwo obiro ka ng’ielore e kambi jo-Midian. Nochopo e hema moro, motuomo, mi hemano opodho ataro.”" 
Judges7:14 Eka wadgi nodwoke niya, “Nyaka bed ni mano en mana ligangla Gideon wuod Joash ma ja-Israel. Kara, Nyasaye osechiwo jo-Midian kod ogandagi mar lweny duto e lwete.”" 
Judges7:15 Kane Gideon owinjo lekno, kaachiel gi ngeche, nogoyo chonge piny, molemo, eka nodok e kambi jo-Israel mowacho niya, “Wuoguru, nikech Ruoth Nyasaye oseketo jolweny mag Midian e lwetu.”" 
Judges7:16 Nopogo joge mia adek e migepe adek, momiyo ng’ato ka ng’ato tung’ kod agulu moting’o meny e iye." 
Judges7:17 Eka nowachonigi niya, “Kwachopo e bath kambi, to ng’iyauru mondo utim mana gima atimo." 
Judges7:18 Ka agoyo tung’ kaachiel gi jogo duto ma wan go, eka un joma oselworo kambi, bende ugo tungeu, kukok niya, ‘Wakedo ni Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo ni Gideon!’ ”" 
Judges7:19 Gideon gi joge mia achiel nochopo e bath kambi kar sa ang’wen mar otieno, mana ka jorit manyien chako tich. Ne gigoyo tung’ kendo ne ginego agulini mane giting’o." 
Judges7:20 Eka migepe adekgo duto nogoyo tung’ kendo onego agulni. Ne giting’o meny e lwetgi ma koracham, to tunge ne giting’o e lwetgi ma korachwich, ka gikok niya, “Ligangla mar Ruoth Nyasaye, gi mar Gideon!”" 
Judges7:21 Ne gilworo kambi ka ng’ato ka ng’ato ochung’ kare. To jo-Midian nochiew ka kihondko omako, moringo ka ywak." 
Judges7:22 Ji mia adekgo nomedo goyo tungegi, mi Ruoth Nyasaye nomiyo ji duto mane ni e kambi ochako kedo kendgi giwegi. Ne giringo nyaka Beth-shita e yo mochomo Zerera, mi gichopo e tong’ Abel-mehola man but Tabath." 
Judges7:23 Jo-Israel ma jo-Naftali gi jo-Asher kod jo-Manase duto noluong, moriembo jo-Midian." 
Judges7:24 Bende Gideon nooro joote e piny gode duto mag Efraim, mowacho ni jo kuno niya, “Loruru mondo uked gi jo-Midian. Geng’nigiuru kuonde duto minyalo ng’adogo aora Jordan nyaka Beth-bara.” Mi jo-Efraim noyworo ni lweny, kendo ne girito kuonde ming’adogo aora Jordan nyaka Beth-bara." 
Judges7:25 Ne gimako Oreb gi Zeeb, ruodhi ariyo mag jo-Midian. Oreb ne ginego e lwanda mar Oreb. Zeeb to ne ginego e kar biyo mzabibu mar Zeeb. Ne gidhi nyime gi lawo jo-Midian eka bang’e ne ging’ado aora Jordan, mi gikelo ni Gideon wi Oreb gi wi Zeeb." 
Judges8:1 Jo-Efraim nowacho ni Gideon niya, “Ang’o momiyo isetimonwa kama? Dak ne iluongowa kidhi kedo gi jo-Midian?” Ne gidhaw kode matek kuom wachno." 
Judges8:2 To Gideon nodwokogi niya, “Ere ndhath gima asetimo? Kata mana gima tinie ma un jo-Efraim usetimo, oloyo mago duto ma dhoodwa osetimo." 
Judges8:3 Donge Nyasaye osechiwo e lwetu Oreb gi Zeeb ma ruodhi mag Midian e lwetu? Ere gima an asetimo minyalo pimo gi gima usetimo?” Kane osewacho kamano, mirimb jogo norumo." 
Judges8:4 Kane Gideon gi joge mia adek osebiro mong’ado aora Jordan, ne giol. To kata kamano pod ne gilawo wasikgigo." 
Judges8:5 Omiyo nokwayo joma nodak Sukoth niya, “Yieuru umi joga chiemo nikech giol, to pod walawo Zeba gi Zalmuna, ruodhi jo-Midian.”" 
Judges8:6 To jodong Sukoth nodwoke niya, “Ere gima omiyo onego wami jogi mag lweny chiemo, to pok imako Zeba gi Zalmuna?”" 
Judges8:7 Gideon nowachonigi niya, “Kara ber! To ka Ruoth Nyasaye osechiwo Zeba gi Zalmuna e lweta, to anayu ringreu gi kuth thim!”" 
Judges8:8 Noa kanyo modhi Penuel, kendo kuno bende nokwayoe chiemo mana kaka nosekwayo jo-Sukoth. To jo-Penuel nodwoke mana machal gi jo-Sukoth." 
Judges8:9 Omiyo nowachonigi niya, “Ka aduogo ka angima, to abiro muko kama ochiel motegno mar siro lweny e dalauni!”" 
Judges8:10 Noyudo ka Zeba gi Zalmuna ne ni Karkor kaachiel gi jogi mag lweny alufu apar gabich. Ne gin joma nodong’ kuom oganda lweny mar jo wuok chieng’. To jolweny alufu mia achiel gi piero ariyo (120,000) noneg e lweny." 
Judges8:11 Gideon noluwo yor thim mane johala luwo, man yo wuok chieng’ man Noba gi Jogbeha, mi nomonjo jolwenygo apoya." 
Judges8:12 Zeba gi Zalmuna ma ruodhi mag Midian noringo, to Gideon nolawogi, momakogi, jolwenjgi to noleny nono." 
Judges8:13 Kane Gideon wuod Joash duogo koa e lweny, koluwo yor Heres," 
Judges8:14 nomako wuod Sukoth moro, mi wuowino nondikone nying ruodhi mag Sukoth, kaachiel gi nying jodonggi. Duto ne gin ji piero abiriyo gabiriyo." 
Judges8:15 Bang’e Gideon nodhi ir jo-Sukoth mowachonigi niya, “Neuru Zeba gi Zalmuna mane omiyo uchaya kupenja ni, ‘Isemako Zeba gi Zalmuna koso, momiyo idwaro ni mondo wami jogi chiemo?’ ”" 
Judges8:16 Eka nomako jodong dalano, kendo nokawo kuth thim moyuyogigo." 
Judges8:17 To bende nomuko kama ochiel motegno mar siro lweny mane ni Penuel kendo nonego jo dalano. 
Judges8:18 Bang’e nopenjo Zeba gi Zalmuna niya, “Joma nunego Tabor ne chal nadi?” Ne gidwoke ni, “Ne gichal kodi. Ng’ato ka ng’ato kuomgi ne chalo gi wuod ruoth.”" 
Judges8:19 Gideon nowachonigi niya, “Ne gin owetena ma yawuot mama. Akuong’ora e nying Nyasaye ni dine uwe negogi, to da ok anegou.”" 
Judges8:20 Eka nowacho ni Jether ma wuode makayo niya, “A malo, ineggi!” To wuodeno ne pod mana rawera, omiyo noluor, mi ok owuodho liganglane." 
Judges8:21 Zeba gi Zalmuna nowacho ni Gideon niya, “Bi inegwa mana in iwuon, nimar in e ng’at maduong’ ma bade otegno.” Omiyo Gideon noa malo, monegogi giduto. Eka nokawo odeyo mane nie ng’ut ngamia maggi." 
Judges8:22 Bang’ wechego jo-Israel nowacho ni Gideon niya, “Iseresowa e lwet jo-Midian, omiyo koro bed ruodhwa kendo wuodi gi nyikwayi bende nobed ruodhi bang’i.”" 
Judges8:23 To Gideon nodwokogi niya, “Ok nabed ruodhu, kata mana wuoda bende ok nobedi, to Ruoth Nyasaye ema nobed ruodhu.”" 
Judges8:24 Eka nomedo wacho niya, “Yieruru ng’ato kuomu mondo omiya stadi mugolo kuom gik moyaki.” (Jo-Midian mane giyakogo ne joma dak e thim, ma timgi en liero stadi mag dhahabu e itgi.)" 
Judges8:25 Jo-Israel nodwoke niya, “Wayie miyigi.” Mi ne gipedho stadi mane oseyako." 
Judges8:26 Pek mar stadi mane gimiyo Gideon ne romo kilo piero adek. To bende ne nitie odeyo gi bonje kod nengni maralik mane ruodhi mag jo-Midian rwako, kaachiel gi thiwni mane otue e ng’ut ngamia maggi." 
Judges8:27 Gideon noloso kido mar nyasaye manono gi dhahabugo, mochungo e dalane Ofra. Jo-Israel duto noweyo Nyasaye modhi kuno lamo nyasaye manonono. Ne odoko obadho ni Gideon kaachiel gi joode." 
Judges8:28 Kamano e kaka jo-Israel noloyo jo-Midian, mi jo-Midian koro ne ok nyal bwogogi. Omiyo piny nobet gi kue kuom higni piero ang’wen kane Gideon wuod Joash pod ngima." 
Judges8:29 Gideonno, ma bende iluongo ni Jerubaal, nodhi odak e dalane owuon." 
Judges8:30 Ne en gi yawuowi piero abiriyo, nikech ne en gi mon mang’eny." 
Judges8:31 Bende ne en gi dhako moro Shekem, ma nonywolone wuowi, mochako ni Abimelek." 
Judges8:32 Gideon wuod Joash notho ka hike oniang’ mi oyike Ofra dala jo-Abiezer, e liend Joash wuon mare." 
Judges8:33 Bang’ tho Gideon, jo-Israel nolokore kendo, moweyo Nyasaye. Ne gichako gilamo Baal, mi giloko Baal-berith nyasachgi." 
Judges8:34 Ne giweyo lamo Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachgi mane oseresogi kuom wasikgi mane olworogi. 
Judges8:35 To bende ne ok gitimo maber ni joka Gideon kuom ber mane Gideon osetimonigi. (Gideonno nyinge moro ne en Jerubaal) 
Judges9:1 Abimelek wuod Jerubaal nodhi Shekem thurgi min mare, mi owuoyo gi owete gi min kod jodhoodgi min mare duto." 
Judges9:2 Nowachonigi niya, “Yieuru upenjna jodong Shekem kama: ‘Ere gima bernu? Bedo e bwo loch yawuot Jerubaal, ma gin ji piero abiriyo duto, koso bedo e bwo loch ng’at achiel?’ Bende nyisgiuru ni nyaka ging’e ni an remo achiel kodgi.”" 
Judges9:3 Owete min mare nowuoyone gi jo-Shekem e wachno, mi jo-Shekem noyie luwe, nimar ne en watgi." 
Judges9:4 Ne gimiye fedha piero abiriyo mogol e od Baal-berith ma nyasachgi, mong’iewogo jomoko ma acheje kendo ma jomahundu mondo oluwe." 
Judges9:5 Abimelek nodhi Ofra dala Jerubaal wuon mare, mi onego owetene piero abiriyo ma yawuot wuon ewi lwanda achiel, mak mana Jotham ma wuod Jerubaal machogo ema nopondo, mi ne ok onego." 
Judges9:6 Bang’e jo-Shekem duto kod jo-Beth-milo nochokore kanyakla, kendo ne gidhi e tiend yath man but siro milamo man Shekem, mi giketo Abimelek ruoth kuno." 
Judges9:7 Kane Jotham owinjo wachno, nodhi mochung’ ewi got Gerizim, kendo nokok niya, “Winjuru un jo-Shekem, kendo Nyasaye bende mondo owinju." 
Judges9:8 Chieng’ moro yien mae bungu nodhi yiero ruodhgi, mi ne giwacho ni yadh zeituni mondo obed ruodhgii." 
Judges9:9 To yadh zeituni nodwokogi niya, ‘Ere kaka dawe mo miyudo kuom olembena, kendo mimiyogo nyiseche kod ji duong’, mondo abed ruodhu?’" 
Judges9:10 Eka yien nowacho ni ng’owo ni, ‘To in diyie mondo ibed ruodhwa?’" 
Judges9:11 To ng’owo nodwokogi niya, ‘Ere kaka dawe olembena mabeyo kendo mamit, mondo abed ruodhu?’" 
Judges9:12 Omiyo yien nokwayo yadh mzabibu mondo oyie bedo ruodhgi. 
Judges9:13 To yadh mzabibu nodwokogi niya, ‘Ere kaka dawe mzabibuna, ma miyo nyiseche kod ji mor, mondo abed ruodhu?’" 
Judges9:14 Bang’ mano, yien duto nokwayo kudho ni, ‘In koro yie mondo ibed ruodhwa.’" 
Judges9:15 Mi kudho nowachonigi niya, ‘Ka udwaro keta ruodhu adiera to ara biuru mondo uyue e tipona. Ka ok kamano, to mach biro muoch kuom kudho kendo biro wang’o kata mana yiend sida man Lebanon.’ ”" 
Judges9:16 To Eka Jotham nomedo wacho niya, “Koro un bende uparo ni usetimo gima kare kendo mowinjore kuom keto Abimelek ruoth? Bende usetimo maber adier ni Jerubaal kod joode?" 
Judges9:17 Bende usetimo ni wuora gima owinjore gi timne maber mane otimo kokedonu kendo kowitore e nyim lweny, moresou e lwet jo-Midian?" 
Judges9:18 Kawuono useriwo ni jood wuora, mi unego yawuote piero abiriyo e lwanda achiel, kendo uketo Abimelek, ma wuod chiege ma misumba, mondo obed ruodh Shekem, mana nikech en watu." 
Judges9:19 Bende uparo ni gima usetimo ni Jerubaal kod joode kawuononi en gima ber kendo ma kare adier? Ka en kamano, to onego ubed mamor gi Abimelek, kendo en bende onego obed mamor kodu." 
Judges9:20 To ka ok kamano, to mach mondo omuoch kuom jo-Shekem gi jo-Beth-milo mondo owang’ Abimelek.”" 
Judges9:21 Bang’ mano Jotham noringo moa. Nodhi modak Beer, nikech noluoro Abimelek owadgi." 
Judges9:22 Abimelek norito jo-Israel kuom higni adek. 
Judges9:23 Bang’e Nyasaye nomiyo jo-Shekem odhaw kode, mi ging’anyone." 
Judges9:24 Mano notimore ni mondo nek marach mar yawuot Jerubaal piero abiriyo ochul ewi Abemelek owadgi ma nonegogi, kendo ewi jo-Shekem ma nokonye negogi." 
Judges9:25 Jo-Shekem nooro ji mondo odhi obut ni Abimelek ewi gode, to jogo ne yako ji duto mane kadho kuno, omiyo Abimelek noyudo wach, motang’." 
Judges9:26 Ng’at moro ma nyinge Gaal wuod Ebed nobiro Shekem, kaachiel gi owetene, mi jo-Shekem noyie bedo e bwo lochne." 
Judges9:27 Ne gidhi e puothegi, mi gipono mzabibu, kendo gikelo kuonde mag bicho, mondo gilosgo divai. Bang’’e ne gitimo sawo e hekalu mar nyasachgi, kuma ne gichiemoe kendo gimethoe, mi giyanyoe Abimelek." 
Judges9:28 Gaal wuod Ebed nowacho niya, “Abimelek to en ng’a? Koso ere gima omiyo wan jo-Shekem dwatine? Donge wuod Jerubaal kod ng’ate ma Zebul josebedo ka tiyo ni jo-Hamor ma wuon Shekem? Koro ere gimomiyo wan dwatine?" 
Judges9:29 Ka dabed ni an jatend jogi, to dariembo Abimelek, kendo da awachone ni mondo okel jolwenje wakedgo.”" 
Judges9:30 Kane Zebul wuod Shekem owinjo wachno, nokecho ahinya," 
Judges9:31 mooro joote ling’ling’ ir Abimelek gi wach niya, “Gaal wuod Ebed, kaachiel gi owetene," 
Judges9:32 josebiro Shekem, kendo gisethuwo jo-Shekem kodi. Omiyo koro kaw jogi mondo ubi gotieno upond e bungu." 
Judges9:33 To kiny gokinyi ka piny oru, uwuog kuma upondoe, mondo umonj dala apoya. Ka Gaal gi jogi jowuok mondo oked kodu, to timnegiuru gima uneno!”" 
Judges9:34 Kamano, Abimelek gi joge nobiro gotieno. Ne gipogore e migepe ang’wen mi gibuto mondo gimonj Shekem." 
Judges9:35 Kiny, kane Gaal owuok, mochung’ e dhoranga dala, Abimelek kaachiel gi joge nowuok kuonde mane gipondoe." 
Judges9:36 Gaal nonegogi, mowacho ni Zebul niya, “Neye joma biro ka ewi gode ka.” To Zebul nodwoke niya, “Maka mana tipo mag gode, to ok gin ji.”" 
Judges9:37 Bang’e matin, Gaal nochako owachone ni, “Ne! Ji e kande lor ewi got, kendo migawo moro e cha, biro koluwo yor yadh ajuoga.”" 
Judges9:38 Eka Zebul nopenje niya, “Koro ere wecheni ma nyocha isungorigo ka? Ok in ema nyocha ipenjo ni ere gima omiyo dwabed e bwo ng’at ma Abimelekni? Donge magi e joma nyocha icharo? Koro dhiyo iked kodgi!”" 
Judges9:39 Kane Gaal owinjo kamano, nokawo jo-Shekem, modhi omonjo Abimelek, to Abimelek nodhuole gi lop tiende, moringo, odok Shekem." 
Judges9:40 Ringre jomotho nopie kanyo mochopo e dhoranga Shekem. 
Judges9:41 Abimelek nodhi modak Aruma, to Zebul noriembo Gaal kaachiel gi owetene mi ok oweyo nigi thuolo mondo gidag Shekem kendo." 
Judges9:42 Kinyne jo-Shekem nowuok oko e lela mi nonyis Abimelek wachno. 
Judges9:43 Nokawo joge, mopogo e migepe adek, mi ne gidhi gipondo e bungu. To kane oneno ji kawuok e dala, nowuok kama nopondoe, momonjogi." 
Judges9:44 Noreto gi migawo mane en go, modhi ochung’ e dhoranga dala. To migepe moko ariyo mag joge nomonjo ji duto mane ni e bungu, mi ne ginegogi duto." 
Judges9:45 Abimelek nokedo gi joma ne ni e dala odiechieng’no duto, mi nomako dala, kendo nonego ji ma nodakie. Eka noketho dalano, mokworo bala kuome." 
Judges9:46 Kane ji duto mane odak kama oger motegno mane ni Shekem owinjo wachno, ne gidonjo e ot ma iye mar hekalu mar El-berik nyasachgi mondo gipondie." 
Judges9:47 To kane onyis Abimelek ni jodalano ochokore kanyakla," 
Judges9:48 nokawo joge, modhigo e got Zalmon. Nokawo le, mong’adogo bad yath moro, moketoe goke. Eka nowacho ni joge niya, “Uneno gima atimoni. Returu mondo un bende utim kamano.”" 
Judges9:49 Omiyo ng’ato ka ng’ato nong’ado bad yath, mi ne giluwo bang’ Abimelek, kendo ne gichano bede yien-go e kor ot ma iye mar hekaluno gi oko eka ne gimokoe mach mi jo dalano duto notho. Duto ne gin ji moromo alufu achiel, chwo gi mon." 
Judges9:50 Bang’e Abimelek nodhi Thebez, molworo, kendo okawo." 
Judges9:51 To ne nitie gorofa mar lweny moger motegno e dier dala, omiyo jo dalano duto, chwo gi mon, nodhi mopondo kanyo. Ne gilorore e iye, mi giidho e tado." 
Judges9:52 Abimelek nomonjo gorofano, to kane ochopo machiegni gi dhoot mondo omokie mach," 
Judges9:53 dhako moro nogolo pong’ rego mogoyo wi Abimelek, mi wiye obarore." 
Judges9:54 Eka noluongo wuowi mane jating’ne gi lweny piyopiyo, mowachone niya, “Wuodh liganglani, inegago, nimar dipo ka ji owacho ni dhako ema onega.” Kamano wuowino nochwowe, motho." 
Judges9:55 Kane jo-Israel oneno ni Abimelek osetho, ne gike, mi gidhi miechgi giduto." 
Judges9:56 Kamano Nyasaye nochulo richo mane Abimelek otimo ni wuon mare kuom nego yawuot wuon piero abiriyo. 
Judges9:57 To bende Nyasaye nochulo kuor ni jo-Shekem kuom richogi, mana kaka Jotham wuod Jerubaal nonyisogi chieng’ mane okuong’ogi." 
Judges10:1 Bang’ Abimelek, Tola wuod Pua ma nyakwar Dodo nowuok mondo ores jo-Israel. Ne en ja-Isakar, ma nodak Shamir e piny gode mag Efraim." 
Judges10:2 Nobedo jatelo e Israel kuom higni piero ariyo gadek, bang’e notho moike Shamir." 
Judges10:3 Bang’ Tola, Jair ja-Gilead nowuok, mobedo jatelo e Israel kuom higni piero ariyo gariyo." 
Judges10:4 Ne en gi yawuowi piero adek mane nigi kenje piero adek ma giidho, bende ne gin gi mier piero adek e piny Gilead ma pod iluongo ni Havoth-jair nyaka chil kawuono. (Havoth-jair, tiende ni, miech Jair)" 
Judges10:5 Kane Jair notho, noyike Kamon." 
Judges10:6 Timbe jo-Israel nochako odoko maricho e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye. Ne gitiyo ni nyiseche manono kaka Baal gi Ashtaroth gi nyiseche mag jo-Aram gi mag jo-Sidon gi mag jo-Moab gi mag jo-Amon kod mag jo-Filistia. Ne giweyo Ruoth Nyasaye, mi ok gilame." 
Judges10:7 Omiyo Ruoth Nyasaye nokecho kodgi, mochiwogi e lwet jo-Filistia gi jo-Amon." 
Judges10:8 Jogo nosando jo-Israel ma nodak loka Jordan e piny jo-Amon man Gilead kuom higni apar gaboro mothirogi. 
Judges10:9 Bang’e jo-Amon nong’ado aora Jordan, mondo omonj jo-Juda gi jo-Benjamin kod jo-Efarim, mi jo-Israel nobedo e thagruok malit." 
Judges10:10 Eka jo-Israel noywak ni Ruoth Nyasaye, ka giywak niya, “A Nyasachwa, waseketho e nyimi, nikech waseweyi, mi walamo mana Baal.”" 
Judges10:11 Ruoth Nyasaye nodwokogi niya, “Jo-Misri gi jo-Amor gi jo-Amon gi jo-Filistia" 
Judges10:12 gi jo-Sidon gi jo-Amalek kod jo-Maon nothirou e higni mokadho. To kane uywakna, donge ne aresou e lwetgi?" 
Judges10:13 To kata kamano, bang’e nuchako uweya, mi udhi lamo nyiseche mamoko. Kuom mano, ok nachak aresu kendo." 
Judges10:14 Dhiuru mondo uywag ni nyiseche museyierogo mondo oresu kuom thagruok momakou.” 
Judges10:15 To jo-Israel nowacho ni Ruoth Nyasaye niya, “Wayie ni waseketho. Omiyo timnwa kaka ihero. To wahombi mondo ikonywa kawuono.”" 
Judges10:16 Kuom mano ne giwito nyisechegi manono, mi gilamo Ruoth Nyasaye. Eka Ruoth Nyasaye nokechogi kuom thagruokgi." 
Judges10:17 Bang’e oganda lweny mar jo-Amon nochokore kanyakla, modhi ojot Gilead. To jo-Israel nochokore kanyakla, mojot Mispa." 
Judges10:18 Jo-Gilead kod jotendgi nowacho e kindgi giwegi niya, “Ng’at ma nokuong kedo gi jo-Amon ema nobed jatelo mar joma odak Gilead duto.”" 
Judges11:1 Jeftha ja-Gilead ne jalweny mager. Ne en wuod Gilead, mane onywolo gi nyako ma jachode." 
Judges11:2 To Gilead ne nigi chiege hie, ma nonywolone yawuowi mogwarore, kendo kane yawuotego osedoko madongo ne giriembo Jeftha, ka giwachone niya, “In ok inyal chamo gikeni mag wuonwa, nikech ok in owadwa ma hie.”" 
Judges11:3 Mi Jeftha noringo oa kuom owetene, modhi odak e piny Tob. Kuno noyudoe jomoko ma acheje mi obedo jatendgi." 
Judges11:4 Bang’ ndalo moko, jo-Amon nobiro momonjo jo-Israel." 
Judges11:5 To kane lweny omuoch, jodong Gilead nodhi omo Jeftha e piny Tob." 
Judges11:6 Ne giwachone niya, “Bi ibednwa jatend lweny mondo waked gi jo-Amon.”" 
Judges11:7 To Jeftha nodwokogi niya, “Donge ne uchaya, mi uriemba e dala wuora? Koro ang’o momiyo ubiro ira ka un e thagruok?”" 
Judges11:8 To ne giwachone niya “Wabiro iri ni mondo wadog kodi waked gi jo-Amon, kendo mondo ibed ruodh joma odak Gilead duto.”" 
Judges11:9 To Jeftha nowachonigi niya, “Kudwoka dala, mi akedo gi jo-Amon, mi Ruoth Nyasaye ochiwogi e lweta, to ng’euru ni nyaka abed ruodhu.”" 
Judges11:10 Jodong Gilead nodwoke niya, “Wakuong’re gi nying Ruoth Nyasaye ma janeno e kindwa kodi, ni wanatim mana gima iwacho.”" 
Judges11:11 Omiyo Jeftha nodhi Mizpa gi jodong Gileadgo, mi jo-Gilead nokete jatendgi kendo ruodhgi. Eka nonwoyo e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, mana weche mane osewacho ni jodongo ka." 
Judges11:12 Bang’e Jeftha nooro joote ir ruodh jo-Amon, kopenje niya, “Ang’o milaro kodwa?”" 
Judges11:13 To ruodh jo-Amon nodwoko joote Jeftha niya, “Kane jo-Isarel wuok Misri, ne gikawo pinywa chakre aora Arnon nyaka aora Jabok gi aora Jordan, omiyo koro dwoknwauru pinyno gi kue.”" 
Judges11:14 Jeftha nochako ooro joote ir ruodh jo-Amon," 
Judges11:15 kowachone niya, “Jo-Israel ne ok okawo piny jo-Moab kata piny jo-Amon." 
Judges11:16 Kane giwuok Misri, ne ging’ado thim nyaka Nam Makwar, mi gichopo Kadesh." 
Judges11:17 Eka ne gioro joote ir ruodh Edom, ka gikwaye mondo oyie gikadhi e pinye, to notamore mi ne gioro wach ni ruodh Moab bende, to en bende nodagi. Omiyo jo-Israel nobedo abeda Kadesh." 
Judges11:18 “Bang’e ne gidhi nyime ka ging’ado thim. Ne giluwo yo ma lworo piny Edom gi piny Moab nyaka ne gichopo yo wuok chieng’ mar Moab e bath aora Arnon. Ne gibworo kanyo, to ne ok ging’ado aora nikech en tong’ piny jo-Moab." 
Judges11:19 Eka jo-Israel nooro joote ir Sihon ruodh Heshbon, mane ruodh jo-Amor, mondo oyie gikadhi e pinye ka gidhi kuma ne gidhi dakie." 
Judges11:20 To Sihon notamogi kadho e pinye. Nochoko joge duto mag lweny mi gijot Jahaz, kendo nochako kedo gi jo-Israel." 
Judges11:21 To Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel, noketo Sihon gi joge duto e lwet jo-Israel, mi jo-Israel noloyogi, mokawo piny jo-Amon duto, mi gidak kuno." 
Judges11:22 Kamano ne gikawo piny jo-Amor chakre aora Arnon yo milambo nyaka aora Jabok man yo nyandwat, kendo chakre thim yo wuok chieng’ nyaka aora Jordan yo podho chieng’." 
Judges11:23 Omiyo ne en mana Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel, ema noriembo jo-Amor mondo oweni joge Israel thuolo." 
Judges11:24 “Donge un udak e piny mane Kemosh nyasachu omayo wegi, momiyou? Kamano e kaka wan bende nyaka wadag adaga e piny mane Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachwa omiyowa." 
Judges11:25 Koso iparo ni iber moloyo Barak wuod Zipor ruodh Moab, mane ok odhaw gi jo-Israel kata omonjogi?" 
Judges11:26 Jo-Israel osedak Heshbon gi Aroer gi mier matindo duto mokiewo kodgi, kaachiel gi mier man e bath aora Arnon kuom higni mia adek. En ang’o ma osebedo ka monou kawogi kuom hignigo duto?" 
Judges11:27 Wan pok wakethonu, to un koro utimonwa marach kuom kedo kodwa. Ruoth Nyasaye e jang’ad bura, kendo kawuono obiro ng’ado bura e kind jo-Israel gi jo-Amon.”" 
Judges11:28 To ruodh jo-Amon ne ok odewo ote mane Jeftha oorone. 
Judges11:29 Much Ruoth Nyasaye nobiro kuom Jeftha, mi nowuotho e Gilead gi Manase, moduogo nyaka Mizpa e Gilead. Koa kanyo nodhi mondo omonj jo-Amon." 
Judges11:30 Nokuong’ore ni Ruoth Nyasaye niya, “Ka inichiw jo-Amon e lweta," 
Judges11:31 to ng’at ma nokwong wuok e dala moromo koda, ka aduogo bang’ loyo jo-Amon e lweny, nobed ng’at mowal ni Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo anachiwe ka misango miwang’o pep.”" 
Judges11:32 Kamano Jeftha nong’ado aora mondo odhi oked gi jo-Amon, mi Ruoth Nyasaye nochiwogi e lwete." 
Judges11:33 Nonegogi oyokre, chakre aora Aroer nyaka Minith, kendo nyaka Abel-keramin, mokawo mier piero ariyo. Mano e kaka jo-Israel noloyo jo-Amon." 
Judges11:34 Kane Jeftha odok dalagi Mizpa, nopo koneno nyare ka ema biro romone, kagoyo thum kendo miel. Mano nene e nyathine kende. Noonge gi wuowi kata nyako machielo." 
Judges11:35 Kane onene, noyiecho lepe, koywak, mowacho niya, “Yaye nyathina! Ichodo chunya! Ang’o momiyo in ema ikelona chandruokni? Asekuong’ora ni Ruoth Nyasaye kendo ok anyal lokora!”" 
Judges11:36 Nyare nowachone niya, “Ka isekuong’ori ni Ruoth Nyasaye kamano, to timna atima gima niwacho ni nitim, nikech Ruoth Nyasaye osemiyo ichulo kuor ni jo-Amon ma wasiki.”" 
Judges11:37 Eka nomedo wacho ni wuon mare niya, “Yie akwayie gimoro achiel kende. Wena thuolo kuom dueche ariyo mondo adhi aba ewi gode ka aywak nikech abiro tho kapod an nyako ngili mapok ong’eyo chwo.”" 
Judges11:38 Noyiene mondo odhi, mi nodhi kaachiel gi osiepene manyiri, moywago nyakone ewi gode kuom dueche ariyo." 
Judges11:39 Bang’ dueche ariyogo, nodwogo ir wuon mare, mi wuon notimone mana kaka nosekuong’ore. Notho nyako ngili ma pok ong’eyo chwo. Mano ema nobedo chakruok mar tim jo-Israel" 
Judges11:40 ni nyigi nyaka dhi ywago nyar Jeftha ja-Gilead ndalo ang’wen higa ka higa. 
Judges12:1 Jo-Efraim nochoko jogi mag lweny, mi ging’ado aora Jordan nyaka Zafon. Ne giwacho ni Jeftha niya, “Ere gima omiyo ne idhi kedo gi jo-Amon, to ok iluongowa mondo wadhi kodi? Wabiro wang’i gi mach e odi!”" 
Judges12:2 To Jeftha nodwokogi niya, “Wasebedo ka wakedo lweny mager gi jo-Amon. Ne waluongou, to ne utamoru biro resowa e lwetgi." 
Judges12:3 Kane aneno ni ok ubi resowa," 
Judges12:4 nawito ngimana madhi loka kedo kodgi, mi Ruoth Nyasaye nochiwogi e lweta. Koro ang’o momiyo ubiro mondo uked koda kawuono?”" 
Judges12:5 Bang’e Jeftha nochoko jo-Gilead duto kanyakla, mi gikedo gi jo-Efraim kendo giloyogi." 
Judges12:6 Bang’ loyogi kamano, jo-Gilead nomako kuonde miyorogo aora Jordan, mondo jo-Efraim kik ng’adi. Noyudo ka nitie wach moro miluongo ni Shiboleth, ma jo-Efraim ok nyal hulo adimba. Omiyo kane ja-Efraim moro pondo, mi okwayo thuolo ka dokadhi, to jo-Gilead nopenje ka en ja-Efraim. Kane okwer, to ne gikone mondo owachi ni “Shiboleth.” To kane owacho ni, “Siboleth,” to gimake kendo ginege mana kanyono. E kindeno jo-Efraim alufu piero ang’wen gariyo notho." 
Judges12:7 Jeftha nobedo jatelo e Israel kuom higni auchiel. Bang’e notho, moyike e dalane Gilead." 
Judges12:8 Bang’ Jeftha, Ibzan ja-Bethlehem nodoko jatelo e Israel." 
Judges12:9 Ne en gi yawuowi piero adek, gi nyiri bende piero adek. Nyigego nodhi tedo, to yawuote bende nokendonigi nyiri piero adek. Ibzan nobedo jatelo e Israel kuom higni abiriyo." 
Judges12:10 Bang’e notho, moyike Bethlehem." 
Judges12:11 Bang’ Ibzan, Elon ja-Zebulun nodoko jatelo e Israel kuom higni apar." 
Judges12:12 Bang’e notho, moyike Aijalon e piny Zebulun." 
Judges12:13 Bang’ Elon, Abdon wuod Hilel ja-Pirathon nodoko jatelo e Israel."
