Judges12:14 Ne en gi yawuowi piero ang’wen kod nyikwayo ma yawuowi piero adek ma moro ka moro kuom yawuote gi nyikwayego ne nigi kanje moidho. Abdon nobedo jatelo e Israel kuom higni aboro. 
Judges12:15 Bang’e notho, moyike Pirathon man Efraim, e piny gode mag jo-Amalek." 
Judges13:1 Timbe jo-Israel nochako odoko maricho e nyim Nyasaye, omiyo noketogi e lwet jo-Filistia kuom higni piero ang’wen." 
Judges13:2 Ne nitie ja-Dan ma nyinge Manoa, ma nodak Zora. Chiege ne migumba ma onge nyathi." 
Judges13:3 Chieng’ moro malaika mar Nyasaye nofwenyore ni chiegeno, mowachone niya, “In dhako ma migumba ma onge nyathi, to ibiro mako ich, mi inywol nyathi ma wuowi." 
Judges13:4 Omiyo koro kik imadh divai kata gimoro ma mero ji, kata kik icham chiemo makuero," 
Judges13:5 nikech ibiro mako ich, kendo nywolo nyathi ma wuowi. Mirich kik ka wiye, nikech chakre chieng’ monywole, nobed ja-Nazir, ng’at mowal ni Nyasaye. En ema nokwong kedo gi jo-Filistia mondo ores jo-Israel e lwetgi.”" 
Judges13:6 Dhakono nodhi mowacho ni chwore niya, “Ng’at Nyasaye nende obiro ira, to kite ne lich ahinya, machalo mana gi kit malaika mar Nyasaye. Ne ok apenje kuma oaye, to bende ne ok ohulona nyinge." 
Judges13:7 Nowachona ni abiro mako ich, kendo nywolo nyathi ma wuowi, omiyo koro kik amadh divai, kata gimoro mamero ji, kata kik acham chiemo makuero, nikech nyathino biro bedo ja-Nazir, ng’at mowal ni Nyasaye, chakre chieng’ nywolne nyaka chieng’ thone.”" 
Judges13:8 Bang’ winjo wechego, Manoa nokwayo Ruoth Nyasaye niya, “A Ruoth Nyasaye, yie mondo ng’at Nyasaye mane ioro cha odwog irwa, kendo onyiswa gima onego watim gi nyathi ma wabiro nywolono.”" 
Judges13:9 Nyasaye notimo gima ne Manoa okwaye, mi malaikane nodwogo e puodho, kuma noyudo dhakono nitie. To Manoa chwore ne ok ni kode kuno." 
Judges13:10 Omiyo dhakono noringo piyo modhi onyiso chwore niya, “Ng’at ma nyocha obiro ira cha, oseduogo ira kendo.”" 
Judges13:11 Manoa noa malo, moluwo chiege, mi nodhi openjo ng’atno niya, “In e jal ma nende owuoyo gi chiega koso?” Ng’atno nodwoke niya, “Ee an.”" 
Judges13:12 Eka Manoa nowachone niya, “Nyathino nobed nyathi machal nadi, ka weche miwachogo otimore? Wanarite nadi, kendo notim ang’o?”" 
Judges13:13 To malaika mar Nyasaye nodwoko Manoa niya, “Chiegi nyaka ritre kuom gik moko duto ma asenyise." 
Judges13:14 Kik omadh divai kata gimoro amora mamero ji, kata mana chamo chiemo makuero kik ocham. Duto mane asenyise, ema mondo otim.”" 
Judges13:15 Manoa nowacho ni malaika mar Nyasaye niya, “Yie mondo ibed wendowa mondo walosni nyadiel moro, icham.”" 
Judges13:16 To malaika mar Nyasaye nodwoke niya, “Kata ugeng’a mondo abedi, to ok abi chamo chiembu. To unyalo lose mondo uchiwe ni Ruoth Nyasaye ka misango miwang’o pep.” Manoa ne pok ofwenyo ni ng’atno en malaika mar Ruoth Nyasaye," 
Judges13:17 Omiyo nowachone niya, “Hulnwa nyingi, mondo wabi wamiyi duong’ ka gima isewachono otimore.”" 
Judges13:18 To malaika nopenje ni, “Marang’o idwaro ng’eyo nyinga, to en nying modhiero ji ng’eyo?”" 
Judges13:19 Omiyo Manoa nokawo nyadiel kod mogo, mi notimogo misango ewi lwanda ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma timbene odhiero ji ng’eyo." 
Judges13:20 Kane ligek mach bebni e kendo-mar-misango, kochiko polo, Manoa gi chiege noneno malaika mar Ruoth Nyasaye ka dum dhi e polo ei ligek majno. Omiyo ne gipodho piny auma." 
Judges13:21 Malaika mar Nyasaye ne ok ochako ofwenyore ni Manoa gi chiege kendo. To koro Manoa nofwenyo ni ng’atno ne malaika mar Ruoth Nyasaye," 
Judges13:22 omiyo nowacho ni chiege niya, “Wabiro tho, nikech waseneno Nyasaye.”" 
Judges13:23 To chiege nodwoke niya, “Ka da ni Ruoth Nyasaye dwaro negowa, to da ok oyie misangowa, kendo da ok onyisowa gigi duto, kata wachonwa gik mosewachonwagi.”" 
Judges13:24 Bang’e dhakono nonywolo nyathi ma wuowi, mochako ni Samson. Nyathino nodongo Mahane-dan, manie kind Zora gi Eshtaol. Ruoth Nyasaye noguedhe," 
Judges13:25 kendo Roho mar Ruoth Nyasaye nochako tiyo kode. 
Judges14:1 Samson nolor odhi Timna, mi noneno nyar Filistia moro kuno." 
Judges14:2 Ka nodok dala nonyiso wuon gi min niya, “Aseneno nyar Filistia moro Timna. Nyuomnagouru.”" 
Judges14:3 To jonywolne nodwoke niya, “Ang’o momiyo idwaro kendo nyar jo-Filistia ma ok oter nyangugi? Donge nitie nyako moro kuom nyi oweteni, kata kuom jowa?” To Samson nowacho ni wuon mare ni, “Nywomnago, nikech ahere.”" 
Judges14:4 Jonywolne ne ok ong’eyo ni Ruoth Nyasaye ema ne dwaro ni mondo gima kama otimre mondo oyudgo yo mokelogo ni jo-Filistia masira. E ndalogo jo-Israel ne ni e bwo loch jo-Filistia. 
Judges14:5 Chieng’ moro Samson ne lor dhi Timna gi jonywolne, to ka nochopo e puoth mzabibu man kanyo, nopo ka nyathi sibuor ochome ka ruto." 
Judges14:6 To much Ruoth Nyasaye nolor kuom Samson ka diemo wang’ mi noyiecho sibuor gi lwete, mokidho matindotindo, mana ka ng’ama yiecho nyadiel, nikech ne en gi lwete nono. To ne ok onyiso jonywolne gima nosetimono." 
Judges14:7 Bang’e nodhi mowuoyo gi nyakono, kendo noyudo ni ohere." 
Judges14:8 Eka bang’ ndalo moko Samson nodok mondo okende. Kane enie yo odhi kuno, nobaro mondo one sibuor mane oyudo osenego cha, mi nopo konwang’o kich mochiek, kopoto kuom sibuorno." 
Judges14:9 Nowuodho pet kich motimo mo, mochamo e lwete kodhi. Nodhi momiyo jonywolne bende ochamo, to ne ok onyisogi ni ogole kuom sibuor motho." 
Judges14:10 Wuon Samson nodhi dalagi nyako mane Samson dwaro kendono, mi Samson noloso nyasi kuno, kaka tim yawuowi nobet e ndalogo." 
Judges14:11 Kane jo-Filistia onene, ne gikelo yawuowi piero adek mondo obudh kode." 
Judges14:12 Samson nowachonigi niya, “We agonue ngero moro. Ka unyalo hulo tiende ka pok ndalo abiriyo mag nyasi orumo, to namiu kandhe piero adek, gi nengni mabeyo bende piero adek." 
Judges14:13 To ka otamou, to nyaka umiya gigo.” Ne gidwoke niya, “Gonwa ngerono, mondo wawinji.”" 
Judges14:14 Mi nowachonigi niya, “Gima ichamo nowuok kuom jacham ji. Gima mit nowuok kuom ratego.”" 
Judges14:15 Ndalo adek nokadho ka pok gihulo tiend ngerono. Chieng’ mar ang’wen ne giwacho ni chi Samson niya, “Ho chwori mondo onyisi tiend ngerono, nono to wabiro wang’i e od wuoru! Ne uluongowa ka mana ni mondo uyakwa koso?”" 
Judges14:16 Omiyo chi Samson nodhi ir chwore, kaywak, mowachone niya, “Kara ichaya, ok ihera! Inyalo goyo ni jowa ngero, to an to pok inyisa tiende?” Samson nodwoke niya, “Wachno pok anyiso wuora kata mama. In to danyisi wachno nadi?”" 
Judges14:17 To nosiko koywakne kuom wachno pilepile nyaka ndalo mag nyasi orumo. To chieng’ mar abiriyo mar nyasi, Samson nonyise tiend ngerono, nikech nojoge gi dudo kuom wachno. Bang’e nyakono nodhi monyiso jogi." 
Judges14:18 Omiyo chieng’ mar abiriyono, kane Samson dwaro dhi nindo, jodala gi nyako nowachone niya, “En ang’o ma dibed mamit moloyo mor kich? Koso ang’o ma dibed ratego moloyo sibuor?” To Samson nodwokogi niya, “Ka dinende ok upuro gi nyarocha, to da ok ufwenyo tiend ngero magoyonu.”" 
Judges14:19 Eka Much Ruoth Nyasaye nolor kuom Samson gi teko, mi nodhi Ashkelon. Nonego ji piero adek kuno, mogonyo lepgi. Eka nokelo lewnigo momiyo joma ne ohulo tiend ngerono. Bang’e nodok dala, kokecho ahinya." 
Judges14:20 To chi Samson nomi osiep Samson, mane ochung’ne kokendo." 
Judges15:1 Bang’ kinde moko e ndalo kayo ngano, Samson nokawo nyadiel modhigo limo nyako mane oyudo okendo cha. Nokwayo jaduong’ne niya, “Adwaro dhi neno chiega e ot ma entie.” To jaduongg’ne nodagi ni ok onyal donjo e odno," 
Judges15:2 kowachone niya, “Ne ang’eyo ni ichaye, omiyo asemiye jal mane ochung’ni. To nyamin maluwe ber moloye, donge dikawe kar jalo?”" 
Judges15:3 To Samson nodwoke niya, “Sani, kata koro atimo ni jo-Filistia marach, to aonge gi ketho.”" 
Judges15:4 Omiyo nodhi momako bwe mia adek. Nokawogi ariyo ariyo, motueyo iwgi kanyakla, eka notueyo meny e iw ariyogo." 
Judges15:5 Nomoko menygo gi mach, mogonyo bwego mondo odhi e puothe jo-Filistia mag ngano. Kamano nowang’o ngano mane oseka, kaachiel gi mago mane pok oka. Puothe mag olembe bende nowang’." 
Judges15:6 Bang’e jo-Filistia nopenjore niya, “En ng’a motimo kama?” Mi nowachnigi ni Samson ema osetimo kamano nikech jaduong’ne ma ja-Timna nosekawo chiege momiyo jal mane ochung’ne kokendo. Omiyo jo-Filistia nodhi mowang’o dhakono kaachiel gi dalagi." 
Judges15:7 Kane Samson owinjo wachno, nowacho niya, “Kara kama e kaka jogi timo! Asingora ni ok nayue ka pok achulogi kuor.”" 
Judges15:8 Nogoyogi arudha, monegogi mang’eny. Eka nodhi modak e lwanda morokore man Etam." 
Judges15:9 Jo-Filistia nobiro mojot e piny Juda. Bang’e ne gimonjo dala moro miluongo ni Lehi. 
Judges15:10 Jo-Juda nopenjogi niya, “Ang’o momiyo ubukowa?” Ne gidwokogi niya, “Wasebiro mondo watue Samson, kendo watimne mana kaka notimonwa.”" 
Judges15:11 Kuom mano, jo-Juda alufu adek nolor modhi e lwanda morokore man Etam, mi giwacho ni Samson niya, “Donge ing’eyo ni wan e bwo loch jo-Filistia? Koro neye masira ma isekelo kuomwa.” En to nodwokogi niya, “Natimonigi mana kaka ne gitimona.”" 
Judges15:12 Ne giwachone niya, “Wasebiro mondo watueyi, kendo wachiwi e lwet jo-Filistia.” To Samson nowachonigi niya, “Kuong’renauru ni un uwegi ok ubi nega.”" 
Judges15:13 Ne gidwoke ni, “Ooyo, wabiro mana tueyi, eka bang’e waketi e lwet jo-Filistia, to ok wabi negi.” Kamano ne gitueye gi tonde ariyo manyien, mi gigole e lwanda morokoreno." 
Judges15:14 Kane Samson ochopo Lehi, jo-Filistia nogoyo koko gi mor, kadhi ire. To Much Ruoth Nyasaye nobiro kuome gi teko, mochodo tonde mane oyudo otuego bedene, mana ka gima ne gin omimi ma much mach ogoyo." 
Judges15:15 Eka noneno chok lemb kanyna ma pod numu, mokwanyo, mi onegogo ji alufu achiel." 
Judges15:16 Bang’e nower niya, “Nanego ji gana achiel gi chok lemb kanyna, mi adhurogi tuche tuche gi chogono.”" 
Judges15:17 Bang’ mano nowito chogono, mi nochako kanyo ni Ramath-lehi, tiende ni, god chok lemb kanyna." 
Judges15:18 Koro riyo noloyo Samson, omiyo noywak ni Ruoth Nyasaye niya, “Isemiya loch maduong’ni, to donge riyo biro nega, kendo jo-Filistia ma ok ong’eyigi biro maka?”" 
Judges15:19 Mi Nyasaye nobaro kama otimo bugo man Lehi, mi pi nowuok kanyo. Samson nomodho pigno, mi chunye oduogo. Mano emomiyo sokono nochak ni En-hakore, (tiende ni, soko ng’at maywak.) Sokono pod ni kuno nyaka chil kawuono." 
Judges15:20 Samson nobedo jatelo e Israel kuom higni piero ariyo, e ndalo mane jo-Filistia rito pinyno." 
Judges16:1 Chieng’ moro Samson nodhi Gaza, kuma noyudoe nyako moro ma jachode, moterorego." 
Judges16:2 Jo-Gaza nowinjo ni Samson ni kuno, ne gilworo kama ne entieno, ka gibutone otieno duto e dhoranga dala to ne ok gitimone gimoro ka giparo ni gibiro nege ka piny oru." 
Judges16:3 To Samson nonindo aninda nyaka dier otieno. Eka nochiew modhi omako thike mag ranga dala, gi sirni kargi ariyo. Nopudhogi kaachiel gi lodi mag dhorangach moterogi nyaka ewi got momanyore gi Hebron, koting’ogi e goke." 
Judges16:4 Bang’ mano, Samson nomako osiep gi nyako moro ma nyinge Delila ma nodak e holo Sorek." 
Judges16:5 Ruodhi mag jo-Filistia nodhi ir nyakono, mowachone niya, “Ho ane Samson, mondo ing’e kuma tekone malichno aye, kendo ing’e kaka wanyalo loye mi watueye kendo wamake. Kitimo kamano to ng’ato ka ng’ato kuomwa biro miyi fedha alufu achiel gi mia achiel.”" 
Judges16:6 Omiyo Delila nowacho ni Samson niya, “Yie inyisa kuma tekoni malichni aye. Ka ng’ato dwaro tueyi mondo omayi teko, onyalo timo ang’o?”" 
Judges16:7 Samson nodwoke niya, “Ka otueya, gi puye abiriiyo mag atung’ ma pok otwo, to anyalo bedo mana machalre gi ng’ato ang’ata.”" 
Judges16:8 Omiyo ruodhi mag jo-Filistia nokelo ni Delila puye abiriyo ma pok otwo, motueyogo Samson." 
Judges16:9 To noyudo nyakono osepando jomoko e ot moro maiye. Eka nokok niya, “Samson! Jo-Filistia osebiro monji!” Samson nochodo puyego mana ka omimi ma much mach ogoyo. Omiyo ne pod ok ong’eyo kuma tekone aye." 
Judges16:10 Delila nowacho ni Samson niya, “Aseneno kaka ichal kendo iwuonda. Koro yie inyisa malong’o kaka ditueyi.”" 
Judges16:11 Samson nodwoke niya, “Ka itueya gi tonde manyien ma pok otuechgo to anyalo bedo mana machalre gi ng’ato ang’ata.”" 
Judges16:12 Omiyo Delila nokawo tonde manyien, motueyego. Eka nokok niya, “Samson, jo-Filistia osebiro monji!” E sano noyudo ka jomoko osebuto e ot maiye. Samson nochodo tonde mane otuego bedene, mana ka gima gin tond otieng’." 
Judges16:13 Delila nowachone niya, “Pod ichaya achaya, kimedo mana wuonda. Nyisa kaka ng’ato nyalo tueyi.” Samson nowachone niya, “Kikawo orimba yie wiya abiriyo, mi ikado gi usi manie fremb chuecho mondo obed machal gi nanga, to anyalo bedo machal mana gi ng’ato ang’ata.”" 
Judges16:14 Bang’e Delila nohoye nyaka onindo. Eka nokawo orimba mag yie wiye abiriyo, mi okado motegno gi usi kamano. Eka nokok niya, “Samson, jo-Filistia osebiro monji!” Samson nochiew oa e nindo, moywayo usi kaachiel gi yie wiye, mopudhogo frembe chwecho." 
Judges16:15 Bang’e Delila nochako openje niya, “Ang’o momiyo iwuonda ni ihera, to chutho ok ihera? Koro isewuonda nyadidek, to pod ok inyisa kuma tekoni aye.”" 
Judges16:16 Nodudo ni Samson pilepile, nyaka Samson nojok modwaro mana dere." 
Judges16:17 Omiyo nohulone adiera, konyise niya, “Nyaka ne nywola mirich pok okayo wiya, nikech an ja-Nazir, ng’at mowal ni Nyasaye. Koliela, to tekona dirum, kendo anyalo bedo mana machalre gi ji mamoko.”" 
Judges16:18 Kane Delila oneno ni Samson osehulone adiera, nooro wach ni ruodhi mag jo-Filistia niya, “Duoguru kendo nikech koro osehulona adiera.” Mi ne gibiro gi pesa e lwetgi." 
Judges16:19 Delila nohoyo Samson, mi Samson nonindo koteno wiye e chonge. Eka Delila noluongo ng’at moro molielo orimba yie wi Samson abiriyo. Bang’e Delila nochako tueyo Samson, mane oyudo tekone koro osea." 
Judges16:20 Eka delila nokok niya, “Samson, jo-Filistia osebiro monji!” Mi Samson nochiew, ka paro ni obiro guecho kendo wuok kaka pile. To ne ok ong’eyo ni Ruoth Nyasaye oseweye." 
Judges16:21 Jo-Filistia nomake, motoko wang’e oko. Bang’e ne gitere Gaza, mi gitueye kuno gi tarege mag mula, kendo ne gikete jareg cham e od tuech." 
Judges16:22 To mosmos yie wiye nochako twi. 
Judges16:23 Chieng’ moro ruodhi mag jo-Filistia nochokore e sawo maduong’, mondo otim misango ni Dagon nyasachgi, ka gigoyone erokamano kuom chiwo jasikgi ma Samson e lwetgi." 
Judges16:24 Kane ji oneno Samson, ne gipako nyasachgi, ka giwer niya, “Jasikwa moseketho pinywa, kendo onego jowa mang’eny, koro nyasachwa oseketo e lwetwa.”" 
Judges16:25 Kane gisemetho, mi giromo, ne giwacho niya, “Kelnwauru Samson, mondo obi otugnwa.” Omiyo ne gigole e od tuech, motugonigi. Bang’e ne gimiyo ochung’ e kind sirni mag ot." 
Judges16:26 Samson nowacho ni wuowi mane taye niya, “Yie iketa kama anyalo muloe sirni mag ot, mondo ayiengrae.”" 
Judges16:27 Noyudo ka chwo gi mon opong’o ot, kendo ruodhi duto mag jo-Filistia bende ne ni kanyo, kendo chwo gi mon alufu adek ne ni ewi tado. Giduto ne ging’iyo Samson katugo." 
Judges16:28 Samson noywak ni Ruoth Nyasaye niya, “A Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasacha, yie ipara. Nyasacha, para, kendo miya teko mana dichiel kende, mondo achulgo kuor ni jo-Filistia kuom toko wengena duto oko.”" 
Judges16:29 Eka nomako sirni ariyo madiere mosiro ot, mi nonyono piny matek, ka lwete ma korachwich ni kuom siro achiel, to ma koracham kuom siro machielo." 
Judges16:30 Nodhiro sirnigo gi muche duto, kokok niya, “We atho gi jo-Filistiagi.” Mi ot noruombore piny kuom ruodhi gi ji duto mane ni e iye. Kamano ji mane Samson onego kotho, ne ng’eny moloyo mago mane onego ka pod ongima." 
Judges16:31 Owetene gi joodgi nobiro moomo ringre. Ne giyike e liend Manoa wuon mare, manie kind Zora gi Eshtaol. Nosebedo jatelo e Israel kuom higni piero ariyo." 
Judges17:1 Ne nitie ng’at moro ma nyinge Mika, ma nodak e piny gode mag Efraim." 
Judges17:2 Nowacho ni min mare niya, “Donge iparo pesani alufu achiel gi mia achiel mane okwal, kendo kaka niluongo jakuogno ka awinjo? An gi fedhago. An ema nakwalogi, to koro adwokonigi.” Min mare nowachone niya, “Nyasaye mondo oguedhi, wuoda!”" 
Judges17:3 Mi nodwoko ni min mare fedhago. To min mare nowachone niya, “Koro wuoda, akuong’ora ni abiro chiwo fedhagi ni Ruoth Nyasaye, mondo olosgo kido mar nyasaye mar bao, mobaw gi fedha. Kamano kuong’ ok nomaki.”" 
Judges17:4 Omiyo kane Mika odwoko fedhago ni min mare, min mare nokawo fedha mia ariyo kuomgi, momiyo jatheth molosonego kido mar bao, mobaw gi fedha. Kido nogo noketi e od Mika." 
Judges17:5 To Mikano ne nigi kare owuon mar lemo. Noloso kido moko manono molosonigi pasia, kendo noketo wuode moro mobedo jadolone." 
Judges17:6 E kindego piny Israel ne onge gi ruoth, omiyo ng’ato ka ng’ato ne timo mana gima ohero." 
Judges17:7 Ne nitie wuowi moro ma ja-Bethlehem-Juda, ma nyinge Ben-gershom. Ne en ja-Lawi ma ja-dhood Juda." 
Judges17:8 Noa Bethlehem mondo odhi odwar kar dak, to kane owuotho, nopo kochopo e dala Mika e piny gode mag Efraim." 
Judges17:9 Mika nopenje ni, “Ia kanye?” Nodwoke niya, “An ja-Lawi moa Bethlehem-Juda, to adwaro kar dak.”" 
Judges17:10 Mika nowachone niya, “Dag koda, mondo ibed jang’adna rieko kendo jadolona, to abiro miyi fedha apar higa ka higa, kaachiel gi chiemo kod lewni.”" 
Judges17:11 Ja-Lawino noyie dak gi Mika, mi nobedo kaka wuode." 
Judges17:12 Mika nokete jadolone, mi nodak kode e dalane." 
Judges17:13 Bang’e Mika nowacho niya, “Koro ang’eyo ni Ruoth Nyasaye biro guedha, nimar aseyudo jadolo ma ja-Lawi.”" 
Judges18:1 E kindego piny Israel ne pok obedo gi ruoth. To e ndalogo, jo-Dan ne dwaro piny mondo odagie, nikech ne pok giyudo lopgi giwegi kaka dhout Israel mamoko." 
Judges18:2 Kuom mano, jo-Dan noyiero jolweny abich kuom dhoutgi duto man Zora gi Eshtaol, mi ne giorogi mondo gidhi giwuoth e piny, kendo gine kaka piny chalo. Kamano ji abichgo nochopo e piny gode mag Efraim, mi gibworo e dala Mika." 
Judges18:3 Kane gin kanyo, ne giwinjo ka wuowi ma ja-Lawi cha wuoyo, mi giyango dhoge. Omiyo ne gipenje niya, “Ng’ama okeli ka, to ang’o mitimo ka?”" 
Judges18:4 Nodwokogi niya, “Mika ema oketa ka. Atiyone ka jadolo, kendo ochula.”" 
Judges18:5 Ne gikwaye niya, “Penjnwa Nyasaye wach ka wuodhwani biro bedo maber.”" 
Judges18:6 Jadolono nodwokogi niya, “Dhiuru gi kue, Ruoth Nyasaye ni kodu e wuodhu.”" 
Judges18:7 Omiyo ji abichgo nowuok mochako wuodhgi. Ne giwuotho awuotha mi gipo ka gichopo Laish. Ne gineno ka jokuno odak gi kue mana kaka jo-Sidon. Ne gin ji mamuol man gi kue, ma ok par ni ng’ato dimonjgi, kendo ne gin gi gik moko, ma onge gimoro ma gichando. Ne gidak mabor gi jo-Sidon, kendo ne ok gitimo winjruok moro amora gi jo-Aram." 
Judges18:8 Kane ji abichgo odok Zora gi Eshtaol, jothurgi nopenjogi wach mane giyudo kuma ne giaye." 
Judges18:9 Ne gidwokogi niya, “Waseneno piny momew ahinya. Omiyo wadhiuru wamonj joma odakie. Kik udeki kayiem nono, to returu umonj pinyno kendo ukaw," 
Judges18:10 nikech Nyasaye osekete e lwetwa. Kudhi kuno to unuyud ni en piny malach man gi gik moko duto, kendo jopinyno ok par ni ng’ato dimonjgi.”" 
Judges18:11 Kuom mano, jo-Dan mia auchiel nowuok Zora gi Eshtaol, koikore ni lweny." 
Judges18:12 Ne gidhi mi gibworo yo podho chieng’ mar Kiriath-jearim e piny Juda. Mano emomiyo kanyo pod iluongo ni Kambi-jo-Dan. 
Judges18:13 Ne gia kanyo, mi gichopo dala Mika e piny gode mag Efraim." 
Judges18:14 Eka ji abich mane osedhi nono piny mokiewo gi Laish kande nowacho ni jowetegi mamoko niya, “Bende ung’eyo ni nitie kido mopa mag nyiseche manono e udigi? Koro paruru ane gima onego watim!”" 
Judges18:15 Mi ne gibaro e dala Mika, kuma wuowi ma ja-Lawi cha nodakie, mi gimose." 
Judges18:16 E sa nogo jolweny mia auchiel ma jo-Dan nochung’ e dhorangach. 
Judges18:17 Eka ji abichgo nodonjo ei ot mondo okaw nyiseche manonogo, to jadolo nodong’ kochung’ e dhorangach ka wuoyo gi jolweny mia auchiel ka." 
Judges18:18 Kane jogo osedonjo e od Mika mokawo nyisechego, jadolo nopenjogi niya, “Ang’o mutimono?”" 
Judges18:19 Ne gidwoke ni, “Ling’ thi, kendo kik iwach gimoro. Bi kodwa mondo ibed jadolowa kendo jang’adnwa rieko. Ere gima ber moloyo? Bedo jadolo mar dhood Israel ngima, koso jadolo mar od ng’at achiel kende?”" 
Judges18:20 Kane jadolo owinjo wachno, nodoko mamor ahinya, omiyo nokawo nyisechego, modhi gi jogo." 
Judges18:21 Jo-Dan-go nowichore moa, ka giketo nyithindgi gi jambgi kod gigi nyimgi." 
Judges18:22 Kane gisedhi mochwalore gi dala Mika, eka jogweng’ gi Mika noyworo. Ne gilawo jo-Dan, mi gijuko." 
Judges18:23 Ne gigoyonigi koko, to jo-Dan nolokore, mopenjo Mika niya, “En ang’o mathagi? Marang’o ilawowa gi jogi duto?”" 
Judges18:24 Nodwokogi niya, “Usekawo nyisechena mane aloso, kaachiel gi jadolona, uago, kendo koro adong’ nono, to eka pod upenja ni en ang’o ma thaga!”" 
Judges18:25 Jo-Dan nowachone niya, “Kiriek to kik iwach gimoro, nimar wan ji ma chunygi lit, kendo kapo nono wagore kuomi, to mano ema dibed thoni kaachiel gi joodi!”" 
Judges18:26 Bang’ mano jo-Dan nodhi nyime gi wuodhgi, to Mika bende kane oneno ni gitek ahinya moloye, noa modok dala." 
Judges18:27 Kamano jogo noa gi jadolo kaachiel gi gik mane Musa oloso. Ne gidhi mi gimonjo Laish, kuma ji nodakie gi kue, kendo ok par ni ng’ato dimonjgi. Ne ginego joma nodak kuno, kendo ne giwang’o dalagi gi mach." 
Judges18:28 Jo-Laish ne onge gi joma dikonygi, nikech ne gidak mabor gi Sidon, to bende ne ok gitimo winjruok moro amora gi jo-Aram, kata obedo ni Laish ne ni e holo man but Beth-rehob kamano. Jo-Dan-go nochako ogero dalano manyien, mi gidakie." 
Judges18:29 Ne gichake ni Dan, nying kwargi ma wuod Israel. To nying dalano mokwongo ne Laish." 
Judges18:30 Bang’e jo-Dan nochungo kido manono cha mondo gilam, kendo Jonathan nyakwar Gershom ma wuod Musa, kaachiel gi yawuote kod nyikwaye, nobedo jodolo mag dhood Dan nyaka ndalo mane odarie jo-Israel, moter e tuech." 
Judges18:31 Kido manono mane Mika olosono nosiko kuno ndalo duto mane od Nyasaye ni Shilo. 
Judges19:1 E ndalo mane piny Israel pok obedo gi ruoth, ja-Lawi moro nodak mabor e chuny gode mag Efraim. Nokendo nyako moro ma nyar Bethlehem-Juda." 
Judges19:2 To nyakono nodhaw kode, moweye, kendo odok dalagi Bethlehem. Kane osebet kuno kuom kinde ma dirom dueche ang’wen," 
Judges19:3 chwore noluwo bang’e mondo odwoke dala. Nokawo jatichne gi kenjene ariyo, modhigo. Kane ochopo, chiegeno nomose, mokele e od wuon mare, mi wuon mare norwake gi mor." 
Judges19:4 Jaduong’neno nogeng’e, mi noriyo kuno kuom ndalo adek, korite maber." 
Judges19:5 Chieng’ mar ang’wen ne gichiew chon, mi giikore mondo gia. To wuon nyako nowacho ni ore niya, “Rit chiemo, icham, mondo iyud teko. Eka bang’e inyalo a.”" 
Judges19:6 Omiyo ji ariyogo nobet piny, mochiemo kendo ometho. Eka wuon nyako nowacho ni ore niya, “Yie mondo iri, imed nenowa.”" 
Judges19:7 To ja-Lawi nochung’ mondo ochak wuoth. Kata kamano, jaduong’ne nomedo kwaye mondo ori, omiyo noyie, monindo kanyo kendo." 
Judges19:8 Chieng’ mar abich nochiew gokinyi mondo odhi, to jaduong’ne nowachone niya, “Rit mondo igagi mondi.” Kamano ji ariyogo nobet piny mi ochiemo kendo ometho, mi gibudho nyaka odhiambo." 
Judges19:9 Bang’e ng’atno nochung’ mondo oa gi chiege kod jatichne, to jaduong’ne nochako owacho niya, “Ok ine ka sa koro ng’eny, kendo piny dwaro yuso? Omiyo ri, mondo inewa kendo, to kiny inyalo chiew gokinyi, mondo idog thuru.”" 
Judges19:10 To ng’atno ne ok dwar riyo kendo, omiyo nochung’ momako wuoth, kaachiel gi chiege kod kenjene." 
Judges19:11 Ne gichopo Jebus, (ma tinde iluongo ni, Jerusalem), ka piny dwaro yuso, mi jatichne nopenje niya, “Ere gima monowa bworo e dala jo-Jebus ka?”" 
Judges19:12 To ruodhe nodwoke niya, “Ok wanyal bworo e dala ma ok mar jo-Israel." 
Judges19:13 Omiyo bi wadhi wabuor Gibea kata Rama.” 
Judges19:14 Kamano ne giwuotho mi gikadho Jebus, kendo ne gichopo Gibea e piny jo-Benjamin ka chieng’ podho." 
Judges19:15 Ne gibaro, mi gidonjo e dalano mondo gibworie, to ne gibet mana e laru manie dier dala, nikech onge ng’ama norwakogi mondo ginind e ode." 
Judges19:16 E sano, jaduong’ moro nobiro kanyo koa e puothe. Ne en ja piny gode mag Efraim, to kata kamano nodak Gibea ma en dala jo-Benjamin." 
Judges19:17 Noting’o wang’e moneno ng’at ma jawuothno, mi nopenje kuma oaye kendo kuma odhiye." 
Judges19:18 Ng’atno nodwoke niya, “Waa Bethlehem-Juda, to wadhi mabor e chuny gode mag Efraim, kuma adakie. Nyocha adhi Bethlehem-Juda to koro adok dala. Kata kamano onge ng’ama oserwaka mondo abwor e ode." 
Judges19:19 Wan gi lum kod chiemo moko mag kenjewa. Bende wan gi chiemo kod divai moromowa, kendo onge gimoro mwachando.”" 
Judges19:20 Jaduong’no nowachone niya, “Ber. Biuru oda. Abiro ritou maber. Kik unind e laru ka.”" 
Judges19:21 Kamano nokawogi, moterogi e ode, kendo nomiyo kenjegi lum. Welogo nolwoko tiendegi, mi gichiemo kendo gimetho." 
Judges19:22 Eka sa mane gichiemono, ne gipo ka jodalano moko ma acheje obiro, molworo ot ka goyo dhoot, kendo wacho ni jaduong’ ma wuon ot niya, “Golnwa ng’at mane obiro kodi cha mondo waterrego.”" 
Judges19:23 To jaduong’no nodwoko, mowacho niya, “Ooyo jowadwa, kik utim gima achach marach kamano, nikech ng’atni wendona." 
Judges19:24 Neuru nyara ma pok ong’eyo chwo eri, kendo chi ng’at onogo bende eri. Weuru agolnugi oko mondo uterru kodgi kendo utim kodgi gimoro amora mudwaro. To kik utim gima lich kamano ni ng’atni.”" 
Judges19:25 To jogo nodagi winje. Omiyo ja-Lawino nogolo chiege oko momiyogi. Ne ginindo kode gi thwon, ka gidwanye nyaka kogwen, eka ne giweye odhi." 
Judges19:26 Dhakono nodwogo ka piny yawore, mopodho e dhood ng’at cha, kama chwore ne nitie, kendo noriere kanyo nyaka piny oru." 
Judges19:27 Chwore nochiew gokinyi, kendo kane oyawo dhoot mondo ochak wuodhe, noyudo ka chiege oriere e nyim dhoot." 
Judges19:28 Nowachone niya, “Chungi, mondo wadhi.” To ne ok odwoke. Omiyo nokawo ringre chiege moriwo e kanje, kendo nochako wuoth." 
Judges19:29 Kane ochopo dala, nokawo pala, mopogo ringre chiegeno migepe apar gariyo, mi noorogi e piny Israel duto." 
Judges19:30 Nowacho ni joma nooro ni mondo openj jo-Israel duto kama: “Bende gima kama osetimoree kata oseneye chakre ndalo mane jo-Israel owuokie Misri nyaka chil kawuono? Paruru wachni, kendo uchiw parou.” Kamano ng’ato ka ng’ato ma nonenogi nowacho niya, “Gima chal kama pok otimore kata pok one nyaka nene!”" 
Judges20:1 Jo-Israel duto, chakre Dan nyaka Beer-sheba, kaachiel gi Gilead, noyworo ni lweny, mochokore Mizpa e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye maonge ng’at modong’." 
Judges20:2 Dhout Israel duto, kaachiel gi jodonggi nobiro e chokruok maduong’ mar jo-Nyasayeno, ka gin jolweny alufu mia ang’wen." 
Judges20:3 Mi jo-Benjamin nowinjo ni jo-Isarel osedhi Mizpa. Jo-Israel nopenjo niya, “Ere kaka gima rach machalo kama notimore?”" 
Judges20:4 Ja-Lawi mane oneg chiege cha nodwoko niya, “Noyudo wan e wuoth gi chiega, mi ne wabuoro Gibea e piny Benjamin." 
Judges20:5 To jo-dalano nobiro mondo omonja gotienono, mi gilworo ot mane antie, ka gidwaro nega. Eka ne ginindo gi chiega gi thwon, motho." 
Judges20:6 Bang’e nakawo ringre, mi apogo kidienje kidienje, kendo naoro sidienjego e piny Israel duto, nikech jogo osetimo tim mochido kendo makuero e Israel." 
Judges20:7 Koro en wachu, un jo-Israel, mondo upar ane gima onego utim.”" 
Judges20:8 Mi ji duto nochung’ rat, mowacho niya, “Onge kata ng’ato achiel kuomwa ma biro dok e hembe kata ode." 
Judges20:9 To ma e gima nyaka watim: Wabiro yiero jomoko gi ombulu, mondo omonj Gibea." 
Judges20:10 To achiel kuom apar mar jo-Israel duto biro choko chiemo kuom ji ni joma kedo. Jomoko duto modong’ biro dhi chulo kuor ni jo-Gibea kuom tim marach kendo makuero ma gisetimo e Israel.” 
Judges20:11 Kamano jo-Israel nowuok gi chuny achiel mondo omonj dalano. 
Judges20:12 Dhout Israel nooro joote e piny jo-Benjamin, ka giwacho niya. “Mano tim marach manade musetimo!" 
Judges20:13 Miwauru joma acheje man Gibeago mondo waneg: kamano wabiro pwodho Israel kuom tim marachno.” To jo-Benjamin notamore winjo wach jo-Israel wetegi. 
Judges20:14 Ne giwuok e miechgi duto, mi gibiro Gibea mondo giked gi jo-Isarel." 
Judges20:15 Chieng’no jolweny alufu piero ariyo gauchiel moa e miech Benjamin noyworo ni lweny. To bende ne nitie jo-Gibea mia abiriyo moyier," 
Judges20:16 ma jo-orujre ma rachembe kendo ma josaba, ma nyalo goyo kata mana yie wich ma ok obayo." 
Judges20:17 Jolwenj Israel marateke ma nochokore noromo alufu mia ang’wen ma onge jo-Benjamin. 
Judges20:18 Jo-Israel nowuok modhi Bethel, mi gipenjo Nyasaye wach niya, “Ere dhoot monego kuong dhi monjo jo-Benjamin?” Ruoth Nyasaye nodwoko ni, “Dhood Juda ema mondo okuong monjogi.”" 
Judges20:19 Kuom mano, jo-Israel nowuok kogwen mojot kuma omanyore gi Gibea." 
Judges20:20 Ne gisudo machiegni gi dalano mondo giked gi jo-Benjamin, kendo ne giriedo jolwenjgi kanyo." 
Judges20:21 Jo-Benjamin nowuok Gibea, morado gi jo-Israel kuno, kendo ne ginego jolwenj jo-Israel alufu piero ariyo gariyo chieng’no." 
Judges20:22 Jo-Israel nodok Bethel moywak e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye nyaka odhiambo, ka gipenje niya, “Ber mondo waked gi jowetewa ma jo-Benjamin kendo koso?” Ruoth Nyasaye nodwokogi niya “Ee, ber, keduru kodgi kendo.”" 
Judges20:23  
Judges20:24 Kamano jo-Israel nojiwore, mochako oriedo mana kama ne giriedoe chieng’ mokwongo. Ne gimonjo jo-Benjamin kendo mar ariyo." 
Judges20:25 Jo-Benjamin nowuok Gibea. Mi chieng’no ne ginego ji alufu apar gaboro, ma duto ne gin jolweny marateke." 
Judges20:26 Eka jo-Israel duto nodok Bethel, mi gibet kuno e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, ka gilemo kendo giriyo kech nyaka odhiambo. Ne gitimo ni Ruoth Nyasaye misengni miwang’o pep, kod misengni mag sawo." 
Judges20:27 E ndalono Sandug Muma mar Nyasaye ne ni kuno," 
Judges20:28 kendo Finehas wuod Eleazar ma wuod Harun ne e jadolo e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye. Jo-Israel nopenjo Nyasaye niya, “Wadog mondo waked gi owetewa ma jo-Benjamin, koso wawe?” Ruoth Nyasaye nodwoko niya, “Monjgiuru, kendo kiny nachiwgi e lwetu.”" 
Judges20:29 Mi jo-Israel noketo ji obuto, molworo Gibea duto." 
Judges20:30 Chieng’ mar adek, jo-Israel nodhi kedo gi jo-Benjamin, kendo ne giriedo jolwenjgi Gibea, mana kaka ne gisetimo mokwongo." 
Judges20:31 Jo-Benjamin nowuok mondo orad kodgi, mi giyware mabor gi dala. Ne gichako nego jo-Israel kaka ne gisetimo mokwongo. Ne ginego ji moromo piero adek e pap, moko e yo madhi Bethel, to moko e yo madhi Gibea." 
Judges20:32 Jo-Benjamin ne paro ni gibiro loyo jo-Israel mana kaka pile, to kata kamano jo-Israel nosechano mondo oyondhgi giwuog oko e wang’ yore madongo." 
Judges20:33 Thoth jolwenj Israel nowuok kuonde mane gintie, mi gichokore kanyakla Baal-Tamar, to joma oyier alufu apar nothinyore kowuok kuonde mane gisebutoe machiegni gi Gibea," 
Judges20:34 mi gimonjo dalano, ka gia yo wuok chieng’. Lweny nodoko mager, to jo-Benjamin ne pok ong’eyo ni ibiro tiekogi." 
Judges20:35 Kamano Ruoth Nyasaye nomiyo jo-Israel oloyo jo-Benjamin, kendo ne ginegogi alufu piero ariyo gabich gi mia achiel chieng’no." 
Judges20:36 Mi jo-Benjamin nong’eyo ni kara ologi. Jo-Israel noseringo e nyim jo-Benjamin mondo oyondhgi, nikech ne ging’eyo ni jogi ma obuto kolworo Gibea biro konyogi." 
Judges20:37 Joma nobutogo nowuok mothinyore Gibea koni gi koni, mi ginego ji duto mane nie dalano." 
Judges20:38 Jo-Israel noyudo osewinjore gi jogi mane obuto ni ka gineno iro madum e dalano kochomo polo, to mano biro bedonigi ranyisi" 
Judges20:39 ni onego gilokre gichom lweny tir. Kane jo-Benjamin osenego ji moromo piero adekgo, mi giparo ni giloyo jo-Isarel kaka ne gisetimo mokwongo," 
Judges20:40 iro nodum e dala, kochomo polo. E sano ne gigoyo machiemo, mi gineno ka dala duto wang’." 
Judges20:41 Omiyo jo-Israel nolokore gi jo-Benjamin, mi luoro maduong’ nomako jo-Benjamin, ka gifwenyo ni kara oselogi." 
Judges20:42 Ne giringo jo-Israel, ka gichiko yo thim, to ne ok ginyal yombo, nimar thoth jolwenj jo-Isarel nothung’ogi, to bende jo-Israel ma noa e dalano nopodho kuomgi gi kang’egi, monegogi." 
Judges20:43 Ne giromo jo-Benjamin koni gi koni, mi giriembogi ka ginegogi nyaka ne gichopo kamoro man yo wuokchieng’ mar Gibea." 
Judges20:44 Jolwenj jo-Benjamin marateke alufu apar gaboro nonegi. 
Judges20:45 Joma notony noringo kochomo Lwanda Rimon, to ji alufu abich kuomgi noneg e yo. Jo-Israel nolawo joma nodong’, monego alufu piero ariyo moko kendo." 
Judges20:46 Kamano jolwenj jo-Benjamin marateke mane oneg chieng’no noromo alufu piero ariyo gabich. 
Judges20:47 To ji mia auchiel notony, moringo odhi e thim nyaka Lwanda Rimon, mi gidak kuno kuom dueche ang’wen." 
Judges20:48 Jo-Israel noduogo chien momonjo jo-Benjamin ma nodong’, mi ginego ji gi jamni mane nie miechgi, kod gik moko duto mane ginwang’o, kendo mier duto mane gidhiye, ne giwang’o gi mach." 
Judges21:1 Kane jo-Israel ni Mizpa, ne gisekuong’ore ni onge ng’ato kuomgi ma noyie mondo ja-Benjamin okend nyare." 
Judges21:2 Koro ne gibiro Bethel, mi gibet kanyo e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye nyaka odhiambo ka giywak matek." 
Judges21:3 Ne gipenjo Ruoth Nyasaye niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel, ang’o motimore e Israel, momiyo Israel achiel lal kama?”" 
Judges21:4 Kinyne gokinyi, ji nochiew chon, mogero kendo-mar-misango kanyo, mi gitimoe misengni miwang’o pep kod misengni mag sawo." 
Judges21:5 Ne gipenjore kendgi ka nitie jomoko kuom dhout Israel mane ok obiro e chokruok mar Ruoth Nyasaye, nikech ne gisekuong’ore matek ni nyaka neg ng’ato ang’ata mane ok obiro Mizpa e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Judges21:6 Ne gikuyo, ka giparo owetegi ma jo-Benjamin, mi giwacho niya, “Kawuono dhood Israel achiel oselal." 
Judges21:7 Ere gima dwatim mondo wayud mon ni jo dhoodno modong’ nikech ne wakuong’ore e nyim Nyasaye ni ok wayie mondo gikend nyiwa.” 
Judges21:8 Mano emomiyo ne gipenjore ka nitie jomoko kuom dhout Israel mane ok obiro Mizpa e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye. To nobedo ni onge ja-Jabesh-gilead mane obiro e chokruokno," 
Judges21:9 omiyo kane okwan ji, to ne oyud ni onge ja-Jabesh-gilead kata achiel kanyo." 
Judges21:10 Omiyo jo-Israel nooro jogi ma jochir alufu apar gariyo, ka gichikogi niya, “Dhiuru Jabesh-gilead mondo uneg joma odakie, chwo gi mon kod nyithindo." 
Judges21:11 Neguru chwo gi mon duto, to kik uneg nyiri ma pok ong’eyo chwo.” Mi jogo nodhi, motimo kamano." 
Judges21:12 Ne giyudo nyi Jabesh-gilead mia ang’wen ma pok ong’eyo chwo, mi gikelogi e kambi man Shilo e piny Kanaan." 
Judges21:13 Bang’e jo-Israel duto nooro joote mondo odhi ir jo-Benjamin mane ni e bur lwanda man Rimon, mondo olos kodgi winjruok." 
Judges21:14 Eka jo-Benjamin-go noduogo, mi jo-Israel nomiyogi nyi Jabesh-gilead mane ok ginego kande. To kata kamano ne ginok, ma ok giromo jo-Benjamin-go." 
Judges21:15 Chuny jo-Israel ne pod ywago jo-Benjamin, nikech Ruoth Nyasaye nosemiyo nying jomoko olal kuom dhout Israel." 
Judges21:16 Kuom mano, jodong Israel nowacho niya, “Koro watim ang’o mondo wayud mon ni joma odong’gi, nikech mond jo-Benjamin duto osenegi?" 
Judges21:17 Nyaka wayud mon ni jo-Benjamin modong’, mondo kik nyinggi lal," 
Judges21:18 to ok wanyal yienigi mondo gikend nyiwa, nikech wasekuong’ore ni nokuong’ ng’at momiyo ja-Benjamiin nyare okendo.”" 
Judges21:19 Bang’e ne giparo ni Sap Ruoth Nyasaye mitimo Shilo higa ka higa biro timore machiegni. (Shilo ni yo nyandwat mar Bethel, kendo en yo milambo mar Lebona, to kendo en yo wuok chieng’ mar yo moa Bethel, kadhi Shekem.)" 
Judges21:20 Omiyo ne giwacho ni jo-Benjamin niya, “Dhiuru mondo ubuti e puothe mzabibu," 
Judges21:21 kendo urit une ka nyi Shilo wuok dhi miel e nyasi. Eka uwuogi, mondo ng’ato ka ng’ato kuomu omak nyako moro gi thwon, odoggo e piny Benjamin mondo obed chiege." 
Judges21:22 Ka wuonegi kata owetegi obiro iru mondo ogolgi, to unyalo wachonigi niya, ‘Yieuru wakendgi, nikech ne ok wamayougi e lweny mondo gibed mondewa. To bende ne ok umiyowagi, omiyo pok uketho singruok ma dikelnu bura!’ ”" 
Judges21:23 Mi jo-Benjamin notimo kamano. Ng’ato ka ng’ato nomako nyako kuom nyiri mane mielgo, modhigo mondo obed chiege. Bang’e ne gidok e pinygi giwegi, mi gichako gigero mier, gidakie." 
Judges21:24 To jo-Israel mamoko bende noke, modok kuom dhoutgi kendo kuom joodgi e miechgi giwegi." 
Judges21:25 E ndalogo Israel ne pok obedo gi ruoth, kendo ng’ato ka ng’ato ne timo mana gima ohero." 
Ruth1:1 E ndalo mane jobura rito piny Israel kech nowuok, mi ng’at moro ma ja-Bethlehem-Juda nodhi gi chiege kod yawuote ariyo mondo odag e piny Moab." 
Ruth1:2 Nying ng’atno ne Elimelek, kendo nying chiege ne Naomi, to nying yawuote ne Malon kod Kilion. Ne gin jo-Efratha man Bethlehem-Juda. Ne gichopo e piny Moab mi gidak kuno." 
Ruth1:3 To Elimelek chwor Naomi notho, moweye gi yawuote ariyo." 
Ruth1:4 Yawuotego nokendo nyi Moab, ma nyinggi Orpa gi Ruth. Ne gidak kuno kuom higni ma dirom apar." 
Ruth1:5 Bang’e Malon gi Kilion ne jotho, mi Naomi nodong’ maonge yawuote gi chwore." 
Ruth1:6 Kane Naomi pod ni e piny Moab, nowinjo kaka Ruoth Nyasaye oseparo joge, momiyo chiemo. Omiyo nochako wuoth gi mond yawuote mondo oa kuno, odog thurgi." 
Ruth1:7 Kamano nowuok oa kuma ne entieno, kaachiel gi mond yawuote, mi gimako yo ma dok e piny Juda." 
Ruth1:8 To nowachonigi niya, “Ng’ato ka ng’ato kuomu mondo odog thurgi, kendo Ruoth Nyasaye mondo otimnu maber, mana kaka nutimona maber gi joga motho." 
Ruth1:9 Ruoth Nyasaye mondo oguedhu, kendo ng’ato ka ng’ato obed mamor e ode kokende.” To kane ogoyonigi oriti, ne gichako ywak matek," 
Ruth1:10 mi giwachone niya, “Ok kamano, to nyaka wadhi kodi ir jou.”" 
Ruth1:11 To Naomi nowachonigi niya, “Doguru nyiga. Ang’o ma dimi udhi koda? Bende pod danywol yawuowi ma dibed chwou?" 
Ruth1:12 Doguru nyiga nikech tinde ati, ok danyal bedo gi dichwo kendo. Ka da anyalo wacho ni ageno bedo gi dichwo gotienoni, kendo nywolo yawuowi," 
Ruth1:13 bende da uyie rito nyaka gidok madongo? Duritru mak okendu? Ooyo nyiga, an ema anie chandruok moloyo un, nimar Ruoth Nyasaye osekuma.”" 
Ruth1:14 Kane giwinjo kamano, ne gimedo ywak matek. Orpa nonyodho wuon odgi, moweye; Ruth to notuere kuome." 
Ruth1:15 Naomi nowacho ni Ruth niya, “Ne! Nyieki osedok thuru, kendo osedok ir nyisechegi. Dog iluw bang’e.”" 
Ruth1:16 To Ruth nodwoke niya, “Kik ichuna ni mondo apogra kodi, mi adog mak aluwi, nikech kuma idhiye ema nadhiye, kendo kama idakie ema nadagie. Jou nobed jowa, kendo Nyasachu nobed Nyasacha." 
Ruth1:17 Kama nithoe ema nathoe, kendo kanyo ema noyikae. Ruoth Nyasaye mondo okweda ka wach moro opoga kodi, kata da obed mana tho.”" 
Ruth1:18 Kane Naomi oneno kaka Ruth oketo chunye mar dhi kode, noling’." 
Ruth1:19 Mon ariyogo nowuotho kanyakla nyaka Bethlehem. To kane gichopo kuno, dala duto nobwok, mi mond dalano nopenjore niya, “Ma bende Naomi adier?”" 
Ruth1:20 To Naomi nowachonigi niya, “Kik uluonga ni Naomi, tiende ni Ng’ama Mor, to luongauru ni Malit, nikech Ng’ama Nyalo Gik Moko Duto osetimona malit ahinya." 
Ruth1:21 Nene aa ka, ka ang’eny gi mwandu, to Ruoth Nyasaye oduoga nono. Uluonga ni Naomi nang’o, ka Ruoth Nyasaye ma Ng’ama Nyalo Gik Moko Duto, osekuma malit kama?”" 
Ruth1:22 Kamano e kaka Naomi noduogo koa e piny Moab gi chi wuode ma nyar Moab. Ne gichopo Bethlehem e ndalo michako kayoe shairi. 
Ruth2:1 Naomi ne nigi watne moro ma nyinge Boaz, ja dhoodgi Elimelek. Ne en ng’at ma rahuma, kendo ma japith." 
Ruth2:2 Chieng’ moro Ruth nyar Moab nowacho ni Naomi niya, “Yiena adhi mondo ahul cham bang’ ng’ato ang’ata moyie kecha.” Nodwoke niya, “Dhiyo, nyara.”" 
Ruth2:3 Omiyo nowuok modhi hulo cham e puodho bang’ jokeyo, kendo nopo kochopo e puoth Boaz, jadhoodgi Elimelek." 
Ruth2:4 To bang’e Boaz nobiro e puothe, koa Bethlehem, momoso jokeyo niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye obed kodu!” Ne gidwoke ni, “Ruoth Nyasaye oguedhi!”" 
Ruth2:5 Eka Boaz nopenjo jatichne mane rito jokeyo ni, “Mano nyar ng’a?”" 
Ruth2:6 Jatichneno nodwoke niya, “En nyar Moab, ma nobiro gi Naomi, koa e piny Moab cha." 
Ruth2:7 Nokwaya ni mondo ayiene ohul cham bang’ jokeyo e kind pidhe mosetue. Osebedo kotiyo ka chakre okinyi nyaka sani, ma ok oyue kata matin.”" 
Ruth2:8 Boaz nowacho ni Ruth niya, “Nyara winji. Kik idhi ihul e puoth ng’ato, bende kik ia ka, to bed mana kod jotichna ma nyiri." 
Ruth2:9 Ket wang’i mana e puodho ma gikeyoeni, kendo ihul bang’gi. Asekwero yawuowi ni kik gimuli. Kendo ka riyo oloyi, to dhi kar dapige, imodh pi ma jotich oumbo.”" 
Ruth2:10 Ruth nogoyo chonge piny, mokulore nyaka e lowo, kowachone niya, “Ang’o momiyo ipara, mikecha kama, to an wendo awenda?”" 
Ruth2:11 Boaz nodwoke niya, “Osenyisa malong’o gik moko duto misetimo ni wuon odu nyaka ne chwori tho, kendo kaka niweyo wuoru gi meru kod piny ma nonywolie, mibiro ir ji mane ok ing’eyo." 
Ruth2:12 Ruoth Nyasaye mondo ochuli kuom tichni, kendo iyud pok makare moa kuom Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel, ma nibiro e bwo tipone mondo iyud kar konyruok.”" 
Ruth2:13 Eka Ruth nowachone niya, “Itimona maber, ruoth, nikech ihoyo chunya, kendo iwuoyo koda maber, kata obedo ni ok an achiel kuom jotichni kamano.”" 
Ruth2:14 Kane sa chiemo ochopo, Boaz nowacho ni Ruth niya, “Bi ka, ichiem.” Omiyo nobet piny but jokeyo. Boaz nomiye shairi molodi, mi nochamo moyieng’ nyaka moko nodong’." 
Ruth2:15 Ka nowuok mondo odhi ohul cham, Boaz nogolo chik ni jotichne niya, “Weyeuru mondo ohul kata mana e kind tuche, kik ukwere." 
Ruth2:16 Bende ugol moko kuom mago mosechoki, uwene mondo ohul, kik utame.”" 
Ruth2:17 Kamano nohulo e puodho nyaka chieng’ opodho. Eka nodino shairi mosehulo, moromo depe ariyo." 
Ruth2:18 Noting’o chamgo motero dala, kendo nonyiso wuon odgi kar rombgi. Bende nogolone chiemo ma nochamo odong’, momiye." 
Ruth2:19 Wuon odgi nopenje niya, “Nihulo kanye kawuono? Nitiyo kune? Oguedh jalo mane opari!” Mi Ruth nonyise ni notiyo ka ng’at ma nyinge Boaz." 
Ruth2:20 Naomi nowachone niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye, osetimonwa ng’wono kod jowa motho, mondo oguedh jalo.” Eka nomedo wacho niya, “Jalo en watwa mahie.”" 
Ruth2:21 Ruth nowachone ni, “Bende nokona ni mondo ati but jotichne nyaka chieng’ ma gitieko keyone duto.”" 
Ruth2:22 Naomi nowachone niya, “En adier nyara, ber iluwri gi jotichne manyiri, nikech dipo kiyudo chandruok e puoth ng’ato.”" 
Ruth2:23 Omiyo Ruth nobedo ka tiyo but jotich Boaz manyiri, nyaka giko keyo mar shairi, gi mar ngano bende, kodak gi wuon odgi." 
Ruth3:1 Bang’e Naomi nowacho ni Ruth niya, “Nyara, onego ayudni kar dak, mondo ibed maber." 
Ruth3:2 Ing’eyo ni Boaz mane ibet kitiyo but jotichne manyiri cha, en watwa. Awinjo ni ang’ nopiedh shairi gotienoni kar dinone." 
Ruth3:3 Omiyo lwokri, kendo iwirri gi mo. Rwak lepi mabeyo, ilor idhi kuno. To kik iwe ong’eyi, ka pok ochiemo kendo ometho." 
Ruth3:4 Kodhi nindo, to ng’i kama onindoe. Bang’e idonj kanyo, iel gir um gi yo ka tiende, kendo inind kanyono. Obiro wachoni gima onego itim.”" 
Ruth3:5 Ruth nodwoke ni, “Duto miwachona, abiro timo.”" 
Ruth3:6 Ruth nodhi kar dino motimo duto mane wuon odgi owachone. 
Ruth3:7 Kane Boaz osechiemo kendo ometho morome, nodhi monindo but pidh cham. Eka Ruth nolidho, moelo gir um gi yo ka tiende, kendo onindo kanyo." 
Ruth3:8 Odiewuor tir, gimoro nobwogo Boaz, mochiew. To ka nolokore, nopo konwang’o dhako moro konindo yo ka tiende!" 
Ruth3:9 Nopenje ni, “In ng’a?” Ruth nodwoke ni, “An Ruth, jatichni ma nyako. Yar gir um mondo iuma, nikech in e ng’at monego tera.”" 
Ruth3:10 Boaz nowachone niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye oguedhi, nyara! Gima itimo kawuononi nyiso long’o maber moloyo ma nitimo ni wuon odu, nikech ok iseluwo bang’ wuowi moro ma jachan kata ma japith." 
Ruth3:11 Koro nyara, kik iluor. Abiro timoni duto miwacho, nikech jodalawa duto ong’eyo ni in nyako makare." 
Ruth3:12 Adier an jadhoodu mahie, to nitie wadu moro mahie moloya." 
Ruth3:13 Bed ka gotienoni, to kiny gokinyi, ka jalo nyalo timoni gima jadhoodu mahie onego tim, to ber, mondo otim kamano. To ka ok oyie timo kamano, to akuong’ora gi nying Ruoth Nyasaye, ni abiro timoni kamano. Koro nindi nyaka okinyi.”" 
Ruth3:14 Omiyo Ruth nonindo ka tiende nyaka huyuhuyu piny, to noa malo ka pod ng’ato ok nyal ng’eyo wadgi. Boaz nowachone niya, “Kik ng’ere ni dhako moro nende obiro kar nindo ka.”" 
Ruth3:15 Eka nomedo wachone niya, “Kel lawi mar abola, iyar.” Mi noyare, kendo Boaz noolone shairi ma dirom migerni auchiel, moyieye. Eka Ruth nodok dala." 
Ruth3:16 Kane oduogo, wuon odgi nopenje niya, “Wach odhi nadi, nyara?” Ruth nonyise duto mane jagono otimone," 
Ruth3:17 kendo nowachone niya, “Magi e migerni auchiel mag shairi momiya, nikech nowachona ni kik aduog ir wuon odwa gi lweta nono.”" 
Ruth3:18 Naomi nowachone niya, “Bed mos nyara nyaka ing’e gima biro wuok e wachni, nikech ng’atno ok bi ling’ mak oloso wachni kawuono.”" 
Ruth4:1 Boaz nodhi e dhoranga Bethlehem, mobet piny. Bang’e noneno jadhoodgi mane osewuoyo kuome cha ka kadho kanyo, mowachone niya, “Akoni, bar ibi ku, ibed piny ka.” Kane osebiro, mobet piny," 
Ruth4:2 Boaz noluongo jodong dala apar, mowachonogi niya, “Un beduru ka.”" 
Ruth4:3 Eka nowacho ni jal ma jadhoodgino niya, “Ing’eyo ni Naomi oseduogo koa Moab. Koro odwaro loko puoth Elimelek owadwa." 
Ruth4:4 Omiyo naparo mondo anyisi wachno, kakwayi ni mondo ing’iewe e nyim joma obet ka, kendo e nyim jodongwa. Kiyie warogo, to ware. To ka ok idwar ware, to wachna mondo ang’e, nikech onge ng’at ma diware mak mana in, kata an.” Mi jadhoodgino nodwoke ni, “Abiro ware.”" 
Ruth4:5 Eka Boaz nowachone niya, “Chieng’ ming’iewoe puodhono kuom Naomi, to nyaka ikaw Ruth nyar Moab bende, ma chi jal ma notho mondo ichung wi ng’at mothono kuom mwandune.”" 
Ruth4:6 Jadhoodgino nodwoke niya, “Ka kamano, to ok anyal ware, nimar dipo kaketho mwanduna awuon. Ber mondo ikaw kara, iwar gino ma owinjore awar, nikech an ok anyal ware.”" 
Ruth4:7 E ndalo machon, jo-Israel ne nigi tim moro kuom wach waro gimoro kata loko gimoro. Ng’ato ne lonyo wuore, kendo miyo wadgi, mondo wachno obed gi teko. Mano e kaka jo-Israel ne miyo wach bedo gi teko e nyim joneno." 
Ruth4:8 Omiyo ng’at cha nolonyo wuor, kawacho ni Boaz niya, “Ero, in ema mondo ing’iew puodhono.”" 
Ruth4:9 Eka Boaz nowacho ni jodongo kod ji duto niya, “Un e joneno kawuono, kang’iewo kuom Naomi gik moko duto mane mag Elimelek gi mag Kilion kod mag Malon." 
Ruth4:10 Ruth nyar Moab, ma chi Malon bende akawo obed chiega, mondo achung wi jal mothono kuom mwandune, mondo kik nyinge lal kuom owetene, kata kuom dhoodgi.”" 
Ruth4:11 Eka jodongo, kaachiel gi ji duto mane nie dhorangach, nowacho niya, “Wan joneno. Ruoth Nyasaye mondo oguedh dhako ma donjo e odino, obed machal gi Rahel kod Lea, mon ariyo ma nogero dhood Israel. Bende in mondo iyud duong’ e Efratha, kendo ibed gi pak mathoth e Bethlehem." 
Ruth4:12 Nyithindo ma Ruoth Nyasaye omiyi gi dhani mondo omi dhoodi obed machal gi dhood Perez, wuod Tamar chi Juda.”" 
Ruth4:13 Kamano Boaz nokawo Ruth, mobedo chiege, mi Ruoth Nyasaye noguedhe, momako ich, kendo nonywolo wuowi." 
Ruth4:14 Bang’e mon nowacho ni Naomi niya, “Opak Ruoth Nyasaye tinende, ma ok oweyi nono. Koro in gi nyakwari. Nying nyathi mondo obed gi huma maduong’ e Israel." 
Ruth4:15 Nobedni ng’ama duogo chunyi, kendo ka ng’ama riti e tiyoni, nikech chi wuodi moherino, kendo moloyoni yawuowi abiriyo, ema osenywolo nyathini.”" 
Ruth4:16 Naomi nokawo nyathi, moriwo e kore, kendo nobedo japite." 
Ruth4:17 Mon wetene nochako nyathi nying ni Obed, kendo ne giwacho niya, “Osenywol ni Naomi nyathi.” En e wuon Jesse, ma wuon Daudi." 
Ruth4:18 Magi e tienge mag Perez: Perez nonywolo Hezron," 
Ruth4:19 to Hezron nonywolo Ram. Ram nonywolo Aminadab," 
Ruth4:20 to Aminadab nonywolo Nashon. Nashon nonywolo Salmon," 
Ruth4:21 to Salmon nonywolo Boaz. Boaz nonywolo Obed," 
Ruth4:22 to Obed nonywolo Jesse. To Jesse nonywolo Daudi. 
1Samuel1:1 Ne nitie ja-Ramathaim moro, ma ja-Zuf, mane odak e piny gode mag Efraim. Nyinge ne Elkana wuod Jeroham, wuod Elihu, wuod Tohu, wuod Zuf ma ja-Efraim." 
1Samuel1:2 Ne en gi mon ariyo, ma nyinggi Hana gi Penina. Penina ne nigi nyithindo, to Hana ne ongego." 
1Samuel1:3 Higa ka higa, ng’atni ne wuok e dalane, kadhi Shilo mondo olem kendo otim misango ni Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto. E ndalogo, noyudo ka Hofni gi Finehas, yawuot Eli, ne tiyo kuno ka jodolo mag Ruoth Nyasaye." 
1Samuel1:4 Kane Elkana timo misango, nopogo migepe mag ring misango ni chiege ma Penina kod yawuote gi nyige duto." 
1Samuel1:5 Nohero Hana, to kata kamano nomiye mana migawo achiel, nimar Ruoth Nyasaye ne ok omiye nyathi." 
1Samuel1:6 Nyiek Hana ne chando chuny Hana malit, konyiere nikech Ruoth Nyasaye ok omiye nyathi." 
1Samuel1:7 Wachni ne timore higa ka higa. Kane odhi e Od Ruoth Nyasaye, nyieke nosiko ka chande, omiyo noywak, kendo nokuno chiemo." 
1Samuel1:8 Chieng moro, Elkana chwore nopenje niya, “Hana, ang’o momiyo chunyi lit, kendo iywak kamano, ma ok inyal kata chiemo? Donge aberni moloyo yawuowi apar?”" 
1Samuel1:9 Kane gisetieko chiemo kod metho e sawo mane ni Shilo, Hana noa malo modhi ochung’ e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye. To noyudo ka Eli jadolo obet e kome but dhood Hekalu mar Ruoth Nyasaye." 
1Samuel1:10 Chuny Hana ne chandore, kendo nolamo Ruoth Nyasaye, koywakne malit." 
1Samuel1:11 Nokuong’ore kowacho niya, “A Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto, ka inine chandruokna, kendo ipara an jatichni, ma ok wiyi owil koda, mi imiya nyathi ma wuowi, to anachiwnigo, mondo obed mari ndalo duto mag ngimane, kendo mirich ok noka wiye.”" 
1Samuel1:12 Kane Hana pod lemo e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye kamano Eli to ne ng’iyo dhoge. 
1Samuel1:13 Hana ne lemo gi chunye. Kata obedo ni dwonde ne ok winji, to dhoge ne diemore, omiyo Eli ne paro ni omer," 
1Samuel1:14 mopenje niya, “Inimer nyaka karang’o? Kuer kong’o!”" 
1Samuel1:15 Hana nodwoke niya, “Ooyo jaduong’, an mana dhako ma chunye chandore. Ok asemadho kong’o kata gimoro ma nyalo mero ji, to achiwo chunya ni Ruoth Nyasaye." 
1Samuel1:16 Kik ikawa ka dhako machach. Ywagruok gi kuyo mogundho ema omiyo asewuoyo kamano kindeni duto.” 
1Samuel1:17 Eli nodwoke niya, “Dhiyo gi kue, kendo Nyasach Israel mondo omiyi gima isekwaye.”" 
1Samuel1:18 Hana nowachone niya, “Mad abed ng’ama owinjore gi ng’wononi.” Eka nodhi mochiemo, ka chunye ler." 
1Samuel1:19 Ne gichiew gokinyi mang’ich, kendo kane giselemo e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, ne gidok dalagi Rama. Elkana noriwore gi chiege ma Hana, mi Ruoth Nyasaye noparo Hana." 
1Samuel1:20 Nomako ich, kendo kane ndalo ogik, nonywolo wuowi, mi owacho niya, “Achake ni Samuel, nikech ne akwaye Ruoth Nyasaye.”" 
1Samuel1:21 Kane ndalo ochopo, Elkana gi joode duto nodhi timo ni Ruoth Nyasaye misango mar higa ka higa, kendo chopo singruokne." 
1Samuel1:22 Hana to ne ok odhi, to nowacho ni chwore niya, “Ok nadhi nyaka nyathi we dhoth, eka natere e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, mi nosik kuno.”" 
1Samuel1:23 Elkana chwore nokone niya, “Tim gima ineno ni ber. Rit nyaka nyathi we dhoth. To Ruoth Nyasaye mondo one ni ichopo singruokni.” Kamano Hana nodong’, kadhodho nyathine nyaka we dhoth." 
1Samuel1:24 Kane nyathi oseweyo dhoth, nodhi kode Shilo gi rwath ma hike adek, gi mogo ma dirom depe ariyo, gi divai e ndede mar pien, modonjo e od Ruoth Nyasaye." 
1Samuel1:25 Ne ginego rwadhno, eka Hana nokelo nyathi ir Eli," 
1Samuel1:26 mowacho niya, “A jaduong’, an e dhako mane ochung’ kalamo Ruoth Nyasaye cha." 
1Samuel1:27 Ne akwaye nyathini, kendo koro osemiyago kaka nakwaye." 
1Samuel1:28 Emomiyo an bende achiwe ni Ruoth Nyasaye, mondo obed jatichne ndalo duto mag ngimane.”" 
1Samuel2:1 Hana nolamo Ruoth Nyasaye, kowacho niya, “Chunya il gi Ruoth Nyasaye, nimar osemedo tekona. Achayo wasika, kendo amor nikech oseresa." 
1Samuel2:2 Onge nyasaye moro maler machal gi Ruoth Nyasaye, nikech onge moro, to mana en kende. Bende onge lwanda moro, machal gi Nyasachwa" 
1Samuel2:3 Weuru sungruok mukwarorugo, kendo ng’ayi kik wuog e dhou, nikech Ruoth Nyasaye en Nyasaye mong’eyo gik moko duto, kendo en ema opimo timbe dhano." 
1Samuel2:4 “Tunge mag joma rateke otur, to joma yomyom manore gi teko." 
1Samuel2:5 Joma ne yieng’ koro tiyo ni jomoko mondo oyud chiemo, to joma ne denyo koro yieng’. Dhako ma migumba onywolo nyithindo abiriyo, to en ma nyithinde ng’eny odong’ nono." 
1Samuel2:6 “Ruoth Nyasaye ema nego, kendo en ema ochiero. Oloro nyaka ei liel, bende ogolo oko." 
1Samuel2:7 Ruoth Nyasaye kelo dhier, kendo okelo mwandu. Odwoko piny, bende oting’o malo." 
1Samuel2:8 Ogolo jachan e buru, kendo oting’o ng’ama odhier a e pidh yugi, mondo omiye bedo e kom moyiedhi kaachiel gi ruodhi. Mise mar piny en mar Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo orenjo piny kuome." 
1Samuel2:9 Orito tiend joge ni kik chwanyre, to joricho lal e mudho, nikech teko ng’ato owuon ok nyal miye loch." 
1Samuel2:10 Joma piem gi Ruoth Nyasaye notur matindotindo, komiyo polo mor kuomgi. Ruoth Nyasaye ng’ado bura e tung’ piny gi tung’ piny. Enomi ruoth moyiero duong’, kendo nomede teko.”" 
1Samuel2:11 Bang’ mano nodok Rama, to nyathi nodong’, katiyo ni Ruoth Nyasaye e nyim Eli jadolo." 
1Samuel2:12 To yawuot Eli ne joma acheje, ma ok dew Ruoth Nyasaye." 
1Samuel2:13 E ndalogo gima jodolo ne timo ni jolemo ne chalo kama: kane ng’at moro timo misango, jatich jadolo ne biro gi uma ma lekene adek ka pod itedo ring’o." 
1Samuel2:14 Nonyumo umano e gima itedoe, kaka agulu, kata kabange, kata nyalaro. Ring’o duto mane lak uma omako ema ne jadolo kawo. Kamano e kaka ne gitimo ni jo-Israel duto ma nobiro Shilo." 
1Samuel2:15 To bende kane pok owang’ bor e kendo-mar-misango, jatich jadolo ne biro kawacho ni ng’at matimo misango niya, “Chiw ring’o mondo obul ni jadolo, nikech ok odwar ring’o motedi, to odwaro mana manumu.”" 
1Samuel2:16 To kapo ni ng’atno odwoke niya, “We mondo okwong owang’ bor, eka ikaw gima ihero,” to jatich ne wacho ni, “Ngang’! Miyago mana sani. To ka ok itimo kamano, to abiro kawo gi thwon.”" 
1Samuel2:17 Ketho mag yawuowigo ne dongo ahinya e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, nikech ne gichayo gima ochiw ni Ruoth Nyasaye." 
1Samuel2:18 Samuel ne tiyo e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye ka pod en nyathi, korwakore gi nanga mar katana." 
1Samuel2:19 Higa ka higa, min mare ne twang’one law matin, kendo kelone, kobiro gi chwore mondo otim misango mar higa." 
1Samuel2:20 Eli ne guedho Elkana gi chiege, kowacho niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye mondo omiyi nyithindo gi dhani kar mano misechiwone.” Kane oseguedhogi kamano, ne gidok thurgi." 
1Samuel2:21 Ruoth Nyasaye noparo Hana, mi nonywolo yawuowi adek gi nyiri ariyo. To nyathi ma Samuel nodongo e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye." 
1Samuel2:22 Eli koro noti ahinya. Nowinjo gik mane yawuote timo ni jo-Israel duto, kendo kaka ne giterore gi mon matiyo e dho Hemb Romo." 
1Samuel2:23 Omiyo nowachonigi niya, “Mar ang’o utimo gik ma kamagi? Asewinjo wach timbeu maricho e dho ji duto." 
1Samuel2:24 Ooyo yawuota, wach masewinjo ka jo-Ruoth Nyasaye wacho kuomu ok en wach maber." 
1Samuel2:25 Ka ng’ato oketho ni wadgi, Nyasaye nobedne jathek, to ka ng’ato oketho ni Ruoth Nyasaye to ere ng’ama nokonye?” To ne gidagi winjo dwond wuon-gi, nimar Ruoth Nyasaye noseng’ado ni mondo githo." 
1Samuel2:26 To nyathi ma Samuel nodongo, kendo Ruoth Nyasaye gi ji nomedo bedo mamor kode." 
1Samuel2:27 Ng’at Nyasaye moro nobiro ir Eli, monyise niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye owacho kama: ‘Nafwenyora ni kwaru kane en gi joode Misri e tuech e od Farao." 
1Samuel2:28 Ne ayiere kuom dhout Israel duto mondo obed jadolona, kendo odhi e kendona-mar-misango, otim misengni, kendo orwakre gi law dolo miluongo ni efod e nyima. Namiyo dhoodu misengni duto miwang’o ma jo-Isarel chiwo." 
1Samuel2:29 Ang’o momiyo koro uchayo misengni maga gi mich masechiko? Imiyo yawuoti duong’ moloyo an awuon, kiweyo gichamo lemo mabeyo mag mich ma joga Israel kelo, mi gidoko machwe." 
1Samuel2:30 Nasingora ni dhoodu ni ginitina nyaka chieng’. To koro awacho ni ok nobed kamano ngang’, nimar joma miya duong’ ema nami duong’, to jogo mochaya, ok nokwan ka gimoro." 
1Samuel2:31 Ndalo biro ma anang’adie tekoni oko gi teko mar dhoodu bende, nyaka chieng’." 
1Samuel2:32 Eka e chandruokni inine mwandu duto ma Nyasaye omiyo jo-Isarel, kendo inigombi, to onge ng’at ma noru e dhoodi nyaka chieng’." 
1Samuel2:33 Anatiek jogi duto matiyo e kendona-mar-misango, mak mana ja-dhoodi achiel ema nodong’, kaywak, kendo ka chunye chandore. To thoth jogi nonegi." 
1Samuel2:34 Gima notimre ni yawuoti ariyo, ma Hofni gi Finehas, nobedni ranyisi. Ginitho giduto chieng’ achiel." 
1Samuel2:35 Mi anaket jadolona awuon, ng’at ma jaadiera, ma notim duto manie chunya gi parona. Anagur dhoode mondo nyikwaye oti nyaka chieng’ ni Ruoth mayiero mowir." 
1Samuel2:36 Jo-dhoodi duto ma nodong’ ka ngima nobi ire, kakwaye fedha matin, kata kuon matin. Giniwach niya, “Asayi, keta e tich kama jadolo moro tiyoe, mondo ayudie gima dacham.” ’ ”" 
1Samuel3:1 Nyathi ma Samuel ne tiyo ni Ruoth Nyasaye e nyim Eli. To weche mane wuok kuom Ruoth Nyasaye ne nok ndalogo, kendo ne ok fwenyre pile." 
1Samuel3:2 Ndalogo wang’ Eli nosechako imore, ma ok onyal neno maber. Chieng’ moro Eli ne nindo kare mar nindo." 
1Samuel3:3 Samuel bende nosenindo e Hekalu mar Ruoth Nyasaye, kama Sanduk mar Nyasaye ne nitie. To kane taya mar Nyasaye pok otho," 
1Samuel3:4 Ruoth Nyasaye noluongo Samuel, mi Samuel nodwoko ni, “Antie.”" 
1Samuel3:5 Eka noringo odhi ir Eli, mowachone niya, “Iluonga; era e.” To Eli nowachone niya, “Ok aluongi. Dog inindi.” Mi nodok monindo." 
1Samuel3:6 Ruoth Nyasaye noluonge kendo niya, “Samuel.” Mi Samuel nochung’, kendo odhi ir Eli, mowachone ni, “Era e, nikech iluonga.” To nodwoke ni, “Ooyo wuoda, ok aluongi. Dog inindi.”" 
1Samuel3:7 Noyudo ka Samuel pok ong’eyo Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo wach Ruoth Nyasaye ne pok ofwenyorene," 
1Samuel3:8 omiyo, kane Ruoth Nyasaye oluongo Samuel kendo luong mar adek, nochung’ kendo odhi ir Eli, mowachone niya, “Era e, nikech Iluonga.” Eli nofwenyo ni kara Ruoth Nyasaye ema luongo nyathino." 
1Samuel3:9 Omiyo nowacho ni Samuel niya, “Dhiyo inindi, to koluongi kendo, to iwach niya, ‘Wachi, Ruoth Nyasaye, jatichni winjo.’ ” Samuel nodok, monindo." 
1Samuel3:10 Eka Ruoth Nyasaye nobiro mochung’ kanyo, kendo oluongo Samuel kaka noseluonge mokwongo niya, “Samuel, Samuel.” Eka Samuel nodwoko ni, “Wachi, jatichni winjo.”" 
1Samuel3:11 Mi Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Samuel niya, “Abiro timo gimoro e Israel ma ng’ato ang’ata mowinjo to ite nopopni." 
1Samuel3:12 E ndalono anachop weche duto te mane awacho kuom Eli gi dhoode. 
1Samuel3:13 Nyaka iwachne ni abiro ng’ado ni dhoode bura mosiko, nikech nong’eyo ni yawuote yanyo Nyasaye, to ne ok okwerogi." 
1Samuel3:14 Emomiyo akuong’ora ni dhood Eli ni, misango kata chiwo ok nopwodh richogi.”" 
1Samuel3:15 Samuel nonindo nyaka okinyi, eka nochiew, moyawo dhood Hekalu mar Ruoth Nyasaye, to noluoro nyiso Eli fwenyruokno." 
1Samuel3:16 Eli noluonge, mowachone niya, “Samuel wuoda.” Nodwoke ni, “Era e,.”" 
1Samuel3:17 Eli nopenje niya, “Wach ang’o ma Ruoth Nyasaye onyisi? Asayi, kik ipandago. Nyasaye mondo okwedi kipanda wach moro kuom weche duto ma nowachoni.”" 
1Samuel3:18 Mi Samuel nonyise duto te, ma ok opande kata wach achiel. Eli nowacho niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye mondo otim gima oneno ni ber.”" 
1Samuel3:19 Kane Samuel dongo, Ruoth Nyasaye ne ni kode, kendo weche duto mane okoro, Ruoth Nyasaye ne ochopo kare." 
1Samuel3:20 Kamano jo-Israel duto, chakre Dan nyaka Beer-sheba, nong’eyo koseket Samuel mondo obed janabi mar Ruoth Nyasaye." 
1Samuel3:21 Ruoth Nyasaye nomedo fwenyore Shilo, nikech kanyo ema nosefwenyoree ni Samuel. Kamano wach Samuel nobedo gi teko e piny Israel duto." 
1Samuel4:1 E ndalogo, jo-Filistia nochokore mondo omonj jo-Israel, kendo jo-Israel nowuok mondo oked kodgi. Jo-Israel nojot Ebenezer, to jo-Filistia nojot Afek." 
1Samuel4:2 Jo-Filistia noyaro ni lweny momanyore gi jo-Israel, kendo kane girado, jo-Filistia noloyo jo-Israel, mi ginego jogi ma dirom alufu ang’wen e paw lweny." 
1Samuel4:3 Kane jolweny oduogo e kambi, jodong Israel nopenjore niya, “Marang’o Ruoth Nyasaye omiyo jo-Filistia oloyowa kawuono? Wadhiuru Shilo waom Sandug Muma mar Ruoth Nyasaye wabedgo, mondo oreswa e lwet wasikwa.”" 
1Samuel4:4 Omiyo ne gioro wach Shilo, mi gikelo Sandug Muma mar Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto, ma en Nyasaye mobet ewi kerubi. Hofni gi Finehas, ma yawuot Eli, ema nobiro gi Sandug Muma." 
1Samuel4:5 Kane Sandug Muma mar Ruoth Nyasaye obiro e kambi, jo-Israel duto nokok matek, ma piny omor." 
1Samuel4:6 Kane jo-Filistia owinjo kokono, ne gipenjore niya, “Mano koko manade matimore e kambi jo-Hibraniano?” To kane giwinjo ni Sanduk mar Ruoth Nyasaye osechopo e kambi," 
1Samuel4:7 ne gidoko maluor mi giwacho niya, “Nyisechegi osebiro e kambigi!” Bende ne giwacho niya, “Yaye! Nyaka nene gima kama pok notimore." 
1Samuel4:8 Yaye! Ng’ano ma noreswa e lwet nyiseche maratekegi? Gin nyiseche ma nosando jo-Misri gi masiche mayoreyore e thim. 
1Samuel4:9 Jiwreuru ubed ka chwo, un jo-Filistia, mondo kik ubed ka wasumb jo-Hibrania, kaka gisebedonu. Beduru ka chwo, kendo keduru!”" 
1Samuel4:10 Jo-Filistia nokedo gi jo-Israel, mi giloyo, kendo jo-Israel duto noringo odok e miechgi. Ne ologi marach, kendo jogi ma dirom alufu adek notho." 
1Samuel4:11 Sanduk mar Nyasaye nokaw, kendo Hofni gi Finehas, ma yawuot Eli, bende nonegi." 
1Samuel4:12 Ja-Benjamin moro noringo oa e lweny, mobiro Shilo chieng’onogo, koyiecho lepe, kendo obuko wiye buru." 
1Samuel4:13 E sa ma nochopoe, Eli noyudo obet e kom e dir yo, kang’icho, nikech chunye ne ridore, koparo Sanduk mar Nyasaye. Kane jalo odonjo e dala, monyiso ji wach, dala duto noywak," 
1Samuel4:14 Eli nowinjo ywak, mopenjo ni, “Mano koko manade?” Ng’atno nodhi ire kareto, monyise wach." 
1Samuel4:15 Eli koro ne jahigni piero ochiko gaboro, kendo wang’e noyuso mane ok onyal neno." 
1Samuel4:16 Jalo nowachone niya, “An ng’at moa e lweny. Aringo lweny mana kawuono.” Eli nopenje niya, “Wuoda, lweny dhi nadi?”" 
1Samuel4:17 Ng’atno nodwoke niya, “Jo-Israel oringo jo-Filistia, kendo oseneggi gi nek malich. Hofni gi Finehas yawuoti, bende josetho. Kendo Sanduk mar Nyasaye osekaw.”" 
1Samuel4:18 Kane Eli owinjo wach Sanduk mar Nyasaye, nogore piny ataro, koa e kom ma nobetie but rangach, mi ng’ute notur, motho nikech ne en jaduong’ moti, kendo nopek. Nosebedo jang’ad bura ni jo-Israel kuom higni piero ang’wen." 
1Samuel4:19 Noyudo ka chi Finehas ma wuod Eli nigi ich, mogik nywol. To kane owinjo ni Sanduk mar Nyasaye osekaw, kendo kwar mare kod chwore josetho, nopo ka muoch kaye, mi nobet piny monywol." 
1Samuel4:20 To nohewore ahinya modwaro tho, mi mon mane chole nokone niya, “Kik iluor, isenywolo wuowi.” To ne ok odwoko wach, kata dewo ne ok odewo." 
1Samuel4:21 Nochako nyathi ni Ikabod, (tiende ni, maonge duong’) kowacho niya, “Duong’ osea kuom Israel.” Nowacho kamano nikech Sanduk mar Nyasaye nosekaw, kendo kwar mare gi chwore ne josetho." 
1Samuel4:22 Mano emomiyo nowacho ni, “Duong’ osea kuom Israel, nikech Sanduk mar Nyasaye osekaw.”" 
1Samuel5:1 Kane jo-Filistia okawo Sanduk mar Nyasaye, ne gigole Ebenezer, mi gikele Ashdod." 
1Samuel5:2 Eka ne gitere e od nyasachgi ma Dagon, mi gikete but nyasachgino." 
1Samuel5:3 Kinyne gokinyi, kane jo-Ashdod obiro, ne giyudo ni Dagon osepodho piny auma e nyim Sanduk mar Ruoth Nyasaye. Omiyo ne gichunge, mi gidwoke kare." 
1Samuel5:4 Kinyne gokinyi mar ariyo, kane gibiro, ne ginwang’o ni Dagon ochako opodho piny auma e nyim Sanduk mar Ruoth Nyasaye, mi wiye gi luetene ochot, molwar e paw dhoot. Kor Dagon kende ema nodong’." 
1Samuel5:5 Mano emomiyo jodolo mag Dagon, kata ng’ato ang’ata ma donjo e od Dagon, ok nyon paw dhood Dagon e Ashdod, nyaka chil kawuono." 
1Samuel5:6 Ruoth Nyasaye nosando jo-Ashdod malich, mi luoro omakogi. Nogoyogi gi tuo mar buche, kendo oyieyo bende nopong’o pinygi." 
1Samuel5:7 Kane jo-Ashdod oneno gima timore, ne giwacho niya, “Sanduk mar Nyasach jo-Israel kik bed e dierwa, nimar osandowa malit, kendo osando Dagon nyasachwa bende.”" 
1Samuel5:8 Omiyo ne giluongo ruodhi duto mag jo-Filistia mondo gine ane gima ginyalo timo gi Sanduk mar Nyasach Israel. Jogo nodwokogi niya, “Goluru Sanduk mar Nyasach Israel, uter Gath.” Kuom mano, ne gigolo Sanduk mar Nyasach Israel, gitero kuno." 
1Samuel5:9 Kane gisetere, eka Nyasaye nochako sando jo-Gath ahinya. Nogoyo jodalano, matindo gi madongo gi tuo mar buche mokwodogi." 
1Samuel5:10 Omiyo ne gikowo sanduk mar Nyasaye Ekron. Kane ochopo Ekron, jo-Ekron noywak, kawacho niya, “Gisekelo Sanduk mar Nyasach Israel kuomwa mondo onegwa waduto.”" 
1Samuel5:11 Emomiyo ne giluongo ruodhi duto mag jo-Filistia, mi giwachonigi niya, “Dwokuru Sanduk mar Nyasach Israel kare, mondo kik onegwa waduto.” Ji mang’eny notho e dalano, nikech Nyasaye nosandogi malit." 
1Samuel5:12 Jogo mane ok otho, to buche nokwodo, kendo ywak mar dalano nochopo nyaka e polo." 
1Samuel6:1 Kane Sanduk Mar Ruoth Nyasaye osebedo e piny Filistia moromo dueche abiriyo," 
1Samuel6:2 jo-Filistia noluongo jodolo kod ajuoke, mopenjogi niya, “Watim ang’o gi Sanduk mar Ruoth Nyasaye? Nyiswauru gima dwadwokego kuma ne entie.”" 
1Samuel6:3 Ne giwacho niya, “Kudwoko Sanduk mar Nyasach Israel, to kik udwoke nono, to chiwneuru mich mar pwodho richo, eka unukwo, kendo unung’e gimomiyo ok onyal weyo sandou.”" 
1Samuel6:4 To ne gimedo penjo niya, “En mich machal nadi monego wamiye?” Ne gidwoko niya, “Onego umiye gik moko abich mag dhahabu, maket gi buche mane okuodou, kaachiel gi oyieyo abich molos gi dhahabu, moromo kar kwan ruodhi mag jo-Filistia, nimar tho achiel ema nogoyou uduto, kaachiel gi ruodhi mau." 
1Samuel6:5 Emomiyo mondo ulos gik maket gi buche mane okuodou, kendo ulos gik maket gi oyieyo ma kethonu piny, kumiyogo Nyasach Israel duong’, mi dipo koweyo sandou, kaachiel gi nyisecheu kod pinyu." 
1Samuel6:6 Marang’o wiu tek, ka wi Farao gi wi jo-Misri? Donge Nyasaye nosandogi malich, nyaka ne giweyo jo-Israel oa?" 
1Samuel6:7 “Emomiyo koro uik gari manyien, kendo ukaw duesni ariyo madhodho, ma yandi pok otuenigi jok. Tueuru dhogo e garino, to ugol nyithindgi kuomgi, odong’ dala." 
1Samuel6:8 Eka ukaw Sanduk mar Ruoth Nyasaye, uket e gari, to gik molos gi dhahabu muchiwo ni Ruoth Nyasaye ka mich mar pwodho richo, uket e sanduk moro but Sandugno. Eka uweye odhi adhiya," 
1Samuel6:9 kung’iye. Kapo ni ochiko yo madhi thurgi nyaka Beth-shemesh, to wanang’e ni kara Ruoth Nyasaye ema osekelonwa masirani. To ka ok oluwo yorno, eka wanang’e ni ok en ema osandowa, to en gimoro mobironwa abira.”" 
1Samuel6:10 Jogo notimo kamano. Ne gikawo duesni ariyo madhodho, mi gitueyo e gari, to nyiroye ne giloronigi e kul." 
1Samuel6:11 Ne giyieyo Sanduk mar Ruoth Nyasaye e gari, kaachiel gi sanduk moketie oyieyo mag dhahabu kod gik maket gi buchegi." 
1Samuel6:12 Dhogo nochiko nyimgi tir e yo madhi Beth-shemesh, ka giluwo yo maduong’. Ne giywak ka gidhi, to ne ok gibaro korachwich kata koracham. Ruodhi mag jo-Filistia noluwogi nyaka tong’ Beth-shemesh." 
1Samuel6:13 Noyudo jo-Beth-shemesh kayo ngano e holo, kendo kane giting’o wang’gi, mi gineno Sanduk, ne gidoko mamor." 
1Samuel6:14 Gari nodonjo, mochung’ e puoth Joshua ja-Beth-shemesh, but kidi moro mang’ongo. Ne gibaro yiend gari, kendo ne gichiwo ni Ruoth Nyasaye dhogo ka misango miwang’o pep." 
1Samuel6:14 Gari nodonjo, mochung’ e puoth Joshua ja-Beth-shemesh, but kidi moro mang’ongo. Ne gibaro yiend gari, kendo ne gichiwo ni Ruoth Nyasaye dhogo ka misango miwang’o pep." 
1Samuel6:15 Jo-Lawi noloro Sanduk mar Ruoth Nyasaye kod sanduk mane oting’o gik molos gi dhahabu mi giketogi ewi kidi mang’ongono. Chieng’no jo-Beth-shamesh notimo ni Ruoth Nyasaye misengni miwang’o pep, kod misengni mamoko." 
1Samuel6:16 Kane ruodhi abich mag jo-Filistia oseneno gima otimore, ne gidok Ekron mana chieng’ono." 
1Samuel6:17 Buche molos gi dhahabu mane jo-Filistia ochiwo ni Ruoth Nyasaye ka mich mar pwodho richo ne mag Ashdod gi Gaza gi Ashkelon gi Gath kod Ekron, ka bur ka bur ochung’ ni dala ka dala." 
1Samuel6:18 To oyieyo molos gi dhahabu ne mag miech jo-Filistia, mane ruodhi abichgo rito. Ne gin mier mochiel gi ohinga, kod ma ok ochiel. Kidi mang’ongo mane giketoe Sanduk mar Ruoth Nyasaye obedo ranyisi e puoth Joshua ja-Bethshemesh nyaka chil kawuono." 
1Samuel6:18 To oyieyo molos gi dhahabu ne mag miech jo-Filistia, mane ruodhi abichgo rito. Ne gin mier mochiel gi ohinga, kod ma ok ochiel. Kidi mang’ongo mane giketoe Sanduk mar Ruoth Nyasaye obedo ranyisi e puoth Joshua ja-Bethshemesh nyaka chil kawuono." 
1Samuel6:19 To jo-Beth-shemesh moko nong’iyo i Sanduk mar Ruoth Nyasaye, omiyo Ruoth Nyasaye nonego ji piero abiriyo kuomgi, mi ji noywak nikech kum malit mane Ruoth Nyasaye okelonigi kamano." 
1Samuel6:20 Eka jo-Beth-shemesh nowacho niya, “Onge ng’ama nyalo chung’ e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, ma Nyasaye malerni! Ere kama dwatere mondo oa kuomwa?”" 
1Samuel6:21 Mi gioro joote ir jo-Kiriath-jearim, ka giwacho niya, “Jo-Filistia osedwoko Sanduk mar Ruoth Nyasaye. Biuru ukawe, ubed kode.” Omiyo jo-Kiriath-jearim nobiro, moomo Sanduk mar Ruoth Nyasaye." 
1Samuel7:1 Ne gitere e od Abinadab e got, kendo ne giyiero Eleazar wuode mondo orite." 
1Samuel7:2 Sanduk nobet Kiriath-jearim kuom ndalo mang’eny. To bang’ higni ma dirom piero ariyo, jo-Israel nochako duogo ir Ruoth Nyasaye." 
1Samuel7:3 Samuel nowacho ni jo-Israel duto niya, “Ka en adier ni uduogo ir Ruoth Nyasaye gi chunyu duto, to wituru nyiseche mag pinje mamoko, kod nyiseche mamon miluongo ni Ashtaroth. Chiwreuru ni Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo uti mana ni en kende, mi enoresu e lwet jo-Filistia.”" 
1Samuel7:4 Omiyo jo-Israel nowito Baal kod Ashtaroth, mi ne gitiyo ni Ruoth Nyasaye kende." 
1Samuel7:5 Samuel nowacho niya, “Chokuru jo-Isarel duto Mizpa, mondo alamnu Ruoth Nyasaye.”" 
1Samuel7:6 Mi ne gichokore kanyakla Mizpa. Ne giumbo pi, mi giolo piny e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo ne gitueyo chiemo chieng’no, ka giwacho niya, “Waseketho e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye.” (Mizpa ema ne Samuel ng’adoe buche mag jo-Israel.)" 
1Samuel7:7 Kane jo-Filistia owinjo ni jo-Israel osechokore kanyakla Mizpa, ruodhigo nodhi mondo oked gi jo-Israel. To kane jo-Israel owinjo ni jo-Filistia biro, luoro nomakogi." 
1Samuel7:8 Ne giwacho ni Samuel niya, “Kik iwe kwayonwa Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachwa mondo oreswa e lwet jo-Filistia.”" 
1Samuel7:9 Omiyo Samuel nokawo nyarombo madhoth, mochiwo ni Ruoth Nyasaye ka misango miwang’o pep. Eka nokwayo Ruoth Nyasaye mondo ores jo-Israel, mi Ruoth Nyasaye nowinjo kwayone, modwoke." 
1Samuel7:10 Kane pod Samuel timo misango, jo-Filistia nokayo ni jo-Israel mondo oked kodgi, to Ruoth Nyasaye nomiyo polo omor matek kuom jo-Filistia, mokeyogi mi jo-Israel noloyogi." 
1Samuel7:11 Jo-Israel nowuok Mizpa, molawo jo-Filistia, ka ginegogi nyaka gikadho Beth-kar." 
1Samuel7:12 Samuel nokawo kidi, mochungo kanyo e kind Mizpa gi Jeshana. Nowacho niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye osekonyowa nyaka ka.” Omiyo nochako kidino ni Ebenezer, (tiende ni, kidi mar konyruok)." 
1Samuel7:13 Kamano nolo jo-Filistia, mi ne ok gichako gidonjo e piny Israel. Ruoth Nyasaye nosandogi malit e ndalo duto mag Samuel." 
1Samuel7:14 Mier mane jo-Filistia okawo e lweny, noduogo ni jo-Isarel, kendo jo-Israel noreso gwenge duto manie kind Ekron gi Gath e lwet jo-Filistia. To bende kue nobedo e kind jo-Israel gi jo-Amor." 
1Samuel7:15 Samuel nobedo jang’ad bura ni jo-Israel ndalo duto mag ngimane. 
1Samuel7:16 Higa ka higa nolworore Bethel, gi Gilgal, gi Mizpa, kong’ado buche jo-Israel kuondego duto." 
1Samuel7:17 To bang’e nodoknga Rama, kuma dalane ne nitie. Kuno bende nong’adoe buche jo-Israel, kendo nogeroe kendo-mar-misango ni Ruoth Nyasaye." 
1Samuel8:1 Kane Samuel oseti, noketo yawuote mondo obed jong’ad bura e Israel." 
1Samuel8:2 Nying wuode makayo ne Joel, to jalupne ne Abija. Ne gin jong’ad bura Beer-sheba." 
1Samuel8:2 Nying wuode makayo ne Joel, to jalupne ne Abija. Ne gin jong’ad bura Beer-sheba." 
1Samuel8:3 Yawuotego ne ok oluwo timbene, to ne giketho bura, ka gibaro kuom dwaro mwandu malang’, kendo kuom chamo asoya." 
1Samuel8:4 Kuom mano, jodong Israel duto nochokore kanyakla, modhi Rama ir Samuel." 
1Samuel8:5 Ne giwachone niya, “Iseti, to yawuoti ok luw timbeni. Koro ketnwa ruoth mondo oritwa, mana machalre gi ogendini duto.”" 
1Samuel8:6 To kane gikwayo Samuel mondo omigi ruoth kamano, wachno ne rachne, mi nolamo Ruoth Nyasaye," 
1Samuel8:7 to Ruoth Nyasaye nowachone niya, “Winj gima ji wachoni. Ok in ema gidagi, to an ema gisedaga, ni kik abed ruodhgi." 
1Samuel8:8 Gima koro gitimoni, en gima gisebedo ka gitimona, chakre ndalo mane agologie Misri nyaka chil kawuono, ka giweya, kendo gitiyo ni nyiseche mamoko." 
1Samuel8:9 Emomiyo koro, winj gima giwachoni. To kata kamano, siemgi matek, kendo nyisgi kaka ruoth biro ritogi.”" 
1Samuel8:10 Samuel nonyiso joma ne kwaye ruoth weche duto mane Ruoth Nyasaye osewachone. 
1Samuel8:11 Nowachonigi niya, “Timbe ruoth ma biro ritou nochal kama: Enokaw yawuotu, mi noketgi e tich gechene. Ginibed joidh faresene, kendo giniring e nyim gechene." 
1Samuel8:12 Enoketgi jodong lweny madongo gi matindo, kendo noket jomoko mondo opur puothene, mi gika chambe, kendo moko nolos gige mag lweny gi gik moko mag gechene." 
1Samuel8:13 Enokaw nyiu mondo olos gik mang’ue ng’ar, gi joted chiemo kod makati." 
1Samuel8:14 Enokaw puotheu mabeyo moloyo mag cham, gi mag mzabibu, kod mag zeituni, mi enomi jotichne." 
1Samuel8:15 Nokaw achiel kuom apar mar chambu gi mar mzabibu mau, mi enomi jodonge kod jotichne." 
1Samuel8:16 Nokaw jotichu machwo gi jotichu manyiri, gi dhou kod kenjeu mabeyo, mi noketgi e tichne." 
1Samuel8:17 Nokaw achiel kuom apar mag jambu, kendo un bende unubed wasumbni mage." 
1Samuel8:18 Mi unuywag e ndalono nikech timbe ruodhu mane uyiero, to Ruoth Nyasaye ok nowinju e ndalono.”" 
1Samuel8:19 Kata kamano, ji nodagi winjo dwond Samuel, mi ne giwachone niya, “Ooyo, nyaka wabed gi ruoth ma ritowa," 
1Samuel8:20 mondo wan bende wachalre gi ogendini duto, ka ruodhwa ritowa, kendo telonwa ka wakedo.”" 
1Samuel8:21 Kane Samuel osewinjo weche duto mag jo-Israel, nonyiso Ruoth Nyasaye," 
1Samuel8:22 mi Ruoth Nyasaye nodwoke niya, “Winj gima giwachoni, mondo iketnigi ruoth.” Eka Samuel nowacho ni jo-Israel ni mondo ng’ato ka ng’ato odog dalane." 
1Samuel9:1 Ne nitie ja-Benjamin moro, ma nyinge Kish, wuod Abiel, wuod Zeror, wuod Bekorath, wuod Afia. Ne en jaduong’ ma japith." 
1Samuel9:2 Nonywolo wuowi maratego kendo ma jaber ma nyinge Saulo. Kuom jo-Israel duto ne onge ng’at man gi chia moloye. Ne orabora ahinya, ma ji duto ne rem mana e goke." 
1Samuel9:3 Chieng’ moro kenje mag Kish wuon Saulo nolal, mi Kish nowacho ni Saulo wuode niya, “Kaw jatich moro, udhi umanygo kenjego.”" 
1Samuel9:4 Ne gidhi mi gimanyogi e piny gode mag Efraim kendo e piny Shalisha, to ne ok giyudogi." 
1Samuel9:5 To kane gibiro e piny Zuf, Saulo nowacho ni jotichne mane ni kode niya, “Wuoth wadogi, dipo ka wuora oweyo paro kenje, koparo mana wan.”" 
1Samuel9:6 To jalo nowachone ni, “E dalani nitie ng’at Nyasaye marahuma. Weche duto mowacho timore adier. We wadhi kuno, dipo ka ofwenyonwa wach moro kuom wuodhwani.”" 
1Samuel9:7 Saulo nopenje niya, “Ka wadhi to ere gima dang’ water ni ng’at Nyasayeno, nimar chiemo mane wating’o koro oserumo, kendo waonge gi mich ma wanyalo terone? Koso wan gang’o?”" 
1Samuel9:8 Jatich nodwoke ni, “An gi pesa moro matin. Mano ema adhi miye mondo onyiswa gima onego watim.”" 
1Samuel9:9 (E ndalo ma chon e Israel kane ng’ato dhi penjo wach kuom Nyasaye, to nowacho ni, “Wadhiuru ir janen” nikech ng’at ma ndalogi luongo ni janabi, ne iluongo chon ni, janen.)" 
1Samuel9:10 Saulo nowachone niya, “Iwacho maber, wuoth wadhi.” Eka ne gidhi e dala mane ng’at Nyasaye nitie." 
1Samuel9:11 Kane pod giidho got, ka gichiko dalano, ne giromo gi nyiri moko kadhi umbo pi, mi gipenjo niya, “Janen nitie?”" 
1Samuel9:12 Nyigo nodwokogi ni, “Ee, en nyimu kanyo. Returu, koroni eka odonjo dala, nikech jodalano timo misango kawuono e hembko man kama oting’ore." 
1Samuel9:13 Ka usedonjo e dala to ubiro yude, kapok oidho odhi e hembko. Ji ok nyal chiemo kapok obiro, nimar en ema oguedho gir misango, eka bang’e joma oluong chiemo. Ero, idhuru, ubiro yude piyo.”" 
1Samuel9:14 Omiyo ne giidho gidhi e dalano. To kane gidonjo e dala, ne gineno Samuel kowuok biro romo kodgi, kodhi e hembko." 
1Samuel9:15 To chieng’ motelo ni biro mar Saulo, Ruoth Nyasaye noyudo osefwenyore ni Samuel, ka wachone niya," 
1Samuel9:16 “Kiny kar sa makama, anaorni ng’at moro moa e piny Benjamin. Wire mondo obed ruodh joga Israel. Enores joga e lwet jo-Filistia, nimar aseneno chandruok mar joga, kendo ywakgi osechopo ira.”" 
1Samuel9:17 Mano emomiyo kane Samuel oneno Saulo, Ruoth Nyasaye nonyise niya, “Ma e jal ma nyoro awachoni. En ema norit joga.”" 
1Samuel9:18 Bang’e Saulo nosudo machiegni gi Samuel e dhorangach, mowachone ni, “Kiyie to nyisa kama janen odakie.”" 
1Samuel9:19 Samuel nodwoke niya, “An e janen. Teluru nyima e hembko, nikech kawuono ang’ nichiem koda. To kiny gokinyi naweyi idhi, ka asedwoko weche duto manie chunyi." 
1Samuel9:20 To kik iparri kuom kenjeni ma nyocha olal, nimar koro oseyudgi. To en ng’a, ma noyud gik malong’o duto mag Israel? Donge en mana in gi dhoodu koso?”" 
1Samuel9:21 Saulo nodwoke niya, “To an mana ja-Benjamin, ma libamba matinie moloyo libembni duto mag Israel, kendo dhoodwa en dhoot matinie moloyo dhoudi duto mag Benjamin. Koro, ere gimomiyo iwachona weche ma kamago?”" 
1Samuel9:22 Samuel notero Saulo gi jotichne e od chiemo, moketogi kama oyiedhi e kind joma noluongi, ma dirom piero adek." 
1Samuel9:23 Eka Samuel nowacho ni jatedo niya, “Kel lemo ma nende amiyi kawachoni ni mondo ikan tenge cha.”" 
1Samuel9:24 Mi jatedo nokelo em kod sembe, moketo e nyim Saulo. “Ma e lemo ma nende okanni. Chame, nikech osekannigo mondo ichame e sawoni gi welo maseluongo.” Kamano Saulo nochiemo gi Samuel chieng’ono." 
1Samuel9:25 Bang’e ne gilor gia e hembko, mi gidhi e dala, kendo ne gipedho ni Saulo kitanda ewi ot malo, monindo." 
1Samuel9:26 To kinyne gokinyi mang’ich, Samuel noluongo Saulo ewi ot, kowachone niya “Chungi, mondo akowi.” Saulo nochung’, mi ne giwuok oko gi Samuel." 
1Samuel9:27 To kane oyudo gilor e mbap dala, Samuel nowacho ni Saulo niya, “Wach ni jatichni okadh otel nyimwa, kendo kosetelo, to in ichung’ mondi, anyisi wach Nyasaye.”" 
1Samuel10:1 Samuel nokawo tung’ mar mo, moolo ewi Saulo. Nonyodhe, mowachone niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye osewiri gi mo mondo ibed ruodh joge Israel. Initel ni jo-Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo iniresgi e lwet wasikgi molworogi. To gima biro bedoni ranyisi ni Ruoth Nyasaye oseyieri mondo ibed ruodh joge ema:" 
1Samuel10:2 Ka isea kuoma kawuono, to ibiro yudo ji ariyo Zelza e piny Benjamin, but liend Rahel. Ginikoni niya, ‘Kenje mane idhi dwaro oseyudi. Koro wuoru oweyo paro kenje to oparo mana in, kowacho niya, “Atim ang’o, ka koro wuoda olal?” ’" 
1Samuel10:3 Bang’ mano, inichop e yath maduong’ man Tabor, kama iniromie gi ji adek ma dhi lamo Nyasaye, ka achiel kuomgi oting’o nyidiek adek, to machielo oting’o makati adek, kendo moro oting’o ndede mar divai." 
1Samuel10:4 Ginimosi, kendo ginimiyi makati ariyo, mi inikaw e lwetgi." 
1Samuel10:5 Bang’ mano, kichopo e Gibea-elohim, kama jolweny mag jo-Filistia nitie, to inirom gi oganda jonabi, kalor a e hembko, ka joma goyo thumbe gi nyigwerni kod asili, otelonigi, kendo iniyud ka gidhumore." 
1Samuel10:6 Much Ruoth Nyasaye nobi kuomi gi teko, mi inidhumri kaachiel kodgi, kendo inilokri ng’at moro machielo." 
1Samuel10:7 Ka ranyisigo otimoreni, to tim gima ineno ni ber, nikech Nyasaye ni kodi." 
1Samuel10:8 Tel nyima kilor nyaka Gilgal, to anabi iri mondo atim misengni miwang’o pep, kod mag sawo. Rita kuom ndalo abiriyo, eka nabi iri mondo anyisi gima onego itim.”" 
1Samuel10:9 Kane Saulo pod loko ng’eye a ir Samuel, Nyasaye nomiye chuny manyien, kendo ranyisigo duto notimore chieng’no." 
1Samuel10:10 Kane gichopo Gibea, oganda jonabi noromo kode, kendo much Nyasaye nobiro kuome gi teko, mi en bende nodhumore kodgi." 
1Samuel10:11 Kane ji duto mong’eye oneno kaka odhumore kod jonabi ne gipenjore niya, “En ang’o mosetimore ni wuod Kishni? Kara Saulo bende en achiel kuom jonabi?”" 
1Samuel10:12 To ng’at moro ma ja gweng’no nopenjo niya, “Gin yawuot ng’a?” Mano e chakruok ngero, mawachore ni, “Kara Saulo bende en achiel kuom jonabi?”" 
1Samuel10:13 Kane Saulo osetieko dhumore, nodok dala." 
1Samuel10:14 Wuon Saulo matin nopenjo Saulo kod jotichne niya, “Ne udhi kanye?” Nodwoke niya, “Ne wadhi dwaro kenje, to kane waneno ni ok wanyal yudogi, ne wadhi ir Samuel.”" 
1Samuel10:15 Wuon Saulo matin nomedo penje ni, “Kiyie, nyisa gima Samuel nowachoni.”" 
1Samuel10:16 Saulo nodwoke niya, “Nonyisowa ratiro kenje oseyudi.” To wach bedo ruoth mane Samuel owachone, to ne ok onyise." 
1Samuel10:17 Samuel nochoko jo-Israel Mizpa e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye,"
