1Samuel10:18 mowachonigi niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel, owacho kama: ‘Ne agolou Misri, maresou e lwet jopinyno, kendo e teko mar pinje duto mane othirou’" 
1Samuel10:19 To un koro usedagi Nyasachu, ma noresou e masicheu, kod chandruoku duto, kendo usekwaye mondo oketnu ruoth. Emomiyo koro chung’uru e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, kuchanoru e libembni mau, kendo e dhoutu.”" 
1Samuel10:20 Eka Samuel nokelo libembni duto mag Israel machiegni, to libamba mar Benjamin ema ne ombulu okwanyo." 
1Samuel10:21 Mi nokelo libamba mar Benjamin machiegni, dhoot ka dhoot, kendo dhood Matri ema noyier. Eka nokelo dhood Matri machiegni, ng’ato ka ng’ato, kendo Saulo wuod Kish ema ombulu nolwar kuome. To kane gidware, ne ok ginyal nwang’e." 
1Samuel10:22 Emomiyo ne gichako gipenjo Ruoth Nyasaye wach niya, “Ng’atno osebiro ka koso?” Ruoth Nyasaye nodwokogi ni, “Ero opondo e kind misike.”" 
1Samuel10:23 Mi ne giringo giome kuno. Ne orabora ahinya, ma kochung’ e dier ji, to giduto girem mana e goke." 
1Samuel10:24 Samuel nowacho ni ji duto niya, “Neuru jal ma Ruoth Nyasaye oyiero. Onge ng’at machal kode kuomu duto.” Mi ji duto nokok kawacho niya, “Ruoth mondo odag aming’a!”" 
1Samuel10:25 Eka Samuel nonyiso ji kaka tich ruoth chalo,, kendo nondiko wachno e kitabu, mi okano e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye. Bang’e nomiyo ji thuolo mondo ng’ato ka ng’ato odog dalane." 
1Samuel10:26 Saulo bende nodhi dalagi Gibea, kendo thuondi moko ma Nyasaye omulo chunygi, nodhi kode." 
1Samuel10:27 To jomoko ma acheje nowacho niya, “Ere kaka jali dikonywa?” Ne gichaye, mi ne ok gikelone mich." 
1Samuel11:1 Bang’ due achiel, Nahash ja-Amon nodhi molworo Jabesh-gilead mondo okaw. Omiyo jo-Jabesh duto nowacho ni Nahish niya, “Tim kodwa winjruok, mondo wabed jogi.”" 
1Samuel11:2 To Nahash ja-Amon nodwokogi niya, “Ok ayie timo kodu winjruok, mak mana ka agolo wengeu ma korachwich mondo akuodgo wi jo-Israel duto.”" 
1Samuel11:3 Jodong Jabesh nowachone niya, “Wenwa kinde kuom ndalo abiriyo, mondo waor joote e piny Israel duto. Bang’ mano, ka joma resowa onge, eka wanachiwre e lweti.”" 
1Samuel11:4 Kane jootego obiro Gibea, dalagi Saulo, ne ginyiso ji wachno, mi ji duto nochako ywak." 
1Samuel11:5 Noyudo ka Saulo donjo e dala koa puodho, ka sembo dho pur, mi kane owinjo ywak, nopenjo gima ji ywago. Eka ne ginyise wach jo-Jabesh." 
1Samuel11:6 Kane Saulo owinjo wachno, Much Nyasaye nobiro kuome gi teko, kendo mirima nomake ahinya." 
1Samuel11:7 Nonego dho pur ariyo, mopogo lemo lemo. Eka nomiyogi joote, moterogi e piny Israel duto, kowacho niya, “Ng’at modagi wuok bang’ Saulo, kendo bang’ Samuel noneg dhoge mana kama.” Luoro moa kuom Ruoth Nyasaye nomako ji, mi ne giwuok giduto gi chuny achiel." 
1Samuel11:8 Saulo nochanogi Bezek, moyudo ni jo-Israel oromo ji alufu mia adek, to jo-Juda alufu piero adek." 
1Samuel11:9 Eka nowacho ni joote mane obiro niya, “Wachuru ni jo-Jabesh-gilead ni kiny gonyango giniyud konyruok.” Kane jootego odok, monyiso jo-Jabesh kamano, ne gidoko mamor," 
1Samuel11:10 mi giwacho ni jo-Amon niya, “Kiny wanawuognu, mondo utimnwa gima uhero.”" 
1Samuel11:11 Kinyne Saulo nopogo joge e migepe adek. Ne gimwomore e kambi jo-Amon kogwen, mi ginegogi nyaka chieng’ otegno. Jo-Amon mane odong’ noke, mane ok nyal nwang’ kata ji ariyo kaachiel." 
1Samuel11:12 Eka jo-Israel nowacho ni Samuel niya, “Ng’a gini mane odagi ni Saulo kik bed ruodhwa? Kelgiuru mondo waneggi.”" 
1Samuel11:13 To Saulo nowacho niya, “Kawuono ok nyal neg ng’ato, nikech tinendeni ema Nyasaye oresoe jo-Israel.”" 
1Samuel11:14 Bang’e Samuel nowacho ni ji niya, “Wadhiuru Gilgal, mondo wagur ruoth e loch kuno.”" 
1Samuel11:15 Kamano ji duto nodhi Gilgal, kendo ne giketo Saulo ruoth e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye kuno. Ne gitimo ni Ruoth Nyasaye misengni mag sawo, kendo Saulo kod jo-Israel duto nobedo mamor ahinya." 
1Samuel12:1 Samuel nowacho ni jo-Israel duto niya, “Uneno kaka asewinjo gik moko duto mane ukwaya, mi aseketonu ruoth." 
1Samuel12:2 Koro Ruoth e jatendu. An to aseti, mi lwar omaka, kendo yawuota bende ni kodu. To asebet jatendu, chakre tinna nyaka kawuono." 
1Samuel12:3 Era e. Koro donjnauru e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo e nyim ruoth moseyiero mowir. Rwadh ng’a, kata kanj ng’a masekawo? Ere ng’a ma asemayo gire? Koso ere ng’ama asethiro? Kata en ng’a ma asekawo asoya kuome, madinogo wang’a? Ng’eng’auru, mondo adwoknugo.”" 
1Samuel12:4 To ne gidwoke ni, “Pok imayowa gimoro, kata thirowa pok ithirowa, bende pok ikawo gimoro kuom ng’ato.”" 
1Samuel12:5 Samuel nowachonigi niya, “Tinende Ruoth Nyasaye obedo janeno kuomu, kendo ruoth moseyiero bende obedo janeno, ni pok amulo gimoro.” Mi ne gidwoke ni, “Ee, obedo janeno.”" 
1Samuel12:6 Eka Samuel nowacho ni ji niya, “Adier, Ruoth Nyasaye mane omiyou Musa gi Harun, kendo mane ogolo kwereu e piny Misri, ema obedo janeno." 
1Samuel12:7 Emomiyo chung’uru mos, mondo awuo kodu e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, ka aparonu timbe makare duto mane Ruoth Nyasaye otimonu, kendo otimo ni kwereu." 
1Samuel12:8 Kane Jakobo gi yawuote osedhi Misri, jo-Misri koro ne sando nyikwagi ma kwereu. Omiyo ne giywak ni Ruoth Nyasaye, mi Ruoth Nyasaye nooro Musa gi Harun mogologi, kendo omiyogi kama wadakieni." 
1Samuel12:9 To wigi nowil gi Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachgi, omiyo nojwang’ogi e lwet Sisera, jaduong’ jolweny ma Jabin ruodh Hazor, kendo e lwet jo-Filistia, kendo e lwet ruodh Moab, mi nyaka ne gikedo kodgi." 
1Samuel12:10 Ne giywak ni Ruoth Nyasaye ka giwacho niya, ‘Waseketho, nikech waseweyi, kendo waselamo Baal gi Ashtaroth, to koro mondo ireswa e lwet wasikwa, kendo wanatini.’" 
1Samuel12:11 Omiyo Ruoth Nyasaye nooro Jerubaal, Barak gi Jeftha, kod Samson, kendo noresou e lwet wasiku koni gi koni, mi nubedo gi kue." 
1Samuel12:12 “Ne ung’eyo ni Ruoth Nyasaye e ruodhu, to kata kamano, kane uneno ni Nahash ruodh jo-Amon omonjou, nuwachona niya, ‘Nyaka wabed gi ruoth maritowa.’" 
1Samuel12:13 Emomiyo koro neuru ruoth museyiero, kendo ma nukwayo, nimar Ruoth Nyasaye osetimonu mana gima nukwaye." 
1Samuel12:14 Ka unuluor Ruoth Nyasaye, mi utine, kendo uwinj dwonde, ma ok udagi chikene, kendo ka un kaachiel gi ruodhu unuluw Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu, to mano nokonyu" 
1Samuel12:15 To ka utamoru winjo dwond Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo udagi chikene, to nosandu kaachiel gi ruodhu." 
1Samuel12:16 “Emomiyo koro ling’uru, une gima duong’ ma Ruoth Nyasaye biro timo e nyimu." 
1Samuel12:17 Donge en ndalo kwayo Ruoth Nyasaye mondo omi polo omor, kendo koth ochue, mi ubiro neno kendo ng’eyo kaka nuketho ahinya kuom kwayo mondo ubed gi ruoth maritou.”" 
1Samuel12:18 Kamano Samuel nokwayo Ruoth Nyasaye, mi Ruoth Nyasaye nomiyo polo omor, kendo koth ochue, chieng’no. Omiyo ji duto noluoro Ruoth Nyasaye ahinya, kod Samuel bende." 
1Samuel12:19 Ji duto nowacho ni Samuel niya, “Kwanwa Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachi mondo kik watho, kane wakwayo mondo wabed gi ruoth, to ne wamedo mana richo ewi moko.”" 
1Samuel12:20 Samuel nodwokogi ni, “Kik uluor. En adier ni usetimo richogo duto, to kata kamano meduru mana luwo Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo tineuru gi chunyu duto." 
1Samuel12:21 Weuru lamo nyiseche manono, ma ok nyal konyo, kata ma ok nyal reso gimoro, nikech gin mana gik manono." 
1Samuel12:22 Ruoth Nyasaye ok nojwang’ joge nikech dipo ka nyinge maduong’ okethore, nimar oseyierou mondo ubed joge owuon." 
1Samuel12:23 To an bende, asingora ni ok naketh e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, kaweyo lemonu kendu nyisou yo maber kendo makare." 
1Samuel12:24 Mak mana ni, luoruru Ruoth Nyasaye, kutiyone gi adiera kod chunyu duto, kendo paruru gik madongo mosetimonu." 
1Samuel12:25 To kusiko kutimo richo, to obiro tiekou kaachiel gi ruodhu.”" 
1Samuel13:1  
1Samuel13:2 Saulo noyiero ji alufu adek kuom jo-Israel, mondo ji alufu ariyo kuomgi obed kode Mikmash, kendo e piny gode mag Bethel, to alufu achiel obed gi Jonathan wuode, Gibea, dala jo-Benjamin. Ji moko duto to noweyo, modok miechgi." 
1Samuel13:3 Jonathan nonego jatend jolweny mag jo-Filistia mane ni Geba, mi jo-Filistia nowinjo ni jo-Hibrania oseng’anyo. Saulo nogoyo tung’ e piny Israel," 
1Samuel13:4 mi jo-Israel duto nowinjo ni Saulo osenego jatend jolweny mag jo-Filistia, kendo ni jo-Filistia ojok kodgi. Omiyo ne giwakore ir Saulo, mane oyudo ni Gilgal." 
1Samuel13:5 Jo-Filistia nochokore mondo oked gi jo-Israel. Ne gin gi geche alufu piero adek, gi joidh farese alufu auchiel, kod ji mathoth ka kuoyo mae dhonam. Ne gidhi Mishmash, mi gijot kuno, yo wuokchieng’ mar Bethaven." 
1Samuel13:6 To kane jo-Israel oneno ka wach otamo wang’gi, nikech nothung’gi ahinya, ne gipondo kamoro amora mane ginyalo tonyie, kaka buche gi bunge gi bugni kod sokni, kendo e kind lwendni." 
1Samuel13:7 Jomoko kuomgi nokadho aora Jordan nyaka piny Gad gi Gilead. Saulo to ne pod odong’ Gilgal, kendo ji duto mane ni kode ne luoro omako." 
1Samuel13:8 Saulo norito kuom ndalo abiriyo, kaka Samuel nosechike, to ka ne ji oneno ni Samuel ok obiro, ne gichako ke, ka gia kuom Saulo." 
1Samuel13:9 Omiyo Saulo nowacho niya, “Kelnauru dhok mitimogo misango miwang’o pep, kod misengni mag sawo.”" 
1Samuel13:10 To e sa mane otieko timoe misango miwang’o pep ema Samuel nobiroe, mi Saulo nowuok mondo oromne, kendo omose." 
1Samuel13:11 Samuel nopenje niya, “En ang’o misetimoni?” Saulo nodwoke niya, “Naneno ka ji ke a kuoma, to bende in ne ok ibiro kaka ne ichiko, kendo jo-Filistia chokore Mikmash." 
1Samuel13:12 Emomiyo naparo ni koro jo-Filistia biro biro monja Gilgal, ka pok akwayo Ruoth Nyasaye mondo okonya. Kuom mano, nochuna timo misango.”" 
1Samuel13:13 Samuel nowacho ni Saulo niya, “Itimo tim mofuwo. Ok iserito chik mane Ruorh Nyasaye omiyi. Da bed ni iserito chikne, to da oguro lochni e Israel nyaka chieng’." 
1Samuel13:14 To koro lochni ok nosiki. Ruoth Nyasaye osedwaro ng’at ma chunye mor godo, kendo osekete mondo obed jatend joge, nikech ne ok irito gima ne Ruoth Nyasaye ochiki.”" 
1Samuel13:15 Eka Samuel noa Gilgal, modhi adhiya. Saulo bende noa kuno, mowuotho kochomo kambi mar lweny, ka ji duto modong’ luwo bang’e. Kane ochopo Gibea, dala jo-Benjamin, nokwano joma ne ni kode, monwang’o ni gin ji ma dirom mia auchiel." 
1Samuel13:16 Saulo gi Jonathan wuode, kod joma ne en go, nobet Geba, dala jo-Benjamin, to jo-Filistia ne pod jot Mikmash." 
1Samuel13:17 Ogendni adek mag mony ne thoro wuok e kambi jo-Filistia. Oganda achiel ne luwo yo madhi Ofra e piny Shual," 
1Samuel13:18 to oganda machielo ne luwo yo madhi Beth-horon, kendo oganda mar adek ne luwo yo mochiko gode, momanyore gi holo mar Zeboim gi thim." 
1Samuel13:19 Ne ok nyal yud jatheth e piny Israel duto, nikech jo-Filistia ne ok oyie mondo jo-Hibrania othedh ligengni kata tonge." 
1Samuel13:20 To jo-Isreal duto ne dhi ir jo-Filistia mondo ng’ato ka ng’ato opiag kweye gi leye gi ratonge kod bithe. 
1Samuel13:21 Nengo mar piago kwer kata le ne en nus shekel, to mar ratong’ kata bidhi ne en achiel kuom adek mar shekel." 
1Samuel13:22 Omiyo kane ndalo mar lweny ochopo, ne ok nyal yud ligangla kata tong’ e lwet ji duto mane ni kod Saulo gi Jonathan, to mak mana Saulo gi Jonathan kende ema ne nigi gilweny." 
1Samuel13:23 Noyudo jo-Filistia oseketo jolweny e holo mar Mikmash. 
1Samuel14:1 Chieng’ moro Jonathan wuod Saulo nowacho ni jating’ne gilweny niya, “Bi mondo waidh loka cha ir jolweny mag jo-Filistia.” To ne ok onyiso wuon mare wachno." 
1Samuel14:2 Noyudo ka Saulo oguro hembe e tiend yath maduong’ man Migron e tong’ Gibea, kendo ji mane ni kode ne dirom mia auchiel." 
1Samuel14:3 Ahija wuod Ahitub, ma owadgi Ikabod, ma wuon Finehas, ma wuod Eli, jadolo mar Ruoth Nyasaye e Shilo, ema ne oting’o law dolo miluongo ni efod. To onge ng’ama nong’eyo ni Jonathan osedhi." 
1Samuel14:4 E hoho mar jolweny mag jo-Filistia, ne nitie lwendni ariyo mogingore e bathe koni gi koni. Nying lwanda mokwongo ne Bozez, to nying machielo ne Sene." 
1Samuel14:5 Lwanda achiel ne ni yo nyandwat, koma omanyore gi Mikmash, to machielo ne ni yo milambo, koma omanyore gi Geba." 
1Samuel14:6 Jonathan nowacho ni jating’ne gilweny niya, “Bi mondo waidh loka ir jolweny mag joma ok ter nyangugo. Dipo ka Ruoth Nyasaye okonyowa, nimar onge gima mono Ruoth Nyasaye resowa, kata ka wang’eny, kata ka wanok.”" 
1Samuel14:7 Jating’ne gilweny nokone ni, “Tim duto manie chunyi, nikech abiro konyi e gimoro amora ma idwaro timo.”" 
1Samuel14:8 Mi Jonathan nowacho niya, “Ber wadhi loka ir jogo mondo ginewa." 
1Samuel14:9 Kapo ni giwachonwa ni, ‘Ritwauru kanyo,’ to wanachung’ mana kanyo, mak wadhi irgi." 
1Samuel14:10 To ka giwacho ni wadhi irgi, eka wanadhi, kwang’eyo ni Ruoth Nyasaye osechiwogi e lwetwa. Mano ema nobednwa ranyisi.”" 
1Samuel14:11 Omiyo ne giwuok e lela, mondo jolweny mag jo-Filistia onegi. Jo-Filistiago nowacho ni, “Neuru! Jo-Hibrania wuok e buche ma yande gipondoe.”" 
1Samuel14:12 Ne giluongo Jonathan kod jatichne, ka giwacho niya, “Idhuru ubi ku, ubiro neno!” Jonathan nowacho ni jatichne niya, “Luw bang’a, nikech Ruoth Nyasaye osechiwogi e lwet jo-Israel.”" 
1Samuel14:13 Jonathan noidho kalawore gi lwete, ka jatichne luwo bang’e. Eka nomonjo jo-Filistia, kogoyonigi piny, to jatichne negogi, ka luwo bang’e." 
1Samuel14:14 E lweny mokwongono, Jonathan gi jatichne nonego ji ma dirom piero ariyo, e pap matin mane gintieno." 
1Samuel14:15 Mi luoro maduong’ nolandore kuom jo-Filistia duto, mane nie paw lweny, kendo mane nie kambi. Jolweny ma jorit, kaachiel gi oganda mony bende nokirni, kendo piny noyiengni, mi kihondko malich nobetie." 
1Samuel14:16 Jorito mag Saulo mane ni Gibea noneno ka oganda lweny mag jo-Filistia ke, karingo koni gi koni." 
1Samuel14:17 Eka Saulo nowacho ni joma ne ni kode niya, “Kwanreuru, mondo une ane ng’ama onge kuomwa.” To kane gitieko kweno, ne ginwang’o ni Jonathan gi jating’ne gi lweny ema onge." 
1Samuel14:18 Saulo nowacho ni Ahija ni, “Kel Sanduk mar Nyasaye ka.” Ahija ema ne ting’o Sanduk ni jo-Israel ndalogo." 
1Samuel14:19 To kane Saulo pod wuoyo gi jadolo, mahu mane nie kambi jo-Filistia nomedore, omiyo nokwero jadolo mondo owe aweya." 
1Samuel14:20 Eka Saulo gi joge duto nowuok mogiyo kadhi e lweny, kuma ne giyudoe ka jo-Filistia negore kendgi giwegi, achadha nono." 
1Samuel14:21 Jo-Hibrania mane ni kor jo-Filistia chon, kendo mane jot kodgi, nodok kor jo-Israel mane luwo Saulo gi Jonathan." 
1Samuel14:22 Bende kane jo-Israel duto mane osepondo e piny gode mag Efraim owinjo ni jo-Filistia ringo, ne gilawogi matek." 
1Samuel14:23 Kamano Ruoth Nyasaye noreso jo-Israel chieng’no, kendo ne gikadho dala mar Bethaven, mana kapod gikedo." 
1Samuel14:24 Jo-Israel nool ahinya chieng’no nikech Saulo nosekwerogi niya, “Okuong’ jalo mochamo gimoro kapok piny oyuso, kendo kapok atieko chulo kuor kuom wasikwa.” Kamano ne onge ng’ato kuomgi mane obilo gimoro." 
1Samuel14:25 To noyudo ka ji duto ochopo e bungu kama mor kich ne chuerie piny. 
1Samuel14:26 Kane gidonjo e bunguno, ne gineno mor kich ka ton, to onge ng’ato ma notero lwete e dhoge, nikech ne giluoro kuong’." 
1Samuel14:27 To Jonathan ne ok owinjo ka wuon mare kwero ji gi kuong’. Emomiyo nochwowo pedni gi luth mane en go e lwete, moketo mor kich e dhoge, mi chunye nodwogo." 
1Samuel14:28 Eka ng’at moro nowachone niya, “Wuoru nokwero ji matek gi kuong’ niya, ‘Okuong’ jalo machamo gimoro tinende.’ ” To noyudo nong’no koro ohewo ji ahinya," 
1Samuel14:29 omiyo Jonathan nowacho niya, “Wuora osethago ji, kuom kwerogi kamano. Neuru kaka chunya koro oduogo. Mana nikech mor kich matin ma abiloni." 
1Samuel14:30 Dobedo maber manade ka da ji ochamo chiemo mane giyako kuom wasikwa, mi da wanego jo-Filistia oyokre!”" 
1Samuel14:31 Ne giloyo jo-Filistia chieng’no, mi gilawogi chakre Mikmash nyaka Aijalon. To kata kamano nong’no nohewo jo-Israel ahinya." 
1Samuel14:32 Omiyo ne gigore kuom gik mope, mi gikawo rombe gi ruedhi kod nyiroye, kendo ne ginegogi mana e lowo. Ne gichamogi kapod gitimo remo." 
1Samuel14:33 Eka nonyis Saulo niya, “Ji ketho ni Ruoth Nyasaye, nikech gichamo ring’o motimo remo.” Saulo nowacho ni ji niya, “Usetimo marach, omiyo ng’ieluru kidi maduong’, ukelna ka.”" 
1Samuel14:34 Eka nomedo wacho niya, “Dhiuru kuom ji, ulandnigi wach ni ruoth wacho kama: ‘Ng’ato ka ng’ato mondo okelna rwadhe kata rombone mondo onegi kendo ocham ka. To kik uketh ni Ruoth Nyasaye, kuchamo ring’o motimo remo.’ ” Omiyo godhiambono, ng’ato ka ng’ato nokelo chiache monego kanyo." 
1Samuel14:35 Mano emomiyo Saulo nogero ni Ruoth Nyasaye kendo-mar-misango. En e kendo-mar-misango mane okuongo gero ni Ruoth Nyasaye. 
1Samuel14:36 Saulo nowacho ni ji niya, “Waloruru mondo wamonj jo-Filistia gotienoni, kendo wayakgi nyaka piny ru, bende kik wawe kata ng’at achiel dong’ kangima.” Mi ne gidwoke niya, “Tim gima ineno ni ber.” To jadolo nowacho ni, “Wapenjuru Nyasaye wach mondi.”" 
1Samuel14:37 Omiyo Saulo nopenjo Nyasaye wach niya, “Alaw jo Filistia koso? Bende ibiro chiwogi e lwet jo-Israel?” To ne ok odwoke gimoro chieng’ono." 
1Samuel14:38 Mi Saulo nowacho ni jodonge niya, “Suduru machiegni, mondo unon kendo ufweny kuma kethoni oaye tinendeni." 
1Samuel14:39 Gi nying Ruoth Nyasaye mareso Israel, kata dabed ni ng’at mokethono en mana Jonathan wuoda, to nyaka otho!” To onge kata ng’at achiel mane odwoke." 
1Samuel14:40 Eka nowacho ni jo-Israel duto niya, “Un beduru bathe konchiel, to an gi Jonathan wuoda, wabed komachielo.” Mi ji duto nodwoko Saulo ni, “Tim gima ineno ni ber.”" 
1Samuel14:41 Eka Saulo nowacho niya, “A Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel, ang’o momiyo ok isedwokowa tinendeni? A Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel, ka ketho ni kuoma, kata kuom Jonathan wuoda, to chiw ombulu miluongo ni Urim. To ka en kuom jogi Israel, to chiw ombulu miluongo ni Thumim.” Mi Saulo gi Jonathan ema noyier, to jo-Israel nowe." 
1Samuel14:42 Eka Saulo nowacho niya, “Go ombulu e kindwa gi Jonathan wuoda.” Mi ombulu nolwar kuom Jonathan." 
1Samuel14:43 Saulo nowacho ni Jonathan niya, “Nyisa gima isetimo.” Mi Jonathan nonyise ni, “Adier, nabilo mor kich matin gi luth mane nie lweta. Era e, ayie tho.”" 
1Samuel14:44 Saulo nowacho niya, “Nyasaye mondo okweda ka ok itho. Jonathan, in nyaka itho!”" 
1Samuel14:45 To ji duto nowacho ni Saulo niya, “Bende Jonathan nyalo tho adier, to en ema osekelo konyruok maduong’ kama e Israel? Ngang’! Gi nying Ruoth Nyasaye, kata mana yie wiye achiel ok nolwar piny, nikech Nyasaye ema osekonye timo tich mosetimo kawuononi.” Kamano ji nowaro Jonathan mondo kik tho." 
1Samuel14:46 Eka Saulo noweyo lawo jo-Filistia, nikech ne gisedok thurgi." 
1Samuel14:47 Kane Saulo obedo ruodh Israel, nokedo gi wasike duto koni gi koni, moloyogi kuonde duto modhiye. Ne gin jo-Moab, gi jo-Amon, gi jo-Edom, gi ruodhi mag Zoba, kod jo-Filistia." 
1Samuel14:48 Notimo chir, mi noloyo jo-Amalek bende, kendo noreso jo-Israel e lwet joma ne monjogi." 
1Samuel14:49 Yawuot Saulo ne Jonathan gi Ishfi kod Malkishua, to nyige ne Merab, nyare maduong’ gi Mikal nyare matin." 
1Samuel14:50 Nying chi Saulo ne Ahinoam nyar Ahimaaz. To nying jatend jolwenje ne Abner wuod Ner, owadgi wuon Saulo." 
1Samuel14:51 Kish wuon Saulo, kod Ner wuon Abner, ne yawuot Abiel." 
1Samuel14:52 Ne nitie lweny mager e kind jo-Israel gi jo-Filistia kuom ndalo duto mag ngima Saulo. Omiyo kane oneno ng’at moro maratego, kata mathwon, to nokete achiel kuom jolwenje." 
1Samuel15:1 Samuel nowacho ni Saulo niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye ne oora ni mondo awiri mo, ibed ruodh joge Israel. Emomiyo koro winj wachne." 
1Samuel15:2 Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto owacho kama: ‘Anakum jo-Amalek kuom geng’o ni jo-Israel yo, kane gia Misri." 
1Samuel15:3 Koro dhiyo iked gi jo-Amalek, kendo iketh mwandugi duto chuth. Kik iwegi, to ineggi duto, chwo gi mon, rawere gi nyithindo madhoth, gi dhok gi rombe, kod ngamia gi kenje.’ ”" 
1Samuel15:4 Omiyo Saulo noluongo jo-Israel Telaim. Nokwanogi, monwang’o ni gin jolweny alufu mia ariyo, kaachiel gi ji alufu apar moa Juda." 
1Samuel15:5 Eka nodhi e dala jo-Amalek, mobutonigi e holo." 
1Samuel15:6 To nowacho ni jo-Keni niya, “Un to, wuoguru ua kuom jo-Amalek, nimar dipo ka anegou kaachiel kodgi, to un nutimo maber ni jo-Israel kane giwuok gia Misri.” Kamano jo-Keni nowuok moa kuom jo-Amalek." 
1Samuel15:7 Eka Saulo nonego jo-Amalek, chakre Havila nyaka Shur, man yo wuok chieng’ mar Misri." 
1Samuel15:8 Agag, ruodh jo-Amalek, ema nomako kangima, to jomoko duto nonego pep." 
1Samuel15:9 Saulo gi joge noweyo Agag kangima, to bende ne ok giketho rombe gi dhok machwe gi nyirombe kod gik moko mabeyo. To gik moko maricho, ma onge ohala, ema ne giketho chuth." 
1Samuel15:10 Eka wach Ruoth Nyasaye nobiro ni Samuel niya," 
1Samuel15:11 “Chunya olokore kuom keto Saulo ruoth, nimar osedok chien ma ok oluwa, kendo ok osetimo gima nachike.” Mirima nomako Samuel, moywak ni Ruoth Nyasaye otienono duto." 
1Samuel15:12 Eka nochiew gokinyi mang’ich, modhi mondo one Saulo, to noyudo wach ni Saulo nende odhi Karmel, mochungo rapar mondo oparego, to bang’e ochweyo nyaka Gilgal." 
1Samuel15:13 Samuel nodhi ir Saulo, mi Saulo owachone niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye mondo oguedhi. Asetimo gima ne Ruoth Nyasaye ochika.”" 
1Samuel15:14 To Samuel nopenje niya, “Ka kamano, to ere gimomiyo awinjo ywak rombe gi mar dhok?”" 
1Samuel15:15 Nodwoke niya, “Gin rombe gi dhok mabeyo mag jo-Amalek, mane ji oweyo mak onego, mondo gitimgo misango ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachi. To moko duto wasenego pep.”" 
1Samuel15:16 Eka Samuel nowacho ni Saulo niya, “Ter mos, mondo anyisi gima Ruoth Nyasaye nende owachona gotienoni.” Saulo nodwoke ni, “Wachna.”" 
1Samuel15:17 Samuel nowachone niya, “kata obedo ni in iwuon ineno ni itin, to oseketi jatend dhout Israel. Ruoth Nyasaye ne oyieri mondo ibed ruodh Israel." 
1Samuel15:18 Ne oori mondo idhi iked gi joricho ma jo-Amalek, kinegogi nyaka itiekgi chuth." 
1Samuel15:19 Koro marang’o ne ok iwinjo dwond Ruoth Nyasaye, mitimo gima rach e nyime, kimwomori, kendo ipeyo mwandu?”" 
1Samuel15:20 Saulo nodwoko Samwel niya, “Ooyo, asewinjo dwond Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo asetiyo tich mane Ruoth Nyasaye oorae. Asekelo Agag ruodh Amalek, kendo asetieko jo-Amalek chuth." 
1Samuel15:21 To ji ema nokawo rombe gi dhok mabeyo kuom mwandu mowe ni mondo okethi, mana ni mondo gitimgo misango ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachi, Gilgal.”" 
1Samuel15:22 To Samuel nopenje niya, “Iparo ni Ruoth Nyasaye ohero chiwo kod misengni moloyo mako chikene koso? Ooyo, mako chik ber moloyo misango, kendo chiko it ber moloyo boche imbe." 
1Samuel15:23 Tamruok mako chik chalo gi tim jwok, kendo wichteko chalo gi tim mamono. Isedagi chik Ruoth Nyasaye, omiyo en bende osedagi ni kik ibed ruoth.”" 
1Samuel15:24 Saulo nowacho ni Samuel niya, “Aseketho, kaweyo luwo chik Ruoth Nyasaye kod wechene bende, nimar naluoro ji, kendo nawinjo dwondgi." 
1Samuel15:25 Emomiyo koro asayi ni wena kethona, kendo lokri wadog kodi, mondo alam Ruoth Nyasaye.”" 
1Samuel15:26 To Samuel nodwoke niya, “Ok nadog kodi, nimar isedagi wach Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo Ruoth Nyasaye osedagi ni kik ibed ruodh Israel.”" 
1Samuel15:27 Kane Samuel olokore mondo odhi, Saulo nomako riak lawe, mi oyiech." 
1Samuel15:28 Eka Samuel nokone niya, “Kawuono Ruoth Nyasaye oyiecho loch Israel kuomi, kendo omiyo ng’at machielo, maber moloyo." 
1Samuel15:29 Bende Nyasaye ma en Duong’ Maler mar Israel ok riambi kata lokre, nimar ok en dhano ma dolokre.”" 
1Samuel15:30 Eka Saulo nowacho niya, “Aseketho, to kata kamano, asayi, miya duong’ kawuono e nyim jodong joga, kendo e nyim jo-Isarel. Wichri wadog kodi, mondo alam Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachi.”" 
1Samuel15:31 Kuom mano, Samuel nowichore, moluwo bang’ Saulo, kendo Saulo nolamo Nyasaye." 
1Samuel15:32 Samuel nowacho niya, “Kelnauru Agag, ruodh jo-Amalek.” Mi Agag nobiro ire gi mor, koparo ni koro ok obi tho." 
1Samuel15:33 To Samuel nowachone niya, “Kaka liganglani osenego nyithind mon, e kaka meru bende nobed achiel kuom mon ma nyithindgi onegi!” Eka Samuel nonego Agag achanya achanya Gilgal e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye." 
1Samuel15:34 Samuel nodok Rama, to Saulo bende nodok e dalane Gibea." 
1Samuel15:35 Samuel nokuyo nikech Ruoth Nyasaye ne oneno ni kara ne ok ber mondo oket Saulo ruodh Israel. Nyaka chop tho Samuel ne ok ochako oneno Saulo kendo. 
1Samuel16:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Samuel niya, “Ibiro kuyo nyaka karang’o, to asedagi ni kik Saulo obed ruoth? Koro ol mo e tung’ni mondo aori ir Jesse ja-Bethlehem, nikech aseyiero wuode moro mondo obed ruoth.”" 
1Samuel16:2 Samuel nodwoke ni, “Anyalo dhi nadi? To ka Saulo owinjo to donega!” Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho niya, “Kaw roya idhigo, kendo iwach ni isebiro mondo itim misango ni Ruoth Nyasaye." 
1Samuel16:3 To iluong Jesse obi e misango, eka nanyisi gima onego itim. Nyaka iwirna jal ma abiro nyisi.”" 
1Samuel16:4 Kuom mano Samuel nodhi Bethlehem kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nowachone. Jodong dala nobiro romone ka kirni, mi gipenje niya, “Ibiro gi kue koso?”" 
1Samuel16:5 Nodwokogi niya, “Ee, abiro gi kue, ni mondo atim misango ni Ruoth Nyasaye. Pwodhreuru mondo wadhi kar misango.” To Jesse gi yawuote, Samuel owuon ema nopwodho, moluongogi e misango." 
1Samuel16:6 Kane gichopo, Samuel noneno Eliab, moparo ni, “Adier, ng’at ma Ruoth Nyasaye oyiero eri ochung’ e nyime.”" 
1Samuel16:7 To Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Samuel niya, “Kik ing’i wang’e kata borne, nikech asedage. Ruoth Nyasaye ok ng’ichi kaka dhano ng’icho. Dhano ng’iyo ringruok, to Ruoth Nyasaye ng’iyo chuny.”" 
1Samuel16:8 Eka Jesse noluongo Abinadab, momiye okadho e nyim Samwel. To Samuel nowacho niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye ok oyiero jali bende.”" 
1Samuel16:9 Eka Jesse nomiyo Shama okadho, to Samuel nowacho niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye ok oyiero kata mana jali.”" 
1Samuel16:10 Kamano Jesse nomiyo yawuote abiriyo okadho e nyim Samuel, to Samuel nowacho ni, “Ruoth Nyasaye ok oyiero moro kuom jogi.”" 
1Samuel16:11 Eka nopenjo Jesse niya, “Magi e kar romb yawuoti duto koso?” Nodwoke ni, “Ooyo, pod odong’ machogo. En to okwayo rombe.” Samuel nowacho ni Jesse niya, “Or ng’ato oluonge, nikech ok wanyal bet piny kapok obiro.”" 
1Samuel16:12 Mi nooro ng’ato mokele e nyimgi. Ne en wuowi ma silwal, kendo man gi chia. Eka Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Samuel niya, “Chungi, iwire gi mo, nikech jali e en.”" 
1Samuel16:13 Omiyo Samuel nokawo mo, mowirogo Daudi e nyim owetene, mi Roho mar Nyasaye nobiro kuom Daudi gi teko, mobedo kode chakre chieng’no. Bang’e Samuel nowuok, modok Rama." 
1Samuel16:14 To Roho mar Ruoth Nyasaye noseweyo Saulo, kendo muya marach moa kuom Ruoth Nyasaye ne chande." 
1Samuel16:15 Jatich Saulo nokone niya, “Ruoth, ineno kaka muya marach moa kuom Nyasaye chandi." 
1Samuel16:16 Dak ior jotichni odhi odwarni ng’at mong’eyo goyo thum, mondo ogo thum e kinde ma muya marachno chandie, eka iyud kue?”" 
1Samuel16:17 Omiyo Saulo nowacho ni jotichne niya, “Ara dwarnauru jagocho molony.”" 
1Samuel16:18 Eka achiel kuom jotichne nodwoke niya, “Ang’eyo wuowi moro ma wuod Jesse ja-Bethlehem, molony e goyo thum. En ng’at ma jachir, kendo ma ratego e lweny. Ong’eyo wuoyo, kendo en jaber. Ruoth Nyasaye bende ni kode.”" 
1Samuel16:19 Kuom mano, Saulo nooro joote ir Jesse, kowacho niya, “Orna Daudi wuodi, ma jakwadh rombe.”" 
1Samuel16:20 Omiyo Jesse nokawo makati apar, gi ndede mar divai, kod nyadiel, moorogo Daudi wuode mondo oter ni Saulo." 
1Samuel16:21 Kamano Daudi nobiro ir Saulo, mobedo jatichne. Saulo nohere ahinya, mokete jating’ne gilweny." 
1Samuel16:22 Saulo nooro ni Jesse wach niya, “Yie iwe Daudi otina, nikech en jatich maber.”" 
1Samuel16:23 Omiyo kinde mane muya marach moa kuom Nyasaye chandoe Saulo, to Daudi ne goyo thum. Kamano chuny Saulo ne duogo, moyud kue, kendo muya marach ne weye." 
1Samuel17:1 Chieng’ moro jo-Filistia nochoko jolwenjgi kanyakla e dala moro mar Juda, miluongo ni Soko. Ne gijot Efes-damin, e kind soko gi Azeka." 
1Samuel17:2 Saulo gi jo-Israel bende nochokore kanyakla, mojot e holo mar Ela. Ne giyaro ni lweny, ka gichomo jo-Filistia." 
1Samuel17:3 Jo Filistia ne ni e got moro, to jo-Israel e got machielo, to holo nopogo kindgi." 
1Samuel17:4 Thwon moro ma nyinge Goliath ja-Gath, nowuok e kambi jo-Filistia. Borne ne dirom mita adek." 
1Samuel17:5 Nosidho ogut mula, kendo norwako akor mar nyinyo ma pekne ne dirom kilo piero auchiel." 
1Samuel17:6 Norwako mula e ogwendene, kendo noting’o tong’ abaja e goke." 
1Samuel17:7 Bond tonge ne chalo lodi, kendo pek mar wi tonge ne dirom kilo abiriyo. Jating’ kuode ne wuotho e nyime, kotelone." 
1Samuel17:8 Goliath nokok ni jolweny mag Israel niya, “Marang’o uyaro ni lweny? Donge ung’eyo ni an ja-Filistia, to un to un jotich Saulo? Ara yieruru ng’ato mondo obi orad koda." 
1Samuel17:9 Kokedo koda, monega, to wanabed wasumbni mau. To ka an ema aloye, manege, to unubed wasumbni mawa.”" 
1Samuel17:10 Eka nomedo wacho niya, “Athiano ni jolweny mag Israel ni kawuono keluru ng’ato mondo akedgo.”" 
1Samuel17:11 Kane Saulo gi jo-Israel duto owinjo weche ja-Filistiano, kibaji nogoyogi, mi gidoko maluor ahinya." 
1Samuel17:12 Daudi ne en wuod ja-Efrath ma Bethlehem-Juda, ma nyinge Jesse, mane nigi yawuowi abiriyo. E ndalo mag Saulo, Jesse nosebedo jaduong’ moti ahinya." 
1Samuel17:13 Yawuote adek madongo nosedhi gi Saulo e lweny. Nying wuode makayo ne Eliab, to jalupne ne Abinadab, kod Shama, wuode mar adek." 
1Samuel17:14 To Daudi ne wuode machogo. Yawuote adek madongogo nosedhi gi Saulo," 
1Samuel17:15 to Daudi ne tiyo ni Saulo ndalo moko, to ndalo moko nodok Bethlehem, kwayo jamb wuon mare." 
1Samuel17:16 Kuom ndalo piero ang’wen ja Filistia cha ne sudo machiegni, kanyisore okinyi godhiambo." 
1Samuel17:17 Chieng’ moro Jesse nowacho ni Daudi wuode niya, “Kaw atonga mar chamb abulani, kod makati apargi, iter piyo ni oweteni e kambi." 
1Samuel17:18 Modhi mong’in apargi bende ter ni jaduong’gi mar lweny. Dhi ine kaka oweteni obet, kendo iduogna wach ma kuomgi." 
1Samuel17:19 Gin kod Saulo gi jo-Israel duto e holo mar Ela, ka gikedo gi jo-Filistia.”" 
1Samuel17:20 Daudi nochiew gokinyi mang’ich, moweyo rombe gi jorit. Nokawo gigo modhi kaka Jesse nochike. Nochopo e kambi mana ka jolweny wuok dhi kedo, kendo ka gigiyo sigich lweny." 
1Samuel17:21 Jo-Israel kod jo-Filistia noyaro ni lweny ka gimanyore. 
1Samuel17:22 Daudi noweyo gik mane oting’o ni jarit misike, moringo odhi ir jolweny, kendo omoso owetene." 
1Samuel17:23 Kane pod owuoyo kodgi, thwon ma nyinge Goliath, ja-Filistia ma ja-Gath, nowuok kuom jolweny mag jo-Filistia, mowacho wechene kaka pile, kendo Daudi nowinje." 
1Samuel17:24 Kane jo-Israel oneno jalo, ne giringo giduto, ka luoro omakogi ahinya." 
1Samuel17:25 Ne giwacho niya, “Donge uneno jal mabironi? Obiro mana ni mondo othian ni jo-Israel. Ng’at monege, to ruoth nomi mwandu mang’eny, kod nyare okendi. Bende joodgi ok nogol osuru kata tiyo tich achune e Israel.”" 
1Samuel17:26 Daudi nopenjo joma nochung’ bute niya, “Ang’o ma ibiro timo ni ng’at ma nyalo nego ja-Filistia cha, kogolo wichkuot kuom jo-Israel? Ja-Filistia ma ok oter nyanguno en ng’a, ma dothian ni ogend Nyasaye mangima?”" 
1Samuel17:27 Jogo nodwoke niya, “Ruoth nomiye mwandu mang’eny, kod nyare okendi.”" 
1Samuel17:28 To kane Eliab, owadgi Daudi maduong’, owinjo Daudi ka wuoyo gi jogo, mirima nomake kode, mopenje niya, “Ang’o mokeli ka? Koso ng’ama iweyo ka ritoni rombe manok kande e thim? Ang’eyo sing’ayini, kod richo manie chunyi. Isebiro mana ni mondo ine lweny!”" 
1Samuel17:29 Daudi nodwoke niya, “Ere gima asetimo? Donge apenjo maber?”" 
1Samuel17:30 Mi nolokore oweye modhi ir ng’at machielo, kopenjo mana penjono. To ji nodwoke mana wach machalre." 
1Samuel17:31 Kane ji owinjo gima Daudi owacho, ne ginyiso Saulo, mi Saulo nooro ng’ato mondo oome." 
1Samuel17:32 Daudi nowacho ni Saulo niya, “Chuny ji kik nyosre nikech ja-Filistia cha. Abiro dhi kedo kode.”" 
1Samuel17:33 To Saulo nowachone niya, “Ok inyal dhi kedo gi ja-Filistiano, nikech pod in mana wuowi, to jalo osebedo jalweny chakre tinne.”" 
1Samuel17:34 To Daudi nodwoko Saulo niya, “Ruoth, an jakwath jamb wuora, to ka sibuor kata ondiek omako rombo e lek," 
1Samuel17:35 to aluwe, maked kode, mondo ares rombono e lake. To kapo ni ochikore kuoma, to amako yie tike kendo agoye, manege." 
1Samuel17:36 Asenego sibuoche gi ondiegi, omiyo ja-Filistia ma kia Nyasayeno bende biro tho mana ka ondiegigo, nikech othiano ni ogend Nyasaye mangima.”" 
1Samuel17:37 Daudi nomedo wacho niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye moseresa e kok sibuoche, kendo e kok ondiegi, biro resa e lwet ja-Filistiani bende.” Saulo nowacho ni Daudi niya, “Ara dhiyo, kendo Ruoth Nyasaye obed kodi.”" 
1Samuel17:38 Mi norwako Daudi kod gige owuon mag lweny. Nosidhone ogut mula, kendo orwakone akor mar nyinyo." 
1Samuel17:39 Daudi notweyo ligangla kuom gik ma norwaknego, to kane otemo wuoth, wuoth notame nikech ne pok ong’iyo kodgi. Omiyo nowacho ni Saulo niya, “Ok anyal dhi gi gigi, nikech pok ang’iyo kodgi.” Kuom mano nolonyogi," 
1Samuel17:40 mi okawo ludhe, kendo noyiero kite mapoth abich e aora, moketo e kirope mar kwath. Eka nomako arujre, mosudo machiegni gi ja-Filistiano." 
1Samuel17:41 Ja-Filistia bende nosudo machiegni gi Daudi, ka jating’ kuode otelone." 
1Samuel17:42 Kane oneno Daudi, nojare, nikech ne en mana wuowi moa, ma silwal, kendo ma jaber." 
1Samuel17:43 Nopenjo Daudi niya, “Iparo ni an guok koso, mibirona mana gi kede?” Mi nokuong’o Daudi e nying nyisechene." 
1Samuel17:44 Eka nowacho ni Daudi niya, “Bi ira ka, mondo achiw ringri ni winy mae polo, kendo ni ondiegi mae thim!”" 
1Samuel17:45 Daudi nodwoko ja-Filistiano niya, “Ibirona gi ligangla gi tong’ abaja kod tong’ dindo, to an abironi mana e nying Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto ma Nyasach jolweny mag Israel, mithianonigi." 
1Samuel17:46 Tinendeni Ruoth Nyasaye biro chiwi e lweta, mi abiro negi, kendo ang’ad wiyi oko. Ringri gi ringre jolweny mag jo-Filistia abiro weyo ni winy mae polo, kendo ni ondiegi mae thim, mondo piny duto ong’e ni nitie Nyasaye e Israel." 
1Samuel17:47 Kamano joma ochokore ka duto biro ng’eyo ni Nyasaye ok res joge gi ligangla kod tong’. Lweny en mar Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo en ema obiro ketou e lwetwa.”" 
1Samuel17:48 Kane ja-Filistia osudo machiegni mondo orad gi Daudi, Daudi noringo piyopiyo, kochomo jolwenj Filistia mondo orom kode." 
1Samuel17:49 Nosoyo lwete e kirope, mogoloe kidi. Nodiro kidino gi orujre, mogoyogo lela wang’ ja-Filistia. Kidi nopowo lela wang’e, mi nogore piny auma." 
1Samuel17:50 Kamano Daudi noloyo ja-Filistia mana gi orujre kod kidi. Nogoye, monege, kata obedo ni ne oonge gi ligangla kamano." 
1Samuel17:51 Eka noringo mochung’ kuom ja-Filistiano, kendo nowuodho ligangla ng’atno e olalo, mong’adogo wiye oko. Kane jo-Filistia oneno ni thwon-gi osetho, ne giringo." 
1Samuel17:52 Jo-Israel gi jo-Juda nogiyo sigich lweny, mi giriembo jo-Filistia nyaka Gath kod dhoranga Ekron. Ringre jo-Filistia mane onegi noriere e yo, chakre Shaarim nyaka Gath kod Ekron." 
1Samuel17:53 Kane jo-Israel oduogo koa riembo jo-Filistia, ne giyako kambigi." 
1Samuel17:54 Daudi nokwayo wi ja-Filistia cha, motero Jerusalem, to gik ng’atno mag lweny, nokano e hembe." 
1Samuel17:55 Kane Saulo oneno Daudi kadhi kedo gi ja-Filistia, nopenjo Abner jatend jolweny niya, “Abner, wuowino en wuod ng’a?” Abner nodwoke ni, “Ruoth, ok ang’eye ngang’.”" 
1Samuel17:56 Ruoth nowachone niya, “Penj ane nying wuon mare.”" 
1Samuel17:57 Omiyo, kane Daudi oa nego ja-Filistia, Abner nokele ir Saulo, ka en gi wi ja-Filistiano e lwete." 
1Samuel17:58 Saulo nopenje niya, “Wuowi, in wuod ng’a?” Daudi nodwoke niya, “An wuod Jesse ja Bethlehem, ma jatichni.”" 
1Samuel18:1 Kane Saulo otieko wuoyo gi Daudi," 
1Samuel18:2 nokawe chieng’ono mi ok oyiene odog ka wuon mare, nikech noneno ka chuny Jonathan oriwore gi chuny Daudi, mohere mana kaka oherore owuon." 
1Samuel18:3 Jonathan gi Daudi ne joherore ahinya, omiyo ne gikuong’ore ni osiep manie kindgi ok norum." 
1Samuel18:4 Jonathan nolonyo nanga mane orwako, momiyo Daudi kaachiel gi liganglane gi atung’e kod okandane." 
1Samuel18:5 Daudi nolocho kuonde duto mane Saulo oree, omiyo Saulo nokete jatend jolweny. Wachno nodoko maber ni ji duto, kata mana ni jodong Saulo." 
1Samuel18:6 Kane Daudi dok dala koa nego ja-Filistia, mon nowuok e miech Israel duto, mondo orom ni ruoth Saulo. Ne giwero wende geto, kendo ne gimiel ka gigoyo thum gi bul." 
1Samuel18:7 Ne gimiel ka giolo wer niya, “Saulo onego ji gana, Daudi to onego ji gana gi gana.”" 
1Samuel18:8 Wachno ne rach ni Saulo, omiyo mirima nomake ahinya. Nowacho niya, “Giketo ni Daudi ji gana gi gana, to an giketona mana gana kende. En ang’o machielo ma pod odongne, mak mana bedo ruoth?”" 
1Samuel18:9 Chakre chieng’no Saulo ne ng’iyo Daudi gi wang’ marach. 
1Samuel18:10 Kinyne muya marach moa kuom Nyasaye nobiro gi teko kuom Saulo, mi nodhumore e ode, kendo Daudi nogoyone thum, kaka nojatimo. To Saulo ne nigi tong’ e lwete," 
1Samuel18:11 mi nobayogo Daudi koparo ni mondo ochwowego oriwe gi kor ot, to Daudi noleng’o motony. Gima kama notimore diriyo." 
1Samuel18:12 Noyudo ka Ruoth Nyasaye oseweyo Saulo, to koro ni kod Daudi, emomiyo Saulo noluoro Daudi." 
1Samuel18:13 Kuom mano, nogole bute mokete jatend jolweny alufu achiel. Daudi ne telo ni joge e lweny," 
1Samuel18:14 kendo nolocho kuonde duto modhiye, nikech Ruoth Nyasaye ne ni kode." 
1Samuel18:15 Kane Saulo oneno kaka Daudi dhi nyime maber, nomedo luore ahinya," 
1Samuel18:16 to jo-Israel gi jo-Juda duto nohero Daudi, nikech notelonigi e lweny." 
1Samuel18:17 Saulo nowacho ni Daudi niya, “Ineno Merab nyara maduong’ni? Abiro miyigo, ikende. To in nyaka ibed mathwon, kikedona lwenje gi wasik Ruoth Nyasaye.” To Saulo ne dwaro ni mondo jo-Filistia ema oneg Daudi, ma ok onege en owuon." 
1Samuel18:18 Daudi nodwoko Saulo niya, “An ng’a, koso anywolana en ang’o, kata joodwa gin ng’a gini e Israel, ma dahedhra bedo or ruoth?”" 
1Samuel18:19 To kane ndalo ochopo ma Saulo onego chiwie Merab nyare ni Daudi, nochiwe mana ni Adriel ja-Mehola." 
1Samuel18:20 To Mikal nyar Saulo nohero Daudi, kendo kane Saulo owinjo wachno, nodoko mamor." 
1Samuel18:21 Noparo ni komiyego, to obiro bedone obadho, mondo jo-Filistia onege. Omiyo Saulo nochako oparo ni mondo Daudi obed chwor nyare." 
1Samuel18:22 Kuom mano nochiko jotichne mondo owach ni Daudi ling’ling’ niya, “Ruoth mor kodi, kendo jotichne duto oheri. Omiyo koro mondo ibed or ruoth.”" 
1Samuel18:23 To kane jotich Saulo onyiso Daudi, nodwokogi niya, “Uparo ni bedo or ruoth en gima yot koso, ma ng’at ang’ata ma jachan ka an kama, nyalo mana bet?”" 
1Samuel18:24 Jotich Saulo noduogo ire, monyise gima Daudi owacho." 
1Samuel18:25 Eka Saulo nowachonigi niya, “Wachuru ni Daudi ni ruoth ok dwar gima inywomone, to odwaro mana ringre jo-Filistia mia achiel, mondo ochulgo kuor ni wasike.” To Saulo noparo ni mano ema dimi Daudi tho e lwet jo-Filistia." 
1Samuel18:26 Kane jotich Saulo onyiso Daudi wechego, Daudi ne mor gi bedo or ruoth." 
1Samuel18:27 Omiyo nowuok gi joge ka ndalo moket pok ochopo, mi ne ginego jo-Filistia mia ariyo. Eka Daudi nokelo ringregi, mokwano ni ruoth mondo obed ore, mi Saulo nomiye Mikal nyare mondo obed chiege." 
1Samuel18:28 To kane Saulo oneno malong’o kaka Ruoth Nyasaye ni kod Daudi, kendo kaka jo-Israel duto ohere," 
1Samuel18:29 nomedo mana luore, mobedo jasike mochwere." 
1Samuel18:30 E kinde ka kinde mane jotend lweny mag jo-Filistia odhi kedo gi jo-Israel, Daudi ne kedo matek, kendo nonego ji moloyo jolwenj Saulo moko duto. Omiyo nyinge noyudo pak maduong’." 
1Samuel19:1 Saulo nowuoyo gi Jonathan wuode, kendo gi joge duto, ni mondo gineg Daudi." 
1Samuel19:2 To Jonathan nohero Daudi ahinya. Omiyo nonyiso Daudi wach niya, “Saulo wuora dwaro negi. Emomiyo tang’, mondo kiny ipond gokinyi kama ogeng’ore." 
1Samuel19:3 An to kiny nawuog machung’ but wuora e pap kama intie, kendo nawuo kode kuomi. Ka awinjo wach moro, to nanyisi.”" 
1Samuel19:4 Jonathan nowuoyo maber gi Saulo wuon mare kuom Daudi, kowachone niya, “Ruoth, kik itim marach ni Daudi jatichni, nikech pok otimoni gimoro marach, to osekonyi ahinya." 
1Samuel19:5 Noyie tho konego ja-Filistia cha, mi Ruoth Nyasaye nokelo konyruok maduong’ ni jo-Israel duto. Nineno mano, kendo nimor. Marang’o koro idwaro timo marach ni Daudi maonge ketho, kinege kayiem nono?”" 
1Samuel19:6 Saulo nowinjo wach Jonathan, mi nokuong’ore gi nying Ruoth Nyasaye ni ok noneg Daudi." 
1Samuel19:7 Bang’e Jonathan noluongo Daudi monyiso wachno. Eka nokele ir Saulo, mi Daudi notiyone kaka chon." 
1Samuel19:8 Lweny nochako owuok, mi Daudi nodhi kedo gi jo-Filistia, moloyogi chuth, nyaka ne giringo." 
1Samuel19:9 Chieng’ moro kane Saulo obet e ode gi tong’ e lwete, to Daudi goyo thum, muya marach moa kuom Ruoth Nyasaye nobiro kuome," 
1Samuel19:10 mi notemo chwowo Daudi gi tong, mondo oriw gi kor ot, to Daudi noleng’o, mi tong’ ochwowo mana kor ot. Eka Daudi nopusore motony." 
1Samuel19:11 Gotienono Saulo nooro joote mondo orit od Daudi, nikech nodwaro nege gokinyi. To Mikal chi Daudi nonyise wach niya, “Ka ok ipondo gotienoni, to kiny nonegi.”" 
1Samuel19:12 Omiyo noloro Daudi piny gie dirisa, mi Daudi noringo motony." 
1Samuel19:13 Bang’e Mikal nokawo kido mar nyasaye manono, moketo e kitanda, kendo noketone raten molos gi yie diek yo ka wiye, moumo duto gi nanga." 
1Samuel19:14 Kane Saulo ooro joote mondo omak Daudi, Mikal nowachonigi ni otuo." 
1Samuel19:15 Jootego noduoko ni Saulo wach, to noorogi kendo, mondo gidog gine Daudi kendgi giwegi. Nomedo wachonigi niya, “Keleuru gi kitanda, mondo anege.”" 
1Samuel19:16 To kane jootego odonjo, ne ginwang’o mana kido mar nyasaye manono e kitanda, kod raten molos gi yie diek yo ka wiye." 
1Samuel19:17 Saulo nopenjo Mikal niya, “Marang’o iwuonda kamano, miweyo jasika odhi, motony?” To Mikal nodwoke niya, “Nokona ni mondo aweye odhi, nono to onega.”" 
1Samuel19:18 Kamano Daudi noringo, motony. Nodhi Rama ir Samuel monyise gik moko duto mane Saulo osetimone. Eka ne gidhi gi Samuel, mi gidak Nayoth." 
1Samuel19:19 Nonyis Saulo wach ni Daudi ni kuno," 
1Samuel19:20 mi nooro joote mondo omake. To kane jootego oneno oganda jonabi ka dhumore, kod Samuel kochung’ ka jatendgi, Much Nyasaye nobiro kuomgi, mi gin bende ne gidhumore." 
1Samuel19:21 Kane onyis Saulo wachno, nochako ooro joote moko, to gin bende ne gidhumore. Eka Saulo nooro joote kendo mar adek, mi kata jogo bende nodhumore." 
1Samuel19:22 Bang’e nodhi Rama en owuon, to kane ochopo e soko maduong’ man Seku, nopenjo kuma Samuel gi Daudi odakie, mi ng’at moro nodwoke ni gin Nayoth e Rama." 
1Samuel19:23 Kane oyudo odhi kuno, Much Nyasaye nobiro kuome en bende kendo nodhumore kowuotho nyaka nochopo Nayoth." 
1Samuel19:24 En bende nolonyo lepe, kendo nodhumore e nyim Samuel mi noriere duk odiechieng’no gotienono duto. Emomiyo wachno olokore ngero ni, “Kara Saulo bende en achiel kuom jonabi.”" 
1Samuel20:1 Daudi noringo oa Nayoth e Rama. Nodhi ir Jonathan, nopenje niya, “Ang’o ma asetimo? Ere kethona? Ere gima rach ma wuoru oneno ni asetimo momiyo odwaro nega?”" 
1Samuel20:2 Jonathan nodwoke ni, “Ngang’! Ok odwar negi. Wuora ok tim gimoro amora, mak onyisa. Ere gimomiyo wuora dipanda wachni? Ok en kamano.”" 
1Samuel20:3 To Daudi nowachone, koramo niya, “Wuoru ong’eyo ni igena ahinya, omiyo ok odwar mondo ing’e wachni, nimar dipo ka obedoni malit. To adier, gi nying Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo gi nyingi iwuon, ondamo achiel kende ema nie kinda gi tho.”" 
1Samuel20:4 Eka Jonathan nopenjo Daudi niya, “Ere gima idwaro mondo atimni?”" 
1Samuel20:5 Daudi nodwoke niya, “Kiny due nopor, kendo owinjore abed gi ruoth e chiemo. To we adhi apond e lek nyaka chop odhiambo mar chieng’ mar adek." 
1Samuel20:6 Kapo ni wuoru oneno ni aonge, to iwachne ni, ‘Daudi nokwaya ahinya mondo ayiene oring odhi dalagi Bethlehem, nikech ndalogi ema joodgi duto timoe misango mar higa.’" 
1Samuel20:7 Kowacho ni, ‘Mano ber,’ eka anayud kue. To ka mirima omake, eka ning’e ni odwaro timona gimoro marach." 
1Samuel20:8 Emomiyo koro bedna jaadiera, nimar nikuong’orina e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye ni osiep manie kindwa ok norum. To ka aseketho, to nega in iwuon. Ang’o ma dimi itera ir wuoru?”" 
1Samuel20:9 Jonathan nodwoke niya, “We paro kamano! Ka da ang’eyo ni wuora dwaro timoni gimoro marach, donge danyisi?”" 
1Samuel20:10 Daudi nopenjo Jonathan niya, “To ere ng’ama nokelna wach, kapo ni wuoru odwoki gi gero?”" 
1Samuel20:11 Jonathan nowachone niya, “Bi wadhi oko e pap.” Mi ne giwuok giduto, gidhi e pap." 
1Samuel20:12 Eka Jonathan nowacho ni Daudi niya, “Akuong’ora e nying Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel ni kiny kata orucha, sa makama, nang’e gima wuora paro. Ka ayudo ni wach ber kuomi, to nanyisi." 
1Samuel20:13 To ka wuora dwaro timoni marach, mi ok anyisi mondo itony, to Ruoth Nyasaye mondo okweda. Ruoth Nyasaye obed kodi, kaka yande obet gi wuora." 
1Samuel20:14 Ka ok atho, to bedna jaadiera, kaka Ruoth Nyasaye dwaro. To ka atho," 
1Samuel20:15 to ibed jaadiera ni oda nyaka chieng’. Ka Ruoth Nyasaye otieko wasiki duto e piny," 
1Samuel20:16 to kik nyinga bed kaachiel kodgi. Ruoth Nyasaye mondo ochul kuor mana ni wasiki.” 
1Samuel20:17 Jonathan nochako okuong’ore ni Daudi kendo, nikech nohere mana kaka noherore owuon." 
1Samuel20:18 Eka Jonathan nowacho ni Daudi niya, “Kiny due nopor, kendo kiny nong’ere ni ionge, nikech komi nobed nono." 
1Samuel20:19 To kochopo orucha, to nong’ere ni ionge chuth. Omiyo chieng’no dhiyo kuma nipondoe chieng’ cha, ibed but pidh kite." 
1Samuel20:20 Eka naba kanyono gi aserni adek, ka ng’ama thoro," 
1Samuel20:21 kendo naor rawera moro, mondo odhi omany asernigo. Ka awachone niya, ‘Aserni eko ni e bathi koni, kawgi,’ to mano nyiso ni mondo iwuog kama ipondoe, nikech wach ber kuomi. Akuong’ora gi nying Ruoth Nyasaye ni onge gima biro timi." 
1Samuel20:22 To ka awachone rawerano ni, ‘Aserni nie nyimi’, to mano nyiso ni Ruoth Nyasaye dwaro mondo idhi adhiya." 
1Samuel20:23 To Ruoth Nyasaye mondo obed janeno nyaka chieng’ kuom singruok mane watimo kodi.” 
1Samuel20:24 Kamano Daudi nodhi mopondo e pap kendo kane due opor, ruoth nodhi e sawo." 
1Samuel20:25 Nobet e kome man but kor ot, kaka nojatimo. Abner nobet bute, kendo Jonathan bende ne ni kanyo, to kom Daudi ne ni nono." 
1Samuel20:26 Saulo ne ok owacho gimoro chieng’ono, nikech noparo ni Daudi ok obiro nikech gimoro ogeng’one. Kamoro en gi chola, to pok ogude." 
1Samuel20:27 Kinyne, kane due osepor, kom Daudi ne pod ni nono, mi Saulo nopenjo Jonathan wuode niya, “Marang’o wuod Jesse ok osebiro e chiemo, nyoro kata kawuono?”" 
1Samuel20:28 Jonatha nodwoke niya, “Daudi nohomba ahinya ni mondo ayiene odhi Bethlehem," 
1Samuel20:29 kowachona ni, ‘Asayi, yiena adhi, nikech joodwa timo misango dala, kendo owetena osechika mondo abedie. Emomiyo koro kiyiena, to we mondo adhi ane wetena.’ Mano emomiyo ok obiro mondo ochiem kodi.”" 
1Samuel20:30 Saulo nokecho gi Jonathan, mowachone niya, “In wuod dhako ma wiye tek, kendo ma jajemo! Donge ang’eyo ni imako osiep gi wuod Jesse, ma biro keloni wichkuot, kendo ni meru monywoli bende?" 
1Samuel20:31 Ndalo duto ma wuod Jesse osiko ka ngima e piny, in ok nidongi. Emomiyo koro or wach, iomnago, nikech nyaka otho!”" 
1Samuel20:32 To Jonathan nodwoko Saulo wuon mare niya, “Ere gimomiyo dotho? Ang’o mosetimo?”" 
1Samuel20:33 To Saulo nobaye gi tong’ mondo ochwowe. Mano omiyo Jonathan nong’eyo ni wuon mare dwaro nego Daudi. 
1Samuel20:34 Jonathan noa e mesa ka mirima mager omake, mokuno chiemo chieng’ mar ariyo mar sawo. Chunye ne lit nikech wach Daudi, nimar wuon mare noseyanye." 
1Samuel20:35 Kinyne gokinyi, Jonathan nowuok gi rawera moro, modhi e pap, kaka ne gichikore gi Daudi." 
1Samuel20:36 Nowacho ni rawerano niya, “Ringi imany aserni madwaro dirogi.” E sa mane rawera ringo, Jonathan nodiro aserni mokadhe." 
1Samuel20:37 Kane ochopo kama aserni olwarie, Jonathan nokone niya “Aserni ero nie nyimi." 
1Samuel20:38 Ruri, kik ideki.” Omiyo rawerano nochoko aserni, moduogogi ni Jonathan ruodhe." 
1Samuel20:39 To nokiya gima timore, mak mana Jonathan gi Daudi kende ema nong’eyo tiend wachno." 
1Samuel20:40 Bang’e Jonathan nomiye gige mag lweny, kowachone ni mondo otergi dala." 
1Samuel20:41 Kane rawera osedhi, Daudi noa kar pidh kite, mokulore didek, eka ne gimosore gi Jonathan, mi giywak giduto, to Daudi noywak moloyo." 
1Samuel20:42 Jonathan nowacho ni Daudi niya, “Dhiyo gi kue. Wasesingore e nying Ruoth Nyasaye mobedo janeno e kindwa kodi, kendo e kind nyikwaya gi nyikwayi nyaka chieng’.” Eka Daudi nochung’, modhi, to Jonathan nodok dala." 
1Samuel21:1 Daudi nodhi Nob ir Ahimelek jadolo. Ahimelek nodhi romone ka kirni, mopenje niya, “Ibiro kendi nang’o, ma onge ng’at ma un go?”" 
1Samuel21:2 Daudi nodwoke niya, “Ruoth oora e ote moro, kosiema ni kik ng’ato ng’e wach moro kuom oteni. To bende asechiko joga ma jolweny mondo orom koda kamoro." 
1Samuel21:3 Koro ere gima in go ka? Yie imiya makati abich, kata gimoro amora mantie.”" 
1Samuel21:4 Ahimelek nodwoke niya, “Makati onge ka, to mak mana mago mowal ni tich Ruoth Nyasaye kende, ma jogi nyalo chamo ka giseritore kuom mon.”" 
1Samuel21:5 Daudi nodwoko jadolo ni, “Adier, waseritore kuom mon, kaka watimo pile kwadhi kedo. E wuodhe duto mwadhiye jolweny ritore maler, to kawuono ok digibed maler moloyo?”" 
1Samuel21:6 Kuom mano jadolo nomiye makati mowal ni tich Ruoth Nyasaye, nikech makati moro amora ne onge kanyo, mak mana makati moket e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, migolo oko chieng’ miketo makati maliet kargi." 
1Samuel21:7 To ng’at moro ma jatich Saulo ne ni kanyo chieng’no, kogeng’e e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye mondo opwodhe. Nyinge ne Doeg ja-Edom, mane ng’at maratego moloyo kuom jokwadh Saulo duto." 
1Samuel21:8 Daudi nopenjo Ahimelek niya, “Donge inie gi tong’ kata ligangla moro ka, nimar ok nabiro gi ligangla kata gi gir lweny moro, nikech wach ruoth nobet arika.”" 
1Samuel21:9 Jadolo nodwoke niya, “Nitie ligangla mar Goliath ja-Filistia, jal mane inego e holo mar Ela cha. Ero okane e tok law dolo miluongo ni efod, koboye gi nanga. Kidware to kawe, nikech onge moro ka, mak mana en.” Daudi nowacho niya, “Miyago, nikech onge moro maloye gi ber.”" 
1Samuel21:10 Chieng’no Daudi nowuok moringo, kodhi ir Akish ruodh Gath, nikech noluoro Saulo." 
1Samuel21:11 To jotich Akish nowacho ni Akish niya, “Donge jali e Daudi ma ruodh pinygi? Ok en ema ne gimiel ka giwere nihya, ‘Saulo onego ji gana, to Daudi onego ji gana gi gana’?”" 
1Samuel21:12 Kane Daudi owinjo wachno, noluoro Akish ruodh Gath ahinya." 
1Samuel21:13 Omiyo noloko kite e nyimgi, kowuondore ni ojaneko. Nogwaro yiend dhorangach, kendo noweyo olape ka mol e yie tike." 
1Samuel21:14 Eka Akish nowacho ni joge niya, “Neuru! Neko omako ng’atni. Marang’o ukele ira?" 
1Samuel21:15 Donge an gi joneko moroma? Ang’o momiyo ukelo ng’atni mondo otim timbe neko e nyima? Udwaro ni jali obi odag e oda koso?” 
1Samuel22:1 Kuom mano, Daudi noringo modhi otony e rogo mar Adulam. Kane owetene kod joodgi duto owinjo wachno, ne gidhi ire kuno." 
1Samuel22:2 Bende ji duto mane nigi chandruok moro amora, kaka gowi kata ng’ur, nochokore ire, ma dirom mia ang’wen, mi odoko jatendgi." 
1Samuel22:3 Daudi noa kanyo, modhi Mizpe e piny Moab. Nowacho ni ruodh Moab niya, “Akwayi, yie mondo wuora gi mama odag kodi, nyaka chop ang’e gima Nyasaye biro timona.”" 
1Samuel22:4 Mi noweyogi e dala ruodh Moab, kendo ne gidak kanyo ndalo duto mane enie rogo." 
1Samuel22:5 Gad janabi nowacho ni Daudi niya, “Kik isik e rogo. Wuogi idhi e piny Juda.” Omiyo Daudi noa kanyo, modhi e bungu mar Hereth." 
1Samuel22:6 Saulo nowinjo ni osefweny kama Daudi gi joge opondoe. Noyudo ka Saulo ni Gibea, kobet piny e tiend yath moro mane ni ewi pith. Ne en gi tong’ e lwete, kendo joge duto nochung’ bute, kolwore." 
1Samuel22:7 Nowacho ni jogo niya, “Winjuru un jo-Benjamin, uparo ni wuod Jesse biro miyo ng’ato ka ng’ato puothe mag cham gi mag mzabibu koso? Koso uparo ni obiro ketou jotend ogend lweny madongo gi matindo?" 
1Samuel22:8 Kara mano emomiyo uduto uriwona? Onge ng’ato kuomu mosenyisa ni wuoda notimo singruok gi wuod Jesse, bende onge ng’ato mane chunye okecha, kata mane onyisa ni wuoda nothuwo jatichna koda, mondo obutna, kaka otimo kawuononi.”" 
1Samuel22:9 Eka Doeg ja-Edom, ma bende noyudo ochung’ gi jodong Saulo, nodwoke niya, “Naneno wuod Jesse kobiro Nob, ir Ahimelek wuod Ahitub." 
1Samuel22:10 Ahimelek nopenjone Ruoth Nyasaye wach, kendo nomiye chiemo kod ligangla mar Goliath ja-Filistia.”" 
1Samuel22:11 Eka ruoth nooro wach, moluongo Ahimelek jadolo, ma wuod Ahitub, kod joodgi duto, mane gin jodolo Nob, mi ne gibiro ire giduto." 
1Samuel22:12 Saulo nowacho niya, “Koro winji, wuod Ahitub.” Ahimelek nodwoke niya, “Ruoth, awinjo.”" 
1Samuel22:13 Saulo nopenje niya, “Marang’o uriwona gi wuod Jesse? Nimiye chiemo kod ligangla, kendo nipenjone Nyasaye wach. Mano omiyo koro osebalo koda, kendo osebutona tinendeni.”" 
1Samuel22:14 Ahimelek nodwoko ruoth niya, “To kuom jotichni duto, ere ng’at ma jaadiera ma dirom gi Daudi ma ori, ma jatend joma riti, kendo momi duong’ e odi?" 
1Samuel22:15 Kawuono eka achako penjone wach kuom Nyasaye koso? Ooyo, ok kamano! Kik ruoth jig wach kuoma, kata kuom joodwa duto, nimar nakiya wachno chuth.”" 
1Samuel22:16 To ruoth nowachone niya, “Nyaka itho, Ahimelek, in gi joodu duto!”" 
1Samuel22:17 Eka ruoth nowacho ni jorit ma nochung’ bute niya, “Dhiuru, uneg jodolo mag Ruoth Nyasaye, nikech gin bende giriwore gi Daudi. Ne ging’eyo ni oringo to ne ok ginyisa.” To jotich ruoth notamore nego jodolo mag Ruoth Nyasaye." 
1Samuel22:18 Omiyo ruoth nowacho ni Doeg ja-Edom niya, “In dhi ineg jodolo.” Mi Doeg nodhi momwomore kuom jodolo, kendo chieng’no nonego ji piero aboro gabich, mane joting’ law dolo miluongo ni efod." 
1Samuel22:19 Bende Doeg nomonjo Nob, dala jodolo, monego chwo gi mon, kod rawere gi nyithindo madhoth, kod dhok gi kenje gi rombe." 
1Samuel22:20 To wuod Ahimelek achiel ma nyinge Abiathar, notony, moringo odhi ir Daudi," 
1Samuel22:21 kendo nonyise kaka Saulo osenego jodolo mag Ruoth Nyasaye. 
1Samuel22:22 Daudi nokone niya, “Kane aneno Doeg ja-Edom chieng’ cha, nang’eyo ni asekelo tho ni joodu duto." 
1Samuel22:23 Bed koda ka, kendo kik iluor, nikech jal madwaro negino, ema dwaro nega an bende. To kibet koda, to nitony.”" 
1Samuel23:1 Chieng’ moro nonyis Daudi ni jo-Filistia kedo gi jo-Keila, kendo yako cham mane ni kuonde dino." 
1Samuel23:2 Omiyo nopenjo Ruoth Nyasaye wach niya, “Adhi aked gi jo-Filistia koso?” Ruoth Nyasaye nodwoke niya, “Dhiyo, iked kodgi, mondo ires jo-Keila.”" 
1Samuel23:3 To joma ne ni kod Daudi nowachone niya, “Ka luoro nyalo makowa mana e Juda kaeri, donge wanaluor moloyo kwadhi kedo gi jo-Filistia?”" 
1Samuel23:4 Kuom mano Daudi nochako openjo Ruoth Nyasaye wach, mi Ruoth Nyasaye nodwoke niya, “A malo idhi Keila, nimar abiro chiwo jo-Filistia e lweti.”" 
1Samuel23:5 Omiyo Daudi gi joge nodhi Keila, mokedo gi jo-Filistia. Ne giloyogi marach, kendo gipeyo jambgi, mi gireso jo-Keila." 
1Samuel23:6 Kane Abiathar wuod Ahimelek oringo odhi Keila ir Daudi, nodhi koting’o law dolo miluongo ni efod e lwete." 
1Samuel23:7 Saulo nowinjo ni Daudi odhi Keila, mi nowacho niya, “Nyasaye osechiwe e lweta nikech kosedonjo e dala man gi rangeye kod radedi, to osemakore owuon.”" 
1Samuel23:8 Omiyo Saulo nowako ji duto ni lweny, mondo gidhi Keila, gitim ageng’a ni Daudi gi joge." 
1Samuel23:9 To kane Daudi owinjo ni Saulo dwaro timone marach, nowachone Abiathar niya, “Kelna law dolo.”" 
1Samuel23:10 Eka Daudi nokwayo Ruoth Nyasaye niya, “A Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel, asewinjo ni Saulo dwaro biro Keila ka, mondo oketh dala nikech an." 
1Samuel23:11 Obiro biro adier kaka asewinjono, koso? A Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel, asayi mondo inyisa wachno.” Mi Ruoth Nyasaye nodwoke niya, “Obiro biro.”" 
1Samuel23:12 Eka Daudi nopenjo kendo niya, “Jo-Keila nochiwa kaachiel gi joga e lwet Saulo koso?” Ruoth Nyasaye nodwoke ni, “Ginichiwi.”" 
1Samuel23:13 Omiyo Daudi nowuok gi joge duto mia auchiel, modhi kamoro amora mane ginyalo dhiye. Kane Saulo owinjo ni Daudi oseringo oa Keila, ne ok odhi kuno." 
1Samuel23:14 Daudi nodak kuonde rogo e piny gode manie thim Zif. Saulo ne dware pile, to Nyasaye ne ok ochiwe e lwete." 
1Samuel23:15 Luoro nomako Daudi nikech Saulo nosewuok mondo onege. To kane Daudi ni Horesh e thim Zif," 
1Samuel23:16 Jonathan wuod Saulo nowuok, modhi ire kuno, mojiwe kotego chunye kuom Nyasaye." 
1Samuel23:17 Nowachone niya, “Kik iluor, nimar Saulo wuora ok bi nwang’i. Inibed ruodh Israel, to anabed jalupni. Saulo wuora bende ong’eyo kamano.”" 
1Samuel23:18 Mi ne gikuong’ore e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye ni osiep manie kindgi ok norum. Bang’ mano, Jonathan nodok dala, to Daudi nodong’ Horesh." 
1Samuel23:19 Jo-Zif nodhi Gibea ir Saulo, mi giwacho niya, “Daudi opondo kuomwa Horesh, e got Hakila, yo milambo mar Jeshimon" 
1Samuel23:20 Emomiyo ruoth, koro bi e kinde moro amora midwaro, mondo wachiwe e lweti.”" 
1Samuel23:21 Saulo nodwokogi niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye mondo oguedhu, nikech usetimona maber." 
1Samuel23:22 Koro dhiuru, unon mondo ung’e maber kama opondoe, bende ung’e joma osenene kanyo, nikech osenyisa ni ogalagala ahinya." 
1Samuel23:23 Ng’euru kuonde duto mopondoe, kendo uduogna wach madier. Eka anadhi kodu, kendo ka en e pinywa ka, to anadware kuom dhout Juda nyaka ayude.”" 
1Samuel23:24 Kuom mano ne giwuok, mi gidok Zif, motelo ni Saulo. To Daudi gi joge ne nie thim Maon man Araba yo milambo mar Jeshimon." 
1Samuel23:25 Saulo gi joge nowuok dhi dware, to nonyis Daudi wach, mi nolor odhi nyaka e lwanda manie thim Maon. Kane Saulo owinjo kamano, nolawo Daudi nyaka thimno." 
1Samuel23:26 Saulo nodhi e bath got konchiel, to Daudi gi joge ne nie bathe komachielo. Daudi ne reto mondo oyomb Saulo, nikech Saulo gi joge ne ochako timonigi ageng’a koni gi koni, mondo omakgi." 
1Samuel23:27 To e sa nogono, jaote moro nobiro ir Saulo mowachone niya, “Reti, ibi piyo, nikech jo-Filistia osemonjo pinywa.”" 
1Samuel23:28 Mi Saulo noweyo lawo Daudi, modok kedo gi jo-Filistia. Emomiyo iluongo kanyo ni, ‘Lwanda mar Pogruok’." 
1Samuel23:29 To Daudi noa kanyo, modhi odak kuonde rogo man Engedi." 
1Samuel24:1 Kane Saulo oa riembo jo-Filistia, nonyise ni Daudi odak e thim Engedi." 
1Samuel24:2 Omiyo noyiero ji alufu adek kuom jo-Israel duto, modhigo e thim mondo odwar Daudi gi joge yo wuok chieng’ mar Luendni mag Diek." 
1Samuel24:3 Nochopo e abilni mag rombe man but yo, kama ne nitie rogo, kendo nodonjo e rogono mondo olosre. To Daudi gi joge noyudo osedonjo e rogono, mobet piny gi yo ka iye." 
1Samuel24:4 Joma ne Daudi nigo nowachone niya, “Kinde koro osechopo ma Ruoth Nyasaye oketoe jasiki e lweti kaka nosingore. Omiyo timne gima idwaro.”" 
1Samuel24:5 To ka nosetimo kamano chunye noridore. Saulo nowuok oa e rogo, modhi nyime gi wuodhe." 
1Samuel24:6 To Daudi nowacho ni joge niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye mondo ogeng’a kik ahiny ruodha, kata mana lith lweta kik ater kuome, nikech en ng’at mowir ma Ruoth Nyasaye oyiero.”" 
1Samuel24:7 Kamano Daudi nogeng’o joge, mi ok oyienigi mondo gineg Saulo. To nochung’ mong’ado riak law Saulo ling’ling’." 
1Samuel24:8 Bang’e Daudi bende nowuok oa e rogo, mokok ni Saulo niya, “Ruoth!” Eka Saulo nogoyo machiemo, mong’iye. Daudi nogoyo chonge piny, ka miye duong’," 
1Samuel24:9 mi owachone niya, “Marang’o iyie gi joma wacho ni Daudi dwaro timoni marach?" 
1Samuel24:10 Ne kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nende oketi e lweta ei rogo kawuono. Jomoko nende owachona ni mondo anegi, to naweyi. Nende awacho ni ok nater lweta kuom ruodha, nikech en ng’at mowir ma Ruoth Nyasaye oyiero." 
1Samuel24:11 Bende wuora, ng’i ine riak lawi manie lweta. Nang’ade to ne ok anegi. Mano nyalo nyisi ni aonge gi paro mar timoni marach kamano. Kata obedo ni ilawa mondo inega, an to pok akethoni." 
1Samuel24:12 Ruoth Nyasaye mondo ong’ad bura e kindwa kodi, kendo en ema onyalo chuloni kuor kuom gima isetimona. To an awuon to ok natimni marach." 
1Samuel24:13 Kaka ngech joma chon wacho ni, ‘Richo wuok e chuny joma richo.’ To an ok natimni marach." 
1Samuel24:14 En ng’a ma ruoth dwaro? Ilawo ng’a? Ilawo mana guok motho, ilawo mana kikun!" 
1Samuel24:15 Ruoth Nyasaye mondo ong’ad bura e kindwa kodi. En mondo oyalwa kodi, nikech ong’eyo ni obiro chwaka, kendo wacho ni aonge ketho.”" 
1Samuel24:16 Kane Daudi otieko nyiso Saulo wechegi, Saulo nopenje niya, “Daudi wuoda, mano dwondi koso?” Eka noywak matek," 
1Samuel24:17 komedo wacho ni Daudi niya, “In ng’at makare moloya, nikech isetimona maber, to an to asetimoni marach." 
1Samuel24:18 Ng’wono mitimona kawuono duong’ motamore gi nono, nikech Ruoth Nyasaye noketa e lweti, to ne ok inega." 
1Samuel24:19 Ka ng’ato oyudo jasike, doweye mak onege koso? Emomiyo Ruoth Nyasaye mondo omiyi pok maber kuom tim misetimona kawuono." 
1Samuel24:20 Koro an gi ratiro ni inibed ruoth, kendo piny Israel nodhi nyime maber e bwo lochni." 
1Samuel24:21 Koro kuong’rina e nying Ruoth Nyasaye ni ok nitiek nyikwaya kata ok niruch nyinga kuom dhoodwa.” 
1Samuel24:22 Mi Daudi nokuong’orene kamano. Eka Saulo nodok dala, to Daudi gi joge nodok e rogo mane gidakie." 
1Samuel25:1 Samuel notho, mi jo-Israel duto nochokore kanyakla moywage kendo ne giyike e ode Rama. Bang’ mano, Daudi nodhi e thim Maon." 
1Samuel25:2 Ne nitie ng’at moro ma japith ahinya ma nodak Karmel e piny Maon. Ne en gi rombe alufu adek, kod diek alufu achiel. Noyudo ong’ado yie rombe Karmel." 
1Samuel25:3 Nyinge ne Nabal, to nying chiege ne Abigail. Abigail ne en dhako man gi rieko maber, kendo man gi chia, to chwore ne koch, kendo timne richo. Ne en ja dhood kaleb." 
1Samuel25:4 Daudi nowinjo gie thim kuno ni Nabal ng’ado yie rombe," 
1Samuel25:5 mi nooro yawuowi apar, kowachonigi niya, “Dhiuru Karmel, umosna Nabal." 
1Samuel25:6 Uwachne kama: ‘Bed gi kue, kaachiel gi joodi, kod ji duto ma in go." 
1Samuel25:7 Asewinjo kaka koro ung’ado yie rombe. Ka yande jokwadhi kwayo butwa, to ne ok watimonigi marach, bende gimoro ok nolalnigi ndalo duto mane gin Karmel." 
1Samuel25:8 Penj jogi, to gibiro nyisi kamano. Emomiyo rwak jogagi mang’won, nikech wabiro e ndalo maber. Akwayi ni mondo imi Daudi wuodi kod joge gimoro amora ma in go.’ ”" 
1Samuel25:9 Kane yawuowigo ochopo ir Nabal, ne ginyise gima Daudi owacho. To kane gitieko wuoyo," 
1Samuel25:10 Nabal nodwokogi niya, “Daudi to ng’a? Wuod Jesse to ang’o? Ndalogi wasumbni mang’eny ringo ka weyo ruodhigi." 
1Samuel25:11 Bende dakaw makati maga, gi piga kod ring’o ma aseyang’o ni joma ng’adona yie rombe, ami jomoko nono, ma akia kuma oaye?”" 
1Samuel25:12 Omiyo jo-Daudi noa kanyo modok, kendo onyise weche duto." 
1Samuel25:13 Eka Daudi nowacho ni joge niya, “Ng’ato ka ng’ato mondoo otue liganglane!” Mi ne gitimo kamano giduto, koda ka Daudi bende. Eka ji ma dirom mia ang’wen nodhi gi Daudi, to ji mia ariyo nodong’ ka rito gigegi." 
1Samuel25:14 To noyudo wuowi moro osenyiso Abigail chi Nabal niya, “Daudi nooro joote oa e thim mondo omos ruodhwa, to nong’ayonigi wach ang’aya." 
1Samuel25:15 To jo-Daudi nosetimonwa maber ndalo duto mane wan kodgi, kwakwayo rombe e thim. Ne ok githagowa, kata girwa moro ne ok olalnwa," 
1Samuel25:16 to ne gibedonwa kaka ohinga mogeng’onwa odiechieng’ gotieno. 
1Samuel25:17 Emomiyo koro, par gima onego itim, nikech gima rach biro timore ni ruodhwa. To nimar ing’eyo ni en ng’at machach, kendo onge ng’ama nyalo wuoyo kode.”" 
1Samuel25:18 Kuom mano Abigail noreto, mokawo makati mia ariyo, gi ndede ariyo mag divai, gi rombe abich moseyang’, gi migerni abich mag chamb aloda, gi tombo mia achiel mag olemb mzabibu motwo mong’in, kod tombo mia ariyo mag olemb ng’owo mong’in moting’ogi gi kanje." 
1Samuel25:19 Nowacho ni jotichne niya, “Teluru, an to abiro bang’u.” To ne ok onyiso Nabal chwore gima otimo." 
1Samuel25:20 Kane oyudo olor gi kanje e hoho manie got, nopo koneno Daudi gi joge ka biro, mi noromo kodgi." 
1Samuel25:21 Noyudo Daudi osewacho niya, “Nathagora kayiem, karito mwandu jali e thim, mak gimoro olal. To kata obedo ni asetimone maber kamano, en to osetimona tim marach." 
1Samuel25:22 Nyasaye mondo okweda ka aweyo kata ng’at achiel madichwo kuom joge kangima kawuononi!” 
1Samuel25:23 Kane Abigail oneno Daudi, noreto molor e kanje, kendo nogoyo chonge piny e nyime, mokulore nyaka e lowo." 
1Samuel25:24 Nolung’ore e tiende, mowachone niya, “Ruoth, kwana ka jaketho. To kata kamano, yie awuo kodi, kendo iwinj wachna." 
1Samuel25:25 Ruoth, kik idew ng’at ma achach miluongo ni Nabal, nikech ochalo gi nyinge. Nabal e nyinge, kendo orabala adier. To an, ne ok aneno yawuowi ma nioro." 
1Samuel25:26 Emomiyo koro ruoth, Ruoth Nyasaye osegeng’i mondo kik ichuer remo, kichulo kuor gi lweti iwuon. Gi nying Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo gi nyingi iwuon, wasiki duto kod jogo duto ma dwaro timoni marach mondo obed kaka Nabal." 
1Samuel25:27 To michni eri ma asekeloni, mondo imi joma in go." 
1Samuel25:28 Asayi, wena kethona, nimar adier Ruoth Nyasaye nomi dhoodi bedo mosiko, nikech ikedo gi wasike. Onge masira ma biro nwang’i e ndaloni duto." 
1Samuel25:29 Ka ng’ato lawi mondo onegi, to Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachi biro keto ngimani e kanyakla mar joma ngima morito ka mwandu mokan e ndede. To ngima wasiki nowit oko mana kaka kidi midiro gi orujre." 
1Samuel25:30 Chieng’ ma Ruoth Nyasaye osetimonie gik mabeyo duto mosesingoreni, kendo oseketi ruodh Israel," 
1Samuel25:31 ok nine malit, kendo ok nichari kendi, kuom chuero remo kayiem, kata kuom chulo kuor. To ka Ruoth Nyasaye osetimoni maber, eka mondo ipara.”" 
1Samuel25:32 Daudi nodwoko Abigail niya, “Apako Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel, moori tinendeni mondo irom koda." 
1Samuel25:33 Oguedh riekoni, kendo in bende oguedhi, nikech isegeng’a kawuono ni kik achuer remo, kendo kik achul kuor." 
1Samuel25:34 Adier, gi nying Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel, mosegeng’a ni kik atimni malit, ka da ok ireto ka ibiro romona, to kiny ka piny oru ok dodong’ni Nabal kata ng’ama dichwo achiel.”" 
1Samuel25:35 Eka Daudi nokawo gik mane Abigail okelone, mi owachone niya, “Dog dala gi kue. Asewinjo gima ikwayo, kendo ayiego.”" 
1Samuel25:36 Kane Abigail odok dala, noyudo ka Nabal timo sawo maduong’, mana ka sap ruoth. Nabal ne mor, nikech nomer ahinya, omiyo Abigail ne ok onyise gimoro kata matin, nyaka piny oru." 
1Samuel25:37 To kinyne gokinyi, ka kong’o noserumo e wang’e, chiege nonyise weche duto, mi chunye notho ka kidi." 
1Samuel25:38 To bang’ ndalo apar, Ruoth Nyasaye nochwade, motho." 
1Samuel25:39 Kane Daudi owinjo ni Nabal osetho, nowacho niya, “Apako Ruoth Nyasaye mosechulo kuor kuom achaye ma nayudo kuom Nabal, kendo ma nogeng’ona ni kik atim richo. To Ruoth Nyasaye osedwoko richo Nabal e wiye owuon.” Eka Daudi nooro wach ni Abigail, mondo okende." 
1Samuel25:40 Kane jotich Daudi obiro Karmel ir Abigail, ne giwachone niya, “Daudi oorowa iri, ni mondo wadhi kodi ibed chiege.”" 
1Samuel25:41 Mi Abigail noa malo, mogoyo chonge piny nyaka e lowo. Eka nowacho niya, “An mana misumba, ma nyalo lwoko tiend jotich ruoth.”" 
1Samuel25:42 Noikore mapiyo, moidho kanyna, kendo jotichne abich manyiri notere, ka giluwo bang’ joote Daudi." 
1Samuel25:43 To Daudi nokendo bende Ahinoam nyar Jazreel, mi mon ariyogo nobedo monde." 
1Samuel25:44 To noyudo Saulo osekawo Mikal nyare, ma chi Daudi, momiyo Paltiel wuod Laish, ma ja-Galim." 
1Samuel26:1 Jo-Zif nobiro Gibea ir Saulo, mi giwachone niya, “Donge ing’eyo ni Daudi opondo e got Hakila, momanyore gi Jeshimon?”" 
1Samuel26:2 Mi Saulo nolor mowuok odhi nyaka thim Zif gi jo-Israel moyier alufu adek, mondo odwar Daudi e thimno." 
1Samuel26:3 Nobworo but yo e got Hakila, momanyore gi Jeshimon, to Daudi ne nie thim. To kane Daudi ong’eyo ni Saulo obiro dware kuno," 
1Samuel26:4 nooro jombetre, mofwenyo kama Saulo obworoe." 
1Samuel26:5 Eka nowuok, modhi kanyono, moneno kama Saulo gi Abner wuod Ner, jatend jolweny, jonindoe e dier kambi, to joge noguro hembegi alwora." 
1Samuel26:6 Daudi nowacho ni Ahimelek ja-Hiti, kod Abishai wuod Zeruya ma owadgi Joab niya, “Ere ng’ama didhi koda mwalo e kambi Saulo?” Abishai nodwoke ni, “Wadhi kodi.”" 
1Samuel26:7 Omiyo Daudi gi Abishai nodhi kuno gotieno, moyudo Saulo ka nindo e dier kambi, to tong’e ochwowo piny gi yo ka wiye. Abner gi jolweny bende ne nindo bute alwora." 
1Samuel26:8 Abishai nowacho ni Daudi niya, “Nyasaye oseketo jasiki e lweti tinendeni. Yiena mondo achwowe dichiel gi tong’e, ariwe gi lowo, mak anwoyo lweta!”" 
1Samuel26:9 To Daudi nodwoke niya, “Kik inege, nimar onge ng’ama nyalo tero lwete kuom ruoth mowir ma Ruoth Nyasaye oyiero, mak doyud bura.”" 
1Samuel26:10 Eka nomedo wacho niya, “Gi nying Ruoth Nyasaye, Ruoth Nyasaye ema chieng’ notieke, kata ka chieng’ thone ochopo, kata kodhi e lweny." 
1Samuel26:11 Kuero ngang’! Kik ater lweta kuom ruoth mowir ma Ruoth Nyasaye oyiero. To wakaw mana tong’ ma yo ka wiyeno, kod puga mar pino mondo wadhigo.”" 
1Samuel26:12 Kamano Daudi nokawo tong’ gi puk pi mane ni yo ka wi Saulo, mi ne gia, ma onge ng’at monenogi, kata mowinjogi, kata mochiew. Ne ginindo giduto, nikech Ruoth Nyasaye nosemiyo nindo ogoyogi ngoga." 
1Samuel26:13 Daudi noidho loka machielo, mochung’ ewi got gi kuma bor, ka kindgi opogore malach." 
1Samuel26:14 Eka noluongo jolweny kod Abner wuod Ner, kowacho niya, “Abner, dak idwoka wach?” Abner nodwoko niya “In ng’awa, ma luongo ruoth?”" 
1Samuel26:15 Mi Daudi nowachone niya, “Donge in dichwo? Bende nitie ng’ama romo kodi e Israel? To ka kamano, nende ok irito ruoth maber? Donge ing’eyo ni ng’at moro nobiro nege?" 
1Samuel26:16 Gima isetimo ok ber. Gi nying Ruoth Nyasaye, uwinjoru gi tho, nikech ne ok urito ruoth, ng’at mowir ma Ruoth Nyasaye oyiero. Koro neye kuma tong’ ruoth nitie, kod puk pi mane ni yo ka wiye.”" 
1Samuel26:17 Kane Saulo ochamo dwond Daudi, nopenje niya, “Daudi wuoda, mano dwondi koso?” Daudi nodwoke niya, “Ee, mano dwonda, ruoth." 
1Samuel26:18 Marang’o ilawa, to an mana jatichni? En ang’o masetimo? Koso rach manadi miseneno kuoma?" 
1Samuel26:19 Koro yie iwinj wachna. Kapo ni Ruoth Nyasaye ema othuwi koda, to mondo oyie kawo misango. To ka ji ema othuwi koda, to mondo okuong’gi e nying Ruoth Nyasaye, nikech gisegola tinende ni kik abed e oganda mar jo-Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo giseriemba mondo adhi ati ni nyiseche mamoko." 
1Samuel26:20 Emomiyo koro kik iwe atho e pinyni, kuma bor gi Ruoth Nyasaye, nimar isewuok dwaro ngimana, mana ka ng’at ma dwaro aywer e gode.”" 
1Samuel26:21 Eka Saulo nowacho niya, “Aseketho. Duogi, Daudi wuoda. Ok nachak atimni gima dihinyi, nikech nende iluoro ngimana. Awuoro, asefuwo, kendo alal marach.”" 
1Samuel26:22 Mi Daudi nodwoke niya, “Ruoth, ne tong’i! Or jalweny moro mondo obi loka ku, oome." 
1Samuel26:23 Ruoth Nyasaye ema miyo ng’ato ka ng’ato pok mowinjore gi timne makare kod adierane. Ruoth Nyasaye nende oketi e lweta, to nadagi tero lweta kuom ruoth mowir ma Ruoth Nyasaye oyiero." 
1Samuel26:24 Kaka ngimani nende long’o e wang’a, e kaka ngimana bende mondo obed malong’o e wang’ Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo en ema mondo oresa e masiche duto.”" 
1Samuel26:25 Eka Saulo nowacho ni Daudi niya, “Oguedhi, Daudi wuoda! Initim timbe madongo, kendo nilo.” Mi Daudi nodhi, to Saulo nodok dala." 
1Samuel27:1 Daudi noparo niya, “Chieng’ moro Saulo nonega. Onge gimoro maber ma datim, mak mana karingo adhi e piny jo-Filistia. Mano eka Saulo nowe lawa, nikech kata komanya machal nadi e piny Israel duto, to ok nonwang’a, kendo natony kaa e lwete.”" 
1Samuel27:2 Omiyo Daudi nowuok gi ji mia auchiel mane ni kode, modhi ir Akish, wuod Maok, ruodh Gath," 
1Samuel27:3 mi gidak kode kuno. Ng’ato ka ng’ato ne ni kod joode. Daudi bende ne ni kod monde ariyo, Ahinoam nyar Jezeel, kod Abigail ma chi Nabal ja-Karmel." 
1Samuel27:4 Kane onyis Saulo ni Daudi oseringo nyaka Gath, noweyo dware." 
1Samuel27:5 Daudi nokwayo Akish niya, “Ruoth, ka koro iyie konya, to mondo imiya kamoro e mier maoko, adagie. Ok owinjore adag kodi e dalani.”" 
1Samuel27:6 Mi Akish nomiye Ziklag mana chieng’ono. Mano emomiyo Ziklag pod ni e bwo ruodh Juda nyaka chil kawuono. 
1Samuel27:7 Daudi nodak e piny jo-Filistia kuom kinde ma dirom higa achiel kod dueche ang’wen. 
1Samuel27:8 Ndalogo Daudi gi joge ne monjo jo-Geshur, gi jo-Girzi, kod jo-Amalek, nikech ogendnigo ema nodak e pinyno, chakre Telam kochomo yo Shur, nyaka piny Misri." 
1Samuel27:9 Daudi ne ketho pinyno ma ok owe ng’ama dichwo kata ma dhako ka ngima. Nopeyo rombe, gi dhok gi kenje, kod ngamia, kendo noyako lewni, to bang’e nodokga ir Akish." 
1Samuel27:10 To kane Akish openje ni, “Ia monjo kune kawuono?” Daudi ne dwoke niya, “Waa monjo yo milambo mar Juda,” kata, “Yo milambo mar piny jo-Jerameel,” kata, “Yo milambo mar piny jo-Keni.”" 
1Samuel27:11 Daudi ne ok we ng’ama dichwo kata madhako kangima, mane dikel wach Gath, nikech noparo niya, “Dipo ka gidonjonwa, ka ginyiso gima watimo.” Kamano e kaka tim Daudi nobet ndalo duto mane odakie e piny jo-Filistia." 
1Samuel27:12 To Akish nogeno Daudi, koparo niya, “Osemiyo jogi ma jo-Israel sin kode chuth, omiyo nobed ng’ata mosiko.”" 
1Samuel28:1 Ndalogo jo-Filistia nochoko jolweny duto mondo giked gi jo-Israel. Akish nowacho ni Daudi niya, “Ng’e malong’o ni in kaachiel gi jogi nyaka udhi koda e lweny.”" 
1Samuel28:2 Daudi nodwoke ni, “Mano ber, kendo ibiro neno gima anyalo timo!” Mi Akish nowachone ni, “Ber! Abiro keti jaritna mosiko.”" 
1Samuel28:3 Noyudo Samuel osetho, mi jo-Israel duto noywage, kendo ne giyike Rama, dalane owuon. To Saulo noseriembo jo-nyakalondo kod ajuoge duto oa e piny Israel." 
1Samuel28:4 Jo-Filistia nochokore kanyakla Shunem, mi gijot kuno. Saulo bende nochoko jo-Israel duto, mojot Gilboa." 
1Samuel28:5 Kane Saulo oneno jolweny jo-Filistia, luoro nomake, mokirni ahinya." 
1Samuel28:6 To kane okwayo Ruoth Nyasaye wach, Ruoth Nyasaye ne ok odwoke, kata e yor lek, kata e yor Urim kata gi dho jonabi." 
1Samuel28:7 Bang’e Saulo nowacho ni jotichne niya, “Dwarnauru dhako ma ja nyakalondo, mondo adhi ire, apenj wach.” Jotichne nodwoke ni, “Nitie dhako moro ma janyakalondo modak Endor.”" 
1Samuel28:8 Saulo no wako lewni mopogore gi mane ojarwako, mondo orweny ji. Eka nokawo ji ariyo, modhigo ir dhakono gotieno. Nowacho ni dhakono niya, “Korna wach gi nyakalondo, kendo igolna ng’at mabiro wachoni, kuom joma otho.”" 
1Samuel28:9 To dhakono nodwoke niya, “Donge ing’eyo gima Saulo osetimo? Oseriembo jo-nyakalondo gi ajuoge e pinywa. Marang’o ichika gi masira?”" 
1Samuel28:10 To Saulo nokuong’ore, kawachone ni, “Gi nying Ruoth Nyasaye, onge bura ma noyudi kuom wachnii.”" 
1Samuel28:11 Eka dhakono nopenje niya, “Agolni ng’a?” Mi nodwoke ni, “Golna Samuel.”" 
1Samuel28:12 To kane dhakono oneno Samuel kawuok, nokok matek, kowacho ni Saulo niya, “Marang’o iwuonda? To kara in mana Saulo!”" 
1Samuel28:13 To ruoth nowachone ni, “Kik iluor. Ineno ang’o?” Nodwoko Saulo niya, “Aneno nyasaye moro ka wuok ei lowo.”" 
1Samuel28:14 Mi Saulo nopenje ni, “Ochalo nadi?” Nodwoke niya, “Jaduong’ moti, moumore gi law abola ema owuok.” Eka Saulo nong’eyo ni en Samuel, mi nogoyo chonge pinyu, mokulore nyaka e lowo, komiye duong’." 
1Samuel28:15 Samuel nopenjo Saulo niya, “Marang’o ichanda, kimiyo awuok oko e liel?” Saulo nodwoke niya,, “Adhier nono, nikech jo-Filistia kedo koda, to Nyasaye oseweya, ma dwok moro ok odwoka, kata gi dho jonabi, kata gi yor lek. Emomiyo aluongi ni mondo inyisa gima onego atim.”" 
1Samuel28:16 Samuel nowachone niya, “Marang’o ipenja, kobedo ni Ruoth Nyasaye oseweyi, modoko jasiki?" 
1Samuel28:17 Ruoth Nyasaye osetimoni mana kaka nomiyo awacho. Osemayi loch, momiyo Daudi." 
1Samuel28:18 Osetimoni kamano nikech nidagi winje, kendo ne ok itimo ni jo-Amalek gima romre gi mirimbe mager." 
1Samuel28:19 To bende Ruoth Nyasaye biro chiwi kaachiel gi jo-Israel e lwet jo-Filistia, kendo kiny inibed koda ka, kaachiel gi yawuoti. Adier, Ruoth Nyasaye biro chiwo oganda lweny mar Israel e lwet jo-Filistia.”" 
1Samuel28:20 Kane Saulo owinjo weche Samuelgo, luoro nomake ahinya, mogore piny auma. Noonge gi teko chuth, nimar noyudo oseriyo kech odiechieng’ gotieno duto." 
1Samuel28:21 Dhakono nosudo bute, kendo ka noneno ni luoro omake, nokone niya, “Nende awinjo wachni, kendo nayie tho kane atimo gima nikwaya." 
1Samuel28:22 Emomiyo koro in bende yie iwinj wachna. We amiyie chiemo moro matin, mondo icham, iyudgo teko mar chako wuoth.”" 
1Samuel28:23 To nodagi ni ok ochiem, to jotichne kaachiel gi dhakono nomedo kwaye, moyie. Nochung’ koa e lowo, mobet e kitanda." 
1Samuel28:24 Dhakono ne nigi nyarwath machwe e ot kanyo. Noreto moyang’o nyarwadhno piyopiyo. Bende nokawo mogo, modwalo, kendo olosogo makati, ma ok oketie thowi." 
1Samuel28:25 Noketogi e nyim Saulo gi jotichne, mi ne gichiemo. Eka ne giwuok, mi gidhi mana gotienono." 
1Samuel29:1 Jo-Filistia nochoko jolweny duto kanyakla Afek, to jo-Israel nojot but thidhiya man Jezreel." 
1Samuel29:2 Jodong jo-Filistia ne chano jogi e migepe matindo gi madongo, to Daudi gi joge, kaachiel gi jo-Akish, ne luwo bang’gi." 
1Samuel29:3 Kane jotend jo-Filistia oneno kamano, ne gipenjo niya, “Jo-Hibraniagi to timo ang’o ka?” Akish nodwokogi niya, “Jali e Daudi, mane jatich Saulo ruodh Israel. Koro osedak koda moloyo higa achiel, to chakre ndalo mane obiroe ira, pok aneno rach moro kuome nyaka chil kawuono.”" 
1Samuel29:4 To jotend jo-Filistia nokecho kode, mi giwachone niya, “Kwer jali odog kuma niketee, kik odhi kodwa kedo, nimar dipo kolokore jasikwa e lweny, nikech kodwaro ni owinjre gi ruodhe, to doneg man jowa." 
1Samuel29:5 Donge en e Daudi mane ji miel ka wero ni, ‘Saulo onego ji gana, to Daudi onego ji gana gi gana’?”" 
1Samuel29:6 Omiyo Akish noluongo Daudi, mowachone niya, “Gi nying Ruoth Nyasaye, in jaadiera, kendo an to aneno ni owinjore wadhi kodi e lweny, nikech pok aneno rach moro kuomi, chakre ndalo mane ibiroe ira, nyaka chil kawuono. To kata kamano, jodongo ok oyie kodi." 
1Samuel29:7 Emomiyo koro dogi, idhi gi kue, ma ok itimo gima diketh chunygi.”" 
1Samuel29:8 To Daudi nowacho ni Akish niya, “Ere gima asetimo? Wach ang’o miseyudo kuoma ndalo duto masebedogo kodi nyaka chil kawuono, ma dimona dhi kedo gi wasiki?”" 
1Samuel29:9 Akish nodwoke niya, “Ang’eyo ni isebedona jaadiera, mana kaka malaika mar Nyasaye, to kata kamano jotend jo-Filistia osedagi ni kik idhi kodgi e lweny." 
1Samuel29:10 Emomiyo kiny ichiew gokinyi mang’ich, kaachiel gi jotich ruodhu ma nubirogo, kendo umondi ka piny dwaro ru, mondo udog e dala ma namiyou. To kik ibed gi chuny moro marach, nikech an to ageni chuth.”" 
1Samuel29:11 Kamano Daudi gi joge nowuok gokinyi mang’ich, modok e piny jo-Filistia. Jo-Filistia to nodhi Jezreel." 
1Samuel30:1 Chieng’ mar adek, Daudi gi joge nochopo Ziklag. To jo-Amalek noyudo ka osemonjo yo milambo mar Juda, kendo gisewang’o Ziklag mi giketho." 
1Samuel30:2 To mond dalano kod ji duto matindo gi madongo, ne gimako gidhigo, ma ok ginego kata achiel" 
1Samuel30:3 Omiyo kane Daudi gi joge jochopo e dala, ne giyudo kosewang’e, to mondgi gi yawuotgi kod nyigi oseter e tuech." 
1Samuel30:4 Daudi gi joge noywak matek, nyaka teko ma di gimed ywakgo orumo." 
1Samuel30:5 Ahinoam nyar Jezreel, gi Abigail chi Nabal ja-Karmel, ma mond Daudi bende noseter e tuech." 
1Samuel30:6 Daudi nodhier nono, nikech joge ne wacho ni mondo ogoye gi kite, nimar chunygi ne lit ahinya, ka ng’ato ka ng’ato paro yawuote gi nyige. To kata kamano Daudi noyudo teko kuom Ruoth Nyasaye." 
1Samuel30:7 Daudi nowacho ni Abiathar jadolo ma wuod Ahimelek niya, “Kelna efod.” Mi Abiathar nokelone law dolo miluongo ni efodno." 
1Samuel30:8 Daudi nopenjo Ruoth Nyasaye wach niya, “Anyalo lawo joma nomonjowago, koso? Bende dajukgi?” Mi nodwoke ni, “Lawgi, nikech adier ibiro jukogi, kendo ibiro reso jogi duto.”" 
1Samuel30:9 Omiyo Daudi nodhi gi joge duto mia auchiel. To kane gichopo e aora Besor," 
1Samuel30:10 ji mia ariyo nool ahinya, ma ok nyal ng’ado aora, omiyo ne gidong’ kanyo, to Daudi gi ji mia ang’wen nodhi nyime gi lepo." 
1Samuel30:11 Eka ne giyudo ja-Misri moro e pap, mi gikelo ir Daudi. Ne gimiye chiemo, mochamo, kod pi, momodho," 
1Samuel30:12 bende ne gimiye ng’owo mong’in, kod saga ariyo mag mzabibu motwo. Kosechiemo, chunye noduogo, nikech nosebedo ka ok oyud chiemo, kata pi modho kuom odiechienge adek gotieno adek." 
1Samuel30:13 Daudi nopenje ni, “In ng’at ng’a? In jakanye?” Nodwoke ni, “An ja-Misri ma misumba ja-Amalek. To ruodha noweya, nikech nyocha ayudo tuo, ndalo adek mokadho." 
1Samuel30:14 Ne wamonjo yo milambo mar piny jo-Kereth, gi mar jo-Juda, kod mar jo-Kaleb, kendo ne wawang’o Ziklag gi mach.”" 
1Samuel30:15 Daudi nokone ni, “Diyie itera ir jogo?” Nodwoke niya, “Kuong’rina e nying Nyasaye ni ok ninega, kendo ok nichiwa e lwet ruoth ma natiyone, eka dateri ir jogo.”"
