1Samuel30:16 Kamano notelo ni Daudi gi joge, mi ne giyudo jo-Amalek koke e pap. Jo-Amalekgo ne chiemo kendo metho, ka gimor nikech mwandu mang’eny mane gipeyo e piny jo-Filistia, kendo e piny Juda." 
1Samuel30:17 Daudi nonegogi chakre rum piny nyaka yuso piny. Onge ng’ato kata achiel kuomgi ma notony mak mana yawuowi mia ang’wen ma noidho ngamia moringo. 
1Samuel30:18 Daudi noreso ji duto mane jo-Amalek omako kaachiel gi monde ariyo. 
1Samuel30:19 Onge jamoko kata jachan, wuowi kata nyako, mane ok oreso. Nodwoko bende gik moko duto te mane jogo opeyo." 
1Samuel30:20 To bende nopeyo jambgi duto, mi jogo nosembogi e nyime, ka giwacho niya, “Magi gik ma Daudi opeyo.”" 
1Samuel30:21 Daudi noduogo ir ji mia ariyo mane oweyo aora Besor, ka tekogi orumo, kendo ok nyal luwo bang’e, mi jogo nowuok mondo oromne kaachiel gi joma ne ni kode. Kane gichopo machiegni, ne gimosogi, kendo gipenjogi kaka wach obet." 
1Samuel30:22 To jomoko maricho, kod joma acheje mane ni kuom joma nodhi gi Daudi, nowacho niya, “Jogi ne ok odhi kodwa, omiyo kik wapognigi gimoro kuom gik mane ope ma wasereso, mak mana ni ng’ato ka ng’ato mondo oyud chiege gi nyithinde, odhigo.”" 
1Samuel30:23 To Daudi nowacho niya, “Owetena, kik utim kamano kuom gik ma Ruoth Nyasaye osemiyowa, nikech en ema oseresowa, kendo ochiwo oganda ma nomonjowano e lwetwa." 
1Samuel30:24 Ere ng’ama diyie kodu e wachni? Ooyo, nyaka pog ni joma nodong’, ka rito misike, mana maromre gi joma nodhi e lweny. Nyaka pognigi maromre.”" 
1Samuel30:25 Chakre chieng’no nolokore tim jo-Israel nyaka chil kawuono. 
1Samuel30:26 Kane Daudi odok Ziklag, nooro gik mope moko ni jodong Juda ma osiepene, kowachonigi niya, “Aoronu mich moa kuom gik mwapeyo kuom wasik Ruoth Nyasaye.”" 
1Samuel30:27 Jogo nodak Datir," 
1Samuel30:28 gi Aroer, gi Sifmoth, gi Eshtemoa," 
1Samuel30:29 gi miech jo-Jerameel, gi miech jo-Keni," 
1Samuel30:30 gi Horma, gi Bora-shan, gi Athak," 
1Samuel30:31 gi Hebron, kod kuonde duto mane Daudi jorawoe gi joge." 
1Samuel31:1 Noyudo jo-Filistia kedo gi jo-Israel, kendo jo-Israel noringo, kinegogi e got Gilboa." 
1Samuel31:2 Jo-Filistia nojuko Saulo kod yawuote ma Jonathan gi Abinadab kod Malkishua, kendo ne ginego yawuotego." 
1Samuel31:3 Lweny nohingo Saulo, mi jodir-asere noyude, mochwowe kendo ohinye marach." 
1Samuel31:4 Saulo nowacho ni jating’ne gi lweny niya, “Wuodh liganglani, inegago, nono to joma kia Nyasayegi biro chwowa, kendo nyiera.” To jalo nodagi, nikech noluor ahinya. Emomiyo Saulo nomako liganglane owuon, mochwoworee." 
1Samuel31:5 To kane jating’ne gi lweny oneno ni Saulo osetho, en bende nochwowore e liganglane, motho gi kanyo." 
1Samuel31:6 Kamano, Saulo, kaachiel gi yawuote adek, gi jating’ne gi lweny, kod joge duto, notho chieng’no." 
1Samuel31:7 Kane jo-Isreal mane odak e holo machielo, kaachiel gi joma nodak loka Jordan, oneno ni jolwenj Israel oseringo, kendo ni Saulo gi yawuote josetho, ne gibolo miechgi kanyo, mi gin bende ne giringo. Bang’e jo-Filistia nobiro, modak e miergo." 
1Samuel31:8 Kinyne, kane jo-Filistia obiro dedo jomotho, ne giyudo ringre Saulo gi ringre yawuote adek, koriere e got Gilboa." 
1Samuel31:9 Ne ging’ado wiye oko, kendo ne gikawo gige mag lweny. Eka ne gioro joote e piny jo-Filistia duto, mondo oter wach maberno ni nyisechegi kod jopinygi." 
1Samuel31:10 Ne giketo gik Saulo mag lweny e od nyisechegi mamon, miluongo ni Ashtaroth, kendo ne gitueyo ringre e kor ohinga mar Bethshan." 
1Samuel31:11 To kane jo-Jabesh-gilead owinjo gima jo-Filistia osetimo ni Saulo," 
1Samuel31:12 thuondi duto nowuok, mowuotho otieno duto. Ne gigolo ringre Saulo kod ringre yawuote e ohinga mar Bethshan, mi gikelogi Jabesh, kendo ne giwirogi gi gik mang’ue ng’ar kanyo." 
1Samuel31:13 Eka ne gikawo chokegi, mi giyiko e tiend yath moro man Jabesh, kendo ne gitueyo chiemo ndalo abiriyo." 
2Samuel1:1 Kane Daudi oseduogo koa nego jo-Amalek, nonindo Ziklag ndalo ariyo." 
2Samuel1:2 Chieng’ mar adek ka Saulo osetho, ng’at moro nobiro moa e lweny koyiecho lepe, kendo obuko wiye buru. Kane ochopo ir Daudi, nokulore piny, komiye duong’." 
2Samuel1:3 Daudi nopenje niya, “Ia kanye?” Nodwoko ni, “Nyocha apondo aa e kambi lweny mar jo-Israel.”" 
2Samuel1:4 Daudi nomedo penje niya, “Ang’o motimore kuno? Wachna.” Nodwoke ni, “Jo-Israel oseringo oa e lweny, to thothgi osetho. Saulo gi Jonathan wuode bende josetho.”" 
2Samuel1:5 Eka Daudi nomedo penje kendo niya, “Ere kaka ing’eyo gi Saulo gi Jonathan wuode josetho?”" 
2Samuel1:6 Wuowino nowacho niya, “Noyudo an e got Gilboa, kendo naneno Saulo kosirore gi tong’e, to geche lweny gi joidh farese lwore machiegni." 
2Samuel1:7 To kane ogoyo machiemo, nonena, moluonga. Nadwoke ni, ‘Era e.’" 
2Samuel1:8 Eka nopenja ni, ‘In ng’a?’ Nadwoke ni, ‘An ja-Amalek.’" 
2Samuel1:9 Eka nowachona niya, ‘Bi ka, inega, nikech an gi rem malit, to pod angima.’" 
2Samuel1:10 Omiyo nasudo bute, manege, nikech nang’eyo ni ok onyal bedo mangima, kosehinyore kamano. Bang’e nakawo osimbo mane ni e wiye, kod ronge mane ni e bade, kendo ekigi.”" 
2Samuel1:11 Kane Daudi owinjo wachno, noyiecho lepe owuon, kendo ji duto mane ni kode bende notimo kamano." 
2Samuel1:12 Ne gisedo ka giywago Saulo gi Jonathan wuode kod jo-Ruoth Nyasaye, ma tiende ni jo-Israel. Bende ne gitueyo chiemo nyaka piny oyuso, ka giparo joma otho e lwenygo." 
2Samuel1:13 Daudi nopenjo wuowi ma nokelone wachno niya, “In jakanye?” Nodwoke niya. “An wuod ja-Amalek ma jadak.”" 
2Samuel1:14 Daudi nowachone ni, “Marang’o ne ok iluoro tero lweti kuom ruoth mowir ma Ruoth Nyasaye oyiero?”" 
2Samuel1:15 Eka noluongo wuowi moro kuom joge mowachone niya, “Bi inege.” Mi jalo nogoyo ng’atno motho." 
2Samuel1:16 Daudi nowacho niya, “Rembi obed e wiyi, nimar dhogi iwuon ema ong’adoni bura, kiwacho ni isenego ruoth mowir ma Ruoth Nyasaye oyiero.”" 
2Samuel1:17 Daudi nochwogo wend ywak ni Saulo gi Jonathan wuode. 
2Samuel1:18 Nochiko ni mondo jo-Juda opuonjre wendno kendo ondike e kitap Jasher, kama:" 
2Samuel1:19 “A Israel, jou madongo osenegi e godeu! Yaye, joma rateke osepodho." 
2Samuel1:20 Kik ihul wachni e Gath. Kik igo milome mare e wang’yore mag Ashkelon, dipo ka mond Filistia obedo mamor. Ee, dipo ka nyi joma kia Nyasayego obedo moil." 
2Samuel1:21 Un gode mag Gilboa, kik tho mok kuomu. Un puothe mag kuoyo, kik koth chue kuomu, nikech kuondegoo ema kuodi mag joma rateke odong’ie, ka kethore, kaachiel gi kuod Saulo, ma koro ok owir gi mo." 
2Samuel1:22 Atung’ Jonathan ne ok duog nono, mak ochuero remo, kata mak ong’olo boche mag joma rateke. Ligangla Saulo bende ne ok duog nono." 
2Samuel1:23 Saulo gi Jonathan ne joma oher kendo joma beyo. Ne ok gipogore e ngimagi kata e thogi. E ng’uech, ne giyot kongo. Ne gin rateke moloyo sibuor." 
2Samuel1:24 Un nyi Israel, ywaguru Saulo! En ema norwakou gi lewni makwar kendo mabeyo, kendo en ema noketonu dhahabu e lepu." 
2Samuel1:25 Yaye! Mano kaka joma rateke osepodho e lweny. Oneg Jonathan e lweny mager. A Jonathan, chunya lit nikech itho." 
2Samuel1:26 Ne ageni ahinya, kendo gen ma nigenago ne lich miwuoro. Ne okadho hera ma mon herogo chwogi." 
2Samuel1:27 Yaye! Joma rateke osepodho, kendo gigi mag lweny olal nono!”" 
2Samuel2:1 Bang’ wechegi, Daudi nopenjo Ruoth Nyasaye wach niya,, “Dadhi e dala moro mar Juda koso?” Ruoth Nyasaye nodwoke ni, “Dhiyo!” Daudi nomedo penjo niya, “Ere dala ma dadhiye?” Mi nodwoke ni, “Hebron.”" 
2Samuel2:2 Omiyo Daudi nodhi kuno, gi monde ariyo, ma Ahinoam nyar Jazreel, kod Abigail chi Nabal ja-Karmel." 
2Samuel2:3 Nodhi gi joge duto, ng’ato ka ng’ato gi joode, mi ne gidak Hebron." 
2Samuel2:4 Jo-Juda nobiro, mowiro Daudi gi mo, ka gikete ruodh dhood Juda. Kane onyis Daudi ni jo-Jabesh-gilead ema noyiko Saulo," 
2Samuel2:5 nooro joote irgi, kowachonigi niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye mondo oguedhu, nikech nutimo ng’wono ni Saulo ruodhu, kuom yike." 
2Samuel2:6 Koro Ruoth Nyasaye mondo otimnu ng’wono gi adiera. An bende natimnu maber, kuom timo kamano." 
2Samuel2:7 Emomiyo koro beduru joma otegno, kendo ma jochir, nikech Saulo ruodhu osetho, kendo dhood Juda osewira abed ruodhgi.”" 
2Samuel2:8 To noyudo ka Abner wuod Ner, ma jatend jolweny mag Saulo, osekawo Ishbosheth wuod Saulo, motero Mahanaim, loka Jordan." 
2Samuel2:9 Nokete ruodh Gilead, gi Asher, gi Jezreel, gi Efraim, gi Benjamin, kendo ruodh jo-Israel duto." 
2Samuel2:10 Ishbosheth ne jahigni piero ang’wen kane ochako bedo ruodh jo-Israel, mi nobedo ruoth kuom higni ariyo. Dhood Juda to ne luwo Daudi," 
2Samuel2:11 kendo Daudi nobedo ruoth kuom higni abiriyo gi dueche auchiel kodak Hebron. 
2Samuel2:12 Abner wuod Ner, kod joma ne luwo Ishbosheth wuod Saulo, nowuok Mahanaim, modhi Gibeon." 
2Samuel2:13 Joab wuod Zeruya, kaachiel gi joma ne luwo Daudi bende nowuok Hebron, mi ogendini ariyogi noromo e yawo man Gibeon. Jo-Daudi nobet e bath yawo konchiel, to jo-Ishbosheth nobet e bath yawo komachielo." 
2Samuel2:14 Eka Abner nowacho ni Joab niya, “We yawuowi oa malo, mondo otemre e nyimwa.” Joab nodwoke ni, “Ara, gitim kamano.”" 
2Samuel2:15 Omiyo ne gia malo, moyier ji apar gariyo kor Ishbosheth wuod Saulo gi jo-Benjamin, kendo ji apar gariyo kor Daudi." 
2Samuel2:16 Eka ne girakore, mi ng’ato ka ng’ato omako wi jasike, kohobo ng’etne gi ligangla, mine giruombore piny rat giduto. Omiyo kanyo nochak ni Helketh-hazurim, (tiende ni, Paw Lak Ligangla.) Pawno nie gweng’ Gibeon." 
2Samuel2:17 Negruokno nokelo lweny mager chieng’ono, kendo jo-Daudi noloyo Abner gi jo-Israel." 
2Samuel2:18 Yawuot Zeruya adek duto ne ni kanyo. Ne gin Joab gi Abishai kod Asahel. To Asahel, mane tiende yot ka mwanda," 
2Samuel2:19 nolawo Abner, ka ok ong’i korachwich kata koracham" 
2Samuel2:20 nyaka Abner nogoyo machiemo, mopenje niya, “Asahel, mano in?” Asahel nodwoke niya, “Ee, an.”" 
2Samuel2:21 Abner nowachone niya, “Bar korachwich kata koracham, mondo imak jalweny moro, ipe gige.” To Asahel notamore weyo lawe." 
2Samuel2:22 Mi Abner nowachone kendo ni, “Bar mondo iwe lawa, dipo ka agoyi manegi. To katimo kamano. To ere kaka dachung’ e nyim Joab owadu?”" 
2Samuel2:23 Kata kamano, Asahel notamore baro. Omiyo Abner nochwowo bund iye gi kapier tong’, mopowo nyaka ka ng’eye. Nogore piny, motho gikanyo. Kane ji duto ochopo kama Asahel othoe, ne gichung’." 
2Samuel2:24 To Joab gi Abishai nodhi nyime ka lawo Abner, nyaka chieng opodho. Mano noyudo ka gin e got Ama, kama omanyore gi Gia, e yo madhi e thim Gibea." 
2Samuel2:25 Jo-Benjamin nochokore bang’ Abner, kendo ne giriedo ni lweny, ka gichung’ ewi got moro." 
2Samuel2:26 To Abner nokok ni Joab, kawacho niya, “Ji biro negore nyaka chieng’ koso? Donge ing’eyo ni giko wachni biro bedo marach moloyo? Nyaka karang’o ma ibiro siko kikwero jogi mondo owe lawo jowetegi?”" 
2Samuel2:27 Joab nodwoke niya, “Gi nying Ruoth Nyasaye ka da ok iwuoyo, da ok giweyo lawo jowetegi nyaka piny oru!”" 
2Samuel2:28 Eka Joab nogoyo tung’, kendo ji duto nochung’. Ne giweyo lawo jo-Israel kendo kedo kodgi." 
2Samuel2:29 Gotienono duto, Abner gi joge nowuotho e holo mar aora Jordan. Ne ging’ado aora Jordan, kendo ne gichopo Mahanaim kar odiechieng’." 
2Samuel2:30 Kane Joab oduogo koa lawo Abner, nochoko joge duto kanyakla, monwang’o ni jo-Daudi apar gochiko osetho, ka ok okwan Asahel." 
2Samuel2:31 To jo-Daudi nosenego ji mia adek kod piero auchiel kuom jo-Benjamin mane luwo Abner. 
2Samuel2:32 Ne giting’o ringre Asahel, mi giyiko e liend wuon mare, Bethlehem. Bang’e Joab kod joge nowuotho gotienono thole, mochopo Hebron ka piny ru." 
2Samuel3:1 Lweny nodhi nyime e kind dhood Saulo gi dhood Daudi kuom ndalo momedore. Daudi nomedo locho, to dhood Saulo nomedo dok chien." 
2Samuel3:2 Yawuot Daudi mane onywolo Hebron e magi: Wuode makayo ne Amon, ma min mare ne Ahinoam, nyar Jezreel;" 
2Samuel3:3 mar ariyo ne Kileab, ma min mare ne Abigail, chi Nabal ja-Karmel; mar adek ne Absalom, ma min mare ne Maaka, nyar Talmai, ruodh Geshur;" 
2Samuel3:4 mar ang’wen ne Adonija, ma min mare ne Hagith; mar abich ne Shefetia, ma min mare ne Abital;" 
2Samuel3:5 mar auchiel ne Ithream, mane wuod chiege ma nyinge Elga. Jogi duto Daudi nonywolo Hebron." 
2Samuel3:6 Kane pod lweny dhi nyime e kind dhood Saulo gi dhood Daudi, Abner nomedo yudo duong’ e dhood Saulo." 
2Samuel3:7 Ne nitie chi Saulo moro, ma nyinge Rizpa, nyar Aya, ma nomiyo Ishbosheth openjo Abner niya, “Marang’o isedonjo e doho wuora, mitero chiege?”" 
2Samuel3:8 Abner nokecho ahinya nikech wachno, mi nodwoko Ishbosheth niya, “Ikawa ka guo Juda koso? Kinde duto asebedo jaadiera ni dhood Saulo wuoru, gi owetene kod osiepene, ka ok achiwi e lwet Daudi, to koro eka ichwanya kuom wach dhako!" 
2Samuel3:9 Nyasaye mondo okweda ka ok atimo ni Daudi kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nosingorene," 
2Samuel3:10 ni enogol loch kuom dhood Saulo, kendo noket Daudi obed ruodh jo-Israel gi jo-Juda, chakre Dan nyaka Beer-sheba!”" 
2Samuel3:11 Ishbosheth ne ok nyal dwoko Abner kata wach achiel, nikech noluore." 
2Samuel3:12 Abner nooro joote Hebron ir Daudi, kowachone niya, “Tim koda winjruok, mi nakonyi loko jo-Israel duto mondo oduog iri.”" 
2Samuel3:13 Daudi nodwoke niya, “Ber! Ayie timo kodi winjruok, to mak mana kikelo Mikal nyar Saulo, chieng’ mibiro nena.”" 
2Samuel3:14 Bende Daudi nooro joote ir Ishbosheth wuod Saulo, kowacho niya, “Dwokna Mikal ma chiega, ma nanywomo gi ringre jo-Filistia mia achiel.”" 
2Samuel3:15 Mi Ishbosheth nooro joote, mogolo Mikal kuom chwore ma Paltiel wuod Laish." 
2Samuel3:16 Chworeno nokowe nyaka Bahurim, ka ywak. To Abner nowachone ni, “Dogi!” Mi nodok." 
2Samuel3:17 Abner nowuoyo gi jodong Israel, kowachonigi niya, “Kuom ndalo mokadho usedwaro mondo Daudi obed ruodhu." 
2Samuel3:18 Koro keteuru, nikech Ruoth Nyasaye osesingore kuome, ka wacho niya, ‘Gi lwet Daudi anares joga Israel e lwet jo-Filistia, kendo e lwet wasikgi duto.’ ”" 
2Samuel3:19 Abner nowuoyo gi jo-Benjamin bende. Eka nodhi Hebron mondo onyis Daudi gik moko duto mane jo-Israel gi jo-Benjamin dwaro timo. 
2Samuel3:20 Abner nobiro Hebron ir Daudi, kaachiel gi ji piero ariyo mi Daudi norwakogi gi chiemo." 
2Samuel3:21 Bang’e Abner nowacho ni Daudi niya, “Ruoth, koro adok loko jo-Israel duto odogni, mondo gitim kodi singruok, kendo mondo ibed ruodh pinywa duto, kaka chunyi dwaro.” Omiyo Daudi nogoyo ni Abner oriti, modhi gi kue." 
2Samuel3:22 To Joab gi jo-Daudi noyudo duogo mana sano. Ne gia peyo, ka gikelo gik mang’eny mane giyako. To Abner ne koro osea ir Daudi Hebron, nikech Daudi nosemiye thuolo, modhi gi kue." 
2Samuel3:23 Kane Joab gi jolweny mane ni kode ochopo Hebron, nonyise niya, “Abner wuod Ner nobiro ir ruoth, mi ruoth oweye odhi gi kue.”" 
2Samuel3:24 Abner nodhi ir ruoth, mopenje niya, “En ang’o misetimo? Awinjo ni Abner nobiro iri. Marang’o imiye thuolo mondo odhi, momiyo koro otony?" 
2Samuel3:25 Donge ing’eyo ni Abner wuod Ner nobiro mana ni mondo owuondi, kendo ong’e wuodheni, kod gik mitimo duto?”" 
2Samuel3:26 Kane Joab osea ir Daudi, nooro joote mondo olaw Abner. Ne gijuke e soko mar Sira, mi giduoge. To Daudi ne kia wachno." 
2Samuel3:27 Kane Abner oduogo Hebron, Joab nobaro kode but rangach, ka gima odwaro wuoyo kode ling’ling’, mi nochwowo bund iye, monege, kochulo kuor nikech remb Asahel owadgi." 
2Samuel3:28 Kane Daudi owinjo wachno, nowacho niya, “An, kod joga, waonge bura e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye kuom tho Abner wuod Ner nyaka chieng’." 
2Samuel3:29 Rembe mondo obed ewi Joab, kendo kuom dhoode duto. E dhood Joab nyaka bedie ng’ama rembe chuer, kata ng’ama jadhoho, kata ng’at modere, kata ng’ama ochando chiemo!”" 
2Samuel3:30 Kamano e kaka Joab gi Abishai owadgi nonego Abner, nikech en ema nonego Asahel owadgi Joab gi Abishai e lweny Gibeon." 
2Samuel3:31 Daudi nowacho ni Joab gi ji duto mane ni kode niya, “Yiechuru lepu, urwakru gi piende gugru, kendo uywag Abner.” Daudi owuon nodhi e liel ka luwo bang’ Abner." 
2Samuel3:32 Ne giyiko Abner Hebron, kendo ruoth noywak gi mirima e liende, mi ji duto bende noywak kode." 
2Samuel3:33 Ruoth noywago Abner, kawacho niya: “Yaye Abner! Bende owinjore itho kaka ng’ama ofuwo adier?" 
2Samuel3:34 Lweti ne ok otue, kata tiendi ne ok omaki gi ratege. To nitho mana kaka ng’ato tho e lwet joma richo!” Bang’e ji duto nomedo ywage." 
2Samuel3:35 Ne gihoyo Daudi mondo ochiem, to piny ne pod odiechieng’, omiyo Daudi nokuong’ore, kawacho niya, “Nyasaye mondo okweda, kapo ni achiemo, kata abilo gimoro ka pok chieng’ opodho.”" 
2Samuel3:36 Wachno ne long’o ni ji duto ma nowinjo, mana kaka gik moko duto mane ruoth timo ne long’onigi." 
2Samuel3:37 Kamano ji duto nong’eyo chieng’no ni kara, ruoth ne kiya wach nek Abner wuod Ner." 
2Samuel3:38 Ruoth nowacho ni joge niya, “Donge ung’eyo ni jalweny maduong’ e Israel ema otho kawuono?." 
2Samuel3:39 Kata obedo ni an ruoth kamano, to yawuot Zeruyagi otamo wang’a. Ruoth Nyasaye ema mondo ochul kuor ni ng’ama rach moromo gi rach mosetimo.”" 
2Samuel4:1 Kane Ishbosheth wuod Saulo owinjo ni oseneg Abner, ka ni Hebron, chunye noa, kendo jo-Israel duto nobwok." 
2Samuel4:2 To Ishbosheth ne nigi jotend mony ariyo, achiel ne nyinge Baana, to machielo Rekab. Ne gin yawuot Rimon ja-Beeroth, ma ja-Benjamin," 
2Samuel4:3 nimar jo-Beeroth noseringo modhi Gitaim, mi gibedo jodak kuno nyaka chil kawuono." 
2Samuel4:4 Jonathan wuod Saulo ne nigi wuode moro mane tiende ong’ol. Ne en jahigni abich kane wach tho Saulo gi Jonathan okel oa Jezreel, mi japite noting’e moringo kode. To kane oyudo japidino reto mondo otony, nyathi nogore piny mohinyore, kendo nodoko rang’ol. Nyinge ne Mefibosheth." 
2Samuel4:5 Rekab kod Baana, ma yawuot Rimon ja-Beeroth, nodhi mochopo e od Ishbosheth godiechieng’ ka piny oore, mi giyudo koyueyo chieng’ makech." 
2Samuel4:6 Dhako ma jarit dhoot noyudo obet ka piedho ngano, to nochako nur nyaka nindo otere, mi Rekab gi Baana owadgi nolidho, modonjo e ot." 
2Samuel4:7 Kane gichopo e ot mane Ishbosheth nindoe, ne gigoye, motho kendo ging’ado wiye oko. Ne gikawo wiye, mi giwuothogo otieno tulu, ka giluwo yo madhi e holo mar aora Jordan." 
2Samuel4:8 Ne gikelo wi Ishbosheth Hebron, ni Daudi, mi giwachone niya, “Ruoth, wakeloni wi Ishbosheth wuod Saulo, jasiki, mane dwaro negi. Tinendeni Ruoth Nyasaye osechuloni kuor kuom Saulo, kendo kuom kothe.”" 
2Samuel4:9 To Daudi nodwoko Rekab gi Baana owadgi niya, “Gi nying Ruoth Nyasaye mosereso ngimana e masiche duto," 
2Samuel4:10 kane ng’at moro obiro Ziklag mokona ni Saulo osetho, koparo ni okelona wach maber, namake, manege. Mano e pok ma namiye kuom wach ma nokelo." 
2Samuel4:11 To koro nadi, ka joma richo osenego ng’at makare e ode owuon, kendo mana e kitandane? Donge owinjore achulnu kuor kuom remo musechuero, mondo ua e piny?”" 
2Samuel4:12 Mi Daudi nogolo chik, kendo joge nonego jogo. Ne ging’ado luetegi kod tiendegi oko, mi giliero e yath but yawo man Hebron. To wi Ishbosheth ne gikawo, mi giyiko Hebron, e liend Abner." 
2Samuel5:1 Dhout Israel duto nobiro Hebron ir Daudi, mi giwachone niya, “Ng’e ni wan mana remo achiel kodi." 
2Samuel5:2 E ndalo ruodhwa mokadho, kane Saulo pod ruodhwa, in ema nitelo ni jo-Israel e lwenjegi duto, kendo Ruoth Nyasaye nowachoni niya, ‘Inibed jakwadh joga Israel, kendo in ema nibed ruodhgi.’ ”" 
2Samuel5:3 Jodong Israel duto nobiro Hebron ir Daudi, kendo ne gitimo kode singruok kuno e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, mi giwire gi mo mondo obed ruodh jo-Israel." 
2Samuel5:4 Daudi ne jahigni piero adek ka nochako tich ruoth, kendo nobedo ruoth kuom higni piero ang’wen." 
2Samuel5:5 Nobedo ruodh jo-Juda kuom higni abiriyo kodak Hebron, kendo nobedo ruodh jo-Israel duto kaachiel gi jo-Juda kuom higni piero adek gadek kodak Jerusalem." 
2Samuel5:6 Ruoth Daudi nodhi Jerusalem gi joge mondo oked gi jo-Jebus ma weg pinyno. To jo-Jebusgo ne paro ni Daudi ok nyal donjo e dalagi, omiyo ne giwachone niya, “Ok nidonj ka, nikech kata mana muofni gi rang’onde oromo geng’ou!”" 
2Samuel5:7 To kata kamano Daudi nokawo Sayun, dala mochiel gi ohinga, ma tinde iluongo ni Dala Daudi." 
2Samuel5:8 Chieng’no Daudi nowacho niya, “Ng’ama dwaro loyo jo-Jebus, to mondo oidh gi aora motucho got, kendo oneg rang’onde gi muofni ma chunya osin-go kande.” Mano emomiyo iwacho ni, “Muofni gi rang’onde kik donj e Hekalu.”" 
2Samuel5:9 Bang’e Daudi nodak e dala mochiel gi ohingano, mi noluonge ni Dala Daudi. Nomedo gero udi molwore, chakre ohinga mar Milo, ka dok ka iye." 
2Samuel5:10 Duong’ mar Daudi koro nomedore ahinya, nikech Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto ne ni kode." 
2Samuel5:11 Hiram ruodh Turo nooro joote ir Daudi gi yiend sida, kaachiel gi jopa bao kod jogedo mag kite, mi jogo nogero ni Daudi ot." 
2Samuel5:12 Koro Daudi nong’eyo ni Ruoth Nyasaye osekete ruodh Israel, kendo osetego lochne ahinya, mondo oguedhgo joge Israel." 
2Samuel5:13 Kane Daudi osea Hebron, modhi odak Jerusalem, nomedo mon moko, ma nonywologo yawuowi gi nyiri" 
2Samuel5:14 Nying yawuote ma nonywolo Jerusalem e magi: Shamua gi Shobab gi Nathan gi Solomon," 
2Samuel5:15 gi Ibhar gi Elishua gi Nefeg gi Jafia 
2Samuel5:16 gi Elishama gi Eliada kod Elifelet. 
2Samuel5:17 Kane jo-Filistia owinjo ni osewir Daudi mondo obed ruodh Israel, ne gibiro kar rombgi mondo gimonje. To kane Daudi owinjo kamano, nolor modhi e dala mochiel gi ohinga cha." 
2Samuel5:18 Kane jo-Filistia ochopo, ne giyaro ni lweny e paw holo mar Refaim." 
2Samuel5:19 Daudi nopenjo Ruoth Nyasaye wach niya, “Kadhi kedo gi jo-Filistia, nichiwgi e lweta koso?” Ruoth Nyasaye nodwoke niya, “Dhiyo; nachiwgi e lweti.”" 
2Samuel5:20 Mi Daudi nodhi Baal-perizim, momonjogi, kendo oloyogi. Eka nowacho niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye osemwomore kuom wasikwa, mana kaka aora mwomo genge.” Mano emomiyo nochak kanyo ni Baal-perizim, (tiende ni, Ruodh mwomruok.)" 
2Samuel5:21 Jo-Filistia noringo moweyo nyisechegi kanyo, mi Daudi kod joge nokawogi." 
2Samuel5:22 Chieng’ machielo jo-Filistia noduogo kendo mochako oyaro ni lweny e paw holo mar Refaim. 
2Samuel5:23 Daudi nochako openjo Ruoth Nyasaye wach, mi Ruoth Nyasaye nodwoke niya, “Kik ichomgi tir, to ng’ad yo ka ng’egi mondo imonjgi kama omanyore gi yien maboyo ka." 
2Samuel5:24 Kiwinjo mutni ewi yien, ka mutni mag ji mawuotho, to ireti, nimar asetelo nyimi, mondo adhi alo jolweny mag jo-Filistia.”" 
2Samuel5:25 Daudi notimo kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nochike mi nonego jo-Filistia chakre Geba nyaka Gezer. 
2Samuel6:1 Daudi nochako ochoko jolweny moyier duto mag Israel, alufu piero adek." 
2Samuel6:2 Eka nowuok kaachiel kodgi, modhi Baale-juda, mondo oom Sanduk mar Nyasaye, miluongogo nying Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto, mobet kuom kerubi kaka ruoth bet e kom duong’ne." 
2Samuel6:3 Ne giketo Sanduk mar Nyasaye e gari manyien, ka gigole e od Abinadab mane nie got. Uza gi Ahio, ma yawuot Abinadab, ema ne chiko gari manyienno," 
2Samuel6:4 moting’o Sanduk mar Nyasaye, ka Ahio otelo e nyim Sanduk." 
2Samuel6:5 Daudi gi dhood jo-Israel te ne jomiel gi tekregi duto e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye ka giwer, kendo gigoyo nyigwerni gi nyidwonge gi ajape kod ongeng’o." 
2Samuel6:6 To kane gichopo kar dino moro, dhok mane ywayo gari nochwanyore, mi Uza norieyo bade mondo ojuk Sanduk mane dwaro podho." 
2Samuel6:7 To Ruoth Nyasaye nokecho kode, mochwade kanyo nikech nomako Sanduk. Mi notho but Sanduk mar Nyasaye." 
2Samuel6:8 Daudi nokecho nikech Ruoth Nyasaye nomwomore kuom Uza, omiyo nochako kanyo ni Perez-uza, (tiende ni Mwomruok kuom Uza.) Pod iluonge kamano nyaka chil kawuono." 
2Samuel6:9 Daudi noluoro Ruoth Nyasaye chieng’no, mowacho niya, “Kara Sanduk mar Ruoth Nyasaye ok onego bed e dalana.”" 
2Samuel6:10 Omiyo ne ok odwar kelo Sanduk mar Ruoth Nyasaye e dalane, to nobaro kode, motere e od Obed-edom ja-Giti." 
2Samuel6:11 Sanduk mar Ruoth Nyasaye nobet e od Obed-edom ja-Giti kuom dueche adek, mi Ruoth Nyasaye noguedho Obed-edom gi joode duto." 
2Samuel6:12 Nonyis ruoth Daudi wach niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye oseguedho od Obed-edom kod gige duto nikech Sanduk mar Nyasaye ni kuno.” Omiyo Daudi nodhi moomo Sanduk mar Nyasaye e od Obed-edom, kendo nokele dalane gi mor." 
2Samuel6:13 Kane joma oting’o Sanduk mar Ruoth Nyasaye osewuotho ondamo auchiel, Daudi notimo misango gi rwath kod im machwe." 
2Samuel6:14 Nomiel aduwa e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye gi tekre duto, korwakore gi law dolo." 
2Samuel6:15 Kamano Daudi gi dhood jo-Israel duto nokelo Sanduk mar Ruoth Nyasaye gi mahu maduong’ kod tung’ ka ywak. 
2Samuel6:16 Kane Sanduk mar Ruoth Nyasaye ochopo e dala Daudi, Mikal nyar Saulo nong’icho gie dirisa, moneno ruoth Daudi ka chikore kendo miel aduwa e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, mi nochaye gi chunye." 
2Samuel6:17 Ne gikelo Sanduk mar Ruoth Nyasaye, mi giketo kare e hema mane Daudi ogurone. Eka Daudi notimo misengni miwang’o pep, kod misengni mag sawo e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye." 
2Samuel6:18 Kane osetieko misengnigo, noguedho jo-Israel e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto," 
2Samuel6:19 kendo nopogonigi chiemo giduto. Ng’ato ka ng’ato ma dichwo kata ma dhako manie oganda Israel, noyudo makati achiel gi ring’o, kod mzabibu motwo mong’in. Eka ji duto nodok miechgi." 
2Samuel6:20 Daudi bende nodok e ode mondo one joode. To Mikal nyar Saulo nowuok romone, mowachone niya, “Tho! Mano duong’ manadi ma nende ruodh Israel oyudo kawuono, komore duk e nyim nyiri ma tiyo ni jotichne, koelore ka ng’ama ofuwo!”" 
2Samuel6:21 Daudi nodwoko Mikal niya, “Nende amiel e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye ma noyiera kar wuoru gi joode duto, koketa ruodh jo-Israel, ma ogadane. Pod abiro miel e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye," 
2Samuel6:22 ka amedo bedo ng’ama iseyo mokadho ka. Dipo ka in ema ichaya, to nyiri miwachogo biro miya duong’.”" 
2Samuel6:23 Mikal nyar Saulo ne ok onywolo nyathi nyaka thone. 
2Samuel7:1 Kane ruoth osechako dak e ode ma nogero, kendo Ruoth Nyasaye omiye kue e kinde gi wasike duto ma nolwore koni gi koni," 
2Samuel7:2 nowacho ni Nathan janabi niya, “Koro an adak e ot moger maber gi yiend sida, to Sanduk mar Nyasaye odak mana e hema.”" 
2Samuel7:3 Nathan nodwoko ruoth niya, “Tim duto midwaro, nikech Ruoth Nyasaye ni kodi.”" 
2Samuel7:4 To gotienono, wach Ruoth Nyasaye nobiro ni Nathan niya," 
2Samuel7:5 “Dhiyo, inyis Daudi jatichna ni Ruoth Nyasaye owacho kama: ‘In digerna ot ma mondo adagie adier?" 
2Samuel7:6 Chakre ndalo mane agoloe jo-Israel e piny Misri, nyaka chil kawuono, pok adak e ot, to asebet ka adak e hema." 
2Samuel7:7 Kuonde duto ma nawuothoe gi jo-Israel duto, ne ok apenjo achiel kuom jobura ma naketo mondo obed jokwadh joga Israel gimomiyo ok gigerona ot mar yiend sida.’" 
2Samuel7:8 Bende nyis Daudi ni Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko duto owacho kama: ‘Ne agoli e lek, kuma nikwayoe rombe, mondo ibed jatend joga Israel." 
2Samuel7:9 Asebet kodi kuonde duto midhiye, kendo asetiekoni wasiki duto. Koro abiro miyo nyingi bedo gi huma maduong’, ka humb joma dongo mag piny," 
2Samuel7:10 kendo abiro miyo joga Israel pinygi giwegi. Anagurgi kuno, kendo ginidagie ma ok othaggi kendo, kaka chon," 
2Samuel7:11 chakre ndalo mane aketoe jobura mondo oritgi, to anamiyi kue e kindi gi wasiki duto. To bende awacho ni anaguedh dhoodi mondo osiki." 
2Samuel7:12 Kisetho, minindo e liel gi kwereni, to anaket achiel kuom yawuoti kari, kendo anagur lochne obed motegno." 
2Samuel7:13 En ema nogerna ot, kendo anager lochne osik nyaka chieng’." 
2Samuel7:14 Anabed wuon mare, kendo enobed wuoda, koketho, to anachwade kaka wuon nyathi chwado nyathine," 
2Samuel7:15 to ok nagol herana kuome, kaka nagolo kuom Saulo, ma nariembo mondo oweni thuolo." 
2Samuel7:16 Dhoodi gi lochni ogur matek e nyima, kendo lochni nosik nyaka chieng’.’ ”" 
2Samuel7:17 Nathan nonyiso ruoth Daudi weche duto ma nofwenyne," 
2Samuel7:18 mi ruoth nodhi e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, mobet piny. Nowacho niya, “A Ruoth Nyasaye, an ng’a, koso dhooda en ang’o momiyo isemiya duong’ ma kama?" 
2Samuel7:19 To gima isetimona pod in ikwano ka gima tin, nimar bende isewacho ni dhooda nosik kuom ndalo mang’eny, kendo isenyisa kaka tienge mabiro nochal." 
2Samuel7:20 A Ruoth Nyasaye, ang’o ma damed wachoni, to ing’eya oko gi iye?" 
2Samuel7:21 Isemiya ng’eyo gik madongo misetimogi, mana nikech singruokni, kendo nikech mano ema idwaro." 
2Samuel7:22 A Ruoth Nyasaye, in ema iduong’, kendo pok wawinjo ni nitie nyasaye moro machal kodi. Onge nyasaye moro mak mana in." 
2Samuel7:23 Ere oganda moro e piny, machalo gi jogi Israel? Bende nitie jopiny moro mane isedhi miwaro e tich misumba, miloko jogi? Ere oganda moro, misetimonigi gik madongo malich, kimiyogo nyingi duong? Koso ere oganda machielo misereso, kigolo Misri mondo obed jogi iwuon, kendo kiriembonigi ogendini mamoko gi nyisechegi mondo oweni thuolo?" 
2Samuel7:24 Niwalo jogi Israel mondo obed jogi nyaka chieng’, kendo in, a Ruoth Nyasaye, ema isedoko Nyasachgi." 
2Samuel7:25 To koro, Ruoth Nyasaye, mi singruok misetimona kaachiel gi dhooda obed gi teko nyaka chieng’, mi ichop gima isewacho." 
2Samuel7:26 Nyingi mondo oyud duong’ nyaka chieng’ ka ji wacho niya, ‘Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto en Nyasach Israel.’ Kamano dhooda nodongi e nyimi," 
2Samuel7:27 nimar in, Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto en Nyasach Israel, ema isenyisa wach ni ibiro dongo oda. Kuom mano asebedo gi chir mondo alem kama e nyimi." 
2Samuel7:28 A Ruoth Nyasaye, in e Nyasaye adier. Wecheni gin adier, kendo isesingorina maber kama." 
2Samuel7:29 Emomiyo koro, A Ruoth Nyasaye, yie iguedh dhooda mondo osik e nyimi nyaka chieng’. In Ruoth Nyasaye ema isesingori kamano, omiyo dhooda noyud gueth nyaka chieng’.”" 
2Samuel8:1 Bang’e Daudi noloyo jo-Filistia mi gibedo moboch, kendo nomayogi Metheg-ama, dalagi." 
2Samuel8:2 Noloyo jo-Moab bende, kendo nochikogi mondo ginind piny, ka giriedo. Eka nopogogi gi tol e migepe adek. Nogolo chik mondo oneg migepe ariyo to migawo achiel mondo odong’. Bang’ mano jo-Moab nobedo e bwo loch Daudi, kendo ne gigolone osuru." 
2Samuel8:3 Bende Daudi noloyo Hadadezer wuod Rehob, ma ruodh Zoba, e kinde mane ruodhno dhiyo chungoe rapar mar lochne e lweny but aora Yufrate." 
2Samuel8:4 Daudi nomako joidh farese alufu achiel gi mia abiriyo, kod jolweny moko alufu piero ariyo. Nong’ado odond farese duto mag geche lweny moweyo mana farese mia achiel." 
2Samuel8:5 To kane jo-Aram moa Damaski obiro mondo okony Hadadezer ruodh Zoba, Daudi nonego ji alufu piero ariyo kuomgi." 
2Samuel8:6 Noketo askeche ma jorit e piny jo-Aramgo, mi ne gibedo e bwo lochne, kendo ne gigolone osuru. Kuonde duto mane Daudi dhiye, Ruoth Nyasaye ne miye locho." 
2Samuel8:7 Noyako gi lweny mag dhahabu mane jorit Hadadezer oting’o, mokelo Jerusalem." 
2Samuel8:8 Bende noyako mula mogundho Beta kod Berothai, ma miech Hadadezer." 
2Samuel8:9 Kane Tou, ruodh Hamath, owinjo ni ruoth Daudi oseloyo lweny mag Hadadezer," 
2Samuel8:10 nooro Joram wuode ire, mondo omose, kendo opake kuom loyo Hadadezer, nimar Hadadezer ne jasik Tou. Joram nokelo gik moko mag fedha, gi mag dhahabu, kod mag mula." 
2Samuel8:11 Magi bende ruoth Daudi nochiwo ni Ruoth Nyasaye kaka nosechiwo fedha gi dhahabu ma noseyako 
2Samuel8:12 kuom jo Edom gi jo-Moab gi jo-Amon gi jo-Filistia kod jo-Amalek, ma noseloyo. Gik moko ma noyako kuom Hadedazer wuod Rehob, ma ruodh Zoba, bende nochiwo ni Ruoth Nyasaye." 
2Samuel8:13 Kamano nying Daudi noyudo huma. Kane Daudi oduogo, nonego jo-Edom alufu apar gaboro e holo kado." 
2Samuel8:14 Bang’e noketo askeche ma jorit e piny Edom, kendo jo-Edom duto nobet e bwo lochne. Kuonde duto mane Daudi dhiye, Ruoth Nyasaye ne miye locho." 
2Samuel8:15 Daudi nobedo ruodh Israel duto, morito piny gi kue, kong’ado bura kare ni joge duto." 
2Samuel8:16 Joab wuod Zeruya ne jatend jolweny, to Jehoshafat wuod Ahilud ne jachan weche." 
2Samuel8:17 Zadok wuod Ahitub, kod Ahimelek wuod Abiathar ne jodolo. Seraya to ne jagoro." 
2Samuel8:18 Benaya wuod Jehoyada ne jatend jo-Kereth kod jo-Peleth. Yawuot Daudi bende ne jodolo. 
2Samuel9:1 Daudi nopenjo niya, “Dipo kodong’ie ng’at moro ma ja dhood Saulo koso, mondo atimne maber, nikech hera mane aherogo Jonathan?”" 
2Samuel9:2 Ne nitie jatich joka Saulo moro ma nyinge Ziba. Ne giluonge mondo obi ir Daudi. Kane osebiro, ruoth nopenje niya, “In e Ziba koso?” Mi nodwoke niya, “E an, ruoth.”" 
2Samuel9:3 Ruoth nomedo penje ni, “Dipo kodong’ie ng’at moro ma ja dhood Saulo, mondo atimne maber, kaka Nyasaye dwaro?” Ziba nodwoko ruoth niya, “Wuod Jonathan moro pod nitie, ma tiendene ong’ol”" 
2Samuel9:4 Ruoth nopenje ni, “En kanye?” Ziba nodwoke niya, “En Lodebar, e od Makir wuod Amiel.”" 
2Samuel9:5 Omiyo Daudi nooro joote Lodebar, mondo oome." 
2Samuel9:6 Kamano Mefibosheth wuod Jonathan, ma wuod Saulo nobiro ir Daudi, mogoyo chonge piny nyaka e lowo. Daudi noluonge niya, “Mefibosheth.” Mi nodwoke ni, “Antie ruoth.”" 
2Samuel9:7 Daudi nowachone niya, “Kik iluor, nimar abiro timoni maber nikech hera ma naherogo Jonathan wuoru. Abiro dwokoni puothe duto mane mag Saulo kwaru, kendo anamiyi chiemo pile.”" 
2Samuel9:8 Mefibosheth nochako okulorene, ka wacho niya, “An aana ni, an ng’a, momiyo itimona maber kamano! An machalo guok mothoni?”" 
2Samuel9:9 Ruoth noluongo Ziba, jatich Saulo, mowachone niya, “Gik moko duto mane mag Saulo kod joode, koro amiyo Mefibosheth nyakwar ruodhu." 
2Samuel9:10 In kod yawuoti gi wasumbi nyaka upurne puothene, kendo ukelne cham monyakie, mondo jood nyakwar ruodhu oyud chiemo. Mefibosheth owuon to abiro miyo chiemo ndalo duto.”" 
2Samuel9:11 Ziba nodwoke niya, “Ruoth, abiro timo gik moko duto michika.” (Noyudo ka Ziba nigi yawuowi apar gabich, kod wasumbini pieri ariyo.) Kamano Mefibosheth nochiemo e mesa Daudi, kaka achiel kuom yawuot ruoth." 
2Samuel9:12 Ne en gi wuode matin, ma nyinge Mika. Jogo duto ma nodak e od Ziba nodoko jotich Mefibosheth." 
2Samuel9:13 Mefibosheth nodak Jerusalem, nikech nochiemo ndalo duto e mesa ruoth. To tiende duto nong’ol." 
2Samuel10:1 Bang’e ruoth Amon notho, mi Hanun wuode nodoko ruoth kare." 
2Samuel10:2 Daudi nowacho niya, “Abiri timo ni Hanun wuod Nahash maber, mana kaka wuon mare notimona maber.” Omiyo nooro joote mondo oduog chuny Hanun kuom tho wuon mare. To kane joote Daudi ochopo e piny jo-Amon," 
2Samuel10:3 jotend jo-Amon nowacho ni Hanun ruodhgi niya, “Bende iparo ni Daudi oseoro joge mondo omi wuoru duong’? Ooyo, oseorogi mana ni mondo gicheng dala, eka oyud yo monyalo loyego.”" 
2Samuel10:4 Kuom mano, Hanun nomako joote Daudi, molielo tikgi nyakulchiel, kendo ong’ado lepgi nyabathe, chakre nungogi kalor piny; bang’e noriembogi." 
2Samuel10:5 Kane onyis Daudi wachno, nooro ji mondo orom ni jootego, nikech ne giyudo wichkuot maduong’. Nowacho mondo gibed Jeriko mondi nyaka yie tikgi dongi, eka giduogi." 
2Samuel10:6 Jo-Amon noneno ni gisemiyo Daudi ojok kodgi, omiyo ne giholo jolweny alufu piero ariyo kuom jo-Aram ma Beth-rehob, kod jo-Aram ma Zoba, kendo ne giwako ruoth Maaka kod joge alufu achiel kaachiel gi jo-Tob alufu apar gariyo." 
2Samuel10:7 Kane Daudi owinjo wachno, nooro Joab kod joma rateke duto, mondo oked kodgi." 
2Samuel10:8 Jo-Amon nowuok, mi ne giriedo ni lweny e dhoranga dala, to jo-Aram ma Zoba, kod ma Rehob, kaachiel gi jo-Tob kod jo-Maaka nochanore e pap." 
2Samuel10:9 Kane Joab oneno ni lweny olwore, noyiero thuond jo-Israel moko, mochano kochomo jo-Aram," 
2Samuel10:10 to jomoko duto modong’ noketo e lwet Abishai owadgi, mi Abishai nochanogi ka gichomo jo-Amon." 
2Samuel10:11 Joab nowacho ni Abishai niya, “Kineno ka jo-Aram tek madwaro loya, to nyaka ibi ikonya. To ka jo-Amon dwaro loyi, to nabi akonyi." 
2Samuel10:12 Bed gi chir, waked matek ni jowa. To Ruoth Nyasaye mondo otim gima oneno ni ber.”" 
2Samuel10:13 Kamano Joab gi joge norado gi jo-Aram moriembo. 
2Samuel10:14 Kane jo-Amon oneno ni jo-Aram ringo, gin bende ne giringo Abishai, mi gidonjo e dalagi. Eka Joab noweyo kedo kodgi, modok Jerusalem." 
2Samuel10:15 Kane jo-Aram oneno ni jo-Israel oseloyogi, ne gichokore kanyakla." 
2Samuel10:16 Hadadezer nooro joote mondo oluong jo-Amon ma nodak loka aora Yufrate, mi ne gibiro Helam, ka Shobak jatend oganda lweny mar Hadadezer otelonigi." 
2Samuel10:17 Kane Daudi oyudo wach ni gibiro, nochoko jolwenj Israel duto kanyakla, mi giidho loka Jordan mondo girad kodgi Helam. Jo-Aram noriedo ni lweny kochomo Daudi gi joge, mi ne girado." 
2Samuel10:18 To jo-Israel noloyogi, mi giringo, kendo Daudi gi joge nonego jogi ma joidh geche mia abiriyo, kod joidh farese alufu piero ang’wen. Bende ne gigoyo Shobak jatendgi, motho kanyo." 
2Samuel10:19 To kane ruodhi duto manie bwo Hadadezer oneno ni jo-Israel oloyogi, ne giywagorenigi, mi gibedo e bwo lochgi. Bang’ mano jo-Aram ne ok ohedhore konyo jo-Amon kendo." 
2Samuel11:1 E ndalo chakruok oro, mane ruodhi thoro wuokie kadhi kedo, Daudi nooro Joab kod askechene owuon, kaachiel gi jolwenj Israel duto, mogoyo jo-Amon asasa kendo ne giluoro dala Raba. To Daudi nodong’ Jerusalem." 
2Samuel11:2 Chieng’ moro kar sa ma dhok donjoe, Daudi noa e kitandane, ma noyudo oyueyoe, mowuotho ewi tat ode, mi nopo koneno dhako moro ka lwokore. Ne en dhako ma jaber ahinya." 
2Samuel11:3 Daudi nopenjo wach dhakono, mi nodwoke ni en Bathsheba nyar Elam, ma chi Uria ja-Hiti." 
2Samuel11:4 Eka Daudi nooro joote mondo oome, to ka nobiro noterore kode. Bang’e nodok e ode." 
2Samuel11:5 Dhakono nomako ich, mi nooro ni Daudi wach, konyise ni en gi ich." 
2Samuel11:6 Daudi nooro ni Joab wach niya, “Orna Uria ja-Hiti.” Mi Joab nooro Uria ir Daudi." 
2Samuel11:7 To kane Uria obiro, Daudi nopenje ka Joab gi jolweny jongima, kendo ni lweny dhi nadi." 
2Samuel11:8 Bang’e Daudi nowachone niya, “Dhiyo e odi mondo iyue.” Kane Uria owuok e od ruoth, ruoth noorone chiemo moa e mesane owuon." 
2Samuel11:9 To Uria ne ok odhi e ode, to nonindo mana but ranga dala ruoth, kaachiel gi jorit ruoth." 
2Samuel11:10 Kane onyis ruoth ni Uria nyoro ok odhi e ode, nopenjo Uria niya, “Donge nyoro ia wuoth? Ang’o momiyo ok idhi e odi?”" 
2Samuel11:11 To Uria nodwoke niya, “Sandug Muma kod jo-Israel gi jo-Juda odak mana e hembe, kendo Joab ma jatendwa gi jodongi mag lweny bende jojot oko e pap. Koro ere kaka an dadonj e oda machiem kendo amethi, kendo anind gi chiega? Akuong’ora gi nyingi, ni ok natim kamano!”" 
2Samuel11:12 Daudi nowacho ni Uria niya, “Ri kawuono bende, to kiny nawe mondo idhi.” Kamano Uria noriyo Jerusalem chieng’no. Kinyne," 
2Samuel11:13 Daudi noluonge mondo gichiem, mi nohoye mometho nyaka omer. To kane piny ochido, Uria nowuok, modhi onindo mana kama jorit ruoth ne nitie, to ne ok odhi e ode." 
2Samuel11:14 Kinyne gokinyi, Daudi nondiko ni Joab barua, moorogo Uria." 
2Samuel11:15 Baruano nondikoe niya, “Ket Uria yo ka nyime, koma lweny gerie moloyo, to un udong’ chien uweye mondo onege.”" 
2Samuel11:16 Omiyo Joab, ma noyudo lworo dala moro, noketo Uria kama nong’eyo ni wasigu mager nitie." 
2Samuel11:17 Jodalano nowuok mondo oked gi Joab, mi ne ginego jolweny moko, ma kuomgi ne nitie askeche moko ma jorit Daudi. Uria bende notho." 
2Samuel11:18 Joab nooro ni Daudi jaote mondo onyise weche duto ma kuom lweny. 
2Samuel11:19 Nochiko jaoteno niya, “Ang’eyo ni kisetieko nyiso ruoth weche duto ma kuom lweny," 
2Samuel11:20 kamoro mirima dipo komake, mowacho niya, ‘Marang’o nusudo machiegni gi dalano kukedo? Donge nung’eyo ni joma ni ewi ohinga dichielu gi asere?" 
2Samuel11:21 Paruru ane ng’ama nonego Abimelek wuod Jerubaal. Ok mana dhako ema nodiro pong’ rego kuome, gi ewi ohinga mar Thebez, monege? Ka ung’eyo kamano to ere gimomiyo nusudo machiegni gi ohinga?’ Kapo ni openji kamano, to iwachne ni Uria ja-Hiti bende otho.”" 
2Samuel11:22 Jaoteno nodhi monyiso Daudi weche duto mane Joab ochike. Mi mirima nomako Daudi gi Joab, mowacho niya, “Marang’o nusudo machiegni gi dalano kukedo? Donge nung’eyo ni joma ni ewi ohinga dichielu gi asere? Paruru ane ng’ama nonego Abimelek wuod Jerubaal. Ok mana dhako ema nodiro pong’ rego kuome, gi ewi ohinga mar Thebez, monege? Ka ung’eyo kamano to ere gimomiyo nusudo machiegni gi ohinga?”" 
2Samuel11:23 Jaote nodwoko Daudi niya, “Jogo nochako loyowa, ni ne giwuoknwa e pap, to ne wariembogi, kwadwokogi chien nyaka dhorangagi." 
2Samuel11:24 To jo-asere mane ni ewi ohinga nochielo jolwenji, kendo jomoko kuom thuondi magi notho. Uria bende osetho.”" 
2Samuel11:25 Kane Daudi owinjo kamano, nodwoko jaote niya, “Wach ni Joab ni kik wachno chande, nikech mano e kaka lweny obet. Kawuono ng’ato tho, kendo kiny en mar ng’ama chielo. Dhiyo ijiwe kamano, mondo omed mana kedo matek gi dalano nyaka olo.”" 
2Samuel11:26 Kane chi Uria owinjo ni Uria osetho, noywage." 
2Samuel11:27 To kane ndalo ywakne orumo, Daudi nooro joote moome, kendo nobedo chiege, monywolone wuowi. To gima ne Daudi otimono ne ok long’o ni Ruoth Nyasaye." 
2Samuel12:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nooro Nathan ir Daudi, kendo ka nobiro ire, nokone niya, “Ji ariyo nodak e dala moro, achiel ne japith, to machielo ne jachan." 
2Samuel12:2 Japith ne nigi jamni gi dhok mogundho," 
2Samuel12:3 to jachan ne onge gi gimoro, mak mana nyarombo achiel kende, ma noseng’iewo. Nopidhe kendo nodongo e ode kaachiel gi nyithinde, kochamo mana chiembe. Nometho e kikombene, kendo nonindo e kore, mobedone kaka nyare." 
2Samuel12:4 Chieng’ moro ng’ato nobworo e dala japithno, to japithno ne ok oyie kawo chiayo moro kuom jambe owuon mondo oyang’ ni wendono, to nokawo mana nyarombo ng’at ma jachan cha, ema noyang’o ni wendone.”" 
2Samuel12:5 Kane Daudi owinjo wachno, mirima nomake ahinya gi japithno. Nowacho ni Nathan niya, “Gi nying Ruoth Nyasaye, ng’at mosetimo kamano owinjore gi tho!" 
2Samuel12:6 Onego ochul nyading’wen kar nyarombono, nikech notimo kamano koonge gi chunye.”" 
2Samuel12:7 Eka Nathan nowacho ni Daudi niya, “In e ng’atno! Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel owacho kama: ‘Ne ayieri mondo ibed ruodh Israel, kendo naresi e lwet Saulo." 
2Samuel12:8 Ne amiyi od ruodhi, kod monde bende obed magi, kendo namiyi dhood Israel gi dhood Juda. Kata ka da ni mano pod tin, to da amedi gik moko moloyo mago." 
2Samuel12:9 Marang’o nichayo wach Ruoth Nyasaye, mitimo gima ok long’one? Isenego Uria ja-Hiti kuom golo chik otho e lwet jo-Amon, kendo isekawo chiege mi obedo chiegi." 
2Samuel12:10 Emomiyo koro lweny ok norum e dhoodi, nikech isechaya, kendo isekawo chi Uria ja-Hiti obedo chiegi.’" 
2Samuel12:11 “Ruoth Nyasaye omedo wacho niya, ‘Abiro keloni thagruok mowuok mana e odi iwuon. Nakaw mondi, kendo namigi ng’at moro mana kineno, mi noterre kodgi e lela, godiechieng’." 
2Samuel12:12 Gima nitimo, nitimo ling’ling’, an to anatim gini e nyim jo-Isarel duto, odiechieng’ alanga.’ ”" 
2Samuel12:13 Daudi nowacho ni Nathan niya, “Aseketho e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye.” Eka Nathan nomedo wachone niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye bende oseweyoni richoni; koro ok nitho." 
2Samuel12:14 To kata kamano nyathi monywolni biro tho, nikech isechayo Ruoth Nyasaye.”" 
2Samuel12:15 Nathan nodok e dalane. Bang’e Ruoth Nyasaye nomiyo tuo ogoyo nyathi mane chi Uria onywolo ni Daudi, mi nohewore ahinya." 
2Samuel12:16 Daudi nosayo Nyasaye mondo kik nyathi tho, koriyo kech, kendo konindo piny e lowo otieno duto." 
2Samuel12:17 Jodong ode ne biro, kendo chung’ bute, ka dwaro chunge oa e lowo. To notamore kendo ne ok oyie mondo ochiem kodgi." 
2Samuel12:18 Chieng’ mar abiriyo, nyathi notho, to jodong od Daudi noluoro nyise ni nyathi osetho. Ne giwacho niya, “Kane nyathi pod ngima, ne wawuoyo gi ruoth, to ne ok owinjwa. To koro obiro timore nadi ka wanyise ni nyathi osetho?”" 
2Samuel12:19 To kane Daudi oneno jotichne ka kuodho wach kendgi, nofwenyo ni kara nyathi osetho. Omiyo nopenjogi niya, “Kara nyathi osetho?” Ne gidwoke ni, “Ee, osetho.”" 
2Samuel12:20 To Daudi noa malo mi olwokore, kendo owirore gi mo, moloko lepe. Eka nodonjo e Od Ruoth Nyasaye, molemo. Bang’e nodok e ode, mokwayo mondo okelne chiemo." 
2Samuel12:21 Jotichne nopenje niya, “En ang’o mitimoni? Kane nyathi pod ngima, nitueyo chiemo, kendo niywak. To ka koro nyathi osetho, to ia malo, michiemo!”" 
2Samuel12:22 Nodwokogi niya, “Kane nyathi pod ngima, natueyo chiemo kaywak, nikech naparo niya, ‘Ng’ama ong’eyo kata ka Ruoth Nyasaye biro ng’wonona mondo nyathi obed mangima?’" 
2Samuel12:23 To koro osetho, ere gima datuene chiemo? Anyalo duoge koso? An ema nadhi ire, to en ok noduog ira.”" 
2Samuel12:24 Daudi nohoyo Bathsheba chiege, modhi ire, kendo noriwore kode, mi Bathsheba nonywolo wuowi, mochako ni Solomon. Ruoth Nyasaye nohero nyathino." 
2Samuel12:25 Kuom mano, nomiyo Nathan janabi owacho ni mondo ochake ni Jedidia, nikech mano e dwaro mar Ruoth Nyasaye. Tiend nying’no en ni, ‘Ng’ama ohero Ruoth Nyasaye’." 
2Samuel12:26 Joab nokedo gi Raba, dala jo-Amon, mokawo Yap Ruoth." 
2Samuel12:27 Eka nooro joote ir Daudi, kowacho niya, “Asekedo gi Raba, kendo asekawo Yap Ruoth." 
2Samuel12:28 Omiyo koro chok joma odong’ duto, ibi ilwor dalano, kendo ikaw, nikech ka ok itimo kamano to dipo ka an ema akawe, mi ji diluonge gi nyinga.”" 
2Samuel12:29 Kuom mano Daudi nochoko oganda lweny duto, modhi Raba. Nokedo gi dalano, mokawo." 
2Samuel12:30 Nogolo osimbo ewi Milkom ma nyasach jo-Amon, moyudo ni pek mar dhahabu molosego oromo kilo piero ang’wen, kendo kidi ma nengone tek ochom kuome, mi nosidho osimbono e wiye owuon. Noyako bende gik mathoth e dalano," 
2Samuel12:31 kendo nodaro joma nodakie, moketogi e tich ng’ado bao, kod kunyo kite, gi tong’o yien, kod wang’o matafari. Kamano e kaka Daudi notimo e miech jo-Amon duto. Bang’e nodok Jerusalem gi jogo duto." 
2Samuel13:1 Absalom wuod Daudi ne nigi nyamin mare moro ma jaber, ma nyinge Tamar, to Amnon wuod Daudi nohere." 
2Samuel13:2 Chuny Amnon ne chande ahinya, nyaka nobedo matuo, mana nikech Tamar nyamin mare. To ne tekne timo kode gimoro, nikech ne en nyako ma pok ong’eyo chwo." 
2Samuel13:3 To Amnon ne nigi osiepne moro ma rieke ng’eny ahinya, ma nyinge Jonadab, wuod Shimea owadgi Daudi." 
2Samuel13:4 Nopenjo Amnon niya, “Wuod ruoth, idhero nadi ndalogi? Dak inyisa gimomiyo?” Amnon nodwoke niya, “Ahero Tamar ma nyamin Absalom owadwa.”" 
2Samuel13:5 Mi Jonadab nowachone niya, “Dhi inind e kitandani, kiwuondori ni ituo. To ka wuoru obiro mondo oneni, to ikwaye niya, ‘Yie mondo Tamar nyamera obi, omiya chiemo. To iyiene mondo olos chiemono e nyima ka, kaneno, kendo achiem koting’ona chiemo e lwete.’ ”" 
2Samuel13:6 Kamano Amnon nonindo kawuondore ni otuo. Kane ruoth obiro mondo onene, Amnon nokwaye niya, “Yie mondo Tamar nyamera obi, olosna kek moko e nyima ka, mondo acham koting’ona e lwete.”" 
2Samuel13:7 Mi Daudi nooro jaote ir Tamar dala, kowacho niya, “Dhiyo e od Amnon owadu, illosne chiemo.”" 
2Samuel13:8 Omiyo Tamar nodhi e od Amnon owadgi, moyude konindo. Nokawo mogo modwalo, kendo otedogo kek e nyime kanyo." 
2Samuel13:9 Eka nokawo nyalaro, motokoe e nyime, to Amnon nodagi chiemo. Nogolo chik ni mondo ji duto owuog oko, mi ne giwuok." 
2Samuel13:10 Eka nowacho ni Tamar niya, “Kel chiemo e od nindo koni, mondo acham kiting’ona e lweti.” Tamar nokawo kek ma noseloso, mokelo ni Amnon owadgi e od nindo." 
2Samuel13:11 To ka nosekelone mondo ocham, Amnon nomake, kawachone niya, “Yie anind kodi nyamera!”" 
2Samuel13:12 En to nokwere ni, “Ooyo owadwa, kik ikuod wiya. Jo-Israel ok tim gima kamano. Kik itim gima ofuwoni." 
2Samuel13:13 Ere kuma dadhi apondie gi wichkuot ma kama? To in bende, dikwani kaka achiel kuom joma ofuwo e Israel. Asayi, dhi ilos gi ruoth, nikech ok nodagi ni kik ikenda.”" 
2Samuel13:14 To kata kamano Amnon nodagi winje. Nomake moterore kode gi thwon. 
2Samuel13:15 To bang’ mano, Amnon nojok kode ahinya, kendo jok mane ojokgo ne duong’ moloyo hera ma noherego mokwongo. Nowachone niya, “A malo idhiyo!”" 
2Samuel13:16 En to nodwoke ni, “Ooyo owadwa, riemb miriembagoni rach moloyo gima isetimona.” To Amnon ne ok odewo wechene." 
2Samuel13:17 Noluongo wuowi mane tiyone, mowachone niya, “Gol nyakoni oko, mondo ilor dhoot.”" 
2Samuel13:18 Mi wuowino nogole oko, moloro dhoot. Noyudo nyakono orwako law ma bade boyo ma nyi ruodhi ma pok okendi ne rwako e ndalogo." 
2Samuel13:19 Tamar nobuko wiye gi buru, moyiecho lawe ma bade boyo ma norwako, kendo nodhi koywak, komako wiye." 
2Samuel13:20 Absalom owadgi nopenje niya, “Amnon owadu osetimoni gimoro koso? Bed gi kue nyamera, nikech en owadu. Wachno kik chand chunyi.” To Tamar nodak e od Absalom owadgi, kotamore hore." 
2Samuel13:21 Kane ruoth Daudi owinjo wechego duto, iye nowang’ ahinya, to ne ok otimo ni Amnon gimoro, nikech ne en wuode makayo, kendo mohero." 
2Samuel13:22 Absalom bende ne ok owacho ni Amnon kata wach achiel, nimar nosin kode kuom kuodo wi Tamar nyamin mare." 
2Samuel13:23 Bang’ higni ariyo, Absalom noluongo yawuot ruoth duto Baal-hazor, man but Efron, kuma noyudo ong’adoe yie rombe." 
2Samuel13:24 Nodhi ir ruoth mowachone niya, “Ruoth, ing’eyo ni tinde ang’ado yie rombe. Akwayi ni mondo ibi kaachiel gi jogi.”" 
2Samuel13:25 To ruoth nodwoke niya, “Ooyo wuoda, ok onego wabi waduto, dipo ka wamiyi ting’ mapek.” Absalom nosaye, to kata kamano ne ok oyie dhi, to nogoyone mana oriti." 
2Samuel13:26 Eka Absalom nowachone niya, “Ka ok iyie biro, to we mondo wadhi gi Amnon owadwa.” Ruoth nodwoke niya, “Ere gimomiyo dodhi kodu?”" 
2Samuel13:27 To Absalom nomienore nyaka oyie ni mondo Amnon gi owetene duto odhi. 
2Samuel13:28 Absalom noloso chiemo mathoth, to noyudo osewacho ni jotichne niya, “Ka Amnon osemer, mi awachonu ni, ‘Negeuru,’ to unege. Kik uluor, nikech an awuon ema achikou. Beduru gi chir, kuikoru.”" 
2Samuel13:29 Mi jotich Absalom notimo ni Amnon mana kaka Absalom nochikogi. To yawuot ruoth moko duto noidho kenjegi piyopiyo, moringo." 
2Samuel13:30 Kane pod gin e yo, wach nochopo ni Daudi niya, “Absalom osenego yawuoti duto, ma onge kata achiel modong’.”" 
2Samuel13:31 Ruoth noa malo, moyiecho lepe, kendo norudhore piny e lowo. Joge duto ma nochung’ bute bende noyiecho lepgi." 
2Samuel13:32 To Jonadab, wuod Shimea ma owadgi Daudi, nowacho niya, “Ruoth, kik ipar ni gisenego yawuoti duto, Amnon kende ema osetho. Absalom nochako ochano wachni chakre chieng’ mane Amnon okuodoe wi Tamar nyamin mare." 
2Samuel13:33 Omiyo kik igen wachni, kiparo ni mita yawuoti duto osetho. Amnon kende ema osetho," 
2Samuel13:34 to Absalom oseringo.” Wuowi ma jarit noting’o wang’e moneno ji mang’eny ka lor e kor got, koluwo yo moa Horonaim." 
2Samuel13:35 Jonadab nowacho ni ruoth niya, “Ne! Yawuoti biro. Ero, en mana kaka awachoni.”" 
2Samuel13:36 Gikanyono kotieko wuoyo, yawuot ruoth nochopo, kendo ne giywak matek. Eka ruoth, kaachiel gi joge duto, bende noywak malit ahinya. Daudi noywago wuode kuom ndalo mang’eny." 
2Samuel13:37 To Absalom noringo, modhi ir Talmai wuod Amihud, ma ruodh Geshur," 
2Samuel13:38 mobet kuno kuom higni adek. 
2Samuel13:39 Bang’e ruoth ne gombo neno Absalom, nikech chunye nosea kuom wach tho Amnon." 
2Samuel14:1 Joab wuod Zeruya noneno ni chuny ruoth dwaro Absalom. 
2Samuel14:2 Omiyo nooro jaote Tekoa, moomone dhako moro mariek kuno. Joab nowacho ni dhakono niya, “Rwakri gi lep ywak, mondo iwuondri ka ng’ama ywago ng’ama otho. Kik iwirri gi mo, to chal dhako moseywago ng’ama otho kuom ndalo mang’eny." 
2Samuel14:3 Mi idhi ir ruoth, kendo iwachne weche ma abiro nyisigi.” Eka Joab nopuonje weche modhi wacho." 
2Samuel14:4 Kane chi Tekoano obiro ir ruoth, nogoyo chonge piny, nyaka e lowo, komiye duong’ mowacho niya, “Ruoth, konya.”" 
2Samuel14:5 Ruoth nopenje ni, “Ang’o machandi?” Nodwoke niya, “Ruoth, an chi liel, chwora osetho." 
2Samuel14:6 Ne an gi yawuowi ariyo, to ne gigore ka kwath, kuma ne onge ng’ato ma thegogi, mi achiel ogoyo wadgi." 
2Samuel14:7 To koro joodwa duto okayona, kawacho niya, ‘Gol jal mane onego owadgi, mondo wanege kar owadgino.’ Kuom mano, digineg jacham mwandu bende. Gidwaro lung’o kara duto pep, mak giweyo nying chwora kata kothe e piny.”" 
2Samuel14:8 Ruoth nowacho ni dhakono niya, “Dog dala, abiro ng’ado buchi.”" 
2Samuel14:9 To dhakono nomedo wachone niya, “Yaye, ruoth! Ketho mondo obed kuoma, kendo kuom joodwa, to in kod lochni ibed ma onge ketho.”" 
2Samuel14:10 Omiyo ruoth nowachone niya, “Ka ng’ato omedo wachoni gimoro, to kele ira, mi ok nochak ochandi kendo!”" 
2Samuel14:11 Dhakono nomedo wacho niya, “Ruoth, akwayi mondo ikuong’rina e nying Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachi, ni jachul kuor kik med ketho, konego wuoda.” Ruoth nodwoke ni, “Gi nying Ruoth Nyasaye, kata yie wi wuodi achiel ok nolwar piny.”" 
2Samuel14:12 Eka dhakono nowacho niya, “Asayi ruoth, yie mondo amed wachoni wach achiel kende.” Ruoth nokone ni, “Wachi.”" 
2Samuel14:13 Dhakono nowacho niya, “King’ado wach wuoda kamano, to imiyo bura loyi in iwuon,, nikech idagi omo jal ma niriembo, mondo oduog dala. Marang’o iseparo wach ma diketh jo-Nyasayeni?" 
2Samuel14:14 Waduto wabiro tho, nikech wachalo gi pi mopukore piny, ma ok nyal twom kendo. Kata kamano, Nyasaye ok dwar mondo ng’ato otho, to oloso wach mondo jal moriemb oduog dala." 
2Samuel14:15 A ruoth, asebiro mondo awuo kodi nikech ji miya luoro. Naparo ni, ‘Awuo gi ruoth, nimar dipo ka otimo gima odwaro." 
2Samuel14:16 Ang’eyo ni ruoth biro winjo ywakna, kendo obiro resa e lwet jal ma dwaro tieka kaachiel gi wuoda, ni kik wabed e oganda mar jo-Nyasaye.’" 
2Samuel14:17 Bende naparo niya, ‘Wach ruoth ema nyalo miya kue, nikech ruoth chalo malaika mar Nyasaye mapogo gima ber gi gima rach.’ Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachi mondo obed kodi.”" 
2Samuel14:18 Ruoth nowacho ni dhakono niya, “Kik ipanda gimoro kuom wach madwaro penjini” Dhakono nodwoke ni, “Ruoth, wachi.”" 
2Samuel14:19 Ruoth nopenje ni, “Joab ni kodi e wachni koso?” Nodwoke niya, “Ruoth, akuong’ora gi nyingi ni onge ng’at ma nyalo mbalore ni weche misewacho. Adier, Joab jatichni ema nonyisa wechego duto mondo awachni." 
2Samuel14:20 Notimo kamano ni mondo gik mosetimore olokre. To ruoth, in gi rieko machalo mar malaika mar Nyasaye ming’eyogo gik moko duto matimore e piny.”" 
2Samuel14:21 Bang’e ruoth nowacho ni Joab niya, “Koro ayie wachni. Dhiyo, iom rawera ma Absalom.”" 
2Samuel14:22 Joab nokulore piny, komiyo ruoth duong’, kendo nodende. Nowacho niya, “Ruoth, tinendeni ang’eyo ni iyie koda, nikech isetimona gima akwayo.”" 
2Samuel14:23 Mi Joab nodhi Geshur omo Absalom, mokele Jerusalem." 
2Samuel14:24 To ruoth nowacho niya, “We mondo odag e ode owuon. Ok adwar mondo obi e nyima.” Mano omiyo Absalom nodak e ode owuon, ka ok odhi e nyim ruoth." 
2Samuel14:25 E Israel duto ne onge ng’at man gi chia miwuoro ka Absalom. Mbala ne onge kuome, a wiye nyaka tiende piny." 
2Samuel14:26 Nolielo wiye higa ka higa, kane yie wiye ohinge. To ka nopimo yie wiyeno, noyudo ni pekne romo kilo ariyo." 
2Samuel14:27 Absalom nonywolo yawuowi adek gi nyako achiel ma nyinge Tamar. Ne en nyako ma jaber ahinya. 
2Samuel14:28 Absalom nodak Jerusalem kuom higni ariyo mangima, ka ok odhi e nyim ruoth." 
2Samuel14:29 Eka noluongo Joab mondo oor ir ruoth, to Joab nodagi biro ire. Noluonge kendo, to Joab ne pod odagi." 
2Samuel14:30 Omiyo Absalom nowacho ni jotichne niya. “Donge ung’eyo puoth Joab mar cham, mokiewo gi puotha? Dhiuru uwang’e gi mach.” Mi ne gidhi mi giwang’o puodhono." 
2Samuel14:31 Eka Joab nodhi ir Absalom e ode, mopenje niya, “Marang’o jotichni owang’o puotha?”" 
2Samuel14:32 Absalom nodwoke ni, “Naoroni wach kaluongi mondo aori ir ruoth, ipenje gimomiyo nooma Geshur. Dobedona maber moloyo ka da pod an kuno. Emomiyo koro adwaro neno ruoth, kendo ka oneno rach moro kuoma, to mondo onega.”" 
2Samuel14:33 Kane Joab odhi ir ruoth, monyise wachno, ruoth noluongo Absalom, mobiro ire. Absalom nokulore piny e nyime, mi ruoth nomose ka nyodhe." 
2Samuel15:1 Bang’ mano, Absalom nong’iewo gari gi farese, kendo ne en gi ji piero abich mane telo nyime." 
2Samuel15:2 Nothoro chiew gokinyi mang’ich, kendo chung’ e dir yo mochomo dhoranga Jerusalem. Ka noneno ng’at man gi wach moro ka dhi ir ruoth mondo ong’ad buche, to noluongo ng’atno kendo openje kuma oaye. Kane ng’atno onyise dhood Israel moaye," 
2Samuel15:3 to Absalom ne wachone niya, “Aneno ni wecheni beyo, kendo adier, to mak mana ni onge ng’at ma ruoth oseketo mondo oyal buche ma kamagi.”" 
2Samuel15:4 Bende nomedo wacho niya, “Yaye! Mad keta jang’ad bura e pinyni! Eka ng’ato ka ng’ato man gi wach kata ywak nyalo biro ira, kendo dang’adne bura kare.”" 
2Samuel15:5 Pile kane ng’ato obiro ire, kendo okulorene ka miye duong’, Absalom ne rieyo lwete ka mose, kendo ka nyodhe." 
2Samuel15:6 Notimo kamano ni jo-Israel duto mane biro ni mondo ruoth Daudi ong’adnigi bura. Mano e kaka Absalom noywayo chuny jo-Israel. 
2Samuel15:7 Bang’ higni ang’wen, Absalom nowacho ni ruoth niya, “Yiena adhi Hebron, mondo achop singruok mane asingora ni Ruoth Nyasaye," 
2Samuel15:8 nikech kane adak Geshur e piny Aram, nasingora ni ka Ruoth Nyasaye oduoga Jerusalem, to nalame Hebron.”" 
2Samuel15:9 Ruoth noyiene, mi Absalom nodhi Hebron." 
2Samuel15:10 To Absalom nooro joote ni dhout Israel duto ling’ling’, kowacho niya, “Ka uwinjo tung’, to ukog ni, ‘Absalom e ruodh Hebron’ ”" 
2Samuel15:11 Absalom noluongo jo-Israel mia ariyo mondo odhi kode Hebron, mi jogo nodhi ka chunygi ler, kendo ka kiya gima Absalom ochano." 
2Samuel15:12 Kane Absalom timo misango, nooro wach Gilo, moluongne Ahitofel ja-Gilo, ma jang’ad rieko ni Daudi. Kamano ji mane ong’anyo ka dok ni Absalom nomedore." 
2Samuel15:13 Kane Daudi oyudo wach ni jo-Israel osedok ni Absalom," 
2Samuel15:14 nowacho ni joge duto mane ni kode Jerusalem niya, “Wuoguru, waringuru, nimar ka ok watimo kamano, to ok wabi tony mak Absalom ojukowa. Wuoguru aruya, dipo kong’ukowa, moloyowa, kendo onego jo dala ka duto.”" 
2Samuel15:15 Jotend lweny nodwoko ruoth niya, “Ruoth waikore timo gimoro amora miwacho.”" 
2Samuel15:16 Omiyo Ruoth nowuok kaachiel gi joode duto, mak mana monde apar moko ema noweyo mondo orit ode." 
2Samuel15:17 Kamano nowuok kaachiel gi joge duto, mi gichung’ but ot matung’." 
2Samuel15:18 Eka jolwenje duto kod jo-Kereth gi jo-Peleth duto, kod jo-Giti mia auchiel ma nobiro kode koa Gath, nokadho e nyime." 
2Samuel15:19 To ruoth nopenjo Itai ja-Giti niya, “Marang’o in bende idhi kodwa? Dogi ibed gi ruoth manyien, nikech in ng’ama wendo ma noriembi, moweyo dalagi." 
2Samuel15:20 Yandi eka ibiro, ere kaka dwawuoth kodi kamoro amora, to an akia kuma adhiye? Emomiyo dogi, kaachiel gi jowadu. Ruoth Nyasaye mondo oguedhi, kendo onyisi herane mosiko.”" 
2Samuel15:21 To Itai nodwoko ruoth niya, “Gi nying Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo gi nyingi iwuon, kamoro amora midhiye, kanyo ema an bende nabedie, kata e tho, kata e ngima.”" 
2Samuel15:22 Omiyo Daudi nowachone niya, “Ara, dhi nyime.” Mi Itai ja-Giti nokadho, kaachiel gi joge duto." 
2Samuel15:23 Jopinyno duto noywak ka ji kadho. To ruoth nochung’ e aora Kidron, ka ji duto kadho nyime, kochiko yo thim." 
2Samuel15:24 Abiathar gi Zadok bende nobiro, kaachiel gi jo-Lawi duto koting’o Sandug Muma mar Nyasaye. Ne giyieyo Sanduk mar Nyasaye piny nyaka ji duto mane wuok Jerusalem okadho." 
2Samuel15:25 Eka ruoth nowacho ni Zadok niya, “Dwok Sanduk mar Nyasaye Jerusalem. Kapo ni Ruoth Nyasaye okecha, to enoduoga, mi anane Sanduk kod kar dakne kendo." 
2Samuel15:26 To ka Ruoth Nyasaye owacho ni ok an ng’at malong’o e nyime, to era e, mondo otimna gima ohero.”" 
2Samuel15:27 Ruoth nomedo wacho ni Zadok jadolo niya, “Koro doguru dala gi kue, in gi Ahimaaz wuodi, kod Abiathar gi Jonathan wuode." 
2Samuel15:28 To an abiro bet kama iyorogo aora e thim, nyaka ayud wach moa kuomi.”" 
2Samuel15:29 Omiyo Zadok gi Abiathar ne jodwoko Sanduk mar Nyasaye Jerusalem, mi gimedo dak kuno." 
2Samuel15:30 To Daudi noidho got Zeituni ka ywak, koumo wiye, kendo ka en gi tiende nono. Ji duto mane ni kode bende noidho got koumo wigi, kendo ka ywak." 
2Samuel15:31 Nonyis Daudi ni Ahithofel en achiel kuom joma odok ni Absalom, mi nowacho niya, “A Ruoth Nyasaye, asayi, lok rieko mar Ahithofel mondo obed mana fuwo!”" 
2Samuel15:32 Kane Daudi ochopo ewi got, kama nilamoe Nyasaye, Hushai ja-Arki nobiro romone, koyiecho lawe, kendo obuko wiye buru," 
2Samuel15:33 Daudi nowachone niya, “Kwadhi kodi, to dimedna mana ting’." 
2Samuel15:34 Omiyo in dog Jerusalem, mondo iwach ni Absalom ni initine kaka nitiyo ni wuon mare e ndalo mokadho. Kitimo kamano to inikethna rieko Ahithofel." 
2Samuel15:35 Un gi Zadok gi Abiathar ma jadolo kuno. Wach moro amora miwinjo e od ruoth to inyis jodologo. 
2Samuel15:36 Ahimaaz wuod Zadok, kod Jonathan wuod Abiathar bende ni kodgi kuno. Gin ema mondo iorgi gikelna weche duto miwinjo.”" 
2Samuel15:37 Kuom mano Hushai ma osiep Daudi nodok, modonjo Jerusalem mana e sa mane Absalom bende ochopoe kuno." 
2Samuel16:1 Noyudo Daudi oselor matin koa ewi got, eka Ziba jatich Mefibosheth noromone, ka nigi kenje ariyo moting’o makati mia ariyo, gi tombo mia achiel mag olemb mzabibu motwo, kod olembe moko mia achiel gi divai e ndede mar pien." 
2Samuel16:2 Ruoth nopenjo Ziba niya, “Marang’o ikelo gigi?” Ziba nodwoke niya, “Akelo kenje mondo jood ruoth oidhi, kendo makati gi olembe mondo jolweny ocham, to divai mondo joma nong’no ohewo e thim omadhi.”" 
2Samuel16:3 Ruoth nomedo penje ni, “To wuod ruodhi ni kanye?” Ziba nodwoke niya, “Odong’ Jerusalem, nikech nowacho ni, ‘Tinende jo-Israel biro dwokona loch wuora.’ ”" 
2Samuel16:4 Eka ruoth nowacho ni Ziba niya, “Gik moko duto mag Mefibosheth koro amiyi.” Ziba nodwoke ni, “Erokamano ruoth. Mad isik kigena kamano.”" 
2Samuel16:5 Kane Daudi ochopo Bahurim, ng’at moro ma nyinge Shimei wuod Gera, ma ja dhood Saulo, nowuok, mokuong’e alanda." 
2Samuel16:6 Nobayo Daudi gi joge duto gi kite, kata obedo ni jolweny duto, kaachiel gi thwondi nolworo ruoth koni gi koni." 
2Samuel16:7 Weche mane Shimei okuong’o e magi: “Aye, in dhand remo, ng’ama achach!" 
2Samuel16:8 Ruoth Nyasaye osechuloni kuor, nikech nichuero remb joka Saulo, ma nikawo lochne. Ruoth Nyasaye osemiyo Absalom wuodi loch. Koro masira osenwang’i, nimar in dhand remo.”" 
2Samuel16:9 Abishai wuod Zeruya nowacho ni ruoth niya, “Marang’o iweyo guok mothoni kuong’i? Yiena mondo adhi ang’ad wiye oko.”" 
2Samuel16:10 To ruoth nowacho niya, “Ang’o ma chandou koda, un yawuot Zeruya? We mondo okuong’a akuong’a. Ka Ruoth Nyasaye ema ochike mondo okuong’a to onge ng’ama nyalo penje gimomiyo otimo kamano.”" 
2Samuel16:11 Eka nomedo wacho ni Abishai kod joge duto niya, “Uneno ka wuoda manywolo ema dwaro nega. To ka kamano, koro ja-Benjaminni to didwar nega machal nadi! Weye okuong’a akuong’a kamano, nikech ruoth Nyasaye ema osechike." 
2Samuel16:12 Dipo nono ka Ruoth Nyasaye oneno chandruokna, motimona ber kar kuong’ mikuong’agono.”" 
2Samuel16:13 Daudi gi joge nodhi nyime gi wuodhgi, to Shimei ne wuotho e kor got komanyore gi Daudi, kokuong’e kendo obaye gi kite, kendo oguetho." 
2Samuel16:14 Daudi gi joge duto nochopo e aora Jordan kool mi ne giyueyo kanyo. 
2Samuel16:15 To Absalom gi jo-Israel duto nodonjo Jerusalem kaachiel gi Ahithofel. 
2Samuel16:16 Hushai ja-Arki ma osiep Daudi nosudo ir Absalom, mowachone niya, “Ruoth, mondo idag aming’a!”" 
2Samuel16:17 Absalom to nopenje niya, “Ma e kaka inyisogo ni ihero Daudi osiepni? Marang’o ne ok idhi kode?”" 
2Samuel16:18 Hushai nodwoke niya, “Ooyo, ng’at ma Ruoth Nyasaye kod oganda man kae, gi jo-Israel duto oyiero ema an ng’ate, kendo anasikgo." 
2Samuel16:19 Ere ng’ama chielo kendo ma datine, mak mana wuod ruoth? Kaka natiyo ni wuoru e kaka in bende natini.”" 
2Samuel16:20 Absalom nowacho ni Ahithofel niya, “Ng’adnwae rieko; ere gima onego watim?”" 
2Samuel16:21 Ahithofel nodwoke ni, “Dhi iriwri gi mond wuoru, ma noweyo mondo oritne dala. Bang’e jo-Israel duto biro winjo ni isetimo tim makuero momiyo wuoru ojok kodi. Mano biro jiwo chuny jogo duto ma luwi.”" 
2Samuel16:22 Jo-Absalom noyie gi wachno mi ne giguro ni Absalom hema ewi ot malo, kendo Absalom nodonjo, moriwore gi mond wuon mare, mana ka jo-Israel duto neno." 
2Samuel16:23 E ndalogo rieko mane Ahithofel ng’ado ne chalo mana gi rieko mane ng’ato yudo kopenjo Nyasaye wach. Daudi kod Absalom bende ne kwano rieko mar Ahithofel kamano. 
2Samuel17:1 Ahithofel nowacho ni Absalom niya, “Yiena ayier ji alufu apar gariyo, mondo alawgo Daudi gotienoni." 
2Samuel17:2 Abiro juke kool, kendo ka chunye onyosore, mi anamiye kihondko maduong’, kendo ji duto man kode noringi. To naneg mana ruoth kende," 
2Samuel17:3 eka anadwok ji duto iri, ka dhako midwoko ir chwore. Kinego ng’at achiel kende to ji duto nobed gi kue.”" 
2Samuel17:4 Wachno ne ber ni Absalom gi jodong Israel duto. 
2Samuel17:5 To kata kamano, Absalom nowacho niya, “Luong Hushai ja-Arki, mondo wawinj wachne bende.”" 
2Samuel17:6 Kane Hushai obiro ir Absalom, Absalom nonyise rieko mane Ahithofel oseng’ado, nopenje niya, “Dwatim gima owachono koso? Ka ok kamano, to in mondo ing’adnwa rieko.”" 
2Samuel17:7 Hushai nodwoko Absalom niya, “Rieko ma Ahithofel ong’adono kawuono ok ber." 
2Samuel17:8 Ing’eyo ni wuoru gi joge gin joma rateke, kendo koro giger mana ka ondiek moma nyithinde. To bende wuoru en jalweny mariek; Ang’ nonind mana kar kende, mopogore gi joge." 
2Samuel17:9 Kata sani, koro osepondo e bugo moro kata kamoro machielo. Omiyo ka jowa moko oneg mana e chakruok lweny, to ng’ato ang’ata mowinjo biro wacho ni masira osemako joma luwo Absalom." 
2Samuel17:10 Mi kata ng’at ma jachir, kendo mager ka sibuor, nokirni, nikech jo-Israel duto ong’eyo ni wuoru en thwon, kendo joma ni kode jochir." 
2Samuel17:11 An to ang’ado rieko ni mondo ichok jo-Israel duto kanyakla, chakre Dan nyaka Beer-sheba, joma thoth ka kuoyo ma e dhonam. Kendo in iwuon itelnigi e lweny." 
2Samuel17:12 Kamano wanajuke kamoro amora ma entie. Wanamwomre kuome, kendo wanamok kuome ka tho momoko e lum. Wananege, kendo onge ng’at achiel kuom joge duto ma notony." 
2Samuel17:13 Kata kapo ni odonjo e dala moro, to jo-Israel duto nokel tonde, mi giniywa udi duto ma e dalano nyaka aora, ma kata kidi matin ok nodong’ kanyo.”" 
2Samuel17:14 Mi Absalom gi jo-Israel duto nowacho niya, “Rieko mar Hushai ja-Arki ber moloyo rieko mar Ahithofel.” To mano notimore nikech Ruoth Nyasaye nosechano mondo okel masira ni Absalom, komiyo rieko mar Ahithofel bedo kayiem nono." 
2Samuel17:15 Eka Hushai nonyiso Zadok gi Abiathar ma jadolo rieko mane Ahithofel ong’ado ni Absalom gi jodong Israel, kod rieko mane en owuon ong’ado." 
2Samuel17:16 Bang’e nomedo wacho niya, “Koro oruru wach piyo, kunyiso Daudi ni, gotienoni kik obwor kar yoro aora manie thim, to oidh loka piyo, nimar dipo ka onege gi joge duto.”" 
2Samuel17:17 Noyudo Jonathan gi Ahimaaz jobet En-rogel ka rito wach, nikech ne ok owinjore mondo gidonj Jerusalem, nimar dipo ka ng’ato onegogi. To nyako moro ma jatich ema ne dhi En-rogel pile nyisogi gik matimore, eka ne gitero ni Daudi wach." 
2Samuel17:18 To kata kamano rawera moro nonenogi, monyiso Absalom. Omiyo ji ariyogo nowuok ayuka, modhi e dala ng’at moro Bahurim. Ne gidonjo e soko ng’atno mane ni e laru." 
2Samuel17:19 Chi ng’atno nokawo par, moumogo dho soko, eka nomoyoe cham nondo kik gimoro nen." 
2Samuel17:20 Kane jotich Absalom ochopo e dalano, ne gipenjo dhakono niya, “Ere Ahimaaz gi Jonathan?” Dhakono nodwokogi niya, “Giseidho loka aora.” Jotich Absalom nodwarogi, to ne gitamogi nwang’o, mi gidok Jerusalem." 
2Samuel17:21 Kane gisedhi, ji ariyogo nowuok e soko, motero ni Daudi wach niya, “A malo, ing’ad aora piyo nimar Ahithofel oseng’ado rieko ma ditieki!”" 
2Samuel17:22 Omiyo Daudi kod joge nong’ado aora Jordan, mi kane piny oru, ne onge kata ng’at achiel mane pok ong’ado aora." 
2Samuel17:23 Kane Ahithofel oneno ni Absalom ok oluwo rieko ma nong’adone, noidho kanje, modok thurgi nyaka dalane. Nolamo gige ni joode, mi nodere, motho. Ne giyike but wuon mare." 
2Samuel17:24 Kane Absalom gi jo-Israel duto oidho loka aora Jordan, noyudo ka Daudi osechopo Mahanaim." 
2Samuel17:25 Absalom noseketo Amasa mondo obed jatend jolweny kar Joab. Amasa ne wuod ja-Ishmael ma nyinge Ithra, ma nokendo Abigail nyar Nahash, ma nyamin Zeruya ma min Joab." 
2Samuel17:26 Absalom gi jo-Israel nojot e piny Gilead. 
2Samuel17:27 Kane Daudi ochopo Mahanaim, Shobi wuod Nahash, ja-Amon ma Raba, gi Makir wuod Amiel ja-Lodebar, kod Barzilai ja-Gilead ma Rogelim, ne jobiro ire." 
2Samuel17:28 Ne gikelo kitendni, gi tewni gi agulni, kod ngano gi shairi gi mogo gi chamb aloda gi oganda gi ng’or," 
2Samuel17:29 kod mor kich gi chak mopoto, gi rombe, kod mo mabuo, mondo Daudi gi joge ocham, nimar ne ging’eyo ni midenyo gi riyo koro omakogi e thim, kendo giol." 
2Samuel18:1 Daudi nochano joma ne ni kode, kendo noyieronigi jotelo madongo gi matindo." 
2Samuel18:2 Nopogo jolweny e migepe adek. Migawo achiel noketo e bwo Joab, to moro e bwo Abishai wuod Zeruya, omin Joab, kendo mar adek e bwo Itai ja-Giti. Nowacho ni jolweny niya, “An bende adhi kodu e lweny.”" 
2Samuel18:3 To jolweny nodwoke ni, “Ok didhi kodwa, nikech wan kata kapo ni waringo, kata kapo ni ginegowa mathoth, to mano ok gimoro. To in iromri gi ji alufu apar kuomwa. Emomiyo owinjore idong’ mondo ikonywa gi ka.”" 
2Samuel18:4 Mi ruoth nowachonigi niya, “Abiro timo gima uneno ni ber.” Omiyo nochung’ but rangach ka oganda lweny wuok, kochanore e migepe matindo gi madongo." 
2Samuel18:5 Ruoth nochiko Joab gi Abishai kod Itai niya, “Akwayou ni kik uhiny rawera ma Absalom.” Jolweny duto nowinjo ka ruoth chiko jotelo ni kik gihiny Absalom." 
2Samuel18:6 Kamano oganda lweny mar Daudi nowuok kedo gi jo-Isarel, kendo lweny norado e bungu mar Efraim." 
2Samuel18:7 Jo-Daudi noloyo jo-Isarel, kendo ji mathoth ma dirom alufu piero ariyo notho chieng’no." 
2Samuel18:8 Lweny nolandore, mokwako pinyno duto, mi chieng’no joma ne otho e bungu ne ng’eny moloyo mago mane jolweny onego." 
2Samuel18:9 Absalom nopo koromo gi jolwenj Daudi. Noyudo oseidho kanyna, to kane kanyna kadho e tiend yath maduong’ ma bedene okar, wi Absalom nomoko e bad yadhno, mi nodong’ koliero kanyo e kor muya, to kanje nodhi adhiya." 
2Samuel18:10 Ng’at moro noneno Absalom, mowacho ni Joab niya, “Aa neno Absalom koliero e yath.”" 
2Samuel18:11 Joab nopenjo ng’atno niya, “Ka inene adier, marang’o ne ok ichwowe mondo otho gi kanyono? Da amiyi fedha apar, gi okanda maber.”" 
2Samuel18:12 To ng’atno nodwoko Joab niya, “Kata da ni imiya fedha gana e lweta, to ok dater lweta kuom wuod ruoth, nimar ne wawinjo ka ruoth chiki kaachiel gi Abishai kod Itai niya, ‘Akayou ni kik uhiny rawera ma Absalom’." 
2Samuel18:13 Ka da ahinye, ruoth dowinjo, nikech onge wach ma nyalo mung’ore ni ruoth, to in ok diresa!”" 
2Samuel18:14 Joab nowachone niya, “An ok anyal galora kodi kamano.” Mi nokawo aserni adek, modhi ochielogo Absalom mane pod oliero e yath ka ngima." 
2Samuel18:15 Eka yawuowi apar ma joting’ ni Joab gi lweny nolworo Absalom, mogoye nyaka otho." 
2Samuel18:16 Bang’e Joab nogoyo tung’, kokwerogo jolweny ni kik gimed lawo jo-Israel." 
2Samuel18:17 Jolweny noduogo mokawo ringre Absalom, mi gibolo e bugo matut mane ni e bungu, kendo ne gidhuro kuome kite mang’eny, molokore pith maduong’. To jo-Israel duto noringo nyaka miechgi." 
2Samuel18:18 Kane Absalom pod ngima, noyudo osechungo siro e Holo mar Ruoth, mondo obedne ka rapar. Nowacho niya, “Aonge gi wuowi ma dichung wiya kasetho.” Omiyo nochako sirono nyinge owuon, kendo pod iluonge ni Rapar mar Absalom nyaka chil kawuono." 
2Samuel18:19 Ahimaaz wuod Zadok nowacho niya, “We aring ater ni ruoth wach maber kaka Ruoth Nyasaye oserese e lwet wasike.”" 
2Samuel18:20 To Joab nodwoke ni, “Kawuono ok niter wach, nimar wach ma diter kawuono ok en wach maber, nikech wuod ruoth osetho. Ibiro tero wach chieng’ machielo.”" 
2Samuel18:21 Eka Joab nowacho ni misumba moro ma ja-Kush niya, “Dhiyo inyis ruoth gima iseneno.” Ja-Kushno nokulore ni Joab, momako ng’uech." 
2Samuel18:22 To Ahimaaz wuod Zadok nochako okwayo Joab niya, “Ok adewo gima biro timorena. Akwayi, yiena aring aluw ja-Kush.” Joab nopenje niya, “Wuoda, marang’o idwa dhi, to onge gima ibiro yudo kuom oteni?”" 
2Samuel18:23 Ahimaaz nodwoke niya, “Kata da nadi, to nyaka aring adhi.” Omiyo Joab noyiene mondo oring odhi. Mi Ahimaaz noringo, koluwo yor paw aora Jordan moyombo ja-Kush." 
2Samuel18:24 Noyudo Daudi obedo e kind dhorangach maoko gi maiye, kendo jarit ne ni ewi dhoranga ohinga. Kane jaritno oting’o wang’e, noneno ng’at man kende ka ringo." 
2Samuel18:25 Omiyo noluongo ruoth, monyiso wach. Ruoth nodwoke niya, “Ka ng’at achiel ema biro, to okelo wach maber.” Jalo noringo piyo, to ka nochopo machiegni," 
2Samuel18:26 jarit noneno ng’at machielo ka ringo biro. Noluongo joma ne nie dhorangach, kokok niya, “Aneno ng’at machielo ka ringo biro kende.” Ruoth nodwoko niya, “En bende okelo wach maber.”" 
2Samuel18:27 Jarit nomedo wacho niya, “Jal motelo ringo ka Ahimaaz wuod Zadok.” Ruoth noko ni, “Ahimaaz ng’at malong’o, kendo ageno ni okelo wach maber.”" 
2Samuel18:28 Ahimaaz nochopo, moting’o dwonde, kowacho ni ruoth niya, “Wach ber.” Bang’e nokulore piny ni ruoth, mowacho niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachi duong’, mosechiwo joma nopiem kodi e lweti.”" 
2Samuel18:29 Ruoth nopenje niya, “To rawera ma Absalom ngima koso?” Ahimaaz nodwoke niya, “Kane Joab oora, nawinjo mahu maduong’, to ne ok ang’eyo gima otimore.”" 
2Samuel18:30 Ruoth nowachone ni, “Sudi ichung’ ka.” Mi nosudo." 
2Samuel18:31 Eka ja-Kush bende nochopo, mowacho niya, “Ruoth akeloni wach maber, nikech Ruoth Nyasaye oseresi e lwet joma nopiem kodi.”" 
2Samuel18:32 Ruoth nopenje niya, “Rawera ma Absalom ngima koso?” Ja-Kush nodwoke niya, “Mad wasiki duto, kod joma piem kodi ka dwaro hinyi, bed mana kaka wuowino koro obedo.”" 
2Samuel18:33 Ruoth nobwok ahinya, moidho e ot mane ni ewi dhorangach, koywak kama: “Yaye, Absalom wuoda, wuoda! Yaye, Absalom wuoda, mad an ema atho kari, Absalom wuoda, wuoda!”" 
2Samuel19:1 Nonyis Joab ni ruoth ywak malit nikech Absalom," 
2Samuel19:2 kendo mor mar odiechieng’no nolokore mana ywak kuom jolweny duto, kane giwinjo ni ruoth okuyo nikech wuode." 
2Samuel19:3 Chieng’ono jolweny nodok Mahanaim ka lidho mana kaka joma olo e lweny duogo alucha ka wigi okuot. 
2Samuel19:4 Noyudo ruoth ogeng’o wang’e kendo ywak gi dwol maduong’ niya, “Yaye Absalom wuoda! Absalom wuoda, wuoda!”" 
2Samuel19:5 To Joab nodonjo ei ot ir ruoth, mowachone niya, “Kawuono jogi osereso ngimani, kaachiel gi ngima yawuoti gi nyigi kod mondi, to ikuodo wigi," 
2Samuel19:6 nikech ihero jogo mochayi, to ichayo jogo moheri. Tinendeni isemiyo ji ong’eyo ni ok ikwan jotend lweny gi jolwenji ka gimoro, nimar aneno ni kada Absalom bed mangima kawuono, to wan duto watho, to dibedo mamor!" 
2Samuel19:7 Omiyo wuogi, iho chuny jogi, nikech an gi adiera e nying Ruoth Nyasaye ni ka ok itimo kamano, to onge kata ng’at achiel ma ang’ nobed kodi otienoni, kendo mano dibedni masira maduong’ moloyo masiche duto miseneno nyaka ia e nyathi.”" 
2Samuel19:8 Mi ruoth nowuok mobet e kome e dhorangach, kendo kane onyis ji ni ruoth obet kanyo, ne gibiro e nyime giduto. To noyudo ka jo-Israel oseringo." 
2Samuel19:9 Koko maduong’ ne nitie e dhout Israel duto, ka ji penjore niya, “Ruoth Daudi noresowa e lwet wasikwa, kendo e lwet jo-Filistia, to koro oseringo oa e pinywa nikech Absalom nopiem kode." 
2Samuel19:10 To Absalom mane wawiro mondo obed ruodhwa koro osetho e lweny. Marang’o waling’ aling’a ma ok wachan kaka wanyalo duogo ruoth?” 
2Samuel19:11 Ruoth nowinjo wach jo-Israel, omiyo nooro wach ni Zadok gi Abiathar ma jadolo, kowachonigi ni mondo gipenj jodong Juda niya, “Marang’o un ema dubi achien kuom dwoka e dala?" 
2Samuel19:12 Un e jowetena, kendo un e remba. Marang’o un ema dudong’ achien kuom dwoka e dala?" 
2Samuel19:13 Wachuru ni Amasa bende ni, ‘Donge ing’eyo ni in kod an wan remo achiel? Nyasaye mondo okweda ka ok aketi jatend jolweny kar Joab.’ ”" 
2Samuel19:14 Kamano noloko chuny jo-Juda duto, mi ne gibet gi chuny achiel, kendo ne giorone wach niya, “Duogi kaachiel gi jogi duto.”" 
2Samuel19:15 Omiyo ruoth noduogo nyaka aora Jordan, monwang’o ka jo-Juda osechokore Gilgal mondo oromne, kendo okele loka Jordan." 
2Samuel19:16 Shimei wuod Gera, ja-Benjamin ma Bahurim, nobiro piyopiyo kod jo-Juda mondo orom ni ruoth Daudi." 
2Samuel19:17 Jo-Benjamin alufu achiel bende nobiro kode. Ziba jatich joka Saulo kod yawuote apar gabich gi wasumbni piero ariyo, noreto, mokwongo ni ruoth chopo Jordan," 
2Samuel19:18 mondo gikonye ng’ado aora gi joode, kendo gitimne gimoro amora modwaro. Kane ruoth oikore ng’ado aora, Shimei wuod Gera nogoyo chonge piny, mokulorene nyaka e lowo," 
2Samuel19:19 kowacho niya, “Ruoth, kik ikwana ka jaketho, kata paro tim achach ma natimo chieng’ ma niwuok Jerusalem cha. Kik ikan wachno e chunyi," 
2Samuel19:20 nikech ayie ni aseketho, emomiyo an e ng’at mokuongo kuom dhood Josef mobiro romoni kawuono.”" 
2Samuel19:21 Abishai wuod Zeruya nowacho niya, “Donge owinjore Shimei tho kuom kuong’o ruoth mowir ma Ruoth Nyasaye oyiero?”" 
2Samuel19:22 To Daudi nodwoke niya, “Ang’o machandou koda, un yawuot Zeruya, momiyo udoko wasika tinendeni? Uparo ni bende dineg ng’ato e Israel kawuono adier? To kawuono eka ang’eyo ni kare an ruodh Israel!”" 
2Samuel19:23 Mi nosingore ni Shimei, kowacho niya, “Ok nonegi.”" 
2Samuel19:24 Mefibosheth nyakwar Saulo nobiro romo ni ruoth. To ne pok olwoko tiende, kata golo yie tike, kata mana lwoko lepe chakre chieng’ mane ruoth owuokie, nyaka chieng’ mane oduogoe koselocho." 
2Samuel19:25 Kane Mefibosheth ochopo koa Jerusalem, mondo orom ni ruoth, ruoth nopenje niya, “Mefibosheth, marang’o ne ok idhi koda?”" 
2Samuel19:26 En to nodwoke niya, “Ruoth, jatichna nowuonda. Kaka ing’eyo ni an rang’ol, nadwaro gawo kanyna mondo aidh adhi kodi," 
2Samuel19:27 to jatichnano nothuwa kodi, omiyo naluoro biro. To ruoth ichalo kaka malaika mar Nyasaye, emomiyo tim gima ineno ni ber," 
2Samuel19:28 nikech joodwa duto nowinjore gi tho e lweti, to kata kamano niyiera mondo abed achiel kuom joma chiemo kodi. Koro ere gima chielo ma damed kwayi?”" 
2Samuel19:29 Ruoth nowachone niya, “Asewinjo wachni, kendo koro aneno ni mondo upogru gi Ziba mwandu mane amiye.”" 
2Samuel19:30 To Mefibosheth nowacho ni ruoth niya, “Ruoth, kaka koro iseduogo gi kue, we mondo Ziba okawgi duto.”" 
2Samuel19:31 Barzilai ja-Gilead bende nosebiro koa Rogelim, kokowo ruoth nyaka aora Jordan." 
2Samuel19:32 Ne en ng’at moti ahinya, ma jahigni piero aboro. En ema nokonyo ruoth gi chiemo, e kinde mane ruoth ni Mahanaim, nikech ne en jamoko." 
2Samuel19:33 Ruoth nowachone niya, “Bi wadhi kodi loka cha, kendo anapidhi, kidak koda Jerusalem.”" 
2Samuel19:34 To Barzilai nodwoke ni, “Ruoth, an ng’at moseti. Ere kaka dadhi kodi Jerusalem?" 
2Samuel19:35 Koro an jahigni piero aboro. Iparo ni pod nitie gimoro manyalo miya mor? Koso awinjo dhath gima achamo kata mar gima amadho? Iparo ni wende chwo kata wende mon pod nyalo miya ilo? Ooyo ruoth, ok owinjore amedni ting’ kayiem." 
2Samuel19:36 Ere gimomiyo dimiya pok ma kama? Abiro ng’ado kodi aora Jordan kende," 
2Samuel19:37 bang’e iyiena adog dalana, mondo oyika kuma liend wuora gi mama nitie. To Kimham wuoda eri. Yie mondo idhi kode, kendo irite kaka idwaro.”" 
2Samuel19:38 Ruoth noyiene, ka dwoke niya, “Kara, Kimham nyalo dhi koda. Anatimne kaka idwaro, kendo gimoro amora midwaro kuoma, anatimni.”" 
2Samuel19:39 Ji duto nong’ado aora Jordan, to ruoth nodong’, ka goyo ni Barzilai oriti. Nonyodhe kendo oguedhe, eka Barzilai nodok dalane." 
2Samuel19:40 Bang’e ruoth nong’ado aora, modhi nyaka Gilgal, ka jo-Juda duto kowe, kaachiel gi jo-Israel moko. Kimham bende nodhi kode." 
2Samuel19:41 Eka jo-Israel duto nobiro ir ruoth, mi gipenje niya, “Marang’o owetewa ma jo-Juda okawi ling’ling’ kendo okowi loka Jordan kaachiel gi joodi gi jolwenji duto?”" 
2Samuel19:42 To jo-Juda duto nodwoko jo-Israel niya, “Ne watimo kamano nikech wan wat ruoth machiegni moloyo. Marang’o iu wang’ gi wachni? Bende uwinjo ni ruoth osemiyowa gimoro wachamo? Koso uparo ni osemiyowa mich moro?”" 
2Samuel19:43 Jo-Israel nodwoko jo-Juda kendo niya, “Wan dhoudi apar e piny Daudi, omiyo owinjore wabed kode moloyo un! Marang’o ujarowa? Donge wan ema ne wakwongo paro wach duogo ruoth?” To kata kamano weche jo-Juda ne ger moloyo weche jo-Israel." 
2Samuel20:1 To ne nitie ja-Benjamin moro kanyo ma achach, ma nyinge Sheba wuod Bikri. Nogoyo tung’ kowacho niya, “Waonge wat gi Daudi! Ok wan libamba achiel gi wuod Jesse. Wan jo-Israel, wadoguru dala.”" 
2Samuel20:2 Omiyo jo-Israel duto noweyo Daudi kendo ne giluwo Sheba wuod Bikri. To jo-Juda nomedo kowo ruodhgi gi chuny achiel, ka gia Jordan nyaka Jerusalem." 
2Samuel20:3 Kane Daudi ochopo e ode Jerusalem, nokawo monde apar ma noweyo ka rito dala, mi noketogi e ot moro machielo, kama ne gibedo kiritogie. Nomiyogi chiemo, to ne ok oriwore kodgi kendo. Kamano noloronigi nyaka chieng’ thogi, ka gidak mana ka mond liete." 
2Samuel20:4 Daudi nonyiso Amasa niya, “Chok jo-Juda duto kanyakla, ibigo ira kapok ndalo adek orumo.”" 
2Samuel20:5 Mi Amasa nodhi choko jo-Juda. To nodeko, mi kinde ma nomiye okadho."
