2Samuel20:6 Eka Daudi nowacho ni Abishai niya, “Koro Sheba wuod Bikri biro hinyowa moloyo Absalom. Omiyo, dhiyo gi jolwenja, ilawe, nimar dipo ka odonjo e mier mochiel gohinga, kendo dotony moa e lweta.”" 
2Samuel20:7 Abishai nowuok Jerusalem, kotelo ni Joab gi jo-Kereth gi jo-Peleth, kod thwondi duto, mondo gilaw Sheba wuod Bikri." 
2Samuel20:8 Kane gichopo e lwanda maduong’ man Gibeon, ne gipo ka giromo gi Amasa. Noyudo ka Joab orwakore gi lep lweny, ka en gi ligangla ei olalo, moliero e okanda mane otueyo e nungone. Nosudo machiegni, kopando gima odwaro timo." 
2Samuel20:9 Nomoso Amasa, kopenje niya, “In nadi, omera?” Eka nomako yie tik Amasa gi lwete ma korachwich mondo onyodhe." 
2Samuel20:10 To Amasa ne ok odewo ligangla mane ni e lwet Joab. Gikanyono Joab nochwowo bund iye dichiel mak onwoyo, mi jamb iye noo piny, motho. Eka Joab gi Abishai owadgi nomedo lawo Sheba wuod Bikri." 
2Samuel20:11 To ng’at achiel kuom jolwenj Joab nochung’ but ringre Amasa, kawacho niya, “Ji duto moyie Joab, kendo modok kor Daudi, mondo oluw bang’ Joab.”" 
2Samuel20:12 To ringre Amasa noriere e dier yo, kochadhore gi remo, kendo ji duto mane luwo yorno ne chung’ ka ng’iye. Kane ng’atno oneno ni ji chung’ kanyo, nogolo ringre Amasa oko e yo, moketo tenge, kendo nobolo law kuome." 
2Samuel20:13 Kane osegole e yo, ji duto noluwo bang’ Joab, ka gilawo Sheba wuod Bikri." 
2Samuel20:14 Sheba nolimo dhout Israel duto nyaka nochopo Abel-beth-maaka, kendo jo-Bikri duto nochokore ire, modonjo kode e dalano." 
2Samuel20:15 Bang’e Joab nobiro gi joge duto, mi gilawo Sheba e Abel-beth-maaka. Ne gigingo pith maduong’ but dala, eka ne gichako kunyo ohinga mondo osienyre." 
2Samuel20:16 To dhako moro mariek mane nie dalano, nokok matek niya, “Uwinjo! Nyisuru Joab obi ka, mondo alos kode.”" 
2Samuel20:17 Joab nosudo machiegni mi dhakono nopenje ni, “In e Joab?” Nodwoko ni, “E an.” Eka dhakono nowachone niya, “Ruoth winj wechena.” Joab nodwoke ni, “Wachi.”" 
2Samuel20:18 Mi dhakono nowachone niya, “E ndalo machon ji ne biro Abel mondo ong’adnigie rieko. Kamano ne giwacho weche mathagogi." 
2Samuel20:19 Dalawani en achiel kuom mier mabeyo kendo mokue moloyo e Israel, to koro in idwaro ketho dala maduong’ kama e Israel. Marang’o idwaro ketho jo-Ruoth Nyasaye?”" 
2Samuel20:20 Joab nodwoke niya, “Ooyo, ok adwar tiekogi kata ketho gimoro!" 
2Samuel20:21 Ok en kamano, to ng’at moro miluongo ni Sheba wuod Bikri, modak e piny gode mag Efraim, ema osepiem gi ruoth Daudi. Omiyo goluru mana ng’atno kende, eka abiro weyo dalani.” Dhakono nowacho ni Joab niya, “Ber! Wabiro dironi wiye gi ewi ohinga.”" 
2Samuel20:22 Eka dhakono nodhi ir jodalano duto, moloso kodgi gi rieko. Mi ne ging’ado wi Sheba wuod Bikri, kendo gidiro ni Joab. Omiyo Joab nogoyo tung’, kendo joge noweyo dalano, modok miechgi. To Joab nodok Jerusalem ir ruoth." 
2Samuel20:23 Koro Joab ne jatend jolweny duto, to Benaya wuod Jehoyada ne jatend jolweny mowak ma jo-Kereth gi jo-Peleth." 
2Samuel20:24 Adoram ne jarit joma nichuno gi thwon mondo oti. To Jehoshafat wuod Ahilud ne jachan weche. 
2Samuel20:25 Sheva ne jagoro, kendo Zadok gi Abiathar ne jodolo." 
2Samuel20:26 To Ira ja-Jair bende ne jadolo mar Daudi. 
2Samuel21:1 E ndalo Daudi ne nitie kech kuom higni adek, omiyo Daudi nopenjo Ruoth Nyasaye wach gimomiyo kejno obiro. Ruoth Nyasaye nodwoke niya, “Ketho ni kuom Saulo kod joodgi, nikech nochuero remb jo-Gibeon.”" 
2Samuel21:2 Kuom mano ruoth noluongo jo-Gibeon ire. (Jo-Gibeon ne ok gin jo-Israel to ne gin jo-Amor ma nodong’ mane jo-Isarel otimogo winjruok. Kata kamano Saulo ne dwaro negogi, nikech nodwaro ni mondo jo-Israel gi jo-Juda ogurre motegno.)" 
2Samuel21:3 Daudi nopenjo jo-Gibeon niya, “Ere gima anyalo timonu? Ere kaka dagol richono, mondo umi hawi oduog ni jo-Ruoth Nyasaye?”" 
2Samuel21:4 To jo-Gibeon nodwoke niya, “Wach manie kindwa gi Saulo kod joodgi ok en wach ma ditiek gi fedha kata dhahabu. Bende waonge gi teko mar nego ja-Israel moro.” Daudi nopenjogi kendo niya, “To ere gima udwaro mondo atimnu?”" 
2Samuel21:5 Ne gidwoke ni, “We mondo watiek nying jal ma nohinyowa, ka dwaro tiekowa ni kik wadag e piny Israel." 
2Samuel21:6 Miwa yawuote abiriyo mondo waneg e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye Gibea, dala Saulo, ruoth mane Ruoth Nyasaye oyiero.” Daudi noyie, mochiwogi." 
2Samuel21:7 To ne ok ochiwo Mefibosheth wuod Jonathan ma wuod Saulo, nikech singruok ma notimo gi Jonathan e nying Ruoth Nyasaye." 
2Samuel21:8 To nokawo mana Armoni gi Mefibosheth, yawuowi ariyo mane Rizpa nyar Aya onywolo ni Saulo, kod yawuowi abich mane Merab nyar Saulo onywolo ni Adriel wuod Barzilai ja-Mehola." 
2Samuel21:9 Jogo ema ne ruoth ochiwo ni jo-Gibeon, mi jo-Gibeon nonegogi e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye e got. Ji abiriyogo duto notho kaachiel e ndalo keyo mar atamalo mar shairi." 
2Samuel21:10 Rizpa nyar Aya nopedho pien gugru ewi lwanda, mobedoe, chakre ndalo keyo, nyaka koth nochue, kendo notamo winy godiechieng’, kod ondiegi gotieno, mondo kik cham ringre jogo." 
2Samuel21:11 Kane onyis Daudi gima Rizpa nyar Aya ma chi Saulo otimo," 
2Samuel21:12 nodhi mokawo choke Saulo kod choke Jonathan wuod Saulo kuom jo-Jabesh-gilead. Noyudo jo-Jabesh-gilead osekawogi ling’ling’ e paw dala mar Bethshan, kama jo-Filistia nolierogie bang’ nego Saulo Gilboa." 
2Samuel21:13 Daudi noomo choke Saulo kod choke Jonathan wuode kanyo, kendo noketogi kaachiel gi choke joma oneg kande." 
2Samuel21:14 Ne gikawo choke Saulo gi mag Jonathan wuode, kaachiel gi mag joma noneg, mi giyiko Zeba e piny Benjamin, e liend Kish wuon Saulo. Ne gitimo duto mane ruoth ochiko, kendo bang’ mano, Nyasaye nokecho pinygi." 
2Samuel21:15 Kinde moro jo-Filistia nochako omonjo jo-Israel, mi Daudi gi jolwenje nodhi mojot Gob. Ne gikedo gi jo-Filistia, nyaka Daudi nodoko mool." 
2Samuel21:16 Ne nitie ja-Refaim moro mathwon, ma pek tong’e ne dirom kilo adek. Noting’o ligangla manyien, kendo noparo ni doneg Daudi." 
2Samuel21:17 To Abishai wuod Zeruya nobiro monego ja-Filistiano, mi Daudi otony. Bang’e jolwenj Daudi nosayo Daudi niya, “Kik ichak idhi kodwa e lweny, nimar dipo ka chieng’ moro onegi, to in ema ibedonwa ka taya e Israel.”" 
2Samuel21:18 Bang’ mano, lweny nochako owuok e kind jo-Israel gi jo-Filistia, mi ne gikedo Gob. E lwenjno Sibekai ja-Husha nonegoe Saf ma ja-Refaim." 
2Samuel21:19 Lweny nowuok kendo e kind jo-Israel gi jo-Filistia e Gob. Mi Elhanan wuod Jair ma ja-Bethlehem nonego Goliath ja-Giti, ma bond tong’e ne chalo lodi." 
2Samuel21:20 Lweny nochako owuok e Gath, kama ne nitie ng’at magana ma rabora man gi lith lwedo auchiel gi lith tielo auchiel koni gi koni. Lith lwetene gi mag tiendene duto koriw ne romo piero ariyo gang’wen. Jalo bende ne ja-Refaim." 
2Samuel21:21 To ka nothiano ni jo-Israel, Jonathan wuod Shimea owadgi Daudi nonege." 
2Samuel21:22 Ji ang’wen-go duto ne jo-Refaim ma oganda joma rabede, to Daudi gi joge nonegogi duto." 
2Samuel22:1 Kane Daudi oneno ni Ruoth Nyasaye oserese e lwet Saulo kendo e lwet wasike duto, nopake gi wer kama:" 
2Samuel22:2 “A Ruoth Nyasaye, in e lwandana, kendo ohingana." 
2Samuel22:3 Nyasacha, in e jaresna, gi lwandana ma ageng’orae. In e okumbana, gi teko mar resruokna. In e ohingana gi kar geng’ruokna, kendo jawarna in ema iresa kuom masiche mager." 
2Samuel22:4 Akwayo Ruoth Nyasaye mowinjore oyud pak, kendo ma resa kuom wasika." 
2Samuel22:5 Tho notaga ka apaka kodwaro tera kaka ohula. 
2Samuel22:6 Tonde mag liel nodhoga. Tho ne dwaro maka kobadho. 
2Samuel22:7 Kane anie chandruok, nakwayo Ruoth Nyasaye. Ee, naywak ni Nyasacha. Nowinjo dwonda gie hekalu mare, kendo ywakna nochopo e ite." 
2Samuel22:8 Piny notetni, kendo oyiengni. Mise mag polo bende notetni kendo okirni, nikech mirimb Ruoth Nyasaye" 
2Samuel22:9 Iro nodum ka wuok e ume, kendo mach mang’angni bende nowuok e dhoge." 
2Samuel22:10 Nosudo polo machiegni, eka nolor, konyono rumbi molil ti." 
2Samuel22:11 Ne oidho kerubi, mi ohuyogo ka kalausi." 
2Samuel22:12 Nokawo mudho kod boche polo morweyo gi koth maduong’, moloko ka hembe." 
2Samuel22:13 Ler motelo e nyime nomoko mach motimo ligega. 
2Samuel22:14 Dwond Ruoth Nyasaye nomor. Ee, Ng’ama Duong’ Moloyo nomor gie polo." 
2Samuel22:15 Nodiro mil polo ka aserni, kokworogi koni gi koni." 
2Samuel22:16 Kane Ruoth Nyasaye okudho ka yamb nyakoi, kendo okwerogi, mise mag piny noelore kendo kude mag nam nofwenyore." 
2Samuel22:17 Norieyo bade ka en malo, mi omaka, kogola e ataro-ngala." 
2Samuel22:18 Ne oresa e lwet wasika marateke kendo kuom ji duto mosin koda, mane oloya gi teko." 
2Samuel22:19 Ne gimonja ka anie masira, to Ruoth Nyasaye ema nokonya." 
2Samuel22:20 Ne ogola e chandruok, mi abedo thuolo. Noresa nikech nomor koda." 
2Samuel22:21 Ruoth Nyasaye ne opoga pok mowinjore gi timna makare. Nochula moromo gi tichna maler," 
2Samuel22:22 nikech naluwo yorene kendo ok asepogora kod Nyasacha, kadonjo e richo." 
2Samuel22:23 Aserito chikene duto, ma onge kata achiel ma apogorago." 
2Samuel22:24 Aonge gi ketho e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye kendo aseritora kuom richo. 
2Samuel22:25 Omiyo osemiya pok mowinjore gi timna makare, kendo moromo gi timna malong’o e nyime." 
2Samuel22:26 In Ruoth Nyasaye, in jaadiera ni ji mohero adiera, kendo ilong’o ni joma long’o." 
2Samuel22:27 Iler ni joma ler, to wiyi tek ni joma wigi tek." 
2Samuel22:28 Ireso joma muol, to josunga idwoko piny." 
2Samuel22:29 A Ruoth Nyasaye, in e tacha. In e Nyasacha ma menyona mudho." 
2Samuel22:30 Imiyo aloyo oganda lweny momonja, kendo in e Nyasacha ma konya kalo ohinga." 
2Samuel22:31 Yor Nyasaye en yo malong’o. Osenon wach Ruoth Nyasaye, moyud ni en adier. Ruoth Nyasaye e okumba mar joma ogeno kuome." 
2Samuel22:32 Ere Nyasaye moro, mak mana Ruoth Nyasachwa? Koso ere lwanda moro, mak mana Nyasachwani?" 
2Samuel22:33 Nyasayeni e kar pondona motegno. Osemiyo yorena bedo thuolo kendo moboch. 
2Samuel22:34 En ema omiyo tienda bedo mayot ka tiend mwanda, kendo oresa, koketa malo kama oting’ore." 
2Samuel22:35 Ojiwo bada ni lweny, mi onyalo ywayo kata mana atung’ mar mula." 
2Samuel22:36 In Ruoth Nyasaye, isekelona resruok mobedona okumba, kendo konyni ema nomiyo abedo gi duong’." 
2Samuel22:37 Ne imiya yo malach mondo awuothie mi ne ok akier. 
2Samuel22:38 Nalawo wasika, mi atiekogi, kendo ne ok aduogo dala ka pok girumo." 
2Samuel22:39 Nagoyogi ngoga, mi atiekogi! Ne giriere piny e tienda, ma ok ginyal chung’." 
2Samuel22:40 Nimiya teko mar kedo, kendo mar loyo wasika." 
2Samuel22:41 Ne imiyo wasika oringa mi atiekogi. 
2Samuel22:42 Ne girango koni gi koni, to onge ng’amaa ne nyalo resogi. Ne giywak ni Ruoth Nyasaye, to ne ok oduokogi." 
2Samuel22:43 Ne aregogi mayom, mana ka buru ma yamo tero, mi anyonogi ka chuodho." 
2Samuel22:44 Ne iresa kuom joma piem koda, kendo niketa jatelo mar ogendini, mi ji mane pok ang’eyo notiyona." 
2Samuel22:45 Joma oa e pinje mamoko ne biro ira kobolore. Kane giwinjo humba, to ne giyie lochna mana gikanyono." 
2Samuel22:46 Chunygi nool, mi ne giwuok ka gitetni, kuma ne gipondoe." 
2Samuel22:47 Ruoth Nyasaye nitie. En e lwandana! Pakeuru! Ee, odend nying Nyasacha, ma lwanda mar resruokna." 
2Samuel22:48 En e Nyasaye mane omiya teko mar chulo kuor, koketo ogendini e bwo lochna," 
2Samuel22:49 Kendo kogola kuom wasika. En e Ruoth Nyasaye mane omiyo aloyo joma ne piem koda, kendo oresa kuom jomahundu." 
2Samuel22:50 Kuom mano, anapake kuom kind ogendini. Adier, anapak nyinge gi wer." 
2Samuel22:51 Nyasaye kelo resruok maduong’ ni ruoth moketo. Ee, ohero ng’at moyiero, gi hera mosiko, ma en mana Daudi, gi kotha nyaka chieng’.”" 
2Samuel23:1 Koro magi e weche mogik mag Daudi wuod Jesse, ng’at momi duong’. Adier, Ruoth mowir mane Nyasach Jakobo oyiero, kendo mane jachuog wende mamit e Israel, nowacho kama:" 
2Samuel23:2 “Roho mar Ruoth Nyasaye ema miya weche mawacho, kendo wachne nie dhoga." 
2Samuel23:3 Nyasach Jakobo, lwanda mar Israel, oseloso, kowacho niya, ‘Ka ruoth rito ji gi bura makare, nikech oluoro Nyasaye," 
2Samuel23:4 To lochne chalo gi ler mar wang’chieng’, mopilore gokinyi ka boche polo onge, kendo mamiyo lum loth bang’ koth.’" 
2Samuel23:5 Donge kamano e kaka oda obet e nyim Nyasaye, nikech osetimo koda singruok mosiko, mochan kare, kendo ma ok nyal lokore? Oseguedho gik moko ma konya, kendo ma adwaro." 
2Samuel23:6 To joma ok oluoro Nyasaye, chalo gi kudho moke, ma ok nyal choki gi lwedo." 
2Samuel23:7 Ng’at madwaro mulogi nyaka konyre gi nyinyo, kata gi bond tong’. Eka bang’e owang’gi chutho gi mach.”" 
2Samuel23:8 Koro thuondi mane Daudi nigo e ndalone e magi: Josheb-bashebeth ja-Takemon ne jatend thuondi adek madongo. En ema nonego ji mia aboro gi tong’, odiechieng’ achiel." 
2Samuel23:9 Ng’at mane luwe ne Eleazar wuod Dodo, ja-Ahohi. Ne en gi Daudi Pas-Damin, kama ne jo-Filistia ochokoree ni lweny. Jo-Israel noringo" 
2Samuel23:10 to en nochung’ kanyo, monego jo-Filistia nyaka bade nojony, mi ligangla nomoko e lwete, kendo Ruoth Nyasaye nomiyogi loch maduong’ chieng’ono. Kane jolweny oduogo ir Eleazar bang’ ringo, koro ne odong’nigi mana dedo joma otho." 
2Samuel23:11 Ng’at mar adek ne Shama wuod Agee ja-Harar. Jo-Filistia nochokore Lehi, kama ne nitie puoth ng’or moro. Jolweny moko duto noringo jo-Filistia," 
2Samuel23:12 en to nodong’ e puodhono, korite, kendo nonego jo-Filistiago. Kamano Ruoth Nyasaye nomiyogi loch maduong’." 
2Samuel23:13 Chieng’ moro kane oyudo jolweny mag jo-Filistia ojot e holo mar Refaim, e kinde mar keyo, ji adek kuom thuondi piero adek madongo kande nodhi ir Daudi e holo mar Adulaim." 
2Samuel23:14 Kindego Daudi ne nie rogo, to jolweny mag jo-Filistia nosekawo Bethlehem." 
2Samuel23:15 Daudi noomo chunye ka siso omake, mowacho niya, “Mad ng’ato kelna pi soko man but ranga Bethlehem, mondo amodhi!”" 
2Samuel23:16 Eka thwondi adekgo nomwomo oganda lweny mar jo-Filistia. Ne gidhi omo pi sokono, mi gikelo ni Daudi. To nodagi modho pigno, moole piny ka misango ni Ruoth Nyasaye," 
2Samuel23:17 kowacho niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye mondo orita kik amodh pigni, nikech ochalo mana remb jogo mane odhi ome, koyie wito ngimagi.” Mano emomiyo Daudi notamore modhe. Gik ma kamago ema thuondi adekgo ne timo." 
2Samuel23:18 Abishai owadgi Joab, wuod Zeruya, ema ne jatend thwondi piero adekgo. Nonego ji mia adek gi tong’ mi nobedo ng’at marahuma kuom thuondigo." 
2Samuel23:19 Ne en rahuma moloyo kuomgi, mobedo jatendgi, to kata kamano, ne ok ochopo e rang’iny mar ji adek kande." 
2Samuel23:20 Benaya wuod Jehoyada, thwon Kabzeel marahuma, notimo timbe thwon mang’eny. Bende nonego thwond Moab ariyo. Chieng’ moro kane kodh pe osechue, nolor e bur, monego sibuor kanyo." 
2Samuel23:21 Bende en ema nonego ja-Misri marabet. Ja-Misrino ne nigi tong’, to Benaya nodhine gi odunga. Noyudho tong’ e lwet ja-Misrino, monegego." 
2Samuel23:22 Timbe machal kamago ema Benaya wuod Jehoyada oyudogo huma, kaachiel gi thwondi piero adek kande." 
2Samuel23:23 Ne en rahuma moloyo ji piero adekgo, to kata kamano, ne ok ochopo e rang’iny mag thuondi adek madongo kande. Daudi nokete jatend joge mag lweny mane rito ngimane." 
2Samuel23:24 Asahel owadgi Joab ne achiel kuom ji piero adekgo. Jomoko ne gin: Elhanan wuod Dodo ja-Bethlehem," 
2Samuel23:25 kod Shama gi Elika jo-Harod," 
2Samuel23:26 gi Helez ja-Palti, gi Ira wuod Ikesh ja-Tekoa," 
2Samuel23:27 gi Abiezer ja-Anathoth, gi Sibekai ja-Husha," 
2Samuel23:28 gi Zalmon ja-Ahohi, kod Maharai" 
2Samuel23:29 gi Itai wuod Ribai ja-Gibea e piny Benjamin," 
2Samuel23:30 gi Benaya ja-Pirathon gi Hidai ja-Gaash, piny aore," 
2Samuel23:31 gi Abialbon ja-Arbath, gi Azmoth ja-Bahurim," 
2Samuel23:32 gi Eliaba ja Shalbon, gi Hashem ja-Gizon kod Jonathan" 
2Samuel23:33 wuod Shama, gi Ahiam wuod Sharar, jo-Harar," 
2Samuel23:34 gi Elifelet wuod Ahasbai ja-Maaka, gi Eliam wuod Ahithofel ja-Gilo," 
2Samuel23:35 gi Hezro ja-Karmel, gi Paarai ja-Arbi," 
2Samuel23:36 gi Igal wuod Nathan ja-Zoba, gi Bani ja-Gad" 
2Samuel23:37 gi Zelek ja-Amon, gi Naharai ja-Beeroth, mane jating’ gilweny mag Joab wuod Zeruya," 
2Samuel23:38 kod Ira gi Gareb, jo-Ithri," 
2Samuel23:39 kod Uria ja-Hiti. Duto ne gin ji piero adek gariyo. 
2Samuel24:1 Mirima nochako omako Ruoth Nyasaye kod jo-Israel, mi nomiyo Daudi otimo gimoro ma dihinygi, kowachone niya, “Dhiyo ikwan jo-Israel gi jo-Juda.”" 
2Samuel24:2 Omiyo ruoth nowacho ni Joab gi jotend lweny mane ni kode niya, “Dhiuru koro, uwuoth e dhout Israel duto, chakre Dan nyaka Beer-sheba, kukwano ji, mondo ung’e kar rombgi.”" 
2Samuel24:3 To Joab nodwoko ruoth niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachi mondo omedni ji nyadi mia achiel kapod wang’i neno. To marang’o iketo chunyi e wachni?”" 
2Samuel24:4 Kata kamano ruoth nochuno Joab gi jotend lweny, mi ne giwuok mondo gikwan jo-Israel." 
2Samuel24:5 Ne ging’ado aora Jordan, mi gichako kweno Aroer kod dala manie holono, ka gichiko Gad nyaka Jazer." 
2Samuel24:6 Eka ne gidhi Dan, mi kane giwuok kuro, ne giluwo piny nyaka Sidon," 
2Samuel24:7 gi dala Turo mochiel gi ohinga kod mier duto mag jo-Hivi gi mag jo-Kanaan. Achien ne gidhi nyaka Beer-sheba, yo thim Juda." 
2Samuel24:8 Bang’ dueche ochiko gi ndalo piero ariyo, kane gisewuotho e pinygi duto, ne giduogo Jerusalem." 
2Samuel24:9 Joab nonyiso ruoth kar romb ji kama: E piny Israel ne nitie ji alufu mia aboro ma nyalo kedo, to jo-Juda ne gin alufu mia abich." 
2Samuel24:10 To kane Daudi osekwano ji, chunye nochande, mowacho ni Ruoth Nyasaye niya, “A Ruoth Nyasaye, aseketho ahinya kuom gima asetimo. To koro asayi ni mondo iwena richona, nikech asetimo gima ofuwo.”" 
2Samuel24:11 Eka kane Daudi ochiew gokinyi, noyudo ka Ruoth Nyasaye osenyiso Gad janabi, mane jakor wach ni Daudi, kowachone niya," 
2Samuel24:12 “Dhiyo inyis Daudi ni Ruoth Nyasaye osewacho kama: ‘Aketo gik moko adek e nyimi. Yier achiel kuomgi monego atimni.’ ” 
2Samuel24:13 Omiyo Gad nodhi ir Daudi mopenje niya, “Ere gima iyiero? Idwaro mondo kech omak pinyu kuom higni adek? Koso idwaro ringo wasiki kuom dueche adek ka gilawi? Koso tho malit mondo obed e pinyu kuom ndalo adek? Parane, inyisa gima dadwok jal moora.”" 
2Samuel24:14 Daudi nodwoko Gad niya, “An gi masira maduong’, to ber mondo wabed e lwet Ruoth Nyasaye, nimar ng’wonone duong’. To kik abed e lwet dhano.”" 
2Samuel24:15 Omiyo Ruoth Nyasaye nooro tho malit kuom jo-Israel, chakre okinyi, nyaka chop kinde ma noketo. Ji alufu piero abiriyo notho, chakre Dan nyaka Beer-sheba." 
2Samuel24:16 To kane malaika orieyo bade kochiko Jerusalem mondo oketh dalano, Ruoth Nyasaye noloko parone kuom masira ma nodwaro timo mowacho ni malaika mane nego ji niya, “Oromo! Koro dwok lweti.” To noyudo ka malaika mar Ruoth Nyasaye obet but kar dino mar Arauna ja-Jebus." 
2Samuel24:17 Kane Daudi oneno malaika mane nego ji, nowacho ni Ruoth Nyasaye niya, “An e jakwath moseketho, kendo an ema asetimo gima rach. To ere rach ma ogandani osetimo? Akwayi ni an ema mondo ikuma kod dhoodwa.”" 
2Samuel24:18 Chieng’no Gad nodhi ir Daudi, mowachone ni, “Dhiyo kar dino mar Arauna ja-Jebus, igerie ni Ruoth Nyasaye kendo-mar-misango.”" 
2Samuel24:19 Omiyo kane Daudi owinjo wachno, nodhi kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nochike." 
2Samuel24:20 To kane Arauna oneno ruoth gi joge ka biro ire, nowuok modhi romone, kendo nogoyo chonge piny, mokulorene nyaka e lowo." 
2Samuel24:21 Arauna nopenjo ruoth niya, “Marang’o ibiro ira?” Daudi nodwoke ni, “Adwaro ng’iewo kodi kar dinoni, mondo agerie ni Ruoth Nyasaye kendo-mar-misango, mondo tho ma nego joga orum.”" 
2Samuel24:22 Arauna nowacho ni Daudi niya, “Ruoth, kaw akawa gimoro amora ma chunyi dwaro, ichiw ni Nyasaye. Ruedhi nitie minyalo timogo misango, kendo yien mag dino cham, kendo jok motue e ng’ut dhok, minyalo chwako." 
2Samuel24:23 Ruoth, magi duto amiyi.” Eka Arauna nomedo wacho ni ruoth niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachi mondo oyie gi chiwoni.”" 
2Samuel24:24 To ruoth nodwoke ni, “Ooyo, nyaka achuli, nikech ok natim ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasacha misengni gi gik mayudo nono.” Omiyo Daudi nochulo fedha ma dirom nus kilo, kong’iewogo kar dino kaachiel gi ruedhigo." 
2Samuel24:25 Eka nogero ni Ruoth Nyasaye kendo-mar-misango kanyono, motimoe misengni miwang’o pep, kod mag sawo. Ruoth Nyasaye nowinjo lemo ma nochiwne, kendo nogeng’o tho malitno mondo kik oneg jo-Israel." 
1Kings1:1 Ruoth Daudi koro noseti, kendo hike ne oniang’, ma kata ne oume gi lep nindo, to pod ne ok onyal yudo liet." 
1Kings1:2 Emomiyo jotichne ne owachone niya, “Yie mondo wadwarni nyako manyalo tiyoni kendo riti. Bende nonind buti mondo iyud liet.”" 
1Kings1:3 Omiyo ne gidwaro nyako ma jaber e piny Israel duto, nyaka ne giyudo Abishag nyar Shunam, mi ne gikele ir ruoth." 
1Kings1:4 Nyakono ne jaber ahinya, norito ruoth kotiyone, to ruoth ne ok riwre kode." 
1Kings1:5 Adonija wuod Hagith nochako kawore, kaparo ni nobed ruoth. Nong’iewo geche lweny, gi joidh farese kod gi ji piero abich mane telo nyime." 
1Kings1:6 Nyaka oa e tinne wuon mare ne pok otale. Adonija ne wuod Daudi mane jalup’ Absalom, kendo ne en gi chia kaka owadgino." 
1Kings1:7 Noloso gi Joab wuod Zeruya, kod Abiathar jadolo, mi jogo nodokne, kendo ne gikonye." 
1Kings1:8 To Zadok jadolo, gi Nathan janabi, gi Shimei, gi Rei, kod thuondi mag Daudi ne ok odokne." 
1Kings1:9 Adonija noyang’o rombe gi ruedhi kod dhok machwe, kotimogo misango but lwanda mar Zoheleth man but En-rogel. Nogwelo owetene duto ma yawuot ruoth, kod jodong Juda duto," 
1Kings1:10 to ne ok ogwelo Nathan janabi, gi Benaya kod thuondi kande, kata Solomon owadgi bende ne ok ogwelo." 
1Kings1:11 Eka Nathan nowacho ni Bathsheba min Solomon niya, “Donge isewinjo ni Adonija wuod Hagith osebedo ruoth, to ruodhwa Daudi ok ong’eyo?" 
1Kings1:12 To koro yiena mondo ang’adni rieko minyalo resogo ngimani gi ngima Solomon wuodi. 
1Kings1:13 Dhi ir ruoth Daudi, kendo penje niya, ‘Ruodha, donge isesingorina ni Solomon wuoda ema nobed ruoth kari, kendo nobed e kom duong’ni? Ka en kamano, to ang’o momiyo Adonija osebedo ruoth?’" 
1Kings1:14 To ka pod iwuoyo gi ruoth kamano, to anadonj bang’i, mondo asir weche miwachogo.”" 
1Kings1:15 Omiyo Bathsheba nodonjo e od ruoth. Ndalogo Daudi noseti ahinya, kendo Abishag nyar Shunam ne tiyone." 
1Kings1:16 Bathsheba nolung’ore ni ruoth, ka miye duong’ mi ruoth nopenje gima odwaro." 
1Kings1:17 En to nodwoke niya, “Ruodha, nisingorina e nying Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachi ni Solomon wuoda ema nobed ruoth kari, kobet e kom duong’ mari." 
1Kings1:18 To koro Adonija osebet ruoth kikia. 
1Kings1:19 Osetimo misango gi ruedhi, kod dhok machwe, gi rombe mathoth, kendo osegwelo yawuot ruoth duto, kod Abiathar jadolo, gi Joab jatend jolweny. To ok ogwelo Solomon wuodi." 
1Kings1:20 Koro ruodha, jo-Israel rito wachni mondo inyisgi ng’at ma nobed ruoth kari." 
1Kings1:21 Ka ok itimo kamano, to wan gi Solomon wuoda wanane masira kisetho.”" 
1Kings1:22 Kane Bathsheba pod wuoyo gi ruoth, Nathan janabi nodonjo, mi onyis ruoth ni Nathan janabi dwaro nene." 
1Kings1:23 Nochopo ir ruoth, mogoyo chonge piny, kokulorene nyaka e lowo." 
1Kings1:24 Eka nopenjo Ruoth niya, “Isewacho ni Adonija ema nobed ruoth kari, kendo nobed e kom duong’ni?" 
1Kings1:25 Osedhi mwalo moyang’o ruedhi gi dhok machwe kod rombe mogundho. Osegwelo yawuot ruoth duto, kaachiel gi Joab jatend jolweny kod Abiathar jadolo, kendo koro gibet piny kode, ka gichiemo kendo gimetho. Giwacho niya, ‘Ruoth Adonija mondo odag aming’a!’" 
1Kings1:26 To an gi Zadok jadolo, gi Benaya wuod Jehoyada, kod Solomon wuodi, ne ok ogwelowa." 
1Kings1:27 In ema iyienigi mondo gitim kamano koso, mak inyisowa ng’ama nobed ruoth kari?”" 
1Kings1:28 Ruoth Daudi nodwoko niya, “Luongna Bathsheba obi ka.” Mi nobiro mochung’ e nyim Ruoth." 
1Kings1:29 Eka ruoth nokuong’ore kowacho niya, “Adier gi nying Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel, mosereso ngimana e masiche duto," 
1Kings1:30 ne akuong’ora ni Solomon wuodi ema nobed ruoth bang’a e kom duong’na. Kawuono eka abiro chopo gima nakuong’ora.” 
1Kings1:31 Bathsheba nogoyo chonge piny, mokulore nyaka e lowo, komiyo ruoth duong’, mi nowacho niya, “Ruodha, mondo idag nyaka chieng’.”" 
1Kings1:32 Eka ruoth Daudi nowacho niya, “Luongnauru Zadok jadolo, gi Nathan janabi, kod Benaya wuod Jehoyada, jobi ira.” Mi ne gibiro e nyime. Nowachonigi niya," 
1Kings1:33 “Dhiuru gi askechena, uket Solomon wuoda e kanja, kendo ukowe nyaka Gihon," 
1Kings1:34 kama Zadok jadolo gi Nathan janabi biro wiree gi mo, mondo obed ruodh Israel. Bang’e ugo tung’, kendo ukog niya, ‘Ruoth Solomon mondo odag aming’a!’" 
1Kings1:35 Eka uluw bang’e, kuduoge ka, mondo obed e kom duong’na, nikech asekete ruoth kara, kendo aseyiere mondo obed jatend jo-Israel gi jo-Juda.”" 
1Kings1:36 Benaya wuod Jehoyada nodwoko Ruoth niya, “Obed kamano! Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachi mondo oyie otimre kamano." 
1Kings1:37 Ruoth Nyasaye mondo obed gi Solomon kaka ne en kodi, kendo lochne obed maduong’ moloyo mari.”" 
1Kings1:38 Eka Zadok jadolo, gi Nathan janabi, kod Benaya wuod Jehoyada, kaachiel gi jo-Kereth kod jo-Peleth, nomiyo Solomon oidho kanyna mar ruoth Daudi, mi ne gilor ka gikowe nyaka Gihon." 
1Kings1:39 Zadok jadolo nokawo tung’ mar mo mane ogolo e Hemb Nyasaye, mowirogo Solomon kuno. Eka ne gigoyo tung’, kendo ji duto nokok niya, “Ruoth Solomon mondo odag aming’a!”" 
1Kings1:40 Bang’e ji duto noluwe ka giduoge; ne gigoyo asili, kendo ne gimor gi mor maduong’, mi piny noyiengni nikech koko margi." 
1Kings1:41 Adonija gi welo duto mane ni kode nowinjo kokono, ka noyudo gitieko chiemo. Joab to ka nowinjo tung’ ka ywak, nopenjo niya, “Ere gimomiyo dala otimo mahu?”" 
1Kings1:42 Kane Joab pod loso, Jonathan wuod Abiathar jadolo nochopo. Adonija nokone ni, “Donji! In ng’ama ber, kendo ageno ni ikelo wach maber!”" 
1Kings1:43 Jonathan nodwoke niya, “Ok kamano. Ruodhwa Daudi oseketo Solomon ruoth." 
1Kings1:44 Nooro Zadok jadolo, gi Nathan janabi, kod Benaya wuod Jehoyada, kaachiel gi jo-Kereth gi jo-Peleth, mondo okow Solomon koidho kanyna mar ruoth," 
1Kings1:45 kendo Zadok jadolo gi Nathan janabi, josewire gi mo but soko Gihon, mondo obed ruoth. Koro gisea kuro gi ilo; emomiyo dala otimo mahu kendo mano e koko musewinjo." 
1Kings1:46 Solomon koro obet e kom ruoth. 
1Kings1:47 To moloyo, jodong ruoth bende nobiro mopako ruodhwa Daudi, ka giwacho niya, ‘Nyasachi mondo omi nying Solomon obed gi huma moloyo nyingi, kendo omi lochne duong’ moloyo mari.’ Mi ruoth Daudi nokulore e kitandane," 
1Kings1:48 mowacho ni, ‘Apako Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel, moseyiena mondo ane wuoda kobet e kom duong’na kawuono.’ ”" 
1Kings1:49 Eka luoro nomako wend Adonija duto, mi gia malo, kendo ng’ato ka ng’ato nodok dalane." 
1Kings1:50 Adonija bende noluoro Solomon, mi nodhi, momako tunge mag kendo-mar-misango." 
1Kings1:51 Nonyis Solomon niya, “Adonija oluori; omiyo osemako tunge mag kendo-mar-misango, kowacho niya, ‘Ruoth Solomon mondo okuong’rena ni ok nonega.’ ”" 
1Kings1:52 Solomon nowacho ni, “Ka timbene nonyiswa ni en ng’ama kare, to onge kata yie wiye achiel ma nolwar piny. To ka noyud kuome ketho moro, to nonege!”" 
1Kings1:53 Eka ruoth Solomon nooro wach, kendo ne gigole oko e kendo-mar-misango. Nobiro, mokulore ni ruoth, mi ruoth nowachone ni, “Dog dalani.”" 
1Kings2:1 Kane Daudi chiegni tho, nolemo ni Solomon wuode niya," 
1Kings2:2 “An to eri adhi kuma ji duto mae piny dhiye; in to bed motegno kinyiso ni in dichwo. 
1Kings2:3 Mak chik Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachi, kiwuotho e yorene, kendo kimako wechene, gi chikene kod buchene, kaka ondiki e chik Musa, kamoro amora midhiye." 
1Kings2:4 Kamano Ruoth Nyasaye nochop singruok mane otimona, kowachona ni, ‘Ka yawuoti noritre, kendo nowuoth e nyima gi adiera gi chunygi duto kod parogi duto, to nyikwayi nobed ruodhi mag Israel nyaka chieng’.’" 
1Kings2:5 “Bende ing’eyo gima Joab wuod Zeruya notimona. Ne onego Abner wuod Ner, kod Amasa wuod Jether, mane jotend jolwenj Israel. E ndalo kue, nochulo kuor kuom gima notimore e lweny, kokelona buch remo nikech tho mar ng’at makare." 
1Kings2:6 Omiyo ti gi riekoni; wiye oseti lwar, to kik iwe otho gi kue." 
1Kings2:7 To tim maber ni jood Barzilai ja-Gilead, kendo ikonygi, nikech ne girwaka gi ng’wono kane aringo Absalom owadu." 
1Kings2:8 To kik wiyi wil gi Shimei wuod Gera ma ja-Benjamin moa Bahurim, nikech nokuong’a gi kuong’ malit, chieng’ mane awuok kadhi Mahanaim. To bang’e, kane romona e aora Jordan, nakuong’orane gi nying Ruoth Nyasaye ni ok nanege." 
1Kings2:9 To koro kik iweye mak ikume. In ng’at mariek, kendo ibiro ng’eyo gima owinjore itim, mondo otho tho mar masira, kata obedo ni wiye oseti lwar kamano.”" 
1Kings2:10 Kamano Daudi notho, moluwo kwerene, kendo noyike Jerusalem." 
1Kings2:11 Nobet ruodh Israel kuom higni piero ang’wen. E Hebron nobedoe ruoth kuom higni abiriyo, to e Jerusalem higni piero adek gadek." 
1Kings2:12 Koro Solomon nobet ruoth kar Daudi wuon mare, kendo lochne nogurore motegno." 
1Kings2:13 To Adonija wuod Hagith nodhi ir Bathsheba min Solomon. Bathsheba nopenje niya, “Ibiro gi kue koso?” Nodwoke ni, “Ee, abiro gi kue." 
1Kings2:14 To adwaro kwayi gimoro.” Bathsheba nokone ni, “Wachi.”" 
1Kings2:15 Eka nowacho niya, “Ing’eyo ni yande loch onego bed mara, kendo jo-Israel duto nogeno ni an ema nabed ruoth. To wach olokore, kendo owadwa osebet ruoth, nikech Nyasaye ema omiye." 
1Kings2:16 Koro adwaro kwayi gimoro achiel, to kik itama.” Bathsheba nokone ni, “Kwa akwaya.”" 
1Kings2:17 Nowacho niya, “Asayi, kwa ruoth Solomon mondo omiya Abishag nyar Shunam obed chiega, nikech ok onyal tami.”" 
1Kings2:18 Nodwoke ni, “Ber, abiro wuoyoni gi ruoth.”" 
1Kings2:19 Omiyo Bathsheba nodhi ir ruoth Solomon mondo okwaye gima Adonija dwaro. Ruoth nochung’ ka dhi romo ni min, mokulorene. Eka nobet e kom duong’ne, kendo nochiko jotich mondo okel kom ni min mare, mondo obed e bade korachwich." 
1Kings2:20 Bathsheba nowachone niya, “An gi kwayo matin, kik idagi.” Ruoth nodwoke ni, “Kwa akwaya, mama ok nadagi.”" 
1Kings2:21 Nowacho niya, “Yie mondo Abishag nyar Shunam obed chi Adonija owadu.”" 
1Kings2:22 Ruoth Solomon nopenjo min mare ni, “Ang’o momiyo ikwaya mondo Abishag nyar Shunam obed chi Adonija? Chal ka gima ikwaya mana ni mondo amiye loch, nimar en owadwa maduong’, kendo Abiathar jadolo, gi Joab wuod Zeruya, jodokne.”" 
1Kings2:23 Bang’ mano, ruoth Solomon nokuong’ore gi nying Ruoth Nyasaye kowacho niya, “Nyasaye mondo okweda ka Adonija ok otho nikech wachni!" 
1Kings2:24 Gi nying Ruoth Nyasaye mosemiyo agurora motegno e loch kar Daudi wuora, kendo mosemiyo jodhooda obedo jotelo kaka nosingore, akuong’ora ni, Adonija biro tho kawuono!”" 
1Kings2:25 Kuom mano ruoth Solomon nooro Benaya wuod Jehoyada monego Adonija. 
1Kings2:26 To ruoth nowacho ni Abiathar jadolo niya, “In to dog Anathoth dalau. Owinjore itho, to kata kamano koro ok nanegi, nikech niting’o Sanduk mar Ruoth Nyasaye e nyim Daudi wuora, kendo nineno chandruok kaachiel kode.”" 
1Kings2:27 Omiyo Solomon nogolo Abiathar ni kik obed jadolo mar Ruoth Nyasaye. Kamano wach mane Ruoth Nyasaye owacho Shilo kuom od Eli nochopo kare. 
1Kings2:28 Kane Joab owinjo wachno, noringo odhi e Hema mar Nyasaye, momako tunge kendo-mar-misango, nimar nodok ni Adonija,, kata obedo ni ne ok odok ni Absalom, e kinde mane Absalom ong’anyoe." 
1Kings2:29 Nonyis Solomon ni Joab oseringo odhi e od Hema mar Ruoth Nyasaye, mobet e bath kendo-mar-misango. Mi Solomon nooro Benaya wuod Jehoyada, kochike ni, “Dhiyo, inege.”" 
1Kings2:30 Omiyo Benaya nodhi e Hema mar Ruoth Nyasaye, mowacho ni Joab niya, “Ruoth owacho ni mondo iwuogi.” To Joab nodagi, kowacho ni, “Ooyo, atho mana ka.” Eka Benaya nokelo ni ruoth wach mane Joab odwoke." 
1Kings2:31 Ruoth nokone niya, “Tim kaka owacho. Nege kendo iyike, mondo igol oko remo mane ochuero kayiem, kik sik kuoma, kendo kuom od wuora." 
1Kings2:32 Ruoth Nyasaye biro kume kuom remo ma nochwero, nikech nonego ji ariyo makare moloyo gi ber. Nonego Abner wuod Ner, jatend jolweny mag Israel, kod Amasa jotend jolweny mag Juda kane Daudi wuora kia." 
1Kings2:33 Emomiyo rembgi mondo obed e wi Joab gi kothe nyaka chieng’, to Ruoth Nyasaye mondo omed kue ni Daudi gi kothe gi ode kod lochne nyaka chieng’.”" 
1Kings2:34 Eka Benaya wuod Jehoyada nodhi monego Joab. Mi noyik Joab e dalane e thim. 
1Kings2:35 Ruoth noketo Benaya wuod Jehoyada jatend jolweny kar Joab, to Zadok jadolo noketo kar Abiathar." 
1Kings2:36 Eka ruoth noluongo Shimei, mowachone niya, “Ger ot Jerusalem, idagie, to kik iwuog oko ngang’," 
1Kings2:37 nikech chieng’ ma iniwuogie, king’ado aora Kidron, to bed king’eyo ni nonegi. To rembi nodong’ e wiyi iwuon.”" 
1Kings2:38 Shimei nodwoko ruoth ni, “Gima iwacho ber. Anatim kamano.” Mi Shimei nodak Jerusalem kuom ndalo mang’eny." 
1Kings2:39 To bang’ higni adek, wasumb Shimei ariyo noringo adhi ir Akish wuod Maaka, ruodh Gath. Kane onyis Shimei ni wasumbni mage ni Gath," 
1Kings2:40 nogawo kanyna, moidho kodhi ir Akish, dwarogi. Kamano noomogi Gath, moduogogi." 
1Kings2:41 To ka nonyis Solomon ni Shimei osewuok Jerusalem, odhi Gath, kendo oseduogo," 
1Kings2:42 noluongo Shimei, mowachone niya, “Namiyo ikuong’ori e nying Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo asiemi matek, kawachoni ni, ‘Ng’e adier ni chieng’ ma iniwuog oko kidhi kamoro amora, to nonegi.’ Kendo idwoka ni, ‘Anatim kaka iwacho.’" 
1Kings2:43 Marang’o nitamori rito singruok ma nitimo e nying Ruoth Nyasaye, kod chik mane aketoni?”" 
1Kings2:44 Ruoth nomedo wacho ni Shimei niya, “Ing’eyo richo duto mane itimo ni Daudi wuora. Emomiyo Ruoth Nyasaye nodwok richoni e wiyi." 
1Kings2:45 To an Solomon, nayud gueth, kendo loch Daudi nogurre e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye nyaka chieng’.”" 
1Kings2:46 Eka Ruoth nochiko Benaya wuod Jehoyada mondo oneg Shimei, mi Benaya nowuok oko, monege. Kamano loch nogurore e lwet Solomon." 
1Kings3:1 Solomon nokendo nyar Farao, ruodh Misri, kokelogo winjruok e pinjegi, kendo nokele e dala Daudi gi Od Ruoth Nyasaye, kod ohinga molworo Jerusalem." 
1Kings3:2 Ji pod ne timo misango e hembko mane ni kuonde moting’ore, nikech ot moger ni Ruoth Nyasaye ne pod onge ndalogo." 
1Kings3:3 Solomon nohero Ruoth Nyasaye, koluwo chik Daudi wuon mare, mak mana ni notimo misango, kendo nowang’o ubani, e hembko mane ni kuonde moting’ore." 
1Kings3:4 Ruoth Solomon ne jadhi Gibeon mondo otim misango, nikech ne en hembko mong’ere moloyo, kendo nothoro timo misengni miwang’o pep alufu achiel e kar misangono." 
1Kings3:5 Kane Solomon odhi dalano, Ruoth Nyasaye nofwenyorene e lek gotieno, mowachone ni, “Kwa gima idwaro mondo amiyi.”" 
1Kings3:6 Solomon nodwoke niya, “Ninyiso hera mosiko ni Daudi wuora ma jatichni, mane wuotho e nyimi gi adiera, kendo kuom dimbruok gi chuny makare. Bende pod inyise hera mosikono nyaka chil kawuono, nimar isemiyo wuode obedo ruoth kare." 
1Kings3:7 Koroni, A Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasacha, iseketa ruoth kar Daudi wuora, to pod an rawera mayot, kendo akia kaka onego awuoth e nyim ji." 
1Kings3:8 Iseketa e kind jogi miseyiero, ma gin ji mathoth mokadho akwana." 
1Kings3:9 Emomiyo yie imiya chuny mariek, manyalo yango gima ber gi gima rach, mondo ang’adgo ni jogi bura, nikech ere ng’ama dinyal ng’ado bura ni jogi mang’enygi?”" 
1Kings3:10 Ruoth Nyasaye ne mor nikech Solomon nokwayo kamano," 
1Kings3:11 omiyo nodwoke niya, “Nikech ikwayo wachni, to ok ikwayo ni mondo idag aming’a, kata mondo iyud mwandu, kata mondo iketh ngima wasiki, to ikwayo mana rieko mar ng’ado bura kare," 
1Kings3:12 koro atimoni kaka isekwayo. Amiyi chuny mar rieko kod mar ng’eyo. Pok onywolie ng’at machal kodi, bende ok nonywol moro bang’i." 
1Kings3:13 Mago mane ok ikwayo bende amedi, gin mwandu kod duong’, ma onge ruoth moro amora ma dibed marom kodi ka pod ingima." 
1Kings3:14 Bende kiluwo yorena, kendo imako chikena gi buchena, kaka Daudi wuoru notimo, to namedni ndalo.”" 
1Kings3:15 Eka Solomon nochiew, moyudo ni kara en mana lek. Nodok Jerusalem, mochung’ e nyim Sandug Muma mar Ruoth Nyasaye, kotimo misengni miwang’o pep kod mag sawo, kendo noloso ni jotichne duto sawo maduong’." 
1Kings3:16 Chieng’ moro, mon ariyo ma jochode nobiro ir ruoth, mi ochung’ e nyime." 
1Kings3:17 Dhako achiel nowacho niya, “Yaye ruodha, wadak gi dhani e ot achiel, kendo nanywolo nyathi ka wan kode e odno." 
1Kings3:18 Bang’ ndalo adek, dhani bende nonywol. Ne wan kendwa e ot; ne onge ng’at moro machielo mak mana wan ji ariyo." 
1Kings3:19 To nyathi dhani notho gotieno, nikech nonindo kuome." 
1Kings3:20 Eka noa malo dier otieno, mokawo wuoda buta ka nindo otera, mi opielo e kore, to wuode motho nopielo e kora." 
1Kings3:21 Kane achiew mondo adhodh nyathina, nayudo kosetho, to kane anone maber gokinyi, nayudo ni ok en nyathi manywolo.”" 
1Kings3:22 Eka dhako machielo nowacho niya, “Ooyo, nyathi mangima e mara, to motho e mari.” Dhako mokwongo nodwoko ni, “Ooyo, nyathi motho e mari, to mangima e mara.” Kamano e kaka ne gimino wach e nyim ruoth." 
1Kings3:23 Eka Ruoth nowacho niya, “Dhako achiel wacho niya, ‘Nyathi mangima e wuoda, to motho e wuodi.’ To machielo wacho ni, ‘Ooyo, in ema wuodi otho, to wuoda ema ngima.’ ”" 
1Kings3:24 Kane ruoth osewacho kamano, nokwayo mondo okelne ligangla, kendo kane gisekelonego," 
1Kings3:25 nowacho niya, “Poguru nyathi mangima diere, mondo umi dhako achiel konchiel, to komachielo umi dhako machielo.”" 
1Kings3:26 To dhako mane nyathine ngima nohero wuode ahinya, omiyo nosayo ruoth, kowacho niya, “Yaye ruoth, mi dhani nyathi mangima, to kik inege ngang’!” To dhako machielo nowacho ni, “Ok enobed mara kata mari. Poge apoga!”" 
1Kings3:27 Eka ruoth nodwoko ni, “Miuru dhako mokwongono nyathi mangima, kik unege ngang’, nikech en e min mare.”" 
1Kings3:28 Jo-Israel duto nowinjo bura mane ruoth ong’ado, mi ne giluore, nikech ne gineno ni rieko Nyasaye ni kuome, ka konye ng’ado bura makare." 
1Kings4:1 Solomon nobedo ruodh jo-Israel duto," 
1Kings4:2 kendo magi ne jodonge: Azaria wuod Zadok ne jadolo maduong’; 
1Kings4:3 Elihoref gi Ahija, ma yawuot Shisha, ne jogoro; Jehoshafat wuod Ahiud ne jachan weche;" 
1Kings4:4 Benaya wuod Jehoyada ne jatend jolweny; Zadok gi Abiathar ne jodolo; 
1Kings4:5 Azaria wuod Nathan ne jatend jodong piny; Zebud wuod Nathan ne jadolo kendo osiep ruoth; 
1Kings4:6 Ahishar ne jaduong’ e od ruoth, kendo Adoniram wuod Abda ne jarit jogo ma nichuno mondo oti gi thwon." 
1Kings4:7 Solomon noketo jodongo apar gariyo mondo orit piny Israel duto, kendo ochok chiemo ma dirome kod joge. Ng’ato ka ng’ato kuomgi ne choko chiemo kuom due achiel e higa," 
1Kings4:8 kendo magi e nying jogo: Wuod Hur ne rito piny gode mag Efraim; 
1Kings4:9 wuod Deker ne rito Makaz, gi Shaalbim, gi Beth-shemesh kod Elon-beth-hanan;" 
1Kings4:10 wuod Hesed ne rito Aruboth, kaachiel gi Soko, kod piny Hefer duto;" 
1Kings4:11 wuod Abinadab, ma chiege Tafath nyar Solomon, ne rito piny Dor duto;" 
1Kings4:12 Baana wuod Ahilud ne rito Taanak gi Megido nyaka Beth-shean, chakre kama yo lorie koa Jezreel dhi Beth-shean, mopowore nyaka Abel-mehola mokiewo gi Zerethan, kendo nyaka loka Jokmeam;" 
1Kings4:13 wuod Geber ne rito piny Ramoth-gilead; pinyno ema miech Jair wuod Manase man Gilead ne nitie, kod piny Argob man Bashan, mier piero auchiel mochiel gi ohinga, kendo man gi lodi mag mula." 
1Kings4:14 Ahinadab wuod Iddo ne rito Mahanaim. 
1Kings4:15 Ahimaaz ma nokendo Basemath nyar Solomon ne rito piny Naftali. 
1Kings4:16 Baana wuod Hushai ne rito piny Asher kod Bealoth. 
1Kings4:17 Jehoshafat wuod Parua ne rito piny Isakar. 
1Kings4:18 Shimei wuod Ela ne rito piny Benjamin. 
1Kings4:19 Geber wuod Uri ne rito piny Gilead; (enie piny mane Sihon ruodh jo-Amor, kod Og ruodh Bashan rito chon.) To ne nitie jaduong’ achiel kende mane rito piny Juda." 
1Kings4:20 Jo-Juda gi jo-Israel ne ng’eny ka kuoyo mae dhonam; ne gidak gi kue, kendo gi mor." 
1Kings4:21 Solomon nobedo ruodh pinje duto, chakre aora Yufrate, nyaka piny jo-Filistia kod tong’ piny Misri. Jopinjego duto ne chulo osuru, kendo ne tiyo ni Solomon kuom ndalo duto mag ngimane." 
1Kings4:22 Chiemo mane ikelo ni Solomon odiechieng’ kodiechieng’ ne romo kama: gunde piero auchiel mag mogo mayom, gi gunde mia achiel gi piero ariyo mag mogo amoga," 
1Kings4:23 gi ruedhi apar machwe ma kwayo kama ochiel, gi ruedhi piero ariyo ma kwayo e lek, gi rombe mia achiel, kaachiel gi nyikeye, gi ngepe, gi mwendni, kod gwen machwe." 
1Kings4:24 Solomon noloyo ruodhi kod pinje duto koa yo milambo mar aora Yufrate, chakre Tifsa nyaka Gaza, mi nobedo gi kue e tong’ pinye duto." 
1Kings4:25 E ndalo Solomon duto, jo-Juda gi jo-Israel duto nodak e miechgii gi kue, chakre Dan yo nyandwat, nyaka Beer-sheba, yo milambo." 
1Kings4:26 Solomon ne nigi udi alufu piero ang’wen moger ni farese mag gechene, bende ne en gi joidh geche alufu piero ang’wen moger ni farese mag gechene, bende ne en gi joidh farese alufu apar gariyo." 
1Kings4:27 Jodong gwenge kande ne kelo chiemo ni ruoth Solomon kod jogo duto mane chiemo e dalane. Ng’ato ka ng’ato ne kelo chiemo kamano e due moketne, mak gimoro orem." 
1Kings4:28 Ne gitero bende shairi gi lum mag farese gi mag kenje kamoro amora mane idwarogie. 
1Kings4:29 Nyasaye nomiyo Solomon rieko gi winjo mathoth, to kod paro malach ka nam." 
1Kings4:30 Kuom mano, rieko Solomon noyombo rieko mar jo yo wuokchieng’ duto. Noloyo bende rieko duto mag jo-Misri." 
1Kings4:31 Noriek moloyo ji duto, kata Ethan ja-Ezra, gi Heman, gi Kalkol kod Darda, ma yawuot Mahol. Humbe nolak e pinje duto mokiewo kode koni gi koni." 
1Kings4:31 Noriek moloyo ji duto, kata Ethan ja-Ezra, gi Heman, gi Kalkol kod Darda, ma yawuot Mahol. Humbe nolak e pinje duto mokiewo kode koni gi koni." 
1Kings4:32 Nochuogo ngeche alufu adek, kendo wende moromo alufu achiel kod abich." 
1Kings4:33 Nowuoyo kuom kit yien duto, kochako gi sida madongo man Lebanon nyaka okinga mati e kind kite mag ohinga. Nowuoyo bende kuom le gi winy gi gik mamol, kendo kuom rech." 
1Kings4:34 Ji ne biro, koa e ogendini duto, mondo owinj rieko Solomon. Ruodhi duto mag piny ngima mane osewinjo humb riekone bende ne biro ire." 
1Kings5:1 Kane Hiram ruodh Turo owinjo ni Solomon osewir, moket ruoth kar Daudi wuon mare, nooro joote ire, nikech yande ne ohero Daudi." 
1Kings5:2 Eka Solomon nooro ni Hiram wach niya," 
1Kings5:3 “Ing’eyo ni Daudi wuora ne ok nyal gero Hekalu ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasache, nikech lwenje mane wasike olworego, nyaka Ruoth Nyasaye noketogi e bwo lochne." 
1Kings5:4 To koro Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasacha osemiya kue kuonde duto, kendo aonge gi wasigu kata masira moro." 
1Kings5:5 Emomiyo koro adwaro gero ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasacha, ka aluwo singruok mane omiyo Daudi wuora, kowacho niya, ‘Wuodi ma naket ruoth kari ema nogerna Hekalu.’" 
1Kings5:6 Omiyo koro yie ichik ji mondo otong’na yiend sida mag Lebanon. Jotichna nonywak tich kod jotichni, kendo anamiyi chudo mag jotichni kaka ichano, nikech onge ng’ato kuomwa mong’eyo tong’o yien machal gi jo-Sidon.”" 
1Kings5:7 Kane Hiram owinjo weche Solomon, nomor ahinya, mowacho niya, “Apako Ruoth Nyasaye tinendeni, mosemiyo Daudi wuowi man gi rieko mondo otel ni oganda maduong’ kamano.”" 
1Kings5:8 Nooro ni Solomon wach niya, “Asewinjo wach miorona, kendo aikora timo gik moko duto midwaro kuom wach yiend sida gi yiend saipras." 
1Kings5:9 Jotichna nogolgi Lebanon, kendo notergi nyaka e dhonam, mi notuegi kanyakala, mondo okwang’gi e nam nyaka kuma idwaro. Joga nogony yien-go kanyono, kendo inikawgi. To kichiwo chiemo moromo jooda to inichop dwarona.”" 
1Kings5:10 Eka Hiram nomiyo Solomon yien duto modwaro," 
1Kings5:11 Kendo higa ka higa Solomon ne miyo Hiram gunde alufu piero ariyo mag cham mondo obed chiemb joode, kod mo ma dirom depe alufu piero ariyo gabich." 
1Kings5:12 Ruoth Nyasaye nomiyo Solomon rieko, kaka nosesingorene. Kue ne nitie e kind Hiram gi Solomon, kendo ne gitimo winjruok." 
1Kings5:13 Solomon nochuno ji alufu piero adek kuom jo-Israel duto mondo oti gi thwon. 
1Kings5:14 Due ka due nooro ji alufu apar kuomgi Lebanon. Ne gitiyo kuno kuom due achiel, to ne giyueyo dala kuom dueye ariyo. Adoram ne en jarit joma nichuno mondo oti gi thwon-go." 
1Kings5:15 To bende Solomon ne nigi joting’ misike alufu piero abiriyo kod jopecho alufu piero aboro mane payo kite e gode," 
1Kings5:16 kaachiel gi nyipeche alufu adek gi mia adek. 
1Kings5:17 Ruoth noketonigi chik, mi ne gipayo kite madongo ma nengogi tek, mondo gilosgo mise mar Hekalu." 
1Kings5:18 Kamano jogedo mag Solomon gi mag Hiram kod jo-Gebal ne payo kite kod bepe ka giko mondo ogergo Hekalu. 
1Kings6:1 E higa mar mia ang’wen gi piero aboro bang’ wuok jo-Israel Misri, kane Solomon osebet ruodh Israel higni ang’wen, nochako gero Hekalu mar Ruoth Nyasaye, e due mar ariyo miluongo ni Zif." 
1Kings6:2 Bor mar Hekalu mane ogero ni Ruoth Nyasaye noromo mita piero adek, lachne mita apar, to borne modhi malo mita apar gabich." 
1Kings6:3 Bor mar agola mane ni e nyim Kama Ler mar Hekalu noromo mita apar, maromre gi lach Hekalu, to lach agolano, koa e nyim Hekalu, noromo mita abich." 
1Kings6:4 Noloso ni Hekalu dirise mogaji," 
1Kings6:5 kendo nogero udi moko momakore gi kor Hekalu gi oko. Udigo noluoro Kama Ler, kaachiel gi Kama Ler Moloyo." 
1Kings6:6 Udigo ne oluwo gorofa adek, kendo lach mar udi mapiny noromo mita ariyo gi nus, to lach mar udi ma diere ne mita adek, kendo lach mar udi mamalo ne mita adek gi nus, nikech ne gisweko kor ot mondo yiend arip kik pow." 
1Kings6:7 Noger Hekalu gi kite mane opa kuma nikunyogie, mondo koko mar nyundo kata mar le kata mar gir tich moro mar nyinyo kik winji e Hekalu, kapod igere." 
1Kings6:8 Dhoot midonjogo e udi mapiny ne nie bat korachwich mar Hekalu, to raidhi nochopo e udi madiere nyaka gorofa mar adek." 
1Kings6:9 Kamano Solomon nogero Hekalu, motieko, kendo nochwade gi sida." 
1Kings6:10 Eka nogero udi molworo Hekalu duto. Bepe mag sida ema noriwo kor udigo gi Hekalu, kendo bor modhi malo mar gorofa ka gorofa noromo mita ariyo gi nus." 
1Kings6:11 Wach Ruoth Nyasaye nofwenyore ni Solomon niya," 
1Kings6:12 “Kuom wach Hekalu migeroni, ka inirit chikena duto, kendo iluwgi maber, to anachop gima nawacho ni Daudi wuoru kuomi." 
1Kings6:13 Anadag kod joga Israel, mak aweyogi ngang’.”" 
1Kings6:14 Kamano Solomon nogero Hekalu, motieko." 
1Kings6:15 Nochwado kor ot gi yo ka iye gi bap sida, chakre tiend ot nyaka yiend tado, to noloso dier ot gi yiend saipras." 
1Kings6:16 Mita apar ma iye nong’ado gi bap sida, chakre tiend ot nyaka yiend tado mondo obed ot maler maiye, miluongo ni Kama Ler Moloyo." 
1Kings6:17 To bor mar ot modong’, mane nie nyim ot maler ma iye, moromo mita piero ariyo." 
1Kings6:18 Bap sida mane nie Hekalu nopa machal gi budho kod thiepe. Ne en bap sida lilo, ma kata kidi moro ne ok nen." 
1Kings6:19 Ei Hekalu nolosoe ot maler ma iye, mondo oketie Sandug Muma mar Ruoth Nyasaye." 
1Kings6:20 Ot ma iyeno, borne gi lachne kod borne modhi malo noromo mita apar, kendo Solomon nobawe gi dhahabu maler. To bende noloso kendo-mar-misango gi bap sida." 
1Kings6:21 Nobawo ii Hekalu gi dhahabu maler, kendo noriwo thiwini mag dhahabu e nyim ot maler ma iye. Odno bende nobawo gi dhahabu." 
1Kings6:22 Kamano nobawo ot duto gi dhahabu, kaachiel gi kendo-mar-misango mane nie ot ma iye." 
1Kings6:23 Ei ot maler maiye noketoe kido ariyo molos gi bap zeituni maket gi malaika miluongo ni kerubi, ma moro ka moro borne noromo mita abich." 
1Kings6:24 Buomb kerubi konchiel noromo mita ariyo gi nus, to komachielo bende kamano. Kamano bor buombe duto korie noromo mita abich." 
1Kings6:25 Pim mar kerubi machielo bende noromo mita abich. Duong’ kod kido mar kerubi ariyogo ne chalre chuth," 
1Kings6:26 kendo bor modhi malo mar moro ka moro noromo mita abich. 
1Kings6:27 Noketo kerubigo e dier ot maler maiye, ka buombegi oyarore. Buomb kerubi achiel nogik e kor ot koni, kendo buomb kerubi machielo nogik e kor ot kocha, to buombegi madiere noromo e dier ot tir." 
1Kings6:28 Solomon nobawo kerubigo bende gi dhahabu. 
1Kings6:29 Kor ot duto, ma iye gi maoko nopayoe kido mag kerubi gi mag yiend othidhe kod thiepe moyarore," 
1Kings6:30 kendo dier udi maiye gi maoko noumo gi dhahabu. 
1Kings6:31 Dhoot midonjogo e ot maiye noloso gi bepe abich mag zeituni; 
1Kings6:32 thikene ariyo nopayoe kido mag kerubi gi mag yiend othidhe kod thiepe moyarore, kendo thikego kaachiel gi kerubi kod yien-go nobawo gi dhahabu." 
1Kings6:33 Kamano bende noloso sich dhood Hekalu gi bepe ang’wen mag zeituni," 
1Kings6:34 to thikene ariyo noloso gi bap saipras, ma moro ka moro nibano diriyo kiyawo." 
1Kings6:35 Thikego bende nopayoe kido mag kerubi gi mag yiend othidhe kod thiepe moyarore, kendo nobawo gik mopago gi dhahabu maromre chuth." 
1Kings6:36 Laro maiye nochielo gi ohinga moger gi kite mopa, moluow didek, kaachiel gi laini achiel mar bap sida." 
1Kings6:37 Mise mar Od Ruoth Nyasaye noket e higa mar ang’wen mar loch Solomon, e due miluongo ni Zif." 
1Kings6:38 To e higa mar apar gachiel, e due mar aboro miluongo ni Bul, Hekalu norumo chuth, kaka nosechan ni onego gere. Kamano Solomon notieko higni abiriyo kagero Hekalu." 
1Kings7:1 Solomon nogero dalane owuon kuom higni apar gadek, eka otieko gere." 
1Kings7:2 Nogero ot miluongo ni Od Bungu mar Lebanon. Borne noromo mita piero abich, to lachne mita piero ariyo gabich, kendo borne modhi malo mita apar gabich. Nogere ewi laini adek mag sirni mag sida, moriwie bepe mag sida." 
1Kings7:3 Ne oumo wiye gi bap sida, mokadho ewi sirni piero ang’wen gabichgo. E laini ka laini nochanie sirni apar gabich." 
1Kings7:4 Ne nitie laini adek mag dirise mogaji, kendo dirisa ka dirisa nomanyore gi wadgi." 
1Kings7:5 Sisi mar dhoudi duto gi mag dirise duto ne romre, kendo dirisa ka dirisa nomanyore gi wadgi e laini adek." 
1Kings7:6 Bende nogero ot moro miluongo ni Od Sirni, ma borne noromo mita piero ariyo gabich, to lachne mita apar gabich. Ne en gi agola man gi sirni e nyime." 
1Kings7:7 Nogero bende Od Kom Duong’ mochwado gi bap sida, chakre tiend ot nyaka tado. Noluonge ni Od Bura nimar nong’adoe bura." 
1Kings7:8 Solomon nogero ode owuon mane obiro dakie e laru machielo man tok Od Bura. Nolose machal gi Od Burano, kendo nogero ot moro machielo ma bende chal kode, ni mondo nyar Farao mane okendo odagie." 
1Kings7:9 Udigo duto noger gi kite mopa ma nengogi tek, chakre mise nyaka yiendambewa, kendo chakre laru mar Hekalu mar Ruoth Nyasaye nyaka laru maduong’. Kitego duto nong’ad gi musmeno marom kaka idwaro, kendo nopagi koni gi koni." 
1Kings7:10 Mise noger gi kite madongo ma nengogi tek, ma moko mita abich to moko mita ang’wen." 
1Kings7:11 To e wigi ne nitie bap sida gi kite ma nengogi tek, ma moro ka moro opa kaka idwaro." 
1Kings7:12 Laru maduong’ nochiel gi ohinga moger gi kite mopa moluow didek, kod laini achiel mar bap sida, machal gi laru ma iye mar Hekalu mar Ruoth Nyasaye kod agola mar Hekalu." 
1Kings7:13 Eka ruoth Solomon nooro jaote Turo mondo oom ng’at moro miluongo ni Huram. 
1Kings7:14 Ne en wuod chi liel ma jadhood Naftali, to wuon mare ne ja-Turo, ma jatich mula. Ne en gi rieko gi winjo kod lony mar loso gimoro amora mar mula, kendo nobiro ir ruoth Solomon, molosone gik moko duto mane odwaro." 
1Kings7:15 Noloso sirni ariyo mag mula. Bor mar moro ka moro noromo mita ochiko, to alwora mar kore noromo mita auchiel. Igi norokore, kendo mith mula molosgigo ne romre gi lach lith lwedo ang’wen." 
1Kings7:16 Nolenyo mula molosogo gik moko ariyo machal gi agulini madongo, moumogo sirni. Bor mar agulu ka agulu noromo mita abich." 
1Kings7:17 Noloso gik moko ariyo mag mula e kido machal gi osera, mong’awogi kuom agulini mane nie wi agulini mane nie wi sirni. Agulu ka agulu ne nie wi osera achiel." 
1Kings7:18 Kamano bende noloso gik mong’inore ong’inore ka machunga e laini ariyo, molworo osera ma noumo agulini mane nie wi sirni." 
1Kings7:19 Agulini mane nie wi sirni mochung’ e nyim agolago, nolos gi mula machal gi wi oyungu, moromo mita ariyo." 
1Kings7:20 Wi sirni ariyogo noyarore, kendo agulini moum gi osera noumore kuomgi, to gik mong’inore ong’inore mia ariyo mochan e laini ariyo nolworo agulu ka agulu." 
1Kings7:21 Nochungo sirnigo e agola mar Hekalu. Siro achiel nochungo korachwich, mochako ni Jakin. Siro machielo nochungo koracham, mochako ni Boaz." 
1Kings7:22 Wi sirnigo noketie mula molos e kido machal gi wi oyungu. Kamano tich sirni norumo. 
1Kings7:23 Eka nolenyo mula molosogo gima duong’ ma ting’o pi, machal gi karaya, mochako ni Nam. Lach dhoge ne romo mita abich, kendo tutne ne romo mita ariyo gi nus, to alwora mar dhoge mita apar gabich." 
1Kings7:24 E bwo dhoge ne nitie gik ma maradadi mong’inore ong’inore, molwore. Noriedgi e laini ariyo, ma borgi romo mita apar gabich. Namno nochue kaachiel gi gik ma maradadigo." 
1Kings7:25 Norenje e ng’e ruedhi apar gariyo mag mula. Ruedhi adek nomanyo yo nyandwat, to adek yo podho chieng’, adek yo milambo, kendo adek yo wuok chieng’. To wigi nodok ka iye. Kamano e kaka noten Namno e dieng’e ruedhigo." 
1Kings7:26 Mith mula molosego ne romre gi lach lith lwedo ang’wen. Dhoge nolos ka dho kikombe, machal gi thiep oyungu. Nonyalo ting’o pi ma dirom depe alufu ang’wen." 
1Kings7:27 Bende noloso rachungi apar mag mula mondo kareche orenjree. Bor mar rachungi ka rachungi ne romo mita ariyo, kendo lachne bende mita ariyo, to borne modhi malo mita achiel gi nus." 
1Kings7:28 Rachungigo nolos kama: ne gin gi pewe moket e frembe. 
1Kings7:29 To nolos sibuoche gi ruedhi kod kerubi mag mula e pewe mane ni e frembego. Nokiewo frembego, yo ka wi sibuoche gi yo ka wi ruedhi, kod yo ka tiendegi." 
1Kings7:30 Rachungi ka rachungi ne nigi tiende ang’wen mag mula, mane nyalo lworore kuom chumbe mag mula. E tunge ang’wen mag rachungi, ne nitie sirni morenjie karaya. Sirnigo nolos gi mula, kendo nokiew bethegi." 
1Kings7:31 Chuma moting’o karaya ne ni malo, moyombo wi rachungi gi mita achiel. En bende nokiewe. Dhoge nolworore mondo karaya orenjree maber. To pewe mag rachungi ne ok olworore, to ne gin gi bethe ang’wen maromre." 
1Kings7:32 Tiende ang’wen go ne nie bwo pewe mag rachungi, to chumbe mane tiendegi lwororee nolos mobedo gimoro achiel gi rachungi. Bor modhi malo mar tielo ka tielo ne romo mita achiel." 
1Kings7:33 To tiendego nolos machal gi tiend gach lweny. Chumbe mane tiende lwororee, kaachiel gi tiendegi giwegi, nolos gi mula." 
1Kings7:34 Ne nitie sirni ang’wen e tunge ang’wen mag rachungi, to sirnigo nolos mobedo gimoro achiel kode." 
1Kings7:35 To ewi rachungi ne nitie chuma molworore, ma borne modhi malo romo mita achiel. Chumano gi ramekni mage kod bethene nolos mobedo gimoro achiel kode." 
1Kings7:36 Kuom rameknigo kod pewe, nopayoe kerubi gi sibuoche kod yiend othidhe kama thuolo ne yudoree, kendo nokiewgi gi oko." 
1Kings7:37 Kamano e kaka noloso rachungigo duto apar mag mula, kendo romgi gi kitgi ne chal." 
1Kings7:38 Eka noloso kareche apar mag mula, ma moro ka moro ne nyalo ting’o pi ma dirom depe mia achiel, to lach karaya ka karaya noromo mita ariyo. Rachungi apargo moro ka moro, ne nigi karache owuon." 
1Kings7:39 Noketo rachungi abich e bath Hekalu korachwich kendo abich e bathe koracham, to Nam cha noketo e bath Hekalu korachwich, yo wuok chieng’ mochomo milambo." 
1Kings7:40 Achien Huram noloso agulini gi rajope kod tewni. Kamano notieko tije duto mag Od Ruoth Nyasaye ni ruoth Solomon. 
1Kings7:41 Noseloso sirni ariyo, gi agulini madongo ariyo mane ni e wi sirni, gi oserni mag mula ma noumo agulini ariyogo," 
1Kings7:42 kod gik mong’inore ong’inore mia ang’wen ma noried e laini ariyo e kor oserni; 
1Kings7:43 gi rachungi apar, gi kareche apar mane orenj kuom rachungigo," 
1Kings7:44 kaachiel gi Nam cha, gi ruedhi apar gariyo mane orenjie Namno;" 
1Kings7:45 gi agulini gi rajope kod tewni. Gigo duto mag Od Ruoth Nyasaye, Huram noloso ni ruoth Solomon gi mula mang’ang’ni." 
1Kings7:46 Nolosogi e paw aora Jordan e lop chuech man e kind Sukoth gi Zarethan. 
1Kings7:47 To Solomon ne ok opimo pek gigo, nikech ne ging’eny ahinya. Omiyo pek mula mane olosgigo ne ok ong’ere." 
1Kings7:48 Solomon noloso gik moko duto mag Od Ruoth Nyasaye. Noloso kendo-mar-misango mar dhahabu ma ting’o makati miketo e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye; 
1Kings7:49 gi rachung teyni apar mag dhahabu maler maiye. Bende noloso thiepe, gi teyni kod ramekni mag dhahabu;" 
1Kings7:50 gi kikombe, gi rangis teyni, gi degi, gi tewni mag ubani, kod tegni mag mach. Magi duto nolos gi dhahabu maler. Pata mag dhood Hekalu bende nolos gi dhahabu." 
1Kings7:51 Kamano ruoth Solomon notieko tich duto mag Od Ruoth Nyasaye, eka noomo gik moko duto mane Daudi wuon mare osechiwo ni Ruoth Nyasaye, mi noketogi kar keno mar Od Ruoth Nyasaye. Ne gin fedha, gi dhahabu kod gik mamoko." 
1Kings8:1 Solomon nochoko jodong Israel duto Jerusalem, mondo oom Sandug Muma mar Ruoth Nyasaye e dala Daudi miluongo ni Sayun." 
1Kings8:2 Mi jo-Israel duto nochokore gi ruoth Solomon chieng’ sawo ma nitimo higa ka higa e due mar abiriyo miluongo ni Ethanim. 
1Kings8:3 Kane jodong Israel duto osebiro, jodolo noting’o Sandug Muma." 
1Kings8:4 Ne gikele kaachiel gi Hemb Romo, kod gik moko duto mane nie Hema mitiyogo tich Nyasaye. Jodolo kod jo-Lawi ema nokelogi." 
1Kings8:5 Ruoth Solomon gi jo-Israel duto ma nochokore kode ne nie nyim Sanduk, ka gitimo misengni gi rombe kod ruedhi mokadho akwana." 
1Kings8:6 Eka jodolo norwako Sandug Muma mar Ruoth Nyasaye kama nolosne e bwo buomb kerubi, ei ot maiye mar Hekalu miluongo ni Kama Ler Moloyo," 
1Kings8:7 nimar kerubi noyaro bwombegi ewi kama Sanduk betie, ka giume kaachiel gi ludhe miting’ego." 
1Kings8:8 Ludhego ne boyo ahinya, ma wigi ne nenore oko e Kama Ler mane nie nyim ot maiye, to ne ok ginen oko mar Hekalu. Pod gin kanyo nyaka chil kawuono." 
1Kings8:9 Ne onge gimoro ei Sanduk mak mana kite ariyo mopa, mane Musa oketoe kane en Horeb, kuma Ruoth Nyasaye notimoe winjruok gi jo-Israel ka gia e piny Misri." 
1Kings8:10 Kane jodolo owuok oa Kama Ler, bor polo nopong’o Od Ruoth Nyasaye," 
1Kings8:11 mi ne ok ginyal tiyo tichgi mar dolo, nikech duong’ maler mar Ruoth Nyasaye nopong’o Hekalu." 
1Kings8:12 Eka Solomon nowacho niya, “A Ruoth Nyasaye, niketo wang’ chieng’ e polo malo, to isewacho ni nidag e mudho mandiwa." 
1Kings8:13 Koro asegeroni ot man gi duong’ mondo idagie nyaka chieng’.” 
1Kings8:14 Ruoth Solomon nowichore, kendo kane jo-Israel duto ma nochokore ochung’, noguedhogi." 
1Kings8:15 Nowacho niya, “Apako Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel, mosechopo singruok ma notimo ni Daudi wuora, kowachone ni," 
1Kings8:16 ‘Chakre ndalo mane areso joga Israel, kagologi e piny Misri, pok ayiero dala moro kuom dhout Israel duto, mondo ogernae ot ma nyinga betie, to nayiero Daudi mondo obed jatend joga Israel.’" 
1Kings8:17 Ung’eyo ni Daudi wuora ne dwaro gero ot ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel," 
1Kings8:18 to Ruoth Nyasaye nowachone niya, ‘Nitimo maber, kuom paro gerona ot." 
1Kings8:19 Kata kamano, in ok niger odno, to mana wuodi mibiro nywolo ema nogernago.’" 
1Kings8:20 Koro Ruoth Nyasaye osechopo singruok ma notimo, nikech asebet kar Daudi wuora, kendo an e ruodh Israel, mana kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nosingore. Mi asegero ot ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel," 
1Kings8:21 kendo aseikoe kar bet ni Sanduk moting’o weche mag singruok mane Ruoth Nyasaye otimo gi kwerewa, kogologi e piny Misri.”" 
1Kings8:22 Eka Solomon nochung’ e dho kendo-mar-misango mar Ruoth Nyasaye, e nyim jo-Israel duto. Norieyo bedene malo kochomo polo," 
1Kings8:23 mowacho niya, “A Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel onge nyasaye moro e piny mwalo machal kodi. Irito singruokni mitimo gi jotichni ma wuotho e yoreni gi chunygi duto, kendo iherogi gi hera mosiko." 
1Kings8:24 Isechopo singruok mane itimo ni Daudi wuora ma jatichni. Adier, gima niwacho ema koro isetimo." 
1Kings8:25 Emomiyo, Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel, chop singruok mane itimo ni Daudi wuora ma jatichni, kiwachone ni, ‘Anywolani nobed ruodhi mag Israel nyaka chieng’, to mana ka yawuoti oritore, kendo owuotho e nyima kaka isewuotho.’" 
1Kings8:26 Koro Nyasach Israel, wachni ma niwacho ni Daudi wuora ma jatichni, mondo otimre." 
1Kings8:27 “In Nyasaye, bende didag e piny? Ka kata polo maduong’ manadi ok nyal romi, to koro ot masegeronini direm marom nadi!" 
1Kings8:28 Kata kamano, Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasacha, yie mondo iwinj lemona gi kwayona, kendo iwinj ywakna makeloni tinende," 
1Kings8:29 Odiechieng’ gotieno mondo irang ot misewacho ni nyingi nobedieni, kendo iwinj lemo ma anakwa ka eri." 
1Kings8:30 Iwinj kwayo ma an kod jogi Israel biro kwayi ka eri. Yie iwinj e polo kama idakie, to kiwinjo, to mondo iwenwa richowa." 
1Kings8:31 “Ka ng’ato otimo ni wadgi marach, kendo okete mondo ocham muma, mi okuong’ore e nyim kendo-mar-misango manie odni," 
1Kings8:32 to iwinj e polo, kendo ing’ad buch jotichni, kikumo ng’at moketho, kendo kidwoko richone e wiye owuon. To jal makare mondo iket kare, kimiye pok moromo gi timne maber." 
1Kings8:33 “Ka wasigu oloyo jogi Israel nikech gisekethoni, to koro gilokore iri, kendo gisayi e odni," 
1Kings8:34 to yie mondo iwinjgi gi e polo, kiweyonigi richogi, kendo idwokgi e piny ma nimiyo kweregi." 
1Kings8:35 “Ka polo ong’awo, ma koth onge, nikech jogi Israel osekethoni, mi gilemo ka eri, kendo giyie duong’ni ka gilokore giweyo richogi nikech ikumogi," 
1Kings8:36 to yie mondo iwinjgi e polo, kiweyonigi richogi. Nyisgi yo maber ma onego giwuothie, kendo imi koth chue e pinyi misemiyo jogi mondo obed mwandugi." 
1Kings8:37 “Ka kech kata dera mar tho marach nie piny, kata ka cham orochore ewi dongo, kata ka bonyo kata kungu nitie, kata ka wasigu olworo dala moro, kata ka tho kata tuo manade nitie," 
1Kings8:38 mi ng’ato olami ka kwayi gimoro, korieyo bedene kochomo Hekaluni, (nimar ng’ato ka ng’ato ong’eyo gima chando chunye,)" 
1Kings8:39 to yie mondo iwinj e polo kama idakie. Iwene richone, kendo ichop lemone, kimiye moromo gi timbene, nikech in kendi ema ing’eyo chuny ji duto." 
1Kings8:40 Kuom mano, mondo giluori ndalo duto ma gidakgo e piny ma nimiyo kwerewani." 
1Kings8:41 “Ka ng’ama wendo ma ok achiel kuom jogi Israel obiro mondo olem e Hekaluni, koa e piny mabor nikech nyingi," 
1Kings8:42 (nimar ji biro winjo humb nyingi maduong’, gi mar lueti motegno kod mar badi morie,)" 
1Kings8:43 to yie mondo iwinj e polo kama idakie, kendo itim duto ma ng’at ma wendono okwayi. Kamano ji duto mae piny mondo ong’e nyingi, kendo oluori, mana kaka jogi Israel oluori, kendo mondo ging’e ni Hekalu ma asegeronini en mari adier." 
1Kings8:44 “A Ruoth Nyasaye, ka jogi dhi e lweny kedo gi wasikgi kamoro amora miorogie, mi gilami, ka gichomo dala miseyiero kod Hekalu ma asegeroni," 
1Kings8:45 to yie mondo iwinji e polo, lemo ma gikwayigo, kendo ikonygi." 
1Kings8:46 “Ka gitimo gima isekwero, (nimar onge ng’ato ma ok kethi,) kendo ikecho kodgi, michiwogi e lwet wasikgi mondo otergi e tuech e piny wasikgigo, kuma bor kata kuma chiegni," 
1Kings8:47 to eka bang’e giloko parogi e piny motuegieno, mi chunygi olokore, kendo gikwayi niya, ‘Waseketho, kwatimo wich teko kod richo,’" 
1Kings8:48 mi giduogo iri gi parogi duto, kendo gi chunygi duto, e piny wasikgi ma notuegieno, kendo gilami ka gichomo pinygi mane imiyo kweregi, kod dala mane iyiero, gi Hekalu ma asegeronini," 
1Kings8:49 to yie mondo iwinj lemogi ma gikwayigo e polo kama idakie, kendo ikonygi." 
1Kings8:50 Iwe ni jogi richogi duto ma gisetimo, kod chwanyruok duto ma gisechwanyorego e nyimi, kendo imi joma noterogi e tuech ong’wonnigi ka kechogi," 
1Kings8:51 nikech gin jogi, kendo gin mwanduni mane igolo e piny Misri, kireso e sand mager ka mach makakni." 
1Kings8:52 “A Ruoth Nyasaye, winj kwayona gi kwayo mag jogi Israel, kichiko iti mondo iwinjgi sa moro amora ma giywaknie," 
1Kings8:53 nimar niyierogi kuom ji duto mae piny mondo gibed jogi, kaka kwerewa Misri.”" 
1Kings8:54 Kane Solomon osetieko lamo Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo kwaye wechego duto, noa malo e nyim kendo-mar-misango mar Ruoth Nyasaye, kama nosegoyoe chonge piny, morieyo bedene kochomo polo." 
1Kings8:55 Kane osechung’ noguedho oganda Israel duto gi dwol maduong’, kowacho niya," 
1Kings8:56 “Apako Ruoth Nyasaye, mosemiyo joge Israel kue, kochopo gik moko duto mane osingore. Onge kata wach achiel moserem kuom singruokne duto mabeyo mane omiyo Musa jatichne owacho." 
1Kings8:57 Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachwa obed kodwa, kaka nobet gi kwerewa. Kik owewa kata kik ojwang’wa," 
1Kings8:58 to mondo okonywa keto chunywa kuome, wawuoth e yorene duto, kendo wamak chikene gi buchene kod wechene mane ochiko kwerewa." 
1Kings8:59 Wechena ma asehombogo Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachwagi mondo obed e nyime odiechieng’ gotieno, mondo okonya kaachiel gi joge Israel, kaka dwarore odiechieng’ kodiechieng’." 
1Kings8:60 Ji duto mae piny ngima mondo ong’e ni Ruoth Nyasaye kende e Nyasaye, kendo onge moro." 
1Kings8:61 Koro mondo chunyu obed malong’o e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachwa, kuwuotho e yorene, kendo kurito chikene, kaka utimo kawuono.”" 
1Kings8:62 Eka ruoth Solomon, kaachiel gi jo-Israel duto, notimo misengni ni Ruoth Nyasaye." 
1Kings8:63 Solomon nochiwo ruedhi alufu piero ariyo gariyo, kod rombe alufu mia achiel gi piero ariyo, (120,000) kotimogo misengni mag sawo. Mano e kaka ruoth kod jo-Israel duto noyango Hekalu ni Ruoth Nyasaye." 
1Kings8:64 Chieng’ono ruoth nopwodho dier laru mane nie nyim Hekalu mar Ruoth Nyasaye, nikech kanyo ema notimoe misengni miwang’o pep, gi misengni mag sawo, nikech kendo-mar-misango mar mula mane nie nyim Ruoth Nyasaye ne tin, mane ok nyal timie misengnigo duto." 
1Kings8:65 E ndalogo Solomon, kaachiel gi jo-Israel duto, notimo sawo maduong’ e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye kuom ndalo abiriyo. Oganda maduong’ nochokore kanyo moa e piny Israel duto, chakre kama idonjogo Hamath nyaka aora manie kind pinygi kod piny Misri." 
1Kings8:66 To chieng’ mar aboro nomiyogi thuolo, mi gidok miechgi ka gidendo ruoth. Ne gimor kendo giil, nikech gik mabeyo duto mane Ruoth Nyasaye osetimo ni Daudi jatichne, kendo ni joge Israel." 
1Kings9:1 Kane Solomon osetieko gero Od Ruoth Nyasaye, gi ode owuon, kod udi duto mane odwaro gero," 
1Kings9:2 Nyasaye nofwenyorene kendo, kaka nofwenyorene mokwongo e dala Gibeon." 
1Kings9:3 Nowachone niya, “Asewinjo lemoni kod kwayoni, mi asegwedho Hekalu misegeronani. Aketo nyinga kanyo mochwere, kendo wengena kod chunya nobedie nyaka chieng’." 
1Kings9:4 To in, kiwuotho e nyima gi chuny makare kod bidhruok, kitimo duto masechiki, kendo kimako chikena gi buchena kaka Daudi wuoru notimo," 
1Kings9:5 eka anagur loch mar nyikwayi e Israel nyaka chieng’ mana kaka nasingora ni Daudi wuoru, ka awachone ni, ‘Ndalo duto, nyikwayi nobed ruodhi mag Israel.’" 
1Kings9:6 To ka un kata nyithindu, ulokoru muweyo luwa, ka ok umako wechena gi chikena mane aketo e nyimu, mudhi tiyo ni nyiseche mamoko, kendo lamogi," 
1Kings9:7 to anagol jo-Israel e piny mane amiyogi, kendo Hekalu masewalo ni nyingani naketh, mondo olal e wang’a, mi nying Israel nolok ka ngero, kendo gima ji duto jaro." 
1Kings9:8 To bende Hekaluni nodong’ gunda, kendo ji duto ma kadho bute nowuor kendo nohum, ka gipenjo niya, ‘Ang’o momiyo Ruoth Nyasaye osetimo gima kama ni pinyni gi Hekaluni?’" 
1Kings9:9 Eka nodwokgi niya, ‘Ne giweyo Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachgi, mane ogolo kweregi e piny Misri, mi ne gilamo nyiseche mamoko, kendo gitiyonigi. Emomiyo Ruoth Nyasaye osekelo masichegi duto kuomgi.’ ”" 
1Kings9:10 Kane higni piero ariyo mane Solomon ogeroe Od Ruoth Nyasaye gi ode owuon oserumo," 
1Kings9:11 nomiyo Hiram mier piero ariyo e piny Galili. (Hiram ruodh Turo nosemiyo Solomon bap sida gi bap saipras kod dhahabu kaka nodwaro.) 
1Kings9:12 To kane Hiram oa Turo mondo odhi one mier mane Solomon omiye, ne ok oherogi." 
1Kings9:13 Omiyo nowacho niya, “Owadwa, imiya mier machal nadi?” Emomiyo nochako gweng’no ni ‘piny Kabul’ (tiende ni, piny motimo ongoro.) Pod iluonge kamano nyaka chil kawuono." 
1Kings9:14 Hiram nokowo ni Ruoth Solomon dhahabu moromo kilo alufu ang’wen. 
1Kings9:15 Tije mane ruoth Solomon otiyo gi joma nichuno mondo oti gi thwon e magi: nogero Od Ruoth Nyasaye, gi ode owuon, gi Milo, kod ohinga mar Gezer, gi Hazor, gi Megido kod Gezer." 
1Kings9:16 (Noyudo ka Farao ruodh Misri osedhi, mokawo Gezer, mowang’o gi mach, kendo nosenego jo-Kanaan modak kanyo, mi dalano nomiyo nyare ma chi Solomon kaka chiwo mar kopo." 
1Kings9:17 Mano emomiyo Solomon nochako gero Gezer kendo.) Bende nogero Beth-horon ma Mwalo," 
1Kings9:18 gi Baalath, gi Tamar manie thim e piny Juda," 
1Kings9:19 kod mier duto mag keno mane en go, gi mier mokanoe gechene mag lweny, kod miech joge ma joidh farese,. Bende Solomon nogero udi e Jerusalem, kod Lebanon, kendo e pinye duto, kaka nodwaro." 
1Kings9:20 Ji duto ma nodong’ e piny Israel kuom jo-Amor, gi jo-Hiti, gi-jo-Perizi, gi jo-Hivi, kod jo-Jebus, ma ok jo-Israel," 
1Kings9:21 Solomon noloko wasumbni mochuno mondo oti gi thwon, kaka obet nyaka chil kawuono. Ne gin joma notamo jo-Israel tieko chuth." 
1Kings9:22 Solomon ne ok oloko jo-Israel wasumbni to noketogi jolweny, gi jobura, gi jodong lweny, gi jotend joidh gechene kod joidh faresene." 
1Kings9:23 Ne en gi jotelo madongo mia abich gi piero abich mane rito jotichne. 
1Kings9:24 Nyar Farao noa e dala Daudi, modhi e ode mane Solomon osegerone, eka Solomon nogero Milo." 
1Kings9:25 Didek e higa, Solomonn ne timo misengni miwang’o pep, gi mag sawo e kendo-mar-misango ma nogero ni Ruoth Nyasaye, kowang’o ubani e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye. Kamano nochopo singruokne." 
1Kings9:26 Ruoth Solomon nohondho yiedhi moko Ezion-geber but Eloth e dho wadh Nam Makwar e piny Edom. 
1Kings9:27 Eka Hiram nooro jokwang’ molony kuom tich nam mondo oti e yiedhigo kaachiel gi jotich Solomon. 
1Kings9:28 Ne gidhi Ofir, kuma ne giomoe dhahabu moromo kilo alufu apar gang’wen, mi ne gikelo ni ruoth Solomon." 
1Kings10:1 Kane ruoth madhako ma Sheba owinjo humb Solomon korka nying Ruoth Nyasaye, nobiro mondo oteme gi penj mang’eny matek." 
1Kings10:2 Nobiro Jerusalem gi oganda maduong’ ahinya, kod ngamia moting’o gik mang’ue ng’ar, gi dhahabu mogundho, kod kite mabeyo ma nengogi tek. Ka nobiro ir Solomon, nopenje duto mane nie chunye." 
1Kings10:3 To Solomon nodwoko penjone duto, maonge moro mane otame dwoko." 
1Kings10:4 Kane ruoth madhako mar Sheba oneno riekone duto, gi ot ma nosegero," 
1Kings10:5 gi chiemb ode, gi jotichne, gi rwakruokgi, gi jolos divai mage, kod misengni ma notimo e Od Ruoth Nyasaye, dhoge nomoko." 
1Kings10:6 Nowacho ni ruoth niya, “Kara humb timbeni gi riekoni ma nawinjo e pinya en adier!" 
1Kings10:7 Kane pok abiro mi anenogi gi wang’a, ne ok anyal yie ni gin adier. To koro aneno ni nonyisa mana dir wach, nimar riekoni kod mwanduni oloyo huma ma nawinjo." 
1Kings10:8 Mondi kod jotichni johawi ma winjo riekoni ndalo duto! 
1Kings10:9 Apako Ruoth ma Nyasachi moheri, kendo oketi ruodh Israel. Ruoth Nyasaye oseketi ruoth ni mondo ing’ad bura kare.”" 
1Kings10:10 Eka nomiyo ruoth Solomon dhahabu moromo kilo alufu abiriyo, kod kite ma nengogi tek. Solomon ne ok ochako oyudo gik mang’ue ng’ar ma dirom gi mago mane ruoth madhako mar Sheba omiye." 
1Kings10:11 To bende yiedhi mag Hiram mane dhi Ofir omo dhahabu, ne kelo yiend almug mang’eny,, gi kite ma nengogi tek." 
1Kings10:12 Yien-go ruoth nolosogo sirni mag Od Ruoth Nyasaye, gi mag ode owuon, kod thumbe nyatiti gi nyigwerni mane jower wergo e Hekalu. Yiend almug machal kamago pok okel kata pok one nyaka chil kawuono." 
1Kings10:13 Ruoth Solomon nomiyo ruoth madhako mar Sheba gimoro amora ma nokwayo, komedogi kuom mago ma nosemiye kuom herone. Eka ruodh Sheba nodok e pinye kaachiel gi jotichne." 
1Kings10:14 Pek mar dhahabu mane ikelo ni Solomon higa ka higa ne romo kilo alufu piero ariyo gadek," 
1Kings10:15 ka ok okwano mago mane wuok e osuch joohala, kendo kuom ruodhi duto mag piny Arabia, kendo kuom jorit piny." 
1Kings10:16 Ruoth Solomon nochuogo kuodi mia ariyo, kendo kuot ka kuot nobaw gi dhahabu moromo kilo abiriyo." 
1Kings10:17 Nochuogo bende okumbni mia adek, kendo okumba ka okumba nobaw gi dhahabu moromo kilo ariyo. Magi duto ruoth noketo e Od Bungu mar Lebanon." 
1Kings10:18 Bende noloso kom duong’ mang’ongo mar lak liech, mobawo gi dhahabu maler." 
1Kings10:19 Kom duong’no ne nigi raidhi man gi kuonde minyono auchiel. Ka toke ne nitie nyaroya mar dhahabu, to sibuoche ariyo mag dhahabu nochung’ e bath bede kom koni gi koni," 
1Kings10:20 kendo sibuoche apar gariyo moko nochung’ moro ka moro e dir raidhi koni gi koni. Onge piny moro ma noselosie kom ruoth machal gi mano. 
1Kings10:21 Kikombe duto mag Solomon nolos gi dhahabu, kendo gik moko duto mikonyruokgo e Od Bungu mar Lebanon bende nolos gi dhahabu maler. Onge gimoro mane olos gi fedha, nikech fedha ne ok kwan ka gimoro e ndalo mag Solomon." 
1Kings10:22 Ruoth Solomon ne nigi yiedhi mane kwang’ e nam, kaachiel gi yiedhi mag Hiram. Ne gidongo, machal gi mago mane dhi Tarshish. Bang’ higni adek adek, yiedhigo ne kelo dhahabu gi fedha, gi lak liech, gi ong’eche kod bimbe." 
1Kings10:23 Kamano Ruoth Solomon noloyo ruodhi duto mag piny gi mwandu kendo gi rieko. 
1Kings10:24 Piny duto ne biro ir Solomon mondo owinj rieko mane Nyasaye omiye. 
1Kings10:25 Higa ka higa, ng’ato ka ng’ato ne kelone chiwo mag gik molos gi fedha gi dhahabu, kaachiel gi lewni, kod gilwenje, gi gik mang’we ng’ar, gi farese kod nyumbu." 
1Kings10:26 Solomon nochako ng’iewo geche mag lweny kod farese. Ne en gi geche alufu achiel gi mia ang’wen, kod farese alufu apar gariyo, ma moko noketo e miech geche, to moko ne en go Jerusalem." 
1Kings10:27 Solomon nomiyo fedha obedo mang’eny ka kuoyo e Jerusalem, kendo yiend sida bende ne ng’eny ka ng’owo ma e pap." 
1Kings10:28 Ne oomo farese Misri gi Koah, kuma johala mage ne ng’iewogie kuom nengo moketi." 
1Kings10:29 Gari achiel ning’iewo Misri gi kilo abiriyo mag fedha, to faras achiel nengone noromo kilo ariyo, kendo johala mag ruoth ne terogi ni ruodhi duto mag jo-Hiti gi mag jo-Aram." 
1Kings11:1 Ruoth Solomon nohero nyi pinje mamoko mang’eny. Nokendo nyar Farao, gi nyi Amon, gi nyi Edom, gi nyi Sidon, kod nyi Hiti." 
1Kings11:2 To Ruoth Nyasaye nosewuoyo ni jo-Israel kuom ogendnigo niya, “Kik ukend nyigi, to gin bende kik uyienigi mondo gikend nyiu, nikech adier ginilok chunyu mondo ulam nyisechegi.” To kata kamano Solomon nohero mon-go ahinya." 
1Kings11:3 Ne en gi mon mia abiriyo ma nyi ruodhi, kod mon mamoko mia adek." 
1Kings11:4 To kane oseti, mondego noloko chunye, molamo nyiseche mamoko, kendo chunye ne ok ni kare gi Ruoth Nyasaye kaka chuny Daudi wuon mare ne ni kare." 
1Kings11:5 Solomon ne lamo Ashtoreth, nyasaye ma dhako mar jo-Sidon, kod Milkom, nyasach jo-Amon." 
1Kings11:6 Notimo gik ma Ruoth Nyasaye okwero, kendo ne ok ohero Ruoth Nyasaye chutho kaka Daudi wuon mare nohero." 
1Kings11:7 Nogero ut lemo ni Kemosh, nyasach jo-Moab, kendo ni Molek, nyasach jo-Amon, ewi got yo wuok chieng’ mar Jerusalem." 
1Kings11:8 Kamano e kaka notimo ni mondene duto ma nyi pinje mamoko, mane wang’o ubani kendo timo misengni ni nyisechegi." 
1Kings11:9 Koro Ruoth Nyasaye nokecho gi Solomon, nikech chunye nosea kuom Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel mane ofwenyorene diriyo," 
1Kings11:10 mochike ni kik olam nyiseche mamoko, to ne ok orito chik Ruoth Nyasaye." 
1Kings11:11 Emomiyo Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Solomon niya, “Ok iserito singruokna gi buchena kaka nachiki, omiyo abiro golo loch kuomi, mi ami achiel kuom jotichni." 
1Kings11:12 Ok abi timo kamano e ndaloni, nikech pod aparo Daudi wuoru, to anagol loch e lwet wuodi." 
1Kings11:13 Kata kamano ok anagole duto, to anawene dhoot achiel, nikech ahero Daudi jatichna, kendo nikech dala Jerusalem ma aseyiero.”" 
1Kings11:14 Eka Ruoth Nyasaye nomiyo Hadad ja-Edom obedo jasik Solomon; ne en ja dhood gi ruodh Edom. 
1Kings11:15 Hadad notony e kinde mane Daudi ni Edom. Ndalogo ema Joab jaduong’ oganda lweny odhi yikoe joma osetho, kendo ne ginego chwo duto Edom." 
1Kings11:16 Joab gi jo-Isarel duto nodong’ kuno kuom dueche auchiel, nyaka ne gitieko chwo duto Edom." 
1Kings11:17 Kane Hadad pod rawera, noringo odhi nyaka Misri, gi jo-Edom moko ma jotich wuon mare." 
1Kings11:18 Ne giwuok Midian, mi gibiro Paran, ir ruoth Farao, mi ruoth Farao nomiye ot, gi chiemo, kod lowo." 
1Kings11:19 Koro Hadad noyudo ng’wono maduong’ ahinya kuom Farao, mi Farao nomiye yuore ma nyamin Tapenes ma mikache mondo obed chiege." 
1Kings11:20 Chiege, ma nyamin Tapenesno, nonywolone wuowi miluongo ni Genubath, ma Tapenes nopidho e od Farao; nobedo e od ruoth kaachiel gi yawuot Farao." 
1Kings11:21 To kane Hadad owinjo e Misri ni Daudi osetho, kendo Joab jaduong’ oganda lweny bende osetho, nokwayo Farao niya, “Weya adog thurwa.”" 
1Kings11:22 Farao nopenje ni, “Ang’o moremi kuoma ka, momiyo idwaro dok thuru?” Nodwoke niya, “Onge gimoro, to weya aweya mondo adhi.” Kamano e kaka Hadad nodoko jasik jo-Israel, mi othagogi. Nobedo ruodh Edom." 
1Kings11:23 Nyasaye nomiyo Razon wuod Eliada bende obedo jasik Solomon. Jali noseringo moweyo ruodhe Hadadezer ma ruodh Zoba," 
1Kings11:24 kendo kane Daudi osekawo Zoba, Razon nochoko mony, mobet jatendgi. Eka nokawo dalano." 
1Kings11:25 Ne en jasik Israel ndalo duto mag Solomon. 
1Kings11:26 Jatich Solomon moro bende nopiem kode. Ne ne Jeroboam wuod Nebat, ja-Efraim ma ja-Zareda. Nying min mare ne Zerua, ma chi liel." 
1Kings11:27 Gima nokelo piem e ma: Noyudo Solomon gero Milo, kendo dino kuonde mopodho manie kor ohinga mar dala Daudi wuon mare." 
1Kings11:28 Jeroboam ne ng’at maratego, kendo kane Solomon oneno ni ojatich matek, nokete jarit jotich duto michuno mag dhood Josef." 
1Kings11:29 Chieng’ moro ka Jeroboam ne wuok Jerusalem, Ahija janabi, ma ja-Shilo noromo kode e yo. Ji ariyogo ne nie pap kendgi, to noyudo ka Ahija orwako law manyien." 
1Kings11:30 Ahija nomako lawe manyienno, moyiecho kidienje apar gariyo." 
1Kings11:31 Nowacho ni Jeroboam niya, “Kaw kidienje apar obed magi nimar Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel owacho niya, ‘Winji, achiegni golo loch e lwet Solomon. Abiro miyi dhoudi apar," 
1Kings11:32 to Solomon nodong’ gi dhoot achiel, mana nikechh ahero Daudi jatichna, kendo nikech Jerusalem dala maseyiero kuom dhoudi duto mag Israel." 
1Kings11:33 Abiro golo loch kuome nikech oseweya, molamo Ashtoreth, nyasaye madhako mar jo-Sidon, gi Kemosh nyasach jo-Moab, kod Milkom nyasach jo-Amon, ka ok oluw yorena mondo otim gik malong’ona, kata rito chikena gi buchena kaka Daudi wuon mare notimo." 
1Kings11:34 Kata kamano ok abi golo loch duto e lwete, to enosik jatelo ndalo duto mag ngimane, mana nikech ahero Daudi jatichna ma nayiero. En jal ma norito chikena gi buchena." 
1Kings11:35 To abiro golo loch e lwet wuode, mi amiyi dhoudi apar." 
1Kings11:36 Wuode to abiro miyo dhoot achiel, mondo Daudi jatichna obed gi taya maliel e nyima e Jerusalem, dala maseyiero mondo aketie nyinga." 
1Kings11:37 To abiro kawi, mondo ibed ruodh Israel kaka chunyi dwaro." 
1Kings11:38 Kiwinjo wechena duto, kendo kiwuotho e yorena, mi itimo gima long’ona, kirito chikena kod buchena kaka Daudi jatichna notimo, eka nabed kodi, kendo nagur dhoodi mosiko, kaka naguro dhood Daudi; kendo anamiyi piny Israel." 
1Kings11:39 Kamano e kaka anasand koth Daudi, to ok nyaka chieng’.’ ”" 
1Kings11:40 Mano emomiyo Solomon ne dwaro nego Jeroboam, to Jeroboam noringo, modhi Misri ir Shishak ruodh Misri, kendo nodak kuno nyaka Solomon notho." 
1Kings11:41 Weche moko mag Solomon, gi timbene duto, kod riekone ondik e Kitap Timbe mag Solomon." 
1Kings11:42 Kinde mane Solomon obedo ruodh Israel duto kodak Jerusalem noromo higni piero ang’wen. 
1Kings11:43 Solomon notho, moyike e dala Daudi wuon mare. Rehoboam wuode nodoko ruoth kare." 
1Kings12:1 Rehoboam nodhi Shekem, nikech jo-Israel duto nosechokore kuno mondo okete ruoth." 
1Kings12:2 To kane Jeroboam wuod Nebat owinjo wachno, noduogo oa Misri, nikech ne pod en Misri kuma nodhiye koringo ruoth Solomon." 
1Kings12:3 Ne giorone wach mondo obi Shekem, mi nobiro gi jo-Israel duto. Eka ne giwacho ni Rehoboam niya," 
1Kings12:4 “Wuoru miyowa ting’ mapek, emomiyo in koro ng’ad ting’ mapek mane oketo kuomwa, eka wanatini.”" 
1Kings12:5 Nodwokogi ni, “Doguru mondi kuom ndalo adek, eka uduog ira.” Mi ne gidok." 
1Kings12:6 Ruoth Rehoboam noporo wach gi jodongo ma yande ng’ado rieko ni Solomon wuon mare ka pod ngima, kowachonigi niya, “Nyisauru gima dadwok jogo.”" 
1Kings12:7 Ne gidwoke niya, “Yie ibed jatichgi kawuono, kidwokogi gi weche mabeyo, eka gibiro bedo jotichni ndalo duto.”" 
1Kings12:8 To Rehoboam nodagi rieko mane jodongo ong’adone, mi noporo wach gi yawuowi ma mbesene mane ni kode," 
1Kings12:9 kopenjogi niya, “Ere kaka dadwok joma osekwaya mondo ang’adnigi ting’ mapek mane wuora oketo kuomgi?”"
