1Kings12:10 Ne gidwoke niya, “Dwok joma okwayi mondo ing’adnigi ting’ mapek mane wuoru omiyogi, kiwachonigi kama: ‘Lith lweta matung’ duong’ moloyo nungo wuora." 
1Kings12:11 Wuora ero nomiyou ting’ mapek, an to abiro medou moloyo. Wuora nochwadou gi del, an to abiro chwadou gi thomoni.’ ”" 
1Kings12:12 Chieng’ mar adek, Jeroboam gi oganda nobiro ir ruoth Rehoboam, kaka nochikogi mondo gidog ire." 
1Kings12:13 Ruoth nodwokogi kager. Noweyo rieko mane jodongo ong’adone," 
1Kings12:14 to noluwo rieko mbesene, kowacho niya, “Wuora nomiyou ting’ mapek, an to abiro medou moloyo. Wuora nochwadou gi del, an to abiro chwadou gi thomoni.”" 
1Kings12:15 Kamano ruoth ne ok odewo ji. To Ruoth Nyasaye ema nomiyo gigo otimore kamano, mondo ochop singruok mane omiyo Ahija ja-Shilo owacho ni Jeroboam wuod Nebat." 
1Kings12:16 Kane jo-Israel oneno ni ruoth ok odewogi, ne gidwoke niya, “Waonge wat gi Daudi! Ok wan libamba achiel gi wuod Jesse! Wadoguru dala, wan jo-Israel. Un oganda Daudi, koro rituru mana dhoodu.”" 
1Kings12:17 Mi jo-Israel nodok miechgi. 
1Kings12:18 Ruoth Rehoboam nooro Adoram mane jarit jogo michuno mondo oti githwon, to jo-Israel duto nogoye gi kite nyaka otho. Kuom mano, ruoth Rehoboam noidho gache piyopiyo, moringo nyaka Jerusalem mondo otony." 
1Kings12:19 Chakre chieng’no, joi-Israel osebet ka dagi loch dhood Daudi nyaka chil kawuono." 
1Kings12:20 Kane jo-Israel duto owinjo ni Jeroboam oseduogo, ne giluonge e chokruok mi gikete ruodh Israel duto. Onge joma nodok ni Rehoboam kod jood Daudi mak mana jo-Juda kende, gi jo-Israel mane odak e dier jo-Juda." 
1Kings12:21 Kane Rehoboam ochopo Jerusalem, nochoko jolweny moyier alufu mia achiel gi piero aboro (180,000) kuom jo-Juda duto gi jo-Benjamin. Ne gidhi kedo gi jo-Israel, mondo gidwok loch ni Rehoboam wuod Solomon." 
1Kings12:22 To wach Nyasaye nobiro ni Shemaya ng’at Nyasaye niya," 
1Kings12:23 “Wuo kod Rehoboam wuod Solomon ruodh Juda, gi dhoodgi duto, gi jo-Benjamin, kod joge duto, kiwachonigi ni," 
1Kings12:24 Ruoth Nyasaye owacho kama, ‘Kik udhi uked gi oweteu ma jo-Israel, to ng’ato ka ng’ato mondo odog dala, nikech gima timoreni oa kuoma.’ ” Ne giwinjo wach Ruoth Nyasaye, mi gidok miechgi kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho." 
1Kings12:25 Jeroboam nogero Shekem e piny gode mag Efraim, modak kuno. Bang’e noa kanyo, modhi ogero Penuel." 
1Kings12:26 Jeroboam ne paro niya," 
1Kings12:27 “Kapod jogi dhi Jerusalem e Hekalu mar Ruoth Nyasaye, to chunygi biro dok ir Rehoboam ma ruodhgi, ma ruodh Juda, kendo loch biro dok ni dhood Daudi. Gininega, kendo ginidog ni Rehoboam ruodh Juda.”" 
1Kings12:28 Omiyo ruoth Jeroboam noporo wach, moloso nyiruedhi ariyo mag dhahabu. Eka nowacho ni ji niya, “Un jo-Israel, usedhi Jerusalem moromo. Koro neuru nyisecheu mane ogolou e piny Misri!”" 
1Kings12:29 Noketo nyarwath achiel Bethel, yo milambo mar piny Israel, to machielo noketo Dan, yo nyandwat." 
1Kings12:30 Wachni nomiyo jo-Israel obedo joketho, nikech ji moko ne dhi lamo nyarwath man Bethel, to ji moko ne dhi Dan." 
1Kings12:31 Nogero ut liswa e hembko mane oseloso moketoe jodolo moa e dhoudi duto, kata mane ok nyikwa Lawi." 
1Kings12:32 Jeroboam nogolo chik mondo otim sawo due apar gabich, due mar aboro, machal gi sawo mane jo-Juda timo, kendo notimo misango ni nyiruedhi mane oloso Bethel. Nogolo jodolo matiyo e hembko mane oseloso, moketo Bethel." 
1Kings12:33 Chieng’ due apar gabich, due mar aboro, due mane oseyiero, nosudo e dho kendo-mar-misango mane oseloso Bethel, motimo sawo ni jo-Israel kendo owang’o misango e kendono." 
1Kings13:1 To Ruoth Nyasaye nosewacho ni jatichne moro mondo oa Juda odhi Bethlehem, mi jalo nodhi moyudo Jeroboam kochung’ e dho kendo-mar-misango kawang’o misango." 
1Kings13:2 Ng’at Nyasayeno nokuong’o kendo-mar-misango kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nochike, koywage niya, “Yaye, kendo-mar-misango! Yaye, kendo-mar-misango! Ruoth Nyasaye owacho kama: Enonywol wuowi e dhood Daudi, ma nochak nyinge ni Josia. Enoneg jodolo mag hembko man kuonde moting’ore, ma wang’o ubani kuomi, kendo enowang’ choke ji kuomi.”" 
1Kings13:3 Eka nokor wach chieng’ono, kowacho niya, “Ranyisi ma Ruoth Nyasaye osewacho ni biro timore ema: Kendo-mar-misangoni nobarre, kendo buru manie wiye nopukre.”" 
1Kings13:4 Kane ruoth Jeroboam owinjo wach mane ng’at Nyasaye okuong’ogo kendo-mar-misango man Bethel, nogolo bade e misango, mosiemo ng’atno, kowacho niya, “Makeuru!” To bede mane osiemogo ng’atno notal, mi ne ok onyal dole kendo." 
1Kings13:5 Kendo-mar-misango bende nobarore, mi buru manie wiye nopukore. Mano noluwore gi ranyisi mane ng’at Nyasaye nokoro, mana kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nochiko." 
1Kings13:6 Eka ruoth nowacho ni ng’at Nyasaye niya, “Kwana Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachi mondo bada ochangi.” Eka ng’at Nyasaye notimo kamano, mi bade notugore." 
1Kings13:7 Ruoth nowacho ni ng’at Nyasaye niya, “Wadog oda mondo iyue, eka abiro miyi gimoro.”" 
1Kings13:8 To ng’at Nyasaye nodwoko ruoth niya, “Kata da bed ni imiya mana nus mwanduni, to ok nadonj e odi. Ok nachiem, kata madho gimoro ok namadh ka," 
1Kings13:9 nikech wach Ruoth Nyasaye nobirona ni kik achiem kata kik amadh gimoro, bende kik adog gi yo mane abirogo.”" 
1Kings13:10 Omiyo noluwo yo machielo, ka ok odok gi yo ma nodhigo Bethel." 
1Kings13:11 To ne nitie janabi moro moti ma nodak Bethel. Yawuote nobiro ire, monyise gik moko duto mane ng’at Nyasaye otimo Bethel chieng’ono. Ne gihulone weche duto mane ng’atno owacho ni ruoth." 
1Kings13:12 Wuon-gi nopenjogi yo mane oluwo, mi ginyise." 
1Kings13:13 Eka nowachonigi ni, “Gawnauru kanyna.” Mi ne gigawone, moidho." 
1Kings13:14 Noluwo ng’at Nyasaye moyude kobet piny e tiend yath moro. Nopenje niya, “In e ng’at Nyasaye mane oa Juda koso?” Ng’atno nodwoke niya, “Ee an”" 
1Kings13:15 Eka nowachone ni, “Wadog dala, idhi ichiem.”" 
1Kings13:16 To nodwoke ni, “Ok anyal dok kodi, kata donjo e odi ok anyal donjo. Bende ok nachiem kata madho gimoro ok namadhi," 
1Kings13:17 nikech wach Ruoth Nyasaye nobirona ni kik achiem kata kik amadh gimoro, kendo kik adog gi yo mane abirogo.”" 
1Kings13:18 Janabi motino nowuonde, kawachone niya, “An bende an janabi kaka in, kendo malaika osekelona wach Ruoth Nyasaye ni mondo abi aomi, wadhi e oda, ichiem.”" 
1Kings13:19 Omiyo nodok kode, mochiemo e ode." 
1Kings13:20 To kane pod gichiemo, wach Ruoth Nyasaye nobiro ni janabi mane oomeno," 
1Kings13:21 mi nowacho ni ng’at Nyasaye mane oa Juda niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye owacho kama: Isedagi winjo wach Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachi ochiki," 
1Kings13:22 to iseduogo michiemo kama nokweri ni kik ichiemie kata kik imethie. Emomiyo ringri ok noyik gi kwereni.” 
1Kings13:23 Kane gisechiemo, janabi moti mane odwokeno nogawone kanyna," 
1Kings13:24 kendo kane jalo osewuok dhiyo, noromo gi sibuor e yo, mi sibuor nonege. Ringre noriere e yo, to kanyna gi sibuor nochung’ bute." 
1Kings13:25 Ji mane kadho kanyo noneno ringre koriere e yo, kod sibuor kochung’ bute, mi ne gitero wach e dala janabi moti cha." 
1Kings13:26 Kane janabino owinjo wachno, nowacho niya, “Nyaka bed ni en ng’at Nyasaye mane ok orito wach Ruoth Nyasaye cha. Emomiyo Ruoth Nyasaye osechiwe ni sibuor, ma koro osenege mokidhe, mana kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nowachone.”" 
1Kings13:27 Eka noko ni yawuote ni, “Gawnauru kanyna.” Mi ne gitimo kamano." 
1Kings13:28 Nodhi moyudo ringre ng’atno koriere e yo, ka kanyna kod sibuor ochung’ bute. To sibuor ne ok ochamo ringre ng’atno, kata timo gimoro ni kanyna ne ok otimo." 
1Kings13:29 Janabino noketo ringre e ng’e kanyna, modwoko Bethel, mondo oywage kendo oyike." 
1Kings13:30 Noyiko ringre ng’atno e bure owuon, mi ne giywage, ka giwacho niya, “Yaye owadwa!”" 
1Kings13:31 Kane oseyike, nowacho ni yawuote niya, “An katho, to uyika e liel moyikie ng’at Nyasayeni, kuketo chokena but chokene," 
1Kings13:32 nimar wach Ruth Nyasaye nochopo kare, kaka jali nowacho kokuong’o kendo-mar-misango man Bethel, kod ut lemo manie hembko mag miech Samaria.”" 
1Kings13:32 nimar wach Ruth Nyasaye nochopo kare, kaka jali nowacho kokuong’o kendo-mar-misango man Bethel, kod ut lemo manie hembko mag miech Samaria.”" 
1Kings13:33 To kata kamano, Jeroboam ne ok oweyo yorene maricho, to nomedo keto jomoko nono mondo obed jodolo ma rito hembko man kuonde moting’ore, kopwodho ng’ato ang’ata ma ne dwaro bedo jadolo." 
1Kings13:34 Timni nomiyo dhood Jeroboam obedo joketho, mi notiekgi chuth, ma onge modong’ e piny." 
1Kings14:1 E ndalogo Abija wuod Jeroboam ne tuo. 
1Kings14:2 Jeroboam nowacho ni chiege niya, “Lok kiti, mondo kik ng’ato ng’e ni in chiega, kendo idhi Shilo ir Ahija janabi ma nokoro ni an ema nabed ruodh pinyni." 
1Kings14:3 Kaw makati apar, gi kek moko kod puga mar mor kich, iterne; enonyisi gima biro timore kuom nyathi.”" 
1Kings14:4 Chi Jeroboam notimo kamano; nodhi Shilo mochopo e od Ahija. To koro Ahija ne ok nyal neno; wengene nosechor, nikech hike noniang’." 
1Kings14:5 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Ahija niya, “Ng’e ni chi Jeroboam biro iri mondo openji wach wuode, nikech wuode tuo.” Eka Ruoth Nyasaye nonyiso Ahija kaka onego owuo kod dhakono. Kane chi Jeroboam ochopo, nowuondore ni en dhako moro nono." 
1Kings14:6 To kane Ahija owinjo tiende e dhoot, nowacho niya, “Donji chi Jeroboam; ang’o momiyo iriasori ni in ng’at moro nono? An gi wach marach monego anyisi." 
1Kings14:7 Dhi iwach ni Jeroboam ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel owacho kama: ‘Ne ayieri e kind ji mondo amiyi duong’. Ne aketi jatend joga Israel," 
1Kings14:8 kendo nagolo loch kuom dhood Daudi, mamiyi. To kata kamano ok isebet ka Daudi jatichna ma norito chikena, kendo noluwa gi chunye duto, katimo mana gik malong’o e nyima," 
1Kings14:9 to in iseketho moloyo joma nokwongoni; iseloso nyisecheni iwuon mag chuma, kimiyago mirima, kendo iselokona ng’eyi." 
1Kings14:10 Emomiyo abiro keloni masira ni dhoodi, kendo abiro tieko joodi machwo duto koda ka wasumbni, ma onge ng’ati ma nodong’ e Israel, kendo abiro yweyo jodhoodi oko pep, mana kaka ng’ama wang’o owuoyo marum chuth." 
1Kings14:11 Jadhood Jeroboam moro ma notho e dala, guogi nocham, to mago ma notho oko, winy nocham, nikech Ruoth Nyasaye osewacho kamano.’" 
1Kings14:12 Koro dog dala, to e sa asaya ma tiendeni onyonoe dala ni i, to nyathi notho." 
1Kings14:13 Jo-Israel duto biro ywage kendo yike, to en ng’at achiel kende kuom jodhood Jeroboam ma noyik e liel, nimar kuome kende ema Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel onwang’oe gima long’one." 
1Kings14:14 Bende Ruoth Nyasaye noyier ng’at moro obed ruodh Israel, ma biro tieko dhood Jeroboam. Chakre kawuono," 
1Kings14:15 Ruoth Nyasaye biro goyo jo-Israel, mi ginikirni kaka odundu ma pi yiengo, kendo nogol jo-Israel oko e piny maber ma nomiyo kweregini, mi nokegi koterogi loka aora Yufrate nikech gisemiyo Ruoth Nyasaye mirima, ka gichungo sirni milamo miluongo ni Ashera." 
1Kings14:16 Enojwang’ jo-Israel nikech richo Jeroboam, mane omiyo jo-Isarel bende otimo.”" 
1Kings14:17 Chi Jeroboam nodok Tirza dalagi, to kane ochopo e dhoot, nyathi cha notho." 
1Kings14:18 Jo-Israel duto noyike, kendo noywage, mana kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nomiyo Ahija janabi ma jatichne owacho." 
1Kings14:19 Weche moko mag Jeroboam, kod lwenjene, kendo kaka norito piny, ondiki e Kitap Weche mag Ndalo mag Ruodhi mag Israel." 
1Kings14:20 Jeroboam norito piny kuom higni piero ariyo gariyo. Notho moyike, eka Nadab wuode nodoko ruoth kare." 
1Kings14:21 Rehoboam wuod Solomon, ma min mare niluongo ni Naama, nyar Amon, nodoko ruodh Juda. Nochako tich ka en jahigni piero ang’wen gachiel, kendo norito piny kuom higni apar gabiriyo, kodak Jerusalem, dala mane Ruoth Nyasaye oyiero kuom dhout Israel duto mondo nyinge obedie." 
1Kings14:22 Jo-Juda notimo gik ma Ruoth Nyasaye okwero, mi richogi nomiyo Ruoth Nyasaye ojok kodgi moloyo kweregi duto." 
1Kings14:23 Ne giloso ut lemo e hembko mane ni kuonde moting’ore, kendo ne gichungo sirni milamo mag kite gi mag yath, e gode maboyo duto, kendo e tiend yien moro amora motimo otiep." 
1Kings14:24 Bende ne giketo ji kuonde lemo mondo jolemo oterrego, kaka kit lemo margi nobet. Jo-Juda ne timo timbe makuero duto mag ogendini mane Ruoth Nyasaye oriembo mondo owe ni jo-Israel thuolo." 
1Kings14:25 E higa mar abich mar loch Rehoboam, Shishak ruodh Misri nomonjo Jerusalem." 
1Kings14:26 Nokawo mwandu duto mag Hekalu mar Ruoth Nyasaye, gi mag od ruoth. Bende nokawo kuodi duto mag dhahabu mane Solomon oloso," 
1Kings14:27 mi ruoth Rehoboam noloso kuodi mag mula kar mago, momiyo jotend jorit ranga dalane." 
1Kings14:28 Kane ruoth dhi e Hekalu mar Ruoth Nyasaye, jorit ne ting’o kuodigo, eka bang’e ne gidwokogi ka od jorit." 
1Kings14:29 Koro weche moko mag Rehoboam, gi timbene duto, ondiki e Kitap Weche mag Ndalo mag Ruodhi mag Juda." 
1Kings14:30 Ne nitie lweny e kind Rehoboam gi Jeroboam ndalo duto. 
1Kings14:31 Rehoboam notho, moyike but kwerene e dala Daudi. Min mare ne nyinge Naama nyar Amon. Abija wuod Rehoboam nodoko ruoth kare." 
1Kings15:1 E higa mar apar gaboro mar loch Jeroboam wuod Nebat, Abija nodoko ruodh Juda." 
1Kings15:2 Norito piny kuom higni adek, kodak Jerusalem. Min mare ne nyinge Maaka, nyar Abishalom." 
1Kings15:3 Abija ne timo richo duto mane wuon mare otimo. Chunye ne ok long’o ni Ruoth Nyasaye kaka chuny Daudi kwar mare ne long’o. 
1Kings15:4 To kata kamano, Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasache noketo wuode ruoth kare, mondo obedne ka taya maliel e Jerusalem mana nikech nying Daudi, kendo nomiyo Jerusalem ogurore," 
1Kings15:5 nimar Daudi notimo gik malong’o ni Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo e ngimane duto ne ok oketho wach moro mane ochike, mak man wach Uria ja-Hiti." 
1Kings15:6 Ne nitie lweny e kind Ahija gi Jeroboam ndalogi duto. 
1Kings15:7 Weche moko mag Abija, gi timbene ondik e Kitap Weche mag Ndalo mag Ruodhi mag Juda." 
1Kings15:8 Abija notho, mi noyike e dala Daudi, Asa wuode nodoko ruoth kare." 
1Kings15:9 E higa mar piero ariyo mar loch Jeroboam ruodh Israel, Asa nodoko ruodh Juda," 
1Kings15:10 mi norito piny kuom higni piero ang’wen gachiel, kodak Jerusalem. Min mare ne nyinge Maaka nyar Abishalom." 
1Kings15:11 Timbe Asa ne long’o e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, mana kaka timbe Daudi kwar mare." 
1Kings15:12 Noriembo joterruok mag kuonde lemo, kodarogi e pinye, kendo nogolo nyiseche manono mane kwerene oloso." 
1Kings15:13 Bende nogolo Maaka e duong’ne mar bedo min ruoth, nikech noloso kido makuero, maket gi nyasaye madhako miluongo ni Ashera. Asa nomuko gima ketno, mowang’o e dho aora Kidron." 
1Kings15:14 Hembko mane ni kuonde moting’ore ne ok okethi, to kata kamano chuny Asa ne long’o e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye e ndalone duto." 
1Kings15:15 Nokawo fedha gi dhahabu kod gik lemo, mi oketo e od Ruoth Nyasaye, to moko en owuon ema nochiwo." 
1Kings15:16 Ne nitie lweny e kind Asa gi Baasha ndalo duto mag ngimagi. 
1Kings15:17 Baasha ruodh Israel nodhi monjo jo-Juda, kendo nochielo Rama gi ohinga, moketoe jolweny mondo ogeng’ ni ji duto madhi ka Asa ruodh Juda, kata maa kuno." 
1Kings15:18 Eka Asa nokawo fedha gi dhahabu duto ma nodong’ kuom mwandu mag Od Ruoth Nyasaye kod mag ode owuon, momiyo jotichne mondo okow ni Ben-hadad ruodh Aram, ma wuod Tabrimmon, wuod Hezion, ma nodak Damaski. Noorone wach niya," 
1Kings15:19 “Winjruok mondo obed e kindwa kodi, kaka winjruok mane nie kind wuora gi wuoru. Ero aoroni chiwo mar fedha gi dhahabu; yie iketh winjruok manie kindu gi Baasha ruodh Israel, mondo owe kedo koda.”" 
1Kings15:20 Ben-hadad noyie kwayo mar ruoth Asa, mi nooro jotend ogend lweny mondo omonj miech Israel. Noketho Ijon, gi Dan, gi Abel-beth-Maaka, gi paw Kineroth duto, kod piny Naftali." 
1Kings15:21 Kane Baasha owinjo gima otimore, noweyo gero ohinga mar Rama, modok Tirza." 
1Kings15:22 Eka ruoth Asa noluongo jo-Juda duto, maonge ng’ama odong’. Ne gigolo kite gi yien duto mane Baasha gerogo ohinga mar Rama, mi Ruoth Asa nochielogo Geba manie piny Benjamin, kod Mizpa." 
1Kings15:23 Weche moko mag Asa, gi tekone kod timbene duto, gi mier mane ogero, ondiki e Kitap Weche mag Ndalo mag Ruodhi mag Juda. Kane oseti, tuo moro nomako tiendene." 
1Kings15:24 Notho moyike e dala Daudi kwar mare. Jehoshafat wuode nodoko ruoth kare. 
1Kings15:25 E higa mar ariyo mar loch Asa ruodh Juda, Nadab wuod Jeroboam nodoko ruodh Israel. Nobedo ruoth kuom higni ariyo," 
1Kings15:26 to notimo gik ma Ruoth Nyasaye okwero, koluwo timbe wuon mare, ma nomiyogo jo-Israel obedo joketho." 
1Kings15:27 Baasha wuod Ahija, ja-Isakar, nojamo Nadab, monege Gibethon, dala jo-Filistia, kane oyudo Nadab gi jo-Israel lworo Gibethon mondo omonji." 
1Kings15:28 E higa mar adek mar loch Asa ruodh Juda ema Baasha nonegoe Nadab, mokawo lochne." 
1Kings15:29 Gikanyono kosedoko ruoth, nonego jood Jeroboam duto. Notieko od Jeroboam chuth, ma ok oweyo kata ng’at achiel kangima, mana kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nosemiyo Ahija ja-Shilo ma jatichne owacho." 
1Kings15:30 Mano notimore nikech Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel, nokecho gi richo mane Jeroboam otimo, kendo mane omiyo jo-Israel otimo." 
1Kings15:31 Weche moko mag Nadab, kod timbene duto, ondiki e Kitap Weche mag Ndalo mag Ruodhi mag Israel." 
1Kings15:32 Ne nitie lweny e kind Asa kod Baasha ruodh Israel e ndalo duto mag ngimagi. 
1Kings15:33 E higa mar adek mar loch Asa ruodh Juda, Baasha wuod Ahija nodoko ruodh Israel, morito piny kuom higni piero ariyo gang’wen, kodak Tirza." 
1Kings15:34 Notimo gik ma Ruoth Nyasaye okwero, koluwo timbe Jeroboam ma nomiyogo jo-Israel obedo joricho." 
1Kings16:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nomiyo Jehu wuod Hanani owacho ni Baasha niya," 
1Kings16:2 “Ne amiyi duong’ kagoli e buru, kendo naketi jatend joga Israel, to eka iluwo timbe Jeroboam, kendo imiyo joga Israel obedo joketho, ka gimiya mirima nikech richogi." 
1Kings16:3 Emomiyo abiro yweyi oko, kaachiel gi jodhoodi, kendo anami odi bed kaka od Jeroboam wuod Nebat." 
1Kings16:4 Jodhood Baasha ma otho e dala, guogi nocham; to mago ma otho oko, winy nocham.”" 
1Kings16:5 Weche moko mag Baasha, kaachiel gi tekone, kod timbene duto, ondik e Kitap Weche mag Ndalo mag Ruodhi mag Israel." 
1Kings16:6 Koro Baasha notho moyike Tirza, eka Ela ma wuode nodoko ruoth kare." 
1Kings16:7 To Ruoth Nyasaye nosemiyo Jehu ma wuod Hanani owuoyo kuom Baasha gi dhoode nikech Baasha notimo gik ma Ruoth Nyasaye okwero. Baasha nomiyo Ruoth Nyasaye mirima gi timbene mane chalo gi timbe mag dhood Jeroboam, kendo nikech notieko dhoodno." 
1Kings16:8 E higa mar piero ariyo gauchiel mar loch asa ruodh Juda, Ela wuod Baasha nodoko ruodh Israel, mi norito piny kuom higni ariyo kodak Tirza." 
1Kings16:9 To Zimri, ma achiel kuom jotend geche mag lweny nojame, mokedo kode. E higa mar piero ariyo gabiriyo mar loch Asa ruodh Juda, kane oyudo Ela omer Tirza e od Arza mane jarit od ruoth," 
1Kings16:10 Zimri nodonjo, monege, kendo okawo lochne." 
1Kings16:11 Kane Zimri osedoko ruoth, nonego jodhood Baasha duto, ma ok oweyo kata ng’ama dichwo achiel kuom wedene, kata osiepene." 
1Kings16:12 Kamano Zimri notieko dhood Baasha duto, kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nomiyo Jehu janabi owacho." 
1Kings16:13 Mano notimore nikech richo duto mag Baasha gi mag Ela wuode, ma ne gimiyo jo-Israel otimo, ka gimiyogo Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel mirima nikech nyiseche manono." 
1Kings16:14 Koro weche moko mag Ela, gi timbene duto, ondik e Kitap weche mag Ndalo mag Ruodhi mag Israel." 
1Kings16:15 Zimri nobet ruoth kuom ndalo abiriyo e higa mar piero ariyo gabiriyo mar loch Asa ruodh Israel, kodak Tirza. Nonwang’o ka jolweny ojot but Gibethon, dala jo-Filistia." 
1Kings16:16 Jolweny mane ojotgo nowinjo kiwacho ni, “Zimri osejamo ruoth, monego.” Emomiyo jo-Isarel duto mane nie kar jot noketo Omri ma jatend lweny mondo obed ruodh Israel chieng’no." 
1Kings16:17 Eka Omri, kaachiel gi jo-Israel duto, nowuok Gibethon, mi gidhi gilworo Tirza." 
1Kings16:18 To kane Zimri oneno ni dala osekaw, nodonjo e od ruoth, mochwinyo mach kuom odno, motho kanyo." 
1Kings16:19 Mano notimore nikech notimo gik mane Ruoth Nyasaye okwero, koluwo timbe Jeroboam, kendo nikech nomiyo jo-Israel obedo joricho." 
1Kings16:20 Koro weche moko mag Zimri, gi timbene mag andhoga, ondiki e Kitap Weche mag Ndalo mag ruodhi mag Israel." 
1Kings16:21 Eka jo-Israel nopogore diriyo. Jomoko noluwo Tibni wuod Ginath, ka gidwaro kete ruoth, to jomoko noluwo Omri." 
1Kings16:22 To joma noluwo Omri noloyo jo-Tibni wuod Ginath e lweny, mi ginego Tibni, kendo Omri nokawo loch." 
1Kings16:23 E higa mar piero adek gachiel mar loch Asa ruodh Juda, Omri nodoko ruodh Israel, motiyo higni apar gariyo, Higni auchiel nodak Tirza," 
1Kings16:24 eka bang’e nong’iewo got Samaria kuom Shemer gi fedha, ma dirom kilo piero abiriyo kendo nochielo godno gi ohinga, mochake ni Samaria, machal gi nying Shemer, ma wuon godno." 
1Kings16:25 Omri notimo gik mane Ruoth Nyasaye okwero moloyo ji duto ma nokwongone," 
1Kings16:26 nikech noluwo timbe duto mag Jeroboam wuod Nebat, kendo nomiyo jo-Israel obedo joricho, ka gimiyo Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel mirima nikech nyisechegi manono." 
1Kings16:27 Koro weche moko mag Omri, gi tekone ma nonyiso, ondik e Kitap Weche mag Ndalo mag Ruodhi mag Israel." 
1Kings16:28 Omri notho, moyike Samaria; Ahab wuode nodoko ruoth kare." 
1Kings16:29 E higa mar piero adek gaboro mar loch Asa ruodh Juda, Ahab wuod Omri nodoko ruodh Israel, morito Israel kuom higni piero ariyo gariyo kodak Samaria." 
1Kings16:30 To Ahab wuod Omri notimo gik ma Ruoth Nyasaye okwero moloyo jogo duto mane okwongone. 
1Kings16:31 Ok noluwo mana richo mag Jeroboam kende, to gima rachie moloyo mane otimo, en ni nokendo Jezebel nyar Ethbaal ruodh jo-Sidon, kendo notiyo ni Baal, kolame." 
1Kings16:32 Noloso kendo-mar-liswa ni Baal e ot ma nogero ni Baal Samaria," 
1Kings16:33 kendo nochungo siro milamo miluongo ni Ashera. Nomiyo Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel mirima moloyo ruodhi duto mag Israel ma nokwongone. 
1Kings16:34 Ndalo Ahab ema Hiel ja-Bethel nogeroe Jeriko. Kane oketo mise, Abiram wuode makayo notho, kendo ka nochungo dhorangeyene, Segub wuode machogo notho, mana kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nomiyo Joshua wuod Nun owacho." 
1Kings16:34 Ndalo Ahab ema Hiel ja-Bethel nogeroe Jeriko. Kane oketo mise, Abiram wuode makayo notho, kendo ka nochungo dhorangeyene, Segub wuode machogo notho, mana kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nomiyo Joshua wuod Nun owacho." 
1Kings17:1 Elija ja-Tishbe modak e piny Gilead nowacho ni Ahab niya, “Gi nying Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel, kata tho ok nomok e lum, kata koth ok nochue e piny kuom hignigi, mak mana ka awacho.”" 
1Kings17:2 Eka wach Ruoth Nyasaye nobiro ni Elija niya," 
1Kings17:3 “Aye ka, ichik yo wuok chieng’, kendo ipond e bath aora Kerith, man yo wuok chieng’ mar aora Jordan." 
1Kings17:4 Inimodh e aora, kendo asechiko agak mondo okelni chiemo kuno.”" 
1Kings17:5 Nodhi kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho, modak e bath aora Kerith man yo wuok chieng’ mar aora Jordan." 
1Kings17:6 Agak ne kelone kuon gi ring’o okinyi godhiambo, kendo nomodho e aorano." 
1Kings17:7 To bang ndalo moko aora nodwono, nikech koth ne onge e piny." 
1Kings17:8 Eka wach Ruoth Nyasaye nobirone niya," 
1Kings17:9 “A malo, idhi Zarefath, dala moro e piny Sidon, idag kuno, nikech asechiko chi liel moro dalano mondo opidhi.”" 
1Kings17:10 Omiyo nodhi Zarefath. To kane ochopo e dhoranga dala, noyudo dhako moro ka dondo yien. Noluonge, mokwaye ni, “Omnae pi matin e agwata mondo amodhi.”" 
1Kings17:11 To kane dhakono dhi, Elija nokowone wach ni, “Ikelnae kuon matin bende.”" 
1Kings17:12 En to nodwoko ni, “Gi nying Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachi, aonge gi gimoro motedi, mak mana sanja mar mogo modong’ e dak, kod mo matin e agulu. Koro eka adondo yien matin, mondo adhi atedgo chiemo, wacham gi wuoda, aye watho.”" 
1Kings17:13 Elija nowachone niya, “Kik iluor. Dhi mondo itim kaka asewacho, to mokwongo ited kuon matin ikelna, eka bang’e ited modong’ ucham gi wuodi." 
1Kings17:14 Nimar ruoth Nyasaye owacho kama: ‘Mogo manie dak, kata mo manie agulu ok norum nyaka chop chieng’ ma Ruoth Nyasaye nokel koth e piny.’ ”" 
1Kings17:15 Mi dhakono nodhi, motimo kaka Elija nowachone, kendo ne gichiemo gi joode kod Elija ndalo mang’eny." 
1Kings17:16 Mogo manie dak kod mo manie agulu ne ok orumo, kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nomiyo Elija owacho." 
1Kings17:17 Bang’ mano, tuo nogoyo wuod dhako ma wuon otno, kendo tuono nohinge, mi chunye nochot." 
1Kings17:18 Dhakono nopenjo Elija niya, “Yaye ng’at Nyasaye, in gang’o koda? Bironi osefwenyo richona koso, ma omiyo wuoda otho?”" 
1Kings17:19 To Elija nodwoke niya, “Miya wuodi.” Eka nokawe kuome, moting’e kodhi kode e gorofa malo, kama nodakie mi nopiele e kitandane owuon." 
1Kings17:20 Eka noywak ni Ruoth Nyasaye, kopenje niya, “Yaye, Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasacha, in ema isekelo masira ni chi liel ma adakgoni kinego wuode?”" 
1Kings17:21 Eka noriere kuom nyathi didek, koywak ni Ruoth Nyasaye niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasacha, akwayi, yie chuny nyathini oduogi.”" 
1Kings17:22 Ruoth Nyasaye nowinjo Elija, mi chuny nyathi noduogo, modoko mangima." 
1Kings17:23 Elija nokawo nyathi, molorgo koa e gorofa. Nomiye min mare, kowacho niya, “Neye! Wuodi ngima.”" 
1Kings17:24 Dhakono nowacho ni Elija niya, “Kawuono eka ang’eyo ni in ng’at Nyasaye, kendo wach Ruoth Nyasaye mawuok e dhogi en adier.”" 
1Kings18:1 Bang’ ndalo mang’eny, ka oro osebetie kuom higni adek, wach Ruoth Nyasaye nobiro ni Elija niya, “Wuogi mondo Ahab oneni nikech abiro kelo koth e piny.”" 
1Kings18:2 Omiyo Elija nowuok mondo Ahab onene. Ndalogo kech ne duong’ e Samaria," 
1Kings18:3 omiyo Ahab noluongo Obadia, ma jaduong’ ode. (Obadia ne en ng’at moluoro Ruoth Nyasaye ahinya," 
1Kings18:4 kendo kane Jezebel nego jonabi mag Ruoth Nyasaye, to nopando jonabi mia achiel kuomgi. Piero abich nopando e rogo achiel, to piero abich opando e rogo machielo, momiyogi chiemo gi pi bende.)" 
1Kings18:5 Ahab nowacho ni Obadia niya, “Wawuoth e piny duto, e sokni kod aore duto, dipo ka wayudo lum ma dwaresgo farese gi kenje, mondo kik kech neggi duto.”" 
1Kings18:6 Omiyo ne gipogo piny e kindgi ji ariyo, mondo kik gimoro dong’ mak orangi. Ahab nochiko konchiel, to Obadia nochiko komachielo." 
1Kings18:7 Kane Obadia dhi, nopo koromo gi Elija. Kane onene, nogoyo chonge piny, mokulorene, kowacho niya, “Jaduong’ Elija! Kara mana in?”" 
1Kings18:8 Nodwoke ni, “Ee, mana an. To koro dhi inyis ruodhu ni, an ka.”" 
1Kings18:9 To Obadia nopenje niya, “Ere gima aseketho, momiyo idwaro keta e lwet Ahab mondo onega?" 
1Kings18:10 Akuong’ora gi nying Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachi ni onge oganda kata piny moro ma ruodha pok ooroe ji mondo odwari. To kane jopinjego okwer ni ionge kuno, to nyaka ne gikuong’re ni gikia kuma intie." 
1Kings18:11 Koro iora mondo adhi anyis ruodha ni, ‘Elija ni ka!’" 
1Kings18:12 To kwasewere kodi, to Roho mar Ruoth Nyasaye biro teri kuma ok ang’eyo. Omiyo, ka adhi, ma anyiso Ahab ni in ka, mi obiro to ok onwang’i, enonega. To jaduong’, aseluoro Ruoth Nyasaye, chakre tinna." 
1Kings18:13 Bende isewinjo gima natimo ka Jezebel ne nego jonabi mag Ruoth Nyasaye? Napando jonabi mia achiel. Piero abich napando e rogo achiel, to piero abich e rogo machielo, mamiyogi chiemo gi pi bende." 
1Kings18:14 To pod iora mondo adhi anyis ruodha ni, ‘Elija ni ka!’ Donge ing’eyo ni obiro nega?”" 
1Kings18:15 To Elija nodwoke niya, “Gi nying Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto, ma Nyasacha ma atiyone, akuong’ora ni abiro nene kawuono.”" 
1Kings18:16 Eka Obadia nodhi dwaro Ahab, monyise wach. Mi Ahab nodhi neno Elija." 
1Kings18:17 Kane Ahab oneno Elija, nowachone niya, “Kara mana in, jasand jo-Israel!”" 
1Kings18:18 Elija nodwoke ni, “An ok asand jo-Israel, to in gi jodhoodu ema usandogi, nikech useweyo chik Ruoth Nyasaye, kuluwo nyiseche manono miluongo ni Baal." 
1Kings18:19 Emomiyo koro or wach mondo jo-Israel duto obi, wachokre e got Karmel, kaachiel gi jonabi mia ang’wen gi piero abich mag Baal, kod mag Ashera mia ang’wen, ma Jezebel opidho.”" 
1Kings18:20 Kuom mano, Ahab noluongo jo-Israel duto, kendo nochoko jonabigo kanyakla e got Karmel." 
1Kings18:21 Eka Elija nochung’ e nyim ji duto, mopenjogi niya, “Unuriwni e kind paro ariyo nyaka karang’o? Ka Ruoth Nyasaye en Nyasaye, to luweuru; to ka Baal e Nyasaye, to luwuru Baal.” To ji noling’ thi." 
1Kings18:22 Eka Elija nowachonigi niya, “Eri an kende e janabi mar Ruoth Nyasaye modong’, to jonabi mag Baal gin mia ang’wen gi piero abich." 
1Kings18:23 Koro miwauru ruedhi ariyo. We giyier achiel mondo giyang’, kendo gikete ewi yien, to kik gimok mach. An bende abiro yang’o rwath machielo, kendo nakete ewi yien, to ok namok mach." 
1Kings18:24 Eka uluong nying nyasachu, to an abiro luongo nying Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo Nyasaye ma noor mach, e Nyasaye.” Ji duto nodwoko ni, “Wayie.”" 
1Kings18:25 Elija nowacho ni jonabi mag Baal niya, “Yieruru rwath achiel, uyang’ mokwongo nikech ung’eny. Eka uluong nying nyasachu, to kik umok mach.”" 
1Kings18:26 Omiyo ne gikawo rwath, mi giyang’o, kendo ne giluongo nying Baal, chakre okinyi nyaka odiechieng’, ka giwacho niya, “Baal, yie idwokwa!” To ne onge dwoko kata matin. To koro ne gichikore achika ka gilworo kendo-mar-liswa mane giseloso." 
1Kings18:27 Kane ochopo odiechieng’ tir, Elija nojarogi, ka ngeko nyiero, kowacho niya, “Koguru matek! Donge en nyasaye? Dipo ka wach moro pod ogale, kata odich, kata odhi wuoth. Kamoro onindo, chieweuru!”" 
1Kings18:28 Omiyo ne gimedo kok matek, ka ging’olore gi pelni kod ligengni, kaka kit timgi nobet, nyaka rembgi nochuer." 
1Kings18:29 Odiechieng’ nokadho, to ne gimedo dhumore nyaka sa michiwoe misango mar odhiambo. To ne onge dwoko, kata ng’ama dewo ywakgi." 
1Kings18:30 Eka Elija nowacho ni ji duto niya, “Suduru ka.” Mi ji duto nosudo machiegni. Noloso kendo-mar-misango mar Ruoth Nyasaye ma nomukore." 
1Kings18:31 Nokawo kite apar gariyo maromre gi kwan mar dhout yawuot Jakobo, jal mane wach Ruoth Nyasaye obirone niya, “Nyingi noluong ni Israel.”" 
1Kings18:32 Kitego nolosogo kendo-mar-misango ni Ruoth Nyasaye. Nokunyo bur molworo kendo-mar-misango. Burno dine rom ting’o migerni ariyo mag koth ngano. 
1Kings18:33 Nochano yien, kendo nopogo rwath lemo lemo, moketo ewi yien. Eka nowacho niya, “Keluru pi, depige ang’wen, uol kuom misango kendo kuom yien.” Mi ne gitimo kamano." 
1Kings18:34 Nowacho niya, “Meduru kendo.” Mi ne gitimo kamano. Nowacho kendo ni, “Timuru mar adek.” Mi ne gitimo," 
1Kings18:35 kendo pi noo piny, molworo kar misango, nyaka bur nopong’." 
1Kings18:36 Kane sa michiwoe misango mar odhiambo ochopo, Elija janabi nosudo machiegni, mowacho niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Ibrahim, gi Isaka, kod Israel, yie mondo ji ong’e kawuono ni in e Nyasach Israel, kendo ni an e jatichni, mosetimo magi duto kaka iwacho." 
1Kings18:37 Dwoka, Ruoth Nyasaye! Dwoka mondo jogi ong’e ni in e Nyasaye maloko chunygi iri.”" 
1Kings18:38 Eka mach mar Ruoth Nyasaye nolwar, motieko misango kaachiel gi yien gi kite kod lowo, kendo nonywayo pi mane nie bur pep." 
1Kings18:39 Kane ji duto oneno gima otimore, ne gipodho piny auma, ka giwacho niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye e Nyasaye! Adier, Ruoth Nyasaye e Nyasaye!”" 
1Kings18:40 Elija nokonogi niya, “Makuru jonabi mag Baal. Kik uwe kata achiel tony.” Ne gimakogi, mi Elija noterogi mwalo e aora Kishon, monegogi kuno." 
1Kings18:41 Koro Elija nowacho ni Ahab niya, “Dhi ichiem, kendo imethi, nikech awinjo ka koth mor matek.”" 
1Kings18:42 Ahab nodhi motimo kamano. To Elija nodhi moidho ewi got Karmel. Nogoyo chonge piny, koketo wiye e kind chongene." 
1Kings18:43 Nowacho ni jatichne ni, “Dhi ewi got, ing’i yo nam.” Jalo nodhi, mong’icho, mi nodwoke niya, “Ok aneno gimoro.” Elija nowachone ni, “Dog nyadibiriyo.”" 
1Kings18:44 Kane oduogo e wuodhe mar abiriyo, nowacho niya, “Koro aneno bor polo matin ka lwet dhano ka wuok e nam.” Eka Elija nowachone ni, “Dhi inyis Ahab ni mondo oik geche, kendo olor mwalo, nimar dipo ka koth ogeng’e.”" 
1Kings18:45 Bang’ sa matin, polo nodudo gi yamo, kendo koth nochue maduong’, mi Ahab noidho geche, modhi Jezreel." 
1Kings18:46 Teko mar Ruoth Nyasaye nolor kuom Elija, mi Elija nong’wano lepe, moringo nyim Ahab kateloe nyaka ranga Jezreel." 
1Kings19:1 Ahab nonyiso Jezebel gik moko duto mane Elija otimo, kendo kaka nonego jonabi duto." 
1Kings19:2 Mi Jezebel nooro jaote ir Elija, kowacho niya, “Ka kiny ochopo sa makama, ka pok anegi kaka isenego jonabigo, to nyiseche mondo onega!”" 
1Kings19:3 Elija noluor, mi noringo mondo otony. Kane ochopo Beer-sheba, dala mar Juda, noweyo jatichne kuno." 
1Kings19:4 To en owuon, nodhi e thim moromo wuodh ndalo achiel. Eka nobet e tiend yath moro, mokwayo Ruoth Nyasaye ni mondo otho, kowacho niya, “Oromo! Yaye Ruoth Nyasaye, kaw ngimana, nikech ok aber moloyo kwerena.”" 
1Kings19:5 Noriere e tiend yadhno, monindo. Eka malaika nomule, ka wachone niya, “A malo, ichiem.”" 
1Kings19:6 Kane oting’o wang’e, nopo koneno makati kod puga mar pi yo ka wiye. Nochiemo kendo nomodho, eka nochako oriere piny." 
1Kings19:7 To malaika mar Ruoth Nyasaye noduogo, momule, ka wacho niya, “A malo, ichiem, nono to wuoth biro hingi.”" 
1Kings19:8 Eka noa malo mochiemo kendo omodho. Chiemono nomede teko, mowuotho ndalo piero ang’wen, odiechieng’ gotieno, mochopo Horeb, god Nyasaye." 
1Kings19:9 Nodonjo e rogo moro, mobworoe. Eka wach Ruoth Nyasaye nobirone niya, “Elija, itimo ang’o ka?”" 
1Kings19:10 Nodwoko niya, “A Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto, asetiyoni gi kinda nikech hera maduong’ maherigo, to jo-Israel ok oserito singruok mane itimo kodgi. Gisemuko kendeni mag misango, kendo gisenego jonabi magi, mak mana an ema adong’, to koro gidwaro nega.”" 
1Kings19:11 Ruoth Nyasaye nowachone niya, “Wuogi, idhi ichung’ nyima ewi got nikech abiro kadho kanyo.” Mokwongo yamo nokudho, momuko gode, kendo obaro lwendni e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye; to Ruoth Nyasaye ok ne nie yamo" 
1Kings19:12 Bang’e ka piny oseyiengni, ne nitie mach; to Ruoth Nyasaye ok ne nie mach. To bang’ mach, piny noling’ thi." 
1Kings19:13 Kane Elija owinjo kamano, nogeng’o wang’e gi lawe mar abola, kendo nowuok, mochung’ e dho rogo. Eka nowinjo dwol kapenje niya, “Elija, itimo ang’o ka?”" 
1Kings19:14 Nodwoko ni, “A Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto, asetiyoni gi kinda, to jo-Israel ok oserito singruok mane itimo kodgi. Gisemuko kendeni mag misango, kendo gisenego jonabi magi; mak mana an ema odong’, to koro gidwaro nega.”" 
1Kings19:15 Eka Ruoth Nyasaye nowachone niya “Dog gi yor thim mane ibirogo, idhi Damaski, to kisechopo, iwir Hazael gi mo mondo obed ruodh Aram." 
1Kings19:16 Jehu wuod Nimshi bende iwir mondo obed ruodh Israel; to Elisha wuod Shafat ja-Abel-mehola ema mondo iwir obed janabi kari. 
1Kings19:17 Ng’at ma Hazael ok onego, Jehu noneg; to ng’at ma Jehu ok onego, Elisha noneg." 
1Kings19:18 To abiro weyo ji alufu abiriyo kangima, mana jogo duto ma pok ogoyo chongegi piny ni Baal, kendo ma pok onyodhe.”" 
1Kings19:19 Elija nowuok kanyo, modhi oyudo Elisha wuod Shafat ka puro. Ji ne puro gi dhok piero ariyo gang’wen; dhok ariyo ne ywayo kwer achiel, to Elisha ema ne puro gi dhok ariyo mogik. Elija nochopo bute, mobolo kuome lawe mar abola." 
1Kings19:20 Eka Elisha noweyo dhok, moringo olawo Elija, kendo owachone niya, “Dogi, to kik wiyi wil gi gima asetimoni.”" 
1Kings19:21 Mi Elisha noweyo lawe, modok okawo dhok ariyogo. Noyang’ogi motedogi gi yiend kwer, mi nomiyo joge mondo ocham. Eka nowuok moluwo Elija, kendo nodoko jatichne." 
1Kings20:1 Ben-hadad ruodh Aram nochoko ogandane mar lweny, kaachiel gi ruodhi piero adek gariyo gi farese kod geche lweny. Nodhi molworo Samaria, kendo nokedo kode mondo okawe." 
1Kings20:2 Eka nooro joote dalano mondo owach ni Ahab niya, “Ben-hadad owacho kama:" 
1Kings20:3 ‘Fethi gi dhahapi, gin maga, to mondi kod nyithindi ema inyalo dong’go.’ ”" 
1Kings20:4 Ruodh Israel nodwoke niya, “Ruodha, ok adagi gima iwacho. An mari, kaachiel gi giga duto.”" 
1Kings20:5 To bang’e jootego noduogo ire, mowacho niya, “Koro Ben-hadad owacho ni mondo imiye fethi gi dhahapi, kaachiel gi mondi kod nyithindi." 
1Kings20:6 Kiny kar sa makama, noor jotichne mondo omany odi, kod ut jogi, kendo ginikaw gimoro amora ma gihero.”" 
1Kings20:7 Eka ruodh Israel noluongo jodongo duto mag piny, mowachonigi niya, “Koro neuru kaka ng’atni dwaro kelona masira. Ne ok atamora chiwo fetha gi dhahapa, to koro odwaro mondo amiye monda gi nyithinda bende!”" 
1Kings20:8 Jodongo kod ji duto nodwoke ni, “Kik idewe, kendo kik iyiene.”" 
1Kings20:9 Omiyo nodwoko joote Ben-hadad niya, “Dhi unyis ruodha ni duto ma nokwongo kwaya, anatim, to gima koro okwaya sani ok anyal timo.” Mi joote nodwoko ni ruodhgi wach." 
1Kings20:10 Ben-hadad noorone wach kendo niya, “Nyiseche mondo okweda ka ok aduwo Samaria ma kata mana buru modong’ie ok nyal romo joga duto jowo!”" 
1Kings20:11 Ruodh Israel nodwoko ni, “Wachneuru niya, ‘Ng’ama rwako gilweny kik pakre ka ng’ama oselonyogi!’ ”" 
1Kings20:12 Ben-hadad nowinjo wachni kometho gi ruodhi kande e hembegi, mi nowacho ni joge niya, “Chanreuru ni lweny.” Mi ne giikore monjo dala Samaria." 
1Kings20:13 Eka janabi moro nobiro ir Ahab ruodh Israel, mowachone niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye owacho kama: ‘Donge ineno oganda maduong’ni? Kawuono eka abiro chiwogi e lweti, mi ining’e ni an e Ruoth Nyasaye.’ ”" 
1Kings20:14 Ahab nopenje ni, “Ruoth Nyasaye biro chiwonwagi e lwet ng’a gini?” Janabi nodwoke ni, “Mana in.”" 
1Kings20:15 Eka Ahab nochano yawuowigo, moromo ji mia achiel gi piero adek gariyo. Achien nochano jolweny duto mag Israel, ma dirom ji alufu abiriyo." 
1Kings20:16 Ne giwuok odiechieng’," 
1Kings20:17 ka yawuowi ma lang jodong gwenge otelo nyime. To noyudo ka Ben-hadad mer e hembe, kaachiel gi ruodhi piero adek mane konye. Nokel ni Ben-hadad wach niya, “Jomoko wuok Samaria.”" 
1Kings20:18 Nodwoko ni, “Makgiuru ka gingima, bed ni gibiro gi kue, kata gibiro kedo kodwa.”" 
1Kings20:19 Yawuowi ma lang jodong gwenge nowuok e dala Samaria, kendo oganda lweny noluwo bang’gi." 
1Kings20:20 Ng’ato ka ng’ato nonego ng’ate, mi jo-Aram noringo, ka jo-Israel lawogi. To Ben-hadad ruodh Aram noidho faras motony kaachiel gi joidh faresene moko." 
1Kings20:21 Eka ruodh Israel nowuok momako farese gi geche, kendo nonego jo-Aram oyokre." 
1Kings20:22 Janabi cha nodhi ir ruodh Israel, mowachone niya, “Koro jiwri, ine gima onego itim, nikech e ndalo oro, ruodh Aram biro monji.”" 
1Kings20:23 Jodong Aram nowacho ni ruodhgi niya, “Nyasach jogo en nyasach gode; mano emomiyo ne giloyowa. Koro onego waked kodgi e pap, eka wanalogi adier." 
1Kings20:24 To tim kama: gol ruodhi kande e tichgi, iket jotend lweny kargi." 
1Kings20:25 Eka ichok oganda lweny moromo gi oganda ma nolalni, kiketo faras ka faras, kendo gari ka gari. Wanaked kodgi e pap, mi wanalogi adier.” Ben-hadad nowinjo wachgi motimo kamano." 
1Kings20:26 E ndalo oro, Ben-hadad nochoko jo-Aram, mi nodhi Afek mondo omonj jo-Israel." 
1Kings20:27 Jo-Israel bende nochokore koseikgi ni lweny, mi ne giwuok mondo giked gi wasikgigo. Jo-Israel nojot momanyore gi jo-Aram. Jo-Aram nopong’o piny, to jo-Israel ne chalo kweth matindo ariyo mag diek." 
1Kings20:28 Ng’at Nyasaye moro nodhi ir ruodh Israel, mowacho ne niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye owacho kama: ‘Jo-Aram osewacho ni Ruoth Nyasaye en nyasach gode, to ok en nyasach holni. Omiyo abiro chiwo oganda maduong’ni duto e lweti, eka unung’e ni an e Ruoth Nyasaye.’ ”" 
1Kings20:29 Ne gijot ka gimanyore kamano kuom ndalo abiriyo. Chieng’ mar abiriyo ne girado ni lweny, kendo odiechieng’no jo-Israel nonego jo-Aram alufu mia achiel." 
1Kings20:30 Joma nodong’ noringo modonjo e dala Afek, to ohinga mar dala nopodho, monego ji alufu piero ariyo gabiriyo kuomgi. Ben-hadad bende noringo, modonjo e dalano, kendo nopondo ei ot moro maiye." 
1Kings20:31 Jodonge nodhi ire, mowachone niya, “Wasewinjo ni ruodhi mag Israel ng’won. We mondo watue piende gugru e nungowa, kod tonde e ng’utwa, wadhi ir ruodh Israel, dipo koreso ngimani.”" 
1Kings20:32 Kuom mano, ne gitueyo piende gugru e nungogi, kod tonde e ng’utgi, mi gidhi ir ruodh Israel. Ne giwachone niya, “Ben-hadad jatichni osayi ni kik inege.” Ahab nopenjogi niya, “Kara, pod ongima? En owadwa.”" 
1Kings20:33 Noyudo ka jogo rito gima dinyisgi parone, omiyo ne giyiene mapiyo niya, “Adier, Ben-hadad en owadu.” Nowachonigi ni, “Dhiuru ukele ka.” Ben-hadad nodhi ir Ahab, mi Ahab noluonge mondo giidh kode gache." 
1Kings20:34 Ben-hadad nowachone ni, “Abiro dwoko mier mane wuora omayo wuoru, kendo iniyud thuolo mar yawo kuonde ohala Damaski, kaka wuora notimo e dala Samaria.” Ahab nodwoke niya, “Abiro gonyi kiyie timo kamano.” Mi notimo kode winjruok, mogonye." 
1Kings20:35 Wach Ruoth Nyasaye nobiro ni ng’at achiel kuom oganda jonabi, mowacho ni wadgi ni, “Yie igoya!” To jalo nodagi goye." 
1Kings20:36 Eka nowachone ni, “Isedagi winjo wach Ruoth Nyasaye, omiyo sibuor biro negi kiwuok kuoma ka.” Gikanyono mane owuokie, noromo gi sibuor monege." 
1Kings20:37 Janabino noyudo ng’at machielo, mi owachone niya, “Yie igoya.” Ng’atno nogoye mohinye." 
1Kings20:38 Eka janabino nodhi morito ruoth Ahab e yo, koumo wang’e gi nanga mondo kik ong’eye." 
1Kings20:39 Kane ruoth kadho, jalo nokok kawachone ni, “Ruoth, ka nadonjo e chuny lweny, naromo gi jalweny moro mokelona ng’at motue, kowachona niya, ‘Rit ng’atni, to kapo ni olalni, to initho, kata in ichul kilo piero adek mag fedha.’" 
1Kings20:40 To kane oyudo adich koni gi koni, napo ka ng’atno olalna.” Ruodh Israel nodwoke ni, “Iseng’ado buchi iwuon! Kamano e kaka nobedi.”" 
1Kings20:41 Eka janabino noelo nanga e wang’e piyopiyo, mi ruodh Israel nong’eyo ni en achiel kuom jonabi." 
1Kings20:42 Nowacho ni ruoth niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye owacho kama: ‘Ng’at ma nyocha adwaro ni mondo otho, iseweyo odhi, omiyo ibiro tho kare, kendo jogi biro tho kar joge.’ ”" 
1Kings20:43 Mi ruodh Israel nodok Samaria ka chunye lit. 
1Kings21:1 Naboth ja-Jezreel ne nigi puoth mzabibu thurgi, machiegni gi od Ahab ruodh Samaria." 
1Kings21:2 Ahab nowacho ni Naboth niya, “Miya puothi mar mzabibu, mondo aloke puoth alot, nikech ochiegni gi oda. Anyalo miyi puoth mzabibu maber moloye; kata kihero, to anachuli nengo moromo kode.”" 
1Kings21:3 To Naboth nodwoko Ahab niya, “Mano kuero! Ok anyal miyi mwandu kwerena.”" 
1Kings21:4 Kuom mano Ahab nodok dala ka iye owang’, motamore chiemo." 
1Kings21:5 Jezebel chiege nodhi ire, mopenje niya, “Ang’o momiyo ikuyo, kendo idagi chiemo?”" 
1Kings21:6 Nodwoke niya, “Akuyo nikech nakwayo Naboth ja-Jezreel ni mondo ang’iew puothe mar mzabibu, to ka ok odwar pesa to mondo awilne gi puodho machielo. To nokwera ni ok onyal miya puothe.”" 
1Kings21:7 Jezebel chiege nowachone ni, “Donge inie ruodh Israel? A malo, ichiem kendo ibed mamor. Abiro miyi puoth mzabibu mar Naboth ja-Jezreel.”" 
1Kings21:8 Omiyo Jezebel nondiko barupe gi nying Ahab, modinogi gi alama mar ruoth; mi noorogi ni jodongo kod joma ogen modak e dala achiel gi Naboth." 
1Kings21:9 Weche mane ondiko e barupego e magi: “Chikuru chieng’ ma ji onego tueye chiemo, kendo uket Naboth obed e nyim ji e kom moyiedhi." 
1Kings21:10 Eka uket ji ariyo macheje obed momanyore kode mondo odonjne, ka giwacho ni oseyanyo Nyasaye kod ruoth bende. Eka ugole oko, ugoye gi kite nyaka otho.”" 
1Kings21:11 Mi jodongo gi joma ogen mag dalano mane odak machiegni gi Naboth notimo kaka Jezebel nonyisogi e barupe mane ooronigi. 
1Kings21:12 Ne gichiko chieng’ ma ji onego otueye chiemo, kendo ne giketo Naboth e kom moyiedhi e nyim ji." 
1Kings21:13 Ji ariyo macheje nodonjo, mobet momanyore kode. Eka ne gidonjo ni Naboth e nyim ji duto, ka giwacho niya, “Naboth noyanyo Nyasaye kod ruoth bende.” Omiyo ji nogole oko, kendo ne gigoye gi kite nyaka otho." 
1Kings21:14 Bang’e ne gioro ni Jezebel wach niya, “Osego Naboth gi kite, kendo osetho.”" 
1Kings21:15 Kane Jezebel owinjo ni osego Naboth gi kite, kendo osetho, nowacho ni Ahab niya, “Dhiyo, ikaw puoth mzabibu mane Naboth ja-Jezreel odagi ng’iewo kodi, nikech koro osetho.”" 
1Kings21:16 Kane Ahab owinjo ni Naboth osetho, nodhi mondo okaw puotheno." 
1Kings21:17 To wach Ruoth Nyasaye nobiro ni Elija ja-Tishbe niya," 
1Kings21:18 “Dhi irom gi Ahab ruodh Israel modak Samaria, nikech enie puoth mzabibu mar Naboth, modhi kawo." 
1Kings21:19 To wachne ni Ruoth Nyasaye owacho kama: ‘Kara iseneko kendo yeko?’ Eka imed nyise ni Ruoth Nyasaye owacho niya, ‘Kama nyocha guogi onang’oe remb Naboth, ema nonang’ie mari bende!’ ”" 
1Kings21:20 Ahab nowacho ni Elija niya, “Yaye, jasika, kara isenwang’a?” Nodwoke ni “Ee, asenwang’i, nikech isechiwori mar timo gik ma Ruoth Nyasaye okwero." 
1Kings21:21 Omiyo Ruoth Nyasaye owacho niya, ‘Abiro kelo masira kuomi. Abiro yweyi oko, kendo abiro tieko jodhoodi machwo duto, ma onge kata ng’at achiel ma nodong’ e Israel." 
1Kings21:22 Anami dhoodi chal gi dhood Jeroboam wuod Nebat, kendo gi dhood Baasha wuod Ahija, nikech isemiya mirima, kendo nikech isemiyo jo-Israel obedo joricho." 
1Kings21:23 Jodhoodi mabiro tho e dala, guogi nocham, to mago mabiro tho oko, winy nocham.’ ”" 
1Kings21:24 To kuom Jezebel, Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho niya, “Guogi nocham ringre e Jezreel.”" 
1Kings21:25 Onge ng’at mane ochiwore mar timo gik ma Ruoth Nyasaye okwero kaka Ahab, mane Jezebel chiege chwalo." 
1Kings21:26 Notimo gik makuero chuth, kolamo gik maket kaka jo-Amor ne timo. Jo-Amorgo ema ne Ruoth Nyasaye oriembo mondo owe ni jo-Israel." 
1Kings21:27 Kane Ahab owinjo wechego, noyiecho lepe, morwako pien gugru e dende. Notueyo chiemo, monindo e pien gugru, kendo nodembore koboch." 
1Kings21:28 Mi wach Ruoth Nyasaye nobiro ni Elija ja-Tishbe niya," 
1Kings21:29 “Bende ineno kaka Ahab odembore e nyima? Ok abi kelo masira e ndalone, nikech osebedo modembore e nyima kamano, to abiro kelo masira e ode mana e ndalo wuode.”" 
1Kings22:1 Higni adek nokadho ka lweny onge e kind jo-Aram gi jo-Israel. 
1Kings22:2 To e higa mar adek, Jehoshafat ruodh Juda nolimo ruodh Israel." 
1Kings22:3 Ruodh Israel nopenjo jodonge ni, “Donge ung’eyo ni Ramoth-gilead en dalawa? To waling’ nadi mak wadhi wakawe kuom ruodh Aram?”" 
1Kings22:4 Eka nopenjo Jehoshafat niya, “Iyie dhi kodwa mondo waked gi jo-Ramoth-gilead?” Jehoshafat nodwoko ruodh Israel niya, “Ayie! Joga e jogi, kendo faresena e fareseni.”" 
1Kings22:5 Eka Jehoshafat nowacho ni ruodh Israel niya, “To mokwongo onego wapenj Ruoth Nyasaye wach.”" 
1Kings22:6 Omiyo ruodh Israel nochoko jonabi ma dirom mia ang’wen, mopenjogi niya, “Adhi aked gi jo-Ramoth-gilead, koso awe?” Ne gidwoke niya, “Dhiyo, nikech Ruoth Nyasaye biro miyi dalano.”" 
1Kings22:7 To Jehoshafat nopenje niya, “Janabi moro mar Ruoth Nyasaye onge ka, ma dwapenj wach koso?”" 
1Kings22:8 Ruodh Israel nodwoke ni, “Ee, ng’at achiel pod odong’ ma dipenjnwa Ruoth Nyasaye wach, en Mikaya wuod Imla.” To Jehoshafat nowachone ni, “Kik iwuo kamano.”" 
1Kings22:9 Eka ruodh Israel noluongo jatichne moro, mowachone niya, “Dhi piyo iluong Mikaya wuod Imla.”" 
1Kings22:10 Koro noyudo ka ruodh Israel gi Jehoshafat ruodh Juda obet e alap manie dhoranga Samaria, ka ng’ato ka ng’ato nie kom duong’ne, korwako lawe mar ruoth, kendo jonabi duto ne koro wach e nyimgi." 
1Kings22:11 Zedekia wuod Kenaana nosethedho tunge mag nyinyo morwako, mi nowacho niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye owacho kama: ‘Ibiro chwowo jo-Aram gi tungegi, nyaka itiekgi.’ ”" 
1Kings22:12 Jonabi duto bende nokoro mana wach machal kamano, ka giwacho niya, “Dhi Ramoth-gilead mondo ilo. Ruoth Nyasaye biro chiwe e lweti.”" 
1Kings22:13 Jaote mane odhi luongo Mikaya nowachone niya, “Jonabi duto osekoro wach nyalhodia, ka giwacho ni gima ber biro timore ni ruoth. In bende yie ikor wach maber kaka gisekorono.”" 
1Kings22:14 To Mikaya nodwoke ni, “Akuong’ora gi nying Ruoth Nyasaye ni gima Ruoth Nyasaye biro wacho ema nawachi.”" 
1Kings22:15 Kane Mikaya ochopo e nyim ruoth, ruoth nopenje niya, “Koso wawe?” Nodwoke niya, “Dhi mondo ilo! Ruoth Nyasaye biro chiwe e lweti.”" 
1Kings22:16 Ruoth nowachone ni, “Asesiemi nyadidi ni kik iwach miriambo, to mak mana adiera kende e nying Ruoth Nyasaye!”" 
1Kings22:17 Mikaya nowacho niya, “Naneno jo-Isarel duto koke e gode, ka rombe maonge jakwath; kendo nawinjo ka Ruoth Nyasaye wacho niya, ‘Jogi onge gi wuon-gi, we mondo gidog e miechgi gi kue.’ ”" 
1Kings22:18 Ruodh Israel nowacho ni Jehoshafat niya, “Donge nawachoni ni jali ok dikorna wach maber, to mana marach?”" 
1Kings22:19 Mikaya nowacho niya, “Koro winj wach Ruoth Nyasaye. Naneno Ruoth Nyasaye kobet e kom duong’ne, kendo ka oganda polo ochung’ e bathe koni gi koni." 
1Kings22:20 Ruoth Nyasaye nopenjogi niya, ‘Ere ng’ama diho Ahab odhi Ramoth-gilead mondo otho kuno?’ To roho ka roho nochiwo parone," 
1Kings22:21 nyaka roho moro nosudo mochung’ e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, kowacho niya, ‘An ema abiro hoye.’" 
1Kings22:22 Ruoth Nyasaye nopenje niya, ‘Ere kaka ibiro hoye?’ Nodwoke niya, ‘Abiro dhi bet roho mar miriambo e dho jonabini duto.’ Ruoth Nyasaye noyie ni, ‘Ee, in ema ibiro hoye, kendo iniloye. Dhiyo itim kamano.’" 
1Kings22:23 Koro sani Ruoth Nyasaye oseketo roho mar miriambo e dho jonabini duto. To kata kamano Ruoth Nyasaye oseng’adoni buch masira.” 
1Kings22:24 Eka Zedekia wuod Kenaana nosudo machiegnii, mothalo lemb Mikaya, kapenje niya, “Ere kaka Roho mar Ruoth Nyasaye ne nyalo a kuoma mondo owuo kodi?”" 
1Kings22:25 Mikaya nodwoke niya, “Chieng’ ma inidonji e ot maiye mondo ipondie, eka ining’e!”" 
1Kings22:26 Ruodh Israel nowacho ni, “Makuru Mikaya, uter ir Amon jaduong’ Samaria, kod Joash wuod ruoth, mondo girite." 
1Kings22:27 Wachnigiuru niya, ‘Ruoth owacho ni mondo uket ng’atni e od tuech, kendo umiye mana kuon abang’a gi pi kende, nyaka aduog ka angima.’ ”" 
1Kings22:28 To Mikaya nowacho niya, “Kiduogo kingima, to kara Ruoth Nyasaye ok osemiyo awuoyo!”" 
1Kings22:29 Kamano ruodh Israel gi Jehoshafat nodhi Ramoth-gilead. 
1Kings22:30 Ruodh Israel nowacho ni Jehoshfat niya, “Kwadhi e lweny, to abiro rwako lewni moko mondo kik ji ng’eya, to in rwak lepi mag ruoth.” Kamano ruodh Israel noloko kite, modhi e lweny." 
1Kings22:31 To ruodh Aram nosechiko jodong lweny piero adek gariyo ma jotend gechene ni kik giked gi ng’at moro amora, to mak mana ruodh Israel kende." 
1Kings22:32 Kane jotend geche oneno Jehoshafat, ne giwacho niya, “Nyaka bed ni jal cha e ruodh Israel.” Ne gilokore ire mondo giked kode, to Jehoshafat nogiyo." 
1Kings22:33 Kane jotend geche oneno ni ok en ruodh Israel, ne giweyo lawe." 
1Kings22:34 To ng’at moro nodiro asere, morodhno gi kor ruodh Israel e kind chumbe mag lweny ma norwako. Mi ruoth nowacho ni jariemb gache niya, “Wichri, igola e lweny, nikech ahinyora malit.”" 
1Kings22:35 Lweny nomedore chieng’no, to ne giyiengo ruoth e gache kochomo jo-Aram, kendo rembe nochuer aming’a e gari nyaka notho godhiambo." 
1Kings22:36 Kane chieng’ dwaro podho, nogo milome ni oganda lweny niya, “Ng’ato ka ng’ato mondo odog thurgi," 
1Kings22:37 nikech ruoth osetho.” Ne gidwoko ringre ruoth Samaria, mi giyike kuno." 
1Kings22:38 Ne gilwoko geche e dho yawo mar Samaria, kuma mon ma jochode ne lwokoree, mi guogi nonang’o rembe. Kamano wach Ruoth Nyasaye nochopo kare." 
1Kings22:39 Weche moko mag Ahab, gi timbene duto, kod ode mane olos gi lak liech, gi mier duto ma nogero, ondik e Kitap Weche mag Ndalo mag Ruodhi mag Israel." 
1Kings22:40 Kane Ahab otho, Ahazia wuode nodoko ruoth kare." 
1Kings22:41 E higa mar ang’wen mar loch Ahab ruodh Israel, Jehoshafat wuod Asa nodoko ruodh Juda." 
1Kings22:42 Nokawo loch ka en jahigni piero adek gabich, kendo norito piny kuom higni piero ariyo gabich kodak Jerusalem. Min mare ne nyinge Azuba nyar Shilhi." 
1Kings22:43 Jehoshafat noluwo timbe duto mag Asa wuon mare, ma ok oweyo kata achiel, kendo timbene ne long’o e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye. To hembko mane ni kuonde moting’ore ne ok okethi, kendo ji ne pod timo misengni kendo wang’o ubani kuondego." 
1Kings22:44 Jehoshafat bende notimo winjruok gi ruodh Israel. 
1Kings22:45 Timbe moko duto mag Jehoshafat, gi tekone kod lwenjene ondik e Kitap Weche mag Ndalo mag Ruodhi mag Juda." 
1Kings22:46 Noriembo joterruok mag kuonde lemo mane otony e ndalo Asa wuon mare, mondo kik gidag e pinye." 
1Kings22:47 Ndalogo Edom ne onge gi ruoth, to jaduong’ moro ema nobet jatelo kar ruoth." 
1Kings22:48 Jehoshafat nohondho yiedhi madongo machal gi mago mane dhi Tarshish, mondo oomgo dhahabu Ofir. To ne ok gidhi, nikech ne gibarore mana Ezion-giber." 
1Kings22:49 Eka Ahazia wuod Ahab nokwayo Jehoshafat niya, “Yie mondo jowa odhi gi jou e yiedhi mau.” To nodagi." 
1Kings22:50 Jehoshafat notho, moyike but kwerene e dala Daudi kwar mare. Jehoram wuode nodoko ruoth kare." 
1Kings22:51 E higa mar apar gabiriyo mar loch Jehoshafat ruodh Juda, Ahazia wuod Ahab nodoko ruodh Israel kuom higni ariyo." 
1Kings22:52 Notimo gik ma Ruoth Nyasaye okwero, koluwo timbe wuon mare, gi timbe min mare, kod timbe Jeroboam wuod Nebat, ma nomiyo jo-Israel obedo joricho." 
1Kings22:53 Notiyo ni Baal, kendo nolame, komiyo Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel mirima mana kaka wuon mare notimo." 
2Kings1:1 Kane Ahab osetho, jo-Moab nodagi bet e bwo loch Israel." 
2Kings1:2 Chieng’ moro Ahazia nogore piny koa e dirisa mar gorofa mar ode man Samaria, mohinyore. Nooro joote mondo odhi openj Baal-zebub nyasach Ekron kata kobiro kwo." 
2Kings1:3 To malaika mar Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Elija ja-Tishbe niya, “Dhi irom gi joote mag ruodh Samaria, kendo ipenjgi nia, ‘Nyasaye onge e Israel ka koso, momiyo udhi mana ir Baalzebub mondo upenje wach?" 
2Kings1:4 Emomiyo Ruoth Nyasaye owacho ni ok nikwo, to initho mana e kitandani minindoeno.’ ”" 
2Kings1:5 Kane jootego odok ir ruoth, nopenjogi gimomiyo giduogo." 
2Kings1:6 Ne gidwoke niya, “Ng’at moro oromo kodwa, mowachonwa ni mondo wadog ir ruoth ma noorowa, wanyise ni Ruoth Nyasaye owacho kama: ‘Nyasaye onge Israel koso, momiyo ioro ji ir Baalzebub nyasach Ekron mondo ipenje wach? Kuom mano ok nikwo, to initho mana e kitanda minindoeno.’ ”" 
2Kings1:7 Ruoth nopenjogi niya, “Jal moromo kodu, monyisou wechego, chal nadi?”" 
2Kings1:8 Ne gidwoke ni, “Norwako law ma rayier, kendo notweyo okanda mar del e nungone.” Ahazia nowacho ni, “Kara en Elija ja-Tishbe.”" 
2Kings1:9 Eka ruoth nooro jatend lweny mane nigi jolweny piero abich mondo odhi ir Elija. Jatelono noyude kobet piny ewi got moro. Nowachone niya, “Ng’at Nyasaye, ruoth owacho ni mondo ilor!”" 
2Kings1:10 To Elija nodwoke ni, “Ka an ng’at Nyasaye adier, to mach mondo oa e polo, otieki kaachiel gi jogi piero abichgo.” Eka mach noa e polo motieko jalo gi joge." 
2Kings1:11 Ruoth nochako ooro ni Elija jatelo machielo kod joge piero abich. Jalo nodhi ir Elija, mowachone niya, “Ng’at Nyasaye, ruoth owacho ni mondo ilor piyo!”" 
2Kings1:12 To Elija nodwoke ni, “Ka an ng’at Nyasaye adier, to mach mondo oa e polo, otieki kaachiel gi jogi.” Mi mach noa e polo, motieke gi joge." 
2Kings1:13 Eka ruoth nooro jatelo mar adek kod joge piero abich. Jatelono nodhi, mogoyo chonge piny e nyim Elija, kosaye niya, “Yaye ng’at Nyasaye, akwayi ni mondo ngimana kod ngima ji piero abichgi obedni ka gima igeno e chunyi." 
2Kings1:14 Wasewinjo kaka mach noa e polo monego jotelo ariyogo, kaachiel gi jogi mag lweny, to koro mondo ngimana obedni ka gima igeno e chunyi.”" 
2Kings1:15 Eka malaika mar Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Elija niya, “Lor kode, kik iluore.” Omiyo nolor, mi ne gidhi kode ir ruoth." 
2Kings1:16 Eka Elija nowacho ni ruoth niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye owacho kama: ‘Ok nikwo, to initho mana e kitanda minindoeno, nikech nioro joote ir Baalzebub nyasach Ekron mondo ipenje wach.’ ”" 
2Kings1:17 Omiyo Ahazia notho kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nomiyo Elija owacho. Joram owadgi nodoko ruoth kare e higa mar ariyo mar loch Jehoram wuod Jehoshafat, ruodh Juda, nikech Ahazia ne onge gi wuowi." 
2Kings1:18 Timbe moko duto mag Ahazia ondik e kitap Weche mag Ndalo mag Ruodhi mag Israel. 
2Kings2:1 E ndalo mane Ruoth Nyasaye dwaro tero Elija e polo gi kalausi, noyudo ka Elija gi Elisha josewuok Gilgal." 
2Kings2:2 Elija nowacho ni Elisha niya, “Yie idong’ ka, nikech Ruoth Nyasaye oora nyaka Bethel.” To Elisha nodwoke ni, “Gi nying Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo gi nyingi iwuon, ok naweyi.” Omiyo ne gidhi nyaka Bethel." 
2Kings2:3 To oganda jonabi ma nodak Bethel nowuok modhi ir Elisha, mopenje niya, “Bende ing’eyo ni Ruoth Nyasaye biro kawo jaduong’ni kawuono?” Nodwokogi niya, “Ee, ang’eyo kamano, to ling’uru.”" 
2Kings2:4 Elija nowacho ni Elisha niya, “Yie idong’ ka, nikech Ruoth Nyasaye oora nyaka Jeriko.” To nodwoke niya, “Gi nying Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo gi nyingi iwuon, ok naweyi.” Omiyo ne gidhi nyaka Jeriko." 
2Kings2:5 Oganda jonabi mane odak Jeriko nosudo machiegni gi Elisha, mopenje niya, “Bende ing’eyo ni Ruoth Nyasaye biro kawo jaduong’ni kawuono?” Nodwokogi niya, “Ee, ang’eyo kamano, to ling’uru.”" 
2Kings2:6 Eka Elija nowachone niya, “Yie idong’ ka, nikech Ruoth Nyasaye oora nyaka aora Jordan.” To nodwoke niya, “Gi nying Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo gi nyingi iwuon, ok naweyi.” Omiyo ji ariyogo nodhi adhiya." 
2Kings2:7 Ji piero abich kuom oganda jonabi bende nodhi, mochung’ kama ochwalore kodgi, ka ji ariyogo chung’ e dho aora." 
2Kings2:8 Eka Elija nobano lawe mar abola, mochwadogo pi, mi pi nopogore koni gi koni, eka ji ariyogo noyudo thuolo mar ng’ado aora kotwo." 
2Kings2:9 Kane giseidho loka, Elija nowacho ni Elisha niya, “Yier gima datimni, kapok okawa kuomi.” Elisha nokone ni, “Akwayi mondo ayud pok ariyo mag teko ma in go.”" 
2Kings2:10 Elija nodwoke ni, “Ikwayo gima tek, to kata kamano, kinena sa mikawa kuomi, to gima ikwayo notimreni. To ka ok inena, to ok notimreni.”" 
2Kings2:11 To kane pod giwuotho, kendo giwuoyo, gari mar mach gi farese mag mach nobiro, mopogogi, kendo Elija noidho gi kalausi nyaka e polo." 
2Kings2:12 Elisha noneno gima notimore, mokok niya, “Wuora, wuora, aneno geche Israel kod joidh faresene!” Kamano Elija nolal e wang’e. Eka Elisha noyiecho lepe owuon kidienje ariyo." 
2Kings2:13 Nokwanyo law abola mar Elija mane olwar piny, kendo nodok mochung’ e dho aora Jordan." 
2Kings2:14 Nochwado pi gi law Elijano kowacho niya, “Ere Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Elija?” Kane osechwado pi kamano, pi nopogore koni gi koni, mi nong’ado aora." 
2Kings2:15 Kane oganda jonabi modak Jeriko onene gi kuma bor, ne giwacho niya, “Teko mane Elija nigo, koro odok ni Elisha.” Ne gidhi romone, mi gikulorene," 
2Kings2:16 ka giwachone niya, “Wan gi joma rateke piero abich. Yie mondo gidhi gidwar jaduong’ni cha, dipo ka Roho mar Ruoth Nyasaye otere, moweye ewi got, kata e hoho moro.” Nodwokogi ni, “Kik uorgi.”" 
2Kings2:17 To ne gikwaye kidhuku kidhuku, nyaka wiye nokuot, mowachnigi niya, “Ara, orgiuru.” Omiyo ne gioro ji piero abich, momanyo Elija kuom ndalo adek, to ne ok giyude." 
2Kings2:18 Ne giduogo Jeriko kuma Elisha ne pod ritogie, mi nowachonigi niya, “Donge nakwerou ni kik udhi?”" 
2Kings2:19 Jo-Jeriko nowacho ni Elisha niya, “Jaduong’ neye kaka dalawa oger kama ber, mak mana pi ema ok ber, kendo lowo bende rach.”" 
2Kings2:20 Nodwokogi niya, “Kelnauru agulu manyien, kendo ketieuru kado.” Mi ne gitimo kamano." 
2Kings2:21 Eka nodhi e soko, moboloe kado, kowacho niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye owachoo kama: Aseloso pigni maber; chakre kawuono ok nokel tho, kendo ok nomon piny chiek.”" 
2Kings2:22 Kamano pigno osiko ka ber nyaka chil kawuono, kaka Elisha nowacho." 
2Kings2:23 Elisha noa kuno, modhi Bethel to kane pod enie yo koidho thur, rawere moko nowuok e dalano, monyiere, ka giyanye ni, “Rabondoni, dhi adhiya! Rabondoni, dhi adhiya!”" 
2Kings2:24 Nogoyo machiemo monenogi, kendo nokuong’ogi e nying Ruoth Nyasaye. Ondiegi ma mon ariyo noa e bungu, mokidho rawere piero ang’wen gariyo kuomgi." 
2Kings2:25 Eka Elisha noa kuno, modhi nyaka got Karmel. To koa Karmel, nodok Samaria." 
2Kings3:1 E higa mar apar gaboro mar loch Jehoshafat ruodh Juda, Joram wuod Ahab nodoko ruodh Israel morito piny kuom higni apar gariyo, kodak Samaria." 
2Kings3:2 Timbene ne richo e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, to ok marom gi mago mane wuon mare gi min mare otimo, nikech nogolo siro mar Baal mane wuon mare oloso." 
2Kings3:3 Kata kamano notuere e timbe mokwer mane Jeroboam wuod Nebat omiyogo jo-Israel obedo joricho. Ne ok oweyogi kata matin. 
2Kings3:4 Mesha ruodh Moab ne japith rombe, kendo higa ka higa nogolo rombe alufu mia achiel kod piende imbe alufu mia achiel." 
2Kings3:5 To kane Ahab otho, ruodh Moab nodagi bedo e bwo loch ruodh Israel." 
2Kings3:6 Omiyo ruoth Joram nowuok Samaria, mochoko jo-Israel duto." 
2Kings3:7 Nooro wach ni Jehoshafat ruodh Juda niya, “Ruodh Moab piem koda. Diyie wanywak ni jo-Moab koso?” Jehoshafat nodwoke ni, “Ayie! Joga e jogi, kendo faresena e fareseni.”" 
2Kings3:8 Eka nopenje ni, “Dwaluw yo mane?” Joram nodwoke ni, “Waluw yor thim Edom.”" 
2Kings3:9 Eka ruodh Israel gi ruodh Juda kod ruodh Edom ne jodhi kanyakla. Ne gitieko ndalo abiriyo ka gilworo kuma bor, nyaka pi norumo ni jolweny kod jamni mane gin go." 
2Kings3:10 Eka ruodh Israel noywak, kawacho niya, “Yaye, wan ruodhi adekgi, hapwa rach, nikech Ruoth Nyasaye osekelowa ka mondo oketwa e lwet jo-Moab!”" 
2Kings3:11 To Jehoshafat nopenjo niya, “Bende nitie janabi mar Ruoth Nyasaye ka, manyalo penjonwa Ruoth Nyasaye wach?” Achiel kuom jotich ruodh nodwoke niya, “Elisha wuod Shafat, mane tiyo ni Elija, ni ka.”" 
2Kings3:12 Jehoshafat nowacho niya, “Ero, jalo e ng’at man gi wach Ruoth Nyasaye.” Mi ruodh Israel gi Jehoshafat kod ruodh Edom ne jodhi ir Elisha." 
2Kings3:13 Elisha nopenjo ruodh Israel niya, “An gang’o kodi? Dhiyo ir jokor weche ma wuoru gi meru ne dhiye!” To ruodh Israel nokwere ni, “Ok kamano nimar Ruoth Nyasaye ema osechokowa kanyakla, mondo oketwa e lwet jo-Moab.”" 
2Kings3:14 Elisha nodwoke niya, “Akuong’ora gi nying Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto ma atiyone, ni da ni ok ageno Jehoshafat ruodh Juda, to da ok adewi, kata ng’iyi da ok ang’iyi." 
2Kings3:15 Kata kamano, kelna jago thum.” Kane jago thum gocho, teko mar Ruoth Nyasaye nolwar kuom Elisha," 
2Kings3:16 mowacho niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye owacho ni mondo ukuny buche mang’eny e holoni," 
2Kings3:17 nikech owacho ni ok unune yamo kata koth, to pi biro pong’o holo, mondo umodhi kaachiel gi jambu." 
2Kings3:18 To mano en gima yot ni Ruoth Nyasaye, nimar jo-Moab bende obiro keto e lwetu." 
2Kings3:19 Ubiro loyo mier mochiel gi ohinga, kod mier mabeyo duto, kendo unutong’ yien mabeyo duto. Unudin sokni, kendo unuketh puothe mabeyo duto gi kite.”" 
2Kings3:20 Kamano, kinyne gokinyi kar sa mitimoe misango, pi nobiro koa yo Edom, nyaka gweng’no duto nolokore pi lilo." 
2Kings3:21 Kane jo-Moab duto owinjo ni ruodhigo obiro mondo oked kodgi, ji duto mane nyalo ting’o gi lwenje noyworo ni lweny, mi giriedo e tong’ pinygi." 
2Kings3:22 Kane gichiew gokinyi, chieng’ norieny e pi, mi ne gineno pi momanyore kodgi kamil makwar ka remo." 
2Kings3:23 Omiyo ne giwacho niya, “Macha remo! Nyaka bed ni ruodhigo nende okedo kendgi, monegore! Koro wadhi wayeki!”" 
2Kings3:24 To kane gichopo kama jo-Israel ojotie, jo-Israel nowuok momonjogi, mi ne giringo, ka jo-Israel lawogi kendo negogi." 
2Kings3:25 Jo-Israel noketho miech Moab, kendo ng’ato ka ng’ato nodiro kidi e puothe duto mabeyo, nyaka kite nopong’ogi. Ne gidino sokni duto, kendo ne gitong’o yien mabeyo duto. Dala Kir-hareseth kende ema nodong’ ni jo-Moab, to jodir orujre nolwore mobaye." 
2Kings3:26 Kane ruodh Moab oneno ni lweny dwaro loye, nowuok gi jo-ligangla mia abiriyo, kotemo mwomo nyaka ir ruodh Aram, mondo otony, to notamogi." 
2Kings3:27 Eka nokawo wuode makayo, mane onego bed ruoth kare, mi onego ewi ohinga, mowang’o ka liswa. Kuom mano mirima maduong’ nomako jo-Israel, kendo ne giweyo kedo kode, mi gidok e pinygi." 
2Kings4:1 Chieng’ moro, dhako moro ma chi liel, ma chwore ne achiel kuom oganda jonabi, notero ywak ir Elisha, kawachone niya, “Chwora osetho, kendo ing’eyo kaka ne en ng’at ma oluoro Ruoth Nyasaye. To jabendho osebiro mondo okaw nyithinda ariyo, olok wasumbe.”" 
2Kings4:2 Elisha nopenje niya, “Datim ang’o? Nyisa gima in go e ot.” Nodwoke niya, “Aonge gi gimoro, mak mana mo matin.”" 
2Kings4:3 Eka Elisha nowachone niya, “Dhiyo e gweng’u, ihol agulini mang’eny kuom jowadu." 
2Kings4:4 Bang’e idonj e odi, ilorrie kaachiel gi yawuoti. Eka iol morno e agulinigo, kendo ka moro osepong’, to iket tenge.”" 
2Kings4:5 Omiyo dhakono nodhi, molorore e ode kaachiel gi yawuote. Ne gigamone agulinigo, to en nooloe mo." 
2Kings4:6 Ne gimedo timo kamano nyaka agulini duto opong’. Omiyo kane okwayo wuode mondo ogamne moro, to wuode nodwoke ni, “Onge modong’.” E sa nogono mo nochok." 
2Kings4:7 Eka dhakono nodhi, monyiso ng’at Nyasaye gima osetimore. Elisha nodwoke niya, “Dhiyo, ihon morno, ichulgo gopeni, to modong’, ukonyrugo gi yawuoti.”" 
2Kings4:8 Chieng’ moro, Elisha nodhi Shunem, kuma dhako moro ma jamoko nodakie. Dhakono nochune mondo ochiem e ode. Bang’ mano, kinde duto mane Elisha luwoe yorno, nothoro rawo kanyo mondo ochiemie." 
2Kings4:9 Mano omiyo dhakono nowacho ni chwore niya, “Aneno ni jal makadho ka pileni en ng’at Nyasaye." 
2Kings4:10 Wachuogne ot moro matin ewi tado, kendo waketnee kitanda gi mesa gi kom kod taya, mondo pile kobiro limowa to oyue kanyo.”" 
2Kings4:11 Chieng’ moro, kane oyudo Elisha orawo kanyo, nodonjo e odno moyueyo." 
2Kings4:12 Bang’e nowacho ni Gehazi jatichne niya, “Luong chi Shunem.” Gehazi noluongo dhakono, mobiro ochung’ e nyim Elisha." 
2Kings4:13 Eka Elisha nowacho ni Gehazi mondo openje niya, “Isekawo chandruok ahinya mar ritowa maber, to koro ere gima dwatimni? Donge dibedie gi ywak moro ma dwater ni ruoth kata jatend jolweny?” Nodwoko ni, “Ooyo, adak kod jowa.”" 
2Kings4:14 Elisha nopenjo kendo niya, “Dwatimne ang’o?” Gehazi nowacho niya, “Oonge gi wuowi, kendo chwore oti.”" 
2Kings4:15 Eka Elisha nowacho niya, “Luonge oduogi.” Kane oseluong dhakono, nobiro mochung’ e dhoot." 
2Kings4:16 Elisha nowachone niya, “Due makama, higa mabiro, inibed gi nyathi ma wuowi.” To dhakono nodwoke niya, “Ooyo, ruodha, kik iwuonda!”" 
2Kings4:17 To bang’e nomako ich, monywolo wuowi e ndalo mane Elisha owacho." 
2Kings4:18 Nyathino nodongo, kendo chieng’ moro ne odhi e puodho kuma wuon mare ne nitie gi jokeyo." 
2Kings4:19 Kane en kuno, nochako ywak ni wuon niya, “Wiya bara! Wiya bara!” Wuon mare nowacho ni jatichne moro niya, “Tere ir min.”" 
2Kings4:20 To kane osetere, nobet e tiend min nyaka sa auchiel, aye notho." 
2Kings4:21 Min mare noidho gorofa, mopiele e kitanda ng’at Nyasaye, eka noloro dhoot, mowuok." 
2Kings4:22 Noluongo chwore, mowachone niya, “Adwaro jatich kod kanyna. Ornagi mondo aret adhi ir ng’at Nyasaye, kendo aduog piyo.”" 
2Kings4:23 Chwore nopenje niya, “Ang’o momiyo idwaro dhi ire kawuono? Due pok opor, bende ok en chieng’ Sabato.” Nodwoke ni, “Adhi adhiya.”" 
2Kings4:24 Kane osegawo kanyna, nowacho ni jatichne niya, “Sembe, wadhi! Sembe asemba matek, mak mana ka awachoni ni, we.”" 
2Kings4:25 Mi nowuok modhi got Karmel ir ng’at Nyasaye. Kane ng’at Nyasaye onene gi kuma bor, kobiro, nowacho ni Gehazi jatichne niya, “Ne! Chi Shunem cha biro." 
2Kings4:26 Ring iromne, ipenje ngimane gi ngima mar chwore kod mar wuode.” Dhakono nodwoko Gehazi ni, “Wangima.”" 
2Kings4:27 Kane ochopo e got, nodhi ir ng’at Nyasaye, momako tiende, Gehazi nosudo mondo ogole, to ng’at Nyasaye nowachone niya, “Weye, nimar chunye chandore malit, to Ruoth Nyasaye osepandona wachne, mak onyisa.”" 
2Kings4:28 Dhakono nopenje ni, “An ema nakwayi wuowi koso? Donge nakweri ni kik iwuonda?”" 
2Kings4:29 Elisha nowacho ni Gehazi niya, “Ng’wan lepi, ikaw ludha, kendo ichak wuoth. Kiromo gi ng’ato, to kik imosi, kata ka ng’ato mosi, to kik idwoke, kendo kichopo, to iriw ludha e lela wang’ nyathi.”" 
2Kings4:30 To min nyathi nowachone niya, “Gi nying Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo gi nyingi iwuon, ok naweyi.” Omiyo Elisha nochung’ modhi kode." 
2Kings4:31 Gehazi notelonigi, kendo kochopo kuno, noketo luth e lela wang’ nyathi, to nyathi noling’ thi, ma ok otimo gimoro manyiso ni ongima. Omiyo Gehazi nodok romo ni Elisha, monyise ni nyathi ok ochier." 
2Kings4:32 Kane Elisha ochopo e ot, noyudo nyathi kotho e kitandane." 
2Kings4:33 Omiyo nodonjo, moloro dhoot mondo obed kende gi nyathi, kendo nolamo Ruoth Nyasaye." 
2Kings4:34 Eka noriere kuom nyathi, koketo dhoge e dho nyathi, wang’e kuom wang’ nyathi, kendo lwete kuom lwet nyathi. Kane osetimo kamano, ringre nyathi nodoko maliet." 
2Kings4:35 Elisha nochung’ mowuotho koni gi koni e ot dichiel. Eka nodok, moriere kuom nyathi kendo, mi nyathi nogir dibiriyo, kendo wang’e noyawore." 
2Kings4:36 Elisha noluongo Gehazi, mowachone niya, “Luong chi Shunem.” Mi noluonge. Kane obiro, Elisha nowachone niya, “Kaw wuodi.”" 
2Kings4:37 Dhakono nodonjo, mogoyo chonge piny e tiende, kokulo wiye piny. Eka nokawo wuode, mowuok." 
2Kings4:38 Elisha nodok Gilgal. Chieng’ moro kane kech nie piny, Elisha ne ni kod oganda jonabi, kapuonjogi. Nowacho ni jatichne niya, “Ket agulu maduong’ e kendo, ited chiemo ni jonabigi.”" 
2Kings4:39 Ng’at achiel kuom jonabi nodhi ng’ueto, moyudo otangle. Nopono bade kopong’ modokgo irgi. Nobarogi, moologi e agulu, ka ok ong’eyo ni gin ang’o." 
2Kings4:40 Eka notok ni ji mondo ocham. To kane gichako chiemo, ne giywak niya, “Yaye, ng’at Nyasaye, ang’o manie agulu ma negowani?” Mi ne ok ginyal chiemo." 
2Kings4:41 To Elisha nowacho niya, “Kara keluru mogo.” Eka nokiro mogo e agulu, mowacho niya, “Koro tokuru ni ji mondo ochiem.” Mi ne giyudo ni gima rach koro onge e agulu." 
2Kings4:42 Ng’at moro noa Baal-shalisha, mokelo ni ng’at Nyasaye cham manyien e gunia. Ne gin makati piero ariyo mag shairi, kod cham mawidhi. Elisha nowacho ni mondo omigi ji ochamgi." 
2Kings4:43 To jatichne nokone ni, “Ere kaka anyalo miyo ji mia achiel chiemo matin ni?” Elisha nomedo wacho ni, “Migi amiya, nikech Ruoth Nyasaye owacho ni ginichiem, mi chiemo moko nodong’.”" 
2Kings4:44 Omiyo nomiyogi, mi gichiemo, kendo moko nodong’, mana kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho." 
2Kings5:1 Naaman ne jaduong’ lweny mar ruodh Aram, kendo Ruoth Nyasaye nosekonye, komiyo jo-Aram loyo e lweny. Kuom mano, ne en ng’at ma ruodhe ogeno kendo morgo. Bende ne en ng’at maratego ma jachir. To ne en radhoho." 
2Kings5:2 Noyudo ka chiege nigi nyar Israel moro ma jatichne, mane jo-Aram omako kane gimonjo jo-Israel, kaka ne githoro timo." 
2Kings5:3 Nyakono nowacho ni chi Naaman niya, “Mad ruodhwa dhi ir janabi man Samaria! Dothiedh dhohone.”" 
2Kings5:4 Kane Naaman owinjo kamano, nodhi monyiso ruodhe gima nyar Israel owacho." 
2Kings5:5 Ruodh Aram nowachone niya, “Kara dhiyo, abiro ori ir ruodh Israel gi barua.” Naaman nodhi gi fedha moromo kilo mia adek, gi dhahabu moromo kilo apar, kod lewni mabeyo apar." 
2Kings5:6 Barua mane otero ni ruodh Israel nowacho kama: “Kisomo barupani, to ng’e ni aseoroni Naaman jaduong’na mar lweny, mondo ithiedh dhohone.”" 
2Kings5:7 Kane ruodh Israel osomo barua noyiecho lepe, kowacho niya, “An e Nyasaye koso, ma anyalo nego ng’ato kata miye ngima, momiyo jali orona ng’ato mondo athiedh dhohone? Neuru kaka odwaro dhaw kodwa!”" 
2Kings5:8 To kane Elisha, ng’at Nyasaye owinjo kaka ruodh Israel oyiecho lepe, noorone wach niya, “Marang’o iseyiecho lepi? Or jalo ira, mondo ong’e ni kara janabi nitie e Israel.”" 
2Kings5:9 Mi Naaman nodhi gi faresene kod gechene, mochung’ e dhood Elisha." 
2Kings5:10 Elisha noorone jaote niya, “Dhiyo, inyumri dibiriyo e aora Jordan, to dendi biro chango, kendo ibiro pwodhori.”" 
2Kings5:11 To Naaman nokecho, modok kowacho niya, “Nende aparo ni dowuog obi ira, kendo dochung’ koluongo nying Nyasaye ma Nyasache, kendo dorie lwete kuom adhondena mondo othiedhna dhoho." 
2Kings5:12 Donge aore mag Damaski, ma Abana gi Farpa, beyo moloyo aore duto mag Israel? Ok danyumra e aorego mondo achangi?” Bang’e nolokore modhi ka iye owang’." 
2Kings5:13 To jotichne nosudo bute, mopenje niya, “Wuonwa, ka da janabi chiki ni mondo itim gimoro maduong’, donge ditimo? To koro ok ber moloyo kowachoni mana ni mondo inyumri e pi, idok maler?”" 
2Kings5:14 Omiyo nolor modhi onimo e aora Jordan dibiriyo, kaka ng’at Nyasaye nowacho, mi nopwodhore, kendo dende noduogo mapakni ka dend nyathi matin." 
2Kings5:15 Naaman gi joge duto nodok ir ng’at Nyasaye, mochung’ e nyime, kowachone niya, “Koro ang’eyo ni onge Nyasaye kamoro amora mak mana e Israel; omiyo akwayi ni yie ikawie mich moro matin.”" 
2Kings5:16 To nodwoke niya, “Gi nying Ruoth Nyasayee ma atiyone, ok nakaw gimoro.” Nochune mondo okaw, to Elisha nodagi." 
2Kings5:17 Eka Naaman nowachone niya, “Kidagi ni kik amiyi gimoro, to akwayi ni mondo imiya lowo ma dirom kenje ariyo ting’o, nikech chakre kawuono ok abi timo misango ni Nyasaye moro amora, to mak mana ni Ruoth Nyasaye." 
2Kings5:18 To ne nitie gimoro achiel ma Ruoth Nyasaye onego wenae; ruodha pod biro donjo e od Rimon nyasache mondo olem kuro, koyiengore e bada. Obiro kulore e od Rimon, kendo an bende abiro kulora kode, to Ruoth Nyasaye mondo owena kuom timo kamano.”" 
2Kings5:19 Elisha niowachone niya, “Dhiyo gi kue.” To kane Naaman osechwalore matin," 
2Kings5:20 Gehazi ma jatich Elisha ng’at Nyasaye, noparo niya, “Ruodha oseweyo Naaman ma ja-Aram odhi mak okawo mich ma nokelo. Gi nying Ruoth Nyasaye, abiro lawe mondo ayudie gimoro kuome.”" 
2Kings5:21 Omiyo Gehazi nolawo Naaman. Kane Naaman oneno ng’ato kalawe, nolor oa e gari, modhi moromone, kopenje niya, “Ere wach?”" 
2Kings5:22 Gehazi nodwoke niya, “Onge wach, to ruodha oora mondo anyisi ni yawuowi ariyo mag oganda jonabi ochopo sani koa e piny gode mag Efraim. Okwayi mondo imiye fedha moromo kilo piero adek, kod lewni ariyo.”" 
2Kings5:23 Naaman nodwoke niya, “Yie mondo ikaw kilo piero auchiel.” Nochuno Gehazi, momiyo kilo piero auchiel mag fedha e kirope ariyo, kod lewni ariyo. Nomiyo jotichne ariyo mondo oting’gi, ka gitelo e nyim Gehazi." 
2Kings5:24 Kane gichopo e dala, Gehazi nokawo gigo kuomgi, mokano e ot. Eka nomiyogi thuolo, mi gidok." 
2Kings5:25 To kane Gehazi odonjo e ot, mondo oti ni ruodhe. Elisha nopenje niya, “Gehazi, ia kanye?” Nodwoke ni, “Ne ok adhi kamoro.”" 
2Kings5:26 Elisha nokone niya, “Donge chunya nodhi kodi, kane ng’at cha lor a e gache, duogo romoni? Iparo ni ma e kinde mar kawo fedha, gi lewni, gi puothe mzabibu, gi rombe, gi dhok, kod jotich machwo gi mamon koso?" 
2Kings5:27 Omiyo koro dhoho mar Naaman biro maki, kaachiel gi nyikwayi nyaka chieng’” Mi Gehazii noa kanyo kosedoko radhoho, ma dende rachar ka pe." 
2Kings6:1 Oganda mar jonabi nowacho ni Elisha niya, “Kama wadakie kodini tin, wahewo." 
2Kings6:2 We wadhi aora Jordan mondo ng’ato ka ng’ato otong’ yien, wagergo udi.” Nodwoke niya, “Ayie dhiuru.”" 
2Kings6:3 To ng’ato achiel kuomgi nokwayo Elisha ni, “Yie idhi kodwa” Mi noyie," 
2Kings6:4 modhi kodgi. Kane gichopo e aora Jordan, ne gichako tong’o yien." 
2Kings6:5 To kane oyudo ng’at moro tong’o yien, wi leye nolwar e pi, mi noywak kowacho niya, “Ruoth, hapa rach, nikech en le ma aholo.”" 
2Kings6:6 Ng’at Nyasaye nopenje niya, “Olwar gi kanye?” Kane jalo onyise, Elisha nong’ado luth, mobolo kanyono, mi le nolewore." 
2Kings6:7 Elisha nokone ni, “Kawe.” Mi ng’atno notero lwete, mokawe." 
2Kings6:8 Chieng’ moro kane jo-Aram kedo gi jo-Israel, noporo wach gi jotende mag lweny, konyisogi kuma obiro butoe." 
2Kings6:9 To ng’at Nyasaye nooro ni ruodh Israel wach, kanyise niya, “Kik iluw yorno, nikech jo-Aram obuto kuno.”" 
2Kings6:10 Eka ruodh Israel nooro ji kuma ng’at Nyasaye nosenyise. Kamano e kaka Elisha ne thoro timo, omiyo ruoth noresore ndalo mogwarore." 
2Kings6:11 Wachno nothago chuny ruodh Aram ahinya, mi noluongo jodonge, mopenjogi niya, “Dak unyisa ng’atwa ma konyo ruodh Israel?”" 
2Kings6:12 Achiel kuom joge nodwoke niya, “Ruoth, onge ng’atwa moro amora, to mak mana Elisha janabi ema nyiso ruodhgi gik miwacho kata ka in e odi mar nindo.”" 
2Kings6:13 Ruoth nowacho niya, “Dhiuru mondo udwar kuma entie, eka naor ji odhi omake.” Ne ginyise ni, “En Dothan.”" 
2Kings6:14 Omiyo nooro farese gi geche kod oganda lweny maduong’. Ne gichopo kuno gotieno, mi gilworo dalano." 
2Kings6:15 Ka ne ng’at Nyasaye ochiew gokinyi, nowuok oko, moneno oganda lweny man gi farese kod geche kolworo dala. Jatichne nowach niya, “Ruodha, wadiwo! Ti wanatim ang’o?”" 
2Kings6:16 Nodwoke niya, “Kik iluor, nimar jowa ng’eny moloyogi.”" 
2Kings6:17 Eka Elisha nokwayo Ruoth Nyasaye niya, “Asayi, yaw wang’ jali mondo onen.” Ruoth Nyasaye noyawo wang’ wuowino, mi noneno ka got opong’ gi farese kod geche mag mach, ka rito Elisha." 
2Kings6:18 Kane jo-Aram obiro monjo Elisha, nokwayo Ruoth Nyasaye niya, “Lok jogi muofni.” Mi Ruoth Nyasaye nolokogi muofni mana kaka Elisha nokwaye." 
2Kings6:19 Eka Elisha nowachonigi niya, “Ma ok e yo, kendo ok enie dala mudwaro. Luwauru mondo ateru ir ng’at mudwarono.” Eka noterogi nyaka Samaria!" 
2Kings6:20 To kane gidonjo Samaria, Elisha nowacho niya, “A Ruoth Nyasaye, koro yaw wang’gi mondo ginen.” Kamano Ruoth Nyasaye noyawo wang’gi, mi ne gipo ka gin mana e dier Samaria!" 
2Kings6:21 Kane ruodh Israel onenogi, nopenjo Elisha niya,, “Wuonwa, aneggi koso?”" 
2Kings6:22 To nodwoke ni, “Kik ineggi! Bende dineg ji mimako e lweny adier? Migi chiemo mondo gichiem, eka gidog ir ruodhgi.”" 
2Kings6:23 Omiyo nolosonigi chiemo mathoth, to kane gisechiemo kendo gimetho, noweyogi, mi gidok ir ruodhgi. Chakre kanyo, jo-Aram ne ok ochako omonjo jo-Israel." 
2Kings6:24 Bang’ mano, Ben-hadad, ruodh Aram nochoko joge duto mag lweny, modhi olworo Samaria mondo okaw." 
2Kings6:25 Ne gilwore aming’a, nyaka kech maduong’ nomako jo-Samaria. Wi kanyna ning’iewo gi fedha moromo kilo achiel, to ondong’ mar owuoch akuru ning’iewo gi fedha moromo achiel kuom piero ariyo mar kilo." 
2Kings6:26 Chieng’ moro kane ruodh Israel oyudo wuotho ewi ohinga mar dala, dhako moro noywakne kawacho niya, “Yaye ruoth, konya!”" 
2Kings6:27 Ruoth nodwoke niya, “Ka Ruoth Nyasaye ok konyi, an to dakonyi nadi? Dakonyi gi cham, koso gi divai?”" 
2Kings6:28 Eka ruoth nomedo penje ni, “Ang’o machandi?” Nodwoke niya, “Dhako moro nowachona ni mondo achiw wuoda wacham, to kinyne wacham mare." 
2Kings6:29 Omiyo ne watedo wuoda, mwachamo. To kinyne kane awachone ni mondo ochiw wuode wacham, to nayudo kosepande.”" 
2Kings6:30 Kane ruoth owinjo wach dhakono, noyiecho lepe. (Wachno notimore ka ruoth wuotho ewi ohinga, mi ji nong’iye, moneno ni pien gugru ema orwako ei lepe.)" 
2Kings6:31 Nowacho niya, “Nyasaye mondo okweda ka ok ang’ado wi Elisha wuod Shafat oko kawuono!”" 
2Kings6:32 Noyudo ka Elisha obet ewi ode kaachiel gi jodongo. Ruoth nooro jaote ire, to kane pok jaoteno ochopo, Elisha nowacho ni jodongo niya, “Uneno kaka ng’at ma janekno oro ng’ato mondo obi ong’ad wiya oko? Ka jaoteneno ochopo ka, to ulor dhoot matek, nikech ruodhe luwo bang’e machiegni.”" 
2Kings6:33 Kane pod owuoyo kodgi, ruoth nochopo, mowacho niya, “Masirani oa mana kuom Ruoth Nyasaye, omiyo onge tiende, medo rito Ruoth Nyasaye mondo okonywa!”" 
2Kings7:1 To Elisha nowacho niya, “Winjuru wach Ruoth Nyasaye. Ruoth Nyasaye owacho niya, ‘Kiny, kar sa makama, nengo atonga mar mogo mayom nobed otonglo achiel e dhoranga Samaria, kendo atonge ariyo mag shairi bende otonglo achiel.’ ”" 
2Kings7:2 Jaduong’ lweny ma nyagach ruoth nowacho ni ng’at Nyasaye niya, “Bende gini ditimre adier, kata da Ruoth Nyasaye yaw dirise polo?” To nodwoke niya, “Ibiro nene gi wang’i, to ok nichame!”" 
2Kings7:3 Noyudo ka jodhoho ang’wen obet e dhoranga Samaria. Ne gipenjore niya, “Ere gima omiyo warito mondo watho ka?" 
2Kings7:4 Kwadonjo e dala, to kech ni kuno, wabiro tho. Kata kwamedo bet ka, pod wabiro mana tho. Ber wadog ni jo-Aram. Ka ging’wononwa, to wanabed mangima. To kata ka gidagi, bende watho.”" 
2Kings7:5 Omiyo kane chieng’ osepodho, ne giwuok mondo gidhi kuma jo-Aram ojotie. To kane gichopo e dho kambigi, ne gipo ka onge kata ng’at achiel kanyo," 
2Kings7:6 nimar Ruoth Nyasaye nosemiyo oganda jo-Aram owinjo koko mar geche gi farese, machalo oganda maduong’, mi giwacho kendgi niya, “Winjuru! Ruodh Israel osewako ruodhi mag jo-Hiti gi mag jo-Misri mondo obi oked kodwa.”" 
2Kings7:7 Omiyo kar ang’ich welo ne giringo mondo gitony, ka giweyo hembegi gi faresegi kod kenjegi e kambi." 
2Kings7:8 Kuom mano, kane jodhohogo ochopo e dho kambi, ne gidonjo e hema moro, mi gichiemoe kendo gimethoe. Eka ne gipeyo fedha gi dhahabu kod lewni, mi gidhi gipando. Ne gidok kendo ne gipeyo gik mane nie hema machielo. Gigo bende ne gidhi gipando." 
2Kings7:9 Eka ne giwacho kendgi niya, “Yawa! Ok watim maber. Ma en odiechieng’ mar mor, to waling’ aling’a nadi? Kwagalore kama nyaka piny oru, to wabiro neno masira. Omiyo koro wadhiuru mondo wanyis jood ruoth gima otimore.”"
