2Kings7:10 Mi ne gidok, kendo ne giluongo jorit ranga dala, ka giwachonigi niya, “Nende wachopo e kambi mar jo-Aram, to ne ok waneno ng’ato, kata winjo dwol moro ne ok wawinjo, mak mana hembe gi farese kod kenje motue e loyegi.”" 
2Kings7:11 Eka jorit rangach nogoyo koko, mi wach noter ni jood ruoth." 
2Kings7:12 Ruoth nochiew gotieno, mowacho ni jodonge mag lweny niya, “Winjuru gima jo-Aram dwaro timonwa. Ging’eyo ni wadenyo, omiyo gisewuok e kambigi, to gipondo mana e bungu, ka giparo ni gibiro makowa kwawuok, eka gidonj e dalawa ka.”" 
2Kings7:13 To achiel kuom jodonge nowacho niya, “Yie mondo ji moko odhi gi farese abich modong’, nikech farese duto biro tho mana kaka jo-Israel mang’eny osetho. We waorgi mondo wane gima timore.”" 
2Kings7:14 Omiyo ne giluongo joidh farese ariyo, mi ruoth noorogi mondo giluw bang’ oganda lweny mar jo-Aram, kowachonigi niya, “Dhiuru, une gima otimore.”" 
2Kings7:15 Kuom mano, ne giluwo jo-Aram nyaka aora Jordan, mi giyudo lewni kod gik moko mang’eny mane jo-Aram owito e yo, ka gireto nikech kibaji. Eka jootego nodok, monyiso ruoth gima ne gineno." 
2Kings7:16 Omiyo ji duto nowuok, moyako kambi jo-Aram, kendo atonga mar mogo mayom ning’iewo otonglo achiel, kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho." 
2Kings7:17 Ruoth noketo jaduong’ lweny ma nyagache cha mondo obed jatend jorit rangach, to ji nonyone piny e dhorangach, motho, mana kaka ng’at Nyasaye nowacho, chieng’ mane ruoth obiro ire." 
2Kings7:18 (Ng’at Nyasaye nosewacho ni ruoth niya, “Kiny kar sa makama, nengo atonge ariyo mag shairi nobed otonglo achiel, kendo nengo atonga mar mogo mayom bende otonglo achiel.”" 
2Kings7:19 Jaduong’ lweny cha nosewacho ni ng’at Nyasaye niya, “Bende gini ditimre adier, kata da Ruoth Nyasaye yaw dirise polo?” To Elisha nosedwoke niya, “Ibiro neno gi wang’i to ok inichame.”" 
2Kings7:20 Kendo kamano e kaka notimorene, nikech ji ne onyone e dhorangach, motho.)" 
2Kings8:1 Elisha nosenyiso dhako mane ochierone wuode cha niya, “Dar gi joodi, udhi udag kamoro amora ma unyalo yudoe thuolo, nikech Ruoth Nyasaye biro kelo kech e piny kuom higni abiriyo.”" 
2Kings8:2 Kamano dhakono nodhi motimo kaka ng’at Nyasaye nowachone. Nodar gi joode modhi odak e piny jo-Filistia kuom higni abiriyo. 
2Kings8:3 Kane higni abiriyogo oserumo, dhakono noduogo koa e piny jo-Filistia, mi nodhi mondo okwa ruoth odwokne ode gi puothe." 
2Kings8:4 To noyudo ka ruoth penjo Gehazi jatich ng’at Nyasaye ni mondo onyise gik madongo duto ma Elisha osetimo. 
2Kings8:5 Kane pod Gehazi nyiso ruoth kaka Elisha nochiero ng’at motho, nopo ka min wuowi mane ochierono obiro, mokwayo ruoth mondo odwokne ode gi puothene. Mi Gehazi nowacho ni ruoth niya, “Ruodha, ma e dhako nogono, kendo ma e wuode mane Elisha ochiero!”" 
2Kings8:6 Ruoth nopenjo dhakono wachno, mi dhakono nonyise gik ma notimore. Eka ruoth nomiye jaduong’ moro kowachone niya, “Los wach dhakoni, mondo odwokne gige duto, kaachiel gi cham duto mosenyak e puothene, chakre chieng’ mane oaye ka, nyaka chil kawuono.”" 
2Kings8:7 Chieng’ moro Elisha nodhi Damaski, moyudo ka Ben-hadad ruodh Aram tuo. Kane ruoth owinjo ni ng’at Nyasaye obiro." 
2Kings8:8 Nowacho ni Hazael niya, “Kaw mich, idhi irom godo ni ng’at Nyasaye, kendo ikwaye mondo openj Ruoth Nyasaye ka abiro kwo.”" 
2Kings8:9 Kamano Hazael nodhi romo ni Elisha, kotero ne mich mang’eny mogolo Damaski, moromo ngamia piero ang’wen ting’o. Kane oromo kode, nochung’ e nyime, mowachone niya, “Ben-hadad ruodh Aram ma nyathini oora ni mondo apenji kobiro kwo.”" 
2Kings8:10 Elisha nodwoke niya, “Dhiyo, iwachne ni obiro kwo. To kata kamano, Ruoth Nyasaye osenyisa malong’o ni obiro tho.”" 
2Kings8:11 Eka wang’ Elisha notwo kuome kang’iye, nyaka wi Hazael nokuot, to pi wang’ ng’at Nyasaye noton." 
2Kings8:12 Hazael nopenje niya, “Jaduong’, iywago ang’o?” Nodwoke niya, “Aywak nikech ang’eyo kaka ibiro sando jo-Israel. Iniwang’ miechgi mochiel gi ohinga, kendo inineg yawuotgi marateke. Inikidh nyithindgi matindotindo, bende iniried iye mondegi mayach.”" 
2Kings8:13 To Hazael nopenje ni, “To an anani, ere kaka danyal timo gima duong’ kamano?” Elisha nodwoke niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye osenyisa ni ibiro bedo ruodh Aram.”" 
2Kings8:14 Eka Hazael noa ir Elisha, modok ir ruodhe. Ruoth nopenje gima Elisha owachone, mi Hazael nodwoke niya, “Nonyisa ni ibiro kwo maonge kiawa.”" 
2Kings8:15 To kinyne noumo wang’ ruoth gi nanga moluti e pi, mothung’e nyaka otho. Eka nobet ruoth kare." 
2Kings8:16 E higa mar abich mar loch Joram wuod Ahab, ruodh Israel, Jehoram wuod Jehoshafat nodoko ruodh Juda." 
2Kings8:17 Ne en jahigni piero adek gariyo kochako tich ruoth, kendo norito piny kuom higni aboro, kodak Jerusalem." 
2Kings8:18 Noluwo timbe ruodhi mag Israel, kaka jodhood Ahab notimo, nikech nokendo nyar Ahab. Timbene ne richo e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye." 
2Kings8:19 To kata kamano, Ruoth Nyasaye ne ok otieko jo-Juda, nikech noparo Daudi jatichne, nimar nosesingorene ni anywolane nobed e kom duong’ ka taya malielne nyaka chieng’." 
2Kings8:20 E ndalo loch Jehoram, jo-Edom nodagi bet e bwo loch Juda, mi ne giketo ruodhgi giwegi." 
2Kings8:21 Omiyo Jehoram noidho loka nyaka Zair, kaachiel gi gechene duto mag lweny, to jo-Edom nolworogi. Mi Jehoram gi jotend gechene nochiew gotieno, momwomo, to joge duto noringo, modok miechgi." 
2Kings8:22 Mano e kaka jo-Edom notieko loch Juda Edom nyaka chil kawuono. E ndalogo Libna bende nodagi bet e bwo loch Juda. 
2Kings8:23 Koro weche moko mag Jehoram, kod timbene duto, ondiki e Kitap Weche mag Ndalo mag Ruodhi mag Juda." 
2Kings8:24 Jehoram notho, mi noyike but kwerene e dala Daudi. Ahazia wuode nodoko ruoth kare." 
2Kings8:25 E higa mar apar gariyo mar loch Joram wuod Ahab ruodh Israel, Ahazia wuod Jehoram nodoko ruodh Juda." 
2Kings8:26 Ahazia ne jahigni piero ariyo gariyo kane ochako tich ruoth, kendo norito piny kuom higa achiel, kodak Jerusalem. Min mare ne nyinge Athalia, nyakwar Omri ruodh Israel." 
2Kings8:27 Ahazia bende noluwo timbe dhood Ahab. Timbene ne richo e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, mana kaka timbe Ahab, nikech ne en or jodhood Ahab." 
2Kings8:28 Ahazia gi Joram wuod Ahab ne jodhi Ramoth-gilead mondo oked gi Hazael ruodh Aram, to nopo ka jo-Aram ohinyo Joram kuno." 
2Kings8:29 Mi ruoth Joram nodok Jezreel ni mondo ochang kuom hinyruok ma noyudo Ramoth kokedo gi Hazael ruodh Aram. Eka Ahazia wuod Jehoram, ruodh Juda, nodhi Jezreel mondo one Joram wuod Ahab nikech Joram ne tuo." 
2Kings9:1 Elisha janabi noluongo achiel kuom jonabi, mowachone niya, “Ng’wan lepi, idhi Ramoth-gilead gi puga mar morni." 
2Kings9:2 Kichopo, dwar Jehu wuod Jehoshafat ma wuod Nimshi. Kisetundo kama entie, to gole kuom jolweny wetene, kendo itere e ot ma iye." 
2Kings9:3 Eka ikaw puga mar mo, iol e wiye, kikone ni Ruoth Nyasaye owachone ni oseyiere mondo obed ruodh Israel. Ka isewacho kamano, to yaw dhoot iring ia. Kik ideki!”" 
2Kings9:4 Omiyo janabi ma rawerano nodhi Ramoth-gilead," 
2Kings9:5 monwang’o jodong lweny ka nie bura. Nowacho niya, “Jaduong’, adwaro loso kodi.” Jehu nopenje niya, “En ng’a ma idwaro losogo kuomwa?” Nodwoke ni, “Mana in, jaduong’”" 
2Kings9:6 Mi Jehu noa malo, modonjo e ot. Eka janabino noolo mo e wiye, kawachone ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel owacho niya, “Aseyieri mondo ibed ruodh Israel." 
2Kings9:7 Inineg dhood Ahab ma ruodhu, mondo ochulgo kuor kuom Jezebel nikech nochuero remb jotichna ma jonabi, kod jotichna mamoko duto." 
2Kings9:8 Dhood Ahab duto norum! Anatiek jo-Ahab machwo duto, ma onge kata achiel ma nodong’ e Israel." 
2Kings9:9 Analok dhoode mondo ochal gi dhood Jeroboam wuod Nebat, kendo machal gi dhood Baasha wuod Ahija." 
2Kings9:10 Guogi nocham Jezebel e piny Jezreel, kendo onge ng’ama nokonye.” Eka janabino noyawo dhoot, moringo." 
2Kings9:11 Kane Jehu owuok, modok ir jodong ruodhe, ne gipenje niya, “Ere wach? Janekono nobiro iri nang’o?” Nodwokogi niya, “Ung’eyo kaka ng’atno wuoyo!”" 
2Kings9:12 To ne gikwere ni, “Mano miriambo! Wachnwa awacha adiera.” Nodwokogi kendo niya, “Nonyisa ni Ruoth Nyasaye owacho ni oseyiera mondo abed ruodh Israel.”" 
2Kings9:13 Mi jogo duto nopedho lepgi aruya ewi raidhi, mondo Jehu obedie. Eka ne gigoyo tung’ ka gikok niya, “Jehu e ruoth!”" 
2Kings9:14 Kamano e kaka Jehu wuod Jehoshsfat ma wuod Nimshi nochako piem gi Joram, mondo ogol e tich ruoth." 
2Kings9:15 Jehu nowacho ni jodong lweny wetene niya, “Ka parou chal kamano, to kara neuru ni ng’ato ok owuok e dala ka, ma diter wach Jezreel.”" 
2Kings9:16 Eka Jehu noidho gache, modhi Jezreel, nimar Joram ne ni kuno. To Ahazia ruodh Juda bende ne ni kuno, ka wendo Joram. (Ruoth Joram ne ni Jezreel mondo ochang kuom hinyruok mane oyudo e lwet jo-Aram Ramoth-gilead gi jo-Israel duto, mondo kik Hazael ruodh Aram kaw.)" 
2Kings9:17 Jarito mane oyudo ochung’ ewi ohinga mar Jezreel noneno Jehu gi joge ka biro, mowacho niya, “Aneno ji moko, ka biro.” Joram nowachone ni, “Or ng’ato gi faras odhi oromnigi, mondo openjgi ka wach ber.”" 
2Kings9:18 Omiyo jaidh faras nodhi romonigi, mowachonigi niya, “Ruoth penjo ka wach ber.” To Jehu nodwoke niya, “Wach maber obadhie ang’o? Wichri ilu bang’a.” Jarito mane ni ewi ohinga nochako owacho niya, “Jaote cha osechopo irgi, to ok ane koduogo.”" 
2Kings9:19 Eka ruoth nooro jaidh faras machielo, ma bende nowachonigi niya, “Ruoth penjo ka wach ber.” Jehu nodwoke niya, “Wach maber obadhie ang’o? Wichri ilu bang’a.”" 
2Kings9:20 Jarito nowacho kendo niya, “Jaoteno osechopo irgi, to en bende ok oduogi. To jariemb gari cha chalo mana gi Jehu wuod Nimshi, nikech oriembo matek ka janeko.”" 
2Kings9:21 Joram nowacho ni joge mondo oikne gache, mi ne gitimo kamano. Eka Joram ruodh Israel, kod Ahazia ruodh Juda, ne jowuok gi gechegi, ka dhi romo ni Jehu, mi ne giromo kode e puoth Naboth ja-Jezreel." 
2Kings9:22 Kane Joram oneno Jehu, nopenje niya, “Ere kaka wach nyalo bet maber, ka meru Jezebel pod dhi nyime gi timbene mag ndhogruok gi mag jwok?”" 
2Kings9:23 Kane Joram owinjo wachno, noloko gache moringo, kowacho ni Ahazia niya, “Ahazia masira ni ka! Jogi jemo!”" 
2Kings9:24 To Jehu noywayo asere gi tekone duto, mochwowo otenga Joram, mi asere nopowo e dho chunye, monywowore e gache." 
2Kings9:25 Eka Jehu nowacho ni Bidkar mane jating’ne gilweny niya, “Kawe, ibole e puoth Naboth ja-Jezreel. Ok ipar gima Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho kuome chieng’ mane wan kodi e gach lweny, kwaluwo bang’ Ahab wuon mare?" 
2Kings9:26 Donge Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho kuome ni, ‘Nyoro aneni kinego Naboth gi yawuote, to abiro chuloni kuor e puodhoni’? Omiyo kawe, ibole e puodhono, mondo wach Ruoth Nyasaye ochop kare.”" 
2Kings9:27 Kane Ahazia ruodh Juda oneno gima otimore, noringo kochomo Beth-hagan. Jehu nolawe, kawacho niya, “En bende negeuru!” Mi ne gichwowe ka geche idho got Gur, machiegni gi Ibleam. Noringo nyaka Megido, motho kuro." 
2Kings9:28 Joge noting’e e gari nyaka Jerusalem, mi giyike but kwerene e dala Daudi." 
2Kings9:29 Ahazia nochako bet ruodh Juda e higa mar apar gachiel mar loch Joram wuod Ahab. 
2Kings9:30 Kane Jehu ochopo Jezreel, Jezebel nowinjo birone, omiyo nowiro wang’e gi mo, kendo oloso yie wiye. Eka nong’icho gie dirisa." 
2Kings9:31 Kane Jehu odonjo e dhorangach, Jezebel nowachone niya, “Ere wach, in Zimri ma janek ruodheni?”" 
2Kings9:32 Jehu noting’o wang’e, mong’iyo dirisa kapenjo niya, “Ere ng’ama odokna?” Eka jotich ariyo kata adek nobiro e dirisa, mong’iye." 
2Kings9:33 Jehu nowacho nigi niya, “Dhiruru dhakono piny.” Kamano ne gidhire, mi rembe nokirore e kor ot, kendo farese nonyone." 
2Kings9:34 Jehu nodonjo e ot, mochiemo kendo ometho. Eka nowacho niya, “Dhiuru uyik dhako mokuong’ni nikech en nyar ruoth.”" 
2Kings9:35 To kane gidhi mondo giyike, ne ginwang’o mana hanga wiye gi tiendene kod luetene kende." 
2Kings9:36 Kane gidok nyiso Jehu, nowachonigi niya, “Mano e gima Ruoth Nyasaye nomiyo jatichne Elija ja-Tishbe owacho, kokoro niya, ‘Guogi nocham ringre Jezebel e gweng’ Jezreel;" 
2Kings9:37 kendo ringre nochal kaka owuoyo moyar e puothe mag Jezreel, ma onge ng’ato ma nong’e ni, ma e Jezebel.’ ”" 
2Kings10:1 Noyudo ka yawuot Ahab piero abiriyo odak Samaria. Omiyo Jehu nondiko barupe, mooro Samaria ni jodong dala kod joma ne pidho yawuot Ahabgo, kowacho niya," 
2Kings10:2 “Donge yawuot ruoth odak kodu, kendo un gi gilwenje, gi geche, gi farese, kod mier mochiel? Omiyo kuyudo baruani," 
2Kings10:3 to yieruru wuod ruoth moro, malong’o kendo motegno, uket e kom wuon mare, mondo uked ni dhood ruodhu.”" 
2Kings10:4 To ne giluor ahinya ka giwacho niya, “Jehu noloyo ruodhi ariyo kande, koro wan to dwaloye nadi?”" 
2Kings10:5 Omiyo jaduong’ od ruoth gi jaduong’ dala kaachiel gi jodongo kod jogo mane pidho yawuowigo nooro ni Jehu wach niya, “Wan jotichni, kendo wayie timo gimoro amora miwachonwa. Ok wanaket ng’at moro obed ruoth. Tim atima gima idwaro.”" 
2Kings10:6 Eka Jehu nondikonigi barua machielo kawacho niya, “Kuyie dokna, kendo mako chikna, to ng’aduru wiye yawuot ruodhu, ukelna Jezreel kiny sa makama.” (Yawuot ruoth piero abiriyogo nodak kod jodong dala mane pidhogi.)" 
2Kings10:7 Kane jodongogo oyudo baruano, ne ginego yawuot ruoth duto, mi giketo wiyegi e aditni, kendo giorogi Jezreel ni Jehu." 
2Kings10:8 Kane jaote onyiso Jehu ni osekel wiye yawuot ruoth, Jehu nowacho ni mondo odhurgi pidhe ariyo e dhorangach, gibed kanyo nyaka piny ru." 
2Kings10:9 Nowuok gokinyi mowacho ni ji duto niya, “An ema najamo ruodha, manego, omiyo un uonge bura e wachno; to koro, jogi duto ng’ama onego?" 
2Kings10:10 Kuom mano ng’euru ni onge wach Ruoth Nyasaye kata achiel ma norem mak otimore kuom weche duto mane owacho kuom dhood Ahab, nikech Ruoth Nyasaye osetimo gima nomiyo Elija jatichne owacho.”" 
2Kings10:11 Eka Jehu nonego jodhood Ahab duto ma nodong’ Jezreel, gi jodonge duto gi osiepene kod jodolo mage, nyaka ne onge kata ng’at achiel modong’." 
2Kings10:12 Jehu nowuok kadhi Samaria. To kane osechopo Beth-eked Kajokwath," 
2Kings10:13 nopo koromo gi owete Ahazia ruodh Juda. Nopenjogi niya, “Un ng’a gini?” Ne gidwoke ni, “Wan owete Ahazia, kendo wadhi limo joka ruoth.”" 
2Kings10:14 Eka Jehu nowacho niya, “Makgiuru.” Mi ne gimakogi duto, ji piero ang’wen gariyo, kendo ne ginegogi pep e Yap Beth-eked." 
2Kings10:15 Kane Jehu osea kuno, noneno Jehonadab wuod Rekab ka biro romone. Nomose, mopenje niya, “Bende chunyi ler koda, kaka chunya ler kodi?” Jehonadab nodwoke niya, “Ee, chunya ler kodi.” Jehu nokone ni, “Ka kamano, to mak lweta.” Omiyo Jehonadab nomako lwete. Eka Jehu nokwaye mondo giidh gari," 
2Kings10:16 kowachone niya, “Bi wadhi mondo ine kaka atiyo ni Ruoth Nyasaye gi kinda.” Kamano Jehu notero Jehonadab Samaria gi geche." 
2Kings10:17 Kane gichopo Samaria, nonego jodhood Ahab duto ma nodong’ kuno, nyaka notiekogi chuth. Mano e kaka wach mane Ruoth Nyasaye owacho ni Elija nochopo kare." 
2Kings10:18 Eka Jehu nochoko jo-Israel duto, mowachonigi niya, “Ahab notiyo ni Baal matin nono, to an abiro tiyone moloyo." 
2Kings10:19 Omiyo luongnauru jonabi duto mag Baal gi ji duto malame kod jodolo mage. Kik ng’ato dong’ kata achiel, nikech adwaro timo ni Baal liswa maduong’, to ng’ama obare notho!” To Jehu nowuondogi kamano mondo oneg jogo duto mane lamo Baal." 
2Kings10:20 Nochiko ni mondo olos chokruok mopwodhi mar lamo Baal. Mi ne gitimo kamano. 
2Kings10:21 Nooro wach e piny Israel duto, mi jolam Baal nobiro maonge kata ng’at achiel modong’. Ne gidonjo e od Baal, ma ot opong’ ma onge kata kama iboloe luth." 
2Kings10:22 Jehu nonyiso jarit lep lemo mondo opogni jolam Baal duto lewnigo, mi nomiyogi." 
2Kings10:23 Eka Jehu nodonjo e od Baal gi Jehonadab wuod Rekab. Nowacho ni jolam Baal niya, “Nonuru mondo une ni onge jatich Ruoth Nyasaye moro e dieru ka, to mak mana jolam Baal kende.”" 
2Kings10:24 Eka nochako wang’o misango kendo timo liswa. To Jehu noseketo askeche piero aboro oko, mondo orit ot, kawachonigi niya, “Ka ng’ato kuomu oweyo ng’at achiel kuom joma aseketo e lwetu otony, to en ema notho kar ng’atno!”" 
2Kings10:25 Kane Jehu osetieko wang’o misango, nowacho ni askechego kod jotendgi niya, “Donjuru, uneggi; kik uwe ng’ato tony!” Kane askechego kod jotendgi osenegogi, ne giwito ringregi oko. Eka ne gidonjo e od Baal maiye," 
2Kings10:26 mi gigoloe siro mane ji lamo, mi giwang’o." 
2Kings10:27 Kamano ne giketho siro mar Baal, kendo ne gimuko od Baal, mi giloko choo, kendo pod en kamano nyaka chil kawuono." 
2Kings10:28 Mano e kaka Jehu notieko lemo mar Baal e Israel. 
2Kings10:29 Kata kamano, ne ok oweyo timo timbe maricho mane Jeroboam wuod Nebat omiyo jo-Israel otimo, nimar ji ne pod lamo nyiroye mag dhahabu mane ni Bethel gi mane ni Dan." 
2Kings10:30 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Jehu niya, “Amor gi tich misetiyo, nikech isetimo ni dhood Ahab kaka nadwaro, omiyo nyikwayi nobed ruodhi mag Israel nyaka tieng’ mar ang’wen.”" 
2Kings10:31 To Jehu ne ok odewo rito chik Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel gi chunye duto. Nomedo timo richo mane Jeroboam omiyo jo-Israel otimo. 
2Kings10:32 Ndalogo ema Ruoth Nyasaye nochako thiroe jo-Israel, komiyo wasikgi kawo bethe pinygi. Hazael noloyo jo-Israel e pinygi duto," 
2Kings10:33 chakre aora Jordan kochomo yo wuokchieng’. Nokawo piny Gilead gi Bashan duto, chakre Aroer but aora Arnon, koloyo jo-Gad gi jo-Reuben kod jo-Manase." 
2Kings10:34 Weche moko mag Jehu, gi timbene kod tekone duto, ondik e Kitap Weche mag Ndalo mag Ruodhi mag Israel." 
2Kings10:35 Jehu notho, moyike Samaria. Jehoahaz wuode nodoko ruoth kare." 
2Kings10:36 Jehu nobet ruodh Israel kuom higni piero ariyo gaboro, kodak Samaria." 
2Kings11:1 Kane Athalia min Ahazia oneno ni wuode osetho, nonego joka ruoth duto." 
2Kings11:2 To Jehosheba nyar ruoth Jehoram, ma nyamin Ahazia, nogolo Joash ling’ling’ kuom yawuot ruoth ma nidwaro nego, mi nopande e od nindo kod japite. Kamano Athalia ne ok onege." 
2Kings11:3 Joash nodak kod Jehosheba e Od Ruoth Nyasaye kuom higni auchiel e kinde mar loch Athalia. 
2Kings11:4 To e higa mar abiriyo, Jehoyada jadolo nooro wach, moluongo jotend jo-Kari kod jotend askeche ma jorit, mondo obi ire e Od Ruoth Nyasaye. Notimo kodgi winjruok, kendo nomiyo gikuong’ore, eka nonyisogii wuod ruoth." 
2Kings11:5 Nochikogi kama: 
2Kings11:6 “Migap askeche ma tiyo chieng’ Sabato nyaka rit od ruoth," 
2Kings11:7 to migepe ariyo modong’ mondo orit Od Ruoth Nyasaye," 
2Kings11:8 kendo oluor ruoth ka girite, ka ng’ato ka ng’ato omako gilweny e lwete. Ka ng’at moro amora dwaro mwomou, to negeuru. Bende kamoro amora ma ruoth dhiye, to koweuru kurite.”" 
2Kings11:9 Jotend askeche notimo duto mane Jehoyada jadolo ochikogi. Ng’ato ka ng’ato kuomgi nokelo askeche duto mane onego oa e tich chieng’ Sabato, kaachiel gi mago mane onego ochak tich chieng’no." 
2Kings11:10 Jadolono nopogo ni jotend askechego tonge gi kuodi mane mag ruoth Daudi, mane okan e Od Ruoth Nyasaye." 
2Kings11:11 Askeche mag jorit noriedo, ka ng’ato ka ng’ato omako gilweny e lwete, chakre yo milambo nyaka yo nyandwat mar Hekalu, ka gilworo kendo-mar-misango kaachiel gi Hekalu." 
2Kings11:12 Eka Jehoyada nogolo wuod ruoth oko. Nosidhone osimb duong’, momiye kitap chik, kendo nowire gi mo mondo obed ruoth. Ji duto nopamo lwetgi, ka kok niya, “Ruoth mondo odag aming’a!”" 
2Kings11:13 Kane Athalia owinjo mahu mar ji, nodhi e Od Ruoth Nyasaye kama ne gintie." 
2Kings11:14 Noneno ruoth kochung’ e bath siro, kaka kit jo-Israel nobet, ka tung’ ywak, kendo ji wer. Ji duto ne mor, kendo goyo tung’. Mi Athalia noyiecho lepe, ka kok niya, “Ujemo! Ujemo!”" 
2Kings11:15 Jehoyada jadolo nowacho ni jotend askeche niya, “Goleuru oko! Kik unege e Od Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo ka ng’at moro oluwe, to neguru ng’atno.”" 
2Kings11:16 Omiyo ne gimake, kendo ne gigole ka giluwo dhorangach mane farese donjogo e dala ruoth, mi ne ginege kanyo." 
2Kings11:17 Eka Jehoyada nomiyo ruoth kod jo-Israel osingore ni Ruoth Nyasaye, ni ginibed jo-Ruoth Nyasaye. Nomiyo ruoth gi ji bende otimo winjruok e kindgi giwegi." 
2Kings11:18 Mi ji duto nodhi momuko od Baal, kendo ne ginego Matan jadolo mar Baal e nyim kende mag liswago. Jehoyada noketo jorit e Od Ruoth Nyasaye." 
2Kings11:19 Eka nodhi gi jotend askeche, gi jo-Kari, kod ji duto, mi ne giwuok gi ruoth e Od Ruoth Nyasaye. Ne gikowe nyaka e od ruoth, ka giluwo dhoranga jorit. Eka Joash nobet e kom duong’." 
2Kings11:20 Kane oseneg Athalia e od ruoth, ji duto nobedo mamor, kendo Jerusalem nokue." 
2Kings11:21 Joash ne jahigni abiriyo kane odoko ruoth. 
2Kings12:1 E higa mar abiriyo mar loch Jehu, Joash nodoko ruoth, morito piny kuom higni piero ang’wen kodak Jerusalem. Min mare ne nyinge Zibia nyar Beer-sheba." 
2Kings12:2 Timbe Joash ne long’o e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye ndalone duto, nikech Jehoyada jadolo ne ng’adone rieko." 
2Kings12:3 To kata kamano ne ok oketho hembko mane ni kuonde moting’ore, kendo ji ne pod timo misengni, kendo wang’o ubani kuondego." 
2Kings12:4 Joash nowachone jadolo niya, “Kawuru pesa duto michiwo ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma ji kelo e Hekalu, bed ni en solro momi ng’ato ka ng’ato mondo ogol, kata en pesa ma ng’ato chiwo kuom herone." 
2Kings12:5 Tiuru gi pesago kuom kuonde mokethore e Hekalu.” 
2Kings12:6 To kane Joash osebedo ruoth kuom higni piero ariyo gadek jodolo ne pok oloso kuonde ma nokethore e Hekalugo. 
2Kings12:7 Omiyo ruoth Joash noluongo Jehoyada jadolo, kod jodolo wetene, mowachonigi niya, “Ang’o momiyo ok ulos kuonde mokethore e Hekalu? Koro weuru tiyo gi pesa ma joweteu golo, to chiwgiuru mondo ulosgo Hekalu.”" 
2Kings12:8 Jodolo ne oyie ni ok giniti gi pesa ma ji ogolo, to bende ni ok ginilos Hekalu." 
2Kings12:9 Jehoyada jadolo nokawo sanduk moro, motucho raumne, eka noketo sandugno e bath dhoot korachwich, kidonjo e Od Ruoth Nyasaye. Pesa duto mane ji kelo e Od Ruoth Nyasaye, jodolo ma jorit dhoot ne keto e sandugno." 
2Kings12:10 To kane gineno ni pesa ng’eny e sanduk, to jagoro mar ruoth gi jadolo maduong’ ne jodhi e Od Ruoth Nyasaye kwano pesa, kendo tueyogi e kirope." 
2Kings12:11 Eka ne gimiyogi nyipeche mane rito tich loso Hekalu, nikech nyipechego ema ne chulo jopecho gi jogedo" 
2Kings12:12 kod jopa kite, kendo gin ema ne ging’iewo yien, gi kite mopa, kod gimoro amora mane idwaro mondo olosgo kuonde mokethore e Od Ruoth Nyasaye." 
2Kings12:13 To nyilerni mag fedha, gi rangis teyni, kod tewni gi tunge, kod gik moko mag fedha kata mag dhahabu ne ok olos gi pesa mane okel e Od Ruoth Nyasaye," 
2Kings12:14 nikech pesago duto ne gimiyo jotich kuom loso Od Ruoth Nyasaye. 
2Kings12:15 To bende ne ok penj kaka pesa tiyo, nikech joma nomi pesa mondo ochul jotich ne gin joma ogen." 
2Kings12:16 To chiwo mipwodhogo ketho mar gowi, kod mag golo richo ne ok kel e Od Ruoth Nyasaye, nimar ne gin mag jodolo." 
2Kings12:17 E ndalogo, Hazael ruodh Aram nodhi kedo gi jo-Gath, mi nokawo dalagi. Bang’ mano, noikore mondo odhi omonj Jerusalem." 
2Kings12:18 To Joash ruodh Juda nokawo gik moko duto mane Jehoshafat gi Jehoram kod Ahazia osechiwo ni Ruoth Nyasaye. (Kwerene adekgo duto nosebet ruodhi mag Juda.) Gigo duto Joash nooro ni Hazael ruodh Aram, kaachiel gi gik moko mane en owuon osechiwo ni Ruoth Nyasaye, kaachiel gi dhahabu duto mane nie kar keno mar Od Ruoth Nyasaye, kod kar keno mar od ruoth. Mi Hazael ne ok omonjo Jerusalem." 
2Kings12:19 Weche moko mag Joash, gi timbene duto, ondiki e Kitap Weche mag Ndalo mag Ruodhi mag Juda." 
2Kings12:20 Jodonge nojame monege e od Milo man yo madhi Sila. 
2Kings12:21 Jozakar wuod Shimeath, kod Jehozabad wuod Shomer e jodonge mane onege. Noyike but kwerene e dala Daudi, mi Amazia wuode nodoko ruoth kare." 
2Kings13:1 E higa mar piero ariyo gadek mar loch Joash wuod Ahazia ruodh Juda, Jehoahaz wuod Jehu nodoko ruodh Israel, mi norito piny kuom higni apar gabiriyo, kodak Samaria." 
2Kings13:2 Timbene ne richo e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, koluwo richo mane Jeroboam wuod Nebat omiyo jo-Israel otimo. Ne ok oweyo kata achiel." 
2Kings13:3 Ruoth Nyasaye nokecho gi jo-Israel, mi nothoro ketogi e lwet Hazael ruodh Aram, kendo e lwet Ben-hadad ma wuode." 
2Kings13:4 To Jehoahaz nosayo Ruoth Nyasaye, mi Ruoth Nyasaye nowinje, nikech noneno kaka ruodh Aram sando jo-Israel." 
2Kings13:5 Omiyo Ruoth Nyasaye nomiyo jo-Israel ng’at ma noresogi e lwet jo-Aram, mi ne gidak e miechgi gi kue kaka chon." 
2Kings13:6 To kata kamano, ne ok giweyo timbe maricho mag dhood Jeroboam, mane Jeroboam omiyo jo-Israel otimo, to ne pod giluwogi. Kido mar nyasaye ma dhako miluongo ni Ashera bende ne pod ni Samaria." 
2Kings13:7 Ruoth Nyasaye noweyo ni Jehoahaz mana jolweny alufu apar, gi joidh farese piero abich, kod geche lweny apar, nikech ruodh Aram nosetiekogi mi gichalo mana mihudhi." 
2Kings13:8 Weche moko mag Jehoahaz, gi timbene duto, kod tekone, ondiki e Kitap Weche mag Ndalo mag Ruodhi mag Israel." 
2Kings13:9 Jehoahaz notho moluwo kwerene, mi noyike Samaria. Jehoash wuode nodoko ruoth kare." 
2Kings13:10 E higa mar piero adek gabiriyo mar loch Joash ruodh Juda, ema Jehoash wuod Jehoash nodokoe ruodh Israel, kendo norito piny kuom higni apar gauchiel, kodak Samaria." 
2Kings13:11 En bende timbene ne richo e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, koluwo timbe maricho duto mane Jeroboam wuod Nebat omiyo jo-Isarel otimo." 
2Kings13:12 Weche moko mag Jehoash, gi timbene duto, kod teko mane okedogo gi Amazia ruodh Juda, ondiki e kitap Weche mag Ndalo mag Ruodhi mag Israel." 
2Kings13:13 Jehoash notho, moluwo kwerene, mi noyike Samaria but ruodhi mag Israel. Jeroboam nodoko ruoth kare." 
2Kings13:14 Kane Elisha tuo gi tuo mane biro nege, noyudo Jehoash ruodh Israel osedhi nene, moywage ni, “Wuora! Wuora! Isebedonwa kaka geche lweny gi joidh farese mag Israel.”" 
2Kings13:15 Elisha nowachone niya, “Kaw tung’ gi aserini.” Mi notimo kamano." 
2Kings13:16 Eka Elisha nochako owachone niya, “Ywa atung’.” Mi noywayo. Elisha noketo luetene kuom luete ruoth," 
2Kings13:17 mowacho niya, “Yaw dirisa mochomo yo wuokchieng’” Mi noyawo. Eka Elisha nowachone niya, “Dir asere.” Kane osediro, Elisha nowachone niya, “Mano asech loch Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo onyiso ni ibiro loyo jo-Aram. Ibiro kedo gi jo-Aram e dala mar Afek nyaka itiekgi chuth.”" 
2Kings13:18 Nowachone kendo niya, “Koro kaw aserini modong’.” Kane ruoth osekawogi, Elisha nowachone ni, “Chiel piny kodgi.” Mi nochielo piny nyadidek, moweyo." 
2Kings13:19 To Elisha, ng’at Nyasaye, nokecho kode, mowachone niya, “Da bed ni ichielo piny nyadibich kata nyadiuchiel, to eka da itieko jo-Aram chuth, to koro inilogi mana nyadidek kende.”" 
2Kings13:20 Elisha notho, moyiki. Kindego jo-Moab ne thoro monjo piny Israel higa ka higa." 
2Kings13:21 To chieng moro kane jomoko yiko ng’ato, ne gipo ka gineno wasigu kabiro, mi ne gibolo ringre ng’atno ei liend Elisha. To kane ringre ng’at mothono olwar kuom choke Elisha, chunye noduogo, mochung’." 
2Kings13:22 Hazael ruodh Aram ne thago jo-Israel ndalo duto mag loch Jehoahaz. 
2Kings13:23 To Ruoth Nyasaye nong’wononigi, kendo nokechogi, koparo singruok mane otimo gi Ibrahim kendo gi Isaka kod Jakobo. Emomiyo ne ok otiekogi, kata witogi oko ne ok owitogi." 
2Kings13:24 Kane Hazael ruodh Aram otho, Ben-hadad wuode nodoko ruoth kare." 
2Kings13:25 Jehoash wuod Jehoahaz nomayo Ben-hadad wuod Hazael mier mane Hazael ogolo e lwet Jehoahaz wuon mare e lweny. Jehoash noloyo Ben-hadad nyadidek, mi nodwoko miergo ni Israel." 
2Kings14:1 E higa mar ariyo mar loch Jehoash wuod Jehoahaz ruodh Israel, Amazia wuod Joash nodoko ruodh Juda." 
2Kings14:2 Ne en jahigni piero ariyo gabich kane ochako tich, kendo norito piny kuom higni piero ariyo gochiko, kodak Jerusalem. Min mare ne nyinge Jehoadin nyar Jerusalem." 
2Kings14:3 Timbe Amazia ne long’o e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, to ok machal gi Daudi kwar mare. Noluwo timbe duto mag Joash wuon mare," 
2Kings14:4 to kata kamano hembko mane ni kuonde moting’ore ne ok okethi, kendo ji ne pod timo misengni, kendo wang’o ubani kuondego." 
2Kings14:5 Kane Amazia ogurore e tich ruoth, nonego joge ma nonego wuon mare mane ruoth." 
2Kings14:6 Ne ok onego yawuot jonekgo, to noluwo wach mondiki e Kitap Chik mar Musa, kama Ruoth Nyasaye owachoe niya, “Kik uneg wuone nikech richo mag nyithindgi, kata kik uneg nyithindo nikech richo mag wuonegi, to ng’ato ka ng’ato noneg mana nikech richone owuon.”" 
2Kings14:7 Amazia nonego jo-Edom alufu apar e holo Kado, mi okawo Sela gi lweny, mochako ni Joksheel. Pod iluonge kamano nyaka chil kawuono." 
2Kings14:8 Eka Amazia nooro ni Jehoash wuod Jehoahaz ma wuod Jehu ruodh Israel, kowachone niya, “Bi mondo waradi.”" 
2Kings14:9 To Jehoash ruodh Israel nodwoko Amazia ruodh Juda gi ngero niya, “Okuro moro man Lebanon, nooro wach ni yath maduong’ man Lebanon, kowachone niya, ‘Yie mondo wuoda okend nyari.’ To nopo ka le moro kadho kanyo, monyono okurono, moketho." 
2Kings14:10 Adieri, iseloyo jo-Edom, mi koro ipakori. Pakruoknino mondo oromi, to ibedgo mana e dala. Ang’o momiyo iero miero ma biro tieki, kaachiel gi jo-Juda?”" 
2Kings14:11 To Amazia ne ok odewo. Omiyo Jehoash ruodh Israel nodhi Bethshemesh, dala mar Juda. Nokedo gi Amazia ruodh Juda kuno," 
2Kings14:12 kendo jo-Israel noloyo jo-Juda, moringo nyaka miechgi." 
2Kings14:13 Jehoash ruodh Israel nomako Amazia wuod Joash ma wuod Ahazia ruodh Juda, e Beth-shemesh. Nodhi Jerusalem, momuko bath ohinga ma borne mita mia ariyo, chakre dhoranga Efraim nyaka dhorangach kama ohinga ogomogo." 
2Kings14:14 Nokawo dhahabu gi fedha kod gik moko duto mane onwang’o e Od Ruoth Nyasaye, kod kar keno mar od ruoth, bende nokawo ji moko, motueyo ka gir singo. Eka nodok Samaria." 
2Kings14:15 Koro weche moko mag Jehoash, gi timbene duto, kod chir mane okedogo gi Amazia ruodh Juda, ondiki e Kitap Weche mag Ndalo mag Ruodhi mag Israel." 
2Kings14:16 Jehoash notho, moluwo kwerene. Noyike Samaria but ruodhi mag Israel. Jeroboam wuode nodoko ruoth kare." 
2Kings14:17 Amazia wuod Joash, ruodh Juda, nodak higni apar gabich bang’ tho Joash wuod Jehoahaz ruodh Israel." 
2Kings14:18 Timbene moko duto ondiki e Kitap Weche mag Ndalo mag Ruodhi mag Juda. 
2Kings14:19 Joge moko nojame Jerusalem, mi noringo nyaka Lakish, to ne gilawe mi ginege kuno." 
2Kings14:20 Ne giting’o ringre gi farese ka gidwoko Jerusalem, mi noyike but kwerene e dala Daudi." 
2Kings14:21 Eka jo-Juda duto noketo Uzia ruoth kar Amazia wuon mare, ka en jahigni apar gauchiel." 
2Kings14:22 En ema nokawo dala mar Elath, modwoko ni jo-Juda, bang’ tho wuon mare. Eka ne ochiele gi ohinga." 
2Kings14:23 E higa mar apar gabich mar loch Amazia wuod Joash ruodh Juda, Jeroboam wuod Jehoash nodoko ruodh Israel, kodak Samaria. Norito piny kuom higni piero ang’wen gachiel." 
2Kings14:24 Timbene ne richo e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, mana kaka timbe duto mane Jeroboam wuod Nebat omiyogo jo-Israel obedo joricho." 
2Kings14:25 Nodwoko piny mane olal ni Israel, chakre kama idonjogo Hamath, nyaka Nam Kado, kaka Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel nomiyo janabi Jona ma wuod Amitai, ja-Gath-hefer, owacho." 
2Kings14:26 Kane Ruoth Nyasaye oneno ni masich jo-Israel lit ahinya, kendo onge ng’ato kata achiel manyalo konyogi, nomiyo Jeroboam wuod Jehoash oresogi," 
2Kings14:27 nikech nosewacho ni ok noruch nying jo-Israel oko. 
2Kings14:28 Koro weche moko mag Jeroboam, gi timbene duto, kod chir mane okedogo gi jo-Damaski, kendo kaka nohoyo Ruoth Nyasaye ni kik to mirimbe kuom jo-Israel, ondik e Kitap Weche mag Ndalo mag Ruodhi mag Israel." 
2Kings14:29 Jeroboam notho, moluwo kwerene mane ruodhi mag Israel. Zekaria wuode nodoko ruoth kare." 
2Kings15:1 E higa mar piero ariyo gabiriyo mar loch Jeroboam ruodh Israel, Uzia wuod Amazia nodoko ruodh Juda." 
2Kings15:2 Ne en jahigni apar gauchiel kane ochako tich, kendo norito piny kuom higni piero abich gariyo, kodak Jerusalem. Min mare ne nyinge Jekolia nyar Jerusalem." 
2Kings15:3 Timbene ne long’o e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, mana kaka timbe Amazia wuon mare." 
2Kings15:4 To kata kamano hembko mane ni kuonde moting’ore ne ok okethi, kendo ji ne pod timo misengni kendo wang’o ubani kuondego." 
2Kings15:5 Ruoth Nyasaye nomiyo ruoth tuo mar dhoho, mi nodak e ot kar kende nyaka otho. Jotham wuode nodoko jatelo e od ruoth, morito piny," 
2Kings15:6 Weche moko mag Uzia, gi timbene duto, ondiki e Kitap Weche mag Ndalo mag Ruodhi mag Juda." 
2Kings15:7 Uzia notho, moyike but kwerene e dala Daudi. Jotham wuode nodoko ruoth kare." 
2Kings15:8 E higa mar piero adek gaboro mar loch Uzia ruodh Juda, Zekaria wuod Jeroboam nobet ruodh Israel kuom dueche auchiel, kodak Samaria." 
2Kings15:9 Timbene ne richo e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, mana kaka timbe kwerene. Noluwo timbe maricho mane Jeroboam wuod Nebat omiyogo jo-Israel obedo joricho." 
2Kings15:10 Shalum wuod Jabesh nojame, monege Ibleam, kendo nokawo lochne." 
2Kings15:11 Timbe moko duto mag Zekaria ondiki e Kitap Weche mag Ndalo mag Ruodhi mag Israel. 
2Kings15:12 Kamano weche mane Ruoth Nyasaye osingorego ni Jehu, kowachone ni nyikwaye nobed ruodhi mag Israel nyaka tieng’ mar ang’wen, nochopo kare." 
2Kings15:13 E higa mar piero adek gochiko mar loch Uzia ruodh Juda, Shalum wuod Jabesh nokawo loch, morito piny due achiel, kodak Samaria." 
2Kings15:14 To Menahem wuod Gadi noa Tirza modhi Samaria. Nonego Shalum wuod Jabesh kuno, mokawo lochne." 
2Kings15:15 Koro timbe moko duto mag Shalum, kendo kaka nojamo Zekaria, ondiki e Kitap Weche mag Ndalo mag Ruodhi mag Israel." 
2Kings15:16 E ndalogo ema Menahem nokawoe Tapua, kaachiel gi mbape duto, chakre Tirza kadhi nyime. Nonego jo-Tapua duto, koriedo iye mon mayach, kendo noketho dalano chuth, nikech ne gidagi yawone dhorangach." 
2Kings15:17 E higa mar piero adek gochiko mar loch Uzia ruodh Juda, Menahem wuod Gadi nodoko ruodh Israel, morito piny kuom higni apar, kodak Samaria." 
2Kings15:18 Timbene ne richo e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, kaka timbe maricho mane Jeroboam wuod Nebat omiyogo jo-Israel obedo joricho." 
2Kings15:19 Ndalogo ema Pul ruodh Asuria nomonjoe e piny Israel, to Menahem nomiyo Pul fedha moromo kilo alufu mia adek, mondo Pul okonye jiwo lochne obed motegno." 
2Kings15:20 Menahem noloso pesa kuom jo-Israel man gi mwandu, mochulogo ruodh Asuria, koketo ni ng’ato ka ng’ato nus kilo mar fedha. Omiyo ruodh Asuria noweyo piny Israel, mi nodok thurgi." 
2Kings15:21 Koro weche moko mag Menahem, gi timbene duto ondiki e Kitap Weche mag Ndalo mag Ruodhi mag Israel." 
2Kings15:22 Menahem notho, moluwo kwerene, mi Pekahia wuode nodoko ruoth kare." 
2Kings15:23 E higa mar piero abich mar loch Uzia ruodh Juda ema Pekahia wuod Menahem nodokoe ruodh Israel, morito piny kuom higni ariyo, kodak Samaria." 
2Kings15:24 Timbene ne richo e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, kaka timbe mane Jeroboam wuod Nebat omiyogo jo-Israel obedo joricho." 
2Kings15:25 To Peka wuod Ramalia, mane jaduong’ne mar lweny, kaachiel gi jo-Gilead piero abich, nojame, monege Samaria e od ruoth. Kane Peka osenege kamano, nokawo lochne." 
2Kings15:26 Koro weche moko mag Pekahia, gi timbene duto, ondiki e Kitap Weche mag Ndalo mag Ruodhi mag Israel." 
2Kings15:27 E higa mar piero abich gariyo, mar loch Uzia ruodh Juda, ema Peka wuod Remalia nodokoe ruodh Israel, morito piny kuom higni piero ariyo, kodak Samaria." 
2Kings15:28 Timbene ne richo e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, kaka timbe mane Jeroboam wuod Nebat omiyogo jo-Israel obedo joricho." 
2Kings15:29 E ndalo mag loch Peka ruodh Israel, Tiglath-pileser ruodh Asuria nobiro, mokawo Ijon gi Abel-bethmaaka gi Janoa gi Kedesh gi Hazor gi Gilead kod Galili. Kamano nokawo piny Naftali duto, motero jopinyno nyaka Asuria e tuech." 
2Kings15:30 To e higa mar piero ariyo mar loch Jotham wuod Uzia, Hoshea wuod Ela nojamo Peka wuod Ramalia, monego, mi okawo lochne." 
2Kings15:31 Koro weche moko mag Peka, kod timbene duto, ondiki e Kitap Weche mag Ndalo mag Ruodhi mag Israel." 
2Kings15:32 E higa mar ariyo mar loch Peka wuod Remalia ruodh Israel, Jotham wuod Uzia nodoko ruodh Juda." 
2Kings15:33 Ne en jahigni piero ariyo gabich kane ochako tich, morito piny kuom higni apar gauchiel, kodak Jerusalem. Min mare ne nyinge Jerusha nyar Zadok." 
2Kings15:34 Timbe Jotham ne long’o e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye kaka timbe Uzia wuon mare. 
2Kings15:35 To kata kamano hembko mane ni kuonde moting’ore ne ok okethi. Ji ne pod timo misengni kendo wang’o ubani kuondego. Jotham ema nogero dhorangach mamalo mar Od Ruoth Nyasaye. 
2Kings15:36 Koro weche moko mag Jotham gi timbene duto, ondiki e Kitap Weche mag Ndalo mag Ruodhi mag Juda." 
2Kings15:37 E ndalogo Ruoth Nyasaye nochako ooro Rezin ruodh Aram kod Peka wuod Remalia mondo omonj jo-Juda. 
2Kings15:38 Jotham notho, moyik but kwerene e dala Daudi kwar mare. Ahaz wuode nodoko ruoth kare." 
2Kings16:1 E higa mar apar gabiriyo mar loch Peka wuod Remalia ema Ahaz wuod Jotham nodokoe ruodh Juda. 
2Kings16:2 Ne en jahigni piero ariyo kane ochako tich, morito piny kuom higni apar gauchiel, kodak Jerusalem. To timbene ne ok long’o e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye kaka timbe Daudi wuon mare ne long’o." 
2Kings16:3 Noluwo timbe ruodhi mag Israel, to gima rach moloyo, en ni nowang’o wuode ka gir misango, koluwo timbe makuero mag ogendini mane Ruoth Nyasaye oriembo mondo owe thuolo ni jo-Israel." 
2Kings16:4 Bende notimo misengni, kendo nowang’o ubani, e hembko ewi gode, kendo e tiend yath moro amora motimo otiep." 
2Kings16:5 E ndalogo, Rezin, ruodh Aram, gi Peka wuod Remalia ruodh Israel nodhi monjo Jerusalem. Ne gilworo Ahaz gi joge, to ne ok ginyal loye." 
2Kings16:6 (Kindego bende ema ruodh Edom noriemboe jo-Juda Elath, modwoko ni jo-Edom, mi jo-Edom nodhi Elath, kuma gidakie nyaka chil kawuono.)" 
2Kings16:7 To kane Ahaz oyudo ni ruodhigo olwore kamano, nooro joote ir Tiglath-pileser ruodh Asuria, kowachone niya, “An nyathini kendo jatichni, yie ibi iresa e lwet ruodh Aram gi ruodh Israel ma kedo koda.”" 
2Kings16:8 Bende Ahaz nokawo fedha gi dhahabu mane nie Od Ruoth Nyasaye kod kar keno mar od ruoth, mooro ni ruodh Asuria kaka chiwo." 
2Kings16:9 Ruodh Asuria noyie gi wechene, modhi omonjo Damaski, mokawo. Nodaro joma odakie, motero e tuech Kir. Rezin bende nonego." 
2Kings16:10 Kane ruoth Ahaz odhi Damaski romo gi Tiglath-pileser ruodh Asuria, noneno kendo-mar-misango mane ni kuno, mi nooro ni Uria jadolo kido mar kendono gi romne duto, manyise kaka ochalo." 
2Kings16:11 Uria jadolo noloso kendo-mar-misango machielo machal gi mano chuth, kendo notieke kapok ruoth Ahaz oduogo koa Damaski." 
2Kings16:12 Kane ruoth oduogo, norango kendono. Eka noidho raidhi, kosudo machiegni kode." 
2Kings16:13 Nowang’oe misango miwang’o pep, kod misango mar mogo. Bende notimoe misango miolo piny, kendo nokiroe remb misengni mag sawo." 
2Kings16:14 To kendo-mar-misango mar mula mane nie nyim Ruoth Nyasaye nogolo e kind kendone manyien gi Od Ruoth Nyasaye, moketo yo nyandwat mar kendo manyienno." 
2Kings16:15 Ruoth Ahaz nowacho ni Uria jadolo niya, “E kendo maduong’ni ema nitimie misango mar okinyi, kod mar mogo mitimo godhiambo, gi mar ruoth kod misangone mar mogo kod misengni miolo piny. Inikir kuome remo duto mag misengni mamoko. To kendo-mar-mula ema anapenjie Ruoth Nyasaye wach.”" 
2Kings16:16 Uria jadolo notimo gik mojo duto kaka ruoth Ahaz nochike. 
2Kings16:17 Ruoth Ahaz nong’ado frembe mag rachungi mane nie Hekalu, kendo nogolo nyilerni mane nie wigi. Gima ne iluongo ni nam bende nogolo kuom ruedhi mag mula mane nie bwoye, mi orenjo e rachungi mar kite." 
2Kings16:18 Bende nomuko agola mane okonyorego chieng’ Sabato, gi dhorangach ma oko mane odonjogo e Od Ruoth Nyasaye, nikech noluoro ruodh Asuria." 
2Kings16:19 Timbe moko mag Ahaz ondiki e Kitap Weche mag Ndalo mag Ruodhi mag Juda. 
2Kings16:20 Ahaz notho, moyike but kwerene e dala Daudi. Hezekia wuode nodoko ruoth kare." 
2Kings17:1 E higa mar apar gariyo mar loch Ahaz ruodh Juda, Hoshea wuod Ela nodoko ruodh Israel, morito piny kuom higni ochiko, kodak Samaria." 
2Kings17:2 Timbene ne ok long’o e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, to ok ne giricho kaka timbe ruodhi mag Israel mane okuongone tiyo." 
2Kings17:3 Shalmaneser ruodh Asuria nokedo gi Hoshea, mi oloyo. Koro Hoshea nobet e bwo lochne, kendo golone osuru." 
2Kings17:4 To ruodh Asuria noyudo ni Hoshea ndhoge, nikech Hoshea noseoro joote ir So ruodh Misri, bende noweyo chulo osuru kaka nosebedo kotimo higa ka higa. Kuom mano, ruodh Asuria nomake, mokete e od tuech." 
2Kings17:5 Eka ruodh Asuria nomonjo pinyno duto, mochopo Samaria. Nolwore kuom higni adek," 
2Kings17:6 mokawe e higa mar ochiko mar loch Hoshea. Nomako jo-Israel, motero Asuria, kendo noketo moko mondo odag Hela but aora Habor man Gazon, to moko noketo e miech jo-Media." 
2Kings17:7 Mano notimore nikech timbe jo-Israel ne ok long’o e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye mane ogologi e piny Misri e bwo loch Farao. 
2Kings17:8 Ne gilamo nyiseche mamoko, kendo ne giluwo timbe mane ruodhi mag Israel oketo, kod timbe ogendini mane Nyasaye oriembo e pinygi mondo owe ni jo-Israel thuolo." 
2Kings17:9 Jo-Israel noyanyo Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachgi, kendo ne gigero ut lemo e hembko mane nie miechgi matindo gi madongo duto." 
2Kings17:10 Ne gichungo sirni milamo mag kite gi mag yien ewi gode maboyo duto, kendo yiend yath moro amora motimo otiep." 
2Kings17:11 Ne giwang’o ubani kuondego duto, kaka ogendini mane Ruoth Nyasaye oriembo e pinyno ne timo, kendo ne gitimo timbe mamono, mane omiyo Ruoth Nyasaye mirima." 
2Kings17:12 Ne gilamo nyiseche manono mane Ruoth Nyasaye okwerogi ni kik gilam. 
2Kings17:13 Ruoth Nyasaye ne siemo jo-Israel kod jo-Juda, kooronigi jonabi gi jokor wach duto, kowachonigi niya, “Weuru yoreu maricho, mondo umak chikena gi buchena ma jonabina mane aoro onyiso kwereu.”" 
2Kings17:14 To kata kamano, ne gidagi weyo yorego, nikech ne wigi tek ka wi kweregi mane ok oyie kuom Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachgi." 
2Kings17:15 Ne gichayo chikene gi singruokne mane otimo kod kweregi, kendo ne ok gidewo weche mane osiemogigo. Ne gilamo nyiseche manono, nyaka gin giwegi gidoko joma nono, nikech ne giluwo timbe mag ogendini mokiewo kodgi, mane Ruoth Nyasaye osekwerogi ni kik giluw." 
2Kings17:16 Ne giweyo chike duto mag Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachgi, ka gilenyo mula mi gilosgo nyiroye ariyo mondo gilam, kendo ka gichungo siro milamo. Bende ne gilamo sulue duto, kendo ne gitiyo ni Baal." 
2Kings17:17 Ne giwang’o yawuotgi gi nyigi ka misango, kendo ne giwuoyo gi nyakalondo. Kamano ne gichiwore ni timbe maricho e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, ka gimiyego mirima." 
2Kings17:18 Kuom mano, Ruoth Nyasaye nokecho ahinya gi jo-Israel, mi noriembogi e nyime, ma onge modong’ mak mana jo-Juda kende." 
2Kings17:19 Jo-Juda bende ne ok orito chik Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachgi, to ne giluwo mana timbe mane jo-Israel ochako timo." 
2Kings17:20 Omiyo Ruoth Nyasaye nodagi nyikwa Israel duto. Nothagogi moketogi e lwet wasigu mane peyogi to achien nogologi e pinygi. 
2Kings17:21 Kane Ruoth Nyasaye opogo jo-Israel kuom dhood Daudi, jo-Israel noketo Jeroboam wuod Nebat ruoth. Mi Jeroboam nohoyo jo-Israel mondo owe luwo Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo nomiyo gidonjo e richo maduong’." 
2Kings17:22 Jo-Israel noluwo timbe maricho duto mane Jeroboam otimo. Ne ok giweyo richogo kata matin," 
2Kings17:23 nyaka Ruoth Nyasaye nogologi e nyime, kaka nosemiyo jonabine duto owacho. Nodarogi moterogi Asuria, kuma gintie nyaka chil kawuono." 
2Kings17:24 Ruodh Asuria nogolo ji Babulon gi Kutha gi Ava gi Hamath kod Sefarvaim, moketogi e miech Samaria kar jo-Israel, mi ne gidoko weg pinyno." 
2Kings17:25 To kane gichako dak kanyo, ne ok gilam Ruoth Nyasaye, omiyo Ruoth Nyasaye nooro sibuoche, monego jomoko kuomgi." 
2Kings17:26 Ne onyis ruodh Asuria niya, “Ogendini mane idaro, miketo e miech Samaria, ok ong’eyo yo ma onego olamgo nyasach pinyno. Kuom mano, nyasayeno oseoro sibuoche ma koro negogi.”" 
2Kings17:27 Eka ruodh Asuria nowacho niya, “Dwokuru achiel kuom jodolo mane agolo Samaria, odhi odag kuro, kapuonjogi kaka onego lam nyasach pinyno.”" 
2Kings17:28 Kamano jadolo achiel mane osegol Samaria nodok kuro, modak Bethel kapuonjo ji kaka onego lam Ruoth Nyasaye." 
2Kings17:29 To kata kamano, oganda ka oganda ne pod loso nyisechegi giwegi, kendo ketogi ei ut lemo mane jo-Samaria oloso e hembko mane ni kuonde moting’ore. Nyiseche mane oganda ka oganda oloso e miechgi e magi:" 
2Kings17:30 Jo-Babulon noloso Sukoth-benoth nyasachgi, kendo jo-Kuth noloso Nergal. Jo-Hamath to noloso Ashima," 
2Kings17:31 kendo jo-Arvi noloso Nibhaz kod Tartak, to jo-Sefarvaim ne wang’o nyithindgi ka misango ni Adramelek gi Anamelek mane nyisechegi." 
2Kings17:32 To kaachiel gi nyisechego ne gilamo Ruoth Nyasaye bende, kendo ne giyiero ji ariyo mondo obed jodolo mag hembko mane ni kuonde moting’ore, mondo otimnigi misengni kuondego." 
2Kings17:33 Kamano ne gilamo Ruoth Nyasaye, to bende ne gitiyo ni nyisechegi giwegi, ka giluwo timbe pinje mane ogolgie." 
2Kings17:34 Pod giluwo timbe machon-go nyaka chil kawuono. Ok giluoro Ruoth Nyasaye, bende ok giluw buchene gi yorene, kata mako puonjne, kata rito chik mane oketo ni nyikwa Jakobo, jal mane Ruoth Nyasaye oloko nyinge ni Israel." 
2Kings17:35 Ruoth Nyasaye nosetimo kodgi singruok, kawachonigi niya, “Kik ulam nyiseche mamoko, kata kik ukulrunigi. Kim utinigi, kata kik utimnigi misango." 
2Kings17:36 To an ema mondo ukulruna kendo utimna misango, nikech an ema nagolou e piny Misri gi teko maduong’, karieyo bada ni lweny." 
2Kings17:37 Kik ulam nyiseche mamoko, to rituru buchena gi chikena mane aketonu e ndiko." 
2Kings17:38 Wiu kik wil gi singruok mane atimo kodu. Kik ulam nyiseche mamoko," 
2Kings17:39 to lamuru mana an Ruoth Nyasaye, mi anaresu e lwet wasiku duto.”" 
2Kings17:40 Kata kamano ne ok gidewo, to ne gisiko gi timbegi machon." 
2Kings17:41 Kamano ogendinigo ne lamo Ruoth Nyasaye, to gi nyiseche manono bende. Nyithindgi gi nyikwagi ne timo kaka kweregi ne timo, kendo pod gitimo kamano nyaka chil kawuono." 
2Kings18:1 E higa mar adek mar loch Hoshea wuod Ela ruodh Israel, Hezekia wuod Ahaz nodoko ruodh Juda." 
2Kings18:2 Ne en jahigni piero ariyo gabich kane ochako tich, morito piny kuom higni piero ariyo gochiko, kodak Jerusalem. Min mare ne nyinge Abija nyar Zekaria." 
2Kings18:3 Timbe Hezekia ne long’o e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye mana kaka timbe Daudi kwar mare. 
2Kings18:4 Noketho ut lemo mag hembko, kaachiel gi sirni milamo mag kite gi mag yien. Thuond mula mane Musa oloso, bende nong’ado matindotindo, nikech nyaka chop ndalogo, jo-Israel ne pod wang’oe ubani. Thuondno niluongo ni Nekushtan, (tiende ni, gima olos gi mula.)" 
2Kings18:5 Hezekia nogeno Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel, kendo onge ruoth moro machal kode kuom ruodhi duto mag Juda," 
2Kings18:6 nikech nopadore kuom Ruoth Nyasaye chutho, ka ok oweyo luwe, kendo norito chike duto mane Ruoth Nyasaye omiyo Musa." 
2Kings18:7 Kuom mano, Ruoth Nyasaye ne ni kode, kendo noguedho gik moko duto mane otimo. Nodagi bet e bwo loch Asuria," 
2Kings18:8 kendo noloyo jo-Filistia e lweny, kokawo mier madongo gi matindo duto, nyaka Gaza gi mier mokiewo kode." 
2Kings18:9 E higa mar ang’wen mar loch Hezekia, kane Hoshea wuod Ela osebet ruodh Israel kuom higni abiriyo, Shalmaneser ruodh Asuria nomonjo Samaria." 
2Kings18:10 Nolworo dalano kuom higni adek, mokawo e higa mar auchiel mar loch Hezekia, kane Hoshea wuod Ela osebet ruodh Israel kuom higni ochiko." 
2Kings18:11 Ruodh Asuria nodaro jo-Israel, motero nyaka Asuria, mi noketo moko kuomgi mondo odag Hela but aora Habor man Gozan, to moko noketo e miech jo-Media." 
2Kings18:12 Wachno notimore nikech ne ok girito chik Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachgi, to ne giketho singruok mane gitimo kodgi. Ne ok gimako weche duto mane Musa jatich Ruoth Nyasaye ochikogi, kata dewogi bende ne ok gidewo." 
2Kings18:13 E higa mar apar gabich mar loch Hezekia, Senakerib ruodh Asuria nomonjo miech Juda duto mochiel gi ohinga, mokawo." 
2Kings18:14 Eka Hezekia ruodh Juda nooro wach ni ruodh Asuria mane oyudo ni Lakish niya, “Aseketho to we kedo koda kendo, nikech ayie chulo gimoro amora midwaro.” Kamano ruodh Asuria nodwaro kuome fedha ma romo kilo alufu apar, kod dhahabu moromo kilo alufu achiel." 
2Kings18:15 Mi Hezekia nomiye fedha duto mane nie Od Ruoth Nyasaye, kod mane nie kar keno mar od ruoth." 
2Kings18:16 E ndalono ema Hezekia nogoloe dhahabu mane obawgo thike kod sirni mag dhood Ruoth Nyasaye, momiyo ruodh Asuria." 
2Kings18:17 Ruodh Asuria nooro Tartan gi Rabsaris kod Rabshake, ma jodonge, kaachiel gi oganda lweny maduong’, ir Hezekia, mi ne giwuok Lakish ka gidhi Jerusalem. Kane gichopo kuno, ne gichung’ but fereji mane golo pi e Yawo Mamalo, e yo maduong’ madhi e puodho miluongo ni Puoth Jalwok Lewni." 
2Kings18:18 Ne giluongo ruoth, to Eliakim wuod Hilkia, mane jaduong’ od ruoth, gi Shebna jagoro, kod Joa wuod Asaf, ma jachan weche mag piny, ema ne jowuok irgi." 
2Kings18:19 Rabshake nowachonigi ni mondo ginyis Hezekia ni ruoth maduong’, ma ruodh Asuria owachone kama: “Ere gimomiyo idhialori kamano?" 
2Kings18:20 Iparo ni weche awecha nyalo lokore rieko kod teko mar loyo lweny? En ng’a ma igeno ni biro konyi piem koda? 
2Kings18:21 Ang’eyo ni idhialori nikech jo-Misri, to nyaka ing’e ni Farao ruodh Misri chalo gi odundu mobarore, ma ka ng’ato oyiengoree, to pilore, kendo chwowo lwete. Mano e kaka Farao ruodh Misri chalo ni ji duto mogeno kuome." 
2Kings18:22 To kuwachona ni ugeno kuom Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu, donge en ema Hezekia oseketho hembkone gi kuonde mitimonee misengni kochiko jo-Juda gi jo-Jerusalem ni nyaka lem mana e nyim kendo-mar-misango man Jerusalem?" 
2Kings18:23 “Koro in Hezekia, singri ni ruodh Asuria ma atiyone! Ayie miyi farese alufu ariyo, kapo nono ni inyalo yudo joma diidhgi!" 
2Kings18:24 Ka jo-Misri ema igeno ni biro konyi gi geche kod joidh farese, to ere kaka iparo ni dilo kata mana achiel matinie moloyo kuom jotend lweny mag ruodha?" 
2Kings18:25 Koso iparo ni asebiro mana ni mondo amonj amonja Jerusalem, akethi, ka ok Ruoth Nyasaye ema ne owachona ni mondo abi amonj pinyni, akethi!”" 
2Kings18:26 Eka Eliakim wuod Hilkia gi Shebna kod Joa nowacho ni Rabshake niya, “Wasayi, yie iwuo kodwa gi dho Aram, nikech en dhok mwang’eyo, to we wuoyo kodwa gi dho Hibrania kae, nimar joma ni ewi ohinga nyalo winjowa.”" 
2Kings18:27 To Rabshake ne odwokogi, kapenjogi niya, “Uparo ni un kod ruodhu kende ema ne ruodha oora iru mondo awachnu wechegi? Ooyo, noora ir joma ni ewi ohinga, ma ochunore ni nyaka cham chiethgi, kendo madh lachgi, mana kaka un bende unutim!”" 
2Kings18:28 Bang’ mano Rabshake nochung’ mokok gi duol maduong’ gi dho Hibrania niya, “Winjuru wach ruoth maduong’ ma ruodh Asuria!" 
2Kings18:29 Owacho ni kik uyie Hezekia wuondu, nikech ok onyal resou e lweta." 
2Kings18:30 Kik uwe ohou ni mondo ugen kuom Ruoth Nyasaye, kowachonu ni, adier Ruoth Nyasaye ema noresu, kendo ni ruodh Asuria ok nokaw dala maduong’ni." 
2Kings18:31 Kik uwinj wach Hezekia, nimar ruodh Asuria owacho niya, ‘Winjreuru koda mondo ubi ira, mi ng’ato ka ng’ato kuomu nocham olemb mzabipe kod ng’ope, bende nomodh pi e sokone owuon," 
2Kings18:32 nyaka chop abi, mi agolu kendo ateru e piny machal gi pinyuni, mondo kik utho, to ubed mana mangima. En piny ma cham gi mzabibu chiekie maber, kendo ma makati gi divai gi mor zeituni kod mor kich ng’enyie. To kik uwinj Hezekia kawuondou ni Ruoth Nyasaye biro konyou." 
2Kings18:33 Bende nitie nyasach piny moro mosereso pinye e lwet ruodh Asuria? 
2Kings18:34 Nyiseche mag Hamath gi Arpad ni kanye? Koso ere nyiseche mag Sefarvaim gi Hena kod Iva? Bende ne gireso Samaria e lweta? 
2Kings18:35 Kuom nyiseche duto mag pinjego, ere mosereso Jerusalem e lweta?’ ”" 
2Kings18:36 To ji noling’ thi, ma onge ng’at modwoke kata wach achiel, nikech ruoth Hezekia nosegolo chik ni kik dwoke." 
2Kings18:37 Eliakim wuod Hilkia ma jaduong’ od ruoth, gi Shebna jagoro kod Joa wuod Asaf ma jachan weche mag piny ne jobiro ir Hezekia, ka joyiecho lepgi, mi ginyise gima ne Rabshake owacho." 
2Kings19:1 Kane ruoth Hezekia owinjo wechego, noyiecho lepe, mi orwako pien gugru, kendo odhi e Od Ruoth Nyasaye." 
2Kings19:2 Nooro Eliakim ma jaduong’ ode gi Shebna ma jagoro kod jodolo madongo ir janabi Isaya wuod Amoz ka jorwako piende gugru," 
2Kings19:3 mondo odhi owachne niya, “Hezekia owacho ni kawuono en chieng’ dhier gi kum kod wichkuot. Wachalo gi dhako ma muoch kayo, to onge muya mochologo nyathi." 
2Kings19:4 Nyalo bet ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachi osewinjo weche Rabshake ma ruodh Asuria oseoro mondo oyany Nyasaye Mangima. Omiyo kamoro obiro kumo Rabshake nikech weche ma osewinjo ka Rabshake wachogo. Kuom mano, in Isaya, lem ni jowa mapod odong’.”" 
2Kings19:5 Kamano kane jodong ruoth Hezekia ochopo ir Isaya, nowachone wechego," 
2Kings19:6 nodwokogi niya, “Dhiuru uwach ni ruodhu ni Ruoth Nyasaye owacho kama: ‘Kik iluor weche ma isewinjo ka ruodh Asuria yanyago," 
2Kings19:7 nikech abiro miye chuny man gi kibaji, mi, kowinjo wach moro marach, to noring odog e pinye, kuma nami onegee.’ ”" 
2Kings19:8 Rabshake nodok, moyudo ni ruodh Asuria osea Lakish, odhi monjo Libna. Omiyo nodhi ire kuno." 
2Kings19:9 To kane ruodh Asuria owinjo Tirhaka ruodh Ethiopia obiro monje, nochako ooro joote ir Hezekia ruodh Juda, kowacho niya," 
2Kings19:10 “Kik iyie Nyasachi migeno kuomeno wuondi ni ruodh Asuria ok nokaw Jerusalem 
2Kings19:11 Chutho, isewinjo kaka ruodhi mag Asuria oseketho pinje mane gikedogo chuth. To koro iparo ni in ema dikwo?" 
2Kings19:12 Kwerena nonego jo-Gozan gi jo-Haran gi jo-Rezef kod jo-Eden ma nodak Telasar. Koro dak ne nyisechegi okonyogi? 
2Kings19:13 Koso ere ruodhi mag Hamath gi Arpad gi Sefarvaim gi Hena kod Iva?” 
2Kings19:14 Hezekia nokawo barua mane joote okelone, mi osomo. Bang’e ne odhi e Hekalu, mi oyaro baruano e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, kokwaye niya," 
2Kings19:15 “A Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel, mobet ewi kerubi kaka ruoth bet e kom duong’ne, in kendi e Nyasach ogendini duto mae piny, kendo in ema nichueyo polo gi piny." 
2Kings19:16 A Ruoth Nyasaye, chik iti mondo iwinji, kendo yaw wang’i mondo inen. Winj weche ma Senakerib yanyigo, in Nyasaye Mangima!" 
2Kings19:17 A Ruoth Nyasaye, en adier ni ruodhi mag Asuria oseketho pinje duto," 
2Kings19:18 mi gibolo nyisechegi e mach, kendo gisekethogi chuth, nimar ne ok gin nyiseche kata matin, to mana tich dhano molos gi yath kata gi kidi." 
2Kings19:19 To koro in Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachwa, yie ireswa e lwet Senakerib, mondo ogendinii duto mae piny ong’e ni in kendi e Nyasaye.”" 
2Kings19:20 Eka Isaya wuod Amoz nooro ni Hezekia wach niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel owacho ni osewinjo lemo mikwayego nikech wach ma Senakerib ruodh Asuria osesiemigo," 
2Kings19:21 omiyo osewuoyo kuom Senakerib kama: “In Senakerib, dala Sayun ochayi kendo jari! Ee, dala Sayun twenyoni ume!" 
2Kings19:22 To koro in, en ng’ano ma isejaro kendo iyanyo? Koso en ng’a, ma isekokne, kijowo wang’i! Nyaka ing’e ni en Ng’ama Ler mar Israel!" 
2Kings19:23 Isejaro Ruoth Nyasaye kimiyo jooteni wacho niya, ‘Aseidho gode maboyo mag Lebanon, mi achopo midimidi, ka an gi gechena mag lweny mang’eny mokadho akwana. Bende asetong’o yiend sida madongo, kod yiend saipras mabeyo man kuno. Asechopo nyaka e chuny bungu, kuma ni iye mogik, kendo ma yien odichie." 
2Kings19:24 Asekunyo sokni, mi amodho pi pinje mamoko. Bende aore mag Misri noduono, ka anyonogi gi tienda!’" 
2Kings19:25 To in Senakerib, kata obedo ni iwacho kamano, donge ing’eyo ni an Ruoth Nyasaye ema nachano chon mondo gigo otimre? Adier, ne achanogi chon, to koro amiyo gitimore. An ema ne achano mondo imuk mier mochiel motegno olokre gundni." 
2Kings19:26 Ma joma odakie chalo gi lum mae pap, maonge gi teko, kata ka lum matwi e tat ot, to ner kapok odongo, nimar ne gionge gi teko, kendo ne ging’eng’ ka luoro omakogi." 
2Kings19:27 To ang’eyo timbeni duto: ang’eyo kata ka ichung’ kata ka ibet piny, kata kiwuok kata kiduogo dala." 
2Kings19:28 Asewinjo kaka iyanya malich, kendo kaka isungori, omiyo abiro keto mbedo e umi, kod rajaki e dhogi, mondo awichi idog thuru gi yo mane ibirogo." 
2Kings19:29 “To winji, in Hezekia, ranyisi ma amiyi ema: E higa mokwongoni, unucham gik matwi kendgi, kendo e higa mar ariyo unucham orowe moloth e higa mokwongono, to e higa mar adek unuket kodhi, kendo unuka cham. Bende unupidh mzabibu, kendo unucham olembgi." 
2Kings19:30 Jo-Juda modong’ nochal gi yath matero tiendene piny, kendo nyago olemo e bedene," 
2Kings19:31 nimar joma nok modong’ nowuog Jerusalem. Adier, oganda mar joma otony noa e got Sayun. Ruoth Nyasaye oseketo chunye mondo otim mano.”" 
2Kings19:32 Kuom mano, Ruoth Nyasaye owuoyo kuom ruodh Asuria kama: “Ok nodonj e dala Jerusalem, kendo ok nobaye gi asere, kata monjogo koting’o kuot ok nomonje. Bende ok noging pith mondo oidhgo ohingane." 
2Kings19:33 Enodog gi yo ma nobirogo, to ok nodonj Jerusalem," 
2Kings19:34 nimar anaked ni dalani mondo aresi, nikech nyinga, kendo nikech Daudi jatichna.”" 
2Kings19:35 Otienono, malaika mar Ruoth Nyasaye nodhi monego jo-Asuria alufu mia achiel gi piero aboro gabich (185,000) e kambigi, kendo kane ji ochiew gokinyi, to ringre joma otho ema ne ginwang’o kopie piny." 
2Kings19:36 Mano omiyo Senakerib ruodh Asuria noa kuno, mi odok Nineve odakie." 
2Kings19:37 To chieng’ moro, kane oyudo olemo e od Nisrok nyiseche, yawuote ma Adramalek gi Sharezer nobiro monege. Bang’e ne giringo, mi gidhi e piny Ararat, to Esarhadon nodoko ruoth kar Senakarib wuon mare." 
2Kings20:1 E ndalogo, Hezekia ne tuo, kendo ohewore. Janabi Isaya wuod Amoz nobiro ire, mowachone niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye owachoni ni mondo ilam mwanduni ni yawuoti, nimar ibiro tho, ok nikwo.”" 
2Kings20:2 Kane Hezekia owinjo kamano, nolokore mong’iyo kor ot, kokwayo Ruoth Nyasaye niya," 
2Kings20:3 “A Ruoth Nyasaye, asayi, parie kaka asewuotho e nyimi gi adieri kod chuny mobidhore, ka atimo gik malong’oni.” Eka ne oywak malit." 
2Kings20:4 To kane Isaya pok ochopo e dier laru, wach Ruoth Nyasaye nobirone niya," 
2Kings20:5 “Dogi iwach ni Hezekia ma jatend joga, ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Daudi kwaru owacho kama: ‘Asewinjo kwayoni, kendo aseneno pi wang’i. Omiyo abiro changi, kendo bang’ ndalo adek inidhi e Od Ruoth Nyasaye." 
2Kings20:6 Abiro medi ndalo moromo higni apar gabich, bende abiro resi kaachiel gi dala Jerusalem e lwet ruodh Asuria, kendo abiro rito dalani nikech nyinga, kendo nikech Daudi jatichna.’ ”" 
2Kings20:7 Eka Isaya nowacho ni jood Hezekia ni mondo okel ng’owo moswagi omwon e bur mane okuodo Hezekia. Ne gitimo kamano, mi Hezekia nochango." 
2Kings20:8 Bang’ mano, Hezekia nopenjo Isaya niya, “Ere gima biro bedona ranyisi ni Ruoth Nyasaye biro changa, kendo ni anadhi e Hekalune bang’ ndalo adek?”" 
2Kings20:9 Isaya nodwoke, ka penje niya, “Diher mondo tipo mar wang’chieng’ manie raidhi odhi nyime ondamo apar, koso mondo odog chien ondamo apar? Mano e ranyisi ma Ruoth Nyasaye onyisigo ni enotim gima osewacho.”" 
2Kings20:10 To Hezekia nokone niya, “En gima yot mondo tipo odhi nyime ondamo apar. Emomiyo tipo mondo odog mana chien ondamo apar.”" 
2Kings20:11 Eka Isaya janabi nokwayo Ruoth Nyasaye kamano, mi Ruoth Nyasaye nodwoko tipo chien ondamo apar e raidhi mane Ahaz oloso." 
2Kings20:12 E ndalogo Merodak-baladan nooro joote ir Hezekia gi barupe kod mich, nikech nowinjo ni yande otuo." 
2Kings20:13 Hezekia norwako jootego, monyisogi mwandune duto mane nie ode mar keno, kaka fedha gi dhahabu gi gik mang’ue ng’ar, gi mo ma nengone tek, kod gige mag lweny, kaachiel gi gik moko duto mane ni kuonde kenone. Onge gimoro amora e ode kata e pinye mane ok onyisogi." 
2Kings20:14 To bang’e janabi Isaya nobiro ir Ruoth hezekia, mopenje niya, “Jogi oa kanye? To wach ang’o mokelogi?” Hezekia nodwoke ni, “Gia e piny Babulon, kuma bor.”" 
2Kings20:15 Isaya nomedo penje niya, “To ang’o ma gineno e odi?” Hezekia nodwoke ni, “Giseneno gik moko duto manie oda. Onge gimoro amora modong’ mak anyisogi e kuonde kenona.”" 
2Kings20:16 Eka Isaya nowacho ni Hezekia niya, “Winj wach Ruoth Nyasaye!" 
2Kings20:17 Ndalo biro ma gik moko duto manie odi, ma kwereni osekano nyaka chil kawuono, noter Babulon. Bende Ruoth Nyasaye omedo wacho ni onge gima nodong’ kata achiel mak oter kuno." 
2Kings20:18 Yawuoti moko nolok wasumbni. Adier, moko kuom yawuoti hie nolok wasumbni mabuoch e od ruodh Babulon.”" 
2Kings20:19 Hezekia ne odwoke niya, “Wach Ruoth Nyasaye ma isenyisa ber.” To ne odwoke kamano, koparo ni en to kue biro siko e ndalone duto." 
2Kings20:20 Weche moko mag Hezekia, gi tekone duto, kendo kaka noloso yawo gi fereji maduong’ mane kelo pi Jerusalem, ondik e Kitap Weche mag Ndalo mag Juda." 
2Kings20:21 Hezekia notho, moyiki but kwerene. Manase wuode nodoko ruoth kare." 
2Kings21:1 Manase ne jahigni apar gariyo kane odoko ruoth, morito piny kuom higni piero abich gabich, kodak Jerusalem. Min mare ne nyinge Hefziba." 
2Kings21:2 Timbe Manase ne richo e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, kaka timbe makuero mag ogendini mane Ruoth Nyasaye oriembo mondo owe thuolo ni jo-Israel." 
2Kings21:3 Nochako oloso hembko mane ni kuonde moting’ore mane Hezekia wuon mare oseketho, kendo nogero kuonde liswa ni Baal. Nochungo siro milamo miluongo ni Ashera, kaka Ahab ruodh Israel notimo, bende nolamo sulue duto, kotiyonigi." 
2Kings21:4 Nogero kende mag liswa e Hekalu mane Ruoth Nyasaye osewuoyo kuome niya, “Jerusalem ema naketie nyinga.”" 
2Kings21:5 Bende nogero kende mag misango ni sulue duto e laru ariyo mag Od Ruoth Nyasaye. 
2Kings21:6 Nowang’o wuode bende, kotimogo misango. Noyie gi jokor wach gi jo nyakalondo kod ajuoke. Timbene maricho ne ng’eny e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, omiyo mirima nomako Ruoth Nyasaye." 
2Kings21:7 Siro milamo mane oseloso, nochungo ei Hekalu, to Ruoth Nyasaye nosewuoyo kuom Hekaluno, kawacho ni Daudi gi Solomon wuod Daudi niya, “Aseyiero Hekaluni gi Jerusalem kuom dhoudi duto mag Israel mondo nyinga obedie nyaka chieng’." 
2Kings21:8 Ka jo-Israel orito gik moko duto mane achikogi, kendo gitimogi, bende ka giluwo chike duto mane Musa jatichna onyisogi, to ok nariembgi e piny mane amiyo kweregi.”" 
2Kings21:9 To ne gitamore winjo, kendo Manase nosemogi ni mondo gimed timbegi maricho e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye moloyo ogendini mane Ruoth Nyasaye otieko mondo owe thuolo ni jo-Israel." 
2Kings21:10 Ruoth Nyasaye nomiyo jotichne ma jonabi owacho niya," 
2Kings21:11 “Manase ruodh Juda osetimo tim makuero, kod richo madongo moloyo mago duto mane jo-Amor otimo chon, kendo osemiyo jo-Juda bende obedo joricho, nikech nyisechene manono." 
2Kings21:12 Emomiyo abiro kelo masira malich kuom Jerusalem gi Juda, ma ka ng’ato owinjo, to ite nopopni." 
2Kings21:13 Abiro pimo Jerusalem gi tol mane apimogo Samaria, kendo gi rapim mane apimogo dhood Ahab. Abiro nang’o Jerusalem mapoth, mana kaka kungu nang’o puodho." 
2Kings21:14 Anawit joga awuon modong’, kendo anachiwgi e lwet wasikgi duto, mondo opegi, kendo oyakgi," 
2Kings21:15 nikech gisemiya mirima gi timbegi maricho, chakre ndalo mane kweregi owuokie Misri nyaka chil kawuono.”" 
2Kings21:16 To ewi richo duto mane Manase otimo, komiyogo jo-Juda obedo joricho e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, en ni nomedo chuero remb ji mang’eny maonge ketho, nyaka remo nomol ka ohula e Jerusalem." 
2Kings21:17 Weche moko mag Manase, gi timbene duto, gi richo mane otimo, ondiki e Kitap Weche mag Ndalo mag Ruodhi mag Juda." 
2Kings21:18 Manase notho, moyike e orundune mane nie puoth Uza. Amon wuode nodoko ruoth kare." 
2Kings21:19 Amon ne jahigni piero ariyo gariyo kane ochako tich, morito piny kuom higni ariyo, kodak Jerusalem. Min mare ne nyinge Meshulemeth nyar Haruz ma ja-Jotba." 
2Kings21:20 Timbe Amon ne richo e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye mana kaka timbe Manase wuon mare. 
2Kings21:21 Noluwo yore duto mane wuon mare oluwo, kotiyo ni nyiseche manono mane wuon mare tiyonigi, kendo kokulorenigi." 
2Kings21:22 Noweyo Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach kwerene, kendo notamore luwe." 
2Kings21:23 Jodong ruoth Amon nojame, monege e ode." 
2Kings21:24 To jo-Juda nonego jogo duto mane ojame, kendo ne giketo Josia wuode mondo obed ruoth kare." 
2Kings21:25 Weche moko mag Amon ondiki e Kitap Weche mag Ndalo mag Ruodhi mag Juda. 
2Kings21:26 Noyike e liende mane nie puoth Uza. Josia nodoko ruoth kare. 
2Kings22:1 Josia ne jahigni aboro kane odoko ruoth, morito piny kuom higni piero adek gachiel, kodak Jerusalem. Min mare ne nyinge Jedida nyar Adaya ma ja-Bozkath." 
2Kings22:2 Timbe Josia ne long’o e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo noluwo timbe duto mag Daudi kwar mare, ma ok oweyo kata achiel." 
2Kings22:3 Kane Josia obedo ruoth, kuom higni apar gaboro, nooro Shafan jagoro wuod Azalia ma wuod Meshulam e Od Ruoth Nyasaye, kowachone niya," 
2Kings22:4 “Dhiyo ir Hilkia jadolo maduong’, inyise mondo okwan kar romb pesa mosekel ei Od Ruoth Nyasaye, ma jorit osechoko kuom ji." 
2Kings22:5 Pesago mondo oket e lwet nyipeche marito tich Od Ruoth Nyasaye," 
2Kings22:6 mondo gichulgo jotich bao gi jogedo kod jopa kite maloso kuonde mokethore e Od Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo mondo ging’iewgo yien gi kite mopa milosogo kuonde mokethorego." 
2Kings22:7 To kik penjgi kaka gitiyo gi pesa momigi, nikech gin joma ogen.”" 
2Kings22:8 Kindeno ema Hilkia jadolo maduong’ nowachoe ni Shafan jagoro niya, “Aseyudo Kitap Chik e Od Ruoth Nyasaye.” Mi nomiyo Shafan kitabuno, mosomo." 
2Kings22:9 Shafan jagoro notero ni ruoth wach niya, “Jotichni osegolo pesa mane oyud e Od Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo gisemiyo nyipeche marito tich odno.”" 
2Kings22:10 Eka nomedo wacho ni ruoth niya, “Hilkia osemiya kitabu moro.” Mi nosome ni ruoth." 
2Kings22:11 Kane ruoth owinjo weche manie kitap chik, noyiecho lepe." 
2Kings22:12 Eka nochiko Hilkia jadolo, gi Ahikam wuod Shafan gi Akbor wuod Mikaya, gi Shafan jagoro, kod Asaya jatich ruoth, niya," 
2Kings22:13 “Dhiuru upenj Ruoth Nyasaye gima biro timorena, kendo ni jo-Juda duto, nikech weche manie kitabu mwaseyudoni. Nyaka bed ni Ruoth Nyasaye okecho kodwa malich, nikech kwerewa ne ok orito chike manie kitabuni, kata timo gik moko duto mondikie.”" 
2Kings22:14 Omiyo Hilkia jadolo gi Ahikam gi Akbor gi Shafan kod Asaya ne jodhi ir Hulda janabi madhako ma chi Shalum wuod Tikva, ma wuod Harhas, jarit lep lemo, mane odak Jerusalem e migawo mar ariyo. Ne giwuoyo kode," 
2Kings22:15 mi nodwokogi niya, “Nyisuru ng’at mane oorou ira ni" 
2Kings22:16 Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel owacho kama: ‘Abiro kelo masira e pinyni, kendo kuom joma odakie, kaluwore gi weche duto manie kitabu ma ruodh Juda osesomo." 
2Kings22:17 Ne gikwinya gi timbegi ka giweya, kendo ka giwang’o ubani ni nyiseche manono. Emomiyo mirimba nobed mager kuom pinyni, kendo ok norum.’" 
2Kings22:18 To wachuru ni ruodh Juda mane oorou mondo upenjne Ruoth Nyasaye wach, ni Ruoth Nyasaye owacho kama:" 
2Kings22:19 ‘Kane iwinjo wechena mane awacho kuom pinyni kod joma odakie, ni ginibed joma okuong’ kendo okwedi, chunyi ne yom, kendo odembore, miyiecho lepi kendo iywak e nyima. Emomiyo an bende asewinjo ywakni." 
2Kings22:20 Noyiki e liendi gi kue, kiluwo kwereni, ma kata wang’i ok none masira ma abiro kelo kae.’ ”" 
2Kings23:1 Kane jootego odwoko ni ruoth wach, noluongo jodongo duto mag Juda gi mag Jerusalem." 
2Kings23:2 Nodhi e Od Ruoth Nyasaye gi jo-Juda kod jo-Jerusalem duto; joma omew gi jochan machalre, kaachiel gi jodolo kod jonabi, mi nosomonigi weche duto mane nie kitap singruok mane nie Od Ruoth Nyasaye." 
2Kings23:3 Eka nodhi e bath siro, mochung’ e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye kosingore ni enoluw Ruoth Nyasaye gi chunye duto kod tekone duto, komako chikene gi wechene kod buchene, kamano mondo orit weche mag singruok mondiki e kitabuno. Mi ji duto bende notimo singruokno." 
2Kings23:4 Eka ruoth nochiko Hilkia jadolo maduong’, gi jadolo maluwe, kod jorit dhoot, ni mondo gik moko duto milamogo Baal gi siro miluongo ni Ashera kod sulue, ogol e Od Ruoth Nyasaye. Nowang’ogi e bath Jerusalem e paw aora Kidron, mi notero buchgi nyaka Bethel." 
2Kings23:5 Nogolo jodolo mag nyiseche manono mane ruodhi mag Juda oketo mondo owang’ ubani e hembko mag miech Juda, kod mag gwenge mokiewo kod Jerusalem, kendo nogolo joma ne wang’o ubani ni Baal gi wang’chieng’ gi due kod sulue duto." 
2Kings23:6 Nogolo siro milamo miluongo ni Ashera e Od Ruoth Nyasaye, motero e dho aora Kidron e bath Jerusalem. Nowang’e kanyo but aora, motoye matindotindo nyaka olokore buru. Eka nokawo buche, mopuko e liete ji ajiya." 
2Kings23:7 Nomuko ut jochode mane nie Od Ruoth Nyasaye, mane ji terorego, kaka kit lemogi nobet. Udigo ema ne mon twang’oe pasia mag Ashera." 
2Kings23:8 Bang’e Josia noluongo jodolo mane nie miech Juda, kendo noketho hembko mane jodologo wang’oe ubani, chakre Geba nyaka Beer-sheba. (Bende nomuko hembko mar jochiende mane oger e dhoranga Joshua jaduong’ Jerusalem, bat koracham kidonjo e dala.)" 
2Kings23:8 Bang’e Josia noluongo jodolo mane nie miech Juda, kendo noketho hembko mane jodologo wang’oe ubani, chakre Geba nyaka Beer-sheba. (Bende nomuko hembko mar jochiende mane oger e dhoranga Joshua jaduong’ Jerusalem, bat koracham kidonjo e dala.)" 
2Kings23:9 Kata obedo ni noluongo jodolo mag hembko mane ni kuonde moting’ore kamano, to ne otamogi ni kik gitim misango e kendo-mar-misango mar Ruoth Nyasaye man Jerusalem, to noyienigi mana chamo makati ma ok ketie thowi kaachiel gi jodolo wetegi." 
2Kings23:10 Ruoth Josia noketho Tofeth manie holo mar Ben-hinom ni kik ji wang’ie nyithindgi ka misango ni Molek. 
2Kings23:11 Nogolo kido mag farese mane ruodhi mag Juda oseketo ni wang’chieng’. 
2Kings23:12 Nomuko kende-mag-misango mane nie wi gorofa mar od Ahaz, mane ruodhi mag Juda oloso e laru ariyo mag od Ruoth Nyasaye. Notoyogi matindotindo, mopuko ng’injogi e aora Kidron." 
2Kings23:13 Ruoth noketho bende kuonde hembko mane ni yo milambo mar got Zeituni, man yo wuok chieng’ mar Jerusalem, mane Solomon ruodh Israel ogero ni Ashteroth, nyasaye ma kuero mar jo-Sidon, gi Kemosh, nyasach jo-Moab, kod Milkom, nyasach jo-Amon." 
2Kings23:14 Noturo sirni mag kite gi mag yien mane ji lamo, motoyogi matindotindo, mi kuonde mane gichungie nodino gi choke ji." 
2Kings23:15 Josia nomuko kendo-mar-misango man Bethel, kaachiel gi hembkone mane Jeroboam wuod Nebat oloso. Notoyo kitene, molokore buru, kendo nowang’o siro milamo mane ni kanyo. (Jeroboam nogo ema nomiyo jo-Israel obedo joricho.)" 
2Kings23:16 Kane Josia owichore, noneno liete ewi got. Nooro ji, mogolo choke e lietego, mi ne giwang’ogi e kendo-mar-misango. Kamano noketho kendono, kaluwore gi wach Ruoth Nyasaye mane ng’at Nyasaye okoro kane Jeroboam ochung’ e dho kendo chieng’ sawo cha. Eka Josia noting’o wang’e, moneno liend ng’at Nyasaye mane okoro wechego." 
2Kings23:17 Nopenjo niya, “Mano liend ng’a, ma aneno loka cha?” Jodalanoo nodwoke niya, “En liend ng’at Nyasaye mane oa Juda, mokoro gik moko duto misetimo kuom kendo-mar-misangoni.”" 
2Kings23:18 Eka Josia nowacho niya, “Weyeuru! Ng’ato kik gol chokene.” Omiyo ne giweyo chokene kaachiel gi choke janabi mane oa Samaria." 
2Kings23:19 Bende Josia noketho od lemo mane nie hembko man kuonde moting’ore, mane ruodhi mag Israel ogero e miech Samaria, kamiyogo Ruoth Nyasaye mirima." 
2Kings23:20 Jodolo duto mane Josia onwang’o e hembko nonego e kende-mag-misango. Eka nodok Jerusalem. 
2Kings23:21 Ruoth nochiko ji duto ni mondo otim Pasaka ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachgi, kaka ondiki e Kitap Singruok." 
2Kings23:22 Adier, Pasaka ma kamano ne pok otim, e ndalo mane jobura ritoe Israel, kata e ndalo mag ruodhi mag Israel gi Juda." 
2Kings23:23 To e higa mar apar gaboro mar loch Josia kende ema ne otimie Pasaka makama ni Ruoth Nyasaye, Jerusalem." 
2Kings23:24 Bende Josia nogolo jonyakalondo, gi ajuoke, gi kido mag nyiseche manono miluongo ni Terafim, gi nyiseche mamoko molos gi lwet dhano, kaachiel gitimbe makuero duto mane onwang’ e piny Juda, kendo e Jerusalem. Kamano noluwo weche mag chik mane ondik e kitabu mane Hilkia jadolo oyudo e Od Ruoth Nyasaye." 
2Kings23:25 Onge ruoth moro kata achiel mane oluwo Ruoth Nyasaye gi chunye duto, kod tekone duto, komako chike duto mag Musa, kaka Josia notimo." 
2Kings23:26 Kata kamano chuny Ruoth Nyasaye ne ok olendo kuom mirima mager mane okechogo gi jo-Juda nikech timbe maricho mane Manase ochwanyego. 
2Kings23:27 To nowacho niya, “Abiro riembo jo-Juda bende mondo oa e nyima, kaka ne ariembo jo-Israel. Abiro jwang’o Jerusalem, dala mane ayiero, kendo abiro wito Hekalu mane awacho ni nyinga nobedie.”" 
2Kings23:28 Weche moko mag Josia, kod timbene duto, ondiki e Kitap Weche mag Ndalo mag Ruodhi mag Juda." 
2Kings23:29 E ndalo Josia ema ne Farao-neko, ruodh Misri, odhi kedoe gi ruodh Asuria e dho aora Yufrate. Ruoth Josia nodhi Megido kedo kode, to kane girado, Farao nonege." 
2Kings23:30 Joge nogolo ringre Megido, koting’e e gari. Ne gikele Jerusalem, mi giyike e liende owuon. Eka ji duto nokawo Jehoahaz wuod Josia, moketo ruoth kar wuon mare." 
2Kings23:31 Jehoahaz ne jahigni piero ariyo gadek kane odoko ruoth, morito piny kuom dueche adek, kodak Jerusalem. Min mare ne nyinge Hamutal nyar Jeremia ma ja-Libna." 
2Kings23:32 Timbe Jehoahaz ne richo e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, mana kaka timbe kwerene." 
2Kings23:33 Farao-neko notere Ribla e piny Hamath, motueye kuno, mondo kik obed ruodh Jerusalem, kendo noketo ni jo-Juda osuru moromo kilo alufu adek mag fedha, gi kilo mia adek mag dhahabu." 
2Kings23:34 Eka Farao-neko noketo Eliakim wuod Josia mondo obed ruoth kar Josia wuon mare, kendo noloko nyinge ni Jehoyakim. Jehoahaz to notero Misri, kuma nothoe." 
2Kings23:35 Jehoyakim noketo ni jo-Juda osuru ma dirom pesa mane Farao dwaro. Ng’ato ka ng’ato nogolo dhahabu gi fedha kaka mwandune obet. Kamano Jehoyakim nochulo fedha gi dhahabu mane Farao oketone. 
2Kings23:36 Jehoyakim ne jahigni piero ariyo gabich kane odoko ruoth, morito piny kuom higni apar gachiel, kodak Jerusalem. Min mare ne nyinge Zebida nyar Pedaya ma ja-Ruma." 
2Kings23:37 Timbe Jehoyakim ne richo e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, mana kaka timbe kwerene." 
2Kings24:1 E ndalo Jehoyakim, Nebukadnezar ruodh Babulon nobiro, mi Jehoyakim nobet e bwo lochne kuom higni adek. To bang’e nopiem kode, modagi lochne" 
2Kings24:2 Eka Ruoth Nyasaye nooro mony mag jo-Babulon gi mag jo-Aram, gi mag jo-Moab kod mag jo-Amon, mondo oked gi jo-Juda, kendo ne giketho pinygi chuth, kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nosemiyo jatichne ma janabi owacho." 
2Kings24:3 Adier, gigo notimore kuom jo-Juda mana kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho, ni mondo ogolgi e nyime. Ruoth Nyasaye nodagi weyonigi kethogi, nikech richo mane Manase otimo," 
2Kings24:4 kopong’o Jerusalem gi remb joma onge ketho. 
2Kings24:5 Weche moko mag Jehoyakim gi timbene duro, ondiki e Kitap Weche mag Ndalo mag Ruodhi mag Juda." 
2Kings24:6 Jehoyakim notho, moluwo kwerene, mi Jehoyachin wuode nodoko ruoth kare." 
2Kings24:7 Ruodh Misri ne ok owuok kendo e pinye, nimar ruodh Babulon nosemaye pinje duto mane nie bwo lochne, chakre aora manie tong’ Misri nyaka chop aora Yufrate." 
2Kings24:8 Jehoyachin ne jahigni apar gaboro kane odoko ruoth, morito piny kuom dueche adek kende, kodak Jerusalem. Min mare ne nyinge Nehushta nyar Elnathan ma ja-Jerusalem." 
2Kings24:9 Timbe Jehoyachin ne richo e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye mana kaka timbe wuon mare. 
2Kings24:10 Ndalono jolwenj Nebukadnezar ruodh Babulon nodhi monjo Jerusalem kendo ne gilworo dalano. 
2Kings24:11 Kane pod gilworo Jerusalem, Nebukadnezar nodhi kuno owuon," 
2Kings24:12 mi piny nohewo Jehoyachin, mochiwore ni ruodh Babulon, kaachiel gi min mare, gi jong’adne rieko, gi jodonge kod jotende. Nomake e higa mar aboro mar loch ruodh Babulon." 
2Kings24:13 Nebukadnezar nokawo gik mabeyo duto mane nie Od Ruoth Nyasaye, kod mane nie kar keno mar od ruoth, kendo nong’ado ong’ado gik moko duto mag dhahabu mane Solomon ruodh Israel oloso, mane nie Od Ruoth Nyasaye. Kamano wach Ruoth nochopo kare." 
2Kings24:14 Nebukadnezar nodaro jo-Jerusalem duto, kotero jodongo kod jomwandu ma dirom alufu apar e tuech kaachiel gi jotheth, kod ji duto molony kuom tich lwedo. Onge ng’ato mane odong’ mak mana joma odhier." 
2Kings24:15 Ruoth kaachiel gi min mare, gi monde gi jotende, kod jodong gwenge." 
2Kings24:16 Nogolo jogo duto Jerusalem kaachiel gi jomwandu duto ma dirom alufu abiriyo, gi jotheth kod joma olony kuom tich lwedo ma dirom alufu achiel. Giduto ne gin joma otegno, moromo lweny." 
2Kings24:17 To ruodh Babulon noketo Matania ma owadgi wuon Jehoyachin mondo obed ruoth kar Jehoyachin. Noloko nying Matania ni Zedekia. 
2Kings24:18 Zedekia ne jahigni piero ariyo gachiel kane odoko ruoth, morito piny kuom higni apar gachiel, kodak Jerusalem. Min mare ne nyinge Hamutal nyar Jeremia ma ja-Libna." 
2Kings24:19 Timbe Zedekia ne richo e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, mana kaka timbe Jehoyakim." 
2Kings24:20 Jo-Jerusalem gi jo-Juda nomiyo Ruoth Nyasaye mirima, nyaka nogologi e nyime." 
2Kings25:1 Omiyo chieng’ due apar, due mar apar, e higa mar ochiko mar loch Zedekia, Nebukadnezar ruodh Babulon nobiro gi joge mag lweny, mi gimonjo Jerusalem. Ne gigero kambi oko mar dala, eka ne gichielone ohinga molwore." 
2Kings25:2 Ne gigoyo ni Jerusalem ageng’a nyaka higa mar apar gachiel mar loch Zedekia. 
2Kings25:3 Koro kech ne lich e dalano, kendo ji ne onge gi chiemo chuth." 
2Kings25:4 Chieng’ due ochiko, due mar ang’wen, jo-Babulon nomwomo ohinga mar dala, mi Zedekia notemo ringo gi jolwenje duto gotieno, kata obedo ni jo-Babulon nosedhogo dala koni gi koni. Ne giluwo rangach mane nie kind ohingni ariyo, ka ging’ado orundu ruoth, mi gichiko yo holo mar Jordan." 
2Kings25:5 To jolweny mag Babulon nolawo Zedekia, mojuko e paw Jeriko, mi jolwenje duto oringo oweye." 
2Kings25:6 Ne gimake mi gitere Ribla ir ruodh Babulon, mong’adone bura kuno." 
2Kings25:7 Ne ginego yawuot Zedekia e wang’e koneno, eka ne gitoko wengene oko, kendo gitueye gi nyororo, mi gitere Babulon." 
2Kings25:8 Chieng’ due abiriyo due mar abich, e higa mar apar gochiko mar loch Nebukadnezar, jatend joma ne rito ruodh Babulon, nobiro Jerusalem," 
2Kings25:9 Nowang’o Od Ruoth Nyasaye, gi od ruoth, kod udi duto mag Jerusalem," 
2Kings25:10 kendo joge mag lweny nomuko ohinga duto mane olworo Jerusalem. 
2Kings25:11 Bang’e Nebukadnezar nomako ji duto mane odong’ Jerusalem motero Babulon, kaachiel gi joma ne oseringo modok ni ruodh Babulon, kod jotich molony mane pod odong’ kuno." 
2Kings25:12 To joma odhier ahinya, mane onge gi gimoro, noweyo e piny Juda mondo oti e puothe mzabibu, kendo e puothe mamoko." 
2Kings25:13 Jo-Babulon notoyo sirni mag mula, gi rachungi mane itiyogo e Hekalu, kod karaya maduong’ mar mula ma bende ne ni kanyo. Bang’e ne gitero mulago duto Babulon." 
2Kings25:14 Bende ne gidhi gi agulini gi rachodhi gi rangisni gi bakunde miting’oe remb misango, kod gik moko duto mag mula mane olos ni tich Hekalu." 
2Kings25:15 Bende jatend jolweny nokawo gik moko duto molos gi dhahabu kata molos gi fedha, kaka kikombe gi tegni mag mach." 
2Kings25:16 Pek mula mane ruoth Solomon olosogo sirni ariyo gi karaya maduong’ ne ng’eny mokadho apima. 
2Kings25:17 Sirni ariyogo ne romre. Moro ka moro borne modhi malo ne romo mita ochiko. Ewi siro ka siro ne nitie gima chalo agulu mar mula, ma borne modhi malo romo mita achiel gi nus, to alwora mare ne oketie gik mong’inore ong’inore ka machunga, ma bende nolos gi mula." 
2Kings25:18 Nebuzaradan, jatend lweny maduong’, nomako Seraya jadolo maduong’, gi Zefania jadolo maluwe, kod ji adek ma jorit dhood Hekalu." 
2Kings25:19 Bende nokawo ng’at mane osebedo jatend jolweny, gi jagoro mare mane tichne en ndiko nying joma onego obed jolweny, kaachiel gi ji abich kuom joma ne ng’ado ni ruoth rieko, kod jodongo piero auchiel mane pod ni Jerusalem." 
2Kings25:20 Jogo duto notero Ribla ir ruodh Babulon," 
2Kings25:21 mi ruoth nogolo chik, mi ogogi kendo oneggi kuno e piny Hamath. Kamano e kaka nodar jo-Juda e pinygi, moter e tuech." 
2Kings25:22 To kuom joma nodong’ e piny Juda, Nebukadnezar ruodh Babulon noyiero Gedalia wuod Ahikam ma wuod Shafan, mondo obed jatendgi." 
2Kings25:23 Jodong lweny duto, kaachiel gi jogi, nowinjo ni ruodh Babulon oseyiero Gedalia. Mi Ishmael wuod Nethania, gi Johanan wuod Karea, gi Seraya wuod Tanhumeth ja-Netoifa, kod Jaazania wuod ja-Maaka ne jodhi ir Gedalia kaachiel gi jogi." 
2Kings25:24 Gedalia nokuong’orenigi kowacho niya, “Kik uluor jo-Babulon. Daguru adaga e pinywani kuyie loch ruodh Babulon, to unune maber.”" 
2Kings25:25 To e due mar abiriyo, Ishmael wuod Nethania ma wuod Elishama ma anywola joka ruoth, nobiro gi ji apar, momonjo Gedalia. Ne ginege, kaachiel gi jo-Yahudi kod jo-Babulon mane ni kode Mizpa." 
2Kings25:26 Eka ji duto, kaachiel gi jodong lweny, noringo modhi Misri, nimar ne giluoro jo-Babulon." 
2Kings25:27 Kane Jehoyachin ruodh Juda osetue higni piero adek gabiriyo, Evil-merodak ruodh Babulon nogonye. Mano notimore chieng’ due piero ariyo gabiriyo, mar due apar gariyo, e higa mane Evil-merodak ochakoe tich ruoth."
