2Kings25:28 Evil-merodak norito Jehoyachin gi ng’wono, kendo ne omiye luor maduong’ moloyo ruodhi duto mane ni Babulon e tuech." 
2Kings25:29 Kuom mano Jehoyachin nolonyo lep tuech, kendo nochiemo e od ruoth ndalone duto." 
2Kings25:30 Odiechieng’ kodiechieng’ kuom higni duto mane ongima, ne imiye gik moko morome konyorego." 
1Chronicles1:1 Adam nonywolo Seth, to Seth nonywolo Enosh." 
1Chronicles1:2 Enosh nonywolo Kenan, to Kenan nonywolo Mahalalel. Mahalalel nonywolo Jared," 
1Chronicles1:3 to Jared nonywolo Enok. Enok nonywolo Methusela, to Methusela nonywolo Lamek." 
1Chronicles1:4 Lamek nonywolo Nowa, to Nowa nonywolo Shem gi Ham kod Jafeth." 
1Chronicles1:5 Jafeth nonywolo Gomer gi Magog, gi Madai gi Javan gi Tubal gi Meshak kod Tiras." 
1Chronicles1:6 To Gomer nonywolo Ashkenaz gi Rifath kod Togarma. 
1Chronicles1:7 Javan to nonywolo Elisha gi Tarshish gi Kitim kod jo-Rodan. 
1Chronicles1:8 Ham nonywolo Kush gi Misri gi Put kod Kanaan. 
1Chronicles1:9 To Kush nonywolo Seba gi Havila gi Sabta gi Raama kod Sabteka. To Raama nonywolo Sheba kod Dedan. 
1Chronicles1:10 Kush ne wuon Nimrod bende, ma nokwongo bet ruoth e piny." 
1Chronicles1:11 Nyikwa Misri ne gin jo-Lud, gi jo-Anam gi jo-Lehab gi jo-Naftu" 
1Chronicles1:12 gi jo-Pathrus gi jo-Kaslu kod jo-Kaftor, ma jo-Filistia nowuok kuomgi." 
1Chronicles1:13 Kanaan nonywolo yawuowi ariyo; Sidon wuode makayo gi Heth. 
1Chronicles1:14 Nyikwaye ne gin jo-Jebus gi jo-Amor gi jo-Girgash 
1Chronicles1:15 gi jo-Hivi gi jo-Arki gi jo-Sini 
1Chronicles1:16 gi jo-Arvad gi jo-Zemar kod jo-Hamath. 
1Chronicles1:17 Shem nonywolo Elam gi Ashur gi Arpaksad gi Lud kod Aram. To Aram nonywolo Uz gi Hul gi Gether kod Mash. 
1Chronicles1:18 Arpaksad nonywolo Shela, to Shela nonywolo Eber." 
1Chronicles1:19 Eber nonywolo Shela, to Shela nonywolo yawuowi ariyo: wuode makayo nochak ni Peleg (tiende ni, pogruok), nikech e ndalone ema nopogie piny, to owadgi ne nyinge Joktan." 
1Chronicles1:20 Joktan nonywolo Almodad gi Shelef gi Hazarmoth gi Jera 
1Chronicles1:21 gi Hadoram gi Uzal gi Diukla 
1Chronicles1:22 gi Ebal gi Abimael gi Sheba gi 
1Chronicles1:23 Ofir gi Havila kod Jobab. Jogo duto ne joka Joktan. 
1Chronicles1:23 Ofir gi Havila kod Jobab. Jogo duto ne joka Joktan. 
1Chronicles1:24 Shem nonywolo Arpaksad to Arpaksad nonywolo Shela. 
1Chronicles1:25 Shela nonywolo Eber, to Eber nonywolo Peleg. Peleg nonywolo Reu," 
1Chronicles1:26 to Reu nonywolo Serug. Serug nonywolo Nahor, to Nahor nonywolo Tera." 
1Chronicles1:27 Tera nonywolo Abram, ma bang’e niluongo ni Ibrahim." 
1Chronicles1:28 Yawuot Ibrahim ne Isaka gi Ishmael," 
1Chronicles1:29 to Ishmael nonywolo Nebayoth wuode makayo, kod Kedar gi Abdeel gi Mibsam" 
1Chronicles1:30 gi Mishma gi Duma gi Masa gi Hadad gi Tema 
1Chronicles1:31 gi Jetur gi Nafish kod Kedema. Jogo duto ne joka Ishmael. 
1Chronicles1:32 Ketura ma chi Ibrahim machielo nonywolo Zimram gi Jokshan gi Medan gi Midian gi Ishbak kod Shua. To yawuot Jokshan ne Sheba gi Dedan. 
1Chronicles1:33 To Midian nonywolo Efa gi Efer gi Hanok gi Abida kod Eldaa. Jogo duto ne joka Ketura. 
1Chronicles1:34 Isaka wuod Ibrahim nonywolo Esau gi Israel. 
1Chronicles1:35 Esau nonywolo Elifaz gi Reuel gi Jeush gi Jalam kod Kora. 
1Chronicles1:36 To Elifaz nonywolo Teman gi Omar gi Zefi gi Gatam gi Kenaz gi Timna kod Amalek. 
1Chronicles1:37 To Reuel nonywolo Nahath gi Zera gi Shama kod Miza. 
1Chronicles1:38 Seir nonywolo Lotan gi Shobal gi Zibeon gi Ana gi Dishon gi Ezer kod Dishan. 
1Chronicles1:39 To yawuot Lotan ne Hori gi Homam. Bende ne en gi nyamin ma nyinge Timna. 
1Chronicles1:40 Yawuot Shobal ne gin Alian gi Manahath gi Ebal gi Shefi kod Onam. Yawuot Zibeon ne Aya gi Ana. 
1Chronicles1:41 Wuod Ana ne Dishon. Yawuot Dishon ne gin Hamran gi Eshban gi Ithran kod Keran. 
1Chronicles1:42 Yawuot Ezer ne gin Bilhan gi Zaavan kod Jaakan. To yawuot Dishan ne Uz gi Aran. 
1Chronicles1:43 Koro ruodhi mane rito piny Edom kane jo-Israel pod onge gi ruoth e magi: Ruoth mokwongo ne en Bela wuod Beor, ma dalane niluongo ni Dinhaba." 
1Chronicles1:44 Kane Bela otho, Jobab wuod Zera ma ja-Bozra nodoko ruoth kare." 
1Chronicles1:44 Kane Bela otho, Jobab wuod Zera ma ja-Bozra nodoko ruoth kare." 
1Chronicles1:45 To kane Jobab otho, Husham ja-Teman nodoko ruoth kare." 
1Chronicles1:45 To kane Jobab otho, Husham ja-Teman nodoko ruoth kare." 
1Chronicles1:46 Bang’ tho Husham, Hadad wuod Bedad nodoko ruoth kare. Hadadno ema noloyo jo-Midian e lweny e piny Moab. Dalane niluongo ni Avith." 
1Chronicles1:47 Kane Hadad otho, Samla ja-Masreka nodoko ruoth kare." 
1Chronicles1:48 Kane Samla otho, Shaul ja-Rehoboth man but aora Yufrate nodoko ruoth kare." 
1Chronicles1:49 To kane Shaul otho, Baal-hanan wuod Akbor nodoko ruoth kare." 
1Chronicles1:50 To bang’ tho Baal-hanan, Hadad nodoko ruoth kare. Dalane niluongo ni Pai. Nying chiege ne Mehetabel nyar Matred ma nyar Mezahab." 
1Chronicles1:51 Magi e jodongo mane rito piny Edom kane Hadad osetho: Timna gi Alia gi Jetheth 
1Chronicles1:52 gi Oholibama gi Ela gi Pinon 
1Chronicles1:53 gi Kenaz gi Teman gi Mibzar 
1Chronicles1:54 gi Magdiel kod Iram. Jogo duto ne jodong Edom. 
1Chronicles2:1 Yawuot Israel ne gin Reuben gi Simeon gi Lawi gi Juda gi Isaka gi Zebulun 
1Chronicles2:2 gi Dan gi Josef gi Benjamin gi Naftali gi Gad kod Asher. 
1Chronicles2:3 Yawuot Juda ma od Bath-shua nyar Kanaan ne gin Er gi Onan kod Shela. To timbe Er, wuod Juda makayo, ne richo e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, mi Ruoth Nyasaye nonege." 
1Chronicles2:4 Bang’e Juda nonywolo yawuowi moko ariyo gi Tamar chi wuodeno, ma nyinggi Perez gi Zera. Koro yawuot Juda duto ne abich." 
1Chronicles2:5 Yawuot Perez ne Hezron gi Hamul. 
1Chronicles2:6 Zera ne nigi yawuowi abich. Ne gin Zimri gi Ethan gi Heman gi Kalkol kod Dara. 
1Chronicles2:7 Wuod Karmi ne en Akan, ma nokelo ni jo-Israel chandruok nikech noketho, kokawo gima ochiw ni Ruoth Nyasaye." 
1Chronicles2:8 Wuod Ethan ne en Azaria. 
1Chronicles2:9 Yawuot Hezron ne gin Jerameel gi Ram kod Kaleb. 
1Chronicles2:10 Ram nonywolo Aminadab, to Aminadab nonywolo Nashon mane jaduong’ jo-Juda." 
1Chronicles2:11 Nashon nonywolo Salmon, to Salmon nonywolo Boaz." 
1Chronicles2:12 Boaz nonywolo Obed, to Obed nonywolo Jesse." 
1Chronicles2:13 Jesse nonywolo Eliab wuode makayo, gi Abinadab, wuode mar ariyo, gi Shimea, wuode mar adek," 
1Chronicles2:14 gi Nethaneel, wuode mar ang’wen, gi Radai wuode mar abich," 
1Chronicles2:15 Gi Ozem, wuode mar auchiel, gi Daudi wuode mar abiriyo." 
1Chronicles2:16 Nyiminegi ne Zeruya gi Abigail. Zeruya ne nigi yawuowi adek: Abishai gi Joab kod Asahel. 
1Chronicles2:17 Abigail mane chi Jather ja-Ishmael, nonywolo Amasa." 
1Chronicles2:18 Kaleb wuod Hezron ne nigi dhako ma nyinge Azuba. Azuba nonywolo Jerioth gi Jesher gi Shobab kod Ardon. 
1Chronicles2:19 Kane Azuba osetho, Kaleb nokendo Efrath, mane ginywologo Hur." 
1Chronicles2:20 Hur nonywolo Uri, to Uri nonywolo Bezalel." 
1Chronicles2:21 Kane Hezron jahigni piero auchiel, nokendo nyar Makir wuon Gilead. Chiegeno nonywolo Segub," 
1Chronicles2:22 to Segub nonywolo Jair mane nigi mier piero ariyo gadek e piny Gilead. 
1Chronicles2:23 To Geshur kod Aram nomayogi Havoth-jair, gi Kenath kod mier matindo mokiewo kode, duto mier piero auchiel. Jogo duto ne nyikwa Makir wuod Gilead." 
1Chronicles2:24 Kane Hezron osetho, Kaleb notero Efratha chi Hezron wuon mare, mi ne ginywologo Ashur wuon Tekoa." 
1Chronicles2:25 Jerameel ne kach Hezron, to yawuot Jerameel ne gin Ram, wuode makayo, gi Buna gi Oran gi Ozem kod Ahija." 
1Chronicles2:26 Jerameel ne nigi dhako machielo ma nyinge Atara, ma nonywolone Onam." 
1Chronicles2:27 Ram ma wuod Jerameel makayo nonywolo Maaz gi Jamin kod Eker. 
1Chronicles2:28 To yawuot Onam ne Shamai gi Jada. To yawuot Shamai ne Nadab gi Abishur. 
1Chronicles2:29 Chi Abishur mane nyinge Abihail nonywolo Aban gi Molid. 
1Chronicles2:30 Yawuot Nadab ne Seled gi Apaim, to Seled notho maonge nyathi." 
1Chronicles2:31 Apaim nonywolo Ishi, to Ishi nonywolo Sheshan, to Sheshan nonywolo Alahi." 
1Chronicles2:32 Yawuot Jada ma omin Shamai ne Jether gi Jonathan. Jether notho maonge nyathi," 
1Chronicles2:33 to yawuot Jonathan ne Peleth gi Zaza. Jogo duto ne joka Jerameel. 
1Chronicles2:34 Sheshan ne onge gi yawuowi, to nonywolo mana nyiri kende, to ne en gi misumba ma ja-Misri ma nyinge Jerha." 
1Chronicles2:35 Jali ema Sheshan nomiyo nyare mokendo, mi ne ginywolo wuowi ma nyinge Atai." 
1Chronicles2:36 Atai nonywolo Nathan, to Nathan nonywolo Zabad." 
1Chronicles2:37 Zabad nonywolo Eflal, to Eflal nonywolo Obed." 
1Chronicles2:38 Obed nonywolo Jehu, to Jehu nonywolo Azaria." 
1Chronicles2:39 Azaria nonywolo Helez, to Helez nonywolo Eleasa." 
1Chronicles2:40 Eleasa nonywolo Sismai, to Sismai nonywolo Shalum." 
1Chronicles2:41 Shalum nonywolo Jekamia, to Jekamia nonywolo Elishama." 
1Chronicles2:42 Kaleb omin Jerameel, nonywolo Mesha wuode makayo, to Mesha nonywolo Zif. Zif nonywolo Meresha, to Meresha nonywolo Hebron." 
1Chronicles2:43 Yawuot Hebron ne gin Kora gi Tapua gi Rekem kod Shema. 
1Chronicles2:44 Shema nonywolo Raham, to Raham nonywolo Jorkeam. Rekem nonywolo Shamai," 
1Chronicles2:45 to Shamai nonywolo Maon. Maon to nonywolo Bethzur. 
1Chronicles2:46 Chi Kaleb moro, ma nyinge Efa, nonywolo Haran gi Moza kod Gazez. To Haran nonywolo Gazez." 
1Chronicles2:47 Yawuot Jadai ne gin Regem gi Jothan gi Geshan gi Pelet gi Efa kod Shaaf. 
1Chronicles2:48 Maaka, ma bende chi Kaleb nonywolo Sheber gi Tirhana," 
1Chronicles2:49 gi Shaaf, kod Sheva. Shaaf ne wuon Madmana, to Sheva ne wuon Makbena gi Gibea. Bende Kaleb ne nigi nyako ma nyinge Aksa." 
1Chronicles2:50 Jogo duto ne joka Kaleb. To joka Hur e magi: Hur, wuod Efratha makayo, nonywolo Shobal wuon Kiriath-jearim," 
1Chronicles2:51 gi Salma wuon Bethlehem, kod Haref wuon Beth-gader." 
1Chronicles2:52 Shobal wuon Kiriath-jearim nonywolo Reaya, kendo ne en kwar joka Manahath moko." 
1Chronicles2:53 Jo-Kiriath-jearim ne gin jo-Ithri gi jo-Pu gi jo-Shuma, kod jo-Mishra. Jo-Zora gi jo-Eshtaol nowuok kuom ogendnigo." 
1Chronicles2:54 Joka Salma ne gin jo-Bethlehem gi jo-Netofa gi jo-Atroth-beth-joab gi joka Manahath modong’, gi jo-Zor" 
1Chronicles2:55 gi dhout jondiko ma nodak Jabez, gi jo-Tira gi jo-Shimea kod jo-Suka. Jogi ne jo-Keni ma kwargi ne or joka Rekab." 
1Chronicles3:1 Yawuot Daudi mane onywolo Hebron e magi: Wuode makayo ne Anon, ma min mare ne Ahinoam nyar Jezreel. Mar ariyo ne Daniel, ma min mare ne Abigail nyar Karmel." 
1Chronicles3:1 Yawuot Daudi mane onywolo Hebron e magi: Wuode makayo ne Anon, ma min mare ne Ahinoam nyar Jezreel. Mar ariyo ne Daniel, ma min mare ne Abigail nyar Karmel." 
1Chronicles3:2 Mar adek ne Absalom, ma min mare ne Maaka nyar Talmai ruodh Geshur. Mar ang’wen ne Adonija ma min mare ne Hagith." 
1Chronicles3:3 Mar abich ne Shefatia ma min mare ne Abital. Mar auchiel ne Ithream, wuod chiege ma nyinge Egla." 
1Chronicles3:4 Daudi nonywolo yawuowi auchielgo kodak Hebron, kuma nobetie ruoth kuom higni abiriyo gi dueche auchiel. Bang’e nodak Jerusalem, korito piny kuom higni piero adek gadek." 
1Chronicles3:5 Kane odak Jerusalem nonywolo Shimea gi Shobab gi Nathan kod Solomon ma min-gi ne Bathsheba nyar Amiel. Bang’e Daudi nonywolo yawuowi moko ochiko. 
1Chronicles3:6 Ne gin Ibhar gi Elishama gi Elifelet. 
1Chronicles3:7 Gi Noga gi Nefeg gi Jafia 
1Chronicles3:8 gi Elishama gi Eliada kod Elifelet. 
1Chronicles3:9 Jogo duto ne yawuot Daudi, ka ok okwan yawuot monde mamoko. Ne gin gi nyamingi ma nyinge Tamar." 
1Chronicles3:10 Solomon nonywolo Rehoboam, to Rehoboam nonywolo Abija. Abija nonywolo Asa, to Asa nonywolo Jehoshafat." 
1Chronicles3:11 Jehoshafat nonwolo Jehoram, to Jehoram nonywolo Ahazia, Ahazia nonywolo Joash," 
1Chronicles3:12 to Joash nonywolo Amazia, Amazia nonywolo Azaria, to Azaria nonywolo Jotham." 
1Chronicles3:13 Jotham nonywolo Ahaz to Ahaz nonywolo Hezekia. Hezekia nonywolo Manase," 
1Chronicles3:14 to Manase nonywolo Amon. Amon to nonywolo Josia. 
1Chronicles3:15 Yawuot Josia ne gin Johanan, wuode makayo, gi Jehoyakim wuode mar ariyo, gi Zedekia wuode mar adek, gi Shalum, wuode mar ang’wen." 
1Chronicles3:16 Yawuot Jehoyakim ne Jekonia gi Zedekia. 
1Chronicles3:17 Jekonia, mane oter e tuech, nonywolo Shealtiel" 
1Chronicles3:18 gi Malkiram gi Pedaya gi Shenazar gi Jehamia gi Hosham kod Nedabia. 
1Chronicles3:19 Pedaya nonywolo Zerubabel gi Shimei, to yawuot Zerubabel ne Meshulam gi Hanania. Ne gin gi nyamin-gi ma nyinge Shelomith." 
1Chronicles3:20 Zerubabel nonywolo yawuowi moko abich. Ne gin Hashuba gi Ohel gi Berekia gi Hasadia kod Jushab-hesed. 
1Chronicles3:21 Hanania nonywolo Pelatia, to Pelatia nonywolo Jeshaya. Jeshaya nonywolo Refaya, to Refaya nonywolo Arnan. Arnan nonywolo Obadia, to Obadia nonywolo Shekania," 
1Chronicles3:22 Shekania to nonywolo yawuowi auchiel, ma nyinggi Shemaya gi Hatush, gi Igal gi Baria gi Nearia kod Shafat." 
1Chronicles3:23 Nearia nonywolo yawuowi adek, ma nyinggi Elioenai gi Hizkia kod Azikram." 
1Chronicles3:24 Elioenai nonywolo yawuowi abiriyo. Ne gin Hodavia gi Eliashib gi Pelaya gi Akub gi Johanan gi Delaya kod Anani. 
1Chronicles4:1 Joka Juda ne Perez gi Hezron gi Karmi gi Hur kod Shobal. 
1Chronicles4:2 Reaya wuod Shobal nonywolo Joath, to Joath nonywolo Ahumai gi Lahad. Giduto ne gin joka Hora." 
1Chronicles4:3 Yawuot Etam ne gin Jezreel gi Ishama kod Idbash. Ne gin gi nyamingi ma nyinge Hazelelponi. 
1Chronicles4:4 Penuel ne wuon Gedor. Ezer ne wuon Husha. Ne gin joka Hur wuod Efratha makayo ma wuon Bethlehem. 
1Chronicles4:5 Ashur wuon Tekoa ne nigi mon ariyo ma nyinggi Hela gi Naara. 
1Chronicles4:6 Naara nonywolo Ahuram gi Hefer kod jo-Timni gi jo-Ahashtar. Mago ne joka Naara. 
1Chronicles4:7 To yawuot Ela ne Zereth gi Zoar gi Ethman kod Koz. 
1Chronicles4:8 Koz nonywolo Adub gi Zobeba kod joka Aharhel wuod Harun. 
1Chronicles4:9 Jabez ne ng’at marahuma moloyo owetene duto. Min mare nochake ni Jabez nikech nonywole gi rem malit. 
1Chronicles4:10 Jabez nokwayo Nyasach Israel niya, “Yie igwedha, kendo imed mbap pinya, bende lweti orita mondo kik gima rach hinya.” Mi Nyasaye nomiye gima nokwayono." 
1Chronicles4:11 Kelub owadgi Shua nonywolo Mehir ma wuon Eshton. 
1Chronicles4:12 Eshton nonywolo Efratha gi Pasea kod Tehina wuon Irnahash. Jogo duto ne joka Reha. 
1Chronicles4:13 Yawuot Kenaz ne Othniel gi Seraya, to yawuot Othniel ne Hathath gi Meonithia." 
1Chronicles4:14 Meonithia nonywolo Ofra, to Seraya nonywolo Joab ma wuon jo-Geharashim. Ne ochakgi nyingno nikech ne gin jopa bao." 
1Chronicles4:15 Yawuot Kaleb wuod Jefune ne gin Iru gi Ela kod Naam, to wuod Ela ne Kenaz." 
1Chronicles4:16 Yawuot Jehalelel ne Zif gi Zifa gi Tiria kod Asarel. 
1Chronicles4:17 Yawuot Ezra ne Jether, gi Mered gi Efer kod Jalon. Mered nokendo Bithia nyar Farao mi Bithia nonywolo Miriam gi Shamai kod Ishba ma wuon Eshtemoa." 
1Chronicles4:17 Yawuot Ezra ne Jether, gi Mered gi Efer kod Jalon. Mered nokendo Bithia nyar Farao mi Bithia nonywolo Miriam gi Shamai kod Ishba ma wuon Eshtemoa." 
1Chronicles4:18 Chi Mered ma nyar Yahudi nonywolo Jared wuon Gedor, gi Heber wuon Soko, kod Jekuthiel wuon Zanoa." 
1Chronicles4:19 Yawuot Hodia ma od nyamin Naam ne Keila ja-Garbi, kod Eshtemoa ja Maaka." 
1Chronicles4:20 Yawuot Shimon ne gin Amnon gi Rina gi Ben-hanan kod Telon. Yawuot Ishi ne Zoheth gi Ben-zoheth. 
1Chronicles4:21 Joka Shela wuod Juda ne gin Er wuod Leka, gi Laada wuon Maresha, gi dhout jotueng’o ma nodak Bethashbea," 
1Chronicles4:22 gi Jokim gi jo-Kozeba gi Joash kod Saraf ma nochwanyore gi jo-Moab modok Bethlehem. (Wechegi nondik chon ahinya.) 
1Chronicles4:23 Jogo ne jochue agulini. Ne gidak Nataim gi Gedara, ka gitiyo ni ruoth." 
1Chronicles4:24 Yawuot Simeon ne gin Nemuel gi Jamin gi Jarib gi Zera kod Shaul. 
1Chronicles4:25 Shaul nonywolo Shalum, to Shalum nonywolo Mibsam, to Mibsam nonywolo Mishma." 
1Chronicles4:26 To joka Mishma e magi: Mishma nonywolo Hemuel, to Hemuel nonywolo Zakur. Zakur to nonywolo Shimei." 
1Chronicles4:27 Shimei nonywolo yawuowi apar gauchiel kod nyiri auchiel, to owetene ne ok ne nigi nyithindo mang’eny kamano, kendo dhoodgi ne ok onya kaka jo-Juda." 
1Chronicles4:28 Ne gidak Beer-sheba gi Molada gi Hazarshual 
1Chronicles4:29 gi Bilha gi Ezem gi Tolad 
1Chronicles4:30 gi Bethuel gi Horma gi Ziklag 
1Chronicles4:31 gi Bethmarkaboth gi Azar-susim gi Beth-biri, kod Shaaraim. Mago ne miechgi nyaka chop ndalo loch Daudi." 
1Chronicles4:32 Miechgi abich mamoko ne gin Etam gi Ain gi Rimon gi Token kod Ashan," 
1Chronicles4:33 kaachiel gi mier mokiewo kodgi nyaka Baalath. Mago kuonde mane gidakie. Nyinggi mane ondik ne gin 
1Chronicles4:34 Meshobab gi Jamlek gi Josha ma wuod Amazia 
1Chronicles4:35 gi Joel gi Jehu wuod Josibia ma wuod Seraya ma wuod Asiel," 
1Chronicles4:35 gi Joel gi Jehu wuod Josibia ma wuod Seraya ma wuod Asiel," 
1Chronicles4:36 gi Elioenai gi Jaakoba gi Jeshohaya gi Asaya gi Adiel gi Jesimiel gi Benaya 
1Chronicles4:37 gi Ziza wuod Shifi ma wuod Alon ma wuod Jedaya ma wuod Shimri ma wuod Shemaya. 
1Chronicles4:38 Jogo duto ne jodong dhoudi, kendo dhoutgi nonya ahinya." 
1Chronicles4:39 Ne gia kama idonjogo Gedor, yo wuok chieng’ mar holo, ka gidwaro lek ni jambgi." 
1Chronicles4:40 Mi ne ginwang’o lege momew kendo mabeyo. Pinyno ne lach ahinya. Jo-Ham ema nokwongo dakie. 
1Chronicles4:41 Joma nyinggi osendikgo nochopo kuno e ndalo Hezekia ruodh Juda. Ne giketho hemb jo-Ham kod jo-Maun, mane giyudo kuno kendo ne ginegogi duto, ma pok ndachgi oneno nyaka chil kawuono. Piny nokue, kendo oboch, mi ne gidak e pinyno, nikech ne nitie lek ni jambgi." 
1Chronicles4:42 To ji mia abich kuom jo-Simeon nodhi nyaka got Seir. Jotendgi ne Pelatia gi Nearia gi Refaya kod Uziel, ma yawuot Ishi." 
1Chronicles4:43 Ne ginego jo-Amalek modong’ kendo pod gidak kuno nyaka chil kawuono. 
1Chronicles5:1 Reuben ne en wuod Israel makayo, to noterore gi chi wuon mare, omiyo kata obedo ni ne en kayo kamano, duong’ne mar dala ne omi yawuot Josef ma wuod Israel. To joka Josef ne ok omi duong’ mar dala kaka owinjore tim ni dhood wuowi makayo," 
1Chronicles5:2 nimar Juda noloyo owetene gi duong’, nikech ode ema nodoko od ruoth. To adier duong’ mar dala ne en mar Josef." 
1Chronicles5:3 Yawuot Reuben ma wuod Israel makayo ne gin Hanok gi Palu gi Hezron kod Karmi. 
1Chronicles5:4 Joka Joel e magi: Joel nonywolo Shemaya, to Shemaya nonywolo Gog, Gog nonywolo Shimei," 
1Chronicles5:4 Joka Joel e magi: Joel nonywolo Shemaya, to Shemaya nonywolo Gog, Gog nonywolo Shimei," 
1Chronicles5:5 to Shimei nonywolo Mika. Mika nonywolo Reaya, to Reaya nonywolo Baal." 
1Chronicles5:6 Baal to nonywolo Beera. Beera ne en achiel kuom joma ne Tiglath-peleser ruodh Asuria odaro, motero e tuech piny mabor. Ne en jaduong’ joka Reuben." 
1Chronicles5:7 Ma e kaka ochan owetene e dhoutgi: Jeyel ne jatelo, eka Zekaria" 
1Chronicles5:8 kod Bela wuod Azaz ma wuod Shema ma wuod Joel ne luwo. Ne gidak Aroer, mi ne gilandore nyaka Nebo gi Baal-meon." 
1Chronicles5:8 kod Bela wuod Azaz ma wuod Shema ma wuod Joel ne luwo. Ne gidak Aroer, mi ne gilandore nyaka Nebo gi Baal-meon." 
1Chronicles5:9 Bende ne gidak e yo wuok chieng’ nyaka chop e thim mopogo kindgi gi aora Yufrate, nikech jambgi nosemedore e piny Gilead." 
1Chronicles5:10 E ndalo loch Saulo ne gikedo gi jo-Hagri, mi ginego, kendo gidak e miechgi e piny man yo wuok chieng’ mag Gilead." 
1Chronicles5:11 Jo-Gad nomanyore gi jo-Reuben, ka gidak e piny Bashan nyaka Saleka." 
1Chronicles5:12 Joel ma jatendgi gi Shafan jalupne gi Janai kod Shafat ne jodak Bashan. 
1Chronicles5:12 Joel ma jatendgi gi Shafan jalupne gi Janai kod Shafat ne jodak Bashan. 
1Chronicles5:13 Jowetegi nowuok kuom dhout Mikael gi Meshulam gi Sheba gi Jorai gi Jakan gi Zia kod Eber. 
1Chronicles5:14 Ji abiriyogo ne yawuot Abihail wuod Huri ma wuod Jaroa, ma wuod Gilead, ma wuod Mikael, ma wuod Jeshishai, ma wuod Jado, ma wuod Buz." 
1Chronicles5:15 Ahi wuod Abdiel ma wuod Guni ne jatend dhoodgi. 
1Chronicles5:16 Ne gidak e piny Gilead kod e miech Bashan, kendo e thim Sharon nyaka mbape." 
1Chronicles5:17 Nying jogo duto nondik e ndalo mag loch Jotham ruodh Juda, kendo Jeroboam ruodh Israel." 
1Chronicles5:18 Jo-Reuben gi jo-Gad kod jo-Manase konchiel ne nigi jolweny molony alufu piero ang’wen gauchiel gi mia abiriyo kod piero auchiel. Ne giikore gi kuodi gi tong’ kod asere. 
1Chronicles5:19 Ne gikedo gi jo-Hagri gi jo-Getur gi jo-Nafish kod jo-Nodab. 
1Chronicles5:20 Nyasaye nokonyogi e lweny nikech ne giywakne kane gikedo. Nowinjogi nikech ne gigene, mi ne giloyo jo-Hagri gi ji duto mane jo-Hagri oseriworego." 
1Chronicles5:21 Ne gipeyo jamb jo-Hagri, ngamia alufu piero abich gi rombe alufu mia ariyo gi piero abich, kod kenje alufu ariyo, kendo ne gimako ji alufu mia achiel." 
1Chronicles5:22 Ne ginego ji mang’eny, nikech Nyasaye ema nomiyo lwenyno obedoe. Bang’e ne gidak e pinyno kar jogo, nyaka ndalo mane odargi kiterogi e tuech Babulon ochopo." 
1Chronicles5:23 Jo-Manase konchiel nodak e pinyno chakre Bashan nyaka Baal-hermon gi Senir kod Got Harmon. Ne ging’eny," 
1Chronicles5:24 kendo jotend dhoutgi ne Efer gi Ishi gi Eliel gi Azriel gi Jeremia gi Hodavia kod Jadiel. Ne gin thuondi, kendo joma rahuma." 
1Chronicles5:25 To ne giweyo Nyasach kweregi, ka gindhogore gi nyisech ogendni mag pinyno mane Nyasaye otieko mondo oyawnigi thuolo." 
1Chronicles5:26 Omiyo Nyasach Israel nomiyo Pul, ma bende iluongo ni Tiglath-peleser ruodh Asuria mondo omonj jo-Reuben gi jo-Gad kod jo-Manasego. Nodarogi moterogi nyaka Hala gi Habor gi Hasa kod Aora Gozan, kuma gidakie nyaka chil kawuono." 
1Chronicles6:1 Yawuot Lawi ne gin Garshon gi Kohath kod Merari. 
1Chronicles6:2 Yawuot Kohath ne gin Amram gi Izhar gi Hebron gi Uziel. 
1Chronicles6:3 To yawuot Amram ne Harun gi Nadab gi Abihu gi Eleazar kod Ithamar. 
1Chronicles6:4 Eleazar nonywolo Finehas to Finehas nonywolo Abishua. 
1Chronicles6:5 Abishua nonywolo Buki, to Buki nonywolo Uzi." 
1Chronicles6:6 Uzi nonywolo Zerahia, to Zerahia nonywolo Merayoth." 
1Chronicles6:7 Merayoth nonywolo Amaria, to Amaria nonywolo Ahitub." 
1Chronicles6:8 Ahitub nonywolo Zadok, to Zadok nonywolo Ahimaaz." 
1Chronicles6:9 Ahimaaz nonywolo Azaria, to Azaria nonywolo Johanan." 
1Chronicles6:10 Johanan nonywolo Azaria, mane jadolo e Hekalu mane Solomon ogero Jerusalem." 
1Chronicles6:11 Azaria nonywolo Amaria, to Amaria nonywolo Ahitub," 
1Chronicles6:12 Ahitub nonywolo Zadok, to Zadok nonywolo Shalum." 
1Chronicles6:13 Shalum nonywolo Hilkia to Hilkia nonywolo Azaria. 
1Chronicles6:14 Azaria nonywolo Seraya, to Seraya nonywolo Jehozadak." 
1Chronicles6:15 Kane Nyasaye omiyo Nebukadnezar odaro jo-Juda gi jo-Jerusalem koterogi Babulon e tuech, Jehozadak bende noter kodgi." 
1Chronicles6:16 Yawuot Lawi ne gin Gershon gi Kohath kod Merari. 
1Chronicles6:17 Yawuot Gershon ne Libna gi Shimei. 
1Chronicles6:18 To yawuot Kohath ne gin Amram gi Izhar gi Hebron kod Uziel. 
1Chronicles6:19 To yawuot Merari ne Mali gi Mushi. Dhout jo-Lawi, kaluwore gi kweregi e magi:" 
1Chronicles6:20 Joka Gershon: Nonywolo Libni, to Libni nonywolo Jahath. Jahath nonywolo Zima," 
1Chronicles6:21 to Zima nonywolo Joa. Joa nonywolo Ido, to Ido nonywolo Zera, to Zera nonywolo Jeatherai." 
1Chronicles6:22 Joka Kohath e magi: Kohath nonywolo Abinadab, to Abinadab nonywolo Kora. Kora nonywolo Asir." 
1Chronicles6:23 To Asir nonywolo Elkana, Elkana nonywolo Ebiasaf, to Ebiasaf nonywolo Asir." 
1Chronicles6:24 Asir nonywolo Tahath, to Tahath nonywolo Uriel. Uriel nonywolo Uzia, to Uzia nonywolo Shaul." 
1Chronicles6:25 Yawuot Elkana ne Amasai gi Ahimoth. 
1Chronicles6:26 Ahimoth nonywolo Zofia, to Zofia nonywolo Nahath." 
1Chronicles6:27 Nahath nonywolo Eliab, to Eliab nonywolo Jeroham, to Jeroham nonywolo Elkana." 
1Chronicles6:28 Wuod Samuel makayo ne Josef, to jalupne ne Abija." 
1Chronicles6:29 Joka Merari e magi: Merari nonywolo Mali, to Mali nonywolo Libni, to Libni nonywolo Shimei to Shimei nonywolo Uza." 
1Chronicles6:30 Uza nonywolo Shimea, to Shimea nonywolo Hagia, to Hagia nonywolo Asaya." 
1Chronicles6:31 Daudi noyiero jo-Lawi moko mondo obed jotend wer, chieng’ mane Sanduk okan e Od Ruoth Nyasaye." 
1Chronicles6:32 Ne giwer e nyim Hemb Romo nyaka Solomon notieko gero Hekalu mar Ruoth Nyasaye Jerusalem, kendo ne gitiyo tijegi kaka nochannigi." 
1Chronicles6:33 Jower kaachiel gi yawuotgi e magi: Kuom joka Kohath, jatend wer ne en Heman ma jathum, ma wuod Joel, wuod Samuel," 
1Chronicles6:33 Jower kaachiel gi yawuotgi e magi: Kuom joka Kohath, jatend wer ne en Heman ma jathum, ma wuod Joel, wuod Samuel," 
1Chronicles6:34 wuod Elkana, wuod Jeroham, wuod Eliel, wuod Toa," 
1Chronicles6:35 wuod Zuf, wuod Elkana, wuod Mahath, wuod Amasai," 
1Chronicles6:36 wuod Elkana, wuod Joel, wuod Azaria, wuod Zefania," 
1Chronicles6:36 wuod Elkana, wuod Joel, wuod Azaria, wuod Zefania," 
1Chronicles6:37 wuod Tahath, wuod Asir, wuod Ahiasaf, wuod Kora," 
1Chronicles6:38 wuod Izhar, wuod Kohath, wuod Lawi, wuod Israel." 
1Chronicles6:39 Jalup Heman ne Asaf omin mare, mane ochung’ e bade korachwich. Asaf ne wuod Berakia, ma wuod Shimea," 
1Chronicles6:40 wuod Mikael, wuod Baaseya, wuod Malkija," 
1Chronicles6:41 wuod Ethni, wuod Zera, wuod Adaya," 
1Chronicles6:42 wuod Ethan, wuod Zima, wuod Shimei," 
1Chronicles6:43 wuod Jahath, wuod Gershon, wuod Lawi." 
1Chronicles6:44 Joka Merari nochung’ yo koracham. Jatendgi ne en Ethan wuod Kishi, ma wuod Abdi, wuod Maluk," 
1Chronicles6:45 wuod Ashabia, wuod Amazia, wuod Hilkia," 
1Chronicles6:46 wuod Amzi, wuod Bani, wuod Shemer," 
1Chronicles6:47 wuod Mali, wuod Mushi, wuod Merari, wuod Lawi." 
1Chronicles6:48 Jowetegi ma jo-Lawi nomi tije duto mag Od Ruoth Nyasaye. 
1Chronicles6:49 To Harun gi dhoode ema ne tiyo tije duto mag Kama Ler Moloyo, kaka Musa jatich Nyasaye nochiko. Ne gitimo misango e kendo-mar-misango, kendo ne giwang’o ubani e kendo mar ubani, kendo ne gitimo misango migologo richo mag jo-Israel." 
1Chronicles6:50 Joka Harun e magi: Harun nonywolo Eleazar, to Eleazar nonywolo Finehas. Finehas nonywolo Abishua," 
1Chronicles6:51 to Abishua nonywolo Buki, Buki nonywolo Uzi. To Uzi nonywolo Zerahia." 
1Chronicles6:52 Zerahia nonywolo Merayoth, to Merayoth nonywolo Amaria, to Amaria nonywolo Ahitub," 
1Chronicles6:53 to Ahitub nonywolo Zadok, to Zadok nonywolo Ahimaaz." 
1Chronicles6:54 Koro magi e kuonde dak kod gwenge mane omi joka Harun, kane ogo ombulu. Nyikwa Harun ma joka Kohath" 
1Chronicles6:55 ema nomi Hebron e piny Juda kaachiel gi lege mokiewogo. 
1Chronicles6:56 To puothe gi mier matindo mag Hebron nomi Kaleb wuod Jefune. 
1Chronicles6:57 Joka Harun nomi Hebron, dala ma ng’at moneko nyalo tonyie, gi Libna gi Jatir gi Eshtomoa" 
1Chronicles6:58 gi Hilen gi Debir 
1Chronicles6:59 gi Ashan kod Beth-shemesh, kaachiel gi legegi." 
1Chronicles6:60 To e piny Benjamin joka Harun noyudoe Geba gi Alemeth koth Anathoth, dala ka dala gi legene. Kamano joka Harun noyudo mier apar gadek." 
1Chronicles6:61 Joka Kohath moko noyudo mier apar mane opognigi kogo ombulu e piny mane jo-Manase konchiel odakie. 
1Chronicles6:62 Joka Gershon noyudo mier apar e pinje mag jo-Isakar gi jo-Asher gi jo-Naftali kod jo-Manase ma nodak e piny Bashan. 
1Chronicles6:63 Joka Merari noyudo mier apar gariyo e pinje mag jo-Reuben gi jo-Gad kod jo-Zebulun. 
1Chronicles6:64 Miergo, kaachiel gi legegi ema ne jo-Israel omiyo jo-Lawi kogo ombulu," 
1Chronicles6:65 mana kaka jo-Juda gi jo-Simeon kod jo-Benjamin bende nomiyogi mier mosekwan malogo. 
1Chronicles6:66 Dhout jo-Kohath moko noyudo mier kuom jo-Efraim. 
1Chronicles6:67 Ne gin Shekem, dala ma ng’at moneko nyalo tonyie, manie piny gode mag Efraim, kod Gezer" 
1Chronicles6:68 gi Jokmeam gi Beth-horon 
1Chronicles6:69 gi Aijalon kod Gath-rimon kaachiel gi legegi. 
1Chronicles6:70 Jo-Kohath modong’ noyudo Aner gi Bileam kod legegi e piny mane jo-Manase konchiel odakie. 
1Chronicles6:71 Joka Gershon noyudo Golan manie piny Bashan gi legene kod Ashtaroth bende gi legene e piny mane jo-Manase komachielo odakie. 
1Chronicles6:72 To e piny Isakar ne giyudoe Kedesh gi Daberath 
1Chronicles6:73 gi Ramoth kod Anem, kaachiel gi legegi." 
1Chronicles6:74 To e piny Asher ne giyudoe Mashal gi Abdon 
1Chronicles6:75 gi Hukok kod Rekob, kaachiel gi legegi." 
1Chronicles6:76 To e piny Naftali ne giyudoe Kedesh-galili, gi Hamon kod Kiriathaim, kaachiel gi legegi." 
1Chronicles6:77 Joka Merari modong’ noyudo Rimona gi Tabor, kaachiel gi legegi e piny Zebulun." 
1Chronicles6:78 To e piny Reuben man yo wuok chieng’ loka Jordan, momanyore gi Jeriko, ne giyudoe Bezer manie thim, kod Jaza," 
1Chronicles6:79 gi Kedemoth kod Mefaath, kaachiel gi legegi." 
1Chronicles6:80 To e piny Gad ne giyudoe Ramoth-gilead gi Mahanain 
1Chronicles6:81 gi Heshbon kod Jazer, kaachiel gi legegi." 
1Chronicles7:1 Isakar ne nigi yawuowi ang’wen. Ne gin Tola gi Pua gi Joshub kod Shimron. 
1Chronicles7:2 To Tola nonywolo Uzi gi Refaya gi Jeriel gi Jamai gi Ibsam kod Shemuel. Ne gin jotend joka Tola, kendo ne gin thuondi marateke e ndalogi. E ndalo Daudi kwan-gi ne romo ji alufu piero ariyo gi mia auchiel." 
1Chronicles7:3 Uzi nonywolo Izrahia, to Izrahia nonywolo Mikael gi Obadia kod Joel." 
1Chronicles7:3 Uzi nonywolo Izrahia, to Izrahia nonywolo Mikael gi Obadia kod Joel." 
1Chronicles7:4 Jodongo abichgo ne nigi mon gi nyithindo mang’eny. Omiyo jolwenjgi ne romo alufu piero adek gauchiel, mane ochan e monje kaka dhoutgi obet." 
1Chronicles7:5 To jowetegi ma jo-Isakar ne romo ji alufu piero aboro gabiriyo. Giduto ne gin thuondi marateke, kendo joka kwaro." 
1Chronicles7:6 Benjamin nonywolo yawuowi adek. Ne gin Bela gi Beker kod Jediael. 
1Chronicles7:7 To Bela nonywolo yawuowi abich, ma gin Ezbon gi Uzi gi Uziel gi Jerimoth kod Iri. Ne gin jotend dhoutgi, kendo thuondi marateke. Ne gitelo ni jolweny alufu piero ariyo gariyo kod piero adek gang’wen ma joka kwaro." 
1Chronicles7:8 Joka Beker ne gi Zemira gi Joash gi Eliezer gi Elioenai gi Omri gi Jeromoth gi Abija gi Anathoth kod Alemeth. 
1Chronicles7:9 Mago e kar romb joka Beker. Ne gin jotend dhoutgi, kendo thuondi marateke. Ne gitelo ni jolweny alufu piero ariyo gi mia ariyo, ma joka kwaro." 
1Chronicles7:10 Jediael nonywolo Bilhan, to Bilhan nonywolo Jeush gi Benjamin gi Ehud gi Kenaana gi Zethan gi Tarshish kod Ahishahar." 
1Chronicles7:11 Jogo duto ne joka Jadiael, kendo ne gin jotend dhoutgi. Ne gin gi jolweny marateke alufu apar gabiriyo gi mia ariyo motiegore ni lweny." 
1Chronicles7:12 Jo Dan ne gin Hushim ma wuode, gi yawuot Aher." 
1Chronicles7:13 Yawuot Naftali ne gin Jaziel gi Guni gi Jazer kod Shalum. Jogo duto ne gin joka Bilha. 
1Chronicles7:14 Manase ne nigi dhako ma nyar Aram mane onywolo Makir, wuon Gilead." 
1Chronicles7:15 Makir nokendo nyako ma nyinge Maaka. Wuod Manase mar ariyo ne Zelofehad, to Zelofehad nonywolo mana nyiri." 
1Chronicles7:16 Maaka chi Makir nonywolo wuowi, mochako ni Peresh, to nying owadgi Peresh ne Sheresh. Sheresh nonywolo Ulam gi Rekem." 
1Chronicles7:17 To Ulam nonywolo Bedan. Jogo duto ne joka Gilead, wuod Makir, ma wuod Manase." 
1Chronicles7:18 Gilead ne nigi nyamin mare ma nyinge Hamoleketh, ma nonywolo Ishdod gi Abiezer kod Mala." 
1Chronicles7:19 Yawuot Shemida ne gin Abihan gi Shekem gi Liki kod Aniam. 
1Chronicles7:20 Jo-Efraim e magi: Efraim nonywolo Shuthela, to Shuthela nonywolo Bered. Bered nonywolo Tahath, to Tahath nonywolo Eleada. To Eleada nonywolo Tahath," 
1Chronicles7:21 to Tahath nonywolo Zabad, to Zabad nonywolo Shuthela. Yawuot Efraim moko ne gin Ezer gi Elead, mane jo-Gath onego kodhi peyo jamni." 
1Chronicles7:22 Efraim wuon-gi noywak ndalo mathoth nyaka owetene nobiro mondo okue chunye. 
1Chronicles7:23 Bang’e Efraim noriwore gi chiege, monywolo wuowi. Nochake ni Beria, (tiende ni, masira), nikech ode noseyudo masira." 
1Chronicles7:24 Ne en gi nyako ma nyinge Sheera, ma nogero Beth-horon mamalo kod Uzen-sheera." 
1Chronicles7:25 Beria nonywolo Refa, to Refa nonywolo Reshef. Reshef nonywolo Tela, to Tela nonywolo Tahan." 
1Chronicles7:26 Tahan nonywolo Ladan. Ladan nonywolo Amihud. Amihud nonywolo Elishama," 
1Chronicles7:27 to Elishama nonywolo Nun, to Nun nonywolo Joshua." 
1Chronicles7:27 to Elishama nonywolo Nun, to Nun nonywolo Joshua." 
1Chronicles7:28 Lopgi gi miechgi ne Bethel gi mier matindo mokiewo kode, kaachiel gi Naaran man yo wuok chieng’. To yo podho chieng’ ne gin gi Gezer gi Shekem gi Aya, kod mier matindo mokiewo kodgi." 
1Chronicles7:29 To jo-Manase ne nigi Beth-shean gi Taanak gi Megido kod Dor gi mier matindo mokiewo kodgi. Ji duto ma nodak e miergo ne nyikwa Josef wuod Israel. 
1Chronicles7:30 Jo Asher e magi: Asher nonywolo Imna gi Ishva gi Ishvi gi nyamin-gi ma nyinge Sera. 
1Chronicles7:31 Yawuot Beria ne gin Heber gi Malkiel. Malkiel nonywolo Birzaith," 
1Chronicles7:32 to Heber nonywolo Jaflet gi Shomer gi Hotham kod Shua ma nyamin-gi. 
1Chronicles7:33 Yawuot Jaflet ne gin Pasak gi Bimhal kod Ashvath. Mago e kar romb yawuot Jaflet. 
1Chronicles7:34 To yawuot Shomer owadgi Jaflet ne gin Roga gi Jehuba kod Aram. 
1Chronicles7:35 Yawuot Hotham ma bende owadgi Jaflet ne gin Zofa gi Imna gi Shelesh kod Amal. 
1Chronicles7:36 Joka Zofa ne gi Sua gi Harnefer gi Shual gi Beri gi Imra 
1Chronicles7:37 gi Beezer gi Hod gi Shama gi Shilisha gi Ithran kod Beera. 
1Chronicles7:38 Yawuot Jether ne gin Jefune gi Pispa kod Ara. 
1Chronicles7:39 Yawuot Ula ne gin Ara gi Haniel kod Rizia. 
1Chronicles7:40 Mago duto ne jotend dhout Asher. Ne gin jolweny marateke kendo jotend jodongo. Kar romb jolweny mag dhoutgi ne alufu piero ariyo gauchiel.

1Chronicles8:23 gi Abdon gi Zikri gi Hanan 
1Chronicles8:24 gi Hanania gi Elam gi Antothia 
1Chronicles8:25 gi Ifdeya kod Penuel ne gin yawuot Shashak. 
1Chronicles8:26 Shamsherai gi Sheharia gi Athalia

1Chronicles8:31 gi Gedor gi Ahio gi Zeker 
1Chronicles8:32 kod Mikloth. To Mikloth nonywolo Shimea. Jogo bende nodak Jerusalem mokiewo gi owetegi. 
1Chronicles8:33 Ner nonywolo Kish, to Kish nonywolo Saulo, to Saulo nonywolo Jonathan gi Malkishua gi Abinadab kod Eshbaal." 
1Chronicles8:34 Wuod Jonathan ne Meribaal. Meribaal nonywolo Mika," 
1Chronicles8:35 to Mika nonywolo Pithon gi Melek gi Tarea kod Ahaz. 
1Chronicles8:36 Ahaz nonywolo Jehoada, to Jehoada nonywolo Alemeth gi Azmoth kod Zimri. Zimri nonywolo Moza,"

1Chronicles8:39 To yawuot Eshek owadgi Ezel ne gin Ulam, wuode makayo, gi Jeush, wuode mar ariyo, kod Elifelet, wuode mar adek." 
1Chronicles8:40 Yawuot Ulam ne gin thuondi molony kuom diro asere. Ne gin gi yawuowi gi nyikwayo mang’eny moromo mia achiel gi piero abich. Jogo duto ne gin jo-Benjamin. 
1Chronicles9:1 Jo-Israel duto nokwan koluwore gi dhoutgi, kendo ne ondik nyinggi e Kitap Ruodhi mag Israel gi Juda kane pok odargi kiterogi Babulon e tuech nikech richogi." 
1Chronicles9:2 Joma nokwongo dak e miechgi ne gin jo-Israel gi jodolo gi jo-Lawi kod jotich Hekalu. 
1Chronicles9:3 To jo-Juda gi jo-Benjamin gi jo-Efraim kod jo-Manase nodak Jerusalem. 
1Chronicles9:4 Jo-Juda ne gin Uthai wuod Amihud, ma wuod Omri, wuod Imri, wuod Bani, ma achiel kuom nyikwa Perez ma wuod Juda." 
1Chronicles9:5 Joka Shela ne Asaya ma wuowi makayo, kaachiel gi yawuote." 
1Chronicles9:6 Joka Zera ne Jeuel kod owetegi mia auchiel gi piero ochiko. 
1Chronicles9:7 Jo-Benjamin ne Salu wuod Meshulam, ma wuod Hodavia, ma wuod Hasenua," 
1Chronicles9:8 gi Ibneya wuod Jeroham gi Ela wuod Uzi ma wuod Mikra, kod Meshulam wuod Shefatia, ma wuod Reuel, wuod Ibnija." 
1Chronicles9:9 Jogo kaachiel gi jowetegi mane nyinggi ochan, ne romo ji mia ochiko gi piero abich gauchiel. Giduto ne gin jodong dhoudi." 
1Chronicles9:10 To jodolo ne gin Jedaya gi Jehoyarid gi Jakin 
1Chronicles9:11 gi Azaria wuod Hilkia, ma wuod Meshulam, ma wuod Zadok, ma wuod Merayoth, ma wuod Ahitub mane jatelo e Od Nyasaye" 
1Chronicles9:12 gi Adaya wuod Jeroham, ma wuod Pashur, ma wuod Malkija, kod Maasa wuod Adiel ma wuod Jazera, wuod Meshulam, wuod Meshilemith, wuod Imer." 
1Chronicles9:13 Jogo ne nigi owetegi ma jodong dhoudi alufu achiel gi mia abiriyo gi piero auchiel. Giduto ne gin joma dongo molony e tich Od Nyasaye. 
1Chronicles9:14 Jo-Lawi ne Shemaya wuod Hashub wuod Azrikam, wuod Hashabia ja-Merari," 
1Chronicles9:15 gi Bakbakar gi Heresh gi Galal gi Matania wuod Mika, ma wuod Zikri, wuod Asaf," 
1Chronicles9:16 gi Obadia wuod Shemaya, ma wuod Galal, wuod Jeduthun, kod Berekia wuod Asa wuod Elkana, ma nodak gi joka Netola." 
1Chronicles9:17 Jorit rangeye ne gin Shalum gi Akub gi Talmon gi Ahiman kod owetegi. To Shalum ne jatendgi. 
1Chronicles9:18 Mokwongo noketgi yo wuokchieng’ mar ranga dala ruoth, ka girito rangeye mag kar dak jo-Lawi." 
1Chronicles9:19 Shalum wuod Koreah, ma wuod Abiasaf, wuod Kora, kaachiel gi owetene ma jo-Kora ne rito rangeye mag Hema Maler kaka kweregi ne rito rangeye mag kambi jo-Ruoth Nyasaye." 
1Chronicles9:20 Chon Finehas wuod Eleazar ne jatendgi. (Ruoth mondo obed kode!) 
1Chronicles9:21 Zekaria wuod Meshelemia norito ranga Hemb Romo. 
1Chronicles9:22 Joma noyier mondo obed jorit rangeye ne gin ji mia ariyo gi apar gariyo, mochan koluwore gi miechgi. Daudi gi Samuel ma janen ema noketogi e tich, nikech ne gin joma kare." 
1Chronicles9:23 Omiyo gin gi yawuotgi, ne girito rangeye Od Ruoth Nyasaye, tiende ni Hema Maler." 
1Chronicles9:24 Jorit rangeye nodak e bath Hekalu kor wuokchieng’ gi kor podho chieng’ gi kor nyandwat gi kor milambo. 
1Chronicles9:25 To owetegi ma nodak oko e mier ne nyaka bi konyogi rito kuom ndalo abiriyo kinde ka kinde. 
1Chronicles9:26 Jorit ang’wen ma jotelogo noyier nimar ne gin joma kare. Ne gin jo-Lawi, kendo ne girito udi gi kuonde keno mag Od Nyasaye." 
1Chronicles9:27 Ne gidak ei alwora mar Od Nyasaye, nikech nomigi tich yawo rangeye pile gokinyi." 
1Chronicles9:28 Jomoko kuomgi nomi tich rito gik lemo. Ne gikwano gigo kigologi kar keno, kendo kidwokogi." 
1Chronicles9:29 To moko ne rito gik Hekalu kod gik mowal ni tich Ruoth Nyasaye, kod mogo mayom gi divai gi mo gi ubani kod gik mang’ue ng’ar." 
1Chronicles9:30 To jodolo ema neruwo gik mang’ue ng’argo. 
1Chronicles9:31 Ja-Lawi moro ma nyinge Matithia, mane kach Shalum ja-Kora, ema nomi tich tedo chapat michiwo ni Nyasaye nikech ne en ng’at makare." 
1Chronicles9:32 To owetegi moko ma jo-Kohath nomi tich keto makati e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, chieng’ Sabato ka Sabato." 
1Chronicles9:33 Mago ne jower kendo jodong dhout jo-Lawi. Ne gidak e udi moko mag Hekalu. Ne ok omigi tich moro machielo, nikech nonego gibed moikore ni tichgi odiechieng’ gotieno." 
1Chronicles9:34 Jogo duto, kaka dhoutgi giwegi nochanogi, ne gin jodong dhout jo-Lawi, kendo ne gidak Jerusalem." 
1Chronicles9:35 Jeyel wuon Gibeon nodak Gibeon, to nying chiege ne Maaka." 
1Chronicles9:36 Wuod Jeyel makayo ne Abdon, to yawuote mamoko ne Zer gi Kish gi Baal gi Ner gi Nadab" 
1Chronicles9:37 gi Gedor gi Ahio gi Zekaria kod Mikloth," 
1Chronicles9:38 to Mikloth nonywolo Shimeam. Jogo bende nodak Jerusalem mokiewo gi owetegi. 
1Chronicles9:39 Ner nonywolo Kish, to Kish nonywolo Saulo, to Saulo nonywolo Jonathan gi Malkishua gi Abinadab kod Eshbaal." 
1Chronicles9:40 Wuod Jonathan ne Meribaal. Meribaal nonywolo Mika," 
1Chronicles9:41 to Mika nonywolo Pithon gi Melek gi Terea kod Ahaz. 
1Chronicles9:42 Ahaz nonywolo Jara, to Jara nonywolo Alemeth gi Azmoth kod Zimri. Zimri nonywolo Moza," 
1Chronicles9:43 To Moza nonywolo Binea. Binea nonywolo Refaya, to Refaya nonywolo Eleasa. Eleasa nonywolo Azel," 
1Chronicles9:44 to Azel nonywolo yawuowi auchiel ma nyinggi ne Azrikam gi Bokeru gi Ishmael gi Shearia gi Obadia kod Hanan. Mago e kar romb yawuot Azel. 
1Chronicles10:1 Noyudo jo-Filistia kedo gi jo-Israel, kendo jo-Israel noringo, kinegogi e got Gilboa." 
1Chronicles10:2 Jo-Filistia nojuko Saulo gi yawuote ma Jonathan gi Abinadab kod Malkishua, kendo ne ginego yawuotego." 
1Chronicles10:3 Lweny nohingo Saulo, mi jo-asere noyude, mochiele kendo ohinye." 
1Chronicles10:4 Saulo nowacho ni jating’ne gilweny niya, “Wuodh liganglani inegago, nono to joma kia Nyasayegi, biro nyiera.” To jating’ gilwenje nodagi, nikech noluor ahinya. Emomiyo Saulo nomako liganglane owuon, mochwoworee." 
1Chronicles10:5 To kane jating’ne gilweny oneno ni Saulo osetho, en bende nochwowore e liganglane, motho." 
1Chronicles10:6 Kamano Saulo notho kaachiel gi yawuote adek kod joode duto chieng’ achiel. 
1Chronicles10:7 Kane jo-Israel mane odak e holo oneno ni jolweny oseringo, kendo ni Saulo gi yawuote josetho, ne gibolo miechgi kanyo, mi gin bende ne giringo. Bang’e jo-Filistia nobiro, modak e miergo." 
1Chronicles10:8 Kinyne, kane jo-Filistia obiro dedo joma otho, ne giyudo ringre Saulo gi ringre yawuote koriere e got Gilboa." 
1Chronicles10:9 Ne gidedo Saulo, kendo ne ging’ado wiye, mi gikawo gige mag lweny. Eka ne gioro joote e piny Filistia duto, mondo oter wach maberno ni nyisechegi, kendo ni jopinygi." 
1Chronicles10:10 Ne giketo gi Saulo mag lweny e od nyisechegi, to wiye ne giguro e kor hekalu mar Dagon nyasachgi." 
1Chronicles10:11 To kane jo-Jabes-gilead owinjo gima ne jo-Filistia osetimo ni Saulo," 
1Chronicles10:12 thuondgi duto nowuok modhi oomo ringre Saulo gi ringre yawuote. Ne gikelogi Jabesh, mi giyiko chokegi kuno e tiend yath moro, kendo ne gitueyo chiemo kuom ndalo abiriyo." 
1Chronicles10:13 Kamano Saulo notho nikech noweyo Ruoth Nyasaye. Ne ok orito chik Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo kar penjo Ruoth Nyasaye wach, to nodhi mana ir jonyakalondo mondo onyise wach." 
1Chronicles10:14 Mano emomiyo Ruoth Nyasaye nonege, momiyo Daudi wuod Jesse lochne." 
1Chronicles11:1 Bang’e jo-Israel duto nochokore gi Daudi Hebron, mi giwachone niya, “Ng’e ni wan mana remo achiel kodi." 
1Chronicles11:2 E ndalo mokadho, kane Saulo pod ruoth, in ema nitelo ni jo-Israel e lwenjegi duto, kendo Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachi nowachoni niya, ‘Inibed jakwadh joga Israel, kendo in ema nibed jatendgi.’ ”" 
1Chronicles11:3 Kuom mano, jodong Israel duto nobiro Hebron ir ruoth Daudi, kendo Daudi notimo kodgi singruok kuno e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, mi ne giwire gi mo mondo obed ruodh Israel, kaluwore gi wach mane Ruoth Nyasaye omiyo Samuel owacho." 
1Chronicles11:4 Bang’e Daudi gi jo-Israel duto nodhi Jerusalem, mane iluongo ni Jebus kuma ne jo-Jebus odakie." 
1Chronicles11:5 Jo-Jebus gogo nowacho ni Daudi niya, “Ok nidonj kaeri!” To kata kamano Daudi nokawo Sayun, dala mane ochiel motegno ahinya. Tinde iluonge ni Dala Daudi." 
1Chronicles11:6 Daudi nosewacho niya, “Ng’at ma nokwong nego ja-Jebus ema nobed jatelo kata jaduong’ lweny.” Joab wuod Zeruya ema nokwongo timo kamano, mi nokete jatelo." 
1Chronicles11:7 Daudi nodak e dala mochiel motegnono, emomiyo nochak kanyo ni Dala Daudi." 
1Chronicles11:8 Nogero udi molwore, kochakore gie ohinga mar Milo, to Joab noloso kuonde mamoko mane okethore e dalano." 
1Chronicles11:9 Duong’ mar Daudi koro nomedore ahinya, nimar Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto ne ni kode." 
1Chronicles11:10 Koro thuondi madongo moloyo, mane konyo Daudi gi tekregi duto mondo okete ruoth, kaluwore gi wach mane Ruoth Nyasaye owacho kuom jo-Israel e magi:" 
1Chronicles11:11 Jashobeam ja-Hakmon ne jatend thuondi adek madongo. En ema nonego ji mia achiel gi tong’, odiechieng’ achiel." 
1Chronicles11:12 Ng’at mane luwe ne en Eleazar wuod Dodo ja-Ahohi. 
1Chronicles11:13 Ne en gi Daudi Pasdamim, kuma ne jo-Filistia ochokoree ni lweny. Ne nitie puoth shairi kuno. Jolweny moko duto noringo jo-Filistia," 
1Chronicles11:14 To gin ne gichung’ gineno jo-Filistiago e dier puodhono, ka girite, kendo ne ginego jo-Filistiago. Mano e kaka Ruoth Nyasaye noreso jo-Israel, komiyogi loch maduong’." 
1Chronicles11:15 Kane jolweny mag jo-Filistia ojot e holo Refaim, ji adek kuom thuondi piero adek madongo nodhi ir Daudi e lwanda man but rogo mar Adulam." 
1Chronicles11:16 Kindego Daudi ne nie rogo, to jolweny mag jo-Filistia nosekawo Bethlehem." 
1Chronicles11:17 Daudi noomo chunye ka siso omake, mowacho niya, “Yaye! Mad ng’ato kelna pi soko man but ranga Bethlehem mondo amodhi!”" 
1Chronicles11:18 Eka thuondi adekgo nomwomo oganda mar jo-Filistia. Ne gidhi omo pi sokono, mi gikelo ni Daudi, to nodagi modho pigno, moole piny ka misango ni Ruoth Nyasaye," 
1Chronicles11:19 kowacho niya, “Nyasaye mondo orita kik amodh pigni, nikech ochalo mana remb jogo mane odhi ome koyie wito ngimagi.” Mano emomiyo Daudi notamore modhe. Gik makamago ema thuondi adekgo ne timo." 
1Chronicles11:20 Abishai omin Joab ema ne jatend thuondi piero adekgo. Nonego ji mia adek gi tong’, mi nobedo ng’at marahuma kuom thuondigo." 
1Chronicles11:21 Ne en rahuma moloyo kuomgi, mobedo jatendgi, to kata kamano ne ok ochopo e rang’iny mag ji adek kande." 
1Chronicles11:22 Benaya wuod Jehoyada, thwon Kabzeel marahuma, nosetimo timbe thwon mang’eny. Bende nonego thuond Moab ariyo. Chieng’ moro, kane kodh pe osechue, nolor e bur moro, monegoe sibuor." 
1Chronicles11:23 Bende en ema nonego ja-Misri marabet mane borne romo mita ariyo gi nus. Ja-Misrino ne nigi tong’ machal gi lodi, to Benaya nodhine gi odunga. Noyudho tong’ e lwet ja-Misrino, monegego." 
1Chronicles11:24 Timbe machal kamago ema ne Benaya wuod Jehoyada oyudogo huma kaachiel gi thuondi piero adek kande. 
1Chronicles11:25 Ne en rahuma moloyo ji piero adekgo, to kata kamano ne ok ochopo e rang’iny mag thuondi adek madongo kande. Daudi nokete jatend joge mag lweny mane rito ng’imane." 
1Chronicles11:26 Thwond jolweny mag Daudi ne gin Asahel omin Joab, gi Elhanan wuod Dodo ja-Bethlehem," 
1Chronicles11:27 gi Shamoth ja-Horad, gi Helez ja-Pelon," 
1Chronicles11:28 gi Ira wuod Ikesh ja-Tekoa, gi Abiezer ja-Anathoth," 
1Chronicles11:29 gi Sibekai ja-Hushath, gi Ilai ja-Ahohi," 
1Chronicles11:30 kod Maharai gi Heled wuod Baana ma jo-Netofa," 
1Chronicles11:31 gi Benjamin, gi Benaya ja-Pirathon," 
1Chronicles11:32 gi Hurai ma ja-Gaash, piny aore, gi Abiel ja-Beth-araba," 
1Chronicles11:33 gi Azmoth ja-Bararim, gi Eliaba ja-Shaalbon," 
1Chronicles11:34 gi Hashem ja-Gizon, kod Jonathan wuod Shagee," 
1Chronicles11:35 gi Ahiam wuod Sakar ma jo-Harar, gi Elifal wuod Ur," 
1Chronicles11:36 gi Hefer ja Mekera, gi Ahija ja-Pelon," 
1Chronicles11:37 gi Ezbai," 
1Chronicles11:38 gi Joel owadgi Nathan, gi Mibhar wuod Hagri," 
1Chronicles11:38 gi Joel owadgi Nathan, gi Mibhar wuod Hagri," 
1Chronicles11:39 gi Zelek ja Amon, gi Naharai ja Beerroth, mane jating’ gi lweny mag Joab wuod Zeruya," 
1Chronicles11:40 kod Ira gi Gareb ma jo-Ithri," 
1Chronicles11:41 gi Uria ja-Hiti, kod Zabad wuod Alai." 
1Chronicles11:42 Jatend thuondi piero adekgo ne Adina wuod Shiza ja-Reuben, ma jatend jo-Reuben." 
1Chronicles11:43 Jomoko mane ni kodgi ne gin Hanan wuod Maaka, gi Joshafat ja-Mithni," 
1Chronicles11:44 gi Uzia ja-Asheteroth, kod Shama gi Jeyel yawuot Hotham ja-Aroer," 
1Chronicles11:45 kod Jadiael wuod Shimri gi Joha owadgi, ma jo-Tizi," 
1Chronicles11:46 gi Eliel ja-Mahav, kod Jeribai gi Joshavia yawuot Elnaam, gi Ithma ja-Moab," 
1Chronicles11:47 kod Eliel gi Obed kod Jaasiel jo-Zoba. 
1Chronicles12:1 Koro magi e joma nobiro Ziklag ir Daudi kane Saulo wuod Kish oseriembe e nyime. Gin bende ne gin thuondi mane konyo Daudi lweny. 
1Chronicles12:2 Ne ginyalo diro asere kata bayo orujre gi bat korachwich kata gi bat koracham. Ne gin jo-Benjamin, dhoodgi Saulo." 
1Chronicles12:3 Jotendgi ne Ahiezer, gi Joash owadgi, ma yawuot Shemaa ja-Gibea, kod Jeziel gi Pelet yawuot Azmoth, kod Beraka gi Jehu jo-Anathoth," 
1Chronicles12:4 gi Ishmaya ja-Gibeon ma achiel kuom jotend thuondi pieradekgo, kod Jeremia gi Jahaziel gi Johanan gi Jozabad ja-Gedera," 
1Chronicles12:5 gi Eluzai gi Jerimoth gi Bealia gi Shemaria gi Shefatia ja-Haruf," 
1Chronicles12:6 kod Elkana gi Ishia gi Azereel gi Joezer gi Jashobeam jo-Kora," 
1Chronicles12:7 kod Joela gi Zebadia yawuot Jeroham ma ja-Gedor. 
1Chronicles12:7 kod Joela gi Zebadia yawuot Jeroham ma ja-Gedor. 
1Chronicles12:8 Jo-Gad moko bende nobiro ir Daudi kane enie rogo e thim. Ne gin joma rateke motiegore ni lweny, mong’eyo kedo gi kuodi kod tong’. Ne giger ka sibuoche, kendo tiendgi ne yot ka tiend mwanda maringo e got." 
1Chronicles12:9 Ezer ne jatendgi, to Obadia jalupne, eka Eliab mar adek," 
1Chronicles12:10 Mishmana mar ang’wen, Jeremia mar abich," 
1Chronicles12:11 Atai mar auchiel, Eliel mar abiriyo," 
1Chronicles12:12 Johanan mar aboro, Elzabad mar ochiko," 
1Chronicles12:13 Jeremia mar apar, Makbanai mar apar gachiel." 
1Chronicles12:14 Joka Gadgo ne jodong oganda lweny. Ng’at matinie moloyo kuomgi muche ne romre gi much ji mia achiel, to much ng’at maduong’ moloyo ne romre gi much ji alufu achiel." 
1Chronicles12:15 Jogo ema nong’ado aora Jordan e due mokwongo kane opong’ moo, kendo oimo genge duto. Ne giriembo ji duto ma nodak e holni man yo wuok chieng’ gi yo podho chieng’ mar aorano." 
1Chronicles12:16 Jomoko kuom jo-Benjamin gi jo-Juda bende nobiro ir Daudi e rogo. 
1Chronicles12:17 Daudi nowuok romonigi, mowachonigi niya, “Ka usebiro ira kaka osiepe mondo ukonya, to arwakou gi mor. To ka ubiro ni mondo undhoga, kendo uketa e lwet wasika, to onge gima aseketho, to Nyasach kwerewa mondo one wachno, kendo ong’adnu bura.”" 
1Chronicles12:18 Eka Roho nolor kuom Amasai, jatend thuondi piero adek kande mowacho niya, “Wan kodi Daudi! Wan jogi, wuod Jesse. Wamosi! Wamosi! Wamoso Jakonyni bende! En Nyasachi makonyi.” Eka Daudi norwakogi, moketogi kuom joge mag lweny." 
1Chronicles12:19 Kane Daudi dhi gi jo-Filistia mondo giked gi Saulo, jo-Manase moko noweyo Saulo modok ni Daudi. Kata kamano Daudi ne ok okonyo jo-Filistia, nimar kane jotendgi oseporo wach, ne giriembe. Ne giwacho niya, “Dipo kondhogowa kodok ni Saulo ma ruodhe, mi okelnwa masira.”" 
1Chronicles12:20 Jo-Manase ma nodok ni Daudi kane odhi Ziklag, ne gin Adna gi Jozabad gi Jadiael gi Mikael gi Jozabad gi Elihu kod Zilthai. Ng’ato ka ng’ato kuomgi ne jatend jolweny alufu achiel mag jo-Manase." 
1Chronicles12:21 Gin ema ne gikonyo Daudi kedo gi joma ne monje, nimar giduto ne gin thuondi mager, kendo Daudi noketogi jotend jolweny." 
1Chronicles12:22 Ji ne medo biro ir Daudi odiechieng’ kodiechieng’ mondo okonye, nyaka ne gidoko oganda mang’ongo mar jolweny." 
1Chronicles12:23 Jolweny ma nobiro Hebron ir Daudi mondo okaw loch Saulo omi Daudi kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nosewacho e magi: 
1Chronicles12:24 Jo-Juda mane oting’o kuodi gi tong’ ne alufu auchiel gi mia aboro. 
1Chronicles12:25 Jo-Simeon ma thuondi mager ne alufu abiriyo gi mia achiel. 
1Chronicles12:26 Jo-Lawi ne alufu angwen gi mia auchiel 
1Chronicles12:27 kaachiel gi Jehoyada jaduong’ dhood Harun, mane nigi ji alufu adek gi mia abiriyo," 
1Chronicles12:28 kod Zadok, wuowi mathwon kendo mager, mane nigi jodong lweny piero ariyo gariyo moa e dhoodgi." 
1Chronicles12:29 Jo-Benjamin, ma owete Saulo, ne romo ji alufu adek, to ji mang’eny kuomgi nopadore kuom dhood Saulo nyaka thone." 
1Chronicles12:30 Jo-Efraim ne thuondi alufu piero ariyo gi mia aboro, man gi huma e dhoutgi." 
1Chronicles12:31 Jo-Manase konchiel mane oyier mondo obi oket Daudi ruoth ne romo alufu apar gaboro. 
1Chronicles12:32 Jo-Isakar ne gin joma riek kuom nyiso jo-Israel gima onego gitim, kendo kinde monego gitimee. Ne gin jotelo mia ariyo, ma nobiro gi jolwenjgi." 
1Chronicles12:33 Jo-Zebulun ne jolweny molony alufu piero abich man gi gilweny mopogore opogore. Ne gin thuondi mager man gi chuny achiel. 
1Chronicles12:34 Jo-Naftali ne jotend jolweny alufu achiel gi ji alufu piero adek gabiriyo moting’o kuodi gi tong’. 
1Chronicles12:35 Jo-Dan ne ji alufu piero ariyo gaboro gi mia auchiel moikore ni lweny. 
1Chronicles12:36 Jo-Asher to ne ji alufu piero ang’wen mochwiny kendo moikore ni lweny. 
1Chronicles12:37 To joma noa loka Jordan kuom jo-Reuben gi jo-Gad kod jo-Manase konchiel ne gin ji alufu mia achiel gi piero ariyo, ma noting’o kit gilweny duto." 
1Chronicles12:38 Jolweny maratekego duto nobiro Hebron gi chuny achiel ni nyaka giket Daudi ruodh jo-Israel duto. Jo-Israel modong’ bende ne nigi paro achiel mar timo kamano. 
1Chronicles12:39 Ne gibet kuno gi Daudi kuom ndalo adek, ka gichiemo kendo gimetho, nikech jowetegi noseikonigi gik moko duto." 
1Chronicles12:40 Bende joma nokiewo kodgi, chakre piny Isakar gi Zebulun kod Naftali nokelonigi chiemo mane giting’o gi kenje gi ngamia gi nyumbu kod ruedhi. Ne gin mogo gi olembe mag ng’owo gi mag mzabibu motwo mong’in kod divai gi mo, kaachiel gi dhok kod rombe mang’eny ahinya, nikech mor mane nitie e Israel." 
1Chronicles13:1 Daudi noporo wach gi jotend ogend lweny madongo gi matindo, kod jotelo duto." 
1Chronicles13:2 Nowacho ni jo-Israel mane ochokore niya “Ka wachni bernu, kendo en dwaro mar Nyasachwa, to mondo waor joote ir jo-Israel wetewa duto modong’ dala, kendo ir jodolo gi jo-Lawi ma nopognigi mier man gi lege, mondo obi irwa." 
1Chronicles13:3 Eka mondo waom Sanduk mar Nyasaye obed kodwa, nimar ne wajwang’e e ndalo Saulo.”" 
1Chronicles13:4 Mi oganda duto noyie timo kamano, kendo wachno ne ber ni piny duto." 
1Chronicles13:5 Omiyo Daudi nochoko jo-Israel duto kanyakla, chakre aora Shihor nyaka kama idonjogo Hamath, yo nyandwat, mondo giom Sanduk mar Nyasaye Kiriath-jearim." 
1Chronicles13:6 Mi Daudi gi jo-Israel duto nodhi Baala, ma bende iluongo ni Kiriath-jearim, manie piny Juda, mondo giomie Sanduk mar Nyasaye miluongogo nying Ruoth Nyasaye, mobet kuom kerubi kaka ruoth bet e kom duong’ne." 
1Chronicles13:7 Ne gigolo Sanduk mar Nysaye e od Abinadab, ka giting’e e gari manyien. Uza gi Ahio ema ne chiko garino." 
1Chronicles13:8 Daudi gi jo-Israel to ne jomiel gi tekregi duto e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, ka giwer, kendo gigoyo thumbe gi nyidwonge gi ongeng’o kod tung’." 
1Chronicles13:9 To kane gichopo kar dino mar Kidon, dhok mane ywayo gari nochwanyore, mi Uza norieyo bade mondo ojuk Sanduk mane oyudo dhi podho." 
1Chronicles13:10 To Ruoth Nyasaye nokecho kode, mochwade nikech nomako Sanduk, mi notho kanyo e nyim Nyasaye." 
1Chronicles13:11 Daudi nokecho nikech Nyasaye nomwomore kuom Uza. Omiyo nochako kanyo ni Perez-uza, (tiende ni, mwomruok kuom Uza.) Pod iluonge kamano nyaka chil kawuono." 
1Chronicles13:12 Daudi noluoro Nyasaye chieng’no, mowacho niya, “Kara Sanduk mar Nyasaye ok onego kel e dalana!”" 
1Chronicles13:13 Omiyo ne ok okelo Sanduk e dalane, to nobaro kode, motere e od Obed-edom ma ja-Giti." 
1Chronicles13:14 Sanduk mar Nyasaye nodong’ e hembe but od Obed-edom kuom dueche adek. Mi Ruoth Nyasaye noguedho od Obed-edom kod gige duto. 
1Chronicles14:1 Hiram ruodh Turo nooro joote ir Daudi gi yiend sida, kaachiel gi jogedo mag kite kod jopa bao, mondo oger ni Daudi ot." 
1Chronicles14:2 Koro Daudi nong’eyo ni kara Ruoth Nyasaye osekete ruodh Israel kendo osetego lochne ahinya mondo oguedhgo joge Israel. 
1Chronicles14:3 Daudi nokendo mon moko Jerusalem, mi nomedo nywolo yawuowi gi nyiri." 
1Chronicles14:4 Nying nyithindo mane onywolo kuno e magi: Shamua gi Shobab gi Nathan gi Solomon 
1Chronicles14:5 gi Ibhar gi Elishua gi Elpelet 
1Chronicles14:6 gi Noga gi Nefeg gi Jafia 
1Chronicles14:7 gi Elishama gi Beeliada kod Elifelet. 
1Chronicles14:8 Kane jo-Filistia owinjo ni osewir Daudi mondo obed ruodh Israel duto, ne gibiro kar rombgi mondo gimonje. To kane Daudi owinjo kamano, nowuok mondo orad kodgi." 
1Chronicles14:9 Noyudo ka jo-Filistia osemonjo joma odak e Holo Refaim. 
1Chronicles14:10 Daudi nopenjo Nyasaye wach niya, “Kadhi kedo gi jo-Filistia, inichiwgi e lweta koso?” Nyasaye nodwoke niya, “Dhiyo! Nachiwgi e lweti.”" 
1Chronicles14:11 Mi Daudi nodhi Baal-perazim, momonjogi, kendo oloyogi. Eka nowacho niya, “Nyasaye osemiyo amwomo wasika mana kaka aora mwomo genge.” Mano emomiyo nochak kanyo ni Baal-perazim, (tiende ni ruodh mwomruok.)" 
1Chronicles14:12 Jo-Filistia noringo moweyo nyisechegi kanyo, mi Daudi nogolo chik, mowang’gi." 
1Chronicles14:13 Chieng’ machielo jo-Filistia nochako omonjo holo cha. 
1Chronicles14:14 Daudi nochako openjo Nyasaye wach, mi Nyasaye nodwoke niya, “Kik ichomgi tir, to ng’ad yo ka ng’egi, mondo imonjgi kama omanyore gi yien maboyo kande." 
1Chronicles14:15 Kiwinjo mutni ewi yien, machalo gi mutni mar ji mawuotho, to imonj jolweny mag jo-Filistia, nimar asetelo nyimi mondo adhi alogi.”" 
1Chronicles14:16 Daudi notimo kaka Nyasaye nochike, mi jo-Israel noriembo jo-Filistia, chakre Gibeon nyaka Gezer." 
1Chronicles14:17 Humb Daudi nolak e pinje duto, kendo Ruoth Nyasaye nomiyo ogendini duto oluore." 
1Chronicles15:1 Daudi nomedo gero udi e Dala Daudi, kendo noloso kama Sanduk mar Nyasaye nyalo betie, mogurone hema." 
1Chronicles15:2 Eka nochiko ni onge ng’at moro ma nyalo ting’o Sanduk mar Nyasaye mak mana jo-Lawi kende nimar gin ema ne Nyasaye oyierogi mondo giting’e, kendo gitine nyaka chieng’." 
1Chronicles15:3 Bang’ mano, Daudi nochoko jo-Israel duto Jerusalem mondo giter Sanduk mar Ruoth Nyasaye kuma noselosone." 
1Chronicles15:4 Nochoko bende joka Harun kod jo-Lawi kanyakla. 
1Chronicles15:5 Ne gin joka Kohath mia achiel gi piero ariyo, mane Uriel otelonigi," 
1Chronicles15:6 gi joka Merari mia ariyo gi piero ariyo, mane Asaya otelonigi," 
1Chronicles15:7 gi joka Gershom mia achiel gi piero adek, mane Joel otelonigi," 
1Chronicles15:7 gi joka Gershom mia achiel gi piero adek, mane Joel otelonigi," 
1Chronicles15:8 gi joka Elizafan mia ariyo mane Shemaya otelonigi," 
1Chronicles15:9 gi jo-Hebron piero aboro, mane Eliel otelonigi," 
1Chronicles15:10 kod joka Uziel mia achiel gapar gariyo, mane Aminadab otelonigi." 
1Chronicles15:11 Eka Daudi noluongo Zadok gi Abiathar ma jodolo kod Uriel gi Asaya gi Joel gi Shemaya gi Eliel kod Aminadab ma jo-Lawi. 
1Chronicles15:11 Eka Daudi noluongo Zadok gi Abiathar ma jodolo kod Uriel gi Asaya gi Joel gi Shemaya gi Eliel kod Aminadab ma jo-Lawi. 
1Chronicles15:12 Nowachonigi niya, “Un ma un jodong dhout Lawi, pwodhreuru kaachiel gi oweteu mondo uter Sanduk mar Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel kuma aseikone." 
1Chronicles15:13 Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachwa ne omwomore kuomwa e kinde mokwongo, nikech ne ok untie mondo uting’ Sanduk, kendo nikech ne ok warite kaka owinjore.”" 
1Chronicles15:14 Omiyo jodolo gi jolawi nopwodhore mondo oter Sanduk mar Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel kama noseikne. 
1Chronicles15:15 Jo-Lawi noting’o Sanduk mar Nyasaye e gokgi gi ludhe, koluwore gi wach Nyasaye kaka Musa nochiko." 
1Chronicles15:16 Daudi nochiko jotend jo-Lawi bende mondo oyier owetegi ma jower molony kendo mong’eyo goyo thumbe mopogore opogore mamit. 
1Chronicles15:17 Omiyo jo-Lawi noyiero Heman wuod Joel, gi Asaf wuod Berekia ma owadgi. To kuom owetegi ma joka Merari ne giyiero Etham wuod Kushaya." 
1Chronicles15:17 Omiyo jo-Lawi noyiero Heman wuod Joel, gi Asaf wuod Berekia ma owadgi. To kuom owetegi ma joka Merari ne giyiero Etham wuod Kushaya." 
1Chronicles15:18 Owetegi mane jolupgi e tich ne Zekaria gi Jaaziel gi Benaya gi Maaseya gi Matithia gi Elifelehu kod Mikneya, kaachiel gi Obed-edom kod Jeyel ma jorit rangeye." 
1Chronicles15:19 Heman gi Asaf kod Etham ma jower noyier mondo ogo ongeng’o mag mula," 
1Chronicles15:20 to Zekaria gi Jaaziel gi Shemiramoth gi Jehiel gi Uni gi Eliab gi Maaseya kod Benaya noyier mondo ogo nyigwerni. 
1Chronicles15:21 Matithia gi Elifelehu gi Mikneya gi Obed-edom gi Jeyel kod Azazia noyier mondo ogo thumbe, ka gitelo ni jower." 
1Chronicles15:22 Kenania ma jatend jo-Lawi ema notelo ni wer nikech nolonyie. 
1Chronicles15:23 To Berekia gi Elkana ne jorit dhout od Sanduk. 
1Chronicles15:24 Shebania gi Jehoshafat gi Nethaneel gi Amasai gi Zekaria gi Benaya kod Eliezer ma jodolo ne goyo tung’ e nyim Sanduk mar Nyasaye. Obed-edom gi Jehia bende ne jorit dhout Sanduk. 
1Chronicles15:25 Bang’ mago Daudi gi jodong Israel kod jotend lweny mane rito jo-lweny alufu achiel, nodhi gi mor mondo oom Sandug Muma mar Ruoth Nyasaye e od Obed-edom." 
1Chronicles15:26 Ne gitimo misango gi ruedhi abiriyo kod imbe abiriyo, nimar Nyasaye ne konyo jo-Lawi ma noting’o Sandug Muma mar Ruoth Nyasaye." 
1Chronicles15:27 Daudi gi jo-Lawi duto ma noting’o Sanduk, kaachiel gi jower norwako aroche mag bafta. Daudi norwako law dolo mar bafta bende." 
1Chronicles15:28 Kamano jo-Israel nokelo Sandug Muma mar Ruoth Nyasaye ka gigoyo sigalagala gi tung’ gi oporo gi ongeng’o gi nyigwerni kod thumbe. 
1Chronicles15:29 Kane Sanduk ochopo e dala Daudi, Mikal nyar Saulo nong’icho gie dirisa moneno ruoth Daudi ka miel kendo tugo, mi nochaye gi chunye." 
1Chronicles16:1 Ne gikelo Sanduk mar Nyasaye mi giketo ei hema mane Daudi ogurone. Eka ne gitimo misengni miwang’o pep kod misengni mag kue e nyim Nyasaye. 
1Chronicles16:2 Kane Daudi osetieko timo misengnigo, noguedho jo-Israel e nying Ruoth Nyasaye," 
1Chronicles16:3 kendo nopogonigi chiemo giduto. Ng’ato ka ng’ato ma dichwo kata madhako noyudo makati achiel gi ring’o kod olembe mar mzabibu motwo mong’in. 
1Chronicles16:4 Daudi noyiero jo-Lawi moko mondo oti e nyim Sanduk mar Ruoth Nyasaye, ka gigoyone erokamano, kendo gipake ka giparego." 
1Chronicles16:5 Jotendgi ne gin Asaf, to jalupne ne Zekaria, to moko ne gin Jaaziel gi Shemiramoth gi Jehiel gi Matithia gi Eliab gi Benaya gi Obed-edom gi Jeyel mane jogo nyigwerni gi thumbe. Asaf ne goyo ongeng’o," 
1Chronicles16:6 to Benaya gi Jahaziel ma jodolo ne goyo tung’ odiechieng’ thole e nyim Sandug Muma mar Nyasaye. 
1Chronicles16:7 Chiengno ema ne Daudi okwongo chikoe Asaf gi owetene mondo opak Ruoth Nyasaye gi wendni: 
1Chronicles16:8 gouru erokamano ni Ruoth Nyasaye. Luonguru nyinge, kendo landuru humb timbene ni ogendini duto." 
1Chronicles16:9 Pakeuru gi wende kod zaburi," 
1Chronicles16:10 bende paruru timbene madongo duto. Moruru nikech nyinge ler. Joma dwaro Ruoth Nyasaye mondo obed mamor! 
1Chronicles16:11 Dwaruru Ruoth Nyasaye mamiyou teko. Dwareuru ndalo duto. 
1Chronicles16:12 Paruru honni gi timbe madongo mosetimo, kaachiel gi buche moseng’ado." 
1Chronicles16:13 Un nyikwa Israel, jotich Ruoth Nyasaye. Adier, un yawuot Jakobo, jotichne moyier," 
1Chronicles16:14 En e Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachwa kendo tekone okwako piny ngima. 
1Chronicles16:15 Noparo singruokne manyaka nene ma nosik kuom tienge gana gi gana," 
1Chronicles16:16 mane otimo ni Ibrahim. Bende noparo kuong’ruok mane okuong’orego ni Isaka," 
1Chronicles16:17 kod singruok mane otimo ni Jakobo. En singruok mochwere ni Israel. 
1Chronicles16:18 Nowacho niya, “Anamiyi piny Kanaan mondo obed mwanduni gi nyikwayi.”" 
1Chronicles16:19 Ne pod gin ji manok ahinya, kendo jodak adaka e pinyno." 
1Chronicles16:20 Ne giwuotho e kind ogendini ka gidak kuonde mopogore opogore. 
1Chronicles16:21 Ruoth Nyasaye ne ok oyie mondo ng’ato otimnigi tim mamono, nikech noherogi. To nokwero ruodhi, kowachonigi niya," 
1Chronicles16:22 “Kik umul joga maseyiero, kendo kik utim ni jonabi maga marach.”" 
1Chronicles16:23 Weruru ni Ruoth Nyasaye, un ji duto modak e piny, kendo pile ka pile, landuru kaka olocho." 
1Chronicles16:24 Huluru ni ogendini duong’ne maler mondo ji duto owinj timbene madongo. 
1Chronicles16:25 Ruoth Nyasaye duong’, kendo nyaka pake malich! Adier, nyaka miye duong’, moloyo nyiseche mamoko duto," 
1Chronicles16:26 nikech nyiseche mag ogendini mamoko gin mana gik manono, Ruoth Nyasaye to nochweyo polo." 
1Chronicles16:27 Duong’ maler gi duong’ mar loch okete diere, kendo teko gi ber duto ni kar dakne." 
1Chronicles16:28 Un ji duto modak e piny, pakuru Ruoth Nyasaye! Dendeuru nikech duong’ne gi tekone." 
1Chronicles16:29 Miuru nyinge duong’ mowinjore kode kendo keluru chiwo, ubigo e nyime! Ka Ng’ama Ler othinyore," 
1Chronicles16:30 to un ji duto manie piny, kulreuru e nyime kutetni! En ema oseguro piny motegno, ma ok onyal ng’ingni." 
1Chronicles16:31 Un polo gi piny, beduru gi mor, kendo un ji, nyisuru ogendni ni, “Ruoth Nyasaye e Ruoth!”" 
1Chronicles16:32 In nam wuo, kaachiel gi gik moko duto manie iyi. Un pewe, beduru mail, kaachiel gi gik moko duto ma un-go" 
1Chronicles16:33 Kendo yien duto mae bunge, mondo okog gi mor e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, nikech obiro mondo orit piny." 
1Chronicles16:34 Gouru erokamano ni Ruoth Nyasaye, nikech ober, kendo herane mosiko ochwere." 
1Chronicles16:35 Wachuru kama: Reswa, in Nyasaye ma jawarwa Chokwa, kendo reswa kuom ogendni mag piny, mondo wago erokamano ni nyingi maler, kendo wayud mor kwapaki." 
1Chronicles16:36 Odend Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel higni gi higni. Eka ji duto nowacho niya, “Amin!” kendo ne gipako Ruoth Nyasaye." 
1Chronicles16:37 Daudi noweyo Asaf kod owetene e nyim Sandug Muma mar Ruoth Nyasaye, mondo giti kanyo ndalo duto, kaka ne dwarore odiechieng’ kodiechieng’." 
1Chronicles16:38 To noketo Obed-edom wuod Jeduthun kod Hosa mondo obed jorit dhout Hema. Obed-edom gi owetene ne gin ji piero auchiel gaboro. 
1Chronicles16:39 Daudi noweyo bende Zadok jadolo kod owetene ma jodolo e Hema mar Ruoth Nyasaye, mane nie hembko mar Gibeon," 
1Chronicles16:40 mondo gitim ni Ruoth Nyasaye misengni miwang’o pile okinyi godhiambo e kendo-mar-misango kaka ondiki e kitap chik mane Ruoth Nyasaye omiyo jo-Israel. 
1Chronicles16:41 Daudi nomiyo Heman gi Jeduthun kod jomoko mane oyier kendo oluong gi nyingegi ni mondo obed jower magoyo erokamano ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma herane mosiko ochwere. 
1Chronicles16:42 Heman gi Jeduthun ne nigi tung’ gi ongeng’o kod kit thumbe moko mipakogo Nyasaye. To yawuot Jeduthun noket jorit dhoudi. 
1Chronicles16:43 Bang’e ji duto noa modhi miechgi. Daudi bende nodhi mondo one joode. 
1Chronicles17:1 Kane Daudi osechako dak e ode mane ogero, nowacho ni Nathan janabi niya, “Koro an adak e ot moger maber gi yiend sida, to Sandug Muma mar Ruoth Nyasaye nie hema.”" 
1Chronicles17:2 Nathan nodwoko Daudi niya, “Tim duto midwaro, nikech Nyasaye ni kodi.”" 
1Chronicles17:3 To gotienono, wach Ruoth Nyasaye nobiro ni Nathan niya," 
1Chronicles17:4 “Dhi inyis Daudi jatichna ni Ruoth Nyasaye owacho niya: ‘In ok ema nigerna ot mondo adagie. 
1Chronicles17:5 Chakre ndalo mane agoloe jo-Israel e piny Misri nyaka chil kawuono, pok adak e ot, to asebet kadak e hema." 
1Chronicles17:6 Kuonde duto mane awuothoe gi jo-Israel, ne ok apenjo achiel kuom jobura mane aketo mondo obed jokwadh joga Israel gimomiyo ok gigerona ot mar yiend sida.’" 
1Chronicles17:7 Bende inyis Daudi ni Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto owacho kama: ‘Nagoloi e lek kuma nikwayoe rombe, mondo ibed jatend joga Israel." 
1Chronicles17:8 Asebet kodi kuonde duto midhiye, kendo asetiekoni wasiki duto. Abiro miyo nyingi bedo gi huma, ka humb joma dongo mag piny," 
1Chronicles17:9 kendo abiro miyo joga Israel pinygi giwegi. Anagurgi kuno, mi gidagie mak othaggi kendo. Jomahundu ok nochak ochandgi kaka ne chandogi chon," 
1Chronicles17:10 chakre ndalo mane aketoe jobura mondo orit joga Israel, to natiek wasiki duto. An Ruoth Nyasaye anamiyi duong’, kendo anaguedh dhoodi mondo osiki." 
1Chronicles17:11 Kisetho, miluwo kwereni, anaket achiel kuom yawuoti kari, kendo anagur lochne obed motegno." 
1Chronicles17:12 En ema nogerna ot, kendo anami lochne osik nyaka chieng’." 
1Chronicles17:13 Anabedne ka wuon mare, to enobed ka wuoda. Ok nagol herane kuome, kaka ne agolo kuom jal mane okuongoni bedo ruoth," 
1Chronicles17:14 to anami obed motegno, kendo anami lochne gurre kuom joga nyaka chieng’.’’" 
1Chronicles17:15 Nathan nonyiso Daudi weche duto mane ofwenyne," 
1Chronicles17:16 mi ruoth nodhi e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, mobet piny. Nowacho niya, “A Ruoth Nyasaye, an ng’a, koso dhooda en ang’o, momiyo imiya duong’ kama?" 
1Chronicles17:17 A Nyasaye, gima isetimona pod in ikwano ka gima tin, nimar bende isewacho ni dhooda nosik kuom ndalo mang’eny, kendo isenyisa kaka tienge mabiro nochal." 
1Chronicles17:18 A Ruoth Nyasaye, in ema ing’eya oko gi iye. Ang’o ma damed wachoni kuom duong’ ma isemiya?" 
1Chronicles17:19 Isemiya duong’ ma kama nikech ihera, kendo nikech mano ema idwaro." 
1Chronicles17:20 A Ruoth Nyasaye, pok wawinjo ni nitie Ruoth Nyasaye moro machal kodi. Onge Nyasaye machielo, to mak mana in." 
1Chronicles17:21 Ere oganda moro e piny, machalo gi jogi Israel? Bende nitie jopiny moro mane isedhi miwaro e tich wasumbni, miloko jogi? Isemiyo nyingi duong’ kuom timbe madongo kendo malich nikech iseriembo ogendini moko mondo owe thuolo ni jogi mane ireso kigolo e piny Misri." 
1Chronicles17:22 Niloko jo-Israel mondo obed jogi nyaka chieng, kendo in Ruoth Nyasaye, ema isedoko Nyasachgi." 
1Chronicles17:23 To koro Ruoth Nyasaye, mi singruok misetimona kaachiel gi dhooda mondo osik nyaka chieng’, kendo ichop gima isewacho." 
1Chronicles17:24 Singruoknino mondo ogurre, kendo nyingi oyud duong’ nyaka chieng’, ka ji wacho niya, ‘Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto, ma Nyasach Israel en Nyasachgi adier!’ Kamano dhooda nodongi e nyimi." 
1Chronicles17:25 In, Nyasacha, isenyisa ni ibiro dongo oda. Kuom mano asebedo gi chir mondo alem e nyingi." 
1Chronicles17:26 A Ruoth Nyasaye, in e Nyasaye kendo isesingorina maber kama." 
1Chronicles17:27 Emomiyo, Ruoth Nyasaye, yie iguedh oda mondo osik e nyimi nyaka chieng’, nimar gima iseguedho, nobed gi hawi ndalo duto.”" 
1Chronicles18:1 Bang’e Daudi noloyo jo-Filistia, mi gibedo moboch, kendo nomayogi Gath gi mier mokiewo kode." 
1Chronicles18:2 Noloyo jo-Moab bende, mi gibet e bwo lochne, kendo ne gigolone osuru." 
1Chronicles18:3 Bende Daudi noloyo Hadadezer ruodh Zoba-hamath, kane ruodhno dhi chungo rapar mar lochne e lweny but aora Yufrate." 
1Chronicles18:4 Daudi nomaye geche lweny alufu achiel, kendo nomako joidh farese alufu abiriyo, kod jolweny moko alufu piero ariyo. Nong’ado odond farese duto mag geche lweny, moweyo mana farese mia achiel." 
1Chronicles18:5 To kane jo-Aram moa Damaski obiro mondo okony Hadadezer ruodh Zoba, Daudi nonego ji alufu piero ariyo gariyo kuomgi." 
1Chronicles18:6 Eka noketo askeche ma jorit e piny jo-Aramgo, mi ne gibedo e bwo lochne, kendo ne gigolone osuru. Kuonde duto mane Daudi dhiye, Ruoth Nyasaye ne miyo olocho." 
1Chronicles18:7 Daudi noyako gilweny mag dhahabu mane jorit Hadadezer oting’o mokelo Jerusalem. 
1Chronicles18:8 Bende noyako munde mathoth ahinya e Tibhath kod Kun ma miech Hadadezer. Mundego ema ne Solomon olosogo gima ne iluongo ni Nam gi sirni kod gik moko duto mitiyogo e Hekalu. 
1Chronicles18:9 Kane Tou ruodh Hamath owinjo ni Daudi oseloyo jolweny mag Hadadezer," 
1Chronicles18:10 nooro Hadoram wuode ir ruoth Daudi mondo omose, kendo opake kuom loyo Hadadezer nimar Hadadezer ne jasik Tou. Hadoram nokelo ni Daudi gik moko mag dhahabu gi mag fedha kod mag mula." 
1Chronicles18:11 Magi bende ruoth Daudi nochiwo ni Ruoth Nyasaye, kaachiel gi fedha kod dhahabu ma noyako kuom ogendni mamoko duto mane oseloyo, kaka jo-Edom gi jo-Moab gi jo-Amon gi jo-Filistia kod jo-Amalek." 
1Chronicles18:12 Abishai wuod Zeruya nonego jo-Edom alufu apar gaboro e holo Kado. 
1Chronicles18:13 Noketo askeche ma jorit e piny Edom, mi jo-Edom duto nobet e bwo loch Daudi. Kuonde duto mane Daudi dhiye, Ruoth Nyasaye ne miyo olocho." 
1Chronicles18:14 Daudi nobedo ruodh Israel duto, morito piny gi kue, kong’ado bura kare ni joge duto." 
1Chronicles18:15 Joab wuod Zeruya ne jatend jolweny, to Jehoshafat wuod Ahilud ne jachan weche." 
1Chronicles18:16 Zadok wuod Ahitub kod Ahimelek wuod Abiathar ne jodolo, Savsha to ne jagoro." 
1Chronicles18:17 Benaya wuod Jehoyada ne jatend jo-Kereth kod jo-Peleth, kendo yawuot Daudi ne jodongo ma konye." 
1Chronicles19:1 Bang’e, Nahash ruodh jo-Amon notho, mi wuode nodoko ruoth kare." 
1Chronicles19:2 Daudi nowacho niya, “Abiro timo ni Hanun wuod Nahash maber, mana kaka wuon mare notimona maber.” Omiyo Daudi nooro joote mondo oduog chunye kuom tho wuon mare. To kane joote Daudi ochopo e piny jo-Amon, mi gidhi ir Hanun mondo giduog chunye," 
1Chronicles19:3 jodong Amon nowacho ni Hanun niya, “Bende iparo ni Daudi oseoro jogi mondo omi wuoru duong’ adier? Ooyo, gibiro mana ni mondo gicheng pinywa, eka oyud yo ma onyalo loyego.”" 
1Chronicles19:4 Kuom mano, Hanun nomako joote Daudi molielo tikgi, kendo ong’ado lepgi nyabathe, chakre nungogi kalor piny. Bang’e noriembogi." 
1Chronicles19:5 Kane Daudi owinjo gima otimore, nooro ji mondo oromnigi, nikech ne giyudo wichkuot maduong’. Nowacho ni mondo gibed Jeriko mondi, nyaka yie tikgi dongi, eka giduogi." 
1Chronicles19:6 Hanun gi jo-Amon noneno ni gisemiyo Daudi ojok kodgi, omiyo ne gioro fedha moromo kilo alufu piero adek mondo giholgo geche lweny gi joma diidhgi kuom jo-Aram-naharaim gi jo-Aram-Maaka kod jo-Zoba." 
1Chronicles19:7 Ne giwako ruodh Maaka gi jolwenje kendo ne giholo gechene mag lweny alufu piero adek gariyo, mi jogo nobiro mojot but Madeba. Jo-Amon bende nowuok e miechgi, kendo ne giyworo ni lweny." 
1Chronicles19:8 Kane Daudi owinjo wachno, nooro Joab kod joma rateke duto mondo oked kodgi." 
1Chronicles19:9 Jo-Amon nowuok, mi ne giriedo ni lweny e dhoranga dala, to ruodhi mane obiro konyogi nochanore e pap." 
1Chronicles19:10 Joab noneno ni lweny olwore, omiyo noyiero thuond jo-Israel moko, mochano kochomo jo-Aram." 
1Chronicles19:11 To jomoko duto modong’, noketi e lwet Abishai owadgi, ka gichomo jo-Amon." 
1Chronicles19:12 Nowachone niya, “Kineno ka jo-Aram tek madwaro loya, to nyaka ibi ikonya. To ka jo-Amon dwaro loyi, eka nabi akonyi." 
1Chronicles19:13 Bed gi chir, waked matek ni jowa, kendo ni miech Nyasachwa. To Ruoth Nyasaye mondo otim gima oneno ni ber.”" 
1Chronicles19:14 Kamano Joab gi joge norado gi jo-Aram, moriembo." 
1Chronicles19:15 Kane jo-Amon oneno ni jo-Aram ringo, gin bende ne giringo Abishai owadgi Joab, mi gidonjo e dalagi. Eka Joab nodok Jerusalem." 
1Chronicles19:16 To kane jo-Aram oneno ni jo-Israel oseloyogi, ne gioro joote mondo oluong jo-Aram mane odak loka aora Yufrate, mi ne gibiro, ka Shobak ma jatend oganda lweny mar Hadadezer otelonigi." 
1Chronicles19:17 Kane Daudi oyudo wach ni gibiro, nochoko jolwenj Israel duto kanyakla, mi giidho loka Jordan mondo gikanigi. Jo-Aram bende noriedo ni lweny, kochomo Daudi gi jogi, mi ne girado." 
1Chronicles19:18 To jo-Israel noloyogi, mi giringo, kendo Daudi gi joge nonego joidh farese alufu abiriyo, gi jolweny mamoko alufu piero ang’wen. Shobak bende notho." 
1Chronicles19:19 Kane jo-Hadadezer oneno ni jo-Isarel oloyogi, ne giywagre ni Daudi, mi gibedo e bwo lochne. Bang’ mano, jo-Aram nodagi konyo jo-Amon kendo." 
1Chronicles20:1 E ndalo chakruok oro, mane ruodhi thoro wuokie kadhi kedo, Joab nowuok gi jolwenje, mogoyo jo-Amon asasa. Ne gichopo Raba, kendo ne gilwore, to Daudi nodong’ Jerusalem. Joab noloyo Raba, moketho chuth." 
1Chronicles20:2 To Daudi nogolo osimbo ewi Milkom ma nyasach jo-Amon, mi nosidhe e wiye owuon. Pek mar dhahabu molosego noromo kilo piero adek, kendo kidi ma nengone tek ne ochom kuome. Bende Daudi noyako gik mathoth e dalano," 
1Chronicles20:3 kendo nodaro joma odakie, moketo e tich payo bao gi kunyo kite kod tong’o yien. Kamano e kaka Daudi notimo ni miech jo-Amon duto. Eka nodok Jerusalem gi joge duto." 
1Chronicles20:4 Bang’ mano, lweny nowuok Gezer e kind jo-Israel gi jo-Filistia, to jo-Israel noloyo jo-Filistia. E lwenyno, Sibekai ja-Husha nonego Saf, ma ja-Refaim." 
1Chronicles20:5 Lweny nowuok kendo e kindgi gi jo-Filistia, mi Elhanan wuod Jakir nonego Lami owadgi Goliath ma ja-Giti, ma bond tong’e ne chalo lodi." 
1Chronicles20:6 Lweny nochako owuok Gath, kama ne nitie ng’at ma gana marabora man gi lith lwedo auchiel gi lith tielo auchiel koni gi koni, duto piero ariyo gang’wen. Jalo bende ne ja-Refaim." 
1Chronicles20:7 To kane othiano ni jo-Israel, Jonathan wuod Shimea owadgi Daudi nonege." 
1Chronicles20:8 Jogo duto ne jo-Refaim, to Daudi gi joge nonegogi duto." 
1Chronicles21:1 Koro Satan ne dwaro hinyo jo-Israel, mi nosundo Daudi mondo okwan gi." 
1Chronicles21:2 Omiyo Daudi nochiko Joab gi jodong oganda ni mondo odhi okwan jo-Isarel, chakre Dan yo nyandwat, nyaka Beer-sheba yo milambo, kendo mondo onyise kar rombgi." 
1Chronicles21:3 To Joab nodwoke niya, “Kata da bed ni Ruoth Nyasaye omedo joge nyadi mia achiel, donge giduto digibed jotichne? Ang’o momiyo idwaro kwanogi? Gima kamano biro mana miyo jo-Israel doko joketho!”" 
1Chronicles21:4 Kata kamano, ruoth nochuno Joab momiyo owuotho e piny jo-Israel duto. Bang’e nodwogo Jerusalem" 
1Chronicles21:5 monyiso Daudi kar romb ji. E piny Israel ne nitie ji tara achiel gi alufu mia achiel (1,100,000) manyalo kedo, to e piny Juda ne nitie ji alufu mia ang’wen gi piero abiriyo (470,000), ma bende nyalo kedo." 
1Chronicles21:6 To Joab ne ok okwano jo-Lawi gi jo-Benjamin, nikech nosin gi chik ruoth." 
1Chronicles21:7 To gima nosetimore ne ok long’o ni Nyasaye, mi nokumo jo-Israel." 
1Chronicles21:8 Eka Daudi nowacho ni Nyasaye niya, “Aseketho ahinya kuom gima asetimo. To koro akwayi ni mondo iwena richona, nikech asetimo gima ofuwo.”" 
1Chronicles21:9 Mi Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Gad jakor wach mar Daudi niya," 
1Chronicles21:10 “Dhiyo, inyis Daudi ni Ruoth Nyasaye owacho kama: ‘Aketo gik moko adek e nyimi: yier achiel kuomgi monego atimni.’ ”" 
1Chronicles21:11 Omiyo Gad nodhi ir Daudi mowachone niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye owacho ni mondo iyier achiel kuom gik moko adekgi:" 
1Chronicles21:12 Higni adek mag kech kata dueche adek ma wasiki lawoue kendo negou, kata ndalo adek ma Ruoth Nyasaye owuon kelonu tho ka dera marach biro e piny kendo malaika mar Ruoth Nyasaye nego ji e piny Israel duto. Koro nyisa gima dadwok Jal ma noora.”" 
1Chronicles21:13 Daudi nodwoko Gad niya, “An gi masira maduong’, to ber mondo abed e lwet Ruoth Nyasaye, nimar ng’wonone duong’ gi lala. To kik abed e lwet dhano.”" 
1Chronicles21:14 Omiyo Ruoth Nyasaye nooro tho malit kuom jo-Israel, monego ji alufu piero abiriyo." 
1Chronicles21:15 Nyasaye nooro malaika mondo oketh Jerusalem, to kane oneno ka malaika kethe, noloko parone kuom masira mane odwaro kelo, omiyo nowacho ni malaika mane nego ji niya, “Oromo! Koro dwok lweti.” To noyudo ka malaikano ochung’ but kar dino mar Ornan ja-Jebus." 
1Chronicles21:16 Daudi nong’iyo malo moneno malaika mar Ruoth Nyasaye kochung’ e kind polo gi piny ka en gi ligangla e lwete ma nodwaro tiekogo Jerusalem. Daudi gi jodonge noriere piny auma ka girwakore gi pien gugru. 
1Chronicles21:17 Daudi nowacho ni Nyasaye niya, “An ema nagolo chik mondo okwan ji, kendo an e jakwath mosebedo ka timo marach. Rombe machandoregi to otimo ang’o? A Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasacha, akwayi ni an ema mondo ikuma kod dhoodwa, to igeng’ tho malitni kik mak jogi.”" 
1Chronicles21:18 Eka malaika mar Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Gad mondo ochik Daudi odhi kar dino mar Ornan ja-Jebus, ogerie kendo-mar-misango ni Ruoth Nyasaye." 
1Chronicles21:19 Omiyo Daudi notimo kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nomiyo Gad owachone, modhi kanyono." 
1Chronicles21:20 To Ornan noyudo diemo ngano. Kane oting’o wang’e, noneno malaika, to yawuote ang’wen mane ni kode noringo mopondo." 
1Chronicles21:21 Kane Daudi ochopo machiegni, Ornan nowichore, kendo ka noneno ruoth, nowuok oa kar dino. Nodhi mogoyo chonge piny e nyim Daudi mokulore nyaka e lowo." 
1Chronicles21:22 Daudi nowachone niya, “Yie ing’iew kar dinoni gi nengo makare, mondo agerie kendo-mar-misango ni Ruoth Nyasaye, mondo tho manego joga orum.”" 
1Chronicles21:23 Ornan nodwoko Daudi niya, “Ruodha, kawe, kendo itim kode gima idwaro. To bende ruedhi minyalo timogo misango, kod yien mag dino minyalo chwako, kaachiel gi ngano minyalo timogo misango mar mogo, eki amiyi duto!”" 
1Chronicles21:24 To ruoth Daudi nodwoko Ornan niya, “Ooyo, abiro mana ng’iewe gi nengo makare, ok nakaw giri ami Ruoth Nyasaye, kata timone misango gi gima ayudo nono.”" 
1Chronicles21:25 Kuom mano, Daudi nong’iewo kar dinono gi Ornan kuom dhahabu moromo kilo abiriyo." 
1Chronicles21:26 Eka nogero ni Ruoth Nyasaye kendo-mar-misango kanyono, motimoe misengni miwang’o pep gi mag sawo, kolamo Ruoth Nyasaye. Mi Ruoth Nyasaye nodwoke gi mach moa e polo, molwar e kendo-mar-misango." 
1Chronicles21:27 Eka Ruoth Nyasaye nochiko malaika mondo odwok ligangla e olalo. 
1Chronicles21:28 Kane Daudi oneno ni Ruoth Nyasaye oseneno kwayone mane okwayo kar dino mar Ornan ja-Jebus, nochako timo misango kanyo." 
1Chronicles21:29 Kata obedo ni e ndalogo Hema Maler mar Ruoth Nyasaye kod kendo-mar-misango mane Musa oloso e thim ne pod ni e hembko man Gibeon," 
1Chronicles21:30 Daudi ne ok odhi kanyo mondo openj Ruoth Nyasaye wach, nikech ligangla mar malaika mar Ruoth Nyasaye nobwoge." 
1Chronicles22:1 Omiyo koro Daudi nowacho niya, “Ma e kama od Ruoth Nyasaye nobedie, kaachiel gi kendo ma jo-Israel notimie misango.”"
