1Chronicles22:2 Daudi nogolo chik mondo ochok jodak duto manie piny Israel. Eka noketogi mondo gipa kite kendo giger Od Nyasaye. 
1Chronicles22:3 Bende noiko nyinyo modhuro mondo olosgo musmande gi teke miriwogo dhoudi, kaachiel gi mula mokalo apima" 
1Chronicles22:4 kod yiend sida mak kwan, nimar jo-Sidon gi jo-Turo nokelone yiend sida mang’eny." 
1Chronicles22:5 Daudi nowacho niya, “Solomon wuoda pod rawera mayot, to ot midwaro gero ni Ruoth Nyasaye onego obed maber miwuoro, kendo ma humbe olak e pinje duto. Omiyo nyaka aikne gik gedo.” Kuom mano Daudi noiko gik mogundho ka pok otho." 
1Chronicles22:6 Bang’e noluongo Solomon wuode, mochike ni mondo oger ot ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel," 
1Chronicles22:7 kowacho niya, “Solomon wuoda, nachano mondo ager ot mamiyogo Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasacha duong’." 
1Chronicles22:8 To Ruoth Nyasaye nokwera, kawachona niya, ‘Isechuero remo mang’eny, kendo isekedo lwenje madongo e nyima, omiyo ok nigerna ot." 
1Chronicles22:9 To ininywol wuowi ma lochne nobed gi kue. Anamiye kue, kamiyogi yueyo e ndalone." 
1Chronicles22:10 En ema nogerna ot. Enobed wuoda, kendo anabed wuon mare, mi nagur lochne e Israel nyaka chieng’.’" 
1Chronicles22:11 Koro wuoda, Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachi obed kodi, kendo oguedhi, mondo igerne Hekalu, kaka nosingore." 
1Chronicles22:12 Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachi mondo omiyi rieko duto mondo irit chikne koseketi ruodh Israel. 
1Chronicles22:13 Inibed gi hawi mana kimako chik kod buche Ruoth Nyasaye mane Musa omiyo jo-Israel. Bed gi chir, kendo gi jing’o! Kik chunyi nyosre, kata kik ibed jaluoro." 
1Chronicles22:14 “Kata obedo ni an gi thagruok mang’eny, to koro aseiko ni Od Ruoth Nyasaye dhahabu ma dirom kilo tara adek, kod fedha moromo kilo tara piero adek gabich, kaachiel gi mula kod nyinyo mokadho apima. Yien gi kite bende aseiko. In bende nyaka imed moko." 
1Chronicles22:15 To bende in gi jotich mang’eny, kaka jopa kite gi jogedo gi jopa bao, kod jotich moko mathoth" 
1Chronicles22:16 molony e tije mopogore opogore mag dhahabu gi fedha gi mula kod nyinyo. Omiyo koro chak tich, kendo Ruoth Nyasaye mondo obed kodi!”" 
1Chronicles22:17 Daudi nochiko jodong Israel ni mondo okony Solomon wuode, kowachonigi niya," 
1Chronicles22:18 “Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu ni kodu. Osemiyou kue kuonde duto, kendo osechiwo joma odak e pinyni e lweta, mi koro giyie loch Ruoth Nyasaye gi joge." 
1Chronicles22:19 Omiyo koro keturu chunyu gi parou kuom dwaro Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu. Chakuru gero Hekalu ni nying Ruoth Nyasaye mondo Sandug Muma mare, kod gik maler mitiyogo kilame, oyudie kar bet.”" 
1Chronicles23:1 Kane Daudi koro oseti, kendo hike oniang’, noyiero Solomon wuode mondo obed ruodh Israel." 
1Chronicles23:2 Nochoko jodong Israel duto kaachiel gi jodolo kod jo-Lawi. 
1Chronicles23:3 Jo-Lawi machwo ma johigni piero adek kata moloyo kanyo nondik nyinggi, mi kar rombgi noromo alufu piero adek gaboro." 
1Chronicles23:4 Alufu piero ariyo gang’wen kuomgi noket mondo oti e Od Ruoth Nyasaye, to alufu auchiel mondo obed jotelo kod jong’ad bura," 
1Chronicles23:5 to alufu ang’wen noket jorit dhorangeye, kendo alufu ang’wen mondo opak Ruoth Nyasaye gi thumbe mane Daudi oloso." 
1Chronicles23:6 Daudi nopogogi e migepe miluongo gi nying Gershon gi Kohath kod Merari, ma yawuot Lawi." 
1Chronicles23:7 Yawuot Gershon ne gin Laadan kod Shimei. 
1Chronicles23:8 Laadan nonywolo yawuowi adek, ma nyinggi Jehiel, ma nodoko jatelo, gi Zetham kod Joel." 
1Chronicles23:8 Laadan nonywolo yawuowi adek, ma nyinggi Jehiel, ma nodoko jatelo, gi Zetham kod Joel." 
1Chronicles23:9 Mago ne jotend dhout Laadan. 
1Chronicles23:10 Yawuot Shimei ne gin ang’wen, ma nyinggi Jahath gi Ziza gi Jeush kod Beria." 
1Chronicles23:11 Jahath ne en jatelo, to Ziza ne jalupne. Jeush gi Beria nokwan kaka dhoot achiel, nikech nyithindgi ne nok." 
1Chronicles23:12 Yawuot Kohath ne gin angwen, ma nyinggi Amram gi Izhar gi Hebron kod Uziel." 
1Chronicles23:13 Yawuot Amram ne gin Harun kod Musa. To Harun gi dhoode nowal ni mondo oti tich dolo ni Ruoth Nyasaye, ka gichiwone gik maler, kendo timone misango, kendo guedho ji e nyinge nyaka chieng’." 
1Chronicles23:14 To joka Musa, ng’at Nyasaye, ne okwan kuom jo-Lawi." 
1Chronicles23:15 Yawuot Musa ne Gershom kod Eliezer. 
1Chronicles23:16 Kuom joka Gershom, Shubael nobedo jatelo," 
1Chronicles23:17 to kuom joka Eleazer, Rehabia ema notelo. Eleazer ne onge yawuowi moko, to Rehabia wuode nonywolo yawuowi mang’eny." 
1Chronicles23:18 To kuom joka Izhar, Shelemoth ne jatelo." 
1Chronicles23:19 Yawuot Hebron ne gin Jeria mane obedo jatelo, gi Amaria jalupne, gi Jahaziel mar adek, kod Jekameam mar ang’wen." 
1Chronicles23:20 Yawuot Uziel ne gin Mika, ma nobedo jatelo, kod Ishia jalupne." 
1Chronicles23:21 Yawuot Merari ne gin Mali kod Mushi. To yawuot Mali ne gin Eleazar kod Kish. 
1Chronicles23:22 Eleazar notho, moweyo nyiri lilo, kendo owetegi ma yawuot Kish nokendogi." 
1Chronicles23:23 Yawuot Mushi ne gin adek, ma nyinggi Mali gi Eder kod Jeremoth." 
1Chronicles23:24 Mago ne gin jo-Lawi, ma nyinggi ochan kaluwore gi nying jodong dhoutgi. Ng’ato ka ng’ato kuomgi ma hike piero ariyo kata moloyo kanyo, nomi tich e Od" 
1Chronicles23:25 Ruoth Nyasaye, nikech Daudi nosewacho niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel osemiyo joge kue, kendo koro Jerusalem e kar dakne nyaka chieng’." 
1Chronicles23:26 Omiyo koro jo-Lawi ok onego oting’ Sanduk kata gik lemo moko mitiyogo kode.” 
1Chronicles23:27 Kuom wechene mogikgo, Daudi nochiko mondo ondik jo-Lawi ma hikgi piero ariyo kata moloyo kanyo." 
1Chronicles23:28 Tichgi ne en konyo joka Harun tiyo e Od Ruoth Nyasaye. Nomigi tich rito udi mag Od Nyasaye gi alworane, kendo lwoko gik lemo duto, kod tiyo tije moko duto mag Od Nyasaye." 
1Chronicles23:29 Ne giiko makati miketo e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye pile, kod mogo mayom mitimogo misango, gi makati ma ok ketie thowi kod chapat gi kek moko mikonyruokgo e lemo, kendo ne girito gik mipimogo gik moko." 
1Chronicles23:30 Ne onego giti e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye pile, okinyi godhiambo, ka gipake kendo gigoyone erokamano." 
1Chronicles23:31 Ne gikonyo bende joma ne timo misango miwang’o pep ni Ruoth Nyasaye e ndalo Sabato, kendo ka due opor, kendo en ndalo moketi, kaka nochan-gi." 
1Chronicles23:32 Jo-Lawi nomi bende tich rito Hemb Romo, kod Kama Ler, to joka Harun owetegi ema nomi tich dolo e Od Ruoth Nyasaye." 
1Chronicles24:1 Migepe mag joka Harun e magi: Yawuot Harun ne gin Nadab gi Abihu gi Eleazar kod Ithamar," 
1Chronicles24:2 to Nadab kod Abihu notho motelo ni wuon-gi, kendo ne ok giweyo yawuowi. Kuom mano joka Eleazar kod joka Ithamar kende ema nobedo jodolo." 
1Chronicles24:3 Daudi nochanogi e migepe mondo opognigi tich, ka Zadok jaka Eleazar gi Ahimelek jaka Ithamar konye." 
1Chronicles24:4 Jodong joka Eleazar ne ng’eny moloyo joka Ithamar, omiyo dhood Eleazar ne nigi jodongo apar gauchiel, to dhood Ithamar jodongo aboro." 
1Chronicles24:5 Nochan-gi gi ombulu, nimar ne nitie jodong Hekalu, ma tindeni jodong Nyasaye, kuom joka Eleazar, kendo kuom joka Ithamar bende." 
1Chronicles24:6 Ja-Lawi moro ma jagoro, ma nyinge Shamaya wuod Nethaneel nondiko nyinggi duto e nyim ruoth gi jodonge gi Zadok jadolo gi Ahimelek wuod Abiathar, kaachiel gi jotelo mag dhout jodolo kod jo-Lawi." 
1Chronicles24:7 Ombulu mokwongo noyiero Jehoyarib, mar ariyo noyiero Jedaya," 
1Chronicles24:8 to mar adek Harim, mar ang’wen Seorim," 
1Chronicles24:9 mar abich Malkia, mar auchiel Mijamin," 
1Chronicles24:10 mar abiriyo Hakoz, mar aboro Abija," 
1Chronicles24:11 mar ochiko Jeshua, mar apar Shekania," 
1Chronicles24:12 mar apar gachiel Eliashib, mar apar gariyo Jakim," 
1Chronicles24:13 mar apar gadek Hupa, mar apar gang’wen Jeshebeab," 
1Chronicles24:14 mar apar gabich Bilga, mar apar gauchiel Imer," 
1Chronicles24:15 mar apar gabiriyo Hazir, mar apar gaboro Hapizez," 
1Chronicles24:16 mar apar gochiko Pethahia, mar piero ariyo Jehezekel," 
1Chronicles24:17 mar piero ariyo gachiel Jakin, mar piero ariyo gariyo Amul," 
1Chronicles24:18 mar piero ariyo gadek Delaya, to mar piero ariyo gang’wen Maazia." 
1Chronicles24:19 Mano e kaka nochan-gi mondo giti e Od Ruoth Nyasaye, kaluwore gi chik mane Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel omiyo Harun kwargi." 
1Chronicles24:20 To jo-Lawi moko e magi: Shubael, jaka Amram, gi Jedaya jaka Shubael," 
1Chronicles24:21 gi Ishia jatend joka Rehabia," 
1Chronicles24:22 gi Shelemoth jaka Izhar, gi Jahath jaka Shelemoth." 
1Chronicles24:23 Kuom dhood Hebron, Hebron ne jatelo, Amaria jalupne, Jahaziel mar adek, kendo Jekameam mar ang’wen." 
1Chronicles24:24 Jomoko ne gin Mika jaka Uziel, gi Shamir jaka Mika," 
1Chronicles24:25 gi Ishia owadgi Mika, gi Zekaria jaka Ishia," 
1Chronicles24:26 gi Mali gi Mushi kod Jaazia, joka Merari," 
1Chronicles24:27 gi Beno gi Shoham gi Zakur kod Ibri, yawuot Jaazia," 
1Chronicles24:28 gi Eleazar jaka Mali mane onge gi yawuowi," 
1Chronicles24:29 gi yawuot Kish ma joka Kish, gi Jeremeel," 
1Chronicles24:30 kod Mali gi Eder kod Jerimoth ma joka Mushi. 
1Chronicles24:31 Mago e dhout jo-Lawi. Dhoudigo duto madongo kod matindo kanyakla, nogoyo ombulu kaachiel gi owetegi ma joka Harun e nyim ruoth Daudi gi Zadok gi Ahimelek kod dhout jodolo gi jo-Lawi." 
1Chronicles25:1 Daudi gi jodonge nowalo yawuot Asaf gi yawuot Heman gi yawuot Jeduthun ni tich lemo, mondo gikor wach ka gigoyo thumbe gi nyigwerni kod ongeng’o. Joma nomi tijno e magi:" 
1Chronicles25:2 Yawuot Asaf ne gin Zakur, gi Josef gi Nethania kod Asarela. Jatendgi ne Asaf mane jakor wach ni ruoth." 
1Chronicles25:3 Yawuot Jeduthun ne gin Gedalia gi Izri gi Isaya gi Shimei gi Hashabia kod Matithia. Jatend ji auchielgo ne Jeduthun wuon-gi, mane koro wach ka gigoyo thum, kendo ka gigoyo ni Ruoth Nyasaye erokamano ka gipake." 
1Chronicles25:4 Yawuot Heman janen mar ruoth, ne gin Bukia gi Natania gi Uziel gi Shubael gi Jerimoth gi Hanania gi Hanani gi Eliatha gi Gidalti gi Romamti-ezer gi Joshbekasha gi Malothi gi Hothir kod Mahazioth." 
1Chronicles25:5 Jogo duto ne yawuot Heman mane Nyasaye omiye mondo opakego, kaka nosesingore. Nyasaye nomiyo Heman yawuowi apar gang’wen kod nyiri adek," 
1Chronicles25:6 to giduto ne gikonyo wuon-gi wer e Od Ruoth Nyasaye e kinde mag lemo. To Daudi owuon ema ne chiko Asaf gi Jeduthun kod Heman e tijegi. 
1Chronicles25:7 Jogo duto, kaachiel gi owetegi ma nolony kuom wer ni Ruoth Nyasaye, ne gin mia ariyo gi piero aboro," 
1Chronicles25:8 ne gipogo tijgi gi ombulu, kendo ne giwer ka gikikore, jomadongo gi jomatindo, molony kod mapuonjore kaachiel." 
1Chronicles25:9 Joma noyier gi ombulu ne magi: Mokwongo ne Josef," 
1Chronicles25:10 mar ariyo Gedalia," 
1Chronicles25:11 mar adek Zakur, mar ang’wen Izri," 
1Chronicles25:12 mar abich Nethani," 
1Chronicles25:13 mar auchiel Bukia," 
1Chronicles25:14 mar abiriyo Asarela," 
1Chronicles25:15 mar aboro Isaya," 
1Chronicles25:16 mar ochiko Matania," 
1Chronicles25:17 mar apar Shimei," 
1Chronicles25:18 mar apar gachiel Azareel," 
1Chronicles25:19 mar apar gariyo Hashabia," 
1Chronicles25:20 mar apar gadek Shubael," 
1Chronicles25:21 mar apar gang’wen Matithia," 
1Chronicles25:22 mar apar gabich Jeremoth," 
1Chronicles25:23 mar apar gauchiel Hanania," 
1Chronicles25:24 mar apar gabiriyo Joshbekasha," 
1Chronicles25:25 mar apar gaboro Hanani," 
1Chronicles25:26 mar apar gochiko Malothi," 
1Chronicles25:27 mar piero ariyo Eliatha," 
1Chronicles25:28 mar piero ariyo gachiel Hothir," 
1Chronicles25:29 mar piero ariyo gariyo Gidalti," 
1Chronicles25:30 mar piero ariyo gadek Mahazioth," 
1Chronicles25:31 to mar piero ariyo gangwen Romamti-ezer. Jogo duto ombulu ema noyiero. Ng’ato ka ng’ato kuomgi ne nigi ji apar gariyo ma yawuote kata owetene. 
1Chronicles26:1 Magi e migepe mag jorit rangeye: Joka Kora ne gin Meshelemia wuod Kore ma wuod Ebiasaf. 
1Chronicles26:2 Yawuot Meshelemia ne gin Zakaria wuode makayo, gi Jediael mar ariyo, gi Zebedia mar ang’wen," 
1Chronicles26:3 gi Elam mar abich, gi Jehohanan mar auchiel, kod Elioenai mar abiriyo." 
1Chronicles26:4 Nyasaye noguedho Obed-edom momiye yawuowi ma nyinggi Shemaya wuode makayo, gi Jehozabad mar ariyo, gi Joa mar adek gi Sakar mar ang’wen, gi Nathaneel mar abich," 
1Chronicles26:5 gi Amiel mar auchiel, gi Isakar mar abiriyo, kod Peulthai mar aboro." 
1Chronicles26:6 Shemaya wuod Obed-edom nonywolo yawuowi ma nobedo jotelo kuom joodgi, nikech ne gin gi rieko." 
1Chronicles26:7 Yawuot Shemaya gogo ne gin, Othni, gi Refael gi Obed kod Elzabad, to ominene ma bende ne nigi rieko ne gin Elihu gi Shemakia." 
1Chronicles26:8 Mago duto ne gin joka Obed-Edom. Gin kaachiel gi owetegi kod yawuotgi, ne gin joma riek kendo mowinjore kod tich Hekalu. Giduto ne gin ji piero auchiel gariyo." 
1Chronicles26:9 Yawuot Meshelemia kod owetene ne gin ji apar gaboro ma bende ne nigi rieko. 
1Chronicles26:10 Yawuot Hosa ja-Merari ne gin Shimri mane Hosa oketo jatelo, kata ne ok en kayo kamano," 
1Chronicles26:11 gi Hilkia mar ariyo, gi Tebalia mar adek, kod Zekaria mar ang’wen. Kar romb yawuot Hosa kaachiel gi owetene ne apar gadek." 
1Chronicles26:12 Jodong dhoudi ema notelo ni migepe mag jorit rangeye. Tijgi ne en tiyo e Od Ruoth Nyasaye kaachiel gi owetegi. 
1Chronicles26:13 Dhoudi madongo gi matindo nogoyo ombulu e kindgi giwegi mondo gipog tich rito rangeye. 
1Chronicles26:14 Ombulu mar rangach man yo wuok chieng’ nolwar kuom Shemelia. Eka ne gigoyo ombulu ni wuode Zekaria, ma jabura mariek, moyudo rangach man yo nyandwat." 
1Chronicles26:15 Obed-edom noyudo rangach man yo milambo, to yawuote noyudo tich rito od keno." 
1Chronicles26:16 Hosa noyudo rangach man yo podho chieng’ kod ranga Shekeleth man e yo maidho. 
1Chronicles26:17 Arita duto noket machalre. Ndalo duto, jo-Lawi auchiel ne rito rangach man yo wuok chieng’ to ang’wen ne rito man yo nyandwat, kendo ang’wen man yo milambo, to ariyo ariyo ne rito od keno ka od keno." 
1Chronicles26:18 Ji auchiel ne rito laru mochiel gi sirni man yo podho chieng’. Ang’wen kuomgi ne rito yo michopogo e laruno, to ariyo ne rito laru hie." 
1Chronicles26:19 Mago ne e migepe mag joka Kora gi joka Merari mane rito rangeye. 
1Chronicles26:20 Jo-Lawi moko ne rito od keno mag Od Nyasaye kod kuonde mikanoe chiwo momi Ruoth Nyasaye. 
1Chronicles26:21 Kuom nyikwa Laadan ma jaka Gershon 
1Chronicles26:22 Jehiel kod owetene ma Zetham gi Joel ema ne rito kuonde keno mag Od Ruoth Nyasaye. Ne gin jotend dhout Laadan jaka Gershon. 
1Chronicles26:22 Jehiel kod owetene ma Zetham gi Joel ema ne rito kuonde keno mag Od Ruoth Nyasaye. Ne gin jotend dhout Laadan jaka Gershon. 
1Chronicles26:23 Kuom dhout Amram gi Izhar gi Hebron kod Uziel 
1Chronicles26:24 Shubael jaka Gershom ma wuod Musa ne jatend jorit kuonde keno. 
1Chronicles26:25 To Shelemoth wuod Zikri, ma wuod Joram, ma wuod Isaya, ma wuod Rehabia, ma wuod Eliezer, ne jatend joka Eliezer owadgi Gershom," 
1Chronicles26:26 Shelemothno kaachiel gi owetene ema ne rito udi mikanoe chiwo mane Daudi gi jodong dhoudi, gi jotend ogend lweny madongo gi matindo, kod jotend jolweny moko osechiwo ni Ruoth Nyasaye." 
1Chronicles26:27 Ne giwalo gik moko kuom gik mane ope e lweny mondo otigo e Od Ruoth Nyasaye. 
1Chronicles26:28 Bende gik mane Samuel janen, gi Saulo wuod Kish, gi Abner wuod Ner, kod Joab wuod Zeruya ochiwo ni Ruoth Nyasaye ne nie lwet Shelemoth kod owetene nikech gin ema ne girito gik moko duto mochiw ni Ruoth Nyasaye." 
1Chronicles26:29 Kuom joka Izhar, Kenania kod yawuote ne gin jogoro gi jong’ad bura e piny Israel." 
1Chronicles26:30 Kuom joka Hebron, Hashabia kod owetene ema nobedo jotend jo-Israel modak yo podho chieng’ mar aora Jordan, ka ging’iyo tich Ruoth Nyasaye kod tich ruoth. Ne gin ji mariek, moromo alufu achiel gi mia abiriyo. Jeria ne en jatend joka Hebron-go." 
1Chronicles26:31 E higa mar piero ang’wen mar loch Daudi, nonon anywola joka Hebron, kendo noyud ni kara joma riek ma nodak Jezer-gilead ne gin joka Hebron." 
1Chronicles26:32 Ruoth Daudi noketo jodong dhoudi mariek alufu ariyo gi mia abiriyo ma joodgi Jeria mondo orit jo-Reuben gi jo-Gad kod jo-Manase konchiel e yore duto mag tich Nyasaye kod tich rito piny. 
1Chronicles27:1 Koro magi e nying jo-Israel mane rito migepe apar gariyo mane tiyo tich Ruoth duto, ka giwilore due ka due e higa ngima. Ne gin jodong dhoudi gi jotend ogend lweny madongo gi matindo, kaachiel gi jondiko maggi. Migawo ka migawo ne nigi ji alufu piero ariyo gang’wen." 
1Chronicles27:2 Jotelo mokwongo ne Jeshobeam wuod Zabdiel ma notiyo e due mokwongo. 
1Chronicles27:3 Ne en nyakwar Perez, kendo ne en jatend jodong lweny duto e due mokwongo." 
1Chronicles27:4 To Eleazar wuod Doidai ja-Ahohi ema notelo e due mar ariyo. 
1Chronicles27:5 Jatelo mar adek ne en Benaya jatend ogend lweny, ma wuod Jehoyada jadolo maduong’." 
1Chronicles27:6 Benaya nogo ne en achiel kuom thuondi piero adek kande, kendo ne en jatendgi. To Amizabad wuode ema norito migape." 
1Chronicles27:7 Jatelo mar due mar ang’wen ne en Asahel omin Joab. Bang’ thone, Zebadia wuode nokawo kare." 
1Chronicles27:8 Jatelo mar due mar abich ne en Shamhuth jaka Zera. 
1Chronicles27:9 Jatelo mar due mar auchiel ne en Ira wuod Ikesh ja-Tekoa. 
1Chronicles27:10 Jatelo mar due mar abiriyo ne en Helez ja-Pelon ma ja-Efraim. 
1Chronicles27:11 Jatelo mar due mar aboro ne en Sibekai jaka Zera, ma ja-Husha." 
1Chronicles27:12 Jatelo mar due mar ochiko ne en Abiezer ja-Anathoth manie piny Benjamin. 
1Chronicles27:13 Jatelo mar due mar apar ne en Maharai jaka Zera, ma ja-Netofa." 
1Chronicles27:14 Jatelo mar due mar apar gachiel ne en Benaya ja-Pirathon manie piny Efraim. 
1Chronicles27:15 To jatelo mar due mar apar gariyo ne en Heldai jaka Othniel ma ja-Netofa. Jotelogo duto ne tiyo due achiel achiel, kendo ng’ato ka ng’ato ne nigi migawo moromo ji alufu piero ariyo gang’wen." 
1Chronicles27:16 Jotend dhout Israel nene e magi: Kuom jo-Reuben, Eliezer wuod Zikri ne jatelo, to kuom jo-Simeon, jatelo ne Shefatia wuod Maaka." 
1Chronicles27:17 Kuom jo-Lawi ne ne Hashabia wuod Kemuel. Kuom joka Harun ne en Zadok. 
1Chronicles27:18 Kuom jo-Juda ne en Elihu ma wat Daudi. Kuom jo-Isakar ne en Omri wuod Mikael. 
1Chronicles27:19 Kuom jo-Zebulun ne en Ishmaya wuod Obadia. Kuom jo-Naftali ne en Jerimoth wuod Azriel. 
1Chronicles27:20 Kuom jo-Efraim ne en Hoshea wuod Azazia. Kuom jo-Manase konchiel ne en Joel wuod Pedaya," 
1Chronicles27:20 Kuom jo-Efraim ne en Hoshea wuod Azazia. Kuom jo-Manase konchiel ne en Joel wuod Pedaya," 
1Chronicles27:21 to kuom jo-Manase komachielo ma nodak Gilead, jatelo ne en Ido wuod Zekaria. Kuom jo-Benjamin ne en Jaasiel wuod Abner." 
1Chronicles27:22 To kuom jo-Dan ne en Azareel wuod Jeroham. Mago e kar romb jotend dhout Israel. 
1Chronicles27:23 Daudi ne ok okwano joma hikgi pok ochopo piero ariyo, nikech Ruoth Nyasaye nosesingore ni nomi jo-Israel bedo mang’eny ka sulue mae polo." 
1Chronicles27:24 Joab wuod Zeruya nochako kweno, to ne ok otieko. Kwenono nokelo mirimb Nyasaye kuom jo-Israel, omiyo ne ok ondik kar rombgi e Kitap Weche mag Ndalo mag loch ruoth Daudi." 
1Chronicles27:25 Azmoth wuod Adiel ne jarit kuonde keno mag ruoth. Jonathan wuod Uzia to ne rito kuonde keno manie mier madongo gi matindo, kendo e miech lweny mochiel gi ohinga." 
1Chronicles27:26 Ezri wuod Kelub to ne rito jotich puodho. 
1Chronicles27:27 Shimei ja-Rama to ne rito jotich puothe mag mzabibu, to Zabdi ja-Shefem ne rito olemb mzabibu milosogo divai." 
1Chronicles27:28 Baal-hanan ja-Geder ne rito yiend zeituni gi ng’owo mae pewe. Joash to ne rito udi mikanoe mo. 
1Chronicles27:29 Shitrai ja-Sharon ne jarit kweth dhok mane kwayo Sharon, to Shafat wuod Adlai ne rito mago mane kwayo e holni." 
1Chronicles27:30 Obil ja Ishmael ne jakwath ngamia, to Jedaya ja-Meronoth ne jarit kenje." 
1Chronicles27:31 Jaziz ja-Hagar ne jarit jamni matindo. 
1Chronicles27:32 Jehiel ja-Hakmon, gi Jonathan owadgi wuon Daudi ma jabura mariek kendo mosomo, ema nopuonjo yawuot Daudi." 
1Chronicles27:33 Ahithofel ne jabuch ruoth, to Hushai ja-Arki ne osiep ruoth." 
1Chronicles27:34 Bang’ tho Ahithofel, Jehoyada wuod Benaya kod Abiathar ne jokawo kare. To Joab ne jaduong’ jolweny." 
1Chronicles28:1 Daudi nochoko jotend Israel duto Jerusalem. Ne gin jodong dhoudi, gi jotend joma ne tiyo ni ruoth, gi jotend ogend lweny madongo gi matindo, gi joma ne rito mwandu kod jamb ruoth gi mag yawuote, kaachiel gi jong’ad bura gi thuondi kod joge duto mane nigi teko." 
1Chronicles28:2 Eka Daudi nochung’ mowacho niya, “Winjuru owetena gi jothurwa. Ne achano mondo ager ot ma Sandug Muma mar Ruoth Nyasaye nyalo betie, mondo obed raten tiend Nyasachwa. Omiyo ne aiko gik moko duto ma dagerego." 
1Chronicles28:3 To Nyasaye nowachona niya, ‘Ok inigerna ot, nikech in ijalweny, kendo isechwero remo.’" 
1Chronicles28:4 Kata kamano Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel noyiera kuom joodwa duto mondo abed ruodh Israel nyaka chieng’, nikech dhood Juda ema nomiyo loch, to kuom dhood Juda, od wuora ema noyiero, to kuom yawuot wuora an ema noyiera, mi oketa ruodh Israel." 
1Chronicles28:5 Ruoth Nyasaye osemiya yawuowi mang’eny, to kuom yawuowigo duto, Solomon ema oseyiero mondo obed ruodh Israel, korito jo-Ruoth Nyasaye." 
1Chronicles28:6 Ruoth Nyasaye nowachona niya, ‘Solomon wuodi ema aseyiero mondo ogerna ot gi lache, nikech aseyiere mondo obed wuoda to an abed wuon mare." 
1Chronicles28:7 Korito chikna kaka iritogi sani, to anagur lochne nyaka chieng’.’" 
1Chronicles28:8 To koro akwayou uduto e nyim Nyasaye, kendo e nyim jo-Ruoth Nyasaye duto ni mondo unon matut chike mag Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu, mondo piny maberni osik maru, kendo uweye kodong’ ni nyithindu nyaka chieng’." 
1Chronicles28:9 “To in Solomon wuoda, par Nyasach wuoru, kendo ichiwri mondo itine gi chunyi duto, nimar Ruoth Nyasaye ng’iyo chuny ji duto, kendo ofwenyo paro mag dhano. Kidware, to iniyude, to kiweye, to enojwang’i nyaka chieng’." 
1Chronicles28:10 Emomiyo par malong’o ni Ruoth Nyasaye oseyieri ni mondo iger ot moyangne. Bed gi jing’o kendo igere!” 
1Chronicles28:11 Daudi nonyiso Solomon wuode kit gedo mar agoch Hekalu kod utene, gi ut keno gi ut gorofa gi udi maiye, kod raum mar Sandug Muma, miluongo ni kar-ng’wono." 
1Chronicles28:12 Nonyise bende paro ma en go kuom gero laru mag Od Ruoth Nyasaye, gi udi mane olwore, gi ut keno mag Od Nyasaye kod udi ma nokanie mich maler mochiw ni Ruoth Nyasaye." 
1Chronicles28:13 To bende nonyise kaka odwaro mondo ochan jodolo gi jo-Lawi e migepegi, kendo opognigi tije duto mag Od Ruoth Nyasaye kendo kaka onego los gik mitiyogo e lemo." 
1Chronicles28:14 Bende nonyise pek mar dhahabu gi fedha monego losgo gik lemo duto," 
1Chronicles28:15 kaka: sis teyni mag dhahabu gi techegi, gi sis teyni mag fedha gi techegi ma moro ka moro owinjore gi tije," 
1Chronicles28:16 gi mesni mag dhahabu miketoe makati e nyim Nyasaye pile, gi mesni moko mag fedha," 
1Chronicles28:17 kod rachwopi gi nyilerni kod kikombe mag dhahabu maler gi tewni mag dhahabu gi mag fedha," 
1Chronicles28:18 gi kendo miwang’oe ubani, kod gach lweny mar dhahabu maler, ma tiende ni kerubi moyaro bwombegi mondo oumgo Sandug Muma mar Ruoth Nyasaye." 
1Chronicles28:19 Daudi nowacho niya, “Magi duto Ruoth Nyasaye owuon ema onyiso. Tichna ne en mana dwaro rieko kaka digere.”" 
1Chronicles28:20 Bang’e Daudi nowacho ni Solomon wuode niya, “Bed gichir, kendo gi jing’o! Kik chunyi nyosre, kendo kik iluor, to chak mana tich, nikech Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasacha nobed kodi, kendo ok nojwang’i kata weyi ka pok itieko tije duto mag Ode." 
1Chronicles28:21 Migepe mag jodolo kod jo-Lawi oikore ni tich Od Nyasaye. Jotich duto molony bende oikore konyi e tije duto, kendo jotelo, kaachiel gi ji duto, nobed e lueti.”" 
1Chronicles29:1 Bang’ mago, Daudi nowacho ni oganda jo-Israel mane osechokore niya, “Solomon wuoda ma Nyasaye oseyiero, pod en rawera to tijni e tich maduong’, nikech odni ok en mar dhano, to en mar Ruoth Nyasaye." 
1Chronicles29:2 Asetemo kar nyalona, maiko gik moko ni tich Od Nyasacha, kaka dhahabu gi mula gi nyinyo gi yien kod kite mabeyo ma nengogi tek mag loso ot, kendo mag gedo." 
1Chronicles29:3 To bende agolo kuom mwanduna awuon 
1Chronicles29:4 dhahabu moa Ofir, moromo kilo alufu mia achiel, gi fedha maler moromo kilo mia ariyo, mondo obawgo kor udi, nikech ahero Od Nyasacha." 
1Chronicles29:5 Mago notigo tich dhahabu gi tich fedha kod tich moro amora ma jotich molony dwaro. To koro ere ng’ama oyie golo chiwo ni Ruoth Nyasaye gi chuny achiel kawuono?” 
1Chronicles29:6 Mi jodong dhoudi, gi jotelo mane rito dhout Israel gi jotend ogend lweny madongo gi matindo kod jotelo mag tich ruoth," 
1Chronicles29:7 noyie gi chuny achiel mogolo dhahabu moromo kilo alufu mia ariyo, gi pesa moromo darik alufu apar, gi fedha kilo alufu mia ang’wen, gi mula kilo alufu mia auchiel, gi nyinyo moromo kilo tara ang’wen mondo ogergo Od Nyasaye." 
1Chronicles29:8 Bende joma ne ni kod kite ma nengogi tek nochiwogi ni Jahiel ma ja-Gershon mondo okan-gi e kar keno mar Od Ruoth Nyasaye. 
1Chronicles29:9 Ji duto ne mor ahinya nikech ne gineno ka jogo golo chiwo ni Ruoth Nyasaye gi chuny achiel. 
1Chronicles29:10 Daudi bende ne mor, kendo nopako Ruoth Nyasaye e nyim ogandano, kowacho niya, “A Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel, nyingi mondo obed gi duong’ ndalo duto nyaka chieng’." 
1Chronicles29:11 A Ruoth Nyasaye, duong’ gi pak gi teko gi loch gin magi, nimar in e wuon gik moko duto manie polo gi piny, kendo iduong’ moloyogi duto." 
1Chronicles29:12 Mwandu gi duong’ a kuomi, kendo in ema irito ji duto. Teko gi nyalo bende ipogo ni ji." 
1Chronicles29:13 Koro wagoyoni erokamano Nyasachwa, kendo wapako nyingi maler." 
1Chronicles29:14 “An to an ng’a, kata joga gin ng’a gini, ma dimi wagol chiwo gi mor kama? In ema ichiwo gik moko duto, kendo wadwokoni mana gik misemiyowa." 
1Chronicles29:15 Wan mana welo kendo jodak e nyimi, kaka kwerewa bende nobet. Ndalowa e piny ka, chalo gi tipo makadho, kendo waonge kar dak mosiko." 
1Chronicles29:16 Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachwa, mwandugi duto mwasechoko mondo wagernigo ot oa kuomi, kendo gin meki." 
1Chronicles29:17 A Nyasaye, ang’eyo ni inono chuny dhano, kendo adiera ema ihero. Asemiyi chiwogi duto gi mor kendo gi chuny makare, to koro amedo bedo gi ilo kaneno jogigi, bende ka goloni chiwo gi mor." 
1Chronicles29:18 A Nyasach Ibrahim gi Isaka kod Israel kwerewa, yie imi jogi obed gi chuny mang’won kama nyaka chieng’, kendo imi gipari." 
1Chronicles29:19 Kony Solomon wuoda mondo omak chikeni gi bucheni mondo ochopgi duto, kendo oger Hekalu ma koro aseikone gik moko.”" 
1Chronicles29:20 Eka Daudi nowacho ni ji duto niya, “Denduru Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu!” Mi oganda duto nopako Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach kweregi, ka gigoyo chonggi piny, mi gikulore nyaka e lowo e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo e nyim Ruoth." 
1Chronicles29:21 Kinyne ne gitimo ni Ruoth Nyasaye misengni gi ruedhi alufu achiel, gi imbe alufu achiel, gi nyirombe alufu achiel, kaachiel gi misengni miolo piny, kod misengni moko mang’eny moromo jo-Israel duto." 
1Chronicles29:22 Chieng’no ne gichiemo kendo gimetho e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye gi mor maduong’. Bang’e ne gichako giketo Solomon wuod Daudi e kom ruoth, kendo ne giwire gi mo mondo obed jatendgi ma Ruoth Nyasaye oyiero. To Zadok bende ne owir mondo obed jadolo." 
1Chronicles29:23 Kuom mano, Solomon nobedo ruodh jo-Ruoth Nyasaye kar Daudi wuon mare, mi nodhi maber, kendo jo-Israel duto nomiye luor." 
1Chronicles29:24 Jotelo kod jolweny duto, kaachiel gi yawuot Daudi, nosingore ni giniyie loch Solomon." 
1Chronicles29:25 Ruoth Nyasaye nomiyo Solomon duong’ ma onge ruodh Israel moro mane osebedogo. 
1Chronicles29:26 Daudi wuod Jesse nobedo ruodh Israel duto 
1Chronicles29:27 kuom higni piero ang’wen. E Hebron nobedoe ruoth kuom higni abiriyo, to e Jerusalem higni piero adek gadek." 
1Chronicles29:28 Notho ka hike oniang’, kendo ka en gi luor kod mwandu mogundho. Solomon wuode nodoko ruoth kare." 
1Chronicles29:29 Gik moko duto mane otimore e ndalo loch Daudi ondiki e Kitap Samuel janen, gi Kitap Nathan janabi, kod Kitap Gad ma bende janen." 
1Chronicles29:30 Weche duto mag loch Daudi, gi tekone, kod weche Israel, kaachiel gi mag pinje duto ondiki e kitepego." 
2Chronicles1:1 Solomon wuod Daudi nogurore e tich ruoth e pinye. Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasache ne ni kode, kendo nomiye duong’ ahinya." 
2Chronicles1:2 Solomon noluongo jotend ogend lweny madongo gi matindo, kod jong’ad bura, gi jotelo duto mag Israel ma jodong gwenge." 
2Chronicles1:3 Eka Solomon gi ji duto ma nochokore kode ne jodhi e hembko mane ni Gibeon, nimar Hemb Romo mane Nyasaye romoe gi joge, mane Musa jatich Ruoth Nyasaye oloso e thim, ne ni kanyo," 
2Chronicles1:4 Daudi nosegolo Sanduk mar Nyasaye Kiriath-jearim motero Jerusalem, nimar nosegurone hema kuno." 
2Chronicles1:5 To kendo-mar-misango mar mula mane Bezalel wuod Uri ma wuod Hur oloso ne ni Gibeon e nyim Hema mar Ruoth Nyasaye. Solomon kod oganda duto nolamo Ruoth Nyasaye kanyo. 
2Chronicles1:6 Solomon noidho mochung’ e bath kendo-mar-misango mar mula mane nie nyim Hemb Romo, motimoe misengni miwang’o pep alufu achiel e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye." 
2Chronicles1:7 Gotieno nogo Nyasaye nofwenyore ni Solomon mowachone niya, “Kwa gima idwaro mondo amiyi.”" 
2Chronicles1:8 Solomon nodwoko Nyasaye niya, “Ninyiso ni ihero Daudi wuora gi hera mosiko, kuom ket ma iketago ruoth kare." 
2Chronicles1:9 A Ruoth Nyasaye, iseketa ruodh oganda ma ji thothie ka kuoyo, koro yie ichop singruok mane isingorigo ni Daudi wuora." 
2Chronicles1:10 Yie imiya rieko mondo ang’e kaka datel ni ogandani, nimar ere ng’ama dinyal rito jogi mang’enygi?”" 
2Chronicles1:11 Eka Nyasaye nodwoko Solomon niya, “Nikech chunyi chalo kamano kendo ok ikwayo mwandu kata fedha, kata pak, kata tho wasiki, kata kwayo ni mondo idag aming’a, to isekwayo mana rieko mar ng’eyo kaka ditel ni oganda maseketi ruodhgi," 
2Chronicles1:12 ero amiyi rieko kod ng’eyo. To bende abiro medi fedha, gi mwandu, kod pak moloyo ruodhi duto mosekuongoni kata ma nowuog bang’i.”" 
2Chronicles1:13 Eka Solomon noa e nyim Hemb Romo, kolor a hembko mane ni Gibeon, modhi Jerusalem, kuma noritoe piny Israel." 
2Chronicles1:14 Solomon nochako dwaro geche mag lweny gi farese, nyaka nobedo gi geche alufu achiel gi mia ang’wen, gi farese alufu apar gariyo. Moko kuomgi noketo e mier mag geche to moko ne en go Jerusalem." 
2Chronicles1:15 Nomiyo fedha gi dhahabu obedo mang’eny Jerusalem ka kuoyo, kendo nomiyo yiend sida odoko mang’eny ka ng’owo mae pap." 
2Chronicles1:16 Solomon ne omo farese Misri gi Koah. Jo-ohande ne omogi kuno gi nengo moketi: 
2Chronicles1:17 gari achiel ne ging’iewo Misri gi kilo abiriyo mag fedha, to faras achiel gi kilo ariyo. Johalago ne terogi ne ruodhi mag jo-Hiti gi mag jo-Aram." 
2Chronicles2:1 Solomon ne dwaro gero Hekalu ni nying Ruoth Nyasaye kod ode mar ruoth. 
2Chronicles2:2 Nondiko joting’ alufu piero abiriyo gi ji alufu aboro mondo opa kite e gode, kod nyipeche alufu adek gi mia auchiel." 
2Chronicles2:3 Solomon nooro ni Hiram ruodh Turo wach niya, “Kaka nitimo ni Daudi wuora, kikowone yiend sida mondo ogergo ode, yie itimna kamano an bende," 
2Chronicles2:4 nimar adwaro gero ot moyang ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasacha, kama jodolo nowang’ie ubani mang’we ng’ar e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo nochiwie makati miketo e nyime pile, kendo notimie misengni miwang’o pep okinyi godhiambo, kod miwang’o e ndalo mag Sabato, kendo ka due por, kendo e ndalo sewni ma Ruoth Nyasaye oseketo ni Israel nyaka chieng’." 
2Chronicles2:5 Ot madwaro gero nobed maduong’, nimar Nyasachwa duong’ moloyo nyiseche duto." 
2Chronicles2:6 To en ng’a ma dinyal gerone ot, ka kata polo maduong’ manade ok nyal rome dakie? An to an ng’a, ma dagerne ot modakie, mak mana kar wang’o ubani e nyime?" 
2Chronicles2:7 Emomiyo yie iorna ng’ato molony kuom loso gik dhahabu, gi mag fedha, gi mag mula, kod mag nyinyo, kendo mong’eyo loso law maralik, gi makwar, kod mambulu, kendo molony kuom goro gik moko. Enoti gi jotichna molony man Juda gi man Jerusalem mane Daudi wuora oketo." 
2Chronicles2:8 Bende orna yiend sida gi saipras gi algum mag Lebanon, nimar ang’eyo ni jotichni olony kuom tong’o yiend Lebanon. Jotichna noti kaachiel gi jotichni," 
2Chronicles2:9 mondo giikna yien mogundho, nimar ot madwaro gero nobed maduong’ kendo miwuoro." 
2Chronicles2:10 Anami jotichni ma jotong’o gunde alufu piero ang’wen mag ngano, gi gunde alufu piero ariyo mag shairi, gi degii alufu ang’wen mag divai, kod depe alufu ang’wen mag mo.”" 
2Chronicles2:11 Hiram ruodh Turo nodwoko Solomon gi barua mondikoe niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye ohero joge, emomiyo oseketi ruodhgi.”" 
2Chronicles2:12 Eka nodhi nyime kowacho niya, “Apako Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel, ma jachwech polo gi piny, nimar osemiyo ruoth Daudi wuowi man gi rieko kod ng’eyo ma biro gero Hekalu ni Ruoth Nyasaye kod ot ma ruoth dakie." 
2Chronicles2:13 Koro aseoro ng’at molony kendo mariek ma nyinge Huram-abi," 
2Chronicles2:14 wuod ja-Turo ma min mare nyar Dan. En ng’at molony kuom tich dhahabu gi fedha gi mula gi nyinyo gi kidi kod yien, kendo ong’eyo loso law maralik kata mambulu kata makwar kod law katana maber, kendo olony kuom tich goro, kod loso kido moro amora momiye. Onyalo tiyo kod jotichni molony, kendo gi jotich Daudi wuoru." 
2Chronicles2:15 Emomiyo, ruodha, yie iornwa ngano gi shairi gi mo gi divai misewacho." 
2Chronicles2:16 Wanatong’ yien Lebanon moromo kaka idwaro, mi watuegi kanyakla kendo wakwang’gi e nam nyaka Jopa, eka iniomgi kuno kiterogi Jerusalem.”" 
2Chronicles2:17 Solomon nokwano jodak duto mane nie piny Israel, kaka Daudi wuon mare nokwanogi. Ne giromo alufu mia achiel gi piero abich gadek kod mia auchiel (153,600.)" 
2Chronicles2:18 Noketo ji alufu piero abiriyo kuomgi mondo obed joting’, to ji alufu piero aboro opa kite e gode kod nyipeche alufu adek gi mia auchiel ma kwayogi." 
2Chronicles3:1 Solomon nochako gero Od Ruoth Nyasaye Jerusalem e laru mar Ornan ja-Jebus, mane nie got Moria. Daudi wuon mare ema noyiero laruno nikech Ruoth Nyassye nofwenyorene kanyo." 
2Chronicles3:2 Nochako gedo e due mar ariyo e higa mar ang’wen mar lochne. 
2Chronicles3:3 Hekalu mane Solomon dwaro gero ni Ruoth Nyasaye ne romo kama: Borne ne mita piero adek, to lachne ne mita apar." 
2Chronicles3:4 Bor mar agola mane nie nyim Hekalu ne romo mita apar, maromre gi lach mar Hekalu, kendo borne modhi malo ne mita apar. Nobawo iye gi dhahabu maler." 
2Chronicles3:5 Hekalu to nochwado iye gi saipras, kendo obawo gi dhahabu maler, mogoroe othidhe gi thiwni." 
2Chronicles3:6 Nolicho Hekalu gi kite mamil ma nengogi tek. 
2Chronicles3:7 Dhahabu mane ogolo Parvein ema nobawogo Hekalu duto, koda ka sirni, gi pewe dhoudi, gi kor ot, kod dhoudi, kendo nogoro kido maket gi malaika miluongo ni kerubi e kor ot." 
2Chronicles3:8 Kama Ler Moloyo, to nogero kama: Borne ne romo mita apar, maromre gi lach mar Hekalu duto, to lachne bende mita apar. Nobawe gi dhahabu ma pekne oromo mita piero ariyo." 
2Chronicles3:9 Pek dhahabu mar musmal mane otiyogo noromo nus kilo. Nobawo udi mamalo bende gi dhahabu. 
2Chronicles3:10 Kama Ler Moloyo nolosoe kerubi ariyo kod bao, mobao gi dhahabu." 
2Chronicles3:11 Bor mar buombe kerubigo ne romo mita apar, nikech bor buom ka buom ne mita ariyo gi nus." 
2Chronicles3:12 Buom achiel mar kerubi ka kerubi nogik e kor ot. To buombegi modong’ noromo e dier ot. 
2Chronicles3:13 Bwombegi noyarore mi borgi duto ne romo mita apar. Kerubigo nochung’ komanyo Kama Ler. 
2Chronicles3:14 Noloso pasia gi law mambulu, gi maralik, gi makwar, kod law katana maber, motwang’ie kido mag Kerubi." 
2Chronicles3:15 Noloso sirni ariyo ma borgi ne romo mita ochiko, moketo e nyim Hekalu. Noumo wi siro ka siro gi gima chal gi agulu maduong’ ma borne romo mita ariyo gi nus." 
2Chronicles3:16 Noloso thiwni machal gi tik ng’ut motueyo kuom agulinigo. Bang’e noloso gik mong’inore ong’inore mag mula mia achiel, mi oliero e thiwnigo." 
2Chronicles3:17 Nochungo sirnigo e nyim Hekalu, koketo achiel korachwich, to machielo koracham. Mano mane oketo korachwich nochako ni Jakin, to ma koracham nochako ni Boaz." 
2Chronicles4:1 Huram noloso kendo-mar-misango mar mula, ma borne romo mita apar, kendo lachne bende mita apar, to borne modhi malo mita abich." 
2Chronicles4:2 Eka nolenyo mula, moloso gima duong’ mating’o pi machal gi karaya, mochake ni Nam. Lach dhoge ne romo mita abich, kendo tutne mita ariyo gi nus to alwora mar dhoge mita apar gabich." 
2Chronicles4:3 E bwo dhoge ne nitie gik ma maradadi monginore ong’inore molwore. Noriedgi e laini ariyo ma borgi romo mita apar gabich. Namno nochue kaachiel gi gik ma maradadigo. 
2Chronicles4:4 Norenje e ng’e ruedhi apar gariyo mag mula. Ruedhi adek nomanyo nyandwat, to adek yo podho chieng’, adek yo milambo kendo adek yo wuok chieng’, to iwgi nodok kaiye." 
2Chronicles4:5 Mith mula molosego ne romre gi lach lith lwedo ang’wen. Dhoge nolos ka dho kikombe, machal gi thiep oyungu. Nonyalo ting’o pi ma dirom depe alufu auchiel." 
2Chronicles4:6 Bende noloso kareche apar mag luoko, moketo abich korachwich, to abich mamoko koracham. Karechego ema nilwokoe gik misango miwang’o, to Nam ema ne jodolo lwokoree." 
2Chronicles4:7 Huram noloso sis teche apar mag dhahabu kaka nochike, moketogi e Hekalu, abich korachwich to abich koracham." 
2Chronicles4:8 Noloso mesni apar bende, moketo e Hekalu, abich korachwich to abich koracham, kendo noloso tewni mia achiel mag dhahabu." 
2Chronicles4:9 Noloso laru mar jodolo gi laru maduong’ kod dhoute, mobawo dhoudigo gi mula," 
2Chronicles4:10 to Nam cha noketo e bath Hekalu korachwich momanyo kind yo wuok chieng’ gi yo milambo. 
2Chronicles4:11 Achien Huram noloso agulini gi rajope, kod tewni. Kamano notieko gik mane oloso ni ruoth Solomon e Od Ruoth Nyasaye." 
2Chronicles4:12 Ne gin: Sirni ariyo, gi agulini madongo ariyo mane nie wi sirni, gi oserni ariyo mane oumo agulini ariyogo," 
2Chronicles4:13 kod gik mong’inore ong’inore mia ang’wen mane oried e laini ariyo e kor oserni. 
2Chronicles4:14 Bende noloso rachungi, gi kareche mane orenj kuom rachungigo," 
2Chronicles4:15 Kaachiel gi Nam achiel cha, gi ruedhi apar gariyo mane orenje e, gi agulini gi rajope kod rachwopi." 
2Chronicles4:16 Huram-abi noloso ni ruoth Solomon gik moko duto mag Od Ruoth Nyasaye gi mula mang’angni. 
2Chronicles4:17 Nolosogi ni ruoth e paw aora Jordan e lop chwech manie kind Sukoth gi Zareda. 
2Chronicles4:18 Solomon noloso gik mathoth ahinya, ma pek mula molosgigo ne ok ong’ere." 
2Chronicles4:19 Solomon noloso gik moko duto mane nie Od Nyasaye ne gin: Kendo-mar-misango mar dhahabu, gi mesni mag makati miketo e nyim Nyasaye pile," 
2Chronicles4:20 gi rachung teyni, kod techegi monego liel e nyim Kama Ler Moloyo kaka nochiki," 
2Chronicles4:21 kod maupe gi teyni gi ramekni," 
2Chronicles4:22 gi rangis teyni, gi degi, gi tewni mag ubani, kod tegni mag mach. Mago duto nolos gi dhahabu maler. Pata mag dhoudi ma iye midonjogo Kama Ler Moloyo, kod mag dhoudi mag Kama Ler mag Hekalu nolos gi dhahabu bende." 
2Chronicles5:1 Kamano Solomon notieko tich duto mag Ruoth Nyasaye, eka noomo gik moko duto mane Daudi wuon mare osechiwo ni Nyasaye, mi noketogi kuonde keno mag Od Nyasaye. Ne gin fedha gi dhahabu kod gik lemo moko." 
2Chronicles5:2 Solomon nochoko jodong Israel duto Jerusalem mondo oom Sandug Muma mar Ruoth Nyasaye e dala Daudi miluongo ni Sayun. 
2Chronicles5:3 Eka jo-Israel nochokore gi ruoth chieng’ sawo ma nitimo e due mar abiriyo higa ka higa. 
2Chronicles5:4 Kane jodong Israel duto osebiro, jodolo gi jo-Lawi noting’o Sandug Muma," 
2Chronicles5:5 gi Hemb Romo, kod gik moko duto mane nie hema, mitiyogo tich Nyasaye." 
2Chronicles5:6 Ruoth Solomon gi jo-Israel duto mane ochokore kode ne ni e nyim Sanduk ka gitimo misengni gi rombe kod ruedhi mang’eny mokadho akwana. 
2Chronicles5:7 Jodolo norwako Sandug Muma mar Ruoth Nyasaye kama olosne e bwo buombe kerubi e ot ma iye mar Hekalu, miluongo ni Kama Ler Moloyo," 
2Chronicles5:8 nimar kerubi noyaro buombegi ewi kar Sanduk, ka giume kaachiel gi ludhe miting’ego." 
2Chronicles5:9 Ludhegi ne boyo ahinya ma wigi ne nenore oko e Kama Ler mane nie nyim ot maiye, to ne ok ginen oko mar Hekalu. Pod gin kanyo nyaka chil kawuono." 
2Chronicles5:10 Ne onge gimoro ei Sanduk, mak mana kite ariyo mopa mane Musa oketoe ka ne en Horeb, kuma Ruoth Nyasaye notimoe singruok gi jo-Israel ka ne gia Misri." 
2Chronicles5:11 Kane jodolo owuok oa Kama Ler, bor polo nopong’o Od Ruoth Nyasaye duto. Nonwang’o ka jodolo duto osepwodhore mondo oti tijgi, ma ok gidewo ndalo mochan-gie." 
2Chronicles5:12 Jo-Lawi duto ma jower nochung’ yo wuok chieng’ mar kendo-mar-misango. Ne gin Asaf gi Heman gi Jeduthun kod yawuotgi gi jowetegi. Ne girwako lewni mag law katana maber, ka gigoyo ongeng’o gi thumbe mopogore opogore. Jodolo mia achiel gi piero ariyo bende ne goyo tung’." 
2Chronicles5:13 Joma ne goyo tung’go kaachiel gi jower, ne wer ka pako Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo goyone erokamano. Ne gigoyo tung’ gi thumbe mopogore opogore ka gipako Ruoth Nyasaye gi wer niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye ber! Herane mosiko ochwere.”" 
2Chronicles5:14 Jodolo ne ok nyal tiyo tijgi nikech bor polono, nimar duong’ maler mar Ruoth Nyasaye nopong’o Hekalu." 
2Chronicles6:1 Solomon nowacho niya, “A Ruoth Nyasaye niwacho ni nidag e mudho mandiwa." 
2Chronicles6:2 To koro asegeroni ot man gi duong’ mondo idagie nyaka chieng’.” 
2Chronicles6:3 Eka ruoth nowichore, kendo kane jo-Israel duto ma ne ochokore e nyime ochung’, noguedhogi." 
2Chronicles6:4 Nowacho niya, “Apako Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel, mosechopo singruok mane otimo ni Daudi wuora, kowachone niya," 
2Chronicles6:5 ‘Chakre ndalo mane aresoe joga kagologi e piny Misri, pok ayiero dala moro kuom dhoudi duto mag Israel mondo ogernae ot ma nyinga betie, mak mana Jerusalem," 
2Chronicles6:6 kendo ne ok ayiero ng’at moro obed jatend joga Israel, mak mana Daudi.’" 
2Chronicles6:7 Ung’eyo ni Daudi wuora ne dwaro gero ot ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel," 
2Chronicles6:8 to Ruoth Nyasaye nowachone niya, ‘Nitimo maber kuom paro gerona ot." 
2Chronicles6:9 Kata kamano, in ok niger odno to mana wuodi mibiro nywolo ema nogernago.’" 
2Chronicles6:10 Koro Ruoth Nyasaye osechopo singruok mane otimo, nikech osebet kar Daudi wuora, kendo an e ruodh Israel, mana kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nosingore, mi asegero ot ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel," 
2Chronicles6:11 kendo aseketoe Sandug Muma moting’o singruok mane Ruoth Nyasaye otimo gi jo-Isarel.” 
2Chronicles6:12 Eka Solomon nochung’ e dho kendo-mar-misango mar Ruoth Nyasaye e nyim jo-Israel duto, kendo noyaro bedene." 
2Chronicles6:13 Noseloso raidhi mar mula, ma borne gi lachne mita ariyo gi nus maromre, to borne modhi malo mita achiel gi nus, moketo e dier laru, noidhe, mogoyoe chonge piny e nyim jo-Israel duto mane ochokore. Norieyo bedene malo," 
2Chronicles6:14 kowacho niya, “A Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel, onge Nyasaye moro e polo kata e piny machal kodi. Irito singruok mitimo gi jotichni mawuotho e yoreni, gi chunygi duto, kendo iherogi gi hera mosiko." 
2Chronicles6:15 Isechopo singruok ma nitimo ni Daudi wuora ma jatichni. Adier, gima niwacho ema koro isetimo." 
2Chronicles6:16 Emomiyo, in Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel, yie ichop singruok mane itimo ni Daudi wuora ma jatichni kiwachone niya, ‘Anywolani nobed ruodhi mag Israel nyaka chieng’, to mana ka yawuoti oritore kendo owuotho e chikena kaka isewuotho.’" 
2Chronicles6:17 To koro Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel, wachni ma iwacho ni Daudi jatichni mondo otimre." 
2Chronicles6:18 “In Nyasaye, bende nidag kod ji e piny? Ka kata polo maduong’ manadi ok nyal romi, to koro ot ma asegeroni direm marom nadi!" 
2Chronicles6:19 Kata kamano, Ruoth Nyasacha, yie mondo iwinj lemona gi kwayona, kendo iwinj ywakna makeloni." 
2Chronicles6:20 Odiechieng’ gotieno mondo irang ot misewacho ni nyingi nobedie, kendo iwinj lemo ma abiro bedo ka akwayogo kaeri." 
2Chronicles6:21 Iwinj kwayo ma an kod jogi Israel biro kwayi. Yie iwinjwa e polo kama idakie, to kiwinjo, mondo iwenwa richowa." 
2Chronicles6:22 “Ka ng’ato otimo ni wadgi marach, kendo okete mondo ocham muma, mi okuong’ore e nyim kendo-mar-misango manie odni," 
2Chronicles6:23 to yie mondo iwinj e polo, kendo ing’ad buch jotichni, kikumo ng’at moketho, kendo kidwoko richone e wiye owuon. To jal ma kare mondo iket kare, mimiye pok moromo gi timne maber." 
2Chronicles6:24 “Ka wasigu oloyo jogi Israel nikech gisekethoni, to eka gilokore, kendo giyie duong’ni ka gilami kendo gisayi e odni," 
2Chronicles6:25 to yie mondo iwinjgi e polo, kiweyonigi richogi, kendo idwokgi e pinygi mane imiyo kweregi." 
2Chronicles6:26 “Ka polo ong’awo, ma koth onge, nikech jogi Israel osekethoni, to bang’e gilemo kaeri kendo giyie duong’ni ka gilokore giweyo richogi nikech ikumogi," 
2Chronicles6:27 to yie mondo iwinjgie polo, kiweyonigi richogi. Nyisgi yo maber ma onego giwuothie, kendo imi koth chue e pinyi misemiyo jogi mondo obed mwandugi." 
2Chronicles6:28 “Ka kech, kata dera mar tho marach, nie piny, kata ka cham orochore ewi dongo kata ka bonyo kata kungu nitie, kata ka wasikgi oluoro dala moro, kata ka tho kata tuo manadi nitie," 
2Chronicles6:29 mi ng’ato olami ka kwayi gimoro, korieyo bedene kochomo Hekaluni, (nimar ng’ato ka ng’ato ong’eyo gima thage kendo chando chunye)" 
2Chronicles6:30 to yie mondo iwinj e polo kama idakie, iwene richone, kendo ichop lemone, kimiye pok moromo gi timbene nikech in kendi ema ing’eyo chuny ji duto," 
2Chronicles6:31 kuom mano mondo giluori, kendo giluw chikeni ndalo duto ma gidakgo e piny mane imiyo kwerewani." 
2Chronicles6:32 “Ka ng’ama wendo ma ok achiel kuom jogi Israel obiro mondo olem e Hekaluni koa e piny mabor nikech nyingi maduong’ gi lweti motegno, kod badi morie," 
2Chronicles6:33 to yie mondo iwinj e polo kama idakie, kendo itim duto ma ng’at ma wendono okwayi. Kamano ji duto manie piny mondo ong’e nyingi kendo olwori mana kaka jogi Israel, kendo mondo ging’e ni Hekalu ma asegeronini en mari adier." 
2Chronicles6:34 “Ka jogi dhi e lweny kedo gi wasikgi kamoro amora miorogie, mi gilami ka gichomo dala miseyiero kod Hekalu masegeronini," 
2Chronicles6:35 to yie mondo iwinj e polo lemo ma gikwayigo, kendo ikonygi." 
2Chronicles6:36 “Ka gitimo gima isekwero, (nimar onge ng’at ma ok kethi), kendo ikecho kodgi, michiwogi e lwet wasikgi mondo otergi e tuech e piny mabor kata machiegni," 
2Chronicles6:37 to eka bang’e giloko parogi e piny motuegieno, mi chunygi olokore, kendo gikwayi niya, ‘Waseketho kwatimo wich teko kod richo,’" 
2Chronicles6:38 mi giduogo iri gi parogi duto kendo gi chunygi duto e piny ma notuegieno, kendo gilemo ka gichomo pinygi ma nimiyo kweregi, kod dala ma niyiero, gi Hekalu masegeronini," 
2Chronicles6:39 to yie mondo iwinj e polo kama idakie lemo ma gikwayigo, kendo ikonygi kiweyo ni jogi richo ma gisetimo e nyimi." 
2Chronicles6:40 “A Nyasacha, yie mondo iwinj lemo mikwayigo ka." 
2Chronicles6:41 A Ruoth Nyasaye, mi jodoloni obed joma owar adier, kendo jogi molwori mondo obed mamor nikech iguedhogi." 
2Chronicles6:42 A Ruoth Nyasaye, kik ilok ng’eyi ni ruoth mowir miseyiero. Par herani mosiko mane iherogo Daudi jatichni.”" 
2Chronicles7:1 Kane Solomon osetieko lemo, mach noa e polo motieko misango miwang’o kod misengni mamoko, kendo duong’ maler mar Ruoth Nyasaye nopong’o Hekalu." 
2Chronicles7:2 Jodongo ne ok nyal donjo e Hekalu nikech duong’ mar Ruoth Nyasaye nopong’e. 
2Chronicles7:3 Kane jo-Isarel duto oneno mach kalor piny kod duong’ mar Ruoth Nyasaye ka nie Hekalu, ne gikulore piny e laru. Ne gilamo Nyasaye kendo gigoyone erokamano ka giwacho niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye ber, herane mosiko ochwere.”" 
2Chronicles7:4 Eka ruoth kod ji duto notimo misengni ni Ruoth Nyasaye. 
2Chronicles7:5 Ruoth Solomon notimo misango gi ruedhi alufu piero ariyo gariyo, kod rombe alufu mia achiel gi piero ariyo. Mano e kaka ruoth kod ji duto noyango Hekalu ni Ruoth Nyasaye." 
2Chronicles7:6 Jodolo nochung’ kargi, kendo jo-Lawi nopako Ruoth Nyasaye gi wende mane Daudi ochuogo ka giwer niya, “Herane mosiko ochwere.” Ne gigoyo thumbe mane Daudi oloso mondo odendgo Ruoth Nyasaye. Jodolo bende nogoyo tung’ ka ochung’ momanyore gi jo-Lawi." 
2Chronicles7:7 Solomon noyango ni Ruoth Nyasaye dier laru mane nie nyim Hekalu, nimar kanyo ema notimoe misengni miwang’o kendo owang’oe boche mag misengni mag sawo, nikech kendo-mar-misango mar mula ma noseloso ne tin, mane ok nyal timie misengnigo duto." 
2Chronicles7:8 E ndalogo Solomon kaachiel gi jo-Israel duto notimo sawo kuom ndalo abiriyo. Ne en chokruok maduong’ ahinya moa piny Israel duto, chakre yo nyandwat, kama idonjogo Hamath nyaka aora man yo milambo e kind pinygi gi piny Misri." 
2Chronicles7:9 Chieng’ mar aboro ne gitimo sawo maduong’, nimar pwodho kendo-mar-misango notieko ndalo abiriyo, kendo sawo bende ndalo abiriyo." 
2Chronicles7:10 Due piero ariyo gadek due mar abiriyo Solomon nomiyo ji thuolo modok miechgi ka mor ahinya nikech gik mabeyo duto mane Ruoth Nyasaye osetimo ni Daudi gi Solomon, kendo ni joge Israel." 
2Chronicles7:11 Solomon notieko Od Ruoth Nyasaye, gi ode owuon. Bende gik moko duto mane ochano mondo otim e Od Ruoth Nyasaye gi ode owuon, notieko maber." 
2Chronicles7:12 Ruoth Nyasaye nofwenyore gotieno, mowachone niya, “Asewinjo lemoni, kendo aseyiero Hekaluni mondo obed kama itimonae misango." 
2Chronicles7:13 Ka aloro polo ni kik koth chue, kata kakelo bonyo mondo ocham piny, kata kaoro dera mar tho marach," 
2Chronicles7:14 to ka joga miluongo gi nyinga obolore ka lama kendo dwara, ka giweyo yoregi maricho, eka nawinj e polo, mi nawenigi richogi kendo nares pinygi." 
2Chronicles7:15 Ka gilemo e Hekaluni, anaranggi gi wang’a kendo nawinjgi gi ita." 
2Chronicles7:16 Aseyiero Hekaluni, kendo asewale obed maler, mondo nyinga obedie, kendo arange gi chunya duto nyaka chieng’." 
2Chronicles7:17 To in, kiwuotho e nyima kitimo duto masechiki, kendo kimako chikena gi buchena kaka Daudi wuoru notimo," 
2Chronicles7:18 eka anagur loch mar nyikwayi, mana kaka nasingora ni Daudi wuoru, kawachone niya, ‘Ndalo duto nyikwayi nobed ruodhi mag Israel.’" 
2Chronicles7:19 To kulokoru, mi ok umako wechena gi chikena ma naketo e nyimu, mudhi tiyo ni nyiseche ma moko kendo lamogi," 
2Chronicles7:20 napudh jo-Israel ka buya, mi nagolgi e piny ma namiyogi, kendo Hekalu ma asegwedho mondo nyinga oyudgo duong’ni, naketh mondo olal e wang’a, mi naloke ka ngero, kendo gima ji duto jaro." 
2Chronicles7:21 Ji duto makadho but Hekalu, ma koro duong’ kamani, nowuor ka gipenjo niya, ‘Ang’o momiyo Ruoth Nyasaye osetimo gima kama ni pinyni kendo ni Hekaluni?’" 
2Chronicles7:22 Eka nodwokgi niya, ‘Ne giweyo Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach kweregi ma noresogi ka gologi e piny Misri, mi ne gilamo nyiseche ma moko kendo gitiyonigi. Emomiyo Nyasaye osekelo masichegi duto kuomgi.’ ”" 
2Chronicles8:1 Kane higni piero ariyo mane Solomon ogeroe Od Ruoth Nyasaye gi ode owuon oserumo," 
2Chronicles8:2 noloso mier mane Hiram omiye, moketoe jo-Isarel." 
2Chronicles8:3 Koro Solomon nodhi Hamath-Zoba mokawo dalano. 
2Chronicles8:4 Noloso Tadmor mane nie thim, kaachiel gi mier mag keno duto ma nosegero Hamath." 
2Chronicles8:5 Bende nogero Beth-horon Mamalo gi Beth-horon Mamwalo mochielo gi ohinga moketonigi rang’eye miloro motegno gi lodi. 
2Chronicles8:6 Nogero Baalath gi mier duto mag keno, kaachiel gi mier duto ma nokanoe gechene mag lweny gi miech joge ma joidh farese. Kendo Solomon nogero udi duto Jerusalem kod Lebanon kendo e pinye duto kaka nodwaro." 
2Chronicles8:7 Ji duto ma nodong’ e piny Israel kuom jo-Hiti gi jo-Amor gi jo-Perizi gi jo-Hivi kod jo-Jebus, ma ok jo-Israel," 
2Chronicles8:8 Solomon noloko wasumbni michuno mondo oti gi thwon, kaka obet nyaka chil kawuono. Ne gin joma notamo jo-Israel tieko." 
2Chronicles8:9 Solomon ne ok oloko jo-Israel wasumbni, to noketogi jolweny kod jotend jolweny gi jotend joidh faresene." 
2Chronicles8:10 Ne en gi jotelo madongo mia ariyo gi piero abich mane rito ji. 
2Chronicles8:11 Solomon nogolo nyar Farao e dala Daudi mokete e ot ma nogerone, nimar nowacho niya, “Chiega ok nyal dak e od Daudi ruodh Israel, nikech kuonde duto ma Sanduk osebedoe oyang ni Ruoth Nyasaye.”" 
2Chronicles8:12 Solomon notimo ni Ruoth Nyasaye misengini miwang’o pep, kod misengini mag sawo e kendo-mar-misango mar Ruoth Nyasaye ma noseketo e nyim agola." 
2Chronicles8:13 Odiechieng’ kodiechieng’ notimo misengni koluwo chik Musa. Notimogi chieng’ ma due opor, kendo e ndalo sewni adek mag higa, ma gin Sap Makati ma ok ketie Thowi, gi Sap Jumbe, kod Sap Kiche." 
2Chronicles8:14 Solomon norito chik mane Daudi wuon mare ma ng’at Nyasaye oketo. Nochan jodolo e tich dolo mopogore opogore, kendo nomiyo jo-Lawi tich wer kod konyo jodolo kaka ne dwarore odiechieng’ kodiechieng’, kendo nopogo jorit rangeye tich rito rangach ka rangach." 
2Chronicles8:15 Kuom weche duto mane ruoth omiyo jodolo gi jo-Lawi ne onge moro amora mane giweyo kata mana wach keno. 
2Chronicles8:16 Kamano Solomon notieko tich duto chakre chieng’ keto mise mar Od Ruoth Nyasaye nyaka rumone. 
2Chronicles8:17 Solomon nodhi Ezion-Geber gi Eloth manie dhonam e piny Edom. 
2Chronicles8:18 Mi Hiram nooro jotichne motero ni Solomon yiedhi kaachiel gi jokwang’ molony kuom tich nam. Ne gidhi Ofir kaachiel gi jotich Solomon, kuma ne giomoe dhahabu moromo kilo alufu apar gauchiel, mi ne gikelo ni ruoth Solomon." 
2Chronicles9:1 Kane ruoth madhako mar Sheba owinjo humb Solomon, nobiro Jerusalem mondo oteme gi penj matek. Nobiro gi oganda maduong’ ahinya kod ngamia moting’o gik mang’ue ng’ar gi dhahabu mogundho kod kite mabeyo ma nengogi tek. Kane obiro ir Solomon nopenjo weche duto mane nie chunye." 
2Chronicles9:2 To Solomon nodwoko wechene duto, ma onge moro mane otame dwoko." 
2Chronicles9:3 Kane ruoth madhako mar Sheba oseneno riekone, gi ot ma nosegero," 
2Chronicles9:4 gi chiemb ode, gi kuonde dak jodonge, gi kit tich mag jotichne, gi rwakruokgi, gi jolos divai mage gi rwakruokgi, kod misengni ma notimo e Od Ruoth Nyasaye, dhoge nomoko." 
2Chronicles9:5 Nowacho ni ruoth niya, “Kara humb timbeni gi riekoni ma nawinjo e pinya en adier!" 
2Chronicles9:6 Kane pok abiro mi anenogi gi wang’a, ne ok anyal yie ni gin adier. To koro aneno ni nonyisa mana dir wach mar riekoni maduong’. Giloyo huma ma nawinjo." 
2Chronicles9:7 Mondi kod jotichni johawi, mawinjo riekoni ndalo duto." 
2Chronicles9:8 Apako Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachi moheri kendo oketi e kom duong’ne, mondo ibedne ruodh Israel. Ruoth Nyasaye ohero jo-Israel kendo odwaro mondo gigurre motegno nyaka chieng’, emomiyo oseketi ruodhgi, mondo ing’ad bura kare.”" 
2Chronicles9:9 Eka nomiyo ruoth Solomon dhahabu moromo kilo alufu abiriyo, gi gik mang’ue ng’ar mogundho kod kite mabeyo ma nengogi tek. Solomon ne ok ochako oyudo gik mang’ue ng’ar machal gi mago mane ruoth madhako mar Sheba omiye." 
2Chronicles9:10 To bende jotich Hiram gi jotich Solomon mane odhi Ofir omo dhahabu ne kelo yiend algum gi kite mabeyo ma nengogi tek. 
2Chronicles9:11 Yien-go ruoth nolosogo raidhi mag Od Ruoth Nyasaye gi mag ode owuon kod thumbe nyatiti gi nyigwerni ma ne jower wergo e Hekalu. Yien machal kamago ne pok one e piny Juda nyaka nene. 
2Chronicles9:12 Ruoth Solomon nomiyo ruoth madhako mar Sheba gimoro amora ma nokwayo kaachiel gi gik moromo mich ma nokelo. Eka ruodh Sheba nodok e pinye kaachiel gi jotichne. 
2Chronicles9:13 Pek mar dhahabu mane ikelo ni Solomon higa ka higa ne romo kilo alufu piero ariyo gadek," 
2Chronicles9:14 ka ok okwan mago mag osuch johala gi johono; kendo ruodhi duto mag piny Arabia kod jorit piny Solomon ne kelone fedha gi dhahabu. 
2Chronicles9:15 Ruoth Solomon nochuogo kuodi mia ariyo, ma kuot ka kuot nobaw gi dhahabu moromo kilo abiriyo." 
2Chronicles9:16 Kendo nochuogo okumbini mia adek, ma okumba ka okumba nogaw gi dhahabu moromo kilo adek gi nus. Magi duto ruoth noketo e Od Bungu mar Lebanon." 
2Chronicles9:17 Bende Ruoth noloso kom duong’ mang’ongo mar lakliech, mi nobawo gi dhahabu maler." 
2Chronicles9:18 Kom duong’no ne nigi raidhi man gi kuonde minyono auchiel gi raten tielo mar dhahabu momakore gi kom. To sibuoche ariyo mag dhahabu nochung’ e bath bede kom koni gi koni. 
2Chronicles9:19 Kende sibuoche apar gariyo moko nochung’ moro ka moro e dir raidhi koni gi koni. Onge piny moro ma nolosie kom ruoth machal gi mano. 
2Chronicles9:20 Kikombe Solomon duto nolos gi dhahabu, kendo gik moko duto mikonyruokgo e Od Bungu mar Lebanon bende nolos gi dhahabu maler. Fedha ne ok kwan ka gimoro e ndalo mag Solomon," 
2Chronicles9:21 nimar yiedhi mage ne dhi Tarshish gi jotich Hiram, kendo bang’ higni adek ne gikelo dhahabu gi fedha gi lak liech gi ong’eche kod bimbe." 
2Chronicles9:22 Kamano ruoth Solomon noloyo ruodhi duto mag piny gi mwandu kendo gi rieko. 
2Chronicles9:23 Ruodhi duto mag piny ne biro ir Solomon mondo owinj rieko mane Nyasaye omiye. 
2Chronicles9:24 Higa ka higa, ng’ato ka ng’ato ne kelone chiwo mag gik molos gi fedha gi dhahabu kaachiel gi lewni kod gilweny gi gik mang’ue ng’ar gi farese kod nyumbu." 
2Chronicles9:25 Solomon ne nigi udi alufu ang’wen mag farese gi mag geche, kod joidh farese alufu apar gariyo. Moko kuomgi noketo e miech geche, to moko ne en go Jerusalem." 
2Chronicles9:26 Ruodhi duto ne nie bwo loch Solomon chakre aora Yufrate nyaka piny Filistia gi tong’ piny Misri," 
2Chronicles9:27 Ruoth nomiyo fedha obedo mang’eny ka kuoyo e Jerusalem, kendo yiend sida bende ne ng’eny ka ng’owo mae pap." 
2Chronicles9:28 Solomon ne omo farese Misri kod pinje moko duto mane giyudoree. 
2Chronicles9:29 Weche moko mag Solomon a chakruokgi nyaka gikogi ondik e Kitap Nathan janabi, kendo e kitabu moting’o weche mane Ahija ja-Shilo okoro, kendo e kitap Iddo janen mondikie fwenyruok ma noneno kuom Jeroboam wuod Nebat." 
2Chronicles9:30 Solomon nobedo ruodh Israel duto kuom higni piero ang’wen kodak Jerusalem. 
2Chronicles9:31 Notho moyike e dala Daudi wuon mare. Rehoboam wuode nodoko ruoth kare. 
2Chronicles10:1 Rehoboam nodhi Shekem nikech jo-Israel duto nosechokore kuno mondo okete ruoth. 
2Chronicles10:2 To kane Jeroboam wuod Nebat owinjo wachno, noduogo koa Misri, nikech ne pod en Misri kuma nodhiye koringo ruoth Solomon." 
2Chronicles10:3 Ne giorone wach mondo obi Shekem. Nobiro gi jo-Israel duto mi ne giwacho ni Rehoboam niya,," 
2Chronicles10:4 “Wuoru nomiyowa ting’ mapek; omiyo in koro ng’ad ting’ mapek ma noketo kuomwa, eka wanatini.”" 
2Chronicles10:5 Nodwokogi niya, “Dhiuru to uduog bang’ ndalo adek.” Mi ne gia." 
2Chronicles10:6 Ruoth Rehoboam noporo wach gi jodongo ma yandi ng’ado rieko ni Solomon wuon mare ka pod ngima, kowachonigi niya, “Nyisauru gima dadwok jogo.”" 
2Chronicles10:7 Ne gidwoke niya, “Kiyie bedo mang’won ni jogi kilombogi kendo iwuoyo kodgi maber, eka gibiro bedo jotichni ndalo duto.”" 
2Chronicles10:8 To Rehoboam nodagi rieko ma jodongo nong’adone. Noporo wach gi yawuowi ma mbesene ma ne ni kode," 
2Chronicles10:9 kopenjogi niya, “Ere kaka dadwok jogi mosekwaya mondo ang’ad ting’ mapek ma wuora noketo kuomgi?”" 
2Chronicles10:10 Ne gidwoke niya, “Dwok joma okwayi mondo ing’adnigi ting’ mapek ma wuoru nomiyogi kiwachonigi kama, ‘Lith lweta matung’ duong’ moloyo nungo wuora." 
2Chronicles10:11 Wuora ero nomiyou ting’ mapek, an to abiro medou moloyo. Wuora nochwadou gi del, an to abiro chwadou gi thomoni.’ ”" 
2Chronicles10:12 Chieng’ mar adek, Jeroboam kod oganda duto nobiro ir ruoth Rehoboam kaka nochikogi mondo gidog ire." 
2Chronicles10:13 Ruoth nodwokogi kager. Noweyo rieko mane jodongo ong’adone," 
2Chronicles10:14 to noluwo rieko mbesene, kowacho niya, “Wuora nomiyou ting’ mapek, to an abiro medou moloyo. Wuora nochwadou gi del, to an abiro chwadou gi thomoni.”" 
2Chronicles10:15 Kamano ruoth ne ok odewo ji. To Nyasaye ema nomiyo gigo otimore kamano, mondo ochop singruokne mane omiyo Ahija ja-Shilo owacho ni Jeroboam wuod Nebat." 
2Chronicles10:16 Kane jo-Israel oneno ni Ruoth ok odewogi, ne gidwoke niya, “Waonge wat gi Daudi! Ok wan libamba achiel gi wuod Jesse! Wadoguru dala, wan jo-Israel duto! Un, oganda Daudi, koro rituru mana dhoodu kendu!”" 
2Chronicles10:17 Kamano jo-Israel duto nodok miechgi. 
2Chronicles10:18 Ruoth Rehoboam nooro Adoram mane jarit joma ichuno mondo oti gi thwon, to jo-Israel duto nogoye gi kite nyaka otho. Kuom mano ruoth Rehoboam noidho geche piyopiyo, moringo nyaka Jerusalem mondo otony." 
2Chronicles10:19 Chakre chieng’no, jo-Israel osebet ka dagi loch dhood Daudi nyaka chil kawuono, mak mana jo-Israel mane odak e dier jo-Juda kende ema nobet e bwo loch Rehoboam." 
2Chronicles11:1 Kane Rehoboam ochopo Jerusalem, nochoko jolweny moyier alufu mia achiel gi piero aboro (180,000) kuom jo-Juda gi jo-Benjamin. Ne gidhi kedo gi jo-Israel, mondo gidwok loch ni Rehoboam." 
2Chronicles11:2 To wach Ruoth Nyasaye nobiro ni Shemeya ng’at Nyasaye niya," 
2Chronicles11:3 “Wuo gi Rehoboam wuod Solomon, ruodh Juda, kod jo-Israel duto mae Juda gi Benjamin," 
2Chronicles11:4 kiwachonigi ni Ruoth Nyasaye owacho kama: ‘Kik udhi uked gi oweteu, to ng’ato ka ng’ato mondo odog dala, nikech gima timoreni oa kuoma.’ ” Ne giwinjo wach Ruoth Nyasaye, mi ne ok gidhi kedo gi Jeroboam." 
2Chronicles11:5 Rehoboam nodak Jerusalem, kendo nogero mier mag siro lweny e Juda." 
2Chronicles11:6 Nogero Bethlehem, Etam, Tekoa," 
2Chronicles11:7 Bethzur, Soko, Adulam," 
2Chronicles11:8 Gath, Maresha, Zif," 
2Chronicles11:9 Adoraim, Lakish, Azeka," 
2Chronicles11:10 Zora, Aijalon, kod Hebron. Gin miech Juda gi Benjamin mochiel gi ohinga." 
2Chronicles11:11 Nochielogi matek ahinya, moketoe jotend jolweny, kendo okanoe chiemo gi mo kod divai." 
2Chronicles11:12 Nokano kuodi gi tonge e miergo duto, kendo nolosogi motegno ahinya. Kamano e kaka norito Juda gi Benjamin." 
2Chronicles11:13 Jodolo gi jo-Lawi duto ma nodak kuom jo-Israel noduogo ir Rehoboam ka gia kuonde duto mane gidakie. 
2Chronicles11:14 Jo-Lawi noweyo lopgi gi mwandugi, mi gidhi Juda gi Jerusalem, nikech Jeroboam gi yawuote noriembogi e tich dolo mar Ruoth Nyasaye." 
2Chronicles11:15 Jeroboam noketo jodolone owuon e hembko mane ni kuonde moting’ore, kendo mondo odol ni kido mochue mag nyiseche manono kod nyiroye ma noseloso." 
2Chronicles11:16 Ji moko kuom dhoudi duto mag Israel ma noketo chunygi kuom lamo Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel ne luwo jodolo gi jo-Lawigo, kendo ne gidhi Jerusalem mondo gitim misango ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach kweregi." 
2Chronicles11:17 Kamano ne gitego piny Juda, kendo kuom higni adek, ne gimiyo loch Rehoboam wuod Solomon obedo motegno, nimar kuom higni adekgo ne giwuotho e yor Daudi gi Solomon." 
2Chronicles11:18 Rehoboam nokendo Mahalath, nyar Jerimoth, wuod Daudi, ma min mare ne Abihail nyar Eliab, wuod Jesse," 
2Chronicles11:19 ma nonywolone yawuowi ma nyinggi Jeush gi Shemaria kod Zaham. 
2Chronicles11:20 Bang’ Mahalath Rehoboam nokendo Maaka nyar Abishalom ma nonywolone Abija gi Atai gi Ziza kod Shelomith. 
2Chronicles11:21 Rehoboam nohero Maaka, nyar Abishalom, moloyo monde duto. Nokendo mon apar gaboro gi nyiri piero auchiel." 
2Chronicles11:22 Rehoboam noketo Abija, wuod chiege ma Maaka, jatend owetene, nimar nodwaro mondo obed ruoth bang’ thone." 
2Chronicles11:23 Notiyo gi rieko, moketo yawuote moko e mier mochiel gi ohinga e gwenge duto mag Juda gi Benjamin. Nopogonigi mwandu mang’eny kendo nokendonigi." 
2Chronicles12:1 Kane loch Rehoboam osegurore motegno, en, kaachiel gi jo-Israel duto, ne giweyo chik Ruoth Nyasaye." 
2Chronicles12:2 Emomiyo e higa mar abich mar lochne, Shishak ruodh Misri, nomonjo Jerusalem" 
2Chronicles12:3 gi geche alufu achiel gi mia ariyo kod joidh farese alufu piero auchiel. Jo-Libia gi jo-Suk kod jo-Kush ma nobiro kode koa Misri ne ng’eny ma ok kwan. 
2Chronicles12:4 Nokawo miech Juda mochiel gi ohinga nyaka nochopo Jerusalem. 
2Chronicles12:5 Eka Shemeya janabi nodhi ir Rehoboam gi jodong Juda mane oseringo odhi Jerusalem nikech biro mar Shishak. Nowachonigi niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye owacho kama: ‘Aweyou e lwet Shishak, nikech un bende useweya.’ ”" 
2Chronicles12:6 Eka ruoth gi jodong Israel nobolore kawacho niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye ni kare.”" 
2Chronicles12:7 Kane Ruoth Nyasaye oneno ka gibolore kamano, nonyiso Shemaya niya, “Gisebolore omiyo ok natiekgi, to abiro resogi bang’ ndalo manok, kendo ok nato mirimba kuom Jerusalem gi lwet Shishak." 
2Chronicles12:8 Kata kamano ginibed e bwo lochne, mondo ging’e ni tiyona opogore gi tiyo ni ruodhi mag pinyni!”" 
2Chronicles12:9 Shishak nomonjo Jerusalem, mokawo mwandu duto mag od Ruoth Nyasaye gi mag od ruoth. Bende nokawo kuodi mag dhahabu mane Solomon oloso," 
2Chronicles12:10 mi ruoth Rehoboam noloso kuodi mag mula kar mago, momiyo jotend jorit ranga dala ruoth." 
2Chronicles12:11 Kane ruoth dhi e Od Ruoth Nyasaye, jorit ne ting’o kuodigo, eka bange ne gidwokogi ka od jorit." 
2Chronicles12:12 Kane Rehoboam osebolore kamano, mirimb Ruoth Nyasaye nodok chien, mi ne ok otieke. To bende weche ne dhi maber e Juda." 
2Chronicles12:13 Ruoth Rehoboam norito piny kodak Jerusalem, kendo lochne nomedo gurore. Ne en jahigni piero ang’wen gachiel kane odoko ruoth, kendo norito piny kuom higni apar gabiriyo, kodak Jerusalem, dala mane Ruoth Nyasaye oyiero kuom dhout Israel duto mondo nyinge obedie. Min mare ne nyinge Naama, nyar Amon." 
2Chronicles12:14 Timbe Rehoboam ne richo, nikech ne ok oketo chunye kuom Ruoth Nyasaye." 
2Chronicles12:15 Weche duto mag Rehoboam a chakruokgi nyaka gikogi ondiki e Kitap Weche mag Ndalo mag Shemaya janabi gi Kitap Iddo janen. Ne nitie lweny e kind Rehoboam gi Jeroboam ndalo duto. 
2Chronicles12:16 Rehoboam notho, moyiki but kwerene e dala Daudi, Abija wuode nodoko ruoth kare." 
2Chronicles13:1 E higa mar apar gaboro mar loch Jeroboam, Abija nodoko ruodh Juda." 
2Chronicles13:2 Norito piny kuom higni adek kodak Jerusalem. Min mare ne nyinge Mikaya nyar Uriel ja-Gibea. Ne nitie lweny e kind Abija gi Jeroboam. 
2Chronicles13:3 Abija nowuok gi oganda jolweny moyier marateke alufu mia ang’wen, kendo Jeroboam nochano jolweny moyier marateke alufu mia aboro momanyore kod jo-Abija." 
2Chronicles13:4 Abija nodhi mochung’ ewi got Zemaraim manie piny gode mag Efraim, mokok niya, “Winjuru in Jeroboam gi jo-Israel duto!" 
2Chronicles13:5 Donge ung’eyo ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel nomiyo Daudi gi nyikwaye loch Israel nyaka chieng’ kotimo kodgi singruok ma ok kethre? 
2Chronicles13:6 To kata obedo kamano Jeroboam wuod Nebat jatich Solomon wuod Daudi nopiem gi ruodhe. 
2Chronicles13:7 Kendo jomahundu manono noriwore kode mokwedo Rehoboam wuod Solomon ka ne pod en rawera ma chunye yom, kendo ma ok nyal sirogi." 
2Chronicles13:8 “To koro uparo ni unyalo dagi loch ma Ruoth Nyasaye nomiyo nyikwa Daudi mana nikech ung’eny, kendo un gi nyiroye mag dhahabu mane Jeroboam omiyou mondo obed nyisecheu?" 
2Chronicles13:9 Donge useriembo jodolo mag Ruoth Nyasaye ma nyikwa Harun kod jo-Lawi, muketo jodolou kaka jopinje mamoko timo? Ng’ato ang’ata mobiro koyiedhore gi nyarwath kata gi imbe abiriyo nyalo doko jadolo ni gik ma ok Nyasaye." 
2Chronicles13:10 Wan to Ruoth Nyasaye e Nyasachwa, kendo ok waseweye. Wan gi jodolo ma nyikwa Harun kod jo-Lawi ma konyogi." 
2Chronicles13:11 Giwang’o ni Ruoth Nyasaye misengni kod ubani mang’ue ng’ar okinyi godhiambo kendo giketo makati e nyime e mesa mar dhahabu maler, kendo girito sis taya gi techene mondo oliel otieno kotieno. Kamano warito chik Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachwa, to un useweye." 
2Chronicles13:12 Neuru kaka Nyasaye ni kodwa, kotelonwa. Neuru kaka jodolone ting’o tungegi mag lweny ma gibiro goyo mondo warad kodu. Un jo-Israel kik uked gi Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach kwereu, nimar ok unyal loye.”" 
2Chronicles13:13 Jeroboam nosepando jolweny moko mondo opo jo-Juda gi yo ka ng’egi. Kamano ogandane mar jolweny ne nie nyim jo-Juda, to joma opondo ne ni kang’e gi." 
2Chronicles13:14 Kane jo-Juda ong’icho, ne gipo ka gineno jolweny koni gi koni, mi giywak ni Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo jodolo nogoyo tung’." 
2Chronicles13:15 Eka jo-Juda nogiyo, kendo kane gigiyo kamano, Nyasaye nokeyo Jeroboam kod jo-Israel duto e nyim Abija gi jo-Juda." 
2Chronicles13:16 Jo-Israel noringo jo-Juda, mi Nyasaye nochiwogi e lwet jo-Juda." 
2Chronicles13:17 Abija kod joge ne onegogi malich ahinya, mi jo-Israel marateke moyier alufu mia abich notho." 
2Chronicles13:18 Kamano ne olo jo-Israel chieng’no. Jo-Juda to ne olocho nimar ne gigeno kuom Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach kweregi. 
2Chronicles13:19 Abija nolawo Jeroboam, mokawo mieche moko, kaka Bethel gi Jeshana gi Efron kod mier mokiewo kodgi." 
2Chronicles13:20 Loch Jeroboam ne ok ochako obedo motegno kendo e ndalo mag Abija. Bang’e Ruoth Nyasaye nochwade motho. 
2Chronicles13:21 To loch Abija nomedo gurore motegno. Nokendo mon apar gang’wen, monywolo yawuowi piero ariyo gariyo, gi nyiri apar gauchiel." 
2Chronicles13:22 Koro weche moko mag Abija gi timbene duto ondiki e kitap Iddo janabi. 
2Chronicles14:1 Abija notho moyiki but kwerene e dala Daudi. Asa wuode nodoko ruoth kare. Piny nokue higni apar ndalo lochne. 
2Chronicles14:2 Timbe Asa ne beyo kendo long’o e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasache. 
2Chronicles14:3 Nogolo kuonde liswa mag nyiseche mag jopinje mamoko. Noketho hembko mane ni kuonde moting’ore, kendo omuko sirni milamo mag kite gi mag yien." 
2Chronicles14:4 Nojiwo jo-Juda mondo oluw Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach kwerene ka gimako buchene gi chikene. 
2Chronicles14:5 Noketho hembko duto mane ni kuonde moting’ore gi kende mag ubani e miech Juda duto, mi piny nokue e ndalo lochne." 
2Chronicles14:6 Noyudo thuolo mar chielo miech Juda gi ohinga, nimar piny nokue. Lweny ne onge e ndalone, nikech Nyasaye nomiye kue." 
2Chronicles14:7 Asa nowacho ni jo-Juda niya, “Wageruru miechwagi, kendo wachielgi gi ohinga man gi kuonde maboyo mag ng’icho, mi waketnigi rangeye miloro motegno gi lodi. Piny pod marwa, nimar waseluwo Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachwa, mi osemiyowa kue kuonde duto.” Omiyo ne gigedo, kendo gidhi nyime maber." 
2Chronicles14:8 Asa ne nigi jolweny ma jo-Juda alufu mia adek moting’o kuodi gi tong’, kod jo-Juda alufu mia ariyo gi piero aboro (280,000) moting’o okumbni gi atunge. Jogi duto ne thuondi mager." 
2Chronicles14:9 Zera ja-Kush nomonjogi kod jolweny tara achiel, kod geche lweny mia adek, mochopo nyaka Maresha." 
2Chronicles14:10 Asa nodhi mondo oked kode, mi ne gichanore ni lweny e paw Zefatha but Maresha." 
2Chronicles14:11 Asa noywak ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasache niya, “A Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachwa, konywa nikech wageno kuomi, kendo wabiro rado gi ogandani mana e nyingi. A Ruoth Nyasaye, in e Nyasachwa, kik dhano adhana loyi!”" 
2Chronicles14:12 Eka Ruoth Nyasaye nomiyo Asa gi jo-Juda oloyo jo-Kush, mi jo-Kush noringo." 
2Chronicles14:13 Ne gilawogi nyaka Gera, ka ginegogi oyokre, nimar Ruoth Nyasaye gi jolwenje ema notiekogi. Mi jo-Juda noyako gik mang’eny ahinya." 
2Chronicles14:14 Ne giketho mier duto mokiewo gi Gera, nikech luoro moa kuom Ruoth Nyasaye nomako pinyno. Ne giyako miego duto, nimar ne nitie mwandu mang’eny ma noyudo jogo oseyako." 
2Chronicles14:15 Ne gituro kuonde dhok, kendo ne gipeyo rombe gi ngamia mathoth. Eka ne gidok Jerusalem." 
2Chronicles15:1 Roho mar Nyasaye nobiro kuom Azaria wuod Oded," 
2Chronicles15:2 modhi romo gi Asa. Nowacho ni Asa gi jo-Juda kod jo-Benjamin niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye ni kodu, to mana ka pod un kode. Kudware, unuyude; to kuweye en bende noweu." 
2Chronicles15:3 Kuom higni mathoth Israel nobedo maonge gi jodolo ma puonjogi, kendo ma onge gi chik." 
2Chronicles15:4 To ka ginie thagruok, ginidog ir Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachgi, kendo ginidware, mi giniyude." 
2Chronicles15:5 E ndalogo, kue nobed maonge ni ng’ato e yorene duto, nimar chandruok maduong’ nobi kuom ji duto modak e pinyni." 
2Chronicles15:6 Ginitiekre kendgi ka libamba kedo gi libamba kendo dala kedo gi dala, nimar Nyasaye nomigi thagruok mang’eny." 
2Chronicles15:7 To un, timuru chir! Lwetu kik jony, nimar nochulu kuom tichu.”" 
2Chronicles15:8 Kane Asa owinjo weche mane Azaria wuod Oded okorone, notimo chir mogolo nyiseche mokwer e piny Juda gi Benjamin duto kod mier duto ma nokawo e piny gode mag Efraim. Noloso kendo-mar-misango mar Ruoth Nyasaye mane nie nyim agoch Od Ruoth Nyasaye." 
2Chronicles15:9 Nochoko jo-Juda gi jo-Benjamin duto gi jodak ma jo-Efraim gi Manase kod Simeon, nimar ji mang’eny noseweyo Israel mobiro ire ka gineno ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasache ni kode." 
2Chronicles15:10 Ne gichokore Jerusalem e due mar adek mar higa mar apar gabich mar loch Asa. 
2Chronicles15:11 Chieng’no ne gitimo ni Ruoth Nyasaye misengni gi dhok mia abiriyo mane gigolo kuom gik mane gipeyo. 
2Chronicles15:12 Ne gisingore mondo giluw Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach kweregi gi chunygi duto," 
2Chronicles15:13 kendo mondo oneg ng’ato ang’ata, matin kata maduong, ma dichwo kata madhako, ma ok dwar luwo Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel." 
2Chronicles15:14 Ne gitimo singruok ni Ruoth Nyasaye gi dwol madwong’, ka gikok kendo ka gigoyo tung’ gi oporo." 
2Chronicles15:15 Jo-Juda duto ne mor nikech singruokno, nimar ne gisingore gi chunygi duto. Ne gidwaro Ruoth Nyasaye gi siso maduong’, mi ne giyude, kendo nomiyogi kue kuonde duto." 
2Chronicles15:16 Bende Asa nogolo Maaka min mare e duong’ne mar bedo min ruoth, nikech noloso kido makuero maket gi nyasaye ma dhako miluongo ni Ashera. Asa nomuko gima ketno, mong’ade matindotindo, kendo nowang’e e dho aora Kidron." 
2Chronicles15:17 To ne ok oketho hembko mane ni kuonde moting’ore e piny Israel. Kata kamano chunye nodimbore e nyim Nyasaye ndalone duto. 
2Chronicles15:18 Nokawo fedha gi dhahabu kod gik lemo, mi oketo e Od Nyasaye. Moko ne gin gik mane wuon mare ochiwo ni Nyasaye, to moko en ema nochiwo." 
2Chronicles15:19 Ne onge lweny nyaka higa mar piero adek gabich mar loch Asa," 
2Chronicles16:1 to e higa mar piero adek gauchiel mar lochne, Baasha ruodh Israel nodhi momonjo jo-Juda, kendo nochielo Rama gi ohinga, moketoe jolweny mondo ogeng’ ni ji duto ma dhi ka Asa ruodh Juda, kata maa kuno." 
2Chronicles16:2 Eka Asa nokawo fedha gi dhahabu kuom mwandu mag Od Ruoth Nyasaye kod mag ode owuon. Noorogi ni Benhadad ruodh Aram ma nodak Damaski gi wach niya," 
2Chronicles16:3 “Winjruok mondo obed e kindwa kodi, kaka winjruok mane nie kind wuora gi wuoru. Ero, aoroni fedha gi dhahabu; yie iketh winjruok manie kindu gi Baasha ruodh Israel, mondo owe kedo koda.”" 
2Chronicles16:4 Benhadad noyie kwayo mar ruoth Asa, mi nooro jotend jolweny mondo omonj miech jo-Israel. Noketho Ijon gi Dan gi Abelmaim kod miech keno duto mag Naftali." 
2Chronicles16:5 Kane Baasha owinjo gima otimore, noweyo gero ohinga mar Rama, mi tijno nochung’." 
2Chronicles16:6 Eka ruoth Asa nodhi gi jo-Juda duto mi gigolo kite gi yien duto mane Baasha gerogo ohinga mar Rama, mi nochielogo Geba gi Mizpa." 
2Chronicles16:7 E ndalogo, Hanani janen nobiro ir Asa ruodh Juda mowachone niya, “Jolweny mag ruodh Aram biro tony e lweti, nikech nigeno kuom jo-Aram, to ne ok igeno kuom Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachi." 
2Chronicles16:8 Donge jo-Kush gi jo-Libia ne gin oganda maduong’ man gi geche gi joidh farese mang’eny ahinya? To Ruoth Nyasaye nochiwogi e lweti, nimar nigeno kuome," 
2Chronicles16:9 nikech wang’ Ruoth Nyasaye ng’iyo piny duto koni gi koni mondo onyis tekone mokonyogo joma chunygi odimbore e nyime. Nitimo gima ofuwo kuom wachni, omiyo chakre kawuono ibiro bedo gi lwenje.”" 
2Chronicles16:10 Wachno nomiyo Asa okecho gi janen, mi otueye gi nyororo e od tuech. To bende Asa nochako sando jomoko e ndalogo." 
2Chronicles16:11 Chakruok weche Asa nyaka gikogi ondiki e kitap Ruodhi mag Juda gi mag Israel. 
2Chronicles16:12 Kane Asa osebedo ruoth kuom higni piero adek gochiko, tuo nomako tiendene. Tuoneno nomedore ahinya, to kata kamano ne ok okwayo Ruoth Nyasaye mondo okonye, to nodhi mana kuom ajuoke." 
2Chronicles16:13 Asa notho higa mar piero ang’wen gachiel mar lochne moluwo kwerene. 
2Chronicles16:14 Noyike e liende ma nokunyo e dala Daudi. Ne gikete e ng’ango mopong’ gi gik mang’ue ng’ar mane joma olony e tijno oseloso, kendo ne giloso mach mang’ongo ahinya ka gimiyego duong’." 
2Chronicles17:1 Jehoshafat nodoko ruoth kar Asa wuon mare. Noikore mondo osir Israel," 
2Chronicles17:2 omiyo noketo jolweny e miech Juda duto mochiel gi ohinga, kendo noketo jotendgi e piny Juda kod e miech Efraim duto mane Asa wuon mare osekawo." 
2Chronicles17:3 Ruoth Nyasaye ne konyo Jehoshafat nimar Jehoshafat noluwo timbe mokwongo mag wuon mare ka ok oluwo Baal. 
2Chronicles17:4 Nogeno Nyasach wuon mare komako buchene mak oluwo timbe jo-Israel. 
2Chronicles17:5 Emomiyo Ruoth Nyasaye nomiyo lochne obedo motegno kendo jo-Juda duto nokelone mich mi nobedo gi mwandu mang’eny kod huma maduong’. 
2Chronicles17:6 Chunye nojiwore e yor Ruoth Nyasaye, bende noketho hembko mane ni kuonde moting’ore, kaachiel gi sirni milamo mane nie piny Juda." 
2Chronicles17:7 E higa mar adek mar lochne nooro Banhail gi Obadia gi Zekaria gi Nethaneel kod Mikaya ma jodonge mondo odhi opuonj e miech Juda. 
2Chronicles17:8 Bende nooro Shemai gi Nethania gi Zebadia gi Asahel gi Shemiramoth gi Jehonathan gi Adonija gi Tobija kod Tobadonija ma jo-Lawi kaachiel gi Elishama gi Jehoram ma jodolo. 
2Chronicles17:9 Ne giwuotho e miech Juda duto gi Kitap Chike mag Ruoth Nyasaye ka gipuonjogo ji. 
2Chronicles17:10 Luoro moa kuom Ruoth Nyasaye nomako ruodhi mag pinje mokiewo gi Juda, mi ne ok gikedo gi Jehoshafat." 
2Chronicles17:11 Jo-Filistia moko ne kelo ni Jehoshafat mich, kaachiel gi fedha ma gichulogo osuru. Jo-Arabu bende nokelone imbe alufu abiriyo gi mia abiriyo kod nyuogi alufu abiriyo." 
2Chronicles17:12 Teko Jehoshafat ne medore ameda. Nogero mier mochiel gi ohinga gi mier mag keno e Juda. 
2Chronicles17:13 Nokano gilweny e miego, kendo ne en gi jolweny marateke Jerusalem." 
2Chronicles17:14 Ma e kar rombgi, kaluwore gi dhoutgi: Jatend jolweny mar dhood Juda ne en Adna mane nigi jolweny marateke alufu mia adek." 
2Chronicles17:15 Jalupne ne en Jehohanan mane nigi ji alufu mia ariyo gi piero aboro, (280,000) kendo" 
2Chronicles17:16 jatelo mar adek ne en Amasia wuod Zikri ma nochiwore ni tich Ruoth Nyasaye. En to ne en gi jolweny marateke alufu mia ariyo. 
2Chronicles17:17 To jatend jolweny mar dhood Benjamin ne en Eliada thwon mager. Ne en gi ji alufu mia ariyo moting’o atung’ gi okumbini. 
2Chronicles17:18 Jalupne ne en Jehozabad mane nigi jolweny alufu mia achiel gii piero aboro (180,000) moikore ni lweny." 
2Chronicles17:19 Mano e kar romb joma ne nie tich ruoth, ka ok okwan jogo mane ruoth oketo e miech Juda duto mochiel gi ohinga." 
2Chronicles18:1 Jehoshafat koro ne nigi mwandu mang’eny kod huma maduong’ ahinya. Nomiyo jodhoodgi okendore gi jodhood Ahab, mondo okelgo winjruok." 
2Chronicles18:2 Bang’ higni moko nodhi Samaria limo Ahab, mi Ahab noyang’one rombe gi ruedhi mogundho mondo ocham gi joma nowuothogo kohoye mondo owuoth gi jo-Ramoth-gilead." 
2Chronicles18:3 Nopenjo Jehoshafat niya, “Iyie dhi kodwa Ramoth-gilead?” Nodwoke niya, “Ayie, joga e jogi. Wabiro dhi kodi e lweny.”" 
2Chronicles18:4 Eka Jehoshafat nowacho ni ruodh Israel niya, “To mokwongo onego wapenj Ruoth Nyasaye wach.”" 
2Chronicles18:5 Omiyo ruodh jo-Israel nochoko jonabi mia ang’wen mopenjogi niya, “Wadhi waked gi jo-Ramoth-gilead, koso wawe?” Ne gidwoke niya, “Dhiyo nikech Nyasaye biro miyi dalano.”" 
2Chronicles18:6 To Jehoshafat nopenje niya, “Janabi moro mar Ruoth Nyasaye onge ka koso, ma dwapenj wach?”" 
2Chronicles18:7 Ruodh Israel nodwoke ni, “Ee, ng’at achiel pod odong’ ma dipenjnwa Ruoth Nyasaye wach, en Mikaya wuod Imla, to asin kode, nikech ok okor gik mabeyo kuoma, to okoro mana gik maricho.” To Jehoshafat nowachone niya, “Kik iwuo kamano.”" 
2Chronicles18:8 Eka ruodh Israel noluongo jatichne moro, mowachone niya, “Dhi piyo iluong Mikaya wuod Imla.”" 
2Chronicles18:9 Koro noyudo ka ruodh Israel gi Jehoshafat ruodh Juda obet e alap manie dhoranga Samaria, ka ng’ato ka ng’ato obet e kom duong’ne, korwako lawe mar ruoth, kendo jonabi duto ne koro wach e nyimgi." 
2Chronicles18:10 Zedekia wuod Kenaana nosethedho tunge mag nyinyo morwako, mi nowacho niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye owacho kama, ‘Ibiro chwowo jo-Aram gi tungegi.’ ”" 
2Chronicles18:11 Jonabi duto bende nokoro wach machal kamano ka giwacho niya, “Dhiyo Ramoth-gilead mondo ilo. Ruoth Nyasaye biro chiwe e lweti.”" 
2Chronicles18:12 Jaote mane odhi luongo Mikaya nowachone niya, “Jonabi duto osekoro wach nyalhodia ka giwacho ni gima ber biro timore ni ruoth. In bende yie ikor wach maber kaka gisekorono.”"
