2Chronicles18:13 To Mikaya nodwoke niya, “Akuong’ora gi nying Ruoth Nyasaye ni gima Nyasaye owachona ema abiro wacho.”" 
2Chronicles18:14 Kane Mikaya ochopo e nyim ruoth, ruoth nopenje ni, “Wadhi waked gi jo-Ramoth-gilead, koso wawe?” Nodwoko niya, “Dhi mondo ilo! Ruoth Nyasaye biro chiwogi e lweti.”" 
2Chronicles18:15 Ruoth nowachone ni, “Asesiemi nyadidi ni kik iwach miriambo, to mak mana adiera kende e nying Ruoth Nyasaye?”" 
2Chronicles18:16 Mikaya nowacho niya, “Naneno jo-Israel duto koke e gode ka rombe maonge jakwath, kendo nawinjo ka Ruoth Nyasaye wacho niya, ‘Jogi onge gi wuon-gi, we mondo gidog e miechgi gi kue.’ ”" 
2Chronicles18:17 Ruodh Israel nowacho ni Jehoshafat niya, “Donge nawachoni ni jali ok dikorna wach maber, to mana marach?”" 
2Chronicles18:18 Mikaya nowacho niya, “Koro winj wach Ruoth Nyasaye: Naneno Ruoth Nyasaye kobet e kom duong’ne, kendo oganda polo duto kochung’ e bathe koni gi koni." 
2Chronicles18:19 Ruoth Nyasaye nopenjogi niya, ‘Ere ng’ama diho Ahab ruodh Israel odhi Ramoth-gilead mondo otho kuno?’ To roho ka roho nochiwo parone," 
2Chronicles18:20 nyaka roho moro nosudo mochung’ e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye kawacho niya, ‘An ema abiro hoye,’ Ruoth Nyasaye nopenje ni, ‘Ere kaka ibiro hoye?’" 
2Chronicles18:21 Nodwoke ni, ‘Abiro dhi bet roho mar miriambo e dho jonabine duto.’ Ruoth Nyasaye noyiene ni, ‘Ee, in ema ibiro hoye. Dhiyo itim kamano.’" 
2Chronicles18:22 Koro sani Ruoth Nyasaye oseketo roho mar miriambo e dho jonabini duto. To kata kamano Ruoth Nyasaye oseng’adoni buch masira.” 
2Chronicles18:23 Eka Zedekia wuod Kenaana nosudo machiegni mothalo lemb Mikaya kopenje niya, “Ere kaka Roho mar Ruoth Nyasaye ne nyalo a kuoma mondo owuo kodi?”" 
2Chronicles18:24 Mikaya nodwoke niya, “Chieng’ ma inidonji e ot maiye mondo ipondie, eka ning’e!”" 
2Chronicles18:25 Ruodh Israel nowacho ni, “Makuru Mikaya, uter ir Amon jaduong’ Samaria kod Joash wuod ruoth, mondo jorite." 
2Chronicles18:26 Wachnigiuru niya, ‘Ruoth owacho ni mondo uket ng’atni e od tuech, kendo umiye mana kuon abang’a gi pi kende nyaka aduog kangima.’ ”" 
2Chronicles18:27 To Mikaya nowacho niya, “Kiduogo kingima, to kara ok asewuoyo gi dho Ruoth Nyasaye.”" 
2Chronicles18:28 Kamano ruodh Israel gi Jehoshafat ruodh Juda nodhi Ramoth-gilead. 
2Chronicles18:29 Ruodh Israel nowacho ni Jehoshafat niya, “Kwadhi e lweny, abiro rwako lewni moko mondo kik ji ng’eya, to in rwak lepi mag ruoth.” Kamano ruodh Israel noloko kite kendo ne gidhi e lweny." 
2Chronicles18:30 To ruodh Aram nosechiko jodong lweny ma jotend gechene ni kik giked gi ng’at moro amora, mak mana ruodh Israel kende." 
2Chronicles18:31 Kane jotend geche oneno Jehoshafat, ne giwacho niya, “Jal cha e ruodh Israel.” Ne gilokore ire mondo giked kode, to Jehoshafat nogiyo, mi Ruoth Nyasaye nokonye. Nyasaye nogologi kuome," 
2Chronicles18:32 nimar kane jotend geche oneno ni ok en ruodh Israel, ne giweyo lawe." 
2Chronicles18:33 To ng’at moro nodiro asere, morodhno gi kor ruodh Israel e kind chumbe mag lweny ma norwako. Mi ruoth nowacho ni jariemb gache niya, “Wichri, igola e lweny, nikech ahinyora malit.”" 
2Chronicles18:34 Lweny nomedore chieng’no; mi ruodh Israel noyiengore e gache kochomo jo Aram nyaka odhiambo, mi notho ka chieng’ podho." 
2Chronicles19:1 Jehoshafat ruodh Juda nodok dalane Jerusalem kongima. 
2Chronicles19:2 To Jehu wuod Hanani ma janen nodhi romone mopenje niya, “Bende itimo maber kikonyo joricho kendo ihero joma ok ohero Ruoth Nyasaye? Mirima osemako Ruoth Nyasaye kodi nikech wachni." 
2Chronicles19:3 Kata kamano kamoro bende iber, nimar nigolo sirni milamo e piny, kendo iketo chunyi kuom luwo Nyasaye.”" 
2Chronicles19:4 Jehoshafat nodak Jerusalem, to nochako owuok kolimo joge chakre Beersheba nyaka piny gode mag Efraim, modwokogi ir Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach kweregi." 
2Chronicles19:5 Noketo jong’ad bura e miech Juda duto mochiel gi ohinga," 
2Chronicles19:6 kendo nowachonigi niya, “Paruru gima utimo, nimar ung’ad bura e nying dhano, to ung’ado e nying Ruoth Nyasaye, nikech en kodu kung’ado bura." 
2Chronicles19:7 Emomiyo tiuru kuluoro Ruoth Nyasaye. Ritreuru kuom gima utimo, nimar Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachwa ok oyie gi ng’ado buch amwor kata buch nyakonchiel kata chamo asoya.”" 
2Chronicles19:8 Bende Jehoshafat noketo jo-Lawi gi jodolo moko kod jodong dhout Israel e Jerusalem mondo ong’ad bura e nying Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo otheg buche milaruokie. Od bura ne ni Jerusalem." 
2Chronicles19:9 Jehoshafat nochikogi kama, “Unuti tijeu gi adiera kendo gi chunyu duto kuluoro Ruoth Nyasaye." 
2Chronicles19:10 Kamano ka joweteu modak e mier mamoko okelo wach moro e nyimu, bed ni en wach nek kata wach ketho chik Nyasaye, kata buch piny, kata buch dini, kata chik moro amora, to nyaka upuonjgi ni kik giketh e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, nimar dokech kodu kaachiel gi joweteugo. Kutimo kamano, ok nubed gi ketho." 
2Chronicles19:11 Amaria jadolo maduong’ ema notelnu e weche duto mag Ruoth Nyasaye, to Zebadia wuod Ishmael ma jaduong’ dhood Juda notelnu e weche duto mag ruoth, kendo jo-Lawi nobed jogoro. Timuru chir, kendo Ruoth Nyasaye mondo okony jogo man gi adiera.”" 
2Chronicles20:1 Bang’ mano jo-Moab gi jo-Amon kod jo-Meun moko nobiro kedo gi Jehoshafat. 
2Chronicles20:2 Jomoko nonyiso Jehoshafat niya, “Oganda maduong’ moa Edom loka nam biro mondo omonji, kendo gisechopo Hazazon-tamar, miluongo bende ni Engedi.”" 
2Chronicles20:3 Luoro nomako Jehoshafat, moketo chunye ni kwayo Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo nochiko jo-Juda duto mondo otue chiemo." 
2Chronicles20:4 Ji noa e miech Juda duto, mi ochokore kaachiel mondo okwa kony kuom Ruoth Nyasaye." 
2Chronicles20:5 Kane jo-Juda gi jo-Jerusalem osekoro e od Ruoth Nyasaye, Jehoshafat nochung’ e nyim laru manyien," 
2Chronicles20:6 mokwayo niya, “A Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach kwerewa, donge in e Nyasaye manie polo? Donge in e ruodh ogendini duto? Nyalo gi teko duto nie lueti maonge ng’ato manyalo siri." 
2Chronicles20:7 A Nyasachwa, donge in ema nichiwo pinyni ni nyikwa Ibrahim ma osiepni, kiriembo joma nodakie mondo owe thuolo ni jogi Israel, odagie nyaka chieng’?" 
2Chronicles20:8 Mi gisedakie kendo gisegeronie Hekalu mondo nyingi obedie," 
2Chronicles20:9 ka giwacho niya, ‘Ka gima rach obiro kuomwa, kaka lweny kata sand kata dera kata kech to wanachung’ e nyim Hekalu kendo e nyimi, nimar nyingi nika. Wanaywag e nyimi nikech masichwa, kwang’eyo ni iniwinjwa kendo inireswa.’" 
2Chronicles20:10 Kane jo-Israel oa e piny Misri, ne ikwerogi ni kik gimonj jo-Amon gi jo-Moab gi jo-got Seir, omiyo ne giweyogi ma ok gitiekogi." 
2Chronicles20:11 To kar goyonwa erokamano, to koro gidwaro riembowa e piny mane imiyowa mondo obed marwa." 
2Chronicles20:12 A Nyasachwa, donge ibiro kumogi? Wan waonge gi teko ma dwasirgo oganda maduong’ mabiro monjowani! Ok wang’eyo gima dwatim, to wageno mana kuomi.”" 
2Chronicles20:13 Jo-Juda duto, kaachiel gi mondegi kod nyithindgi kata matindo manadi, nochung’ e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye." 
2Chronicles20:14 Eka Roho mar Ruoth Nyasaye nolor kuom Jahazia ja-Lawi, mane nie dier chokruok. Ne en wuod Zekaria, ma wuod Benaya, ma wuod Jeyel, ma wuod Matania, ma achiel kuom nyikwa Asaf." 
2Chronicles20:15 Nowacho niya, “Un jo-Juda duto gi joma odak Jerusalem, kod ruoth Jehoshafat, winjuru gima Ruoth Nyasaye owachonu. Owacho ni kik uluor oganda maduong’ni, kendo chunyu kik parre, nimar lweny ok en maru to en mar Nyasaye." 
2Chronicles20:16 Kiny uwuognigi awuoga. Gibiro biro ka giluwo yor Ziz, kendo unuyudgi e giko pony, yo wuok chieng’ mar thim Jeruel." 
2Chronicles20:17 To un, jo-Juda gi jo-Jerusalem, ok onego uked e lwenjni. Kuseriedo ni lweny, to uchung’ achung’a, mondo une kaka Ruoth Nyasaye biro lochonu. Kik uluor, kendo chunyu kik parre. Kiny uwuognigi awuoga, kendo Ruoth Nyasaye biro konyou.”" 
2Chronicles20:18 Eka Jehoshafat nogoyo chonge piny, mokulo wiye nyaka e lowo, mi jo-Juda gi joma odak Jerusalem bende nogoyo chongi piny e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye ka gilame." 
2Chronicles20:19 Koro jo-Lawi ma jo-Kohath gi jo-Kora nochako wer ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel gi dwol maduong’ ahinya. 
2Chronicles20:20 Jo-Juda ne ochiew gokinyi mang’ich mondo odhi e thim Tekoa, to kane gidhi, Jehoshafat nochung’ mowachonigi niya, “Winjuru un jo-Juda gi joma odak Jerusalem! Genuru kuom Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu, mi unukwo, kendo genuru kuom jonabi mage, mi unulo.”" 
2Chronicles20:21 Kane oseporo wach gi joge, noyiero joma onego tel nyim jolweny korwako lep lemo, mondo opak Ruoth Nyasaye, ka wer kama: “Gouru erokamano ni Ruoth Nyasaye, nimar herane mosiko ochwere.”" 
2Chronicles20:22 Kane gichako wer kendo peko, Ruoth Nyasaye norundo jo-Amon gi jo-Moab kod jo-got Seir, mane obiro monjo jo-Juda, mi nologi." 
2Chronicles20:23 Noyudo ka jo-Amon kod jo-Moab onywako ni jo-got Seir, motieko chuth, kendo kane gisetiekogi kamano, ne gichako negore kendgi giwegi." 
2Chronicles20:24 Kane jo-Juda ochopo kama oting’ore manie thim, mondo gine wasikgi mang’enygo, ne gineno mana ringre joma otho ka opie piny, maonge ng’ama otony." 
2Chronicles20:25 Kane Jehoshafat kod joge odhi mondo oyeki, ne giyudo dhok mathoth, gi mwandu gi lewni kod gik moko mabeyo mang’eny, mane ok ginyal ting’o duto. Ne gitieko ndalo adek ka pod giyeko, nimar gigo ne ng’eny ahinya." 
2Chronicles20:26 To chieng’ mar ang’wen ne gichokore e holo mi gipakoe Ruoth Nyasaye. Emomiyo kanyo ne ochak ni, holo mar Pak, nying ma pod iluongego nyaka chil kawuono." 
2Chronicles20:27 Eka jo-Juda gi jo-Jerusalem ne jodok Jerusalem, ka Jehoshafat otelonigi, ka gimor nikech Ruoth Nyasaye nomiyo giloyo wasikgi." 
2Chronicles20:28 Ne gidhi Jerusalem, e Od Ruoth Nyasaye ka gigoyo tung’ gi thumbe mopogore opogore." 
2Chronicles20:29 Kane ruodhi mag pinje mamoko duto owinjo kaka Ruoth Nyasaye osekedo gi wasik Israel, luoro moa kuom Ruoth Nyasaye nomakogi." 
2Chronicles20:30 Kamano piny Jehoshafat nobet gi kue, nimar Nyasache nokelo kue e kindgi gi pinje duto mokiewo kode." 
2Chronicles20:31 Mano e kaka Jehoshafat norito Juda. Ne en jahigni piero adek gabich kane odoko ruoth, morito piny kuom higni piero ariyo gabich, kodak Jerusalem, Min mare ne nyinge Azuba nyar Shilhi." 
2Chronicles20:32 Jehoshafat noluwo timbe Asa wuon mare adimba. Timbene ne long’o e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye. 
2Chronicles20:33 To kata kamano, hembko mane ni kuonde moting’ore ne ok okethi, kendo ji ne pok oketo chunygi kuom Nyasach kweregi." 
2Chronicles20:34 Chakruok weche Jehoshafat nyaka gikogi yudore e kitap Jehu wuod Hanani, ma koro ondik e Kitap Ruodhi mag Israel." 
2Chronicles20:35 Bende Jehoshafat ruodh Juda notimo winjruok gi Ahazia ruodh Israel mane timbene richo. 
2Chronicles20:36 Noriwore kode e tich hondho yiedhi madhi Tarshish, kendo ne gilosogi Ezion-geber." 
2Chronicles20:37 Eka Eliezer wuod Dodavahu ma ja-Maresha nokoro wach marach kuom Jehoshafat niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye biro ketho gima useloso, nikech isetimo winjruok gi Ahazia.” Kamano yiedhi nobarore, ma ok nyal dhi Tarshish." 
2Chronicles21:1 Jehoshafat notho moyike but kwerene e dala Daudi, mi Jehoram wuode nodoko ruoth kare." 
2Chronicles21:2 Ne en kod owetene ma nyingegi Azaria, Jahiel, Zekaria, Azaria, Mikael, kod Shefatia. Giduto ne gin yawuot Jehoshafat ruodh Juda." 
2Chronicles21:3 Wuon-gi nopogonigi mwandu mang’eny mag fedha gi dhahabu kod gik moko ma tekregi ng’eny kaachiel gi miech Juda mochiel gohinga. To loch nomiyo Jehoram nimar ne en wuode makayo. 
2Chronicles21:4 Kane Jehoram osebet e kom duong’ mar wuon mare kendo oguroree, nonego owetene duto kod jodongo moko bende mag Israel." 
2Chronicles21:5 Jehoram ne jahigni piero adek gariyo kane odoko ruoth, kendo norito piny kuom higni aboro, kodak Jerusalem." 
2Chronicles21:6 Noluwo timbe ruodhi Israel kaka jodhood Ahab notimo, nimar nokendo jodhood Ahab. Timbene ne richo e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye." 
2Chronicles21:7 To kata kamano Ruoth Nyasaye ne ok otieko dhood Daudi, nikech nosesingorene kaachiel gi nyikwaye ni anywolane nobed e kom duong’ ka taya malielne nyaka chieng’." 
2Chronicles21:8 E ndalo loch Jehoram, jo-Edom nodagi bet e bwo loch Juda, mi ne giketo ruodhgi giwegi." 
2Chronicles21:9 Omiyo Jehoram nodhi kuno kaachiel gi jodonge mag lweny gi gechene duto, to jo-Edom nolworogi, mi Jehoram gi jotend gechene nochiew gotieno momwomo." 
2Chronicles21:10 Mano e kaka jo-Edom notieko loch Juda e Edom nyaka chil kawuono. E ndalogo Libna bende nodagi bedo e bwo loch Jehoram, nimar noseweyo Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach kwerene." 
2Chronicles21:11 Bende noloso hembko mane ni kuonde moting’ore e piny gode mag Juda, momiyo jo-Jerusalem oweyo Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo omiyo jo-Juda oruenyo." 
2Chronicles21:12 Eka barua noa kuom Elija janabi niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Daudi kwaru owacho kama," 
2Chronicles21:13 ‘Nakel masira maduong’ kuom jogi gi nyithindgi gi mondi kod gigi duto," 
2Chronicles21:14 kendo in iwuon nibed gi tuo marach ma nocham dhokchindi kuom ndalo mang’eny nyaka giniwuog oko nikech ne ok iluwo timbe Jehoshafat wuoru kata timbe Asa ruodh Juda," 
2Chronicles21:15 to niluwo mana timbe ruodhi mag Israel. Bende nimiyo jo-Juda gi jo-Israel oweyo Ruoth Nyasaye kaka dhood Ahab nomiyo jo-Israel oweye, kendo ninego oweteni ma yawuot wuoru mane joma kare moloyi.’ ”" 
2Chronicles21:16 Ruoth Nyasaye nomiyo jo-Filistia kod jo-Arabu mokiewo gi jo-Kush obedo wasik Jehoram," 
2Chronicles21:17 mi ne gimonjo jo-Juda kendo ne gikawo gik moko duto mane giyudo e od ruoth kaachiel gi yawuote gi monde, mak mana Ahazia wuode machogo ema nodong’." 
2Chronicles21:18 Bang’ mago duto Ruoth Nyasaye nomiyo tuo mar dhokchin ma ok nyal chango omako Jehoram. 
2Chronicles21:19 Tuo nomedore, mi bang’ higni ariyo dhokchinde nowuok oko mi notho gi rem malit. Joge ne ok olosone mach kaka nolosni kwerene." 
2Chronicles21:20 Ne en jahigni piero adek gariyo kane odoko ruoth, kendo norito piny kuom higni aboro kodak Jerusalem. Notho ma onge ng’ama oywage. Ne giyike e dala Daudi, to ok e liete ruodhi." 
2Chronicles22:1 Mony ma nobiro gi jo-Arabu e lwenjno nosenego yawuot Jehoram madongo duto. Kamano e kaka Ahazia wuod Jehoram machogo nodoko ruodh Juda. 
2Chronicles22:2 Ahazia ne jahigni piero ang’wen gariyo kane odoko ruoth, morito piny kuom higa achiel, kodak Jerusalem. Min mare ne nyinge Athalia nyakwar Omri." 
2Chronicles22:3 Ahazia bende noluwo timbe dhood Ahab nimar min mare nopuonje timbe maricho. 
2Chronicles22:4 Timbene ne richo e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye mana kaka timbe jodhood Ahab, nikech bang’ tho wuon mare, jogo nodoko jong’adne rieko marach ma ne okethe." 
2Chronicles22:5 Noyie puonjgi modhi Ramoth-gilead gi Joram wuod Ahab ma ruodh Israel mondo giked gi Hazael ruodh Aram. To jo-Aram nohinyo Joram," 
2Chronicles22:6 modok Jezreel ni mondo ochang kuom hinyruok ma noyudo Rama kokedo gi Hazael ruodh Aram. Ahazia wuod Jehoram ma ruodh Juda nodhi Jezreel mondo one Joram wuod Ahab nikech notuo. 
2Chronicles22:7 To Nyasaye nosechano ni mondo Ahazia otho kodhi limo Joram, omiyo, kane Ahazia ni kuno, nowuok gi Joram mondo girom gi Jehu wuod Nimshi, mane Ruoth Nyasaye oyiero mondo otiek od Ahab." 
2Chronicles22:8 Kane Jehu nego jodhood Ahab, noromo gi jodong Juda kod Ahazia, monegogi." 
2Chronicles22:9 Eka nochako dwaro Ahazia, monwang’e Samaria kuma noyudo opondoe. Ne gikele ir Jehu mi ginege. Ne giyike maber, nikech ne giwacho ni en nyakwar Jehoshafat mane oluwo Ruoth Nyasaye gi chunye duto. Ne onge ng’ato e od Ahazia manyalo bedo ruoth." 
2Chronicles22:10 Kane Athalia min Ahazia oneno ni wuode osetho, nonego jood ruodh Juda duto." 
2Chronicles22:11 To Jehosheba, nyar ruodh Jehoram nogolo Joash wuod Ahazia ling’ling’ kuom yawuot ruoth mane idwaro nego, mi opande e od nindo kaachiel gi japite. Jehosheba nyar ruoth Jehoram ma chi Jehoyada jadolo, kendo ma nyamin Ahazia nopando Joash, mi Athalia ne ok onege." 
2Chronicles22:12 Joash nodak kodgi kuom higni auchiel, kopondo e Od Nyasaye, e kinde mar loch Athalia." 
2Chronicles23:1 E higa mar abiriyo, Jehoyada notimo chir motimo winjruok gi jotend ogend lweny, ma gin Azaria wuod Jehoram, gi Ishmael wuod Jehohanan, gi Azaria wuod Obed, gi Maaseya wuod Adaya, kod Elishafat wuod Zikri." 
2Chronicles23:2 Ne giwuotho e piny Juda duto ka gichoko jo-Lawi mane nie miech Juda duto, kod jodong dhout israel, mi gibiro Jerusalem." 
2Chronicles23:3 Eka joma nochokore duto notimo singruok gi ruoth e Od Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo Jehoyada nowachonigi niya, “Neuru wuod ruoth! Waketeuru ruoth kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho kuom nyikwa Daudi." 
2Chronicles23:4 Gima onego utim e ma: Un jodolo gi jo-Lawi kod jorit rangeye, pogreuru migepe adek. Migawo mokwongo mondo obi e Hekalu chieng’ Sabato. Migawo mar ariyo nyaka rit od ruoth," 
2Chronicles23:5 kendo migawo mar adek nyaka rit rangach miluongo ni Ranga Mise, to ji mamoko duto nobed e laru mar Od Ruoth Nyasaye." 
2Chronicles23:6 Jodolo gi jo-Lawi makonyogi kende ema nyalo donjo e Hekalu, nimar gin joma owal ni Ruoth Nyasaye, to ji mamoko duto kik donji kata achiel, kaluwore gi chik Ruoth Nyasaye." 
2Chronicles23:7 Jo-Lawi nyaka lwor ruoth ka girite, ka ng’ato ka ng’ato omako gilwenje e lwete. Ka ng’ato moro amora dwaro donjo e Hekalu, to negeuru. Bende kamoro amora ma ruoth dhiye, to koweuru kurite.”" 
2Chronicles23:8 Jo-Lawi gi jo-Juda duto notimo gik moko duto mana kaka Jehoyada jadolo nochikogi. Ng’ato ka ng’ato kuomgi nokelo joge mane onego a e tich chieng Sabato, kaachiel gi mago mane onego ochak tich chieng’no, nimar Jehoyada jadolo ne ok omiyo migawo moro amora thuolo mara." 
2Chronicles23:9 Nopogo ni jotend askechego tonge gi kuodi kod okumbni mane mag ruoth Daudi mane okan e Od Ruoth Nyasaye. 
2Chronicles23:10 Nochano ji duto mondo orit ruoth, ka ng’ato ka ng’ato omako gilweny e lwete, chakre yo milambo nyaka nyandwat mar Hekalu, ka giluwo kendo-mar-misango kaachiel gi Hekalu." 
2Chronicles23:11 Eka Jehoyada nogolo ruoth oko, mosidhone osimb duong’, kendo omiye kitap chik, mi gikete ruoth. Jehoyada gi yawuote nowire gi mo ka gikok niya, “Ruoth mondo odag aming’a!”" 
2Chronicles23:12 Kane Athalia owinjo mahu mar joma ringo kendo pako ruoth, nodhi e Od Ruoth Nyasaye kama ne gintie." 
2Chronicles23:13 Noneno ruoth kochung’ e bath sich ruoth e dhoot, ka tung’ ywak kendo ji wer. Ji duto ne mor kendo ne goyo tung’, ka jower otelonigi gi thum. Athalia noyiecho lepe ka kok niya, “Ujemo! Ujemo!”" 
2Chronicles23:14 Eka Jehoyada jadolo noluongo jatend askeche, mowachonigi niya, “Goleuru oko! Kik unege e Od Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo ka ng’at moro oluwe, to neguru ng’atno.”" 
2Chronicles23:15 Omiyo ne gimake, kendo kane gichopo e dhoranga dala ruoth miluongo ni Ranga Farese, ne ginege kanyo." 
2Chronicles23:16 Eka Jehoyada, kaachiel gi ji kod ruoth bende, ne josingore ni ginibed jo-Ruoth Nyasaye." 
2Chronicles23:17 Mi ji duto nodhi momuko od Baal, gi kende-mag-liswa, kod kido duto mag Baal e nyim kende-mag-liswago." 
2Chronicles23:18 Jehoyada noketo jorit e Od Ruoth Nyasaye e bwo jodolo gi jo-Lawi. Daudi nosechano jodolo gi jo-Lawi mondo orit Od Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo omiye misengni miwang’o pep, kaka ondiki e chik Musa, ka giwero wende mor kaluwore gi chik mane en owuon ogolo." 
2Chronicles23:19 Jehoyada noketo jorit e dhorangeye mag Od Ruoth Nyasaye ni kik ng’ato man gi chola donjie. 
2Chronicles23:20 Eka nodhi gi jotend askeche gi jodongo kod jotend ji kaachiel gi ji duto, kendo ne giwuok gi ruoth e Od Ruoth Nyasaye. Ne gikowe nyaka od ruoth, ka giluwo dhorangach mamalo, mi ne gikete e kom duong’ne." 
2Chronicles23:21 Kane Athalia oseneg, ji duto nobedo mamor, kendo Jerusalem nokue." 
2Chronicles24:1 Joash ne jahigni abiriyo kane odoko ruoth, morito piny kuom higni piero ang’wen, kodak Jerusalem. Min mare ne nyinge Zibia nyar Beer-sheba." 
2Chronicles24:2 Timbe Joash ne long’o e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye kuom ndalo duto mag Jehoyada jadolo. 
2Chronicles24:3 Jehoyada noyudone mon ariyo, mane onywologo yawuowi gi nyiri." 
2Chronicles24:4 Bang’ mano, Joash noketo chunye mondo olos Od Ruoth Nyasaye." 
2Chronicles24:5 Nochoko jodolo gi jo-Lawi, mowachonigi niya, “Wuothuru e miech Juda, usol pesa kuom jo-Israel duto mondo ulosgo od Nyasachu higa ka higa. Neuru ni utimo piyo.” To jo-Lawi ne ok otimo kamano." 
2Chronicles24:6 Omiyo Ruoth noluongo Jehoyada jadolo maduong’, mopenje niya, “Ang’o momiyo ok ijiw jo-Lawi mondo osol osuru kuom jo-Juda gi jo-Jerusalem? En osuru mane Musa jatich Ruoth Nyasaye oketo kuom jo-Israel mondo olosgo Hemb-Romo." 
2Chronicles24:7 Neye kaka Athalia, dhako machachno, gi yawuote, oseketho Od Nyasaye, kendo gisekawo gik moko duto mitiyogo tich Nyasaye, mi giketo ni Baal.”" 
2Chronicles24:8 Bang’e ruoth nogolo chik mondo olos sanduk, oket e dhood Hekalu mar Ruoth Nyasaye gi yo ka oko," 
2Chronicles24:9 kendo ogo milome e Juda gi Jerusalem duto mondo ji ochiw ni Ruoth Nyasaye osuru mane Musa jatich Nyasaye oketo kuom jo-Israel e thim. 
2Chronicles24:10 Mano omiyo jodongo gi ji duto nokelo osuru gi mor, ma giketo e sandugno nyaka ne gitieko." 
2Chronicles24:11 E kinde ka kinde mane jo-Lawi onenoe ka pesa ng’eny e sanduk, ne gitere ni jodong ruoth. Eka jogoro mar ruoth gi jatich jadolo maduong’ ne jobiro mondo okaw sanduk. Kane gisegolo pesa, ne gidwoko sanduk kare. Kamano e kaka ne gitimo pile pile, mi ne gichoko pesa mogundho." 
2Chronicles24:12 Ruoth kod Jehoyada nomiyo nyipeche mane rito tich loso Od Ruoth Nyasaye pesago. Jogo nondiko jogedo gi jopa bao kod joma olony e tich chuma, gi mula mondo olos Od Ruoth Nyasaye." 
2Chronicles24:13 Kamano jotich ne tiyo, kendo tich nodhi nyime malong’o e lwetgi, mi ne giloso Od Nyasaye maber kendo motegno, moloyo kaka ne en chon." 
2Chronicles24:14 Kane gisetieko tich, ne gikelo pesa modong’ ni ruoth gi Jehoyada, mi ne gilosogo tewni mag ubani gi agulini mag dhahabu gi mag fedha mondo okonyruokgo e Od Ruoth Nyasaye kuom misengni miwang’o pep, kod tije moko mag Hekalu. Ne gitimo misengni miwang’o pep e Od Ruoth Nyasaye pile pile ndalo duto mag Jehoyada." 
2Chronicles24:15 Jehoyada koro noti, kendo hike oniang’, mi notho kane en jahigni mia achiel gi piero adek." 
2Chronicles24:16 Ne oyike e dala Daudi but liete ruodhi, nikech nosetimo maber e Israel kotiyo ni Nyasaye, kendo koloso Hekalu." 
2Chronicles24:17 Kane Jehoyada osetho, jodong Juda nolondho ruoth, mi noyie luwo riekogi." 
2Chronicles24:18 Koro ji noweyo Od Ruoth Nyasaye, mi gitiyo ni sirni milamo gi nyiseche mamoko. Kethono nomiyo Nyasaye okecho kod jo-Juda gi jo-Jerusalem." 
2Chronicles24:19 Kata kamano nooronigi jonabi mondo odwokgi ire. Jonabigo nosiemogi, to ne gidagi winjo." 
2Chronicles24:20 Roho mar Nyasaye nobiro kuom Zekaria wuod Jehoyada jadolo, mi nochung’ kama oting’ore, mowacho ni ji niya, “Nyasaye owacho kama, ‘Ang’o momiyo uketho chikna, momiyo ok unyal yudo hawi? Un useweya, omiyo an bende aseweyou.’ ”" 
2Chronicles24:21 To ne giriwore ni Zekaria mi ne gigoye gi kite e laru mar Od Ruoth Nyasaye kaka ruoth nochikogi, mi otho." 
2Chronicles24:22 Kamano wi ruoth Joash nowil gi ng’wono mane Jehoyada otimone, konego Zekaria wuod Jehoyada ma notho kaywak niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye mondo one, kendo ochul kuor.”" 
2Chronicles24:23 Bang’ higa achiel jolweny ma jo-Aram nobiro monjo Joash. Ne gibiro Juda gi Jerusalem, mi ne ginego jodongo duto mag pinyno, to mwandu duto mane gikawo kuomgi ne gioro ni ruodh Damaski." 
2Chronicles24:24 Kata nobedo ni jo-Aram nobiro gi jolweny manok, Ruoth Nyasaye nochiwo oganda maduong’ mag jolweny e lwetgi, nimar jo-Juda noseweyo Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach kweregi. Kamano jo-Aram notimo gima buch Ruoth Nyasaye noseng’ado kuom Joash." 
2Chronicles24:25 Kane jo-Aram osea, ne giweyo Joash kohinyore malit. Eka jodonge noriwone nikech remb wuod Jehoyada jadolo, mi ne ginege e kitandane. Kamano e kaka notho, mi ne giyike e dala Daudi, to ok kar yiko ruodhi." 
2Chronicles24:26 Joma noriwone ne gin Zabad wuod Shimeath nyar Amon, kod Jehozabad wuod Shimrith nyar Moab." 
2Chronicles24:27 Weche mang’eny mane jonabi okoro kuome ka gisiemego, kendo kaka noloso Od Ruoth Nyasaye, kaachiel gi timbe yawuote, ondiki e kitabu monyisie weche mag Kitap Ruodhi. Amazia wuode nodoko ruoth kare." 
2Chronicles25:1 Amazia ne jahigni piero ariyo gabich kane odoko ruoth, kendo norito piny kuom higni piero ariyo gochiko, kodak Jerusalem." 
2Chronicles25:2 Timbe Amazia ne long’o e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, to ne ok otimgi gi chunye duto." 
2Chronicles25:3 Kane osegurore e tich ruoth, nonego joma nonego wuon mare mane ruoth." 
2Chronicles25:4 Ne ok onego nyithindgi, to noluwo chik mondiki e kitap Musa, kama Ruoth Nyasaye owachoe niya, “Kik uneg wuone nikech richo mag nyithindgi, bende kik uneg nyithindo nikech richo mag wuonegi, to ng’ato ka ng’ato noneg mana nikech richone owuon.”" 
2Chronicles25:5 Eka Amazia nochoko jo-Juda gi jo-Benjamin duto moketonigi jotelo madongo gi matindo kaluwore gi dhoutgi. Nokwano joma osetieko higni piero ariyo kod mosekadho kanyo, monwang’o ni gin joma ochwiny alufu mia adek moromo kedo, kendo mong’eyo diro tong’ kod ting’o okumba." 
2Chronicles25:6 Bende nondiko jo-Israel mathuondi alufu mia achiel kuom kilo alufu adek mag fedha. 
2Chronicles25:7 To ng’at Nyasaye moro nobiro ire mowachone niya, “A Ruoth, kik iwe jolweny mag jo-Israel dhi kodi nimar Ruoth Nyasaye ok ni kod jo-Israel ma jo-Efraimgi." 
2Chronicles25:8 To kiparo ni mano e kaka inyalo loyo lweny, to Nyasaye biro mana miyo wasiki loyi, nimar en ema en gi teko mar konyo kata mar wito.”" 
2Chronicles25:9 Amazia nopenjo ng’at Nyasaye niya, “To wabiro timo ang’o kuom kilo alufu adek ma asemiyo jolweny ma jo-Israel?” Ng’at Nyasaye nodwoke niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye nigi teko mar miyi moloyo mago.”" 
2Chronicles25:10 Eka Amazia noriembo jolweny mane oa Efraim, mi ne gidok miechgi ka gikecho ahinya gi jo-Juda." 
2Chronicles25:11 To Amazia notimo chir, mowuok gi jo-Juda ka gidhi holo Kado, mi ne ginego jo-Seir alufu apar kuno." 
2Chronicles25:12 Bende ne gimako ji alufu apar kangima, mi ne gitero ewi lwanda moro, kendo ne gidhirogi piny, mi githo ka gitur bonje bonje." 
2Chronicles25:13 To jolweny mane Amazia oriembo ni ok ginyal dhi kode e lweny nomwomore kuom miech Juda chakre Samaria nyaka Beth-horon, mi ne ginego ji alufu adek, kendo gipeyo gik mang’eny." 
2Chronicles25:14 Kane Amazia oa nego jo-Edom, nobiro gi nyiseche jo-Seir, moketogi ka nyisechene, kolamogi kendo owang’onigi ubani." 
2Chronicles25:15 Emomiyo Ruoth Nyasaye nokecho gi Amazia, moorone janabi moro, mopenje niya, “Ang’o momiyo igeno kuom nyiseche mag jopiny moro mane ok nyal reso joma lamogi e lweti?”" 
2Chronicles25:16 Kane pod janabino wuoyo, ruoth nopenje niya, “Waseketi jabuch ruoth koso? Ling’! Koso idwaro tho?” Mi janabi noling’ matin, to bang’e nowacho niya, “Koro ang’eyo ni Nyasaye osechano mondo otieki, nikech isedagi winjo puonjna.”" 
2Chronicles25:17 Bang’e Amazia ruodh Juda noporo wach gi joge mane ng’adone rieko, mi ooro joote ir Jehoash wuod Jehoahaz ma wuod Jehu, ruodh Israel, kowachone niya, “Bi mondo waradi.”" 
2Chronicles25:18 To Jehoash ruodh Israel nodwoko Amazia ruodh Juda gi ngero niya, “Okuro moro man Lebanon nooro wach ni yath maduong’ man Lebanon, kowachone niya, ‘Yie mondo wuoda okend nyari.’ To nopo ka le moro kadho kanyo, monyono okurono, moketho." 
2Chronicles25:19 In Amazia, iwuorori ni iseloyo jo-Edom, mi koro iwuoyo gi sunga. To ber mondo ibed mana e dala. Ang’o momiyo iero miero ma biro tieki kaachiel gi jo-Juda?”" 
2Chronicles25:20 To Amazia ne ok odewo, nimar ne en dwaro Nyasaye mondo ochiw jo-Juda e lwet wasikgi, nikech ne gigeno kuom nyiseche jo-Edom." 
2Chronicles25:21 Omiyo Jehoash ruodh Israel nodhi Beth-shemesh dala mar Juda. Nokedo gi Amazia ruodh Juda kuno," 
2Chronicles25:22 kendo jo-Israel noloyo jo-Juda, moringo nyaka miechgi." 
2Chronicles25:23 Jehoash ruodh Israel nomako Amazia wuod Joash ma wuod Ahazia, ruodh Juda, e Beth-Shemesh, modwoko Jerusalem. Nomuko bath ohinga mar Jerusalem ma borne mita mia ariyo, chakre dhoranga Efraim nyaka dhorangach kama ohinga ogomogo." 
2Chronicles25:24 Nokawo fedha gi dhahabu kod gik moko duto mane onwang’o e Od Ruoth Nyasaye mane Obed-edom rito. Nokawo bende mwandu mag od ruoth, kaachiel gi ji moko, motueyo ka gir singo. Eka nodok Samaria." 
2Chronicles25:25 Amazia wuod Joash ruodh Juda nodak higni apar gabich bang’ tho Jehoash wuod Jehoahaz, ruodh Israel." 
2Chronicles25:26 Chakruok timbe Amazia nyaka gikogi, ondiki e Kitap Ruodhi mag Juda gi Israel." 
2Chronicles25:27 Chakre ndalo mane Amazia oweyoe Ruoth Nyasaye, jo-Jerusalem moko nojame, mi noringo nyaka Lakish. To ne gilawe, mi ginege kuno." 
2Chronicles25:28 Ne giting’o ringre gi farese, ka gidwoko e dala Daudi, mi noyike but kwerene." 
2Chronicles26:1 Jo-Juda duto noketo Uzia ruoth kar Amazia wuon mare, ka en jahigni apar gauchiel." 
2Chronicles26:2 Kane wuon mare osetho, nokawo dala mar Elath modwoko ni jo-Juda, eka nochiele gi ohinga." 
2Chronicles26:3 Uzia ne jahigni apar gauchiel kane odoko ruoth, morito piny kuom higni piero abich gariyo, kodak Jerusalem. Min mare ne nyinge Jekolia nyar Jerusalem." 
2Chronicles26:4 Timbe Uzia ne long’o e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye mana kaka timbe Amazia wuon mare. 
2Chronicles26:5 Noketo chunye kuom luwo Nyasaye e ndalo Zekaria, jal mane opuonje luoro Nyasaye, kendo ndalo duto mane oluwoe Ruoth Nyasaye, noyudo gueth." 
2Chronicles26:6 Uzia nodhi kedo gi jo-Filistia, momuko ohinga mar Gath gi mar Jabne kod mar Ashdod. Nogero mier e gweng’ Ashdod kod kuonde moko e piny Filistia." 
2Chronicles26:7 Nyasaye nokonye loyo jo-Filistia, gi jo-Arabu mane odak Gur-baal, kod jo-Meun." 
2Chronicles26:8 Uzia noketo ni jo-Amon osuru, kendo humbe nolak nyaka mbap Misri, nimar nosedoko ruoth maduong’ ahinya." 
2Chronicles26:9 Nogero kuonde maboyo mag ng’icho e Jerusalem e dhorangach kama ohinga ogomogo, gi e dhoranga Hoho, kod e giko ohinga, moketoe gilweny." 
2Chronicles26:10 E thim bende nogeroe kuonde maboyo mag siro lweny, kendo nokunyo yewni mang’eny, nimar ne en gi jamni mathoth e piny gode kendo e piny pap, bende ne en gi jopur gi jopith mzabibu mane tiyone e gode kod kuonde momew, nikech nohero pur." 
2Chronicles26:11 Uzia ne nigi joma oikore ni lweny, mopog e migepe kaka Jeyel jagoro gi Maaseya jatelo nosechano. Achiel kuom jotend lweny mag ruoth ma nyinge Hanania ema noritogi." 
2Chronicles26:12 Kar romb jodong dhoudi mane thuondi mager wuokie ne alufu ariyo gii mia auchiel. 
2Chronicles26:13 Ne gin jotend jolweny marateke alufu mia adek gabiriyo gi mia abich (307,500) ma dikony ruoth kedo gi wasike." 
2Chronicles26:14 Uzia noiko ni jolweny kuodi gi tong’ gi ogute kod akor mag chuma, gi atunge gi kite midiro gorujre." 
2Chronicles26:15 Noloso masinde midirogo aserni gi kite madongo mane joma riek ofwenyo, moketo kuonde maboyo mag ng’icho, kod kuonde ma ohinga ogomogo e Jerusalem. Humbe nolak malach ahinya, kendo nodoko motegno nikech Ruoth Nyasaye nokonye miwuoro." 
2Chronicles26:16 Kane Uzia osedoko motegno kamano, nobedo jasunga mi okethore. Nochayo Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasache, modonjo ei Hekalu mar Ruoth Nyasaye mondo owang’ ubani e kendo-mar-ubani." 
2Chronicles26:17 To Azaria jadolo, kaachiel gi jodolo mamoko mag Ruoth Nyasaye piero aboro ma jochir noluwe mondo okwere," 
2Chronicles26:18 ka giwachone niya, “Wang’o ubani ni Ruoth Nyasaye ok en tiji, Uzia, to en tich jodolo ma nyikwa Harun, mowal ni tijno. Aye Kama Ler! Iketho! Ruoth Nyasaye nyalo kumi nikech wachni.”" 
2Chronicles26:19 To Uzia nokecho. Noyudo ka en gi tap mach e lwete, mondo owang’ie ubani. To kane mirima omake gi jodolo kamano, dhoho notuch e lela wang’e e nyim jodolo e Od Ruoth Nyasaye but kendo-mar-ubani." 
2Chronicles26:20 Kane Azaria jadolo maduong’ gi jodolo duto orange, ne gineno dhoho e lela wang’e, mi gigole oko mapiyo. To en bende noreto mondo owuogi, nimar Ruoth Nyasaye nosechwade." 
2Chronicles26:21 Ruoth Uzia nobedo jadhoho nyaka chieng’ thone, emomiyo nodak e ot kar kende, kendo ne ok oyiene donjo e Od Ruoth Nyasaye. Jotham wuode nobedo jatend od ruoth, kendo norito piny." 
2Chronicles26:22 Chakruok weche Uzia nyaka gikogi, Isaya janabi wuod Amoz ema nondiko." 
2Chronicles26:23 Uzia notho, moyike but kwerene e paw liete ruodhi, to ok e lietegi hie, nimar ne en jadhoho. Jotham wuode nodoko ruoth kare." 
2Chronicles27:1 Jotham ne jahigni piero ariyo gabich kane odoko ruoth, morito piny kuom higni apar gauchiel, kodak Jerusalem. Min mare ne nyinge Jerusha nyar Zadok." 
2Chronicles27:2 Timbe Jotham ne long’o e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, kaka timbe Uzia wuon mare, kendo en ne ok odonjo e Hekalu kaka wuon mare nodonjo. To timbe ji ne pod richo." 
2Chronicles27:3 Jotham nogero dhorangach mamalo mar Od Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo notiyo ahinya kuom gero ohinga mar Ofel." 
2Chronicles27:4 Bende nogero mier e piny gode mag Juda gi kuonde maboyo mag ng’icho kod mag siro lweny e gode motimo bunge. 
2Chronicles27:5 Nokedo gi ruodh jo-Amon, mi oloyo. E higano jo-Amon nomiye kilo alufu ang’wen mag fedha, gi gunde alufu apar mag ngano, kod gunde alufu apar mag shairi. Ne gimedo miye kamano e higa mar ariyo kod mar adek." 
2Chronicles27:6 Kamano Jotham nobedo gi teko, nikech timbene ne long’o e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasache." 
2Chronicles27:7 Koro weche moko mag Jotham, gi lwenjene, kod timbene duto, ondiki e kitap Weche mag Ndalo mag Ruodhi mag Israel gi Juda." 
2Chronicles27:8 Ne en jahigni piero ariyo gabich kane odoko ruoth, morito piny kuom higni apar gauchiel, kodak Jerusalem." 
2Chronicles27:9 Notho moluwo kwerene, mi noyike e dala Daudi. Ahaz wuode nodoko ruoth kare." 
2Chronicles28:1 Ahaz ne jahigni piero ariyo kane odoko ruoth, morito piny kuom higni apar gauchiel, kodak Jerusalem. To timbene ne ok long’o e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye kaka timbe Daudi kwar mare ne long’o." 
2Chronicles28:2 Noluwo timbe maricho mag ruodhi mag Israel, mothedho koda ka kido mag Baal." 
2Chronicles28:3 Nowang’o ubani e holo mar Ben-hirom, kendo nowang’o yawuote ka misango, koluwo timbe makuero mag ogendini mane Ruoth Nyasaye oriembo mondo owe thuolo ni jo-Israel." 
2Chronicles28:4 Bende notimo misengni, kendo nowang’o ubani e hembko, gi ewi gode, kod e tiend yath moro amora motimo otiep." 
2Chronicles28:5 Emomiyo Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasache ne ochiwe e lwet ruodh Aram, mi oloye, kendo omako joge mang’eny, motero Damaski. Bang’e Ruoth Nyasaye nochiwe e lwet ruodh Israel ma bende noloye, monego joge oyokre." 
2Chronicles28:6 Odiechieng’no, Peka wuod Ramalia nonego jo-Juda ma thuondi mia achiel gi piero ariyo. Ne ologi nikech ne giseweyo Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach kweregi." 
2Chronicles28:7 Zikri thwon Efraim nonego Maaseya wuod ruoth, gi Azkiram jaduong’ od ruoth, kod Elkana jalup ruoth." 
2Chronicles28:8 Jo-Israel nomako owetegi alufu mia ariyo, (200,000) kaachiel gi mondgi gi nyithindgi machwo kod manyiri. Bende ne giyako mwandugi mang’eny ma gitero Samaria." 
2Chronicles28:9 To noyudo ka janabi mar Ruoth Nyasaye ni kuno ma nyinge Oded. Nodhi romo ni jolweny mane dok Samaria, mowachonigi niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach kwereu nochiwo jo-Juda e lwetu nimar nokecho kodgi, to un koro usenegogi achadha marach, mi wachno osetundo e polo." 
2Chronicles28:10 To eka pod udwaro ni mondo jo-Juda gi jo-Jerusalem machwo gi mamon obed wasumbni mau! Un uwegi donge un gi ketho e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu? 
2Chronicles28:11 Koro winjuru! Weuru oweteu mane umako odhi, nimar Ruoth Nyasaye chiegni kecho kodu.”" 
2Chronicles28:12 Azaria wuod Johanan gi Berekia wuod Meshilemoth gi Jehizkia wuod Shalum kod Amasa wuod Hadlai ma jodong Efraim bende nodhi romo ni joma ne a e lweny," 
2Chronicles28:13 mokwerogi, kawachonigi niya, “Ok unyal kelo joma omaki kaeni, nimar kutimo kamano, to ubiro miyo waketho e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, kwamedo richo ewi mago mane wasetimo. Kethowa osebedo mang’eny ahinya, omiyo Ruoth Nyasaye okecho malich gi jo-Israel.”" 
2Chronicles28:14 Kane jolweny owinjo wechego, ne gigonyo joma omaki, kendo ne gidwoko gik mane oyaki, ka jodongo gi joma nochokore neno." 
2Chronicles28:15 Mi joma nyinggi oseluongigo nokonyo joma omaki, kamiyo joma ne ni duge nengni mogol kuom gik moyaki. Ne gichiwonigi lewni kod wuoche, kendo ne gimiyogi chiemo, bende ne giwirogi gi mo. Ne giting’o jogo duto moyomno gi kenje, ka giterogi kuom jowetegi Jeriko, dala mar othidhe. Bang’e ne gidok Samaria." 
2Chronicles28:16 E kindeno ruoth Ahaz nokwayo ruodh Asuria mondo okonye," 
2Chronicles28:17 nikech jo-Edom noseduogo momonjo jo-Juda, mi oloyo, kendo omako ji mang’eny." 
2Chronicles28:18 Jo-Filistia bende nosemonjo miech Juda manie piny pap kod manie thim. Ne gikawo Beth-shemesh gi Aijalon gi Gederoth kod Soko gi Timna gi Gimzo kod mier mokiewo kodgi, mi gidakie." 
2Chronicles28:19 Ruoth Nyasaye nothiro jo-Juda nikech Ahaz ruodhgi notimo timbe machach e Juda, koweyo Ruoth Nyasaye." 
2Chronicles28:20 Tiglath-pileser ruodh Asuria nobiro ir Ahaz, to kar konye, to nomonje." 
2Chronicles28:21 Emomiyo Ahaz nokawo gik moko e Od Ruoth Nyasaye gi od ruoth kod ut jodongo, momiyo ruodh Asuria kaka osuru, to mano ne ok okonye." 
2Chronicles28:22 To Ahaz achielni nomedo ketho ni Ruoth Nyasaye e ndalo mar chandruokne," 
2Chronicles28:23 nikech notimo liswa ni nyiseche mag jo-Damaski mane oyudo oseloye. Nowacho niya, “Abiro golo liswa ni nyiseche mag ruodhi Aram, mondo okonya kaka ne gikonyo ruodh Aram.” To ne gimiyo othirno kaachiel gi jo-Juda duto." 
2Chronicles28:24 Bende Ahaz nochoko gik lemo mag Od Nyasaye, mong’ado ong’ado. Noloro dhout Hekalu mar Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo nogero kende-mag-liswa kuonde duto e Jerusalem." 
2Chronicles28:25 Noloso hembko e mier duto mag Juda mondo owang’ie ubani ni nyiseche manono, kokwinyogo Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach kwerene." 
2Chronicles28:26 Chakruok weche Ahaz nyaka gikogi, kaachiel gi timbene duto, ondiki e Kitap Ruodhi mag Juda gi Israel." 
2Chronicles28:27 Ahaz notho, moluwo kwerene, mi noyike Jerusalem, to ok e liete ruodhi Israel. Hezekia wuode nodoko ruoth kare." 
2Chronicles29:1 Hezekia ne jahigni piero ariyo gabich kane odoko ruoth, morito piny kuom higni piero ariyo gochiko, kodak Jerusalem. Min mare ne nyinge Abija nyar Zekaria." 
2Chronicles29:2 Timbe Hezekia ne long’o e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, kaka timbe Daudi kwar mare." 
2Chronicles29:3 E due mokwongo mar higa mane ochakoe lochne, noyawo dhout Hekalu mar Ruoth Nyasaye, moloso." 
2Chronicles29:4 Noluongo jodolo gi jo-Lawi, mochoko e laru ma yo wuokchieng’," 
2Chronicles29:5 mi nowachonigi niya, “Winjuru un jo-Lawi! Pwodhreuru, kendo upwodh Od Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach kwereu, kugolo chilo man Kama Ler." 
2Chronicles29:6 Kwerewa noweyo Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachwa kane gitimo timbe maricho e nyime. Ne giweye, mi gilokone ng’egi, kendo kata mana kar dakne, ne ok gidwar neno." 
2Chronicles29:7 Bende ne ginego teyni, mi giloro dhout agola, kendo ne giweyo wang’o ubani kata timo misengni miwang’o pep ni Nyasach Israel e Hekalu." 
2Chronicles29:8 Emomiyo Ruoth Nyasaye nokecho, moloko jo-Juda gi Jerusalem gima lich miwuoro, mabwogo ji, kendo michicho, kaka uneno uwegi." 
2Chronicles29:9 Mano emomiyo wuonewa notho e lweny, kendo yawuotwa gi nyiwa kod mondwa oseter kuma bor e tuech." 
2Chronicles29:10 Koro adwaro singora ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel ni wanamak chikne, mondo chunye olend kuom mirima mager ma en go kodwa." 
2Chronicles29:11 Un nyithinda, kik koro umalru, nimar Ruoth Nyasaye oseyierou mondo uti e nyime ka jodolone, kutimone misengni.”" 
2Chronicles29:12 Eka Mahath wuod Amasai gi Joel wuod Azaria ma joka Kohath, kod Kish wuod Abdi gi Azaria wuod Jahalel ma joka Merari, kod Joa wuod Zima gi Eden wuod Joa ma joka Gershon," 
2Chronicles29:12 Eka Mahath wuod Amasai gi Joel wuod Azaria ma joka Kohath, kod Kish wuod Abdi gi Azaria wuod Jahalel ma joka Merari, kod Joa wuod Zima gi Eden wuod Joa ma joka Gershon," 
2Chronicles29:13 kod Shimri gi Jeuel ma joka Elizafan, kod Zekaria gi Matania ma joka Asaf," 
2Chronicles29:14 kod Jehuel gi Shimei ma joka Heman, kod Shemaya gi Uziel ma joka Jeduthun, ma duto jo-Lawi," 
2Chronicles29:15 nochoko jowetegi kaachiel. Ne gipwodhore giduto, eka ne gidonjo e Od Ruoth Nyasaye, mi gilose kaka ruoth nochikogi e nying Ruoth Nyasaye." 
2Chronicles29:16 Jodolo nodonjo e ot ma iye mar Hekalu mondo gilosi. Ne gigolo chilo duto mane giyudo e Od Ruoth Nyasaye, mi giketo e laru mar Hekalu, eka jo-Lawi nokawo chilono, motero e aora Kidron." 
2Chronicles29:17 Ne gichako tich loso hekalu chieng’ mokwongo mar due mokwongo, mi ne gichopo e agoch Hekalu chieng’ mar aboro mar dueno. Eka ne giloso Od Ruoth Nyasaye kuom ndalo aboro moko, mi ne gitieko tich chieng’ mar apar gauchiel mar due mokwongono." 
2Chronicles29:18 Bang’e ne gidhi ir ruoth Hezekia e ode, mi giwachone niya, “Waseloso Od Ruoth Nyasaye duto, kaachiel gi kendo-mar-misango, kod mesa mar makati miketo e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye pile, kaachiel gi gik lemo duto." 
2Chronicles29:19 Bende gik moko duto mane ruoth Ahaz owito e ndalo lochne kane oweyo Ruoth Nyasaye, waseiko mwapwodho, kendo koro waseketogi e nyim kendo-mar-misango mar Ryuoth Nyasaye.”" 
2Chronicles29:20 Kinyne Hezekia nochiew gokinyi mang’ich, moluongo jodong Jerusalem kanyakla, mi gidhi e Od Ruoth Nyasaye." 
2Chronicles29:21 Ne gikelo ruedhi abiriyo gi rombe abiriyo gi nyirombe abiriyo kod nyuogi abiriyo, mondo gitimgo misango mar golo richo mag dhood joka ruoth gi mag jodolo kod mag jo-Juda duto. Nochiko jodolo ma nyikwa Harun mondo otim kodgi misango e kendo-mar-misango mar Ruoth Nyasaye." 
2Chronicles29:22 Omiyo noyang’ ruedhi gi imbe kod nyirombe, kendo rembgi nomi jodolo, moolo e kendo-mar-misango." 
2Chronicles29:23 Eka nokel nyuogi mag misango mar golo richo e nyim Ruoth gi joma ochokore, mi ne giketo lwetgi kuomgi." 
2Chronicles29:24 Bang’e jodolo noyang’ogi mi gitimo misango mar golo richo kod rembgi e kendo-mar-misango mondo ochulgo richo mag jo-Israel duto. Ne gitimo kamano nikech ruoth nochiko mondo otim misango miwang’o pep, kod misango mar golo richo, mondo opwodhgo richo mag jo-Israel duto." 
2Chronicles29:25 Hezekia noketo jo-Lawi e Od Ruoth Nyasaye, momiyogi thumbe mopogore opogore, kaluwore gi chik Daudi, gi mar Gad janen mar ruoth, kod mar Nathan janabi. Chik mane jonabi ogolono noa kuom Ruoth Nyasaye." 
2Chronicles29:26 Kane jo-Lawi oseikore gi thumbe mane Daudi oloso, kendo jodolo bende oikore gi tungegi," 
2Chronicles29:27 Hezekia nogolo chik mondo otim misango miwang’o pep e kendo-mar-misango. Kane jodolo ochako timo misango miwang’o pepno, jo-Lawi bende nochako wer, kendo ne gigoyo tung’ kaachiel gi thumbe mane Daudi ruodh Israel oloso." 
2Chronicles29:28 Joma nochokore duto nolamo Nyasaye, ka jower wer, kendo jogo tung’ goyo tungegi. Mano nodhi nyime nyaka misango miwang’o pep norumo." 
2Chronicles29:29 Eka ruoth kod ji duto mane ni kode nokulore, kalamo Ruoth Nyasaye." 
2Chronicles29:30 Bang’e ruoth Hezekia kod jodonge nochiko jo-Lawi mondo opak Ruoth Nyasaye gi wende mane Daudi kod Asaf janen ochwogo. Ne giwer gi mor, kendo ne gikulore ka gilamo Ruoth Nyasaye." 
2Chronicles29:31 Eka Hezekia nowacho niya, “Kaka usechiworu ni Ruoth Nyasaye, koro keluru misengni mag erokamano e Od Ruoth Nyasaye.” Mi joma nochokore nokelo misengni mag erokamano." 
2Chronicles29:32 Gik mane okel mondo otimgo misango miwang’o pep, ne gin ruedhi piero abiriyo, gi imbe mia achiel, kod nyirombe mia ariyo. Mago duto nochiw mondo otimgo misango miwang’o pep ni Ruoth Nyasaye." 
2Chronicles29:33 To mago mane okel ni mondo otimgo misengni mag erokamano ne ruedhi mia auchiel gi rombe alufu adek. 
2Chronicles29:34 Jodolo ne nok ahinya, mane ok nyal yang’o jamni mitimogo misengni miwang’o pep, emomiyo jowetegi ma jo-Lawi nokonyogi tich nyaka jodolo moko notieko pwodhore. Jo-Lawi ne jokinda kuom tich pwodhruokgi moloyo jodolo." 
2Chronicles29:35 Ewi tich timo misengnigo ne nitie bende tich dolo mar wang’o bor mag misengni mag erokamano, kaachiel gi misengni miolo piny kuom misengni miwang’o pep. Kamano e kaka tich Od Ruoth Nyasaye nodwok kare," 
2Chronicles29:36 Hezekia gi joge duto ne mor nikech gima Nyasaye nosetimonigi, nimar gino nitimore apoya." 
2Chronicles30:1 Hezekia nooro joote ir jo-Israel gi jo-Juda duto, kendo nondiko barupe bende ni jo-Efraim gi jo-Manase koluongogi ni mondo gibi Jerusalem e Od Ruoth Nyasaye mondo gitim Sap Pasaka ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel." 
2Chronicles30:2 Ruoth noseporo wach gi jodonge kod jobura duto man Jerusalem ni mondo gitim Pasaka e due mar ariyo. 
2Chronicles30:3 Ne ok ginyal time e ndalo monego timee, nimar jodolo ne pok opwodhore mang’eny moromo, to ji bende ne pok ochokore Jerusalem." 
2Chronicles30:4 Wachni ne ber ni ruoth kod jobura duto. 
2Chronicles30:5 Kamano ne ging’ado bura mondo ogo milome e Israel duto, chakre Beer-sheba, yo milambo nyaka Dan, yo nyandwat, mondo ji obi Jerusalem otim Pasaka ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel, nikech ji ne pok otime mang’eny kaka chik dwaro." 
2Chronicles30:6 Omiyo joote nodhi e piny Israel gi Juda duto, kaka ruoth nochiko, ka gitero barupe moa kuom ruoth gi jodonge, mondikie niya, “Un jo-Israel mosetony e lwet ruodhi mag Asuria, koro duoguru ir Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Ibrahim gi Isaka kod Israel, mondo en bende oduog iru." 
2Chronicles30:7 Kik uchal gi kwereu kod oweteu mane oweyo ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach kweregi, momiyo noweyogi ma gikethore chuth kaka uneno." 
2Chronicles30:8 Koro kik utim wichteko kaka kwereu notimo, to chiwreuru ni Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo udonj e Hekalu, ma Ruoth Nyasaye oseguedho mondo obed mare nyakachieng’. Tiuru ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu, mondo chunye olend kuom mirima mager ma en go kodu." 
2Chronicles30:9 Kuduogo kuom Ruoth Nyasaye, eka oweteu gi nyithindu noyud ng’wono kuom joma nomakogi, mi giniduogi e pinyni, nimar Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu ng’won, kendo jamiwafu, omiyo ka uduogo kuome, to ok noloknu ng’eye.”" 
2Chronicles30:10 Kamano joote nodhi e dala ka dala e piny Efraim gi Manase duto nyaka Zebulun, to ji nonyierogi anyiera ka charogi." 
2Chronicles30:11 Mak mana jomoko manok ma chunygi muol ema noa Asher gi Manase kod Zebulun, mobiro Jerusalem." 
2Chronicles30:12 To piny Juda ema ne Nyasaye otiyoe gi teko, momiyogi chuny achiel mar winjo wachne kaka ruoth gi jodonge nochikogi." 
2Chronicles30:13 Omiyo ji mang’eny nochokore Jerusalem e due mar ariyo, mondo gitim Sap Makati maduong’ miwuoro." 
2Chronicles30:14 Ne gigolo kende-mag-liswa duto mane ni Jerusalem, kaachiel gi kende miwang’oe ubani, mi giwito e holo Kidron." 
2Chronicles30:15 Ne ginego nyarombo mar Pasaka chieng’ due apar gang’wen mar due mar ariyo. Jodolo gi jo-Lawi noyudo wichkuot, omiyo ne gipwodhore mi gikelo misengni miwang’o pep e Od Ruoth Nyasaye." 
2Chronicles30:16 Ne gikawo keregi e tich, kaluwore gi chik Musa ng’at Nyasaye, kendo jodolo nokiro remo mane jo-Lawi ogamonigi." 
2Chronicles30:17 Ne nitie ji mang’eny e chokruok mane pok opwodhore, omiyo jo-Lawi nonego nyarombo mar Pasaka ni ng’ato ka ng’ato mane ok ler, mondo opwodhe ni Ruoth Nyasaye." 
2Chronicles30:18 Adieri, ji mathoth, ma ng’enygi noa Efraim gi Manase gi Isakar kod Zebulun, ne pok opwodhore, to kata kamano ne gichamo Pasaka, ka ok giluwo chik. To Hezekia nokwayonigi kawacho niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye mang’won, ma Nyasach kwerewa, mondo ong’won ni ng’ato ka ng’ato" 
2Chronicles30:19 moketo chunye kuome, kata obedo ni ng’atno ok opwodhore kaka chik Hekalu dwaro.”" 
2Chronicles30:20 Mi Ruoth Nyasaye nowinjo kwayo Hezekia moweyo ni ji kethogi. 
2Chronicles30:21 Jo-Israel mane ni Jerusalem notimo Sap Makati ma ok ketie Thowi gi mor maduong’ kuom ndalo abiriyo, kendo jo-Lawi gi jodolo ne pako Ruoth Nyasaye odiechieng’ kodiechieng’, ka giwerne gi tekogi duto." 
2Chronicles30:22 Hezekia nopako jo-Lawi duto, nimar ne gitiyo ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach kweregi." 
2Chronicles30:23 Eka joma nochokorego duto noyie ni mondo gimed timo sawo kuom ndalo abiriyo moko, mi ne gitimo kamano gi mor." 
2Chronicles30:24 Hezekia ruodh Juda nomiyogi ruedhi alufu achiel gi rombe alufu abiriyo mondo gitimgo misango, to jodongo nochiwo ruedhi alufu achiel gi rombe alufu apar. Mi jodolo mang’eny ahinya nopwodhore." 
2Chronicles30:25 Joma nochokore duto mane oa Juda, kod jodolo gi jo-Lawi, kaachiel gi ji mane oa Israel kod jodak manie Israel gi Juda ne jobedo gi mor maduong’." 
2Chronicles30:26 Kamano ne nitie mor maduong’ ahinya Jerusalem, nimar chakre ndalo Solomon wuod Daudi ruodh Israel, gimoro machal kamano ne pok otimore Jerusalem." 
2Chronicles30:27 Jodolo gi jo-Lawi noguedho joma nochokore, mi Nyasaye nowinjogi, ka lemogi otundo kar dakne e polo." 
2Chronicles31:1 Kane mago duto oserumo, jo-Israel duto mane osechokore Jerusalem nodhi e miech Juda. Ne gimuko sirni milamo mag kite gi mag yien, gi ut lemo mag hembko, kod kende-mag-liswa e piny Juda gi Benjamin kod Efraim gi Manase, nyaka ne gitieko kethogi duto te. Eka jo-Israel duto nodok e miechgi." 
2Chronicles31:2 Bang’e Hezekia nopogo jodolo gi jo-Lawi e migepe mopogore opogore, kaka tichgi nobet. Moko noketo mondo otim misengni miwang’o pep, to moko misengni mag sawo, kendo moko mondo orit dhorangeye mag Od Ruoth Nyasaye, to moko mondo ogo erokamano kendo opak Ruoth Nyasaye gi wer." 
2Chronicles31:3 Ruoth ne golo kuom mwandune owuon gik mitimogo misengni miwang’o pep okinyi godhiambo, kod miwang’o e ndalo mag Sabato, kendo ka due opor, kendo e ndalo mag sewni moketi, kaka ondiki e chik Ruoth Nyasaye." 
2Chronicles31:4 Bende nochiko joma nodak Jerusalem mondo ochiw ni jodolo gi jo-Lawi pokgi, mondo gichiwre ni chopo chik Ruoth Nyasaye." 
2Chronicles31:5 Kane wachni oselandore e piny, jo-Israel nochiwo cham ma gikwongo kayo, gi divai ma gikwongo loso, gi mor zeituni mokwongo nyak, gi mor kich, kod gik moko mag puodho, kendo ji mang’eny nokelo achiel kuom apar mag gik moko duto." 
2Chronicles31:6 Jo-Juda gi jo-Israel mane odak e miech Juda nokelo achiel kuom apar mar dhok gi rombe bende, kod gik mosechiw ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachgi, mi ne giketogi pidhe pidhe." 
2Chronicles31:7 Ne gichako dhuro pidhego e due mar adek, kendo ne gitieko dhurogi e due mar abiriyo." 
2Chronicles31:8 Kane Hezekia gi jodonge obiro moneno pidhego, ne gipako Ruoth Nyasaye gi joge Israel bende." 
2Chronicles31:9 Eka Hezekia nopenjo jodolo gi jo-Lawi wach pidhego," 
2Chronicles31:10 mi Azaria jadolo maduong’, ma jadhood Zadok, nodwoke niya, “Nyaka ne gichak kelo chiwo e Od Ruoth Nyasaye, wasechiemo mwayieng’, kendo chiemo mang’eny pod odong’, nimar Ruoth Nyasaye oseguedho joge. Mano emomiyo wadong’ gi chiemo mang’enygi.”" 
2Chronicles31:11 Eka Hezekia nochikogi mondo gilos kuonde keno e Od Ruoth Nyasaye. Kane gisetimo kamano," 
2Chronicles31:12 ne gikano chiwo mag achiel kuom apar, kod gik mochiw ni Ruoth Nyasaye kaka nochikgi. Konania ja-Lawi ne jarit maduong’ mar gigo, kendo Shimei omin mare nobedo jalupne," 
2Chronicles31:13 to ruoth Hezekia gi Azaria jaduong’ Hekalu noketo Jehiel gi Azazia gi Nathan gi Azahel gi Jerimoth gi Jozabad gi Eliel gi Ismakia gi Mahath kod Benaya mondo okonygi. 
2Chronicles31:14 Koreh wuod Imna ja-Lawi ma jarit dhorangach ma yo wuok chieng’ norito gik ma ji chiwo ni Nyasaye kuom herogi. Tichne ne en pogo ni jodolo gik mochiw ni Ruoth Nyasaye, kod chiwo maler moloyo." 
2Chronicles31:15 Eden gi Miniamin gi Jeshua gi Shemaya gi Amaria kod Shekania ne konyo Koreh gi kinda, ka gidak e miech jodolo. Ne gipogo gik moko ni owetegi madongo gi matindo duto te," 
2Chronicles31:16 mosetieko higni adek, mak mana joma chwo ma nyinggi nosechan ema ne ok pognigi gimoro, nikech ne giyudo pokgi pile, ka gidhi e Od Ruoth Nyasaye mondo giti tichgi e migepegi." 
2Chronicles31:17 Jodolo nochan kaluwore gi dhoutgi, to jo-Lawi mosetieko higni piero ariyo nochan kaluwore gi tichgi." 
2Chronicles31:18 Jodolo nochan kaachiel gi mondgi kod nyithindgi machwo gi manyiri duto, nimar ne gitimo kinda kuom bedo joma kare e nyim Nyasaye." 
2Chronicles31:19 Noyier ji moko e mier mopogore opogore mondo opog gik moko ni jodolo ma nyikwa Harun mane odak oko e puothe man but miechgi madongo, kendo ni jo-Lawi duto ma nyinggi osechan." 
2Chronicles31:20 Kamano e kaka Hezekia notimo e piny Juda duto. Timbene ne beyo e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasache, kendo ne ok oweye." 
2Chronicles31:21 Tije duto ma notimo e Od Nyasaye notimo koluwo chik, kendo kodwaro Nyasaye gi chunye duto, mi noyudo gueth." 
2Chronicles32:1 Kata obedo ni Hezekia nosetiyo ni Nyasaye maber kamano, Senakerib ruodh Asuria, nobiro momonjo jo-Juda, kendo nolworo miechgi mochiel gi ohinga ni mondo okaw." 
2Chronicles32:2 Kane Hezekia oneno ni Senakerib ruodh Asuria osebiro mondo omonj Jerusalem," 
2Chronicles32:3 noporo wach gi joge kod joma rateke ni mondo odin sokni mane chiegni gi Jerusalem, mi ne gikonye timo kamano." 
2Chronicles32:4 Ji mang’eny nochokore, mi ne gidino sokni gi aore mane mol kanyo, ka giwacho niya, “Onge gimomiyo ruodhi Asuria onego oyud pi mang’eny kama ka gibiro ka.”" 
2Chronicles32:5 Hezekia noketo chunye moloso ohinga kuonde duto momukore, kendo nomedo geroe kuonde maboyo mag ng’icho. Nogero ohinga machielo molworo mokwongono, kendo noloso Milo mane nie dala Daudi mondo obed motegno. Bende noloso gilweny kod okumbni mogundho." 
2Chronicles32:6 Noketo jodong lweny mondo otel ni ji, mi noluongogi ire e laru manie dhorangach. Eka notego chunygi kowachonigi niya," 
2Chronicles32:7 “Jiwreuru kendo timuru chir. Kik uluor ruodh Asuria, kendo oganda lweny maduong’ mobirogo kik bwogu, nimar Jal makonyowa tek moloyo jal makonye." 
2Chronicles32:8 Teko mar dhano ema en go, to wan, Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachwa ema konyowa, kendo kedo lwenjewa.” Kane ji owinjo weche Hezekia ruodh Juda, ne gitimo chir." 
2Chronicles32:9 Bang’ mano Senakerib ruodh Asuria mane oyudo olworo Lakish kod ogandane duto mag lweny, nooro joote Jerusalem ir Hezekia ruodh Juda gi jo-Juda duto ma nodak kuno, kowacho niya," 
2Chronicles32:10 “Senakerib ruodh Asuria owacho kama: Ugeno kuom ang’o momiyo uhedhoru mondo uked kodwa kwamonjo Jerusalem? 
2Chronicles32:11 Ok upar ni Hezekia witou mondo kech gi riyo onegu kowachonu ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu biro resou e lwet ruodh Asuria? 
2Chronicles32:12 Donge Hezekia achielni osegolo hembko man kuonde moting’ore gi kende duto mag misango mag Ruoth Nyasaye, kochiko jo-Juda gi jo-Jerusalem niya, ‘Unulam e nyim kendo-mar-misango achiel kende, kendo wi kendono ema unuwang’ie misengini mau?’" 
2Chronicles32:13 Donge ung’eyo gik mwasetimo gi kwerewa ni jopinje moko? Bende nyiseche jopinjego duto ne nyalo resogi e lweta adier? 
2Chronicles32:14 Kuom nyiseche duto mag ogendini mane kwerena otieko chuth, ere moro mane nyalo reso joge e lweta, momiyo ugeno ni Nyasachu dinyal resou?" 
2Chronicles32:15 Omiyo koro kik uyie Hezekia wuondu kendo witu kamano, bende kik uyie wechene, nimar onge nyasach oganda moro kata piny moro amora mane nyalo reso joge e lweta kata e lwet kwerena. To koro ere kaka Nyasachu diresu e lweta?”" 
2Chronicles32:16 Jootene nomedo wuoyo marach kuom Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo kuom Hezekia jatichne." 
2Chronicles32:17 Bende Senakerib nondiko barupe mojarogo Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel kowuoyo marach kuome niya, “Kaka nyiseche mag jopinjego ne ok nyal resogi e lweta, e kaka Nyasach Hezekia bende ok nores joge e lweta.”" 
2Chronicles32:18 Jootego nowacho kamano ni jo-Jerusalem mane ni ewi ohinga, ka gikok gi duol maduong’ gi dho jo-Juda mondo obwoggi kendo omigi luoro, eka mondo gikaw dalano." 
2Chronicles32:19 Ne giwuoyo kuom Nyasach Jerusalem mana kaka ne giwuoyo kuom nyiseche mag jopinje mamoko molos gi lwet dhano. 
2Chronicles32:20 Omiyo ruoth Hezekia kod Isaya janabi ma wuod Amoz nolemo ka ywak ni Nyasaye. 
2Chronicles32:21 Eka Ruoth Nyasaye nooro malaika e kambi mar ruodh Asuria, motieko thuondi gi jodongo kod jotend jolweny duto. Omiyo nodok e pinye ka en gi wichkuot. To kane odonjo e od nyasache, yawuote moko nonege kanyo." 
2Chronicles32:22 Kamano Ruoth Nyasaye noreso Hezekia gi jo-Jerusalem e lwet Senakerib ruodh Asuria kendo e lwet wasike duto, mi nomiyogi kue e mbapgi duto." 
2Chronicles32:23 Ji mang’eny nobiro Jerusalem, ka gikelo ni Ruoth Nyasaye mich, kendo Hezekia ruodh Juda bende ne gimiyo gik ma nengogi tek, kendo chakre kanyo ogendini duto nomiye duong’." 
2Chronicles32:24 E ndalogo Hezekia nobedo matuo modwaro tho, mi nokwayo Ruoth Nyasaye, mowinje kendo omiye ranyisi." 
2Chronicles32:25 To Hezekia ne ok odwoko erokamano marom gi ber mane otimne, to nodoko jasunga. Emomiyo Ruoth Nyasaye nokecho kode kaachiel gi jo-Juda kod jo-Jerusalem." 
2Chronicles32:26 To Hezekia nobolore moweyo sunga. Jo-Jerusalem bende notimo kamano. Omiyo Ruoth Nyasaye ne ok osandogi e ndalo duto mag Hezekia. 
2Chronicles32:27 Hezekia ne nigi mwandu mang’eny kod huma maduong’. Noloso ut keno mag kano fedha gi dhahabu gi kite ma nengogi tek gi gik mang’ue ng’ar gi okumbni kod gik moko mabeyo mopogore opogore. 
2Chronicles32:28 Nogoyo dere mag cham, kendo nochueyo degi mag divai gi mag mo, kendo nogero kunde jamni mopogore opogore kod abich rombe." 
2Chronicles32:29 Bende nogero mier modakie, kendo nobedo gi rombe gi dhok mogundho, nimar Nyasaye nomiye mwandu mang’eny ahinya." 
2Chronicles32:30 Hezekia nogono nogeng’o soko mar Gihon gi yo ka malo, mochiko pi, mi omol kochomo dala Daudi yo podho chieng’. Tije duto mane Hezekia ochako, notieko maber." 
2Chronicles32:31 Kamano bende e kaka notieko wach joote jodong Babulon, mane oor ire mondo onon tiend hono ma nosetimore e pinye. Chutho Nyasaye noweye kende e wachno, to mana ni mondo oteme, kendo mondo ong’ego gima nie chunye." 
2Chronicles32:32 Weche modong’ mag Hezekia gi timbene mabeyo ondik e weche mag Isaya janabi wuod Amoz e Kitap Ndalo mag Ruodhi mag Juda gi Israel. 
2Chronicles32:33 Hezekia notho moluwo kwerene mi ne giyike gi yo ka malo mar liete joka Daudi. Jo-Juda gi jo-Jerusalem duto ne joyike gi luor maduong’. Manase wuode nodoko ruoth kare. 
2Chronicles33:1 Manase ne jahigni apar gariyo ka nodoko ruoth, kendo norito piny kuom higni piero abich gabich kodak Jerusalem." 
2Chronicles33:2 Timbene ne richo e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye kaka timbe makuero mag ogendini mane Ruoth Nyasaye oriembo mondo owe thuolo ni jo-Israel. 
2Chronicles33:3 Nochako oloso hembko man kuonde moting’ore mane Hezekia wuon mare oseketho, kendo nogero kuonde liswa ni Baal. Nochungo sirni milamo, kendo nolamo sulue duto kotiyonigi." 
2Chronicles33:4 Nogero kende-mag-liswa ei Hekalu, mane Ruoth Nyasaye osewuoyo kuome niya, “Jerusalem ema nyinga nobedie nyaka chieng’.”" 
2Chronicles33:5 Nogero kende-ma-liswa ni sulue duto e laru ariyo mag Od Ruoth Nyasaye. 
2Chronicles33:6 Nowang’o yawuote bende ka liswa e holo mar wuod Hinom. Noyie gi jokor wach gi jonyakalondo kod ajuoke. Timbene maricho ne ng’eny e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, omiyo Ruoth Nyasaye nokecho kode." 
2Chronicles33:7 Kido mar nyasaye manono ma noseloso, noketo ei Hekalu. To Nyasaye nosewuoyo kuom Hekaluno, kowacho ni Daudi gi Solomon wuod Daudi niya, “Aseyiero Hekaluni gi Jerusalem kuom dhoudi duto mag Israel mondo nyinga obedie nyaka chieng’." 
2Chronicles33:8 Ka jo-Israel orito kendo otimo gik moko duto ma nachikogi, kendo oluwo buche gi chike duto mane Musa onyisogi, to ok nariembgi e piny mane amiyo kweregi.”" 
2Chronicles33:9 Manase nosemo jo-Juda gi jo-Jerusalem, mi ne gimedo timo richo e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye moloyo ogendini mane Ruoth Nyasaye otieko mondo owe thuolo ni jo-Israel." 
2Chronicles33:10 Ruoth Nyasaye nowuoyoo gi Manase kod joge, to ne ok gidewe." 
2Chronicles33:11 Emomiyo Ruoth Nyasaye nomiyo jotend jolweny mag ruodh Asuria odhi kedo kodgi. Ne gimako Manase gi olowu, kendo ne gitueye gi ratege mag mula, mi gitere Babulon." 
2Chronicles33:12 Koro kane en e thagruok, nohombo Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasache mondo ong’wonne." 
2Chronicles33:13 Nokwayo Nyasach kwerene kobolore ahinya, mi Nyasaye nowinjo ywakne mokonye, kendo nodwoke Jerusalem e lochne. Koro Manase nong’eyo ni Ruoth Nyasaye e Nyasaye." 
2Chronicles33:14 Bang’e nogero ohinga moro e holo gi yo ka oko mar dala Daudi kor podho chieng’ mar Gihon. Ohingano nochopo e Dhoranga Rech, mi odhogo got Ofel kendo nodhi malo mabor ahinya. Bende noketo jotend jolweny e miech Juda duto mochiel gohinga." 
2Chronicles33:15 Nogolo nyiseche manono kaachiel gi kido mar nyasaye manono mane nie Od Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo nomuko kende-mag-liswa duto ma noseloso e god Hekalu kendo Jerusalem, mi nowitogi oko." 
2Chronicles33:16 Bende nochako oloso kendo-mar-misango mar Ruoth Nyasaye, mi notimoe misengni mag sawo kod mag erokamano, kendo nochiko jo-Juda mondo oti ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel." 
2Chronicles33:17 Kata kamano ji ne pod timo misengni e hembko man kuonde moting’ore, to mana ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachgi." 
2Chronicles33:18 Weche moko mag Manase, gi lemo mane okwayogo Nyasache, kod weche mane jonen owachone e nying Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel, ondiki e Kitap weche mag Ndalo mag Ruodhi mag Israel." 
2Chronicles33:19 To lemone, kendo kaka Nyasaye nowinjo kwayone, kaachiel gi kethone gi richone duto, kod kuonde mane ogeroe hembko moketoe sirni milamo gi kido mag nyiseche manono, kane pok chunye olokore modembore kuom Ruoth Nyasaye, ondiki e Kitap Weche mag Ndalo mag Jonen." 
2Chronicles33:20 Manase notho moluwo kwerene, moyike e ode. Amon wuode nodoko ruoth kare." 
2Chronicles33:21 Amon ne jahigni piero ariyo gariyo kane odoko ruoth, morito piny kuom higni ariyo, kodak Jerusalem." 
2Chronicles33:22 Timbene ne richo e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye mana kaka timbe Manase wuon mare. Notimo liswa ni kido manono duto mane Manase wuon mare oloso, kendo notiyonigi." 
2Chronicles33:23 Amon achielni ne ok obolore e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye kaka Manase wuon mare nobolore, to nomedo ketho moloyo." 
2Chronicles33:24 Jodonge nojame, monege e ode." 
2Chronicles33:25 To jo-Juda nonego jogo duto mane ojame, kendo ne giketo Josia wuode mondo obed ruoth kare." 
2Chronicles34:1 Josia ne jahigni aboro kane odoko ruoth, morito piny kuom higni piero adek gachiel, kodak Jerusalem." 
2Chronicles34:2 Timbene ne long’o e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo noluwo timbe Daudi kwar mare, ma ok oweyo kata achiel." 
2Chronicles34:3 E higa mar aboro mar lochne, kane pod en rawera, nochako luwo Nyasach Daudi kwar mare. To e higa mar apar gariyo nochako pwodho Juda gi Jerusalem, koketho hembko mane ni kuonde moting’ore, gi sirni milamo, kod kido mopa gi mothedhi." 
2Chronicles34:4 Nogolo chik, mi ji omuko kende-mag-liswa mag Baal, kaachiel gi kende miwang’oe ubani mane ochung’ e wigi. Nomuko sirni milamo kod kido mopa gi mothedhi, eka notoyogi molokogi buru, kendo nokiro burugo e liete joma nosetimonigi liswa." 
2Chronicles34:5 Bende nowang’o choke jodolo e kende mane gitimoe liswa, kopwodho Juda gi Jerusalem." 
2Chronicles34:6 Notimo kamano bende e miech Manase gi Efraim kod Simeon nyaka chop Naftali, komuko ute jodologo." 
2Chronicles34:7 Nomuko bende kende-mag-liswa kod sirni milamo, gi kido manono, mi otoyogi molokogi buru. Noketho kende duto miwang’oe ubani e piny Israel duto. Eka nodok Jerusalem." 
2Chronicles34:8 Koro e higa mar apar gaboro mar lochne, kane osepwodho piny kod Hekalu, nooro Shafan wuod Azalia gi wuod Joahaz jagoro mondo olos Od Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasache." 
2Chronicles34:9 Ne gidhi ir Hilkia jadolo maduong’, mi gimiye pesa mane osekel e Od Ruoth Nyasaye, ma jo-Lawi ma jorit dhoot nosechoko kuom jo-Manase gi jo-Efraim gi jo-Israel modong’ duto, gi jo-Juda gi jo-Benjamin duto, kendo kuom jo-Jerusalem." 
2Chronicles34:10 Ne giketo pesago e lwet nyipeche mane rito tich Od Ruoth Nyasaye, mi nyipechego nochiwo pesago e lwet jotich, mondo olosgo Od Ruoth Nyasaye." 
2Chronicles34:11 Pesago jotich bao gi jogedo ne jong’iewogo kite mopa kod yiend ripo gi sirni, mondo gilosgo udi mane ruodhi mag Juda oseweyo okethore." 
2Chronicles34:12 Mi ne gitiyo tijno ka giketo chunygi. Jahath gi Obadia jo-Lawi ma joka Merari, gi Zekaria kod Meshulam ma joka Kohath, ema nobedo joritgi. Jo-Lawi duto mane olony kuom goyo thum" 
2Chronicles34:13 ema ne rito joting’, kendo chiko jotich moko duto kuom tich moro amora. Jo-Lawi moko bende ne jotelo, kendo moko ne jorit dhorangeye." 
2Chronicles34:14 Chieng’ moro, kane oyudo gigolo pesa mosekel e Od Ruoth Nyasaye, Hilkia jadolo noyudo kitabu mondikie chik Ruoth Nyasaye mane Musa ochiwo." 
2Chronicles34:15 Eka Hilkia nowacho ni Shafan jagoro niya, “Aseyudo kitap chik e Od Ruoth Nyasaye.” Mi Hilkia nomiyo Shafan kitabuno." 
2Chronicles34:16 Shafan notere ni ruoth kendo nowachone niya, “Jotichni tiyo tich duto mane omigi." 
2Chronicles34:17 Gisegolo pesa mane ochoki e Od Ruoth Nyasaye kendo giseketo e lwet nyipeche kod jotich.” 
2Chronicles34:18 Eka nomedo wacho ni ruoth niya, “Hilkia osemiya kitabu moro.” Mi nosome ni ruoth." 
2Chronicles34:19 Kane ruoth owinjo weche mag chik, noyiecho lepe." 
2Chronicles34:20 Nochiko Hilkia, gi Ahikam wuod Shafan, gi Abdon wuod Mika, gi Shafan jagoro kod Asaya jatich ruoth, kowachonigi niya," 
2Chronicles34:21 “Dhiuru upenj Ruoth Nyasaye wach ma kuoma, gi man kuom jo-Isarel gi jo-Juda modong’, kor wach weche manie kitabu mwaseyudoni. Nyaka bed ni Ruoth Nyasaye okecho kodwa malich, nikech kwerewa ne ok orito wachne, kata timo gik moko duto mondiki e kitabunii, bende ne ok gitimo.”" 
2Chronicles34:22 Omiyo Hilkia, gi jogo mane ruoth ooro, nodhi ir Hulda janabi madhako ma chi Shalum wuod Tikva, ma wuod Harhas, jarit lep lemo, mane odak Jerusalem e migawo mar ariyo. Ne giwuoyo kode kuom wachno," 
2Chronicles34:23 mi nodwokogi niya, “Nyisuru ng’at mane oorou ira ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel owacho kama:" 
2Chronicles34:24 ‘Abiro kelo masira e pinyni, kendo kuom joma odakie kaluwore gi kuong’ duto manie kitabu ma nosesom e nyim ruodh Juda." 
2Chronicles34:25 Ne gikwinya gi timbegi, ka giweya, kendo ka giwang’o ubani ni nyiseche manono. Emomiyo akecho kodgi, kakumogi nyaka chieng’.’" 
2Chronicles34:26 To wachuru ni ruodh Juda mane oorou mondo upenjne Ruoth Nyasaye wach ni Ruoth Nyasaye owacho kama: 
2Chronicles34:27 ‘Asewinji nikech kane iwinjo wechena mane awacho kuom pinyni kod joma odakie, chunyi ne yom kendo odembore, miyiecho lepi, kendo iywak e nyima." 
2Chronicles34:28 Noyiki e liendi gi kue, kiluwo kwereni, ma kata wang’i ok none masira ma abiro kelo kuom dalani, kendo kuom joma odakie.’ ” Kane jootego odwoko ni ruoth wach," 
2Chronicles34:29 noluongo jodongo duto mag Juda gi Jerusalem. 
2Chronicles34:30 Nodhi e Od Ruoth Nyasaye gi jo-Juda kod jo-Jerusalem duto, joma omew gi jochan machalre, kaachiel gi jodolo kod jo-Lawi, mi nosomonigi weche duto mane nie kitap singruok mane oyud e Od Ruoth Nyasaye." 
2Chronicles34:31 Eka ruoth nodhi kar betne, mochung’ e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye kosingore ni enoluw Ruoth Nyasaye gi chunye duto kod tekone duto, komako chikene gi wechene kod buchene, kamano mondo orit weche mag singruok mondiki e kitabuno." 
2Chronicles34:32 Eka nomiyo jo-Jerusalem duto okuong’ore ni ginirit singruokno. Mi jo-Jerusalem norito singruok mar Nyasach kweregi. 
2Chronicles34:33 Bang’e Josia nogolo gik makuero duto mane nie piny Israel, mi nomiyo ji duto modak e Israel otiyo ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachgi. Ne ok giweyo luwo Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach kweregi e ndalo Josia duto." 
2Chronicles35:1 Josia notimo Pasaka ni Ruoth Nyasaye e Jerusalem kendo ne oneg nyarombo mar Pasaka chieng’ due apar gang’wen mar due mokwongo. 
2Chronicles35:2 Noketo jodolo e tijegi, mojiwogi mondo giti maber e Od Ruoth Nyasaye." 
2Chronicles35:3 Eka nowuoyo gi jo-Lawi mane owal ni tich Ruoth Nyasaye, mane puonjo jo-Israel duto, kowachonigi niya, “Keturu Sanduk Maler e Hekalu mane Solomon wuod Daudi, ruodh Israel, ogero. Ok onego uting’e e goku kendo. Omiyo koro tiuru ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu, kendo ni joge Israel." 
2Chronicles35:4 Chanreuru e migepe, kaluwore gi dhoutu, kaka Daudi ruodh Israel gi Solomon wuode nochiko." 
2Chronicles35:5 Chanuru tijeu e Hekalu, kaluwore gi dhout oweteu ma ok jo-Lawi, mondo dhoot ka dhoot obed gi migawo moro makonye." 
2Chronicles35:6 Neguru nyiromb Pasaka, kendo pwodhreuru mondo ukony oweteu luwo chik mane Ruoth Nyyasaye omiyo Musa ogolo.”" 
2Chronicles35:7 Eka Josia nochiwo ni joma nosechokore nyirombe gi nyidiek moromo alufu piero adek, kod ruedhi alufu adek, mondo otimgo misango mar Pasaka. Mago duto nochiwo kogolo kuom mwandune owuon." 
2Chronicles35:8 Jodonge bende ne mor gi kelo chiwo ni ji gi jodolo kod jo-Lawi. Hilkia gi Zekaria kod Jehiel, jotelo madongo mag Od Ruoth Nyasaye, nochiwo ni jodolo nyirombe gi nyidiek alufu ariyo gi mia auchiel, kod ruedhi mia adek, mondo otimgo misango mar Pasaka." 
2Chronicles35:9 Konania bende, kod Shemaya gi Nethanel ma owetene kod Hashabia gi Jeyel kod Jozabad, ma jodong jo-Lawi, nomiyo jo-Lawi nyirombe gi nyidiek alufu abich kod ruedhi mia abich mondo otimgo misango mar Pasaka." 
2Chronicles35:10 Kane gik moko duto oseikore, jodolo nochung’ keregi, kendo jo-Lawi nobedo e migepegi, kaluwore gi chik ruoth." 
2Chronicles35:11 Kane oneg nyiromb Pasaka, jo-Lawi ema noyang’ogi, to jodolo nokiro remo mane jo-Lawi gamonigi." 
2Chronicles35:12 Ne gipogo boche mag misengnii ni migepe mag dhoudi ma ok jo-Lawi, mondo owang’ ni Ruoth Nyasaye kaka ondiki e Kitap Musa. Kamano e kaka ne gitimo gi ruedhi bende." 
2Chronicles35:13 Ne gibulo nyiromb Pasaka kaka chik nowacho, to ring misengni maler ne gitedo e agulini gi sufriache, eka ne gitero piyopiyo ni ji duto ma ok jo-Lawi." 
2Chronicles35:14 Bang’e ne giloso maggi giwegi kod mag jodolo, nikech jodolo ma yawuot Harun nodich gi timo misengni miwang’o pep, kod tich wang’o bor, nyaka otieno. Mano emomiyo jo-Lawi noloso maggi giwegi kod mag jodolo ma yawuot Harun." 
2Chronicles35:15 Jower ma yawuot Asaf ne ni keregi, kaluwore gi chik Daudi, gi mar Asaf, gi mar Heman, kod mar Jeduthun janen mar ruoth. Jorit dhorangeye bende ne rito dhorangeye duto. Onge ng’ama nonego a e tije mondo odhi olos chiemo, nikech owetegi ma jo-Lawi nosetedonigi." 
2Chronicles35:16 Kamano tich Ruoth Nyasaye duto mar Pasaka kod mar timo misengni miwang’o pep e kendo-mar-misango mar Ruoth Nyasaye notim chieng’ono, kaka ruoth Josia nochiko." 
2Chronicles35:17 E ndalono jo-Israel mane osechokore notimo Pasaka kod Sap Makati ma ok ketie thowi kuom ndalo abiriyo. 
2Chronicles35:18 Pasaka machal kamano ne pok otimie Israel chakre ndalo mag Samuel janabi. Onge ruodh Israel moro amora ma nosetimo Pasaka machal gi mano mane Josia kaachiel gi jodolo gi jo-Lawi gi jo-Jerusalem kod ji duto ma noa Juda gi Israel otimo. 
2Chronicles35:19 Ne en higa mar apar gaboro mar loch Josia mane otimie Pasakano. 
2Chronicles35:20 Bang’e kane Josia osetieko loso Hekalu, noyudo ka Neko ruodh Misri odhi kedo Karkemish man but aora Yufrate mi Josia nodhi mondo orad kode." 
2Chronicles35:21 To Neko noorone joote gi wach niya, “Walar ang’o kodi, ruodh Juda? In ok ema abiro monji kawuono, to abiro mana monjo dhoot ma an go gi lweny, kendo Nyasaye osechika mondo atim piyo. Kik ipiem gi Nyasaye man kora, nono to abiro tieki.”" 
2Chronicles35:22 Kata kamano Josia ne ok nyal weye, to noramo arama ni nyaka oked kode. Ne ok odewo wach mane Nyasaye omiyo Neko owacho, to nodhi adhiya mi girado e paw Megido." 
2Chronicles35:23 Jodir asere nochielo ruoth Josia, mi nowacho ni jotichne niya, “Golauru oko nimar asehinyora malich.”" 
2Chronicles35:24 Omiyo jotichne nogole e gache mi gitere Jerusalem ka giting’e e gache machielo. Notho kuno, mi ne giyike but kwerene, kendo jo-Juda gi jo-Jerusalem duto noywage." 
2Chronicles35:25 Jeremia bende nochuogo wend ywak ni Josia, kendo jower duto, machwo gi mamon, pod wero wendno nyaka chil kawuono. Gino oselokore tim jo-Israel kendo wendno ondik e Kitap Wende Ywak." 
2Chronicles35:26 Weche moko mag Josia, a chakruokgi nyaka gikogi, gi timbene mabeyo moluwore gi chik Ruoth Nyasaye," 
2Chronicles35:27 ondiki e Kitap Ruodhi mag Israel gi Juda. 
2Chronicles36:1 Ji duto noketo Jehoahaz ruoth e Jerusalem kar Josia wuon mare. 
2Chronicles36:2 Ne en jahigni piero ariyo gadek kane odoko ruoth, morito piny kuom dueche adek, kodak Jerusalem." 
2Chronicles36:3 Bang’e Neko ruodh Misri nogole e tich ruoth, modare Jerusalem, kendo noketo ni piny Juda osuru moromo kilo piero adek mag dhahabu." 
2Chronicles36:4 Eka noketo Eliakim owadgi Jehoahaz ruodh Juda gi Jerusalem, kendo noloko nyinge ni Jehoyakim. Jehoahaz to notero Misri." 
2Chronicles36:5 Jehoyakim ne jahigni piero ariyo gabich kane odoko ruoth, morito piny kuom higni apar gachiel, kodak Jerusalem. Timbene ne richo e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasache." 
2Chronicles36:6 Nebukadnezar ruodh Babulon nomonje, motueye gi ratege kendo notere Babulon." 
2Chronicles36:7 Nebukadnezar nokawo bende bath gik moko mag Od Ruoth Nyasaye, motero Babulon e ode." 
2Chronicles36:8 Timbe moko mag Jehoyakim gi gik makuero ma notimo, kod ketho maling’ling’ ma nofweny kuome, ondiki e Kitap Ndalo mag ruodhi mag Israel gi Juda. Jehoyachin wuode nodoko ruoth kare." 
2Chronicles36:9 Jehoyachin ne jahigni aboro kane odoko ruoth, morito piny kuom dueche adek gi ndalo apar kodak Jerusalem. Timbene ne richo e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye." 
2Chronicles36:10 E ndalo oro ruoth Nebukadnezar nooro joote mokelo Jehoyachin Babulon kaachiel gi mwandu mag Od Ruoth Nyasaye, mi Nebukadnezar noketo Zedekia owadgi Jehoyachin ruodh Juda gi Jerusalem." 
2Chronicles36:11 Zedekia ne jahigni piero ariyo gabich kane odoko ruoth, morito piny kuom higni apar gachiel kodak Jerusalem." 
2Chronicles36:12 Timbene ne richo e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasache. Notamore winjo weche Jeremia jadolo, mane Ruoth Nyasaye ooro ire." 
2Chronicles36:13 Bende ruoth Nebukadnezar nosemiyo okuong’ore e nying Nyasaye ni nobed e bwo lochne, to kata kamano nopiem kode, motamore duogo kuom Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel." 
2Chronicles36:14 Jodolo madongo duto bende kaachiel gi ji, noweyo Ruoth Nyasaye chuth, ka giluwo timbe makuero mag jopinje mamoko. Ne gidwanyo Od Ruoth Nyasaye, mane oseguedho mondo obed mare e Jerusalem." 
2Chronicles36:15 Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach kweregi notimo kinda kooronigi jootene pile nikech nokecho joge, kendo nohero kar dakne." 
2Chronicles36:16 To ne gimedo charo joote Nyasaye, ka gichayo wachne, kendo ginyiero jonabi mage, nyaka Ruoth Nyasaye nokecho kodgi, ma koro ne ok ginyal konyo." 
2Chronicles36:17 Emomiyo nokelonigi ruodh jo-Babulon, monego yawuotgi e Hekalu, kendo ne ok okecho wuowi kata nyako, ng’at motegno kata jaduong’ moti. Ruoth Nyasaye nochiwogi duto e lwete," 
2Chronicles36:18 mi nokawo gik moko duto mitiyogo e Od Ruoth Nyasaye, madongo gi matindo, kod mwandu mag Od Ruoth Nyasaye, gi mag od ruoth, kod mag ut jodonge, motero Babulon." 
2Chronicles36:19 Ne giwang’o Od Nyasaye, mi gimuko ohinga mar Jerusalem. Ne giwang’o ut ruoth duto, kendo ne giketho gik moko duto ma nengogi tek man Jerusalem." 
2Chronicles36:20 Jogo mane ok onegi, ruoth notero Babulon, kuma ne gidokoe wasumbe, kendo wasumb yawuote, nyaka nochopo ndalo mane jo-Persia okawoe loch." 
2Chronicles36:21 Mano notimore mondo wach Ruoth Nyasaye mane omiyo Jeremia owacho, ochopi. Jeremia nosewacho niya, “Pinyni nonind ma ok opur kuom higni piero abiriyo, mondo ochulgo ndalo mag Sabato mane osekadho, ka jopiny ok orito.”" 
2Chronicles36:22 E higa mokwongo mar loch Kuros, ruodh Persia, Ruoth Nyasaye nomiyo wachne, mane Jeremia okoro, ochopo kare. Nomiyo Kuros ogoyo milome e pinye duto, kendo olando wach gi barupe," 
2Chronicles36:23 ni Kuros ruodh Persia, owacho kama: “Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach polo osemiya loch kuom pinje duto, kendo osechika mondo agerne ot Jerusalem, manie piny Juda. Ng’ato ang’ata kuomu ma en achiel kuom joge nyalo dhi, kendo Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasache mondo obed kode.”" 
Ezra1:1 E higa mokwongo mar loch Kuros ruodh Persia, Ruoth Nyasaye nomiyo wachne mane Jeremia okoro, otimore. Nomiyo Kuros ruodh Persia ogoyo milome e pinje duto,, kendo olando wach gi barua, kowacho niya:" 
Ezra1:2 “Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach polo osemiya loch kuom pinje duto, kendo en owuon osechika mondo agerne Hekalu Jerusalem e piny Juda." 
Ezra1:3 Jo-Ruoth Nyasaye duto man kuomu nyalo dhi Jerusalem e piny Juda mondo ochak oger Hekalu ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel, ma dalane en Jerusalem, kendo Nyasaye mondo obed kode." 
Ezra1:4 To ng’ato ka ng’ato ma ok odhi, omi teko mar solo fedha gi dhahabu gi jamni kod gik mamoko kuom jogweng’gi, kamoro amora modakie. Mago nobed mich momedi kuom gik mane ji chiwo kuom herogi ni tich Hekalu mar Nyasaye man Jerusalem.”" 
Ezra1:5 Bang’e jodong dhout Juda gi Benjamin kod jodolo gi jo-Lawi, kaachiel gi ji mamoko duto mane Nyasaye ojiwo chunygi mondo ochak oger Hekalu mar Ruoth Nyasaye man Jerusalem, noikore dhi timo kamano." 
Ezra1:6 Mi jogweng’gi duto nokonyogi gi fedha gi dhahabu gi jamni gi gik mamoko, kod gik ma nengogi tek, kaachiel gi gik mane ng’ato ka ng’ato ochiwo kuom herone." 
Ezra1:7 To bende gik lemo mag Od Ruoth Nyasaye mane Nebukadnezar oyudo osegolo Jerusalem, mi oketo e od nyisechene, koro Kuros ruodh Persia nogolo," 
Ezra1:8 moketo e lwet Mithredath jakeno, mane okwanogi ni Sheshbazar jaduong’ mar piny Juda." 
Ezra1:9 Kwan-gi ne romo kama: Nyilerni piero adek molos gi dhahabu, gi nyilerni alufu achiel molos gi fedha, gi tewni mopogore opogore piero ariyo gochiko," 
Ezra1:10 gi tewni piero adek molos gi dhahabu, gi tewni mia ang’wen gapar mopogore opogore molos gi fedha, kod tewni mamoko alufu achiel." 
Ezra1:11 Gik moko duto molos gi dhahabu kod molos gi fedha moromo alufu abich gi mia ang’wen. Gigo duto ema Sheshbazar nodhigo kane joma otue owuok Babulon dhi Jerusalem. 
Ezra2:1 Koro magi e jo-Juda ma nodok Jerusalem gi Juda koa Babulon, kuma ne Nebukadnezar ruodh Babulon oterogie tuech. Ng’ato ka ng’ato nodok e gweng’gi." 
Ezra2:2 Jotendgi ne gin: Zerubabel, gi Jeshua, gi Nehemia, gi Seraya, gi Reelaya, gi Mordekai, gi Bilshan, gi Mizpar, gi Bigvai, gi Rehum, kod Baana." 
Ezra2:3 Kar romb jo-Israel machwo e magi: joka Parosh ne romo alufu ariyo gi mia achiel gi piero abiriyo gariyo; 
Ezra2:4 joka Shefatia, ne mia adek gi piero abiriyo gariyo;" 
Ezra2:5 joka Ara, mia abiriyo gi piero abiriyo gabich;" 
Ezra2:6 joka Pahath-moab, tiende ni joka Jeshua kod joka Joab ne romo alufu ariyo gi mia aboro gapar gariyo;" 
Ezra2:7 joka Elam ne alufu achiel mia ariyo gi piero abich gang’wen; 
Ezra2:8 joka Zatu, mia ochiko gi piero ang’wen gabich;" 
Ezra2:9 joka Zakai, mia abiriyo gi piero auchiel;" 
Ezra2:10 joka Bani, mia auchiel gi piero ang’wen gariyo;" 
Ezra2:11 joka Bebia, mia auchiel gi piero ariyo gadek;" 
Ezra2:12 joka Azgad, alufu achiel gi mia ariyo kod piero ariyo gariyo;" 
Ezra2:13 joka Adonikam, mia auchiel gi piero auchiel gauchiel;" 
Ezra2:14 joka Bigvai, alufu ariyo gi piero abich gauchiel;" 
Ezra2:15 joka Adin, mia ang’wen gi piero abich gang’wen;" 
Ezra2:16 joka Ater, tiende ni joka Hezekia, to piero ochiko gaboro;" 
Ezra2:17 joka Bezai, mia adek gi piero adek gariyo;" 
Ezra2:18 joka Jora, mia achiel gapar gariyo;" 
Ezra2:19 joka Hashum, mia ariyo gi piero ariyo gadek;" 
Ezra2:20 joka Gibar, to piero ochiko gabich;" 
Ezra2:21 jo-Bethlehem, mia achiel gi piero ariyo gadek;" 
Ezra2:22 jo-Netofa, piero abich gauchiel;" 
Ezra2:23 jo-Anathoth, mia achiel gii piero ariyo gaboro;" 
Ezra2:24 jo-Beth-azmoth, piero ang’wen gariyo;" 
Ezra2:25 jo-Kiriath-jearim gi jo-Kefira kod jo-Beeroth, mia abiriyo gi piero ang’wen gadek;" 
Ezra2:26 jo-Rama gi jo-Geba, mia auchiel gi piero ariyo gachiel;" 
Ezra2:27 jo-Mikmas, mia achiel gi piero ariyo gariyo;" 
Ezra2:28 jo-Bethel kod jo-Ai, mia ariyo gi piero ariyo gadek;" 
Ezra2:29 jo-Nebo, piero abich gariyo;" 
Ezra2:30 jo-Magbish, mia achiel gi piero abich gauchiel;" 
Ezra2:31 jo-Elam machielo, alufu achiel gi mia ariyo kod piero abich gang’wen;" 
Ezra2:32 jo-Harim, mia adek gi piero ariyo;" 
Ezra2:33 jo-Lod gi jo-Hadid kod jo-Ono, mia abiriyo gi piero ariyo gabich;" 
Ezra2:34 jo-Jeriko, mia adek gi piero ang’wen gabich;" 
Ezra2:35 jo-Senaa, alufu adek gi mia auchiel kod piero adek." 
Ezra2:36 Kar romb jodolo: joka Jedaya ma jodhood Jeshua, mia ochiko gi piero abiriyo gadek;" 
Ezra2:37 joka Imer, alufu achiel gi piero abich gariyo;" 
Ezra2:38 joka Pashur, alufu achiel gi mia ariyo kod piero ang’wen gabiriyo;" 
Ezra2:39 joka Harim, alufu achiel gapar gabiriyo." 
Ezra2:40 Kar romb jo-Lawi: joka Jeshua gi joka Kadmiel ma jodhood Hodavia ne ji piero abiriyo gang’wen. 
Ezra2:41 Kar romb jower; joka Asaf ne mia achiel gi piero ariyo gaboro. 
Ezra2:42 Kar romb jorit dhorangeye: joka Shalum gi joka Ater, gi joka Talmon, gi joka Akub, gi joka Hatita, kod joka Shobai, duto ji mia achiel gi piero adek gochiko." 
Ezra2:43 Jotich Hekalu ne gin; Joka Ziha, gi joka Hasufa, gi joka Taboath," 
Ezra2:44 gi joka Heros, gi joka Siaha, gi joka Padon," 
Ezra2:45 gi joka Labana, gi joka Hagaba, gi joka Hakub,"
