Ezra2:46 gi joka Hagab, gi joka Shamlai, gi joka Hanan," 
Ezra2:47 gi joka Gidel, gi joka Gahar, gi joka Reaya," 
Ezra2:48 gi joka Rezin, gi joka Nekoda, gi joka Gazam," 
Ezra2:49 gi joka Uza, gi joka Pasea gi joka Besai," 
Ezra2:50 gi joka Asna, gi joka Meunim, gi joka Nefusim," 
Ezra2:51 gi joka Bakbuk, gi joka Hakufa, gi joka Harhur," 
Ezra2:52 gi joka Bazluth, gi joka Mehida, gi joka Harsha," 
Ezra2:53 gi joka Barkos, gi joka Sisera, gi joka Tema," 
Ezra2:54 gi joka Nezia, gi joka Hatifa." 
Ezra2:55 Nyikwa jotich Solomon ne gin: joka Sotai, gi joka Hasofereth, gi joka Peruda," 
Ezra2:56 gi joka Jaala, gi joka Darkon, gi joka Gidel," 
Ezra2:57 gi joka Shefatia, gi joka Hatil, gi joka Pokereth-hazebaim, kod joka Ami." 
Ezra2:58 Jotich Hekalu, kaachiel gi nyikwa jotich Solomon ne romo ji mia adek gi piero ochiko gariyo." 
Ezra2:59 Koro magi e joma nodwogo koa Tel-mela, gi Tel-harsha, gi Kerub, gi Adan, kod Imer, to ne ok nyal ng’e anywolagi, kata ka gin koth jo-Israel adier:" 
Ezra2:60 joka Delaya, gi joka Tobia, kod joka Nekoda, ne romo ji mia auchiel." 
Ezra2:61 Jodolo mane ok ong’e anywolagi bende ne gin: joka Hobaya, gi joka Hakoz, kod joma luongore ni joka Barzilai, nikech kwargi nokendo nyar Barzilai ja-Gilead, mokawo nying jaduong’neno." 
Ezra2:62 Jogo nomanyo nyingegi e kitepe mane ondikie nying anywola, to ne ok giyudo, omiyo nokwan-gi ka joma ok owinjore tiyo tich dolo." 
Ezra2:63 Kendo ruoth nokwerogi ni kik gicham chiemo mowal ni jodolo, nyaka jadolo bedie manyalo penjo Ruoth Nyasaye wach gi ombulu miluongo ni Urim gi Thumim." 
Ezra2:64 Ji duto mane ochokore kanyakla ne romo ji alufu piero ang’wen gariyo gi mia adek kod piero auchiel," 
Ezra2:65 ka ok okwan wasumbgi machwo gi mamon, mane romo alufu abiriyo gi mia adek kod piero adek gabiriyo. Bende ne gin gi jower mia ariyo, machwo gi mamon." 
Ezra2:66 Ne gin gi farese mia abiriyo gi piero adek gauchiel, gi nyumbu mia ariyo gi piero ang’wen gabich," 
Ezra2:67 gi ngamia mia ang’wen gi piero adek gabich, kod kenje alufu auchiel gi mia abiriyo kod piero ariyo." 
Ezra2:68 Kane gibiro e Od Ruoth Nyasaye Jerusalem, jodong dhoudi moko nochiwore mondo ochak oger Od Nyasaye mana kama ne entie chon." 
Ezra2:69 Ne gichiwo dhahabu moromo kilo alufu aboro, gii fedha moromo kilo alufu adek, kod lep dolo mia achiel, kar nyalogi." 
Ezra2:70 Jodolo gi jo-Lawi kod ji mamoko nodak Jerusalem, kendo e alworane. Jower gi jorit dhorangeye gi jotich Hekalu kod jo-Israel mamoko duto, to nodak e miechgi." 
Ezra3:1 Kane due mar abiriyo ochopo, jo-Israel koro noyudo odak e miechgi. Ne gichokore Jerusalem, maonge kata ng’at achiel modong’." 
Ezra3:2 Eka Joshua wuod Jozadak gi jodolo wetene kod Zerubabel wuod Shealtiel gi owetene ne jogero kendo-mar-misango mar Nyasach Israel, mondo otimie misengni miwang’o pep, kaka ondiki e chik Musa ng’at Nyasaye." 
Ezra3:2 Eka Joshua wuod Jozadak gi jodolo wetene kod Zerubabel wuod Shealtiel gi owetene ne jogero kendo-mar-misango mar Nyasach Israel, mondo otimie misengni miwang’o pep, kaka ondiki e chik Musa ng’at Nyasaye." 
Ezra3:3 Mokwongo ne gichungo kendo-mar-misango kare machon, nikech ne giluoro joma koro nodak e pinyno, mi gitimoe ni Ruoth Nyasaye misengni miwang’o pep, okinyi godhiambo." 
Ezra3:4 Ne gitimo Sap Kiche kaka nondiki, kendo ne gitimo misengni miwang’o pep kaka chik dwaro odiechieng’ kodiechieng’." 
Ezra3:5 To bende ne gitimo misengni mapile, gi misengni mag Sabato gi mago mitimo ka due opor, kod mag sewni moko duto mowal ni Nyasaye, kendo ne gichiwo mich mane ji okelo ni Ruoth Nyasaye kuom herogi." 
Ezra3:6 Ne gichako timo misengni miwang’o pep e odiechieng’ mokwongo mar due mar abiriyono, kata obedo ni mise mar Hekalu mar Ruoth Nyasaye ne pok oketi." 
Ezra3:7 Jogedo gi jopa kite ne gimiyo pesa, to jo-Sidon gi jo-Turo ne gimiyo chiemo gi gik mimadho kod mo, mondo odhi Lebanon, okwang’ yiend sida nyaka dhowath Jopa. Kuros ruodh Persia ema nosemiyogi thuolo mar timo kamano." 
Ezra3:8 E due mar ariyo mar higa mar ariyo bang’ duokgi e Od Nyasaye Jerusalem, Zerubabel wuod Shealtiel kod Jeshua wuod Josadak ne jochako tich, ka jodolo gi jo-Lawi gi jo-Israel wetegi duto ma noa e tuech, mobiro Jerusalem, konyogi. Ne giyiero jo-Lawi ma hikgi piero ariyo kadhi nyime, mondo orit tich Od Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Ezra3:9 To Jeshua gi yawuote kod owetene ma Kadmiel gi Binui kod Hodavia ne jokawo tich rito joma ne tiyo e Od Nyasaye. 
Ezra3:10 Kane jogendo oseketo mise mar Hekalu mar Ruoth Nyasaye, jodolo morwako lep dolo, nochung’ keregi ka goyo tung’, kendo jo-Lawi ma nyikwa Asaf bende nogoyo ongeng’o ka pako Ruoth Nyasaye kaka Daudi ruodh Israel nochiko." 
Ezra3:11 Ne giolo wer, ka gipako kendo gigoyo erokamano ni Ruoth Nyasaye niya, “En erokamano, nimar herane kuom jo-Israel osiko nyaka chieng’.” Ji duto nopako Ruoth Nyasaye gi duol maduong’ nikech mise mar Od Ruoth Nyasaye noseketi." 
Ezra3:12 To thoth jodolo gi jo-Lawi kod jodong dhoudi mane koro hikgi oniang’, kendo ma noseneno Hekalu mokwongo, noywak, koneno ka mise mar odni oketi. To ji mang’eny nokok matek nikech mor mane gin go." 
Ezra3:13 Ji ne ok nyal pogo ywak gi mor, nikech koko mar ji ne duong’, kendo ne nyalo winjore gi kuma bor ahinya." 
Ezra4:1 Kane wasik jo-Juda gi jo-Benjamin owinjo ni joma oa e tuech koro gero Hekalu ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel," 
Ezra4:2 ne gidhi ir Zerubabel gi Jeshua kod jodong dhoudi, mi giwachonigi niya, “We wakonyu gedo, nikech Nyasachuno ema wan bende walamo, kendo wasebedo ka watimone misango, chakre ndalo loch Esarhadon ruodh Asuria, ma nokelowa ku.”" 
Ezra4:3 To Zerubabel gi Jeshua kod jodong dhout Israel mamoko nodwokogi niya, “Uonge tich gi ot mwagero ni Nyasachwani. Wabiro gere ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel wan kendwa, kaka Kuros, ruodh Persia, nochikowa.”" 
Ezra4:4 Bang’e joma koro nodak e pinyno nonyoso chuny jo-Juda, ka gibwogogi ni mondo kik gigedi." 
Ezra4:5 Ndalo duto mane Kuros rito piny, ne gimiyo jodonge asoya mondo oketh wach jo-Juda. Mano nodhi nyime nyaka ndalo loch Darius ruodh Persia." 
Ezra4:6 Kane Ahasuerus ochako loch, joma koro nodak e pinyno nondiko barua kadonjo ni jo-Jerusalem gi jo-Juda." 
Ezra4:7 E ndalo mane Artaxerxes obedo ruodh Persia, Mithredath gi Tabeel kod jowetene nondikone. Baruano nondiki gi dho Aram, kendo nosome gi dho Aram." 
Ezra4:8 Rehum, ma jaduong’ pinyno, kod Shimshai jagoro ne jondiko barua ni ruoth Artaxerxes, ka ketho nying Jerusalem. Baruano nochak kama:" 
Ezra4:9 “Wan jondik baruani wan Rehum ma jaduong’ piny, gi Shimshai jagoro, kod jowetewa duto ma jong’ad bura gi jodongo gi joteko gi jotich madongo, gi jo-Erek gi jo-Babulon gi jo-Elam modak Susa," 
Ezra4:10 kod ji mamoko mane Asnapar ruoth moluor kendo mogen odaro momiyo kar dak e dala mar Samaria, kendo e piny man loka aora Yufrate.”" 
Ezra4:11 Baruano nodhi nyime kawacho kama: “Kuom ruoth Artaxerxes. Wan wasumbni magi modak loka Yufrate, wamosi." 
Ezra4:12 Ruoth, mondo ing’e ni jo-Yahudi mane owei mobiro kuondegi, osechopo Jerusalem, kendo ochako gero dala marach ma nong’anyono. Gisepime kendo koro gitieko gero ohingane." 
Ezra4:13 To ruoth, nyaka ing’e malong’o ni kapo ni gigero dalagino, mi gitieko ohingane, to ok ginigol osuru, kata golo chiwo, kata mana chulo gimoro amora, mi e gikone giniketh lochni." 
Ezra4:14 To wan jotichni ok owinjore waling’ kwaneno kiketho nyingi. Mano emomiyo waseoro baruani kwanyisigo wach," 
Ezra4:15 mondo onon kitepe mondikie weche ma notimore e ndalo ruodhi ma nokwongoni. Kirango kitepego, to ibiro nwang’o ni Jerusalem en dala ma jang’anyo, kendo ma jachand ruoth gi pinye. Bende jodalano osebedo ka jemo kuom higni mathoth. Mano emomiyo ne oketh dalano." 
Ezra4:16 Koro ruoth, wanyisi ni ka oger dalano, mi ohinga mare orumo, to onge piny moro loka Yufrate ma nodong’ e bwo lochni.”" 
Ezra4:17 Ruoth nodwokogi kama: “To kuom Rehum ma jaduong’ piny gi Shimshai jagoro kod joweteu duto modak Samaria gi piny man loka aora Yufrate, amosou." 
Ezra4:18 Barua ma nyocha uorona, osesomna maber," 
Ezra4:19 omiyo nyocha agolo chik mondo onon kitepe, mi oseyud ni jodalano osebedo ka ng’anyo kuom kinde malach, kendo wich teko gi ng’anyo bende osebedo kosiko kanyo." 
Ezra4:20 E ndalo mokadho ruodhi marateke norito Jerusalem, kendo noloyo piny duto man loka Yufraete. Ji ne goyonigi osuru mopogore opogore." 
Ezra4:21 Kuom mano koro goluru chik mondo jogo owe tich. Dalano kik ger nyaka agol chik. 
Ezra4:22 Neuru ni ok ujwang’o wachni, nono to wach marach kata gima lit biro wuok, ma diketh lochwa.”" 
Ezra4:23 Kane osesom barup ruoth Artaxerxes ni Rehum gi Shimshai kod jowetegi, ne gidhi Jerusalem piyopiyo, mi gichuno jo-Yahudi mondo owe tich." 
Ezra4:24 Chakre chieng’no, tich Od Nyasaye man Jerusalem nochung’, mi nosiko kamano nyaka higa mar ariyo mar loch Darius ruodh Persia." 
Ezra5:1 Bang’e janabi Hagai, gi janabi Zekaria ma nyakwar Iddo, ne jokoro wach e nying Nyasach Israel, ka jiwo jo-Yahudi gi jo-Juda man Jerusalem." 
Ezra5:2 Kane Zerubabel gi Shealtiel kod Jeshua wuod Jozadak owinjo wechegigo, ne gichako gero Od Nyasaye Jerusalem, kendo jonabi mag Nyasayego ne ni kodgi, ka konyogi." 
Ezra5:3 Tatenai ma ruodh piny man loka Yufrate, gi Shethar-bozenai kod jowetegi nobiro irgi piyopiyo, mowachonigi niya, “En ng’a mane omiyou thuolo mar gero odni, kendo tieko loso gik manie iye?”" 
Ezra5:4 Bende ne gipenjogi nying joma tiyo tijno. 
Ezra5:5 Eka jogo nooro wach ni ruoth Darius, kanyise gima timore. To Nyasaye ne ni kod jodong jo-Yahudi, omiyo ne ok ochung-gi mondo giwe tich ka pod irito dwoko moa kuom ruoth." 
Ezra5:6 Koro ma e barua mane Tatenai ruodh piny man loka Yufrate, gi Shethar-bozenai kod jowetegi ma jotend pinyno ondiko ni ruoth Darius:" 
Ezra5:7 “Kuom ruoth Darius, wamosi ahinya." 
Ezra5:8 Ruoth mondo ing’e ni ne wadhi e piny Juda, mi wayudo ka jodong jo-Yahudi gero Od Nyasaye maduong’ gi kite madongo kod yien moketi e kor ot. Tich tiyore adimba, kendo odhi nyime maber e lwetgi." 
Ezra5:9 Ne wapenjo jodongogo ng’ama nomiyogi thuolo mondo giger Hekaluni, kendo gilos gik iye duto." 
Ezra5:10 Bende ne wapenjogi nyinggi mondo ing’e nying jotendgi kod kar rombgi. 
Ezra5:11 To ne gidwokowa niya, ‘Wan jotich Nyasach polo gi piny, kendo wagero ot mane oyudo oseger chon, higni mang’eny mokadho. Ruodh Israel maduong’ ema nogere, motieke." 
Ezra5:12 To kata kamano, kwerewa mowang’o i Nyasach polo, mi Nyasaye nochiwogi e lwet Nebukadnezar ja-Kaldea, ruodh Babulon mane omuko odno, kendo otero jowa Babulon e tuech." 
Ezra5:13 To Kuros ruodh Babulon nogolo chik e higa mokwongo mar lochne, ni mondo ochak oger Hekalu mar Nyasayeni." 
Ezra5:14 To bende ne nitie gik lemo moko molos gi dhahabu kod fedha e Od Nyasaye mane ni Jerusalem. Nebukadnezar nogolo gigo, motero Babulon, kendo oketogi e Hekalu man kuno. Ruoth Kuros nogolo gigo e Hekaluno, moketogi e lwet ng’at moro ma nyinge Sheshbazar, mane oseketo ruodh pinyni, kowachone niya," 
Ezra5:15 “Kaw gigi, idhigo, mondo iket e Hekalu Jerusalem, kendo ine ni oger Hekalu mar Nyasaye kanyo kare machon.”" 
Ezra5:16 Omiyo Sheshbazar nogo nobiro Jerusalem moketo mise mar Od Nyasaye. Chakre chieng’no nyaka chil kawuono gedo osebedo kadhi nyime, to pok orumo.’" 
Ezra5:17 Emomiyo, koro ruoth, kineno ni ber, to yie mondo onon ane ka en adier ni ruoth Kuros nogolo chik mondo oger Hekalu mar Nyasaye Jerusalem. Ruoth bang’e yie iornwa paroni kuom wachni.”" 
Ezra6:1 Kuom mano, ruoth Darius nogolo chik mi ne omany od kitepe man Babulon kuma nokanie mwandu, to ne ok oyudo." 
Ezra6:2 To kitabu moro noyud Ekbatana, dala ruoth manie piny Media, mondikie niya:" 
Ezra6:3 Ruoth Kuros nogolo chik kuom Od Nyasaye man Jerusalem e higa mokwongo mar lochne, kowacho niya, “Hekaluno mondo ochak oger, mondo obed kama itimoe misengni, kendo ichiwoe mich miwang’o. Borne nyaka bed mita piero adek, to lachne bende mita piero adek." 
Ezra6:4 Onego bedie kiepe adek mag kite madongo moluwore gi kiew achiel mar bao. Pesa migerego to biro wuok kuom mwandu ruoth. 
Ezra6:5 To bende nyaka dwok gik moko mag dhahabu gi mag fedha mitiyogo e Od Nyasaye, mane Nebukadnezar ogolo e Hekalu man Jerusalem, mokelo Babulon. Nyaka dwokgi duto e Hekalu man Jerusalem, mondo moro ka moro oket kare e Od Nyasaye.”" 
Ezra6:6 Kane ruoth Darius osesomo wechego, nogolo chik kama: “Koro in Tatenai ma ruodh piny man loka Yufrate gi Shethar-bozenai kod joweteu ma jotend pinyno, auru kuno," 
Ezra6:7 kendo uwe ni jatend jo-Yahudi gi jodonggi thuolo mondo oger Od Ruoth Nyasayeno. To mondo gigere e wang’e machon. 
Ezra6:8 To bende achiko kaka onego utim ni jodong jo-Yahudigo, mondo Od Nyasayeno oger. Kaw pesa moko moa kuom osuch piny man loka Yufrate, ochulgo gik moko duto ma jogo konyorego, mondo kik tich chung’." 
Ezra6:9 Odiechieng’ kodiechieng’ gimoro amora ma gidwaro nyaka migi, bed ni gin nyiruedhi, kata imbe, kata nyirombe mitimogo misengni miwang’o pep ni Nyasach polo, kata ngano kata chumbi kata divai kata mo, mana kaka jonabi man Jerusalem dwaro." 
Ezra6:10 Kamano mondo gitim misengni mang’we ng’ar ni Nyasach polo, kendo gilam ni ruoth gi yawuote, mondo obed mangima." 
Ezra6:11 To bende aketo chik ni, ka ng’ato oketho chikno, to nyaka gol yiend tat ode, mi gur piny, kendo chwade, kotueye e yienno. Ode bende nyaka lokre pidh owuoyo nikech kethoneno." 
Ezra6:12 Nyasaye moseyiero Jerusalem, mondo nyinge obedie, oriemb ruoth moro amora kata oganda maparo ketho wachni, kata maparo muko Od Nyasaye man Jerusalem. An Darius asegolo chik, kendo nyaka time mak orem.”" 
Ezra6:13 Tetenai ruodh piny man loka Yufrate, gi Shethar-bozenai kod jowetegi, notimo mana kaka ruoth Darius nochiko." 
Ezra6:14 Mi jodong jo-Yahudi nodhi nyime gi gedo. Weche mane Hagai janabi kod Zekaria nyakwar Iddo jokoro, nojiwogi, omiyo ne gitieko gedo kaka Nyasach Israel nochiko, kendo moluwore gi chike mag Kuros kod mag Darius." 
Ezra6:15 Gedo norumo tarik piero ariyo gadek mar due Adar e higa mar auchiel mar loch ruoth Darius. 
Ezra6:16 Bang’e jo-Israel duto, ma jodolo kod jo-Lawi gi ji duto mane oa e tuech, norwako Od Nyasaye gi mor maduong’." 
Ezra6:17 Kane girwakogo, ne gitimo misango gi ruedhi mia achiel gi imbe mia ariyo ko nyirombe mia ang’wen, to bende ne gichiwo nyuogi apar gariyo, maromre gi kar romb dhout Israel, mi gitimogo misango mar golo richo ni oganda Israel duto." 
Ezra6:18 Bang’e ne giketo jodolo gi jo-Lawi e migepegi mag tich Nyasaye e Jerusalem, kaka nondiki e kitap Musa." 
Ezra6:19 Tarik apar gang’wen mar due mokwongo, joma noa e tuech notimo Sap Pasaka." 
Ezra6:20 Noyudo ka jodolo gi jo-Lawi duto osepwodhore, omiyo ne ginego nyirombe mag Pasaka ni ji duto ma noa e tuech, kaachiel gi jowetegi ma jodolo, kendo ni gin giwegi." 
Ezra6:21 Joma nochamo Pasakano ne gin jo-Isarel mane oa e tuech, kaachiel gi jogo duto mane koro lamo Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel, bang’ weyo timbe dondruok mag ogendni ma koro nodak e pinyno." 
Ezra6:22 Ne gitimo Sap Makati ma ok Ketie Thowi kuom ndalo abiriyo ka gimor, nimar Ruoth Nyasaye nosemiyo gibedo mamor, koloko chuny ruodh Asuria mondo ohergi kendo ojiwgi e tich gero Od Nyasaye, ma Nyasach Israel." 
Ezra7:1 E ndalo loch Artaxerxes ruodh Persia, ng’at moro miluongo ni Ezra noa Babulon, modhi Jerusalem. Ne en wuod Seraya, ma wuod Azaria, wuod Hilkia," 
Ezra7:2 wuod Shalum, wuod Zadok, wuod Ahitub," 
Ezra7:3 wuod Amaria, wuod Azaria, wuod Merayoth," 
Ezra7:4 wuod Zerahia, wuod Uzi, wuod Biki," 
Ezra7:5 wuod Abishua, wuod Finehas, wuod Eleazar, ma wuod Harun jadolo maduong’." 
Ezra7:6 Ezrano ne japuonj chik, motiegore e chik Musa mane Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel omiyo joge. Ruoth Artaxerxes nomiye gik moko duto mane okwayo, nimar Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasache ne ni kode." 
Ezra7:7 Higa mar abiriyo mar loch ruoth Artaxerxes, ema Ezra kod jo-Israel moko nodhiye Jerusalem kaachiel gi jodolo gi jo-Lawi gi jower gi jorit dhorangeye kod jotich Hekalu." 
Ezra7:8 Ne gichopo kuno due mar abich, higa mar abiriyo mar loch ruoth." 
Ezra7:9 Chieng’ due achiel due mokwongo ema ne Ezra osechano mondo owuog Babulon, kendo nochopo Jerusalem chieng’ mokwongo mar due mar abich, nikech Nyasaye noseguedhe." 
Ezra7:10 Ezra noseketo chunye kuom somo chik Ruoth Nyasaye kendo rito, kopuonjo jo-Israel buchego." 
Ezra7:11 Koro ma e barua mane ruoth Artaxerxes omiyo Ezra jadolo kendo japuonj chik, molony e chike kod buche mane Ruoth Nyasaye omiyo jo-Israel:" 
Ezra7:12 “An Artaxerxes, ruodh ruodhi andiko ni Ezra, jadolo kendo japuonj chik, mong’eyo chike Nyasach polo, ka awacho kama:" 
Ezra7:13 “Koro agolo chik ni: ja-Israel moro amora manie pinya, kata bed ni en jadolo kata ja-Lawi, mochiwore mar dhi Jerusalem, nyalo dhi adhiya kodi." 
Ezra7:14 An gi jobucha abiriyo waseori mondo idhi inon ane kaka gik moko chalo e piny Juda kod Jerusalem korka chik Nyasaye moseket e lueti. 
Ezra7:15 Bende mondo iter fedha gi dhahabu ma an gi jobucha wasechiwo kuom herowa ni Nyasach Israel, ma kar dakne en Jerusalem," 
Ezra7:16 kaachiel gi fedha duto kod dhahabu ma inyalo yudo e piny Babulon duto, kanyakla gi mich ma jo-Israel gi jodolo ochiwo kuom herogi ni tich Od Nyasachgi man Jerusalem." 
Ezra7:17 To bende nyaka iti gi pesago mana kuom ng’iewo ruedhi gi imbe kod rombe gi gik mibiro timogo misango mar cham kod misango miolo piny. Gigo duto nyaka ichiw e kendo-mar-misango man e Od Nyasachu Jerusalem. 
Ezra7:18 To kapo ni fedha gi dhahabu moko odong’, to inyalo konyorigo gi joweteni kaka Nyasachu dwaro." 
Ezra7:19 Gik lemo mosemiyi mag tich Od Nyasachi, nyaka iter e nyim Nyasach Jerusalem." 
Ezra7:20 To ka inyalo dwaro gimoro mondo olosgo Od Nyasachi, to inyalo ng’iewo gi pesa mar osuch pinya." 
Ezra7:21 “To an ruoth Artaxerxes, agolo chik ni jokeno duto mag pinya man loka aora Yufrate, ni gimoro amora ma Ezra jadolo kendo japuonj chik Nyasach polo nodwar kuomu, nyaka umiye," 
Ezra7:22 mak mana ni ok onego umiye fedha mokalo kilo mia adek gi piero abich, kata ngano mokadho ogunde mia ariyo, gi divai degi mia achiel, gi mo bende degi mia achiel, mak mana kado ema unyalo miye kaka uneno." 
Ezra7:23 Gimoro amora ma Nyasach polo dwaro kuom tich Ode nyaka chiw malong’o, nono to mirima biro lwar kuom pinya gi mar yawuota." 
Ezra7:24 To bende wanyisou malong’o ni uonge gi teko mar keto osuru kata chudo moro kuom jodolo gi jo-Lawi gi jower gi jorit dhorangeye kod jotich Hekalu, kata kuom ji mamoko e Od Nyasaye." 
Ezra7:25 “To in Ezra, kuom rieko ma Nyasachi osemiyi, yier jong’ad bura mondo oyal jogi duto man e piny man loka Yufrate, mong’eyo chik Nyasachi. To jogo ma ok ong’eyo chikego, to mondo upuonji." 
Ezra7:26 Ng’ato ma ok orito chik Nyasachi, kata chikna, to mondo okume motegno, bed ni en buch tho, kata mar dare kitere kuma bor, kata mar peyo gige, kata mar tueye.”" 
Ezra7:27 Ezra nowacho niya, “Apako Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach kwerewa, moseketo wach makama e chuny ruoth mondo omed ber mar Od Ruoth Nyasaye man Jerusalem," 
Ezra7:28 kendo osemiyo ruoth gi jobuche kod jotende madongo ogena.” Kuom mano, kane aseng’eyo ni Ruoth Nyasaye oguedha, nabedo gi chir, mi achoko jotend Israel moko mondo adhigo." 
Ezra8:1 Jodong dhoudi mane odhi koda, kawuok Babulon e ndalo loch ruoth Artaxerxes e magi:" 
Ezra8:2 Kuom joka Finehas ne en Gershom; kuom joka Ithamar, ne en Daniel; kuom joka Daudi ne en Hatush" 
Ezra8:2 Kuom joka Finehas ne en Gershom; kuom joka Ithamar, ne en Daniel; kuom joka Daudi ne en Hatush" 
Ezra8:3 wuod Shekania; kuom joka Parosh, ne en Zekaria mane odhi gi chwo mia achiel gi piero abich, ma nyinggi osendiki e kitabu;" 
Ezra8:4 kuom joka Path-moab, ne en Elihoenai wuod Zerahia, ma nodhi gi chwo mia ariyo;" 
Ezra8:5 kuom joka Zatu, ne en Shekania wuod Jahaziel mane nigi chwo mia adek;" 
Ezra8:6 Kuom joka Adin, ne en Ebed wuod Jonathan gi chwo piero abich;" 
Ezra8:7 kuom joka Elam, ne en Jeshaya wuod Athalia gi chwo piero abiriyo;" 
Ezra8:8 kuom joka Shefatia, ne en Zebadia wuod Mikael gi chwo piero aboro;" 
Ezra8:9 kuom joka Joab, ne en Obadia wuod Jehiel gi chwo mia ariyo gapar gaboro;" 
Ezra8:10 kuom joka Bani, ne en Shelomith wuod Josifia gi chwo mia achiel gi piero auchiel;" 
Ezra8:11 kuom joka Bebai, ne en Zekaria wuod Bebai gi chwo piero ariyo gaboro;" 
Ezra8:12 kuom joka Azgad, ne en Johanan wuod Hakatan gi chwo mia achiel gapar." 
Ezra8:13 To dhoot mogik ne joka Adonikam, ma nyinggi Elifelet gi Jeyel kod Shemaya, mane odhi gi chwo piero auchiel," 
Ezra8:14 kod joka Bigvai ma nyinggi Uthai gi Zabud, mane odhi gi chwo piero abiriyo." 
Ezra8:15 Nachoko jogo duto e bath aora mamol kochiko Ahava, mi ne wabworo kanyo kuom ndalo adek. To kane aserango ji, kaachiel gi jodolo, nanwang’o ni onge ja-Lawi kata achiel." 
Ezra8:16 Omiyo naoro jomoko ir Iddo jatend joma odak Kasifia. Joma naorogo ne gin Eliezer gi Ariel gi Shemaya gi Elnathan gi Jarib, gi Nathan gi Zekaria kod Meshulam, duto joma dongo, kaachiel gi Joyarib kod Elnathan, mane joma ong’eyo ng’ado rieko." 
Ezra8:17 Nowachonigi mondo gidhi gikwa Iddo, kaachiel gi jowetene ma jotich Hekalu mane ni kode mondo omiwa joma nyalo tiyo e Hekalu mar Nyasaye." 
Ezra8:18 Nyasaye noguedhowa, omiyo ne gimiyowa Sherebia gi yawuote kod jowetene, duto ji apar gaboro. Sherebia ne en ng’at mariek, ma jaka Mali nyakwar Lawi ma wuod Israel." 
Ezra8:19 Bende ne gimiyowa Hashabia gi Jeshaya ma joka Merari gi jowetegi kod yawuotgi, duto ji piero ariyo," 
Ezra8:20 kaachiel gi jotich Hekalu mia ariyo gi piero ariyo. (Daudi gi jodonge ema nowalo oganda mar jotich Hekalu mondo obed joma konyo jo-Lawi) Jogo duto nondik nyinggi. 
Ezra8:21 Bang’ mano nagolo chik mondo wari kech e dho aora Ahava kanyo, ka wabolore e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachwa, kendo wakwaye mondo oritwa gi nyithindwa kod giwa duto e wuodhwa." 
Ezra8:22 Wiya nokuot kwayo ruoth askeche gi joidh farese ma diritwa e yo kuom wasigu, nikech ne wasewachone ni Nyasaye guedho jogo duto madware, kendo timonigi maber. To mirimbe mager ni kuom jogo duto moweye." 
Ezra8:23 Kuom mano, ne wariyo kech, kendo wakwayo Nyasachwa mondo wawuoth maber, mi nowinjo kwayowa." 
Ezra8:24 Nayiero jodolo ma jotelo apar gariyo, kaachiel gi Sherebia, gi Hashabia kod jowetegi apar." 
Ezra8:25 Fedha gi dhahabu kod gik lemo mane ruoth gi jobuche gi jodonge kod jo-Israel duto mane ni kanyo osechiwo ni tich Od Nyasaye, napimo, maketo e lwet jogo." 
Ezra8:26 Kar romb gik ma namiyogigo ne romo fedha kilo alufu piero ariyo, gi gik lemo mag fedha mia achiel ma pek moro ka moro oromo kilo piero abiriyo, kod dhahabu moromo kilo alufu adek." 
Ezra8:27 Gi lewni piero ariyo mag dhahabu ma nengogi ne darik alufu achiel, kod tewni ariyo mag mula mang’ang’ni, ma nengogi tek ka nengo dhahabu." 
Ezra8:28 Eka nawacho ni jogo niya, “Un joma owal ni Ruoth Nyasaye mana kaka gik lemogi. Fedha gi dhahabu to gin mich ma ji osechiwo kuom herogi ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach kwereu." 
Ezra8:29 Kawgiuru kendo uritgi nyaka chop chieng’ muketogi e ut Od Ruoth Nyasaye, ka jotend jodolo gi jo-Lawi kod jodong dhout Israel man Jerusalem neno.”" 
Ezra8:30 Kamano jodolo gi jo-Lawigo nokawo fedha gi dhahabu kod gik lemo mondo giter Jerusalem e Od Nyasachwa. 
Ezra8:31 Mi tarik apar gariyo mar due mokwongo ne wawuok but aora Ahava kuma ne wasebworoe, kwachiko Jerusalem. Nyasaye ne ni kodwa, omiyo noritowa kuom wasigu kendo kuom jomahundu mane nyalo butonwa e yo." 
Ezra8:32 Kane wachopo Jerusalem, ne wayueyo kuom ndalo adek," 
Ezra8:33 to chieng’ mar ang’wen ne wadhi e Od Nyasachwa, mi fedha gi dhahabu kod gik lemo nopim, moket e lwet Meremoth wuod Uria jadolo gi Eleazar wuod Finehas kod Jozabad wuod Jeshua gi Noadia wuod Binui ma jo-Lawi." 
Ezra8:34 Gik moko duto ne okwan sa michiwogie, kendo pekgi kod kwan-gi nondik piny." 
Ezra8:35 Bang’e joma noduogo koa e tuech Babulon, notimo ni Nyasach Israel misengni miwang’o pep. Ne gichiwo ruedhi apar gariyo mochung’ ni jo-Israel duto, gi imbe piero ochiko gauchiel kod nyirombe piero abiriyo gariyo, kaachiel gi nyuogi apar gariyo ka misango mar golo richo. Mago duto nochiw ni Ruoth Nyasaye ka misango miwang’o te." 
Ezra8:36 To bende ne gimiyo jotelo gi ruodhi mane rito piny man loka aora Yufrateno chike mag ruodh Babulon. Jogo nokonyo tich Od Nyasaye bende. 
Ezra9:1 Kane osetim gigo duto, jodongo moko nobiro ira, mowachona niya, “Jo-Israel koda ka jodolo gi jo-Lawi ok osepogore moa kuom joma ok jo-Yahudi, to gitimo mana timbe makuero mane mag jo-Kanaan gi jo-Hiti gi jo-Perizi gi jo-Jebus gi jo-Amon gi jo-Moab gi jo-Misri kod jo-Amor." 
Ezra9:2 Gisekendo nyi joma ok jo-Yahudi, ma koro odak e pinyni, kendo yawuotgi bende gisekendonigi nyi jogo. Kamano oganda maler mar Nyasaye osenywandore gi joma ok jo-Yahudi. To jotelo gi jodongo ema josebedo joketho moloyoe jomoko.”" 
Ezra9:3 Kane awinjo wachno, nayiecho lawa kod abolana, mapudho yie wiya gi yie tika, kendo nabet piny ka dhoga omoko." 
Ezra9:4 Jogo duto mane oluoro wach Nyasach Israel nobiro ira, nikech gima rach mane joma oduogo koa e tuech Babulon otimo. Nabet kanyo ka dhoga omoko nyaka sa mitimoe misango mar odhiambo." 
Ezra9:5 To kane sa mitimoe misango mar odhiambo ochopo, nachung’ aa kama ne aywagorae ka lawa oyiech, kendo nagoyo chonga piny, matang’o lweta ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachwa, ka awacho niya," 
Ezra9:6 “A Nyasachwa, wiya okuot ma ok anyal hedhora ting’o wiya malo, nimar wasenyumore e richo, kendo kethowa osebedo maduong’, motundo e polo malo." 
Ezra9:7 Chakre ndalo kwerewa nyaka chil kawuono, wasebedo joketho ahinya. Mano emomiyo ruodhi mag pinje mamoko osenegowa, kendo tueyowa kendo yako giwa, mi wasebedo gi wichkuot maduong’. Pod wasiko kamano kaachiel gi ruodhiwa kod jodolowa nyaka chil kawuono." 
Ezra9:8 A Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachwa, koro sani, kuom kinde matin, isebedonwa mang’won, kiweyo jowa moko tony, kendo isemiyowa kama wanyalo dakie e dalani maler. Iseduogo chunywa, kendo iweyonwa thuolo mondo dendwa oduogi e tuech ma wantieni." 
Ezra9:9 Adier, wan joma otue, to kata kamano in Nyasachwa, ok isejwang’owa chutho miweyowa e tuechwa, to isemiyo chuny ruodhi mag Persia obedo maber kodwa, mi gimiyowa thuolo mondo walos Hekalu mari kendo wager kuonde mokethore, kibedonwa kaka ohinga molworo Juda gi Jerusalem." 
Ezra9:10 A Nyasachwa, koro dwawach ang’o kwasejwang’o chikeni, bang’ ng’wono machal kama?" 
Ezra9:11 Nichikowa gi dho jotichni ma jonabi, kiwacho niya, ‘Piny ma koro udonjoe mondo ukawni en piny modwanyore nikech joma odakie osedwanye gi timbegi mag kiragi, mi giloke mochido chakre tung’ piny nyaka tung’ piny." 
Ezra9:12 Emomiyo kik uyie mondo yawuotgi okend nyiu, kata yawuotu okend nyigi. Bende kik utim gimoro ma dikelnigi kue, kata ma dikelnigi mwandu nyaka chieng’. Kamano unubed motegno, mi unucham gik mabeyo mag pinyno, kendo unuwe pinyno ni nyithindu ka mwandugi nyaka chieng’.’" 
Ezra9:13 “A Nyasachwa, nikumowa kuom richowa kendo kuom kethowa maduong’. Kata kamano ne ok ikumowa maromre gi richowago, to niweyo jowa moko otony, mi wabedo thuolo kaka koroni." 
Ezra9:14 Bang’ mago duto ere kaka dwachak waketh chikeni, mi wakendre gi joma timbegi monogi? Donge ditiekwa gi mirimbi, mi onge ng’ama ditony kata achiel?" 
Ezra9:15 A Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel, in jaadiera, nimar jowa manokgi koro osetony, kaka notimore e kinde mokwongo. Eri, wan joricho ma bura oloyo, to nikech richowago, onge ng’ato kuomwa manyalo chung’ e nyimi.”" 
Ezra10:1 Kane Ezra lemo kendo hulo richo, koriere piny kendo oywak e nyim Od Nyasaye, oganda jo-Israel maduong’ nobiro molwore. Ne gin chwo gi mon kod nyithindo, kendo giduto ne giywak malit." 
Ezra10:2 Eka Shekania wuod Jehiel, jaka Elam nowacho ni Ezra niya, “Waseketho e nyim Nyasachwa kuom kendo nyi joma ok jo-Yahudi, ma koro odak e pinyni. To kata ka wasetimo kamano, jo-Israel pod nigi geno." 
Ezra10:3 Emomiyo koro wasingrueru ni Nyasachwa ni wanariemb mon-go gi nyithindgi, kaka useng’adonwa rieko, un kod jogo moluoro chik Nyasaye, kendo watimuru gima chik dwaro." 
Ezra10:4 Chak mana tich, nikech en tich momiyi, kendo wabiro konyi. Bed gi chir mondo itim gima dwarore.”" 
Ezra10:5 Ezra nochung’, momiyo jotend jodolo gi jo-Lawi kod jo-Israel okuong’ore ni ginitim gima gisewachono. Mi ne gichamo muma." 
Ezra10:6 Eka Ezra noa e nyim Od Nyasaye, modhi e od Jehohanan nyakwar Eliashib, monindo kuno. To ne ok ochamo gimoro kata pi ne ok omodho, nimar noywak nikech richo mane joma oa e tuech otimo." 
Ezra10:7 Kinyne ne ogo milome e Jerusalem kendo e piny Juda duto, ni ji duto mane oa e tuech mondo ochokre Jerusalem." 
Ezra10:8 To ka ng’ato ok ochopo kapok ndalo adek orumo, to jotelo gi jodongo nyalo peyo gige duto, kendo ng’ado kare oko kuom oganda joma oa e tuech." 
Ezra10:9 Mi jo-Juda gi jo-Benjamin duto nochokore Jerusalem kapok ndalo adek orumo. Due piero ariyo due mar ochiko, ji duto nobet e laru manie nyim Od Nyasaye, ka kirni nikech luoro nomakogi, kendo nikech koth maduong’ ne goyogi." 
Ezra10:10 Ezra jadolo nochung’, mowachonigi niya, “Useketho kuom kendo nyi joma ok jo-Yahudi, kendo usemedo richo mag jo-Israel." 
Ezra10:11 To koro huluru richou ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach kwereu, kendo lokreuru mondo utim gima odwaro, kupogoru kuom joma ok jo-Yahudi, kendo kuom nyigi ma usekendo.”" 
Ezra10:12 Mi ji duto ma nochokore kanyo nodwoke gi duol maduong’ niya, “Ee, wayie timo gima iwacho." 
Ezra10:13 To eri wan ji mang’eny ka, kendo en chiri, omiyo ok wanyal dhi nyime gi chung’ oko ka. To bende tijni ok bi rumo kuom odiechieng’ achiel kata kuom ndalo ariyo, nikech waseketho gi ketho maduong’ e wachni." 
Ezra10:14 Koro jodongwa mondo ochung’ ni ogandawa duto, kendo jogo duto manie miechwa mosekendo nyi joma ok jo-Yahudi, mondo obi e nyim jodongo e seche moketi. Ng’ato ka ng’ato mondo obi e nyim jodonge kod jong’ad bura mag dalagi, nyaka mirimb Nyasaye man kuomwa e wachni rum.”" 
Ezra10:15 Ji duto noyie timo kamano, mak mana Jonathan wuod Asahel kod Jazeya wuod Tikva, kaachiel gi Meshulam kod Shebethai ma ja-Lawi ema notimo rabala e wachni." 
Ezra10:16 To joma noa e tuech notimo mana kaka ne gisesingore. Ezra jadolo noyiero jotelo moko gi nyinggi, mochung’ni dhoutgi. Ne gichako tich nono wach joma osekendo nyi joma ok jo-Yahudi tarik achiel mar due mar apar," 
Ezra10:17 mi ne gitieko tijno tarik achiel mar due mokwongo. 
Ezra10:18 Jodolo mane oyud ni osekendo nyi joma ok jo-Yahudi, ne gin Maaseya gi Eliezer gi Jarib kod Gedalia ma jaka Jeshua wuod Jozadak, gi owetene." 
Ezra10:19 Ne gikuong’ore ni nyaka giriemb mondgigo, kendo ne giomo im e kweth obed misango mar golo richogi." 
Ezra10:20 Kuom joka Imer ne gin Hanani kod Zebadia; 
Ezra10:21 kuom joka Harim ne gin Maaseya gi Elija gi Shemaya gi Jehiel kod Uzia; 
Ezra10:22 kuom joka Pashur ne gin Elioenai gi Maaseya gi Ishmael gi Nethaneel gi Jozabad kod Elasa. 
Ezra10:23 To kuom jo-Lawi ne gin Jozabad gi Shimei gi Keleya (miluongo bende ni Kelita,) gi Pethahia gi Juda kod Eliezer." 
Ezra10:24 To kuom jower ne en Eliashib. To kuom jorit dhorangeye ne gin Shalum gi Telem kod Uri. 
Ezra10:25 To magi e jo-Israel mamoko: kuom joka Parosh ne gin Ramia gi Izia gi Malkia gi Mijamin gi Eleazar gi Malkia gi Mijamin kod Benaya. 
Ezra10:26 To kuom joka Elam ne gin Matania gi Zekaria gi Jehiel gi Abdi gi Jeremoth kod Elija. 
Ezra10:27 Kuom joka Zatu ne gin Jeremoth gi Zabad kod Aziza. 
Ezra10:28 Kuom joka Bebai ne gin Jehohanan gi Hanania gi Zabai kod Athalia. 
Ezra10:29 Kuom joka Bani ne gin Meshulam gi Maluk gi Adaya gi Jashub gi Sheal kod Jeremoth. 
Ezra10:30 Kuom joka Pahath-moab ne gin Adnagi Kelal gi Benaya gi Maaseya gi Matania gi Bezalel gi Binui kod Manase. 
Ezra10:31 Kuom joka Harim to ne gin Eliezer gi Ishija gi Malkia gi Shemaya gi Simeon," 
Ezra10:32 gi Benjamin gi Maluk kod Shemaria. 
Ezra10:33 Kuom joka Hashum ne gin Matenai gi Matata gi Zabad gi Elifelet gi Jeremai gi Manase kod Shimei. 
Ezra10:34 Kuom joka Bani ne gin Maadai gi Amram gi Uel 
Ezra10:35 gi Benaya gi Bedeya gi Keluhi 
Ezra10:36 gi Vania gi Meremoth gi Eliashib 
Ezra10:37 gi Matania gi Mataenai kod Jaasau. 
Ezra10:38 Kuom joka Binui ne gin Shimei 
Ezra10:39 gi Shelemia gi Nathan gi Adaya 
Ezra10:40 gi Maknadebai gi Shashai 
Ezra10:41 gi Azareel gi Shelemia gi Shemaria 
Ezra10:42 gi Shalum gi Amaria kod Josef. 
Ezra10:43 To kuom joka Nebo ne gin Jeyel gi Matithia gi zabad gi Zebina gi Jedai gi Joel kod Benaya. 
Ezra10:43 To kuom joka Nebo ne gin Jeyel gi Matithia gi zabad gi Zebina gi Jedai gi Joel kod Benaya. 
Ezra10:44 Jogo duto nosekendo nyi joma ok jo-Yahudi, to koro ne giriembogi, kaachiel gi nyithindgi." 
Nehemiah1:1 Magi e weche mag Nehemia wuod Hakalia: E due mar Kislev, e higa mar piero ariyo mar loch Artaxerxes, kane en Susa, dala ruoth," 
Nehemiah1:2 Hanani ma owadwa nobiro gi jomoko koa Juda. Napenjogi wach Jerusalem, kod wach jo-Yahudi mane odong’ kuom joma nodok kuno, koa e tuech Babulon, kuma nosetergie." 
Nehemiah1:3 Ne gidwoka niya, “Joma nodong’ e pinyno, koa e tuech koro oneno thagruok gi wich kuot maduong’. Ohinga mar Jerusalem osemuki, kendo dhorangeyene duto osewang’ gi mach.”" 
Nehemiah1:4 Kane awinjo wachno, nabet piny maywak kuom ndalo mogwarore, ka atueyo chiemo, kendo alemo e nyim Nyasach polo." 
Nehemiah1:5 Ne alemo kama: “A Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach polo, Nyasaye maduong’ kendo malich. Irito singruok mitimo gi joma oheri kendo marito chikeni, kiherogi gi hera mosiko." 
Nehemiah1:6 Yie ichik iti kendo inen, mondo iwinj kwayona ma aketo e nyimi odiechieng’ gotieno, kakwayo ni jo-Israel. Ahulo richo ma wan jo-Israel wasetimo e nyimi. Ee, an kaachiel gi dhoodwa wasetimo richo." 
Nehemiah1:7 Wasekethoni adier, kendo ok waserito chike duto mane imiyo Musa jatichni." 
Nehemiah1:8 To yie ipar gima ninyise, kiwacho niya, ‘Kuketho chikna, to anakeu e kind ogendini." 
Nehemiah1:9 To kuduogo ira, mi urito chikna, to anachoku, kendo anadwoku e dala miseyiero mondo nyinga obedie, kata obedo ni uke muchopo e tung’ piny gi tung’ piny.’" 
Nehemiah1:10 A Ruoth Nyasaye, jo-Israel gin jotichni kendo jogo misewaro gi tekoni kod badi motegno." 
Nehemiah1:11 Yie ichik iti mondo iwinj kwayona kod kwayo jotichni mohero luoro nyingi, kendo yie iguedha kawuononi, mondo imi jal matiyone ogena.” E kindeno ne an jagam divai mar ruoth Artaxerxes." 
Nehemiah2:1 Ne en due mar Nisan, e higa mar piero ariyo mar loch ruoth Artaxerxes. Kaka gamo divai ne en tichna, ne akawo divai, mamiyo ruoth, to nakuyo kachung’ e nyime." 
Nehemiah2:2 Ruoth nopenja ni “Ang’o momiyo isin, to ok ituo? Nyaka bed ni chunyi chandore.” Kane awinjo kamano, luoro nomaka." 
Nehemiah2:3 Nadwoko ruoth niya, “Ruoth mondo odag aming’a! Akuyo nikech dala moyikie kwerena odong’ nono, kendo dhorangeyene osewang’ gi mach.”" 
Nehemiah2:4 Ruoth nopenja ni, “Koro idwa ni atimni ang’o?” Nalamo Nyasach polo," 
Nehemiah2:5 mi awacho ni ruoth niya, “Ka long’oni, kendo kiyie koda, to yie adhi Juda, nyaka dala moyikie kwerena, mondo achak agere kendo.”" 
Nehemiah2:6 Ruoth nopenja, ka mikache obet bute, niya, “Wuodhino biro kawi ndalo adi, to ibiro duogo karang’o?” Kuom mano nanyise kar ndalo madwaro, mi oyiena mondo adhi." 
Nehemiah2:7 Eka nomedo kwayo ruoth niya, “Kiyi, to miya barupe mondo ater ni ruodhi mag piny man loka aora Yufrate, mondo giyiena akadh nyaka achop Juda." 
Nehemiah2:8 To bende miya barua moro mondo adhigo ir Asaf, jarit yiend bunge magi, mondo omiya yien adhi alosgo dhorangeye kama ochiel motegno momanyore gi od ruoth, kendo alosgo ohinga mar dala, kod ot ma abiro dakie.” Ruoth nomiya gik moko duto mane akwaye, nikech Nyasacha ne ni koda." 
Nehemiah2:9 Kane achopo kuom ruodhi mag piny man loka aora Yufrate, namiyogi barupe ruoth. Noyudo ka ruoth omiya jotend lweny kod joidh farese mondo okowa." 
Nehemiah2:10 To kane Sanbalat ja-Horon kod Tobia ja-Amon ma misumba owinjo ni ng’ato osebiro mondo okel dongruok ni jo-Israel, ne gikecho ahinya." 
Nehemiah2:11 Kane achopo Jerusalem nabedo kuno kuom ndalo adek. 
Nehemiah2:12 Bang’e nakawo jomoko manok, mawuokgo gotieno, to ne ok anyiso ng’ato gima Nyasacha noseketo e chunya mondo atim ni Jerusalem. Ne waonge gi kanyna, mak mana mano mane aidho." 
Nehemiah2:13 Nawuok gotieno ka aluwo rangach miluongo ni Ranga Holo, mi achiko Soko mar Thuol, kod Ranga Owuoyo, ka anono kuonde mane ohinga mar Jerusalem omukorego, kaachiel gi dhorangeyene mane owang’ gi mach." 
Nehemiah2:14 Bang’ mano nadhi e Ranga Soko, machopo e Yap Ruoth, to ne onge kama kanja nyalo kadhoe." 
Nehemiah2:15 Ne amedo luwo holo gotieno, ka anono ohinga, eka naduogo e dala gi Ranga Holo mane owuokgo." 
Nehemiah2:16 To jotelo ne ok ong’eyo kuma ne adhiye, kata gima natimo. Bende ne pok anyiso jo-Yahudi gi jodolo gi joka ruoth gi jotelo kod ji duto mane onego kony tich, gima adwaro timo." 
Nehemiah2:17 To bang’e nawachonigi niya, “Uneno masira ma wantieni, ka Jerusalem odong’ gunda, kendo rangeyene owang’ gi mach. Koro biuru walos ohinga mar Jerusalem mondo wich kuot ma wan go orum.”" 
Nehemiah2:18 Bende nanyisogi kaka Nyasaye nosebet koda, kendo gima ne ruoth owachona mi ne gidwoka niya, “Wachakuru gedo!” Kamano ne gichako tich matek, modhi nyime maber." 
Nehemiah2:19 To kane Sanbalat ja-Horon gi Tobia ja-Amon ma misumba, kod Geshem ja-Arabu owinjo wachno, ne ginyierowa kendo gicharowa, ka gipenjowa ni, “Ang’o mutimoni? Udwaro ng’anyo ni ruoth koso?”" 
Nehemiah2:20 To nadwokogi niya, “Nyasach polo biro gwedhowa, kendo wan jotichne koro wachako gedo. To un uonge migawo kata teko kata mana rapar moro e Jerusalem.”" 
Nehemiah3:1 Eliashib jadolo maduong’ kod jodolo mamoko ne jochako tich, mogero Rangach miluongo ni Ranga Rombe. Ne gichungo sirni mage, mi girwako thikene. Ne gigero ohinga mochopo kama oger mabor mar ng’icho mar Hamea, kendo nyaka kama oger mabor mar ngicho mar Hananel. Eka ne giguedhe." 
Nehemiah3:2 To jo-Jeriko nogedo e dir Eliashib, ka Zakur wuod Imri to ne gedo e dir jo-Jerikogo." 
Nehemiah3:3 Ranga Rech to yawuot Hasenaa ema nogero. Ne gichungo sirni mage, kendo ne girwako thikene gi radedi kod lodi mage." 
Nehemiah3:4 Meremoth wuod Uria ma wuod Hakoz nogero migape e dirgi. Ng’at mane ogedo e dir jo-Meremoth ne en Meshulam wuod Berekia ma wuod Meshezabel. Zadok wuod Baana ema nogedo e dir Meshulam," 
Nehemiah3:5 to e dir Zadok to Tekoa ema nogedoe. To jodonggi ne ok oyie tiyo tich mane ruoth omiyogi. 
Nehemiah3:6 Joyada wuod Pasea kod Meshulam wuod Besodeya ne jogero Ranga Dala Machon. Ne gichungo sirni mage, mi girwako thikene gi radedi kod lodi mage." 
Nehemiah3:7 Melatia ja-Gibeon gi jo-Mizpa nogedo e dir jo-Tekoa mochopo e od jatelo man loka aora Yufrate. 
Nehemiah3:8 Uziel wuod Marhaya, jatich dhahabu, notiyo e dir jogo. Hanania, ma jalos gik mang’ue ng’ar, nogedo mokiewo gi Uziel ka gigero ohinga mar Jerusalem nyaka kama ohinga lachgo." 
Nehemiah3:9 Refaya wuod Hur mane jatend dir gweng’ Jerusalem bende nogero migape mokiewo gi migap Hanania. 
Nehemiah3:10 Jedaya wuod Harumaf nogedo kama omanyore gi ode owuon, to Hatush wuod Hashabnia ne tiyo e dire." 
Nehemiah3:11 Malkia wuod Harim, gi Hashub wuod Pahath-moab ne jochako ogero migawo machielo, kaachiel gi kama oger mabor mar ng’icho mar kende mach." 
Nehemiah3:12 Shalum wuod Halohesh, ma jatend dir gweng’ Jerusalem komachielo nogedo e dir jogo, ka nyige konye." 
Nehemiah3:13 Hanun gi jo-Zanoa nogero Ranga Holo, mi girwako thikene gi radedi kod lodi mage, to bende ne gigero ohinga ma borne oromo mita mia abich nyaka gichopo e Ranga Owuoyo." 
Nehemiah3:14 Ranga Owuoyono to Malkia wuod Rekab, jatend gweng’ Beth-hekerem ema nogero. Norwako thikene gi radedi kod lodi mage." 
Nehemiah3:15 Shalum Kol-hoze, jatend jo-Mizpa, nogero Ranga Soko, moketone tado, kendo orwako thikene gi radedi kod lodi mage. Bende nogero ohinga, chakre Yap Siloam, kama omanyore gi orundu mar ruoth, nyaka raidhi malor koa e Dala Daudi." 
Nehemiah3:16 Nehemia wuod Azbuk, jatend dir gweng’ Bethzur, nogedo e dir Shalum, mochopo nyaka kar liend Daudi, kendo nyaka yawo mokuny, kod od jolweny." 
Nehemiah3:17 Jo-Lawi ema notiyo e dir Nehemia. Hashabia, jatend dir gweng’ Keila, nogedo e dir Rehum wuod Bani, kochung’ ni jogweng’gi." 
Nehemiah3:18 Jowete Hashabia nogedo e dirgi. Ne gin jo-Binui wuod Hanadad, jatend dir gweng’ Keila machielo." 
Nehemiah3:19 Ezer wuod Jeshua jatend Mizpa nochako gero migawo machielo e dir jo-Binui, kama omanyore gi yo ma idho kochomo kar keno mar gilweny man kama ohinga ogomogo." 
Nehemiah3:20 Barak wuod Zebai bende nochako gero migawo moro, chakre kama ohinga ogomogono, nyaka dhood Eliashib jadolo maduong’." 
Nehemiah3:21 Meremoth wuod Uria ma wuod Hakoz nochako ogero migawo machielo e dir Barak. Migapeno nochakore e dhood Eliashib mochopo e giko mar od Eliashib. 
Nehemiah3:22 Jodolo mane odak e gweng’ Jerusalem nogedo e dir Meremoth," 
Nehemiah3:23 to Benjamin gi Hashub nogedo kama omanyore gi odgi. E dirgi, Azaria wuod Maaseya ma wuod Anania nogedoe kama omanyore gi ode." 
Nehemiah3:24 Binui wuod Hanadad nochako ogero migawo moro e dir Azaria, chakre od Azaria nyaka kama oting’ore ma ohinga ogomogo." 
Nehemiah3:25 Palal wuod Uzai nogedo momanyore gi kama oting’oreno, kendo momanyore gi od ruoth." 
Nehemiah3:26 Pedaya wuod Parosh nochako gedo e dir Palal nyaka kama omanyore gi Ranga Pi, gi yo ka wuok chieng’ kendo momanyore gi kama oger mabor mar ng’icho mowuok oko." 
Nehemiah3:27 E dir Pedaya, jo-Tekoa nochako ogero migawo machielo, chakre kama omanyore gi kama duong’ moger mabor mar ng’icho mowuok okono nyaka ohinga mar Ofel." 
Nehemiah3:28 To koa e Ranga Farese, jodolo ema nogedo kama omanyore gi utgi." 
Nehemiah3:29 Zadok wuod Imer nogedo e dir jodolo kama omanyore gi ode. E dir Zadok to Shemaya wuod Shekania mane jarit Rangach mochiko yo wuok chieng’, ema nogedoe." 
Nehemiah3:30 Hanania wuod Shemelia, kod Hanun wuod Zalaf mar auchiel ne jochako gero migawo moro e dir Shemaya. Meshulam wuod Berekia noloso ohinga e dir jogo, kama omanyore gi ode." 
Nehemiah3:31 Malkia jatich dhahabu notiyo e dir Meshulam, mogedo nyaka od jotich Hekalu, kod od johala, kama omanyore gi Rangach Miyworoe, kendo nyaka ot man ewi tado mar kama ohinga ogomogo." 
Nehemiah3:32 Jotich dhahabu kod joohala ema noloso ohinga chakre gorofa nyaka Ranga Rombe. 
Nehemiah4:1 Kane Sanbalat owinjo ni wagero ohinga mar Jerusalem, mirima nomake ahinya, kendo nojaro jo-Yahudi," 
Nehemiah4:2 kopenjo jowetene kod jolweny mane ni Samaria niya, “Jo-Yahudi mayomyomgi dwaro timo ang’o ka? Giparo ni digilos kanyo kendo? Bende diginyal timo misango kendo tieko tich godiechieng’ achiel? Koso giparo ni ginyalo golo kite kuom pidhe ohinga mowang’go, mi gichak gigedgo?”" 
Nehemiah4:3 Tobia ja Amon, mane oyudo ochung’ bute, bende nowacho niya, “We gigedi. To kata mana bwe koidho ohingano, to nyaka oruombre piny!”" 
Nehemiah4:4 “A Nyasachwa, winjie kaka gijarowa. Dwok ayanygi e wigi giwegi, kendo itergi e piny mabor ka joma otue ma ji jaro." 
Nehemiah4:5 Kik iwenigi richogi, kendo kik wiyi wil gi kethogi, nikech gisechayo jogedo e lela.”" 
Nehemiah4:6 Ne wamedo mana gero ohinga mi olworo, kendo borne modhi malo nochopo e kore nimar ji ne nigi chuny mar tich." 
Nehemiah4:7 To kane Sanbalat kod Tobia, kaachiel gi jo-Arabu gi jo-Amor kod jo-Ashdod owinjo ni tij gero ohinga mar Jerusalem odhi nyime maber, kendo ni kuonde momukore bende osedin, mirima nomakogi ahinya," 
Nehemiah4:8 mi ne gichokore giduto mondo gibi gimonj Jerusalem, kendo gimi ji kihondko." 
Nehemiah4:9 Kuom mano ne walamo Nyasachwa, kendo ne waketo askeche ma jorit odiechieng’ gotieno mondo ogeng’gi." 
Nehemiah4:10 To jo-Juda nowacho niya, “Pidhe mag kuonde momukore ng’eny, to teko joma goologi osedok chien, omiyo ok wanyal medo gero ohinga.”" 
Nehemiah4:11 Wasikwa bende nowacho niya, “Wabiro monjogi, mwaneggi, kapok giwinjo kata neno gimoro, mi tich biro chung’.”" 
Nehemiah4:12 Kane jo-Yahudi modak machiegni gi wasikwa obiro irwa, ne giwachonwa jading’eny ni wasikwago biro wuok kuonde duto ma gidakie mondo omonjwa." 
Nehemiah4:13 Kane awinjo wachno, nachano ji e dhoutgi, maketo kuonde mane ni thuolo e kor ohinga, ka giting’o ligangla gi tong’ kod atung’." 
Nehemiah4:14 Eka narango piny kaka chalo, manyiso ruoth kod jotelo gi ji duto niya, “Kik uluorgi, to paruru Ruoth Nyasaye maduong’ kendo malich, kendo uked ni oweteu gi yawuotu gi nyiu gi mondu kod miechu.”" 
Nehemiah4:15 Kane wasikwa owinjo ni wasefwenyo gima gichano timo, kendo ni Nyasaye oseketho parogi, ne giweyowa, mi waduto ne wadhi nyime gi gedo." 
Nehemiah4:16 Chakre chieng’no, nus mar joga nodhi nyime gi gedo, to nus modong’ noting’o tong’ gi okumba gi atung’, ka girwakore gi akor mag lweny. Jotelo to nokwayo jo-Juda" 
Nehemiah4:17 mane gedo. Joma ne golo pidhe mag kuonde momukorego ne tiyo gi lwedo achiel, to lwedo machielo gimakogo gilweny." 
Nehemiah4:18 Jogedo bende notiyo ka nigi liganglagi. Ja go tung’ to nochung’ buta. 
Nehemiah4:19 Naloso gi joka ruoth kod jotelo gi ji duto, ka awacho niya, “Tich duong kendo omamore, omiyo wakelore wakelore kwagedo." 
Nehemiah4:20 Kuom mano, kamoro amora muwinjo ka tung’ ywakie, to yworwauru kanyo, kendo Nyasachwa biro kedonwa.”" 
Nehemiah4:21 Kamano ne wadhi nyime gi tich, chakre ru piny,, nyaka yuso piny, ka nus ji oting’o tong’." 
Nehemiah4:22 E kindego nawacho ni ji bende niya, “Ng’ato ka ng’ato mondo onind Jerusalem, kaachiel gi jatichne, mondo gibednwa joma ritowa gotieno, kendo joma tiyo godiechieng’.”" 
Nehemiah4:23 Kuom mano, an gi owetena gi joga kod askeche ma rita, ne ok walonyo lepwa, kendo seche duto ne wamako gilwenjwa e lwetwa ma korachwich." 
Nehemiah5:1 Bang’ kinde moko ji duto machwo gi mamon, nochako ywagore malit nikech gima ne jo Yahudi wetegi otimo." 
Nehemiah5:2 Jomoko ne ng’ur ni gisesingo yawuotgi gi nyigi mondo giyud chiemo ma digiresgo ngimagi. 
Nehemiah5:3 Jomoko to ne singo puothegi mag cham gi mag mzabibu kod utegi mondo giyud cham nikech kech. 
Nehemiah5:4 To jomoko bende ne singo puothegi mag cham gi mag mzabibu mondo giyud pesa ma digigolgo osuru ni ruoth. 
Nehemiah5:5 Ne giwacho niya, “Donge gik ma wakonyorego chalo mana gi gik ma ji duto konyorego? Nyithindwa bende chalo mana gi nyithind ji mamoko. To kata kamano pod wachuno yawuotwa gi nyiwa mondo obed wasumbni. Kata sani nyiwa moko osedoko wasumbni, to onge gima wanyalo timo, nikech puothewa mag cham gi mag mzabibu nie lwet jomoko.”" 
Nehemiah5:6 Kane awinjo ywagruokgino kod weche mane giwacho, mirima maduong’ nomaka." 
Nehemiah5:7 To nahoyo chunya, mi aparo gima onego atim. Bang’e nadhi maloso gi joka ruoth kod jotelo moko, ka akwerogi ni gisetimo marach kuom kawo jo-Yahudi wetegi ka gik mosing ni gope." 
Nehemiah5:8 Eka namedo wachonigi niya, “Jo-Yahudi weteu mane jopinje mamoko ong’iewo, wasewaro mwadwoko, kaka wanyalo, to un koro uuso mana joweteu uwegi, to mano biro chunowa mana ni nyaka wawargi kendo!” Ne giling’ ka dhogi omoko." 
Nehemiah5:9 Eka nadhi nyime kawachonigi niya, “Gima utimo rach! Owinjore ubed joma oluoro Nyasaye ahinya, mondo ogendini ma wasikwa kik yud thuolo mar charowa." 
Nehemiah5:10 An awuon gi jowetena kod joga, waholo ji pesa kod cham, to ok wakaw ohala. Waweuru wach mar kawo ji ka joma osing kuom gope." 
Nehemiah5:11 Dwoknigiuru utgi, kod puothegi mag cham gi mag mzabibu kod mag zeituni, kaachiel gi ohala museyudo kuom pesa gi cham gi mag mzabibu kod mag zeituni, kaachiel gi ohala museyudo kuom pesa gi cham gi divai manyien kod mo musehologi.”" 
Nehemiah5:12 Eka ne gisingore niya, “Wabiro dwokonigi gigo duto, kendo ok wanadwar ohala moro kuomgi.” Koro eka naluongo jodolo, mi amiyo joma noseketho okuong’ore ni ginitim gima gisewacho." 
Nehemiah5:13 Bang’e nateng’o nangana, ka awachonigi niya, “Ng’ato ka ng’ato ma ok ochopo singruokni, to Nyasaye mondo oteng’ oko kuom joge kendo kuom mwandune, mana kaka aseteng’o nangana, modong’ nono.” Eka ji duto ma nochokore nowacho ni, “Obed kamano.” Mi ne gipako Ruoth Nyasaye. Bange ne gitimo kaka ne gisingore." 
Nehemiah5:14 To bende kuom higni apar gariyo duto mane abedoe jatend piny Juda, chakre higa mar piero ariyo mar loch ruoth Artaxerxes nyaka higa mar piero adek mar lochne, an gi jowetena ne ok wakawo chiemo mane oyie ni jatelo kawo kuom jopinyno." 
Nehemiah5:15 Jotelo ma nokwongona noketo ni ji ting’ mapek, ka gikawo kuomgi chiemo kod divai ma nengogi ne romo nus kilo mar fedha odiechieng’ kodiechieng’. To bende jotichgi ne thago ji, to an ne ok atimo kamano, nikech naluoro Nyasaye." 
Nehemiah5:16 Bende naketo tekra duto e tich ohinga, kendo ne ok ang’iewo lowo" 
Nehemiah5:17 To bende napidho jo-Yahudi mia achiel gi piero abich, koriwore gi jong’ad bura. Ji mamoko ma noa e pinje mokiewo kodwa bende narwako." 
Nehemiah5:18 Chiemo mane gichamo odiechieng’ kodiechieng’ ne romo dhiang’ achiel gi rombe auchiel machwe. Gwen bende nilosona, kendo bang’ ndalo apar apar nikelona divai mang’eny mopogore opogore. Mago duto nagolo kuom mwanduna awuon, to kata kamano, ne ok akawo chiemo mane oyie ni jatelo kawo kuom jopiny, nikech ji ne nigi ting’ mapek mohingogi." 
Nehemiah5:19 A Nyasacha, par gik moko duto masetimo ni jogi, kendo iguedha." 
Nehemiah6:1 Sanbalat gi Tobia gi Geshem ja-Arabi kod wasikwa mamoko nowinjo ni wasetieko gero ohinga, ma onge kamoro momukore modong’, kata obedo ni ne pok aketo thike mag dhorangeye." 
Nehemiah6:2 Mano omiyo Sanbalat gi Geshem noluonga mondo adhi gi Hakefirim e paw Ono, alos kodgi. To mano ne mana riekogi mar timona marach." 
Nehemiah6:3 Omiyo naoronigi joote gi wach niya, “An gi tich maduong’, omiyo ok anyal biro. Ere kaka dawe tich mondo ochung’, ka abiro iru mwalo kuno?”" 
Nehemiah6:4 Ne giluonga kamano nyading’wen, to e kinde ka kinde nadwokogi mana machalre." 
Nehemiah6:5 To e luong mar abich, Sanbalat noorona wach kod joote moting’o barua ma ok odin." 
Nehemiah6:6 Baruano nondikie niya, “Wach oselandore e kind ogendini ni in kod jo-Yahudi uchano ng’anyo, kendo Geshem bende osewinjo kamano. Mano emomiyo igero ohinga. Wawinjo bende ni in iwuon idwaro bedo ruoth." 
Nehemiah6:7 Kendo wawinjo ni iseketo jonabi mondo oland wach e Jerusalem, ni nigi ruoth, ma enie in. Bed gi ratiro ni ruoth biro winjo wachni, omiyo bi piyo mondo walos kodi.”" 
Nehemiah6:8 To nadwokogi niya, “Onge gimoro mosetimore kaka uwachono. Mago mana weche mag miriambo, muhango un uwegi!”" 
Nehemiah6:9 Giduto ne gidwaro bwogowa, ka giparo ni wabiro nyosore, kendo tichwa ok bi rumo. To namedo keto tekra duto e tich." 
Nehemiah6:10 Chieng’ moro nadhi e od Shemaya wuod Delaya ma wuod Mehetabel, mane chik otueyo e ode. Nowachona niya, “Wadhi e Od Nyasaye, mondo warom ei Kama Ler, kendo waloruru dhoudi, nimar gibiro biro negi gotieno.”" 
Nehemiah6:11 To nadwoke niya, “Bende ng’ato kaka an diring adier? Koso ng’ato kaka an nyalo donjo e Hekalu mondo oresre?" 
Nehemiah6:12 Ooyo, ok abi donjo!” Eka nafwenyo ni Nyasaye ne ok oore, to nokoro wechego mana ni mondo ohinya, kendo ni Tobia gi Sanbalat ema nomiye asoya mondo okor wechego." 
Nehemiah6:13 Ne gimiye asoya mondo obwoga, adonj e Hekalu kamano, mi atim gima chik okwero mondo giketh nyinga." 
Nehemiah6:14 A Nyasacha, par gima Tobia gi Sanbalat josetimo, kendo par kaka Noadia janabi madhako kod jonabi mamoko josetemo bwoga." 
Nehemiah6:15 Chieng’ due piero ariyo gabich mar due Elul, ohinga norumo. Tich notieko ndalo piero abich gariyo." 
Nehemiah6:16 Kane wasikwa owinjo kamano, kendo ogendini mokiewo kodwa oneno tijno, ne giwuoro kaka en tich maduong’, kendo ne ging’eyo ni Nyasachwa ema nokonyowa." 
Nehemiah6:17 To e kindego duto jodong Juda ne oro barupe mang’eny ni Tobia, kendo ne giyudo dwoko moa kuome." 
Nehemiah6:18 Jo-Juda mang’eny ne ni kode e winjruok, nimar ne en or Shekania wuod Ara, kendo wuode ma Jehohanan nokendo nyar Meshulam wuod Berekia." 
Nehemiah6:19 Jogo ne pako Tobia e wang’a pile, kendo ne ginyise weche mane awacho. To bende Tobia nondikona barupe kobwogago." 
Nehemiah7:1 Kane ohinga oseger manyien, kendo aketone dhorangeye, ne ayiero jorit dhorangeye." 
Nehemiah7:2 Bende naketo Hanani owadwa gi Hanania mane jatend kama ochiel motegno, mondo jobed jotend Jerusalem. Nayiero Hanania nikech ne en ng’at mogen kendo moluoro Nyasaye moloyo joma moko duto." 
Nehemiah7:3 Nawachonigi niya, “Rangeye mag Jerusalem ok onego owe thuolo e seche mag odiechieng’ tir, to nyaka chieggi matek ka joritgi yueyo. Bende yieruru jo-Jerusalem moko bende obed jorito. Moko uket kuonde monego riti, to moko uket e nyim utgi giwegi.”" 
Nehemiah7:4 Jerusalem ne lach kendo iye ne ni thuolo, kendo udi ne pok ochak gerie." 
Nehemiah7:5 Nyasaye nojiwo chunya mondo achok joka ruoth kod jotelo gi ji duto, mondo ondik nyinggi kaluwore gi dhoutgi. Bende nayudo kitabu mondikie nying joma nokuongo duogo, kaachiel gi anyuolagi." 
Nehemiah7:6 Magi e weche mane ayudo kondiki e kitabuno: Kuom jo-Juda mane Nebukadnezar ruodh Babulon odaro motero e tuech, magi e joma noduogo Jerusalem gi Juda, ng’ato ka ng’ato e dalagi." 
Nehemiah7:7 Jotendgi ne gin Zerubabel gi Jeshua gi Nehemia gi Azaria gi Raamia gi Nahamani gi Mordekai gi Bilshan gi Mispereth gi Bigvai gi Nehum kod Baana. 
Nehemiah7:8 Kar romb jo-Israel machwo e magi: joka Parosh ne romo alufu ariyo gi mia achiel kod piero abiriyo gariyo; 
Nehemiah7:9 joka Shefatia ne mia adek gi piero abiriyo gariyo; 
Nehemiah7:10 joka Ara, mia auchiel gi piero abich gariyo;" 
Nehemiah7:11 joka Pahath-moab, tiende ni joka Jeshua kod joka Joab, ne alufu ariyo gi mia aboro;" 
Nehemiah7:12 joka Elam, alufu achiel gi mia ariyo kod piero abich gang’wen;" 
Nehemiah7:13 joka Zatu, mia aboro gi piero ang’wen gabich;" 
Nehemiah7:14 joka Zakai, mia abiriyo gi piero auchiel;" 
Nehemiah7:15 joka Binui, mia auchiel gi piero ang’wen gaboro;" 
Nehemiah7:16 joka Bebai, mia auchiel gi piero ariyo gaboro;" 
Nehemiah7:17 joka Azgad, alufu ariyo gi mia adek kod piero ariyo gariyo;" 
Nehemiah7:18 joka Adonikam, mia auchiel gi piero auchiel gabiriyo;" 
Nehemiah7:19 joka Bigvai, alufu ariyo gi piero auchiel gabiriyo;" 
Nehemiah7:20 joka Adin, mia auchiel gi piero abich gabich;" 
Nehemiah7:21 joka Ater, ma tiende ni joka Hezekia, to piero ochiko gaboro;" 
Nehemiah7:22 joka Hashum, mia adek gi piero ariyo gaboro;" 
Nehemiah7:23 joka Bezai, mia adek gi piero ariyo gang’wen;" 
Nehemiah7:24 joka Harif, mia achiel gapar gariyo;" 
Nehemiah7:25 joka Gibeon, to piero ochiko gabich;" 
Nehemiah7:26 jo-Bethlehem gi jo-Netofa, mia achiel gi piero aboro gaboro;" 
Nehemiah7:27 jo-Anathoth, mia achiel gi piero ariyo gaboro;" 
Nehemiah7:28 jo-Beth-Azmoth, piro ang’wen gariyo;" 
Nehemiah7:29 jo-Kiriath-jearim gi jo-Kefira kod jo-Beeroth, mia abiriyo gi piero ang’wen gadek;" 
Nehemiah7:30 jo-Rama gi jo-Geba, mia auchiel gi piero ariyo gachiel;" 
Nehemiah7:31 jo-Mikmas, mia achiel gi piero ariyo gariyo;" 
Nehemiah7:32 jo-Bethel gi jo-Ai, mia achiel gi piero ariyo gadek;" 
Nehemiah7:33 jo-Nebo, piero abich gariyo;" 
Nehemiah7:34 jo-Elam machielo, alufu achiel gi mia ariyo kod piero abich gariyo;" 
Nehemiah7:35 jo-Harim, mia adek gi piero ariyo;" 
Nehemiah7:36 jo-Jeriko, mia adek gi piero ang’wen gabich;" 
Nehemiah7:37 jo-Lod gi jo-Hadid kod jo-Ono, mia abiriyo gi piero ariyo gachiel;" 
Nehemiah7:38 to jo-Senaa, alufu adek gi mia ochiko kod piero adek." 
Nehemiah7:39 Kar romb jodolo: joka Jedaya ma jodhood Jeshua ne mia ochiko gi piero abiriyo gadek; 
Nehemiah7:40 Joka Imer, alufu achiel gi piero abich gariyo;" 
Nehemiah7:41 joka Pashur, alufu achiel gi mia ariyo kod piero ang’wen gabiriyo;" 
Nehemiah7:42 to joka Harim, alufu achiel kod apar gabiriyo." 
Nehemiah7:43 Kar romb jo-Lawi; joka jeshua gi joka Kadmiel, ma jodhood Hadava ne oromo ji piero abiriyo gang’wen." 
Nehemiah7:44 Kar romb jower: joka Asaf ne mia achiel gi piero ang’wen gaboro. 
Nehemiah7:45 Kar romb jorit dhorangeye: joka Shalum gi joka Ater gi joka Talmon gi joka Akub gii joka Hatita kod joka Shobai, duto ji mia achiel gi piero adek gaboro." 
Nehemiah7:46 Jotich Hekalu ne magi: joka Ziha gi joka Hasufa gi joka Taboath 
Nehemiah7:47 gi joka Keros gi joka Sia gi joka Padon 
Nehemiah7:48 gi joka Lebana gi joka Hagaba gi joka Shalmai 
Nehemiah7:49 gi joka Hanan gi joka Hidel gi joka Gahar," 
Nehemiah7:50 gi joka Reaya gi joka Rezin gi joka Nekoda 
Nehemiah7:51 gi joka Gazam gi joka Uza gi joka Pesea 
Nehemiah7:52 gi joka Besai gi joka Meunim gi joka Nefishesim 
Nehemiah7:53 gi joka Bakbuk gi joka Hakufa gi joka Harhur 
Nehemiah7:54 gi joka Bazluth gi joka Mehida gi joka Harsha 
Nehemiah7:55 gi joka Barkos gi joka Sisera, gi joka Tema" 
Nehemiah7:56 gi joka Nezia kod joka Hatifa. 
Nehemiah7:57 Nyikwa jotich Solomon ne gin: joka Sotai gi joka Sofereth gi joka Perisa 
Nehemiah7:58 gi joka Jaala gi joka Darkon gi joka Gedel 
Nehemiah7:59 gi joka Shefatia gi joka Hatil gi joka Pokereth-hazebaim kod joka Amon. 
Nehemiah7:60 Kar romb jotich Hekalu, kaachiel gi nyikwa jotich Solomon, duto ne romo ji mia adek gi piero ochiko gariyo." 
Nehemiah7:61 Koro magi e joma noduogo koa Tel-mela gi Tel-hasha gi Kerub gi Adon kod Imer, to ne ok nyal ng’e anywolagi, kata ka gin koth jo-Israel adier;" 
Nehemiah7:62 joka Delaya gi joka Tobia gi joka Nekoda duto ji mia auchiel gi piero ang’wen gariyo. 
Nehemiah7:63 Jodolo moko bende ne ok ong’e anywolagi. Ne gin joka Hobaya gi joka Hakoz gi joma luongore ni joka Barzilai, nikech kwargi nokendo nyar Barzilai ja-Gilead, mokawo nying jaduong’neno." 
Nehemiah7:64 Jogo nomanyo nyingegi e kitepe ma nondikie nying anywola, to ne ok giyudo, omiyo nokwan-gi ka joma pok owinjore tiyo tich dolo," 
Nehemiah7:65 kendo ruoth nokwerogi ni kik gicham chiemo moyang’ ni jodolo ka pok jadolo obiro manyalo penjo Ruoth Nyasaye wach gi ombulu miluongo ni Urim gi Thumim. 
Nehemiah7:66 Ji duto mane ochokore kanyakla ne romo alufu piro ang’wen gariyo gi mia adek kod piero auchiel," 
Nehemiah7:67 ka ok okwan wasumbgi machwo gi mamon, mane romo alufu abiriyo gi mia adek kod piero adek gabiriyo. Bende ne gin gi jower mia ariyo gi piero ang’wen gabich, machwo gi mamon" 
Nehemiah7:68 Ne gin gi farese mia abiriyo gi piero adek gauchiel, gi nyumbu mia ariyo gi piero ang’wen gabich," 
Nehemiah7:69 gi ngamia mia ang’wen gi piero adek gabich, kod kenje alufu auchiel gi mia abiriyo gi piero ariyo." 
Nehemiah7:70 Jodong dhoudi moko nogolo chiwo ni tich. Ruoth bende nogolo dhahabu moromo kilo mia achiel gi piero adek, gi tewni piero abich, kod lep dolo mia abich gi piero adek." 
Nehemiah7:71 Jodong dhoudi moko nogolo dhahabu moromo kilo alufu achiel gi mia ariyo, mondo okonygo tich." 
Nehemiah7:72 Joma odong’ nogolo dhahabu moromo kilo alufu ariyo gi mia auchiel gi fedha moromo kilo alufu achiel gi mia achiel kod lep dolo piero auchiel gabiriyo. 
Nehemiah7:73 Jodolo gi jo-Lawi kod ji mamoko nodak Jerusalem kendo e alworane. Jorit dhorangeye gi jower gi jotich Hekalu kod jo-Israel mamoko duto, to nodak e miechgi giwegi." 
Nehemiah8:1 Kane due mar abiriyo ochopo, kendo jo-Israel koro odak e miechgi, ji duto nochokore gi chuny achiel e laru manie nyim Rangach miluongo ni Ranga Pi. Ne gikawo Ezra ma japuonj chik mondo okel kitap chik Musa mane Ruoth Nyasaye osechiko jo-Israel mondo oriti." 
Nehemiah8:1 Kane due mar abiriyo ochopo, kendo jo-Israel koro odak e miechgi, ji duto nochokore gi chuny achiel e laru manie nyim Rangach miluongo ni Ranga Pi. Ne gikawo Ezra ma japuonj chik mondo okel kitap chik Musa mane Ruoth Nyasaye osechiko jo-Israel mondo oriti." 
Nehemiah8:2 Omiyo chieng’ mokwongo mar due mar abiriyo, Ezra jadolo nokelo kitap chik e nyim oganda, ma noting’o chwo gi mon kod nyithindo duto mane oromo winjo tiend gik mane iwacho." 
Nehemiah8:2 Omiyo chieng’ mokwongo mar due mar abiriyo, Ezra jadolo nokelo kitap chik e nyim oganda, ma noting’o chwo gi mon kod nyithindo duto mane oromo winjo tiend gik mane iwacho." 
Nehemiah8:3 Nosomo kitabuno chakre okinyi mang’ich nyaka odiechieng’ tir, kochung’ momanyore gi laru man e nyim Ranga Pi, e nyim chwo gi mon kod nyithindo mane oromo winjo tiend gik mane iwacho. Ji duto nochiko itgi maber mondo owinj kitap chik." 
Nehemiah8:4 Ezra japuonj chik nochung’ ewi ndiri mar bao molos ni somo chik, ka Matithia gi Shema gi Anaya gi Uria gi Hilkia kod Maaseya ochung’ e bathe ma korachwich, to Pedaya gi Mishael gi Malkia gi Hashum gi Hashbadana gi Zekaria kod Meshulam to ne jochung’ e bathe ma koracham." 
Nehemiah8:4 Ezra japuonj chik nochung’ ewi ndiri mar bao molos ni somo chik, ka Matithia gi Shema gi Anaya gi Uria gi Hilkia kod Maaseya ochung’ e bathe ma korachwich, to Pedaya gi Mishael gi Malkia gi Hashum gi Hashbadana gi Zekaria kod Meshulam to ne jochung’ e bathe ma koracham." 
Nehemiah8:5 Ezra noelo kitabu, ka ji duto neno, nimar nochung’ kama oting’ore. Kane oele kamano, ji duto nochung’." 
Nehemiah8:5 Ezra noelo kitabu, ka ji duto neno, nimar nochung’ kama oting’ore. Kane oele kamano, ji duto nochung’." 
Nehemiah8:6 Ezra nopako Ruoth Nyasaye maduong’ mi ji duto noting’o badgi malo, kawacho ni, “Obed kamano! Obed kamano!” Giduto ne gimiyo Ruoth Nyasaye duong’, ka gigoyo chonggi piny kendo gikulore nyaka e lowo." 
Nehemiah8:6 Ezra nopako Ruoth Nyasaye maduong’ mi ji duto noting’o badgi malo, kawacho ni, “Obed kamano! Obed kamano!” Giduto ne gimiyo Ruoth Nyasaye duong’, ka gigoyo chonggi piny kendo gikulore nyaka e lowo." 
Nehemiah8:7 Jeshua gi Bani gi Sherebia gi Jamin gi Akub gi Shabethai gi Hodia gi Maaseya gi Kelita gi Azaria gi Jozabad gi Hanan kod Pelaya ma jo-Lawi nohulo ni ji tiend chik, mana ka ji obet keregi." 
Nehemiah8:8 Ne gisomo kitap chik mar Nyasaye gi dwol machil, kendo ne gihulo tiend wechego ka gipuonjogo ji weche mane gisesomo." 
Nehemiah8:9 Kane ji duto owinjo weche mag chik, ne giywak. To Nehemia ma ruoth kod Ezra ma jadolo kendo japuonj chik kaachiel gi jo-Lawi mane puonjo ji, ne jowacho ni ji duto niya, “Kawuono en odiechieng’ mowal ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu, omiyo kik uku, kata kik uywagi.”" 
Nehemiah8:9 Kane ji duto owinjo weche mag chik, ne giywak. To Nehemia ma ruoth kod Ezra ma jadolo kendo japuonj chik kaachiel gi jo-Lawi mane puonjo ji, ne jowacho ni ji duto niya, “Kawuono en odiechieng’ mowal ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu, omiyo kik uku, kata kik uywagi.”" 
Nehemiah8:10 Eka Ezra nowachonigi niya, “Koro unyalo dhi mondo ucham chiemo mabeyo kod gik mamit mimadho, bende upognie joma odhier ma onge gimoro, nikech odiechieng’ni owal ni Ruoth Nyasaye. Kik uku nikech mor ma Ruoth Nyasaye miyou ema kelonu teko.”" 
Nehemiah8:10 Eka Ezra nowachonigi niya, “Koro unyalo dhi mondo ucham chiemo mabeyo kod gik mamit mimadho, bende upognie joma odhier ma onge gimoro, nikech odiechieng’ni owal ni Ruoth Nyasaye. Kik uku nikech mor ma Ruoth Nyasaye miyou ema kelonu teko.”" 
Nehemiah8:11 Jo-Lawi bende nokweyo ji kawachonigi niya, “Ling’uru, nikech odiechieng’ni en chieng’ maler. Kik ubed gi kuyo.”" 
Nehemiah8:12 Kuom mano ji duto nodhi mondo ochiem kendo omethi, kendo opog chiemo ni joma moko, kendo otim sawo gi mor maduong’, nikech ne gisewinjo gima opuonjgi." 
Nehemiah8:13 Chieng’ mar ariyo jodong dhoudi duto, kaachiel gi jodolo kod jo-Lawi, nochokore e nyim Ezra japuonj chik, mondo opuonjre chik." 
Nehemiah8:13 Chieng’ mar ariyo jodong dhoudi duto, kaachiel gi jodolo kod jo-Lawi, nochokore e nyim Ezra japuonj chik, mondo opuonjre chik." 
Nehemiah8:14 Ne giyudo kondik e chik ni Ruoth Nyasaye nosechiko jo-Israel gi dho Musa ni onego gidagi e kiche ndalo sawo matimore e due mar abiriyo," 
Nehemiah8:15 kendo ni mondo giland wach e miechgi duto kendo e Jerusalem ni ji odhi kuonde moting’ore odwar bede zeituni mopidhi kod mago ma ok opidhi gi mag othidhe kod mag yien moko motimo oboke, mondo olosgo kiche kaka chik dwaro." 
Nehemiah8:16 Omiyo ji nodhi moomo bede yien, kendo ogerogo kichego, ka ng’ato ka ng’ato ogero mare owuon ewi tat ode, kata e laru mar dalane, kata e laru mar Od Nyasaye kata e laru momanyore gi Ranga Efraim." 
Nehemiah8:17 Kamano ji duto ma noduogo koa e tuech noloso kiche mi odakie. To gima kamano ne pok jo-Israel otimo chakre ndalo Joshua wuod Nun nyaka ndalogo. Kuom mano ne nitie mor maduong’. 
Nehemiah8:17 Kamano ji duto ma noduogo koa e tuech noloso kiche mi odakie. To gima kamano ne pok jo-Israel otimo chakre ndalo Joshua wuod Nun nyaka ndalogo. Kuom mano ne nitie mor maduong’. 
Nehemiah8:18 Odiechieng kodiechieng’ chakre chieng’ mokwongo nyaka chieng’ mogik, nisomo kitap chik mar Nyasaye. Ne gitimo nyasi kuom ndalo abiriyo, to chieng’ mar aboro ne giloso sawo mogik, kaka chik dwaro." 
Nehemiah9:1 Chieng’ due piero ariyo gang’wen mar dueno jo-Israel nochokore ka riyo kech, kendo ka rwakore gi pien gugru, kendo ka gibuko wigi buru." 
Nehemiah9:2 Jogo ma jo-Israel hie nopogore moa kuom jopinje mamoko. Ne gichung’ kendo gihulo richogi gi timbe anjawo mane kweregi otimo. 
Nehemiah9:3 Kane gichung’ kamano, kitap chik mar Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachgi nosom kuom seche adek, eka ne gihulo richogi kendo gilamo Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachgi kuom seche adek mamoko." 
Nehemiah9:4 Jeshua gi Bani gi Kadmiel Shebania gi Buni gi Sherebia gi Bani kod Kenani nochung’ e raidhi ma noket ni jo-Lawi, kendo ne giywak matek ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachgi." 
Nehemiah9:5 Eka jo-Lawi ma Jeshua gi Kadmiel gi Bani gi Hashabnia gi Sherebia gi Hodia gi Shebani kod Petyhahia, nowacho niya: Chung’uru kendo upak Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu, kuwachone ni, “Higni gi higni ipako nyingi moluor, mokadho dend kod pak.”" 
Nehemiah9:6 A Ruoth Nyasaye in kendi e Nyasaye. In ema nichweyo polo gi polo man malo mogik, kaachiel gi piny gi gik mantie iye, gi nembe kod gik mantie igi. In ema iritogi duto, kendo gik moko duto manie polo, lamo mana in." 
Nehemiah9:7 In e Ruoth Nyasaye ma noyiero Abram, kendo ogole e dala mar Ur e piny jo-Kaldea, mochake ni Ibrahim." 
Nehemiah9:8 Niyudo ka en ng’at ma jaadiera e nyimi, mi nitimo kode singruok ni ibiro miye piny mane jo-Kanaan gi jo-Hiti gi jo-Amor gi jo-Perzi gi jo-Jebus kod jo-Girgash odakie, mondo obed mare gi nyikwaye. Kendo nichopo singruokno, nikech in jaadiera." 
Nehemiah9:9 “Bende nineno masiche mane kwerewa oyudo e piny Misri, kendo niwinjo ywakgi e Nam Makwar." 
Nehemiah9:10 Nitimo ranyisi gi honni misandogo Farao gi joge kod ji duto mane ni e pinye, nimar ning’eyo kaka ne gitiyo kwerewa gi achaye. Kamano nimiyo nyingi obedo gi huma mosiko nyaka chil kawuono." 
Nehemiah9:11 Nipogo nam diere e nyimgi, mi ging’ado ka giwuotho e lowo motwo, To joma ne lawogi niwito e kut ka kidi mowit e apaka mar nam." 
Nehemiah9:12 Godiechieng’ nitelonigi e siro mar bor polo, to gotieno nitelonigi gi siro mar mach mondo omenynigi yo ma giwuothoe." 
Nehemiah9:13 Nilor ewi got Sinai, kendo niwuoyo kodgi gie polo, kimiyogi chike makare kendo madiera kod buche mabeyo," 
Nehemiah9:14 kendo nipuonjogi wach Sabato mari maler. Bende nimiyogi chike mabeyo gi dho Musa jatichni. 
Nehemiah9:15 Nimiyogi chiemo moa e polo mondo otieknigi kech, kendo nigolonigi pi e lwanda mondo gineg godo riyo; bende nichikogi mondo gidonj kendo gikaw piny mane ikuong’ori ni nimigi." 
Nehemiah9:16 “To kwerewago ne jong’ayi, kendo tokgi ne tek, mi giketho chikni." 
Nehemiah9:17 Ne gitamore luwo chikni, kendo ne ok giparo honni ma nitimo e nyimgi. Ne gisiko ka tokgi tek, mi giketo ng’ato otelnigi, mondo gidog gibed wasumbni e piny Misri. To ne ok ijwang’ogi, nikech in Nyasaye mang’won, ma weyoni ji richogi, kendo mohero kecho ji. Iyi ok wang’ piyo, to herani osiko." 
Nehemiah9:18 Ne giloso kido mar roya gi dhahabu moleny, mi giwacho ni mano e nyasachgi ma nogologi Misri, kendo ne gichayi ahinya." 
Nehemiah9:19 To kata kamano kuom ng’wononi maduong’ ne ok ijwang’ogi e thim. Siro ma bor polo nosiko ka telonigi godiechieng’, to gotieno siro mar mach nosiko ka menyonigi yo mane giwuothoe." 
Nehemiah9:20 Nimiyogi Roho mari maber mondo opuonjgi. Ne ok ituonogi manna ma nioro, kendo nisiko kimiyogi pi mondo gineggo riyo." 
Nehemiah9:21 Niritogi e thim kuom higni piero ang’wen, kendo onge gima ne gichando. Lepgi bende ne ok oti, kendo tiendegi ne ok okuot." 
Nehemiah9:22 “Nimiyo giloyo pinje gi joma nodakie, mi gikawo ka gik mope e lweny. Kamano ne gikawo piny Sihon ruodh Heshbon, gi piny Og ruodh Bashan." 
Nehemiah9:23 Nimiyo ginya ka sulue mae polo, kendo nikelogi e piny mane isingori ni inimi kweregi mondo obed margi." 
Nehemiah9:24 Kane nyikwagi odonjo e pinyno mokawo, niloyonigi jo-Kanaan mane oyudo odak kuno, michiwogi kaachiel gi ruodhigi e lwet jo-Israel mondo otim kodgi gima gihero." 
Nehemiah9:25 Jo-Israel nokawo mier mochiel motegno gi puothe mag mzabibu gi yiend zeituni kod yiend olembe mamoko mang’eny. Kamano ne gichiemo mi giyieng’ kendo ne gidoko machwe, mi gibedo mamor nikech ber mane itimonigi." 
Nehemiah9:26 “To kata kamano ne wigi tek, mi ging’anyoni. Ne gilokore ni giweyo chikni, kendo ne ginego jonabi magi ma noyudo siemogi mondo giduog iri. Ne gichayi ahinya," 
Nehemiah9:27 omiyo nichiwogi e lwet wasikgi mothagogi. To kane giywakni mondo ikonygi e thagruokgino, niwinjogi gie polo, mi nioronigi joma noresogi e lwet wasikgigo, nikech ng’wononi maduong’." 
Nehemiah9:28 To kane giseyudo yueyo matin, timbegi nochako bedo maricho e nyimi, omiyo nijwang’ogi michiwogi e lwet wasikgi moloyogi. Ne gichako giywakni nyading’eny mondo ikonygi, kendo pile niwinjogi gie polo, miresogi kuom ng’wononi." 
Nehemiah9:29 Nikwerogi matek mondo gilokre kendo gimak chikeni, to ne gisungore, mi ok gidewo chikni. Ne giketho chikni, ma ka ng’ato orito, to yudo ngima. Ne gilokore giweyi ka tokgi tek ta, mi gitamore mako chikeni." 
Nehemiah9:30 Kuom higni mang’eny ning’wononigi, ka Roho mari siemogi gi dho jonabi magi, to ne ok ginyal winjo. Omiyo nichiwogi e lwet jopinje mamoko." 
Nehemiah9:31 Kata kamano kuom ng’wononi mogundho ne ok itiekogi kata jwang’ogi chuth, nimar in Nyasaye mang’won gi lala kendo ma kechoo ji." 
Nehemiah9:32 “A Nyasachwa man gi teko, in e Nyasaye maduong’ kendo malich, ma rito singruokne gi adiera. Omiyo koro kik ikaw masiche mwanenogi mayot, nikech ruodhiwa gi jodongwa gi jodolowa gi jonabiwa gi kwerewa kod jogi duto osethagore, chakre ndalo loch ruodhi mag Asuria nyaka chil kawuono." 
Nehemiah9:33 Isebedo ng’at makare kendo ma jaadiera kuom gik moko duto mosetimorenwa, to wan ema wasebedo kwatimo marach." 
Nehemiah9:34 Ruodhiwa gi jodongwa gi jodolowa kod kwerewa ne ok orito chikni, kata dewo weche mane isiemogigo." 
Nehemiah9:35 Kata ndalo mane ruodhigi giwegi ritogi, kane pod gichamo mwandu mogundho mane imiyogi, kendo gidak e piny malach kendo momew mane ipogonigi, ne ok gitini, bende ne ok giweyo timbegi maricho." 
Nehemiah9:36 To koro eri wan mana wasumbni e piny mane imiyo kwerewa mondo ochamie gik moyakie, kendo obed mamor gi gik mabeyo mantie." 
Nehemiah9:37 Gik moko duto ma pinywani nyago dhi mana ni ruodhi miketo mondo otiwa nikech richowa. Gin gi teko kuom dendwa, kendo gitimo gima gihero ni jambwa, ka wan to wachandore malich.”" 
Nehemiah9:38 Kuom mago duto watimo singruok motegno, kwandiko wechene, kendo jodongwa gi jo-Lawi mawa kod jodolowa oketo lwetgi ka joneno." 
Nehemiah10:1 Joma noketo lwetgi ne gin Nehemia ma ruoth, ma wuod Hakalia, kod Zekaria," 
Nehemiah10:2 gi Seraya gi Azaria gi Jeremia 
Nehemiah10:3 gi Pashur gi Shebania gi Malkia 
Nehemiah10:4 gi Hatush gi Shebania gi Maluk 
Nehemiah10:5 gi Harim gi Meremoth gi Obadia 
Nehemiah10:6 gi Daniel gi Ginethon gi Baruk 
Nehemiah10:6 gi Daniel gi Ginethon gi Baruk 
Nehemiah10:7 gi Meshulam gi Abia gi Mijamin 
Nehemiah10:8 gi Maazia gi Bilgai kod Shemaya. Jogo duto ne jodolo. 
Nehemiah10:9 To jo-Lawi ne gin: Jeshua wuod Azania gi Binui ma jaka Henadad gi Kadmiel 
Nehemiah10:10 kaachiel gi jowetegi ma Shebania gi Hodia gi Kelita gi Pelaya gi Hanan 
Nehemiah10:11 gi Mika gi Rehob gi Hashabia 
Nehemiah10:12 gi Zakur gi Sherebia gi Shebania 
Nehemiah10:13 gi Hodia gi Bani kod Beninu. 
Nehemiah10:14 To jotelo ne gin Parosh gi Pahath-moab gi Elam gi Zatu gi Bani 
Nehemiah10:15 gi Buni gi Azgad gi Bebai," 
Nehemiah10:16 gi Adonija gi Bigvai gi Adin 
Nehemiah10:17 gi Ater gi Hezekia gi Azur 
Nehemiah10:18 gi Hodia gi Hashum gi Bezai 
Nehemiah10:19 gi Harif gi Anathoth gi Nebai 
Nehemiah10:20 gi Migpiash gi Meshulam gi Hezir 
Nehemiah10:21 gi Meshezabel gi Zadok gi Jadua 
Nehemiah10:22 gi Pelatia gi Hanan gi Anaya 
Nehemiah10:23 gi Hoshea gi Hanania gi Hashub 
Nehemiah10:24 gi Halohesh gi Pilha gi Shobek 
Nehemiah10:25 gi Rehum gi Hashabna gi Maaseya 
Nehemiah10:26 gi Ahia gi Hanan gi Anan 
Nehemiah10:27 gi Maluk gi Harim kod Baana. 
Nehemiah10:28 To jomoko duto ma nopogore kuom jopinje mamoko noyie gi singruok mane jowetegi ma jotelo osetimo. Ne gin jodolo gi jo-Lawi gi jorit dhorangeye gi jower gi jotich gi nyigi, ma tiende ni ji duto mane oromo winjo tiend gima iwacho." 
Nehemiah10:29 Ne gikuong’ore giduto kendo gichamo muma, ni ginirit chike Nyasaye mane Musa jatich Nyasaye omiyogi, kendo ni ginimak kendo ginichop chike Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachgi duto." 
Nehemiah10:30 Ne gikuong’ore niya, “Ok wanachiw nyiwa ni joma ok jo-Yahudi ma koro odak e pinywagi, bende ok wanakend nyigi ni yawuotwa." 
Nehemiah10:31 Ka jogo okelo gik ohala moko, kata cham moro amora chieng’ Sabato, to ok wanang’iep kuomgi chieng’ Sabato kata chieng’ moro amora maler. Bang’ higni abiriyo abiriyo ok wanapur puothewa, kendo wanawe ji duto mosing ni gope." 
Nehemiah10:32 “Bende wasingore ni higa ka higa wanachiw pesa moromo achiel kuom adek mar shekel ni tich Od Nyasachwa," 
Nehemiah10:33 mibiro ng’iewogo makati miketo e nyim Nyasaye pile, gi misango mar cham mitimo pile, gi misengni miwang’o pep, kod misengni mamoko mitimo chieng’ Sabato gi ndalo ma due opor, kod ndalo sewni, kendo ni tich misengni mamoko gi misengni migologo richo mag jo-Israel, kendo ni tich duto mag Od Nyasachwa." 
Nehemiah10:34 “Wan jodolo gi jo-Lawi, kaachiel gi ji mamoko, wasegoyo ombulu kwapogogo tich kelo yien miwang’ogo misango e kind dhoutwa, mondo dhoot ka dhoot okel yien e Od Nyasachwa, kaka ondiki e chik." 
Nehemiah10:35 Wayie kelo chamb gwel e Od Ruoth Nyasaye higa ka higa, kaachiel gi olemo mokwongo nyak." 
Nehemiah10:36 Bende wayie kelo e Od Nyasachwa yawuotwa makayo mokwong nywol ni jodolo matiyo e Od Nyasachwano, kaka ondiki e chik." 
Nehemiah10:37 Kendo wayie kelo ni jodolo kuon ohia gi olemo mopogore opogore mokwongo nyak, kaachiel gi divai manyien kod mo, mondo okan e ut keno mag Od Nyasachwa. Wayie bende kelo ni jo-Lawi achiel kuom apar mag chambwa, nimar jo-Lawi ema choko achiel kuom apar mag cham maa e miechwa duto." 
Nehemiah10:38 To ka jo-Lawi choko achiel kuom apar mag chamgo, to jadolo ma ja dhood Harun nyaka bed kodgi. Jo-Lawi nyaka kel achiel kuom apar mag chamgo, to jodolo ma jadhood Harun nyaka bed kodgi. Jo-Lawi nyaka kel achiel kuom apar mag achiel kuom apargo e Od Nyasachwa mondo okan e ut keno mowinjore." 
Nehemiah10:39 Jo-Israel gi jo-Lawi nyaka kel mich mag cham gi mag divai gi mag mo e udi mikanoe gik mitiyogo e Hekalu, kendo kama jodolo gi jorit dhorangeye gi jower odakie. Ok wanajwang’ Od Nyasachwa.”" 
Nehemiah11:1 Jodong Israel nobiro modak Jerusalem, to joma moko nogoyo ombulu moyiero ng’at achiel achiel kuom ji apar mondo odag Jerusalem, dala mowal ni Nyasaye. Ji modong’ to nodak e mier mamoko," 
Nehemiah11:2 kendo ji duto nogoyo erokamano ni joma nochiwore mondo odag Jerusalem. 
Nehemiah11:3 Kamano jodong pinyno nodak Jerusalem, to jo-Israel mamoko gi jodolo gi jo-Lawi gi jotich Hekalu kod nyikwa jotich Solomon nodak e miech Juda, ka ng’ato ka ng’ato odak e dalane owuon." 
Nehemiah11:4 To e Jerusalem jo-Juda moko gi jo-Benjamin moko nodak kanyakla. Jodong Juda ne gin: Athaya wuod Uzia ma wuod Zekaria ma wuod Amaria ma wuod Shefatia ma wuod Mahalalel ma jadhood Perez. 
Nehemiah11:5 Joodgi duto nodak Jerusalem; ne giromo ji mia ang’wen gi piero auchiel gaboro, duto joma omew. Jaduong’ Juda moro ne Maaseya wuod Baruk ma wuod Kol-hoze ma wuod Hazaya ma wuod Adaya ma wuod Joyarib ma wuod Zekaria ma jadhood Shela." 
Nehemiah11:6  
Nehemiah11:7 Jodong Benjamin ne gin; Salu wuod Meshulam ma wuod Joed wuod Pedaya wuod Kolaya wuod Maaseya wuod Ithiel wuod Jeshaya," 
Nehemiah11:8 kaachiel gi owetene ma Gabai gi Salai. Giduto ne giromo ji mia ochiko gi piero ariyo gaboro. 
Nehemiah11:9 Joel wuod Zikri ne jatendgi, kendo Juda wuod Hasenua ne jatelo mar ariyo mar dala." 
Nehemiah11:9 Joel wuod Zikri ne jatendgi, kendo Juda wuod Hasenua ne jatelo mar ariyo mar dala." 
Nehemiah11:10 To jodolo ne gin: Jedaya wuod Joyarib 
Nehemiah11:11 ma wuod Seraya ma wuod Hilkia ma wuod Meshulam ma wuod Zadok ma wuod Merayoth ma wuod Ahitub. Jedaya ne jatend tich mar Od Nyasaye. 
Nehemiah11:12 En, kaachiel gi jowetene mane tiyo e Hekalu ne gin ji mia aboro gi piero ariyo gariyo. Jadolo moro ne Adaya wuod Jeroham ma wuod Pelalia wuod Amzi wuod Zekaria wuod Pashur ma wuod Malkia." 
Nehemiah11:13 En, kaachiel gi jowetene ne giromo ji mia ariyo gi piero ang’wen gariyo. Giduto ne gin jodong dhoudi. Jadolo machielo ne Amasai wuod Azarel ma wuod Azai wuod Meshilemoth, wuod Imer." 
Nehemiah11:14 En kaachiel gi jowetene ne gin ji mia achiel gi piero aboro, ma giduto ne gin joma omew. Jatendgi ne Zabdiel wuod Hagedolim." 
Nehemiah11:15 Jo-Lawi to ne gin: Shemaya wuod Hashub ma wuod Azrikam ma wuod Hashabia ma wuod Buni," 
Nehemiah11:16 kod Shebethai gi Jozabad mane jotend jo-Lawi mane rito tich loso Od Nyasaye," 
Nehemiah11:17 kod Matania wuod Mika ma wuod Zabdi ma wuod Asaf mane jatend wer sa lemo, kod Bakbukia mane jatelo mar ariyo mar jowetene, kod Abda wuod Shamua ma wuod Galal ma wuod Jeduthun." 
Nehemiah11:18 Kar romb jo-Lawi ma nodak Jerusalem, dala mowal ni Nyasaye ne mia ariyo gi piero aboro gang’wen." 
Nehemiah11:19 Jorit dhorangeye ne gin Akub gi Talmon kod jowetegi. 
Nehemiah11:20 Giduto ne giromo ji mia achiel gi piero abiriyo gariyo. Jo-Israel mamoko duto nodak e miech Juda, ka ng’ato ka ng’ato odak e dalane owuon." 
Nehemiah11:21 Jotich Hekalu to nodak Ofel. Jotendgi ne Ziha gi Gishpa. 
Nehemiah11:22 Jatend jo-Lawi ma ne odak Jerusalem ne Uzi wuod Bani ma wuod Hashabia ma wuod Bani ma wuod Hashabia ma wuod Matania ma wuod Mika, ma jadhood Asaf ma jower." 
Nehemiah11:23 Jo-Lawigo to ruoth owuon ema ne ochiko, kendo nomigi tich wer ma onego gitim pile." 
Nehemiah11:24 Pathahia wuod Meshezabel ma jodhood Zera wuod Juda ema ne ng’ado ni ruoth rieko kuom weche duto mag jo-Israel. 
Nehemiah11:25 Koro ma e kaka ji nodak e mier gi gwenge mokiewo gi miego. Jo-Juda moko nodak Kiriath-arba gi mier matindo mokiewo kode, gi Dibon kod Jakabzeel gi mier mokiewo kodgi," 
Nehemiah11:26 gi Jeshua gi Molada gi Bethpelet 
Nehemiah11:27 gi Hazar-shual gi Beersheba kod mier mokiewo kode," 
Nehemiah11:28 gi Ziklag gi Mekona kod mier mokiewo kode," 
Nehemiah11:29 gi En-rimon gi Zora gi Jarmuth," 
Nehemiah11:30 kod Zanoa gi Adulam gi mier mokiewo kodgi, gi Lakish kod gwenge matindo mokiewo kode. Kamano ne gidak e pinyno, chakre Beersheba nyaka holo Hinom." 
Nehemiah11:31 Jo-Benjamin nodak Geba gi Mikmash gi Aya gi Bethel kod mier mokiewo kode," 
Nehemiah11:32 gi Anathoth gi Nob gi Anania 
Nehemiah11:33 gi Hazor gi Rama gi Gitaim 
Nehemiah11:34 gi Hadid gi Zeboim gi Shim. 
Nehemiah11:35 Gi Lod gi Ono kod Geharashim. 
Nehemiah11:36 To migepe moko mag jo-Lawi ma yande odak e Juda koro odak e piny Benjamin. 
Nehemiah12:1 Jodolo gi jo-Lawi mane oduogo gi Zerubabel wuod Shealtiel, kendo gi Jeshua, ne gin Seraya gi Jeremia gi Ezra" 
Nehemiah12:1 Jodolo gi jo-Lawi mane oduogo gi Zerubabel wuod Shealtiel, kendo gi Jeshua, ne gin Seraya gi Jeremia gi Ezra" 
Nehemiah12:2 gi Amaria gi Maluk gi Hatush 
Nehemiah12:3 gi Shekania gi Erhum gi Meremoth 
Nehemiah12:4 gi Iddo gi Genethon gi Abia 
Nehemiah12:5 gi Mijamin gi Maadia gi Bilgia 
Nehemiah12:6 gi Shemaya gi Joyarib gi Jedaya gi Salu gi Amok gi Hilkia kod Jedaya. 
Nehemiah12:7 Jogo ema nobedo jotend jodolo gi jowetegi e ndalo Jeshua. 
Nehemiah12:8 Jo-lawi ne gin: Jeshua gi Binui gi Kadmiel gi Sherebia gi Juda kod Matania. Matania nogono kaachiel gi jowetene, ema ne telo ni wer sa lemo." 
Nehemiah12:9 Bakbukia gi Uni ma jowetegi to ne chung’ momanyore kodgi ka wer. 
Nehemiah12:10 Jeshua nonywolo Joyakim, to Joyakim nonywolo Eliashib. Eliashib nonywolo Joyada," 
Nehemiah12:11 to Joyada nonywolo Jonathan. Jonathan to nonywolo Jadua. 
Nehemiah12:12 E ndalo Joyakim, jodolo mane jodong dhoudi ne gin: Meraya mane jatend joka Seraya, gi Hanania jatend joka Jeremia," 
Nehemiah12:13 gi Meshulam jatend joka Ezra, gi Jehohanan jatend joka Amaria," 
Nehemiah12:13 gi Meshulam jatend joka Ezra, gi Jehohanan jatend joka Amaria," 
Nehemiah12:14 gi Jonathan jatend joka Maluk, gi Josef jatend joka Shebania," 
Nehemiah12:15 gi Adna jatend joka Harim, gi Helkia jatend joka Merayoth," 
Nehemiah12:16 gi Zekaria jatend joka Iddo, gi Meshulam jatend joka Ginethon," 
Nehemiah12:17 gi Zikri jatend joka Abia, kod jatend joka Miniamin, gi Piltai jatend joka Moadia,"
