Nehemiah12:18 gi Shamua jatend joka Bilgia, gi Jehonathan jatend joka Shemaya," 
Nehemiah12:19 gi Matenai jatend joka Joayarib, gi Uzi jatend joka Jedaya," 
Nehemiah12:20 gi Kalai jatend joka salu, gi Eber jatend joka Amok," 
Nehemiah12:21 gi Hashabia jatend joka Hilkia, kod Nethaneel jatend joka Jedaya." 
Nehemiah12:22 Nying jodong dhout jodolo noyudi kosendiki, chakre ndalo mag Eliashib gi mag Joyada gi mag Johanan kod mag Jadua, nyaka chop ndalo loch Darius ruodh Persia." 
Nehemiah12:23 Nying jodong dhout jo-Lawi bende nondik e kitap Weche mag Ndalo, to mana nyaka chop ndalo Johanan nyakwar Eliashib." 
Nehemiah12:24 Jotend jo-Lawi ne gin Hashabia gi Sherebia gi Jeshua gi Binui kod Kadmiel, kaachiel gi jowetegi mane giwarorego e tich pako Nyasaye kendo goyone erokamano, ka giluwo chik Daudi ng’at Nyasaye." 
Nehemiah12:25 Matania gi Bakbukia gi Obadia gi Meshulam gi Talmon kod Akub ne jorit dhorangeye kendo ne rito ut keno man e dhorangeye. 
Nehemiah12:26 Mano e kaka nochan tich e ndalo Joyakim wuod Jeshua, ma wuod Jozadak, kendo e ndalo Nehemia ma ruoth, kendo e ndalo Ezra ma jadolo kendo japuonj chik." 
Nehemiah12:26 Mano e kaka nochan tich e ndalo Joyakim wuod Jeshua, ma wuod Jozadak, kendo e ndalo Nehemia ma ruoth, kendo e ndalo Ezra ma jadolo kendo japuonj chik." 
Nehemiah12:27 E kinde mane orwakie ohinga mar Jerusalem, noluong jo-Lawi duto, kamoro amora mane gidakie, mi gibiro Jerusalem mondo giwer kendo gigo erokamano e nyasino, ka gigoyo ongeng’o gi nyigwerni kod thumbe mamoko." 
Nehemiah12:28 Jo-Lawi ma jower nochokore koa e gwenge mokiewo gi Jerusalem, kendo koa e miech jo-Netofa" 
Nehemiah12:29 kendo Beth-gilgal kod gwenge mag Geba gi Beth-azmoth, nikech jower nosegedo machiegni gi Jerusalem." 
Nehemiah12:30 Jodolo gi jo-Lawi nopwodhore giwegi, eka ne gipwodho ji, kendo ne gipwodho dhorangeye kod ohinga." 
Nehemiah12:31 Bang’ mano, naidho ewi ohinga gi jodong Juda, mi achano jower e migepe ariyo madongo ogo erokamano. Migawo achiel noluwo wi ohinga bat korachwich, kochiko Ranga Owuoyo." 
Nehemiah12:32 Hoshaya noluwo bang’ migawono, kaachiel gi nus jodong Juda," 
Nehemiah12:33 kod Azaria gi Ezra gi Meshulam 
Nehemiah12:33 kod Azaria gi Ezra gi Meshulam 
Nehemiah12:34 gi Juda gi Benjamin gi Shemaya kod Jeremia. 
Nehemiah12:35 Jodolo moko bende nodhi kodgi, ka goyo tung’. Ne gin Zekaria wuod Jonathan ma wuod Shemaya ma wuod Matanaya ma wuod Mikaya ma wuod Zakur ma wuod Asaf," 
Nehemiah12:36 kaachiel gi jowetene ma Shemaya gi Azarel gi Milalai gi Gilalai gi Maai gi Nethaneel gi Juda kod Hanani, ka giting’o thumbe mane Daudi ng’at Nyasaye oloso. Ezra japuonj chik ema notelonigi." 
Nehemiah12:36 kaachiel gi jowetene ma Shemaya gi Azarel gi Milalai gi Gilalai gi Maai gi Nethaneel gi Juda kod Hanani, ka giting’o thumbe mane Daudi ng’at Nyasaye oloso. Ezra japuonj chik ema notelonigi." 
Nehemiah12:37 Ne gikadho Ranga Soko, eka ne gichomo nyimgi tir, ka giidho raidhi nyaka dala Daudi, kama ohinga oting’orego. Bang’e ne gikadho Od Daudi, mi giwuotho nyaka Ranga Pi, man yo wuok chieng’." 
Nehemiah12:38 To migap jower machielo nochomo bat koracham, kendo naluwogi gi nus jodongo komachielo. Ne waluwo ohinga kwakadho kama oger mabor mar ng’icho mar Kende Mach, nyaka kama ohinga lachgo." 
Nehemiah12:39 Ne wakadho Ranga Efraim gi Ranga Dala Machon gi Ranga Rech gi kama oger mabor mar ng’icho mar Hananel kod mar Hamea nyaka wachopo e Ranga Rombe. Mi ne gichung’ e Ranga Od Jorito. 
Nehemiah12:40 Kamano migep jower ariyogo nodhi mochung’ e Od Nyasaye, kaachiel gi an kod nus jotelo" 
Nehemiah12:41 gi jodolo ma Eliakim gi Maaseya gi Miniamin gi Mikaya gi Elioenai gi Zekaria kod Hanania, ka jogoyo tung’," 
Nehemiah12:42 kaachiel gi Maaseya gi Shemaya gi Eleazar gi Uzi gi Jehohanan gi Malkia gi Elam kod Ezer. Jower nower matek, ka Izrahia otelonigi." 
Nehemiah12:43 Misango maduong notim chieng’no, kendo ji nobedo mamor nikech Nyasaye nosetimonigi gima omiyo gimor ahinya. Kata mana mon gi nyithindo bende nodoko mamor, kendo mahu mar mor mane otimore Jerusalem ne winjore gi kuma bor." 
Nehemiah12:44 Chieng’no noyier ji mondo orit udi mibiro kanoe chiwo gi chamb gwel gi chiwo mar achiel kuom apar, kendo mondo ochok chiwo moa e gwenge mokiewo gi mier madongo mondo opog ni jodolo gi jo-Lawi kaka chik dwaro. Jo-Yahudi duto ne mor sidang’ kuom tich jodolo gi jo-Lawi." 
Nehemiah12:45 Jodolo gi jo-Lawi notiyo tich Nyasachgi, kaachiel gi tich pwodhruok, kaluwore gi chike mag Daudi kod mag Solomon wuode. Jower gi jorit dhorangeye bende notimo kamano." 
Nehemiah12:46 Ndalo Daudi ema ne Asaf okawoe tich bedo jatend jower, kochano wende mag pak kod mag goyo erokamano ni Nyasaye." 
Nehemiah12:47 Kendo e ndalo Zerubabel gi ndalo Nehemia, jo-Israel duto nochiwo pok ni jower kendo ni jorit dhorangeye kaka ne dwarore pile. Bende ne gipogo ni jo-Lawi gik moketnigi, mi jo-Lawi bende nopogo ni joka Harun pokgi." 
Nehemiah13:1 Chieng’no kane osom kitap Musa e nyim ji, noyud kondik ni ja-Amon kata ja-Moab ok onego donji e chokruok mar jo-Nyasaye nyaka chieng’," 
Nehemiah13:2 nikech ne ok giromo ni jo-Israel gi chiemo kata gi pi, to ne ging’iewo Baalam mondo okuong’gi. To Nyasachwa noloko kuong’no obedo gueth." 
Nehemiah13:3 Kane ji owinjo chikno, ne gigolo jo-Israel ma anywola mondo oa kuomgi." 
Nehemiah13:4 To kane mago pok otimore, Eliashib jadolo mane oket jarit ut keno mag Od Nyasachwa, kendo mane wat Tobia, noyudo osemiyo Tobia ot maduong’." 
Nehemiah13:5 Odno ema yandi ikanoe chiwo mag cham gi ubani gi gik lemo mitiyogo e Hekalu, gi achiel kuom apar mag cham gi divai manyien gi modhi, mane ochiw ni jo-Lawi gi jower gi jorit dhorangeye kaka chik dwaro, kaachiel gi chiwo mane opog ni jodolo." 
Nehemiah13:6 E kindego duto ne ok an Jerusalem, nikech noyudo ka asedok ir Artaxerxes ruodh Babulon e higa piero adek gariyo mar lochne. To bang’ kinde moko, nakwayo ruoth thuolo," 
Nehemiah13:7 mondo aduog Jerusalem. To kane ochopo kuno, eka nafwenyo gima rach mane Eliashib otimo kuom miyo Tobia ot laru mar Od Nyasaye." 
Nehemiah13:8 Wachno nodokona malit ahinya, mi gik Tobia duto mane ni e ot, nawito oko." 
Nehemiah13:9 Bang’ mano nagolo chik mondo opwodh odno, kendo odwokie gik lemo mag Od Nyasaye gi chiwo mag cham kod mar ubani." 
Nehemiah13:10 Nafwenyo bende ni jo-Lawi koro ne ok mi pokgi, omiyo gin, kaachiel gi jower, mane tiyo tich lemo mopogore opogore, ne gisedhi e puothegi." 
Nehemiah13:11 Kuom mano nadhaw gi jodongo, ka apenjogi niya, “Marang’o Od Nyasaye owe nono?” Bang’e naluongo jo-Lawigo, mi adwokogi e tijgi." 
Nehemiah13:12 Eka jo-Juda duto nokelo achiel kuom apar mag mo e ut keno. 
Nehemiah13:13 Naketo Shelemia jadolo gi Zadok jakweno gi Pedaya ja-Lawi mondo obed jotend tijno, Hanan wuod Zakur ma wuod Matania obed jakonygi, nikech giduto ne gin joma kare. Tijgi ne en pogo ni jowetegi gik monego giyudi." 
Nehemiah13:14 A Nyasacha, par gima natimono, kendo igwedha, to kik wiyi wil gi timbe mabeyo mosetimo ni Odi kendo ni tiji." 
Nehemiah13:15 E ndalo gogo naneno jomoko e piny Juda mabiyo mzabibu chieng’ Sabato, mondo olosgo divai, kod joma choko divai gi mzabibu gi ng’owo gi gik ohala moko ma giyieyo kuom kenje chieng’ Sabato, kendo gikelo Jerusalem. Mi nakwerogi ni kik gihon chiemo chieng’ Sabato." 
Nehemiah13:16 Jo-Turo bende mane odak Jerusalem ne kelo rech kod gik ohala moko mopogore opogore chieng’ Sabato, mi gihonogi ni jo-Yahudi, kata mana e Jerusalem." 
Nehemiah13:17 Kuom mano nadhaw gi jodong Juda, ka awachonigi niya, “Utimo gima rach manadi, kuchido chieng’ Sabato marach kama?" 
Nehemiah13:18 Donge ma e gima kwereu notimo, momiyo Nyasachwa osekelo masirani kuomwa kendo kuom dalawani? Koro umedo kelo mirimb Nyasaye kuom Israel, kuchido chieng’ Sabato.”" 
Nehemiah13:19 Omiyo ka nigolo ji e dhorangeye mag Jerusalem sa mane Sabato dwaro chakore, nagolo chik mondo dhorangeye olor, kendo kik yawgi nyaka chieng’ Sabato rum. Bende naketo jotichna moko mondo orit dhorangeye ni kik misigo moro amora donj e dala Jerusalem chieng’ Sabato." 
Nehemiah13:20 To bang’ mano, johala gi joma hono gik mopogore opogore nobiro dichiel kata diriyo, mobworo but Jerusalem." 
Nehemiah13:21 To nasiemogi ka apenjogi niya, “Ang’o momiyo ubworo but ohinga mar Jerusalem? Kuchako utimo kamano, to ubiro neno!” Bang’ mane ne ok gichako giduogo chieng’ Sabato kendo." 
Nehemiah13:22 Bende nachiko jo-Lawi mane onego opwodhre mondo okaw tich mar rito dhorangeye ni nyaka gine ni chieng’ Sabato orit maler. A Nyasaye, par gima natimono bende, kendo iguedha, mi ikecha kuom herani maduong’ mosiko." 
Nehemiah13:23 E ndalogo bende naneno jo-Yahudi moko mane osekendo nyi Ashdod gi nyi Amon kod nyi Moab. 
Nehemiah13:24 Nyithindgi moko ne wacho dho Ashdod, kata dhok moro nono, to ne ok nyal wacho dho jo-Yahudi." 
Nehemiah13:25 Nadhaw kodgi, mi ayanyogi, to jomoko kuomgi nagoyo, mi apudho yie wigi. Kendo namiyo gikuong’ore e nyim Nyasaye ni ok giniyie jogo okend nyigi, kendo ni ok ginikend nyi jogo, kata kendogi ni yawuotgi." 
Nehemiah13:26 Nawachonigi niya, “Donge ruoth Solomon noketho mana nikech wach mon makama? E pinje duto ne onge ruoth moro machal kode. Nyasache nohere mokete ruodh Israel duto, to kata en bende nyi jomoko notere e richo." 
Nehemiah13:27 Kamano, koro uparo ni onego waluw timbeugo, kendo waketh ketho maduong’ni, kwaweyo Nyasachwa nikech kendo nyi pinje moko?”" 
Nehemiah13:28 To noyudo ka achiel kuom yawuot Joyada ma wuod Eliashib jadolo maduong’ osekendo nyar Sanbalat ja-Horon. Emomiyo ne ariembe buta. 
Nehemiah13:29 A Nyasacha, par kaka gisechido tich dolo, kendo ketho kuong’ruok ma jodolo gi jo-Lawi timo." 
Nehemiah13:30 Kamano napwodho ji kuom gik moko duto moa e pinje mamoko, kendo nadwoko jo-Lawi gi jodolo e tijegi." 
Nehemiah13:31 To bende nachano mondo okel chiwo mar yien kaka dwarore, kaachiel gi chamb agwela. A Nyasaye, para kendo iguedha." 
Job1:1 Ne nitie ng’at moro ma nyinge Ayub, mane odak e piny Uz. Ne en ng’at makare kendo maler, mane oluoro Nyasaye, kendo otang’ ni richo." 
Job1:2 Nonywolo yawuowi abiriyo gi nyiri adek," 
Job1:3 kendo ne en gi rombe alufu abiriyo gi ngamia alufu adek gi dhok alufu achiel kod kenje mia abich. To bende ne en gi jotich mogundho. Kamano ne en ng’at momewie moloyo ji duto ma nodak e pinje man yo wuok chieng’. 
Job1:4 Yawuote ne timo sawo, moro ka moro e ode, kendo luongoe owetene mamoko duto. Bende ne giluongoe nyiminegi adekgo mondo okonygi chiemo." 
Job1:5 Kane sawo ka sawo oserumo, Ayub ne chiew gokinyi mang’ich, kendo timo misango mondo opwodhgo nyithinde. Ne otimo kamano pile, koparo ni dipo ka achiel kuomgi oketho kuom yanyo Nyasaye gi chunye." 
Job1:6 To kinde nochopo ma yawuot polo obiro e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo Satan bende ne ni kodgi." 
Job1:7 Ruoth Nyasaye nopenje ni, “Ia kanye?” Satan nodwoke niya, “Asebedo ka abayo abaya e piny, kalworora koni gi koni.”" 
Job1:8 Eka Ruoth Nyasaye nochako openje ni, “Bende inenoe Ayub jatichna? Onge ng’at makare kendo maler ka en e piny ngima, moluora kendo otang’ gi richo.”" 
Job1:9 Satan nodwoko ni, “Bende Ayub diluori adier, ka ok oyud gimoro kuomi?" 
Job1:10 Donge irite maber, kaachiel gi joode kod gimoro amora ma en go? Iguedho gik moko duto motimo, kendo isemiye dhok mopong’o piny." 
Job1:11 To koro sani temie kawo gik moko ma en go ka ane ka dang’ ok okuong’i e wang’i!” 
Job1:12 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Satan niya, “Kara ber, aketo gik moko duto ma en go e tekoni, mak mana ni en owuon to kik ihinye.” Bang’ mano Satan noa odhi." 
Job1:13 Chieng’ moro kane oyudo nyithind Ayub timo sawo e dala owadgi maduong’," 
Job1:14 ng’at moro nobiro ir Ayub ka ringo, mowachone niya, “Nende oyudo wapuro gi dhok, ka kenje bende kwayo machiegni e lek." 
Job1:15 Eka wapo ka jo-Sabea omonjowa moyako jamnigo duto. Nende ginego jotichni duto pep, mak mana an kenda ema atony, omiyo abiro mondo anyisi.”" 
Job1:16 To kane pok otieko wuoyo, jatich machielo nobiro mowacho niya, “Polo nende ogoyo rombe gi jokwath, motho pep, mak mana an kenda ema atony, omiyo abiro mondo anyisi.”" 
Job1:17 Kane pok otieko wuoyo, jatich machielo notucho, mowacho niya, “Mony adek mag jo-Kaldai nende omonjowa, mokawo ngamia mawa, kendo onego jotichni duto, mak mana an kenda ema atony, omiyo abiro mondo anyisi.”" 
Job1:18 To kane pok otieko wuoyo, jatich mar ang’wen nobiro, mowacho niya, “Nyithindi nende timo sawo e dala wuodi maduong’" 
Job1:19 mi kalausi moa e thim ogoyo ot piny, monego nyithindi duto pep. An kenda ema atony, omiyo abiro mondo anyisi.”" 
Job1:20 Bang’e Ayub nochung’, moyiecho lepe kanyisogo kuyo ma en go. Ne olielo wiye apwodha mopodho piny auma." 
Job1:21 Eka nowacho niya, “Kane awuok ei mama, to ne aonge gi gimoro, kendo chieng’ ma atho, to ok nadog gi gimoro. Ruoth Nyasaye ema ne ochiwo, kendo en ema koro osekawo. Nying Ruoth Nyasaye opaki!”" 
Job1:22 Kuom mano, kata obedo Ayub osesandore malit kamano, to ne ok oketho, kata wacho ni Nyasaye rach, ne ok owacho." 
Job2:1 Kane kinde ochopo ma yawuot polo ochako obiroe e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, Satan bende ne ni kodgi." 
Job2:2 Ruoth Nyasaye nopenjo Satan ni, “Ia kanye?” Satan nodwoke ni, “Asebedo ka abayo abaya e piny, ka alworora koni gi koni.”" 
Job2:3 Ruoth Nyasaye ne ochako openje niya, “Bende inenoe Ayub jatichna? Onge ng’at makare kendo maler kaka en e piny ngima, moluora kendo motang’ ni richo. Ne imiyo ayieni mondo iteme kayiem nono, to kata kamano pod ok oketho.”" 
Job2:4 To Satan nodwoko ni, “Dhano nyalo yie weyo gimoro amora ma en go mana ni mondo obed mangima." 
Job2:5 To koro temie kimulo dende ane, ka dang’ ok okuong’i!”" 
Job2:6 Mano omiyo Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Satan niya, “Kara ber, koro ero akete e tekoni mondo itimne gima idwaro, to kik inege.”" 
Job2:7 Bang’ mano, Satan nowuok oa e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye mi odhi ogoyo Ayub gi tuoche buche, mokuodo dende chakre lith tiende nyaka paw wiye." 
Job2:8 Ayub nodhi mobet e buch kendo, mi okawo mbalatago mondo ogwonyrego." 
Job2:9 Eka chiege nopenje niya, “Pod iyie ayiea kuom Nyasachi? Ere gimomiyo ok inyal yanye mondo itho?”" 
Job2:10 To Ayub nodwoke niya, “Iwuoyo mana kaka dhako mofuwo wuoyo. Ka Nyasaye okelonwa gima ber, to wakawo. Koro ere gimomiyo wang’ur kokelonwa chandruok?” Kuom mano, kata obedo ni Ayub nosechandore malit kamano, to ne ok oketho dhoge." 
Job2:11 Osiepe Ayub adek, ma Elifaz ja-Teman gi Bildad ja-Shua kod Zofar ja-Nama nowinjo kaka Ayub osebedo gi thagruok. Omiyo ne giparo ni mondo gidhi gilime, kendo giho chunye." 
Job2:12 Kane gikwongo nene, kapod gin mabor kode, ne ok ginyal ng’eye. To kane ging’eye, ne gichako ywak malit, mi giyiecho lepgi kendo gibuko wigi buru." 
Job2:13 Bang’e ne gibet e lowo kanyo kode kuom ndalo abiriyo odiechieng’ gotieno, ka ok giwuo nikech ne gineno kaka othagore malit." 
Job3:1 Bang’e Ayub ema ne ochako wuoyo, kokuong’o chieng’ mane onywolee," 
Job3:2 niya," 
Job3:3 “Nyasaye mondo okuong’ odiechieng’ mane onywolae, kendo okuong’ odiechieng’ mane omakie ichna." 
Job3:4 Odiechingno mondo olokre mudho! Nyasaye man malo kik chak par odiechiengno! Ler bende kik chak rienyie. 
Job3:5 Odiechiengno mondo otim luoch kendo otim mudho mandiwa, ka boche polo oime, kendo wang’chieng’ oimore." 
Job3:6 Mudho molil omwony otienono, mondo kik obed achiel kuom ndalo mag higa, kendo kik kwane ka achiel kuom ndalo mag due." 
Job3:7 Otienono obed otieno ma ok makie ich nyathi, kendo ma koko mar mor ok winjie." 
Job3:8 Ajuoke mondo okuong’ odiechiengno. Ee, mana joma olony kuom golo chik ni Levayathan, mi winjgi, ema mondo okuong’e!" 
Job3:9 Otienono kik lokre odiechieng’, kendo sulue mar okinyi kik rieny, kata ng’amba bende kik ng’ol." 
Job3:10 Ee, otienono mondo okuong’, nikech noweyo onywola, mi aneno mana chuny lit kod thagruok." 
Job3:11 Dine ber ka atho ei mama, kata ka atho mana e sa mane onywolae!" 
Job3:12 Mama nopira e chonge nang’o? Ere gima omiyo ne oyiena adhodho thunde," 
Job3:13 nimar ka dine atho e kindeno, to dikoro ayueyo maber," 
Job3:14 kanindo kaachiel gi ruodhi kod jodonggi mosetho mane ogero udi madongo mabeyo. 
Job3:15 Kata dikoro anindo mana ka joma omew mane opong’o utegi gi dhahabu kod fedha," 
Job3:16 kata ka nyithindo monywol kosetho," 
Job3:17 nimar ei liel ema joma richo weyoe timbegi mag mahundu, kendo jotich mool bende yudoe yueyo." 
Job3:18 Koda ka joma otue bende yudo yueyo gi kue kuno, maonge nyapara machikogi gi gero." 
Job3:19 Ji mopogore opogore ni kanyo, ei liel, joma dongo gi joma tindo machalre, ma kata mana wasumbni bende bedo maonge e bwo chik." 
Job3:20 Ere gimomiyo jomoko inywolo mana ni mondo one thagruok? Koso ji man gi chuny lit iweyo neno chieng’ nang’o? 
Job3:21 Gidwaro tho, to tho otamore negogi. Ee, gidwaro tho moloyo mwandu." 
Job3:22 Ok ginyal bedo mamor nyaka chop githo, mi yikgi." 
Job3:23 Ere gimomiyo Nyasaye oweyogi ka gingima, to gibayo abaya e mudho, ka ogeng’onigi koni gi koni?" 
Job3:24 Kar chiemo to aywak, bende asiko ka achur achura." 
Job3:25 Gimoro amora ma aluoro oseyuda, kendo gik ma bwoga ema timorena." 
Job3:26 Aonge kue, kendo ok anyal yueyo, nikech chandruokna osiko.”" 
Job4:1 Eka Elifaz ja-Teman nopenjo Ayub niya," 
Job4:2 “Mit ka chunyi nyalo doko malit ka ng’ato owuoyo kodi, nimar ok anyal ling’ mak awuoyo?" 
Job4:3 Par ine kaka isepuonjo ji mang’eny, kendo isejiwo joma yomyom." 
Job4:4 Wecheni ne siro joma ochwanyore ma dwaro podho, kendo ne irieyo chongegi monyosore." 
Job4:5 To koro thagruok ma kamano osebironi in iwuon, kendo chunyi chandore ma ok inyal bedo gi kue." 
Job4:6 Donge yie ma in go kuom Nyasaye kueyo chunyi? Koso donge igeno kuom timni makare? 
Job4:7 Ara koro par ane, ka bende nitie kata ng’at achiel makare ma oseyudo thagruok malich, kata ng’ama ber ma masira osetieko?" 
Job4:8 Aseneno ni joma puro richo, kendo chwoyo timbe maricho kayo mana gik ma kamago." 
Job4:9 Nyasaye tiekogi gi mirimbe mager, mana ka gima yamb ahiti ema ogoyo, molalgo nono." 
Job4:10 Joma timbegi richo twaro, kendo ruto ka sibuor, to Nyasaye miyo giling’, kendo turo lekegi." 
Job4:11 Githo mana ka sibuor ma onge gima cham, kendo nyithindgi oke kuonde duto." 
Job4:12 Ne okuodhna wach moro mos, mane ok anyal winjo maber." 
Job4:13 Ne ochalo gi lek ma mono ng’ato nindo. 
Job4:14 Ne abwok, kendo kibaji ne ogoya, mi denda duto otetni" 
Job4:15 Eka muya maliw nokudho pat wang’a, mi denda ojuol." 
Job4:16 Ne aneno ka gimoro ochung’ buta kanyo, to kata obedo ni ne arange, ne ok anyal ng’eyo ni en ang’o. Piny noling’ thi, eka ne awinjo dwol machil kawacho niya," 
Job4:17 ‘Bende dhano nyalo bedo makare e nyim Nyasaye? Koso nitie ng’ato manyalo bedo maler e nyim Jachuechne?’ 
Job4:18 Ka Nyasaye ok ogeno jotichne owuon, kendo oyudo ni malaikane gin joketho," 
Job4:19 koro ere kaka dogen dhano ma ochwe mana gi lowo, kendo molos mana gi buru, ma inyalo ng’inyo ka oguyo?" 
Job4:20 Dhano nyalo bedo kangima gokinyi, to otho apoya ka pok ochopo odhiambo." 
Job4:21 Gik moko duto ma en go omaye, kendo otho mana ka pod oonge gi rieko." 
Job5:1 In Ayub, luong mondo ine ane ka ng’ato dwoki. Bende nitie malaika ma inyalo ringo ire?" 
Job5:2 Sadha nego ng’ama onge rieko, kendo mirima kelo tho ni ng’ama ofuwo." 
Job5:3 An awuon aseneno ng’ama ofuwo kodak maber, to achien opo nono ka ode okuong’." 
Job5:4 Nyithinde ok nyal yudo konyruok kendo onge ng’ama ochung’ e bura ka chwakogi. 
Job5:5 Ji modenyo chamo chamb ng’ama ofuwono koda ka mago ma dongo mana e kind kuthe, kendo mwandune miyo nyiego mako joma riyo oloyo." 
Job5:6 Richo ok honre ahona, kata chandruok bende ok bi abiya nono," 
Job5:7 to dhano ema kelo ni en owuon chandruok, mana kaka ong’ere ni winy huyo e kor polo." 
Job5:8 Omiyo ka da bed ni an e in, to da adhi ir Nyasaye, mi aterone ywakna," 
Job5:9 nikech en ema otimo gik madongo, bende honni mage ng’eny mokadho akwana." 
Job5:10 Okelo koth e piny, kendo omiyo puothe bedo mang’ich." 
Job5:11 Adier, Nyasaye ema ting’o joma odhier malo, kendo oreso joma okuyo." 
Job5:12 Oketho cheno mag jowuond," 
Job5:13 kendo omako jorieko gi riekogi giwegi, kamano gimoro amora ma gichano kethore." 
Job5:14 Piny othonigi mudho, kata mana godiechieng’ tir, kendo gimulo amula ka joma wuotho gotieno." 
Job5:15 To Nyasaye reso joma odhier e tho, kendo okonyo joma ithiro." 
Job5:16 En ema omiyo joma odhier bedo gi geno, to joma parogi richo ling’ thi." 
Job5:17 Ng’at ma Nyasaye kwero en jahawi, omiyo kik imak wach e chunyi ka Nyasaye okumi." 
Job5:18 Ka Nyasaye ochwadi ma iriemo, too en ema othiedho kanyo. Ee, lwedo mohinyino ema changi." 
Job5:19 E kinde ka kinde obiro resi kuom hinyruok. 
Job5:20 Ka kech owuok, to enoriti ibed mangima, kendo kata ka lweny nitie, to enoresi e tho." 
Job5:21 Nyasaye noresi kuom weche ma ji hangigo kendo nogoli kuom masira. 
Job5:22 Kata timbe mahundu kata kech biro, to ininyiergi anyiera, kendo kata mana ondiegi bende ok niluor." 
Job5:23 Puotheni ok nobed gi lwendni e igi, kendo ondiegi ok nomonji." 
Job5:24 Inidag e hembi gi kue kendo ka irango rombi, to iniyud ka onge moro molal." 
Job5:25 Nyithindi nobed mang’eny ka lum," 
Job5:26 kendo inidag aming’a, mi itho ka ndaloni ogik kare, mana ka cham mochiek maber mokel kar dino." 
Job5:27 Ayub, wasepuonjore wechegi kuom ndalo mang’eny, mi koro wang’eyo ni gin adier, omiyo in bende yie kodgi." 
Job6:1 Ayub nodwoko kama: 
Job6:2 “Ka da bed ni inyalo pimo chandruok gi lit ma an-go," 
Job6:3 to da oyud ni gipek moloyo kuoyo duto mae dhonam. Mano emomiyo wechena osebedo mager kamano. 
Job6:4 Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto osechiela gi aserni mage, kendo kwichgi landore e denda duto. Adier, masiche moa kuom Nyasaye olwora koni gi koni." 
Job6:5 Kanyna ka chamo lum to oling’ thi, kendo dhiang’ bende ka chiemo to ok oywagi." 
Job6:6 To ere ng’ama dicham chiemo maboth maonge chumbi? Koso nyuka mar pi bende nigi ndhadhu? 
Job6:7 Ok ahero chiemo machal kamago, bende gimoro amora ma achamo miyo ang’ok." 
Job6:8 Mad Nyasaye timna gima akwaye! Ang’o momiyo ok otimna gima adwaro? 
Job6:9 Adwaro mondo onega chuth," 
Job6:10 kendo ka anyalo ng’eyo kamano, to da abedo mamor, kata obedo ni an gi rem machal nadi, nikech nyaka nene pok asedagi chik Nyasaye." 
Job6:11 Ere teko ma pod adong’go, ma dimi abed mangima?" 
Job6:12 Uparo ni denda en lwanda? Koso ringra en chuma? 
Job6:13 Aonge teko ma odong’ ma daresrago, kendo onge kuma daring adhi akonyrae." 
Job6:14 E kinde ma ng’ato nigi chandruok kama, to odwaro mana osiepe mawinjo wachne, bed ni osejwang’o Nyasaye, kata pok ojwang’e." 
Job6:15 To un osiepena, uwuonda mana ka aore maduono ka koth ongee." 
Job6:16 E ndalo koth, to pe maleny ewi gode lokore ohula, kendo pong’ogi apong’a." 
Job6:17 E ndalo oro to igi dong’ nono kotwo. 
Job6:18 Joma wuotho e thim rwenyo ka dwaro pi. Gibayo abaya kendo githo kuno. 
Job6:19 Ee, jowuoth moa Sheba gi Tema manyo aore," 
Job6:20 to ka ginwang’ogi, to giyudo ni pi ma gigeno yudo ongee." 
Job6:21 Un to uchalona mana gi aorego, nikech uneno kaka achalo, to ubwok." 
Job6:22 Bende asekwayou mondo umiya gimoro? Kata ni mondo ugol mwandu 
Job6:23 uwarago e lwet wasika, kata e lwet jomecho?" 
Job6:24 Koro puonjauru, kendo nyisauru kethona. Abiro ling’ mondo awinj wachu." 
Job6:25 Adier, wach makare nyalo miyo ayie, to un uwacho mana weche manono." 
Job6:26 Ere gima omiyo umino koda wach, to wechena mag thagruok to ukwano mana ka yamo ma kudho?" 
Job6:27 Un joma digo ombulu nyathi kich mondo obed misumbau, kendo di uho osiepeu mondo uyud mwandu kuomgi!" 
Job6:28 Koro ng’iuru koni mondo uranga tir. Uparo ni adwaro wuondou koso? 
Job6:29 Paruru ane, mondo uwe ng’adona bura marach. Weuru thaga, nikech an kare." 
Job6:30 Un pod uparo ni ariambo ariamba, kendo uparo ni ok ang’eyo pogo gima ber gi gima rach!" 
Job7:1 “Thagruok ma dhano nigo e piny chalo mana gi ngima ng’at moter e lweny gi thwon, kendo mana ka tich lwedo matek," 
Job7:2 kata ka misumba ma gombo yueyo e tipo mang’ich, kendo ka jatich madwaro misache." 
Job7:3 Kamano e kaka atiyo tich manono due ka due, kendo ayudo kuyo otieno kotieno." 
Job7:4 Ka adhi nindo, to piny ok ru piyo. Ajony otieno duto, kendo agombo ni piny oru." 
Job7:5 Kudni opong’o denda, kendo buru oima, kendo adhondena chuer tutu." 
Job7:6 Ndalona ringo matek motamore gi nono, kendo girumo piyo ma onge geno." 
Job7:7 A Nyasaye, par ni ngimana chalo yamo, kendo morna oserumo." 
Job7:8 Koro inena sani, to ok nichak inena kendo, bende ka iranga, to ok iniyuda." 
Job7:9 Kaka bor polo duono kendo olal nono," 
Job7:10 kendo wi ji duto mong’eye wil kode. 
Job7:11 Ooyo, ok daling’! Mirima ohinga, kendo chunya lit, omiyo nyaka alosi." 
Job7:12 Ruoth Nyasaye, ang’o momiyo ikwaya? Koso iparo ni an ondieg nam?" 
Job7:13 E kinde ma arierae piny mondo ayue, ka aparo ni abiro yudo kue," 
Job7:14 to in imiyo lek gi fweny malich bwoga. 
Job7:15 Omiyo adwaro mondo adera moloyo bedo mangima kaka achaloni! 
Job7:16 Chunya osea, kendo aol gi bedo mangima. Weya, nikech ngimana onge tiende." 
Job7:17 Yaye, Ruoth Nyasaye, ang’o momiyo ikawo dhano mapek? Koso ere gima omiyo idewe," 
Job7:18 momiyo ilime okinyi kokinyi, kendo iteme sa duto?" 
Job7:19 Ok diwe amwonyie olawo? 
Job7:20 In jang’i jini, ere gima obadhi ka atimo richo? Ang’o momiyo an ema inena, koso ere gima omiyo achando chunyi?" 
Job7:21 In donge diwenae richona? Koso ok ding’wonnae timbena maricho? Piyopiyo nono, abiro nindo e liel, kendo ka imanya, to ok niyuda.”" 
Job8:1 Eka Bildad ja-Shua nodwoko Ayub kapenje niya," 
Job8:2 “Ibiro thoro weche manono kamano nyaka karang’o? 
Job8:3 Nyasaye ok ng’ad buch amwor, to otimo mana gima kare." 
Job8:4 Nyaka bed ni nyithindi ne oketho e nyime, mi okumogi e yo mowinjore gi kethogi." 
Job8:5 To in koro duogi ir Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto. 
Job8:6 Kapo ni iler, kendo ionge gi richo, to obiro konyi, mi odwokni mwanduni duto," 
Job8:7 kendo mwandu ma obiro miyi nobed mang’eny, ma ok nyal pim gi mago mane olalni." 
Job8:8 Parie ane, rieko mag ndalo machon, kendo neye mane kwerewa ofwenyo." 
Job8:9 Wan to, ndalowa nok ahinya, omiyo ok wanyal ng’eyo gimoro, kendo wan ngimawa e pinyni rumo piyo mana ka tipo makadho." 
Job8:10 Kuom mano, we ipuonjri kuom rieko joma chon, mondo iyud rieko mang’eny mane gin-go." 
Job8:11 Bende odundu nyalo dongo ka pi onge? Koso togo nyalo bet kama chuodho onge? 
Job8:12 Ka pi odwono, to giwang’ ka pod gitindo, kendo ka pok giromo tiyogo." 
Job8:13 Ji ma ok dew Nyasaye bende chalo gi gigo, kendo ka giseweyo Nyasaye, to gik ma gigeno kuomgi lal nono." 
Job8:14 Gik ma gigeno kuomgi chalo gi usi, kata mana gi mbuwi." 
Job8:15 Koro ka giyiengore kuom mbuwi, to mbuwi, dikonygi adier, mak oyiech? Koso ka gimako usi, to usi diresgi mak ochot?" 
Job8:16 Ji ma timbegi richo chalo gi buya, matwi kendo dongo e ndalo chwiri, kendo landore e puodho duto." 
Job8:17 Tiendegi olawore e lwendni, kendo omako matek." 
Job8:18 To ka opudhgi oko, to onge ng’ama nyalo ng’eyo ni gisebet kanyo." 
Job8:19 Mano e kaka ngimagi lal nono, kendo moko manyien wuok kuonde mane gintie." 
Job8:20 Nyasaye to ok jwang’ joma ogeno kuome, to bende ok okony joma timbegi richo." 
Job8:21 Enochak omi inyier kendo ikog gi mor," 
Job8:22 to enokel wichkuot ni joma mon kodi, kendo miech joma timbegi richo nolal nono.”" 
Job9:1 Eka Ayub nodwoko niya," 
Job9:2 “Ee, ayie gi wecheni, to ere kaka dhano dilo Nyasaye gi bura?" 
Job9:3 Ka da inyalo yudo kinde mar piemie kode gi wach, to onyalo penji penjo gana gi gana ma ng’ato ok nyal dwoko." 
Job9:4 Nyasaye riek malich, kendo en gi teko, ma onge ng’ama nyalo piem kode, mi loye." 
Job9:5 Oyiengo gode apoya, kendo omukogi gi mirimbe mager." 
Job9:6 En ema omiyo piny yiengni, koda ka mise mage." 
Job9:7 Nyasaye nyalo mono chieng’ wuok, kata mono sulue rieny gotieno." 
Job9:8 Onge ng’ama ne okonyo Nyasaye yaro polo, kata nyono Ondieg Nam mager." 
Job9:9 Nyasaye ema oketo sulue e kor polo, kaka Rudhni gi Oluoro-Budho gi Ratego, kod sulue mamoko man yo milambo." 
Job9:10 Otimo gik madongo modhiero dhano ng’eyo kendo honni mage okadho akwana. 
Job9:11 Nyasaye kadho machiegni to ok anyal nene. 
Job9:12 Gima odwaro ema okawo, kendo onge ng’ama nyalo tame, bende ong’e ng’ama nyalo penje gima otimo." 
Job9:13 Mirimb Nyasaye osiko. Ne otieko wasike mane okonyo Rahab ondieg nam, kapiem kode." 
Job9:14 Koro ere kaka dayud weche ma dadwokgo Nyasaye malichni? 
Job9:15 Kata obedo ni aonge gi ketho, to onge gima anyalo timo, mak mana kwayo ng’wono kuom Nyasaye ma jang’adna bura." 
Job9:16 To kata ka aluonge e bura, mi obiro, kendo oyiena aloso, to ok apar ni obiro winjo wachna." 
Job9:17 Okuma malit kuom gima onge ndhathe, kendo omedo goya kayiem." 
Job9:18 Ok onyal weyo ayue, to otimona mana gik ma miyo chunya lit." 
Job9:19 Bende datem konyora githwon? To neye kaka oratego! Koso dadonjne? To ng’ama dichune mondo obi e bura? 
Job9:20 Kata obedo ni an kare, to dhoga awuon dindhoga, kendo gimoro amora ma dawachi dinere marach." 
Job9:21 Aonge gi ketho, to koro ok adew! Asin gi ngima mar pinyni, nikech pogruok onge," 
Job9:22 nimar Nyasaye tiekowa, kata ka wan gi ketho, kata ka waongego." 
Job9:23 Ka ng’at ma onge gi ketho otho apoya, to Nyasaye nyiero anyiera!" 
Job9:24 Nyasaye oseketo piny e lwet joma timbegi richo, bende omiyo jong’ad bura duto bedo muofni. To ka ok en ema ne otimo kamano, to kara, ng’ano mane otime?" 
Job9:25 Ndalona ringo kadho, to onge achiel maber kuomgi." 
Job9:26 Ngimana kadho ka yie ma jang’wech, kendo ringo matek mana ka ongo ma yudho gweno." 
Job9:27 Ka atemo bwonjo mondo rem olalna," 
Job9:28 to rem dwaro mana nega. Ang’eyo ni Nyasaye kwana ka jaketho. 
Job9:29 To kaka okwana kamano, koro ere gima omiyo onego achandra?" 
Job9:30 Kata da alwokra gi sabun maber," 
Job9:31 to Nyasaye diwita e bur yugi, mi athing’ kata mana lepa!" 
Job9:32 Nyasaye ok en dhano ma dahedhra dwoko, kata ma dadhi ayalgo e bura." 
Job9:33 Mad ng’ato bedie ma dithegwa gi Nyasaye, kata ma ding’adnwa bura e kindwa kode," 
Job9:34 mondo owe kuma, kendo owe bwoga gi masichene." 
Job9:35 Eka dalosi ka ok aluor, nikech an awuon ang’eyo kaka chunya chalo." 
Job10:1 Aol gi bedo mangima, omiyo koro abiro hulo chandruokna duto, nikech chunya lit." 
Job10:2 A Nyasaye, kik ikwana ka jaketho, to nyisa gima aseketho." 
Job10:3 Bende en gima ber kibedo makwiny, kendo kijaro gima in iwuon ema ichueyo? To eka ibuonjo kineno rieko ma joma richo ng’ado!" 
Job10:4 Bende inyalo neno gik moko kaka dhano neno? 
Job10:5 Koso in ndaloni nok ka ndalo dhano," 
Job10:6 momiyo inono richona, kendo imanyo ketho moro amora ma an-go?" 
Job10:7 To chutho ing’eyo ni aonge gi ketho, kendo aonge gi ng’ato ma diresa kuomi." 
Job10:8 Donge lweti mane ochweya ema koro tieka? 
Job10:9 A Nyasaye, par ni ne ichweya kuom lowo, to bende didwoka e lowo adier?" 
Job10:10 Ne imiyo wuora teko mondo onywola, mi imiyo adongo ei mama." 
Job10:11 Ne ichweyo ringra gi choke kod leche, mi iumo chokena gi ring’o kod pien." 
Job10:12 Isemiya ngima, kendo isehera gi hera mosiko, bende pod abedo mangima, nikech in ema irita." 
Job10:13 To kata obedo kamano, koro ang’eyo ni e chunyi kucha," 
Job10:14 ne irito mondo ine ane ka atimo richo, mana ni mondo itamri weyona richonano!" 
Job10:15 Ka aketho, to alewo. To kata ka atimo maber, to ok ayud pak. Yaye, chunya lit, kendo wichkuot ohewa!" 
Job10:16 Ka adhi maber, to idwara mana ka sibuor, kendo itimo honni mondo ihinyago." 
Job10:17 Pile ibedo gi joneno maranga, momiyo mirimbi medore ameda kuoma, kendo pile ikelona chandruok manyien." 
Job10:18 A Nyasaye, ne imiyo onywola nang’o?" 
Job10:19 Dine ber ka atho ka pok ng’ato onena. Ka dine awuog ei mama, mi yika mana gi kanyono, to mano dine obedo maber, mana ka gima ne ok onywola." 
Job10:20 Donge ngimana chiegni rumo? Koro weya mondo acham ngima e ndalo modong’na," 
Job10:21 ka pok adhi e piny motimo mudho mandiwa, kuma ok anyal wuokie." 
Job10:22 En piny motimo mudho kod tipo, ma kata ler en mana mudho.”" 
Job11:1 Eka Zofar ja-Nama nowacho ni Ayub niya," 
Job11:2 “Bende ng’ato diwe weche manonogi, mak odwoko? Koso thoro weche mang’eny dimi ng’ato bed ng’ama kare?" 
Job11:3 In Ayub, iparo ni wecheni mang’enygo nyalo miyo ng’ato ling’? Kata kiwacho weche mag ajara, to ok dikweri koso?" 
Job11:4 Iparo ni gik miwacho gin adier, bende iwacho ni iler e nyim Nyasaye." 
Job11:5 To ka da bed ni Nyasaye nyalo dwoki kuom wachno," 
Job11:6 to da onyisi ni nitie yore mang’eny mag rieko, kendo nitie gik matut motamo dhano ng’eyo. Neye ni Nyasaye ok dew richoni moko!" 
Job11:7 Bende inyalo fwenyo midhierni mag Nyasaye adier? Koso inyalo ng’eyo kama duong’ne ogikie? 
Job11:8 Obor moyombo polo! Koro ere gima ditim? Riekone tut mokadho piny! In to ing’eyo ang’o? 
Job11:9 Duong’ mar Nyasaye lach moloyo piny ngima, kendo lach moloyo nam." 
Job11:10 Kapo ni Nyasaye omaki kendo yali, to ere ng’ama ditame?" 
Job11:11 Ong’eyo joma nono, kendo oneno timbegi duto maricho." 
Job11:12 Ka kenje thim inyalo nywolo ka muol, to kara joma ofuwo bende nyalo timo timbe mariek!" 
Job11:13 Ayub, lok chunyi, mondo idwar Nyasaye." 
Job11:14 Gol richo kuomi, kendo riemb timbe ma ok ni kare oa dalani." 
Job11:15 Eka diting’ wiyi kionge gi wichkuot, kendo ichak ngima manyien ka in gi chir." 
Job11:16 Bang’e wiyi nowil gi chandruokni duto, mana ka koth mochue ochok ma wich wilgo." 
Job11:17 Ngimani nobed maler moloyo odiechieng’ tir gi ler, kendo mudho manie ngimani norieny mana ka ler mar okinyi." 
Job11:18 Inidag gi kue nikech geno ma in go, kendo Nyasaye noriti, mi miyi yueyo." 
Job11:19 Ok inibed ka iluoro wasiki, kendo ji mang’eny nobi mondo ikonygi." 
Job11:20 To joma timbegi richo norang koni gi koni, ka luoro omako, nikech onge yo moro ma ginyalo tonygo, to tho kende ema ginigen ni biro tiekogi.”" 
Job12:1 Ayub nodwoko niya," 
Job12:2 “Adier, un e jodongo ma ok riw gi kiawa, kendo ka utho, to rieko bende olal." 
Job12:3 To an gi rieko mana ka ma un-go, kendo ok uloya. Ere ng’ama ok ong’eyo gik moko duto musewacho?" 
Job12:4 Koda ka osiepena nyiera anyiera, kata obedo ni an ng’at makare kendo ma onge ketho, to chon an ema ne Nyasaye dwoko lemona." 
Job12:5 Yot ni joma onge gi thagruok chayo joma thagore, kendo goyo ng’at ma chiegni podho." 
Job12:6 To jokuo gi joma ok dew Nyasaye odak gi kue, kata obedo ni tekregi giwegi ema giloko Nyasachgi." 
Job12:7 Dhiuru upenj dhok gi winy mondo opuonju," 
Job12:8 kendo ukwa rieko kuom rech manie nam kod gik mamol. 
Job12:9 Giduto ging’eyo ni Nyasaye ema timo gik ma kamago. 
Job12:10 Nyasaye ema rito ngima gik mochueyo, kendo much ji duto ni e lwete." 
Job12:11 Donge it dhano pimo weche mowinjo, mana kaka lep pogo ndhath gik mobilo?" 
Job12:12 Adier, jodongo nigi rieko, to Nyasaye nigi rieko kod teko." 
Job12:13 Jodongo nigi paro matut, Nyasaye to nigi paro matut, kaachiel gi teko monyalo timogo gimoro amora." 
Job12:14 Ka Nyasaye ema omuko gimoro, to ere ng’ama nyalo gere kendo? Koso ka Nyasaye ema oketo ng’ato e tuech, koro ere ng’ama digonye?" 
Job12:15 Ka Nyasaye ogeng’o koth, to oro wuok, kendo ka oyawo polo, to ohula mwomo, mi keth piny." 
Job12:16 Nyasaye nigi teko kod loch, kendo jawuond kaachiel gi ng’at miwuondo duto nie lwete." 
Job12:17 Oketho rieko mag jotelo, kendo omayo jong’ad bura paro." 
Job12:18 Oriembo ruodhi, kendo oketogi e tuech." 
Job12:19 En ema omiyo jodolo bedo jochan ma onge lewni, kendo omiyo joma nigi loch bedo mobolore." 
Job12:20 Omiyo joma ogen ling’ thi, kendo omiyo rieko mag jodongo lal nono." 
Job12:21 Okuodo wi joma nigi loch, kendo otieko teko jotelo." 
Job12:22 Ooro ler kuonde motimo mudho mandiwa, kendo olero tiend midhierni matut." 
Job12:23 Omiyo ogendini bedo marateke kendo madongo, to bang’e oloyogi, mi okethgi." 
Job12:24 Omiyo jotendgi bedo mofuwo, kendo oweyo gibayo abaya, mi girweny nono," 
Job12:25 ka gimulo e mudho mandiwa, kendo ka gitagore ka joma omer." 
Job13:1 “Gik moko duto ma uwacho ne asewinjo chon, kendo ang’eyogi pep." 
Job13:2 Gik mung’eyo ema an bende ang’eyo, omiyo ok uloya gi rieko." 
Job13:3 Nyasaye ema an go gi wach, to ok un, kendo en ema adwaro yalo kode." 
Job13:4 Un to, uumo adiera gi miriambo, omiyo uchalo jothieth ma ok nyal thiedho tuo." 
Job13:5 Kudwaro nyiso ni uriek, to ling’uru aling’a!" 
Job13:6 Koro chikuru itu mondo uwinj kaka ayalo bucha. 
Job13:7 Ere gima omiyo uriambo? Koso uparo ni miriambou biro konyo Nyasaye? 
Job13:8 Udwaro dok ni Nyasaye koso? Koso udwaro chwake kiyale? 
Job13:9 To ka Nyasaye orangou maber, bende doyud gimoro maber kuomu? Uparo ni unyalo wuondo Nyasaye kaka uwuondo dhano?" 
Job13:10 Kata kudokne kamano, to obiro ng’eng’ou malit." 
Job13:11 Donge tekone biro goyou gi kihondko, mi mbi mare chamu?" 
Job13:12 Ngecheu kod weche muchwakorugogo onge gi ndhathgi. 
Job13:13 Koro ling’uru mondo uwena thuolo awuo, kata gima nadi ema timore," 
Job13:14 nimar aikora mar wito ngimana. 
Job13:15 Kata bed ni Nyasaye biro nega, to onge wach! Pod abiro mana wacho wachna e nyime." 
Job13:16 Nyalo bet bende ni thwonano biro konya, nimar onge jaricho ma dihedhre dhi e nyim Nyasaye!" 
Job13:17 Koro chikuru itu maber mondo uwinj weche ma awacho. 
Job13:18 Aikora mar yalo, nikech ang’eyo ni achung’ e adiera." 
Job13:19 Nyasaye, yie ibi idonjna. Ka iyie timo kamano, to abiro ling’ thi, kendo aikora ni tho." 
Job13:20 An gi gik moko ariyo kende ma adwaro kwayi, ka itimonagi to ok naringi aa e wang’i." 
Job13:21 Mokwongo, yie iwe sanda. Mar ariyo, yie igol kuoma oko masicheni mabwoga." 
Job13:22 Nyasaye in ema ikwong wuoyo, eka adwoki. Ka ok kamano, to we awuo, eka idwoka." 
Job13:23 Nyisa ketho ma asetimo midonjonago. 
Job13:24 Ere gima omiyo idhina gi bathi, koso ere gima omiyo ikwana ka jasigu?" 
Job13:25 Ere gima omiyo itemo bwoga, to an mana oboke ma yamo kwadho, kendo mana tiang’ motwo?" 
Job13:26 Idonjona gi weche malit, moriwo koda ka richo mane atimo ka an nyathi." 
Job13:27 Idhogo tiendena gi nyororo, kendo iketo alama ei tienda mondo onyis kamoro amora ma anyono." 
Job13:28 An ema iranga, to aorora mana ka yien motop, kata ka law ma olwenda ochamo." 
Job14:1 Ndalo dhano nok, kendo oneno thagruok mathoth." 
Job14:2 Odongo kendo onur piyo, mana ka maua, bende olal nono ka tipo makadho." 
Job14:3 A Nyasaye, ng’at ma kamano bende dilokri, mi ing’i? Koso dikela e nyimi mondo iyala?" 
Job14:4 Onge gima ler ma diwuog kuom gima ochido ka dhano. 
Job14:5 Kar romb hike nosechan chon. Ee, kata mana duechene bende ong’ere. In Nyasaye isechane, omiyo ok nyal loke." 
Job14:6 Lok wang’i oa kuom dhano mondo iweye. Kata obedo ni ngimane tek kamano, to we one maber kaka onyalo." 
Job14:7 Ka osetong’ yath, to nitie geno ni onyalo loth kendo." 
Job14:8 Kata obedo ni tiendene top, kendo osikine tho ei lowo," 
Job14:9 to kowinjo much pi, to oloth mana ka yien mochako dongo." 
Job14:10 Dhano to tho, kendo mano e gikone, to ka osetho, to erego?" 
Job14:11 Kata aora dipo ka chieng’ moro oduono, kendo kata mana nam bende pige nyalo rumo." 
Job14:12 Dhano to kosetho, to ok nyal chier kendo. Ok onyal chiew ka polo pok okethore, kendo gimoro ok nochiewe e nindoneno." 
Job14:13 A Nyasaye, mad iyie ipanda e piny joma otho, mondo apond kuno nyaka mirimbi kue. Bang’e iket kinde ma ibiro parae kendo." 
Job14:14 Ka ng’ato otho, to bende dochak obed mangima? An to abiro dhil gi thagruokna nyaka kinde maber chopi." 
Job14:15 Bang’e iniluonga, to anadwoki, kendo inibed mamor kineno ng’at mane ichueyo." 
Job14:16 Eka inirang kamoro amora ma anyono, to ok inidew richona." 
Job14:17 Ibiro keto richona e ndede, mi idin mondo kik nen. Ee, ibiro rucho oko timbena duto mamono." 
Job14:18 Kamoro dipo ka kinde obiro ma gode nyalo mukoree, kendo ma lwendni bende imukoe oko." 
Job14:19 Pi nyalo loko lwendni, kendo ohula nyalo ywero lowo. Kamano e kaka iketho geno ma dhano nigo!" 
Job14:20 To mogik, ihewo dhano chuth, kendo itere mabor, mi tho bam wang’e." 
Job14:21 Kata bed mana ni yawuote yud duong’, to en ok ong’e, kata ka giyudo wich kuot, to ok one." 
Job14:22 Rem mar dende kende ema owinjo, kaachiel gi kuyo mar chunye.”" 
Job15:1 Elifaz nodwoko niya," 
Job15:2 “Mago weche manono, Ayub! Iwacho mana weche maonge tich!" 
Job15:3 Onge ng’ama riek manyalo wuoyo kaka iwuoyono, kata manyalo temo resore gi weche manono kamano." 
Job15:4 Inyoso chuny ji mondo kik luor Nyasaye kendo imonogi lame. 
Job15:5 Iwuoyo kamano nikech ing’eyo ni in jaricho, kendo idwaro mana wuondowa gi weche mamit." 
Job15:6 An ok anyal ng’adoni bura, nikech weche miwacho ema nyiso ni in jaketho." 
Job15:7 Iparo ni in e ng’at mane okwong nywol? Koso ne intie ka pok ne Nyasaye ochueyo gode? 
Job15:8 In ne in kanyo, miwinjo ka Nyasaye chano gik mobiro timo? Koso in kendi ema in gi rieko?" 
Job15:9 Onge gima ing’eyo ma wan ok wang’eyo. 
Job15:10 Ne wayudo rieko kuom jodongo madongo, mane onywol kapok onywol wuoru." 
Job15:11 Ichayo hoch ma Nyasaye hoyigo, kaachiel gi weche mamuol ma isewinjo koso?" 
Job15:12 Ang’o momiyo ikecho, kendo ijwolo wang’i," 
Job15:13 ka mirima omaki gi Nyasaye, kendo ikwede gi weche mathoth?" 
Job15:14 Bende nitie ng’at maler chutho adier? Koso bende nitie ng’at malong’o e wang’ Nyasaye? 
Job15:15 Ka Nyasaye ok nyal geno kata mana malaika mage, kendo joma odak e polo bende nenore mana ma ok ler," 
Job15:16 to koro ere kaka dogen dhano man gi timbe modwanyore motow, kendo magado richo mana ka pi?" 
Job15:17 Koro in Ayub, winj gima an ang’eyo:" 
Job15:18 Joma riek osepuonja adiera, mane kweregi onyisogi mak opandogi." 
Job15:19 E ndalogo kwerewago ne odak mana kendgi e pinygi, ma onge jopinje mamoko ma gikikorego, ma dimi giwe Nyasaye." 
Job15:20 Ng’at ma timbene richo kendo mathiro jowadgi noyud chandruok e kinde duto mag ngimane. 
Job15:21 Koko mag masiche biro mor e ite, kendo jomecho biro monje mi yake e kinde moparo ni enie gi kue." 
Job15:22 Oonge gi geno mar wuok e chandruok, nimar ong’eyo ni tho okiye," 
Job15:23 kendo ni achudhe rito mondo ocham ringre. Ng’at ma kamano ong’eyo ni ngimane otimo mudho. 
Job15:24 Masira marach omake apoya, kendo chandruok gi paro malit oime, mana ka gima ruoth maratego ema omonje." 
Job15:25 Mano e gima notimre ni ng’at ma kamano, nikech othiano ni Nyasaye, kendo osepiem gi Ng’ama Nyalo Gik Moko Duto." 
Job15:26 Ng’at ma kamano en jasunga, kendo wiye tek. Oyudho okumbane mana ka jalweny," 
Job15:27 kendo omwomore mondo oked gi Nyasaye. 
Job15:28 En ng’at mane omako mier madongo e lweny, kendo okawo udi mane wegi osedarie, to kata kamano lweny biro ketho miergo gi udigo chuth." 
Job15:29 Ok nobed jamoko kuom kinde mang’eny. Mwandu ma en go ok nodag aming’a. To kata mana tipone bende nolal nono. 
Job15:30 Kendo ok notony e masira. Enochal gi yath ma mach owang’o pote, kendo ma yamo okeyo thiepene." 
Job15:31 Ka ogalore, mi ogeno kuom timbe manono, to timbene manono kende ema noyudi." 
Job15:32 Obiro ner ka ndalone pok orumo, mana ka pot yath, mi ok nochak obed mang’ich." 
Job15:33 Enochal gi yadh mzabibu ma olembe lwar ka pok ochiek, kendo mana ka yadh zeituni ma ok nyag olemo." 
Job15:34 Ji ma ok dew Nyasaye ok nobed gi nyithindo, to bende udi moger gi gik moyud kuom asoya, mach nowang’ mi tiek pep." 
Job15:35 Mago e joma kelo chandruok, kendo timo timbe maricho. Chunygi opong’ gi miriambo kinde duto.”" 
Job16:1 Ayub nodwoko niya," 
Job16:2 “Asewinjo weche machalo kamago ndalo mathoth, omiyo hocho muhoyago medona mana chandruok." 
Job16:3 Ubiro siko kuloso kamano nyaka karang’o? Ang’o momiyo utamoru ling’? 
Job16:4 Ka da bed ni an e un, to an bende dawacho gik moko duto muwachogo. Da agonu wiya ka ng’ama riek, kendo da arogonu gi weche mogundho." 
Job16:5 Bende da ang’adonu rieko ma ategogo chunyu, kendo dikoro athoro weche mondo ahougo!" 
Job16:6 To an to, kata ka aloso, kata ka aling’, to rem ma an-go ok rum." 
Job16:7 A Nyasaye, isemiyo aol chuth, kendo isenego joga duto." 
Job16:8 Isemaka, kendo ikawa ka jasiki. Adong’ mana choke lilo, kendo ji paro ni mano nyiso ni an jaketho." 
Job16:9 Nyasaye jako bedena gi embena ka en gi mirima mager, kendo ojwolona wang’e, ka osin koda." 
Job16:10 Ji ng’amo dhogi, ka gidwaro chama, bende ginur kuoma, bende githalo lemba." 
Job16:11 Nyasaye osejwang’a e lwet joma timbegi richo. 
Job16:12 Chon ne adak gi kue, to Nyasaye ne omaka gi ng’uta, mi owita piny, kendo otura. An ema Nyasaye onena," 
Job16:13 kendo ochiela gi aserni koni gi koni. Gichwowa kendo gihinya, to eka pod ok okecha!" 
Job16:14 Ohinyo denda sa duto, kendo omonja ka jalweny ma chunye okethore." 
Job16:15 Aywak kendo arwako pien gugru, bende abet abeta e buru ka wiya okuot." 
Job16:16 Aseywak mi wang’a oowore, kendo okuot ma ok anyal neno," 
Job16:17 to ok asetimo tim mahundu, kendo alamo Nyasaye gi adiera duto." 
Job16:18 In piny, kik ipand gik maricho ma osetimna! Kik iyie ng’ato omi aling’, ka aywak mondo ong’adna bura makare!" 
Job16:19 Nitie ng’ato e polo ma biro chung’ ka chwaka. 
Job16:20 Adwaro mondo ywakna ochop e nyim Nyasaye, kendo owinj lemona." 
Job16:21 Bende adwaro ni ng’ato okwana Nyasaye, ka ng’ama kwayo ni osiepne." 
Job16:22 Hika koro orumo, kendo achomo kuma adhiye chuth." 
Job17:1 “Ndalona oserumo, kendo aonge gi kue. Onge gima odong’na mak mana tho!" 
Job17:2 Chunya lit ka aneno kaka ji tugo koda seche duto. 
Job17:3 A Nyasaye, awacho adiera, omiyo yie wachna, nimar onge ng’at machielo ma nyalo yie gima awacho." 
Job17:4 Isedino parogi mondo kik ging’e adiera, omiyo koro kik iwe gigona siboi." 
Job17:5 Ngero moro wacho niya, ‘Ka ng’ato ondhogo jowetene kuom wach pesa, to kethoneno nyaka dog e wi nyithinde.’" 
Job17:6 To koro an ema gigoyona ngerono! Omiyo ka ji owinjo kamano, to gibiro ira, kendo ging’udho wang’a olawo." 
Job17:7 Kuyo ma an go odino wang’a ma ok anyal neno, kendo bedena gi tiendena odong’ mana choke." 
Job17:8 Ji maparo ni gin joadiera kibaji omako, kendo giduto giwacho ni aonge gi Nyasaye." 
Job17:9 Bende ji maparo ni gin joma ogen medo neno ni adier gin ema gin kare. 
Job17:10 To ka da giduto gibi, mi gichung’ e nyima, to ok da ayudo kata achiel kuomgi ka riek." 
Job17:11 Ndalona oserumo, kendo chenona duto osekethore, bende koro onge gima ageno." 
Job17:12 Osiepena to wacho ni otieno en odiechieng’, kendo ni ler ni machiegni, kata obedo ni an e mudho kamano." 
Job17:13 Aonge gi geno, kendo abiro dak mana e Piny Joma Otho, kuma abiro rierae piny mondo anindi e mudho." 
Job17:14 Ka awacho ni liel ni, ‘In e wuora,’ kata ka awacho ni kudni machamagi ni, ‘Un mama gi nyiminena,’" 
Job17:15 to koro ere kuma genona dibedie, koso ere ng’ama ding’e ni an gi geno?" 
Job17:16 Ka iyika e bur, to geno ma an-go ok didhi koda e Piny Joma Otho.”" 
Job18:1 Eka Bildad nodwoke niya," 
Job18:2 “Ayub, ji machal kodi ok nyal ling’ koso? Ka da bed ni inyalo ling’, to da waloso kodi." 
Job18:3 Ang’o momiyo iparo ni wafuwo ka dhok? 
Job18:4 Mirima ma in godono hinyi mana in iwuon! Iparo ni ji duto biro rumo e piny mana nikech in? Koso ni gode biro mukore nikech wecheni? 
Job18:5 Ng’at ma timbene richo biro nego tache, kendo maye ok nochak oliel." 
Job18:6 Ee, taya manie hembe ibiro nego." 
Job18:7 Chon nowuotho motegno, to tinde oywayo wuoth. Riekone owuon ema omiyo opodho." 
Job18:8 Osenyumore e gogo, mi tiendene omoko." 
Job18:9 Ee, obadho omako ofunj tiende matek, ma ok onyal bwodho." 
Job18:10 Osechikne otego e wang’yo ma oluwo. 
Job18:11 Masira bwoge koni gi koni, kendo lawe sa duto." 
Job18:12 Chon ne en gi mwandu, to tinde oonge kata mana gi chiemo, kendo masira rite arita." 
Job18:13 Tuo marach omako dende duto, kendo miyo bedene kod tiendene kethore." 
Job18:14 Ogole oko e ode mane odakie gi kue, kendo iywaye kitere e tho." 
Job18:15 Koro ng’ato ang’ata nyalo dak e odeno, ka osekir yath e iye mondo otiek tuo mantie." 
Job18:16 Jarichono chalo gi yath ma tiendene otwo kendo bedene oner. 
Job18:17 Humbe orumo e piny, kendo nyinge olal ma onge ng’ama paro." 
Job18:18 Ibiro riembe e piny ma ji odakieni, mi oa e ler, odhi e mudho." 
Job18:19 Ok nowe nyikwayo ma dichung wiye, bende oonge gi joge ma odong’." 
Job18:20 Ka joma odak yo wuok chieng’ owinjo gima otimoreneno, to gibwok. Joma odak yo podho chieng’ kowinjo kamano, to luoro mako." 
Job18:21 Mano e gima timore ni joma timbegi richo ma ok dew Nyasaye.” 
Job19:1 Ayub nodwoko niya," 
Job19:2 “Nyaka karang’o ma ubiro miyoe chunya bedo malit gi wecheu mang’enygi? 
Job19:3 Kinde ka kinde uwang’o iya, kendo ok une wichkuot ka uyanya." 
Job19:4 Kapo ni atimo marach, to mano hinyou nadi?" 
Job19:5 Uparo ni uber moloya, kendo uparo ni thagruokna nyiso ni an jaketho." 
Job19:6 To Nyasaye ema oseng’adona bura ma ok ni kare, kendo en ema ochikona obadho mondo amokie!" 
Job19:7 Ka agoyo nduru ni onega, to onge ng’ama dewo. Kata ka adwaro bura makare, to ok anyal yudo." 
Job19:8 Nyasaye osedinona yo, mi ok anyal kadho, kendo osemiyo mudho oimo yorena." 
Job19:9 Osekawo mwanduna duto, kendo oketho nyinga." 
Job19:10 Ogoya koni gi koni, mi arumo. Kaka ng’ato pudho yath, mi kethre, e kaka Nyasaye oseketho geno mane an go." 
Job19:11 Nyasaye osekecho koda malich, kendo omon koda mana ka jasike." 
Job19:12 Ooro jolwenje mondo oked koda, kendo gilworo hemba koni gi koni mondo gimonja." 
Job19:13 Owetena oseweya, kendo osiepena duto koro ok dwara." 
Job19:14 Wedena gi joma ohera oseweya mi odhi. 
Job19:15 Joma ne bedo welo e oda, wigi osewil koda, kendo kata nyiri mane tiyona okawa mana ka ng’ama wendo." 
Job19:16 Ka aluongo jatichna moro, to ok odwoka, kata ka ahombe ni mondo okonya, to ok oyie." 
Job19:17 Chiega ok dwar winjo tikna, kendo kata mana ominena hie ok nyal sudo buta machiegni." 
Job19:18 Nyithindo jara, kendo ka ginena, to ginyiera." 
Job19:19 Osiepena mane ageno ahinya, osin koda, kendo joma nyocha ahero gi chunya duto koro ringa." 
Job19:20 Adong’ choke lilo, kendo koro aliero mana e lak tho." 
Job19:21 Yaye un osiepena, ywagauru, nimar lwet Nyasaye oseketa piny." 
Job19:22 Ere gima omiyo un bende usanda mana kaka Nyasaye sanda? Donge usesanda moromo? 
Job19:23 Mad ng’ato yie ndik weche ma awacho e kitabu," 
Job19:24 kata gor wechenago gi tindo e kor lwanda mondo osik nyaka chieng’. 
Job19:25 To ang’eyo ni ng’ato nitie e polo, ma nobi mondo ochwaka chieng’ giko." 
Job19:26 Kata ka tuo oketho denda kamano, to e ringruokni anane Nyasaye." 
Job19:27 Ee, ananene gi wang’a awuon." 
Job19:28 Chunya ne otho nikech nuwacho niya, ‘Ere kaka dwasande?’ Adier, ne udwaro yore ma dukedgo koda." 
Job19:29 To koro luoruru ligangla ma ochomou, nimar en ligangla ma Nyasaye kumogo richo, eka mondo ung’e ni nitie Jal mang’ado bura!”" 
Job20:1 Eka Zofar nowacho niya," 
Job20:2 “Ayub, gima iwacho owang’o iya, omiyo koro adwaro dwoki piyopiyo." 
Job20:3 Asewinjo kiyanya malit, to koro ang’eyo kaka onego adwoki." 
Job20:4 Ing’eyo malong’o ni chakre kinde mane okwong keto dhano e piny," 
Job20:5 onge jaricho mosebedo mamor aming’a, kendo ilo mar ng’at ma ok dew Nyasaye rumo piyo." 
Job20:6 Kata obedo ni osungore mi ochop nyaka e polo, kendo kata obedo maduong’, ma wiye geyo mana boche polo," 
Job20:7 to achien noyweye oko mana ka buru, mi olal nono. Joma ne ong’eye nowuor kuma odhiye." 
Job20:8 Enoduon ka buoyo, kendo nolal nono ka lek, mi ok nonene kendo." 
Job20:9 Wenge mane onene ok nochak onene, nikech noa chutho kuma ne oyudo odakie." 
Job20:10 Yawuote nyaka dwok gik mane okwalo kuom joma odhier. Adier, nyithinde nyaka dwok mwandu mane okawo." 
Job20:11 Dende pod ber, kendo chwe, to piyopiyo nono obiro lokore buru." 
Job20:12 Richo mitne, omiyo okano moko e lembe," 
Job20:13 mana ka ng’at mokano chiemo e dhoge mondo owinj ndhathe. 
Job20:14 To chiemono lokore makech e iye, mana ka kwiri." 
Job20:15 Nyasaye miyo jaricho dwoko mwandu ma osekwalo, mana ka ng’ama ng’ogo gima osechamo." 
Job20:16 Gima jaricho omwonyo chalo kwiri kendo nege mana ka gima thuol ema okaye. 
Job20:17 Ok obi dak mondo one mor zeituni gi chak kod mor kich mamol ka aore," 
Job20:18 to obiro weyo gik moko duto ma osebedo ka otiyone, kendo ok obi yudo thuolo ma ochamogo mwandune," 
Job20:19 nikech ne othiro joma odhier kendo ojwang’ogi, mi omayo jomoko nono utgi." 
Job20:20 Wuoche nokadhore," 
Job20:21 omiyo kane ochiemo, to gimoro ok dong’ e tape. To koro sani gige oserumo." 
Job20:22 Kata gik mang’eny opong’o dalane kamano, to achien none chandruok malich." 
Job20:23 We ocham achama gik moko duto modwaro! Nyasaye biro kume gi mirima mager. 
Job20:24 Ka otemo ringo mondo oyomb ligangla mar nyinyo, to asere mar mula chwowe." 
Job20:25 Ee, asere goye mbure, kendo kama lew asere opowo, remo chwerie, omiyo kihondko dwaro nege." 
Job20:26 Gik moko duto mane osekano lal nono. Mach ma lwet dhano ok omoko ema wang’e kaachiel gi joode duto. 
Job20:27 Polo nyiso richo mag ng’atni. Piny bende donjone. 
Job20:28 Mirimb Nyasaye biro mwomo ka ohula, mi keth mwandune duto." 
Job20:29 Mano e kum ma Nyasaye miyo joricho. Ee, mano e pok moketonigi.”" 
Job21:1 Ayub nodwoko niya," 
Job21:2 “Chikuru itu mondo uwinj gima awacho, nikech mano ema dimi abed mamor." 
Job21:3 Miyauru thuolo mondo awuo, to ka asetieko, to unyalo chara achara kaka uhero!" 
Job21:4 An dhano aongego gi wach, to nitie gimoro ma maya kue." 
Job21:5 Ranguru ane ka ok ubi bwok, mi dhou moki!" 
Job21:6 Ka aparo gik mosetimorena, ang’eng kendo denda duto kirni." 
Job21:7 Ere gima omiyo Nyasaye weyo joricho dak aming’a kendo dhi maber? 
Job21:8 Nyithindgi gi nyikwagi dongo mana e wang’gi. 
Job21:9 Nyasaye ok kel chandruok e miechgi, omiyo gidak adaka gi kue, ma onge gima bwogogi." 
Job21:10 Adier, jambgi duto iluwo maber, kendo ginywol ma ok gibwogi." 
Job21:11 Nyithindgi ringo kendo tugo ka nyiroye," 
Job21:12 bende gimielo thum kod asili. 
Job21:13 Piny dhi kodgi maber, kendo githo gi kue" 
Job21:14 Joricho okwero Nyasaye niya, ‘Wewa! Ok wadwar ng’eyo yoreni." 
Job21:15 In ng’a, ma dwatini? Koso ere gima dwayud kwalami?’" 
Job21:16 Giwacho ni giyudo gik moko duto gi tekregi. An to ok anyal yie gi parogino. 
Job21:17 Joricho manok kende ema tho piyo, kendo matin kende ema yudo masira. Bende Nyasaye osekumo joricho gi mirima adier," 
Job21:18 mi okeyogi ka mihudhi ma yamo tero, kata ka buru ma yamo kudho?" 
Job21:19 Uwacho ni Nyasaye kumo nyithindo kuom richo wuonegi. Ooyo, Nyasaye mondo okum akuma joricho kendgi, konyisogo ni otimo kamano nikech richo jogo giwegi." 
Job21:20 Adier, joricho mondo okum kuom richogi giwegi, eka ging’e mirimb Nyasaye." 
Job21:21 Ka ng’ato ndalone orumo, motho, to bende dodew adier ka nyithinde neno maber?" 
Job21:22 Bende dhano dipuonj Nyasaye adier? Koso bende doyal Ng’ama Duong’ Moloyo? 
Job21:23 Ji moko bedo mangima, kendo ok gituo nyaka githo." 
Job21:24 Gimor kendo gidak gi kue, bende dendgi ber." 
Job21:25 Ji moko to ok ne maber e ngimagi duto, kendo githo ka chunygi lit." 
Job21:26 To kata kamano ji duto tho machalre, mi yiki, kendo kudni nur kuomgi!" 
Job21:27 Ang’eyo parou, kendo ang’eyo gik maricho mudwaro hinyago." 
Job21:28 Ubiro penja ni, tinde ere dala ng’at maduong’ mane timo timbe maricho?" 
Job21:29 To un, pok uwuoyo gi joma wuotho e pinje mamoko koso? Donge usewinjo ka giwacho ni," 
Job21:30 e kinde ma Nyasaye okecho kendo kumo ji, to joricho ema dong’ mak okum?" 
Job21:31 Onge ng’ama donjo ni jaricho kendo ma kume moromo gi gik maricho duto mosetimo. 
Job21:32 Ka oting’e kitere e liel," 
Job21:33 to ji gana gi gana kowe, kendo kata mana lowo lwar kuome mos. Liende bende jorit rito arita." 
Job21:34 Omiyo weche mutemo hoyago gin weche manono, kendo gik moko duto musewacho gin mana miriambo!”" 
Job22:1 Eka Elifaz nodwoko niya," 
Job22:2 “Bende dhano nyalo konyo Nyasaye adier, kata da bed ni oriek manadi?" 
Job22:3 Ere gima Nyasaye yudo, kata ka in ng’at makare? Koso iparo ni kidimbori, to mano konye gang’o?" 
Job22:4 Kik ipar ni Nyasaye kumi kendo yali nikech iluore! 
Job22:5 Ooyo, okumi mana nikech isetimo richo mang’eny ahinya, kendo mana nikech timbeni maricho okadhore." 
Job22:6 Ne ikawo lep owadu, mi iweye duk, ni eka mondo ochuli pesa mane oholo kuomi." 
Job22:7 Joma riyo oloyo, ne ituono pi mondo omodhi, bende ne itamori miyo joma odenyo chiemo mondo ocham." 
Job22:8 Ne ikonyori gi tekoni ma in go kod duong’ni, mi ikawo piny duto." 
Job22:9 Ok en mana ni ne idagi konyo mond liete kende, to nyithi kiye bende ne ithago, kendo imayogi gik mane gin go." 
Job22:10 Mano omiyo masiche olwori koni gi koni, kendo ipo nono ka luoro ohewi." 
Job22:11 Piny olokore mudho ma ok inyal neno gimoro, kendo ohula oyuoyi." 
Job22:12 Donge Nyasaye odak e polo kuma bor moloyo, kendo orango sulue mana e bwoye, kata obedo ni gin mabor kamano?" 
Job22:13 To eka in to pod ipenjo ni, ‘Nyasaye ong’eyo ang’o?’ Bende ni, ‘Ere kaka onyalo yalowa, to boche polo oime?’" 
Job22:14 Iparo ni boche polo motimo rumbi nyalo mone neno, kowuotho e kind polo gi piny?" 
Job22:15 Par ane yore ma joma timbegi richo osebedo ka luwo. 
Job22:16 Joma luwo yore ma kamago tho ka pok ndalogi ochopo, ka gima ohula oyuoyogi." 
Job22:17 Gin e joma ne odagi Nyasaye, kendo mane paro ni ok onyal kumogi." 
Job22:18 To eka Nyasaye nogo ema oseguedhogi gi mwandu! An ok anyal ng’eyo gima ji ma timbegi richo paro! 
Job22:19 Ka joma beyo oneno ka ikumo joma timbegi richo, to gibedo mamor, kendo joma onge ketho bende nyiero." 
Job22:20 Mwandu duto mag joricho okethi, kendo mach wang’o gimoro amora modong’." 
Job22:21 Koro in Ayub, winjri gi Nyasaye, mondo iwe kwane ka jasigu." 
Job22:22 Ka itimo kamano, to obiro guedhi. Winj puonjne, kendo imak wechene e chunyi." 
Job22:23 Adier, nyaka iduog ir Nyasaye kibolori, kendo itiek timbe maricho manie dalani." 
Job22:24 Wit dhahapi kucha. Ee, wit kata mana dhahapi maler e chuoth aora moduono." 
Job22:25 Mondo Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto obed dhahapi, kendo obed fedha modhurni tuche tuche." 
Job22:26 Bang’e ibiro geno kuom Nyasaye pile, kendo ibiro yudo ni en e tiend mor ma in go." 
Job22:27 Ka ilemo, to obiro winji, kendo inichop singruok duto mane itimo." 
Job22:28 Gimoro amora michano timo, nodhi maber." 
Job22:29 Nyasaye tieko josunga, to oreso joma obolore." 
Job22:30 Obiro resi ka ionge gi ketho, kendo ka itimo gima kare.”" 
Job23:1 Ayub nodwoko niya," 
Job23:2 “Pod adagi adaga, kendo aywak nikech Nyasaye ema hinya. Ok anyal weyo mak achur." 
Job23:3 Mad bed ni ang’eyo kuma dayudie Nyasaye, kendo ni ang’eyo kaka dadhi ire," 
Job23:4 to dawach wechena e nyime, kendo damul weche duto ma achwakorago." 
Job23:5 Adwaro ng’eyo gima dowachi, kendo kaka dodwoka." 
Job23:6 Bende Nyasaye digoya gi mbi, mi uth bucha? Ooyo, ang’eyo ni dowinj wachna." 
Job23:7 An jaadiera, omiyo dadimb wach ni Nyasaye, kendo dowach ni aonge ketho chuth." 
Job23:8 Asemanyo Nyasaye yo wuok chieng’, to oonge kuno. Bende kane amanye yo podho chieng’, to ne ok ayude." 
Job23:9 Nyasaye osebedo ka tiyo yo nyandwat, kendo yo milambo bende osedhiye, to pok anene." 
Job23:10 To kata kamano, ong’eyo gimoro amora ma atimo, kendo ka oranga, to obiro yudo ka aler." 
Job23:11 Yor Nyasaye ema aluwo gi chunya duto, kendo ok abar korachwich kata koracham." 
Job23:12 Pile atimo mana gima Nyasaye ochiko. Adier, aluwo mana dwarone, to ok gik ma an ema adwaro." 
Job23:13 Ok olokre, to bende onge ng’ama dipiem kode, kata ma ditame timo gima odwaro." 
Job23:14 Obiro timo gima osechanona. Mano en mana gimoro achiel kuom gik mang’eny ma ochanona. 
Job23:15 Omiyo ka aparo ni abiro chung’ e nyime, to atetni ateta, kendo luoro nega." 
Job23:16 Nyasaye Ma Nyalo Gik Moko Duto oseketho chir mane an-go. En mana Nyasaye ema miya luoro, to ok mudho, kata obedo ni mudho dino wang’a kamano." 
Job24:1 “Ere gima omiyo Nyasaye ok oketo chieng’ ma ing’adoe bura ni joma ong’eye? 
Job24:2 Joma timbegi richo ketho kiew mondo oyud lowo madongo, kendo gikwalo rombe mi gimedo gi jambgi." 
Job24:3 Bende gikwalo kenje mag nyithi kiye, kendo gimako rwadh chi liel, ka gir singo kuom gik moholo." 
Job24:4 Gimono joma odhier yudo adiera monego giyudi, kendo gimiyo joma odenyo ringo pondo." 
Job24:5 Kuom mano, joma odhier manyo chiemo e thim, mana ka kanj thim. Onge kamachielo ma ginyalo yudoe chiemo ni nyithindgi." 
Job24:6 Ichunogi kayo puothe ma ok maggi, kendo gipono olemo e puothe joricho." 
Job24:7 Otieno to ginindo ka gionge gi gima giumrego, kata ma digigeng’go koyo." 
Job24:8 Koth maa e gode rodhogi, kendo gipadore e dier lwendni mondo giyudie resruok." 
Job24:9 Joricho loko nyithi kiye wasumbni, kendo gikawo nyithind joma odhier kar gope." 
Job24:10 To joma odhier wuotho duge, kendo ka gikayo cham e puoth jomoko, to kech kayogi." 
Job24:11 Gibiyo zeituni ka giloso mo, kendo gibiyo mzabibu ka gilosogo divai ka riyo negogi." 
Job24:12 Ka idhi e mier, to iwinjo ywak joma ohiny, kendo ma tho, to Nyasaye ok dew lemogi!" 
Job24:13 Nitie ji ma ok dwar ler. Ok giwinj tiende, kendo gitamore luwo kama orienyie." 
Job24:14 Janek dhi nego ng’ama odhier ka pok piny oyawore. Otieno to odhi mecho. 
Job24:15 Ng’at ma ja terruok rito mondo piny oimre, kendo opando wang’e mondo kik ng’eye." 
Job24:16 Jokuo turo udi gotieno, odiechieng’ to gipondo, kendo ok gidwar neno ler." 
Job24:17 Giluoro ler mar odiechieng’, to mudho ema gihero." 
Job24:18 “Uwacho ni, ‘Ohula yweyo ng’at ma jaricho, kendo Nyasaye okuong’o puothe, omiyo tinde ok odhi oti e puothene mag mzabibu." 
Job24:19 Jaricho duono nono e piny ma ji odakieni, mana kaka pe duono ka chieng’ rieny e ndalo oro." 
Job24:20 Onge ng’ama pare, kata mana min mare bende wiye owil kode, kudni chame kendo orumo chuth.’" 
Job24:21 Mano timore nikech ne osando mond liete, kendo ne ok okecho mon ma onge nyithindo." 
Job24:22 Nyasaye tieko joma rateke gi tekone, kendo omiyo joricho tho." 
Job24:23 To kata obedo ni Nyasaye oweyogi gibedo mangima kamano, to orangogi seche duto." 
Job24:24 Joricho dhi maber kuom kinde manok kende, to bang’e giner ka buya mopudhi kata ka tiang’ motong." 
Job24:25 Bende ng’ato nyalo kwer ni mano ok kamano? Koso ng’ato dinyis malong’o ni wechena ok gin adier?” 
Job25:1 Bang’ wechego Bildad nowacho niya," 
Job25:2 “Nyasaye nigi teko mathoth, omiyo ji duto nyaka luore. Orito polo gi kue." 
Job25:3 Bende nitie ng’at manyalo kwano malaika ma tiyone? Koso nitie kamoro ma ler mar Nyasaye ok rienyie? 
Job25:4 Bende nitie ng’at manyalo bet makare kata maler e wang’ Nyasaye? 
Job25:5 Ka Nyasaye ok kwan kata mana due ka gima rieny ahinya, kendo ka ok okwan sulue ka gik maler adier," 
Job25:6 to koro dhano mana ma kudni akudani, to dichal nade e nyime?”" 
Job26:1 Eka Ayub nodwoke niya," 
Job26:2 “Mano konyruok manade misechiwo ni ng’at modhier ma onge teko! 
Job26:3 Ing’adona rieko maber miwuoro, kendo iyie puonjo ng’ama ofuwo ka an kama!" 
Job26:4 To ere ng’ama iparo ni biro winjo wechenigi duto? Koso ng’ama oori mondo ilos kamano? 
Job26:5 Piny Joma Otho tetni, kendo joma odak kuno, luoro omako." 
Job26:6 Adier, Piny Joma Otho, Nyasaye neno, kendo onge gima mone nene." 
Job26:7 Nyasaye noyaro polo ma yo nyandwat, mi ong’awo piny e kor muya." 
Job26:8 Nyasaye ema pogo boche polo gi pi, kendo omono pek mar pigno yiecho bochego." 
Job26:9 Omiyo boche polo imo due marieny maler. 
Job26:10 Ne ogoro laini alwora e nam, mopogogo ler gi mudho." 
Job26:11 Ka omiyo polo omor, to mise mag polo tetni ka gima luoro omakogi." 
Job26:12 Tekone ema ne okweyogo nam, kendo riekone ema ne otiekogo Rahab ma ondieg nam." 
Job26:13 Muche ema ne omiyo polo olendo, kendo lwete ema ne onego ondiek ma ne oyudo ringo tony." 
Job26:14 To mago gik manyiso mana dir tekone kende, kendo gin mana weche manok miwacho kuome. To koro en ng’awa ma nyalo ng’eyo duong’ hie mar Nyasaye.”" 
Job27:1 Ayub ne omedo wacho niya," 
Job27:2 “Akuong’ora e nyim Nyasaye Mangima Manyalo Gik moko Duto, motamore ng’adona bura makare, kendo mosemiyo chunya obedo malit," 
Job27:3 ni, e kinde duto moweya ka angima," 
Job27:4 to dhoga ok nowach gimoro marach, kendo lewa ok nomul miriambo." 
Job27:5 E ndalo duto ma pod angima, ok nayie ni wecheu ni kare, to nasik kawacho ni aonge gi ketho." 
Job27:6 Ok nawe mak awacho ni an kare, nimar ang’eyo ni aler." 
Job27:7 Mad jogo duto ma piem koda yud kum mana ka joricho. 
Job27:8 Ere geno ma joma ok gen Nyasaye dibedgo, e sa ma Nyasaye dwaro negogie?" 
Job27:9 Koso Nyasaye diwinj ywakgi ka chandruok omakogi? 
Job27:10 Ne onego ginyis ni giyudo mor kuom tiyo ni Nyasaye, bende nonego gibed ka gilame pile!" 
Job27:11 Koro we mondo apuonjue kaka duong’ mar Nyasayee romo, kendo mondo anyisue gima Ng’ama Nyalo Gik Moko Duto osechano." 
Job27:12 To bende kata ka ok anyisou, to useneno gi wang’u, koro ere gima omiyo uwacho weche manono?" 
Job27:13 Winjuru kaka Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto kumo joricho kod joma timo timbe mahundu. 
Job27:14 Nyalo bet ni gin gi yawuowi mang’eny, to giduto ginitho e lweny, kendo nyithindgi bende ok noyud chiemo moromogi." 
Job27:15 Eka tuo to noneg joma otony e lweny kata ma kech ok onego, kendo mondgi ok noywaggi." 
Job27:16 Jaricho nyalo bet gi pesa mang’eny ka lowo, kendo nyalo bet gi lewni mogundho ma okia kar kwan-gi," 
Job27:17 to lepego ng’at moro makare ema biro rwako, kendo ng’at moro ma onge ketho ema biro kawo pesanego." 
Job27:18 Joricho gero udi, to utgigo ok nyal dak. Girumo piyo mana ka mbuwi kata ka kiru." 
Job27:19 Chieng’ moro nindo notergi kapod gimew, to ka gichiew, to giniyud ka mwandugi oselal." 
Job27:20 Masira nomakgi ka ohula motucho apoya, kendo yamb otieno nokegi mabor." 
Job27:21 Adier, yamb ugue noywergi ka gologi e miechgi." 
Job27:22 Enokudh kuomgi matek, ma ok oweyonigi thuolo, kendo kata obedo ni ginitem kaka ginyalo mondo gitony," 
Job27:23 to yamo nokudh kuomgi ka giringo, kendo tekone malich nomi kihondko makgi." 
Job28:1 “Nitie buche ma ikunyoe fedha kendo nitie kuonde ma ipidhoe dhahabu. 
Job28:2 Ji kunyo chuma e lowo, kendo gilenyo mula mondo gigol kuom kite." 
Job28:3 Ji manyo kite kuonde motimo mudho ma ndiwa, kendo gidhi kuonde matut mondo gikunygie." 
Job28:4 Gikunyo yore kuonde ma ng’ato pok odakie, kata ma tiend dhano pok onyono. Kuondego gitiyoe kendgi, ka giliero e tonde ei buchego." 
Job28:5 Lowo to ema chiemo wuokie, to pinyne ibaroe lwendni gi mach." 
Job28:6 Lwendnigo ema kite ma nengogi tek wuokie, to buru ema oting’o dhahabu." 
Job28:7 Onge otenga maneno yore manie buchego, kendo kata mana wang’ achuth mabith ok nyal nenogi." 
Job28:8 Bende onge sibuor kata ondiek mager mawuotho e yore machilgo. 
Job28:9 Ji baro lwendni marateke, kendo githulo gode gi tiendegi." 
Job28:10 Gitucho lwendni manie gode, kendo giyudoe kite ma nengogi tek." 
Job28:11 Gikunyo nyaka gichop kuonde ma aore ochakoree, ma gigol oko gik mopondo." 
Job28:12 Koro rieko to iyudo kanye? Koso ere kuma ng’eyo wuokie? 
Job28:13 Rieko ok nyal yud kuom dhano, kendo onge ng’at mong’eyo kuma diyudee." 
Job28:14 Kuonde matut mag nembe kwer ni, rieko ok nyal yud kuomgi." 
Job28:15 Rieko ok nyal ng’iew gi fedha kata gi dhahabu," 
Job28:16 bende dhahabu maler kata kite ma nengogi tek ok nyal romo gi nengone. 
Job28:17 Nengone tek moloyo fedha, kendo tek moloyo kata mana gima olos gi dhahabu, kata marieny ka glas." 
Job28:18 Nengo mar rieko tek moloyo kite mabeyo duto ma nengogi tek," 
Job28:19 kendo ber mare ok nyal pim gi dhahabu malerie moloyo. 
Job28:20 Koro rieko to iyudo kanye? Koso ere kuma ng’eyo wuokie? 
Job28:21 Onge gima ngima manyalo nene, kata mana winy mahuyo bende ok nene." 
Job28:22 Koda ka tho gi masira bende oyie ni gisewinjo mana humbe kende. 
Job28:23 Nyasaye kende ema ong’eyo yo madhi e rieko. Ee, mana en ema ong’eyo kuma iyudee," 
Job28:24 nikech en ema oneno giko piny, kendo en ema oneno gik moko duto manie bwo polo." 
Job28:25 Ka ne Nyasaye omiyo yamo teko, mi opimo duong’ mar nam," 
Job28:26 kendo ka ne oparo kuma koth onego chwee, kod yore ma rumbi biro luwo," 
Job28:27 eka ne oneno rieko, mopimo berne kaka chal mi nonwang’o ni ober." 
Job28:28 Bang’e nowacho ni dhano niya, ‘Ka idwaro bedo gi rieko, to nyaka iluor Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo ka idwaro bedo gi ng’eyo, to nyaka iwe richo.’" 
Job29:1 Ayub nochako owacho niya," 
Job29:2 “Mad ng’ato dwoka e ndalona machon, mane Nyasaye ritae." 
Job29:3 Nyasaye ne ni koda kinde duto, bende ne omenyona kuonde motimo mudho mane awuothoe." 
Job29:4 E ndalogo ne adhi maber nikech Nyasaye norito dalana gi herane. 
Job29:5 Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto ne ni koda ndalogo, kendo nyithinda duto ne oketa diere." 
Job29:6 Jamba ne golo chak mang’eny, kendo yienda mag zeituni ne nyak maber, kata mana kuonde motimo kite manade." 
Job29:7 Kane adhi mondo abed e buch jodong dala," 
Job29:8 to yawuowi ne baro gi chien konena, kendo jodongo ne chung’na ka miya duong’." 
Job29:9 Kane achopo to jotelo ne weyo wuoyo," 
Job29:10 kendo koda ka joma dongo manade ne ling’ thi. 
Job29:11 Ng’ato ka ng’ato mane owinjo wechena ne bedo mamor, kendo joma ne onena ne pako gik ma asetimo," 
Job29:12 nikech ne akonyo joma odhier kod nyithi kiye maonge kuma chomo. 
Job29:13 Ji ma ne nigi chandruok madongo ne paka, kendo ne akueyo chuny mond liete." 
Job29:14 Pile asebedo jaadiera, kendo jang’ad bura makare, ka arwako adiera gi tim makare ka lepa." 
Job29:15 An nene e wang’ muofni, kendo e tiend rang’onde," 
Job29:16 to jochan ne abedonigi ka wuon-gi, kendo ne adok ni jodak ka ni e chandruok." 
Job29:17 Ne aketho teko joma kwiny, kendo ne areso joma ne gidwaro hinyo a e lwetgi." 
Job29:18 Ne aparo ni abiro dak aming’a, mi achien atho e dala gi kue." 
Job29:19 Ne achalo yath ma opidhi kama ng’ich, kendo mayudo koth pile." 
Job29:20 Ng’ato ka ng’ato ne miya duong’, kendo tekra ne pod nitie." 
Job29:21 Kane ang’ado rieko, to ji ling’ thi, kendo ne gichiko itgi maber mondo giwinj gima awacho." 
Job29:22 Onge gima ne ginyalo medo ka asetieko wuoyo. Wechena ne donjonigi mana kaka kodh ajiki donjo e lowo 
Job29:23 Ne giritogi mana ka joma rito koth e ndalo oro. 
Job29:24 Kane abwonjo kodgi, to chunygi duogo, kendo kuyo mane gin go rumo." 
Job29:25 An ema ne abedo jatendgi, mi agolo chike, mana ka ruoth ma otelo ni joge mag lweny, kendo ne ahoyogi kane chunygi onyosore." 
Job30:1 “To tinde koda ka joma tindo jara. Wuonegi to joma nono, mane ok nyal yienigi kata mana konyo guogi rito jamba." 
Job30:2 Ne gin joma tekregi oserumo, kendo manyap, ma ok nyal timona gimoro." 
Job30:3 Ne gidhier malich, kendo gidenyo, mi ne gimwodo tiende yien motwo gotieno e thim kuonde machil." 
Job30:4 Ne ging’wedo buya mae thim, to gichamo. Tiende yien maonge ndhadhu bende ne chiembgi." 
Job30:5 Ji ne riembogi gi mahu, mana kaka iriembo jakuo." 
Job30:6 Ne ochunogi ni nyaka gidag mana e buche mane nie tik gode kod kuonde ma kamago. 
Job30:7 Ne giywak oko kuonde moyugno mana ka ondiegi, ka gichokore kanyakla e tiend bunge." 
Job30:8 Gin joma ofuwo ma onge nying, mane oriemb oko e pinygi." 
Job30:9 To koro gin ema gibiro ka, kendo ginyiera,’ kendo achalonigi mana ka gima itugogo." 
Job30:10 Gisin koda, kendo giparo ni giber moloya, bende gihedhore ng’udho wang’a olawo." 
Job30:11 Gimwomore kuoma gi mirimbgi duto, nikech Nyasaye osemiyo abedo mayomyom, kendo aonge gi teko." 
Job30:12 Oganda mar joma nonogi monja gi kanyima, kendo giriemba gi ng’uech ka giikore mar monja mogik." 
Job30:13 Gigeng’ona yo, ka gidwaro tieka chuth, to onge ng’ama tamogi." 
Job30:14 Gimwomore kuoma ka gikadho kuonde ma ohingana ruomborego. 
Job30:15 Kihondko dwaro nega, kendo duong’na olal ka yamo. Mwanduna bende oseduono ka boche polo." 
Job30:16 Koro chunya dwaro wuok, kendo onge gima nyalo tiekona rem." 
Job30:17 Otieno to chokena muodore, kendo rem machamano ok nyal kue." 
Job30:18 Nyasaye ngwana gi ng’uta, mi lepa jowre marach." 
Job30:19 Owita piny e chuodho, mi alokora buru." 
Job30:20 Yaye Nyasaye, aluongi, to ok idwoka, kendo kata ka alami to ok idewa." 
Job30:21 Ilokori jasika, kendo isanda gi tekri duto." 
Job30:22 Iuka ka gima yamo tera, kendo iudha e yamo mang’ongo." 
Job30:23 Ang’eyo ni idwaro tera e tho, kuma ji duto ochomo." 
Job30:24 Ere gima omiyo imonjo ng’ama orumo, ma ok nyal timo gimoro, to mana makwayo ni mondo okeche?" 
Job30:25 Donge ne aywago joma thagore, kendo chunya ne lit ka aneno joma nigi chandruok?" 
Job30:26 Ne ageno yudo mor kod ler, to thagruok kod mudho ema ne obirona." 
Job30:27 Iya nyawni, kendo aonge gi kue. Onge gimoro modong’na, mak mana thagruok." 
Job30:28 Awuotho e mudho, kendo chieng’ ok rienyna." 
Job30:29 An owadgi ondiegi, kendo tula e osiepna." 
Job30:30 Denda oselokore rateng’, kendo opokore, midhusi bende ohinga." 
Job30:31 Kuma ne awinjoe thum mamit, tinde ywak gi pi wang’ ema nitie." 
Job31:1 “Ne asesingora ni ok narang nyako moro, mi agombi." 
Job31:2 Ere gima Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto orito timo ni dhano, kendo ere pok morito chulogo timbewa?" 
Job31:3 Donge chandruok gi masira ema orito joma timbegi richo? 
Job31:4 Nyasaye ong’eyo gik moko duto ma atimo, kendo orango ondamo ka ondamo ma akawo." 
Job31:5 Akuong’ora ni pok atimo tim miganga, kata pok atemo wuondo ng’ato." 
Job31:6 Nyasaye mondo opima e ratil makare, to obiro nwang’o ni an ng’at makare." 
Job31:7 Ka dipo ni aseweyo yo makare, mi richo oywaya, kata kapo ni richo omieno lweta," 
Job31:8 to ber mondo chamba okethi, kata jomoko nono ochamgi." 
Job31:9 Ka dipo ni asegombo chi wadwa moro, mi apondo e dhoode gi oko ka arite," 
Job31:10 to chiega mondo obed misumba ng’ato, kendo jomoko nono mondo onind kode." 
Job31:11 Mano en tim mamono, kendo tho ema ikumego," 
Job31:12 nimar ochalo mach marach manyalo tieko gik moko duto ma an-go. 
Job31:13 Pile kane achiel kuom jotichna oywakna, to ne awinje mi atimne gima kare." 
Job31:14 Ka dine ok atim kamano, to ere kaka dachom Nyasaye tir, koso ere kaka dadwoke ka obiro yala?" 
Job31:15 Donge Nyasaye achiel mane ochueya, e Nyasaye mane ochueyo jotichnago bende?" 
Job31:16 Pok asetamora konyo joma odhier, bende pok aweyo mond liete e thagruok marach," 
Job31:17 kata mana weyo nyithi kiye kech, ka achiemo, bende pok aweyo," 
Job31:18 to e ngimana duto asebedo ka aritogi. 
Job31:19 Kane ayudo ng’at ma jachan ma koyo nego, kendo ma onge gi lewni ma dorwaki," 
Job31:20 to ne amiye lewni molos gi yie romba awuon, mi opaka gi chunye duto." 
Job31:21 Kapo ni asewuondo nyathi kich moro, nikech ang’eyo ni daloye e bura," 
Job31:22 to kara mondo bedena otur, mi jakre gi e goka!" 
Job31:23 To adier ne ok anyal timo gima kamano, nikech aluoro kum malich ma Nyasaye kumogo ji." 
Job31:24 Pok abedo gi geno kuom mwanduna," 
Job31:25 kata sungora kodgi 
Job31:26 bende pok aselamo wang’ chieng’ mang’angnini, kata mana due marieny maberni pok alamo." 
Job31:27 Adier, paro mar timo kamano pok odonjo e chunya." 
Job31:28 Richo ma kamano ikumo gi tho, nimar okwedo Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto." 
Job31:29 Ok asebedo mamor ka wasika thagore, kata ka masira omakogi." 
Job31:30 Bende pok aseketho ka alemonigi marach mondo githo. 
Job31:31 Ji duto matiyona ong’eyo malong’o ni pile asebedo ka arwako welo. 
Job31:32 Jowuoth bende aserwako e dalana, kendo pok aweyo ginindo e yo." 
Job31:33 Ji moko temo pando richogi, an to pok apando maga." 
Job31:34 Ok aseluoro gima ji biro wacho, omiyo ok aseling’ kata siko ei ot ka aluoro achaya margi." 
Job31:35 Mad ng’ato bedie manyalo winja! Akuong’ora ni weche ma asewacho gin adier. Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto mondo odwoka. Ka da bed ni ng’at modonjona ondiko weche modonjonago," 
Job31:36 to da alierogi e ng’uta mondo ji one, kata da asidhogi e wiya ka osimbo." 
Job31:37 Da anyiso Nyasaye gik moko duto ma asetimo, ka aonge gi wichkuot e nyime." 
Job31:38 Kapo ni asekwalo puodho ma apuro, mi amayo wuon-go," 
Job31:39 kata kapo ni ne achamo cham monyakie, to eka jopur mane opure kech nego," 
Job31:40 to ber mondo kuthe gi kayongo ema odong’ie kar cham.” Weche Ayub ogik ka. 
Job32:1 Bang’ mano, ji adekgo noweyo dwoko Ayub, nikech ne osiko koparo mana ni ok en jaketho." 
Job32:2 Eka ng’at moro ma nyinge Elihu ne mirima omako, nikech Ayub ne chwakore kende ni en kare, ni to Nyasaye e jaketho. (Elihu ne en wuod Barakel nyakwar Buz ma ja-Ram.)" 
Job32:3 Mirima nomake bende gi osiepe Ayub adekgo, nimar dwoko Ayub malong’o notamogi, to mano ne miyo Nyasaye nenore ka jaketho." 
Job32:4 Elihu ne ng’ama tinie moloyo kuom jogo, omiyo ne orito nyaka ng’ato ka ng’ato otieko wuoyo." 
Job32:5 To kane oneno ni ji adekgo ok nyal dwoko weche Ayub, iye nowang’," 
Job32:6 mi ochako loso, kowacho kama: “An pod atin, to un joma dongo, omiyo ne aluor nyisou gima aparo." 
Job32:7 Ne awacho e chunya ni onego awe ulosi, un joma dongo, mondo wapuonjre rieko kuom joma hikgi ng’eny." 
Job32:8 To nyaka ung’e ni muya mar Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto ema miyo ji rieko, kobiro kuomgi." 
Job32:9 Higni mang’eny ok ema mi ji bed gi rieko, kata joma oti ok ema ng’e gik makare." 
Job32:10 Mano emomiyo koro adwaro ni uchik itu, mondo anyisu gima an aparo." 
Job32:11 Ne achiko ita gi chuny achiel ka uwuoyo, kendo ne arito ka umanyo weche mariek monego uwachi." 
Job32:12 Bende ne aling’ ka aketo chunya, mi aneno ka ng’eng’o Ayub otamou." 
Job32:13 Koro ere kaka unyalo wacho ni usefwenyo rieko? Nyasaye ema nyaka dwok weche Ayub, nikech dwokogo osetamou." 
Job32:14 Un ema Ayub osebedo ka loso kodu, to kata kamano, an to ok dadwoke kaka ne udwokeno.”" 
Job32:15 Eka Elihu nowacho ni Ayub niya, “Wach otamo jogi, kendo ok ginyal dwoko wecheni." 
Job32:16 Gichung’ achung’a kanyo ka onge gima giwachi! Koro pod darit arita, kata obedo ni giling’ kamano?" 
Job32:17 Ooyo, koro abiro chiwo dwokona an awuon, kendo nyisi gima aparo." 
Job32:18 Ok anyal rito kapok awuoyo, kendo ok anyal mono weche wuok e dhoga." 
Job32:19 Ka ok ayudo thuolo mar wuoyo, to abiro barora ka puga mobarore gi chak!" 
Job32:20 Ok anyal konyo, to nyaka awuo, eka ayud kue." 
Job32:21 Ok abi chwako ng’ato e wachni, kendo ok abi wuondo ng’ato." 
Job32:22 Adier, an ok ang’eyo kaka iwuondo ji, to bende kapo ni atimo kamano, to Jachuechna dikuma piyopiyo.”" 
Job33:1 “Koro in Ayub, chik iti maber, mondo iwinj weche ma adwaro wachoni." 
Job33:2 Abiro ng’ogo weche mopong’o chunya. 
Job33:3 Ang’eyo ni wechena duto ni kare, kendo abiro wacho mana adiera." 
Job33:4 Roho mar Nyasaye ema ne ochueya kendo omiya ngima. 
Job33:5 Koro ikri mondo idwoka, ka inyalo." 
Job33:6 In Ayub, wachalre kodi e nyim Nyasaye, nimar waduto ne ochwewa mana gi lowo." 
Job33:7 Kuom mano ok onego iluora, kiparo ni abiro hewi e yo moro amora." 
Job33:8 Nende achiko ita kiloso, mi awinjo kiwacho ni" 
Job33:9 ionge gi ketho, kendo pok itimo gimoro marach, to ni iler, kendo ionge gi richo." 
Job33:10 Ne iwacho ni Nyasaye keto weche moko kuomi mondo oyudgo tiendi, kendo okwani mana ka jasike." 
Job33:11 Bende niwacho ni odhogo tiendeni gi nyororo, kendo orango gimoro amora ma itimo." 
Job33:12 To koro Ayub, anyisi ni iseketho. Nyasaye duong’ moloyo dhano." 
Job33:13 Ere gima omiyo iwacho ni Nyasaye ok winj kwayo mar dhano? 
Job33:14 Kata obedo ni Nyasaye wuoyo e yore mathoth, to onge ng’ama dewo winjo gima owacho." 
Job33:15 Nyasaye wuoyo e lek kendo e fweny mabiro ni ji gotieno ka ji nindo. 
Job33:16 Nyasaye miyo giwinjo gik ma owacho, kendo luoro makogi ka giwinjo kaka osiemogi." 
Job33:17 Nyasaye wuoyonigi mondo giwe timo richo, kendo mondo kik gibed joma sungore." 
Job33:18 Nyasaye ok nowe girum, to oresogi e lak tho hie hie." 
Job33:19 Nyasaye kelo ni dhano tuo, kendo opong’o dende gi rem mondo orieyego." 
Job33:20 Dho ng’at matuo bedo marach, ma kata mana chiemo mamit manade thing’e athing’a." 
Job33:21 Dende dhi adhiya, kendo odong’ choke lilo." 
Job33:22 Adier, ochiegni dhi e Piny Joma Otho." 
Job33:23 Kamoro dipo ka achiel kuom malaika gana gi gana mag Nyasaye, maparo ni ng’ato tich monego oti, nyalo konye." 
Job33:24 Malaikano nyalo ng’wonone, mi wach niya, ‘Weyeuru! Ok onego odhi e Piny Joma Otho, nikech an gi gima awarego.’" 
Job33:25 Eka dende biro chako bedo machwe kendo motegno ka dend wuowi. 
Job33:26 Ka olemo, to Nyasaye biro winje, kendo nolam Nyasaye gi mor. Adier, Nyasaye nochak olosne gik moko maber kendo." 
Job33:27 Eka nowachi e lela niya, ‘Asetimo richo. To kata obedo ni ne ok atimo gik makare kamano, to Nyasaye nong’wonona." 
Job33:28 Ne oresa kuom dhi e Piny Joma Otho, omiyo pod angima.’" 
Job33:29 Nyasaye timo gik ma kamago pile pile. 
Job33:30 Adier, oreso ngima dhano, kendo omiye mor mar bedo mangima." 
Job33:31 Ayub koro chik iti ni gima awachoni. Ee, ling’ mondo iwe awuo." 
Job33:32 To ka in gi wach, to wachi mondo awinji. Dang’ abed mamor kapo ni in kare." 
Job33:33 To ka ok kamano, to ling’ mondo iwinj gima awacho, nimar abiro puonji kaka onego ibed mariek.”" 
Job34:1 Eka Elihu nodhi nyime kawacho niya," 
Job34:2 “Un joma riek, koro winjuru wechena." 
Job34:3 Ka ubilo chiemo mamit, to ung’eyo ni omit, koro ere gima monou ng’eyo weche mariek ka uwinjo?" 
Job34:4 Aneno ni en wachwa mondo wang’ad burani.
