Psalms40:11 A Ruoth Nyasaye, ang’eyo ni ok ibi weyo bedona mang’won. Herani mosiko gi adiera mari rita nyaka chieng’." 
Psalms40:12 Masiche mathoth olwora, kendo ging’eny mokadho akwana! Richona osehinga, omiyo koro ok anyal neno. Ging’eny mohewo yie wiya kendo chunya oseol." 
Psalms40:13 A Ruoth Nyasaye, yie iresa! Reti piyo mondo ikonya, yaye Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Psalms40:14 We joma dwaro ketho ngimana oyud wichkuot giduto, mi ging’eng nono. Bende jogo ma giyo kamor ni ahinyora onego dwok chien, kendo wigi okuot." 
Psalms40:15 Ee, joma goyona siboigo onego odhier nono kologi." 
Psalms40:16 To ji duto mabiro iri obed mamor kendo mail. Ji duto mohero warruok maa kuomi onego wach pile niya, “Mano kaka Ruoth Nyasaye duong’!”" 
Psalms40:17 An jachan, kendo ok anyal yudo kaka akonyora, to yie ipara in Ruoth Nyasaye. In e jakonyna kendo jawarna. Kik ideki, yaye Nyasacha!" 
Psalms41:1 Ng’at ma konyo joma odhier en jahawi. Ruoth Nyasaye norese ka en e thagruok. 
Psalms41:2 Ruoth Nyasaye nokonye, kendo norite. Enomi odag gi kue e piny, kendo ok nojwang’e e lwet wasike." 
Psalms41:3 Ruoth Nyasaye nokonye ka otuo, mi change." 
Psalms41:4 Ne awacho ni Ruoth Nyasaye niya, “Asetimo richo e nyimi, to yie ikecha mondo ichanga.”" 
Psalms41:5 Wasika wacho gik maricho kuoma. Giwacho niya, “Obiro tho karang’o, mondo wich owil kode?”" 
Psalms41:6 Ji mabiro lima, chunygi bor koda. Gidwaro mana winjo weche maricho kuoma, mondo gidhi gilandni ji." 
Psalms41:7 Ji duto ma mon koda kuodha e kindgi giwegi, kendo gik mahinya ema gimorgo." 
Psalms41:8 Giwacho niya, “Yamo marach omake. Ok nochak ochung’ e kitandane.”" 
Psalms41:9 Koda ka osiepna ma ageno moloyo, kendo mane chiemo koda, bende oselokore jasika." 
Psalms41:10 A Nyasaye, kecha, kendo changa mondo achulnigi kuor." 
Psalms41:11 Ka aneno ni wasika ok oloya, eka anang’e ni imor koda." 
Psalms41:12 Inikonya nikech atimo gik makare, kendo iniketa buti nyaka chieng’." 
Psalms41:13 Wapakuru Ruoth Nyasaye, ma Nyasach Israel. Ee, pakeuru sani, kendo nyaka chieng’! Amin! Amin!" 
Psalms42:1 Kaka le gamo yueyo ka dwaro pi aora, e kaka chunya dwari, yaye Nyasaye!" 
Psalms42:2 A Nyasaye mangima, siso oloya kodi. Dayud thuolo karang’o mondo alem e nyimi?" 
Psalms42:3 Aywak odiechieng gotieno, kendo pi wang’a kende e chiemba, nimar seche duto wasika penja niya, “Nyasachi nogo ni kanye?”" 
Psalms42:4 Ka aparo gik mosekadho, to chunya chot, nimar aparo kaka ne atelo ni ji rumbi kane wadhi e od Nyasaye, kendo kaka oganda mamor ne wer, kendo pako Nyasaye matek." 
Psalms42:5 Ere gima omiyo chunya lit? Koso ang’o momiyo chunya parore? Anaket genona kuom Nyasaye, mi anachak apake kendo. En e jakonyna kendo Nyasacha." 
Psalms42:6 Chunya lit, omiyo anapare. Ee, kata obedo ni adar, mi adak kuma aora Jordan ochakoree but got Hermon kod got Miza, to pod anapare kuno." 
Psalms42:7 Nam ka nam luongo wadgi, ka abururu mag Nyasaye wuo, kendo anyumora e apaka maggi madongo." 
Psalms42:8 Ruoth Nyasaye nyiso herane mosiko odiechieng’ kodiechieng’. Anawerne wende pak otieno kotieno. Ee, analam Nyasaye ma miya ngima." 
Psalms42:9 Abiro wacho ni Nyasaye ma lwandana niya, “Wiyi osewil koda nang’o? Ere gima omiyo onego abed mana ka akuyo nikech wasika?”" 
Psalms42:10 Gigoyona siboi, kendo ginyiera, ka athagora. Odiechieng’ duto gipenja niya, “Nyasachi nogo ni kanye?”" 
Psalms42:11 Ere gima omiyo chunya lit? Koso ang’o momiyo chunya parore? Anaket genona kuom Nyasaye, mi anachak apake kendo. En e jakonyna, kendo Nyasacha." 
Psalms43:1 A Ruoth Nyasaye, ng’ad bura ma nyiso ni aonge ketho, kendo chwaka mondo joma ok ong’eyi kik loya. Yie igola e lwet joricho ma jomriambo." 
Psalms43:2 In e Nyasaye ma lwandana, to ere gima omiyo koro ijwang’a? Koso ang’o momiyo onego abed kakuyo mana nikech wasika?" 
Psalms43:3 Or ler kod adiera mari mondo otelna, kendo odwoka Sayun, godi maler, e Hekalu mari ma idakie." 
Psalms43:4 Bang’e anadhi e kendoni mar misango, A Nyasaye. Anapaki gi thum, yaye Nyasaye ma Nyasacha." 
Psalms43:5 Ere gima omiyo chunya lit? Koso ang’o momiyo chunya parore? Anaket genona kuom Nyasaye, mi anachak apake kendo. En e jakonyna kendo Nyasacha." 
Psalms44:1 A Nyasaye, wasewinjo gi itwa, ka kwerewa hulonwa timbe madongo mane itimo e ndalogi." 
Psalms44:2 Ne ginyisowa kaka in iwuon ne iketogi e pinywani to iriembo ogendini mane ok ong’eyi, kendo kaka ne ikumo ogendini mamokogo, to imiyo jogi iwuon odak maber." 
Psalms44:3 Jogigo ne ok okawo piny gi gigegi mag lweny, bende ne ok gilocho gi tekregi giwegi. To ne gilocho mana nikech tekoni maduong’, kendo nikech ne in kodgi. Mano e kaka niherogi!" 
Psalms44:4 In e Ruodha kendo Nyasacha. Imiyo jogi ma nyikwa Jakobo locho. 
Psalms44:5 Waloyo wasikwa gi tekoni, kendo wanyono joma kedo kodwa nikech in." 
Psalms44:6 Atung’ gi ligangla ok nyal miyo alo," 
Psalms44:7 to in ema iresowa kuom wasikwa, kendo iseloyo joma mon kodwa, mikuodo wigi." 
Psalms44:8 Pile wabiro paki, kendo goyoni erokamano nyaka chieng’!" 
Psalms44:9 To koro, yaye Nyasaye, isedagiwa, mi imiyo wasikwa oloyowa. Ndalogi ok idhi gi jolwenjwa e lweny." 
Psalms44:10 To isemiyo waringo wasikwa, mi giyako giwa." 
Psalms44:11 Ne ijwang’owa, mi oyang’wa ka rombe, kendo ikeyowa e pinje moko nono." 
Psalms44:12 Ne iuso jogi iwuon kuom nengo matin, maonge ohala!" 
Psalms44:13 Jopinje mamoko ma okiewo kodwa neno gima itimonwa. 
Psalms44:14 Ne ilokowa ngero ma ogendini goyo, omiyo gigoyonwa siboi, ka gijarowa." 
Psalms44:15 Pile aparo mana kaka nyinga kethore, kendo wichkuot ohinga," 
Psalms44:16 nikech wasikwa nyierowa, kendo yanyowa, ka chulo kuor." 
Psalms44:17 Gigo duto osetimorenwa, to kata kamano, pok wiwa owil kodi, kata ketho singruok mane itimo kodwa." 
Psalms44:18 Pok waweyi, bende tiendewa pok obaro, moweyo yori." 
Psalms44:19 To kata kamano, ne ibolowa e kind ondiegi! Ee, ne ijwang’owa e mudho mandiwa mar tho." 
Psalms44:20 Ka dine wawe lami, A Nyasaye, mi walam nyasach piny moro nono," 
Psalms44:21 to difwenyo, nikech in ing’eyo paro maling’ling’ mag ji." 
Psalms44:22 To inegowa seche duto nikech in, kendo wachalo mana gi rombe midwaro yang’o." 
Psalms44:23 A Ruoth Nyasaye, chiew! Ang’o momiyo inindo? A malo! Kik ijwang’wa nyaka chieng’!" 
Psalms44:24 Ere gima omiyo ipandonwa wang’i, ka wiyi owil gi chandruok kod thagruok ma wan go?" 
Psalms44:25 Wagore piny, mi wayikore e buru, ka wariere." 
Psalms44:26 A malo mondo ikonywa! Yie ireswa nikech herani mosiko. 
Psalms45:1 Weche mamit opong’o chunya e sa ma achungoe wendni ni ruoth, kendo lewa chalo kalamb jondiko molony." 
Psalms45:2 In e ng’at ma jaberie moloyo ji duto, kendo in e jatwak mong’ith. Omiyo Nyasaye oseguedhi nyaka chieng’." 
Psalms45:3 Tue liganglani e nungoni, yaye ruoth maratego, man gi teko kod duong’." 
Psalms45:4 Dhi adhiya kiidho farasi, kirwakori gi lep duong’, mondo ilo, kendo ikel adiera gi muolo kod bura makare. Tekoni maduong’ biro miyo itimo timbe madongo!" 
Psalms45:5 Aserni magi bitho, kendo hobo chuny wasiki. Ogendini podho apodha e tiendi." 
Psalms45:6 Lochni chalo gi loch Nyasaye mosiko nyaka chieng’, kendo irito pinyi gi adiera," 
Psalms45:7 Ihero timbe makare to imon gi timbe maricho. Mano emomiyo Nyasaye ma Nyasachi oseyieri ruoth, mowiri gi mo komiyi mor mang’eny moloyo mor ma osemiyo jowadu." 
Psalms45:8 Lepi duto dum manemane gi poda kod dalasini. Jothum bende miyi mor e udi mabeyo mobaw malich gi lak liech. 
Psalms45:9 Nyiri moko manie dalani gin nyi ruodhi, to e bath komi korachwich, chiegi ochung’ie, korwakore gi dhahabu maler moa Ofir." 
Psalms45:10 Chik iti nyara, mondo iwinj weche ma awacho, kendo ipargi. Wiyi mondo owil gi jou kaachiel gi wedeni." 
Psalms45:11 Chia mari biro miyo ruoth heri. En ruodhi, omiyo nyaka iluore." 
Psalms45:12 Jo-Turo nokelni mich. Jomwandu bende notem mondo oyud kaka ng’iyo kodi. 
Psalms45:13 Nyar ruoth ni e odgi, to mano kaka ojaber! Lepe ochue mana gi usi mar dhahabu." 
Psalms45:14 Ne otere ir ruoth ka orwakore gi law majaber, ka nyige mag harusi luwe. Nyigo bende nokel ir ruoth." 
Psalms45:15 Gibiro, kendo gidonjo e od ruoth, ka gikok gi mor maduong’." 
Psalms45:16 In, ruodha, ibiro nywolo yawuowi mang’eny, mondo ikaw kar kwereni, kendo iniketgi jotelo e piny ngima." 
Psalms45:17 Analand humbi ni tienge duto, omiyo ogendini nopaki nyaka chieng’." 
Psalms46:1 Nyasaye e kar konyruokwa, kendo e tekowa. En e jakonywa e kinde mag chandruok." 
Psalms46:2 Kuom mano ok wanaluor kata ka piny yiengni, kendo gode mukore, mi lwar e kude mag nam," 
Psalms46:3 kata ka nembe wuo, kendo tagore, kendo gode tetni nikech gingruok mar apaka." 
Psalms46:4 Nitie aora makelo mor e dala mar Nyasaye, ma Ng’ama Duong’ Moloyo oseloko kar dakne." 
Psalms46:5 Nyasaye odak e dalano, omiyo dalano ok nyal lo. Ee, Nyasaye biro konye gokinyi mang’ich." 
Psalms46:6 Ogendini luor, kendo pinje yiengni, to piny bende leny ka Nyasaye rogo matek." 
Psalms46:7 Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto ni kodwa. Adier, Nyasach Jakobo e kar konyruokwa!" 
Psalms46:8 Biuru mondo uneye gik ma Ruoth Nyasaye osetimo. Ee, neyeuru gik miwuoro mosetimo e piny." 
Psalms46:9 Otieko lwenje e piny duto. Oturo atunge kod tonge, kendo owang’o okumbni gi mach." 
Psalms46:10 Owacho niya, “Weuru lweny, eka ung’e ni an e Nyasaye. An gi loch kuom ogendini kendo kuom piny ngima.”" 
Psalms46:11 Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto ni kodwa. Adier, Nyasach Jakobo e kar konyruokwa!" 
Psalms47:1 Un ogendini, pamuru gi mor! Pakuru Nyasaye, kukok matek." 
Psalms47:2 Mano kaka Ruoth Nyasaye Maduong’ Moloyo lich miwuoro! En Ruoth Maduong’ morito piny ngima," 
Psalms47:3 Kendo omiyo ogendini bedo e bwo lochwa! Ee, oketo ogendini duto e bwowa." 
Psalms47:4 Ne oyieronwa piny ma wadakieni. En piny maber mar Jakobo, mane Nyasaye ohero." 
Psalms47:5 Nyasaye oseidho malo e kome, ka ji kok gi mor. Ee, Ruoth Nyasaye oseidho e kom duong’ne, ka tung’ ywak mamit." 
Psalms47:6 Pakuru Nyasaye gi wende pak! Adier, pakuru ruodhwa gi wer!" 
Psalms47:7 Nyasaye e Ruodh piny duto. Pakeuru gi wende mamit. 
Psalms47:8 Nyasaye obet e kome maler, ka en gi loch kuom ogendini." 
Psalms47:9 Jotelo mag ogendini chokore kanyakla gi jo-Nyasach Ibrahim. En ema en gi loch kuom gik moko duto. 
Psalms48:1 Ruoth Nyasachwa duong’! Omiyo nyaka apake ahinya e dalane manie wi gode maler. 
Psalms48:2 Sayun, god Nyasaye, bor kendo ber. Ee, dala Ruoth maduong’ kelo mor ni piny ngima." 
Psalms48:3 Joma odak e ut Jerusalem madongo, oseng’eyo ni Nyasaye e kar konyruok motegno." 
Psalms48:4 Ruodhi nochokore kanyakla, mi obiro mondo omonj got Sayun." 
Psalms48:5 To ka ne gineno godno, ne gibwok, kendo luoro nomakogi, mi giringo." 
Psalms48:6 Luoro gi rem nomakogi kanyo, mana ka dhako ma muoch kayo," 
Psalms48:7 kendo ne gitagore, mana ka yiedhi madongo madhi Tarshish, ma yamb ugue tago." 
Psalms48:8 Ne awinjo gik ma Nyasaye osetimo, to koro wasenenogi gi wang’wa e dala Ruoth Nyasachwa ma Nyasach ogendini. En dala ma oguro motegno nyaka chieng’." 
Psalms48:9 A Nyasaye, waparo herani mosiko ei Hekalu mari." 
Psalms48:10 Ji duto paki kuonde duto, kendo humbi oselak e piny duto. Irito ji adiera," 
Psalms48:11 omiyo jo-Sayun bedo mamor. Ing’ado bura kare, omiyo ilo opong’o mier mag Juda." 
Psalms48:12 Wuothuru e got Sayun, kendo lworeuru, kukwano kuonde moger maboyo mag ng’icho" 
Psalms48:13 Bende nonuru ohingane, kaachiel gi kuonde mochiel motegno mag siro lweny," 
Psalms48:14 mondo chieng’ moro unyis tieng’ mabiro ni Nyasayeni en Nyasachwa mochwere, kendo obiro telonwa nyaka chieng’." 
Psalms49:1 Winjuru, un ogendini duto! Chikuru itu, un ji duto manie piny," 
Psalms49:2 Joma dongo gi joma tindo, jomwandu kata jochan." 
Psalms49:3 Abiro wacho weche mariek, ma chunya oseparo, kendo owinjo tiendgi maber." 
Psalms49:4 Anachik ita mondo awinj tiend ngero, kendo anahul tiende ka agoyo thum." 
Psalms49:5 Ere gima daluor, ka anie masira, e kinde ma wasikwa ma joricho olwora?" 
Psalms49:6 Gin e jogo mogeno kuom mwandugi, kendo ma sungore nikech gimew ahinya." 
Psalms49:7 To ng’ato ok nyal warore owuon, bende ok onyal chulo Nyasaye gima dowargo ngimane," 
Psalms49:8 nikech nengo mar ngima dhano duong, malich moloyo! Gima onyalo chulo ok nyal romo mone tho," 
Psalms49:9 mi odag nyaka chieng’. 
Psalms49:10 Oneno ni kata joma riek bende tho, mana ka joma ofuwo kod joma oming’, kendo mwandugi dong’ mana ni jomoko nono." 
Psalms49:11 Liete ma oyikgie ema nobed miechgi mochwere, kendo ginisik kuno nyaka chieng’, kata obedo ni ne gin gi lopegi giwegi." 
Psalms49:12 Duong’ mar ng’ato ok nyal sirone tho, to enotho athoya kaka le tho." 
Psalms49:13 Neyeuru gik matimore ni joma ogeno kuom tekregi giwegi, kendo winjeuru giko mar jogo mogeno kuom mwandugi." 
Psalms49:14 Gimwomore e tho ka rombe, kendo tho nogono ema biro bedo jakwadhgi. Joma kare nogonigi siboi gokinyi, ka ringregi top e Piny Joma Otho, kuma bor gi pinygi." 
Psalms49:15 An to Nyasaye nokonya, kendo nogola e teko mar tho." 
Psalms49:16 Kik ibed maluor ka ng’ato odoko japith, kata ka mwandune medore," 
Psalms49:17 nikech ka otho, to ok onyal kawo gimoro, mi odhigo. Ooyo, mwandune ok nyal lor kode e liel." 
Psalms49:18 Kata obedo ni ngima mar pinyni ber ni ng’ato, kendo ji pake nikech odhi maber," 
Psalms49:19 to pod obiro mana dhi kuma kwerene duto nitie, ma mudho osikoe nyaka chieng’." 
Psalms49:20 Duong’ mar ng’ato ok nyal sirone tho, to enotho athoya mana kaka le tho." 
Psalms50:1 Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach nyiseche wuoyo, kaluongo piny duto, chakre yo wuokchieng’ nyaka yo podho chieng’." 
Psalms50:2 Nyasaye rieny gi e Sayun, dala maber manimba." 
Psalms50:3 Nyasachwa biro, to ok obi ling’ aling’a. Mach mang’ang’ni nie nyime, kendo yamb koth maratipo kudho kolwore." 
Psalms50:4 Oluongo polo gi piny mondo obed joneno ka ong’ado ni joge bura. 
Psalms50:5 Owacho niya, “Chokuru joma oyie kuoma, mane otimona misango ka timogo koda singruok.”" 
Psalms50:6 Polo hulo ni Nyasaye en jaadiera, kendo ni en owuon e jang’ad bura." 
Psalms50:7 Un joga, chikuru itu mondo awuonu. Abiro hulo gik maricho ma un jo-Israel usetimo." 
Psalms50:8 Aonge kodu gi wach kuom misengni miwang’o pep kod misengni mamoko mutimona pile. 
Psalms50:9 To kata kamano, ok achando ruedhi mugolo e kundeu, kata nyuogi moa e abilni mau," 
Psalms50:10 nikech le duto manie bungu gin maga, kaachiel gi dhok gana gi gana makwayo e gode." 
Psalms50:11 Ang’eyo winy duto mahuyo e kor polo, kendo gik mangima duto ma e thim gin maga." 
Psalms50:12 Ka da bed ni kech kaya, to ok dawachnu, nikech piny gi gik moko duto manie iye gin maga." 
Psalms50:13 Koso uparo ni dacham ring ruedhi, kata ni damadh remb diek?" 
Psalms50:14 Ooyo, to erokamano ema mondo obed misango mutimona, kendo chiwuru ni Ng’ama Duong’ Moloyo gik mane usingoru." 
Psalms50:15 Luongauru e kinde ma unie chandruok, mi anaresu, kendo unumiya duong’." 
Psalms50:16 To Nyasaye wacho ni jaricho niya, “Ere gima omiyo iolo chikena? Koso ang’o momiyo iwuoyo kuom singruokna," 
Psalms50:17 to isedagi ni ok rieyi, kendo ok idwar chikena?" 
Psalms50:18 Ka ineno jakuo, to ibedo osiepne, kendo inie kanyakla mar joma terore." 
Psalms50:19 Pile iikori mar wacho weche maricho, bende ok iluoro wacho miriambo." 
Psalms50:20 Iikori mar donjo ni owadu hie. Adier, idwaro hinyo koda ka wuod meru!" 
Psalms50:21 Isetimo gigi duto, to nikech ok asewacho gimoro, omiyo iparo ni achalo kodi. To koro abiro kweri e wang’i ka anyisi wechego duto, achiel ka achiel!" 
Psalms50:22 Un joma ok dewa, winjuru wachna, nono to abiro kidhou matindotindo, kendo onge ng’ama nokonyu." 
Psalms50:23 Ng’at ma goyo erokamano, ema timona misango ma miya duong’, kendo ng’at ma oluora, ema anawar.”" 
Psalms51:1 A Nyasaye, kecha nikech herani mosiko! Ywe richona duto kuom ng’wononi maduong’." 
Psalms51:2 Lwok timbena mamono, kendo pwodha kuom richona." 
Psalms51:3 Ayie ni timbena mono, kendo gichando chunya seche duto." 
Psalms51:4 In kendi ema asekethoni, ka atimo gik ma ok ler e nyimi. Kuom mano, ayie ni in kare kiyala, kendo ka ing’adona bura." 
Psalms51:5 Asebedo katimo richo chakre ndalo mane onywolae. Adier, nyaka chieng’ mane mama omakoe ichna, asebedo jaricho." 
Psalms51:6 To chuny man gi adiera ema idwaro, omiyo pong’ parona gi riekoni." 
Psalms51:7 Golna richona, eka abed maler, kendo lwoka mondo abed matar moloyo pe." 
Psalms51:8 We mondo ayud mor maduong’. Kata obedo ni isegoya, mi itura kamano, to anachak abed mamor kendo." 
Psalms51:9 Geng’ wang’i ni richona, kendo lwok timbena mamono duto." 
Psalms51:10 A Nyasaye, chuena chuny manyien, kendo miya paro malong’o mopong’ gi luor." 
Psalms51:11 Kik iriemba e wang’i, bende kik imaya Roho mari maler." 
Psalms51:12 Duogna mor mane an-go kane iwara, kendo mi chunya obed gi luor." 
Psalms51:13 Eka anapuonj joricho chikeni, mi giniduog iri." 
Psalms51:14 A Nyasaye ma jawarna, kik iwe atho nikech richona, eka abiro pako timbeni makare gi dwol maduong," 
Psalms51:15 Yaw dhoga mondo awuo, to abiro paki." 
Psalms51:16 Ka da bed ni idwaro misengni, to da achiwoni. To ok iyie kata mana gi misengni miwang’o pep." 
Psalms51:17 A Nyasaye, misango midwaro en chuny mobolore, nikech ok nidagi chuny motur kendo mojok gi richo." 
Psalms51:18 Bed mang’won ni dala mar Sayun, A Nyasaye, kendo konye. Ee, chak iger ohinga mar Jerusalem." 
Psalms51:19 Eka inibed mamor gi misengni motimni kaka chik dwaro, kendo ruedhi nochiw ka misengni e kendoni mar misango." 
Psalms52:1 In ng’ama ratego, ang’o momiyo isungori nikech richoni? Hera mar Nyasaye osiko pile nyaka chieng’." 
Psalms52:2 Ichano timbe ma idwaro hinyogo ji, kendo lewi mihangogo ji bith ka wembe." 
Psalms52:3 Ihero timbe maricho moloyo mabeyo kendo miriambo berni moloyo adiera. 
Psalms52:4 Ihero chwanyo chuny ji gi weche mag miriambo. 
Psalms52:5 Kuom mano, Nyasaye notieki chuth. Obiro maki, mi oyudhi oko e piny joma ngima!" 
Psalms52:6 Joma oluoro Nyasaye none gima otimoreni, mi ginibed maluor. Gininyieri, ka giwacho niya," 
Psalms52:7 “Neyeuru ng’at mane ok ogeno kuom Nyasaye, to ogeno mana kuom mwandune mathoth, kendo pakore gi richone!”" 
Psalms52:8 To an, achalo gi yadh zeituni, ma dongo maber e bath od Nyasaye, nimar ageno kuom hera mosiko mar Nyasaye nyaka chieng’." 
Psalms52:9 A Nyasaye, abiro goyoni erokamano pile kuom gik ma isetimo, kendo ka an e kanyakla mar joma oheri, to anahul ni iber." 
Psalms53:1 Joma ofuwo wacho e chunygi niya, “Nyasaye ongee!” Giduto gin joma okethore, kendo gisetimo gik maricho miwuoro. Onge kata ng’at achiel matimo gima ber!" 
Psalms53:2 Nyasaye rango ji gie polo, mondo one ane ka nitie joma riek kendo malame." 
Psalms53:3 To giduto giseweye, kendo gisedwanyore mana maromre. Onge kata achiel kuomgi matimo tim makare." 
Psalms53:4 Nyasaye penjo niya, “Joma timbegi richogi onge gi rieko koso? Gichamo joga ka joma chamo kuon, to ok gilama ngang’!”" 
Psalms53:5 To kihondko ma pok ginenoe nyaka nene biro makogi, nikech Nyasaye keyo choke joma kwede. Nologi chuth, mi giyud wichkuot, nikech Nyasaye osedagigi." 
Psalms53:6 Mad jo-Israel yud resruok moa Sayun! Nyikwa Jakobo nobed mamor, e kinde ma Ruoth Nyasaye nochak omi joge dhi nyime maber. Ee, jo-Israel nobed moil!" 
Psalms54:1 A Nyasaye, resa gi tekoni, kendo ng’ad bura ma nyiso ni aonge ketho." 
Psalms54:2 Winj lemona, yaye Nyasaye, kendo chik iti ni wechena." 
Psalms54:3 Josunga biro mondo omonja. Ee, jokwinyo dwaro nega. Gin ji ma ok dew Nyasaye." 
Psalms54:4 An to, ang’eyo ni Nyasaye e jakonyna. Adier, Ruoth ema rito ngimana." 
Psalms54:5 Richo wasika onego odog e wigi giwegi! A Ruoth Nyasaye, tiekgi nikech in jaadiera." 
Psalms54:6 A Ruoth Nyasaye, abiro timoni misango gi mor, kendo abiro goyoni erokamano, nikech iber." 
Psalms54:7 Iseresa kuom thagruokna duto, kendo aseneno ka olo wasika kaka chunya dwaro." 
Psalms55:1 A Nyasaye, winj lemona, kendo kik ipandna wang’i ka aywakni," 
Psalms55:2 to yie iwinja, kendo idwoka. Aonge gi kue nikech thagruok ma an-go." 
Psalms55:3 Chunya chandore nikech bwok ma wasika bwogago, kod thir ma wasika thirago. Gimiya chandruok mathoth, kendo giyanya ka gikecho." 
Psalms55:4 Luoro ohewa, kendo masiche mag tho ohinga." 
Psalms55:5 Kihondko omaka, kendo atetni. Ee, masiche opong’o chunya." 
Psalms55:6 Da abed gi bwomba ka akuru, to da ahuyo, mi adhi mabor mondo ayud kue!" 
Psalms55:7 Adier, da ahuyo mi adhi mabor ahinya, kendo da agero dalana e thim." 
Psalms55:8 Da areto, mondo ayud kama abwokie, mondo yamo mager gi koth morweyo kik hinya." 
Psalms55:9 A Ruoth, tiekgi kendo roch wechegi, nikech lweny kod timbe mag mahundu ema aneno e dala." 
Psalms55:10 Giidho ewi ohinga mar dala, ka giwuotho e wiye alwora odiechieng’ gotieno, kendo dala opong’ gi timbe mamono gi anjawo." 
Psalms55:11 Masira ni kuonde duto, bende yore mag dala opong’ gi weche maricho kod wuondruok." 
Psalms55:12 Ka da bed ni jasigu ema jara, to da adhil adhila. Kata ka da bed ni ng’at mapiem koda ema sungorena to da apondone." 
Psalms55:13 To kara odoko mana ni in, ng’at mwaromgo, ma jawuodha kendo ma osiepna mahero." 
Psalms55:14 Ne wagoyo kodi mbaka mamit, kendo ne wadhi kodi e Hekalu kaachiel gi oganda mane ochokore." 
Psalms55:15 Onego wasika yud tho apoya, mi gidhi e piny joma otho ka pod gingima! Richo opong’o miechgi kod chunygi." 
Psalms55:16 To an akwayo Ruoth Nyasaye mondo okonya, kendo ang’eyo ni obiro resa." 
Psalms55:17 Aywak kendo achur okinyi gi odiechieng’ kod otieno, kendo ang’eyo ni obiro winjo ywakna." 
Psalms55:18 Kata obedo ni wasika thoth kamano, to Nyasaye biro dwoga kangima kaa e lweny ma akedoe kodgi." 
Psalms55:19 Nyasaye ma osebedo Ruoth nyaka nene biro winja kendo biro loyogi. To gin, onge gima ginyalo timo, nikech ok giluore." 
Psalms55:20 Jowuodha machon ne omonjo osiepene, moketho singruokne kodgi." 
Psalms55:21 En jambola, to chunye opong’ gi sigu. Adier, wechene yom ka mo, to kara gibitho mana ka ligangla mowuodhi e olalo!" 
Psalms55:22 Ket chandruokni ni Ruoth Nyasaye, to obiro konyi. Ok nowe mondo olo ng’at maber." 
Psalms55:23 Jonek gi jomriambo ok nodag aming’a. In Nyasaye ibiro wito jogo e bur matut. An to abiro geno kuomi. 
Psalms56:1 A Nyasaye, kecha, nikech wasigu kiya mondo ohinya. Ee, gisanda sa duto." 
Psalms56:2 Odiechieng’ duto joma mon koda kiya. Joma kedo kodago ng’eny! 
Psalms56:3 A Nyasaye Maduong’ Moloyo, ka luoro omaka, to aketo genona kuomi." 
Psalms56:4 Ageno kuom Nyasaye, kendo apako singruok mare. En ema ageno kuome. Omiyo ok anyal bedo maluor. Ere gima dhano adhana ditima?" 
Psalms56:5 Wasika kelona chandruok e gimoro amora matimo. Kinde duto gisiko giparo mana kaka di gihinya! 
Psalms56:6 Gichokore kama opondo, kendo ging’iyo gik moko duto ma atimo, ka gikiya mondo ginega." 
Psalms56:7 A Nyasaye, kumgi nikech richogi. Tiekgi gi mirimbi." 
Psalms56:8 Ing’eyo chandruokna duto, kendo isendikogi e kitapi. Pi wang’a bende isekano." 
Psalms56:9 Chieng’ ma aywakni, to wasika noringi kendo ang’eyo ni Nyasaye ema konya." 
Psalms56:10 Ageno kuom Nyasaye, kendo apako singruok mare. Adier, anadend singruok mar Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Psalms56:11 En ema ageno kuome, omiyo ok anyal bedo maluor. Ere gima dhano adhana ditima?" 
Psalms56:12 A Nyasaye, anachiwni gima asesingora. Ee, anachiwni mich mar erokamano," 
Psalms56:13 nikech iseresa e tho, kendo ok iweyo apodho, mi koro awuotho mana e nyimi, yaye Nyasaye, ka abet e ler marieny kuom joma ngima." 
Psalms57:1 Kecha, A Nyasaye! Yie ikecha, nikech aringo iri mondo ayud kar konyruok. Ee, ayueyo e tipo mar bwombeni nyaka masiche duto kadhi." 
Psalms57:2 Aywak ni Nyasaye Maduong’ Moloyo. En e Nyasaye ma miya gik moko duto madwaro. 
Psalms57:3 Obiro dwoka gie polo, mi oresa, kendo enolo joma monja. Nyasaye biro nyisa adierane kod herane mosiko." 
Psalms57:4 Anindo e kind sibuoche ma dwaro chamo ji. Lekegi to chalo gi ligangla ma dhoge bith. 
Psalms57:5 A Nyasaye, nyis tekoni gi e kor polo, kendo duong’ni maler bende mondo onenre e piny duto." 
Psalms57:6 Wasika osechikona obadho mondo omaka, omiyo chunya chandore. Adier, ne gikunyo bur e wang’ yora, to gin giwegi ema ginyumoree." 
Psalms57:7 Aikora, A Nyasaye, aikora chuth! Anawer kendo anapaki." 
Psalms57:8 In chunya, chiew! Nyatiti gi orutu, un bende chakuru ywak! An to abiro chiew kogwen." 
Psalms57:9 A Ruoth Nyasaye, anagoni erokamano e kind ogendini. Ee, anapaki e kind ji," 
Psalms57:10 nimar herani mosiko kod adierani tundo e polo. 
Psalms57:11 A Nyasaye, nyis tekoni gi e kor polo, kendo duong’ni maler bende mondo onenre e piny duto!" 
Psalms58:1 Un ruodhi marateke, bende uyalo ji maber, ka ung’ado bura kare e kind ng’ato gi wadgi?" 
Psalms58:2 Ooyo, ok utim kamano, to uparo mana richo ma udwaro timo, kendo utimo timbe mahundu e piny." 
Psalms58:3 Joricho timbegi obam e ngimagi duto. Giwacho miriambo, chakre chieng’ monywolgie." 
Psalms58:4 Gitimo kwiri mana ka tond buya," 
Psalms58:5 kendo gidino itgi mana ka thuol ma otamore winjo dwond jabo thuol, kata bed ni ower mamit machal nadi." 
Psalms58:6 A Ruoth Nyasaye, muk lekegi. Ee, tur leke sibuoche magergi!" 
Psalms58:7 Onego gidwon nono ka pi mopuk e lowo, kendo onego giner ka lum minyono e wang’yo." 
Psalms58:8 Mad gichal gi ndach kamnio maleny, kendo lal nono, kata mad gichal gi nyathi monywol kosetho, ma ok oneno chieng’." 
Psalms58:9 Ibetogi ka bungu, ka ok ging’eyo. Nyasaye biro terogi mabor ka pod gingima, kokecho." 
Psalms58:10 Joma kare to nobed mamor ka gineno kikumo joricho, kendo giniyor remb jorichogo." 
Psalms58:11 Bang’e ji nowach niya, “Kara nitie pok ma joma kare yudo! Adier, nitie Nyasaye mang’ado ni piny bura!”" 
Psalms59:1 A Nyasacha, resa kuom wasika. Gola e lwet jogo ma monja." 
Psalms59:2 Resa kuom jorichogo, kendo konya kuom jonekgo." 
Psalms59:3 Ok aseketho, kata timo gimoro marach, to joma kwinygo chokore mondo omonja, kendo gikiya mondo ginega." 
Psalms59:4 An to aonge gi ketho ma dimi girikni mondo gibuka. A malo, Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto, mondo ibi ikonya." 
Psalms59:5 Bi iwuon mondo ine gi wang’i, yaye Nyasach Israel! Chiew mondo ikum ogendini ma ok ong’eyi, kendo kik ikech andhoke ma jorichogo." 
Psalms59:6 Giduogo godhiambo, kendo gilworore e dala, ka gigueyo ka guogi." 
Psalms59:7 Winjie weche manono ma giwachogo! Lewgi bith ka ligangla, to eka pod giwacho niya, “Ere ng’ama biro winjowa?”" 
Psalms59:8 To in, Ruoth Nyasaye, inyierogi anyiera, kendo ikawo ogendini duto matin." 
Psalms59:9 Yaye, lwandawa, in ema ageno kuomi. A Nyasaye, in e kar konyruokna." 
Psalms59:10 Nyasacha mohera biro biro ira. Obiro nyisa wasika koselo kaka adwaro. 
Psalms59:11 A Nyasaye, dak ineggi, nimar dipo ka wi joga owil? Kegi gi tekoni, mi itiekgi chuth, A Ruoth ma okumbawa." 
Psalms59:12 Richo nie dhogi, kendo giwacho mana weche mamono lilo, omiyo sungagi ema onego lokrenigi obadho ma makogi!" 
Psalms59:13 Tiekgi gi mirimbi, mi girum chuth, nikech gikuong’o ji, kendo giriambo. Eka ji duto nong’e ni Nyasaye ema rito Israel, kendo ni lochne olandore e piny ngima." 
Psalms59:14 Wasika duogo godhiambo, kendo gilworore e dala, ka gigueyo ka guogi." 
Psalms59:15 Giwuotho e dala koni gi koni ka gidwaro chiemo, kendo ging’ur ka ok giyud moromogi." 
Psalms59:16 An to nabed ka apako tekoni. Okinyi kokinyi anawer kapako herani mosiko, nikech isebedona kar konyruok." 
Psalms59:17 A lwandana, anapaki gi wer. In e kar konyruokna, yaye Nyasaye, bende in ema ihera." 
Psalms60:1 A Nyasaye, isedagiwa, kendo isemiyo olowa. Mirima osemaki kodwa, to koro yie iduog irwa." 
Psalms60:2 Isemiyo piny otetni, mobarore tiarara, to koro los kuonde mobarorego, nimar ochiegni kethore chuth." 
Psalms60:3 Isemiyo jogi oneno thagruok mang’eny miwuoro! Adier, isemiyo wakwang’ ka joma omadho kong’o makech!" 
Psalms60:4 Ne ichungo bandera, mondo joma oluori ochokre, to ne gilokore, mi giringo wasikgi." 
Psalms60:5 Reswa gi tekoni, kendo winj lemowa, mondo joma ihero oyud konyruok." 
Psalms60:6 Nyasaye nowuoyo gie kar dakne, kowacho niya, “Kaka koro aselocho, abiro dhi mondo apog dala mar Shekem, kaachiel gi holo mar Sukoth ni joga." 
Psalms60:7 Piny Gilead gi piny Manase gin maga. Efraim en oguta, kendo Juda en ludha mar loch." 
Psalms60:8 Piny Moab to nobed mana karacha mar lwok, kendo Edom nobed kama aboloe wuochena. Bende jo-Filistia ne paro ni diloya, mi go mahu adier?”" 
Psalms60:9 A Nyasaye, en ng’a mabiro tera e dala mochiel motegnono? Koso en ng’a ma notelna ka tera e dala mar Edom?" 
Psalms60:10 Bende en adiera ni isedagiwa? Donge ibiro dhi e lweny gi jolwenjwa? 
Psalms60:11 Konywa kedo gi wasikwa, nimar kony mar dhano ok nyal gimoro!" 
Psalms60:12 Ka Nyasaye konyowa, to wabiro kedo gi chir, nikech en ema obiro loyonwa wasikwa." 
Psalms61:1 A Nyasaye, winj ywakna, kendo chik iti ni lemona." 
Psalms61:2 Ka chunya chandore kuma bor gi dala, to aluongi. Ting’a malo, iketa ewi lwanda mohinga gi bor mondo aresra," 
Psalms61:3 nimar in e kar konyruokna, kendo in e ohinga ma sirona wasigu." 
Psalms61:4 We adag e hembi kuom ngimana duto, mondo ayud resruok e tipo mar bwombeni." 
Psalms61:5 A Nyasaye, isewinjo singruokna, kendo isemiya mwandu ma joma oluori yudo." 
Psalms61:6 Yie imed ruoth higni mang’eny mondo odag aming’a. 
Psalms61:7 Onego orit piny nyaka chieng’, ka in kode, A Nyasaye. Ee, rite gi herani mosiko kod adiera mari." 
Psalms61:8 Eka abiro paki gi wer nyaka chieng’, kendo pile abiro chiwoni gik ma asesingora ni nachiw." 
Psalms62:1 Nyasaye kende ema ayiengora kuome, kendo resruokna wuok mana kuome." 
Psalms62:2 En kende e lwandana kendo jawarna. Adier, en e kar konyruokna, omiyo ok anyal yiengni." 
Psalms62:3 Un duto ubiro monjo ng’at achielni nyaka karang’o mondo unegi? To ochalo mana gi ohinga mobam madwaro podho, kata chiel mohungore konchiel!" 
Psalms62:4 Udwaro gole mondo oa e duong’ne, kendo umor gi wacho miriambo. Uguedhe gi dhou maoko, to chunyu maiye kuong’e akuong’a." 
Psalms62:5 Nyasaye kende ema ayiengora kuome. Ee, en ema aketo genona kuome." 
Psalms62:6 En kende e lwandana kendo jawarna. Adier, en e kar konyruokna, omiyo ok anyal yiengni." 
Psalms62:7 Warruokna gi nyinga maber wuok mana kuom Nyasaye. En lwandana ma ageng’orae, kendo en e kar konyruokna." 
Psalms62:8 Un jowa, genuru kuom Nyasaye kinde duto. Nyiseuru chandruok duto ma ungo, nimar en e kar konyruokwa." 
Psalms62:9 Adier, dhano chalo mana gi muya, kendo onge gima onyalo. Ka ikete e rapim, to ok opek kata matin. Oyot moloyo muya!" 
Psalms62:10 Kik uket genou kuom timbe mahundu, kendo kik ugen yudo gimoro e yor mecho. Kata ka mwandu omedore, to kik ugen kuomgi." 
Psalms62:11 Pile asewinjo ka Nyasaye wacho ni teko duto gin mage," 
Psalms62:12 kendo ni herane osiko mochwere. A Ruoth Nyasaye in iwuon imiyo ng’ato ka ng’ato, pok maromre gi timne." 
Psalms63:1 A Nyasaye, in e Nyasacha, kendo agombo mondo aneni. Siso omaka kodi, kendo riyo mar ng’eyi oloya mana kaka piny motwo gombo koth." 
Psalms63:2 Kuom mano, we aneni e kar dakni maler, mondo aneye tekoni gi duong’ni." 
Psalms63:3 Herani mosiko ber moloyo bedo mangima, omiyo abiro paki." 
Psalms63:4 Abiro goyoni erokamano e kinde duto mag ngimana, kendo analami, kating’o bedena malo." 
Psalms63:5 Chunya nobed mamor mana ka ng’ama ochamo ondhudho kod mo, moyieng’, kendo napaki ka awer gi mor." 
Psalms63:6 Ka anindo e kitandana, too in ema apari. Ee, otieno duto aparo mana in," 
Psalms63:7 nikech pile isebedo konyruokna. Awer gi ilo ka ayueyo e tipo mar buombeni. 
Psalms63:8 Apadora kuomi, kendo lweti rita maber." 
Psalms63:9 To joma temo nega biro dhi e piny joma otho. 
Psalms63:10 Adier, noneggi e lweny, kendo ondiegi ema nocham ringregi." 
Psalms63:11 Ruodhwa to nobed mail nikech Nyasaye, kendo jogo duto matimo singruok e nying Nyasaye bende nobed mamor. Jomriambo to noum dhogi!" 
Psalms64:1 A Nyasaye, winj ywakna, nikech an e chandruok. Konya kuom bwok ma wasika bwogago." 
Psalms64:2 Rita kuom gik ma joricho dwaro timona, kendo konya e lwet joma timbegi mono." 
Psalms64:3 Gipiago lewgi mana ka ligangla, kendo gichielo weche mager mana ka asere." 
Psalms64:4 Gipondo kendo gichielo joma beyo gi aserni. Ee, gichielogi apoya, ka ok giluoro gimoro." 
Psalms64:5 Gijiwore kendgi giwegi kuom timbegi maricho, kendo gipenjore mana kama onego gichikie obathgi, ka giparo ni onge ng’ama nenogi." 
Psalms64:6 Gichano timbegi maricho gi rieko maling’ling’. Yaye! Chuny dhano gi parone lich manade! 
Psalms64:7 To Nyasaye tiekogi gi aserni mage, kendo gipo mana ka ohinygi malit." 
Psalms64:8 Weche ma giwacho giwegi ema nomi ologi. Ji duto ma onenogi biro goyonigi siboi," 
Psalms64:9 kendo nobed maluor. Ginihul gima Nyasaye osetimo, kendo ginipar matut kuom timbene madongo." 
Psalms64:10 Joma kare duto nobed gi ilo, nikech gima Ruoth Nyasaye osetimo. Giniyud konyruok kuome, kendo ji duto mabeyo nopake." 
Psalms65:1 A Nyasaye, ji nyaka paki Sayun, kendo chiwni gik ma gisesingore," 
Psalms65:2 nikech in e Nyasaye mawinjo lemo mag ji. Ji duto biro biro iri nikech richogi. 
Psalms65:3 Yaye, kethowa ohingowa, to in ema ing’wononwa kuomgi." 
Psalms65:4 Joma iyiero mondo obi odag e odi maler gin johawi. Gik mabeyo manie odi biro romowa. Gin gik moguedhi mag Hekalu magi maler. 
Psalms65:5 A Nyasachwa kendo jawarwa, idwokowa kitimo gik madongo miresowago. In ema ji duto modak e piny ogeno kuomi, koda ka joma odak kuonde maboyo loka nam." 
Psalms65:6 Iguro gode gi tekoni mondo gisik kuonde ma iketogie. Mano nyiso tekoni maduong’. 
Psalms65:7 Ikueyo wuo mar nam gi mar apaka. Koko mar ogendini bende ikueyo. 
Psalms65:8 Kata mana joma odak kuonde maboyo bedo maluor ka owinjo gik madongo ma isetimo. Timbeni kelo mahu mar mor e tung’ piny gi tung’ piny. 
Psalms65:9 Pile iguedho piny kikelo koth ma miyo obedo momew. Aoreni ok duon, kendo gimiyo puothe nyak maber Mano e kaka iguedho piny!" 
Psalms65:10 Ikelo koth mathoth e puothe mopur, kendo imiyogi bedo mang’ich." 
Psalms65:11 Iseguedho piny, omiyo wayudo cham maber. Kamoro amora ma idhiye, cham ng’enyie." 
Psalms65:12 Lege duto jamni opong’o, kendo kor gode duto otimo mor lilo." 
Psalms65:13 Rombe opong’o pewe, kendo holni duto cham onurie. Omiyo gode gi pewe gi holni goyo koko kendo wer nikech gimor." 
Psalms66:1 Un ji duto, pakuru Nyasaye ka ukok gi mor." 
Psalms66:2 Weruru nyinge maduong’ kumiye pak mang’ongo. 
Psalms66:3 Pakuru Nyasaye niya, “Mano kaka gik mitimo lich miwuoro! Tekoni duong’ ahinya, omiyo wasiki kulore gi luoro e nyimi." 
Psalms66:4 Ji duto modak e piny lami kendo paki, ka gimiyo nyingi duong’.”" 
Psalms66:5 Biuru mondo uneye gik madongo ma Nyasaye osetimo ni ji. 
Psalms66:6 Ne oloko nam odoko lowo motwo, mi kwerewa ong’ado aora gi tiendegi! Kanyo ne gibedo mamor nikech gima ne otimo." 
Psalms66:7 Orito piny gi tekone nyaka chieng’, kendo orango gik ma ogendini timo. Kuom mano kik ji moko tem ni piem kode!" 
Psalms66:8 Un ogendini duto, pakuru Nyasachwa, kendo dwondu mupakego mondo owinji." 
Psalms66:9 En ema oseritowa mangima, kendo ok oseweyo wachwanyore mi wapodho." 
Psalms66:10 A Nyasaye isepwodhowa mana kaka ipwodho fedha gi mach. 
Psalms66:11 Ne iweyo wamoko e obadho, mi imiyowa thagruok maduong’." 
Psalms66:12 Ne iweyo wasikwa onyonowa, mi mach owang’owa, kendo ohula oywoyowa, to koro isekelowa kama wanyalo yweyoe." 
Psalms66:13 Abiro kelo misengni miwang’o pep e hekalu mari, ka achiwoni gik mane asingora." 
Psalms66:14 Kane an e chandruok ne asingora ni natimni misengni. Emomiyo koro abiro chiwo jamni machwe mondo owang’ e kendo mar misango," 
Psalms66:15 kendo iro mar imbe miwang’o nodumni mamit ka ubani. 
Psalms66:16 Un ji duto muluoro Nyasaye, biuru mondo anyisu gik ma osetimona." 
Psalms66:17 Ne aywakne mondo okonya, kendo ne aikora mar pake gi wer." 
Psalms66:18 Ka dine bed ni richo mitna, to Ruoth Nyasaye dine ok owinja." 
Psalms66:19 To osewinja adier, kendo osechiko ite ni lemona." 
Psalms66:20 Apako Nyasaye, nikech ne ok odagi lemona, to osiko ohera pile." 
Psalms67:1 A Nyasaye, kechwa mondo iguedhwa, kendo rangwa gi ng’wono." 
Psalms67:2 Eka mondo piny duto ong’e yoreni, kendo ogendini duto bende ong’e teko miseresogo ji." 
Psalms67:3 A Nyasaye, onego ogendini duto paki. Adier, ogendini duto mondo opaki!" 
Psalms67:4 Onego ogendini duto bed mamor, kendo wer gi ilo, nikech ing’adonigi bura gi adier, kendo itelonigi duto." 
Psalms67:5 A Nyasaye, onego ogendini duto paki. Adier, ogendini duto mondo opaki!" 
Psalms67:6 Piny osechiek maber! Nyasaye ma Nyasachwa oseguedhowa. 
Psalms67:7 Ee, Nyasaye oseguedhowa adier, omiyo ji duto onego omiye luor, kamoro amora ma gidakie." 
Psalms68:1 Nyasaye onego oa malo mondo oke wasike! Jogo mamon kode onego oringe! 
Psalms68:2 Kaka yamo tero iro mabor, e kaka Nyasaye bende biro riembogi mabor, kendo kaka odok leny but mach, e kaka joricho bende norum e nyim Nyasaye." 
Psalms68:3 To joma kare nobed gi ilo, kendo nobed mamor e nyime. Adier, ginibed mamor malich!" 
Psalms68:4 Weruru ni Nyasaye! Pakuru nyinge gi wer. Ee, denduru Ng’ama ringo gi gache e boche polo. Nyinge en Ruoth Nyasaye. Beduru mamor e nyime." 
Psalms68:5 Nyasaye modak e Hekalu mare maler rango nyithi kiye, kendo rito mond liete." 
Psalms68:6 En ema omiyo joma piny ochamo mier mondoo odagie, kendo ogonyo joma otue, oketo kama ber. Joma odage to nodag mana e piny motwo." 
Psalms68:7 A Nyasaye ma ruodh Sinai, e kinde mane itelo ni jogi king’ado thim," 
Psalms68:8 piny noyiengni, kendo polo nomiyowa koth, nikech biro mari, yaye Nyasach Israel." 
Psalms68:9 Ne imiyo koth maduong’ ochue, mi oloso piny mane osebedo mool." 
Psalms68:10 Jogi iwuon nodak kuno. Kuom ng’wononi nimiyo jochan gik ma gichando. 
Psalms68:11 Ruoth Nyasaye nogolo wach, mi oganda maduong’ mar mon nolando wach maberno." 
Psalms68:12 Ruodhi gi jolwenjgi noringo lweny, kendo mon manie mier nopogo gik moyaki." 
Psalms68:13 Ne gichalo akuche mobaw gi fedha, kendo ma bwombegi obaw gi dhahabu, To ere gima omiyo jou moko nodong’ adong’a dala, karito rombe?" 
Psalms68:14 Kane Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto okeyo ruodhi e got Zalmon, ne omiyo pe ochue kanyo." 
Psalms68:15 Bashan en got maduong’ manadi! En got man gi tunge mang’eny maboyo," 
Psalms68:16 to un gode madongo kendo maboyo, ere gimomiyo urango got mane Nyasaye oyiero mondo odagie kusungoru? Ruoth Nyasaye biro dak kanyo nyaka chieng’!" 
Psalms68:17 Kane Ruoth Nyasaye owuok Sinai kadhi e Hekalu mare, ne en gi geche lweny madongo gana gi gana." 
Psalms68:18 Oidho malo, ka otelo ni joma omako e lweny. Bende oseyudo mich, koda ka kuom joma piem kode. Ruoth Nyasaye nodag kanyo nyaka chieng’." 
Psalms68:19 Pakuru Ruoth Nyasaye mating’o chandruokwa pile. En e Nyasaye ma warowa. 
Psalms68:20 Nyasachwa en Nyasaye makonyo ji. Ruoth Nyasaye e Nyasachwa ma resowa e tho. 
Psalms68:21 Adier, Nyasaye nobar dier wi wasike. Ee, nopuod wi jogo mosiko ka timo richo." 
Psalms68:22 Ruoth Nyasaye osewacho niya, “Abiro duogo wasiki ka agolo Bashan. Adier, abiro duogogi, ka agologi e kude mag nam," 
Psalms68:23 mondo iyor rembgi kendo guogi magi onang’ remo mang’eny kaka ginyalo.” 
Psalms68:24 A Nyasaye, kibiro, to ji duto neni, Ee, ji neni, A Nyasaye ma Ruodha, kidonjo e Hekalu mari gi duong’." 
Psalms68:25 Jower otelo, to jogo thum luwogi, ka nyiri magoyo nyiduonge ni e diergi." 
Psalms68:26 Giwer ka giwacho niya, “Pakuru Nyasaye e chokruok mar joge. Un duto nyikwa Israel, pakuru Ruoth Nyasaye.”" 
Psalms68:27 Dhood Benjamin, ma en dhoot matinie moloyo, ema okwongo biro. Bang’e jotend Juda biro gi ogandagi, kendo jotend Zebulun gi jotend Naftali luwogi." 
Psalms68:28 A Nyasaye, nyis tekoni ma isekonyowago" 
Psalms68:29 e Hekalu mari man Jerusalem, kama ruodhi kelonie chiwo." 
Psalms68:30 To kwer piny Misri, machalo gi le mager modak e odunduno, kendo kwer ogendini mamoko, machalo kweth ruedhi gi nyiroye. Giduto mondo gikulreni, ka gikeloni fedha. Ka ogendini duto mohero lweny." 
Psalms68:31 Joote madongo moa Misri nobi iri. Jo-Ethiopia to noting’ bedegi malo ka lami, A Nyasaye." 
Psalms68:32 Weruru ni Nyasaye un ogendini mag piny. Ee, weruru wende pak ni Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Psalms68:33 Weruru ni Ng’ama ringo gi gache e kor polo ma nyaka nene. Winjeuru ka okok gi duol maduong’. 
Psalms68:34 Huluru teko Nyasaye! Duong’ne okwako Israel, kendo tekone nenore e kor polo." 
Psalms68:35 Mano kaka Nyasach Israel lich e Hekalu mare! Ochiwo teko gi loch ni joge. Pakuru Nyasaye. 
Psalms69:1 A Nyasaye, resa, nimar pi oima, mochopo e ng’uta!" 
Psalms69:2 Kendo anyumora e chuodho matut, kama onge lowo motegno ma anyalo chungoe. Adier, an e chuny pi matut, kendo apaka chiegni tera." 
Psalms69:3 Aseywak ni mondo okonya, mi aol, kendo dwonda rama! Wengena bende oowore kuom rangi mondo ikonya." 
Psalms69:4 Joma mon koda kayiem nono ng’eny, moloyo yie wiwa gi ng’eny, bende joma hangona wach kendo dwaro nega, rateke mokadho! Ne gichuna mondo amigi gik mane ok akwalo." 
Psalms69:5 A Nyasaye, ing’eyo kaka fupa chalo, kendo onge richona kata achiel ma ikia." 
Psalms69:6 Kik iwe akel wichkuot ni joma ogeno kuomi, A Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto. Kik iwe akel ayany ni jogo malami, yaye Nyasach Israel." 
Psalms69:7 Aseyudo chuny malit ka ji yanya nikech in, kendo wiya okuot ma ok anyal ting’o wang’a." 
Psalms69:8 Achalo ni owetena ka ng’ama pok gineno. Joodwa to achalonigi mana japiny moro nono. 
Psalms69:9 Hera ma aherogo Hekalu mari wang’o chunya ka mach, kendo ayany ma ji yanyigo ema koro iyanyago." 
Psalms69:10 Abolora kasando ringra kendo ka atueyo chiemo, to ji yanya ayanya." 
Psalms69:11 Arwakora gi pien gugru, to ginyiera anyiera." 
Psalms69:12 Gikuodha e dala, kamoro amora ma giwuothoe kendo jomer chuogona wer ma gijarago." 
Psalms69:13 A Ruoth Nyasaye, an to abiro lami. Dwoka, yaye Nyasaye, e sa asaya mihero, nikech herani duong’, kendo nimar irito singruok mane itimo ni niwar ji." 
Psalms69:14 Resa, kik anyumra e chuodho, kendo rita kuom wasika, bende kik iwe pi matut tera." 
Psalms69:15 Kik iwe ohula ywoya, kendo kik iwe anim e kut, kata kik iwe bur liel mwonya." 
Psalms69:16 A Ruoth Nyasaye, dwoka nikech ber mar herani maduong’ mosiko. Bi ira kuom ng’wononi maduong’." 
Psalms69:17 An jatichni, kik ipandna wang’i, to yie idwoka sani nikech an e chandruok maduong’." 
Psalms69:18 Bi mondo iwara, kendo iresa e lwet wasika." 
Psalms69:19 In ing’eyo kaka ji miya chuny lit, kendo ing’eyo kaka gijara kendo gikuodo wiya, wasika duto bende ineno." 
Psalms69:20 Ayany ma ji yanyago osenego chunya ma onge kaka akony. Ne ageno ni ji dikecha, to ne ok aneno. Bende ne aparo ni dayud kony, to ne ok ayudo." 
Psalms69:21 Kane kech kaya, to ne gimiya mana kwiri mondo acham, kendo kane riyo oloya, to ne gimiya mana kong andwayo mondo amadhi." 
Psalms69:22 Chiembgi giwegi ema mondo obednigi obadho, kendo sewni ma gitimo onego okelnigi masira!" 
Psalms69:23 Wang’gi mondo oimre, kik ginen, kendo imi dendgi osik ka kirni." 
Psalms69:24 A Nyasaye, onego ito mirimbi mager kuomgi, kendo sandgi malit kikecho." 
Psalms69:25 Onego kambigi dong’ nono, maonge kata ng’at achiel modong’ ka ngima e hembe," 
Psalms69:26 nimar gisando ng’ama isekumo, kendo gigoyo siboi ni joma isehinyo!" 
Psalms69:27 Kumgi kuom richogi duto, kendo kik iwe giyud warruok moa kuomi." 
Psalms69:28 Onego ruch nyinggi oko e kitap ngima, bende onego kik kwan-gi kaachiel gi joma kare." 
Psalms69:29 An to an jachan kendo rem rama, omiyo ting’a malo kendo resa, a Nyasaye." 
Psalms69:30 Abiro pako Nyasaye gi wer, kendo abiro miyo nyinge duong’, ka agoyone erokamano." 
Psalms69:31 Mano biro miyo Ruoth Nyasaye mor, moloyo misango motimne gi rwath, kata bed mana ni en rwath maber manade!" 
Psalms69:32 Ka jochan neno kamano, to gibiro bedo mamor, kendo jogo malamo Nyasaye, chunygi biro duogo." 
Psalms69:33 Ruoth Nyasaye winjo ywak jochan, bende wiye ok wil gi joge motue." 
Psalms69:34 Un polo gi piny kod nembe, kaachiel gi gik moko duto manie iu, pakuru Nyasaye." 
Psalms69:35 Enores Sayun, kendo nochak oger miech Juda. Joge nodag kuno, kendo nobed weg piny." 
Psalms69:36 Ee, nyikwa jotichne nokaw pinyno, kendo jogo mohere nodag kuno." 
Psalms70:1 A Nyasaye, resa! Reti piyo mondo ikonya, yaye Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Psalms70:2 We joma dwaro ketho ngimana wigi okuodi, mi ng’eng’ nono, bende jogo ma giyo ka mor ni ahinyora, onego dwok chien ka wigi okuot." 
Psalms70:3 Ee, joma goyona siboigo onego odhier nono nikech ologi." 
Psalms70:4 To ji duto mabiro iri onego bed mamor kendo mail. Onego ji duto mohero warruok maa kuomi wach pile niya, “Mano kaka Nyasaye duong’!”" 
Psalms70:5 An jachan kendo ok anyal yudo kaka akonyora, omiyo yie ibi ira piyo, yaye Nyasaye. In e jakonyna kendo jawarna. A Ruoth Nyasaye, kik ideki!" 
Psalms71:1 A Ruoth Nyasaye, in ema ageno kuomi. Kik iwe loya, mi wiya kuodi," 
Psalms71:2 to ka in Nyasaye makare, konya kendo resa. Chik iti iwinj gima awacho, mondo iwara." 
Psalms71:3 Bedna lwanda ma aresorae, kendo ohinga motegno mogeng’a. To adier, inie lwandana kendo ohingana." 
Psalms71:4 A Nyasaye, resa kuom joricho. Ee, gola e teko joma ger ma timbegi mono." 
Psalms71:5 Ruoth Nyasaye, aketo genona kuomi, mana kaka asebedo ka atimo chakre aa e nyathi." 
Psalms71:6 Asetenora kuomi nyaka ne nywola, bende isebedo kirita nyaka ne aa ei mama. Pile abiro bedo ka apaki." 
Psalms71:7 Ngimana osebedo ka odhiero ji mang’eny, to in e jaritna maratego." 
Psalms71:8 Odiechieng’ duto asiko ka apaki, kendo ahulo duong’ni maler." 
Psalms71:9 Kik koro idaga ni ati! Adier, kik tinde ijwang’a ni tekra orumo." 
Psalms71:10 Wasika chano kaka diginega. 
Psalms71:11 Giwacho niya, “Nyasaye osejwang’e! Walaweuru mondo wamake, nikech onge ng’ama nyalo rese!”" 
Psalms71:12 A Nyasaye, kik ibed mabor koda, to yie ikonya piyo, yaye Nyasacha." 
Psalms71:13 Joma nega onego lo kendo rum. Adier, mad kuod wi joma dwaro hinya, mi ng’eng’ nono." 
Psalms71:14 An to pile abiro keto genona kuomi, kendo anamed mana paki." 
Psalms71:15 Anahul timni makare, kendo pile anawuo kuom warruok maa kuomi, kata obedo ni otut modhiera winjo kamano." 
Psalms71:16 Ruoth Nyasaye, anapak timbeni madongo, kendo anahul timni makare. Ee, anahul timni kende." 
Psalms71:17 A Nyasaye, isepuonja nyaka ne aa e nyathi, kendo ndalona duto asebedo ka ahulo timbeni miwuorogo." 
Psalms71:18 To kaka koro ati, kendo wiya oselokore lwar, yie kik ijwang’a, yaye Nyasaye! Bed koda ka ahulo tekoni gi duong’ni ni tienge duto mabiro." 
Psalms71:19 A Nyasaye, timni makare tundo nyaka e polo malo! Isetimo gik madongo, omiyo onge ng’ama romo kodi." 
Psalms71:20 Isemiyo aneno chandruok gi rem malit, to ang’eyo ni ibiro meda teko, kendo ibiro gola e liel." 
Psalms71:21 Ibiro meda duong’ moloyo, kendo ibiro chako ikueyo chunya." 
Psalms71:22 A Nyasaye, abiro paki ahinya gi thum, nikech in jaadiera. Abiro weroni wende gi thum, yaye Ng’ama Ler mar Israel." 
Psalms71:23 Anakog gi mor, ka agoyoni thum. Adier, abiro wer gi tekra duto, nikech isewara." 
Psalms71:24 Pile anawuo kuom timni makare, nikech joma ne dwaro hinya oselo, mi wigi okuot." 
Psalms72:1 A Nyasaye, puonj ruoth mondo ong’ad bura mana gi adierani, kendo ipuonje timni makare." 
Psalms72:2 Kamano enorit jogi gi adiera, kendo notel ni jochan e yo makare." 
Psalms72:3 Ji modak e gode madongo gi matindo onego odag maber gi kue. 
Psalms72:4 Ruoth onego ong’ad bura kare ni joma chandore, kendo okony jochan, mi olo joma thirogi." 
Psalms72:5 Onego jogi sik kalami ndalo duto, mana kaka chieng’ gi due osiko ka rieny." 
Psalms72:6 Ruoth onego chal gi koth machue kendo miyo piny bedo mang’ich. 
Psalms72:7 Tim makare onego olandre e ndalone, kendo ji onego odhi maber nyaka chieng’." 
Psalms72:8 Pinye nochakre e bath nam man yo wuok chieng’, nyaka bath nam man yo podho chieng’, kendo nochakre aora Yufrate nyaka tung’ piny." 
Psalms72:9 Ogendini modak e piny motwo nokulre e nyime, kendo wasike noriere piny tir kobolore." 
Psalms72:10 Ruodhi mag Spania kod mag pinje manie dier nam nogolne osuru, kendo ruodhi mag Arabu gi mag Ethiopia bende nokelne mich." 
Psalms72:11 Kamano ruodhi duto nokulrene, kendo ogendini duto notine." 
Psalms72:12 Ka joma odhier oywakne, to oreso, kaachiel gi jochan kod joma onge gi ng’ama dikonygi." 
Psalms72:13 Okecho joma ithiro kendo modhier, bende oreso ngima jochan." 
Psalms72:14 Ogologi e thagruok, kendo e timbe mahundu, nimar okwano ngimagi ka gima nengogi tek." 
Psalms72:15 Ruoth mondo odag aming’a. Onego oyud chiwo mar dhahabu moa Arabu. Bende onego lemne kinde duto, kendo hap Nyasaye mondo obed kode pile." 
Psalms72:16 Onego chiemo obed mang’eny e piny, kendo cham machiek e gode mondo obed mogundho ka chamb Lebanon. Ji onego opong’ mier mana ka lum manie pap." 
Psalms72:17 Wich kik wil gi nyinge, kendo humbe mondo osiki nyaka chieng’. Ogendini duto mondo opake, kendo onego ji duto kwa Nyasaye mondo oguedhgi kaka oseguedho ruoth." 
Psalms72:18 Pakuru Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel! En kende ema otimo gik malichgi. 
Psalms72:19 Pakuru nyinge maduong’ nyaka chieng’, kendo duong’ne maler mondo opong’ piny! Amin!" 
Psalms72:20 Mano e giko lemo mag Daudi wuod Jesse. 
Psalms73:1 Mano kaka Nyasaye ng’won ni jo-Israel! Adier, ong’won ni jogo man gi chuny makare!" 
Psalms73:2 An to ne achiegni podho, ka tiendena dwaro kier," 
Psalms73:3 nikech nyiego ne omaka gi josunga, ka aneno kaka joricho mew." 
Psalms73:4 Rem ok ramgi; gin roteke, kendo dendgi ber." 
Psalms73:5 Ok githagre kaka ji mamoko thagore. Adier, gionge gi chandruok ma ji mamoko nigo." 
Psalms73:6 Mano emomiyo girwakore gi sunga mana ka ng’ama orwako thiwni, kendo girwakore gi kwinyo mana ka ng’ama orwako kandhu." 
Psalms73:7 Wengegi ofinyo, kendo chunygi opong’ gi timbe mamono." 
Psalms73:8 Gicharo ji mamoko ka giwacho gik maricho, kendo gisungore ka mbaka mag thiro ji mamoko ema gigoyo." 
Psalms73:9 Giwuoyo marach kuom Nyasaye manie polo, kendo gigolo chike ni joma nie piny ka gisungore." 
Psalms73:10 Omiyo koda ka jo-Nyasaye odok irgi, kendo oyie mamor gi gik moko duto ma giwacho." 
Psalms73:11 Giwacho niya, “Nyasaye ok bi ng’eyo! Adier, Ng’ama Duong’ Moloyo ok bi fwenyo!”" 
Psalms73:12 Mano e kaka joricho chalo. Gin gi gik moko mang’eny, kendo pile mwandugi medore ameda." 
Psalms73:13 Kuom mano, a Nyasaye, aritora maler, ma ok amul richo, mana kayiem nono," 
Psalms73:14 nimar achandora pile odiechieng’ duto, ka ikuma okinyi kokinyi." 
Psalms73:15 To ka da bed ni ne asewacho weche ma kamago, to da abedo andhoga ni jogi!" 
Psalms73:16 Omiyo ne atemo matek mondo ang’e tiend wachno maber. 
Psalms73:17 To ne odhiera ng’eyo, nyaka ne adonjo e Hekalu mari, eka awinjo gima notimre ni joricho e giko." 
Psalms73:18 Chutho iketogi kuonde makier, mi imiyo gilwar e tho." 
Psalms73:19 Itiekogi ka diemo wang’! Masiche malich lal kodgi nono. 
Psalms73:20 A Ruoth Nyasaye, gichalo lek malal nono gokinyi, ma, kichiew, to wiyi osewilgo." 
Psalms73:21 Kane iya owang’, mi chunya odoko malit," 
Psalms73:22 to ne abedo mofuwo ka dhiang’ e nyimi. 
Psalms73:23 Kata kamano, e kinde duto in koda, kimako lweta." 
Psalms73:24 Itelona, king’adona rieko, kendo chieng’ giko inirwaka kar duong’." 
Psalms73:25 Ere ng’at moro ma an go e polo mak mana in? Kuom mano, ere gimoro machielo ma anyalo dwaro e piny?" 
Psalms73:26 Parona gi denda nyalo bedo manyap, to in e tekra, A Nyasaye. In kendi e mwanduna nyaka chieng’." 
Psalms73:27 Chutho, joma oweyi biro lal nono, kendo initiek jogo ma ok oyie kuomi." 
Psalms73:28 An to aonge gi gima berna, moloyo bedo machiegni kodi, yaye Nyasaye. A Ruoth Nyasaye, in ema aseyieri mondo ibedna kar konyruok mondo aland gik moko duto misetimo." 
Psalms74:1 A Nyasaye, isejwang’owa kamano nang’o? Bende mirima biro maki gi jogi iwuon nyaka chieng’ adier?" 
Psalms74:2 Parie joma ne iyiero chon mondo obed jogi. Gin joma ne iwaro mondo obed ogandani iwuon. Bende parie got Sayun kama ne isedakie. 
Psalms74:3 Bi mondo iwuoth e dala mane osekethoreni. Wasikwa oseketho Hekalu mari chuth. 
Psalms74:4 Wasiki nopong’o Hekalu gi koko, kendo ne gichungo bandechegi ka ginyiso ni gisekawe." 
Psalms74:5 Ne gigoye piny mana ka joma tong’o yien gi ledhi," 
Psalms74:6 kendo ne gibaro gik mopa duto gi ledhi kod nyundo. 
Psalms74:7 Bende ne giwang’o Hekalu mari gi mach, mi gidwanyo kama ilamie. Adier, ne gikethe chuth!" 
Psalms74:8 Ne gichano mondo gitiekwa pep, kendo ne giwang’o kamoro amora milami e piny." 
Psalms74:9 Ok wanyal neno gik maler mane watiyogo e lemo, bende koro waonge jonabi. Waonge gi ng’at mong’eyo ni gima osetimoreni biro siko nyaka karang’o." 
Psalms74:10 A Nyasaye, wasikwa biro jarowa kuom kinde marom nadi? Koso gibiro yanyo nyingi nyaka chieng’?" 
Psalms74:11 Ere gima omiyo itamori konyowa? Koso ang’o momiyo ing’wonyonwa lweti? 
Psalms74:12 To in Nyasaye, isebedo Ruodhwa nyaka nene, kendo isebedo kilocho e piny ngima." 
Psalms74:13 Ne ipogo nam gi tekoni mang’ongo, mi itoyo wiye mag ondiegi nam." 
Psalms74:14 Adier, ne itoyo wiye mag Levayathan, mi imiyo joma odak e thim ringre mondo ocham." 
Psalms74:15 Nimiyo sokni gi aore omol, kendo in ema nimiyo aore ma ok duon oduono." 
Psalms74:16 In ema ne ichueyo odiechieng’ gi otieno, mi iketo wang’chieng’ gi due karegi." 
Psalms74:17 Niketo tong’ mag piny. Oro gi chwiri bende in ema niketo. 
Psalms74:18 To par ineye A Nyasaye, kaka wasiki mofuwo jari." 
Psalms74:19 Kik ijwang’ jogi moheri e lwet wasikgi makwiny, kendo kik wiyi wil gi jotichni misando," 
Psalms74:20 to par singruok mane itimo kodwa. Kuonde duto motimo mudho e piny opong’ gi timbe mahundu. 
Psalms74:21 Kik iwe lo joma ithiro, to joma odhier kendo ma jochan mondo opaki." 
Psalms74:22 A Nyasaye, a malo mondo ihul wachni iwuon, kiparo kaka joma kiayi jari pile odiechieng’ duto." 
Psalms74:23 Wiyi kik wil gi koko mar mirima ma wasiki goyo sa ka sa. 
Psalms75:1 Wagoyoni erokamano, A Nyasaye. Ee, wagoyoni erokamano. Wahulo kaka iduong’, kendo walando gik madongo misetimo." 
Psalms75:2 Nyasaye wacho niya, “Ka kinde ma aseketo mondo ong’adie bura ochopo, to abiro ng’ado bura." 
Psalms75:3 Kata obedo ni piny oyiengni, mi ji duto modakie kihondko omako, to an ema nagur mise mage motegno." 
Psalms75:4 Akwero josunga niya, ‘Weuru sungoru!’ Joricho bende akwero ni, owe kawore." 
Psalms75:5 Ee, awachonigi giduto mondo giwe timbegi mag sunga gi mag tok teko.”" 
Psalms75:6 Teko mar ng’ado bura ok wuog yo wuok chieng’ kata yo podho chieng’. Bende ok owuog yo nyandwat kata yo milambo," 
Psalms75:7 to Nyasaye e jang’ad bura. Odwoko ji moko piny, to moko oting’o malo." 
Psalms75:8 Ruoth Nyasaye oting’o kikombe mar divai mochiek makech e lwete, kendo ogamo ni ji mondo omadhi. Joricho duto onego madhe pep, koda ka duche!" 
Psalms75:9 An to abiro pako Nyasach Jakobo. Ee, abiro pake gi wer nyaka chieng’." 
Psalms75:10 Enotiek teko joricho, to teko mar joma kare nomedre ameda." 
Psalms76:1 Nyasaye rahuma e piny Juda, kendo nyinge duong’ e piny Israel." 
Psalms76:2 Jerusalem e dalane. Ee, odak e got Sayun." 
Psalms76:3 Kanyo ema ne oturoe aserni gi okumbni kod ligengni mag wasigu. 
Psalms76:4 A Nyasaye, mano kaka nyingi duong’! Mano kaka iwuotho motegno, ka iduogo ia e gode kuma ne iloyoe wasiki." 
Psalms76:5 Jolweny ma jochir osedendi, kendo koro ginindo mana nindo mar tho. Onge kata ng’at achiel modong’ ma dikonyre gi gigi mag lweny." 
Psalms76:6 Kane ibwogogi, yaye Nyasach Jakobo, farese gi joithgi nogore piny, mi parogi olal." 
Psalms76:7 To in, A Ruoth, ilich manade! Ere gima dichung’ e nyimi ka ikecho?" 
Psalms76:8 Ne imiyo bura ming’ado ong’ere gie polo. Piny nobedo moluor, kendo oling’ thi," 
Psalms76:9 kane ichung’ mondo ing’ad bura, kendo mondo ires ji duto ma ithiro e piny ka." 
Psalms76:10 Kata mana mirimb dhano keloni pak, kendo jogo motony e lweny nopaki e sewni ma gitimoni." 
Psalms76:11 Miuru Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu gima ne usingoru ni unumiye, kendo un ogendini duto modak machiegni, keluru mich ni ng’ama ji duto oluoro." 
Psalms76:12 En ema omiyo jodongo bolore, kendo obwogo ruodhi madongo mag piny." 
Psalms77:1 Aywak ni Nyasaye matek. Ee, aywak matek, kendo owinja." 
Psalms77:2 E kinde mane anie chandruok to ne alamo Ruoth. Otieno duto ne ating’o bedena malo, ka alemo, to chunya ne ok nyal yudo kue." 
Psalms77:3 Kane aparo Nyasaye, to ne ahum nono, kendo kata kane aparo matut, to chunya nyosore anyosa." 
Psalms77:4 Nyasaye ne ok we anindi, kendo ne aparora ma ok anyal wuoyo." 
Psalms77:5 Ne aparo ndalo mosekadho. Higni machon bende ne aparo. 
Psalms77:6 Otieno duto nasiko ka aparo mana kamano. Ne aparo matut, kapenjora niya," 
Psalms77:7 “Ruoth biro dagiwa nyaka chieng’ koso? Bende nochak ohera kendo? 
Psalms77:8 En adieri ni ng’wonone orumo chutho? Koso singruok mare ti oweyo? 
Psalms77:9 Wi Nyasaye osewil gi bedo mang’won koso? Koso mirima osemiyo oweyo kecho ji?” 
Psalms77:10 Kane aseparo mago duto, ne awacho niya, “Gima litna moloyo en ni Nyasaye koro onge gi teko.”" 
Psalms77:11 A Ruoth Nyasaye, anahul timbeni madongo. Adier, anapar honni mane itimo e kinde mokadho." 
Psalms77:12 Anapar gik moko duto ma isetimo. Ee, anapar timbenigo matut." 
Psalms77:13 Gik moko duto mitimo ler, yaye Nyasaye. Onge Nyasaye moro maduong’ ka in." 
Psalms77:14 In e Nyasaye matimo honni. Ne inyiso tekoni maduong’ e kind ogendini," 
Psalms77:15 kane ireso jogi ma nyikwa Jakobo kod nyikwa Josef. 
Psalms77:16 A Nyasaye, kane pige oneni, to ne gidoko maluor, kendo kude mag nam nowalo." 
Psalms77:17 Boche polo nokelo koth maduong’, kendo polo noriadore, ka mil koni gi koni." 
Psalms77:18 Adier, polo noriadore malich e yamb kalausi, mi omenyo piny duto. Piny bende notetni kendo oyiengni." 
Psalms77:19 A Nyasaye, niwuotho, king’ado nam matut, to ger tiendi ne ok nyal ne." 
Psalms77:20 Ne itayo jogi ka jakwath, ka gin e lwet Musa gi Harun." 
Psalms78:1 Un joga, chikuru itu ni puonjna, mondo uwinj gima awacho." 
Psalms78:2 Abiro wuoyo kodu gi ngero, ka anyisou tiend midhierni mane otimore chon." 
Psalms78:3 Gin gik ma wasewinjo mi wang’eyo, kendo mane kwerewa ohulonwa." 
Psalms78:4 Ok wanapandgi ni nyithindwa, to wananyis tieng’ mabiro teko Nyasaye gi timbene madongo, kod gik malich miwuoro ma osetimo." 
Psalms78:5 Nyasaye nomiyo jo-Israel ma nyikwa Jakobo chikene gi buchene, mane ochiko kwerewa mondo opuonj nyithindgi," 
Psalms78:6 kendo nyithindgigo opuonj tieng’ mabiro, mondo nyikwagi bende opuonjre wechego." 
Psalms78:7 Kamano joma birogo noket genogi kuom Nyasaye, kendo wigi ok nowil gi gima ne osetimo, to pile ginirit chikene." 
Psalms78:8 Ok onego gichal gi kweregi mane wigi tek, kendo mane odagi luoro Nyasaye. Ne gin joma chunygi yomyom, kendo ma ok ogeno kuom Nyasaye." 
Psalms78:9 Jo-Efraim mane kedo gi atung’ kod asere ne oringo lweny. 
Psalms78:10 Ne ok girito singruok mane gisetimo gi Nyasaye. Kamano ne gitamore rito chikene. 
Psalms78:11 Wigi ne owil gi gik mane osetimo, kaachiel gi honni mane osetimo," 
Psalms78:12 Nyasaye notimo honni e thim mar Zoan e piny Misri, mana ka kweregi neno." 
Psalms78:13 Ne obaro nam, mi otelonigi nyaka gikadho, ka pi ogingore ka ohinga koni gi koni" 
Psalms78:14 E kinde mag odiechieng’ ne otelonigi gi bor polo, to otieno duto ne otelonigi gi mach maliel." 
Psalms78:15 Ne obaro lwendni e thim, mi omiyogi pi mathoth ka pi nam." 
Psalms78:16 Ne omiyo sokni owuok e lwanda, mi pi omol ka aora." 
Psalms78:17 To kata kamano, pod ne gisiko mana ka gitimo richo e nyime, kendo ne gipiem e thim gi Ngama Duong’ Moloyo." 
Psalms78:18 Ne gitemo Nyasaye marayiem, ka gikwaye chiemo mondo gineggo kech." 
Psalms78:19 Ne giwuoyo kuome marach, ka gipenjore, niya, “Bende Nyasaye nyalo miyowa chiemo e thim ka adier?" 
Psalms78:20 Chutho nogoyo lwanda, mi pi obubnie molokore aore, to koro kuon gi ring’o bende domiwa?”" 
Psalms78:21 Kane Ruoth Nyasaye owinjo kamano, nokecho gi nyikwa Jakobo, mi omonjogi gi mach. Adier, mirima mager nomake gi jo-Israel," 
Psalms78:22 nikech ne ok giyie kuome, kendo ne ok gigeno ni doresgi." 
Psalms78:23 To kata kamano nogolo chik mondo dhout polo oyawre. 
Psalms78:24 Eka nomiyo manna, ma en chiemo moa e polo, ochuenigi ka koth mondo gicham." 
Psalms78:25 Kamano Nyasaye nomiyogi chiemb malaika, mi gichamo nyaka giyieng’." 
Psalms78:26 Bang’e tekone nomiyo yamb ugue gi yamb milambo okudho," 
Psalms78:27 moorogi winy mang’eny ka kuoyo manie dhonam, mi gibedo gi ring’o mogundho ka lowo." 
Psalms78:28 Winjgo ne olwar e dier kambi kuonde duto ma hembe nitie. 
Psalms78:29 Kuom mano ji nochiemo moyieng’, nikech Nyasaye nomiyogi gima ne gigombo." 
Psalms78:30 To kata kamano wuochegi ne ok orumo, omiyo kane pod gichiemo," 
Psalms78:31 Nyasaye nokecho kodgi ahinya, monego jogi marateke, ma yawuot Israel mabeyoe moloyo." 
Psalms78:32 To kata obedo ni ne otimonigi honni madongo kamano, to ji pod ne osiko timo mana richo, kendo ne ok ginyal yie kuom Nyasaye." 
Psalms78:33 Mano omiyo Nyasaye nong’ado ndalogi machiek, kokelonigi masiche apoya." 
Psalms78:34 To kane ochako negogi, joma odong’ nolokore odok ire, kendo olame matek." 
Psalms78:35 Ne gifwenyo ni kara Nyasaye Maduong’ Moloyo e lwandagi kendo jawargi. 
Psalms78:36 To kata kamano ne giwuonde ka giwachone mana weche mag miriambo. 
Psalms78:37 Ne ok giketo chunygi kuome, bende ne giweyo singruok mane gisetimo kode." 
Psalms78:38 En to nokechogi, mong’wononigi kuom richogi, mi ok otiekogi. Kinde mathoth ne omwonyo mirimbe, nikech ne ok odwar kecho kodgi." 
Psalms78:39 Ne ong’eyo ni ne gin mana ji matho, machalo yamo makudho kendo kadho." 
Psalms78:40 Ne gipiem kode e thim ndalo mang’eny, kendo ne gimiye mirima ndalo mathoth!." 
Psalms78:41 Adier, ne gitemo Nyasaye kinde mang’eny, nyaka ne gimiyo Ng’ama Ler mar Israel okecho." 
Psalms78:42 Wigi ne owil gi tekone maduong’, bende ne ok giparo chieng’ mane oseresogie kuom wasikgi," 
Psalms78:43 kendo kaka notimo timbe madongo kod honni e thim Zoan e piny Misri. 
Psalms78:44 Ne oloko aore remo, omiyo jo-Misri ne ok nyal modho e aorego." 
Psalms78:45 Ne ooro lwang’ni kuomgi mokayogi. Ogwende bende nokelo, moketho pinygi." 
Psalms78:46 Ne ooro kungu mondo ocham chambgi. Dede bende nooro mondo oketh puothegi. 
Psalms78:47 Noketho mzabibu maggi gi pe, kendo notieko ng’opegi gi koyo mang’ich thi." 
Psalms78:48 Ne onego dhogi gi pe, kendo rombe gi diek bende nomiyo polo onego." 
Psalms78:49 Notoyo kuomgi mirimbe mager, kokecho ahinya, ka ooro malaika maketho gik moko." 
Psalms78:50 Ne ok ogeng’o mirimbe, kendo kata mana weyo ngima jo-Misrigo, ne ok oweyo, to nonegogi anega gi tuo malich." 
Psalms78:51 Adier, nonego nyithindo machwo makayo mag Misri duto, ma yawuowi mabeyoe moloyo ma nyikwa Ham." 
Psalms78:52 Joge owuon to nogolo oko e piny Misri, mi otelonigi e thim kaka jakwath telo ni jambe." 
Psalms78:53 Notelonigi maber maonge masira. Wasikgi, to nam noimo!" 
Psalms78:54 Nokelogi e pinye maler, kendo e gode mane oseloyo mokawo." 
Psalms78:55 Noriembo joma ne odak e pinyno, mondo oyaw ni joge thuolo, eka ne opoge ni dhout Israel, mi omiyo gidak e miechgi." 
Psalms78:56 To pod ne gipiem apiema gi Nyasaye Maduong’ Moloyo mi giteme. Ne gitamore rito chikene," 
Psalms78:57 mi giweye, kendo gindhoge mana kaka kweregi notimo. Ne gibaro mi giweyo yo, mana ka asere modir gi atung’ mobam, ma ok dimb gima onego ochiel." 
Psalms78:58 Ne giwang’o iye ka gilemo e hembko man kuonde moting’ore, kendo ne gimiyo nyiego omake, ka gilamo kido mag nyiseche manono." 
Psalms78:59 Kane Nyasaye oneno kamano, nokecho, mi odagi jo-Israel chuth." 
Psalms78:60 Ne odar moweyo hembe man Shilo, kama ne osebet kodakie gi ji." 
Psalms78:61 Ne oyie ni wasigu mondo okaw Sandug Muma kama tekone gi duong’ne maler nitie. 
Psalms78:62 Ne okecho gi joge owuon, mi oweyo wasikgi onegogi." 
Psalms78:63 Yawuotgi ne onegi e lweny, omiyo ne onge joma kend nyigi." 
Psalms78:64 Jonabi ne onegi gi ligangla, kendo mondgi ne ok nyal ywagogi." 
Psalms78:65 To achien, Ruoth Nyasaye ne ochiew ka ng’ama oa e nindo. Ne ochalo ng’at maratego ma kong’o oilo." 
Psalms78:66 Ne oloyo wasike mi omiyogi wichkuot mosiko. 
Psalms78:67 Ne odagi nyikwa Josef. Joka Efraim bende ne ok oyiero. 
Psalms78:68 To ne oyiero mana joka Juda, kod got Sayun ma ohero." 
Psalms78:69 Ne ogero Hekalu mare kanyo machal gi dalane e polo, kendo ne ogurore motegno mana ka piny mosiko nyaka chieng’." 
Psalms78:70 Nyasaye noyiero Daudi jatichne," 
Psalms78:71 ka ogole e tich kwayo rombe. Ne okete ruodh jo-Israel ma nyikwa Jakobo, mondo obed jakwadh joge owuon." 
Psalms78:72 Daudi noritogi gi chunye duto, kendo notelonigi gi rieko." 
Psalms79:1 A Nyasaye, ogendini ma ok ong’eyi osedonjo e piny jogi iwuon. Gisemiyo Hekalu mari maler obedo mogak, mi giketho Jerusalem chuth." 
Psalms79:2 Giseweyo ringre jogi ni winy gi ondiegi mondo ocham. 
Psalms79:3 Ne ginego jogi, mi remo nomol ka pi e Jerusalem duto, kendo ne onge ng’ama nyalo yikogi." 
Psalms79:4 Ogendini mokiewo kodwa goyonwa siboi, ka nyierowa kendo jarowa." 
Psalms79:5 A Nyasaye, ibiro kecho kodwa nyaka karang’o? Koso mirimbi biro siko ka liel ka mach nyaka chieng’?" 
Psalms79:6 Ol mirimbi kuom ogendini ma ok oyie kuomi. Ee, kech gi jogo ma ok lami." 
Psalms79:7 Gisenegowa wan nyikwa Jakobo kendo giseketho pinywa. 
Psalms79:8 Kik ikumwa kuom richo mag kwerewa, to koro yie ikechwa piyo, nikech osejwang’wa ni pangla." 
Psalms79:9 A Nyasaye ma Jawarwa, kechwa mondo nyingi oyud duong’." 
Psalms79:10 Ere gima omiyo ogendini ma ok oyie kuomi onego openjwa niya, “Nyasachu nogo ni kanye?” A Nyasaye, wadwaro mondo ikum ogendinigo mana e wang’wa kwaneno, nikech ne gichuero remb jotichni!" 
Psalms79:11 Chik iti mondo iwinj ywak joma otue, kendo tekoni maduong’ mondo omi ogony joma ong’adnigi buch tho." 
Psalms79:12 Ruoth, chul kuor ni ogendini mamokogo nyadibiriyo kuom achaya ma gichayigo." 
Psalms79:13 To wan jogi, ma wan rombe mag kwedhi, wanagoni erokamano nyaka chieng’, kendo wanahul duong’ni ni tienge duto mabiro." 
Psalms80:1 A Jakwadh Israel, winjwa, in ma itelo ni nyikwa Josef ka ng’ama telo ni jambe! Rienynwa in mibet e kerubi kaka ruoth mabet e kom duong’ne." 
Psalms80:2 Kony dhout Efraim gi Benjamin kod Manase gi tekoni, kendo bi mondo ireswa!" 
Psalms80:3 A Nyasaye, duogwa iri, kendo rienynwa mondo wayud resruok." 
Psalms80:4 A Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto, ibiro sin gi lemo mar jogi nyaka karang’o?" 
Psalms80:5 Isemiyowa pi wang’ mondo obed chiembwa. Adier, isemiyowa agwata maduong’ ma pi wang’ opong’o, mondo wamodhi." 
Psalms80:6 Iseweyo jopinje mokiewo kodwa yakowa, kendo wasikwa nyierowa anyiera." 
Psalms80:7 A Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto, duogwa iri, kendo rienynwa mondo wayud resruok." 
Psalms80:8 Ne igolo yadh mzabibu e piny Misri, mi iriembo ogendini moko e pinygi, eka ipidhee," 
Psalms80:9 kendo ne ibetone kama onego odongie. Tiendene ne odonjo matut e lowo, kendo bedene noyarore mokwako pinyno." 
Psalms80:10 Tipone ne oimo gode kod yiend sida madongodongo. 
Psalms80:11 Bedene konchiel ne oyarore mochopo nam Mediterenia, to bedene ma komachielo nochopo e aora Yufrate." 
Psalms80:12 To koro ere gima omiyo isemuko chiel molwore? Ng’ato ang’ata makadho, tinde nyalo pono olembene." 
Psalms80:13 Mbithe bende kethe, kendo le maa e thim chame." 
Psalms80:14 A Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto duog irwa. Rangwa gie polo, kendo bi mondo ireswa, wan yadhi mar mzabibu." 
Psalms80:15 Ee, bi ires mzabibu ma in iwuon ema ne ipidho. Adier, kony mzabibu ma pod yot, mane imiyo odongo maber mondo obed mari iwuon." 
Psalms80:16 Wasikwa osetong’e, momoko kuome mach! Ranggi gi gero, kendo tiekgi." 
Psalms80:17 Ng’ama iseyiero, to onego iriti. Ee, rit wuod dhano ma isemiyo teko mondo otini." 
Psalms80:18 Ok wanachak waweyi kendo. Konywa wabed mangima, mondo wapaki." 
Psalms80:19 A Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto, duogwa iri, kendo rienynwa mondo wayud resruok." 
Psalms81:1 Koguru gi mor ni Nyasaye ma jaritwa. Adier, pakuru Nyasach Jakobo gi wer." 
Psalms81:2 Chakuru goyo thum gi nyidwonge. Gouru nyatiti kod orutu mamit. 
Psalms81:3 Gouru tung’ ka due opor, kendo ka due otegno, kunyisogo ni gin ndalo mag nyasi." 
Psalms81:4 Mano e chik Israel mane Nyasach Jakobo ogolo. 
Psalms81:5 Ne ogolo chikno ni jo-Israel kane omonjo piny Misri. Awinjo dwol ma ok ang’eyo, ka wacho niya," 
Psalms81:6 “Ne agolo ting’ mapek e goku, mi ne amiyo ubolo odheche mane utiyogo piny." 
Psalms81:7 Kane un e thagruok, to ne uluonga, mi akonyou. Ne adwokou gie boche polo mapondoe, kendo ne amiyou tem e sokni mag Meriba." 
Psalms81:8 Un joga, winjuru siem masiemougo. Mano kaka agombo ni mondo uchikna itu un jo-Israel!" 
Psalms81:9 Kik uti ni nyiseche mamoko, bende kik ulam nyasaye moro mak mana an." 
Psalms81:10 An e Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu mane ogolou e piny Misri. Ng’amuru dhou malach mondo apidhu. 
Psalms81:11 To joga ne ok nyal winjo wachna. Adier, jo-Israel ne odagi mako chikna." 
Psalms81:12 Kuom mano, ne aweyogi mondo gidhi, ka wigi tek kamano, mondo gitim mana gik ma gin giwegi ema gidwaro." 
Psalms81:13 To mano kaka agombo ni mondo joga owinja. Ee, mad jo-Israel luw yorena." 
Psalms81:14 Ka gitimo kamano, to da alonigi wasikgi piyopiyo, mi akum joma sandogi." 
Psalms81:15 Jogo mamon koda dikulre e nyima ka luoro omako, kendo digiyud kum mochwere." 
Psalms81:16 Damiu mogo mayomie moloyo obed chiembu, kaachiel gi mor kich mothodhi e lwanda mondo ucham nyaka uyieng’.”" 
Psalms82:1 Nyasaye e jakom e buch polo, kendo oyalo kata mana nyiseche mamoko." 
Psalms82:2 Owachonigi niya, “Nyaka uwe ng’ado buch amwor, bende nyaka uwe chwako joma richo." 
Psalms82:3 Ng’aduru bura kare ni joma odhier kod nyithi kiye, kendo konyuru jochan gi joma ok nyal konyore kendgi." 
Psalms82:4 Ee, resgiuru e lwet joma timbegi richo." 
Psalms82:5 Mano kaka umemoru, kendo mano kaka ufuwo! Uwuotho mana e mudho, kendo adiera manie piny oselal." 
Psalms82:6 Ne awachonu ni un nyiseche, kendo un duto un yawuot Ng’ama Duong’ Moloyo." 
Psalms82:7 To ubiro tho mana kaka ji duto tho, kendo ngimau norum mana ka ngima ruoth moro amora.”" 
Psalms82:8 A Nyasaye, bi mondo irit piny gi adiera, nimar ogendini duto gin magi." 
Psalms83:1 A Nyasaye, kik iling’ aling’a, ma ok itimo gimoro!" 
Psalms83:2 Neye kaka wasiki goyo koko ka piem kodi, kendo kaka joma mon kodi ng’anyoni!" 
Psalms83:3 Gitimo cheno maling’ ling’ mondo gihiny jogi. Adier, gidwaro hinyo joma ikawo ka mwanduni." 
Psalms83:4 Giwacho niya, “Watiekuru ogandagi, mondo wich owil gi Israel chuth!”" 
Psalms83:5 Giwinjore e weche ma giwacho, kendo giriworeni giduto." 
Psalms83:6 Gin jo-Edom gi jo-Ishmael gi jo-Moab gi jo-Hagri," 
Psalms83:7 kaachiel gi jo-Gebal gi jo-Amon gi jo-Amalek gi jo-Filistia kod jo-Turo. 
Psalms83:8 Jo-Asuria bende josetimo kodgi winjruok mondo okony nyikwa Lut. 
Psalms83:9 A Nyasaye, timnigi kaka ne itimo ni jo-Midian, kendo kaka ne itimo ni Sisera gi Jabin e aora Kishon." 
Psalms83:10 Ne oneggi Endor, mi ringregi odong’ katop kuno," 
Psalms83:11 Tim ni jotendgi mag lweny kaka ne itimo ni Oreb gi Zeeb, kendo lo ruodhigi duto, kaka niloyo Zeba gi Zalmuna," 
Psalms83:12 mane jowacho niya, “Wabiro kawo piny Nyasaye mondo odok marwa.”" 
Psalms83:13 A Nyasacha, kegi! Ee, kegi mana ka mihudhi ma yamo tero!" 
Psalms83:14 Kaka mach wang’o bungu, kata kaka ligek mach kakni e gode," 
Psalms83:15 e kaka mondo iriembgi gi kalausi, kendo mondo ibwoggi gi kalausi mager." 
Psalms83:16 A Ruoth Nyasaye, migi wichkuot maduong’ nyaka chop gidwog iri." 
Psalms83:17 Mad logi, kendo kihondko makgi nyaka chieng’, mi githo gi wichkuot maduong’." 
Psalms83:18 Kamano mondo ging’e, A Ruoth Nyasaye, ni in kende e Ruoth Maduong’ e piny ngima." 
Psalms84:1 A Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto, mano kaka ahero Hekalu mari," 
Psalms84:2 kendo mano kaka agombo ni mondo abed kuno! Agombo bedo e laru mar Hekalu mar Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo awer matek gi ilo ni Nyasaye mangima." 
Psalms84:3 Kata winj abang’ chieth osegero utegi e Hekaluni. Opija bende nigi kar dakgi giwegi kanyo, kama gipidhoe nyithindgi machiegni gi kendoni mar misango. A Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto ma Ruodha kendo Nyasacha," 
Psalms84:4 mano kaka joma odak e Hekalu mari gin johawi! Pile gipaki gi wer. 
Psalms84:5 Mano kaka joma yudo tekogi kuomi gin johawi! Ee, joma keto chunygi kuom dhiyo got Sayun gin joma oguedhi adier." 
Psalms84:6 Ka gikadho e holo motwo, to holono lokore thidhya, kendo kodh opon kelone gueth." 
Psalms84:7 Teko medore ni jogo ameda, ka gidhi nyime gi wuodhgi. Gibiro neno Nyasach nyiseche e got Sayun!" 
Psalms84:8 A Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto, winj lemona. Chik iti, yaye Nyasach Jakobo." 
Psalms84:9 A Nyasaye, guedh ruodhwa ma ritowa. En e ruoth ma iseyiero, mowir gi mo." 
Psalms84:10 Odiechieng’ achiel ma ng’ato obedogo e Hekalu mari, ber moloyo ndalo gana gi gana mobedogo kamoro nono. Ber mondo achung’ kata mana e dhoranga od Nyasacha, moloyo dak e miech joricho." 
Psalms84:11 Ruoth Nyasaye e ohinga ma wageng’orego kendo e okumbawa. En ema oguedhowa gi ng’wono kod duong’. Ok otuon joma timo gik makare gimoro amora maber. 
Psalms84:12 A Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto, mano kaka joma ogeno kuomi gin johawi!" 
Psalms85:1 A Ruoth Nyasaye, iseguedho pinyi, kendo isemiyo nyikwa Jakobo ochako dhi nyime maber." 
Psalms85:2 Iseweyo ni jogi richogi, kendo iseng’wononigi kuom timbegi mamono." 
Psalms85:3 Ne iweyo kecho kodgi, mi chunyi olendo kuom mirima mager mane in go." 
Psalms85:4 A Nyasaye Jawarwa, duogwa iri, mondo iwe sin kodwa." 
Psalms85:5 Ibiro kecho kodwa nyaka chieng’ koso? Koso mirimbi biro siko nyaka karang’o? 
Psalms85:6 Wan jogi, yie idwognwa tekowa mondo wapaki." 
Psalms85:7 A Ruoth Nyasaye, reswa, kinyisowago ni iherowa gi hera mosiko." 
Psalms85:8 Achiko ita ni gima Ruoth Nyasaye wacho. Osingore ni obiro kelonwa kue, wan joge owuon, ka ok wadok e timbewa manono." 
Psalms85:9 Adier, oikore mar reso jogo ma miye luor, kendo duong’ne maler biro siko e pinywani." 
Psalms85:10 Hera gi adiera biro riwore kanyakla. Tim makare kod kue bende biro bedo kaachiel. 
Psalms85:11 Luor ma dhano oluorogo Nyasaye biro chopo malo, kendo adiera mar Nyasaye biro e piny koa e polo." 
Psalms85:12 Ruoth Nyasaye biro miyo wadhi nyime maber, kendo pinywa biro nyago cham mogundho!" 
Psalms85:13 Tim makare biro telo e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo biro losone yo mondo oluw." 
Psalms86:1 A Ruoth Nyasaye, winj ywakna mondo idwoka, nikech adhier, kendo achando ng’ama dikonya." 
Psalms86:2 Resa e tho, nimar ayie kuomi. Adier, konya, nikech an jatichni, kendo ageno kuomi." 
Psalms86:3 A Ruoth Nyasaye, in e Nyasacha, omiyo kecha. Alami odiechieng’ duto pile." 
Psalms86:4 Chunya mondo obed mamor, yaye Ruoth Nyasaye, nimar in ema aywakni" 
Psalms86:5 A Ruoth Nyasaye, iber kendo ing’wono ni ji, bende inyiso herani mogundho ni ji duto maywakni." 
Psalms86:6 Chik iti ni lemona, A Ruoth Nyasaye. Adier, winj ywakna mondo ikonya." 
Psalms86:7 Aluongi e kinde ma an e chandruok, nimar ang’eyo ni iwinjo lemona." 
Psalms86:8 A Ruoth Nyasaye, onge Nyasaye moro ma romo kodi, kata ma nyalo timo gik ma itimo." 
Psalms86:9 Ogendini duto ma isechueyo, A Ruoth Nyasaye, biro kuloreni, kendo gibiro miyo nyingi duong’," 
Psalms86:10 nimar in kendi Nyasaye, ema iduong’, kendo in ema itimo gik malich ma iwuoro." 
Psalms86:11 A Ruoth Nyasaye, nyisa yori mondo awuothie gi adiera. Puonja kaka daluori gi chuny achiel." 
Psalms86:12 Abiro paki gi chunya duto, A Ruoth Nyasacha, bende abiro miyo nyingi duong’ nyaka chieng’," 
Psalms86:13 nikech hera miherago lich, kendo nimar iseresa e bur matut mar tho." 
Psalms86:14 A Nyasaye, josunga ma timbegi richo dwaro nega. Gin joma ok dewi." 
Psalms86:15 Ruoth, in e Nyasaye ma jang’wono kendo makecho ji. Iyi ok wang’ piyo, kendo inyiso adierani kod herani mosiko." 
Psalms86:16 Duog ira mondo ikecha. Meda teko, kendo resa." 
Psalms86:17 A Ruoth Nyasaye, nyisa gima dimi ang’e ni ihera, mondo joma mon koda oyud wichkuot ka gineno ni isekonya, kendo imiya yueyo." 
Psalms87:1 Nyasaye nogero dalane e gode maler. 
Psalms87:2 Ohero dala Jerusalem moloyo miech nyikwa Jakobo mamoko duto. 
Psalms87:3 In dala Nyasaye, winji gik mabeyo miwuoro ma owacho kuomi." 
Psalms87:4 “Ka akwano ogendini moyie kuoma, to anakwan koda ka jo-Misri gi jo-Babulon, kendo ananyis jo-Filistia gi jo-Turo kod jo-Ethiopia ni gin bende gin jo-Jerusalem.”" 
Psalms87:5 Kuom Sayun to ji duto nowachie niya, “En min ogendini duto, kendo Ng’ama Duong’ Moloyo biro miyo ogurore motegno.”" 
Psalms87:6 Ruoth Nyasaye nondikie nying ji duto ma e piny, kendo enokwan-gi ka jo-Jerusalem." 
Psalms87:7 Ji duto nower kendo nomiel, ka wacho niya, “Sokni mawa duto wuok mana kuomi.”" 
Psalms88:1 A Ruoth Nyasaye ma Jawarna, aywakni odiechieng’ gotieno duto pile." 
Psalms88:2 Winj lemona, kendo chik iti ni ywakna mondo ikonya," 
Psalms88:3 nikech thagruok mang’eny osemaka, kendo an mana e lak tho." 
Psalms88:4 An achiel kuom jogo duto machiegni tho, kendo tekona duto orumo." 
Psalms88:5 Ojwang’a e kind joma otho. Adier, achalo gi ng’ama onegi, monindo ei liel, ma wiyi osewilgo chuth, kendo ma koro ok nyal konyo." 
Psalms88:6 Isewita e pier bur piny. En bur motimo mudho, kendo matut miwuoro!" 
Psalms88:7 Ikuma marach kikecho, kendo apaka mag mirimbi nega." 
Psalms88:8 Isemiyo osiepena oringa. Adier, isemiyo achalo ni osiepena, gima bwogogi. Olorna, kendo ok anyal wuok." 
Psalms88:9 Wengena kethore nikech chandruok ma an-go. A Ruoth Nyasaye, aluongi pile, kendo alami kating’o bedena malo." 
Psalms88:10 Bende itimo honni ni joma otho adier? Koso joma otho nyalo chier, mi paki?" 
Psalms88:11 Bende joma otho winjo wach herani mosiko? Koso bende giwinjo wach ng’wononi e piny joma othono? 
Psalms88:12 Bende honni mitimo nenore kama otimo mudhono? Koso bende ng’wononi nenore e piny ma wich owilgono. 
Psalms88:13 A Ruoth Nyasaye, aluongi mondo ikonya. Alami okinyi kokinyi." 
Psalms88:14 Ere gima omiyo idaga, A Ruoth Nyasaye? Ang’o momiyo ipandona wang’i?" 
Psalms88:15 Chakre tinna aseyudo chandruok machiegni nega. Thagruok misemiya, osetieko tekona." 
Psalms88:16 Mirimbi mager nega dwaro nyuma ka apaka, kendo monj malich misemonjago omiya luoro ma dwaro nega." 
Psalms88:17 Odiechieng’ duto gilwora mana ka ataro, kendo gigeng’ona koni gi koni." 
Psalms88:18 Isemiyo koda ka osiepena mohera oringa. Tinde mudho kende e osiepna modong’! 
Psalms89:1 A Ruoth Nyasaye, abiro pako herani mosiko gi wer, kendo abiro hulo adiera mari ni tienge duto nyaka chieng’." 
Psalms89:2 Ang’eyo ni herani osiko, kendo ni adiera mari ogurore mochwere ka polo." 
Psalms89:3 Ne iwacho niya, “Asetimo singruok gi Daudi, jatichna ma aseyiero, mowir gi mo," 
Psalms89:4 ka anyise ni kothe biro bet ruoth ndalo duto, kendo ni anarit lochne nyaka chieng’.”" 
Psalms89:5 Polo pako honni mitimo. A Ruoth Nyasaye, malaika magi pako adiera mari." 
Psalms89:6 Onge nyasaye e polo machal kodi, yaye Ruoth Nyasaye. Ooyo, onge moro marom kodi." 
Psalms89:7 In ema malaika miyi luor e buch polo. Ee, oluori moloyo malaika duto man buti." 
Psalms89:8 A Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto, ere ng’ama romo kodi gi duong’? Itimo gik moko duto gi adiera, yaye Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Psalms89:9 In gi loch kuom nam, kendo ikueyo apaka mage madongo." 
Psalms89:10 Ne igoyo Rahab ma ondieg nam, minego. Wasiki bende ne iloyo gi tekoni mang’ongo." 
Psalms89:11 Polo gi piny gin magi. In ema ne ichueyo piny kod gik moko duto manie iye," 
Psalms89:12 bende ne iketo nyandwat kod milambo. Got Tabor gi got Hermon werni gi mor. 
Psalms89:13 Mano kaka iratego! Adier, mano kaka tekoni ng’eny!" 
Psalms89:14 Lochni otenore kuom tim makare kod ng’wononi. Hera gi adiera opong’o gik moko duto mitimo. 
Psalms89:15 Joma lami gi wer, kendo modak e ler mar ng’wononi, gin johawi." 
Psalms89:16 Pile giil odiechieng’ duto nikech in. Adier, timni makare miyogi mor." 
Psalms89:17 Imiyowa loch madongo. Ee, ng’wononi ema omiyo walocho," 
Psalms89:18 nimar ne iyeronwa jarit. Adier, in Ng’ama Ler mar Israel, ema ne imiyowa ruoth." 
Psalms89:19 Chon nifwenyori ni jogi, miwachonigi niya, “Aseketo osimbo ewi jalweny marahuma." 
Psalms89:20 Aseyiero Daudi jatichna, mi awire gi mo ka akete ruoth." 
Psalms89:21 Abiro bedo kode kinde duto mondo akonye, kendo tekona biro miyo obedo motegno." 
Psalms89:22 Wasike ok nomonje mi nyale, kata mana jaricho ok noloye." 
Psalms89:23 Abiro tieko wasike, mi aneg jogo duto mapiem kode." 
Psalms89:24 Pile abiro here, kendo abiro bedone mang’won, bende abiro miye locho." 
Psalms89:25 Anayar tong’ pinye, chakre nam Mediterenia nyaka aora Yufrate." 
Psalms89:26 Enowachna niya, ‘In e wuora kendo Nyasacha. Bende in e lwandana ma ageng’orae.’" 
Psalms89:27 Abiro miyo obed wuoda makayo, kendo ruoth maduong’ moloyoe ruodhi duto." 
Psalms89:28 Anahere mochwere, kendo anarit singruok mane atimo kode nyaka chieng’." 
Psalms89:29 Pile nyakware moro nobed ruoth, kendo lochne nobed mogurore ka polo." 
Psalms89:30 To ka nyikwaye ok omako chikena kendo ok owuotho e yorena," 
Psalms89:31 bende ka ok gidewo wechena,"
