Psalms89:32 to anakumgi kuom richogi, kendo anasandgi kuom timbegi mamono." 
Psalms89:33 To ok nawe mak ahero koth Daudi kata weyo mak arito singruok mane atimone. 
Psalms89:34 Adier, ok naketh winjruokna kode, ka ok achopo gima ne awacho." 
Psalms89:35 Ne asingora gi nyinga maler dichiel kendo mogik niya, ‘Ok anawuond Daudi." 
Psalms89:36 To pile enobed gi nyikwayo, kendo lochne nosik nyaka chieng’." 
Psalms89:37 Enobed mogurore ka due, ma en janeno maradier e kor polo.’ ”" 
Psalms89:38 To eka in Nyasaye pod isiko ikecho akecha gi ruoth mane iyiero, mowir gi mo! Isejwang’e, mi iweye!" 
Psalms89:39 Iseketho singruok mane itimo gi jatichni, kendo isewito osimbone e buru!" 
Psalms89:40 Isemuko ohinga mar dalane, mi iweyo kuondene mag siro lweny kokethore." 
Psalms89:41 Ji duto makadho kanyo yako gige, kendo ogendini mokiewo gi pinye goyone siboi." 
Psalms89:42 Isemiyo wasike olocho, mi giduto gibedo mamor." 
Psalms89:43 Isemiyo gi lwenjene olokore gik manono, mi oloye e lweny." 
Psalms89:44 Isemaye ludhe mar loch, kendo isemuko kom duong’ne." 
Psalms89:45 Isemiyo odoko moti ka ndalone podi, kendo isemiye wichkuot maduong’." 
Psalms89:46 A Ruoth Nyasaye, ibiro pando wang’i nyaka karang’o? Koso ibiro pondo nyaka chieng’? Nyaka karang’o ma mirimbi biro wang’ie ka mach?" 
Psalms89:47 Parie kaka ngima dhano chiek, kendo kaka ji duto nichueyo ni nyaka tho." 
Psalms89:48 Ere ng’ama nyalo dak nyaka chieng’, mak otho? Koso en ng’a ma disir tho, mak odhi e liel?" 
Psalms89:49 A Ruoth Nyasaye, tinde ere timbeni mane inyisowago ni iherowa? Ere gik mane isingori ni nitim ni Daudi?" 
Psalms89:50 A Ruoth Nyasaye, winjie kaka joma mon kodi yanyo ruoth mane iyiero mowir gi mo." 
Psalms89:51 Giyanye kamoro amora modhiye! 
Psalms89:52 Wapakuru Ruoth Nyasaye nyaka chieng’. Amin. 
Psalms90:1 A Ruoth Nyasaye, nyaka nene isebedonwa kar dak." 
Psalms90:2 Kane pok ochue gode, kata kane piny pok obetie, in e Nyasaye ma nyaka nene kendo manyaka chieng’." 
Psalms90:3 Idwoko dhano e lowo, kiwacho niya, “Doguru un koth dhano.”" 
Psalms90:4 Higni alufu achiel rumoni piyo mana ka ndalo achiel, kata mana ka seche mag otieno manenore ni chiek." 
Psalms90:5 Iywoyo ji, mana ka ohula maywoyo gik moko,, kendo lalgo nono. Gikadho piyo mana ka lek. Gichalo buya ma loth gokinyi," 
Psalms90:6 kendo dongo, mi gol maua, to bang’e ner, kendo tho godhiambo." 
Psalms90:7 Mirimbi osebwogowa, motiekowa!" 
Psalms90:8 Iketo richowa mopondo e nyimi kamaa inenogie. 
Psalms90:9 Mirimbi ong’ado ndalowa machiek, omiyo ngimawa orumo ka yamo makudho." 
Psalms90:10 Hik dhano gin piero abiriyo, to ka ng’ato nigi ngima maber, to onyalo dak higni piero aboro. To hignigo duto kelonwa mana chandruok gi kuyo. Ngimawa rumo piyo, kendo walal nono." 
Psalms90:11 Ere ng’ama ong’eyo teko duto mar mirimbi? Koso ere ng’ama ong’eyo luoro ma gero mari kelo? 
Psalms90:12 Kuom mano, puonjwa wakwan ndalo ngimawa, mondo wabed gi rieko." 
Psalms90:13 Biro bet kinde marom nadi ka pok chunyi olendo, A Ruoth Nyasaye? Yie ikechwa, wan jotichni." 
Psalms90:14 Pong’ chunywa gi hera mosiko okinyi kokinyi, mondo wawer kendo wabed mamor kuom ngimawa duto." 
Psalms90:15 Isemiyowa thagruok maduong’ kuom higni mang’eny, to koro miwa mor maduong’ maromre gi thagruok mane wabedogono." 
Psalms90:16 Nyiswae tijeni madongo, wan jotichni, mondo nyithindwa bende one duong’ni maler." 
Psalms90:17 A Ruoth Nyasachwa, guethni mondo obed kodwa, kendo ikonywa e gik moko duto ma watimo, mondo wadhi maber e tijewa duto." 
Psalms91:1 Ng’at madhi ir Nyasaye Maduong’ Moloyo mondo oyud resruok kata ngat mosiko e tipo mar Ng’at Manyalo Gik Moko Duto," 
Psalms91:2 nyalo wacho ni Nyasaye niya, “In e kar konyruokna kendo ohingana, In e Nyasacha ma ageno kuome.”" 
Psalms91:3 Nyasaye nokonyi adier kuom masiche duto mopondo, kendo kuom tuoche manego ji." 
Psalms91:4 Enoumi gi buombene, mi iyue e tipone gi kue. Adierane biro bedoni ka okumba kod gigi mag lweny." 
Psalms91:5 Ok inibed kiluoro masira moro gotieno, kata gima nyalo hinyi apoya godiechieng’." 
Psalms91:6 Bende ok iniluor tho magoyo ji ka piny olil, kata tuoche manego ji ka piny ler." 
Psalms91:7 Ji gana nyalo podho buti, Ee, ji gana gi gana nyalo tho machiegni kodi, to in onge gima nyalo hinyi." 
Psalms91:8 Inirang aranga mi ine kaka joricho yudo kum. 
Psalms91:9 Ne ikawo Nyasaye Maduong’ Moloyo, kaka kar konyruokni kendo kar dakni," 
Psalms91:10 omiyo masira moro ok nomaki, bende kata mana gimoro marach ok nobi machiegni gi dalani." 
Psalms91:11 Nyasaye biro keto malaikane mondo oriti, kendo okonyi kamoro amora midhiye." 
Psalms91:12 Ginitayi gi lwetgi, mondo kik ichwany tiendeni e kite." 
Psalms91:13 Ininyon sibuoche gi thuonde. Koda ka sibuoche mager kod thuonde malich man gi kwiri. 
Psalms91:14 Nyasaye owacho niya, “Anawar joma ohera, kendo nakony jogo mong’eya." 
Psalms91:15 Ka giywakna, to nadwokgi, kendo ka gin e chandruok, to anabed kodgi. Anaresgi, kendo anami gibed joma oluor." 
Psalms91:16 Anami gidag aming’a, mondo gibed mamor gi warruok ma amiyogi.”" 
Psalms92:1 A Ruoth Nyasaye Maduong’ Moloyo, goyoni erokamano kendo pako nyingi en gima ber." 
Psalms92:2 Ee, en gima long’o hulo herani mosiko okinyi kokinyi, kaachiel gi adierani otieno kotieno," 
Psalms92:3 kigoyoni thumbe mamit. 
Psalms92:4 A Ruoth Nyasaye, timbeni madongo miya mor, kendo awer gi ilo nikech gik ma isetimo." 
Psalms92:5 Mano kaka timbeni dongo yaye Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo mano kaka paroni tut!" 
Psalms92:6 Nitie gimoro ma ng’ama ofuwo ok nyal ng’eyo. Adier, ng’ama ming’ ok nyal winjo ni," 
Psalms92:7 joma timbegi mono dongo ka buya, kendo joricho dhi nyime maber, to kata kamano, notiekgi duto chuth," 
Psalms92:8 nikech in Ruoth Nyasaye ema in gi duong’ nyaka chieng’! 
Psalms92:9 Wang’eyo ni wasiki biro tho, kendo joricho duto nolo mi ke nono." 
Psalms92:10 Isemiyo abedo maratego ka jowi, kendo iseguedha kimiya mor." 
Psalms92:11 Aseneno gi wang’a ka olo joricho ma monja, bende asewinjo ka giywak." 
Psalms92:12 Joma kare nokar ka yiend othith. Ginidongi mana ka yiend sida man Lebanon. 
Psalms92:13 Gichalo gi yien mopidhi e od Ruoth Nyasaye, ma dongo maber e Hekalu mar Nyasachwa." 
Psalms92:14 Pod ginyago olemo kata ka giseti, bende gisiko ging’ich kendo gitegno." 
Psalms92:15 Mano nyiso ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma lwandana en jaadiera. Adier, tim moro marach onge kuome." 
Psalms93:1 Ruoth Nyasaye e ruoth adier! Orwakore gi duong’ mar loch, kendo oumore gi teko, mana ka nanga. Adier, piny ogurore motegno, kendo ok nyal ng’ingni." 
Psalms93:2 A Ruoth Nyasaye, kom duong’ni osebedo mogurore nyaka chon, kendo intie nyaka nene!" 
Psalms93:3 Kude mag nam walo, yaye Ruoth Nyasaye. Ee, giwalo kendo giwuo." 
Psalms93:4 Ruoth Nyasaye man malo ng’ongo! Oduong’ moloyo wuo mar nam, kendo en gi teko moloyo apaka." 
Psalms93:5 A Ruoth Nyasaye, chikeni osiko, kendo Hekalu mari ler ahinya nyaka chieng’." 
Psalms94:1 A Ruoth Nyasaye, in Nyasaye machulo kuor. Nyiswa kaka ichalo!" 
Psalms94:2 In e jang’ad bura ni ji duto. Koro a malo mondo imi josunga gima giromogo! 
Psalms94:3 A Nyasaye, joricho biro bedo mamor nyaka karang’o?" 
Psalms94:4 Joma timbegi mono biro sungore kendo kawore kuom kinde marom nade? 
Psalms94:5 Ginyono jogi, yaye Nyasaye. Ee, githiro oganda miseyiero." 
Psalms94:6 Ginego mond liete gi nyithi kiye, kaachiel gi jopinje mamoko modak e pinywa" 
Psalms94:7 Giwacho niya, “Nyasaye ok newa. Adier, Nyasach Jakobo ok dew gima watimo!”" 
Psalms94:8 Un joga, ere kaka unyalo bedo joma ofuwo momemore kamano? Unupuonjru karang’o?" 
Psalms94:9 Uparo ni Nyasaye mane ochueyo it ok winj koso? Koso ng’ama nochueyo wang’ donge neno? 
Psalms94:10 En ema orito ogendini! Donge okumogi? Koso ng’ama puonjo dhano nyalo bedo maonge gi rieko adier? 
Psalms94:11 Nyasaye ong’eyo ni paro mag dhano nono. 
Psalms94:12 A Nyasaye, ng’at ma ichiko, kendo ipuonjo chikeni, en jahawi," 
Psalms94:13 nikech imiye yueyo e kinde mag chandruok ka joricho to ichikonigi obadho. 
Psalms94:14 Nyasaye ok nojwang’ joge owuon kendo ok nowegi. 
Psalms94:15 Bura nochak ong’ad kare kendo, mi ji makare duto noyiego." 
Psalms94:16 Onge ng’at mane ochung’ mondo okonya kuom joma richo. Adier, onge ng’at mane ochwaka kuom joma timbegi mono." 
Psalms94:17 Kuom mano, ka dine Nyasaye we konya, to dine asedhi piyopiyo e piny ma ok wuoe." 
Psalms94:18 Pile kane aneno ni tienda dwaro kier, to in Nyasaye ne ikonya gi herani mosiko." 
Psalms94:19 Ka an gi parruok kendo kihondko omaka, to ikueyo chunya, kendo imiya bedo mamor." 
Psalms94:20 In ibet mabor gi jong’ad buch amwor, ma miyo timbe maricho nenore ka gik ma chik oyiego," 
Psalms94:21 kendo ma chokore mondo otim ni joma kare timbe mamono, mi ng’ad ni joma onge ketho buch tho." 
Psalms94:22 To in Ruoth Nyasaye, ema ibedona kar konyruok. In e Nyasaye ma obedona lwanda ma ageng’orae." 
Psalms94:23 Ibiro kumo jogo kuom timbegi mamono, mi itiekgi nikech richogi. Ee, in Ruoth Nyasachwa, ibiro tiekogi." 
Psalms95:1 Biuru wapak Ruoth Nyasaye gi wer. Waweruru gi mor ni jaritwa kendo jawarwa! 
Psalms95:2 Wadhiuru e nyime kwagoyone erokamano, kendo wawerne wende mag pak gi ilo" 
Psalms95:3 nikech Ruoth Nyasaye en Nyasaye maduong’. En e ruoth maduong’ie moloyo nyiseche duto. 
Psalms95:4 Hohini matut mag piny ni e lwete, kendo gode maboyo bende mage." 
Psalms95:5 En gi loch kuom nam, nikech en ema ne olose. Piny bende mare, nikech en ema ne ochueye." 
Psalms95:6 Biuru, wakulre piny e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye ma Jachuechwa, mondo walame, kwagoyone chongwa piny," 
Psalms95:7 nimar en e Nyasachwa. Wan joge, kendo oritowa kaka jakwath rito jambe. Winjuru dwonde kawuono! Owacho ni," 
Psalms95:8 “Kik wiu dok matek kaka ne wi kwereu odoko matek, kane gin Meriba, chieng’ mane gin Masa e thim cha." 
Psalms95:9 Ne gitema kanyo, kata obedo ni ne giseneno gik mane atimonigi." 
Psalms95:10 Ne asin kodgi kuom higni piero ang’wen, mi awacho niya, ‘Gitamore winjo chikena, kendo ok ging’eyo yorena.’" 
Psalms95:11 Mirima ne omaka, mi akuong’ora ni, ‘Ok ginidonj e piny mane adwaro miyogie yueyo.’ ”" 
Psalms96:1 Weruru wer manyien ni Ruoth Nyasaye, un ji duto mae piny ngima, werneuru." 
Psalms96:2 Weruru ni Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo pakuru nyinge. Pile nyisuru ji kaka osekonyou." 
Psalms96:3 Huluru ni ji duong’ne maler, mondo ji duto owinj timbene madongo." 
Psalms96:4 Ruoth Nyasaye duong’, kendo nyaka pake malich! Adier, nyaka miye duong’ moloyo nyiseche mamoko duto," 
Psalms96:5 nikech nyiseche mag ogendini mamoko duto gin mana gik manono. Ruoth Nyasaye to ochueyo polo. 
Psalms96:6 Duong’ maler gi duong’ mar loch okete diere, kendo teko gi ber duto ni e Hekalu mare." 
Psalms96:7 Un ji duto modak e piny, pakuru Ruoth Nyasaye. Dendeuru nikech duong’ne gi tekone." 
Psalms96:8 Miuru nyinge duong’ mowinjore kode, kendo keluru chiwo e Hekalu mare." 
Psalms96:9 Ka Ng’ama Ler othinyore, to un ji duto manie piny, kulreuru e nyime, kutetni." 
Psalms96:10 Nyisuru ogendini duto niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye e Ruoth!” En ema oseguro piny motegno, ma ok nyal ng’ingni, kendo obiro ng’ado ni ji duto bura kare." 
Psalms96:11 Un polo gi piny, beduru mamor, to in nam, wuo, kaachiel gi gik moko duto manie iyi!" 
Psalms96:12 Un pewe, beduru mail, kaachiel gi gik moko duto ma un go, kendo yien duto mae bunge bende mondo okog gi mor e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye," 
Psalms96:13 nikech obiro mondo orit piny. Adier, obiro rito ji duto mae piny gi bura makare kod adiera." 
Psalms97:1 Ruoth Nyasaye e ruoth adier! In piny, bed mamor! Un pinje manie dier nam, bende beduru gi ilo." 
Psalms97:2 Boche polo gi mudho molil olworo Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo lochne otenore kuom tim makare kod adiera." 
Psalms97:3 Mach otelo e nyime, kendo wang’o wasike koni gi koni." 
Psalms97:4 Mil polo mare menyo piny ngima, kendo ka piny onene, to yiengni." 
Psalms97:5 Gode leny nono ka odok e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye ma ruodh piny duto. 
Psalms97:6 Polo hulo timne makare, kendo ogendini duto neno duong’ne maler." 
Psalms97:7 Wichkuot omako ji duto malamo kido mag nyiseche manono. Ee, jogo duto masungore gi gik manono, wigi okuot. Kata mana nyiseche duto kulore e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Psalms97:8 Jo-Sayun mor, kendo joma odak e miech Juda nigi ilo, nikech buche ming’ado, yaye Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Psalms97:9 A Ruoth Nyasaye Maduong’ Moloyo, in ruodh piny ngima, kendo iduong’ moloyo nyiseche mamoko duto." 
Psalms97:10 A Nyasaye, ihero joma mon gi richo. Irito ngima jogi, kendo iresogi e lwet joricho." 
Psalms97:11 Ler rieny kuom joma kare, kendo mor mana ni kuom joma beyo." 
Psalms97:12 Un joma kare duto, beduru gi ilo, kendo pakuru Nyasaye kuom gik mosetimo." 
Psalms98:1 Weruru wer manyien ni Ruoth Nyasaye, nimar osetimo gik malich miwuoro, kendo oselocho gi tekone maler." 
Psalms98:2 Ruoth Nyasaye ne onyiso ji ni oselocho, mi ne omiyo ogendini ong’eyo ratiro kaka oreso ji." 
Psalms98:3 Orito singruok mane otimo kod jo-Israel, gi adiera, konyisogo ni oherogi gi hera mosiko. Ji duto oseneno resruok moa kuom Nyasachwa." 
Psalms98:4 Un ji duto modak e piny, weruru ni Ruoth Nyasaye gi ilo. Ee, pakeuru gi wer, kukok gi mor." 
Psalms98:5 Weruru ni Ruoth Nyasaye wende pak gi thum. Adier, gouru thumbe mamit," 
Psalms98:6 kaachiel gi asili kod tung’, kukok gi ilo e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye ma ruodhwa." 
Psalms98:7 In nam, wuo, kaachiel gi gik moko manie iyi. To in piny, kod ji duto modak e iyi, weruru." 
Psalms98:8 Un nembe madongo, pamuru, kendo un gode, weruru gi ilo kanyakla ni Ruoth Nyasaye," 
Psalms98:9 nimar obiro mondo orit piny. Adier, obiro rito ogendini duto mae piny gi bura makare kod adiera." 
Psalms99:1 Ruoth Nyasaye e ruoth, kendo mano miyo ogendini kirni! Obet e kom duong’ne ewi kerubi, kendo piny yiengni!" 
Psalms99:2 Ruoth Nyasaye duong’ e Sayun. En gi loch kuom ogendini duto. 
Psalms99:3 Ng’ato ka ng’ato nopak nyinge maduong’ kendo malich. Mano kaka oler manade! 
Psalms99:4 En Ruoth maduong’ mohero gik makare. Osekelo adiera e Israel, ma piny nyikwa Jakobo. Ee, osekelo tim maber gi bura makare." 
Psalms99:5 Pakuru Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachwa, kendo lameuru e nyim kom duong’ne. Mano kaka oler manade!" 
Psalms99:6 Musa gi Harun ne jodolo mage. Samuel bende ne achiel kuom joma lame. Giduto ne giywak ni Ruoth Nyasaye, mi owinjogi." 
Psalms99:7 Ne owuoyo kodgi gi e siro mar bor polo. Bang’e ne girito chike kod buche mane omiyogi. 
Psalms99:8 A Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachwa, ne iwinjo ywak jogi, mi inyisogi ni in e Nyasaye ma ng’wono ni ji, kata obedo ni ne ikumogi kuom richogi kamano." 
Psalms99:9 Pakuru Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachwa, kendo lameuru e gode maler, nimar Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachwa en Nyasaye maler." 
Psalms100:1 Un ogendini duto mae piny weruru ni Ruoth Nyasaye gi mor. 
Psalms100:2 Lameuru gi ilo, kendo biuru nyime kuwer gi mor." 
Psalms100:3 Ng’euru ni Ruoth Nyasaye e Nyasaye. En ema ne ochueyowa, kendo wan mage. Adier, wan joge, kendo oritowa kaka jakwath rito jambe." 
Psalms100:4 Donjuru ei Hekalu mare kugoyo erokamano, kendo pakeuru e laru mar ode. Ee, goneuru erokamano, kendo dendeuru." 
Psalms100:5 Ruoth Nyasaye ber, kendo herane mosiko ochwere. Adierane bende ok norum!" 
Psalms101:1 Wer ma aweroni, loso kuom ng’wono kod adiera, kendo in ema aweronigo, A Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Psalms101:2 Abiro keto chunya mondo atim tim makare. To ibiro biro ira karang’o? Abiro bedo gi ngima modimbore e oda. 
Psalms101:3 Adier, abiro bet mabor gi richo. Asin gi timbe joma weyo Nyasaye, kendo ok nariwra kodgi kata matin." 
Psalms101:4 Ok nabed jamganga ngang’ bende kata mana paro timo richo ok napar. 
Psalms101:5 Anatiek ng’ato ang’ata maketho nying wadgi gi weche maricho, kendo ok nayie gi ng’at ma jasunga mochayo ji." 
Psalms101:6 Anayie mana gi jogo ma oluoro Nyasaye, kendo anawe gidag koda. Ng’at ma jaadiera chutho ema nobed jatichna." 
Psalms101:7 Onge ng’at ma jawuondre ma nodag e oda, kendo ok nane jamriambo e wang’a." 
Psalms101:8 Odiechieng’ kodiechieng’ ananeg joricho e pinya. Anariemb joma timbegi mono duto e dala Ruoth Nyasaye. 
Psalms102:1 A Ruoth Nyasaye, chik iti ni lemona, kendo winj ywakna mondo ikonya." 
Psalms102:2 Kik ipandna wang’i ka an e chandruok, to chik iti mondo iyie idwoka piyo ka aluongi." 
Psalms102:3 Ngimana lal nono mana ka iro, kendo denda wang’ ka mach." 
Psalms102:4 Chunya ool mana ka lum moner, kendo dhoga rach ma ok anyal chiemo." 
Psalms102:5 Achur matek, kendo adong’ mana choke lilo." 
Psalms102:6 Achalo gi winyo modak kende e thim, kata ka tula modak e gunda." 
Psalms102:7 Ariera piny, to nindo otamore tera. Achalo gi winyo mong’ichno kende ewi tado." 
Psalms102:8 Wasika yanya pile odiechieng’ duto, kendo jogo majara kuong’o ji gi nyinga." 
Psalms102:9 Buru e chiemba, kendo pi wang’a ton kuom gima amadho," 
Psalms102:10 nikech mirimbi mager. Iseyudha, mi iwita mabor!" 
Psalms102:11 Ngimana kadho piyo mana ka tipo mar odhiambo, kendo achalo gi lum maner." 
Psalms102:12 To Ruoth Nyasaye, in ruoth nyaka chieng’ kendo tienge duto nopari." 
Psalms102:13 Ibiro a malo mi ikech Sayun, nikech kinde osechopo monego kechee, bende mae sa mowinjore." 
Psalms102:14 Jotichni ohero Sayun, kata obedo ni okethe kamano! Adier, kata obedo ni odong’ mana gunda, to pod gikeche akecha." 
Psalms102:15 Ogendini duto nomi nying Ruoth Nyasaye duong’, kendo ruodhi mag piny noluor tekone." 
Psalms102:16 E kinde ma Ruoth Nyasaye nochak ogerie Sayun kendo, to enothinyre gi duong’." 
Psalms102:17 Enowinj ywak joge mosejwang’, kendo enochik ite ni lemogi." 
Psalms102:18 Nyaka ndik gik ma Ruoth Nyasaye osetimo, mondo joma biro mapok onywol, chieng’ moro opake." 
Psalms102:19 Ruoth Nyasaye norango piny gi e kar dakne maler man malo. Ee, nong’iyo piny gi e polo," 
Psalms102:20 mondo owinj ywak ma joma otue ywakgo, kendo mondo ogony jogo mane ong’adnigi buch tho." 
Psalms102:21 Kuom mano, ji nohul nying Ruoth Nyasaye e Sayun. Adier, ginipake e Jerusalem," 
Psalms102:22 e kinde ma ogendini gi ruodhigi nochokre kanyakla mondo olame. 
Psalms102:23 Ruoth Nyasaye nomiyo abedo mayomno kapod atin, kendo osemiyo ngimana ong’adore machiek." 
Psalms102:24 In Ruoth Nyasaye to ingima nyaka chieng’. 
Psalms102:25 Chon gi lala ne ichueyo piny, kiketo mise mare, kendo ne iloso polo gi lweti iwuon." 
Psalms102:26 Gin to ginirum; in to isiko mochwere. Giduto ginidok moti, kaka law doko moti, kendo inilokgi kaka iloko law mi girum chuth." 
Psalms102:27 In to isiko mana in, kendo hiki ok norum" 
Psalms102:28 Kuom mano, nyithindwa nodag gi kue, kendo pile inirit nyikwagi." 
Psalms103:1 A chunya, pak Ruoth Nyasaye! Dend nyinge maler, in tekra duto." 
Psalms103:2 A Yaye chunya, pak Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo wiyi kik wil gi ng’wonone duto." 
Psalms103:3 En ema oweyona richona duto, kendo ochango tuochena pep." 
Psalms103:4 Oresa e tho kendo oguedha gi hera kod ng’wono. 
Psalms103:5 En ema omiya gik mabeyo mogundho e ngimana, omiyo anenora ng’ama pod tin, kendo man gi teko ka sibuor, kata ka ongo." 
Psalms103:6 Ruoth Nyasaye ng’ado ni joma ithiro bura kare, kendo omiyogi gik ma owinjore giyudi." 
Psalms103:7 Ne onyiso Musa gik mane ochano mondo otim, bende ne omiyo jo-Israel oneno timbene madongo." 
Psalms103:8 En jang’wono kendo okecho ji. Iye ok wang’ piyo, bende onyiso herane mosiko." 
Psalms103:9 Ok osik ka odhawnwa kinde duto, kendo ok osik kokecho." 
Psalms103:10 Bende ok okumwa maromre gi richowa, kata chulonwa kuor moromo gi timbewa mamono ok ochulnwa." 
Psalms103:11 To kaka polo bor moyombo piny, e kaka hera moherogo joma oluore bende bor moyombo hera duto." 
Psalms103:12 Ogolo richowa kendo owitogi mabor kodwa, mana kaka yo wuok chieng’ bor gi yo podho chieng’." 
Psalms103:13 Ruoth Nyasaye ohero joma oluore, mana kaka wuoro ohero wuode." 
Psalms103:14 En ong’eyo gima ochuewago. Ong’eyo ni wan mana buru. 
Psalms103:15 Ngima dhano chalo mana lum. Odongo, kendo onenore maber ka maua." 
Psalms103:16 Bang’e yamo kudhe, kendo tere mabor, mi ng’ato ok chak nene kendo." 
Psalms103:17 To hera ma Ruoth Nyasaye oherogo joma oluore osiko nyaka chieng’, bende ng’wonone ochwere kuom tienge duto" 
Psalms103:18 morito singruokne, kendo omako chikene gi adiera." 
Psalms103:19 Ruoth Nyasaye noguro kom duong’ne e polo. En e ruodh gik moko duto. 
Psalms103:20 Pakuru Ruoth Nyasaye, un malaike madongo marateke, mawinjo wachne, kendo morito chikene." 
Psalms103:21 Un ogend polo duto, pakuru Ruoth Nyasaye. Ee, un jotich matimo gik ma odwaro, pakeuru." 
Psalms103:22 Dendeuru, un chuechne duto, kamoro amora ma lochne nitie. A yaye chunya, pak Ruoth Nyasaye!" 
Psalms104:1 A yaye chunya, pak Ruoth Nyasaye! Mano kaka iduong’, A Ruoth Nyasacha! Irwakori gi loch kod duong’," 
Psalms104:2 kendo iumori gi ler mana kaka ng’ato umore gi law. Ne iyaro polo mana ka hema," 
Psalms104:3 mi igero dalani e pige man malo. Boche polo ema iidho ka gachi mar lweny," 
Psalms104:4 Ioro yamo ka jooteni, kendo mil polo ema iketo jotichni." 
Psalms104:5 Iseguro piny ewi mise mare, mondo kik ong’ingni ngang’" 
Psalms104:6 Ne irwako nam kuome, mana ka ng’ama orwake gi kandhu, mi pi noimo gode." 
Psalms104:7 To kane ikwero pigego, ne giringo mi gia. Adier, kane giwinjo kigolo chik kikok," 
Psalms104:8 ne giwalore gia ewi gode, mi giridore ewi holni nyaka kuonde mane iselosonigi." 
Psalms104:9 Eka ne iketonigi tong’ ma ok ginyal kadho, mondo kik gichak giim piny kendo." 
Psalms104:10 In ema imiyo pi sokni bubni e holni, kendo mol e kind gode." 
Psalms104:11 Kamano le ma e bungu yudo pi modho, kendo magwar nego riyo mohewogi." 
Psalms104:12 Winy gero utgi, kendo ywak mamit e yien ma dongo but aorego." 
Psalms104:13 Ioro koth gie polo, mondo ochue e gode, kendo guethni opong’o piny." 
Psalms104:14 Imiyo lum loth ni jamni, kaachiel gi alode ma dhano chamoo, mondo oyud teko mopurogo," 
Psalms104:15 eka oyud divai ma miye mor, kod mor zeituni mamiyo obedo mail, kaachiel gi kuon mamiyo obedo motegno." 
Psalms104:16 Yiend sida mag Lebanon yudo koth mang’eny, kendo ng’ich. Gin yiend Ruoth Nyasaye mane opidho owuon." 
Psalms104:17 Winy gero utgi e bedegi. Nyamnaha too gedo e bedegi man malo moloyo. 
Psalms104:18 Ngau mae thim dak e gode maboyo, to lwendni morokore ema apwoche bwokie." 
Psalms104:19 Ne ichueyo due mondo onyis kinde mitimoe sewni. Chieng’ bende ong’eyo sa ma opodhoe. 
Psalms104:20 Ne iloso otieno, kendo ka piny lil, to le duto manie bungu wuok oko." 
Psalms104:21 Sibuoche ruto, kadhi dwaro chiemo. Gimanyo chiemo ma Nyasaye miyogi." 
Psalms104:22 Ka chieng’ wuok to gidok e bungu, kendo ginindo e gondegi." 
Psalms104:23 Dhano to wuok dhi e tichne, kendo tiyo nyaka odhiambo." 
Psalms104:24 A Ruoth Nyasaye, isechueyo gik mang’eny ahinya! Mano kaka ne ilosogi gi rieko matut! Piny opong’ gi gik misechueyo." 
Psalms104:25 Ne ichueyo nam maduong’ kendo malach, kama gik moko madongo gi matindo mokadho akwana odakie." 
Psalms104:26 Yiedhi kwang’ie, kendo ondieg nam mane ichueyo, miluongo ni Levayathan, tugoe." 
Psalms104:27 In ema girangi giduto, mondo imigi chiemo e sa ma kech ohewogi." 
Psalms104:28 Chutho, kimiyogi, to gichamo. Ee, kiyawonigi lweti, to giyieng’." 
Psalms104:29 To ka ipandonigi wang’i, to githagore, bende ka igolo muchi kuomgi, to githo, mi gidog e lowo kuma ne giaye!" 
Psalms104:30 To ka imiyogi muya, to gibedo mangima. Kamano imiyo gibedo gi ngima manyien." 
Psalms104:31 Duong’ maler mar Ruoth Nyasaye mondo osik nyaka chieng’, kendo onego obed mamor gi gik mane ochueyo." 
Psalms104:32 Ka orango piny, to piny tetni, bende ka omulo gode, to gode dhuolo iro." 
Psalms104:33 Abiro wer ni Ruoth Nyasaye kuom ngimana duto. Adier, abiro dendo Nyasacha e kinde duto ma pod angima." 
Psalms104:34 Mad obed mamor gi wenda, nikech en ema omiyo abedo mail." 
Psalms104:35 Onego tiek joricho e piny. Adier, joma timbegi mono mondo olal nono. A chunya, pak Ruoth Nyasaye! Ee, wadendeuru!" 
Psalms105:1 Gouru erokamano ni Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo lameuru. Bende nyisuru ogendini gik ma osetimo." 
Psalms105:2 Werneuru, kendo pakeuru. Huluru gik madongo duto mosetimo." 
Psalms105:3 Beduru mamor nikech wan joge. Un duto mutiyo ni Ruoth Nyasaye, beduru mail." 
Psalms105:4 Dhiuru ire mondo okonyu, kendo beduru kode kinde duto." 
Psalms105:5 paruru honni mage malich kendo madongo, kaachiel gi buche mane ong’ado." 
Psalms105:6 Un nyikwa Ibrahim jatichne, kendo ma nyikwa Jakobo ng’ate moyiero," 
Psalms105:7 En e Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachwa, kendo tekone okwako piny ngima." 
Psalms105:8 Obiro rito singruokne nyaka chieng’ kuom tienge gana gi gana. 
Psalms105:9 En singruok mane otimo ni Ibrahim, kendo mane otimo ni Isaka." 
Psalms105:10 Ee, Ruoth Nyasaye notimo singruok ma ok rum ni Israel. En winjruok mochwere mane otimo ni Jakobo, kowacho niya," 
Psalms105:11 “Anamiyi piny Kanaan mondo obed mwanduni gi nyikwayi.” 
Psalms105:12 Jo-Nyasaye ne nok, kendo ne gin mana jodak e pinyno." 
Psalms105:13 Ne gibayo e pinje gi pinje, ka gidak kuonde mopogore opogore," 
Psalms105:14 to Ruoth Nyasaye ne ok oyie mondo ng’ato othirgi, nikech noherogi. Bende ne okwero ruodhi, kowachonigi niya," 
Psalms105:15 “Kik umul joga maseyiero, kendo kik utim ni jonabi maga marach.”" 
Psalms105:16 Kane Ruoth Nyasaye okelo kech e pinygi, motieko chiembgi duto," 
Psalms105:17 ne oyudo osemiyo ong’iew Josef ka misumba, mondo oore otel nyimgi." 
Psalms105:18 Ne otueye gi nyororo, mohinyo tiendene. Ng’ute bende ne otue gi ratege," 
Psalms105:19 nyaka gima ne osekoro otimore. Wach Ruoth Nyasaye ne onyiso ji gima ne Josef okoro en adier. 
Psalms105:20 Bang’e ruodh Misri ne ogonye. Ee, ruoth mane rito pinje noweye mobedo thuolo." 
Psalms105:21 Ne okete jatelo mondo orit pinje duto. 
Psalms105:22 Ne omiye teko duto kuom jodonge, kendo mondo ogol chike ni jong’ad ni ruoth rieko." 
Psalms105:23 Bang’e Jakobo nodhi Misri, mi odak e piny nyikwa Hamno." 
Psalms105:24 Ruoth Nyasaye nomiyo joge nyithindo mang’eny, kendo nomiyo gibedo motegno moloyo wasikgi." 
Psalms105:25 Ee, nomiyo jo-Misri obedo mamon gi joge, mi gibedo ka gitiyo kodgi e yor miganga." 
Psalms105:26 Bang’e ne ooro jatichne Musa, kod Harun mane oseyiero." 
Psalms105:27 Ne ginyiso jo-Misri teko mar Nyasaye, ka gitimo honni e pinygi." 
Psalms105:28 Nyasaye ne ooro mudho e piny, mi piny olil ti, to kata kamano jo-Misri ne ok odewo chikene." 
Psalms105:29 Ne oloko aore maggi remo, mi onego rech pep." 
Psalms105:30 Oguende ne opong’o pinygi koda ka ut ruoth. 
Psalms105:31 Nyasaye ne ogolo chik, mi lwang’ni kod kikun opong’o piny." 
Psalms105:32 Kar kelo koth e pinygi, to nokelo mana pe kod mil polo," 
Psalms105:33 kokethogo yiendgi mag mzabibu kod ng’owo, kendo koturogo yien mamoko duto." 
Psalms105:34 Ne ogolo chik, mi dede mokadho akwana obiro," 
Psalms105:35 mochamo oboke duto ma e piny, kaachiel gi cham mae puothe pep." 
Psalms105:36 Ne onego nyithindo machwo makayo duto, ma yawuot Misri mabeyoe moloyo." 
Psalms105:37 Eka ne otelo ni jo-Israel, mogolo e piny Misri, ka giting’o fedha gi dhahabu. Giduto ne dendgi ber kendo gijing’." 
Psalms105:38 Jo-Misri ne obedo mamor ka gi, nikech ne giluorogi." 
Psalms105:39 Nyasaye ne oyaro bor polo ka pasia mondo ogeng’go joge, bende ne omiyogi mach mamenyonigi gotieno." 
Psalms105:40 Ne gikwayo gima digicham, mi okelonigi aluru, kendo nomiyogi chiemo moa e polo mondo gicham giyieng’." 
Psalms105:41 Ne obaro lwanda, mi pi obubnie, kendo pigno nomol e piny mana ka aora." 
Psalms105:42 Notimo kamano nikech ne oparo singruokne maler, mane otimo ni jatichne Ibrahim." 
Psalms105:43 Kuom mano ne otelo ni joge moyiero, mi ogolo oko ka wer gi ilo." 
Psalms105:44 Ne omiyogi pinje jomoko nono, mi gikawo puothe ma jogo osepuro," 
Psalms105:45 mondo gimak chikene, mi girit buchene. Ruoth Nyasaye omi duong’!" 
Psalms106:1 Pakuru Ruoth Nyasaye! Bende goneuru erokamano nikech ober, kendo herane mosiko ochwere." 
Psalms106:2 Ere ng’ama nyalo hulo gik moko duto mosetimo? Koso en ng’a manyalo pake moromo? 
Psalms106:3 Joma orito chikene, kendo ma pile timo gik makare, gin johawi!" 
Psalms106:4 A Ruoth Nyasaye, para, chieng’ mikonyo jogi, mondo abed achiel kuomgi kiwarogi." 
Psalms106:5 We aneye kaka jogi dhi nyime maber, mondo an bende abed mamor e ogandani, kendo awer kaachiel kodgi." 
Psalms106:6 Wasetimo richo kaka kwerewa notimo. Adier, wasebedo joricho ma timbegi mono." 
Psalms106:7 Kwerewa ne ok owinjo tiend honni malich, mane Nyasaye otimo e piny Misri. Wigi ne owil gi timbe mathoth mane nyiso herane, mi ne gipiem kode e Nam Makwar." 
Psalms106:8 To kata kamano, ne oresogi kaka ne osesingore, mondo onyisgo tekone maduong’!" 
Psalms106:9 Ne ogolo chik, mi Nam Makwar oduono, eka ne otelo ni joge mong’ade, mana ka gima en lowo motwo." 
Psalms106:10 Kamano ne oresogi kuom jogo mane mon kodgi. Adier, nokonyogi e lwet wasikgi." 
Psalms106:11 Pi noimo wasikgi ma onge kata achiel modong’. 
Psalms106:12 Bang’e joge noyie ni wechene gin adier, mi giwerone wende pak." 
Psalms106:13 To piyopiyo nono wigi ne owil gi gima ne osetimonigi, mi gichako gitimo gik moko ka pok gipenje mondo ong’adnigi rieko." 
Psalms106:14 Wuoro ne omakogi e thim, mi gitemo Nyasaye ka gikwaye ring’o." 
Psalms106:15 Kuom mano ne omiyogi, to kata kamano, ne okelonigi tho malich." 
Psalms106:16 Kane pod gin e thim, nyiego ne omakogi gi Musa, kendo gi Harun, jatich mowal ni Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Psalms106:17 Eka piny nobarore momwonyo Dathan, kaachiel gi Abiram kod joode." 
Psalms106:18 Mach ne omwoch kuom joma ne luwogi, mi owang’o joma richogo pep." 
Psalms106:19 Jo-Israel noloso nyaroya mar dhahabu ka gin Horeb, mi gilamo kido manonono." 
Psalms106:20 Ne giwilo duong’ mar Nyasaye, mana gi kido mar chiayo machamo lum!" 
Psalms106:21 Wigi ne owil gi Nyasaye mane oresogi gi timbene madongo e Misri. 
Psalms106:22 Ee, wigi nowil gi honni miwuoro mane otimo e piny nyikwa Ham, kod gik malich mane otimo e Nam Makwar." 
Psalms106:23 Kuom mano Nyasaye nowacho ni obiro tieko joge, to Musa jatichne moyiero nochung’ e kinde gi ji, mondo ogeng’ mirimbe kik tiekgi." 
Psalms106:24 Bang’e ne gichayo piny maber mane omiyogi, nikech ne ok giyie ni singruok mar Nyasaye en adier." 
Psalms106:25 Ne gisiko mana e hembegi ka ging’ur ang’ura, kendo ne gitamore winjo wach Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Psalms106:26 Mano nomiyo osiemogi, kowachonigi ni obiro miyo githo e thim," 
Psalms106:27 kendo obiro keyo nyikwagi e kind ogendini mamoko nono, komiyo githo e pinje jogo." 
Psalms106:28 Bang’e jo-Nyasaye ne oriwore e lamo Baal ka gin Peor, kendo ne gichamo misengni motim ni nyiseche maonge ngima." 
Psalms106:29 Timbegigo nomiyo Nyasaye mirima, mi tho marach ogoyogi." 
Psalms106:30 To Finehas nokumo joma notimo richogo, mi tuo marachno norumo." 
Psalms106:31 Gima notimono osemiyo ikwane ka ng’ama kare kendo pod ibiro kwane kamano kuom tienge duto mabiro. 
Psalms106:32 Jo-Israel nomiyo Nyasaye mirima e sokni mag Meriba, kendo gima ne gitimono nokelo ni Musa chandruok." 
Psalms106:33 Ne gimiyo iye owang’, mi ochadho wach." 
Psalms106:34 Ruoth Nyasaye nosechikogi mondo gineg ogendini mokiewo kodgi," 
Psalms106:35 to kar timo kamano, ne gikendore akenda kodgi, mi giluwo timbegi." 
Psalms106:36 Kuom mano jo-Nyasaye nolamo kido mag nyiseche manono, mi mano nolokorenigi obadho." 
Psalms106:37 Ne gichiwo yawuotgi gi nyigi ka misengni ni nyiseche mag jopinje mamoko nono. 
Psalms106:38 Adier, ne gichwero remb yawuotgi gi nyigi ma onge ketho ka gichiwonigi ni nyiseche manono mag Kanaan, mi piny nodoko mogak nikech remo ma nochuerno." 
Psalms106:39 Gin bende ne gidoko mogak gi timbegi modwanyorego, mi giweyo luwo Nyasaye." 
Psalms106:40 Kuom mano, Ruoth Nyasaye nokecho kodgi. Chutho nojok kodgi, kata obedo ni gin joge mane oyiero kamano." 
Psalms106:41 Ne ojwang’ogi e lwet ogendini mamoko nono, mi gibedo e bwo loch joma mon kodgi." 
Psalms106:42 Bende wasikgigo ne othirogi, mi olokogi wasumbgi." 
Psalms106:43 Ruoth Nyasaye nokonyo joge ndalo mang’eny, to gin ne gihero mana piem kode, mi richogi odwokogi chien." 
Psalms106:44 Kata kamano, kane giywak, to nowinjogi, mi oneno chandruok ma gin go." 
Psalms106:45 Ne oparo singruok mane otimonigi, mi oloko parone nikech herane maduong’," 
Psalms106:46 komiyo joma ne oseterogi e tuech okechogi. 
Psalms106:47 Reswa, A Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachwa, kendo golwa kuom ogendini mamoko, iduogwa e pinywa, mondo wapak nyingi maler, kendo wayud mor kuom goyoni erokamano." 
Psalms106:48 Wadenduru Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel higni gi higni. Ji duto mondo owach niya, “Obed kamano!” Pakuru Ruoth Nyasaye!" 
Psalms107:1 Gouru erokamano ni Ruoth Nyasaye, nikech ober, kendo herane mosiko ochwere." 
Psalms107:2 Konyauru pako Ruoth Nyasaye un duto ma osewaro. Osekonyou e teko wasiku," 
Psalms107:3 kendo oseduogou, kogolou e pinje mamoko, chakre yo wuok chieng’ nyaka yo podho chieng’, kendo chakre yo nyandwat nyaka yo milambo." 
Psalms107:4 Jou moko nobayo abaya e thim kendo ne ok ginyal yudo mier ma gidakie. 
Psalms107:5 Kech nokayogi, kendo riyo noloyogi, mi geno mane gin go orumo." 
Psalms107:6 To kane gin e chandruok kamano, ne giywak ni Nyasaye mondo okonygi, mi ogologi e chandruokgino." 
Psalms107:7 Ne otelonigi e yo mochikore tir, nyaka ne gichopo e dala ma ginyalo dakie." 
Psalms107:8 Onego gigo erokamano ni Nyasaye kuom herane mosiko, kendo kuom gik miwuoro mane otimonigi." 
Psalms107:9 Ng’ama riyo oloyo, ne omiyo pi modho, mi orome. Ng’ama odenyo to nomiyo oyieng’ gi gik mabeyo." 
Psalms107:10 Joma moko to nodak e mudho, kendo e tipo mar tho. Ne gin joma thagore motue gi nyororo," 
Psalms107:11 nikech ne gipiem gi Nyasaye Maduong’ Moloyo, ka gidagi mako chikene." 
Psalms107:12 Tich matek ne oologi mi gipodho piny, to onge ng’ama ne nyalo konyogi." 
Psalms107:13 To kane gin e chandruok kamano, ne giywak ni Nyasaye mondo okonygi, mi ogologi e chandruokgino." 
Psalms107:14 Ne ogologi oko e mudho, kendo e tipo mar tho, mi ochodo nyororo mane otuegigo." 
Psalms107:15 Onego gigo erokamano ni Nyasaye kuom herane mosiko, kendo kuom gik miwuoro mane otimonigi!" 
Psalms107:16 Omuko dhorangeye mag mula, kendo oturo lodi mag nyinyo." 
Psalms107:17 Joma moko ne tuo nikech richogi. Adier, ne githagore nikech timbegi mamono." 
Psalms107:18 Dhogi ne rach, ma ok ginyal chamo gimoro, kendo ne gichiegni tho." 
Psalms107:19 To ka ne gin e chandruok kamano, ne giywak ni Nyasaye mondo okonygi, mi oresogi e chandruokgino." 
Psalms107:20 Ne ooro wachne, mi ochangogi, kendo ne oresogi e tho." 
Psalms107:21 Onego gigo erokamano ni Nyasaye kuom herane mosiko, kendo kuom gik miwuoro mane otimonigi." 
Psalms107:22 Onego gigone erokamano gi misengni, kendo giwer wende ma nyiso gik moko duto mosetimo." 
Psalms107:23 Joma moko kwang’ e nembe gi yiedhi, kendo giyudo chiembgi e tich nam." 
Psalms107:24 Gineno gik miwuoro ma Nyasaye osetimo e nembe. 
Psalms107:25 Ne ogolo chik, ahiti maduong’ ochako kudho motago nam." 
Psalms107:26 Apaka ne gingo yiedhi malo, kendo nyumo kuonde matut. Chuny jokwang’ noridore, nikech masira malich mane ojukogino." 
Psalms107:27 Ne gipuore kendo gitagore ka joma omer. Riekogi duto ne ok nyal konyogi. 
Psalms107:28 To kane gin e chandruok kamano, ne giywak ni Nyasaye mondo okonygi, mi oresogi." 
Psalms107:29 Ne okueyo ahiti, mi apaka oling’," 
Psalms107:30 eka ne gibedo mamor nikech nam nokue. Kamano Nyasaye nokelogi maber nyaka e dhowath mane gidwaro gowoe. 
Psalms107:31 Onego gigo erokamano ni Nyasaye kuom herane mosiko, kendo kuom gik miwuoro mane otimonigi." 
Psalms107:32 Onego gihul duong’ne e chokruok mar ogandagi, kendo gipake e buch jodongo." 
Psalms107:33 Nyasaye miyo piny ma aora molie doko ongoro, kendo omiyo sokni duono, mi pinje mokiewo kodgi doko motwo." 
Psalms107:34 Piny momew bende omiyo lokore piny motimo kado ma ok nyal pur. 
Psalms107:35 To bende omiyo piny motimo ongoro bedo gi pi, kendo piny motwo bedo gi sokni." 
Psalms107:36 Omiyo joma odenyo dak kuonde makamago, kendo gigero dala mondo gidagie." 
Psalms107:37 Gikomo, kendo gipidho mzabibu, bende gikeyo maber," 
Psalms107:38 oguedho joge, komiyo ginya mathoth, kendo ok oyie mondo jambgi odog piny." 
Psalms107:39 To ka olo jo-Nyasaye, mi osandi, kithiro malit," 
Psalms107:40 to Nyasaye nyiso ni ochayo joma thirogi, komiyo gibayo abaya e thim ka giruenyo." 
Psalms107:41 Oreso jochan kuom chandruokgi, kendo omiyo ginya mang’eny." 
Psalms107:42 Joma kare neno kamano, kendo gibedo mamor, to joricho duto dhogi moko." 
Psalms107:43 Joma riek onego onon wechegi, mondo opar hera mosiko mar Nyasaye." 
Psalms108:1 Aikora, A Nyasaye. Adier aikora chuth. Anawer, kendo anapaki. In chunya chiew!" 
Psalms108:2 Un thumbe bende chakuru ywak. An to abiro chiew ka chieng’ pok owuok! 
Psalms108:3 A ruoth Nyasaye anagoni erokamano e kind ogendini. Ee, anapaki e kind ji mae piny." 
Psalms108:4 Herani mosiko kod adierani bor moyombo polo. 
Psalms108:5 A Nyasaye, nyis tekoni gie kor polo, kendo duong’ni maler bende onenre gie kor polo," 
Psalms108:6 Reswa gi tekoni, kendo dwok lemowa, mondo joma ihero oyud konyruok." 
Psalms108:7 Nyasaye nowuoyo e kar dakne maler, kowacho niya, “Kaka koro aselocho, abiro dhi mondo apog dala mar Shekem, kaachiel gi holo mar Sukoth, ni joga." 
Psalms108:8 Piny Gilead gi piny Manase gin maga. Efraim en oguta, to Juda en ludha mar loch." 
Psalms108:9 Piny Moab to nobed karacha mar lwok, kendo Edom nobed kama aboloe wuochena. Jo-Filistia to anagonigi siboi.”" 
Psalms108:10 A Nyasaye, ere ng’ama biro tera e dala mochiel motegno? Koso en ng’a ma nokela Edom?" 
Psalms108:11 Bende en adier ni isedagiwa? Donge ibiro dhi e lweny gi jolwenjwa? 
Psalms108:12 Konywa kedo gi wasikwa, nikech kony mar dhano ok nyal gimoro." 
Psalms108:13 Ka Nyasaye konyowa to wabiro kedo gi chir, nikech en ema obiro loyonwa wasikwa." 
Psalms109:1 A Nyasaye ma apako, kik iling’," 
Psalms109:2 nimar joricho gi jomriambo josemonja, ka hangona wach." 
Psalms109:3 Giwacho gik malich kuoma, kendo gibuka, maonge gima omiyo." 
Psalms109:4 Kata obedo ni aherogi kendo alemonigi kamano, to pod gimon amona koda." 
Psalms109:5 Gichula richo kar ber, kendo sin kar hera ma aherogigo." 
Psalms109:6 Giwacho niya, “Mad ng’at mamon kode donjne, kendo ng’at marach ng’adne bura!" 
Psalms109:7 Koseyale, to onego oyude gi ketho, kendo mad kwan kata mana lemone ka ketho!" 
Psalms109:8 Hike mondo ong’adre machiek, kendo ng’ato machielo mondo okaw tije." 
Psalms109:9 Nyithinde onego dong’ kiye. Chiege bende onego bed chi liel. 
Psalms109:10 Onego nyithinde bed jokuecho mawuotho awuotha, koseriembgi gia e dalagi mokethi." 
Psalms109:11 Joma osehole gik moko mondo omaye gige duto, kendo joma welo oyak mwandu duto mosekano." 
Psalms109:12 Onego kik ng’ato bedne mang’won, kata kik rit nyithinde modong’ kiye." 
Psalms109:13 Nyikwaye duto mondo otho, mi nyinge lal nono kuom tieng’ mabiro." 
Psalms109:14 Onego Nyasaye par richo mag kwerene, kendo tamre weyo ni min mare richone." 
Psalms109:15 Pile Nyasaye onego par richo ng’atno, to en owuon onego wich wil kode chuth," 
Psalms109:16 nimar ne ok odewo bedo mang’won, to ne osando jodhier gi jochan kod joma ok nyal yudo kaka konyore, mi onego." 
Psalms109:17 Ne ohero kuong’o ji, to koro en ema onego numba dong’ne! Guedho ji bende ne ok ohero, omiyo kik ng’ato guedhe!" 
Psalms109:18 Ne orwakore gi kuong’ ka ng’ama rwako law. Mad en ema kuong’no dong’ kuome mana ka pi ma donjo e okak, kendo leny e chokene mana ka mo!" 
Psalms109:19 Onego giume mana kaka law umo ng’ato, kendo oonego gituere kuome ka okanda motueyo pile.”" 
Psalms109:20 To, A Ruoth Nyasaye, mano kaka onego ikum wasika mawacho gik malichgo kuoma!" 
Psalms109:21 Ruoth Nyasacha, konya kaka ne isesingori, kendo resa nikech herani maber." 
Psalms109:22 Adhier, kendo an jachan. Chunya chandore malit ahinya." 
Psalms109:23 Achiegni lal nono ka tipo makadho. Adier, ahungora mana ka yamo mahungo bonyo." 
Psalms109:24 Chongena onyosore nikech achando chiemo, kendo denda odhero marach." 
Psalms109:25 Ka ji onena, to gigoyona siboi. Gitwenyo umgi ka gijara." 
Psalms109:26 Konya, A Ruoth Nyasacha. Resa nokech herani mosiko." 
Psalms109:27 Yie imi wasika ng’eyo ni in ema iseresa kamano. 
Psalms109:28 We gikuong’a akuong’a, to in yie iguedha. Mad lo wasika duto, to an jatichni mondo abed gi mor." 
Psalms109:29 We wasika wigi okuodi, mi girwak wichkuot ka kandhu." 
Psalms109:30 Abiro goyo erokamano maduong’ ni Nyasaye, kendo anapake e chokruok maduong’," 
Psalms109:31 nikech okonyo jochan, kendo ogologi e lwet jogo ma ng’adone buch tho." 
Psalms110:1 Ruoth Nyasaye ne owacho ni ruodha niya, “Bed abeda korachwich ka nyaka chop aket wasiki obed raten tiendi.”" 
Psalms110:2 Ruoth Nyasaye biro miyo lochni yarore chakre Sayun, kowacho niya, “Bed gi loch kuom wasiki.”" 
Psalms110:3 Chieng’ ma ikedo gi wasiki, to jou nochiwre mondo okedi, kendo yawuotgi nobi iri e gode maler, konur mana ka tho mamoko gokinyi." 
Psalms110:4 Ruoth Nyasaye osekuong’ore, kendo ok nolokre nga’ng’, kuom wachne mowacho ni, “In jadolo nyaka chieng’, e tich dolo mar Melkizedek.”" 
Psalms110:5 Ruoth Nyasaye nie badi korachwichh, kendo obiro loyo ruodhi moko, chieng’ ma mirima omake." 
Psalms110:6 Obiro ng’ado ni ogendini bura, mi omi ringre joma otho pong paw lweny. Adier, obiro loyo ruodhi e piny ngima." 
Psalms110:7 Ruodhni nomodh e aora manie bath yo, omiyo enoting’ wiye nikech oselocho." 
Psalms111:1 Pakuru Ruoth Nyasaye! Abiro goyone erokamano gi chunya duto e chokruok mar joge. 
Psalms111:2 Mano kaka gik ma Ruoth Nyasaye timo lich miwuoro! Ji duto mohero timbenego dwaro ng’eyo tiendgi. 
Psalms111:3 Timbene opong’ gi duong’ kod luor, kendo timne makare ochwere nyaka chieng’." 
Psalms111:4 Ruoth Nyasaye ok we wiwa wil gi timbene madongo. Ong’won kendo okecho ji. 
Psalms111:5 Ji duto moluore, omiyo chiemo, bende wiye ok wil gi singruokne." 
Psalms111:6 Osenyiso joge tekone, kuom miyogi pinje mag ogendini mamoko nono." 
Psalms111:7 Gik moko duto motimo, otimo kare kendo gi adiera, bende chikene duto ogurore ma ok lokre." 
Psalms111:8 Gisiko kinde duto nyaka chieng. Gin weche mogen kendo mar adier. 
Psalms111:9 Ne okelo warruok ni joge, mi otimo kodgi singruok mosiko. Mano kaka nyinge ler, kendo duong!" 
Psalms111:10 Luoro Nyasaye e chakruok mar rieko, kendo joma timo kamano yudo rieko mang’eny. Nyaka pake mochwere!" 
Psalms112:1 Pakuru Ruoth Nyasaye! Ng’at moluoro Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo marito chikene gi mor, en jahawi." 
Psalms112:2 Nyithinde nobed madongo e piny. Ee, nyikwa ng’at maber noyud gueth." 
Psalms112:3 Joode nobed jomwandu man gi gik mathoth, kendo en owuon nodhi nyime maber nyaka chieng’." 
Psalms112:4 Ong’won kendo okecho ji. En e ler marieny e mudho ni joma beyo. 
Psalms112:5 Ng’at makonyo ji gi chuny maler, kendo matiyo tijene e yo modimbore, en jahawi!" 
Psalms112:6 Onge gima nyalo yienge, bende wich ok nyal wil kode." 
Psalms112:7 Ok oluoro winjo weche makelo kuyo, nikech yie ma en go otegno, kendo ogeno kuom Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Psalms112:8 Ok oluor, kendo chunye ok chandre. Ong’eyo ni obiro neno ka olo wasike." 
Psalms112:9 Opogo gige ni jochan gi chuny maler. Ngwonone osiko nyaka chieng’. Obiro bedo gi teko, kendo obiro yudo luor." 
Psalms112:10 Joricho koneno kamano, to igi wang’. Ging’icho marach ka gikecho, bang’e gilal nono. Geno ma gin go orumo chuth." 
Psalms113:1 Pakuru Ruoth Nyasaye! Ee, denduru nyinge, un jotichne." 
Psalms113:2 Pakuru nyinge pile, kendo nyaka chieng’." 
Psalms113:3 Chutho, nying Ruoth Nyasaye mondo odendi, chakre wuok chieng’ nyaka podho chieng’." 
Psalms113:4 Ruoth Nyasaye nigi loch kuom ogendini duto, kendo duong’ne maler oyombo polo." 
Psalms113:5 Onge ng’ama chal gi Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachwa. Odak malo kuma bor," 
Psalms113:6 to kata kamano okulore mondo orang polo gi piny. 
Psalms113:7 Ochungo joma odhier a e buru. Adier, ogolo jochan e pidh yugi," 
Psalms113:8 kendo oketogi gibet gi ruodhi mag joge. 
Psalms113:9 Oguedho dhako ma onge nyathi, mi oloke dhako mamor ma min nyithindo. Ruoth Nyasaye mondo opaki!" 
Psalms114:1 E kinde mane jo-Israel ma nyikwa Jakobo owuokie Misri, ma piny jomoko nono," 
Psalms114:2 Juda nodoko kama owal ni Ruoth Nyasaye, to Israel nodoko mwandune owuon." 
Psalms114:3 Nam Makwar ne ogoyo wang’e kuom Ruoth Nyasaye, mi oringo. Aora Jordan to ne odok chien, moweyo mol." 
Psalms114:4 Gode madongo nochikore ka diek. Gode matindo bende nochikore ka rombe. 
Psalms114:5 Koro in Nam, ang’o momiyo ne iringo? Koso in aora Jordan, ere gimomiyo ne iweyo mol?" 
Psalms114:6 Un gode madongo, ere gimomiyo ne uchikoru ka diek? Koso un gode matindo, ang’o momiyo ne uchikoru ka rombe?" 
Psalms114:7 In piny, yiengni, ka Ruoth Nyasaye biro! Ee, tetni e nyim Nyasach Jakobo," 
Psalms114:8 ma loko lwendni doko degni mag pi, kendo loko lwanda mogingore doko soko mamol." 
Psalms115:1 In kendi, A Ruoth Nyasaye, ema nyaka iyud duong’, to ok wan, nikech adiera mari kod herani mosiko." 
Psalms115:2 Ang’o momiyo ogendini penjowa niya, “Ere Nyasachu nogo?”" 
Psalms115:3 Nyasachwa ni e polo malo, kendo otimo gimoro amora modwaro." 
Psalms115:4 Nyisechegi, to lwet dhano ema oloso gi fedha kod dhahabu," 
Psalms115:5 Gin gi dhok, to ok ginyal wuoyo, kendo gin gi wang’, to ok ginyal neno." 
Psalms115:6 It bende gin go, to ok ginyal winjo, kendo gin gi um, to ok ginyal ng’uecho." 
Psalms115:7 Gin gi lwedo, to ok ginyal mako gimoro, kendo gin gi tielo, to ok ginyal wuotho. Bende gionge gi dwol minyalo winjo." 
Psalms115:8 Joma loso kidogo, kaachiel gi jogo mogeno kuomgi, chalo mana gi kido mane gilosogo!" 
Psalms115:9 Genuru kuom Ruoth Nyasaye, un jo-Israel! En ema okonyou, kendo oritou." 
Psalms115:10 Un jodolo ma nyikwa Harun, genuru kuom Ruoth Nyasaye, nimar en ema okonyou, kendo oritou." 
Psalms115:11 Genuru kuom Ruoth Nyasaye un ji duto moluore! En ema okonyou kendo oritou. 
Psalms115:12 Ruoth Nyasaye parowa, kendo obiro guedhowa. Adier, obiro guedho jo-Israel, kod jodolo duto ma nyikwa Harun." 
Psalms115:13 Ee, obiro guedho ji duto moluore, bed ni gin joma dongo kata joma tindo." 
Psalms115:14 Ruoth Nyasaye onego omiu nyithindo mang’eny, un kaachiel gi nyikwau." 
Psalms115:15 Onego Ruoth Nyasaye mane ochueyo polo gi piny guedhu. 
Psalms115:16 Polo en mar Ruoth Nyasaye kende. Piny to nomiyo dhano. 
Psalms115:17 Joma otho ma odhi e piny ma ji ok losie, ok pak Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Psalms115:18 To wan, joma ngima, wabiro goyone erokamano pile kendo nyaka chieng’. A yaye, pakuru Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Psalms116:1 Ahero Ruoth Nyasaye nikech owinjo kwayona. Adier, ochiko ite ni lemona" 
Psalms116:2 e sa asaya ma aywaknee. 
Psalms116:3 Tho ne otueya gi tondene, kendo masiche mag liel nolwora. Parruok gi kihondko nomaka!" 
Psalms116:4 Eka ne aywak ni Ruoth Nyasaye kawacho niya, “Ahombi Ruoth Nyasaye, yie iresa!”" 
Psalms116:5 Ruoth Nyasaye ber kendo ng’won. Adier, Nyasachwa en jakech ji." 
Psalms116:6 Orito joma ok nyal konyore kendgi. Ne okonya kane an e chandruok. 
Psalms116:7 A yaye chunya, bed gi geno, nimar Ruoth Nyasaye osebedona mang’won." 
Psalms116:8 Oseresa e tho, kendo omiyo aweyo ywak, bende osekonyo tienda mondo kik chwanyre." 
Psalms116:9 Kuom mano abiro wuotho e nyime, e piny joma ngima." 
Psalms116:10 Kata kane awacho niya, “An gi masira marach ma dwaro nega,” to pod ne asiko mana kayie mana kuom Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Psalms116:11 Kata mana e kinde mane abedo maluor, kawacho niya, “Ji duto gin jomriambo,” to pod ne ayie ayia kuom Nyasaye." 
Psalms116:12 Ang’o ma dachiw ni Ruoth Nyasaye kuom ber duto mosetimona? 
Psalms116:13 Abiro kelone misango miolo piny, mondo agonego erokamano kuom resa." 
Psalms116:14 Bende gik mane asesingora ni nachiwne, abiro chiwone e chokruok mar joge duto." 
Psalms116:15 Mano kaka lit ni Ruoth Nyasaye ka ng’ate moro otho! 
Psalms116:16 A Ruoth Nyasaye, an jatichni, atiyoni mana kaka ne mama otiyoni. Isegonya, mi abedo thuolo!" 
Psalms116:17 Abiro chiwoni misango mar erokamano, kendo abiro lami." 
Psalms116:18 Anachiwni gik ma asesingora ni nachiwni e chokruok mar jogi duto," 
Psalms116:19 machokore e agolini mag Hekalu mari man Jerusalem. A yaye, pakuru Ruoth Nyasaye!" 
Psalms117:1 Un ogendini duto, pakuru Ruoth Nyasaye. Dendeuru un ji duto mae piny." 
Psalms117:2 Hera mosiko moherowago en hera maduong’, kendo adierane osiko nyaka chieng’. Pakuru Ruoth Nyasaye!" 
Psalms118:1 Gouru ni Ruoth Nyasaye erokamano, nimar ober, kendo herane osiko ochwere." 
Psalms118:2 Jo-Israel mondo owach niya, “Herane mosiko ochwere.”" 
Psalms118:3 Jodolo ma nyikwa Harun bende mondo owach niya, “Herane mosiko ochwere.”" 
Psalms118:4 Kendo ji duto ma oluore mondo owach niya, “Herane mosiko ochwere.”" 
Psalms118:5 Kane an e thagruok, to ne aywak ni Ruoth Nyasaye. Ne odwoka, mi ogonya abedo thuolo." 
Psalms118:6 Ruoth Nyasaye ni koda, omiyo ok anabed maluor. Ere gima dhano ditimna?" 
Psalms118:7 Ang’eyo ni Ruoth Nyasaye ni koda, kendo konya, omiyo anane ka olo wasika." 
Psalms118:8 Geno kuom Ruoth Nyasaye ber moloyo geno kuom dhano. 
Psalms118:9 Adier, geno kuome ber moloyo geno kuom ruodhi mag piny." 
Psalms118:10 Ogendini duto ne oketa diere, to ne atiekogi gi teko mar Ruoth Nyasaye!" 
Psalms118:11 Adier, ne giluora koni gi koni, to ne atiekogi gi tekone." 
Psalms118:12 Ne ginur kuoma ka kich, to piyopiyo nono ne girumo ka mach mawang’o kudho!" 
Psalms118:13 Ne gimonja marach, kendo ne gichiegni loya, to Ruoth Nyasaye ne okonya." 
Psalms118:14 En ema omiyo abedo maduong’ kendo man gi teko. En e Jawarna. 
Psalms118:15 Winjieuru kaka jo-Nyasaye goyo mahu mar loch e hembegi! Teko mar Ruoth Nyasaye osetimo timbe madongo. 
Psalms118:16 Chutho, tekone e lweny osemiyo walocho." 
Psalms118:17 Ok abi tho, to abiro mana bedo mangima, mondo ahul gik ma Ruoth Nyasaye osetimo." 
Psalms118:18 Osekuma malich miwuoro, to ok aseweyo atho!" 
Psalms118:19 Yawnauru dhoranga Hekalu, mondo adonj apak Ruoth Nyasaye!" 
Psalms118:20 Ma e dhoranga Ruoth Nyasaye. Joma kare kende ema donjoe. 
Psalms118:21 A Ruoth Nyasaye, apaki nikech ne iwinjo ywakna, mi imiyo alocho." 
Psalms118:22 Kidi mane jogedo odagi, ema koro osedoko kidi motegno moriwo kor ot." 
Psalms118:23 Mano en tich Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo en gima lichnwa miwuoro!" 
Psalms118:24 Ruoth Nyasaye osemiyo odiechieng’ni obedo maber ahinya. Wabeduru mamor kendo mail! 
Psalms118:25 A Ruoth Nyasaye, wakwayi mondo ikonywa, mondo wadhi nyime maber." 
Psalms118:26 Oguedh ng’ama biro e nying Ruoth Nyasaye. Waguedhou gie Hekalu mare. 
Psalms118:27 Ruoth Nyasaye e Nyasaye, kendo osemiyowa ler. Chakuru timo sawo kuting’o oboke e lwetu, kudhi nyaka e tunge mag kendo-mar-misango." 
Psalms118:28 In e Nyasacha, kendo abiro goyoni erokamano, bende abiro hulo duong’ni kaka chalo." 
Psalms118:29 Gouru erokamao ni Ruoth Nyasaye, nikech ober, kendo herane mosiko ochwere." 
Psalms119:1 Joma onge ketho, kendo matimo kaka chik Ruoth Nyasaye dwaro, gin johawi!" 
Psalms119:2 Joma oluwo chikene kendo moluore gi chunygi duto, bende gin johawi." 
Psalms119:3 Adier, joma kamago ok tim gik maricho, to giwuotho mana e yore Nyasaye." 
Psalms119:4 Isemiyowa chikeni, kendo iwachonwa ni onego waluwgi gi adiera." 
Psalms119:5 Mano kaka ageno ni abiro luwo chikeni maber. 
Psalms119:6 Ka arito chikeni duto adimba, eka wiya ok nokuodi." 
Psalms119:7 Bende ka asepuonjora bucheni ming’ado kare, to anapaki gi chuny malong’o." 
Psalms119:8 Anarit chikeni gi adiera, omiyo yie kik ijwang’a ngang’." 
Psalms119:9 Ere kaka ng’at ma pod tin dirit ngimane bed maler? Dorite mana ka omako wachni, A Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Psalms119:10 Atemo tiyoni gi chunya duto, omiyo rita mondo kik awe luwo chikeni." 
Psalms119:11 Akano wachni e chunya, mondo kik akethi e nyimi." 
Psalms119:12 A Ruoth Nyasaye, apaki. Yie ipuonja chikeni." 
Psalms119:13 Chike duto ma isegolo, anaol achiel ka achiel." 
Psalms119:14 Chikeni miya mor, moloyo mor ma mwandu mang’eny miya." 
Psalms119:15 Aparo chikeni matut, kendo arango yore midwaro mondo aluw." 
Psalms119:16 Amor ahinya gi chikeni, kendo wiya ok nowil gi wachni." 
Psalms119:17 Bedna mang’won an jatichni, mondo adag aming’a kendo amak wachni." 
Psalms119:18 Yaw wang’a mondo ane weche miwuoro manie chikni. 
Psalms119:19 Anie pinyka mana kuom kinde matin, omiyo kik ipandna chikeni." 
Psalms119:20 Siso oloya seche duto, kadwaro ng’eyo buche ming’ado." 
Psalms119:21 Ikwero josunga. Ee, joma obaro moweyo chikeni okuong’!" 
Psalms119:22 Gol kuoma ayany kod ajara ma ji chayago, nikech aserito chikeni." 
Psalms119:23 Kata obedo ni jotelo chokore kachano timona marach, to an, jatichni, pod apuonjora apuonja chikeni." 
Psalms119:24 Chikeni miya mor, kendo gin ema gikelona rieko." 
Psalms119:25 Ariera piny e buru koloya, omiyo miya ngima kaka nisingori." 
Psalms119:26 Ne ahulo gik moko duto ma asetimo, mi idwoka, koro puonja chikeni." 
Psalms119:27 Nyisa kaka onego arit chikeni, eka apar chikeni miwuoro." 
Psalms119:28 Kuyo omona yueyo, omiyo meda teko kaka ne isingori." 
Psalms119:29 Konya kik aluw yore mag miriambo, kendo ng’wonna mondo amak chikni." 
Psalms119:30 Aseyiero yor adiera, kendo bucheni ming’ado aseketo e nyima." 
Psalms119:31 Asemako chikeni matek, yaye Ruoth Nyasaye, kik iyie wiya kuodi." 
Psalms119:32 Abiro rito chikeni gi chunya duto, nikech ibiro meda rieko." 
Psalms119:33 A Ruoth Nyasaye, puonja tiend chikeni mondo aritgi kinde duto." 
Psalms119:34 Lerna tiend chikni mondo ariti. Ee, anarite gi chunya duto." 
Psalms119:35 Telna mondo awuoth kaka chikeni dwaro, nikech gin ema gimiya mor." 
Psalms119:36 Miya chuny mohero rito chikeni, kar bedo gi mwandu." 
Psalms119:37 Rita mondo kik adew gik manono, to bedna mang’won kaka ne isingori." 
Psalms119:38 Rit singruok mane isingorinago, an jatichni. En singruok ma itimo ni ji duto moluori." 
Psalms119:39 Geng’na ayany ma aluoro, nikech buche ming’ado beyo." 
Psalms119:40 Mano kaka adwaro ni mondo arit chikeni! Ng’wonna, nikech in ng’at makare." 
Psalms119:41 A Ruoth Nyasaye, nyisa hera maduong’ miherago, kendo resa kaka isesingori." 
Psalms119:42 Eka anyalo dwoko joma yanya, nikech ageno kuom wachni." 
Psalms119:43 Miya teko mondo ahul wachni maradiera kinde duto, nikech genona ni kuom buche ming’ado." 
Psalms119:44 Kamano anarit chikni ndalo duto nyaka chieng’. 
Psalms119:45 Anadag gi thuolo, nikech asetemo rito chikeni," 
Psalms119:46 bende anahul ni ruodhi chikeni, ka aonge gi wich kuot." 
Psalms119:47 Ayudo mor kuom rito chikeni, nikech aherogi." 
Psalms119:48 Aluoro chikeni kendo aherogi, omiyo anapargi matut." 
Psalms119:49 Par gima ne isingori ni nitimna an jatichni, nikech osemiyo abedo gi geno." 
Psalms119:50 Kata kane anie chandruok, to singruok mari, mane omiya ngima, ne ohoyo chunya." 
Psalms119:51 Josunga osebutona ahinya, to pok aleng’ora maweyo chikni." 
Psalms119:52 Aparo chike mane imiya chon, kendo gihoyo chunya, yaye Ruoth Nyasaye" 
Psalms119:53 To ka aneno joricho ka ketho chikni, to mirima pong’o chunya." 
Psalms119:54 Achuogo wende kuom chikeni, kamoro amora ma adakie." 
Psalms119:55 Apari gotieno, A Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo arito chikni," 
Psalms119:56 amor nikech arito chikeni. 
Psalms119:57 A Ruoth Nyasaye, in e gimoro amora ma adwaro. Asingora ni abiro rito chikeni." 
Psalms119:58 Akwayi gi chunya duto ni mondo ing’wonna kaka isesingori. 
Psalms119:59 Aserango timbena, mi asingora ni nyaka aluw chikeni." 
Psalms119:60 Areto mak ariwra mondo arit chikeni. 
Psalms119:61 Ogend joricho oketa diere, to kata kamano wiya ok nyal wil gi chikni." 
Psalms119:62 Achiew dier otieno mondo apaki, nikech buche ming’ado ni kare." 
Psalms119:63 An e kanyakla mar ji duto ma tiyoni, kendo ma orito chikeni." 
Psalms119:64 A Ruoth Nyasaye, herani mosiko opong’o piny. Yie ipuonja chikeni." 
Psalms119:65 Iserito singruokni, A Ruoth Nyasaye mi itimona maber, an jatichni." 
Psalms119:66 Miya rieko mar ng’ado weche kare. Ng’eyo bende mondo imiya, nikech ageno mana kuom chikeni." 
Psalms119:67 Kane pok ikuma, to ne abayo maweyo yoreni, to koro amako wachni." 
Psalms119:68 Iber manade! Mano kaka ikecho ji! Yie ipuonja chikeni. 
Psalms119:69 Josunga ketho nyinga gi weche mag miriambo, to kata kamano, arito chikeni gi chunya duto." 
Psalms119:70 Jogo onge gi rieko, an to chikeni ema miya mor." 
Psalms119:71 Kum misekumago berna, nikech okonya mondo apuonjra chikni." 
Psalms119:72 Chik mawuok e dhogi berna. Moloyo fedha gi dhahabu mogundho. 
Psalms119:73 A Ruoth Nyasaye, in ema ne ichueya, kendo irita maber." 
Psalms119:74 Ji duto moluori nobed mamor konena, nikech ageno kuom wachni." 
Psalms119:75 A Ruoth Nyasaye, ang’eyo ni buche ma ing’ado ni kare, kendo ne ikuma nikech in jaadiera." 
Psalms119:76 Herani mosiko mondo oho chunya, kaka ne isesingorina, an jatichni." 
Psalms119:77 Kecha mondo abed mangima, nikech ahero chikni" 
Psalms119:78 Onego wi josunga kuodi, nikech gidonjona kayiem nono. An to chikeni ema abiro paro matut." 
Psalms119:79 Ji duto ma oluori kendo mohero chikeni mondo obi ira. 
Psalms119:80 Konya amak chikeni gi chunya duto mondo kik ayud wichkuot. 
Psalms119:81 Siso oloyo chunya, A Ruoth Nyasaye, karito mondo iresa. To kata kamano wachni ema pod ageno." 
Psalms119:82 Wang’a koro oowore kuom rango gima ne isingori, to pod apenjo niya, “Inikonya karang’o?”" 
Psalms119:83 An ng’at manono, mana ka puga mobarore, to pok wiya owil gi chikeni." 
Psalms119:84 Onego arit nyaka karang’o ka pok ikumo joma sandago? 
Psalms119:85 Josunga ma ok ong’eyo chikeni, osekunyona bugni mondo anyumrae." 
Psalms119:86 Konya, nikech ji sanda gi weche mag miriambo, to chikeni duto gin adier." 
Psalms119:87 Gisechiegni nega, to ok asejwang’o chikeni." 
Psalms119:88 Ng’wonna, nikech herani mosiko, mondo arit chikeni." 
Psalms119:89 A Ruoth Nyasacha, wachni ogurore e polo kendo nosik nyaka chieng’." 
Psalms119:90 Adiera mari osiko kuom tienge duto, kogurore motegno mana kaka piny osiko kama iseketee." 
Psalms119:91 Gik moko duto pod osiko nyaka chil kawuono mana nikech wachni, nimar giduto gitiyoni." 
Psalms119:92 Ka dine ni ok chikni e kama morna wuokie, to dikoro kum mikumago osenega." 
Psalms119:93 Ok anawe chikeni ngang’, nikech gin ema omiyo isemiyo abedo mangima." 
Psalms119:94 A Ruoth Nyasaye, an ng’ati, yie ikonya nimar asetemo rito chikeni." 
Psalms119:95 Joricho kiya mondo onega, to chikeni ema abiro paro matut." 
Psalms119:96 Ang’eyo ni kata mana gik mabeyo duto nigi gikogi, mak mana chikni kende ema onge gi gikone." 
Psalms119:97 Mano kaka ahero chikni! Apare odiechieng’ duto. 
Psalms119:98 An gi chikni seche duto, omiyo abedo mariek moloyo wasika." 
Psalms119:99 An gi paro matut moloyo jopuonjna, to nikech chikeni ema aparo." 
Psalms119:100 Riekona bende lach moloyo kata jopuonjna, to nikech arito chikeni." 
Psalms119:101 Asetang’ ni timbe maricho duto, nikech adwaro rito chikeni." 
Psalms119:102 Ok aseleng’ora, maweyo chikeni, nikech in iwuon ema isebedo jopuonjna." 
Psalms119:103 Mano kaka chikeni mit. Adier, gimit moloyo mor kich!" 
Psalms119:104 Chikeni ema miya rieko, omiyo achayo timbe duto maricho." 
Psalms119:105 Wachni e taya ma nyisa kama anyono, kendo e ler ma menyona yo." 
Psalms119:106 Akuong’ora ni anarit chikeni makare, mana kaka ne asingora." 
Psalms119:107 A Ruoth Nyasaye, athagora malit ahinya, omiyo miya abed mangima kaka isesingori." 
Psalms119:108 Yie gi lemona mar erokamano, kendo puonja chikeni, yaye Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Psalms119:109 Pile ngimana nie masira, to kata kamano pok wiya owil gi chikni." 
Psalms119:110 Joricho chikona obadho, an to pok aleng’ora maweyo chikeni." 
Psalms119:111 Chikeni gin mwanduna mosiko, kendo gin ema gimiyo chunya mor." 
Psalms119:112 Aseketo chunya mondo arit chikeni nyaka thona. 
Psalms119:113 Amon gi joma nigi chuny ariyo, to ahero mana chikni." 
Psalms119:114 In e okumbana kendo e kara ma apondoe. Singruok mari ema ageno. 
Psalms119:115 Auru kuoma, un joricho, mondo arit chike Nyasacha." 
Psalms119:116 Miya teko kaka ne isingori, mondo abed mangima, bende kik iwe gima ageno, kadhi mak otimore." 
Psalms119:117 Sira mondo abed gi kue, eka arit chikeni pile." 
Psalms119:118 A Ruoth Nyasaye, idagi joma otamore rito chikeni, nikech wechegi opong’ gi miriambo kod kwinyo." 
Psalms119:119 Joricho duto ikwano ka yugi. Kuom mano ahero chikeni. 
Psalms119:120 Luoro ma aluorigo miyo denda tetni. Buche ming’ado bende miyo kihondko maka. 
Psalms119:121 Asetimo gik makare kendo mabeyo, omiyo kik ijwang’a e lwet wasika." 
Psalms119:122 Singrina ni inikonya, an jatichni, kendo kik iwe josunga thaga." 
Psalms119:123 Aserango warruok makare mane isingori ni ikelo, mi koro wang’a ool." 
Psalms119:124 Timna mana kaka herani mosiko obet, kendo puonja chikeni." 
Psalms119:125 An jatichni; kuom mano, miya rieko, mondo awinj tiend weche mipuonjo." 
Psalms119:126 A Ruoth Nyasaye, ma e sa monego itimie gimoro, nikech ji otamore winjo chikni." 
Psalms119:127 Ahero chikeni moloyo dhahabu malerie moloyo. 
Psalms119:128 Kuom mano, aluwo chikeni duto, to yore maricho duto amon-go." 
Psalms119:129 Puonj magi lich miwuoro! Omiyo aritogi gi chunya duto. 
Psalms119:130 Tiend wachni koel, to kelo ler, kendo omiyo weche donjo kata ni ng’ama riekone tin." 
Psalms119:131 Agamo yueyo, ka siso mar winjo chikeni oloya." 
Psalms119:132 Duog ira mondo ibedna mang’won, kaka itimo pile ni joma oheri." 
Psalms119:133 Kik iwe apodhi, to sira kaka isesingori, kendo kik iwe richo hewa." 
Psalms119:134 Gola e lwet joma thira, mondo abed gi thuolo mar rito chikeni." 
Psalms119:135 Ler mar wang’i mondo orieny kuoma, kendo opuonja chikeni." 
Psalms119:136 Pi wang’a mol ka aora, nikech ji ok dew rito chikni." 
Psalms119:137 A Ruoth Nyasaye, mano kaka in jaadiera! Chikeni oriere tir, kendo gin adier." 
Psalms119:138 Chike ma isegolo ni kare ahinya, kendo gin adier chuth." 
Psalms119:139 Mirima wang’o iya ka mach, nikech wasika ok dew chikeni." 
Psalms119:140 Singruok mari osetem, mi onwang’ ni en kare, miyo ahere, an jatichni." 
Psalms119:141 An atin, kendo ok an gimoro, to wiya ok wil gi chikeni." 
Psalms119:142 Timni makare nosiki nyaka chieng’, Kendo chikni en adiera pile." 
Psalms119:143 Achandora malit, kendo chunya parore to chikeni ema kelona mor." 
Psalms119:144 Chikeni ni kare nyaka chieng’, omiyo miya ang’egi mondo abed mangima." 
Psalms119:145 Aywakni gi chunya duto, A Ruoth Nyasaye. Yie idwoka mondo arit chikeni." 
Psalms119:146 Adier, aywakni, mondo iwara, eka aluw chikeni." 
Psalms119:147 Kapok piny oru, to aluongi mondo ikonya, kendo aketo genona duto kuom singruokni." 
Psalms119:148 Seche mag otieno asiko ka aneno, mondo apar wachni matut." 
Psalms119:149 Winja, A Ruoth Nyasacha, mana kaka herani mosiko obet, kendo miya abed mangima, mana kaka berni obet." 
Psalms119:150 Joma kwiny masanda, koro biro machiegni, to gibor gi chikeni." 
Psalms119:151 In to, ichiegni koda, A Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo singruokni duto gin adier." 
Psalms119:152 Asepuonjora chikeni duto chakre chon, kendo ang’eyo ni ilosogi mondo gisiki nyaka chieng’." 
Psalms119:153 Neye kaka achandora, kendo yie iwara, nikech wiya ok osewil gi chikni." 
Psalms119:154 Yalna mondo abed thuolo, kendo imi abed mangima kaka isesingori." 
Psalms119:155 Joricho ok noyud warruok, nikech ok girit chikeni," 
Psalms119:156 to ng’wononi duong’, A Ruoth Nyasaye, omiyo mi abed mangima kaka chikni obet." 
Psalms119:157 An gi wasigu mang’eny, kaachiel gi joma thira, to ok aseleng’ora maweyo chikeni." 
Psalms119:158 Ka arango andhokego, to chunya chido, nikech ok girit wachni." 
Psalms119:159 A Ruoth Nyasaye, neye kaka ahero chikeni. Omiyo mi mi abed mangima kaka herani mosiko obet." 
Psalms119:160 Mise mar chikni en adiera, kendo chikeni makare duto osiko nyaka chieng’." 
Psalms119:161 Joma nigi loch monja kayiem nono, to kata kamano, chikni ema aluoro." 
Psalms119:162 Singruokni miya mor manadi! Amor mana ka ng’ama oyako mwandu mathoth! 
Psalms119:163 Asin gi miriambo, kendo ajokgo, to chikni ema ahero." 
Psalms119:164 Apaki dibiriyo odiechieng’ kodiechieng’, nikech buche makare ming’ado" 
Psalms119:165 joma ohero chikeni nigi kue mar adier, kendo onge gima nyalo miyo gipodhi." 
Psalms119:166 A Ruoth Nyasaye, ageno ni ibiro wara, nikech atimo gik ma idwaro." 
Psalms119:167 Ee, arito chikeni, kendo aherogi gi chunya duto." 
Psalms119:168 Amako chikeni kod buche ming’ado, nikech ineno gik moko duto." 
Psalms119:169 A Ruoth Nyasaye, yie iwinj ywakna. Miya rieko kaka isesingori e wachni." 
Psalms119:170 Lemona otundi e nyimi, mondo iresa kaka ne isingori." 
Psalms119:171 Pile anapaki, nikech ipuonja chikeni." 
Psalms119:172 Anawer kapako chikeni, nikech giduto gin kare." 
Psalms119:173 Pile bed kiikori mar konya, nikech chikeni ema aseyiero." 
Psalms119:174 Mano kaka adwaro resruok moa kuomi! Chikeni ema miya mor, A Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Psalms119:175 Miya ngima mondo apaki. Chikeni bende mondo okonya. 
Psalms119:176 Abayo abaya ka rombo molal, omiyo bi mondo idwara, an jatichni, nikech wiya ok osewil gi chikeni." 
Psalms120:1 Kane an e chandruok, to ne aywak ni Ruoth Nyasaye, mi odwoka." 
Psalms120:2 A Ruoth Nyasaye, konya kuom jomriambo gi jomganga." 
Psalms120:3 Un jomriambo, Nyasaye notimnu ang’o? Nokumu machal nadi?" 
Psalms120:4 Nokumu mana kichielou gi aserni mabitho mag jolweny, kata kiwang’ou gi mach moowore haa!" 
Psalms120:5 Dak e kindu rach mana ka dak e piny Meshek, kata ka dak e kind jo-Kedar!" 
Psalms120:6 Asedak aming’a mokadho gi joma ok dwar kue. 
Psalms120:7 An adwaro kue, to gin gidwaro mana lweny." 
Psalms121:1 Ating’o wang’a ka arango gode. To ere kuma konyruokna biro aye? 
Psalms121:2 Konyruokna a mana kuom Ruoth Nyasaye, ma jachuech polo gi piny." 
Psalms121:3 Onego jaritwa kik we apodhi, kendo kik onur mi nindo tere." 
Psalms121:4 To adier, jarit Israel ok nur, kendo nindo ok tere." 
Psalms121:5 Ruoth Nyasaye biro teloni. En e bathi korachwich ka oriti. 
Psalms121:6 Chieng’ ok nochami godiechieng’, kendo due ok nochar wang’i gotieno." 
Psalms121:7 Ruoth Nyasaye biro riti e masiche duto. Adier, obiro riti maber." 
Psalms121:8 Obiro riti kiwuok, kendo kiduogo, pile kendo nyaka chieng’." 
Psalms122:1 Ne abedo mamor kane ji owachona niya, “Wadhiuru e od Ruoth Nyasaye.”" 
Psalms122:2 Koro eri wachung’ e dhorangeyen, yaye Jerusalem." 
Psalms122:3 Jerusalem noger mondo obed dala ma ji chokoree gi kue kaachiel. 
Psalms122:4 Dhout Israel biroe, ee, jo-Ruoth Nyasaye biroe, mondo ogone erokamano kaka nochikogi." 
Psalms122:5 Kanyo ema nitie ut ng’ado bura, ma ruoth ma nyakwar Daudi ng’adoe bura ni joge." 
Psalms122:6 Lemuru mondo Jerusalem obed gi kue, kuwacho niya, “Joma oheri, A Jerusalem, mondo odhi nyime maber." 
Psalms122:7 Kue onego obed e ohinga mari, kendo dongruok maber bende obed e ut jodongi.”" 
Psalms122:8 Awacho e nying owetena gi osiepena niya, “A Jerusalem, kue obed kodi." 
Psalms122:9 Alemo ni mondo idhi nyime maber, nikech duong’ mar od Ruoth Nyasachwa.”" 
Psalms123:1 A Ruoth Nyasaye in ema arangi, kating’o wang’a e polo kuma kom duong’ni nitie." 
Psalms123:2 Kaka jatich rango ruodhe, kendo kaka jatich ot manyako rango wuon ot motiyone, e kaka wan bende wasiko kwarangi, nyaka chop ikechwa, A Ruoth Nyasachwa." 
Psalms123:3 Kechwa, A Ruoth Nyasaye, yie ikechwa nikech waseyudo ayany marach," 
Psalms123:4 Ka jomwandu ma josunga jarowa kuom kinde malach! 
Psalms124:1 “Ka dine bed ni Ruoth Nyasaye ok jakorwa, to ang’o ma dine otimorenwa?” (Jo-Israel mondo owach niya:)" 
Psalms124:2 “Ka dine bed ni Ruoth Nyasaye ok jakorwa, e kinde mane wasikwa monjowa," 
Psalms124:3 to dine gimwonyowa kwangima, ka mirima mager ohewogi kodwa!" 
Psalms124:4 Ohula dine oywerowa mabor. Chutho, pi dine oimowa." 
Psalms124:5 Ee, dine wanimo e pi mabubni malich!”" 
Psalms124:6 Wapakuru Ruoth Nyasaye, ma ok oseyie mondo wasikwa otiekwa." 
Psalms124:7 Wasetony mana ka winyo mobwodho e obadho. Obadho ne otur, kendo koro wan thuolo." 
Psalms124:8 Konyruokwa a mana kuom Ruoth Nyasaye, ma jachuech polo gi piny." 
Psalms125:1 Joma ogeno kuom Ruoth Nyasaye, chalo gi got Sayun, mogurore motegno, kendo ma ok nyal ng’ingni." 
Psalms125:2 Kaka gode olworo Jerusalem, e kaka Ruoth Nyasaye bende olworo joge, pile kendo nyaka chieng’." 
Psalms125:3 Joricho ok nobed gi loch ngang’ kuom piny joma kare. Ka gibedogo, to joma kare giwegi ditim richo." 
Psalms125:4 A Ruoth Nyasaye, tim maber ni joma kare kendo modimbore." 
Psalms125:5 To chieng’ mikumoe joricho, to kum joma timbegi obam bende. Israel mondo obed gi kue!" 
Psalms126:1 Kane Ruoth Nyasaye odwokowa Sayun, to ne chalonwa mana lek!" 
Psalms126:2 Mano kaka ne wanyiero, kendo wawer gi mor! Bang’e ogendini mamoko nowuoyo kuomwa niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye osetimonigi gik madongo miwuoro!”" 
Psalms126:3 Adier, Nyasaye notimonwa gik madongo miwuoro, kendo mano kaka ne wabedo mamor!" 
Psalms126:4 A Ruoth Nyasaye, chak idwokwa kendo, mana kaka koth mikelo, dwoko pi e aora mosedwono." 
Psalms126:5 Joma chuoyo ka ywak, biro kayo cham gi ilo." 
Psalms126:6 Adier, joma ywak koting’o kodhi, biro dok e miechgi gi cham ka mor." 
Psalms127:1 Ka ok Ruoth Nyasaye ema ogero ot, to tich gedo odhi kanono, kendo ka ok en ema orito dala, to tich jorito ok nyal gimoro!" 
Psalms127:2 Bende onge tiende tiyo matek mondo uyud chiemo, kuchiew gokinyi mang’ich, kendo kudhi nindo molewo, nimar Ruoth Nyasaye ema miyo nindo tero ng’at mohero." 
Psalms127:3 Nyithindo gin mich moa kuom Ruoth Nyasaye. Adier, gin gueth miwuoro." 
Psalms127:4 Yawuowi ma ng’ato onywolo ka pod otin, chalo gi aserni ma jalweny oting’o e lwete." 
Psalms127:5 Ng’at man gi aserni mang’eny ma kamago en jahawi. Ok noloye ka oromo gi wasike e dhoranga dala. 
Psalms128:1 Ng’ato ka ng’ato moluoro Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo marito chikene, en jahawi." 
Psalms128:2 Iniyud gik moko duto misetiyonigi, bende inidhi maber, kendo inibed mamor." 
Psalms128:3 Chiegi nochal gi yadh mzabibu manyago olemo mang’eny e dalani, kendo e sa ma yawuoti olworo mesa ka chiemo, to ginichal gi yiend zeituni maloth." 
Psalms128:4 Adier, ng’at moluoro Ruoth Nyasaye, noguedh mana kamano!" 
Psalms128:5 Onego Ruoth Nyasaye guedhi gie Sayun, e kinde duto mag ngimani." 
Psalms128:6 Onego idag aming’a, mondo ine nyikwayi. Israel mondo obed gi kue!" 
Psalms129:1 In Israel, hul kaka wasiki osesandi malit, chakre tinni." 
Psalms129:2 “An Israel, wasika osesanda malit chakre tinna, to pok giloya." 
Psalms129:3 Ne ging’ado dieng’eya achadha marach, mi giloke mana ka puodho mopur." 
Psalms129:4 To Ruoth Nyasaye ma timne kare, osechodo tonde mane joricho osetueyago.”" 
Psalms129:5 Mad lo jogo duto ma mon gi Sayun, mi riembgi ka wigi okuot, kendo dwokgi chien!" 
Psalms129:6 Onego gichal gi lum matwi e tat ot, to two kapok ong’adi." 
Psalms129:7 Onge ng’ama choke kata matueye wiye wiye. 
Psalms129:8 Kamano ji makadho ok nyal wachonigi niya, “Waguedhou e nying Ruoth Nyasaye.” Kata ni, “Onego Ruoth Nyasaye guedhu.”" 
Psalms130:1 A Ruoth Nyasaye, anie chandruok malit! Winj ywakna!" 
Psalms130:2 Yie iwinj dwonda, kendo chik iti ni ywak maywaknigo mondo ikonya." 
Psalms130:3 Ka da bed ni isiko kiparo richo ma ji timo, to ere ng’ama dichung’ e nyimi?" 
Psalms130:4 To in ing’wononwa, omiyo waluori." 
Psalms130:5 Arito Ruoth Nyasaye gi chunya duto, kendo ageno kuom wachne." 
Psalms130:6 Chutho, arito Nyasaye kaketo chunya, moloyo kaka jarit rito ru piny." 
Psalms130:7 Un jo-Israel, genuru kuom Ruoth Nyasaye, nikech herane osiko, kendo pile oikore ahinya mar reso ji." 
Psalms130:8 Obiro waro joge Israel kuom richogi duto. 
Psalms131:1 A Ruoth Nyasaye, aseweyo ng’ayi, kendo abet mabor gi wang’ teko. Ok adwar chandora gi gik madongo, kata gi weche matek modhiera ng’eyo." 
Psalms131:2 To abolora, kendo chunya nigi kue. Kaka nyathi ling’ mos e bad min mare e kaka chunya bende ling’ mos e iya." 
Psalms131:3 Un jo-Israel, genuru kuom Ruoth Nyasaye, pile kendo nyaka chieng’." 
Psalms132:1 A Ruoth Nyasaye, kik wiyi wil gi Daudi, to parie kaka nothagore malit," 
Psalms132:2 kendo kaka nosingoreni, in Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto ma Nyasach Israel" 
Psalms132:3 kowacho niya, “Ok anadhi dala, kendo ok anadhi nindo," 
Psalms132:4 bende ok anayue kendo nindo ok notera," 
Psalms132:5 nyaka chop ayud kar dak ni Ruoth Nyasaye, ma Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto kendo ma Nyasach Israel." 
Psalms132:6 Ne wawinjo ni Sandug Muma ni Efrata, mi ne wayude e paw Jaar." 
Psalms132:7 Eka ne wawacho niya, “Wadhiuru kar dak mar Nyasaye, mondo walem e nyim kom duong’ne.”" 
Psalms132:8 A Ruoth Nyasaye, bi idonj kar yueyoni, in kaachiel gi Sandug Muma ma en ranyisi mar tekoni." 
Psalms132:9 Onego jodolo bed joma kare, kendo jogi duto onego ogo mahu gi mor." 
Psalms132:10 Ne ihero Daudi jatichni, omiyo kik ilok ng’eyi ni ruoth miseyiero." 
Psalms132:11 Ne ikuong’orine matek ahinya, kendo ok nilokri. Ne iwachone niya, “Abiro keto wuodi moro ruoth, kendo enorit piny bang’i." 
Psalms132:12 Ka yawuoti orito singruokna, kendo ka gimako chikena ma abiro miyogi, to yawuotgi bende nobed e kom duong’ni tienge duto.”" 
Psalms132:13 Ruoth Nyasaye notim kamano nikech oseyiero Sayun kodwaro ni mondo kar dakne obed kanyo. 
Psalms132:14 Nowacho niya, “Kanyo ema nobed kar yueyona nyaka chieng’. Adier, kanyo ema adwaro dakie." 
Psalms132:15 Abiro guedho jo-Sayun gi gik moko duto ma gidwaro, bende abiro miyo joge ma jochan chiemo moromogi." 
Psalms132:16 Anami jodolo mage bedo joma kare, kendo joge nower, ka goyo mahu gi mor." 
Psalms132:17 Kanyo ema naketie nyakwar Daudi moro ruoth maduong’. Adier, kanyo ema nyikwa ruoth ma aseyiero biro bedoe gi loch." 
Psalms132:18 Anami wichkuot neg wasike, to en owuon, lochne nodhi nyime maber." 
Psalms133:1 Mano kaka en gima ber kendo malong’o ka owete odak kanyakla gi kue. 
Psalms133:2 Dak ma kamano chalo gi mo ma nengone tek, mowirgo wi Harun, kendo chuer ka mol e tike nyaka riak lawe." 
Psalms133:3 Bende ochalo gi tho mamol e got Hermon, kendo machuer ka mol e gode mag Sayun. Kanyo ema Ruoth Nyasaye osewacho ni obiro keloe guethne. Guethneno en ngima ma ok rum." 
Psalms134:1 Biuru upak Ruoth Nyasaye, un jotichne duto, ma tiyo e Hakalu mare gotieno." 
Psalms134:2 Ting’uru bedeu malo, ka uchomo Kama Ler, kendo pakuru Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Psalms134:3 Onego Ruoth Nyasaye ma jachuech polo gi piny guedhu gi e Sayun. 
Psalms135:1 Pakuru Ruoth Nyasaye! Denduru nyinge un jotichne," 
Psalms135:2 ma uchung’ e Hekalu mare. Ee, un muchung’ e laru mar od Nyasachwa," 
Psalms135:3 pakuru Ruoth Nyasaye nikech ober, kendo denduru nyinge gi wer nikech ong’won." 
Psalms135:4 Ne oyiero Jakobo mondo obed ng’ate. Adier, noyiero jo-Israel mondo obed joge owuon." 
Psalms135:5 Ang’eyo ni Ruoth Nyasaye duong’ moloyo nyiseche duto. 
Psalms135:6 Otimo gimoro amora mohero, e polo kata e piny, kendo e nembe koda ka kude matut." 
Psalms135:7 Okelo boche polo morweyo kaa e tung’ piny gi tung’ piny, kendo omiyo polo mil e sa ma koth chue." 
Psalms135:8 Ne onego nyithindo makayo duto mag dhano gi mag le e piny Misri," 
Psalms135:9 kendo ne otimo honni gi gik miwuoro mondo okumgo Farao gi jodonge duto. 
Psalms135:10 Ne otieko ogendini mang’eny, kendo onego ruodhi madongo." 
Psalms135:11 Ne gin Sihon, ruodh jo-Amor, gi Og ruodh Bashan, kod ruodhi duto mag Kanaan." 
Psalms135:12 Piny jogo ne omiyo joge Israel mondo obed mwandugi. 
Psalms135:13 A Ruoth Nyasaye, nyingi nosiki nyaka chieng’, kendo humbi nolagi kuom tienge duto mabiro." 
Psalms135:14 Ruoth Nyasaye nong’ad ni joge bura maber, konyiso ni gin kare kendo kong’wononigi." 
Psalms135:15 Nyiseche mag ogendini mamoko to lwet dhano ema oloso gi fedha kod dhahabu. 
Psalms135:16 Gin gi dhok to ok ginyal wuoyo, kendo gin gi wang’ to ok ginyal neno." 
Psalms135:17 It bende gin go to ok ginyal winjo. Bende gionge gi muya e dhogi. 
Psalms135:18 Joma loso kidogo, kaachiel gi joma ogeno kuomgi, chalo mana gi kido ma giselosogo!" 
Psalms135:19 A Jo-Israel, pakuru Ruoth Nyasaye. Dendeuru, un jodolo ma nyikwa Harun." 
Psalms135:20 Un jo-Lawi, pakuru Ruoth Nyasaye. Dendeuru un duto muluore!" 
Psalms135:21 Pakuru Ruoth Nyasaye Sayun. Ee, dendeuru e dalane Jerusalem. Yaye, pakuru Ruoth Nyasaye!" 
Psalms136:1 Gouru ni Ruoth Nyasaye erokamano, nikech ober, kendo herane mosiko ochwere." 
Psalms136:2 Gouru erokamano ni Nyasaye maduong’ moloyo nyiseche duto, nimar herane mosiko ochwere." 
Psalms136:3 Gouru erokamano ni ruoth maduong’ moloyo ruodhi duto. Herane mosiko ochwere. 
Psalms136:4 En kende ema otimo honni madongo. Herane mosiko ochwere. 
Psalms136:5 Ne ochueyo polo gi riekone. Herane mosiko ochwere. 
Psalms136:6 Bende ne oyaro piny ewi nam matut. Herane mosiko ochwere. 
Psalms136:7 Ne ochueyo wang’ chieng gi due," 
Psalms136:8 mondo wang’ chieng’ obed gi loch kuom odiechieng’," 
Psalms136:9 to due gi sulue obed gi loch kuom otieno. Herane mosiko ochwere. 
Psalms136:10 Ruoth Nyasaye nonego yawuot Misri makayo. Herane mosiko ochwere. 
Psalms136:11 Ne ogolo jo-Israel e piny Misri. Herane mosiko ochwere. 
Psalms136:12 Adier, nogologi gi lwete motegno kod bade mojing’! Herane mosiko ochwere." 
Psalms136:13 Ne obaro Nam Makwar. Herane mosiko ochwere. 
Psalms136:14 Eka ne otelo ni jo-Israel, mong’ade. Herane mosiko ochwere." 
Psalms136:15 Farao gi jolwenje, to nomiyo onimo e nam. Herane mosiko ochwere." 
Psalms136:16 Bang’e ne otelo ni joge e thim. Herane mosiko ochwere. 
Psalms136:17 Ne onego ruodhi marateke. Herane mosiko ochwere. 
Psalms136:18 Adier, ne onego ruodhi marahuma! Herane mosiko ochwere." 
Psalms136:19 Ne gin Sihon ruodh Amor 
Psalms136:20 kod Og ruodh Bashan. Herane mosiko ochwere. 
Psalms136:21 Ne okawo pinygi, momiyo joge Israel," 
Psalms136:22 mondo obed mwandugi. Herane mosiko ochwere. 
Psalms136:23 Kane olowa, to wiye ne ok owil kodwa. Herane mosiko ochwere." 
Psalms136:24 Chutho, ne ogolowa e teko wasikwa. Herane mosiko ochwere." 
Psalms136:25 Ochiwo chiemo ni dhano kod le. Herane mosiko ochwere. 
Psalms136:26 Gouru erokamano ni Nyasach polo, nimar herane mosiko ochwere." 
Psalms137:1 Ne wabet piny e bath aore mag Babulon, mi waywak ka waparo Sayun." 
Psalms137:2 Ne wang’awo thumbewa e yien man kanyo. 
Psalms137:3 Joma ne omakowa ne owachonwa mondo wawernigi wend Sayun. 
Psalms137:4 To ere kaka dwawer wend Ruoth Nyasaye e piny jomoko nono? 
Psalms137:5 Kapo ni wiya nyalo wil kodi, yaye Jerusalem, to onego bada ma agoyogo thum, tal." 
Psalms137:6 Ee, ka ok apari, kendo ka ok aparo ni in e morna maduong’, to lewa mondo omok e danda!" 
Psalms137:7 A Ruoth Nyasaye, parie gima ne jo-Edom otimo, chieng’ mane okaw Jerusalem! Adier, ne gisiko giwacho niya, “Mukeuru mondo oruombre piny!”" 
Psalms137:8 In Babulon bende ibiro kethi, kendo ng’at ma ochuloni kuor kuom gik ma isetimonwa en jahawi!" 
Psalms137:9 Ee, ng’at mokawo nyithindi, mochwado e lwanda, en jahawi!" 
Psalms138:1 A Ruoth Nyasaye, agoyoni erokamano gi chunya duto. Apaki gi wer e nyim nyiseche." 
Psalms138:2 Akulora piny kachomo Hekalu mari maler, kapako nyingi nikech herani mosiko kod adierani, kendo nikech iseyaro singruokni, modoko malach ka polo." 
Psalms138:3 Kane aluongi, to ne idwoka, kendo ne itega gi tekoni." 
Psalms138:4 A Ruoth Nyasaye, ruodhi duto mag piny biro paki, nikech gisewinjo wecheni." 
Psalms138:5 Gibiro wero gik ma isetimo, kendo gibiro pako duong’ni maler." 
Psalms138:6 Kata obedo ni in malo chutho, A Ruoth Nyasaye, to pod ikecho joma ni e piny. Josunga bende ok nyal pondoni!" 
Psalms138:7 Kata e kinde ma masiche oketa diere, to irita maber. Ikwedo wasika ma jokwinyo, kendo iresa gi teko mar badi ma kor achwich." 
Psalms138:8 Ibiro timo gik moko duto ma isesingorina. A Ruoth Nyasaye, herani mosiko ochwere, omiyo kik iwe tich ma isechako, mak itieko." 
Psalms139:1 A Ruoth Nyasaye, isenona ming’eya chutho!" 
Psalms139:2 Ing’eyo gik moko duto ma atimo. Adier, ing’eyo parona duto gi kuma bor!" 
Psalms139:3 Inena kuonde duto ma adhiyoe, kod kuonde duto ma ayueyoe. Chutho, ing’eyo yorena duto!" 
Psalms139:4 Kata ka pok awuoyo, to ing’eyo gima adwaro wacho." 
Psalms139:5 Ilwora, mi iketa diere koni gi koni. Adier, irita gi tekoni maduong’." 
Psalms139:6 Ng’ech ming’eyago lich miwuoro! Chutho, otut ma ok anyal winjo tiende." 
Psalms139:7 Ka da bed ni adwaro ringo Roho mari, to ere kuma dapondie?" 
Psalms139:8 Ka aringo adhi e polo, to in kuno. Kata ka ayikora piny, kuma joma otho nitie, to kuno bende intie!" 
Psalms139:9 Ka da bed ni an gi buomba ma anyalo huyogo nyaka ugue, kata ka adak e tung’ nam man yo imbo," 
Psalms139:10 to kuno bende dibedie mondo itelna kendo ikonya. 
Psalms139:11 Anyalo wacho ni mudho mondo oima, kata anyalo nyiso ler marieny kuoma mondo olokre mudho," 
Psalms139:12 to kata mana mudho ok nyal moni neno, kendo otieno lerni mana ka odiechieng’. Chutho, mudho gi ler chalreni!" 
Psalms139:13 In ema ne ichueyo denda duto. Adier, in ema ne iriwo fuondena kaachiel ei mama." 
Psalms139:14 Apaki, nikech in ema iwinjori gi luor. Gik moko duto mitimo lich, kendo odhiero ji. Ang’eyogi gi chunya duto."
