Psalms139:15 Ne ineno ka chokena chakore, kendo ka iriwogi maber ei mama, e kinde mane adongo kuno ling’ling’." 
Psalms139:16 Ne inena kapod ichueya ei ich, kendo ndalo mane oketna bende ne isendiko e kitapi ka pok ochak kwan-gi." 
Psalms139:17 A Nyasaye, mano kaka paroni odhiera ng’eyo! Yaye, mano kaka ging’eny!" 
Psalms139:18 Ka dabed ni anyalo kwanogi, to da anwang’o ni ging’eny moloyo kuoyo. To ka achiew, to ayudo ni pod an kodi!" 
Psalms139:19 A Nyasaye, mano kaka agombo ni mondo ineg joricho! Bende mano kaka agombo ni mondo jonek obed mabor koda!" 
Psalms139:20 Giwacho weche maricho kuomi. Adier, giketho nyingi gi weche mamono." 
Psalms139:21 A Ruoth Nyasaye, mano kaka amon gi joma mon kodi, kendo mano kaka asin gi jogo mapiem kodi." 
Psalms139:22 Mon ma amon go kodgi lich, kendo akwanogi ka wasika." 
Psalms139:23 Nona, A Nyasaye, mondo ing’e chunya. Ee, tema mondo ing’e parona." 
Psalms139:24 Rang ane ka nitie miganga moro e chunya, kendo telna e yo mosiko nyaka chieng’." 
Psalms140:1 Ruoth Nyasaye, gola e lwet joricho, kendo konya e teko jomahundu." 
Psalms140:2 Pile gichano timo richo, ka gidwaro mana dhaw." 
Psalms140:3 Gipiago lewgi mabith mana ka lak thuol. Adier, wechegi chalo gi kwich thuond rai." 
Psalms140:4 Rita, A Ruoth Nyasaye, kuom teko joma timbegi mono. Ee, konya kuom jomahundu madwaro tieka." 
Psalms140:5 Josunga osechikona obadho. Adier, giseyarona tonde e yo mondo amokie." 
Psalms140:6 A Ruoth Nyasaye, awachoni niya, “In e Nyasacha.” Winj ywakna mondo ikonya." 
Psalms140:7 Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasacha kendo ma jawarna, isebedo kirita e lweny." 
Psalms140:8 Kik imi joricho gik ma gidwaro, yaye Ruoth Nyasaye. Chutho, kik iwe timbegi mamono dhi nyime maber." 
Psalms140:9 Adier, kik iwe wasika lochi, to mi bwok ma gibwogago dog mana e wigi giwegi!" 
Psalms140:10 Onego mirni mag mach maliel makwar wang’gi, mondo kik giwuog oko kendo." 
Psalms140:11 Onego joma hango jowetegi kayiem nono kik lochi, kendo masira mondo omak jomahundu, mi tieki." 
Psalms140:12 A Ruoth Nyasaye, ang’eyo ni ichwako joma odhier," 
Psalms140:13 Joma kare biro pako nyingi adier, kendo ginibed ka gilemo e nyimi." 
Psalms141:1 A Ruoth Nyasaye, akwayi ni mondo ikonya piyopiyo! Yie iwinja ka aluongi." 
Psalms141:2 Lemona mondo obedni ka ubani miwang’o e nyimi, kendo bedena mating’o malo mondo obedni ka misango mar odhiambo." 
Psalms141:3 A Ruoth Nyasaye, ket jarit e dhoga, mondo orita, kik awach gima ok owinjore." 
Psalms141:4 Rita mondo kata mana gombo timo richo kik agombi, kata kik akony joricho timo timbegi mamono. Bende kik iwe abed kodgi kaachiel e sewni maggi." 
Psalms141:5 Ng’at makare nyalo kuma, kendo kwera gi ng’wono, to ok nawe jaricho wir wiya gi mo, nikech pile alemo mondo timbene maricho okethre." 
Psalms141:6 Chieng’ ma iwito ruodhigi piny ewi lwendni, to ji noyie ni wechena gin adier." 
Psalms141:7 Chokegi noke e dho bur liel, mana ka agulu motore, mi ong’inyore matindo tindo." 
Psalms141:8 To an, A Ruoth Nyasaye, wang’a osiko kuomi, kadwaro mondo irita. Adier, kik iwe atho!" 
Psalms141:9 Rita kuom obadho ma gisechikona. Ee, resa kuom obeto mag joricho." 
Psalms141:10 Mad joma timbegi mono mok e obathgi giwegi, ka an to akadho mak gimoro ohinya." 
Psalms142:1 Aluongo Ruoth Nyasaye mondo okonya. Adier, aywakne matek!" 
Psalms142:2 Ahulone gik moko duto mathaga, kanyise chandruokna duto." 
Psalms142:3 E sa ma chunya chiegni nyosore, to ong’eyo gima onego atim. Wasika osechiko obadho e yo ma aluwo!" 
Psalms142:4 Arango batha koni gi koni, to ok ane ng’ama nyalo rita, kendo onge ng’ama dewa!" 
Psalms142:5 A Ruoth Nyasaye, aywakni ni mondo ikonya. In e kar konyruokna, yaye Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo in kendi ema adwari e piny ka." 
Psalms142:6 Chik iti ni ywakna, nikech arumo chuth! Konya e lwet wasika, nikech gitek moloya." 
Psalms142:7 Ee, gola e od tuech mondo abi apak nyingi e chokruok mar joma kare, nikech isebedona mang’won." 
Psalms143:1 A Ruoth Nyasaye, winj lemona, kendo chik iti ni ywakna. Yie idwoka nikech in ng’ama kare, kendo ma jaadiera." 
Psalms143:2 Kik iyala, an jatichni, nimar onge ng’ama kare e nyimi." 
Psalms143:3 Jasika osesanda, mi oloya chuth. Oseketa e od tuech molil ti, kendo achalo mana gi joma ne otho chon!" 
Psalms143:4 Kuom mano, chunya dwaro nyosore, nikech oserumo chuth!" 
Psalms143:5 Aparo ndalo mosekadho, kaachiel gi gik moko duto misetimo." 
Psalms143:6 Alami, ka ating’o bada malo, kendo sisom oloya kodi, mana ka lowo motwo madwaro pi." 
Psalms143:7 Dwoka sani, A Ruoth Nyasaye, nimar genona duto oserumo. Kik ipandna wang’i, nono to abedo e kanyakla mar jogo madhi e piny joma otho." 
Psalms143:8 Nyisa herani mosiko gokinyi, nimar ageno kuomi, yaye Ruoth Nyasaye. Bende nyisa yo monego aluw, niikech kuomi ema aketoe chunya duto." 
Psalms143:9 A Ruoth Nyasaye, aringo iri mondo irita, omiyo resa e lwet wasika." 
Psalms143:10 Puonja mondo atim gik mam idwaro, nimar in e Nyasacha. Onego Roho mari bedna mang’won, mi telna e yoo mokue." 
Psalms143:11 A Ruoth Nyasaye, resa kaka ne isingori. Adier, konya e chandruokna kuom ng’wononi." 
Psalms143:12 Neg wasika, nikech hera miherago, kendo tiek jogo duto mathira, nikech an jatichni." 
Psalms144:1 Pakuru Ruoth Nyasaye ma lwandana! Ojiwo bada ni lweny, kendo opuonja kedo." 
Psalms144:2 En e kar konyruokna, kendo e ohingana. Bende en e jawarna kendo kara ma apondoe. En okumbana, kendo en ema ageno kuome. Oketo ogendini e bwo lochna." 
Psalms144:3 A Ruoth Nyasaye, dhano en ang’o ma ding’iye? Koso dhano adhanani to ang’o ma dimi ipare?" 
Psalms144:4 En mana gima nono ka yamo makudho, kendo ndalone ringo piyo ka tipo makadho." 
Psalms144:5 Sud polo machiegni gi piny mondo ilor, eka imul gode, mondo iro owuogie." 
Psalms144:6 Dir mil polo magi ka aserni, kikeyo wasiki koni gi koni." 
Psalms144:7 Rie badi koa e polo mondo iresa, kigola e atarongala." 
Psalms144:8 Konya e lwet jopinje mamoko ma ok wach adiera, to riambo kata mana ka gikuong’ore." 
Psalms144:9 Anawerni wer manyien, A Nyasaye, kagoyoni thum mamit." 
Psalms144:10 Imiyo ruodhi locho, kendo ireso Daudi jatichni." 
Psalms144:11 Resa e lak ligangla mabith. Adier, konya kuom teko mar jopinje mamoko, ma ok wach adier, to riambo kata mana ka gikuong’ore." 
Psalms144:12 Yawuotwa ma pod tindo, onego chal gi yien madongo motegno. Nyiwa bende onego ochal gi kite mopa, ma licho od ruoth." 
Psalms144:13 Derewa onego opong’ gi kit cham duto, kendo rombe manie abilniwa onego onywolre gana gi gana." 
Psalms144:14 Dhowa bende mondo onywolre mang’eny, maonge mobuogo kata motho. Onego nduru moro kik gore e gweng’wa." 
Psalms144:15 Ji ma ok odak kamano gin johawi, kendo joma Nyasachgi en Ruoth Nyasaye, bende johawi." 
Psalms145:1 Anahul duong’ni maler, A Ruodha kendo Nyasacha, kendo anapak nyingi ndalo duto nyaka chieng’." 
Psalms145:2 Abiro goyoni erokamano odiechieng’ kodiechieng,, kendo anapaki ndalo duto mochwere." 
Psalms145:3 A Ruoth Nyasaye iduong’, omiyo nyaka paki ahinya. Adier, duong’ni odhiero ji ng’eyo." 
Psalms145:4 Gima isetimo tienge gi tienge nopaki, ka gihulo timbeni madongo." 
Psalms145:5 Ji nowuo kuom duong’ni maler kod tekoni. An bende napar matut timbeni miwuoro. 
Psalms145:6 Ji nowuo kuom timbeni malich. An bende nahul duongni maler. 
Psalms145:7 Giniol gik moko duto mabeyo misetimo, kendo ginipaki kuom timni makare, ka giwer mamor." 
Psalms145:8 Ruoth Nyasaye jang’wono, kendo okecho ji. Iye ok wang’ piyo, kendo ohero ji gi hera mosiko." 
Psalms145:9 Otimo maber ni ji duto, kendo okecho gik moko duto mane ochueyo." 
Psalms145:10 Kuom mano, A Ruoth Nyasaye, chuechni duto biro paki, kendo jogi biro goyoni erokamano." 
Psalms145:11 Ginitwag kuom duong’ maler mar lochni, kendo gininyis kaka tekoni ng’ongo," 
Psalms145:12 mondo ji duto ong’e timbeni madongo, kod duong’ maler mar lochni." 
Psalms145:13 Lochni en loch mochwere. In e Ruoth nyaka chieng’. Ruoth Nyasaye ochopo singruokne duto, kendo timbene duto beyo." 
Psalms145:14 Okonyo ji duto manie chandruok, kendo oting’o joma obolore malo." 
Psalms145:15 En ema gik moko duto mangima range, kendo omiyogi chiemo e sa ma kech ohewogi." 
Psalms145:16 Oyawo lwete, kendo omiyogi gik moko duto ma gichando." 
Psalms145:17 Yore duto mag Ruoth Nyasaye gin kare. Adier, ong’won e timbene duto." 
Psalms145:18 Ochiegni gi ji duto ma ywakne gi adiera. 
Psalms145:19 Ji duto ma oluore, omiyo gik moko duto ma gichando, bende owinjo ywakgi, kendo oresogi." 
Psalms145:20 Orito ji duto mohere, to enotiek joricho duto." 
Psalms145:21 An to, pile anapak Ruoth Nyasaye. Chuechne duto bende mondo opak nyinge maler nyaka chieng’." 
Psalms146:1 Pakuru Ruoth Nyasaye! A yaye chunya, dend Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Psalms146:2 Anapake kuom ngimana duto. Ee, anadend Nyasacha gi wer ndalona duto." 
Psalms146:3 Kik ugen kuom jotelo mag piny, kata kuom ng’ato ang’ata ma ok nyal warou," 
Psalms146:4 nikech ka githo, to gidok e lowo, kendo chieng’ onogo gik moko duto mane gichano timo, orumo!" 
Psalms146:5 To ng’at ma Nyasach Jakobo konyo, kendo ma ogeno kuom Ruoth Nyasache," 
Psalms146:6 ma jachuech polo gi piny kod nam, kaachiel kod gik moko duto manie igi, en jahawi. Ruoth Nyasaye pile rito singruokne." 
Psalms146:7 Ong’ado bura, kochwako joma ithiro, kendo ochiwo chiemo ni joma denyo. Ruoth Nyasaye gonyo joma otue bedo thuolo," 
Psalms146:8 kendo omiyo muofni neno. Oting’o joma obolore malo, kendo ohero joma kare." 
Psalms146:9 Orito jopinje mamoko modak e piny joge, bende okonyo mond liete gi nyithi kiye, to orocho gik ma joricho ochano timo!" 
Psalms146:10 Ruoth Nyasaye nobed ruoth nyaka chieng’. A Sayun, Nyasachi nobed gi loch mochwere. Pakuru Ruoth Nyasaye!" 
Psalms147:1 Pakuru Ruoth Nyasaye! En gima ber, wero ni Nyasachwa wende pak. Adier, goyone erokamano long’o kendo owinjore." 
Psalms147:2 Ruoth Nyasaye chako gero Jerusalem kendo. Oduogo jo-Israel mane oter e tuech," 
Psalms147:3 bende oduogo chuny joma genogi oserumo, kendo othiedho adhondegi." 
Psalms147:4 Osekwano sulue, mi ong’eyo kar rombgi, kendo oluongo moro ka moro gi nyinge." 
Psalms147:5 Ruoth Nyasaye duong’ miwuoro, bende riekone lach mokadho apima." 
Psalms147:6 Oting’o joma obolore malo, joricho to ochwado piny e lowo." 
Psalms147:7 Weruru ni Nyasachwa wende pak, kugoyone thum mamit." 
Psalms147:8 Oyaro boche polo e kor polo, kendo okelo koth e piny, lum bende omiyo loth e gode." 
Psalms147:9 Ochiwo ni le chiembgi, kendo omiyo nyithi agak chiemo ka giywakne." 
Psalms147:10 Teko mar farese kata teko mar jolweny, ok ema mi Nyasaye mor," 
Psalms147:11 to obedo mamor mana gi joma oluore, kendo man gi geno kuom herane mosiko." 
Psalms147:12 Weruru ni Ruoth Nyasaye, un jo-Jerusalem. A yaye, jo-Sayun, pakuru Nyasachu." 
Psalms147:13 Oseketo lodi motegno e dhorangeyeu, kendo oseguedho jou." 
Psalms147:14 Osekelo kue e tong’ pinyu, kendo osemiyou cham mabeyo mogundho." 
Psalms147:15 Ogolo chik ni tung’ piny gi tung’ piny, kendo wachne chopo piyo ka diemo wang’." 
Psalms147:16 Okelo pe mopedhore ka pamba, kendo okiro tho mamoko e lum mana ka buru." 
Psalms147:17 Ooro kite mag pe mana ka kit ombo, bende okelo koyo, mi pi lokre pe." 
Psalms147:18 Bang’e ogolo chik, kendo pe leny nono. Bende okelo yamo, kendo pi chako mol." 
Psalms147:19 Onyiso nyikwa Jakobo wachne. Ee, ogolo chikene gi buchene ni jo-Israel." 
Psalms147:20 Onge oganda moro machielo ma osetimone kamano, kata ma osepuonjo chikene. Pakuru Ruoth Nyasaye!" 
Psalms148:1 Pakuru Ruoth Nyasaye! Ee, dendeuru gie polo." 
Psalms148:2 Un malaikane, kaachiel gi ogend lweny duto mage mae polo, pakeuru!" 
Psalms148:3 Pakeuru un wang’chieng’ gi due, koda ka un, sulue marieny duto." 
Psalms148:4 Un polo man malo chutho, dendeuru, kaachiel gi un, pige man ewi polo." 
Psalms148:5 Giduto mondo gipak nying Ruoth Nyasaye, nikech en ema ne ogolo chik, mi ochuegi." 
Psalms148:6 Ne ogurogi kuonde ma gintie nyaka chieng’, kuom chikne mochwere." 
Psalms148:7 Pakuru Ruoth Nyasaye gie piny, un ondiegi mae nam, kod nembe matut duto," 
Psalms148:8 koda ka mach gi pe, kod pi malokore pe, kaachiel gi yamo madongo marito chikne." 
Psalms148:9 Dendeuru un gode madongo gi matindo, kod yiend olembe gi bunge," 
Psalms148:10 kaachiel gi le mae thim kod jamni, gi gik mamol, kod gik mahuyo." 
Psalms148:11 Un ruodhi gi jotelo duto mag piny, kod jodongo gi jong’ad bura ma e piny duto," 
Psalms148:12 kaachiel gi yawuowi gi nyiri, koda ka joma oti gi joma tindo, pakeuru!" 
Psalms148:13 Giduto mondo gipak Ruoth Nyasaye, nimar nyinge duong’ moloyo nying moko duto, kendo duong’ne maler oyombo polo gi piny." 
Psalms148:14 Nomiyo ogandane ma jo-Israel odoko motegno, ni mondo joge mohero ahinya opake. Pakuru Ruoth Nyasaye!" 
Psalms149:1 Pakuru Ruoth Nyasaye! Werneuru wer manyien, kendo dendeuru e chokruok mar joge." 
Psalms149:2 A Israel, bed mamor nikech jachuechni. Ee, beduru gi ilo, un jo-Sayun, nikech Ruodhu." 
Psalms149:3 Denduru nyinge ka umiel. Adier, gouru bul kod thum, kupakego," 
Psalms149:4 nimar Ruoth Nyasaye ohero joge. Oting’o joma obolore malo, komiyo gilocho." 
Psalms149:5 Jo-Nyasaye mondo obed mail kuom locho, kendo giwer gi mor e sewni maggi." 
Psalms149:6 Onego gikog matek ka gipako Nyasaye, kendo ka gimako ligengni mabitho e lwetgi," 
Psalms149:7 mondo gigolgo ogendini mamoko, kendo gikumgi." 
Psalms149:8 Bende mondo gitue ruodhi jogo kod jotendgi gi nyororo," 
Psalms149:9 kendo gikumgi mana kaka Nyasaye osechiko. Mano e mor mar jo-Nyasaye! Pakuru Ruoth Nyasaye. 
Psalms150:1 Pakuru Ruoth Nyasaye! Ee, denduru Nyasaye e Hekalune. Pakeuru e polo, kuma tekone nitie." 
Psalms150:2 Bende pakeuru kuom gik madongo mosetimo. Adier, dendeuru, nikech oduong’ moloyo gik moko duto." 
Psalms150:3 Pakeuru gi tung’, kugoyone thumbe mamit." 
Psalms150:4 Pakeuru kugoyo bul, kendo kumiel. Dendeuru gi thum kod asili," 
Psalms150:5 kugoyone ongeng’o! Ee, pakeuru, kugoyo ongeng’o matek!" 
Psalms150:6 Gimoro amora mangima mondo opak Ruoth Nyasaye! Adier, pakuru Ruoth Nyasaye!" 
Proverbs1:1 Magi e ngeche mag Solomon wuod Daudi, ruodh Israel," 
Proverbs1:2 ma biro konyi ng’eyo rieko kod puonj maber, kendo winjo tiend weche matut." 
Proverbs1:3 Ginyalo puonji dak gi rieko, kendo bedo jaadiera e yo makare kendo mowinjore." 
Proverbs1:4 Bende ginyalo miyo joma ok ong’eyo weche mang’eny bed mariek, kendo gipuonjo joma tindo ng’eyo weche mopogore opogore." 
Proverbs1:5 Ngechegi nyalo kata mana medo ng’eyo mar joma riek, kendo menyo yo ni joma nigi winjo," 
Proverbs1:6 mondo ong’e tiend ngeche kod weche matek ma joma riek wach. 
Proverbs1:7 Luoro Ruoth Nyasaye e chakruok mar rieko. Joma ofuwo to chayo rieko, kendo ok dwar puonjore." 
Proverbs1:8 Wuoda, chik iti ni gik ma wuoru puonji, kendo kik idagi gik ma meru wachoni," 
Proverbs1:9 nimar puonjgi biro loso kiti maber, mana kaka kondo kata thiwni miyo ng’ato nenore maber." 
Proverbs1:10 Wuoda, ka joricho temi, to kik iyienigi." 
Proverbs1:11 Ginyalo wacho niya, “Bi mondo wabut ni ng’ato, wanegi, kendo wamonj joma onge ketho kayiem nono," 
Proverbs1:12 mondo wamwonygi ngili ka bur liel. Kata obedo ni gionge ketho kamano, to wabiro negogi, mi gidhi e Piny Joma Otho." 
Proverbs1:13 Bang’e wakaw mwandu mogundho, mi wapong’ miechwa gi gik mwayako." 
Proverbs1:14 Omiyo wadhi kodi, kendo wabiro pogo gik moko duto ma wakwalo.”" 
Proverbs1:15 Koro in wuoda, kata ka giwachoni kamano, to kik idhi kodgi, bende bed mabor gi timbegi." 
Proverbs1:16 Gireto piyopiyo ka gidwaro timo richo, kendo girikni ni chuero remo!" 
Proverbs1:17 Kata ka ichiko obadho ka winy neno, to pod gimokoe amoka." 
Proverbs1:18 Kamano e kaka joricho chiko obadho ni gin giwegi kendo gin ema gimokoe. 
Proverbs1:19 Pile mecho hinyo ng’ama jamecho. Chutho, mano e gima timore ni jakuo." 
Proverbs1:20 Winjuru kaka rieko goyo koko matek e wang’yore kendo e chirni. 
Proverbs1:21 Bende oluongo matek e dhoranga dala, kod kuonde duto ma ji chokoree." 
Proverbs1:22 Owacho niya, “Koro un joma ofuwogi, udwaro chalo kama nyaka karang’o? Koso nyaka karang’o ma ubiro tugoe gi rieko? Un ok unyal puonjoru ngang’?" 
Proverbs1:23 Chikuru itu ka akwerou gimoro. Abiro ng’adonu rieko, kendo abiro puonjou wechena," 
Proverbs1:24 Asebedo ka aluongou ni mondo ubi, to ok usewinja ngang’, bende ok usedewa!" 
Proverbs1:25 Usedagi rieko duto maseng’adonu, kendo ok useyie mondo anyisu gimoro mutimo marach." 
Proverbs1:26 Omiyo ka uyudo chandruok, to ananyieru anyiera." 
Proverbs1:27 Ee, anajaru ajara ka masira obiro kuomu ka koth maduong’, mokelonu thagruok gi rem malit." 
Proverbs1:28 E kinde ma un e thagruok kamano, unuluonga to ok anaduoku, bende unumanya kuonde duto, to ok unuyuda kamoro amora!" 
Proverbs1:29 Pile ne ok udwar rieko, kendo ne utamoru luoro Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Proverbs1:30 Ne udagi winjo wachna, bende ne ok udewo puonjna kata ka akwerou gimoro." 
Proverbs1:31 Kuom mano, unuyud gima owinjore kodu, kendo timbeu uwegi noromu!" 
Proverbs1:32 Ji ma ok ong’eyo gik moko tho mana nikech gidagi rieko, kendo joma ofuwo rumo nikech ok gidew gik moko." 
Proverbs1:33 To ng’ato ang’ata mowinjo wachna nodag gi kue ka onge gima oluoro.” 
Proverbs2:1 Wuoda, mak weche ma apuonji, kendo kan-gi e chunyi." 
Proverbs2:2 Chik iti ni weche man gi rieko, kendo tem matek mondo iwinj tiendgi." 
Proverbs2:3 Adier, dwar rieko, kendo many ng’eyo." 
Proverbs2:4 Dware matek, mana ka gima idwaro fedha, kata ka gima idwaro mwandu moro mopandi." 
Proverbs2:5 Ka itimo kamano, to ining’e tiend luoro Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo iniyud rieko ming’eyogo Nyasaye," 
Proverbs2:6 nimar Ruoth Nyasaye ema chiwo rieko, kendo en ema opuonjo ng’eyo." 
Proverbs2:7 Okonyo joma kare ma jo-adiera, kendo oritogi." 
Proverbs2:8 En okumba mar joma timo ni jowadgi maber, kendo orito jogo ma opadore kuome." 
Proverbs2:9 Ka iwinjo wachna, to ining’e gima ber makare kendo mowinjore. Pile inibed king’eyo gima onego itim." 
Proverbs2:10 Inibed gi rieko, kendo ng’eyo ma in go nokelni mor." 
Proverbs2:11 Rieko kod paro matut noriti," 
Proverbs2:12 kendo ginitelni mondo kik itim gimoro marach. Ginimi ibed mabor gi joma wacho weche makelo miero. 
Proverbs2:13 Gin joma oseweyo yo makare, to luwo mana yor mudho." 
Proverbs2:14 Timo richo gi gik mamono ema gihero," 
Proverbs2:15 kendo gin joma yoregi ogajore ogajore. 
Proverbs2:16 Rieko noresi kuom dhako ma jamganga, ma temo ywayi gi weche mamit." 
Proverbs2:17 En dhako ma ok oluoro chwore, kendo ma ok dew kuong’ruok mane okuong’orego e nyim Nyasaye." 
Proverbs2:18 Kapo ni idhi e ode, to iwuotho mana e yo maridore kochiko tho. Chutho, dhiyo kuno, en mana dhi e Piny Joma Otho!" 
Proverbs2:19 Ng’ato ang’ata molimo dhakono to ok chak duog kendo. Adier, ok ochak oduog e wang’yor ngima!" 
Proverbs2:20 Kuom mano, nyaka iluw yo ma ng’at maber luwo." 
Proverbs2:21 Joma kare kendo modimbore ema nosik e pinywani. 
Proverbs2:22 To Nyasaye noriemb joricho e piny, kendo nopudh joma timbegi mono gi lop tiendgi, mana ka buya mipudho e lowo." 
Proverbs3:1 Wuoda, wiyi kik wil gi weche ma apuonji, to pile par gik ma anyisi mondo itim," 
Proverbs3:2 nimar puonjna biro miyo idhi nyime maber, kendo idag aming’a." 
Proverbs3:3 Kik iwe luoro kod adiera lalni, to tuegi e ng’uti, kendo ndikgi e chunyi." 
Proverbs3:4 Ka itimo kamano,, eka Nyasaye nobed mamor kodi, kendo inidhi nyime maber gi ji bende." 
Proverbs3:5 Gen kuom Ruoth Nyasaye gi chunyi duto, to kik igen kuom riekoni iwuon." 
Proverbs3:6 Par Ruoth Nyasaye e gik moko duto mitimo, eka obiro nyisi yo makare monego iluw." 
Proverbs3:7 Kik iwe chunyi wuondi ni iriek, to luor aluora Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo bed mabor gi richo" 
Proverbs3:8 Tim ma kamano nochalni gi yath maber, ma thiedho adhondeni, kendo kueyo rem ma in go." 
Proverbs3:9 Nyaka imi Ruoth Nyasaye duong’ gi mwanduni, kichiwone cham mabeyoe moloyo ma ikayo e puotheni." 
Proverbs3:10 Eka dereni nopong’ gi cham mogundho, kendo iniyud divai mang’eny ma onge kama ikanie." 
Proverbs3:11 Wuoda, kik icha kum ma Ruoth Nyasaye kumigo, kata kik iyi wang’ kokweri," 
Proverbs3:12 nikech ng’ama Ruoth Nyasaye ohero ema ochiko, mana kaka wuoro chiko wuode mohero." 
Proverbs3:13 Ng’at modoko mariek, kendo man gi ng’eyo en jahawi," 
Proverbs3:14 nimar rieko ber moloyo fedha, bende en mwandu maduong’ moloyo dhahabu." 
Proverbs3:15 Chutho, rieko ber moloyo kite ma nengogi tek. Onge gimoro amora maberie minyalo pimo kode." 
Proverbs3:16 Rieko miyi idak aming’a, bende okeloni mwandu kod luor." 
Proverbs3:17 Omiyo idak e ngima maber, kendo oteloni mana e yo makare." 
Proverbs3:18 En ludh ngima ni jogo duto man kode, kendo joma opadore kuome gin johawi." 
Proverbs3:19 Ruoth Nyasaye nochueyo piny gi riekone, kendo ne oketo polo kare kuom ng’eyo ma en go." 
Proverbs3:20 Riekone ema nomiyo aore omol, kendo ema ne omiyo koth ochue e piny." 
Proverbs3:21 Wuoda, rit riekoni kod paroni matut. Kik iwe gilalni." 
Proverbs3:22 Gibiro miyi ngima maber man gi mor. 
Proverbs3:23 Bende gibiro teloni gi kue kiwuotho e yo, kendo tiendi ok nochwanyre ngang’!" 
Proverbs3:24 Ok nibed maluor ka idhi nindo, kendo ininind maber nyaka piny ru." 
Proverbs3:25 Kik ibed maluor kineno ka joma ofuwo kihondko nego, kata ka masira omako joma timbegi mono," 
Proverbs3:26 nimar Ruoth Nyasaye noriti maber, kendo ok nowe obadho maki." 
Proverbs3:27 Tim ni jochan maber e sa asaya minyalo. 
Proverbs3:28 Ka inyalo konyo wadu kawuono, to kik iwachne niya, “Dogi, eka kiny iduog akonyi.”" 
Proverbs3:29 Kik ipar timo gimoro marach ni osiepni, nikech en wadu mudakgo." 
Proverbs3:30 Kik idhaw ni ng’ato kayiem nono, ka onge gima rach motimoni." 
Proverbs3:31 Kik nyiego maki gi jomahundu, bende kik iluw timbegi," 
Proverbs3:32 nimar Ruoth Nyasaye mon gi joricho, to ogeno joma kare." 
Proverbs3:33 Okuong’o miech joma timbegi mono, to oguedho miech joma long’o." 
Proverbs3:34 Wi Ruoth Nyasaye tek ni joma wigi tek, to okecho jogo ma obolore." 
Proverbs3:35 Joma riek noyud luor maduong’, to gima joma ofuwo yudo en mana wichkuot momedore." 
Proverbs4:1 Yawuota, winjuru gima awachonu. Chikuru itu eka unubed gi ng’eyo." 
Proverbs4:2 Weche ma apuonjou beyo, omiyo makgiuru matek." 
Proverbs4:3 Kane pod an nyathi mayom ma miderma 
Proverbs4:4 to wuora ne puonja kanyisa niya, “Par gik ma anyisi, kendo kik wiyi wil kodgi. Bende tim kaka anyisi, eka inibed mangima." 
Proverbs4:5 Bed gi rieko kod paro matut, kendo kik icha gima anyisi." 
Proverbs4:6 Kik ijwang’ rieko, eka enoriti." 
Proverbs4:7 Gima berie moloyo minyalo timo en yudo rieko. Kata ka mwanduni duto orumo, to winjo tiend wach ema onego ibedgo." 
Proverbs4:8 Her rieko, eka enomiyi duong’, kendo padri kuome, mondo okelni luor." 
Proverbs4:9 En ema nobedni osimbo mar duong’.” 
Proverbs4:10 Wuoda, winj wachna, kendo par matut gima anyisi, eka inidag aming’a." 
Proverbs4:11 Asepuonji rieko, kendo asenyisi yo makare monego iluw." 
Proverbs4:12 Onge gima nomi ikier ka iwuotho gi rieko, bende kata ka iringo to ok nichwanyri." 
Proverbs4:13 Pile par gima isepuonjori, kendo rite maber nikech en e ngimani." 
Proverbs4:14 Kik idhi kuonde ma joricho dhiye, bende kik iluw timbegi mamono." 
Proverbs4:15 Kata mana paro timo richo kik ipar, to wichri, kendo idhi yori iwuon." 
Proverbs4:16 Joma timbegi mono ok nyal nindo kapok otimo gimoro marach. Adier, nindo ok tergi kapok gihinyo ng’ato!" 
Proverbs4:17 Mahundu gi timbe mamono e chiembgi. 
Proverbs4:18 Wang’yo ma joma kare luwo, chalo chieng’ mapilore gokinyi, kendo medore ameda nyaka nyango tegno." 
Proverbs4:19 Yor joricho to olil mana ka muth otieno. 
Proverbs4:20 Wuoda, chik iti mondo iwinj weche mawachoni." 
Proverbs4:21 Kik iwe gikadhni, to kan-gi e chunyi," 
Proverbs4:22 nikech ng’ama winjo tiendgi to gichango kendo gimiyo ngima. 
Proverbs4:23 Chunyi e kama ngimani ochakoree, emomiyo rite ka mwanduni migenoe moloyo." 
Proverbs4:24 Kik iwach gimoro ma ok adiera, bende bed mabor gi miriambo kod weche mag miganga." 
Proverbs4:25 Rang mana nyimi tir, ka idimbori kendo ka in gi chir, kendo kik ikul wiyi ka gima wichkuot omaki." 
Proverbs4:26 Rang maber yo ma onego iluw, eka gimoro amora mitimo biro bedo maber." 
Proverbs4:27 Tang’ ni richo, kendo kik iwe yo makare, kibaro koracham kata korachwich." 
Proverbs5:1 Wuoda, chik iti, mondo iwinj rieko kod paro ma an go." 
Proverbs5:2 Eka ining’e kaka onego iritri, kendo wecheni nonyis ni in gi rieko." 
Proverbs5:3 Chi ng’ato nono nyalo wacho weche mamit ka mor kich, kendo dhoge nyalo bedo mayom ka mo," 
Proverbs5:4 to achien enochalni kwiri mager kata ka ligangla mabith! 
Proverbs5:5 Obiro teri e Piny Joma Otho, nimar owuotho mana e yo maridore kochomo tho!" 
Proverbs5:6 Ok omok e yo madhi e ngima, to obagni abaga koni gi koni, kendo mano ok obadhe." 
Proverbs5:7 Koro in wuoda, chik iti, kendo wiyi kik wil gi gima awachoni." 
Proverbs5:8 Bed mabor gi dhako ma kamano, kendo kik isud kata machiegni gi dhoode." 
Proverbs5:9 To kapo ni itimo kamano, to jomoko nono ema biro yudo duong’ ma in go, kendo initho e lwet jomahundu ka pod itin." 
Proverbs5:10 Adier, jomoko nono dikaw mwanduni, kendo gik moko duto misechoko dibed mag ng’at machielo" 
Proverbs5:11 Inichur, kinindo e kitandani mithoe,’ ka dendi chamore rumo." 
Proverbs5:12 Bang’e iniwach niya, “Ang’o mane omona puonjora rieko? Koso ere gima nomiyo adagi, ni ng’ato ok nyisa gima atimo marach?" 
Proverbs5:13 Ne ok achiko ita ka jopuonjna wuoyo, kendo ne ok adewogi," 
Proverbs5:14 Omiyo koro asepo ka ayudo wichkuot e lela!” 
Proverbs5:15 Kik ibed jamganga ni chiegi iwuon, to en kende ema mondo ihere." 
Proverbs5:16 Onge ohala miyudo kuom nyithindo minywolo oko," 
Proverbs5:17 nimar nyithindo ok onego obed mag jomoko nono, to in ema onego gitini." 
Proverbs5:18 Kuom mano, bed mamor gi chiegi. Ee, yud ilo kuom nyako mane ikendo ka pod in wuowi." 
Proverbs5:19 Ojaber kendo olong’o mana ka nyakech. Ber ma obergono mondo omiyi mor, kendo herane mondo oketi diere." 
Proverbs5:20 Wuoda, ere gima omiyo onego iher dhako moro nono? Koso ang’o momiyo chi ng’ato nono dilombi?" 
Proverbs5:21 Ruoth Nyasaye neno gik moko duto mitimo, kendo orangi kamoro amora midhiye." 
Proverbs5:22 Richo mag ng’ama timbene mono gin obadho momake matek. 
Proverbs5:23 Koro otho nikech ok onyal ritore owuon, kendo fupe ema tere e liel." 
Proverbs6:1 Wuoda, ka isingori ni inichul ni ng’ato gope," 
Proverbs6:2 kata ka singruok moro amora omaki," 
Proverbs6:3 to nyaka itim mana kaka awachoni eka mondo ires ngimani, nikech koro inie teko ng’at machielo! Nyaka iret idhi ir ng’atno mondo ihombe oweyi ibed thuolo." 
Proverbs6:4 Kik iwe nindo teri, bende kik ichung’ mondo iyue," 
Proverbs6:5 to resri mondo ibwodhri e obadhono, mana ka winyo kata ka mwanda ma yombo jadwar." 
Proverbs6:6 Joma nyap onego oneye kaka biye odak, mondo opuonjre rieko." 
Proverbs6:7 Biye onge gi jatelo kata ruoth kata jaduong’," 
Proverbs6:8 to kata kamano gikano chiembgi e ndalo chwiri, mondo gibi gicham e ndalo oro." 
Proverbs6:9 Koro, in ng’at ma jasamwoyo, to ibiro budho abudha nyaka karang’o? Koso karang’o ma ibiro chung’ ia kama inindoe?" 
Proverbs6:10 Iwacho niya, “We akwakra, mondo anindie matin mondi.”" 
Proverbs6:11 To e sa mapod inindono, dhier biro monji, mana ka jamecho momanore gi gilweny!" 
Proverbs6:12 Ji manono ma joricho wuotho awuotha kawacho miriambo. 
Proverbs6:13 Seche duto gining’o wang’gi, kendo gisimo ji ka giwuondo." 
Proverbs6:14 Gichano mana timo richo, ka giwacho weche makelo miero." 
Proverbs6:15 Kuom mano, masiche biro makogi apoya, mi gihinyre malit." 
Proverbs6:16 Nitie gik moko auchiel ma Nyasaye mon-go. To chutho, gin gik moko abiriyo ma ok onyal yiego:" 
Proverbs6:17 Mokwongo en wang’ maneno gi sunga, mar ariyo en lep mawacho miriambo, mar adek en lwedo machwero remb joma onge ketho," 
Proverbs6:18 mar ang’wen en chuny maparo timo timbe mamono, mar abich en tielo marikni ka dhi timo richo," 
Proverbs6:19 mar auchiel en janeno mawacho miriambo lilo, mar abiriyo en ng’at mathuwo osiepe mondo odhaw." 
Proverbs6:20 Wuoda, tim gik ma wuoru nyisi, bende kik idagi puonj meru." 
Proverbs6:21 Pile kan wechegi e chunyi maiye," 
Proverbs6:22 nimar puonjgigo ema notelni ka in e wuoth. Giniriti gotieno, kendo gining’adni rieko godiechieng’." 
Proverbs6:23 Chike ma kamago gin ler marieny, kendo kwer ma ikwerogo ng’ato kuom gima otimo marach kelo ngima." 
Proverbs6:24 Ginyalo miyo ibed mabor gi mon maricho, kendo itang’ ni weche mamit mag mond jomoko nono." 
Proverbs6:25 Kik chia ma mon-go nigo ywayi, kendo kik wengegi malombo miyi gombo." 
Proverbs6:26 Ng’ato nyalo yudo ohodho gi pesa matin moromo mana makati achiel. Terruok gi chi ng’ato to biro mana tieko ngimani duto! 
Proverbs6:27 Bende diting’ mach e kori, mak lepi owang’?" 
Proverbs6:28 Koso bende diwuoth kuom mirni mag mach mak tiendi owang’? 
Proverbs6:29 Mano e kaka ng’at materore gi chi wadgi chalo. Omiyo ng’ato ang’ata motimo kamano ok notony mak oyudo kum. 
Proverbs6:30 Ji ok cha jakech mokwalo chiemo ka kech nego. 
Proverbs6:31 Kata kamano, ka ojuke, to nyaka ochul nyadibiriyo. Chutho, nyaka ochul mwandune duto." 
Proverbs6:32 Kamano bende, ng’at ma terore gi chi ng’ato onge rieko, nimar oketho mana ngimane owuon." 
Proverbs6:33 Noyud chwat kod wichkuot mosiko. 
Proverbs6:34 Mirima ma mako chwor dhako en mirimb nyiego, omiyo ka ochulo kuor, to oonge gi miwafu ngang’!" 
Proverbs6:35 Ok onyal yie mondo ochule gimoro, kendo kata mana chiwo malich manade ok nyal kueyo mirimbe!" 
Proverbs7:1 Wuoda, par gik ma awachoni, kendo kan-gi e chunyi." 
Proverbs7:2 Tim kaka anyisi, eka inibed mangima. Rit chikena, mana kaka dirit tong wang’i." 
Proverbs7:3 Rwakgi ka tere e lith lweti, kendo ndikgi e chunyi mondo ipargi pile." 
Proverbs7:4 Kwan rieko ka gima en nyameru, kendo kwan ng’eyo tiend wach mana kaka ikwano osiepni mihero." 
Proverbs7:5 Ginimi itang’ ni mond jomoko nono. Adier, inibed mabor gi mon ma jomganga mawacho weche kisera." 
Proverbs7:6 Chieng’ moro kane ang’icho gie dirisa mar oda," 
Proverbs7:7 ne aneno yawuowi moko mapok otegno, to e kindgi ne nitie wuowi moro ma onge gi rieko kata matin." 
Proverbs7:8 Ne oyudo owuotho e wang’yo mokadho but od dhako moro ma jachode," 
Proverbs7:9 e sa mar odhiambo ka piny dwaro yuso. 
Proverbs7:10 Eka ne opo ka oromo gi dhakono korwakore malich ka dwaro mondo oyud dichwo. 
Proverbs7:11 Ne en dhako ma wang’e tek, kendo maonge wichkuot. Pile ne owuotho e gweng’," 
Proverbs7:12 korito chwo kamoro amora ma doyudgie, e wang’yore kata e chirni." 
Proverbs7:13 Omiyo ka ne oneno wuowino, ne okwake mi onyodhe, korango tong wang’e tir. Nowachone niya." 
Proverbs7:14 “Nende atimo sap misango kawuono gi chiayo, omiyo an gi ring’o mang’eny." 
Proverbs7:15 Kuom mano, aa biro mondo amanyi, to hawi maber, eri, ayudi!" 
Proverbs7:16 Asepedho kitandana gi suke mokikokiko moa Misri," 
Proverbs7:17 kendo asekiroe poda mang’ue mamit. 
Proverbs7:18 Omiyo wadhi mondo wayud mor nyaka piny ru, wabiro winjo maber ka wakwakore," 
Proverbs7:19 nimar chwora onge, odhi wuoth kuma bor." 
Proverbs7:20 Osedhi gi pesa mang’eny, kendo ok obi duogo nyaka bang jumbe ariyo.”" 
Proverbs7:21 Kamano dhakono ne oywayo wuowino gi wach mamit, mi odhi kode." 
Proverbs7:22 Chutho, ne odhi kode mana ka rwath mitero kar yeng’o, kata ka mwanda machikore" 
Proverbs7:23 ka kia ni ochomo asere ma biro hobo adundone, kata ka winyo mochiko obadho motegne, to en owuon ok ong’eyo ni ngimane ni e tho!" 
Proverbs7:24 Koro in wuoda, chik iti mondo iwinj gima awachoni." 
Proverbs7:25 Kik iyie dhako makamano lombi, bende kik iwuoth awuotha ka idware," 
Proverbs7:26 nimar oseketho ngima ji mang’eny, kendo osemiyo ji mathoth mokadho akwana otho." 
Proverbs7:27 Temie kidhi e ode ane, mak dichom mana yo madhi e piny joma otho! Adier, en e yo maridore katero ji e tho." 
Proverbs8:1 Winjuru kaka rieko luongo! Adier, odwaro ni ji mondo owinj dwonde." 
Proverbs8:2 Ochung’ ewi gode man e bath yo, kendo e akek yore." 
Proverbs8:3 Bende ochung’ but rangach, kama ochomo yo dala," 
Proverbs8:4 kowacho niya, “Aluongou un ji duto. Chutho, aluongo ng’ato ka ng’ato manie piny." 
Proverbs8:5 Un joma pod yom, winjuru kaka onego udok motegno. Un joma ofuwo, winjuru kaka onego uyud rieko" 
Proverbs8:6 Chikuru itu nikech adwaro nyisou weche mabeyo moloyo. Weche duto ma awachonu ni kare. 
Proverbs8:7 Gin adier, nimar amon gi miriambo." 
Proverbs8:8 Chutho, gik moko duto ma awacho long’o, kendo onge miriambo kata miganga moro." 
Proverbs8:9 Ng’at man gi rieko to winjogi maler. Ee, ng’at mawinjo tiend wach, to ong’eyogi maber." 
Proverbs8:10 Yieruru mana puonjna kar yiero fedha, kendo yieruru mana rieko moloyo yiero dhahabu maler." 
Proverbs8:11 Nimar rieko ber moloyo kata mana kite ma nengogi tek onge gimoro amora maber ma dipimego. 
Proverbs8:12 An e rieko, kendo an ema amiyo ji ng’eyo, bende anyiso ji winjo tiend weche, kendo apuonjogi ng’ado bura kare." 
Proverbs8:13 Luoro Ruoth Nyasaye en bedo mamon gi richo. An amon gi sunga kod wang’teko, kaachiel gi timbe mamono kod weche mag miriambo." 
Proverbs8:14 Achano gik moko, kendo atimogi. Bende an gi rieko, kendo ategno." 
Proverbs8:15 Akonyo ruodhi rito pinjegi, kendo akonyogi loso chike mabeyo." 
Proverbs8:16 Adier, an ema akonyo ruodhi kod jotelo rito piny." 
Proverbs8:17 Ahero joma ohera, kendo ng’ato nag’ata madwara to yuda." 
Proverbs8:18 An e wuon mwandu kod duong’. Chutho, mwandu mogundho kod gueth ni e lweta." 
Proverbs8:19 Gima iyudo kuom ber moloyo dhahabiu maler, kendo oloyo kata mana fedha malerie moloyo." 
Proverbs8:20 An atimo timbe makare, kendo ang’ado bura kare," 
Proverbs8:21 kachiwo mwandu ni joma ohera, kendo apong’o utgi gi gik mogundho." 
Proverbs8:22 An rieko, ema ne Ruoth Nyasaye okuongo chueya, kapok oloso gimoro amora mane ochueyo chon." 
Proverbs8:23 Adier, ne okwongo chueya chon ahinya, kapok piny ochakore." 
Proverbs8:24 Ne onywola kapok ochue nembe, kendo kane pod onge sokni," 
Proverbs8:25 kata kane pok ochue gode madongo, bende ka gode matindo ne pok oket kuonde ma gintie." 
Proverbs8:26 Adier, Nyasaye nonywola kapok ochueyo piny kata puothe kata mana lowo." 
Proverbs8:27 Noyudo antie kane oloso polo, kendo kane oketo kuonde ma nam ogikie." 
Proverbs8:28 Adier, ne antie kane oyaro boche e kor polo, kendo kane oyawo sokni mag nam," 
Proverbs8:29 mi ogolo chik ni pi, mondo kik kadh kama oketo. Bende ne antie kane oketo mise mar piny." 
Proverbs8:30 Ne abet bute ka jatich molony, ka oyudo morne duto kuoma. Ne atugo e nyime pile," 
Proverbs8:31 ka ahero piny mosechueyo, kendo amor gi ji modakie." 
Proverbs8:32 Koro un yawuota, winjuru gima awacho, nikech joma timo kaka anyisogi gin johawi." 
Proverbs8:33 Chikuru itu ni gik ma apuonjou, mondo ubed gi rieko, kendo kik uwe olalnu." 
Proverbs8:34 Ng’at ma owinjo wachna, kendo ma osiko e dhoranga dalana, ka oketo wang’e e dhooda, en jahawi," 
Proverbs8:35 nimar ng’at ma oyuda, to oyudo ngima, kendo Ruoth Nyasaye nobed mamor kode." 
Proverbs8:36 To ng’at ma ok oyuda, hinyore owuon. Chutho, ng’at ma mon koda, ohero mana tho!”" 
Proverbs9:1 Rieko osegero ode, kendo osetong’one yien abiriyo mondo obed sirni mage." 
Proverbs9:2 Oseyang’o chiayo, kendo oseloso divai mamit, siwandha bende osegero." 
Proverbs9:3 Oseoro jotichne manyiri kuonde moting’ore e gweng’, mondo oluong ji, ka wacho niya," 
Proverbs9:4 “Biuru un joma onge gi rieko.” Ng’at ma ofuwo, bende rieko wachone niya," 
Proverbs9:5 “Bi mondo wachiem kodi, kendo imadh divai mamit ma aseloso." 
Proverbs9:6 Bed mabor gi joma onge gi rieko, eka inibed mangima. Kamano, luw mana yor rieko.”" 
Proverbs9:7 Ka itemo rieyo ng’at ma jasunga, to in ema iyudo wichkuot, kendo ka ikwero ng’at marach, to in iwuon ema ihinyori." 
Proverbs9:8 Kuom mano, kik item rieyo ng’at ma jasunga, nikech mano biro miyo obet mamon kodi. To ka irieyo ng’at man gi rieko, to obedo osiepni." 
Proverbs9:9 Bende kipuonjo ng’at man gi rieko, to omedo bedo mariek. Chutho, kinyiso ng’at makare gimoro, to omedo mana puonjore." 
Proverbs9:10 Luoro Ruoth Nyasaye e chakruok mar rieko, nimar ka ing’eyo Ng’ama Ler, to in gi rieko adier." 
Proverbs9:11 Rieko biro medo hiki. 
Proverbs9:12 Adier, ka in gi rieko, to in ema iyudo ohala, to ka idage, to in ema ihinyori." 
Proverbs9:13 Fuwo chalo gi dhako ma jakoko momemore, kendo ma onge gi wichkuot." 
Proverbs9:14 Obet e dhoode, kama oting’ore e dala," 
Proverbs9:15 kendo oluongo ji makadho, kadhi e tijegi, kowachonigi niya," 
Proverbs9:16 “Biuru, un joma onge gi rieko.” Ng’ama ofuwo to owachone niya," 
Proverbs9:17 “Pi ma okwal ema mit modho, kendo chiemo moyudi e yor miganga nigi ndhadhu moloyo.”" 
Proverbs9:18 Jogo to ok ong’eyo ni joma dhi ire, tho, kata ni joma osedonjo e ode osenyumore matut e Piny Joma Otho." 
Proverbs10:1 Ngeche moko mag Solomon: Wuowi mariek miyo wuon mare bedo mamor, to wuowi mofuwo miyo min mare chuny lit." 
Proverbs10:2 Mwandu muyudo e yo marach ok kony gimoro. Tim makare to reso ji e tho. 
Proverbs10:3 Ruoth Nyasaye ok we kech neg ng’at makare. Jaricho to otuono gik modwaro. 
Proverbs10:4 Bedo jasamwoyo miyo ng’ato bedo jachan. Tich matek to kelo mwandu. 
Proverbs10:5 Ng’at ma kayo cham ka osechiek en ng’at mariek, to ng’at ma nindo aninda ndalo keyo kelo wichkuot." 
Proverbs10:6 Ng’at makare yudo gueth. Weche jaricho to pando masira. 
Proverbs10:7 Ji nopak nying ng’at makare kosetho. Jaricho to wich wil go. 
Proverbs10:8 Joma riek luwo puonj makare, to joma wechegi ofuwo biro rumo." 
Proverbs10:9 Timbe makare kelo ni ng’ato kue, to ng’at ma timbene obam, chieng’ moro nomaki." 
Proverbs10:10 Ng’at ma pando adiera, kelo chandruok, to ng’at ma kwero gimoro e lela, kelo kue." 
Proverbs10:11 Weche ng’at makare, gin soko mar ngima, to weche jaricho, pando masira e igi." 
Proverbs10:12 Sigu kelo miero, hera to umo ketho duto." 
Proverbs10:13 Joma riek pile wacho weche mariek. Joma ofuwo to onego ochwadi. 
Proverbs10:14 Joma riek, yudo rieko duto ma ginyalo nwang’o. Ng’at mofuwo kawuoyo, to chandruok ema chiegni." 
Proverbs10:15 Mwandu mar jamoko en ohinga ma ogeng’orego. Ng’at modhier to chan ema nego. 
Proverbs10:16 Tich matek ema kelo ngima ni ng’at makare. To timbe jaricho kelone mana masira. 
Proverbs10:17 Ng’at moyie weche mirieyego nobed mangima, to ng’at motamore kethone obayo yo." 
Proverbs10:18 Ng’at mapando sigu manie chunye en jamriambo, kendo jafuong’ wach en ng’at mofuwo." 
Proverbs10:19 Ka iwuoyo mang’eny to ichiegni gi richo. Ng’at mariek to ling’ aling’a. 
Proverbs10:20 Weche ng’at makare chalo gi fedha maler. Paro mag jaricho to onge tich. 
Proverbs10:21 Weche ng’at makare konyo ji mang’eny. Joma ofuwo to tho nikech gionge gi rieko. 
Proverbs10:22 Gueth moa kuom Ruoth Nyasaye ema kelo ni ng’ato mwandu, kendo mwandu makamano ok kel parruok." 
Proverbs10:23 Timbe maricho ema ng’at mofuwo ohero, to rieko ema miyo ng’at mariek mor." 
Proverbs10:24 Gima jaricho oluoro ema timorene. Ng’at makare to yudo mana gima odwaro. 
Proverbs10:25 Kalausi tero joricho kuma bor. Joma kare to ogurore motegno nyaka chieng’. 
Proverbs10:26 Kik iwe jasamwoyo timni gimoro, nikech obiro chaloni ka kedhno marewo dhok, kendo ka iro malungo wang’." 
Proverbs10:27 Luor Ruoth Nyasaye, eka idag aming’a. Joricho to tho ka ndalogi podi." 
Proverbs10:28 Geno mar joma kare kelo ngima. Joricho to ok gen gimoro. 
Proverbs10:29 Ruoth Nyasaye rito joma onge ketho, to otieko joma timo richo." 
Proverbs10:30 Pile joma kare ok nyal yiengni. Joricho to ok nodag e piny. 
Proverbs10:31 Joma kare wacho weche mariek Lep mawacho weche maricho to ibiro ng’ado oko. 
Proverbs10:32 Ng’at makare ong’eyo gima onego owachi e sa mowinjore. Joricho to pile wacho gik machwanyo ji. 
Proverbs11:1 Ruoth Nyasaye mon gi joma pimo gik moko gi rapim ma ok ni kare, to rapim makare ema omorgo." 
Proverbs11:2 Josunga yudo wichkuot piyopiyo nono, omiyo ber bedo mamuol." 
Proverbs11:3 Tim makare ema telo ni joma beyo, to tim miganga tieko joma acheje." 
Proverbs11:4 Chieng’ bura, to mwandu ok nyal konyi. Tim makare to nyalo geng’oni tho!" 
Proverbs11:5 Adier, tim makare miyo ng’ato dak maber. Ng’at ma timbene mono to tiekore mana kende owuon." 
Proverbs11:6 Tim makare reso ng’ama kare. Ng’at ma achach, to wuoche owuon ema rwako wino e ng’ute." 
Proverbs11:7 Ka jaricho otho, to genone duto tho kode, kendo geno ma ogenogo mwandune ok kony gimoro." 
Proverbs11:8 Ng’at makare resore e chandruok. Jaricho to nyumore e masira. 
Proverbs11:9 Weche joma ok dew Nyasaye ketho ji, to rieko joma kare ema resogi." 
Proverbs11:10 Dala bedo mamor ka joma kare dhi nyime maber, kendo mahu mar mor nitie ka joricho tho." 
Proverbs11:11 Mier yudo gueth ka joma kare odakie. Weche joricho to ketho mier aketha. 
Proverbs11:12 Ng’at maonge gi rieko ema jaro jowadgi. Ng’at mong’eyo gik moko to ling’ aling’a. 
Proverbs11:13 Ng’at ma jafuong’ wach ok hulne weche maling’ling’. Ng’at ma odimbore to kano wach e chunye. 
Proverbs11:14 Ka onge ng’at matelo ni ji gi rieko maber, to oganda dok mana chieng’. To ka nitie jong’ad rieko mathoth, to piny dhi nyime maber." 
Proverbs11:15 Ka ichung’ ni ng’at ma ok ing’eyo e gowi ma en-go, to nyaka iywag ang’e. Kuom mano, ber ka ibet mabor gi wach makamano." 
Proverbs11:16 Dhako malong’o yudo luor, to dhako ma kite rach yudo wichkuot. Ng’at ma jaluoro ok nyal yudo mwandu, to ng’at ma jachir nyaka bed jamoko." 
Proverbs11:17 Ng’at ma jang’wono kelo gueth ni en owuon. Ng’at makwiny to hinyore kende. 
Proverbs11:18 Ohala ma jaricho yudo ok konye, to ng’at makare yudoo pok man gi ohala." 
Proverbs11:19 Ng’at ma oketo chunye kuom tim makare nobed mangima, to ng’at mosiko ka timo richo notho." 
Proverbs11:20 Ruoth Nyasaye mon gi joma timbegi obam, to ohero joma timo timbe makare." 
Proverbs11:21 Bed king’eyo ni joricho noyud kum. Joma kare to notony. 
Proverbs11:22 Dhako ma jaber to onge gi rieko, chalo mana gi tere mar dhahabu morwak e um nguruwe." 
Proverbs11:23 Joma kare dwaro mana gik makelo gueth. Geno mar joricho to ok kony gimoro. 
Proverbs11:24 Ng’ato nyalo bet ni pogo ni ji gige gi chuny maler, to pod mwandune medore ameda! Ng’at machielo to nyalo bedo ni kungo malich, to pod omedo mana bedo modhier." 
Proverbs11:25 Bed mang’won, eka idhi nyime maber. Kony jowadu, eka gin bende gikonyi." 
Proverbs11:26 Ji kuong’o ng’at ma kungo chambe, ka ritogo nengo maber, to giguedho ng’at magolo mage oko mondo ong’iew." 
Proverbs11:27 Ng’at madwaro mana gik makare, nyaka winj maber, to ka ng’ato dwaro mana ketho, to richone nyaka dog e wiye owuon." 
Proverbs11:28 Joma kare nodhi nyime maber, mana ka oboke maloth ndalo chwiri, to jogo ma ogeno kuom mwandugi nolwar mana ka oboke malwar ndalo oro." 
Proverbs11:29 Ng’at ma miyo joodgi chandruok ok noyud gimoro kata matin, kendo pile ng’at mofuwo bedo misumba ng’at mariek." 
Proverbs11:30 Tim makare kelo ngima maber. Timbe mahundu to kelo mana tho! 
Proverbs11:31 Ka ng’at maber yudo pokne e piny ka, to ong’ere ni jaricho noyud kum mak orem." 
Proverbs12:1 Ng’at ma ohero rieko bedo mamor ka onyise gima rach ma osetimo, to ng’at motamore ni kik rieye chalo mana le." 
Proverbs12:2 Ruoth Nyasaye mor gi joma kare, to okwedo joma chano timo richo." 
Proverbs12:3 Richo ok nyal miyo ng’ato chuny motegno. Ng’at makare to ogurore motegno. 
Proverbs12:4 Dhako malong’o miyo chwore mor, to dhako ma kuodo wich chalo ni chwore mana gi tuo mar nyamuoda." 
Proverbs12:5 Joma kare pile timo ni jowadgi maber. Joricho to wuondo jowadgi awuonda. 
Proverbs12:6 Weche joricho oting’o mana tho lilo. Weche joma kare to reso joma nie chandruok. 
Proverbs12:7 Joricho tho gi wigi. Joma kare to weyoo nyikwagi bang’gi. 
Proverbs12:8 Ng’at mariek yudo pak. Ng’at maonge rieko to inyiero anyiera. 
Proverbs12:9 Ber bedo dhano adhana matiyo mana ni mondo oyud chiembe, moloyo timruok ng’ama duong’ maonge chiemo." 
Proverbs12:10 Ng’at maber rito jambe gi ng’wono. Ng’at marach to sando jambe asanda. 
Proverbs12:11 Ng’at mapuro matek, nyaka yud chiemo mang’eny. To ng’at maketho sechene gi timbe manono en ng’at mofuwo." 
Proverbs12:12 Joricho dwaro mana timo timbe mamono. Joma kare to timo gik makelo ohala. 
Proverbs12:13 Weche jaricho mako mana en owuon. Ng’at modimbore to tony atonya e chandruok. 
Proverbs12:14 Pok ma ng’ato yudo romre gi weche mowacho kendo gi gik motimo. 
Proverbs12:15 Pile ng’at mofuwo paro ni en kare. Joma riek to chiko itgi ni puonj. 
Proverbs12:16 Ng’at mofuwo nyiso mirimbe piyopiyo. Ng’at mariek to mwonyo ayany. 
Proverbs12:17 Adiera kelo bura makare. Miriambo to kelo mana buch amwor. 
Proverbs12:18 Weche mimwomruokgo chuoyo chuny mana ka ligangla. Weche mawuok e dho ng’ama kare to kelo ngima. 
Proverbs12:19 Adier ok tow nyaka chieng’. Miriambo to ok deki. 
Proverbs12:20 Joma ochano timbe mamono wuondore kendgi giwegi, to joma timbegi long’o yudo mor." 
Proverbs12:21 Ng’at makare ok gimoro marach yudi. Joricho to chandruok kende ema gineno. 
Proverbs12:22 Ruoth Nyasaye mon gi jomriambo, to omor gi joma wacho adiera." 
Proverbs12:23 Ng’at mariek ok hul riekone. Ng’at mofuwo to nyiso mana fupe. 
Proverbs12:24 Tich matek miyo ng’ato bedo gi duong’. Samuoyo to miyo ng’ato bedo mana misumba. 
Proverbs12:25 Parruok miyo chuny ng’ato bedo mool, to weche mabeyo miyo chunye duogo." 
Proverbs12:26 Ng’at makare nyiso osiepene yo. Joma richo to miyo ji rwenyo arwenya. 
Proverbs12:27 Jasamwoyo ok nyal yudo gima odwaro, to ng’at matiyo matek yudo mwandu." 
Proverbs12:28 Tim makare e yo mochiko ngima. Fuwo to em mana yo madhi e tho! 
Proverbs13:1 Wuowi mariek winjo puonj wuon mare. Ng’at ma wang’e tek to ok yie kethone. 
Proverbs13:2 Joma kare nomi pok maromre gi gik ma giwacho. Jomriambo to gombo mana miero. 
Proverbs13:3 Ng’at marito dhoge reso ngimane, to ng’at ma rodho wach arodha tiekore kende owuon." 
Proverbs13:4 Ng’at ma jasamwoyo nyalo dwaro gimoro ahinya, to ok onyal yudo. Jakinda to yudo gik moko duto ma odwaro." 
Proverbs13:5 Ng’at makare mon gi miriambo. Jaricho to wechene kuodo wich, kendo ojogo ji." 
Proverbs13:6 Tim makare rito ng’at modimbore. Timbe maricho to tieko joricho. 
Proverbs13:7 Ji moko kawore ka jomwandu, to chutho gionge gi gimoro. Ji moko to wuondore ni jochan, to adier, gin gi mwandu mathoth!" 
Proverbs13:8 Jamwandu nyaka warre gi mwandune, ka obwoge, momake. Jachan to onge gima bwogo." 
Proverbs13:9 Joma kare chalo ler mang’angni. Joricho chalo ler madwaro tho. 
Proverbs13:10 Sunga ok kel gimoro, to okelo mana miero, omiyo ber mondo ng’ato odwar rieko kuom ji." 
Proverbs13:11 Mwandu moyudi e yo mayot lal piyopiyo, to mwandu mitiyone matek medore ameda." 
Proverbs13:12 Ka gima igeno ok otimore, to chunyi ol, to ka gima igeno otimore, to chunyi duogo." 
Proverbs13:13 Kitamori winjo puonj, to idwaro mana chandruok, to kiwinjo gima iwachoni, to iyudo pok maber." 
Proverbs13:14 Puonj mar ng’at mariek en soko mar ngima, ma reso ng’ato e tho." 
Proverbs13:15 Rieko mabith kelo luor. Ndhogruok to kelo masira. 
Proverbs13:16 Ng’at mariek, paro matut ka pok otimo gimoro. Ng’at mofuwo to nyiso mana fupe." 
Proverbs13:17 Jaote ma kite rach kelo chandruok. Ng’at modimbore to kelo kue. 
Proverbs13:18 Ng’at madagi ni kik rieye bedo mana jachan, kendo yudo wichkuot, to ng’at machiko ite ka ikwero, yudo duong." 
Proverbs13:19 En gima ber manade yudo gima idwaro! Joma ofuwo otamore weyo richo. 
Proverbs13:20 Kibedo e kanyakla mar joma riek, eka ibedo mariek, to kimako osiep gi joma ofuwo to ihinyori." 
Proverbs13:21 Chandruok luwo joricho kuonde duto. Joma kare to yudo gik mabeyo. 
Proverbs13:22 Ng’at makare bedo gi mwandu moweyo ni nyithinde. Mwandu joricho to nodog ni joma kare. 
Proverbs13:23 Puothe jochan dinyag cham mathoth moromogi, ka da bed ni adiera ni e piny!" 
Proverbs13:24 Ka ok ichwad wuodi to kara ok ihere, ka ihere adier to nyaka ikume." 
Proverbs13:25 Joma kare nigi chiemo moromogi. Joricho to denyo ndalo duto. 
Proverbs14:1 Mon mariek ema utegi obidhore, to mon mofuwo ketho utgi aketha." 
Proverbs14:2 Ng’at makare oluoro Ruoth Nyasaye. Ng’at ma achach to ochaye achaya. 
Proverbs14:3 Weche ng’at mofuwo kelone mana kum. Weche ng’at mariek to konye e thagruok. 
Proverbs14:4 Kionge gi dhok ma puroni to ok iyud chiemo maber, to ka in gi dhok ma puroni to ibedo gi cham mang’eny." 
Proverbs14:5 Janeno malong’o pile wacho adiera. Janeno ma mibadhi to wacho mana miriambo lilo. 
Proverbs14:6 Ng’at ma jasunga ok nyal bedo mariek. Ng’at ma weche donjone to puonjore piyopiyo. 
Proverbs14:7 Bed mabor gi joma ofuwo, nikech gionge gi gima digipuonji." 
Proverbs14:8 Rieko mar ng’at mariek, nyise yo makare monego oluw, to fup joma omemore, miyo gibayo yo." 
Proverbs14:9 Joma ofuwo ok dew kata ka gitimo richo. Joma beyo to dwaro ni mondo ong’wonnigi. 
Proverbs14:10 Chuny ng’ato ema ong’eyo gima litne, kata mor ma en go. Ng’at machielo to ok nyal ng’eyo." 
Proverbs14:11 Od jaricho iketho, to od ng’at makare dhi nyime maber." 
Proverbs14:12 Yo ma ng’ato paro ni ber, nyalo mana tere e tho." 
Proverbs14:13 Bwonjo mar ng’ato nyalo pando parruok manie chunye, to ka morne orumo to chunye odong’ mana ka lit." 
Proverbs14:14 Ng’at marach yudo gima oromo kode. Ng’at makare bende yudo pok kuom timbene. 
Proverbs14:15 Ng’at ma riekone tin yie gimoro amora mowinjo. Ng’ama riek to ong’eyo pogo weche. 
Proverbs14:16 Ng’at mariek tang’, kendo loko dieng’eye ni richo. Ng’ama ofuwo to mwomore amwoma nikech ok oluoro gimoro." 
Proverbs14:17 Ng’at ma iye jawang’ piyo timo gik mofuwo. Ng’at mariek to hore mos. 
Proverbs14:18 Joma omemore yudo gima owinjore gi fupgi. Joma riek to riekogi medore ameda. 
Proverbs14:19 Joricho nokulre ni joma kare, kendo ginikuechi e dhoutgi." 
Proverbs14:20 Onge ng’ama ohero jachan. Jomwandu to nigi osiepe mathoth. 
Proverbs14:21 Ka idwaro bedo mamor, to kony jochan, nimar charo ji en richo." 
Proverbs14:22 Ka ichano timo marach to ibiro lal nono, to ka ichano timo maber to ji nogeni kendo nomiyi luor." 
Proverbs14:23 Tich ema kelo chiemo. Thoro wach to kelo mana chan. 
Proverbs14:24 Osimb joma riek en mwandu. To gima joma ofuwo sidho gin mana fupgi. 
Proverbs14:25 Janeno ma wacho adier reso ji e tho, to janeno ma riambo ketho bura." 
Proverbs14:26 Ng’at moluoro Ruoth Nyasaye nodag gi kue kaachiel gi joode. 
Proverbs14:27 Luoro Ruoth Nyasaye chalo gi soko mar ngima nikech oreso ji e tho. 
Proverbs14:28 Ruoth ma joge ng’eny ema nigi huma. Ruoth ma joge nok to podho. 
Proverbs14:29 Ng’at ma iye ok wang’ piyo ema nigi rieko mang’eny, to ng’at ma mirimbe liet nyiso mana fupe." 
Proverbs14:30 Chuny mokue ema miyo del bedo mangima. Nyiego to chalo adhola ma ketho del. 
Proverbs14:31 Ng’at ma sando jachan, to chayo mana Nyasaye mane ochueye, to ng’at ma kecho jachan ema miyo Nyasaye duong’." 
Proverbs14:32 Timbe mamono mag joricho ema miyo orumo. Ng’at makare to yudo resruok kuom timne malong’o. 
Proverbs14:33 Rieko nie chuny ng’at ma weche donjone. Joma ofuwo to kia rieko. 
Proverbs14:34 Tim makare ting’o oganda malo. Richo to ketho nying oganda. 
Proverbs14:35 Ruoth mor mana gi jatichne ma tiyo maber, to iye wang’ gi jatich ma utho tich." 
Proverbs15:1 Dwoko mamuol ema kueyo mirima, to dwoko makwiny jimbe ajimba." 
Proverbs15:2 Ka ng’at mariek wuoyo to wachne lombo ji. Ng’at mofuwo to rodho weche maonge tich. 
Proverbs15:3 Ruoth Nyasaye neno gik matimore kamoro amora. Orango joma beyo gi joma richo mana machalre. 
Proverbs15:4 Weche mang’won kelo ngima. Weche maricho to nyoso chuny. 
Proverbs15:5 Ng’at mofuwo ochayo puonj wuon mare, to ng’at mariek winjo kikwere gimoro." 
Proverbs15:6 Joma kare nigi mwandu mang’eny e miechgi, to gik ma joricho yudo kelonigi mana chandruok." 
Proverbs15:7 Lew ng’at mariek lando rieko. Ng’at mofuwo to wechene obam. 
Proverbs15:8 Ruoth Nyasaye mor ka joma ber lame, to omon gi misengni ma joricho chiwone." 
Proverbs15:9 Ruoth Nyasaye mon gi timbe joma richo, to ohero joma timo gik makare." 
Proverbs15:10 Ng’at mobaro moweyo yo makare biro yudo kum malit, kendo ng’at modagi ni ok kwer biro tho." 
Proverbs15:11 Ruoth Nyasaye ong’eyo gik matimore kata mana e piny joma otho. Koro ere kaka dhano dipandne paro manie chunye? 
Proverbs15:12 Ng’at ma jasunga ok dwar mondo okwer, omiyo ok odhi ir joma riek mondo ong’adne rieko." 
Proverbs15:13 Ka ng’ato mor, to obwonjo. Ka en gi parruok to chunye nyosore." 
Proverbs15:14 Ng’at ma weche donjone dwaro puonjruok, to joma ofuwo mor amora gi fupe." 
Proverbs15:15 Ngima mar jachan en thagruok mochwere. Chuny motegno to mor amora pile. 
Proverbs15:16 Ber bedo jachan moluoro Ruoth Nyasaye moloyoo bedo gi mwandu makelo chandruok. 
Proverbs15:17 Ber chamo alot kama oherie, moloyo chamo ring’o malit kama ochayie." 
Proverbs15:18 Ng’at ma iye wang’ piyo ero miero, to ng’at ma hore mos kelo kue." 
Proverbs15:19 Yo ma jasamwoyo luwo otimo kudho lilo. Ng’at ma ratego to luwo yo maler. 
Proverbs15:20 Wuowi mariek miyo wuon mare mor. Ng’at ma charo min to ofuwo. 
Proverbs15:21 Joma ofuwo mor amora gi fupgi, to ng’at mariek timo mana gima ber." 
Proverbs15:22 Ka onge jong’ad rieko, to ji ok tim gik ma gichano, to ka jong’ad rieko ng’eny, to gik ma gichano dhi maber." 
Proverbs15:23 Ka ng’ato odwoko wach maber, to obedo mamor. Adier, wach mowinjore gi sane, ber manade!" 
Proverbs15:24 Ng’at mariek idho yo matere e ngima, to ok oluw yo maridore kochomo tho." 
Proverbs15:25 Ruoth Nyasaye biro ketho miech josunga, to enorit mwandu mag mond liete." 
Proverbs15:26 Ruoth Nyasaye mon gi paro maricho, to weche mang’won long’one." 
Proverbs15:27 Ng’at ma gombo bedo gi mwandu e yor miganga keto joode e chandruok, to ng’at modagi chamo asoya nodag aming’a." 
Proverbs15:28 Joma beyo paro matut kapok odwoko wach. Joma timbegi richo to dwoko wach piyopiyo, kendo wechegigo kelo chandruok." 
Proverbs15:29 Ka joma kare lemo, to Ruoth Nyasaye winjo. Joricho to ok dew." 
Proverbs15:30 Wang’ mamor duogo chuny, kendo wach maber miyo del bedo mangima." 
Proverbs15:31 Ng’at ma chiko ite kikwero bedo e kanyakla mar joma riek. 
Proverbs15:32 Ng’at ma tamore puonj hinyore kende owuon, to ng’ama yie kikwero medo bedo mariek." 
Proverbs15:33 Luoro Ruoth Nyasaye puonjo ji rieko, kendo bedo mamuol kelo luor." 
Proverbs16:1 Chuny dhano nyalo chano gik modwaro timo, to mago duto nie lwet Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Proverbs16:2 Ng’ato nyalo paro ni gik moko duto motimo ni kare, to Ruoth Nyasaye ema pimo paro mar dhano." 
Proverbs16:3 Ket gik moko duto mitimo e lwet Ruoth Nyasaye, eka itimgi maber." 
Proverbs16:4 Gik moko duto ma Ruoth Nyasaye osechweyo nigi gikogi, kendo giko joricho en mana tho." 
Proverbs16:5 Ruoth Nyasaye mon gi ng’ato ang’ata ma jasunga. Ng’at makamano to ok notony ngang’ mak oyudo kum. 
Proverbs16:6 Bed gi luor kod adiera, eka Ruoth Nyasaye noweni richoni." 
Proverbs16:7 Ka Ruoth Nyasaye mor gi ng’ato kod timne, to ng’atno nyalo miyo koda ka wasike lokre osiepene." 
Proverbs16:8 Gima tin miyudo e yor adiera, ber moloyo gik mang’eny miyudo e yor miganga." 
Proverbs16:9 Dhano loso chenone owuon, to Ruoth Nyasaye ema telone eka otimgi." 
Proverbs16:10 Ruoth golo chik gi teko mar Nyasaye, omiyo wechene duto ni kare." 
Proverbs16:11 Ruoth Nyasaye dwaro ni rapim duto obed makare, kendo ni ohala duto oloki e yo makare." 
Proverbs16:12 Ruodhi ok nyal yie timbe maricho, nikech adiera ema miyo loch gurore motegno." 
Proverbs16:13 Ruoth ka ruoth dwaro mana adiera, omiyo gihero joma bidho wach." 
Proverbs16:14 Pile ng’at mariek dwaro ni mondo ruoth obed mamor, nimar kokecho, to mirimbe nyalo kelo ni ng’ato tho." 
Proverbs16:15 Mor ma ruoth nigo e pat wang’e kelo ngima, mana kaka boche polo kelo koth e ndalo chwiri." 
Proverbs16:16 Mano kaka yudo rieko gi ng’eyo, ber, moloyo yudo fedha gi dhahabu." 
Proverbs16:17 Yo ma joma beyo luwo bor gi richo, omiyo rang kama iluwo mondo ires ngimani." 
Proverbs16:18 Sunga kelo masira, kendo ng’ayi miyo ng’ato chwanyore." 
Proverbs16:19 Ber bedo gi jochan kibolori, moloyo bedo gi josunga, kipogo kodgi gik moyaki." 
Proverbs16:20 Ng’at machiko ite ni gima ipuonje dhi nyime maber. Kuom mano, ket genoni kuom Ruoth Nyasaye mondo ibed mamor." 
Proverbs16:21 Ng’at man gi paroo iluongo ni ng’ama riek, kendo wechene mamit gin mana puonj." 
Proverbs16:22 Rieko en soko mar ngima ni jooma ni kode, to fup joma ofuwo kelonigi mana chwat." 
Proverbs16:23 Ng’at mariek paro matut ka pok owacho gimoro. Kuom mano, weche mawuok e dhoge gin mana puonj." 
Proverbs16:24 Weche mamuol chalo mana gi mor kich, ma mit kichamo, kendo kelo del maber." 
Proverbs16:25 Yo ma ng’ato paro ni ber nyalo mana tere e tho. 
Proverbs16:26 Kech makayo jatich miyo otiyo matek mondo oyud chiemo. 
Proverbs16:27 Ng’at ma chunye rach ohero mana ero miero, kendo wechene chalo mach mager!" 
Proverbs16:28 Joricho kelo dhaw kuonde duto, kendo jokuoth thuwo osiepe." 
Proverbs16:29 Ng’at ma jamahundu wuondo osiepene, kendo oterogi e masira." 
Proverbs16:30 Tang’ ni ng’ama buonjo kodi, ka simi gi wang’e, nimar nyaka bed ni ochano timo gimoro marach." 
Proverbs16:31 Lwar en osimbo mar duong’, kendo joma kare ema yude." 
Proverbs16:32 Herruok ber moloyo doko ratego. Ng’at moritore owuon yudo duong’ moloyo ng’ama kawo dala maduong’. 
Proverbs16:33 Ji goyo ombulu mondo ong’e gima onego gitim, to Nyasaye owuon ema ong’eyo gima timore." 
Proverbs17:1 Ber bang’o kuon gi kue, moloyo chamo chiemo mathoth e ot ma dhaw ng’enyie." 
Proverbs17:2 Misumba mariek nyalo bedo gi loch kuom wuod dala ma kuodo wich, mi pogne mwandu kaachiel gi yawuot dalano mamoko." 
Proverbs17:3 Dhahabu gi fedha itemo gi mach. Chuny dhano to Ruoth Nyasaye ema temoo. 
Proverbs17:4 Joma timbegi mono ohero winjo weche maricho. Jomriambo bende kuoth ema mitnigi. 
Proverbs17:5 Ng’at ma chayo jachan yanyo mana Nyasaye mane ochueye, kendo ng’at mabedo mamor ka masira omako wadgi noyud kum." 
Proverbs17:6 Jodongo mor gi nyikwagi, mana kaka yawuowi mor gi wuonegi." 
Proverbs17:7 Ng’at mogen ok riambi, mana kaka ng’at mofuwo ok nyal wacho gima kelo konyruok." 
Proverbs17:8 Ng’at mohero chiwo asoya paro ni asoya tiyo ka bilo, omiyo gik moko motimo dhi nyime maber." 
Proverbs17:9 Ka idwaro ni mondo ji oheri, to ng’wonnigi ka gitimoni marach. Ka pile ilwero ng’ato kuom gimoro marach mosetimo, to osiep ema iketho." 
Proverbs17:10 Kikwero ng’at mariek dichiel kende, to opuonjore maber, moloyo ng’at mofuwo migoyo ndalo mia achiel, eka winj gimoro." 
Proverbs17:11 Ng’at ma timbene richo ohero miero, omiyo Nyasaye biro orone jaote makwiny." 
Proverbs17:12 Ber romo gi ondiek madhako mosema nyithinde, moloyo romo gi ng’at mofuwo matimo gik mofuwo." 
Proverbs17:13 Kitimo marach ni ng’at mosetimoni maber, to masira ok norum e odi." 
Proverbs17:14 Chakruok mar miero chalo gi pi mochako chuer, omiyo nyaka geng’e ka pok omwomo." 
Proverbs17:15 Kumo ng’at maonge ketho, kata weyo jaricho aweya, gin gik ma Ruoth Nyasaye mon-go." 
Proverbs17:16 Ng’at mofuwo ketho pesa kuom puonjruok kayiem, nikech oonge gi obwongo mowinjogo gimoro." 
Proverbs17:17 En adier ni osiepni nyalo heri kinde duto, to owadu ema konyi e chandruok." 
Proverbs17:18 Ng’at maonge gi paro kende ema nyalo singore ni dichul gop wadgi. 
Proverbs17:19 Ng’ama ohero miero en jaricho, kendo ng’at makawore, kelo chandruok ni en owuon." 
Proverbs17:20 Ng’at ma paro mana richo, donjo e chandruok, kendo ng’at ma wacho miriambo yudo mana masira." 
Proverbs17:21 Wuon wuowi mofuwo yudo kuyo. Adier, oonge gi mor." 
Proverbs17:22 Chuny mamor kelo ngima maber, to chuny mool kelo tuo." 
Proverbs17:23 Jong’ad bura maricho chamo asoya ling’ling’ mondo oketh bura. 
Proverbs17:24 Ng’at mariek keto chunye pile mondo odwar rieko. Ng’at mofuwo to jahubagabaga. 
Proverbs17:25 Wuowi mofuwo miyo wuon mare chuny lit, kendo kelo ni min mare kuyo." 
Proverbs17:26 Ok en gima ber kumo ng’at maonge ketho, kata goyo ng’at makare." 
Proverbs17:27 Ng’at mariek ok wach weche mang’eny, kendo ng’at man gi paro matut ok yie mondo iye owang’." 
Proverbs17:28 Ka ng’at mofuwo oling’ to ikwane ka ng’ama riek. Adier, ka ok owuo to ji paro ni en gi ng’eyo." 
Proverbs18:1 Ng’at ma kendeke dwaro mana gige owuon. Ok onyal yie gik ma ji duto oyiego. 
Proverbs18:2 Ng’at mofuwo ok dew kata ka owinjo gimoro, kata ka ok owinjo. Riekone kende ema odwaro nyiso." 
Proverbs18:3 Richo kelo wichkuot, kendo ka nyingi okethore, to achaya ema iyudo." 
Proverbs18:4 Weche dhano gin soko mar rieko. Gitut ka nam, kendo giliw ka aora mamol." 
Proverbs18:5 Ok en gima kare chwako jaketho, kata ketho buch ng’ama kare." 
Proverbs18:6 Weche ng’at mofuwo kelo dhaw, omiyo owinjore gi goch." 
Proverbs18:7 Ka ng’at mofuwo wuoyo, to otiekore kende. Wechene owuon ema make." 
Proverbs18:8 Mano kaka weche kuoth mit manade! Gidonjonwa mana kaka chiemo mamit ridore e iwa. 
Proverbs18:9 Jasamwoyo rach mana ka ng’at ma ketho gik moko. 
Proverbs18:10 Nying Ruoth Nyasaye chal gi dala mochiel motegno, ma ng’at makare nyalo ringo resoree." 
Proverbs18:11 Jamoko paro ni mwandune en ohinga mogeng’orego. 
Proverbs18:12 Ng’at mamuol ema yudo duong’. Jasunga to luwo yo mochiko kethruok. 
Proverbs18:13 Chik iti kapok idwoko penjo. Ka ok itimo kamano to ibedo mofuwo, kendo ikelo wichkuot." 
Proverbs18:14 Chuny man gi chir ema konyo ng’ato ka tuo. To ka chuny ng’ato ool to konye tek. 
Proverbs18:15 Joma weche donjonigi dwaro mondo opuonjre, kendo gichiko itgi mondo kik wach moro kadhnigi." 
Proverbs18:16 Lwedo mabup ema yawo dhoot, kendo nyalo miyo ine kata mana ng’ama duong’." 
Proverbs18:17 Ng’at ma okuongo yalo ema iparo ni wacho adier, to eka bang’e ng’at ma giyalogo chako ng’eng’e." 
Proverbs18:18 Ka joma rateke ng’ang’ore e od bura, to ombulu ema nyalo thegogi." 
Proverbs18:19 Kikonyo owadu, to enoriti mana ka dala mochiel motegno, to ka idhaw kode to enolorni dhoot." 
Proverbs18:20 Weche duto mawuok e dho ng’ato duogo e wiye owuon. 
Proverbs18:21 Weche ma ng’ato wacho nyalo kelo ngima, to bende ginyalo kelo tho. Kuom mano, rit dhogi maber mondo wecheni okonyi." 
Proverbs18:22 Ng’at mokendo dhako oyudo gima ber. En gi hap Ruoth Nyasaye. 
Proverbs18:23 Jachan kawuoyo to ywagore. Jamoko to wuoyo mana gi gero. 
Proverbs18:24 Osiepe moko beyo mana kuom mbekni manono. Osiep maber to nyalo geni moloyo kata mana owadu monywoligo. 
Proverbs19:1 Ber bedo jachan ma timne kare, moloyo bedo jamoko ma wechene obam." 
Proverbs19:2 Ng’at maonge gi rieko to gombo gik moko, ok nyal dhi nyime maber. Jarikni jamuod nyoyo gi kuoyo." 
Proverbs19:3 Ng’at mofuwo kethore kende owuon, to bang’e owacho ni Ruoth Nyasaye ema otimone kamano." 
Proverbs19:4 Jomwandu pile yudo osiepe mang’eny. Jochan to kata mana osiepe manok ma gin-go ringo weyo. 
Proverbs19:5 Janeno ma jamriambo ok nyal tony mak okum. Adier, ng’at ma wacho miriambo lilo ok tony." 
Proverbs19:6 Ng’ato ka ng’ato temo mondo joma dongo ohere, kendo ng’ato ka ng’ato wacho ni en osiep ng’ama bade lach." 
Proverbs19:7 Ka omine jachan duto ochaye, osiepene to koro dijwang’e machal nadi! Kata obedo ni otemo matek mondo oyud osiep, to ok onyal yudo." 
Proverbs19:8 Ng’at ma dwaro rieko rito ngimane maber, kendo ng’at maparo gima osepuonjore dhi nyime kare." 
Proverbs19:9 Janeno mariambo ok nyal tony mak okum. Ng’at ma kamano nolal nono. 
Proverbs19:10 Joma ofuwo ok owinjore dag maber. Wasumbni bende ok owinjore bed gi loch kuom jodong gweng’. 
Proverbs19:11 Ng’at mariek, iye ok wang’ piyo. Ka ng’ato otimoni marach, to en gima ber moloyo ka ifwayo." 
Proverbs19:12 Ruoth ma mirima omako chalo gi sibuor maruto, to ka omor kodi, to morneno chalo koth machue." 
Proverbs19:13 En masira bedo wuon wuowi mofuwo. Dhako ma ralep bende chalo gi pi maton ma ok chogi. 
Proverbs19:14 Dala kod mwandu ema wuon nyathi weyone. Dhako mariek to Ruoth Nyasaye ema chiwo. 
Proverbs19:15 Nindo mit ni jasamwoyo, to ng’at makamano kech biro nego." 
Proverbs19:16 Rit chike Ruoth Nyasaye mondo idag aming’a, nikech kichayogi to initho." 
Proverbs19:17 Ka imiyo jachan gimoro, to ichalo ng’at ma holo Ruoth Nyasaye, nikech Ruoth Nyasaye nodwoknigo." 
Proverbs19:18 Ka nyithindi oketho to puonjgi gi chwat kapod gitindo ma ginyalo winjoe gimoro. Ka ok itim kamano to ikethogi. 
Proverbs19:19 Ng’at ma jamrima nyaka ikre owuon ni yudo kum ma mirimbe kelo, nikech ka igole e chandruok makamano dichiel, to ng’e ni ibiro timo kamano pile." 
Proverbs19:20 Chik iti ni rieko ming’adoni, kendo yie mondo opuonji, eka chieng’ moro nibed mariek." 
Proverbs19:21 Ng’ato nyalo chano gik mathoth, to dwaro mar Ruoth Nyasaye ema timore." 
Proverbs19:22 Enn wichkuot bedo jawuoro. Bedo jachan too ber moloyo bedo jamriambo. 
Proverbs19:23 Luor Ruoth Nyasaye mondo idag aming’a gi kue maonge gima thagi. 
Proverbs19:24 Ng’at ma jasamwoyo luto lwete e tawo, to tero lwete e dhoge tame." 
Proverbs19:25 Josunga nyaka kum mondo joma kia gik moko opuonjre. Ng’at mariek to puonjore apuonja kokwere. 
Proverbs19:26 Ng’at mamon gi wuon, kendo riembo min e dala, kelo wichkuot kod achaya." 
Proverbs19:27 Wuoda, ka iweyo puonjruok, to piyopiyo nono wiyi biro wil gi gik ma iseng’eyo." 
Proverbs19:28 Janeno man gi sadha e chunye ketho bura. Joricho to chadho mana weche mamono. 
Proverbs19:29 Josunga gi joma ofuwo duto biro yudo kum. 
Proverbs20:1 Kong’o miyo ng’ato bedo jakoko maonge gi rieko. Emomiyo mer en mana fuwo. 
Proverbs20:2 Ka ruoth okecho, to nyaka iluore, mana kaka iluoro sibuor karuto, nikech kimedo wang’o iye, to ichalo mana gi ng’ama dere." 
Proverbs20:3 Joma onge gi rieko ohero kelo dhaw. To ng’ama ok dwar miero to ji miyo luor. 
Proverbs20:4 Jasamuoyo ma ok pur puothe e kinde mowinjore ok nyal yudo cham e ndalo keyo. 
Proverbs20:5 Paro mae chuny ng’ato chalo gi pi manie soko matut, to ng’at machielo man gi rieko nyalo tuomogi oko." 
Proverbs20:6 Ji mang’eny wuorore kendgi ni gin joma ogen, to temie ane ka diyud kata mana achiel ma inyalo geno!" 
Proverbs20:7 Nyithindo ma wuon-gi jaadiera, kendo timo gik makare gin johawi." 
Proverbs20:8 Ruoth mobet e kom duong’ne kang’ado bura piedho weche maricho duto gi wang’e. 
Proverbs20:9 Ere ng’ama nyalo wacho ni parone long’o, kendo ni richone duto osepuodhi?" 
Proverbs20:10 Ruoth Nyasaye mon gi rapim ma ok ni kare. 
Proverbs20:11 Timbe nyathi ema nyiso kite, omiyo inyalo ng’eyo ka kite ber kata rach." 
Proverbs20:12 Ruoth Nyasaye osemiyowa wang’ mondo wanen-go, kendo osemiyowa it mondo wawinjgo wach." 
Proverbs20:13 Ka ihero riyo mana kinindo, to nyaka ibed modhier, to ka itiyo matek, to ibedo gi chiemo mogundho." 
Proverbs20:14 Pile jang’iewo ywagore ni nengo gimoro tek. Koseng’iewo, to osungore ni ong’iewo gino gi nengo mayot." 
Proverbs20:15 Ka iwuoyo gi rieko, to in gi mwandu moloyo dhahabu kata kite ma nengogi tek." 
Proverbs20:16 Ng’at mochung’ ni ng’ato nono e gowi onego omak mwandune kar gowino. 
Proverbs20:17 Chiemo moyud e yor miganga nenore ni mit mokadho, to achien omuodore mana ka kuoyo." 
Proverbs20:18 Kiyie mondo ji ong’adni rieko to in idhi nyime maber, omiyo kik ibuk lweny ka pok iikori maber." 
Proverbs20:19 Ng’at ma jafuong’ wach ok kan weche maling’ling’, omiyo bed mabor gi ng’ama ok rit dhoge." 
Proverbs20:20 Ka ng’ato okuong’o wuon kata min, to ngimane norum mana ka taya motho e mudho mandiwa." 
Proverbs20:21 Ka ng’ato choko mwandu e yo mayot, to e giko mwandugo ok nokonye ngang’." 
Proverbs20:22 Kik ichul kuor kuom gima rach ma ng’ato otimoni, to gen kuom Ruoth Nyasaye mondo olosni wachno." 
Proverbs20:23 Ruoth Nyasaye mon gi joma tiyo gi rapim ma ok ni kare. 
Proverbs20:24 Ka Ruoth Nyasaye ema telo ni ji, to koro ere kaka dhano adhana matho ding’e kuma dhiye?" 
Proverbs20:25 Ng’at ma kuong’ore ka rikni ni biro chiwo ni Nyasaye gimoro keto mana wino e ng’ute, nikech achien dipo ka oywago ang’e!" 
Proverbs20:26 Ruoth mariek fwenyo joketho, kendo okumogi ma ok okechogi." 
Proverbs20:27 Ruoth Nyasaye menyo chuny dhano hie, kononogo parone maiye." 
Proverbs20:28 Ruoth mang’won ma timne kare kendo ma jaadiera ema siko korito pinye. 
Proverbs20:29 Sunga mar yawuowi en teko ma gin go, kendo duong’ mar jodongo en lwar mae wigi." 
Proverbs20:30 Goch motegno miyo ng’ato weyo richo, kendo chwat malit chopo nyaka e chuny dhano." 
Proverbs21:1 Ruoth Nyasaye ema nyiso ruoth gik monego otim, mana kaka ochiko aora kuma onego molie." 
Proverbs21:2 Ng’ato nyalo paro ni gik moko duto motimo ni kare, to Ruoth Nyasaye ema ong’eyo parone duto." 
Proverbs21:3 Ruoth Nyasaye ohero mondo itim gik makare kendo mowinjore moloyo timone misengni. 
Proverbs21:4 Wang’teko kod sunga ema otelo ni joma timbegi mono, to mano en richo." 
Proverbs21:5 Ng’at matiyo matek, kendo ma chano gik moko mos noyud gik mathoth, to ng’at marikni ok noyud gimoro." 
Proverbs21:6 Mwandu moyudi e yor miganga lal piyopiyo nono, to bende gitero ji e tho." 
Proverbs21:7 Tim mahundu en obadho ma joricho mokoe, nikech gidagi timo gik makare." 
Proverbs21:8 Joketho wuotho e yo mogondore ogondore. Joma onge ketho to wuotho mana e yo moriere tir. 
Proverbs21:9 Ber dak e kiru, moloyo dak e ot maduong’ gi dhako maralep." 
Proverbs21:10 Riyo mar timo richo ohingo joma timbegi mono, kendo ok gikech ng’ato." 
Proverbs21:11 Ka ng’at ma wang’e tek oyudo kum, to eka koda ka ng’at ma onge paro puonjore. Ng’at mariek to mako gik mipuonje." 
Proverbs21:12 Nyasaye Makare nono miech joricho, kendo otieko jorichogo." 
Proverbs21:13 Ka ng’ato odino ite ni ywak joma odhier, to en bende ywakne ok nowinji." 
Proverbs21:14 Mich mochiw ling’ling’ ni ng’at mokecho, kueyo mirimbe." 
Proverbs21:15 Ka adiera nitie to joma kare bedo mamor. Joma timbegi mono to lal nono. 
Proverbs21:16 Ng’at moweyo yor rieko ochiko mana piny joma otho. 
Proverbs21:17 Ng’at mohero raha, nyaka bed jachan. Adier, ng’at mohero kong’o gi chiemo mabeyo ok nyal bedo gi mwandu." 
Proverbs21:18 Chandruok ma joricho dwaro ni joma kare dok mana e wigi giwegi. 
Proverbs21:19 Ber dak e thim oko, moloyo dak gi dhako maralep makwiny." 
Proverbs21:20 Gik mabeyo opong’o dala ng’ama riek kendo odhi maber. Joma ofuwo to ketho mwandugi aketha piyopiyo. 
Proverbs21:21 Bed mang’won kendo ma jaadiera, mondo idag aming’a, eka ji nomiyi luor, kendo notimni maber." 
Proverbs21:22 Jatend lweny man gi rieko nyalo kawo dala ma jolweny mager orito, mi oketh ohinga mane jolwenygo paro ni ogeng’ogi." 
Proverbs21:23 Ka ok idwar ni iyud chandruok, to rit lewi." 
Proverbs21:24 Jasunga e nying mowinjore gi ng’ama kawore ma wang’e tek, kendo ma ok dew ji." 
Proverbs21:25 Ng’at ma jasamwoyo ma ok ohero tich negore mana kende owuon. 
Proverbs21:26 Parone osiko mana kuom gik ma ogombo ni mondo obedgo. Ng’at makare to bade lach, kendo pogo gige gi ng’wono." 
Proverbs21:27 Ruoth Nyasaye mon gi misango ma joricho timone, to moloyo kotimne misangono gi paro marach." 
Proverbs21:28 Janeno ma wacho miriambo biro lal nono, to ng’at mawacho adiera, nowe nyikwayo bang’e." 
Proverbs21:29 Ng’at makare ong’eyo gima otimo. Jaricho to wuondore awuonda. 
Proverbs21:30 Rieko gi ng’eyo kod paro matut, Ruoth Nyasaye ok kwan ka gimoro." 
Proverbs21:31 Inyalo gawo farese mondo obed moikore ni lweny, to Ruoth Nyasaye ema miyo ilocho." 
Proverbs22:1 Ber bedo gi nying maber, moloyo bedo gi mwandu mathoth. Bende ber bedo ng’at mogen, moloyo bedo gi fedha kata dhahabu." 
Proverbs22:2 Onge pogruok moro e kind jachan gi jamoko, nimar Ruoth Nyasaye nochueyogi giduto." 
Proverbs22:3 Ng’at man gi rieko neno chandruok kabiro, kendo tang’. Ng’at ma riekone tin to mwomore amwoma e chandruok, eka achien oywago ang’e." 
Proverbs22:4 Bed ng’ama ok sungre, kendo luor Ruoth Nyasaye, eka iyud mwandu gi luor, kendo idag aming’a." 
Proverbs22:5 Obadho kod bugni nie yo ma jaricho luwo, omiyo ka ihero ngimani to bed mabor gi yorno." 
Proverbs22:6 Ka ipuonjo nyathi timbe mabeyo ka pod otin, to wiye ok nowil gi timgo e ngimane duto." 
Proverbs22:7 Joma odhier gin wasumb jomwandu, kendo kiholo gimoro kuom ng’ato to nyaka idok misumbane." 
Proverbs22:8 Ng’at matimo timbe mamono nyaka yud masira, kendo e giko ibiro kume mager." 
Proverbs22:9 Ng’at mang’won to noyud gueth, nikech opogo chiembe ni jochan." 
Proverbs22:10 Ka iriembo ng’at ma jasunga, to wichkuot kod miero gi dhaw orumo." 
Proverbs22:11 Inyalo bedo osiep ruoth kiperogo. Ruoth Nyasaye to ohero mana ng’ama jaadiera. 
Proverbs22:12 Orango mondo one ni bura ong’ad kare, to oketho buch ng’at ma jamriambo." 
Proverbs22:13 Ng’at ma janyawo budho abudha e dala, kawacho ni sibuor dipo kochame kowuok oko." 
Proverbs22:14 Terruok en bur matut ma joma Ruoth Nyasaye okechogo nyumoree. 
Proverbs22:15 Timo gik mofuwo en kit nyathi. Ka ichwade to obiro weyo timbe makamago. 
Proverbs22:16 Ka ithiro jochan mondo iyud mwandu, kata ka imiyo joma omew chiwo, to in ema ibedo jachan." 
Proverbs22:17 Chik iti iwinj weche joma riek, kendo ket chunyi mondo imak rieko ma gipuonji," 
Proverbs22:18 nikech kikanogi e chunyi, kendo kinyalo hulogi gi wiyi, to inibed mamor." 
Proverbs22:19 Adwaro ni mondo iket genoni kuom Ruoth Nyasaye. Mano emomiyo apuonji wechegi mondo okonyi in iwuon. 
Proverbs22:20 Eri, asendikoni ngeche piero adekgi. Giting’o ng’eyo kod rieko maber," 
Proverbs22:21 kendo gibiro puonji ng’eyo adiera, mondo idwok wach maradiera ni ng’at mane oori." 
Proverbs22:22 Kik iyak ng’at modhier mana nikech odhier, kendo ka odonj ni ng’at mathagore, to kik ithage," 
Proverbs22:23 nimar Ruoth Nyasaye nochwak joma kamago, kendo nokum ng’ato ang’ata ma yakogi." 
Proverbs22:24 Kik imak osiep gi ng’ama iye jawang’ piyo, kendo kik ibed e kanyakla mar joma chunygi richo," 
Proverbs22:25 nimar dipo ka iluwo timbegi, mi imoko e obadho marach." 
Proverbs22:26 Kik ichung’ ni ng’ato nono e gowi," 
Proverbs22:27 nikech kotami chulo to wuon gowino nyalo kata mana kawo kitandani! 
Proverbs22:28 Kik iketh kiew machon mane kwereni oketo. 
Proverbs22:29 Ng’at ma ong’eyo tije maber ok ti ni ji ajiya, to tiyo mana ni ruodhi." 
Proverbs23:1 Ka ibet piny mondo ichiem gi ruoth, to par malong’o ni ng’at ma ichiemogi en ng’a!" 
Proverbs23:2 Ka in jawuoro to dimbri! 
Proverbs23:3 Kik iwe miluma hewi gi chiembe mamit, nimar nyalo bet ni odwaro mana ng’eyogo kiti." 
Proverbs23:4 Kik iwe tich bari ndasi ni eka iyud mwandu mang’eny," 
Proverbs23:5 to bed mariek nimar pesani nyalo lal ka diemo wang’, mana ka gima en gi buombene ma ohuyogo ka ongo." 
Proverbs23:6 Kik ichiem gi ng’at ma jamgundia, kata kik iwe miluma hewi gi chiembe mamit." 
Proverbs23:7 Onyalo wachoni ni mondo ichiem kode, to ng’e malong’o ni owuondi awuonda. Ochalo yier momoko e dwondi," 
Proverbs23:8 mamiyo ing’ogo gik ma isechamo, mi wecheni mamit lal nono." 
Proverbs23:9 Kik item wuoyo gi ng’at mofuwo, nikech obiro mana chayo riekoni." 
Proverbs23:10 Kik iketh kiew machon, kata kik ima nyithi kiye lopgi," 
Proverbs23:11 nikech Ruoth Nyasaye man gi teko e jaritgi, kendo ema chwakogi." 
Proverbs23:12 Ket chunyi kuom puonjruok, kendo chik iti ni weche mag rieko." 
Proverbs23:13 Kik iwe nyathi mak ikumo, nimar chwat ok nyal nege!" 
Proverbs23:14 Chutho mano biro rese mana e tho. 
Proverbs23:15 Wuoda, ka inyalo bedo mariek, to dabed mamor." 
Proverbs23:16 Adier, anabed mamor ahinya ka awinjo ka iwacho weche makare." 
Proverbs23:17 Kik nyiego maki gi gik ma joricho nigo, to luor mana Ruoth Nyasaye ndalo duto." 
Proverbs23:18 Ka itimo kamano to inidhi maber, kendo inidag aming’a." 
Proverbs23:19 Wuoda, winja mondo ibed mariek, kendo ket chunyi kuom tim maber." 
Proverbs23:20 Kik ibed e kanyakla mar jokong’o gi jowuoro," 
Proverbs23:21 nikech gikogi en mana dhier. Ka tichni en mana chiemo gi nindo, to nyaka iwuoth duk!" 
Proverbs23:22 Winj wuoru, nikech en ema onywoli, kendo kik icha meru, kata bed ni oseti." 
Proverbs23:23 Adiera gi rieko gi puonjruok kod paro maber ema nyaka iyudi, kata dabed ni ing’iewogi gi nengo matek. Kik iwe ng’ato kawgi kata dabed ni omiyi ang’o." 
Proverbs23:24 Wuon ng’at makare en jahawi, nikech wuowi mariek miyo wuon bedo mamor." 
Proverbs23:25 Kuom mano bed ng’at mamiyo wuon gi min mane onywole mor. 
Proverbs23:26 Wuoda, chik iti maber mondo ngimana obedni ranyisi." 
Proverbs23:27 Dhako ma jachode en bur matut, kendo dhako materore en soko ma dhoge diny." 
Proverbs23:28 Gibuto ni ji ka jomecho, kendo gimiyo ji mathoth donjo e richo." 
Proverbs23:29 Ng’at madeko oko ka kong’o, kendo mamadho kong’o mayoreyore donjo e dhaw kendo yudo masira. Ohinyore kayiem nono; wang’e bende kwar. Bang’e to oywago ang’e." 
Proverbs23:30  
Proverbs23:31 Kuom mano kik irwo kong’o mochiek kendo matar, kineno ka bwoyo yienyo e dho agwata," 
Proverbs23:32 nikech kinyne gokinyi niwinj dendi ka rach mana ka gima thuol man gi kwiri marach ema okayi. 
Proverbs23:33 Inine gik mayoreyore ka ringo e wang’i, kendo iniwach gik manono." 
Proverbs23:34 Iniukni mana ka ng’at man e yie ma apaka tago e chuny nam. 
Proverbs23:35 Bang’e iniwach niya, “Nyaka bed ni ng’ato osechwada, to ok anyal paro gima osetimorena. Nyaka bed ni osegoya, to kata kamano ne ok awinjo kigoya. Ere kaka anyalo chung’ mondo adog ameth kendo?”" 
Proverbs24:1 Kik nyiego maki gi gik ma joricho nigo, bende kik item bedo osiepgi." 
Proverbs24:2 Nimar gik makelo chandruok ema giketo e chunygi, kendo wechegi duto hinyo ji." 
Proverbs24:3 Mise mar dala maber en mana rieko kod ng’eyo. 
Proverbs24:4 Ng’at mariek keto gik moko mabeyo kendo ma nengogi tek e ute. 
Proverbs24:5 Bedo mariek ber moloyo bedo ratego, Adier, rieko nigi tich moloyo teko." 
Proverbs24:6 Joma chano gik moko malong’o ema kedo lweny maber, omiyo, kidwaro loyo lweny, to nyaka ibed gi jong’ad rieko mathoth." 
Proverbs24:7 Ng’at mofuwo ok nyal winjo tiend weche mariek nikech gitut modhiere. Onge gima long’o ma onyalo wacho e bura. 
Proverbs24:8 Ka pile ichano timo richo, to ji biro luongi ni andhoga." 
Proverbs24:9 Gimoro amora ma ng’at mofuwo chano timo en richo. Ji mon gi ng’at machayo jowetene. 
Proverbs24:10 Ka tekri orumo chieng’ ma chandruok omaki, to mano nyiso ni tekoni tin." 
Proverbs24:11 Kineno ng’at ma ji dwaro nego, to rese piyopiyo." 
Proverbs24:12 Kik iwach ni mano ok tiji, nikech Nyasaye ma pimo chuny ji nopar gima itimono. Bed gi ratiro ni Nyasaye marangi ong’eyo gima itimo. Ochulo ng’ato ka ng’ato moromo gi timbene." 
Proverbs24:13 Wuoda, cham mor kich, nikech ober gi del. Kaka pet kich mit e dhogi," 
Proverbs24:14 e kaka rieko gi ng’eyo bende ber ni chunyi. Ka iyudogi to inidhi nyime maber, kendo nidag aming’a." 
Proverbs24:15 Kik ichan mayo ng’at makare gire, kata ketho dalane, nikech mano en richo." 
Proverbs24:16 Ng’at makare nyalo podho ndalo mang’eny, to pod ochako ochung’ achung’a kendo. Jaricho to masira achiel kende ema tieko." 
Proverbs24:17 Kik ibed mamor ka masira omako jasiki," 
Proverbs24:18 nono to Ruoth Nyasaye oneno kitimo kamano, mi in ema osin kodi, to oweyo jasikino." 
Proverbs24:19 Kik iwe timbe joricho thag chunyi, bende kik nyiego maki gi gik ma gin go," 
Proverbs24:20 nimar jaricho onge gi gima ogeno, to tho kende ema ochomogi." 
Proverbs24:21 Wuoda, luor Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo luor ruoth ma rito piny. Bed mabor gi joma piem kodgi," 
Proverbs24:22 nikech joma kamago nyalo lal nono ka diemo wang’. Bende ing’eyo masira ma biro tieko jogo? 
Proverbs24:23 Wechegi bende gin weche mane joma riek wacho. Ng’ado bura nyakonchiel nikech luoro wang’ en richo. 
Proverbs24:24 Ka jang’ad bura owacho ni ng’at moketho onge gi ketho, to ji duto manie piny kuong’e kendo chaye." 
Proverbs24:25 Jong’ad bura ma kumo joketho, to dhi nyime maber, kendo bedo gi huma." 
Proverbs24:26 Ka ng’ato odwoki gi dwok maratiro, to mano nyiso ni en osiepni maradier." 
Proverbs24:27 Kik igo dala mi iger ot maber kapok iloso puotheni ma miyi chiemo moromi. 
Proverbs24:28 Kik ibed janeno mar miriambo kuom wadu ka onge gima omiyo. 
Proverbs24:29 Kik iwach niya, “Abiro timone mana gima nyocha otimona! Adier, abiro chulone kuor!”" 
Proverbs24:30 Ne oyudo awuotho e puothe mag ng’at ma jasamwoyo kendo ma riekone tin. 
Proverbs24:31 Puothenego notimo kuthe kendo ogawore gi buya. Ohinga mane ochielgigo bende nosemukore. 
Proverbs24:32 Kane arango puothego ne aparo mi ayudo niya," 
Proverbs24:33 Ka ng’ato okwakore mondo otim nindoe matin," 
Proverbs24:34 to e sa mapod onindoeno, dhier biro gore kuome apoya, ka jamecho momanore gi gilweny." 
Proverbs25:1 Magi e ngeche mamoko mag Solomon, mane jotich Hezekia ruodh Juda ondiko, kogolo kuonde mane ondikgie:" 
Proverbs25:2 Wamiyo Nyasaye duong’ kuom gik ma opando. Ruodhi to wamiyo duong’ kuom lero tiend weche. 
Proverbs25:3 Onge ng’ama ong’eyo chuny ruoth, nimar parone oyombowa mana kaka bor mar polo, kendo tut mar nam." 
Proverbs25:4 Ka ogol chilo kuom fedha, eka jatheth nyalo thedho gimoro maber gi fedhano." 
Proverbs25:5 Kamano bende kogol jong’ad rieko maricho e nyim ruoth, to lochne gurore motegno, nikech orito piny gi adiera."
