Proverbs25:6 Ka ichung’ e nyim ruoth, to kik iyiedhri mondo ong’eyi, kendo kik idhi ibed kama oyang ni jodongo," 
Proverbs25:7 nono to ogoli kanyo mondo iwe thuolo ni ng’ama duong’ moloyi! Emomiyo ber bedo kama rachrach, eka luongi mondo idhi ibed kama oyiedhi." 
Proverbs25:8 Kik irikni hulo ni ng’ato gimoro amora mineno, dipo ka wadu moro obiro mong’eng’i marach." 
Proverbs25:9 Ka in gi wach gi wadu, to los wachno kode ka un kendu to kik ihul weche maling’ling’ mag ng’ato," 
Proverbs25:10 nikech kowinjo to obiro kuodo wiyi marach, mi nyingi kethre nyaka chieng’." 
Proverbs25:11 Wach mowachi maber e kinde mowinjore chalo gi gimoro maber, molos gi dhahabu, moket ei adita mochue gi fedha." 
Proverbs25:12 Siem ma ng’at mariek siemogo ng’at ma chiko ite, ber moloyo tere mar dhahabu, kata tigo molos gi dhahabu." 
Proverbs25:13 Jaote malong’o duogo chuny joma oore, mana ka pi mang’ich ma nego riyo e ndalo keyo ka chieng’ kech." 
Proverbs25:14 Ji ma sungore ni biro chiwo gik moko, to bang’e ok chiw, chalo gi boche polo kod yamo ma ok kel koth." 
Proverbs25:15 Kihori mos gi weche mamuol to inyalo loko kata mana chuny ruoth matek manade. Lep mayom bende nyalo turo chogo. 
Proverbs25:16 Kinwang’o mor kich, to cham mana moromi, nikech ka ichamo mathoth, to dipo ka ing’ok." 
Proverbs25:17 Kamano bende kik ilim wadu pile pile, nikech dipo ka ojok kodi, mi ochayi." 
Proverbs25:18 Ng’at ma riambo kuom wadgi chalo mana gi arungu kata ligangla kata asere mabith. 
Proverbs25:19 Geno kuom ng’at ma mibadhi ka in e chandruok chalo gi muodo gimoro gi lak malit, kata wuotho gi tielo mowil," 
Proverbs25:20 kata dong’ duk ka piny ng’ich. Wero wer ni ng’at ma chunye lit chalo mana gi rudho chumbi e adhola. 
Proverbs25:21 Ka jasiki odenyo, to miye chiemo, kendo ka riyo oloye, to miye pi omodhi," 
Proverbs25:22 nikech kitimo kamano to inege gi wich kuot, kendo Ruoth Nyasaye nomiyi pok." 
Proverbs25:23 Fuong’o wach kelo miero, mana kaka yamo kelo koth." 
Proverbs25:24 Ber dak e kiru, moloyo dak e ot maduong’ gi dhako maralep." 
Proverbs25:25 Winjo wach maber moa kuma bor chalo gi modho pi mang’ich ka riyo oloyi. 
Proverbs25:26 Ng’at makare ma ok kwer jaricho, ka temo chune timo gimoro, chalo mana gi aora moduwore, kata gi soko ma ok nyal modh pige." 
Proverbs25:27 Kaka chamo mor kich mathoth ahinya ok ber, e kaka dwaro pak mang’eny bende rach." 
Proverbs25:28 Ng’at ma ok nyal pieyo mirimbe, chal mana gi dala ma onge gi ohinga, ma monjo yot." 
Proverbs26:1 Pako ng’at mofuwo ok owinjore, mana kaka pe kod koth ok owinjore e ndalo keyo." 
Proverbs26:2 Kuong’ ma onge gima omiyo ok nyal mako ng’ato. Gikadho akadha ka winy mahuyo e kor polo to ok pi. 
Proverbs26:3 Kaka faras owinjore gi chwat, kendo kaka dho kanyna owinjore gi tueyo, e kaka ng’at mofuwo bende owinjore gi goch!" 
Proverbs26:4 Ka idwoko ng’at mofuwo e yo mofuwo, to inyalo doko mofuwo ka en," 
Proverbs26:5 to ka ok idwoke kaka owinjore, to onyalo paro ni oriek." 
Proverbs26:6 Kioro ng’at mofuwo to ing’ado mana tiendeni iwuon, nikech obiro keloni masira." 
Proverbs26:7 Ngero ma ng’at mofuwo ogoyo wengni mana ka tiend rang’ol. 
Proverbs26:8 Kipako ng’at mofuwo, to ichalo mana gi ng’at motueyo kidi e orujre." 
Proverbs26:9 Ngero ma ng’at mofuwo goyo chalo mana gi kudho mochwowo lwet ng’at momer. 
Proverbs26:10 Ng’at ma ndiko ng’ato ang’ata moyudo chalo gi ng’at matho diro aserni adira, ka hinyogo ji duto." 
Proverbs26:11 Ng’at mofuwo ma nwoyo gima ofuwo ma osetimo chalo gi guok modok nang’o ng’okne. 
Proverbs26:12 Ber bedo ng’at mofuwo mogik moloyo bedo ng’at maparo ni riek, to chutho ok riek." 
Proverbs26:13 Ng’at ma jasamwoyo wacho ni sibuor ni oko, omiyo ok owuogi." 
Proverbs26:14 Jasamuoyo lokore aloka e kitanda, mana kaka dhoot malworore e pata." 
Proverbs26:15 Ji moko nyap ahinya, ma ok nyal kata mana nyamo chiembgi." 
Proverbs26:16 Ng’at ma jasamwoyo paro e chunye ni oriek moloyo ji abiriyo mariek. 
Proverbs26:17 Kidonjo e wach ma ok mari, to ichalo mana gi ng’at mamako guok gi ite." 
Proverbs26:18 Ng’at ma wuondo wadgi, to eka wacho ni ongere angera" 
Proverbs26:19 chalo gi janeko ma tho diro aserni gi tong’ adira. 
Proverbs26:20 Ka yien onge, to mach tho. Kamano bende, ka jakuoth onge, to miero orumo." 
Proverbs26:21 Kaka mirni miyo mach ng’ang’ni, kendo kaka yien miyo mach liel, e kaka kwinyo bende ero miero." 
Proverbs26:22 Mano kaka weche kuoth mit! Gidonjonwa mana kaka chiemo mamit ridore e iwa. 
Proverbs26:23 Weche mamit mawuok e chuny marach chalo gi agulu mochue marachrach, to owir gi range mang’ang’ni." 
Proverbs26:24 Jasigu nyalo wuoyo kodi mamit gi dhoge, to chutho chunye maiye wuondi awuonda." 
Proverbs26:25 Kata obedo ni wechenego mit kamano, to kik iyie kode, nikech chunye sigu opong’o." 
Proverbs26:26 Onyalo wuondore ni oonge gi sigu, to kata kamano gik maricho motimo biro nenore e lela." 
Proverbs26:27 Ka ng’ato okunyo ni wadgi bur, to en ema onyumore e burno. Kata ka ong’ielo kidi mondo ohinygo wadgi, to en ema kidino ng’ielore kuome." 
Proverbs26:28 Lep mawacho miriambo, mon gi adiera, kendo dhok ma pero ji kelo masira." 
Proverbs27:1 Kik isungri ni gima pok ineno, nikech ok ing’eyo gima biro timore." 
Proverbs27:2 We ji moko ema opaki, kata bed ni gin welo. In kik ipakri kendi." 
Proverbs27:3 Chandruok ma ng’at mofuwo kelo pek moloyo kidi kata kuoyo. 
Proverbs27:4 Mirima kwiny, kendo ketho gik moko. Nyiego to rach moloyo!" 
Proverbs27:5 Kwero ng’ato ratiro ber moloyo here, to ok inyise kethone." 
Proverbs27:6 Osiepni, kata ka ogoyi, to otimo kamano nikech oheri. Jasigu to kata ka omosi gi mor, to mosneno oting’o masira." 
Proverbs27:7 Ka ng’ato oyieng’ to kata mana mor kich ok odwar. Ka odenyo to kata mana chiemo makech mitne amita! 
Proverbs27:8 Ng’at man mabor gi thurgi, chalo mana gi winyo modhi mabor gi ode." 
Proverbs27:9 Mo ma iwirruokgo kod poda mang’ue ng’ar miyo ng’ato winjo maber, kendo rieko ma osiep ng’ado miyo chuny bedo motegno." 
Proverbs27:10 Kik wiyi wil gi osiepni kata mana gi osiepe wuoru, kendo ka in gi chandruok, to kik iring ir owadu mondo okonyi, nikech ng’at modak buti nyalo konyi moloyo owadu modak mabor." 
Proverbs27:11 Wuoda, bed mariek mondo chunya obed mamor, eka abed gi gima ageng’ogo joma chaya." 
Proverbs27:12 Ng’at man gi rieko neno chandruok ka biro, kendo tang’. Ng’at ma riekone tin to mwomore amwoma e chandruok eka achien oywago ang’e." 
Proverbs27:13 Ng’at mochung’ ni ng’ato nono e gowi onego omak mwandune kar gowino! 
Proverbs27:14 Ng’at ma moso wadgi matek gokinyi mang’ich chalo mana ng’ama ire. 
Proverbs27:15 Dhako maralep chalo mana gi kodh ajiki. 
Proverbs27:16 Ok inyal kwere mi oling’, mana kaka ok inyal ng’eyo yamo. Bende ok inyal kwere, mana kaka ok inyal jowo mo maliw gi lweti." 
Proverbs27:17 Kaka nyinyo piago nyinyo wadgi, e kaka ng’ato bende piago obwongo wadgi." 
Proverbs27:18 Ng’at maloso yiend olembene maber ema nocham olembegi. Kamano bende e kaka jatich marito ruodhe maber nomi duong’. 
Proverbs27:19 Kirango pi, to wang’i iwuon ema ineno, kendo kirango chunyi, to in iwuon ema inenori." 
Proverbs27:20 Kaka joma otho ok nyal pong’o Piny Joma Otho, e kaka gombo mar dhano bende ok nyal rumo." 
Proverbs27:21 Mach ema itemogo dhahabu kod fedha. Chuny dhano to itemo gi pak. 
Proverbs27:22 Kata ka igoyo ng’at mofuwo mi both inego, to pod ofuwo afuwa." 
Proverbs27:23 Rit jambi maber gi rieko kaka inyalo," 
Proverbs27:24 nikech mwandu ok siki nyaka chieng’. Kata mana loch bende ok siki e dhoot achiel kende. 
Proverbs27:25 Ka ibeto lum, mi iweyo lum manyien oloth, kendo ka ichoko ni jambi lum e kor gode," 
Proverbs27:26 eka iniyud yie rombe milosogo lewni, kendo ining’iew lowo gi pesa miyudo kuom dieki." 
Proverbs27:27 Dieki nomiyi chak moromi maber, kaachiel gi joodi kod jotichni manyiri." 
Proverbs28:1 Jaricho ringo kata ka onge ng’ama lawe. Ng’at makare to jachir ka sibuor. 
Proverbs28:2 Piny nyalo bedo mogurore kendo motegno ka nitie jotelo mariek. To ka richo nie piny, to jotelo ok ti aming’a." 
Proverbs28:3 Jatelo mathiro jochan chalo gi kodh yamo ma ketho cham. 
Proverbs28:4 Joma ok oluoro chik pako joricho. Joma orito chik to kwerogi. 
Proverbs28:5 Joma timbegi mono ok ong’eyo adiera, to jogo malamo Ruoth Nyasaye ong’eyo gik moko duto." 
Proverbs28:6 Ber bedo jachan ma jaratiro oloyo bedo jamoko ma timbene obam. 
Proverbs28:7 Wuowi ma rito chik en ng’ama riek, to ng’at mamako osiep gi joma nono oloyo, kuodo wi wuon mare." 
Proverbs28:8 Ka iholo ji gik moko mondo odwokni gi ohala, to ohala miyudono nodog ni ng’at machielo makonyo jochan." 
Proverbs28:9 Ka ng’ato ok orito chik, to kata mana lemone Nyasaye mon-go." 
Proverbs28:10 Ka ichiko ng’at makare gi richo, to in iwuon ema richono nodogni. Ng’at ma onge ketho to yudo gik mabeyo." 
Proverbs28:11 Jamwandu pile paro ni riek, to jachan man gi paro matut ong’eyo chuny jamwanduno." 
Proverbs28:12 Ka joma kare nigi loch, to ji duto mor, to ka joricho e jotelo, to ji pondo aponda." 
Proverbs28:13 Ng’at ma temo pando richone ok nyal dhi maber, to ng’ama hulo richone kendo weyo ema Nyasaye kecho." 
Proverbs28:14 Ng’at ma pile oluoro Ruoth Nyasaye en jahawi. Ng’ama wiye tek to masira mako. 
Proverbs28:15 Jatelo marach ma rito joma chandore chalo mana gi sibuor modenyo, kata ka ondiek ma kech nego." 
Proverbs28:16 Ruoth ma onge gi rieko sando joge asanda, to ruoth mamon gi timbe mobam, to nobed gi loch aming’a." 
Proverbs28:17 Ng’at ma oneko, ochomo mana kar joma otho. Omiyo ng’ato kik geng’e." 
Proverbs28:18 Ng’at makare yudo kue. Ng’ama mibadhi to podho. 
Proverbs28:19 Ng’at mapuro matek nigi chiemo mathoth. Joma timo mana gik manono to nyaka bed maonge gimoro. 
Proverbs28:20 Ng’at makare dak malong’o e ngima maber, to ng’at ma rikni mondo oyud mwandu nyaka yud kum." 
Proverbs28:21 Dok ni ng’ato kayiem ok ber. Jong’ad bura moko nyalo dok ni ng’ato mana ni mondo ocham asoya moro maonge ndhathe! 
Proverbs28:22 Ng’at ma iye lit rikni mondo oyud mwandu. Ok ong’eyo ni chieng’ moro dhier nyalo make. 
Proverbs28:23 Kikwero ng’ato e wang’e, to nopaki moloyo kipere." 
Proverbs28:24 Ng’at ma kwalo mwandu wuon gi min, to paro ni mano ok rach, chalo mana janek." 
Proverbs28:25 Ng’at ma iye lit kelo miero, to ng’at ma ogeno kuom Ruoth Nyasaye dhi maber." 
Proverbs28:26 Ng’at mogeno kuom riekone owuon en ng’at mofuwo, to ng’at ma luwo puonj joma riek dhi nyime maber." 
Proverbs28:27 Ng’at ma konyo jochan ok chand gimoro, to ng’at ma loko wang’e ok yud gimoro mak mana kuong’." 
Proverbs28:28 Ka joricho nigi loch, to ji pondo aponda, to ka girumo, to joma kare chako kawo loch kendo." 
Proverbs29:1 Ng’at ma wiye medo bedo matek, kata ka osekwere, nopo mana ka otur ma ok chomre." 
Proverbs29:2 Ka joma kare nigi loch, to ji duto mor, to ka joricho e jotelo to ji ng’ur ang’ura." 
Proverbs29:3 Ng’at mohero rieko miyo wuon mare mor. Ng’at ma jachode to ketho mwandune aketha. 
Proverbs29:4 Ka ruoth orito pinye gi adiera, to piny dhi maber, to ka obembo ji gi osuru mathoth, to oketho piny." 
Proverbs29:5 Ng’at ma pero wadgi chiko obadho mana ni en owuon. 
Proverbs29:6 Jaricho rwako wino e ng’ute mana nikech kethone. Joma kare to dhi maber kendo bedo mamor. 
Proverbs29:7 Ng’at makare winjo ywak jochan. Ng’at marach to ok dwe gik makamago. 
Proverbs29:8 Joma ok dew jowadgi nyalo kelo miero e gweng’. Joma riek to temo kweyo mirimb ji. 
Proverbs29:9 Ka ng’at mariek yalo gi ng’at mofuwo, to oketho kindene kayiem. Ng’at mofuwo biro nyiere anyiera, kagoyo koko kendo yanye." 
Proverbs29:10 Joma ohero chuero remo mon gi ng’at ma jaratiro. Joma kare to okawo ngimane ka gimoro. 
Proverbs29:11 Ng’at mofuwo, iye wang’ piyo, kendo mwomore amwoma. Ng’at mariek to geng’o mirimbe kendo hore mos." 
Proverbs29:12 Ruoth ma ohero chiko ite ni weche mihango, bedo mana gi jotich ma jomriambo." 
Proverbs29:13 Jachan gi ng’at mathire nigi gimoro achiel machalre; en ni Ruoth Nyasaye ema ne omiyogi ngima giduto. 
Proverbs29:14 Ruoth mang’ado ni joricho bura kare ema lochne nogurre mosiko. 
Proverbs29:15 Ka ichwado nyathi, kendo ikwere, eka ikonye bedo mariek. Nyathi mowe aweya to kelo ni min mare wichkuot." 
Proverbs29:16 Ka joricho ema nigi loch to timbe manono medore ameda. Joma kare to nogonigi agoya siboi ka gipodho. 
Proverbs29:17 Puonj wuodi tim maber eka okonyi kendo omiyi mor. 
Proverbs29:18 Oganda ma wach Nyasaye ok fwenyrene en oganda molal. Ng’at morito chik Nyasaye to en jahawi. 
Proverbs29:19 Ok inyal rieyo misumba mana gi dhogi kende, nimar obiro winji awinja, to ok odewi." 
Proverbs29:20 Konyo ng’at mofuwo yot moloyo konyo ng’at mamwomore gi wach. 
Proverbs29:21 Kimiyo misumba gik moko duto modwaro, chakre tinne, to chieng’ moro en ema nokaw gigi duto." 
Proverbs29:22 Ng’at ma iye jawang’ piyo, pile kelo miero kod masira." 
Proverbs29:23 Sunga ema miyo ji podho. Joma muol to yudo luor. 
Proverbs29:24 Ng’at moyie kawo gik ma jakuo okwalo hinyore kende owuon, nikech ong’eyo ni okuong’ ng’at ma ok hul gima rach moseneno, to kata kamano pod ok onyal hulo, nimar ong’eyo bende ni kohulo to dikume." 
Proverbs29:25 En gima rach luoro gima ji paro kuomi, to ber geno mana kuom Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Proverbs29:26 Kata obedo ni pile ji mang’eny londhore mondo ruoth okonygi, to chutho Ruoth Nyasaye kende ema ng’ado bura gi adiera." 
Proverbs29:27 Joma kare mon gi joricho, to joricho bende mon gi joma kare." 
Proverbs30:1 Magi e weche moko matut mag Agur wuod Jake: “Nyasaye ok ni koda! Yaye, Nyasaye ok ni koda! Omiyo aol marumo." 
Proverbs30:2 Achalo mana le to ok dhano, kendo aonge gi paro ma dhano nigo." 
Proverbs30:3 Pok apuonjora bedo mariek, omiyo ok ang’eyo gimoro kata matin kuom Nyasaye." 
Proverbs30:4 Ere ng’ama osedhi e polo, kendo oseduogo? Koso en ng’a ma oseboyo pige mag nembe e law? Kata en ng’a moseketo tunge piny kuonde ma gintie? Hulna nyinge kod nying wuode, king’eyo." 
Proverbs30:5 “Nyasaye rito singruok duto motimo. En okumba ni jogo duto madwaro ni mondo okony. 
Proverbs30:6 Kik ihang wach ni, Nyasaye owacho gimoro ma ok owacho, nikech obiro kumi, monyisi ni in jamriambo.”" 
Proverbs30:7 A Nyasaye, akwayi gik moko ariyo kende. Yie ayudgi kapok atho." 
Proverbs30:8 Mokwongo akwayi ni mondo weche mag miriambo gi mag miganga obed mabor koda. Mar ariyo akwayo ni kik iwe abed jamoko, kata kik iwe abed jachan, to chiemo moroma kende ema imiya," 
Proverbs30:9 nimar ka abedo gi chiemo mathoth, to dipo ka akwedi, to bende ka an jachan, to dipo ka akwelo, mi aketho nyingi, yaye Nyasaye." 
Proverbs30:10 Kik iwuo marach kuom jatich ni ng’at mondike, nono to okuong’i, mi iyudo chandruok." 
Proverbs30:11 Nitie ji ma kuong’o wuonegi, kendo ma ok mi minegi luor." 
Proverbs30:12 Nitie ji moko ma paro ni ler, to adier pok opwodhgi." 
Proverbs30:13 Bende nitie ji moko ma paro ni beyo ahinya. Yaye, mano kaka gisungore!" 
Proverbs30:14 Nitie ji moko ma lekegi chalo ligangla. Gichamo joma odhier kod joma chandore duto manie piny, mi gitiek pep." 
Proverbs30:15 Ji moko nitie ma pile dwaro mondo omigi amiya gik moko, mana kaka chwe bende pile nyodho anyodha remo, to ok yieng’. Bende nitie gik moko adek ma gik moko ok rom. Chutho, gin gik moko ang’wen ma ok nyal wacho ni, “Waromo”." 
Proverbs30:16 Mokwongo en Piny Joma Otho, mar ariyo en dhako ma migumba, mar adek en lowo motwo ma dwaro koth to mar ang’wen en mach malandore alanda." 
Proverbs30:17 Ng’at manyiero wuon, kata machayo min mare ka oti, onego achuth cham, kata onego agak lodh wengene!" 
Proverbs30:18 Nitie gik moko adek motama winjo. Chutho, gin gik moko ang’wen ma tiendgi odhiera ng’eyo." 
Proverbs30:19 Mokwongo en kaka ongo huyo e kor polo, mar ariyo en kaka thuol mol e lwanda, mar adek en kaka yie kwang’ e dier nam, to mar ang’wen en kaka wuowi sero nyako." 
Proverbs30:20 Kit dhako ma miganga chalo kama: Oterore, bang’e olwokore, eka owacho niya, “Onge gima rach masetimo.”" 
Proverbs30:21 Nitie gik moko adek ma chando piny. Chutho, gin gik moko ang’wen ma piny ok nyal yiego." 
Proverbs30:22 Mokwongo en misumba modoko ruodh piny, mar ariyo en ng’at mofuwo moyieng’," 
Proverbs30:23 mar adek en nyako ma kite rach moyudo dichwo, to mar ang’wen en jatich manyako ma omayo dhako mondike dichwo." 
Proverbs30:24 Nitie gik moko ang’wen e piny ma tindo ahinya, to giriek malich!" 
Proverbs30:25 Mokwongo gin biye. Gionge gi teko mathoth, to gikano chiembgi e ndalo chwiri." 
Proverbs30:26 Mar ariyo gin apwoche, ma bende nigi teko matin, to oloso gondgi e kind kite." 
Proverbs30:27 Mar adek gin det bonyo. Gionge gi ruodhgi, to giwuotho ka gichanore ka ogend lweny." 
Proverbs30:28 Mar ang’wen to gin olele. Gitindotindo ma inyalo mana mako gi lwedo, to kata kamano, gidak kata mana e ut ruodhi." 
Proverbs30:29 Nitie gik moko adek ma ber rango, kawuotho. Chutho, gin gik moko ang’wen." 
Proverbs30:30 Mokwongo en sibuor. Oratego moloyo le duto, kendo onge gima oluoro." 
Proverbs30:31 Mar ariyo, en thwon gweno ma gar ka dwaro gwere gi wadgi. Mar adek en nywok, to mar ang’wen en ruoth matelo ni joge kadhi e lweny." 
Proverbs30:32 Ka isebedo mofuwo, mi ikawori kendo ichano timo richo, to ling’, mondo ipar maber," 
Proverbs30:33 nimar kipuoyo chak to iyudo mo, kendo kigoyo um ng’ato to remo chuer, kamano bende, ka iwang’o i ji, to iero miero!" 
Proverbs31:1 Magi e weche matut mane min ruoth Lemuel opuonje: 
Proverbs31:2 “En ang’o, yaye wuoda? Ere gima dawachi? In ema Nyasaye nomiyai bang’ winjo lemo mane akuong’oranego." 
Proverbs31:3 Kik iketh tekri kuom mon, kata kik iwit mwanduni duto kuomgi, nikech giseketho ruodhi mang’eny." 
Proverbs31:4 Yaye, wuoda Lemuel, chik iti ni gima awacho. Ruodhi ok onego omadh kong’o, kendo ok onego gigomb madho gik mamero ji," 
Proverbs31:5 nimar ka gimetho to wigi wil gi chik, kendo giketho buch joma odhier machandore." 
Proverbs31:6 Joma tho, kendo joma chunygi lit ema mondo imi kong’o," 
Proverbs31:7 eka wigi owil gi chan kod chuny lit ma gin-go. 
Proverbs31:8 Kik iwe mak ichwako joma odhier ma ok nyal konyore kendgi. 
Proverbs31:9 Ee, nyaka iwuo mondo ong’adnigi bura kare.”" 
Proverbs31:10 Dhako malong’o ber moloyo kite ma nengogi tek. Mano kaka yudo dhako ma kamano tek! 
Proverbs31:11 Chwore oketo geno mare kuome, omiyo chworeno ok nyal bedo jachan." 
Proverbs31:12 E ngimane duto otimo ni chwore mana gik mabeyo kende. 
Proverbs31:13 Otiyo matek, koloso lewni mabeyo gi yie rombe kod tworo." 
Proverbs31:14 Kaka yiedhi a kuonde maboyo ka kelo gik moko, e kaka dhakono bende kelo chiemo moago oko." 
Proverbs31:15 Omondo chiew mondo olos ni joode chiemo, kendo onyis jotichne manyiri gik ma onego gitim." 
Proverbs31:16 Ka odwaro ng’iewo puodho, to orango puodhono maber, eka ong’iewe gi pesane owuon, bang’e opidhoe mzabibu." 
Proverbs31:17 Otimo kinda, kendo otiyo tijene duto gi teko, mathoth." 
Proverbs31:18 Oneno ni gik moloso kelone ohala, omiyo omoko taya, kendo otiyogo koda ka seche mag otieno." 
Proverbs31:19 Ochueyo yie rombo kendo olosogo law owuon. 
Proverbs31:20 Ong’won ni joma odhier, kendo okonyo joma chandore." 
Proverbs31:21 Ok odew kata ka koyo ng’ich, nikech joode nigi lewni maliet ma girwako." 
Proverbs31:22 Ochueyo lewni mipedho e kitendni. 
Proverbs31:23 Chwore en jabura mong’ere, kendo en achiel kuom jodong piny." 
Proverbs31:24 Dhakono bende loso lewni gi misibe mondo johala ong’iew. 
Proverbs31:25 Oratego kendo ji ogene, bende ndalo mabiro ok goye kibaji." 
Proverbs31:26 Ka owuoyo to owuoyo gi rieko, kendo opuonjo ji gi muolo." 
Proverbs31:27 Pile odich korango gik ma joode ochando. 
Proverbs31:28 Nyithinde goyone erokamano. Chwore bende pake, ka wacho niya," 
Proverbs31:29 “Mon mang’eny beyo, to in ema iloyogi duto.”" 
Proverbs31:30 Ber mar wang’ wuondo ji. Adier, chia bende rumo, to dhako ma oluoro Ruoth Nyasaye ema yudo pak." 
Proverbs31:31 Miye pak moromo gi gik ma otimo, kendo ji duto mondo omiye luor." 
Ecclesiastes1:1 Magi e weche Jayalo ma wuod Daudi, kendo mane ruodh Jerusalem." 
Ecclesiastes1:2 Owacho niya, “Ngima en gima nono. Gik moko duto onge tich. Gin gik manono giduto, kendo onge gima nigi tiende kata achiel!" 
Ecclesiastes1:3 Ere ohala ma dhano yudo kuom gik moko duto motimo e piny ka? 
Ecclesiastes1:4 Tieng’ achiel kadho, kendo tieng’ machielo biro. Piny to osiko mana kaka en." 
Ecclesiastes1:5 Chieng’ wuok kendo podho, eka odok kuma owuokie mondo ochak owuog kendo." 
Ecclesiastes1:6 Yamo bende kudho kochomo yo milambo, kendo okudho kochomo yo nyandwat. Olworore alwora nyaka odog kuma nochakoree." 
Ecclesiastes1:7 Aore duto mol nyaka nam, to nam ok pong’. Bang’e pi dok adoka kuma aore chakoree, kendo chako mol." 
Ecclesiastes1:8 Gik moko duto miyo dhano bedo mool. Adier, ool motamore gi nono. Kata obedo ni wengewa neno gik mang’eny, to pod gidwaro mana neno gik moko. Itwa bende winjo weche mathoth, to pod dwaro mana winjo weche manyien." 
Ecclesiastes1:9 Gik ma osetimore biro timore kendo, bende gik mane dhano osetimo, obiro mana timo kendo. Onge gima nyien e piny ka." 
Ecclesiastes1:10 Adier, onge gimoro ma ng’ato nyalo wacho ni nyien. Ooyo, ok nyien! Nyaka bed ni nosebetie chon, ka pok onywolwa." 
Ecclesiastes1:11 Tieng’wani ok par joma chon, mana kaka tieng’ mabiro luwo bang’wa ok noparwa.”" 
Ecclesiastes1:12 An Jayalo, asebedo ruodh Israel ka adak Jerusalem." 
Ecclesiastes1:13 Ne aketo chunya kuom nono tiend gik moko duto matimore e piny mondo apuonjra tiendgi, mi ayudo ni tich ma Nyasaye osemiyo dhano mondo onyagrego e piny ka lit ahinya." 
Ecclesiastes1:14 Aseneno gik moko duto matimore e piny ka mi afwenyo ni gionge tich, mana ka yamo makadho." 
Ecclesiastes1:15 Gima obam ok inyal rieyo, bende ok inyal kwano gik maonge." 
Ecclesiastes1:16 Ne awacho e chunya niya, “Asebedo ng’at mariekie moloyo ng’ato ang’ata mane okwongona bedo ruoth e Jerusalem, kendo ang’eyo ni rieko kod ng’eyo gin gik manade.”" 
Ecclesiastes1:17 Ne aseketo chunya mondo apuonjra kendo ang’e pogruok manie kind ng’eyo gi fuwo, kendo manie kind rieko gi memruok. To asefwenyo ni mano bende en mana gima nono, ka yamo makadho." 
Ecclesiastes1:18 Rieko mang’eny kelo mana parruok mathoth. Adier, ka ing’eyo gik mang’eny, to imedo mana bedo gi chuny lit." 
Ecclesiastes2:1 Ne aneno ni onego acham piny, mondo ang’ego gima mor dikelna, to ne ayudo ni mano bende mana wach manono." 
Ecclesiastes2:2 Ne afwenyo ni nyiero en mana fuwo, kendo ni mor ma kamano ok kony gimoro." 
Ecclesiastes2:3 Kaka ne adwaro rieko ahinya ne atemo mondo ayud mor kuom madho kong’o, kendo kuom chano timo gik manono, eka afwenygo gima owinjore dhano tim kuom kinde matin ma odakgo e piny ka." 
Ecclesiastes2:4 Kuom mano, ne atimo gik madongo kaka gero udi mondo adagie, kendo pidho puothe mzabibu." 
Ecclesiastes2:5 Bende ne aloso puothe moko mi apidhoe kit olembe duto. 
Ecclesiastes2:6 Bang’e ne akunyo yewni mondo ayud pi. 
Ecclesiastes2:7 Ne ang’iewo wasumbni ma yawuowi gi ma nyiri, bende ne an gi wasumbni mamoko monywol e dalana. Ne an gi jamni moloyo ng’ato ang’ata mane osedak Jerusalem." 
Ecclesiastes2:8 Bende ne achoko fedha gi dhahabu mane igolo e ut keno mag ruodhi mag pinje mane aloyo. Chwo gi mon ne werna mondo omiya mor, kendo ne an gi mon duto ma ng’ama dichwo nyalo dwaro." 
Ecclesiastes2:9 Kamano ne aduong’ moloyo ng’ato ang’ata mosedak Jerusalem, kendo riekona ne okonya ahinya." 
Ecclesiastes2:10 Ne akawo gimoro amora mane wang’a gombo, kendo ne ok aweyo gimoro mane chunya dwaro. Gik moko mane aloso nomiya mor, kendo morno ema nobet pokna." 
Ecclesiastes2:11 To bang’e ne aparo gik moko duto mane asetimo, kendo kaka ne asetiyo matek katimogi, mi afwenyo ni gin mana gik manono, machalo yamo makadho." 
Ecclesiastes2:12 Chutho, ruoth ok nyal timo gimoro manyien, to mana gik mane ruodhi mokwongone osetimo. Kuom mano ne achako paro ni ere tiend bedo mariek kata bedo momemore, kata bedo mofuwo?" 
Ecclesiastes2:13 Adier, ang’eyo ni rieko ber moloyo fuwo mana kaka ler ber moloyo mudho." 
Ecclesiastes2:14 Ji mariek nyalo neno kuma dhiye. Joma ofuwo to ok nyal neno. To kata kamano ang’eyo bende ni waduto wachomo mana kamoro achiel. 
Ecclesiastes2:15 Ne aparo e chunya ni gima timore ni joma ofuwo biro timore ni an bende. Kuom mano, koro onge gimoro kata achiel ma abiro yudo kuom bedo mariek. En mana thagruok kayiem nono." 
Ecclesiastes2:16 Onge ng’ama paro joma riek kosetho, mana kaka joma ofuwo bende ok par. Wan duto wich biro wil kodwa e ndalo mabiro. Joma riek gi joma ofuwo nyaka tho duto machalre. Ee, waduto nyaka watho!" 
Ecclesiastes2:17 Kuom mano, ne achako sin gi ngima, nikech gik moko duto ma asetimo e piny ka ne ok okelona gimoro, mak mana chandruok. Giduto gin mana gik manono ka yamo makadho." 
Ecclesiastes2:18 Ne ajok gi gik moko mane lucha ochwerie, ka atimo e piny ka, nikech ne ang’eyo ni nawegi ni ng’at moro mabiro luwo bang’a." 
Ecclesiastes2:19 To ere ng’ama ong’eyo ka ng’at ma biro luwano nobed mariek kata mofuwo? To kata bed ni oriek kata ofuwo, to pod nokaw akawa gimoro amora ma lucha gi riekona osekelo e pinyka. Mano bende en mana gima nono." 
Ecclesiastes2:20 Kuom mano, ne achako ywago ang’e kuom tich matek duto ma asetimo," 
Ecclesiastes2:21 nikech kata obedo ni ng’ato timo gimoro gi riekone gi ng’eyone kod lonyne duto, to nyaka owe gino ni ng’at moro machielo mane luche ok ochuerie. Mano bende en gima nono, kendo ma ok owinjore!" 
Ecclesiastes2:22 Ere ohala ma ng’ato yudo kuom tichne matek duto ma obarorego ndasi e piny ka? 
Ecclesiastes2:23 Gimoro amora motimo e ngimane duto kelone mana chuny lit gi parruok. Chunye ok nyal bedo gi kue, kata mana e seche mag otieno. Mago duto bende gin mana gik manono." 
Ecclesiastes2:24 Kuom mano, onge gima ber ma dhano nyalo timo, mak mana chiemo gi metho kod chamo mwandu moseyudo. To kata mana mano bende ne afwenyo ni wuok mana kuom Nyasaye," 
Ecclesiastes2:25 nimar ka da bed ni onge Nyasaye, to ere yo ma diyudgo gima ichamo, kata mibedogo mamor?" 
Ecclesiastes2:26 Nyasaye ema miyo joge mohero rieko gi ng’eyo kod mor. Joricho to omiyo tiyo matek ka choko mwandu mana ni mondo mwandugo omi mana ng’ama ohero moloyo. Emomiyo mano bende en mana gima nono ka yamo makadho. 
Ecclesiastes3:1 Gimoro amora ma timore e pinyni timore mana e kinde ma Nyasaye oseketone. 
Ecclesiastes3:2 Nitie kinde mar nywol, gi kinde mar tho, kinde mar pitho, gi kinde mar putho," 
Ecclesiastes3:3 kinde mar nek, gi kinde mar chengo, kinde mar muko, gi kinde mar gero," 
Ecclesiastes3:4 kinde mar kuyo, gi kinde mar mor, kinde mar ywak, gi kinde mar miel," 
Ecclesiastes3:5 kinde mar keyo kite, gi kinde mar choko kite, kinde mar kwakruok, gi kinde ma ok kwakruokie," 
Ecclesiastes3:6 kinde mar dwaro gimoro, gi kinde ma gimoro lalie, kinde mar rito gimoro, gi kinde mar wito gimoro," 
Ecclesiastes3:7 kinde mar yiecho gimoro, gi kinde mar bepo, kinde mar ling’, gi kinde mar wuoyo," 
Ecclesiastes3:8 kinde mar hera, gi kinde mar sin, kod kinde mar lweny gi kinde mar kue." 
Ecclesiastes3:9 Ka kamano, to ere ohala ma dhano yudo kuom tichne duto?" 
Ecclesiastes3:10 Koro ang’eyo tich ma Nyasaye osechanonwa. 
Ecclesiastes3:11 Oseketo kinde mowinjore ni gimoro amora. Osemiyowa gombo mar ng’eyo gik mabiro timore, to ok osemiyowa fwenyo gik moko duto motimo." 
Ecclesiastes3:12 Kuom mano ang’eyo ni gima dhano nyalo timo en mana bedo mamor, kendo chamo piny ka pod ongima." 
Ecclesiastes3:13 Wan waduto onego wachiem kendo wamethi kendo wabed mamor, ka wachamo mwandu ma waseyudo. Mano en gima Nyasaye ema chiwo." 
Ecclesiastes3:14 Ang’eyo ni gimoro amora ma Nyasaye otimo siko nyaka chieng’. Ok inyal medoe gimoro, bende ok inyal goloe gimoro. Osetimo kamano mondo dhano oluore." 
Ecclesiastes3:15 Gimoro amora matimore nosetimore chon, kendo gimoro amora mabiro timore bende nosetimore. Nyasaye miyo gik moko duto nwoyore anwoya." 
Ecclesiastes3:16 Bende aseneno ni e pinyni, kama adiera gi bura onego bedie, to richo ema betie." 
Ecclesiastes3:17 Ne awacho e chunya niya, “Nyasaye biro yalo joma kare gi joma richo machalre, nikech kata mana e piny mabiro, gik moko duto te notimre mana e kinde moketnigi.”" 
Ecclesiastes3:18 Ne aneno ni Nyasaye temo ji mondo onyisigo ni ok giber moloyo le. 
Ecclesiastes3:19 Chutho, gimoro achiel ochomo dhano gi le machalre. Dhano tho mana kaka le bende tho. Adier, giyueyo mana machalre." 
Ecclesiastes3:20 Giduto ne gia kuom lowo, kendo kanyo ema ginidogie giduto. Kamano giduto gidhi kama chalre." 
Ecclesiastes3:21 Ere kaka ng’ato nyalo ng’eyo ni chuny dhano dhi e polo, to chuny le dhi e lowo?" 
Ecclesiastes3:22 Kuom mano, ne afwenyo ni kara gima dhano nyalo timo en mana chamo mwandu moseyudo, nikech mano ema Nyasaye osemiye, nimar ok onyal ng’eyo gima biro timore ka osetho." 
Ecclesiastes4:1 Bang’e ne achako arango timbe ma isandogo ji e pinyni, mi ne aneno joma isando kaywak, to onge ng’ama konygi, nikech joma ne sandogi ne nigi teko mathoth." 
Ecclesiastes4:2 Kuom mano akwano joma osetho ka joma johawi moloyo joma pod ngima. 
Ecclesiastes4:3 To joma johawi moloyo joma osetho gi joma pod ngima gin jogo ma pok onywol, kendo ma pok oneno timbe maricho matimore e pinyni." 
Ecclesiastes4:4 Bende kane aparo gima omiyo ji tiyo matek mondo odhi maber, to ne ayudo ni gitimo kamano nikech gidwaro ni mondo gibed gi gik mang’eny moloyo jowadgi. To mano en gima nono, ka yamo makadho!" 
Ecclesiastes4:5 Ji wacho ni ng’at mofuwo kende ema nyalo kwakore, to weyo kech nego." 
Ecclesiastes4:6 Mano nyalo bedo adier, to bedo gi chiemo moromo teng lwedo gi chuny mokue ber moloyo bedo gi chiemo moromo lwedo ariyo, to gi tich mang’eny maturi kayiem nono." 
Ecclesiastes4:7 Aseneno gimoro machielo e pinyni ma bende onge tich. 
Ecclesiastes4:8 En ngima ng’at modak kende maonge gi wuowi kata gi owadgi. Pile otiyo atiya matek, to mwandu moyudo ok rome. Openjore niya, “En ng’a ma atiyone matek, ka atuonora gik mabeyo ma onego acham?” Mano bende en gima nono, ma ok owinjore kata matin." 
Ecclesiastes4:9 Bedo ji ariyo ber moloyo bedo ng’at achiel, nikech ginyalo yudo pok maduong’ kuom tich ma gitiyo." 
Ecclesiastes4:10 Ka achiel kuomgi opodho, to machielo nyalo chungo wadgi. To ka ng’ato ni kende, mi opodho, to mano rach moloyo, nikech onge ng’at makonye." 
Ecclesiastes4:11 Ka piny ng’ich, to ji ariyo nyalo nindo kaachiel mi bed maliet. To ere kaka inyalo bet maliet ka in kendi?" 
Ecclesiastes4:12 Ka ng’ato ni kende, to ng’ato nyalo monje mi hewe. Ji ariyo to nyalo hewo ng’atno. Adier, tol mokadi didek, chodo tek." 
Ecclesiastes4:13 Ng’ato nyalo wuok e dhier kata e tuech, mi bed ruodh pinygi. To kapo ni obedo mofuwo koseti, ma ok owinj rieko ming’adone, to ok oloyo wuowi ma jachan, man gi rieko." 
Ecclesiastes4:14  
Ecclesiastes4:15 Aseng’iyo ji duto modak e pinyni, mi aneno ni nyaka bedie wuowi moro kuomgi ma nokaw kar ruoth." 
Ecclesiastes4:16 Ruoth nyalo bedo gi ji mang’eny ahinya e bwoye, to ka osetho, to onge ng’ama pako nyinge kuom gik ma osetimo. Mano bende en gima nono, mana ka yamo makadho." 
Ecclesiastes5:1 Bed motang’ ka idhi e od Nyasaye, nimar dhiyo kuno mondo ipuonjri, ber moloyo chiwo misango ka ng’at mofuwo ma ok ong’eyo gima ber gi gima rach." 
Ecclesiastes5:2 Par maber ka pok iwuoyo, kendo kik irikni ka isingori ni Nyasaye. Nyasaye nie polo, to in inie piny, omiyo kik iwuo mathoth moloyo kaka owinjore." 
Ecclesiastes5:3 Ka in gi parruok mathoth, to ibiro bedo gi lek maricho. Kamano bende ka wecheni ng’eny, to inyalo wacho gima ofuwo." 
Ecclesiastes5:4 Kuom mano, ka isingori ni ibiro chiwo ni Nyasaye gimoro, to tim kamano piyo, nikech Nyasaye ok mor gi ng’at mofuwo. Adier, tim gima isingori ni ibiro timo." 
Ecclesiastes5:5 Ber ka ok isingori moloyo singori, to ok itimo." 
Ecclesiastes5:6 Kik iwe wecheni iwuon teri e richo, nono to idhi e nyim jadolo mar Nyasaye, kiywagori ni iseketho, nikech kitimo kamano to imiyo Nyasaye kecho kodi, kendo obiro ketho gik ma luchi osemiyi." 
Ecclesiastes5:7 Kata ka lek medore, kendo weche manono bedo mathoth, to pod onego iluor aluora Nyasaye." 
Ecclesiastes5:8 Ka ineno ka piny moro sando joge modhier, ka timonigi marach, kendo tuonogi gik monego giyudi, to kik ibuogi, nimar jatelo ka jatelo nigi ng’at moloye gi duong’, kendo giduto bende gin gi joma dongonigi." 
Ecclesiastes5:9 Piny ma ruodhe ohero tich lowo ema dhi nyime maber. 
Ecclesiastes5:10 Ka ihero pesa, to pesa ok noromi ngang’, bende ka igombo bedo jamwandu, to mwandu miyudo ok noromi, nikech mano en mana gima nono." 
Ecclesiastes5:11 Kaka mwanduni medore, e kaka joma ipidho bende medore. Ohala miyudo en mana ng’eyo ni in jamoko." 
Ecclesiastes5:12 Jachan pile nindo mamit, kata obedo ni ochamo gima tin kata mang’eny. Gik mang’eny ma jamoko nigo to miyo oparore, ma ok onyal nindo." 
Ecclesiastes5:13 Gima lich ma aseneno e pinyni en ni ji kano pesa mondo chieng’ moro okonygi," 
Ecclesiastes5:14 to achien giwito pesago te e gimoro maonge gi tich. Bang’e gidong’ nono maonge gima ginyalo weyoni nyithindgi. 
Ecclesiastes5:15 Waweyo pinyni gi lwetwa nono, mana kaka ne wabiroe. Kata obedo ni wasetiyo matek, mwayudo mwandu, to onge gimoro amora mwaago." 
Ecclesiastes5:16 Mano gima lit ahinya. Wadhi mana kaka ne wabiro. Ere gima wayudo kuom tich manono mwachandorego? 
Ecclesiastes5:17 Wadak e mudho, ka chunywa lit kendo ka waluor, bende ka wakecho kendo ka watuo." 
Ecclesiastes5:18 Kuom mano, asefwenyo ni gima ber ma dhano nyalo timo en mana chiemo gi metho kod chamo mwandu moseyudo kuom kinde matin ma Nyasaye omiye mondo odaggo e piny ka. Mano e gima Nyasaye oseketo ni dhano." 
Ecclesiastes5:19 Ka Nyasaye oguedho ng’ato gi mwandu, kendo omiye dak maber, ma oweyone kinde mondo ocham gigo, to onego obed mamor ka ochamogi. Mano bende en gima Nyasaye ema ochiwo." 
Ecclesiastes5:20 Kaka Nyasaye oseyiene mondo obed mamor kamano, ok obi thagore koparo ni ngima chwok." 
Ecclesiastes6:1 Aseneno gimoro achiel marach matimore ni dhano e piny ka. 
Ecclesiastes6:2 Nyasaye nyalo miyo ng’ato mwandu kod luor kaachiel gi gimoro amora ma ng’atno dwaro, to ok owe ng’atno cham mwandunego ngang’. Ng’ato nono ema biro chamogi. Mano en gima nono, kendo ma ok ber kata matin." 
Ecclesiastes6:3 Ng’ato nyalo bedo gi nyithindo mia achiel, mi odag higni mang’eny. To kata da bed ni odak aming’a machal nadi, to ok oyudo mor kuom gik ma en go, kendo ok oyike maber ka otho, to oneno ni nyathi ma obuogi kosetho ber moloye." 
Ecclesiastes6:4 Nyathi makamano lal nono e mudho, kendo kata mana nying ok chake." 
Ecclesiastes6:5 Ok one ler mar odiechieng’, bende ok ong’eyo kaka ngima chalo, kata kamano oyudo yueyo," 
Ecclesiastes6:6 moloyo ng’at ma odak higni gana gi gana, to onge gi mor. To bende giduto gidhi mana kanyachiel!" 
Ecclesiastes6:7 Dhano tiyo matek mana ni mondo oyud gima ochamo, to eka ok oyud morome ngang’." 
Ecclesiastes6:8 Koro ere ber ma ng’ama riek neno, moloyo ng’ama ofuwo? Koso ere gima ber ma jachan nigo kuom gik moseng’eyo ma doritrego e ngimane?" 
Ecclesiastes6:9 En mana gima nono, ka yamo makadho! Emomiyo ber bedo mamor gi gik ma in go, moloyo gombo gik ma iongego." 
Ecclesiastes6:10 Gimoro amora matimore ne osechan chon, kendo waduto wang’eyo ni dhano ok nyal piem gi gima tek moloye." 
Ecclesiastes6:11 Kimedo goyo mbaka to weche medo bedo manono moloyo, kendo onge gima iyudoe." 
Ecclesiastes6:12 Ere ng’ama nyalo ng’eyo gima ber ma dhano onego otim e ngima machiek kendo manono, makadho mana ka tiponi? Koso ere kaka ng’ato nyalo ng’eyo gima biro timore e pinyni bang’ thone?" 
Ecclesiastes7:1 Nying maber ber moloyo mo mang’ue ng’ar ma nengone tek. Chieng’ tho ng’ato bende ber moloyo chieng’ nywolne. 
Ecclesiastes7:2 Ber dhi e dala ma iywagoe ng’at motho, moloyo dhiyo kama itimoe mor, nikech pile joma ngima nyaka par ni tho ema ochikowa waduto." 
Ecclesiastes7:3 Kuyo ber moloyo nyiero. Chutho, onyalo miyo wang’i bed mojuol, to kata kamano, omiyo riekoni bedo mabith." 
Ecclesiastes7:4 Ng’at maparo mana mor pile en ng’at mofuwo. Ng’at mariek to wiye ok wil gi tho. 
Ecclesiastes7:5 Ber mondo ng’at mariek okweri gimoro, moloyo yudo pak kuom joma ofuwo," 
Ecclesiastes7:6 nimar nyiero mar ng’at mofuwo onge tiende kata matin, to chalo mana gi kudho mararni e mach." 
Ecclesiastes7:7 Ka ng’at mariek owuondo ng’ato, to odoko mofuwo, bende ka ng’ato ochamo asoya, to okethore kende owuon." 
Ecclesiastes7:8 Giko mar gimoro ber moloyo chakruokne. Horuok bende ber moloyo sunga. 
Ecclesiastes7:9 Kik iyi wang’ piyo, kendo kik ibed gi sadha e chunyi, nikech joma ofuwo ema timo kamano." 
Ecclesiastes7:10 Bende kik ipenjri gimomiyo chon gik moko ne dhi maber moloyo ndalogi, nikech mano en penjo mofuwo." 
Ecclesiastes7:11 Rieko ber moloyo mwandu, kendo okonyo joma ngima duto man kode." 
Ecclesiastes7:12 Emomiyo ber bedo gi rieko moloyo bedo gi mwandu, nimar rieko kelo ngima ni jogo man kode." 
Ecclesiastes7:13 Parie gik ma Nyasaye osetimo. Ere kaka ng’ato nyalo rieyo gima Nyasaye osedolo? 
Ecclesiastes7:14 Ka gik moko dhini maber, to bed mamor. To ka chandruok ema omaki, to nyaka ipar ni Nyasaye kelo mor, bende okelo chandruok, omiyo ok inyal ng’eyo gima kiny notimre kiny." 
Ecclesiastes7:15 Ngimana osebedo ngima manono, to kata kamano aseneno gik moko duto! Aseneno ni ng’ato nyalo tho piyo, kata bed ni en ng’at makare, to bende ng’ato nyalo dak aming’a, to en ng’at marach." 
Ecclesiastes7:16 Kuom mano, kik ibed ng’at makare ahinya, kata ma ofuwo ahinya, nimar ere gima omiyo onego itur gi piny?" 
Ecclesiastes7:17 To bende kik ibed ng’at ma timbene richo ahinya, kata ma ofuwo ahinya, nimar ere gima omiyo onego itho ka ndaloni podi?" 
Ecclesiastes7:18 To bed mana e diere. Ka itimo kamano, kendo iluoro Nyasaye, to inidhi nyime maber." 
Ecclesiastes7:19 Gima rieko timo ni ng’ato duong’ moloyo gima ruodhi apar nyalo timo ni dala ma gidakie. 
Ecclesiastes7:20 Onge ng’ato kata achiel e piny ngima manyalo timo mana gik mabeyo lilo, ma ok oketho gimoro." 
Ecclesiastes7:21 Kik ichik iti ni gik moko duto ma ji wacho, nikech dipo ka iwinjo kata ka jatichni kuong’i." 
Ecclesiastes7:22 Par ni in bende isekuong’o ji ndalo mathoth. 
Ecclesiastes7:23 Ne apimo gigo duto gi rieko, ka aketo chunya mondo abed mariek. To ne ok anyal." 
Ecclesiastes7:24 Ere kaka dhano difweny tiend ngima? Otut moyombowa, kendo otek modhierowa winjo." 
Ecclesiastes7:25 To kata kamano, ne aketo chunya mondo apuonjra rieko. Ne adwaro yudo rieko mondo ang’ego tiend weche mane akia, kendo mondo afweny ni ng’at mofuwo en jaricho kendo janeko." 
Ecclesiastes7:26 Ne ayudo ka dhako kech moloyo tho. Herane nyalo maki mana ka obadho kata ka tol, kendo bade ma okwakigo tueyi mana ka nyororo! Ng’at mohero Nyasaye to nyalo tony mak omako. Jaricho to ok nyal yombe." 
Ecclesiastes7:27 An Jayalo awacho niya: Adier, ne afwenyo wechegi achiel kachiel kane oyudo adwaro mondo ang’e tiend gik moko," 
Ecclesiastes7:28 to mana ka asedwero kuom ndalo mang’eny. To aseyudo ni ng’at achiel kende ema nyalo bet mariek kuom ji gana. Dhako to onge mariek kata achiel. 
Ecclesiastes7:29 To gima aseyudo bende, en mana ni, Nyasaye ne ochueyowa joma kare, to wan wawegi ema wasegajore gi paro mathoth." 
Ecclesiastes8:1 Ng’at mariek ema ong’eyo tiend gik moko. Rieko miyo wang’e rieny, kendo tieko ich wang’ ma en go." 
Ecclesiastes8:2 Nyaka itim gima jatelo owacho, kendo kik irikni kisingore ni ibiro chiwo ni Nyasaye gimoro." 
Ecclesiastes8:3 Ruodh piny nyalo timo gimoro amora mohero, omiyo kik ibed kama entie, nikech masira dipo ka oyudi kanyo," 
Ecclesiastes8:4 nimar ruoth nigi teko, kendo onge ng’ama hedhore kwero gima otimo." 
Ecclesiastes8:5 E kinde duto ma irito chikene, to onge gima notimi, kendo ng’at mariek ong’eyo kaka onego otim gimoro, kod kinde ma owinjore otimee," 
Ecclesiastes8:6 nimar nitie yo maber kod kinde maber monego timie gimoro amora, to gima chandowa en mana ni wan ok wang’eyo." 
Ecclesiastes8:7 Onge ng’ato kata achiel mong’eyo gima biro timore, to bende ere ng’ama dinyiswa?" 
Ecclesiastes8:8 Onge ng’ama nyalo geng’o tho mondo kik nege, kata ng’ama nyalo chwalo chieng’ thone nyime. Ka lweny owuok, to onge tony! Onge gima wanyalo timo mi wakwo." 
Ecclesiastes8:9 Kane aparo gik moko matimore e piny ka, to ne aneno gigo duto, mi afwenyo ni ji moko nigi teko, kendo ji moko odak kathagore e bwogi." 
Ecclesiastes8:10 Bende ne aneno ka joricho biro, kendo donjo adonja Kama Ler. To kata kamano ne giwuotho awuotha e dala koni gi koni, ka gisungore ni gima gisetimono ok rach. To mano bende en tim manono." 
Ecclesiastes8:11 Ji ketho aketha ma ok odewo, mana nikech gineno ni kata ka ng’ato oketho, to ok yud kum piyo kaka owinjore." 
Ecclesiastes8:12 Jaricho nyalo timo richo ndalo mathoth, to eka pod odak adaka aming’a. Adier, ang’eyo ni ji wacho niya, “Ka iluoro Nyasaye to gik moko duto dhini maber," 
Ecclesiastes8:13 to joma timbegi mono ok dhi nyime maber. Ngimagi chalo mana gi tipo makadho, kendo ginitho kapod gitindo, nikech ok giluoro Nyasaye.”" 
Ecclesiastes8:14 To mano nono, nikech kinono gik matimore e piny, to ibiro yudo ni sa moro joma kare yudo kum ma joricho ema onego oyudi, to joricho yudo pok ma joma kare ema onego yudi. Mano emomiyo awacho ni gik moko duto onge tich." 
Ecclesiastes8:15 Kuom mano, aneno ni ng’ato nyaka cham raha, nikech onge mor ma dhano nigo mak mana chiemo gi metho kod chamo mwandune. Mano e pok moyudo kuom tich matek motiyo e kinde ma Nyasaye omiyego ngima e piny ka." 
Ecclesiastes8:16 Kane aketo chunya mondo ayud rieko, kendo ang’e tiend gik matimore e piny, to ne afwenyo ni kata ka ng’ato osiko ka neno otieno gi odiechieng’ ma ok nindi," 
Ecclesiastes8:17 to ok onyal ng’eyo gik ma Nyasaye timo. Kata da bed ni oketo chunye matek machal nade, to ok onyal ng’eyo tiendgi. Ji mariek paro ni ong’eyo tiendgi, to chutho ok ging’eyo." 
Ecclesiastes9:1 Ne aketo chunya kuom kinde mang’eny, ka aparo, mi afwenyo ni joma riek kod joma kare, ni e lwet Nyasaye, kaachiel gi timbegi koda ka hera gi sigu ma gin go. Onge ng’ama ong’eyo kata mana gimoro achiel ma biro timorene." 
Ecclesiastes9:2 To mano onge wach, nikech gimoro achiel ema timore ni ng’at makare kod ng’at ma jaricho, bende ema timore ni ng’at maler, kod ng’at ma ok ler, kendo ni joma lamo Nyasaye gi joma ok lame. Onge pogruok manie kind ng’at malong’o gi ng’at ma jaricho, kata manie kind ng’at makuong’ore ni biro chiwo gimoro ni Nyasaye, kod ng’at ma oluoro kuong’ruok kamano." 
Ecclesiastes9:3 Adier, gimoro achiel ema timore ni ji duto machalre, kendo mano rach moloyo gik moko duto maricho matimore e piny ka. E kinde duto ma ji ngima, to chunygi opong’ gi richo kod gik manono, to bang’e githo mana apoya." 
Ecclesiastes9:4 To kata kamano, ng’ato ang’ata mapod ngima e pinyni nigi gima ogeno, nimar ber bedo guok mangima, moloyo bedo sibuor motho!" 
Ecclesiastes9:5 Chutho, joma ngima ong’eyo ni gibiro tho. Joma otho to ok ong’eyo gimoro kata matin! Onge pok ma gibiro chako yudo, kendo wich owil kodgi chuth." 
Ecclesiastes9:6 Hera kod sigu kaachiel gi gombo mane gin go nosetho kodgi. Ok ginichak gine gimoro amora matimore e piny ka. 
Ecclesiastes9:7 Emomiyo cham achama chiembi mondo ibed mamor, kendo madh amadha kongi mondo iwinj maber, nikech Nyasaye oseyie gi gik moko mitimo." 
Ecclesiastes9:8 Pile onego irwakri maber, kendo ibed mamor." 
Ecclesiastes9:9 Cham ngima gi chiegi e ndalo duto ma idak e ngima manono ma Nyasaye omiyini, nimar mano kende e gima niyudi kuom chandruok michandorigo e piny ka." 
Ecclesiastes9:10 Tim gik moko duto minyalo timo gi chunyi duto, nimar e piny joma otho, kuma ibiro dhiye, onge paro kata ng’eyo kata rieko, kata tim moro amora!" 
Ecclesiastes9:11 Gimoro machielo mane achako afwenyo en ni, e pinyni, jong’uech matek ok yomb e ng’uech pile, kendo joma thuondi ok lo lweny pile. Bende pile joma riek ok yud gima gikonyorego, kendo joma nigi paro pile ok bed jomwandu. Joma ong’eyo tich bende pile ok yud duong’ e tich. Kamano hawi marach mako ng’ato ang’ata." 
Ecclesiastes9:12 Ng’ato ok nyal ng’eyo sa ma kindene chopoe, nimar wachalo rech ma tol omako, kata winy ma omoko e wino. Adier, wamoko e sa marach ka ok wang’eyo kata matin." 
Ecclesiastes9:13 Nitie gimoro machielo maduong’ mane achako aneno, manyiso kaka ji okawo rieko e piny ka." 
Ecclesiastes9:14 Ne nitie dala moro matin ma ji odakie manok. Ruoth moro maratego ne omonje, mi olwore mondo omwom ohingane." 
Ecclesiastes9:15 To e dalano ne nitie ng’at moro modhier, to kata obedo ni nodhier kamano, ne oriek ahinya, ma dine oreso dalano, to onge ng’ama ne opare kata paro nono." 
Ecclesiastes9:16 Kane oneno kamano, ne owacho ni, rieko ber moloyo teko, to kata kamano onge ng’ama paro ni ng’at modhier bende nyalo bedo mariek, kata mayie winjo gik mowacho." 
Ecclesiastes9:17 To chutho, en gima ber chiko it ni weche mamuol ma ng’at mariek wacho, moloyo winjo weche ma ruoth kokgo e buch joma ofuwo." 
Ecclesiastes9:18 Rieko ber moloyo gik lweny, to jaricho achiel nyalo ketho gik mabeyo mang’eny." 
Ecclesiastes10:1 Kaka lwang’ni motho nyalo ketho mo mang’ue ng’ar mi dum tik marach, e kaka fuwo matin nono bende nyalo ketho rieko maduong’." 
Ecclesiastes10:2 Pile ng’at mariek timo atima gik makare. Ng’at mofuwo to timo mana gik maricho. 
Ecclesiastes10:3 Fupe nenore anena kata mana kowuotho e yo, omiyo ji duto ng’eyo ni en ng’at mofuwo." 
Ecclesiastes10:4 Ka ruoth okecho kodi, to kik iwe tich mitiyone, nikech ka ibolori, to onyalo ng’wononi kata mana ketho madongo." 
Ecclesiastes10:5 Koro nitie gima rach ma aseneno ka ruodhi timo e piny ka. 
Ecclesiastes10:6 Giketo joma ofuwo e tije madongo. Joma omew to ok gidew. 
Ecclesiastes10:7 Bende aseneno ka wasumbni oidho farese, to jodongo wuotho gi tiendgi ka wasumbni." 
Ecclesiastes10:8 Ka ikunyo bur, to in ema inyumorie, kata ka ipowo kor ot, to in ema thuol kayi." 
Ecclesiastes10:9 Ka ikunyo kite, to kite nyaka hinyi, kendo ka ibaro yien, to nyaka ihinyri kibero." 
Ecclesiastes10:10 Ka ng’ato tong’o gi le modik, ma ok opiago, to nyaka oti kode gi muya, eka otong’ gimoro. Kuom mano, ber chano gik moko mokwongo ka pok itimo." 
Ecclesiastes10:11 Ka thuol okayi ka pok iboye, to onge ohala ma iyudo kuom ng’eyo boyo thuonde!" 
Ecclesiastes10:12 Weche ma ng’at mariek wacho, kelone luor. Ng’at mofuwo to tiekore kende owuon gi wechene." 
Ecclesiastes10:13 Ochako wuoyo gi weche mofuwo, to otieko gi weche maricho mag neko," 
Ecclesiastes10:14 kendo owuoyo awuoya ma ok oling’! Onge ng’at ma ong’eyo gima biro timore kiny. Kose ere ng’ama nyalo nyisowa gima biro timore bang’ thowa? 
Ecclesiastes10:15 Joma ofuwo negore gi tich nikech gionge kata mana rieko ma ginyalo ng’eyogo yo ma didwokgi dala. 
Ecclesiastes10:16 Ka ruodh piny en ng’at ma yolo, kendo jotende galore agala e sewni otieno duto, to pinyno nigi chandruok." 
Ecclesiastes10:17 To piny ma ruodhe tiyo gi parone owuon, bende ma jotende timo sewni mana e seche mowinjore, kendo ritore ma ok mer, ema nigi hawi." 
Ecclesiastes10:18 Ka ng’ato nyap, ma ok nyal umo tat ode, to nyaka ot chuer, mi podhi." 
Ecclesiastes10:19 Chiemo mabeyo miyo ng’ato bedo mamor, kendo kong’o bende miyo ng’ato winjo maber, to gigo ok yudre ka pesa onge!" 
Ecclesiastes10:20 Kik ikuong’ ruoth kata mana e chunyi. Bende kik iwuo marach kuom jomwandu kata mana ka in kendi e odi mar nindo, nimar dipo ka winyo okawo wachno, motero oko." 
Ecclesiastes11:1 Tim atima timbe ng’wono, to achien notimni ng’wono." 
Ecclesiastes11:2 Adier, pog apoga gigi ni ji mang’eny, nikech ikia gima kiny notimre kiny." 
Ecclesiastes11:3 Ka rumbi ogingore, to nyaka koth chue. Bende kama yath opodhoe ema orieree." 
Ecclesiastes11:4 Ka irito mana nyaka koth chue, to ok nichwo gimoro, kendo ka ikowo keyo akowa, to ok nike." 
Ecclesiastes11:5 Gik moko duto Nyasaye ema ochueyo, bende ok inyal ng’eyo gima otimo, mana kaka ok inyal ng’eyo kaka nyathi chakore ei min." 
Ecclesiastes11:6 Onego ichwo kodhi okinyi godhiambo, nikech ok ing’eyo kata gibiro twi giduto." 
Ecclesiastes11:7 Ler ber, kendo oyo nyango marieny mamit bende ber." 
Ecclesiastes11:8 Ka ng’ato odak aming’a to onego ogo erokamano kuom hignigo duto, koparo ni kosetho, to ndalo mudho nobed mang’eny moloyo! Kuom mano, gik moko duto mabiro gin mana kayiem nono." 
Ecclesiastes11:9 Un joma tindo, beduru mamor e ndalo ma pod utindo. Timuru gik moko duto mudwaro, kendo yuduru gik moko duto ma chunyu gombo. To kata kamano, nyaka ung’e ni Nyasaye noyalu kuom gik moko duto mutimo." 
Ecclesiastes11:10 Kik uwe gimoro thagu, mi kelnu chuny lit, nikech bang’ kinde manok ok ubi bedo matindo kendo." 
Ecclesiastes12:1 Paruru jachuechu kapod utindo, kendo ka pok ndalo mag chandruok obiro, ma koro uwachoe niya, “Onge gima tinde bernwa e piny.”" 
Ecclesiastes12:2 Mano e ndalo ma koro wang’chieng’ gi due kod sulue olokorenu mudho, kendo wang’u otimo bo, mana ka gima boche polo osiko kanenore anena e wang’u." 
Ecclesiastes12:3 Bedeu ma osebedo ka konyou notetni, kendo tiendeu ma koro otegnogi, nobed modolore. Unubed rowuoge ma ok nyal chamo chiemo, kendo wengeu nobed modimbore ma ok nyal neno maber." 
Ecclesiastes12:4 Itu nobed modinore ma ok unyal winjo koko ma ji goyo e wang’yore. Bende ka pong’ rego, kata ka thum ywak to ok unuwinj maber. To kata kamano, kata mana ywak winyo nochiewu e nindo." 
Ecclesiastes12:5 Un ubed kuluoro idho kuonde moting’ore, kendo wuoth nobednu lweny. Bende yie wiu nolokre lwar, kendo tekreu mar nyodo norum chuth, ma ok nyal duogo. Koro wadhi e dalawa mosiko nyaka chieng’, kendo ji biro ywagowa e wang’yore." 
Ecclesiastes12:6 Chunywa nochodi mana kaka nyororo mar fedha chot, mi taya mar dhahabu lwar piny kendo barre, mana kaka aguch pi tho, kendo mana kaka tol motuego ndowo mituomogo pi e soko chot." 
Ecclesiastes12:7 Ringrewa biro dok e lowo, kendo muya mar ngima biro dok ir Nyasaye mane omiyowago." 
Ecclesiastes12:8 Emomiyo, an Jayalo, awacho niya, “Gik moko duto onge tich! Gin gik manono giduto, kendo onge gima nigi tiende kata achiel.”" 
Ecclesiastes12:9 To nikech Jayalo ne nigi rieko, omiyo ne omedo puonjo ji apuonja gik mong’eyo. Ne ochoko ngeche eka ochanogi maber." 
Ecclesiastes12:10 Ne otemo ndikogi e yo mayomo chuny ji, to weche duto ne gin mana adiera lilo." 
Ecclesiastes12:11 Weche mag joma riek chalo gi ludhe ma jokwath kwayogo rombe, kata ka musmande ma ogo matek. Nyasaye ma jakwadhwa achiel kende waduto, ema osechiwo wechego." 
Ecclesiastes12:12 Koro wuoda, nitie gimoro kendo monego ing’e. Tich ndiko kitepe ok rum, kendo somo mathoth biro mana oli." 
Ecclesiastes12:13 Bang’ mago duto, gimoro achiel kende ema odong’ ma onego anyisi. En ni, luor Nyasaye, kendo rit chikene, nimar mano ema ne omiyo ochue dhano." 
Ecclesiastes12:14 Nyasaye biro yalowa kuom gik moko duto ma watimo, kata mana gik motim ling’ling’, bed ni gibeyo kata giricho." 
SongOfSongs1:1 Ma e wend Solomon mamitie moloyo wendene mamoko duto. 
SongOfSongs1:2 “Bi inyodha gi nyoth mogundho. Herani mit moloyo divai. 
SongOfSongs1:3 Mo miwirorigo ng’we ng’ar. Kata mana nyingi kawinjo to dumna mamit ka mo mopukore, omiyo nyiri duto oheri." 
SongOfSongs1:4 Kawa mondo waring wadhi mondo iketa e odi, yaye ruodha. Wabiro bedo mamor kaachiel, kendo wabiro madho hera mana ka divai. Adier, mano kaka heri en gima ber!" 
SongOfSongs1:5 Yaye, nyi Jerusalem, chieng’ oseloka rateng’ mana ka hembe Warabu, to kata kamano, pod aber abera mana kaka pasia mag od Solomon." 
SongOfSongs1:6 Kik uchaya kuom bet dichol, nikech chieng’ ema oseloko kita kamano. Owetena ne mon koda, omiyo ne gimiya tich rito puoth mzabibu. Kuom mano, ne ok ayudo thuolo mar loso denda." 
SongOfSongs1:7 In jaherana, nyisa kuma ibiro dhi kwayoe jambi. Gibiro yueyo kanye godiechieng’? Ere gima omiyo onego amanyi kuonde ma jokwath mamoko kwayoe?”" 
SongOfSongs1:8 “Donge ing’eyo kuma adhiyoe, yaye nyako ma jaber moloyo nyiri duto gi ber? Onego iluw tiend rombena, mondo eka ibi ikwa dieu but hembe jokwath." 
SongOfSongs1:9 Jaherana, ilombo chwo ka faras madhako malombo farese machwo ma ywayo geche Farao." 
SongOfSongs1:10 Yie wiyi mokadi nenore maber koliero e lembi kendo e ng’uti mana ka tigo ma nengone tek. 
SongOfSongs1:11 To wabiro losoni thiwni mag dhahabu kod tigo mag fedha.” 
SongOfSongs1:12 “Kane ruodha pod obet e kome, mo mane awirorago ne dum mamit." 
SongOfSongs1:13 Ka jaherana onindo e agoga to awinjo maber, mana kaka awinjo ka aliero mo mang’ue ng’ar e kind thundena." 
SongOfSongs1:14 Jaherana chalo gi maua maber ma dongo e puothe mzabibu man Engedi.” 
SongOfSongs1:15 “Mano kaka ijaber, yaye jaherana! Mano kaka ijaber! Wengeni nyiso mana hera lilo.”" 
SongOfSongs1:16 “In bende iber manadi, yaye jaherana! Mano kaka ilomba! Lum mayom ema biro bedo kitandawa," 
SongOfSongs1:17 kendo bede yien mokar nobednwa tado. 
SongOfSongs2:1 An to, an mana maup thim mar Sharon, kata ondanyo madongo e pap.”" 
SongOfSongs2:2 “Ooyo jaherana, iber e kind nyiri weteu, mana kaka ondanyo ber e kind kuthe.”" 
SongOfSongs2:3 “To in bende jaherana, iber e kind yawuowi weteu, mana kaka yadh olemo ber e kind yien mamoko duto. Ahero bet e tiponi ka achamo olembi mamit." 
SongOfSongs2:4 Ne itera e odi mar chiemo, mi iliero bandech hera kuoma." 
SongOfSongs2:5 Hera nega, omiyo duog chunya gi gik mamit." 
SongOfSongs2:6 Badi ma kor acham oteno wiya, to badi ma korachwich okwaka.”" 
SongOfSongs2:7 “Un nyi Jerusalem, kuongreuru gi nying le mae thim ni ok unuchoch herawa.”" 
SongOfSongs2:8 Awinjo dwond jaherana. Ero obiro, ka ochikore e gode. Adier, odum e kor gode kobiro ira!" 
SongOfSongs2:9 Jaherana chalo gi apol kendo ochalo gi ngau ma pod dongo. Echagocha, ochung’ e tok ohingawa, ka ong’icho gie dirisa." 
SongOfSongs2:10 Awinjo ka jaherana wuoyo koda, kawacho niya, ‘A malo, jaherana! Wuog wadhi, yaye jaber." 
SongOfSongs2:11 Ndalo chwiri koro osekadho, omiyo koth oserumo," 
SongOfSongs2:12 kendo maupe thiewo e piny duto. Koro ma e kinde ma ji werie, kendo ma dwond akuru winjore e piny." 
SongOfSongs2:13 Olemo bende ochako chiek, kendo mzabibu mamoyo dum mamit. A malo jaherana, Wuog wadhi, yaye jaber." 
SongOfSongs2:14 Ilalna mana ka winyo ma ode ni kama orokore e kor got mabor. We aneye wang’i, kendo awinjie dwondi, nikech ijaber, kendo dwondi mit.’" 
SongOfSongs2:15 Yaye jowadwa, maknauru nyithind bwe ma ketho puothe mag mzabibu, nikech dipo ka giketho mzabipwa mamoyo.”" 
SongOfSongs2:16 Jaherana en mara, kendo an bende an mare. Okwayo e chuny ondanyo." 
SongOfSongs2:17 Nyaka koch okinyi kudhi, mi piny yawre. Duogi e gode mang’ue ng’ar, yaye jaherana, mana ka gima in apol kata ka ngau ma pod dongo modak e gode." 
SongOfSongs3:1 Ne aleko jaherana otieno kotieno, ka anindo e kitandana. Ne amanye, to ne ok anyal yude. Bende ne aluonge, to ne ok odwoka." 
SongOfSongs3:2 Ne aa malo, mi awuotho e dala duto kadwaro jaherana. Adier, ne amanye, to ne ok anyal yude. Bende ne aluonge, to ne ok odwoka." 
SongOfSongs3:3 Eka ne aromo gi jorit mag dala mi apenjogi niya, “Bende usenenonae jaherana?”" 
SongOfSongs3:4 Piyopiyo nono kane aseweyogi ne ayudo jaherana. Ne akwake matek, ma ok aweyone thuolo, nyaka ne atere e od mama, kama ne onywolae." 
SongOfSongs3:5 “Un nyi Jerusalem, kuongrenauru gi nying le mae thim ni ok unuchoch herawa.”" 
SongOfSongs3:6 Mano ang’o mawuok e thim ka iro madhuolore, machalo ich ubani miwang’ono, kata machalo poda ma johala kelo?" 
SongOfSongs3:7 Neuru, giting’o kom miting’oe Solomon, kendo thuwondi piero auchiel olwore. Gin jolweny magerie moloyo e Israel." 
SongOfSongs3:8 Giduto ging’eyo kedo gi ligangla, kendo gin jolweny molony. Moro ka moro omanore gi ligangla, koikore kedo gi gimoro manyalo monjogi gotieno." 
SongOfSongs3:9 Ruoth Solomon noloso kom mane iting’egono gi yiend Lebanon mabeyo mokadho. 
SongOfSongs3:10 Bethene ne olos gi fedha. Kama itenoe wich to ne olos gi dhahabu, kendo kama ibetie nolos gi law maralik. Iye to ne nyi Jerusalem oloso maber gi lak liech." 
SongOfSongs3:11 “Un nyi Sayun, biuru mondo une ruoth Solomon! Orwako osimbo mane min mare osidhone chieng’ mane okendoe monenoe mor maduong’.”" 
SongOfSongs4:1 “Mano kaka iber, yaye jaherana! Mano kaka iber! Mano kaka wang’i miumo gi nanga nyiso hera lilo! Yie wiyi miel ka kwedh diek machikore ka lor e gode mag Gilead." 
SongOfSongs4:2 Lekeni tar mana ka rombe ma ong’ad yiegi kawuono, kendo olwoki. Moro ka moro omanyore gi wadgi, kendo onge kata achiel momukore." 
SongOfSongs4:3 Dhogi kwar ka olemo. Yaye mano kaka wecheni mitna! Lembi miumo gi nanga bende kwar mana ka osaye. 
SongOfSongs4:4 Ng’uti bor ka osuch Daudi, ma nenore gi kuma bor, kendo ma jolweny gana achiel marateke lieroe kuodigi." 
SongOfSongs4:5 Thundeni chalo gi nyidiek marude, ma kwayo e chuny ondanyo." 
SongOfSongs4:6 Abiro mana bet e got mang’ue ng’ar, nyaka koch okinyi kudhi, mi piny yawre." 
SongOfSongs4:7 Mano kaka iber, yaye jaherana! Ionge gi mbala kata achiel e dendi." 
SongOfSongs4:8 Chiega, bi walor waa e got Lebanon. Adier, bi walor waa Lebanon. Wuogi ia e got Amana gi got Senir kod Hermon, kuonde ma sibuor gi kwach odakie." 
SongOfSongs4:9 Jaherana, ka wang’i orado gi mara, kata ka arango tigo ma iliero e ng’uti, to chunya rumo!" 
SongOfSongs4:10 Yaye chiega, herani mit moloyo divai, kendo mo miwirorigo dum mamit moloyo modhi duto." 
SongOfSongs4:11 Dhogi mit ka mor kich, yaye jaherana. Adier, lewi chalona chak kata mor kich. Lepi dum tik mamit mana ka tik mamit mar god Lebanon." 
SongOfSongs4:12 Jaherana ma chiega chalo gi puodho mochiel motegno, kata ka soko modin ma ji ok modhie." 
SongOfSongs4:13 Gik moko dongo maber e puodhono. Ee, gidongo mana ka olemo mabeyoe moloyo." 
SongOfSongs4:14 Gin gik mopogore opogore, ma moko mit chamo, to moko ng’ue ng’ar." 
SongOfSongs4:15 Soko nie puodhono. Aore mamol koa got Lebanon bende kelone pi.” 
SongOfSongs4:16 “In yamb masawa, tugri! Yamb milambo, in bende kudhi e puotha, mondo tik gik mang’ue ng’ar man kanyo odum. Yaye jaherana, bi e puothi mondo icham olembe mabeyo.”" 
SongOfSongs5:1 “Asebiro e puotha, yaye chiega ma jaherana. Achoko gik mang’ue ng’ar. Bende achamo mor kichna, kendo amadho divacha kod chaga.” “Ee, chiem, kendo meth ametha, nyaka chop hera meri.”" 
SongOfSongs5:2 Ne oyudo anindo to chunya wuotho. Eka ne awinjo ka jaherana dwong’o dhoot, kawacho niya, “Yawna, chiega ma jaherana, kendo winja majaber. Wiya otimo pi nikech tho omokoe. Adier, yie wiya ng’ich nikech ng’ich mar otieno.”" 
SongOfSongs5:3 Ne adwoke niya, “To sani aselonyora. Idwaro ni mondo achak arwakra koso? Bende aselwoko tienda. Koso idwaro ni mondo achak anyon piny?”" 
SongOfSongs5:4 Jaherana ne osoyo lwete gi e otuch manie dhoot, mi awinjo ka denda duto tetni." 
SongOfSongs5:5 Kane achung’ mondo ayawne, to lweta ne ton mo mang’ue ng’ar. Chutho, mo mane nie lith lweta ne oton e ralor mar dhoot." 
SongOfSongs5:6 To kane ayawo ni jaherana dhoot, to ne ayudo ka osea! Mano kaka ne agombo winjo dwonde! Ne arange koni gi koni, to ne ok anyal nene. Bende ne aluonge, to ne ok odwoka." 
SongOfSongs5:7 Jorit mag dala ne joromo koda. Ne gigoya, mi gihinya marach, to bende jorit man ewi ohinga ne oyudho kabuda mokawo." 
SongOfSongs5:8 A yaye, un nyi Jerusalem, ka uneno jaherana, to yie unyise ni hera ma aherego dwaro nega!" 
SongOfSongs5:9 “In nyako ma jaber moloyo nyiri duto gi ber, nyiswae kaka jaheranino chalo. Ang’o ma oloyogo yawuowi moko duto, momiyo ichikowa matek kamano?”" 
SongOfSongs5:10 “Jaherana jaber kendo ratego. En ema onenore kata kuom ji gana apar. 
SongOfSongs5:11 Yie wiye oyuwo kendo boyo, bende rateng’ kendo ng’ich thi. Adier, yie wiye ber moloyo dhahabu." 
SongOfSongs5:12 Wang’e chal gi akuch rachar manie bath aora, kata ma dumbore e chak." 
SongOfSongs5:13 Lembe ber mana ka puodho ma ogawore gi alode mamit kod gik mang’ue ng’ar. Dhoge chalo gi ondanyo, kendo ton mo mang’ue mamit." 
SongOfSongs5:14 Lwetene beyo, kendo orwakoe tere mochomie kite ma nengogi tek. Nungone chalo gi lak liech mapoth, mobaw gi kite mabeyo mamil." 
SongOfSongs5:15 Ogwendene chalo gi sirni molos gi kite mag ombo, mochom e rachungi mag dhahabu maler. Ka inene, to omiyo igamo yueyo, mana ka ng’ama oneno got Lebanon motimo yiend sida mabeyo." 
SongOfSongs5:16 Mano kaka dhoge ber nyodho, kendo gimoro amora man kuome berna! Koro un nyi Jerusalem, mano e kaka jaherana chalo.”" 
SongOfSongs6:1 “Ere kuma jaherani nogo odhiye, yaye, nyako majaber moloyo nyiri duto gi ber? Ochiko kure, mondo wakonyi manye?”" 
SongOfSongs6:2 “Jaherana osedhi e puothe, kama gik mang’ue ng’ar dongoe, mondo okwa kanyo kendo opon ondanyo." 
SongOfSongs6:3 Jaherana en mara, kendo an bende an mare. Okwayo e chuny ondanyo.”" 
SongOfSongs6:4 “Jaherana, iber mana ka Jerusalem, kata ka dala mar Tirza. Ka aneni, to agamo yueyo agama, mana ka gima aneno mier ariyogo." 
SongOfSongs6:5 Gol wang’i kuoma nimar wang’i nega. Yie wiyi miel mana ka kwedh diek, machikore ka lor e gode mag Gilead." 
SongOfSongs6:6 Lekeni tar mana ka rombe ma olwok kawuono. Moro ka moro omanyore gi wadgi, kendo onge kata achiel momukore." 
SongOfSongs6:7 Lembi miumo gi nanga kwar ka olemo.” 
SongOfSongs6:8 Ruoth nigi mon piero auchiel, gi mamoko piero aboro, kaachiel gi nyiri mokadho akwana." 
SongOfSongs6:9 To an ahero mana nyako achiel kende, ma jaber ka winyo. En e nyar min kende, ma min ohero malich. Nyiri duto ka onene, to pake. Kata mana mond ruoth bende pake gi wer." 
SongOfSongs6:10 Ma to ng’a, ma pilore ka wang’chieng’ni? Adier, ojaber mana ka due, kendo ong’ang’ni mana ka wang’chieng’! Ka anene to agamo yueyo agama mana kaka agamo yueyo kaneno gik pologo." 
SongOfSongs6:11 Ne alor mwalo e puoth nas, mondo ane kaka odundu loth e dho aora, kendo ane kaka yiend mzabibu moyo, kata ka yien mamoko ochako thiewo." 
SongOfSongs6:12 Koro amor mokadho. Achalo jatend oganda lweny moidho gache. 
SongOfSongs6:13 “Nyar Shulam, duogi! Yaye duogi. Yie iduogi mondo waneni.”" 
SongOfSongs6:14 “Ere gima omiyo udwaro neno nyar Shulam, ka mielo miel machon?" 
SongOfSongs7:1 Yaye nyar jaduong’, mano kaka tiendi beyo, kirwako patpat. Embeni becho mana ka gima japecho molony ema opayo." 
SongOfSongs7:2 Pendi chalo gi bakul ma divai mamit ok rumie. Nungoni bende chalo gi pidh cham ma maua mabeyo olworo, moketo diere." 
SongOfSongs7:3 Thundi chalo mana gi nyidiek marude. 
SongOfSongs7:4 Ng’uti to chalo gi osuch lak liech, kendo wengeni nyiwni ka pi yewni man but dhoranga Heshbon, dala maduong’. Umi ber mana ka got Lebanon moting’ore kochomo Damaski." 
SongOfSongs7:5 Wiyi ni malo mana ka got Karmel, kendo yie wiyi mokadi ber mana ka law maralik, ma kata mana ruoth koneno, to chunye chandore!" 
SongOfSongs7:6 Mano kaka iber, yaye jaherana, kendo mano kaka mor mimiya lichna!" 
SongOfSongs7:7 Iber mana ka yadh nas, kendo thundi kwar mana ka olemo." 
SongOfSongs7:8 Emomiyo abiro idho yadhno mondo apon olembene! Thundeni chalona saga mar olemo, kendo muchi dumna mamit mana ka maua." 
SongOfSongs7:9 Dhogi bende mit ka divai, mamol mos e kind lekena ka amadho.”" 
SongOfSongs7:10 An mar jaherana, kendo odwara." 
SongOfSongs7:11 “Bi yaye jaherana wadhi waba oko, mondo wanind e puothe mag mzabibu gotieno." 
SongOfSongs7:12 Wabiro chiew gokinyi mondo warang yiend mzabibu, kendo wane ane ka gisechako loth, kata ka gisechako thiewo. Bende mondo wane ane ka yien moko osemoyo. Eka anachiwrani kuno." 
SongOfSongs7:13 Kuno to inyalo ng’ueyoe tik kungumanga, kendo olembe mamit duto odhuro kuno. A yaye jaherana, asekanoni kit mor duto te!" 
SongOfSongs8:1 Mad da bed ni in owadwa mane wadhodhogo thuno achiel, to da anyodhi kata mana e wang’yo ka aromo kodi! Kata bed ni ng’ama nadi ema rangowa, bende onge ng’ama da onyierowa." 
SongOfSongs8:2 Da ateri e od mama, mi amiyi divai mamit." 
SongOfSongs8:3 Badi ma koracham oteno wiya, to badi ma korachwich okwaka.”" 
SongOfSongs8:4 “Un nyi Jerusalem, kuong’renauru ni ok unuchoch herawa.”" 
SongOfSongs8:5 “Mano ng’a, mawuok e thim, ka jokwakore gi jaheraneno?” “Jaherana, ne achiewi e bwo yadh olemo, kama ne meru onywolie." 
SongOfSongs8:6 Kik iher ng’ato nono mak mana an. Adier, kik ikwak nyako moro nono mak mana an. Hera nigi teko mana ka tho. Chutho, hera matut tek mana ka tho hie. Omuoch mach, kendo oliel mana ka mach mang’ang’ni," 
SongOfSongs8:7 ma kata pi mathoth manade ok nyal nego. Adier, kata ohula maduong’ manade ok nyal yuoye. To ka ng’ato otemo ni ng’iewo hera, kata mana gi mwandune duto, to achaye kende ema oyudo.”" 
SongOfSongs8:8 “Wan gi nyaminwa moro matin, ma thunde pok ochwopo. Koro wabiro time nadi, ka wuowi obiro dware?" 
SongOfSongs8:9 Da bed ni en ohinga, to da wageng’e gi osuri mar fedha, kendo ka da bed ni en dhorangach, to da wageng’e gi bepe mag sida.”" 
SongOfSongs8:10 “An to an ohinga, kendo thunda ema orita. Jaherana ong’eyo ni aritora maber, maonge gima dithage.”" 
SongOfSongs8:11 Solomon nigi puoth mzabibu, kama iluongo ni Baal-Hermon. Oketo puodhono e lwet jopur, kendo moro ka moro nyaka chule fedha alufu achiel kuom olembene." 
SongOfSongs8:12 An to an gi puotha awuon mar mzabibu. Emomiyo Solomon, in to bed abeda gi fedha miyudo kuom jopur! Jopur bende mondo obed abeda gi pokgi mar fedha mia ariyo ma giyudo!" 
SongOfSongs8:13 “A jaherana, jowadwa ochiko itgi, omiyo yie awinjie dwondi gie puodho kuno.”" 
SongOfSongs8:14 “Reti, ibi ira jaherana, mondo ibed e gode mang’ue ng’ar, mana ka gima in apol, kata ngau ma pod dongo modak e gode.”" 
Isaiah1:1 Ma e fweny ma wuoyo kuom Juda gi Jerusalem, mane Isaya wuod Amoz oneno e kinde mag loch Uzia gi Jotham, kod Hezekia, mane ruodhi Juda:" 
Isaiah1:2 Winjuru un polo gi piny, kendo chikuru itu, nikech Ruoth Nyasaye osewuoyo, ka wacho niya, “An gi nyithindo ma asepidho modoko madongo, to koro gisepiem koda." 
Isaiah1:3 Dhiang’ ong’eyo wuon-go, kendo kanyna bende ong’eyo kund wuon. Jo-Israel to ok ong’eya. Adier, joga awuon onge gi paro!" 
Isaiah1:4 A yaye oganda ma joricho ma opong’ gi timbe mamono, kendo ma joge joketho ma acheje! Useweyo Ruoth Nyasaye, Ng’ama Ler mar Israel kuchaye kendo ulokone ng’eu." 
Isaiah1:5 Ka pod usiko upiem apiema koda kamano, to ere dendu kama pod anyalo goyo, ka adhonde opong’o wiu, kendo ringreu duto odholore kama?" 
Isaiah1:6 Onge kama ngima e dendu, chakre tiendu nyaka wiu, mak mana kuonde moridhore gi kuonde moriemo kod adhonde, ma pok oketie yath, kata motue, kata mowirie mo ma dimi gichangi." 
Isaiah1:7 Pinyu odong’ gunda, kendo miechu mach osewang’o, bende jopinje moko nono mayou chambu mana e wang’u kuneno. Adier, odong’ gunda, mana kaka Sodom nodong’, kosekethi." 
Isaiah1:8 Sayun kende ema odong’, ka kiru mar jorito modong’ e puodho bang’ keyo. En dala ma wasigu olworo koni gi koni." 
Isaiah1:9 Ka dine Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto ok oreso ji manok kuomwa to dine otiekwa chuth, mana kaka ne otiek Sodom gi Gomora.”" 
Isaiah1:10 Un ruodhi mag Jerusalem, kaachiel gi jou, winjuru wach Ruoth Nyasaye. Ee, un muchalo gi jo-Sodom gi jo-Gomora, chikuru itu ni puonjne." 
Isaiah1:11 Openjou niya, “Ere ohala mar timona misengni mogundho? Aol gi misengni mag imbe miwang’o pep, kaachiel gi boche mag jamni machwe. Bende ok agomb remb ruedhi gi mag rombe kod mag nyuogi." 
Isaiah1:12 Ere ng’ama osekwayou mondo uchiw gigo ka ubiro e nyima? Ok unuchak unyon laru mar Hekaluna kendo! 
Isaiah1:13 Gik muchiwona onge tich, kendo tikgi dwaro ng’oga! Bende sewni mutimo ka due opor, kendo mutimo e kinde mag Sabato, ojoga. Chokruok mutimo, gi ndalou mag tueyo chiemo kod sewni mamoko bende ok adwar." 
Isaiah1:14 Ok ayie kodgi! Giwang’o iya, kendo ok adwar nenogi chuth!" 
Isaiah1:15 Bende ka uting’o bedeu malo ka ulemo, to abiro umo wang’a mondo kik aneu, kendo kata da bed ni ulemo machal nade, to ok nawinju" 
Isaiah1:16 nikech lwetu otimo remo. Lwokreuru mondo ubed maler, bende goluru timbeu mamono oko e wang’a," 
Isaiah1:17 kendo uwe timo richo to utim mana gik mabeyo. Luwuru mana adiera, kendo konyuru joma ithiro. Bende nyaka une ni nyithi kiye kod mond liete oyal buchegi kare.”" 
Isaiah1:18 Ruoth Nyasaye wacho niya, “Koro biuru, wapor wach kaachiel. Kata obedo ni richou kwar manade, to ginidog matar ka pe. Adier, kata ka gikwar ka remo, to ginibed marachar ka pamba." 
Isaiah1:19 Ka uyie kuoma, mumako chikna gi chunyu duto, to unucham gik mabeyo duto manie piny." 
Isaiah1:20 To ka udagi, mi upiem koda, to ligangla notieku. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano.”" 
Isaiah1:21 Mano kaka dala Jerusalem mane chon oluoro Nyasaye koro chalo mana gi dhako moweyo chwore, to dwanyore gi chwo mamoko! E kinde moko ne en kama adiera nitie, to tinde jonek ema opong’e." 
Isaiah1:22 Fethu oselokore chuoth nyinyo, kendo divachu otimo pi." 
Isaiah1:23 Jotendu duto gin jopiem, kendo giwinjore gi jokuoye. Giduto gihero chamo asoya, kendo gidwaro mondo ji omigi amiya gik moko. Kuom mano ok giyal buche nyithi kiye kare, bende weche ma mond liete okelo e nyimgi ok gidew." 
Isaiah1:24 Omiyo Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyakalaga, ma en Ng’ama Nyalo Gik Moko Duto mar Israel, wacho niya," 
Isaiah1:25 “Anachak asandu mi apuodh richou duto mana ka ng’ama lenyo fedha mondo chuoth nyinyo owuogi. 
Isaiah1:26 Bang’e anamiu jong’ad bura mabeyo, kod jobura mariek mana kaka chon. Bang’ mano dalau nochak oluongi ni, ‘Dala ma adiera nitie’, kendo ni, ‘Dala moluoro Nyasaye.’" 
Isaiah1:27 Ka jo-Sayun olokore moweyo richogi, kendo oluwo yo makare, to anawargi." 
Isaiah1:28 Joricho duto gi joma piem koda to norum chuth, nimar gidagi biro ira." 
Isaiah1:29 Tinde umor kulemo e tiend yien madongo, kendo kutimo misengni e puothe mowal ni tijno, to achien wiu nokuodi." 
Isaiah1:30 Uchalo gi yath ma pote oner, kata ka puodho ma koth ok chuee!" 
Isaiah1:31 Ng’at ma rategoe moloyo nochal oswekle, kendo timbeu mamono ema nodok pilni mach, mi un uwang’ kaachiel gi timbeu, ma onge ng’ama nego majno!”" 
Isaiah2:1 Ma e wach mane Isaya wuod Amoz oyudo e fweny, ma wuoyo kuom Juda gi Jerusalem:" 
Isaiah2:2 “E ndalo mabiro, got ma Hekalu ochung’ie nobed mabor moloyo gode moko duto, kendo ogendini duto nodhi kanyo," 
Isaiah2:3 ka giwacho niya, ‘Wadhiuru god Ruoth Nyasaye. Enopuonjwa yorene kendo wanaluwgi.’ Puonj mar Ruoth Nyasaye wuok Jerusalem. Ee, Sayun e kama owuoyoe gi joge." 
Isaiah2:4 Enong’ad bura ka othego ogendini mopogore opogore kendo enoyal pinje mang’eny. Ng’ato ka ng’ato nothedh liganglane mondo obed kwer. Tongegi to ginithedh rabetni. Onge oganda moro ma noked gi oganda machielo, kendo ji ok nochak opuonjre lweny.”" 
Isaiah2:5 Biuru, yaye un joka Jakobo, mondo wawuoth e ler mar Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Isaiah2:6 Ruoth Nyasaye osejwang’ou nikech uyie gi jo yo wuok chieng’ ma dhi ajuoga, kendo mawuoyo gi jochiende mana ka jo-Filistia. Bende jopinje mamoko yudore kamoro amora e pinyu." 
Isaiah2:7 Pinyu opong’ gi fedha gi dhahabu kod mwandu mokadho akwana, kaachiel gi farese mang’eny gi geche mogundho mag lweny." 
Isaiah2:8 To bende opong’ gi nyiseche manono ma lwetu uwegi ema oloso, ni to mago ema ulamo!" 
Isaiah2:9 Ji ma ogen gi ji ajia duto nodwok piny. Kuom mano, onego Nyasaye kik wenu!" 
Isaiah2:10 Donjuru e buche manie lwendni kata manie lowo, ka uluoro duong’ malich mar Ruoth Nyasaye kod tekone," 
Isaiah2:11 nimar ndalo biro ma sunga ma dhano sungorego nodwok piny, to Ruoth Nyasaye kende ema noting’ malo." 
Isaiah2:12 Adier, Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto oseketo chieng, ma noyalie josunga ma kawore, mi oruch e buru." 
Isaiah2:13 Chieng’no yiend sida maboyo duto man Lebanon, kod yien madongo duto man Bashan nokul piny" 
Isaiah2:14 kaachiel gi gode maboyo duto," 
Isaiah2:15 gi kuonde mochiel motegno mag siro lweny, kod ohinga maboyo duto." 
Isaiah2:16 Kata mana yiedhi madongo duto madhi Tarshish, kod mago mag Arabia bende nokethi chieng’no." 
Isaiah2:17 Duong’ duto ma dhano nigo noduog piny. Sunga mar dhano bende noruchre e buru. 
Isaiah2:18 Nyiseche manono duto nokethi, mi tiek chuth." 
Isaiah2:19 Ka Ruoth Nyasaye oa malo mondo oyieng piny, to ji nodonj e buche manie lwendni, kata manie lowo, ka giluoro duong’ malich mar Ruoth Nyasaye kod tekone." 
Isaiah2:20 Adier, chieng’ ma Ruoth Nyasaye oa malo mondo oyieng piny, to nyiseche manono mane ji oseloso gi fedha kod dhahabu, giniwit ni olwende kod oliktiga" 
Isaiah2:21 mi ginidonj e buche manie lwendni kendo manie kor gode maboyo, ka giluoro duong’ malich mar Ruoth Nyasaye kod tekone." 
Isaiah2:22 Kik iket genoni kuom dhano, nimar onge gima dhano nyalo. En gima nono mana ka muya mawuok e ume!" 
Isaiah3:1 Winjuru! An Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto abiro tieko chiemo kod pi e Jerusalem gi Juda, kendo abiro golo ji duto ma ugeno kuomgi," 
Isaiah3:2 kaka thuondi marateke kod jolweny gi jong’ad bura gi jonabi gi jokor wach gi jodongo 
Isaiah3:3 gi jotend ogend lweny gi joma ogen gi jo bura gi jonyakalondo kod ajuoke mamoko. 
Isaiah3:4 Bang’e anaket mana yawuowi matindo obed jotendu kendo giniritu mana gi timbe mag oyuma. 
Isaiah3:5 Ji nosandre kendgi giwegi, ka ng’ato ka ng’ato dhaw mana gi wadgi, to nyithindo bende yanyo joma dongo, kendo ji ajia chayo joma ogen." 
Isaiah3:6 E ndalogo ng’ato nyalo dhi ir wadgi e odgi, mi wachne niya, “In, in gi lewni, omiyo yie ibed ruodhwa mondo irit pinywa mokethore.”" 
Isaiah3:7 To ng’atno nodwoke niya, “Ooyo, ok dabed ruodhu, nimar aonge gi chiemo kata lewni e oda, omiyo ok unyal keta ruodh ogandani.”" 
Isaiah3:8 Jerusalem nokethre kendo Juda nopodhi nikech gisewuoyo marach kuom Ruoth Nyasaye, bende gisetimone timbe maricho, ka gipiem gi duong’ne mang’ongo." 
Isaiah3:9 Wang’gi ema nyiso ni gin joricho, kendo gihulo richogi ahula ma ok gipando, mana ka jo-Sodom. Yaye, mano kaka ginine masira, nikech giniyud pok mowinjore gi timbegi maricho." 
Isaiah3:10 Ng’at makare en jahawi, kendo gik moko duto dhine maber, nikech oyudo pok kuom gik mabeyo motimo." 
Isaiah3:11 Jaricho to nigi masira, kendo gik moko duto dhine marach, nikech oyudo pok moromo gi timbene maricho." 
Isaiah3:12 Joga to nyithindo ema thiro, kendo mon e jotendgi. A yaye joga, jotendu wuondou, kendo gimiyo ubayo yo monego uluw." 
Isaiah3:13 To Ruoth Nyasaye biro mondo oyal kendo ong’ad bura ni joge. 
Isaiah3:14 Ee, oyalo jodong joge gi jotendgi, kowacho niya, “Useketho puotha mar mzabibu, kendo gik moko ma useyako kuom joma odhier opong’o uteu." 
Isaiah3:15 Ere kaka unyalo hedhoru nyono joga kendo thiro joma odhier?” Mano en wach mar adier, ma Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto ema owacho." 
Isaiah3:16 Eka Ruoth Nyasaye nochako owacho niya, “Mond Sayun sungore kendo kawore, ka ging’ayo ng’utgi malo, kendo gimoyo wang’gi. Bende giwuotho ka ging’adore kendo manyonge manie tiendegi ywak." 
Isaiah3:17 Omiyo abiro keto tuo e wigi, kendo ami gidong’ duge.”" 
Isaiah3:18 Chieng’no anami manyonge ma girwako e ng’ut tiendegi, kod lewni mag leso, gi gik ma gilichogo wigi," 
Isaiah3:19 gi tigo ma giketo e ng’utgi, gi ronge mag lwedo, gi nanga miliero e ng’ut," 
Isaiah3:20 gi kitembni mag wich, gi thiwni mag ng’ut tielo, gi lwedo," 
Isaiah3:21 gi tere mag um gi mag lwedo," 
Isaiah3:22 gi lewni mabeyo, gi kabude, gi sukni, gi mifuke mag lwedo," 
Isaiah3:23 gi kio matindo, gi nengni mabeyo, gi kilembni, kod lewni miumogo wang’." 
Isaiah3:24 Kuom mano kar winjo tik mang’ue ng’ar, to unuwinj mana tik madum marach. Bende kar bedo gi misip, to tol ema notueugo, kendo kar bedo gi wich molos maber, to bondo ema unubedgo, bende kar rwako nanga maber, to gunia ema unutue e nungou, kendo kar bedo gi chia maber to mbelni mag mach ema nobed e dendu." 
Isaiah3:25 Ligangla noneg jou machwo kendo thuondu notho e lweny. 
Isaiah3:26 Ywak kod dengo nopong’ dhorangeye mag Sayun, kendo dalano nodong’ nono kokethore." 
Isaiah4:1 E kindeno chwo manok kende ema nodong’, kendo mon abiriyo nobed ka laro dichwo achiel, ka wachone niya, “Yie mondo wabed mondi waduto. Chiemo mwachamo gi lewni mwarwako to wabiro yudo wawegi, to yie ayieya oluongwa mana ni mondi, mondo kik wane wichkuot ni waonge gi chwo.”" 
Isaiah4:2 E ndalogo, yath ma Ruoth Nyasaye osepidho nobed gi duong’ kendo nonere maber, bende olemo ma piny onyago ema nobed gima kelo ni jo-Israel motony mor kod pak." 
Isaiah4:3 Eka jogo ma odong’ Jerusalem ma moro ka moro ondik nyinge e kitap ngima, noluong ni joma ler." 
Isaiah4:4 Ruoth Nyasaye biro ng’ado bura maliel ka mach, kolwoko chind mond Sayun, kendo opwodho remo mochwer e dalano." 
Isaiah4:5 Bang’e Ruoth Nyasaye nohon rumbi mar iro godiechieng’, kod ligek mach mang’ang’ni gotieno e wi udi man e got Sayun, kod kuonde chokruok, nikech duong’ nolandore kuonde duto" 
Isaiah4:6 mana ka tado makelo tipo ka chieng’ rieny kendo ka kama ji ringo tonyie, kendo bwogoe koth gi yamo maduong’." 
Isaiah5:1 Abiro wero ni jaherana wenda mar hera, ma awerego puothe mar mzabibu. Jaherana ne nigi puoth mzabibu e bath got kama omew." 
Isaiah5:2 Ne opure maber mi ogolo kite mane nitie, kendo opidhoe mzabibu mabeyo ahinya. Ne ogero ot mabor mar rito e dier puodhono, kendo ne okunyo bur mibiyoe mzabibu e lwanda man kuno. Ne ogeno ni puotheno biro nyagone olemo mabeyo, to kar timo kamano ne onyago mana olemo makech." 
Isaiah5:3 Koro un jo-Jerusalem kod jo-Juda, ng’adieuru bura e kinda kod puotha mar mzabibu." 
Isaiah5:4 En ang’o mane onego atim e puotha mane ok atimo? To kane atimo gik moko duto mowinjore, to ere gima omiyo ne onyago mana olemo makech, to ne ageno ni obiro nyagona olemo mabeyo?" 
Isaiah5:5 Koro chikuru itu, mondo uwinj gima abiro timo ni puotha mar mzabibu. Abiro pudho chiende oko, kendo abiro muko ohingane, mi dhok gi le nokwaye kendo nonyone piny." 
Isaiah5:6 Kamano, anawe okethre. Bende ok nolwer bede olembene, kata doch ok nodoye, to kudho kod pedo ema nogawree, kendo anakwer boche polo mondo koth kik chak chue kanyo." 
Isaiah5:7 Puoth mzabibu mar Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto en Israel, kendo jo-Juda e yath mane orito maber. Ne ogeno ni adiera dibedie, to nek ema ne oneno, bende noparo ni tim makare diyudree, to ywak malit ema ne owinjo." 
Isaiah5:8 Yaye, unune malit un joma medo gero udi agera, kendo ma medo yaro puothe ayara nyaka piny pong’ thich, mi udong’ kukwako piny!" 
Isaiah5:9 Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto osekuong’ore ka awinjo niya, Udi mang’eny nowe gunda, Adier, udi madongo mabeyo nodong’ nono ma onge joma odakie." 
Isaiah5:10 Bende puodho maduong’ nonyag mana mzabibu moromo divai matin nono, kendo kodhi moromo depe ariyo nonyag cham moromo mana ondweto kende." 
Isaiah5:11 Yaye, unune malit, un joma chiew gokinyi mang’ich kadhi dwaro kong’o, kendo budho nyaka dier otieno ka mer!" 
Isaiah5:12 Utimo sewni gi kong’o mogundho kod thumbe mopogore opogore to ok udew gik ma Ruoth Nyasaye osetimo, bende ok unegi." 
Isaiah5:13 Kuom mano, noter joga e tuech e piny mabor kapok gifwenyo ni ginie masira. Kech gi riyo biro nego joma ogen kaachiel gi ji mamoko duto." 
Isaiah5:14 Emomiyo piny joma otho ong’amo dhoge malach, ka dande oyawore, mondo omwonygo joma ogen kaachiel gi ji mamoko duto, e kinde ma gikokie gi mor." 
Isaiah5:15 Ji duto, koda ka josunga, nodwok piny mi bolre." 
Isaiah5:16 Yo ma Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto ng’adoe bura biro miye duong’, kendo timne makare biro nyiso ni en Ng’ama Ler." 
Isaiah5:17 Nyirombe ema nokwa e lege, ma yande ruedhi kwayoe, kendo nyidiek ema nolag e lege madongo ma yande miyo dhok doko machwe." 
Isaiah5:18 Yaye, unune malit, un joma ywayo chandruok irgi ka joma ywayo rombo kata gari gi tol." 
Isaiah5:19 Uwacho niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye mondo oreti, otim tichne piyopiyo wane! Adier, gima Ng’ama Ler mar Israel ochano timo, mondo ochop piyopiyo waneye!”" 
Isaiah5:20 Yaye, unune malit, un joma kwano richo ka gima ber, kendo ma kwano gima ber ka gima rach. Uluongo mudho ni ler, kendo ler uluongo ni mudho, bende ukwano gik makech ka gik mamit, to gik mamit ukwano ka gik makech." 
Isaiah5:21 Yaye, unune malit, un joma paro e chunygi giwegi ni riek, kendo ma kwanore ni ong’eyo gik moko." 
Isaiah5:22 Yaye un thuondi mag madho kong’o kendo ma tekogi en mana ruwo kong’o makech," 
Isaiah5:23 ubiro yudo kum, nimar uweyo joketho nikech asoya, to joma onge ketho ema utamo e adiera monego giyudi!" 
Isaiah5:24 Emomiyo kaka ligek mach wang’o yugi, mi tieki, kendo kaka tiang’ wang’ mi rum e mach mager, e kaka un bende unulal nono mana ka buru, nimar usechayo chik Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto, kendo usedagi wach Ng’ama Ler mar Israel." 
Isaiah5:25 Kuom mano Ruoth Nyasaye okecho gi joge, kendo oserieyo bade kuomgi mogoyogi, mi gode otetni, kendo ringre jogo obimbore e wang’yore ka yugi. To kata kamano mirimbe pok okue, kendo pod okumogi akuma." 
Isaiah5:26 Mano omiyo obiro ting’o bandera kaka ranyisi ma ogwelo oganda moro modak kuma bor. Obiro luongogi mondo giwuogi e tung’ piny, kendo gibiro biro piyopiyo ka giringo," 
Isaiah5:27 ma onge ng’ama ol kuomgi kata ma chwanyore, kendo ma onge ng’ama nur kata ma nindo. Bende onge ng’ama okandane ombekni e nungone kata ma tond wuochene ochot."
