Isaiah5:28 Aserni maggi opiag mabith, kendo atungegi duto oywa motegno. Ombong’ faresegi tek ka kite, kendo tiend gechegi mag lweny winyore ka kalausi." 
Isaiah5:29 Giywak mana ka sibuor maruto komako le, kendo dhigo ma onge ng’ama nyalo maye." 
Isaiah5:30 Ginikog kuom jo-Israel chieng’no, mana ka nam matwaro, kendo ka ng’ato orango piny to mudho gi chandruok ema none, bende wang’chieng’ noimre e boche polo." 
Isaiah6:1 E higa mane ruoth Uzia othoe, ne aneno Ruoth Nyasaye ka obet e kome moting’ore malo kendo moluor, ka lawe morwako opong’o Hekalu." 
Isaiah6:2 Malaike miluongo ni serafi ne ni bute. Moro ka moro ne nigi buombe auchiel, ma ariyo oumogo wang’e, to ariyo mamoko oumogo tiendene, kendo ariyo modong’ ohuyogo." 
Isaiah6:3 Ne giluongore, ka moro ka moro kok ni wadgi niya, “Mano kaka Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto ler! Oler adier! Yaye mano kaka oler! Piny duto opong’ gi duong’ne.”" 
Isaiah6:4 E kinde ka kinde mane gikokie kamano, mise mag dhoudi ne yiengni, kendo iro ne pong’o Hekalu." 
Isaiah6:5 Kane aneno kamano, ne aywak, ka awacho niya, “A yaye, piny lichna! Aruenyo, nimar an ng’at ma dhoge ochido, kendo adak e kind ji ma dhogi ok ler, to eka aseneno Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto gi wang’a awuon!”" 
Isaiah6:6 Eka malaika moro nohuyo, mobiro ira koting’o mach" 
Isaiah6:7 mane osegolo e kendo-mar-misango gi ramaki. Ne orewo dhoga ka owacho niya, “Winji, majni oserewo dhogi, omiyo timbeni mamono oweni. Adier, richoni opwodhi.”" 
Isaiah6:8 Bang’ mano ne awinjo ka Ruoth Nyasaye wacho niya, “Ere ng’ama daor? Koso ng’ano ma dibed jaotena?” An to ne adwoko niya, “Era e, an ema mondo iora.”" 
Isaiah6:9 Eka nowachona niya, “Dhiyo mondo inyis jogi kama: ‘Kata da bed ni uchiko itu machal nade, to ok unuwinji. Bende kata da bed ni ung’icho matek machal nade, to ok unufweny gimoro.’" 
Isaiah6:10 To in Isaya, nyaka imi, chuny jogi dok mapek, mondo kik wach donjnigi, kendo imi itgi dinre mondo kik giwinj wach, bende imi wengegi imre mondo kik ginen, eka dipo ka gilokore, mi ochanggi.”" 
Isaiah6:11 Bang’e ne apenjo niya, “Yaye Ruoth Nyasaye, gima kamano biro timore nyaka karang’o?” Eka nodwoka niya, “Mano biro timore nyaka mier lokre gundni, mi udi dong’ nono, ma onge ng’ama odakie, kendo piny kethre chuth," 
Isaiah6:12 ka Ruoth Nyasaye oseriembo ji duto mabor, mi piny Israel olokore gima ojwang’." 
Isaiah6:13 Kata ka achiel kuom apar mar ji odong’ kanyo, to gin bende notiekgi pep, mana ka yien motong’, mi osiki kende ema odong’. Kamano jo-Nyasaye ma biro dong’ nochal gi osikino.”" 
Isaiah7:1 E kinde mane Ahaz wuod Jotham ma nyakwar Uzia obet ruodh Juda, Rezin ruodh Aram kod Peka wuod Remalia ma ruodh Israel ne jodhi monjo Jerusalem, to kawe notamogi." 
Isaiah7:2 Kane joka Daudi owinjo ni jo-Aram osewinjore gi jo Efraim, ne gitetni kaachiel gi Ahaz ma ruodhgi, mana ka yien manie bungu ma yamo uko." 
Isaiah7:3 Eka Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Isaya niya, “Dhiyo gi wuodi Shear-jashub ir Ahaz kama fereji mar pi mamalo ogikie but yo mochiko puodho miluongo ni puoth Jalwok Lewni, mondo iwachne kama:" 
Isaiah7:4 ‘Nyaka ibed gi kue, ma ok ibedo maluor. Kik iwe mirima mager ma Rezin gi jo Aram kod wuod Remalia nigo, nyos chunyi, nikech gin mana meny ariyo mag mach motimo iro." 
Isaiah7:5 Adier, jo-Aram gi jo-Efraim kaachiel gi wuod Remalia osechano mondo otieku, ka giwacho niya," 
Isaiah7:6 “Wamonj piny Juda mondo wakedgo, kendo kwasekawe to waket wuod Tabeel obed ruoth kuno.” ’" 
Isaiah7:7 To Ruoth Nyasaye wacho kama: ‘Mano ok notimre e ndalogi kata e ndalo mabiro," 
Isaiah7:8 nimar kata obedo ni Damaski e dala maduong’ mar Aram, kendo Efraim, kendo wuod Remalia e jatend dalono," 
Isaiah7:9 bende kata ni Samaria e dala maduong’ mar Efraim nokethi, mi ok nochak obed oganda kendo. Kuom mano, bed gi yie motegno kuom Nyasaye, nono to ok ibi chung’ mogurore.’ ”" 
Isaiah7:10 Ruoth nochako owuoyo kendo gi Ahaz, kowacho niya," 
Isaiah7:11 “Kwa Ruoth Nyasachi mondo omiyi ranyisi moro amora, moa mwalo e bur piny, kata moa e polo malo.”" 
Isaiah7:12 To Ahaz nodwoko niya, “Ooyo, ok natem Ruoth Nyasaye ka akwaye mondo omiya ranyisi.”" 
Isaiah7:13 Bang’e Isaya nowacho niya, “Un joka Daudi, chikuru itu. Olo chuny ji ma uolo pok oromou koso, ma pod udwaroe mana olo Nyasacha bendeni?" 
Isaiah7:14 Koro Ruoth Nyasaye owuon biro miyou ranyisi ma chalo kama: Nyako moro osemako ich, kendo obiro nywolo wuowi, ma obiro chako ni Emanuel, (ma tiende ni, Nyasaye ni kodwa.)" 
Isaiah7:15 E kinde ma nyathino nong’ee pogo gima rach gi gima ber, to enobed ka ochamo mor dhiang’ gi mor kich," 
Isaiah7:16 nikech kata obedo ni koro uluoro ruodh Efraim gi ruodh Aram, to ka pok nyathino ong’eyo pogo gima rach gi gima ber, to pinje ruodhi ariyogo nobed mojwang’" 
Isaiah7:17 To in Ahaz, Ruoth Nyasaye biro keloni kaachiel gi jogi kod joodi masira ma pok oneye nyaka ne jo-Israel pogre kuom jo-Juda. Ruodh Asuria ema nokel masirano." 
Isaiah7:18 “E ndalogo, Ruoth Nyasaye noluong jolwenj Misri modak kuonde ma aora Nael ochakoree, kod jolweny mag Asuria." 
Isaiah7:19 Giduto ginibi, mi gipong’ piny mana ka lwang’ni gi kich mopoto e hohni kod buche mag lwendni kendo e kuthe gi lege duto." 
Isaiah7:20 E ndalogo Ruoth Nyasaye nokel ruodh Asuria mondo oyaku mi weu nono, mana ka gima wembe ema olielo dendu duto koda ka tiku bende." 
Isaiah7:21 E ndalogo ka ng’ato nigi roya achiel kod rombe ariyo," 
Isaiah7:22 to enocham mo nikech chak mathoth moyudo kuom jamnigo. Adier, joma odong’ e piny Juda nocham mor dhiang’ gi mor kich." 
Isaiah7:23 E ndalogo puothe ma yande nitie mzabibu mang’eny ma nengogi tek nolokre bunge mogawore gi kuthe kod pedo. 
Isaiah7:24 Ji nodhi kuondego gi asere kod atung’ mana ni mondo odwarie le, nimar piny duto nobed koyugno." 
Isaiah7:25 Ji ok nodhi e kor gode ma yande ipuro nikech ginitim pedo gi kuthe, to dhok gi rombe ema nobed ka kwayoe.”" 
Isaiah8:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nowachona niya, “Dwar bao moro malach mondo indikie ni, MAHER-SHALAL-HASH-BAZ, (tiende ni, yeko biro timore machiegni.)" 
Isaiah8:2 Eka iluong Uria jadolo gi Zekaria wuod Jeberekia obed janeno, nikech gin joma long’o.”" 
Isaiah8:3 Bange ne ariwowa gi janabi madhako ma chiega, mi omako ich, monywolo nyathi ma wuowi. Eka Ruoth Nyasaye nowachona niya, “Chake ni Maher-shalal-hash-baz," 
Isaiah8:4 nimar kapok ong’eyo wacho ni ‘Baba’, kata ni ‘Mama,’ to ruodh Asuria nomonj Damaski kod Samaria, mi yak mwandugi duto.”" 
Isaiah8:5 Bang’e Ruoth Nyasaye nochako owachona niya," 
Isaiah8:6 “Ogandani osedagi wechena mamuol machalo pi Shiloa mamol mos gi kue," 
Isaiah8:7 kendo gitetni e nyim Resin kod wuod Remalia, emomiyo abiro kelo kuomgi ruodh Asuria gi joge mag lweny, mabiro pong’o pinygi chuth, mana kaka aora Yufrate maduong’ kendo matut pong’o wang’e kendo mwomo genge, mi o oko." 
Isaiah8:8 Yaye, Emanuel! Obiro mwomo piny Juda mi ochop koni gi koni mana kaka ohula mwomo genge mi im piny duto gi pi matut.”" 
Isaiah8:9 Un ogendini, ng’euru ni ibiro negou! Chikuru itu, un pinje man kuonde maboyo, nimar kata umanoru gi gi lweny, to pod nonegu anega." 
Isaiah8:10 Kata dabed ni uchano gik ma udwaro timo, to gik ma uchanogo nokethre. Adier, kata dabed ni ugolo chik mondo otimgi, to ok ginitimre, nikech Nyasaye ni kodwa." 
Isaiah8:11 Weche mane Ruoth Nyasaye owuoyogo koda gi tekone maduong’, kosiema ni kik aluw timbe jo-Israelgi e magi:" 
Isaiah8:12 Gik ma jogi luongo ni ler, kik iluong ni ler. Bende gik ma giluoro kik iluor, kata kik goyi kibaji." 
Isaiah8:13 Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto, ema nyaka ikwan ni ler. En ema nyaka imiye luor, kendo en ema nyaka kibache goyi." 
Isaiah8:14 En e Kar Ler, kendo e kidi ma chwanyo ji. Adier, en e lwanda mamiyo pinje jo-Israel ariyo duto podho. Chutho en e obadho mamako jo-Jerusalem." 
Isaiah8:15 Ji mang’eny biro chwanyore e lwandano, mi gore piny kendo tur. Adier, obadhono biro mako ji mathoth." 
Isaiah8:16 Koro atueyo kalatas mondikie wechego matek, kendo achano puonjno e chuny jopuonjrena." 
Isaiah8:17 Arito Ruoth Nyasaye ma pando wang’e ni joka Jakobo, ka ageno mana en." 
Isaiah8:18 An kaachiel gi nyithindo ma Ruoth Nyasaye osemiya, wan ranyisi ma Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto modak e got Sayun oseoro, manyisogi gik mabiro timore." 
Isaiah8:19 Kamoro dipo ka ji biro wachonu ni mondo udhi upenj wach kuom ajuok nyakalondo kod ajuoke mamoko majajni kendo madhum. To bende ber ka joma ngima penjo joma otho wach adier? Nyasachgi donge ema onego gipenj wach? Ee, ber mondo giwinj mana chik Nyasaye gi wachne!" 
Isaiah8:20 Adier, ji nyalo wachonu weche makamago, to kata kamano gima giwacho onge tich." 
Isaiah8:21 Ginikadhi e piny ka githagore kendo ka gidenyo. Kamano igi nowang’, mi giyany ruodhgi kendo Nyasachgi." 
Isaiah8:22 Kata ka giting’o wang’gi malo, kata ka girango piny, to chandruok gi mudho kod chuny malit ema ginine kuonde duto, kendo noriembgi, mi witgi e mudho mandiwa." 
Isaiah9:1 To ndalo biro ma piny ma yande neno chandruok nobed gi mor. Chon Nyasaye nomiyo piny Zebulun gi piny Naftali obedo pinje michayo, to e ndalo mabiro nomi pinjego duong’. Tiende ni Galili piny ogendini man yo podho chieng’ man aora Jordan, e yo madhi nam Mediterenian." 
Isaiah9:2 Ji ma wuotho e mudho none ler maduong’. Adier, ler norieny kuom jogo modak e piny motimo mudho mandiwa." 
Isaiah9:3 Yaye Nyasaye, inimi oganda Israel nya, kendo inimi gimed bedo mamor. Ginibed mamor e nyimi kaka ji mor e ndalo keyo, kendo mana kaka ji mor ka pogo gik moyaki." 
Isaiah9:4 Mano notimre nikech ibiro turo jok ma giting’o, kaachiel gi luth misandogigo, mana kaka nitimo e ndalo mane olo jo-Midian." 
Isaiah9:5 Gik moko duto ma jolweny omanorego kod lewni duto ma omienore gi remo, nowang’ mana ka yien michwakogo mach," 
Isaiah9:6 nikech nonywolnwa nyathi. Adier, ibiro miyowa wuowi, kendo loch nobed e lwete. Noluong nyinge ni, Jabura Mahono, Nyasaye Maratego,, Wuoro ma nyaka chieng’, kendo Ruodh Kue." 
Isaiah9:7 Lochne nobed maduong’, kendo kue mokelo nobed maonge giko. Enobed e kom Daudi kendo norit pinye gi adiera kod tim makare mondo ogurre obed motegno. Chakre kawuono nyaka chieng’, Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto oseketo chunye mondo otim gigo." 
Isaiah9:8 Ruoth Nyasaye oseoro wachne kosiemogo joka Jakobo. Ee, wachno otundo kuom jo-Israel." 
Isaiah9:9 Jo-Efraim kod jo-Samaria duto nobolre, kata obedo ni giwuoyo gi sunga kod wang’ teko niya," 
Isaiah9:10 “Adier, udi moger gi matafari osepodho, to koro wabiro gedo mana gi kite mopa, bende kata obedo ni osetong’ yiend ng’owo, to wabiro pidho yiend sida kargi.”" 
Isaiah9:11 Ruoth Nyasaye biro kelo wasigu mondo oked kodgi. Adier, obiro thuwo wasikgi kodgi mondo otiekgi." 
Isaiah9:12 Jo-Aram biro kedo kodgi gi yo wuok chieng’, to jo-Filistia biro monjogi gi yo podho chieng’, kendo gibiro mwonyo jo-Israel mana dichiel. To kata kamano, mirimb Ruoth Nyasaye ok norum, kendo pod nosik kokumogi akuma." 
Isaiah9:13 To ji ok noduog ir jal ma nobed ka kumogi. Ooyo, ok ginidwar mondo Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto otelnigi." 
Isaiah9:14 Emomiyo Ruoth Nyasaye nogol wich gi yip kod odundu gi yiend othith e odiechieng’ achiel. 
Isaiah9:15 (Wich en joma oti kod joma ogen, to yip en jonabi mawacho miriambo.)" 
Isaiah9:16 Jotend jogi osewitogi. Omiyo joma onego telnigi ok ong’eyo gima onego gitim. 
Isaiah9:17 Mano, emomiyo Ruoth Nyasaye ok nokech yawuotgi, bende ok nobed mamuol gi nyithi kiye kata gi mond liete, nikech giduto gin joricho, kendo gikia Nyasaye, bende ng’ato ka ng’ato kuomgi wacho mana weche mofuwo. Kata kamano, mirimb Ruoth Nyasaye ok norum, kendo pod nosik kokumogi akuma." 
Isaiah9:18 Richo liel mana ka mach mager mobolie kudho, kendo wang’o koda ka bungu ka iro dhuolore." 
Isaiah9:19 Omiyo mirimb Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto biro wang’o piny Israel, kendo ji ema nobed yien michwakogo mach." 
Isaiah9:20 Ng’at achiel biro mecho konchiel, to pod nodeny adenya, kendo ng’at machielo biro mwonyo gik moko komachielo, to ok noyieng’ ngang’. Moro ka moro biro chamo ringre nyithinde, bende onge ma nowe owadgi mak ochamo." 
Isaiah9:21 To kata kamano mirimb Ruoth Nyasaye ok norum kendo pod nosik kokumogi akuma. 
Isaiah10:1 Yaye, unune malit, un joma loso chike ma ok ni kare, kendo ma keto chike maricho mathiro ji." 
Isaiah10:2 Utamo joma odhier e adiera, kendo umayo joga ma jochan gik monego giyudi, bende uyako mond liete kod nyithi kiye." 
Isaiah10:3 To unutim ang’o chieng’ mikumou, ka masira moa kuma bor omakou? Ere ng’ama nuring ire mondo okonyu? Koso ere kama un uweye nyithindu" 
Isaiah10:4 mondo kik gikirni e nyim jotuech, kata kik gipodhi e lwet janek? To kata kamano mirimb Ruoth Nyasaye ok norum, kendo pod nosik kokumou akuma." 
Isaiah10:5 Ruodh Asuria e luth ma agoyogo ji ka akecho. Ee, en e luth ma akumogo ji ka mirima omaka." 
Isaiah10:6 En ema aore mondo odhi oked gi oganda moweyo Nyasaye Adier, achike mondo omonj joma miya mirimago. Mi oketh mwandu, kendo oyakgi kaka en ema odwaro, konyonogi piny, mana ka chuodho minyono e wang’ yore." 
Isaiah10:7 To ruodh Asuriani ok ong’eyo ni an ema ne aore. Oparo mana in en omonjo amonja ji, kodwaro ni mondo olo piny duto." 
Isaiah10:8 Owacho niya, “Donge jotenda duto gin ruodhi?" 
Isaiah10:9 Aseketho Kalno mana kaka naketho Karkermish, kendo asetimo ni Hanath mana kaka natimo ni Arpad, bende aseketho Samaria mana kaka naketho Damaski." 
Isaiah10:10 Kaka koro asekawo pinje ma lamo nyiseche manono ma kido ma gin go ng’eny maloyo mag Jerusalem gi Samaria 
Isaiah10:11 donge abiro timo ni Jerusalem kod nyisechene manono, mana kaka asetimo ni Samaria kod kido mage manono?”" 
Isaiah10:12 Ka Ruoth Nyasaye osetieko kumo jo-Jerusalem kaka nochano to enokum ruodh Asuria kuom timbene mag sunga kod ng’ayi," 
Isaiah10:13 nimar ruodh Asuria osewacho niya, “Aseloyo lwenjegi duto mana gi tekona kod riekona awuon, nikech an gi ng’eyo. Ne aketho tong’ mag pinje, mi ayako mwandugi mathoth, kendo anyono ji e buru." 
Isaiah10:14 Lweta oseyudo kuonde ma mwandugi nitie, kendo asekawo pinje duto mana kaka ng’ato kawo tong’ e od winyo ma oringo, ma onge gima kwadho buombe, kata ma ng’amo dhoge, kata ma chwicho!”" 
Isaiah10:15 To Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho niya, “Bende le disungre ni ng’at matong’o kode? Koso musemeno dibed maduong’ moloyo ng’ama ng’eto kode? Mano nyalo timore mana ka luth nyalo yiengo ng’ama oting’e, kata ka arungu bende nyalo ting’o dhano ma sirore kode!”" 
Isaiah10:16 Kuom mano, Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto biro kelo tuo kuom jolwej Asuria marateke, chakre e wigi nyaka lith tiendgi, kendo tuo noliel ka mach ei ringregi." 
Isaiah10:17 Ler mar Israel nolokre mach. Adier, Ng’ama Ler nolokre mach mang’ang’ni, ma chieng’ moro nomuochi, mi wang’gi pep odiechieng’ achiel mana ka kudho." 
Isaiah10:18 Notiekgi chuth, mana ka bunge kod puothe mag olembe mabeyo mowang’ chuth, kata ka ng’at ma tuo ochamo dende motieko," 
Isaiah10:19 kendo ginidong’ manok, mana ka yien manok modong’ e bungu ma kata mana nyathi matin nyalo kwano achiel ka achiel." 
Isaiah10:20 Chieng’no jo-Israel ma nyikwa Jakobo manok modong’ nowe keto genogi kuom ng’at mane dwaro tiekogi, to ginigen gi chunygi duto mana kuom Ruoth Nyasaye ma en Ng’ama Ler mar Israel." 
Isaiah10:21 Adier, joma nok modong’ ma nyikwa Jakobo noduog ir Nyasaye Maratego." 
Isaiah10:22 Un jo-Israel, kata obedo ni ung’eny ka kuoyo mae dhonam, to ji manok modong’ kuomu kende ema nochak oduogi, nimar Nyasaye oseketo bura makare mabiro tieko joge duto." 
Isaiah10:23 Adier, Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto osechano kelo masira ma biro tieko piny duto." 
Isaiah10:24 Mano emomiyo owacho kama: “Un joga modak Sayun, kik uluor jo-Asuria, kata obedo ni gisandou kaka ne jo-Misri otimonu chon," 
Isaiah10:25 nimar piyopiyo nono mirima ma koro omaka kodu biro rumo, to gin ema abiro kecho kodgi mi atiekgi." 
Isaiah10:26 Abiro chwadogi gi del, mana kaka ne achwado jo-Midian kane atiekogi e lwanda Oreb, kendo kaka ne achwado jo-Misri e Nam Makwar." 
Isaiah10:27 Chieng’no ting’ mapek mane jo-Asuria oketo e goku nogol, kendo nyororo ma osebedo ka gitueyogo ng’utu nochod oko.”" 
Isaiah10:28 Ne aneno e fweny ni: Mony moa Rimon osechopo Ayath gisekadho Migron, kendo kikano gigi Mikmash" 
Isaiah10:29 gisebiro gi yo maluwo Maabara, mi gibworo Geba. Jo-Rama kibaji goyo, kendo jo-Geba, dala Saulo, kihondko omako." 
Isaiah10:30 Un jo-Bath-galim, gouru uwi! To un jo-Laish, chikuru itu. Un jo-Anathoth, dwokgiuru." 
Isaiah10:31 Jo-Madmena ringo. Un jo-Gebim bende ringuru utony! 
Isaiah10:32 Kawuono ruodh Asuria biro guro kambine Nob. Okwadho bandera ma nyiso ni omonj Sayun, god Jerusalem." 
Isaiah10:33 To neuru kaka Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto nego wasike mana kaka mil polo lwero yien. Onego jotelo gi joma moko duto, mana ka ng’at ma tong’o yien, mi yien maboyo podhi, kendo kata mana mago madongoe moloyo kulre piny." 
Isaiah10:34 Ee, Nyasaye Maratego biro goyo jo-Asuria piny, mana ka ng’at ma tong’o yiend Lebanon." 
Isaiah11:1 Bang’e nyakwar Jesse moro nowuogi, mana ka bad yath maloth." 
Isaiah11:2 Roho mar Ruoth Nyasaye nobi kuome. En Roho makelo rieko gi ng’eyo, kendo ma ng’ado ni ji rieko, kendo miyo ji teko, bende en Roho ma puonjo ji luoro Nyasaye." 
Isaiah11:3 Ok nong’ad bura mana nikech gima oneno, bende ok nochiw parone mana nikech gima owinjo." 
Isaiah11:4 To nong’ad bura gi adiera ni joma odhier, kendo nochwak joma muol kaka owinjore. Dhoge ema nobed luth mogoyogo joma timbegi mono. Ee, wachne ema noneggo joricho." 
Isaiah11:5 Tim makare kod adiera nobed ka okanda motueyo e nungone, kendo adiera e misip ma notuego dende." 
Isaiah11:6 E ndalo lochne, otoyo nodag kaachiel gi rombe. Kwach bende nonind kaachiel gi diek, kendo nyaroya kod nyithi sibuor nodongi kaachiel, ma kata mana nyathi matin nokwagi akwaya." 
Isaiah11:7 Dhiang’ gi ondiek nobed osiepe, kendo nyithindgi nonind kanyakla. Sibuor nocham lum ka dhiang’," 
Isaiah11:8 kendo nyathi madhoth notug e dho bur thuond rai, bende rawera noso lwete asoya e bur thuond hu." 
Isaiah11:9 Onge gima nohiny ng’ato, kata ma noketh gimoro e gode maler duto, nimar joma ong’eyo Ruoth Nyasaye nopong’ piny, mana ka pi mopong’o nam." 
Isaiah11:10 E ndalogo, nyakwar Jesseno noketi ka ranyisi ni ji. Ogendini nobi ire, kendo dalane nobed gi duong." 
Isaiah11:11 E kindego, Ruoth Nyasaye norie bade mondo odwok joge manok modong’ mapod Asuria gi Misri ma nyandwat kod ma milambo gi ma Ethiopia gi Elam, gi Babulon gi Hamath, kod mag pinje manie dhonam." 
Isaiah11:12 Eka enoting’ bandera malo mondo obed ranyisi ni ogendini, mi ochok jo-Israel mane oriemb e pinygi, kendo ochok jo-Juda moke, kogolo e tung’ piny gi tung’ piny." 
Isaiah11:13 Nyiego mar jo-Israel nolal nono, kendo sadha mar jo-Juda norum. Adier, nyiego ok nomak jo-Israel gi jo-Juda, kendo jo-Juda ok nobed wasik jo-Israel." 
Isaiah11:14 Ginimonj jo-Filistia yo podho chieng’, kendo giniriwre kaachiel, mi giyak jo yo wuok chieng, kamano ginikaw piny Edom gi piny Moab, kendo jo-Amon bende nobed e bwogi." 
Isaiah11:15 Ruoth Nyasaye nomi Nam Makwar duon, eka norie lwete e aora Yufrate, mi okel yamo maliet ma opoggo aorano dibiriyo, mondo ji ong’ade ka otwo." 
Isaiah11:16 Kamano ndara nobedie ni jo-Ruoth Nyasaye manok, modong’ kuom joma ne oter Asuria mana kaka ndara nobetie ni jo-Israel kawuok Misri." 
Isaiah12:1 Chieng’no unuwach niya, “A Ruoth Nyasaye wabiro paki! Kata obedo ni mirima osemaki kodwa, to koro oselendo, mi ikweyo chunywa." 
Isaiah12:2 Adier, Nyasaye e jareswa. Wan gi geno kendo ok waluor, nimar Ruoth Nyasaye e kar konyruokwa, kendo e okumbawa. Osenyiso ni en e jareswa.”" 
Isaiah12:3 Kuom mano ubiro yudo gik mabeyo gi mor kuom Ruoth Nyasaye ma resou. 
Isaiah12:4 Chieng’no un duto unuwach niya, “Gouru erokamano ni Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo lameuru. Landuru ni ji duto gik mosetimo. Ka uhulo ni nyinge nigi duong’ moloyo." 
Isaiah12:5 Weruru ni Ruoth Nyasaye wende pak nikech oselocho, kendo mano nyaka ng’ere e piny duto." 
Isaiah12:6 Un joma odak Sayun, koguru gi mor, nimar Ng’ama Ler mar Israel odak e dieru gi duong’ne duto.”" 
Isaiah13:1 Ma e wach mane Nyasaye onyiso Isaya wuod Amoz kuom Babulon e fweny: 
Isaiah13:2 Chunguru bandera ewi got mojuer kaka ranyisi muluongogo wasik Babulon. Gwelgiuru mondo gidonj e dhoranga Babulon. 
Isaiah13:3 An awuon ema agolo chik ni jolwenja. Adier, asechiko joga marateke ka akecho, mondo otim gima adwaro. Gigombo mondo an ema alo lweny." 
Isaiah13:4 Winjuru kaka koko mar oganda mang’ongo gore ewi gode! En koko mar ogendini ma chokore kaa e pinje mopogore opogore. Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto choko oganda mang’ongo mar lwenyno. 
Isaiah13:5 Gia e piny mabor, manie tung’ piny mogik. Ruoth Nyasaye ema kelo jogo kaka gige mag lweny mondo okethgo piny gi mirimbe mager." 
Isaiah13:6 Gouru uwi, un jo-Babulon, nimar chieng’ ma Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto oseketonu koro ochopo machiegni! En odiechieng’ ma abiro keloe masira maduong’ e piny." 
Isaiah13:7 Chieng’onogo lwet ng’ato ka ng’ato nowengni, kendo kibaji nogo ji duto, ma chunygi a chuth." 
Isaiah13:8 Rem bende noneggi mana ka dhako ma muoch kayo. Ng’ato ka ng’ato nong’i wadgi ka kihondko omako, kendo ka neno awedho." 
Isaiah13:9 Adier, chieng’ ma Ruoth Nyasaye oseketo biro. En odiechieng’ mirima gi ichwang’ mager, ma obiro kethoe piny, mi lokre thim, kendo otiekie joricho duto." 
Isaiah13:10 Sulue mag polo ok norieny, kendo wang’chieng’ nolokre mudho ka wuok. Due bende ok norieny." 
Isaiah13:11 Abiro kelo masira e piny, kendo abiro kumo joma timbegi mono kaka owinjore, mondo ng’ayi mag josunga orum, kendo athir nyadhi mag joma wang’gi tek." 
Isaiah13:12 Abiro miyo ji doko manok mana kaka dhahabu maberie moloyo migolo Ofir, nok." 
Isaiah13:13 Chieng’no Ruoth Nyasaye nokech malich, mi polo notetni, kendo piny noyiengni mi leng’re." 
Isaiah13:14 Bang’ mano, ng’ato ka ng’ato nodog thurgi ir joodgi, mana ka le ma jodwar lawo, kata ka rombe moke ma onge ng’ama chiko." 
Isaiah13:15 Ji duto moyudi nochwow, mi tho. Adier, ng’ato ka ng’ato momaki, ligangla ema nonegi." 
Isaiah13:16 Nyithindgi bende nochwad piny e wang’gi ka gineno. Utegi noyaki, kendo mondgi bende nomak gi thwon." 
Isaiah13:17 Abiro kelo jo-Media, ma ok dew fedha kata ok gomb dhahabu, mondo omonjgi." 
Isaiah13:18 Jo-Media biro nego yawuotgi gi asere, gin joma ok kech kata mana nyithindo." 
Isaiah13:19 Kamano, kata obedo ni Babulon, en dala maberie moloyo mier mag pinje mamoko duto, kendo ma jo-Babulon sungorego, to Nyasaye nokethe mana kaka noketho Sodom gi Gomora." 
Isaiah13:20 Ng’ato ok nochak odag kuno kuom tienge duto mabiro. Onge ja-Arabu ma nogur hembe kanyo, bende onge jakwath ma nokwa jambgi kuno." 
Isaiah13:21 Kanyo ema ondiegi mae thim nonindie, kendo gik maricho mag bungu nopong’ udi man kuno. Tula mag thim bende nodagie, kendo jochiende notugie." 
Isaiah13:22 Otoche noywagre e udigo. Bwe bende nodagi e udi madongo mabeyo. Yaye! Ndalo Babulon sudo machiegni. Adier, kinde matin ema odongne!" 
Isaiah14:1 Ruoth Nyasaye biro kecho jo-Israel ma nyikwa Jakobo, mi ochak oyiergi, kendo oketgi e pinygi giwegi. Jopinje mamoko nobi mondo odag kodgi, mi gilokre jo-Israell." 
Isaiah14:2 Ogendini nodwuok jo-Israel thurgi, kuma ne giaye, mi jo-Israel nolok ogendnigo wasumbgi e piny Israel, ma Ruoth Nyasaye oseyiero. Jo-Israel nomak joma nomakogi, mi giti joma notiyogi." 
Isaiah14:3 Kamano ka Ruoth Nyasaye ogolo rem gi luoro kod tich misumba malit ma jo-Israel nigo, kendo omiyogi kue" 
Isaiah14:4 to ginigo agoro ni ruodh Babulon ka giwer kama: “Neyeuru kaka giko mar josand ji chalo, kendo kaka sungane otieki." 
Isaiah14:5 Ruoth Nyasaye oseturo ludh loch mar joricho, ma lochgi orumo." 
Isaiah14:6 In ruodh Babulon, ne isando ogendini pile gi gero, kigoyogi, kendo kinyonogi piny gi mirima maonge yueyo." 
Isaiah14:7 Koro piny duto oyueyo, kendo nigi kue, omiyo ji kok gi mor." 
Isaiah14:8 Yiend saipras gi yiend sida mag Lebanon bende mor, kendo giwacho niya, ‘Kaka osetieki, koro onge ng’at ma biro tong’owa.’" 
Isaiah14:9 Piny joma otho otuk duto mondo oromni kidonjo kuno. Adier, joma ne osetho ochiew mondo oromni, koda ka mago, mane osebedo jotelo e piny ka. Ee, jogo duto mane osebedo ruodhi mag pinje a malo e kombegi." 
Isaiah14:10 Giduto giwachoni niya, ‘Kara in bende isedoko mayomyom ka wan! Koro ichal mana kodwa!’" 
Isaiah14:11 Duong’ ma yande in go, kaachiel gi thumbe ma yande iwinjo, osedhi kodi e Piny Joma Otho. Kudni e godhro minindoe, kendo e baranget miumorigo." 
Isaiah14:12 In ratego, sulue mar okinyi marieny matek, mano kaka isepodho ka ia e polo!" 
Isaiah14:13 Ne iparo e chunyi niya, ‘Abiro idho nyaka e polo, mi aket koma mar loch malo moyombo sulue mag Nyasaye. Bende anabedi e got man yo nyandwat kuma nyiseche chokoree." 
Isaiah14:14 Anaidh malo moyombo boche polo, kendo anachal gi Nyasaye Maduong’ Moloyo.’" 
Isaiah14:15 To kata obedo ni iparo kamano, to ibiro boli piny kuma tut mogik e piny joma otho." 
Isaiah14:16 Ji duto maneni biro rangi, kendo gininoni maber ka gipenjore niya, ‘Bende ma e ng’at mane yiengo piny," 
Isaiah14:17 kendo miyo ruodhi tetni, mi lok piny thim, kendo mane ok gony joma osetueyo dog thuchegi?’" 
Isaiah14:18 Ruodhi mag ogendini yueyo e lietegi molos malich," 
Isaiah14:19 to in, osewiti oko, mi irieri piny mak oyiki, mana ka guok motho. Joma oneg e lweny, mowit e bur motimo kite, ema ogangore kuomi." 
Isaiah14:20 Ringri mosenyon pinyno ok bi yiki kaka oseyik ruodhi mamokogo, nikech iseketho pinyi, mi inego jogi iwuon. Nyithindi bende ok nobed ruodhi bang’i.”" 
Isaiah14:21 Ikreuru uneg yawuote nikech richo wuon gi, mondo kik gichak giyud loch mi gikaw piny, kendo gipong’e gi miechgi." 
Isaiah14:22 Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto wacho niya, “Anaked kodgi, mi aneg jo-Babulon duto, koda ka nyithindgi gi nyikwagi, mi nyinggi lal nono." 
Isaiah14:23 Abiro loko Babulon siany, kendo time kama chiewo ema dakie. Anakethe chuth mana ka gima oywe gi yuech.” Mago e weche mar Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto." 
Isaiah14:24 Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto osekuong’ore kawacho niya, “Gima aseparo biro timore mana kaka asechano. Adier, kaka asechano e kaka notimre." 
Isaiah14:25 Ananeg jo-Asuria manie piny, kendo nanyon-gi piny gi tienda e godena. Eka nagol jok mane ruodh Asuria oketo kuom joga, kendo nagony ting’ mapek mane omiyogi." 
Isaiah14:26 Mano e wach ma aseiko ni piny ngima, kendo abiro rieyo bada kuom ogendini duto mondo otimre," 
Isaiah14:27 nimar ka Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto ema ochano gimoro to ere ng’ama ditame, kendo ka en ema orieyo bade to ere ng’ama dimi odwok bade piny?" 
Isaiah14:28 Wach mane Nyasaye onyisa e fweny e higa mane Ahaz othoe ema: 
Isaiah14:29 Yaye un jo Filistia kata obedo ni luth mane goyou osetur kamano, to kik ubed mamor, nimar nyathi thuol nobed mager moloyo wuon, kendo nobed ndemu man gi kwiri marach!" 
Isaiah14:30 Joma odhier to nokwa jambgi e legena, kendo jochan noyue gi kue. To un jo Filistia, nami kech neg nyithindu, kendo jou manok modong’ bende nanegi." 
Isaiah14:31 Un miech Filistia, ywaguru! Un jo-Filistia duto, laluru nono, nimar oganda lweny maduong’ biro, koa yo nyandwat, kochanore maber, kendo ma onge kata ng’at achiel ma digni." 
Isaiah14:32 Koro ere dwoko ma onego mi joote mag ogandano? Dwokgiuru niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye osemiyo Sayun ogurore motegno, kendo kanyo ema joge ma jochan biro tonyie.”" 
Isaiah15:1 Fweny mane Nyasaye onyiso kuom Moab e ma: Ibiro keth Ar gi Kir, miech Moab, otieno achiel, mi piny Moab rum." 
Isaiah15:2 Jo Dibon noring kaidho gode mondo olem e hembko man kuno. Jo-Moab to noywag nikech Nebo gi Medeba osekethi, kendo ng’ato ka ng’ato noliel wiye kod tike." 
Isaiah15:3 Ji nowuoth e yore korwako piende gugru, bende giniywagi ewi udi kendo e akek yore." 
Isaiah15:4 Jo-Heshbon kod jo-Eleale noywagi, mi ywakgi nowinjre nyaka Jahaz. Mano emomiyo thuond Moab marateke luoro nomaki, kendo chir ma gin-go norum." 
Isaiah15:5 Chunya lit nikech masira mabiro mako Moab, nimar jodonggi noring nyaka Zoar, mi chop Eglath-shelishia. Ginidh e yo ma dhi Luhith ka giywak, kendo nowinjgi ka giywak malit e yo madhi Horonaim." 
Isaiah15:6 Sokni mag Nimrim nodwon. Lum bende notwo, kendo oboke duto noner, ma onge gimoro amora mang’ich ma nodong’." 
Isaiah15:7 Mano emomiyo jo-Moab nokaw mwandugi, ma giseyudo kuom tich matek, kod pesagi duto, mi ging’adgo aora Arabim." 
Isaiah15:8 Ywak ma giniywaggo ni mondo okonygi nowinjre nyaka e tong’ piny Moab. Adier, nduru ma ginigo nochop nyaka Eglaim kod Beer-elim." 
Isaiah15:9 Remo nopong’ sokni mag Dimon, to eka masiche madongo pod nomak amaka Dimon! Sibuor nomak ng’ato ang’ata maringo kaa Moab, kod ji manok modong’ e pinyno." 
Isaiah16:1 Ruodhi mag Moab noor chiwo mag rombe Jerusalem, ka gin Sela e thim." 
Isaiah16:2 Ka mond Moab ochopo e kuonde ming’adogo aora Arnon, to ginichal mana nyithi winy morwenyo, ma huyo koni gi koni." 
Isaiah16:3 Giniwach niya, “Konywauru gi tekou duto, kendo tipou mondo ogeng’nwa chieng’ makech’ mondo ochalnwa ka gima en otieno. Panduru jowa ma oseriembi, kendo kik uyie mondo omak joma oringo lweny." 
Isaiah16:4 Weuru mondo jo-Moab ma onge mier oyud kar konyruok kuomu, kendo pandgiuru mondo kik joyeko yudgi. Ka thak mithagogo ji oserumo, kendo jokeyo osetieko tijgi, mi jogo duto mathiro ji oa e piny," 
Isaiah16:5 to kom loch nogur kuom ng’wono mar Nyasaye, kendo jang’ad bura mar adier ma nyakwar Daudi ema nobed e komno. Enobed ng’at madwaro mana adiera, kendo ma timo gik makare mak odeko." 
Isaiah16:6 Wasewinjo humb jo-Moab, kaka gin josunga. Adier, wasewinjo kaka ging’are malich, kendo kaka wechegi opong’ gi miriambo lilo." 
Isaiah16:7 Kuom mano, jo-Moab biro ywak. Adier, gibiro ywak malit. Giniywag olemb mzabibu motwo mag Kir-hareseth ma osekethore chuth," 
Isaiah16:8 kendo giniywag puothe mag Heshbon mowe, kod mzabibu mosener mag Sigma, ma yande divachgi mero jotend ogendini. Ne gigawore nyaka Jazer, mi gitundo e thim kod nam." 
Isaiah16:9 Kuom mano, abiro ywago mzabibu mag Sibma mana kaka aywago Jezer. Un jo-Heshbon kod jo-Eleale, pi wang’a biro lwokou, nimar mahu mar lweny ema biro winjore e puotheu mag olembe monyak maber." 
Isaiah16:10 Mor kod ilo norum chuth e puotheu mabeyo, kendo onge wer ma nower e puotheu mag olembe, bende onge ng’ama nogo koko gi mor. Ok unuchak ubi mzabibu kuonde bicho, kendo mahu mag mor mugoyo e ndalo keyo biro rumo." 
Isaiah16:11 Kuom mano, chunya ywago jo-Moab gi jo-Kirhereseth, mana ka ng’ama goyo thum e liel." 
Isaiah16:12 Kata ka jo-Moab chandore kadhi e hembko manie wi gode mondo otim misengni kendo kata ka gidonjo e hekalu margi mondo gilem, to onge gima giniyudi." 
Isaiah16:13 Mago e weche mane Ruoth Nyasaye owacho kuom jo-Moab chon. 
Isaiah16:14 To koro owacho niya, “Bang’ higni adek, ma ok okadho ngang’, duong’ mar Moab norum, kendo ji manok marichoricho ema notony kuom joge mang’enygo.”" 
Isaiah17:1 Ma e wach mane Nyasaye onyiso e fweny kuom Damaski: Damaski biro kethore chuth, mi ute mukre kendo dhurre pidhe pidhe." 
Isaiah17:2 Ji ok nodag e mier mage nyaka chieng’, kendo miergo nodong’ mana kuonde ma jamni kwayoe mos ma onge gima thaggi." 
Isaiah17:3 Piny Israel ok nochak oobed gi dala mochiel motegno, bende Damaski ok nochak obed gi ruoth, kendo jo-Aram manok modong’ noneg duto, nimar duong’gi nolal nono, mana kaka duong’ mar Israel biro lal. Mago e weche mag Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto." 
Isaiah17:4 E ndalogo, duong’ mar Israel nomich matin, mana ka ng’at ma tuo ochamo dende, kendo chue ma yande ochuego olal nono," 
Isaiah17:5 kata ka tiang’ cham moseka. Adier, piny Israel nojwang’ mana ka puothe cham moseka e Holo Rafaim, kendo ma johulo osehuloe." 
Isaiah17:6 Joge manok kende ema nodong’, mana kaka olembe manok kende ema dong’ e yath kosepon. Olembe ariyo kata adek nyalo dong’ e bede yath man malo midimidi, to ang’wen kata abich nyalo dong’ e bedene moyarore gi piny. Mago e weche Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo gik Moko Duto." 
Isaiah17:7 E ndalogo, ji nopar Nyasaye ma jachuechgi, kendo ginigen kuom Ng’ama Ler mar Israel." 
Isaiah17:8 Ok ginichak giket genogi kuom kende-mag-liswa, ma lwetgi ema oloso, kata kuom gimoro amora ma gin giwegi ema giseloso, bed ni en sirni milamo, kata kende mag ubani." 
Isaiah17:9 E ndalogo miechu mochiel motegno nodong’ nono, mi kethre, mana ka miech jo-Hivi gi jo-Amor mane giweyo ka jo-Israel obiro." 
Isaiah17:10 Mano notimre nimar wiu ne owil gi Nyasaye mane oresou. Adier, ne ok uparo lwanda ma en kar konyruoku. Emomiyo, kata ka upidho cham mabeyo mondo umigo nyisecheu manono duong’," 
Isaiah17:11 bende kata obedo ni umiyo chamgo twi mana chieng’ ma upidhogieno, mi kinyne githiew, to unuka mana chandruok kod rem ma ok rum!" 
Isaiah17:12 Winjuru! Mano e koko mar ogendini mang’eny, gimor mana ka nam ma wuo! Chikuru itu! Donge uwinjo kaka ogendini mwomore, gimwomore mana ka apaka madongo!" 
Isaiah17:13 To Nyasaye biro kwerogi, mi giring gidhi mabor, mana ka mihudhi mipiedho e gode, kendo ma yamo tero, kata ka buru ma kalausi keyo." 
Isaiah17:14 Kihondko nomak jo-Israel godhiambo, gokinyi to wasikgi norum pep! Mano e pok mowinjore gi joma yakowa." 
Isaiah18:1 Nitie piny moro loka aora mag Ethiopia, ma yiedhi ng’enyie." 
Isaiah18:2 Pinyno oro joote kaluwo aora Nael gi yiedhi mohondhi gi odundu. Un joote ma jong’wech, doguru ir jou, gin ji maboyo kendo ma dendgi poth, ma ji oluoro kuonde duto. Gin ji marateke, maloyo ogendini mamoko, kendo ma pinygi aore opogo opogo." 
Isaiah18:3 Un ji duto modak e piny, unune koting’ bandeche lweny malo ewi gode, kendo unuwinj ka tung’ ywak." 
Isaiah18:4 To Ruoth Nyasaye nosewachona kama: “Abiro rango piny gie polo kar dakna, ka ayueyo mos, mana kaka piny kue mos ka chieng’ liet, kata ka tho omoko gokinyi e ndalo keyo." 
Isaiah18:5 Ananeg joma dwaro monjou ka pok gichopo, mana ka ng’ama ng’ado bede mzabibu gi ratong’ e kinde ma keyo podi, ma mzabibu osemoyo, kendo olembgi chiegni chiek," 
Isaiah18:6 ringregi duto nodong’ ni winy mae gode, mondo ocham e ndako oro, kendo ni ondiegi mondo ocham e ndalo chwiri.”" 
Isaiah18:7 E ndalogo, ogandano noter chiwo e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto. Gin ji maboyo ma dendgi poth, ma ji oluoro kuonde duto. Gin ji marateke, maloyo ogendini mamoko, kendo ma pinygi aore opogo opogo. Ginikel chiwogo e got Sayun, kama ji lamoe Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko duto." 
Isaiah19:1 Wach mane Nyasaye onyiso fweny kuom Misri e ma: Neuru kaka Ruoth Nyasaye biro piyopiyo e boche polo. Obiro e piny Misri, emomiyo nyiseche manono mag Misri kirni." 
Isaiah19:2 Owacho niya, “Abiro thuwo jo-Misri e kindgi giwegi, mi ng’ato ka ng’ato gore gi wadgi. Dala ka dala noked gi dala machielo, kendo gweng’ ka gweng’ bende noked gi wadgi." 
Isaiah19:3 Chuny jo-Misri nonyosre, kendo anaketh rieko ma ging’ado, mi ginipenj nyiseche manono mondo onyisgi wach, bende ginidhi ir ajuoke mopogore opogore." 
Isaiah19:4 To anaket piny Misri e lwet jatelo mager. Adier, ruoth makwiny ema notigi. An Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto ema awacho kamano.”" 
Isaiah19:5 Aora Nael noduon, mi two," 
Isaiah19:6 kendo kuonde ma pi luwo nodum marach. Aore mamoko mag Misri nodwon mi two, kendo odundu gi se bende nowang’." 
Isaiah19:7 Lege duto man but aora Nael, kod gik mopidhi e bathe, duto yamo nolalgo nono." 
Isaiah19:8 Jolupo duto moywagi. Adier, jogo duto malupo gi olowo e aora Nael, kaachiel gi mago machiko tonde kuno, chunygi nonyosre." 
Isaiah19:9 Joma chueyo nengni gi tworo kata gi pamba none marach, nikech gigo ok nochieg maber." 
Isaiah19:10 Ee, jotueng’o mag Misri nodhier nono, kendo jotich duto nobed gi chuny malit." 
Isaiah19:11 Mano kaka ufuwo, un jotelo mag Zoan. Adier, unyalo bedo jong’ad rieko mag Farao mabeyo moloyo. Omiyo ere kaka unyalo wacho ni Farao niya, “Wan yawuot joma riek ma nyikwa ruodhi machon”?" 
Isaiah19:12 Koro in Farao, ere jogi mariek, mondo obi opuonji kendo omi ing’e gima Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto osechano timo e Misri?" 
Isaiah19:13 Jotend Zoan ofuwo adier, kendo jodong Nof paro e chunygi giwegi ni giriek, to ok giriek. Kamano jotend dhout Misri osewito jogi." 
Isaiah19:14 Ruoth Nyasaye osemiyogi chuny mar fuwo. Emomiyo rieko duto ma ging’ado obam, kendo gimiyo jo-Misri kier e gik moko duto ma gitimo, mana kaka ng’at momer kier e ng’okne." 
Isaiah19:15 Jo-Misri ok nodhi nyime maber e gimoro amora ma gitimo, bed ni jatelo ema time, kata ng’ama chal nade ema time." 
Isaiah19:16 E ndalogo jo-Misri nobed manyap ka mon. Ginibed maluor, kendo ginikirni ka Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto orieyo lwete kuomgi mondo okumgi." 
Isaiah19:17 Piny Juda nolokre masira ni jo-Misri. Nyinge kende ka jo-Misri owinjo, to nogogi gi kihondko, nikech gik ma Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto osechano timonigi." 
Isaiah19:18 E ndalogo, noyud ka joma odak e mier abich mag Misri wuoyo gi dho Hibrania, ka kuong’ore ni noluw Ruoth Nyasaye manyalo Gik Moko Duto. Dala achiel kuomgi noluong ni Dala Wang’chieng’." 
Isaiah19:19 E kindego, nobedie kendo-mar-misango mar Ruoth Nyasaye e dier Misri, kod siro maler mochung’ ni Ruoth Nyasaye e tong’ piny Misri." 
Isaiah19:20 Sirono nochung’ kanyo kaka ranyisi, kendo kaka rapar ni Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto e Misri, mondo ka giywakne e kinde ma wasikgi thirogi, to oornigi jawar, mondo okonygi kendo oresgi." 
Isaiah19:21 Ruoth Nyasaye noyangre ni jo-Misri mondo ong’eye, kendo chieng’no giniyie kuome, mi ginitimne misango mar cham kod misengni mamoko. Bende ginikuong’re, mi gichop kuong’ruokgigo." 
Isaiah19:22 Ruoth Nyasaye nogo jo-Misri, to kata kamano, enochanggi mana e kinde ma ogoyogieno. Pile ka giduogo ire, to enowinj kwayogi, mi ochanggi." 
Isaiah19:23 E kindego ndara maduong’ nobedie moa Misri kadhi Asuria. Jo-Asuria nobi Misri, kendo jo-Misri bende nodhi Asuria. Kamano jo-Misri gi jo-Asuria nolam Nyasaye kaachiel." 
Isaiah19:24 E ndalogo, duong’ mar Israel nobed maromre gi duong’ mar Misri kod mar Asuria, kendo pinje adekgo nobed gueth e dier piny." 
Isaiah19:25 Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko duto noguedhgi, ka wacho kama: “Oguedh jo-Misri ma joga, kendo oguedh jo-Asuria ma chuechna, bende oguedh jo-Israel ma gin mwanduna awuon.”" 
Isaiah20:1 Sargon ruodh Asuria ne ooro jatend lweny mare Ashdod, mi okawo dalano bang’ lweny mager." 
Isaiah20:2 E kindeno Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Isaya wuod Amoz niya, “Gony pien gugru manie nungonino, kendo ilony wuocheni.” Isaya notimo kamano, mowuotho duk, gi tiende nono." 
Isaiah20:3 Bang’e Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho niya, “Kaka Isaya osewuotho duk, kendo gi tiende nono, kuom higni adek, kobedo ranyisi misieomogo Misri kod Ethiopia," 
Isaiah20:4 e kaka ruodh Asuria nosemb jo-Misri kod jo-Ethiopia ma osemako duto, joma dongo kaachiel gi nyithindo. Giniwuoth duge gi tiendegi nono, ka siandagi neno, mi Misri noyud wichkuot." 
Isaiah20:5 Ji duto nogore nyang’eng’a ka geno ma gigenogo kuom jo-Ethiopia, kendo sunga ma gisungorego ni jo-Misri dikonygi, nolal nono." 
Isaiah20:6 Chieng’no joma odak a dhonam nowach niya, ‘Neuru gima osetimore ni joma ne wageno kuomgi, mi waringo irgi mondo oreswa kuom ruodh Asuria! To koro wan to dwatony nadi?’ ”" 
Isaiah21:1 Wach mane Nyasaye onyiso e fweny kuom thim man but nam e ma: E fweny malichno nanenoe kalausi mager kaa e thim man yo milambo, ma en piny ma ji oluoro." 
Isaiah21:2 Ne aneno kaka dala mandhogo ji, ondhogi. Ne awinjo ka Nyasaye jiwo jo-Elam kod jo-Media ni mondo odhi omonj Babulon kendo olwore, mondo sungane orum." 
Isaiah21:3 Kane aneno fwenyno ne apuodora ka rem rama malit, mana ka dhako ma muoch kayo. Gik mane aneno kendo awinjo ne ogoya gi kibaji, mi adhier nono." 
Isaiah21:4 Dhoga nomoko kendo natetni ma ok anyal konyo. Ne asegeno ni abiro yueyo godhiambo, ka chieng’ opodho, to kindeno nolokorena mana masira." 
Isaiah21:5 Bende naneno ka chiemo oseket piny, mi ochan kombe, kendo ka jatend jo-Babulon chiemo kendo metho, to e sano ne gipo ka oluonggi mondo gimanre gi gigi mag lweny." 
Isaiah21:6 Ruoth Nyasaye nowachona kama: “Ket jang’icho mondo ohul gik ma oneno. 
Isaiah21:7 Ka oneno geche lweny ka biro, ma farese ariyo ariyo ywayo, kaachiel gi joma oidho kenje kod ngamia, to mondo orang ane maber gima timore.”" 
Isaiah21:8 Bang’e jang’icho nokok niya, “Jaduong’, asebet ka achung’ kar ng’icho odiechieng’ gotieno duto pile," 
Isaiah21:9 to koro echa aneno joidh farese ka biro, kaachiel gi geche lweny ma farese ariyo ariyo ywayo.” Eka nawinjo dwoko niya, “Babulon osepodho! Osepodho, kendo nyisechene manono osemuki moriere piny.”" 
Isaiah21:10 Yaye, jothurwa ma jo-Israel, ma osenyon ka kal minyono kidino, asenyisou gik ma Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto ma Nyasach Israel owachona." 
Isaiah21:11 Ma e wach mane Nyasaye onyiso e fweny kuom Duma: Ne awinjo ng’ato ka luonga Seir. Ne openjo niya, “In jang’icho koro en sa adi mar otieno?”" 
Isaiah21:12 Ne adwoko niya, “Piny chiegni ru, to obiro yuso kendo. To kudwaro penjo kendo, to uduog ira.”" 
Isaiah21:13 Ma e wach mane Nyasaye onyiso e fweny kuom jo-Arabu: Un jo-Dedan ma bworo e thim gi jo-Arabu," 
Isaiah21:14 kod un joma odak Tema, rwakuru joma oseringo, kumiyo chiemoo gi pi," 
Isaiah21:15 nikech giseringo lweny mager, minegoe ji gi ligangla kod asere mabith." 
Isaiah21:16 Ruoth Nyasaye osewacho niya, “Kapok higa achiel orumo ngang’, to duong’ duto mar jo-Arabu ma Kedar notieki." 
Isaiah21:17 Jo asere marateke maggi manok kende ema nodong’, nimar Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel ema owacho kamano.”" 
Isaiah22:1 Wach mane Nyasaye onyiso kuom holo mar Hinom e ma: Un jo-Jerusalem, nyisauru gima omiyo uduto uidho ewi udi." 
Isaiah22:2 Yaye, in dala ma ji goyoe mahu, kendo ma koko opong’o, bende ok ginitho e lweny." 
Isaiah22:3 Jotendu mag lweny duto noringi, kendo nomaki kapok oywayo atungegi. Kata mana jou marateke bende noring kuma bor." 
Isaiah22:4 Mano emomiyo awacho niya, “Weuru ng’iya! Weuru aweya, aywag malit! Kik utem kueyo chunya, nikech jowa oserumo.”" 
Isaiah22:5 Aywak nikech Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto oseketo chieng’ lweny gi koko kod masira. Nomuk ohinga e holo mar fweny, kendo ji nokogi ewi gode, kadwaro kony." 
Isaiah22:6 Jo-Elam biro kawo aserni maggi, kendo jo-Aram biro tueyo farese e gechegi mag lweny. Jo-Kir bende nokaw kuodigi." 
Isaiah22:7 Geche lweny nopong’ holni mau mabeyo, kendo joidh farese noried ni lweny e dhorangeyeu." 
Isaiah22:8 Kamano teko mar Juda norum. Chieng’no unubed gi chir nikech giu mag lweny mokan e ot miluongo ni Od Bungu. 
Isaiah22:9 Bende unurang ohinga mar dala Daudi, mondo ulos kuondene mang’eny momukore. Unuchik pi Soko Mamwalo mondo ochokre," 
Isaiah22:10 kendo unukwan ut Jerusalem, mi unumuk moko mondo ulosgo ohinga obed motegno," 
Isaiah22:11 bende unukuny yawo e kind ohinga ma oko kod ohinga maiye mondo pi Soko Machon odonjie. To kata kamano ok nupar Jachuech gik moko duto, kata dewo Jal mane oseloso gigo duto chon, ok nudew." 
Isaiah22:12 Chieng’no Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto noluongu mondo uywagi kendo udengi, kendo mondo uliel wiu kendo urwak piende gugru." 
Isaiah22:13 To kar timo kamano, to unutug atuga kumetho, kendo kuyang’o dhok gi rombe uchamo, ka uwacho niya, “Wachiemuru kendo wamethuru, nikech kiny wanatho.”" 
Isaiah22:14 To Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto osebirona e fweny, mi awinjo ka okuong’ore ni, richou ok nopwodhi nyaka chop thou. Mano e wach Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto!" 
Isaiah22:15 Bang’e Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto nowachona niya, “Dhiyo ir jakeno ma nyinge Shebna, ma jarit od ruoth, mondo ipenje kama:" 
Isaiah22:16 ‘Ere gima itimo ka, koso ere wadu man ka, momiyo isekunyo bur mibiro yikie kae? Chutho, ang’o momiyo ikunyo bur malo e lwanda, mondo obed liel ma ringri biro yueyoe?" 
Isaiah22:17 Ruoth Nyasaye biro teng’i oko, mana ka ng’ama teng’o nyuogo oko e nanga." 
Isaiah22:18 Eka enong’wasi motueyi matek, kendo oboli e piny malach, mana ka mpira mowit e pap, kendo gecheni mag lweny mayande isungorigo nosik mana kuno.’ ”" 
Isaiah22:19 Ruoth Nyasaye wachoni niya, “Anagoli e tiji, mi adwoki e piny." 
Isaiah22:20 Chieng’no analuong jatichna Eliakim wuod Hilkia mondo okaw kari. 
Isaiah22:21 Anarwake gi lawi mar duong’, mi asidhne kilembani, kendo enobed wuon jo-Jerusalem gi jo-Juda" 
Isaiah22:22 Anamiye rayaw mar od Daudi, kendo gima oyawo, onge ng’ama nolor; bende gima oloro, onge ng’ama noyaw." 
Isaiah22:23 Enobed jatelo ma nomi joodgi yud duong’, kendo anagure matek, mana ka musmal." 
Isaiah22:24 Kuome ema joodgi duto te, koda ka modhier, nobed kayudoe konyruok, mana kaka gik mang’eny mopogore opogore liero kong’aw e musmal." 
Isaiah22:25 To an, Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto, amedo wacho ni, chieng’no musmal mane ogur motegnono nopudh oko. Adier, nong’ade mi olwar, kendo gik moko duto mayande olier kuome nokethi. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano.”" 
Isaiah23:1 Wach mane Nyasaye onyiso e fweny kuom Turo ema: Un yiedhi madongo mag Turo madhi Tarshish, ywaguru, nikech dhowath mugowoe ibiro kethi chuth. Ubiro winjo wachni e yo kurawo e chula Saiprus." 
Isaiah23:2 Un joma odak e dho nam, ling’uru thi. Ywaguru, un joohala mag Sidon," 
Isaiah23:3 ma jotendgi ng’ado nembe mondo oom cham Shihor, kendo ma yudo ohala kuom ting’o mwandu mag ogendini." 
Isaiah23:4 Dala mar Sidon, ma en dhowath mochiel motegno, noywagi ka wiye okuot ka wacho niya, “Tinde ok awinj rem mar muoch. Nyithindo bende ok anywol. Aonge gi nyithindo ma yawuowi kata ma nyiri ma apidho.”" 
Isaiah23:5 Ka jo-Misri owinjo masira ma biro mako Turo, to ginichandre malit mi giwach niya," 
Isaiah23:6 “Yaye, un joma odak e dhonam, ywaguru, kendo idhuru yiedhi udhi Tarshish." 
Isaiah23:7 Yande jou dhi e pinje mamoko maboyo mondo oyud kuonde dak, to koro dalau mane mor, kendo humbe olak chon, odong’ mana gunda!”" 
Isaiah23:8 To en ng’a mosechano kelo masira kuom Turo, dala ma pinje moko nie bwoye, kendo ma joohala mage gin joma ogen e piny ngima?" 
Isaiah23:9 Ruoth Nyasaye manyalo Gik Moko Duto ema osechano kelo masirano mondo otiek sunga mar joma ogen, kendo okel achaya kuom ji duto moluor ahinya e piny." 
Isaiah23:10 Kuom mano, pururu lowo un jo-Tarshish, nikech ohandu biro rumo!" 
Isaiah23:11 Ruoth Nyasaye oserieyo bade e nam mondo olok loch ruodhi, bende osegolo chik mondo omuk miech Kanaan mochiel motegno." 
Isaiah23:12 Osewacho niya, “Yaye, un jo-Sidon, dala mothir, ok unuchak uubed mamor. Kata ka ung’ado nam mudhi Saiprus, to kuno bende ok unuyudie yueyo." 
Isaiah23:13 Ranguru uneye piny jo-Babulon. Jo-Babulon ema nolok Turo thim ma ondiegi dakie, to jo-Asuria ok ema noloke. Ginidhur lowo mondo ginyon ka giidho ohingane, kendo ginimuk ut ruodhi, mi giketh dalano chuth." 
Isaiah23:14 Ywaguru, un yiedhi madongo madhi Tarshish, nikech dhowath mugowoe ibiro kethi." 
Isaiah23:15 Chakre chieng’no wich nowil gi Turo kuom higni piero abiriyo, maromre gi hik ruoth achiel. To ka higni piero abiriyogo oserumo, to Turo nochandre ka dhako ma jachode miwero niya:" 
Isaiah23:16 In dhako ma jachode mojwang’, kaw thumi iwuothgo e dala koni gi koni, kigwelo puch mamit, kendo kiwero wendi duto, mondo chwo ochak opari.”" 
Isaiah23:17 To bang’ higni piero abiriyo Ruoth Nyasaye nokech Turo, mi resi, to kata kamano, dalano nodog e tije machon, mi oyud ohala kuom tiyo ni ogendini duto mae piny ngima, mana kaka dhako ma jachode yudo ohala kuom dwanyruok gi chwo." 
Isaiah23:18 To ohala moyudo e tijeno nochiw ni Ruoth Nyasaye. Ok nokunggi, bende ok nokan-gi, to nong’iew kodgi chiemo mathoth kod lewni mabeyo ni jodolo mag Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Isaiah24:1 Winjuru! Ruoth Nyasaye biro teng’o piny, mi dong’ nono. Obiro bare, mi oloke ataro, kendo oke joma odakie." 
Isaiah24:2 Chieng’no jadolo nobed maromre gi ji ajia, kendo misumba nobed maromre gi ruodhe. Jahon gik moko bende nobed maromre gi jang’iewo, kendo jahol ji nobed maromre gi ng’ama holo." 
Isaiah24:3 Piny nodong’ nono haa, kendo nokethre chuth, nikech Ruoth Nyasaye ema osewacho kamano." 
Isaiah24:4 Piny notwo kendo gik mantie noner. Adier, piny duto noner kendo notwo, koda ka kuonde moting’ore duto." 
Isaiah24:5 Ji modak e piny osedwanyo piny, nikech gidagi rito chike, mi giketho muma mochwere." 
Isaiah24:6 Mano emomiyo kuong’ biro mwonyo piny, kendo joma odakie none chandruok nikech richogi, bende ginilal nono, mak mana ji manok kende ema nodong’." 
Isaiah24:7 Yiend mzabibu noner, mi divai mobi manyien nobed matin. Joma mor bende chunygi nobed malit." 
Isaiah24:8 Nyiduonge noling’ thi, bende mahu ma joma mor goyo norum, kendo thumbe ok noywagi." 
Isaiah24:9 Onge ng’ama nochak omadh divai ka wer, kendo kong’o nobed marach ni jamath." 
Isaiah24:10 Dala Manono nokethre chuth, kendo ot ka ot nolor mondo joyeko kik donjie." 
Isaiah24:11 Ji noywagre e wang’yore nikech divai nobed maonge. Tuke duto bende norum, kendo mor nobed maonge e piny." 
Isaiah24:12 Dalano nodong’ mana gunda, kendo dhorangach notur matindotindo." 
Isaiah24:13 Mano e gima biro timore e piny ngima, kendo ni oganda ka oganda. Ji manok kende ema nodong’, mana kaka olemo manok ema dong’ e yadh zeituni moyiengi, kata e yadh mzabibu mihulo bang’ keyo." 
Isaiah24:14 Ji biro ywak matek yo podho chieng’, ka gikok niya, “Mano kaka duong’ mar Ruoth Nyasaye ng’ongo!" 
Isaiah24:15 Kuom mano ji mondo omi Ruoth Nyasaye duong’ e pinje man yo wuok chieng’, kendo nying Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel opaki e dhonembe gi chulni man yo podho chieng’.”" 
Isaiah24:16 Wasewinjo ka giwer e tung’ piny ka tung’ piny niya, “Mano kaka Ng’ama Kare ber!” An to chunya pod lit ahinya, nimar ji pod osiko ka timo atima richo, kendo ndhogruok opong’o piny." 
Isaiah24:17 A yaye, un joma odak e piny, masira gi bur kod obadho ema ochomou!" 
Isaiah24:18 Ka uringo masira, to ununyumru e bur, kendo ka utony mak unyumoru e bur, to obadho nomaku, nikech masira biro lwar kuomu koa e polo, kendo piny duto noyiengni marach." 
Isaiah24:19 Piny nobarre, mi gik moko duto lal nono." 
Isaiah24:20 Adier, piny notagre mana ka ng’at momer, kendo noukni mana ka kiru ma yamo yiengo. Nopodhi, to ok nochak ochung’ kendo, nimar richo ji ohinge gi pek." 
Isaiah24:21 Chieng’no Ruoth Nyasaye nong’ad bura, mi malaika mae polo, nokum e polo, kendo ruodhi mae piny, nokum e piny." 
Isaiah24:22 Enochokgi mana ka joma omaki, mi ketgi e od tuech nyaka chop yalgi, kendo kumgi." 
Isaiah24:23 Due norieny matiptip, kendo wang’chieng’ bende noimre, nikech Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto nogur lochne e got Sayun man Jerusalem, mi duong’ne maler norieny e nyim jodonge." 
Isaiah25:1 A Ruoth Nyasaye, in e Nyasacha! Anating’ nyingi malo, kendo anapaki, nikech honni mane ichano chon, isetimo gi adiera." 
Isaiah25:2 Iseketho mier, mi udi momukore odhurore pidhe pidhe. Adier, iseloko mier mochiel motegno pidhe mag kite, mi udi mabeyo mag jopinje mamoko osekethore chuth, kendo ok nochak oger." 
Isaiah25:3 Mano emomiyo oganda makwiny miyi luor. Adier, mier mag ogendini mager oluori," 
Isaiah25:4 nikech isebedo kar konyruok ni ng’at modhier machandore. Ee, in e kar bwogo koth, kendo e tipo ma geng’o chieng’ e ndalo ma joma ger monjowa ka koth machwe maduong’ e ndalo chiri," 
Isaiah25:5 kata ka chieng’ marieny mager e ndalo oro. In ema itieko koko mar wasikwa mager, mana kaka boche polo geng’o liet mar chieng’, mi wer ma wasikwago chayowago lal nono." 
Isaiah25:6 Kamano Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto biro loso sawo mamit ni ji duto ewi got Sayun. Enobed sawo mar divai mochiek chuth, kendo modhing’ maber, kod chiemo mamit motimo mo." 
Isaiah25:7 Ewi godni ema Ruoth Nyasaye nogolie kanik moumo wang’ ogendini duto. 
Isaiah25:8 Enotiek tho nyaka chieng’. Bang’e enoywe pi wang’ ng’ato ka ng’ato, kendo nogol achaye man kuom joge e piny duto. Ruoth Nyasaye ema owacho kamano." 
Isaiah25:9 Chieng’no ji nowach niya, “Ma e Nyasachwa, ma waserito mondo oreswa. Adier, ma e Ruoth Nyasachwa ma wageno kuome, omiyo wabeduru mamor kendo moil, nikech osewarowa," 
Isaiah25:10 kendo nikech lwete nobed ewi godni mondo okonywa. Jo-Moab to nonyon gi tiende, mana kaka dhok nyono tiang’ e kul." 
Isaiah25:11 Kanyo ema jo-Moab norieye bedegi mana kaka ng’ama goyo abal rieyo bedene ka kwang’, to Nyasaye notiek sungagi, kaachiel gi gimoro amora ma lwetgi oseloso." 
Isaiah25:12 Ruoth Nyasaye nomuk ohinga margi marabora ma gigeng’orego, mi ruombre piny e buru.”" 
Isaiah26:1 Wer ma nower e piny Juda chieng’no e ma: “Wan gi dala mochiel motegno, kendo resruok ma Ruoth Nyasaye osekelonwa ema obedo ohinga mwageng’orego." 
Isaiah26:2 Yawuru dhorangeye mondo oganda moyie kuom Nyasaye odonji. 
Isaiah26:3 Joma parogi osiko kuomi, A Nyasaye, irito gi kue. Gin gi kue nikech gigeno kuomi." 
Isaiah26:4 Genuru kuom Ruoth Nyasaye nyaka chieng’, nikech Ruoth Nyasaye owuon en lwanda mosiko." 
Isaiah26:5 Joma ne odak e dala moting’ore osedwoko piny, kendo osemuko dalagi, mi orwombore piny e buru," 
Isaiah26:6 mondo joma ithiro kendo ma jochan onyone gi tiendgi.” 
Isaiah26:7 Yor ng’at makare oriere tir, nikech in ema iloso ni joma long’o yo ma onego giluw." 
Isaiah26:8 Wan bende waluwo yo mondiki e chikeni, kwageni, A Ruoth Nyasaye. Gima chunywa dwaro moloyo en ni mondo nyingi oyud duong’." 
Isaiah26:9 Otieno duto chunya dwari. Adier, amanyi ka aketo chunya, nikech ka ibiro e piny, ming’ado bura, to eka joma odakie puonjore tim makare." 
Isaiah26:10 Jaricho to kata da dhial manade, to pod ok onyal puonjore tim makare, to omedo ameda timo richo e piny ma adiera nitie, ka ok odew duong’ mar Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Isaiah26:11 A Ruoth Nyasaye iselocho, to joricho ok ne mano. We gineye hera matut miherogo jogi, mondo wigi okuodi, kendo mach ma iseiko ni wasiki otiekgi!" 
Isaiah26:12 A Ruoth Nyasaye, inimiwa kue, nikech gik moko duto ma wasetimo, in ema itimonwa." 
Isaiah26:13 A Ruoth Nyasachwa, ruodhi moko ma ok in osebedo ka ritowa, to koro in kendi ema walami." 
Isaiah26:14 Joma otho ok nochak obed mangima. Adier, joma osenindo e liel ok nochak ochier. Mano emomiyo isekumo ruodhigo mi itieko, kendo imiyo wich owil kodgi." 
Isaiah26:15 A Ruoth Nyasaye, inimed ogandawa. Ee, inimede kiyaro tong’ pinywa mondo nyingi oyud duong’." 
Isaiah26:16 Ne wamanyi, A Ruoth Nyasaye, ka wan e chandruok, kendo kane ikumowa, to ne walami mos." 
Isaiah26:17 Kaka dhako winjo rem kendo ywak ka muoch kayo, e kaka wachalo ka wan e nyimi, A Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Isaiah26:18 Wasebedo kwanegore gi tich, to onge gima wasetimo, mana ka dhako mosebedo ka muoch kayo, to onywolo mana yamo! Kata obedo ni wasechandore kamano, to ok wasekelo resruok ni pinywa." 
Isaiah26:19 Jogi duto mosetho nochak obed mangima. Adier, ringregi nochier kendo. Joma onindo e lowo biro chier, mi kog gi mor, nimar tekoni biro lor kuomgi mana ka tho ma moko e lum, mi piny nogol joma notho chon oko." 
Isaiah26:20 Un joga, donjuru e uteu, mi ulor dhoudi, mondo upond matin mi mirimb Ruoth Nyasaye kadhi," 
Isaiah26:21 nikech Ruoth Nyasaye biro biro, koa kar dakne, mondo okum joma odak e piny nikech richogi. Piny noel remo mosechuer kuome, kendo ok nopand joma osenegi." 
Isaiah27:1 Chieng’no Ruoth Nyasaye nokaw liganglane mabith kendo motegno, mi oneggo Levayathan, kod thuol malich kendo manudore, modak e nam." 
Isaiah27:2 Chieng’no wer ma nower ema: “Israel e puodho maber mar mzabibu. 
Isaiah27:3 To an Ruoth Nyasaye e jaritne, kendo akelone pi pile mondo kik pot mzabibu lwar. Arite gotienoo kendo godiechieng’," 
Isaiah27:4 to ok onyagna olemo ma anyalo losogo divai. Omiyo ochalo mana gi puodho ma kudho gi pedo ema opong’o. Kuom mano, abiro monje, mi awang’e pep," 
Isaiah27:5 mak mana ka jo-Israel oringo kuoma kaka kar konyruokgi, mi gitimo koda winjruok. Adier, onego gitim koda winjruok." 
Isaiah27:6 E ndalo mabiro, nyikwa Jakobo nogurre motegno. Ee, jo-Israel nobed ka yath ma dongo kendo thiewo nyaka nyag olemo, mi pong’ piny ngima.”" 
Isaiah27:7 To bende Nyasaye osekumo jo-Israel matek, kaka nokumo joma nosesandogi? Koso bende osenego jo-Israel matek, kaka nonego wasigu mane onegogi?" 
Isaiah27:8 Ooyo, ose mana riembogi gidhi e piny mabor, ka gima yamo mager moa yo wuok chieng’ ema oterogi." 
Isaiah27:9 Kapok richo mag jo-Israel opwodhi, to nyaka giketh kendegi mag liswa, mi gireg kitegi olokre buru, kendo ging’ad oko yien gi sirni duto milamo." 
Isaiah27:10 To dala ma ochiel motegno nodong’ gunda. Enobed dala mojwang’ maonge ng’ama odakie, kendo nolokre thim. Jamni nokwa kuno, ka chamo bede yien." 
Isaiah27:11 Bende mon mamoto nojak bede yien motwo, ochwakgo mach. Mano notimre nikech ogandano onge gi rieko. Omiyo, Jachuechgi ok nokechgi. Adier, Ng’ama nochueyogi ok nong’wonnigi." 
Isaiah27:12 Chieng’no Ruoth Nyasaye nochoku un jo-Israel, achiel achiel, chakre aora Yufrate nyaka aora Nael, ka gima ookwanyo olemb yath moyiengi." 
Isaiah27:13 Chieng’no tung’ maduong’ noywagi, mi joma olal e piny Asuria nobi, kaachiel gi joma noter Misri e tuech, mi ginilam Ruoth Nyasaye e got maler man Jerusalem." 
Isaiah28:1 Yaye, inine malit, in dala Samaria manie holo momew, ma jomer mag Israel sungorego ka osimbgi. Duong’ni biro rumo mana ka maua moner, in dala ma joge lwokore gi kong’o!" 
Isaiah28:2 Winjuru! Ruoth Nyasaye biro kelo ng’at maratego moseyiero mondo oketh pinyu. Obiro biro mana ka yamb koth makelo pe, maketho piny, kata mana ka pi ohula mabubni kaywoyo gik moko." 
Isaiah28:3 Bang’e osimbo ma jomer mag Israel sungoregono nonyon piny," 
Isaiah28:4 mi duong’ne biro rumo ka maua moner, kata ka olemo mokwongo chiek, ma ng’ato ang’ata moneno, to pono chamo ka rikni." 
Isaiah28:5 Chieng’no Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto ema nobed osimbo maber mar duong’ ni joge manok modong’. 
Isaiah28:6 Enomi jong’ad bura mau bed gi chuny mar ng’ado bura gi adiera, kendo enomi jolwenju ma kedo matek gi wasigu e dhorangeyeu bed gi chir mathoth." 
Isaiah28:7 To koro jotend Jerusalem duto bende gin jomer. Jodolo mage kod jonabine mer kendo kwang’ nikech kong’o makech, omiyo gitimo gik mofuwo. Gitagore ataga ka gineno fweny, kata ka ging’ado bura." 
Isaiah28:8 Ging’ok e mesni, kendo kuonde duto ma gintie onywandore." 
Isaiah28:9 Giwacho niya, “Koro ere ng’ama Janabi paro ni biro puonjo? Koso ere joma biro winjo tiend gima opuonjo? Mit koparo ni wan nyithindo ma tinde eka oweyo dhoth?" 
Isaiah28:10 Onwoyonwa gik mowacho ndalo mang’eny, kodhum gi weche ma onge tiendgi.”" 
Isaiah28:11 To chutho, kamano e kaka Ruoth Nyasaye biro loso kodgi, kowuoyo gi dhok moro nono ma ok ginyal winjo." 
Isaiah28:12 Chon Nyasaye nowachonigi niya, “Achiwonu yueyo maradier, kendo joma ool mondo oyue. Adier, mano e yueyo.” To ne gidagi winjo." 
Isaiah28:13 Mano omiyo Ruoth Nyasaye nochak owuo kodgi kadhum gi weche ma onge tiendgi! To ka giwinjo wechego, to ginichwanyre, mi gipodh kendo gitur. Ginimok e obadho, mi makgi, kendo tergi e tuech." 
Isaiah28:14 Kuom mano, chikuru itu, un josunga, ma jotend jo-Jerusalem." 
Isaiah28:15 Uwacho niya, “Wasetimo winjruok gi tho. Adier, wasetimo singruok gi Piny Joma Otho. Omiyo ka ohula miwachono biro, to ok obi ywoyowa, nikech waseloso miriambo ka kar konyruokwa, kendo wuondruok e okumba ma wageng’orego.”" 
Isaiah28:16 To koro Ruoth Nyasaye wacho kama: “Winjuru! Abiro keto kidi mar mise e Sayun, mondikie ni, ‘Ng’ama oyie ok norikni.’ En kidi motegno, moyier, ma nengone tek, momako kor ot." 
Isaiah28:17 Anami adiera bed rapim, kendo anami tim makare bed tol mipimogo ot, kigero. To kodh pe biro ywero miriambo ma ugeng’orugo. Kendo pi ohula biro mwomo kar konyruoku," 
Isaiah28:18 mi winjruok mane utimo gi tho, kethre, kendo singruok mane utimo gi Piny Joma Otho, rum. Pi mabubni noywo gik moko, mi unuchal gi piny ma ohula omwomo!" 
Isaiah28:19 Pile pile ohula nobi, mi yweru. Adier, noywou okinyi kokinyi, kendo odiechieng’ gotieno. Kuwinjo wachni, to unukirni," 
Isaiah28:20 nimar unubed e thagruok mana ka ng’ama onindo e kitanda machiek, ma ok nyal riere tir, kendo ma baranget ma oumorego tin, ma ok nyal ume maber.”" 
Isaiah28:21 Ruoth Nyasaye biro a malo gi mirima, kaka ne oa malo e got Perazim, kendo kaka ne otimo e holo mar Gibeon, mondo oti tije magalagala ma osechano timo, ma ji ok par ni onyalo timo." 
Isaiah28:22 Koro weuru sunga, nono to ibiro tueu gi ratego motegno, nimar asewinjo ka Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto golo chik mondo oketh piny duto." 
Isaiah28:23 Chikuru itu mondo uwinj wechena: 
Isaiah28:24 Uparo ni ng’ato nyalo siko ka puro apura puodho, to ok chwowe kodhi? Koso onyalo buso abusa nyalandra, to ok opidh gimoro?" 
Isaiah28:25 Donge ka osetieko buso, to ochuoyo kothe mopogore opogore, moro ka moro gi kare mowinjore kode?" 
Isaiah28:26 Ong’eyo gima onego otim, nikech Nyasaye ema puonje, kendo nyise yo maber monego otimee." 
Isaiah28:27 Cham duto ok diem machalre. Moko idino gi radin, to moko iteng’o gi luth." 
Isaiah28:28 Ngano en cham mayom, omiyo ok dine matek, nimar dipo ka ong’inyore matindotindo. Chutho, ok dine nyalandra. Kata ka obedo ni iywayo gari kuome mondo tiende gari odine, to ok tim kamanoo aming’a, nimar dipo ka orege mayom." 
Isaiah28:29 Wachno bende oa kuom Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto, ma ng’ado rieko mabeyo, kendo ma tekone duong’!" 
Isaiah29:1 Yaye, inine malit in Jerusalem, dala mane Daudi obworoe! Kuom higa achiel kata higni ariyo sewni mitimo higa ka higa pod timore," 
Isaiah29:2 to bang’e anakelni masira, mi ywagruok gi nduru nobedie, kendo inichal gi kendo-mar-misango ma remo ochuerie!" 
Isaiah29:3 Anabed jasiki, mi agoni ageng’a." 
Isaiah29:4 Nadwoki piny, mi iwuo mana gie lowo, kendo wecheni nowuog mana e buru. Duondi nochal gi dwond ng’at ma jajuogi, ma dwonde pilore ka wuok piny." 
Isaiah29:5 To oganda maduong’ ma kedo kodi nochal gi buru. Adier, oganda magerno nochal gi mihudhi ma yamo tero." 
Isaiah29:6 Piyopiyo nono, Ruoth Nyasaye manyalo Gik Moko Duto biro biro mondo okonyi. Polo nomor, kendo piny noyiengni gi koko maduong’. Kodh yamo bende nobedie, gi kalausi, kod polo ma goyo gik moko." 
Isaiah29:7 Ogendini mang’eny ma goyoni ageng’a kendo kedo kodi, nolal nono mana ka lek mar otieno, yaye Jerusalem." 
Isaiah29:8 Ginichal gi ng’at modenyo ma leko ni chiemo, to chiew, yudo ni onge gima ochamo, kata ka ng’at ma riyo oloyo, ma leko ni modho, to chiew, yudo ni onge pi mosemodho. Mano e kaka ogendini makedo gi got Sayun nochal.”" 
Isaiah29:9 Nenore ni udhier nono. Ara galreuru agala kanyo! Meruru amera, to ok gi divai, bende tagreuru ataga to ok nikech kong’o." 
Isaiah29:10 Nimar Ruoth Nyasaye osemiyo ubedo gi chuny mar nindo matut. Ee, osedino wengeu, (tiende ni jonabiu), kendo oseumo wiyeu, (tiende ni jou ma koronu wach.)" 
Isaiah29:11 Weche duto ma bironu e fweny, chalo gi kitabu modin gi dwogo. Kichiwo kitabuno ni ng’at mong’eyo somo, mi ikwaye ni mondo osomnigo, to obiro dwoki ni ok onyal some nikech odine." 
Isaiah29:12 To kata ka ichiwo kitabuno ni ng’at makia somo, mi iwachone ni mondo osome, to obiro dwoki ni ok ong’eyo somo." 
Isaiah29:13 Bang’ mano, Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho niya, “Jogi lama mana gi dhogi kende, kendo gimiya luor mana gi dhogi ma oko, to chunygi bor koda, kendo luor ma giluorago en mana chik mar dhano, momak gi wich." 
Isaiah29:14 Emomiyo anachak abwog jogi kendo, ka atimo gik malich ma miyo giwuoro. Rieko mar jogi mariek nolal nono, kendo paro matut mar jogi mang’ado rieko, norum.”" 
Isaiah29:15 Yaye, unune malit, un joma temo pando parogi ni Nyasaye, kendo ma, kosetimo timbegi e mudho, to wacho niya, “Ere ng’ama nenowa, koso ere ng’ama ong’eyo gima watimo?”" 
Isaiah29:16 To koro mano kaka uloko weche ataro, mana ka gima jachuech bende romre gi lowo mochueyo. Bende gimoro ma ochue dikwer ni jachuechne ok ochueye? Koso agulu bende diwachi ni ng’ama ochueye onge gi rieko?" 
Isaiah29:17 Bang’ kinde matin, Lebanon biro lokore puodho momew, mi yien mabeyo nodongie." 
Isaiah29:18 Chieng’no, joma itgi odino nowinj wach, ka isomo kitabu, kendo joma wengegi osebedo kotimo mudho mandiwa, nonen." 
Isaiah29:19 Joma muol nochak obed mamor kuom Ruoth Nyasaye. Adier, joma odhierie moloyo nobed mamor kuom Ng’ama Ler mar Israel." 
Isaiah29:20 Joma ger norum, kendo josunga ok nobedie, mi jogo duto ma timbegi mono notieki." 
Isaiah29:21 Gin jogo ma ketho nying ji, kendo ma buto mondo ohiny jong’ad bura, bende gimiyo buch ng’at makare iketho kayiem nono." 
Isaiah29:22 Kuom mano, Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach joka Jakobo, kendo mane owaro Ibrahim wacho kama: “Koro Jakobo ok bi yudo wichkuot, kendo kibaji ok nogoye," 
Isaiah29:23 nikech ka nyikwaye oneno gima asetimo ni ogandagi, to ginimi nyinga duong’. Ee, ginidend Ng’ama Ler mar Jakobo. Adier, ginimi Nyasach Israel luor." 
Isaiah29:24 Joma parogi bayo noyud rieko, kendo joma wigi tek bende nopuonji!”" 
Isaiah30:1 Ruoth Nyasaye wacho niya, “Yaye, unune malit, un nyithinda ma jopiem! Uchano timo gik moko ma ok meka, bende utimo winjruok gi ogendini mamoko, to an ok ahero. Kamano umedo mana richo ewi richo!" 
Isaiah30:2 Urikni kudhi Misri mondo uyud resruok kuom Farao, kendo ugeng’oru e tipo mar Misri, to ok upenja." 
Isaiah30:3 Gen mugenogo kuom Farao ok nokonyu, kendo geng’ruok mugeng’orugo e tipo Misri, nokelnu mana wichkuot," 
Isaiah30:4 nimar kata obedo ni jotelo mage ni Zoan, kendo jootene chopo nyaka Hanes," 
Isaiah30:5 to uduto unuyud wichkuot kuom oganda ma ok nyal konyouno. Adier, ok unuyud konyruok kata ohala moro, to mana wichkuot kod achaye.”" 
Isaiah30:6 Wach mane Nyasaye onyiso e fweny kuom ondiegi manie piny milambo ema: “Jooteugo kadho e piny ma masira gi parruok malit opong’o, kama sibuoche mamon nitie, kendo sibuoche machwo rutoe, bende kama thuonde mager mahuyo odakie. Kenje gi ngamia oting’o mwandugi, ka gitero ni oganda ma ok nyal konyou." 
Isaiah30:7 Adier, kata ka gitero mwandugi ni jo-Misri kamano, to kony ma ubiro yudo kuomgi romre gi nono. Mano ema omiyo achako Misri ni Rahab, ondiek ma budho abudha." 
Isaiah30:8 Koro dhiyo mondo indik wachno kamoro. Ee, ndike mondo obed ranyisi e ndalo mabiro nyaka chieng’." 
Isaiah30:9 Jogo gin joma jopiem. Gin yawuowi ma jomriambo, ma odagi winjo chike ma Ruoth Nyasaye ogolo." 
Isaiah30:10 Giwacho ni jokor wach niya, ‘Kik une fweny.’ Jonabi to giwachonigi ni, ‘Kik ukor wach moro mar adiera, to kornwauru mana weche mamit mag wuondruok." 
Isaiah30:11 Baruru uwe yo moriere tir, mondo kik wachak wawinj wach Ng’ama Ler mar Israel.’ ”" 
Isaiah30:12 To Ng’ama Ler mar Israel wacho kama, “Ok usewinjo wachnano, bende usando ji, kendo utimo timbe mag miganga, kuparo ni gik ma kamago nyalo konyou," 
Isaiah30:13 omiyo richouno biro chalonu okak manie ohinga mabor, ma miyo ohinga barore tiarara, kendo podho ka diemo wang’," 
Isaiah30:14 mi ng’inyre matindotindo mana ka agulu motore, ma ok nyal yud take mikwanyogo mach, kata pate mitwomogo pi.”" 
Isaiah30:15 Ruoth Nyasaye ma Ng’ama Ler mar Israel owacho niya, “Kuduogo ira, mi ubedo gi kue, to unuyud resruok. Bende kudemboru, kendo uketo genou kuoma, to un ubed gi teko.” To kata kamano ne udagi," 
Isaiah30:16 mi uwacho niya, “Ooyo, wabiro idho farese mondo waringi.” To mano ber, ringuru aringa, uyombi, kunyalo! To kata obedo ni uringo matek manade, to wasiku biro ringo matek mi juku." 
Isaiah30:17 Ng’at achiel noriemb jou alufu achiel, kendo ji abich kobwogou to unuring uduto mi uke nono, mana ka yien mokelore okelore ewi got." 
Isaiah30:18 To kata kamano, Ruoth Nyasaye pod dwaro ng’wononu, kendo ogombo ahinya mondo okechu, nimar en Nyasaye ma jaadiera. Mano kaka jogo duto mogeno kuome gin johawi!" 
Isaiah30:19 Un jo-Sayun modak Jerusalem, ok unuchak uywagi. Ruoth Nyasaye biro ng’wononu, kendo obiro dwokou ka owinjo ywaku." 
Isaiah30:20 Kata obedo ni omiyo chiembu gi piu doko matin, mi uthagru, to en, ma en japuonju, ok nochak opondnu kendo, to unubed kunene gi wang’u pile." 
Isaiah30:21 To kubaro koracham kata korachwich, mi uweyo yo, to unuwinj gi itu uwegi ka dwol moro wachonu gi kang’eu niya, “Ma e yo, luweuru.”" 
Isaiah30:22 Bang’e unukaw nyisecheu manono mubawo gi fedha kata gi dhahabu, mi uwiti ka ukwanogi ka gik ma ok ler, kaka tutu kata chieth." 
Isaiah30:23 Ruoth Nyasaye nokel koth ni chambu, kendo nomi puotheu chieg cham mogundho. Jambu bende nokwa e lege madongodongo," 
Isaiah30:24 kendo ruethu kod kenjeu mupurogo nocham mana ngano mopidhi maber, kendo mokirie kado." 
Isaiah30:25 Chieng’ nek maduong’no, ma ikethoe kuonde mochiel motegno, aore kod sokni mamol nobed ewi gode madongo kod pidhe maboyo duto." 
Isaiah30:26 Chieng’no due nobed karieny maler ka wang’chieng’ kendo wang’ chieng’ nobed ka rieny maler nyadibiriyo moloyo kaka orieny pile. Nochal mana gi ler mar ndalo abiriyo moriw e odiechieng’ achiel! En chieng’ ma Ruoth Nyasaye nochomie tiende joge kod bedegi motur, kendo ochangie adhondegi." 
Isaiah30:27 Neuru! Ruoth Nyasaye biro, kaa kuma bor. Mirimbe liel ka mach ma iche dhuolore. Dhoge tetni gi mirima mager, kendo lewe otimo mach makakni, mawang’o gik moko duto." 
Isaiah30:28 Muche bende chalo gi aora mopong’ ma mwomo genge, kendo imo ng’ato nyaka ng’ute. Obiro piedho ogendini gi rapiedhi mar tho, mi omi giba yo ma gidwaro luwo, mana ka faras michiko gi chuma ma otue e dhoge." 
Isaiah30:29 To un, unuwer wende mor, mana ka wende miwero e otieno mitimoe sawo maler. Unubed mamor e chunyu, mana kaka jolemo bedo mamor e kinde ma jago asili otelonigi ka gidhi e god Ruoth Nyasaye ma en lwanda mar Israel." 
Isaiah30:30 Bang’e Ruoth Nyasaye nomi winj dwonde man gi duong’, kendo nonyis bade motimo mach mawang’o gik moko duto, ka lor gi mirima mager, ka polo mor gi koth maduong’, machue gi pe kod yamo mager." 
Isaiah30:31 Kihondko nomak jo-Asuria ka giwinjo dwond Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo ka ogoyogi gi ludhe." 
Isaiah30:32 Un to nubed mamor kugoyo thumbe, kendo uwer e kinde duto ma ruoth Nyasaye goyogie." 
Isaiah30:33 To mach miwang’oe ringre joma otho ne oseik chon mondo owang’ie Molok, nyasach Asuria. Kendono duong’ ahinya, kendo odhurie yien mogundho. Much Ruoth Nyasaye ma chalo gi mach maliel ema biro moke." 
Isaiah31:1 Mano kaka utimo gima ofuwo, un joma dhi Misri mondo uyud konyruok! Uketo genou kuom farese, kendo kuom geche mag lweny mang’eny ka kuoyo, kod joidh farese gana gi gana, to ok udew Ruoth Nyasaye ma Ng’ama Ler mar Israel, kata kwaye mondo otelnu." 
Isaiah31:2 To Ruoth Nyasaye riek, kendo onyalo kelo masira, bende ok olok parone. Obiro kumo oganda mar joricho, kaachiel gi joma konyogi." 
Isaiah31:3 Jo-Misri gin mana ji, to ok gin Nyasaye, bende faresegi gin mana ring’o to ok gin roho. Omiyo ka Ruoth Nyasaye orieyo bade mondo okumgi, to joma ikonyo kaachiel gi joma konyogi, nopodh piny, mi gilal nono giduto." 
Isaiah31:4 Ruoth Nyasaye osewachona niya, “Kaka sibuor kata nyathi sibuor ng’ur, kachamo chiayo mosemako, to ok odew, bende ok oluor kata ka jokwath mang’eny ochokore ka goyo koko, mondo oriembe, e kaka Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto nolor piny mondo oked ewi got Sayun." 
Isaiah31:5 Bende kaka winyo huyo but ode, ka rito nyithinde, e kaka Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto nobed karito Jerusalem. Ee, norite kendo nokonye, bende norese.”" 
Isaiah31:6 Yaye, jo-Israel, duoguru ir Nyasaye ma useweyo chuth," 
Isaiah31:7 nimar chieng’ ma unuwitie nyisecheu manono mag fedha gi dhahabu, ma useloso gi lwetu motimo richo," 
Isaiah31:8 to noneg jo-Asuria gi ligangla, to ok gi ligangla ma dhano kedogo. Giniring lweny, mi yawuotgi ma jolweny nolok wasumbni." 
Isaiah31:9 Kihondko nomak jodonggi, mi dhier nono, kendo jotendgi mag lweny bende kibaji nogo ma ok nyal ringo. Mano e wach maradier mar Ruoth Nyasaye, ma maye omoki Sayun. Adier, maye ng’ang’ni Jerusalem." 
Isaiah32:1 Winjuru! Ruoth moro biro biro ma norit piny e yo makare, kendo jotende noti gi adiera." 
Isaiah32:2 Adier, ng’at moro nobed ni ji ka kama gibwogoe koth gi yamo, bende noduog chuny ji mana ka aore mamol e piny motwo, kata ka tipo mang’ich mar lwanda maduong’, man e piny maliet ma chieng’ kechie." 
Isaiah32:3 Wenge joma neno onge gima nomon neno, bende it joma winjo nowinj awinja." 
Isaiah32:4 Chuny ng’at mamwomore nobed gi rieko, kendo ng’at ma radwal nolos maber." 
Isaiah32:5 Ng’at ma achach ok nochak oluong ni ng’at malong’o, bende ng’at ma jamganga ok nochak oluong ni ng’ama ogen," 
Isaiah32:6 nimar ng’at ma achach nobed kawuoyo ka ng’ama achach adier, kendo chunye ka paro mana timo timbe manono. Gik motimo duto nobed gik maricho, kendo ka owuoyo to owacho miriambo koda ka kuom Ruoth Nyasaye. Omono joma odenyo chamo gik ma onego gicham, bende otamo joma riyo oloyo modho." 
Isaiah32:7 Ng’at ma achach yorene richo. Ochano gik maricho e chunye, mondo ohiny joma odhier gi weche mag miriambo, kendo otamo jochan e adiera monego giyudi." 
Isaiah32:8 Ng’at ma jaadiera to paro mana gik makare, kendo ok we adiera kata matin." 
Isaiah32:9 Un mon modak e ngima maber, auru malo mondo uwinj gima awacho! Un nyiri ma ok dew gimoro." 
Isaiah32:10 E sani pod onge gima badhou, to bang’ higa achiel gi ndalo moko manok, unubed gi kibaji, nikech cham ok nochiegi, omiyo ok nuyud gima ukayo." 
Isaiah32:11 Un mon ma sani odak e ngima maber, parreuru! Weuru dhil mudhilgono! Lonyreuru duk mondo utue piende gugru e nungou," 
Isaiah32:12 kendo ywaguru, nikech puotheu momew kod mzabipu ma nyago olemo mabeyo biro kethore." 
Isaiah32:13 Kudho kod pedo ema biro gawore e puothe joga, nimar ot ka ot ma yande mor nitie e dalau maduong’, nodong’ nono." 
Isaiah32:14 Ji noring owe udi mabeyo madongodongo duto, mi dala ma yande ji thothie nodong’ nono. Nobed lek maber ni le mae thim, kendo jamni bende nokwae. Kuonde moting’ore mochiel motegno mag siro lweny, kod kuonde maboyo mag rito, nolokre thim kuom ndalo mang’eny," 
Isaiah32:15 nyaka chop roho moa e polo malo lor kuomwa. Eka piny motwo nolokre puothe momew, mi yien mabeyo dongie." 
Isaiah32:16 Bang’e adiera gi tim makare nobedi e piny duto, kuonde momew koda ka kuonde motimo ongoro," 
Isaiah32:17 mi kue nosik nyaka chieng’, kendo luoro ok nobedie." 
Isaiah32:18 Kamano joga nobed e piny mokue, ka gidak gi mor, ma onge koko." 
Isaiah32:19 Tik gode ma otimo bungu nobed mang’ich maber, kendo mier manie pap nobed gi kue." 
Isaiah32:20 Koro mano kaka unubed mamor, ka ng’ato ka ng’ato kuomu chwoyo chambe e bath aora, kendo weyo jambe wuotho awuotha kaka ohero!" 
Isaiah33:1 Yaye unune malit un jo-Asuria! Useketho gik moko, to un pok okethu. Bende usendhogo ji, to un pok ondhogu. To koro ka usetieko ketho gik moko, to un ema ibiro kethu, kendo ka utieko ndhogo ji, to un ema ibiro ndhogu." 
Isaiah33:2 A Ruoth Nyasaye, wan to kechwa nimar wageno kuomi. Yie imiwa teko okinyi kokinyi, kendo reswa e kinde mar masira." 
Isaiah33:3 Ka ji owinjo kiting’o dwondi, mi imor, to giringo, kendo ka ia malo, to ogendini ke." 
Isaiah33:4 Mwandugi noyaki, mi tieki, mana kaka bonyo nang’o lum, mi tieki. Adier, ji nopot kuomgi mana ka det bonyo." 
Isaiah33:5 Ruoth Nyasaye duong’ moloyo, nikech odak e polo malo. Opong’o Sayun gi adiera kod tim makare," 
Isaiah33:6 kendo ubiro yiengoru kuome e ndalou duto. Rieko gi ng’eyo ema kelo resruok, kendo luor ma oluorgo Ruoth Nyasaye e mwandune!" 
Isaiah33:7 Neuru kaka thuondu ywak e wang’yore. Adier, joote museoro mondo odwar kue, ywak malit." 
Isaiah33:8 Yore madongo odong’ nono; jowuoth ok luwgi. Singruok duto okethi, kendo winjruok motim ok dew. Dhano bende ok kwan ka gimoro." 
Isaiah33:9 Piny ywak, kendo dok chien. Lebanon two, kendo kethore. Sharon bende olokore thim, kendo Bashan gi Karmel oyaki modong’ nono." 
Isaiah33:10 Ruoth Nyasaye wacho ni jo-Asuria niya, “Koro abiro a malo mondo anyis duong’na maler." 
Isaiah33:11 Gik ma uchano timo gin gik manono, kendo yamo maliet ka mach biro tiekou pep." 
Isaiah33:12 Ogendini nokethi chuth, mi lokre pidhe mag choka, kendo ginichal gi kudho mobeti, mi owang’ e mach." 
Isaiah33:13 Un mudak kuonde maboyo, winjuru gima asetimo. To un ma un machiegni, yieru ni aratego.”" 
Isaiah33:14 Joricho modak Sayun biro tetni ka luoro omako. Adier, joma ok dew Nyasaye kihondko nomaki, mi ginipenjre niya, “Bende nitie ng’ato kuomwa manyalo dak gi mach mawang’o gik moko duto? Koso en ng’a ma didag gi mach maliel nyaka chieng’?”" 
Isaiah33:15 Ng’atno nyaka bed mana ng’at ma timbene oriere, kendo ma wacho adiera, bende ma ok dwar mwandu miyudo gi malang’, kendo ma riembo asoya kucha, bende ma dino ite ni weche mag chwero remo, kendo ma umo wang’e ni timbe mamono." 
Isaiah33:16 Ng’at ma kamano nodag kama oting’ore mokue. Got mabor motimo lwendni ema nobed kare mar geng’ruok, kendo enobed koyudo chiemo gi pi morome." 
Isaiah33:17 Enone Ruoth gi duong’ne duto, kendo norang piny moyarore malach." 
Isaiah33:18 Chunye nonyise gik machon, kendo nopar kaka ne oluoro wasigu mane ochung’ e tok ohinga mar dalagi, ka chano kaka dimwom ohingano, mi yakgi." 
Isaiah33:19 Ok enochak one oganda mager ma dhogi tek winjo, kendo mawuoyo kabodho wach ma ok winjreno." 
Isaiah33:20 Ka orango Sayun, dala mwatimoe sewni, to enone ni en dala man gi kue. Ee, kong’iyo Jerusalem, to enone ni ochalo gi hema ma ok tungni, ma loyene ogur motegno kendo ma kata tonde achiel ok ochot." 
Isaiah33:21 Kanyo ema duong’ maler mar Ruoth Nyasaye nonenree Enochalnwa aora malach man gi bade mang’eny. Onge yiedhi ma nokwang’ kanyo, kikiewo, kata ma noringie gi tanga. Tondegi ombekni ma ok nyal rido murungot, kata ywayo tanga," 
Isaiah33:22 nimar Ruoth Nyasaye en jang’adnwa bura. En e ruodhwa, ma ketonwa chik, kendo en ema noreswa." 
Isaiah33:23 Bang’e ng’ama muofu kod ng’ama rang’ol bende noyud pok kuom gik moyaki. 
Isaiah33:24 Onge ng’at ma odak kuno ma nowach ni otuo, kendo richo mag ji man kuno nong’wonnigi." 
Isaiah34:1 Un ugendini mae piny, biuru ka mondo uchik itu. Piny ngima kod gimoro amora manie iye, mondo owinj wachna," 
Isaiah34:2 nimar Ruoth Nyasaye nigi mirima mager kod ogendini duto, kod jogi mag lweny. Kuom mano osekuong’ogi ni mondo oneggi, mi tiekgi chuth." 
Isaiah34:3 Jogi monegi nowe oko mak oyiki, mi ringregi pong’ piny gi mifuolu, kendo rembgi nobubni e gode." 
Isaiah34:4 E ndalono gik moko duto manie polo malo noleny, mi lal nono. Polo bende nodol mana ka kalatas, kendo sulue nolwar piny mana ka oboke moner, kata ka olemo mochiek." 
Isaiah34:5 To ka ligangla mar Ruoth Nyasaye osetieko tichne e polo, to obiro lwar kuom jo-Edom, ma en oganda ma osekuong’o mondo otieki." 
Isaiah34:6 Ligangla mar Ruoth Nyasaye notim remo lilo, kendo boche nogawre kuome, mana ka gima gin boche mag nyiroke imbe, kod remb rombe gi diek mitimogo misango, nimar Ruoth Nyasaye biro timo misango Bozra, dala Edom. Ee, obiro neko malich e piny Edom." 
Isaiah34:7 To kar nego jope, to ruodhi ema obiro nego, kendo kar nego ruedhi, to oganda mar joma rateke ema nonegi, mi remo pong’ piny, kendo piny leny nikech boche," 
Isaiah34:8 nimar Ruoth Nyasaye oseketo chieng’ ma obiro chuloe kuor. Adier, oseketo higa ma nokumie jo-Edom kuom gima ne gitimo ni Sayun." 
Isaiah34:9 Aore mag Edom nolokre lam, kendo lowo man kuno nolokre mach lilo," 
Isaiah34:10 mi pinyno lokre lam maliel otieno gi odiechieng’, ma ok nyal negi, bende iro nodumie mochwere. Enodong’ thim kuom higni gi higni, kendo onge ng’ama nochak oluw kuno." 
Isaiah34:11 Nobed kama otenga gi chiew gi tula kod agak ema odakie. Ruoth Nyasaye nopim pinyno, mi oyud ni oromo gi ketho, omiyo enodong’ nono." 
Isaiah34:12 Onge ruoth ma noti pinyno, bende jodonge norum pep." 
Isaiah34:13 Kudho ema noyugno e udi madongodongo man kuno, kendo aila kod pedo nogawre e mier mage mochiel gi ohinga. Enobed piny marach ma ondiegi ema nitie, kendo ma tula ema odakie." 
Isaiah34:14 Le mae thim kod ondiegi norom kuno, kendo kanyo ema jochiende noyudree. Gik malich mag otieno nodag kanyo, mi yud kar yueyo." 
Isaiah34:15 Aywer noger ode kuno, mi nywolie tonge, kendo toye nyithindo. Noumgi gi buombe mondo kik gimoro chamgi. Otenga bende nochokre kuno, moro ka moro gi wadgi." 
Isaiah34:16 Somuru kitap Ruoth Nyasaye, to ubiro yudo ni onge achiel kuom gigo ma nobed maonge, kendo roho mare ema nochokgi." 
Isaiah34:17 En ema oseyiero ni moro ka moro kare, kendo osepogonigi piny, kopimo gi tol. Pinyno nobed margi nyaka chieng’, kendo ginidagie tieng’ gi tieng’." 
Isaiah35:1 Thimbe kod pinje motwo nobed mamor, kendo maupe mabeyo nothiew kuondego." 
Isaiah35:2 Ee, ginithiew mang’eny, kendo piny nopong’ gi wende mor. Kuonde ma yande otwo nobed mang’ich mana ka gode mag Lebanon, kata ka lege mabeyo mag Sharon kod mag got Karmel, kendo jo-Israel none duong’ maler mar Ruoth Nyasachgi." 
Isaiah35:3 Teguru bede mayomyom, kendo rieuru chong monyosore," 
Isaiah35:4 bende nyisuru chuny mool niya, “Beduru motegno, kendo kik ubed maluor. Neuru! Nyasachu biro mondo ochul kuor. Ee, obiro mondo okum wasiku kaka owinjore, kendo oresu.”" 
Isaiah35:5 Bang’e muofni nonen, kendo joma itgi odino nowinj wach." 
Isaiah35:6 Rang’onde bende nochikre ka nyidiek, kendo momni nower gi mor, nimar pi nobubni e piny motwo, kendo aore nobed ka molie."
