Isaiah35:7 Lop kuoyo ma yande chieng’ oowo gi liet nolokre dago mar pi, kendo sokni nowuog e lowo motwo, mi kuonde ma yande ondiegi ema odakie bed kuonde ma lum gi odundu gi togo dongoe." 
Isaiah35:8 Wang’yo maduong’ nobed e thimno, kendo noluonge ni, ‘Wang’yo Maler’ Joma ok ler gi joma ofuwo ok nowuothie." 
Isaiah35:9 Sibuoche ok nodhi kuno, kendo onge kata mana ondiek mager ma nosud machiegni kode. To yorno ema joma Ruoth Nyasaye osewaro nowuothie." 
Isaiah35:10 Adier, joma Ruoth Nyasaye osereso noluw yorno, ka duogo dala. Ginidonj Sayun ka gikok gi mor kendo ka giil, to kuyo gi parruok nolal nono." 
Isaiah36:1 E higa mar apar gang’wen, mar loch Hezekia, Senakerib ruodh Asuria nomonjo miech Juda mochiel motegno duto, mokawo." 
Isaiah36:2 Ne ooro Rabshake kod oganda lweny mang’ongo ka en Lakish mondo odhi Jerusalem ir ruoth Hezekia. Kane Rabshake ochopo kuno, ne ochung’ but fereji magolo pi e yawo mamalo man yo mochiko puodho miluongo ni Puoth Jalwok Lewni." 
Isaiah36:3 Eliakim wuod Hilkia ma jaduong’ od ruoth, gi Shebna jagoro, kod Joa wuod Asa jachan weche mag piny ne jowuok modhi ire kanyo." 
Isaiah36:4 Eka Rabshake nowachonigi niya, “Nyisuru Hezekia ni ruoth maduong’ ma ruodh Asuria owacho kama: ‘Ere gima omiyo idhialori kamano?" 
Isaiah36:5 In iparo ni weche awecha nyalo lokore rieko kod teko miloyogo lweny? En ng’a ma igeno ni biro konyi piem koda? 
Isaiah36:6 Ang’eyo ni idhialori nikech jo-Misri, to nyaka ing’e ni jo-Misri chalo gi odundu mobarore, ma ka ng’ato oyiengoree, to pilore kendo chwowo lwete. Mano e kaka Farao, ruodh Misri, chalo, ni jogo duto mogeno kuome!’" 
Isaiah36:7 To kuwachona ni ugeno kuom Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu, to donge en e Nyasaye ma Hezekia oseketho hembkone gi kuonde mitimonee misengni, kochiko jo-Juda gi jo-Jerusalem ni nyaka lem mana e nyim kendo-mar-misango man Jerusalem kende?" 
Isaiah36:8 “Koro in Hezekia, singri ni ruodh Asuria ma atiyone! Ayie miyi farese alufu ariyo kapo nono ni inyalo yudo joma idhogi!" 
Isaiah36:9 Ka jo-Misri ema igeno ni biro konyi gi geche kod joidh farese, to ere kaka iparo ni dilo kata mana achiel matinie moloyo kuom jotend lweny mag ruodha?" 
Isaiah36:10 Koso iparo ni asebiro mana ni mondo amonj amonja Jerusalem, akethi, ka ok Ruoth Nyasaye ema oyiena? Ng’eni Ruoth Nyasaye ema nowachona ni mondo abi amonj pinyni akethi.”" 
Isaiah36:11 Eka Eliakim gi Shebna kod Joa nowacho ni Rabshake niya, “Wasayi, yie iwuo kodwa gi dho Aram, nikech en dhok mwang’eyo, to we wuoyo kodwa gi dho Hibrania kae, nimar joma ni ewi ohinga nyalo winjowa.”" 
Isaiah36:12 To Rabshake ne odwokogi, ka penjogi niya, “Uparo ni un kod ruodhu kende ema ne ruodha oora iru mondo awachnu wechegi? Ooyo, oora ir joma nie wi ohinga, ma ochunore ni nyaka cham chiethgi, kendo madh lachgi giwegi, mana kaka un bende unutim!”" 
Isaiah36:13 Bang’ mano nochung’ mokok gi dwol maduong’ gi dho Hibrania niya, “Winjuru wach ruoth maduong’ ma ruodh Asuria!" 
Isaiah36:14 Owacho ni kik uyie Hezekia wuondu, nikech ok onyal resou." 
Isaiah36:15 Bende kik uwe ohou ni mondo ugen kuom Ruoth Nyasaye, kowachonu ni, adier Ruoth Nyasaye ema noresu, kendo ni ruodh Asuria ok nokaw dala maduong’ni." 
Isaiah36:16 Kik uwinj wach Hezekia, nimar ruodh Asuria owacho niya, ‘Winjreuru koda, mondo ubi ira, mi ng’ato ka ng’ato kuomu nocham olemb mzabipe kod ng’ope, bende nomodh pi e sokone owuon," 
Isaiah36:17 nyaka chop abi mi agolu kendo ateru e piny machal gi pinyuni. En piny ma cham gi mzabibu chiekie maber, kendo ma makati gi divai ng’enyie." 
Isaiah36:18 Tang’uru, nono to Hezekia owitou, kowuondou ni Ruoth Nyasaye biro konyou. Bende nitie nyasach piny moro mosereso pinye e lwet ruodh Asuria?" 
Isaiah36:19 Nyiseche mag Hamath gi Arpad ni kanye? Koso ere nyiseche mag Sefarvaim? Bende ne gireso Samaria e lweta? 
Isaiah36:20 Kuom nyiseche duto mag pinjego, ere moro mosereso pinye e lweta, ma dimi upar ni Ruoth Nyasaye nyalo reso Jerusalem e lweta?’ ”" 
Isaiah36:21 To ji noling’ thi, ma onge ng’at modwoke wach kata achiel, nikech ruoth Hezekia nosegolo chik ni kik dwoke." 
Isaiah36:22 Eliakim wuod Hilkia ma jaduong’ od ruoth, gi Shebna jagoro kod Joa wuod Asaf ma jachan weche mag piny ne jobiro ir Hezekia, ka joyiecho lepgi, mi ginyise gima ne Rabshake owacho." 
Isaiah37:1 Kane ruoth Hezekia owinjo wechego, noyiecho lepe, mi orwako pien gugru, kendo odhi e Od Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Isaiah37:2 Nooro Eliakim ma jaduong’ ode, gi Shebna ma jagoro kod jodolo madongo ir janabi Isaya wuod Amoz ka jorwako piende gugru," 
Isaiah37:3 mondo odhi owachne niya, “Hezekia owacho ni kawuono en chieng’ dhier gi kum kod wichkuot. Wachalo gi dhako ma muoch kayo, to onge muya mocholgo nyathi." 
Isaiah37:4 Nyalo bet ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachi osewinjo weche Rabshake, ma ruodh Asuria oseoro, mondo oyany Nyasaye Mangima. Omiyo koro obiro kumo Rabshake nikech weche ma osewinjo ka Rabshake wachogo. Kuom mano, in Isaya, lem ni jowa mapod odong’.”" 
Isaiah37:5 Kamano, kane jodong ruoth Hezekia ochopo ir Isaya, mowachone wechego," 
Isaiah37:6 ne odwokogi niya, “Dhiuru uwach ni ruodhu ni Ruoth Nyasaye owacho kama: ‘Kik iluor weche ma isewinjo ka ruodh Asuria yanyago" 
Isaiah37:7 nikech abiro miye chuny man gi kibaji, ma kowinjo wach moro marach, to noring odog e pinye, kuma nami onegee.’ ”" 
Isaiah37:8 Rabshake nodok, moyudo ni ruodh Asuria osea Lakish, odhi monjo Libna. Omiyo nodhi ire kuno." 
Isaiah37:9 To kane ruodh Asuria owinjo ni Tirhaka ruodh Ethiopia obiro monje, nochako oro joote ir Hezekia ruodh Juda kowacho niya," 
Isaiah37:10 “Kik iyie Nyasachi migeno kuomeno wuondi ni ruodh Asuria ok nokaw Jerusalem. 
Isaiah37:11 Chutho, isewinjo kaka ruodhi mag Asuria oseketho pinje mane gikedogo chuth. To koro iparo ni in ema dikwo?" 
Isaiah37:12 Kwerena nonego jo-Gozan gi jo-Haran gi jo-Rezef kod jo-Eden ma nodak Telasar. Koro dak ne nyisechegi okonyogi? 
Isaiah37:13 Koso ere ruodhi mag Hamath gi Arpad gi Sefarvaim gi Hena kod Iva?” 
Isaiah37:14 Hezekia nokawo barua mane joote okelone, mi osomo. Bang’e ne odhi e Hekalu, mi oyaro baruano e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye," 
Isaiah37:15 kokwaye niya," 
Isaiah37:16 “A Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto, ma Nyasach Israel, mobet ewi kerubi kaka ruoth bet e komduong’ne, in kendi e Nyasach ogendini duto mae piny, kendo in ema nichueyo polo gi piny." 
Isaiah37:17 A Ruoth Nyasaye, chik iti mondo iwinji, kendo iyaw wang’i mondo inen. Winj weche ma Senakerib yanyigo, in Nyasaye Mangima!" 
Isaiah37:18 A Ruoth Nyasaye, en adier ni ruodhi mag Asuria oseketho pinje duto," 
Isaiah37:19 mi gibolo nyisechegi e mach, kendo gisekethogi chuth, nimar ne ok gin nyiseche kata matin, to mana tich dhano molos gi yath kata gi kidi." 
Isaiah37:20 To koro Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachwa, reswa e lwet Senakerib, mondo ogendini duto mae piny ong’e ni in kendi e Nyasaye.”" 
Isaiah37:21 Eka Isaya wuod Amoz nooro ni Hezekia wach niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel owacho ni osewinjo lemo mikwayego nikech wach ma Senakerib ruodh Asuria osesiemigo," 
Isaiah37:22 omiyo osewuoyo kuom Senakerib kama: In Senakerib, dala Sayun ochayi kendo jari! Ee, dala Sayun twenyoni ume!" 
Isaiah37:23 To koro in, en ng’ano ma isejaro kendo iyanyo? Koso en ng’a ma isekokne ka ijowo wang’i? Nyaka ing’e ni en Ng’ama Ler mar Israel!" 
Isaiah37:24 Isejaro Ruoth Nyasaye gi dho jooteni, kiwacho niya, ‘Aseidho gode maboyo mag Lebanon, mi achopo midimidi, ka an gi gechena mag lweny mang’eny mokadho akwana. Bende asetong’o yiend sida madongo, kod yiend saipras mabeyo man kuno. Asechopo nyaka e chuny bungu, kama ni iye mogik, kendo ma yien odichie." 
Isaiah37:25 Asekunyo sokni, mi amodho pi pinje mamoko. Bende aore mag Misri noduono, ka anyonogi gi tienda!’" 
Isaiah37:26 To in Senakerib, kata obedo ni iwacho kamano, donge ing’eyo ni an Ruoth Nyasaye ema ne achano chon mondo gigo otimre? Adier, ne achanogi chon, to koro amiyo gitimore. An ema ne achano mondo imuk mier mochiel motegno, olokre gundni," 
Isaiah37:27 ma joma odakie chalo gi lum ma e pap, maonge gi teko, kata ka lum matwi e tat ot, to ner kapok odongo, nimar ne gionge gi teko, kendo ne ging’eng’ ka luoro omakogi." 
Isaiah37:28 To ang’eyo timbeni duto: ang’eyo kata ka ichung’, kata ka ibet piny, kata kiwuok, kata kiduogo dala." 
Isaiah37:29 Asewinjo kaka iyanya malich, kendo kaka isungori, omiyo abiro keto mbedo e umi, kod rajaki e dhogi, mondo awichi idog thuru gi yo mane ibirogo." 
Isaiah37:30 To winji, in Hezekia, ranyisi ma amiyi ema: E higa mokwongoni, unucham gik matwi kendgi, kendo e higa mar ariyo unucham orowe moloth e higa mokwongono, to e higa mar adek unuket kodhi, kendo unuka cham. Bende unupidh mzabibu, bende unucham olembgi." 
Isaiah37:31 Jo-Juda modong’ nochal gi yath ma tero tiendene piny, kendo nyago olemo e bedene," 
Isaiah37:32 nimar joma nok modong’ nowuog Jerusalem. Adier, oganda mar joma otony noa e got Sayun. Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto oseketo chunye mondo otim kamano." 
Isaiah37:33 Kuom mano, Ruoth Nyasaye owuoyo kuom ruodh Asuria kama: “Ok nodonj e dala Jerusalem, kendo ok nobaye gi asere, kata monjogo koting’o kuot ok nomonje. Bende ok nong’ing pith mondo oidhgo ohingane." 
Isaiah37:34 Enodog gi yo ma nobirogo, to ok nodonj Jerusalem," 
Isaiah37:35 nimar anaked ni dalani mondo aresi, nikech nyinga, kendo nikech Daudi jatichna.”" 
Isaiah37:36 Malaika mar Ruoth Nyasaye nodhi monego jo-Asuria alufu mia achiel gi piero aboro gabich (185,000) e kambigi, kendo kane ji ochiew gokinyi, to ringre joma otho ema ne ginwang’o kopie piny." 
Isaiah37:37 Mano omiyo Senakerib ruodh Asuria noa kuno, mi odok Nineve, odakie." 
Isaiah37:38 To chieng’ moro, kane oyudo olemo e od Nisrok nyasache, yawuote ma Adramelek gi Sharezer nobiro monege. Bang’e ne giringo, mi gidhi e piny Ararat, to Esarhadon nodoko ruoth kar Senakerib wuon mare." 
Isaiah38:1 E ndalogo, Hezekia ne tuo, kendo ohewore. Janabi Isaya wuod Amoz nobiro ire, mowachone niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye owacho ni mondo ilam mwanduni ni yawuoti, nimar ibiro tho, ok nikwo.”" 
Isaiah38:2 Kane Hezekia owinjo kamano, nolokore mong’iyo kor ot, kokwayo Ruoth Nyasaye niya," 
Isaiah38:3 “A Ruoth Nyasaye asayi; parie kaka asewuotho e nyimi gi adiera kod chuny mobidhore, ka atimo gik malong’oni.” Eka ne oywak malit!" 
Isaiah38:4 Bang’e wach Ruoth Nyasaye nobiro ni Isaya niya," 
Isaiah38:5 “Dhiyo iwach ni Hezekia ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Daudi kwaru owacho kama: ‘Asewinjo kwayoni, kendo aseneno pi wang’i." 
Isaiah38:6 Omiyo abiro medi ndalo moromo higni apar gabich, bende abiro resi kaachiel gi dala Jerusalem e lwet ruodh Asuria, kendo abiro rito dalani.’ ” Eka Isaya ne owacho ni jood Hezekia ni mondo okel ng’owo moswagi, omwon e bur mokuodo Hezekia. Ne gitimo kamano, mi bur nochango. Bang’ mano, Hezekia nopenjo niya: Ere gima biro bedona ranyisi ni abiro dhi e Od Ruoth Nyasaye?" 
Isaiah38:7 To Isaya nodwoke ni, “Ranyisi ma Ruoth Nyasaye onyisigo ni obiro timo gima osewacho e ma:" 
Isaiah38:8 Rang ane tipo mar wang’ chieng’ manie raidhi mar dhood Ahaz. Abiro dwoko tipono chien ondamo apar.” Kamano wang’chieng’ nodok chien ondamo apar e raidhi mane oyudo oselorie. 
Isaiah38:9 Koro weche mag Hezekia ruodh Juda mane ondiki ka osechango e magi: 
Isaiah38:10 “Ne aparo ni abiro tho kapod atin, kendo ni abiro tieko ndalona duto e piny joma otho." 
Isaiah38:11 Ne awacho niya: Ok anachak aneni A Ruoth Nyasaye, e piny joma ngima, bende ok nachak ane dhano gi wang’a kaka joma ngima neno." 
Isaiah38:12 Osepudh oda, mi owit kucha, mana kaka ipudho kiru mar jakwath. A Ruoth Nyasaye, iseng’ado ngimana machiek mana kaka jatueng’o dolo usi, kendo ng’ado. Isanda, chakre okinyi nyaka odhiambo," 
Isaiah38:13 kendo aywak ka an gi rem malit nyaka piny ru. Chokena duto otur, mana ka gima sibuor ema oturo. Adier, isanda, chakre okinyi nyaka odhiambo," 
Isaiah38:14 omiyo aywak mana ka opija kata akuru, kendo wengena otho bo kuom rango malo. A Ruoth Nyasaye, winj ywakna mondo ibed jawarna." 
Isaiah38:15 Ere kaka dater ywakna ni Ruoth Nyasaye? Koso en ang’o ma dawachne, ka en owuon ema osetimona gigi duto? Abayo abaya koni gi koni engimana duto, nikech chandruok ma chunya nigo." 
Isaiah38:16 To pod chunya nobed mana kodi, A Ruoth Nyasaye. In ema imiyo chunya yueyo. Duoga iri mondo abed mangima." 
Isaiah38:17 Chutho, koro aseneno ni chandruok duto mane aseyudo konya, nimar iseresa e tho nikech herani. Bende isewito richona duto ka dieng’eyi." 
Isaiah38:18 Piny joma otho ok nyal goyoni erokamano! Adier, joma otho ok nyal paki. Chutho, joma osedhi e bur ok nyal geno adiera mari." 
Isaiah38:19 To joma ngima kende ema nyalo goyoni erokamano kaka agoyoni kawuononi. Wuone bende nyiso yawuotgi adiera mari, A Nyasaye." 
Isaiah38:20 Ruoth Nyasaye oikore mondo oresa! Kuom mano, waweruru wende pak, ka wagoyo thumbe e Od Ruoth Nyasaye e ndalo duto mag ngimawa.”" 
Isaiah39:1 E ndalo Merodak-baladan wuod Baladan, ma ruodh Babulon, nooro joote ir Hezekia gi barupe kod mich, nikech ne owinjo ni yande otuo, to koro osedoko mangima." 
Isaiah39:2 Hezekia norwako jootego, monyisogi mwandune duto mane ni e ode mar keno, kaka fedha gi dhahabu gi gik mang’ue ng’ar, gi mo ma nengone tek kod gilweny, kaachiel gi gik moko duto mane ni kuonde kanone. Onge gimoro amora e ode kata e pinye mane ok onyisogi." 
Isaiah39:3 To bang’e janabi Isaya nobiro ir ruoth Hezekia, mopenjee niya, “Jogi oa kanye? To wach ang’o mokelogi?” Hezekia nodwoke ni, “Gia e piny Babulon, kuma bor.”" 
Isaiah39:4 Janabi Isaya nomedo penje niya, “To ang’o ma gineno e odi?” Hezekia nodwoke ni, “Giseneno gik moko duto manie oda. Onge gimoro amora modong’ mak anyisogi e kuonde kenona.”" 
Isaiah39:5 Bang’ mano Isaya nowacho ni Hezekia niya, “Winj wach Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto." 
Isaiah39:6 Ndalo biro ma gik moko duto manie odi, ma kwereni osekano nyaka chil kawuono, noter Babulon. Bende Ruoth Nyasaye omedo wacho ni onge gima nodong’ kata achiel mak oter." 
Isaiah39:7 Yawuoti moko nolok wasumbini. Adier moko kuom yawuoti hie nolok wasumbni mabuoch e od ruodh Babulon.” 
Isaiah39:8 Hezekia ne odwoke niya, “Wach Ruoth Nyasaye ma isenyisa ber.” To ne odwoke kamano, koparo ni en to kue biro siko e ndalone duto." 
Isaiah40:1 Nyasachu wacho kama: “Houru chuny joga! Hogiuru! 
Isaiah40:2 Wuouru gi jo-Jerusalem gi muolo, kuwachonigi ni gisetieko ndalogi mag tuech, kendo ni osekumgi moromo. Ruoth Nyasaye osekumogi nyadiriyo kuom richogi duto.”" 
Isaiah40:3 Dwol moro kok niya, “Losuru ni Ruoth Nyasaye yo e thim. Losuru ni Nyasachwa ndara mopie e piny motwo." 
Isaiah40:4 Hohni duto nobugi kendo gode duto nopie. Yore motimo gogni bende nobed maler, kendo kuonde motimo gode nobed pewe." 
Isaiah40:5 Eka duong’ maler mar Ruoth Nyasaye nofwenyre, mi ji duto nonene kaachiel, nimar Ruoth Nyasaye owuon ema owacho kamano.”" 
Isaiah40:6 Dwol moro wacho niya, “Ting’ dwondi iwuo.” To moro dwoko ni, “Ere gima dawachi?” “Wach niya, ‘Dhano ka dhano chalo gi lum, kendo berne duto chalo gi maua manie pap." 
Isaiah40:7 Lum ner, kendo maua two, ka much Ruoth Nyasaye okudhogi. Chutho, dhano chalo gi lum." 
Isaiah40:8 Adier, lum two, maua bende ner, to wach Nyasachwa to osiko nyaka chieng’.’ ”" 
Isaiah40:9 In mikelo ni Sayun wach maber, idh wi got mabor, kendo ikogi matek. Ee, in mikelo ni Jerusalem wach maber, ting’ dwondi, ikogi matek ka ok iluor, kiwacho ni miech Juda niya, “Eri, Nyasachu ni ka.”" 
Isaiah40:10 Ng’euru ni Ruoth Nyasaye biro gi teko. Obiro loyo piny gi tekone maduong’ neuru, obiro gi joge mogonyo e lweny ka wuotho e nyime, ka gik moyako." 
Isaiah40:11 Ochalo jakwath ma sembo jambe, koting’o nyirombe e bade, kendo oriwogi e kore, kotelo ni mago man gi nyithindo, kotero modho." 
Isaiah40:12 En ng’a mane opimo pi nembe e chuny lwete, kata mane opimo duong’ mar polo gi lith lwete? En ng’a mane opimo lowo duto manie piny, kata mane opimo gode madongo gi matindo e ratil mak mana Ruoth Nyasaye?" 
Isaiah40:13 Ere ng’at ma oseng’ado ni Ruoth Nyasaye rieko, kata mosechung’ e dire ka puonje?" 
Isaiah40:14 Bende Ruoth Nyasaye osedwaroe rieko moro kuom ng’ato, kata dwaro ni mondo ng’ato opuonje adiera kod yore mabeyo? Ooyo, ok osetimo kamano," 
Isaiah40:15 nikech ogendini duto mag piny ok gimoro kipimo kode. Giromre mana gi pi maton kaa e dapi, kata ka buru momoko e ratil. Adier, chulni gi dhonembe duto yotne mana ka muya!" 
Isaiah40:16 Yien duto manie piny Lebanon, kaachiel gi le duto man kuno, ok nyal romo timonego misango miwang’o pep." 
Isaiah40:17 Ogendini duto ok gimoro e nyime. Okwanogi ka gik manono ma onge tich. 
Isaiah40:18 En ng’a ma dipim gi Nyasaye? Koso ang’o ma diwachi ni chal kode? 
Isaiah40:19 Dochal gi kido ma ng’ato ochueyo, kendo ma jatheth dhahabu obawo gi dhahabu, mi othedhone thiwni mag fedha koso?" 
Isaiah40:20 Koso dochal gi yien maber ma ok tow ma ng’ato oyiero, mi oluongo japecho molony mondo olosnego kido mopa ma ok nyal podho?" 
Isaiah40:21 Donge ung’eyo, koso pok uwinjo," 
Isaiah40:22 ni Nyasaye obet e polo malo, kendo ni joma odak e piny chalone mana dede. Ok osewachnu kamano chakre chon? Koso pok uparo nyaka ne chue piny ni en ema ne oyaro polo mana ka pasia, kendo ogure mana ka hema midakie?" 
Isaiah40:23 Odwoko ruodhi gi jotelo duto piny, mi lokre gima nono." 
Isaiah40:24 Ka okudho muya kuomgi, to giner, mi kalausi dhi kodgi mana ka mihudhi, nimar gichalo gi kodhi mokom machiegni, ma tiendegi pok ochwowo lowo." 
Isaiah40:25 Ng’ama Ler penjo niya, “To koro en ng’a ma duporago? Koso ere ng’ama dirom koda?" 
Isaiah40:26 Ting’uru wengeu malo e polo, mondo upar ane ng’ama ne ochueyo gigo duto. Donge en mana Jal mane otelo ni oganda mar sulue, ka oluongo moro ka moro gi nyinge, mana ka gima en jaduong’ lweny motelo ni jolwenje? Tekone maduong’ malich omiyo onge kata mana sulue achiel ma ok ochung’ kare." 
Isaiah40:27 Un jo-Israel ma nyikwa Jakobo, ere gima omiyo ung’ur, kuwacho niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye ok ne yorewa, kendo ok ong’adnwa bura maber”?" 
Isaiah40:28 Donge ung’eyo, koso pok uwinjo, ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasaye mochwere, kendo ma Jachuech piny malichni duto, ok ol, kendo ok nyosre? Parone tut, ma odhiero dhano ng’eyo." 
Isaiah40:29 En ema omiyo joma ool teko. Adier, omedo muya ni joma tekogi orumo." 
Isaiah40:30 Joma tindo nyalo ol, mi nyosre, kata mana yawuowi mopong’ bende nyalo chwanyore, mi podhi." 
Isaiah40:31 To joma ogeno kuom Ruoth Nyasaye, tekogi noduogi. Ginihu ka ongo, mana ka gima gin gi buombegi, kendo giniringi, to ok giniol, bende giniwuothi, to tekregi ok norum." 
Isaiah41:1 Un pinje mae dhonembe, kod chulni chikuru itu, ka uling’ thi e nyima. Ogendini mondo obi abia! Gibi abia machiegni mondo giwuo ane. Waduto wanadonj kaachiel kama ing’adoe bura." 
Isaiah41:2 Ng’at moa yo wuok chieng’, ma locho kamoro amora modhiye cha, ere ng’ama okele? Koso en ng’a moketo ogendini e lwete, kendo miyo oloyo ruodhi mi onyon piny? Okeyogi gi liganglane mana ka buru, kendo oriembogi gi asere, mana ka mihudhi ma yamo tero." 
Isaiah41:3 Olawogi koriembogi matek mana ka gima ohuyo, to en okadho maber mak ohinyore." 
Isaiah41:4 To koro apenjo ni, mano en tij ng’a? Koso en ng’a mamiyo mago duto timore? En ng’a mamiyo tienge luwore nyaka ne piny chakre? En mana an, Ruoth Nyasaye. An ema akwongo, kendo anie nyamgiko." 
Isaiah41:5 Pinje mae dhonembe kod chulni osewinjo wachno, modoko maluor, kendo ji duto kirni, chakre tung’ piny nyaka tung’ piny." 
Isaiah41:6 Ng’ato ka ng’ato konyo wadgi, kendo jiwe, kawacho ni mondo obed gi chir." 
Isaiah41:7 Kamano japecho jiwo jathedh dhahabu, kaloso nyasaye manono, kendo jal matiyo gi nyundo jiwo jal ma goyo musmal kawacho ni tich riwo nyinyo osetim maber. Eka oguro nyasaye manonono gi musmal mondo kik oyiengni." 
Isaiah41:8 To un jo-Israel jotichna, aseyierou, mi agolou e giko piny kuonde mane untie. Adier, un nyikwa Jakobo ma aseyiero, kendo ma koth Ibrahim osiepna," 
Isaiah41:9 ne aluongou mondo ua kuonde maboyo. Aseluongou ni jotichna, kendo aseyierou ma ok awitou." 
Isaiah41:10 Kik uluor gimoro nikech an kodu. Kik kibaji gou, nimar an e Nyasachu. Amiyou teko, kendo akonyou, bende asirou gi bada ma korachwich ma alochogo." 
Isaiah41:11 Koro neuru! Jogu duto ma mon kodu wigi biro kuot, mi gidhier nono. Adier, jogo duto ma kedo kodu norum mi lal nono." 
Isaiah41:12 Unudwar wasikugo, to ok unuyudgi. Chutho, jogo mane kedo kodu ok nobed gimoro kata matin," 
Isaiah41:13 nikech an Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu ema amako badu ma korachwich, kendo awachonu niya, “Kik ubed maluor, nimar an ema akonyou.”" 
Isaiah41:14 In oganda Jakobo, in kudni akuda, to kik ibed maluor. Yaye, in Israel ma onge ndhathe, kik kibaji goyi. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano." 
Isaiah41:15 Neuru! Abiro miyo uchalo gi gir diemo ngano manyien ma lekene bitho. Unumuk gode madongo gi matindo, kutoyogi matindotindo, mi gilokre mihudhi." 
Isaiah41:16 Unupiedhgi mi yamo notergi mabor, kendo kalausi nokegi. To un to unubed mamor, nikech Ruoth Nyasaye ma Ng’ama Ler mar Israel." 
Isaiah41:17 Joma odhier kod joma chandore manyo pi, to ok ginwang’, omiyo dwondgi otwo nikech riyo, to an Ruoth Nyasaye abiro dwoko kwayogi. Adier, an Nyasach Israel ok najwang’gi." 
Isaiah41:18 Abiro miyo aore wuogi kuonde motwo motimo kwoyo, kendo sokni tuchi e holni. Bende abiro miyo yewni bedi e piny motimo ongoro, mi pi bubni e piny motwo." 
Isaiah41:19 Abiro pidho yien mopogore opogore kuonde motwo," 
Isaiah41:20 mondo ji duto one kendo ong’e ni, Ruoth Nyasaye, ma Ng’ama Ler mar Israel ema osetimo kamano." 
Isaiah41:21 Ruoth Nyasaye ma Ruodh joka Jakobo wacho niya, “Biuru, uwach wachu ane." 
Isaiah41:22 Nyisecheu mondo obi onyiswa ane gik matimore. Onego ginyiswa ane tiend gik mane osetimore. 
Isaiah41:23 Nyiswauru ane gik mabiro timore e kinde mabiro, mondo wayie ni kara un nyiseche adier. Timuru ane gimoro, maber kata marach, manyalo miyo wang’eng’ mi wadhier nono." 
Isaiah41:24 To en adier ni ok unyal gimoro, kendo gik mutimo onge tich. Bende ng’ato ang’ata ma kwanou ka nyisechene en raura ka un!”" 
Isaiah41:25 An to aseluongo ng’ato yo nyandwat ma yo wuok chieng’ mondo obi. En ng’at mabiro lama. Enonyon ruodhi mana ka lowo mimwonogo ot, kendo nonywasgi mana kaka jachuech nywaso lop agulu." 
Isaiah41:26 En ng’a, mane okoro wachno, ni mondo wang’e? Koso en ng’a mane onyisowa chon ni wachno biro timore, mondo wayie ni en adier? Onge ng’ato mane ohule, kata mane owuoyo kuome. Adier, wecheu ne ok owinji kata matin." 
Isaiah41:27 Ne asenyiso jo-Sayun chon ni, “Ero gibiro,” kendo ne aoro ni Jerusalem jaote materonigi wach maber." 
Isaiah41:28 To kane arango nyisecheu, to ne ok aneno moro manyalo dwoko penjona." 
Isaiah41:29 Neyeuru kaka gin gik manono. Gimoro amora ma gitimo onge tich. Nyisechego gin mana yamo makudho! 
Isaiah42:1 Neuru! Ma e jatichna ma atayo. En ng’at ma aseyiero, kendo ma chunya morgo. Aseketo roho mara kuome, omiyo obiro kelo adiera ni ogendini." 
Isaiah42:2 Ok nokogi, kata nduru ok nogo, dwonde bende ok nowinji e yore." 
Isaiah42:3 Kata mana odundu motore ok notur mi owiti ka gima nono, bende ok nosim kata mana taya maliel marachrach, to enong’ad bura mana gi adiera." 
Isaiah42:4 Ok nochwanyre kata chunye ok nonyosre to enokel adiera e piny, kendo pinje manie dhonembe rito mondo chikne obi." 
Isaiah42:5 Ruoth Nyasaye mane ochueyo polo mi oyaro, kendo ochueyo piny gi gik mangima duto mantie, mi ochiwo muya ni joma odakie kod gik moko duto mangima, wacho kama:" 
Isaiah42:6 “An Ruoth Nyasaye, aseluongi ni mondo itim gima kelo resruok. Asemako lweti mondo ariti, kendo anami ibed ng’at ma kelo singruok e kinda gi ji," 
Isaiah42:7 mondo iyaw wenge muofni kendo igol joma otue e mudho kuma gidakie. 
Isaiah42:8 An e Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo mano e nyinga. Ok ayie mondo duong’ ma imiya omi nyasaye moro machielo, bende ok ayie mondo pak mipakago opakgo gik ma opa." 
Isaiah42:9 Neuru kaka gik mane akoro osetimore. To koro anyisou gik manyien ma biro timore. Adier, ahulonugi kapok gitimore.”" 
Isaiah42:10 Weruru ni Ruoth Nyasaye wer manyien, kupako nyinge e piny duto. Un mukwang’ e nam, pakeuru kaachiel gi gik manie nam." 
Isaiah42:11 Thim, kod mier man kuno, mondo obed mamor, kaachiel gi kuonde dak mag jo-Arabu ma Kedar. Un joma odak Sela, koguru gi mor ewi gode." 
Isaiah42:12 Un duto mudak e dhonembe gi chulni, pakeuru. Kamano ji duto mondo omi Ruoth Nyasaye duong’." 
Isaiah42:13 Ruoth Nyasaye biro wuok oko ka thwon maratego. Enobed gi mirima mager mana ka jalweny, kendo enokogi ka ogoyo sigich lweny, mi olo wasike." 
Isaiah42:14 An Ruoth Nyasaye, aseling’ kuom ndalo mang’eny, ka abedo gi kue, kendo ka aterora mos, to koro abiro ywak ka dhako ma muoch kayo, ka aomo chunya, kendo agamo yueyo." 
Isaiah42:15 Anatiek gik moko duto manie gode, ka amiyo gik mang’ich duto man kuno two. Anami aore lokre kuonde motwo, kendo adwon yewni duto." 
Isaiah42:16 Bang’e anatel ni muofni e wuodhgi, ka amiyo giluwo yore ma ok ging’eyo. Mudho ma giwuothoe analoknigi ler, kendo anarie yore mobam ma giluwo. Mago duto natim mak ok aweyo moro mak atimo." 
Isaiah42:17 To joma ogeno mana kuom gik mopa, ma luongo gik maket ka nyisechegi, noyud wichkuot, kendo nodwok chien." 
Isaiah42:18 Un joma itgi odino, koro winjuru! Yaye un muofni, ranguru mondo unen!" 
Isaiah42:19 Ere muofu maloyou, un jo-Israel jotichna? Kata ere ng’ama ite odino moloyou, un jootena ma aoro? Koso ere muofu maloyou un joma atimogo singruok mar kue, kata ma ite odino maloyou un jotich Ruoth Nyasaye?" 
Isaiah42:20 Useneno gik mathoth, to ok udewgi. Un gi it, to onge gima uwinjo." 
Isaiah42:21 Ruoth Nyasaye noneno ni ber mondo chikne obed gi duong’, mondo adierane olandre." 
Isaiah42:22 To kata kamano jogi gin joma oyaki, kendo oter e tuech. Giduto gisenyumore e obadho mokunynigi, mi gilal e ut tuech. Omakgi, mi odhi kodgi mana ka gima gin gik moyaki, ma onge ng’ama nyalo resogi, kata wacho ni mondo odwokgi." 
Isaiah42:23 Un joma nyalo winjo wach, chikuru itu uwinji. Ee, chakre kawuono, chikuru itu." 
Isaiah42:24 En ng’a, mane ochiwo jo-Israel ma nyikwa Jakobo e lwet joyeko? Donge en Ruoth Nyasaye? Ne giketho e nyime, mi gitamore luwo yorene, kendo gidagi rito chikne." 
Isaiah42:25 Mano ema omiyo noolo mirimbe mager kuom jo-Israel, kokelonigi lweny maliet ka mach. Ne olworogi gi mach koni gi koni, to ne ok giwinjo tiend kumno. Adier, ne orewogi, to kata kamano ne ok gidewo." 
Isaiah43:1 Un jo-Israel ma nyikwa Jakobo, Ruoth Nyasaye mane otimou oganda wacho kama: “Kik ubed maluor nikech asewarou. Aseluongou gi nyingu, omiyo un joga awuon." 
Isaiah43:2 Ka ukadho e pige matut, to an kodu. Adier, ka ng’ado aore, to ok giniteru, bende kata ka uwuotho e mach mang’ang’ni to ok unuwang’," 
Isaiah43:3 nimar an Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu, ma Ng’ama Ler mar Israel, kendo ma jaresu. Achiwo Misri gi Ethiopia kod Seba mondo awarugo." 
Isaiah43:4 Akwanou ka gima nengone tek, bende un joma ogen, ma ahero, omiyo achiwo pinje moko mondo awarugo. Adier, achiwo jomoko nono mondo aresgo ngimau." 
Isaiah43:5 An kodu, omiyo kik ubed maluor. Abiro chokou, ka agolou yo wuokchieng’ gi yo podho chieng’, kaachiel gi nyithindu." 
Isaiah43:6 Abiro wacho ni jo-nyandwat ni mondo oweu. Jo-milambo to abiro nyiso niya, “Kik ugeng’nigi," 
Isaiah43:7 to keluru yawuota gi nyiga, kugolo kuonde maboyo. Adier, kelgiuru kugologi e tung’ piny koni gi koni. Chutho, keluru ji duto ma iluongo gi nyinga, ma asechueyo, kendo asetimo oganda. Gin joma asechueyo, mondo ayud duong’." 
Isaiah43:8 Keluru jogo. Gin joma nigi wenge, to ok nyal neno. Bende gin gi it, to ok ginyal winjo." 
Isaiah43:9 Ogendini duto mondo ochokre kaachiel. Ere nyasachgi mane osekoroe gima kama, kata mosehuloe gimoro ka pok otimore? Weuru gikel joneno mondo onyis ane gik mane gitimo, mondo gilo bura, ka wachgi en adier." 
Isaiah43:10 To ka ok ginyal, to koro, An Ruoth Nyasaye awacho kama: “An to an gi joneno. Un jo-Israel e joneno maga, kendo jotichna. Aseyierou mondo ung’eya, kendo uket genou kuoma. Bende mondo ung’e ni an e Nyasaye. Nyasaye moro motelona ne pok obedoe, bende moro maluwa ok nobedie." 
Isaiah43:11 An kende e Ruoth Nyasaye. Onge jawar moro mak mana an. 
Isaiah43:12 An ema asekoro wach, kanyisou malong’o gik mabiro timore, to nyisecheu manono ok osetimo kamano. Un e joneno maga! An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano." 
Isaiah43:13 An e Nyasaye ma ok lokre nyaka chieng’. Gima amako onge ng’ama nyalo kawo, bende gima atimo, onge ng’ama nyalo ketho.”" 
Isaiah43:14 Ruoth Nyasaye ma jaresu kendo ma Ng’ama Ler mar Israel wacho kama: “Aseoro oganda lweny mondo omonj Babulon nikech un, kendo abiro miyo jo-Babulon podh piny auma ka giringo, mi koko mar mor ma gigoyo lokre ywak." 
Isaiah43:15 An e Ruoth Nyasaye ma Ng’ama Ler, ma jachuechu, kendo ma Ruodhu, yaye Israel!”" 
Isaiah43:16 An Ruoth Nyasaye ema ne apogo nam, mondo yo obedie e kind pige mogingore madongo." 
Isaiah43:17 Bende ne amiyo geche lweny kod farese odonjo kuno, kaachiel gi oganda lweny maratego, mong’ielore piny, ma ok nyal chako chung’ kendo. Adier, ne githo mana ka taya mosim. Koro awachonu niya," 
Isaiah43:18 “Weuru keto chunyu e gik machon, kuparo gik ma osekadho." 
Isaiah43:19 Koro adwaro timo gima nyien. Neuru, asechako time. Donge unene? Abiro loso yo e piny motwo. Adier, abiro loso yore e piny motimo ongoro." 
Isaiah43:20 Le mae thim, kaka bwe kod udo nogona erokamano, nikech abiro kelo pi e piny motwo, mi alos yore e piny motimo ongoro, mondo joga moyier oyud pi mamodho." 
Isaiah43:21 Gin ji mane atimo ogandana awuon, mondo oland weche ma miya duong’." 
Isaiah43:22 To neyeuru ni, ne ok uluonga mondo akonyu, yaye joka Jakobo! Useol koda, A Israel!" 
Isaiah43:23 Ok usetimona misengni miwang’o pep mag rombe, kendo ok usemiya duong’ kutimona misengni mamoko. To ok asechandou mondo utimna misengni mag cham, bende ok asemiyou ting’ mapek, ka adwaro ni mondo uwang’na ubani." 
Isaiah43:24 Ne ok ung’iewona niang’ gi pesau, kata dhila gi boche mag misengniu, ne ok udhila. To ne utura mana gi richou, kendo ne uola mana gi timbeu mamono." 
Isaiah43:25 An kende e jal ma rucho richou oko, mi ok chak par kendo, nikech mano e gima ahero timo." 
Isaiah43:26 Parnauru gik mane otimore chon, mondo wapim wach kaachiel. Wachuru wecheu ane, manyiso ni uonge gi ketho." 
Isaiah43:27 Kwaru mokwongo ne otimo richo, kendo jonabiu ne opiem koda." 
Isaiah43:28 Jodongu bende ne omiyo Hekalu mara odoko mogak. Mano omiyo ne ajwang’o jo-Israel ma nyikwa Jakobo mondo otieki, mi yud wichkuot." 
Isaiah44:1 “Koro winjauru un jotichna ma nyikwa Jakobo. Chikuru itu un jo-Israel, oganda ma aseyiero." 
Isaiah44:2 An Ruoth Nyasaye ma jachuechu, kendo ma jakonyu, mane olosou chakre e ich, awacho kama: Un joka Jakobo jatichna, ma bende aluongo ni jo-Jeshurun, kik ubed maluor," 
Isaiah44:3 nikech abiro kelo koth mang’eny e lowo motwo mobaro okak. Bende abiro olo rohona kuom kothu, ka aguedhogi." 
Isaiah44:4 Ginidongi mana ka lum man kama ng’ich, kata ka yien manie bath aora." 
Isaiah44:5 Ng’at moro nowach niya, ‘An ng’at Ruoth Nyasaye.’ To machielo nowach ni en nyakwar Jakobo. Ng’at moro to nondik nying Ruoth Nyasaye e lwete, kendo noluongre gi nying Israel.”" 
Isaiah44:6 Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto ma Ruodh jo-Israel kendo jawargi, wacho niya, “An e mokwongo, kendo an e mogik, bende onge Nyasaye moro mak mana an." 
Isaiah44:7 To ka ng’ato paro ni rom koda, to mondo ochung’ ane owach kamano. Onego ohul gik manyalo nyiso ni owacho adiera, nikech kane ginyalo koro gik mane otimore chon, to kara nyaka bed ni ginyalo hulo gik ma koro eka biro timore!" 
Isaiah44:8 Kik ubed maluor, bende kik chunyu nyosre! Donge ne anyisou chon ni gima kama biro timore? Adier, ne ahulo wachno, kendo koro ubedo joneno maga! Bende nitie Nyasaye moro machielo, ma ok mana an? Ooyo, ok ang’eyo Jachuech moro machielo.”" 
Isaiah44:9 Joma loso nyiseche manono gin joma nono oloyo, kendo gik ma giherogo ok kony gimoro. Joma lamogi olokore muofni, kendo ok ging’eyo gimoro, omiyo wigi nokuodi." 
Isaiah44:10 Ka ng’ato oloso nyasaye manono gi bao kata gi chuma to oketho tekre kayiem," 
Isaiah44:11 nikech joma ogeno kuomgigo biro yudo wichkuot. Bende joma olosogi gin mana ji, ma ok Nyasaye. Koro weuru gichokre giduto mondo gichoma tir ane, mak kihondko bi makogi, mi giyud wichkuot maduong’." 
Isaiah44:12 Jatheth ema chwako chuma e mach, eka ogoye gi nyundo mondo othedhe kaka odwaro. Olose gi muche duto, mi obed mool, ka kech ohewe kendo riyo oloye." 
Isaiah44:13 Japecho to pimo bao gi tol, kendo oketo alama kuome, eka opaye gi koyo, kendo olose maber e kido mar dhano, mana ni mondo ochunge achunga e od lemo!" 
Isaiah44:14 Ng’ato nyalo pidho yiend sida, kendo koth miyo yien-go dongo, mondo bang’e obed gi yien ma okonyorego. Kata onyalo yiero yath moro maber e bungu, mi otong’." 
Isaiah44:15 Dir yadhno omoko mach mondo oo, to dire moko ochwakogo chiemo. Moko to olosogo nyasaye molamo kokulorene piny." 
Isaiah44:16 Adier, dir yadhno konchiel to ochwako, kendo obuloe ring’o mondo ocham, moyieng’. To bende ooyo majno, kowacho niya, “Ero! Awinjo maber, kendo denda yudo liet.”" 
Isaiah44:17 Bang’e bath yadhno modong’ to opayo, kendo olosogo nyasaye, mokulorene nyaka e lowo, kendo olamo, kowacho niya, “Resa, nimar in e nyasacha!”" 
Isaiah44:18 Joma kamago ok ong’eyo gimoro, bende ok giwinj tiend gik moko. Wengegi odinore ma ok ginyal neno, kendo chunygi thanythany ma ok ginyal fwenyo tiend gimoro." 
Isaiah44:19 Ng’at machal kamano onge gi paro kata rieko ma onyalo penjorego kende niya, “Bath yadhni konchiel ne achwako, mi atedogo makati. Bende asebuloe ring’o mi achamo, to koro ere kaka dalok dire konchiel modong’ bed nyasaye? Koso ere gima omiyo onego akulra piny, kalamo mana osiki motong’ mar yath?”" 
Isaiah44:20 Ng’at ma kamano chamo mana buch kendo! Parone mofuwo osewuonde, mowite. Omiyo oonge gi rieko monyalo parogo ni gima oting’o e lweteno ok en gima adier." 
Isaiah44:21 “Parieuru mago duto un nyikwa Jakobo. Adier, un jo-Israel, paruru ane, nimar un jotichna, omiyo kik wiu wil koda." 
Isaiah44:22 Aserucho richou, mi oduono mana ka ong’ueng’o. Ee, asekeyo timbeu mamono mana ka boche polo. Duoguru ira, nikech asewarou.”" 
Isaiah44:23 Koguru gi mor un polo, nimar Ruoth Nyasaye ema osetimo kamano. Un kuonde matut moloyo mag piny, gouru mahu gi mor, kendo un gode kaachiel gi bunge kod yien, weruru wende locho, nikech Ruoth Nyasaye osewaro jo-Israel ma nyikwa Jakobo, komiyogo nyinge duong’." 
Isaiah44:24 Ruoth Nyasaye ma jawaru, kendo mane ochueyou e ich, wacho kama: “An e Ruoth Nyasaye mane ochueyo gik moko duto. Ne ayaro polo awuon, kendo ne aloso piny kenda." 
Isaiah44:25 Ang’eyo jonabi mag miriambo kaachiel gi ranyisigi, bende akuodo wi ajuoke. Adwoko weche joma riek chien, kamiyo riekogi lokore gima nono." 
Isaiah44:26 To weche ma jotichna okoro, amiyo timore, kendo achopo gik ma jootena ochano. Awuoyo kuom Jerusalem ni, ji nochak odag kuno kendo, mi achak alos kuonde mokethore duto kuomgi." 
Isaiah44:27 Nam matut, to awachone niya, ‘Duon! Abiro miyo aoreni two kururu.’" 
Isaiah44:28 To Kuros anyiso niya, ‘Ibiro bedo jakwadha, kendo ibiro timo gik moko duto ma adwaro, kigolo chik mondo ochak oger Jerusalem, mi chak ket mise mag Hekalu kendo.’ ”" 
Isaiah45:1 Ruoth Nyasaye wacho ni Kuros, ruoth moseyiero niya, “Asemako lweti ma korachwich mondo ilo ogendini manie nyimi, kendo iketh teko mag ruodhi, mi iyaw dhorangeye gi dhoudi ma onge kata achiel ma nodong’ ka ochiegi." 
Isaiah45:2 An to anatel nyimi mondo apie gode mogangore. Anatur dhorangeye molos gi mula, kendo nang’ad lodi mag nyinyo." 
Isaiah45:3 Anamiyi mwandu mopandi e mudho, kendo mokan kuonde mopondo, mondo eka ing’e ni an e Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel, ma luongi gi nyingi." 
Isaiah45:4 Aseluongi gi nyingi mana nikech jo-Israel ma nyikwa Jakobo, ma jotichna ma aseyiero. Adier asemiyi nying maduong’, kata obedo ni ok ing’eya." 
Isaiah45:5 An e Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo moro onge. Adier, onge Nyasaye moro mak mana an. Kata obedo ni pok ing’eya, to abiro miyi teko," 
Isaiah45:6 mondo ji man yo wuok chieng’ gi yo podho chieng’ ong’e ni onge Nyasaye moro mak mana an. 
Isaiah45:7 Achueyo ler, kendo achueyo mudho. Akelo gueth, to masira bende an ema akelo. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema atimo mago duto.”" 
Isaiah45:8 Un polo, lwaruru piny, mondo tim makare ochwe ka koth, mi piny nyag olemb warruok, kendo tim makare bende omedre. Mago duto, an Ruoth Nyasaye ema achueyo." 
Isaiah45:9 Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko duto wacho niya, “Mano kaka ng’at mapiem gi jachuechne none malit! Ere kaka agulu dipiem gi ng’ama chueye? Bende lowo dipenj jachuech ni ere gima ochueyo? Koso gima osechue diwach ni jachuech niya, ‘Ikia tich’?" 
Isaiah45:10 Bende nyathi ma koro eka icholo diwach ni wuon gi min ni, ‘Ang’o munywoloni?’ ”" 
Isaiah45:11 An Ruoth Nyasaye ma Ng’ama Ler kendo ma Jachuech Israel awacho kama: “Bende duhedhru penja gimoro kuom nyithinda, kata nyisa gima onego atim?" 
Isaiah45:12 An ema ne achueyo piny, mi aketoe dhano. Ne ayaro polo gi lweta awuon, mi achiko gik moko duto mantie mondo oliel." 
Isaiah45:13 An ema aseting’o Kuros malo mondo okel resruok, kendo abiro rieyo yorene tir. Enochak oger dalana, kendo nogony joga mane oter e tuech, mi bed thuolo, to ok nikech ichule gimoro, kata nikech imiye asoya.”" 
Isaiah45:14 Ruoth Nyasaye owacho niya, “Jotich mag Misri gi joohala mag Nubia kod jo-Sabea ma roboche nobed e bwo lochu, mi lokre wasumbu. Adier, ginibi iru kotuegi gi nyororo, mi gikulrenu ka gimiyou duong’, kendo ka giwacho niya, ‘Chutho Nyasaye ni kodu, kendo Nyasaye moro onge. En kende e Nyasaye.’ ”" 
Isaiah45:15 Adier, in Nyasaye mapondo, A Nyasach Israel ma Jawarwa!" 
Isaiah45:16 Ji duto mapiem kodi piny ochamo kendo ogore nyang’eng’o. Joma payo nyiseche manono lal nono ka wigi okuot. 
Isaiah45:17 Jo-Israel to Ruoth Nyasaye noresi gi resruok mosiko. Piny ok nochak ochamgi, kata ok ginichak gigore nyang’eng’o kendo nyaka chieng’." 
Isaiah45:18 Ruoth Nyasaye ema ne ochueyo polo, kendo oloso piny moguro motegno. Kane ochueye, ne ok oweye chwangla, to nolose mondo ji odagie. En ema owacho kama: An e Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo onge Nyasaye moro." 
Isaiah45:19 Ok awuo ling’ling’, kama opondo e piny motimo mudho, bende pok awacho ni joka Jakobo ni mondo okwaya gima ok asechano ni abiro miyogi. An Ruoth Nyasaye awacho adier. Ahulo mana gik ma ratiro." 
Isaiah45:20 Chokreuru usud machiegni, un joma otony e ogendini. Mano kaka ufuwo, un joma ting’o nyiseche molos gi yien, kendo malamo nyasaye ma ok nyal reso ji." 
Isaiah45:21 Biuru, uwach wachu ane, ka upenjoru ng’ato gi ng’ato. En ng’a mane okoro ni Kuros biro locho kamano? Koso en ng’a mane owacho chon ni gigo biro timore? Donge ne en mana an, Ruoth Nyasaye? Onge nyasaye moro mak man an, man gi loch, kendo manyalo reso ng’ato. Ooyo, onge moro mak mana an." 
Isaiah45:22 Un ogendini manie tung’ piny gi tung’ piny, genuru kuoma, mondo uyud resruok, nimar an e Nyasaye, kendo moro onge." 
Isaiah45:23 An Nyasaye mangima asekuong’ora! Adier, gima owuok e dhoga en adier, kendo ok nyal lokore. Asesingora ka awacho niya, “Ji duto nogona chonggi piny, kendo ng’ato ka ng’ato nokuong’re ni biro luwa.”" 
Isaiah45:24 Ji nowach niya, ‘Ruoth Nyasaye kende ema nigi teko, kendo ema miyo ji locho. Ji duto mapiem kode nochung’ e nyime ka wigi okuot." 
Isaiah45:25 Nyikwa Israel duto nolochi kendo noyud duong’, mana nikech Ruoth Nyasaye.’" 
Isaiah46:1 Nyiseche Babulon ma Bel gi Nebo okulore piny ka luoro omako. Yande ji ting’ogi ating’a ka miyogi duong’, to koro kenje gi jamni ema oting’ogi, ka gilokore ting’ maturo jamni mool!" 
Isaiah46:2 Adier, nyisechego okulore ka luoro omako. Ok ginyal konyo joma lamogi, to gin giwegi ema iting’ogi, kiterogi e tuech!" 
Isaiah46:3 Winjuru, un joka Jakobo, ma aseting’o nyaka ne nywol. Ee, chikuru itu un jo-Israel modong’, ma aseting’o nyaka ne a e ich." 
Isaiah46:4 Kata ka udoko moti, to pod an e En. Adier, kata ka wiu oti lwar, to pod nating’u ating’a. Kaka asechueyou, e kaka abiro ting’ou. Ee, pod abiro ting’ou kendo resou." 
Isaiah46:5 Uparo ni achal gi ng’a? Koso en ng’a marom koda? 
Isaiah46:6 Dupima gi nyasaye ma dhano loso koso? Joma dwaro nyasaye machal kamano kawo dhahabu mang’eny, kendo pimo fedha e ratil, eka gindiko jatheth mondo olosnigigo nyasayeno. Bang’e gilame ka giriere piny e nyime." 
Isaiah46:7 Giting’e e gokgi ka gitere dala, kendo girenje piny, mi ochung’ achung’a kanyo ma ok ong’ingni. Kata ka ng’ato kokne matek manade, to ok onyal dwoke, bende ok onyal rese e chandruok." 
Isaiah46:8 Paruru wachno, mondo utang! Yaye, un joma piem koda, paruru wachno e chunyu." 
Isaiah46:9 Kik wiu wil gi gik mane otimore chon, nimar an Nyasaye, kendo onge moro. Adier, an Nyasaye, kendo onge moro marom koda." 
Isaiah46:10 Anyiso giko mar gimoro mana e kinde ma ochakoree. Nyaka nene asebedo ka ahulo gik ma pok otimore, ka awacho niya, “Gima awacho nyaka timre. Omiyo abiro timo gimoro amora ma adwaro.”" 
Isaiah46:11 Aluongo ng’ato e piny mabor mondo otim gima adwaro. Obiro biro kaka winyo mager, koa yo wuok chieng’. Asewuoyo, kendo abiro timo kaka asewacho. Adier, asechano gima adwaro timo, kendo abiro timogo mak orem." 
Isaiah46:12 Winjauru, un joma chunygi tek, ma paro ni resruok pod bor." 
Isaiah46:13 Akelo resruok mara machiegni. Ok en mabor ngang’! Adier, kony ma akelo ok bi deko. Anares ji Sayun, mondo jo-Israel mamiya duong’ oyud konyruok." 
Isaiah47:1 In Babulon, dala ma pok olo, bed piny e lowo. Ee, in dala maduong’ mar jo-Kaldai, we komlochni, ibed piny e buru. Ji ok nochak odendi ka gima in nyako ma dende yom, kendo mosedak e ngima maber!" 
Isaiah47:2 Kaw nyapong’ mondo ireggo, kendo igol kitamba ma iuomogo wang’i. Lony lawi mabor mirwako, mondo thochi odong’ nono king’ado aore." 
Isaiah47:3 Dugi nonen, kendo wichkuot ma in go nonere e lela." 
Isaiah47:4 Abiro chulo kuor, kendo onge ng’ama notama. Ng’ama Ler mar Israel ma Jawarwa, ma nyinge Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto, owacho kamano." 
Isaiah47:5 Yaye, dala maduong’ mar jo-Kaldai, bed kiling’ thi, kendo gumbi idhiyo e mudho mandiwa, nimar ok nochak oluongi ni min pinje mang’eny." 
Isaiah47:6 Kane mirima omaka gi joga, ne ajwang’ogi ka gima ok gin joga awuon, mi aketogi e tekoni. Ne ok ikechogi, to ne iketo kum mapek koda ka kuom joma oti." 
Isaiah47:7 Ne iwacho niya, “Abiro bedo ruoth nyaka chieng’.” To ne ok iparo gik mane isetimogo, kata gik ma gibiro kelo achien!" 
Isaiah47:8 Emomiyo koro winj wachni, in dala machalo nyako mohero ngima mamalo, kendo obet e kom loch ka ok dew gimoro, to wacho e chunye niya, “An kenda ema antie. Onge ng’at moro machielo marom koda. Ok nachal gi chi liel, kendo nyithinda ok notho ngang’.”" 
Isaiah47:9 To kata obedo ni iparo kamano, to piyopiyo nono gik moko ariyogo notimreni riat odiechieng’ achiel, mi inidong’ chi liel, kendo nyithindi bende notho. Mago duto notimreni, ma kata yiendi mang’enygo ok nokonyi." 
Isaiah47:10 Ne iparo ni onge gima ditimi nikech timbeni mamonogo, mi iwacho niya, “Onge ng’ama nena.” To rieki mathoth ne owuondi, “An kenda ema antie. Onge ng’at moro machielo marom koda.”" 
Isaiah47:11 Kuom mano masira biro maki, kendo ok ning’e kaka dithiedhri. Adier, masira biro nyori, kendo ok ning’e misango minyalo geng’ego. Ee, masira biro poyi, mi tieki pep!" 
Isaiah47:12 Dhi adhiya nyime gi yiendi gogogo, misebedo kitiyogo nyaka ne ia e nyathi, mondo waneye ane ka digikonyi, kata di gibwog ji." 
Isaiah47:13 Isechandori gi jogi mang’adoni rieko kuom ndalo mang’eny, to koro we jokor wach ma rango polo gi sulue, kendo manyisi gik mabiro timore due ka duego, otim ane chir mondo oresi, ka ginyalo!" 
Isaiah47:14 To winji, gichalo tiang’ ma mach wang’o. Ok ginyal kata mana resore gin giwegi e mach, kendo majno ok nobed mach maberber, minyalo bet bute kioyo." 
Isaiah47:15 Kamano e kaka jathieth misechandorigo nyaka ne ia e nyathi biro bet. Moro ka moro nokwang’ kochiko yore owuon, kendo onge ng’ama noresi." 
Isaiah48:1 Winjuru, un joka Jakobo, miluongo ni jo-Israel, kendo ma koth Juda. Ukuong’oru gi nying Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo ulamo Nyasach Israel, to ok ulame gi adiera, kata e yo makare," 
Isaiah48:2 kata obedo ni upakoru ni un jo-Jerusalem, dala maler, ma nyinge en Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto kamano." 
Isaiah48:3 Chon gi lala ne akoro gik ma koro osetimore. Ne ahulogi gi dhoga awuon. Bang’e ne atiyo piyopiyo nono, mi gitimore." 
Isaiah48:4 Ne ang’eyo ni wiu tek ta, ka rwath ma ng’ute opong’, kendo ma pat wang’e tek ka lwanda." 
Isaiah48:5 Mano emomiyo ne ahulonu gigo chon, ka anyisou kapok moro otimore, nikech dipo ka ng’ato kuomu owacho niya, “Nyasacha mane aloso gi chuma ema ne omiyo gitimore.”" 
Isaiah48:6 Usewinjo gima ne awacho, omiyo pareuru maber, eka ubiro yie ni en adier. To koro anyisou gik manyien ma pok ung’eyo, mosebet kopondo." 
Isaiah48:7 Ne ok achueyogi chon, to achueyogi mana e sechegi. Ne ok uwinjogi chon, to uwinjogi mana kawuono, omiyo ok unyal wacho ni useng’eyogi." 
Isaiah48:8 Chutho ne ok ung’eyogi, bende ne ok uwinjogi, nikech ne ok uyawo itu chon, nimar ne ang’eyo ni un joma andhoga ma ok nyal gen, kendo ma jopiem nyaka ne a e ich." 
Isaiah48:9 Kar tiekou to ne aterora mos, mi ageng’o mirimba mana nikech nyinga gi duong’na." 
Isaiah48:10 Asepwodhou, to ok kaka ipwodho fedha e mach." 
Isaiah48:11 Ne atimo kamano nikech nyinga. Ee, mana nikech nyinga awuon, nimar ere kaka dayie mondo nyinga okethre? Ok ayie mondo duong’ ma imiya omi nyasaye moro machielo." 
Isaiah48:12 “Winjauru un joka Jakobo. Ee, chikuru itu, un jo-Israel, un joma aseluongo. An e En. An e mokwongo, kendo an e mogik." 
Isaiah48:13 Ne aketo mise mag piny gi lweta awuon, kendo ne ayaro polo gi lweta ma korachwich. Kane aluongogi to ne githinyore ka diemo wang’." 
Isaiah48:14 Chokreuru un duto, mondo uwinji. Ere nyasachu moro mosehulo gima biro timore, kawacho niya, ‘Ng’at ma ahero ema nokum Babulon kaka adwaro, mi lo jo-Kaldai.’" 
Isaiah48:15 An awuon ema asewacho kamano. Adier, an ema aseluonge, mi akele, omiyo gik mochano duto biro dhi maber." 
Isaiah48:16 Suduru machiegni koda mondo uwinj wachnani: Nyaka nene pok asewuoyo ling’ling’. Chieng’ mane gigo duto chakore ne antie.” (To koro Ruoth Nyasaye oseora, kaachiel gi Roho mare.)" 
Isaiah48:17 Ruoth Nyasaye ma jawaru, kendo ma Ng’ama ler mar Israel, wacho kama: “An Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu. Apuonjou mondo uyud konyruok, kendo atelonu e yo ma onego uluw." 
Isaiah48:18 Dine bed ni uwinjo chikena, to hapu domol ka aora, kendo pok muyudo kuom timu makare dotiak ka pi nam." 
Isaiah48:19 Nyithindu gi nyikwau dobedo mang’eny ka kuoyo mokadho akwana, kendo nyingu ok dong’ad oko, kata ok doruchi e wang’a.”" 
Isaiah48:20 Wuoguru ua Babulon! Ee, ringuru ua kuom jo-Kaldai! Wachuru ni, Ruoth Nyasaye ema osewaro joka Jakobo jotichne. Nyisuru wachno, kuwer gi mor mar loch, kendo kulande e tung’ piny gi tung’ piny." 
Isaiah48:21 Kane otelonigi e thim, to riyo ne ok oloyogi, nikech ne omiyo pi owuok e lwanda. Ee, nobaro lwanda, mi pi obubnie." 
Isaiah48:22 Ruoth Nyasaye owacho ni, “Joricho onge gi kue.”" 
Isaiah49:1 Winjuru, un joma odak e dhonembe kod chulni. Chikuru itu, un ogendini man kuonde maboyo. Ruoth Nyasaye noluonga kapok onywola. Adier, noluonga gi nyinga kapod an ei mama." 
Isaiah49:2 Ne opiago lewa, modoko liganglane mabith, kendo ne opanda e tipo mar lwete. Ne otima asere moywe maler, kendo ne opanda e olalone." 
Isaiah49:3 Ne owachona niya, “In e jatichna, in Israel, oganda ma biro kelona duong’.” Kamano ne ayudo duong’ e nyim Ruoth Nyasacha, kendo ne odoko tekra." 
Isaiah49:4 Chon ne awacho ni asetiyo matek kayiem nono, kendo ni aseketho tekra to onge gima ayudo. To kara Ruoth Nyasaye biro ng’ado bucha kare, kendo pokna mana ni e lwete." 
Isaiah49:5 Koro Ruoth Nyasaye mane ochueya ei mama mondo abed jatichne kendo adwok jo-Israel ma nyikwa Jakobo ire, wacho niya," 
Isaiah49:6 “Tich dwoko jo-Israel ma nyikwa Jakobo mane oke en tich ma in jatichna ihingo. Kuom mano, abiro loki ler mar ogendini, mondo iter warruokna e tung’ piny gi tung’ piny.”" 
Isaiah49:7 Ruoth Nyasaye ma Ng’ama Ler, kendo ma Jawar Israel, wacho ni ng’at ma ji charo, ma ogendini nyono gi tiendgi, kendo ma misumba jotend piny, niya “Ruodhi nochung’ni, ka ikadho. Bende jodongo nokulreni piny nikech Ruoth Nyasaye. En Ruoth Nyasaye ma Ng’ama Ler mar Israel ma oseyieri.”" 
Isaiah49:8 Ruoth Nyasaye wacho kama: “Abiro dwoko kwayoni e kinde mowinjore. Adier, abiro konyi e ndalo mar resruok. Anariti mi achiwi ka ng’ama kelo winjruok e kinda gi ji, mondo ichak idwok piny kare, mi ipog ni ji puothe mojwang’." 
Isaiah49:9 Awacho ni joma ni e tuech niya, ‘Auru, udhi.’ Mago manie mudho bende awachonigi ni, ‘Wuoguru mondo ji oneu.’ Giniyud chiemo kamoro amora ma gidhiye, kata mana e gode gi pewe duto motwo, mana ka gima gin rombe mikwayo maber." 
Isaiah49:10 Kech ok nokagi, kendo riyo ok nologi, bende chieng’ marieny makech ok nomigi olo, nimar Jal ma oherogi ema notelnigi, ka terogi modho e soko ma pi bubnie." 
Isaiah49:11 Anami gode duto lokre yore, kendo anabug yorena madongo duto maber." 
Isaiah49:12 Neuru! Ginibi ka gia kuonde maboyo. Moko noa yo nyandwat gi yo podho chieng’, to moko noa e piny Syene yo milambo.”" 
Isaiah49:13 Un polo gi piny, koguru gi mor! Weruru wende locho, un gode, nimar Ruoth Nyasaye osekueyo chuny joge machandore, kendo obiro kechogi." 
Isaiah49:14 Dala Sayun to wacho niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye osejwang’a. Adier, wi Nyasachwa osewil koda.”" 
Isaiah49:15 To wi dhako bende diwil gi nyathi mane odhodho? Koso wiye diwil adier gi wuode mane onywolo? Kata ka obedo ni wiye nyalo wil, an to wiya ok diwil kodi." 
Isaiah49:16 Ne! Asegori e tat lweta, kendo ohingani osiko neno anena e wang’a." 
Isaiah49:17 Jogo ma geri tiyo piyopiyo. Joma ne omuki mokethi, to ringo dhi!" 
Isaiah49:18 Ting’ wang’i malo mondo irang koni gi koni. Nyithindi chokore ka biro iri. An Ruoth Nyasaye mangima, akuong’ora niya, “Nyithindi nochal gi thiwni ma dhako rwako, kata ka law maber ma miaha rwakorego." 
Isaiah49:19 Kata obedo ni okethi kendo miechi odong’ gundni kamano, to ibiro yudo ni idoko matin, ma ok nyal romo jogi dakie. Bende jogo mane okethi noriemb dhi mabor." 
Isaiah49:20 Nyithindi mane omayi nosik kawachoni niya, ‘Ka eri diny ahinya, omiyo dwarnwa piny malach mondo wadagie!’" 
Isaiah49:21 Bang’e inipenjri niya, ‘Ere kaka ne ayudo nyithindogi duto, to nyithinda duto ne omaya, mi adong’ maonge gi nyithindo? Adier, ne oriemb joga, mi oter e tuech. Koro en ng’a mane opidhogi, ka an to ne adong’ kenda kamacha? Koso ere kaka ne ayudogi duto?’ ”" 
Isaiah49:22 Ruoth Nyasaye wacho niya, “Koro abiro chungo bendera kaka ranyisi mondo aluonggo ogendini mi gibiro kelo nyithindi ka giting’o e korgi kod e gokgi." 
Isaiah49:23 Ruodhi mag ogendnigo, kaachiel gi mondgi ema nobed ka pidho nyithindigo. Ginikulreni piny, mi ginang’ buru manie tiendi. Eka ining’e ni an e Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo ining’e ni ng’ama ogeno kuoma ok noyud wichkuot." 
Isaiah49:24 Bende dima ng’at maratego jok ma osemako? Koso dires joma ng’at makwiny otueyo?” 
Isaiah49:25 An Ruoth Nyasaye to adwoko niya, “Joma otue nogol kata mana kuom ng’at maratego, kendo joma omaki bende nores kuom ng’at makwiny. Anaked gi jogo duto ma kedo kodi, mi ares nyithindi e lwetgi." 
Isaiah49:26 Anachun joma thiri, mondo ocham ringregi giwegi, kendo anami gimer gi rembgi, mana ka joma divai makech omero, mi ji duto nong’e ni an Ruoth Nyasaye ema aresou. An Jawaru, ma Ng’ama Nyalo Gik Moko Duto mar Jakobo.”" 
Isaiah50:1 Ruoth Nyasaye wacho niya, “Un jo-Israel ma nyithinda, en adier ni ne ariembou nikech timbeu maricho, to bende nitie gima nyiso ni nariembou chuth, kaka ng’ato riembo chiege? Koso ng’ato nitie mane achiwoune? Ooyo, ne ang’iewou mana nikech timbeu mamono." 
Isaiah50:2 Kuom mano, ere gima omiyo ne ok ayudo ng’ato, kane abiro iru? Koso kane aluongo, to ere gima omiyo ng’ato ne ok odwoka? Uparo ni bada chiek ma ok nyal warou, kata ni aonge gi teko ma daresugo? Ooyo, ka akok, to nam duono, bende aore lokore piny motwo, mi rech manie igi tho kendo dum marach nikech pi onge." 
Isaiah50:3 Aloko polo doko marateng’ ti, mana ka gima aume gi pien.”" 
Isaiah50:4 Ruoth Nyasaye osemiya lep mar puonj, mondo ang’e kaka anyalo hoyo ng’at ma ojony. Opiago ita mabith gokinyi pile pile, ni mondo achik ita ka ng’at mipuonjo." 
Isaiah50:5 Ruoth Nyasaye oseyawo ita, mi ok asetamora winjo wachne, bende ok aselokora mi aweye." 
Isaiah50:6 Ne aloko dieng’eya ni joma goya, kendo nachiwo tika ni joma dwaro pudho. Wang’a bende ne ok apando kiyanya, kata king’udho kuoma olawo." 
Isaiah50:7 To Ruoth Nyasaye biro konya, omiyo onge ayany moro ma nyalo hinya. Kuom mano aseguro wiya matek ka lwanda, ka ang’eyo ni ok nayud wichkuot," 
Isaiah50:8 bende ang’eyo ni ng’at ma biro pogo wachna kare ni buta. Kuom mano, ng’at ma hedhore piem koda mondo obi waradi! Adier, ng’at ma dwaro kwero wechena mondo owuog ane!" 
Isaiah50:9 Ruoth Nyasaye ema biro chwaka. Koro ere ng’ama biro loya gi bura? Ooyo, mano ok nyalre! Giduto gibiro ti ka law, ma olwenda ochamo." 
Isaiah50:10 Ere ng’ato kuomu moluoro Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo winjo dwond jatichne, bende ma wuotho kuonde motimo mudho, to ok ne ler kata matin? Ng’at ma kamano mondo ogen kuom Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Isaiah50:11 Winjuru, un duto joma kudho mach, kendo moko meny, mi liel. Wuothuru awuotha e ligek mach musekudho kendo e meny ma usemokono! Gima ubiro yudo e lweta e ma; Ubiro rieru piny gi rem malit kutho." 
Isaiah51:1 Winjauru, un duto joma ohero tim makare, kendo ma ogeno kuom Ruoth Nyasaye. Paruru lwanda mane ogolue. Ranguru bur mane okuny, mogoloue" 
Isaiah51:2 Adier, paruru Ibrahim wuonu, kod Sara mane onywolou. Kane aluongo Ibrahim, to ne en mana ng’at achiel kende. Bang’e ne aguedhe, mi amiye odoko oganda maduong’." 
Isaiah51:3 An Ruoth Nyasaye naho chuny Sayun. Adier, anaguedh kuonde modong’ gundni, mi alok kuonde motimo ongoro bed ka Eden, puoth Nyasaye. Mor gi ilo, kaachiel gi erokamano kod wer mamit nopong’ Sayun." 
Isaiah51:4 Winjuru un joga. Chikuru itu, yaye ogandana, nimar abiro golo chik, mi ami adierana bed taya ni ogendini." 
Isaiah51:5 Adiera mara biro machiegni. Ee, resruok ma akelo nenore ratiro. Abiro rito ogendini gi bada motegno, kendo joma odak e pinje manie dhonembe gi chulni biro ng’iya ka gigeno ni abiro ritogi gi tekona." 
Isaiah51:6 Ting’uru wang’u urang polo, nikech polo biro lal ka iro. Piny bende ranguru, nimar piny biro ti ka law, ka ji modakie tho ka lwang’ni, to resruok ma akelo nosiki, kendo teko ma awarogo ji ok norum." 
Isaiah51:7 Winjuru, un joma ong’eyo tim makare kaka obet, kendo ma keto chunygi kuom chikna. Kik uluor achaya mag ji, kendo ayany ma giyanyougo kik gou kibaji," 
Isaiah51:8 nikech ibiro tiekgi, mi girum, mana kaka olwenda tieko law. To an, teko ma awarogo ji nosiki nyaka chieng’. Adier, resruok ma akelo ok norum kuom tienge duto." 
Isaiah51:9 A malo! A malo! Jiw badi motegno, A Ruoth Nyasaye. Jiwri kaka nijiwori chon e ndalo mokadho. Donge in ema nichwowo Ondieg Nam miluongo ni Rahab, mi ing’ado matindotindo?" 
Isaiah51:10 Donge in ema ne idwono pi ataro, mi iloko kuonde matut mag nam obedo yo, mondo joma owar okadhie?" 
Isaiah51:11 Kamano joma Ruoth Nyasaye osewaro noduog dala. Ginidonj Sayun ka gikok gi mor, kendo ka mor mosiko opong’o chunygi. Chutho, giniwuothi ka gimor kendo ka giil. To kuyo gi parruok nolal nono." 
Isaiah51:12 An awuon ema ahoyou. Kuom mano, ere gima omiyo uluoro dhano adhana matho, kendo maonge ndhathe ka lumni?" 
Isaiah51:13 Ere gima omiyo wiu osewil gi Ruoth Nyasaye, ma Jachuechu, mane oyaro polo kendo ochueyo piny? Ere gima omiyo kibaji osiko ka goyou ndalo duto? Koso ang’o momiyo uluoro mirimb ng’at masandou kadwaro tiekou? Uparo ni mirimb ng’at ma sandouno to gima nade!" 
Isaiah51:14 Misumba ma tich turo ibiro gonyo machiegni. Ok enotho, mi odhi e Piny Joma Otho, kata mana chiemo bende ok nochandi." 
Isaiah51:15 An e Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu, mamiyo nam gingore, mi apaka wuo. Nyinga en Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto." 
Isaiah51:16 Aseketo wechena e dhou, mi apandou e tipo mar lweta, ka ayaro polo, kendo ka aketo mise mar piny, bende ka awachonu, un jo-Sayun, ni, “Un e joga.”" 
Isaiah51:17 A malo! A malo, in dala Jerusalem. Ruoth Nyasaye osekumi malit ahinya komiyi kikombe ma mirimbe opong’o imadho. Adier, isemadho kikombe mamero ji, mi ilung’o." 
Isaiah51:18 Kuom yawuowi duto ma isenywolo, onge kata achiel manyalo teloni, Adier, kuom yawuowi duto ma isepidho, onge kata achiel ma ditayi." 
Isaiah51:19 Masiche ariyo osemaki. Achiel en kethruok piny, to machielo en tho mar kech kod lweny. To ere ng’ama nyalo hoyi, kendo duog chunyi?" 
Isaiah51:20 Ruoth Nyasaye okumo yawuoti gi kum mager. Ginindo e yore duto mana ka gima gimer, kendo mana ka le ma obadho omako." 
Isaiah51:21 Emomiyo winji, in miseyudo masira, kendo imer, to ok gi kong’o." 
Isaiah51:22 Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachi kendo ma Ruodhi, ma chwako joge e bura, owacho kama: “Ng’e ni agolo kikombe mamero ji e lweti, mi ok nichak imethi e kikombe mar mirimbano, nikech aweyo kumi." 
Isaiah51:23 To abiro kete e lwet joma sandi kendo thiri, mane owachoni niya, ‘Nind piny mondo wawuoth kuomi.’ Kamano ne inindo piny, mondo dieng’eyi olokre yo ma jowuoth luwo!”" 
Isaiah52:1 A malo! A malo, mondo ibed motegno, in dala Sayun. Rwak lepi mabeyoe moloyo, yaye Jerusalem, dala maler, nimar chakre kawuono, joma ok oter nyangu, kaachiel gi joma ogak, ok nochak odonj kuomi." 
Isaiah52:2 In dala Jerusalem, machalo misumba moriere piny e lowo, a malo iteng’ri mondo buru oa kuomi. Adier, in dala Sayun, machalo nyako ma misumba, gony tonde motuego ng’uti." 
Isaiah52:3 Ruoth Nyasaye wacho ni jo-Israel niya: “Ne ong’iewu, maonge gima ochul kuomu, omiyo koro ibiro warou maonge chudo moro.”" 
Isaiah52:4 Ee, Ruoth Nyasaye wacho kama: “Mokwongo, joga ne odhi Misri mondo odagie, to achien jo-Asuria nosandogi malit kayiem nono." 
Isaiah52:5 To koro, en ang’o ma anenoni? Aneno ka joga okaw nono, maonge gima ochul. Joma ne omakogi goyonigi siboi, kendo odiechieng’ kodiechieng’ gitugo gi nyinga marach." 
Isaiah52:6 To chieng’ resruok, joga nong’e nyinga. Gining’e ni kara en mana an ema wuoyo kodgi.”" 
Isaiah52:7 Mano kaka ji mor ka neno jaote makelo wach maber, ka wuotho ewi gode. Jaote wacho ni gik moko koro dhi maber, kendo olando wach resruok. Bende owacho ni jo-Sayun niya, “Nyasachu e ruoth kuonde duto.”" 
Isaiah52:8 Winjuru! Jorito mau nokog gi mor, nikech gibiro neno Ruoth Nyasaye gi wengegi, ka duogo Sayun." 
Isaiah52:9 Un kuonde mokethore mag Jerusalem, koguru gi mor, nikech unuyud ka Ruoth Nyasaye osekecho joge, kendo owaro Jerusalem." 
Isaiah52:10 Ruoth Nyasaye osenyiso tekone, mana e nyim ogendini duto ka neno, omiyo ji duto modak e tung’ piny koni gi koni none ka Ruoth Nyasaye reso joge." 
Isaiah52:11 Wuoguru! Wuoguru ua Babulon, ka ok umulo gimoro mogak. Adier, un muting’o gik lemo, wuoguru Babulon chuth, kusepwodhoru maler." 
Isaiah52:12 To ok unuwuog kurikni, kendo ok noriembu, nikech Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel ema biro telo nyimu, kendo en bende ema obiro dong’nu chien." 
Isaiah52:13 Winjuru! Jatichna biro dhi nyime maber. Enoting’e malo, kendo nomiye duong’ mang’ongo." 
Isaiah52:14 Kaka ne ji mang’eny obwok ka onene, nikech rem malit oloko wang’e, mi odoko gima ok chal dhano," 
Isaiah52:15 e kaka ogendini mang’eny nobwogi ka onene, kendo ruodhi noling’ thi e nyime, nikech ginine gima ne pok giwinjo." 
Isaiah53:1 En ng’a moseyie wach mwalando? Koso ere ng’ama Ruoth Nyasaye osenyiso tekone? 
Isaiah53:2 Jatich Ruoth Nyasaye nodongo e nyime mana ka yath ma tiendene nie lowo motwo. Ne oonge gi chia, bende ne oonge gi duong’ moro, mane nyalo mako wang’wa, mi mi wahere." 
Isaiah53:3 Ji ne ojare, kendo okwere. Ne ne ng’at ma neno chandruok, kendo mong’iyo gi rem. Adier, ne wajare, mi wakwane ka gima nono, ma, ka ng’ato oneno, to loko wang’e kucha." 
Isaiah53:4 To eka tuochewa ema ne oting’o, kendo chandruokwa ema ne ture. Wan to ne waparo ni masira mane oyudono ne en kum mane Nyasaye omiye nikech richone owuon," 
Isaiah53:5 to kara ne ochwowe mana nikech kethowa. Ee, ne osande nikech richowa. Sand mane oyudo ema kelonwa kue, kendo wachango nikech chwat mane ochwadego." 
Isaiah53:6 Waduto ne waselal mana ka rombe, ka ng’ato ka ng’ato ochiko mana yore owuon, to en ema ne Ruoth Nyasaye oketo kuome richowa duto." 
Isaiah53:7 Ne osande, kendo ne oyie mondo ochwade, to ne ok owacho gimoro, to noling’ thi mana ka rombo mitero kar yeng’o, kata ka rombo manie nyim joma ng’ado yiere." 
Isaiah53:8 Kane osemake, mi ong’adne bura, ne okawe mi otere e tho, to onge ng’ama ne openjo gima omiyo inege. Adier, ne ogole oko e piny joma ngima nikech richo mag jowa." 
Isaiah53:9 Ne en gi jamoko ka otho, kendo ne okunyne bur kama iyikoe joricho, to onge tim mahundu mane osetimo, kata miriambo mane osewuok e dhoge." 
Isaiah53:10 To kata kamano ne en dwaro mar Ruoth Nyasaye ni mondo ogoye, mi kete e chandruok. Ka ochiwo ngimane mondo opwodhgo richo mag joma moko, to enone ka nyithinde dak aming’a, kendo gik ma Ruoth Nyasaye ochano nodhi maber nikech en." 
Isaiah53:11 Bang’ chandruokne duto enone ler, kendo enong’e malong’o ni osetimo gima kare. Kaka jatichna en ng’at makare, omiyo en bende enomi ji mang’eny bedo joma kare, koting’o richogi." 
Isaiah53:12 Kuom mano, anamiye pok kaachiel gi joma dongo, kendo enopog gik moyaki gi joma rateke, nimar ne ochiwore chuth, mi otho, kendo ne okwane kaka achiel kuom joricho, nikech ne oting’o richo ji mang’eny, kochung’ kar joricho e nyim Nyasaye." 
Isaiah54:1 Ruoth Nyasaye owacho niya, “Wer matek, in Jerusalem machalo gi dhako ma migumba mane ok onywol. Adier, kog gi mor, in michalo dhako ma pok muochh okayo, nikech dhako ma chwore oweyo nobed gi nyithindo mang’eny, moloyo dhako man gi dichwo." 
Isaiah54:2 Med odi, obed maduong’. Adier, yar rageng’ mag hembi malach, bende tud tondene obed maboyo, kendo igur loyene obed motegno," 
Isaiah54:3 nimar ibiro nya kuonde duto, kendo nyikwayi noma ogendini pinjegi, mi gidag e mier ma koro owe gundni." 
Isaiah54:4 Kik ibed maluor, kata kik chunyi nyosre, nikech ok niyud wich kuot. Ndalo biro chopo ma wiyi nowilie gi wich kuot mane iyudo ka pod itin, kendo ok nichak ipar chandruok mane ineno kane idong’ chi liel," 
Isaiah54:5 nimar Jachwechni e chwori! Nyinge en Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto. Adier, Jawarni en Ng’ama Ler mar Israel, ma iluongo ni Nyasach piny ngima." 
Isaiah54:6 Ruoth Nyasaye oseduoki ire, mana ka dhako mane oyudo osejwang’ ma chunye lit ahinya, Ruoth Nyasaye penjo niya, Bende ng’ato dijwang’ chiege mane okendo ka en wuowi adier?" 
Isaiah54:7 Chutho, ne ajwang’i kuom kinde manok, to koro abiro dwoki dala gi hera matut." 
Isaiah54:8 Kane mirima ohinga, ne apandoni wang’a kuom ndalo matin, to koro asekechi gi ng’wono mochwere. An Ruoth Nyasaye ma Jawarni ema awacho kamano." 
Isaiah54:9 Gik mosetimore miyo aparo ndalo mag Nowa. Kaka ne akuong’ora e ndalogo ni pi mane oimo piny ok nochak oime kendo, e kaka koro akuong’ora ni mirima ok nochak omaka kodi kendo, bende ok nachak adhawni." 
Isaiah54:10 Kata da bed ni gode madongo lal nono, kendo gode matindo gol, to an herana ok nolal nono, bende singruok mar kue mane atimo ok nogol kuomi. An Ruoth Nyasaye ma kechoi ema awacho kamano." 
Isaiah54:11 “Winji, in Jerusalem, dala mosandi, ma ahiti oyiecho, mi odong’ gunda kokuyo, maonge ng’ama hoyo. Abiro keto mise mari gi kite motegno, mi ageri gi kite mabeyo." 
Isaiah54:12 Diriseni to abiro loso gi kite makwar, mi aket kite mang’ang’ni e dhorangeyeni, kendo ager ohingani gi kite ma nengogi tek." 
Isaiah54:13 Ruoth Nyasaye ema nopuonj joma geri duto, kendo nyithindi nodhi nyime maber ahinya." 
Isaiah54:14 Enogeri e mise mar tim makare, kendo inibed mabor gi kuonde mithiroe ji, omiyo ok nibed maluor, bende nibed mabor gi masiche, mi ok ginisud machiegni kodi." 
Isaiah54:15 Ka ipo ni ng’ato omonji, to ok nakonye. Adier, ng’ato ang’ata momonji norum, nikech aheri." 
Isaiah54:16 An ema achueyo jatheth ma chwako chuma e mach, eka othedhogo gi lweny. Bende an ema achweyo jolweny ma kedo gi gigo, ka kethogo gik moko." 
Isaiah54:17 To koro onge gir lweny molosi ni mondo ohinyi, ma nohinyi, bende inilo buche duto modonjnie. Mano e pok ma jotich Ruoth Nyasaye yudo. Adier, mano e gueth ma asemiyogi. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano.”" 
Isaiah55:1 Winjuru! Un duto, ma riyo oloyo! Biuru mondo umodhi. Un joma onge gi chiemo, biuru ung’iew chiemo ucham. Ee, biuru ukaw akawa divai gi chak nono, ma ok uchulo gimoro." 
Isaiah55:2 Ere gima omiyo ung’iewo chiemo ma ok konyu, kuketho mwandu kuom gima ok nyal yieng’ou? Ka uchiko itu, mi uwinjo gima awacho, to ubiro chamo chiemo mabeyo, mi uwinj ndhath gima uchamo." 
Isaiah55:3 Biuru ira mondo uchik itu ni gima awacho. Adier, winjuru wachna mondo ubed mangima. Eka abiro timo kodu singruok mochwere, ka asingora ni abiro herou gi chunya duto, kaka ne ahero Daudi." 
Isaiah55:4 Ne akete mondo obed jaote ni ogendini duto. Ee, nakete jatelo kendo japuonj ji." 
Isaiah55:5 Kamano un bende unuluong ogendini ma ok ung’eyo mondo obi, mi ogendini ma ok ong’eyou noring ka biro iru, nikech Ruoth Nyasaye ma Ng’ama Ler mar Israel, osemiyou duong’." 
Isaiah55:6 Dwaruru Ruoth Nyasaye kapod kinde nitie minyalo yudego. Adier, ywagneuru ka pod en machiegni." 
Isaiah55:7 Joma timbegi mono mondo owe timbegi maricho kod paro mochido. Onego giduog ir Ruoth Nyasaye mondo okechgi. Adier, onego giduogi ir Nyasachwa, nimar nong’wonnigi richogi duto." 
Isaiah55:8 Ruoth Nyasaye wacho niya, “Parou ok e parona, bende yoreu ok e yorena," 
Isaiah55:9 nimar kaka polo bor moyombo piny, e kaka yorena bende boyo moyombo mau, kendo e kaka parona bende boyo moyombo parou." 
Isaiah55:10 Bende kaka koth chue, kendo pe lwar, koa e polo, mi ok chak dog malo kendo, to miyo mana piny ng’ich, mondo cham otwi, mi thiew kendo nyagi, mi kodhi ma ichwoyo kod cham, bedie," 
Isaiah55:11 e kaka wach mawuok e dhoga nochal, ok noduog ira ka pok otiyo tije, to enotim gima ne ochano, mi ochop ote mane aoree." 
Isaiah55:12 Adier, unuwuog Babulon gi mor kod kue, kendo kuonde mukadhoe, gode madongo gi matindo nogo mahu gi mor. Yien duto mae thim bende nopam lwetgi." 
Isaiah55:13 Kuonde ma koro pedo gi kudho nitie, yien mabeyo ema biro dongoe. Mano nomi Ruoth Nyasaye bedo gi huma ma ok nyal lal, kendo nobed rapar mosiko nyaka chieng’.”" 
Isaiah56:1 Ruoth Nyasaye wacho niya, “Rituru chik, kendo beduru gi timbe makare, nimar piyopiyo nono resruok ma akelo biro, mi timna makare nonere ratiro kolocho." 
Isaiah56:2 Jal matimo kamano mak oweyo, kendo momako wechego ndalo duto, en jahawi. Adier, ng’at morito Sabato mondo kik kethie, bende ma ok tim gimoro marach, en jahawi." 
Isaiah56:3 “Ng’at ma japiny moro moseyie kuom Ruoth Nyasaye kik luor, kawacho e chunye niya, ‘Adier, Ruoth Nyasaye biro poga kuom joge nyaka chieng’.’ Ng’ama buoch bende kik wachi ni, ‘An ok an gimoro, to an mana yath ma ok nyagi,’" 
Isaiah56:4 nikech an Ruoth Nyasaye awacho kama: Joma buoch marito Sabato maga, kendo mayiero mondo otim gik ma adwaro, bende morito singruok ma asetimo kodgi," 
Isaiah56:5 noyud gima ber moloyo yudo nyithindo. Giniyud rapar e oda kendo e ohingana. Adier, abiro miyogi nying’ mosiko, ma ok rum nyaka chieng’." 
Isaiah56:6 “Kamano bende e kaka an Ruoth Nyasaye, awacho ni jopinje mamoko ma oyie kuoma ka lama, kendo ohero nyinga, bende mobedo jotichna morito Sabato mondo kik kethie, kendo morito singruok ma atimo kodgi." 
Isaiah56:7 Awachonigi ni anakelgi e goda maler, mi ami gibed mamor e oda mar lemo, kendo nayie gi gik ma giwacho e kendona-mar-misango, kaachiel gi misengni ma gitimona, nikech noluong oda ni, Od Lemo mar ogendini duto.”" 
Isaiah56:8 An Ruoth Nyasaye machoko jo-Israel moke, awacho kama: “Ji duto mane odong’ mak ochoki, pod abiro dwoko dala.”" 
Isaiah56:9 Biuru mondo uchiem un le mae pap kod mae thim," 
Isaiah56:10 nikech jotend Israel duto chalo gi jorito ma muofni, ma ok ne gimoro. Giduto gichalo gi guogi ma momni ma ok nyal gueyo. Gihero nindo ka giriere piny, ka gileko" 
Isaiah56:11 Adier, gichalo guogi mowuor ma ok yieng’! Gin jokwath ma ok ong’eyo gimoro. Moro ka moro dhi e yore owuon, kadwaro ohande kamoro amora monyalo yudee." 
Isaiah56:12 Ng’ato ka ng’ato kuomgi wacho niya, “Biuru wamany divai kod kong’o makech, mondo wamadh, wamer. Kiny bende nobed maber mana kama, kata moloyo ma.”" 
Isaiah57:1 Ji makare tho, to onge ng’ama dewo. Bende joma oyie kuom Nyasaye iwito kucha, to onge ng’ama penjo. Adier, richo ema yueyo joma kare oko," 
Isaiah57:2 to kata kamano, gidonjo kama okue. Giseluwo yo moriere tir, mi koro ginindo gi kue e kar yueyo mogik." 
Isaiah57:3 To un nyithind ajuoga, biuru ka! Ee, un koth ng’at ma jaterre kod dhako ma jamganga, suduru machiegni!" 
Isaiah57:4 En ng’a, mujaro, kumoyone wang’u kendo kumilone lewu? Donge un nyithindo monywol e richo, ma koth miriambo?" 
Isaiah57:5 Uoworu gi nyiseche manono e tiend yien mang’ich duto, kendo uwang’o nyithindu ka misengni e hohni, kendo e kind lwendni maboyo." 
Isaiah57:6 To in oganda Israel, kar dak mopogni ni e hoho motimo lwendni mapoth. Kuno ema itimoe misengni miolo piny ni nyiseche manono, kendo ema ichiwoe misengni mag cham. Iparo ni dawe mak asin gi gigo koso?" 
Isaiah57:7 Bende ewi got moro marabora e kama isedwanyorie. Kuno bende iseidhoe mitimoe misengni," 
Isaiah57:8 kendo isechungoe nyisecheni manono e ng’e dhoudi kod e lemb dhoudi. Adier, iseweya mabor, mi ichalo nyako molonyore duk, kendo inindo e kitanda malach ma iseloso, ka itimo winjruok gi chwo, mana nikech mor mar nindo kodgi kaachiel, kidwanyori kodgi ndalo mang’eny ma ok kwan, ka dendi oowi." 
Isaiah57:9 Ne iwirori gi modhi mondo ilomb nyasaye manono miluongo ni Molek, kendo ne ibukori gi poda mang’eny mang’ue ng’ar, mi ioro jooteni kuonde maboyo, koda ka e Pinje Joma Otho." 
Isaiah57:10 Kata obedo ni ne iol gi wuoth mabor kamano, to ne ok iwacho niya, “Gima atimoni onge gi tiende.” Ne ineno ka tekoni oduogo, mi ok inyisori." 
Isaiah57:11 To en ng’a ma iluoro ahinya, ma omiyo iweya, ma ok inyal para, kata mana rwaka e chunyini? Koso idagi luora nikech ne ineno ka aling’ aling’a, mi achalo ng’ama ok oneni?" 
Isaiah57:12 To koro abiro kwedo timni marach ma iparo ni berno! 
Isaiah57:13 Nyisecheni manonogo ok nokonyi ka iywak. Adier, onge nyasaye moro amora ma noresi. Yamo notergi mabor giduto. Ee, kata mana muya matin nono nokudhgi, mi tergi mabor. To joma oloka kar konyruokgi nokaw piny, kendo goda maler nobed mwandugi." 
Isaiah57:14 Bang’e unuwinj dwol ka wacho niya, “Buguru ndara. Bugeuru, kendo loseuru maber, kugolo gik moko duto ma dichwany joga.”" 
Isaiah57:15 Ng’ama Duong’ Moloyo, ma nyinge Ng’ama Ler, kendo mosiko nyaka chieng’ wacho kama: “Adak kama ler kendo man malo, gi joma chunygi obolore kendo muol, mondo aduog chuny joma muol, kendo ajiw teko mar joma obolore." 
Isaiah57:16 Ok anabed kadhaw ndalo duto, bende ok anabed kakecho nyaka chieng’, nimar ka da bed ni atimo kamano, to ji duto mane achueyo ditho." 
Isaiah57:17 Kuom kinde moko, ne akecho ka aneno ketho jo-Israel. Ne agoyogi ka mirima oloya, mi apandonigi wang’a, to ne giringo ka joneko, mi gidhi kuma gin ema gihero." 
Isaiah57:18 Aseneno timbegi, to pod abiro mana changogi, mi aho chunygi, kendo amigi yueyo maber, bende anakue chuny jogi maywak.”" 
Isaiah57:19 An Ruoth Nyasaye awacho niya, “Kue mondo obedie ni joma ni mabor, kendo ni joma ni machiegni, nikech abiro changogi." 
Isaiah57:20 To joricho chalo gi nam moduwore. Adier, gichalo mana nam ma ok nyal kue, ma pige olokore mana chuodho gi yugi.”" 
Isaiah57:21 An Nyasaye awacho niya, “Joricho onge gi kue.”" 
Isaiah58:1 Gouru koko matek mak uweyo, kuywak mana ka tung’. Huluru ni joga kethogi. Adier, nyisuru joka Jakobo richogi." 
Isaiah58:2 Kata obedo ni gin joricho kamano, to pod gidwara pilepile, kendo gihero ng’eyo yorena, mana ka oganda ma timo gik makare, kendo ma ok oweyo chik Nyasaye. Gikwaya mondo amigi chike makare, kendo giwacho ni gimor ka gisudo machiegni koda." 
Isaiah58:3 Gipenja niya, “Ere gima omiyo watueyo chiemo ka in to ok ine mano? Koso ang’o momiyo wasandore ka in to ok ine?” An to adwokogi niya, “Winjuru! Chieng’ ma utueyo chiemo, to utimo gik ma un uwegi ema udwaro, kendo jotichu ema uturo gi tich matek." 
Isaiah58:4 Kuom mano tueyo chiemo ma utueyo, kelo mana miero gi lweny, kendo miyo ji goyo joma odhier adhong’. Emomiyo tueyo chiemo mutueyono, ok nomi winj dwondu e polo malo." 
Isaiah58:5 Uparo ni kit tueyo chiemo ma ayiego en mana sando ringruok, ka ng’ato okulo wiye piny ka togo, kata ka onindo e pien gugru mopedho e buru? Koso mano e gima uluongo ni tueyo chiemo adier? Koso mano e chieng’ ma an Ruoth Nyasaye ayiego?" 
Isaiah58:6 Donge kit tueyo chiemo ma adwaro en ni mondo ugony tonde mag richo, kendo utur jok duto, mondo joma isando oyud yueyo?" 
Isaiah58:7 Koso donge en ni mondo upog chiembu ni joma kech ohewo, kendo urwak joma odhier, ma onge kuonde dak, e miechu, bende umi joma wuotho duk lewni, kendo kik upand wang’u ni wedeu?" 
Isaiah58:8 Kutimo kamano eka ler ma un go noyawre mana ka ru piny, kendo unubed mangima mana ka adhola mosechango. Timbeu uwegi makare ema notelnu, kendo duong’ maler mar Ruoth Nyasaye ema nodong’nu chien." 
Isaiah58:9 Bang’e ka uluongo, to Ruoth Nyasaye nodwoku. Adier, ka uywakne, to nodwoku niya, ‘An ka,’ Ka uweyo sando ji, kendo uweyo achaya kod hango ji kayiem," 
Isaiah58:10 mi umiyo joma kech kayo chiemo, kendo ukonyo joma thagore gi gik ma gichando, to ler ma un go norieny e mudho, kendo kata mana tipou nobed maler ka odiechieng’." 
Isaiah58:11 Ruoth Nyasaye ema nobed ka telonu pilepile, kokonyou kuonde motwo. Enomi dendu bed mojing’, mi uchal gi puodho mang’ich maber, kata ka soko ma pige ok duon." 
Isaiah58:12 “Nyithindu munywolo nochak oger kuonde ma nodong’ gundni mana ewi mise machon, mi noluongu ni, joger ohinga momukore, kendo ni, jolos udi mane okethi.”" 
Isaiah58:13 Ka urito chieng’ Sabato maler, ma ok utiyo tijeu uwegi, kendo ka ok utimo gik ma un ema udwaro chieng’no, to uhulo ni chieng’no en chieng’ mor, kendo chiengg’ mowal ni Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo umiyo Ruoth Nyasaye duong’ kuom weyoo loko ohala, kendo kuweyo weche manono," 
Isaiah58:14 to unubed moil kuom Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo enoteru ewi piny kama oting’ore, ka ulocho, bende enomiu mwandu mane osingore ni nomi Jakobo kwaru. Ruoth Nyasaye ema owacho kamano." 
Isaiah59:1 Bad Ruoth Nyasaye ok chiek, ma ok nyal reso ji, bende ite ok odino, ma ok onyal winjo wach," 
Isaiah59:2 to richou ema opogo kindu gi Nyasachu. Adier, richou ema osemiyo opandonu wang’e, mondo kik owinj kwayou." 
Isaiah59:3 Lwetu omienore gi remo, kendo usemulo richo. Miriambo bende wuok e dhou, kendo lew hango wach." 
Isaiah59:4 Onge ng’ama donjo ni wadgi e yo makare, kata ma yalo bura gi adiera, to ji duto ogeno kuom weche manono kod miriambo. Gichano weche maricho e chunygi, ma bang’e nywolo mana chandruok." 
Isaiah59:5 Gibutno e tong thuonde, kendo gichueyo mbup otieng’. To chamie tong’go ane, ka ok ditho! Kata temie kitoyo moro, mak ineno ka thuol ema owuokie!" 
Isaiah59:6 Mbupgi ok nyal chuego nanga, kendo onge ng’ama nyalo rwako gik ma gichueyo! Tichgi kelo mana chandruok, kendo lwetgi odich mana gi timbe mahundu." 
Isaiah59:7 Tiendgi rikni ka gidhi timo richo, kendo giyot ni chuero remo maonge ketho. Paro mopong’o chunygi en mana paro mamono, kendo kamoro amora ma gidhiyoe, to masira gi chandruok ema dong’ie." 
Isaiah59:8 Ok ging’eyo yo makelo kue, kendo adiera onge e timbegi. Bende yore duto ma giluwo ogondore ogondore, kendo ng’ama luwo yorego ok yud kue kata matin." 
Isaiah59:9 Mano ema omiyo adiera bor kodwa, kendo tim makare ok chop kuomwa. Wagombo mondo wane ler, to mudho lilo ema waneno. Adier, wadwaro mondo piny oru, to mudho mandiwa ema wawuothoe." 
Isaiah59:10 Wamulo amula kor udi ka muofni. Adier, watuomore atuoma ka joma ok nen. Wachwanyore godiechieng’, mana ka gima piny oimore. Chutho wachalo mana joma otho e kind joma ngima." 
Isaiah59:11 Wang’ur mana ka ondiegi, kendo waywagore malit mana ka tula. Wageno yudo adiera, to ok wayudi. Warito resruok to pod en mabor ahinya." 
Isaiah59:12 Richowa osebedo ka medore ameda e nyim Nyasaye. Chutho timbewa mamono ema nyiso ni wan joricho. Wang’eyo timbewa mamono kendo waparogi. 
Isaiah59:13 Waseng’anyo, mi waketho e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye. Adier, wasedok chien, mi wajwang’o Nyasachwa. Bende waseparo weche mag miriambo e chunywa, kendo mago ema wawuondogo ji." 
Isaiah59:14 Bura makare ogol oko, kendo tim makare ni kuma bor. Adiera bende onge kata mana e chirni, kendo bura makare orumo e ut bura chuth." 
Isaiah59:15 Kuom mano, adiera olal nono, kendo ka ng’ato obet motang’ ni richo, to ikwane mana ka janeko! Ruoth Nyasaye noneno ni adiera onge, omiyo iye nowang’." 
Isaiah59:16 Noneno ni onge ng’ama dikony, mi mirima mager omake. Mano omiyo ne olocho gi tekone owuon, kendo adierane ema ne okonyorego." 
Isaiah59:17 Ne orwakore gi tim makare ka law akor mar nyinyo, kendo ne orwako warruok ka ogut lweny. Bende ne orwako chulo kuor ka ng’ama rwako law, kendo mirima mager ema ne obolo kuome ka law abola." 
Isaiah59:18 Obiro timo ni ng’ato ka ng’ato mana gima oromo gi timbene. Ee, obiro kumo wasike gi mirima mager, kata mana mago modak e dhonembe gi chulni." 
Isaiah59:19 Kamano ji man yo podho chieng’ gi joma ni yo wuok chieng’ noluor nying Ruoth Nyasaye, kod duong’ne maler, nimar enobi ka aora ma mwomore, ma much Ruoth Nyasaye ema tero." 
Isaiah59:20 Enobi ka jawar mar Sayun. Ee, nobi mondo ores nyikwa Jakobo moseweyo richogi. Ruoth Nyasaye ema owacho kamano." 
Isaiah59:21 To bende Ruoth Nyasaye wacho niya, “Singruok ma abiro timo kodgi e ma: Roho mara man kuomu, kod wechena ma aseketo e dhou, nosik kodu chakre kawuono, nyaka kuom tienge duto mabiro mag nyikwau. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano.”" 
Isaiah60:1 In dala Jerusalem, a malo! Rieny nikech lerni osechopo, kendo duong’ maler mar Ruoth Nyasaye oselor kuomi." 
Isaiah60:2 Kata obedo ni mudho biro umo piny, mi ogendini bed e mudho mandiwa, to Ruoth Nyasaye norieny kuomi, mi duong’ne maler nonenre kuomi." 
Isaiah60:3 Ogendini gi ruodhigi nobi e lerni mathinyore. 
Isaiah60:4 Ting’ wang’i mondo irang koni gi koni. Nyithindi duto chokore ka biro iri. Adier, yawuoti biro koa kuma bor, kaachiel gi nyigi, koik e bathe." 
Isaiah60:5 Kineno kamano to inibed mamor, mi chunyi pong’ gi ilo. Mwandu mogundho mag ogendini mopogore opogore nokelni gi yiedhi." 
Isaiah60:6 Ngamia mang’eny moa Midian gi Efa nopong’ pinyi. Giduto ginia Sheba ka gikelo dhahabu kod ubani, kendo ka gipako Ruoth Nyasaye gi wer." 
Isaiah60:7 Jamni duto mag Kedar nochokni. Rombe mag Nebayoth bende nobed jamni mitimogo misengni ma ayiego e kendona mar misango, mi duong’ maler mar Hekalu mara nomedre." 
Isaiah60:8 Mago gin ang’o ma kwang’ ka boche polo, kata mahuyo ka akuche maduogo e odgigo?" 
Isaiah60:9 Gin yiedhi moa e pinje manie dhonembe kod chulni, ma biro ka yiedhi madongo mag Tarshish otelonigi. Gikelo yawuoti moa kuma bor, ka nigi dhahabu kod fedha, ma gibiro miyogo nying Ruoth Nyasaye, ma Ng’ama Ler mar Israel duong’, nimar osemiyi duong’." 
Isaiah60:10 A Jerusalem, jopinje mamoko ok nochak oger ohinga mari, kendo ruodhigi nobed jotichni. Kata obedo ni ne asandi malit ka an gi mirima kamano, to koro asekechi, kendo ang’wononi." 
Isaiah60:11 Dhorangeyeni biro siko koyaw, kendo ok nochieggi godiechieng’ kata gotieno, mondo ji okelni mwandu mag ogendini, ka ruodhigi otelonigi." 
Isaiah60:12 Ogendini gi pinje motamore tiyoni biro lal nono, mi kethre chuth." 
Isaiah60:13 Yien mabeyo mag Lebanon bende nokelni, mondo omedgo duong’ maler mar Hekalu mara, ma en raten tienda." 
Isaiah60:14 Yawuot joma ne sandi biro miyi duong’. Adier, joma ne chari biro kulore e tiendi. Giniluongi ni ‘Dala Ruoth Nyasaye’, kendo ni ‘Sayun Dala mar Ng’ama Ler mar Israel’." 
Isaiah60:15 Isebedo dala mojwang’ kendo ma ji ochayo, maonge ng’ama lim, to koro abiro miyo ibedo dala man gi duong’ mosiko, ma kelo ni ji mor ma ok rum." 
Isaiah60:16 Iniyud mwandu mag ogendini koda ka mago mag ruodhi. Kamano ining’e ni an, Ruoth Nyasaye e jaresni. Adier, jawarni en Ng’ama Nyalo Gik Moko Duto, ma Nyasach Jakobo." 
Isaiah60:17 Kar mula anakelni dhahabu, to kar nyinyo anakel fedha. Kar yien anakel mula, kendo kar kite anakel nyinyo, bende anami jotendi tiyo gi kue kod tim makare." 
Isaiah60:18 Timbe mahundu ok nochak owinji kendo e pinyi, kata mana tulo moro marach ok nochak omuoch machiegni kodi. To iniluong ohinga mari ni, ‘Resruok.’ Dhorangeyeni to iniluong ni, ‘Pak.’"
