Isaiah60:19 Wang’ chieng’ ok nochak obedni ler mar odiechieng’, kata due ok nochak orienyni gotieno, to Ruoth Nyasaye ema nobedni ler mosiko. Nyasachi nobedni duong’ maler." 
Isaiah60:20 Wang’chieng’ ok nochak opodhi, kendo dueyi bende ok notho, nikech Ruoth Nyasaye ema nobedni ler mosiko, mi ndaloni mar ywak norum." 
Isaiah60:21 Jogi duto nobed joma kare, kendo piny nobed margi nyaka chieng’. Ginichal gi bad yath ma an ema apidho gi lweta awuon, mondo okelna duong’." 
Isaiah60:22 Ji manok nolokre gana apar, kendo oganda matin nolokre oganda maduong’. An Ruoth Nyasaye anami gino timre piyopiyo nono, ka kindene ochopo." 
Isaiah61:1 Roho mar Ruoth Nyasaye ni kuoma, nikech Ruoth Nyasaye oseyiera, mowira mondo aland wach maber ni joma odhier. Oseora mondo akue chuny jogo ma neno masira, bende mondo ahul ni joma omaki ni koro gin thuolo, kendo ahul ni joma otue ni koro ogonygi." 
Isaiah61:2 Bende oseora mondo ahul ni ma e higa ma Ruoth Nyasaye biro guedhoe joge, kod chieng’ ma Nyasachwa biro chuloe kuor." 
Isaiah61:3 Abiro hoyo chuny ji duto man gi lit, kendo gik ma abiro miyogi e magi: Maua mabeyo, kar buru ma gibukorego; kendo mor, kar lit ma gin go, kod pak, kar bedo gi chuny mool. Enoluonggi ni, yien mag tim makare, ma Ruoth Nyasaye opidho mondo oyudgo duong’." 
Isaiah61:4 Ginichak giger kuonde mane omukore, kendo ginichak gilos mier mane okethore chon. Adier, ginilos mier mane okethore, modong’ gundni kuom higni mang’eny," 
Isaiah61:5 Jopinje mamoko nobed jokwadh jambu, kendo ginipur puotheu, mi gilwer mzabipu." 
Isaiah61:6 To un, noluongu ni, ‘Jodolo mag Ruoth Nyasaye’, kendo ni, ‘Jotich Nyasachwa’. Unucham mwandu mag ogendini mamoko, bende unukaw gigi mabeyo, mi ukonyrugo." 
Isaiah61:7 Kar bedo gi wichkuot, to unuyud pok nyadiriyo, kendo kar yudo achaya, to unubed mamor gi poku. Kamano unuyud pok nyadiriyo e pinyu, mi ubed gi mor mochwere," 
Isaiah61:8 nimar an Ruoth Nyasaye ahero adiera, to amon gi mecho kod timbe mamono. Omiyo abiro miyou pok ma ok lokre, mi atim kodu singruok mochwere." 
Isaiah61:9 Nyikwau nong’ere, kendo noyud duong’ e kind ogendini. Ji duto monenogi nong’e ni un oganda ma Nyasaye oguedho." 
Isaiah61:10 Wabeduru mamor kuom Ruoth Nyasaye gi tekowa duto. Adier wabed moil kuom Nyasachwa, nimar oserwakowa gi warruok mana ka ng’ama orwako nanga, bende oboyowa gi tim makare ma ka ng’ama obo gi law, kendo mana ka wuon kisera magawo maua e ng’ute, kata ka miaha morwako thiwni mabeyo." 
Isaiah61:11 Kaka lowo miyo cham twi, kendo kaka cham mae puodho thiewo, e kaka Ruoth Nyasaye bende nomi tim makare kod pak thiew e nyim ogendini duto." 
Isaiah62:1 In Sayun aheri, omiyo ok analing’. Adier, aheri in Jerusalem, omiyo ok nawe wuoyo, nyaka chop resi, mi resruokni rieny ka taya maliel." 
Isaiah62:2 Ogendini none ni oseresi, kendo ruodhi duto bende none kaka osemiyi duong’. Bang’e noluongi gi nying manyien, ma Ruoth Nyasaye owuon ema nochaki." 
Isaiah62:3 Inibed kondo maber e lwet Ruoth Nyasaye. Adier, inibed osimb ruoth e lwet Nyasachi." 
Isaiah62:4 Ji ok nochak oluongi kendo ni, ‘Dala Mojwang’’. Piny bende ok nochak oluongi kendo ni, ‘Piny Mowe.’ To noluongi ni ‘Dala Ma Amorgo’, kendo noluong pinyi ni, ‘Dhako mokendi’, nimar Ruoth Nyasaye mor kodi, kendo pinyi nochal gi dhako man gi chwore." 
Isaiah62:5 Kaka wuowi kendo nyako, e kaka Jal mane ogeri biro kendi. Adier, kaka ng’at mokendo, mor gi chiege, e kaka Nyasachi nobed mamor kodi." 
Isaiah62:6 A Jerusalem, aseketo jorit e ohinga mari. Ok giling’ odiechieng’ gotieno duto. Awachonigi niya, “Un joma paro ni Ruoth Nyasaye wach, kik uyue!" 
Isaiah62:7 Kata en bende kik uwe oyue, nyaka chop ami Jerusalem bed dala marahuma ma ji duto pako.”" 
Isaiah62:8 Ruoth Nyasaye osekuong’ore koting’o bade ma korachwich man gi teko, kowacho niya, “Ok nachak ayie wasiki kaw chambi ocham. Jopinje mamoko bende ok nochak omadh divai ma isetiyone matek." 
Isaiah62:9 To jogo mosekeyo ema nocham cham ma gisekayo, kendo ginipak Ruoth Nyasaye. Bende jogo mosepono olemb mzabibu nomadh divai e laru mar Hekalu mara.”" 
Isaiah62:10 Wuoguru! Wuoguru e dhorangach mondo ulos ni joga yo. Buguru yo. Bugeuru maber, kendo goluru kite. Bang’e ting’uru bandera mondo ji one." 
Isaiah62:11 Wach ma Ruoth Nyasaye osebedo ka lando e tung’ piny gi tung’ piny ema: “Nyisuru jo-Sayun ni, ‘Jaresu biro.’ Obiro gi joge mogonyo e lweny kawuotho e nyime, ka gik ma oyako." 
Isaiah62:12 Noluonggi ni, ‘Joma owal’, kendo ni, ‘Joma Ruoth Nyasaye osewaro’, kendo ni, ‘Dala ma ok ojwang’.’ ”" 
Isaiah63:1 Mano ng’a, mabiro koa Bozra e piny Edom, ka lepe otimo remono? Orwakore gi lep duong’, kendo owuotho gi tekone duto. “An Ruoth Nyasaye ema abiro, ka ahulo ni Jerusalem oseresi, kendo an ema an gi teko mar waro ji.”" 
Isaiah63:2 To ere gima omiyo lepi duto kwar, mana ka lep ng’ama nyono mzabibu ka biyo?" 
Isaiah63:3 “Gikwar kamano nikech asenyono mzabibu kenda kar bicho. Onge ng’ato kata achiel kuom ogendini mane ni koda. Ne anyono wasika piny ka akecho. Adier, ne anyonogi ka an gi mirima mager, mi rembgi okirore e lepa. Mano ema omiyo lepa duto otimo remo." 
Isaiah63:4 Ne asechano chieng’ ma achuloe kuor, kendo higa ma aresoe joga osechopo." 
Isaiah63:5 Ne arango ng’ama dikonya, to ne ok ayudo. Kuom mano ne adhier nono, kane ayudo ni onge ng’ama nyalo konya. To kata kamano tekona awuon ne omiyo alocho, kendo mirimba awuon ema ne okonya." 
Isaiah63:6 Ne anyono ogendini piny ka akecho. Ee, ne atong’ogi atong’ogi, mi rembgi obubni piny.”" 
Isaiah63:7 Abiro pako ber mar Ruoth Nyasaye kod timbene madongo miwuoro ka agoyo erokamano kuom gik moko duto mosetimonwa, kendo kuom hera maduong’ moseherowago wan jo-Israel. Notimonwa kamano nikech ng’wonone kod herane mogundho." 
Isaiah63:8 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho niya, “Jogi gin joga adier. Gin yawuota ma ok nyal wuonda.”" 
Isaiah63:9 Omiyo ne odoko jaresgi e chandruok duto. Onge jaote kata malaika moro mane oresogi, to mana en ema osebedo ka owarogi gi herane kod ng’wonone, koting’ogi nyaka nene." 
Isaiah63:10 To kata kamano, ne gidagi lochne, mi gimiyo Roho mare maler okuyo, eka ne olokore jasikgi, mi okedo kodgi en owuon." 
Isaiah63:11 Bang’e ne giparo ndalo machon mi gipenjore niya, “Ere Nyasaye mane ogolo joge e aora Nael, ka Musa otelonigi? Adier, ere Jal mane oketo Roho mare kuomgi," 
Isaiah63:12 kendo mane otiyo gi tekone mang’ongo e dir Musa korachwich, mobarogo pi e nyimgi, mondo nyinge oyud duong’ mochwere?" 
Isaiah63:13 Ne omiyo ging’ado nam mayot, mana kaka faras ng’ado thim," 
Isaiah63:14 kendo mana kaka jamni ridore e holo to ok chwanyre. Roho mar Ruoth Nyasaye notelonigi ka gidhi kar yueyo. Mano e kaka ne otelo ni joge mondo nyinge oyud duong’.” 
Isaiah63:15 A Ruoth Nyasaye, rang piny gie polo mondo ine. Ee, rang piny gi kuma ler ma idakie gi duong’. Tinde ere hera matut ma yande iherowago cha? Koso ere tekoni kod kinda mane in go chon?" 
Isaiah63:16 In e wuonwa, omiyo kik idagi konyowa. Kata obedo ni Ibrahim ok ong’eyowa, kendo Israel ok oyie ni wan joge, to in Ruoth Nyasaye, in e wuonwa, kendo in e jawarwa nyaka nene." 
Isaiah63:17 A Ruoth Nyasaye, ere gima omiyo iweyowa aweya, mi wabaro waweyo yoreni? Koso ang’o momiyo imiyo chunywa doko matek, mondo kik waluori? Duogi nikech wan, wan jotichni. Wan dhoudi mikwano ka mwanduni." 
Isaiah63:18 Ere gima omiyo joricho osedonjo e Hekalu mari? Koso ang’o momiyo wasikwa osenyono kama ilamie? 
Isaiah63:19 Kuom ndalo mang’eny osekwanwa ka joma ok nie bwo lochni, mana ka gima ok wan jogi iwuon." 
Isaiah64:1 Mad ibar polo ilor piny, mondo imi gode oleny e nyimi," 
Isaiah64:2 mana kaka mach wang’o oswekle, kendo yienyo pi! Kitimo kamano, eka wasiki diwinj humbi, kendo ogendini ditetni ka ibiro." 
Isaiah64:3 Kane itimo honni mane ok wagen ni wanane, ne ilor piny, mi gode oleny e nyimi." 
Isaiah64:4 It pok owinjo kata wang’ pok oneno nyasaye moro ma rito joge mogeno kuome, to mak mana in." 
Isaiah64:5 Ihero ng’at matimo tim makare ka mor, kendo ma paro yoreni. Kata kane ikecho kamano, to wan ne pod watimo richo atima. Wasesiko gi richowa ndalo mang’eny. Koro bende niwarwa adier?" 
Isaiah64:6 Waduto wasebedo ka ng’at mogak, kendo timbewa duto mabeyo chalo mana gi lewni mochido. Waduto wasener mana ka oboke, kendo timbewa mamono kwadhowa oko mana ka yamo." 
Isaiah64:7 Onge ng’ama lami, kata matemo mondo opadre kuomi, nikech ipandonwa wang’i kendo ijwang’owa e richowa." 
Isaiah64:8 To kata kamano, A Ruoth Nyasaye in e wuonwa. Wan lop chuech, to in e jachwechwa, kendo wan duto wan tich lweti." 
Isaiah64:9 A Ruoth Nyasaye, kik ibed gi mirima moloyo kaka owinjore, kata paro richowa ndalo duto. Rangwa wahombi, nikech wan duto wan jogi." 
Isaiah64:10 Miechi maler kendo madongo duto olokore thim. Kata mana Sayun owuon olokore thim. Adier, Jerusalem osewe gunda." 
Isaiah64:11 Mach osewang’o Hekalu marwa ma jaber kendo man gi duong’, mane kwerewa pakie, omiyo giwa duto mabeyo osekethore." 
Isaiah64:12 Bende diyie weyo gik makamagi, yaye Ruoth Nyasaye? Koso diling’ thi kikumowa moloyo kaka owinjore?" 
Isaiah65:1 Ruoth Nyasaye wacho niya, “Ne antie mondo jogo mane ok dwara, omanya. Adier, ne aikora mondo joma ne ok manya, oyuda, ka awacho ni oganda mane ok lama ni, ‘Eri a! Eri a!’" 
Isaiah65:2 Ne arieyo bada odiechieng’ duto, ka ahombo joma wigi tek, mane luwo mana yoregi maricho, katimo dwarogi giwegi." 
Isaiah65:3 Gin joma ne kwinya pilepile, kaneno, ka gitimo misengni e puothe, kendo giwang’o ubani e kende molos gi matafali." 
Isaiah65:4 Ne gigwom e liete joma otho, kendo ne gipondo kuonde mobuto otieno duto, bende ne gichamo ring mbidhi, kod chiemo moko makuero." 
Isaiah65:5 Giwacho ni ji mamoko niya, ‘Kik usud machiegni kodwa, bende kik umulwa, nimar waler moloyou.’ Joma kamago gin mach maliel aliela ma ok tho, ma iche thing’a odiechieng’ duto." 
Isaiah65:6 Neuru! Wachno osendiki e nyima. Ok abi ling’, to abiro kumou kuom richou, kaachiel gi richo mag wuoneu. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano." 
Isaiah65:7 Ne uwang’o ubani e gode duto madongo gi matindo, kukweda, omiyo abiro kwongo pimo pok monego uyudi, eka achulu kaka owinjore!”" 
Isaiah65:8 Ruoth Nyasaye wacho kama: “Kaka olemo moko mabeyo ma dilosgo divai nyalo yudore e saga marach, ma ji kwer ni, ‘Kik wit sagano, nimar oting’o hawi,’ e kaka abiro timo ni jotichna, mi ok natiek oganda duto." 
Isaiah65:9 Anami Jakobo nyikwayo ma noluw bang’e, kendo anami Juda jocham gikeni ma nikaw godena. Ee, joga moyier ma jotichna nokaw pinyno mi dagie." 
Isaiah65:10 Joga ma osebedo ka lama nokwa jambgi e geng’ Sharon, kendo holo mar Akor nobed leg dhogi." 
Isaiah65:11 “To un mane ujwang’a, an Ruoth Nyasaye, mi wiu owil gi goda maler, kendo uloso sewni ni nyiseche manono miluongo ni Gad gi Meni, kutimonigi misengni miolo piny," 
Isaiah65:12 aseng’adonu buch tho, kendo uduto ibiro negu, nikech ne aluongou, to ne ok udwoka, bende ne alosonu, to ne udagi winja. To ne utimo timbe mamono ma ok ayiego, kuyiero mana gik ma adagi." 
Isaiah65:13 Kuom mano, an Ruoth Nyasaye, awacho niya: Jotichna nochiem, to un unudeny, kendo ginimodhi, to un riyo nohewu. Bende ginibed mail, un to unuyud wichkuot." 
Isaiah65:14 Jotichna nower ka chunygi mor, to un unywasgi ka ukuyo kendo chunyu lit." 
Isaiah65:15 Ka joga moyier, dwaro kuong’o ng’ato, to giniluong nyingu ka giwacho ni, ‘Ruoth Nyasaye mondo oneg ng’atno, kaka ne onegou.’ Joga to analuong gi nying’ moro nono maber.”" 
Isaiah65:16 Ng’ato ang’ata ma dwaro mondo oyud gueth e piny, to nyaka kwa mana Nyasach adiera mondo oguedhe. Bende ng’at ma kuong’ore e piny ka, to nyaka kuong’re mana e nying Nyasach adiera, nikech wich nowil gi thagruok machon, mi lal nono e wang’a." 
Isaiah65:17 “Winjuru, achueyo polo manyien kod piny manyien. Kamano wich nowil gi gik machon, kendo ok nochak opargi." 
Isaiah65:18 Emomiyo beduru mamor kendo moil nyaka chieng’ gi gik ma achueyo, nimar achueyo Jerusalem obed dala makelo mor, kendo achueyo joma odakie mondo obed joma oil." 
Isaiah65:19 Abiro bedo mamor gi Jerusalem, kendo abiro bedo moil nikech joga. “Ywak kod ywagruok ok nochak owinji e Jerusalem," 
Isaiah65:20 kendo ok nobedie nyathi matho kapod yom, kata ng’at maduong’ matho kapok ndalone orumo. Bende ka ng’ato otho ka hike mia achiel, to nokwane ka ng’ama otho kapod tin. Joricho mokwong’ kende ema notho ka pok hikgi oromo mia achiel." 
Isaiah65:21 Ji noger udi, kendo ginidagie aming’a, kendo ginipur puothe mzabibu, mi gicham olembgi." 
Isaiah65:22 Ok giniger udi ni mondo jomoko nono ema odagie, bende ok ginichwo cham ni mondo jomoko nono ema ocham. Joga moyier nodag aming’a mana kaka yath dak, mi kuom ndalo mang’eny ginicham mwandu ma luchgi okelo." 
Isaiah65:23 Ok giniketh tekregi kayiem, bende ok gininywol nyithindo maneno masira, nimar gin, kaachiel gi nyithindgi, gin joma Ruoth Nyasaye oguedho." 
Isaiah65:24 Anadwokgi kapok giluonga, kendo anawinjgi kapok gitieko wuoyo." 
Isaiah65:25 Ondiek kod rombo nokwa kaachiel kendo sibuor nocham lum mana ka dhiang’ Thuol to nocham mana lowo. Onge gima nohiny ng’ato kata ma noketh gimoro e gode maler duto. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano.” 
Isaiah66:1 Ruoth Nyasaye wacho niya, “Polo e koma mar duong’, to piny e raten tienda. Kuom mano, ere kama dugernae ot? Koso ere kama dayueye?" 
Isaiah66:2 Gigi duto an ema achueyo, kendo an e wuon-gi. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano. Ng’at ma abiro konyo en ng’at mamuol, ma chunye otur, kendo ma tetni kowinjo wachna." 
Isaiah66:3 “Ng’at moyang’o rwath chalre gi ng’at monego dhano. Ng’at motimo misango gi rombo, bende chalre gi ng’at moturo ng’ut guok, kendo ng’at mochiwo misango mar cham chalre gi ng’at mochiwo remb mbidhi, bende ng’at mowang’o ubani kar rapar chalre gi ng’at molamo nyiseche manono, kendo kaka chunygi mor gi timbe makuerogo," 
Isaiah66:4 e kaka an bende abiro yieronigi masiche mondo omakgi, ka akelo kuomgi gik ma giluoro, nimar ne alwongo, to onge ng’ama dwoka, kendo ne awuoyo, to onge ng’ama winja. To ne gitimo timbe mamono ma ok ayiego, eka giyiero mana gik ma adagi.”" 
Isaiah66:5 Winjuru wach Ruoth Nyasaye, un mutetni kowuoyo. Owacho kama: “Joweteu mosin kodu, kendo modagu nikech uhero nyinga, wacho niya, ‘Ruoth Nyasaye mondo onyis duong’ne maler, mondo waneye ane mor ma un go!’ To kata kamano gin ema ginine wichkuot.”" 
Isaiah66:6 Winjuru! Tulo omuoch e dala Jerusalem. Koko winjore e Hekalu! En dwond Ruoth Nyasaye makumo wasike gi kum mowinjore kodgi. 
Isaiah66:7 Bende dhako dinywol nyathi ma ok owinjo rem? Donywol wuowi kapok muoch okaye adier? 
Isaiah66:8 Ooyo! Gima kamano pok owinji kata pok one. Ka kamano, to bende dichue piny moro godiechieng’ achiel? Koso oganda bende dinywol dichiel? Sayun to ne onywolo yawuote mana e sa mowinjoe muoch!" 
Isaiah66:9 Ruoth Nyasaye penjo niya, “Dawe sa ma dhako nywolie chopi mak amiye teko mar nywol? Koso dadin iye, to an ema amiyo dhako teko mar nywol? Ruoth Nyasaye ema owacho kamano." 
Isaiah66:10 Un duto muhero Jerusalem, moruru kode. Adier, beduru gi ilo nikech en. Un duto ma yande uywage, koro beduru mamor kode gi ilo." 
Isaiah66:11 Bang’e unubed mamor kuchamo mwandune mogundho, mana kaka nyathi mor kadhodho min." 
Isaiah66:12 Ruoth Nyasaye wacho niya, “Abiro miyo Jerusalem bedo gi kue mamol ka aora, kendo mwandu mag ogendini bende abiro olone, mana ka aora motiak. Unubed mamor mana ka nyithindo midhodho, kendo miiko e bath, kata mipiro e chong." 
Isaiah66:13 Kaka min nyathi hoyo nyathine, e kaka an bende abiro hoyou, mi uyud kue e Jerusalem." 
Isaiah66:14 Ubiro neno kamano, mi chunyu bed mamor. Dendu nobed maber, mana ka lumb chwiri. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema nami jotichna ong’e tekona; Wasika to nanyis mirimba.”" 
Isaiah66:15 Neuru kaka Ruoth Nyasaye biro ei mach, ka gechene mag lweny chalo kalausi, mondo osand ji gi mirimbe mager ka mach makakni." 
Isaiah66:16 Ruoth Nyasaye noyal buch ji duto gi mach kod ligangla! Kamano joma Ruoth Nyasaye onego nobed mang’eny. 
Isaiah66:17 Joma pwodhore kendo bedo maler, ni mondo odhi e hembko, ka moro ka moro luwo wadgi, kendo chamo ring mbidhi gi oyieyo kod gik moko makuero, norum dichiel. Ruoth Nyasaye ema owacho kamano." 
Isaiah66:18 An Ruoth Nyasaye, ang’eyo timbegi kaachiel gi parogi, bende abiro choko ogendini duto, gi dhoudi mawacho dhok mopogore opogore, kendo ginibi mi gine duong’na maler," 
Isaiah66:19 eka anatim ranyisi e kindgi. Bang’e anaor jogi moko motony ir ogendini ma pok owinjo humba, kata pok oneno duong’na maler, mi ginilandnigi duong’na maler. Ogendnigo gi jo-Tarshish, gi jo-Put, gi jo-Lud gi jo-Meshak, gi jo Rosh gi jo-Tubal kod jo-Javan, kaachiel gi joma odak e dhonembe kod chulni man kuonde maboyo." 
Isaiah66:20 Jou ma gigolo kuom ogendini duto ginikelna kaka chiwo, an Ruoth Nyasaye. Ginikelgi Jerusalem, goda maler, ka moko oidho farese, to moko oidho geche mag lweny gi geche mamoko kendo moko bende oidho kenje kod ngamia, mana kaka jo-Israel kelo misengni e od Ruoth Nyasaye, ka giting’o e tewni maler. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano." 
Isaiah66:21 Moko kuomgi analok jodolo, kendo moko anami tich jo-Lawi. Ruoth Nyasaye ema owacho kamano." 
Isaiah66:22 Kaka polo manyien gi piny manyien nosiki e nyima, e kaka dhoodu gi nyingu bende nosiki. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano." 
Isaiah66:23 E kinde ka kinde ma due opor, kendo chieng’ Sabato ka chieng’ Sabato, ji duto nobi e nyima mondo olama. Ruoth Nyasaye ema owacho kamano." 
Isaiah66:24 Giniwuogi, mi gine ringre joma otho mosepiem koda. Kudni machamogi ok notho, kata mach mawang’ogi bende ok notho, kendo ginibed gik ma ji duto osin-go." 
Jeremiah1:1 Kitabuni oting’o weche kod timbe mag Jeremia wuod Hilkia. Ne en achiel kuom jodolo modak Anathoth e piny Benjamin. 
Jeremiah1:2 Wach Ruoth Nyasaye nobirone e higa mar apar gadek mar loch Josia wuod Amon, ruodh Juda," 
Jeremiah1:3 kendo e ndalo loch Jehoyakim wuod Josia, nyaka due mar abich mar higa mar apar gachiel mar loch Zedekia wuod Josia, kane odar jo-Jerusalem, moter e tuech." 
Jeremiah1:4 An Jeremia, Ruoth Nyasaye nowachona niya," 
Jeremiah1:5 “Kane pok achueyi e ich, ne oyudo aseyieri, kendo kane pok onywoli, ne asewali mondo iti tichna, mi aketi janabi ni ogendini.”" 
Jeremiah1:6 Eka nadwoke niya, “A Ruoth Nyasaye, ok ang’eyo wuoyo, nikech pod atin.”" 
Jeremiah1:7 To Ruoth Nyasaye nowachona niya, “Kik iwachi ni pod itin, to dhiyo adhiya ir ji duto ma aori kuomgi, mondo iwachnigi gik moko duto ma anyisi." 
Jeremiah1:8 Kik iluorgi, nikech abiro bet kodi, kendi riti. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano!”" 
Jeremiah1:9 Bang’e Ruoth Nyasaye notero lwete, momulo dhoga, kowachona niya, “Eri, aketo wechena e dhogi." 
Jeremiah1:10 Kawuono amiyi teko kuom ogendini, kendo kuom ruodhi, mondo ipudhi kendo igo piny, mondo imuki kendo ikethi, to bende mondo iger kendo ipidhi.”" 
Jeremiah1:11 Ruoth Nyasaye nopenja niya, “Jeremia, ineno ang’o?” Nadwoke ni, “Aneno bad yath machako loth.”" 
Jeremiah1:12 Eka Ruoth Nyasaye nowachona niya, “Iwacho kare. An bende achako chopo wachna!”" 
Jeremiah1:13 Bang’e nochako openja niya, “En ang’o kendo mineno?” Ne adwoke niya, “Aneno agulu kayienyo yo nyandwat, kendo ochiegni pukore yo koni.”" 
Jeremiah1:14 Ruoth Nyasaye nowachona niya, “Masira biro yienyo koa yo nyandwat, mi chop kuom ji duto modak e pinyni." 
Jeremiah1:15 Aluongo ogendini duto man yo nyandwat mondo obi. Ruodhi maggi bende nobi, kendo norenj kombegi mag loch e dhorangeye Jerusalem, kendo e alwora mar ohinga Jerusalem, kendo e alwora mag mier moko duto mag Juda." 
Jeremiah1:16 Mano e kaka abiro kumo joma oseketho, moweya kendo owang’o misengni ni nyiseche mamoko, ka gilamo gik ma giloso giwegi." 
Jeremiah1:17 Emomiyo tim atima chir Jeremia, kendo dhi iwachnigi gik moko duto ma asenyisi. Kik iwe gimiyi luoro, nono to abiro miyo ibed maluor moloyo e nyimgi." 
Jeremiah1:18 Ji duto manie pinyni, kaka ruodhi mag Juda, gi jodongo gi jodolo kod ji mamoko duto, biro bedo mamon kodi. To kawuono amiyi teko mondo isirgi. Ibiro chalo gi dala mochiel motegno, kendo gi siro mar chuma, kendo gi ohinga mar mula." 
Jeremiah1:19 Ok giniloyi, nikech abiro bet kodi kendo riti. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano.”" 
Jeremiah2:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nowachona 
Jeremiah2:2 ni mondo adhi ahul wachne ni ji duto modak Jerusalem kama: “Aparo hera mane un-go koda kane pod un oganda mayom, nimar e ndalo mane uluwa e thim, piny motwo ma ok pur, ne uhera mana kaka miaha hero chwore." 
Jeremiah2:3 E ndalogo un jo-Israel nubedo joga awuon, kendo nuchalona mana cham ma okwong dumbo. Nakumo ji duto mane dwaro hinyou, kendo ne akelonigi chandruok. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano.”" 
Jeremiah2:4 Winjuru wach Ruoth Nyasaye un nyikwa Jakobo ma jo-Israel. 
Jeremiah2:5 Ruoth Nyasaye owacho niya, “Ang’o marach mane kwereu oneno kuoma, mane omiyo giweya? Ne gilamo nyiseche manono, mi gin bende gidoko joma nono." 
Jeremiah2:6 Ne ok gidewa, kata obedo ni ne aseresogi kagologi e piny Misri, mi atelonigi e thim, piny marach motwo ma masiche ng’enyie. Pinyno otimo gode gi bugni, ma onge ng’ama wuothoe, bende onge ng’ama odakie." 
Jeremiah2:7 Ne akelou e piny momew, mondo ucham gik monyakie kod gik mabeyo mantie. To kane udonjo e piny mane amiyouno ne udwanye, mi ukethe." 
Jeremiah2:8 Jodolo noweyo penjo kuma Ruoth Nyasaye nitie. Joma ne ong’eyo weche chik bende ne ok odewa, kendo jotelo nobaro moweya. Jonabi bende ne koro wach e nying Baal, kendo ne lamo nyiseche manono." 
Jeremiah2:9 “Emomiyo an Ruoth Nyasaye abiro yalo joga kendo. Abiro yalou, kendo abiro yalo nyikwau." 
Jeremiah2:10 “Koro idhuru yie udhi e chula mar Saipras, kendo uor joote Kedar openjnu wach mondo uwinj ane" 
Jeremiah2:11 ka oganda moro oseweyo nyisechegi, moluwo nyiseche mamoko, kata obedo ni ok gin nyiseche madieri kamano? To un joga, useweya, an Nyasachu moseting’ou malo, mi ulamo nyiseche ma ok nyal konyou." 
Jeremiah2:12 Kuom mano, an Ruoth Nyasaye, agolonu chik un polo mondo uyiengni malich, kuwuoro kendo kudhier nono," 
Jeremiah2:13 nikech joga osetimo richo tieng’ ariyo. Gisebaro, mi giweya, an soko mar pi maliw mamol, kendo gisekunyo yewni mabarore, ma ok nyal ting’o pi!" 
Jeremiah2:14 “Jo-Israel ok gin wasumbni, bende ne ok onywolgi wasumbni. Kuom mano, ere gima omiyo wasikgi yakogi?" 
Jeremiah2:15 Wasikgigo rutonigi matek, mana ka sibuoche. Giseketho pinygi, molokore thim. Miechgi bende okethore, maonge ng’ama dagie." 
Jeremiah2:16 Ee, jo-Memfis gi jo-Tapanes josetoyo pat wi jo-Israel." 
Jeremiah2:17 Yaye, jo-Israel! Tim ma kamano usekelo mana kuomu uwegi! Ne uweya, an Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu, kane atelonu e yo." 
Jeremiah2:18 “Koro ang’o ma uparo ni ubiro yudo kuom dhi Misri? Uparo ni ubiro modho pi aora Nael? Koso ang’o ma uparo ni ubiro yudo kuom dhi Asuria? Uparo ni ubiro modho pi aora Yufrate? 
Jeremiah2:19 Timbeu uwegi maricho ema biro kelonu kum. Ee, timbe mane uweyago ema biro kelonu bura. Kamano ubiro ng’eyo ni weyo Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu, kendo chaye en gima lit kendo marach moloyo. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano." 
Jeremiah2:20 Yaye jo-Israel, chon gi lala ne udagi lochna, kendo ne utamoru rito chikna, kuwacho ni ok unutina. To nulemo alema ewi gode maboyo duto, kendo e tiend yien duto motimo otiep, mi udwanyoru ka dhako ma jachode." 
Jeremiah2:21 Ne apidhou ka ng’ama pidho mzabibu moyier, mana ka kodhi maberie moloyo, to neyeuru kaka koro uchalo! Uchalo gi mzabibu marach ma ok nyag olemo mabeyo." 
Jeremiah2:22 Kata da bed ni ulwokoru gi pi kendo kod sabun mang’eny, to pod anyalo neno kuonde ma richou otonie. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano." 
Jeremiah2:23 Ere kaka unyalo wacho ni pok udwanyoru, bende ni pok ulamo Baal? Parieuru kaka ne utimo richo e holo, kendo neyeuru gik ma usetimo. Uchalo ngamia madhako madwaro thuondi, ma tho ringo aringa koni gi koni." 
Jeremiah2:24 To uchalo kanj thim ma ok nyal geng’ kadwaro thuondi. Onge thwon manyalo thagore ka dware, nikech yude yot ka kinde miluwee ochopo." 
Jeremiah2:25 Un jo Israel kik uwe tiendeu dok malit, kata kik uwe dwondu two, kuringo bang’ nyiseche manono. To uwacho niya, ‘Ok wanyal konyo. Wasehero nyiseche mamoko, kendo nyaka waluwgi!’" 
Jeremiah2:26 To kaka wi jakuo kuot ka omake, e kaka un jo-Israel wiu nokuodi, kaachiel gi ruodhiu gi jodongu gi jodolo mau kod jonabi mau." 
Jeremiah2:27 Un duto mawacho ni yath ni, ‘In e wuonwa,’ kendo wacho ni kidi ni, ‘In minwa,’ wiu nokuodi. Ne ubaro mi uweya, kendo ne udagi duogo ira, to eka ka masira omakou, to ukwaya mondo abi akonyu!" 
Jeremiah2:28 Koro ere nyiseche gogo mane uloso? Ka un e chandruok, to mondo okonyu ane, ka ginyalo konyou! Un jo-Juda, un gi nyiseche mang’eny." 
Jeremiah2:29 An Ruoth Nyasaye apenjou ni, “Ang’o momiyo uywakna, to un ema useng’anyona uduto?" 
Jeremiah2:30 Ne anego yawuotu, to mano ne ok opuonjou, bende ne ok unyal yie kethou, to ne unego jonabi mau mana kaka sibuor mager neko." 
Jeremiah2:31 “Chikuru itu maber uduto, mondo uwinj gima awachonu, un jo-Israel. Achalonu thim, koso achalonu piny ma masiche ng’enyie, ma ok unyal dak koda maberni? Ka ok kamano, to marang’o uwacho ni ubiro timo mana kaka uhero, kendo ni ok unyal duogo ira, to un joga?" 
Jeremiah2:32 Bende wi nyako nyalo wil gi gik ma olichorego? Koso wi miaha nyalo wil gi lawe mar kisera? An to, wi joga osewil koda kuom ndalo mang’eny mokadho akwana." 
Jeremiah2:33 Un ung’eyo yore muyudogo osiepeu machwo, to bende kata mana mon ma jochode bende nyalo puonjore kuomu." 
Jeremiah2:34 Remb joma odhier, kendo maonge ketho, otonie lepu; gin remb joma ne ok oturo uteu ka kweloe. To kata kamano uwacho niya," 
Jeremiah2:35 ‘Waonge ketho, kendo adier, Ruoth Nyasaye ok okecho kodwa.’ To ng’euru ni an Ruoth Nyasaye abiro kumou kuom wacho ni uonge gi richo kamano." 
Jeremiah2:36 Ere gima omiyo uloko parou ka ok udewo? Jo-Misri mugeno kuomgi ok nokonyu, mana kaka jo-Asuria bende ne ok okonyou." 
Jeremiah2:37 Ubiro a e piny Misri, ka uduto umako wiu nikech wichkuot. An Ruoth Nyasaye asedagi joma ugeno kuomgi, kendo ok ginikonyu ngang’.”" 
Jeremiah3:1 Ruoth Nyasaye owacho niya, “Ka ng’ato oriembo chiege, mi chiegeno odhi, kendo bang’e ng’at machielo okende, to chwore mokwongo ok nyal kawe kendo, nikech dhakono koro ogak. To un jo-Israel useweya, mulamo nyiseche mang’eny, kudwanyoru mana ka dhako madwanyore gi chwo mang’eny, to koro udwaro duogo ira!" 
Jeremiah3:2 Ranguru wi gode malo mondo uneye, bende nitie kamoro ma pok ulemoe kudwanyoru? Uchalo dhako ma jachode ma obet e bath yo karito chwo, kata ka ja-Arabu ma jamecho mopondo e thim, kakiyo joma odwaro yako. Usedwanyo piny gi timbeu maricho machalo timbe chode." 
Jeremiah3:3 Mano emomiyo koth ne ok ochue, kata mana kodh opon ne ok oton. To bende uchalo dhako ma jachode, nikech uonge gi wichkuot." 
Jeremiah3:4 To koro eka uwachona niya, ‘In wuonwa, kendo iseherowa chakre tindowa.’" 
Jeremiah3:5 Uwuoyo kamano kuparo ni ok nakechi mochwere, kendo ni mirima ok nomaka kodu nyaka chieng’. Un jo-Israel, mano e gima nuwacho, to kata kamano, pod nutimo atima richo duto mane unyalo.”" 
Jeremiah3:6 E ndalo loch ruoth Josia, Ruoth Nyasaye nopenja niya, “Iseneno gima jo-Israel otimo ka giweya? Giseidho gode duto, kendo gisedhi e tiend yien duto motimo otiep, mi gilamoe nyiseche manono mana kaka dhako ma jachode ringo koni gi koni kadwaro chwo." 
Jeremiah3:7 An Ruoth Nyasaye ne aparo ni gibiro duogo ira bang’ timo mago duto, to ne ok giduogo, kendo owetegi ma jo-Juda noneno timbegigo." 
Jeremiah3:8 Ne gineno bende kaka ne ariembo jo-Israel nikech ne giweya ka dhako moweyo chwore, to dwanyore gi chwo mamoko. To jo-Juda ma owetegigo ma bende joma andhoke ne ok odewo, mi gin bende ne giweya, kendo ne gidhi gidwanyore ka dhako moweyo chwore to dwanyore gi chwo mamoko." 
Jeremiah3:9 Ne gidwanyo adwanya piny gi timbegi mag lamo kite kod yien. 
Jeremiah3:10 To kata bang’ mago duto jo-Juda ma andhoke ma owete jo-Israel nowuondore ni duogo ira, to ok ne gidwogo gi chunygi duto.”" 
Jeremiah3:11 Ruoth Nyasaye nowachona niya, “Kata obedo ni jo-Israel ne oweya, to gisenyiso ni gibeyo moloyo jowetegi ma andhoke ma jo-Juda." 
Jeremiah3:12 Omiyo dhiyo e piny man yo nyandwat mondo iwach ni jo-Israel kama: ‘Duoguru ira un jo-Israel ma andhokegi. Aherou gi hera mosiko, omiyo ok nasik ka akecho kodu nyaka chieng’." 
Jeremiah3:13 Mak mana ni nyaka uyie ni useketho, kendo nyaka uyie ni usepiem gi Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu. Bende yieuru ni usedwanyoru gi nyiseche mamoko e tiend yien duto motimo otiep, kendo ne ok uwinjo wachna.’ An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano." 
Jeremiah3:14 “Duoguru ira un nyithinda moseweya, nimar an ruodhu. Abiro golo ji manok kuomu e miechu kendo e dhoutu, mi adwoku e got Sayun." 
Jeremiah3:15 Abiro ketonu jotelo moluora, kendo gibiro ritou gi rieko kod winjruok maber." 
Jeremiah3:16 Bang’e kusemedoru kendo unya, to ji ok nochak owuo kuom Sandug Muma mar Ruoth Nyasaye kendo. Ok unupare, kendo ok unudware, bende ok unulos moro machal kode." 
Jeremiah3:17 E ndalogo noluong Jerusalem ni komduong’ mar Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo ogendini duto nochokre kuno mondo omi nyinga duong’. Ok ginichak gitim tim wich teko, bende ok ginibed gi chuny mar timo richo." 
Jeremiah3:18 Jo-Israel biro riwore gi jo-Juda, kendo gibiro wuotho kanyakla, ka gia yo nyandwat, ka giduogo e piny mane amiyo kwereu mondo obed mwandugi nyaka chieng’." 
Jeremiah3:19 “Un jo-Israel aseyie kawou ka yawuota, mondo amiu piny maberie moloyo pinje mamoko duto. Ne aparo ni ubiro luonga ni wuonu, kendo ok nuchak uweya." 
Jeremiah3:20 To un jo-Israel useweya mana ka dhako moweyo chwore. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano. 
Jeremiah3:21 “Koko gore ewi gode! Gin jo-Israel ma ywak ka kwayo ng’wono, nimar gisebedo ka giluwo yore maricho, ka ok gidew Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachgi." 
Jeremiah3:22 Duoguru un nyithinda moseweya, mondo aloku joma kare. Udwoka niya, ‘Ee, waduogo iri, nimar in e Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachwa." 
Jeremiah3:23 Onge resruok ma wanyalo yudo kuom lemo ewi gode, kata kuom joma goyo koko kuonde moting’ore. Konyruok ma wayudo wan jo-Israel, wuok mana kuom Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachwa." 
Jeremiah3:24 “ ‘Chakre tindowa, gik moko duto ma wuonewa osetiyo moyudo, kaka jamni kod yawuowi gi nyiri, oselalnwa kuom lamo Baal, nyasach wichkuot." 
Jeremiah3:25 Onego wanind piny ka wiwa okuot, kendo ka timbewa maricho oumowa. Wan kaachiel gi kwerewa waseketho e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachwa, chakre tindowa, kendo ok wasewinjo wachne.’ ”" 
Jeremiah4:1 Ruoth Nyasaye wacho niya, “Un jo-Israel, ka uyie lokoru, to duoguru ira. Wituru nyisecheu manono ma amon-go mondo uluw mana an." 
Jeremiah4:2 Ka ukuong’oru gi nying Ruoth Nyasaye gi adiera gi bura makare kendo gi tim malong’o, to ogendini biro kwaya mondo gin bende aguedhgi kaka aseguedhou, kendo gibiro miya duong’." 
Jeremiah4:3 Ruoth Nyasaye wacho ni jo-Juda gi jo-Jerusalem niya, ‘Paruru puotheu ma mbora, mondo kik uket kodhi e kind kudho." 
Jeremiah4:4 Un jo-Juda gi jo-Jerusalem, rituru singruokna, kendo timuru gik madwaro, nono to gik maricho musetimo biro miyo mirimba liel ka mach ma onge ng’ama nyalo nego.’" 
Jeremiah4:5 “Gouru tung’, e piny duto, kendo koguru matek, kunyiso jo-Juda gi jo-Jerusalem mondo oring odhi e mier mochiel motegno." 
Jeremiah4:6 Nyisuru ji yo madhi Sayun. Ringuru mondo utony, kik udeki, nikech Ruoth Nyasaye kelo masira kaa nyandwat mabiro ketho piny malich." 
Jeremiah4:7 Jaketh ogendini osewuok oko ka sibuor mowuok e gonde. Osewuok kama odakie mondo obi oketh pinyu. Miech Juda nodong’ gundni ma onge ng’ama odakie. 
Jeremiah4:8 Kuom mano, rwakreuru gi piende gugru, kendo uywagi ka ugoyo nduru, nikech mirima mager ma Ruoth Nyasaye nigo gi jo-Juda pok orumo.”" 
Jeremiah4:9 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho niya, “Chieng’no chuny ruodhi gi chuny jodongo nonyosre, kata jodolo bende nobuogi kendo jonabi nong’eng’.”" 
Jeremiah4:10 Kane awinjo kamano, nawacho niya, “A Ruoth Nyasaye, isewuondo jo-Jerusalem chuth! Niwacho ni kue biro betie, to koro ligangla ema nie ng’utwa!”" 
Jeremiah4:11 Ndalo biro, mibiro nyisie jo-Jerusalem ni yamo maliet moa e thim kudho koni, kochomo jo-Ruoth Nyasaye. Ok nokudh mos maber minyalo piedhgo cham," 
Jeremiah4:12 to nobed kalausi ma Ruoth Nyasaye okelo. Ruoth Nyasaye owuon ema koro kumo joge. 
Jeremiah4:13 Neuru, wasigu biro mogingore ka boche polo. Gechegi mag lweny chalo gi kalausi, kendo faresegi ringo matek moloyo ongo. Yaye! Warumo!" 
Jeremiah4:14 Un jo-Jerusalem, lwokuru richo manie chunyu mondo oresu. Ubiro siko kuparo weche maricho nyaka karang’o?" 
Jeremiah4:15 Winjuru! Jaote moa Dan ema hulo ni masira biro, kendo jago milome moa e gode mag Efraim bende wacho kamano." 
Jeremiah4:16 Nyisuru ogendini kendo landuru wach ni, Jerusalem ibiro kethi. Wasigu biro moa e piny mabor, kendo gibiro goyo koko ni joma odak e miech Juda." 
Jeremiah4:17 Gibiro timo ageng’a ni piny Juda mana ka joma olworo puodho, nikech oganda jo-Juda oseweya. Ruoth Nyasaye ema owacho kamano." 
Jeremiah4:18 “Un jo-Juda, un ema usekelo masira kuomu uwegi, nikech yoreu gi timbeu maricho. Ee, richou ema okelonu masira kum malitni.”" 
Jeremiah4:19 Iya nyawni! Awinjo rem malit! Yaye chunya! Chunya diko malit! Ok anyal ling’ nikech awinjo tung’ gi mahu mag lweny. 
Jeremiah4:20 Masira achiel luwo machielo, kendo piny duto okethi, piyopiyo nono hembena omuki, kendo rageng’ni maggi oyiech matindo tindo." 
Jeremiah4:21 Nyaka karang’o ma ananeye bandeche mag lweny ka kwadhore, kendo nawinjie tung’ lweny ka ywak." 
Jeremiah4:22 Ruoth Nyasaye wacho niya, “Joga ofuwo, kendo ok ging’eya. Gichalo gi nyithindo momemore, kendo maonge rieko. Richo ema ging’eyo timo, to timo gima ber otamogi.”" 
Jeremiah4:23 Bang’e narango piny, maneno ni onge gi kido. Polo bende ne onge gima rienyie." 
Jeremiah4:24 Ne arango gode madongo, maneno ka giyiengni; kuonde moting’ore bende ne rundore koni gi koni." 
Jeremiah4:25 Naneno ka ji onge kuno, kendo winy duto noseringo." 
Jeremiah4:26 Piny momew noselokore thim, kendo mier man kuno noselokore gundni, nikech mirima mager mar Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Jeremiah4:27 Ruoth Nyasaye osewacho ni piny ngima biro dong’ nono, to ok nokethe chuth." 
Jeremiah4:28 Ji duto modak e piny noywagi, kendo polo nolokre mudho. Ruoth Nyasaye osewacho, kendo ok nolok parone! Oseparo mogik, kendo ok nodog chien." 
Jeremiah4:29 Ka ji winjo ni joidh farese gi jo asere biro, to ng’ato ka ng’ato noringi. Jomoko noring odhi e bunge, to moko noidh lwendni, mi pond kuno. Mier duto nodong’ nono, ma onge ng’ama odakie." 
Jeremiah4:30 Un jo-Jerusalem, urumo! Ere gimomiyo urwakoru gi lewni mabeyo, koso ere gima omiyo urwako stadi kendo uwiro wengeu? Ubisoru maber kayiem nono, to chodeu oseweyou, kendo koro dwaro negou." 
Jeremiah4:31 Ne awinjo ywak ka mar dhako ma muoch kayo. Ee, mana kaka mar dhako ma hango nywol. Kara ne en mana dwond Jerusalem, ma gamo yueyo, kendo orieyo bade kawacho niya, “Arumo! Chunya dwaro a, nikech jonek lwora mondo onega.”" 
Jeremiah5:1 Un jo-Jerusalem, wuothuru e yore mag dalau kendo e chirniu, mondo une ane ka nitie kata ng’at achiel makare mohero adiera. Kuyudo, to Ruoth Nyasaye nowe ni jodalano richogi." 
Jeremiah5:2 Kata ka ukuong’oru gi nying Ruoth Nyasaye, to ukuong’oru mana gi miriambo." 
Jeremiah5:3 Donge adiera ema Ruoth Nyasaye dwaro? Ne ogoyou piny, to ne ok udewo. Ne osandou malit, to ne utamoru winjo puonjne. Wiu tek ka lwanda, kendo udagi duogo ire," 
Jeremiah5:4 Bang’e nowacho niya, “Chutho jogi gin joma ofuwo maonge rieko. Ok ging’eyo yor Ruoth Nyasaye kod gima Nyasachgi dwaro." 
Jeremiah5:5 Omiyo koro abiro dhi ir jotelo mondo alosgo, nimar nyaka bed ni gin ema ging’eyo yor Ruoth Nyasaye, kod gima Nyasachgi dwaro.” To kara gin bende gisedagi loch mar Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo gitamore rito chikne." 
Jeremiah5:6 Mano emomiyo sibuor moa e bungu biro negogi. Ee, ondiek moa e thim biro kidhogi, kendo kwach nowuoth e miechgi. Ng’ato ang’ata mowuok oko nokidh matindo tindo. Magi duto notimre nikech richogi thoth, kendo nikech giseweyo Nyasaye nyading’eny." 
Jeremiah5:7 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho niya, “Ere gima dimi awe ni joga richogi? Yawuotgi oseweya, mokuong’ore gi nying nyiseche manono. Ne amiyo joga gik moko duto mane gidwaro, to pod ne giterore atera ka giketho sechegi gi mon ma jochode." 
Jeremiah5:8 Ng’ato ka ng’ato oowore kuom gombo chi wadgi, mana ka faras moyieng’ ma gombo ohewo." 
Jeremiah5:9 Donge onego akumgi kuom gik ma kamago? Donge onego achul kuor ni oganda ma kama?. 
Jeremiah5:10 Abiro chiko wasikgi mondo ochadh yiend mzabibu maggi, to ok ginikethgi chuth nimar abiro nyisogi mondo gilwer mana bedegi oko nikech ok gin maga." 
Jeremiah5:11 Jo-Israel gi jo-Juda oseweya adier. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano.” 
Jeremiah5:12 Jo-Ruoth Nyasaye osekwede, ka giwacho niya, “Ok obi timo gimoro. Onge masira moro, kaka lweny kata kech, ma nobi kuomwa.”" 
Jeremiah5:13 Giwacho bende ni jonabi nobed ka yamo ma kudho, maonge gi wach moa kuom Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Jeremiah5:14 An Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto abiro nyisi, in Jeremia, gima biro timore ni jogi nikech gik ma gisewachogo. Abiro loko wechena mawuok e dhogi obed mach, to jogi abiro loko yien mondo mach owang’gi pep." 
Jeremiah5:15 Un jo-Israel, akelo oganda moro, maa e piny mabor mondo obi omonju. En oganda machon kendo maratego ma ok uwinj dhogi, kata mana weche ma giwacho bende ok ung’eyo." 
Jeremiah5:16 Jogi ma jo asere nego ji mathoth, kendo giduto gin jolweny marateke." 
Jeremiah5:17 Gibiro tieko chambu kaachiel gi chiembu pep, kendo gibiro tieko yawuotu gi nyiu. Gibiro tieko jambu kod olembeu mag mzabibu gi ng’opeu. Giniketh miechu mochiel motegno, mugeno kuomgi." 
Jeremiah5:18 To kata e ndalogo, an Ruoth Nyasaye awacho ni ok natieku chuth." 
Jeremiah5:19 To kupenja gimomiyo natimonu gigo duto, to anadwoku niya, ‘Kaka nene uweya, mutiyo ni nyiseche mag pinje mamoko e pinyu uwegi, e kaka unuti ni jopinje mamoko e piny ma ok maru!’" 
Jeremiah5:20 In Jeremia, nyis joka Jakobo gi jo-Juda niya," 
Jeremiah5:21 “Winjuru un joma ofuwo, man gi wenge, to ok nen, bende man gi it, to ok nyal winjo." 
Jeremiah5:22 An Ruoth Nyasaye apenjo kama: Ere gimomiyo ok unyal luora? Koso ang’o momiyo ok unyal kirni e nyima? Nene aketo kuoyo manie dhonam mondo ogeng’ nam, kendo obed tong’ mosiko ma pi ok nyal kadho. Apaka mag nam nyalo gingore, kendo wuo matek, to ok nyal kadho, kata mwomo." 
Jeremiah5:23 To un wiu tek, kendo uhero piem. Usepiem koda adier, muweya!" 
Jeremiah5:24 Ne ok uwacho e chunyu niya, ‘Ber waluor Ruoth Nyasachwa, ma miyowa kodh chwiri gi kodh opon e kinde mowinjore, kendo ma miyowa kinde mwakeyoe higa ka higa.’" 
Jeremiah5:25 To timbeu maricho oseketho gigo, kendo richou osemono gik mabeyo ma kamago bironu." 
Jeremiah5:26 Joga moko gin joma richo. Gichalo jodwar ma chiko obadho mondo omakgo winy, to ji ema gimako." 
Jeremiah5:27 Gipong’o utegi gi gik mokwal, mana kaka jachik winy. Mano emomiyo gin gi teko kendo gimew," 
Jeremiah5:28 bende emomiyo gichwe kendo dendgi leny. Timbegi maricho ng’eny mokadho akwana. Ok gikony nyithi kiye mondo oyud bura makare, bende ok ging’ad bura makare ni joma odhier." 
Jeremiah5:29 Donge abiro kumogi kuom mago duto? Ee, abiro chulo kuor ni ogandani. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano!”" 
Jeremiah5:30 Gima lich ma buogo ji osetimore e pinyni. 
Jeremiah5:31 Jonabi koro weche mag miriambo, jodolo bende chwakogi, to kendo mano e gima joga ohero! To gibiro timo ang’o, chieng’ ma gigo orumo?" 
Jeremiah6:1 Un jo-Benjamin, ringuru mondo utony! Ringuru ua Jerusalem! Gouru tung’ e Tekoa, kendo mokuru mach ewi Beth-hakerem mondo onyis ji ni lweny biro, nimar chandruok kod masira maduong’ chiegni biro koa nyandwat." 
Jeremiah6:2 Un jo-Sayun uchalo gi lek maber mar jamni," 
Jeremiah6:3 to ruodhi biro buoro kanyo gi jogi mag lweny, mana kaka jokwath dibi gi rombgi mondo okwa. Gibiro guro hembegi ka gilworou, kendo ng’ato ka ng’ato nokaw gima odwaro." 
Jeremiah6:4 Giniwach niya, “Waikreuru mondo wamonj Jerusalem! Ikreuru! Wabiro monjogi godiechieng’ tir.” To eka ginilok parogi ka giwacho niya, “Ooyo, sa koro ng’eny, piny dwaro yuso, kendo tipo lor." 
Jeremiah6:5 To ikreuru, nimar wabiro monjogi kawuono gotieno, mi wamuk ut Jerusalem mabeyo kendo madongo.”" 
Jeremiah6:6 Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto osegolo chik niya, “Tong’uru yien, kendo uging lowo pidhe pidhe e tiend ohinga, mondo umonj Jerusalem.” Osewacho bende niya, “Abiro kumo dalani nikech bura makare onge kanyo chuth." 
Jeremiah6:7 Kaka pi soko bubni pile, e kaka richo Jerusalem bende osiko ka bubni. Dalano opong’ gi lweny kod masiche, kendo tuoche gi adhonde ema aneno kanyo." 
Jeremiah6:8 Puonjreuru kuom mano, un jo-Jerusalem, nono to aweyou, mi aloko dalau thim, ma onge ng’ama dakie.”" 
Jeremiah6:9 Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto nowachona niya, “Duog ires jo-Israel modong’ ka ng’ama dok e puoth mzabibu mondo opon olemo modong’.”" 
Jeremiah6:10 Ne adwoke niya, “Ere ng’ama diwinja, ka awuoyo kodgi, kata ka akwerogi kamano? Gisedino itgi, omiyo ok ginyal winjo. Gisetamore winjo wachni, kendo gitugo mana gi gima iwacho." 
Jeremiah6:11 Kuom mano, Ruoth Nyasaye, mirimbi opong’a, kendo koro ohewa.” Eka Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Jeremia niya, “Ol mirimba kata mana kuom nyithindo matugo e yore, kendo kuom yawuowi mochokore kanyakla. Mon gi chwo ibiro kawo koda ka joma oti mojwajni." 
Jeremiah6:12 Utegi gi puothegi kod mondgi bende nomi jomoko nono, nimar abiro kumo jopinyni. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano." 
Jeremiah6:13 “Ji duto madongo gi matindo temo yudo pesa e yore mag miganga, kata mana jonabi gi jodolo bende migengni." 
Jeremiah6:14 Gichalo jothieth mathiedho jotuo marachrach, mana ka gima ok gituo, nimar giwacho ni gik moko beyo, to chutho, gik moko ok beyo." 
Jeremiah6:15 Bende uparo ni wigi nokuot nikech gik makuero mane gitimogo koso? Ooyo, wigi ne ok okuot kata matin, to bende gionge gi wichkuot! Kuom mano, ginipodhi kaka jomoko osepodho, kendo ka akumogi to ginirum. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano.”" 
Jeremiah6:16 Ruoth Nyasaye wacho ni joge niya, “Chung’uru e akek yo, mondo urang wang’yore machon, kupenjo kuma yo maber nitie. Wuothuru e wang’yorno, mi unuyud kue.” To gidwoko niya, “Ok wanawuothi e wang’yorno.”" 
Jeremiah6:17 Ruoth Nyasaye noketo jorit mondo ka gigoyo tung’ to ji owinji. To ji nowacho niya, “Ok wanawinji.”" 
Jeremiah6:18 Omiyo Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho niya, “Winjuru un ogendini mondo ung’e gima biro timore ni joga." 
Jeremiah6:19 Un jo-piny, winjuru! Akelo masira kuom jogi mana moromo gi timbegi, nikech gisedagi wechena, kendo ok giserito puonjna." 
Jeremiah6:20 Ere tiende kelona ubani moa Sheba, kata gik mang’ue ng’ar moa e pinje maboyo? Ok anayie misengni miwang’o pep, kendo ok anabed mamor gi misengni mamoko ma gitimona.”" 
Jeremiah6:21 Kuom mano, Ruoth Nyasaye owacho kama: “Anami jogi chwanyre, mi podhi. Wuone gi yawuowi biro tho, kaachiel gi osiepegi kod joma odak machiegni kodgi.”" 
Jeremiah6:22 An Ruoth Nyasaye awacho niya, “Oganda moro biro, moa e piny man yo nyandwat. Ee, oganda marang’ongo man kuma bor ikore ni lweny." 
Jeremiah6:23 Gin gi aserni kod tonge, giger kendo ok gikech ng’ato; tiend faresegi mor ka apaka mar nam mawuo. Gikore kedo gi Sayun.”" 
Jeremiah6:24 To un jo-Jerusalem uwacho niya, “Wasewinjo wachno, mi thudhno omako luetewa. Kibaji goyowa mana ka dhako ma muoch kayo." 
Jeremiah6:25 Ok wahedhre wuok oko, kata bayo e wang’yore, nikech wasikwa oikore ni lweny kuondego, kendo masiche ng’eny koni gi koni.”" 
Jeremiah6:26 To an Ruoth Nyasaye awachonu niya, “Un joga, rwakreuru gi piende gugru, kendo bukreuru gi buru. Ywaguru malit ka ng’ama ywago wuode ma miderma, nimar ng’at ma biro tiekou biro poyou.”" 
Jeremiah6:27 “In Jeremia, aseketi japim joga. Pimgi, eka mondo ifweny timbegi." 
Jeremiah6:28 Giduto gin joma wigi tek, moseweya. Gibayo e piny ka gikuodho ji. Chunygi tek ka mula kendo ka chuma; giduto gin joma okethore." 
Jeremiah6:29 Kata obedo ni obuk mach matek, mondo oleny fedha kendo opwodhi, to en mana ketho kinde kayiem, nikech ng’iend fedha tamore wuok." 
Jeremiah6:30 Emomiyo ibiro luongo joga ni fedha mowe, nikech an Ruoth Nyasaye aseweyogi.”" 
Jeremiah7:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Jeremia 
Jeremiah7:2 mondo odhi ochung’ e dhoranga Hekalu mar Ruoth Nyasaye, ogo milome niya, “Winjuru wach Ruoth Nyasaye, un jo-Juda duto madonjo e dhorangani, ka biro lame." 
Jeremiah7:3 Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto kendo ma Nyasach Israel, owacho ni mondo ulok yoreu gi timbeu maricho, eka owe udak kaeri." 
Jeremiah7:4 To un usiko kuwacho niya, ‘Ma Hekalu mar Ruoth Nyasaye! Hekalu mar Ruoth Nyasaye! Hekalu mar Ruoth Nyasaye!’ Wach muwachono, en miriambo, omiyo kik ugen kuome." 
Jeremiah7:5 Lokuru yoreu gi timbeu, kendo ng’ato ka ng’ato mondo otim ni wadgi gima kare." 
Jeremiah7:6 Weuru sando jopinje mamoko modak kuomu, kata nyithi kiye, kata mond liete. Bende kik uchuer remb joma onge ketho kaeri, kendo kik ulam nyiseche mamoko, nimar mano ditieku chuth." 
Jeremiah7:7 Kulokoru kamano to anyalo weyo udag kaeri e piny mane amiyo kwereu chon mondo obed margi nyaka chieng’. 
Jeremiah7:8 Onge gima uyudo kuom keto chunyu e wach miriambo muwachono. 
Jeremiah7:9 Ukwelo, unego ji, uteroru, ukuong’oru gi miriambo, utimo lisweche ni Baal, kendo ulamo nyiseche manono ma yande ok ung’eyo." 
Jeremiah7:10 To kusetimo gik ma kamago to eka ubiro e nyima e Hekalu ma nyinga nitieni, kendo uwacho niya, ‘Wasekwo.’ To uparo ni unyalo kwo adier, ka utimo timbe makuero kamano?" 
Jeremiah7:11 Koso uparo ni Hekalu mara en kama jomecho pondoe? An Ruoth Nyasaye aseneno gik ma utimo! 
Jeremiah7:12 “Dhiuru Shilo, dala mane ayiero mokwongo mondo nyinga obedie, mondo uneye gima ne atimo kuno, nikech richo mag joga Israel." 
Jeremiah7:13 To koro usetimo richogo duto! Kata obedo ni ne akawo chandruok, mi aloso kodu, to ne ok udewa, bende kane aluongou, to ne ok uyiena." 
Jeremiah7:14 Omiyo abiro timo ni Hekalu mara mugeno kuome mana kaka natimo ni Shilo. Kata mana dalau mane amiyo kwereuni, bende abiro timone kamano." 
Jeremiah7:15 Abiro riembou mondo ua e wang’a mana kaka ne ariembo oweteu ma jo-Efarim duto te. 
Jeremiah7:16 “In Jeremia, kik ulem ni jogi, bende kik ikwaya wach moro nikech gin, kata kik ihomba, nimar ok nawinji!" 
Jeremiah7:17 Donge ineno gik ma gitimo e miech Juda kendo e yore mag Jerusalem? 
Jeremiah7:18 Nyithindo modo yien, eka wuonegi moko mach, to mon dwalo mogo mondo olosgo kek obed misango ni nyasaye ma dhako ma iluongo ni Ruodh Polo. Bende gitimo ni nyiseche mamoko misengni miolo piny, mondo gichwanyago." 
Jeremiah7:19 To iparo ni an Ruoth Nyasaye ema gichwanya? Ooyo, gin ema gichwanyore giwegi, kendo gikelo wichkuot kuomgi kendgi." 
Jeremiah7:20 Emomiyo an Ruoth Nyasaye, abiro olo mirimba mager ka eri. Abiro ologi kuom ji kendo kuom jamni, to bende abiro ole kuom yien gi cham. Mirimba biro chalo gi mach mager, ma ng’ato ok nyal nego.”" 
Jeremiah7:21 Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto ma Nyasach Israel owacho niya, “Chamuru achama misengni monego wang’ pep, kaachiel gi misengni moyienu chamo." 
Jeremiah7:22 Kane agolo kwereu e piny Misri, ne ok awacho gimoro kuom misengni miwang’o pep kod misengni mamoko, kata golo chik kuomgi ne ok agolo." 
Jeremiah7:23 To ne achikogi matek mondo giluora, eka abed Nyasachgi, kendo gibed joga. Bende nanyisogi ni nyaka gitim gik mane achikogi, eka mondo gidhi maber." 
Jeremiah7:24 To ne ok gidewa, bende ne ok giwinjo wachna. Ne gisiko ka gitimo timbe mag wichkuot, kendo kar dhi nyime, to ne gidok chien." 
Jeremiah7:25 Chakre chieng’ mane kwereu owuokie Misri nyaka chil kawuono, asekawo chandruok, mi aoronigi jotichna ma jonabi." 
Jeremiah7:26 To kata kamano ne ok gidewa, bende ne ok giwinja, to wigi nomedo doko matek moloyo kata mana wi kweregi." 
Jeremiah7:27 To in Jeremia, kata obedo ni inyisogi weche duto kamano, to ok giniwinj wachni, kendo kata obedo ni iluongogi, to ok giniyieni." 
Jeremiah7:28 Eka bang’e ininyisgi niya, ‘Ogandani odagi winjo wach Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachgi, kendo ok giyie mondo opuonjgi. Ok ginyal wacho adiera, nikech adiera oselalnigi.’" 
Jeremiah7:29 “Yaye, jo-Jerusalem, ma yie wiu maboyo en ranyisi ni un joma owalna, dhiuru uliego oko, kendo udhi uywagi ewi gode, nimar an Ruoth Nyasaye asedagi joma akechogogi kendo aseweyogi." 
Jeremiah7:30 “Jo-Juda osetimo gima rach e nyima. Giseketo nyisechegi makuero e Hekalu mara, mi gidwanyo. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano." 
Jeremiah7:31 Gisegero kendo-mar-misango miluongo ni Tofeth e holo Benhinom mondo giwang’ie yawuotgi gi nyigi ka misango. To ne ok achikogi mondo gitim kamano, bende wach ma kamano ne ok aparo kata matin!" 
Jeremiah7:32 Mano omiyo ndalo biro chopo ma ok noluongie kanyo ni Tofeth kata ni holo Benhirom, to noluonge ni holo Nek, nikech giniyik joma otho e Tofeth, mi pong’ du ma onge kama odong’." 
Jeremiah7:33 Winy gi le mae thim ema nocham ringre joma otho, kendo ng’ato ok nobedie ma diriembgi." 
Jeremiah7:34 Anatiek mor gi ilo duto e miech Juda, kendo e wang’ yore man Jerusalem, ma kata mana dwond miaha gi chwore ok nowinji, nikech noyud ka piny oselokore thim." 
Jeremiah8:1 “E ndalono ji nogol choke ruodhi gi choke jodongo mag Juda e lietegi, kaachiel gi choke jodolo gi mag jonabi kod mag ji mamoko duto mane odak Jerusalem." 
Jeremiah8:2 Chokego nowit oko mondo chieng’ gi due kod sulue, mane gihero kendo gilamo, orieny kuomgi. Kar chokogi mondo oyikgi, to nowegi aweya gitow ewi lowo." 
Jeremiah8:3 Ji duto motony e oganda marachni, mi odak kuonde duto ma asekeyogie, nogomb mana tho kar bedo mangima. An Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik moko Duto ema awacho kamano.”" 
Jeremiah8:4 In Jeremia, wach ni joga ni an Ruoth Nyasaye awacho kama: “Ka ng’ato opodho, to donge ochako ochung’? Koso ka ng’ato obaro moweyo yo, to donge oduogo e yo kendo?" 
Jeremiah8:5 Ka kamano, to ere gima omiyo gibaro giweya ma ok ginyal duogo ira ngang’? Gituere kuom nyisechegi manono, kendo gidagi duogo ira." 
Jeremiah8:6 Ne achiko ita mondo awinj wechegi, to ne ok giwacho adiera kata achiel. Onge kata ng’at achiel kuomgi moseloko chunye kuom timbegi maricho, kata moseywagore kuom richo mosetimo. Ng’ato ka ng’ato mwomore e timbene, mana ka faras lweny mochodo kochiko wasigu." 
Jeremiah8:7 To kata ogungo mae kor polo ong’eyo ndalogi mag dar, kendo kata akuru gi opija gi nyamnaha bende ong’eyo ndalo ma giduogoe, joga to kia chikena." 
Jeremiah8:8 “Ere kaka ginyalo wacho ni giriek kendo ging’eyo chikena, to jopuonj chik mag miriambo osegajo chikena?" 
Jeremiah8:9 Jorieko wigi okuot. Wach ogoyogi nyang’eng’o kendo dhogi omoko. Gisedagi wechena, koro ere rieko ma gin-go?" 
Jeremiah8:10 Kuom mano mondgi kaachiel gi puothegi abiro miyo jomoko nono. Ji duto, madongo gi matindo, temo yudo pesa e yore mag miriambo, kata mana jonabi gi jodolo duto bende jomriambo," 
Jeremiah8:11 nimar giwacho ni gik moko dhi nyime maber to chutho gik moko ok dhi nyime maber. Kuom mano gichalo gi jothieth mathiedho jotuo marachrach, mana ka gima ok gituo." 
Jeremiah8:12 Bende uparo ni wigi okuot nikech timbe makuero mane gitimogo koso? Ooyo, wigi ok okuot kata matin, bende gionge gi wichkuot. Kuom mano, gibiro podho kaka ji mamoko osepodho, kendo ka akumogi to ginirum. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano." 
Jeremiah8:13 “Abiro tieko joga chutho, nikech gichalo yiend mzabibu kata ng’owo maonge olemo, ma kata potgi bende osener.”" 
Jeremiah8:14 Jo-Nyasaye penjore niya, “Ere gimomiyo wabet abeta? Biuru wadhi e mier mochiel motegno wathoe, nimar Ruoth Nyasaye oseng’adonwa buch tho. Osemiyowa pi motimo kwiri mondo wamodhi, nikech timbewa osebedo maricho e nyime." 
Jeremiah8:15 Ne wageno kue, to mana kayiem nono. Bende ne wageno ni wabiro yudo resruok, to masira ema obwogowa." 
Jeremiah8:16 Ne wawinjo ka farese mag wasigu futo ka Dan, kendo ywakgi ne miyo piny duto yiengni. Wasigugo osebiro mondo oketh pinywa, kod gik moko duto mantie, kaachiel gi dalawani kod joma odakie.”" 
Jeremiah8:17 Ruoth Nyasaye owacho niya, “Ng’euru ni abiro kelo thuonde mager kuomu. Gin thuonde man gi kwiri maricho, ma ok nyal bo, omiyo gibiro kayou.”" 
Jeremiah8:18 “Akuyo ma ok anyal yudo kue, kendo chunya tuo." 
Jeremiah8:19 Ling’uru ane, awinjo ka joga ywak kuonde duto ma gintie, ka gipenjo niya, ‘Ruoth Nyasaye oseweyo Sayun koso? Ruodh Sayun onge kuno adier?’ To Ruoth Nyasaye ma ruodhgi dwoko niya, ‘Ere gima omiyo usemiya mirima kuom lamo nyiseche mag pinje mamoko?’ ”" 
Jeremiah8:20 Ji ywak kawacho niya, “Ndalo keyo osekadho mak wayudo gima dwaresrego.”" 
Jeremiah8:21 Chunya lit, nikech itimo ni joga malit. Aywak kendo akuyo marach." 
Jeremiah8:22 Yath tinde orumo e piny Gilead koso? Jathieth onge kuno adier? Ere gima omiyo pok othiedh joga? 
Jeremiah9:1 “Mad wiya lokre soko mar pi, kendo pi wang’a lokre aora, mondo aywagi odiechieng’ gotieno nikech joga mosenegi." 
Jeremiah9:2 Mad abed ki kiru mar bworo e thim, kuma anyalo betie mabor gi joga, nimar giduto gin joma terore, kendo oganda ma andhoga." 
Jeremiah9:3 Lewni chalo gi atung’ moywa, kendo diro miriambo mana kaka atung’ diro asere, bende timbe miganga ema opong’o piny.” Ruoth Nyasaye owacho niya, “Joga timo richo kinde duto, kendo ok gidewa." 
Jeremiah9:4 Ng’ato ka ng’ato nyaka tang’ ni osiepne, kendo onge ng’ama nyalo geno owadgi, nimar owete duto gin jowuond ka Jakobo, bende ng’ato ka ng’ato kuodho osiepne." 
Jeremiah9:5 Giduto giwuondo osiepegi, kendo onge ng’ama wacho adiera. Gisepuonjo lewgi wacho miriambo, kendo gisedonjo matut e richo ma ok ginyal wuokie." 
Jeremiah9:6 Gitimo timbe mahundu kinde duto, timbegi mag wuond bende osiko asika, to gitamore yie kuoma." 
Jeremiah9:7 “Kuom mano, an Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto awacho ni abiro pwodho joga, ka ng’at malenyo mula mondo ogol ng’iende. Joga osetimo richo, koro ere gima datimnigi?" 
Jeremiah9:8 Lewni chalo gi asere man gi kwiri mager, kendo dhogi wacho weche mag miriambo. Ng’ato ka ng’ato wuoyo mang’won gi wadgi, to kara e chunye kucha to ochikone mana obadho!" 
Jeremiah9:9 Koro donge abiro kumogi kuom timbe ma kamago? Adier, abiro chulo kuor ni oganda machal kamano! An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano!”" 
Jeremiah9:10 Jeremia nowacho niya, “Abiro ywago gode gi lege, nikech gisetwo, kendo onge ng’ama wuothoe. Ywak mar jamni tinde ok winji, kendo winy gi le duto mae thim oseringo.”" 
Jeremiah9:11 Ruoth Nyasaye owacho niya, “Abiro loko miech Jerusalem gundni kama ondiegi ema odakie, kendo miech Juda abiro loko thim.”" 
Jeremiah9:12 Jeremia nopenjo Ruoth Nyasaye niya, “Ere gimomiyo piny okethore kendo otwo, ka piny motimo ongoro ma onge ng’ama wuothoe? Ere ng’ama riek manyalo winjo tiend wachni? Koso en ng’a ma isenyiso tiende mondo onyis joma moko?”" 
Jeremiah9:13 To Ruoth Nyasaye nodwoka niya, “Gima kama osetimore nikech jo-Israel oseweyo chik mane amiyogi. Ok giseluora, to bende ok gisetimo gik mane awachonigi ni mondo gitim." 
Jeremiah9:14 Gisebedo mana ka wigi tek, ka gitimo dwarogi giwegi, kendo giselamo kido manono mag Baal, kaka ne kweregi opuonjogi." 
Jeremiah9:15 Kuom mano, winji gima abiro timo, an Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto kendo ma Nyasach Israel. Abiro miyo joga alode makech mondo ocham, kod pi motimo kwiri mondo gimodhi." 
Jeremiah9:16 Abiro keyogi e kind ogendini ma ok ging’eyo, kendo ma kata kweregi bende ne ok ong’eyo. Bende abiro kelonigi wasigu mondo omonjgi nyaka chop atiekgi chuth.”" 
Jeremiah9:17 Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto wacho niya, “Luonguru mon ma joywak. Ee, oruru wach mondo mon mong’eyo ywak obi." 
Jeremiah9:18 Gibi piyo mondo gidengnwa, nyaka wengewa pong’ gi pi wang’, mi owre nikech ywak." 
Jeremiah9:19 Winjuru ywak maywagore Sayun, ‘Waserumo chuth, kendo waseyudo wichkuot miwuoro. Osedarwa e pinywa, kendo miechwa osekethi.’ ”" 
Jeremiah9:20 Jeremia nowacho niya, “Un mon, chikuru itu ni gima Ruoth Nyasaye owacho, mondo uwinj wachne. Puonjuru nyiu gi osiepeu wende ywak." 
Jeremiah9:21 Tho osedonjo gie dirisewa, koda ka e miech ruodhiwa, kendo osenego nyithindo e pewe oko, kod yawuowi e chirni.”" 
Jeremiah9:22 Ruoth Nyasaye wacho niya, “Ringre joma otho biro dhurore pidhe mana ka owuoyo mool e puothe. Ginichal gi cham ma jokeyo osebeto, to pok ochoki." 
Jeremiah9:23 “Ji mariek kik sungre nikech riekogi, joma rateke bende kik sungre nikech tekogi, kata joma omew kik sungre nikech mwandugi." 
Jeremiah9:24 To ng’at madwaro sungore, to mondo osungre mana nikech ong’eya, kendo wechena osedonjone, nimar an Ruoth Nyasaye ahero ji gi hera mosiko, kendo atimo gik makare kendo mowinjore e piny, nikech kamano e kaka adwaro. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano.”" 
Jeremiah9:25 Ruoth Nyasaye wacho ni ndalo biro ma nokumie ji duto moter nyangu," 
Jeremiah9:26 kaka jo-Misri gi jo-Juda gi jo-Edom gi jo-Amon kod jo-Moab, kaachiel gi ji duto modak e thim ma timgi en tito yie wigi, nikech tero nyangu mar jogo duto, kaachiel gi mar jo-Israel, ok en tero nyangu mar chuny to en mana mar ringruok." 
Jeremiah10:1 Un jo-Israel winjuru wach ma Ruoth Nyasaye osewachonu: 
Jeremiah10:2 “Kik uluw timbe ogendini mamoko, kendo kik chunyu parre kuom honni muneno e kor polo, kata obedo ni gimiyo ogendini parore." 
Jeremiah10:3 Gik ma jogo lamo gin gik manono, nimar gin mana yien motong’ e bungu, kendo japecho payogi mana gi koyo, eka obawogi gi fedha kod dhahabu," 
Jeremiah10:4 kendo oriwogi gi musmal mondo kik giwuore. 
Jeremiah10:5 Gichalo gi gik mibwogogo winy e pwothe nikech ok ginyal wuoyo. Iting’ogi ating’a nimar ok ginyal wuotho, omiyo kik uluorgi nimar ok ginyal hinyou, to bende onge gima ber ma ginyalo timo.”" 
Jeremiah10:6 A Ruoth Nyasaye, onge ng’ato machal kodi, iduong’ kendo nyingi bende duong’." 
Jeremiah10:7 A Ruodh ogendini duto, ere ng’ama ok diluori, nikech in iwinjori gi luor. Kuom jorieko duto mag ogendini, kata kuom ruodhigi duto, onge ng’ato maromo kodi." 
Jeremiah10:8 Giduto gifuwo kendo gionge rieko, nikech giyudo riekogi manono mana kuom yien mopa!" 
Jeremiah10:9 Kido magi manonogo obaw gi fedha mogol Tarshish, kendo gi dhahabu mogol Ufaz. Gin mana tich lwedo. Irwakogi gi lewni mambulu gi maralik, ka jachuech molony ema ochueyo." 
Jeremiah10:10 To Ruoth Nyasaye e Nyasaye maradier. En e Nyasaye mangima, kendo ruoth mochwere. Ka okecho to piny yiengni, kendo ogendini ok nyal siro mirimbe." 
Jeremiah10:11 Nyaka inyis jogo ni nyiseche mane ok ochueyo polo gi piny ibiro kethi. Ok ginichak gibed kamoro amora e piny. 
Jeremiah10:12 Ruoth Nyasaye nochueyo piny gi tekone, mogure motegno kendo noyaro polo gi riekone." 
Jeremiah10:13 Omiyo pi man e tok polo wuo, kendo otugo boche polo e tung’ piny duto. Bende omiyo polo mil ka koth chue, kendo ogolo yamo kar kenone mondo okudhi." 
Jeremiah10:14 Gik ma kamago miyo ji ng’eng’, kendo bedo mofuwo. Jotheth duto yudo wichkuot kuom gik ma githedho, nikech gin mana nyiseche manono, ma onge gi ngima." 
Jeremiah10:15 Gin gik manono moromo chayo, kendo gibiro rumo, chieng’ ma Ruoth Nyasaye biro mondo otiekgi." 
Jeremiah10:16 Nyasach Jakobo to ok chal gi gigo, nimar en ema ochueyo gik moko duto, kendo oseyiero jo-Israel mondo obed joge owuon. Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto e nyinge." 
Jeremiah10:17 “Un jo-Jerusalem ma osetimnigi ageng’a, chokuru giu," 
Jeremiah10:18 nimar Ruoth Nyasaye owacho ni obiro golo ji duto modak e pinyni, kendo obiro sandou nyaka urum pep.”" 
Jeremiah10:19 Jo-Jerusalem ywak niya, “Mano kaka wahinyore malit, kendo adhondewa ok nyal chango, to ne waparo ni en gima wanyalo dhilgo." 
Jeremiah10:20 Hembewa osekethore chuth, kendo tonde mane otuegigo osechot. Yawuotwa duto osea modhi mabor, koro onge ng’ama odong’ ma dichak gurnwa hembewa, bende onge ng’ama nyalo lieronwa rageng’ni maggi.”" 
Jeremiah10:21 Jeremia nodwokogi niya, “Jotelo mau onge gi rieko, nikech ok gipenj wach kuom Ruoth Nyasaye. Mano emomiyo ok gisetimo gimoro maber, kendo jowa oseke kuonde duto." 
Jeremiah10:22 Winjuru! Wach osebiro! Koko maduong’ timore e piny moro yo nyandwat. Gin jolweny mabiro ketho miech Juda, mi lokre thim ma ondiegi ema dakie." 
Jeremiah10:23 A Ruoth Nyasaye, ang’eyo ni ngima ng’ato ok nie tekone owuon, bende onge ng’ama nyalo yiero yore owuon." 
Jeremiah10:24 Kuom mano, A Ruoth Nyasaye, riewa gi bura, to ok gi mirimbi, nono to itiekowa pep." 
Jeremiah10:25 Ol mirimbi kuom ogendini ma ok oyie kuomi. Ee, kech kod jogo ma ok lami! Gisenegowa, wan nyikwa Jakobo, mi gitiekowa duto, kendo giketho pinywa.”" 
Jeremiah11:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Jeremia niya," 
Jeremiah11:2 “Winj weche mag singruok ma abiro wachoni, eka inyis jo-Juda gi joma odak Jerusalem" 
Jeremiah11:3 ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel okuong’o ng’ato ang’ata motamore rito wach singruokni. 
Jeremiah11:4 En singruok mane atimo gi kweregi kane agologi e piny Misri, e sand mager ka mach makakni. Ne awachonigi ni ka girito chikena, kendo gitimo gik moko duto ma anyisogi, to ginibed joga, kendo anabed Nyasachgi." 
Jeremiah11:5 Bang’e eka anachop singruok mane atimo gi kweregi ni namigi piny maber kendo momew, ma koro gintieni.” Jeremia nodwoko Ruoth Nyasaye niya, “Ee, ayie timo kamano.”" 
Jeremiah11:6 Eka Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Jeremia ni, “Dhiyo iland wechegi e miech Juda kendo e yore mag Jerusalem, kinyiso ji mondo owinj kendo orit weche mag singruokna." 
Jeremiah11:7 Chakre kinde mane agoloe kweregi e piny Misri nyaka chil kawuono, asebedo kasiemogi matek mondo girit wechena." 
Jeremiah11:8 To ne gitamore winjo kata dewo. Kar timo kamano to ng’ato ka ng’ato nosiko ka timo timbene mag wich teko. Ne oyudo ka osechikogi mondo girit singruokno, to ne gidagi. Mano emomiyo nakelonigi kum duto mane singruokno oting’o.”" 
Jeremiah11:9 Bang’e Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Jeremia niya, “Jo-Juda gi joma odak Jerusalem piem koda." 
Jeremiah11:10 Gisedok e richo kweregi mane otamore timo gima ne awacho, nikech gisebedo ka gilamo nyiseche manono. Jo-Israel gi jo-Juda oseketho singruok mane atimo gi kweregi." 
Jeremiah11:11 Kuom mano an Ruoth Nyasaye asiemogi ni abiro kelo masira kuomgi kendo onge ng’at ma notony. To kata ka giywak mondo akonygi, to ok nadewgi." 
Jeremiah11:12 Bang’e jo-Juda gi joma odak Jerusalem biro dhi ir nyisechegi ma gisebedo ka gitimonigi misengni, mondo okonygi. To nyisechego ok noresgi ka masira obiro." 
Jeremiah11:13 Jo-Juda nigi nyiseche mang’eny mana ka miechgi, kendo joma odak Jerusalem bende oseloso kende-mag-misango mang’eny, mana moromo gi yore mag dalagi, mondo gitimie misengni ni Baal." 
Jeremiah11:14 Kuom mano, in Jeremia, kik ilam ni jogi, kata kik isaya mondo akonygi nimar kata ka ginie chandruok mi giluonga, to ok nadewgi.”" 
Jeremiah11:15 Ruoth Nyasaye wacho niya, “Joma ahero, timo timbe maricho. Ere gimomiyo oyienigi biro e oda? Koso giparo ni ginyalo geng’o masira kuom timo kuong’ruok kendo kuom wang’o boche ma gitimogo misengni? Bende giparo ni ginitony adier?" 
Jeremiah11:16 Chon ne aluongogi ni yadh zeituni ma obokene ng’eny, kendo manyago olembe mathoth mabeyo, to koro abiro wang’o obokene kod bedene gi mach mariadore ka mor polo." 
Jeremiah11:17 “An Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo gik Moko Duto ema napidho jo-Israel gi jo-Juda kaka ng’ato pidho yath, to koro abiro bwogogi gi masira nikech richo ma gisetimo. Gisekelo gima kama kuomgi giwegi, nikech gimiya mirima kuom timo misengni ni Baal.”" 
Jeremiah11:18 Ruoth Nyasaye nonyisa gik maricho mane wasika dwaro timona. 
Jeremiah11:19 Ne achalo gi nyarombo mogol e abila, ka kia ni idwaro nego, kendo ne ok ang’eyo ni ichano gik marichogo kuoma. Ne giwacho niya, “Wanegeuru mondo nyinge olal nono.”" 
Jeremiah11:20 Eka nalemo niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto, in e jang’ad bura makare, kendo ma temo chuny ji gi parogi. We aneye ka ichulo ni jogo kuor, nikech aseketo wachna e lweti.”" 
Jeremiah11:21 Jo-Anathoth ne dwaro nego Jeremia, kendo ne giwachone ni gibiro nege ka pod osiko koyalo e nying Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Jeremiah11:22 Kuom mano Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto nowuoyo kuomgi niya, “Abiro kumogi. Yawuotgi biro tho e lweny. Nyithindgi bende kech biro nego." 
Jeremiah11:23 Onge kata ng’at achiel kuomgi ma nodong’, chieng’ ma achano ni akelo masira kuom jo-Anathoth.”" 
Jeremiah12:1 “A Ruoth Nyasaye, ang’eyo ni kata ka akeloni ywakna, to biro yudore ni in ema in kare. Kata kamano pod daher penjie wach kuom adiera mari. Ere gimomiyo joma richo yudo mwandu? Koso ere gimomiyo joma jowuond dhi maber?." 
Jeremiah12:2 Ipidhogi, mi gigol tiendegi, kendo gidongo, mi ginyag olemo. Pile giwuoyo maber kuomi, to chutho chunygi bor kodi." 
Jeremiah12:3 To Ruoth Nyasaye, ing’eya, kendo ineno gik ma atimo, bende inono chunya mondo ine kaka aheri. Ywa joma richogi oko ka rombe ma idwaro yang’o, kendo ketgi tenge nyaka chieng’ minegogie chopi." 
Jeremiah12:4 Nyaka karang’o ma pinywa biro bedo motwo, kendo lum manie lege biro wang’ie? Le gi winy tho, nikech timbe maricho mag joma odak e pinyni, mawacho ni ok ine gik maricho ma gitimo.”" 
Jeremiah12:5 Ruoth Nyasaye nowachona niya, “In Jeremia, ka ringo gi ji oseoli, to koro ere kaka dipiem gi farese? Ka piny maber midakieni ema iywagorie, to ere kaka ibiro betie bungu mandiwa manie geng Jordan?" 
Jeremiah12:6 Koda ka omineni hie osendhogi, kendo giseriwore gi jomoko ma monji. Kik igen-gi, kata obedo ni giwachoni weche mabeyo kamano.”" 
Jeremiah12:7 An Ruoth Nyasaye awacho niya, “Aseweyo ogandana mane ayiero, mi adagigi. Aseketo joga ma ahero e lwet wasikgi." 
Jeremiah12:8 Joga awuon oselokore wasika. Giserutona ka sibuor manie bungu, mi koro amon kodgi." 
Jeremiah12:9 Joga awuon chalo gi olith ma kite okikokiko, ma olidhe mamoko gueyo koni gi koni. Un ogendini, biuru mondo ugoru kuom joga, mi uyaki mana kaka ondiegi gore kuom gima gimako, mi gikidhi." 
Jeremiah12:10 Jotelo mag pinje mamoko oseketho puotha mar mzabibu. Gisenyono puothena piny gi tiendgi, mi giloko pinya maber odoko motwo ma ok nyag gimoro." 
Jeremiah12:11 Gisekethe, ma oriere e nyima kanyo ma onge tich. Piny duto oselokore thim, to onge ng’ama dewo." 
Jeremiah12:12 Ji oseng’ado gode mae thim ka gibiro mondo giyeki. To an ema aoro lweny mondo otiek pinyno, ma onge ng’at manyalo dakie gi kue." 
Jeremiah12:13 Joga pidho ngano, to kuthe ema gikayo. Gisetiyo matek, to ok giyud gimoro. Pinygi otho nikech mirimba mager.”" 
Jeremiah12:14 Ruoth Nyasaye wacho niya, “An gi gima adwaro wacho kuom ogendini maricho mokiewo gi jo-Israel. Abiro pudhogi oko e pinygi ka yien mipudho, mi nares jo-Juda kuomgi." 
Jeremiah12:15 To ka asepudhogi oko kamano, eka anakechgi, mi aduog oganda ka oganda e lope, kendo e pinye owuon." 
Jeremiah12:16 Chon ogendinigo ne kuong’ore gi nying Baal, kendo ne gipuonjo joga mondo otim kamano. To ka koro ginyalo yie luwo dini mar joga gi chunygi duto, mi gikuong’re gi nyinga, to gin bende ginibed joga." 
Jeremiah12:17 To ka oganda moro otamore, to anapudhe oko, mi akethe chuth. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano.”" 
Jeremiah13:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nowachona mondo adhi ang’iew law, atue e nungona, to kik abude e pi." 
Jeremiah13:2 Omiyo ne ang’iewo lawno kaka Ruoth Nyasaye ne ochika, mi arwako." 
Jeremiah13:3 Bang’e Ruoth Nyasaye nowuoyo koda kendo, mowachona niya," 
Jeremiah13:4 “Dhiyo e aora Yufrate, ilony law mirwakono mondo ipandi e bur lwanda.”" 
Jeremiah13:5 Omiyo ne adhi mi apande but aora Yufrate kaka ne Ruoth Nyasaye ochika. 
Jeremiah13:6 Bang’ kinde moko, Ruoth Nyasaye nowachona mondo adogi Yufrate aom lawno." 
Jeremiah13:7 Kuom mano nadok Yufrate, mi arango kama ne apandoe lawno, ne ayude, mi anwang’o ka okethore, ma onge tich." 
Jeremiah13:8 Ruoth Nyasaye nochako owuoyo koda, ka wachona niya," 
Jeremiah13:9 “Mano e kaka abiro ketho sunga mar jo-Juda kaachiel gi sunga marach mar jo-Jerusalem. 
Jeremiah13:10 Oganda marachni osetamore winjo wachna, mi gisebedo joma wigi tek, kendo ma timbegi richo. Giselamo nyiseche mamoko, kendo gitiyonigi. Kuom mano gibiro chalo mana gi law ma koro onge tichni." 
Jeremiah13:11 Kaka law atueya mako nungo ng’at morwake matek, e kaka nadwaro ni mondo jo-Isarel gi jo-Juda omaka matek, mondo gibed joga, kendo gikel pak kod duong’ ni nyinga. To kata kamano ne gitamore luora.”" 
Jeremiah13:12 “In Jeremia, nyis jo-Isarel ni an Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachgi awacho kama: ‘Agulini mag divai onego opong’ gi divai.’ To gibiro dwoki ni, ‘Wang’eyo maber ni agulini mag divai onego opong’ gi divai.’" 
Jeremiah13:13 Eka ichak iwachnigi ni an Ruoth Nyasaye abiro miyo jopinyni madho divai nyaka mer. Koda ka ruodhi ma nyikwa Daudi gi jodolo gi jonabi kod jo-Jerusalem duto biro mer. 
Jeremiah13:14 Bang’e anarwadgi duto, wuone gi nyithindo machalre. Ok nakechgi kendo ok nawegi, bende ok nang’wonnigi ngang’, to naneggi duto.”" 
Jeremiah13:15 “Un jo-Israel, winjuru! Ruoth Nyasaye ema wuoyo, omiyo kik usungru, mi utamru winje." 
Jeremiah13:16 Miuru Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu duong’, ka pok okelo mudho, mi uchwanyoru e gode gotieno, kendo kapok oloko ler mugenono mudho mandiwa." 
Jeremiah13:17 Ka utamoru winjo siemni, to anaywagu gi chunya nikech sungau. Anaywagu malit, mi pi wang’a nochuer nyaka wang’a owre, nikech odar jo-Ruoth Nyasaye, kitero e tuech.”" 
Jeremiah13:18 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Jeremia niya, “Dhiyo inyis ruoth gi min mare mondo joa e kombegi mag duong’ nikech osimbegi mag loch osea e wigi molwar piny." 
Jeremiah13:19 Oselwor miech piny milambo, kendo onge ng’ama nyalo resogi. Osedar jo-Juda mi oter e tuech.”" 
Jeremiah13:20 Un jo-Jerusalem, neyeuru! Wasiku biro, koa malo yo nyandwat. Ere oganda mane chalonu gi kweth maber, mane omiu mondo uriti?" 
Jeremiah13:21 Unuwach ni ji ang’o ka joma yande uparo ni osiepeu ema koro oket e wiu ka jotendu? Ubiro bedo gi rem mana ka dhako ma muoch kayo! 
Jeremiah13:22 To eka upenjo gimomiyo gima kama osetimorenu, kendo gimomiyo oseyiech lepu kuomu, mi odwanyu, to ubiro yudo ni mano otimore nikech richou lich." 
Jeremiah13:23 Bende ja-Nubi nyalo loko kit dende? Koso kwach dilok kite marabok dok kido moro nono? Kapo ni gigo nyalo timore, to kara un bende mutimo gik maricho unyalo timo gik mabeyo!" 
Jeremiah13:24 Ruoth Nyasaye biro keyou ka mihudhi ma yamo mager moa e thim keyo. 
Jeremiah13:25 Ruoth Nyasaye osewacho ni mano e gima biro timorenu. Osechano mondo otimnu kamano nikech useweye, mi ugeno mana kuom nyiseche manono." 
Jeremiah13:26 Ruoth Nyasaye owuon ema noyiech lepu kuomu, mi dugu nonen." 
Jeremiah13:27 Ruoth Nyasaye oseneno kaka utimo gik ma omon-go. Ulawo nyiseche manono e gode kendo e pewe, mana ka ng’at ma gombo chi wadgi, kendo ka faras ma dichwo ma lawo madhako! Un jo-Jerusalem urumo! Unuben maler karang’o?" 
Jeremiah14:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nowuoyo gi Jeremia kuom oro mane omako piny niya," 
Jeremiah14:2 “Jo-Juda ywak kendo miechgi kethore. Jogi oriere piny kokuyo, kendo jo-Jerusalem ywak mondo okonygi." 
Jeremiah14:3 Jodongo oro jotichgi mondo oumbnigi, to ka gichopo e sokni, to ok giyud pi, omiyo giduogo gi dapige nono. Giumo wigi nikech gidhier nono, kendo gikia gima ginyalo timo." 
Jeremiah14:4 Chuny jopur lit, nikech koth onge, kendo piny otwo, omiyo giumo wigi." 
Jeremiah14:5 Mwanda bende nywolo nyathi, to oweyo mana kanyo nikech lum onge." 
Jeremiah14:6 Kenje mag thim chung’ ewi gode, kendo gamo yueyo mana ka bwe. Wengegi wingni nikech lum onge." 
Jeremiah14:7 “Joga ywakna niya, ‘A Ruoth Nyasaye, kata ka richowa nyiso ni wan joketho, to yie ikonywa kaka isesingori. Adier, waseweyi ndalo mang’eny, kwaketho e nyimi." 
Jeremiah14:8 To in kendi ema jo-Israel ogeno kuomi, nimar in ema iresowa ka wanie chandruok. Ere gima omiyo ichalo wendo e pinywa ma bworo kuom otieno achiel kende?" 
Jeremiah14:9 Ere gima omiyo ichalo gi ng’at mobwok kata ka jalweny ma onge gi teko ma dokonygo ng’ato? Adier, in Ruoth Nyasaye in kodwa, kendo wan jogi, omiyo kik iwitwa.’ ”" 
Jeremiah14:10 Ruoth Nyasaye wuoyo kuom jogi niya, “Gihero ringo weya kamano, kendo gibayo kamoro amora ma gihero. Kuom mano, ok amor kodgi, to aparo richo ma gisetimo, kendo abiro kumogi nikech richogigo.”" 
Jeremiah14:11 Ruoth Nyasaye nowachona niya, “Kik ikwaya mondo akony jogi." 
Jeremiah14:12 Kata ka gitueyo chiemo, to ok nawinj ywakgi, kendo kata ka gichiwona misengni miwang’o pep, gi mag erokamano, to ok nabed mamor kodgi. Abiro miyo githo e lweny, kendo kech gi tuo biro negogi.”" 
Jeremiah14:13 An to ne adwoke ni, “A Ruoth Nyasaye, donge ing’eyo ni jonabi wacho ni ji niya, ‘Kech kata lweny biro bedo maonge, nimar nisingori ni kue kende ema nobed e pinywa’?”" 
Jeremiah14:14 To Ruoth Nyasaye nowachona niya, “Jonabigo koro weche mag miriambo e nyinga. An ne ok aorogi, kendo ne ok amiyogi chik, bende ne ok awuoyo kodgi. Gik ma giwachonugo gin fweny ma ok owuok kuoma, to gikoro mana weche manono ma giparo apara." 
Jeremiah14:15 An Ruoth Nyasaye anyisi gima abiro timo ni jonabi mane ok aorogo. Giwuoyo gi nyinga ka giwacho ni lweny kod kech ok bi mako pinyni, to adier, kech gi lweny ema abiro negogigo." 
Jeremiah14:16 Joma ne giwachonigi gigo bende lweny gi kech biro nego. Ringregi kaachiel gi mag mondgi kod nyithindgi nowiti e yore mag Jerusalem, ma onge ng’ama noyiki, nikech abiro kumogi kuom timbegi maricho." 
Jeremiah14:17 “In Jeremia, wach ni ji kama: ‘Pi wang’a mondo omol odiechieng’ gotieno! Onego kik awe ywak nimar joga osego matek, mi ohinyore malit." 
Jeremiah14:18 Ka awuok oko e pap, to aneno ringre joma onegi e lweny, to ka adonjo e dala moro, to aneno joma kech nego. Jonabi gi jodolo dhi nyime gi tijegi, to chutho ok ging’eyo gima gitimo.’ ”" 
Jeremiah14:19 “A Ruoth Nyasaye iseweyo jo-Juda chuth koso? Adier, ichayo jo-Sayun? Ere gimomiyo isehinyowa malit kamano, ma ok wanyal chango? Ne wageno ni wabiro yudo gik mabeyo, to onge gima ber mane wayudo. Ne waparo ni ibiro changowa, to masira malit ema nopoyowa." 
Jeremiah14:20 A Ruoth Nyasaye, wahulo richowa kaachiel gi richo kwerewa. Adier, waseketho e nyimi." 
Jeremiah14:21 Kik ijwang’wa, nikech dipo ka nyingi okethore. Bende kik iyie jomoko cha Jerusalem, kama kom duong’ni nitie. Rit singruok mane itimo kodwa, kendo kik ikethe." 
Jeremiah14:22 Bende nyiseche manono mag ogendini nyalo kelo koth adier? Koso polo giwegi nigi teko mar miyo koth chue? Ooyo, in ema waketo chunywa kuomi, A Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachwa, nikech in kende ema inyalo timo gik ma kamago.”" 
Jeremiah15:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nowachona niya, “Kata da bed ni Musa gi Samuel ema jochung’ e nyima ka, to ok anyal weyo ni jogi richogi. Wachnigi mondo gia e wang’a." 
Jeremiah15:2 To ka gipenjo ni gidhi kanye, to nyisgi ni Ruoth Nyasaye owacho kama: Jomoko kuomu tuo biro nego, kendo mano e kuma gibiro dhiye! To moko biro tho e lweny, kendo kuno ema gibiro dhiye! Bende moko kech biro nego, mi kuno ema gibiro dhiye! To moko ibiro tero e tuech, kendo kuno ema gibiro dhiye!" 
Jeremiah15:3 “An Ruoth Nyasaye asechano ni masiche ang’wen biro makogi. Ibiro neggi mi guogi biro kidho ringregi. Winy nochamgi kendo ondiegi nocham ringregi modong’. 
Jeremiah15:4 Abiro miyo ogendini duto mag piny bwog konenogi, nikech gik maricho mane Manase wuod Hezekia otimo Jerusalem kane en ruodh Juda." 
Jeremiah15:5 “Ere ng’ama biro kechou, un jo-Jerusalem? Koso ng’ama biro ywagou? En ng’a ma biro chung’ mondo omosu?" 
Jeremiah15:6 Ne uweya, kendo udagi wachna, omiyo ne abiro, mi atiekou, nikech ne ok anyal geng’o mirimba kendo." 
Jeremiah15:7 Ne akeyou e mier duto, mana ka mihudhi ma yamo keyo. Un joga ne atiekou, mi anego nyithindu, nikech ne udagi weyo timbeu maricho." 
Jeremiah15:8 Ne anego chwo mang’eny, mi ubedo gi mond liete mathoth ka kuoyo mae dhonam ne anego yawuotu godiechieng’, mi akelo ne minegi kuyo." 
Jeremiah15:9 Dhako man gi yawuowi abiriyo opodho piny ka muche orumo, nikech yawuotego duto osenegi. Piny othone mudho ka wiye okuot, kendo chunye chandore. Abiro miyo wasigu neg jou ma pod odong’ ka ngima. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano.”" 
Jeremiah15:10 Jeremia noywagore niya, “Yaye! Hapa rach! Ere gima omiyo ne mama onywola, nimar ji duto osiko ka dhaw adhawa koda? Pok aholo ng’ato pesana, bende pok aholo pesa kuom ng’ato, to kata kamano, ji duto kuong’a." 
Jeremiah15:11 A Ruoth Nyasaye, kapo ni ok asetiyoni maber, kata ka ok asekwayi mondo ikech wasika ka chandruok omako to kuong’ duto ma gikuong’ago mondo omaka." 
Jeremiah15:12 Onge ng’ama nyalo turo chuma, to moloyo chuma monywas gi mula, moa e piny ma yo nyandwat.”" 
Jeremiah15:13 Ruoth Nyasaye nodwoka niya, “Abiro kelo wasigu oyak mwandu joga, mondo akumgi kuom richo ma gisetimo e pinygi duto." 
Jeremiah15:14 Abiro miyo giti ni wasikgi e piny ma ok ging’eyo, nikech mirimba chalo mach, kendo biro liel nyaka chieng’.”" 
Jeremiah15:15 Jeremia nodwoke niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye, in ing’eyo weche duto, omiyo para kendo ikonya. Chul kuor ni joma sanda. Kik iwegi, nono to ginega. Ng’e ni giyanya nikech in." 
Jeremiah15:16 Ne iwuoyo koda, mi awinjo wecheni duto. A Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto, an ng’ati, omiyo wecheni opong’o chunya gi mor kod ilo." 
Jeremiah15:17 Ne ok abet e kanyakla mar joma mor, bende ne ok aneno ber, to ne an mana kenda, ka apong’ gi siwuori, nikech tich mane imiya." 
Jeremiah15:18 Ere gima omiyo asiko ka an gi rem malit? Ang’o momiyo adhondena ok nyal chango? Koso idwaro bedona ka aora ma duono ndalo oro?” 
Jeremiah15:19 To Ruoth Nyasaye nodwoka niya, “Ka iduogo ira, to abiro rwaki, mi inichak ibed jatichna, ka iwacho weche makare, ma ok weche manono, to inichak ibed janabina. Ji biro biro iri, to ok inidhi irgi." 
Jeremiah15:20 Abiro loki motegno ka ohinga mar chuma, mondo eka isir jogo. Gibiro kedo kodi, to ok giniloyi, nikech abiro bet kodi mondo ariti." 
Jeremiah15:21 Abiro resi kuom joma timbegi richo, kendo abiro konyi kuom jomahundu. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano.”" 
Jeremiah16:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nochako owuoyo koda, kowachona niya," 
Jeremiah16:2 “Ok nikendi, kendo ok ninywol nyithindo ka." 
Jeremiah16:3 Abiro nyisi gima biro timore ni nyithindo monywol ka, kaachiel gi jonywolgi." 
Jeremiah16:4 Tuoche maricho biro negogi, to onge ng’ama noywaggi, bende ok noyikgi. Ginidhurre pidhe pidhe mana ka owuoyo miolo e puothe. Moko notho e lweny to moko kech nonegi, kendo winy gi ondiegi nocham ringrergi." 
Jeremiah16:5 “Kik idonj e ot miywagoe ng’at motho, to bende kik iywag ng’ato, nimar asegolo kue mara gi herana kod ng’wonona kuomgi. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano." 
Jeremiah16:6 Joma omew kaachiel gi joma odhier biro tho e pinyni, to onge ng’ama noywaggi kata noyikgi. Onge ng’ama noter buchgi kata ma noliel wiye ma nyiso ni en e lit" 
Jeremiah16:7 Ka ng’ato ng’ate otho, to onge ng’ama nobi ochiem kode kata ometh kode mondo oduog chunye, bed ni wuon kata min ema otho." 
Jeremiah16:8 “Kik idonj e ot ma ji timoe sawo. Bende kik ibed piny mondo ichiem kendo imeth kodgi. 
Jeremiah16:9 An Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto awacho kama: Abiro tieko mor kod ilo ma jogo nigo, ma kata dwond mon ma miehni gi chwogi ok nowinj kaeri. Gigi duto notimre kapod gingima kendo gineno gi wang’gi!”" 
Jeremiah16:10 “Ka inyisogi wechegi, to gibiro penji gima omiyo asechano mondo akumgi malit kamano. Bende gibiro penji gima giseketho, kata richo ma gisetimo e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachgi." 
Jeremiah16:11 To dwokgi ni Ruoth Nyasaye owacho kama: ‘Kwereu noweya, mi otiyo ni nyiseche mamoko kendo olamo. Ne giweya kendo ne ok giwinjo chikena." 
Jeremiah16:12 Koro un to usetimo gik maricho moloyo kata mane kwereu otimo. Un duto un joma richo ma wigi tek, ma ok nyal luora." 
Jeremiah16:13 Kuom mano abiro riembou e pinyni, mi ateru e piny ma ok ung’eyo, kata ma kwereu bende ne ok ong’eyo. Kuno unulamie nyiseche mamoko odiechieng’ gotieno, to ok anakechu.’" 
Jeremiah16:14 To ndalo biro ma onge ng’ama nokuong’re gi nyinga ka Nyasaye mangima mane ogolo jo-Israel e piny Misri. 
Jeremiah16:15 To ginikuong’re gi nyinga mana ka Nyasaye mangima mane ogolo jo-israel e piny man yo nyandwat gi pinje mamoko duto mane osekeyogie. Anaduoggi e pinygi giwegi mane amiyo kweregi. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano. 
Jeremiah16:16 “Abiro oro ji mang’eny mondo omak jogi, mana kaka jolupo maluwo rech. Bang’e naor jodwar mang’eny mondo odwargi e gode duto koda ka e kind lwendni." 
Jeremiah16:17 Aneno gik moko duto ma gitimo, kendo onge gima opondona, bende richogi ok nyal kadhona mak aneno." 
Jeremiah16:18 Abiro miyo gichul nyadiriyo kuom richogi gi timbegi mamono. Gisedwanyo pinya gi nyisechegi maonge gi ngima mana ka ringre joma otho, kendo gisepong’o piny gi nyisechegi mamono gogo.”" 
Jeremiah16:19 Eka Jeremia nolemo ka wacho kama: “A Ruoth Nyasaye, in ema imiya teko, kendo irita, bende in e kara ma abwokie e kinde mag chandruok. Ogendini moa tung’ piny ka tung’ piny nobi iri, kawacho niya, ‘Kwerewa ne lamo nyiseche manono ma gin mana kido ma onge tich." 
Jeremiah16:20 Dhano bende nyalo loso nyiseche owuon? Ooyo, mago ok dibed nyiseche kata matin!’ ”" 
Jeremiah16:21 Ruoth Nyasaye nodwoko niya, “Mano emomiyo abiro nyisogi tekona gi duong’na dichiel kendo mogik, mi gibiro ng’eyo ni an e Ruoth Nyasaye.”"
