Jeremiah17:1 Ruoth Nyasaye wacho niya, “Un jo-Juda, richou ondik gi kalamb chuma, kendo ogorgi gi gima bith e chunyu, kendo e tunge kendeu mag liswa." 
Jeremiah17:2 Yawuotu paro kende-mag-liswa kod sirni milamo mane ochung’ e tiend yien duto motimo tiep, kendo e pidhe" 
Jeremiah17:3 kod gode duto manie pewe. Abiro miyo wasiku yak mwanduu duto, nikech richo ma usetimo kuonde duto e pinyu." 
Jeremiah17:4 Ubiro a e piny mane amiyou, kendo abiro miyo utiyo ni wasiku e piny ma ok ung’eyo, nimar mirimba chal gi mach, kendo biro liel nyaka chieng’.”" 
Jeremiah17:5 Ruoth Nyasaye wacho niya, “Okuong’ ng’at ma baro weya, to geno mana kuom dhano, ka parone bor koda." 
Jeremiah17:6 Ochalo kudho manie thim, madongo e piny motwo, mana e lowo motimo chumbi, ma onge gima dongoe maber. Onge gima ber ma ng’atno nyalo yudo." 
Jeremiah17:7 To oguedh ng’at ma ogena kendo oyie kuoma," 
Jeremiah17:8 nimar ochalo gi yath mopidh but aora, matero tiendene kochomo pi. Onge gima thage, kata ndalo oro, ma chieng’ rienyie mager, nikech pote osiko ka ng’ich ang’icha. Ok odew kata ka koth ok chue, to osiko konyago anyaga olemo." 
Jeremiah17:9 “Ere ng’ama nyalo ng’eyo gima chuny dhano paro? Onge gima jamriambo kaka chuny dhano. En gi tuoche mang’eny ma ok nyal chango. 
Jeremiah17:10 An Ruoth Nyasaye amanyo paro mar dhano, kendo apimo rieko mag ji. Atimo ni ng’ato ka ng’ato mana kaka ochalo, kendo mana ka luwore gi timbene." 
Jeremiah17:11 Ng’ato ma yudo pesa e yor miriambo chalo gi winyo matoyo tong’ mane ok otoko. Gibiro lalne kapok obet ng’at moti, kendo bang’e nolokre mana ng’at mofuwo.”" 
Jeremiah17:12 Hekalu marwa chal gi kom duong’ mang’ongo, mogur ewi got mabor nyaka ne piny chakre." 
Jeremiah17:13 Ruoth Nyasaye ema jo-Israel ogeno kuome, omiyo ji duto moweye noyud wichkuot. Ginilal nono mana ka nying mondik e buru, nikech giseweyo Ruoth Nyasaye ma en soko mar pi maliw." 
Jeremiah17:14 Jeremia nokwayo niya, “A Ruoth Nyasaye, changa mondo adok mangima. Resa mondo ayud kue. In ema apaki." 
Jeremiah17:15 Ji penja ni, ‘Ere masiche mane Ruoth Nyasaye obwogowago? Wadwaro mondo okelgi sani!’" 
Jeremiah17:16 To Ruoth Nyasaye, bende ne akwayi mondo ikelnigi masira? In Ruoth Nyasaye ing’eyo ni ne ok agomb mondo giyud thagruok, kendo in ing’eyo gima asewacho." 
Jeremiah17:17 Kik ilokrina masira, nimar in e kara mar resruok ka masira oyuda." 
Jeremiah17:18 Kel wichkuot kuom joma sanda, to an mondo iweya, kendo kelnigi kihondko, to an kik ibwoga. Kelnigi masira, kendo kethgi chuth.”" 
Jeremiah17:19 Ruoth Nyasaye nowachona niya, “Jeremia, dhiyo mondo ichung’ e dhorangach miluongo ni Ranga Ji, kama ruodhi mag Juda donjogo kendo wuokgo Jerusalem. Bang’e idhi e dhorangeye mamoko mag dala." 
Jeremiah17:20 Nyis ruodhi kod jo-Juda duto, kaachiel gi ji duto modak Jerusalem maluwo dhorangeyegi mondo ochik itgi owinj gima awacho." 
Jeremiah17:21 Nyisgi ni ka ok gidwar tho, to kik giting’ misike chieng’ Sabato. Bende kik giting’ gimoro ka gikadhogo e dhorangeye mag Jerusalem chieng’no." 
Jeremiah17:22 Kata mana ting’o gik moko ka gigolo e utgi kik giting’. Nyaka girit chieng’ Sabato obed maler, kaka ne achiko kweregi, kendo kik giti tich moro chieng’no." 
Jeremiah17:23 To kweregi ne ok odewo winjo wachna, kendo wigi ne odoko matek, mi gidagi luora, kata obedo ni asekumogi kamano." 
Jeremiah17:24 “Nyisgi ni nyaka giluora gi chunygi duto. Kik giting’ misigo moro amora ka gikadho e dhorangeye mag dalani chieng’ Sabato, to girit chieng’ Sabato obed maler, mak gitiyo tich moro." 
Jeremiah17:25 Kamano eka ruodhi maggi gi jodonggi didonj e dhorangeye mag Jerusalem, kendo bed gi duong’ mane ruoth Daudi nigo. Gin kaachiel gi jo-Juda kod jo-Jerusalem giniidh geche gi farese, kendo ji nodag Jerusalem nyaka chieng’." 
Jeremiah17:26 Ji nobi koa e miech Juda kod mier mokiewo gi Jerusalem. Bende ji moa e piny Benjamin nobi kaachiel gi joma odak e tiend gode, gi ewi gode, kod e piny Negeb. Ginikel misengni miwang’o pep gi misengni mag cham kod ubani, kaachiel gi misengni mag erokamano gi misengni mamoko e Hekalu mara." 
Jeremiah17:27 To ka ok giluora, mi gitamore rito chieng’ Sabato obed maler, kendo giting’o misigo moro amora ka gikadho e dhorangeye mag Jerusalem chieng’no, to anamok mach e dhorangeye mag Jerusalem, mi majno nowang’ ut ruodhi mag Jerusalem, kendo onge ng’ama nonege.”" 
Jeremiah18:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nowachona niya," 
Jeremiah18:2 “Dhiyo e od jachue agulini, kendo abiro miyi wechena kuno.”" 
Jeremiah18:3 Omiyo ne adhi mi ayudo ka jachue agulini nie tichne. 
Jeremiah18:4 To e sa asaya mane gima odwaro chueyo ok owuok maber, to ne okawo lowono, kendo olosogo gima chielo, mana kaka ohero." 
Jeremiah18:5 Bang’e Ruoth Nyasaye nopenja niya," 
Jeremiah18:6 “Donge un jo-Israel anyalo timou mana gima jachuech timo gi lowo? Ng’euru ni unie tekona, mana kaka lowo ni e teko jachuech. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano." 
Jeremiah18:7 Kapo ni asiemo oganda moro, kata piny moro, ni abiro ketho kata tieko kata dhuolo gi lop tiende," 
Jeremiah18:8 to bang’e ogandano olokore moweyo timbene maricho, to an bende koro aloko parona kuom gima rach mane awacho ni abiro timo." 
Jeremiah18:9 To bende kapo ni awacho ni abiro pidho kendo gero oganda moro," 
Jeremiah18:10 mi ogandano otimo richo, kendo otamore rito chikna, to nyaka alok parona kuom gima ber mane awacho ni natim." 
Jeremiah18:11 Omiyo koro dhi inyis jo-Juda gi jo-Jerusalem ni achano kelonigi masira, kendo abiro kumogi. Kwergi mondo giwe richogi. Kendo ng’ato ka ng’ato olok yorene gi timbene maricho." 
Jeremiah18:12 To gibiro dwoki niya, ‘Ok wanyal loko timbewa! Wabiro timo mana gima wahero, ka ng’ato ka ng’ato timo mana gima wiye omiye.’" 
Jeremiah18:13 “Kuom mano an Ruoth Nyasaye awacho kama: Penjieuru ogendini duto ka gima kama osetimore nyaka nene. Jo-Israel osetimo gima rach miwuoro! 
Jeremiah18:14 Bende wi got Lebanon motimo lwendni nyalo bet maonge pe adier? Koso aore mag godno nyalo duono? Ooyo, gisiko asika kamano." 
Jeremiah18:15 To joga wigi osewil koda, kendo giwang’o ubani ni kido manono. Gisechwanyore mi giweyo wang’yo ma onego giluw, mi koro ok giluw yore machon, to giwuotho e yore mogondore ma ok opa." 
Jeremiah18:16 Giseketho pinygi, modoko gima bwogo ji, kendo ma ji charo nyaka chieng’. Ji duto ma kadho machiegni biro bwok kuom gima gineno, kendo gibiro kino wigi ka giwuoro." 
Jeremiah18:17 Anake joga e nyim wasikgi, mana ka buru ma yamb ugue keyo. Abiro lokonigi ng’eya, kendo ok nakonygi ka masira omakogi.”" 
Jeremiah18:18 Bang’ mano ji nowacho niya “Wang’aduru rieko mondo wanyal Jeremia. Pod nobedie abeda jodolo manyalo telonwa, gi joma riek manyalo ng’adonwa rieko, kod jonabi manyalo nyisowa wach Nyasaye. Biuru wahangne wach, kendo wawe dewo gima owacho.”" 
Jeremiah18:19 To Jeremia nolemo niya, “A Ruoth Nyasaye, winj gima akwayo, kendo winj gima wasika wacho kuoma." 
Jeremiah18:20 Richo bende ichulo kuom ber? Gin to gisekunyona bur mondo anyumrae. Par kaka ne abiro iri, mi awuoyo kodi, kakwayi mondo kik mirima maki kodgi." 
Jeremiah18:21 To koro Ruoth Nyasaye, we kech oneg nyithindgi, kendo we githo e lweny. Joma chwo gi nyithindo mondo otho, kendo mon mondo odong’ mond liete, kendo maonge nyithindo. Tuoche mondo oneg jodongo, to yawuowi mondo otho e lweny." 
Jeremiah18:22 Kel mony apoya, mondo oyak miechgi, mi giywag ka kihondko omakogi. Gisekunyona bur mondo anyumrae, kendo gisechikona obadho mondo omaka." 
Jeremiah18:23 To in Ruoth Nyasaye, ing’eyo gik moko duto ma gitimo ka gidwaro nega. Omiyo kik ing’wonngi kuom timbegi maricho, kendo kik iwenigi richogi. Kelgi e nyimi ka gichwanyore, kendo kumgi ka in gi mirima mager.”" 
Jeremiah19:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nonyisa mondo adhi ang’iew agulu. Bende nonyisa mondo akaw jodongo moko kod jodolo madongo," 
Jeremiah19:2 adhigo e holo mar Ben-hinom, mokiewo gi dhorangach miluongo ni Ranga Tegni. Kuno ema ne adhi huloe wach mane obiro miya." 
Jeremiah19:3 Ruoth Nyasaye nokona mondo awach niya, “Winjuru un ruodhi mag Juda kod jo-Jerusalem. An Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto kendo ma Nyasach Israel, awacho kama: Abiro kelo masira malich kuom dalani, ma ng’ato ka ng’ato mowinjo, to ite nopopni." 
Jeremiah19:4 Abiro timo kamano nikech useweya, mudwanyo dalani, kutimoe lisweche ni nyiseche mamoko ma ok ung’eyo, to kata mana kwereu gi ruodhi mag Juda bende ne ok ong’eyo. Usemiyo remb ji maonge ketho opong’o ka," 
Jeremiah19:5 kendo usegero kende-mag-liswa mondo uwang’ie nyithindu ka liswa ni Baal. To ne ok achikou mondo utim kamano, bende wach ma kamano ne ok aparo kata matin." 
Jeremiah19:6 Emomiyo an Ruoth Nyasaye, awacho ni ndalo biro ma ok noluongie holoni ni Tofeth, kata ni holo Ben-hinom, to noluonge ni holo Nek." 
Jeremiah19:7 Ka eri ema nakethie gik moko duto ma jo-Juda gi jo-Jerusalem chano timo. Anawe wasikgi logi, mi neggi e lweny, kendo anami winy gi ondiegi cham ringregi." 
Jeremiah19:8 Anaketh dalani gi keth malich, mi ng’ato ang’ata makadho machiegni nobwogi, kawuoro gima osetimore ni dalani." 
Jeremiah19:9 Anami ji modak ka cham ringre nyithindgi giwegi. Bende ginicham ringre jowadgi e kinde marach ma wasigu nobed ka lworo dalagi, ka dwaro negogi.”" 
Jeremiah19:10 Bang’ wacho wechego, Ruoth Nyasaye nonyisa mondo ato agulu cha e nyim joma ne asedhigogo," 
Jeremiah19:11 kendo awachnigi ni Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto nosewacho kama: “Abiro toyo jogi gi dalani mana kaka itoyo agulu ma ok nyal chak chom. Joma otho noyik kata mana e Tofeth, nikech ok noyud kamoro nono ma diyikgie." 
Jeremiah19:12 Mano e kaka abiro timo ni dalani, kaachiel gi joma odakie, kendo analoke mana ka Tofeth. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano." 
Jeremiah19:13 Naketh udi mag Jerusalem gi ut ruodhi Juda, to moloyo udi duto ma osewang’ ubani ewi tetgi ni sulue, kendo ma osepukie lisweche miolo piny ni nyiseche mamoko, mi ginibed mogak mana ka Tofeth.”" 
Jeremiah19:14 Bang’ wechego, ne awuok aa Tofeth, kuma ne Ruoth Nyasaye oorae, mondo adhi ahulie wachne. Ne adhi mi achung’ e laru mar Hekalu, eka anyiso ji duto niya," 
Jeremiah19:15 “Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto ma Nyasach Israel owacho ni obiro kelo masiche duto mane osiemogo dalani kaachiel gi mier duto mokiewo kode, nikech un joma tokgi tek, motamore winjo wachne.”" 
Jeremiah20:1 Kane Pashur wuod Imer jadolo, kendo jatelo maduong’ e Hekalu owinjo gik mane Jeremia okoro," 
Jeremiah20:2 nogolo chik mochwad Jeremia, kendo otueye e lodi e dhoranga Hekalu miluongo ni Ranga Benjamin mamalo." 
Jeremiah20:3 Kinyne gokinyi, Pashur ne ogonyo Jeremia, mi Jeremia nowachone niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye ok luongi ni Pashur, to oluongi ni Magor-misabib, tiende ni, masira ni kuonde duto." 
Jeremiah20:4 Ruoth Nyasaye osewacho ni obiro miyo ilokri masira ni in iwuon, kendo ni osiepeni, kendo wasigu noneg osiepenigo duto e lweny mana kineno. Abiro keto jo-Juda duto e teko mar ruodh Babulon, kendo enoter moko e tuech Babulon, to moko nogol chik mondo onegi." 
Jeremiah20:5 Bende anawe wasikgi yak mwandu duto manie Jerusalem kaachiel gi gik moko duto mantie, koda ka gik mabeyo duto mag ruodhi Juda, mi gikaw gidhigo Babulon" 
Jeremiah20:6 To in Pashur, nomaki kaachiel gi joodi, mi teri Babulon kuma inithoe kendo yikie but osiepeni ma isebedo ka ihulonigi weche mag miriambo!”" 
Jeremiah20:7 “A Ruoth Nyasaye, ne iwuonda, mi iwuonda adier. In itek moloya, omiyo ne ihewa. Ji duto tugo koda kendo ginyiera odiechieng’ duto." 
Jeremiah20:8 E kinde duto ma awuoyoe, to aywak kendo akok niya, ‘Mahundu gi masira nitie!’ A Ruoth Nyasaye, gichara kendo giyanya kinde duto nikech ahulo wachni." 
Jeremiah20:9 To ka awacho ni abiro weyi mondo kik achak awuo e nyingi, to wachni wang’o chunya, mana ka mach. Opong’o chokena, kendo ohewa ting’o ma ok anyal siro." 
Jeremiah20:10 Awinjo ka ji kuodha gi nying’ ma gichaka ni ‘Masira ni kuonde duto,’ kendo giwacho niya, ‘Kwedeuru! Ee, wakwede!’ Kata mana osiepena ma ageno bende gombona mana chwanyruok. Giwacho niya, ‘Dipo ka oyondhe, mi omoko, kendo wachulone kuor.’" 
Jeremiah20:11 To in Ruoth Nyasaye, in koda, itek, kendo iduong’, omiyo joma sanda biro chwanyore, kendo ok ginyal gimoro. Wigi biro kuot malich, nikech ok gibi loyo. Wichkuotgino nosik nyaka chieng’, kendo wich ok nowilgo." 
Jeremiah20:12 In Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto imiyo ji tem makare, kendo inono chunygi gi parogi. Omiyo yie ichulna kuor kuom wasika, nimar aketo wechena duto e lweti." 
Jeremiah20:13 “Weruru ni Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo pakeuru, nikech osereso joma ithiro e lwet joma timbegi richo." 
Jeremiah20:14 “Okuong’ chieng’ mane mama onywolae! 
Jeremiah20:15 Okuong’ ng’at mane omiyo wuora mor, kuom kelone wach ni onywolne nyathi ma wuowi!" 
Jeremiah20:16 Mad ng’atno chal gi mier mane Ruoth Nyasaye oketho mak okecho. Mad owinj ka ji ywagore malit gokinyi, kendo owinj tung’ lweny godiechieng’ tir," 
Jeremiah20:17 nikech ne ok onega kapok onywola. Kamano dine oyika ei mama, mi ok dine onywola." 
Jeremiah20:18 Ere gima omiyo ne onywola mana ni mondo ane lit gi masira, kendo atho mana gi wichkuot?”" 
Jeremiah21:1 Ruoth Zedekia nooro Pashur wuod Malkia kod Zefania wuod Maaseya jadolo ir Jeremia kokwaye niya," 
Jeremiah21:2 “Yie ipenjnwa Ruoth Nyasaye wach, nikech Nebukadnezar ruodh Babulon kedo kodwa. Dipo ka Ruoth Nyasaye otimonwa hono moro kaka ne ojatimo, mi ochun Nebukadnezar mondo owewa.”" 
Jeremiah21:3 Eka Ruoth Nyasaye nowuoyo gi Jeremia, mi Jeremia nowacho ni jootego" 
Jeremiah21:4 ni mondo onyis Zedekia ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel owacho niya, “Jolweny ma konyo Zedekia kedo gi ruodh Babulon gi joge mag lweny molworo ohinga mar Jerusalem abiro dwoko ei dala, kendo abiro dhuro gikgi mag lweny pidhe pidhe e chuny dala." 
Jeremiah21:5 An awuon abiro kedo kodu ka iya owang’, kendo ka an gi mirima mager." 
Jeremiah21:6 Abiro nego ji duto modak dalani. Tuo marach biro nego ji kaachiel gi jamni. 
Jeremiah21:7 To Zedekia ruodh Juda gi jodonge kod jodalani duto ma otony e lweny, kendo otony e kech gi tuo, abiro keto e lwet ruoth Nebukadnezar, kendo e lwet wasikgi ma dwaro negogi. Nebukadnezar biro negogi, kendo ok obi weyogi kata kechogi kata timonigi ng’wono. An Ruoth Nyasaye awacho kamano!”" 
Jeremiah21:8 Ruoth Nyasaye ne ochako owacho ni Jeremia mondo onyis ji kama: “Winjuru an Ruoth Nyasaye aketonu yore ariyo mondo uyier achiel kuomgi. Achiel en dhi e ngima, to machielo en dhi e tho." 
Jeremiah21:9 Ng’ato ang’ata modong’ Jerusalem, lweny kata kech kata tuo noneg, to ng’ato ang’ata modhi ochiwore e lwet jo-Babulon ma koro monjo dalani, ok nonegi. To enores mana ngimane kende." 
Jeremiah21:10 Aseng’ado wach ni ok anyal weyo dalani, to nyaka akethe. Ibiro kete e lwet ruodh Babulon, kendo obiro wang’e morum pep. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano!”" 
Jeremiah21:11 “In Jeremia, nyis jood ruodh Juda ma nyikwa ruoth Daudi mondo owinj gima Ruoth Nyasaye owacho." 
Jeremiah21:12 Timuru gik makare pile. Konyuru ng’at ma ithiro e lwet joma thire, ka ok kamano, to timbeu maricho biro wang’o iya, ka mach ma ok nyal negi." 
Jeremiah21:13 Un jo-Jerusalem, dalau obet e bath holni mana ka lwanda mogingore e pap. To an Ruoth Nyasaye abiro kedo kodu. Uwacho ni onge ng’at ma nyalo monjou kata ma nyalo mwomo ohingau." 
Jeremiah21:14 To an Ruoth Nyasaye abiro kumou mana maromre gi kethou. Abiro wang’o od ruodhu gi mach ma nowang’ gik moko duto machiegni kode. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano.” 
Jeremiah22:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho niya, “Dhiyo e od ruodh Juda ma nyakwar Daudi," 
Jeremiah22:2 mondo iwachne, kaachiel gi jodonge kod joge madonjo e dhorangeyegi, ni Ruoth Nyasaye owacho kama:" 
Jeremiah22:3 An Ruoth Nyasaye awachonu ni mondo utim gik makare kendo madier. Konyuru ng’at ma ithiro e lwet joma thire. Kik usand kata kik uthir jodak gi nyithi kiye kod mond liete, bende kik uneg joma onge ketho kama oyangnani." 
Jeremiah22:4 Ka utimo kaka awachono to nyikwa Daudi nodhi mana nyime ka bedo ruodhi, kendo gin kaachiel gi jodonggi kod jogi gibiro siko ka gidonjo e dhoranga od ruoth, ka giidho geche mag lweny kod farese." 
Jeremiah22:5 To ka ok urito wechego, to akuong’oranu ni od ruodhuni biro lokore gunda. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano." 
Jeremiah22:6 “Od ruodh Juda berna mana ka piny Gilead, kendo ka got Lebanon, to kata kamano abiro loke thim, kama onge ng’at madakie." 
Jeremiah22:7 Abiro oro ji mondo okethe. Giduto gibiro biro gi ledhi, mi ging’ad yiend sida duto mabeyo mogerego, mi giwiti e mach." 
Jeremiah22:8 Bang’e achien, jopinje mamoko nobed ka kadho kanyo, kendo ginipenjre kendgi ni, ‘Ere gimomiyo Ruoth Nyasaye osetimo gima chal kama ni dala maduong’ni?’" 
Jeremiah22:9 Eka nodwokgi niya, ‘Mano osetimore nikech jogi oseweyo singruok mane Nyasachgi otimo kodgi, mi gilamo nyiseche mamoko kendo gitiyonigi.’" 
Jeremiah22:10 “Jo-Juda, kik uywag ruoth Josia, ma koro osethoni, to ywaguru wuode ma Shalum, nikech osetere e piny moro, kendo ok noduogi, bende ok ochak one piny mane onywolee." 
Jeremiah22:11 To nikech Ruoth Nyasaye osewuoyo kuom Shalum wuod Josia mane obet ruodh Juda kar wuon mare kowacho niya, ‘Osea ka chuth, kendo ok noduogi." 
Jeremiah22:12 Enotho e piny ma giseteree, kendo ok nochak one pinyni.’" 
Jeremiah22:13 “En gima lit manadi kuom ng’at ma gero od gorofa e yor miganga kendo ka miyo jowetene tiyo kayiem, to ok migi misara." 
Jeremiah22:14 En gima lit manadi kuom ng’at mawacho ni obiro gero ot marang’ongo man gi udi madongo malo. Bang’e oketne dirise mi ochwade gi yiend sida, kendo owire gi range maber." 
Jeremiah22:15 Bende gero ut sida mabeyo moloyo mag jomoko nyalo nyiso ni in ruoth adier? “Wuoru nodak maber. Pile ne en ng’at makare kendo jaadiera, omiyo gik moko duto mane otimo ne odhi maber." 
Jeremiah22:16 Ne oyalo jochan kare, omiyo gige duto nodhi maber. Gik ma kamago ema nyiso ni ng’ato ong’eyo Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Jeremiah22:17 In to ineno mana gigi iwuon. Inego joma onge ketho, kendo ithiro jogi gi gero. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano.”" 
Jeremiah22:18 Kuom mano, Ruoth Nyasaye wuoyo kuom Jehoyakim wuod Josia, ma ruodh Juda niya, “Onge ng’ama noywage, kawacho ni, ‘Yaye Ruoth! Thoni lit manadi!’" 
Jeremiah22:19 Noywaye mi wite oko e dhoranga Jerusalem, mana ka punda motho." 
Jeremiah22:20 Un jo-Jerusalem, dhiuru e got Lebanon, mondo ukogi, kendo dhiuru e piny Bashan mondo uywagi. Ywaguru gie gode mag Abarim, nikech joma uriworugo oselo." 
Jeremiah22:21 Nawuoyo kodu kapod udhi maber, to ne utamoru winjo. Adier, usiko kutamoru luora chakre tindou." 
Jeremiah22:22 Jotendu, yamo ema biro tero. Joma uriworugo ibiro kawo mi ter e tuech. Bang’e unuyud wichkuot kendo nog’eng’u nikech timbeu maricho." 
Jeremiah22:23 Un joma odak Lebanon, moloso kuonde dakgi e yiend sida, unuywag manade ka rem malit ka rem mar muoch ochopo kuomu!”" 
Jeremiah22:24 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Jekonia wuod Jehoyakim ma ruodh Juda niya, “An Nyasaye mangima akuong’ora ni kata ka inie tere manie lweta ma korachwich to pod dawuodhi oko," 
Jeremiah22:25 mi achiwi ni joma iluoro madwaro negi, kata mana e lwet Nebukadnezar ruodh Babulon kod joge mag lweny." 
Jeremiah22:26 Abiro witi kaachiel gi meru, e piny moro mane ok onywolue, kendo unutho kuno uduto." 
Jeremiah22:27 Ok unuduog e pinyu muheroni.” 
Jeremiah22:28 Jeremia nowacho niya, “Uparo ni Jekonia en agulu motho, mowit oko, ma ng’ato ok dwar koso? Ka ok kamano, to ere gima omiyo owite kaachiel gi nyithinde e piny ma ok ong’eyo?" 
Jeremiah22:29 “Yaye, piny, piny! Winjuru wach Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Jeremiah22:30 Ng’atni okuong’, omiyo enotho maonge nyathi. En ng’at ma ok nyal dhi nyime maber. Nyikwaye ok nobed ruodhi mag Juda ka Daudi. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano.”" 
Jeremiah23:1 “Enobed malich manade kuom jotelo ma weyo joga inego kendo ikeyo. 
Jeremiah23:2 An Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel awuoyo kuom jotelo mane onego rit joga niya, ‘Usekeyo joga, mi uriembo, bende ok useritogi maber. Koro abiro kumou nikech gik maricho ma usetimo." 
Jeremiah23:3 Abiro choko joga modong’, kagolo e pinje duto mane akeyogie, kendo nadwokgi e pinygi. Gininywol nyithindo mang’eny mi ginya." 
Jeremiah23:4 Anaketnigi jotelo ma noritgi maber, mi onge gima nobwoggi kata ma nomi gibed maluor, bende onge ng’ato kuomgi ma noyud kolal. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano.’" 
Jeremiah23:5 “Ndalo biro ma nayierie nyakwar Daudi hie mondo obed ruoth. Enorit piny gi rieko, kotimo gik ma owinjore kendo makare e piny." 
Jeremiah23:6 E ndalo lochne, jo-Juda nodag gi kue, kendo jo-Israel bende nodag maonge ng’ama chandogi. Ginichak ruodhno ni ‘Ruoth Nyasaye ma resowa.’ ”" 
Jeremiah23:7 “An Ruoth Nyasaye awacho niya, ‘Ndalo biro ma onge ng’ama nokuong’re gi nyinga ka Nyasaye mangima mane ogolo jo-Israel e piny Misri," 
Jeremiah23:8 to ginikuongre gi nyinga mana ka Nyasaye mangima mane ogolo jo-Israel e piny man nyandwat, kendo e pinje mamoko duto mane asekeyogie. Bang’e eka ginidag e pinygi giwegi.’ ”" 
Jeremiah23:9 Jeremia nowuoyo kuom jonabi niya, “Chunya ool morumo, kendo atetni. Achal gi ng’at momer, mosemadho kong’o mang’eny, mana nikech Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo nikech wechene maler.”" 
Jeremiah23:10 Joma oseweyo Ruoth Nyasaye opong’o piny. Timbegi richo, kendo gikonyore gi tekogi e yo marach. Piny ywak kendo lege otwo nikech osekuong’gi." 
Jeremiah23:11 Ruoth Nyasaye wacho niya, “Timbe jonabi gi timbe jodolo ok ler. Asejukogi ka gitimo richo kata mana e Hekalu mara!" 
Jeremiah23:12 Yore ma giluwo biro bedo mapothpoth kendo motimo mudho. Abiro miyo gichwanyre kendo gipodhi, nikech abiro kelo masira kuomgi chieng’ makumogie. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano." 
Jeremiah23:13 “Aseneno ni jonabi mag Samaria gin joma ofuwo. Ne gikoro weche e nying Baal, mi gimiyo joga Israel olal." 
Jeremiah23:14 To bende aseneno ka jonabi mag Jerusalem timo mana gik mamono. Giterore, to kendo giwacho miriambo, bende gijiwo joma timo richo, omiyo onge ng’ama nyalo weyo timbene maricho. Giduto gichalna gi jo-Sodom gi jo-Gomora." 
Jeremiah23:15 Kuom mano, an Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto, awuoyo kuom jonabi mag Jerusalem, ni abiro miyogi alode makech mondo gicham, kod pi motimo kwiri mondo gimodhi, nikech giselando weche makwedo Nyasaye e pinygi duto.”" 
Jeremiah23:16 Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto wacho ji jo-Jerusalem niya, “Kik uwinj gima jonabi wachonu, nikech gimiyo ugeno kuom gik ma ok bi timore. Ginyisou gik ma giparo apara giwegi, to ok gik ma an ema awacho." 
Jeremiah23:17 Gisiko ka giwacho ni ji motamore winjo wachna niya, ‘Gik moko duto biro dhinu maber.’ Bende giwacho ni joma wigi tek ni masira ok nomakgi." 
Jeremiah23:18 To onge kata ng’ato achiel kuom jonabigo moseng’eyo weche mopondo mag Ruoth Nyasaye. Bende onge ng’ato kuomgi mosewinjo kata moseng’eyo wechne, kata mana mosechiko ite kuom gik ma an Ruoth Nyasaye awacho." 
Jeremiah23:19 Mirimba chalo gi ahiti maduong’ ma biro utho joricho. 
Jeremiah23:20 Ok obi rumo kapok otieko timo gik ma adwaro. E ndalo mabiro un joga ubiro ng’eyo tiend wechegi duto malong’o!” 
Jeremiah23:21 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho niya, “An, ne ok aoro jonabigo, to ne girikni arika ka gidhi. Bende ne ok amiyogi wach moro, to pod ne giwuoyo mana e nyinga!" 
Jeremiah23:22 Ka dine ging’e parona mopondo, to dine gilando wachna ni joga mondo owe yoregi gi timbegi maricho." 
Jeremiah23:23 “An, an Nyasaye man kuonde duto, to ok man kanyachiel kende." 
Jeremiah23:24 Onge ng’ama nyalo pondo kamoro ma ok anyal nene. Donge ung’eyo ni an, an kuonde duto, e polo kendo e piny." 
Jeremiah23:25 Asewinjo weche mag miriambo ma jonabigo osehulo e nyinga ka giwacho ni giseleko, mi giyudo wach moa kuoma." 
Jeremiah23:26 Koro jonabigo biro wuondo joga gi miriambo ma giparo apara nyaka karang’o?. 
Jeremiah23:27 Giparo ni lek ma giwachogo biro miyo wi joga wil koda kaka wi kweregi nowil koda, modok ni Baal." 
Jeremiah23:28 Janabi ma oseleko lek, onego owach ni en mana lek, to janabi moseyudo wachna onego ohul wachnano kare. Koso mihudhi gi cham yande chalre?" 
Jeremiah23:29 Wachna chalo gi mach kendo chalo gi nyundo ma baro lwanda matindotindo. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano. 
Jeremiah23:30 Amon gi jonabi ma kawo weche jowetegi, kendo hulo kagima gin wechena." 
Jeremiah23:31 Bende amon gi jonabi ma wacho wechegi giwegi, to wuondore ni wechego oa kuoma." 
Jeremiah23:32 Winjuru gima awacho, an Ruoth Nyasaye! Amon gi jonabi mahulo lek mag miriambo, nimar giwito joga kod sungagi gi lekgigo. Ne ok aorogi, bende ne ok achikogi mondo gidhi gitim kamano, omiyo onge gima gikonyogo jogagi. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho.”" 
Jeremiah23:33 “In Jeremia, ka ng’ato kuom joga kata kuom jonabi kata kuom jodolo openji wach moa kuoma, kowacho niya, ‘Ere ting’ mapek moa kuom Ruoth Nyasaye,’ to wachne ni, ‘Un e ting’ mapek ma Ruoth Nyasaye nigo, kendo obiro witou.’" 
Jeremiah23:34 To kapo ni janabi kata jadolo kata achiel kuom jogi omulo wechego, kawacho niya, ‘Wach mapek moa kuom Ruoth Nyasaye,’ to anakume kaachiel gi joode." 
Jeremiah23:35 Kar mulo wechego to ng’ato ka ng’ato mondo openj osiepene kaachiel gi jowetene niya, ‘Ere kaka Ruoth odwokowa?’ Kata ni, ‘Ruoth Nyasaye osewacho nang’o?’" 
Jeremiah23:36 To kik gichak gimul weche ma wacho ni, ‘Wach Ruoth Nyasaye en ting’ mapek,’ nikech ka ng’ato omulogi, to anami wachna bedne mapek adier! Ji oseketho weche Nyasachgi, ma Nyasaye mangima, kendo ma Ruoth Nyasaye manyalo Gik Moko Duto." 
Jeremiah23:37 “Jeremia, in ema nyaka ipenj jonabi niya, ‘Ere kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nodwokou? Nowacho nang’o?’" 
Jeremiah23:38 To ka giwacho niya, ‘Wach Ruoth Nyasaye en ting’ mapek,’ to iwachnigi ni, abiro ting’ogi mi awitgi kuma bor, nikech gisemulo weche mane akwerogi ni kik gimul." 
Jeremiah23:39 Gibiro lal e wang’a, kaachiel gi dala maduong’ mane amiyogi gi kweregi." 
Jeremiah23:40 Abiro miyogi wichkuot mochwere kod achaya ma wich ok nowilgo.” 
Jeremiah24:1 Ruoth Nyasaye ne onyisa atonge ariyo moting’o ng’owo, koket e nyim Hekalu, mano notimore kane Nebukadnezar ruodh Babulon osetero Jekonia wuod Jehoyakim ma ruodh Juda e tuech Babulon, kaachiel gi jotend Juda gi jotheth kod joma olony e tich lwedo." 
Jeremiah24:2 Atonga achiel noting’o ng’owo mabeyo machiek atamalo, to atonga machielo noting’o ng’owo maricho ma ok nyal cham." 
Jeremiah24:3 Bang’ mano, Ruoth Nyasaye nopenja niya, “Jeremia, ang’o mineno?” Ne adwoke ni, “Aneno ng’owo, ma moko kuomgi beyo ahinya to moko richo ahinya ma ok nyal cham.”" 
Jeremiah24:4 Eka ne Ruoth Nyasaye owachona niya," 
Jeremiah24:5 “An Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel akwano joma ne oter e tuech Babulon ka ng’owo mabeyogo, kendo abiro guedhogi." 
Jeremiah24:6 Abiro ritogi maber, kendo anaduoggi e pinyni. Abiro gerogi, kendo ok namukgi. Abiro pidhogi, kendo ok napudhgi." 
Jeremiah24:7 Anamigi chuny mar ng’eyo ni an e Ruoth Nyasaye. Bang’e ginibed joga, kendo anabed Nyasachgi, nikech giniduog ira gi chunygi duto." 
Jeremiah24:8 “To Zedekia ruodh Juda gi jodonge kod jo-Jerusalem mamoko duto mosedong’ kae, kata mosedhi Misri, abiro kwano mana ka ng’owo maricho ma ok nyal chamgo!" 
Jeremiah24:9 Abiro kelo kuomgi masira malich ma nomi ogendini duto bed maluor. Ji nobed ka ngerogi, kendo tugo kodgi. Bende ji nochargi, kendo noluong nyinggi ka gima okuong’ kuonde duto ma akeyogie." 
Jeremiah24:10 Anakel kuomgi lweny gi kech kod tuo, nyaka chop girum pep e piny mane amiyogi gi kweregi.”" 
Jeremiah25:1 E higa mar ang’wen mar loch Jehoyakim wuod Josia ma ruodh Juda, Ruoth Nyasaye nowuoyo gi Jeremia kuom jo-Juda. Mano ne higa mokwongo mar loch Nebukadnezar ruodh Babulon." 
Jeremiah25:2 Jeremia janabi nonyiso jo-Juda kaachiel gi jo-Jerusalem duto niya," 
Jeremiah25:3 “Kuom higni piero ariyo gadek, chakre higa mar apar gadek mar loch Josia wuod Amon ruodh Juda nyaka chil kawuono, Ruoth Nyasaye osebedo kawuoyo koda, kendo asetimo kinda kanyisou gik mowacho, to ok usedewo." 
Jeremiah25:4 Ruoth Nyasaye bende osetimo kinda kaoronu jotichne ma jonabi, to ok usewinjo, kendo ok usedewo." 
Jeremiah25:5 Jonabigo ne nyisou mondo uwe yoreu gi timbeu maricho, eka udag e piny mane Ruoth Nyasaye omiyou kaachiel gi kwereu ka mwanduu mosiko." 
Jeremiah25:6 Ne gikwerou ni kik uti ni nyiseche mamoko, kendo kik ulamgi. Bende ni kik umi Ruoth Nyasaye mirima kuom lamo kido manono muloso uwegi. Ka da bed ni ne uluoro Ruoth Nyasaye, to dine ok okumou." 
Jeremiah25:7 To Ruoth Nyasaye owuon wacho ni udagi winjo wachne, kendo kar luore to ne umiye mana mirima gi kido manono mane uloso, mi un uwegi ema umiyo okumou." 
Jeremiah25:8 “Emomiyo, kaka ne udagi winjo wechene, Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto wacho niya," 
Jeremiah25:9 ‘Abiro kelo ogendini duto moa yo nyandwat, kendo abiro kelo jatichna Nebukadnezar ruodh Babulon. Ogendinigo biro kedo gi pinyni kod joma odakie kendo gibiro kedo gi ogendini duto modak machiegni. Abiro tiekogi chuth, mi piny biro dong’ nono malich, mabwogo ji, kendo ma ji chayo. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano." 
Jeremiah25:10 Abiro tieko mor gi ilo ma gin go, ma kata dwond mon ma miehni gi chwogi ok nowinji. Ponge bende ok nowinji ka rego, kendo anasim techegi." 
Jeremiah25:11 Pinyni duto biro dong’ nono, kendo nobed gima lich mabwogo ji. Ogendini duto nobed ka tiyo ni ruodh Babulon kuom higni piero abiriyo." 
Jeremiah25:12 To bang’ mano, anakum ruodh Babulon kaachiel gi joge kuom richogi. Anaketh pinygi, mi osik kokethore nyaka chieng’. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano." 
Jeremiah25:13 Abiro kelo ni ogandano kum duto ma asesiemogigo, tiende ni gik moko duto mondik e kitabuni. Gin gik mane Jeremia osewacho kuom ogendinigi." 
Jeremiah25:14 Ogendini mang’eny kod ruodhi madongo nolokgi wasumbini, kendo abiro chulonigi kuor kuom timbegi.’ ”" 
Jeremiah25:15 Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel nowacho niya, “Ma e kikombe mopong’ gi mirimba. Kawe mondo imi ogendini duto ma aori irgi omadhe." 
Jeremiah25:16 Ka gisemadhe, to gibiro kwang’ kendo neko biro makogi nikech lweny ma abiro kelonigi.”" 
Jeremiah25:17 Omiyo ne agamo kikombe e lwet Ruoth Nyasaye, mi amiyo ogendini duto mane oora irgi omadhe." 
Jeremiah25:18 Ogendini mane omi omadhego ne gin jo-Jerusalem kaachiel gi joma odak e miech Juda, kod ruodhigi gi jotendgi. Ne omi gimadhe mondo gin gi pinygi gilokre gima owe ma ji chayo, kendo gima lich mabwogogi. Bang’e nyinggi nobed gima ikuong’ogo ji. Kamano e kaka pod ochal nyaka chil kawuono." 
Jeremiah25:19 Jomoko ma bende ne omi omadho kikombe mar ngimano e magi: Farao ruodh Misri gi jotende kod jodonge, gi jo-Misri duto," 
Jeremiah25:20 Kaachiel gi jopinje mamoko modak kuomgi, gi ruodhi duto mag piny Uz, gi ruodhi duto mag miech Filistia, ma Ashkelon gi Gaza gi Ekron kod dir Ashdod modong’," 
Jeremiah25:21 gi jo-Edom gi jo-Moab kod jo-Amon duto," 
Jeremiah25:22 gi ruodhi duto mag pinje mae dhonam Mediterania," 
Jeremiah25:23 gi mier mag Dedan gi Tema kod Buz gi ogendini duto ma timgi en tito yie wigi," 
Jeremiah25:24 gi ruodhi duto mag piny Arabia, gi ruodhi duto mag ogendini modak e thim," 
Jeremiah25:25 gi ruodhi duto mag Zimri gi Elam kod Media," 
Jeremiah25:26 kaachiel gi ruodhi duto mag pinje man yo nyandwat, kuonde maboyo gi machiegnni duto. Jopinjego duto ne omi omadho kikombeno. Bang’e mogik, ruodh Babulon biro madhe." 
Jeremiah25:27 Eka Ruoth Nyasaye nowachona niya, “Nyis ji ni an Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto kendo Nyasach Israel, achikogi mondo gimethi, mi gimer kendo ging’ogi nyaka gipodh piny ma ok ginyal kata chung’, nikech lweny ma abiro kelonigi." 
Jeremiah25:28 To ka gidagi kawo kikombeno e lweti mondo gimadhi, to nyisgi ni Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko duto owacho ni nyaka gimadhe!" 
Jeremiah25:29 Dala ma abiro kuongo kumo en mana dalani. Koso giparo ni nawe mak akumogi? Ooyo, abiro kumogi mak orem, nikech abiro kelo lweny kuom ji duto modak e piny. An Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto ema awacho kamano." 
Jeremiah25:30 “To in Jeremia, nyaka ihul weche duto ma asewacho, kinyiso ji niya, ‘Ruoth Nyasaye ruto gie polo. Ee, owuoyo gie polo malo. Oruto korogo joge, kendo okok ka ng’ama biyo mzabibu, kendo ji duto modak e piny winje." 
Jeremiah25:31 Dwonde winjore e tung’ piny duto, nikech Ruoth Nyasaye yalo ogendini. Ee, oyalo ji duto, kendo ong’ado ni joricho buch tho.’ ”" 
Jeremiah25:32 Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto owacho niya, “Masira biro mako ogendini duto moro ka moro, kendo ahiti maduong’ chokore e tung’ piny kuma bor." 
Jeremiah25:33 Chieng’no ringre joma Ruoth Nyasaye onego nokere, chakre tung’ piny konchiel nyaka komachielo, kendo onge ng’ama noywaggi. Ok nokaw ringregi mondo oyiki, to gining’ielre ang’iela e lowo ka owuoyo miolo e puothe." 
Jeremiah25:34 “Ywaguru un jotelo! Ywaguru matek! Ywaguru kendo bukreuru gi buru, nikech kinde minegoue osechopo, kendo ibiro negou ka imbe machwe." 
Jeremiah25:35 Ok nobedie yo moro ma jotelo nyalo tonygo. 
Jeremiah25:36 Giywak kendo gigoyo uwi ka gin gi lit, nimar Ruoth Nyasaye oseketho pinygi," 
Jeremiah25:37 kendo miechgi mane nigi kue osedoko gundni nikech mirimbe mager. 
Jeremiah25:38 Ruoth Nyasaye oseweyo joge mana ka sibuor ma oweyo gonde. Timbe malich mag lweny osemiyo mirimb Ruoth Nyasaye mager oloko pinyni thim.” 
Jeremiah26:1 Kane Jehoyakim wuod Josia odoko ruodh Juda," 
Jeremiah26:2 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Jeremia niya, “Dhiyo ichung’ e laru mar Hekalu mondo inyis joma odak e miech Juda ma biro lemo e Hekalu weche ma asenyisi. Kik iwe kata wach achiel mak inyisogi." 
Jeremiah26:3 Kamoro dipo ka ji owinjo wechego, mi ng’ato ka ng’ato oweyo timbene maricho. Ka giweyo timbegi maricho kamano, to analok parona kuom masira mane adwaro kelo kuomgi." 
Jeremiah26:4 “Iniwachnigi ni, An Ruoth Nyasaye asewacho ni nyaka uluora, kuluwo chike mane anyisou." 
Jeremiah26:5 Asetimo kinda ka aoro jotichna ma jonabi mondo owachnu wechena, to ok usedewo gik ma giwacho." 
Jeremiah26:6 Ka ok uwinjogi, kendo ka pod utamoru timo gik ma awacho, to abiro ketho Hekaluni mana kaka naketho Shilo, kendo ogendini duto noluong nying dalani ka gima okuong’.”" 
Jeremiah26:7 Jodolo gi jonabi kod ji duto nowinjo ka Jeremia hulo wechego e Hekalu," 
Jeremiah26:8 kendo kane otieko wacho gik moko duto mane Ruoth Nyasaye ochike mondo owachi, jodolo gi jonabi kod ji duto nomake, ka kok niya, “Owinjore negi kuom wach ma kama!" 
Jeremiah26:9 Ere gima omiyo ikoro wach e nying Ruoth Nyasaye ni Hekalu biro chalo gi Shilo, kendo ni dalani ibiro kethi, ma onge ng’ama nodagie?” Gikanyono ji nochokore mang’eny, molworo Jeremia ei Hekalu." 
Jeremiah26:10 Kane jodong Juda owinjo wachno, ne giwuok e od ruoth, mi gidhi gibet e dhoranga Hekalu miluongo ni Rangach Manyien." 
Jeremiah26:11 Eka jodolo gi jonabi nonyiso jodongo kaachiel gi ji duto niya, “Owinjore ng’ad ni ng’atni buch tho, nikech osewuoyo marach kuom dalawa. Donge usewinje gi itu, kowuoyo?”" 
Jeremiah26:12 Bang’ mano, Jeremia nowacho ni jodongo gi ji niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye ema oseora mondo ahul weche duto ma usewinjo ka awacho kuom Hekaluni kendo kuom dalani." 
Jeremiah26:13 Nyaka ulok yoreu gi timbeu, kendo nyaka uluor Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu. Eka onyalo loko parone kuom masira ma osewacho ni obiro kelo kuomu." 
Jeremiah26:14 An to an e tekou. Timnauru gimoro amora muparo ni ber kendo kare. 
Jeremiah26:15 To nyaka ung’e ni ka unega, to un gi ji duto modak e dalani unubed joketho kuom nego ng’at ma onge ketho, nimar Ruoth Nyasaye ema oseora mondo anyisu wechego duto.”" 
Jeremiah26:16 Kane jodongo gi ji duto owinjo wechego, ne giwacho ni jodolo gi jonabi niya, “Ng’atni ok owinjore ng’adne buch tho, nikech osewuoyo mana kodwa e nying Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachwa.”" 
Jeremiah26:17 Bang’e jodongo moko nochung’’ monyiso ji mane ochokore kanyo niya," 
Jeremiah26:18 “E ndalo loch Hezekia ruodh Juda, Mika janabi ma ja-Meresheth nonyiso jo-Juda duto ni Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto owacho kama: ‘Sayun ibiro pur oko ka puodho. Jerusalem biro lokore pidhe mag lwendni, kendo got mogerie Hekalu nolokre bungu.’" 
Jeremiah26:19 To uparo ni ruoth Hezekia kod joge nonego Mika koso? Ooyo ne ok ginege, to Hezekia noluoro Ruoth Nyasaye, mi otemo kueyo mirimb Nyasaye. Kuom mano Ruoth Nyasaye noloko parone kuom masira mane osewacho ni obiro kelo kuomgi. To wan to koro ere gima omiyo wadwaro kelo masira malich kuomwa?”" 
Jeremiah26:20 (Ne nitie ng’at moro machielo miluongo ni Uria wuod Shemaya ma ja-Kiriath-jearim. En bende ne owuoyo e nying Ruoth Nyasaye kuom dalani kendo kuom ogandani, mana kaka Jeremia osewuoyo." 
Jeremiah26:21 To kane ruoth Jehoyakim kod jotend jolwenje gi jodonge owinjo gima ne Uria owachono, notemo nege. To Uria nowinjo wachno, mi luoro nomake moringo odhi Misri." 
Jeremiah26:22 Kata kamano, Ruoth Jehoyakim nooro Elnathan wuod Akbor kod jomoko e piny Misri mondo oom Uria." 
Jeremiah26:23 Omiyo ne gigole kuno, mi gidwoke ni ruoth Jehoyakim, monege, kendo ne owit ringre e bur mane iyikoe ji ajiya.)" 
Jeremiah26:24 Jeremia to notony, mi ok ochiw e lwet ji mondo onege, mana nikech Ahikam wuod Shafan nokonye." 
Jeremiah27:1 Kane Zedekia wuod Josia odoko ruodh Juda, Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Jeremia niya," 
Jeremiah27:2 “Kaw yien kod pien molir, ilosgo jok mondo irwak e ng’uti." 
Jeremiah27:3 Bang’e inyis joote moa kuom ruodhi mag Edom gi mag Moab gi mag Amon gi mag Turo kod mag Sidon mosebiro Jerusalem neno Ruoth Zedekia," 
Jeremiah27:4 mondo onyis ruodhigigo ni an Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto, kendo ma Nyasach Israel" 
Jeremiah27:5 ema nachueyo piny gi tekona maduong’, kendo nachueyo dhano gi le duto modakie, omiyo anyalo kete e teko ng’ato ang’ata ma ayiero." 
Jeremiah27:6 Kamano an ema aseketo ogendinigi e teko jatichna Nebukadnezar ruodh Babulon, bende asemiyo koda ka le tiyone." 
Jeremiah27:7 Ogendini duto notine, kendo giniti ni wuode kod nyakware bende, nyaka chop kinde ma ogandane owuon nopodhie. Bang’e ogandane noti ni ogendini marateke kod ruodhi madongo." 
Jeremiah27:8 “To ka oganda moro otamore tiyo ni Nebukadnezar ruodh Babulon, kata rwako jokne, to lweny gi kech kod tuoche ema nakumgo ogandano nyaka chop ami obed e teko mar Nebukadnezar. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano." 
Jeremiah27:9 Kik uchik itu kuom jonabi kata kuom ng’ato ang’ata mawacho ni nyalo koro gik ma biro timore e yor lek kata e yor luongo chuny joma osetho, kata e yor mbofwa. Jogo duto koronu wach ni ok unubed e bwo loch ruodh Babulon," 
Jeremiah27:10 to giwuondou, kendo gibiro miyo teru mabor gi pinyu. Anariembu oko, mi urum pep." 
Jeremiah27:11 To ka oganda moro oyie tiyo ni ruodh Babulon, kendo rwako jokne, to anaweye obed e pinye, mi opure kendo odagie. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano.”" 
Jeremiah27:12 Jeremia nonyiso Zedekia ruodh Juda wechego, kowacho niya, “Ka uyie rwako jok mar ruodh Babulon mi utiyone kendo utiyo ni joge, eka unures ngimau." 
Jeremiah27:13 Ere gimomiyo in kod jogi duto, to Nyasaye osewacho ni lweny kata kech kata tuo biro nego oganda moro amora ma ok ti ni ruodh Babulon?" 
Jeremiah27:14 Kik udew weche jonabi ma kwerou ni kik uti ni ruodh Babulon, nimar giwuondou." 
Jeremiah27:15 Ruoth Nyasaye owuon osewacho ni ne ok oorogi, to giwuondou awuonda e nyinge. Mano emomiyo noriembu, mi negu duto, kaachiel gi jonabi ma wachonu miriambogo.”" 
Jeremiah27:16 Bang’e Jeremia nonyiso jodolo kod ji duto ni Ruoth Nyasaye osewacho niya, “Kik uwinj weche mag jonabi mawacho ni bang’ kinde matin ibiro dwok gik lemo mag Hekalu mane oter Babulon. Giwuondou awuonda!" 
Jeremiah27:17 Emomiyo kik uwinj wachgi, to tiuru atiya ni ruodh Babulon, eka unures ngimau. Ere gima omiyo dalani dilokre gunda?" 
Jeremiah27:18 Ka gin jonabi adier, kendo ka gin gi wachna, to onego gikwaya, an Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto, mondo kik ayie gik lemo modong’ Jerusalem e Hekalu kendo e od ruoth, ter Babulon!" 
Jeremiah27:19 Winjuru gima an Ruoth Nyasaye awacho kuom sirni mag Hekalu gi karaya maduong’ gi rachungi kod gik lemo mamoko mag Hekalu mane ruoth Nebukadnezar oweyo 
Jeremiah27:20 kane omako Jekonia wuod Jehoyakim ruodh Juda motero Babulon kaachiel gi jodong Juda gi Jerusalem. 
Jeremiah27:21 An Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto kendo ma Nyasach Israel awacho ni gik mane owe Jerusalem e Hekalu kendo e od ruoth," 
Jeremiah27:22 ibiro tero Babulon, mi bed kuno nyaka chop apargi kendo. Bang’e anaduoggi, mi aketgi kaeri. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano.”" 
Jeremiah28:1 E higano, e due mar abich mar higa mar ang’wen mar loch Zedekia ruodh Juda, Hanania janabi, ma wuod Azur ja-Gibeon, nowuoyo gi Jeremia e Hekalu kowachone e nyim jodolo kod ji," 
Jeremiah28:2 ni Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto kendo ma Nyasach Israel owacho kama: “Aseturo jok mar ruodh Babulon," 
Jeremiah28:3 kendo ka pok higni ariyo orumo, to abiro dwoko gik lemo duto mane ruoth Nebukadnezar okawo motero Babulon." 
Jeremiah28:4 Bende abiro duogo Jekonia wuod Jehoyakim ma ruodh Juda kaachiel gi jo-Juda mane odar moter Babulon e tuech. Adier, abiro turo jok mar ruodh Babulon. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano.”" 
Jeremiah28:5 To Jeremia janabi nodwoko Hanania janabi e nyim jodolo gi ji duto mane oyudo ochung’ e Hekalu," 
Jeremiah28:6 kowacho niya, “Mad Ruoth Nyasaye tim kamano! Dang’ bed maber ka omiyo wecheni duto otimore, mi oduogo gik lemo duto mane oter Babulon, kaachiel gi joma ne odar mi oter kuno e tuech!" 
Jeremiah28:7 To in Hanania, kaachiel gi ji duto, winjuru gima awachonu." 
Jeremiah28:8 Jonabi machon mane okwongonwa ne koro wach ni lweny gi kech kod tuo biro biro kuom ogendini mang’eny gi pinje marateke. 
Jeremiah28:9 To ubiro ng’eyo ka janabi ma koro wach kue en janabi ma Ruoth Nyasaye oseoro adier, mana ka gik ma okoro otimore.”" 
Jeremiah28:10 Bang’ mano, Hanania nogolo jok e ng’ut Jeremia, moturo matindo tindo." 
Jeremiah28:11 Eka nowacho e nyim ji duto niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye osewacho ni kaka aseturo jokni e kaka obiro turo jok ma ruoth Nebukadnezar oseketo e ng’ut ogendini, kendo obiro timo kamano kapok higni ariyo orumo.”" 
Jeremiah28:12 To bang’ kinde moko, kane Hanania oseturo jok mane nie ng’ut Jeremia, Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Jeremia" 
Jeremiah28:13 mondo odhi onyis Hanania niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye osewacho ni inyalo turo jok mar yien, to obiro keto jok mar nyinyo kare." 
Jeremiah28:14 Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto kendo ma Nyasach Israel osewacho ni obiro keto jok mar nyinyo kuom ogendini duto, kendo giniti ni Nebukadnezar ruodh Babulon. Bende osewacho ni obiro miyo kata mana le mae bungu ti ni Nebukadnezar.”" 
Jeremiah28:15 Bang’e Jeremia nowacho ni Hanania niya, “Koro winji, Hanania. Ruoth Nyasaye ok oori, to imiyo jogi geno mana miriambo." 
Jeremiah28:16 Omiyo Ruoth Nyasaye owuon wacho ni obiro tieki e wang’ pinyni, nimar ibiro tho ka pok higani orumo, nikech isejiwo ji mondo otamre mako chikne.”" 
Jeremiah28:17 Kamano Hanania janabi notho e due mar abiriyo mar higano. 
Jeremiah29:1 Jeremia nondiko ni jotelo mane odong’ kuom joma otue, kaachiel gi jodolo gi jonabi kod ji duto mane Nebukadnezar ogolo Jerusalem motero Babulon." 
Jeremiah29:2 Nondiko baruano kane ruoth gi min mare gi jodong od ruoth gi jotend Juda kod jo-Jerusalem gi jotheth kod joma olony e tich lwedo osea Jerusalem. 
Jeremiah29:3 Jeremia noketo baruano e lwet Elasa wuod Shafan gi Gemaria wuod Hilkia mane oyudo Zedekia ruodh Juda ooro ir Nebukadnezar ruodh Babulon. Jeremia nondiko baruano kama: 
Jeremiah29:4 “Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto kendo ma Nyasach Israel wacho ni jogo duto mane omiyo Nebukadnezar ogolo Jerusalem motero Babulon e tuech niya," 
Jeremiah29:5 ‘Geruru udi mondo udagie. Losuru puothe kendo chamuru gik monyakie. 
Jeremiah29:6 Kenduru mon, mondo ubed gi nyithindo, bende kenduru ni yawuotu, kendo uwe nyiu okendi, mondo gin bende gibed gi nyithindgi. Kamano unya kuno, mondo kik udong’ chien." 
Jeremiah29:7 Tiuru matek mondo ulos dala moro amora ma asemiyo oterue e tuech. Lamuru ni dalano nikech ka odhi maber to un bende ubiro dhi maber. 
Jeremiah29:8 An Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel asiemou ni kik jonabi modak kodu kata jokor wach wuondu. Kik uchik itu ni lekgi," 
Jeremiah29:9 nimar giwachonu miriambo e nyinga, to an ne ok aorogi. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano.’ ”" 
Jeremiah29:10 Ruoth Nyasaye wacho niya, “Ka higni piero abiriyo mag loch Babulon oserumo, to anaparu mi aduogu e pinyu kachopogo singruok mane atimonu." 
Jeremiah29:11 An awuon ema ang’eyo gima achanonu. En gima ber to ok gima rach, kendo abiro kelonu gik mabeyo duto mugeno. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano." 
Jeremiah29:12 Bang’e unuluonga, kendo unubi ulama, mi nadwoku." 
Jeremiah29:13 Unudwara, mi unuyuda, nikech unudwara gi chunyu duto." 
Jeremiah29:14 Adier, awacho ni un uyuda, mi anadwoku e pinyu. Anagolu e pinje duto kuonde ma asekeyoue, mi anadwoku e piny mane agoloue, kane amiyo oteru e tuech. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano." 
Jeremiah29:15 “Un uwacho ni Ruoth Nyasaye osemiyou jonabi e Babulon. 
Jeremiah29:16 To winjuru gima Ruoth Nyasaye wacho kuom ruoth marito piny kaka ne Daudi orito, kendo kuom jodalani, tiende ni wedeu mane ok odar moter e tuech kodu." 
Jeremiah29:17 Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto wacho niya, ‘Abiro kelo lweny gi kech gi tuoche kuomgi, kendo abiro miyo gichal ka ng’owo motop ma ok nyal cham." 
Jeremiah29:18 Abiro chandogi gi lweny gi kech gi tuoche, mi ogendini duto mag piny biro bedo maluor koneno gima otimorenigi. Kamoro amora ma akeyogie, ji nobed kangerogi kendo tugo kodgi. Ginichargi, kendo giniluong nyinggi ka gima okuong’." 
Jeremiah29:19 Mano biro timore nikech ne gitamore winjo wach mane asiko ka aoro jotichna ma jonabi mondo oternigi. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano. 
Jeremiah29:20 Un duto joma ne amiyo ruodh Babulon ogolo Jerusalem kendo odhigo kaka joma otue, winjuru gima an Ruoth Nyasaye awacho.’" 
Jeremiah29:21 “An Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto kendo ma Nyasach Israel, kuom Ahab wuod Koloya, gi Zedekia wuod Maaseya, ma wachonu miriambo e nyinga asewuoyoe niya, ‘Abiro ketogi e lwet Nebukadnezar ruodh Babulon, mi obiro negogi mana kuneno." 
Jeremiah29:22 Ka joma ne ogol Jerusalem moter Babulon e tuech dwaro kuong’o ng’ato, to giniwach niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye mondo otimni kaka notimo ni Zedekia gi Ahab, mane ruodh Babulon owang’o ka ngima gi mach!”" 
Jeremiah29:23 Mano e gima biro timorenigi nikech ne gilokore joma ofuwo, ka giterore, kendo giwacho miriambo e nyinga, to ne ok amiyogi wach mondo gihul. Ang’eyo gima gisetimo, kendo asebedo janeno kuom timbegi. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano.’ ”" 
Jeremiah29:24 Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto kendo ma Nyasach Israel mondo onyis Shemaya ma ja-Nehelam niya," 
Jeremiah29:25 “Ne indiko barua e nyingi iwuon, mioro ni jo-Jerusalem duto, kendo ni Zefania ma wuod Maaseya jadolo kendo ni jodolo mamoko duto. Niwacho ni Zefania ei baruano niya," 
Jeremiah29:26 ‘Ruoth Nyasaye ne oketi jadolo kar Jehoyada, kendo koro in e jatelo maduong’ e Hekalu, kuom mano, en tiji mondo ine ni ng’ato ang’ata ma janeko to wuondore ni en janabi to mondo otue gi nyororo kod chuma molworo ng’ute." 
Jeremiah29:27 Ka kamano, to ere gimomiyo ok isekwero Jeremia ma ja-Anathoth, mosebedo kawuoyo gi ji ka gima en janabi?" 
Jeremiah29:28 Nyaka kwere nikech nowacho ni jo-Juda man Babulon ni ginibed e tuech kuno aming’a. Omiyo onego giger udi gidagie, kendo gilos puothe, gicham gik monyakie.’ ”" 
Jeremiah29:29 Zefania janabi nosomo baruano ni Jeremia. 
Jeremiah29:30 Bang’e Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Jeremia," 
Jeremiah29:31 mondo oor wach ni ji duto mane oter Babulon e tuech, konyisogi gima ne Ruoth Nyasaye owacho kuom Shemaya." 
Jeremiah29:32 Nowacho niya, “An Ruoth Nyasaye abiro kumo Shemaya gi nyikwaye duto, nikech ne owuoyo ka gima en janabi, mi omiyo uyie weche mag miriambo, to ne ok aore. Ok nobed gi nyikwayo ma nochung wiye e ogandau, bende obiro tho ka pok oneno gik mabeyo ma abiro timo ni joga, nikech nowachonigi mondo gitamre mako chikena. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano.”" 
Jeremiah30:1 Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel nowacho ni Jeremia niya," 
Jeremiah30:2 “Ndik weche duto ma asewachoni e kitabu," 
Jeremiah30:3 nimar ndalo biro ma anaduogie joga ma jo-Israel gi jo-Juda. Anadwokgi e piny mane amiyo kweregi, mi gidagie kendo.”" 
Jeremiah30:4 Ruoth Nyasaye wuoyo kuom jo-Israel gi jo-Juda kama: 
Jeremiah30:5 “Asewinjo ywak mar kihondko ma onge kue. 
Jeremiah30:6 Koro ling’uru mondo upar ane. Bende dichwo dinywol nyathi? Ere gima omiyo ji duto kirni? 
Jeremiah30:7 Odiechieng’ marach biro, kendo onge odiechieng’ machal kode. En chieng’ marach ni nyikwa Jakobo. To kata kamano, gibiro tony.”" 
Jeremiah30:8 Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto wacho niya, “Chieng’no anang’ad jok manie ng’utgi, kendo anatur ratege motuegigo, mi ok ginichak gibed wasumb jopinje mamoko" 
Jeremiah30:9 To ginitina, an Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachgi, kendo giniti ni Daudi ma abiro keto mondo obed ruodhgi." 
Jeremiah30:10 “Un nyikwa Jakobo jatichna, kik ubed maluor. Ee, un jo-Israel, kik chunyu parre, nikech abiro resou mi agolu e piny mabor motueueno. Nyikwa Jakobo noduogi kendo ginidag gi kue, maonge ng’ama bwogogi. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano." 
Jeremiah30:11 “Abiro bet kodu mondo aritu, mi atiek ogendini duto kuonde ma asekonyoue, to un ok natieku. Kata kamano ok nawe mak akumou, to ok nakumu gi gero.”" 
Jeremiah30:12 Ruoth Nyasaye wacho ni joge niya, “Adhondeu ok nyal chango, nikech nuhinyoru marach," 
Jeremiah30:13 onge ng’ama nyalo ritou, kendo adhondeu ok thiedhre, omiyo ok unyal chango." 
Jeremiah30:14 Osiepeu duto oseweyou, kendo tinde ok gidewu. Asemonjou mana ka jasigu, kendo useyudo kum mager nikech richou mang’eny, bende nikech timbeu maricho lich." 
Jeremiah30:15 Ere gimomiyo uywagoru ni rem ma un-go, to ok unyal chango. Asekumou kamano nikech richou ng’eny, kendo nikech timbeu maricho lich." 
Jeremiah30:16 Ji duto matiekou bende notieki, kendo wasiku noter mabor e tuech. Ji duto mathirou bende nothir, kendo joma yakou bende noyaki." 
Jeremiah30:17 Kata obedo ni wasiku wacho niya, ‘Sayun osejwang’ kendo onge ng’ama dewe,’ to anami uchak ubed mangima, kendo anachang adhondeu.”" 
Jeremiah30:18 Ruoth Nyasaye wacho niya, “Abiro dwoko nyikwa Jakobo e pinygi, mi aguedh ng’ato ka ng’ato e ode. Dala ka dala nochak oger mana kama ne entie, kendo ot ka ot ji nodagie mana kaka nodakie chon." 
Jeremiah30:19 Ji modak kuondego nower wende pak, kendo ginikogi gi ilo. Anami ginya mathoth, ma ok gidok chien, kendo anami giyud pak, ma onge ng’ama chayogi." 
Jeremiah30:20 Abiro dwokonigi tekogi machon, mi achak agur ogandagi motegno, to anakum ji duto mathirogi." 
Jeremiah30:21 Ruodhgi nobed mana ng’atgi giwegi. Ee, jatendgi nowuog mana kuomgi. Ka aluonge, to nobi buta machiegni, nikech onge ng’ama dihedhre sudo machiegni ka ok aluonge." 
Jeremiah30:22 Kamano unubed joga kendo anabed Nyasachu. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano. 
Jeremiah30:23 “Mirimba chalo gi ahiti maduong’ ma biro uko joricho. 
Jeremiah30:24 Ok obi rumo kapok otieko timo gik ma adwaro timo. E ndalo mabiro, ubiro ng’eyo wechegi malong’o." 
Jeremiah31:1 Ruoth Nyasaye wacho niya, “Ndalo biro ma anabedie Nyasach dhout Israel duto, kendo ginibed joga." 
Jeremiah31:2 “Ne atimo ng’wono e thim ni joma ne otony ma ok otho e lweny. Jo-Israel ne gombo yudo yueyo," 
Jeremiah31:3 omiyo ne athinyoranigi gi kuma bor. Kinde duto asebedo ka aherou, un jo-Israel, kendo pod asiko ka aherou mochwere." 
Jeremiah31:4 Jo-Israel, abiro chako gerou, kendo ubiro tueyo gara, mi umiel gi ilo." 
Jeremiah31:5 Unuchak upidh mzabibu e gode mag Samaria, kendo joma opidhogi nocham olemo ma ginyago." 
Jeremiah31:6 Adier, kinde biro ma jorito noluong ji gie gode mag Efraim niya, ‘Biuru wadhi Sayun ir Ruoth Nyasachwa!’" 
Jeremiah31:7 “An Ruoth Nyasaye awacho kama: Weruru gi ilo nikech mor ma jo-Israel nigo. En oganda maduong’ie moloyo. Weruru wendeu mag pak, kuwacho niya, ‘Ruoth Nyasaye osekonyo joge. Osereso jo-Israel duto modong’.’" 
Jeremiah31:8 Abiro kelogi kagologi yo nyandwat, kendo abiro chokogi kagologi e tung’ piny koni gi koni, kaachiel gi muofni gi rang’onde mi mon mayach kendo ma muoch kayo, mi giniduogi, ka gin oganda maduong’." 
Jeremiah31:9 Joga noduog kaywak, to anakue chunygi ka atelonigi e yo. Anatergi e aore mabeyo mamol, kendo ok ginichwanyre nimar giniwuoth e yo maber. An wuon jo-Israel, kendo Efraim e wuoda makayo." 
Jeremiah31:10 “Un ogendini, winjuru, an Ruoth Nyasaye, mondo uland wachna e pinje man loka nam. An ema ne akeyo jo-Israel, to koro abiro chako chokogi, mi aritgi kaka jakwath rito jambe." 
Jeremiah31:11 Asegolo jo-Israel e tuech, ka aresogi e lwet wasigu mane oloyogi gi teko." 
Jeremiah31:12 Gibiro duogo, mi giwer gi ilo e got Sayun, ka gimor gi gik ma achiwonigi, kaka cham gi divai gi mo kod jamni. Ginichal gi puodho ma koth oromo, mi ok ginichak gichand gimoro kendo." 
Jeremiah31:13 Bang’e nyiri nomiel kendo nobed mamor, kendo yawuowi gi joma dongo bende nobed mail. Anakue chunygi kendo nalok lit ma gin go obed mor, kendo kuyo ma gin go obed ilo." 
Jeremiah31:14 Abiro miyo jodolo gundh gi chiemo mabeyo moloyo, kendo joga noyud gik moko duto ma gichando. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano.”" 
Jeremiah31:15 Ruoth Nyasaye wacho niya, “Dwol winjore e dala mar Rama, en nduru gi ywak malit, Rahel ywago nyithinde, kendo ok onyal hore nikech gisetho giduto." 
Jeremiah31:16 Ling’ iwe ywak, kendo ywe pi wang’i, nimar niyud pok nikech gik misetimo ni nyithindi. Gibiro duogo ka gia e piny wasigu. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano." 
Jeremiah31:17 “Iniwe nyikwayi bang’ thoni, nimar nyithindi biro duogo dala." 
Jeremiah31:18 “Awinjo jo-Israel ka ywagore niya, ‘A Ruoth Nyasaye ne wachalo gi ruedhi masilwende ma ok obo, to ne iboyowa, mi wapie. Dwogwa, to wabiro dwogo nikech in Ruoth Nyasachwa." 
Jeremiah31:19 Kata obedo ni ne wabaro mi waweyi, to piyopiyo nono ne wadwaro duogo. Kane isekumowa, to ne wakulo wiwa kwakuyo. Wiwa ne okuot ka chunywa lit, nikech richo mane watimo kapod wayom.’" 
Jeremiah31:20 To an Ruoth Nyasaye awacho kama: In Israel in e wuoda mahero moloyo. E sa asaya ma aluongoe nyingi, to apari gi hera. Chunya oheri, omiyo abiro kechi." 
Jeremiah31:21 Un jo-Israel, keturu ranyisi ma nyiso wang’ yo, mondo yo ma onego uluw kik ruenyu, to uduog e miechu mane uweyo." 
Jeremiah31:22 Ubiro digni kamano nyaka karang’o, un joma andhokegi? An Ruoth Nyasaye asechueyo gimoro ma hono: asemiyo dhako odoko maratego mana ka dichwo!”" 
Jeremiah31:23 Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel wacho niya, “Ka asedwoko jo-Israel e pinygi, to ginichak giwach e piny Juda gi mier mage kama: ‘Mad Ruoth Nyasaye guedh got maler mar Jerusalem ma en kama ler modakie.’" 
Jeremiah31:24 “Ji biro dak e piny Juda, kendo e mier mage duto. Bende nobedie jopur, kod jokwath gi jambgi." 
Jeremiah31:25 Anaduog chuny joma ool, kendo ng’ato ang’ata ma kech ohewo anami chiemo." 
Jeremiah31:26 Kuom mano ji nowach niya, ‘Nindo noterowa, to ka ne wachiew ne wanwang’o ka chunywa oduogo.’" 
Jeremiah31:27 “An Ruoth Nyasaye awacho ni kinde biro ma ji gi jamni nonya mang’eny e piny Israel gi Juda. 
Jeremiah31:28 Kaka ne aketo chunya mondo apudhgi, kendo agogi piny, kendo akethgi, e kaka abiro keto chunya mondo apidhgi kendo agergi." 
Jeremiah31:29 Ka ndalono ochopo, to ji ok nochak owach niya, ‘Wuone ne ochamo olembe manumu, to nyithindo ema dhogi rewore.’" 
Jeremiah31:30 To koro ng’ama ochamo olemo manumu, dhoge norewre mana en owuon, tiende ni ng’ato ka ng’ato notho mana nikech richone owuon.”" 
Jeremiah31:31 Ruoth Nyasaye wacho niya, “Ndalo biro ma anatimie singruok manyien gi dhood Israel kod dhood Juda." 
Jeremiah31:32 Ok nochal gi singruok mane atimo gi kweregi kane atayogi kagologi e piny Misri, nimar ne giketho singruok mane atimo kodgi kata obedo ni ne an ruodhgi." 
Jeremiah31:33 Singruok ma anatim gi dhood Israel bang’ ndalogo ema: Anaket chiekena e parogi, kendo anandikgi e chunygi. Anabed Nyasachgi, mi ginibed jogaa." 
Jeremiah31:34 Onge ng’ama nopuonj wadgi kata ma nopuonj omin mare, kawachone ni, ‘Ng’e Ruoth Nyasaye,’ nikechh giduto gining’eya, chakre ng’at matinie moloyo nyaka ng’at maduong’ie moloyo. Anawenigi richogi, kendo ok nachak apar timbe maricho mane gisetimo. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano.”" 
Jeremiah31:35 Ruoth Nyasaye ema miyo chieng’ rieny godiechieng’, kendo omiyo due gi sulue rieny gotieno. En ema otago pi nam, kendo omiyo apaka wuo. Nyinge en Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto." 
Jeremiah31:36 Osingore ni Israel nobed oganda kinde duto nyaka giko piny. 
Jeremiah31:37 Ka da bed ni polo inyalo pimo, kata mise mag piny inyalo nono maber, to eka Ruoth Nyasaye dijwang’ jo-Israel nikech gik maricho ma gisetimo." 
Jeremiah31:38 Ruoth Nyasaye wacho niya, “Ndalo biro ma nochak ogerie dalani, chakre kama oger mabor mar ng’icho mar Hananel kochiko yo podho chieng’, nyaka rangach man kama ohinga gomogo." 
Jeremiah31:39 Tong’ne nodhi koa kanyo kochomo yo podho chieng’, nyaka got Gareb, mi olwor nyaka Goah." 
Jeremiah31:40 To holo duto kama owitie ringre joma otho, kendo owitie yugi, nobed kama ler moyangna, kaachiel gi pewe duto manie geng aora Kidron nyaka ranga Farese, koma ochomo yo wuok chieng’. Dala Jerusalem ok nochak omuki, bende ok nochak okethe.”" 
Jeremiah32:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nowuoyo gi Jeremia e higa mar apar mar loch Zedekia ruodh Juda, ma bende ne higa mar apar gaboro mar loch Nebukadnezar ruodh Babulon." 
Jeremiah32:2 E ndalono jolweny mag ruodh Babulon ne monjo Jerusalem, kendo noyudo Jeremia janabi otue e laru mar od ruoth." 
Jeremiah32:3 Ruoth Zedekia notueye kanyo nikech noyudo osekoro wach niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye osewacho ni obiro chiwo Jerusalem e lwet ruodh Babulon, mi kaw," 
Jeremiah32:4 kendo ni ruoth Zedekia ok notony e lwet jo-Babulon, to ibiro make mi tere e nyim ruodh Babulon mi enonene wang’ gi wang’, kendo nowuo kode dhok gi dhok." 
Jeremiah32:5 Enotere Babulon kendo nobed kuno nyaka chop otimne gima odwaro. To kata da oked gi jo-Babulon matek manade, to ok nolo. Ruoth Nyasaye ema owacho kamano.”" 
Jeremiah32:6 Jeremia nowacho niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye nowachona ni" 
Jeremiah32:7 Hanamel wuod Shalum ma owadgi wuora biro biro ira, ka dwaro mondo ang’iew puothe man Anathoth, nikech an watne mahie, omiyo an gi ratiro mar ng’iewo puotheno.”" 
Jeremiah32:8 Kane Ruoth Nyasaye osenyisa kamano, Hanamel ma wuod owadgi wuora nobiro ira e laru mar jorit, mowachona niya, “Ng’iew puotha man Anathoth e piny Benjamin, nikech in watna mahie, omiyo in ema in gi ratiro mar ng’iewe obed mari.” To koro nang’eyo ni Ruoth Nyasaye ema dwaro mondo ang’iew puodhono." 
Jeremiah32:9 Kuom mano ne ang’iewe, mi achulo Hanamel fedha moromo achiel kuom abich mar kilo." 
Jeremiah32:10 Ne aketo sei e barup winjruok manyiso ni aseng’iewo puodhono, mi adino baruano e nyim joneno, kendo ne apimo fedha e ratil." 
Jeremiah32:11 Eka ne akawo barua modin mane oting’o weche duto mag winjruok kod mano mane ok odin," 
Jeremiah32:12 mi amiyo Baruk wuod Neria ma wuod Maseya e nyim Hanamel gi joneno mane oseketo sei e barup winjruok nogo, kendo e nyim jo-Yahudi duto mane obet e laru." 
Jeremiah32:13 Ne anyiso Baruk e nyim jogo duto niya," 
Jeremiah32:14 “Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto kendo ma Nyasach Israel osechiko mondo ikaw barup winjruok modinni, kod mano ma ok odin, mondo iketgi e agulu gibedie mak gikethre kuom higni mang’eny," 
Jeremiah32:15 nikech Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko duto kendo ma Nyasach Israel osewacho ni udi gi puothe mag mzabibu nochak ong’iew kendo e pinyni.” 
Jeremiah32:16 Kane asemiyo Baruk wuod Neria barup winjruokno, ne alemo kama:" 
Jeremiah32:17 “A Ruoth Nyasaye! Ne ichueyo polo gi piny kod riekoni gi tekoni maduong’. Onge gima nyalo tami timo. 
Jeremiah32:18 Isenyiso herani mosiko ni ji gana gi gana, to bende ikumo ji nikech richo mag wuonegi. In Nyasaye maduong’ man gi teko, kendo nyingi en Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto." 
Jeremiah32:19 In ichano gik malich miwuoro, kendo itimo gik madongo. Bende ineno gik moko duto ma ji timo, kendo itimonigi mana moromo gi timbegi." 
Jeremiah32:20 Ne itimo ranyisi gi honni e piny Misri, kendo pod isiko kitimogi nyaka chil kawuono e piny Israel kendo e pinje moko duto." 
Jeremiah32:21 Ne itiyo gi tekoni maduong’ kod riekoni kuom timo ranyisi gi honni mane ibwogogo wasikwa, mi igolo jogi e piny Misri." 
Jeremiah32:22 Ne imiyogi piny maber kendo momewni, mana kaka nisesingori ni kweregi." 
Jeremiah32:23 To kane gidonjo e pinyni, mi gidakie, ne ok girito chikeni, bende ne ok giluori. Ne ok gitimo gimoro amora mane isechikogi mondo gitim. Mano emomiyo ne ikelo masirani duto kuomgi." 
Jeremiah32:24 “Jo-Babulon osedhuro lowo pidhe pidhe e alwora mar dala, kendo gimonje mondo gikawe. Lweny gi kech kod tuo biro miyo gikawe. A Ruoth Nyasaye, ineno kaka gigo mane iwacho timore." 
Jeremiah32:25 To kata kamano, Ruoth Nyasaye, in ema ne inyisa mondo ang’iew puodho cha e nyim joneno, kata obedo ni jo-Babulon ochiegni kawo dalani kamano.”" 
Jeremiah32:26 Eka Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Jeremia niya," 
Jeremiah32:27 “An e Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach ji duto, kendo onge gima nyalo tama timo." 
Jeremiah32:28 Kuom mano, abiro chiwo dalani e lwet Nebukadnezar ruodh Babulon kod joge mag lweny mondo okawe." 
Jeremiah32:29 Jo-Babulon ma koro monjo Jerusalem biro moke mach, mi obiro wang’ pep kaachiel gi udi ma ji osebedo kawang’o ubani ni Baal e tetgi, kendo timoe misengni miolo piny ni nyiseche mamoko, ka gimiyago mirima." 
Jeremiah32:30 Jo-Israel gi jo-Juda osebet mana ka timo gik ma amon-go, chakre tindogi, kendo gisemiya mirima gi kido manono ma giseloso." 
Jeremiah32:31 Dalani osemiya mirima mager, chakre chieng’ mane ogeree nyaka chil kawuono, kendo asechano mondo akethe" 
Jeremiah32:32 nikech timbe maricho ma jo-Israel gi jo-Juda osetimo, kaachiel gi ruodhigi gi jotendgi kod jodologi gi jonabigi kod ji duto modak e piny Juda gi Jerusalem." 
Jeremiah32:33 Giselokona ng’egi, kendo kata obedo ni ne asesiko kapuonjogi, to gidagi winja, bende ok giyie mako puonjna." 
Jeremiah32:34 Giseketo kido mag nyisechegi makuero e Hakalu mara, mi gidwanyo," 
Jeremiah32:35 kendo gisegero kende-mag-liswa ni Baal e holo Ben-hinom mondo giwang’ie yawuotgi gi nyigi ka liswa ni nyasaye miluongo ni Molek. To ne ok anyisogi mondo gitim kamano, bende ne ok aparo kata matin ni ginyalo timo gima kamano, mi gimi jo-Juda bed joricho.”" 
Jeremiah32:36 Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel nowuoyo kuom Jerusalem niya, “Jeremia, isenyiso ji ni lweny gi kech kod tuoche biro miyo jo-Babulon kaw dalani. To koro winji gima chielo ma adwaro wacho" 
Jeremiah32:37 Kinde moro anachokgi, kagologi e pinje duto ma nobed ka asekeyogie, ka akecho kendo ka mirimba ger, mi aduoggi ka eri mondo gidagie gi kue." 
Jeremiah32:38 Eka ginibed joga kendo anabed Nyasachgi. 
Jeremiah32:39 Abiro miyogi chuny achiel gi yo achiel mondo giluora nyaka chieng’, eka gidhi nyime maber kod nyikwagi bende." 
Jeremiah32:40 Anatim kodgi singruok mochwere ni ok nawe timonigi maber, kendo anami giluora gi chunygi duto, mi ok ginibar giweya." 
Jeremiah32:41 Anatimnigi maber ka chunya mor, kendo anagurgi motegno e pinyni gi chunya duto kod parona duto." 
Jeremiah32:42 “Kaka asekelo masira maduong’ni kuom jogi, e kaka abiro miyogi gik moko duto mabeyo ma asesingoranigi." 
Jeremiah32:43 In Jeremia, isewacho ni pinyni biro chalo thim, kama le kata dhano ok dagie, kendo ni jo-Babulon biro kawe. To kata kamano, bang’e, puothe nochak ong’iew e pinyni." 
Jeremiah32:44 Ji nong’iewgi mi ket sei e barupe mag winjruok manyiso ni oseng’iewgi, kendo ginidin barupego e nyim joneno. Mano notimre e piny Benjamin gi mier mokiewo gi Jerusalem gi miech Juda, kendo e miech piny gode, kod piny motwo man yo milambo, nimar nadwok joga e pinygi. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano.”" 
Jeremiah33:1 Ruoth Nyasaye ne ochako owuoyo gi Jeremia, kane Jeremia pod otue e laru mar od jorit." 
Jeremiah33:2 Nowachone kama: “An Ruoth Nyasaye mane ochueyo piny, mi oloso kendo oguro motegno, nyinga en Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Jeremiah33:3 In Jeremia awachoni niya, ‘Luonga, to abiro dwoki, kendo ananyisi gik madongo kendo malich ma ok ing’eyo.’" 
Jeremiah33:4 An Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel, awacho ni ut Jerusalem kod od ruodh Juda ibiro muki. Onge tiende wuok mondo utem muko pidhe mag lowo ma jo-Babulon osedhuro mondo giidhi ka gimonjo dala," 
Jeremiah33:5 nikech mano biro mana miyo dala pong’ gi ringre ji ma abiro nego ka an gi mirima mager. Asejwang’o dalani nikech timbe maricho ma joma odakie osetimo. 
Jeremiah33:6 To kata kamano, abiro change, mi odok mangima. Bende abiro chango joma odakie mi amigi mor kod kue." 
Jeremiah33:7 Abiro miyo jo-Juda gi jo-Israel dhi nyime maber, kendo anachak agergi, mi gibed mana kaka ne gin chon." 
Jeremiah33:8 Abiro pwodhogi kuom richogi duto, kendo abiro weyonigi timbe maricho ma gisetimo e nyima ka gitamore mako chikna." 
Jeremiah33:9 Jerusalem nobed kama miya mor, kendo makelona pak gi duong’, mi ogendini duto mae piny nobed maluor kendo makirni ka giwinjo gik moko duto mabeyo ma atimo ni jo-Jerusalem, kod dongruok maber ma akelo ni dalani.”" 
Jeremiah33:10 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho niya, “Ji wacho ni kaeri chalo gi thim, kendo onge ji kata jamni modakie. En adier ni miech Juda kod yore mag Jerusalem odong’ nono, kendo onge ji kata jamni mantie." 
Jeremiah33:11 To ubiro chako winjo mor gi ilo kuondego. Dwond mon ma miehni gi chwogi bende nowinji. Unuwinj ka ji wer ka gikelo chiwo mag erokamano e Hekalu mara niya, ‘Gouru erokamano ni Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto, nikech ong’won kendo herane osiko.’ Abiro miyo pinyni bed maber mana kaka ne ochalo chon. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano.”" 
Jeremiah33:12 Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto nowacho niya, “E piny ma koro chalo thim, maonge ji ma odakieni, chieng’ moro lege nochak obedie ma jokwath nyalo kwayoe jambgi." 
Jeremiah33:13 Jokwath nochak okwan jambgi e mier manie piny gode gi manie tiend gode kod manie piny milambo gi manie piny Benjamin kod manie mier matindo molworo Jerusalem kendo e miech Juda. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano.” 
Jeremiah33:14 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho niya, “Kinde biro ma anachopie singruok mane atimo ni jo-Israel gi jo-Juda ni anaguedhgi." 
Jeremiah33:15 E kindeno anakel nyakwar Daudi hie, mi enotim gik malong’o kendo makare." 
Jeremiah33:16 E ndalogo nores jo-Juda, kendo jo-Jerusalem nodag gi kue. Omiyo ginichak dalagi ni, ‘Ruoth Nyasaye moresowa.’" 
Jeremiah33:17 An Ruoth Nyasaye asingora ni e kinde duto nobedie nyakwar Daudi ka ruodh Israel," 
Jeremiah33:18 kendo pile nobedie jodolo ma jo-Lawi ka tiyo e nyima, kendo kachiwo misengni miwang’o pep gi mag mogo kaachiel gi misengni mamoko.”" 
Jeremiah33:19 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Jeremia niya," 
Jeremiah33:20 “Kapo ni chike ma aritogo odiechieng’ gotieno nyalo kethore, mi ok giluwore kaka pile," 
Jeremiah33:21 to kara singruok mane atimo gi Daudi jatichna ni kinde duto nyakware ema nobed ruoth, bende nyalo kethore, kendo singruok mane atimo gi jodolo ma jo-Lawi ma tiyona bende dikethre." 
Jeremiah33:22 Abiro miyo nyikwa Daudi jatichna kod jodolo ma jo-Lawi ma tiyona nya, mondo gibed mang’eny ma ok nyal kwan, mana ka sulue manie polo kata ka kuoyo mae dhonam.”" 
Jeremiah33:23 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Jeremia niya," 
Jeremiah33:24 “Donge isewinjo ka ji wacho ni aseweyo jo-Israel gi jo-Juda, ma gin dhoudi ariyo mane ayiero? Kuom mano koro gicharo joga, kendo ok gikwan-gi ka joma nigi pinygi." 
Jeremiah33:25 To an Ruoth Nyasaye awacho ni, kapo ni anyalo ketho chike ma aritogo odiechieng’ gotieno kod polo gi piny," 
Jeremiah33:26 to eka anyalo ketho singruok mane atimo gi nyikwa Jakobo kendo gi Daudi jatichna, ni anaket nyakwar Daudi moro obed ruodh nyikwa Ibrahim gi Isaka kod Jakobo. Adier, abiro timonigi ng’wono mi gichak gidhi nyime maber.”" 
Jeremiah34:1 Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel nowuoyo gi Jeremia kane oyudo Nebukadnezar ruodh Babulon gi ogandane mar lweny kod jolweny mag ogendini mamoko, kaachiel gi mag pinje duto mane ni e bwo lochne omonjo Jerusalem kod mier mokiewo kode." 
Jeremiah34:2 Nowachone mondo odhi onyis Zedekia ruodh Juda niya, “An Ruoth Nyasaye, abiro chiwo dalani e lwet ruodh Babulon, mi nowang’e pep." 
Jeremiah34:3 In ok nitony, to ibiro maki mi teri ire. Ubiro nenoru kode wang’ gi wang’, mi uwuo kode dhok gi dhok. Bang’e inidhi Babulon." 
Jeremiah34:4 Omiyo ruoth Zedekia, winji, gima an Ruoth Nyasaye awacho kuomi. Ok nonegi e lweny," 
Jeremiah34:5 to initho gi kue, mi ji nowang’ni gik mang’ue ng’ar kiyiki, mana kaka ne giwang’o ni kwereni mane okwongoni bedo ruodh. Giniywagi ka giwacho niya, ‘A yaye!’ Ruodhwa otho! An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano.”" 
Jeremiah34:6 Bang’e Jeremia janabi noluwo wechego duto ni Zedekia ruodh Juda, mane ni Jerusalem." 
Jeremiah34:7 E kindeno jolweny mag ruodh Babulon noyudo monjo Jerusalem, kaachiel gi Lakish kod Azeka. Mier ariyogo kende e miech Juda mochiel motegno mane pok okaw." 
Jeremiah34:8 Ruoth Nyasaye nowuoyo gi Jeremia, kane ruoth Zedekia osetimo winjruok gi jo-Jerusalem mondo ogony wasumbni maggi odhi." 
Jeremiah34:9 Noyudo ji duto osewinjore ni ng’ato ka ng’ato biro gonyo wasumbni mage ma jo-Hibrania machwo gi mamon mondo ng’ato kik bed gi ja-Yahudi matiyone ka misumba. 
Jeremiah34:10 Kane ji duto kaachiel gi jotendgi osetimo singruok ni gibiro gonyo wasumbgi kamano kendo ni ok ginichak gilokgi wasumbni, ne gichopo singruokno, mi giweyo wasumbgi odhi." 
Jeremiah34:11 To achien ne giloko parogi mi gikawo mon gi chwo mane gisegonyo, mi gichako gidwoko e tich wasumbni." 
Jeremiah34:12 Kindeno ema Ruoth Nyasaye 
Jeremiah34:13 ma Nyasach Israel nowachoe ni Jeremia niya, “Ne atimo singruok gi kwereni kane aresogi mi agologi Misri e tich wasumbni. Ne awachonigi niya," 
Jeremiah34:14 ‘Higni abiriyo ka higni abiriyo onego ng’ato ka ng’ato kuomu owe ja-Hibrania moro amora mane ong’iewo ka misumba, kendo mosetiyone kuom higni auchiel.’ To kwereu ne ok nyal winja, kata rito chikna ne ok girito." 
Jeremiah34:15 Un to yande uloko parou, mi utimo gima ahero. Uduto ne uyie gonyo jo-Hibrania weteu, mi utimo singruok e nyima ei Hekalu miluongo gi nyinga." 
Jeremiah34:16 To bang’e ne uchako uloko parou, mi ukwedo nyinga. Uduto ne uchako ukawo wasumbni kendo." 
Jeremiah34:17 Kuom mano, an Ruoth Nyasaye awacho ni ne achikou mondo uwe jo-Hibrania weteu thuolo, to ok userito chiknano, emomiyo abiro weyou thuolo, to mana ni mondo lweny gi tuoche kod kech onegu! Abiro miyo ogendini duto manie piny bed maluor konenou. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano." 
Jeremiah34:18 Jotend Juda gi mag Jerusalem kod jodong od ruoth gi jodolo kod jopinyni duto notimo koda singruok ka gikadho e kind kidienje ariyo mag rwath mong’adi sirunda. To ne giketho singruok mane gisetimo e nyima, mi ok gichopo singruokno. Omiyo abiro timo ni jogi mana gima ne atimo ni rwath" 
Jeremiah34:19  
Jeremiah34:20 Abiro chiwogi e lwet wasikgi ma dwaro negogi, kendo ringregi winy gi le ema biro chamo." 
Jeremiah34:21 Bende abiro chiwo Zedekia ruodh Juda gi jodonge e lwet joma dwaro negogi, kendo abiro ketogi e lwet jolweny mag ruodh Babulon ma koro oseweyo monjou." 
Jeremiah34:22 Adier, abiro golo chik, mi jo-Babulon-go biro duogo monjo dalani mi gikaw, kendo giwang’ pep. Abiro ketho miech Juda, mi lokre thim maonge ng’ama dakie. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano.”" 
Jeremiah35:1 E ndalo loch Jehoyakim wuod Josia ruodh Juda, Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Jeremia niya" 
Jeremiah35:2 “Dhiyo ir joka Rekab mondo iwuo kodgi. Bang’e ikelgi e ot achiel kuom ut Hekalu mondo imigi divai gimadhi.” 
Jeremiah35:3 Kuom mano Jeremia nokawo Jazania wuod Jeremia machielo, ma nyakwar Habazia kod owetene gi joka Rekab duto," 
Jeremiah35:4 mi okelogi e Hekalu. Ne oterogi e od yawuot Hanan wuod Igdalia ng’at Nyasaye. Odno ne nie bath od jodong Hekalu, kendo ewi od Maaseya wuod Shalum mane jatich maduong’ e Hekalu." 
Jeremiah35:5 Bang’e Jeremia noketo kikombe gi tewni ma divai opong’o e nyim joka Rekab, mowachonigi niya, “Madhuru divai.”" 
Jeremiah35:6 To ne gidwoke niya, “Ok wamadh divai nikech Jonadab wuod Rekab ma kwarwa nowachonwa ni wan kata nyikwawa kik wamadh divai nyaka chieng’." 
Jeremiah35:7 Bende nokwerowa ni kik wager udi kata kik wapur puothe, kendo ni kik wapidh yiend mzabibu kata kik wabed gi gik makamago. Nochikowa mana ni mondo wadag mana e hembe kuom ngimawa duto, ni eka wanadag aming’a e piny ma wanie weloni." 
Jeremiah35:8 Waserito chike duto mag Jonadab wuod Rekab ma kwarwa. Wan wawegi ok wamadh divai, kata mana mondwa gi yawuotwa kod nyiwa bende ok madhi." 
Jeremiah35:9 Ok wager udi mondo wadagie, bende waonge gi puothe mag mzabibu, kata puothe mamoko, kata cham," 
Jeremiah35:10 to wadak mana e hembe, kamano, chike duto mane kwarwa Jonadab omiyowa waserito maber." 
Jeremiah35:11 To kane Nebukadnezar ruodh Babulon omonjo pinywani, ne waneno ni ber mondo wabi Jerusalem, dipo ka jolweny mag Babulon gi mag Aram omakowa. Mano emomiyo wadak Jerusalem.”" 
Jeremiah35:12 Bang’ wechego, Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto kendo ma Nyasach Israel nowacho ni Jeremia" 
Jeremiah35:13 mondo odhi owach ni jo-Juda gi jo-Jerusalem niya, “An Ruoth Nyasaye apenjou gima omiyo utamoru winja, kata rito chikena?" 
Jeremiah35:14 Nyikwa Jonadab oserito chik mane kwargi omiyogi mi ok gimadh divai, kendo kata nyaka sani onge ng’ato kuomgi mametho, nikech girito chik mane kwargi ogolo. To an asebedo ka awuoyonu pile, to utamoru." 
Jeremiah35:15 Bende asebedo ka aoronu jotichna ma jonabi, kendo gisekwerou ni mondo uwe timbe maricho, utim gik makare. Ne gisiemou ni uwe lamo nyiseche mamoko mondo udag aming’a e piny mane amiyou gi kwereu. To ne ok unyal winja, kata chiko itu kuom gima awacho." 
Jeremiah35:16 Nyikwa Jonadab oserito chik mane kwargi omiyogi, to un to utamoru winja." 
Jeremiah35:17 Omiyo an Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto kendo ma Nyasach Israel abiro kelo kuomu un jo-Juda gi jo-Jerusalem masiche duto mane asesiemougo, nikech ne ok unyal winja ka awuoyo kodu, bende ne ok unyal dwoka ka aluongou.”" 
Jeremiah35:18 Bang’e Jeremia nowacho ni joka Rekab ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel osewacho niya, “Userito chik mane kwaru Jonadab omiyou, kutimo gik moko duto mane ochikou." 
Jeremiah35:19 Kuom mano an Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto, kendo ma Nyasach Israel asingora ni e kinde duto nobedie nyakwar Jonadab wuod Rekab ma tiyona.”" 
Jeremiah36:1 E higa mar ang’wen mar loch Jehoyakim ruodh Juda, Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Jeremia niya," 
Jeremiah36:2 “Kaw kitabu mondo indikie weche duto ma asenyisi kuom Israel gi Juda kod ogendini duto, chakre chieng’ mane akwongo losoe kodi e ndalo loch ruoth Josia nyaka chil kawuono." 
Jeremiah36:3 Kamoro ka jo-Juda owinjo masiche duto ma achano kelo kuomgi, to ginyalo weyo yoregi maricho. Bang’e anyaloweyonigi timbegi maricho kod richogi.”" 
Jeremiah36:4 Mano omiyo Jeremia noluongo Baruk wuod Neria, mi oluwone weche duto mane Ruoth Nyasaye osenyise, kendo Baruk nondikogi duto e kitabu." 
Jeremiah36:5 Bang’e Jeremia nomiyo Baruk chik niya, “Tinde ok oyiena donjo e Hekalu" 
Jeremiah36:6 Omiyo adwaro ni wang’ni ka ji tueyo chiemo, to mondo idhi kuno isom weche manie kitabuni matek mondo giwinj gik moko duto ma Ruoth Nyasaye osenyisa, mi awachoni indiko. Nyaka itim kamano kama ji duto nyalo winjigo, koda ka jo-Juda mobiro ka oa e miechgi." 
Jeremiah36:7 Kamoro dipo ka gilamo Ruoth Nyasaye, mi gilokore giweyo yoregi maricho, nimar osesiemogi ni obiro kumogi gi mirimbe mager.”" 
Jeremiah36:8 Kamano Baruk nodhi e Hekalu mosomo weche Ruoth Nyasaye manie kitabuno, mana kaka Jeremia nonyise." 
Jeremiah36:9 E due mar ochiko, higa mar abich, mar loch Jehoyakim wuod Josia ruodh Juda, jo-Jerusalem duto kaachiel gi ji mane oa e miech Juda ne oriyo kech mondo Ruoth Nyasaye okechgi." 
Jeremiah36:10 Eka Baruk nosomonigi weche duto mane Jeremia owachone, mi ondiko e kitabu. Ne osomo wechego e Hekalu gi e od Gemaria wuod Shafan ma jang’ad ni ruoth rieko. Odno ne nie laru mamalo e dhoranga Hekalu miluongo ni ‘Rangach Manyien.’" 
Jeremiah36:11 Kane Mikaya wuod Gemaria ma nyakwar Shafan owinjo ka Baruk somo weche Ruoth Nyasaye e kitabuno," 
Jeremiah36:12 ne odhi e dala ruoth modonjo ei od jang’ad ni ruoth rieko, kama ne oyudo jotelo duto nitie ka yalo. Elishama ma jang’ad ni ruoth rieko, kod Delaya wuod Shemia gi Elnathan wuod Akbor, gi Gemaria wuod Shefan gi Zedekia wuod Hanania kod jotelo mamoko duto ne oyudo ni kuno." 
Jeremiah36:13 Mikaya nonyisogi weche duto mane osewinjo ka Baruk somo ni ji. 
Jeremiah36:14 Eka jotelogo nooro Jehudi wuod Nethania ma wuod Shelemia ma wuod Kushi mondo onyis Baruk okel kitabu mane oyudo osesomo ni jino. Omiyo Baruk nokawo kitabuno mi odhigo irgi. 
Jeremiah36:15 Kane ginene, ne giwachone niya, “Bed piny mondo isomnwa kitabuno.” Kuom mano Baruk nobet piny, mosomonigi," 
Jeremiah36:16 kendo kane osetieko some duto, jotelogo nowuoyo e kindgi giwegi ka wuoro. Eka ne giwacho ni Baruk niya, “Nyaka wanyis ruoth wachni.”" 
Jeremiah36:17 Bang’ mano ne gipenje niya, “Nyiswa ane, ere kaka ne indiko wechegi duto? Koso Jeremia ema ne wuoyoni to indiko?”" 
Jeremiah36:18 Baruk nodwokogi niya, “Jeremia ema ne owachona wechego duto, mi andiko gi wino e kitabuni.”" 
Jeremiah36:19 Bang’e ne giwachone niya, “Un gi Jeremia nyaka upondi, mondo kik ng’ato ng’e kama untie.”" 
Jeremiah36:20 Jotelogo nokawo kitabuno mokano e od Elishama ma jang’ad ni ruoth rieko, eka ne gidhi e laru mar od ruoth, mi ginyiso ruoth weche duto." 
Jeremiah36:21 Ruoth ne ooro Jehu mondo odhi oomne kitabuno, mi Jehu nodhi oome e od Elishama mosome ni ruoth kod jodongo duto mane nigi ruoth." 
Jeremiah36:22 Ne en due mar ochiko, kinde ma koyo ng’ichie, kendo ne oyudo ruoth obet ka oyo mach e ode modakie ndalo koyo." 
Jeremiah36:23 E kinde ka kinde mane Jehudi tieko somo laini adek kata ang’wen, ruoth ne ng’ado kuondego gi pala moro matin, kendo owito e mach. Ne otimo atima kamano nyaka ne otieko kitabuno." 
Jeremiah36:24 To ruoth, kata ng’ato ang’ata kuom jodonge ne ok obedo maluor, kata yiecho lepgi ma dinyis ni giloko chunygi." 
Jeremiah36:25 Kata obedo ni Elnathan gi Delaya gi Gemaria ne jokwayo ruoth ni mondo kik owang’ kitabuno, to ne ok odewogi." 
Jeremiah36:26 Bang’e nogolo chik mondo jaduong’ Jerameel kaachiel gi Seraya wuod Azriel kod Shelemia wuod Abdiel jodhi omak Jeremia gi Baruk jandiko mare. To noyudo ka Ruoth Nyasaye osepandogi. 
Jeremiah36:27 Kane ruoth Jehoyakim osewang’o kitabu mane Baruk ondikoe weche mane Jeremia oluwone, Ruoth Nyasaye nonyiso Jeremia" 
Jeremiah36:28 mondo okaw kitabu machielo, kendo ondikie weche duto mane nie kitabu mokwongono." 
Jeremiah36:29 Bende Ruoth Nyasaye ne owachone mondo onyis ruoth Jehoyakim niya, “Isewang’o kitabu, kendo isepenjo Jeremia gima omiyo ne ondiko ni ruodh Babulon biro biro ketho pinyni, kendo nego ji modakie koda ka jamni." 
Jeremiah36:30 Kuom mano, an Ruoth Nyasaye awachoni, in ruoth Jehoyakim, ni onge nyakwari moro amora ma nobed ruoth ka Daudi. Ringri nowiti oko kama chieng’ nochamee godiechieng’, kendo koyo nochamee gotieno." 
Jeremiah36:31 Anakumi in kod nyikwayi, kaachiel gi jodongi nikech richo ma usetimo. In gi jo-Jerusalem kod jo-Juda, ok usedewo siem mane asiemougo, omiyo abiro kelo kuomu masiche duto ma asewacho.”" 
Jeremiah36:32 Bang’ mano, Jeremia nokawo, kitabu machielo, momiyo Baruk jandiko mare, mondikoe weche duto mane Jeremia owachone. Ne ondiko gimoro amora mane nie kitabu mane ruoth Jehoyakim osewang’o e mach. Bende Jeremia ne omedo weche mang’eny machal gi mokwongogo." 
Jeremiah37:1 Nebukadnezar ruodh Babulon noketo Zedekia wuod Josia ruodh Juda kar Jekonia wuod Jehoyakim. 
Jeremiah37:2 To ruoth Zedekia kata jotelo mage kata mana joge ne ok odewo weche mane Ruoth Nyasaye onyiso Jeremia janabi mondo owachi. 
Jeremiah37:3 Ruoth Zedekia nooro Jehukal wuod Shelemia kod Zefania wuod Maaseya ma jodolo ir Jeremia mondo giwachne niya, “Yie ilamnwa Ruoth Nyasachwa.”" 
Jeremiah37:4 E ndalono noyudo ka pok otue Jeremia, kendo ne pod odak adaka gi ji kapod en thuolo." 
Jeremiah37:5 E kindeni jolweny mag Farao nowuok Misri, kendo kane jo-Babulon mane oyudo monjo Jerusalem owinjo kamano, ne giweyo monjo Jerusalem." 
Jeremiah37:6 Eka Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel nowacho ni Jeremia janabi," 
Jeremiah37:7 “Ruodh Juda osekwayi mondo ipenjne wach kuoma. Nyise ni jolweny mag Farao ma osebiro mondo okonye biro dok thurgi Misri. 
Jeremiah37:8 Bang’e jo-Babulon biro duogo, mi gimonj Jerusalem, kendo gikawe mi giwang’." 
Jeremiah37:9 An Ruoth Nyasaye anyisou ni kik uwuondru ka ugalo ni jo-Babulon ok nochak oduogi, nikech adier, gibiro duogo." 
Jeremiah37:10 To kata kapo ni uloyo jolweny duto mag Babulon ma monjougo, mi odong’ mana joma ohinyore ma nindo aninda, e hembegi, to joma ohinyorego pod dia malo, mi wang’ Jerusalem pep.”" 
Jeremiah37:11 Kane jolweny mag Babulon oweyo monjo Jerusalem, nimar jolweny mag Farao ne biro,"
