Jeremiah37:12 Jeremia notemo wuok Jerusalem mondo odhi e piny Benjamin opognee mwandu mag joodgi. 
Jeremiah37:13 To kane ochopo e dhorangach miluongo ni Ranga Benjamin, jatend jolweny mane tiyo kanyo, ma nyinge Irija wuod Shelemia ma nyakwar Hanania, nochunge, mi owachone niya, “Iringo idok ni jo-Babulon!”" 
Jeremiah37:14 Jeremia to nodwoke ni, “Ooyo, ok adognigi.” To Irija ne ok nyal winjo wachne, omiyo ne omake mi otere e nyim jodongo." 
Jeremiah37:15 Kane jodongogo oneno Jeremia, ne gikecho kode ahinya, mi gigolo chik mondo ochwade, kendo olorne e od Jonathan ma jang’ad ni ruoth rieko. (Od Jonathanno ne koro olok od tuech.)" 
Jeremiah37:16 Ne giketo Jeremia e od tuech manie bwo lowo, mi odak kuno aming’a," 
Jeremiah37:17 Ruoth Zedekia nogolo chik moter Jeremia ire, kendo kane Jeremia obiro, nopenje ling’ling’ niya, “Bende Ruoth Nyasaye osewachoe wach moro?” Jeremia nodwoke niya, “Ee, osewacho wach moro!” Eka nodhi nyime kowachone ni ruodh Babulon biro make." 
Jeremiah37:18 Bang’ mano Jeremia nopenjo Zedekia niya, “Ere gima asekethoni kata ni jodongi kata ni jogi momiyo iketa e tuech?" 
Jeremiah37:19 Tinde ere jonabi magi mane onyis ni ruodh Babulon ok bi monjo pinyni? 
Jeremiah37:20 Omiyo jaduong’, akwayi ni ichik iti, kendo itim gima awacho. Kiyie, to kik idwoka e od Jonathan ma jang’adni rieko, nimar ka idwoka, to en adier ni abiro tho kuno.”" 
Jeremiah37:21 Omiyo ruoth Zedekia nogolo chik mondo otue Jeremia e laru mar od jorit. Ne imiye makati achiel odiechieng’ kodiechieng’ mogol kuom jolos makati, nyaka makati duto norumo Jerusalem. Kamano Jeremia nosiko asika kotue e laruno." 
Jeremiah38:1 Shefatia wuod Matan gi Gedalia wuod Pashur gi Jukal wuod Shelemia kod Pashur wuod Malkia ne jowinjo gima ne Jeremia wacho ni ji. Ne onyiso ji 
Jeremiah38:2 ni Ruoth Nyasaye nosewacho niya, “Ng’ato ang’ata ma odong’ Jerusalem, lweny kata kech kata tuoche biro nego. To ng’ato ang’ata modhi ochiwore e lwet jo-Babulon ok nonegi. Enotony to ngimane kende ema noresi.”" 
Jeremiah38:3 Bende Jeremia ne nyiso ji ni Ruoth Nyasaye nosewacho niya, “Abiro chiwo dalani e lwet jolweny mag ruodh Babulon, mi kawe.”" 
Jeremiah38:4 Kane jodongogo owinjo wechego, ne ginyiso ruoth niya, “Ng’atni nyaka negi, nikech kowuoyo kama, to onyoso chuny jolweny kaachiel gi jomoko duto modong’ e dala ka. Emomiyo waneno ni ng’atni ok dwar konyo ji, to odwaro mana ni mondo giyud chandruok.”" 
Jeremiah38:5 Mano omiyo ruoth Zedekia nowacho niya, “Onge wach! Kara timneuru gima uneno ni ber. Ok anyal tamou.”" 
Jeremiah38:6 Kuom mano ne gikawo Jeremia, mi ginyumo e soko jaduong’ Malkia, mane nie laru mar od jorit. Sokono ne onge pi, mak mana chuodho, omiyo ne gilore piny, e iye gi tonde, mi onyumore e chuodho." 
Jeremiah38:7 To Ebed-melek, ja-Ethiopia ma jatich mabuoch mane tiyo e od ruoth, ne owinjo ni jodongogo onyumo Jeremia e sokono. E sano ne oyudo ka ruoth nie bura e dhorangach miluongo ni Ranga Benjamin." 
Jeremiah38:8 Omiyo Ebed-melek noa e od ruoth, mi odhi onyiso ruoth niya," 
Jeremiah38:9 “Jaduong’, jogi osetimo gima ok ber. Gisenyumo Jeremia e soko kama kech biro negee nikech chiemo onge e dala duto.”" 
Jeremiah38:10 Kane ruoth owinjo kamano, nogolo chik mondo Ebed-melek odhi gi ji adek mane ni kanyo, mondo giywa Jeremia oko e soko ka pok otho." 
Jeremiah38:11 Omiyo Ebed-melek nokawo jogo, modhigo e od kendo mar dala ruoth mi okawoe nengni moti. Eka nodhi, mi oloro ni Jeremia nengnigo gi tonde e soko," 
Jeremiah38:12 kowachone niya, “Ket nengni motigo e yuothi, mondo tonde kik hinyi.” Jeremia notimo kamano," 
Jeremiah38:13 eka ne giywaye gi tonde, mi gigole oko. Bang’ mano ne olorne alora e laru mar od jorit." 
Jeremiah38:14 Ruoth Zedekia nogolo chik mondo okel Jeremia janabi e rangach mar adek mar Hekalu, kendo kane osekele ire, ne owachone niya, “Adwaro penji wach, to kik ipanda gimoro kata achiel.”" 
Jeremiah38:15 Jeremia nodwoke niya, “Ka anyisi wach ma adier, to ibiro nega, to bende ka ang’adoni rieko, to ok ibi dewo tiyogo.”" 
Jeremiah38:16 Kane ruoth Zedekia owinjo kamano, nosingore ni Jeremia ling’ling’ niya, “Akuong’ora gi nying Ruoth Nyasaye mangima mane ochueyowa ni ok nanegi, kendo ok nachiwi e lwet joma dwaro negi.”" 
Jeremiah38:17 Eka Jeremia nowachone niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto owacho ni ka iwuok ma ichiwori e lwet jotelo mag ruodh Babulon, to initony kendo dalani ok nowang’ gi mach. Adier, initony kaachiel gi joodi." 
Jeremiah38:18 To ka ok ichiwori e lwetgi, to gibiro kawo dalani, mi giwang’ kendo in ok nitony e lwetgi.”" 
Jeremiah38:19 Ruoth Zedekia nodwoke niya, “Aluoro jo-Yahudi ma oseringo odok ni jo-Babulon, nikech dipo ka ochiwa e lwetgi, mi gisanda.”" 
Jeremiah38:20 Eka Jeremia nowachone niya, “Ok nochiwi e lwetgi, omiyo akwayi ni mondo iwinj wach Ruoth Nyasaye kaka asenyisi, mi inine maber kendo ok nonegi." 
Jeremiah38:21 To Ruoth Nyasaye osenyisa e fweny ni ka idagi chiwori," 
Jeremiah38:22 to mon modong’ e od ruodh Juda ibiro gol, mi ter ni jotelo mag ruodh Babulon, kendo ka gidhi to giniwach niya, ‘Osiepe ruoth mogeno osewuonde, kendo gisebet ka gihewe gi rieko. Koro tinde osemoko e chuodho, omiyo osiepene oseweye!’ ”" 
Jeremiah38:23 Bang’ mano Jeremia nochako onyiso Zedekia niya, “Jo-Babulon nokaw mondi gi nyithindi duto, to in bende ok nitony e lwetgi. Ruodh Babulon nokawi mi teri e tuech, kendo dalani nowang’, mi rum pep.”" 
Jeremiah38:24 Zedekia nokone niya, “Kik iwe ng’ato ng’e weche ma wawacho kodigi, to eka ok gimoro ditimi." 
Jeremiah38:25 Ka jotelo owinjo ni asewuoyo kodi, to gibiro biro penji gima wasewacho, kendo gibiro nyisi ni ka iwachonigi weche duto ma wasewacho, to ok gibi negi." 
Jeremiah38:26 To in nyisgi mana ni ne ibiro kwaya mondo kik adwoki e od Jonathan, nimar dipo ka itho kuno.”" 
Jeremiah38:27 Adier, jotelo duto nobiro ir Jeremia, mi gipenje gima ne giwacho gi ruoth, to ne onyisogi mana kaka ruoth nosenyise mondo owachi. Omiyo ne ok ginyal timo gimoro, nikech onge ng’ato mane osewinjo weche mane Jeremia jowacho gi ruoth." 
Jeremiah38:28 Kuom mano nodwok Jeremia e laru mar od jorit, mi obet kanyo nyaka chieng’ mane okawie Jerusalem." 
Jeremiah39:1 E ndalo mar apar, higa mar ochiko mar loch Zedekia ruodh Juda, Nebukadnezar ruodh Babulon nobiro gi joge mag lweny, molworo Jerusalem mondo omonji." 
Jeremiah39:2 Kamano chieng’ due ochiko due mar ang’wen e higa mar apar gauchiel mar loch ruoth Zedekia, ne omuk ohinga mar Jerusalem." 
Jeremiah39:3 Kane osekaw Jerusalem, jodongo duto mag ruodh Babulon kaka Nergal Serezer machielo, ne jobiro mobet piny e Dhorangach Madiere." 
Jeremiah39:4 Kane Zedekia ruodh Juda gi jolwenje oneno gima osetimore, ne gipondo gotieno mi gia e dala. Ne giwuok ka ging’ado orundu ruoth, mi gikadho e dhorangach mane ni e kind ohingni ariyo, ka gichiko Paw Jordan." 
Jeremiah39:5 To jolweny mag Babulon nolawogi, mojuko Zedekia e paw Jeriko. Ne gimake mi gitere ir ruoth Nebukadnezar, mane oyudo ni Ribla e gweng’ Hamath, mong’adone bura kuno." 
Jeremiah39:6 Ruodh Babulon nogolo chik moneg yawuot Zedekia e dala mar Ribla kuno, mana e nyim Zedekia koneno. Bende noneg jodong Juda duto." 
Jeremiah39:7 Bang’e nogolo wenge Zedekia oko, mi otueye gi nyororo mondo otere Babulon." 
Jeremiah39:8 E kindeno, jo-Babulon nowang’o od ruoth gi ute ji, mi gimuko ohinga mar Jerusalem." 
Jeremiah39:9 To mogik Nebuzaradan ma jatend lweny nomako joma ne odong’ e dala motero Babulon kaachiel gi joma nosedokne. 
Jeremiah39:10 Joma odhier ahinya maonge gimoro ema noweyo e piny Juda, mi omiyo puothe mag mzabibu gi mag cham." 
Jeremiah39:11 To Nebukadnezar ruodh Babulon ne ooro wach ni Nebuzaradan jatend jolweny kowuoyo kuom Jeremia, kama:" 
Jeremiah39:12 “Dhiyo ikaw Jeremia, kendo irite maber. Kik ihinye, to timne gimoro amora modwaro.”" 
Jeremiah39:13 Omiyo Nebuzaradan, kaachiel gi jaduong Nebushazban gi jaduong’ Nergal Sarezar, kod jodong ruodh Babulon duto," 
Jeremiah39:14 ne ooro joote ir Jeremia, mogole e laru mar od jorit. Ne gikete e lwet Gedalia wuod Ahikam ma nyakwar Shafan mondo otere dala maber. Kamano Jeremia nodak gi joge." 
Jeremiah39:15 Ruoth Nyasaye nosewuoyo gi Jeremia kane pod otueye e laru mar od jorit, kowachone" 
Jeremiah39:16 mondo odhi onyis Ebed-edom ja Ethiopia ni Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto kendo ma Nyasach Israel osewacho niya, “Abiro ketho dalani, kendo ok abi guedhe, mana kaka nasingora ni natim. To ka chieng’no ochopo mi gigo otimore, to inibedie, kendo ininegi ka gitimore." 
Jeremiah39:17 To an Ruoth Nyasaye anakonyi, kendo ok noketi e lwet joma iluorogo." 
Jeremiah39:18 Anariti maber, mi ok nonegi, initony nikech isegeno kuoma to kata kamano, inires mana ngimani kende. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano.”" 
Jeremiah40:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nowuoyo gi Jeremia kane Nebuzaradan jatend lweny maduong osegonye Rama. Nosetere kuno kotueye gi nyororo kaachiel gi jomoko duto mane ogol Jerusalem gi Juda, kitero e tuech Babulon." 
Jeremiah40:2 Jatend lwenyno nogolo tenge mowachone niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye ne osesiemo ni obiro kelo masira e pinyni," 
Jeremiah40:3 kendo koro osetimo gima ne owacho ni notim. To gigo duto osetimore mana nikech jou osetimo timbe maricho e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo nikech ne ok giwinjo chikne." 
Jeremiah40:4 Koro agonyo nyororo oko e lweti mondo ibed thuolo, kendo ka idwaro dhi koda Babulon, to wanyalo dhi, mi anariti maber. To ka ok idwar dhi, to bende onge wach, inyalo dong’. In thuolo, omiyo inyalo dhi kamoro amora mihero.”" 
Jeremiah40:5 Jeremia ne ok dwar dhi Babulon, omiyo Nebuzaradan nowachone niya, “Dogi ir Gedalia wuod Ahikam ma nyakwar Shafan, ma ruodh Babulon oseketo jatend miech Juda. Inyalo bet kode mondo idag gi jou, kata inyalo dhi kamoro amora mihero.” Bang’ mano, nomiyo Jeremia chiwo kod chiemo, mi oweye odhi." 
Jeremiah40:6 Kamano Jeremia nodhi Mizpa, mobet gi Gedalia, kaachiel gi joma noyudo odong’ piny Juda." 
Jeremiah40:7 Noyudo jotend lweny moko ma jo-Juda, kod jolwenjgi pok ochiwore e lwet jo-Babulon. Ne giwinjo ni ruodh Babulon oseketo Gedalia wuod Ahikama jatend piny Juda, mondo orit ji duto mane oter e tuech Babulon. Mago ne joma odhierie moloyo e piny Juda." 
Jeremiah40:8 Omiyo Ishmael wuod Nethania gi Johanan wuod Karea gi Seraya wuod Tanhumeth kod yawuot Efai ja-Netofa gi Jezania ja-Makath ne jokawo jogi modhigo Mizpa ir Gedalia. 
Jeremiah40:9 Eka Gedalia nowachonigi niya, “Awachonu adier ni ok onego uluor chiworu e lwet jo-Babulon. Daguru adaga e pinyni mondo uti ni ruodh Babulon, to ubiro dhi nyime maber." 
Jeremiah40:10 An abiro dak Mizpa, kendo anabed jaoteu ka jo-Babulon obiro ka. To unyalo choko divai gi olemo kod mor zeituni mondo ukan, kendo udag e mier ma usekawo.”" 
Jeremiah40:11 E kindeno jo-Yahudi duto mane ni e piny Moab gi piny Amon gi piny Edom kod pinje mamoko nowinjo ni ruodh Babulon oseyie ni jo-Yahudi moko mondo odag adaga e piny Juda. Bende ne giwinjo ni oseketo Gedalia mondo obed jatendgi. 
Jeremiah40:12 Mano omiyo jo-Yahudi noa kuonde duto mane oseketgie, mi giduogo e piny Juda. Ne gidhi Mizpa ir Gedalia, kendo ne gichoko divai kod olemo mogundho." 
Jeremiah40:13 Bang’e Johanan wuod Karea kod jotend lweny mane pok ochiwore e lwet ruodh Babulon nobiro Mizpa ir Gedalia," 
Jeremiah40:14 mi giwachone niya, “Donge ing’eyo ni Balis ruodh jo-Amon oseoro Ishmael wuod Nethania mondo obi onegi?” To kata kamano, Gedalia ne ok nyal yie wachno." 
Jeremiah40:15 Eka Johanan nowachone ling’ling’ niya, “We mondo adhi aneg Ishmael, kendo onge ng’ama biro ng’eyo ni an ema anege. Ere gima omiyo diwe mondo onegi, to mano nyalo miyo jo-Yahudi duto moseduogo iri ke, mi ji duto modong’ e Juda rum?”" 
Jeremiah40:16 To Gedalia nodwoke niya, “Kik itim kamano, nikech gima uwacho kuom Ishmael en mana miriambo.”" 
Jeremiah41:1 E due mar abiriyo, Ishmael wuod Nethania ma nyakwar Elishama ma anywola joka ruoth, nobiro Mizpa gi ji apar mondo oneg Gedalia wuod Ahikam. Kane oyudo gichiemo kode kuno." 
Jeremiah41:2 Ishmael gi joge apargo noa malo monego Gedalia mane ruodh Babulon oseketo mondo obed jatend piny Juda. 
Jeremiah41:3 Bende ne ginego jo-Yahudi duto mane ni Mizpa gi Gedalia, kaachiel gi jolweny mag jo-Babulon mane oyudo ni kuno." 
Jeremiah41:4 Kinyne, kane pok ji ong’eyo ni Gedalia osenegi," 
Jeremiah41:5 ji piero aboro nobiro koa Shekem gi Shilo kod Samaria. Ne oyudo giselielo tikgi, mi giyiecho lepgi, kendo gisaro dendgi, bende ne giting’o cham gi ubani mondo gichiw e Hekalu." 
Jeremiah41:6 Ishmael noa Mizpa modhi romonigi kaywak. Kane ochopo irgi. Nowacho nigi niya, “Biuru mondo une Gedalia.”" 
Jeremiah41:7 To gikanyono mane gichopo e chuny Mizpa, Ishmael gi joge nonegogi, mowito ringregi e bur." 
Jeremiah41:8 To ji apar kuom jogo nosayo Ishmael, kawachone niya, “Kiyie to kik inegwa! Wan gi cham gi mor zeituni kod mor kich mwasepando e bungu.” Omiyo noweyogi, mi ok onegogi kaka ne onego jowadgi mamoko." 
Jeremiah41:9 Bur mane Ishmael owitoe joma ne onegogo ne bur maduong’. Ruoth Asa ema nosekunyo burno mondo okanie pi ndalo mane Baasha ruodh Israel dwaro monje. Koro Ishmael nopong’o burno gi ringre ji mane onego. 
Jeremiah41:10 Bang’e ne okawo nyi ruoth kaachiel gi ji mamoko duto man Mizpa mane Nebuzaradan jatend lweny maduong’ oseketo e bwo Gedalia. Kane osemakogi kamano, nochako wuoth kochomo yo piny Amon." 
Jeremiah41:11 Johanan wuod Karea kaachiel gi jotend lweny duto mane en-go ne jowinjo gima rach mane Ishmael osetimono. 
Jeremiah41:12 Omiyo ne gikawo jogi, mi gidhi kedo kode. Ne gijuke but yawo maduong’ man Gibeon," 
Jeremiah41:13 Kendo kane joma Ishmael tero e tuech oneno Johanan kod jotend lweny, ne gidoko mamor," 
Jeremiah41:14 mi giringo gidok ni Johanan. 
Jeremiah41:15 To Ishmael kod joge moko aboro notony e lwet Johanan, moringo odhi e piny Amon." 
Jeremiah41:16 Bang’e Johanan kod jotend lweny mane ni kode ne jokawo joma ne Ishmael wuod Nathania omako Mizpa, kane osenego Gedalia wuod Ahikam. Ne gin chwo gi mon kod nyithindo, kaachiel gi jotich mabuoch mane Johanan oreso Gibeon." 
Jeremiah41:17 Ne gia Gibeon, mi gibuoro Gerush-kimham but Jerusalem, ka gidhi e piny Misri" 
Jeremiah41:18 mondo gitony gia e lwet jo-Babulon. Ne giluoro jo-Babulon nikech Ishmael ne osenego Gedalia, mane ruodh Babulon oketo jatend piny Juda." 
Jeremiah42:1 Jotend lweny duto kaka Johanan wuod Karea gi Azaria wuod Hoshaya kod ji mamoko duto te nobiro ir Jeremia janabi," 
Jeremiah42:2 mowachone niya, “Kiyie to timnwa gima wakwayi. Yie ilamnwa Ruoth Nyasachwa, wan ji duto modong’. Chon ne wan ji mathoth, to koro neye kaka wadong’ mana manok kende." 
Jeremiah42:3 Lemnwa mondo Ruoth Nyasachi onyiswa yo ma onego waluw, kendo gima onego watim.”" 
Jeremiah42:4 Jeremia nodwokogi niya, “Kara mano ber, abiro lamo Ruoth Nyasachwa mana kaka usekwaya, kendo gimoro amora mowachona, to abiro nyisou. Ok napandu wach moro amora kata achiel.”" 
Jeremiah42:5 Eka ne giwachone niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachwa mondo obed janeno makare kendo maradiera ka ok warito chik duto ma omiyi mondo watigo. Wakuong’ore ni wabiro timo gimoro amora ma Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachi owachoni mondo inyiswa," 
Jeremiah42:6 bed ni en wach maber kata marach. Wabiro winjo gima Ruoth Nyasaye ma waori ire owacho, nimar mano ema dimi wadhi nyime maber.”" 
Jeremiah42:7 Bang’ ndalo apar, Ruoth Nyasaye nowuoyo gi Jeremia," 
Jeremiah42:8 mi Jeremia noluongo Johanan wuod Karea kod jotend lweny duto mane ni kode, kaachiel gi ji duto te." 
Jeremiah42:9 Nowachonigi niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel, mane uora ire mondo apenjnu wach, owacho kama:" 
Jeremiah42:10 ‘Ka uyie dhi nyime gi dak e pinyni, to abiro gerou, kendo ok abi kethou. Bende abiro pidhou ka ng’ama pidho yien, kendo ok napudhu. Asebedo ka akuyo nikech masira mane akelo kuomu." 
Jeremiah42:11 Weuru luoro ruodh Babulon, nikech an kodu, kendo abiro konyou, mi aresu ua e tekone. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano." 
Jeremiah42:12 Abiro kechou, kendo en bende abiro miyo okechu, mi owe udag e pinyu ka.’ ”" 
Jeremiah42:13 Jeremia nomedo wachonigi niya, “Un joma odong’ e piny Juda, kik udagi winjo wach Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu, mi utamru dak e pinyni." 
Jeremiah42:14 Bende kik uwach ni, ‘Ooyo, wabiro dhi mondo wadag e piny Misri, kuma ok wanyal chako nenoe lweny, kata winjoe tung’ ma luongowa mondo wadhi e lweny kata bedo kech.’" 
Jeremiah42:15 Ka uwacho kamano to Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto kendo ma Nyasach Israel wacho niya, ‘Ka uramo ni nyaka udhi udag e piny Misri," 
Jeremiah42:16 to lweny ma uluorono biro jukou, kendo kech ma uparono bende biro luwou, mi utho e piny Misri kuno." 
Jeremiah42:17 Jogo duto ma oramo ni nyaka dhi dag e piny Misri, lweny kata kech kata tuoche biro nego. Onge kata ng’at achiel kuomgi ma nokwo. Ooyo, onge achiel ma notony kuom masira ma abiro kelo kuomgi.’" 
Jeremiah42:18 “Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel wacho niya, ‘Kapo ni udhi e piny Misri, to abiro olo mirimba kuomu, mana kaka ne aolo mirimba kuom jo-Jerusalem. Unulokru gima bwogo ji, kendo ji nobed kajarou, mi giluong nyingu ka gima okuong’. Bende ok nuchak une kaeri kendo.’ ”" 
Jeremiah42:19 Eka Jeremia nodhi nyime kawacho niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye osenyisou un joma odong’ e piny Juda ni kik udhi e piny Misri. Kuom mano, koro asiemou ni," 
Jeremiah42:20 mano dibed ketho maduong’! Ne uora ir Ruoth Nyasachwa kuwachona niya, ‘Lamnwa Ruoth Nyasachwa, kendo inyiswa weche duto mowacho mondo watigo.’" 
Jeremiah42:21 To koro asenyisou gik moko duto, to udagi winjo weche ma Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachwa oseora mondo awachnu." 
Jeremiah42:22 Kuom mano nyaka ung’e ni lweny kata kech kata tuoche biro negou e piny ma udwaro dhi dakieno!” 
Jeremiah43:1 Kane Jeremia osetieko nyiso ji weche duto mane Ruoth Nyasaye oseoro mondo onyisgi," 
Jeremiah43:2 Azaria wuod Hoshaya kod Johanan wuod Karea, kaachiel gi ji mamoko duto ma wigi tek, ne jowacho ni Jeremia niya, “Iriambo! Ruoth Nyasachwa ok oseori mondo ikwerwa ni kik wadhi wadag Misri." 
Jeremiah43:3 To Baruk wuod Neria ema osethuwi kodwa mondo iketwa e lwet jo-Babulon, mondo onegwa, kata omakwa oterwa Babulon.”" 
Jeremiah43:4 Kamano Johanan gi jotend lweny kod ji duto notamore winjo chik Ruoth Nyasaye mondo odong’ e piny Juda. 
Jeremiah43:5 Omiyo Johanan kod jotend lweny nokawo ji duto mane odong’ Juda, mi gidhigo Misri kaachiel gi ju duto mane oseduogo mondo odag e piny Juda koa e pinje mane oyudo osekegie." 
Jeremiah43:6 Ne gin chwo gi mon gi nyithindo koda ka nyi ruoth. Ne okawo ng’ato ang’ata mane Nebuzaradan ma jatend lweny maduong’ oseweyo e lwet Gedalia mondo oriti. Jeremia gi Baruk bende ne gidhigo. 
Jeremiah43:7 Ne gitamore winjo chik Ruoth Nyasaye, mi giduto gidhi Tapanhes e piny Misri." 
Jeremiah43:8 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Jeremia ka en Tapanhes niya," 
Jeremiah43:9 “Kaw kite moko madongo mondo ikuny e nyim dhoranga dala ruoth, ka jo-Juda moko neno." 
Jeremiah43:10 Bang’e inyisgi ni Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto kendo ma Nyasach Israel owacho kama: ‘Abiro luongo Nebukadnezar ruodh Babulon ma jatichna, kendo obiro keto kom lochne ewi kite ma aseketo ka eri, mi ogur hembe e wigi." 
Jeremiah43:11 Adier, enobi, mi olo piny Misri. Joma oket ni mondo tuoche oneg, tuoche biro nego, kendo joma oket ni itero e tuech, noter e tuech, bende joma oket ni tho e lweny, biro tho e lweny!" 
Jeremiah43:12 Anami owang’ hekalu mag nyiseche jo-Misri, kendo nokaw nyisechegi mi oter e tuech. Obiro manyo piny Misri, mi oyaki, kendo dong’ nono, mana kaka jakwath dondo nyuogo e lepe, mi dong’ nono. Bang’e noa Misri kosetieko timo gik moko duto modwaro timo." 
Jeremiah43:13 Obiro turo sirni milamo man Heliopolis e piny Misri, kendo obiro wang’o hekalu mag nyiseche jo-Misri.’ ”" 
Jeremiah44:1 Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko duto kendo ma Nyasach Israel nowuoyo ni Jeremia kuom jo-Yahudi mane oyudo odak e miech Misri ma Migdol gi Tapanhes kod Memfis, kendo e gweng’ milambo mar pinyno, kowacho niya," 
Jeremiah44:2 “Un uwegi useneno masira mane akelo kuom Jerusalem gi mier mamoko mag Juda. Bende kata sani pod gikethore, ma onge ng’ama odakie." 
Jeremiah44:3 Ne atimo kamano nikech joma ne odak kuondego ne otimo timbe maricho ka gimiyago mirima. Ne gilamo nyiseche mamoko, ma gin kata un kata mana kwereu ne pok olamo, mi gitimonigi misengni." 
Jeremiah44:4 Ne asiko ka aoronu jotichna ma jonabi mondo okweru kik utim gik makuero ma amon-gogo," 
Jeremiah44:5 to ne udagi winjo, kata dewo ne ok udewo. Bende ne utamoru weyo tim marach mar timo misengni ni nyiseche mamoko." 
Jeremiah44:6 Mano omiyo ne aolo mirimba mager e miech Juda kendo e yore mag Jerusalem, mi awang’ogi gi mach. Ne gidong’ ka gikethore maonge ng’ama dakie, kendo pod gisiko kamano nyaka chil kawuono." 
Jeremiah44:7 “Kuom mano an Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto koro apenjou ni, ere gima omiyo uhinyoru uwegi kutimo gima rach kamano? Koso udwaro kelo masira kuom chwo gi mon gi rawere kod nyithindo mayom, ma dimi jou duto rum?" 
Jeremiah44:8 To mano ema biro timore, kumedo miya mirima gi kido mag nyisecheu manono, kendo kuom timo misengni ni nyiseche mamoko e piny Misri, kama usebiro mondo udagieni. Koso utimo kamano mana ni mondo urum, kendo mondo ogendini duto mae piny ojaru, kendo oluong nyingu ka gima okuong’?" 
Jeremiah44:9 To bende wiu diwil gi gik maricho duto ma kwereu kaachiel gi ruodhi mag Juda gi mondgi kod un gi mondu usetimo e miech Juda kendo e yore mag Jerusalem adier? 
Jeremiah44:10 To pok uboloru kata mana nyaka chil kawuono, kendo ok useluora kata rito chikena gi buchena mane amiyou gi kwereu." 
Jeremiah44:11 “Kuom mano, an Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto, kendo ma Nyasach Israel abiro kelo masira kuomu, mi atiek jo-Juda pep." 
Jeremiah44:12 Kata mana jo-Juda modong’ moramo nyaka dhi dag e piny Misri, abiro tieko chuth. Lweny kata kech biro negogi duto e piny Misri. Ginilokre gima bwogo ji, mi ji nojargi, kendo noluong nyinggi ka gima okuong’." 
Jeremiah44:13 Anakum joma odak Misri, mana kaka ne akumo jo-Jerusalem ka akelonigi lweny gi kech kod tuoche." 
Jeremiah44:14 Onge kata ng’at achiel kuom jo-Juda mane odong’ mi tony. Bende onge kata ng’at achiel kuomgi ma nodong’ e piny Juda kuma gigombo mondo gidagie kendo. Onge ng’ama nodogi, mak mana ji moko manok moringo lweny.”" 
Jeremiah44:15 Bang’ wechego, ji duto mane ong’eyo ni mondgi timo misengni ni nyiseche mamoko, kaachiel gi mon mane oyudo ochung’ kanyo, kod jo-Juda mane oyudo odak e gweng’ Misri ma milambo, duto oganda maduong’ koriwore, nowacho ni Jeremia niya," 
Jeremiah44:16 “Wadagi winjo gima isewachonwa e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye. 
Jeremiah44:17 Wabiro timo gik moko duto ma wasesingore ni watimo. Wabiro timo misengni ni nyasaye madhako miluongo ni Ruodh Polo, kendo wabiro chiwone misengni miolo piny, mana kaka wan gi kwerewa gi ruodhwa kod jotendwa ne watimo e miech Juda kendo e yore mag Jerusalem. E ndalono ne wan gi chiemo mogundho, kendo ne wadhi nyime maber maonge chandruok moro." 
Jeremiah44:18 To nyaka ne wawe timo misengni ni ruoth madhako mar polo, kendo wawe chiwone misengni miolo piny, wasebet modhier maonge gimoro, kendo lweny gi kech osenego jowa.”" 
Jeremiah44:19 Eka mon bende nowacho niya, “Kane waloso kek e kido machal gi ruoth madhako mar polo, kendo wachiwone misengni miolo piny, to chwowa ne oyie gi gima ne watimono.”" 
Jeremiah44:20 Bang’e Jeremia nowacho ni ji duto ma chwo gi mamon mane osedwoke kamano niya," 
Jeremiah44:21 “Uparo ni Ruoth Nyasaye ne ok ong’eyo wach misengni ma un gi kwereu kod ruodhiu gi jotendu kaachiel gi jopinyu duto ne utimo e miech Juda kendo e yore mag Jerusalem? Koso uparo ni wiye osewil kodgi? 
Jeremiah44:22 Kata mana sani, pinyu okethore maonge ng’ama odakie. Oselokore gima bwogo ji, kendo giluongo nyinge ka gima okuong’, nikech Ruoth Nyasaye ne ok nyal weyo mak okumou kuom timbeu maricho." 
Jeremiah44:23 Masirano nobiro kuomu kaka uneno kawuononi nimar ne utimo misengni ni nyiseche mamoko, mi utimo timbe maricho e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye. Ne ok uwinje, kata puonjne bende ne ok uluwo.”" 
Jeremiah44:24 Jeremia nochako onyiso ji duto, kaachiel gi mon niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko duto, kendo ma Nyasach Israel owacho ni jo-Juda modak Misri kama:" 
Jeremiah44:25 ‘Un kaachiel gi mondu, usetimo singruok ni ruoth madhako mar polo. To mano ber! Chopuru achopa singruokugo, kendo timuru atima gik ma usekuong’oru ni ubiro timo!" 
Jeremiah44:26 To koro winjuru singruok ma an Ruoth Nyasaye asetimo e nyinga maduong’ ni jo-Juda duto modak Misri: Ok nachak ayie mondo ng’ato ang’ata kuomu oluong nyinga ka wacho niya, “Akuong’ora e nying Ruoth Nyasaye mangima.”" 
Jeremiah44:27 Abiro neno ni ok gidhi nyime maber, to anang’igi gi wang’ marach. Un jo-Juda duto modak e piny Misri, lweny kata tuoche biro negou nyaka urum pep, maonge kata ng’at achiel modong’." 
Jeremiah44:28 To ji manok kuomu notony e tho, mi dog Juda koa Misri. Bang’e jo-Juda modong’ kuom mago mane obiro Misri nong’e ka wechena kata wechegi ema oselokore adiera." 
Jeremiah44:29 An Ruoth Nyasaye namiu ranyisi," 
Jeremiah44:30 kaketo Farao Hofra ma ruodh Misri e lwet wasike madwaro nege, mana kaka naketo Zedekia ruodh Juda e lwet Nebukadnezar ruodh Babulon mane jasike, kendo mane dwaro nege. Anamiu ranyisino mondo ung’e ni nakumu kaeri, kendo ni anakel masira kuomu kaka ne asesingora.’ ”" 
Jeremiah45:1 E higa mar ang’wen mar loch Jehoyakim wuod Josia ruodh Juda, Baruk wuod Neria nondiko weche mane Jeremia owachone. Bang’e Jeremia janabi nonyiso" 
Jeremiah45:2 Baruk niya, “Weche ma Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel owacho kuomi e magi:" 
Jeremiah45:3 ‘In iwacho ni tinde iol, nikech Ruoth Nyasaye osemedoni mana kuyo kuom thagruok ma in go. Bende iwacho ni iseywak miol, to ok iseyudo kue ngang’.’" 
Jeremiah45:4 Kuom mano, Ruoth Nyasaye owacho mondo anyisi kama: ‘Abiro muko gik moko duto ma asegero, kendo pudho gik ma asepidho. Abiro timo kamano e piny ngima." 
Jeremiah45:5 Idwaro mondo iyud gik ma dongo dongo, to onego iwe dwarogi, nimar abiro kelo masira ni ji duto e piny. In to, initony kamoro amora midhiye, to ngimani kende ema niresi.’ ”" 
Jeremiah46:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nowuoyo gi Jeremia kuom ogendini mamoko ma jo-Israel. 
Jeremiah46:2 Noloso kuom Misri, kowuoyo kuom jolweny mag Farao Neko ruodh Misri mane Nebukadnezar ruodh Babulon oloyo Karkemish but aora Yufrate e higa mar ang’wen mar loch Jehoyakim wuod Josia ruodh Juda. Weche gogo e mago:" 
Jeremiah46:3 Jotend jolwenj Misri kok niya, “Ikreuru gi okumbni kod kuodi mondo udhi e lweny!" 
Jeremiah46:4 Gawuru fareseu mondo udhi! Rieduru ni lweny, kusidho kondeu! Piaguru tongeu, kendo manreuru gi giu mag lweny.”" 
Jeremiah46:5 To Ruoth Nyasaye penjo niya, “Koro ang’o ma aneno ka timoreni? Gigore nyang’eng’o. Thuondi oselo, omiyo luoro ohewogi, kendo giringo matek ma ok gigo machiemo." 
Jeremiah46:6 Jong’uech ok nyal tony. Gichwanyore kendo gipodho yo nyandwat but aora Yufrate.” 
Jeremiah46:7 En ng’a ma gingore ka aora Naelni, kendo ka aora ma mwomo gengeni?" 
Jeremiah46:8 Gin jo-Misri ema gingore ka Nael, kendo ka aora ma mwomo genge! Misri wacho niya, “Abiro gingora mi apong’ piny, kendo aketh mier gi ji modakie.”" 
Jeremiah46:9 “Chikuru farese mondo odhi, kendo geche mag lweny ochak ng’wech! Raduru gi wasigu un thuondi mag Ethiopia gi mag Put moting’o okumbni, kod un jo asere molony moa e piny Lud." 
Jeremiah46:10 Kawuono en chieng’ Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto. En chieng’ mochuloe kuor ni wasike. Ligangla biro chamogi mi yieng’, kendo madh rembgi mi mer, nimar kawuono Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto, timo misango yo nyandwat but aora Yufrate." 
Jeremiah46:11 “Un jo Misri, dhiuru e piny Gilead umanyie yath. Yedheu duto ok kony gimoro. Onge gima nyalo thiedhou." 
Jeremiah46:12 Ogendini osewinjo ni wiu okuot, kendo ywaku opong’o piny. Jolweny gangore kuom jowetegi, kendo giruombore piny giduto.”" 
Jeremiah46:13 E ndalo mane Nebukadnezar ruodh Babulon biro mondo omonj Misri, Ruoth Nyasaye nowuoyo gi Jeremia niya," 
Jeremiah46:14 “Landuru wach e miech Misri ma Migdol gi Memfis kod Tapanhes, mondo giikre gisir wasikgi, nimar lweny oseketho kuonde machiegni kodu." 
Jeremiah46:15 Ere gimomiyo Nyasachu maratego miluongo ni Apis opodho? Ruoth Nyasaye ema osegoye mopodho! 
Jeremiah46:16 Jolwenju osechwanyore mopodho, kendo moro ka moro wacho ni wadgi niya, ‘Reti wadog dala ir jowa, mondo kik watho e lwet wasigu.’" 
Jeremiah46:17 Chakuru Farao ruodh Misri nying manyien ni, ‘Ruodh Sunga,’ nikech en ng’at mane thuolo momiye obayo." 
Jeremiah46:18 “An Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto, an ruoth. Akuong’ora gi nyinga awuon ni, kaka got Tabor duong’ moloyo gode moko duto kendo kaka got Karmel man but nam bende duong, e kaka teko ng’at mabiro monjou nobed maduong’." 
Jeremiah46:19 “Un jo-Misri, ikreuru mondo oteru e tuech! Memfis ibiro loko gunda, mi nobed thim ma onge ng’ama odakie." 
Jeremiah46:20 Piny Misri chal gi roya buong’, ma kich moa yo nyandwat okayo." 
Jeremiah46:21 Jolweny ma jo Misri ondiko, bende omemore mana ka nyiroye mitueyo dala. Ne ok ginyono piny mondo gikedi, to giduto ne giwichore mi giringo, nikech ndalo ming’adonigie bura nosechopo, momiyo masira omakogi." 
Jeremiah46:22 Jo-Misri ringo dhi kaywak ka thuol, nikech wasigu biro gi tekregi duto. Gimonjogi gi ledhi mana ka joma dwaro tong’o yien," 
Jeremiah46:23 kendo gibeto bung Misri. Jolwenjgi ng’eny mokadho akwana, kendo thoth mohewo bonyo." 
Jeremiah46:24 Oganda moa yo nyandwat oseloyo jo-Misri, mi wigi okuot. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano.”" 
Jeremiah46:25 Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto kendo ma Nyasach Israel wacho niya, “Abiro kumo Amon nyasach Thebes, kaachiel gi jo-Misri kod nyisechegi mamoko kod ruodhigi. Bende abiro kumo Farao gi ji duto mogeno kuome," 
Jeremiah46:26 kachiwogi e lwet Nebukadnezar ruodh Babulon gi joge mag lweny ma dwaro negogi. To achien ji nodag e piny Misri kendo, kaka ne gisedak e kinde mokadho. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano." 
Jeremiah46:27 “To un nyikwa Jakobo jatichna, kik ubed maluor. Ee, un jo-Israel kik chunyu parre, nikech abiro resou mi agolu e piny mabor kuma otueueno. Ubiro duogo mi udag gi kue, maonge gima thagou, kendo ng’ato ok nobuogu." 
Jeremiah46:28 Kik uluor, nikech an kodu. Abiro tieko ogendini duto kuonde duto ma asekeyoue, to un ok natieku. To kata kamano, abiro kumou moromo gi timbeu. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano.”" 
Jeremiah47:1 Kane pok Farao omonjo Gaza, Ruoth Nyasaye nowuoyo gi Jeremia kuom jo-Filistia niya," 
Jeremiah47:2 “Neye kaka pi gingore koa yo nyandwat! Obiro bubni ka aora ma mwomo genge, kendo obiro imo piny duto kod gimoro amora mantie, kaka mier kod joma odakie. Ji biro goyo nduru mondo okonygi, kendo ng’ato ka ng’ato manie piny noywag malit." 
Jeremiah47:3 Giniwinj tiend farese ka diko, gi geche maringo, kod tiend geche ka mutni. Wuone nyithindo ok nodog chien mondo oom nyithindgi, to ginibed maluor maonge gi teko," 
Jeremiah47:4 nikech kinde osechopo mikethoe piny Filistia. Kamano konyruok ma jo-Turo gi jo-Sidon geno yudo kuom Filistia norum pep, nimar an Ruoth Nyasaye abiro ketho jo-Filistia duto mane oa e dho nembe mag Kaftor." 
Jeremiah47:5 Jo-Gaza oseliel wigi, ka nyiso ni gin gi kuyo maduong’, kendo jo-Ashkelon oling’ thi. Jo-Filistia modong’ noywag nyaka karang’o?" 
Jeremiah47:6 Giywak niya, ‘Yaye! Ligangla mar Ruoth Nyasaye biro chadho ji nyaka karang’o? Onego odog e olalo mondo oyue kanyo!’" 
Jeremiah47:7 To doyue nadi, to asemiye tich mondo oti? Asechike mondo omonj Ashkelon kaachiel gi joma odak e dhonam.”" 
Jeremiah48:1 Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto kendo ma Nyasach Israel nowuoyo kuom jo-Moab kama: “Ywaguru jo-Nebo, nimar dalagi okethi! Kiriathaim osekaw, mi omuk kama ochiel motegno manie dalano. Joma odak kuno wigi okuot," 
Jeremiah48:2 kendo duong’ mar piny Moab oselal. Wasigu ikore Heshbon mondo otiek oganda jo-Moab. Dala mar Dibon biro ling’ thi ka oganda mar lweny omonje. 
Jeremiah48:3 Jo-Horanaim goyo koko ka wacho niya, ‘Masira! Warumo!’" 
Jeremiah48:4 Piny Moab osekethi! Winjuru nyithindo ka ywak. 
Jeremiah48:5 Winjuru ywak joma oruwo e yo nyaka chop Luhith. Ywak bende winjore e yo malor Horanaim. 
Jeremiah48:6 Un jo-Moab, ringuru piyo ures ngimau! Ringuru mana ka ayuer ma seso e bungu." 
Jeremiah48:7 Ne ugeno kuom tekou gi mwanduu, to koro ibiro mako koda ka un, kendo Kemosh nyasachu ibiro ter e tuech, kaachiel gi jodonge kod jodolo mage." 
Jeremiah48:8 Onge dala kata achiel ma notony mak okethi, kendo holo gi pap duto noyaki, mi kethi. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano." 
Jeremiah48:9 Chunguru kidi mar liel, upargo piny Moab, nimar ibiro kethe piyopiyo, kendo mier mage biro dong’ gundni ma onge ng’ama odakie.”" 
Jeremiah48:10 (Okuong’ ng’at ma ok otiyo tich Ruoth Nyasaye gi chunye duto! Bende okuong’ ng’at ma ok oneko gi liganglane.) 
Jeremiah48:11 Ruoth Nyasaye wacho niya, “Pile jo-Moab osebet kodak gi kue, kendo ok osedargi, kiterogi e tuech, gichalo gi divai mowe mondo okue e agulu achiel, ma ok olok e agulini mamoko. Ndhath divai mowe kamano ok kethre, to osiko asika ka omit." 
Jeremiah48:12 Kuom mano ndalo biro ma naorie ji mondo ool jo-Moab oko, kendo okethgi, ka ng’ama puko divai oko, kendo toyo aguch divaino matindo tindo." 
Jeremiah48:13 Bang’e jo-Moab noyud ni Kemosh nyasachgi ok nyal konyogi, mana kaka jo-Israel noyudo ni Bethel ma nyasachgi mane gigeno kuome ne ok nyal konyogi." 
Jeremiah48:14 “Un jo-Moab, ere gimomiyo uketoru ni un thuondi mosekedo e lwenje mager?" 
Jeremiah48:15 To piny Moab gi mier mage osekethi, kendo thuondi mage osenegi! An Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto ema awacho kamano." 
Jeremiah48:16 Piny Moab chiegni rumo, kendo ibiro kethe mapiyopiyo." 
Jeremiah48:17 Un joma odak machiegni kode, kendo un ji duto mong’eyo humbe, ywageuru kuwacho niya, ‘Lochne maratego osekethi, kendo humbe gi duong’ne oserumo.’" 
Jeremiah48:18 To un joma odak Dibon, weuru duong ma un-go, mondo ubed piny e buru, nikech jaketh Moab osebiro kuomu, kendo oketho kuondeu mochiel motegno." 
Jeremiah48:19 Un joma odak Aroer, chung’uru e dir yo kung’icho mondo upenj joma ringo gima osetimore." 
Jeremiah48:20 Ginidwoku niya, “Piny Moab oserumo! Ywageuru, nikech oseyudo wichkuot. Gouru milome e bath aora Arnon ni Moab osekethi." 
Jeremiah48:21 “Oseng’ad bura ni mier mae pap kaka Holon gi Jaza gi Mefath 
Jeremiah48:22 gi Dibona gi Nebo gi Beth-diblathaim 
Jeremiah48:23 gi Kiriathaim gi Bethgamul gi Bethmeon 
Jeremiah48:24 gi Kerioth kod Bozra. Ee, bura oseloyo miech Moab duto, man mabor koda man machiegni." 
Jeremiah48:25 Duong’ mar Moab oseng’iny matinditindo, kendo tekone osekethi. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano." 
Jeremiah48:26 “Miuru jo-Moab kong’o mondo omer, nikech gisedagi winjo chikna, an Ruoth Nyasaye. Gibiro ng’ielore e ng’okgi giwegi, kendo ji biro nyierogi." 
Jeremiah48:27 Un jo-Moab, parieuru kaka ne unyiero jo-Israel! Ne ucharogi mana ka gima gin joma osemaki kaachiel gi jomecho." 
Jeremiah48:28 Koro un jo-Moab, ayeuru e miechu udhi udag e gode maboyo, mondo uchal gi akuru mogero ode e bath lwanda marabora morokore." 
Jeremiah48:29 Jo-Moab gin josunga! Asewinjo kaka gisungore kendo gipakore ka gijaro ji, kendo giparo ni gin kende ema giloyo ji moko duto." 
Jeremiah48:30 An Ruoth Nyasaye ang’eyo kaka gisungore, to sungagino onge tiende, kendo gik moko duto ma gitimo biro rumo." 
Jeremiah48:31 Mano emomiyo abiro ywago jo-Moab duto kod jo-Kirheres. 
Jeremiah48:32 Abiro ywago jo-Sibma moloyo kaka ne aywago jo-Jazer. A yaye, dala mar Sibma, ichalo gi yiend mzabibu ma bedene oyarore nyaka Nam Kado, mi ochweyo nyaka Jazer. To koro olembeni gi divai mari osekethi!" 
Jeremiah48:33 Mor gi ilo osegol e piny Moab momewni. Divai tinde ok mol kuonde bicho, kendo onge joma odong’ ma dikog gi mor ka loso divai." 
Jeremiah48:34 “Jo-Heshbon gi jo-Eleale ywak, kendo ywakgi winjore nyaka Jahaz, jo-Zoar bende winje, kendo owinjore nyaka Horonaim gi Elgath-shelishya, nikech pige mag Nimrim oseduono." 
Jeremiah48:35 Abiro tamo jo-Moab mondo kik tim ni nyisechegi misengni miwang’o pep kod misengni mamoko kuonde moting’ore. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho. 
Jeremiah48:36 “Kamano chunya ywago jo-Moab kod jo-Kirheres mana ka ng’ama goyo tung’ e liel, nikech mwandugi duto oselal." 
Jeremiah48:37 Ng’ato ka ng’ato osepwodho wiye, kendo olielo tike. Giduto gisaro luetegi, kendo girwako piende gugru." 
Jeremiah48:38 Ji ywak ewi udi duto kendo e wang’ yore mag Moab nimar aseketho piny Moab, mana ka ng’ama nego agulu ma onge tich. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho." 
Jeremiah48:39 Oseketh Moab. Yaye, ywaguru, nimar Moab oseyudo wichkuot. Osekethore chuth, molokore gima bwogo ji, kendo ogendini modak machiegni nyierogo." 
Jeremiah48:40 “An Ruoth Nyasaye asesingora ni oganda moro biro podho kuom jo-Moab mana kaka achuth podho kuom gima otho, koyaro buombene." 
Jeremiah48:41 Miechgi gi kuondegi mochiel motegno ibiro kawo. Chieng’no jolweny mag Moab nobed gi kihondko mana ka dhako ma muoch kayo. 
Jeremiah48:42 Jo-Moab ibiro tieko chuth, mi ok ginichak gibed oganda kendo, nikech ne gitamore winjo chikna." 
Jeremiah48:43 Masiche gi bugni kod obadho ema ochomogi. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano. 
Jeremiah48:44 Ng’ato ang’ata ma temo tony e masira biro nyumore e bugo, to ng’ama owuok e bugo, obadho biro mako, Mago duto biro timore ni jo-Moab chieng’ ma akumogie." 
Jeremiah48:45 Joma ringo, ma ok nyal yudo konyruok, temo mondo opondi e dala mar Heshbon ma chon ruoth Sihon nodakie, to gibiro yudo ni dalano osemokie mach. Mach osewang’o tong’ piny kod wi gode mag jo-Moab mohero lwenygi." 
Jeremiah48:46 Ywaguru jo-Moab! Joma ne lamo Kemosh koro osetieki, kendo yawuotgi gi nyigi osemak moter e tuech." 
Jeremiah48:47 To e ndalo ma biro anami jo-Moab dhi nyime maber kendo.” Mano e bura ma Ruoth Nyasaye oseng’ado ni jo-Moab. 
Jeremiah49:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nowuoyo kuom jo-Amon niya, “Jo-Israel ni kanye? Donge nitie ng’ato manyalo reso lopgi? Ang’o momiyo giseweyo jo-Amon malamo Milkomgi okawo piny jo-Gad mi odakie?" 
Jeremiah49:2 Onge wach! To kata kamano, ndalo biro ma anami joma odak e dala mar Raba winj mahu mar lweny. Dala maduong’ mar jo-Amonno nodong’ gunda, kendo mier matindo tindo mokiewo kode nowang’ chuth. Bang’e jo-Israel nochak okaw pinygi kuom joma nomayogigo. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano." 
Jeremiah49:3 Un jo-Heshbon, ywaguru, nikech dalau osekethi! Un mond Raba denguru kendo urwak piende gugru, mi uring koni gi koni, nimar Milkom nyasachu ibiro kaw mi ter e tuech, kaachiel gi jodolo mage kod jodonge." 
Jeremiah49:4 Ere gima omiyo usungoru, un joma andhokegi, to tekou orumo? Ang’o momiyo uparo ni un rateke, kendo ni onge ng’ama dihedhre monjou?" 
Jeremiah49:5 Abiro kelonu masiche moa koni gi koni kendo uduto ubiro ringo. Ng’ato ka ng’ato noring mondo ores ngimane, kendo onge ng’ama nochak ochok jolweny mau kanyakla" 
Jeremiah49:6 To bang’e achien anami jo-Amon chak dhi nyime maber kendo.” 
Jeremiah49:7 Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto nowuoyo kuom jo-Edom kama: “Rieko tinde orumo e piny Edom koso? Donge jorieko maggi ng’adonigi rieko? Koso tinde riekogi olal? 
Jeremiah49:8 Jo-Dedan, wichreuru uringi, mondo utony kuonde maboyo, nimar abiro tieko nyikwa Esau, nikech kinde ma akumogie osechopo." 
Jeremiah49:9 Ka ji pono mzabibu, to donge giweyo moko? Koso ka jokuo obiro kwalo chambu gotieno, to donge gikawo mana ma gidwaro?" 
Jeremiah49:10 Un to aseyweyou oko gi yuech, kendo asefwenyo kuonde ma upondoe, mi koro onge kama unyalo resorue. Jo-Edom gi wedegi kod joma odak machiegni kodgi osetieki, kendo onge kata ng’at achiel modong’." 
Jeremiah49:11 Kuom mano onego uwena nyithindu makiye mondo ariti. Mondu mag liete nyalo konyore kuoma.” 
Jeremiah49:12 Ruoth Nyasaye wacho niya, “Ka ji mane ok owinjore kum, bende noyudo kum, koro un uparo ni dutony mak okumu? Ooyo, nyaka kumu!" 
Jeremiah49:13 An awuon asekuong’ora ni dala mar Bozra nobed gima bwogo ji, kendo nolokre thim ma ji nyiero, kendo noluong nyinge ka gima okuong’. Mier matindo mokiewo kode nobed kokethore nyaka chieng’! An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano.”" 
Jeremiah49:14 Jeremia nowacho niya, “Aseyudo wach moa kuom Ruoth Nyasaye ni oseoro jaote mondo onyis ogendini kama: ‘Chokuru ogendu mag lweny, kendo uikru monjo Edom.’" 
Jeremiah49:15 Un jo-Edom, Ruoth Nyasaye biro miyo ogandau dok manyap, kendo onge ng’ama biro miyou luor." 
Jeremiah49:16 Sunga ma un go osewuondou, to chutho onge ng’ama oluorou kaka uparono. Udak malo e lwendni morokore manie wi gode maboyo. To kata obedo ni udak malo mabor kaka ongo kamano, to Ruoth Nyasaye biro lorou piny. Ruoth Nyasaye ema owacho kamano.”" 
Jeremiah49:17 Ruoth Nyasaye wacho niya, “Masira malich biro mako jo-Edom, mi ng’ato ka ng’ato makadho machiegni, moneno gik moko duto mosetimore ni pinyno, nobwogi ka kihondko omako." 
Jeremiah49:18 Gima ne otimore ni Sodom gi Gomora kane okethogi kaachiel gi mier mokiewo kodgi, e gima biro timore ni piny Edom. Onge ng’ama nodag kuno, kata mana ma nobworie. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano." 
Jeremiah49:19 Anabi mana ka sibuor mochomo lek moloth, kowuok e bungu moyugno manie geng aora Jordan, kendo anami jo-Edom mwomre gi ng’uech kaa. Bang’e ng’at ma ayiero jatelo norit ogandano. “Ere ng’ama inyalo pimo koda? Koso ere ng’ama dihedhre piem koda? En ruoth mane ma dikwer wachna?" 
Jeremiah49:20 Omiyo winjuru gima asechano timo ni Edom kaachiel gi ji modak e dalagi mar Teman. Kata mana nyithindgi bende noywa oko, mi kibaji nogo ng’ato ka ng’ato." 
Jeremiah49:21 Ka olo Edom, to koko nogore matek mi piny noyiengni, kendo kokono nowinjre nyaka Nam Makwar." 
Jeremiah49:22 Wasigu nomonj Bozra mana ka achuth mopodho piny kuom gima otho, koa malo e kor polo ka buombene oyarore. Chieng’no jolweny mag Edom kihondko nomaki mana ka dhako ma muoch kayo.”" 
Jeremiah49:23 Ruoth Nyasaye nowuoyo kuom jo-Damaski niya, “Joma odak Hamath gi Arpad luoro omako, kendo chunygi chandore nikech gisewinjo wach marach. Chunygi ling’ore mana ka apaka mar Nam Makwar, kendo ok ginyal yudo yueyo." 
Jeremiah49:24 Jo-Damaski osedoko manyap, kendo gisewichore mondo giring ka kihondko omakogi. Piny ochamogi kendo giwinjo rem mana ka dhako ma muoch kayo." 
Jeremiah49:25 Dala marahuma mane mor chono, ji osedarie pep." 
Jeremiah49:26 Chieng’no yawuowi kod jolweny duto noneg e yore mag Damaski. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano. 
Jeremiah49:27 Anamok mach e ohinga mar Damaski, kendo nawang’ ut ruoth Beh-hadad pep.”" 
Jeremiah49:28 Ruoth Nyasaye nowuoyo kuom jo-Kedor kod ruodhi mag Hazor mane Nebukadnezar ruodh Babulon oloyo niya, “Dhiyouru umonj jo-Kedar ma jo-Arabu modak yo wuok chieng’, mi utieki." 
Jeremiah49:29 Yakuru hembegi kod jambgi kaachiel gi rageng’ni mag hembegi kod gimoro amora muyudo e hembego. Bende peuru ngamia maggi kendo unyisgi ni masira olworogi kuonde duto. 
Jeremiah49:30 “Un jo-Hazor to asiemou an Ruoth Nyasaye ni, ringuru udhi mabor, upondi, nimar Nebukadnezar ruodh Babulon osechano tiekou, kendo owacho niya," 
Jeremiah49:31 ‘Biuru mondo wamonj ji maparo ni odak gi kue, kendo onge gima nyalo timogi! Dhorangeyegi ni nono, kendo ok lor, bende ok riti.’ An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano." 
Jeremiah49:32 Yakuru ngamia maggi kod jambgi mogundhogo. Abiro keyo jo-Kedar ma timgi en tito yie wigi, kuonde duto, kendo abiro kelo kuomgi masira moa koni gi koni. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano." 
Jeremiah49:33 Hazor nolokre thim nyaka chieng’, kama ondiegi ema dakie. Onge ng’ama nodag kuno, kata mana ma nobuorie.”" 
Jeremiah49:34 Kane Zedekia osedoko ruodh Juda, Ruoth Nyasaye nowuoyo gi Jeremia janabi kuom piny Elam." 
Jeremiah49:35 Nowacho niya, “Abiro nego jo-asere duto mag Elam mosemiyo pinygi teko." 
Jeremiah49:36 Anami yamo moa kuonde duto kudh kochomo Elam, mi ake joma odak kuno kuonde duto. Onge piny moro ma joma ringo ok nochopie." 
Jeremiah49:37 Anami jo-Elam bed moluoro wasikgi ma dwaro negogi. Anatiekgi gi mirimba mager, kendo anaor ogendini mag lweny kuomgi nyaka chop girum chuth. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano." 
Jeremiah49:38 Anatiek ruodhi kod jotelo mag Elam, mi agur lochna kuno." 
Jeremiah49:39 To bang’e achien, anami jo-Elam chak dhi nyime maber. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano.”" 
Jeremiah50:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nowuoyo gi Jeremia janabi kuom piny Babulon niya," 
Jeremiah50:2 Huluru wach ni ogendini! Kik umung’gi, to gonigiuru milome! Chunguru bandera mondo ji ong’e ni Babulon osepodho. Marduk nyasache osemaki. Nyiseche mamoko mag Babulon oyudo wichkuot. Nyiseche makuerogo okethi." 
Jeremiah50:3 Oganda moa yo nyandwat osebiro monjo Babulon, kendo biro loke thim, mi ji kod jamni biro ringo, kendo onge ng’ama biro dakie." 
Jeremiah50:4 Ruoth Nyasaye wacho niya, “Ka kindeno ochopo, to jo-Israel gi jo-Juda nobi kanyakla, kaywak, kendo ka dwara, an Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachgi." 
Jeremiah50:5 Ginipenj yo madhi Sayun, kendo ginichik kuno. Bang’ mano ginitimna singruok mochwere ma wigi ok nowilgo ka gisingore ni ginibed joga." 
Jeremiah50:6 “Joga chalo gi rombe molal ma jokwadhgi owito e gode. Gisebayo ka rombe maa got moro kadhi e got machielo, kendo wigi osewil gi kuma dalagi nitie." 
Jeremiah50:7 Ji duto moyudogi monjogi. Wasikgi to wacho niya, ‘Ne gitimo timbe maricho e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, omiyo gima watimonigi ok rach. Kweregi nogeno kuom Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo gin bende nonego gisik ka gigeno kuome.’" 
Jeremiah50:8 “Un jo-Israel, ringuru ua Babulon! Ringuru ua e pinyno! Un ema ukuong wuok ka nyuogi ma telo ni kweth." 
Jeremiah50:9 Adhi jiwo ogendini moko marateke modak yo nyandwat mondo obi omonj Babulon. Gibiro riedo ni lweny mondo giked gi dalano mi gikaw. Giniba asere ka jodwar ma josaba ma gima gibayo ok leng’. 
Jeremiah50:10 Babulon ibiro yaki kendo joma yekogo biro kawo gimoro amora ma gidwaro. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano. 
Jeremiah50:11 “Un jo-Babulon ne uyako ogandana. To kata umor kendo uil ka nyaroya matugo e lek, kata ka faras manyiero," 
Jeremiah50:12 to dalau uwegi biro bedo gi wichkuot maduong’. Jo-Babulon nobed oganda matinie moloyo ogendini duto. Bende pinygi nolokre thim ma pi ongee," 
Jeremiah50:13 nikech asekume gi mirimba mager. Omiyo onge ng’at ma nodag Babulon, to enodong’ mana gunda. Ji duto mokadho kanyo nobed maluor, mi dhier nono kuom gima osetimorene." 
Jeremiah50:14 “Un jo-asere, rieduru ni lweny mondo uked gi Babulon ka ugoyone ageng’a. Chieluru Babulon gi asere, nikech osetimo timbe maricho e nyima, an Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Jeremiah50:15 Gouru sigich lweny e alwora mar dala koni gi koni, nimar jo-Babulon oseting’o badgi ni wasikgi! Ohingane osetuom momukore! An Ruoth Nyasaye koro achulo kuor ni jo-Babulon. Kuom mano, un bende chulnigiuru kuor, kendo utimnigi mana kaka ne gitimo ni ji mamoko." 
Jeremiah50:16 Neggiuru mondo chuoyo gi keyo kik bedie. Jopinje mamoko modak kanyo biro dok thuchegi, nikech lweny ger." 
Jeremiah50:17 “Jo-Israel chalo gi rombe ma sibuoche lawo kendo keyo. Mokwongo ruodh Asuria ema nomonjogi, mochamogi ka sibuor machamo le. Eka bang’e ruoth Nebukadnezar nobiro momuodo chokegi." 
Jeremiah50:18 Emomiyo an Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto, ma Nyasach Israel abiro kumo ruoth Nebukadnezar." 
Jeremiah50:19 Abiro dwoko jo-Israel e pinygi, mi ginichal rombe ma kwayo e lek maber, ka gichamo cham manyak e got Karmel kendo e piny Bashan, kendo ka gichamo gik manyak e piny Efraim gi piny Gilead, mi giyieng’." 
Jeremiah50:20 Ka kindeno ochopo, to onge richo ma noyud kuom jo-Israel kata kuom jo-Juda, nikech joma aweyo ka ngima, ema bende anawenigi richogi. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano." 
Jeremiah50:21 “Monjuru jo-Marathaim kod jo-Pekod, mi uneggi kendo utiekgi. Timuru gik moko duto ma achikou. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano." 
Jeremiah50:22 Mahu mar lweny winjore e piny, kendo gik moko duto kethore malich." 
Jeremiah50:23 Babulon ne chalo gi nyundo mane ogoyo piny ngima, to koro nyundono otur matindotindo. Jopinje duto obwok kuom gima osetimorene." 
Jeremiah50:24 In Babulon, obadho mane achikoni kikia osemaki! Ne oyudi mi omaki nikech ne ipiem koda." 
Jeremiah50:25 An Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto, aseyawo kama okanie giga mag lweny, kendo asegologi gi mirima, nikech an gi gima onego atim e piny Babulon!" 
Jeremiah50:26 Monjuru Babulon kuonde duto koni gi koni, mondo umuk derene. Dhururu gik muyako ka pidhe mag cham. Kethuru dalano ma kik gimoro dong’ie." 
Jeremiah50:27 Neguru jolwenje duto ka rwedhi miyang’o. Ywaguru jo-Babulon, nikech sa osechopo monego kumgie.”" 
Jeremiah50:28 (Joma noringo motony koa Babulon nobiro Sayun monyisowa kaka Ruoth Nyasachwa nochulo ni jo-Babulon kuor kuom gima ne gitimo ni Hekalune.) 
Jeremiah50:29 “Nyisuru jo-asere mondo omonj Babulon. Ee, ng’ato ka ng’ato mong’eyo bayo asere olwor dala, kendo kik uwe ng’ato tony. Chuluru ni Babulon kuor kuom gik moko duto mosetimo, kendo utimne mana kaka osetimo ni ji mamoko, nikech osesungore e nyima, an Ng’ama Ler mar Israel." 
Jeremiah50:30 Kuom mano yawuote nonegi e yore mag dala, mi jolwenje notiek pep chieng’no. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano." 
Jeremiah50:31 “In Babulon isungori ahinya, omiyo an Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto amon kodi, kendo kinde koro osechopo ma akumie." 
Jeremiah50:32 Oganda ma jasungani biro chwanyore mi podhi, kendo onge ng’ama nochunge. Abiro wang’o mier mokiewo kode gi mach, mi gik moko duto man e alworane kethre.”" 
Jeremiah50:33 Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto wacho niya, “Jo-Israel gi jo-Juda ithiro. Ji duto mane omakogi kwayogi malich, kendo ok nyal weyonigi thuolo mondo gia." 
Jeremiah50:34 To gin gi jawar maratego ma nyinge Ruoth Manyalo Gik Moko Duto! En owuon ema nolos wachgi, mi okel kue e piny, to jo-Babulon enomi chandruok.”" 
Jeremiah50:35 Ruoth Nyasaye wacho niya, “Tho ochopo kuom Babulon! Ee, ochopo kuom joge gi kuom jotende kod kuom joge mariek." 
Jeremiah50:36 Tho ochopo kuom jonabi mage ma jomriambo. Gin joma ofuwo manade! Tho ochopo kuom jolwenje, mi luoro omakogi." 
Jeremiah50:37 Oseketh faresegi gi gechegi mag lweny. Tho ochopo kuom jolweny mane ondiko, mi gilokore mayomyom ka mon. Oseketh mwandune kendo oyakgi." 
Jeremiah50:38 Oro ochopo e pinye, kendo miyo aorene duono. Mago duto otimore nikech Babulon en piny milamoe nyiseche makuero, mabwogo ji, kendo miyo ji fuwo." 
Jeremiah50:39 Kuom mano gibuya gi ondiegi kod winy makuero nodag kuno. Onge ng’ama nochak odag kuno nyaka chieng’. 
Jeremiah50:40 Gima notimore ni Sodom gi Gomora kane akethogi kaachiel gi mier mokiewo kodgi, e gima biro timore ni Babulon. Onge ng’ama nodag kuno, kata mana ma nobworie. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano." 
Jeremiah50:41 Oganda moro biro moa e piny man yo nyandwat. Ee, oganda marang’ongo man kuma bor ikore ni lweny." 
Jeremiah50:42 Gin gi asere gi tonge. Giger kendo ok gikech ng’ato. Tiende faresegi mor ka apaka mar nam mawuo. Giikore kedo gi Babulon. 
Jeremiah50:43 Ruodh Babulon owinjo wach, mi thudhno omako lwete, kendo kibaji goye mana ka dhako ma muoch kayo." 
Jeremiah50:44 “An Ruoth Nyasaye abiro biro mana ka sibuor mochomo lek moloth, kowuok e bungu moyugno manie geng aora Jordan, kendo anami jo-Babulon mwomre gi ng’uech kawuok e dalagi. Bang’e ng’at ma ayiero jatelo norit ogandano. “Ere ng’ama inyalo pimo koda? Koso ere ng’ama dihedhre piem koda. Jatelo mane ma dikwer wachna?" 
Jeremiah50:45 “Omiyo winjuru gima asechano timo ni dala Babulon, kod joma odakie, kata mana nyithindgi bende noywa oko, mi kibaji nogo ng’ato ka ng’ato." 
Jeremiah50:46 Ka olo Babulon, to koko nogore matek, mi piny noyiengni, kendo ogendini mamoko nowinj kokone.”" 
Jeremiah51:1 Ruoth Nyasaye wacho niya, “Abiro kelo yamo maketho Babulon kendo tieko joma odakie." 
Jeremiah51:2 Abiro oro ji moa e pinje mamoko mondo odhi oke Babulon mana ka mihudhi ma yamo keyo. Chieng’ ma masira omake, to ginimonje koni gi koni, mi giwe pinyno nono." 
Jeremiah51:3 Kik uwe ni jo-Babulon thuolo mondo oba asere, kata kik uwenigi thuolo mondo gimanre gi gigi mag lweny. Bende kik uwe yawuotgi mak unego, to tiekgiuru atieka pep!" 
Jeremiah51:4 Ginitho e yore mag miechgi kosechwowgi mohinygi. 
Jeremiah51:5 An Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto pok ajwang’o jo-Israel gi jo-Juda, kata obedo ni gisetimo timbe maricho e nyima kamano, an Ng’ama Ler mar Israel." 
Jeremiah51:6 Koro achulom kuor kendo akumo jo-Babulon, to ok onego negu nikech richogi, omiyo ringuru ua kuno, ukwo ngimau." 
Jeremiah51:7 Babulon ne chalo gi kikombe mar dhahabu manie lweta, mamiyo piny duto mer. Ogendini nomadho divai manie iye, mi wigi okethore." 
Jeremiah51:8 To koro Babulon osepodho apoya, mi okethore! Ywageuru! Dwaruru yath ni adhondene, nimar dipo ka omiyo ochango." 
Jeremiah51:9 Jo-pinje mamoko modak kuno nowacho niya, ‘Ne watemo konyo Babulon, to kata kamano kinde nosekadho. Koro biuru, wawuogi mondo wadog thuchewa, nimar osekum Babulon gi kum malich mochopo nyaka e polo.’" 
Jeremiah51:10 Jo-Israel owacho ni Ruoth Nyasaye osenyiso ni gin joma kare. Omiyo giwacho niya, ‘Wadhiuru Sayun mondo walandie gik ma Ruoth Nyasachwa osetimo.’ ”" 
Jeremiah51:11 Ruoth Nyasaye osewinjo ruodhi mag Media, nikech odwaro ketho Babulon, mondo ochulgo ni Babulon kuor kuom ketho Hekalu mare. Jotend jolweny golo chik niya, “Piaguru aserni, kendo ikreuru gi tonge." 
Jeremiah51:12 Chunguro bandera manyiso jolweny mondo omonj ohinga mar Babulon. Jiwuru jorit, kendo keturu jolweny kuondegi, bende keturu jomoko obuti, mondo obuk joma ringo.” Ruoth Nyasaye osetimo gima ne owacho ni notim ni jo-Babulon, mana kaka nochano." 
Jeremiah51:13 Babulon en dala man gi aore mang’eny, kendo en gi mwandu mogundho, to kata kamano oserumo, kendo tond ngimane osechot." 
Jeremiah51:14 Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto osekuong’ore gi nyinge owuon ni obiro kelo ji mang’eny ka bonyo mondo omonj Babulon, kendo ka giseloye to ginikog gi mor." 
Jeremiah51:15 Ruoth Nyasaye nochueyo piny gi tekone, mogure motegno, kendo noyaro polo gi riekone." 
Jeremiah51:16 En ema omiyo pi manie tok polo wuo, kendo otugo boche polo e tung’ piny duto. Bende omiyo polo mil ka koth chue, kendo ogolo yamo kar kenone mondo okudhi." 
Jeremiah51:17 Gik makamago miyo ji ng’eng’ kendo bedo mofuwo. Jotheth duto yudo wichkuot kuom gik ma githedho, nikech gin mana nyiseche manono ma onge gi ngima." 
Jeremiah51:18 Gin gik manono moromo chayo, kendo gibiro rumo chieng’ ma Ruoth Nyasaye biro mondo otiekgi." 
Jeremiah51:19 Nyasach Jakobo to ok chal gi gigo, nimar en ema ne ochueyo gik moko duto, kendo oseyiero jo-Israel mondo obed joge owuon. Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto e nyinge." 
Jeremiah51:20 Ruoth Nyasaye wacho niya, “Babulon, in e le ma akedogo. Ne akonyora kodi kuom chadho ogendinni," 
Jeremiah51:21 kendo kuom chadho farese gi joma idhogi, kuom turo geche lweny kod joma riembogi," 
Jeremiah51:22 kuom nego chwo gi mon, kod joma dongo gi joma tindo, kaachiel gi yawuowi gi nyiri. Bende ne akonyora kodi" 
Jeremiah51:23 kuom chadho ruodhi gi jodonggi.” 
Jeremiah51:24 Ruoth Nyasaye wacho niya, “Ubiro neno ka achulo kuor ni Babulon gi joge kuom richo duto mane gitimo Sayun." 
Jeremiah51:25 Babulon, ichalo gi got maketho piny ngima, to an Ruoth Nyasaye an jasiki. Abiro maki, mi agoyi piny milokri buru." 
Jeremiah51:26 Onge kidi moro kata achiel ma nogol e gundani mondo ogedgo. Ibiro chalo gi thim nyaka chieng’. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano. 
Jeremiah51:27 “Chunguru bandech lweny! Gouru tung’ mondo ogendini owinji, kendo giikre monjo Babulon! Luonguru jopinje mag Ararat gi mag Mini kod mag Ashkenaz mondo obi ochak lweny, kendo yieruru ng’ato obed jatendgi. Keluru farese mang’eny ka bonyo." 
Jeremiah51:28 Nyisuru ruodhi mag Media gi jotendgi kod jodonggi kaachiel gi jopinje duto manie bwo lochgi mondo oikre monjo Babulon. 
Jeremiah51:29 Piny tetni kendo yiengni, nikech Ruoth Nyasaye loko Babulon thim maonge ng’ama dakie, mana kaka nosechano." 
Jeremiah51:30 Jolweny mag Babulon oringo lweny, mopondo mana kuonde mochiel motegno. Luoro omakogi, mi koro gichalo mana mon. Dhorangeye dala osemuki, mowang’ udi gi mach." 
Jeremiah51:31 Joote mang’eny ringo kaa koni gi koni mondo onyis ruodh Babulon ni wasigu osemwomo ohinga kuonde duto. 
Jeremiah51:32 Gisekawo dhowedhe, kendo giwang’o odundu gi mach, mi kibaji ogoyo jolweny mag Babulon." 
Jeremiah51:33 Chieng’ keyo osechopo machiegni! Piyopiyo nono wasigu biro negogi, mi nyon-gi ka cham midino. Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto kendo ma Nyasach Israel ema owacho kamano.”" 
Jeremiah51:34 Ruodh Babulon nokango Jerusalem mochamo. Osenyodho dalano, mobolo kucha mana ka agulu ma iye ni nono, kendo omwonye mana ka ondiek. Ne okawo mana gik mabeyo modwaro, to owito mago ma ok odwar." 
Jeremiah51:35 Jo-Sayun wacho niya, ‘Muma mondo ocham jo-Babulon kuom masira ma gisekelonwa.’ Ee, jo-Jerusalem wacho niya, ‘Muma mondo ocham jo-Babulon kuom rembwa mosechwer.’" 
Jeremiah51:36 Kuom mano Ruoth Nyasaye wacho ni jo-Jerusalem niya, “Abiro doknu mondo achul kuor ni jo-Babulon nikech un, kendo abiro twoyo kuonde ma pi Babulon aye, mi aduon aorene." 
Jeremiah51:37 Babulon nodong’ gunda ma ondiegi ema dakie. Nobed kama bwogo ji ma onge ng’ama odakie, kendo kibaji nogo ji duto moneno gima osetimorene." 
Jeremiah51:38 Jo-Babulon goyo asumbi ka sibuor, kendo giruto ka nyithind sibuor." 
Jeremiah51:39 Kara, ka giowore kamano, to abiro losonigi sawo! Abiro miyogi gimer, mi gibed mamor, to bang’e nindo notergi ma ok ginyal chiew kendo." 
Jeremiah51:40 Abiro terogi mondo oyang’gi mana kaka iyang’o jamni. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano. 
Jeremiah51:41 “Osekaw Babulon dala maduong’ ma piny duto pako. Oselokore gima bwogo ogendini. 
Jeremiah51:42 Nam oseime, mi oume gi apaka mawuo." 
Jeremiah51:43 Miech jo-Babulon osedoko gik mabwogo ji, kendo chalo mana gi thim ma pi ongee. Ng’ato ok dagie kata wuothie." 
Jeremiah51:44 Abiro kumo Bel nyasach Babulon, mi ami ong’og oko gik mosekwalo, kendo ogendini ok nochak olame kendo. “Ohinga mar Babulon osepodho! Un jo-Israel, ringuru ua kuno." 
Jeremiah51:45 Ng’ato ka ng’ato oring mirimba mager, mondo ores ngimane." 
Jeremiah51:46 Kuwinjo wach moro marach, kaka wach lweny, kata ni ruoth moro kedo gi wadgi, to kik chunyu parre, kata kik ubed maluor, nikech higa ok kadhi mak weche makamago olandore." 
Jeremiah51:47 Kinde biro ma anakumie nyiseche manono mag Babulon, mi piny Babulon noyud wichkuot, kendo joge duto noneg e lweny." 
Jeremiah51:48 Mony moa yo nyandwat biro loyo Babulon kendo kethe, mi gik moko duto manie piny kendo manie polo nokog gi mor. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano." 
Jeremiah51:49 Babulon nomiyo ji otho e piny ngima, omiyo koro ibiro kethe nikech joge nonego jo-Israel mang’eny." 
Jeremiah51:50 “Un joga man Babulon, useyombo tho! Koro ringuru ua, mak udigni. Kata ubor koda kamano, to paruru an Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu, kendo Jerusalem bende mondo upar." 
Jeremiah51:51 Uwacho niya, ‘Ji oseyanyowa, omiyo wiwa okuot, nikech jopinje mamoko osedonjo kuonde maler mag Hekalu.’" 
Jeremiah51:52 Kuom mano, an Ruoth Nyasaye, awacho ni kinde biro ma anakumie nyiseche manono mag Babulon duto." 
Jeremiah51:53 Kata da bed ni Babulon nyalo idho, mi tundi e polo, kendo ger udi motegno kuno, to pod daor ji mondo okethe. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano." 
Jeremiah51:54 “Winjuru ywak man Babulon manyiso ni pinyno okethore! 
Jeremiah51:55 To an Ruoth Nyasaye ema aketho Babulon, kendo abiro miyo oling’ thi. Koko mar jolweny mamonjo dalano chal mana ka apaka mawuo matek." 
Jeremiah51:56 Gisebiro mondo giketh Babulon kendo gisemako jolweny mage, mi gituro gigi mag lweny. An Ruoth Nyasaye, an e Nyasaye ma kumo ji kuom richogi, omiyo abiro kumo Babulon mana marom gi timbene." 
Jeremiah51:57 Abiro miyo jodonge gi joge mariek gi jotelo kod joge mag lweny bed momer, mi nindo tergi, mi ok ginyal chiew kendo. An Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko duto, ema awacho kamano." 
Jeremiah51:58 Ohinga mapek mar Babulon ibiro ruomb piny, kendo dhorangeyene maboyo nowang’ pep. Tich maduong’ mane ogendini tiyo koro nobed gima nono, nikech tichgi duto koro osewang’ morumo pep. An Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto ema awacho kamano.”" 
Jeremiah51:59 Seraya wuod Neria ma nyakwar Maseya ne jatich Zedekia ruodh Juda. E higa mar ang’wen mar loch Zedekia, noyudo Seraya dwaro dhi Babulon, omiyo Jeremia ne oore." 
Jeremiah51:60 Jeremia nokawo kitabu moro, mi ondikoe masiche duto mane biro timore ni Babulon, kaachiel gi weche mamoko duto mane osewacho kuom Babulon." 
Jeremiah51:61 Nowacho ni Seraya niya, “Ka ichopo Babulon, to som ni ji weche duto mondik e kitabuni." 
Jeremiah51:62 Bang’e ilem kama: ‘A Ruoth Nyasaye, isewacho ni ibiro ketho dalani, maonge gima ngima kaka dhano kata le, ma nodagie, kendo ni obiro dong’ nono nyaka chieng’.’" 
Jeremiah51:63 Ka isetieko timo kamano, to itue ni kitabuno kidi, eka iwite e aora Yufrate." 
Jeremiah51:64 Bang’ mano iwach niya, ‘Mano e gima biro timore ni Babulon. Kaka kidini onyumore e pi, e kaka Babulon bende nonyumre e masira ma Ruoth Nyasaye biro kelo kuome, mi ok nochak owuog kendo.’ ” Mano e giko weche Jeremia." 
Jeremiah52:1 Zedekia ne jahigni piero ariyo gachiel kane odoko ruodh Juda, kendo norito piny kuom higni apar gachiel, kodak Jerusalem. Min mare ne nyinge Hamutal nyar Jeremia ma ja-Libna." 
Jeremiah52:2 Timbe Zedekia ne richo e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, mana kaka timbe Jehoyakim." 
Jeremiah52:3 Jo-Jerusalem gi jo-Juda nomiyo Ruoth Nyasaye mirima, nyaka nodarogi, motergi e tuech. Zedekia nopiem, modagi loch ruodh Babulon." 
Jeremiah52:4 Omiyo chieng’ due apar due mar apar e higa mar ochiko mar loch Zedekia, Nebukadnezar ruodh Babulon nobiro gi joge mag lweny, momonjo Jerusalem. Ne gigero kambi oko mar dala, eka gichielone ohinga molwore." 
Jeremiah52:5 Ne gigoyo ni Jerusalem ageng’a nyaka higa mar apar gachiel mar loch Zedekia. 
Jeremiah52:6 Koro kech ne lich e dalano, kendo ji ne onge gi chiemo chuth. Chieng due ochiko due mar ang’wen," 
Jeremiah52:7 jo-Babulon nomwomo ohinga mar dala, mi Zedekia notemo ringo gi jolwenje duto gotieno, kata obedo ni jo-Babulon nosedhogo dala koni gi koni kamano. Ne giluwo rangach mane ni e kind ohingni ariyo, ka ging’ado orundu ruoth, mi gichiko holo mar Jordan." 
Jeremiah52:8 To jolweny mag Babulon nolawo ruoth Zedekia, mojuko e paw Jeriko mi jolwenje duto oringo oweye." 
Jeremiah52:9 Ne gimake mi gitere Ribla ir ruodh Babulon, mong’adone bura kuno." 
Jeremiah52:10 Ruodh Babulon nogolo chik, moneg yawuot Zedekia mana e wang’e koneno, e dala Ribla, e piny Hamath. Jodong Juda bende nonegi kuno." 
Jeremiah52:11 Bang’e nogolo chik, motok wenge Zedekia oko, kendo notueye gi nyororo, motere Babulon e tuech. Nosiko e od tuech nyaka otho." 
Jeremiah52:12 Chieng’ due apar due mar abich e higa mar apar gochiko mar loch Nebukadnezar, Nebuzaradan, ma jang’ad ni ruoth rieko, kendo ma jatend joge mag lweny, nodonjo Jerusalem." 
Jeremiah52:13 Ne owang’o Hekalu mar Ruoth Nyasaye gi od ruoth kod ut joma dongo duto," 
Jeremiah52:14 kendo joge mag lweny nomuko ohinga duto ma nolworo dalano. 
Jeremiah52:15 Bang’e Nebuzaradan nomako joma nodong’ Jerusalem, motero Babulon, kaachiel gi joma noseringo modok ni ruodh Babulon, kod jotich molony mane pod odong’ kuno." 
Jeremiah52:16 To jomoko modhier ahinya, mane onge gi gimoro, noweyo e piny Juda, mondo oti e puothe mzabibu kendo e puothe mamoko." 
Jeremiah52:17 Jo-Babulon notoyo sirni mag mula gi rachungi mane itiyogo e Hekalu kod karaya maduong’ mar mula ma bende ne ni kanyo. Bang’e ne gitero mulago duto Babulon. 
Jeremiah52:18 Bende ne gidhi gi agulini gi rachodhgi gi rangisni gi bakunde miting’oe remb misango, gi tep ubani kod gik moko duto mag mula ma nolos ni tich Hekalu." 
Jeremiah52:19 Jatend jolweny nokawo gik moko duto molos gi dhahabu kata molos gi fedha, kata kikombe gi tegni mag mach gi tewni mamoko, gi agulini gi rachungi taya, gi tewni mag ubani kod tewni mag misengni miolo piny." 
Jeremiah52:20 Pek mula mane ruoth Solomon olosogo sirni ariyo gi karaya maduong’ kod ruedhi apar gariyo mane orenjie karayano ne ng’eny mokadho apima. 
Jeremiah52:21 Sirni ariyogo ne romre. Moro ka moro borne modhi malo ne romo mita ochiko, to alwora mare ne romo mita auchiel. Ne girokore, kendo mith moro ka moro ne romre gi lwedo achiel." 
Jeremiah52:22 Ewi siro ka siro ne nitie gima chalo agulu mar mula, ma borne modhi malo romo mita ariyo gi nus, to alwora mare ne oketie gik mong’inore ong’inore ka machunga, ma bende nolos gi mula." 
Jeremiah52:23 Siro ka siro ne nigi gik mong’inorego mia achiel, ma piero ochiko gauchiel kuomgi ne nenore gi kapiny." 
Jeremiah52:24 Nebuzaradan, jatend lweny maduong’, nomako Seraya jadolo maduong’, gi Zefania jadolo maluwe, kod ji adek ma jorit dhood Hekalu." 
Jeremiah52:25 Bende nokawo ng’at mane osebedo jatend jolweny, gi jagoro mare mane tichne en ndiko nying joma onego obed jolweny, kaachiel gi ji abiriyo kuom joma ne ng’ado ni ruoth rieko, kod jodongo piero auchiel mane pod ni Jerusalem." 
Jeremiah52:26 Jogo duto notero Ribla ir ruodh Babulon," 
Jeremiah52:27 mi ruoth nogolo chik, mi ogogi kendo oneggi kuno e piny Hamath. Kamano e kaka nodar jo-Juda e pinygi moter e tuech." 
Jeremiah52:28 Kar rom ji mane Nebukadnezar odaro motero e tuech chal kama: E higa mar abiriyo mar lochne, nodaro ji alufu adek gi piero ariyo gadek." 
Jeremiah52:29 To e higa mar apar gaboro mar lochne nodaro ji mia aboro gi piero adek gariyo, kogolo Jerusalem." 
Jeremiah52:30 E higa mar piero ariyo gadek mar lochne to Nebuzaradan nodaro jo-Yahudi mia abiriyo gi piero ang’wen gabich. Kamano ji duto mane odar ne romo alufu ang’wen gi mia auchiel. 
Jeremiah52:31 Kane Jehoyachin ruodh Juda osetue higni piero adek gabiriyo, Evil-merodak ruodh Babulon nogonye. Mano notimore chieng’ due piero ariyo gabich due mar apar gariyo, e higa mane Evil-merodak ochakoe tich ruoth." 
Jeremiah52:32 Evil-merodak norito Jehoyachin gi ng’wono, kendo ne omiye luor maduong’ moloyo ruodhi duto mane ni Babulon e tuech." 
Jeremiah52:33 Kuom mano Jehoyachin nolonyo lep tuech, kendo nochiemo e od ruoth ndalone duto." 
Jeremiah52:34 Odiechieng’ kodiechieng’ kuom higni duto mane ongima, ne imiye gik moko morome konyorego." 
Lamentations1:1 Mano kaka dala Sayun mane ji ng’enyie tinde odong’ nono! Chon ogendini ne kwane ka dala maduong’, to koro osedong’ mana ka chi liel. Adier, chon ne en ruodh mier duto, to tinde ochalo mana ng’ama tiyo tich misumba." 
Lamentations1:2 Oywak malit otieno duto, ka pi wang’e ridore e lembe. Kuom joherane duto, onge ng’ama nyalo kueyo chunye. Osiepene duto osendhoge, mi odoko wasike." 
Lamentations1:3 Kane jo-Juda osepodho, mi othirgi, ne otergi e tuech. Koro gidak e kind ogendini, to kuondego bende ok giyudie kue. Joma ne sandogi duto osejukogi, ke gin e thagruok malich kamano." 
Lamentations1:4 Yore madhi Sayun ywagore, nimar onge ng’ama luwogi, kadhi timo sawo kuno, kendo dhorangeye odong’ nono maonge ji. Jodolo mage omo chunygi malit, kendo nyige isando marach. Mano kaka en gi thagruok malich!" 
Lamentations1:5 Wasike ema tinde oloye, kendo dhi nyime maber. Ruoth Nyasaye ema osekelone chandruok, nikech timbene mamono mokadho akwana. Wasike osemako nyithinde matindo, motero mabor e tuech." 
Lamentations1:6 Duong’ duto mane Sayun nigo oselal. Jodonge chalo gi le modenyo ma ok nyal yudo lum, kendo giringo ka gionge teko, ka wasikgi lawogi." 
Lamentations1:7 Jerusalem paro ndalo mane onenoe chandruok kod chuny lit, kane wasigu omako joge, to onge ng’ama nobiro mondo okonye. Wasike ne ogoyone siboyi, koneno ni osepodho." 
Lamentations1:8 Jerusalem ne timo richo mang’eny malich, mi olokore mana ka nanga mochido mowiti, kendo ji duto mane miye duong’ tinde ochaye, nikech giseneno duge. Koro ere gima dotim, mak mana omo chunye, kendo loko wang’e kucha?" 
Lamentations1:9 Chilo ma en go omienore e lepe, to ne ok odewo gima biro timore achien. Mano emomiyo podho mosepodhogo lich miwuoro, kendo onge ng’ama nyalo hoyo chunye. Oywagore niya, “A Ruoth Nyasaye, neye chandruok ma an-go, nimar wasika oselocho!”" 
Lamentations1:10 Wasigu osekawo mwandune duto. Oseneno joma ok jo-Israel ka donjo e Hekalu mare. Gin ogendini mane Ruoth Nyasaye, ikwero ni kik donji e chokruok maler, nimar en chokruok mari." 
Lamentations1:11 Jo-Jerusalem duto ywagore ka kwayo chiemo. Giloko mwandugi mondo giyudgo chiemo, odwoknigi tekregi. Dala Jerusalem wacho niya, “A Ruoth Nyasaye, rang ineye kaka ikwana ka gima nono!" 
Lamentations1:12 Un duto mukadho ok dudewie wach malich machal kama? Mad urang uneye ka bende nitie chandruok machalo gi mara, ma Ruoth Nyasaye osesandago malit kokechoni." 
Lamentations1:13 Ne ooro mach gie polo modonjo e chokena. Nochiko obadho momako tiendena, mi odwoka chien. Oseweya ka adong’ kenda, ka tuo ramo denda odiechieng’ duto." 
Lamentations1:14 Osedhogo richona kuoma gi lwete owuon. Adier, ne oketo jok mare e ng’uta, mi pek mar jokno otieko tekra. Ruoth Nyasaye osejwang’a e lwet wasika, kendo ok anyal sirogi." 
Lamentations1:15 “Osenyono joga duto marateke, kendo oseluongo oganda lweny mang’ongo mondo otiek yawuota ma jolweny. Bende osenyono dala maduong’ mar Juda mana ka ng’ama nyono olemo mar bicho." 
Lamentations1:16 Mano emomiyo aywak ka pi wang’a ridore e lemba, nimar ng’at ma dikue chunya mi konya, ni kuma bor. Yawuota odhier nono, nikech wasika oselocho.”" 
Lamentations1:17 Sayun ting’o bedene malo ka ywak, to onge ng’ama nyalo kueyo chunye. Ruoth Nyasaye osechiko ni mondo joma odak mokiewo gi joka Jakobo odok mamon kodgi. Jerusalem oselokorenigi ka nanga mochido mowiti." 
Lamentations1:18 Dala Jerusalem ywagore kama: “Ruoth Nyasaye osetimo gima kare, to an, dala Jerusalem ema asepiem kode, mi aweyo chikene. Ling’uru! Ling’uru un ogendini duto, mondo uneye chandruok ma an go! Nyiga gi yawuota osemak, moter e tuech." 
Lamentations1:19 Ne aluongo osiepena mondo okonya, to ne giwuonda awuonda. Jodolona kod jodonga notho e dalani, ka dwaro chiemo mondo oduoggo tekregi." 
Lamentations1:20 A Ruoth Nyasaye neye kaka anie chandruok malit! Chunya chandore, kendo iya nyawni, nikech asepiem kodi marach ahinya. Lweny nego ji oko e thim, mana kaka tho bende neko dala e udi, kendo nyithindo dong’ kiye." 
Lamentations1:21 Winj kaka achur, to onge ng’ama kue chunya. Kane wasika duto owinjo chandruok ma an go, ne gidoko mamor kuom gima nitimo. To kel odiechieng’ mane isechiko, mondo gin bende gichal koda." 
Lamentations1:22 We mondo richogi duto okel e nyimi, kendo itimnigi mana kaka isetimona kuom richona duto, nikech achur malich ahinya, kendo chunya ool chuth.”" 
Lamentations2:1 Mano mudho mandiwa manade, ma Ruoth Nyasaye osekumogo Sayun, ka iye owang’! Hekalu mar Israel, ma duong’ne yande otundo nyaka e polo, osewito piny, chieng’ bura, ka ok oparo ni en raten tiende." 
Lamentations2:2 Ruoth Nyasaye oseketho mier duto mag joka Jakobo, ka ok okechogi. Nomuko kuonde mochiel motegno e piny Juda ka en gi mirima mager. Ne omukogi nyaka e lowo, mokuodo wi jotelo, kodwoko loch pinyno chien." 
Lamentations2:3 Kane iye owang’, to ne onego joma rateke duto mag Israel, kendo kane wasigu biro, to ne ok okonyogi gi tekone maduong’. Oseliel e piny joka Jakobo ka mach mawang’o gik moko duto man bute." 
Lamentations2:4 Oseywayo atung’e ka omako matek gi bade ma korachwich, mana ka jasigu. Osenego joma beyo duto mwahero, mi oolo mirimbe mager ka mach kuom jo-Sayun." 
Lamentations2:5 Adier, Ruoth Nyasaye oselokore jasigu, mi otieko Israel. Osemuko udi madongo duto, kendo mier mochiel motegno oduoko piny, bende osekelo ni Jerusalem kuyo kod ywagruok." 
Lamentations2:6 Osegolo gik moko duto e Hekalu mare, mi odong’ nono mana ka kiru mowe e puodho. Adier, kama ler ma joge chokoree osemuko chuth. Ruoth Nyasaye osemiyo wi ji owil gi sewni madongo kod Sabato e Sayun, kendo osejwang’o ruoth kod jodolo ka iye owang’." 
Lamentations2:7 Osedagi kendone mar misango mi ojwang’o Hekalu mare. Nochiwo ut Sayun madongo e lwet wasigu, mi gigoyo koko e od Ruoth Nyasaye mana machal gi koko migoyo chieng’ sawo maduong’." 
Lamentations2:8 Ruoth Nyasaye osechano mondo omuk ohinga mar Sayun. Ne opime maber, kokethe mak oweyo, nyaka chop otieke pep. Omiyo ohingane oruombore piny, mi kuyo ema odong’." 
Lamentations2:9 Dhorangeyene bende osepodho piny, kendo Ruoth Nyasaye oseturo lodi mage matindotindo. Ruodh Sayun kod jodonge oke e kind ogendini mamoko, kendo chik Nyasaye koro ok ti. Jonabi mage bende koro ok yud fweny moa kuom Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Lamentations2:10 Jodonge obet piny, mi oling’ thi. Gisebuko wigi buru, kendo girwakore gi piende gugru. Nyi Jerusalem bende okulo wigi piny." 
Lamentations2:11 Aseywak ahinya, mi wang’ a oowore kendo iya nyawni. Chunya bende chandore malit, nikech masira ma joga neno. Rawere gi nyithindo mayom nong’no tero, kendo gipodho e wang’yore mag dala." 
Lamentations2:12 Ee, nong’no terogi, kendo gipodho e yore mag dala, kaka joma ohinyore. Giywak ka gikwayo minegi chiemo kod divai, to kata kamano chunygi chot mana e kor minegi." 
Lamentations2:13 Yaye Jerusalem, ere kaka daho chunyi? Ere chandruok ma dapim gi marino? Koso ang’o ma dapimgo, mondo aho chunyi, yaye Sayun? Adhondi duong’ ka nam! Ere ng’ama dithiedhi?" 
Lamentations2:14 Fweny mane jonabini oneno, mi onyisi, ne ok adier, to ne gin mana miriambo lilo. Ok ne ginyisi timbeni mamono, mondo ichak idhi maber kendo, to fweny ma gisenyisi gin mana weche manono ma wito ji." 
Lamentations2:15 Yaye Jerusalem, ji duto makadho buti pamo lwetgi ka seyi. Gisicho, kendo gitwenyo umgi, ka gipenjore niya, “Adier, ma e dala ma ji luongo ni ‘Dala Maberie Moloyo’, kendo ni, ‘Dala Makelo Mor Ni Piny Ngima.’ ”" 
Lamentations2:16 Wasiki duto yanyi marach kendo jari. Gisicho, kendo gigoyoni siboi ka giwacho niya, “Ero wasetieke! Ma e odiechieng’ ma wasebet kwarito! Adier, osechopo, mi wanene!”" 
Lamentations2:17 To Ruoth Nyasaye osetimo gima nochano chon. Adier, osetimo gima nosiemo ji ni obiro timo. Oseketho gik moko ka ok odewo, kendo omiyo wasigu ogoyoni siboi komedo tekogi." 
Lamentations2:18 A Sayun, dala mochiel gi ohinga, ywag ni Ruoth Nyasaye gi chunyi duto. Pi wang’i mondo omol ka aora odiechieng gotieno. Kik iyue kata matin, kendo pi wang’i ki chogi." 
Lamentations2:19 A malo gotieno mondo iywag matek bang’ seche ang’wen ka seche ang’wen ka jorit lokoree. Weche duto manie chunyi, ol oko ka pi e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye. Ting’ bedeni malo kilame, mondo ores nyithindi ma nong’no tero e wang’yore duto." 
Lamentations2:20 Yaye Ruoth Nyasaye, rang mondo ineye joma isesando malit! Bende mon dicham nyithindgi ma giserito maber? Koso jodolo gi jonabi dineg adier e Hekalu mari?" 
Lamentations2:21 Joma dongo gi joma tindo duto nindo piny e wang’ yore. Nyiga gi yawuota lweny gi kech osenego. Isenegogi ka in gi mirima. Adier, isetiekogi ka ok ikechogi ngang’." 
Lamentations2:22 Ne iorona wasigu moa kuonde duto, mana ka ji machokore e nyasi moro maduong’. Onge kata ng’at achiel mane otony. Ooyo, onge ng’ato mane odong’ ka ngima, chieng’ mane inie gi mirima, A Ruoth Nyasaye. Ji duto mane anywolo maber kendo apidho, wasika osetieko pep." 
Lamentations3:1 An ema aseneno masira mane Ruoth Nyasaye okelona kokecho. 
Lamentations3:2 An e jal mane oriembo, mi ochuno mondo owuothi e mudho mandiwa." 
Lamentations3:3 An ema osanda kinde duto odiechieng’ ngima. 
Lamentations3:4 Osemiyo denda dhi adhiya; chokena bende oseturo 
Lamentations3:5 Oselwora gi gik mamiya chuny lit kod olo. 
Lamentations3:6 Osemiyo adak kuonde motimo mudho, mana ka ng’at mane otho chon." 
Lamentations3:7 Osechiela gi ohinga koni gi koni ma ok anyal tony, kendo osetueya gi nyororo mapek." 
Lamentations3:8 Bende kata ka aywak, kendo aluonge mondo okonya, to ok odwar winjo kwayona." 
Lamentations3:9 Osegeng’o yore mane aluwo gi kite mopa, omiyo awuotho e yore mogondore." 
Lamentations3:10 Obutona mana ka ondiek kata ka sibuor mobuto kama opondo. 
Lamentations3:11 Osegeng’o yora mi abaro tenge, kendo okidha matindo tindo, mojwang’a kucha." 
Lamentations3:12 Oseywayo atung’e, mi ochiela gi aseche." 
Lamentations3:13 Osehobo kora gi asere ma owuodho e olalo. 
Lamentations3:14 Asedoko ng’at ma ji duto nyiero. Gigeta gi wer pile odiechieng’ duto. 
Lamentations3:15 Osemiyo lit gi olo opong’o chunya. 
Lamentations3:16 Osemiyo laka otur ka amuodo ge, kendo osemiyo achamo buru." 
Lamentations3:17 Koro chunya onge gi kue, mi wiya osewil gi mor ma yande an go." 
Lamentations3:18 Kuom mano, aywak ni tekra orumo, kendo geno mane agenogo kuom Ruoth Nyasaye bende orumo." 
Lamentations3:19 Ka aparo thagruok kod kuyo ma an-go, to litna malich." 
Lamentations3:20 Aparogi pile, kendo chunya onyosore." 
Lamentations3:21 To gima bende aparo, momiyo an gi geno en ni" 
Lamentations3:22 hera mosiko mar Ruoth Nyasaye ochwere, kendo ng’wonone ok rum." 
Lamentations3:23 Ginyien pile, okinyi kokinyi. Chutho, adiera mare duong’." 
Lamentations3:24 Awacho niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye kende ema an-go, omiyo ageno kuome.”" 
Lamentations3:25 Ruoth Nyasaye timo maber ni joma ogene kendo ma dware. 
Lamentations3:26 En gima ber bedo gi kue, kirito Ruoth Nyasaye mondo oresi." 
Lamentations3:27 Bende ber mondo ng’ato oting’ jok ka pod en wuowi," 
Lamentations3:28 kendo ka Nyasaye otueyo jokno kuome, to ber mondo obed kar kende koling’." 
Lamentations3:29 Onego obolre chuth, nikech kamoro dipo ka oresore." 
Lamentations3:30 Bende onego ochiw lembe ni ng’at ma dwaro thale, kendo oyie bedo ng’ama ji yanyo," 
Lamentations3:31 nikech Ruoth Nyasaye ok nowit ng’ato nyaka chieng’. 
Lamentations3:32 Kata obedo ni okumo ji malit, to ong’wononigi bende gi herane mogundho mosiko," 
Lamentations3:33 nimar ok ohero sando dhano kata kumo. 
Lamentations3:34 Ruoth Nyasaye ok yie mondo osand ng’ato ang’ata motue 
Lamentations3:35 kata tamo ng’ato yudo adiera monego oyudi e nyim Ng’ama Duong’ Moloyo," 
Lamentations3:36 kata ketho buch ng’ato kiyalo. 
Lamentations3:37 En ng’a ma dichik gimoro mi timre, ka ok Ruoth Nyasaye ema ochano ni mondo gino otimre?" 
Lamentations3:38 Donge ber gi rach wuok mana kuoma Ng’ama Duong’ Moloyo? 
Lamentations3:39 Ka kamano, to ere gima omiyo dhano adhana mathoni ng’ur, kikume nikech richone?" 
Lamentations3:40 Ber wanon timbewa, kendo wapar ane kaka gibet, eka wadog ir Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Lamentations3:41 Kwasudo ir Ruoth Nyasaye, to ber wasud ire gi chunywa, to ok kwating’o mana bedewa malo kende." 
Lamentations3:42 A Ruoth Nyasaye, wan e joma osetimo richo mi opiem kodi, to pok ing’wononwa kuom richowa." 
Lamentations3:43 Iselawowa ka in gi mirima mager, mi inegowa mak ikechowa." 
Lamentations3:44 Iseumori gi boche polo, mondo lemowa kik tund iri," 
Lamentations3:45 bende isemiyo ogendini kwanowa ka yugi miwito. 
Lamentations3:46 Wasikwa duto yanyowa marach kendo jarowa. 
Lamentations3:47 Luoro kod obadho oritowa, kendo kethruok gi masira ochomowa." 
Lamentations3:48 Pi wang’a mol ka aora nikech joga inego. 
Lamentations3:49 Adier, pi wang’a biro chwer mak chogi" 
Lamentations3:50 nyaka chop Ruoth Nyasaye rang piny gie polo, mi ne chandruokna." 
Lamentations3:51 Ka aneno gima otimore ni nyi dalawa duto, to chunya chandore malit." 
Lamentations3:52 Joma ne mon koda kayiem nono, oseriemba malit, mana ka winy miriembo." 
Lamentations3:53 Ne giluta e bur ka angima, mi gibolo kite kuoma." 
Lamentations3:54 Pi ne oima, mi awacho ni, ‘Atho.’" 
Lamentations3:55 To ne aluongo nyingi, yaye Ruoth Nyasaye, kane anie bur matutno." 
Lamentations3:56 Kane aywakni ni mondo kik itamri konya, to ne iwinjo dwonda." 
Lamentations3:57 Ne isudo machiegni kane aluongi kamano, mi iwachona ni kik abed maluor." 
Lamentations3:58 A Ruoth Nyasaye, isechwaka, mi ireso ngimana." 
Lamentations3:59 Iseneno gima rach motimna, mi ing’ado bucha kare." 
Lamentations3:60 Ne ineno kaka ji chulona kuor, kendo niwinjo weche duto mane gihondho kuoma." 
Lamentations3:61 A Ruoth Nyasaye isewinjo ayany ma giyanyago, kaachiel gi gik maricho mane gichano timona." 
Lamentations3:62 Isewinjo bende kaka wasika kuodha ling’ling’ pile, odiechieng’ duto." 
Lamentations3:63 Neye kaka gigeta malit gi wer kinde duto! 
Lamentations3:64 A Ruoth Nyasaye, timnigi gima oromo gi timbegi." 
Lamentations3:65 Migi bedo gi chuny matek, mondo eka ikuong’gi." 
Lamentations3:66 Lawgi kikecho kendo itiekgi chuth, mondo kik gidag e piny misechueyoni, yaye Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Lamentations4:1 Mano kaka dhahabu ochido, kata mana dhahabu maberie moloyo! Kite mag Hekalu okere e akek yore duto." 
Lamentations4:2 Neye kaka yawuot Sayun ma yande beyo ka dhahabu maler, tinde ipimo mana gi aguch lowo, ma dhano ema ochueyo." 
Lamentations4:3 Kata mana ondieg otoyo bende dhodho nyithindgi, joga to osedoko makwiny mana ka udo ma e thim." 
Lamentations4:4 Nyathi madhoth riyo oloyo, mi lewe omoko e dande. Nyithindo matindo kwayo chiemo, to onge ng’ama migi kata mana ng’injo."
