Lamentations4:5 Joma yande chamo chiemo mabeyo koro ojwang’ e wang’ yore. Jogo mane odak e ngima maber, koro kwanyo chiemo mana e pidh yugi." 
Lamentations4:6 Kum ma joga oyudo lich moloyo kum mane okum go Sodom, nikech Sodom nolok gunda mana piyopiyo nono, ma onge ng’ama oywago." 
Lamentations4:7 Jodong joga yande nigi ngima maber. Dendgi yande pichni kendo leny ka mo," 
Lamentations4:8 to tinde wang’gi olil ti, mi ka ng’ato oromo kodgi to ok nyal ng’eyogi. Chokegi ogulo, kendo dendgi ojwer mana ka luth." 
Lamentations4:9 Ji mane otho e lweny ne johawi, moloyo joma ne kech oywayo monego, kaonge gima cham." 
Lamentations4:10 Mon mang’won notedo nyithindgi giwegi. Adier, nyithindgi nolokore chiembgi e ndalo mane masira omakoe joga." 
Lamentations4:11 Ruoth Nyasaye ne oolo mirimbe mang’eny ka iye owang’, mi omoko mach kuom Sayun mowang’o mise mage duto." 
Lamentations4:12 Onge ruoth moro kata mana ng’at achiel modak e piny mane oyie ni jasigu didonj e dhorangeye Jerusalem. 
Lamentations4:13 Mago notimore nikech richo mag jonabi mage, kendo nikech timbe mamono mag jodolone, mane ochuero remb joma kare." 
Lamentations4:14 Ne gibayo ka muofni e wang’ yore ka gichadhore gi remo, ma ji ok nyal mulo lepgi." 
Lamentations4:15 Ji ne goyonigi koko niya, “Dhiuru kucha! Dhiuru kucha, un joma ogak. Dhiuru kucha, kik ubi machiegni.” Kuom mano ne giringo piyopiyo mi gidhi, kendo gibayo e kind ogendini, ka ok ginyal nwang’o kuonde dak." 
Lamentations4:16 Ruoth Nyasaye owuon ema nokeyogi, mi ok ochako oparogi kendo. Bende ne ok ong’wono ni jodolo, kata kecho jodongo ne ok okecho." 
Lamentations4:17 Wengewa ojony ka warango gima dikonywa, to kara mana kayiem. Oganda mane warito kwageno ni biro konyowa, to kara ne ok nyal gimoro." 
Lamentations4:18 Wasikwa manyo kuonde ma waluwo, omiyo ok wanyal wuotho e wang’ yore. Ndalowa orumo. Adier, chieng’ thowa osechopo." 
Lamentations4:19 Joma lawowa nenore ni ringo matek moloyo ongo ma huyo e kor polo. Gilawo gerwa matek e kor gode, kendo gibutonwa e thim." 
Lamentations4:20 Ruoth mane Nyasaye oyiero, kendo ma wakwano ka ngimawa, ne gimako e bur mane gikunyo. To en e jal mane waparo ni dwadag e bwo tipone e kind ogendini." 
Lamentations4:21 Un jo-Edom, modak e piny Uz, ero umor kendo uil, to ng’euru ni kikombe mwamadhoni, ema un bende ubiro madho! Enomeru mi unyis dugu." 
Lamentations4:22 Kum mane okumgo jo-Sayun kuom timbegi mamono koro orumo. Ok nochak oriembgi kendo, mondo gibed wasumbni e piny wasikgi. To un jo-Edom ema Ruoth Nyasaye nokumu, kendo enoel kethou e lela." 
Lamentations5:1 A Ruoth Nyasaye, parie gima osetimorenwa! Rangwa mondo ineye kaka wiwa okuot malit." 
Lamentations5:2 Jopinje mamoko osekawo pinywa gi miechwa. 
Lamentations5:3 Wachalo gi nyithindo makiye, maonge gi wuonegi. Minewa bende chalo mond liete." 
Lamentations5:4 Pi mwamodho gi yien mwachwako wang’iewo ang’iewa, to gin mawa wawegi!" 
Lamentations5:5 Wasandore malit gi jok mapek e ng’utwa. Inegowa gi tich, ma ok wanyal yudo yueyo." 
Lamentations5:6 Kinde moro ne wawinjore gi jo-Misri mondo omiwa chiemo, to kinde machielo bende ne wawinjore gi jo-Asuria kamano." 
Lamentations5:7 Kwerewa notimo richo mathoth, kendo koro gionge, to wan ema koro ikumowa nikech richogigo." 
Lamentations5:8 Wasumbni ema tinde tiyowa, kendo onge ng’ama nyalo resowa e lwetgi." 
Lamentations5:9 Wayudo chiembwa kwachiwo ngimawa, nikech jolweny manyalo monjowa nie thim." 
Lamentations5:10 Dendwa liet mana ka mach nikech tuo ma kech okelonwa. 
Lamentations5:11 Mon gi nyiri ne omak gi thwon e Sayun kendo e miech Juda. 
Lamentations5:12 Jodong gweng’ ne iliero gi luetegi e yien, kendo kata mana joma odong’ ok mi duong’." 
Lamentations5:13 Yawuowi ichuno mondo oregi. Wahia bende chandore gi ting’o yien mapek. 
Lamentations5:14 Jodongo tinde ok chokre e bura. Yawuowi bende oseweyo goyo thum. 
Lamentations5:15 Mor oserumo e chunywa, kendo miendwa olokore ywak." 
Lamentations5:16 Osimbwa mar duong’ bende osepodho. Yaye, masira ochomowa, nikech wan joricho." 
Lamentations5:17 Chunywa lit, kendo wang’wa lil" 
Lamentations5:18 nikech got Sayun osejwang’, mi ondiegi ema bayoe." 
Lamentations5:19 To in Ruoth Nyasaye ilocho nyaka chieng’, kendo lochni osiko kuom tienge duto." 
Lamentations5:20 Ere gimomiyo ijwang’owa kuom ndalo mang’enygi? Bende wiyi diwil kodwa nyaka chieng’ koso? 
Lamentations5:21 A Ruoth Nyasaye, duogwa iri mondo waduog iri. Yie mondo wabedi kaka ne wabet chon." 
Lamentations5:22 Koso isedagiwa chuth ka in gi mirima mager? 
Ezekiel1:1 Due abich, due mar ang’wen e higa mar piero adek, kane adak e bath aora Kebar kaachiel gi jo-Yahudi mane oter e tuech, polo ne oyawore, mi Nyasaye ofwenyorena." 
Ezekiel1:2 (Ne en due abich mar dueno, kane ruoth Jehoyachin osetieko higni abich e tuech," 
Ezekiel1:3 ema ne wach Ruoth Nyasaye obiroe ni Ezekiel wuod Buzi jadolo, ka en e piny Babulon e bath aora Kebar, mi owinjo ka teko Ruoth Nyasaye olor kuome.)" 
Ezekiel1:4 An Ezekiel, ne ating’o wang’a, mi aneno yamb ahiti ka kudho koa yo nyandwat. Bende ne aneno bor polo maduong’ kod mach mamil aruya gi ler mokwake koni gi koni, to e dier majno ne nitie gimori marieny ka mula." 
Ezekiel1:5 Bende ne aneno gik moko mangima ang’wen e iye, machalo gi dhano," 
Ezekiel1:6 mak mana ni moro ka moro ne nigi lela wenge ang’wen kod buombe ang’wen. 
Ezekiel1:7 Tiendegi ne oriere tir, kendo ombong’gi ne chalo gi ombong’ nyaroya, to mil ka mula moywe." 
Ezekiel1:8 E bwo bwomb moro ka moro ne nitie lwedo machalo lwet dhano. Gigo duto kargi ang’wen ne nigi lela wenge kod buombe machal kama: 
Ezekiel1:9 buombe ariyo mag moro ka moro noyarore, kamulo buomb jowetene koni gi koni. Kane gihuyo, to gidhi adhiya kaachiel, ma ok gilokore." 
Ezekiel1:10 Moro ka moro ne nigi lela wenge ang’wen. Lela wang; ma nyime ne chalo gi lela wang dhano, to lela wang’ ma kor achwich ne chalo gi lela wang’ sibuor. To e bathe koracham ne nitie lela wang’ machalo gi mar rwath, to yoka ng’eye ne nitie moro machalo gi mar ongo." 
Ezekiel1:11 Moro ka moro nosiko koyaro buombene ariyo, komulogo buombe jowetene koni gi koni, to ariyo mamoko noumogo dende." 
Ezekiel1:12 Kaka ne gin gi lela wenge ang’wen moro ka moro, ne ginyalo huyo ka gichomo kamoro amora ma roho dwaro dhiye ma ok gilokore kata matin." 
Ezekiel1:13 Ne nenore kagima mach mar mirni kata kar meny rieny e kindgi, karingo koni gi koni. Ne en mach mang’ang’ni, kendo polo ne mil e iye." 
Ezekiel1:14 Gik mangimago bende ne ringo koni gi koni ka mil polo. 
Ezekiel1:15 Kane arango gik mangima ang’wen-go, ne aneno tiende molworore ka mag gari, mochung’ e bath moro ka moro." 
Ezekiel1:16 Tiendego ne rieny ka kidi ma nengone tek, kendo giduto ne gichalre. Nolosgi ariyo ariyo ka moro ka moro ochung’ ei wadgi ariwa." 
Ezekiel1:17 Kamano kane gidhi kamoro to gidhi adhiya mak gilokore. 
Ezekiel1:18 Tiende ang’wen-go ne nigi murudumbe madongo malich ma wenge man gi teko mar neno opong’o. 
Ezekiel1:19 Kane gik mangimago wuotho, to tiendego bende wuotho e bathgi, kendo kane gidum gia e lowo, to tiendego bende dum." 
Ezekiel1:20 Ne gidhi mana kuma roho dwaro dhiye, kendo tiendego bende ne dhi kodgi, nimar roho mane nie gik mangimago ema bende ne nie tiendego." 
Ezekiel1:21 Kane gik mangimago wuotho, kata ka gichung’, kata ka gidum gia e lowo, to tiendego bende ne timo mana kaka gitimo, nimar gik mangimago ema ne chiko tiendego." 
Ezekiel1:22 Ewi gik mangimago malo ne nitie gimoro malich moyarore, ma mil mana ka pe mopedhore." 
Ezekiel1:23 To buombe ariyo mag gik mangimago ne oyarore e bwo gino, ka moro ka moro mulo buomb jowetene koni gi koni, to buombene ariyo mamoko oumo dende." 
Ezekiel1:24 Bende kane gihuyo ne awinjo ka buombegi kwadhore matek, machalo mana nam maduong’ ma wuo, kata jolweny mang’eny magoyo mahu, kata dwond Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto. Kane gichung’ to buombegi ne lor piny," 
Ezekiel1:25 to koko ne pod winjore awinja ewi gima oyarore cha. 
Ezekiel1:26 Ewi gino ne nitie gimoro machalo gi kom duong’ molos gi kidi ma nengone tek, to gimoro machalo gi dhano nobet kuome." 
Ezekiel1:27 Gima nobet e komno ne rieny ka mula molut e mach, chakre tiende nyaka wiye, kendo ler mang’angni nolwore koni gi koni." 
Ezekiel1:28 To lerno ne nigi kido duto machalo gi kit lihudu manie kor polo ka koth chue. Mano e kaka duong’ maler mar Ruoth Nyasaye ne chalo! 
Ezekiel2:1 Kane aneno kamano, ne apodho auma, eka ne awinjo dwol moro kawacho niya, “In wuod dhano, a malo mondo alos kodi.”" 
Ezekiel2:2 E kinde mane dwolno wuoyo, Roho nodonjo kuoma, mi achung’ gi tienda. Eka ne awinjo ka dwolno pod wuoyo, kawacho niya," 
Ezekiel2:3 “In wuod dhano, aori ir jo-Israel ma oseng’anyo mopiem koda. Kaka kweregi nopiem koda, e kaka gin bende koro gipiem koda." 
Ezekiel2:4 Wigi tek, kendo ok gimiya luor, omiyo aori irgi mondo inyisgi gima an Ruoth Nyasaye awacho." 
Ezekiel2:5 To kata da bed ni giwinjo wachni, kata ok giwinjo, to gibiro ng’eyo ni janabi moro osebet ka ni e kindgi." 
Ezekiel2:6 “To in wuod dhano, kik iluorgi, kata kik iluor gima giwacho. Gibiro lwori mana ka kudho, mi giketi diere, kendo inichal mana ka gima idak e kind thomoni. To kata kamano, kik iwe joma wigi tekgo bwogi, kata kik iluor gimoro amora ma giwacho." 
Ezekiel2:7 Kata obedo ni gin joma wigi tek kamano, to wachnigi weche duto ma awachoni ni mondo inyisgi, bed ni giyie winjo kata ok giyie." 
Ezekiel2:8 “Wuod dhano, winji gima anyisi: Wiyi kik bed matek ka wi jogo. Omiyo ng’am dhogi mondo icham gima amiyi.”" 
Ezekiel2:9 Bang’ wechego, ne aneno lwedo moting’o kalatas modol, korie kochomo kuma antie." 
Ezekiel2:10 Ne oyaro kalatasno, mi aneno ka weche mag ywak gi kuyo kod masiche ondik e iye kendo e dieng’eye." 
Ezekiel3:1 Eka Nyasaye nowachona niya, “In wuod dhano, cham kalatas manie nyimini, mondo idhi iwuo gi jo-Israel.”" 
Ezekiel3:2 Kuom mano, ne ang’amo dhoga, mi omiya kalatasno mondo acham," 
Ezekiel3:3 kowachona niya, “Cham kalatas mamiyini mondo oyieng’i.” Kamano ne achame, mi awinjo ka omit mana ka mor kich." 
Ezekiel3:4 Bang’ mano, Nyasaye nowachona niya, “Wuod dhanoo, dhiyo ir jo-Israel mondo inyisgi weche duto ma awachoni." 
Ezekiel3:5 Ok aori ir oganda mawacho dhok matek ma ok ing’eyo, to aori mana ir jo-Israel ma jou." 
Ezekiel3:6 Ka da bed ni aori ir ogendini madongo mawacho dhok matek ma ok ing’eyo, to da gichiko itgi, mi giwinjo gima iwacho." 
Ezekiel3:7 To jo-Israel ok bi chiko itgi mondo owinj gima iwacho, nikech an bende ne gitamore winjo wachna. Giduto gin jopiem, kendo wigi tek." 
Ezekiel3:8 Koro abiro miyo wiyi bedo matek ka wigi," 
Ezekiel3:9 bende abiro miyo ibedo motegno moloyo lwanda. Omiyo kik iluor joma jopiem go, kata kik iwe gigoyi kibaji.”" 
Ezekiel3:10 Nyasaye ne odhi nyime kawachona niya, “In wuod dhano, chik iti maber ahinya mondo ipar weche duto ma abiro wachoni." 
Ezekiel3:11 Bang’e idhi ir jou ma ungo e tuech, mondo inyisgi wechenago, bed ni giyie winjo wachni kata ok giyie. To bende wachnigi ni wechego oa kuom Ruoth Nyasaye.”" 
Ezekiel3:12 Eka Roho ne oting’a malo, kendo kane duong’ maler mar Ruoth Nyasaye odum, to ne awinjo koko maduong’ ka koko mar yiengni piny." 
Ezekiel3:13 Kokono ne mar buomb gik mangimago ka moro ka moro kwadhore kuom wadgi, kendo ne mar tiende machal gi mag garigo kamor matek." 
Ezekiel3:14 E kinde mane Roho oting’a malono, ne iya owang’, kendo abedo gi chuny lit, mi teko mar Ruoth Nyasaye nobiro kuoma." 
Ezekiel3:15 Ne adhi Telabib, kuma ne joma oter e tuech odakie e bath aora Kebar, mi abet kuno kuom ndalo abiriyo, ka adhier nono nikech gik mane aseneno." 
Ezekiel3:16 Kane ndalo abiriyogo oserumo, Ruoth Nyasaye ne owuoyo koda," 
Ezekiel3:17 ka wachona niya, “Wuod dhano, adwaro mondo aketi jarit mar oganda Israel. Tiji biro bedo siemogi gi siem moro amora mamiyi." 
Ezekiel3:18 Ka awachoni ni ng’at ma timbene mono biro tho, mi ok isieme mondo owe yorene marichogo, obed mangima, to enotho ka pod en jaricho, kendo in ema anakwani ka ng’ama onege." 
Ezekiel3:19 To ka isiemo jaricho mi odagi weyo timo timbene mamonogo, to enotho kapod en jaricho, to in inires ngimani." 
Ezekiel3:20 “Ka ng’at makare odonjo e richo, mi akelone masira, to enotho. Adier, enotho nikech richone, nimar ok isesieme. Ok napar timbene makare mosebedo kotimo, to in ema nakwani ka ng’ama onege." 
Ezekiel3:21 To ka isiemo ng’at makare mondo kik tim richo, mi owinji, kendo ok otimo richo, to ok enotho, mi in bende inires ngimani.”" 
Ezekiel3:22 Ne ayudo ka teko mar Ruoth Nyasaye obiro kuoma, mi awinjo kowachona niya, “A malo, mondo idhi oko e holo kuma abiro losoe kodi.”" 
Ezekiel3:23 Kuom mano, ne awuok, mi adhi e holo, kendo ne aneno duong’ maler mar Ruoth Nyasaye, mana kaka ne asenene e bath aora Kebar. Ne apodho auma," 
Ezekiel3:24 to Roho ne odonjo kuoma, mi achung’. Eka Ruoth Nyasaye ne owachona niya, “Dog dala, mondo ilorri e ot." 
Ezekiel3:25 Ibiro tueyi gi tonde, mi ok iniwuog idhi oko kuma jou nitie." 
Ezekiel3:26 Bende abiro tueyo lewi mondo kik ilosi, mi isiem joma jopiemgi." 
Ezekiel3:27 To bang’e ka achako wuoyo kodi, mi amiyi teko mar loso, to iniwachnigi wechena, kinyisogi ni wechego oa kuom Ruoth Nyasaye. Ji moko kuomgi nowinji, to moko ok nodewi, nikech gin oganda ma jopiem.”" 
Ezekiel4:1 Nyasaye nowacho niya, “In wuod dhano, kaw matafari iket e nyimi mondo igorie gima nyiso ni matofarino ochung’ kar Jerusalem." 
Ezekiel4:2 Bang’e ikuny bur molwore duto, mi idhurne lowo, kendo iketne gik moko mochung’ kaka ranyisi mag kambe jolweny kod lodi mituomogo ohinga." 
Ezekiel4:3 Bende kaw tap nyinyo mondo iket ka ohinga mar nyinyo e kindi gi matafarino. Chom matafarino tir, mondo ochal gi dala ma ogone ageng’a, to in ema ichal gi joma goyone ageng’a. Mano nobed ranyisi ni jo-Israel." 
Ezekiel4:4 “Bang’e nindi gi ng’eti koracham mondo ochal ka gima aketo richo jo-Israel kuomi. Ndalo duto ma irieri kanyo nochal ka gima iting’o richogi. 
Ezekiel4:5 Inirieri kanyo kuom ndalo mia adek gi piero ochiko, nikech akwano ndalo achiel kar higa achiel ma abiro kumogie." 
Ezekiel4:6 Ka isetieko ndalogo duto, to chak inind kendo gi ng’eti korachwich, mondo iting’ richo mag jo-Juda bende kuom ndalo piero ang’wen. Akwano ndalo achiel kar higa achiel." 
Ezekiel4:7 “Bang’e irang matafari manyiso ni ibiro goyo ni Jerusalem ageng’a, kendo irie badi kikoro ni masira biro mako dalano." 
Ezekiel4:8 Abiro tueyi gi tonde mondo kik ilokri koni gi koni, nyaka ndalo mag ageng’a rum." 
Ezekiel4:9 “Koro kaw ngano gi shairi gi oganda gi olayo gi bel kod mariwa mondo iolgi duto e agulu, itedgo kuon. Inicham kuonno kuom ndalo mia adek gi piero ochiko ma ibiro nindoe gi ng’eti ma koracham." 
Ezekiel4:10 To cham mana chiemo moromo achiel kuom ang’wen mar kilo e odiechieng’ kodiechieng’, kendo nyaka ichame mana dichiel e sa moketi." 
Ezekiel4:11 Pi ma imodho bende nyaka bed mana nus lita odiechieng’ kodiechieng’. 
Ezekiel4:12 To kitedo chiemono, to nyaka itede mana e mach michwako gi chieth dhano, kama ji duto nyalo nenie.”" 
Ezekiel4:13 Eka Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho niya, “Ka asekeyo jo-Israel e pinje mamoko, to mano e kaka ginicham chiemo ma chik okwero.”" 
Ezekiel4:14 To ne adwoke niya, “A Ruoth Nyasaye an pok atimo gima kuero ngang’.”" 
Ezekiel4:15 Kuom mano, Ruoth Nyasaye noyiena mondo ated chiemba gi mach mar owuoch dhiang’, kar tedo gi chieth dhano." 
Ezekiel4:16 Bang’e nowacho niya, “Wuod dhano, abiro miyo chiemo bed mamit Jerusalem. Ji nopim chiemo ma gichamo ka parore. Pi ma gimodho bende ginipim ka gidhier nono." 
Ezekiel4:17 Kamano ginichand chiemo gi pi, mi giwuor, ka ng’ato ka ng’ato ng’iyo wadgi, kendo dendgi nodhi adhiya nikech richogi.”" 
Ezekiel5:1 Nyasaye nowacho niya, “Wuod dhano, kaw ligangla mabith, ilielgo wiyi kod tiki, kendo ipoggi didek." 
Ezekiel5:2 Ka kinde migoyoe ageng’a oserumo, to nyaka iwang’ achiel kuom adek mar yiergo ewi matafari mochung’ kar Jerusalemno. To achiel kuom adek machielo, ng’adi gi ligangla e alwora mar matafarino. Achiel kuom adek modong’ to witi mondo yamo odhigo, nikech anawuodh liganglana alawgo joga." 
Ezekiel5:3 To kaw yiergo moko matin, mondo itue e riak lawi." 
Ezekiel5:4 Bang’e kaw moko kuom mago, iwit e mach mondo owang’, mi mach muoch kuomgi mi wang’ jo-Israel duto pep.”" 
Ezekiel5:5 Eka Ruoth Nyasaye nomedo wacho niya, “Neye kaka Jerusalem chalo! Ne akete e dier piny, ka ogendini mamoko olwore koni gi koni" 
Ezekiel5:6 To jo-Jerusalem osepiem koda, moweyo buchena kod chikena moloyo ogendini mamoko duto, nimar gisedagi chikena, mi gitamore rito." 
Ezekiel5:7 Emomiyo an Ruoth Nyasaye awacho kama: Kaka usebedo kupiem koda moloyoe kata mana ogendini mokiewo kodu, ka ok uluw buchena kata rito chikena, to uluwo mana timbe ogendini mokiewo kodu," 
Ezekiel5:8 omiyo an Ruoth Nyasaye awacho ni amon kodu! Abiro kumou ratiro mondo ogendini duto one. 
Ezekiel5:9 Usedwanyoru marach gi timbeu manono, omiyo abiro kumo jo-Jerusalem gi kum marach ma nyaka nene pok akumogigo." 
Ezekiel5:10 Kuom mano, wuone nocham nyithindgi, to nyithindo bende nocham wuonegi Jerusalem." 
Ezekiel5:11 “An Ruoth Nyasaye mangima, akuong’ora kama: Kaka usedwanyo Hekalu mara gi timbeu mamono kendo makuero, omiyo ok nang’wonnu, to anatieku atieka, mak akechou." 
Ezekiel5:12 Achiel kuom adek mar jou, tuo gi kech nonegi Jerusalem, to achiel kuom adek machielo ligangla ema nonegi e alwora mar dala. Achiel kuom adek modong’ to anake e tung’ piny gi tung’ piny, ka alawogi gi ligangla." 
Ezekiel5:13 To ka asetieko kumou gi mirimba mager kamano, mi achulonu kuor, to mirimba noto, mi abed gi kue mos. Bang’e unung’e ni an Ruoth Nyasaye ema asewuoyo kodu ka chunya lit nikech useweya." 
Ezekiel5:14 Anami ubed oganda mojwang’ kendo mokwedi, mi ogendini mokiewo kodu kod ji duto makadho nonyieru, ka goyonu siboi." 
Ezekiel5:15 Adier, ka akumou malit gi mirimba mager to unubed gima ichayo, kendo miyanyo, bende unubed puonj malich ni ogendini mokiewo kodu. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano" 
Ezekiel5:16 Anatiek chiembu, mondo kech onegu, mana ka gima achielou gi asere motimo kwiri" 
Ezekiel5:17 Anaol kech gi ondiegi kuomu, mi tiek nyithindu, bende anakel tuo gi lweny kod chuero remo e pinyu, mondo onegu. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano.”" 
Ezekiel6:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho kama: 
Ezekiel6:2 “Wuod dhano, rang gode mag Israel, mondo inyisgi wachna niya," 
Ezekiel6:3 ‘Un gode mag Israel, chikuru itu, uwinj weche ma an Ruoth Nyasaye ema awachonu. Anyisou, un gode madongo gi matindo kod hohni gi holni ni akelo lweny kuomu, mabiro ketho kuonde ma ji lamoe nyiseche manono." 
Ezekiel6:4 Kendeu mag misango ibiro jwang’o, kendo gik ma iwang’oe ubani ibiro turo, mi ji duto man kuondego noneg mana e nyim nyisechegi manonogo." 
Ezekiel6:5 Anabol ringre jo-Israel moketho e nyim nyisechegi manono, kendo anake chokegi kuonde duto ma gitimoe misango." 
Ezekiel6:6 Mier madongo duto mag Israel nomuki, kendo kuonde moting’ore ma gilamoe nyiseche manono bende nokethi, mondo kendegi gi nyisechegi manono oketh matindotindo, kaachiel gi gik ma giwang’oe ubani, kendo gik moko duto mane giloso nolal nono." 
Ezekiel6:7 Ka jou ma otony oneno kinego ji kuomgi kamano to gining’e ni an e Ruoth Nyasaye.’ 
Ezekiel6:8 “Anawe jomoko otony mak onegi, mi nakegi e pinje mamoko." 
Ezekiel6:9 To ginipara kuonde motergie e tuechgo mi ging’e ni ne asekumogi mana ni mondo wigi okuodi, nikech chunygi marach oseweya, mi gihero nyiseche manono moloya. Ginichare kendgi nikech timbe maricho kendo makuodo wich ma gisetimo." 
Ezekiel6:10 Kamano gining’e ni an e Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo ni siem mane asiemogigo ne ok mar oyuma!”" 
Ezekiel6:11 Ruoth Nyasaye wacho niya, “Chwaduru lwetu kedo gouru tiendu piny kuywak malit nikech timbe makuero kod gik mamono duto ma jo-Israel osetimo. Kech gi tuoche biro negogi, kendo gibiro tho e lweny." 
Ezekiel6:12 Joma ni kuonde maboyo, tuo ema noneg, to man machiegni notho e lweny. Mago modong’ to kech ema nonegi. Kamano anakumgi gi mirimba mager." 
Ezekiel6:13 Bang’e ringre joma otho noriere e kind nyisechegi manono, but kendegi mag misango, ewi gode matindo gi madongo, kendo e bwo yien duto motimo otiep, ma tiende ni kuonde duto mane giwang’oe ubani mang’ue ng’ar ni nyisechegi. Eka ng’ato ka ng’ato nong’e ni an e Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Ezekiel6:14 Adier, anarie bada kuomgi mi aketh pinygi ka aloke thim, chakre piny motwo ma yo milambo, nyaka dala mar Ribla man yo nyandwat, ma ok aweyo kamoro ma jo-Israel odakie mak aketho. Bang’e ji duto nong’e ni kara an e Ruoth Nyasaye.”" 
Ezekiel7:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nowachona niya," 
Ezekiel7:2 “Wuod dhano, ma e gima an Ruoth Nyasaye awacho ni piny Israel: Giko mar pinyu ochopo!" 
Ezekiel7:3 Un jo-Israel, giko osechopo, mabiro kumoue gi mirimba mager kuom gik ma usetimo. Abiro chulou maromre gi timbeu makuero," 
Ezekiel7:4 ka ok akechou kata ka ok ang’wononu. To anakumu kuom timbe modwanyore musetimo, eka unung’e ni kara an e Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Ezekiel7:5 “An Ruoth Nyasaye awacho kama: Koro masiche mang’eny biro makou. 
Ezekiel7:6 Gik moko duto orumo! Giko osechopo! Adier, osepoyou, mi urumo!" 
Ezekiel7:7 Masira osebironu un joma odak e pinyni. Kinde mar mor muyudo kuondeu moting’ore mag lemo ema orumo, to nditi kende ema nitie." 
Ezekiel7:8 Piyopiyo nono abiro olo kuomu mirimba duto mager. Anang’adnu bura mana maromre gi timbeu, mi akumu kuom gik makuero duto musetimo." 
Ezekiel7:9 Ok anakechu kata ok anang’uonnu, to anakumu kuom timbe makuero musetimo. Eka unung’e ni an e Ruoth Nyasaye ma jakum ji." 
Ezekiel7:10 “Odiechieng’ masiche osechopo! Sunga gi timbe ma ok ni kare osemedore. 
Ezekiel7:11 Timbe mahundu bende osemedore marach, to onge joricho mabiro dong’. Mwandugi kod duong’gi bende biro rumo." 
Ezekiel7:12 Kindeno biro! Adier, ndalono sudo machiegni! Jong’iewo gi joloko ok onego obed mamor, bende ok onego giywagre, nikech mirimb Nyasaye ni kuomgi giduto." 
Ezekiel7:13 Joloko ok nochak oyud gik ma giseloko. Osekor wach marach kuomgi, kendo wachno ok nolokre! Joma timbegi mono ok nyal dak!”" 
Ezekiel7:14 Tung’ ywak, kendo ji duto ikore, to onge ng’ama dhi e lweny, nikech mirimb Ruoth Nyasaye biro lwar kuom ji duto machalre." 
Ezekiel7:15 Lweny gore oko, to tuo kod kech nie mier. Ng’ato ka ng’ato man oko biro tho e lweny. Joma nie mier to tuo gi kech biro nego." 
Ezekiel7:16 Kata ka moko notony mi dhi e gode, ka akuche maluor, to ginitho kuro nikech richogi." 
Ezekiel7:17 Lwet ji duto nowengni, kendo chongegi nokirni." 
Ezekiel7:18 Ginirwak piende gugru, kendo kibaji nogogi marach. Wigi noliel, mi giduto giyud wichkuot." 
Ezekiel7:19 Giniwit dhahapgi kod fethgi e wang’yore, mana ka yugi, nikech dhahabu kata fedha ok nokonygi chieng’ mirimb Nyasaye. Adier, mwandugo ok nonegnigi kech, bende ok noyieng’gi, nimar mwandugo ema ne oterogi e richo." 
Ezekiel7:20 Ne gisungore gi kite ma nengogi tek, mane gilosogo nyiseche manono makuero. Mano ema omiyo Ruoth Nyasaye nomiyo mwandugi othing’ogi." 
Ezekiel7:21 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho niya, “Abiro miyo jopinje mamoko yakgi, mi joma timbegi richo maketho chik nomagi mwandugi duto, mi dwany." 
Ezekiel7:22 Kata ka jomecho odonjo e Hekalu mara mahero, modwanyo mi obet mogak, to ok anatim gimoro." 
Ezekiel7:23 “Losuru ni joga nyoroche, nikech nek opong’o piny, kendo mier otimo mahundu lilo." 
Ezekiel7:24 Omiyo abiro kelo ogendini marichoe moloyo mondo okaw miechu. Abiro tieko sunga jou marateke, mi ami ogendini keth kuondeu mag lemo." 
Ezekiel7:25 Kibaji biro goyou mi unumany kue, to ok unuyudi." 
Ezekiel7:26 Masiche mathoth nomaku, kendo weche maricho kende ema unuwinji. Unugomb jonabi mondo onyisu gik mabiro timore, to ok unuyudi. Jodolo bende ok nobed gi gima gipuonjo ji." 
Ezekiel7:27 Ruoth noywagi, kendo jotelo chunygi nonyosre. Ji duto kihondko nomaki mi tetni. Anakumu mana maromre gi gik moko duto ma usetimo, kendo anang’adnu bura mana kaka useng’ado ni joma moko. Kamano unung’e ni an e Ruoth Nyasaye.”" 
Ezekiel8:1 Chieng’ due abich, due mar auchiel, e higa mar auchiel koseterwa e tuech, ne oyudo abet e oda gi jodong Juda kapenjo Nyasaye wach. Ne apo ka teko mar Ruoth Nyasaye obiro kuoma." 
Ezekiel8:2 Ne ating’o wang’a, mi aneno gima chalo gi dhano. Chakre e nungone kadok piny ne otimo mach, to chakre e nungone kadok malo ne mil ka mula moywe." 
Ezekiel8:3 Ne orieyo gima chalo gi lwedo, mi omaka gi yie wiya. E fwenyno. Roho noting’a malo e kor polo, mi otera Jerusalem, moketa piny e dhoranga laru maiye mar Hekalu mochomo yo nyandwat, kuma nitie nyasaye manono ma Nyasaye mon-go." 
Ezekiel8:4 Ne aneno duong’ maler mar Nyasach Israel kanyo, mana kaka ne asenene e fweny mane aneno e holo cha." 
Ezekiel8:5 Ruoth Nyasaye nowachona niya, “Wuod dhano, rang yo nyandwat.” Ne arango kuno, mi aneno nyasaye manono ma Ruoth Nyasaye mon-go, kobet yo nyandwat mar kendo-mar-misango manie dhorangach." 
Ezekiel8:6 Ruoth Nyasaye nomedo wachona niya, “Wuod dhano, bende ineno gik makuero ma jo-Israel timo mondo oriemba adhi mabor gi Hekalu mara? To pod ibiro mana neno gik maricho moloyo mago!”" 
Ezekiel8:7 Ne otera e dhoranga laru, mi onyisa kor ot kama otuchi." 
Ezekiel8:8 Ne owacho niya, “Wuod dhano, muk kor ot ka.” Ne amuke, mi apo ka ayudo dhoot." 
Ezekiel8:9 Nowachona ni, “Donji, ine gik makuero kendo modwanyore ma gitimo kanyo.”" 
Ezekiel8:10 Kuom mano, nadonjo mi aneno ka kor udi ogorie gik mamol kod le mang’eny ma chik okwero, kaachiel gi nyiseche manono mamoko duto mane jo-Israel lamo." 
Ezekiel8:11 Jodong Israel piero abiriyo ne ni kanyo, ka Jaazania wuod Shafan nie diergi. Moro ka moro noting’o gima iwang’oe ubani, ka ubani dum iro." 
Ezekiel8:12 Ruoth Nyasaye nopenja niya, “Wuod dhano, bende ineno gik ma jodong Israel timo kama opondo kae? Ng’ato ka ng’ato lemo mana e od nyasache manono. Giwuondore niya, ‘Ruoth Nyasaye ok newa! Osejwango pinyni.’ ”" 
Ezekiel8:13 Bang’e Ruoth Nyasaye nowachona niya, “Pod ibiro neno kakaa gitimo gik modwanyore moloyo kata mago!”" 
Ezekiel8:14 Eka ne otera e dhorangach man yo nyandwat, mi onyisa mon maywago nyasaye moro miluongo ni Tamuz." 
Ezekiel8:15 Ne openja niya, “Wuod dhano, bende ineno mano? To pod ibiro neno koda ka gik makuero maricho moloyo mano!”" 
Ezekiel8:16 Eka ne otera e laru maiye mar Hekalu, kuma ne nitie ji piero ariyo gabich but dhoranga Hekalu, e kind kendo-mar-misango gi kama ikadhoe. Ne giseloko dieng’egi ni Kama Ler, ka gikulore koma ochomo yo wuok chieng’, kendo gilamo chieng’ mawuok gokinyi." 
Ezekiel8:17 Ruoth Nyasaye nopenja niya, “Wuod dhano, donge ineno mano? Timbe makuero ma isenenogo pok oromo jo-Judagi koso, ma pod gimedoe mana pong’o piny gi timbe mahunduni, ka gimedo miyago mirima? Neye kaka giyanya marach moloyo!" 
Ezekiel8:18 Abiro kumogi gi mirimba mager, ka ok ang’wononigi, kata ka ok akechogi. Kata da bed ni gilama matek manade, to ok anadewgi.”" 
Ezekiel9:1 Bang’e ne awinjo Nyasaye ka kok niya, “Un joma dhi kumo Jerusalem, biuru kaeri kuting’o gi lwenjeu.”" 
Ezekiel9:2 Piyopiyo nono, ji auchiel nothinyre e dhorangach maoko mar Hekalu mochomo yo nyandwat, ka ng’ato ka ng’ato oting’o gi lweny. Kuomgi kanyo ne nitie ng’ato morwako lewni mabeyo, kendo oting’o kalam gi kalatas. Giduto ne gibiro, mi gichung’ but kendo-mar-misango mar mula." 
Ezekiel9:3 Eka duong’ maler mar Nyasach Israel nodum moa kuom malaika miluongo ni kerubi, mi odhi e dhood Hekalu. Ruoth Nyasaye noluongo ng’at mane orwako lewni mabeyo cha," 
Ezekiel9:4 mowachone niya, “Dhiyo, iwuothi e Jerusalem duto, iket kido e lela wang’ ng’ato ka ng’ato ma chunye lit kendo maywagore nikech gik moko duto makuero matimore e dalani.”" 
Ezekiel9:5 To bende ne awinjo ka Nyasaye wacho ni ji auchiel ka niya, “Luwuru bang’ ng’atno kamoro amora modhiye e dala duto, kendo neguru ji, kik uwe kata ng’at achiel, bende kik ukechgi." 
Ezekiel9:6 Neguru joma dongo gi joma tindo, chwo gi mon, mine gi nyithindo, to kik umul ng’ato ang’ata man gi kido e lela wang’e. To chakuru timo kamano mana gie Hekalu mara.” Omiyo ne gichako mana gi jodongo mane ochung’ e Hekalu." 
Ezekiel9:7 Bang’e Nyasaye nowachonigi niya, “Dwanyuru Hekalu mondo obed mogak, kudhuro ringre joma otho e lerni mage. Koro wuoguru uchak tich.” Kamano ne giwuok mi gichako nego ji e dala mar Jerusalem." 
Ezekiel9:8 To kane oyudo ginego ji kamano, ne adong’ kanyo kenda, mi apodho piny auma, ka aywak niya, “A Ruoth Nyasaye, bende ditiek jo-Israel duto modong’, kikumo Jerusalem gi mirimbi mager?”" 
Ezekiel9:9 Nyasaye nodwoka niya, “Jo-Israel kod jo-Juda josetimo richo madongo ahinya. Gisenego ji mathoth e pinyni, mi gipong’o Jerusalem gi timbe maricho. Giwacho niya, ‘Ruoth Nyasaye osejwang’o pinywani. Ok onewa!’" 
Ezekiel9:10 Omiyo koro ok anawe ng’ato kata achiel, bende ok anakechgi.”" 
Ezekiel9:11 Bang’e ng’at mane orwako lewni mabeyo cha ne oduongo ir Ruoth Nyasaye, mowacho niya, “Asetimo gik moko duto mane ichika.”" 
Ezekiel10:1 Ne arango gik ma oyarore mane ni ewi gik mangima miluongo ni kerubigo, mi aneno gimoro e wiye machalo kom duong’ molos gi kidi ma nengone tek miluongo ni safir." 
Ezekiel10:2 Nyasaye nowacho ni ng’at mane orwako lewni mabeyo cha niya, “Dhiyo e kind tiende mawirore manie bwo kerubi, mondo ijow mach gi lweti. Bang’e ike majno e dala Jerusalem duto.” Eka ng’atno nodhi, ka aneno." 
Ezekiel10:3 Kane odonjo kuno, ne oyudo ka kerubi ochung’ yo milambo mar Hekalu, ka bor polo opong’o laru ma iye mar Hekalu." 
Ezekiel10:4 Duong’ maler mar Ruoth Nyasaye nosewuok moa e wi kerubi, mi odhi e dhood Hekalu. Eka bor polo nopong’o Hekalu, kendo duong’ maler mar Ruoth Nyasaye ne rieny e laru." 
Ezekiel10:5 Kane buombe kerubigo kwadhore, to winjore koda ka e laru maoko mar Hekalu, mana ka dwond Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto." 
Ezekiel10:6 Ruoth Nyasaye ne onyiso jal mane orwako lewni mabeyo cha mondo ojow mach e kind tiende mane nie bwo kerubi, eka ng’atno nodhi mochung’ e bath tielo achiel." 
Ezekiel10:7 Achiel kuom kerubigo notero lwete e mach mane nie kindgi, mi okwanyo moko, moketo e lwet ng’at mane orwako lewni mabeyono. Ng’atno nokawo majno, mi oa." 
Ezekiel10:8 Ne aneno ni kerubi ka kerubi nigi lwedo machalo gi lwet dhano e bwo buom ka buom. 
Ezekiel10:9 Bende ne aneno ni nitie tielo achiel achiel e bath kerubi ka kerubi, kendo tiendego ne mil ka kite ma nengogi tek." 
Ezekiel10:10 Ne gichalre giduto, kendo tielo ka tielo ne nigi tielo machielo mochung’ e chunye ariwa." 
Ezekiel10:11 Kane kerubigo dhiyo kamoro, to ne gidhi adhiya mak gilokore. Giduto ne giwuotho kaachiel, ka gichomo kuma gidwaro dhiye ma ok gilokore ngang’." 
Ezekiel10:12 Dendgi gi dieng’egi gi luetegi kod buombegi, kaachiel gi tiendego, ne nigi wenge mang’eny man gi teko mar neno." 
Ezekiel10:13 Tiendego ne gin mana mago mane aneno e fweny mokwongo. 
Ezekiel10:14 Kerubi ka kerubi ne nigi lela wang’e ang’wen. Mokwongo ne chalo gi lela wang’ rwath, to mar ariyo ne chalo gi lela wang’ dhano. Mar adek to ne chalo gi lela wang’ sibuor, kendo mar ang’wen ne chalo gi lela wang’ ongo." 
Ezekiel10:15 Kerubigo e gik mangima mane aneno e bath aora Kebar kande. Ne gidum e kor yamo. 
Ezekiel10:16 Kane gidhi, to tiendego ne dhi kodgi, bende kane giyaro buombegi mondo gihu, to tiendego bende pod ne dhi adhiya kodgi." 
Ezekiel10:17 Kane gichung’, to tiendego bende ochung’, to kane gihuyo, to tiendego bende dhi kodgi, nimar kerubigo ema ne chiko tiendego." 
Ezekiel10:18 Bang’e duong’ maler mar Ruoth Nyasaye ne oa e dhood Hekalu, mi odhi ewi kerubigo malo." 
Ezekiel10:19 Ne giyaro buombego mi gidum ka arangogi, mi aneno ka tiendego dhi kodgi. Ne gichung’ e dhoranga Hekalu ma yo wuokchieng’, ka duong’ maler mar Nyasach Israel nie wigi malo." 
Ezekiel10:20 Ne ang’eyo ni gin e gik mangima mane aneno e bath aora Kebar, koting’o Nyasach Israel kobet e komduong’ne." 
Ezekiel10:21 Kerubi ka kerubi ne nigi lela wenge ang’wen gi buombe ang’wen kod gima chalo gi lwet dhano e bwo buom ka buom. 
Ezekiel10:22 Lela wengego e lela wenge mane aseneno e bath aora Kebar. Kerubi ka kerubi ne ochiko mana nyime tir, mak obaro." 
Ezekiel11:1 Roho ne oting’a malo, motera e dho Hekalu man yo wuok chieng’. Ne aneno ji piero ariyo gabich e bath dhorangach kanyo. Ji ariyo kuomgi ne Jaazania wuod Azur kod Pelatia wuod Benaya, ma jotelo mag oganda." 
Ezekiel11:2 Nyasaye nowachona niya, “In wuod dhano, magi e joma timbegi manono, makelo koko kod weche maricho e dalani." 
Ezekiel11:3 Giwacho ni, ‘Donge ma e kinde maber mar gero udi, nikech dala Jerusalem chalo gi agulu, kendo wan wapondo e iye ka ring’o man e agulu?’" 
Ezekiel11:4 Koro wuod dhano, kwergi matek.”" 
Ezekiel11:5 Roho mar Nyasaye nolor kuoma, mi Ruoth Nyasaye nowachona mondo anyis jo-Israel niya, “Ang’eyo gima uwacho, bende ang’eyo gik ma uparo e chunyu." 
Ezekiel11:6 Usenego ji mang’eny ahinya e dala ka, mi wang’yore opong’ gi ringre joma otho." 
Ezekiel11:7 Kuom mano, gima an Ruoth Nyasaye awachonu e ma: Ayie ni dalani biro bedo agulu muwachono, to ang’o ma nobed ring’o? Donge mana ringre joma unegogo? Un to abiro riembou oko e dala!" 
Ezekiel11:8 Ang’eyo ni uluoro lweny, to lweny muluorono ema abiro kelonu." 
Ezekiel11:9 Abiro riembou oko e dala, mi abolu e lwet jopinje mamoko. Aseng’adonu buch tho," 
Ezekiel11:10 omiyo ibiro negou e lweny mana e pinyu uwegi mi ji duto nong’e ni an e Ruoth Nyasaye. 
Ezekiel11:11 Ooyo, dalani ok nobed agulu mupondoe, kendo un ok nubed ring’o manie iye. Abiro kumou kamoro amora ma untie e pinyu, eka unung’e ni an e Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Ezekiel11:12 Anakumu kamano nikech ok userito chikena kata luwo yorena, to usemana luwo chike mag ogendini mamoko mokiewo kodu.”" 
Ezekiel11:13 Kane pod akoro wach kamano, ne apo ka Pelatia wuod Benaya ogore piny motho mana gi kanyono. Ne apodho piny auma, mi akok ni, “Yaye Ruoth Nyasaye! Bende inyalo nego jo-Israel modong’ adier!”" 
Ezekiel11:14 Ruoth Nyasaye nowachona niya," 
Ezekiel11:15 “In wuod dhano, joma odak Jerusalem wuoyo kuomi kendo kuom jou ma jo-Israel duto manie tuech, kawacho niya, ‘Joma nie tuech oter mabor ahinya, kama ok ginyal lamo Ruoth Nyasaye, to bende wan ema Ruoth Nyasaye osemiyowa pinyni.’" 
Ezekiel11:16 To koro in Ezekiel, nyis jou moter e tuech ni an Ruoth Nyasaye, awacho ni kata obedo ni ne akeyogi e pinje mamoko mondo gidag e kind ogendini man maboyo, to kindeni ayie mondo gilama e pinje ma gintiego." 
Ezekiel11:17 Kuom mano, nyisgi ni an Ruoth Nyasaye awacho ni abiro chokogi kagologi e pinje mane akeyogie, kendo abiro dwokonigi piny Israel." 
Ezekiel11:18 Ka gisedwogo to giniwit nyiseche manono ma giyudo kuno, kendo giniwe timbegi makuero." 
Ezekiel11:19 Anagol kuomgi chuny matek ka lwanda ma gin-go, mi amigi chuny manyien mar luora. Adier, anamigi chuny malong’o." 
Ezekiel11:20 Bang’e ginirit chikena, kendo giniluw yorena duto, ka giketo chunygi. Ginibed joga, an to anabed Nyasachgi." 
Ezekiel11:21 To anakum joma oketo chunygi kuom timbegi makuero, kendo kuom lamo nyiseche manono, mana maromre gi gik ma gisetimo. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano.”" 
Ezekiel11:22 Kerubi ne oyaro buombene mi ohuyo, ka tiende machalo gi mag garigo ni e bathgi, kendo ka duong’ maler mar Nyasach Israel ni malo e wigi." 
Ezekiel11:23 Eka duong’ maler mar Ruoth Nyasaye noa e dala Jerusalem, modhi ochung’ ewi got man yo wuok chieng’." 
Ezekiel11:24 Ne aneno e fweny ka Roho oting’a, mi odwoka Babulon ir joma nie tuech. Bang’e fwenyno nolalna nono." 
Ezekiel11:25 Ne anyiso joma noter e tuech gik moko duto mane Ruoth Nyasaye osenyisa. 
Ezekiel12:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nowachona niya," 
Ezekiel12:2 “In wuod dhano, idak e kind joma jopiem. Gin gi wenge to ok ginyal neno gimoro, bende gin gi it, to ok ginyal winjo wach, nikech gin joma wigi tek." 
Ezekiel12:3 “Koro in wuod dhano, tue misigo mana ka ng’at maringo tony e lweny, mondo ichak iwuoth mana godiechieng’. Nyaka iwe ji duto neni kiwuok idhi kamoro machielo. Ka gineno kidhi kamano, to kamoro dipo ka gineno ni gin joma jopiem." 
Ezekiel12:4 Tue misigo mana ka misik ng’at ma itero e tuech nyaka itim kamano mana godiechieng’ ka gineni, to kochopo odhiambo, to we gine kiwuok ka ng’ama omak, itero e tuech. To yo ma onego iwuoggo ema:" 
Ezekiel12:5 Pow otuch e kor odi mana ka pod gineni, kendo iwuog e otuchno, kiting’o misiki." 
Ezekiel12:6 We mondo gineni ka iketo misigo e goki, kendo ichakgo wuoth ka piny olil, kiumo wang’i ma ok inyal neno kuma idhiye. Gima itimono biro bedo siem ni jo-Israel.”" 
Ezekiel12:7 Ne atimo kaka Ruoth Nyasaye ne onyisa, mana godiechieng’no. Ne atueyo misigo mana ka ng’ama ringo tony e lweny, kendo kane piny oyuso, ne atucho kor oda gi lweta, mi aketo misika e goka, eka awuok gi e otuch, mana ka ji nena." 
Ezekiel12:8 Kinyne gokinyi, Ruoth Nyasaye nowuoyo koda, kapenja niya," 
Ezekiel12:9 “Wuod dhano, donge jo-Israel ma jopiemgi osepenji gima itimo?" 
Ezekiel12:10 Nyisgi ni an Ruoth Nyasaye awacho kama: Fweny ma anyisono wuoyo kuom jaduong’ ma jatend Jerusalem, kaachiel gi ji duto modak kuno." 
Ezekiel12:11 Nyisgi bende ni gima isetimono en ranyisi mar gima biro timorenigi. Enomakgi mi tergi e tuech. 
Ezekiel12:12 Jaduong’ ma jatendgi noting’ misike e goke ka piny olil, kendo noring otony, kowuok gi e otuch ma gipowone e ohinga. Enoum wang’e, kendo ok none kuma odhiye." 
Ezekiel12:13 Anayar tonda, mi amakego. Bang’e anatere e dala mar Babulon e piny jo-Kaldea, kuma enothoye ka ok oneno dalano gi wang’e." 
Ezekiel12:14 Eka anake jodonge kaachiel gi joma ng’adone rieko kod joma rite kuonde duto, mi ji nodwargi mondo oneggi." 
Ezekiel12:15 “Ka asekeyogi e kind ogendini kendo e pinje man maboyo kamano, eka gining’e ni an e Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Ezekiel12:16 Anawe moko manok kuomgi tony e lweny, kendo e kech gi tuoche, mondo kuonde ma gintie e kind ogendini, ging’e ni timbegi osebedo modwanyore kendo ging’e ni an e Ruoth Nyasaye.”" 
Ezekiel12:17 Ruoth Nyasaye nowachona bende niya," 
Ezekiel12:18 “Wuod dhano, ka ichiemo kata ka imodho pi, to nyaka itetni ka gima kibaji ogoyi." 
Ezekiel12:19 Nyis ogandaa duto ni an Ruoth Nyasaye awacho kama: Jo-Jerusalem ma pod odak e piny Israel biro tetni ka chiemo kata ka modho pi. Pinygi noyaki, mi dong’ nono, nikech timbe mahundu mag ji duto modak kuno osebet mang’eny." 
Ezekiel12:20 Mier ma tinde ji opong’o nokethi, mi pinyno lokre thim. Eka gining’e ni an e Ruoth Nyasaye.”" 
Ezekiel12:21 Wach Ruoth Nyasaye nochako obirona niya," 
Ezekiel12:22 “Wuod dhano, ere gima omiyo jo-Israel goyo ngero niya, ‘Ndalo kadho mathoth, to weche mikoro ok timre.’" 
Ezekiel12:23 To nyisgi ni an Ruoth Nyasaye awacho kama: Abiro tieko ngerono chuth, mi ok nochak ogoye e Israel kendo. Bende nyisgi ni kinde osechopo ma gik moko duto mane okor biro timore adier!" 
Ezekiel12:24 Fweny mag miriambo kata koro wach mawito ji ok nochak obed e Israel kendo," 
Ezekiel12:25 nimar an Ruoth Nyasaye anawuo kodgi, kendo gima awacho notimre ma ok odeko ngang’. Un joma jopiemgi, unune gi wang’u ka pod ungima, ka atimo gima nasesiemou ni natim. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano.”" 
Ezekiel12:26 Ruoth Nyasaye nochako owachona niya," 
Ezekiel12:27 “Wuod dhano, jo-Israel paro ni fweny mineno kod weche mikoro ok bi timore e ndalogi, to ni ginitimre mana bang’e achien." 
Ezekiel12:28 To onge wachna moro ma nodeki ngang’, kendo ni gima asewacho notimre mak orem. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano.”" 
Ezekiel13:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nowachona niya," 
Ezekiel13:2 “Wuod dhano, kwed jonabi mag Israel, kendo nyis joma koro mana wechegi giwegigo ni mondo giwinj wachna." 
Ezekiel13:3 An Ruoth Nyasaye awacho kama: Joma koro weche mag miriambo none malit! Ok giseneno fweny moro, to giwacho mana gima chunygi ema paro." 
Ezekiel13:4 Yaye, jo-Israel, jonabi mau chalo mana gi bwe modak e mier mowe gundni." 
Ezekiel13:5 Ok gidhi mondo gilos kuonde ma ohinga omukoree e piny Israel, omiyo ok ubi siro lweny, chieng’ Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Ezekiel13:6 Fweny ma gineno ok gin madier, kendo gikoro weche mag miriambo. Giwacho ni wechego gin weche Ruoth Nyasaye, to an ne ok aorogi. To eka pod giparo ni gik ma gikoro biro timore!" 
Ezekiel13:7 An to awachonigi niya, ‘Fweny muneno ok gin madier, kendo weche ma ukoro gin miriambo. Uwacho ni gin wechena, to an pok awuoyo kodu.’" 
Ezekiel13:8 “Kuom mano, an Ruoth Nyasaye awachonigi kama: “Amon kodu nikech wecheu gin miriambo, kendo fweny ma uneno ok gin madier." 
Ezekiel13:9 Achiegni kumou, un jonabi maneno fweny ma ok adier, kendo ma koro weche mag miriambo. Ok unubed e chokruok mar joga, kendo nyingu ok nondik kaachiel gi nying jo-Israel mamoko, bende ok unuchak udog e pinyu, mi unung’e ni an e Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Ezekiel13:10 “Jonabi wuondo joga, kanyisogi ni gik moko duto dhi maber, to kara gik moko ok dhi maber ngang’! Joga osegero ohinga mayomyom, to jonabi osebiro, momwone." 
Ezekiel13:11 Omiyo nyis jomwonogo ni ohinga biro podho. Abiro hono koth maduong’, kendo pe madongodongo biro goye, bende yamb ahiti biro uke." 
Ezekiel13:12 Kamano ohinga nopodhi, kendo ng’ato ka ng’ato nopenj jomuonogo ni, ‘Koro ere gima muonou osetimo?’ ”" 
Ezekiel13:13 Koro Ruoth Nyasaye wacho niya, “Abiro kelo yamb ahiti, ka an gi mirima mager, mi koth maduong’ kod pe madongodongo noketh ohingano chuth." 
Ezekiel13:14 Abiro muko ohinga mane gimwonono, mi lal nono, kendo mise mare dong’ e lela. Enopodh kuomu, mi onegu. Bang’e ji duto nong’e ni an e Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Ezekiel13:15 “Kamano anaketh ohinga, kendo anakum joma ne omwone, ka an gi mirima mager. Eka anawachnu niya, ‘Ohinga oserumo, kaachiel gi joma ne omwone." 
Ezekiel13:16 Gin e joma ne owuondo jo-Jerusalem ni gik moko duto dhi maber, to kara gik moko ok dhi maber ngang’. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano.’ ”" 
Ezekiel13:17 Ruoth Nyasaye nomedo wachona niya, “In wuod dhano, neye nyiu makoro weche mag miriambo. Kwed gima gitimono," 
Ezekiel13:18 kinyisogi ni, an Ruoth Nyasaye awacho kama: Un mon, unune malit! Utwang’o ris e lwet ji duto, kendo uloso kitembni mutwang’oe yath, mondo ji oumgo wigi, eka gibed gi teko mar tieko ngima ji. To bende uparo ni ayie mondo ubed gi teko mar nego ji kata mar resogi mondo uyudgo ohala?" 
Ezekiel13:19 Useketho nyinga kuom joga mana ni mondo uyud cham moko sanja, kod makati matin. Unego joma ok owinjore negi. Mano e kaka uwuondo joga moyie gi wecheu mag miriambogo." 
Ezekiel13:20 “Emomiyo, an Ruoth Nyasaye awacho kama: Amon gi ris ma utueyo e ng’ut lwedo mondo uhimgo ji. Abiro chodogi oko e lwetu, mondo uwe joma utemo mako otony ka winyo." 
Ezekiel13:21 Bende abiro yiecho kitembnigo matindotindo, mondo ares joga oa e tekou chuth. Eka unung’e ni an e Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Ezekiel13:22 “Unyoso chuny joma kare gi miriambo, to an ok adwar mondo unyos chunygi. Bende ujiwo chuny joma timbegi mono, mi gidagi weyo timbegi mamonogo, mondo gires ngimagi." 
Ezekiel13:23 Kuom mano ok nuchak une fweny mag miriambo, kata koro weche ma wito ji! Abiro reso joga e tekou, mondo ung’e ni an e Ruoth Nyasaye.”" 
Ezekiel14:1 Jodong Israel moko nobiro ira mondo openja wach Ruoth Nyasaye. 
Ezekiel14:2 Eka Ruoth Nyasaye nowuoyo koda," 
Ezekiel14:3 kawachona niya, “Wuod dhano, jogi oketo chunygi kuom lamo nyiseche manono, kendo giyie mondo nyisechego otergi e richo. Koro ere kaka giparo ni anyalo dwokogi?" 
Ezekiel14:4 “Omiyo nyisgi ni an Ruoth Nyasaye awacho kama: An awuon ema nadwok ng’ato ang’ata ma ja-Israel moketo chunye kuom lamo nyiseche manono, kendo oyie mondo nyisechego otere e richo, to pod eka biro mondo openj janabi wach! Anadwoke dwok ma oromo gi lamo nyiseche mang’eny manonogo!" 
Ezekiel14:5 Kamano ageno ni kum ma abiro kumogigo biro miyo giduogo ira, kata obedo ni giseweya ka gilamo nyiseche manonogo." 
Ezekiel14:6 “Kuom mano, koro nyis jo-Israel ni an Ruoth Nyasaye awacho kama: Duoguru ira mondo uwe nyisecheu manono kod timbeu modwanyorego." 
Ezekiel14:7 E kinde duto ma ja-Israel kata japiny moro modak kuom jo-Israel oweya, mi olamo nyiseche manono, kendo oyie nyisechego otere e richo, to eka pod biro mondo openj wach kuom janabi, an awuon ema nadwoke!" 
Ezekiel14:8 Anabed mamon kode, mi atime ranyisi ma asetimogo ji, bende anagole kuom oganda joga, mi ung’e ni an e Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Ezekiel14:9 “Ka gimoro owuondo janabi, mi owacho wach ma ok adier, to an Ruorh Nyasaye ema awuonde, omiyo abiro rieyo bada mondo atieke, oa kuom jo-Israel." 
Ezekiel14:10 Janabi kaachiel gi ng’ama openje wach noyud kum achiel machalre. 
Ezekiel14:11 Kamano jo-Israel ok nochak oweya, ka dwanyore gi richogi. Ginibed joga, kendo an bende nabed Nyasachgi. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano.”" 
Ezekiel14:12 Ruoth Nyasaye nochako owachona niya," 
Ezekiel14:13 “In wuod dhano, ka jopiny moro otimo richo kendo oweya, to anabi, mi aketh chambgi. Anakel kech mondo oneg ji kod jamni machalre." 
Ezekiel14:14 To kata dabed ni ji adek ma Nowa gi Daniel kod Ayub odak kuno, to timbegi makare dires mana ngimagi giwegi kende. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano." 
Ezekiel14:14 To kata dabed ni ji adek ma Nowa gi Daniel kod Ayub odak kuno, to timbegi makare dires mana ngimagi giwegi kende. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano." 
Ezekiel14:15 “Ka akelo ondiegi mi onego ji, kendo piny okethore, ma onge ng’ama nyalo wuothoe," 
Ezekiel14:16 to kata da bed ni ji adekgo odak kuno, to ok digires kata mana nyithindgi giwegi, to ngimagi kende ema digiresi, kendo piny dilokre thim. An Ruoth Nyasaye mangima ema akuong’ora kamano." 
Ezekiel14:17 “Ka akelo lweny mager e piny, motieko ji kod jamni machalre," 
Ezekiel14:18 to kata da bed ni ji adekgo odak kuno, to ok digires kata mana nyithindgi giwegi, to ngimagi kende ema digiresi. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano." 
Ezekiel14:19 “Kata ka akelo tho marach e piny, ka an gi mirima mager, mi anego ji mang’eny kod jamni machalre," 
Ezekiel14:20 to kata da bed ni Nowa gi Daniel kod Ayub odak kuno, to ok digires kata mana nyithindgi. Timbegi makare dires mana ngimagi giwegi kende." 
Ezekiel14:20 to kata da bed ni Nowa gi Daniel kod Ayub odak kuno, to ok digires kata mana nyithindgi. Timbegi makare dires mana ngimagi giwegi kende." 
Ezekiel14:21 “Koro an Ruoth Nyasaye awacho kama: Ka kamano, Jerusalem none malit machal nadi, ka akumogi gi lweny gi kech gi ondiegi kod tho marach, ma gin kumna ang’wen marichoe moloyo, mabiro nego ji kod jamni machalre?" 
Ezekiel14:22 To ka jomoko otony, mi obiro iru gi nyithindgi ma gisereso, to ranggiuru maber ane. Unune ka gin joma timbegi mono, mi unuyie ni kara kum ma akumogo Jerusalem ni kare." 
Ezekiel14:23 Bende ka uneno kaka richogi chalo, to unuyie, mi ung’e ni kara ne akumogi mana e wang’e. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano.”" 
Ezekiel15:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nowachona niya," 
Ezekiel15:2 “Wuod dhano, Ere kaka yadh mzabibu ber moloyo yien mamoko? Koso ere kaka bade ber moloyo bad yath moro amora?" 
Ezekiel15:3 Bende dilos kode gimoro maber? Koso ding’ad bade mi igur e kor ot mondo ong’awie gik moko? 
Ezekiel15:4 Ooyo, ibole mana e mach mondo ochwake. To kosebole e majno kamanoo, mi bathe koni gi koni owang’, kendo kore odong’ korewore, bende pod dilos kode gimoro malong’o?" 
Ezekiel15:5 Kane pok owang’, to onge gima ne inyalo timo kode, to koro kosewang’, mi kore orewore, to dobed maonge tich machal nadi?”" 
Ezekiel15:6 Kuom mano, an Ruoth Nyasaye awacho niya, “Kaka yadh mzabibu itong’oe bungu, kendo ichwako, e kaka abiro kawo jo-Jerusalem mi akum." 
Ezekiel15:7 Kata obedo ni gisetony e mach, to koro mach biro wang’ogi pep. Ka asekumogi kamano, to eka unung’e ni an e Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Ezekiel15:8 Giseweya, omiyo abiro loko pinygi thim. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano.”" 
Ezekiel16:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nochako owuoyo koda, mowachona niya," 
Ezekiel16:2 “Wuod dhano, nyis Jerusalem gik makuero mosetimo," 
Ezekiel16:3 bende nyise ni an Ruoth Nyasaye awacho kama: Ne onywoli e piny Kanaan. Wuoru ne ja-Amor, to meru ne nyar jo-Hiti." 
Ezekiel16:4 Kane onywoli, to onge ng’ama ne ong’ado pendi, kata mane olwoki, kata mane owiri gi chumbi, kata mane oboyi gi nanga." 
Ezekiel16:5 Ooyo, onge ng’ama ne okechi, mi otimoni gigo, to ne owiti mana oko e pap, nikech onge ng’ama ne dwari." 
Ezekiel16:6 “Ne oyudo akadho machiegni gi kama ne intie, mi aneni, kichadhori gi rembi iwuon. Kata obedo ni ne itimo remo kamano, to ne awachoni ni mondo ibed mangima," 
Ezekiel16:7 mi ne amiyo idongo mana ka yath madongo maber. Ne idongo motegno, kendo marabora, mi idoko nyako mopong’. Thundi ne ochung’ maber, kendo yie dendi noseti, to kata kamano ne in duk." 
Ezekiel16:8 “Kane achako akadho machiegni kodi, ne ayudo ka iseromo mako osiep, omiyo ne ayaro lawa, mi aumogo dugi, kendo ne ayie ni abiro kendi. Adier, ne atimo kodi singruok, mi idoko mara. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano." 
Ezekiel16:9 “Ne akawo pi, mi alwokogo remo oko kuomi, kendo ne awiro dendi gi mo." 
Ezekiel16:10 Ne arwaki gi lewni mogorie gik mabeyo, mi amiyi wuoche ma nengogi tek, kaachiel gi kitamba wich maber, kod law arwaka mar las." 
Ezekiel16:11 Bende ne amiyi tigo ma nengone tek, gi ronge mag lwedo, kod thiwni miketo e ng’uti." 
Ezekiel16:12 Ne arwakoni tere e umi, kod stadi e iti, kendo ne amiyi osimbo maber mondo isidh e wiyi." 
Ezekiel16:13 Kamano ne in gi gik mabeyo mag fedha kod mag dhahabu, bende pile ne irwako lewni mabeyo. Ne ichamo kuon molos gi mogo mayomie moloyo, kaachiel gi mor kich kod mor zeituni. Ne ijaber malich, kendo ne ibedo ruoth madhako." 
Ezekiel16:14 Humb berni nolak e pinje dutu, kendo onge nyako moro amora mane oloyi gi ber, nikech an ema ne achueyi kamano. Mano e gima an Ruoth Nyasaye awacho." 
Ezekiel16:15 “To ka ineno ni ijaber ahinya, ne iyie mondo ng’ato ang’ata madwari oterre kodi." 
Ezekiel16:16 Ne ikawo lepi moko ma ilicho kuondeni mag lemo, kendo ne idwanyori gi ji duto kuondego, mana ka dhako ma jachode." 
Ezekiel16:17 Ne ikawo gik mabeyo mag fedha gi dhahabu mane amiyi, mi ilosogo nyiseche manono machwo, kendo idwanyorigo." 
Ezekiel16:18 Bende ne ikawo lewni mogorie gik mabeyo mane amiyi, mirwako ni nyiseche manonogo, kendo ichiwonigi mor zeituni kod ubani mane asemiyi." 
Ezekiel16:19 Ne ikawo mogo mayomie moloyo, kaachiel gi mor zeituni kod mor kich mane asemiyi, mi ichiwo ka misango ni nyiseche manonogo, mondo gibed mamor kodi. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano." 
Ezekiel16:20 “Bang’e ne ikawo yawuowi kod nyiri mane isenywolona, mi ichiwo ka misango ni nyiseche manono. Iparo ni wech mane iweyago ne gima tin," 
Ezekiel16:21 ma pod ne ikawoe mana nyithinda, ichiwo ka misango ni nyiseche manono?" 
Ezekiel16:22 E kinde duto mane itimo timbe maricho mag chode, ne ok iparoe ngang’ ndalo mane in nyathi, ka in duk, kendo ichadhori gi remo.”" 
Ezekiel16:23 To Ruoth Nyasaye ne omedo wacho ni Jerusalem niya, “Inine malit nikech kane isetimo timbe mamonogo duto," 
Ezekiel16:24 to ne igero kuonde milamoe nyiseche manono, kendo mitimoe timbe mag chode." 
Ezekiel16:25 Ne ikawo berni, irucho e buru, mi ichiwo ringri ni ng’ato ang’ata ma dwari, kimedo bedo jachode odiechieng’ kodiechieng’." 
Ezekiel16:26 Bende ne iweyo jo-Misri ma jogombo mokiewo kodi oterre kodi, mi imiya mirima gi timbeni mang’eny mag chodego." 
Ezekiel16:27 “Koro aserieyo bada mondo akumi, kendo amayi gueth mane aguedhigo. Asechiwi e lwet jo-Filistia ma mon kodi, kendo mojok gi timbeni mag dwanyruok." 
Ezekiel16:28 Joma ne isebedo ka idwanyorigo ok oromi, omiyo ne idwanyori gi jo-Asuria, to gin bende ne ok giromi." 
Ezekiel16:29 Ne ichako idhi ir jo-Babulon, ma johala, to gin bende ne ok giromi!" 
Ezekiel16:30 “Koro in dhako ma jachode, an Ruoth Nyasaye awacho kama: Mago duto isetimo mana ka dhako ma jachode ma onge wichkuot, kimiyago mirima." 
Ezekiel16:31 Ne igero kuonde ma ilamoe nyiseche manono e wang’yore duto to kendo itimoe timbe chode. To in ok ikaw pesa, ka mon mamoko ma jochode!" 
Ezekiel16:32 Ichalo dhako ma weyo chwore to terore gi chwo mamoko nono. 
Ezekiel16:33 Dhako ma jachode ichulo pesa. In to, in ema ne ichiwo gik moko ni osiepeni, kendo ne imiyogi asoya mondo giduto gibi giterre kodi." 
Ezekiel16:34 Omiyo in ipogori gi mon moko ma jochode. Onge joma ne dwari mondo ochodi, omiyo kar yudo pesa kuomgi, to in ema ne ichulogi! Kamano ipogori gi mon mamoko ma jochode adier!" 
Ezekiel16:35 “Koro in dhako ma jachode, winji gima an Ruoth Nyasaye awacho." 
Ezekiel16:36 Awacho kama: Ne ilonyori duk, mi ichiwo ringri ka jachode ni osiepeni, kendo ni nyiseche manono makuero. Bende ne inego nyithindi ka misango ni nyiseche manonogo." 
Ezekiel16:37 Mano omiyo abiro choko osiepeni duto, mane ihero kod mane ok ihero, kanyakla. Abiro kelogi duto iri mondo gilwori ka giketi diere, mi olony lepi mondo gine dugi." 
Ezekiel16:38 Anang’adni buch tho ka an gi mirima mager, nikech terruok kod nek mane itimo." 
Ezekiel16:39 Anaketi e teko osiepenigo, mi gimuk kuonde ma itimoe timbe chode, kendo ilamoe nyiseche manono. Ginikaw lepi, kaachiel gi gigi mabeyo mag fedha gi dhahabu, mi giweyi duk sikit." 
Ezekiel16:40 “Ginikelni oganda maduong’, mi chieli gi kite, kendo chadhi matindotindo gi ligangla." 
Ezekiel16:41 Giniwang’ uti, mi gikumi, mana ka mon mang’eny neno. Kamano anatiek timbeni mag chode, mi iwe chiwo gik moko ni osiepeni." 
Ezekiel16:42 Bang’e mirimba noto, kendo nabed gi kue, mi ok nachak akech kodi kendo." 
Ezekiel16:43 Wiyi ne owil gi rit mane aritigo kapod itin, mi iwang’o iya gi gik moko duto mane itimo. Mano emomiyo anakumi moromo gi timbeni duto, nimar ne imedo timbe mag dwanyruok kuom timbe duto makuero ma isetimo! An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano.”" 
Ezekiel16:44 Ruoth Nyasaye ne ochako owacho niya, “Yaye Jerusalem, ji biro goyi ngero kama: ‘Awendo ok we yiere.’" 
Ezekiel16:45 In nyar meru adier adier! Meru ne mon gi chwore kod nyithinde mana kaka isetimo. Bende ichalo gi nyimineni mane mon gi chwogi kod nyithindgi. In, kaachiel gi mier mamoko ma nyimineni, un nyi nyar jo-Hiti to wuoru ne en ja-Amor!" 
Ezekiel16:46 “Nyameru maduong’ en Samaria mane ni yo nyandwat kaachiel gi mier matindo mokiewo kode. To nyameru matin en Sodom, mane ni yo milambo kaachiel gi mier matindo mokiewo kode." 
Ezekiel16:47 Niluwo yoregi, mitimo timbe makuero mane gitimo, to mano ne ok oromi ngang’. Omiyo bang’ kinde matin kende, ne ibedo kitimo gik maricho moloyogi e yore duto." 
Ezekiel16:48 “An Ruoth Nyasaye awacho kama: Kaka an Nyasaye mangima, nyameru Sodom, gi mier matindo mokiewo kode ne ok otimo timbe mamono moromore gi mago ma in kaachiel gi mier matindo mokiewo kodi isetimo!" 
Ezekiel16:49 Sodom kaachiel gi mier matindogo, ne josunga, nikech ne gin gi chiemo mang’eny, kendo ne gidak maber gi kue. To ne ok gikony jochan kaachiel gi joma ok nyal konyore kendgi." 
Ezekiel16:50 Ne gin josunga ma wigi tek, kendo ne gitimo gik ma amon-go, omiyo ne atiekogi, kaka inenono." 
Ezekiel16:51 “Richo mane Samaria otimo ok gimoro, kipimo gi richoni! Ne itimo timbe modwanyore maricho moloye. Timbenigo miyo nyimineni nenore ka joma onge ketho." 
Ezekiel16:52 Kuom mano, koro wichkuot nie wiyi. Richoni dongo ahinya moloyo mag nyimineni, omiyo nyiminenigo nenore ka joma beyo. Emomiyo ting’ ating’a wichkuotni, nimar isemiyo nyimineni nenore ka joma ler!”" 
Ezekiel16:53 Ruoth Nyasaye nochako owacho ni Jerusalem niya, “Abiro miyo Sodom gi Samaria kaachiel gi mier matindo mokiewo kodgi, chak dhi nyime maber. In bende abiro chako amiyo idhi maber." 
Ezekiel16:54 Wiyi biro kuot, kendo wichkuot mabiro makino noduog chuny nyimineni, mi gipar ni gin johawi." 
Ezekiel16:55 Ginichak gidhi maber, kendo in, kaachiel gi mier matindo mokiewo kodi nochak ogeru kendo." 
Ezekiel16:56 Donge ne inyiero Sodom kisungori," 
Ezekiel16:57 e kinde mane timbeni mamono pok oel e lela? Koro ichalo mana kode, kendo joma mon kodi duto mokiewo kodi, kaka jo-Edom kod jo-Filistia, nyieri." 
Ezekiel16:58 Koro nyaka iyud kum ma dhogruokni gi timbeni makuero okelo. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano.” 
Ezekiel16:59 Ruoth Nyasaye nomedo wacho niya, “Abiro timoni mana kaka oromore gi timbeni, nimar ne ichayo winjruok mane wan go, mi ok irito singruok mane itimo koda." 
Ezekiel16:60 An to abiro rito singruok mane atimo kodi kapod itin, kendo abiro timo kodi singruok machielo, mosiko nyaka chieng’." 
Ezekiel16:61 Inipar gik ma isetimo, mi wiyi kuodi, kineno ka nyameru maduong’ gi matin joduogo. Anami gichal nyigi, kata obedo ni ne ok asingora kodi kamano." 
Ezekiel16:62 Abiro chako atimo kodi singruok, mi ining’e ni kara an e Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Ezekiel16:63 Chieng’ ma anapuodh gik maricho duto ma isetimo, eka inipargi, mi wiyi kuodi, ma kata mana loso ok nilosi. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano.”" 
Ezekiel17:1 Ruoth Nyasaye ne owuoyo koda," 
Ezekiel17:2 mowachona niya, “Wuod dhano, nyis jo-Israel ngeroni," 
Ezekiel17:3 mondo ging’e gima an Ruoth Nyasaye adwaro wachonigi: “Ne nitie ongo moro maduong’ ahinya mane nigi buombe madongodongo. Dende duto ne yier mabeyo opong’o. Chieng’ moro ne ohuyo modhi e piny Lebanon, mi ojako wi yadh sida." 
Ezekiel17:4 Ne oting’e, mi otere e piny joohala, mokete e dala maduong’ mar Babulon, ma duke ng’enyie." 
Ezekiel17:5 Bang’e ne okawo yath mapod tin e piny Israel, mi opidho kuno e lowo momew ma pi ng’enyie." 
Ezekiel17:6 Yadhno noloth mi odoko yadh mzabibu mayoreyore gi piny. Bedene ne otimo otiep kochomo kuma ongo nitie, to tiendene nodonjo matut ei lowo. Bedene kaachiel gi pote ne onya mang’eny." 
Ezekiel17:7 “To bende ne nitie ongo moro maduong’ man gi buombe madongodongo, kendo ma yier opong’o dende. Yadh mzabibuno ne otero tiendene gi bedene kochomo kuma ongo machielono nitie, koparo ni ongono biro miye pi mang’eny moloyo mane nie puodho kama nopidheeno." 
Ezekiel17:8 To chutho, yadh mzabibuno ne osepidh e lowo momew ma pi oromo, omiyo ne onyalo golo pote mathoth, kendo onyag olemo, mi obed yath maber ahinya." 
Ezekiel17:9 “Kuom mano, koro an Ruoth Nyasaye, apenjo kama: Bende yadh mzabibuno biro betie, mi dongi? Donge ongo mokwongo cha biro dhuole gi lop tiende, mi lwar olembene piny kendo tur bedene, mi pote wang’? Pudhe oko yot, ma ok nyal dwaro oganda maduong’ kata ng’ama ratego!" 
Ezekiel17:10 En adier ni osepidhe, to bende obiro betie, mi odongi? Donge obiro two ka yamb oro moa yo wuok chieng’ okudhe kama entieno?”" 
Ezekiel17:11 Ruoth Nyasaye nochako owachona niya," 
Ezekiel17:12 “Penj ane joma jopiemgi ka bende ging’eyo tiend ngerono, nyisgi ni ruodh Babulon ne obiro Jerusalem, mi omako ruodh Jerusalem, kaachiel gi jodonge, odokgo Babulon." 
Ezekiel17:13 Ne okawo owadgi ruoth moro, mi otimogo winjruok, komiyo kuong’ore. Joma dongodongo to nokawo, mi otero e tuech," 
Ezekiel17:14 mondo ogandano kik chak ting’re, to mondo obed gi adiera ni winjruok mane otimo ok okethore." 
Ezekiel17:15 To ruodh Juda ne ong’anyo, mi ooro joote Misri, mondo oyudne farese kod oganda lweny maduong’. To bende dolo lweny adier? Bende dotony adier, kuom timo gima kamano? Koso bende doketh winjruok, mi weye mak okume?”" 
Ezekiel17:16 “An Ruoth Nyasaye awacho kama: Kaka an e Nyasaye mangima, ruodhni biro tho e piny Babulon, nimar oseketho singruok mane otimo kokuong’ore ni ruodh Babulon, mane okete e tich ruoth." 
Ezekiel17:17 E kinde ma jo-Babulon obiro donjoe Jerusalem, ka gingo pidhe mag lowo kendo kunyo buche e dir ohinga, to Farao ok noorne oganda lweny maduong’ mondo okonye, omiyo ji notho mang’eny." 
Ezekiel17:18 Kaka ruodh Juda ne oketho winjruok mane otimo kokuong’ore, mi otimo gik makamago, omiyo ok notony.”" 
Ezekiel17:19 “An Ruoth Nyasaye amedo wacho kama: Kaka an Nyasaye mangima, abiro kumo ruodh Juda kuom ketho winjruok mane otimo kokuong’ore gi nyinga." 
Ezekiel17:20 Abiro chikone obadho, mi amakego. Eka anatere Babulon, mi akume kuno nimar ne oweya." 
Ezekiel17:21 Jolwenje marateke noneg e lweny, to modong’ noke kuonde duto. Eka unung’e ni an Ruoth Nyasaye ema asewuoyo.”" 
Ezekiel17:22 Ruoth Nyasaye wacho kama: “An bende abiro jako wi yadh sida marabora, mi akaw chunye mayom," 
Ezekiel17:23 apidhi ewi god Israel maborie moloyo. Bedene nojany, kendo nonyag kodhi, mi odok yadh sida maber ahinya. Koth winy duto noged kuome, mi yud yueyo e tipone." 
Ezekiel17:24 Yien duto mae piny nong’e ni an Ruoth Nyasaye ema atong’o yien maraboche, to amiyo yien matindo dongo maboyo. Bende an ema amiyo yien mang’ich two, kendo amiyo yien motwo chako doko mang’ich. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano, kendo abiro timo gima asewacho.”" 
Ezekiel18:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nowuoyo koda," 
Ezekiel18:2 kapenja niya, “Bende iwinjoe ngero ma ji osiko ka goyo e piny Israel, niya, ‘Wuone osechamo olemo manumu, to nyithindo ema lekegi tho’?" 
Ezekiel18:3 “To an Ruoth Nyasaye awacho kama: Kaka an e Nyasaye mangima, ngerono ok nochak ogo e piny Israel kendo." 
Ezekiel18:4 Ji duto mangima gin maga. Wuoro kata wuowi gin maga giduto machalre. To ng’ato biro tho mana nikech richone owuon. 
Ezekiel18:5 “Nyalo bet ni nitie ng’at makare, ma timo gik mowinjore kendo malong’o," 
Ezekiel18:6 ma ok lam nyiseche manono mag jo-Israel, bende ok gicham misengni ma itimo kuonde moting’ore ma chik okwero. Ok oterre gi chi wadgi, kata ok oriwre gi dhako ka ni e due." 
Ezekiel18:7 Ok othir ng’ato kendo ok omechi, bende odwoko gima osingne. Joma kech ohewo omiyo chiemo, kendo joma wuotho duge orwako gi lewni." 
Ezekiel18:8 Ok ohol pesa mondo oyudie ohala, bende odagi timo timbe mamono, kendo ong’ado bura kare e gimoro amora ma ji yalo." 
Ezekiel18:9 Oluwo chikena, kendo orito buchena. Ng’at ma kamano en ng’at makare, omiyo enobed mangima. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano." 
Ezekiel18:10 “To nyalo bet ni en gi wuowi ma jamecho kendo janek," 
Ezekiel18:11 bende matimo gik ma wuon mare ne ok otimo. Ochamo misengni mitimo kuonde moting’ore ma chik okwero, kendo oterore gi mond ji." 
Ezekiel18:12 Othiro joma odhier, bende omecho, kendo otamore dwoko gima osingne. Olamo nyiseche manono, kendo otimo timbe modwanyore," 
Ezekiel18:13 bende oholo ji pesa mondo oyudie ohala. Koro ng’at makamano dibed mangima adier? Ooyo, ok onyal bet mangima. Enotho, nikech osetimo timbe modwanyorego duto, kendo rembe nodog e wiye owuon." 
Ezekiel18:14 “Koro nyalo bet ni ng’at makamano bende nigi wuowi, mi wuowino oneno gik moko duto mane wuon otimo, to ok oluwo timbego." 
Ezekiel18:15 Ok olam nyiseche manono mag jo-Israel, kendo ok ocham misengni mitimo kuonde moting’ore ma chik okwero, bende ok oterre gi mond ji." 
Ezekiel18:16 Ok othir ng’ato, kendo ok omechi, bende odwoko gima osingne. Joma kech ohewo to omiyo chiemo, kendo joma wuotho duge orwako gi lewni." 
Ezekiel18:17 Ok odwar timo timbe mamono, kendo ok ohol ji pesa mondo oyudie ohala, to orito chikena, kendo oluoro buchena. Kuom mano, richo mag wuon ok nomi otho, to enobed abeda mangima." 
Ezekiel18:18 Wuon mare nowuondo ji, kendo omecho, bende pile notimo ni ji duto timbe mamono. Omiyo en ema notho nikech richone." 
Ezekiel18:19 “To kamoro unyalo penjo niya, ‘Ere gima omiyo wuowi ok yud kum nikech richo mag wuon mare?’ To an adwoko kama: ‘Wuowi notimo gik makare kendo malong’o. Ne orito chikena, koluwogi maber, omiyo obiro bedo mangima adier." 
Ezekiel18:20 To mana ng’at motimo richo ema notho. Wuowi ok nyal yudo kum nikech richo mag wuon mare, to wuoro bende ok nyal yudo kum nikech richo mag wuode. Ng’at makare noyud pokne kuom timne makare, to ng’at ma timne mono noyud kum kuom timne mamono.’" 
Ezekiel18:21 “Ka ng’at ma timbene mono oweyo richone, mi orito chikena kendo otimo timbe makare kendo malong’o, to ok notho, to nobed mangima." 
Ezekiel18:22 Richone duto nowene, mi nobed mangima nikech notimo timbe makare." 
Ezekiel18:23 Uparo ni berna ka ng’at ma timbene mono tho? Ooyo, dibedna maber mana ka oweyo richone, mi obedo mangima. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano." 
Ezekiel18:24 “To ka ng’at makare oweyo timne makare, mi odonjo e richo, kotimo timbe mamono kendo modwanyore ma joricho ema timo, to koro dobed mangima adier? Ooyo, onge timne makare kata achiel ma napar. To enotho nikech noweya, mi odonjo e richo." 
Ezekiel18:25 “Un uwacho niya, ‘Gima Ruoth Nyasaye timo ok ni kare.’ To koro winjuru, un jo-Israel. Un ema utimo gik ma ok ni kare, to ok an!" 
Ezekiel18:26 Ka ng’at makare oweyo timne makare, mi odonjo e richo, motho, to otho mana nikech timbe mamono mosetimo." 
Ezekiel18:27 To ka ng’at ma timbene mono oweyo timo richo, mi otimo timbe makare kendo malong’o, to oreso ngimane," 
Ezekiel18:28 nimar ne oneno ni timbene mono, mi oweyo, omiyo ok enotho, to enobed abeda mangima." 
Ezekiel18:29 To kata kamano, un jo-Israel pod uwacho niya, ‘Gima Ruoth Nyasaye otimo ok ni kare.’ To ok en kamano. Un ema utimo gik ma ok ni kare, to ok an." 
Ezekiel18:30 “Emomiyo an Ruoth Nyasaye anyisou un jo-Israel ni abiro kumo ng’ato ka ng’ato kuomu mana maromre gi timbene. Kuom mano, weuru timbeu mamono duto mondo kik uwe richo tieku." 
Ezekiel18:31 Adier, weuru richo duto ma usebedo ka utimo mondo ubed gi chuny manyien kod paro malong’o. Ere gima omiyo udwaro tho, un jo-Israel?" 
Ezekiel18:32 Ok adwar ni mondo ng’ato otho. Omiyo an Ruoth Nyasaye awacho kama: Weuru timo richo mondo ubed mangima.” 
Ezekiel19:1 In Ezekiel, ywag jotend Israel, kiwacho kama:" 
Ezekiel19:2 “Mano kaka meru ne chalo sibuor madhako maratego! Ne odak e kind sibuoche, kendo ne onywolo nyithindo mang’eny." 
Ezekiel19:3 Ne opuonjo nyathine achiel, mi opuonjore mako le, kendo odoko jacham ji." 
Ezekiel19:4 Ogendini nowinjo humbe, eka ne gikunyone bur, mi onyumoree. Bang’e ne giywaye gi nyororo mi gitere Misri." 
Ezekiel19:5 Kane min oneno ni gima ne ogeno osekethore, ne ochako opidho nyathine machielo, mi en bende nolokore sibuor mager." 
Ezekiel19:6 Kane odoko maduong’, ne owuotho gi sibuoche mamoko, mi opuonjore mako le, kendo odoko jacham ji." 
Ezekiel19:7 Ne omuko ut ruodhi, mi oweyo miechgi gundni, kendo pile kane oruto, to kibaji goyo joma odak e pinyno." 
Ezekiel19:8 Eka ogendini moa kuonde duto nochokore mondo oked kode. Ne gikunyone bur, mi onyumoree." 
Ezekiel19:9 Bang’e ne gitueye gi nyororo, mi gitere ni ruodh Babulon. Ne obole e od tuech, mondo kik ochak owinj dwonde kendo e gode mag Israel.”" 
Ezekiel19:10 “Meru ne chalo gi mzabibu mopidhi e bath aora, motimo oboke mathoth, kendo manyak maber, nikech ne nitie pi mang’eny." 
Ezekiel19:11 Bede mzabibuno ne otegno, moromo loso ludhe ruodhi. Ne odongo mabor mi otundo e polo, kendo ji duto neno kaka orabora kendo otimo otiep maber." 
Ezekiel19:12 To ne odhuole oko gi lop tiende gi mirima mager, mi opodho piny. Yamb oro moa yo wuokchieng’ notwoyo olembene. Bedene bende ne otur, kendo otwo, mi owang’ e mach." 
Ezekiel19:13 To koro mzabibuno me ochak opidh kendo e piny motwo ma pi ongee. 
Ezekiel19:14 Ne omuoch mach, mi majno owang’o bedene gi olembene. Kamano bedene ok nochak obed motegno, moromo loso ludhe ruodhi.” Mano en wend ywak ma osewer ndalo mang’eny." 
Ezekiel20:1 Chieng’ due apar, due mar abich, e higa mar abiriyo, jodong’ Israel moko nobiro ira mondo openj Ruoth Nyasaye wach. Kane oyudo gibet e nyima," 
Ezekiel20:2 Ruoth Nyasaye nowuoyo koda, mowachona niya," 
Ezekiel20:3 “Wuod dhano, nyis jogi ni an Ruoth Nyasaye awacho kama: Bende usebiro ni mondo upenja wach adier? Kaka an Nyasaye mangima, ok anayienu mondo upenja gimoro! An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano." 
Ezekiel20:4 “Wuod dhano, ng’adnigi bura! Adier, kiparonigi timbe modwanyore mane kweregi otimo." 
Ezekiel20:5 Nyisgi ni an Ruoth Nyasaye awacho ni, kane ayiero jo-Israel, ne afwenyoranigi e piny Misri, mi akuong’ora ni an Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachgi." 
Ezekiel20:6 Mano e kinde mane asingorae ni abiro gologi e Misri mondo atergi e piny momew kendo maberie moloyo pinje mamoko duto, mane aseyieronigi." 
Ezekiel20:7 Ne awachonigi ni mondo giwit nyiseche manono mag Misri ma gihero, kendo ni kik gidwanyre kodgi, nikech an e Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachgi." 
Ezekiel20:8 “To ne gipiem koda, mi gitamore winja. Ne ok giwito nyiseche modwanyore mag Misri, kata weyo lamogi ne ok giweyo. Kuom mano, ne achano mondo atiekgi gi mirimba mager e piny Misri kuno." 
Ezekiel20:9 To ne ok atimo kamano, nikech mano dine oketho nyinga, nimar ne asewacho ni jo-Israel, ka joma ne odak e igi kod ogendini mokiewo kodgi winjo, ni abiro gologi Misri." 
Ezekiel20:10 “Kamano ne agologi Misri, mi aterogi e thim." 
Ezekiel20:11 Eka ne amiyogi chikena, kendo apuonjogi buchena, ma ka ng’ato orito, to yudo ngima." 
Ezekiel20:12 Ne aketo ndalo mag Sabatona obed ranyisi mar winjruok e kinda kodgi, mondo oparnigi ni an Ruoth Nyasaye ema ayierogi mondo gibed maga." 
Ezekiel20:13 To ne gipiem apiema koda, kata mana e thim, ka giketho buchena, kendo gidagi chikena, ma ka ng’ato orito, to yudo ngima. Bende ne giketho ndalo mag Sabatona chuth. Mano ema omiyo ne achano mondo atiekgi gi mirimba mager e thim kuno." 
Ezekiel20:14 “To ne ok atimo kamano, nikech mano dine oketho nyinga, nimar ogendini mamoko ne oseneno ka agolo jo-Israel e piny Misri." 
Ezekiel20:15 To ne akuong’ora e thim ni ok natergi e piny momew kendo maberie moloyo pinje mamoko duto mane asingora ni namigi. 
Ezekiel20:16 Ne akuong’ora kamano nikech ne gidagi rito chikena, kendo ne giketho buchena. Ndalo mag Sabato bende ne ok girito, nikech ne gihero mana lamo nyisechegi manono." 
Ezekiel20:17 “To kata kamano, ne akechogi, mi ok atiekogi chuth e thim kuno." 
Ezekiel20:18 Bende ne akwero nyithindgi kuno niya, ‘Kik urit chike mane kwereu oketo, kendo kik uluw puonjgi, kata kik udwanyru kuom lamo nyisechegi manono." 
Ezekiel20:19 An Ruoth Nyasaye e Nyasachu, omiyo rituru buchena kod chikena." 
Ezekiel20:20 Nyaka une ni ndalo mag Sabatona orit maler, mondo obed ranyisi mar singruok manie kinda kodu, mondo oparnu ni an Ruoth Nyasaye e Nyasachu.’" 
Ezekiel20:21 “To kata obedo ni ne akwerogi kamano, to gin bende ne gipiem koda. Ne giketho chikena, kendo ne ok girito buchena, ma ka ng’ato orito, to yudo ngima. Ne giketho ndalo mag Sabatona, omiyo ne achano mondo atiekgi duto gi mirimba mager e thim kuno." 
Ezekiel20:22 To ne ok atimo kamano, nikech mano dine oketho nyinga kuom ogendini mane oneno ka agolo jo-Israel e piny Misri." 
Ezekiel20:23 To ne achako akuong’ora e thim ni anakegi e kind ogendini mopogore opogore e piny ngima. 
Ezekiel20:24 Ne akuong’ora kamano nikech ne gisedagi chikena kendo ne giketho buchena, mi ne ok girito ndalo mag Sabatona, bende ne gilamo nyiseche manono mag kweregi." 
Ezekiel20:25 Bang’e ne amiyogi buche maricho kod chike ma ok kel ngima. 
Ezekiel20:26 Ne amiyo gibedo mogak kuom gik mane gichiwo ni nyiseche manono, kendo kuom chiwo misango gi yawuotgi makayo. Ne atimo kamano mondo abwoggigo, mi ging’e ni an e Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Ezekiel20:27 “Kuom mano, wuod dhano, koro nyis jo-Israel ni awacho kama: Yo machielo mane kwereu oweyago, ka yanya e ma:" 
Ezekiel20:28 Kane akelogi e piny mane asingora ni namigi, to kamoro amora mane ginenoe got mabor kata yath motimo otiep ne gitimoe misengni. Misengni miwang’o kod mago miolo piny mane gitimo, ne omiya mirima." 
Ezekiel20:29 (Ne apenjogi ni, ‘Kuonde moting’ore ma udhiyegi, to gin gik manade?’ Mano emomiyo pod iluongogi ni kuonde moting’ore kamano nyaka chil kawuono.)" 
Ezekiel20:30 Koro nyis jo-Israael ni an Ruoth Nyasaye awacho kama: Ere gima omiyo udhogoru gi nyiseche manono mana kaka kwereu notimo? 
Ezekiel20:31 Kata kawuono ka uchiwo mich kendo ka uwang’o yawuotu ka misango, to pod udhogoru mana gi nyiseche manono. To eka un jo-Israel pod uparo mana ni anyalo yie mondo upenja wach! To kaka an Ruoth Nyasaye mangima, ok ayienu mondo upenja gimoro kata matin!" 
Ezekiel20:32 Uparo ni ubiro bedo machal gi ogendini modak e pinje mamoko, malamo yien gi lwendni, to akwerou ni mano ok timre." 
Ezekiel20:33 “An Ruoth Nyasaye mangima akuong’ora ni abiro tiyo matek gi tekona duto kod mirimba mager. 
Ezekiel20:34 Adier, ka agolou e pinje mane akeyoue, mi achokou kanyakla, to abiro nyisou tekona maduong’ kod mirimba mager!" 
Ezekiel20:35 Anateru e Thim Ogendini, mi ayalu kuno mana e wang’u kuneno!" 
Ezekiel20:36 Kaka ne akumo kwereu e Thim Sinai, e kaka koro abiro kumou kuno. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano." 
Ezekiel20:37 “Abiro tiyou matek, mi ami ubed joma orito singruokna." 
Ezekiel20:38 Bende anagol kuomu joma jopiem, kendo maketho chikena. Anagolgi e pinje ma koro gidakie, to ok anayienigi giduogi e piny Israel. Eka unung’e ni kara an e Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Ezekiel20:39 “An Ruoth Nyasaye awacho kama: Ara, un jo-Israel, koro dhiuru adhiya nyime gi tiyo ni nyisecheu manonogo! To aramo ni e giko to ubiro luora, mi ok unumi nyinga maler kethre kuom chiwo mich ni nysecheu manono.”" 
Ezekiel20:40 Ruoth Nyasaye nochako owacho niya, “Un jo-Israel duto, unudog e pinyu, mi ulama ewi god Israel marabora ma en goda maler. Anabed mamor kodu, kendo anadwar mondo ukelna misengni mau kod chiwo mabeyo mosewalna." 
Ezekiel20:41 Ka asegolou e pinje mane okeue, mi achokou kanyakla, to anayie misengni mang’ue ng’ar ma uwang’o. Ka ulama kamano, to ogendini nong’e ni an Nyasaye maler," 
Ezekiel20:42 kendo ka aduogou e piny Israel mane asingora ni anami kwereu, to unung’e ni an e Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Ezekiel20:43 Bang’e unupar timbeu maricho mane udhogorugo, mi unucharu kendu nikech richo mane utimogo." 
Ezekiel20:44 Un jo-Israel, ka unune ni ok asekumou moromo gi timbeu maricho kendo mamono, to atimonu mana kelo ni nyinga duong’, to unung’e ni an e Ruoth Nyasaye. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano.”" 
Ezekiel20:45 Ruoth Nyasaye nowuoyo koda, mowachona niya," 
Ezekiel20:46 “Wuod dhano, rang yo milambo, kendo wuo marach kuom piny man milambo, ka ikoro masira kuom bungu man kuno." 
Ezekiel20:47 Nyis bungu man yo milambono ni an Ruoth Nyasaye awacho kama: Abiro moko mach, kendo abiro wang’o yiendi duto motwo, koda ka mago mang’ich! Onge gima noneg majno, to nolandre chakre yo milambo nyaka nyandwat, korewo wenge ji duto." 
Ezekiel20:48 Ng’ato ka ng’ato nong’e ni an Ruoth Nyasaye ema amoko majno, kendo ni onge ng’ama nyalo nege.”" 
Ezekiel20:49 To an Ezekiel, ne adwoko Ruoth nyasaye niya, “Yaye Ruoth Nyasaye, ji duto wacho ni, ‘Jali obembowa gi ngeche mathoth!’ ”" 
Ezekiel21:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nowuoyo koda," 
Ezekiel21:2 mowachona niya, “Wuod dhano, chung’ kichomo yo Jerusalem, mondo ikwed kuonde ma ji lemoe. Siem piny Israel" 
Ezekiel21:3 kinyiso jopinyno ni Ruoth Nyasaye owacho kama: Amon kodu, omiyo abiro wuodho liganglana mondo anegugo duto, mi joma kare gi joma timbegi mono notho machalre." 
Ezekiel21:4 Adier, liganglana biro nego ji duto, chakre nyandwat nyaka milambo mondo atiek jou makare kod ma timbegi mono machalre." 
Ezekiel21:5 Kamano ji duto nong’e ni asewuodho ligangla e olalo, kendo ok nachak adwoke." 
Ezekiel21:6 “In wuod dhano, chur ka gima chunyi dwaro chot. Adier, chur malit kama ji duto nyalo nenie." 
Ezekiel21:7 To ka gipenji gima omiyo ichur, to nyisgi ni ichur nikech gima biro timore. Bende nyisgi ni e kindeno, kihondko nomakgi, kendo bedegi nowengni, mi chir ma gin go lal nono, kendo chongegi tetni. Kindeno osechopo, kendo gigo biro timore. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano.”" 
Ezekiel21:8 Wach Ruoth Nyasaye nochako obirona niya," 
Ezekiel21:9 “Wuod dhano, kor wach, kinyiso ji ni Ruoth Nyasaye owacho kama: Ligangla opiagi kendo oywe maler." 
Ezekiel21:10 Opiage mondo oneki, kendo oyweye mondo omil ka polo! Koso uparo ni atugo? Ooyo, usedagi chwat mar kede," 
Ezekiel21:11 omiyo ligangla ema koro iyweyo mondo ochak tich. Ipiage kendo iyweye mondo okete e lwet janek. 
Ezekiel21:12 Yaye, wuod dhano, ywagi kendo chur, nimar liganglano biro nego joga Israel, kaachiel gi jotendgi duto. Kuom mano, tang’ lweti, ka chunyi lit," 
Ezekiel21:13 nimar ma koro ok en tem mitemogigo, nikech ere gima odong’ ma ditim ni joma ochayo kede? An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano." 
Ezekiel21:14 “Koro in wuod dhano, kor wach, kipamo lweti, mondo ligangla omil koni gi koni, ka chadho ji marach. En e ligangla maneko. Adier, en ligangla makelo kihondko kod tho." 
Ezekiel21:15 Omiyo joga tuomore, kendo chunygi nyosore. Abwogo dalagi gi ligangla ma mil ka polo, kendo moikore mondo oneki." 
Ezekiel21:16 In ligangla mabith, chadh koni gi koni! Ee, chadh kamoro amora michomo!" 
Ezekiel21:17 An bende abiro pamo lweta, kendo mirimba biro rumo. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano." 
Ezekiel21:18 Ruoth Nyasaye nochako owuoyo koda," 
Ezekiel21:19 mowachona niya, “Wuod dhano, gor laini ariyo e lowo, mochung’ kar yore ariyo ma ruodh Babulon gi jolwenje nyalo luwo. Yorego duto nyaka chakre mana e piny Babulon. Eka ichung ranyisi ariyo e akek yorego," 
Ezekiel21:20 mondo ranyisi achiel onyis ruoth yo madhi Raba, dala jo-Amon, to machielo onyise yo madhi Jerusalem e chuny Juda," 
Ezekiel21:21 nimar adier ruodh Babulon ochung’ e tiend ranyisi manie akek yorego, koyiengo asere, kendo openjo nyisechene wach, bende orango chuny chiayo motimgo misango, mondo ong’ego yo monego oluw." 
Ezekiel21:22 Koro oting’o asere mondikie ni Jerusalem, gi lwete ma korachwich. Kamano ong’eyo ni onego odhi Jerusalem mondo ogi sigich lweny, kendo olos lodi mituomogo dhorangeye, bende oging pidhe mag lowo, kendo okuny buche molworo ohinga." 
Ezekiel21:23 Jo-Jerusalem ok nyal yie ni gik mokorgo biro timore adier, nikech winjruok ma gisetimo gi ogendini mamoko. To mano biro miyo richogi iparo, mi makgi!" 
Ezekiel21:24 “Kuom mano, an Ruoth Nyasaye awacho kama: Richou oel e lela, kendo ji duto ong’eyo kaka un joketho, nikech richou nonenore e gimoro amora mutimo, kendo mano ema omiyo opargi. Kuom mano, oseng’adnu bura kendo abiro chiwou e lwet wasiku." 
Ezekiel21:25 “In ruodh Israel, ma timbene mono, kendo ma ok ler, in bende ndaloni ochopo ma ibiro kumie mogik." 
Ezekiel21:26 An Ruoth Nyasaye awacho kama: Lony osimboni mar duong’ kod kilembani, nimar gik moko ok bi bedo kaka gin pile. Ji modhier ema biro yudo loch, to joma nigi teko biro podho." 
Ezekiel21:27 Adier, abiro ketho dalano chuth, mi lokre gunda. To mano ok notimre nyaka chop ka ruoth mowinjore gi loch obiro, kendo en ema abiro miye osimbono." 
Ezekiel21:28 “Wuod dhano, kor wach, kinyiso gima Ruoth Nyasaye owacho kuom jo-Amon, ma yanyo jo-Israelgo. Nyisgi ni ligangla osewuodhi mondo oneki. Oseyweye maler mondo oneki komil ka polo." 
Ezekiel21:29 Bende nyisgi ni fweny ma gineno gin miriambo, kendo weche ma gikoro bende ok gin adier. Gin joricho ma timbegi mono, omiyo ndalo ma ibiro kumogie mogik chiegni. Ligangla biro lwar e ng’utgi." 
Ezekiel21:30 “In, ruodh Babulon, dwok liganglani e olalo. Abiro ng’adoni bura e piny mane onywolie," 
Ezekiel21:31 mi akumi ka an gi mirima mager ka mach mang’ang’ni. Bang’e anaketi e lwet jomahundu ma tichgi en mana ketho gik moko. 
Ezekiel21:32 Mach nowang’i mi tieki, kendo rembi nochuer e pinyi iwuon, mi ok nochak opari kendo. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano.”" 
Ezekiel22:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nowuoyo koda, mopenja niya," 
Ezekiel22:2 “Wuod dhano, bende iikori mar yalo dala ma jonek opong’oni? Nyis jodalani gik maricho modwanyore ma gisetimo." 
Ezekiel22:3 Bende nyisgi ni an Ruoth Nyasaye awacho kama: Usechuero remo mathoth e dalau, kendo usedwanyoru kulamo nyiseche manono, omiyo ndalou chiegni!" 
Ezekiel22:4 Un joketho kuom nek makamano, bende usedwanyoru gi nyiseche manono mane uluwo, omiyo useng’ado ndalou machiek, mi koro kindeu orumo! Mano ema omiyo aseweyo ogendini mamoko mondo ojaru, ka twenyonu umgi." 
Ezekiel22:5 Pinje machiegni kod mago man maboyo biro jaro timbeu modwanyore mag mahundu. 
Ezekiel22:6 Jotend Israel duto osetiyo gi teko ma gin go, mi ginego ji." 
Ezekiel22:7 Onge kata ng’at achiel e dala mamiyo wuon gi min luor. Uwuondo jopinje mamoko, kendo usando mond liete gi nyithi kiye." 
Ezekiel22:8 Ok uluoro kuonde mowalna, bende ok urit Sabatona." 
Ezekiel22:9 Ji moko kuomu hango ni jowetegi wach mondo onegi. Moko bende chamo misengni motim kuonde moting’ore ma chik okwero, kendo moko dwanyore adwanya e kindu." 
Ezekiel22:10 To moko bende terore gi mond wuonegi, kendo moko chuno mon mondo oriwrego ka ni e due." 
Ezekiel22:11 Giterore gi mond ji koda ka mond yawuotgi gi nyiminegi hie. 
Ezekiel22:12 Jomoko kuomu chuero remo mana ni mondo oyud pesa. To moko bende okawo ohala kuom pesa ma giholo jo-Israel wetegi, kendo gidoko momew e yor wuond. Wiu osewil koda. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano." 
Ezekiel22:13 “Abiro tero lweta, mi akumu kuom mecho musemechogo kod chuero remo ma usechuero." 
Ezekiel22:14 Bende uparo ni pod unubed gi chir kata gi teko moro ma unyalo ting’ogo kata mana lwetu ka akumou kamano? An Ruoth Nyasaye ema asewacho kamano kendo abiro timo kaka awacho! 
Ezekiel22:15 Abiro keyou e kind ogendini modak e pinje mopogore, mi atiek timbeu mamono." 
Ezekiel22:16 Kamano ogendini mamoko nojaru; un to unung’e ni an e Ruoth Nyasaye.” 
Ezekiel22:17 Ruoth Nyasaye ne ochako owachona niya," 
Ezekiel22:18 “Wuod dhano, akwano jo-Israel mana ka chuoth nyinyo modong’ bang’ lenyo fedha." 
Ezekiel22:19 Kuom mano, koro an Ruoth Nyasaye awachonigi kama: Kaka un gik manono kamano, abiro chokou Jerusalem kanyakla,"
