Ezekiel22:20 mana kaka ichoko nyinyo mopogore opogore e karaya milenyogie gi mach mager mibuko matek. Kamano e kaka mirimba mager nolenyu, mana kaka mach lenyo nyinyo mopogore opogore." 
Ezekiel22:21 Chutho, abiro chokou Jerusalem kanyakla, mi alenyu gi mirimba mager ka mach." 
Ezekiel22:22 Ibiro lenyou Jerusalem mana kaka ilenyo fedha e karaya, mi unung’e ni an Ruoth Nyasaye ema akumou gi mirimba mager.”" 
Ezekiel22:23 Ruoth Nyasaye nochako owuoyo koda," 
Ezekiel22:24 mowachona niya, “Wuod dhano, nyis jo-Israel ni pinygi en piny ma otimo richo, omiyo abiro kume gi mirimba mager." 
Ezekiel22:25 Jotendgi chalo gi sibuoche ma ng’ur ka kidho le ma gisemako. Ginego ji, omiyo mond liete doko mang’eny, kendo giyako mwandu kod gik mabeyo." 
Ezekiel22:26 Jodolo bende ketho chikna, kendo ok gimi gik mowalna duong’. Ok gipog gik ma owalna gi gik ma ok owalna, bende ok gipuonj ji pogruok manie kind gik maler kod gik ma ok ler, kendo ok girit Sabatona. Mano emomiyo jo-Israel ok miya duong’." 
Ezekiel22:27 Ruodhi chalo gi otoche ma kidho le ma gimako. Gichuero remo mondo giyud mwandu. 
Ezekiel22:28 Jonabi to umo richogo mana ka joma mwono kor ot gi buru. Gineno fweny mag miriambo, kendo gikoro weche ma ok adier. Giwacho ni wechego gin mag Ruoth Nyasaye, to an Ruoth Nyasaye pok awuoyo kodgi." 
Ezekiel22:29 Ji ajia bende wuondo ji kendo mecho. Gisando joma odhier kod jopinje mamoko modak kuomgi. 
Ezekiel22:30 “Asebet karango mondo ayud ng’at manyalo gero ohinga, kendo ma dichung’ kuonde ma ohinga omukoree, mondo okony piny, kik akethi gi mirimba, to ne ok anyal yudo ng’at makamano." 
Ezekiel22:31 Kuom mano, abiro tiekogi pep, ka an gi mirima mager ka mach, kakumogi maromre gi timbegi. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano.”" 
Ezekiel23:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nowuoyo koda," 
Ezekiel23:2 mowachona niya, “Wuod dhano, chon ne nitie nyimine moko ariyo." 
Ezekiel23:3 Kane pod gitindo, ka gidak Misri, ne gikethore mi gilokore jochode." 
Ezekiel23:4 Nyako maduong’ ne nyinge Ohola, to matin ne nyinge Oholiba. Ne akendogi giduto, mi ginywolona nyithindo. (Ohola ochung’ kar Samaria, to Oholiba ochung’ kar Jerusalem.)" 
Ezekiel23:5 “To kata obedo ni Ohola ne chiega kamano, to ne odhi adhiya nyime gi timbene mag chode, kendo ne osiko kogombo chodene ma jo-Asuria. Chodenego ne jolweny morwako lep lweny maralige. Moko ne jotelo man gi tije madongodongo, kendo moko ne jotend jolweny maidho farese. Giduto ne gin yawuowi mapod tindo, man gi chia." 
Ezekiel23:6  
Ezekiel23:7 Ohola ne ohero dhogore gi jotend lweny mag Asuriago duto, kendo gombo mane en go ne omiyo odwanyore kolamo nyiseche manono mag jo-Asuria." 
Ezekiel23:8 Ne odhi adhiya nyime gi timbe chode mane osechako timo ka en Misri, kuma ne okethoree modoko jachode." 
Ezekiel23:9 Kuom mano ne ajwang’e e lwet chodene ma jo-Asuria mane ogombo malichgo. 
Ezekiel23:10 Ne gilonye duk, kendo ne gikawo yawuote gi nyige. Bang’e ne ginege gi ligangla. Gima ne otimoreneno nolokore ngero ma mon goyo kuonde duto." 
Ezekiel23:11 “Kata obedo ni Oholiba ne oneno gigo duto, to ne odoko achach, mi otimo timbe maricho, kochodo moloyo kata mana Ohola." 
Ezekiel23:12 Gombo ne nege gi jodong Asuria, kod jotend lweny morwakore gi lep lweny mabeyo, kod jotend joidh farese, ma duto ne yawuowi ma pod tindo man gi chia." 
Ezekiel23:13 Ne aneno ni odwanyore chuth, kendo ni orach mana ka nyamin maduong’." 
Ezekiel23:14 “To en ne omedo nyumore matut e timbe mag dwanyruok. 
Ezekiel23:15 Ne oneno kido, mag jotend Babulon mogor e kor udi, kendo owir gi range makwar, ne otuenigi misibe e nungogi, kendo ne onalnigi kilemba mabeyo e wigi." 
Ezekiel23:16 Kane onenogi kamano, to gombo ne ohewe, mi ooro joote Babulon mondo oluongne joma ne ogorgo." 
Ezekiel23:17 Eka jo-Babulon-go nobiro mondo oterre kode. Ne giriwre kode, mi gidwanye nyaka ne ojok kodgi." 
Ezekiel23:18 Bang’e ne onyisore e lela, mi ji duto ong’eyo ni en jachode. Kuom mano ne ojoga mana kaka nyamin ne ojoga." 
Ezekiel23:19 Ne omedo dhi nyime moloyo gi timbe chode, kotimo mana kaka notimo e piny Misri kapod ne en nyako." 
Ezekiel23:20 Gombo maduong’ ne omake gi joma ohero terruok, ma dendgi chalo gi dend kanyna, kendo ma nyotgi mol ka ohula." 
Ezekiel23:21 “In Oholiba, ne idwaro chako timo timbeni mag dwanyruok mane itimo Misri kane pod in nyako, kane chwo tugo kodi, moketho ringri." 
Ezekiel23:22 To koro Oholiba, an Ruoth Nyasaye awachoni kama: Tinde iol gi chodenigo, to abiro miyo gibedo mamon kodi, kendo gibiro lwori, mi giketi diere." 
Ezekiel23:23 Abiro kelo jo-Babulon kod jo-Kaldea duto, kaachiel gi jo Pekod gi jo-Shoa gi jo-Koa kod jo-Asuria duto. Giduto gin jotend lweny ma yawuowi mapod tindo man gi chia. Gin joma tiyo tije madongodongo kendo gin jotend joidh farese." 
Ezekiel23:24 Gibiro monji gi yo nyandwat ka gin gi oganda lweny maduong’ kod geche lweny gi geche mamoko. Gin gi kuodi gi okumbni kod ogut lweny, kendo gibiro lwori mi giketi diere. Abiro chiwi e lwetgi, kendo gining’adni bura, kaluwore gi chikgi giwegi." 
Ezekiel23:25 Kaka mirima mager omaka kodi, abiro weyo gitimi kaka gin ema gihero ka gikecho kodi. Gining’ad umi kod iti, kendo ginineg nyithindi. Adier, ginimayi yawuoti gi nyigi, mi giwang’gi ka gingima." 
Ezekiel23:26 Bende ginilonyi duk, kendo ginikaw gik milichorigo ma nengogi tek." 
Ezekiel23:27 Kamano anatiek gombo ma in go kod timbe modwanyore ma isebedo kitimo chakre kinde mane idak Misri. Ok nichak irang nyiseche manono, bende ok nichak ipar Misri kendo." 
Ezekiel23:28 “An Ruoth Nyasaye awacho kama: Abiro chiwi e lwet joma imon-go, kendo ma ijokgo," 
Ezekiel23:29 kendo kaka gin bende gimon kodi, gibiro kawo gimoro amora ma ingo, mi gilonyi duk. Inidong’ e lela, mi nong’ere ratiro ni in dhako ma jachode. Mago e gik ma gombo ma in go kod timbe chode" 
Ezekiel23:30 osekeloni, nikech ne in dhako ma ogendni terorego, mi idwanyori gi nyisechegi manono." 
Ezekiel23:31 Ne iluwo timbe nyameru, omiyo agwata mar kum mane amiye, ema in bende abiro miyi!" 
Ezekiel23:32 “An Ruoth Nyasaye awacho kama: Ibiro madho agwata nyameru. En agwata maduong’ kendo matut. Ji duto nojari kendo nonyieri, nikech agwatano opong’ du." 
Ezekiel23:33 En agwata ma luoro gi masira opong’o. Mane Samaria nyameru omadho. Enomi ibed momer, kendo chunyi nobed malit." 
Ezekiel23:34 Inimadhe, mi ilung’e pep, kendo inigwar kori gi pedni mage mobarore. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano." 
Ezekiel23:35 “Koro an Ruoth Nyasaye awacho kama: Kaka ne wiyi owil koda, mi ilokona ng’eyi, ibiro yudo sand kuom gombo ma in go kod timbeni mag chode.”" 
Ezekiel23:36 Bang’ mano, Ruoth Nyasaye nopenja niya, “Wuod dhano, donge iikori mag ng’ado ni Ohola gi Oholiba bura? Donjnigi kuom gik modwanyore ma gisetimo." 
Ezekiel23:37 Gisebedo ka giterore kendo giseneko. Giseterore gi nyiseche manono, kendo gisenego nyithindo mane ginywolona. Adier, ne gichiwo yawuota ka misango miwang’o ni nyisechegi manono!" 
Ezekiel23:38 To mago kende ok e gik mane gitimo! Hekalu mara bende ne gidwanyo, mi giketho Sabatona." 
Ezekiel23:39 Kane gisenego nyithinda ka misango miwang’o ni nyiseche manono, ne gibiro e Hekalu mara, mi gidwanyo mana chieng’ onogo. Adier, mano e gima ne gitimo e Hekalu mara!" 
Ezekiel23:40 “Bende ne gioro joote mondo oluong joma odak e piny moro mabor, mi jogo nobiro. Eka mon ariyogo nolwokore, mi owiro wang’gi kendo olichore gi gik ma nengogi tek." 
Ezekiel23:41 Ne gibet e kitanda molos maber, kendo mesa mopedh malich ne nie nyimgi. Ne gikawo ubani kod mor zeituni ma an ema ne asemiyogi, mi giketo ewi mesano." 
Ezekiel23:42 Bang’e mahu mar oganda joma ok dew gimoro ne owinji. Ne gin joma oa e thim. Ne girwako ronge e bede mon-go, kendo gisidhonigi osimbe mabeyo e wigi." 
Ezekiel23:43 Eka ne awacho e chunya niya, ‘Gikonyore gi dhako ma jachode, ma terruok oolo," 
Ezekiel23:44 kendo gisiko gidhi adhiya ire, kaka ji dhi ir dhako ma jachode.’ Adier, ne gidhi ir Ohola gi Oholiba mane mon modwanyore." 
Ezekiel23:45 Ji makare to nokwed mon-go kuom timbegi mag terruok kod nek, nimar giterore kendo gichuero remo." 
Ezekiel23:46 “An Ruoth Nyasaye awacho kama: Kel oganda mar jomahundu mondo otunggi, kendo oyakgi." 
Ezekiel23:47 Jogo mondo ogogi gi kite kendo omonjgi gi ligangla, ka nego nyithindgi, kendo wang’o utgi." 
Ezekiel23:48 Abiro tieko timbe dwanyruok e pinyni duto mondo obed siem ni mon mamoko kik oterre kaka ne mon ariyogo osetimo. 
Ezekiel23:49 To un nyimine ariyo, abiro kumou kuom timbeu mag dwanyruok kod richou mar lamo nyiseche manono. Eka unung’e ni an e Ruoth Nyasaye.”" 
Ezekiel24:1 Chieng’ due apar, due mar apar, e higa mar ochiko, Ruoth Nyasaye nowuoyo koda, mowachona niya," 
Ezekiel24:2 “Wuod dhano, ndik odiechieng’ ma kawuono e kitabu, nikech enie chieng’ ma ruodh Babulon chakoe goyo ageng’aa ni Jerusalem." 
Ezekiel24:3 Nyis joga ma jopiem ni an Ruoth Nyasaye agoyonigi ngero kama: Keturu agulu e mach, kendo olieuru pi." 
Ezekiel24:4 Ketieuru ring’o mamit kaka bat kod em, kendo pong’euru gi choke mabeyo." 
Ezekiel24:5 To nyaka gibed ring rombe machwe. Eka chwakieuru mach matek, mondo ochieg maber koda ka choke." 
Ezekiel24:6 “Koro an Ruoth Nyasaye awacho kama: Mano kaka dala jonek none malit! Ochalo gi agulu ma nyal ochamo, ma ok nyal lwokore. Goluru ring’o duto e iye, achiel ka achiel, ma ok uweyo moro kata achiel." 
Ezekiel24:7 Dalano ne otimo remo, to remono ne ok ochwer e lowo, kama buru ne nyalo umee, to ne ochwer mana e lwanda lilo." 
Ezekiel24:8 An bende aseweyo remono e lela kanyo, kama enie tangalare, mondo owang’ iya, achul kuor." 
Ezekiel24:9 “Koro ma e gima an Ruoth Nyasaye awacho; Mano kaka dala jonek none malit, nikech an awuon ema abiro chwako mach matek!" 
Ezekiel24:10 Keturu yien mang’eny e kendo, kendo kudhuru mach obed mamiyo. Teduru ring’o nyaka kate duon, mi choke wang’." 
Ezekiel24:11 Bang’e keturu agulu modong’ nono e mach mondo ochwakre, nyaka chuma molosego bed maliet ha, mi nyal man kuome wanyre, mi lal nono. To mano tich manono." 
Ezekiel24:12 Nimar kata da ichwake machal nade, to nyal mopoto kuome ok nyal rumo." 
Ezekiel24:13 In Jerusalem bende, timbeni mag chode osemiyo ibet modwanyore. Kata obedo ni ne atemo pwodhi kamano, to pod ne isiko asika ka idwanyori. Kuom mano, ok nichak ibed maler kendo, nyaka chop ka akumi gi mirimba duto mager." 
Ezekiel24:14 An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano, kendo gima asewacho biro timore mak orem! Ok nakech ng’ato, kendo ok nang’won ni ng’ato, bende ok nalokra. Anakumi mana maromre gi timbeni duto. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano.”" 
Ezekiel24:15 Ruoth Nyasaye nowuoyo koda, mowachona niya," 
Ezekiel24:16 “Wuod dhano, abiro mayi ng’at ma ihero moloyo, apoya. To kik ing’ur, kata kik iywagi, kendo pi wang’i kik chuer." 
Ezekiel24:17 Chunyi to om aoma mos. Kik itim timbe mag ywak, kaka wuotho gi wich nono, kata wuotho gi tielo maonge wuoche. Bende kik ium dhogi, kata kik icham chiemo ma joywak chamo.”" 
Ezekiel24:18 Chieng’no gokinyi, ne awuoyo gi ji, to kochopo odhiambo, to chiega notho. Eka kinyne natimo mana kaka nosenyisa." 
Ezekiel24:19 Ji ne openja gima omiyo atimo kamano," 
Ezekiel24:20 mi adwokogi niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye ema nowuoyo koda," 
Ezekiel24:21 mowachona ni mondo anyisu, un jo-Israel, ni owacho kama: Usungoru ni Hekalu otegno. Kunene, to umor kendo uhero donjoe. To koro an Ruoth Nyasaye abiro loke gima kuero, kendo yawuotu gi nyiu modong’ Jerusalem none e lweny." 
Ezekiel24:22 Kuwinjo wachno to unutim mana kaka Ezekiel osetimo. Ok unum dhou, kendo ok unucham chiemo ma joywak chamo." 
Ezekiel24:23 Bende ok unutim timbe ywak ma ji timo pile, kaka wuotho gi wich nono, kata wuotho gi tielo nono. Ok unuywagi, kendo pi wang’u ok nochuer. Dendu nodhi adhiya mosmos nikech richou, kendo unuywagru e chunyu, ng’ato ka ng’ato gi wadgi." 
Ezekiel24:24 “An Ruoth Nyasaye, amedo wacho kama: Ezekiel nobednu ranyisi, kendo unutim gik moko duto ma osetimo. Ka gik makamago duto otimore, eka unung’e ni an e Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Ezekiel24:25 “Wuod dhano, abiro mayogi Hekalu motegno mane gisungorego kendo ma miyogi mor, mane gihero rango kendo donjoe. Bende anamagi yawuotgi kod nyigi." 
Ezekiel24:26 Chieng’ ma atimo kamano, to ng’at moro motony e lweny nobi, kendo nonyisi gima osetimore." 
Ezekiel24:27 Odiechieng’no ema inichak iwuoe, mi iwe bedo momo, kendo inilos gi ng’atno. Kamano inibed ranyisi ni ji, mi gining’e ni an e Ruoth Nyasaye.”" 
Ezekiel25:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nowuoyo koda," 
Ezekiel25:2 mowachona niya, “Wuod dhano, chung’ kichomo piny Amon, kendo ikwede." 
Ezekiel25:3 Nyis jopinyno ni an Ruoth Nyasaye awacho kama: Un jo-Amon, ne ubedo mamor ka uneno ka Hekalu mara odwany, kendo ka piny Israel okethi, kendo ka itero jo-Juda e tuech." 
Ezekiel25:4 Kaka ne ubedo mamor kamano, abiro miyo dhoudi modak e thim man yo wuok chieng’ maku, mi kaw pinyu. Ginigur kembegi e pinyu, mi gidag kuno. Bende ginicham olembeu kendo ginimadh chau." 
Ezekiel25:5 Abiro miyo dala mar Raba bed mana kama ikwayoe ngamia, kendo piny Amon duto abiro miyo bedo kama ikwayoe rombe, mi unung’e ni an e Ruoth Nyasaye.”" 
Ezekiel25:6 Ruoth Nyasaye nomedo wachonigi niya, “Kaka ne upamo lwetu kuchikoru gi mor, kendo ujaro piny Israel," 
Ezekiel25:7 omiyo abiro ketou e lwet ogendini mamoko mondo oyaku. Abiro tiekou chuth, mi ok unuchak ubed oganda, bende ok nubed gi pinyu uwegi. Eka unung’e ni an e Ruoth Nyasaye.”" 
Ezekiel25:8 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho niya, “Kaka jo-Moab osewacho ni jo-Juda chalo gi ogendini mamoko duto," 
Ezekiel25:9 omiyo abiro miyo wasigu monjo miech Moab manie tong’ pinygi, koda ka mier mabeyoe moloyo, kaka Beth-jeshimoth, gi Baal-meon kod Kiriathaim." 
Ezekiel25:10 Abiro miyo dhoudi modak e thim man yo wuok chieng’ kaw piny Moab kaachiel gi piny Amon, mondo jo-Moab kik chak bed oganda." 
Ezekiel25:11 Kamano e kaka anakum jo-Moab, mi gining’e ni an e Ruoth Nyasaye.”" 
Ezekiel25:12 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho niya, “Jo-Edom nochulo kuor malit kuom Juda, kendo kuor mane gichulono osekelo ketho mosiko kuomgi." 
Ezekiel25:13 “Koro awacho ni abiro kumo piny jo-Edom, mi aneg ji duto kod le man kuno. Pinyno nodong’ nono, ka ji tho e lweny, chakre dala mar Teman nyaka dala mar Dedan." 
Ezekiel25:14 Joga Israel nochulna kuor kuom jo-Edom, kendo gitimnigi mana kaka mirimba mager chalo. Kamano jo-Edom nong’e kaka kuor ma achulo lit! An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano.”" 
Ezekiel25:15 Ruoth Nyasaye nochako owacho niya, “Jo-Filistia osechulo kuor malit ni wasikgi manyaka nene, mi gitiekogi ka gisin kodgi." 
Ezekiel25:16 Kuom mano, awacho ni abiro monjo jo-Filistia, mi aywegi oko pep." 
Ezekiel25:17 Ji mamoko duto modak but nam Mediterenia kanyo bende abiro nego. Ka asechulonigi kuor kamano, eka gining’e ni an e Ruoth Nyasaye.”" 
Ezekiel26:1 Chieng’ mokwongo mar due, e higa mar apar gachiel, Ruoth Nyasaye nowuoyo koda," 
Ezekiel26:2 mowachona niya, “Wuod dhano, joma odak e dala mar Turo goyo mahu gi mor, kawacho kama: ‘Jerusalem ne en dala ma ogendini duto chokoree kuom ohala, to koro osekethe. Dhorangaye oseyaworenwa, omiyo wabiro bedo momew, nikech oseloye, modong’ gunda.’" 
Ezekiel26:3 “To koro an Ruoth Nyasaye awacho kama: Amon kodi, in dala mar Turo! Omiyo abiro kelo ogendini mang’eny mondo omonji, kendo gibiro chalo mana apaka mag nam." 
Ezekiel26:4 Gibiro muko ohinga mari, kod kuondeni mochiel motegno mag siro lweny. Bang’ mano, anaywer lowo duto oko kuomi, mi awe kidong’ mana lwanda lilo." 
Ezekiel26:5 Lwandano nolokre chula, ma jolupo moyoe tondegi. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano. “In iwuon, ogendini noyaki," 
Ezekiel26:6 kendo giniyak joma odak e miechi maoko ma ok nie chula. Eka un jo-Turo unung’e ni an e Ruoth Nyasaye. 
Ezekiel26:7 “An Ruoth Nyasaye awacho kama: Abiro kelo Nebukadnezar ruodh Babulon ma ruoth maduong’ie moloyo ruodhi duto mondo omonji, in Turo. Enobi kowuok yo nyandwat gi oganda lweny maduong’ kod farese gi geche lweny, kaachiel gi joidh farese." 
Ezekiel26:8 Jogi modak e mier maoko noneg e lweny. Wasikigo nokuny buche mi giging pidhe mag lowo e bath ohingani, kendo ginimonji ka gigeng’ore gi kuodi." 
Ezekiel26:9 Ginituom ohinga mari gi lodi madongodongo, mi gimuk kuondeni mochiel motegno mag siro lweny gi tuor mag nyinyo." 
Ezekiel26:10 Rumbi mar buru ma faresegi odhuolo noimi, kendo koko mar farese maywayo gechegi mag lweny noyieng ohingani, ka gikadho e dhorangayi mokethore." 
Ezekiel26:11 Joidh faresegi nomwomre e yoreni ka ginego jogi, kendo sirni magi motegno nomukre." 
Ezekiel26:12 Wasikigo noyak mwanduni kod gigi mag ohala. Ginimuk ohingani, kendo giniteng’ uti mabeyo. Bende ginikaw kite gi yien koda ka lopi, mi giwit e nam." 
Ezekiel26:13 Kamano anatiek wer duto miwero, kendo thumbe migoyo ok nochak owinji." 
Ezekiel26:14 Analoki mana lwanda lilo ma jolupo moyoe tondegi. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano. 
Ezekiel26:15 “To koro an Ruoth Nyasaye amedo nyiso dala mar Turo kama: Ka oloyi, mi omaki, to mano kaka kihondko nogo joma odak e dhonam, ka giwinjo ka jogi minego ywak." 
Ezekiel26:16 Ruodhi duto mag pinje manie dhonam nowe kombegi mag dongo kendo nolony lepgi mag loch kod mago mogor malich, mi gibed e lowo ka gikirni. Ka gineno masira mosemaki, to kihondko nomakgi marach, mi ginisik ka gikirni akira." 
Ezekiel26:17 Bang’e giniwer wend ywak mawacho niya: Dala marahuma osekethi, kendo yiedhi mage olal nono. Chon jodalano ne nigi loch e nam, kendo ji duto modak e dhonam noluorogi." 
Ezekiel26:18 To koro Turo osepodho, omiyo pinje manie dhonam kirni, kendo joma odak kuondego kihondko nego, kuom gima osetimorene.”" 
Ezekiel26:19 Ruoth Nyasaye wacho kama: “In Turo, abiro loki gunda, mana ka mier mokethore maonge ng’ama odakie, kendo abiro imi gi pi nam matut." 
Ezekiel26:20 Abiro teri e piny joma otho, mondo ibed gi joma notho chon. Anami idag e piny manie bwo lowono, kibudho e bur matut e kind gik machon mokethore, mi ok nichak iduog e piny joma ngima." 
Ezekiel26:21 Anami ibed gima bwogo ji, kendo mano ema nobed gikoni. Ji notem manyi, to ok giniyudi. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano.”" 
Ezekiel27:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nowachona niya," 
Ezekiel27:2 “Wuod dhano, ywag Turo gi wend ywak." 
Ezekiel27:3 En dala manie dhonam, kendo oloko ohala gi ji modak kamoro amora e dhonam. Nyise ni an Ruoth Nyasaye awacho kama: In Turo, ne isungori kiparo ni iber gilala." 
Ezekiel27:4 Tong’ ni ochueyo nyaka ei nam. Joma ne ogeri ne olosi ka yie ma jaber. 
Ezekiel27:5 Ne giloso bepeni gi yien mabeyo moa got Senir, bende ne gikawo yadh sida moa Lebanon, ema gilosonigo murungot." 
Ezekiel27:6 Ngeyni magi to ne giloso gi yiend ober moa Bashan, kendo tati ne giloso gi yiend saipras, mogol e chulni mag Kitim. Eka ne gibawi gi lak liech." 
Ezekiel27:7 Tangani ne olos gi law maber mar Misri, mogorie kido mabeyo, kendo ne ginenore kata mana gi kuma bor. Tandarua miumigo nolos gi nanga maralik maber, mogol e chula mar Saipras." 
Ezekiel27:8 Jo-Sodom gi jo-Arvad ne odoko jogi makiewo ngayi. Ne in gi jotich molony ma kwang’i, yaye Turo!" 
Ezekiel27:9 Jopecho maloso kuonde mokethore e yie, ne jo-Biblos motiegore maber e tijgi. Bende jokwang’ mag yiedhi duto manie nam, ne ging’iewo gik moko mana e dukeni." 
Ezekiel27:10 “Jo-Persia gi jo-Lidia gi jo-Libya ne odoko jolweny magi. Ne ging’awo kuodigi kod ogutegi mag lweny kuomi. Gin ema ne gimiyo nyingi obedo gi huma. 
Ezekiel27:11 Jolweny ma jo-Arvad norito ohingani, kendo joma ne oa Gamad norito kuondeni mochiel motegno mag siro lweny. Ne ging’awo kuodigi e ohingani. Gin e joma ne olosi, mi ibedo jaber." 
Ezekiel27:12 “Ne iloko ohala e piny Tarshish, kikawo fedha gi kit nyinyo moko mopogore opogore kaka chudo kuom gik mogundho mane itimogo ohala." 
Ezekiel27:13 Bende ne iloko ohala e piny Yunani gi Tubal kod Meshek, kendo ne ikawo wasumbini kod gik molos gi mula kuom gik ohala mane in go." 
Ezekiel27:14 Jo-Beth-togarma ne miyi farese matiyo, gi mago miidho, kod kenje kar gigi." 
Ezekiel27:15 Jo-Rodo noloko kod ohala, kendo ji moa e pinje mang’eny manie dhonam nomiyi lak liech kod bepe mabeyo maratenge kaka chudo kuom gigi." 
Ezekiel27:16 Jo-Aram bende ne ng’iewo gigi mag ohala kaachiel gi gik mamoko mang’eny mane iloso. Ne gimiyi kite ma nengogi tek miluongo ni emerald gi koral kod rubi, gi law maralik gi nanga mayom mogorie kido mabeyo, kuom gigi." 
Ezekiel27:17 Jo-Juda gi jo-Israel to ne ng’iewo gik mane in go, ka chuli ngano gi mor kich gi mor zeituni kod gik mamilimili." 
Ezekiel27:18 Jo-Damaski bende ne ng’iewo gigi mag ohala kaachiel gi gik mang’eny mane iloso, ka gichuli divai mogol Helbon kod yie rombe mogol Sahar." 
Ezekiel27:19 Ne giwilo gigi gi nyinyo mothedhi kod gik mamilimili. 
Ezekiel27:20 Jo-Dedan ne miyi barangede mibolo kiidho farese kuom gigi. 
Ezekiel27:21 Jo-Arabu kod ruodhi mag Kedar bende ne ng’iewo gigi mag ohala ka gichuli nyirombe gi rombe kod diek. 
Ezekiel27:22 Jolok ohala mag Sheba kod Rama to ne jong’iewo gik mane in go, ka gimiyi gik mamilimili mabeyoe moloyo, kod kite mopogore opogore ma nengogi tek kod dhahabu." 
Ezekiel27:23 Joma ne odak e mier ma Haran gi Keneh gi Eden gi Ashur kod Kilmad, kaachiel gi joohala mag Sheba, duto ne joloko ohala kodi." 
Ezekiel27:24 Ne gikeloni lewni ma nengogi tek kod mago maralik mogorie kido mabeyo, kaachiel gi mikeka mag dier ot, mokiew gi range malombo wang’, kod tonde mokadi motegno." 
Ezekiel27:25 Mwanduni duto ne iting’o e yiedhi madongodongoe moloyo. Ne ichalo gi yie manie nam, moting’ore mapek." 
Ezekiel27:26 Kane jokwang’ magi oteri e chuny nam, yamb yo wuok chieng’ nogoyi, moketi kuma bor gi dhowath." 
Ezekiel27:27 Mwanduni duto mag ohala gi jokwang’ magi, gi jopecho gi joohala magi, kod jolweny duto mane in go nolal pep e nam, kane yie obarore." 
Ezekiel27:28 Uwi mane jokwang’ matho goyo nowinjore gie dhonam. 
Ezekiel27:29 Yiedhi mamoko koro odong’ nono, nikech jokwang’ duto osewuok, mochung’ e dhowath." 
Ezekiel27:30 Giduto giywagi malit, ka gibuko wigi buru, kendo ging’ielore e lowo." 
Ezekiel27:31 Giselielo wigi ka giywagi, kendo girwako piende gugru. Giywak matek, ka chunygi lit ahinya." 
Ezekiel27:32 Gisechuogoni wend ywak kama: Ere dala moro machielo, machalo gi Turo, ma koro oling’ thi e dier nam?" 
Ezekiel27:33 Kane ioro gigi mag ohala loka nam, to ne ikonyo ogendini duto. Ruodhi ne odoko momew mana gi gigi mogundho." 
Ezekiel27:34 To koro, ibarori e nam, mi isiko e nam matut. Mwanduni kod joma ne tiyoni, duto oselal nono e nam kaachiel kodi.”" 
Ezekiel27:35 Ng’ato ka ng’ato modak e dhonam, kihondko goyo kuom gima osetimoreni. Kata mana ruodhi maggi bende obwok, mi remb ringregi oo." 
Ezekiel27:36 Ilal! Adier, iselal chuth, kendo joohala mae piny duto kihondko goyo, ka giparo ni gin bende masira makamano biro makogi." 
Ezekiel28:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nowuoyo koda mowachona niya," 
Ezekiel28:2 “Wuod dhano, nyis ruodh Turo ni an Ruoth Nyasaye awachone kama: Isungori ni ibet e kom duong’ ni in nyasaye. To kata obedo ni iwuondori ni in nyasaye kamano, to ng’e ni in mana dhano!" 
Ezekiel28:3 Koso iparo ni iriek moloyo Daniel, ma onge gima dotami ng’eyo?" 
Ezekiel28:3 Koso iparo ni iriek moloyo Daniel, ma onge gima dotami ng’eyo?" 
Ezekiel28:4 En adier ni riekoni osemiyo ibedo momew gi mwandu mag dhahabu kod fedha," 
Ezekiel28:5 nimar ne iloko ohala gi rieko, mi iyudo ohala mathoth To koro mano kaka mwanduni osemiyo idhialori!”" 
Ezekiel28:6 “Koro an Ruoth Nyasaye awacho kama: Kaka iparo ni iriek ka nyasaye kamano," 
Ezekiel28:7 abiro kelo wasigu moa e oganda magerie moloyo mondo omonji. Gibiro ketho mwanduni duto ma iseyudo kuom riekoni, kendo misungo." 
Ezekiel28:8 Gibiro negi gi nek marach e chuny nam. 
Ezekiel28:9 To chieng’ ma gibiro mondo ginegino, bende pod niwach ni in nyasaye? Ooyo, ka gibiro iri, to nibed mana dhano matho, ma ok nyasaye!" 
Ezekiel28:10 Initho ka guok e lwet jopinje mamoko makia Nyasaye. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema agolo chik kamano.” 
Ezekiel28:11 Ruoth Nyasaye nochako owuoyo koda," 
Ezekiel28:12 mowachona niya, “Wuod dhano, chuog wend ywak ni ruodh Turo. Nyise ni an Ruoth Nyasaye awacho kama: E kinde moko ne in ng’at makare ahinya. Mano kaka ne iriek kendo ijaber!" 
Ezekiel28:13 Ne idak Eden, puoth Nyasaye, kendo ne ilichori gi gik molos gi dhahabu, kod kite mopogore opogore ma nengogi tek, kaka sardius gi topaz gi diamond gi berul gi oniks gi jasper gi safir gi emerald kod karbunkel. Ne olosnigi mana chieng’ mane ochueyie." 
Ezekiel28:14 Ne aketo malaika malich ma iluongo ni kerubi kuno mondo oriti, mi ne aketi e goda maler, kiwuotho e kind kite mang’ang’ni ka mach." 
Ezekiel28:15 Timbeni ne long’o chakre chieng’ mane ochueyie nyaka chieng’ mane ichakoe timo timbe mamono. 
Ezekiel28:16 Ne iketo chunyi kuom tich ohala, mi mano nomiyo idonjo e timbe mahundu kod richo. Kuom mano ne oriembi oko e goda maler, kendo kerubi mane riti ne ogoli oko kuom kite mang’ang’nigo." 
Ezekiel28:17 Sunga ne omaki nikech ne ijaber, kendo huma mane in go nomiyo itimo timbe mofuwo. Asechwadi piny e lowo, mondo ibed siem ni ruodhi mamoko." 
Ezekiel28:18 Kane iloko ohala to ne itimo timbe mang’eny mamono, mi kuondeni mag lemo nodwanyore. Emomiyo ne amoko mach kuomi, mi iwang’ pep. Ne aloki buru mondo ji duto oneni." 
Ezekiel28:19 Ilal! Adier, iselal chuth, kendo ogendini duto mane ong’eyi luoro omako, kaparo ni gin bende masira mosemakino biro makogi.”" 
Ezekiel28:20 Ruoth Nyasaye nowachona niya," 
Ezekiel28:21 “Wuod dhano, chung’ kichomo dala mar Sidon, kendo kwede," 
Ezekiel28:22 kinyise ni an Ruoth Nyasaye awacho kama: Amon kodi, in Sidon! Ji biro miya duong’ nikech gima atimoni, kendo ging’e ni an e Ruoth Nyasaye, ka anyiso kaka aler kuom joma odak kuomi." 
Ezekiel28:23 Abiro oroni tuoche, kendo anami remo mol e wang’yoreni. Wasigu nomonji koni gi koni, mi gineg jogi. Eka ining’e ni an e Ruoth Nyasaye.”" 
Ezekiel28:24 Ruoth Nyasaye nochako owachona niya, “Onge oganda moro modak machiegni mane ojaro Israel, ma nochak olokre ka kudho kata ka pedo ma hinyogi. Kamano jo-Israel nong’e ni an e Ruoth Nyasaye.”" 
Ezekiel28:25 Ruoth Nyasaye nomedo wacho niya, “Abiro dwoko jo-Israel ka agolo kuom ogendini mane akeyogie, mi ogendini duto nong’e ni an Ng’ama Ler. Jo-Israel nodag e pinygi giwegi, mane amiyo Jakobo jatichna." 
Ezekiel28:26 Ginidag kuno gi kue, kendo giniger udi, mi gipidh mzabibu. Anakum ogendini mokiewo kodgi duto, mane ojarogi, mi Israel nobed gi kue. Eka gining’e ni an e Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachgi.”" 
Ezekiel29:1 Chieng’ due apar gachiel due mar apar, e higa mar apar, Ruoth Nyasaye nowachona niya," 
Ezekiel29:2 “Wuod dhano, chung’ kichomo piny Misri, mondo ikwed Farao ruodh Misri, kaachiel gi pinyno duto." 
Ezekiel29:3 Nyise ni an Ruoth Nyasaye awachone kama: Iwacho ni aora Nael en mari, kendo ni ne ichueri kendi." 
Ezekiel29:4 To abiro keto olowu e dhogi, mi ami rech manie aochi mok kuomi." 
Ezekiel29:5 Anaboli e thim kaachiel gi rechgo duto, mi ringri norodhre piny kuno. Ok noyiki to wachiwi ni winy kod ondiegi mondo ochami." 
Ezekiel29:6 Eka jo-Misri duto nong’e ni an e Ruoth Nyasaye.” Ruoth Nyasaye nochako owachona niya, “Jo-Israel nogeno kuomu ni dukonygi, un jo-Misri, to unyap mana ka odundu." 
Ezekiel29:7 Ne gimakou mi utur, mi umiyo onding’gi owil." 
Ezekiel29:8 Emomiyo an Ruoth Nyasaye anyisi in Farao ni abiro kelo ji mondo omonji, kendo gibiro nego jogi, kaachiel gi jambi duto." 
Ezekiel29:9 Piny Misri biro dong’ nono kokethore, eka ining’e ni an e Ruoth Nyasaye. “Kaka ne iwacho ni aora Nael en mari, kendo ni in ema ne ichueye," 
Ezekiel29:10 omiyo an jasiki, kendo amon gi Naelni nogo. Bende abiro miyo piny Misri duto doko piny mokethore kendo modong’ nono, chakre dala mar Migdol yo nyandwat, nyaka dala mar Saiyene yo milambo, kendo nyaka tong’ Ethiopia." 
Ezekiel29:11 Onge dhano kata le ma nokadh e iye, kendo kuom higni piero ang’wen onge ng’ama nodag kuno." 
Ezekiel29:12 Anami Misri bed piny mokethore moloyo pinje mamoko duto e piny. Anake jo-Misri e pinje, mi gidag e kind ogendini mamoko.”" 
Ezekiel29:13 Ruoth Nyasaye nomedo wacho niya, “Bang’ higni piero ang’wen anadwok jo-Misri ka agolo e pinje mane akeyogie," 
Ezekiel29:14 mi anami gidag e piny Misri ma milambo, kuma ne giaye. Ginibed oganda mayomyomie moloyo ogendini mamoko duto," 
Ezekiel29:15 mi ok ginichak gilo oganda moro kendo. Anami gibed oganda marachrach ma ok nyal bedo gi loch kuom oganda machielo. 
Ezekiel29:16 Kamano jo-Israel ok nochak oket genogi kuomgi. Masira momako Misrino nonyis jo-Israel kaka ne giketho ka giketo genogi kuom jo-Misri. Bang’e jo-Israel nong’e ni an e Ruoth Nyasaye.” 
Ezekiel29:17 Chieng’ mokwongo mar due mar achiel, e higa mar piero ariyo gabiriyo, Ruoth Nyasaye nowuoyo koda, mowachona niya," 
Ezekiel29:18 “Wuod dhano, Nebukadnezar ruodh Babulon nomonjo Turo. Ne omiyo jolweny mage otiyo matek, mi wigi oluny kendo gokgi obuth. To ruoth Nebukadnezar, kata mana oganda jolwenje, ne ok oyudo gimoro kuom chandruokgino duto." 
Ezekiel29:19 Kuom mano, koro an Ruoth Nyasaye awacho kama: Abiro chiwo piny Misri e lwet ruoth Nebukadnezar, mi oyak pinyno, kendo okaw mwandugi duto, mondo ochulgo lwenje." 
Ezekiel29:20 Abiro miye piny Misri kaka chudo kuom tichne, nikech jolwenje ne tiyona. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano." 
Ezekiel29:21 “E ndalogo anami jo-Israel bed oganda matek, mi in Ezekiel nami iwuo kama ji duto nyalo winjie mondo ging’e ni an e Ruoth Nyasaye.”" 
Ezekiel30:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nowachona niya," 
Ezekiel30:2 “Wuod dhano, kor wach ni an Ruoth Nyasaye awacho kama: “Ywaguru," 
Ezekiel30:3 nikech chieng’ masira chiegni! Adier, chieng’ Ruoth Nyasaye chiegni! Enobed odiechieng’ ma piny dudoe, kendo ma ogendini yudoe chandruok." 
Ezekiel30:4 Lweny nobedie Misri, kendo jo-Ethiopia noparre malit. Ka gineno kaka oneg ji mang’eny Misri, kendo oyak pinyno, mi okethore kendo odong’ gunda." 
Ezekiel30:5 “Jolweny mane ogol Ethiopia gi Lidia gi Libya gi Arabia gi Kub koda ka joga awuon bende notho e lwenyno.” 
Ezekiel30:6 Ruoth Nyasaye wacho niya, “Jolweny ma konyo Misri noneg e lweny, chakre Migdol yo nyandwat nyak Saiyene yo milambo. Oganda lweny ma jo-Misri sungorego otieki. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano." 
Ezekiel30:7 Pinyno nobed mokethore moloyo pinje mamoko duto, kendo mier mage nodong’ gundni moloyo mier mamoko duto e piny." 
Ezekiel30:8 Ka awang’o Misri gi mach, mi anego jolweny makonye duto, eka gining’e ni an e Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Ezekiel30:9 “Ka ndalono ochopo, kendo Misri osekethi, to anaor joote gi yiedhi mondo odhi obwog jo-Ethiopia ma odak gi kue, mi ginibed gi kihondko malich. Adier, ndalono biro!”" 
Ezekiel30:10 Ruoth Nyasaye wacho niya, “Abiro oro Nebukadnezar ruodh Babulon mondo otiek mwandu Misri." 
Ezekiel30:11 Enobi gi jolwenje mager mondo oketh pinyno. Ginimonje, mi ringre joma onegi nopong’e." 
Ezekiel30:12 Anaduon aora Nael, mi aket Misri e lwet joma richo, kendo jopinje mamoko noketh pinyno duto. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano.”" 
Ezekiel30:13 Ruoth Nyasaye wacho niya, “Abiro tieko nyiseche manono man Memfis, mi onge ng’ato ma nochak obed ruodh Misri kendo. Bende anago ji duto modak kuno gi kihondko." 
Ezekiel30:14 Yo milambo mar piny Misri abiro loko thim, to dala Zoan man yo nyandwat abiro wang’o gi mach. Anakum dala maduong’ mar Misri miluongo ni Thebes," 
Ezekiel30:15 kendo anaol mirimba kuom dala mar Pelisium, ma dala mochiel motegno moloyo e Misri. Mwandu mag Thebes bende nakethi," 
Ezekiel30:16 kendo nawang’ Misri gi mach, mi Pelisium chandre malit. Ohinga mar Thebes ibiro muko, mi pi pong’ dala." 
Ezekiel30:17 Yawuowi manie mier mag Hieropolis kod Bubastis notho e lwenjno, to ji mamoko duto nomaki mi ter e tuech." 
Ezekiel30:18 Ka atieko teko ma jo-Misri sungorego, to mudho noim Tapanhes. Adier, rumbi noim piny Misri, mi ji duto manie mieche nomaki mi ter e tuech." 
Ezekiel30:19 Ka akumo jo-Misri kamano, to gining’e ni an e Ruoth Nyasaye.”" 
Ezekiel30:20 Chieng’ due abiriyo, due mar achiel e higa mar apar gachiel, Ruoth Nyasaye nowuoyo koda, mowachona niya," 
Ezekiel30:21 “Wuod dhano, aseturo bad Farao, ruodh Misri, to onge ng’ama osetueyo badeno, kata mosechome mondo ochangi, obed motegno ma dochak omakgo ligangla kendo." 
Ezekiel30:22 Koro an Ruoth Nyasaye awacho kama: An jasik ruodh Misri, omiyo abiro turo bade mangima gi bade mosetur, mi ligangla noa e lwete mi lwar piny." 
Ezekiel30:23 Bende abiro keyo jo-Misri e pinje, mi gidag e kind ogendini mamoko." 
Ezekiel30:24 Bang’e anami bad ruodh Babulon bed motegno, mi aket liganglana e lwete. Bad ruodh Misri to abiro turo, mi nochur ka otho e nyim ruodh Babulon." 
Ezekiel30:25 Adier, anami ruodh Misri bed mayomyom. Ruodh Babulon to nami teko. Ka amiyo ruodh Babulon liganglana, mi omonjogo piny Misri, to ji duto nong’e ni an e Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Ezekiel30:26 Anake jo-Misri e pinje, mi gidag e kind ogendini mamoko. Eka gining’e ni an e Ruoth Nyasaye.”" 
Ezekiel31:1 Chieng’ mokwongo mar due mar adek, e higa mar apar gachiel, Ruoth Nyasaye nowuoyo koda, mowachona niya," 
Ezekiel31:2 “Wuod dhano, nyis Farao ruodh Misri gi ogandane duto kama: Koro mano kaka iduong’! En ang’o ma dipimigo?" 
Ezekiel31:3 Ichalo gi yadh sida man Lebanon, man gi bede mabeyo motimo tipo. Adier, en yath marabora motundo e polo." 
Ezekiel31:4 Aore manie bwo lowo ne miyo yadhno dongo, nikech ne otero pi kama odongoe, kendo ne gikeyo pi ni yien duto manie bungu." 
Ezekiel31:5 Yadhno ne odongo marabora moyombo yien duto, kendo bedene ne boyo mokar madongodongo, nikech ne oyudo pi morome." 
Ezekiel31:6 Kit winy duto ne ogero utgi e bedene, kendo le mag thim ne nywolo nyithindgi e tiende. Ogendini mag piny bende ne yueyo e tipone." 
Ezekiel31:7 Mano kaka yadhno ne jaber! Ne en rabora malich, kendo bedene ne okar, nikech tiendene ne ochopo e pige mamol e bwo lowo." 
Ezekiel31:8 Onge yadh sida moro e puoth Nyasaye, mane inyalo pimo kode. Adier, onge yath moro mane nigi bede machal gi mage. Chutho onge yath moro e puoth Nyasaye mane jaber ka en." 
Ezekiel31:9 An Ruoth Nyasaye ema amiyo obedo majaber gi bede mojany kamano. Yien duto mane nie Eden puoth Nyasaye ne nyiego omako kode. 
Ezekiel31:10 “Koro an Ruoth Nyasaye awacho kama: Yadhno ne odongo, mi ochopo e polo. To kane odongo marabora kamano, nodoko jasunga." 
Ezekiel31:11 Kuom mano asedagi yadhno, omiyo abiro kete e lwet ruodh piny moro, mabiro timone mana maromre gi richone." 
Ezekiel31:12 Jopinje mamoko mager biro tong’e oko, mi wite kucha. Bedene motur biro lwar e gode duto kod holni manie piny. Bende ogendini duto ma osebedo kodak e tipone biro dar." 
Ezekiel31:13 Kit winy duto biro piyo kuome piny, kuma opodhoeno. Le bende biro nyono bedene." 
Ezekiel31:14 Kuom mano onge yath moro kata bed ni oyudo pi mang’eny manade, ma nochak odong mabor mi wiye tund e polo kamano. Giduto nyaka githo mana kaka dhano tho, mi gidhi e Piny Joma Otho.”" 
Ezekiel31:15 Ruoth Nyasaye wacho kama: Chieng’ ma yadhno dhiyo e Piny Joma Otho, anami pi manie bwo lowo ime, kendo ywage. Anageng’ aore mondo kik mol, kendo anakel mudho e got Lebanon mana nikech en, mi ami yien duto mae bungu two." 
Ezekiel31:16 Ka awite mwalo e Piny Joma Otho, to koko mopodhogo nobwog ogendini duto. Yien duto mag Eden gi yiend Lebanon mabeyo mayudo pi mang’eny nobed mamor e piny mamwalono." 
Ezekiel31:17 Gisedhi kode e Piny Joma Otho, mondo gibed gi joma ne oyudo osenegi e lweny. Ji duto mane odak e bwo tipone to oseke e kind ogendini." 
Ezekiel31:18 “Yadhno en ruodh Misri, kaachiel gi ogandane duto. Kuom yien duto mag Eden, onge moro marabora kendo ma mako wang’ moloye. To koro obiro dhi mwalo e Piny Joma Otho mana ka yiend Eden mamoko, mi obed gi joma kia Nyasaye, kod joma ne oneg e lweny. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano.”" 
Ezekiel32:1 Chieng’ mokwongo mar due mar apar gariyo e higa mar apar gariyo, Ruoth Nyasaye nowuoyo koda, mowachona niya," 
Ezekiel32:2 “Wuod dhano, ywag Farao ruodh Misri kinyise kama: Itimori sibuor e kind ogendini, to chutho in mana nyang’ pi ma mwomo aora. Iduwo pi gi tiendi, kendo iketho aore!" 
Ezekiel32:3 Ka ogendini mang’eny ochokore, to namaki gi tonda, mi anyisgi giywayi oko gi tolno." 
Ezekiel32:4 Anaboli piny e pap, mi ami winy kod ondiegi duto mag piny nur kuomi, ka chami." 
Ezekiel32:5 Anadhur ringri motop e gode kod holni," 
Ezekiel32:6 kendo anami rembi mol, mi pong’ piny, koda ka gode gi holni." 
Ezekiel32:7 Chieng’ ma atieki, to abiro miyo polo imore mi sulue ok norieny. Anaum wang’chieng’ gi boche polo, mi due bende ok norieny." 
Ezekiel32:8 Kamano anagol ler duto mag polo, mi ami pinyi tim mudho. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano." 
Ezekiel32:9 “Ka atero jogi momak e lweny, e pinje mane pok ing’eyo, to kibaji biro goyo ogendini mathoth." 
Ezekiel32:10 Gima biro timoreni nobwog ogendini mang’eny, kendo ka amilo ligangla e nyim ruodhigi, to remb ringregi noo. Chieng’ ma ipodhoe, to giduto ginibed ka gitetni, ka giparo ni gin bende gibiro tho.”" 
Ezekiel32:11 Ruoth Nyasaye wacho niya, “Ligangla mar ruodh Babulon biro lwar kuomi," 
Ezekiel32:12 kendo abiro miyo jolweny moa kuom oganda magerie moloyo neg oganda maduong’ mar jolwenji. Gibiro ketho gik moko duto ma isungorigo, mi gineg jogi duto." 
Ezekiel32:13 Abiro nego dhou duto kamoro amora ma gimodhoe. Bang’e pi ok nochak oduwre, nikech dhano gi jamni ma diduwe nobed maonge!" 
Ezekiel32:14 Anami aoreu kue, mi gibed maliw, kendo mol nyamonge. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano." 
Ezekiel32:15 “Ka aketho piny Misri, mi olokore thim, kendo anego ji duto modak kuno, to gining’e ni an e Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Ezekiel32:16 Wendni en wend ywak ma mond pinje mamoko noywaggo Misri kod joge duto. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano.” 
Ezekiel32:17 Chieng’ due apar gabich, due mokwongo, e higa mar apar gariyo, Ruoth Nyasaye nowuoyo koda, mowachona niya," 
Ezekiel32:18 “Wuod dhano, ywag jo-Misri, ma oganda maduong’. Witgi e Piny Joma Otho mondo gibed kuno gi ogendini mamoko marateke," 
Ezekiel32:19 kipenjogi niya, ‘Uparo ni ubeyo moloyo ji mamoko koso? Dhiuru urieru gi joma kia Nyasaye mane osetho!’" 
Ezekiel32:20 “Jo-Misri biro tho kaachiel gi joma inego e lweny, nikech ligangla oikore nego jo-Misri duto." 
Ezekiel32:21 Thuondi madongo kaachiel gi joma ne konyogi kedo, biro rwako jo-Misri gi mor e Piny Joma Otho, ka giwacho niya, ‘Joma kia Nyasaye mane onegi e lweny osebiro mwalo ka! Eki giriere ka!’" 
Ezekiel32:22 “Jotend Asuria oriere piny kucha, ka liete jolweny mag pinyno olworogi. Giduto ne oneggi e lweny," 
Ezekiel32:23 kendo lietegi nie bath Piny Joma Otho kuma bor. Jolweny mag pinyno duto notho e lweny, kendo lietegi olworo liete jotendgi. To chon ne gimiyo joma ngima kibaji." 
Ezekiel32:24 “Ruodh Elam bende ni kuno, ka liete joge mag lweny olwore. Ne oneggi duto e lweny, mi owitgi e Piny Joma Otho mak otergi nyangu. Kane gingima to ne gibwogo ji, to koro giriere e liel ka wigi okuot." 
Ezekiel32:25 Ruodh Elam oriere piny e kind joma onegi. Liete mag joge mag lweny olwore mokete diere. Giduto ne gin joma ok ter nyangu mane onegi e lweny. Kane gingima to ne gibuogo ji, to koro giriere e liel ka wigi okuot, kaachiel gi ji mamoko mane onegi e lweny." 
Ezekiel32:26 “Ruodhi mag Meshek gi Tubal bende ni kuno, ka liete jogi mag lweny olworogi. Giduto ne githo e lweny mak otergi nyangu. Kane gingima, to ne gibwogo ji." 
Ezekiel32:27 Ne ok oyikgi kaluwore gi chik mane oyikgo thuondi e ndalo machon. Thuondigo ne dhi e Piny Joma Otho ka omanore gi gilwenjgi. Ligangla ne gitenogo wigi, to kuodigi ne giumorego. Kane thuondigo ngima to ne gibwogo ji." 
Ezekiel32:28 “To un jo-Misri, unurieru piny ka utur e kind ogendini ma ok ter nyangu, mane onegi e lweny." 
Ezekiel32:29 “Jo-Edom gi ruodhigi kod jotendgi bende ni kuno. Chon ne gin jolweny marateke, to koro giriere e Piny Joma Otho, kaachiel gi joma ok ter nyangu, mane onegi e lweny." 
Ezekiel32:30 “Jotelo duto mag ogendini modak yo nyandwat ni kuro, kaachiel gi jo-Sidon. Chon ne gin joma rateke ma bwogo ji, tinde to gisedonjo e Piny Joma Otho gi wichkuot ka ok otergi nyangu mi giriere kuno gi joma onegi e lweny. Gin bende gin gi wichkuot mana ka ji mamoko madhi e Piny joma Otho.”" 
Ezekiel32:31 Ruoth Nyasaye wacho niya, “Ka Farao ruodh Misri oneno jogo duto, to chunye noduogi mi obed modhil kuom thone, kod tho jolwenje duto mane onegi e lweny." 
Ezekiel32:32 Kane pod ongima, to ne amiyo obwogo ji, to koro en kaachiel gi joge mag lweny gibiro riere piny kaachiel gi joma ok ter nyangu mane onegi e lweny. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano.”" 
Ezekiel33:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nowuoyo koda, mowachona niya," 
Ezekiel33:2 “Wuod dhano, penj jou kama: Ka akelo lweny e piny moro, donge jopinyno diyier ng’atgi achiel mondo obed jarito?" 
Ezekiel33:3 Ka ng’ato oneno wasigu ka biro, mi ogoyo koko mondo ji otang’," 
Ezekiel33:4 to ng’at mowinjo kokono ok odewo, mi wasigu obiro monege, to en owuon ema nochaye kuom thone." 
Ezekiel33:5 Adier, onegore kende owuon nikech ne owinjo siem, to ok odewo. Ka dine oyie owinj siem, to dotony." 
Ezekiel33:6 “To ka jarito oneno wasigu ka biro, to ok ogoyo koko mondo ji otang’, mi wasigu obiro, monego ng’ato, to ng’atno notho kapod en jaricho, to anakwan jaritono ka e ng’at ma onego ng’atno." 
Ezekiel33:7 “Koro in, wuod dhano, aketi jarito mar oganda Israel duto. Tiji biro bedo siemogi gi siem moro amora ma amiyi." 
Ezekiel33:8 Ka awachoni ni ng’at marach biro tho, mi ok isieme mondo owe yorene maricho, to enotho kapod en jaricho, kendo in ema nakwani ka ng’ama onege." 
Ezekiel33:9 To ka isiemo ng’at marach, to ok oweyo timbene maricho, to enotho kapod en jaricho, to in isereso ngimani.”" 
Ezekiel33:10 Ruoth Nyasaye nowachona niya, “Wuod dhano, jo-Israel ywagore ni kethogi kod richogi turogi, kendo ni dendgi dhi adhiya. Gipenjore kaka digiyud ngima." 
Ezekiel33:11 To nyisgi ni an Ruoth Nyasaye akuong’ora ni ok berna ka ng’at ma timbene richo tho, to abedo mamor mana ka oweyo timbene maricho, mobedo mangima. Un jo-Israel, weuru timbeu maricho! Adier, wegiuru! Ere gima omiyo udwaro ni mondo utho!" 
Ezekiel33:12 “Wuod dhano, koro nyis jo-Israel ni ka ng’at makare odonjo e richo, to gik mabeyo mosetimo ok nokonye. To bende ka ng’at ma timbene richo oweyo timo richo, to ok noyud kum. Ng’at makare to ka odonjo e richo to timbene mabeyo mosebedo kotimo ok nomi obed mangima." 
Ezekiel33:13 Ka awacho ni ng’at makare ni nobed mangima, to odonjo e richo, kogeno kuom gik mabeyo mosetimo, to ok napar kata mana gimoro achiel kuom gik mabeyo mosetimo, to enotho athoya nikech richone." 
Ezekiel33:14 To bende ka asiemo ng’at marach ni obiro tho, mi oweyo timbene maricho," 
Ezekiel33:15 kodwoko gik mane oholo, kendo ochulo gik mane osekwalo, mi oluwo chike makelo ngima, kotimo gik makare kendo mabeyo, to enobed mangima." 
Ezekiel33:16 Anawene richo duto ma osetimo, kendo enobed mangima nikech otimo gik makare kendo mabeyo." 
Ezekiel33:17 “Jou wacho ni gima an Ruoth Nyasaye atimo ok ni kare! To chutho, gin ema timbegi ok ni kare." 
Ezekiel33:18 Ka ng’at makare oweyo tim makare, mi odonjo e richo, to enotho nikech richone." 
Ezekiel33:19 To bende ka ng’at marach oweyo timbene maricho, mi otimo gik makare kendo mabeyo, to nobed mangima." 
Ezekiel33:20 To un jo-Israel, pod uwacho ni gima atimo ok ni kare! Koro abiro ng’ado ni ng’ato ka ng’ato kuomu bura moromo gi timbene.”" 
Ezekiel33:21 Chieng’ due abich, due mar apar, kane wasetieko higni apar gariyo e tuech, ng’at moro mane otony mowuok Jerusalem ne obiro mowachona ni dalano osekaw." 
Ezekiel33:22 To odhiambo mane kinyne obiroe, ne oyudo asewinjo ka teko mar Ruoth Nyasaye ni kuoma. Omiyo kinyne gokinyi, kane ng’atno obiro, to Ruoth Nyasaye noduogona teko mar wuoyo." 
Ezekiel33:23 Bang’e Ruoth Nyasaye nowuoyo koda, mowachona niya," 
Ezekiel33:24 “Wuod dhano ji modak e miech Israel modong’ gundni wacho kama, ‘Ibrahim ne en ng’at achiel kende, to ne omiye pinyni duto. Wan to wan ji mang’eny, omiyo pinyni koro en marwa!’" 
Ezekiel33:25 “To nyisgi ni an Ruoth Nyasaye awachonigi kama: Uchamo ring’o man gi remo, kendo ulamo nyiseche manono, bende uchuero remo. Koro ere gima omiyo uparo ni pinyno en maru?" 
Ezekiel33:26 Ligangla mau ema ugeno kuomgi. Timbeu mono, kendo ng’ato ka ng’ato terore gi chi wadgi. To eka pod uparo ni pinyno en maru!" 
Ezekiel33:27 “Nyisgi bende ni an Ruoth Nyasaye akuong’ora ni kaka an Nyasaye mangima, ji modak e mier modong’ gundni ibiro nego, kendo joma odak oko e risaf, ondiegi nocham, to joma opondo e gode kod buche, tuoche nonegi." 
Ezekiel33:28 Anaketh pinyno mi lokre thim, kendo tekregi ma gisungorego norum. Gode mag Israel nobed moyugno, maonge ng’ama nyalo wuothoe." 
Ezekiel33:29 Ka akumo ji kuom richogi, kendo aloko pinyno thim, eka gining’e ni an e Ruoth Nyasaye.”" 
Ezekiel33:30 Ruoth Nyasaye nowachona niya, “Wuod dhano, jou wuoyo kuomi ka gichokore e tok ohinga kendo ka gin e dhoutegi. Ng’ato ka ng’ato wacho ni wadgi niya, ‘Wadhiyo mondo wawinj wach moa kuom Nyasaye kawuono.’" 
Ezekiel33:31 Kuom mano joga chokore mondo owinj gima iwacho, to kata obedo ni iwachonigi gima onego gitim, to ok gitim. Miriambo ema gihero kendo pesa ema giketoe chunygi." 
Ezekiel33:32 Gikwani mana ka jawer ma weronigi wende mamit, kata magoyonigi thum. Wecheni duto giwinjo, to onge ma gimako kata achiel." 
Ezekiel33:33 To ka wechenigo duto otimore, kaka en adier ni gibiro timore, mak orem, to eka gining’e ni kara janabi osebet ka ni e kindgi!”" 
Ezekiel34:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nowuoyo koda mowachona niya," 
Ezekiel34:2 “Wuod dhano, kwed jotend Israel, ma akwano ka jokwadh joga. Kornigi wach, kinyisogi ni an Ruoth Nyasaye awacho kama: Unune malit, un jokwath mag Israel! Uritoru mana un uwegi, to rombe to ok udew." 
Ezekiel34:3 Umadho chak, kendo urwako lewni molos gi yie rombe, bende rombe mabeyoe moloyo ema unego uchamo, to rombe ok uriti." 
Ezekiel34:4 Adier, ok urit rombe moyomno, kendo ok uthiedh mago matuo, bende ok uchom mago motur, bende ok uchok mago moke, kata manyo molal ok umany, to usandogi asanda." 
Ezekiel34:5 Koro kaka rombe onge gi jokwath, giseke mi ondiegi osenegogi kendo ochamogi." 
Ezekiel34:6 Kamano romba bayo abaya ewi gode, kendo gike kuonde duto e pinyu, to onge ng’ama manyogi kata ma temo mondo ochokgi." 
Ezekiel34:7 “Kuom mano, un jokwath, winjuru gima an Ruoth Nyasaye awachonu." 
Ezekiel34:8 Ondiegi osemonjo romba, monego, kendo ochamo, nikech gionge jakwath. Jokwadha ok tem mondo omany rombe to giritore mana gin giwegi. Rombe to ok gidew." 
Ezekiel34:9 Omiyo un jokwath," 
Ezekiel34:10 an Ruoth Nyasaye awacho ni kaka an Nyasaye mangima, amon kodu. Abiro golo rombena oko kuomu, mi ok nachak awe kendo ubed jokwadhgi kendo, kuritoru mana kendu uwegi! Bende abiro resogi e lwetu, mi ok nawe uchamgi." 
Ezekiel34:11 “An Ruoth Nyasaye awachonu ni abiro manyo rombena an awuon mi aritgi," 
Ezekiel34:12 mana kaka jakwath rito rombene mane olal moke, to ochako onwang’o. Abiro duogogi kagologi kuonde duto mane gikee, chieng’ masira mane piny otimo mudho." 
Ezekiel34:13 Abiro gologi oko kuom ogendini mamoko, mi achokgi kaachiel, kendo aduoggi e pinygi giwegi. Anakwagi e gode Israel kendo e bath aore, kod kuonde duto ma ji odakie." 
Ezekiel34:14 Anawe gikwa gi kue e lege mae gode gi holni, kendo e lege duto mabeyo manie piny Israel." 
Ezekiel34:15 An awuon ema nabed jokwadh romba, kendo anayudnigi kama giyueyoe. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano." 
Ezekiel34:16 “Anamany rombe molal, mi achok mago moke, bende anachom mago motur, kendo anathiedh mago matuo, mi arit mago mangima kendo machue, nimar an e jakwath marito rombe e yo makare." 
Ezekiel34:17 “Koro un jamba, an Ruoth Nyasaye awachonu ni abiro ng’ado bura moro ka moro kuomu, mi apog mabeyo kuom maricho, kendo anapog imbe kuom nyuogi." 
Ezekiel34:18 Uchamo lum mabeyo moloyo, to eka pod unyono lum ma ok ucham piny. Bende umodho pi maliw, to uduwo mago ma ok umodhi!" 
Ezekiel34:19 Kuom mano, umiyo rombena mamoko chamo mana lum ma usenyono piny, kendo modho mana pi ma useduwo." 
Ezekiel34:20 “Emomiyo an Ruoth Nyasaye, anyisou ni abiro ng’ado bura e kindu un rombe machwe kod mago modhero." 
Ezekiel34:21 Ugoyo joweteu matuo gi mba, kendo utuomogi gi pat wiu, mi umiyo gipogore gia e kueth, kendo gike." 
Ezekiel34:22 To abiro reso rombena mi ok nawe uchak usandgi. Anang’ad bura ni romba duto, mi apog mabeyo kuom maricho." 
Ezekiel34:23 Anamigi jakwath achiel, ma en jatichna Daudi, kendo enoritgi maber." 
Ezekiel34:24 An Ruoth Nyasaye anabed Nyasachgi, to jatichna Daudi nobed jatendgi. An ema awacho kamano." 
Ezekiel34:25 Anatim kodgi singruok makelonigi kue, bende anatiek ondiegi duto e piny, mondo romba obed gi kue, ka kwayo e thim, kendo nindo aninda e bungu." 
Ezekiel34:26 “Anaguedhgi kendo anawe gidag e alwora mar goda maler, kakelonigi koth e kinde mowinjore." 
Ezekiel34:27 Yiendgi nonyag olembe, kendo puothegi nochieg cham, bende ng’ato ka ng’ato nodag gi kue e lope owuon. Ka achodo nyororo mane otuego joga, mi aresogi e teko mar joma ne olokogi wasumbni, to eka gining’e ni an e Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Ezekiel34:28 Ogendini mamoko ok nochak oyakgi, bende ondiegi ok noneggi mi chamgi, to ginidag gi kue, maonge ng’ama bwogogi." 
Ezekiel34:29 Anami puothegi chieg cham mang’eny, mi atiek kech e pinygi. Bende ogendini mamoko ok nochak ojargi kendo." 
Ezekiel34:30 Ng’ato ka ng’ato nong’e ni arito jo-Israel kendo ni gin joga. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano. 
Ezekiel34:31 “Un joga, un e kueth jamba makwayo, kendo an e Nyasachu. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano.”" 
Ezekiel35:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nowuoyo koda, mowachona niya," 
Ezekiel35:2 “Wuod dhano, chung’ kichomo yo Edom, mondo ikwedi." 
Ezekiel35:3 Nyis jopinyno ni an Ruoth Nyasaye awacho kama: An jasiku un gode mag Seir. Abiro rieyo lweta kuomu, mi akethu ulokru thim." 
Ezekiel35:4 Abiro miyo miechu dong’ gundni, mi udok kama owe nono. Eka unung’e ni an e Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Ezekiel35:5 “Ne umako sadha mosiko gi jo-Israel, mi umiyo oneggi e kinde mane masira omakogie, kikumogi mogik kuom richogi." 
Ezekiel35:6 Kuom mano, koro kaka an Ruoth Nyasaye mangima, akuong’ora ni tho ema ochomou, kendo ok unyal tony ngang’! Un joketho kuom chuero remo, kendo remono dong’ e wiu uwegi." 
Ezekiel35:7 Anami piny gode mag Seir lokre thim, kendo naneg ng’ato ang’ata mawuotho kuno." 
Ezekiel35:8 Anaum gode gi ringre joma otho, nikech joma oneg e lweny nopodh e gode gi holni kod hohni." 
Ezekiel35:9 Anami pinyu kethre chuth, kendo onge ng’ama nochak odag e miechu. Eka unung’e ni an e Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Ezekiel35:10 “Ne uwacho ni ogendini ariyo ma Juda gi Israel, kaachiel gi pinjegi gin mau, kendo ni ubiro kawogi, kata obedo ni an Ruoth Nyasaye e Nyasachgi." 
Ezekiel35:11 Kuom mano, kaka an Ruoth Nyasaye an Nyasaye mangima, abiro kumou kuom mon mane umon-go gi joga, kendo kuom mirima kod nyiego nikech gik mane utimonigi." 
Ezekiel35:12 Bang’e unung’e ni an Ruoth Nyasaye ne awinjo ka uchaya, kuwacho niya, ‘Gode mag Israel oselokore thim, kendo osemiwagi.’" 
Ezekiel35:13 Bende asewinjo ka uwuoyo kuoma gi sunga, ka uyanya." 
Ezekiel35:14 “Emomiyo, an Ruoth Nyasaye awacho kama: Abiro miyo pinyu kethre, mi piny ngima nogonu siboi kuom masira momakouno," 
Ezekiel35:15 mana kaka ne ugoyo siboi kane masira omako jo-Israel, ma gin mwanduna awuon. Kuom mano gode mag Seir nowe kokethore. Adier, piny Edom duto nodong’ mana gunda. Bang’e ji duto nong’e ni an e Ruoth Nyasaye.”" 
Ezekiel36:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nowachona niya, “Wuod dhano, wuo gi gode mag Israel, mondo inyisgi giwinj wach ma an Ruoth Nyasaye awachonigi." 
Ezekiel36:2 Wasik Israel ne ogoyonigi siboi, kawacho ni gode machon tinde gin maggi." 
Ezekiel36:3 Omiyo koro kor wach, kihulo ni an Ruoth Nyasaye awacho kama: Kane ogendini mokiewo gi Israel okawo gode mag Israel, moyako, ji duto ne onyiero Israel." 
Ezekiel36:4 Kuom mano, un gode mag Israel, winjuru gima an Ruoth Nyasaye awacho ni gode madongo gi matindo kendo ni aore kod holni, kaachiel gi kuonde mane owe kokethore kod mier mane odong’ gundni, mane ogendini mokiewo gi jo-Israel oyako kendo onyiero." 
Ezekiel36:5 “Ruoth Nyasaye ohero jo-Israel ahinya, omiyo asewuoyo ka an gi mirima mager kuom ogendini mokiewo kodgi, to moloyo asewuoyo kuom jo-Edom. Ne gimako piny ka gin gi siboi kod sunga marach e chunygi, mi gikawo legene." 
Ezekiel36:6 “Kuom mano, kor wach ni piny Israel, kinyiso gode madongo gi matindo kod aore gi holni ni an Ruoth Nyasaye aherogi, omiyo asewuoyo gi mirima mager, nikech ogendini mamoko duto oseyanyogi marach." 
Ezekiel36:7 “Emomiyo an Ruoth Nyasaye akuong’ora ni ogendini mokiewo gi Israel noyud wichkuot. 
Ezekiel36:8 To un joga Israel, yien nochak odongnu e gode mag Israel, mi nyagnu olembe, nikech ubiro dok e pinyu mak odeko." 
Ezekiel36:9 An kodu, omiyo abiro konyou, mi puotheu pur, kendo ketie kodhi." 
Ezekiel36:10 Un dhood Israel duto, abiro miyo unya mang’eny, kendo uchak udog e miechu, mi uger kuonde duto mane owe kokethore." 
Ezekiel36:11 Anami ji kaachiel gi jamni medre, kendo unubed mang’eny kaka ne un chon, mi ubed gi nyithindo mathoth. Unudag kuno kaka ne udak chon, mi ami udhi nyime maber moloyo. Eka unung’e ni an e Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Ezekiel36:12 Un joga Israel, anadwoku mondo uchak uwuoth e pinyu. Enobed pinyu uwegi, kendo nochieg maber, mi kech ok nochak oneg nyithindu." 
Ezekiel36:13 “An Ruoth Nyasaye awacho kama: Ang’eyo ni ji luongo godego ni jocham ji, kendo giwacho ni godego mayo jo-Israel nyithindgi." 
Ezekiel36:14 To chakre kawuono, ok ginichak gibed jocham ji ma mayou nyithindu. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano." 
Ezekiel36:15 Ok anayie mondo ogendini onyier godego, kata mondo ji ojargi. Bende ok ginichak gima jo-Israel nyithindgi. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano." 
Ezekiel36:16 Ruoth Nyasaye nochako owuoyo koda, mowachona niya," 
Ezekiel36:17 “Wuod dhano, e ndalo mane jo-Israel odak e pinygi, ne gidwanye gi yoregi kod timbegi makuero. Ne akwano timbegigo ka gima ochido, mana ka boke." 
Ezekiel36:18 Ne akumogi gi mirimba mager, nikech remo mane gichuero e pinygi, kod nyiseche manono mane gidwanyorego." 
Ezekiel36:19 Bende ne ang’adonigi bura kuom yoregi gi timbegi makuero, mi akeyogi e pinje mamoko, mi gidak e kind ogendini mopogore opogore." 
Ezekiel36:20 To kamoro amora mane gidhiye, ne gikeloe wichkuot ni nyinga maler, nikech ji ne wacho niya, ‘Jogi gin jo-Ruoth Nyasaye, to ne oriembgi e piny mane omiyogi.’" 
Ezekiel36:21 Mano ne omiyo aparo nyinga maler, nikech jo-Israel nokelone wichkuot, kamoro amora mane gidhiye." 
Ezekiel36:22 “Koro nyis jo-Israel ni an Ruoth Nyasaye awachonigi kama: Gima abiro timo ok abi timo nikech un, jo-Israel, to abiro timo mana nikech nyinga maler, ma usekelone wichkuot kamoro amora ma usedhiye e kind ogendini duto." 
Ezekiel36:23 Ka anyiso ogendini kaka nyinga maduong’ mane ukelone wichkuot, en nying maler, to eka gining’e ni an e Ruoth Nyasaye. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano. Gima abiro timonu ema nonyis ogendini ni an Ng’ama Ler." 
Ezekiel36:24 Anagolu e kind ogendini modak e pinje mopogore opogore, mi adwoku e pinyu uwegi." 
Ezekiel36:25 Anakir kuomu pi maliw, mi apuodhu kuom nyisecheu mamono, kod gimoro amora mane odwanyou." 
Ezekiel36:26 Anamiu chuny manyien kod paro manyien. Bende anagol kuomu chuny matek ka lwanda, mi amiu chuny malong’o." 
Ezekiel36:27 Anaket Rohona awuon kuomu, mondo uluw chikena, kendo urit buchena duto ma asemiyou." 
Ezekiel36:28 Bang’e unudag e piny mane amiyo kwereu, mi unubed joga, kendo anabed Nyasachu." 
Ezekiel36:29 Anaresu kuom gik moko duto ma miyo ubedo mogak, bende anamiu cham mogundho, mi ok unuchak ubed gi kech kendo." 
Ezekiel36:30 Adier, anami olembu nyag mang’eny, kendo chambu chieg mathoth, mondo kik uchak ubed gi kech ma dikuod wiu e kind ogendini." 
Ezekiel36:31 Unupar timbe mamono mane utimo, mi unucharu kendu nikech richou kod timbeu makuero." 
Ezekiel36:32 To un jo-Israel, adwaro ni mondo ung’e ni ok natim gigo duto nikech un, to adwaro ni mondo une wichkuot kuom gik ma utimo. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano." 
Ezekiel36:33 “An Ruoth Nyasaye awacho niya, ‘Ka apwodhou kuom richou duto, to anami uchak udag e miechu, mi uger kuonde mane omukore." 
Ezekiel36:34 Ng’ato ang’ata mane okadho machiegni gi puotheu noneno kaka giyugno marach. To abiro miyo uchak upurgi kendo," 
Ezekiel36:35 mi ji duto nowach niya, “Piny ma yande thimni tinde chalo gi puoth Eden, kendo mier mane omukore mi oyaki kendo owe gundni, tinde ochiel motegno, kendo ji odakie.”" 
Ezekiel36:36 Bang’e ogendini mokiewo kodu ma osetony e lweny nong’e ni an Ruoth Nyasaye ema asewacho ni abiro timo kamano, kendo abiro time mak orem!’" 
Ezekiel36:37 “An Ruoth Nyasaye amedo wacho niya, ‘Abiro timo gik moko madongo kata moloyo mago. Abiroo yie jo-Israel okwaya mondo akonygi, mi ami ginya mathoth mana ka kueth rombe." 
Ezekiel36:38 Mier ma tinde omukoregi ji nopong’ mana kaka rombe mitimogo misengni chieng’ sawo ne pong’o Jerusalem. Kamano gining’e ni an e Ruoth Nyasaye.’ ” 
Ezekiel37:1 Ne awinjo ka teko Ruoth Nyasaye ni kuoma, mi Roho mare noting’a motera e holo kama choke opong’o." 
Ezekiel37:2 Ne omiyo awuotho e holo duto e kind chokego, mi aneno ka ging’eny ahinya, kendo gitwo kururu." 
Ezekiel37:3 Eka nopenja niya, “Wuod dhano, bende chokego dichak lokre ji mangima kendo?” An to ne adwoke niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye, in kendi ema inyalo ng’eyo wachno.”" 
Ezekiel37:4 Ne owachona niyaa, “Kor ni chokegi wach, kinyisogi ni, ‘Un choke motwo, winjuru wach Ruoth Nyasaye!" 
Ezekiel37:5 An Ruoth Nyasaye awachonu kama: Abiro miyo muya lor kuomu, mi uchak ubed ji mangima." 
Ezekiel37:6 Abiro keto leche kuomu, mi amiu ring’o kod pien. Eka anami muya donj kuomu, mi uchak ubed ji mangima. Bang’ mano, unung’e ni an e Ruoth Nyasaye.’ ”" 
Ezekiel37:7 Kuom mano, ne achako koro wach kaka nosewachona. To kane oyudo awuoyo, ne apo ka awinjo ka choke rwadore, ka chogo ka chogo chako tudore gi wadgi." 
Ezekiel37:8 Kane arango chokego, naneno ka leche gi ring’o kod pien oumogi. Muya to ne giongego." 
Ezekiel37:9 Eka Ruoth Nyasaye nowachona niya, “Wuod dhano, kor wach ni yamo, kinyise ni Ruoth Nyasaye ochike mondo oa e tunge ang’wen mag piny, kokudho kuom joma othogi, mondo gichak gibed mangima.”" 
Ezekiel37:10 Kuom mano, ne akoro wach mana kaka ne osewachona, eka muya nodonjo kuom joma othogo, mi gidoko ji mangima, kendo gichung’ gi tiendegi. Ne gin ji mang’eny, moromo bedo oganda lweny mang’ongo." 
Ezekiel37:11 Nyasaye nowachona niya, “Wuod dhano, jo-Israel chalo mana gi chokego. Giwacho ni gitwo kururu, kendo ni gionge gima gigeno." 
Ezekiel37:12 Kuom mano, kor ni joga Israel wach, kinyisogi, ni an Ruoth Nyasaye, awacho kama: ‘Abiro elo lieteu, mi agolu oko, kendo adwoku e pinyu." 
Ezekiel37:13 Ka aelo lieteu, kendo agolou oko kamano, to unung’e ni an e Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Ezekiel37:14 Anaket Roho mara kuomu, mi ubed mangima, kendo anami udag e pinyu uwegi. Eka unung’e ni an e Ruoth Nyasaye. Asesingora ni anatim kamano, kendo abiro time mak orem. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano.’ ”" 
Ezekiel37:15 Ruoth Nyasaye ne ochako owuoyo koda, mowachona niya," 
Ezekiel37:16 “Wuod dhano, kaw luth moro, indikie ni, ‘Jo-Juda’, eka ichak ikaw luth machielo, indikoe ni, ‘Jo-Israel ma nyikwa Josef, kata nyikwa Efraim.’" 
Ezekiel37:17 Koro riw ludhe ariyogo e lueti, mondo onenre ka luth achiel." 
Ezekiel37:18 To ka jou openji mondo inyisgi tiend gima itimono," 
Ezekiel37:19 to dwokgi ni an Ruoth Nyasaye awacho ni abiro kawo luth mochung’ kar jo-Israel, mi ariw gi luth mochung’ kar jo-Juda. Kamano anariwgi gibed luth achiel ma amako e lweta." 
Ezekiel37:20 “Ka isemako ludhego e lueti, mi ji duto onenogi," 
Ezekiel37:21 to nyisgi ni an Ruoth Nyasaye awacho ni abiro choko jo-Israel, kagolo kuom ogendini mane okegie, mi adwokgi e pinygi giwegi." 
Ezekiel37:22 Anariwgi mondo gibed oganda achiel e piny gode mag Israel. Ginibed gi ruoth achiel maritogi, bende ok ginichak gipogre ogendini ariyo, kata pinje ariyo." 
Ezekiel37:23 Ok ginichak gidwanyre gi nyiseche manono kendo makuero, bende ok ginindhogre gi richo. Anaresgi, kagologi e yore duto mag richo koda ka mago ma gindhogago. Anapwodhgi, mi gibed joga, kendo anabed Nyasachgi." 
Ezekiel37:24 Jatichna Daudi ema nobed ruodhgi. Kamano giduto giniriwre e bwo ruoth achiel, mi gimak chikena." 
Ezekiel37:25 Ginidag e piny mane amiyo Jakobo jatichna. En e piny mane kweregi odakie. Ginidag kuno kaachiel gi nyithingdi kod nyikwagi nyaka chieng’, kendo jatichna Daudi nobed ruodhgi mochwere." 
Ezekiel37:26 Abiro timo kodgi singruok mochwere makelonigi kue. Anami gimedre, mi aket Hekaluna e pinygi, kendo nobed kuno nyaka chieng’." 
Ezekiel37:27 Anadag kodgi kanyo, mi abed Nyasachgi, kendo gibed joga." 
Ezekiel37:28 Ka aketo Hekaluna kanyo mondo obed e kindgi nyaka chieng’, eka ogendini nong’e ni an, Ruoth Nyasaye, ema aseyiero jo-Israel obed joga awuon.”" 
Ezekiel38:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nowuoyo koda mowachona niya," 
Ezekiel38:2 “Wuod dhano, chung’ kichomo Gog, modak e piny Magog. En ruoth maduong’ mar ogendini mag Meshek kod Tubal. Kwede," 
Ezekiel38:3 kinyise ni an Ruoth Nyasaye awachone kama: In Gog, an jasiki." 
Ezekiel38:4 Abiro mbedo dhogi gi mbedo, mi awichi, kendo aywayi oko kaachiel gi jogi duto mag lweny. Ogandani mar lweny, kod farese gi joidh farese morwakore gi lep lweny, ng’eny ahinya. Jalweny ka jalweny omanore gi kuode kod liganglane." 
Ezekiel38:5 Jo-Persia gi jo-Ethiopia kod jo-Libya ni kodi. Giduto bende giting’o kuodi, kendo gisidho konde mag lweny." 
Ezekiel38:6 Jolweny duto moa e piny Gomer, kendo e piny Beth-togarma man yo nyandwat kuma bor, ni kodi, kaachiel gi ji mang’eny moa kuom ogendini mamoko." 
Ezekiel38:7 In Gog, anyisi mondo iikri, kaachiel gi jogi mag lweny." 
Ezekiel38:8 Bang’ higni mathoth, kinde nochopi ma ananyisie mondo imonj piny moro ma ji osebet kodakie gi kue maonge lweny, chakre ndalo mane oduoggie, kigologi kuom ogendini mang’eny. Inimonj gode mag Israel mane oselokore thim, kendo mane owe kokethore chon, to koro ji duto odakie gi kue." 
Ezekiel38:9 In gi jogi mag lweny, kod ogendini mang’eny man kodi, numonj pinyno mana ka yamb ahiti, kendo unuume mana ka rumbi.”" 
Ezekiel38:10 Ruoth Nyasaye nomedo wacho ni Gog niya, “Ka kindeno ochopo, to inibed gi paro marach." 
Ezekiel38:11 Iniwach e chunyi niya, ‘We adhi amonj piny kama ji odakie mos gi kueno. En gi mier ma ok ochiel gi ohinga, kendo maonge gi dhorangeye molor matek.’" 
Ezekiel38:12 Eka in idhi iyak kendo ipe gik mantie, kendo inimonj kuonde mane okethore chon, to tinde ji odakie. Gin joma ne osechoki kigolo kuom ogendini mamoko, ma koro nigi jamni kod mwandu mamoko. Pinygi nie dier pinje madongo." 
Ezekiel38:13 Jo-Sheba gi jo-Dedan kod johala mag miech Tarshish biro penji kama: ‘Isechoko jogi mag lweny, idhigo koso?’" 
Ezekiel38:14 “Kuom mano, wuod dhano, dhiyo inyis Gog ni an Ruoth Nyasaye awachone kama: ‘E kinde ma joga Israel odakie gi kueno," 
Ezekiel38:15 to iniwuogi ia thuru yo nyandwat kuma bor. Inibi ka in gi oganda lweny maduong’ maratego moa kuom ogendini mathoth. Giduto ginibi ka giidho farese. 
Ezekiel38:16 Ununur kuom joga Israel, mana ka rumbi maumo piny. Ka kindeno ochopo, anaori mondo imonj pinya, to gima natimni nonyis ogendini ni an Ng’ama Ler, mi ging’eya, yaye Gog!" 
Ezekiel38:17 In e ng’at mane awuoyo kuome chon kane aoro jotichna ma jonabi mag Israel mondo owach pile ni e ndalo mabiro anakel ng’ato mondo omonj Israel.’ An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano.” 
Ezekiel38:18 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho bende niya, “Chieng’ ma Gog nomonjie Israel, mirima mager nomaka." 
Ezekiel38:19 Awacho ka akecho ahinya ni chieng’no piny Israel noyiengni malich. 
Ezekiel38:20 Rech duto manie nam, gi winy manie kor polo, kod le mae thim gi gik mamol piny, kaachiel gi dhano duto mae piny notetni e nyima. Gode nomukre, kendo hohni bende noruombre piny, kendo ohingni duto nopodhi." 
Ezekiel38:21 “Anabwog Gog gi masiche mopogore opogore. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano. Joge noked kendgi ng’ato gi ng’ato. 
Ezekiel38:22 Anakume gi tuoche kod nek. Bende anahon koth mang’ongo gi pe madongo gi mach kod kite maliel kuome, kendo kuom joge mag lweny kod ogendini mathoth man kode." 
Ezekiel38:23 Mano e yo ma ananyisgo ogendini duto ni aduong’ kendo aler. Eka gining’e ni an e Ruoth Nyasaye.” 
Ezekiel39:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nowachona niya, “Wuod dhano, kwed Gog, ruoth maduong’ mar ogendini mag Meshek kod Tubal, kinyise ni an Ruoth Nyasaye awacho kama: Gog, an jasiki." 
Ezekiel39:2 Abiro wichi, mi agoli yo nyandwat kuma bor nyaka chop ibi e gode mag Israel." 
Ezekiel39:3 Eka anago atung’i e badi ma koracham, kod aserni e badi korachwich, mi lwar piny." 
Ezekiel39:4 In Gog, kod ogandani mar lweny kaachiel gi ogendini makonyi, ubiro tho e gode mag Israel, kendo anami kit winy duto gi ondiegi cham ringreu." 
Ezekiel39:5 Adier, unutho mana oko e pap. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano." 
Ezekiel39:6 “Abiro moko mach e piny Magog kod dhonembe duto ma ji odakie gi kue, mi ng’ato nong’e ni an e Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Ezekiel39:7 Anami joga Israel ng’e nyinga maler, kendo ok nawe nyinga chak kethre. Eka ogendini nong’e ni an Ruoth Nyasaye an Ng’ama Ler mar Israel.”" 
Ezekiel39:8 Ruoth Nyasaye nochako owacho niya, “Chieng’ ma awuoyo kuomeno biro biro mak orem. An ema asewacho kamano." 
Ezekiel39:9 Bang’e joma odak e miech Israel nodhi mondo ochok gi-lweny mojwang’, mondo obed yien ma gichwako. Kuodi gi okumbni, kod aserni gi atunge, kaachiel gi arunge kod tonge ma gichoko nobed yien moromogi chwako kuom higni abiriyo." 
Ezekiel39:10 Ok ginidhi e thim mondo gimoti, kata dhi e bungu mondo gitong’ yien, nikech ginibed ka gichwako gi-lweny mojwang’go. Ginipe kendo giniyak jogo mane opeyogi kendo oyakogi. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano.”" 
Ezekiel39:11 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho kendo niya, “Chieng’ ma gigo duto otimore to anami Gog kar yik e Israel, e holo miluongo ni, Holo Jowuoth, man yo wuokchieng ma yo Nam Kado. Gog kod jolwenje duto noyik kanyo, kendo holono noluong ni Holo mar Oganda Jolwenj Gog." 
Ezekiel39:12 Jo-Israel notiek dueche abiriyo ka yiko ringre joma otho duto, mondo gichak gipuodh pinygi kendo." 
Ezekiel39:13 Ng’ato ka ng’ato modak e pinyno noyikgi, kendo mano nomi giyud duong’, chieng’ ma alocho. An Ruoth Nyasaye awacho kamano." 
Ezekiel39:14 “Ka dueche abiriyogo oserumo, to noyier ji ma nosiki ka wuotho e piny mondo oyik ringre joma otho ma giyudo ka pod oriere ewi lowo. Kamano mondo gipuodh piny obed maler." 
Ezekiel39:15 Ka giwuotho e piny koni gi koni to kinde duto ma giyudoe chok dhano to giniket ranyisi e bathe mondo ka jokunyo obiro, to mondo oyike e Holo Oganda Jolwenj Gog." 
Ezekiel39:16 Kamano piny nochak opwodhi.” (Nitie dala moro machiegni gi kanyo mochak nyinge oganda jolwenjno.) 
Ezekiel39:17 Ruoth Nyasaye nochako owacho niya, “Wuod dhano, nyis winy duto kod ondiegi duto man kuonde duto ni awachonigi kama: Biuru mondo ucham misango ma adwaro timonu. Obiro bet sawo maduong’ ahinya ewi gode mag Israel, kuma ubiro chamoe ring’o kendo madhoe remo." 
Ezekiel39:18 Adier, ubiro chamo ringre jolweny, kendo ubiro madho remb ruodhi mag piny. Giduto ginibednu ka imbe gi nyirombe gi diek gi ruedhi machwe mag Bashan mitimogo misango." 
Ezekiel39:19 Ka anego jogo ka misango kamano, to un winy kod ondiegi, unucham boche, mi uyieng’ kendo umadh remo mi umer." 
Ezekiel39:20 E mesana to unuchamie farese gi joidhgi kod thuondi gi jolweny mamoko duto nyaka uyieng’. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano.” 
Ezekiel39:21 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho niya, “Abiro miyo ogendini neno duong’na maler, kendo ka asekumo ji duto matek, to gibiro ng’eyo kaka ang’ado bura kare." 
Ezekiel39:22 Chakre kanyo jo-Israel nong’e ni an e Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachgi," 
Ezekiel39:23 kendo ogendini mamoko nong’e ni ne oter jo-Israel e tuech nikech richo mane gitimo ka giweya. Ne ajwang’ogi e lwet wasikgi, kendo aweyo githo giduto e lweny." 
Ezekiel39:24 Ne atimonigi maromre gi dwanyruokgi kod timbegi mamono, mi alokonigi ng’eya.”" 
Ezekiel39:25 Ruoth Nyasaye nochako owacho niya, “Koro abiro kecho jo-Israel ma nyikwa Jakobo, mi ami gichak gidhi nyime maber, kendo ok nayie nyinga maler kethre." 
Ezekiel39:26 Ka gichako gidak gi kue e pinygi giwegi, ka onge ng’ama bwogogi, to ok ginipar wichkuot mane giyudo kuom ndhok mane gindhogago." 
Ezekiel39:27 Anaduoggi, kagologi e pinje duto mag wasikgi mondo anyis ogendini mang’enygo ni an Nyasaye Maler" 
Ezekiel39:28 Eka joga nong’e ni an e Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachgi, nikech ne aterogi e tuech, to koro achokogi kaduogogi e pinygi giwegi ma ok aweyo kata achiel chien." 
Ezekiel39:29 Anapong’ jo-Israel gi Roho mara, mi ok nachak awegi kendo. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano.”" 
Ezekiel40:1 Due apar mar higa manyien, ma en higa mar apar gang’wen bang’ kawo Jerusalem, kane wasetieko higni piero ariyo gabich e tuech, ne awinjo ka teko mar Ruoth Nyasaye obiro kuoma, mi oting’a." 
Ezekiel40:2 Ne aneno e fweny ka Nyasaye otera e piny Israel, moketa ewi got mabor. Kuno ne anenoe udi mochokore kanyachiel e nyima, machalo dala." 
Ezekiel40:3 Ruoth Nyasaye ne otera machiegni gi udigo, mi apo kaneno ng’at moro marieny ka mula. Ne ochung’ e dhorangach, koting’o tol mipimogo gik moko, kod rapim mar bao e lwete." 
Ezekiel40:4 Ng’atno nowachona niya, “Wuod dhano, rang maber, kendo chik iti malong’o, mondo iwinj weche duto ma abiro wachoni, nimar mano ema omiyo osekeli ka. Bang’e idhi inyis jo-Israel gimoro amora ma iseneno ka.”" 
Ezekiel40:5 Gima ne aneno ne en Hekalu, kendo ne nitie ohinga molwore. Ng’at mane aseneno cha nogolo rapim mar bao ma borne mita adek, mi opimogo ohinga. Borne noromo mita adek to lach mar kore bende mita adek." 
Ezekiel40:6 Eka ng’atno nodhi e rangach ma yo wuokchieng’. Ne oidho raidhi manie dhorangach, mi opimo dhorangach, moyudo ni lachne modhi iye romo mita adek." 
Ezekiel40:7 E tok dhorangajno ne nitie yo ma ji kadhoe man gi udi mag rito adek e bathe koni gi konu. To ot ka ot ne borne kod lachne mita adek maromre, kendo lach mar kor ot mane ni e kindgi ne mita ariyo gi nus. Kisekadho ut ritogo, to nitie yo madhi e ot maduong’ momanyore gi Hekalu. Bor mar yorno ne mita adek." 
Ezekiel40:8 Ng’atno nopimo odno, moyudo ni lachne modhi iye oromo mita ang’wen. Ne omakore gi dhorangach kendo en ema ne ochiegnie moloyo gi Hekalu." 
Ezekiel40:9 Lach mar kor ot mogik tung’ mar odno ne romo mita achiel. 
Ezekiel40:10 Udi mag rito mane ni e bath yo koni gi koni ne romre duto, kendo korgi bende ne romre duto koni gi koni." 
Ezekiel40:11 Bang’e ng’atno nopimo lach mar dhorangach. Ne oromo mita auchiel gi nus, to kane thike oyaw, to lach kama idonjogo ne romo mita abich." 
Ezekiel40:12 E nyim od rito ka od rito ne nitie ohinga machiek ma borne modhi malo romo nus mita. Bor kod lach mar udigo ne mita adek adek maromre. 
Ezekiel40:13 Bang’e ng’atno nopimo lach mar rangach, chakre e kor ot ma katok od rito achiel gi ka iye nyaka kor ot ma katok ot machielo momanyore kode, monwang’o ni oromo mita apar gariyo gi nus." 
Ezekiel40:14 Ot mane ni tung’ mogik ema nidonjogo e laru. Ne opime, moyudo ni lachne mita apar." 
Ezekiel40:15 Bor duto mar yo makadho e kind udino, chakre oko mar rangach nyaka bath ot mogik tung’ ne romo mita piero ariyo gabich." 
Ezekiel40:16 Ne nitie dirise matindotindo e kor udi maoko mag udi duto, kendo e kor udi maiye manie kind udi. Kor udi ma yo ka iye, momanyore gi yo makadho e kind udino ne ogorie yiend othidhe." 
Ezekiel40:17 Ng’atno nokawa mokadho koda e dhorangach nyaka e laru moro. Kuno ne nitie udi piero adek momakore gi ohinga maoko, to e nyim udigo ne nitie kama ochanie kite mopamore" 
Ezekiel40:18 molworo laruno duto. To laru ma okono ne ni piny moloyo laru maiye. 
Ezekiel40:19 Ne nitie rangach moro moting’ore gi malo mane idonjogo e laru ma iye. Ng’atno nopimo kind rangach maiye gi maoko, mi oyudo ni bor mae kindgi romo mita piero abich." 
Ezekiel40:20 Bang’e ng’atno nodhi mopimo rangach ma yo nyandwat midonjogo e laru maoko. 
Ezekiel40:21 Udi mag rito adek mane ni e bath yo koni gi koni, kod kor udi mane ni e kindgi, kaachiel gi ot maduong’, duto ne romre gi mago mane nie rangach ma yo wuokchieng’. Bor duto mar rangach gi utene ne mita piero ariyo gabich, to lachne mita apar gariyo gi nus." 
Ezekiel40:22 Ot maduong’ kod dirise gi kido mag yiend othidhe mane ogor, ne chalo gi mago manie rangach ma yo wuok chieng’. Kaeri bende ne nitie raidhi man gi ondembe abiriyo midhigo e dhorangach, kendo ot maduong’ ne ni tung’ mogik, kuma omanyore gi laru." 
Ezekiel40:23 Ne nitie rangach moro machielo midonjogo e laru maiye momanyore gi rangach maokono, mana kaka ne nitie e rangach ma yo wuokchieng’. Ng’atno nopimo bor manie kind rangach maoko gi maiyeno, moyudo ni oromo mita piero abich." 
Ezekiel40:24 Eka ng’atno notera yo milambo, mi kuno ne wanenoe rangach machielo. Ne opime moyudo ni oromre gi rangeye mamoko duto." 
Ezekiel40:25 Udi mag rangajno ne nigi dirise mana kaka rangeye mamoko. Bor duto mar rangajno bende ne mita piero ariyo gabich, to lachne apar gariyo gi nus." 
Ezekiel40:26 Ne nitie raidhi man gi ondembe abiriyo madhi e dhorangajno, kendo ot maduong’ mane ni kuno bende ne ni tung’ mogik, kama omanyore gi laru. Ne ogor yiend othidhe e kor udi maiye momanyore gi yo makadho e kind udi." 
Ezekiel40:27 Kanyo bende ne nitie rangach machielo midonjogo e laru maiye. Ng’atno nopimo bor mae kind rangeyego, moyudo ni oromo mita piero abich." 
Ezekiel40:28 Ng’atno nokawa mokadho koda e dhorangach ma yo milambo, mi wachopo e laru maiye. Ne opimo rangajno, moyudo ni orom gi rangeye mamoko." 
Ezekiel40:29 Udi mage mag rito gi ode maduong’ kod kor ute maiye ne chalre gi mago mane ni e rangeye mamoko. 
Ezekiel40:30 Bende udi mag rangeye ne nigi dirise. Borne duto ne mita piero ariyo gabich, to lachne mita apar gariyo gi nus." 
Ezekiel40:31 Ne en gi ot maduong’ momakore gi laru mamoko. Yiend othidhe bende ne ogor e kor udi momanyore gi yo makadho e kind udi. Raidhi man gi ondembe aboro ne dhi nyaka e dhorangajno. 
Ezekiel40:32 Koro ng’atno nokawa mokadho koda e dhorangach ma yo wuokchieng’, mi wachopo e laru maiye. Eka ne opimo rangajno moyudo ni orom gi rangeye mamoko." 
Ezekiel40:33 Ute mag rito gi ode maduong’ kod kor udi maiye ne romre gi mago mane ni e rangeye mamoko. Ne nitie dirise kuonde duto, koda ka e ot maduong’. Borne duto bende ne mita piero ariyo gabich, to lachne mita apar gariyo gi nus." 
Ezekiel40:34 Ot maduong’ ne omanyore gi laru maoko, kendo yiend othidhe nogor e kor udi manie bath yo makadho e kind udi. Raidhi man gi ondembe aboro ne dhi nyaka e dhorangajno." 
Ezekiel40:35 Ng’atno nochako okawa motera e rangach ma yo nyandwat. Ne opime, moyudo ni oromre gi mamoko." 
Ezekiel40:36 Dhorangajno bende ne nigi udi mag rito, gi kor udi maiye mogor, gi ot maduong’, kod dirise kuonde duto. Borne duto ne mita piero ariyo gabich, to lachne mita apar gariyo gi nus." 
Ezekiel40:37 Ot maduong’no ne omanyore gi laru maoko, kendo yiend othidhe ne ogor e kor udi manie bath yo makadho e kind udi. Raidhi man gi ondembe aboro ne dhi nyaka e dhorangajno." 
Ezekiel40:38 E laru maoko ne nitie ot moro momakore gi rangach maiye, odno ne nigi dhoot madonjo e ot maduong’ mane omanyore gi laru. Kanyo ema ne ilwokoe jamni monegi, midwaro timogo misenghni miwang’o pep." 
Ezekiel40:39 Ne nitie mesni ang’wen ei ot maduong’no, ariyo e bath ot konchiel, kendo ariyo e bathe komachielo. Ewi mesnigo ema ne inegoe jamni mitimogo misengni mopogore opogoore, kaka misengni miwang’o pep, kod mag golo richo, kod mago mipwodhogo richo mag gowi." 
Ezekiel40:40 To oko mar odno bende ne nitie mesni ang’wen, ariyo e bath rangach ma yo nyandwat konchiel kendo, kendo ariyo e bathe komachielo." 
Ezekiel40:41 Kamano ne nitie mesni ang’wen e ot kendo ang’wen mamoko oko. Omiyo giduto ne gin mesni aboro mane inegoe jamni mitimogo misengni. 
Ezekiel40:42 Mesni ang’wen mane ilosoe misengni miwang’o pep ne mag kite mopa. Borgi modhi malo ne nus mita to borgi kod lachgi ne mita achiel achiel maromre. Gik moko duto mane itiyogo kuom yang’o jamni mitimogo misengni ne iketo ewi mesnigo. 
Ezekiel40:43 Ndiri ma lachne lwedo achiel ne oket molworo bath mesa ka mesa. Mesnigo ema ne iketoe ring’o duto mane itimogo misengni. 
Ezekiel40:44 E bath rangach ma yo nyandwat e laru maiye, ne nitie ot moro mochomo yo milambo. Bende e bath rangach ma yo milambo ne nitie ot machielo machal gi mano mochomo yo nyandwat." 
Ezekiel40:45 Ng’atno nonyisa niya, “Ot momanyo yo milambono en mar jodolo matiyo e Hekalu," 
Ezekiel40:46 to ot mochomo yo nyandwatno en mar jodolo matiyo e kendo-mar-misango. Jodologo duto nyaka bed jo-Lawi ma nyikwa Zadok. Gin kende ema oyienigi dhiyoe nyim Ruoth Nyasaye mondo gitine.” 
Ezekiel40:47 Ng’atno nopimo laru maiye, mi oyudo ni oromo mita piero abich koni gi koni. To e nyim Hekalu hie ne nitie kendo-mar-misango." 
Ezekiel40:48 Eka ng’atno nokawa, motera e ot ma e dhood Hekalu. Ne opimo dhoot midonjogo ei Hekalu, mi oyudo ni borne oromo mita ariyo gi nus, to lachne mita abiriyo. Lach mar kor udi mage ne romo mita achiel gi nus koni gi koni." 
Ezekiel40:49 Bor mar ot mane ni e dhootno ne romo mita apar, to lachne mita auchiel. Raidhi man gi ondembe apar ne nie dhoodno. Bende e bath dhoot koni gi koni ne nitie siro achiel achiel." 
Ezekiel41:1 Bang’ mago duto, ng’atno notera e ot madiere mar Hekalu, miluongo ni Kama Ler. Ne opimo yo midonjogo e odno, mi oyudo ni borne mita adek," 
Ezekiel41:2 to lachne mita abich, kendo lach mar kor ot mita ariyo gi nus koni gi koni. Eka ne opimo ot madiereno, moyudo ni borne romo mita piero ariyo, to lachne mita apar." 
Ezekiel41:3 Bang’ mano, nodhi e ot maiye man tung’ mogik. Nopimo yo midonjogo, moyudo ni borne mita achiel, to lachne mita adek, kendo lach mar kor ot ne romo mita adek gi nus koni gi koni." 
Ezekiel41:4 Eka ne opimo odno, moyudo ni borne gi lachne mita apar maromre. Bang’ mano nowachona niya, “Odni e Kama Ler Moloyo.”" 
Ezekiel41:5 Ng’atno nopimo lach mar kor udi maoko mag Hekalu, moyudo ni oromo mita adek. Udi moko ma lachgi mita ariyo, noger alwora, komakore gi Hekalu." 
Ezekiel41:6 Udigo ne mag gorofe adek, ma udi piero adek adek kuomgi nie gorofa ka gorofa. Kia malo, to lach mar kor udi mag Hekalu ne dongo mi bath udigo konchiel norenjore ewi ohinga, mondo yien moriw masirogi kik pow kor udi mag Hekalu." 
Ezekiel41:7 Lach mar kor udi mag Hekalu ne nenore maromre gi oko, chakre piny nyaka malo, nikech udigo. Ne nitie raidhi ma oger e tok udi molworo Hekalugo gi oko. Mano omiyo ng’ato ne nyalo a e gorofa mapiny, to dhi e madiere nyaka gorofa mamalo." 
Ezekiel41:8 Ne aneno ndiri mochwe molworo Hekalu duto gi oko. Borne modhi malo ne mita adek, kendo wiye ne romre gi mise mar udi mane oger momakore gi Hekalugo, to lachne ne romo mita ariyo gi nus." 
Ezekiel41:9 Lach mar kor udigo gi oko ne romo mita ariyo gi nus. 
Ezekiel41:10 Bende ne nitie kama odong’ nono molworo Hekalu, e kind ndiri gi udi ma jodolo tiyoe, ma lachne mita apar." 
Ezekiel41:11 Ne nitie dhoot moro midonjogo e udi man yo nyandwat mar Hekalu, kendo machielo midonjogo e udi man yo milambo." 
Ezekiel41:12 Ne nitie ot moro yo podho chieng’ momanyore gi Hekalu. Borne ne romo mita piero adek gabich, to lachne mita piero ang’wen gabich. Lach mar kor ute ne mita ariyo gi nus koni gi koni." 
Ezekiel41:13 Ng’atno ne opimo oko mar Hekalu, moyudo ni borne oromo mita piero abich. Chakre e tok Hekalu, kadhi ariwa mar laru nyaka chop e tok ot koma ogik yo podho chieng’ bende ne romo mita piero abich." 
Ezekiel41:14 Lach madhi ariwa kanyim Hekalu, kaachel gi kama odong’ nono koni gi koni, noromo mita piero abich." 
Ezekiel41:15 Bende ng’atno nopimo lach mar ot man yo podho chieng’ mar Hekalu, kaachiel gi lach mar kor udi koni gi koni, moyudo ni oromo mita piero abich. Ot ne ni kama idonjogo e Hekalu kaachiel gi Kama Ler, kod Kama Ler Moloyo," 
Ezekiel41:16 duto nobaw gi bao, chakre dier ot nyaka dirise. Dirisego ne inyalo umo." 
Ezekiel41:17 Kor udi ma yo ka i Hekalu, kadhi malo nyaka ewi dhoudi, ne ogorie" 
Ezekiel41:18 yiend othidhe kod kido mag malaika miluongo ni kerubi kuonde duto. Ne ogorgi molworo ot, ka kido mar kerubi gi kido mar yadh othidhe okikore. Kerubi ka kerubi ne nigi lela wenge ariyo." 
Ezekiel41:19 Lela wang’ achiel ne mar dhano, mochomo kuma yadh othidhe nitie e bathe konchiel, to lela wang’e machielo ne mar sibuor, ma bende nochomo yadh othidhe e bathe komachielo. Mano e kaka kor udi duto ne ogor," 
Ezekiel41:20 chakre dier ot nyaka ewi dhoudi. 
Ezekiel41:21 Bor kod lach mag sirni mag dhoot mar Kama Ler ne romre koni gi koni. 
Ezekiel41:22 E nyim dhoot midonjogo Kama Ler Moloyo ne nitie gimoro molos gi bao machalo kendo-mar-misango. Borne modhi malo ne mita achiel gi nus, to lachne mita achiel. Sirni mane nie kona mage, kaachiel gi siandane kod bethene, duto ne mag bao. Ng’atno nonyisa niya, “Mano e mesa mochung’ e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye.”"
