Ezekiel41:23 Kama Ler kod Kama Ler Moloyo ne nigi dhoudi madongo, mayawore gie diergi," 
Ezekiel41:24 kendo banore diriyo. 
Ezekiel41:25 Dhood Kama Ler nogorie yiend othidhe kod kido mag kerubi, mana kaka nogor e kor udi. E nyim kama idonjogo e Hekalu ne nitie gama molos gi bao." 
Ezekiel41:26 Bende ne nitie dirise e bethe odno koni gi koni, kendo kor udi mage ne ogorie yiend othidhe." 
Ezekiel42:1 Ng’atno notera e laru maoko, nyaka e ot moro man yo nyandwat mar Hekalu, machiegni gi ot mogik, yo podhochieng’ mar Hekalu." 
Ezekiel42:2 Bor odno ne mita piero abich, to lachne mita piero ariyo gabich." 
Ezekiel42:3 Bathe konchiel mochomo kama ne odong’ nono, ma borne romo mita apar, molworo Hekalu, to bathe komachielo nochomo kama ochanie kite mopamore molworo laru maoko. Odno ne oger gorofe adek, ma moro ka moro lach moloyo mano manie wiye." 
Ezekiel42:4 E bath udi manie gorofano yo nyandwat, ne nitie yo ma lachne oromo mita abich, to borne oromo mita piero abich. Dhout udigo nochomo yo nyandwat." 
Ezekiel42:5 Udi mane ni e gorofa mamalo ne diny moloyo mago mane ni e gorofa madiere kod gorofa mamwalo, nikech gorofa ka gorofa ne lach moloyo manie wiye." 
Ezekiel42:6 Udi mane ni e gorofe adekgo duto ne ni ewi ndiri cha. Ne gionge gi sirni kaka udi mamoko mane ni e laru. 
Ezekiel42:7 Bor mar laini mar udi mane ni e gorofa mamwalo ne romo mita piero ariyo gabich," 
Ezekiel42:8 kendo ohinga ma borne romo mita mita piero ariyo gabich ne ochuogore e kore, komanyore gi laini mamoko." 
Ezekiel42:9 E bath odno mogik koma ochomo yo wuokchieng’, kama ne ohinga ochakorego, ne nitie dhoudi midonjogo e laru maoko." 
Ezekiel42:10 E bath Hekalu koma odok yo milambo bende ne nitie ot moro machal gimachielono mane ni machiegni gi ot mogik, yo podhochieng’ mar Hekalu." 
Ezekiel42:11 E nyim udigo ne nitie yo moro machal gi mano mane ni yo nyandwat. Udi ariyogo ne romre kuom borgi gi lachgi, kendo ne gichalre chuth, koda ka dhoutgi." 
Ezekiel42:12 Ne nitie dhoudi e bath odno yo milambo, tung’ mogik yo wuokchieng’, kama ohinga ochakorego." 
Ezekiel42:13 Ng’atno nowachona niya, “Udi ariyogi duto owal ni tich Nyasaye. E igi ema nyaka jodolo matiyo e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye chamie misengni malerie moloyo. Jodolo noket misengni malerie moloyo, kaka misegni mag cham, kod misengni mag golo richo, kod mago mipwodhogo ketho mar gowi, ei udigo, nikech gin kuonde mowal ni tich Nyasaye." 
Ezekiel42:14 Ka jodolo dwaro wuok e Hekalu mondo odhi e laru maoko, to nyaka giwe lewni maler mag dolo mane oyudo girwako ka gitiyo e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye. Nyaka girwak lewni moko nono, ka pok gidhi oko kuma ji ochokoree.”" 
Ezekiel42:15 Kane ng’atno osetieko pimo kama ogerie Hekalu gi yoka iye, ne ogola oko gi e dhorangach ma yo wuokchieng’, mi opimo kama Hekalu nitie gi yo ka oko." 
Ezekiel42:16 Eka ne okawo rapim mar bao, mopimogo koma ochomo yo wuokchieng’, moyudo ni oromo mita mia ariyo gi piero abich." 
Ezekiel42:17 Bang’e ne opimo koma ochomo yo nyandwat 
Ezekiel42:18 gi yo milambo 
Ezekiel42:19 kod yo podhochieng’, moyudo ni giduto gin mita mia ariyo gi piero abich maromre." 
Ezekiel42:20 Ne en gi ohinga molwore, ma borne gi lachne mita mia ariyo gi piero abich maromre. Ohingano nopogo koma ler kod koma ok ler." 
Ezekiel43:1 Bang’ mago duto, ng’atno notera e rangachh mochomo yo wuokchieng’," 
Ezekiel43:2 mi aneno duong’ maler mar Nyasach Israell kabiro koa yoo wuokchieng’. Dwond Nyasaye ne wuo ka apaka mar nam, kendo duong’ne maler nomiyo piny rieny." 
Ezekiel43:3 Fwenyno ne chalo gi fweny mane aneno kane Nyasaye obiro ketho Jerusalem, kendo ochal gi moro mane aneno e bath aora Kebar. Bang’e ne apodho piny auma." 
Ezekiel43:4 Duong’ maler mar Ruoth Nyasaye nokadho e dhorangach ma yo wuokchieng’, modonjo e Hekalu." 
Ezekiel43:5 Roho noting’a, motera e laru maiye, mi aneno ka duong’ maler mar Ruoth Nyasaye opong’o Hekalu." 
Ezekiel43:6 Kane ng’atno pod ochung’ e dira kanyo, ne awinjo ka Ruoth Nyasaye wuoyo koda gie Hekalu niya," 
Ezekiel43:7 “Wuod dhano, Hekaluni e koma mar duong’, kendo en e kama atenoe tienda. Abiro dak kaeri e kind jo-Israel nyaka chieng’. Jo-Israel, kata ruodhigi, ok nochak okel ni nyinga maler wichkuot kuom lamo nyiseche mamoko, kata kuom chungo kite ma giparogo ruodhigi motho." 
Ezekiel43:8 Ruodhigigo nogero utegi mana momakore gi Hekaluna, mi kor ot kende ema opogo kinda kodgi. Gik modwanyore mane gitimo nokelo ni nyinga maler wichkuot, omiyo ne atiekogi ka an gi mirima mager." 
Ezekiel43:9 To koro nyaka giwe lamo nyiseche mamoko, kendo giwit kite ma giparogo ruodhigi. Ka gitimo kamano, to anadag e kindgi nyaka chieng’.”" 
Ezekiel43:10 Ruoth Nyasaye nomedo wacho niya, “Wuod dhano, nyis jo-Israel wach Hekalu, mondo ging’e kaka ochalo, eka wigi okuodi kuom timbegi maricho." 
Ezekiel43:11 To ka ineno ni wigi okuot kuom gik ma gisetimo, to nyisgi kido mogergo Hekalu, kaachiel gi gik moko duto manie iye, kod dhorangeye midonjogo gi miwuokgo, kendo kaka gik moko duto ochan e iye. Bende nyisgi chike duto man kanyo. Ndik gigo duto mondo ging’e kaka gik moko ochan, kendo gimak chikego duto." 
Ezekiel43:12 To chik Hekalu chalo kama: Kuonde duto molworo wi godni gin kuonde maler moloyo.” 
Ezekiel43:13 Kendo-mar-misango, kipimo gi rapim mane opimgo Hekalu, ne chalo kama. Bor modhi malo mar kama kendo-mar-misango orenjore romo nus mita, kendo olach moloyo kendo-ma-misango gi nus mita. To lake koni gi koni oting’ore malo moromo lwedo achiel." 
Ezekiel43:14 Gi yo ka piny, to bor mar kendo-mar-misango kadhi malo ne romo mita achiel, to borne gi lachne mita aboro aboro maromre. To e wiye ne nitie kama borne gi lachne oromo mita abiriyo abiriyo maromre, to borne modhi malo mita ariyo. To bor gi lach mar wiye mogik, kama iwang’oe misango, ne romo mita auchiel maromre, to borne modhi malo bende mita ariyo. Wiyeno ne nigi tunge ang’wen. Kendo-mar-misangono ne nigi raidhi miidhego e bathe ma yo wuokchieng’." 
Ezekiel43:15  
Ezekiel43:16  
Ezekiel43:17  
Ezekiel43:18 Ruoth Nyasaye nowuoyo koda, mowachona niya, “Wuod dhano, chik iti mondo iwinj gima awachoni. Ka oseger kendo-mar-misango, to nyaka iwale ni tich Nyasaye, kiwang’oe misengni, kendo ikiroe remb jamni motimgo misengnigo." 
Ezekiel43:19 Jodolo ma jo-Lawi ma nyikwa Zadok kende ema nyaka bi e nyima mondo otina. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema agolo chikno. “Nyaka imigi nyarwath mondo gitimgo misango mar golo richo. 
Ezekiel43:20 To nyaka ikaw remb nyarwadhno moko mondo iwirgo tunge ang’wen mag kendo-mar-misango, kendo iwirgo konde ang’wen mag kore kod ndiri man koni gi koni. Kamano e kaka ibiro pwodho kendo-mar-misango, kendo walogo ni Nyasaye." 
Ezekiel43:21 Bang’e kaw nyarwath motimgo misango mar golo richono, mondo iwang; pep kama onego wangg’ie, oko mar Hekalu." 
Ezekiel43:22 Kinyne to kaw nyuok maonge gi songa mondo itimgo misango mar golo richo. Pwodh kendo-mar-misango gi remb nywogno mana kaka ne ipwodhe gi remb nyarwath. 
Ezekiel43:23 Ka isetieko timo kamano, to kaw nyarwath gi nyaim maonge gi songa," 
Ezekiel43:24 ikel ira, an Ruoth Nyasaye. Jodolo mondo okir kuomgi chumbi, otimnago misango miwang’o pep." 
Ezekiel43:25 Odiechieng’ ka odiechieng’ kuom ndalo abiriyo onego chiw nywok gi nyarwath kod im ka misango mar golo richo. Giduto nyaka gibed maonge gi songa. 
Ezekiel43:26 Kamano jodolo nyaka pwodh kendo-mar-misango kuom ndalo abiriyo mondo obed moikore ni tich Nyasaye. 
Ezekiel43:27 Ka ndalo abiriyo orumo, to jodolo nyalo chako timo misengni miwang’o pep, kod misengni mag sawo ma ji kelo, e kendono. Bang’e anabed mamor kodu. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano.”" 
Ezekiel44:1 Ng’atno nochako otera e dhorangach maoko man yo wuokchieng’ mar kuma Hekalu nitie, mi wanwang’o ni dhorangajno olor." 
Ezekiel44:2 Ruoth Nyasaye nowachona niya, “Dhorangajni nyaka sik kolor, kendo ok nochak oyawe ngang’. Onge dhano ma oyiene kadhoe, nikech an Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel asekadhoe. Emomiyo nyaka osik kolore." 
Ezekiel44:3 Ruodh piny Israel kende ema nyalo dhi kanyo kaka ruoth, mondo ocham sawo e nyima. To nyaka odonji kendo owuogi kokadho mana e ot maduong’ ma iye mogik.”" 
Ezekiel44:4 Bang’e ng’atno nokadho koda e dhorangach ma yo nyandwat mar Hekalu. Ne apodho piny auma. 
Ezekiel44:5 Mi Ruoth Nyasaye nowachona niya, “Wuod dhano, rang maber, kendo chik iti ni gimoro amora ma anyisi, nikech koro amiyi chike mag hekalu. Nyaka ing’e joma oyienigi donjo e Hekalu." 
Ezekiel44:6 “Nyis jo-Israel ma jopiemgo ni an Ruoth Nyasaye ok nachak ayie gi gik makuodo wich ma gisebedo ka gitimo. 
Ezekiel44:7 Gisedwanyo Hekaluna, ka giyie ni jopinje mamoko ma ok ter nyangu kendo mochaya donjo e Hekalu e kinde ma itimona misango gi boche kod remo. Kamano joga oseketho singruok mane atimo kodgi, kuom gik mamono ma gisetimo." 
Ezekiel44:8 Kar timo tich ma onego utina e Hekalu, to use mana keto jopinje mamoko mondo otim." 
Ezekiel44:9 “An Ruoth Nyasaye awacho kama: Japiny moro amora ma ok ter nyangu kendo mochaya ok nochak odonj e Hekaluna kata obed mana japiny moro modak e Israel. 
Ezekiel44:10 “Jo-Lawi mane oringo oweya kaachiel gi jo-Israel mamoko, mi olamo nyiseche manono, nyaka kum kuom richogino." 
Ezekiel44:11 Ginyalo tiyona e Hekalu, ka girito dhorangeye, kendo ka gitiyona tije mamoko mag Hekalu. Ginyalo yang’o jamni ma ji chiwo kaka misengni miwang’o pep kod misengni mamoko, kendo nyaka gichung’ e nyim ji ka gitiyonigi." 
Ezekiel44:12 To kaka ne gitiyo ni jo-Israel e tij lemo kuonde milamoe nyiseche manono, mi gimiyo jo-Israel odonjo e richo, omiyo an Ruoth Nyasaye akuong’ora ni nyaka kumgi." 
Ezekiel44:13 Ok ginichak gitina kaka jodolo, bende ok ginidhi but gik maler mowalna, kendo ok ginidonj Kama Ler Moloyo. Mano e wichkuot ma ginine kuom gik maricho ma gisebedo ka gitimo." 
Ezekiel44:14 To abiro miyogi tije mamoko duto mag Hekalu. 
Ezekiel44:15 “An Ruoth Nyasaye awacho kama: Jodolo ma jo-Lawi ma nyikwa Zadok to ne odhi nyime katiyona maber e Hekalu, ka jo-Israel mamoko to oringo oweya, kuom mano, koro gin ema nyaka gitina, kendo gibi e nyima mondo gichiwna boche kod remo mag misengni." 
Ezekiel44:16 Gin e joma nodonj e Hekaluna, mi ti e kendona-mar-misango, kendo los kaka ilemo e Hekalu." 
Ezekiel44:17 Ka gidonjo e dhorangach madhi e laru ma iye mar Hekalu, to nyaka girwakre gi lewni mabeyo mayom. Ok ginyal rwako law moro amora molos gi yie rombo e sa ma ginie tich e laru maiye, kata e Hekalu." 
Ezekiel44:18 To nyaka girwak kilemba, kod sirueche molos gi law maber mayom, to bende kik gitue nungogi gi okanda, nimar dipo ka luya ochamogi." 
Ezekiel44:19 Kapok giwuok gidhi e laru maoko kuma ji nitie, to nyaka gikuong gilony lepgi ma girwako ka gitiyo e Hekalu, mi gikan e udi mowal ni tich Nyasaye, nimar dipo ka lepgi malergo ogere kuom ng’ato, mohinyo." 
Ezekiel44:20 “Jodolo kik liel wigi, to bende kik giwe wigi yugno ahinya, to nyaka ging’adgi maber." 
Ezekiel44:21 Kik gimadh kong’o e kinde ma gidwaro donjo e laru maiye. 
Ezekiel44:22 Bende jadolo kik kend dhako ma chwore otho, kata dhako moweyo chwore to nyaka okend mana nyako ma silili ma nyar Israel, kata chi liel ma chwore ne jadolo." 
Ezekiel44:23 “Jadolo nyaka puonj joga pogruok manie kind gik maler gi gik ma ok ler, kendo manie kind gik ma ogak gi gik ma ok ogak." 
Ezekiel44:24 Ka wach moro owuok ma ji laroree, to jodolo nyaka yal wachno, mi ng’ad bura mana moluwore gi chikna. Ginirit ndalo mag sewni maga, kaluwore gi chikena, kendo ginirit ndalo mag Sabatona maler." 
Ezekiel44:25 “Jadolo kik mul ringre ng’at motho, ma dimi obed mogak, mak mana ka ng’atno en wuon kata min, nyathine kata owadgi, kata nyamin ma pok odhi tedo." 
Ezekiel44:26 To komulo watne motho kamano, to nyaka opwodhre. Bang’ puodhruokno nyaka oyue kuom ndalo abiriyo." 
Ezekiel44:27 Eka enodhi e laru maiye mondo otim misango mar golo richo, mondo eka ochak oti e Hekalu kendo. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano." 
Ezekiel44:28 “Jodolo ok noyud lowo mopognigi e piny Israel ka mwandugi, to an Ruoth Nyasaye ema nabed mwandugi." 
Ezekiel44:29 Misengni mag cham kod misengni mag golo richo gi ketho ema nobed chiembgi. Bende giniyud gik moko duto mowalna e Israel. 
Ezekiel44:30 Gin ema giniyud cham mabeyo duto mokwongo chiek mochiwna. E kinde ka kinde ma ji otedo makati, to ginimi jodolo makati mokwong tedi kaka chiwo mondo oguedh miechgi." 
Ezekiel44:31 Jadolo kik cham gimoro amora motho kende, kata ma ondiek onego, bed ni en winyo kata le.”" 
Ezekiel45:1 Ka piny opogi mondo dhoot ka dhoot oyud lope, to lowo ma borne romo kilomita apar nyaka wal ni Ruoth Nyasaye. Kanyo duto nobed kama ler." 
Ezekiel45:2 Bath lowono, ma borne gi lachne mita mia ariyo gi piero abich maromre noket tenge mondo ogerie Hekalu. E alwora mar lop Hekaluno nobedie kama odong’ nono ma lachne romo mita piero ariyo gabich." 
Ezekiel45:3 Bath lowono ma borne romo kilomita apar gariyo gi nus, to lachne kilomita abich, noket tenge mondo ogerie Hekalu, ma bende iluongo ni Kama Ler Moloyo," 
Ezekiel45:4 kendo mondo jodolo matiyo ni Ruoth Nyasaye e Hekalu odagie. Utegi nobed kanyo kaachiel gi Kama Ler mogerie Hekaluno nobed mita mia ariyo gi piero abich maromre, kaachiel gi kama odong’ nono molwore ma lachne mita piero ariyo gabich." 
Ezekiel45:5 To bende bath lowono komachielo ma borne bende oromo kilomita apar gariyo gi nus, kendo lachne kilomita abich, noket tenge ni jo-Lawi matiyo e Hekalu. Ginibed gi mier kuno ma gidakie." 
Ezekiel45:6 To lowo modong’ ma borne oromo kilomita apar gariyo gi nus to lachne kilomita ariyo gi nus bende nyaka ket tenge mondo ogerie dala moro maduong’. Enobed mokiewo gi lowo mowal ni Nyasayeno, kendo nobed mar jo-Israel duto." 
Ezekiel45:7 Ruoth marito piny bende nyaka pogne lowo, momakore gi kama owal ni Nyasaye kod lowo ma dala maduong’ nitie, koni gi koni. Yo podhochieng’, lop ruoth nochwe nyaka nam Mediterenia, to yo wuokchieng’ nogik e tong’ piny. Kamano borne moa yo podhochieng’ nobed maromre gi lowo mopog ni dhoot ka dhoot." 
Ezekiel45:8 Mano ema nobed lop ruoth marito piny Israel, mondo kik ochak othir ji, to owe bath piny koma odong’ obed mar dhout Israel." 
Ezekiel45:9 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho niya, “Usetimo richo aming’a un jotend Israel. Weuru timbeu mag mecho kod mag thir muthirogo ji. To timuru mana gik makare kendo mowinjore. Bende kik uchak uriemb joga e lopgi kendo. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano." 
Ezekiel45:10 “Nyaka ji duto ti gi rapim makare kama: 
Ezekiel45:11 Rapim miluongo ni efa, mipimogo gik machalo cham, nyaka bed maromre gi rapim miluongo ni bath, mipimogo gik maliw. To rapim miporogo rapim nyaka bed rapim miluongo ni homer. Homer achiel nyaka bed maromre gi efa apar, kendo kod bath apar." 
Ezekiel45:12 “Bende rapim mag pek gik moko nyaka chal kama: Gera piero ariyo nyaka bed maromre gi shekel achiel, kendo shekel piero auchiel nyaka bed maromre gi mina achiel." 
Ezekiel45:13 “Koro chiwo ma onego uket tenge e magi: Kukayo chambu, to nyaka uket tenge achiel kuom piero auchiel mag chambugo." 
Ezekiel45:14 Mor zeituni bende nyaka uket tenge achiel kuom mia achiel muyudo kuom olemo ma yiendu onyago. Nyaka upim morno gi rapim miluongo ni kor. 
Ezekiel45:15 To bende kuom rombe mia ariyo nyaka uchiw rombo achiel. Gigo ema unukel mondo obed chiwo mitimogo misengni mag cham gi misengni miwang’o pep, kod mago mag sawo, mondo richou owenu. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema agolo chik kamano." 
Ezekiel45:16 “Jopinyu duto nyaka ter chiwogo ir ruoth marito piny Israel. 
Ezekiel45:17 En ema nobed kochiwo jamni mitimogo misengni mag cham kod mago miolo piny, ni oganda duto mar Israel e sewni duto, koda ka sewni mitimo ka due opor, kod mitimo ndalo Sabato. Bende en ema nobed kochiwo misengni mag golo richo kod misengni mag cham gi mago miwang’o pep kod mag sawo mondo opwodhgo richo mag jo-Israel.”" 
Ezekiel45:18 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho niya, “Chieng’ mokwongo mar due mar achiel nyaka utim misango gi rwath maonge songa, mondo upwodhgo Hekalu." 
Ezekiel45:19 Jodolo nyaka kaw remo moko mag chiayo motimgo misango mar golo richo mondo owir e sirni mag dhood Hekalu, kod tunge ang’wen, mag kendo-mar-misango, kendo e sirni mag dhorangeye midonjogo e laru maiye." 
Ezekiel45:20 Nyaka utim kamano bende chieng’ due abiriyo mar dueno, mondo upwodhgo richo ng’ato ang’ata ma oketho ka ok ong’eyo, kata moketho kobothne. Mano e yo ma unumigo Hekalu sik ka ler." 
Ezekiel45:21 Chieng’ due apar gang’wen unuchak timo sawo mar Pasaka, kendo kuom ndalo abiriyo ng’ato ka ng’ato nyaka cham makati ma ok ketie thowi." 
Ezekiel45:22 Chieng’ mokwongo mar sawo, ruoth marito piny nyak chiw rwath ka misango migologo richone owuon kaachiel gi richo mag ji mamoko duto." 
Ezekiel45:23 To odiechieng’ kodiechieng’ mar ndalo abiriyo mag sawogo, nyaka ochiw ni Ruoth Nyasaye ruedhi abiriyo kod imbe abiriyo maonge songa, ka misango miwang’o pep. Bende nyaka ochiw nywok odiecheng’ kodiechieng’ ka misango mar golo richo." 
Ezekiel45:24 Nyaka chiw debe mar cham gi lita ang’wen mag mor zeituni kuom rwath ka rwath kod im ka im motimgo misango. 
Ezekiel45:25 “Kuom Sawo Maduong’ machakore chieng’ due apar gabich, due mar abiriyo, ruoth marito piny Israel nyaka tim misengni mag golo richo gi misengni miwang’o pep pilepile kuom ndalo abiriyo, mana machalre gi mago mitimo e Sap Pasaka, kendo bende nyaka bed maromre gi mago michiwo e Sap Pasaka.”" 
Ezekiel46:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho niya, “Dhorangach ma yo wuokchieng’ midonjogo e laru maiye nyaka bed kolor kuom ndalo auchiel ma ji tiyoe, to nyaka yawe chieng’ Sabato ka Sabato, kod ndalo ka ndalo ma due oporie." 
Ezekiel46:2 Ruoth marito piny nyaka wuog e laru maoko mi dhi e ot maduong’ manie dhorangach ma yo wuokchieng’no, mi ochung’ e bath sirni mag dhorangajno, ka jodolo timone misengni miwang’o pep, kod misengni mag sawo. Nyaka olem e dhorangach kanyo, eka bang’e owuog oko. To dhorangach kik lor nyaka odhiambo." 
Ezekiel46:3 Chieng’ Sabato ka Sabato, kendo ndalo ka ndalo ma due opor, ji duto nyaka kulre mondo olam Ruoth Nyasaye e nyim dhorangajno." 
Ezekiel46:4 Chieng’ Sabato, ruoth marito piny nyaka kel ni Ruoth Nyasaye nyirombe auchiel gi im auchiel, duto maonge songa, kaka misango miwang’o pep." 
Ezekiel46:5 Im ka im nyaka okel gi cham moromo debe achiel, obed misango mar cham mitimego, to kuom nyarombo ka nyarombo onyalo chiwoe cham mang’eny kaka en ema ohero. To kuom debe ka debe mar misango mar cham nyaka ochiwe mor zeituni moromo lita ang’wen." 
Ezekiel46:6 Ka due opor, to nyaka ochiw nyarwath gi nyirombe auchiel kod im achiel, duto maonge songa." 
Ezekiel46:7 Misango mar cham nyaka bed moromo debe achiel kuom rwath ka rwath gi im ka im, to kuom nyarombo ka nyarombo, onyalo chiwoe cham mang’eny kaka en ema ohero. Kuom debe ka debe mar cham to nyaka ochiw mor zeituni moromo lita ang’wen." 
Ezekiel46:8 Ruoth marito piny nyaka wuog oko gi dhorangach koluwo ot maduong’, mana kaka ne otimo kodonjo." 
Ezekiel46:9 “E kinde ma ji obiro lamo Ruoth Nyasaye e sawo moro amora, to joma odonjo gi dhorangach ma yo nyandwat nyaka wuog gi dhorangach ma yo milambo, kendo jogo modonjo gi dhorangach ma yo milambo, nyaka wuog gi dhorangach ma yo nyandwat. Onge ng’ama onego owuog gi dhorangach modonjogo, to ng’ato ka ng’ato nyaka wuog mana gi dhorangach momanyore gi mane odonjogo." 
Ezekiel46:10 Ruoth marito piny bende nyaka donji mana kaka ji mamoko donjo, kendo wuogi mana kaka giwuok." 
Ezekiel46:11 E ndalo mag sewni to misango mar cham nyaka bed debe achiel kuom rwath ka rwath, kata kuom im ka im, to kuom nyarombo ka nyarombo, jalemo nyalo chiwoe cham mang’eny kaka en ema ohero. Kuom debe ka debe mar cham to nyaka chiwie mor zeituni moromo lita ang’wen." 
Ezekiel46:12 “Ka ruoth marito piny dwaro timo ni Ruoth Nyasaye misango kuom herone owuon, bed ni en misango miwang’o pep, kata misango mar sawo, to dhorangach ma yo wuokchieng’ midonjogo e laru maiye nyaka yawne. Nyaka otim misango mana kaka otimo misango chieng’ Sabato, to ka osewuok, to dhorangach nyaka lor." 
Ezekiel46:13 “Okinyi ka okinyi nyarombo maonge songa ma hike achiel nyaka chiw ni Ruoth Nyasaye. Misangono nyaka tim pilepile. 
Ezekiel46:14 Bende misango mar mogo moromo kilo ariyo nyaka tim okinyi kokinyi, kendo nyaka chiwe gi mor zeituni moromo lita achiel, midwalego. Chike mag misango mitimo ni Ruoth Nyasaye nyaka sik mochwere." 
Ezekiel46:15 Nyarombo gi mogo kod mor zeitunigo nyaka chiw ni Ruoth Nyasaye okinyi kokinyi nyaka chieng’.” 
Ezekiel46:16 Ruoth Nyasaye ogolo chik niya, “Ka ruoth marito piny omiyo wuode moro lowo moro amora kaka chiwo, to lowono nobed mar wuodeno chuth, kaka mwandu moyudo kuom wuon mare." 
Ezekiel46:17 To ka ruoth ochiwo lope moro ni ng’ato matiyone, to lowono nochak odog ni ruoth ka higa miweyoe ji thuolo ochopo. En lope owuon, omiyo en kod yawuote kende ema ginyalo bet kode nyaka chieng’." 
Ezekiel46:18 To ruoth marito piny moro kik thir joge kamayogi mwandu moro amora, to nyaka opog ni yawuote lowo kuom lowo mopogne, mondo kik othir joga komayogi lopgi.”" 
Ezekiel46:19 Ng’atno nokawa motera e dhoot midonjogo e udi man yo rangach ma yo milambo mar laru maiye. Udigo ne udi maler, mowal ni jodolo. Ne osiemo kamoro yo podhochieng’ mar udigo," 
Ezekiel46:20 mowacho niya, “Mano e kama jodolo onego ochwakie ring’o ma gitimogo misengni mag golo richo kod mago mipwodhogo ketho mag gowi, kendo kanyo ema gitedoe misengni mag cham. Kamano onge gimoro maler ma diter e laru maoko, kuma gino nyalo miyoe ji hinyruok!”" 
Ezekiel46:21 Bang’e ne otera e laru maoko mi onyisa laru matin e kona ka kona mar laruno," 
Ezekiel46:22 ma borne mita piero ariyo, to lachne mita apar gabich." 
Ezekiel46:23 Moro ka moro ne nigi ohinga mar kite molwore, kod kite mag tedo moger komakore gi ohinga." 
Ezekiel46:24 Ng’atno nomedo nyisa niya, “Magi e kuonde tedo ma jotich Hekalu onego ochwakie misengni ma ji chiwo.”" 
Ezekiel47:1 Ng’atno nochako odwoka e dho Hekalu mi aneno pi kawuok gie bwo dhoodno, ka mol kochomo yo wuokchieng’, koma Hekalu bende ochomo. Ne omol koridore mwalo, kokadho yo nyandwat mar kendo mar misango." 
Ezekiel47:2 Bang’e ng’atno nogola oko mar Hekalu gie dhorangach ma yo nyandwat, mi otera oko nyaka e rangach ma yo wuokchieng’. Kuno to nanenoe aora matin mamol kawuok e bath rangajno gi yo milambo." 
Ezekiel47:3 Ng’atno nochomo yo wuokchieng’, koting’o tol mipimogo. Nowuotho e bath aora nyaka koma oromo mita mia abich. Eka nomiyo ayoro aorano kanyo, manwang’o ni pi ochopo mana e ombong’na." 
Ezekiel47:4 Ne ochako opimo kama oromo mita mia abich. Eka nomiyo ayoro kanyo kendo, to koro ne ochopo e chonga. Bang’ mano ne ochako opimo mita mia abich, mi kane ochako omiyo ayoro pigno, to ne otundo e nungona." 
Ezekiel47:5 Ne ochako opimo mita mia abich, to koro aora nodoko matut mane ok anyal yoro, mak mana ka agoyo abal." 
Ezekiel47:6 Ng’atno nowachona niya, “Wuod dhano, donge iseneno gima atimonino? Make maber!” Eka nogola e pi, modwoka e geng aora," 
Ezekiel47:7 to kane wachopo kanyo, ne aneno yien mang’eny e bath aora koni gi koni." 
Ezekiel47:8 Ng’atno nowachona niya, “Aorani mol kochomo yo wuokchieng’, kendo omol e holo mar aora Jordan, nyaka e Nam Kado. To kotundo e Nam Kado kuno, to pi namno nodok maliw." 
Ezekiel47:9 Kamoro amora ma aorani molie, kit le duto kod rech ng’enyie. Adier, aorani nomi pi Nam Kado bed maliw, kendo kamoro amora momolie, nokelie ngima." 
Ezekiel47:10 Jolupo nobed ka moyo tondegi e geng nam, chakre Engedi nyaka Eneglaim. Kit rech mang’eny mopogore opogore machalo mago manie Nam Mediterenia noyudre kuno." 
Ezekiel47:11 To pi man kuonde motimo siany kod degni manie bath namno ok nolokre maliw. Ginisik mana kaka gichalo, mondo gibed kuonde ma ji yudoe bala." 
Ezekiel47:12 E bath aora koni gi koni kit yien duto ma olembegi ichamo nodongie. Obokegi ok notwo, bende ok giniwe mak ginyago olemo, to ginibed ka ginyak due ka due, nikech pi ma giyudo mol ka wuok e Hekalu. Olemb yien-go ema ji nocham, to obokegi nothiedhruokgo.”" 
Ezekiel47:13 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho niya, “Tong’ mag piny midwaro pogo e kind dhout Israel apar gariyo, ka joka Josef to yudo diriyo moloyo dhoudi mamoko, e magi:" 
Ezekiel47:14 Ne akuong’ora ni kwereu, kating’o bada, ni anamigi pinyni. Omiyo koro pogreuru maromre." 
Ezekiel47:15 “Tong’ ma yo nyandwat noring kochomo yo wuokchieng’, chakre Nam Mediterenia nyaka dala mar Hethlon, kendo nyaka kama idonjogo Hamath. Eka nodhi nyime nyaka dala mar Zedad," 
Ezekiel47:16 gi dala mar Berotha kod Sibraim manie kind piny Damaski gi piny Hamath, mi otund nyaka dala mar Tikon manie tong’ piny Hauran." 
Ezekiel47:17 Kamano tong’ ma yo nyandwat nobed koa e Nam Mediterenia kochomo yo wuokchieng’ nyaka dala mar Enon ka ogoyo tong’ gi pinje mag Damaski gi Hamath, man yo nyandwat." 
Ezekiel47:18 “Tong’ ma yo wuokchieng’ noring koa dala moro manie kind piny Damaski gi piny Hauran, kochomo yo milambo. Bang’ mano, aora Jordan nobed tong’ mopogo kind piny Israel yo podho chieng’, kod piny Gilead, yo wuokchieng’, nyaka Dala Othidhe man e bath Nam Kado." 
Ezekiel47:19 “Tong’ ma yo milambo nochom yo milambo ma podhochieng’, chakre Dala Othidhe nyaka sokni mag Meriba-kadesh. Eka bang’e nochom yo nyandwat ma podhochieng’, koluwo aora manie tong’ piny Misri, nyaka Nam Mediterenia." 
Ezekiel47:20 “Nam Mediterenia ema nobed tong’ ma yo podhochieng’, kendo noring kochomo yo nyandwat nyaka moro man yo podhochieng’ mar kama idonjogo Hamath." 
Ezekiel47:21 “Mano e piny ma nyaka upogru gi ombulu e kind dhout Israel," 
Ezekiel47:22 mondo obed mwandugi mosiko. Jopinje mamoko modak kuomu, kendo mosenywolo nyithindgi e pinyu, bende nyaka yud lowo ka upogo piny. Nyaka kwan gi ka jo-Israel hie." 
Ezekiel47:23 Jo-pinje mamoko duto nyaka yud lopgi machalre gi dhoot ma gidak kuomgi. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano.” 
Ezekiel48:1 Tong’ piny ma yo nyandwat noring koa e Nam Mediterenia, kochiko yo wuokchieng’ nyaka dala mar Hethlon, kendo nyaka kama idonjogo Hamath, nyaka dala mar Enon, mochomo e tong’ manie kind piny Damaski gi piny Hamath. Lowo mopog ni dhoot ka dhoot onego chakre e tong’ man yo wuokchieng’ nyaka tong’ man yo podhochieng’. Dhood Dan ema noyud lopgi yo nyandwat tung’ mogik." 
Ezekiel48:2 To lop dhood Asher ema nobed yo milambo mar lop Dan. 
Ezekiel48:3 Bang’ Asher to lop dhood Naftali ema nobedie. 
Ezekiel48:4 Eka lop joka Manase nobed kaluwo lop Naftali. 
Ezekiel48:5 Bang’ lop Manase, to lop joka Efraim ema nobedie." 
Ezekiel48:6 Eka lop dhood Reuben 
Ezekiel48:7 gi lop dhood Juda nobed kaluwore kamano. 
Ezekiel48:8 To yo milambo mar lop Juda lowo mowal ni Nyasaye nobedie. Enochakre e tung’ piny ma yo wuokchieng’ nyaka yo podhochieng’, kendo borne nobed kilomita apar gariyo gi nus, mana machalre gi lowo mopog ni dhoudi duto. E dier lowono tir e kama nogerie Hekalu." 
Ezekiel48:9 Bor mar lowo mowal ni Ruoth Nyasaye nyaka bed kilomita apar gariyo gi nus, to lachne kilomita apar." 
Ezekiel48:10 Jodolo nyaka yud pok kuom lowo mowalno. Bethene ma yo nyandwat gi ma yo milambo nobed kilomita apar gariyo gi nus, maromre, to bethene ma yo wuokchieng’ nobed kilomita abich abich. Hekalu mar Ruoth Nyasaye to nyaka bed e dier lowono." 
Ezekiel48:11 Lowono nobed mar jodolo ma nyikwa Zadok. Ne gitiyona maber, mi ok giriwore gi jo-Israel mamoko kuom timo richo kaka jo-Lawi mamoko notimo." 
Ezekiel48:12 Kuom mano nyaka gibed gi kargi giwegi e bath jo-Lawi mamoko, kendo kanyo nobed kama lerie moloyo." 
Ezekiel48:13 Jo-Lawi nyaka yud lowo ma borne kilomita apar gariyo gi nus, to lachne kilomita abich, e bath lop jodolo." 
Ezekiel48:14 Lowo ma owal ni Ruoth Nyasaye e lowo maberie moloyo lowo duto, kendo onge kamoro amora kuome ma inyalo ng’iewo, kata wilo kata miyo ng’at moro machielo. Oler, kendo owale ni Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Ezekiel48:15 Bath lowono koma odong’, ma borne romo kilomita apar gariyo gi nus, ok nobed kama ler, to en kama ji duto nyalo konyorego kaka ohero. Ginyalo dak kuno, mi giti gi lowono kaka gidwaro, to dala nyaka bed e diere tir." 
Ezekiel48:16 Bor gi lach mar dala nyaka bed kilomita alufu ariyo gi mia ariyo gi piero abich maromre koni gi koni. 
Ezekiel48:17 Alwora mar dalano koni gi koni e bethene duto nobedie kama odong’ nono, ma ariwa mare oromo mita mia achiel gi piero ariyo gabich." 
Ezekiel48:18 Ka oseger dalano, to lowo modong’, moromo kilomita abich yo wuokchieng’ kendo kilomita abich yo podhochieng’ ma omanyore gi kama ler to nobed puothe ma joma odak e dalano puro. Ng’ato ang’ata matiyo e dala kanyo, nyalo puro lowono, ka ok odew dhoot ma aoye." 
Ezekiel48:19  
Ezekiel48:20 Lowo ma owal ni Nyasayeno duto nyaka bed kilomita apar gariyo gi nus koni gi koni maromre, kendo kama dala nitie nobed e iye." 
Ezekiel48:21 Ka gweng’ mowal ni Ruoth Nyasaye, kod lowo mowe ni dala, ma lachne gi borne kilomita apar gariyo gi nus maromre osekaw, to lowo duto modong’ e bath lowo mowalno koni gi koni, nobed mar ruodh piny. Bathe ma yo podhochieng’ nodhi nyaka Nam Mediterenia, to bathe ma yo wuokchieng’’ nodhi nyaka tong’ piny Israel. Hekalu gi lowo mowal ni Ruoth Nyasaye, gi mano nomi jo-Lawi," 
Ezekiel48:22 kod kama dala nitie nobed e kind lope ruodhigo. Lowono duto ni e kind lowo mopog ni dhood Juda yo nyandwat, kod mopog ni dhood Benjamin, yo milambo." 
Ezekiel48:23 Yo milambo mar lowono ema dhoudi modong’ noyudie lopgi, chakre tong’ ma yo wuokchieng’ nyaka tong’ ma yo podhochieng’. Dhood Benjamin ema noyud lowo momakore gi lowono," 
Ezekiel48:24 to lop dhood Simeon ema nobed yo milambo mar lop Benjamin. 
Ezekiel48:25 Bang’ lop Simeon, to lop dhood Isakar ema nobedie." 
Ezekiel48:26 Eka lop dhood Zebulun nobed kaluwo lop Isakar," 
Ezekiel48:27 to dhood Gad ema noyud lowo tung’ mogik. 
Ezekiel48:28 Yo milambo mar lowo mopog ni dhood Gad, tong’ piny Israel nochakre e Dala Othidhe kochomo yo milambo ma podhochieng’, nyaka sokni mag Meriba-kadesh. Eka bang’e nochom yo nyandwat ma podhochieng’ koluwo aora manie tong’ piny Misri nyaka Nam Mediterenia." 
Ezekiel48:29 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho niya, “Mano e kaka piny onego opogi ni dhout Israel, mondo obed mwandugi mosiko.”" 
Ezekiel48:30 Dalano nobed gi dhorangeye apar gariyo. Bor mar bath ohinga ka bath ohinga nobed mita alufu ariyo gi mia ariyo kod piero abich, kendo nobed gi dhorangeye adek mochak dhoudi adek mag Israel." 
Ezekiel48:31 Dhorangeye mae bath ohinga ma yo nyandwat nochakk Reuben gi Juda kod Lawi," 
Ezekiel48:32 to mae bath ohinga ma yo wuokchieng’ nochak Josef gi Benjamin kod Dan. 
Ezekiel48:33 Dhorangeye mae bath ohinga ma yo milambo nochak Simeon gi Isakar kod Zebulun," 
Ezekiel48:34 to mae bathe ma yo podhochieng’ nochak Gad gi Asher kod Naftali. 
Ezekiel48:35 Kamano bor ohingano duto nobed mita alufu ochiko. To nying dalano mosiko nobed, ‘Ruoth Nyasaye ni ka.’" 
Daniel1:1 E higa mar adek mar loch Jehoyakim ruodh Juda, Nebukadnezar ruodh Babulon nobiro molworo jerusalem mondo okaw." 
Daniel1:2 Ruoth Nyasaye nochiwo Jehoyakim e lwet Nebukadnezar, kaachiel gi gik lemo moko mane pod odong’ ei Hekalu, Jerusalem. Ruoth Nebukadnezar nokawogi, moterogi Babulon ei hekalu mar nyisechene, mi okano gik Hekalu mane oyakogo e od kenone." 
Daniel1:3 Bang’e nogolo chik ni Ashpenaz mane jatelo maduong’ mondo oyier yawuot joka ruodh Israel gi mag jotend Israel. 
Daniel1:4 Yawuowigo ne nyaka bed joma nigi chia maber ma onge gi songa moro e dendgi, kendo mariek motiegore moromo tiyo e od ruoth. Ashpenaz ne nyaka puonjgi ndiko kendo somo dho Babulon." 
Daniel1:5 Bende ruoth nogolo chik ni nyaka mi yawuowigo chiemo gi divai pile mana kaka imiyo jood ruoth mamoko. Ne onego gitiegre kuom higni adek, eka bang’e ne ginyalo tiyo ni ruoth." 
Daniel1:6 Kuom joma ne oyiergo ne nitie yawuot jo-Juda ma nyinggi Daniel gi Hanania gi Mishael kod Azaria. 
Daniel1:7 To jatelo maduong’ nochakogi nying manyien. Daniel nochako ni Bethshazar, to Hanania ni Shadrak; Mishael to nochako ni Meshak, kendo Azaria ni Abednego." 
Daniel1:8 Daniel ne oparo ni ok onego obed mogak kuom chamo chiemo kendo madho divai mane ibiro miyogi kaa e od ruoth. Omiyo ne okwayo Ashpenaz ma jatelo maduong’ mondo kik ochune chamo gigo. 
Daniel1:9 Nyasaye nomiyo Ashpenaz okecho Daniel, kendo obedone mang’won." 
Daniel1:10 To kata kamano nowacho ni Daniel niya, “Aluoro ruodha, nikech en ema osegolo chik konyiso gik monego ucham kendo umadhi, to kapo ni oneno ni in dendi ok ber ka dend yawuowi mamokogo, to onyalo nega.”" 
Daniel1:11 Mano omiyo Daniel nodhi ir jarit mane Ashpenaz oketo mondo orite kaachiel gi jowetene adek ka. 
Daniel1:12 Nowachone niya, “Kiyie, to miwa mana alot wacham, gi pi wamodhi kuom ndalo apar." 
Daniel1:13 Bang’ mano to mondo ing’iwa ane gi yawuowi mamoko machamo chiemb od ruoth, mondo ine ane joma oloyo jowadgi gi del maber.”" 
Daniel1:14 Jaritno noyie ni mondo gitim ane kamano kuom ndalo apar. 
Daniel1:15 To kane ndalogo orumo, ne ginenore machwe kendo man gi teko moloyo yawuowi mane chamo chiemb od ruoth." 
Daniel1:16 Mano omiyo jarit ne ok omiyogi chiemb od ruoth, to nomiyogi mana alot." 
Daniel1:17 Nyasaye ne omiyo yawuowi ang’wen-go rieko mar kitabu kod rieko moro amora. To bende nomiyo Daniel rieko mar loko tiend fweny kod lek duto. 
Daniel1:18 Kane higni adek mane ruoth Nebukadnezar oketo oserumo, Ashpenaz notero yawuowigo duto e nyime." 
Daniel1:19 Ruoth nowuoyo kodgi duto, mi oyudo ni Daniel gi Hanania gi Mishael kod Azaria riek moloyo yawuowi mamokogo duto. Kuom mano ne gidonjo e tich ruoth." 
Daniel1:20 E kinde akinda mane ruoth openjoe wach moro, kata mane okeloe gimoro matek manade, to ne oyudo ni yawuowi ang’wen-go ong’eyo wachno nyadipar moloyo johul wach kata ajuoke duto mae pinye." 
Daniel1:21 Daniel nobet kuno nyaka higa mokwongo mar loch Kuros ruodh Babulon. 
Daniel2:1 Ruoth Nebukadnezar ne oleko lek e higa mar ariyo mar lochne. Lekno nochando chunye ahinya ma ok onyal nindo. 
Daniel2:2 Kuom mano, noluongo jong’adne rieko gi jothieth gi ajuok nyakalondo kod jokor mondo obi ohulne tiend lekno. Kane gibiro mi gichung’ e nyime," 
Daniel2:3 nowachonigi niya, “Ne aleko lek machando chunya, ahinya, omiyo adwaro ng’eyo tiende.”" 
Daniel2:4 Ne gidwoke gi dho Aram niya, “Ruoth, onego idag aming’a! Nyiswa lekni mondo wahulni tiende.”" 
Daniel2:5 Ruoth nowachonigi niya, “Asechano ni ka ok unyisa tiend lekno, to abiro jako embeu gi bedeu, kendo abiro loko uteu gundni-gundni." 
Daniel2:6 To ka unyalo nyisa lekno, kod tiende, to abiro miyou chiwo mang’eny kod duong’ miwuoro. Omiyo koro nyisauru lekno kod tiende.”" 
Daniel2:7 Eka ne gichako gidwoko ruoth niya, “Ka inyalo nyisowa lekno, to wabiro nyisi tiende.”" 
Daniel2:8 Kane ruoth owinjo kamano, nowachonigi niya, “Nenore malong’o ni utemo mana ketho kinde, nimar ung’eyo ni asenyisou parona mogik!" 
Daniel2:9 Ka ok uhulona tiend lekno, to uduto ibiro miyou kum machalre. Ang’eyo ni usewinjoru e kindu uwegi mondo uwuonda awuonda nyaka chop alok parona. Nyisauru lekno, to abiro ng’eyo ni kara unyalo hulo tiende adier.”" 
Daniel2:10 Eka ajuoke noduoke niya, “Yaye, ruoth onge kata ng’ato achiel e piny ngima manyalo nyisi gima idwaro ng’eyono. Onge ruoth moro amora, kata da bed ni oduong’ machal nadi, mosedwaro ni nyaka ajuoke hulne wach ma kamano." 
Daniel2:11 Wach ma ruith penjo en wach matek maonge ng’ama nyalo hulo mak mana nyiseche ema nyalo, to gin ok gidak gi ji.”" 
Daniel2:12 Kane ruoth owinjo kamano, mirima mager nomake, mogolo chik mondo oneg jong’adne rieko duto." 
Daniel2:13 Kuom mano chik nowuok mondo oneggi duto, koda ka Daniel gi jowetene." 
Daniel2:14 Kane oyudo Ariok jatend jorit ruoth dhi mondo oneg jorieko, Daniel notimo rieko modhi ire," 
Daniel2:15 kendo openje niya, “Ere gima omiyo ruoth ogolo chik mager kamano?” Ariok nonyise gima ne osetimore," 
Daniel2:16 omiyo Daniel nodhi piyopiyo mokwayo ruoth mondo omiye kinde, eka ohulne tiend lekno." 
Daniel2:17 Bang’ mano Daniel nodok dala monyiso jowetene ma Hanania gi Mishael kod Azaria gima nosetimore. 
Daniel2:18 Ne owachonigi ni mondo gilam Nyasach Polo mondo okechgi, kendo onyisgi tiend midhierono, mondo kik neggi kaachiel gi jong’ad rieko mamoko e Babulon." 
Daniel2:19 Eka otienono, tiend midhierono noelore ni Daniel e fweny, mi nopako Nyasach Polo kowacho niya," 
Daniel2:20 “Nying Nyasaye opaki nyaka chieng’, nikech rieko duto kod teko gin mage." 
Daniel2:21 En ema ochano ndalo kod chwiri gi opon, bende en ema oketo ruodhi e tich, kendo ogolo. Omiyo ji rieko kod ng’eyo." 
Daniel2:22 Ofwenyo gik matut kendo mopondo, bende ong’eyo gik ma opand e mudho, kendo ler olwore koni gi koni." 
Daniel2:23 In Nyasach kwerena, apaki kendo amiyio duong’. Isemiya rieko gi teko, kendo idwoko kwayona, ka inyisowa gima onego wawachi ni ruoth.”" 
Daniel2:24 Emomiyo Daniel nodhi ir Ariok mane ruoth oseketo mondo oneg jong’ad rieko mag Babulon, mi owachone niya, “Kik ineggi, to tera ir ruoth mondo alokne tiend lekne.”" 
Daniel2:25 Eka Ariok nokawo Daniel piyopiyo motero ir ruoth, mi owachone niya, “Ruoth, eri aseyudo ja-Juda moro manie tuech ka, manyalo nyisi tiend lekni.”" 
Daniel2:26 Ruoth ne openjo Daniel (ma bende niluongo ni Belteshazar) niya, “Bende inyalo nyisa lek mane aleko, mi ilokna tiende adier?”" 
Daniel2:27 Daniel nodwoke niya, “Ruoth onge ajuoga moro amora kata jakor wach manyalo nyisi tiend leknino," 
Daniel2:28 to nitie Nyasaye e polo malo ma elo tiend midhierni. En ema osenyisi, in ruoth Nebukadnezar, gik ma biro timore e kinde mabiro. Koro mae fweny mane ineno e lek kinindo." 
Daniel2:29 “Ruoth, kane inindo, to ne ileko gik mabiro timore, kendo Nyasaye maelo tiend midhierni, nonyisi gima biro timore." 
Daniel2:30 Koro Nyasaye oseelona tiend lekno, to ok nikech ariek moloyo ji mamoko duto, to mana ni mondo iwinj tiende, kendo mondo ing’e paro ma osebironino." 
Daniel2:31 “Ruoth ne ileko ni ineno kido moro marabet, marieny, kendo malich kirango." 
Daniel2:32 Wiye ne olos gi dhahabu maler, to kore kod bedene ne olos gi fedha, kendo nungone gi eme ne olos gi mula." 
Daniel2:33 Ogwendene to nolos gi nyinyo mokikore gi lowo. 
Daniel2:34 E sa mane irangee, kidi maduong’ nomukore kende e got moro, ka onge ng’ama omule, mi ogoyo tiend kido mane olos gi nyinyo kod lowono, mi oturo matindotindo." 
Daniel2:35 Gi kanyono nyinyo gi lowo gi mula gi fedha kod dhahabu nokere okere mana ka mihudhi ma yamo tero e ndalo oro, maonge kata matin modong’. To kidi mane ogoyo kidono nolokore got maduong’ mopong’o piny ngima." 
Daniel2:36 Mano e kaka ne lekno chalo. To koro adwaro nyisi tiende. 
Daniel2:37 Jaduong’, in e ruoth maduong’ie moloyo ruodhi duto. Nyasach polo oseketi ruoth, mi omiyi loch gi teko kod duong’," 
Daniel2:38 mondo irit ji, kaachiel gi le kod winy, kuonde duto ma gintie. Kamano ruoth, in e wich mar dhahabuno." 
Daniel2:39 Ka isetho, to ruoth moro nobedie, ma lochne ok nobed maduong’ ka mari. Bang’ mano ruoth mar adek nobedie, ma nobed gi loch kuom piny duto. (En ema em gi nungo mar mula nyiso.)" 
Daniel2:40 Eka bang’e nobedie ruoth mar ang’wen maratego ka nyinyo. Kaka nyinyo turo gik moko duto, kendo rego, e kaka obiro turo ruodhi mokwongone tiyo duto." 
Daniel2:41 Bende ne ineno ni tiend kidono gi lith tiendene ne olos gi nyinyo mokikore gi lowo. Mano nyiso ni nobed piny moting’o ogendini mopogore opogore. Kuonde moko ei pinyno nobed matek ka nyinyo, nikech tiend kidono nolos gi nyinyo, mokikore gi lowo." 
Daniel2:42 Lith tiende molos gi nyinyo mokikore gi lowo nyiso ni pinyno biro bedo motegno, to ma ketho yot." 
Daniel2:43 To bende ne ineno ka nyinyo oruw gi lowo. Mano nyiso ni jotend pinyno notem kelo winjruok e kind jogi e yor kend, to gima gidwaro ok notimre, mana kaka nyinyo gi lowo ok nyal ruwore maber." 
Daniel2:44 E kinde loch ruodhigo, Nyasach Polo nokel loch moro ma ok norum. Onge ng’ama noketh lojno, to en ema noketh loch mamoko duto, mi otiek chuth. En to nosik kogurore nyaka chieng’." 
Daniel2:45 Ne ineno kaka kidi omukore kende ma onge ng’ama omule, kendo nineno kaka ne otuomo kido molos gi nyinyo gi mula gi lowo gi fedha kod dhahabu. Kamano Nyasaye Maduong’ nyisi gik mabiro timore e ndalo mabiro, kendo koro asenyisi ratiro gima nyocha ileko, bende asenyisi tiende.”" 
Daniel2:46 Kane ruoth Nebukadnezar owinjo wechego, nogoyo chonge piny mokulore nyaka e lowo e nyim Daniel, kendo ne ogolo chik mondo otimne misengni, kendo owang’ne ubani." 
Daniel2:47 Nowacho ni Daniel niya, “Nyasachi e Nyasaye maduong’ie moloyo nyiseche mamoko duto, kendo en e Ruodh ruodhi. En ema oelo tiend midhierni. Ang’eyo kamano nikech osemiyi teko mar fwenyo tiend wachni.”" 
Daniel2:48 Eka ne oketo Daniel e tich maduong’ mi omiye gik mabeyo mathoth. Nokete jaduong’ gweng’ Babulon, kendo nokete jatend jong’ad rieko duto e Babulon." 
Daniel2:49 To bende Daniel nokwayo ruoth mi oketo Shadrak gi Meshak kod Abednego jotend gweng’ Babulon. Daniel to nosiko katiyo mana e dala ruoth. 
Daniel3:1 Ruoth Nebukadnezar noloso kido mar dahabu ma borne mita piero adek, to lachne mita adek, mi ogolo chik mondo ochunge e paw Dura e gweng’ Babulon." 
Daniel3:2 Bang’e nochiko mondo jotelo madongo gi matindo duto mag pinye obi ochokre e rueko mar kido mane osechungono. 
Daniel3:3 Kamano jotelogo duto nochokore, mochung’ e nyim kidono." 
Daniel3:4 Eka jago milome nolando wach gi duol maduong’ niya, “Un ji duto mae piny ngima, bed ni ua e dhoot mane kata bed ni uwacho dhok mane," 
Daniel3:5 ka uwinjo tung’ gi thum nyatiti gi asili kod thumbe mamoko kaywak, to nyaka ukulru piny kendo ulam kido ma ruoth Nebukadnezar osechungo." 
Daniel3:6 To ng’ato ang’ata ma ok okulore piny kendo olemo, ibiro wit piyopiyo e mach makakni.”" 
Daniel3:7 Kuom mano e sa mane giwinjoe thumbe ka ywak, ji duto mae piny, bed ni gia e dhoot mane, kata bed ni giwacho dhok mane, nokulore piny, molamo kido mar dhahabu mane ruoth Nebukadnezar ochungo." 
Daniel3:8 E ndalogo ema ne jo-Babulon moko oyudoe thuolo mar donjo ni jo-Yahudi. 
Daniel3:9 Ne giwacho ni ruoth Nebukadnezar niya, “Ruoth, mondo idag aming’a!" 
Daniel3:10 Ne igolo chik ni e sa ma ji owinjoe ka thumbe ywak, to ng’ato ka ng’ato nyaka kulre piny mi lam kido mar dhahabu." 
Daniel3:11 To ng’at ma ok okulore mi olame nyaka wit piyopiyo e mach makakni. 
Daniel3:12 To nitie jo-Yahudi moko ma nyinggi Shadrak gi Meshak kod Abednego mane iketo jotelo mag gweng’ Babulon. Ruoth, gin gitamore winjo chikni. Gisedagi lamo nyasachi kata kulruok ni kido mane ichungo.”" 
Daniel3:13 Kane ruoth owinjo kamano, mirima mager nomake, mi ogolo chik mondo okel ji adekgo ire." 
Daniel3:14 Kane okelgi ire, nopenjogi niya, “Shadrak gi Meshak kod Abednego, bende en adier ni utamoru lamo nyasacha, kendo utamoru kuloru piny ni kido mar dhahabu ma asechungo?" 
Daniel3:15 Koro sani ka uwinjo tung’ gi thum nyatiti gi asili kod thumbe mamoko ka ywak, to nyaka ukulru piny kendo ulam kidono. To kudagi timo kamano, to ibiro witu e mach makakni, piyopiyo ma ok odeko. Koso uparo ni nitie Nyasaye moro manyalo resou?”" 
Daniel3:16 Shadrak gi Meshak kod Abednego ne jodwoke niya, “Ruoth wan to ok wabi temo mondo waresre." 
Daniel3:17 To kapo ni Nyasaye ma walamo nyalo resowa e mach kendo e tekoni, to kara obiro resowa." 
Daniel3:18 To kata ka ok oresowa, to onego ing’e malong’o ruoth ni ok wanyal lamo nyasachi, bende ok wanyal kulore piny ni kido mar dhahabu ma isechungo.”" 
Daniel3:19 Eka mirima mager nomako Nebukadnezar, mi wang’e olokore remo ni Shadrak gi Meshak kod Abednego. Nochiko joge mondo ochwak mach obed maliet nyadibiriyo moloyo kaka ne oliet pile," 
Daniel3:20 mi ogolo chik ni joge mag lweny marateke moloyoe mamoko mondo otue ji adekgo kendo owit e mach makaknino. 
Daniel3:21 Kamano ne gitueyogi mana ka girwakore gi lepgi duto kod kondegi, mi giwitogi e mach." 
Daniel3:22 To nikech chik ruoth ne ger, kendo mach ne liet malich, omiyo joma ne oting’o Shadrak gi Meshak kod Abednego katero e mach ne jowang’, mi orumo pep." 
Daniel3:23 To Shadrak gi Meshak kod Abednego ne joling’ore e chuny mach kotuegi kamano. 
Daniel3:24 Eka Nebukadnezar nochung’ piyopiyo kobwok, mi openjo jong’adne rieko niya, “Donge ne watueyo ji adek, mi wanyumo e mach?” Ne gidwoke ni “Ee ruoth, ne watimo kamano.”" 
Daniel3:25 To nomedo penjogi niya, “Ka kamano, to ang’o momiyo aneno ji ang’wen kawuotho e mach, ka ok otue, to bende ok wang’? To ng’at mar ang’wen kuomgi chalo mana gi Nyasaye!”" 
Daniel3:26 Mano omiyo Nebukadnezar nodhi e dho mach, mi oluongo niya, “Shadrak gi Meshak kod Abednego, un jotich Nyasaye maduong’ moloyo, wuoguru!” Mi ne giwuok." 
Daniel3:27 Jotelo duto mag ruoth kaachiel gi jong’adne rieko, nochokore mondo oneye joma ne mach otamore wang’ogo. Yie wigi ne ok orewore, kata lepgi ne ok owang’ to bende ne ok gidum much iro ka joma ne owuok e mach adier." 
Daniel3:28 Nebukadnezar nowacho niya, “Pakuru Nyasach Shadrak gi Meshak kod Abednego! Nende ooro malaika mare moreso joma lame kendo mogeno kuomegi. Ne gidagi winjo chikna, mi giyie tho, kar kulruok piny mondo gilam nyasaye moro amora ma ok mana Nyasachgi." 
Daniel3:29 Kuom mano, koro agolo chik ni, ng’ato ang’ata ma owuoyo marach kuom Nyasach Shadrak gi Meshak kod Abednego, to ibiro jak embene gi bedene, bed ni oa e oganda mane, kata dhoot mane, kata owacho dhok mane, kendo nolok ode gunda, nimar onge nyasaye moro amora manyalo reso ji kamano.”" 
Daniel3:30 Eka ruoth nomiyo Shadrak gi Meshak kod Abednego tije madongo moloyo e gweng’ Babulon. 
Daniel4:1 Ruoth Nebukadnezar nolando wach ni ogendini duto mae piny ngima, bed ni gia e dhoot mane, kata bed ni giwacho dhok mane. Nowachonigi niya, “Amosou gi mos mogundho." 
Daniel4:1 Ruoth Nebukadnezar nolando wach ni ogendini duto mae piny ngima, bed ni gia e dhoot mane, kata bed ni giwacho dhok mane. Nowachonigi niya, “Amosou gi mos mogundho." 
Daniel4:2 Koro adwaro nyisou ranyisi gi honni ma Nyasaye maduong’ moloyo osetimona. 
Daniel4:3 “Ranyisi mag Nyasaye dongo manade! Honni motimo nigi teko malich miwuoro! Lochne osiko nyaka chieng’. 
Daniel4:4 “An Nebukadnezar, noyudo adak gi kue e oda ka achamo mwanduna." 
Daniel4:5 To chieng’ moro kane anindo, ne aleko lek mobwoga, mi aneno gik malich miwuoro." 
Daniel4:6 Mano omiyo nagolo chik mondo jong’adna rieko duto man Babulon okel ira olokna tiend lekno. 
Daniel4:7 Eka nokel ajuoke duto, mi ahulonigi lekna, to ne ok ginyal lokona tiende." 
Daniel4:8 To bang’e Daniel ma bende iluongo ni Belteshazar, nodonjo. (Nyingeno oting’o nying Bel ma nyasacha.) Much nyiseche maler ni kuome. En bende nanyise leknano." 
Daniel4:9 Ne awachone kama: Belteshazar, jatend ajuoke duto, ang’eyo ni much nyiseche maler ni kuomi, kendo ni ielo midhierni duto. Koro winji gima nende aleko, mondo ilokna tiende." 
Daniel4:10 “Kane oyudo anindo, naneno yath marabora e dier piny tir." 
Daniel4:11 Yadhno nodongo adonga motundo e polo, kendo ng’ato ang’ata man kamoro amora e piny ne nyalo nene." 
Daniel4:12 Obokene ne beyo, kendo nonyago olemo mang’eny moromo piny ngima chamo. Le ne yueyo e tipone, winy bende ne gedo e bedene, kendo gik moko duto mangima nochamo olembene." 
Daniel4:13 To kane pod aparo gima ne anenono, ne apo ka aneno malaika ma jarit ka lor a e polo." 
Daniel4:14 Ne okok gi duol maduong’ niya, ‘Ng’ad yadhno oko, kendo ilwer bedene gi obokene, mi ike olembene, mondo le oring oa e tipone, kendo winy bende oa e bedene." 
Daniel4:15 To iwe osiki mar tiende kochung’ e lowo, kendo itueye alwora gi nyinyo kod mula. Kamano nodong’ ei lum e pap kanyo, nimar ng’atno nyaka dag gi le e thim, kendo tho mok kuome." 
Daniel4:16 Ok nobed gi paro mar dhano, to nobed mana gi paro mar le kuom higni abiriyo," 
Daniel4:17 nikech mano e wach mane malaike ma jorit ong’ado mondo ji modak e piny ong’e ni Nyasaye Maduong’ Moloyo ema nigi loch kuom pinje duto mae piny. Onyalo keto ng’ato ang’ata modwaro obed ruoth, kata dabed ni en dhano adhana.’ ”" 
Daniel4:18 Kane ruoth Nebukadnezar osehulo lekne kamano, nowacho niya, “Mano e gima ne aleko. Koro in Belteshazar, nyisa tiende nimar jong’adna rieko ok nyal lokona tiende. In to ang’eyo ni inyalo lokonago, nikech much nyiseche maler ni kuomi.”" 
Daniel4:19 Kane Daniel ma nyinge moro en Belteshazar, owinjo wachno, ne obwok mi chunye ochandore ma ok onyal wacho gimoro. Ruoth nowachone niya, “Belteshazar, kik iwe chunyi chandre nikech lekno kata ne gima tiende nyiso.” Belteshazar nodwoke niya, “Ruoth dobedo maber ka lekno kod tiende odok ni wasiki!" 
Daniel4:20 Nineno yath maratego kendo marabora motundo e polo, ma ng’ato ang’ata e piny ne nyalo neno." 
Daniel4:21 Obokene ne beyo, kendo nonyago olemo mang’eny moromo piny duto chamo. Le ne yueyo e tipone kendo winy bende ne gedo e bedene." 
Daniel4:22 “Ruoth, in e yadhno! Irabora kendo itegno. Tekoni osedongo mochopo e polo, kendo lochni okwako piny ngima." 
Daniel4:23 To bende nineno malaika ma jarit kaa e polo mowacho niya, ‘Ng’ad yadhni oko, mi ikethi, to osikine iwe kochung’ e lowo. Itueye alwora gi nyinyo kod mula, mi iwe kodong’ ei lum e pap kanyo. Kamano ng’atni mondo odag gi le e thim nyaka higni abiriyo, kendo tho omok kuome.’" 
Daniel4:24 “Ruoth, koro adwaro lokoni tiend leknino. Onyiso bura ma Nyasaye Maduong’ Moloyo oseng’adoni. Ibiro riembi ia kuom ji mondo idag gi le." 
Daniel4:25 Ibiro chamo lum gi dhogi ka dhiang’ kendo ininind oko kama tho nomokie kuomi kuom higni abiriyo. Bang’e ining’e ni kara Nyasaye Maduong’ Moloyo ema nigi loch kuom piny duto mae piny, kendo onyalo keto ng’ato ang’ata modwaro obed ruoth." 
Daniel4:26 “To bende ineno ka malaika ogolo chik ni mondo osiki kochung’ e lowo. Mano nyiso ni inichak ibed ruoth kendo, ka iseyie ni Nyasaye ema nigi loch e piny ngima." 
Daniel4:27 Kuom mano, ruoth, luw gima anyisini. We timo marach, to tim maber, kendo ikech joma odhier mondo ichulgo richo misetimo. Kamano nidhi nyime maber.”" 
Daniel4:28 Gigo duto notimore ni ruoth Nebukadnezar. 
Daniel4:29 Bang’ dueche apar gariyo, noyudo ruoth wuotho e tat ode, Babulon," 
Daniel4:30 mowacho niya, “Neye kaka Babulon duong’! Ne agere gi tekona awuon mondo obed dalana maduong’ kendo anyisigo tekona gi duong’na.”" 
Daniel4:31 Kane pok dhoge olwar, dwol nowuoyo gi e polo niya, “Ruoth Nebukadnezar, winj gima awachoni. Osemayi pinyi kawuono." 
Daniel4:32 Ibiro riembi ia kuom ji, kendo ibiro dak mana gi le, kichamo lum gi dhogi ka dhiang’ kuom higni abiriyo. Bang’e ining’e ni Nyasaye Maduong’ Moloyo ema nigi loch kuom pinje duto mae piny, kendo ni onyalo keto ng’ato ang’ata modwaro obed ruoth.”" 
Daniel4:33 Piyopiyo nono wechego notimore ni Nebukadnezar. Noriembe, mogole kuom ji, mi odhi ochamo lum gi dhoge ka dhiang’. Tho nomoko kuome, mi yie wiye nodongo maboyo ka yie ongo, kendo kokene bende nodongo maboyo ka kok winyo." 
Daniel4:34 To kane higni abiriyogo oserumo, an Nebukadnezar ne ang’iyo polo malo, mi parona oduogo. Ne apako Nyasaye Maduong’ Moloyo ma osiko nyaka chieng’, mi amiye duong’ gi luor, ka awacho niya, “Lochne osiko nyaka chieng’." 
Daniel4:35 Ji ma odak e piny nenore ka gima tin e nyime, bende otimo gima en ema ohero gi ogendini mag polo kod ji manie piny. Onge ng’ama nyalo mone timo gima odwaro, kata mana penje gima otimo.”" 
Daniel4:36 Kane parona oduogo, to loch mar piny gi luor kod teko ne oduogna. Jong’adna rieko gi jodonga nobiro ira, mi oduogna loch mogurore moloyo mane an go mokwongo." 
Daniel4:37 To koro, an Nebukadnezar apako Ruodh Polo kendo amiye duong’, nimar gimoro amora motimo ni kare. Pile ong’ado bura kare, kendo odwoko joma sungore piny." 
Daniel5:1 E ndalo loch ruoth Belshazar, ne orwako jodongo alufu achiel e sawo maduong’, mi ometho kodgi." 
Daniel5:2 To kane gimetho, Belshazar nogolo chik mondo okel kikombe gi tewni mag dhahabu gi mag fedha mane Nebukadnezar kwar mare ogolo e Hekalu man Jerusalem. Nodwaro ni en gi jodonge kaachiel kod monde gi monde mamoko ometh gi gigo." 
Daniel5:3 Kamano nokel kikombe gi tewni mag dhahabugo, mi giduto gimetho kodgi." 
Daniel5:4 Kane gimetho kamano, ne gipako nyiseche molos gi dhahabu gi fedha gi mula gi nyinyo gi yien kod kidi." 
Daniel5:5 Eka ne gipo ka lwet dhano othinyore, mochako ndiko kor ot, machiegni gi kama ne taya lielie. Kane ruoth oneno lwet dhano ka ndiko kamano," 
Daniel5:6 ne obedo maluor, mi chunye ochandore, kendo dende ojuol ka chongene tetni." 
Daniel5:7 Ne ogoyo koko mondo oomne ajuoke, kendo kane gibiro nowachonigi niya, “Ng’ato ang’ata ma nyalo somo ndikoni, mi nyisa tiende, to norwakne law ruoth maralik, kod thiwni mar dhahabu mar duong’ne e ng’ute, kendo nobed jalupna mar adek.”" 
Daniel5:8 Jong’ad ni ruoth rieko duto nosudo machiegni, to onge ng’ato kuomgi mane nyalo somo ndikono, kata mana nyalo nyiso ruoth tiende." 
Daniel5:9 Kane ruoth Belzashar oneno kamano, luoro nomake ahinya, mi dende omedo juol marach. Jodonge bende nodhier nono." 
Daniel5:10 Chi ruoth nowinjo koko mane ruoth gi jodonge goyo, mi odonjo e ot mitimoe sawo. Nowacho niya, “Ruoth, mondo idag aming’a. Kiyie to chunyi owe chandore, bende dendi owe juol kamano." 
Daniel5:11 Nitie ng’at moro e pinyi man gi much nyiseche maler. E ndalo loch ruoth Nebukadnezar kwaru, ng’atno ne nigi paro maber kod rieko mana ka rieko mag nyiseche, omiyo nokete jatend ajuoke duto." 
Daniel5:12 Ng’atno iluongo ni Daniel, mane Nebukadnezar ochako ni Belteshazar. En gi nyalo mar adier kod rieko, bende olony e tiend midhierni. Omiyo or ng’ato oluongnigo, mondo onyisi tiend wachni.”" 
Daniel5:13 Kamano nokel Daniel piyopiyo e nyim ruoth, mi ruoth nopenje niya, “In e Daniel ma achiel kuom jo-Yahudi mane kwara odaro e piny Juda, mokelo e tuech ka koso?" 
Daniel5:14 Asewinjo ni much nyiseche ni kuomi, kendo ni in ng’at mariek mong’eyo gik matut." 
Daniel5:15 Aseluongo jong’ad rieko gi ajuoke mondo obi osom ndikono kendo olokna tiende to otamogi. 
Daniel5:16 To asewinjo humbi ni inyalo fwenyo gik mopondo, kendo inyalo elo tiend midhierni. Omiyo, ka inyalo somo ndikono, mi ilokna tiende, to norwakni law ruoth maralik, gi thiwni mar dhahabu mar duong’ e ng’uti, kendo inibed jalupna mar adek.”" 
Daniel5:17 Daniel nodwoko niya, “Ruoth, bed abeda gi michnigo, kata inyalo miyogi ng’ato ang’ata mihero. An to abiro somoni asoma gima ondikno, mi anyisi tiende." 
Daniel5:18 “Nyasaye Maduong’ moloyo noketo Nebukadnezar kwaru obedo ruoth maduong’ man gi teko kod duong’. 
Daniel5:19 Omiyo ogendini duto mae piny ngima, bed ni gia e dhoot mane kata giwacho dhok mane, ne oluore kendo ne tetni e nyime. Kapo ni ne odwaro nego ng’ato, to onego anega, kata kane odwaro weyo ng’ato ka ngima, to oweyo aweya. Ne onyalo miyo ng’ato teko, kata mayogo tekono, mana kaka en ema ohero." 
Daniel5:20 To nikech ne odoko jasunga ma wiye tek kendo ma jakwinyo, ne omaye lochne kaachiel gi duong’ne." 
Daniel5:21 Ne oriembe oa kuom ji, mi parone olokore ka paro le. Bende ne odak gi kenje manie thim, mi ochamo lum gi dhoge ka dhiang’, kendo ne onindo oko ka tho omoko kuome. To achien noyie gi Nyasaye Maduong’ Moloyo ema nigi loch e pinje duto ma e piny, kendo en ema oketo ng’ato ang’ata modwaro bedo ruoth." 
Daniel5:22 “To in Belshazar, nyakware, ok isebolori e nyime, kata obedo ni ing’eyo gigo kamano." 
Daniel5:23 Kar timo kamano to isepiem gi Ruodh Polo kuom kelo kikombe gi tewni mane osegol e Hekalu mare, mi umethoe. Ee, in gi jodongi kaachiel gi mondi mamoko ne umadho divai gi gigo, kupako nyiseche molos gi dhahabu gi fedha gi mula gi nyinyo gi bao kod kidi. Gin nyiseche ma ok nyal neno, kata winjo wach, kata ng’eyo gimoro. To ne ok iluoro Nyasaye morito ngimani kaachiel gi gik moko duto mitimo." 
Daniel5:24 Mano emomiyo Nyasaye nooro lwedo mondo ondik wechego. 
Daniel5:25 “Koro magi e weche mane ondiki: KWAN, KWAN, PIM, POGRUOK," 
Daniel5:26 kendo magi e tiend weche gogo: KWAN nyiso ni Nyasaye osekwano ndalo mag lochni, mi otieko lochnino." 
Daniel5:27 PIM nyiso ni osepimi e ratil, mi oyud ni ok iromo." 
Daniel5:28 POGRUOK nyiso ni pinyi osepogi, mi omi jo-Media gi jo-Persia.”" 
Daniel5:29 Kane Daniel otieko wuoyo, Belshazar nogolo chik, mi orwak ni Daniel law ruoth maralik, gi thiwni mar dhahabu mar duong’ e ng’ute. Eka nokete jalupne mar adek." 
Daniel5:30 To otieno nogo ema nonegie Belshazar ruodh Babulon," 
Daniel5:31 mi Darius ja-Media okawo loch pinyno, ka en jahigni piero auchiel gariyo." 
Daniel6:1 Darius noneno ni ber mondo oyier jotelo mia auchiel gi piero ariyo orit pinje duto mane nie bwo lochne. 
Daniel6:2 Eka noketo Daniel kod ji ariyo mamoko obed jotend jotelogo kendo orang weche duto mag ruoth. 
Daniel6:3 Piyopiyo nono, Daniel ne nenore ni nyalo tiyo maber ahinya moloyo jotelo kod jodongo mamoko duto. Kuom mano, ruoth noparo mondo okete jatend pinye duto." 
Daniel6:4 Mano nomiyo jotelo mamoko kod jodongo otemo mondo ondhog Daniel e tichne mar rito piny. To ne ok ginyal yudo gimoro amora marach e tichne, nikech ne ne jaratiro maonge miganga." 
Daniel6:5 Kuom mano, ne giwacho e kindgi giwegi niya, “Ok wabi nwang’o gimoro ma dwadonjgo ni Daniel mak mana ka en gimoro modok korka wach Nyasache.”" 
Daniel6:6 Omiyo ne gidhi ir ruoth, mi giwachone niya, “Ruoth Darius, mondo idag aming’a." 
Daniel6:7 Wan duto ma wan jotend pinyi, wasewinjore ni onego igol chik mager ni, kuom ndalo piero adek ng’ato kik kwa gimoro kuom Nyasaye moro amora kata kuom dhano moro, to mak mana kuomi, in ruoth. To ng’ato ang’ata moketho chikno nyaka wit e bur sibuoche." 
Daniel6:8 Kuom mano, ruoth wadwaro mondo igol chikno, kendo iketie sei, mondo obed achiel kuom chike mag jo-Media gi jo-Persia ma ok nyal loki.”" 
Daniel6:9 Kamano ruoth Darius noketo sei e chikno. 
Daniel6:10 Kane Daniel owinjo ni oseket sei e chikno, nodhi e ode. To ewi ode ne nitie ot moro mane nigi dirise mochomo yo Jerusalem. Ei odno Daniel ne pod dhi adhiya nyime gi goyo chonge piny e dho dirisego, kolamo Nyasaye nyadidek e odiechieng’ achiel kaka ne ojatimo pile." 
Daniel6:11 Jotelogo nobiro moneno Daniel ka lamo Nyasache," 
Daniel6:12 mi giduto ne gidhi ir ruoth mondo gidonjne. Ne gipenje niya, “Ruoth, donge ne igolo chik ni, ng’ato ang’ata mokwayo gimoro kuom Nyasaye moro amora kata kuom dhano moro ma ok kuomi, to nyaka wit e bur sibuoche?” Ruoth nodwokogi niya, “Ee, en chik mogurore mana kaka chike moko duto mag jo-Media gi jo-Persia, ma ok nyal loki.”" 
Daniel6:13 Eka ne giwachone niya, “To Daniel, ma achiel kuom jo-Juda mane odar nokel ka, ok dwar winjo wachni, kendo otamore rito chik mane igolo, nikech olamo Nyasache didek e odiechieng’ achiel.”" 
Daniel6:14 Kane ruoth owinjo kamano, chunye nochandore, mi otemo dwaro yo ma doresgo Daniel, kendo nobet koparo wachno nyaka chieng’ opodho." 
Daniel6:15 Bang’e jotelogo noduogo ire monyise niya, “Ruoth, ing’eyo ni kaluwore gi chike mag jo-Media gi jo-Persia, chik moro amora ma ruoth ogolo ok nyal loki.”" 
Daniel6:16 Mano omiyo ruoth nogolo chik, mi okaw Daniel owiti e bur sibuoche. To nowacho ni Daniel niya, “Onego Nyasachi ma itiyone gi adiera duto, resi e masirani.”" 
Daniel6:17 Bang’ mano, ne okel lwanda, mi olorgo dho burno, kendo ruoth noketoe sei mare gi mag jodonge, mondo kik ng’ato res Daniel." 
Daniel6:18 Bang’e ruoth nodok ode, mi onindo kech, kendo kata mana morne mapile ne ok otimo, bende nindo notamore tere." 
Daniel6:19 Nochiew huyuhuyu piny, moreto piyopiyo kodhi e bur sibuoche," 
Daniel6:20 kendo kane ochopo machiegni, ne okok ka chunye parore, kowacho niya, “Daniel, jatich Nyasaye mangima! Donge Nyasaye ma itiyone gi adiera duto oseresi e dho sibuoche?”" 
Daniel6:21 Daniel ne odwoke niya, “Ruoth, mondo idag aming’a!" 
Daniel6:22 Nyasaye oseoro malaikane, mi omako dho sibuoche mondo kik hinya. Osetimo kamano nikech ong’eyo ni aonge gi ketho, to bende nikech pok atimo gimoro marach e nyimi ruoth.”" 
Daniel6:23 Kane ruoth owinjo kamano ne obedo gi mor maduong’, mi ogolo chik mondo oywa Daniel oko. Omiyo ne giywaye oko, mi oyud ni onge ngima osetime kata mana matin nono, nikech ne ogeno kuom Nyasache." 
Daniel6:24 Bang’ mano, ruoth ne ogolo chik ni mondo joma ne odonjo ni Daniel owiti e bur sibuoche kaachiel gi mondgi kod nyithindgi. To kane owitgi e bur kamano, sibuoche ne ongamogi moturo chokegi duto matindotindo, mana kapok gichopo kata e pier bur piny." 
Daniel6:25 Bang’e ruoth Darius nondiko ni ogendini duto mae piny, bed ni gia e dhoot mane, kata giwacho dhok mane, kowacho niya, “Amosou uduto gi mos mogundho." 
Daniel6:25 Bang’e ruoth Darius nondiko ni ogendini duto mae piny, bed ni gia e dhoot mane, kata giwacho dhok mane, kowacho niya, “Amosou uduto gi mos mogundho." 
Daniel6:26 Asegolo chik e pinje duto manie bwo lochna ni ng’ato ka ng’ato nyaka luor Nyasach Daniel kendo miye duong’. En e Nyasaye Mangima, mosiko nyaka chieng’. Lochne gi tekone ok norum." 
Daniel6:27 En ema owaro ji kendo oreso, kendo en ema otimo honni e polo gi piny. Ne oreso Daniel e dho sibuoche.”" 
Daniel6:28 Kamano Daniel ne odhi nyime maber e ndalo loch Darius, kendo e ndalo loch Kuros ja-Persia." 
Daniel7:1 E higa mokwongo mar loch Belshazar ruodh Babulon, an Daniel ne aleko, kendo aneno fweny gotieno. Ne andiko lekno e kitabu," 
Daniel7:2 kendo gima ne aneno gotieno chalo kama: Yamo ne kudho moa koni gi koni kendo nam noloko marach. 
Daniel7:3 Eka ondiegi ang’wen madongo dongo man gi kido mopogore opogore nothinyore, kowuok e nam." 
Daniel7:4 Ondiek mokwongo ne chalo gi sibuor, to ne en gi buom ka buomb ongo. Kane pod ang’iye, ne aneno ka buombenego opudh oko, kendo ondiegno oting’ore malo, mi ochung’ ka dhano. Eka ne omiye paro mar dhano." 
Daniel7:5 Bang’e ne aneno ondiek mar ariyo, ma chalo gi dubu, kochung’ gi tiendene ma yo kachien. Ne oriwo ng’ede adek e dhoge, kendo ne awinjo ka dwol moro wachone niya, “Cham achama ring’o nyaka iyieng’ chuth.”" 
Daniel7:6 Kane pod ang’icho, naneno ondiek machielo machalo gi kwach. Ne en gi buombe ang’wen e dieng’eye ka mag winyo, kendo en gi wiye ang’wen! Bende ne omiye teko mar rito piny." 
Daniel7:7 Bang’ mano, kane pod aleko, ne achako aneno ondiek mar ang’wen. Ne onenore malich ahinya, kendo ne en gi teko mang’eny. Bende ne en gi leke madongodongo mag chuma, kendo ne osiko ochiemo achiema konyono gimoro amora modong’ e piny. En ne ok ochal gi ondiegi adek mamoko ka, kendo ne en gi tunge apar." 
Daniel7:8 To kane oyudo ang’iyo tungego, ne aneno tung’ moro matin kawuok e kind tunge mamokogo. Tung’no nomuko tunge adek mane oyudo ni kanyo chon, mondo owene thuolo. Tung’no ne nigi wenge ka mag dhano, kod dhok mawacho weche mag sunga." 
Daniel7:9 Kane oyudo pod ang’icho, kombe mag loch ne oket kanyo. Eka ng’at moro machon ma nyaka nene, ne obet e kom achiel. Lepe ne tar ka pe, kendo yie wiye ne chalo gi yie rombo marachar thiriri. Kome ne en mana mach maliel, kendo ne en gi tiende motimo mach mosiko ka liel aliela." 
Daniel7:10 Mach nodhuolore kanyo mana ka aora mamol. Ne nitie ji gana gi gana kanyo matiyone, kendo ji tara gi tara mochung’ e nyime. Eka bura nochakore, mi oyar kitepe." 
Daniel7:11 To kane pod ang’icho, ne awinjo ka tung’ matin cha pod wuoyo awuoya, kawacho weche mag sunga. Eka ne aneno ka oneg ondiek mar ang’wenno, mi owit ringe e mach, kendo owang’ morumo pep." 
Daniel7:12 To ondiegi adek mamoko ne ok oneg, to ne owegi kuom kinde moko moromo. To kata kamano ne omagi teko." 
Daniel7:13 Kane aleko gotienono ne aneno gima chalo dhano kabiro ei boche polo, mi oter ir ng’at ma nyaka nene." 
Daniel7:14 Eka ne oyudo teko gi duong’ kod loch mar rito piny, mondo ji manie piny ngima, bed ni gia e dhoot mane, kata giwacho dhok mane, otine. Tekone ne biro bedo mosiko, kendo lochne bende ne onge ng’ama nyalo ketho." 
Daniel7:15 Fweny mane anenogo nobwoga, mi chunya ochandore ahinya." 
Daniel7:16 Omiyo ne adhi ir ng’at achiel kuom joma ne ochung’ kanyo, mi apenje mondo onyisa tiend fwenygo. Eka nonyisa, kowachona niya," 
Daniel7:17 “Ondiegi ang’wen madongogo, nyiso loch ruodhi ang’wen mabiro bet e piny." 
Daniel7:18 To jo-Nyasaye Maduong’ Moloyo biro yudo loch mar rito piny, kendo ginisik gi lojno nyaka chieng’.”" 
Daniel7:19 Bang’ mano ne adwaro ng’eyo ngech ondiek mar ang’wen, mane kite opogore gi kit ondiegi mamokogo, kendo mane nenore malich mabwogo ji. Ne en gi leke mag nyinyo kod kogno mag mula, kendo ne osiko ochiemo achiema konyono gimoro amora modong’ piny." 
Daniel7:20 Bende ne adwaro ng’eyo ngech tung’ apar mane otwi e wiye, kendo ngech tung’ achiel mane owuok bang’e, momuko tunge mamoko adek. Tung’no ne nigi wenge, to bende ne en gi dhok mawacho weche mag sunga, kendo ne onenore maduong’ moloyo tunge mamoko duto te." 
Daniel7:21 To kane pod oyudo ang’icho, ne aneno ka tung’no kedo gi jo-Nyasaye, mi oloyogi," 
Daniel7:22 nyaka ne ng’at ma nyaka nene obiro mong’ado bura ka chwako jo-Nyasaye Maduong’ Moloyo. Kinde koro ne osechopo ma jo-Nyasaye yudoe loch mar rito piny. 
Daniel7:23 Eka ne onyisa kama, “Ondiek mar ang’wenno nyiso loch mar ruoth mar ang’wen ma biro bet e piny, kendo nobed mopogore gi loch mamoko duto. Enokwak piny duto, kendo nonyone piny, mokethe chuth." 
Daniel7:24 Tungene apar to nonyiso ruodhi apar ma nobed e lojno. Eka bang’e, ruoth moro nowuogi mopogore gi ruodhi mokwongogo, kendo nolo ruodhi adek." 
Daniel7:25 Enobed kowuoyo marach kuom Nyasaye Maduong’ Moloyo, kendo enothir jo-Nyasaye. Bende enotem loko chike mag dinigi kod sewni maggi, mi jo-Nyasaye nobed e bwo lochne kuom higni adek gi nus." 
Daniel7:26 Bang’ mano, bura nong’adi mi nomaye lochne duto mondo okethe chuth." 
Daniel7:27 Eka teko kod duong’ mar ruodhi duto mae piny nochiw ni jo-Nyasaye Maduong’ Moloyo. Tekogi mag loch mar rito piny nosik mochwere, kendo ruodhi duto mae piny nobed katiyonigi kendo miyogi luor.”" 
Daniel7:28 Mano e giko wechego, to an Daniel ne abwok ahinya, mi denda ojuol, to ne ok anyiso ng’ato wechego." 
Daniel8:1 E higa mar adek mar loch Belshazar, an Daniel naneno fweny machielo machal gi mokwongono." 
Daniel8:2 Ei fwenyno ne apo ka aneno ni ne an Susa, dala maduong’ mar piny Elam, ka achung’ e bath aora Ulai." 
Daniel8:3 Ne ating’o wang’a mi aneno im kochung’ e bath aora. Ne en gi tunge ariyo madongo, ma achiel kuomgi bor moloyo machielo. To maborno ema ne aneno ka twi achien." 
Daniel8:4 Ne aneno imno ka tuomo gimoro amora moyudo e nyime, kochomo yo podho chieng’ gi yo nyandwat kod yo milambo. Onge gima ne nyalo geng’o kata reso gimoro e tekone, ne otimo gimoro amora mohero, kendo nochikore konyiso ni oratego." 
Daniel8:5 Kane pod aparo tiend wachno, nywok moro nothinyore kowuok yo podho chieng’ karingo matek ma tiende ok mul piny. Ne en gi tung achiel marabet e pat wang’e." 
Daniel8:6 Kane ochopo but im man gi tunge ariyo mane aseneno kochung’ e bath aora cha, ne omuomore kuome gi tekone duto." 
Daniel8:7 Ne aneno komonjo imno kokecho, momuko tungene ariyoka. Imno koro ne onge gi teko ma diresrego, omiyo nywok ne ogoye piny monyone, kendo onge ng’at mane nyalo konye." 
Daniel8:8 Nywogno ne medo nyiso tekone, to kata obedo ni ne oratego kamano, tunge maduong’no notur, eka kar tung’ achielno, tunge ang’wen madongo ne otwiye, ka moro ka moro ochiko tung’ achiel achiel mar piny." 
Daniel8:9 Bang’e tung’ moro notwi, kowuok e achiel kuom tunge ang’wen-go. Nonyiso tekone kochiko yo milambo gi yo wuok chieng’ kod yo piny maber mar Israel." 
Daniel8:10 Ne odoko motegno momonjo ogend lweny mag polo, tiende ni sulue, kendo ne owito moko kuomgi piny, monyono." 
Daniel8:11 To bende nopiem gi jatend ogend lweny mag polo, mi nomiyo misengni mane itimo pile ni jatelono ogik, kendo omiyo lemo mar Hekalu bende ogik." 
Daniel8:12 Kar timo misengni mitimo pile, to richo malich ema ne itimo, mi dini mar adier nowit kucho. Tung’no notimo gimoro amora modwaro." 
Daniel8:13 Bang’e nawinjo ka malaika moro penjo malaika machielo niya, “Gik mane otimore e lwenygo biro siko kamano nyaka karang’o ka richo malich ema itimo kar misengni mitimo pile, kendo ka ogend lweny mag polo gi Hekalu inyono piny?”" 
Daniel8:14 Nodwoko niya, “Nyaka kinde ma misengni alufu ariyo gi mia adek mitimo okinyi godhiambo kadhi. Eka nochak opwodh Hekalu kendo.”" 
Daniel8:15 An Daniel natemo mondo ang’e tiend fwenyno, mi apo ka aneno gima chalo dhano kochung’ e nyima." 
Daniel8:16 Eka nawinjo dwol machalo dwond dhano kaluongo gi loka machielo mar aora Ulai niya, “Gabriel, nyis jalo tiend gima ne oneno.”" 
Daniel8:17 Omiyo Gabriel nobiro mochung’ buta, mi kihondko omaka, mapodho piny. Nowachona niya, “Wuod dhano, winji! Fweny mane inenono nyiso gik mabiro timore e ndalo giko.”" 
Daniel8:18 To kane owuoyo koda, parona ne olal, mana kama ne apodhoe aumano. To ne omaka mochunga," 
Daniel8:19 eka owachona niya, “Adwaro nyisi gima notimre bang’ masiche ma mirimb Nyasaye osekelo, nikech fwenyno nyiso gik mabiro timore e ndalo mag giko." 
Daniel8:20 “Im man gi tunge ariyo mane ineno cha, nyiso loch Media gi loch Persia." 
Daniel8:21 To nyuok nyiso loch Gris, kendo tung’ maduong’ manie pat wang’e nyiso ruodh Gris mokwongo." 
Daniel8:22 Tunge ang’wen mane otwi kane tung’ mokwongo osemukore nyiso loch ruodhi ang’wen ma biro betie ka pinyno osepogore, to ok ginibed motegno ka loch ruoth mokwongo." 
Daniel8:23 “Ka loch ruodhigo ochiegni rumo, kendo ka gisetimo richo mang’eny moromo kumo, to ruoth moro ma wiye tek, makwiny kendo ma jamriambo, biro wuok." 
Daniel8:24 Enobed gi teko mathoth, to tekono ok nobed mare owuon. Enokel masira malich, to gimoro amora motimo nodhi maber. Enotiek joma rateke kaachiel gi jo-Nyasaye." 
Daniel8:25 To nikech oriek, yorene mag miriambogo biro miyo otimo gimoro amora modwaro. Enobed jasunga kendo notiek ji mathoth apoya. Kata mana Ruodh Ruodhi bende nopiemgo, to ruodhno ema notieke, to ok gi lwet dhano." 
Daniel8:26 Fweny mar misengni mitimo okinyi godhiambo pile ma osenyisi tiende, en adier, to kik ihul wachno ni ng’ato, nikech pod kinde malach biro kadho kapok otimore.”" 
Daniel8:27 Bang’ mano, an Daniel, chunya nobedo mool, mi abedo matuo kuom kinde mogwarore. To bange ne aa malo, mi adok e tich mane ruoth osemiya. Kata kamano fwenyno ne odhiera, kendo ne ok anyal ng’eyo tiende." 
Daniel9:1 E higa mokwongo mar loch Darius wuod Ahazuerus ja-Media, mane ruodh piny Babulon," 
Daniel9:2 an Daniel, nasomo kitepe maler, ka adwaro ng’eyo tiend higni piero abiriyo mane Jerusalem biro bedogo gunda, kaka ne Ruoth Nyasaye owacho ni Jeremia." 
Daniel9:3 Bang’e ne alamo Ruoth Nyasaye matek, kaywakne kendo ka ariyo kech. Bende ne arwako pien gugru, kendo ne abuko wiya buru." 
Daniel9:4 Ne alamo Ruoth Nyasacha kendo ahulo richo mag jowa, ka awacho niya, “A Ruoth Nyasaye in e Nyasaye maduong’ kendo malich. Irito singruok mitimo gi joma oheri kendo marito chikeni, kendo iherogi gi hera mosiko." 
Daniel9:5 Waseketho, kendo wabedo joricho kwatimo marach. Wasedagi timo gima ne ichikowa ni mondo watim, mi waweyo chikeni gi bucheni." 
Daniel9:6 Wasetamore winjo jotichni ma jonabi mane owuoyo e nyingi ni ruodhiwa kendo ni jotendwa gi kwerewa kod oganda duto. 
Daniel9:7 In Ruoth Nyasaye pile isebedo kitimo gik makare, to wan jo-Juda gi jo-Jerusalem gi jo-Israel duto mane ikeyo e pinje machiegni gi maboyo nikech ne waweyi, ema wasebedo ka watimo timbe mag wichkuot." 
Daniel9:8 Ee, Ruoth Nyasaye, wan gi ruodhiwa gi jotendwa kod kwerewa wayudo wichkuot nikech wasetimo richo e nyimi." 
Daniel9:9 In ijang’wono kendo iweyo ni ji richogi, kata obedo ni wan wasepiem kodi." 
Daniel9:10 A Ruoth Nyasaye, kane iwachonwa ni mondo waluw chike mane imiyo jotichni ma jonabi owachonwa, to ne watamore winji." 
Daniel9:11 Jo-Israel duto noketho chikeni, mi otamore winjo gima ne iwacho. Ne watimo richoo e nyimi, mi ikelo kuomwa kuong’ duto mondik e kitap chik Musa jatichni." 
Daniel9:12 Ne ichopo mana gik moko mane iwacho ni nitimnwa kaachiel gi jotendwa, nimar ne ikumo Jerusalem malich moloyo dala moro amora e piny." 
Daniel9:13 Ne wayudo kum duto mondiki e kitap chik Musa. To Ruoth Nyasachwa, kata sani pok watimo gimoro, ma dimi mirimbi kue, kata pok waweyo richowa, kwaluwo wachni maradier." 
Daniel9:14 In Ruoth Nyasachwa nirito kinde mowinjore mondo ikumwae, mi bang’e koro isekumowa. Kuom timo kamano nitimo mana gima kare, nikech in ng’at makare, to wan ema ok wasewinji." 
Daniel9:15 “Ruoth Nyasachwa, ne inyiso tekoni kuom golo jogi e piny Misri, kendo imiyo nyingi obedo gi huma ma pod osiko nyaka chil kawuono. Wan waseketho, kendo wasetimo richo." 
Daniel9:16 A Ruoth Nyasaye in ng’at makare, omiyo koro we kecho gi Jerusalem, nikech en dalani kendo en godi maler. Jopinje mokiewo kodwa duto jaro Jerusalem, kendo gijaro jogi mana nikech kethowa kaachiel gi timbewa manono mane kwerewa otimo." 
Daniel9:17 A Nyasachwa, winj lemona gi ywakna, kendo iguedh Hekalu mari mane okethore, mondo oger. Kamano mondo ng’ato ka ng’ato ong’e ni in e Nyasaye." 
Daniel9:18 A Nyasaye, winjwa, kendo ng’i kuma wantie, mondo ineye thagruok ma wan go kod masira momako dala miluongo gi nyingi. Walami nikech ing’won ahinya, to ok nikech timbewa ni kare." 
Daniel9:19 A Ruoth Nyasaye winjwa, kendo iwenwa richowa. A Ruoth Nyasaye winjwa kendo ikonywa mak ideko, mondo ji duto ong’e ni in e Nyasaye, nimar dalani kod jogi gin magi.”" 
Daniel9:20 Ne adhi nyime gi lemo ka ahulo richona kod richo mag jowa, kendo ne aywak ni Ruoth Nyasacha mondo oguedh gode maler." 
Daniel9:21 Kane pod alemo kamano, ng’at miluongo ni Gabriel, mane aseneno e fweny, ne ohuyo matek mobiro kuma antie. Ne en kar sa mitimoe misango mar odhiambo." 
Daniel9:22 Nowachona malong’o niya, “Daniel, asebiro mondo ami ing’e tiend fweny cha." 
Daniel9:23 E sa mane ichakoe ywak ni Nyasaye, ne odwoki, kendo asechopo mondo anyisi dwokono, nikech in ng’at ma Nyasaye ohero ahinya. To koro chik iti mondo iwinj tiend fwenyno." 
Daniel9:24 “Nyasaye oseketo ni jou gi dalau higni mia ang’wen gi piero ochiko mondo kethogi gi richogi orumie. Bang’e nowe ni ji richogi, kendo nogur tim makare mosiko mondo weche mag fweny gi weche makare otimre adier, eka opwodh Kama Ler Moloyo." 
Daniel9:25 Koro winji, mondo ing’e tiend gik ma abiro wachoni. Chakre chieng’ ma ogolie chik ni Jerusalem onego ochak oger, higni piero ang’wen gochiko nokadhi, eka jatelo mowir nobi. Bang’e Jerusalem nobed ka oseger, molosie yore kendo ochiel gi ohinga motegno, mi nodag higni mia ang’wen gi piero adek gang’wen. Kindeno nobed kinde mar thagruok," 
Daniel9:26 to e gikone, ng’at ma Nyasaye oseyiero noneg kayiem. Oganda lweny mar jatelo moro nobi, mi keth Jerusalem gi Hekalu. To giko nobi ma mwomore ka ohula, kendo lweny gi masira nobedie mana kaka Nyasaye nochiko." 
Daniel9:27 Jatelono nolos winjruok motegno gi ji mang’eny kuom higni abiriyo, kendo nomi ji owe timo misengni kendo owe kelo chiwo kuom higni adek gi nus. Gima kuero makelo kethruok nobed ewi osuri mar Hekalu nyaka ng’at mane okete kanyo chopi e giko mane Nyasaye oketone.”" 
Daniel10:1 E higa mar adek mar loch Kuros ruodh Persia, wach nofwenyore ni Daniel, ma bende niluongo ni Belteshazar. Kata obedo ni wachno ne en wach ma adier, to winjo tiende ne ok yot. Kata kamano ne onyise tiende e yor fweny." 
Daniel10:2 E kindeno, an Daniel, ne ayudo ka asebedo ka asando ringra kuom jumbe adek," 
Daniel10:3 ka ok acham chiemo mabeyo, kendo ring’o kata divai ne ok amul. Bende ne ok awir denda gi mo kuom ndalogo duto." 
Daniel10:4 Chieng’ due piero ariyo gang’wen due mokwongo e higano, ne aneno ni achung’ e bath aora maduong’, tiende ni aora Tigris." 
Daniel10:5 Ne ating’o wang’a mi aneno ng’at morwako law maber, kendo otueyo okanda mar dhahabu." 
Daniel10:6 Dende ne ng’ang’ni ka kidi ma nengone tek. Pat wang’e ne rieny mana ka mil polo, kendo wang’e ne liel ka mach. Bedene gi tiendene bende ne rieny ka mula moyue, kendo duonde ne wuo ka koko mar ji mang’eny." 
Daniel10:7 An Daniel kenda ema ne aneno fwenyno, to ji mamoko mane wan go ne ok oneno gimoro. Kata kamano ne gibwok ahinya, mi giringo gipondo." 
Daniel10:8 Ne adong’ kenda kanyo ka arango fweny malichno. Teko norumona kendo denda nolokore maonge ng’ama ne nyalo ng’eya. 
Daniel10:9 Ne awinjo ka ng’atno wuoyo, mi apodho piny ka rieko olalna, kendo ka wiya ochomo piny." 
Daniel10:10 Bang’e ne awinjo ka ng’ato maka, kendo keta piny gi chongena kod luetena, to denda kirni." 
Daniel10:11 Ne owachona niya, “Daniel in ng’at ma Nyasaye ohero ahinya. A malo mondo ichik iti iwinj gima adwaro wacho, nimar oseora iri.” Kane osewachona kamano, ne aa malo ka pod denda kirni." 
Daniel10:12 Eka ne ochako owachona niya, “Daniel, kik iluor, nikech Nyasaye nowinjo lemoni mana chieng’ mane ikwongo ketoe chunyi, kisandori e nyime, omiyo koro asebiro mondo adwoki." 
Daniel10:13 To malaika ma jarit piny Persia ne okedo koda kuom ndalo piero ariyo gachiel. Eka Mikael ma achiel kuom malaike madongo nobiro mondo okonya, nikech ne adong’ kenda e piny Persia kuno." 
Daniel10:14 Koro asebiro mondo anyisi gima biro timore ni jou e ndalo mabiro, nikech ma bende en fweny manyiso gik mabiro timore e ndalo mabiro.”" 
Daniel10:15 Kane owuoyo koda kamano, to ne akulo wiya, ka dhoga omoko." 
Daniel10:16 Eka gimoro machalo gi dhano nomulo pien dhoga, mi achako wuoyo, ne awacho ni gima chalo dhano mane ochung’ e nyimano niya, “Jaduong’, fweny ma asenenoni ochwowo chunya, omiyo tekra orumo." 
Daniel10:17 Achalo gi misumba mochung’ e nyim ruodhe. Koro ere kaka dalos kodi, to aonge gi teko kata muya modong’ e denda?”" 
Daniel10:18 Eka ne ochako omula kendo, mi awinjo ka ayudo teko." 
Daniel10:19 Nowachona niya, “Nyasaye oheri, omiyo kik chunyi parre kata kik iluor, to bed abeda gi chir.” Kane osewuoyo koda kamano, ne awinjo ka achako yudo teko moko, mi awachone niya, “Jaduong’ wachna gima idwaro nyisa nikech koro iseduogona teko.”" 
Daniel10:20 Eka ne openja niya, “Bende ing’eyo gima omiyo asebiro iri?" 
Daniel10:21 Asebiro mana ni mondo ahulni gima ondiki e kitap weche ma adiera. To koro onego adog mondo aked gi malaika ma jarit piny Persia. Bang’e malaika ma jarit piny Gris biro wuok, to onge ng’at manyalo konya mak mana Mikael ma malaika ma jarit piny Israel." 
Daniel11:1 En ema ochung’ kaka jakonyna kendo jaritna. 
Daniel11:2 “To koro adwaro nyisi gima biro timore adier. “Ruodhi adek moko biro bet e piny Persia, to bang’gi ruoth mar ang’wen nowuogi, ma nobed gi mwandu mang’eny moloyogi. Bang’e ka mwandune osemiyo oguro lochne motegno, to nothuw ogendini duto gi ruodhi Gris." 
Daniel11:3 Eka bang’ mano ruoth moro ma jalweny nowuogi. Enobed ruodh piny maduong’ kendo notim gimoro amora mohero. 
Daniel11:4 To ka lochne osegurore, pinye nopogre tieng’ ang’wen, kendo yawuote gi nyikwaye ok nobed ruodhi bang’e. Jomoko nono ema nokaw lochne gi thwon, to ok ginibed gi teko marom gi mane en go." 
Daniel11:5 Ruodh Misri nobed gi teko, to achiel kuom jotend jolwenje nobed gi teko moloye, kendo nobed ruodh piny maduong’." 
Daniel11:6 Bang’ higni moko achien, ruodh Misri nomi ruodh Siria nyare okendi, mondo gitim kode winjruok. To winjruokgino ok nodag aming’a, kendo nyakono gi jotich mane odhi kode, kaachiel gi nyathine kod chwore nonegi," 
Daniel11:7 Bang’e watne moro nomonj jolweny ruodh Siria, kendo nodonj e dalagi mochiel motegno, mi logi." 
Daniel11:8 Enokaw kido mag nyiseche kaachiel gi gik ma nengogi tek mag fedha gi mag dhahabu, mi oter Misri. Bang’ bedo gi kue kuom higni mogwarore," 
Daniel11:9 ruodh Siria nomonj Misri, to nochune mondo odog e pinye." 
Daniel11:10 “Bang’e yawuote noikre ni lweny, mi chok jolweny mang’eny. Achiel kuomgi nomwom ka ohula, mi monj kendo kwak kama lach nyaka chopi dala wasigu mochiel motegno." 
Daniel11:11 Eka mirima nomak ruodh Misri, mi noked gi ruodh Siria, kendo omak ogandane maduong’ mar lweny." 
Daniel11:12 Bang’e sunga nomake nikech lochneno, kendo nikech jolweny mang’eny mosenego, to lochne ok nodhi nyime." 
Daniel11:13 Ruodh Siria nochak ochok oganda lweny maduong’ moloyo mane en go chon, kendo ka kinde ochopo maber, to noduog gi oganda mar lwenyno, kod gilweny mathoth." 
Daniel11:14 E ndalogo, ji mang’eny nodagi loch ruodh Misri, kendo in Daniel, jou moko mohero lweny nong’any nikech fweny moro ma giseneno, to kata kamano nologi." 
Daniel11:15 Bang’e ruodh Siria nolwor dala mochiel motegno, mi kaw. Jolweny mag Misri ok nodhi nyime gi kedo, kendo kata mana joma rateke moloyoe kuomgi ok nobed gi teko mar kedo." 
Daniel11:16 Kuom mano, jasikgi notimnigi mana gima ohero, maonge ng’ama tame. Enokaw piny Israel ma jaber, mi bed e bwo lochne chuth." 
Daniel11:17 Enobed gi paro mar kawo pinje duto mae bwo loch ruodh Misri. Omiyo enomiye nyare okendi, eka oyud kaka dohinye, to kata kamano ok nonyal." 
Daniel11:18 Bang’ mano nomonj ogendini modak e dho nam, mi olo pinjegi mang’eny. To jatelo moro moa e piny machielo noloye, mi tiek sungane chuth." 
Daniel11:19 Enoring mi odog e mier mochiel motegno e pinye owuon, to noloye kuno, mi mano nobed rumbe chuth." 
Daniel11:20 “Eka ruoth moro nowuog bang’e ma noor ng’ato osolne osuru mondo pinye obed gi mwandu mang’eny. To bang’ kinde matin ruodhno nonegi, to ok e lweny."
