Daniel11:21 Jal ma nobed ruodh Siria bang’ mano nobed ng’at ma timbene richo, ma ok owinjore bed ruoth. Enobi apoya e ndalo kue, mi okaw loch gi rieko mar miriambo." 
Daniel11:22 Ogend lweny duto nopiem kode, to enoywegi oko motiekgi pep, koda ka jadolo maduong’ mar Nyasaye." 
Daniel11:23 Enotim winjruok gi ogendini mamoko kowuondogi. Kamano nogurre motegno, kata obedo ni nobed mana ruodh oganda matin." 
Daniel11:24 Enomonj piny momew ma yande obet gi kue, mi okaw, kotimo timbe mane kwerene ok nyal timo. Enopog ni joge mwandu gi gik moyako e lweny, bende enochan monjo kuonde mochiel motegno mag siro lweny, to mano notim mana kuom kinde matin kende." 
Daniel11:25 “Enowuog gi chir ka en gi oganda maduong’ mondo omonj Ruodh Misri, ma bende enobed koikore kedo kode gi oganda lweny maduong, kendo maratego. To ruodh Misri ok nosir nikech joge moko nondhoge." 
Daniel11:26 Jong’adne rieko mohero moloyo ema notieke. Joge mag lweny mathoth nonegi kendo notiek ogandane mar lweny. 
Daniel11:27 Bang’e ruodhi ariyogo nobed piny mondo ochiem kaachiel, to ginibed ka gin gi paro maricho. Omiyo giniwuondre, kendo ok giniyud gima gidwaro, nimar kinde ma Nyasaye oketo pok ochopo." 
Daniel11:28 Ruodh Siria nochak wuoth ka dok thurgi, gi mwandu mang’eny moseyako, koketo chunye mondo singruok manie kind Nyasaye gi jo-Israel okethre. Enotim gima en ema ohero, eka nodhi adhiya thurgi." 
Daniel11:29 “Achien enochak omonj Misri e kinde ma Nyasaye oketo, to ok nolo pinyno kaka noloye mokwongo." 
Daniel11:30 Joma oa yo podho chieng’ nobi gi mendegi mondo oked kode, mi nobed maluor. Bang’e nodog ka en gi mirima mager mondo otiek joma otimo singruok maler gi Nyasaye, tiende ni jo-Israel, kendo enoluw rieko mag joma oseweyo singruokno." 
Daniel11:31 Ogendini mage moko mag lweny nodwany Hekalu kod kuondene mochiel motegno, mi ginimi ji we timo misengni mitimo pile, kendo ginichung gima kuero makelo kethruok." 
Daniel11:32 Ruoth nong’ad rieko mondo oywago joma oseweyo singruokgi malerno, to kata kamano, joma ong’eyo Nyasachgi nobed motegno kendo nolochi." 
Daniel11:33 Ji mariek nong’ad rieko ni ji mamoko mathoth. To kuom kinde matin jomoko kuomgi notho e lweny kendo nowang’ e mach. Moko bende noywag mwandugi, kendo noter e tuech." 
Daniel11:34 To e kinde ma inegogieno giniyud kony matin, kata obedo ni ji mang’eny kuom joma odoknigi nobed gi paro maricho." 
Daniel11:35 Jomoko kuom joma riek bende nonegi mana ni mondo joma odong’ kuom ogandagi obed joma beyo mopwodh kendo maler, nyaka kinde mar giko ma Nyasaye oseketo chopi." 
Daniel11:36 “Ruodh Siria notim gima en ema ohero, kendo enosungre ni oloyo nyasaye moro amora, bende enopakre ni oduong’ moloyo kata mana Nyasaye maduong’ moloyo nyiseche moko. Enodhi nyime kotimo kamano nyaka chop Nyasaye kume, nikech Nyasaye nyaka tim gima osechano." 
Daniel11:37 Ruodhno ok nodew nyasaye mane kwerene lamo, kod nyasaye mane mon ohero. Chutho ok nodew nyasaye moro amora, nimar enobed koparo ni oduong’ duto." 
Daniel11:38 Kar lamo nyisechego, to enolam mana nyasaye marito kuonde mochiel motegno mag siro lweny. Enochiw dhahabu gi fedha gi kite ma nengogi tek kod chiwo mamoko mabeyo ni nyasaye ma kwerene ne ok lamno." 
Daniel11:39 Enoket ji malamo nyasach jopiny moro nono mondo orit mier mochiel motegno mag siro lweny. Joma oyie lochne noyud duong’ mang’ongo, kendo noketgi e tije madongo, mi omigi lowo kaka gir erokamano." 
Daniel11:40 “E kinde ma loch ruodh Siria chiegni rumo, ruodh Misri biro monje, mi ked kode gi tekone duto, kokonyore gi geche lweny gi joidh farese kod mende mang’eny, mi omwom mana ka aora ma mwomo genge." 
Daniel11:41 Bende enomonj piny Israel ma jaber, mi oneg ji gana gi gana. Piny Edom gi piny Moab kod piny Amon mane odong’, to notony." 
Daniel11:42 Enomonj pinje mang’eny ma kata mana Misri bende ok notony. 
Daniel11:43 Enoyak dhahabu gi fedha mopandi mag Misri, kaachiel gi mwandu mamoko ma nengogi tek, kendo enolo piny Libya gi piny Ethiopia." 
Daniel11:44 Bang’e weche moko moa yo wuokchieng’ gi yo nyandwat nomiye luoro, mi noked gi gero malich, kendo noneg ji mang’eny." 
Daniel11:45 Bende enogur hembene madongo dongo e kind nam gi got maberie moloyo ma ogerie Hekalu. To enotho kuno, ka onge ng’ama konye." 
Daniel12:1 “E kindeno, malaika maduong’ miluongo ni Mikael marito jou, biro thinyore. Enobed kinde mar chandruok marachie moloyo kendo ma pok oneye nyaka ne ogendini chak bet e piny. Ka kindeno ochopo, to ibiro res jou duto ma nyinggi ondiki e kitap Nyasaye." 
Daniel12:2 Ji mang’eny kuom joma osetho biro chier. Moko kuomgi nochier mi yud ngima mochwere, to moko noyud wichkuot kod achaye mosiko." 
Daniel12:3 To joma riek norieny ka ler mar polo, kendo jogo mane opuonjo ji mang’eny mondo otim gik makare norieny ka sulue nyaka chieng’." 
Daniel12:4 “To in Daniel, koro um kitabu, kendo idine gi odok nyaka kinde mar giko chopi. To kindegi ji mang’eny biro ringo koni gi koni mondo onge tiend gik matimore.”" 
Daniel12:5 To an Daniel, naneno ji ariyo moko ka moro ochung’ e bath aora koni, to moro ochung’ komachielo." 
Daniel12:6 Achiel kuom jogo nowacho ni ng’at mane orwako law maber mane ochung’ gi chien yo ka wi aora cha, niya “Odong’ kinde marom nadi mondo honnigi orum?”" 
Daniel12:7 Ng’at mane orwako law maberno noting’o bedene malo kochomo polo, mi osingore e nying Nyasaye mochwere, kowacho niya, “Odong’ kinde moromo higni adek gi nus, kendo ka sand misandogo jo-Nyasaye oserumo, to noyud ka gigi duto osetimore.”" 
Daniel12:8 Ne awinjo gima owacho, to ne ok ang’eyo tiendgi, omiyo napenje niya, “Jaduong’, giko mar gigi nobed nadi?”" 
Daniel12:9 Nodwoka niya, “Daniel, koro dhi adhiya, nikech wechegi odin kendo okan nyaka kinde mar giko chopi." 
Daniel12:10 Ji mang’eny ibiro pwodhi mondo gibed joma beyo kendo maler. Joma richo to wechegi ok nodonjnigi, kendo ginisik asika ka gitimo richo. Joma riek to wechegi nodonjnigi." 
Daniel12:11 “Chakre chieng’ ma ji nowee timo misengni mitimo pile, tiende ni chakre kinde ma ochungie gima kuero makelo kethruok, ndalo alufu achiel gi mia ariyo gi piero ochiko nokadhi." 
Daniel12:12 Joma osiko kuom Nyasaye nyaka ndalo alufu achiel gi mia adek gi piero adek gi abich kadhi gin johawi. 
Daniel12:13 “In Daniel, sik kuom Nyasaye nyaka giko. Eka initho, to achien inichier mi iyud pokni chieng’ giko piny.”" 
Hosea1:1 Kitabuni ondikie weche mane Ruoth Nyasaye onyiso Hosea wuod Beeri e ndalo loch ruodhi Juda ma Uzia gi Jotham gi Ahaz kod Hezekia, kendo e ndalo loch Jeroboam wuod Jehoash ruodh Israel." 
Hosea1:2 Kane Ruoth Nyasaye okwongo miyo Hosea owuoyo ni jo-Israel, ne owachone niya, “Jopinyni oseweya, molamo nyiseche mamoko, mana ka dhako moweyo chwore mondo odwanyre gi chwo mamoko." 
Hosea1:3 Omiyo, dhiyo ikend nyako ma wang’e tar mondo inywolgo nyithindo.” Kamano Hosea nodhi mokendo Gomer nyar Diblaim. Ne omako ich, monywolo ni Hosea wuowi." 
Hosea1:4 Eka Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Hosea niya, “Chak nyathino ni Jezreel, nimar achiegni kumo ruodh Israel kuom remo mane Jehu wuon mare ochwero Jezreel. Abiro tieko loch nyikwa Jehu e Israel," 
Hosea1:5 kendo e kindeno anaketh teko mar jolwenj Israel e holo Jezreel.” 
Hosea1:6 Gomer nochako omako ich, monywolo nyako. Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Hosea niya, “Chake ni Lo-ruhama, tiende ni, ma ok oher, nikech ok nachak aher jo-Israel, kata mana ng’wononigi ok nang’wonnigi," 
Hosea1:7 to anaher jo-Juda. An Ruoth Nyasaye anaresgi, to ok naresgi gi lweny, kata gi gilweny.”" 
Hosea1:8 Kane Gomer oseweyo dhodho Lo-ruhama, nochako omako ich, monywolo wuowi machielo." 
Hosea1:9 Eka Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho niya, “Chake ni Lo-ami, tiende ni joma ok joga, bende ok ayie bedo Nyasachu,”" 
Hosea1:10 “To kata kamano jo-Israel nobed mang’eny ma ok nyal kwan kata pim, mana ka kuoyo mae dhonam. Sani koro awachonigi ni ok gin joga, kendo chieng’ moro nawachnigi niya, ‘Un nyithind Nyasaye mangima’," 
Hosea1:11 Bang’e jo-Israel gi jo-Juda nochak oriwre kanyakla achiel, mi gichak gidhi nyime maber. Kamano chieng’ Jezreel nobed chieng maduong’ adier!”" 
Hosea2:1 Kuom mano, ubiro luongo joweteu ni Ami, tiende ni, joga, kendo ubiro luongo nyimineu ni Ruhama, tiendi ni, joma oher." 
Hosea2:2 “Nyithinda, wuoru gi meru! Donge en e chiega, to an e chwore? Wuouru kode mondo owe timbene mag terruok." 
Hosea2:3 Ka ok kamano to abiro gonye, mi odong duk kaka nonywole! Abiro miyo ochal gi piny motwo ma pi ongee, kendo riyo biro nege." 
Hosea2:4 Kata mana nyithinde bende ok naher, dhako ma jachode" 
Hosea2:5 ema nonywologi e terruok. Dhako mane onywologino onge gi wichkuot, nimar owacho niya, ‘Adwaro chodena, nikech gin ema ne gimiya chiemo gi pi, gi mo kod divai, kod yie rombe, gi pamba michweyo nanga.’" 
Hosea2:6 “Kuom mano yo mokadhoe abiro dino gi kudho, kendo abiro gero ohinga ogeng’ yo moluwo, mondo kik ochak oluw yorene machon." 
Hosea2:7 Ka olawo chodene, to ok nojukgi, kendo ka omanyogi, to ok noyudgi. Bang’e nowach niya, ‘Abiro dok ni chwora kendo, nikech ne aneno maber ka wan kode moloyo kaka obet sani.’" 
Hosea2:8 To pod ok ong’eyo ni an ema ne amiye cham gi divai kod mo, bende ok ongeyo ni an ema ne amiye fedha gi dhahabu mogundho, mane otiyogo kuom lamo Baal." 
Hosea2:9 Omiyo e ndalo keyo, to anakaw cham gi divai mane amiye, kaachiel gi yie rombe gi pamba mane amiye mondo ochwego nanga orwaki." 
Hosea2:10 Bang’e anagonye duk mana ka chodene neno, kendo onge ng’ama norese e lweta." 
Hosea2:11 Anatiek mor duto moneno, kod chokruokne duto mag lemo, kaka sewni motimo higa ka higa, gi sewni motimo due ka due, kod nyasi motimo juma ka juma." 
Hosea2:12 Anaketh yiende mag mzabibu gi ng’opene, ma owacho ni gin chudo mane chodene omiye. Anami yiende mag mzabibu kod yiende mamoko lokre bungu, kendo le ma e thim nokethgi." 
Hosea2:13 Anakume kuom kinde mane oweyae, mowang’o ubani ni Baal, kendo orwako gik mabeyo mondo olombgo chodene. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano." 
Hosea2:14 “To koro winjuru! Abiro kawe, mi atere e thim, kendo abiro wuoyo kode maber kuno, mi aduog chunye." 
Hosea2:15 Anachak adwokne puothene mag mzabibu, kendo nalok Holo Thagruok odok dhoranga geno. Ka aluonge, to nodwoka mana kaka ne odwoka kapod oyom, e kinde mane owuok oa e piny Misri." 
Hosea2:16 Adier, chieng’no noluonga ni chwore, to ok nochak oluonga ni Baal mare." 
Hosea2:17 Ok nachak awe omul nying Baal kendo. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano. 
Hosea2:18 “Bang’ mano anatim singruok gi le mae thim gi winy mae kor polo kod gik mamol e lowo ni kik gihiny joga. Eka natur atung’ gi ligangla kod gimoro amora mar lweny, mi aywegi oko e piny mondo joga odag gi kue." 
Hosea2:19 In Israel, abiro kendi mondo ibed chiega, mi anatimni gima berr kendo makare. Ananyisi hera gi ng’wono mochwere, kendo inibed mara nyaka chieng’." 
Hosea2:20 Anarit singruokna, kendo anatimu joga, mi unung’e ni an e Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Hosea2:21 E kindeno anadwok kwayo ma joga Jezreel kwayogo. Anami koth chue e piny," 
Hosea2:22 mi piny nonyag cham gi mzabibu kod zeituni. 
Hosea2:23 Anapidh joga e pinyni, mi anami gidhi nyime maber. Anaher joma ne iluongo ni, ‘joma ok oher,’ kendo anawach ni joma iluongo ni, ‘joma ok joga,’ ni un joga, mi ginidwoka niya, ‘In Nyasachwa.’ ”" 
Hosea3:1 Ruoth nyasaye nowachona niya, “Dhiyo monsdo ikaw dhako man gi chotne kendo materore. Here mana kaka pod ahero jo-Israel, kata obedo ni giweya ka gilamo nyiseche mamoko, kendo gihero chiwo misengni mag mzabibu motwo ni kido manono.”" 
Hosea3:2 Kuom mano, ne adhi, mi achulo shekel apar gabich mag fedha kod gunde ariyo mag cham, mi akawo dhakono kaka ne Ruoth Nyasaye onyisa." 
Hosea3:3 Eka ne awachone ni obiro dak koda kuom ndalo mathoth, kendo ni ok nochak obed jachode. To bende ng’ato ok nochak onind kode, kata mana an." 
Hosea3:4 Mano nyiso ni jo-Israel biro bet maonge ruodhi kata jotelo kendo maonge misengni kata sirni milamo, bende maonge kido mag nyiseche, kata gik mikorogo wach." 
Hosea3:5 To achien jo-Israel noduog ir ruoth Nyasachgi, kendo ir Daudi ruodhgi, kendo ka ndalogo ochopo, to giniluor Ruoth Nyasachgi, mi giyud michne mabeyo." 
Hosea4:1 Ruoth Nyasaye ni kod wach ni ji modak e pinyni. Omiyo un jo-Israel chikuru itu mondo uwinj ane gima owacho. Owacho kama: “Dimbruok kod hera onge e pinyni, kendo ji ok oyie kata mana kuom Nyasaye." 
Hosea4:2 Ji ketho singruok ma gisetimo, bende giriambo, gineko, gikuelo, kendo giterore. Timbegi maricho medore ameda, kendo gichuero remo kinde duto." 
Hosea4:3 Omiyo pinyni biro two kendo gik moko duto modakie biro tho. Adier, le duto gi winy koda ka rech biro tho.”" 
Hosea4:4 Ruoth Nyasaye wacho niya, “Un jodolo ema an kodu gi wach, omiyo kik ng’ato par ni ji ema akwero kendo asiemo." 
Hosea4:5 Utimo gik manono odiechieng’ gotieno, kendo jonabi bende timo mana kamano. Kuom mano abiro tieko Israel meru." 
Hosea4:6 Un joga, osetieku, nikech ok uyie lochna. Jodolo mau osedagi yie kuoma, kendo gisetamore puonjna. Omiyo adagi ni un gi yawuotu ok ubed jodolona.”" 
Hosea4:7 “Kaka jodolo medore e kaka gimedo timo richo e nyima. Abiro loko nying maber ma gin go obed nyiero. 
Hosea4:8 Gipidhore kuom richo mag joga, omiyo gidwaro ni mondo joga omed ameda timo richo." 
Hosea4:9 Jodolo kod ji nokum mana machalre! Abiro kumogi, ka achulogi kuom richo ma gitimo." 
Hosea4:10 Ka gichiemo, to ok giniyieng’. Gilamo nyasach nyodo, to kata kamano ok ginywol nyithindo, nikech giseweya, kendo gilamo nyiseche mamoko." 
Hosea4:11 “Kong’o osemayo joga rieko! 
Hosea4:12 Gipenjo bao mondo onyisgi gima biro timore, kendo ludhe bende nyisogi wach ma gidwaro ng’eyo! Giseweya, mi gidhi ir nyiseche mamoko, mana ka dhako moweyo chwore to dwanyore gi chwo mamoko." 
Hosea4:13 Gitimo misengni ewi gode, kendo giwang’o ubani kuonde moting’ore e bwo yien maboyo motimo otiep nikech nitie tipo mang’ich kuondego. Mano emomiyo nyiu tiyo tich chode, to mond yawuotu tiyo tich terruok." 
Hosea4:14 To ok nakumgi kuom timbegigo nimar un uwegi ema undhogoru gi mon ma jochode mag hekalu, kendo utimo ni Baal misengni kaachiel kodgi. To ‘Oganda mofuwo yudo masira’, mana kaka ngero wacho." 
Hosea4:15 “Kata obedo ni un jo-Israel useweya, to da obedo maber ka jo-Juda ok otimo gima chal kamano. Kik udhi ulem Gilgal kata Bethel, kendo kik ukuong’ru kuondego e nying Ruoth Nyasaye mangima." 
Hosea4:16 Jo-Israel tokgi tek mana ka tok kanyna. Kuom mano, ere kaka dapidhgi maber ka rombe manie lek momew?" 
Hosea4:17 Jo-Israel ni e bwo loch mar nyiseche manono," 
Hosea4:18 kendo gin e kanyakla mar jomer. Gidhi nyime gi timbegi mag chode, kendo gihero wichkuot moloyo nying maber." 
Hosea4:19 Gin gi chuny mabiro ywerogi mabor mana ka kalausi kendo nyiseche ma gitimonigi misengni ok nokonygi. 
Hosea5:1 “Un jodolo, winjuru wachni! Chikuru itu, un jo-Israel. Winjuru un joka ruoth, nikech un ema onego ung’ad ni ji bura, to koro un ema ibiro ng’adnu bura. Usemiyo obadho omako jo-Mizpa, kendo uchalo gogo mamako ji ewi got Tabor." 
Hosea5:2 Usepiem koda muweya mi udonjo e richo matut, omiyo abiro kumou uduto." 
Hosea5:3 Ang’eyo kaka jo-Israel chalo, kendo ok ginyal pondona. Giseweya kaka dhako weyo chwore, to dwanyore gi chwo mamoko.”" 
Hosea5:4 Richo ma gisetimo omonogi dok ir Nyasachgi. Gidwaro mana lamo nyiseche manono, omiyo ok giyie loch Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Hosea5:5 Sunga ma jo-Israel nigo nyiso ni gin joricho. Richogigo miyo gichwanyore kendo gipodho, mi jo-Juda bende podho kodgi." 
Hosea5:6 Gidhi gi jambgi mondo gitimgo misengni ni Ruoth Nyasaye, to ok ginyal yude, nikech oseweyogi." 
Hosea5:7 Gisendhogo Ruoth Nyasaye, mi giweyo, kendo nyithindgi ok gin joge. Omiyo puothegi koro ibiro kethi." 
Hosea5:8 Gouru tung’ mar lweny e dala Gibea. Rama bende timieuru kamano. Giuru sigich lweny e dala mar Bethel, kuwacho niya, “Wan bang’u, jo-Benjamin!”" 
Hosea5:9 Ruoth Nyasaye wacho niya, “Aseng’ado bura mak lokre ni, chieng’ mokumie jo-Israel, to ginirum pep." 
Hosea5:10 Akecho jotend Juda nikech gisekwalo lop jowetegi, omiyo abiro olo mirimba mager kuomgi mana ka aora mopong’ ma mwomo genge." 
Hosea5:11 Jo-Israel ni e thagruok. Gisewito piny mane margi nikech ne giramo ni nyaka giring gidhi ir ji mamoko mondo okonygi, to kara jogo onge gima dikonygigo." 
Hosea5:12 Kuom mano an awuon abiro kelo masira kuom jo-Israel, atiek jo-Juda pep." 
Hosea5:13 “Mano omiyo, kane jo-Israel oneno ni tuo osemakogi, kendo kane jo-Juda bende oneno adhondegi giwegi, jo-Israel noringo odhi Asuria mondo ruoth maduong mar pinyno okonygi. To ruodhno ne ok nyal changogi kata thiedho adhondegigo." 
Hosea5:14 An awuon abiro monjo jo-Israel gi jo-Juda mana ka sibuor mager! Abiro kidhogi matindotindo, kendo naywagi oko, ma onge ng’at ma nokonygi." 
Hosea5:15 “Abiro dhi mi adog kar dakna nyaka chop kinde ma giyie ni giseketho, mi giduog ira ka gidwara gi chunygi duto, nikech thagruok malit ma giseyudo.”" 
Hosea6:1 Jo-Israel wacho niya, “Wadoguru ir Ruoth Nyasaye. Osekidhowa, to kata kamano obiro changowa. Osehinyowa, to donge obiro keto yath e adhondewa?" 
Hosea6:2 Bang’ ndalo ariyo kata adek obiro duogo chunywa kendo miyo wachak wadhi maber, mi wadag e nyime." 
Hosea6:3 Weuru wabolre kendo watem bedo joma ong’eyo Ruoth Nyasaye, nimar obiro biro irwa adier, mana ka piny ma jaru pile. Bende obiro biro mondo oguedhwa, mana na koth ma miyo piny bedo mang’ich.”" 
Hosea6:4 To Ruoth Nyasaye wacho niya, “Un jo-Israel gi jo-Juda, ang’o ma anyalo timonu? Hera ma uherago lal piyo mana ka ong’weng’o mar okinyi, kata ka tho maduono ka nyango tegno." 
Hosea6:5 Kuom mano, aseoro jonabi maga iru mondo osiemu ni ibiro kumou kendo tiekou. Gima adwaro ni mondo un joga utim, en gima ratiro kendo maler," 
Hosea6:6 nimar gima adwaro moloyo en hera mosiko, to ok misengni. Ber ka joga ong’eya, moloyo ka gitimona misengni miwang’o." 
Hosea6:7 “To piyopiyo nono mane jogago odonjogo e piny mane asingoranigi, ne giketho singruok mane atimo kodgi, mi giweya." 
Hosea6:8 Gilead en dala ma jomahundu opong’o, kendo ma remb joma onegi chuerie." 
Hosea6:9 Jodolo chalo mony mag jomecho marito ji kobuto e bungu. Kata mana e wang’ yo madhi Shekem ginegoe ji. Gitimo mahundu mana gi wang’ matek. 
Hosea6:10 Aseneno ka gitimo gima mono e Israel. Joga osedwanyore kendgi kuom lamo nyiseche manono. 
Hosea6:11 To un jo-Juda aseketo kinde ma abiro kumoue kuom gik ma utimo.” 
Hosea7:1 “Pile ka adwaro chango jo-Israel mondo gichak gidhi nyime maber, to richogi gi timbegi makuero ema aneno. Giwuondo ji kendo gituro udi mondo gikuelie, bende gimayo ji gik moko kata mana e wang’ yore." 
Hosea7:2 Ok gipar ni wiya ok nyal wil gi richo duto ma gitimo. Richogi olworogi, kendo ok nyal tama neno.”" 
Hosea7:3 Ruoth Nyasaye wacho niya, “Ji wuondo ruoth gi jodonge kuom yoregi maricho." 
Hosea7:4 Giduto gin jowuond kendo jomriambo. Gichalo kendo ma mach nyenyni, ma jatedo ok chwalie mach nyaka mogo mosedwalo kuodi." 
Hosea7:5 Chieng’ mane ruoth timo sawo, ne gimiyo omadho divai gi jodonge, mi gimer kendo gilokore josunga ma jaro ji ajara." 
Hosea7:6 Adier, giowore gi timbegi mana ka kendo ma mach nyenynie. Otieno duto, mirimbgi okuot, okinyi omuoch ka mach maliel." 
Hosea7:7 Ne ginego jotendgi gi mirimbgi mager, kendo ruodhigi osepodho achiel achiel. To onge ng’ama kwaya mondo akony.”" 
Hosea7:8 Ruoth Nyasaye wacho niya, “Jo-Israel chalo gi makati motedi manumu, nikech gigeno kuom ogendini molworogi." 
Hosea7:9 Winjruok ma gin-go gi jopinje mamokogo osemayogi teko, to ok ging’eyo. Bende ok ging’eyo ni wigi osetimo lwar." 
Hosea7:10 Sunga ma jo-Israel nigo nyiso ni gin joricho, to kata kamano, pod gitamore duogo ira, an Ruoth Nyasachgi." 
Hosea7:11 Jo-Israel chalo gi akuru mofuwo. Giluongo jo-Misri mondo okonygi, to kendo giringo gidhi e piny Asuria." 
Hosea7:12 Abiro makogi ka gidhi, mana kaka jodwar mako winy gi wino, kendo abiro kumogi kuom richo ma gisetimo." 
Hosea7:13 “Gidiwo, nimar giseweya mi gipiem koda, omiyo ibiro tiekgi. Ne adwaro resogi, to giwacho miriambo kuoma." 
Hosea7:14 Ok giselama gi adiera, to girudhore piny ka giywak, kendo ka gilama mondo amigi cham gi divai, to ging’olo dendgi mana ka joma lamo nyiseche manono. To gisetamore mako chikna." 
Hosea7:15 Kata obedo ni apidhogi, mi amiyo gibedo motegno, to gipiem apiema koda!" 
Hosea7:16 Gisiko ka giweya, kendo gidok ni nyiseche maonge teko. Ok nyal gen-gi, nikech gichalo gi atung’ mobam. Ibiro nego jotendgi e lweny nikech gisungore, mi jo-Misri nonyiergi.”" 
Hosea8:1 Ruoth Nyasaye wacho niya, “Go tung’, nikech wasigu yako Hekalu mara, mana ka otenga mayudho nyagweno! Joga oseketho singruok mane atimo kodgi, kendo gisedagi winjo puonjna." 
Hosea8:2 Kata obedo ni giluonga ni Nyasachgi kendo giwacho ni ging’eya kamano," 
Hosea8:3 to gisedagi gima ber, mano omiyo wasikgi biro lawogi." 
Hosea8:4 Joga yiero ruodhi maggi, to gitimo kamano ma ok gipenja. Bende giyiero jotelo ka ok ayie. Gikawo fedha gi dhahabu ma gin-go, kendo giloso nyiseche manono ma biro kelonigi mana masira." 
Hosea8:5 Asedagi nyaroya mar dhahabu ma jo-Samaria lamo, kendo mirimba ng’ang’ni kuomgi. Koro pod gidwaro ni mondo akumgi nyaka karang’o?" 
Hosea8:6 Jatich moro e Israel ema ne oloso kido manono, to kidono ok en Nyasaye! Kido mar nyaroya ma jo-Samaria lamono ibiro baro matindo tindo." 
Hosea8:7 “Jo-Israel chwoyo yamo, to gikayo mana kalausi. Gin gi cham ma ok wuodhi, omiyo gionge gi mogo. To kapo ni onyago cham, to jopinje mamoko dichame, mi tieke." 
Hosea8:8 Jo-Israel duto ibiro mwonyo, mi tieki pep. To kata mana sani ogendini mamoko okawogi ka joma nono." 
Hosea8:9 Gisedhi Asuria mondo giyudie konyruok, ka gichalo kanj thim moringo oa e kweth, kendo gitimo mana gima gin ema gidwaro. Adier, jo-Israel oseng’iewore kuom ogendini mamoko mondo okonygi." 
Hosea8:10 To koro abiro chokogi mondo akumgi! Piyopiyo nono gibiro neno malit ka ruodh Asuria sandogi. 
Hosea8:11 “Kaka jo-Israel medo kende-mag-misango mang’eny mondo ogolgo richo e kaka gimedo bedo gi kuonde mang’eny ma gitimoe richo. 
Hosea8:12 Andiko chike gana gi gana mondo ji opuonjre, to gidagi ni mago gik mayore yore ma ok ging’eyo." 
Hosea8:13 Gihero timo misengni, kendo gihero chamo ring misengnigo. To an Ruoth Nyasaye ok amor kodgi, kendo abiro paro richogi mi akumgi, ka adwokogi e piny Misri." 
Hosea8:14 Jo-Israel osegero ut ruodhi, to wigi owil gi jachuechgi. Jo-Juda osegero mier mochiel motegno, to abiro oro mach mondo owang’ miego kaachiel gi ut ruodhigo.”" 
Hosea9:1 Un jo-Israel, weuru timo sewni ka ogendini mamoko. Useweyo Nyasachu mi udok ni Baal kuonde dino duto mondo uyudie cham, mana ka dhako moweyo chwore to dwanyore gi chwo mamoko mondo oyudie pesa" 
Hosea9:2 To ok uyud cham kod mor zeituni. Divai bende notamore. 
Hosea9:3 Jo-Israel ok nodong’ e piny Ruoth Nyasaye, to ginidog Misri, kata ginidhi Asuria kuma ginichamie chiemo mamiyo gibedo mogak." 
Hosea9:4 E pinjego ok ginyal oloe ni Ruoth Nyasaye misengni mag divai kata timone misengni mamoko. Chiemono biro miyo joma chame bed mogak mana ka joma ochamo chiemb liel, nikech ok ginyal kele e Hekalu, to gichame mana ni mondo gineggo kech." 
Hosea9:5 To ginitim ang’o ka ndalo moket ni sewni mag Ruoth Nyasaye ochopo? 
Hosea9:6 Ka masira obiro, mi ji oringo, jo-Misri norwakgi, to noyikgi mana Memfis! Mwandugi kod miechgi ma giseweyo to yugi kod kudho ema nopong’." 
Hosea9:7 Kinde mar kum osechopo ma ng’ato ka ng’ato yudoe gima oromo gi timbene, kendo jo-Israel biro winjo! Uwacho niya, “Jonabi ofuwo! En janeko!” Un uchaya ahinya nikech richou lich." 
Hosea9:8 Nyasaye oseora ka jonabi mondo asiem jo-Israel ma joge. Kamoro amora ma adhiye to uchikona obadho mana ka winyo. Kata mana e Hekalu mar Nyasaye bende wasika nitie. 
Hosea9:9 Usedonjo matut e richo mana kaka notimore Gibea. Nyasaye nopar richou, mi nokumu." 
Hosea9:10 Ruoth Nyasaye wacho niya, “Kane akuongo yudo Israel, to yudogino ne chal mana gi yudo mzabibu ma e thim. Ee, kane akwongo neno kwereu, nenogino ne chal mana gi neno ng’owo mochiek atamalo. To kane gibiro Baal-peor, ne gichako lamo kido manono makuodo wich, omiyo ne amon kodgi mana kaka ne amon gi kido manono mane giherono." 
Hosea9:11 Duong’ mar Israel biro huyo ka winyo, mi lal nono, kendo ok ginichak ginywol nyithindo, kata bedo mayach mondgi ok nochak obedi. Onge nyathi ma nomak ichne." 
Hosea9:12 To kata kapo ni ginywolo nyithindo, to anami nyithindgigo tho duto mak aweyo kata achiel ka ngima. Ka ajwang’o jogi, to giniyud masira malich." 
Hosea9:13 Aneno ni jo-Israel nowe nyithindgi mi maki. Ibiro chunogi mondo gigolgi oko, oneggi." 
Hosea9:14 A Ruoth Nyasaye, ang’o ma dwakwayi mondo imi jogi? Migi iye ma ok onywolo nyithindo, kendo thuno ma ok gol chak.”" 
Hosea9:15 Ruoth Nyasaye wacho niya, “Richogi duto nochakore Gilgal, kendo kuno ema nachako monie kodgi. Kuom mano abiro riembogi e pinya, nikech richo ma gisetimo. Anawe herogi nimar jotendgi duto osetamore luora." 
Hosea9:16 Jo-Israel chalo gi yath ma tiendene osetwo kendo ok nyag olemo. Ok gininywol nyithindo, to kata kapo ni ginywolo, to ananeg nyithindgi ma gihero ahinyago.”" 
Hosea9:17 Ruoth Nyasacha biro jwang’o joge nikech ok gisewinje. Gibiro bedo joma bayo abaya e kind ogendini. 
Hosea10:1 Jo-Israel ne chalo gi yadh mzabibu monyak maber. Kaka ne gimedo dhi nyime maber, e kaka ne gimedo gero kende mag misango, kendo kaka pinygi ne nyak maber, e kaka ne giloso sirni milamo mabeyo." 
Hosea10:2 Chunygi wuondogi, omiyo koro nyaka kumgi kuom richogi. Nyasaye biro muko kendegi mag misango, kendo ketho sirni maggi ma gilamo." 
Hosea10:3 Bang’e gibiro wacho niya, “Waonge gi ruoth nikech ne ok waluoro Ruoth Nyasaye. To kata kamano ere gima ruoth ditimnwa?”" 
Hosea10:4 Githoro weche manono ka gikuong’ore gi miriambo kendo giloso winjruok ma ok nyal konyo. Adiera oselokore miriambo, kendo landore e piny duto kaka kayongo ma ketho lowo." 
Hosea10:5 Kihondko nomak joma odak Samaria, kendo giniywag nyaroya molos gi dhahabu man Bethel. Gin kaachiel gi jodolo matiyo ni nyasaye manonono noywag koneno ka itero girgi ma gigeno kuome Asuria" 
Hosea10:6 mondo ochiw ni ruodh Asuria ka osuru. Wi jo-Israel nokuodi nikech richogi giwegi. 
Hosea10:7 Samaria ibiro kethi, kendo ruodhe biro lal nono mana ka buoyo manie pi." 
Hosea10:8 Kuonde moting’ore ma jo-Israel timoe richo ka gilamo nyisechegi manono ibiro ketho. Kuthe gi buya ema biro twi ewi kendegi mag misango. Ji nowach ni gode niya, “Umwauru!” Kendo giniwach ni pidhe ni, “Ruombreuru kuomwa!”" 
Hosea10:9 Ruoth Nyasaye wacho niya, “Jo-Israel pok oweyo timo richo e nyima chakre ndalo mane gitimoe richo Gibea. Kuom mano, lweny biro jukogi Gibea!" 
Hosea10:10 An awuon abiro monjo jorichogi mi akum. Ogendini bende biro riwore kanyakla mondo omonjgi, kendo giyud kum kuom richogi mang’eny." 
Hosea10:11 “Jo-Israel ne chalo gi nyaroya mobo mamuol, kendo mohero tich ywayo lodi madiemo cham. To koro asetweyo jok e ng’ute ma opugno mondo opur. Ee, namiyo jo-Juda gi jo-Israel opuro." 
Hosea10:12 Bang’e ne awachonigi niya, ‘Chwouru timbe makare, eka unuka gueth mawuok kuomgi. Paruru okang’, nikech en kinde ma onego uduogie ira, an Ruoth Nyasachu, mi nabi kendo aol gueth kuomu.’" 
Hosea10:13 To kar timo kamano, ne uchuoyo mana timbe maricho, mi richo ema ukayo, kendo usechamo olemo ma miriambou onyago. “To nikech ne ugeno yoreu uwegi, kendo ne ugeno kuom jolwenju marateke mathoth," 
Hosea10:14 lweny biro buko jou, mi miechu mochiel motegno nokethi. Enochal gi kinde mane ruoth Shalman okethoe dala mar Betharbel gi lweny, monego kata mana mine gi nyithindgi." 
Hosea10:15 Mano e gima notimrenu, un jo Bethel, nikech richo madongo ma usetimo. E sa ma lweny ochakoree, ruodh Israel biro tho.”" 
Hosea11:1 “Kane Israel pod tin, ne ahere. Naluongo wuoda mondo oa Misri." 
Hosea11:2 To kaka ne amedo luonge, e kaka ne omedo dhi mabor koda. Joga ne timo misengni ni Baal, kendo ne giwang’o ubani ni kido manono." 
Hosea11:3 To eka an ema ne apuonjogi wuoth, kendo ne ariwogi e bada ka nyathi, to ne ok giyie ni an ema ne achangogi." 
Hosea11:4 Ne akelogi ira gi hera mogundho. Ne akwanyogi piny mi atenogi e lemba, kendo ne akulora, mi amiyogi chiemo." 
Hosea11:5 To gisedagi duogo ira, omiyo nyaka gidog Misri, kendo gibiro bedo e bwo loch jo-Asuria." 
Hosea11:6 Lweny biro yweyo miechgi mi tur lodi mag dhorangeyegi. Obiro tieko joga, nikech ne giluwo riekogi giwegi." 
Hosea11:7 Giseweya, omiyo ok ginyal tony, kendo gibiro ywak nikech jok motuenigi, to onge ng’ama nogonynigigo." 
Hosea11:8 “To ere kaka daweu, un jo-Israel? Koso ere kaka dajwang’u? Bende datieku adier, kaka ne atieko jo-Adma? Koso anyalo timonu kaka ne atimo ni jo-Zeboim? Ooyo, ok anyal timonu kamano, nikech aherou ahinya." 
Hosea11:9 Ok nakumu gi mirimba mager, bende ok nachak aketh Israel, nimar an Nyasaye, to ok dhano. An Ng’ama Ler, an kodu, kendo ok nabi iru gi mirima." 
Hosea11:10 Abiro ruto ni wasik jo-Israel ka sibuor, mi joga biro biro ira. Gibiro ringo ira ka gia yo podho chieng’." 
Hosea11:11 Gibiro wuok Misri ka gihuyo mana ka winy, kendo gibiro wuok Asuria matek mana ka akuche, mi anachak adwokgi e miechgi. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano.”" 
Hosea11:12 Ruoth Nyasaye wacho niya, “Jo-Israel osemera gi miriambo kod wuond, kendo jo-Juda bende pod osiko odagi wachna, an Ng’ama kare kendo maler." 
Hosea12:1 Gik moko ma jo-Israel timo, chakre okinyi nyaka otieno, gin gik manono kendo mahinyo ji. Miriambo kod timbe mag mahundu medore ameda kuomgi. Gitimo winjruok gi jo-Asuria, kendo gichiwo mor zeituni ni jo-Misri mondo okonygi." 
Hosea12:2 Ruoth Nyasaye dwaro yalo jo-Juda, bende obiro kumo jo-Israel maromre gi timbegi maricho." 
Hosea12:3 Jakobo kwargi nowuondo owadgi ka pod gin ei min-gi, kendo kane osedongo, ne oi gi Nyasaye." 
Hosea12:4 Ee, noi gi malaika, mi oloyo. Noywak kodwaro ni mondo oguedhe. Nyasaye noromo gi Jakobo Bethel, mi owuoyo kode." 
Hosea12:5 Mano ne Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto, kendo Ruoth Nyasaye e nying mibiro parego." 
Hosea12:6 Kuom mano, un nyikwa Jakobo, genuru kuom Ruoth Nyasachu, kendo udog ire. Beduru joadiera kendo joma timo gik makare, kendo keturu chunyu pile kuom Ruoth Nyasachu." 
Hosea12:7 Ruoth Nyasaye wacho niya, “Jo-Israel bende jomganga mana ka jo-Kanaan. Gin gi rapim ma ok ni kare, kendo gihero wuondo jong’iewo." 
Hosea12:8 To eka giwacho niya, ‘Wamew, nimar waseyudo mwandu, kendo onge ng’ama nyalo wacho ni waseyudogi e yor miganga.’" 
Hosea12:9 To an Ruoth Nyasachu mane ogolou Misri, abiro miyo uchak udag e hembe mana kaka ne udak ka ne aromo kodu e thim." 
Hosea12:10 Ne awuoyo gi jonabi, mi amiyogi fweny mang’eny, to koro abiro kelo masira gi lwet jonabi!" 
Hosea12:11 Jo-Israel lamo kido manono Gilead, to joma lamo gik ma kamago biro tho. Gitimo misengni gi ruedhi Gilgal, emomiyo kende-mag-misango biro lokore, mi dok tuche mag kite manie puothe.”" 
Hosea12:12 Jakobo kwarwa ne oringo modhi e piny Aram, kuma ne okwayoe jamb ng’at moro mondo oyud dhako." 
Hosea12:13 Ruoth Nyasaye ne ooro janabi mondo ogol jo-Israel e tuech. Adier, nooro janabi mondo oritgi." 
Hosea12:14 Jo-Israel osemiyo Ruoth Nyasaye mirima mager. Giwinjore gi tho kuom timbegi maricho, kendo Nyasaye ok nowenigi richogi, to obiro kumogi kuom wichkuot ma gisemiye." 
Hosea13:1 Chon kane jo-Efraim wuoyo, to ji mamoko tetni. Dhoodgi ne duong’ moloyo dhout Israel mamoko. To ji noketho kuom lamo Baal, kendo gibiro tho nikech wachno." 
Hosea13:2 To eka pod gimedo timo atima richo, kendo giloso kido mag fedha mondo gilam. Gikawo fedha ma gin-go, kendo gilosogo kido manono, ma dhano ema oparo, moloso gi lwete owuon. To bang’e giwacho niya, “Timnigiuru misengni.” To ere kaka ji nyalo nyodho kido manonogo, mana kido molos e kit rwath?" 
Hosea13:3 Kuom mano ji biro leny nono, mana ka ong’ueng’o, kata ka tho maduono ka nyango tegno. Ginichal mana gi mihudhi ma yamo keyo kar dino, kendo ka iro mawuok e kendo, mi lal nono." 
Hosea13:4 Ruoth Nyasaye wacho niya, “An e Ruoth Nyasachu mane ogolou Misri. E ndalogo ne ok ung’eyo Nyasaye moro mak mana an, kendo an kende ne e Jawaru." 
Hosea13:5 Ne aritou e thim, piny motwo motimo ongoro." 
Hosea13:6 To kane udonjo e piny maber, ne uyudo gik moromou muyieng’, kendo ne udoko josunga, mi wiu owil koda." 
Hosea13:7 Omiyo koro abiro monjou ka sibuor kendo abiro buto e bath yo mondo akiu mana ka kwach. 
Hosea13:8 Abiro monjou mana ka ondiek ma osema nyithinde, kendo abiro yiechou tiarara. Ee, abiro kidhou ka diemo wang’, mana ka sibuor, mi ang’inyu matindo tindo ka ondiek." 
Hosea13:9 “Un jo-Israel abiro tiekou, to koro ere ng’ama dikonyu?" 
Hosea13:10 Ne ukwaya mondo aketnu ruoth gi jotelo, to ere kaka digires pinyni?" 
Hosea13:11 Ne aketonu ruodhi ka an gi mirima, kendo asegologi ka akecho ahinya." 
Hosea13:12 “Richo kod timbe mamono mag jo-Israel ondik e kitabu, kendo okan maber." 
Hosea13:13 Jo-Israel nigi thuolo mar chako ngima manyien, to gimemore ka nyathi ma idwaro nywolo, to ok ong’eyo kaka onego wuogi!" 
Hosea13:14 Uparo ni abiro reso jogi kuom tho, kata konyogi ni kik gidhi e piny joma otho? Ooyo! In tho, bi gi masicheni duto, kendo in piny joma otho, bi gi kethruokni duto, nimar ok abi kecho jogi." 
Hosea13:15 Kata obedo ni jo-Israel dhi nyime maber ka buya malandore, to abiro kelonigi jaketh ma notiek gigi mabeyo duto mana kaka yamb oro moa e piny motimo ongoro duono sokni duto." 
Hosea13:16 Jo-Israel nyaka yud kum kuom kethogi, nimar gisepiem gi Nyasachgi. Gibiro tho e lweny kendo nyithindgi nochwad piny, mi ried iye mondgi mayach.”" 
Hosea14:1 Duoguru ir Ruoth Nyasachu un jo-Israel. Richou osemiyo uchwanyoru, mi upodho." 
Hosea14:2 Duoguru ir Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo kar kelone chiwo, to lameuru kama: “Wenwa richowa duto, kendo yie lemowa, mi wanapaki kaka wasesingore." 
Hosea14:3 Jo-Asuria ok nyal resowa, bende ok wanadwar geche mag lweny mondo waidhi. Ok wanachak wawach ni gik mwaseloso gi lwetwa niya, ‘Un e nyisechewa.’ A Ruoth Nyasaye, in ema itimo ng’wono ni joma onge ng’ama konyogi.”" 
Hosea14:4 Ruoth Nyasaye wacho niya, “Abiro duogo joga ira, kendo anahergi gi chunya duto, nikech koro ok akecho kodgi." 
Hosea14:5 Abiro chalo ni jo-Israel kaka koth e piny motwo. Gibiro moyo ka maua, kendo tiendegi biro kar ka yiend Lebanon." 
Hosea14:6 Gibiro loth kendo gibiro bedo mabeyo ka yiend zeituni. Ginidum mamit mana ka yiend sida mag Lebanon. 
Hosea14:7 Gibiro chako gidak e tipona, mi ginya ka cham, kendo ginyag mana ka yiend mzabibu. Gibiro bedo gi huma mana ka divai mar Lebanon." 
Hosea14:8 Jo-Israel ok nochak olam nyiseche manono kata matin, omiyo anawinj lemogi, kendo naritgi. Anageng’gi mana ka yath ma tipone ng’ich, nimar an ema amiyogi guethgi duto.”" 
Hosea14:9 Joma riek mondo owinj weche mondik ka, kendo girwakgi e chunygi. Yore mag Ruoth Nyasaye oriere tir, kendo joma kare luwogi, to joricho chwanyore kendo podho nikech ok giluwgi." 
Joel1:1 Ma e wach Ruoth Nyasaye mane omiyo Joel wuod Pethuel. 
Joel1:2 “Winjuru, un joma dongo, kaachiel gi ji duto modak e piny Juda. Bende gima kama osetimore e ndalou, kata e ndalo kwereu?" 
Joel1:3 Nyisuru nyithindu wachni, gin bende ginyis nyithindgi, kendo nyithindgigo onyis tieng’ maluwogi." 
Joel1:4 Bonyo madongo nochamo oboke, bang’e rumbi mar bonyo ma pod tindo nochamo oboke mane odong’." 
Joel1:5 Auru malo mondo uywagi, un jomergi! Ywaguru un jomadh divai, nikech mzabibu milosogo divai mamit osekethi!" 
Joel1:6 Oganda bonyo maduong’ osemonjo pinywa. Gin gi teko mathoth, kendo gikadho akwana. Lekegi bitho mana ka leke sibuor." 
Joel1:7 Giseketho yiendwa mag mzabibu, kendo giselwaro it ng’opewa. Gisechamo opoko chuth, mi bede odong’ ka rachere." 
Joel1:8 Ywaguru mana ka nyako maywago ng’at ma nyocha dwaro kende. 
Joel1:9 Onge mogo kata gima imadho ma inyalo chiwo e Hekalu mar Ruoth Nyasaye mondo otimgo misango mar cham kata misango miolo piny. Mano emomiyo jodolo matimo misengni ni Ruoth Nyasaye ywak. 
Joel1:10 Puothe ni nono, kendo piny ywak, nimar cham okethore, kendo yiend mzabibu gi yiend zeituni otwo." 
Joel1:11 Ywaguru un jopur, nikech ngano gi shairi kod cham duto okethore. Un joma rito puothe mzabibu, ywaguru, nikech yiend mzabibu kod yiend ng’owo osener." 
Joel1:12 Yien duto osetwo. Adier, komamanga gi othidhe kod yiend olemo mamoko, osetwo, kendo mor mar ji bende oserumo." 
Joel1:13 Un jodolo matimo misengni e kendo-mar-misango rwakuru pien gugru mondo uywagi! Ee, un jotich Nyasachwa, donjuru e Hekalu kendo ninduru kanyo e piende gugru otieno duto, nikech onge mogo kata divai e od Nyasachu ma unyalo timogo misango mar cham kata misango miolo piny." 
Joel1:14 Gouru milome mondo ji ori kech, kendo luonguru chokruok mar lemo. Un jodongo, chokuru jo-Juda duto e Od Ruoth Nyasaye mondo oywagne!" 
Joel1:15 Chieng’ Ruoth Nyasaye chiegni, chieng’ ma Ng’ama Nyalo Gik Moko Duto keloe masira malich. Chieng’no nobed marach manade!" 
Joel1:16 Cham kethore mana kwaneno; mor onge e Od Nyasachwa; 
Joel1:17 kodhi top e lowo motwo. Onge cham minyalo kano, omiyo dere man nono kethore." 
Joel1:18 Dhok chur manade, kendo ng’eng’ ang’eng’a, nikech lek ongenigi. Rombe bende kech nego." 
Joel1:19 Aywakni, A Ruoth Nyasaye, nikech legewa gi yiendwa otwo pep, mana ka gima mach owang’o." 
Joel1:20 Kata mana le bende ywakni, nikech aore duto oseduono, kendo lege otwo mana ka gima mach owang’o." 
Joel2:1 Gouru tung’ kendo gouru uwi e Sayun got maler mar Nyasaye. Jo-Juda duto mondo okirni, nikech chieng’ Ruoth Nyasaye biro machiegni." 
Joel2:2 Enobed chieng’ mudho machil, chieng’ mudho mandiwa kendo motimo rumbi. Rumbi maduong’ mar bonyo imo gode, kendo obiro mang’eny mana ka oganda jolweny marateke. Gima chal kodgi pok obetie, bende ok nobedie." 
Joel2:3 Gichamo oboke mana ka gima mach owang’o! Piny ma pok gichopoe ber ka puoth Eden, to ka giseaye, to odong’ motwo tarara. Onge gima giweyo mak gichamo." 
Joel2:4 Kirangogi, to gichalo farese, kendo giringo ka farese mag lweny" 
Joel2:5 Kiwinjogi ka gichikore ewi gode, to gichalo ka geche maringo, kata ka lum motwo ma mach wang’o. Ochan-gi mana ka oganda lweny maduong’ moriedo ni lweny." 
Joel2:6 Ka gibiro, to ng’ato ka ng’ato kirni, kendo wenge ji lokore mamarmar." 
Joel2:7 Gimonjo mier ka jolweny, kendo giidho ohinga ka askeche. Gisiko ka gidhi mana nyime tir, ma ok gibar kamoro," 
Joel2:8 bende moro ok tuomre gi wadgi. Gimwomo gik ma digeng’gi mak gichung’. 
Joel2:9 Gimwomo dala lweny, kendo gikalo ohinga piyopiyo. Giidho kor udi, mi gidonjo gie dirisni ka jokuo." 
Joel2:10 Piny yiengni e nyimgi, to polo bende tetni. Wang’ chieng’ gi due oimore, sulue bende ok rieny." 
Joel2:11 Ruoth Nyasaye ruto e nyim ogandane mar lwenyno. Joge mag lweny ng’eny, kendo rateke. Ndalo Ruoth Nyasaye lich manade! Ere ng’ama nyalo siro chieng’no?" 
Joel2:12 Ruoth Nyasaye owacho niya, “To kata mana sani, lokreuru gi chunyu duto, mondo uduog ira kuriyo kech, kendo kuywak kendo kukuyo." 
Joel2:13 Chunyu mondo otur, eka onyis ni uywagoru, to kik uyiech ayiecha lepu.” Duoguru ir Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu, nikech ong’won kendo okecho ji. Iye ok wang’ piyo, kendo onyiso herane mosiko, bende chunye lor a kuom kelo ni ji masira." 
Joel2:14 Dipo ka Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu biro loko parone, mi oguedhu gi cham mogundho. Eka unubed gi mogo kod divai, ma unyalo timonego misengni miolo piny." 
Joel2:15 Gouru tung’ e got Sayun, gouru milome mondo ji ori kech, kendo luonguru chokruok mar lemo." 
Joel2:16 Chokuru ji kanyakla, mondo giikre ni chokruok maler. Luonguru joma dongo, kendo chokuru nyithindo, koda ka ma pod dhoth. Kata mana joma nyocha okendo machiegni nyaka a e utgi mi bi." 
Joel2:17 Jodolo ma tiyo ni Ruoth Nyasaye ei Hekalu, nyaka ywagi, kochung’ e kind dhorangach gi kendo-mar-misango. Giywak kama: “A Ruoth Nyasaye, kech jogi ma mwanduni, kik iwe ogendini mamoko jarwa mi nyierwa, ka giwacho niya, ‘Nyasachu ni kanye?’ ”" 
Joel2:18 Bang’e Ruoth Nyasaye nonyiso ni ohero pinye ahinya, kendo nokecho joge." 
Joel2:19 Nowinjo ywakgi, modwokogi niya, “Koro abiro miyou cham gi mzabibu kod mo, mi unuyieng’. Onge ogendini mamoko ma nochak ojaru kendo." 
Joel2:20 Abiro riembo wasiku mane oa nyandwat, mi ater e thim motwo. Moko motelo nariemb, mi tho e Nam Kado, to man chien notho e Nam Mediterenia. Gibiro tow, mi githing’ ji. Abiro timo kamano nikech gik madongo ma gisetimo." 
Joel2:21 “Kuom mano in lowo kik ibed maluor, to bed gi mor kendo gi ilo, nikech Ruoth Nyasaye osetimoni gik madongo!" 
Joel2:22 Un le bende, kik ubed maluor, nikech lege loth, kendo yien nyago olemo. Ee, yiend ng’owo kod mzabibu nyago olemo mang’eny." 
Joel2:23 Beduru mamor un jo-Sayun, beduru mail kuom gima Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu osetimonu. Omiyou koth maber moromo cham, adier, omiyou kodh chwiri gi kodh opon, kaka chon." 
Joel2:24 Cham biro pong’o dere, kendo divai manyien gi mo biro pong’o kuonde keno." 
Joel2:25 An ema naoronu bonyogo kaka ogandana mar lweny, to abiro dwokonu gik mane olalnu e higni mane gichamoe puotheu." 
Joel2:26 Koro ubiro bedo gi chiemo mathoth, mucham nyaka uyieng’, mi unupak Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu, mosetimonu gik miwuoro. Bende joga ok nochak ojar kendo." 
Joel2:27 Bang’e unung’e ni an e dieru, un jo-Israel, kendo ni an Ruoth Nyasaye e Nyasachu, maonge moro kendo, bende joga ok nochak ojar kendo." 
Joel2:28 “Bang’e naol Roho mara kuom ji duto. Yawuotu gi nyiu nokor wach, bende jou madongo nolek lek, kendo jou matindo none fweny." 
Joel2:29 E ndalogo ema naorie Roho mara, kata mana kuom jotich machwo gi mamon." 
Joel2:30 Anatim honni e polo kendo e piny, mondo obed ranyisi. Remo gi mach kod iro madhuolore nobedie," 
Joel2:31 wang’chieng’ nolokre mudho, kendo due nolokre makwar ka remo, ka pok chieng’ maduong’ miwuoro mar Ruoth Nyasaye ochopo." 
Joel2:32 Chakre kanyo ng’ato ka ng’ato moluongo nying Ruoth Nyasaye noresi. Jomoko modak e got Sayun notony kuno. Ee, jomoko notony Jerusalem, mana kaka Ruoth Nyasaye osewacho. Joma Ruoth Nyasaye oluongo nobed mangima.”" 
Joel3:1 Ruoth Nyasaye owacho niya, “E ndalono nadwok mwandu jo-Juda gi mwandu jo-Jerusalem mane olalnigi," 
Joel3:2 kendo anachok ogendini duto, mi ater e holo Jehoshafat, (tiende ni, holo ma Ruoth Nyasaye ng’adoe bura.) Kanyo ema nang’adie buchgi kuom gik ma gisetimo ni joga Israel, nikech gisekeyo joga awuon e pinje mamoko, mi gipogo pinya e kindgi giwegi." 
Joel3:3 Ne gigoyo ombulu mondo gipoggo joga, kendo ne giuso yawuowi gi nyiri obed wasumbni, mondo pesa ma giyudo gichodgo, kendo gimadhgo kong’o." 
Joel3:4 “Un jo-Turo gi jo-Sidon kod jo-Filistia duto, ang’o mutimonani? Udwaro chulona kuor koso? Ka kamano, to kuor mudwaro chulono abiro dwoko e wiu uwegi ka diemo wang’." 
Joel3:5 Usekawo fetha gi dhahapa, kendo utero giga ma nengogi tek kuondeu mag lemo." 
Joel3:6 Bende usekawo jo-Juda gi jo-Jerusalem, mutero mabor gi pinygi, kendo ung’iewogi gi jo-Yunani." 
Joel3:7 Koro adhi gologi kuonde ma useng’iewogie, kendo abiro timonu mana kaka natimonigi." 
Joel3:8 Abiro miyo jo-Juda ng’iewo yawuotu gi nyiu, kendo giniusgi ni jo-Sabea, modak kuma bor ahinya. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano.”" 
Joel3:9 Nyis ogendini niya, “Ikreuru ni lweny, kendo chokuru jokedo. Ee, luonguru jolweny duto mondo obi!" 
Joel3:10 Thedhuru kweu obed ligengni, kendo thedhuru rabeti mau obed tonge. Kata joma oyomno nyaka kedi, kendo ng’ama ngoro nyaka nyis ni en thwon!" 
Joel3:11 Returu ubi, un ogendini mokiewo, mondo uchokru e holo.” A Ruoth Nyasaye, mi jolwenji marateke olor kuno!" 
Joel3:12 Ogendini nyaka ikre, mondo obi e holo ma Ruoth Nyasaye ng’adoe bura, nimar kanyo ema an Ruoth Nyasaye abiro betie, ka ayalo ogendini duto moa koni gi koni." 
Joel3:13 Gin gi richo mang’eny, omiyo betgiuru duto ka cham mibeto chieng’ keyo. Nyon-giuru ka mzabibu minyono kar bicho, ma mzabibu opong’o, kendo divai o oko." 
Joel3:14 Ji gana gi gana nie holo mar ng’ado bura. Kanyo ema chieng’ Ruoth Nyasaye chiegni chopoe. 
Joel3:15 Wang’ chieng’ gi due olokore mudho, kendo sulue bende ok rieny." 
Joel3:16 Dwond Ruoth Nyasaye mor gi ewi got Sayun. Ee, omor Jerusalem, kendo polo gi piny yiengni. To Ruoth Nyasaye nores joge Israel, kobedonigi kama ginyalo geng’oree." 
Joel3:17 “Bang’e un jo-Israel unung’e ni an, Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu, adak Sayun, goda maler, kendo jopinje mamoko ok nonyone kendo." 
Joel3:18 Kindeno yiend mzabibu manyak ahinya nopong’ gode, kendo jamni mathoth noyud e got ka got. Soko nomol kawuok e Hekalu mar Ruoth Nyasaye, mi nomi holo Shitim bedo mang’ich." 
Joel3:19 Piny Misri biro lokore thim, kendo piny Edom nolokre thim modong’ nono, nikech jopinjego nomonjo piny Juda, mochuero remb joma onge gi ketho." 
Joel3:20 Abiro chulo kuor ni jonekgo, kendo joketho ok nawe mak akumo. Ji nodag e piny Juda gi Jerusalem nyaka chieng’, kendo Ruoth Nyasaye nodag e got Sayun.”" 
Joel3:21  
Amos1:1 Magi e weche Amos, mane achiel kuom jokwath ma nodak Tekoa. Nyasaye nofwenyone wechegi higni ariyo ka pok yiengni piny obetie, ka Uzia e ruodh Juda, to Jeroboam wuod Joash e ruodh Israel." 
Amos1:2 Nowacho niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye ruto Sayun! Ee, dwonde mor Jerusalem! Kuom mano lege jamni two, kendo wi got Karmel mang’ich ner.”" 
Amos1:3 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho niya, “Jo-Damaski osetimo richo mang’eny, omiyo abiro kumogi mak orem, nikech gisesando jo-Gilead gi sand malit, ka giywayo kuomgi bepe mogurie musmande mabitho midinogo cham." 
Amos1:4 Kuom mano abiro oro mach e dhood Hazael piny Aram, kendo majno biro wang’o miech ruodh Ben-hadad mochiel motegno." 
Amos1:5 Abiro turo lodi mag dhoranga Damaski, mi ariemb jodong holo Aven kod Beth-eden. Jo-Aram ibi dar mi ter mabor e tuech e piny Kir.”" 
Amos1:6 Ruoth Nyasaye owacho niya, “Jo-Gaza osetimo richo mang’eny, omiyo abiro kumogi mak orem, nikech ne gikawo oganda ngima, mi giketo e lwet jo-Edom." 
Amos1:7 Kuom mano abiro oro mach e ohinga mar Gaza mondo owang’ kuonde mochiel motegno mag dalano," 
Amos1:8 kendo abiro riembo jodong mier mag Ashdod gi Ashkelon. Anakum dala mar Ekron, kendo jo-Filistia duto modong’ notho.” Mano e wach Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Amos1:9 Ruoth Nyasaye owacho niya, “Jo-Turo osetimo richo mang’eny, omiyo abiro kumogi mak orem, nikech ne gidaro oganda moro, mi gitero e piny Edom e tuech, ka ok girito winjruok mar osiep mane gitimo kodgi." 
Amos1:10 Kuom mano abiro oro mach e ohinga mar Turo mondo owang’ kuonde mochiel motegno mag dalano.” 
Amos1:11 Ruoth Nyasaye owacho niya, “Jo-Edom osetimo richo mang’eny, omiyo abiro kumogi mak orem, nikech ne gimonjo jowetegi ma jo-Israel, mi ginego malit, kendo ne ok gigeng’o mirimbgi, to ne gisiko ka gimako kodgi sadha marach." 
Amos1:12 Kuom mano abiro oro mach Teman mondo owang’ kuonde mochiel motegno mag Bozra.” 
Amos1:13 Ruoth Nyasaye owacho niya, “Jo-Amon osetimo richo mang’eny, omiyo abiro kumogi mak orem, nikech wuoch lowo nomakogi, mi giriedo iye mon mayach e piny Gilead." 
Amos1:14 Kuom mano abiro moko mach e ohinga mar Raba mondo owang’ kuonde mochiel motegno mag dalano. Ji nogo mahu chieng’ kedo, kendo lweny nobed maliet ka mach." 
Amos1:15 Ruodhgi ibiro daro, mi ter e tuech, kaachiel gi jodonge.”" 
Amos2:1 Ruoth Nyasaye owacho niya, “Jo-Moab osetimo richo mang’eny, omiyo abiro kumogi mak orem, nikech ne giwango choke ruodh Edom mi giloko buru." 
Amos2:2 Kuom mano abiro oro mach e piny Moab mondo owang’ kuonde mochiel motegno mag Kerioth. Jo-Moab biro tho e chuny mahu mar lweny, ka jolweny giyo sigich lweny, kendo tung’ ywak." 
Amos2:3 Abiro nego ruodh Moab, kaachiel gi jotend pinyno duto.” Mano e wach Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Amos2:4 Ruoth Nyasaye owacho niya, “Jo-Juda osetimo richo mang’eny, omiyo abiro kumogi mak orem, nikech gisechayo puonjna, kendo gisedagi rito chikena. Nyiseche manono mane kweregi lamo osemiyo gibaro, mi giweya." 
Amos2:5 Kuom mano abiro oro mach e piny Juda mondo owang’ kuonde mochiel motegno mag Jerusalem.” 
Amos2:6 Ruoth Nyasaye owacho niya, “Un jo-Israel usetimo richo mang’eny, omiyo abiro kumou mak orem, nimar ung’iewo joma onge gi ketho, nikech pok gichulo gopegi. Joma odhier ma ok nyal chulo kata mana nengo patpat bende ung’iewo ka wasumbni." 
Amos2:7 Unyono jochan piny, kendo udhiro joma odhier oko e yo. Wuowi gi wuon mare dhi ir dhako achiel ma jachode mar Hekalu, ka gidwanyogo nyinga maler." 
Amos2:8 Kuonde duto ma ji lamoe, ginindo e lewni mosingnigi kuom gope. Divai ma ukawo kuom joma ugoyo faini, umadho e Hekalu mar Nyasachu." 
Amos2:9 To koro eka un ema numiyo atieko jo-Amor ma raboche ka yiend sida, kendo matek ka yiend ober. Ne atiekogi pep!”" 
Amos2:10 Ruoth Nyasaye nochako owacho niya, “An ema nagolou e piny Misri, mi atelonu e thim kuom higni piero ang’wen, kendo namiyou piny jo-Amor mondo obed maru." 
Amos2:11 Ne aketo yawuotu moko mondo obed jonabi, to moko naketo obed jo-Nazir. Donge awacho adier, jo-Israel?" 
Amos2:12 To ne umiyo jo-Nazir omadho divai, bende nuchiko jonabi ni kik hul wachna." 
Amos2:13 Koro abiro diyou piny kama untie, mana kaka gari mopong’ gi cham sikore e lowo." 
Amos2:14 Jong’uech matek ok notony, kendo joma rateke nobed mool, bende kata mana jolweny mager ok nores ngimagi." 
Amos2:15 Jo-Asere noringi, kendo jong’wech matek ok noresre. Bende joma oidho farese ok notony." 
Amos2:16 To kata mana jolweny mathuondi moloyo noring duge chieng’no.” 
Amos3:1 Ruoth Nyasaye owacho niya, “Un jo-Israel winjuru gima awacho kuomu. Ne agolo dhoutu duto e piny Misri," 
Amos3:2 kendo un ema aseng’eyou kendo ritou kuom ogendini duto manie piny. Kuom mano abiro kumou kuom richou duto. 
Amos3:3 Uparo ni ji ariyo nyalo chako wuoth kaachiel ka pok giwinjore? 
Amos3:4 Koso sibuor bende ruto e bungu ka onge gima osemako? Kata nyathi sibuor nyalo ng’ur e gono adier, ka onge gima ochamo?" 
Amos3:5 “Bende winyo nyalo moko e obadho ka ok oketne kudni? Koso obadho nyalo meko ka onge gima otuge? 
Amos3:6 “Bende tung’ mar lweny nyalo ywak e dala mak omiyo ji luoro? Koso gimoro nyalo timore e dala ka ok Ruoth Nyasaye ema okelo? 
Amos3:7 “Adier, onge gima Ruoth Nyasaye timo ka ok onyiso jotichne ma jonabi." 
Amos3:8 “Ere ng’ama ok diluor ka sibuor ruto? Koso ere janabi ma diling’ mak ohulo gima Ruoth Nyasaye owachone?” 
Amos3:9 Gouru milome e ut ruodhi mag Ashdod gi mag Misri, kuwacho niya, “Chokreuru kanyakla e gode moluoro Samaria, mondo uneye timbe pogruok matimore e dalano, kendo kaka ithiro ji kuno.”" 
Amos3:10 Ruoth Nyasaye owacho kama: “Jogo ok ong’eyo kaka digibed joma obidhore. Gipong’o utgi madongo gi gik moyaki. 
Amos3:11 Kuom mano wasigu nolwor pinygi, kendo noketh kuondegi mochiel motegno kod utgi madongodongo.”" 
Amos3:12 Ruoth Nyasaye owacho niya, “Kaka jakwath reso lemo ariyo kata it rombo ma ondiek osechamo, e kaka Nyasaye nores mana jo-Israel manok modak Samaria." 
Amos3:13 Koro chikuru itu mondo usiem nyikwa Jakobo ni Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto wacho kama: 
Amos3:14 Chieng’ ma nakum jo-Israel kuom richogi, to naketh kende mag liswa man Bethel bende. Tunge mag kendogo nong’ad oko, mi ginipodh piny." 
Amos3:15 Anamuk udi midakie ndalo chwiri kod mago midakie ndalo oro. Udi ma olich igi gi lak liech nodong’ gundni, kendo ot ka ot maduong, nokethi.”" 
Amos4:1 “Winjuru, un mond Samaria machwe ka dhok makwayo e lege momew. Uthago joma onge teko, kendo usando joma odhier, bende ng’ato ka ng’ato kuomu rungo chwore, ka wacho niya, ‘Kelna gima anyalo madho!’" 
Amos4:2 To kaka Ruoth Nyasaye en Ng’ama Ler, osesingore ni ndalo biro ma wasiku noywaue gi olowu, kendo ng’ato ka ng’ato kuomu nochal mana gi rech ma olowu omako." 
Amos4:3 Ginigolu e dala ka giluwo kama ohinga omukoree, mi giniwitu oko.”" 
Amos4:4 Ruoth Nyasaye owacho niya, “Un jo-Israel, kara dhiuru Bethel mondo utim atima richo e hekalu, kendo dhiuru Gilgal mondo utim richo kuno gi tekreu duto! Keluru jamni mondo utimgo misengni okinyi kokinyi, kendo keluru chiwo mar achiel kuom apar chieng’ mar adek ka chieng’ mar adek." 
Amos4:5 Chiwuru makati ma ok ketie thowi ka misango mar erokamano, kendo landuru wach, kusungoru kuom misengni muchiwo kuom herou! Nimar gima kamano ema bernu ka utimo.”" 
Amos4:6 Ruoth Nyasaye owacho niya, “An ema nakelo kech e miechu duto, mi ubedo ma onge gi chiemo. To kata kamano ne ok uduogo ira." 
Amos4:7 Ne atamo koth chuenu e ndalo monego ochuee. Ne amiyo koth ochue e mier moko, to puothe mane ok ochuee nowang’." 
Amos4:8 Ji ne a e mier moko, kendo wuotho kool kadhi e dala moro dwaro pi, to ne ok giyud moromogi. To kata kamano, ne ok uduogo ira." 
Amos4:9 “Naoro dera morocho chambu ewi dongo. Bonyo nochamo chambu gi yiendu mag mzabibu gi ng’owo kod zeituni. Kata kamano ne ok uduogo ira. 
Amos4:10 “Ne akelonu yamo marach mar tho machal gi mano mane akelo ni jo-Misri. Bende namiyo yawuotu mang’eny otho e lweny, kendo amayou fareseu. Ne amiyo mifuond jomotho e kambeu othing’ou. To kata kamano ne ok uduogo ira." 
Amos4:11 “Ne atieko jomoko kuomu kaka ne atieko Sodom gi Gomora, kendo ne uchalo gi luth moyudh e mach. Kata kamano ne ok uduogo ira." 
Amos4:12 “Kuom mano un jo-Israel, abiro timonu mana gik ma kamago. To nikech abiro timonu kamano, omiyo nyaka uikru ni romo ni Nyasachu.”" 
Amos4:13 Nyasaye ema noloso gode, kendo ochueyo yamo. Onyiso dhano parone, bende oloko ler mar odiechieng’ bedo mudho. En e ruodh piny duto, kendo nyinge en Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto." 
Amos5:1 Chikuru itu un jo-Israel mondo uwinj wend ywak ma achuogonu. 
Amos5:2 “Oganda Israel osepodho, to ok nochak oa malo. Opodho piny auma e lope owuon, kendo onge ng’ama ochunge.”" 
Amos5:3 Ruoth Nyasaye owacho niya, “Dala Israel mane jolweny owuokie alufu achiel, biro duogoe mana ji mia kende. To mano mane owuokie ji mia achiel, biro duogo mana ji apar.”" 
Amos5:4 Ruoth Nyasaye wacho ni jo-Israel niya," 
Amos5:5 “Kudwaro bedo mangima, to duoguru ira. To kik udhi Bethel, kata kik udhi Gilgal, bende kik ukadh nyaka Beer-sheba, nimar jo-Gilgal ibiro daro mi ter e tuech, kendo Bethel biro lal nono.”" 
Amos5:6 Ka udwaro bet mangima, to dwaruru Ruoth Nyasaye, nono to obiro muoch kuom joka Josef ka mach. En mach mabiro wang’o jo-Israel maonge ng’ama nego." 
Amos5:7 Mano wach manade kuom un ma loko bura makare ataro, kendo tuono ji gik monego giyudi!" 
Amos5:8 Ruoth Nyasaye ema nochueyo Yugni gi Ratego, kendo en ema omiyo piny ru kendo yuso. Oluongo pi nam mondo obi, kendo oologi e piny." 
Amos5:9 En ema omiyo sulue wuok kendo podho, kaluwore, chakre Oluoro Budho nyaka Ratego." 
Amos5:10 Un to umon gi ng’ama odonjo ni jaketho, kendo uchayo ng’at mawacho adiera." 
Amos5:11 Usethiro joma odhier, kendo usekawo chambgi moko kaka osuru. Kuom mano ok unudag e udi mabeyo mag kite musegero, bende ok unumadh divai kuom mzabibu mabeyo musepidho," 
Amos5:12 nimar ang’eyo kaka kethou ng’eny, kendo ang’eyo kaka richou okadho akwana. Un usando joma onge gi ketho, kendo uchamo asoya, bende utamo joma odhier yudo bura makare." 
Amos5:13 Emomiyo ng’at mariek ling’ aling’a, nikech piny rach." 
Amos5:14 Dwaruru ber, to kik udwar rach, mondo ubed mangima, kendo Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto obed jakoru adier kaka uparono." 
Amos5:15 Beduru mamon gi gik maricho, to heruru gik mabeyo, kendo gururu bura makare e ut bura, nikech dipo ka Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto otimo ng’wono ni joka Josef modong’." 
Amos5:16 Kuom mano, Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto wacho kama: “Ywak biro bet e yore duto mag dala, kendo kuonde duto ji nobed kaywakie, ma kata mana jopur noluong mondo oywagi kaachiel gi joma ong’eyo wende ywak." 
Amos5:17 Ywak nobed e puothe duto mag mzabibu, nimar anabi mondo akumu." 
Amos5:18 Un joma ofuwo ma dwaro mondo chieng’ Ruoth Nyasaye obi, uparo ni chieng’no nokelnu ang’o? Ok nobed chieng’ ler, to nobed mana chieng’ mudho!" 
Amos5:19 Unuchal mana gi ng’at ma sibuor riembo, to romo gi ondiek, kata machal gi ng’at modonjo e ot, kendo oyiengo lwete e kor ot, mi thuol okayo!" 
Amos5:20 Chieng’ Ruoth Nyasaye en mana mudho mandiwa. Adier, en chieng’ molil, maonge ler!" 
Amos5:21 “Amon gi sewni mutimona, kendo ajarogi, bende ok ahero nyasi mau mag lemo." 
Amos5:22 Ka utimona misengni miwang’o pep, kod misengni mag cham, to ok nayiego, bende ok narang jambu mutimogo misengni mag sawo." 
Amos5:23 Weuru baro wiya gi wendeu mag pak, nikech ok adwar winjo thumbe mugoyona." 
Amos5:24 Weuru bura makare omol ka pi, kendo tim makare bende omol ka aora ma ok duon." 
Amos5:25 “Apenjou, un jo-Israel, bende nutimona misengni, kendo ukelona chiwo kuom higni piero ang’wen mane utieko e thimgo duto?" 
Amos5:26 Koro nyaka uting’ nyisecheu manono mag sulue ma Sakuth gi Kaiwan mane uloso," 
Amos5:27 kendo abiro darou mi ateru e tuech, e piny man loka machielo mar Damaski.” Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto owacho kamano." 
Amos6:1 “Mano biro bedo wach marach manade kuom joma odak maber Sayun, kendo kuom joma ogeno ni gode mag Samaria nyalo resogi. Un joma dongo mag oganda maduong’ moloyo, ma joma jo-Israel dhi irgi mondo oyud konyruok," 
Amos6:2 dhiuru uneye Kalne mi uchwe nyaka Hamath, eka ulor udhi Gath e piny jo-Filistia. Uparo ni uber moloyo jo-pinjego? Koso pinyu duong’ moloyo pinjegi?" 
Amos6:3 Un joma ok odewo ni chieng’ bura biro, to urikni mana kutimo timbe mahundu!" 
Amos6:4 Un ma unindo e kitendni molos gi lak liech, kendo utaroru e kombe madongo, kuchamo nyirombe mugolo kuom jambu, kod nyiruedhi machue mopidh maber." 
Amos6:5 Un muchuogo wende manono, kugoyo thum kendo uloso thumbe kaka ne Daudi loso," 
Amos6:6 umodho divai gi ndope, kendo uwiroru gi modhi ma nengogi tek, to ok litnu ka joka Josef rumo." 
Amos6:7 Kuom mano, ubiro bedo joma ikwongo daro, kitero e tuech. Mano biro bedo giko mar mor mudhialorugono.”" 
Amos6:8 Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto osesingore owuon niya, “Asin gi sunga mar joka Jakobo, kendo asin gi utgi madongo dongo. Abiro chiwo Samaria ma dalagi, kod gik moko duto man e iye e lwet wasigu." 
Amos6:9 Ka ji apar odong’ e ot achiel, to ginitho giduto," 
Amos6:10 kendo ka wat ng’at achiel kuom joma othogo obiro mondo ogol ringre wadgi, owang’, nopenj niya, ‘Pod nitie ng’ato modong’ koso?’ To dwoko nobed ni, ‘Ongee. To ling’ nimar nying Ruoth Nyasaye ok nyal hul.’ ”" 
Amos6:11 Ruoth Nyasaye biro golo chik, mi udi madongo nomuki, mi lokre pidhe, to matindo noteng’ matindo tindo." 
Amos6:12 Farese bende nyalo ringo e kite? Koso dhok nyalo puro nam? To un uloko bura makare mana gima kech, kendo tim maber uloko mana gima rach." 
Amos6:13 Umor kuom loyo dala maonge ndhathe, bende usungoru ni un gi teko moloyo kawo Karnaim." 
Amos6:14 “To un jo-Israel, abiro kelo oganda moro mondo omonju, kendo ginisandu, chakre kama idonjogo Hamath, man yo nyandwat, nyaka holo man yo Araba, yo milambo. An Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto ema awacho kamano.”" 
Amos7:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nokona e fweny, mi anenoe rumbi mar bonyo monywol e ndalo ma cham chiegni chiekie." 
Amos7:2 E fwenyno naneno ka bonyogo osetieko chamo gimoro amora mang’ich e piny. Eka ne awacho niya, “A Ruoth Nyasaye, ng’wonni jogi, ma joka Jakobo. Ere kaka ginyalo resore, to ginok kamano?”" 
Amos7:3 Mi chuny Ruoth Nyasaye nolendo, mowacho niya, “Ee, ayie. Gima kamano ok notimre.”" 
Amos7:4 Ruoth Nyasaye nochako okelona fweny machielo, mi aneno ka ooro mach mondo owang’ nam maduong’ manie bwo piny, kendo mondo otiek gik moko duto manie piny." 
Amos7:5 Eka naywak niya, “A Ruoth Nyasaye, akwayi ni we timo kamano. Ere kaka jo-Israel nyalo resore, to ginok kamano?”" 
Amos7:6 Mi chuny Ruoth Nyasaye nochako olendo, mowacho niya, “Mano bende ok bi timore.”" 
Amos7:7 Ruoth Nyasaye nokelona fweny moro machielo mi anenoe ng’ato mochung’ e kor ot, koting’o tol mar rapim mipimogo kor ot mondo one ane koriere tir." 
Amos7:8 Eka Ruoth Nyasaye nopenja niya, “Amos, ang’o minenono?” Ne adwoke niya, “Aneno tol mar rapim.” Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho niya, “Apimo chuny joga Israel gi rapim, mana kaka ng’ama pimo kor ot, kendo ok nachak awenigi ngang’." 
Amos7:9 Kuonde ma joka Isaka lemoe ibiro kethi, kendo kuonde maler duto mag Israel biro kethore, bende abiro biro mondo aked gi dhood Jeroboam.”" 
Amos7:10 Amazia jadolo man Bethel nonyiso Jeroboam ruodh Israel niya, “Amos piem kodi e Israel, kendo wechene biro ketho piny." 
Amos7:11 Owacho niya, ‘Jeroboam biro tho e lweny, kendo jo-Israel ibiro daro e pinygi, mi tere e tuech.’ ”" 
Amos7:12 Amos owuon, to ne Amazia okwero niya, “Dhi kucha, jakorni! Dhiyo e piny Juda mondo ikor wach kuno iyudgo chiembi." 
Amos7:13 To kik ichak ikor wach Bethel ka, nikech ma en Hekalu mar pinywa, kama ruoth lemoe.”" 
Amos7:14 To Amos nodwoko Amazia niya, “An ok an janabi, to bende mano ok tija. An mana jakwath, kendo jarit yiend ng’owo." 
Amos7:15 To Ruoth Nyasaye ema nokawa ka akwayo rombe, mi owachona niya, ‘Dhiyo mondo ikor wach ni joga Israel’" 
Amos7:16 Kuom mano koro winj wach Ruoth Nyasaye. Ikwera ni awe koro wach kuom jo-Israel, kendo ni awe wacho weche manono kuom joka Isaka." 
Amos7:17 To Ruoth Nyasaye wachoni kama: ‘Chiegi biro doko jachode e dala Samaria, kendo yawuoti gi nyigi noneg e lweny. Lopi nopog gipimo gi rapim, to in iwuon initho e piny moro nono, kendo jo-Israel nodar, mi ter e tuech.’ ”" 
Amos8:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nokelona fweny machielo, mi anenoe atonga moting’o olemo." 
Amos8:2 Ruoth Nyasaye nopenja niya, “Amos, ineno ang’o?” Ne adwoke ni, “Aneno atonga moting’o olemo mochiek.” Eka ne Ruoth Nyasaye owachona niya, “Joga Israel bende ochiek ni yudo kum, kendo ok nachak awegi mak akumogi." 
Amos8:3 Chieng’no wende ma iwero e od ruoth nolokre mag ywak, kendo ringre jomotho nopie kuonde duto, to piny noling’ thi.”" 
Amos8:4 Winjuru un joma nyono jochan, kendo temo manyo joma odhier." 
Amos8:5 Uwacho kendu uwegi niya, “Mad ndalo mag lemo mar due manyien rum piyo, mondo waus cham.” Bende upenjoru niya, “Ndalo mag Sabato biro rumo karang’o, mondo wagol chambwa warundi? Eka wanyalo keto nengo mamalo, kendo tiyo gi rapim ma ok ni kare mondo wawuondgo jong’iewo!" 
Amos8:6 Wabiro uso cham maricho e nengo maber. Bang’e wanyalo ng’iewo joma odhier mondo obed wasumbni mana kuom nengo moromo patpat.” 
Amos8:7 Jo-Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach joka Jakobo osekuong’ore ni wiye ok nowil gi timbegi maricho. 
Amos8:8 Kuom mano piny biro yiengni, kendo ji duto modakie noywagi! Piny duto biro tetni, bende obiro ting’ore mi opie, mana ka aora Nael manie piny Misri." 
Amos8:9 Ruoth Nyasaye wacho niya, “Chieng’no nami chieng’ podhi odiechieng’ tir, mi piny lokre mudho ka chieng rieny ha." 
Amos8:10 Anami sewni mau lokre ywak mar tho, kendo wendeu mag mor nolokre dengo. Anami urwak pien gugru uduto, kendo uliel wiu. Unuchal joma ywago wuodgi ma miderma, kendo chieng’no nobed malit adier.”" 
Amos8:11 Ruoth Nyasaye wacho niya, “Ndalo biro ma anakelie kech e piny, ok kech mar chiemo, kata riyo mar pi, to mana riyo mar winjo wach Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Amos8:12 Ji nowuoth kadawo, chakre nyandwat nyaka milambo. Ginidigni chakre yo wuokchieng’ nyaka yo podho chieng’, ka gimanyo wach Ruoth Nyasaye to ok giniyudi." 
Amos8:13 Chieng’no nyiri ma jobeyo kod yawuowi bende nopodh piny nikech riyo. 
Amos8:14 Ji duto makuong’ore gi nying Ashima, ma Nyasaye madhako mar Samaria, kata makuong’ore gi nyasach Dan, kendo gi nyasach Beer-sheba, nopodh chuth, kendo ok nochak oa malo.”" 
Amos9:1 Ne aneno Ruoth Nyasaye kochung’ e bath kendo mar misango, kowacho niya, “Tuom sirni mag hekalu, mondo agola duto oyiengni. Mukgi mondo gilwar ewi ji, to ji duto modong’ anami otho e lweny. Onge ng’at ma noringi, kata ma notony." 
Amos9:2 Kata ka gikunyo bur, mi gichopo nyaka kar joma otho, to abiro gologi mana kuno. Kata ka giidho nyaka e polo, to abiro lorogi piny." 
Amos9:3 Ka gipondo ewi got Karmel, to nadwargi nyaka amakgi. Ka gipondona e bwo pi matut, to anachik thuol mondo okagi kuro." 
Amos9:4 Ka wasikgi omakogi ka terogi e tuech, to anachik mondo oneggi kuno. Aramo ni ok natimnigi maber, to nyaka atimnigi marach!”" 
Amos9:5 Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto mulo piny, mi piny leny, kendo ji duto modakie ywak. Piny duto ting’ore malo, kendo pie, mana ka aora Nael." 
Amos9:6 Ruoth Nyasaye gero ute e polo, kendo orenjo polo kuom piny. Oluongo pi nam mondo obi, kendo oologi e piny. Ruoth Nyasaye e nyinge!" 
Amos9:7 Ruoth Nyasaye wacho niya, “Un jo-Israel, gima atimonu chalo mana gi gima atimo ni jo-Ethiopia. Bende nagolo jo-Filistia e piny Kaftor, kendo nagolo jo-Aram e piny Kir, mana kaka un bende nagolou e piny Misri." 
Amos9:8 Arango piny jo-Israel motimo richoni, kendo abiro tieke e wang’ piny. Kata kamano ok anatiek joka Jakobo duto te." 
Amos9:9 To anagol chik, mi anapiedh jo-Israel e kind ogendini duto, ka cham mipiedho e odheru, kendo kata wang’ cham achiel ok nolwar piny." 
Amos9:10 Joga duto ma joketho ibiro negi e lweny kata mana mago duto mawacho niya, ‘Nyasaye ok nowe masira chop kuomwa.’" 
Amos9:11 “Chieng’no anachung’ e dhood Daudi mosebet ka ot molokore gunda. Analos kuonde momukore mondo oduog maber. Abiro gere kendo, mi alose machal gi kaka nochal chon." 
Amos9:12 Bang’e jo-Israel nolo jo-Edom modong’ kaachiel gi ogendini mamoko duto ma chon yande meka.” Ruoth Nyasaye mabiro miyo gima kamano timore owacho kamano. 
Amos9:13 Ruoth Nyasaye wacho niya, “Ndalo biro ma cham nobed mang’eny, mi nogol pur ka ji pod keyo, kendo mzabibu nonyag mathoth, mi nochak oket kodhi ka ji pod loso divai. Yiend mzabibu mang’eny mabeyo nonyag mathoth e gode duto, mi unubed gi divai mang’eny." 
Amos9:14 Abiro chako amiyo joga Israel dag e ngima maber. Gibiro gero miechgi mane olokore gundni, mi gidagie, kendo gibiro pidho yiend mzabibu, mi gimadh divai. Gibiro puro puothegi, mi gicham gik manyakie." 
Amos9:15 Abiro pidhogi e lopgi mane amiyogi kendo ok nochak opudhgi.” 
Obadiah1:1 Magi e weche mane Ruoth Nyasaye owacho ni Obadia e fweny kuom jo-Edom. Ruoth Nyasaye oseoro jaotene ir ogendini, kowacho niya, “Biuru mondo wadhi waked gi jo-Edom.” Kendo wasewinjo wachne." 
Obadiah1:2 Ruoth Nyasaye owacho ni jo-Edom niya, “Abiro miyo udoko matinie moloyo e kind ogendini duto, mi ji duto biro jarou." 
Obadiah1:3 Sunga ma un-go osewuondou! Udak e mbita mar lwanda motegno, kendo dalau ni ewi gode malo. Mano emomiyo uwacho kendu uwegi niya, ‘Ere ng’ama didwokwa piny?’" 
Obadiah1:4 To kata bed ni ugero dalau midimidi malo ka od ongo, mi uchal mana gi joma odak e kind sulwe kamano, to abiro dwokou piny.” Ruoth Nuasaye omedo wacho niya," 
Obadiah1:5 “Ka jokuo obiro gotieno to gikawo mana gik ma gidwaro, kendo ka ji pono mzabibu to pile giweyo moko. Un to wasiku oseyweyou oko gi yuech!" 
Obadiah1:6 Yaye, joka Esau! Giseyudo mwanduu, kata mana mago mupando, mi giyako." 
Obadiah1:7 Ogendini mane uriworugo osewuondou, mi giseriembou ua e pinyu. Joma ne ubetgo gi kue koro oseloyou, kendo osiepeu mane uchiemogo osechikonu obadho, ka giwacho kuomu niya, ‘Riekogi cha duto koro olal kanye?’ ”" 
Obadiah1:8 Ruoth Nyasaye owacho niya, “Chieng’ ma nakum piny Edom, anatiek jogi mariek, mi onge rieko ma nodong’ e piny gode mag Esau." 
Obadiah1:9 Jolweny mag Teman biro bwok, mi noneggi, maonge kata achiel modong’ e piny gode mag Esau." 
Obadiah1:10 Notieku kendo nochau nyaka chieng’ nikech ne unego oweteu ma joka Jakobo muyakogi. 
Obadiah1:11 Chieng’ mane wasikgi moa e pinje mamoko omuko dhorangeyegi, ne uchung’ achung’a. Ne uricho mana ka wasigu mane oyako mwandu Jerusalem, mi opogo e kindgi giwegi gi ombulu." 
Obadiah1:12 “Ne ok onego ubed mamor gi masira mane oweteu ma jo-Juda oyudo, bende ne ok onego unyiergi chieng’ rumbgi. Ne ok onego usungru kuneno ka gin e chandruok." 
Obadiah1:13 Chieng’ mane masira omako joga, ne ok onego udonj e dalagi mondo unyiergi ka gin e thagruok, kendo uyak mwandugi." 
Obadiah1:14 Ne ok onego uchung’ e akek yo mondo ugeng’ ni joma dwaro tony, kendo chieng’ mane gin e chandruok, ne ok onego uketgi e lwet wasikgi." 
Obadiah1:15 “Chieng’ ma an Ruoth Nyasaye abiro ng’adoe bura ni ogendini chiegni. Yaye, jo-Edom! Gik ma usetimo ema notimnu, kendo timbeu maricho nodong’ mana e wiu uwegi." 
Obadiah1:16 Joga oseyudo kum malit ewi goda maler, omiyo ogendini duto molworo joga biro yudo kum malit moloyo. Ibiro kumogi sidang’, mi gilal nono!" 
Obadiah1:17 “To jomoko modak e got Sayun biroo tony kuno, mi kanyono nobed kama ler, kendo joka Jakobo nokaw piny ma margi giwegi." 
Obadiah1:18 Joka Jakobo gi joka Josef nochal mach, mi ginitiek joka Esau manaa kaka mach wang’o tiang’ mi tieki. Onge nyakwar Esau moro ma nodong’ kangima. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema asewacho kamano.”" 
Obadiah1:19 Jo-Israel modak yo milambo nokaw piny gode mag Esau, kendo joma odak e tiend gode mag Juda biro kawo piny jo-Filistia. Jo-Israel nokaw piny Efraim gi Samaria, to jo-Benjamin nokaw piny Gilead." 
Obadiah1:20 Jo-Israel mamalo mane odar, mi oter e tuech, ma koro ni Sefarad, biro kawo mich piny man yo milambo." 
Obadiah1:21 Jo-Israel biro dhi e got Sayun mondo oresi, mi god Esau nobed e bwo lochgi. To Ruoth Nyasaye ema nobed ruoth." 
Jonah1:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Jona wuod Amitai niya," 
Jonah1:2 “Wuogi, idhi Nineve, dala maduong’, mondo isiem jodalano, nikech richogi osechopo e nyima.”" 
Jonah1:3 To kane Jona owinjo kamano, nowuok mondo oring odhi Tarshish, oa e wang’ Ruoth Nyasaye. Nodhi Jopa, kuma noyudoe yie madhi Tarshish. Nochulo nengo mar wuoth, mi oidho yie mondo odhi Tarshish kuma bor gi Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Jonah1:4 To Ruoth Nyasaye nomiyo yamo okudho matek e nam, mi ahiti mager ne dwaro ketho yie." 
Jonah1:5 Kibaji nogoyo jokwang’, mi ng’ato ka ng’ato nolamo nyasache. Gik mane gin go e yie ne giwito e nam, mondo yie odong’ mayot. To sechego noyudo Jona oselor e yie piny, kendo oriere kuno ka nindo ogoye ngoga." 
Jonah1:6 Jatend yie nopo konwang’o Jona kanyo, mopenje niya, “Ang’o momiyo inindo aninda? Chungi mondo iywag ni nyasachi, dipo ka owinjo moresowa.”" 
Jonah1:7 Jokwang’ nowacho e kindgi giwegi niya, “Biuru wago ombulu, mondo wang’ego ni ng’ano mokelonwa hawi marachni.” Kamano ne gigoyo ombulu, mi ombulu nolwar mana kuom Jona." 
Jonah1:8 Eka ne gipenje niya, “Ang’o mitimo ka? Nyiswa kuma iaye. To ija kanye?”" 
Jonah1:9 Nodwokogi niya, “An ja-Hibrania, kendo alamo Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach polo mane ochueyo nam gi piny.”" 
Jonah1:10 Kane giwinjo kamano, ne gidoko maluor ahinya, mi giwacho niya, “Mano kaka isetimo gima rach!” Ne giwacho kamano, nimar ne giseng’eyo ni Jona ringo a e wang’ Ruoth Nyasaye, nikech noyudo osewachonigi." 
Jonah1:11 Koro nam ne medo tugore marach moloyo, omiyo jokwang’ nopenjo Jona niya, “Watimni ang’o, mondo nam okuenwa?”" 
Jonah1:12 Jona nodwokogi niya, “Kawauru ubola e nam, to bang’e nam biro bedonu mokue, nimar ang’eyo ni ahiti maduong’ni obironu mana nikech an.”" 
Jonah1:13 To jogo nokiewo yie matek mondo gigow e dho nam, to ne ok ginyal, nimar nam nomedo tugore gi ahiti, motamogi." 
Jonah1:14 Mogik ne giywak ni Ruoth Nyasaye, ka giwacho niya, “A Ruoth Nyasaye, yie kik iwe watho kuom nego ng’atni, kendo kik ikwanwa ka jonek kuom tho ng’at ma ok oketho, nimar gima osetimore en mana dwaroni.”" 
Jonah1:15 Kamano ne gikawo Jona, mi gibolo e nam, eka nam nokue." 
Jonah1:16 Bang’ mano jokwang’ noluoro Ruoth Nyasaye ahinya, mi ne gitimone misango, kendo gikuong’orene." 
Jonah1:17 To Ruoth Nyasaye nosechano ni mondo rech mang’ongo omwony Jona, omiyo Jona noriyo ei rechno ndalo adek, odiechieng’ gotieno." 
Jonah2:1 Jona nolamo Nyasaye gi ei rech, kowacho niya," 
Jonah2:2 “A Ruoth Nyasaye, ne aywakni ka an e masira, mi nidwoka. Naywak ka an e Piny Joma Otho mondo ikonya, mi niwinjo ywakna." 
Jonah2:3 Niluta e chuny nam mandiwa, mi ataro nolwora koni gi koni. Apaka gi ahiti duto nokadho kuoma." 
Jonah2:4 Naparo ni oriemba e nyimi, kendo ni ok nachak ane Hekalu mari maler." 
Jonah2:5 Pi nolwora, modwaro thung’a, nam matut noima chuth." 
Jonah2:6 Nadhi piny e tiend gode, mi buya mag nam nogajore e wiya. A Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasacha, nanimo e piny moro ma dhorangeyene olor nyaka chieng’. To kata kamano nigola e bur kangima." 
Jonah2:7 Kane chunya dwaro a, ne apari, A Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo lemona nochoponi e Hekalu mari maler." 
Jonah2:8 Joma lamo nyiseche manono nyalo weyo gik ma gigeno kuomgi," 
Jonah2:9 an to natimni misango, ka apaki gi wer. Anachul gima asingorani. Ruoth Nyasaye ema reso ji!”" 
Jonah2:10 Eka Ruoth Nyasaye nochiko rechno, mi ong’ogo Jona e dhonam." 
Jonah3:1 Ruoth Nyasaye nochako owuoyo gi Jona kendo, kowachone niya," 
Jonah3:2 “Wuogi, idhi Nineve, dala maduong’, mondo isiem jodalano gi wach ma abiro miyi.”" 
Jonah3:3 Kamano Jona nowuok modhi Nineve kaka Ruoth Nyasaye nochike. To Nineve ne en dala maduong’ gilala, moromo wuodh ndalo adek, kia tung’e koni nyaka kocha." 
Jonah3:4 Jona nodonjo e dala, mowuotho kuom odiechieng’ achiel. Eka nogoyo milome kama: “Bang’ ndalo piero ang’wen, ibiro ketho Nineve!”" 
Jonah3:5 Kane jo-Nineve owinjo gima Nyasaye nowacho, ne giyiego. Ne gigoyo milome mondo ji otue chiemo, kendo ne girwako piende gugru giduto, joma dongo gi joma tindo machalre." 
Jonah3:6 Kane ruoth owinjo wachno, noa malo e kome, molonyo lepe mag ruoth, kendo norwako pien gugru, mi obet e buru." 
Jonah3:7 Ruoth gi jodonge nogoyo milome e Nineve duto niya, “Onge dhano kata chiayo ma nobil chiemo kata dhi e kwath, kata mana modho pi." 
Jonah3:8 Nyaka girwakre gi pien gugru, kendo giywag ni Nyasaye gi tekregi duto. Ng’ato ka ng’ato mondo owe yorene maricho kaachiel gi timbene mag miero." 
Jonah3:9 Kamoro Nyasaye dipo ka olokore moweyo mirimbe, mi ok watho.”" 
Jonah3:10 Nyasaye noneno gima ne gitimo, mokaka ne giweyo yoregi maricho. Omiyo nolokore, mi ok okelo masira kuomgi kaka nosesiemogi." 
Jonah4:1 Wachno nojogo Jona ahinya, mi iye owang’." 
Jonah4:2 Omiyo nowacho ni Ruoth Nyasaye niya, “A Ruoth Nyasaye, kane pod an thurwa, donge nawacho ni ibiro timo gima kama? Mano emomiyo ne atemo ringo mondo adhi Tarshish, nikech nang’eyo ni in Nyasaye ma jang’wono, kendo makecho ji. Iyi ok wang’ piyo, kendo inyiso hera mosiko, bende chunyi lor a kuom kelo ni ji masira." 
Jonah4:3 Omiyo koro kaw ngimana, A Ruoth Nyasaye. Da ber katho, moloyo bet mangima!”" 
Jonah4:4 To Ruoth Nyasaye nopenje niya, “Bende iparo ni ber kikecho kamano?”" 
Jonah4:5 Jona nowuok modhi obet piny yo wuok chieng’ mar Nineve. Nogero kiru kanyo mobetie koyueyo chieng’, korito gima ditimre ni dalano." 
Jonah4:6 Ruoth Nyasaye nomiyo otangle otwi e wi tat kiruno, mondo okel tipo ma dimi Jona kue. Omiyo Jona nobedo mamor ahinya gi otangleno." 
Jonah4:7 To kinyne kane piny oru, Nyasaye nomiyo kudni ochwowo otangleno, mi otangle otwo." 
Jonah4:8 Kane chieng’ owuok, Nyasaye nokelo yamb ugue maliet, mi chieng’ ochamo wi Jona, kendo nong’no otere. Kuom mano, nogombo mondo otho, kowacho niya, “Da ber katho, moloyo bet mangima.”" 
Jonah4:9 To Nyasaye nopenje niya, “Iparo ni ber kikecho kuom tho otangle?” Nodwoko niya, “Ee, ber ka akecho, kata mana nyaka tho!”" 
Jonah4:10 Eka Ruoth Nyasaye nowachone niya, “Ka inyalo kecho otangle, mane otwi otieno achiel, to otho otieno machielo, mane ok ipidho, kata miyo dongo kamano," 
Jonah4:11 an to donge dakech Nineve, dala maduong’ man gi nyithindo moloyo alufu mia achiel gi piero ariyo, (120,000) kaachiel gi jamni mang’eny?”" 
Micah1:1 Kitabuni ondikie weche mane Ruoth Nyasaye omiyo Mika ja-Moresheth e fweny kuom Samaria gi Jerusalem e kinde loch Jotham gi Ahaz gi Hezekia, ruodhi mag Juda." 
Micah1:2 Winjuru un ogendini duto! Chikuru itu, un ji duto modak e piny! Ruoth Nyasaye nowuog e Hekalu maler, mondo onyis gik musetimo." 
Micah1:3 Ruoth Nyasaye biro wuok kar dane maler, kendo nolor piny, mowuothi ewi gode." 
Micah1:4 Gode biro leny e bwoye mana ka odok moket e mach. Giniruombre e holni mana ka pi mabubni e abururu. 
Micah1:5 Mago duto biro timore nikech jo-Israel oseketho, mi oweyo Nyasaye. Ere joma omiyo jo-Israel oweyo Nyasaye kamano? Gin mana jo-Samaria! Koso ere joma timo richo mar lamo nyiseche manono e piny Juda? Donge gin mana jo-Jerusalem?" 
Micah1:6 Kuom mano Ruoth Nyasaye wacho niya, “Abiro miyo Samaria dok gunda e pap, kama inyalo pidhoe mzabibu. Anang’iel kite mag dalano e holo mi awe mise mage tangalare." 
Micah1:7 Kido mopa mag nyisechegi ibiro toyo matindo tindo kendo wang’ gi mach, mi lokre pidhe mag yugi. Ji noloso nyiseche manono gi mwandu mane giyudo kuom weyo Nyasaye, omiyo koro gibiro yudo gima romre gi richo mar weyo Nyasaye.”" 
Micah1:8 Bang’e Mika nowacho niya, “Abiro ywak malit nikech wachni. Abiro wuotho gi tienda nono, kendo ka an duk, mondo anyisgo kuyo ma an go. Anahol ka dhiang’ kendo naywag ka tula" 
Micah1:9 nimar adhonde Samaria ok nyal chango. Kata mana Juda bende osebedo gi adhondego, nikech masira osechopo e dhoranga Jerusalem hie koma jowa odakie.”" 
Micah1:10 Kik unyis jo-Gath ni oselowa, bende kik uwe gine ka waywak. Bukreuru gi buru e dala mar Beth-afra." 
Micah1:11 Jo-Shafir idaro kitero e tuech duge, ka wigi okuot. To joma odak Zaanan ok nyal wuok ka ngima. Ka uwinjo jo-Bethezel ka ywak, to unung’e ni ng’ato ok nyal kuo kuno." 
Micah1:12 Jo-Maroth twenyore malit ka rem ramo, kendo gidwaro resruok, nikech Ruoth Nyasaye osekelo masira machiegni gi dhoranga Jerusalem." 
Micah1:13 Un joma odak Lakish, tueuru fareseu e geche lweny. Ne uluwo timbe maricho mag Israel, mi umiyogo jo-Jerusalem odonjo e richo." 
Micah1:14 Koro un jo-Juda gouru oriti ni dala mar Moresheth-gath, nikech ruodhi mag Israel ok noyud konyruok e dala mar Beth-akzib." 
Micah1:15 Un jo-Maresha, Ruoth Nyasaye wacho ni obiro ketou e lwet wasigu ma biro kawo dalau. Ruodh Israel biro dhi pondo e rogo man Adulam." 
Micah1:16 Un jo-Juda, pwodhuru wiu obed ranyisi ni uywago nyithindo muhero. Ee, lokreuru rabonde ka achudhe, nikech nyithindugo ibiro mau." 
Micah2:1 Enobed marach manade ni joma riere e kitanda ka paro timo timbe maricho! Gichiew ka piny yawore mondo gitim richogo, nikech ging’eyo ni gin gi teko mar timo kamano." 
Micah2:2 Ka gidwaro lop ng’ato, to gikawo akawa gi thwon. To kata ka gidwaro udi, to mago bende gikawo akawa. Gimayo ji kata mana utegi kaachiel gi mwandugi, mi giwegi nono." 
Micah2:3 Omiyo Ruoth Nyasaye wacho niya, “Achano kelo masira kuomu, kendo enochal lodi e ng’utu ma ok unyal gonyo. Ok unuchak uwuothi ka uchung’ tir, nikech kindeno nobednu kinde marach." 
Micah2:4 Ka kindeno ochopo, to ji nogou ngero, ka wero wend ywak niya, ‘Otiekwa chuth! Ruoth Nyasaye osekawo pinywa, mi omiyo joma oketowa e tuech!’" 
Micah2:5 Kuom mano, onge ng’ato kuomu ma biro yudo lowo chieng’ ma ipoge kendo ni Ruoth Nyasaye.”" 
Micah2:6 Ji lwera, kawachona niya “Kik ilwerwa! We lwerowa gi weche ma kamago. Masira ma kamano ok bi makowa!" 
Micah2:7 Iparo ni okwong’ jo-Israel koso? Bende Ruoth Nyasaye dikechi, mi tim gik ma kamago adier? Donge en ema owuoyo maber gi joma timbegi ni kare?”" 
Micah2:8 To Ruoth Nyasaye dwoko niya, “To donge un ema uselokoru wasik joga? Joma duogo gi kue kaa e lweny ka paro ni masira orumo, umayo lopegi." 
Micah2:9 Uriembo mond joga e mier ma gihero, kendo gueth moa kuoma usemayo nyithindgi nyaka chieng’." 
Micah2:10 Auru malo mondo udhi! Ka eri ok en kama onego uyuee. Ubiro rado gi masira. 
Micah2:11 Aneno ni janabi ma ji ohero en mana ng’at ma lworore e kor gweng’, gi weche mag miriambo, kokoro ni ji ni gibiro yudo divai gi kong’o mang’eny." 
Micah2:12 “To un jo-Israel modong’ abiro chokou kanyakla mana ka rombe manie abila, kata ka kweth manie lek. Koko nogore e pinyu nikech ng’eny mar ji." 
Micah2:13 Jal ma noyawnigi rangach ema nogolgi oko. Ginipusre e dhorangach, mi gitony. Ruodhgi, ma en Ruoth Nyasaye owuon, ema notelnigi ka giwuok.”" 
Micah3:1 Un jotend Israel winjuru! Donge en tichu, ng’ado bura makare?." 
Micah3:2 To kata kamaano, umon gi gima ber, kendo uhero mana gima rach! Usando joga malit mana ka ondiek makidho rombo kendo yuyo ring’o oko kuom choke," 
Micah3:3 kata ka ng’ato maturo chok chiayo, kendo kango ring’o mondo otedi, ocham!" 
Micah3:4 Kinde biro ma unuywagie ni Ruoth Nyasaye, to ok nodwoku, kata mana winjo lemou ok nowinji, nikech timbe maricho musetimo." 
Micah3:5 Ruoth Nyasaye wacho niya, “Jonabi wuondo joga ka nyiso joma miyogi gik moko ni gibiro yudo kue, to joma ok migi gimoro, to gibwogo ni gibiro kelonigi lweny." 
Micah3:6 Kuom mano ok ginichak giyud fweny moro gotieno, kendo ok ginichak gibed gi teko mar koro wach. Ler ma gineno nolokre mudho, kendo wang’chieng’ biro podhonigi." 
Micah3:7 Joma koro wach wigi biro kuot, nikech Nyasaye ok dwokgi.”" 
Micah3:8 To an, Roho mar Ruoth Nyasaye opong’a, momiya teko gi rieko kod chir mar nyiso jo-Israel richogi." 
Micah3:9 Winjuru, un jo-Israel mochayo timbe makare, kendo ma loko adiera bedo miriambo." 
Micah3:10 Ugero Jerusalem, dala Nyasaye, gi remo kendo e yo mamono." 
Micah3:11 Jodong dala ng’ado bura maber mana ni joma miyogi asoya; jodolo bende lero tiend chik ni joma miyogi gimoro, kendo jonabi hulo gik ma gikoro mana ka omigi pesa. To eka pod gineno ni Ruoth Nyasaye biro konyogi! Giwacho niya, “Donge Ruoth Nyasaye ni kodwa? Omiyo onge masira moro mabiro makowa.”"
