Micah3:12 Gik mutimo ma kamagogo biro miyo ipuro Sayun ka puodho, mi Jerusalem lokre gunda, kendo god Hekalu lokre bungu." 
Micah4:1 E ndalo mabiro, got ma Hekalu ochung’ie nobed mabor moloyo gode moko duto, kendo ogendini mang’eny nodhi kanyo." 
Micah4:2 Giniwach niya, “Waidhuru god Ruoth Nyasaye mondo wadhi e Hekalu mar Nyasach Israel. Enopuonjwa yorene, mi wanaluwgi.” Puonj mar Ruoth Nyasaye wuok Jerusalem. Ee, Sayun e kama owuoyoe gi joge." 
Micah4:3 Enong’ad bura, ka othego ogendini, kendo enoyal weche mag ogendini marateke modak kuonde maboyo. Ng’ato ka ng’ato nothedh liganglane mondo obed kwer, kendo tongegi ginithedhi rabetni. Onge oganda moro ma noked gi oganda machielo, kendo ji ok nochak opuonjre lweny." 
Micah4:4 To ng’ato ka ng’ato nodag e dalane gi kue, koyueyo e tipo yiend mzabibu mare kod ng’ope, ma onge gima goye kibaji. Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto ema osesingore kamano." 
Micah4:5 Oganda ka oganda lamo nyasache kendo tiyone. Wan to wabiro lamo Ruoth Nyasachwa, kendo en ema wabiro tiyone nyaka chieng’." 
Micah4:6 Ruoth Nyasaye wacho niya, “Kinde biro ma abiro chokoe joma ne akumo, tiende ni joma ne oter e tuech mi othagore." 
Micah4:7 Ging’ol kendo osedargi mabor gi pinygi, to kata ginok kamano, to abiro miyo gibed oganda maduong’, kendo abiro bedo ruodhgi e got Sayun, chakre chieng’no nyaka chieng’.”" 
Micah4:8 Omiyo in Jerusalem, dala ma Nyasaye ritoe joge, ibiro bedo dala maduong’, kendo loch mane in go chon biro duogoni." 
Micah4:9 Ere gima omiyo iywak matek? Ionge gi ruoth koso? Koso ionge gi joma ding’adni rieko, momiyo rem chami malit ka dhako ma muoch kayo?." 
Micah4:10 Un jo-Jerusalem, rudhreuru arudha e lowo kuywak mana ka dhako manywol, nimar nyaka koro ua e dalau udhi udag oko e thim, kiterou Babulon, kuma Ruoth Nyasaye nokonyoue, kendo noresue kuom wasiku." 
Micah4:11 Ogendini mathoth osechokore mondo omonju, ka wacho niya, “Jerusalem nyaka kethi! Wadwaro nenogo kokethore, mondo wagone siboi!”" 
Micah4:12 To ogendinigo ok ong’eyo gima Ruoth Nyasaye paro. Gikia ni ochano chokogi mondo okumgi, mana kaka ichoko cham midwaro dino!" 
Micah4:13 Mano emomiyo Ruoth Nyasaye wacho niya, “Un jo-Jerusalem, chakuru kumo wasiku! Abiro miyo ubedo maratego ka rwath ma tunge tek ka nyinyo, kendo ma tiende chalo chuma. Ubiro nyono ogendini mang’eny, kendo unuwalna mwandugi kod gik ma giseyako, obed maga, an Ruoth Nyasaye ma ruodh piny ngima.”" 
Micah5:1 Un jo-Jerusalem, ng’oluru dendu manyiso ni un gi kibaji, nimar wasikwa olworowa, kendo gigoyo lemb jatend Israel gi luth." 
Micah5:2 Bethlehem Efratha, in e dala matinie moloyo miech Juda duto. To kuomi ema jatend Israel biro wuokie, ma anywolane nitie nyaka nene." 
Micah5:3 Kuom mano, Ruoth Nyasaye biro weyo joge e lwet wasikgi nyaka dhako ma muoch kayo nywol wuode. Bang’e jowete wuowino modong’ mak otho e tuech, noduogi mi chak riwre gi jowetegi." 
Micah5:4 To wuowino nobi, mi nobed jatend joge, koritogi gi teko kod duong’ moa kuom Ruoth Nyasaye. Joge nodag maber, nikech ji duto manie piny noyie lochne," 
Micah5:5 mi enobed ng’at makelo kue. Ka jo-Asuria omonjo pinywa, mi omwomo miechwa mochiel motegno, to wanaor jotendwa marateke moloyo, mondo oked kodgi," 
Micah5:6 mi giniketh piny Asuria gi lweny. Ginireswa ka jo-Asuria monjo pinywa. 
Micah5:7 Jo-Israel modong’ mak otho nochal ni ogendini mang’eny ka koth ma Ruoth Nyasaye okelo ni cham, nikech dhano ok nyal kelo koth, to Nyasaye ema kele." 
Micah5:8 Ee, jo-Israel motony nobed e kind ogendini mana ka sibuor ma dwaro le e bungu, kata madwaro rombe e lek. Ka odonjo kuom rombe to opodho kuomgi kendo okidhogi matindo tindo ma onge ng’ama resogi." 
Micah5:9 Jo-Israel biro loyo wasikgi mi tiek pep. 
Micah5:10 Ruoth Nyasaye wachonu un jo-Israel niya, “E kindeno ananeg fareseu kendo naketh gecheu mag lweny." 
Micah5:11 Anaketh miechu, mi amuk kuondeu duto mochiel motegno mag siro lweny." 
Micah5:12 Abiro ketho timbe ajuoke duto, kendo ok nuchak ubed gi jokor wach kata achiel." 
Micah5:13 Abiro ketho nyiseche manono gi sirni milamo, kendo ok unuchak ulam gik ma uloso uwegi." 
Micah5:14 Abiro muko sirni milamo e pinyu, mi aketh miechu," 
Micah5:15 to bende abiro chulo kuor gi mirimba mager ni ogendini ma ok oseluora.” 
Micah6:1 Winjuru kaka Ruoth Nyasaye yalo jo-Israel. A Ruoth Nyasaye, bi mondo ihul wachni ka gode winjo kendo bedo joneno." 
Micah6:2 Un gode, kendo un mise mochwere mag piny, winjuru weche ma Ruoth Nyasaye dwaro yalo, nikech en gi bura gi joge, kendo obiro yalo kodgi." 
Micah6:3 Ruoth Nyasaye wacho niya, “Un joga, ere gima asetimonu? Ere kaka asemiyo ubedo mool? Dwokauru!" 
Micah6:4 Nene agolou e piny Misri, kendo aresou e tich bedo wasumbni, Ne aoro Musa gi Arun kod Miriam mondo otelnu." 
Micah6:5 Un joga, parieuru gima ne Balak ruodh Moab ochano timonu. Kendo kaka Balaam wuod Beor nodwoke. Bende parieuru gik mane otimore e yo, kua Shitim udhi Gilgal, mana ni mondo ung’e timbe madongo mane atimo mondo aresugo.”" 
Micah6:6 Ang’o ma dakel ni Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach polo, ka abiro mondo alame? Dakel nyiroye ma hikgi achiel achiel mondo awang’ne ka misango?" 
Micah6:7 Koso Ruoth Nyasaye dibed mamor ka akelone rombe gana gi gana, kata ka akelone mor zeituni mamol ka aora? Koso onego achiw nyathina makayo ka misango mondo achulgo richona?" 
Micah6:8 To, in dhano, Ruoth Nyasaye osenyisi yo maber monego iluw. Odwaro mondo itim gik makare, kendo iher ji gi ng’wono, bende iluor Ruoth Nyasachi gi chunyi mamuol." 
Micah6:9 Luoro Ruoth Nyasaye en rieko. Ruoth Nyasaye luongo jo-Jerusalem niya, “Winjuru, un joma ochokore e dalani." 
Micah6:10 Mwandu muyudo e yor miganga ema opong’o ut joma richo. Gipimo gik moko gi rapim ma ok ni kare, ma ok adwar." 
Micah6:11 Bende uparo ni anyalo weyo ni joma tiyo gi rapim ma ok ni karego richogi? 
Micah6:12 Joma jomoko manie dalani mayo joma odhier. Gin jomriambo mosiko ka hango wach ahanga. 
Micah6:13 To koro asechako goyou gi goch malit mondo atieku nikech richou. 
Micah6:14 Kuom mano, unuchiem to ok unuyieng’, kendo kech pod nokau akaya. Ka ugolo gik moko e uteu mondo upandi, to ok unyal. To kapo ni ureso gimoro, to abiro miyo okethre e lweny!" 
Micah6:15 Ubiro chuoyo, to ok unuka cham, kendo ubiro biyo zeituni, mi uyud mo, to ok unukonyru gi morno. Bende unulos divai, to ok unumadhi." 
Micah6:16 Useluwo timbe maricho mag ruodh Omri, gi mag dhood Ahab, kendo pok uweyogi. Omiyo abiro tiekou, mi jou bed joma ichayo. Adier, ogendini mamoko duto biro mana charou.”" 
Micah7:1 A yaye! Koro achalo ng’ama kech kayo, mobiro pono olemo, to oyudo ka yath odong’ nono, ma onge olemo minyalo cham kata mana ng’owo mamitna manyak atamalo." 
Micah7:2 Ji moluoro Nyasaye oserumo e piny Israel, kendo onge kata ng’at achiel makare modong’. Ji duto kichore ni chuero remo, kendo ng’ato ka ng’ato chiko mana ni wadgi obadho." 
Micah7:3 Gitimo timbe maricho gi chunygi duto. Jodongo kwayo gik moko mondo omigi, kendo jong’ad bura chamo asoya, bende jotelo golo chik mana kaka gin ema gihero." 
Micah7:4 Kuom mano, kata mana timbegi mabeyo kendo modimbore obam, kendo chalo mana gi bunge motimo kuthe. To koro chieng’ ma Nyasaye kumogie osechopo, mana kaka jonabi mage ne osiemogi ni enotim. Omiyo koro kihondko omakogi." 
Micah7:5 Kik iyie gi weche wadu, kendo kik igen kuom osiepeni, to bende nyaka itang’ ni weche miwacho kata mana ni chiegi." 
Micah7:6 E ndalogi yawuowi jaro wuonegi, nyiri bende kwedo minegi, kendo mond yawuowi kwedo weg utegi. Kamano wasik ng’ato gin mana joodgi." 
Micah7:7 An to abiro manyo Ruoth Nyasaye. Abiro rito Nyasaye jawarna, kendo Nyasacha biro winjo wachna." 
Micah7:8 Yaye wasika, kik ogona siboi, nikech kata obedo ni asepodho, to abiro chung’ kendo. Kata obedo ni adak e mudho, to Ruoth Nyasaye nobedna ler." 
Micah7:9 Aseketho e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye omiyo ayie mirimbe nyaka ochwaka, mi ong’adna bura maber, kendo ogola oko e ler, mi ane ni otimo gima kare kaka nosingore." 
Micah7:10 Bang’e wasika mane penja ni, ‘Ere Nyasachi nogono?’ None gima osetimore, mi wigi nokuodi. Eka ananegi ka oselogi, kendo onyon-gi piny ka chuodho ma e wang’ yo." 
Micah7:11 E ndalo gogo, un jo-Jerusalem unuchak uger ohingau, kendo unuyar tong’ pinyu," 
Micah7:12 mi jou noduog iru koa kuonde duto. Ginia Asuria yo wuok chieng’, kod Misri, yo milambo, kendo ginia e dho nembe gi gode duto." 
Micah7:13 To piny nokethre, mi lokre thim, nikech timbe maricho mag joma odakie." 
Micah7:14 A Ruoth Nyasaye, rit jogi miseyiero, kaka jakwath kawo luth, kendo kwayogo jambe. Gidak mana kendgi e thim, ka piny momew olworogi koni gi koni. To we mondo gikwa e lege mag Bashan gi mag Gilead, kaka ne gitimo chon." 
Micah7:15 Timnwa honni kaka nitimo e kinde mane iwuokie Misri. 
Micah7:16 Ogendini one honnigo, mondo luoro omakgi, kata obedo ni gitek kamano. Giniling’ thi, kendo ok giniwinj gimoro." 
Micah7:17 Gininang’ lowo mana ka thuol, kendo giniwuog kuonde ma gipondoe mana ka gik malak piny. Giniduog ir Ruoth Nyasachwa ka giluor kendo ka gitetni." 
Micah7:18 A Ruoth Nyasaye, onge Nyasaye moro maromo kodi. Iweyo ni jogi iwuon modong’ richogi, kendo ok ikechi nyaka chieng’, to iherowa gi hera mosiko." 
Micah7:19 Inichak ikechwa kendo, mi inyon richowa e tiendi, kendo inyumgi e bwo nam." 
Micah7:20 Initim gima kare, kendo iniher jo-Israel ma nyikwa Ibrahim gi hera mosiko, mana kakane isingori ni kwerewa chon." 
Nahum1:1 Ma e fweny mane Nyasaye omiyo Nahum ja-Elkosh kuom dala mar Nineve. 
Nahum1:2 Ruoth Nyasaye en Nyasaye ma janyiego kendo ma jachul kuor gi mirimbe mager. Okano mirima e chunye mondo ochulgo ni wasike kuor. 
Nahum1:3 Iye ok wang’ piyo, to en gi teko mathoth. Chutho ok onyal weyo joricho mak okumo. En gi yore moluwo ei kalausi kendo ei ahiti, bende boche polo e buru monyono." 
Nahum1:4 Kogolo chik, to nembe gi aore duono, mi lokre lowo motwo. Lege mabeyo mag Bashan gi Karmel two, kendo bunge mang’ich man Lebanon wang’." 
Nahum1:5 Gode madongo gi matindo tetni e nyime, kendo leny nono. Piny duto kod joma odakie bende tungni." 
Nahum1:6 En ng’a manyalo chomo mirimb Ruoth Nyasaye tir? Koso ere ng’ama nyalo siro gero ma en-go? Mirimbe o oko mana ka aora mar mach, kendo lwendni barore abara e nyime." 
Nahum1:7 Ruoth Nyasaye ber. En e kar konyruok mar adier ni joma dwaro mondo okonygi ka gin e thagruok, bende ong’eyo ji duto mogeno kuome," 
Nahum1:8 kendo oresogi e ohula ma raywoyi. Joma opiem kode to otieko chuth, kendo oriembogi koterogi e mudho." 
Nahum1:9 Un jo-Asuria ere gima omiyo upiem gi Ruoth Nyasaye? Obiro tiekou en owuon! Joma mon kode ok nohedhre piem kode kendo! 
Nahum1:10 Giduto giniwang’ pep mana ka kudho mochoki, kata ka tiang’ motwo." 
Nahum1:11 Ng’at machach ni kuomu machano gik maricho kuom Ruoth Nyasaye," 
Nahum1:12 To Ruoth Nyasaye wacho niya, “Kata obedo ni wasigu ng’eny kendo rateke, to ibiro negogi, mi girum chuth. To un jo-Juda, kata obedo ni asandou, to ok anachak asandu kendo." 
Nahum1:13 Koro abiro chodo nyororo motueugo, mi agolu e tich misumba." 
Nahum1:14 Ruodh Asuria to awachone kama: ‘Asegolo chik mondo nyingi orum chuth! Yawuoti ok nobed ruodhi kari, kendo abiro ketho nyisecheni manie hekalu mari, mi ananegi nikech in gima nono!’ ”" 
Nahum1:15 Neyeuru kaka jaote ringo kalor e gode kakelo wach maber mar kue. Owacho niya, “A yaye, un jo-Juda, timuru sewni mau, kendo chiwuru ni Ruoth Nyasaye gik mane usekuong’oru ni unuchiw, nimar joma richo ok nochak olou kendo, nikech osetiekgi chuth.”" 
Nahum2:1 Un jo-Israel ma nyikwa Jakobo, Ruoth Nyasaye biro dwokonu duong’ ma yande un go, kata obedo ni joma monjou oseyakou, mi okawo olemb mzabipu. Un jo-Nineve, oganda lweny mag wasiku ma ketho gik moko oselworou moketou diere. Ranguru yo, kendo jiwreuru gi tekou duto!" 
Nahum2:2  
Nahum2:3 Jolwenjgi oserwakore gi nengni makwar, kendo kuodigi kwar ka remo. Gechegi mag lweny oriedo, kendo rieny mana ka wang’chieng’!" 
Nahum2:4 Giringo ka gimwomore e alap mar dala, ka moro ka moro tuomore gi wadgi. Gichalo gi meny ma ng’angni kendo gimil e dir dala mana ka polo." 
Nahum2:5 Ruodh Nineve kok ka golo chik ni jotende. Gichwanyore ka gireto, kendo girikni mondo gidhi gichan jolwenjgi e ohinga." 
Nahum2:6 To dhorangeye mag aore molworo dala oseyawore, kendo kibaji goyo joka ruoth." 
Nahum2:7 Chi ruoth ogol oko duk, moter e tuech, kendo jotichne duto manyiri ywak malit komako wigi." 
Nahum2:8 Nineve koro chalo gi yawo ma pige dwono, nikech jolwenje duto ringo weye. Okoknigi kowacho ni, “Chung’uru!” To onge ng’ama duogo." 
Nahum2:9 Mwandu mag fedha gi dhahabu oyaki, kendo nenore ni ging’eny ma ok rum. Gin mwandu mabeyoe moloyo ma chuny ng’ato nyalo gombo." 
Nahum2:10 Mago duto oyaki motieki, ma onge gima odong’. Kibaji goyo joge, kendo chongegi tuomore ka gitetni, kendo wengegi olokore makwar haa!" 
Nahum2:11 Koro tinde ere dala mane ong’ere kaka gond sibuor, kama thuondi ne nitie, kendo kama mon gi nyithindo ne odakie ka onge gima giluoro?" 
Nahum2:12 Nineve ne chalo gi sibuor. Nonego wasike mondo opidhgo nyithinde kod monde, mi opong’o dalane kod mieche mamoko gi mwandu moyaki kaachiel gi wasumbni." 
Nahum2:13 Ruoth Nyasaye wacho niya, “Asedoko mamon kodi, kendo abiro wang’o gecheni mag lweny! Nyithindi duto biro tho e lweny, kendo gik moko duto mane iyako nomayi. Bende dwond jotendi mioro ok nowinji.”" 
Nahum3:1 Mano kaka inine marach yaye dala Nineve! In dala momienore gi remo kendo ma miriasia gi gik moyaki opong’o. 
Nahum3:2 Winjie kaka del michwadogo farese ywak, kendo kaka geche mag lweny ringo matek ka tiendegi wuo! Tiend faras diko piny matek, kendo geche lweny chikore ka mwomore." 
Nahum3:3 Ligengni gi tonge ng’ang’ni, kendo mil. Joma otho okadho akwana, kendo ringregi odhurore pidhepidhe kuonde duto. Ji chwanyore achwanya kuomgi." 
Nahum3:4 Mago duto otimore nikech timbeni modwanyore. Ne in dala ma jaber, to ipong’ gi timbe mag juok. Ne indhogo ogendini gi timbeni mag juok gi mag dwanyruokgo." 
Nahum3:5 Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto wacho niya, “Amon kodi, kendo abiro elo lepi nyaka malo e ng’uti mondo ogendini duto one dugi, mi wiyi kuodi." 
Nahum3:6 Abiro bolo kuomi gik mochido modwanyore ka akuodo wiyi, mondo ji duto onyieri." 
Nahum3:7 Ji duto moneni nobwogi, ka wacho niya, ‘Mano kaka Nineve okethore malich!’ To kata kamano, onge ng’ama noho chunyi. Chutho ere kama diyudie ng’ama diywagi?”" 
Nahum3:8 In iparo ni ditony moloyo jo-Amon, dala mane ni e but aora Nael, ka pi olworo koni gi koni ka ohinga?" 
Nahum3:9 Jo-Ethiopia gi jo-Misri ne e tekre, kendo ne gin gi teko mathoth. Jo-Put kod jo-Libya bende ne konye." 
Nahum3:10 To kata kamano, en bende ne oloye, mi omak joge moter e tuech. Nyithind dalano ne ochwad piny e akek yore, mi otho, kendo ne ogo ombulu mondo ong’ego joma dikaw jotende ka wasumbni. Jodongo mage duto bende ne otue gi nyororo." 
Nahum3:11 Kamano e kaka in Nineve bende ibiro kwang’ ka ng’at momer, mi piny chami, kendo inimany kar tony kiringo wasigu." 
Nahum3:12 Kuondeni duto mochiel motegno mag siro lweny nopodhi. Notiekgi mana ka ng’owo mokwongo chiek, ma lwar e dho joma yiengo yath." 
Nahum3:13 Jolwenji nodok manyap ka mon. Dhorangeye mag pinyi noyawre malach ni wasigu, kendo mach nowang’gi pep." 
Nahum3:14 Ikreuru ni ageng’a mabiro. Umburu pi kendo nyonuru lowo, unywasi mondo ogogo matafari mang’eny ulosgo kuonde mag siro lweny obed motegno." 
Nahum3:15 To e kinde ma utimoe gigo, mach nowang’u, mi tieku pep, kendo ligangla nonegu, mi wasigu notieku mana ka nyithi bonyo ma chamo gik moko duto ma giyudo. Kata obedo ni unywoloru ka dede kamano, to unulal nono mana kaka rumbi mar dede mahuyo kendo lal nono." 
Nahum3:16 Jou ma johala ng’eny ka sulue ma e polo," 
Nahum3:17 kendo jodongu kod jotendu chokore kaachiel mana ka dede mopoto e chiel ka koyo ng’ich. To giduto gibiro ringo mi gilal nono mana ka det bonyo ma ringo ka chieng oowo piny, kendo onge ng’ama ong’eyo kuma gidhiye." 
Nahum3:18 A yaye ruodh Asuria, jodongi oriere piny kotho, bende jogi oke e kor gode ka onge ng’at machokgi." 
Nahum3:19 Adhondeni ok nyal chango, nimar gidhi marach. Ji duto mowinjo gima otimoreni biro pamo lwetgi gi mor, nimar onge kata ng’at achiel e piny ngima ma pok isebedo kisando." 
Habakkuk1:1 Ma e wach mane Ruoth Nyasaye onyiso janabi Habakuk e fweny. 
Habakkuk1:2 A Ruoth Nyasaye, nyaka karang’o ma anyalo ywaknie mondo ikonywa, to ok iwinja? Aywakni ka awacho niya, ‘Masira’, to ok ireswa." 
Habakkuk1:3 Ere gima omiyo iweyo aneno chandruok machalo kamano? Koso ang’o momiyo iweyo aneno timbe mamonogi? Mecho kod timbe machach ema aneno, kendo miero gi lweny olwora koni gi koni." 
Habakkuk1:4 Kuom mano ji ok luw chik, kendo buche ok yal gi adiera, nimar joma timbegi mono thoth, mohewo joma kare. Mano emomiyo adiera iloko aloka." 
Habakkuk1:5 Ruoth Nyasaye ne odwoka niya, “Winjuru un joma andhokegi! Gimoro biro timore ma ubiro wuoro kendo biru bwogou, nimar abiro timo gimoro e ndalou, ma ok unuyie kinyisou." 
Habakkuk1:6 Abiro kelo jo-Babulon, ma oganda mager kendo ma jomrima! Giwuotho e piny ngima ka gimayo jomoko nono miechgi." 
Habakkuk1:7 Gin joma ger marach, kendo gitimo mana gima gin ema gidwaro to onge ng’ama geng’ogi." 
Habakkuk1:8 Faresegi jong’wech moloyo kwach, kendo ger moloyo ondiegi mawuotho ka piny oselil. Joidh faresegi a kuma bor, kendo gihuchore mana ka ongo ma yudho gima omako," 
Habakkuk1:9 kendo joma temo geng’ogi, leny nono koneno kaka gilich. Gichoko ji ma gimako mang’eny mana ka kuoyo." 
Habakkuk1:10 “Gijaro ruodhi kod jodonggi, bende giseyo kuonde mochiel motegno mag siro lweny, nikech gidhuro pidhe mag lowo, ma giidhogo ohinga, kendo gimuko kuonde mochiel motegnogo." 
Habakkuk1:11 Bang’e gikadho piyopiyo mana ka yamo, ka gidhi kamoro machielo. To kata kamano gin joketho nikech gikwano tekregi giwegi ka nyasachgi.”" 
Habakkuk1:12 A Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasacha kendo ma Ng’ama Ler, donge in e Nyasaye ma nyaka nene kendo mochwere? A Ruoth Nyasaye ma Lwandawa, in ema iketo jo-Babulon mondo okumwa king’adonwa bura." 
Habakkuk1:13 In to iler ma ok inyal yie neno richo, kata yie neno timbe mamono. Koro ere gima omiyo irango aranga joma andhokegi, to ok itim gimoro? Koso ang’o momiyo iling’ aling’a ka joma richo tieko joma kare moloyogi." 
Habakkuk1:14 Koro imiyo ji chalo mana gi rech ma e nam, kata gi gik malak piny, ma onge gi jotelo." 
Habakkuk1:15 Jo-Babulon mako ji mana kaka jolupo mako rech gi olowu, kendo ywayogi gi tol ka mor." 
Habakkuk1:16 Bang’e gikulore ni tondegigo kendo giwang’onigi ubani ka giwacho niya, “Magi e nyiseche ma kelonwa mwandu, momiyo wadak maber.”" 
Habakkuk1:17 A Nyasaye, koro ibiro weyo gitimo kamano nyaka chieng’ ka ginego ogendini anega, to ok idew?" 
Habakkuk2:1 Abiro chung’ kara. Adier, abiro chung’ ewi kama oger mabor mar ng’icho, mi arit mondo ane ane gima Nyasaye biro dwoka kuom ywakna." 
Habakkuk2:2 Eka ne Ruoth Nyasaye odwoka kama: “Ndik wach mibiro yudo e fweny, kigoro maler e kite mopa, ma ng’ato nyalo somo mayot, mi ring nyis joma moko." 
Habakkuk2:3 To fweny mibiro yudono nigi kinde moketne, kendo ka kindeno ochopo, to gigo notimre mana ma piyopiyo mak orem. Kata ka ineno ni odeko, to rite arita, nikech notimre maonge kiawa, kendo mana e kinde mowinjore.”" 
Habakkuk2:4 Koro ma e fweny nogo: Ng’at ma chunye ok ni kare nopodhi, to ng’at makare nobed mangima nikech adierane." 
Habakkuk2:5 Andhoke ma jo-Babulon sungore, to ok ginidhi maber. Gisechoko ogendini mang’eny moa e pinje mopogore opogore, ka wuoro omakogi, to ok ginyal yieng’." 
Habakkuk2:6 To kinde biro ma joma koro gimakogo nong’ong’nigi, kawachonigi niya, “Unune malit, un jomecho ma doko momew gi mwandu moyaki kod gik mohol.”" 
Habakkuk2:7 Donge joma uholo gik moko biro bandhou gigo? Koso donge gibiro tucho apoya, mi giteng’u nyaka udong’ nono, mi ubed wasumbgi?" 
Habakkuk2:8 Kaka ne uyako ogendini mang’eny, e kaka ogendini duto bende noyaku, nikech remo mane uchuero kod timbe mahundu mane utimo e piny kendo e mier, kusandogo joma odakie." 
Habakkuk2:9 Unune malit, un muyudo mwandu e yo marach, mondo ugergo dalau kama oting’ore ma wasigu ok nyal monjoue." 
Habakkuk2:10 Tim musetimo kutieko ogendini mang’eny biro kelonu wichkuot, mi ket ngimau e masira." 
Habakkuk2:11 Kata mana kite manie kor utu noywagrenu, kendo yien manie tetu nodwokgi!" 
Habakkuk2:12 Mano kaka unune malit, un joma gero mier gi pesa moyud kuom nek gi mecho." 
Habakkuk2:13 Donge Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto osewacho ni gik ma ogendini mamoko oseyudo gi luchgi nowang’, mi lal nono?" 
Habakkuk2:14 Kinde biro chopo ma joma ong’eyo duong’ mar Ruoth Nyasaye nopong’ie piny ka, mana ka pi mopong’o nam." 
Habakkuk2:15 Unune malit, un joma sando jopinje makiewo kodu, mi kwang’ ka joma omer, mana ni mondo unyiergi ka giwuotho duk." 
Habakkuk2:16 To un bende duong’ ma un go biro lokore wichkuot, nikech ubiro madho kikombe ma mirimb Nyasaye opong’o mi ukwang’. Ee, Nyasaye biro kumou malit mi unubed gi wichkuot marach kar duong’ mane un-go." 
Habakkuk2:17 Timbe mahundu, mane utimo ni Lebanon, kendo nek mane unegogo le man kuno nodog e wiu, kendo nomi udhier nono, nikech usechuero remo e piny kendo e mier, bende usetimo timbe mahundu ni joma odakie duto." 
Habakkuk2:18 Ere ohala muyudo kuom lamo nyiseche manono ma lwet dhano ema oloso? Gin mana kido mamiyo ji lal. Ere ohala ma ng’at molosogi yudo kuomgi? Chutho oloso mana nyiseche manono ma ok nyal wuoyo! 
Habakkuk2:19 Unune malit, un joma wacho ni yath mopa mondo ochiew, kendo ma kwayo kidi mondo oa malo. Bende gik makamago dikelnu wach moa kuom Nyasaye adier? Obawgi gi fedha kod dhahabu, kendo gionge gi ngima." 
Habakkuk2:20 Ruoth Nyasaye to nie Hekalu mare. Piny duto mondo oling’ thi e nyime! 
Habakkuk3:1 Ma e lemo mar Habakuk janabi: 
Habakkuk3:2 A Ruoth Nyasaye, asewinjo humbi, kendo timbeni miya luoro. Chak itim timbeni machon mana e ndalogi, kendo kata obedo ni ikecho kamano to ng’wonnwae." 
Habakkuk3:3 Nyasaye biro koa Teman. Ee, Ng’ama Ler biro koa got Paran. Duong’ne maler opong’o kor polo kaachiel gi piny." 
Habakkuk3:4 Othinyore ka ler mar okinyi, kendo meny ariyo rieny e bathe koni gi koni. Kor polo kanyo e kama opandoe duong’ne maler." 
Habakkuk3:5 Tho malich otelo e nyime, to dera luwo bang’e." 
Habakkuk3:6 Ka ochung’ to piny yiengni, kendo ka ong’icho, to ogendini kirni, bende gode duto ma nyaka nene barore kendo nimo. Pod owuotho mana kaka ne owuotho chon." 
Habakkuk3:7 Aneno ka kihondko malich omako jo-Kushan gi jo-Midian, madak e hembe." 
Habakkuk3:8 A Ruoth Nyasaye, mirima omaki gi aore koso? Koso ikecho gi nam, ma omiyo ibiro kiidho fareseni kod gecheni ma ilochogo?" 
Habakkuk3:9 Igolo atung’ oko, kendo ipong’o olalo gi asere. Imiyo ohula baro piny," 
Habakkuk3:10 bende ka gode orangi, to tetni ka luoro omako. Ohula mwomo ka ridore, kendo nam matut wuo matek ka apaka gingore." 
Habakkuk3:11 Wang’ chieng’ gi due ochung’ achung’a keregi, ka gineno polo ka mil, mana ka gima gin aserni gi tong’ magi." 
Habakkuk3:12 Iwuotho e piny gi gero, kendo inyono ogendini piny gi mirima." 
Habakkuk3:13 Ibiro mondo ires jogi, kaachiel gi ruoth miseyiero. Iseketho od jaricho, chakre tado nyaka dier ot, kimuko mise mare chuth." 
Habakkuk3:14 Wasikwa nobiro ka kalausi, kaparo ni biro tiekowa, mana kaka inyalo tieko ng’at modhier man kar kende. To kata kamano ne itiekogi mana gi gilwenjegi giwegi." 
Habakkuk3:15 Ka ingado nam gi fareseni, to apaka madongo gingore." 
Habakkuk3:16 Ka awinjo gigi to kibaji goya, kendo dhoga tetni. Chokena duto nyosore, kendo tiendena kirni ka luoro ohewa. Ahora mos, karito chieng’ ma masira biro makoe joma monjowa." 
Habakkuk3:17 Kata obedo ni ng’owo ok thiew, kendo mzabibu gi zeituni ok nyagi, bende puothe ok chieg cham, kendo rombe gi dhok onge dala," 
Habakkuk3:18 to pod anamor amora kuom Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo anabed moil kuom Nyasaye jawarna." 
Habakkuk3:19 Ruoth Nyasaye e tekra. En ema omiyo tienda bedo mayot ka tiend mwanda, mondo awuothgo kuonde moting’ore." 
Zephaniah1:1 Ma e wach Ruoth Nyasaye mane obiro ni Zefania wuod Kushi ma wuod Gedalia, ma wuod Amaria ma wuod Hezekia, e ndalo Josia wuod Amon, ruodh Juda." 
Zephaniah1:2 Ruoth Nyasaye wacho niya, “Abiro yweyo gik moko duto manie piny, mi lal nono." 
Zephaniah1:3 Abiro tieko dhano kaachiel gi le, bende abiro tieko winy ma e kor polo, kod rech ma e nam. Abiro goyo joma timbegi mono piny, mi atiek koth dhano chuth. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano." 
Zephaniah1:4 “Abiro kumo jo-Juda kod jo-Jerusalem duto, mondo atiek tich lamo Baal duto mitimo ka, mi kata mana nying jodolo manono ok nowinji." 
Zephaniah1:5 Bende abiro tieko ji maidho ewi udi, kendo kulore piny kalamo gik manie kor polo, Kod joma lama an Ruoth Nyasaye, to kendo kuong’ore gi nying Milkom, nyasaye manono," 
Zephaniah1:6 kaachiel gi joma oselokona ng’egi, kendo ok manya kata kwaya mondo akony.”" 
Zephaniah1:7 Ling’uru thi e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, nimar odiechienge chiegni. Ruoth Nyasaye oseloso misango, kendo osepwodho wende." 
Zephaniah1:8 Owacho niya, “Ka chieng’ ma atimoe misango ochopo, to anakum joka ruoth kod jotendgi madongo, kaachiel gi joma luwo timbe jopinje mamoko." 
Zephaniah1:9 Chieng’no abiro kumo jogo duto mamiel e laru mar Hekalu, kendo mapong’o od ruodhgi gi timbe mahundu kod timbe mag wuond." 
Zephaniah1:10 “Chieng’no, ywak nowinjre e dharangach miluongo ni Dhoranga Rech, kendo e bath dala koma nyien, bende koko maduong’ nogore e gode," 
Zephaniah1:11 kendo ji modak e dala mamwalo noywagi, nimar joohala duto orumo, kendo joma loko ohand fedha otiek pep." 
Zephaniah1:12 “Chieng’no anamany Jerusalem, kamenye gi taya, mi akum joma osiko katimo atima richo, kendo wacho ni Ruoth Nyasaye ok bi timo gimoro kata matin." 
Zephaniah1:13 Mwandugi noyaki, kendo miechgi nokethi. Giniger udi, to ok ginidagie, kendo ginipidh mzabibu, to ok ginimadh divachgi.”" 
Zephaniah1:14 Odiechieng’ mang’ongo mar Ruoth Nyasaye chiegni. En odiechieng’ marach, kendo obiro koringo piyopiyo, moloyo jalweny ma jang’wech." 
Zephaniah1:15 Chieng’no en chieng’ bura, kendo en chieng’ ywagruok gi rem, bende en chieng’ kethruok gi lal, kod mudho gi kuyo, kaachiel gi rumbi molil kod ong’ueng’o malich. En chieng’ ma tung’ ywakie," 
Zephaniah1:16 kendo sigich lweny winjoree e mier mochiel motegno, kendo kuonde moger maboyo mag ng’icho." 
Zephaniah1:17 Ruoth Nyasaye owacho niya, “Abiro kelo ni ji thagruok malich, kendo ginituomre atuoma ka muofni, nikech richo ma gisetimo e nyima. Rembgi nochuer ka pi, kendo ringregi noriere, ka tow e lowo." 
Zephaniah1:18 Fethgi kata dhahapgi ok noresgi.” Chieng’ ma Ruoth Nyasaye ng’adoe bura, nyiego mager ma en-go nowang’ piny duto, mi tiek pep. Kamano enotiek gik moko duto modak e piny mana ka diemo wang’." 
Zephaniah2:1 Chokreuru kanyakla, un oganda ma onge gi wichkuotni," 
Zephaniah2:2 ka pok oteru kuma bor, mi ulal nono ka mihudhi! Ee, chokreuru, kapok Ruoth Nyasaye okelo mirimbe mager kuomu, kata kapok chieng’ mirimbe ochopo." 
Zephaniah2:3 Dwaruru Ruoth Nyasaye un jogo duto modak e piny, kobolore kendo korito chikene. Bende dwaruru tim makare, bende beduru gi chuny mamuol nimar dipo ka uyudo kar konyruok, chieng’ mirimb Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Zephaniah2:4 Dala mar Gaza ibiro we nono. Ashkelon bende biro dong’ gunda, kendo jo-Ashdod ibiro riembo mana odiechieng’ tir. Ekron to ibiro dhuolo gi lop tiende." 
Zephaniah2:5 Mano kaka unune malit, un jo Kereth modak e dhonam! Ruoth Nyasaye wuoyo kuomu niya, “Un jo-Filistia, abiro dwoko pinyu piny. Abiro kethe mi aweye ka onge ng’ama odakie," 
Zephaniah2:6 kendo obiro dong’ mana kama jokwath kende ema kwayoe, kendo kama rombe ema nindoe." 
Zephaniah2:7 Jo-Juda modong’ ema nobed weg piny man e dhonam. Ginikwa jambgi e dhonam kuno, kendo giniyue e ut jo-Askelon gotieno, nimar an Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachgi, abiro konyogi, mi adwoknigi gueth mane gin-go chon." 
Zephaniah2:8 “Asewinjo ayany ma jo-Moab yanyogo joga gi ajara ma jo-Amon jarogigo, bende aseneno kaka gidonjo e lop joga manie tong’gi." 
Zephaniah2:9 “Kuom mano, an Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasach Israel, akuong’ora gi nyinga awuon, ni Moab biro chalo gi Sodom, to Amon nochal gi Gomora, mi gibed kuonde ma aila gi bugni mag pundo ema opong’o, kendo mokethore nyaka chieng’. Joga modong’ noyakgi mi kaw pinygi.”" 
Zephaniah2:10 Mano ema nobed pok ma giniyud kuom sunga ma gin go, nikech ne giyanyo jo-Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto, ka gikawore malich." 
Zephaniah2:11 To Ruoth Nyasaye biro thinyore mondo okumgi marach! Obiro nego nyiseche duto mag piny gi kech, mi ji duto modak e pinje mae dhonembe kod chulni nokulre ka lame, ng’ato ka ng’ato e dalane." 
Zephaniah2:12 Un jo-Ethiopia bende ligangla mar Ruoth Nyasaye nonegu," 
Zephaniah2:13 kendo norie bade kuom piny man yo nyandwat, motiek Asuria, kendo olok Nineve piny motwo mana ka piny ongoro." 
Zephaniah2:14 Kueth mag jamni nogudre kuno, kaachiel gi le duto mag thim. Achuth gi otenga bende nobed kayueyo ewi sirni modong’ kochung’ kuno, kendo tula kod agak noywagi e dirise kod dhoudi, bende yien mabeyo mane obawgo kor udi nodong’ kong’iengore." 
Zephaniah2:15 Ji nopenjre niya, “Koro ma e dala mane mor, kendo ogeno kuom lochne cha adier? Koso en e dala mane sungore e chunye kawacho niya, ‘Anie kende, kendo onge moro maromo koda’? To koro okethore chuth, mi olokore mana kama le mae thim ema odakie, kendo ng’ato ang’ata ma kadho kanyo wuoro, ka tang’o lwete.”" 
Zephaniah3:1 Mano wach malit manade kuom dala Jerusalem, ma jasand ji, kendo monyorore ma japiem!" 
Zephaniah3:2 Ne ok onyal yie kwer mane ikwerego, kendo ne odagi winjo puonj. Bende ne ok oyie kuom Ruoth Nyasaye, kata mana sudo machiegni kode ne ok osudo." 
Zephaniah3:3 Jotende ne chalo gi sibuoche ma ruto e iye, kendo ruodhi mage ne chalo gi ondiegi mawuotho gotieno, ma ok we piny ru ni gimoro ka pok gitieko," 
Zephaniah3:4 Jonabi mage ne joyiem, kendo ne ok gin jonabi madiera, bende jodolo mage ne ok dew gik mowal ni Nyasaye, kendo ne giketho chik." 
Zephaniah3:5 To Ruoth Nyasaye man Jerusalem timo mana gik makare. Ok otim gimoro marach to ong’ado bura gi adiera okinyi kokinyi mak olewo ngang’. Jaricho to wiye ok kuodi. 
Zephaniah3:6 Ruoth Nyasaye wacho kama: “Aseyweyo ogendini ka yuech, kendo ohingni ma gigeng’orego okethore chuth. Asemiyo wang’yoregi olokore thim ma onge ng’ama luwo. Miechgi bende okethore, kendo odong’ nono ma onge joma odakie." 
Zephaniah3:7 Ne aparo ni jo-Jerusalem diwinj chikna, omiyo ne awachonigi niya, ‘Luorauru, kendo winjuru puonjna.’ To kata kamano ne giketo chunygi mana kuom timo timbegi mamono." 
Zephaniah3:8 “Kuom mano an Ruoth Nyasaye, awachonu niya, ‘Ritauru! Adier, rituru chieng’ ma abiro chung’ie ka ayalou, nimar asechano choko ogendini kod dhoudi kanyakla, mondo aol kuomgi mirimba duto maliet ka mach, kendo mabiro wang’o piny duto ma tiek pep." 
Zephaniah3:9 Bang’e anapwodh dho ji mondo an Ruoth Nyasaye ema gilama, ka gitiyona gi chuny achiel." 
Zephaniah3:10 Joga malama kendo moke loka aora mag Ethiopia, nobi kakelona mich." 
Zephaniah3:11 Chieng’no, in Jerusalem ok niyud wichkuot kuom timbeni mamono mane ipiemgo koda, nimar e kindeno anagol jogi ma josunga kendo ma jong’ayi, mi ok nichak isungri kendo e goda maler." 
Zephaniah3:12 To joma nawe nobed joma odhier kendo mathagore. 
Zephaniah3:13 Jo-Israel modong’ noyud kar resruok e nying Ruoth Nyasaye. Ok ginichak gitim timbe mamono, kendo weche mag miriambo miwuondogo ji ok nowuog e dhogi, nimar ginichal gi rombe machiemo kendo nindo piny, ma onge ng’ama bwogo.’ ”" 
Zephaniah3:14 Un jo-Sayun, koguru gi mor! A jo-Israel, gouru mahu matek! Ee, beduru mamor gi chunyu duto, yaye, jo-Jerusalem," 
Zephaniah3:15 nimar Ruoth Nyasaye oseriembo wasiku, motero kuma bor. Ruoth Nyasaye ma Ruodh Israel nie kindu, omiyo ok unuchak uluor masira." 
Zephaniah3:16 Wach ma nobi ni Jerusalem chieng’no e ma: A jo-Sayun, kik ubed maluor, kendo kik uwe lwetu nyosre." 
Zephaniah3:17 Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu nie kindu, mondo oritu maber mana ka jalweny. Obiro bedo mamor nikech un, mi ochak onyisu herane, kower gi mor nikech un, mana kaka ne otimo chon." 
Zephaniah3:18 Ruoth Nyasaye wacho niya, “Abiro golo masiche oko kuomu, mi ok ginimiu wichkuot kendo." 
Zephaniah3:19 Winjuru! Ka kindeno ochopo, to anakum joma thirou. Anakony rang’onde, kendo anachok joma oke, mi alok wichkuot mane joga nigo obed pak gi huma e piny ngima." 
Zephaniah3:20 Ka kinde ochopo monego achokue, to anakelu dala. Anamiu pak kod huma e kind ogendini duto mae piny, ka adwokonu gueth mane un-go chon, mana kuneno. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano.”" 
Haggai1:1 Chieng’ mokwongo mar due mar auchiel e higa mar ariyo mar loch Darius, Ruoth Nyasaye nokelo ni janabi Hagai wach mondo onyis Zerubabel wuod Shealtiel, ma jatend piny Juda, gi Joshua wuod Jehozadak, jadolo maduong’ niya," 
Haggai1:1 Chieng’ mokwongo mar due mar auchiel e higa mar ariyo mar loch Darius, Ruoth Nyasaye nokelo ni janabi Hagai wach mondo onyis Zerubabel wuod Shealtiel, ma jatend piny Juda, gi Joshua wuod Jehozadak, jadolo maduong’ niya," 
Haggai1:2 “Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto wacho kama: Ogandani wacho ni kinde pok ochopo mar chako gero Hekalu mara.” 
Haggai1:3 Bang’e Ruoth Nyasaye nochako ooro wach ni Hagai janabi mondo openj jo-Israel niya," 
Haggai1:4 “Bende ma en kinde maber adier monego un uwegi udag e utu mugero mabeyo, ka Hekalunani to omukore kama?" 
Haggai1:5 Mano emomiyo koro an Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto awacho ni, nonuru timbeu!" 
Haggai1:6 Usechuoyo mathoth, to ukayo matin, bende uchiemo to ok uyieng’. Umetho to ok romu, kendo urwakoru to koyo pod chamou achama. Jatich tiyo kendo chamo msara, to oketo pesane mana e mifuko motuch." 
Haggai1:7 “Emomiyo an Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto awacho kama: Nonuru timbeu! 
Haggai1:8 Dhiyouru e gode mondo ukel yien ugergo Hekalu ma amorgo, kendo kama duong’na maler nyalo nenoree." 
Haggai1:9 Ugeno yudo gik mathoth, to uyudo mana manok. Ka ukelo cham dala, to akudhogi kucha. An Ruoth Nyasaye apenjo ni, ‘Uparo ni atimo kamano nikech ang’o?’ To adwokou kama: ‘Atimo kamano nikech Hekaluna odong’ gunda, ka un to, ng’ato ka ng’ato nigi ode owuon motimoe gige." 
Haggai1:10 Mano emomiyo polo otwo, ma koth ok chuenu, kendo piny otho ma ok nyag gimoro." 
Haggai1:11 Asehono oro mondo otwo piny kaachiel gi gode, mi cham gi mzabibu kod zeituni, gi gik moko duto ma piny nyago, ner, mondo kech omak dhano gi jamni kendo oketh tije duto ma dhano oloso.’ ”" 
Haggai1:12 Zerubabel wuod Sheatiel, gi Joshua wuod Jehozadak jadolo maduong’, kaachiel gi ji moko duto mane oa e tuech nowinjo weche Ruoth Nyasaye, kaachiel gi weche mane Hagai owacho kane Ruoth Nyasachgi oore, mi luoro maduong’ nomakogi e nyim Ruoth Nyasachgi." 
Haggai1:12 Zerubabel wuod Sheatiel, gi Joshua wuod Jehozadak jadolo maduong’, kaachiel gi ji moko duto mane oa e tuech nowinjo weche Ruoth Nyasaye, kaachiel gi weche mane Hagai owacho kane Ruoth Nyasachgi oore, mi luoro maduong’ nomakogi e nyim Ruoth Nyasachgi." 
Haggai1:13 Kuom mano, Hagai jaote mane Ruoth Nyasaye ooro, nonyiso ji weche mane Nyasaye omiye, kowacho niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye owacho ni en kodu.”" 
Haggai1:14 Bang’ mano Ruoth Nyasaye nojiwo chuny Zerubabel wuod Shealtiel ma jatend piny Juda, gi chuny Joshua wuod Jehozadak, jadolo maduong’, kod chuny ji mamoko mane oa e tuech," 
Haggai1:14 Bang’ mano Ruoth Nyasaye nojiwo chuny Zerubabel wuod Shealtiel ma jatend piny Juda, gi chuny Joshua wuod Jehozadak, jadolo maduong’, kod chuny ji mamoko mane oa e tuech," 
Haggai1:15 mi ne gibiro mi gichako gero Hekalu mar Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto ma Nyasachgi, due piero ariyo gang’wen, due mar auchiel." 
Haggai2:1 Due piero ariyo gachiel, due mar abiriyo e higa mar ariyo mar loch ruoth Darius, weche mane Ruoth Nyasaye owacho gi dho janabi Hagai e magi:" 
Haggai2:2 “Penj Zerubabel wuod Shealtiel ma jatend Juda gi Joshua wuod Jehozada, jadolo maduong, kod joma moko duto niya," 
Haggai2:2 “Penj Zerubabel wuod Shealtiel ma jatend Juda gi Joshua wuod Jehozada, jadolo maduong, kod joma moko duto niya," 
Haggai2:3 ‘Bende nitie ng’ato modong’ kuomu duto mane oneno Hekaluni kapod nigi duong’ne machon? Ka kamano, to tinde onene kochal nadi? Donge ochalnu ka gima onge?’" 
Haggai2:4 Bang’e nyis Zerubabel gi Joshua wuod Jehozadak jadolo maduong’ kod ji moko duto mondo ojiwre obed motegno. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano.” Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto owacho ni, “Chakuru achaka tich, nikech an kodu," 
Haggai2:4 Bang’e nyis Zerubabel gi Joshua wuod Jehozadak jadolo maduong’ kod ji moko duto mondo ojiwre obed motegno. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano.” Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto owacho ni, “Chakuru achaka tich, nikech an kodu," 
Haggai2:5 kendo Roho mara ni kuomu. Kik ubed maluor," 
Haggai2:6 nikech awacho kama: Gimoro achiel kende ema odong’; en ni abiro yiengo polo gi piny kod nam. 
Haggai2:7 Bende anayieng ogendini duto, mi mwandugi duto nobi ka, mi anapong’ Hekalu gi duong’ maler. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano." 
Haggai2:8 An e wuon fedha, kendo an e wuon dhahabu." 
Haggai2:9 Duong’ ma Hekaluni biro bedogo achien nolo duong’ mane en go mokwongo, kendo anakel kue gi gueth ka. An Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto awacho kamano.”" 
Haggai2:10 Due piero ariyo gang’wen, due mar ochiko, e higa mar ariyo mar loch Darius, wach Ruoth Nyasaye mane obiro gi dho janabi Hagai e ma:" 
Haggai2:11 Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto owacho kama “Nyis jodolo mondo odwok wach ma apenjogini. 
Haggai2:12 ‘Ka nga’to oting’o ring’o mowal ni tich Nyasaye e riak lawe, mi riak laweno ogere e makati, kata e kado, kata e divai, kata e mo, kata e chiemo moro amora, to gima ogere kuomeno bende didok mowal ni tich Nyasaye koso?’ ” Eka Hagai nopenjo jodolo wachno, mi gidwoke ni, “Ooyo.”" 
Haggai2:13 Hagai nodhi nyime kapenjogi niya, “To ka ng’ato omulo ringre ng’at motho, mi koro odoko mogak, bang’e ogere kuom gimoro, koro gino bende didok mogak koso?” Jodolo nodwoke niya, “Dodok mogak.”" 
Haggai2:14 Eka Hagai nowacho niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye wacho kama: Mano e kaka jo-Israel, kod gik moko duto ma gitimo, chalo. Mano emomiyo gik moko duto ma gichiwona e Hekaluni ogak." 
Haggai2:15 To paruru ane gima biro timore chakre kawuono. Kane pok uchako gero Hekalu mar Ruoth Nyasaye kendo, to ere kaka ne uchalo?" 
Haggai2:16 Donge kane ng’ato obiro kama ochokie cham, ka oparo ni obiro yudo gunde piero ariyo, to ne oyudo mana apar kende?" 
Haggai2:17 Ne aketho chambu duto gi dera marach kod pe, to kata kamano ne ok uduogo ira. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano.”" 
Haggai2:18 “Paruru, chakre kawuono, due piero ariyo gang’wen due mar ochiko, ma en odiechieng’ moketie mise mar Hekalu mara." 
Haggai2:19 Adier, chakre kawuono paruru matut mondo une ane ka pod cham dibed matin, kata kapod mzabibu gi komamanga kod zeituni ok dinyag olemo. Ooyo, ok nobed kamano, nikech chakre kawuono abiro guedhou.”" 
Haggai2:20 Chieng’ due piero ariyo gang’wenno, wach Ruoth Nyasaye nochako obiro ni Hagai niya," 
Haggai2:21 “Nyis Zerubabel jatend Juda ni abiro yiengo polo gi pinyu. 
Haggai2:22 Analok loch ruodhi, mi aketh teko mag pinje mamoko, kendo anago geche mag lweny piny, kaachiel gi joithgi. Ng’ato ka ng’ato noked gi wadgi, mi farese kod joma idhogi nonegi." 
Haggai2:23 To chieng’no anakawi, in jatichna Zerubabel wuod Shealtiel kendo anami ibed ruodh jogo, nikech in ema aseyieri. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano.”" 
Zechariah1:1 E due mar aboro, higa mar ariyo mar loch ruoth Darius, wach Ruoth Nyasaye nobiro ni janabi Zekaria, wuod Berekia ma wuod Iddo, kawacho niya," 
Zechariah1:2 “Ruoth Nyasaye nokecho ahinya gi kwereu. 
Zechariah1:3 Emomiyo wach ni ji ni Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto owacho kama: Duoguru ira mondo an bende aduog iru. 
Zechariah1:4 Kik ubed machal gi kwereu mane jonabi machon ywaknigi kawacho ni, ‘Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto wacho niya, “Weuru yoreu maricho kod timbeu mamono mondo uduog ira.” ’ To ne ok gichiko itgi kata dewo wechena ne ok gidewo. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano." 
Zechariah1:5 Ang’eyo ni unyalo penja ni kwereu ni kanye, kata ni jonabigo pod ngima?" 
Zechariah1:6 To donge wechena gi chikena mane amiyo jotichna ma jonabi mondo osiemgo kwereu ne otimore, mi masira omakogi? Koso donge ne gilokore mi giweyo timbegi maricho, ka giwacho niya, ‘Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto osetimonwa kaka nochano. Adier, osetimonwa mana maromre gi timbewa.’ ”" 
Zechariah1:7 Due piero ariyo gang’wen, due mar apar gachiel miluongo ni Shebat, e higa mar ariyo mar loch Darius, wach Ruoth Nyasaye nobiro ni Zekaria janabi, wuod Berekia ma wuod Iddo mi nowacho kama:" 
Zechariah1:8 Nende aneno fweny gotieno ni ng’ato oidho faras masilwal, kochung’ e kind yien e holo moro. To kadieng’eye ne nitie farese ma silwende gi marabuore kod marachere." 
Zechariah1:9 Kane anenogi kamano, ne apenjo malaika moro mane oyudo wuoyo koda niya, “Jaduong’, magi ang’o?” Ne odwoka ni, “Abiro nyisi tiendgi.”" 
Zechariah1:10 Eka ng’at mane ochung’ e kind yienno nowacho niya, “Mago e joma Ruoth Nyasaye oseoro mondo owuothi e piny ngima koni gi koni.”" 
Zechariah1:11 Bang’e jogo nodwoko malaika mane ochung’ e kind yien niya, “Wasewuotho e piny ngima koni gi koni, mi wanwang’o ni okue kendo oboch.”" 
Zechariah1:12 Eka malaika mar Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho niya, “A Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto, nyaka karang’o ma ibiro betie ka ok idewo Jerusalem kaachiel gi mier mag Juda, ma isebedo kikechogo kuom higni piero abiriyogi?”" 
Zechariah1:13 Ruoth Nyasaye nodwoko malaika mane osebedo kawuoyo koda, kohoyo chunye gi weche mabeyo." 
Zechariah1:14 Kuom mano, malaikano nowachona niya, “Dhiyo inyis ji ni weche Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto e magi: ‘Hera maduong’ ma aherogo Jerusalem gi Sayun miya mirima." 
Zechariah1:15 Akecho ahinya gi ogendini ma neno maber, nikech kane pok mirima omaka ahinya gi joga to ne gisandogi moloyo kaka owinjore." 
Zechariah1:16 Emomiyo an Ruoth Nyasaye awacho kama: Aseduogo Jerusalem gi ng’wono mondo akeche. Omiyo kanyo ema ibiro chako igeroe oda, kaachiel gi udi mamoko duto.’ ”" 
Zechariah1:17 To bende malaikano nowachona ni mondo anyis ji ni, Ruoth Nyasaye wacho kama: “Miecha duto biro pong’ gi gik moko mabeyo, mi anachak aho Sayun, kendo anatim Jerusalem dala ma ayiero.”" 
Zechariah1:18 Ne ating’o wang’a mi aneno tunge ang’wen. 
Zechariah1:19 Eka ne apenjo malaika mane wuoyo koda ni, “Magi to ang’o?” Ne odwoka ni “Gin ruodhi mosekeyo jo-Juda gi jo-Israel kod jo-Jerusalem.”" 
Zechariah1:20 Bang’e Ruoth Nyasaye nonyisa jotheth ang’wen," 
Zechariah1:21 mi apenjo gima gibiro timo. Ne odwoka niya, “Gisebiro mondo gibwog kendo gilo tunge ang’wen-go. Tungego gin ruodhi mane okeyo jo-Juda, ma onge kata ng’at achiel mane nyalo ting’o wiye.”" 
Zechariah2:1 Ne ating’o wang’a mi aneno ng’ato koting’o tond pimo e lwete. 
Zechariah2:2 Ne apenje kuma odhiye, mi odwoka ni odhi pimo Jerusalem, mondo one ane kaka borne gi lachne onego obedi." 
Zechariah2:3 Kane malaika mane awuoyogo owuok dhi, malaika machielo nothinyore kabiro romone, mowachone niya," 
Zechariah2:4 “Ring idhi iwachne wuowi man gi rapimno ni Jerusalem biro bedo dala maonge gi ohinga, nikech ji mabiro dakie kaachiel gi jamni nobed mang’eny mohinge." 
Zechariah2:5 Ruoth Nyasaye owacho ni obiro bedone ohinga mar mach molwore, kendo obiro bedone duong’ maler e diere.”" 
Zechariah2:6 Ruoth Nyasaye wacho niya, “Ne akeyou e tunge ang’wen mag piny, to koro auru, uring ua e piny ma yo nyandwat." 
Zechariah2:7 Adier, ringuru, un jo-Sayun modak Babulon.”" 
Zechariah2:8 Ruoth Nyuasaye Manyalo Gik Mooko Duto oherou malich ahinya, ma ka ng’ato mulou, to ng’atno soko mana wang’a owuon. Emomiyo Ruoth Nyasaye mane oora gi ote maduong’ ir ogendini ma noyakou owacho kama:" 
Zechariah2:9 “Abiro goyogi, mi uyakgi, un joma ne tiyonigi.” Kamano unung’e ni Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto ema ne oora." 
Zechariah2:10 Ruoth Nyasaye wacho kama: “Un jo-Sayun, koguru matek, kendo beduru mamor, nikech abiro mondo adag e kindu.”" 
Zechariah2:11 Chieng’no ogendini mang’eny nobi ir Ruoth Nyasaye mi bed joge kendo enodag e kindu 
Zechariah2:12 Eka unung’e ni kara Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto ema ne oora iru. Ruoth Nyasaye biro chako kawo piny Juda kendo ka mare owuon e piny maler mi ochak otim Jerusalem dala moyiero. 
Zechariah2:13 Ji duto mondo oling’ e nyim Ruoth Nyasaye, nimar osechiew, moa kar dakne maler." 
Zechariah3:1 Bang’e Ruoth Nyasaye nonyisa Joshua, jadolo maduong’, kochuny e nyim malaika mar Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo ne aneno Satan bende kochung’ e bad Joshua korachwich, mondo odonjne." 
Zechariah3:1 Bang’e Ruoth Nyasaye nonyisa Joshua, jadolo maduong’, kochuny e nyim malaika mar Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo ne aneno Satan bende kochung’ e bad Joshua korachwich, mondo odonjne." 
Zechariah3:2 Eka malaika mar Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Satan niya, “Yaye Satan, Ruoth Nyasaye mondo okweri! Adier, Ruoth Nyasaye moseyiero Jerusalem obed mare owuon, mondo okweri! Ng’atni donge chalo gi yien moyudhi kaliel e mach?”" 
Zechariah3:3 Noyudo ka Joshua ochung’ e nyim malaikano korwakore gi lewni mochido. 
Zechariah3:3 Noyudo ka Joshua ochung’ e nyim malaikano korwakore gi lewni mochido. 
Zechariah3:4 Malaikano nowacho ni joma ochung’ e nyime niya, “Lonyneuru lewni mochidogo oko.” Eka nowacho ni Joshua niya, “Neye kaka asegolo richoni oko kuomi! Koro abiro rwaki gi lewni mabeyo.”" 
Zechariah3:4 Malaikano nowacho ni joma ochung’ e nyime niya, “Lonyneuru lewni mochidogo oko.” Eka nowacho ni Joshua niya, “Neye kaka asegolo richoni oko kuomi! Koro abiro rwaki gi lewni mabeyo.”" 
Zechariah3:5 Nomedo wacho niya, “Sidhneuru kilemba e wiye”. Omiyo ne gisidhone kilemba maler, kendo girwakone lewni maler, ka malaika mar Ruoth Nyasaye ochung’ kanyo." 
Zechariah3:6 Bang’e malaika mar Ruoth Nyasaye nochiko Josha gi teko niya. 
Zechariah3:7 “Ruoth Nyasaye owacho kama: Ka iwuotho e yorena, kendo imako chiknani, to inibed gi loch e Hekalu mara, kendo inirit alwora mar Hekalu, bende anamiyi thuolo mar donjo e nyima kaachiel gi joma tiyonagi." 
Zechariah3:8 Koro yaye Joshua jadolo maduong’, in kaachiel gi jowadu mobet e nyima ka, chikuru itu. Un duto un ranyisi maber mar gik mabiro. Abiro kelo jatichna miluongo ni Badyath." 
Zechariah3:8 Koro yaye Joshua jadolo maduong’, in kaachiel gi jowadu mobet e nyima ka, chikuru itu. Un duto un ranyisi maber mar gik mabiro. Abiro kelo jatichna miluongo ni Badyath." 
Zechariah3:9 Aseketo kidi man gi bethe abiriyo e nyim Joshua, kendo an awuon abiro ndiko kuome weche mawacho niya, ‘Abiro tieko richo mag pinyni e odiechieng’ achiel." 
Zechariah3:9 Aseketo kidi man gi bethe abiriyo e nyim Joshua, kendo an awuon abiro ndiko kuome weche mawacho niya, ‘Abiro tieko richo mag pinyni e odiechieng’ achiel." 
Zechariah3:10 Chakre chieng’no un duto unudag e miechu gi kue, ka ng’ato ka ng’ato luongo wadgi mondo odhi olime. An Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik moko Duto ema awacho kamano.’ ”" 
Zechariah4:1 Bang’e malaika mane osebedo ka wuoyo koda nodwogo mochiewa, mana ka ng’ama ochiew e nindo." 
Zechariah4:2 Ne openja niya, “Ineno ang’o?” An to ne adwoke niya, “Aneno rachung taya mar dhahabu man gi tawo e wiye. Rachung tayano oting’o teyni abiriyo, kendo taya ka taya nigi kuonde abiriyo mirwakoe kitambi." 
Zechariah4:3 Bende aneno yiend zeituni ariyo e bathe, ma moro nie dir tawo korachwich, to machielo nie dire koracham.”" 
Zechariah4:4 Bang’e napenjo malaika mane wuoyo koda niya, “Jaduong’, magi to ang’o?”" 
Zechariah4:5 Malaika nodwoka kapenja ni, “Ikia gigi adier?” To ne adwoke ni, “Ooyo jaduong’, ok ang’eyogi.”" 
Zechariah4:6 Eka nowachona niya, “Ruoth Nyasaye wacho ni Zerubabel kama: ‘Gik moko matimore ok timre kuom teko kata kuom nyalo, to gitimore kuom Roho mara. An Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto ema awacho kamano.’" 
Zechariah4:7 Kata da bed ni thagruok mochomo Zerubabel dongo ka gode, to ginipie ka pewe. En ema obiro keto kidi matieko gero Hekalu, ka ji kok niya, ‘Mano kaka Hekalu ber! Ruoth Nyasaye mondo oguedhe.’ ”" 
Zechariah4:8 To bende wach Ruoth Nyasaye nobirona niya," 
Zechariah4:9 “Kaka Zerubabel ema oseketo mise mar Hekalu, e kaka en bende ema obiro tieke. Kamano unung’e ni Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto ema ne oora iru." 
Zechariah4:10 Adier, kawuono wachako tijni mana marachrach, to en ng’a ma dihedhre chaye, nikech ji nobed mabor koneno Zerubabel koting’o rapim migedogo e lwete.”" 
Zechariah4:11 Malaikano nowachona niya, “Teyni abiriyogo gin wenge mag Ruoth Nyasaye marango piny ngima.”" 
Zechariah4:12 Bang’e ne apenjo malaikano niya, “Yiend zeituni ariyo manie bath rachung taya koni gi konigi, nyiso ang’o?”" 
Zechariah4:13 Ne odwoka kopenja niya, “Donge ing’eyo tiend gigo?” An to ne adwoke ni, “Ooyo, jaduong’.”" 
Zechariah4:14 Bang’e nowachona niya, “Mago gin ji ariyo mowal ni tij Ruodh piny ngima.”" 
Zechariah5:1 Ne ating’o wang’a, mi aneno kalatas moban kahuyo e kor yamo." 
Zechariah5:2 Eka malaika cha nopenja niya, “Ineno ang’o?” Ne adwoke ni “Aneno kalatas moban kahuyo. Borne oromo mita apar, to lachne mita abich.”" 
Zechariah5:3 Bang’e nowachona niya, “Mano en kuong’ ma lak e piny ngima. Weche mondik e bath kalatasno konchiel biro tieko jokuo duto, kendo weche mondik e bathe komachielo notiek ji duto ma kuong’ore gi miriambo." 
Zechariah5:4 Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto wacho ni, ‘Anaor kuong’no e ut jokuo duto, kende e od ng’ato ang’ata makuong’ore gi miriambo e nyinga. Kuong’no nosik e udigo, mi tiekgi pep, koda ka yien gi kite mogergigo.’ ”" 
Zechariah5:5 Malaika mane wuoyo koda cha ne oduogo ira mowachona niya, “Ting’ wang’i mondo ineye gima birono kaka chalo.”" 
Zechariah5:6 Ne apenje ni en ang’o, mi odwoka ni en atonga ma opong’ gi richo duto motim e piny ngima." 
Zechariah5:7 Eka raum mapek molos gi chuma mane oumgo atongano noelore, mi apo ka aneno dhako mobet piny." 
Zechariah5:8 Malaika nowachona niya, “Dhakono e richo.” Eka ne odhiro dhakono, modwoko ei atonga, mi ochako oumo dhoge gi raum mapekno." 
Zechariah5:9 Bang’ mano ne aneno mon ariyo mahuyo e kor yamo, ka biro irwa gi buombe machalo buombe ogungo. Ne gikawo atonga, mi gidhigo e kor polo malo." 
Zechariah5:10 Eka ne apenjo malaika mane wuoyo koda cha kuma giteroe atongano. 
Zechariah5:11 Nodwoka niya, “Gitere e piny Babulon mondo ogerne ot kuno, kendo ka oseger odno, to norenj atongano kare molosne kanyo.”" 
Zechariah6:1 Ne achako ating’o wang’a, mi aneno geche lweny ang’wen ka wuok e kind gode ariyo. To godego ne mag mula." 
Zechariah6:2 Gari mokwongo ne nigi farese ma silwende, to mar ariyo ne nigi maratenge." 
Zechariah6:3 Mar adek to ne nigi farese marachere, kendo mar ang’wen ne nigi marang’eye." 
Zechariah6:4 Ne apenjo malaika mane oyudo wuoyo koda cha niya, “Jaduong’, magi to ang’o?”" 
Zechariah6:5 Eka nodwoka ni, “Magi gin yembe ang’wen mag polo mowuok e nyim Ruodh piny ngima, kuma gisebedoe ka gitiyoe.”" 
Zechariah6:6 Gari man gi farese maratengeno dhiyo e piny ma yo nyandwat, to mano man gi farese marachere dhiyo e piny ma yo imbo man iye mogik, kendo mano man gi farese marang’eye dhiyo e piny Babulon man yo milambo. To kane farese marang’eye wuok," 
Zechariah6:7 ne gigombo dhi wuotho e piny duto. Omiyo Ruoth Nyasaye nowachonigi niya, “Dhiuru uwuoth e piny koni gi koni.” Mi ne gitimo kamano." 
Zechariah6:8 Eka ne oluonga monyisa niya, “Winji! Mago madhi yo nyandwatgo osemiyo chunya olendo gi piny ma nyandwatno.”" 
Zechariah6:9 Bang’e wach Ruoth Nyasaye nobirona niya," 
Zechariah6:10 “Kaw fedha gi dhahabu kuom joma ne omak moter e tuech, ma nyinggi Heldai gi Tobia kod Jedaya, ma joseduogo koa Babulon, mondo idhiyo e od Josia wuod Zefania mana chieng’ mikawogieno." 
Zechariah6:11 Kaw fedha gi dhahabugo mondo ilosgo osimbo, isidh ewi Joshua wuod Jehozadak jadolo maduong’," 
Zechariah6:11 Kaw fedha gi dhahabugo mondo ilosgo osimbo, isidh ewi Joshua wuod Jehozadak jadolo maduong’," 
Zechariah6:12 kiwachone niya, ‘Weche ma Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto owacho e magi: Jali e ng’at miluongo ni Badyath. Obiro dhi nyime maber, kodongo piyopiyo kama entie, kendo obiro gero Hekalu mar Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Zechariah6:13 Adier, en ema obiro gero Hekalu mar Ruoth Nyasaye. Bende en ema obiro bedo ruoth, kobet e kom duong’, kotiyo piny, ka jodolo konye, kendo kue nobed e kindgi ji ariyogo.’" 
Zechariah6:14 To Heldai gi Tobia gi Jedaya kod Josia wuod Zefania ema nobed karito osimbo kaka rapar e Hekalu mar Ruoth Nyasaye.” 
Zechariah6:15 Ji moa kuonde maboyo nobi mondo okony tich gero Hekalu mar Ruoth Nyasaye. Kamano unung’e ni Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto ema oseora iru. To mano notimre mana ka uyie winjo wach Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachu. 
Zechariah7:1 Chieng’ due ang’wen, due mar ochiko e higa mar ang’wen mar loch ruoth Darius, wach Ruoth Nyasaye nobiro ni Zekaria." 
Zechariah7:2 Noyudo ka jo-Bethel ooro Sherezer kod Regemelek kaachiel gi ji mamoko mondo okwa gueth kuom Ruoth Nyasaye. 
Zechariah7:3 Ne oorogi mondo gipenj jodolo manie Od Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto kod jonabi niya, “Wasebedo kwaywak kendo watweyo chiemo e due mar abich, kuom higni mang’enygi, to pod onego wamed timo kamano koso?”" 
Zechariah7:4 Eka ne wach Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto obirona kama: 
Zechariah7:5 “Nyis ane ji duto kod jodolo niya, ‘Bende ne umiya duong’ adier, kuom riyo kech mane uriyogo e due mar abich gi mar abiriyo, kuom higni piero abiriyogo?" 
Zechariah7:6 Koso kane uchiemo kendo umetho, to donge ne utimo kamano, mana ni mondo ubedgo mamor un uwegi?’" 
Zechariah7:7 Donge mano e gima namiyo jonabi machon ohulo e kinde mane kue nitie kendo ji opong’o Jerusalem gi mier mane olwore koni gi koni, kaachiel gi piny ma yo milambo kod piny pap?”" 
Zechariah7:8 Ruoth Nyasaye nowacho ni Zekaria kama: 
Zechariah7:9 “An Ruoth Nyasaye ne awacho niya, ‘Ng’aduru bura kare, ka ng’ato ka ng’ato miyo wadgi luor kendo timone ng’wono." 
Zechariah7:10 Kik usand nyithi kiye gi mond liete, gi jopinje mamoko modak kuomu, kod joma odhier, bende kik ng’ato chan timo ni wadgi tim moroo mamono.’" 
Zechariah7:11 To ne gidagi, mi giloko ng’egi ka gidino itgi, mondo mi kik giwinj wachna." 
Zechariah7:12 Bende ne gijiwo chunygi mobedo matek ka kidi, mi gitamore winjo puonj kod weche duto mane Roho mara miyo jonabi machon puonjogi. Kuom mano an Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto nakumogi gi mirimba." 
Zechariah7:13 Ne awacho niya, ‘Kaka ne gidagi winja ka aluongogi, e kaka ne adagi winjogi ka giluonga," 
Zechariah7:14 mi ariembogi kakeyogi e kind ogendini ma ok ging’eyo, ka giweyo pinygi kokethore, ma onge ng’ama luwo.’ Kamano ne gimiyo pinygi maberno olokore thim.”" 
Zechariah8:1 Wach Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto nobirona niya," 
Zechariah8:2 “Magi e weche Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto: Hera malich ma aseherogo Sayun osemiyo abedo gi mirima. Adier, hera maherego osemiya mirima mager." 
Zechariah8:3 Koro an Ruoth Nyasaye awacho ni aseduogo Sayun kendo abiro dak Jerusalem. Jerusalem ibiro luongo ni, ‘Dala ma Adiera Nitie’, kendo god Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto noluong ni, ‘Got Maler’." 
Zechariah8:4 Bende an Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto awacho ni, Jodongo kod mon moti biro chako bet e wang’yore mag Jerusalem kendo, ka moro ka moro sirore gi luth nikech hike oniang’ ahinya." 
Zechariah8:5 Bende yawuowi gi nyiri nopong’ wang’yore mag dala ka tugo. 
Zechariah8:6 “An Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto, awacho kama: Kata kapo ni gima kamano nenore ni joma odong’ e ogandani ka gima ok nyal timore, koro an bende nonenrena kamano?" 
Zechariah8:7 Winjuru! Abiro reso joga kagolo e pinje ma yo wuokchieng’ gi ma yo podho chieng’," 
Zechariah8:8 mi adwokgi Jerusalem mondo gidagie. Ginibed joga kendo anabed Nyasachgi, kuom adiera kod tim makare.”" 
Zechariah8:9 Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto wacho kama: “Beduru gi chir, un joma ndaloni weche ma jonabi osebedo kawacho, chakre chieng’ mane iketoe mise mar Hekalu mara, mondo ochak oger kendo." 
Zechariah8:10 To kane pok kindeno ochopo, ji kata jamni ne ok ti tich michulo, kendo kane ng’ato owuok dhi e tije, to ok ong’ere kata ka doduogi, nikech wasigu ne ng’eny. Bende ne athuwo ng’ato ka ng’ato gi wadgi." 
Zechariah8:11 To koro ok abi timo ni joma odong’ e ogandani kaka natimo e kinde mokadho. An Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto ema awacho kamano. 
Zechariah8:12 Ginichwo kodhi ka gin gi kue, mi mzabibu nonyag olembe, kendo lowo nochieg cham. Koth bende nochuenigi maber, kendo anaguedh joma odong’ kuom jogagi gi gigo duto." 
Zechariah8:13 Un jo-Juda kod jo-Israel, usebedo ranyisi malong’o ni ogendini mamoko duto kuom gima timore ni joma akuong’o, to koro abiro resou, mi ubed ranyisi mar gima timore ni joma aguedho. Kuom mano kik ubed maluor, to beduru gi chir.”" 
Zechariah8:14 Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto owacho niya, “Kaka ne awacho ni abiro tiekou, nikech kwereu nomiya mirima, mi ok aloko parona," 
Zechariah8:15 e kaka asechano mondo aguedh Jerusalem kod jo-Juda: omiyo kik ubed maluor. 
Zechariah8:16 To gik ma onego utim e magi: Ng’ato ka ng’ato nyaka wach mana adiera kende ni wadgi, kendo nyaka uyal bura kare, kendo gi adiera, mondo kue obedie." 
Zechariah8:17 Kik ng’ato chan timo gima mono ni wadgi, kendo kik ukuong’ru gi miriambo, nikech amon gi gik ma kamago duto. An Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto ema awacho kamano.”" 
Zechariah8:18 Wach Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto nobirona niya," 
Zechariah8:19 “Kinde mag riyo kech e due mar ang’wen gi mar abich gi mar abiriyo kod mar apar biro lokore sewni mag mor gi ilo ni jo-Juda. Omiyo beduru gi adiera kod kue.” 
Zechariah8:20 Bende magi e weche Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto: “Kinde biro chopo ma ogendini madongo moa e pinje marateke kendo e mier madongo nobi Jerusalem. 
Zechariah8:21 Joma odak e dala moro nodhi ir joma odak e dala machielo, mi wachnigi niya, ‘Wadhiuru ir Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto mondo walame, kendo wakwaye mondo oguedhwa.’" 
Zechariah8:22 Kamano ogendini madongo kod ji marateke nobi Jerusalem mondo olam Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto kendo okwaye mondo oguedhgi.” 
Zechariah8:23 Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto wacho niya, “E kindego ji apar moa e ogendini mamoko, mawacho dhok mopogore opogore, nobi ir ja-Yahudi, mi mak riak lawe, ka wachone niya, ‘Wadwaro dhi kodi, nimar wasewinjo ni Nyasaye ni kodi.’ ”" 
Zechariah9:1 Wach moa kuom Ruoth Nyasayee ema: Ruoth Nyasaye osechano kumo piny Hadrak, kod dala mar Damaski. Piny duto en mar Ruoth Nyasaye, mana kaka dhout Israel bende mage." 
Zechariah9:2 Dala mar Hamath, mokiewo gi Hadrak bende mare, kaachiel gi mier ma Turo gi Sidon, kata obedo ni joma odak kuondego riek kamano," 
Zechariah9:3 Jo-Turom osegero ohinga ma gigeng’orego, kendo gisedhuro fedha gi dhahabu mana ka lowo." 
Zechariah9:4 To Ruoth Nyasaye biro mayogi mwandugi duto, mi wit e nam. Dala hie to mach biro wang’o, mi rum pep." 
Zechariah9:5 Ka dala Ashkelon oneno kamano, to biro bedo maluor. Gaza bende kihondko biro mako, mi geno mane Ekron nigo rum. Ruodhi mag Gaza biro lal nono, bende Ashkelon nodong’ nono maonge ji modakie," 
Zechariah9:6 kendo ji ma anywola ema nobed kodak Ashdod. Ruoth Nyasaye wacho niya, “Anaketh sunga ma jo-Filistia sungorego," 
Zechariah9:7 mi ok ginichak gicham ring’o man gi remo, kata chamo chiemo moko makuero. Jogi motony nobed joga, mi lokre achiel kuom dhout Juda. Jo-Ekron bende nolokre joga kaka ne jo-Jebus olokore." 
Zechariah9:8 “Anachung’ e pinya ka jarito, mondo ng’ato kik donji kata wuogi, mi wasigu ok nochak olo joga nimar aseneno thagruokgi gi wang’a.”" 
Zechariah9:9 Un jo-Sayun, beduru mamor! Koguru matek, yaye jo-Jerusalem, nimar ruodhu biro iru, kolocho. Obiro komuol, kendo koidho kanyna. Chutho oidho kanyna matin. Adier, en mana nyathi kanyna." 
Zechariah9:10 Ruoth Nyasaye wacho niya, “Abiro golo geche mag lweny oa e piny Israel, kendo abiro tieko farese mag lweny man Jerusalem. Bende atunge mag jolweny biro rumo. Ruodhno nokel kue ni ogendini duto, kendo lochne noyarre, koa e nam man yo imbo nyaka nam man yo wuok chieng’, bende koa e aora Yufrate nyaka tung’ piny koni gi koni." 
Zechariah9:11 “To un, abiro duoko jou motue, ka agolo e bur motwo maonge pi, nikech singruok mane utimo koda gi remb misango." 
Zechariah9:12 Un joma otue ma koro nigi geno, duoguru e dalau mochiel motegno. Ahulo ni abiro guedhou nyadiriyo kuom sand mane osandugo." 
Zechariah9:13 Aseloko Juda atung’ kendo asetimo Israel asere. Asekawo yawuoti yaye Sayun, mi aloko ligangla ma akedogo gi jo-Yunani.”" 
Zechariah9:14 Ruoth Nyasaye biro thinyore ewi joge malo, kendo obiro chielo asere mage ka mil polo. Obiro goyo tung’, mi odhi gi ahiti moa milambo." 
Zechariah9:15 Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto ema nobed okumbagi mi ginilo lweny ka ginyono kite mag orujre piny. Ginigo koko ka joma omer, mi ginineg ji, mi rembgi chuer mana ka remb misango miolo gi tawo e tunge mag kendo-mar-misango." 
Zechariah9:16 Kamano Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasachgi nores joge chieng’no mana kaka jakwath reso jambe, kendo enoketgi e pinye mana ka kite ma nengogi tek miketo e osimbo mar duong mondo omil." 
Zechariah9:17 Mano kaka gin gi mwandu mogundho kod mor maduong’! Cham gi divai biro miyo yawuotgi gi nyigi bed gi del mabeyo. 
Zechariah10:1 Kwauru Ruoth Nyasaye koth e kinde mowinjore, nimar en ema okelo boche polo morweyo, eka koth chue mi dhano gi le yud chiemo." 
Zechariah10:2 Nyiseche manono wacho weche maonge tiendgi, kende ajuoke neno ranyisi mag miriambo. Gileko lek ma ok adiera, kendo giwacho weche mawito ji. Mano emomiyo ji bayo abaya ka rombe, kendo githagore nikech gionge jakwath." 
Zechariah10:3 Ruoth Nyasaye wacho niya, “Mirima omaka gi jotend joga, omiyo abiro kumogi. To an Ruoth Nyasaye abiro konyo jo-Juda, ma akwano ka jamba, mi ami gibed marateke ka farese mag lweny." 
Zechariah10:4 Bende ginibed motegno ka kite moriwo kor ot, kendo ka loye migurogo hema. Ginichal gi atung’ moywa mochiek ni lweny, kendo kuomgi ema jotend lweny duto nowuogie." 
Zechariah10:5 Ginibed ka jolweny marateke ma nyono wasikgi ka chuodho, kendo ginikedi nikech an Ruoth Nyasaye an kodgi, bende ginilo kata mana joidh farese, mi gikuod wigi." 
Zechariah10:6 Abiro miyo jo-Juda bed marateke, kendo abiro miyo jo-Israel locho. Bende anachak aguedhgi, nikech asekechogi, mi ginichal ka gima ne ok ajwang’ogi, nikech an Ruoth Nyasachgi, kendo abiro dwoko kwayogi." 
Zechariah10:7 Jo-Israel nochal gi jolweny marateke, bende ginibed moil ka joma ometho. Nyithindgi none kamano, mi bed mamor, kendo ginipak Ruoth Nyasaye gi ilo." 
Zechariah10:8 “Abiro luongogi gi liyo mondo achokgi, mi ginibed mang’eny mana kaka ne gin chon." 
Zechariah10:9 Kata obedo ni nakeyogi e kind ogendini man maboyo kamano, to ginipara, mi gipidh nyithindgi kuondego. Bang’e giniduogi." 
Zechariah10:10 Anagolgi Misri gi Asuria, kakelogi dala, bende anakelgi e piny Gilead gi piny Lebanon, nyaka chop piny pong’ thich." 
Zechariah10:11 Ka ging’ado nam Misri, to apaka nokue. Adier, kuonde matut duto mag aora Nael noduon. Sunga ma jo-Asuria sungorego nodwok piny, kendo loch mar Misri norum." 
Zechariah10:12 To an Ruoth Nyasaye ema nami jo-Israel teko, mi ginipaka ka gimiyo nyinga duong’. An Ruoth Nyasaye ema awacho kamano.”" 
Zechariah11:1 A Lebanon, yaw dhorangeyeni, mondo mach owang’ yiendi mabeyo mag sida!" 
Zechariah11:2 Ywaguru un yien duto, nimar yiend sida osepodho. Adier, yien madongo osekethi. Un yiend Bashan, ywaguru, nimar bungu ma yien odichie osebeti." 
Zechariah11:3 Winjuru kaka jotelo ywak ka chunygi lit, nimar duong’ ma yande gin-go olal nono. Adier, winjuru kaka giywak ka sibuoche maruto nimar bung Jordan ma gidakie osekethi." 
Zechariah11:4 Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasacha nowachona niya, “Bed jakwadh rombe ma ibiro yang’o," 
Zechariah11:5 nikech jokwadhgi giwegi ok dewgi. Joma ng’iewogi bende negogi, to ok yud kum. Giloko ringgi pesa, kendo giwacho niya, ‘Opak Ruoth, nikech waseyudo mwandu!’ ”" 
Zechariah11:6 Ruoth Nyasaye nomedo wacho niya, “Ok anakech joma odak e pinyni, to abiro keto ng’ato ka ng’ato e lwet jatende kendo e lwet ruodhe, mi jotelogo noketh piny, to ok anares ji e lwetgi.”" 
Zechariah11:7 Kuom mano ne adoko jakwadh rombe miyang’o, ka atiyo ni joohand rombe. Bang’e ne akawo ludhe ariyo, mi achako achiel ni, ‘Ng’wono’, to machielo ne achako ni, ‘Riwruok’. Kamano ne abedo jakwadh rombe." 
Zechariah11:8 Kane pok due achiel orumo, ne ariembo jokwath adek nikech ne gijoga, kendo gin bende chunygi nosin koda." 
Zechariah11:9 Bang’e ne awacho ni rombe niya, “Ok abi medo bedo jakwadhu kendo. Mago kuomu matho, to otho athoya, kendo mago madwaro lal, olal alala, to mago modong’, moro ka moro oneg wadgi.”" 
Zechariah11:10 Eka ne akawo ludha miluongo ni Ng’wono, mi aturo, ka anyisogo ni singruok mane Ruoth Nyasaye otimo gi ogendini duto okethi." 
Zechariah11:11 Kamano singruok ne okethi chieng’no, kendo joohand rombe mane ranga nong’eyo ni en wach Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Zechariah11:12 Ne awachonigi niya, “Ka uyie to miyauru pokna. To ka ok kamano, to bedgouru.” Kuom mano ne gichula pokna moromo shekel piero adek mag fedha." 
Zechariah11:13 Bang’e Ruoth Nyasaye nowachona niya, “Ket pesago kar keno mar Hekalu.” Omiyo ne akawo shekel piero adek mag fedhago, mane giparo ni ema oroma, mi aketo kar keno mar Hekalu mar Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Zechariah11:14 Bang’ mano ne aturo luth machielo miluongo ni Riwruok, ka anyisogo ni aketho riwruok manie kind jo-Juda gi jo-Israel." 
Zechariah11:15 Ruoth Nyasaye nowachona kendo niya, “Kaw gigi, ichak iwuondri ni in jakwath, to bed jakwath manono," 
Zechariah11:16 kaka ranyisi ni abiro keto jakwath e piny ma ok rang rombe matho, kata ok many molal, kata ok thiedh matuo, bende ma ok kwa mago mangima, to chamo mana mago machue, kendo mwodo koda ka orengegi." 
Zechariah11:17 Masira ochomo jakwath manono ma jwang’o rombeno! Ligangla biro lwar e bade kendo e wang’e ma korachwich, mi bade tal, kendo wang’e ma korachwich nokethre chuth.”" 
Zechariah12:1 Ma en wach Ruoth Nyasaye kuom Israel: Ruoth Nyasaye mane oyaro polo, kendo oketo mise mar piny, mi omiyo dhano much ngima wacho kama:" 
Zechariah12:2 “Anami Jerusalem chal gi agwata mar kong’o, ma ogendini mokiewo kode biro madho, mi kwang’ ka joma omer. Ka ogendinigo goyo ni Jerusalem ageng’a, to miech Juda bende giniluor." 
Zechariah12:3 Chieng’no ka ogendini duto mag piny ochokore mondo omonj Jerusalem, to naloke obed mapek ka kidi, ma onge ng’ama nyalo ting’o, kendo ogendini duto motemo ting’e, nohinyre marach." 
Zechariah12:4 “An Ruoth Nyasaye awacho niya, chieng’no anago farese duto gi kihondko, mi ami joma idhogi lokre joneko. Anarit jo-Juda, to farese mag ogendini mamokogo analok muofni," 
Zechariah12:5 mi dhout Juda nowach kendgi niya, ‘Joma odak Jerusalem yudo teko kuom Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto ma Nyasachgi.’" 
Zechariah12:6 “E kindeno anami dhout Juda bed ka mach manie bungu kata manie puoth tiang’. Ginitiek ogendini duto mokiewo kodgi koni gi koni. Jo-Jerusalem to nodag gi kue e dalagi. 
Zechariah12:7 An Ruoth Nyasaye nakuong miyo dhoudi duto mag Juda locho, mondo duong’ mar dhood Daudi kod jo-Jerusalem kik lo duong’ ma jo-Juda mamoko nigo." 
Zechariah12:8 “Chieng’no an Ruoth Nyasaye nabed okumba ni jo-Jerusalem, mi kata mana ng’ama yomyomie moloyo kuomgi nobed motegno ka Daudi, kendo joka Daudi nobed jotend ji mana kaka Nyasaye kata malaika mare." 
Zechariah12:9 Bende anatiek ogendini duto mabiro mondo omonj Jerusalem. 
Zechariah12:10 Anami joka Daudi gi jo-Jerusalem chuny mang’won, kendo mohero lemo. Eka bange giniteg wang’gi kuom jal mane gichwowo, mi otho, kendo giniywage mana ka joma ywago nyathi ma miderma. Adier, giniywag malit mana ka joma ywago wuodgi makayo." 
Zechariah12:11 “E kindeno ywak nobed malich Jerusalem mana ka ywak mane oywaggo Hadad-rimon e paw Megido. 
Zechariah12:12 Dhoudi duto ma e piny noywagi kar kendgi, ka mondgi bende ywak kar kendgi. Joka Nathan" 
Zechariah12:13 gi joka Lawi kod joka Shimei bende noywag kamano ka mondgi bende ywak kar kendgi. 
Zechariah12:14 Dhoudi mamoko duto bende noywagi kar kendgi, ka mondgi bende ywak kar kendgi.”" 
Zechariah13:1 Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto wacho niya, “Ka ndalogo ochopo, to soko noyawre ni nyikwa Daudi kod jo-Jerusalem mondo opwodhgo richogi gi timbegi makuero." 
Zechariah13:2 E kindeno, anaruch nying nyiseche manono e piny, mi ok nochak opargi kendo. Bende anatiek jokor wach kod chuny magombo timo timbe makuero." 
Zechariah13:3 Bang’ mano, ka ng’ato pod nodhi adhiya nyime gi koro wach, to wuon gi min nowachne niya, ‘Ok inichak ibed mangima kendo, nimar isewacho miriambo e nying Ruoth Nyasaye.’ Kamano wuon gi min nochwowe gi tong’, mi nege, kokoro wach." 
Zechariah13:4 Ndalogo jokor wach duto wigi nokuodi gi fweny ma gineno, bende ok ginirwak lewni motimo yier ma jokor wach rwako, mondo giwuondgo ji," 
Zechariah13:5 to moro ka moro nowach niya, ‘Ok an jakor wach, to an mana japur, kendo asebedo kayudo chiemba e lowo chakre tinna.’" 
Zechariah13:6 To ka ng’ato openje ni, ‘Mbelni manie korigi to manade?’ To enodwok niya, ‘Ne ayudogi e od osiepna.’ ”" 
Zechariah13:7 Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto owacho niya, “In ligangla, a malo mondo ichadh jakwadha! Ee, chadh ng’at matiyona. Chutho, neg jakwath mondo rombe oke, nimar abiro kumo joga moyomno.”" 
Zechariah13:8 An Ruoth Nyasaye awacho kama: “Mano biro timore e piny duto, mi ariyo kuom adek ibiro negi, to achiel kuom adek nowe ka ngima." 
Zechariah13:9 Bang’e anaket achiel kuom adek nogono e mach mondo opwodhgi maler mana kaka ipwodho fedha. Adier, natemgi mana kaka itemo dhahabu. Bang’e ginilama, mi anadwok kwayogi, an awuon. Anawachnigi ni gin joga. Gin to giniwach ni an Nyasachgi.”" 
Zechariah14:1 Winjuru! Odiechieng’ Ruoth Nyasaye sudo machiegni, ma mwandu Jerusalem noyakie, mi pog mana e wang’u kuneno." 
Zechariah14:2 Enochok ogendini duto mondo oked gi Jerusalem, kendo dalano nokaw, mi mwandu manie udi noyaki, bende mon nomak gi thwon. Bath dala konchiel noter e tuech, to bathe komachielo nowe mana kanyo." 
Zechariah14:3 Eka Ruoth Nyasaye nowuogi mi ked gi ogendinigo mana ka gima okedo e paw lweny. 
Zechariah14:4 Chieng’no enochung’ e got Zeituni, ma omanyore gi Jerusalem yo wuok chieng’, kendo godno nobarre mi hoho maduong’, mochakore yo wuok chieng’ nyaka podho chieng’, poge ariyo. Bath got konchiel nodog yo nyandwat to bathe komachielo nodog yo milambo." 
Zechariah14:5 Unutony kuluwo hohono, nimar enochwe nyaka dhoranga dala. Adier, unutony kaka jou notony higni mang’eny mokadho, ka giringo yiengni piny mane otimore e ndalo Uzia ruodh Juda. Bang’e Ruoth Nyasaye ma Nyasacha nobi kaachiel gi malaika mage duto." 
Zechariah14:6 Chakre chieng’no koyo gi pe ok nobedie. 
Zechariah14:7 Otieno bende ok nobedie, to piny nosik mana odiechieng’ lilo, kendo kata ka piny olokore odhiambo to ler nosik asika. Ruoth Nyasaye kende ema ong’eyo ndalo ma gigo biro timoree." 
Zechariah14:8 Chakre chieng’no, pi maliw nomol kawuok Jerusalem. Moko nochik Nam Kado, man yo wuok chieng’ to moko nochik Nam Mediterenia, man yo podho chieng’. Enosik komol e ndalo chwiri kendo e ndalo oro mana machalre." 
Zechariah14:9 Chakre chieng’no, Ruoth Nyasaye nobed ruodh piny ngima, kendo ji duto nolame ka Nyasachgi, mi ng’eye gi nyinge achiel ma Ruoth Nyasaye." 
Zechariah14:10 Piny duto mokiewo gi Jerusalem nobed mopie ka pap, chakre Geba, kochomo milambo nyaka Rimon. Jerusalem to nosik koting’ore ating’a kama entie, chakre dhorangach miluongo ni Dhoranga Benjamin, nyaka dhorangach man yo kama ohinga ogomogo, kendo chakre kama oger mabor mar ng’icho mar Hananel nyaka kuonde mibiyoe mzabip ruoth. (Kuma ohinga ogomogo, chon ne nitie dhorangach moro.)" 
Zechariah14:11 Ji nodag Jerusalem gi kue, ka onge ng’ama bwogogi ni ibiro kuong’ dalagi mondo okethi." 
Zechariah14:12 Ruoth Nyasaye nogo ogendini duto mane okedo gi Jerusalem gi tho marach. Thono nochal kama: Ringregi notow mana ka gichung’ gi tiendgi, kendo wengegi notow mana e wigi, to lewgi bende notow mana e dhogi." 
Zechariah14:13 Chieng’no Ruoth Nyasaye nogogi gi kihondko malich, kendo ng’ato ka ng’ato nomak wadgi mondo ogorego." 
Zechariah14:14 Jo-Juda bende nokony jo-Jerusalem e lweny kendo giniyak mwandu mag ogendini mokiewo kodgi, kaka fedha gi dhahabu kod lewni mogundho." 
Zechariah14:15 Bende tho machalo gi mano mane ogoyo jogo nogo farese gi nyumbu gi ngamia kod kenje manie kambi mag wasigu, mi neg pep." 
Zechariah14:16 Bang’ lweny, ji duto motony e ogendini mane omonjo Jerusalemgo nobi higa ka higa mondo olam Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto ka ruodhgi, kendo mondo otim Sap Kiche." 
Zechariah14:17 To ka dhoot moro mar ogendini ma e piny ok odhi Jerusalem mondo olam Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto ka ruodhgi, to koth ok nochue e pinygi." 
Zechariah14:18 Bende ka jo-Misri ok odhi mi ochopo e dalano, to giniyud tuo machal gi mano ma Ruoth Nyasaye biro kelo ni oganda moro amora ma ok odhi mondo otim Sap Kiche." 
Zechariah14:19 Mano e kum ma ibiro kumogo jo-Misri kod ogendini mamoko ma ok odhi Jerusalem mondo otim Sap Kiche. 
Zechariah14:20 Chakre chieng’no, kata mana okode mag farese nogorie weche mawacho niya, ‘Mowal ni Ruoth Nyasaye,’ kendo agulni mitedogo e Hekalu nobed mowal ni tich Ruoth Nyasaye mana ka tewni mitiyogo e kendo-mar-misango." 
Zechariah14:21 Agulni duto manie Jerusalem kod Juda nobed mowal ni tich Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo ji duto matimo misengni nokaw moko mondo ochwakie ring misango. Kamano ka kindeno ochopo, to onge johala moro amora ma nochak oyud e Hekalu mar Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto." 
Malachi1:1 Ma e wach Ruoth Nyasaye mane omiyo Malaki mondo onyis jo-Israel. 
Malachi1:2 Ruoth Nyasaye owacho niya, “Aherou.” To usedwoke kupenje ni, “Ere kaka iherowa?” To Ruoth Nyasaye odwoko ni, “Donge Esau gi Jakobo ne gin owete? Kata kamano ahero Jakobo gi nyikwaye." 
Malachi1:3 Esau gi nyikwaye to asin-go. Aseketho piny gode mag Esau, mi aloko obedo thim ma ondiegi dakie.”" 
Malachi1:4 Ka nyikwa Esau ma jo-Edom owacho ni kata obedo ni miechgi osekethi kamano, to gibiro gerogi kendo, to Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto dwoko niya, “We mondo gigergi, to abiro kethogi kendo, mi ji noluong jogo ni oganda mar kethruok ma Ruoth Nyasaye okechogo nyaka chieng’." 
Malachi1:5 Ubiro neno gigo gi wang’u ka timore, mi unuwach niya, ‘Kara Ruoth Nyasaye nigi teko kata e pinje mamoko ma ok Israel!’ ”" 
Malachi1:6 Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto owacho ni jodolo niya, “Wuowi nyaka mi wuon luor, kendo jatich bende nyaka luor ng’at ma otiyone. To an dak umiya duong’, to an wuonu? Koso dak umiya luor, to an ema utiyona? Usejara, to eka upenja ni, ‘Ere kaka wasejari?’" 
Malachi1:7 Usejara kuom chiwo chiemo ma chik ok oyiego e kendona mar misango, to eka upenja ni ere kaka ok usemiya luor! To usejara kuchayo kendona mar misango." 
Malachi1:8 Uparo ni en gima kare ka ukelo chiayo ma muofu kata mong’ol kata matuo mondo utimnago misango? To ka da bed ni uchiwo chiayo ma kamano ni ruodhu, bende da obedo mamor kodu, koso da orwakou?" 
Malachi1:9 Koro sani un jodolo, kapo ni utemo ni ukwayo Nyasaye mondo okonyu, to ok nowinj kwayou, kendo mano en kethou.”" 
Malachi1:10 Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto owacho niya, “Da obedo maber ka ng’at achiel kuomu oloro dhorangeye mag laru mar Hekalu, mondo kik umok mach e kendona mar misango kayiem nono. Ok amor kodu, kendo ok nayie misengni muchiwona." 
Malachi1:11 Ji manie tung’ piny koni gi koni miyo nyinga duong’. Giwang’ona ubani mang’ue ng’ar kuonde duto, kendo gichiwona misengni ma ayiego. Giduto gimiyo nyinga duong’." 
Malachi1:12 To uchaya, kuparo ni kendona mar misango en kama odwanyore, ma unyalo chiwoe chiemo moro amora." 
Malachi1:13 Uwacho niya, ‘Mano kaka waol gi gik makamagi!’ Kendo utwenyona umu. To bende uchiwona jamni mokwal kata mong’ol kata matuo mondo otimnago misango. Uparo ni anyalo yie gi chiwo ma kamago?" 
Malachi1:14 Okuong’ ng’at ma jawuond ma timona misango gi chiayo modwanyore kamano mondo ochopgo kuong’ruokne, to oweyo chiache maber e kul. An e ruodh ruodhi, kendo ogendini duto oluora!”" 
Malachi2:1 Un jodolo, Ruoth Nyasaye ochikou kama:" 
Malachi2:2 “Nyaka umi nyinga duong’ kuom gik mutimo. To ka ok uwinjo wachna, kendo ok utimo kaka awacho, to abiro kuong’ou, kendo anakuong’ gik moko duto mabeyo ma uyudo e tich dolo. Ee, abiro kuong’o gigo nikech udagi rito chikna." 
Malachi2:3 Anang’ad bedeu oko kendo anarwadh owuoch jamni mutimogo misengni e pat wengeu, mi nariembu ua e wang’a." 
Malachi2:4 Eka ubiro ng’eyo ni an ema asemiyou chikni, mondo singruok mane atimo gi nyikwa Lawi osik kogurore motegno." 
Malachi2:5 “Kane atimo kodgi singruokna, ne achikogi ngima kod dak maber, mamiyogi mago duto mondo gimiya luor. Kamano ne gimiyo nyinga duong’, kendo giluora." 
Malachi2:6 Ne gipuonjo ji mana weche makare, maonge kata wach achiel mar miganga. Ne gitimo gik makare ma adwaro, kendo ne gikonyo ji mang’eny mondo owe timbe maricho." 
Malachi2:7 En tich jodolo mondo opuonj ji wach mar adiera mar Nyasaye, kendo ji onego odhi irgi mondo opuonjre chik Nyasaye, nikech gin jootena, An Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto." 
Malachi2:8 To un jodolo usebaro, muweyo yo makare. Puonj maru osemiyo ji mang’eny ochwanyore. Bende un jo-Lawi, useketho singruok mane atimo kodu." 
Malachi2:9 Mano emomiyo an bende asemiyo jo-Israel jarou kendo chayou, nikech ok uluw chikena, to bende ka upuonjo ji wachna, to ok utimnigi machalre giduto.”" 
Malachi2:10 Uwacho niya, “Donge waduto wuonwa en achiel? Donge Nyasaye achiel ema ne ochueyowa? Ka kamano, to ere gima omiyo waketho singruok mane Nyasaye otimo gi kwerewa, ka ng’ato ka ng’ato ketho singruok motimo gi wadgi?" 
Malachi2:11 Jo-Juda oseketho singruok mane gitimo ni Nyasaye, kendo gisetimo gik maricho e Israel kendo e Jerusalem. Gisedwanyo Kama Ler mar Ruoth Nyasaye mohero, kendo gisekendo mon malamo nyiseche mamoko." 
Malachi2:12 Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto onego otiek ng’ato ang’ata matimo kamano, kendo ong’ad kare oko chuth kuom oganda joka Jakobo, kendo kuom joma chiwone misengni.”" 
Malachi2:13 To bende uywak kendo udengo, ka ulwoko kendo-mar-misango mar Ruoth Nyasaye gi pi wang’u, nikech Ruoth Nyasaye odagi ng’iyo misengni muchiwone, kata yie kodgi ok oyie." 
Malachi2:14 To eka pod ng’ato ka ng’ato kuomu penjo gimomiyo otimo kamano. Ruoth Nyasaye dwoko ni mano timore nikech uketho singruok mane utimo gi mon mane ukendo ka pod un yawuowi. Ne gin mondeu, to useketho singruok mane utimonigi, kata obedo ni ne usingoru e nyim Nyasaye ni ok unuwegi." 
Malachi2:15 Donge Nyasaye notimou ringruok achiel kendo chuny achiel kodgi? Donge otimo kamano mana ni mondo wabed gi nyithindo maluwo Nyasaye adier? Kuom mano, nyaka uritru mondo kik ng’ato kuomu keth singruok mane otimo ni dhako mane okendo ka en wuowi." 
Malachi2:16 Ruoth Nyasaye Manyaalo Gik Moko Duto ma Nyasach Israel owacho niya, “Amon gi weruok manie kind dhako gi chwore. Ok berna ka ng’ato timo gima rach kamano ni chiege. Emomiyo ritreuru mondo ng’ato ka ng’ato kuomu kik tim gima rach kamano ni chiege.”" 
Malachi2:17 Wecheu osemiyo Ruoth Nyasaye ool. To kupenjo ni ere kaka usemiyo ool, to odwokou niya, “Umiyo aol kuwacho ni Ruoth Nyasaye kwano joma richo ka joma beyo, kendo oherogi. Bende usemiyo aol kupenjo ni, ‘Ere Nyasachwa ma ng’ado bura kare?’ ”" 
Malachi3:1 To Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto dwoko kama: “Abiro oro jaotena otel, mondo olosna yo. Bang’e Ruoth mudwaro nobi apoya e Hekalu mare, kendo jaote mudwaro nenono nobi, mi nohul weche mag singruokna." 
Malachi3:2 To chieng’ mobiroeno, ere ng’ama nosir? Koso chieng’ ma othinyoree, ere ng’ama noting’ wiye? Enochal gi mach malenyo mula mondo obed maler, kendo enochal sabun ma luoko maler." 
Malachi3:3 Enobi mondo ong’ad bura mana ka ng’at malenyo fedha obed maler. Enopwodh jodolo maler mana kaka ipwodho fedha gi dhahabu. Bang’e ginitim ni Ruoth Nyasaye misengni makare. 
Malachi3:4 Eka Ruoth Nyasaye nobed mamor gi misengni ma jo-Juda gi jo-Jerusalem kelone, kaka ne omor kodgi chon.”" 
Malachi3:5 Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto owacho niya, “Abiro ng’adonu bura, kendo bedo janeno kuomu piyo piyo, ka ayalo ajuoke gi joma terore gi joma kuong’ore kayiem gi joma wuondo jotichgi e yor misara, kod joma ok oluora, ma timo marach ni mond liete gi nyithi kiye kod jopinje mamoko modak kuomu.”" 
Malachi3:6 Ruoth Nyasaye omedo wacho niya, “An Ruoth Nyasaye, kendo ok alokra. Mano emomiyo un nyikwa Jakobo pok urumo chuth." 
Malachi3:7 Useweyo chikena, mi ok urito, mana kaka kwereu noweyo. To koro ka uduogo ira, to an bende abiro duogo iru. Ka upenjoru niya, ‘Ang’o ma onego watim mondo wadog ire?" 
Malachi3:8 Dhano bende nyalo mayo Nyasaye gire koso?’ To adwokou niya, ‘Umaya adier!’ To ka upenja niya, ere kaka umaya? To adwokou niya, ‘Usemaya kuom dagi miya chiwo mar achiel kuom apar kod mag misengni kaka chik dwaro.’" 
Malachi3:9 Omiyo okuong’u uduto, nimar oganda duto osemaya giga." 
Malachi3:10 Keluru achiel kuom apar mag giu duto kar keno mar Hekalu, mondo chiemo obed e oda. Temieuru timo kamano ane, ka ok nayaw dirise mag polo, kendo amiu gik mabeyo mogundho, ma onge kama ikete." 
Malachi3:11 Ok nawe kute keth chambu, kendo yiendu mag mzabibu nonyag olembe mang’eny." 
Malachi3:12 Bang’e ogendini duto noluongu ni johawi, nikech pinyu nobed kama ber dakie.”" 
Malachi3:13 Ruoth Nyasaye owacho kendo niya, “Usewacho weche mag wich teko kuoma. To eka pod upenja niya, ‘Ang’o marach mwasewacho kuomi?’" 
Malachi3:14 Bende usewacho ni, ‘Tiyo ni Nyasaye onge gi tiende. Ere tiend timo gima Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto owacho, kata ywagruok e nyime, kwanyise ni wayie kethowa?" 
Malachi3:15 Waneno ka joma josunga ema nigi mor. Joma timbegi richo dhi maber ahinya, to bende gitemo Nyasaye gi timbegi marichogo, to onge gima timogi.’ ”" 
Malachi3:16 Kane joma oluoro Ruoth Nyasaye owinjo wechego, ne giwuoyo e kindgi giwegi, kendo Ruoth Nyasaye nowinjo wechegi. Nying joma oluoro Ruoth Nyasaye kendo mamiye duong’ ne ondik e kitabu moro e nyime." 
Malachi3:17 Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto owacho niya, “Chieng’ ma ang’adoe bura, to ginibed joga awuon kendo ginibed mwanduna. Anabednigi mang’won mana kaka wuoro bedo mang’won ni wuode moluore." 
Malachi3:18 Bang’ mano unune pogruok manie kind joma richo, kendo e kind joma tiyona gi joma ok tina.”" 
Malachi4:1 Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Duto owacho niya, “Winjuru, ndalo biro ma josunga gi joma richo duto nowang’ie ka tiang’. Chieng’no giniwang’ adier, kendo onge gima nodong’ kuomgi." 
Malachi4:2 To un joma oluoro nyinga tekona nopilre kuomu ka wang’chieng’ ma kelo ler, mi noresu, kendo ler mare nobed gima changou. Unubed joma ni thuolo kendo mail ka nyiroye moyawnigi abila." 
Malachi4:3 Chieng’ ma ang’adoe bura, unulo joma timbegi richo, kendo ginichalnu ka buru munyono." 
Malachi4:4 “Paruru puonj mag Musa jatichna gi chike mane amiye e got Horeb, ni mondo jo-Israel duto oluw." 
Malachi4:5 “To ka pok chieng’ maduong’ kendo malich mar Ruoth Nyasaye ochopo, abiro oro Elija janabi," 
Malachi4:6 mondo ochak okel winjruok e kind wuone gi nyithindo, nono to abiro, mi aketho pinyu chuth!”" 
Matthew1:5 to Salmon nonywolo Boaz gi chiege ma Rahab. Boaz nonywolo Obed gi chiege ma Ruth, to Obed nonywolo Jesse." 
Matthew24:15 “Ka uneno Gima Kuero Makelo Kethruok, mane janabi Daniel owuoyo kuome, kochung’ e Hekalu," 
Luke3:25 wuod Matathia, wuod Amos, wuod Nahum, wuod Esli, wuod Nagai," 
Luke3:25 wuod Matathia, wuod Amos, wuod Nahum, wuod Esli, wuod Nagai," 
Luke3:29 wuod Joshua, wuod Eliezer, wuod Jorim, wuod Mathat, wuod Lawi," 
Acts2:16 To ma e gima janabi Joel nowuoyo kuome ni," 
Acts5:39 To ka gia kuom Nyasaye, to ok unyal loyogi, kata da utim ang’o, to duyud mana ni ukedo gi Nyasaye!” Jobura noyie gi wachne." 
Acts7:45 Bang’e achien, kwerewa ne oyudo hemano kuom wuonegi. Ne giting’e ka gidhi gi Joshua, mi gikawo piny ogendini mane Nyasaye oseriembo mondo owenigi thuolo. Hema nobedo kuno nyaka ndalo Daudi." 
Acts23:26 “Kuom ruoth moluor Feliks, Amosi ahinya." 
Romans9:25 Mano oluwore gi gima Nyasaye owacho e kitap Hosea niya, “Ji mane ok joga, analuong ni joga. Adier, oganda mane ok ahero, analuong ni joma ahero," 
Colossians4:11 Joshua ma bende iluongo ni Justo, bende ooronu mos. Ji adekgo e jo-Yahudi kende moyie kuom Kristo, ma atiyogo ni Loch Nyasaye, kendo gisekonya ahinya." 
Colossians4:18 An Paulo andiko mosni gi lweta awuon niya, “Amosou to paruru nyororo motueyago. Ng’wono mar Nyasaye obed kodu.”" 
Hebrews4:8 Ka dine bed ni Joshua osemiyogi kar yueyo, to Nyasaye ok dochako owuoyo kuom kinde machielo."
